Genesis1:1 Etohopʼre Isor do ot ar sermae sirjạukeda. 
Genesis1:2 Unre dhạrti do nonkan muṭhạn bae ńamakatʼ tahẽkana, onare jiwiyanakʼ mente jãhãnakʼ cetʼge baṅ tahẽkana; ar ńut do athantar dakʼ cetanre tahẽkana. Ar Isorren Jiu do ona dakʼ cetanreye manḍrao baṛaekan tahẽkana." 
Genesis1:3 Isore menkeda, “Marsal hoyokʼma.” Ado marsal hoyena. Uni do onae ńelkeda ar ạḍi mońjge hoyakana. Uni do ńut khon marsale begarketʼte ona reakʼ ńutum do siń ar ńut reakʼ ńutum do ńindại dohokeda. Nonkate setakʼena ar ạyupʼena ar ona do pạhil din hoyena." 
Genesis1:4  
Genesis1:5  
Genesis1:6 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Dakʼ talare mitʼṭecʼ phaelao jaega sirjạukʼma, ar dakʼ do bar hạṭińokʼma.”" 
Genesis1:7 Nonkate Isor do dakʼ talare mitʼṭecʼ phaelao jaegae sirjạukeda ar cetan ar latar reakʼ dakʼe begarkeda. Onate cetan ar latar reakʼ dakʼ do begarena. 
Genesis1:8 Isor okaṭakʼ phaelao jaegae sirjạuketʼ ona reakʼ ńutum do sermae dohokeda. Nonkate ạyupʼena ar setakʼena ar ona do dosar din hoyena. 
Genesis1:9 Noa tayom Isore menkeda, “Serma latar reakʼ sanam dakʼko mitʼ jaegare jarwakʼma ar rohoṛ jaega ńelokʼma.” Ar onkage hoyena." 
Genesis1:10 Isor do ona rohoṛ jaega reakʼ ńutum do ote dohokeda, ar jarwa akan dakʼ do jalapuriye metatʼa. Isore ńelkeda ona do ạḍi mońjge hoyakana." 
Genesis1:11 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Ot cetanre ghãsko janamokʼma; ar nonkan aṛakʼ sakam ar dareko hoyokʼma ar onako reakʼ itạko tahenma. Ot cetanre eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jo dareko janamokʼma ar onako hõ jo bahakʼma; ar onako reakʼ itạko tahenma.” Ar onkage hoyena." 
Genesis1:12 Ot reakʼ ghãsko, ar itạ menakʼ nonkan sanam lekan anaj ar aṛakʼ sakamko, baha dareko ar sanam lekan jo dareko janamokʼma; ar onako reakʼ itạko hõ tahenma. Isore ńelkeda ona do ạḍi mońjge hoyakana." 
Genesis1:13 Nonkage ạyupʼena ar setakʼena, ar ona do tesarakʼ din hoyena." 
Genesis1:14 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Sermare marsalakʼko hoyokʼma, ar onako do ńindạ khon sińe begarma. Onako do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dinko, candoko ar bochorko reakʼ cinhạko tahenma." 
Genesis1:15 Ar onako do serma khon dhạrtite marsalokʼma.” Ar onkage hoyena. 
Genesis1:16 Isor do barea maraṅ marsale benaokeda. Onakin modre maraṅakʼ do siń cetanre ar huḍińakʼ do ńindạ cetanre rajokʼ lạgitʼe benaokeda. Ona chaḍa uni do ipilko hõe benaoketʼkoa. 
Genesis1:17 Uni do sermare onkoe dohoketʼkoa jemon dhạrti cetanre marsalko emokʼte," 
Genesis1:18 siń ar ńindạ cetanreko rajokʼ ar ńut khon marsalko begar. Isore ńelkeda ona hõ ạḍi mońjge hoyakana. 
Genesis1:19 Ado ạyupʼena ar setakʼena, ar ona do ponakʼ din hoyena." 
Genesis1:20 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Dakʼko do sanam lekan jiwiyankote perejokʼma, ar ot cetanre ar serma latarre cẽṛẽkoko uḍạu baṛaema.”" 
Genesis1:21 Nonkate Isor do jalapuriren maraṅ maraṅ jiwiyanko ar dakʼre jhake jhak aema lekan jiwiyankoe sirjạuketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa aema lekan cẽṛẽko hõe sirjạuketʼkoa. Ar apan ạpin jạtrenko lekate bạḍokʼ reakʼ daṛe hõe danatʼkoa. Isore ńelkeda ona do ạḍi mońjge hoyakana. 
Genesis1:22 Isor do onko sanamko bhoratʼkoteye menkeda, “Saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛete perejokʼpe ar apeakʼ lekhako ḍhertape, ar jalapuri reakʼ dakʼko perejpe. Ar coṭren cẽṛẽko hõ apan ạpin jạtrenko leka lekha ḍherokʼ takoma”" 
Genesis1:23 Ado ạyupʼena ar setakʼena, ar ona do mõṛẽakʼ din hoyena." 
Genesis1:24 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Ot khon nonkan jiwiyankoko janamokʼma ar jemon onko do apan ạpin jạtrenko leka saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛe tahentakoma. Onko modre ạsul janwarko, bir janwarko ar sanam lekan leńokʼ ṭundạṅkan jiwiyanko hõko tahenma.” Ar onkage hoyena." 
Genesis1:25 Isor do dhạrtiren sanam lekan bir janwarko, ạsul janwarko ar sanam lekan leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅkan jiwiyankoe benaoketʼkoa. Noko sanamkoge apan ạpin jạtrenko lekate saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛeye ematʼkoa. Isore ńelkeda ona do ạḍi mońjge hoyakana." 
Genesis1:26 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do abo leka ar abo sãote jurikʼ leka manwa bon benaokoma. Onko do jalapuriren hakoko, coṭren cẽṛẽko, otren janwarko, leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅkan sanam lekan lạṭu ar kạṭicʼ ạsul ar bir janwarko ar dhạrti reakʼ sanamakʼko cetanre mạlik lekate ektiạriko calaoma.”" 
Genesis1:27 Tayomte Isor do acʼleka mitʼṭen manwae benaokedea. Hẽ acʼakʼ muṭhạn lekageye benaokedea, uni do herel ar maejiukategeye sirjạuketʼkinạ." 
Genesis1:28 Isor do unkin bhoratʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛete perejokʼpe, ar apnarakʼ lekha ḍhertape ar dhạrti perejpe ar dhạrti do apeakʼ ḍanṭaore dohoype. Ona chaḍa ape do jalapuriren hakoko, coṭren cẽṛẽko ar otren sanam lekan jiwiyanko cetanre mạlik lekate ektiạripe calaoa.”" 
Genesis1:29 Ona tayom Isore menkeda, “Ńelben, Ot cetan reakʼ sanam aṛakʼ sakamko ar sanam lekan dareko ar jo bahako reakʼ itạko hõń emena. Noakoge abenakʼ jomakʼ do hoyokʼa." 
Genesis1:30 Ot cetanren sanam janwarko, coṭren cẽṛẽko ar sanam lekan leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅokʼ jiwiyanko, metakʼme sanam lekan jiwiyankoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ aṛakʼ sakamko hõń emena.” Ar onkage hoyena." 
Genesis1:31 Isor do acʼakʼ sirjạuakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼe ńelkeda. Ar sạrige onako do ạḍi mońjge hoyakana. Ado ạyupʼena ar setakʼena, ar ona do turuiyakʼ din hoyena." 
Genesis2:1 Isor do ot ar sermare menakʼ sanamakʼe benao sạtkeda. 
Genesis2:2 Nonkate Isor do eaeakʼ dinte acʼakʼ kạmiye sạtʼkeda; one okaṭakʼe kạmiketʼ; ar eaeakʼ din doe jirạuena acʼakʼ joto kạmiko khon; ar enhilokʼ uni do sirjạu reakʼ cetʼge bae kạmileda. 
Genesis2:3 Uni do noa eaeakʼ dine bhorada ar acʼ lạgitʼe begar dohokada, ente enhilokʼ uni do sirjạu reakʼ kạmiye sạtkeda are jirạuena." 
Genesis2:4 Sirjạu tayom serma ar ot reakʼ katha: Probhu Isor do tinre maraṅ serma ar ote benaoetʼ tahẽkana unre dhạrtire aṛakʼ sakam, dare, nạ̃ṛĩ, anaj, ar phosolko do baṅ janam akan tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isor do dhạrtire dakʼ reakʼ bae bebosta akatʼ tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa jumire cas lạgitʼ manwa hõ bako tahẽkana." 
Genesis2:5  
Genesis2:6 Menkhan dakʼ do hasa latar khon bhumbuk rakabokʼ kan tahẽkante hasa do odage tahẽkana. 
Genesis2:7 Unre Probhu Isor do hasaren mitʼṭen herel manwae benaokedea ar mũreye oṅadete jiwiye aderadea. Onate manwa do jiwiyanicʼe hoyena. 
Genesis2:8 Probhu Isor do purub secʼ Edenre mitʼṭen bagwane benaoleda, ar onḍege acʼren bekʼnaoicʼ manwa doe dohokedea." 
Genesis2:9 Ar onḍe uni do nonkanakʼ darekoe janam ocokeda one oka do ńelokʼte mońj ar onako reakʼ joko hõ sebelge tahẽkan. Ona chaḍa bagwan talare uni do “Jion dare” ar “Boge bạṛicʼ dare” ńutumanakʼ barea dare hõe janam ocokeda. 
Genesis2:10 Ona bagwanre dakʼ reakʼ jogan emakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen gaḍa tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do Eden disạm khon oḍokʼ hecʼakan tahẽkan ar ona do ponea gaḍate hạṭiń akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis2:11 Pạhil gaḍa reakʼ ńutum do Pison. Noa do Hawila disạm beṛhaete ạtu oḍok hecʼ akan tahẽkana. Onḍe do sona ńamokʼkan tahẽkana," 
Genesis2:12 ona disạm reakʼ sona do ạḍi bhagea. Ona chaḍa onḍe do guggul ar gomedok mạnik hõ ńamokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis2:13 Dosar gaḍa reakʼ ńutum do Sihon. Noa gaḍa do kus disạm beṛhaete ạtu calao akana. 
Genesis2:14 Tesar gaḍa reakʼ ńutum do Hidekel. Noa do Ạsur disạm purub secʼte ạtu oḍok akana. Ar ponakʼ gaḍa reakʼ ńutum do Phurạt tahẽkana. 
Genesis2:15 Probhu Isor do uni manwae idikedete Eden bagwanreye dohokadea jemon uni do onḍe cas-baskate onae ńel todarot daṛeakʼ. 
Genesis2:16 Ar Probhu Isor do manwa hukumadeteye metadea, “Am do noa bagwan reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ dare reakʼ jogem jom daṛeakʼa;" 
Genesis2:17 menkhan boge-baṛicʼ dare reakʼ jo do alom joma, ente oka hilokʼ ona dare reakʼ joyem joma enhilokʼ am do khạṭigem gujukʼa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Ar Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Manwa eskar tahen do baṅ bhagea. Iń do uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭen lek lekan gateń benaoaea.”" 
Genesis2:19 Ar Probhu Isor do hasa khon otren okoe jiwiyanko ar coṭren cẽṛẽkoe benaoletʼko onko sanamko uni manwa ṭhene ạguketʼkoa. Probhu do ńeńele khojkeda, onko do cetʼ menteye hohoakoa mente. Ar uni okoeṭakʼ oka lekae ńutumkede onkage onko jiwiyankoakʼ ńutum do hoyena." 
Genesis2:20 Uni do sanam lekan ạsul janwarko ar bir janwarko ar sermaren cẽṛẽkoe ńutumketʼkoa, menkhan onko modre uni herel manwaren, metakʼme Adamren lek lekan gate do bako ńamlena." 
Genesis2:21 Probhu Isor do Adame jạpitʼ ocokedea, ar onate Adam doe jạpitʼkeda. Ar unre uni khon mitʼṭen pańjrae oḍokketʼte ona jaega doe jel esetʼkada" 
Genesis2:22 Ar Probhu Isor do Adam khon oneye oḍokketʼ pańjrate mitʼṭen maejiue benaokedete Adam ṭhene idikedea. 
Genesis2:23 Uni ńelte Adame menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do hoyakana. Nuiyakʼ jaṅ ar jel do ińakʼ jaṅ ar jel khonge benao akana. Ar herel hoṛakʼ hoṛmo khone benao akante nui do maejiue ńutum ocoyena." 
Genesis2:24 Ona iạte manwa do eṅgat-apat bạgikate acʼren bạhu tulucʼ mitʼ akane tahena ar unkin do mitʼ hoṛmokin hoyokʼa. 
Genesis2:25 Unre Adam ar uniren bạhu do uluṅge kin tahenkan tahẽkana, menkhan onate unkin do bạkin lajaokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Genesis3:1 “Probhu Isorre benaoketʼko otren jiwiyanko modre biń do sanamko khon cạture tahẽkana. Mitʼ din biń do uni maejiue kulikedea, “Isor do cetʼ sạrige bagwanre menakʼ joto dareko reakʼ jo jom doe mana akatʼbena?”" 
Genesis3:2 Maejiue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Bagwan reakʼ jo doliń jom daṛeakʼgea." 
Genesis3:3 Menkhan tala bagwanre oka dare menakʼ ona reakʼ jo jojom do managetalińạ. Isor doe menakada, ‘ona dare reakʼ jo do joṭetʼ hõ alo ben joṭeda, ar jom hõ aloben joma. Ar ben onkale khan khạṭige ben gujukʼa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Unre biń do maejiue metadea, “Tis hõ baṅa, aben do baben gujukʼa." 
Genesis3:5 Isor doe baḍaea, oka hilokʼ ona dare reakʼ jo ben joma enhilokʼ abenakʼ mẽtʼ do saṛokʼ tabena. Ar onate aben do ạkil ben ńama ar Isor leka ben hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis3:6 Maejiu do ona dare reakʼ jo mońj ar sebelgeye ńelkeda, ona chaḍa ạkil ńam lạgitʼ laloc hõ hecʼadea, onate uni do dare reakʼ joe gotʼkeda are jomkeda. Ar acʼren jãwãe hõe emadea ar uni hõe jomkeda." 
Genesis3:7 Onate bana hoṛakʼ mẽtʼ do saṛentạkina. Ar uluṅgea kin mente kin bujhạukeda. Ar loa dare reakʼ sakamko rokʼkate ạkin lạgitʼ kicricʼkin benaoana. 
Genesis3:8 Ado ạyupʼ reakʼ reaṛ hoeye ehopʼ akatʼ tahẽkanre unkin do Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅkin ańjomketʼtaea. Ente bagwanre uni doe dãṛãbaṛae kan tahẽkana. Unre Adam ar uniren bạhu do Probhu Isor samaṅre alo paṛaokʼ lạgitʼ bagwan reakʼ dareko talarekin okoyena. 
Genesis3:9 Probhu Isor do Adam hohoadeteye metadea, “Okare menama?”" 
Genesis3:10 Uni do goṅketʼteye menkeda, “Bagwanre amakʼ aṛaṅiń ańjom akatʼgea. Menkhan uluṅge minạńte, botorteń oko akana.”" 
Genesis3:11 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Amem uluṅge ona do okoeye lạiyakatʼmea? Am do cetʼ oneń manaletʼme dare reakʼ joyem jom akada?”" 
Genesis3:12 Adame menkeda, “Ińren gate lekate okoe maejiuem em akawạdiń unige ona dare reakʼ joye emadińa ariń jomkeda.”" 
Genesis3:13 Unre Probhu Isor do uni maejiue metadea, “Noa do cetʼem ceka akada?” Maejiu do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Biń do ińe bulạukedińa ar onate iń do onań jomkeda.”" 
Genesis3:14 Unre Probhu Isor do uni bińe metadea, “Noam kạmiketʼte am do otren sanam ạsul janwar ar bir janwarko modre ḍher sarapanicʼem hoyena. Am do jion bhor lacʼtem taṛama ar dhuṛim joma." 
Genesis3:15 Iń do am ar maejiu talare ar amren bõsko ar maejiuko hotete hijukʼkan bõsko talare bạiriń janam ocoya. Ona bõsren mitʼ hoṛ do amakʼ bohokʼe gejer tama ar am do uniyakʼ iḍim sogagtaea.” 
Genesis3:16 Ona tayom uni maejiue metadea, “Bhạrti hoṛmom tahenre amakʼ kosṭo do arhõń ḍher ocoytama. Am do bedonte gidrạm janamea. Ar jãwãe lạgitʼem jaljalaokʼa, ar uni do am cetanre mạlike hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis3:17 Ona tayom uni do Adame metadea, “Okaṭakʼ dare reakʼ jo jojomiń manaletʼme amren bạhuakʼ kathate onam jom akatʼte am iạte ot hõ ot sarapanakʼ hoyena. Am do goṭa jiongem khaṭaokʼa ar hasa reakʼ phosolem joma." 
Genesis3:18 Am iạte hasare rạṅgạiniko ar jạnumko janamokʼa, menkhan amakʼ jomakʼ do jumi reakʼ phosolge hoyokʼa." 
Genesis3:19 Ar okaṭakʼ hasatem benao ocoakan ona hasate ạurim ruạṛ calakʼ hạbicʼ bohokʼ reakʼ balbal dakʼ do jaṅgare ńurokʼtama arem joma. Amakʼ noa dhuṛi reakʼ hoṛmo do dhuṛitege ruạṛ calakʼtama.” 
Genesis3:20 Adam do acʼren bạhuakʼ ńutum Hawae, dohoketʼtaea (mane do “Jiwetʼicʼ ”), ente uni do sanam jiwetʼ hoṛkoren gogoe hoyokʼa." 
Genesis3:21 Probhu Isor do Adam ar uniren bạhu lạgitʼ janwarakʼ harta reakʼ kicricʼe benaoketʼte unkine horokʼatʼkinạ. 
Genesis3:22 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ńelpe, boge bạṛicʼ dare reakʼ jo jomkate manwa do aboren mitʼṭen lekae hoyakana. Ńitokʼ manwa do jaejug tahen lạgitʼ jion dare reakʼ jo tiyokʼkate aloe jom daṛeakʼ onate jãhãnakʼ cekae jạruṛtabona.”" 
Genesis3:23 Noa menkate Probhu Isor do hasate bekʼnaoicʼ manwa do ot cas lạgitʼ Eden bagwan khone oḍokgotʼkedea. 
Genesis3:24 Nonkate uni do unkine laga ńirketʼkinạ. Ona tayom uni do jion dare ṭhen calakʼ reakʼ horre horhoe lạgitʼ Eden bagwan purub secʼre Kerubkine dohoketʼkinạ, ar ona sãote onḍe mitʼṭecʼ jolokʼkan tarwaṛe hõe dohokeda ar ona do ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkana." 
Genesis4:1 Adam do acʼren bạhu Hawa tulucʼe giticʼmitʼen khan Hawa doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena, ar Kain ńutuman mitʼṭen koṛa hopone janamkedea. Unre Hawae menkeda, “Probhu Isor do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone emakawạdińa.”" 
Genesis4:2 Tayomte uniyakʼ kukhire Kainren boeha Habele janamena. Habel do bhiḍi gupikoe ehopʼena ar Kain do jumi cacasicʼe hoyena. 
Genesis4:3 Mitʼdin Kain do Probhu Isor ṭhen acʼakʼ jumi reakʼ phosol ạgukateye samaṅkeda. 
Genesis4:4 Ar Habel hõ acʼren bhiḍi palko khon pạhil janam akan bheḍako ạgukate onkoakʼ itil reakʼ hĩskoe samaṅkeda. Probhu Isor do Habelakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe ataṅkeda," 
Genesis4:5 menkhan Kainakʼ dãṛẽ do bae ataṅleda. Onate Kain do raṅgaote mẽtʼãhãe dhundketʼtaea. 
Genesis4:6 Noa ńelte Probhu Isor do Kaine kulikedea, “Am do cedakʼem raṅgao akana ar cedakʼ mẽtʼãhã dom dhund akatʼtama?" 
Genesis4:7 Bhageakʼem kạmi akatʼ khan enḍekhan amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do cedakʼ kharsala baṅ ńelokʼkantama? Am do bhageakʼ bam kạmi akatʼte kại doe khudạu baṛamea ar ona do amakʼ duạrre hecʼkate duṛupʼkokʼa; menkhan uni bhagaoe hoyokʼtama.” 
Genesis4:8 Mitʼ din ṭạnḍirekin tahẽkanre Kain do Habel sãote kathae roroṛkan tahẽkanre uni do acʼren boeha Habel cetanre tiye tulketʼte uniye gocʼkedea. 
Genesis4:9 Unre Probhu Isor do Kaine kulikedea, “Amren boeha Habel do okare menaea?” Kaine menkeda, “Bạń baḍaea. Ińren boeha ńel todarote reakʼ bhar do cetʼ iń cetanre menakʼa?”" 
Genesis4:10 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Cetʼem ceka akada? Ńelme, ot khon amren boehawakʼ mãyãm do iń ṭhene rakʼeda." 
Genesis4:11 Ar ot hõ amren boehawakʼ mãyãm ataṅ lạgitʼ moca bae jhicʼetʼte jumi reakʼ sarap do amrege paṛaoena. 
Genesis4:12 Jumi dom casgea menkhan ḍher phosol do baṅ hoyokʼtama. Ar uḍạcal hoṛ leka dhạrtirem ạcur baṛaea.” 
Genesis4:13 Unre Kain do Probhu Isore metadea, “Noa sạjại do ohoń sahao daṛelea." 
Genesis4:14 Teheń am do jumi khonem lagayediń kana, ar amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khoniń danaṅokʼa. Ar dhạrtireń ạcur baṛaere jãhãe samaṅregeń paṛaokʼ unige iń doe gojeńa.”" 
Genesis4:15 Unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Enḍekhan, okoe ame khũnme uni cetanre iń do eae doboṛiń hala ruạṛa.” Noa menkate Probhu Isor do Kain lạgitʼ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ cinhại bondoboskeda jemon jãhãege samaṅre ńamkate hõ aloko goje." 
Genesis4:16 Noa tayom Kain do Probhu Isor samaṅ khone calaoente Eden reakʼ purub secʼ Nod ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ disạmre girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis4:17 Ar Kain do acʼren bạhu tulucʼe giticʼmitʼen khan uni doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar Hanoke janamkedea. Ar Kain do mitʼṭecʼ nagrahae benaokeda. Uni do acʼren gidrạwakʼ ńutum lekate Hanok nagrahae dohokeda. 
Genesis4:18 Hanokren gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Irad tahẽkana; ar Iradren hoponakʼ ńutum do Methusael; ar Methusaelren hoponakʼ ńutum do Lamek tahẽkana. 
Genesis4:19 Lamekren do barea bạhukin tahẽkantaea. Unkin modre mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Ada, ar eṭagicʼakʼ ńutum do Silạ tahẽkana." 
Genesis4:20 Adawakʼ kukhire do Jabale janamena. Nui Jabalge tạmbure tahẽkate okoe do mĩhũ meromko ạsuletʼko tahẽkan onkoren hapṛame tahẽkana. 
Genesis4:21 Jabalren boehawakʼ ńutum do Jubạl tahẽkana. Uni do banam ar tirioko oroṅetʼ tahẽkan hoṛkoren hapṛame tahẽkana. 
Genesis4:22 Silạwakʼ kukhire do Tubạle janamena. Uni do tamba ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ joto lekan laser jinisko benao reakʼe kạmikan tahẽkana. Tubạl-Kainren miseratakʼ ńutum do Nayma tahẽkana. 
Genesis4:23 Mitʼdin Lamek do acʼren banar bạhui metatʼkinạ, “Ada ar Silạ, ińakʼ katha ańjom ben; Lamekren bạhukin, ińakʼ katha luturakʼ ben. Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ ińe hạnledeń, metakʼme okoeṭakʼ koṛa do ińe joṭetʼledeń, uni doń khũn akadea." 
Genesis4:24 Kạin khũn reakʼ hala ruạṛ eae doboṛ hoyokʼ khan, Lamek khũn reakʼ hala do eae gel doboṛ hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis4:25 Tayomte Adam do arhõ acʼren bạhu tulucʼe giticʼmitʼena ar Hawa do ar mitʼṭen koṛa hopone janamkedea. Ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Sethe dohoketʼtaea. Hawae menkeda, “Kain do Habele khũnkedete Isor do Habel bodolte armitʼṭen hopone emadińa.”" 
Genesis4:26 Ar Sethren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone janamena. Uniyakʼ ńutum do Enose dohoketʼtaea. Ar unkhon hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum manotko ehopʼkeda. 
Genesis5:1 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Adam bõsrenkoakʼ katha. Isor do acʼleka, acʼakʼ muṭhạn lekage manwae sirjạukedea;" 
Genesis5:2 Uni do herel ar maejiukategeye sirjạuketʼkinạ are bhoratʼkinạ. Ar unkin do manwae ńutumketʼkinạ. 
Genesis5:3 Adamakʼ mitʼsae pegel bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone hoyena. Uni hopon do acʼlekageye hoyena. Adam do uniyakʼ ńutum Sethe dohoketʼtaea. 
Genesis5:4 Seth janam tayom Adam do irạl sae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Ar onako dinre uniren do ạḍi utạr hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis5:5 Adam do jotote are sae pegel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:6 Seth do mitʼ sae mõṛẽ bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Enose janamena. 
Genesis5:7 Enos janam tayom Seth do irạl sae eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do ạḍi utạr hopon ar hoponerako janamena. 
Genesis5:8 Seth do aresae gelbar bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:9 Enosakʼ aregel bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Kaine janamena. 
Genesis5:10 Kain janam tayom Enos do irạlsae gelmõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako janamlena. 
Genesis5:11 Enos do jotote aresae mõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:12 Kainakʼ eaegel bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Mahalalelakʼ janam do janamena. 
Genesis5:13 Mahalalelakʼ janam tayom Kain do arhõ irạlsae pongel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Inạko dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylentaea. 
Genesis5:14 Kain do jotote aresae gel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalelakʼ turuigel mõṛẽ bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Jared doe janamena. 
Genesis5:16 Jared janam tayom Mahalalel do arhõ irạlsae pegel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Inạko bhitrire uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylentaea. 
Genesis5:17 Mahalalel do jotote irạlsae aregel mõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:18 Jaredakʼ mitʼsae turuigel bar bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Enok doe janamena. 
Genesis5:19 Enokakʼ janam tayom Jared do arhõ irạlsae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Inạko dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylentaea. 
Genesis5:20 Jared do jotote aresae turuigel bar bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:21 Enokakʼ turuigel mõṛẽ bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Mathusala doe janamena. 
Genesis5:22 Mathusalawakʼ janam tayom pesae bochor hạbicʼ Enok do Isor sãote jopoṛao tahẽkantaea. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylentaea. 
Genesis5:23 Enok do jotote pesae turuigel mõṛẽ bochor noa dhạrtire jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis5:24 Inạ tayom uni do okare hõ ar bae ńellena. Isor sãote uniyakʼ jopoṛao tahẽkante Isor do acʼ ṭhene idikedea. 
Genesis5:25 Mathusalawakʼ mitʼsae irạlgel eae bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Lameke janamena. 
Genesis5:26 Lamekakʼ janam tayom Mathusala do arhõ eaesae irạl gel bar bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylena. 
Genesis5:27 Mathusala do jotote aresae turuigel are bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:28 Lamek do mitʼsae irạlgel bar bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren do mitʼṭen hopone hoyena. 
Genesis5:29 Uni doe menkeda, “Aboakʼ khaṭaoakʼko modre, bạ̃ṛtikaete Probhu Isor do ote sarapatʼ tayom aboakʼ oka khaṭao hoyokʼkan onate nui gidrạge abo do jiwiye raṛejtabona.” Noa menkate uni do Noha ńutume dohoketʼtaea." 
Genesis5:30 Nohawakʼ janam tayom Lamek do arhõ mõṛẽsae aregel mõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Noako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylena. 
Genesis5:31 Lamek do jotote eaesae eaegel eae bochor jiwetʼ tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis5:32 Nohawakʼ umer mõṛẽsae bochor paromen khan uniren hopon Sem, Ham ar Japhet tekoko janamena." 
Genesis6:1 Manwa do dhạrtireko saṅge idiyen khan onkoren aema hoponerako janamena ar unre Isorren hoponko do noko kuṛiko mońjko ńelketʼko khan akoakʼ kusi lekako baplaketʼkoa. 
Genesis6:2  
Genesis6:3 Noa ńelte Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Ińren Jiu do jaejug hạbicʼ manwa bae cehaokoa, ente onko do gujukʼ taberen kanako. Iń do mitʼsae bargel bochor hạbicʼ somoe iń emakoa.”" 
Genesis6:4 Isorren hoponko sãote noko kuṛiyakʼ giticʼmidokʼ iạte tinạkʼko janamen onko do onako dinren daṛean hoṛko hoyena. Onako dinre ar ona tayom hõ dhạrtire Nepheliạ ńutuman mitʼ jạtren hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Genesis6:5 Probhu Isor do dhạrtiren manwakoakʼ dusṭạmi ḍher idikʼkantako, ar ontor reakʼ hudis bundisko bạṛicʼgetako onakoe ńelkeda." 
Genesis6:6 Onate Probhu Isor do ontorreye dukena. Ar dhạrtiren manwae sirjạukedete bhabna iạteye menkeda, “Ińren benaoicʼ manwa do dhạrti khoniń marao utạrea; ar uni sãote sanam jiwiyanko, leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko ar coṭren cẽṛẽko hõń maraokoa. Noakoń benao akatʼte iń do monre ạḍi dukiń ńameda.”" 
Genesis6:7  
Genesis6:8 Menkhan Noha cetanre Isor doe kusiyena. 
Genesis6:9 Nohawakʼ jion reakʼ katha. Noha do mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛe tahẽkana. Ar acʼ okteren hoṛko modre uni eskarge dhorom hoṛ doe tahẽkana. Uni do Isor sãote jaoge helmel tahẽkantaea. 
Genesis6:10 Sem, Ham ar Japhet ńutuman Noharen do pea hoponko tahẽkana." 
Genesis6:11 Onako dinre kại reakʼ bạṛicʼ so ar santao ar behokakʼkote dhạrti do perecʼ akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis6:12 Isor do dhạrti secʼe beṅgetʼkeda ar goṭage kharap caba akane ńelkeda, ente dhạrtiren manwakoakʼ sobhab do sea akan tahẽkana." 
Genesis6:13 Noa ńelte Isor do Nohae metadea, “Manwa jạtrenko doń maraokoa. Ente dhạrti do onkoakʼ santao ar behokte perecʼ akana. Iń do manwa sãote dhạrti reakʼ jotowakʼiń marao giḍikakʼa." 
Genesis6:14 Onate am do bhage kaṭte am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jahaj benaome. Ar onare khuṛpikon benaoa; ar ona reakʼ bahre ar bhitri do alkatram potaoakʼa. 
Genesis6:15 Jahaj do nonkam benaoa: Jeleńte pesae moka, osarte mõṛẽgel moka, ar usulte pegel moka." 
Genesis6:16 Jahaj reakʼ chat khon latar mitʼ moka beṛhaete mitʼṭecʼ phaka jaegam dohokakʼa ar jahaj reakʼ duạr do mitʼ secʼrem dohoya. 
Genesis6:17 Iń do dhạrtire mitʼṭecʼ ḍubạ dakʼ iń ạguya jemon serma latarre tinạkʼ do sahẽtʼetʼkan jiwiyanko menakʼko onko joto doń ḍahao maraokoa. Onate dhạrtiren sanam manwako doko marao utạrokʼa. 
Genesis6:18 “Menkhan iń do am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń dohoya. Am do jahajtem bolokʼa ar am sãote amren hoponko ar amren bạhu ar kiminmetako hõko tahena. 
Genesis6:19 Am sãote jiwetʼ tahen lạgitʼ sanam jạtren jiwiyanko khon am do mimitʼ joṛ eṅga ar ạnḍiạ ona jahajtem aderkoa. 
Genesis6:20 Sanam jạtren cẽṛẽko, jiwiyanko ar leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko do am ṭhenko hijukʼa jemon onkom bańcao doho daṛeako;" 
Genesis6:21 am do onko lạgitʼ joto lekan jomakʼ jiniskom jogaṛ dohokakʼa. Onako do am ar onko lạgitʼ jomakʼge hoyokʼa.” 
Genesis6:22 Noha do Isorakʼ hukum leka jotowakʼgeye kạmikeda. 
Genesis7:1 Noa tayom Probhu Isor do Noha arhõe metadea, “Am ar am gharońjrenko ape do jahajte bolokʼpe. Ente ińiń ńeleda, hoṛko modre eken amgem dhoromgea." 
Genesis7:2 Am do sapha jiwiyan mimitʼ jạtrenko khon eae joṛkate eṅga ar ạnḍiạ, ar be sapha jiwiyanko khon do mitʼ joṛakate eṅga ar ạnḍiạm hataokoa." 
Genesis7:3 Coṭre uḍạukʼ sapha cẽṛẽko khon hõ eae joṛkate eṅga ar ạnḍiạm hataokoa. Dhạrtire onkoren bõsko jiwetʼ dohoko lạgitʼge am do onam onkaea. 
Genesis7:4 Iń do eae din khange dhạrtire dakʼ iń ạguya. Onate pongel siń ar pongel ńindại daga. Ar otre okoeko jiwiyankoń sirjạu akatʼko onko joto do dhạrti khoniń marao giḍikakoa.” 
Genesis7:5 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Noha do jotowakʼe kạmikeda. 
Genesis7:6 Dhạrtire ḍubạ dakʼ ehobokʼ jokhecʼ Nohawakʼ umer do turuisae bochor tahẽkana. 
Genesis7:7 Ḍubạ dakʼ khon rukhiyạkʼ lạgitʼ Noha do, acʼren bạhu, ar uniren hoponko ar onkoren bạhuko tulucʼ ona jahajteye boloyena." 
Genesis7:8 Isor do Noha oka lekae hukumade tahẽkana onkage sapha ar besapha jiwiyanko ar cẽṛẽko ar leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko do eṅga ar ạnḍiạ joṛa joṛa Nohawakʼ jahajteko rakapʼena. 
Genesis7:9  
Genesis7:10 Ar ona eae din paromen khan dhạrtire ḍubạ dakʼ do hecʼena. 
Genesis7:11 Nohawakʼ umer tinre turuisae bochor tahẽkana, ar ona bochor reakʼ dosar cando reakʼ gel eaeakʼ dinre ot latar reakʼ dakʼ do oḍokokʼ ehopʼena ar serma hõ paṛakʼena." 
Genesis7:12 Ar pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ dhạrtire dakʼ ńurena. 
Genesis7:13 Oka hilokʼ dadakʼe ehopʼketʼ enhilokʼ Noha do, acʼren bạhu, acʼren hopon Shem, Ham ar Japhet ar onkoren bạhuko salakʼ jahajteye boloyena." 
Genesis7:14 Onko sãote mimitʼ jạtren mimitʼ joṛkate bir ar ạsul janwarko, leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko ar joto lekan cẽṛẽko hõko boloyena." 
Genesis7:15 Sahẽtʼetʼkan jiwetʼ sanam jiwiyankoge joṛ joṛ Nohawakʼ jahajteko rakapʼena. 
Genesis7:16 Isor do Noha okalekae hukumade tahekan onkage onko do eṅga ạnḍiạ jahajteko rakapʼena. Ar ona tayom Probhu Isor do jahaj reakʼ duạre sińkeda. 
Genesis7:17 Ar dakʼ do pon gel siń hạbicʼ dhạrtire ḍher idikʼtege tahẽyena. Dakʼ ḍher idiyen khan jahaj do ot khon cetante cape rakabokʼ ehopʼena. 
Genesis7:18 Ar dakʼ do ot cetanre arhõ ḍher idiyen khan jahaj do dakʼ cetanre ḍombolena. 
Genesis7:19 Otre dakʼ do ḍher idikʼtege tahẽyena; ar tinạkʼ maraṅ maraṅ buruko tahẽkana onako joto do unum cabayena. 
Genesis7:20 Ar buruko unum cabayen khan dakʼ do arhõ mõṛẽ gel moka rakapʼena. 
Genesis7:21 Ona iạte otren sanam jiwiyanko, cẽṛẽko, ạsul ar bir janwarko, kạṭicʼ ar lạṭu jiwiyanko ar sanam manwako unum gocʼena." 
Genesis7:22 Ar ot cetanre tinạkʼ jiwiyanko tahẽkan, metakʼme sahẽtʼetʼ tahẽkan sanam jiwiyanko doko gocʼ cabayena." 
Genesis7:23 Isor do otren sanam jiwiyanko dhạrti khone ḍahao marao cabaketʼkoa. Onate manwako, janwarko, leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko ar coṭren cẽṛẽko do dhạrti khonko marao cabayena. Eken Noha ar uni sãote tinạkʼ do jahajreko tahẽkan onkoge jiwetʼko tahẽyena." 
Genesis7:24 Ar dhạrti do mitʼsae mõṛẽgel din hạbicʼ dakʼre unmge tahẽyena. 
Genesis8:1 Jahajre Noha ar uni sãote tinạkʼ ạsul ar bir janwarko tahẽkan Isor do onkoakʼ katha bae hiṛińleda. Uni do dhạrti cetanre hoeye ạgukeda, ar onate dakʼ do ańjedokʼ ehopʼen." 
Genesis8:2 Unre ot latar khon dakʼ oḍokokʼ ar serma reakʼ paṛakʼ hõ bondena ar dakʼ ńurokʼ hõ thirena. 
Genesis8:3 Ar ot cetan reakʼ dakʼ do ańjedokʼ ehopʼena, ar ḍubạ ehobokʼ mitʼsae mõṛẽgel din tayom dakʼ do ḍher ańjetʼena." 
Genesis8:4 Onate eae cando reakʼ gel eaeakʼ dinre jahaj do Ararat burure ḍhaṅena. 
Genesis8:5 Noa tayom hõ dakʼ do ańjedokʼtege tahẽyena, ar gel cando reakʼ pạhilakʼ dinre buruko reakʼ cuṛạ ńelena." 
Genesis8:6 Noa pongel din tayom Noha do jahaj reakʼ khiṛkiye jhicʼkeda," 
Genesis8:7 ar mitʼṭen bhonḍa kạhũi aṛakʼkedea. Uni kạhũ do ot cetan khon dakʼ ạuri ańjetʼ cabakʼ hạbicʼ hante nate manḍrao baṛaye ehopʼena. 
Genesis8:8 Noha do ot khon dakʼ ańjetʼena se baṅ ona baḍae lạgitʼ ar mitʼṭen potame aṛakʼkedea. 
Genesis8:9 Menkhan unrehõ otre dakʼ do tahẽkana, onate okarehõ abokʼ jaega bae ńamletʼte Noha ṭhengeye ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar Noha do ti tiạrkate uni potame ataṅ daramkedea." 
Genesis8:10 Ona eae din tayom uni do arhõ uni potame aṛakʼkedea. 
Genesis8:11 Ar ạyubokʼ jokhecʼ potam do jahajre Noha ṭhene ruạṛ hecʼena ar ṭhonṭate jạitun dare reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ sakame ger ạgukeda. Onate Noha doe bujhạukeda ot khon dakʼ do ańjetʼ akana. 
Genesis8:12 Uni do eae din tayom arhõ uni potame aṛakʼkedea, menkhan niạ dhao uni do ar bae ruạṛ hecʼlena." 
Genesis8:13 Nohawakʼ umer do unre turuisae mitʼ bochor hoyakan tahẽkana. Ar ona bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ ot khon dakʼ do ocokʼena. Unre Noha do jahaj reakʼ chat ocokʼ kateye ńelkeda, ot do hawedokʼ ehopʼena." 
Genesis8:14 Ado dosar cando reakʼ bargel eaeyakʼ dinre ot do rohoṛ utạrena. 
Genesis8:15 Unre Isor do Nohae metadea," 
Genesis8:16 “Am do amren bạhu ar amren hoponko ar onkoren bạhuko soṅgekate jahaj khon oḍok hijukʼme," 
Genesis8:17 Ar ona sãote janwarko cẽṛẽko ar leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko, metakʼme tinạkʼ jiwiyanko menakʼko onko sanamko hõm oḍok ạgukoa. Ińakʼ khojogokʼakʼ do dhạrtire onkoren bõsko bạḍokʼma arko saṅge idikʼte lekhareko ḍherokʼma.”" 
Genesis8:18 Unre Noha do acʼren bạhu ar hoponko ar onkoren bạhuko soṅgekate jahaj khone oḍok hecʼena. 
Genesis8:19 Onko sãote joto janwar ar cẽṛẽko ar lacʼte taṛam jiwiyanko, metakʼme ot cetanre ạcur baṛae sanam jiwiyanko akoakʼ jạtko lekako oḍok hecʼena." 
Genesis8:20 Ona tayom Noha do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar mimitʼ jạtren sapha janwarko ar cẽṛẽko khon hataokate pinḍ cetanreye dãṛẽketʼkoa. 
Genesis8:21 Probhu Isor do ona dãṛẽ reakʼ jut so iạteye kusiyena ar mon monteye menkeda, “Manwa iạte ar tishõ ot do ar bạń sarapakʼa, ente cetʼleka sanam jiwiyankoń marao cabaketʼko onka do ar tishõ bạń onkaea." 
Genesis8:22 Tinạkʼ din noa dhạrti tahen unạkʼ din niạm lekate itạ do er ar irokʼa, rabaṅ din ar lolo din, siń ar ńindạ hoyokʼtege tahena.”" 
Genesis9:1 Isor do Noha ar uniren hoponkoe bhoratʼkoteye menkeda, “Ape do saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛete ḍher idikʼpe ar dhạrti perejpe." 
Genesis9:2 Ar dhạrtiren sanam janwarko, coṭren cẽṛẽko, leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅko ar jalapuriren hakoko do apeko botorapea. Noko do apeakʼ tiregeko jimạ ocoyena." 
Genesis9:3 Jiwetʼ ar ạcur baṛae sanam jiwiyankoge aperen jomakʼko hoyokʼa. Ar jomakʼ lekate iń do laharege cetʼleka ape lạgitʼ aṛakʼ sakamkoń emlen onkage ńitokʼ hõ onakogeń ematʼpea; 
Genesis9:4 menkhan jiwi sudhạ, metakʼme mãyãm sudhạ jel do alope joma." 
Genesis9:5 Ar jãhãege apeko khũnpe enḍekhan iń do khạṭige apeakʼ mãyãm reakʼ iń hala ruạṛakoa, ona do janwarge cetʼ ar manwakoge cetʼ. Manwa jiwi okoeye hatao uniyakʼ hõ hataokʼtaea." 
Genesis9:6 Isor do manwa acʼlekageye sirjạu akadea; onate jãhãn manwa jodi jãhãeye khũne enḍekhan eṭakʼ armitʼ hoṛ do uni khũniạhi hoṛakʼ jiwiye hataotaea. 
Genesis9:7 Ape do apeakʼ saṅgekʼ reakʼ daṛete ḍherokʼpe. Ar dhạrti reakʼ beṛhaete pasnaokʼpe ar saṅgekʼpe.” 
Genesis9:8 Tayomte Isor do Noha ar uniren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape ar aperen bõsko lạgitʼ ar okoe janwarko ape sãoteko tahẽkan, metakʼme, tinạkʼ cẽṛẽko ar janwarko ape sãote jahaj khonko oḍok hecʼakan, metakʼme dhạrtiren sanam jiwiyanko lạgitʼ iń do ńitokʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobos iń dohoyeda." 
Genesis9:9  
Genesis9:10  
Genesis9:11 Ona bondobos do hoyokʼ kana, ḍubạ dakʼte ar tishõ sanam jiwiyanko do bạń gocʼkoa ar goṭa dhạrti hõ ḍubạ dakʼte do bạń ḍahao maraoa.”" 
Genesis9:12 Isor do arhõe menkeda, “Oka bondobos ape ar ape sãoren sanam jiwiyanko lạgitʼ iń dohoketʼ ona do piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ tahena. Ona bondobos reakʼ cinhạ lekate rimilre mitʼṭecʼ liṭạ akʼ iń dohoya. Ar noage dhạrti lạgitʼ ińakʼ cinhạ do hoyokʼa." 
Genesis9:13  
Genesis9:14 Iń do coṭre rimiliń jarwaea ar onare liṭạ akʼ iń ńel ocoya," 
Genesis9:15 ar unrege amakʼ ar sanam jiwiyanko lạgitʼ ińakʼ noa bondobos reakʼ kathań disạya. Ar tishõ ḍubạ dakʼte sanam jiwiyanko do bạń maraokoa. 
Genesis9:16 Rimilre tinre noa liṭạ akʼ ńelokʼa unre iń do ona ńelte dhạrtiren sanam jiwiyanko lạgitʼ ińakʼ noa bondobos reakʼ kathań disạya.” 
Genesis9:17 Ona tayom Isor do Nohae metadea, “Dhạrtiren sanam jiwiyanko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ iń bondobos akatʼ noage ona reakʼ cinhạ do hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis9:18 Unre Noharen hopon Shem, Ham ar Japhet do jahaj khonko oḍok hecʼakan tahẽkana. Ar Hamren do Kanan ńutuman mitʼṭen hopone hoyena." 
Genesis9:19 Noharen noko pea hoponren bõskoge goṭa dhạrtiko perecʼkeda. 
Genesis9:20 Noha do casokʼe ehopʼena ar mitʼṭecʼ darkha bagwane benaokeda. 
Genesis9:21 Uni do mitʼdin darkha rasa ńũteye bulente acʼakʼ tạmbure uluṅgeye giticʼ akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis9:22 Kananren apat Ham do acʼ baba nonkae ńelkede khan uni do bahrete senkate acʼren banar boehae lạiyatʼkinạ. 
Genesis9:23 Mekhan Shem ar Japhet do ạkinakʼ tarenre mitʼṭecʼ kicricʼkin ladeante pạclạte taṛam idikate ạkinren baba kin oyokadea. Ukinakʼ mẽtʼãhã do ulṭạu secʼ tahẽkante ạkinren babawakʼ uluṅ do bạkin ńelleda. 
Genesis9:24 Ado nisạ chuṭạuentae khan Noha do acʼren huḍiń hoponakʼ kathae baḍaekeda. 
Genesis9:25 Ar unreye menkeda, “Kanan do sarapanicʼe hoyokʼma. Uni do acʼren boehako modre joto khon huḍińicʼren golame hoyokʼma.”" 
Genesis9:26 Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Bhạgangeae Shemren Probhu Isor do. Ar Kanan do Shemren golame hoyokʼma." 
Genesis9:27 Isore do Japhete phaelaoaema. Ar Shemakʼ tạmbureye girobasokʼma ar Kanan do uniren golame hoyokʼma.” 
Genesis9:28 Ḍubạ dakʼ tayom Noha do arhõ pesae mõṛẽgel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis9:29 Uni do jotote aresae mõṛẽgel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana ar ona tayom doe gocʼena. 
Genesis10:1 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Noharen hopon Shem, Ham ar Japhet bõsrenko reakʼ katha. Ḍubạ dakʼ tayom onkoren hõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylena." 
Genesis10:2 Japhetren hopon doko hoyokʼkana, Gomer, Magog, Madal, Jawan, Tubạl, Mesek ar Tirạs." 
Genesis10:3 Ar Gomerren hoponko do Askenas, Riphạt ar Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Jawaren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Elisa, Tạrsis, Kitim ar Dodanim." 
Genesis10:5 Noko khonge sesre ạḍi utạr pạrsi, gharońj ar jạt lekate doreão aṛe reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmreko pasnao idiyena." 
Genesis10:6 Hamren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana, Kus, Misrạyim, Put ar Kanan." 
Genesis10:7 Kusren hopon doko hoyokʼ kana, Seba, Hạwila, Sabta Raema ar Sabteka; ar Raemaren hopon dokin hoyokʼ kana Seba, ar Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Kusren do mitʼṭecʼ hopone hoylena uniyakʼ ńutum do Nimrod tahẽkana. Uni do dhạrtire mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkana. 
Genesis10:9 Probhu Isor samaṅre uni do mitʼṭen sesendra birbanṭa hoṛge. Ona iạteko mena, “Nimrod do Probhu Isor samaṅre mitʼṭen birbanṭa sesendrayicʼ.”" 
Genesis10:10 Uni do Sinạr disạm reakʼ Babel, Erek, Akad ar Kalnere rajosṭiye calaoetʼ tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:11 Uni do onḍe khon Ạsur hạbicʼ acʼakʼ rajosṭiye pasnao idiketʼtaea. Onḍenakʼ Ninwi, Rehobot, Ir, Kalah ńutumanakʼ nagraha do unigeye teṅgoleda. Noa modre Resen do Ninwi ar Kalah talare tahẽkana. Ar noako mitʼkate mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ nagraha tearlena." 
Genesis10:12  
Genesis10:13 Ludio, Anamio, Lehebio, Naptuhiko, Pạthrusiko ar Kạsluhiko ar Kerh do Misorren bõsko tahẽkana. Kạsluhiko do Philisṭikoren hapṛamko tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:14  
Genesis10:15 Kananren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Sidon tahẽkana. Uni tayom do Hethe janamena. 
Genesis10:16 Jebusiko, Amoriko, Girgạsiko," 
Genesis10:17 Hiwiko, Arkiko, Siniko," 
Genesis10:18 Arwadiko, Semariko ar Hamathiko do Kanan bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Tayomte noko Kanan gharońjren doko pasnao idiyena." 
Genesis10:19 Sidon nagraha khon Gerare calakʼ horre Gaja hạbicʼ ar Gaja khon Sodom, Gomora, Adma ar Seboyim calakʼ horre Lasa hạbicʼ Kananrenkoakʼ reakʼ simạ do tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:20 Gharońj, pạrsi, disạm ar jạt lekate nokoge Ham bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:21 Japhetren dadattetʼ Shemren hõ hopon ar hoponerako hoylena. Shem doe tahẽkana Eberren hopon ar uniren hoponkoren ạgil hapṛam. 
Genesis10:22 Shemren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana, Elam, Ạsur, Arpaksad, Lud ar Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Aramren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana, Us, Hul, Gether ar Mesek." 
Genesis10:24 Arpaksadren hoponakʼ ńutum do Selah ar Selahren hoponakʼ ńutum do Eber 
Genesis10:25 Eberren do barea hoponkin tahẽkana. Unkin modre mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Peleg. Uni oktere dhạrti do begarlen iạte uni do niạ ńutumko doholetʼtaea. Pelegren, boehawakʼ ńutum do Joktan tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:26 Joktanren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Almodad, Seleph, Hasarmawet, Jerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Usạl Diklạ," 
Genesis10:28 Ebal Abimayel Seba," 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Hawila ar Jobab. Noko joto do Joktanren hoponko tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:29 Ophir, Hawila ar Jobab. Noko joto do Joktanren hoponko tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:30 Mesa khon purub secʼ Sephar calakʼ horre okako buru nala tahẽkan ona reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ireko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis10:31 Ar onkoakʼ gharońj, pạrsi, disạm ar jạt lekate nokoge Shemren bõsko tahẽkana." 
Genesis10:32 Nokoge bõs ar jạtrenko lekate Noharen hoponkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gharońjrenko tahẽkana. Ar ḍubạ dakʼ tayom noko bõskoren hoṛge goṭa dhạrtiko pasnao idiyena. 
Genesis11:1 Onako dinre goṭa dhạrtiren manwa do eken mitʼ pạrsitegeko roṛetʼ tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ aṛaṅ hõ mitʼge tahẽkana. 
Genesis11:2 Onko do purub secʼko laha idiyente Sinor disạmre mitʼṭecʼ bilạn ṭạnḍiko ńamketʼ khan onḍege girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Genesis11:3 Ar akoreko menjoṅana, “Dela, iṭạ bon benaoa ar seṅgelre bon rapaga.” Onko do dhiri bodolte iṭạ ar cun suṛki bodolte alkatra beoharko ehopʼena." 
Genesis11:4 Onkoko menkeda, “Dela, abo lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha bon benaoa ar nonkan mitʼṭecʼ usul oṛakʼ bon benaoa one ona reakʼ cuṛạ do serma hạbicʼ rakabokʼ. Ar noa iạte abo do ńutum hoyokʼtabona ar goṭa dhạrtire babon pasnaokʼa.”" 
Genesis11:5 Probhu Isor do manwa oka nagraha ar usul oṛakʼko bekʼnaokan tahẽkan ona ńel lạgitʼe pheḍ hecʼena. 
Genesis11:6 Uni doe menkeda, “Noko do mitʼ jạtren kanako ar pạrsi hõ mitʼgetakoa; ar onate noa kạmireko lagao akana. Akoakʼ monsubạ purạu lạgitʼ noa tayom noko do jãhãn tạkicʼakʼge bako manaoa." 
Genesis11:7 Onate dela, latarte bon pheḍokʼa ar onkoakʼ pạrsibon gaḍ baḍaotakoa jemon mitʼ hoṛ armitʼ hoṛakʼ pạrsi aloe bujhạu daṛeakʼ.”" 
Genesis11:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ona jaega khon goṭa dhạrtireye pasnaoketʼkoa. Onate onkoakʼ ona nagraha reakʼ kạmi do bondentakoa. 
Genesis11:9 Ar onate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Babele dohokeda, ente onḍege Probhu Isor do dhạrti reakʼ pạrsiye gaḍbaḍao ocoketʼtakoa. Ar onḍe khonge uni do goṭa dhạrtiye pasnaoketʼkoa." 
Genesis11:10 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Shem bõsrenkoakʼ katha. Ḍubạ dakʼ bar bochor tayom Shemakʼ umer mitʼsae bochor tahẽkanre uniren do Arpaksad ńutuman mitʼṭen hopone janamena. 
Genesis11:11 Arpaksadakʼ janam tayom Shem do mõṛẽsae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Ar onako dinre uniren do aema hopon ar hoponerako hoylentaea. 
Genesis11:12 Arpaksadakʼ pegel mõṛẽ bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Selahae janamena. 
Genesis11:13 Selahwakʼ janam tayom Arpaksad do ponsae pe bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren hõ aema hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis11:14 Selahwakʼ pegel bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Ebere janamena. 
Genesis11:15 Eber janam tayom Selah do arhõ ponsae pe bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis11:16 Eberakʼ pegel pon bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Pelege janamena. 
Genesis11:17 Pelegakʼ janam tayom Eber do ponsae pegel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Ar onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis11:18 Pelegakʼ pegel bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Reuakʼ janam hoyena. 
Genesis11:19 Reuakʼ janam tayom Peleg do barsae are bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis11:20 Reuakʼ pegel bar bochor umer tahẽkanre uniren hopon Seruge janamena. 
Genesis11:21 Serugakʼ janam tayom Reu do arhõ barsae eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ aema hopon ar hoponerako hoyena. 
Genesis11:22 Serugakʼ pegel bochor hoyentae khan uniren hopon Nahore janamena. 
Genesis11:23 Nahorakʼ janam tayom Serug do barsae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Ar onako dinre uniren do arhõ gidrạko hoyena. 
Genesis11:24 Nahorakʼ bargel are bochor umerre uniren hopon Terahe janamena. 
Genesis11:25 Terahwakʼ janam tayom Nahor do arhõ mitʼsae gelare bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Onako dinre uniren do arhõ aema hopon ar hoponerako hoyentaea. 
Genesis11:26 Terahwakʼ eaegel bochor umer tayom uniren hopon Abram, Nahor, ar Haran tekoko janamena." 
Genesis11:27 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Terahren bõskoakʼ katha. Terahren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Abram, Nahor ar Haran, ar Haranren hoponakʼ ńutum do Lot." 
Genesis11:28 Haran do acʼren apat jiwetʼe tahẽkanre acʼakʼ janam ato Kạldikoakʼ disạmre Ur nagrahareye gocʼlena. 
Genesis11:29 Abram ar Nahor do bana hoṛgekin bapla akan tahẽkana. Abramren bạhuakʼ ńutum do Sạri ar Nahorren bạhuakʼ ńutum do Milkạ tahẽkana. Milkạ ar Iskạ do Haranren hoponerakin tahẽkana. 
Genesis11:30 Sạri do bạńjhigeye tahẽkana; uniren do gidrạge bako hoyakan tahẽkana. 
Genesis11:31 Abram do, Lot ar Sạri soṅgekate Kanan disạm reakʼ Terahte calakʼ iạte Kạldikoakʼ disạm Ur nagraha khone mohnḍayena. Abram do Terahren hopone tahẽkana, ar Lot do Terahren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme, Haranren hopon, ar Sạri do Terahren hopon Abramren bạhui tahẽkana. Pạhilre onko do Haran ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha hạbicʼko calaoena ar onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Genesis11:32 Terah do barsae mõṛẽ bochor umer tahẽkanre Haran nagraharegeye gocʼena. 
Genesis12:1 Probhu Isor do Abrame metadea, “Am do amakʼ disạm, ar amren peṛa pạrbhạko ar am apatakʼ oṛakʼ duạr bạgikate iń okaṭakʼ disạmiń udukʼam ona disạmte calakʼme." 
Genesis12:2 Iń do am khon mitʼ maraṅ jạtiń benaokoa. Amiń bhorama ariń maraṅmea amakʼ ńutum do goṭa beṛhae pasnaokʼtama ar am hotete hoṛ do bhorko ńama. 
Genesis12:3 Okoe amko bhoram iń hõ onkoń bhorakoa ar okoe amko sarapam onko hõ ińiń sarapakoa. Ar am iạtege dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do bhorko ńama.” 
Genesis12:4 Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekage Abram doe oḍokena ar Lot hõ uni soṅgeteye calaoena. Haran nagraha bạgiyakʼ jokhecʼ Abramakʼ umer do eaegel mõṛẽ bochor tahẽkana. 
Genesis12:5 Uni do acʼren bạhu Sạri ar bhạcạt koṛa Lote soṅgekedea are oḍok hecʼena. Ar acʼakʼ sanamakʼko soṅgekate ar tinạkʼ guti kạ̃ṛmĩko Haranreye ńamletʼko onko soṅgekate uni do Kanan disạmteye seṭerena. 
Genesis12:6 Kanan disạm talate calakʼ jokhecʼ Abram do Sikem nagraha ṭhenakʼ More reakʼ sonot dare hạbicʼe sen idiyena. Unre Kananrenko do ona disạmreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Genesis12:7 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Abram ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye metadea, “Iń do noa disạmge amren bõskoń emakoa.” Unre Abraham do uniye ńel ocoyen Probhu Isor lạgitʼ onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda." 
Genesis12:8 Ar ona tayom onḍe khon Bethel nagraha reakʼ purub secʼre menakʼ buru ṭoṭha secʼe calao idiyena ar pạchimre Bethel ar purubre Ae nagraha reakʼ tala jaegareye ḍerayena. Uni do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ onḍe hõ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar Probhu Isore sewawadea. 
Genesis12:9 Tayomte onḍe khon uṭhạukate Negeb reakʼ dạkhin hahaṅkar secʼe calaoena. 
Genesis12:10 Kanan disạmre mitʼṭecʼ akal hoyena. Ona do maraṅ akalge tahẽkante, ar Abram do thoṛa din lạgitʼ Misor disạmte senkateye girobasena." 
Genesis12:11 Uni do Misor disạmte hecʼkate acʼren bạhu Sạriye metadea, “Ańjomme, am do ạḍigem cehragea." 
Genesis12:12 Ar Misorrenko samaṅre tinrem paṛaokʼa unre onko do ińren bạhu kanam menteko hudismea. Khan onko do amko dohomea ar iń doko gojeńa. 
Genesis12:13 Onate onkom metakoa, am dom ińren misera kana. Ar am iạte onko do iń sãote bhageko beohara ar jiwetʼko dohoyińạ.”" 
Genesis12:14 Abraham do tinre Misorteye seṭerena unre Misorrenko doko ńelkeda, Sạri do sạriyakʼge ạḍiye cehragea." 
Genesis12:15 Unre Pharaokʼa raj dorbarren hoṛko hõ uniko ńelkede khan Pharao ṭhen uniyakʼ kathako lạikeda. Onate Sạri do raj oṛakʼteye idi ocoyena. 
Genesis12:16 Sạri iạte Pharao do Abram sãote mońj beohare ehopʼkeda. Ar Abraham do bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako, gadhako, ũṭko, guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩkoe ńamketʼkoa." 
Genesis12:17 Menkhan Abramren bạhu Sạri iạte Probhu Isor do Pharao ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼren hoṛko cetanre aema lekan ruạ hasoke paṛao ocokeda. 
Genesis12:18 Unre Pharao do Abrame hohowadeteye metadea, “Am do iń sãote cedakʼ nonka dom beoharkeda? Cedakʼ amren bạhu do amren misera kanae mentem lạikedea. Ona iạtege coṅ ińma baplaye lạgitʼ iń ạgukede. Nui amren bạhu soṅgekate am do calaojoṅme.”" 
Genesis12:19  
Genesis12:20 Noa menkate Pharao do uniren hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa ar onko do Abramakʼ jotowakʼko salakʼ uni ar uniren bạhuko bidạkatʼkinạ. 
Genesis13:1 Unre Abram do acʼren bạhu ar acʼakʼ jotowakʼ soṅgekate Misor disom khon oḍokkate Negeb reakʼ dạkhin hahaṅkar jaega secʼe calaoena ar Lot hõ uni sãoteye calaoena. 
Genesis13:2 Abram do ạḍi kisạ̃ṛe tahẽkana. Uniren do ạḍi utạr ạsul janwarko ar sona rupạ tahẽkantaea. Tayomte uni do Negeb khone uṭhạuente Bethel hạbicʼe senena. Ar nonkate uni do Bethel ar Ae tala reakʼ ona ṭhạ̃ireye seṭerena one okareye ḍeralen ar pạhilre pinḍe benaoletʼ. Ar uni do onḍe Probhu Isore sewawadea. 
Genesis13:3  
Genesis13:4  
Genesis13:5 Lot, okoe do Abram sãoteye tahẽkan, uniren hõ aema ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi, merom ar tạmbuko tahẽkantaea." 
Genesis13:6 Menkhan mitʼ ṭhen kin tahẽdaṛeakʼ nonkan jaega do baṅ tahẽkana. Unkin bana hoṛrenge ạsul janwarko ar tạmbuko nunạkʼ ḍher tahẽkante mitʼ ṭhen tahen do muskilge tahẽkantạkina. 
Genesis13:7 Onate Abram ar Lotren gutiko talare jaoge jhogṛa hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa onako oktere Kananrenko ar Pheresiko hõ ona disạmreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Genesis13:8 Unre Abram do Lote metadea, “Ńelme, sor peṛa kanalaṅ. Onate alaṅ talare ar alaṅren gutiko talare jhogṛakʼ do baṅ ṭhika." 
Genesis13:9 Goṭa disạmge am samaṅre menakʼa. Onate dela, laṅ begarlenge. Am do leṅga secʼem bachaoan khan iń do jojom secʼ iń calakʼa ar jojom secʼem bachaoan khan iń do leṅga secʼ iń calakʼa.”" 
Genesis13:10 Unre Lot do Jordan reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire ḍher dakʼko ar jaega hõ mońjgeye ńelkeda, metakʼme Probhu Isorakʼ bagwan leka, ar onka baṅre hõ Soyer calakʼ hor reakʼ Misor leka. Probhu Isor do un hạbicʼ hõ Sodom ar Gomora do bae ḍahao marao akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Genesis13:11 Unre Lot do Jordan reakʼ sanam jaega acʼ lạgitʼe bachaoana ar purub secʼe sen idiyena. Nonkate unkin dokin apan ạpinena. 
Genesis13:12 Abram do Kanan disạmre ar Lot do ona bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ nagrahako talareye girobasena. Uni do Sodom nagraha ṭhene ḍerayena. 
Genesis13:13 Sodomren hoṛko do ạḍi bạṛicʼko tahẽkana onko do Probhu Isor upạrte ạḍiko ghạṭ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Genesis13:14 Lote begaren khan Probhu Isor do Abrame metadea, “Am oka jaegarem teṅgo akan onḍe khon utạr, dạkhin ar purub pạchim beṅgetʼ ạcurme." 
Genesis13:15 Ar okako jaegam ńel ona do am ar amren bõsko jaejug hạbicʼ iń emakoa. 
Genesis13:16 Iń do amren bõsko gitil lekań saṅgekoa. Dhạrti reakʼ gitil jodi jãhãeko lekha daṛeakʼ khan enḍekhan am bõsren hoṛ hõko lekha caba daṛeakoa. 
Genesis13:17 Am do goṭa disạm mitʼ dhao dãṛã ạcurme, ente iń do noa disạmge amiń emama.”" 
Genesis13:18 Unre Abram do acʼakʼ tạmbukoe uṭhạukeda ar Hebron ṭoṭha reakʼ Mamre ńutuman mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ sonot dareko ṭhene ḍerayena. Ar onḍehõ uni do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ pinḍe benaokeda. 
Genesis14:1 Sinạr disạmren Amraphe raj, Elasarren Ariok raj, Elamren Kedarlaomer raj ar Goyimren Tidạl raj-" 
Genesis14:2 Noko ponea rapajko do mitʼkate Sodomren raj Bera, Gomoraren raj Birsạ, Admaren raj Sinạb, Seboyimren raj Semeber ar Belaren, metakʼme, Soarren raj upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena." 
Genesis14:3 Noko mõṛẽ goṭen raj do akoren palṭonko mitʼ ṭhenko jarwaketʼkote Sidim buru lodamteko calaoena. Noa jaega do buluṅ doreão hõko metakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis14:4 Noa lahare noko rajko do gelbar bochor hạbicʼ Kedarlaomer gobolreko tahẽkana, menkhan gelpe bochorre hecʼkate onko doko hulkeda." 
Genesis14:5 Ar ona dosar bochor do Kedarlaomer raj ar uni sãotenko do senkate Rephayimko, Susiko, Emiko, Hamrenko bhagaoketʼkoa. Ar Rephayimko do Asterot Karnạimren, Susiko do Hamren, Emiko do Sawe kiriạthạimren ar Horiko do El- Paran reakʼ Seyir buru ṭoṭhareko bhagaoketʼkoa. El-Paran do hahaṅkar ṭoṭhare tahẽkana." 
Genesis14:6  
Genesis14:7 Ona tayom noko rajko doko ạcurente En-Mispạt, metakʼme, Kadesteko boloyena. Onko do Amalekikoakʼ goṭa disạmko hatkeda ar Hasason- Tamar nagrahare okoe Amoriko tahẽkan onkoko bhagaoketʼkoa." 
Genesis14:8 Noako ghoṭna tayom Sodom, Gomora, Adma, Seboyim ar Bela, metakʼme Soarren rajko do Elamren raj Kedarlaomer, Goyimren raj Tidạl, Sinạrren raj Amraphel ar Elasaren raj Ariok sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ Sidim tapolre onkoren palṭonko jarwaketʼkoa. Ponea raj upạrte mõṛẽ goṭen raj do lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoena." 
Genesis14:9  
Genesis14:10 Sidim bilạn ṭạnḍire Alkatrate perecʼ aema ghaḍlakʼko tahẽkana. Tinre Sodom ar Gomorren rajko dạṛetʼ tahẽkana unre onko modren adomko do ona alkatra ghaḍlakʼreko ńurena, ar eṭakʼko do buru secʼko dạṛkeda." 
Genesis14:11 Okoe rajko jitạuen onko do Sodom ar Gomora reakʼ sanam dhon durib ar jomakʼko luṭ idikeda. 
Genesis14:12 Abramren bhạcạt koṛa Lot do unre Sodomreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Onko raj do uniyakʼ dhon durib sudhạ uni hõko sapʼ idikedea. 
Genesis14:13 Mitʼṭen hoṛ doe dạṛ paskao hecʼente Ibri hoṛ Abram ona khobore lạiyadea. Abram do ona jokhecʼ Amori hoṛ Mamreyakʼ Elon bir ṭhere girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Mamre do Eskol ar Anerren boehae tahẽkana. Unkin do Abram sãote gatekʼ reakʼkin bondobos akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Genesis14:14 Abram do tinreye ańjomkeda, acʼren sor peṛa do onko rajko sapʼ idiakadea unre uni do acʼren pesae irạl gel gạkhuṛ lạṛhại gutikoanteye oḍok calaoena ar Dan nagraha hạbicʼ bạirikoe khudạu idiketʼkoa. Noko gutiko do acʼakʼ oṛakʼregeko janamlena." 
Genesis14:15 Uni do acʼren hoṛkoe hạṭińketʼkoa ar ńindạ jokhecʼ bạirikoe ńẽtʼketʼkote onkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Ona tayom uni do Damesek utạr reakʼ Hoba hạbicʼe laga idiketʼkoa. 
Genesis14:16 Uni do luṭakʼ sanam jiniskoe ruạṛ ạgukeda ar acʼren bhạcạt koṛa ar uniyakʼ dhon duribko hõe ruạṛ ạguketʼtaea. Ona sãote maejiuko ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko hõe chaḍao ạguketʼkoa. 
Genesis14:17 Kedarlaomer ar uni sãoten rajko bhagaokate Abram do tinreye ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Sodomren raj do uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ Sawe buru nalare, metakʼme rajakʼ buru nalareye oḍok hecʼena." 
Genesis14:18 Salemren raj Melkisedek do Abram lạgitʼ piṭhạ ar darkha rasae ạgukeda. Uni do maraṅ Isorren naekeye tahẽkana. 
Genesis14:19 Uni do Abram bhoradeteye metadea, “Serma ar ot okoeye sirjạu akatʼ uni maraṅ Isor do Abrame bhoraema." 
Genesis14:20 Okoe do amren bạiriko amakʼ tireye jimạketʼko uni maraṅ Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtae ma.” Unre Abram do acʼakʼ ruạṛ ạguakatʼ jinisko reakʼ gel hĩs khon mitʼ hĩs do Melkisedeke emadea. 
Genesis14:21 Sodomren raj do Abrame metadea, “Am do dhon durib sanamakʼ dohoyme menkhan eken ińren hoṛko imạńme.”" 
Genesis14:22 Abram do Sodomren raje metadea, “Serma ar ot okoeye sirjạu akatʼ uni maraṅ Probhu Isorakʼ ńutumte ti tulkań kiriạkʼ kana," 
Genesis14:23 amakʼ jãhãn jinis, metakʼme mitʼṭecʼ sui se panahe reakʼ totolakʼ hõ bạń hataoa. Iń do noań kiriạkʼkana jemon bam mendaṛeakʼ, amakʼ dhonte Abram doe kisạ̃ṛ akana mente." 
Genesis14:24 Ińren hoṛko okako jomakatʼ ona chaḍa ar cetʼge bạń hataoa; menkhan Aner, Esko ar Mamre, okoe do iń soṅgeteko calaolen onkoakʼ bhag do hatao ocoakome." 
Genesis15:1 “Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Abram dorsonteye metadea, “Abram, alom botorokʼa. Ḍhal leka iń do amiń rukhiyạmea, ar amakʼ kuṛại do maraṅ hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis15:2 Abrame menkeda, “E Probhu, Ińren Isor, am do cetʼem imạńa. Ińren ma cele gidrạge coṅ bạnukʼko. Ińiń gujukʼ tayom do Damesekren Elieserge ińakʼ sompottiren mạlik doe hoyokʼa." 
Genesis15:3 Am do hopon hõ bam emakawạdińa. Onate ińakʼ oṛakʼren mitʼṭen guti do ińakʼ sompottiren ạidạriyicʼe hoyokʼa.” 
Genesis15:4 Unre Probhu Isor do Abram metadea, “Baṅa, uni do bae hoyokʼa. Amren hoponge amakʼ sompottiren ạidạriyicʼe hoyokʼ.”" 
Genesis15:5 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Abram bahrete idikedeteye metadea, “Serma secʼ beṅged me arem daṛeakʼ khan ipilko lekhakom. Am bõsren hoṛ do onko ipil leka alekhako hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abram do Probhu Isorakʼ kathareye pạtiạuena ar onate Isor do dhorom menteye ataṅkedea. 
Genesis15:7 Probhu Isor do Abrame metadea, “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. Noa disạmem ạidạrijoṅ lạgitʼ ińge Kạldikoakʼ Ur nagraha khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼmea.”" 
Genesis15:8 Unre Abrame menkeda, “E Probhu, ińren Isor, iń do cekateń baḍaea, noa disạm do ińakʼ ạidạrire hijukʼa mente?”" 
Genesis15:9 Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am do mitʼṭen bạchur, ar mitʼṭen merom ar mitʼṭen bheḍa iń ṭhenem ạgukoa. Onko sanamkoakʼ umer do jemon pe bochor hoyokʼ. Ona sãote mitʼṭen potam ar mitʼṭen parwa hopon hõ soṅgetem ạgukinạ.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abram do onkageye kạmikeda. Uni do onkoe ạguketʼkote talateye paṛakʼketʼkoa ar mimitʼ paṛakʼ do ona reakʼ ulṭạu secʼe sajao dohokeda, menkhan cẽṛẽ do bae paṛakʼletʼkinạ." 
Genesis15:11 Unre gidiko hecʼkate mạ̃ṛĩ cetanreko hecʼena, menkhan Abram do onkoe laga ńirketʼkoa." 
Genesis15:12 Tinre ạyupʼ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Abram doe jạpitʼkeda. Ar kajake jạpitʼ akatʼ tahẽkanre mitʼṭecʼ botoranakʼ ńut do unire hecʼena. 
Genesis15:13 Unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Noa katha do khạṭigem baḍaea, am bõsren hoṛko do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ disạmreko girobasokʼa one okaṭakʼ do apeakʼ baṅkan. Onḍe onko do eṭakʼkoren guti hoekate ponsae bochor hạbicʼko santao ocokʼa." 
Genesis15:14 Menkhan okoe onko golam menteko khaṭaoko onko jạtrenko doń sạjạikoa. Ar onko do ạḍi utạr dhon-duribante ona disạm khonko oḍok hijukʼa. 
Genesis15:15 Ar am do ona laharege ḍher umerre suluktem topa ocokʼa ar amren hapṛamko ṭhenem calakʼa. 
Genesis15:16 Menkhan am bõsren pon piṛhiren hoṛ do nonḍeko ruạṛ hijukʼa, ente Amorikoakʼ ghạṭ do nonka ạuri hoyokʼa one onate onkoń sạjạiko.”" 
Genesis15:17 Siń cando hạsurkate tinre ńutena unre dhũạte perecʼ mitʼṭecʼ jolokʼkan diuhe ar mitʼṭecʼ mosal do jolokʼ ńelena. Ar sajao akatʼ janwarkoakʼ paṛakʼ talate parom calaoena. 
Genesis15:18 Probhu Isor do ona din Abram lạgitʼ noa menkate mitʼṭecʼ bondobose dohokeda, “Misor reakʼ gaḍa khon ehopʼkate maraṅ gaḍa phurạt hạbicʼ iń do goṭa disạmge amren bõskoń ematʼkoa." 
Genesis15:19 Noa modre Keniko, Kenisiko, ar Kadmoniko," 
Genesis15:20 Hittiko, Pherisiko ar Rephayiko," 
Genesis15:21 Amoriko, Kananiko, Girgạsiko ar Jebusikoakʼ disạm hõ tahena.”" 
Genesis16:1 Abramren bạhu Sạri do unrehõ cele gidrạge bako hoyakantae tahẽkana. Hagar ńutuman uniren do mitʼṭen Misiriạ kạ̃ṛmĩye tahẽkantaea. 
Genesis16:2 Mitʼ din Sạri do Abrame metadea, “Ńelme, Probhu Isor doe bạńjhi ocoakadińạ. Onate am do ińren kạ̃ṛmĩ ṭhen bolokʼme. Hoedaṛeakʼa uni hotete iń do gidrạń ńam daṛeke.” Abram do Sạri reakʼ kathareye rạjiyena." 
Genesis16:3 Onate Kanan disạmre Abram do gel bochore khemaoketʼ tayom Sạri do acʼren Misiriạ kạ̃ṛmĩ Hagar sãote Abrame baplakadea. 
Genesis16:4 Abram do Hagar ṭhene boloyen khan uni doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena. Ar Hagar do tinreye bujhạukeda acʼ doe bhạrti hoṛmo akana unre uni do acʼren kisạ̃ṛren era do nihạ̃teye ehopʼena. 
Genesis16:5 Onate Sạri do Abrame metadea, “Ińre noa behok lạgitʼ dạyi dom amkangea. Ińren kạ̃ṛmĩ do amakʼ aṭetʼreń kolledea, menkhan uni doe bhạrti hoṛmo akana menteye baḍaeketʼ khan ar bae bạsutạń kana. Enḍekhan alaṅ talare okoeṭakʼ laṅ dusikana ona do ńitokʼ Probhu Isorgeye bicạrma.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abram do Sạriye roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ńelme, amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do amakʼ tirege menaea. Am oka bhagem hudisetʼ onage onkaeme.” Unre Sạri do Hagar cetanre santaoe ehopʼkeda onate Hagar do uni ṭhen khon ńir pharakokʼ hoyentaea." 
Genesis16:7 Probhu Isorren goḍet do horre hahaṅkar jaegare mitʼṭecʼ dakʼ bhumbukokʼ ṭhen Hagare ńamkedea. Ona dakʼ jharna do Sur ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ jaegate calakʼ horre tahẽkana. 
Genesis16:8 Serma goḍete menkeda, “Sạriren kạ̃ṛmĩ Hagar, oka khonem hecʼakana ar okatem calakʼkana?” Hagare roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do ińren kisạ̃ṛren bạhu ṭhen khoniń dạṛjoṅkana.”" 
Genesis16:9 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍete menkeda, “Amren kisạ̃ṛ era ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼme ar uni tabere tahenme.”" 
Genesis16:10 Uni do arhõe metadea, “Am bõsren hoṛko nonkań saṅgekoa, onko do bako lekha caba daṛeakoa.”" 
Genesis16:11 Uni do arhõe metadea, “Ńelme, am dom bhạrti hoṛmo akana. Amren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyokʼtama. Uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Ismaelem dohoytaea (metakʼme, Isore ańjoma), ente amakʼ duk reakʼ rakʼ do Probhu Isore ańjomakada." 
Genesis16:12 Menkhan manwa hoykate hõ uni do bir gadha lekan hoṛe hoyokʼa. Uniren do sanamkoge bạiriko hoyokʼtaea ar eṭakʼko hõ uni do bạiri lekako hudisea. Uni do acʼren boehakoakʼ disạmreye girobasokʼa.” 
Genesis16:13 Noa katha ańjomkate Hagar do mon monteye menkeda, “Iń do cetʼ sạrige uniń ńelkedea one uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre minạń?” Hagar sãote okoeye roroṛkan tahẽkan, uni Probhu lạgitʼge Hagar do unreye menkeda, “Am dom Isor kana, iń do am samaṅre minạńa.”" 
Genesis16:14 Ona iạte Kades ar Bered talare okaṭakʼ kuń menakʼ ona reakʼ ńutum do Ber-lahai-roi kuń hoyena (metakʼme, “Okoeye jiwetʼge ar ińe ńelakadiń uniyakʼ kuń”)." 
Genesis16:15 Ar Hagarren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyentaea, ar Abram do uniyakʼ ńutum Ismaelle dohoketʼtaea." 
Genesis16:16 Abram irạl gel turui bochor umer tahẽkanre Ismael doe janamena. 
Genesis17:1 Abramakʼ umer do tinre are gel are bochor tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do uni ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye menkeda, “Iń kangeạń sanam daṛean Isor. Am do iń sãote helmel dohoyme ar ińakʼ sana leka calakʼme." 
Genesis17:2 Iń do iń lạgitʼge ińakʼ bondobosiń ṭarhaoa ar amren bõskoń saṅge ocokoa.” 
Genesis17:3 Ona iạte Abram do otreye obmakʼena ar Isor do uni sãote katha roroṛe ehopʼena. 
Genesis17:4 Uniye menkeda, “Am lạgitʼ ińakʼ noa bondobosre cekae reakʼ do noage: Am do ạḍi utạr jạtkoren apatem hoyokʼa." 
Genesis17:5 Am do Abram (metakʼme ‘maraṅ utạricʼ baba’) mente do ar bam hoho ocokʼa, menkhan ńit khon amakʼ ńutum do Abraham hoyokʼtama (metakʼme ‘ạḍi utạr jạtkoren apat’); ente ạḍi utạr jạtkoren babageń dohoakatʼmea." 
Genesis17:6 Iń do amakʼ bõskoń saṅge ocoytama. Ar am khon aema jạtrenkoń sirjạukoa, ar am khon ạḍi utạr rajko janamokʼa." 
Genesis17:7 Noa bondobos do eken am ar iń talare tahena ona do baṅ; ona do amren hoponko ar ińre piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ calakʼa. Noa do hoyokʼa jaejug reakʼ bondobosge. Niạ bondobos do amakʼ ar am tayom bõsren hoṛkoren hõ Isoriń hoyena. 
Genesis17:8 Okaṭakʼ Kanan disạmre upriạ menam ona reakʼ jotoge jaejug hạbicʼ sompotti lekate am ar amren bõskoń ematʼkoa. Ar iń do onko sanamkoren Isoriń hoyena. 
Genesis17:9 Isor do Abraham arhõe metadea, “Noa bondobos do amakʼ okaṭakʼ cekae reakʼ menakʼ ona do noage: Am ar amren sanam hoponko piṛhike piṛhi noa bondobosko manao idiya." 
Genesis17:10 Ińakʼ noa bondobos do, cinhạ lekate aperen sanam herel hoponko do khatnakʼ hoyokʼtakoa, ona do am ar am bõsren hoṛko manao idiya." 
Genesis17:11 Aperen mitʼke mitʼ herel hoponko do hereltetʼ reakʼ laha hartape getʼ giḍikakʼa. Ar alaṅ talare okaṭakʼ bondobos dohoyen, onage hoyokʼa ona reakʼ cinhạ do." 
Genesis17:12 Piṛhike piṛhi aperen sanam herel hoponko do janam tayom irạl din hilokʼrepe khatna ocokʼa. Am bõsren jãhãegeye baṅkanre hõ amakʼ oṛakʼren gutikan khane uni hõm khatna ocoyea, ar amakʼ oṛakʼreye janam akan nonkan jãhãe guti se bidisiạko ṭhen khone kiriń akan uni guti hõ khatna ocoye hoyokʼa." 
Genesis17:13 Iń do arhõń meneda, okoe guti amakʼ oṛakʼreye janamakana se okoe do ṭaka poesateye kiriń akan, onko hõ sanamgeko khatna ocokʼa. Ar noage hoyokʼa apeakʼ hoṛmore ińakʼ jaejug reakʼ bondobos do." 
Genesis17:14 Ar okoe hoṛakʼ hereltetʼ reakʼ laha harta bae getʼ giḍikakʼ uni do jạtrenko tala khone marao ocokʼa, ente uni do ińakʼ bondobose bemanot akada.”" 
Genesis17:15 Isor do Abraham arhõe metadea, “Amren bạhu Sạri do Sạri mente ar do bae hoho ocokʼa. Uniyakʼ ńutum do Sara hoyokʼtaea." 
Genesis17:16 Iń do uniń bhoraea ar nonkan mitʼṭen hoponiń emama. Uni do arhõń bhoraea jemon ạḍi utạr jạtkoren ar onkoren rajkoren eṅgate hoyokʼ.” 
Genesis17:17 Noa katha ańjomkete Abraham do otreye ombakʼena ar landawate mon monteye menkeda, “Enḍekhan sạrige mitʼ sae umerren haṛamren hopone hoyokʼa, ar uni are gel umerren maejiuakʼ kukhire!”" 
Genesis17:18 Abraham do Isore metadea, “Ismael do am samaṅre jiwetʼe tahenma!”" 
Genesis17:19 Unre Isore menkeda, “Amren bạhu Sara do sạrige gidrại hoyokʼtaea, ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Isahakem dohoytaea (metakʼme ‘landa’). Uni ar uni bõsren hoṛko lạgitʼ iń do ińakʼ jaejug hạbicʼ bondobosiń dohoya. Tobe Ismael reaṅ okam menketʼ iń doń ańjomkeda." 
Genesis17:20 Ańjomme, iń do uni hõń bhoraea ar ạḍi utạr hoponkote uni bõsren hoṛkoakʼ lekhań ḍher ocoya. Uni hõ gelbar khũṭren janam datae hoyokʼa ar uni khon iń do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jạtrenkoń benao rakapʼkoa." 
Genesis17:21 Menkhan iń do Isahak lạgitʼge bondobosiń dohoya. Hijukʼkan bochor niạ oktege uni do Sarawakʼ hoborreye hijukʼa.” 
Genesis17:22 Abraham sãote katha roṛe sạtketʼ khan Isor do uni ṭhen khon coṭteye rakapʼ calaoena. 
Genesis17:23 Isorakʼ katha leka Abraham do enhilokʼge Ismaele khatna ocokedea. Ona sãote uni do kirińko se oṛakʼreko janam akan nonkan sanam gutiko, metakʼme uniyakʼ oṛakʼren sanam herel hoponkoe khatna ocoketʼkoa." 
Genesis17:24 Abraham do tinre acʼe khatna ocoyena unre uniyakʼ umer do aregel are bochor tahẽkana," 
Genesis17:25 ar uniren hopon Ismaelakʼ umer do gelpe bochor tahẽkana. 
Genesis17:26 Mitʼ dintege Abraham ar uniren hopon Ismael dokin khatna ocoyena. 
Genesis17:27 Ona sãote oṛakʼren eṭakʼ sanam herel hoponko, metakʼme, okoe do uniyakʼ oṛakʼreko janamlen ar bedisiạ ṭhen khonko kiriń ocolen onko jotogeko khatna ocoyena." 
Genesis18:1 Abraham do tinre Mamre reakʼ sonot dareko ṭhene girobasokʼkan tahẽkana unre mitʼ din Probhu Isor do uni ṭhene ńel ocoyena. Abraham do enhilokʼ tikin jokhecʼ setoṅre acʼakʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhene duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis18:2 Ar unreye beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan, acʼ khon thoṛa sạṅgiń ńokʼre pe hoṛ teṅgo akane ńel ńamketʼkoa. Uni do onko ṭhene ńir senente otre ombakʼkateye joharatʼkoa ar ona tayom doe metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, jãhãn osubida bạnukʼtape khan dayakate aperen guti khon do alope sahaṛokʼa." 
Genesis18:3  
Genesis18:4 Iń do dakʼiń ạguyeda, ar ape do jaṅga ạbukokʼpe. Ar ona tayom do noa dare buṭạre mitʼ ghạṛi jirạu hataṛokʼpe." 
Genesis18:5 Aperen guti ṭhenpe hecʼakana onate ape lạgitʼ thoṛa jomakʼ iń ạgulege, onatepe tirpitokʼa ar ona tayom do arhõpe sen idikʼa.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abraham do tạmbu bhitrite bolokate Sarae metadea, “Ma usạra gel irạl keji holoṅ sipime ar piṭhạ benaome.”" 
Genesis18:7 Ar ona tayom Abraham do ńir senkate pal khon mitʼṭen mońj phẽṭaṛe ạgukedete acʼren gutiye emadea. Ar guti do usạrate uniye isinkedea. 
Genesis18:8 Abraham do ona isin akatʼ jel sãote toa ar dahe hõe ematʼkoa. Ar tinreko jojomkan tahẽkana unre Abraham do onko sorre dare buṭạreye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis18:9 Onko do Abrahamko kulikedea, “Amren bạhu Sara do okare menaea?” Uniye menkeda, “Tạmbu bhitrire menaea.”" 
Genesis18:10 Unre onko modren mitʼ hoṛe menkeda, “Hijukʼkan bochor niạ okte iń do khạṭige am ṭhen arhoń hijukʼa. Unre amren bạhu Sarawakʼ hoborre mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại tahentaea.”" 
Genesis18:11 Unre Abraham ar Sara do aema umer hoyakantạkin tahẽkana ar Sara hõ gidrạ hoyokʼ reakʼ umer do caba akantae tahẽkana. 
Genesis18:12 Onate Sara do mone monte landaketʼteye menkeda, “Ińren jãwãe doe haṛam akana ar iń hoń joko cabayena; giticʼmidokʼ reakʼ rạskạ do cetʼ arhõ ruạṛ hecʼạńạ?”" 
Genesis18:13 Unre Probhu Isor do Abrahame metadea, “Sara do buḍhi umerre gidrại hoyokʼtae reakʼ katha ańjomkate cedakʼe landakeda?" 
Genesis18:14 Probhu Isor ṭhen bin leṭejokʼakʼ do cetʼge bạnukʼanaṅ. Hijukʼkan bochor niạ okte iń do arhõ am ṭheniń hijukʼa ar unre Sarawakʼ hoborre mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại tahena.” 
Genesis18:15 Unre Sara do botor rakapʼadete landa reakʼ kathae baṅketʼteye menkeda, “Baṅa, iń do bacoṅ landa akatʼ.” Menkhan Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Ona do sạri katha do baṅkana; am dom landa akatʼgea!”" 
Genesis18:16 Noa tayom onko pe hoṛ do onḍe khonko beretʼena ar Sodom secʼko beṅgetʼkeda. Ar Abraham do onko koyokʼgotʼkako lạgitʼ onko sãote thoṛa sạṅgiń ńokʼe calaoena. 
Genesis18:17 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Okaṭakʼ iń cekae lạgidokʼkan ona do cetʼ Abraham khoniń danaṅkakʼa?" 
Genesis18:18 Abraham ar uni bõsren hoṛko khonge coṅ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ daṛean jạtrenkoń sirjạuko ar onko iạtege coṅ dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko ma bhorko ńam. 
Genesis18:19 Iń Probhu Isor do noa lạgitʼge uniń bachao akadea jemon acʼren hoponko ar oṛakʼren eṭakʼ sanamko dhorom ar ińakʼ sanaleka calakʼ reakʼ solhae emako. Ar onko do uniyakʼko ańjomtaete onka lekako calakʼ, enḍekhan iń Probhu Isor do Abraham reaṅ okań menakatʼ onageń onkaea.”" 
Genesis18:20 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Sodom ar Gomora upạrte ạḍi gulmal calakʼkana, ar onkoakʼ kại do ạḍi bạṛicʼgetakoa." 
Genesis18:21 Ona iạte iń do latarte pheḍkateń ńela, onko okako cekayetʼkan ona do sạriyakʼkana se baṅa. Ar onka baṅkanre hõ iń do onań baḍae daṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis18:22 Unre eṭakʼ bar hoṛ do ạcurente Sodom secʼ calakʼkin ehopʼena ar Abraham do Probhu Isor samaṅreye teṅgo tahẽyena. 
Genesis18:23 Ar Abraham do Probhu Isor ṭhen sorenteye menkeda, “Menkhan am do cetʼ bạṛicʼ hoṛko sãote dhorom hoṛko hõm maraokoa?" 
Genesis18:24 Nagrahare jodi mõṛẽgel dhorom hoṛko tahen enḍekhan onko mõṛẽgel iạte cetʼ goṭa nagraha bam moneyakʼte onam marao giḍikakʼa? 
Genesis18:25 Noa do am lạgitʼ baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa. Bạṛicʼ hoṛko sãote dhorom hoṛkom maraoko ona do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa. Dhạrtiren bikʼcạricʼ do cetʼ hok reakʼ bae bicạra?” 
Genesis18:26 Unre Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Sodom nagrahare mõṛẽgel dhorom hoṛko ńamokʼ enḍekhan, onko iạte nagraha do bạń maraoa.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahame menkeda, “Ńelme, dhuṛi ar torocʼ chaḍa am samaṅre iń do celegeń baṅkana, enhõ iń do dilkate ińren Probhu Isor sãote kathań roṛeda." 
Genesis18:28 Mõṛẽgel dhorom hoṛ baṅkate onḍe mõṛẽ hoṛ komko ńamokʼ enḍekhan onko mõṛẽ hoṛ kom iạte goṭa nagraham marao giḍikakʼa?” Uniye menkeda, “Onḍe pongel mõṛẽ hoṛiń ńamko enḍekhan ona do bạń maraoa.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abraham do arhõe menkeda, “Enḍekhan onḍe eken pongel dhorom hoṛko ńamokʼ?” Uniye menkeda, “Onko pongel hoṛ iạte bạń onkaea.”" 
Genesis18:30 Abrahame menkeda, “Ińren Probhu Isor do ińakʼ kathate aloe ạṛisokʼma. Onḍe jodi pegel dhorom hoṛko ńamokʼ?” Uniye menkeda, “Pegel dhorom hoṛko ńamlen khan ona do bạń maraoa.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahame menkeda, “Dilkate Probhu Isor sãote tinre kathań roṛeda unre arhõń meneda, jodi onḍe bargel hoṛko ńamokʼ?” Uniye menkeda, “Onko bargelko iạte ona do bạń maraoa.”" 
Genesis18:32 Unre Abrahame menkeda, “Ińren Probhu Isor do alo baṛeye ạṛisokʼma, iń do ar mitʼ dhaoiń meneda, onḍe eken gel hoṛko ńamokʼ?” Uniye menkeda, “Onko gel hoṛko iạte iń do ona nagraha bạń maraoa.”" 
Genesis18:33 Abraham sãote katha roṛ mucạtʼkate Probhu Isor do onḍe khone calaoena ar Abraham hõ acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Genesis19:1 Enhilokʼge ạyupʼ jokhecʼ unkin serma goḍet do Sodom nagrahatekin seṭerena. Lot do unre nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhene duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Unkin ńelte uni doe beretʼena ar otre ombakʼkate ḍobokʼatʼkinteye menkeda," 
Genesis19:2 “Ńelben, laha secʼ do ar alo ben calakʼa dayakate abenren gutiyakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼben ar ti jaṅga ạbukokʼte aṅga hạṭińokʼben. Ar ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate arhõ calakʼ ben.” Unkin kin menkeda, “Baṅ, ạliń do noa nagraha reakʼ kulhirege liń tahẽ aṅgakʼa.”" 
Genesis19:3 Menkhan Lot do ạḍiye jorae moṭketʼkin khan unkin do uni sãote senkate uniyakʼ oṛakʼtekin boloyena. Tayomte Lot do bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhại sekao isinketʼte unkin lạgitʼ mońj jomakʼe tearkeda, arko jom ńũkeda." 
Genesis19:4 Menkhan unkin ạurikin gitijokʼrege Sodomren sanam juạn ar haṛam hoṛko do hecʼkate oṛakʼko esetʼ ạcurkeda. 
Genesis19:5 Onko do Lot hohoadeteko metadea, “Teheń ńindạ bar hoṛ am ṭhenkin hecʼakan unkin do okare menakʼkinạ? Unkin do ale ṭhen oḍok ạgukinme. Ale do unkin herel hoṛ sãotele loṭghuṭiya.”" 
Genesis19:6 Unre Lot do duạr bahre hoṛko ṭhene oḍokena ar duạr doe siń toraketʼteye menkeda," 
Genesis19:7 “E boehako, ape ṭheniń nehõrokʼ kana, nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ do alope kạmiya." 
Genesis19:8 Ńelpe, ińren barea kuṛi menakʼkinạ. Unkin do tisge herelakʼ mẽtʼãhã bạkin ńelakada. Unkin do ape ṭheniń oḍok ạguyetʼkinạ. Unkin sãote apeakʼ sanaleka baṛe kạmipe, menkhan nukin hoṛ cetanre do cetʼ hõ alope cekaea, ente unkin do ińakʼ oṛakʼre asray kin hataoakada.”" 
Genesis19:9 Menkhan onkoko menkeda, “Men, samaṅ khon ocogokʼme! Onko do arhõko menkeda, “Nui hoṛ do upriạ lekate abo ṭhene hecʼakana ar abo cetanreye khobor dariyeda. Ale do ńitokʼ unkin khon hõ am sãote arhõ bạṛicʼle beohara.” Noa menkate onko do Lot ạḍiko ṭhelaokedea ar oṛakʼ reakʼ silpiń rạpudko ehopʼena." 
Genesis19:10 Unre unkin hoṛ do ti tiạrkate oṛakʼ bhitrete Lotkin aderkedea ar silpiń kin sińkeda. 
Genesis19:11 Ona tayom unkin do bahrereko teṅgo akan tahẽkan juạn ar haṛamkoakʼ mẽtʼkin kãṛã ocoketʼtakoa ar onate cetʼge bako ńelńam daṛeada. Onate onko do duạr sendrateko laṅga cabayena. 
Genesis19:12 Tayomte unkin hoṛ do Lotkin kulikedea, “Noa nagrahare jãwãe goṅkem, gidrạko se jãhãe peṛako menakʼkotama? Onko sanamko soṅgekate noa ṭhạ̃i khon oḍok calakʼme," 
Genesis19:13 ente noa ṭhạ̃i ḍahao marao lạgitʼge ạliń doliń sapṛao akana. Ente noa ṭhạ̃iren hoṛkoakʼ rakʼ do Probhu Isor ṭhen seṭer akana, ar ạliń do ona ḍahao marao lạgitʼ liń kol ocoakana." 
Genesis19:14 Unre Lot do bahrete senkate acʼren okoe jãwãe goṅkekin hoyokʼ onkine metatʼkinạ, “Usạrate noa jaega khon dela oḍok hijukʼben, Probhu Isor do noa nagraha ḍahao marao lạgitʼe sapṛao akana.” Menkhan unkin dokin hudiskeda uni doe khiloḍ kana." 
Genesis19:15 Setakʼen khan unkin serma goḍet do Lot usạrae lạgitʼkin metadea, “Ma usạragod me. Amren bạhu ar amren banar kuṛi okoe do nonḍe menakʼkin unkin salakʼ oḍok hijukʼme. Ar baṅkhan oka sạjại noa nagraha cetanre pheḍ hijukʼkan onare am hõm paṛaokʼa arem ḍahao marao utạrokʼa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Lot do menkhan hẽ nõkʼõe calakʼ kangeạńe ehopʼena. Menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ daya do uni cetanre tahẽkante unkin hoṛ do Lot ar uniren bạhu ar hoponerakin nagraha bahretekin or oḍokketʼkoa. 
Genesis19:17 Arko oḍoken khan unkin bar hoṛ modre mitʼ hoṛ doe menkeda, “Bańcaokʼem menetʼ khan dạṛme. Tayom secʼ alogem koyokʼ ruạṛa ar noa bilạn ṭạnḍire okare hõ alom teṅgokʼa. Burute dạṛpe; ar baṅ khan ape hõpe gujukʼa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Unre Lote menkeda, “Baṅ, baṅ." 
Genesis19:19 Ńelme, amren guti cetanre am dom kusi akana, ar ińakʼ jiwi rukhiyại lạgitʼ okam ceka akatʼ ona do maraṅgea. Menkhan burute do bạń dạṛ daṛeakʼa. Hoedaṛeakʼa ona laharege muhin do ińre hecʼ paṛaokʼa ar iń doń gujukʼa." 
Genesis19:20 Ńelme, dạdạṛ hoyokʼtiń khan ona huḍiń ato ma sorrege menakʼ. Jiwi bańcao lạgitʼ iń do onḍege dạṛ ocowạńme. Ona ato do maraṅ baṅkanre hõ.”" 
Genesis19:21 Serma goḍet do uniye metadea, “Iń do amakʼ noa nehõr iń dohoketʼtama. Ar okaṭakʼ ato reakʼ katham lạiketʼ ona do bạń maraoa." 
Genesis19:22 Menkhan ma usạrate nonḍe khon dạṛme. Ente onḍe ạurim seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ iń do cetʼge bạń ceka daṛeakʼkana.” Lotakʼ katha iạte ona ato reakʼ ńutum do Soar hoyena (metakʼme “Huḍiń”). 
Genesis19:23 Lot do tinre Soarteye seṭerena unre siń cando doe rakapʼena. 
Genesis19:24 Ona tayomge Probhu do sermaren Probhu Isor ṭhen khon Sodom ar Gomora cetanre gondhok ar seṅgel dakʼe jạ̃ṛĩkeda. 
Genesis19:25 Uni do ona banar nagraha, onakin reakʼ sanam jaega, nagraharen sanam hoṛko ar onḍenakʼ jumikore janam akan nonkan sanamakʼe marao giḍikada." 
Genesis19:26 Lotren bạhu do tayomreye tahẽkana ar uni do tayom secʼe koyokʼ ruạṛkeda, ar onate uni doe buluṅ ḍhipiyena." 
Genesis19:27 Dosar hilokʼ Abraham do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate ona jaegae calaoena one okare laha hilokʼ Probhu Isor samaṅreye teṅgo akan tahẽkan. 
Genesis19:28 Uni do Sodom, Gomora ar bilạn ṭạnḍi secʼe beṅgetʼketʼ khan maraṅ okocʼ culhạre cetʼleka dhũạ rakabokʼ onkageye ńelkeda." 
Genesis19:29 Nonkate Lot okareye tahẽkan Isor do ona bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ nagrahae maraoetʼ tahẽkanre Abrahamakʼ katha disạkate Lot do onḍenakʼ muhin khone ocokʼ ạgukedea. 
Genesis19:30 Soarre tahen bae dilletʼte Lot do acʼren banar hoponerawante onḍe khone oḍokena ar buru ṭoṭhateye calaoena. Onḍe uni do mitʼṭecʼ buru danderreye tahẽyena. 
Genesis19:31 Mitʼ din maraṅicʼ hoponera do huḍińicʼ kuṛiye metadea, “Baba mae haṛamokʼ kan. Ar noa ṭhạ̃ire nonkan herel hoṛ ma bạnukʼko okoe do hecʼkate dhạrti reakʼ niạm lekate alaṅe baplake laṅ." 
Genesis19:32 Dela, alaṅ do darkha rasate baba laṅ ńũ bul ocoyea ar uni tulucʼ laṅ giticʼmidokʼa. Ar onate baba hotete alaṅakʼ bõs laṅ rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ona katha lekage enhilokʼ ńindạ jokhecʼ unkin do darkha rasate apattetʼkin ńũ bul ocokedea. Ar ona tayom maraṅicʼ kuṛi do apattetʼ tulucʼe giticʼmitʼena, menkhan uni tinreye giticʼena ar tinreye beretʼena ona do Lot bae disạleda." 
Genesis19:34 Dosar hilokʼ maraṅicʼ do huḍińicʼ kuṛiye metadea, “Ńelme, hola ńindạ do baba tulucʼ iń giticʼmitʼena. Dela, teheń ńindạ hõ onka gelaṅ bul ocoyea, ar ona tayom do uni tulucʼ am giticʼmidokʼme. Enḍekhan baba hotete alaṅ do alaṅakʼ bõs laṅ rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis19:35 Nonkate unkin do ona ńindạ hõ apattetʼkin bul ocokedea ar huḍińicʼ do apattetʼ sãoteye giticʼmitʼena. Ar uni huḍińicʼ kuṛi do tinreye giticʼena are beretʼena ona do apattetʼ bae disạleda. 
Genesis19:36 Nonkate Lotren banar kuṛige ạkinren apattetʼ hotetekin bhạrti hoṛmoyena. 
Genesis19:37 Tayomte maraṅicʼ kuṛiren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyena ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Moabe dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Baba ṭhen khon”). Nui kangeae Moabkoren janam data do. 
Genesis19:38 Ar huḍińicʼ kuṛiren hõ mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyena, ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Ben-amine dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme, “Iń bõsren hopon”). Uni do ńitokʼren Amonikoren janam data kanae." 
Genesis20:1 Tayomte Abraham do Mamre khon Negeb ńutumanakʼ dạkhin hahaṅkar secʼe calao idiyena. Onḍe uni do Kades nagraha ar Sur tala reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegare girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Onḍe khon uni do thoṛa din lạgitʼ Gera nagrahare senkateye tahẽyena. 
Genesis20:2 Onḍe acʼren bạhu Sara do arhõ acʼren misera menteye lạikedea. Ona iạte onḍenicʼ Abimelek raj do hoṛ kolkate Sara acʼ ṭhene ạgukedea. 
Genesis20:3 Menkhan ńindạ jokhecʼ Isor do Abimelek kukmuteye metadea, “Okoe maejiuem ạgu akade, uniren do jãwãe menaetaea. Unim ạgu akadete am do gujukʼ secʼem mohnḍa akana.”" 
Genesis20:4 Abimelek do menkhan unhõ Sara ṭhen do bae boloakan tahẽkana; onate uniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E Probhu Isor, bin dusạnre hõ cetʼ mitʼ jạtrenkom maraokoa?" 
Genesis20:5 Uni maejiu ma acʼgeye menakawạdińa, acʼ do uni hoṛren miserat kanae, ar uni hoṛ do acʼren dadattetʼ kanae. Onate iń do sojhe hudiste noań kạmiakada; ona chaḍa ińakʼ colonre jãhãn dosge baṅ tahẽkana.”" 
Genesis20:6 Isor do kukmũ talate uniye metadea, “Hẽ, ińiń baḍaegea sojhe montege noam kạmiakada. Ar ona iạtege uni do bạń joṭetʼ ocoakatʼmea ar iń upạrte kại khoniń aṭkao akatʼmea." 
Genesis20:7 Ńitokʼ do acʼren jãwãe ṭhen idi ruạṛkaeme. Uni do mitʼṭen nạbi hoṛ kanae. Uni do am lạgitʼe koeya, ar onate amakʼ jiwi do rukhiyạkʼtama. Menkhan jodi uni bam ruạṛkae, enḍekhan disạime, am ar amren hoṛ sanamgeko gujukʼa.”" 
Genesis20:8 Noa iạte Abimelek do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate tinạkʼ do acʼ tabere kạmiyạko tahẽkan onko sanamko hoho sorkateye baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Ar noa katha ańjomkate uniren hoṛko hõ ạḍiko botorena. 
Genesis20:9 Unre Abimelek do Abraham hohoadeteye metadea, “Am do ale tulucʼ noa do cetʼlekam beoharkeda? Iń do am ṭhen cetʼ iń dos akatʼte iń ar ińakʼ rajosṭire nunạkʼ maraṅ kại reakʼ dayirem paṛao akadińạ? Nonka beohar do lek baṅ tahẽkantama.”" 
Genesis20:10 Abimelek do uniye kulikedea, “Cetʼ hudiste nonka dom kạmileda?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń doń hudisleda, noa jaegaren hoṛko do Isorre botor bạnukʼtakoa. Onate hoedaṛeakʼa onko do ińren bạhu ńame lạgitʼte ińko gocʼ botejińạ." 
Genesis20:12 Ona chaḍa uni do ińren misera hõ kanae, ente gogoe eṭakʼgere hõ ạliń bana hoṛge ini mitʼ babaren gidrạ kana liń, ar ńitokʼ do ińren bạhu kanae." 
Genesis20:13 Isor do tinre iń babawakʼ oṛakʼ khone oḍok ạgukedińa unre iń do ińren bạhuń metade tahẽkana, ‘Ińem dulạṛedeń kan ona do nonkatege udugme. Alaṅ do jãhãrege laṅ calakʼ, am do boeha mentem lạiyeńa.’”" 
Genesis20:14 Niạ tayom Abimelek do thoṛa bhiḍi, ḍaṅgra ar guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko Abrahame emadea, ar ona sãote uniren bạhu Sara hõe ruạṛkadea." 
Genesis20:15 Ar Abrahame metadea, “Ńelme, ińakʼ goṭa disạmge am samaṅre menakʼa. Jãhãregem kusikʼ onḍege am dom girobas daṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis20:16 Ona tayom uni do Sarae metadea, “Ńelme, iń do amre okań behok akatʼ ona jemon amren hoṛko samaṅre danaṅge tahen onate amren jãwãe do mitʼ hajar rupạń emaekana. Noate sanamko samaṅre sạbudokʼa, am do jãhãnakʼ bam dos akada.”" 
Genesis20:17 Noa tayom Abraham do Isor ṭhene koeyana. Onate Isor do Abimelek, ar uniren bạhu ar uniren eṭakʼ maejiukoe bogeketʼkoa. Noate onko do gidrạ janamko reakʼ daṛeko ńam ruạṛkeda." 
Genesis20:18 Abrahamren bạhu Sara iạte Probhu Isor do Abimelekakʼ oṛakʼren sanam maejiukoakʼ kukhiye bondletʼtako tahẽkana. 
Genesis21:1 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ katha lekage Sarae hirikedea ar uni lạgitʼ okaṭakʼe gokʼakatʼ tahẽkan onae onkakeda. 
Genesis21:2 Onate Sara doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena. Ar Abrahamakʼ haṛam umerre Sarawakʼ kukhire uniren gidrại janamena. Isor oka okte reakʼ kathae menletʼ ṭhik ona okterege uni gidrạwakʼ janam do hoyena. 
Genesis21:3 Abraham do Sarawakʼ kukhiren uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum Isahake dohoketʼtaea. 
Genesis21:4 Isorakʼ hukum lekage Abraham do irạl dinre acʼren hopon Isahake khatna ocokedea. 
Genesis21:5 Abrahamakʼ umer tinre mitʼsae bochor tahẽkana unre Isahakakʼ janam do hoyena. 
Genesis21:6 Sarae menleda, “Isor doe landa ocokedińa, ar ona katha ańjomkate eṭakʼko hõko landaea.”" 
Genesis21:7 Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Sara okoeṭakʼ hopon toae ńũnũae noa katha Abraham do okoe lahareye lại daṛekea? Menkhan uniyakʼ noa haṛam umerrege uniren gidrạ do ińakʼ hoborreye hecʼena.”" 
Genesis21:8 Isahak doe harayena ar gogowakʼ toa ńũ tise bạgiketʼ enhilokʼge Abraham do mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. 
Genesis21:9 Sarae ńelkeda, Hagarakʼ kukhire Abrahamren okoeṭakʼ gidrại janamlen uni ṭhen Isahak doe nisṛạu ocokʼkana." 
Genesis21:10 Ar onate uni do Abrahame metadea, “kạ̃ṛmĩ era do gidrạ sudhạ oḍok giḍikaeme, ente Isạhak sãote uni gidrạ do sompotti reakʼ ạidạriyicʼ bae hoedaṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis21:11 Gidrạ Ismael iạte Abrahamakʼ mon do bạṛicʼentaea. 
Genesis21:12 Menkhan Isor do uniye metadea, “Amren kạ̃ṛmĩ ar uniren gidrạ iạte mon do alom bạṛijtama. Sara okaṭakʼe menakatʼme am do onage onkaeme, ente Isahakren bõskoge amren bõs menteko lekhakʼa." 
Genesis21:13 Tobe uni kạ̃ṛmĩren gidrạ hotete hõ mitʼṭen maraṅ jạtrenkoń benao rakapʼkoa, ente uni hõe amren hoponkana.”" 
Genesis21:14 Unre Abraham do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate thoṛa jomakʼ ar dakʼte perecʼ mitʼṭecʼ kum Hagare emadete tarenrey ladeadea. Ar ona tayom gidrạ hõ tireye caladete uniye bidạkadea. Hagar do onḍe khon oḍokʼkate Ber-Seba reakʼ hahaṅkarre ạcur baṛaye ehopʼena. 
Genesis21:15 Kum reakʼ dakʼ cabayen khan uni do mitʼṭecʼ jhạuạ latarre acʼren gidrại giticʼkedea. 
Genesis21:16 Ar ona tayom do mitʼṭecʼ sar tuń sạṅgińre senkateye duṛupʼena. ‘gidrạwakʼ gujukʼ jemon aloń ńel’ mone monte noa menkate onḍeye duṛupʼena ar ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis21:17 Gidrạwakʼ rakʼ do menkhan Isorakʼ luturre seṭerena. Unre Isorren goḍet do serma khon Hagar hohowadeteye metadea, “E Hagar, amakʼ do cetʼ hoyakana? Alom botorokʼa, ente gidrạ okare menae onḍe khonge uniyakʼ rakʼ do Isorakʼ luturre seṭer akana." 
Genesis21:18 Am do beretʼkate gidrạ heweme, ente uni hotete iń do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jạtiń benao rakapʼkoa.”" 
Genesis21:19 Ona tayom Isor do Hagarakʼ mẽtʼe saṛ ocoketʼtaea, onate uni do dakʼte perecʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍạḍiye ńel ńamkeda. Ar ona ḍạḍi ṭhen senkate uni do acʼakʼ kume perecʼketʼte gidrại ńũ ocokedea." 
Genesis21:20 Isor do uni gidrạ ńel todarote ehopʼena, ar uni gidrạ doe sẽṛã idiyena. Uni do hahaṅkarreye tahẽyena ar akʼ sar enecʼreye paka idiyena." 
Genesis21:21 Uni do Paran ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hahaṅkar ṭoṭhare girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Ar uniren eṅgattetʼ do Misor disạmren mitʼṭen kuṛi sãoteye baplakadea. 
Genesis21:22 Ona oktere Abimelek ar acʼren maraṅ senapoti Pikol do Abraham ṭhen hecʼkatekin menkeda, “Am jãhãnakʼgem kạmiyetʼ amakʼ joto kạmirege Isor do am sãote menaea." 
Genesis21:23 Onate am do Isor ńutumte ńit iń ṭhen noa kiriạkʼme, iń ar ińren hoponko sãote se ińren bõsko sãote am do eṛe bam beohara. Cetʼ leka am tulucʼ pạtiạr salakʼ iń beohar akatʼ, ṭhik onkage amhõ iń sãote ar oka disạmre upriạ menam ona disạmren hoṛko sãote pạtiạr salakʼem beohara.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahame menkeda, “Hẽ, iń doń kiriạkʼ kana.”" 
Genesis21:25 Menkhan uni do mitʼṭecʼ kuń babotre Abimelek ṭhene lạliskeda, uniren gutiko do jorkate acʼ ṭhen khon onako hatao akada." 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleke roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Noa okoeye kạmi akatʼ ona do bạń baḍaea. Am do noa lahare bam lại akawạdińa. Iń do teheńgeń ańjomkeda.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ona tayom Abraham do bhiḍi ar daṅgrakoe ạguketʼkote Abimeleke emadea ar unkin do mitʼṭecʼ kin bandhaokeda. 
Genesis21:28 Abraham do acʼakʼ bhiḍi pal khon eae goṭen bhiḍi hopone begarketʼkoa.
