Genesis21:29 Noa ńelte Abimelek doe kuliyana, “Noako do cetʼkana? Ar noko eae goṭen bhiḍi hopon begarko reakʼ mane baṅ cetʼkan?”" 
Genesis21:30 Abrahame menkeda, “Noko do amem hataokoa. Noa kuń ińiń la akatʼ ona reakʼ porman kanako noko do.”" 
Genesis21:31 Onate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Ber-seba (metakʼme “Kiriạ reakʼ kuń”), ente nonḍege unkin dokin kiriạlena." 
Genesis21:32 Ber-sebare noa bondoboskin bandhaoketʼ tayom Abimelek ar acʼren maraṅ senapoti Pikol do ạkinakʼ disạm, metakʼme Philistikoakʼ disạmtekin ruạṛ calaoena." 
Genesis21:33 Abraham do Ber-Sebare Probhu Isor, metakʼme okoe do etohopʼ ar ses bạnukʼtae uni Isore sewawadea. Ar onḍe do mitʼṭecʼ jhão dareye rohoekeda." 
Genesis21:34 Abraham do Philistikoakʼ disạmre ḍher dine tahẽyena. 
Genesis22:1 Noako ghoṭna tayom Isor do Abraham biḍạureye paṛao ocokedea. Isor do uniye hohowadea, “E Abraham.” Abrahame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Minạńgea.”" 
Genesis22:2 Isore menkeda, “Amren gidrạ, amren uni sadher hopon, okoe do ạḍim dulạṛede uni ar am do Moriạ ṭoṭhate calakʼ ben. Ar onḍe okaṭakʼ buru reakʼ kathań lạiyam onḍe mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate uni samaṅem.”" 
Genesis22:3 Onate Abraham do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate gadhae palanadea. Ar ona tayom acʼren hopon Isahak ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sahane hataokeda ar acʼren barea gutiye soṅgeketʼkinte Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ kathae metade tahẽkan ona secʼe mohnḍayena. 
Genesis22:4 Ar tesar hilokʼ Abraham doe beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan sạṅgińre ona ṭhạ̃iye ńel ńamkeda. 
Genesis22:5 Unre acʼren gutiye metatʼkinạ, “Gadha ar aben do nonḍege tahẽ hataṛokʼben; ar ińren hopon ar iń do onḍeliń calaolenge. Ar onḍe dewa sewa sạtkate arhõ aben ṭhen liń ruạṛ hijukʼa.”" 
Genesis22:6 Noa menkate Abraham do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sahan bojha do acʼren hopone gokʼadea ar acʼ do seṅgel ar chorae hataokeda. Ar ona tayom do mitʼte taṛamkin ehopʼena. 
Genesis22:7 Unre Isahak do acʼren apate metadea, “E ba.” Abrahame menkeda, “Hẽ beṭa cetʼem meneda?” Isahake menkeda, “Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sahan ar seṅgel ma menakʼ talaṅge, menkhan alaṅren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ bheḍa hopon do ukuricʼ?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahame menkeda, “E beṭa, Isorge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren dãṛẽ lạgitʼ bheḍa hopone jogaṛ alaṅa.” Ar noako katha roṛ roṛte unikin dokin laha idiyena." 
Genesis22:9 Ar oka jaega reakʼ katha Isor do Abrahame metade tahẽkan onḍekin seṭerena. Onḍe seṭerkate unkin do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍkin benaokeda ar onare sahankin ladekeda. Ar Abraham do Isahakakʼ ti-jaṅgae tolketʼtaete ona pinḍ reakʼ sahan cetanreye dohokedea. 
Genesis22:10 Ona tayom acʼren hopon teṅgene lạgitʼ uni do chora hataokate tiye tulketʼtaea. 
Genesis22:11 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do serma khon uniye hohoadea, “E Abraham, E Abraham!” Abrahame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Nõkʼõe minạńgea.”" 
Genesis22:12 Goḍete menkeda, “Hoponme teṅgene lạgitʼ ti do alom tul tama se unire cetʼge alom cekaea. Isor botorae hoṛkanem ona do ńitokʼ bujhạuena, ente iń ńutumte amren sadher hopon teṅgene lạgitʼ do bam pạclena.”" 
Genesis22:13 Unre Abraham do beṛhaeteye beṅgetʼ ạcurketʼ khan acʼ tayomre mitʼṭen bheḍa do jhạuạre dereń aṭkao akane ńelkedea. Unre Abraham do uni bheḍae ạgukedea ar acʼren hopon bodolte uniye teṅgenkedea. 
Genesis22:14 Ar ona jaega reakʼ ńutum Yehowa-Yire (metakʼme “Probhu Isorakʼ jogaṛ”) dohokeda. Onate teheń hõ hoṛko mena, “Probhu Isorakʼ burure Probhu Isorgeye jogaṛa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Probhu Isorren goḍet do serma khon Abraham arhõ hohoadeteye metadea, “Am do amren gidrạ, uni sadher hopon dãṛẽye lạgitʼ bam pạclena. Ona iạte iń Probhu Isor do ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda," 
Genesis22:16  
Genesis22:17 khạṭigeń bhorama, ar sermaren ipilko ar jalapuri reakʼ gitil leka amakʼ bõsrenkoń saṅge ocokoa. Am bõsren hoṛ do akoren bạirikoakʼ nagrahako jitạu joṅa," 
Genesis22:18 Ar amren bõsko hotete dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do bhorko ńama. Am do ińakʼ hukumem manao akatʼte onań onkaea.” 
Genesis22:19 Noa tayom Abraham do acʼren gutikin ṭhene ruạṛ hecʼena. Unre jotoko mitʼ dhaote onḍe khon Ber-sebateko ruạṛ hecʼena; ar nonḍege Abraham doe tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis22:20 Noako ghoṭna tayom Abraham doe ańjomkeda, uniren boeha Nahorren bạhu Milkạ do gidrạkoe janam akatʼkoa." 
Genesis22:21 Nahorren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Us. Ar ona tayom do Bus ar Kemuelakʼ janam hoyena. Kemuelren hoponakʼ ńutum do Aram tahẽkana. 
Genesis22:22 Nahorren eṭakʼ hoponkoakʼ ńutum do Kesed, Hajo, Pildas, Jidlaph ar Bethuel." 
Genesis22:23 Bethuelren hoponera do Rebekae tahẽkana. Abrahamren boeha Nahorren bạhu Milkạwakʼ kukhire noko irạl goṭecʼ hoponko janamlena. 
Genesis22:24 Nahorren do mitʼṭen chuṭki erae tahẽkantaea uniyakʼ ńutum do Ruma. Ar uniyakʼ kukhire do Tebah, Gaham, Tahas ar Makat, nokoko janamlena." 
Genesis23:1 Sara do mitʼsae bargel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahekan tayom Sara do Kanan disạm reakʼ Kiriath-Arba nagrahareye gocʼena. Noa nagraha do ńitokʼ Hebronko metakʼkana. Sarae gocʼen khan Abraham do sara lạgitʼ homor halaṅe ehopʼena. 
Genesis23:2  
Genesis23:3 Uni do acʼren gocʼakan bạhu ṭhen khon beretʼkate onḍe Hethrenkoe metatʼkoa," 
Genesis23:4 “Iń do eṭakʼ disạm khon upriạ lekate apeko talareń girobasokʼ kana. Ona iạte dayakate topa ṭạnḍi benao lạgitʼ ape talare thoṛa jaega aṛakʼ ạńpe jemon ińren bạhuń topa daṛeae.” 
Genesis23:5 Hethrenko menkeda," 
Genesis23:6 “Aleakʼ katha ańjomme. Am do nonḍe ale talare Isorren ojokʼicʼ mitʼṭen mukhiyạm hoyakana. Aleakʼ joto khon mońj utạrakʼ toparege amren bạhu do topakaeme. Amren bạhu topaye lạgitʼ aleko modre okoehõ acʼakʼ topa ṭhạ̃i aṛag do bae baron mea.” 
Genesis23:7 Unre Abraham doe beretʼena ar ona ṭoṭharen Hethren hoṛkoe ḍobokʼatʼkoa. 
Genesis23:8 Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Ińren bạhu nonḍeń topaye iạte apeakʼ jãhãn tạkicʼakʼ bạnukʼ khan tobe do dayakate ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha ańjomtińpe. Ape do iń ńutumte Sohar hopon Ephron noa nehõraepe jemon uni do acʼakʼ jumi reakʼ ses simạnare Makpelare okaṭakʼ dander menakʼ ona baṛeye aṛakʼạń. Ar ona do ape samaṅrege purạ damtegeń kirińa.”" 
Genesis23:9  
Genesis23:10 Onḍe do eṭakʼ Hethrenko sãote Ephron hõe duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Uni do Abraham roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Baṅ, baṅ, am do dayakate ińakʼ katha ańjomme. Iń bõsren hoṛko samaṅre ona jumi ar ona tala reakʼ dander do begor damtegeń emama; ar amren bạhu do onḍegem topa daṛeaea.” Unre Hethrenko hõ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenko tahẽkana ar onko hõ Ephronakʼ noa kathako ańjomkeda." 
Genesis23:11  
Genesis23:12 Abraham do otre ombakʼkate arhõ onkoe ḍobokʼatʼkoa. 
Genesis23:13 Ona tayom joto hoṛ jemonko ańjom ńam onkage Ephrone metadea, “Bam baṅle khan dayakate ińakʼ katha ańjomme. Jumi do damtegeń hataoa. Onate dayakate jumi reakʼ dam do hataome jemon ińren bạhuń topa daṛeae.”" 
Genesis23:14 Ephron do Abrahame metadea," 
Genesis23:15 “Am do ińakʼ katha ańjomme. Ona jumi reakʼ dam do ponsae sekel rupạ, menkhan iń ṭhen se am ṭhen ona do cetʼge baṅkana. Am do boroṅ senkate onḍege amren bạhu topakaeme.”" 
Genesis23:16 Ephronakʼ katha ańjomkate Abraham do bạnij beparkoakʼ soṅ lekate pon keji irạl sae gram rupạ uniye soṅadea. Ephron do Hethrenko samaṅre noa pon keji irạl sae gram rupạ reakʼ kathae menleda. 
Genesis23:17 Mamre nagraha ṭhen Makpelare Ephronakʼ oka jumi tahẽkan ona jumi ar ona reakʼ dander ar jumi beṛhaeteakʼ dareko do Abraham ṭhen sompotti lekateye ạkhrińkeda. Ar okoe Hethrenko nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenko tahẽkan onko samaṅrege uni do onae kirińkeda. 
Genesis23:18  
Genesis23:19 Noa tayom Abraham do Kanan disạm reakʼ Mamre nagraha ṭhen, metakʼme Hebron ṭhen Makpela reakʼ danderre acʼren bạhui topakedea." 
Genesis23:20 Nonkate Makpela reakʼ ona dander sudhạ jumi do topa thạ̃i lekate Hethrenko ṭhen khon Abrahamakʼ tire hecʼena. 
Genesis24:1 Abraham do unre ạḍiye haṛam akan tahẽkana ar umer hõ ạḍi ḍher hoyakantae tahẽkana. Probhu Isor do sanam secʼ khongeye bhoraekan tahẽkana. 
Genesis24:2 Ar oṛakʼren sanam khon mare okoeṭakʼ guti cetanre uniyakʼ sanamakʼ bhar tahẽkan uni do mitʼ dine metadea, “Ińakʼ bulu latarre amakʼ ti dohoyme." 
Genesis24:3 Serma ar otren Probhu Isor samaṅre iń do noań kiriạ ocoyetʼmea; okoe Kananrenko talareń tahenkan onko mod khon okoeṭakʼ kuṛi hõ ińren koṛa lạgitʼ bạhu mente do alom bachaokoa. 
Genesis24:4 Ona bodolte am do ińakʼ disạmtem calakʼa ar iń bõsrenko mod khon jãhãeṭakʼ kuṛige ińren koṛa Isahak lạgitʼem bachaoea.” 
Genesis24:5 Noa katha ańjomkate uni guti do Abrahame metadea, “Iń sãote uni kuṛi jodi hijukʼ bae reben, enḍekhan oka disạmem bạgi oṭoakatʼ ona disạmtege cetʼ arhõ amren hoponiń idiyea?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahame menkeda, “Men sontorokʼme, ińren hopon do tishõ onḍe alom idiyea." 
Genesis24:7 Sermaren Probhu Isor do iń ar ińren babawakʼ oṛakʼ duạr ar ińakʼ janam ṭhạ̃i khone oḍok ạgu akadińạ. Uni do iń sãote kathae roṛakada are kiriạ akawạdińa, noa disạm do ińren bõskoe emakoa. Uni do am lahate acʼren goḍet onḍeye kolea jemon hoponińren bạhu hoyokʼ lạgitʼ onḍe khon mitʼṭen kuṛiyem ạguye." 
Genesis24:8 Menkhan uni kuṛi am sãote hijukʼ bae reben, enḍekhan ińakʼ noa kiriạ khon am dom chaḍaogea. Menkhan ińren hopon do tishõ onḍe alom idiyea.”" 
Genesis24:9 Unre uni guti do acʼren kisạ̃ṛakʼ bulu latarre tiye dohoketʼte noa babotre uni ṭhene kiriạyena. 
Genesis24:10 Niạ tayom uni guti do acʼren kisạ̃ṛren ũṭko khon gel goṭen ũṭe hataoketʼkoa. Ar kisạ̃ṛakʼ joto lekan jinis khon thoṛa thoṛa hataokate Aram-Naharaim disạmteye mohnḍayena. 
Genesis24:11 Ona nagraha bahrere mitʼṭecʼ kuń tahẽkana. Uni guti do onḍe seṭerkate ũṭko ona kuń ṭhene ikhṛum ocoketʼkoa. Unre ạyupʼ hijukʼkan tahẽkana, ar kuṛikoakʼ dakʼ lo okte hõ hoyakan tahẽkana." 
Genesis24:12 Unre uni guti do noa menkate koeyana, “E Probhu, ińren kisạ̃ṛ Abrahamren Isor, teheń noa reakʼ sanamakʼge amakʼ tireń dohokeda ar ińren kisạ̃ṛ Abrahamem emakade reakʼ amakʼ katha baṛe disạime." 
Genesis24:13 Ńelme, noa nagraharen kuṛiko do dakʼ loko oḍokʼ hijukʼ kana, ar iń do noa kuń ṭhengeń teṅgo akana." 
Genesis24:14 Onko modren mitʼṭen kuṛiń metaea, ‘amakʼ kanḍa khon dakʼ dulạńte ńũ ocoyińme.’ Ar uni kuṛiye mitạń, ‘ma dakʼ ńũiyme, ar amren ũṭ hõń ńũakoa,’ enḍekhan uni kuṛige jemon amren guti Isahak lạgitʼem bachao akade bạhu doe hoyokʼ. Ar onateń baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińren kisạ̃ṛ emakʼ katham dohoakada mente.”" 
Genesis24:15 Uniyakʼ katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege Rebeka do kanḍa hermetʼkate nagraha khone oḍokʼ hecʼena. Uni do Bethuelren hoponerae tahẽkana. Ar Bethuel do Abrahamren boeha Nahorren bạhu Milkạren hopon kanae. 
Genesis24:16 Rebeka do ńelokʼte ạḍi cehrageye tahẽkana, ar bae bapla akan tahẽkana. Uni do kuń khon dakʼ tinreye rakapʼkeda unre Abrahamren guti do ńir senkate uni ṭhene menkeda, “Dayakate amakʼ kanḍa khon dakʼ ńũ ocoyińme.”" 
Genesis24:17  
Genesis24:18 Rebekae menkeda, “Nõkʼõe, ma ńũiyme.” Noa katha menkate uni do usạra hermetʼ khon pheḍkate dakʼe dulketʼte uniye ńũ ocokedea." 
Genesis24:19 Dakʼe ńũ ocokede tayom Rebeka do uniye metadea, “Amren ũṭko hõ dakʼ iń rakapʼakoa ariń ńu ocokoa.”" 
Genesis24:20 Noa menkate uni do usạrate ũṭkoakʼ dakʼ ńũńũakʼ gamlare kanḍa reakʼ dakʼe dulketʼte arhõ kuń ṭhene calaoena. Nonkate uni do joto ũṭko lạgitʼ dakʼe lokeda. 
Genesis24:21 Ar Probhu Isor do niạ dãṛãnreye jo baha ocoyea se baṅ ona baḍae lạgitʼ uni guti do hape hapete Rebekae beṅgetʼadea. 
Genesis24:22 Ũṭko dakʼe ńũ sạtatʼko khan uni guti do turui gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mạkṛi ar banar ti lạgitʼ barsae gram ojon sona reakʼ barea sakom oḍokkate Rebekae caladeteye kulikedea," 
Genesis24:23 “Am dom okoeren hoponera kana? Ar lạiyạńme baṛe am babawakʼ oṛakʼre ińakʼ tahen lạgitʼ jaega hoedaṛekokʼa se baṅa?” 
Genesis24:24 Rebekae menkeda, “Iń babawakʼ ńutum do Bethuel. Uni do Milkạ ar Nahorren hopon kanae.”" 
Genesis24:25 Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Aleakʼ oṛakʼre aema busupʼ ar jomakʼko menakʼa ar tahen lạgitʼ jaega hõ menakʼgea.”" 
Genesis24:26 Unre uni guti do ombakʼente Probhu Isore sewawadea are menkeda," 
Genesis24:27 “Bhạgạngeae Probhu Isor do, one okoe doe ińren kisạ̃ṛ Abrahamren Isor kan! Uni do ińren kisạ̃ṛe emade tahẽkan katha ar pạtiạrtetʼ udug do bae hiṛiń akada. Unige horkoe udukʼ ạguạdińa ar iń kisạ̃ṛren boehawakʼ oṛakʼteń hecʼakana.”" 
Genesis24:28 Ar Rebeka do oṛakʼteye ńir senente oṛakʼren sanamko ar acʼren eṅgattetʼ hõ noa kathae lạiyadea. 
Genesis24:29 Rebekaren boehawakʼ ńutum do Laban tahekana. Uni do miseratakʼ tire bala ar mũre mạkṛi ńelte ar uni hoṛakʼ katha acʼren miseratakʼ moca khon ańjomkate nagraha bahre kuń ṭhene ńir senena. Ar senkate uni hoṛ do kuń ṭhen ũṭko aṛere teṅgo akane ńelkedea. 
Genesis24:30  
Genesis24:31 Laban do uniye metadea, “E Probhu Isorren bhoranicʼ, dela hijukʼme. Bahrere do cedakʼem teṅgo akana? Iń do am lạgitʼ oṛakʼ ar ũṭko lạgitʼ jaegań ṭhik dohoakada.”" 
Genesis24:32 Noa katha ańjomkate guti do uniyakʼ oṛakʼteye calaoena. Laban do ũṭkoakʼ bojhako pheḍkate busupʼ ar bhusiye jom ocoketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom do guti ar sãoten hoṛkoakʼ jaṅgae ạbukketʼtakoa. 
Genesis24:33 Menkhan tinre jomakʼe ạguadea unre uni gutiye menkeda, “Nonḍe cedakʼ iń hecʼakan ona ạuriń lại hạbicʼ cetʼge bạń jom ńũiya.” Labane menkeda, “Ma lạime.”" 
Genesis24:34 Unre uniye menkeda, “Iń do Abrahamren guti kạnạń." 
Genesis24:35 Probhu Isor do ińren kisạ̃ṛ ạḍiye bhor akawadea; ar onate ạḍi kisạ̃ṛe hoyakana. Probhu Isor do ạḍi utạr ḍaṅgrako ar bheḍako, sona ar rupạko, guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko, ũṭ ar gadhakoe emakawadea." 
Genesis24:36 Uniren bạhu Sara do ḍher umerre uniyakʼ kukhire iń kisạ̃ṛren mitʼṭen koṛa hopone janamkedea, ar uni koṛa hopon do acʼakʼ sanam sompottiye emakawadea." 
Genesis24:37 Uni do noa menkateye kiriạ ocoakadińạ, acʼ oka disạmreye girobasokʼkan ona Kanan disạmren jãhãe kuṛige uniren hopon lạgitʼ bạbu mente jemon aloń bachaoko." 
Genesis24:38 Ona bodolte uniyakʼ apatakʼ oṛakʼte senkate uni bõsren khonge jemon mitʼṭen kuṛi do uniren hopon lạgitʼ bạhu menteń bachaoe. 
Genesis24:39 Unre ińren kisạ̃ṛ iń metadea, ‘uni kuṛi iń sãote hijukʼ bae reben khan?’" 
Genesis24:40 “Uni doe metadińạ, ‘Probhu Isor, okoe doń botoraekan, unige acʼren goḍet am sãoteye kolea jemon amakʼ daṛanrem jo baha daṛeakʼ. Ar nonkate ińren babawakʼ oṛakʼte senkate ińren hoṛko modrenko khon mitʼṭen kuṛi do ińren hopon lạgitʼem bachaoea." 
Genesis24:41 Ar onko ṭhen senkate jãhãe kuṛi bako emam enḍekhan ińakʼ noa kiriạ khon dom khalasgea.’ 
Genesis24:42 “Ona iạte iń do teheń ona kuń ṭhen hecʼkate mone monte koekateń menkeda, ‘E Probhu, ińren kisạ̃ṛ Abrahamren Isor, dayakate ińakʼ noa daṛan baṛe jo baha ocoytińme." 
Genesis24:43 Ńelme, iń do noa kuń ṭheniń teṅgo akana. Ar nagraha khon jãhãeṭakʼ kuṛige dakʼ lo lạgitʼe oḍok hijukʼ ar uniń metae amakʼ kanḍa khon dakʼ dulante ńũ ocoyińme." 
Genesis24:44 Onate ińe mitạń, ne ńũiyme ar ińren ũṭko lạgitʼ dakʼe emokʼa, enḍekhan unige iń kisạ̃ṛren hopon lạgitʼ bachao akadeyicʼ bạhu doe hoyokʼma.’" 
Genesis24:45 “Ińakʼ koejoṅ ạuri mucạdokʼrege Rebeka do kanḍa hermetʼkate kuń ṭhene hecʼena ar dakʼ loe ehopʼena. Iń do uniń metadea, ‘dayakate thoṛa dakʼ ńũ ocoyińme.’" 
Genesis24:46 “Uni do usạrate hermetʼ khon kanḍa pheḍkate dakʼ dulạńteye metadińạ, ‘Nõkʼõe, ńũiyme. Ar amren ũṭko hoń ńũakoa.’ Unre iń do dakʼ iń ńũkeda ar ińren ũṭhõ dakʼkoe ńũwatʼkoa." 
Genesis24:47 “Ona tayom uniń kulikedea, ‘Am do okoeren hoponera kanam?’ “Uni doe menkeda, ‘iń doń Nahor ar Milkạ hopon Bethuelren hoponera kạnạń.’ “Noa katha ańjomkate iń do mũ reakʼ mạkṛi ar banar tire sakomiń horokʼadea." 
Genesis24:48 Ona tayom iń do ombakʼkate Probhu Isoriń sewawadea. Ar ińren kisạ̃ṛ Abrahamren Probhu Isoriń sarhaokedea, ente unige iń do ṭhik horteye ạgukedińa jemon iń kisạ̃ṛen boeharen hopontetʼren hoponera do acʼren hopon lạgitʼ iń idiye." 
Genesis24:49 Ńitokʼ ape do ińren kisạ̃ṛ lạgitʼ pạtiạrpe kạmiya se baṅ ona baṛe lạiyạńpe. Ar bape onkae khan ona hõ lạiyạńpe jemon eṭakʼ jãhãteń sen daṛeakʼ.” 
Genesis24:50 Unre Laban ar Bethuel tạkinkin menkeda, “Enḍekhan noa do Probhu Isor khonge hoyakana. Onate ale do hẽ se baṅ cetʼge memenakʼ do bạnukʼtaea." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka do nonḍege menaea; ma idiyem. Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka amren kisạ̃ṛren hopon tulucʼ uniyakʼ bapla hoyokʼma.” 
Genesis24:52 Abrahamren guti do noa katha ańjomkate ombakʼkate Probhu Isore sewawadea. 
Genesis24:53 Ona tayom uni do sona ar rupạ reakʼ gohona ar kicricʼko oḍokkate Rebekae emadea, ar Rebekaren boeha ar eṅgattetʼ hõ aema dam reakʼ jiniskoe ematʼkinạ." 
Genesis24:54 Tayomte uni guti ar soṅgeten hoṛ do jom-ńũkate onḍegeko tahẽ aṅgayena. Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre jạpitʼ khon tinreko beretʼena unre uni gutiye menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do bidạkaleme jemon ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭheniń ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼ.”" 
Genesis24:55 Menkhan Rebekaren eṅgattetʼ ar boeha kin menkeda, “Kuṛi do gel din gan ale ṭhene tahenma, ar ona tayom doe calakʼa.”" 
Genesis24:56 Uni guti doe menkeda, “Probhu Isor do ińakʼ noa dãṛãne jo baha ocoakatʼtińạ onate alope aṭkao dohokạńạ. Bidạkạńpe jemon ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭheniń ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼ.”" 
Genesis24:57 Unkin kin menkeda, “Enḍekhan kuṛi hohokate ale do uniyakʼ moca khon acʼakʼ kathale ańjoma.”" 
Genesis24:58 Onko do Rebeka hohoadeteko kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ nui hoṛ sãotem calakʼa?” Rebekae menkeda, “Hẽ, calakʼạń.”" 
Genesis24:59 Unre acʼren boehako do Abrahamren guti ar uni sãoten hoṛko tulucʼ akoren misera ar uniren dhại buḍhiko kolkedea. 
Genesis24:60 Onko do Rebeka bhoradeteko metadea, “E mạ̃i, am do ạḍi utạr gidrạkoren gogo baṛe hoyokʼme. Amren hoponko jemon bạirikoakʼ sanam nagrahako jitạu daṛeakʼ.”" 
Genesis24:61 Niạ tayom Rebeka ar uniren kạ̃ṛmĩko doko sapṛaoente ũṭre decʼkate Abrahamren guti tayom tayomteko calaoena. Ar nonkate uni guti do Rebeka soṅgekateye oḍokena. 
Genesis24:62 Unre Isahak do Negebreye tahẽkana. Ar niạko dinre uni do Ber-Lahai-roi ńutuman jaega ṭhene senakan tahẽkana. 
Genesis24:63 Onḍe khon ruạṛ hecʼkate enhilokʼge ạyupʼ jokhecʼ dheyan lạgitʼ uni do ṭạnḍireye oḍok calaoena. Are beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan ũṭko hijukʼkane ńelketʼkoa. 
Genesis24:64 Ar Rebeka hõ sạṅgińre Isahake ńelkede khan ũṭ khone pheḍena. 
Genesis24:65 Ona tayom uni do gutiye kulikedea, “Bilạn ṭạnḍi talateye hijukʼkan uni koṛa doe okoekana?” Uni guti doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni kangeae ińren kisạ̃ṛ do.” Noa katha ańjomkate Rebeka do oyonakʼteye poṭomena." 
Genesis24:66 Unre uni guti do okakoe cekaletʼ sanamakʼ katha Isahake baḍae ocokedea. 
Genesis24:67 Unre Isahak do acʼ gogowakʼ tạmbure Rebekae idikedea are baplakedea. Uni do Rebekae dulạṛkedea ar eṅgattetʼ ńutumte jiwi raṛecʼentaea. 
Genesis25:1 Abraham do Keṭura ńutuman armitʼṭen maejiue baplakedea. 
Genesis25:2 Uniyakʼ kukhire do nokoko janamlena Simran, Joksan, Medan, Midiạn, Jisbak ar Suah." 
Genesis25:3 Seba ar Dedan do Joksanren hoponkin tahẽkana. Asuriko, Letusiko ar Leumiko do Dedan bõsren hoṛ kanako." 
Genesis25:4 Ephah, Epher, Hanok, Abida, ar Eldah do Midiạnren hoponko tahẽkana. Noko joto do Ketuaren hopon ar uniren hoponkoren bõsko tahẽkana." 
Genesis25:5 Abraham do acʼakʼ sanam dhon sompotti Isahake em oṭoade tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:6 Uni do acʼren chuṭki erakoren hoponko hõ acʼ jiwetʼe tahenrege ḍhere danatʼkoa. Noko do Isahak sãote bae tahẽ ocowatʼkoa menkhan purub reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ disạmteye kolkatʼkoa. 
Genesis25:7 Abrahamren do jotote mitʼsae eaegel mõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:8 Mitʼṭecʼ mońj ar suk jion khemao tayom ḍher umer paromkate uni doe gocʼena ar acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. 
Genesis25:9 Mamre nagraha reakʼ purub secʼ Sohar hopon Ephronakʼ jumire Makpela reakʼ danderre acʼren hopon Isahak ar Ismael do unikin topakadea. 
Genesis25:10 Noa jumige uni do Hittiko ṭhen khone kiriń hataoleda. Ar nonḍege acʼren bạhu Sara ar acʼ hõe topa ocoakana. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahamakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniren hopon Isahak do Isorre bhoradea. Ar Isahak do Ber-lahae-roi ṭhen girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis25:12 Sararen kạ̃ṛmĩ Misiri Hagarakʼ kukhire Abrahamren hopon Ismaelakʼ janam do hoylena. 
Genesis25:13 Ar noa do Ismael bõsrenkoakʼ ńutum kana: Janam lekate uniren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana, pạhilre Nebayot, uni tayom do Kedar, Adbeyel, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Misma, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Thema, Jetur, Naphis ar Kedma." 
Genesis25:16 Noko gelbar hopon do gelbar bõskoren sordarko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ ńutum lekage atoko ar oneko ḍeralen reakʼ ńutum do doholena. 
Genesis25:17 Ismael do mitʼsae pegel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Ar ona tayom doe gocʼena ar acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. 
Genesis25:18 Hạwila khon Sur hạbicʼ okaṭakʼ jaega tahẽkan onḍege uniren bõsko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ar ona ṭhạ̃i do Misor aṛe, Ạsurte calakʼ horre tahẽkana. Onkoren boeha Isahak bõsrenkoakʼ disạm sorrege onko doko tahẽkana." 
Genesis25:19 Noa do Abrahamren hopon Isahakakʼ jion reakʼ Itihas kana. Abrahamren hoponakʼ ńutum do Isahak tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:20 Isahak do pongel bochor umer tahẽkanre Rebekae baplaledea. Rebeka do Padan-Aram disạmren Aramiạ Bethuelren hoponera ar Aramiạ Labanren miserate tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:21 Isahakren bạhu do bạńhigeye tahẽkante Isahak do acʼren bạhu lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda. Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ koejoṅe ańjomkeda ar Rebeka doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena. 
Genesis25:22 Uniyakʼ kukhire jawa gidrạkin janamena ar unkin do ạkin talare kin ṭhela ṭhilikʼkan tahẽkana. Onate Rebekae menkeda, “Iń do cedakʼ nonka doń ạikạueda?” Ar ona baḍae lạgitʼ uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana." 
Genesis25:23 Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ kukhire barea jạtrenkoakʼ etohopʼ hoyakana, janam khonge unkin do barea bõskin hoyokʼa. Mitʼṭen khon eṭakʼicʼakʼ daṛe do ḍherokʼa, ar maraṅicʼ do huḍińicʼren gutiye hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis25:24 Gidrạ janamokʼ oktere ńelena sạrige uniyakʼ kukhire jawa gidrạkin tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:25 Pạhilre okoeṭakʼ gidrại janamen uniyakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ roṅ do arakʼge tahẽkana ar hoṛmo do upʼte perecʼ tahẽkantaea. Onate uniyakʼ ńutum do Esau dohoyena (mane do “Upʼ ”). 
Genesis25:26 Ona tayom Esauakʼ iḍi sapʼakatʼ uniren boehae janamena. Onate uniyakʼ ńutum do Jakob dohoyena (metakʼme “Iḍi sapʼakatʼ”). Nukinkin janamokʼre Isahakakʼ umer do turui gel bochor tahẽkana. 
Genesis25:27 Nukin hoponkin harayen khan Esau do gạkhuṛ sikạriại hoyena. Ar bir pakaṛkore ạcur baṛaye ehopʼena, menkhan Jakob do mạ̃hirgeye tahẽkana. Uni do tạmbukore tahengeye kusiyena." 
Genesis25:28 Isahak do sendra jele kusiyakʼkan tahẽkante acʼren hopon Esau ạḍiye dulạṛede tahẽkana, menkhan Rebeka do Jakob bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛkedea." 
Genesis25:29 Mitʼdin Jakob do dạle suṛạ akawan tahẽkana, ar un jokhecʼ Esau do sendra khone hecʼena. Ar ạḍiye laṅgayena." 
Genesis25:30 Uni do Jakobe metadea, “Iń do ạḍiń laṅga akana. Amakʼ ona arakʼ jinis khon thoṛa jom ocoạńme.” Noa katha iạte Esauakʼ armitʼṭen ńutum do Edom hoyentaea (metakʼme “Arakʼ”)." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobe menkeda, “Maraṅicʼ hopon lekate amakʼ okaṭakʼ ạidạri menakʼ ona teheń iń ṭhen ạkhrińme.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esaue menkeda, “Ńelme, iń doń gujukʼ lạgidokʼ kana, ar maraṅicʼ hopon ạidạrite do cetʼ hoyokʼtińạ?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe menkeda, “Iń ṭhen lahare kiriạlenme.” Unre Esau doe kiriạyente maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ạdạri do Jakob ṭhene ạkhrińkeda." 
Genesis25:34 Ar Jakob do noa tayom piṭhạ ar dạl suṛạ Esaue jom ocokedea, ar Esau do jom ńũkateye calaoena. Ar acʼakʼ maraṅ hoponakʼ ạidạri reakʼ do jãhãn damge bae ematʼa." 
Genesis26:1 Abrahamakʼ oktere leka niạ dhao hõ disạmre mitʼṭecʼ akal hoyena. Ona iạte Isahak do Gora nagrahate Philisṭikoren raj Abemelek ṭhene calaoena. 
Genesis26:2 Unre Probhu Isor do Isahak ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye menkeda, “Misorte do alom calakʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm reakʼ kathań lạiyam ona disạmrege tahenme." 
Genesis26:3 Ńitokʼ noa disạmre thoṛa din lạgitʼ tahẽ hataṛokʼme. Ar iń do am sãote tahẽkate amiń bhorama. Noako disạm do am ar am bõsren hoṛkoń emakoa. Ona chaḍa iń do amren baba Abraham ṭhen okań kiriạlen ona hõń disạ dohoya. 
Genesis26:4 Iń do am bõsren hoṛko sermaren ipilko lekań saṅge ocokoa ar noa disạm do onkoń emakoa. Ar amren bõs hotete dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do bhorko ńama," 
Genesis26:5 ente Abraham do ińre tabe akane tahẽkana ar ińakʼ emakʼ sanam hukumko, niạmko ar solhako ańjom are manaoleda.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ona iạte Isahak do Gera nagraharegeye tahẽyena. 
Genesis26:7 Menkhan onḍenko hoṛ do tinre acʼren bạhu reakʼko kulikedea unre uni do acʼren misera menteye lạiyatʼkoa. Ente acʼren bạhu mente lạiyako doe botorena; uniye hudiskeda cehra iạte onḍenko hoṛ do Rebeka ńame lạgitʼ acʼko gocʼ botejea. 
Genesis26:8 Isahak do ḍher din onḍeye taheyena. Mitʼdin philisṭikoren raj Abemelek do jalna khon latar secʼe uyuńkeda. Ar ńelkateye hahaṛayena, ente Isahak do acʼren bạhu Rebekae dulạṛede kana." 
Genesis26:9 Uni do Isahak hohoadeteye metadea, “Ńelme, Rebeka do khạṭige amren bạhu kanae; menkhan cedakʼ am do amren misera mentem lại akadea?” Isahake roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń doń hudisetʼ tahẽkana uni iạte hoedaṛeakʼa iń do gujukʼ hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abemeleke menkeda, “Menkhan ale sãote noa do cetʼem beoharkeda? Jãhãe hoṛge coṅ amren bạhu ma giticʼmidokʼ lạgitʼe soṅgeke. Ar nonkate ale dusirem paṛao ocokelea.”" 
Genesis26:11 Noa tayom Abemelek do sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ kajak hukume emena, jãhãege Isahak se uniren bạhu cetanre tiye lagao uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Genesis26:12 Isahak do ona bochorge ona disạmreye cas-abadkeda ar mitʼsae doboṛ phosole ńamkeda. Probhu Isor do uniye bhoradea," 
Genesis26:13 ar onate uni doe kisạ̃ṛ idiyena. Uni do dinke dine kĩsạ̃ṛ idiyente ḍher sompottiren mạlike hoyena. 
Genesis26:14 Uniren bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako ar guti kạ̃ṛmĩko nunạkʼko saṅge idiyena, ona ńelte Philisṭiko hõ hiskạwaeko ehopʼena." 
Genesis26:15 Abraham oktere uniren gutiko okako kuńko laletʼ tahẽkan Plisiṭiko do onare hasa giḍikateko dhapao esetʼletʼ tahẽkana. 
Genesis26:16 Tayomte Abemelek do Isahake metadea, “Am do ale ṭhen khon sen joṅme, ente am do ale khon hõ ḍher daṛeanicʼem hoyakana.”" 
Genesis26:17 Onate Isahak do onḍe khone uṭhạuente Gera reakʼ khaṅgoṭ gaḍare ḍerakate girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis26:18 Onḍe uniren baba Abraham oktere okako kuńko la letʼ tahẽkan Isahak do arhõ ona kuńkoe la dohṛa ocokeda, ente Abraham gocʼ tayom Philisṭiko do onako dhapaoleda. Ar uniren apat kuńko reakʼ oka ńutume doholetʼ onage uni hõe ńutumkeda." 
Genesis26:19 Isahakren gutiko do ona rohoṛ gaḍare kuń la jokhecʼ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ kuńko ńamkeda one ona reakʼ latar khon dakʼ oḍokokʼkan tahẽkan. 
Genesis26:20 Menkhan Geraren gutiko do Isahakren gutiko sãote jhogṛakʼko ehopʼketʼteko menkeda, “Noa dakʼ do aleakʼ kana.” Noa jhogṛa iạte Isahak do ona kuń reakʼ ńutum Esoke dohokeda (metakʼme “jhogṛa”)." 
Genesis26:21 Tayomte Isahakren gutiko do ar mitʼṭecʼ kuńko lakeda, menkhan ona iạtehõ onko do jhogṛakʼko ehopʼena. Noa ńelte Isahak do ona reakʼ ńutum Siṭnae dohokeda (metakʼme “Bạiri”)." 
Genesis26:22 Ona tayom Isahak do onḍe khone ocokʼente ar mitʼṭecʼ kuńe lakeda. Menkhan niạ dhao Philisṭiko do ona iạte ar bako jhogṛalena. Ar Isahak do ona kuń reakʼ ńutum do Rebobothe (metakʼme “Ḍher jaega”) dohokeda. Uni doe menkeda, “Sesre Probhu Isorge ale doe jaegawatʼlea jemon nonḍegele saṅge idikʼ.”" 
Genesis26:23 Tayomte Isahak do onḍe khone oḍokente Ber-sebateye calaoena. 
Genesis26:24 Ar Probhu Isor do enhilokʼge uni ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye menkeda, “Iń do amren baba Abrahamren Isor kạnạń. Alom botorokʼa, ente iń do am sãote minạńa. Ińren guti Abraham lạgitʼge amiń bhorama ar amakʼ bõskoń saṅge ocoytama.”" 
Genesis26:25 Unre Isahak do onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar Probhu Isore sewawadea. Onḍege uni doe ḍerayena ar acʼren gutiko mitʼṭecʼ kuńko lakeda. 
Genesis26:26 Noa tayom Abemelek do acʼren muntri Ahusat ar maraṅ subedar Pikol soṅgekate Gera khon Isahak ṭhene hecʼena. 
Genesis26:27 Khan Isahak do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń ṭhen do cedakʼpe hecʼakana? Ape ma hiskạtege coṅ ape khonpe sạṅgiń akadiń.”" 
Genesis26:28 Onkoko menkeda, “Ale do ńitokʼ saphatele ńeleda Probhu Isor do am tulucʼ menaea. Ar onatele ṭhik dohoakada am ar ale talare mitʼṭecʼ cukti tahen do jạruṛgea. Onate dela, noa bon kiriạlenge," 
Genesis26:29 jemon amakʼ jãhãnakʼ ale hõ bale loksantam bickom sulukte cetʼlekale bidạ akatʼme onkage amhõ aleakʼ jãhãnakʼ alom loksantalea. Ńitokʼ am do Probhu Isorren bhoranicʼem hoyakana.” 
Genesis26:30 Noa tayom Isahak do onko lạgitʼ bhoje sapṛaokeda, arko jom ńũwana." 
Genesis26:31 Ar dosar hilokʼ setakʼre beretʼkate onko do ako talareko kiriạyena. Ona tayom Isahak do onkoe bidạkatʼkoa ar onko do suluk monteko mohnḍayena. 
Genesis26:32 Ar enhilokʼge Isahakren gutiko do hecʼkate akoko la akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ kuń reakʼko baḍae ocokedea, “Ale do dakʼle ńam akada.”" 
Genesis26:33 Isahak do ona kuń reakʼ ńutum Sibae dohokeda (metakʼme “Kiriạ”). Ona iạte teheń hõ ona nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Ber-seba tahẽyena. 
Genesis26:34 Esau do pongel bochor umerre Hittiạ Beriren hoponera Judit ar Hittiạ Elonren hoponera Basmạt tekine baplaketʼkinạ. 
Genesis26:35 Nukin barea maejiu do Isahak ar Rebekawakʼ jionre baṅ sahaokʼleka kin hoyena. 
Genesis27:1 Haṛam umerre Isahak do mẽtʼ reakʼ ńeńel daṛe nunạkʼ kom idiyentaea, uni do ar bae ńeńelkan tahẽkana. Uni do mitʼ din acʼren maraṅicʼ hopon Esau hohoadeteye metadea, “E beṭa.” Esaue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ baba.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isahake menkeda, “Ńelme, iń doń haṛamena; ar tisiń gujukʼa ona do bạń baḍaea." 
Genesis27:3 Onate am do, amakʼ akʼ-sarante sendra calakʼme ar iń lạgitʼ sendra jel ạguiyme." 
Genesis27:4 Ar ona tayom do ińiń kusiyakʼ leka sebel jomakʼ tearme ar ạguạńme, jemon gujukʼ lahare ona jomkateń bhor oṭowam.”" 
Genesis27:5 Isahak do acʼren dulạṛiạ hopon Esau sãote tinre kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre Rebeka do onae ańjom tiyokʼkeda. Ar Esau sendrae calao akan tahẽkanre," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka do acʼren dulạṛiạ hopon Jakobe metadea, “Ńelme, ańjomkedạń, am baba do amren dadame men akawadea," 
Genesis27:7 ‘sendra jel ạgukate mońjte jemone isin aroeate onae jom daṛeakʼ. Ar ona jomkate ạuriye gujukʼre Probhu Isor samaṅreye bhor oṭoae.’ 
Genesis27:8 Onate beṭa, ńitokʼ okaṭakʼ iń metam ona leka kạmime." 
Genesis27:9 Am do ńitge bhiḍi meromkoakʼ palte calakʼme ar moṭa soṭa barea merom hopon ạguwạńme. Iń do unkinte am babae kusikʼ leka jomakʼiń teara. 
Genesis27:10 Ar am baba ṭhen onam idiya ar ona jomkate uni do gujukʼ lahareye bhorama.” 
Genesis27:11 Unre Jakob do eṅgattetʼe metadea, “Menkhan iń dada Esau ma goṭa hoṛmore hodo hodo upʼ menakʼtae, ar ińakʼ ma bạnukʼtiń." 
Genesis27:12 Iń baba do tinre tite hoṛmoreye capoyińạ ar unreye hudisa uni doń ṭhoka akadea. Unre uni do bhor bodolteye sarapạńa.” 
Genesis27:13 Menkhan acʼren eṅgat do uniye metadea, “E beṭa, amakʼ ona sarap do ińre paṛaokʼma. Am do eken ińakʼ katha ańjomme ar senkate barea merom hopon ạguwạńme.”" 
Genesis27:14 Jakob do senkate merom hopone ạguketʼkinte acʼ gogoe emadea, ar Rebeka do Jakob acʼ babae kusiyakʼ leka jomakʼe isinkeda." 
Genesis27:15 Ar ona tayom do acʼren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ mońj utạrakʼ kicricʼ huḍińicʼ hopone horokʼadea; ente kicricʼko do oṛakʼrege tahẽkana. 
Genesis27:16 Uni do Jakobakʼ ti ar hoṭokʼre okakore upʼ baṅ tahẽkan onḍe do merom hoponakʼ hartae paṭheadea. 
Genesis27:17 Ona tayom acʼakʼ tearakʼ ona sebel jomakʼ ar piṭhạ Jakobe caladea. 
Genesis27:18 Ar Jakob do acʼ baba ṭhen senkateye hohokeda, “E ba.” Isahake menkeda, “Am dom okoe kana beṭa?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakob do acʼren apate metadea, “Iń do amren maraṅicʼ hopon Esau kạnạń. Am okam metadiń tahẽkan iń do onań onka akada. Ńitokʼ am do ma beretʼme ar ińakʼ sendra ạguakʼ jel jomme ar bhorạń.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isahake roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E beṭa, cekate unạkʼ usạra sendra jel dom ńamkeda?” Jakob roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren Probhu Isorakʼ ạyurtege.”" 
Genesis27:21 Unre Isahak do Jakobe metadea, “Dela iń ṭhen hijukʼme, jemoniń tunum ạikạume ariń bujhạ daṛeakʼ am do sạrige ińren hopon Esau kanam mente.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakob do acʼ baba Isahak ṭhene sen sorena. Ar Isahak do tite tunumkedeteye menkeda, “Aṛaṅ do Jakobakʼ kana menkhan, ti do Esauakʼge.”" 
Genesis27:23 Jakobakʼ ti do acʼren boeha Esauakʼ lekage upʼte perecʼ tahẽkante Isahak do bae bujhạu daṛeadea. Ar Isahak do uni bhorae lạgitʼe sapṛaoena. 
Genesis27:24 Uni do arhõe kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ sạrige ińren Esau kanam?” Jakobe menkeda, “Hẽ baba.”" 
Genesis27:25 Isahake menkeda, “Enḍekhan amakʼ sendra jel khon thoṛa ạguạńme, jemon ona jomkateń bhoram.” Unre Jakob do Isahak ṭhen jomakʼe ạgukeda, ar Isahak do ona khone jomkeda. Ona tayom Jakob do darkha rasa hõe emadea ar uni doe ńũkeda." 
Genesis27:26 Ar ona tayom Isahake menkeda, “E beṭa, dela hijukʼmeń cokʼamge.”" 
Genesis27:27 Unre Jakob doe sen sorena are cokʼ ocoyena, ar Isahak do uniyakʼ kicricʼ reakʼ soe ńamketʼte noa menkateye bhoradea: “Nõkʼõe coṅ ińren hoponakʼ so, Probhu Isore bhor akawatʼ jumi reakʼ lekage noa so do." 
Genesis27:28 Isor do serma reakʼ sisire emam ma, ar amakʼ jumiye bhorakʼma; Am do ḍher phosol ar nãwã darkha rasam ńama." 
Genesis27:29 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko do amko sapʼ sorama, ar sanam hoṛge amko ḍobokʼama. Am gusṭiren hoṛkoren mạlikkem hoyokʼa, onko do amko ḍobokʼama. Okoe amko sarapam onko cetanre hõ sarap paṛaokʼma; ar okoe amko bhoram onko hõ bhor hecʼakoma.”" 
Genesis27:30 Isahak do Jakobe bhoradea. Ar Jakob acʼ baba ṭhen khon ạuriy ocogokʼrege dadattetʼ Esao do jel sendra khon oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼena. 
Genesis27:31 Ar sebel jomakʼe isinketʼte acʼ baba ṭhen idikateye menkeda, “E ba, ma beredokʼte duṛubokʼme ar amren hopone ạguakatʼ sendra jel jomme ar bhorạńme.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isahak do uniye kulikedea, “Am dom okoekana?” Esaue menkeda, “Iń do amren maraṅicʼ hopon Esau kạnạń.”" 
Genesis27:33 Noa katha ańjomkate Isahak doe thar tharaoena. Uni doe menkeda, “Enḍekhan sendra jel do okoeye ạguạdińa? Iń do am hijukʼ laharege onań jomkeda ar uni hõń bhoradea, ar ona bhor reakʼ jo do unigeye ńama.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau do acʼ babawakʼ katha ańjomkate ạḍi ãṭe rakʼkeda. Ar ona tayom do acʼ babae metadea, “E ba, ińhõ bhorạńme.”" 
Genesis27:35 Isahake menkeda, “Amren bokom do eṛekate amakʼ bhore idiakada.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esaue menkeda, “Jakob ńutum emae do ṭhikge hoyakana, ente uni do bar dhao ińakʼ jaega khone ocokʼkedińa. Uni do ińakʼ maraṅ hoponakʼ ạidạri hõe hatao akada ar niạ dhao do ińakʼ bhor hõe idikeda.” Esau do arhõe menkeda, “Iń lạgitʼ do cetʼ jãhãn bhor bam dohoakada?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isahake roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ńelme, uni do amren mạlik iń hoyoco akadea ar uniyakʼ gusṭiren sanamko do acʼren gutiń hoe ocoakatʼkoa. Iń do uni lạgitʼ phosol ar nãwã darkha rasań bondobos akada. Am lạgitʼ do ńit cetʼ iń cekaea?”" 
Genesis27:38 Unre Esau do acʼ baba nehõrkateye metadea, “E ba, am ṭhen do cetʼ ona mitʼṭecʼ bhorge tahẽkana? Am do iń hõ bhorạńme.” Noa menkate Esau do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe dhurạuena." 
Genesis27:39 Unre acʼ babae menkeda, “Am okaṭakʼ jumirem girobasokʼ ona do bhage hasa baṅ hoyokʼa; onḍe do serma reakʼ sisir hõ baṅ ńurokʼa." 
Genesis27:40 Amakʼ tarwaṛegete jiwetʼem tahena, ar am do bokomren gutim hoyokʼa. Menkhan khạtirjoma tinre bam tahẽ daṛeakʼa unre am do amakʼ taren khon uniyakʼ araṛem giḍikakʼa.”" 
Genesis27:41 Jakob do acʼ baba ṭhen khon bhore ńamketʼ khan Esau ṭhen hiskạ ocokʼe ehopʼena. Uni do mone monteye menkeda, “Iń baba lạgitʼ rakʼjoṅ din do sor hijukʼ kana. Ar ona tayomge ińren boeha Jakob doń khũnea.”" 
Genesis27:42 Rebeka do acʼren maraṅicʼ hopon Esauakʼ joto kathae ańjomketʼ khan hoṛ kolkate huḍińicʼ hopone hoho ạgu ocokedete uniye metadea, “Ańjomme, amren boeha Esau do ame gocʼmea ar onate acʼakʼ jiwiye raṛejtaea." 
Genesis27:43 Onate beṭa, ińakʼ katha ańjomme. Am do Haran nagrahate ińren boeha Laban ṭhen dạṛme ar amren boehawakʼ raṅgao ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ onḍege tahenme." 
Genesis27:44  
Genesis27:45 Thoṛa din tayom tinre raṅgao cabakʼtaea ar uni upạrte cetʼem cekaleda mente onae hiṛińa, unre hoṛ kolkate onḍe khoniń ruạṛ ạgumea. Ente cedakʼ mitʼ dinte bana hoṛiń atʼbena?”" 
Genesis27:46 Tayomte Rebeka do Isahake metadea, “Noko Hitti kuṛiko iạte iń do jiwetʼ tahen baṅ sanań kana. Ar Jakob hõ noa disạmren jãhãe Hitti kuṛiye baplaye enḍekhan ińakʼ jiwetʼ tahen do cetʼ lab?”" 
Genesis28:1 Rebekawakʼ katha ańjomkate Isahak do Jakob hohoadeteye bhoradea ar noa hukume emadea, “Kanan disạmren okoeṭakʼ kuṛige alom baplakoa." 
Genesis28:2 Am do Padan Aram disạmre am gogoren baba Bethuelakʼ oṛakʼte calakʼme. Ar onḍe tahẽkate am mamaren jãhãeṭakʼ kuṛige baplayem. 
Genesis28:3 Sanam daṛean Isor do ame bhoramma ar aema hoponren apat hoyokʼ reakʼ daṛeye danama. Uni do am bõsren hoṛkoe saṅge ocokoa. Onko do aema jạtrenko hoyokʼa. 
Genesis28:4 Okaṭakʼ ạsirbad Abrahame emade tahẽkan ona ạsirbadge uni do am ar am bõsren hoṛkoe emakoa. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm Abrahame emade tahẽkan, ar onḍe ńitokʼ porjạtrenko leka menakʼme, ona disạm hõ amakʼ ạidạrire hijukʼa.”" 
Genesis28:5 Noa menkate Isahak do Jakobe kolkadea, ar Jakob hõ Padan-Aramre Bethuelren hopon Laban ṭhene calaoena. Laban do Jakob ar Esauren eṅgattetʼ Rebekaren boehae tahẽkana." 
Genesis28:6 Esaue ańjomkeda, Isahak do Jakobe bhoradea ar Padam-Aramreye kolkadea jemon uni do onḍe jãhãe kuṛiye baplaye. Arhõe ańjomkeda, bhor ńam tayom Jakob do Kananren kuṛiko hõ alo baplako reakʼe hukum ocoakana." 
Genesis28:7 Ar Jakob do acʼ go-babawakʼ katha leka Padam-Aramteye calaoena. 
Genesis28:8 Nonkate Esaue bujhạukeda, acʼ baba Isahak do Kananren maejiuko cetanre bae kusiya." 
Genesis28:9 Onate Esao do barea bạhukin tahẽkanre hõ Abrahamren hopon Ismaelakʼ oṛakʼte senkate uniren hoponera Mahalate baplakedea. Mahalat do Nebaotren miserae tahẽkana. 
Genesis28:10 Jakob do Ber-seba bạgikate Haran nagraha secʼe mohnḍayena. 
Genesis28:11 Horre mitʼ jaegare candoe hạsuren khan uni do onḍegeye aṅga hạṭińena. Onḍe do thoṛagan dhiri hõ tahẽkana. Jakob do onako dhiri reakʼ mitʼṭecʼre bohokʼ aṭhṛekateye giticʼena. 
Genesis28:12 Uni do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũye ńelkeda ot khon mitʼṭecʼ siṛhi dohoakana ar ona reakʼ mucạtʼ do serma hạbicʼ rakapʼ akana. Ar Isorren goḍet do acʼ ṭhen pheḍ hijukʼ ar rakapʼ calakʼkane ńelletʼkoa," 
Genesis28:13 ar Probhu Isor do ona coṭre teṅgokateye menkeda, “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. Am okarem giticʼ akan noa disạm do am ar amren bõskoń emakoa." 
Genesis28:14 Amren bõsko do dhạrtiren gitil lekako saṅgekʼa. Onko do purub-pạchim ar utạr-dạkhin secʼko pasnao idikʼa. Ar dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do am ar amren bõsko hotete bhorko ńama. 
Genesis28:15 Iń do am sãotege minạńa; ar jãhãtegem calakʼ iń do amiń rukhiyạmea. Noa disạmtege arhõń ruạṛ ạgumea. Ar okań galmarao akatʼme ona ạuriń purạu hạbicʼ iń do bạń bạgi giḍimea.” 
Genesis28:16 Ar Jakob do jạpitʼ khon beretʼkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isor do khạṭige noa jaegare menaea menkhan iń do bạń bujhạu daṛeadea.”" 
Genesis28:17 Ar noa katha hudiskate uni do monre botor hecʼadea. Uniye menkeda, “Noa do ạḍi botoranakʼ jaegakana! Noa do Isorakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana; serma reakʼ duạr do nonḍe kangea.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakob do ạḍi setakʼreye beretʼena ar oka dhirireye bohokʼ akatʼ tahẽkan ona do cinhạ khunṭi lekae teṅgoketʼte ona cetanre sunume dulada. 
Genesis28:19 Ar ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Bethele dohokeda (metakʼme, “Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ”). Noa jaega sor reakʼ nagraha do Lus ńutum tahẽkana." 
Genesis28:20 Noa tayom Jakob do kiriạkateye menkeda, “Ińakʼ noa daṛan horre ińe rukhiyạyiń, ar ińakʼ horokʼ lạgitʼ kicricʼe imạń," 
Genesis28:21 ar iń babawakʼ oṛakʼte napaeteń ruạṛ daṛeakʼ, enḍekhan nui Probhu Isorge ińren Isor menteń manaoea." 
Genesis28:22 Ar noa dhiri oka do cinhạ khunṭi lekań teṅgoketʼ nonḍege Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do hoyokʼa. E Isor, jãhãnakʼgem imạń ona reakʼ gel hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do amiń emama.”" 
Genesis29:1 Jakob do calakʼ calakʼte purub disạmren hoṛkoakʼ ṭoṭhateye seṭerena. 
Genesis29:2 Onḍe uni doe beṅgetʼ ạcurketʼ khan mitʼṭecʼ kuńe ńel ńamkeda. Unre ona kuń aṛere pe pal bhiḍi meromko aḍa akan tahẽkana. Gupiko do onḍe khonge akoren palko dakʼko ńũakokan tahẽkana. Ar kuń mocare do maraṅ okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhiri doho akan tahẽkana. 
Genesis29:3 Gukʼpiko do tinre sanam bhiḍi palko jarwayetʼko tahẽkana unre kuń reakʼ moca khon dhiri ocokʼkate onko do bhiḍiko dakʼko ńũ akokan tahẽkana. Ar ona tayom do arhõ dhiriteko esetʼkakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Genesis29:4 Jakob do gupikoe kuliketʼkoa, “E boehako, ape do okaren hoṛ kanape?” Onkoko menkeda, “Haran nagraharen hoṛ kanale.”" 
Genesis29:5 Jakob do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ Nahorren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Labanpe oromakadea?” Onkoko menkeda, “Hẽ, orom akadegeale.”" 
Genesis29:6 Jakob do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Uni do cetʼ besge menaea?” Metadeako, “Hẽ, uni doe besgea. Uniren kuṛi Rahel do bhiḍi palkowante nonḍeye hijukʼkana.”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakobe menkeda, “Ńelpe, siń cando hạsurokʼ do ńit hõ dirigea. Sanam janwarko mitʼ ṭhen jarwako reakʼ okte hõ baṅ hoyakana. Ape do aperen bhiḍiko dakʼ ńũ akote arhõ ạtiń idikope.”" 
Genesis29:8 Menkhan onkoko menkeda, “Baṅ, ale lạgitʼ ona do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa. Joto janwar mitʼ ṭhenko jarwalen khan kuń khon dhirile ocoga, ar unre ale do bhiḍiko dakʼle ńũ ocoakoa.”" 
Genesis29:9 Jakob do unhõ onko sãoteye galmaraokan tahẽkana unre Rahel do acʼ apatren bhiḍikoe ạguketʼkoa, ente uni do onkoe gupiyetʼko tahẽkana." 
Genesis29:10 Jakob do acʼ mama Labanren hoponera ar uniren bhiḍi palko ńelte kuń ṭhene sorena ar kuń khon dhiri ocokʼkate bhiḍiko dakʼe ńũwatʼkoa. 
Genesis29:11 Ona tayom do Rahele cokʼadete ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis29:12 Uni do Rahele metadea, acʼ do apattetʼren peṛa, Rebekaren hopon kanae. Noa katha ańjomkate Rahel doe ńir senente acʼren apattetʼ ona khobore lạiyadea." 
Genesis29:13 Laban do acʼ misratren hopon Jakobakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ khobore ńamketʼ khan ńir oḍokente uni sãote ńapamokʼe calaoena. Ar hạṛupʼkedeteye cokʼ adea ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ạgukedea. Unre Jakob do acʼakʼ joto katha Labane lạiyadea. 
Genesis29:14 Laban do uniye metadea, “Aleakʼ hoṛmore hõ inạ mãyãmge menakʼa.” Ona tayom Jakob do Labanakʼ oṛakʼre mitʼ candoe tahẽyena." 
Genesis29:15 Mitʼ din Labane menkeda, “Bhạgnạńkantem cetʼ begor beton tem khaṭaokʼa? Lạiạńme cetʼ iń emama.”" 
Genesis29:16 Labanren do barea hoponerakin tahẽkana. Maraṅicʼakʼ ńutum do Lea ar huḍińicʼakʼ ńutum do Rahel. 
Genesis29:17 Lea do eken mẽtʼ motoge ńelokʼte mońj tahẽkantaea, menkhan Rahel do rupte cehrate jotoge ạḍi napaye tahẽkana." 
Genesis29:18 Jakob do Rahele dulạṛedekan tahẽkanteye menkeda, “Amren huḍińicʼ kuṛi Rahel lạgitʼ eae bochor gutiń khaṭaokʼa.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labane menkeda, “Rahel eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛ ṭheniń goṅae khon amakʼ tire emokʼge bhagekʼ hoyokʼtińa. Am do iń ṭhenge tahenme.”" 
Genesis29:20 Niạ tayom Jakob do Rahel lạgitʼ eae bochore kạmikeda. Jakob do Rahele dulạṛede tahẽkante unạkʼ bochor hõ thoṛa din lekae bujhạukeda. 
Genesis29:21 Ona tayom Jakob do Labane metadea, “Ińakʼ kạmi reakʼ din do purạuena. Okoe lạgitʼ iń kạmiketʼ ńitokʼ uni emaliń ben jemon uni tulucʼ liń giticʼmitʼ daṛeakʼ.”" 
Genesis29:22 Unre Laban do ona ṭhạ̃iren sanam hoṛkoe hohoatʼkote mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. 
Genesis29:23 Ado ńindạyen khan acʼren kuṛi Lea do Jakob ṭhene kolkedea, ar Jakob hõ uni sãoteye tahẽyena." 
Genesis29:24 Laban do acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩ Silpạ hõ Learen kạ̃ṛmĩ lekateye emadea. 
Genesis29:25 Ado setakʼen khan Jakob do hahaṛakʼ tulucʼe ńelkedea uni doe Lea kana. Onate uni do Labane metadea, “Aben do ạliń tulucʼ cedakʼ nonka doben beoharkeda? Nunạkʼ din do cetʼ Rahel lạgitʼ bạliń khaṭao akana? Enḍekhan cedakʼben eṛe ketʼlińa?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labane menkeda, “Maraṅicʼ tahen tulucʼ huḍińicʼ bapla maṛaṅe do aleakʼ niạmre bạnukʼa." 
Genesis29:27 Noate niạ bapla hapta parom ocoakʼ ben. Ona tayom do eṭakʼicʼ hoponera liń emabena. Menkhan uni lạgitʼ aben do arhõ eae bochor khaṭaokʼ hoyokʼtabena.” 
Genesis29:28 Jakob do uniyakʼ kathae manaoketʼte ona bapla haptae purạukeda. Ar ona tayom Laban do acʼren hoponera Rahel hõ Jakob sãoteye baplakadea," 
Genesis29:29 ar acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩ Bilhạ do Rahele emadea. 
Genesis29:30 Jakob do Rahel ṭhen hõe boloyena. Menkhan uni do Lea khon Rahelge bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛede tahẽkana. Ona tayom uni do arhõ eae bochor Laban tabereye tahẽyena. 
Genesis29:31 Probhu Isor do Lea khijlạu ocokʼkane ńelkede khan uni do bhạrti hoṛmo reakʼ daṛeye emadea, menkhan Rahel do bạńjhigeye tahẽyena." 
Genesis29:32 Lea doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Ar uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Rubene dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Hạni ńeleme, mitʼṭen hopon”), Ente uniye menleda, “Probhu Isor do ińakʼ duke ńelketʼtińạ, ar ńitokʼ do khạṭige ińren jãwãe doe dulạṛińạ.”" 
Genesis29:33 Noa tayom Lea do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena armitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Ar uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Simeone dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Ańjom”), ente uniye menkeda, “Ińe hirkhạwạń reakʼ katha Probhu Isor doe ańjomakada, ar onate uni do armitʼṭen hopone emadińạ.”" 
Genesis29:34 Ona tayom uni do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uni do armitʼṭen hopone janamkedea. Uni doe menkeda, “Niạ dhao ińren jãwãe do iń sãoteye midokʼa, ente iń do uniren pea gidrạń janam akatʼkoa.” Ar noa menkate gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Lewiye dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Jopoṛao”)." 
Genesis29:35 Tayomte uni do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uniren do armitʼṭen hopone hoyentaea. Uniye menkeda, “Niạ dhao do Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea.” Onate uni do gidrạwakʼ ńutum Jihudại dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Sarhaoicʼ ”). Ona tayom thoṛa okte lạgitʼ uni do hoborjoṅe thirena." 
Genesis30:1 Rahel do tinreye ńelkeda acʼ do Jakobren gidrạren eṅgat bae hoedaṛeakʼ kana unre uni do acʼren boeha kuṛi cetanre hiskạ rakapʼadea. Uni do Jakobe metadea, “Gidrạ imạńme, arbaṅ khan iń doń gujukʼa.”" 
Genesis30:2 Unre Jakob do Rahel cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoena. Uniye menkeda, “Iń doń Isor kana se cetʼ? Unige coṅe bạńjhi ocoakatʼme.”" 
Genesis30:3 Rahele menkeda, “Ińren kạ̃ṛmĩ Bilhạ hataoem. Am do uni ṭhen bolokʼme jemon uni hotete hoborre gidrạń ńame, ar nonkate iń hõ mitʼṭecʼ gharońj iń benao rakaba.”" 
Genesis30:4 Noa menkate Rahel do Jakob sãote acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩ Bilhae baplakadea, ar Jakob hõ uni ṭhene boloyena." 
Genesis30:5 Nonkate Bilhạ doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. 
Genesis30:6 Unre Rahele menkeda, “Isor do hok reakʼe bicạr akada ar ińakʼ rakʼe ańjomketʼte mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại emadińa.” Ona iạte gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Dane dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Hok reakʼ bicạr”)." 
Genesis30:7 Rahelren kạ̃ṛmĩ Bilhạ do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena, ar nonkate uni do dosar dhao koṛa gidrạren eṅgate hoyena." 
Genesis30:8 Unre Rahele menkeda, “Isor do maraṅ lạṛhạire ińren boeha khone jitạu akadińa.” Onate uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Napthaliye dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Lạṛhại”)." 
Genesis30:9 Ar Lea tinreye ńelkeda acʼren cele gidrạge bako hoyokʼkana unre acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩ Silpạ do Jakob tulucʼe baplakadea. 
Genesis30:10 Onate Learen kạ̃ṛmĩ Silpawakʼ kukhire Jakobren mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyena. 
Genesis30:11 Unre Lea doe menkeda, “Ạḍi bhạg tiń!” Noa menkate uni do gidrạwakʼ ńutum Gade dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Bhạg”)." 
Genesis30:12 Silpạ do Jakobren armitʼṭen koṛa gidrạren eṅgate hoyena. 
Genesis30:13 Unre Lea doe menkeda, “Ạḍi suk ińakʼ do! Sanam maejiukoge iń do bhạganicʼko mitạńa.” Onate gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Asere dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Kusiʼ”)." 
Genesis30:14 Guhum gegetʼ jokhecʼ Ruben do ṭạnḍi secʼe senen khan jauḍicʼ Dudạ joe ńamkeda ar onako ạgukate eṅgattetʼe emadea. Unre Rahel do Leae metadea, “Amren gidrại ạguakatʼ dudạ jo khon thoṛa imạńme.”" 
Genesis30:15 Menkhan Lea do uniye metadea, “Ińren jãwãeyem hatao akadere hõ cetʼ baṅ hoyokʼkan tama? Ar ińren hopone ạguakatʼ Dudạ jo hõm khojkana?” Rahele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren hopone ạguakatʼ Dudạ jo bodolte teheń ńindạ uni do am tulucʼe giticʼma.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ado ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Jakob do ṭạnḍi khon hijukʼe ńelkede khan Lea doe oḍokente uniye metadea, “Teheń do iń tulucʼem giticʼa, ente hoponińe ạguakatʼ Dudạ jote am doń bhaṛa akatʼmea.” Onate Jakob do enhilokʼ ńindạ Lea tulucʼe giticʼmitʼena." 
Genesis30:17 Isor do Leawakʼ koejoṅe ańjomketʼtaea ar uni doe bhạrti hoṛmoyente mõṛẽ dhao Jakobren gidrạren eṅgate hoyena. 
Genesis30:18 Unre Lea doe menkeda, “Ińren jãwãe do kạ̃ṛmĩń emadete Isor do kuṛạiye emadińạ.” Ar onate uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Isakare dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Kuṛại”)." 
Genesis30:19 Noa tayom Lea do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyente turui dhao Jakobren gidrạren eṅgate hoyena. 
Genesis30:20 Unre Lea doe menkeda, “Isor do mitʼṭecʼ mońj dane emakawạdińa. Ńit khon ińren jãwãe doe manotińạ, ente ińakʼ kukhire uniren turui goṭen gidrạń janam akatʼkoa.” Noa menkate uni do gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Sebulone dohoketʼa (metakʼme “Manot”)." 
Genesis30:21 Ona tayom Learen do armitʼṭen kuṛiye hoyena. Uniyakʼ ńutum do Dinae dohoketʼtaea. 
Genesis30:22 Inạ tayom Isor do Rahel secʼe beṅgetʼkeda. Uni do Rahelakʼ koejoṅe ańjomkeda ar bhạrti hoṛmo reakʼ daṛeye emadea. 
Genesis30:23 Onate Rahel doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Unre uniye menkeda, “Isor do ińakʼ henostae ocokʼketʼtińạ.”" 
Genesis30:24 Ar uni koṛa gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Josephe dohoketʼtaea (Metakʼme “Uni do arhõ jemone emokʼ ”), ente uni doe menleda, “Probhu Isor do jemon ar mitʼṭen gidrại danạń.”" 
Genesis30:25 Rahelakʼ kukhire Josephe janamen khan Jakob do Labane metadea, “Ńitokʼ do bidạ kạliń ben jemon ạlińakʼ disạm ar apnar oṛakʼ teliń ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼ." 
Genesis30:26 Ạlińren hopon ar hoponerako ar ạlińren bạhu iạtege abenakʼ liń kạmi akada. Ar ńitokʼ baṛe onko seletʼ calao ocowạliń ben. Ar aben doben baḍaegea abenakʼ cetʼleka liń kạmi akada mente.” 
Genesis30:27 Menkhan Laban do uniye metadea, “Ạliń cetanre abenakʼ jãhãn bekusiyakʼ menakʼ khan enḍekhan alo ben calakʼa. Ạliń liń bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana, Probhu Isor do aben iạtege ạliń doe bhor akawatʼlińa.”" 
Genesis30:28 Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Abenakʼ beton do abenge ṭhik joṅ ben. Ạliń do onage liń em katabena.”" 
Genesis30:29 Menkhan Jakob doe menkeda, “Abenakʼ cetʼleka liń kạmi akatʼ ar ạlińakʼ tite cetʼleka abenren palko bạḍ akan, ona do abenge ben baḍaea." 
Genesis30:30 Ạliń hijukʼ lahare abenren mĩhũ-merom palko nunạkʼ ḍher do bako tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ do ḍherko bạḍ akana. Ar ạliń jãhãrege liń dãṛã akatʼ onḍege Probhu Isor do abene bhor akatʼbena. Menkhan ńitokʼ do ạlińakʼ gharońj reakʼ katha hudis reakʼ okte hoyakan tạlińa.”" 
Genesis30:31 Unre Labane menkeda, “Ạliń do cetʼ liń emabena?” Jakobe menkeda, “Aben do cetʼge emokʼ baṅ hoyokʼtabena. Menkhan eken mitʼṭecʼ katha ben doholekhan enḍekhan ạliń do arhõ abenren palkoliń gupikoa arliń jotonkoa." 
Genesis30:32 Ạliń do teheńge abenren mĩhũ-merom palko tala khon huḍiń ar maraṅ kabra chapan merom ar bhiḍiko ar bhiḍi hoponko liń begarkoa. Ar onkoge ạlińren beton lekako hoyokʼa. 
Genesis30:33 Ar tayom daram jãhãtinrege ạlińakʼ beton reakʼ ben hudis unre noko khonge sạbudokʼa, cetʼge bạliń behok akada mente. Huḍiń ar maraṅ kabra chap bạnukʼ nonkan merom se bhiḍi hopon ạlińakʼ palreko ńamlen khan onko do kombṛo akanko menteko hudisokʼa.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labane menkeda, “Hẽ, bhagegea. Aben okaben hudisetʼ onage hoyokʼma.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ar Laban do enhilokʼge acʼren mĩhũ-merom palko khon Jakob lạgitʼ lạṭu ar kạṭicʼ kabra chapan merom eṅga, metakʼme okoekoakʼ hoṛmore jaega jaegare ponḍ upʼ tahẽkan onko ar bhiḍikoren hõ hende hende hoponkoe begarketʼkoa. Onko ńel todarotko reakʼ bhar do acʼren hoponkoe ematʼkoa." 
Genesis30:36 Ona tayom uni do Jakob ṭhen khon pe din reakʼ hor sạṅgińe senena, ar Jakob do Labanren sarecʼ palko ńel todarotkoe ehopʼena." 
Genesis30:37 Tayomte Jakob do pea eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dare reakʼ berel ḍạre hataokeda ar ona ḍạr reakʼ chal jaega jaegareye chaḍaokeda. Onate ona do ponḍge ńelena. 
Genesis30:38 Ar Palren mĩhũ-meromko tinre dakʼ ńũko hijukʼa unre uni do ona ḍạrko dakʼ reakʼ gamlareye topokakʼkan tahẽkana. Ar nonḍe dakʼ ńũ lạgitʼko jarwakʼkan tahẽkanre onko doko (otoṅokʼ) milạukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis30:39 Nonkate ona ḍạrko samaṅreko milạukʼkan tahẽkante onkoren okoeko hoponko janamokʼkan tahẽkan onko do lạṭu lạṭu ar kạṭicʼ kạṭicʼ kabra kabra chapanko hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis30:40 Jakob do merom hopon ar bhiḍi hoponkoe begaretʼko tahẽkana, ar merom pạṭhi ar bhiḍi pạṭhiko do Labanren kabra ar hende merom ar hende bhiḍi palko talareye dohoyetʼko tahẽkana. Nonkate uni do acʼ lạgitʼ judạ mitʼṭen mĩhũ-meromkoakʼ pale tearkeda ar onko palrenko do Labanren palko sãote bae mesao ocowatʼkoa." 
Genesis30:41 Ona chaḍa ḍher daṛean bhiḍi-meromkoko midokʼre uni do dakʼ reakʼ gamlare onko samaṅre ona ḍạrkoe topo dohokakʼkan tahẽkana jemon ona ḍạr samaṅre onkoko midokʼ (otoṅokʼ). 
Genesis30:42 Menkhan nijor bhiḍi ar meromko samaṅre ona ḍạrko do bae dohoyetʼ tahẽkana. Onate Labanren bhiḍi-meromko do nijorkoge ar Jakobren do daṛe daṛeko hoyena. 
Genesis30:43 Ar Jakob do nonkate ạḍiye kisạ̃ṛena. Uniren mĩhũ-merom, ũṭ, gadha ar guti kạ̃ṛmĩko hõ ḍherko saṅge idiyena." 
Genesis31:1 Jakob doe ańjom tiyokʼkeda Labanren hoponko do noa kathako lại baṛayeda je, Jakob do onkoren apatakʼ sanamakʼe hatao akada ar onkoren apatakʼ sompotti iạtege nunạkʼ ḍher hoyakantaea." 
Genesis31:2 Jakob do noa hõe ạri bạndhikeda, Laban do lahate leka acʼre kusi bạnuea mente." 
Genesis31:3 Unre Probhu Isor do Jakobe metadea, “Am do amren hapṛamkoakʼ disạmren hoṛko ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼme. Iń do am são sãotegeń tahena.”" 
Genesis31:4 Jakob do hoṛ kolkate okare mĩhũ-merom palko tahẽkantae onḍe Lea ar Rahele hoho ạguketʼkinạ. 
Genesis31:5 Ona tayom unkine metatʼkinạ, “Ińiń ńeletʼa abenren babawakʼ mẽtʼãhã do pạhil leka kharsala ińre bạnukʼtaea, menkhan iń babaren Isor do iń sãote menaea." 
Genesis31:6 Ar noa hõben baḍaegea iń do ińakʼ goṭa daṛete abenren babawakʼ iń kạmiakada," 
Genesis31:7 menkhan uni doe eṛe akadińạ ar gel dhao ińakʼ betone bodol akatʼtińạ. Menkhan, Isor do ińakʼ jãhãnakʼ bae loksan ocoakatʼtińạ." 
Genesis31:8 Abenren baba do tinreye menleda, ‘okoeko bhiḍi ar merom do kạṭicʼ kạṭicʼ kabra kabra chapanko hoyokʼ onko do ińakʼ betonko hoyokʼa,’ unre palren sanam bhiḍi-merom do onka lekageko hopon akatʼkoa. Arhõ tinreye menkeda, ‘ińakʼ beton do kabra kabra bhiḍi-meromkoge hoyokʼa,’ ar unre sanam bhiḍi-meromko do kabra kabrako hoponketʼkoa." 
Genesis31:9 Isor do abenren babawakʼ palren bhiḍi-meromko khon nonkage ińe emakawạdińa. 
Genesis31:10 “Mĩhũ-meromkoko midokʼkan tahẽkanre iń do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńelkeda. Iń doń ńelkeda, merom pạṭhi cetanre okoeko bodako dejokʼkan tahẽkan onko do kabra kabra kạṭicʼ ar lạṭu chapanko tahẽkana." 
Genesis31:11 Kukmũ talarege Isorren goḍet do ińe hohowạdińạ, ‘E Jakob.’ Unre ińiń menkeda, ‘Hẽ minạńgea.’" 
Genesis31:12 Uniye metadińạ, ‘beṅgetʼkate ńelme, merom pạṭhiko cetanre okoe bodako dejokʼkan onko do kabra kabra lạṭu ar kạṭicʼ chapan kanako. Ar Laban amre okae ceka akatʼ ona do jotogeń ńelakada." 
Genesis31:13 Iń doń Isor kana okoe do Bethelre am ṭheniń ńel ocolente ar oka dhiri khunṭire sunum dulkate iń ṭhenem kiriạlen. Am do ńitokʼ noa disạm bạgikate amakʼ bukạ topa ṭhạ̃ite ruạṛ calakʼme.’ ” 
Genesis31:14 Noa katha ańjomkate Rahel ar Lea dokin menkeda, “Babawakʼ sompotti reakʼ okaṭakʼ hĩsge ạliń do ńithõ bạnukʼ tạlińa ar tayomtehõ baṅ tahẽna." 
Genesis31:15 Uni ma bahreren hoṛ lekageye hudisliń, ente uni doe ạkhriń akatʼlińạ ar okam ńamakatʼ ona mam jomakatʼ." 
Genesis31:16 Onate ạlińren babawakʼ sompotti khon Isor okae hatao akatʼ ona do khạṭige ńitokʼ ạliń ar ạlińren gidrạkoakʼ kana. Onate Isor okae metamkan onage onkaeme.” 
Genesis31:17 Noa tayom Jakob do acʼren hopon ar hoponerako ar bạhuko ũṭreye decʼketʼkote Kanan disạmte acʼren baba Isahak ṭhene mohnḍayena. Ar mĩhũ-merom palko ar eṭakʼ dhonko tinạkʼ do Padam-Aramreye labletʼ onako sanamakʼe soṅge torakeda. 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Unre Laban do acʼren bhiḍikoakʼ upʼ kạpciy tako lạgitʼe calao akan tahẽkanre Rahel do acʼ apatakʼ gharońjren murhutʼkoe kombṛoketʼkoa. 
Genesis31:20 Ar Jakob do acʼakʼ calakʼ reakʼ katha Laban bae baḍae ocoledea. 
Genesis31:21 Nonkate Jakob do acʼakʼ sanam jinisko hataokateye dạṛkeda. Uni do Phurạt gaḍae paromketʼte Gilead reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ buru ṭoṭha secʼe sen idiyena. 
Genesis31:22 Niạ pe din hilokʼ Laban doe baḍaekeda baṅma, Jakob doe dạṛkeda." 
Genesis31:23 Unre uni do acʼren peṛa pạrbhạkowante Jakobe khudạu idiketete eae din reakʼ horte senkate Gileadkoakʼ buru ṭoṭhareye tiyokʼkedea. 
Genesis31:24 Menkhan Isor do ńindạ jokhecʼ kukmũte Labane metadea, “Sontorokʼme! Jakob do boge-bạṛicʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alom metaea.”" 
Genesis31:25 Jakob okare tạmbu ṭaṅgaokateye ḍera akan tahẽkan, onḍege Laban do senkate uniye sapʼ tiyokʼkedea. Laban ar uniren peṛa-pạrbhạko hõ Gilead reakʼ ona bururege tạmbuko ṭaṅgaokeda." 
Genesis31:26 Ar Laban do Jakobe metadea, “Noa do cetʼ ben cekakeda? Cedakʼ ben eṛeketʼ lińa ar lạṛhạire bondi akan hoṛ leka ạlińren hoponera ben ạguketʼkinạ?" 
Genesis31:27 Oko okote dạṛkate cedakʼ ben eṛe mojaketʼ lińạ? Ạliń ben metaliń khan ạliń do rạskạte, sereńate, kortal ru ar taranakʼ banamate aben liń bidạkebena." 
Genesis31:28 Aben do ạlińren goṛom gidrạko hõ baben cokʼ ocowatʼlińạ; ente lelha hoṛ lekaben kạmikeda. 
Genesis31:29 Apeakʼ loksantape reakʼ ektiạri bạnukʼ tạliń ona do baṅa. Menkhan Abenren hapṛamkoren Isor do hola ńindạ ạlińe menakawatʼ lińa, “Men sontorokʼme! Jakob do boge bạṛicʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alom metaea.”" 
Genesis31:30 Bhagegea, aben ạpumakʼ oṛakʼ calakʼ iạte jiwi lokʼkan tabena ar onateben oḍok hecʼakana, menkhan ạliń gharońjren murhutʼko do cedakʼ ben kombṛo ạguakatʼkoa?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ạliń doliń botorokʼkan tahẽkana, ente liń hudisetʼ tahẽkana hoedaṛeakʼa aben do abenren hoponerakin ạliń khon ben recʼ doholińạ. Ar onate ạliń doliń dạṛ akada." 
Genesis31:32 Ar okoe ṭhen abenren onko murhutʼ ben ńamko uni doe gocʼ ocokʼma. Ạlińakʼ sanam jinisko talare abenakʼ jãhãnakʼ tahen eman khan enḍekhan aleren peṛa-pạrbhạko samaṅrege sendrae ben.” Menkhan Jakob do bae baḍaekan tahẽkana Rahel do onko boṅga murhutʼkoe kombṛo ạguakatʼkoa mente. 
Genesis31:33 Unre Laban do mimitʼ mimitʼte Jakob, Lea ar uniren banar kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ tạmbureye boloyena menkhan celege bae ńamletʼkoa. Ar Leawakʼ tạmbu khon oḍok kate Rahelakʼ tạmbuteye boloyena." 
Genesis31:34 Rahel do menkhan onko boṅga murhutʼko ũṭ reakʼ godi latarreye oko dohoakatʼko tahẽkana ar unre uni do ona godi cetanreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Laban do uniyakʼ tạmbu reakʼ sanam jaegareye sendraketʼkoa menkhan onḍehõ celege bae ńam letʼkoa. 
Genesis31:35 Sesre Rahel do acʼ babae metadea, “Ńelme, bạń beretʼ daṛeakʼkante alom ạṛisokʼa, ente iń do candoteakʼ hoyokʼ kantińạ.” Laban do sucʼ sutrucʼ sendrakate hõ onko boṅga murhutʼ do bae ńamletʼkoa." 
Genesis31:36 Unre Jakob do raṅgaoente ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Ạliń do cetʼ liń dos akada, ar cetʼ liń behok akatʼte nonka ben khudạu ạguketʼlińa?" 
Genesis31:37 Ạlińakʼ sanam jinisko hạtṛạukate cetʼ abenakʼ gharońj reakʼ jãhãnakʼ ben ńamkeda? Arben ńamakatʼ khan ạliń ar abenren peṛa-pạrbhạko samaṅre ona dohoy ben jemonko bicạr daṛeakʼ. 
Genesis31:38 Ạliń do bargel bochor aben sãote liń khemao akada. Unre abenren jãhãn bhiḍi se meromakʼ kukhi hõ baṅ bạṛicʼlena, se abenakʼ palren jãhãn bhiḍi se meromhõ bạliń gocʼ jomletʼkoa." 
Genesis31:39 Se, bir janwar hoteteko gocʼ ocoakan bhiḍi-merom hõ aben ṭhen do bạliń ạguletʼkoa. Menkhan ona reakʼ loksan do ạliń geliń ladeana. Abenren bhiḍi se merome kombṛolenre sińkan ar ńindạ kan aben do ạliń ṭhen khon khuti purun ben hatao akada." 
Genesis31:40 Ạliń do siń cando reakʼ lolote ar ńindạ do rabaṅ iạte lin thakaolena, jạ̃pitʼhõ mońjte bạliń jạpitʼ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Ar nonkage liń tahenkan tahẽkana." 
Genesis31:41 Oka bargel bochor aben ṭhen liń tahẽkan ona reakʼ gelpon bochor do abenakʼ liń kạmileda abenren banar hoponera ben lạgitʼ, ar turui bochor liń khaṭaolena abenren mĩhũ-meromko lạgitʼ. Onako dinre aben do gel dhao ạlińakʼ beton ben bodolleda." 
Genesis31:42 Ạliń babaren Isor, okoe do Abraham ar Isahakren Isor kan, uni do ạliń sãote bae tahẽlen khan enḍekhan khạṭige aben do ńitokʼ eken ti ben bidạkelińa. Isor do ạlińakʼ khaṭaokʼ ar kosṭoe ńelakada. Ar onatege calaoen ńindạ do noa reakʼ bhageye bicạr akada.”" 
Genesis31:43 Noa kathare Laban do Jakobe metadea, “Nukin do ạlińren hoponera kanakin, ar noko gidrạko do ạlińren goṛom gidrạko kanako, ar noko mĩhũ-merom palrenko hõ ạlińrenge. Nonḍe jãhãnakʼge ben ńeletʼkan noako joto do ạlińakʼ kana; enhõ teheń do ạlińren hoponera kin se unkinren gidrạko babotre ạlińakʼ jãhãnakʼ cekae reakʼ cetʼge bạnukʼ tạlińa." 
Genesis31:44 Ona khon bickom dela, alaṅ talare mitʼṭecʼ bondobos laṅ bandhaoa jemon alaṅ talare goha leka tahen.”" 
Genesis31:45 Unre Jakob do mitʼṭecʼ dhiri hataokate khunṭi lekae teṅgokeda ar acʼren peṛakoe metatʼkoa, “Thoṛa dhiri ạgu jarwaepe.” Unre onko do dhiri ạgu jarwakate mitʼ ṭhenko ḍhipikeda ar sanamkoge ona aṛereko jom-ńũkeda." 
Genesis31:46  
Genesis31:47 Laban do ona ḍhipi reakʼ ńutum Jegar Sahadutạiye ńutumkeda (metakʼme “Goha ḍhipi”). menkhan Jakob do acʼakʼ pạrsite ona reakʼ ńutum do Goled (metakʼme “Goha ḍhipiye dohokeda”). 
Genesis31:48 Labane menkeda, “Teheń do noa ḍhipige alaṅ talare goha tahẽyena.” Ona iạte noa ḍhipi reakʼ ńutum do Galedkin dohokeda." 
Genesis31:49 Ona chaḍa noa reakʼ ńutum do Mispa hõko dohokeda (metakʼme “Horho jaega”), ente Labane metade tahẽkana, “Tinre balaṅ ńelokʼa unre Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼge alaṅ cetanre tahenma." 
Genesis31:50 Ar ạlińren hoponera sãote bạṛicʼben beohar, enḍekhan hoponerakin tahenrehõ eṭakʼ maejiuko hataoko ben, ar okoehõ alaṅ sãote bae tahenrehõ disại ben, Isor do alaṅren gohae tahẽyena." 
Genesis31:51 Laban do Jakob arhõe metadea, “Noa ḍhipi secʼ beṅged ben, noa dhiri khunṭi do aben ar ạliń talare dohoyena." 
Genesis31:52 Noa ḍhipi ar dhiri khunṭi do noa goha mente tahẽyena, noa ḍhipi paromkate ạliń do abenakʼ cetʼge bạliń loksan tabena, ar aben hõ noa ḍhipi paromkate ạlińakʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge bạliń loksantạlińa." 
Genesis31:53 Arben onkale khan Abrahamren Isor ar Nahorren Isor ar onkoren hapṛamkoren Isorge jemonko bicạrlaṅ.” Menkhan Jakob do acʼ apatren Probhu Isor ńutumteye kiriạyena. 
Genesis31:54 Niạ tayom Jakob do ona burure dãṛẽye samaṅkeda ar peṛa-pạrbhạko jom-ńũ lạgitʼe goṛoatʼkoa. Arko jom-ńũketʼ khan ona bururegeko tahẽ aṅgayena. 
Genesis31:55 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate Laban do acʼren hoponerakin ar goṛomtetʼ gidrạkoe cokʼatʼkoteye bhoratʼkoa. Ar ona tayom do bidạ hataokate acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Genesis32:1 Jakob hõ acʼakʼ horteye calao idiyena. Ar hor reakʼ mitʼ jaegare uni do Isorren goḍetkoe ńelketʼkoa. 
Genesis32:2 Onko ńelte uni doe menkeda, “Noa do Isorakʼ ḍera kana.” Ar onate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Mahanayime dohokeda (metakʼme, “Barea ḍera”)." 
Genesis32:3 Jakob do acʼ lahate Seyirte, metakʼme Edom disạmte acʼren boeha Esau ṭhen thoṛa hoṛe kolketʼkoa." 
Genesis32:4 Uni doe roṛ gotʼkada acʼren kisạ̃ṛ Esau jemonko baḍae ocoye, uniren guti Jakob doe meneda, “Iń do Laban ṭheniń tahẽkana." 
Genesis32:5 Ińren do ḍaṅgrako, gadhako, bhiḍiko, meromko ar guti-kạ̃ṛmĩ sanamkoge menakʼkotińa. Ar ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen dayań ńama aste laha khongeń baḍae ocoyetʼmea.”" 
Genesis32:6 Onko hoṛ do ruạṛ hecʼkate Jakobko metadea, “Ale do amren boeha Esau ṭhenle senlena. Uni do ńitokʼ ponsae hoṛkoante am sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hijukʼkana.”" 
Genesis32:7 Noa katha ańjomkate Jakob do monre botor caṛhaoadea are dhak dhakaoena. Uni do acʼ soṅgeten hoṛko, bhiḍi-meromko, ḍaṅgrako, gadhako ar ũṭko bar ṭhene begarketʼkoa." 
Genesis32:8 Uni doe hudiskeda, Esau hecʼkate mitʼ dolrenkoe ńẽtʼlekore eṭakʼ dolrenko doko dạṛ pạnḍucʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Genesis32:9 Jakob do Isor ṭhen noa menkate koejoṅe ehopʼena, “E Probhu, ińren hapṛam Abrahamren Isor, ińren ạpuń Isahakren Isor, amge coṅ ińakʼ disạmte, ińren hoṛko ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼem menakadińạ ar onḍe am dom bhạlạiyińạ." 
Genesis32:10 Amren nui guti oka daya ar pạtiạrem udukʼ akawade onaren lek doń baṅkana. Eken mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅga tire sapʼkate noa Jordan gaḍań paromlena, menkhan ńitokʼ iń soṅgere barea maraṅ dolrenko menakʼkoa." 
Genesis32:11 Nehõram kạnạń, ińren boeha Esauakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme. Enteń botorokʼ kana uni do hecʼkate aleye gocʼlea, gidrạ ar onkoren eṅgatko celege sarecʼ do bae doholeya." 
Genesis32:12 Menkhan am dom metadiń tahẽkana, ‘khạṭige amiń bhạlạiymea ar am bõsren hoṛ do jalapuri reakʼ gitil lekań saṅge ocokoa ar onko do okoehõ bako lekha caba daṛeakoa.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Jakob do ona ńindạ onḍegeye tahẽ aṅgayena. Ar acʼakʼ okako tahẽkantae onako khon uni do acʼren boeha Esau lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ dane ṭhik dohokeda. 
Genesis32:14 Ona do hoyokʼ kana, barsae merom pạṭhi ar bargel merom eṅga, barsae bhiḍi ar bargel bheḍa, hopon sudhạ toa emokʼ pegel ũṭko, pongel gại ar gel goṭecʼ ḍaṅgra, bargel gadha eṅga ar gel goṭecʼ gadha." 
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Onko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolreye hạṭińketʼkote gutikoakʼ tire jimạkateye metatʼkoa, “Mimitʼ dolko tayomre thoṛa jaega dohokate iń laha lahate calakʼpe.”" 
Genesis32:17 Uni do pạhil dolren gutiye hukumadea, “Ińren boeha Esau tulucʼem ńapamlenre uni tinreye kulimea, ‘okatem calakʼkana? Ar okoeren hoṛ kanam? Am samaṅren mĩhũ-merom pal doko okoeren kana?’" 
Genesis32:18 Unrem mena, ‘noko do amren guti Jakobren kanako. Uni do acʼren kisạ̃ṛ Esau lạgitʼ noa dane kol akada, ar uni do ale tayomre menaea.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Nonkage uni do dosar, tesar ar eṭakʼ gutiko okoe do palrenko idiyetʼko tahẽkan onko sanamkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Esau tulucʼpe ńapamlen khan apehõ inạ kathagepe mena." 
Genesis32:20 Ar mucạtʼrepe mena, ‘amren guti Jakob do ale tayomrege menaea.’ ” Jakob do mone monte noae hudiskeda, “Iń laha lahate okaṭakʼ dan calakʼkan onatege uni doń hape ocoyea. Ona tayom tinre uni tulucʼ iń ńapama hoedaṛeakʼa unre uni doe ataṅińa.”" 
Genesis32:21 Dan reakʼ jinisko acʼ lahate calaoenre hõ ona ńindạ hõ onḍegeye tahẽyena. 
Genesis32:22 Ona ńindạge Jakob do beretʼkate taṛamate paromokʼ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ jaegate acʼren banar bạhu, banar kạ̃ṛmĩ ar gelmitʼ hoponko do gaḍae paromketʼkoa." 
Genesis32:23 Ar cetʼko tahẽkantae onako joto do onko sãoteye kolgotʼkada. 
Genesis32:24 Onate Jakob do eskargeye tahẽyena. Unre mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ do hecʼkate ạuri aṅgakʼ hạbicʼ uni tulucʼe lạṛhạiyena. 
Genesis32:25 Uni hoṛ do tinreye ńelkeda, Jakob bae bhagao daṛeae kana unre uni do Jakobakʼ ḍubhi jaṅe joṭetʼketʼtaea. Onate uniyakʼ bulu reakʼ jaṅ do ṭhik jaega khon ocokʼentaea." 
Genesis32:26 Unre uni hoṛe menkeda, “Aṅga hijukʼ kana, ńitokʼ do aṛakʼkạńme.” Jakobe menkeda, “Ạurim bhorạń hạbicʼ bạń aṛakʼmea.”" 
Genesis32:27 Uni hoṛe menkeda, “Cetʼtam ńutum do?” Khane roṛ ruạṛadea, “Iń doń Jakob kana.”" 
Genesis32:28 Uni hoṛe menkeda, “Isor ar manwa sãote lạṛhạikatem jitạu akante amakʼ ńutum Jakob do baṅ tahena, amakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Israel (metakʼme ‘Isor tulucʼ lạṛhạiyicʼ ’).”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakob do uniye metadea, “Nehõram kạnạń, amakʼ ńutum baṛe lạiyạńme?” Uniye menkeda, “Ińakʼ ńutum do cedakʼem kuliyedińkana?” Ar noa katha menkate uni do Jakobe bhoradea." 
Genesis32:30 Unre Jakob do ona jaega reakʼ ńutum Penuele dohokeda (metakʼme “Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã”). Uniye menkeda, “Iń do samna sạmni Isoriń ńelkedere hõ jiwetʼge minạńa.”" 
Genesis32:31 Jakob do tinre Peniel khone mohnḍayena unre siń cando doe rakapʼena. Ar acʼakʼ bulu iạte kheṛdokʼ kheṛdokʼe taṛam idikeda. 
Genesis32:32 Onate Israelko do bulu joṛao cetan reakʼ jel teheń hạbicʼ bako joma, ente bulu reakʼ joṛao ṭhenge Jakob doe joṭetʼ ocolena." 
Genesis33:1 Jakob do horte calakʼ jokhecʼe ńelkeda, Esau do pon sae hoṛkowante acʼ secʼe hijukʼkana. Unre uni do Lea, Rahel ar unkin banar kạ̃ṛmĩ erakin talare acʼren gidrạkoe hạṭińketʼkoa." 
Genesis33:2 Pạhilre uni do kạ̃ṛmĩkin ar unkinren gidrạkoe dohoketʼkoa. Ona tayom do Lea ar uniren gidrạko ar tayom utạrre do Rahel ar Josephe dohoketʼkinạ. 
Genesis33:3 Menkhan acʼ do onko laha lahateye sen idiyena. Ar sen idikʼ jokhecʼ uni do otre eae dhao ombakʼkate dadattetʼe ḍobokʼadea ar nonkate uni ṭhene seṭerena. 
Genesis33:4 Unre Esau do uni ṭhen ńir hecʼenteye hạṛupʼkedea are kokekedeteye cokʼadea. Ar ona tayom do bana hoṛkin rakʼana. 
Genesis33:5 Tayomte Esau do onko maejiu ar gidrạko secʼe beṅgetʼketʼteye kulikedea, “Am sãote noko doko okoe kana?” Jakobe menkeda, “Isor do dayate amren guti noko gidrạkoe emakadea.”" 
Genesis33:6 Pạhilre kạ̃ṛmĩkin ar unkinren gidrạko senkate Esauko ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis33:7 Ona tayom do Lea ar acʼren gidrạko uniko ḍobokʼadea. Ar mucạtʼre do Rahel ar Joseph hõ unikin ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis33:8 Unre Esaue menkeda, “Horre one okoe dolbolko sãoteń ńapamen onako do cetʼkana?” Jakobe menkeda, “Onko do ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen dayań ńam lạgitʼ kanako.”" 
Genesis33:9 Menkhan Esaue menkeda, “Eya, ḍherge hoyakana. Amakʼ oka menakʼtam ona do amakʼge tahẽ ocowakʼme.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe menkeda, “Baṅ, baṅ, nehõram kạnạń, iń cetanre amakʼ daya menakʼ khan enḍekhan noako dan baṛe hataotińme. Ar tinre kusi montem ataṅińạ unre iń ṭhen do Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã ńel lekage hoyokʼtińạ." 
Genesis33:11 Isor do ạḍiye daya akawạdińa, ar ińakʼ do ḍherge menakʼtińạ. Ona iạte okaṭakʼ daniń ạguakatʼ ona do dayakate hataome.” Jakob nonkae nehõren khan Esau do onkoe ataṅketʼkoa." 
Genesis33:12 Tayomte Esaue menkeda, “Dela, ńitokʼ do bon senokʼma. Ar iń do am sãotegeń calakʼa.”" 
Genesis33:13 Jakob do uniye metadea, “Am ińren kisạ̃ṛ dom baḍaegea, noko gidrạkoakʼ umer do komgetakoa. Ona chaḍa okoeko ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi akoren hoponko toako nunuako kan onko hõ disạko hoyokʼtińạ. Ente mitʼdinte usạra idileko khan enḍekhan sanamgeko gujukʼa." 
Genesis33:14 Onka do baṅa, amge bickom iń lahate calakʼme. Ar Seyirte am ṭhen ạuriń seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ samaṅren mĩhũ-merom palko ar gidrạkoakʼ calakʼ reakʼ daṛe bujhạukate iń do bại bạiteń calakʼa.”" 
Genesis33:15 Unre Esaue menkeda, “Enḍekhan iń sãoten thoṛa hoṛ do am ṭheniń doho oṭokakoa.” Jakobe menkeda, “Ona reakʼ jãhãn jạruṛ do bạnukʼa? Ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen dayań ńamakatʼ onage ḍhera.”" 
Genesis33:16 Khange Esau do enhilokʼge Seyirteye ruạṛ calaoena," 
Genesis33:17 ar Jakob doe uṭhạuente Sukotteye calaoena. Ar onḍe do acʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaokeda ar acʼren mĩhũ-merom palko lạgitʼ hõ oṛakʼkoe benaokeda. Ona iạtege ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Sukot dohoyena (metakʼme “Chạuni oṛakʼ ”). 
Genesis33:18 Padam-Aram khon oḍok hecʼ tayom Jakob do napaetege Kanan disạm reakʼ Sikem nagrahateye seṭerena. Uni do nagraha sorre tạmbui ṭaṅgaokeda ar tayomte ona jumi do Sikemren apat Hamorren hoponko ṭhen khon mitʼsae rupạ sikạteye kirińkeda. 
Genesis33:19  
Genesis33:20 Ar onḍe do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar ona reakʼ ńutum do El-Elohe Israele dohokeda (metakʼme “Isor doe Israelkoren Isor kana”). 
Genesis34:1 Leawakʼ kukhire Dina ńutuman Jakobren okoeṭakʼ kuṛiye janamlen uni do mitʼdin onḍenko kuṛi sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍoken khan Sikem ńutuman mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ mẽtʼreye paṛaoena. Nui Sikem do Hiwikoren sordar Hamorren hopone tahẽkana. Sikem do uniye sapʼ idikedete jor julumkate uni tulucʼe giticʼmitʼena are nosṭokedea. 
Genesis34:2  
Genesis34:3 Ar Dinare ạḍi mon tolentaea. Uni do Dinae dulạṛkedea ar acʼakʼ dulạṛ reakʼ kathae baḍae ocokedea. 
Genesis34:4 Sikem do acʼren baba Hamore metadea, “Nui kuṛi sãote ińakʼ bapla reakʼ bebostaeme.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jakob doe ańjomkeda Sikem do acʼren kuṛi Dinai bạṛicʼ akadea. Unre uniren hoponko do ṭạnḍire palren mĩhũ-merom gupiko lạgitʼko calao akan tahẽkana, ar onko ạuriko ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ uni do hapegeye tahẽyena." 
Genesis34:6 Ar Sikemren apat Hamor do Jakob sãote katha roṛ lạgitʼ nagraha khone oḍok hecʼena. 
Genesis34:7 Jakobren hoponko ona kathako ańjomketʼ khan gupi ṭạnḍi khonko hecʼena. Ar monre cetʼleka kosṭoko ạikạuketʼ onkage ạḍi bạṛicʼko raṅgaoena, ente Sikem do Jakobren hoponerawakʼ kũạritetʼe nosṭoketʼtaete Israel lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ opoman reakʼe kạmikeda, one okaṭakʼ kạmi do baṅ ganokʼakʼ tahẽkan." 
Genesis34:8 Menkhan Hamor do Jakob ar uniren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren hopon do amren kuṛire ạḍi mon lagao akantaea. Onate ińren hopon tulucʼ amren hoponera baplaye lạgitʼ baṛe emokʼme." 
Genesis34:9 Ar ale sãote bapla reakʼ bebostaepe. Aperen hoponerako emalepe ar aleren hoponerako hõ ape hataokope. 
Genesis34:10 Ape do ale talare girobasokʼpe. Ente goṭa disạm do ape samaṅrege menakʼa. Nonḍege tahenpe, ar apeakʼ kusi leka dãṛã baṛaepe ar dhon sompottiren mạlik hoyokʼpe.”" 
Genesis34:11 Ona chaḍa Sikem hõ kuṛiren apattetʼ ar boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Iń cetanrepe daya akan khan enḍekhan ape okape khoj onageń emapea." 
Genesis34:12 Noa bapla reakʼ gonoṅ ar dan lekate ape okaṭakʼpe goṭae onageń emokʼa. Menkhan aperen kuṛi baṛe iń sãote baplayepe.” 
Genesis34:13 Sikem do onkoren boeha kuṛi Dinawakʼ kũạritetʼe nosṭoketʼ iạte Jakobren hoponko do cạtur salakʼ unkinko roṛ ruạṛatʼkinạ, “Bin khatna akan nonkan okoe tulucʼ hõ aleren misera do bale bapla daṛeaea ente ona do ale lạgitʼ bemanotakʼ kana." 
Genesis34:14  
Genesis34:15 Menkhan mitʼṭecʼpe kạmi lekhan ale dole rạjigea. Ona do hoyokʼkana, aperen sanam herel hoṛ ale leka khatnakʼ hoyokʼtapea." 
Genesis34:16 Ar enḍekhan aleren kuṛiko apele emapea ar aperen kuṛiko hõ alele hataokoa; ar ale do ape sãote mitʼ jạt lekale tahena. 
Genesis34:17 Menkhan aleakʼ katha bape ańjom ar khatnakʼ bape rebenokʼ, enḍekhan aleren miserawante nonḍe khonle calakʼa.”" 
Genesis34:18 Onkoakʼ noa kathate Hamor ar uniren hopon Sikem do ạḍikin kusiyena. 
Genesis34:19 Ar gharońjren manotan hoṛ Sikem do ar bae bilomletʼte uni doe rạjiyena, ente Jakobren kuṛi lạgitʼ ạḍiye ṭanokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Genesis34:20 Ona iạte nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen senkate Hamor ar uniren hopon Sikem do onḍenko hoṛkin metatʼkoa," 
Genesis34:21 “Noko hoṛ do aboren gate kanako. Ar aboakʼ disạmre onko tahen lạgitʼ hõ aema jaega menakʼa. Noko do nonḍegeko tahẽ ocowa ar akoakʼ kusi lekako dãṛã baṛaema. Ar abo do onkoren kuṛiko bon hataokoa ar aboren kuṛihõ onko bon emakoma. 
Genesis34:22 Eken mitʼṭecʼ bon kạmi lekhan onko do abo sãoteko girobasokʼa ar mitʼ jạt leka tahenko rạjigea. Ona do hoyokʼ kana, onko leka aboren sanam herel hoṛ do khatnakʼ lagao abona." 
Genesis34:23 Onkoren ḍaṅgrako-bhiḍiko, dhon-sompotti ar sanam mĩhũ meromko hõ abo talaregeko tahena. Onate dela, onkoakʼ kathare bon rạjikʼma. Enḍekhan onko do abo sãoteko girobasokʼa.”" 
Genesis34:24 Onate nagraharen sanam herel hoṛ do Hamor ar uniren hopon Sikemakʼ kathateko rạjiyena, arko khatna ocoyena." 
Genesis34:25 Niạ pe din hilokʼ tinre herel hoṛ do hasoteko thakao caba akan tahẽkana unre Dinaren boeha, metakʼme Jakobren banar koṛa Simeon ar Liwi do tarwaṛewante nagrahate bolokate mitʼke mitʼ herel hoṛkin gocʼketʼkoa. Nonka hoyokʼ do nagraharen celege bako hudis akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Genesis34:26 Unkin do Hamor ar uniren hopon Sikem hõkin gocʼkedea ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ khon Dinakin oḍok ạgukedea. 
Genesis34:27 Ar Jakobren eṭakʼ hoponko do ona nagrahate bolokate okare akoren miserate nosṭo ocolen onḍe eken mạ̃ṛĩko ńelketʼ khan ona nagrahako luṭkeda. 
Genesis34:28 Ar nagraha bhitri ar bahrere onkoren tinạkʼ ḍaṅgra-bhiḍi ar gadhako tahẽkan onko sanamko hatketʼkoa. 
Genesis34:29 Onko do onkoakʼ sanam dhon-durib ar onkoren gidrạko ar maejiukoko luṭketʼkoa; ar onkokoakʼ oṛakʼre tahẽkanakʼ cetʼge bako bạgi oṭowada. 
Genesis34:30 Jakob do noa tayom Simeon ar Liwiye metatʼkinạ, “Aben do noa disạmren hoṛko ṭhen, bạ̃ṛtikaete Kananrenko ar Pherisiko ṭhen sĩṛĩcʼge ben so ocokedeńte muhinre ben paṛao ocokedińa. Aboren hoṛ doko thoṛagea. Onko do jarwa mitʼkate abo cetanre jhãpko ema, ar onate iń do gharońj sudhạń meṭao utạrokʼa.”" 
Genesis34:31 Simeon ar Lewi dokin menkeda, “Menkhan ạlińren misera sãote cetʼ jãhãege kusumbi lekae beohara?”" 
Genesis35:1 Niạ tayom Isor do Jakobe metadea, “Am do ńitokʼ Bethelre senkate tahenme. Ar amren boeha Esau ṭhen khonem ńir pharakokʼ jokhecʼ okoe do am ṭhene ńel ocolen uni Isor lạgitʼ onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benaome.”" 
Genesis35:2 Unre Jakob do acʼren hoṛko ar sãoten eṭakʼ hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape ṭhen tinạkʼ boṅga murhutʼko menakʼko onko joto do giḍikakope ar apnar baṛe saphakʼpe ar apeakʼ kicricʼko bodoltape." 
Genesis35:3 Ona tayom do dela, Bethelte bon calakʼa. Iń do onḍe Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ iń benaoa ente uni do muhinreye goṛowạdiń tahẽkana ar joto jaegarege iń sãoteye tahẽkana.”" 
Genesis35:4 Unre onko ṭhen tinạkʼ boṅga murhutʼko tahẽkan onko do Jakobakʼ tireko jimạketʼkoa. Ona sãote lutur reakʼ pagrako hõ uniko emadea. Ar Jakob do onako hataokate Sikem nagraha ṭhenakʼ maraṅ dare buṭạreye topakada. 
Genesis35:5 Ona tayom onko doko mohnḍayena. Onkoakʼ calakʼ horre Isor do aḍe pase nagraharen hoṛko talare nonkan mitʼṭecʼ botore rakapʼ ocokeda ar onate Jakobren hoṛ do celege bako khudạuletʼkoa. 
Genesis35:6 Jakob ar uni soṅgeten sanamkoge Kanan disạm reakʼ Lus nagrahate, metakʼme Bethelreko seṭerena." 
Genesis35:7 Onḍe uni do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda. Ar ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do El-Bethele dohokeda (metakʼme “Bethelren Isor”), ente boeha ṭhen khone dạṛletʼ jokhecʼ Isor do onḍege uni ṭhene sodorlena." 
Genesis35:8 Niạko dinre Rebekaren dhạ̃i buḍhi Dabora doe gocʼena. Uni do Bethel ṭhenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ dare buṭareko topakedea. Ona iạte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Alon-Bakotko dohokeda (metakʼme “Rakʼjoṅ dare”). 
Genesis35:9 Jakob do Padam-Aram khone hecʼen khan Isor do arhõ uni ṭhene ńel ocoyena ar bhoradeteye metadea, “Amakʼ ńutum do Jakob tahẽkana, menkhan Jakob mente do arbam hoho ocokʼa; amakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Israel.” Ar noa menkate uniyakʼ ńutum do Israele dohoketʼtaea." 
Genesis35:10  
Genesis35:11 Isor do arhõe metadea, “Iń do phạdkoren Isor kạnạń. Am do ạḍi utạr hoponkoren apatem hoyokʼa arpe saṅgekʼa. Iń do am khonge mitʼṭecʼ jạtrenkoń rakapʼkoa, ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍher bõsrenko benao rakabokʼa. Ar amakʼ bõsre aema rapajko janamokʼa." 
Genesis35:12 Okaṭakʼ disạm do Abraham ar Ishạhakiń ematʼkin tahẽkan ona disạmge iń do amiń emama. Ar am tayom do amren bõskoń emakoa.” 
Genesis35:13 Isor do Jakob tulucʼ katha galmarao tayom onḍe khon coṭteye rakapʼ calaoena. 
Genesis35:14 Ar Jakob do ṭhik ona jaegare dhiri reakʼ cinhạ khunṭiye teṅgokeda ar ona cetanre coḍor samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. Ar ona tayom do ona cetanre sunume dulada. 
Genesis35:15 Isor okare uni sãoteye galmaraoletʼ Jakob do ona jaega reakʼ ńutum Bethele dohokeda. 
Genesis35:16 Ona tayom Jakob ar uniyakʼ gharońjrenko do Bethel khonko mohnḍayena. Ar Ephrat reakʼ horte thoṛa sạṅgińko senen khan Rahel do bedon rakapʼadea ar ạḍi kosṭokʼe ehopʼena. 
Genesis35:17 Ar gidrạ janame reakʼ haso ḍherentae khan dhạ̃i buḍhiye menkeda, “Alom botorokʼa, niạ dhao hõ koṛa gidrại hoyokʼtama.”" 
Genesis35:18 Menkhan Rahel doe gocʼena. Gujukʼ jokhecʼ gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Benoniye dohoketʼtaea (Metakʼme “Ińakʼ dukren hopon”). Menkhan uniren apat do uniyakʼ ńutum Benjạmine dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Bhạganren hopon”). 
Genesis35:19 Ar Rahel do Ephrat, metakʼme Bethlehem calakʼ horreko topakadea." 
Genesis35:20 Jakob do uniyakʼ topa cetanre cinhạ khunṭi leka mitʼṭecʼ dhiriye condokeda. Ona do teheń hõ Rahelakʼ topa reakʼ cinhạ lekage menakʼa. 
Genesis35:21 Inạ tayom Israel, metakʼme Jakob do arhõ sen idikʼe ehopʼena. Uni do Megdol-Eder ńutumanakʼ buru hanasare acʼakʼ tạmbui ṭaṅgaoketʼte onḍeye ḍerayena." 
Genesis35:22 Israel do tinre ona ṭoṭhareye girobasokʼkan tahẽkana unre Ruben do acʼ apatren bạhu Bilha sãoteye laṭghaṭkeda. Ar ona do Israel hõe ańjomkeda. Jakobren do gelbar goṭen hoponko tahẽkantaea. 
Genesis35:23 Leawakʼ kukhire Jakobren hoponko modre pạhil hopon do Rubene janamlena. Ona tayom do Simeon, Liwi, Jihudạ, Isakar ar Sebulon." 
Genesis35:24 Ar Rahelakʼ kukhire do Joseph ar Benjạmin tạkinkin janamlena. 
Genesis35:25 Rahelren kạ̃ṛmĩ era Bilhawakʼ kukhire do Dan ar Napthtali. 
Genesis35:26 Learen kạ̃ṛmĩ era Silpạwakʼ kukhire do Gad ar Aser. Jakobren noko hoponko do Padam Aramreko janamlena. 
Genesis35:27 Mucạtʼre Jakob do Kiriat-Arab, metakʼme Hebron ṭhenakʼ Mamre nagrahare acʼ apat Isạhak ṭhene hecʼena. Noa ṭoṭharege Abraham ar Isạhak dokin girobasokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Genesis35:28 Isạhak do Mitʼsae irạlgel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis35:29 Ar purạ jion khemaokate uni doe haṛamena are gocʼente acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. Uniren hopon Esau ar Jakob do unikin topakadea. 
Genesis36:1 Noa do hoyokʼkana Esau, metakʼme Edomren bõsko reakʼ katha." 
Genesis36:2 Esau do Kananren kuṛiye baplaletʼkoa. Onko kuṛi doko hoyokʼkana Hitti hoṛ Elonren hoponera Ada ar Hibio Sibeonren goṛomtetʼ kuṛi, metakʼme Anaren hoponera Oholibama." 
Genesis36:3 Ona chaḍa Ismaelren kuṛi, metakʼme Nebaiotren misera Basmathõe baplaledea." 
Genesis36:4 Noko modre Adawakʼ kukhire do Eliphas ar Basmatakʼ kukhire do Reule janamena; 
Genesis36:5 Ar Oholibamawakʼ kukhire do Jeus, Jalam ar Korah tekoko janamlena. Esaoren nokoko hoponge Kanan disạmreko janamena." 
Genesis36:6 Tayomte Esau do acʼren bạhuko, gidrạko ar oṛakʼren eṭakʼ sanamko, ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko ar eṭakʼ janwarko tinạkʼ do Kanan disạmreye hameṭan tahẽkan ona sanam dhon-duribko hataokate acʼren boeha Jakob khon sạṅgiń mitʼṭecʼ disạmteye calaoena." 
Genesis36:7 Esau ar Jakobren mĩhũ-merom palko do nunạkʼ ḍherko tahẽkana, unkin lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhen girobasokʼ do muskilge tahẽkana; ar okarekin tahẽkan onḍe unkinren pal janwarko mitʼ ṭhen ạtińko leka jaega hõ baṅ tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:8 Ona iạte Esau do Seyir reakʼ buru ṭoṭha secʼ senkateye girobasena. Esauakʼ eṭakʼ ńutum do Edom hõ tahẽkana.
