Genesis36:9 Noa do Seyir buru ṭoṭharen Edomkoren hapṛam Esauakʼ bõs reakʼ katha kana. 
Genesis36:10 Esaoren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Eliphas Reuel. Eliphas do Adaren hopon ar Reuel do Basmatren hopone tahẽkana. 
Genesis36:11 Eliphasren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, Teman, Omar, Sephi, Gatam ar Kenas." 
Genesis36:12 Esauren hopon Eliphasren do Timna ńutuman chuṭki erae tahẽkana. Ar Amalek do uniyakʼ kukhireye janamlena. Noko sanamkoge Esauren bạhu Adaren goṛom gidrạ kanako. 
Genesis36:13 Reuelren hopon doko hoyokʼkana, Nahat, Serah, Sama ar Misa. Noko do Esauren bạhu Basmatren goṛom gidrạko kanako." 
Genesis36:14 Sibeonren goṛomtetʼ kuṛi, metakʼme Anaren hoponera Oholibamaren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Jeus, Jalam ar Korah." 
Genesis36:15 Esauren hoponko modre adom hoṛ do sordarko hoylena. Esauren maraṅicʼ hopon Eliphasren okoeko hopon do sordarko tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼ kana, Teman, Omar, Sepho, Kenas," 
Genesis36:16 Korah, Gatam ar Amalek. Edomre noko do Adaren hopon Eliphasren bõsko tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:17 Reuelren hopon okoe do sordarko hoylen onko doko hoyokʼ kana Nahat, Serah, Sama ar Misa. Noko do Esauren bạhu Basmatren hopon Reuelren bõsko tahẽkana. Edom disạmre nokogeko janamlena." 
Genesis36:18 Esauren bạhu Oholibaren okoeko hopon do gusṭikoren sordarko tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼkana Jeus, Jalam ar Korah. Noko do Anaren hoponera Oholibaren hoponko tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:19 Noko do Esauren, metakʼme Edomren bõs ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gusṭiren sordarko tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:20 Hori Seyirren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon, Ana, Dison, Eser ar Disan. Noko do Edom disạmre girobas akanko tahẽkana. Ar Edom disạmre Seyirren noko hopon do Hori gusṭiren sordarko tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:21  
Genesis36:22 Lotanren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Hori ar Hemam. Lotanren miseratakʼ ńutum do Timna tahẽkana. 
Genesis36:23 Sobalren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana, Manahat, Ebal, Sepho ar Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Sibeonren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Aia ar Ana. Nui Anage acʼren apat Sibeonren gadha ạtińe senlenre hahaṅkarre lolo bhumbuke ńamleda. 
Genesis36:25 Anaren hoponakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Dison ar hoponeratakʼ ńutum do Oholibama. 
Genesis36:26 Disonren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do Hamran, Esban, Ithran ar Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Eserren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Bilhan, Sawan ar Jakan." 
Genesis36:28 Ar Disonren hoponkin do Us ar Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Hori sordarkoakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon, Ana," 
Genesis36:30 Dison, Eser ar Disan. Noko do Seyir, metakʼme Edom disạmre Hori jạtkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gusṭiren sordarko tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:31 Israelko talare raj ạuriko hoyokʼre Edom disạmre okoe do rajokʼko ehopʼlen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana: 
Genesis36:32 Beorren hopon Bela do Edomren raje hoylena; uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Dinhaba tahẽkana. 
Genesis36:33 Bela gocʼ tayom Bosra nagraharen Serahren hopon Jobab do raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:33 Bela gocʼ tayom Bosra nagraharen Serahren hopon Jobab do raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:34 Ar Joabakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jaegare Temanikoakʼ disạmren Husam do raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:35 Husamakʼ gujukʼ tayom Bedadren hopon Hadad do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoylena. Uni do Moab disạmren Midiạnrenkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Ar uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Awit tahẽkana. 
Genesis36:36 Hadatakʼ gujukʼ tayom Masreka nagraharen Samla do raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:37 Samla gujukʼ tayom uni bodolte Rehobot nagraharen Sạul do raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:38 Sạulakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jaegare do Akborren hopon Balhana raje hoyena. 
Genesis36:39 Akborren hopon Balhanawakʼ gujukʼ tayom Hadad do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. Ar uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Pau tahẽkana, ar uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Mehetabel tahẽkana, Uni do Matredren hoponera ar Mesahabren goṛomtetʼ kuṛiye tahẽkana." 
Genesis36:40 Esauakʼ okako bõsren hoṛkoakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gusṭi ar ṭoṭharen sordarko tahẽkan onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Timna, Alwa, Jethet," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 Kenas, Teman, Mibsar," 
Genesis36:43 Magdiel ar Iram; Noko doko tahẽkana Edomren hapṛam Esau bõsren hoṛko ar Edomren sordarko. Ar disạm reakʼ oka ṭoṭhakore onkoko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan onkokoakʼ ńutum lekage onako ṭoṭha reakʼ ńutum do hoyakana. 
Genesis37:1 Jakob do Kanan disạmrege girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Ar acʼren apat hõ onḍegeye tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis37:2 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Jakob gharońjrenko reakʼ kạhini. Joseph do acʼren boehako sãote bhiḍi ar meromkoe gupikan tahẽkana. Ar uniren boehako doko tahẽkana acʼren kạki eṅgat Bilhạ ar Silpạren hoponkoge. Uniyakʼ umer gel eae bochor tahẽkanre uni do acʼren noko boehakoakʼ bạṛicʼ colon reakʼ katha acʼ apate lạiyadea. 
Genesis37:3 Haṛam umerren hopone tahẽkan iạte Israel do joto hoponko khon Josephge ḍhere dulạṛede tahẽkana. Ar mitʼṭecʼ tilpạṅ talpaṅ aṅgrope benaoade tahẽkana. 
Genesis37:4 Uniren boehako tinreko bujhạukeda, akoren apat do Josephge bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛedea mente unre onko do uni hiskạwaeko ehopʼena. Ar uni tulucʼ katha hõ mońte bako roṛetʼ tahẽkana." 
Genesis37:5 Mitʼdin Joseph do mitʼṭecʼe kukmũkeda. Ar ona katha acʼren dadattetʼtakoe lạiyatʼko khan onko do arhõ bạ̃ṛti hiskạwaeko ehopʼena. 
Genesis37:6 Joseph doe metatʼko tahẽkana, “Ańjompe, iń do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńel akada." 
Genesis37:7 Ona do nonka, abo do khetre getʼakatʼ phosol reakʼ ạṭi bon toleda; menkhan hahaṛa do noage je, ińakʼ ạṭi do sojhete teṅgo akana. Ar ona tayom apeakʼ ạṭiko do ińakʼ ạṭi beṛhaete teṅgokate ińakʼ ạṭiko ḍobokʼada.”" 
Genesis37:8 Unre uniren boeha do uniko metadea, “Am do cetʼ sạrigem hudiseda rajem hoyokʼa ar ale cetanre hukumem calaoa?” Uniyakʼ kukmũ ar kathate uniren dadattetʼtako do arhõ bạ̃ṛti hiskạwaeko ehopʼena." 
Genesis37:9 Noa tayom Joseph do arhõ mitʼṭecʼe kukmũkeda ar acʼren dadattetʼtakoe lạiyatʼkoa. Uni doe metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, iń do arhõ mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńelakada. Ińiń ńelkeda siń cando ar ńindạ cando ar gelmitʼ ipilko do ińko ḍobokʼạń kana.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ar noa kukmũ do acʼ baba ar boehako ṭhene lạiketʼ khan apattetʼ do ruhetʼkedeteye metadea, “Noa do cetʼ lekan kukmũm ńelleda?” Amren eṅgam, ar amren dadamtako ar iń do cetʼ ombakʼkate amle ḍobokʼama?”" 
Genesis37:11 Niạ tayom Joseph iạte acʼren boehako do hiskạte mon perecʼentakoa, menkhan uniren apat do noako katha monreye rebetʼ dohokada, ar okoehõ bae lạiyatʼkoa." 
Genesis37:12 Tayomte Josephren boehako do akoren apattetʼren merom ar bhiḍi gupiko lạgitʼ Sikemteko calaoena. 
Genesis37:13 Unre mitʼ din Israel do Josephe metadea, “Dadamtako do Sikemre merom ar bhiḍi palko gukʼpikana. Ar ińakʼ monejoṅakʼ do noage am do onko ṭhenem calakʼa.”" 
Genesis37:14 Israel do arhõe menkeda, “Amren dadamtako ar bhiḍi-meromko cetʼleka menakʼkoa senkate ona reakʼ khoborem ạguạńạ.” Ar noa menkate Joseph do Hebron reakʼ buru lodam khone kolkadea. Joseph do tinre Sikemteye seṭerena unre mitʼṭen hoṛ do bilạn ṭạnḍire ạcur baṛaekan ńelkedeteye kulikedea, “Cetʼem sendra baṛakana?”" 
Genesis37:15  
Genesis37:16 Josephe menkeda, “Ińren boehakoń sendrayetʼkoa. Amem lại daṛekińạ onko do okareko gupikana mente?”" 
Genesis37:17 Uni hoṛe menkeda, “Onko do nonḍe khonko calao akana. Menkhan roṛiń ańjomletʼkoa, ‘dela abo do Dothante bon calakʼa.’ ” Unre Joseph do acʼren boehako sendra Dothanteye calaoena ar onkoe ńamketʼkoa." 
Genesis37:18 Onko do sạṅgiń khon Josephko ńel ńamkedea ar ako ṭhen ạuriye seṭerokʼrege goje reakʼko solhawana. 
Genesis37:19 Onko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Hạni ńelepe, kukmũ gurui hijukʼ kana." 
Genesis37:20 Dela, ńitokʼge bon gojea ar mitʼṭecʼ kuńre bon khadlekaea. Ar bon mena, uni do kaṭaha janwarko jomkedea, ar ona tayom do uniyakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bon ńela cetʼ hoyokʼa mente.”" 
Genesis37:21 Menkhan Ruben do noa katha ańjomkate onkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoe reakʼe kurumuṭukeda uni doe metatʼkoa, “Uni do alope gojea.”" 
Genesis37:22 Uni do solhae ematʼkoa, “Mãyãm do alope joroetaea. Ar unire hat hõ alope lagaoa bickom mitʼṭecʼ kuńre bhoraokaepe.” Uni do onko ti khon Joseph bańcaoe lạgitʼ ar apattetʼ ṭhen jimạkae lạgitʼ noa kathae menkeda." 
Genesis37:23 Joseph acʼren dadattetʼtako ṭhene seṭeren khan onko do joraemoṭ uniyakʼ hoṛmo khon uniyakʼ tilpạṅ talpaṅ aṅgropko totʼketʼtaea. 
Genesis37:24 Ar ona tayom do kuńreko bhoraokadea. Ona kuń do rohoṛge tahẽkana. 
Genesis37:25 Ona tayom Josephren dadattetʼtako do jom-ńũiy lạgitʼko duṛupʼen khan Ismaelren bạnij-beparko Gilead khon hijukʼko ńelketʼkoa. Onko do ũṭre decʼkate jut so mosola, ran sunum ar gondhorosante Misor disạmteko calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Genesis37:26 Unre Jihudạ do acʼren boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Aboren boeha gocʼkate uniyakʼ mãyãm bon danaṅ dohokakʼte aboakʼ do cetʼ lab hoyokʼa?" 
Genesis37:27 Uni mae aboren boehakange, ar unire hõ aboakʼ jel ar mãyãmge menakʼa. Onate uni do babon joṭedea, bickom Ismaelrenko ṭhen bon ạkhriń gotʼkaea.” Rubenren boehako do uniyakʼ noa kathako ańjomketʼtaea." 
Genesis37:28 Ar Midiạnren bạnij-bepariko do tinreko hecʼ sorena unre Josephren boehako do kuń khonko or rakapʼkedea ar bargel rupạ ṭakate Ismaelren bepari ṭhenko ạkhrińkedea. Onko bạnij-bepariko do Misorte Joshepko idikedea. 
Genesis37:29 Tayomte Ruben do ona kuń ṭhen senkate Joseph bae ńel ńamledete dukte uniyakʼ kicricʼ oṛecʼkate boehako ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Joseph do onḍe bạnuea. Iń do ńitokʼ cetʼ iń cekaea?”" 
Genesis37:30  
Genesis37:31 Unre onko do mitʼṭen merom bodako gurkedea ar bodawakʼ mãyãmre Josephakʼ kicricʼko topokeda. 
Genesis37:32 Ar akoren baba ṭhen ona idikateko menkeda, “Ale do noale ńam akada. Mońjte ńelme, noa kicricʼ do amren hoponakʼ kana se baṅa.”" 
Genesis37:33 Jakob do aṅgrop ńel ṭhikketʼteye menkeda, “Noa kicricʼ do ińren hoponakʼ kangea. Uni do kaṭaha janwarko jomkedea. Hẽ uni do kaṭaha janwar ṭhengeye or cirạ ocoakana.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakob do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼa ar ḍanḍare gõṛẽ kicricʼe horokʼketʼte ḍher din hạbicʼ hopontetʼ lạgitʼte homor halaṅkeda. 
Genesis37:35 Ar uniren eṭakʼ hoponko do uniyakʼ jiwi raṛejtae lạgitʼko kurumuṭukeda, menkhan cetʼtege jiwi do baṅ raṛecʼlentaea. Uni doe menkeda, “Iń do rakʼ rakʼteń gujukʼte ińren hoponiń ṭheniń calakʼa.” Nonkate Jakob do Joseph lạgitʼ ạḍiye rakʼkeda." 
Genesis37:36 Ar Midianko do Misorte Josephko idikedete Poṭiphar ṭhenko ạkhrińkedea. Poṭiphar do Pharaoren mitʼṭen maraṅ rajren kạmiyạ hoṛe tahẽkana, uni do rurukhiyạkoren sordargeye tahẽkana." 
Genesis38:1 Niạ tayom Jihudạ do acʼren boehako bạgikate Adulam atoren mitʼṭen hoṛ sãote girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Uni hoṛakʼ ńutum do Hirạ tahẽkana. 
Genesis38:2 Onḍe tahen jokhecʼge Suạ ńutuman mitʼṭen Kanan hoṛren hoponerare uni do mẽtʼ lagaoentaea. Ar uni kuṛiye baplakedea. 
Genesis38:3 Ar uni doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Ar Jihudạ do gidrạwakʼ ńutum Ere dohoketʼtaea. 
Genesis38:4 Ona tayom uni do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uniren do armitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyentaea. Ar eṅgattetʼ do gidrạwakʼ ńutum Onane dohoketʼtaea. 
Genesis38:5 Ona tayom uni do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uniren do arhõ mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamena. Ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Selae dohoketʼtaea. Nui gidrại janamokʼ jokhecʼ onko do Kesib atoreko tahẽkana. 
Genesis38:6 Tayomte Jihudạ do acʼren maraṅicʼ hopon Er sãote Tamor ńutuman mitʼṭen kuṛi tulucʼe baplakadea. 
Genesis38:7 Menkhan Jihudạren nui hopon do Probhu Isor nońjorre bạṛicʼgeye tahẽkante jiwetʼ bae doholedea. 
Genesis38:8 Jihudạ do unre Onane metadea, “Dadamren rạnḍi bạhu do amge baplayem. Ar erweltetʼ koṛa lekate okaṭakʼ ganokʼ ona onkaeme ar Dadamren hoykate uniyakʼ bõsem rukhiyạitaea.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onan doe baḍaekan tahẽkana, ona bõs do acʼakʼ baṅ hoyokʼtaea mente. Onate boeha hoykate bõs rukhiyại lạgitʼ tinạkʼ dhao hilit era tulucʼe giticʼmitʼen unạkʼ dhaoge acʼakʼ herelteakʼ itạ do otreye giḍikada." 
Genesis38:10 Menkhan uniyakʼ noa kạmi iạte Probhu Isor do bae kusilena. Onate uni hõ jiwetʼ do bae tahẽ ocowadea. 
Genesis38:11 Unre Jihudạ do acʼren kimintetʼ Tamore metadea, “Tin hạbicʼ ạlińren hopon Sela bae hara juạnokʼ unhạbicʼ aben do abenren apatakʼ oṛakʼre senkate rạnḍi hoṛ leka tahẽ hataṛokʼ ben.” Ente Jihudạwakʼ monre noa botor tahẽkana, Sela hõ acʼren boehako lekae gujukʼa. Ar Jihudạwakʼ kathate Tamor do acʼ apatakʼ oṛakʼte senkateye tahẽyena." 
Genesis38:12 Noa ḍher din tayom Jihudạren bạhu, metakʼme Suạren hoponera doe gocʼena. Ar uni lạgitʼ homor halaṅ reakʼ din cabayen khan Jihudạ do acʼren gate Adulamren Hirạ soṅgekate Timnạteye calaoena. Ar okoeko hoṛ do uniren bhiḍikoakʼ upʼko kạpciyetʼtako tahẽkana onko do ona atoregeko tahẽkana." 
Genesis38:13 Unre mitʼṭen hoṛ do Tamor ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Ńelme hõńharme do acʼren bhiḍikoakʼ upʼ kạpciytako lạgitʼ Timnạteye calakʼkana.”" 
Genesis38:14 Tamor doe ńelkeda, Selawakʼ umer hoyentaere hõ hońhartetʼ do acʼakʼ katha leka Sela sãote bae bapla edekana. Onate uni do rạnḍi kicricʼ bhạnduṛkate ṭuṭurikate kicricʼteye oyo potomena ar Enaim reakʼ duạr phaṭok ṭhen senkateye duṛupʼena. Ona Enaim do Timna calakʼ horrege tahẽkana." 
Genesis38:15 Tamor do mẽtʼãhãe poṭom esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkante Jihudạ do kusmbi kuṛi menteye hudiskedea. 
Genesis38:16 Onate uni do Tamor ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Dela, am sãoteń giticʼmitʼlenge.” Menkhan uni do acʼren kimintetʼ bae oromledea. Tamore menkeda, “Noa iạte am do cetʼem imạńa?”" 
Genesis38:17 Jihudại menkeda, “Ińakʼ pal khon mitʼṭen merom hoponiń kolama.” Tamore menkeda, “Ona ạurim kolạń hạbicʼ iń ṭhen jãhãnakʼ bondhok doho oṭokakʼme?”" 
Genesis38:18 Jihudại menkeda, “Cetʼ iń doho oṭokakʼa?” Uniye menkeda, “Baber sudhạ amakʼ mohor chap akatʼ amakʼ ti reakʼ ṭheṅga.” Unre Jihudạ do onako uni ṭhene doho oṭokatʼte uni tulucʼe giticʼmitʼena, ar onate Tamor doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena." 
Genesis38:19 Niạ tayom Tamor doe calaoena ar bohokʼ reakʼ kicricʼ giḍikate arhõ rạnḍi maejiuakʼ kicricʼe bandekeda. 
Genesis38:20 Jihudạ do uni maejiu ṭhen khon ona bondhok dohoakan jinis ạguy lạgitʼ acʼren gate Adulam tite mitʼṭen merom hopone kolkedea. Menkhan uni do bae sendra ńam daṛeadea. 
Genesis38:21 Unre uni do onḍenko hoṛkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Enaim reakʼ hor aṛere okoeṭakʼ kusumbi kuṛiye tahẽkan uni do okare menaea?” Onkoko menkeda, “Nonḍe do cele kusumbi kuṛige bạnukʼkoa.”" 
Genesis38:22 Unre uni do Jihudạ ṭhen ruạṛ senkateye menkeda, “Iń do bạń sendra ńam daṛeadea. Ona chaḍa onḍenko hoṛko meneda, onḍe jãhãn mundil-kusumbige bạnukʼkoa.”" 
Genesis38:23 Jihudại menkeda, “Enḍekhan ona jinisko do uni ṭhenge tahẽocoge, ar baṅ khan hoṛko do alaṅko landa dhutʼalaṅa. Ona chaḍa merom hopon mań kolledege, menkhan bam sendra ńam daṛeadea.”" 
Genesis38:24 Noa pe cando tayom Jihudạ doe ańjom ńamkeda, kimintetʼ doe laṭghaṭ akada ar onateye bhạrti hoṛmo akana. Noa katha ańjomkate Jihudạ doe menkeda, “Uni do oḍokete seṅgelreye khadle ocokʼma.”" 
Genesis38:25 Tamor do tinreye oḍok giḍi ocokʼkan tahẽkana unre acʼren hońhartetʼ ṭhene roṛgotʼkada, “Ạlińakʼ kukhire okoeren gidrạ menae noako do uniyakʼ jiniskana.” Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Dayakate mitʼ dhao biḍạulegae ben noa baber sudhạ mohor chapakatʼ ar ṭheṅga do okoeyakʼ kana mente?”" 
Genesis38:26 Jihudạ do onakoe ńel oromketʼteye menkeda, “Uni do iń khon ḍhere bhagegea, ente ińren hopon Sela sãote bạń bapla akadea.” Noa tayom uni do ar tishõ Tamor sãote bae giticʼ mitʼlena." 
Genesis38:27 Ado gidrạ hoyokʼ jokhecʼ Tamorakʼ kukhire jawa gidrạ menakʼ kinạ mente ńelena. 
Genesis38:28 Janamokʼ jokhecʼ mitʼṭen gidrạ do ti oḍok lahayentaea. Unre dhạ̃i buḍhi do mitʼṭecʼ arakʼ sutạm uniyakʼ tire tolketʼteye menkeda, “Nui do lahareye janamena.”" 
Genesis38:29 Menkhan hahaṛa do noage ńelena, nui gidrạ do tinre acʼakʼ ti bhitriteye or aderkeda ar unrege uniren eṭakʼ boeha doe oḍokena. Unre dhạ̃i buḍhi doe menkeda, “Am do cekate tạkicʼakʼ dom parom ạgukeda?” Ar ona iạte uniyakʼ ńutum do Peres dohoyena (metakʼme “Tạkʼkicʼ rạputʼakʼ”)." 
Genesis38:30 Ona tayom acʼren boeha do arakʼ sutạmte tolgeye oḍok hecʼena. Ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Sereho dohoyentaea. 
Genesis39:1 Ar Joseph do Misor disạmteye idi ocoyena. Ismaelrenkoge uni do onḍeko idikedea. Ar Poṭiphar ńutuman Pharaoren mitʼṭen misri kạmiyạ hoṛ do onko ṭhen khon Josephe kirińkedea. Uni do Pharaoren rurukhiyạ dolkoren sordare tahẽkana. 
Genesis39:2 Probhu Isor do Joseph sãoteye tahẽkante joto lekan kạmireye jo baha ocoyede tahẽkana. Onate uni do Misriạ kisạ̃ṛakʼ oṛakʼreye doho ocoyena. 
Genesis39:3 Ar uniren kisạ̃ṛ doe ńelkeda Probhu Isor do Joseph sãore menaete uniyakʼ joto lekan kạmireye jo baha ocoyedekana. 
Genesis39:4 Onate Joseph do kisạ̃ṛakʼ nońjorreye paṛaoena ar uniren sapʼdapʼicʼe doho ocoyena. Ar kisạ̃ṛ do acʼakʼ gharońj ar dhon-duribko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar hõ Joseph cetanreye dohokeda. 
Genesis39:5 Joseph noako bhare em ocoyen tayom Joseph iạte Probhu Isor do uni Misri kisạ̃ṛakʼ jotowakʼe bhoratʼtaea. Probhu Isor do Poṭiphorakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr, ot-baṛge ar ona reakʼ jotowakʼgeye bhorada." 
Genesis39:6 Noa ńelte Poṭiphor do acʼakʼ joto reakʼ bhar Josephe aṛakʼadea. Joseph cetanre jotowakʼ reakʼ bhar tahẽkante Poṭiphor do eken acʼakʼ jomakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼ reakʼ hõ bae dạndikʼkan tahẽkana. Joseph do rupte ar ńelokʼte ạḍi napaegeye tahẽkana. 
Genesis39:7 Onate uni do thoṛa dinrege acʼ kisạ̃ṛren bạhuttetʼakʼ nońjorreye paṛaoena. Mitʼ din uni do Josephe metadea, “Dela ińakʼ aṭetʼte hijukʼme ar iń tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼme.”" 
Genesis39:8 Menkhan Joseph do bae rebenlena. Uni doe menkeda, “Ńelme, noa oṛakʼre minạńte ińren kisạ̃ṛ do jãhãnakʼ reakʼ bae dạndikʼ kana. Uni do acʼakʼ jotowakʼko cetanre ińe dohoakadińa." 
Genesis39:9 Noa oṛakʼre iń cetante ar celege bạnukʼkoa. Ar am do uniren bạhu kanam, onate eken am chaḍa ar sanamkoge iń tabereye dohoakatʼkoa. Ar iń do cekate nonkan bạṛicʼ kạmiń kạmite Isor upạrteń kại daṛekea?”" 
Genesis39:10 Poṭiphorren bạhu do dinke din ona kathage hudisokʼe ehopʼena. Menkhan Joseph do uni tulucʼ tahen ar giticʼmidokʼ hõ bae rạjilena. 
Genesis39:11 Mitʼ din Joseph do acʼakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ oṛakʼteye bolo akan tahẽkana. Ar unre oṛakʼre do celege bako tahẽkana. 
Genesis39:12 Unre Poṭiphorren bạhu do Josephakʼ kicricʼ sapʼkateye menkeda, “Dela aṭetʼre iń tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼme.” Unre Joseph do acʼakʼ kicricʼ giḍikate bahreteye ńir oḍokena." 
Genesis39:13 Phoṭiphorren bạhu do Joseph acʼakʼ tire kicricʼ giḍikate bahrete ńir oḍokokʼe ńelkede khan uni do acʼren gutiko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, uni do abo opoman bon lạgitʼ nui Ibri hoṛe ạgu akadea. Uni do iń nosṭoyiń lạgitʼ iń ṭhene bololena. Ar iń do kajakteń kạumạukeda." 
Genesis39:14  
Genesis39:15 Ar ińakʼ kạumạu ańjomte uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼ iń ṭhen bhạnduṛ oṭokate bahreteye ńir oḍokena.” 
Genesis39:16 Ar Josephren kisạ̃ṛ oṛakʼte ạuriye ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ kicricʼ do acʼ ṭhengeye dohokada. 
Genesis39:17 Uni do Poṭiphor noa katha baḍae ocokedeteye metadea, “Okoeṭakʼ Ibri guti abo ṭhenem ạgu akade uni do nosṭoyiń lạgitʼ ińakʼ oṛakʼteye bololena." 
Genesis39:18 Menkhan ińakʼ kạumạu ar hoho iạte uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼ giḍikateye ńir oḍokena.” 
Genesis39:19 Erattetʼakʼ noa katha ańjomkate kisạ̃ṛ do ạḍiye edreyena, ente acʼren bạhui metade tahẽkana, “Amren guti doe nonka kedińa.”" 
Genesis39:20 Unre Poṭiphor do hajotre Josephe bhoraokadea one oka ṭhạ̃ire raj bondiko dohoyetʼko tahẽkan. Menkhan Probhu Isor do hajotre hõ Joseph sãoteye tahẽkana. Uni do Probhu Isorre pạtiạugeye tahẽyena ar Probhu Isor do uniye dayawadete hajot khanaren sordarakʼ nońjorreye paṛao ocokedea. 
Genesis39:21  
Genesis39:22 Hajotren sordar do sanam kạidiko cetanre Joseph bhare emadea jemon onḍenakʼ sanam kạmiko Josephakʼ sanaleka hoyokʼ. 
Genesis39:23 Joseph cetanre okako kạmi reakʼ bhar tahẽkan hajot khanaren sordar do ona bae ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isor do Joseph sãoreye tahẽkana, ar Joseph do jotowakʼ kạmiregeye jo baha ocokedea." 
Genesis40:1 Noako ghoṭna tayom Misor rajren barea kạmiyạ hoṛ do raj upạrtekin behokkeda. Nukin modre mitʼṭen do piṭhạ bekʼnaoicʼ sordar ar eṭakʼicʼ do darkha rasa dudulicʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis40:2 Pharao do nukin bana hoṛ cetanre nunạkʼe ạṛisena," 
Genesis40:3 onate uni do Josephren kisạ̃ṛakʼ kạidi oṛakʼreye bhoraokatʼkinạ. Ar Joseph hõ inạ mitʼ ṭhạ̃iregeye bondi ocoakan tahẽkana. 
Genesis40:4 Kạd oṛakʼren sordar do nukin banar kạidikinakʼ bhar do Joseph cetanregeye dohokeda, ar Joseph hõ unkin ńel todarotkine ehopʼena. Ḍher din tayom Misor rajakʼ bondire menakʼkin unkin hoṛ do ńindạ jokhecʼ bana hoṛge mimitʼ goṭecʼkin kukmũkeda. Unkin mimitʼ hoṛakʼ kukmũ reakʼ do bises mane tahẽkana." 
Genesis40:5  
Genesis40:6 Setakʼ jokhecʼ Joseph do unkin ṭhene calaoen khan uni do mirluṅgeye ńelketʼkinạ. 
Genesis40:7 Ona ńelte Joseph do unkine kuliketʼkinạ, “Teheń do cedakʼ nunạkʼ mirluṅ ben ńelokʼkana?”" 
Genesis40:8 Unkin dokin roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ạliń bana hoṛge mimitʼ goṭecʼ liń kukmũ akada, menkhan ona reakʼ bhede lạiyạliń nonkan celege nonḍe do bạnukʼkoa.” Joseph doe metatʼkinạ, “Ona kukmũ reakʼ bhed lại daṛeaben reakʼ ektiạri do cetʼ Isorakʼ tire bạnukʼa? Oka kukmũ ben ńelakatʼ ona baṛe lạiyạń ben.”" 
Genesis40:9 Unre darkha rasa dudulicʼ sordar do acʼakʼ kukmũ reakʼ katha Josephe lạiyadea. Uni doe menkeda, “Iń do kukmũte iń samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ darkha nãṛĩń ńelkeda." 
Genesis40:10 Ona do pea ḍạrena. Ar ona ḍạr do sagenokʼ são sãote bahayena ar thoka thoka joyente beleyena. 
Genesis40:11 Unre Pharaoakʼ darkha rasa reakʼ bạṭi do ińakʼ tire tahẽkana. Iń do ona darkha jo hataokateń roḍocʼkeda ar Pharao iń emadea.” 
Genesis40:12 Joseph do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ kukmũ reakʼ mane do noage. Pea ḍạr do hoyokʼ kana pe din." 
Genesis40:13 Pharao do pe din khange nonḍe khone oḍokmea ar lahateakʼ kạmireye bahal ruạṛmea. Ar am do darkha rasa dudulicʼ lekate arhõ Pharaoakʼ bạṭirem dula. 
Genesis40:14 Menkhan amakʼ bhageakʼ dinkore iń do alom hiṛińińa. Am do Pharao ṭhen ińakʼ katham lạiya, jemon amakʼ goṛote noa hajot oṛakʼ khoniń oḍok daṛeakʼ." 
Genesis40:15 Ente, Ibrikoakʼ disạm khon jorkateń sapʼ ạgu ocoakana, ar noa disạmre hecʼkate hõ jãhãn nonkanakʼ do bạń kạmi akada one onate noa khạndṛuṅreko aṭkao dohokạń.”" 
Genesis40:16 Piṭhạ bekʼnaokoren sordar do tinreye ńelkeda, darkha rasa dudulicʼakʼ kukmũ reakʼ mane do bhagegea unre acʼ hõ Josephe metadea, “Iń hõ mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńel akada. Iń doń ńelkeda pe ḍạlicʼ moeda reakʼ piṭhạ do bohokʼreń dipil akada." 
Genesis40:17 Ar cetan reakʼ ḍạlicʼre do Pharao lạgitʼ aema lekan piṭhạko tahẽkana. Menkhan cẽṛẽko do hecʼkate ińakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ ona ḍạlicʼ khon jojomko ehopʼena.” 
Genesis40:18 Unre Joseph do roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Nõkʼõe amakʼ kukmũ reakʼ manetetʼ do. Pe ḍạlicʼ reakʼ mane do hoyokʼ kana pe din." 
Genesis40:19 Niạ pe din bhitrire Pharao do amakʼ bohokʼ am khone ńurtama are pạsimea, ar cẽṛẽko hecʼkate amakʼ jelko ṭhokrao joma.”" 
Genesis40:20 Niạ pe din hilokʼre Pharao do acʼ tabereko kạmikan hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. Enhilokʼ uni do acʼakʼ janam din tahẽkantaea. Pharao do acʼren darkha rasa dudulicʼ ar piṭhạ bekʼnaokoren sordare oḍokketʼkinte onko samaṅreye ạguketʼkinạ. 
Genesis40:21 Ar acʼren darkha rasa dudulicʼ do lahateakʼ kạmireye bahal ruạṛkedea, ar uni do Pharaoakʼ bạṭire dudule ehopʼena." 
Genesis40:22 Menkhan piṭhạ bekʼnaokoren sordar doe pạsikedea. Joseph cetʼleka kukmũ reakʼ manetetʼe lạiyatʼkin tahẽkan onkage unkinre hoyena. 
Genesis40:23 Menkhan uni darkha rasa dudulicʼ do Josephakʼ ona katha doe hiṛińkeda; ar bae disạleda. 
Genesis41:1 Noa bar bochor tayom Pharao do mitʼṭecʼe kukmũkeda. Uniye ńelkeda, acʼ do Nil gaḍa aṛereye teṅgo akana," 
Genesis41:2 ar hahaṛa reakʼ katha do noage, gaḍa khon unre eae goṭen ńelokʼte mońj, moṭa soṭa gạiko rakapʼ hecʼente pạṭiol (nol) ghãsre ạtińko ehopʼena." 
Genesis41:3 Onko tayom ona gaḍa khon arhõ eae goṭen morotʼ morotʼ gạiko rakapʼ hecʼena. Onko do ńelokʼte roga ar hirkhạgeko tahẽkana. Ar rakapʼ hecʼkate gaḍa aṛeren eṭakʼ gạiko sorreko teṅgoyena. 
Genesis41:4 Ona tayom onko roga ar hirkhạge ńelokʼ gạiko do onko eae goṭen mońj, moṭa soṭa gạiko utʼketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom Pharao doe ebhenena." 
Genesis41:5 Uni do arhõe jạpitʼ ruạṛkeda ar dosar dhao kukmũye ńelkeda. Uni doe ńelkeda mitʼṭecʼ guhum budạre eae goṭecʼ bhage gele geleyena. 
Genesis41:6 Ar ona tayom do arhõ eae goṭecʼ copa copa geleyena. Onako do purub reakʼ hoete tolmocʼge tahẽkana. 
Genesis41:7 Ona copa copa geleko do ona eae goṭecʼ danawanakʼ gelekoe utʼgotʼkada. Ar ona tayom Pharao doe ebhenena. Uni doe bujhạukeda, okaṭakʼe ńelketʼ ona do eken kukmũ kana mente." 
Genesis41:8 Menkhan setakʼ secʼ uniyakʼ mon do khad badaoentaea. Uni do hoṛ kolkate Misor disạmren sanam gonokko ar muhnidarko ar gunidarkoe hoho ạgu ocoketʼkoa. Ar okaṭakʼ kukmũe ńelakatʼ onae lạiyatʼkoa, menkhan celege ona reakʼ bhed do bako lại daṛeada." 
Genesis41:9 Unre Pharaoren darkha rasa dudulicʼe menkeda, “Maharaj, teheń ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dusi reakʼ katha disạ hecʼạdińa." 
Genesis41:10 Mitʼ dhao Maharaj do acʼ oṛakʼren guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko cetanreye raṅgaolena. Unre uni do rajakʼ kạd oṛakʼre piṭhạ bekʼnaokoren sordar sãote iń hõ bondikateye doholedińa. 
Genesis41:11 Unre mitʼ ńindạte bana hoṛ apan ạpin mitʼṭecʼkate liń kukmũkeda. Ar banar kukmũ reakʼge manetetʼ tahẽkana. 
Genesis41:12 Unre rurukhiyạ dol sordarren mitʼṭen Ibri guti koṛa hõ onḍeye tahẽkana. Ar bana hoṛge ạlińakʼ kukmũ reakʼ katha uni liń lạiyadea. Unre uni do bana hoṛge kukmũ reakʼ bhede lạiyatʼlińạ. 
Genesis41:13 Ar ạlińakʼ kukmũ reakʼ oka bhede lạiyatʼliń ṭhik onkage jotowakʼ do hoyena. Maharaj do arhõ ińakʼ kạmireye bahal dohṛakedińa menkhan piṭhạ benaoren sordar doe pạsikedea.” 
Genesis41:14 Unre Pharao do Joseph hoho ạguye lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa, ar onko do usạra senkate kạd oṛakʼ khon uniko oḍok ạgukedea. Ar Joseph do goco hoyo saphakate kicricʼkoe bodolketʼte Pharao ṭhene hạjirena." 
Genesis41:15 Unre Pharao do Josephe metadea, “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńel akada, menkhan okoe hõ ona reakʼ mane do bako lại daṛe ạdińa. Ińiń ańjom akada, kukmũ reakʼ katha lạiyam khan am do ona reakʼ manetetʼem lại daṛeakʼa.”" 
Genesis41:16 Joseph do Pharaoe metadea, “Ona reakʼ daṛe do bạnukʼtińạ. Menkhan Isor do Maharajakʼ kukmũ reakʼ manetetʼe lạiyaea ar uniyakʼ monre suluke danaea.”" 
Genesis41:17 Unre Pharao do Josephe metadea, “Kukmũteń ńelkeda, iń do Nil gaḍa aṛereń teṅgo akana," 
Genesis41:18 ar hahaṛa reakʼ do noage, gaḍa khon eae goṭen bhage moṭa soṭa gạiko rakapʼ hecʼente pạṭiol (nol) ghasre ạtińko ehopʼena." 
Genesis41:19 Ona tayom arhõ eae goṭen gạiko rakapʼ hecʼena. Onko do ńelokʼte roga ar hirkhạgeko tahẽkana. Goṭa Misor disạmre ńelokʼte nonka hirkhạ gại do ar okare hõ bako ńelakana. 
Genesis41:20 Tayomte onko roga, ar ńelokʼte hirkhạ gạiko do lahaten onko eae goṭen moṭa soṭa gạiko utʼketʼkoa," 
Genesis41:21 menkhan onko ńelte baṅ bujhạulena, onko moṭa soṭa gạiko utʼ ocoyena mente, ente onko do lahate lekageko ńelena. Ar ona tayom do jạpitʼ khoniń ebhenena." 
Genesis41:22 Tayomte iń do arhõń kukmũ dohṛakeda. Ar kukmũteń ńelkeda mitʼṭecʼ budạre eae goṭecʼ maraṅ ar danawanakʼ guhum geleyena. 
Genesis41:23 Ar ona tayom do eae goṭecʼ copa copa geleyena. Ar onako do purub reakʼ hoete tolmocʼena. 
Genesis41:24 Ar eae goṭecʼ copa copa gele do ona danawanakʼ gelekoe utʼkeda. Iń do noako katha gonokkoń lạiyatʼkoa, menkhan celege noa reakʼ mane do bako lại daṛeạdińa.”" 
Genesis41:25 Unre Joseph do Pharaoe metadea, “Maharajakʼ noa banar kukmũ do mitʼgea. Isor okae ceka lạgidokʼkan onage Maharaj ṭhene sodor akada." 
Genesis41:26 Eae goṭecʼ moṭa soṭa gại reakʼ mane do hoyokʼ kana eae bochor ar danawanakʼ eae goṭecʼ guhum gele reakʼ mane hõ eae bochor kana. Amakʼ banar kukmũge mitʼgea. 
Genesis41:27 Tayomte oneko rakapʼ hecʼen eae goṭecʼ roga, ar ńelokʼte hirkhạ gạiko ar purub reakʼ hoete tolmocʼ akan eae goṭecʼ copa gele, noa banar reakʼ mane do hoyokʼkana akal reakʼ eae bochor." 
Genesis41:28 Isor okae cekae lạgidokʼkan ona do Maharaje udukʼ akawadea, ar ona kathage iń do Maharaj ṭheniń lạiyeda." 
Genesis41:29 Goṭa Misor disạmre nonkan sãwãe eae bochor hijukʼkana one unre ḍher phosolko arjaokʼ," 
Genesis41:30 ar ona tayomge eae akal bochor hijukʼ kana. Unre ḍher arjao akan phosol reakʼ katha hoṛkoakʼ mon khon ocogokʼa, ente noa akal iạte disạm do jarkhar cabakʼa." 
Genesis41:31 Noa akal iạte disạm reakʼ bhage din reakʼ kathako hoṛkoakʼ monre disạ baṅ tahena. Noa do maraṅ akalge hoyokʼa. 
Genesis41:32 Noa kukmũ do Maharaj bar dhaoe ńel ocoakana. Noa reakʼ mane do hoyokʼkana, Isor doe niṭ dohoakada ar hako pakoge ona doe hoeocoya." 
Genesis41:33 “Ona iạte Maharaj ńitokʼ nonkan mitʼṭen akelan ar bujhạntar hoṛ bachao joṅme. Ar uni cetanre Misor disạm reakʼ bhar dohoyme. 
Genesis41:34 Ona chaḍa eṭakʼ kạmiyạko hõ uni sãote dohokom. Disạmre eae bochor tinre bạ̃ṛti phosol hoyokʼa, unre jemon mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩsko hatao." 
Genesis41:35 Ar onako din lạgitʼ bạ̃ṛti phosolko jarwaete onko do tayom daram jom lạgitʼ Maharajakʼ tabere mimitʼ nagrahare onako doho jarwaete rukhiyại reakʼko bebostae. 
Genesis41:36 Eae bochor Misor disạmre oka akal hoyokʼ unre jomakʼ lekate phosol jemon doho jarwakʼ ar akalre disạmren hoṛ jemon aloko gujukʼ.” 
Genesis41:37 Josephakʼ noa bebosta reakʼ katha do Pharao ar uniren sanam kạmiyạko ṭhen bhagege bujhạuena. 
Genesis41:38 Pharao do acʼren kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Nui hoṛre nonkanakʼko menakʼa one okaṭakʼ do noa dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan. Nui leka do okoe bon sendra ńamkea?”" 
Genesis41:39 Niạ tayom Pharao do Josephe metadea, “Isorge jotowakʼkoe baḍae ocoakatʼmea ar am lekan bujhạntar ar ạkilan hoṛ do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Genesis41:40 Onate amge raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼ bhar do hataome. Ar ińren sanam porja do amakʼ hukum lekageko senokʼa. Iń do eken raj lekate am cetanreń tahena.” 
Genesis41:41 Pharao do Joseph arhõe metadea, “Disạime, iń do goṭa Misor disạm cetanre amgeń dohoketʼmea.”" 
Genesis41:42 Ona tayom Pharao do acʼakʼ ti khon mohor chapakatʼ mundạm bocʼkate Josephe horokʼadea. Ar mońj utạrakʼ kicricʼe emadea ar hoṭokʼre sona reakʼ mala hõe horokʼadea. 
Genesis41:43 Noa tayom Joseph do acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ dosarakʼ rãt gạḍireye duṛupʼkedea. Ar gạḍi calakʼ oktere Joseph laha lahateko roṛ sodorkeda, “Ikhṛumokʼpe, ikhṛumokʼpe.” Ar nonkate Pharao do goṭa Misor disạm reakʼ bhar Joseph cetanreye dohokeda." 
Genesis41:44 Tayomte uni do Josephe metadea, “Ńitʼ hạbicʼ raj minạńrehõ enhõ goṭa Misor disạmren hoṛ do amakʼ hukum lekage duṛupʼ arko teṅgona.”" 
Genesis41:45 Pharao do Josephakʼ nãwã ńutum Sapnat Paneahe dohoketʼtaea. Ar On nagraharen naeke Poṭipheraren hoponerat Asnat tulucʼ Josephe baplakadea. Noa tayom Joseph do goṭa Misor disạm dãṛãn lạgitʼe oḍokena. 
Genesis41:46 Joseph do tinre Misorren raj Pharaoakʼ kạmireye bahal ocoyena unre uniyakʼ umer do pegel bochor tahẽkana. Uni do Pharaoakʼ raj dorbar khon oḍokkate Misor disạm reakʼ sanam jaegae dãṛã ạcurkeda. 
Genesis41:47 Ar ona eae bochor Misor disạmre asambheṛ phosol hoyena. 
Genesis41:48 Unre Joseph do ona eae bochor hạbicʼ Misor reakʼ ḍher arjawakʼ phosolko do nagraha reakʼ gola oṛakʼkoreye dohokeda. Uni do mimitʼ nagraha ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ khetko khon phosol ạgukateye jarwa ocokeda. 
Genesis41:49 Nonkate uni do jalapuri reakʼ gitil leka asambheṛ jomakʼe doho jarwakeda. Ar nunạkʼ ḍher phosol dohoyena je, ona do soṅ khon hõ ḍherge tahẽkana. Onate uni do ar bae soṅleda." 
Genesis41:50 Akal lahare On nagraharen naeke Poṭipheraren hoponera Asnatakʼ kukhire Josephren barea gidrạkin janamena. 
Genesis41:51 Joseph do maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum Manaseye dohoketʼtaea (metakʼme “Hiṛińkakʼ”). Uniye menkeda, “Isor do ińakʼ sanam duk ar iń babawakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ katha ińakʼ mon khone ocokʼakada.”" 
Genesis41:52 Ona tayom dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Ephrayeme dohokeda (metakʼme “Joanakʼ ”) Uniye menkeda, “Oka disạmre iń do dukiń ńamketʼ ona disạmrege Isor doe jo baha ocoakadińạ.”" 
Genesis41:53 Inạ tayom Misor disạm reakʼ ḍher phosol reakʼ ona eae bochor do cabayena. 
Genesis41:54 Ar ona tayom do akal reakʼ eae bochor ehopʼena. Ar Josephakʼ katha lekage jotowakʼ hoyena. Aḍe pase disạmko hõ noa akal khon rukhiyạ bae ńamleda, menkhan Misorre do okare hõ jomakʼ reakʼ okulạn baṅ tahẽkana." 
Genesis41:55 Ar Misor disạmren hoṛ do tinre reṅgecʼreko paṛaoena ar Pharao ṭhen jomakʼko koekeda unre Pharao doe metatʼkoa, “Joseph ṭhen calakʼpe. Ar uni okaṭakʼe metape, ona baṛe onkaepe.”" 
Genesis41:56 Noa akal do goṭa disạmrege pasnao idiyena. Ar tinre maraṅ akal hoyena unre Joseph do sanam murại oṛakʼkoe jhicʼkeda ar Misorrenko ṭhen jomakʼe ạkhrińkeda. 
Genesis41:57 Ar eṭakʼ disạmkore hõ maraṅ akal hoyena, onḍenko hoṛ hõ Joseph ṭhen khon jomakʼ kiriń idijoṅ lạgitʼ Misorte hijukʼko ehopʼena." 
Genesis42:1 Jakob do tinreye ańjomkeda Misor disạmre jomakʼ menakʼa unre uni do acʼren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Apan apin mẽtʼãhã secʼ do cedakʼpe beṅgetʼ joṅkana?”" 
Genesis42:2 Uni do arhõe metatʼkoa, “Ańjompe, ińiń ańjomakada Misor disạmre jomakʼ menakʼa. Onate ape do onḍe senokʼpe ar abo lạgitʼ jomakʼ kiriń ạguipe jemon jiwetʼbon tahen ar alobon gujukʼ.”" 
Genesis42:3 Unre Josephren gel boeha do jomakʼ kiriń ạgui lạgitʼ Misorteko calaoena. 
Genesis42:4 Jakob do menkhan Josephren bokottetʼ Benjạmin do onko sãote bae kolledea. Uniyakʼ jãhãn muhin hoedaṛeakʼa mente uni doe botorokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Genesis42:5 Ar jomakʼ kiriń lạgitʼ tinạkʼ hoṛko calakʼkan tahẽkan onko dolre Israelren hopon hõko tahẽkana, ente Kanan disạmre hõ akal paṛao akan tahẽkana." 
Genesis42:6 Joseph do Misor disạmren disạm cakʼlaoicʼe tahẽkana. Uni cetanrege disạmren sanam hoṛko ṭhen anaj ạkhriń reakʼ bhar do tahẽkana. Onate Josephren dadattetʼtako hõ uni ṭhen senkate otre ombakʼkateko ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis42:7 Joseph do dadattetʼtakoe ńel oromketʼkoa, menkhan ạnạṛi hoṛ lekae kuliketʼkoa, “Ape do oka khonpe hecʼakana?” Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ale do Kanan disạm khon anaj kiriń lạgitʼle hecʼakana.”" 
Genesis42:8 Joseph do acʼren boehakoe ńel oromketʼkoa menkhan onko do bako orom daṛeadea. 
Genesis42:9 Unre uni do onko reaṅe kukmũletʼ reakʼ katha disạ hecʼadea. Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape dope disạm cikʼyạ hoṛ kanape. Aleakʼ disạm reakʼ okako jaegare rurukhiyạ reakʼ bebosta bạnukʼ onako ńel lạgitʼgepe hecʼakana.”" 
Genesis42:10 Onko do uniko metadea, “Baṅa, hujur, amren golam do anaj kiriń lạgitʼgele hecʼakana." 
Genesis42:11 Ale do jotoge mitʼ babaren hopon kanale. Kharap hoṛ dole baṅkana. Ale amren golam do disạm cikʼyạ hoṛ dole baṅkana.” 
Genesis42:12 Unre Joseph do arhõe metatʼkoa, “Aleakʼ disạmre oka jaegakore rurukhiyạ reakʼ bebosta bạnukʼ, ona ńel lạgitʼgepe hecʼakana.”" 
Genesis42:13 Menkhan onkoko menkeda, “Amren golamko do jotote gelbar boehako kanale. Ale do Kanan disạmren mitʼhoṛ ren hopon kangeale. Aleren huḍiń utạricʼ boeha do ńitokʼ aleren baba ṭhen menaea, ar aleren armitʼ boeha do jiwetʼ bạnuitalea.”" 
Genesis42:14 Joseph do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape reaṅ okań menetʼ onage ṭhika, ape do disạm cikʼyạ hoṛ kangeape." 
Genesis42:15 Ape do noategepe biḍạu ocokʼa- aperen huḍiń utạricʼ boeha tin hạbicʼ nonḍe bae hijukʼ unhạbicʼ ape do nonḍe khon chaḍao bape ńama. In do pharao ńutumteń kiriạkʼkana. 
Genesis42:16 Aperen huḍiń utạricʼ boeha ạguye lạgitʼ ape modren mitʼhoṛ kolkaepe, ar sarecʼko do jotoge bondi akanpe tahẽ hataṛokʼa. Ar apeakʼ katha sạri kana se baṅa ona sạbudokʼa. Menkhan uni nonḍe bape ạguye enḍekhan Pharao ńutumteń kiriạkʼkana ape do disạm cikʼyạ hoṛ kangeape.”" 
Genesis42:17 Noa menkate Joseph do pe din hạbicʼ jotoge hajotreye dohokatʼkoa. 
Genesis42:18 Tesar hilokʼ Joseph do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń okań metatʼpe ona onkaepe, ente iń do Isoriń botoraea." 
Genesis42:19 Arpe dhorom hoṛkan khan enḍekhan ape modre mitʼ hoṛ noa hajotre bondi akane tahenma, ar sarecʼ eṭakʼko do apeakʼ upạs akatʼ gharońj lạgitʼ anajko idiyma." 
Genesis42:20 Ar apeakʼ katha sạrikana mente ona sạbud lạgitʼ aperen boeha iń ṭhen ạguyepe. Enḍekhan ape do gujukʼ khon rukhiyạpe ńama.” Ar onate onko doko rạjiyena. 
Genesis42:21 Ona tayom onko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Sạrige aboren uni boeha cetanre oka bon cekaletʼ onate abo dobon dusigea. Uni do abo ṭhene nehõrlena ar uniyakʼ mon reakʼ kosṭo ńeltehõ unre babo dayalena. Onatege noa kosṭo do abore hecʼpaṛao akana.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ruben do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń doń metatʼpe tahẽkangea, ‘uni cetanre behokakʼ alope kạmiya.’ Menkhan unre bape ańjomletʼtińạ. Ńitokʼ do uniyakʼ mãyãm reakʼ hakʼla hạli reakʼ okte hoyakana.”" 
Genesis42:23 Joseph onkoakʼ kathae bujhạuketʼtako onko do ona bako bujhạu daṛeada, ente torjomayicʼ onko talareye tahẽkana." 
Genesis42:24 Unre Joseph do onko ṭhen khon oḍok senkateye rakʼkeda, ar ona tayom do ruạṛ hecʼkate onko sãote arhõ galmaraoe ehopʼena. Ar Simeone bachaokedete onko samaṅrege tole reakʼe hukumkeda." 
Genesis42:25 Joseph do onkoakʼ bostakore anaj perejtako ar ṭaka ruạṛkatako lạgitʼe hukumkeda. Ona chaḍa horte lạgitʼ onkoakʼ oka jạruṛ ona emokʼ lạgitʼ hõe hukumkeda. Ar Josephakʼ hukum lekage onko lạgitʼ jotowakʼko kạmikeda. 
Genesis42:26 Noa tayom onko do akoren gadhare anajko ladekeda arko mohnḍayena. 
Genesis42:27 Ado jirạukʼ reakʼ jaegareko seṭeren khan onko modren mitʼhoṛ do gadhako jomakʼ emako lạgitʼ acʼakʼ bostae raṛaketʼ khan uni do ṭakae ńel ńamkeda. Ente ṭaka do bosta mocarege tahẽkana. 
Genesis42:28 Unre uni do acʼren boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Ma ńelpe, ińakʼ ṭaka do em ruạṛ akana. Ińakʼ ṭaka do bostarege menakʼa.” Noa ńelte onko do botorteko keklesetʼena. Onko do thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ apan ạpinko beṅgetʼ baṛawana arko menkeda, “Isor abo cetanre noa do cetʼe cekakeda?”" 
Genesis42:29 Onko do Kanan disạmte ruạṛ senkate noako reakʼ sanamakʼ akoren apatko lạiyadea," 
Genesis42:30 “Ona disạmren cakʼlaoicʼ hoṛ do ạḍi keṭecʼkate ale sãote kathae roṛakada. Uni do disạm cikʼyạ hoṛ kanale menteye hudisketʼlea. 
Genesis42:31 Menkhan ale do unile metadea, ‘Baṅa, ale dole ne hoṛ kana, disạm cikʼyạko dole baṅkana." 
Genesis42:32 Ale dole gelbar boehawa, ar mitʼ babaren hoponko kanale. Ale modre mitʼṭen doe gocʼentalea, ar jotoko khon huḍińicʼ do ńitokʼ Kanan disạmre aleren baba ṭhen menaea.’" 
Genesis42:33 “Unre uni hoṛ, okoe doe disạmren cakʼlaoicʼ kan, uniye metatʼlea, ‘iń do niạtegeń bujhạu daṛeakʼa bhage hoṛ kanape mente. Ape do aperen mitʼ boeha iń ṭhen doho oṭokaepe ar apeakʼ upạsakatʼ gharońj lạgitʼ tinạkʼ anaj jạruṛape unạkʼ idiype," 
Genesis42:34 ar aperen huḍiń utạricʼ boeha iń ṭhen ạguiyepe. Enḍekhan iń bujhạu daṛeakʼa, disạm cikʼyạko dope baṅkana menkhan bhage hoṛ kanape. Unre aperen boeha do ape ṭheniń ruạṛkaea, ar noa disạmrepe bạnij bepar daṛeakʼa.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Inạ tayom akoakʼ bostako khạliketʼtako khan hahaṛa tulucʼko ńelkeda onko jotokoakʼ ṭaka do bostarege menakʼa. Noa ńelte onko do botor caṛhaoatʼkoa ar onkoren apat hõ. 
Genesis42:36 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape dope nirbõskedińa. Joseph hõ bạnuiya, Simeon hõ bạnuiya, ar ńitokʼ ape do Benjạmin hõ idiyepe meneda. Noako kosṭo reakʼ bojha do ińge gogokʼ hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Genesis42:37 Unre Ruben do acʼ apate metadea, “Benjạmin am ṭhen bạń ạgu ruạṛ daṛeae khan ińren banar hopon gocʼkinme. Am do Benjạmin ińakʼ tire jimạyem, iń do arhõ am ṭheniń ạgu ruạṛkaea.”" 
Genesis42:38 Menkhan Jakobe menkeda, “Baṅ, ińren nui hopon do ape sãote bae calakʼa. Uniren boehae gocʼ ocoakana, ar nui do ńitokʼ eskarge menaea. Apeakʼ calakʼ horre nuiyakʼ jãhãn muhin hoylen khan enḍekhan noa haṛam umerre ạḍi duk ńamkate patal puritepe ãṛgo calakʼ hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Genesis43:1 Kanan disạm reakʼ akal do arhõ ḍher idiyena. 
Genesis43:2 Misor disạm khon Israelren, metakʼme Jakobren hoponko okaṭakʼ anajko ạguletʼ ona cabayentako khan onkoren apat doe menkeda, “Ape do arhõ senokʼte anaj kiriń ạgui tabonpe.”" 
Genesis43:3 Unre Jihudạ do uniye metadea, “Menkhan uni hoṛ do kajakteye menakatʼlea, ‘aperen boeha ape sãote bape ạgule khan iń samaṅre alope hijukʼa.’" 
Genesis43:4 Aleren boeha ale sãotem sen ocoae khan enḍekhan ale do arhõ senkate anajle kiriń ạguiya. 
Genesis43:5 Ar uni bam sen ocoae khan alehõ bale calakʼa. Ente uni hoṛ doe metatʼle tahẽkana, ‘aperen boeha ape sãote bape ạgu lekhan apehõ iń samaṅre alope hijukʼa.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Unre Israele menkeda, “Iń sãote nonka bạṛicʼ do cedakʼpe beoharkeda? Aperen armitʼṭen boeha menae ona do cedakʼpe lạikeda?”" 
Genesis43:7 Onkoko menkeda, “Menkhan uni hoṛ do abo ar aboakʼ gharońj reaṅ ạḍiye kuliketʼlea, ‘Aperen baba do cetʼ ńitʼhõ jiwetʼ menaegea? Aperen do cetʼ arhõ boeha menakʼkotapea?’ Onatege ale do unile roṛ ruạṛade tahẽkana. Unre ale do cekatele baḍaea, uniye metalea, ‘aperen boeha ạguyepe’?”" 
Genesis43:8 Unre Jihudạ do acʼ babae metadea, “Uni do ale sãote sen ocoaeme baṛe. Ale do usạrate senkatele ruạṛ hijukʼa jemon am ar ale aleren gidrạko jiwetʼko tahen ar alo bon gujukʼ." 
Genesis43:9 Ińge uni lạgitʼ jạmin iń teṅgoyena. Uni lạgitʼ ińge dạyiń tahena. Am ṭhen baṅ ruạṛ ạgu daṛeae khan jaejug hạbicʼ am ṭhen dusi akaniń tahenma. 
Genesis43:10 Ale nunạkʼ bale bilomle khan khạṭige nunạkʼ dinte babar dhao senkatele ruạṛ hecʼ daṛekokʼa.” 
Genesis43:11 Unre onkoren apate metatʼkoa, “Onkage hoyokʼ khan, enḍekhan mitʼṭecʼ kạmipe. Uni hoṛ lạgitʼ dan lekate noa disạm reakʼ bhage bhage jinisko reakʼ thoṛa thoṛa idi torawaepe, ona do noakoge, ran sunum, dumur rasa, jut so mosola, gondhoros, pesta jo ar badam." 
Genesis43:12 Ar soṅgete ṭaka hõ dobṛa idi toraepe, ente bostare oka ṭakae ruạṛatʼpe tahẽkan ona hõ ruạṛkatae hoyokʼa. Hoedaṛeakʼa hiṛińte onko do onako emlen tahẽkana." 
Genesis43:13 Aperen boeha soṅgete idiyepe ar usạra uni hoṛ ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼpe. 
Genesis43:14 Sanam daṛean Isorakʼ dayate jemon uniye dayawape, ar aperen uni boeha ar Benjạmin jemon apeakʼ tireye aṛakʼkin; ar nirbõsokʼ khaniń nirbosokʼa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Unre onko do ona dan, ar dobṛa ṭaka ar Benjạmin soṅgekate Misor disạmteko mohnḍayena. Ar onḍe seṭerkate Joseph samaṅreko hạjirena." 
Genesis43:16 Onko sãote Benjạmine ńelkede khan Joseph do acʼ oṛakʼren ńel todaroticʼe metadea, “Oṛakʼ bhitrite aderkom ar jel isin aroytabonme. Noko hoṛ do iń sãote mańjanko joma.”" 
Genesis43:17 Joseph okae menketʼ onkage uni todaroticʼ doe kạmikeda. Uni do Josephakʼ oṛakʼteye aderketʼkoa. 
Genesis43:18 Ado Josephakʼ oṛakʼteko idi ocokʼkana menteko ńelketʼ khan onko do botorte roroṛko ehopʼena, “Laha dhao aboakʼ bostare oka ṭaka senlen ona lạgitʼge nonḍe bon ạgu ocoakana. Niạ dhao do aboakʼ doskoe udukʼ abonteye sapʼ idibona, ar aboren gadhakoe recʼ bona ar golame khaṭao bona.”" 
Genesis43:19 Onate onko do Josephakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr samaṅreko hecʼen khan ńel todaroticʼko metadea," 
Genesis43:20 “Hujur, ale do noa laharehõ mitʼ dhao anaj kirińle hecʼlena." 
Genesis43:21 Menkhan ḍerate seṭerkate aleakʼ bostale raṛaketʼ khan joto ṭakage apan ạpinakʼ bostarele ńelkeda. Ar ńitokʼ do ona ṭaka hõle ruạṛ ạguakada. 
Genesis43:22 Ona chaḍa anaj kiriń lạgitʼ arhõ ṭakale ạguakada. Menkhan ona ṭaka aleakʼ bostare okoeye doholeda ona do bale baḍaea.” 
Genesis43:23 Uni ńel todaroticʼ doe menkeda, “Jotoge ṭhikgea, alope botorokʼa. Ape ar aperen babaren Isorge ona dan do apeakʼ bostareye doholeda. Apeakʼ ṭaka doń ńam akada.” Ar noa menkate Simeon do onko ṭhene oḍok ạgukedea." 
Genesis43:24 Ona tayom uni do sanamko Josephakʼ oṛakʼ bhitriteye aderketʼkote ạbukokʼ lạgitʼ dakʼe ematʼkoa ar onko do jaṅgako ạbukena. Uni do onkoren gadhako hõe jom ocoketʼkoa. 
Genesis43:25 Ar tikin jokhecʼ Josephakʼ hijukʼ iạte onko do akoakʼ danko dohokeda. Enteko ańjomakatʼ tahẽkana onko do onḍegeko jom-ńũiya mente. 
Genesis43:26 Ado Joseph oṛakʼteye hecʼena khan onko do akoakʼ ona dan oṛakʼ bhitriteko ạgukeda ar uniko emadete ombakʼkateko ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis43:27 Ar uni do boge judại kuliketʼkoa, “Aperen baba uni haṛam hoṛ do cetʼ bogege menaea? Uni do cetʼ ńitʼhõe jiwetʼgea?”" 
Genesis43:28 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren golam aleren baba do ńit hõe jiwetʼgea ar bogege menaea.” Ar noa menkate ombakʼkateko ḍobokʼadea." 
Genesis43:29 Joseph do beṛhaete beṅgetʼkate acʼren boeha Benjạmine ńelkedeteye menkeda, “Nui do cetʼ aperen huḍiń utạricʼ boeha kanae one okoe reakʼ kathape metadiń tahẽkan?” Ona tayom uni do Benjạmine metadea, “Isore dayawam ma!”" 
Genesis43:30 Boehae ńelkede khan Josephakʼ ontor do bhak bhakaoentaea. Uni do usạrate onḍe khone oḍokena ar acʼakʼ kandhare bolokate rarakʼe dhurạuena. 
Genesis43:31 Tayomte mẽtʼãhãe apʼente onḍe khone oḍok hecʼena ar apnare sambṛaoente jomakʼ emokʼ lạgitʼe hukumkeda. 
Genesis43:32 Emokʼicʼ do Joseph, ar uniren boehako mitʼ ṭhene jom ocoketʼkoa ar Josephakʼ oṛakʼre okoe Misrikoko jom ńũiyetʼ tahẽkan onko do eṭakʼ jaegareye jom ocoketʼkoa. Ente misriko do Ibriko sãote bako jom ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana, ente onko ṭhen do hirkhạwakʼge tahẽkana." 
Genesis43:33 Joseph samaṅre uniren boehako do umer lekateko duṛupʼ ocoakan tahẽkana. Noate onko doko hahaṛayena ar apan ạpinko beṅgetʼ baṛawana. 
Genesis43:34 Joseph do acʼakʼ ṭebil khon thoṛa jomakʼ boehako emako lạgitʼe kolkeda. Ar eṭakʼ boehako khon Benjạmin do mõṛẽ doboṛ bạ̃ṛtiye emocoyena. Nonkate onko do Joseph sãoteko jom ńũkeda. Arko jom-ńũketʼte uni tulucʼko rạskạyena. 
Genesis44:1 Ona tayom Joseph do acʼ oṛakʼren ńel todaroticʼ noa menteye hukumadea, “Tinạkʼ anajko idi daṛeakʼ unạkʼge bostare bhoraoakome, ar mimitʼ hoṛkoakʼ ṭaka do onkoakʼ bostaregem dohokakʼa." 
Genesis44:2 Ar onkoren huḍiń utạricʼ boehawakʼ bostare ińakʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi ar anaj lạgitʼ ṭaka hõm dohoya.” Ar Joseph okae metade uni do onkageye kạmikeda. 
Genesis44:3 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre uni do gadhakowante onkoe kolkatʼkoa. 
Genesis44:4 Ar nagraha khonko oḍok calakʼ oktere Joseph do acʼ oṛakʼren ńel todaroticʼe metadea, “Usạrate onko hoṛ tayomte calakʼme. Arem tiyokʼleko khanem metakoa, ‘Upkạr bodolte cedakʼpe bạṛicʼ oṭokada?" 
Genesis44:5 Ona bạṭirege coṅ ińren kisạ̃ṛmae ńũiyetʼ tahẽkan ar ona bạṭitege uni do gonok reakʼe kạmikan tahẽkana. Ape do noa kạmikate ạḍipe bạṛicʼ akada.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Uni ńeltodaroticʼ do onkoe khudạu tiyokʼketʼko khan ona kathae metatʼkoa. 
Genesis44:7 Menkhan onko do uniko metadea, “Hujur, noa katha do cedakʼem meneda? Amren golamko do nonkan kạmi tishõ ohole kạmilea." 
Genesis44:8 Ńelme, calaoen dhao aleakʼ bostare oka ṭakale ńamletʼ ona do arhõ Kanan khonle ạgu ruạṛakada. Inạ tayom amren kisạ̃ṛakʼ oṛakʼ khon rupạ se sona do cedakʼle kombṛo idiya?" 
Genesis44:9 Ona bạṭi amren golamko ṭhen ńamlen khan enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼma, ar alehõ amren kisạ̃ṛren golam akanle tahena.”" 
Genesis44:10 Uni ńeltodaroticʼe menkeda, “Ṭhikgea, ape okape menketʼ onkage baṛe hoyokʼma. Menkhan okoe ṭhen ona bạṭi ńamokʼa eken unige ińren golame tahena. Ar eṭakʼkoakʼ do cetʼ dosge baṅ tahena.”" 
Genesis44:11 Unre sanamkoge usạrate akoakʼ bosta otre phedkateko raṛakeda. 
Genesis44:12 Ar uni ńeltodaroticʼ do maraṅicʼ boehawakʼ bosta khon ehopʼkate huḍiń utạricʼ boehawakʼ bosta hạbicʼe sendrakeda, ar Benjạminakʼ bostare ona bạṭi do ńamena." 
Genesis44:13 Noa ńelte onko do akoakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼtakoa. Ar ona tayom do akoren gadhakore bostako ladeketʼte arhõ nagrahateko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Genesis44:14 Jihudạ ar uniren boehako do tinre Josephakʼ oṛakʼteko ruạṛena unre Joseph hõ onḍeye tahẽkana. Onko do senkate ombakʼkateko ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis44:15 Unre Joseph do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Cedakʼ nonka dope kạmikeda? Jotowakʼ sạrigeń guni daṛeakʼ ona do cetʼ bape baḍaekan tahẽkana?”" 
Genesis44:16 Jihudại menkeda, “Hujur cetʼle mena? Ar cetʼ baṅle roṛ ruạṛam? Ar cekate baṅ bin dusi mentele sạbudokʼ? Amren golamkoakʼ dos ma Isorge coṅe udukʼ akatʼ. Okoe ṭhen ona bạṭi ńamakan uni ar ale sanamkoge Hujurren golamle hoyena.”" 
Genesis44:17 Menkhan Josephe menkeda, “Iń khon sahaṛ akan tahen ma onka kạmi do. Okoe ṭhen ona bạṭi ńamlen eken unige ińren golame hoyokʼa. Menkhan ape do nirạite aperen baba ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼpe.”" 
Genesis44:18 Unre Jihudạ do Joseph ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Hujur, am do Pharaoakʼ jaegare menama, onate amren golam am ṭhen thoṛa katha roṛ lạgitʼ aṛakʼạńme. Amren golam cetanre alom edrekʼa." 
Genesis44:19 Hujur, amren golamkom kuliletʼkoa, ‘aperen baba do cetʼ jiwetʼge menaea ar aperen eṭakʼ boehako menakʼkoa se baṅa?’" 
Genesis44:20 Unre hujurle metade tahẽkana, ‘aleren baba doe jiwetʼgea ar haṛam umerre uniren do mitʼṭen hopon menaetaea. Uniren boeha doe gocʼena, ar mitʼ gogoren hopon lekate ńitokʼ do uni eskarge menaea. Onate uniren baba do ạḍiye dulạṛedea.’" 
Genesis44:21 “Ona tayom am do amren golamkom metatʼle tahẽkana, ‘iń ṭhen ạguiyepe; iń do uniń ńelea.’" 
Genesis44:22 Menkhan ale do hujurle metade tahẽkana, ‘apattetʼ bạgikate uni do bae hecʼ daṛeakʼa. Are hijukʼ khan apattetʼ doe gujukʼa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Menkhan am do amren golamkom metatʼle tahẽkana, ‘huḍiń utạricʼ boeha soṅgete bape ạgu darale khan iń samaṅre ar alope hijukʼa.’" 
Genesis44:24 Ona iạte ale do ruạṛ senkate amren golam, metakʼme iń baba do hujurakʼ joto kathale lạiyade tahẽkana." 
Genesis44:25 “Tayomte aleren babae menkeda, ‘ruạṛ senkate abo lạgitʼ arhõ thoṛa anaj kiriń ạguiype.’" 
Genesis44:26 Unrele menkeda, ‘aleren huḍińicʼ boeha ale sãotem sen ocoae khan ale dole senokʼa. Ar baṅkhan do bale calao daṛeakʼa. Aleren huḍińicʼ boeha ale sãote bae tahen enḍekhan ale do uni hoṛ samaṅre bale teṅgo daṛeakʼa.’" 
Genesis44:27 “Unre amren golam do, metakʼme aleren baba doe menkeda, ‘baḍaegeape ińren oṛakʼ hoṛ do barea hopone janamạdiń tahẽkana." 
Genesis44:28 Mitʼ dhao unkin modre mitʼ hoṛ do iń samaṅ khone oḍok calaoena, ar mucạtʼreń baḍaekeda, uni do kaṭaha janwarko khanḍa khunḍikedea. Ona tayom khon uni do ar bạń ńel ńamledea." 
Genesis44:29 Ar ńitokʼ nũi hõ iń khonpe idiye ar jãhãnakʼ hạnakʼ hoylentae khan, enḍekhan haṛam umerre ạḍi duk ar bhabna talate patal purite calakʼ hoyokʼtińạ.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Ona iạte ńitokʼ amren golam ṭhen, metakʼme iń baba ṭheniń ruạṛ calaolen khan ar uniren hopon iń sãote bae ńel ńamle khan khạṭige uni doe gujukʼa, ente hopontetʼ tulucʼ uniyakʼ jiwi do tol akantaea. Ar nonkate amren golamko do akoren baba, metakʼme amren golam do ạḍi duk salakʼ patal purite calakʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Iń amren golam do iń baba ṭhen khon nonka jạmin dohokateń ạguakadea, ‘am ṭhen bạń ruạṛ ạguye enḍekhan am ṭhen dusi akaniń tahenma.’" 
Genesis44:33 Onate hujur, dayakate uni bodolte ińge golam lekate dohoyińme, ar nui koṛa do boehako sãote ruạṛ calao ocoaeme." 
Genesis44:34 Nui koṛa begorte iń do cekate iń baba ṭheniń ruạṛ calakʼa? Ariń onkae khan uniyakʼ duk do ińakʼ mẽtʼte ńeńel hoyokʼtińạ.” 
Genesis45:1 Unre Joseph do acʼren kạmiyạko samaṅre ar bae sambṛao daṛeada. Uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Iń samaṅ khon sanamko ocogokʼpe.” Onate boehako ṭhen tinre acʼakʼ oprome emkeda unre onḍe do ar celege bako tahẽkana." 
Genesis45:2 Uni do nunạkʼ ãṭ rarakʼe ehopʼena, ona do misriko hõko ańjom tiyokʼkeda ar Pharaoakʼ oṛakʼren hõko baḍae ocoketʼkoa." 
Genesis45:3 Joseph do acʼren boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Iń doń Joseph kana! Iń baba do cetʼ ńitʼhõ jiwetʼ menaegea?” Noa katha ańjomkate boehataeko do botorte thar tharaokʼko ehopʼena; onko do cetʼge bako roṛ ruạṛadea." 
Genesis45:4 Unre Joseph do acʼren boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Dela, iń ṭhen hijukʼpe.” Adoko hecʼ soren khan onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do aperen boeha Joseph kạnạń; Misorteko calakʼkan tahẽkanre onko ṭhen okoepe ạkhrińlediń." 
Genesis45:5 Ińpe ạkhrińledeńte alope dukokʼa ar apnar cetanre alope raṅgaokʼa. Manwa jiwi rukhiyạitako lạgitʼge Isor do ape lahate nonḍeye kol akadińạ. 
Genesis45:6 Akal calakʼ kana bar bochor khon. Noa do arhõ mõṛẽ bochor hạbicʼ tahena. Unre phosol hõ baṅ erokʼa ar irhõ baṅ irokʼa. 
Genesis45:7 Dhạrtire aperen bõsko jiwetʼ dohoko lạgitʼ ar ḍahao maraokʼ reakʼ ti khon bańcaokate apeakʼ jiwi rukhiyại lạgitʼge Isor do ape lahate ińe kol akadińạ. 
Genesis45:8 Ape do bape kolakadińạ, menkhan Isorgeye kol akadińạ. Uni do pharaoren apatakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye dohoakadińạ ar acʼakʼ gharońj cetanre mạlike dohoakadińạ. Ona chaḍa uni do goṭa Misor disạm cetanre cakʼlaoicʼ menteye dohoakadińạ." 
Genesis45:9 “Ape do ńitokʼ usạrate baba ṭhen senkate lạiyaepe, uniren hopon Joseph do noae meneda, ‘Isor do goṭa Misor disạmren cakʼlaoicʼe hoyoco akadińa. Ar begor bilomte am do iń ṭhen hijukʼme." 
Genesis45:10 Ar hecʼkate am do Gosen ṭoṭhare girobasokʼme. Onate am do, amren hoponko, amren goṛom gidrạko, amren ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi palko, ar jãhãnakʼge menakʼtam ona sanamakʼko soṅgekate iń ṭhen tahẽhataṛokʼpe." 
Genesis45:11 Am ar gharońjrenkoakʼ jemon jãhãn haron alo hoyokʼ onate iń do nonḍege amakʼ jom ńũ reakʼ iń bebostaea, ente akal do ńithõ mõṛẽ bochor hạbicʼ calakʼa.’" 
Genesis45:12 “Ar ińakʼ mocatege jotowakʼiń menetʼkan ona do mẽtʼtegepe ńeleda, ar ińren boeha Benjạmin hõe ńeleda." 
Genesis45:13 Misor disạmre ińakʼ tinạkʼ manot ar jãhãnakʼgepe ńeletʼ ona reakʼ jotowakʼge senkate babape baḍae ocoyea. Ńitokʼ ape do usạrate senkate nonḍe ạguiyepe.” 
Genesis45:14 Niạ tayom Joseph do acʼren boeha Benjạmine hạṛupʼkedete rarakʼe ehopʼena ar Benjạmin hõ hạṛupʼkateye rakʼkeda. 
Genesis45:15 Ona tayom Joseph do acʼren boehakoe cokʼatʼkoa ar hạṛupʼketʼkoteye rakʼkeda. Unre uniren boehako do uni tulucʼko galmaraokeda. 
Genesis45:16 Josephren boehakoakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ khobor Pharaoakʼ oṛakʼte seṭeren khan Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko do ạḍiko kusiyena. 
Genesis45:17 Pharao do Josephe metadea, “Amren boehako metakom jemon onko do anajte perecʼ bojha gadhareko ladete Kanan disạmteko ruạṛ calakʼma," 
Genesis45:18 ar onkoren baba ar onko gharońjren sanamkoante am ṭhenko hijukʼma. Ar Misor disạm reakʼ joto khon bhage bhageakʼ jiniskom emakoa ar disạm reakʼ joto khon bhage jomakʼkom jom ocokoa. 
Genesis45:19 Noa chaḍa am cetanre ińakʼ noa hukum tahẽyena, amren boehakom metakoa onko do akoren bạhuko ar kạṭicʼ gidrạko lạgitʼ Misor disạm khon gạḍiko idiyma, ar akoren apatko ạguyema." 
Genesis45:20 Ar gharońj reakʼ jinisko lạgitʼ aloko bhabnakʼma, ente goṭa Misor disạm reakʼ bhage bhage jinisko do onkoakʼge hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis45:21 Israelren hoponko do onkageko kạmikeda. Pharaoakʼ hukum leka Joseph do onko lạgitʼ gạḍi ar horte lạgitʼ jomakʼe kolatʼkoa. 
Genesis45:22 Ar sanamkoge hoṛo hoṛo kicricʼe ematʼkoa, menkhan Benjạmin do mõrẽ goṭecʼ kicricʼ ar pesae rupại emadea." 
Genesis45:23 Uni do acʼ baba lạgitʼ gel goṭen gadha ar gel goṭen gadha eṅgae kolketʼkoa. Onko gel goṭen gadhare Misor disạm reakʼ bhage bhage jinisko reakʼ bojha tahẽkana, gadha eṅgakore do anaj, piṭhạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jomakʼ jinisko tahẽkana. Noako do acʼ babawakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ horteakʼ jomakʼkoge tahẽkana." 
Genesis45:24 Noako bebostakate uni do acʼren boehakoe kolkatʼkoa. Ar calakʼ jokhecʼe metatʼkoa, “Horre alope kạphạriạukʼa.”" 
Genesis45:25 Tayomte onko do Misor khon Kanante akoren apat Jakob ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Joseph do ńithõ jiwetʼge menaea. Unige goṭa Misor disạmren cakʼlaoicʼe hoyakana.” Noa katha ańjomkate Jakob doe ṭhak utạrena, ente pạtiạu do baṅ hecʼadea." 
Genesis45:26  
Genesis45:27 Menkhan Joseph okakoe metatʼko tahẽkan ona ańjomkate ar uni idiye lạgitʼ Joseph okaṭakʼ gạḍiye kolakatʼ ona ńelte onkoren apat Jakobakʼ bhabna do cabayentaea. 
Genesis45:28 Uniye menkeda, “Ińren hopon Joseph ńit hõ jiwetʼ menae onage ḍhera. Ar gujukʼ lahare iń do senkate mitʼ dhaoiń ńelea.”" 
Genesis46:1 Israel do acʼakʼ sanamakʼ hataokateye oḍokena. Ar Ber-sebare hecʼkate uni do acʼ apat Isạhakren Isor ńutumte dãṛẽye samaṅkeda. 
Genesis46:2 Isor do ńindạ jokhecʼ Israel tulucʼ kukmũ talate kathae roṛkeda. Uni doe hohokeda, “E Jakob, E Jakob.” Jakobe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Minạńgea.”" 
Genesis46:3 Isore menkeda, “Iń Isor do, am babaren Isor kạnạń. Misor disạmte calakʼ do alom botorokʼa, ente iń do onḍe am khon mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ utạr jạtrenkoń sirjạukoa." 
Genesis46:4 Iń do am são sãote Misorteń calakʼa ar khạṭige arhõń ruạṛ ạgumea. Ar gujukʼre Joseph do acʼakʼ tite amakʼ mẽtʼkine hạrubtama.” 
Genesis46:5 Inạ tayom Joseph do Ber-seba bạgikateye mohnḍayena. Ar onko idiko lạgitʼ Pharao okako gạḍiye kolletʼ tahẽkan Israelren hoponko do onatege akoren apat ar bạhuko ar gidrạkoko idiketʼkoa. 
Genesis46:6 Ar okoe mĩhũ-meromko ar dhon-duribko Kanan disạmreko hameṭan tahẽkan onako joto soṅgekate Jakob ar uni gharońjren sanamko do Misorteko calaoena. 
Genesis46:7 Jakob do acʼren hoponko ar goṛom gidrạko, metakʼme acʼ bõsren jotoko soṅgekate Misorteye calaoena." 
Genesis46:8 Israelko, metakʼme Jakob ar acʼ bõsren hoṛko okoe do Misorteko senlen onkoakʼ tạlika do nonka leka. Jakobren maraṅicʼ hopon do Ruben." 
Genesis46:9 Rubenren hoponko do Hanok, Palu, Hesron ar Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeonren hoponko do Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar ar Sạul. Sạul do Kanan maejiuren hopone tahẽkana." 
Genesis46:11 Lewiren hoponko do Gerson, Kohat ar Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Jihudạren hoponko do Er, Onan, Selah, Peres ar Serah. Er ar Onan do Kanan disạmregekin gocʼena. Peresren hoponkin do Hesron ar Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Isakarren hoponko do Tola, Puah, Job ar Simron." 
Genesis46:13 Isakarren hoponko do Tola, Puah, Job ar Simron." 
Genesis46:14 Sebulonren hoponko do Sered, Elon ar Jahleyel." 
Genesis46:15 Ar hoponera Dina sudhạ noko do Lea secʼte Jakobren bõsko. Noko do Padan-Aramreko janamlena. Jakobren noko bõsko do jotote pegel pe hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:16 Gadren hoponko do Siphon, Hagi, Suni, Esbon, Eri, Arodi ar Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Aserren hoponko do Jimna, Jiswa, Jiswi, Beria, ar onkoren misera Sarah. Beriaren hoponkin do Heber ar Malkieb." 
Genesis46:18 Laban do acʼren hoponera Leae emade tahẽkan Silpạ noko do jotoge uni hotete Jakobren bõs kanako. Silpa ar Jakobren noko bõsko do jotote gel turui hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:19 Jakobren bạhu Rahelren hoponkin do Joseph ar Benjạmin. 
Genesis46:20 Josephren hopon Manase ar Ephrayim do Misor disạmrekin janamlena. Nukinre eṅgat do On nagraharen naeke Poṭipheraren hoponera Asnate tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:21 Benjạminren hoponko do Bela, Beker, Asbel, Gera, Naman, Ehi, Ros, Mupim, Hupim ar Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Onko do Rahelren hoponko tahẽkana. Noko do jotote pongel hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:23 Danren hopon do Husim. 
Genesis46:24 Napthaliren hoponko do Jahseyel, Guni, Jeser, ar Silem." 
Genesis46:25 Laban do acʼren hoponera Rahele emade tahẽkan kạ̃ṛmĩ Bilharen hoponko tahẽkana noko do Jakob ar Bilharen jotote eae goṭenko tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:26 Jakob sãote okoe do Misor disạmteko calaoen, metakʼme acʼ apnar bõsren jotote turuigel turui hoṛko tahẽkana; noa lekhare uniren hoponkoren bạhuko do bako sapʼakana." 
Genesis46:27 Misor disạmre Josephren okoekin hoponkin janamlen ar Jakobakʼ gharońjren okoe do Misorteko calaolen onko do jotote eaegel hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Genesis46:28 Jakob do Joseph ṭhen Jihudạgeye kol lahakedea jemon Joseph do Jihudạge Gosen calakʼ reakʼ hore udukʼae. Ar mucạtʼre onko do jotoge onḍeko seṭerena. 
Genesis46:29 Joseph do acʼren apat Israel tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiye sapṛaoketʼte Gosenteye calaoena. Ar apattetʼ sãote ńapam torage uni do hoṭokʼre hạṛupʼkedete ạḍi ghạṛicʼe rakʼkeda. 
Genesis46:30 Tayomte Israel do Josephe metadea, “Ńit hõ jiwetʼ menam ona do nij mẽtʼteń ńelkeda. Ar ńit do gujukʼ hõń sapṛaogea.”" 
Genesis46:31 Noa tayom Joseph ar acʼren boehako ar acʼ apat gharońjren eṭakʼkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do Pharao ṭhen senkateń mena, ‘ińren boehako ar iń babawakʼ bõsrenko do Kanan disạm khon iń ṭhenko hecʼakana." 
Genesis46:32 Onkoakʼ kạmi do gukʼpi kạmikana; onko do bhiḍi-merom gukʼpi hoṛ kanako, onate onko do soṅgete bhiḍi, merom, ḍaṅgra ar sanamakʼ jinisko ạgudara akada.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ar Pharao tinre ape hohoapeteye kulipea, ‘ape do cetʼkope kạmiya?’" 
Genesis46:34 Unre unipe metaea, ‘amren golamko ar onkoren hapṛamko do huḍiń khon ńit hạbicʼ mĩhũ-meromkogele gupi ạguyetʼkoa.’ Onate ape do Gosenre girobasokʼ lạgitʼ hukumpe ńama. Ente Misriko ṭhen bhiḍi-merom gukʼpi do hirkhạwakʼ kạmikana”" 
Genesis47:1 Joseph do Pharao ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Ińren baba ar boehako do akoren meromko, bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako ar akoakʼ jotowakʼ soṅgekate Kanan disạm bạgikate nonḍeko hecʼakana. Onko do ńitokʼ Gosenreko seṭerakana.”" 
Genesis47:2 Joseph do boehako mod khon mõṛẽ hoṛe bachaoketʼkote Pharao samaṅreye hạjirketʼkoa. 
Genesis47:3 Khan Pharao do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼpe kạmiya?” Onkoko menkeda, “Amren golamko do bhiḍi-meromkole gupi baṛakoa. Ente aleren hapṛamko hõ inạgeko onkayetʼ tahẽkana.”" 
Genesis47:4 Onko do arhõko menkeda, “Ale do noa disạmre thoṛa din lạgitʼ tahenle hecʼakana. Kanan disạmre ńitokʼ do ạḍi akal calakʼkana ar onḍe aleren bhiḍi-meromko ạtińko lạgitʼ jãhãn ghãsko hõ bạnukʼa. Onate dayakate amren golamko do Gosenre tahen lạgitʼ hukum emalem.”" 
Genesis47:5 Pharao do Josephe metadea, “Am baba ar amren boeha do am ṭhengeko hecʼakana." 
Genesis47:6 Ar goṭa Misor disạmge am samaṅre menakʼa. Onate disạm reakʼ joto khon bhage utạrakʼ jaegare am baba ar boehatam girobasokʼ lạgitʼ jaega emakom. Onko do Gosenreko girobasokʼma. Ar onko modre lek lekan hoṛko ńamlen khan onko cetanre ińren mĩhũ-merom reakʼ bhar hõń emakoa.” 
Genesis47:7 Inạ tayom Joseph do Pharao ṭhen acʼren apate ạgukedea, ar Jakob do Pharao ạsirbade emadea." 
Genesis47:8 Pharao do Jakobe kulikedea, “Amakʼ umer do tinạkʼ hoyena?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobe menkeda, “Noa dhạrtire thoṛa dinren hoṛ lekate ińakʼ umer do mitʼ sae pegel bochor paromena. Menkhan onako din reakʼ lekha do ḍher din baṅkana, ona do duktege parom akana. Tobe thoṛa dinren hoṛ lekate ińren hapṛamko tinạkʼ dinko khemao akatʼ unạkʼ din iń do bạń khemao akada.”" 
Genesis47:10 Inạ tayom Jakob do Pharaoe bhoradete onḍe khone calaoena. 
Genesis47:11 Joseph do acʼren apattetʼ ar boehako tahen lạgitʼe bebostakeda. Ar Pharaoakʼ hukum leka Misor disạm reakʼ joto khon bhageakʼ jaega uni do sompotti lekae danatʼkoa. Ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Ramses tahẽkana. 
Genesis47:12 Joseph do acʼren apat, boehako ar onkoakʼ gharońjrenko jomakʼ jogao akoe ehopʼena. Uni do onkoren hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ hisạb lekateye emakokan tahẽkana." 
Genesis47:13 Tayomte akal do nonka maraṅ hoyena, goṭa disạmre okarege jomakʼ do ar baṅ tahẽlena. Akal khạtirte Misor ar Kanan disạm do loraoena." 
Genesis47:14 Misor ar Kanan disạmren hoṛko do okaṭakʼ anajko kirińletʼ ona reakʼ dam babot Joseph do banar disạmre tinạkʼ ṭaka tahẽkan ona do raj oṛakʼteye aderkeda. 
Genesis47:15 Ado tinre Misor ar Kanan disạm reakʼ joto ṭaka cabayena unre Misorrenko do Joseph ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Jomakʼ emaleme. Ale do cetʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅregele gujukʼa? Aleakʼ ṭaka poesa okako tahẽkan ona joto do cabayentalea.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josephe menkeda, “Enḍekhan aperen ḍaṅgrako- bhiḍiko joto imạńpe. Enḍekhan onko bodolte jomakʼ iń emapea.”" 
Genesis47:17 Unre onko do akoren sanam ḍaṅgra-bhiḍiko Joseph ṭhen ạguko ehopʼena. Ar uni do meromko, bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako, sadomko ar gadhako bodolte anaj emakoe ehopʼena. Ar sanam mĩhũ-meromko jimại dohoketʼkote goṭa bochorge jomakʼe ematʼkoa." 
Genesis47:18 Ona bochor paromen khan dosar bochor hoṛko do hecʼkate Josephko metadea, “E hujur ṭhen do cetʼge bale okoea, aleakʼ tahẽkantale joto ṭaka-poesa do caba utạrentalea, aleren mĩhũ-meromko hõ ar bạnukʼkotalea. Ńitokʼ do aleakʼ noa hoṛmo ar jaega jumi chaḍa hujur emae reakʼ do ar cetʼhõ bạnukʼtalea." 
Genesis47:19 Ale do jumi sudhạ sanamkoge amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre cedakʼle cabakʼa? Onate aleakʼ jaega-jumi joto hataome, ar ona bodolte jomakʼ emaleme. Ale do jaega-jumi sudhạ Pharaoren golamle hoyokʼa. Ona tayom hõ alo jemonle gujukʼ bickom jiwetʼle tahẽdaṛeakʼ onate thoṛa itạ hõ emalem. Enḍekhan aleakʼ jumi hõ baṅ nosṭokʼtalea.”" 
Genesis47:20 Unre Joseph do Misor disạm reakʼ sanam jumi Pharao ńutumteye kirińkeda. Ar akal do nunạkʼ botoranakʼ hoyena, Misorrenko do akoakʼ jaega-jumiko ạkhrińkeda. Nonkate Misor disạm reakʼ sanam jaega-jumi do Pharaoakʼ tire hecʼena." 
Genesis47:21 Joseph do Misor reakʼ mitʼ simạ khon eṭakʼ simạ hạbicʼ tinạkʼ hoṛko tahẽkan onko sanamkoge nagrahateye ạguketʼkoa. 
Genesis47:22 Uni do eken naekekoakʼ jaega-jumi bae kirińleda. Noko naeke do Pharao ṭhen khon goṛoko ńametʼ tahẽkana ar onategeko calakʼkan tahẽkana. Onate onko do akoakʼ jumi bako ạkhrińleda. 
Genesis47:23 Joseph do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, Pharao secʼ khon iń do teheń apeakʼ ar apeakʼ jaega-jumiń kirińkeda. Ape do ńitokʼ itạ idiype, ar jumire erpe." 
Genesis47:24 Ar Phosol ir tayom do mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs Pharaope emaea, ar sarecʼ pon hĩs do jumi reakʼ itạ lạgitʼ ar gharońjren hoṛko ar gidrạko lạgitʼ jomakʼpe dohojoṅa.”" 
Genesis47:25 Unre hoṛkoko menkeda, “Am do aleakʼ jiwim bańcao akatʼtalea. Onate hujurakʼ dayale ńam lekhan ale do Pharaoren golamle tahena.”" 
Genesis47:26 Tayomte Joseph do Misor disạm reakʼ jaega-jumi reaṅ noae ạnkeda, joto phosol reakʼ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do Pharaoakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar noa ạn do teheń hạbicʼ hõ Misor disạmre calakʼkana. Eken naekekoakʼ jumikoge Pharaoakʼ sompotti modre baṅ paṛaolena." 
Genesis47:27 Ar Israelko do Misor reakʼ Gosenre girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Onḍe onko do jaega-jumiko benaoana. Onkoren do ạḍi utạr hopon ar hoponerako hoyena ar lekhareko ḍher idiyena. 
Genesis47:28 Jakob do Misor disạmre arhõ gel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽyena. Onate uni do mitʼ sae pon gel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis47:29 Gujukʼ thoṛa din lahare Israel do acʼren hopon Joseph hohowadeteye metadea, “Am nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan ińakʼ bulu latarre amakʼ ti dohoyme ar gokʼạńme, ińre am do biswạsem tahena. Misorre iń do alom topayińạ," 
Genesis47:30 ente iń do ińren hapṛamko talare topa ocokʼiń khojkana. Am do ińakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ Misor disạm khon oḍokkate ińren hapṛamko okareko topa ocoakan onḍe idikatem topayińạ.” Josephe menkeda, “Iń do amakʼ katha lekageń kạmiya.”" 
Genesis47:31 Unre Jakobe menkeda, “Enḍekhan kiriạwạńme.” Ar Joseph do uni ṭhene kiriạyena. Unre Israel do parkom reakʼ bohokʼreye ombakʼena ar Isore sewawadea." 
Genesis48:1 Niạ thoṛa din tayom Joseph do khobore ńamkeda, acʼ baba doe ruạkʼkana. Unre uni do acʼren banar hopon Manase ar Ephrayem soṅgekate onḍeye calaoena." 
Genesis48:2 Ar Jakob do tinreye baḍaekeda, acʼren hoponkin tulucʼ Joseph do acʼ ṭhene hecʼakana, unre acʼakʼ sanam daṛeteye beretʼena ar aṭetʼreye duṛupʼena." 
Genesis48:3 Ona tayom Jakob do Josephe metadea, “Sanam daṛean Isor do Kanan disạmre Lus nagrahare iń ṭhene ńel ocoyena are ạsirbad ạdiń tahekana." 
Genesis48:4 Uni doe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘ạḍi utạr hoponkoren baba hoyokʼ reakʼ daṛeń ematʼmea ar am bõsren hoṛkoakʼ lekha doń saṅge ocoya. Iń do am khon aema jạtrenkoń sirjạukoa, ar am tayom noa disạm do jaejug reakʼ sompotti lekate amren bõskoń emakoa.’" 
Genesis48:5 Am ṭheniń hijukʼ lahare amren okoekin hoponkin janamlen unkin hõ ińren hoponko talarekin lekhakʼa. Ruben ar Simeon cetʼleka ińren kanakin onkage Ephrayem ar Manase hõ ińren kanakin. 
Genesis48:6 Menkhan nukin tayom amren okoeko hoponko hoyokʼ onko do amren mentegeko lekhakʼa. Sompotti ạidạri jokhecʼ Manase se Ephrayem ńutumte onko doko ạidạrijoṅa. 
Genesis48:7 Padam-Aram khon oḍokkate Kanan disạm reakʼ Ephrat khon thoṛa sạṅgiń tahenrege Rahel doe gocʼena, onate iń do ạḍi dukiń ńamkeda. Ephrat reakʼ horre, metakʼme Bethlehem calakʼ horre uniń topakadea.”" 
Genesis48:8 Niạ tayom Josephren hoponkin secʼ beṅgetʼkate Israel doe kuliyana, “Unkin dokin okoe kana?”" 
Genesis48:9 Joseph do acʼ babae roṛ ruạṛadea, “Unkin do ińren hopon kanakin. Isor do noa disạmre unkine emakawạdińa.” Israele menkeda, “Iń ṭhen ạgukinme. Iń do unkin hõń ạsirbad ạkina.”" 
Genesis48:10 Haṛam umerre mẽtʼte ńel reakʼ daṛe komao idiyente Israel do mońjte bae ńeńelkan tahẽkana. Onate Joseph do acʼren banar koṛa acʼ baba ṭhene ạguketʼkinạ. Unre Israel do unkin hạṛupʼkateye cokʼatʼkinạ. 
Genesis48:11 Uni do Josephe metadea, “Iń do amakʼ mẽtʼãhãń ńelńama mente do bạń hudis akatʼ tahẽkana, menkhan Isor do eken am do baṅ, amren gidrạkin hõe ńel ocokedińa.”" 
Genesis48:12 Unre Joseph do acʼren apatakʼ gunṭhikin aṛe khon acʼren hoponkine ocokʼketʼkinte otre ombakʼkate apattetʼe ḍobokʼadea. 
Genesis48:13 Ona tayom Joseph do acʼren banar hopon arhõ Israel ṭhene ạguketʼkinạ. Ephrayem do jojomtite sapʼkate Israelakʼ leṅgati secʼ ar Manase do leṅgatite sapʼkate uniyakʼ jojom ti secʼe dohokedea. 
Genesis48:14 Menkhan Israel do tiye tiyạrketʼte jojom tite Josephren huḍińicʼ hopon Ephrayeme capokedea; ar Manase do Josephren maraṅicʼ hoponkanre hõ uni do leṅga titeye capokedea. 
Genesis48:15 Ona tayom Uni do Joseph bhoradeteye menkeda, “Uni Isor, one ińren hapṛam Abraham ar Isahak do uniyakʼ sanaleka kin calakʼkan tahẽkan, unige ińakʼ jionre pạhil khon teheń hạbicʼ gupiyicʼ lekae ạyur ạguyedeń kana," 
Genesis48:16 uni serma Goḍet, okoe do sanam muhin reakʼ ti khone rukhiyạ akadiń, unige nukin gidrại bhorakinma. Nukin hotetege iń ar ińren hapṛam Abraham ar Isahakakʼ ńutum do jiwetʼ tahenma. Ar aboakʼ disạmre nukin bõsren hoṛ do lekhare ḍherko hoyokʼma.”" 
Genesis48:17 Apattetʼ do acʼakʼ jojom ti Ephrayemakʼ bohokʼreye dohoketʼte Joseph do bae kusilena. Uni do Ephrayemakʼ bohokʼ khon ocokʼkate Manaseakʼ bohokʼre dohoy lạgitʼ apatakʼ ti sapʼkateye menkeda, “E baba, nonka do baṅ. Nui do ińren maraṅicʼ koṛa kanae. Amakʼ jojom ti nui cetanre dohoyme.”" 
Genesis48:18  
Genesis48:19 Menkhan apattetʼ doe menkeda, “Iń doń baḍaegea. Uni hõ maraṅe hoyokʼa ar uni bõsren hoṛ do mitʼ jạtrenko hoyokʼa. Menkhan huḍińicʼ boeha do uni khon hõ maraṅe hoyokʼa ar uni bõsren hoṛko khon ạḍi utạr jạtrenko hoyokʼa.”" 
Genesis48:20 Ona tayom Israel do unkin banar hopone bhoratʼkinạ are menkeda, “Israelko jãhãegeko bhorako jokhecʼ abenakʼ ńutum ńumkateko mena, ‘Isor do Ephrayem ar Manase lekae hoyocomema.’ ” Noa menkate uni do Manase khon Ephrayemge lahareye dohokedea." 
Genesis48:21 Ona tayom Israel do Josephe metadea, “Ńelme, ińakʼ gujukʼ okte do sorakana. Menkhan Isor do ape sãoreye tahena, ar aperen hapṛamkoakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ idipea." 
Genesis48:22 Amren boehako khon thoṛa ḍher ńokʼ sompottiń ematʼmea. One okaṭakʼ jaega do tarwaṛe ar akʼsarte lạṛhạikate Amorikoakʼ ti khoniń hatletʼ ona jaegage am doń ematʼmea.” 
Genesis49:1 Tayomte Jakob do acʼren hoponko hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Jotokoge iń ṭhen hijukʼpe. Ar tayom daram dinkore apeakʼ jionre cetʼko hoyokʼ onań lạiyapea." 
Genesis49:2 “Jakobren hoponko, dela iń ṭhen hijukʼpe; aperen baba Israel cetʼe menetʼ ona ańjompe." 
Genesis49:3 “Ruben, am do ińren maraṅicʼ hopon kanam; am do ińakʼ daṛe kanam, ińakʼ juạn daṛe reakʼ pạhil joge; man ar daṛete amren boehako cetanre menama." 
Genesis49:4 Menkhan am do dakʼ lekam ikocʼ sokojokʼa, onate amakʼ cetan hudạ do ar baṅ tahentama. Ente ińren bạhu ṭhen bolokate amren apatakʼ aṭetʼem besonot akada." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeon ar Lewi banar boeha; unkin do jor bojor lạgitʼge tarwaṛekin sapʼeda. 
Genesis49:6 Unkinakʼ oko danaṅre ińakʼ jãhãn hĩs do bạnukʼa, ar unkinakʼ dolre iń do bạnuńa. Unkin do edrete hoṛkin khũnkoa, ar ạkinakʼ kusi sanaleka ḍaṅgrawakʼ jaṅga sirkin samakʼakada." 
Genesis49:7 Unkinakʼ kurkurạukʼ edre, ar kurmutạha do sarapanakʼ baṛe hoyokʼma. Unkin gusṭirenko do Jakobakʼ bõsko talareń hạṭińkoa, ar Israelko talareń chirchạturkoa." 
Genesis49:8 “E Jihudạ, amren boeha do amko sarhaomea. Amakʼ ti do amren bạirikoakʼ hoṭokʼre tahena; ar amren boeha do amko ḍobokʼama." 
Genesis49:9 E Jihudạ, am dom dhạcri kul hoponkana; sendra jel jom baṛakate ińren nui hopon doe rakapʼ hijukʼa; dhạcri kul ar kul eṅga lekae burum akana. Okoe hale uni doe buskukea?" 
Genesis49:10 Ar Silote uni ạuriye hijukʼ hạbicʼ jạt jạtrenko uniyakʼ hukum ạuriko bataotae hạbicʼ, uniyakʼ raj ṭheṅga do Jihudạ bõsrege tahena; ar cakʼlao ṭheṅga do uniyakʼ gunṭhikin talare." 
Genesis49:11 Jihudạ do darkha nạ̃ṛĩre acʼren gadhae tolkaea, ar gadha hopon do soros utạrakʼ nạ̃ṛĩre. Uni do darkha rasate kicricʼkoe soboda, ar darkha joko reakʼ mãyãmte do oyonakʼkoge." 
Genesis49:12 Uniyakʼ mẽtʼkin do darkha rasa leka arakʼge hoyokʼa, ar ḍaṭa do toa khon hõ ponḍge hoyokʼtaea." 
Genesis49:13 “Sebulon do doreão aṛereye girobasokʼa; uni do jahajko reakʼ bondorgeye hoyokʼa; ar uniyakʼ simạ do Sidon hạbicʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Genesis49:14 “Isakar do mitʼṭen daṛean gadha kanae. Uniyakʼ giticʼ ṭhạ̃i do bhiḍi khạṛko talare hoyokʼtaea. 
Genesis49:15 Uni doe ńela jirạukʼ jaega do bhagegea ar disạm hõ jutgea, onate uni do bojha gog lạgitʼ taren hõe koceytaea ar golam leka khaṭaoakʼ hõe bataoa." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan do Israelren mitʼṭen gusṭi lekate acʼren hoṛkoe bicạrkoa. 
Genesis49:17 Uni do horten bińe hoyokʼa, mitʼṭen bisan bińge; uni do sadomakʼ jaṅgae sogaga, ar aswari do sạmbirteye ńurokʼa." 
Genesis49:18 “E Probhu Isor, am do unim rukhiyạyea ar ona ńelhor lạgitʼge iń do minạńa." 
Genesis49:19 “Gad do lạṛhại phạdko ṭhene cipạ ocokʼa, menkhan uni do acʼ hõ onkoe cipạkoa." 
Genesis49:20 “Aserakʼ jumire do sebel jomakʼkoge upcạukʼa; uni do rajakʼ lek leka jomakʼe emokʼa. 
Genesis49:21 Naphtali do chuṭạ jel eṅga kanae; uni do mońj mońj kathakoe phuṭạueda. 
Genesis49:22 “Joseph do jokote perecʼ dare kanae, dakʼ aṛere jo akan dare leka; uniyakʼ ḍạrko do pạcri cetante lawer akana." 
Genesis49:23 Dhinkiạko do sarte uniko tuńe kana, ar muhinreko paṛao edekana." 
Genesis49:24 Menkhan uniyakʼ akʼ do keṭecʼge tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ tikin reakʼ sopo hõ jojosakʼge, ente Jakobren Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do unire menakʼa. Ar uni tayomre do uni gukʼpiyicʼ menaea, Israel reakʼ ona dhirige." 
Genesis49:25 Am apatren Isor do ame goṛowama. Sanam daṛean Isor do serma khone bhorama ar ot latar khon jharna reakʼ ạsirbade emama. Ar maejiuakʼ kukhire gidrại emokʼte uniyakʼ toa reakʼ bhorte uni do ame bhorama. 
Genesis49:26 Amren babawakʼ ńamakʼ bhor do uniren hapṛamkoakʼ bhor khon phaelaogea; ona do jaejug reakʼ buru hạbicʼ seṭer akana. Ona ạsirbad do Josephakʼ bohokʼre paṛaokʼma; uniyakʼ bohokʼrege paṛaokʼma ente uni do acʼren boehako khone maraṅgea. 
Genesis49:27 “Benjạmin do mitʼṭen cikʼrạkan hunḍạr kanae; uni do setakʼre sendra jele joma ar ạyupʼ do luṭakʼ jiniskoe hạṭińa.” 
Genesis49:28 Noko joto do Israelren gelbar gusṭiren kanako. Onkoren apattetʼ do onkoe bhorako jokhecʼ noako kathae menleda. Uni do sanamkoge apan ạpin lek leka bhore ematʼko tahẽkana. 
Genesis49:29 Tayomte Jakob do acʼren hoponko noae metatʼkoa, “Hapṛamko ṭhen calakʼ reakʼ okte hoyakantińạ. Hitti Ephron reakʼ jumire okaṭakʼ dander menakʼ ona danderre ińren hapṛamko ṭhen ińhõ topayińpe." 
Genesis49:30 Noage Kanan disạmre Mamre ṭhen Makpela jumi reakʼ ona dander kana. Mạ̃ṛĩ poḍa tear lạgitʼ Abraham do jumi sudhạ Hitti Ephron ṭhen khon noa dander doe kirińleda. 
Genesis49:31 Abraham ar uniren bạhu Sara do onḍegekin topa ocoakana. Isahak ar uniren bạhu Rebeka hõ onḍegekin topa ocoakana. Ar Lea hõ onḍegeń topa akadea. 
Genesis49:32 Dander sudhạ noa jumige Hittiko ṭhen khoniń kirińakada.” 
Genesis49:33 Jakob do acʼren hoponko galmaraoakoe sạtketʼ khan aṭetʼre acʼakʼ banar jaṅgae rakapʼketʼtaea are giticʼena. Ar ona tayom do jiwi oḍokentaete acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. 
Genesis50:1 Unre Joseph do acʼ babawakʼ mẽtʼãhãre giḍiyente rarakʼe dhurạuena are cokʼadea. 
Genesis50:2 Tayomte uni do acʼ taberen rarankoe hukumatʼkoa jemon apatakʼ hoṛmore mosolako ojokʼae. Ar onko do onkageko kạmikeda. 
Genesis50:3 Nonkate pongel din paromena. Ente noa kạmi do pongel din hạbicʼge lagaokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar Misorren hoṛ do Israel lạgitʼ eae gel din hạbicʼko homor halaṅkeda. 
Genesis50:4 Noa homor halaṅ din paromen khan Joseph do Pharaoren kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan enḍekhan Pharao ṭhen senkate noa katha baḍae ocoyepe," 
Genesis50:5 ạpuń gujukʼ oktere noae kiriạ ocoakadińa, Kanan disạmre acʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ jaegare jemoniń topakae. Onate nehõraepe ona kạmi lạgitʼ jemone sen ocoạń. Ar lạiyaepe onań sạt lekhange arhõń ruạṛ hijukʼa.”" 
Genesis50:6 Pharaoe roṛgotʼkada, “Uni okaṭakʼe kiriạ ocoakatʼme onkage senkate topayeme.”" 
Genesis50:7 Unre Joseph do acʼren apat topaye lạgitʼe senena. Ar Pharaoren kạmiyạko hõ, metakʼme uniyakʼ bicạr duṛupʼakʼren ar Misorren sanam manotanko do Joseph sãoteko calaoena." 
Genesis50:8 Ona chaḍa Josephren ar acʼ babawakʼ gharońjren ar uniren boehako hõ uni sãoteko calaoena. Gosenre onko do eken akoren hopon ar hoponerako ar mĩhũ-meromko ar bhiḍikoko bạgi oṭowatʼkoa. 
Genesis50:9 Ạḍi utạr rãt gạḍiko ar aswarikoante onko do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ phạdge Joseph sãoteko calaoena. 
Genesis50:10 Onko do jordan gaḍa aṛe reakʼ Atadkoakʼ khạrại hạbicʼko senena ar Joseph do apattetʼ lạgitʼ eae din hạbicʼe homor halaṅkeda. Ar uni sãote hoṛko hõko homor halaṅkeda. 
Genesis50:11 Atadkoakʼ khạrạire nonka rakʼ hokʼmorko ńelketʼ khan ona disạmren hoṛ do, metatʼme Kananren hoṛko menkeda, “Noa do Misorrenkoakʼ ãṭ homorkangea.” Onate jordan gaḍa eṭakʼ aṛe reakʼ noa jaega do Abel Misrayim ńutumko dohokeda (Metakʼme, “Misorrenkoakʼ rakʼ homor”)." 
Genesis50:12 Israel do acʼren hoponko okaṭakʼe metatʼko tahẽkan onko do onageko kạmikeda. 
Genesis50:13 Onko do uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ Kanan disạmteko idikeda ar Mamre ṭhenakʼ Makpela reakʼ dander ṭhen uniko topakadea. Topa ṭạnḍi benao iạte jumi sudhạ noa danderge Abraham do Hitti Ephron ṭhen khone kirińleda. 
Genesis50:14 Apattetʼe topakede khan Joseph, uniren boehako ar tinạkʼ do uni topaye lạgitʼko senlen onko sanamkoge Misorteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
Genesis50:15 Babae gocʼen khan Josephren boehako do ako akoreko mepenena, “Josephre oka bon cekaletʼ ar ona reakʼe hala ruạṛ abon khan unre cetʼ bon cekaea?”" 
Genesis50:16 Onko do Joseph ṭhen katha roṛgotʼkateko menkeda, “Gujukʼ lahare babae menleda, amre okaṭakʼle behok akatʼ ona aleakʼ kại baṛe ikạitaleme. Onate aleakʼ nehõr do amren golamkoakʼ behokakʼ baṛe ikạitaleme.” Ar Joseph do onkoakʼ katha ańjomkateye rakʼkeda." 
Genesis50:17  
Genesis50:18 Inạ tayom uniren dadattetʼtako do uni samaṅre hecʼkate unire giḍiyenteko menkeda, “Ale do amren golam kanale.”" 
Genesis50:19 Menkhan Josephe menkeda, “Alope botorokʼa. Isorakʼ ṭhạ̃ire teṅgon lạgitʼ iń doń cele kana?" 
Genesis50:20 Ape do ińre bạṛicʼpe hudisleda, menkhan Isor do ona talate bhạlại reakʼe monsubạ akada jemon ḍher hoṛakʼ jiwi rukhyiạkʼtako; ar teheń do onage hoyakana." 
Genesis50:21 Onate ape do alope botorokʼa. Iń do ape ar aperen hopon ar hoponerako lạgitʼ jomakʼ iń jogaoapea.” Noako as reakʼ kathate uni do jiwi raṛecʼe ematʼkoa. 
Genesis50:22 Joseph ar acʼ apatakʼ gharońjren hoṛ do Misorrege girobas akanko tahẽyena. Joseph do mitʼsae gel bochor hạbicʼ jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Genesis50:23 Uni do Ephrayemren hoponko pe piṛhi hạbicʼe ńel oṭokatʼkoa. Ona chaḍa Makirren hoponko hõ janam tayom Josephakʼ hoborreko doho ocolena. Makir do Manaseren hopone tahẽkana. 
Genesis50:24 Joseph do acʼren boehakoe metatʼkoa, “Ińakʼ gujukʼ okte do seṭer akana, ar noa do khạṭi kana je, Isor do apeye ạsulpea. Uni do Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob okaṭakʼ disạm emako lạgitʼe gokʼatʼko tahẽkan ona disạmge nonḍe khone idipea.”" 
Genesis50:25 Ona tayom Joseph do Israelkoe kiriạ ocoketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Isor do khạṭige apeye jotonpea. Nonḍe khonpe calakʼre ińakʼ jaṅko hõ iditoraetińpe.”" 
Genesis50:26 Ar Joseph do mitʼsae gel bochor umer tahẽkanreye gocʼena. Ar uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩre jokʼgao mosolako ojokʼakʼte mitʼṭecʼ baksare dohokate Misorreko baekadea. 
Exodus1:1 Israelren, metakʼme Jakob sãote uniren hoponko okoe do apan ạpin gharońj salakʼ Misor disạmteko senlen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Ruben, Simeon, Lewi, Jihudạ," 
Exodus1:2  
Exodus1:3 Isakar, Sebulon, Benjamin, Dan, Napthali, Gad ar Aser. Ona chaḍa Joseph do laharege Misorteye calao akan tahẽkana. Jakobakʼ bõsren noko do lekhare jotote eae gel hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Exodus1:4  
Exodus1:5  
Exodus1:6 Tayomte Joseph, ar ren boehako ar onko okteren sanamkogeko gocʼena." 
Exodus1:7 Menkhan Israelkoakʼ bõsko saṅge idikʼ reakʼ daṛe do tahẽkangea; onko do lekhareko ḍher idiyente beṛhaeteko pasnaoena arko daṛe idiyena, ar onkote Misor disạm do perecʼena." 
Exodus1:8 Tayomte Misor disạm reakʼ sanam ektiạri do nonkan mitʼṭen nãwã rajakʼ tire paṛaoena okoe do Joseph reaṅ cetʼge bae baḍaekan tahẽkana. 
Exodus1:9 Uni do acʼren porjakoe metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, Israelko do lekhate ar daṛete abo khonko ḍher idikʼkana." 
Exodus1:10 Onate lekhare jemon ar aloko ḍher idikʼ onate dela, onko sãote bud salakʼ bon calakʼma; ar baṅ khan lạṛhạire onko do aboren bạiriko sãoteko midokʼte abo upạrteko lạṛhạiya ar tayomte noa disạm bạgikateko oḍok calakʼa.”" 
Exodus1:11 Onate Misorrenko do gokʼ bhạriạ hotete santaoko lạgitʼ onko cetanre sordarko bahalketʼkoa. Ar Pharaoakʼ phosol jarwae lạgitʼ Israelko hotete Pitạm ar Ramesh noa barea murại nagrahako benaokeda. 
Exodus1:12 Menkhan Misorrenko do Israelko tinạkʼko santaoketʼko unạkʼge onko do lekhareko ḍher idiyena ar beṛhaeteko pasnao idiyena. Onate Misriko do Israelko iạte monre botor rakapʼatʼkoa. 
Exodus1:13 Onko do arhõ jorjulum salakʼ golamko khaṭaoketʼkoa. 
Exodus1:14 Khet reakʼ eṭakʼakʼ kạmi sãote onko cetanre cun suṛki ar iṭạ reakʼ hamal kạmiko ladeatʼkoa ar onkoakʼ jiwiko haṛhãtʼ cabaketʼtakoa. Onko do jor julumkate joto lekanakʼ kạmiko kạmi ocoketʼkoa. 
Exodus1:15 Ona chaḍa Misorren raj do Sipra ar Poa ńutuman barea Ibri, metakʼme Israelkoren dhạ̃i buḍhikine metatʼkinạ,"
