Exodus1:16 “Gidrạ janamko oktere Ibri maejiuko goṛowako jokhecʼ ben ńelkoa onko do koṛa hopon se kuṛi hoponko janametʼkoa; ar koṛa hoponko hoylen khan onko doben gocʼkoa ar kuṛi hopon do jiwetʼ ben dohokoa.” 
Exodus1:17 Menkhan unkin dhạ̃i buḍhi do Isor kin botoraekan tahẽkana. Onate unkin do Misor rajakʼ hukum leka kạmi baṅkate koṛa hoponko jiwetʼkin dohoketʼkoa. 
Exodus1:18 Unre raj do unkin dhạ̃i buḍhi hoho ạgu ocoketʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Cedakʼ nonka do ben kạmikana? Koṛa hopon do cedakʼ jiwetʼ ben dohoyetʼkoa?”" 
Exodus1:19 Unkin do Pharaokin roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ibri maejiu do Misorren maejiu leka doko baṅkana. Onkoakʼ daṛe do nunạkʼge ḍhera je, dhạ̃i buḍhi onko ṭhen ạuri seṭerokʼrege onko do gidrạko janametʼkoa.”" 
Exodus1:20 Isor do unkin dhạ̃i buḍhikine bhạlạiyketʼkinạ. Ar Israelkoakʼ lekha do ḍher idikʼtege tahẽyena ar onko doko daṛe idiyena.” 
Exodus1:21 Unkin dhạ̃i buḍhi do Isor kin botoraekan tahẽkante uni do onkoren hoponko hotete bõskoe saṅgeketʼkoa. 
Exodus1:22 Tayomte Pharao do acʼren porjako cetanre noae hukumkeda, “Ibriko talare koṛa hoponko janamlen khan ape do Nil gaḍarepe khadlekoa, menkhan kuṛi hopon do jiwetʼpe dohokoa.”" 
Exodus2:1 Niạko oktere Lewi gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛ do inạ mitʼ gusṭirenge mitʼṭen kuṛiye baplakedea. 
Exodus2:2 Ar kuṛi doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyentaea. Gidrạ do ńelokʼte ạḍi napaegeye tahẽkana. Ona iạte uniren eṅgattetʼ do pe cando hạbicʼ acʼ ṭhene oko dohokedea. 
Exodus2:3 Menkhan tinre ar bae oko doho daṛeadea unre uni do pạṭiol ghãste mitʼṭecʼ piṭạri benaokate onare jaṭaṅ hasa ar alkatrae potaoada ar onare uni gidrại giticʼkedete nil gaḍa reakʼ pạṭiol gajaṛreye doho oṭokada. 
Exodus2:4 Ar gidrạwakʼ cetʼ hoyokʼa mente ona ńel lạgitʼ uniren ạjittetʼ do onḍe khon thoṛa sạṅgiń ńokʼreye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Exodus2:5 Thoṛa ghạṛicʼ khange Pharaoren hoponera do ḍạbrạkʼ lạgitʼ gaḍateye hecʼena. Ar unre uniren kạ̃ṛmĩko do gaḍa aṛe aṛeteko dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana. Unre uni do pạṭiol gajaṛre mitʼṭecʼ pạṭạriye ńelńamketʼ khan acʼ ṭhen ạguiy lạgitʼ mitʼṭen kạ̃ṛmĩye kolkadea. 
Exodus2:6 Uni do onae oṭakʼketʼ khan ạḍiye hahaṛayena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrạ onare rarakʼkane ńelkedea. Onate raj hoponera do uni gidrạ cetanre ạḍi mãyã hecʼadea. Uniye menkeda, “Nui do Ibrikoren gidrạ kanae.”" 
Exodus2:7 Unre gidrạren ạjittetʼ do hecʼkate Pharaoren hoponerae metadea, “Iń do cetʼ am lạgitʼ mitʼṭen Ibri maejiu iń hohoạguama, jemon nui gidrại nunu harawam?”" 
Exodus2:8 Uni doe menkeda, “Hẽ, Do calakʼme.” Unre kuṛi do senkate gidrạren eṅgattetʼgeye hoho ạgukedea." 
Exodus2:9 Pharaoren hoponera do uniye metadea, “Nui gidrạ idikate nunu harawạńme. Noa lạgitʼ iń do betoniń emama.” Unre uni maejiu do gidrại idikedea are nunu harakedea." 
Exodus2:10 Gidrạ thoṛae harayen khan maejiu do Pharaoren hoponera ṭhene idikedea, ar uni do acʼren gidrạ lekae ataṅkedea. Uniye menkeda, “Nui do dakʼ khoniń owar rakapʼ akadea.” Ar onate uniyakʼ ńutum do Mose ye dohoketʼtaea." 
Exodus2:11 Mose doe sẽṛãyen khan mitʼdin uni do acʼ jạtrenko sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍokena ar hamal gokʼ bhạriạ kạmiye ńelketʼkoa. Uni do arhõe ńelkeda, Misorren mitʼṭen hoṛ do Ibrikoren mitʼ hoṛe dale kana." 
Exodus2:12 Unre uni do beṛhaete koyokʼ baṛakate okoehõ bae ńel ńamletʼkoa. Khan uni Misri hoṛe gocʼkedea ar gitilreye topakadea. 
Exodus2:13 Dosar hilokʼ uni do arhõ bahreteye oḍok senena ar barea Ibri hoṛ lạṛhạikane ńelketʼkinạ. Unre uni do dusiyicʼe metadea, “Cedakʼ amren boeha dom dale kana?”" 
Exodus2:14 Uni hoṛe menkeda, “Okoe baṅ ạliń talare mukhiyạ ar bicạricʼe dohoakatʼme? Uni Misri hoṛ leka cetʼ iń hõ gojeńem khojkana?” Noa katha ańjomkate Mose doe botorena. Uni doe hudiskeda, khạṭige noa katha do sodor akana." 
Exodus2:15 Pharao noa kathae ańjomketʼ khan Mose goje lạgitʼe kurumuṭukeda. Menkhan Mose do Pharao ṭhen khone dạṛketʼte Midiạn disạmteye calaoena. Ar onḍe senkate uni do mitʼṭecʼ kuń aṛereye duṛupʼena. 
Exodus2:16 Onḍenicʼ Midiạn naekeren do eae goṭen hoponerako tahẽkantaea. Onko do apattetʼren bhiḍiko dakʼ ńũako lạgitʼ dakʼ lo rakapʼkate gamlareko dul perecʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
Exodus2:17 Menkhan adom gukʼpiko do hecʼkate kuń ṭhen khon onko kuṛikoko laga ńirketʼkoa. Noa ńelte Mose doe beretʼena ar onkoe goṛowatʼkoa ar onkoren bhiḍiko hõ dakʼe ńũwatʼkoa. 
Exodus2:18 Ado onko kuṛiko akoren apattetʼ ṭhenko ruạṛen khan uni doe kuliketʼkoa, “Teheń do cekate unạkʼ usạrape ruạṛ hecʼena?”" 
Exodus2:19 Onkoko menkeda, “Mitʼṭen misri hoṛ do gupikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạketʼlea. Eken ona do baṅ, uni do dakʼe loketʼte aleren bhiḍiko hõe ńũ ocoketʼkoa.”" 
Exodus2:20 Uni do acʼren hoponerakoe kuliketʼkoa, “Uni hoṛ do okare menaea? Ar cedakʼpe bạgi oṭoadea? Do hohoaepe ar thoṛa jom ocoyepe.”" 
Exodus2:21 Mose do uni naeke ṭhen tahen lạgitʼe rạjiyena ar naeke do Mose tulucʼ acʼren hoponera Silpại baplakadea. 
Exodus2:22 Silpạren mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyen khan Mose do uniyakʼ ńutum Gerseme dohoketʼtaea, ente uni doe menkeda, “Iń do upriạ hoṛiń hoyakana.”" 
Exodus2:23 Ḍher din tayom Misorren raj doe gocʼena. Ar Israelko do golam khaṭao iạte ạḍi ala jhalareko paṛao akan tahẽkana. Noa khon chaḍao ńam lạgitʼ onkoakʼ rakʼ do Isor ṭhen seṭerena. 
Exodus2:24 Isor do onkoakʼ rakʼe ańjomketʼtakote Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ bondobose doholetʼ ona kathae disạkeda." 
Exodus2:25 Uni do Israelko secʼe beṅgetʼkeda ar onkoe moneyatʼkoa. 
Exodus3:1 Mitʼ din Mose do acʼren hońhartetʼ Jethro, metakʼme Ruelren bhiḍi-meromkoe gupiyetʼko tahẽkana. Jethro do Midiankoren mitʼṭen naekeye tahẽkana. Mose do hahaṅkar hanasate bhiḍi-meromko gupi gupite Isorakʼ Horeb buruteye seṭerketʼkoa." 
Exodus3:2 Onḍe Probhu Isorren mitʼṭen goḍet do jạnum jhạuạre jolokʼkan seṅgelre uni ṭhene ńel ocoyena. Mose doe ńelkeda, ona jạnum jhạuạre seṅgel do jolokʼkangea menkhan baṅ lokʼkana." 
Exodus3:3 Noa ńelte mone moneteye menkeda, “Iń do mitʼ aṛere senkate noa hahaṛa reakʼ iń ńela, cedakʼ bhala ona jhạuạ do baṅ lokʼ kana?”" 
Exodus3:4 Mose do ona jạnum jhạuạ ńel lạgitʼe sen sorokʼkan tahẽkanre Probhu Isor do ona jạnum jhạuạ tala khone menkeda, “E Mose, E Mose.” Moseye menkeda, “Minạńgea.”" 
Exodus3:5 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ar alom sorokʼa. Amakʼ jaṅga reakʼ panahe bojtam. Ente am do sonot ṭhạ̃irem teṅgo akana." 
Exodus3:6 Iń do am babaren Isor kạnạń; ar iń kangeạń Abraham, Isahak ar Jakobren Isor do.” Unre Mose do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhãe betʼketʼtaea, ente Isor secʼ beṅgetʼ doe botorena." 
Exodus3:7 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Misor disạmre ińren hoṛko cetanre oka santao hoyokʼkan ona doń ńelakada. Misorren sordarkoakʼ santao iạte Israelkoakʼ rakʼ do iń ṭhen seṭerakana. Onkoakʼ duk saset reakʼ katha hõń baḍae akada." 
Exodus3:8 Misorrenkoakʼ ti khon onko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ iń doń pheḍ hecʼakana. Iń do ona disạm khoniń oḍok ạgukoa ar Kananrenko, Hittirenko, Amorirenko, Pherisirenko, Hiwirenko ar Jebusirenkoakʼ disạmteń idikoa. Ona disạm do maraṅgea ar mońjgea; onḍe do toa ar dumur rasa reakʼ jãhãn okulạnge bạnukʼa." 
Exodus3:9 Israelkoakʼ rakʼjoṅ do ńitokʼ iń ṭhen seṭer akana. Misorrenko ṭhen cetʼlekako santao ocokʼkan ona doń ńelakada. 
Exodus3:10 Onate am do ńitge calakʼme. Iń do Pharao ṭheniń koletʼmea. Ar senkate am do ińren hoṛko, metakʼme Israelko Misor khonem oḍok ạgukoa.”" 
Exodus3:11 Menkhan Mose do Isore metadea, “Iń do nonkan celegeń baṅkana, one Pharao ṭhen senkate Misor khon Israelkoń oḍok ạgu daṛeako.”" 
Exodus3:12 Isore menkeda, “Ińge am sãoteń tahena. Am do Misor khon hoṛkom oḍok ạgukoa ar ape do noa burure ińpe sewawạńạ. Ar ińiń koletʼme noage uni ṭhen amakʼ cinhạ do hoyokʼa.”" 
Exodus3:13 Unre Mose do Isore metadea, “Menkhan tinre Israelkoń metakoa onkoren hapṛamkoren Isorge iń doe kolakadińa, unre hoedaṛeakʼa onko do ińko kuliyińạ, ‘cetʼ kana uniyakʼ ńutum do?’ Unre iń do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛakoa?”" 
Exodus3:14 Isor do Moseye metadea, “Menayicʼ doń iń kangea ‘Iń kangeạń uni do. Am do Israelkom metakoa, ‘Iń kangeạń’ ar ińge onko ṭheniń kol akatʼmea." 
Exodus3:15 Am do arhõm metakoa, onkoren hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Jakobren Probhu Isorge onko ṭhene kol akatʼmea. Ińakʼ ńutum do jaejugicʼ Probhuge. Onko do piṛhike piṛhi ińakʼ noa ńutumgeko disạitińạ." 
Exodus3:16 Am do senkate Israelkoren murubbiko jarwakatem metakoa, onkoren hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Jakobren Probhu Isorge am ṭhene ńel ocoakana are menakada, ‘ape cetanre’ar Misorre cetʼ hoyokʼkan ona doń ńelakada." 
Exodus3:17 Ona iạteń meneda, Misor reakʼ santao khoniń oḍok idipea ar Kananrenko, Hittirenko, Amorirenko, Pherisirenko, Hiwirenko ar Jebusirenkoakʼ disạmteń idipea. Onḍe do toa, dumur rasa ar jãhãn cetʼ reakʼ reṅgecʼge bạnukʼa.’" 
Exodus3:18 “Israelkoren murubbiko do amakʼ kathako ańjomtama. Am ar onko do Misor raj ṭhen senkatepe mena, ‘Ibrikoren Probhu Isor do ale ṭhene ńel ocoakana are menakada. Dayakate sen ocoaleme, jemon ale do hahaṅkar talate pe din reakʼ horle senokʼte aleren Probhu Isor dãṛẽle samaṅ daṛeae.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ińiń baḍaea kajak tiye aṭkarlere hõ Misorren raj do ape bae aṛakʼpea. 
Exodus3:20 Onate iń do unire ińakʼ daṛeń uduga ar hahaṛa kạmiko hotete Misoriń ńẽda ar onate Pharao doe sen ocoapea. 
Exodus3:21 Israelko cetanre Misorrenkoakʼ monre nonkan mitʼṭecʼ dayań janam ocoya jemon Misor khon oḍokokʼ jokhecʼ eken ti alope oḍok hijukʼ. 
Exodus3:22 Sanam Ibri maejiuko do ạdepasere menakʼko Misorren maejiuko ṭhen khon sona, rupạ ar kicricʼkope koetoda. Ona tayom onako hataokate aperen hopon ar hoponerakope horokʼakoa. Nonkate Israelko do Misorrenkoakʼ jinisko ạidạri joṅa.”" 
Exodus4:1 Menkhan Mose do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Israelko bako pạtiạuạń ar ińakʼ katha jodi bako ańjomtiń? Onkoko mendaṛeakʼa, ‘Probhu Isor do am ṭhen bae ńel ocoakana.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ tire ona do cetʼ kana?” Uniye menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅga kana.”" 
Exodus4:3 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ona do otre giḍiyme.” Mose do ṭheṅga otreye giḍiketʼ sãote ona do mitʼṭen bińe hoyena. Ar Mose do ona ńelteye dạṛetʼkan tahẽkana." 
Exodus4:4 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Amakʼ ti tiạrtam ar canḍbol sabme.” Adoe sapʼketʼ khan ona do arhõ ṭheṅga ruạṛena." 
Exodus4:5 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Noam onkaea jemon onkoko pạtiạukʼ, onkoren hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Jakobren Probhu Isor do sạrige am ṭhene ńel ocoakana.”" 
Exodus4:6 Probhu Isor do arhõ uniye metadea, “Amakʼ ti do ḍanḍa totolakʼ cetanre menakʼ kicricʼ reakʼ bhãj bhitrire dohoyme.” Mose do onkageye kạmikeda. Menkhan tiye oḍokketʼ khan uniyakʼ ti do ponḍge murhucʼ jom rog leka ńelena." 
Exodus4:7 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Amakʼ ti do arhõ onḍege doho ruạṛme.” Mose do arhõe onkakeda. Menkhan tinre tiye oḍokketʼtaea unre uniyakʼ ti do hoṛmo reakʼ eṭakʼ hạṭińko leka mońjge hoyena." 
Exodus4:8 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Onko bako pạtiạuam se pạhilakʼ cinhạ reakʼ jãhãn dam bako emam enḍekhan onko do hoedaṛeakʼa dosarakʼko pạtiạuakʼa." 
Exodus4:9 Menkhan onko ona banar reakʼ okaṭakʼge bako pạtiạuakʼ se amakʼ katha bako luturakʼ enḍekhan am do Nil gaḍa khon thoṛa dakʼ rakapʼkate otrem dula. Onate dakʼ do otre mãyãm leka hoyokʼa.” 
Exodus4:10 Mose doe menkeda, “Menkhan E Probhu Isor, iń do rawal moca hoṛ doń baṅkana. Lahatehõ bạń roṛ daṛeakʼ kan tahẽkana ar am sãote katha roṛ tayom hõ bạń daṛeakʼ kana. Ińakʼ mocare katha do aṭkaokʼtińa, ente ińakʼ alaṅ do hamalgetińạ.”" 
Exodus4:11 Menkhan Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Manwakoakʼ moca do okoeye benao akada? Okoe uni doe kala, guṅgạ are kãṛã ocoakadea? Ar ńeńel lạgitʼ daṛe do okoeye emakawadea? Uni do cetʼ iń Probhu Isorgeń baṅkana?" 
Exodus4:12 Ńitokʼ do calakʼme. Ińge katha roṛ lạgitʼ iń goṛowama ar okaṭakʼ roroṛ hoyokʼtam ona hõń cetʼama.” 
Exodus4:13 Moseye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ińiń nehõram kana, jãhãe hotete noa khobor baṛe kolme.”" 
Exodus4:14 Noa katha ańjomkate Probhu Isor do Mose cetanreye edreyena. Uni doe menkeda, “Amren dadam Liwi Aron do cetʼ bạnuiya? Ińiń baḍaea uni do ạḍi napae katha roroṛe baḍaea. Uni do am tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hijukʼ kana. Are ńellem khan uni do ạḍiye kusikʼa." 
Exodus4:15 Ar tinre uni sãote katham roṛa unre unim lạiyaea cetʼ roroṛ hoyokʼtaea mente. Iń do aben bana hoṛge katha roṛ lạgitʼ iń goṛoabena ar cetʼ cekae hoyokʼa ona hõń cetʼabena. 
Exodus4:16 Am huyạte Aronge hoṛko sãote kathae roṛa, jemon uniyakʼ mocage amakʼ moca ar am do uniren Isor lekam hoyokʼa." 
Exodus4:17 Amakʼ noa ṭheṅga do iditoraeme ar ona hotetege onako hahaṛa kạmi dom kạmiya.” 
Exodus4:18 Noa tayom Mose do acʼren hońhartetʼ Jethro ṭhen ruạṛ senkateye metadea, “Misor disạmre ińren peṛa pạrbhạko ṭhen ruạṛ sen ocoạliń ben. Ạliń do senkate liń ńelkoa ńit hõ jiwetʼ menakʼkoa se baṅa.” Jethro do Moseye metadea, “Ṭhikgea Do calakʼben, ar abenakʼ bhạlạiy hoyokʼ taben ma.”" 
Exodus4:19 Midiạn disạmre tahenrege Probhu Isor do Moseye metade tahẽkana, “Am do ńitokʼ Misorte ruạṛ calakʼme. Ente okoeko hoṛ am gocʼmeko menetʼ tahẽkan onko do celege ar jiwetʼ bạnukʼkoa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Unre Mose do acʼren bạhu ar gidrạko gadhareye decʼketʼkote Misor disạmteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ar Isorakʼ ona ṭheṅga hõe iditorakeda. 
Exodus4:21 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Okako hahaṛa kạmi lạgitʼ daṛeń ematʼme ona do Misor disạmte ruạṛ senkate Pharao samaṅrem onkaea. Menkhan uniyakʼ mon nonkań keṭecʼ ocoytaea onate uni do hoṛko bae sen ocoakoa." 
Exodus4:22 Ona tayom am do Pharaoem metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Israel doe ińren pạhilicʼ hopon kana." 
Exodus4:23 Ińiń metatʼme tahẽkana ińren pạhilicʼ hopon do sen ocoaeme jemon ińe sewa daṛeạń. Menkhan bam sen ocoadete amren pạhilicʼ hoponiń gojea.’ ” 
Exodus4:24 Misorte calakʼ hor reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍerare Probhu Isor do Mose goje lạgitʼ uni samna sạmniye hecʼena. 
Exodus4:25 Unre Sipora do mitʼṭecʼ dharanakʼ dhirite acʼren gidrạwakʼ laha hartae getʼketʼtaea. Ar Moseyakʼ jaṅga ṭhene capatʼgotʼkada are menkeda, “Am do mãyãmte ńamicʼ ińren jãwãekanam.”" 
Exodus4:26 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye aṛakʼkedea. Khatna babotre Sipora do ona kathageye menleda. 
Exodus4:27 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Arone metadea, “Hahaṅkarre senkate am do Mose tulucʼ ńapamokʼme.” Unre uni doe calaoena ar Isorakʼ burure Moseye ńamkedea are cokʼadea." 
Exodus4:28 Ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ memen lạgitʼe kolakade Aron do onae baḍae ocokedea. Ona chaḍa okako hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ hukum Probhu Isore emakawade ona hõe lạiyadea. 
Exodus4:29 Ona tayom Mose ar Aron do Misorte senkate Israelren sanam murubbikin jarwaketʼkoa. 
Exodus4:30 Probhu Isor do Mose okaṭakʼ kathae metade tahẽkan ona sanamakʼge Arone baḍae ocokedea ar hoṛko samaṅre ona hahaṛa kạmikoe udukʼkeda. 
Exodus4:31 Onate Israelko doko pạtiạuena. Ar tinreko ańjomkeda, Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ duk sasete ńelakada ar onkoe hiriakatʼkoa unre onko do otre ombakʼkate Probhu Isorko sewawadea." 
Exodus5:1 Inạ tayom Mose ar Aron do senkate Pharaokin metadea, “Probhu Isor, okoe doe Israelkoren Isor kan, uniye meneda, ‘ińren hoṛko hahaṅkarre iń ńutumte jemon mitʼṭecʼ porobko porob daṛeakʼ onate onko sen ocoakome.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Menkhan Pharaoe menkeda, “Okoe kanae uni Probhu Isor do, one uniyakʼ hukumiń ańjomte Israelkoń sen ocoakoa? Nui Probhu Isor hõ bạń baḍae akadea ar Israelko hõ bạń sen ocoakoa.”" 
Exodus5:3 Unre Mose ar Aronkin menkeda, “Ibrikoren Isor do ạliń ṭhene ńel ocoakana. Onate dayakate sen ocoaleme jemon hahaṅkarre pe din reakʼ horte senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte dãṛẽle samaṅ daṛeakʼ. Ar baṅkhan jãhãn moṛok se lạṛhại hotete uni do ale cetanre sạjạiye kola.”" 
Exodus5:4 Misorren raj do unkine metatʼkinạ, “Mose ar Aron, aben do kạmiko khon hoṛakʼ mon cedakʼ ben ocokʼetʼtakoa? Do calakʼ ben, ar kạmite ruạṛokʼben." 
Exodus5:5 Ńelben, disạmre aperen hoṛ doko saṅge idikʼkana, ar aben khạtirte onko do kạmiko bạgi akada.”" 
Exodus5:6 Pharao do enhilokʼge golamko cetanreye dohoakade sasantaoicʼ sordar ar Israelren cakʼlaoko cetanre noa hukume emkeda," 
Exodus5:7 “Iṭạ benao lạgitʼ hoṛko busupʼ alope emakoa. Onko do akotege busupʼko jogao joṅma. 
Exodus5:8 Menkhan enhõ lahate tinạkʼ iṭako benaoetʼ tahẽkan ṭhik unạkʼge onko ṭhen khonpe bujhạu hatao joṅa, mitʼṭecʼ hõ alope aṛakʼakoa. Onko hoṛ doko kuṛhiạgea ar onateko rakʼeda arko meneda Isor ńutumte dãṛẽ samaṅ lạgitʼ sen ocoaleme." 
Exodus5:9 Ape do onkore arhõ hamal kạmiko ladeakope, jemon eṛe kathare lutur baṅkate kạmire lạgiyạ paṛao akanko tahen.”" 
Exodus5:10 Unre golamko cetanreye dohoakatʼko sordar ar Israelren cakʼlaoko do bahrete senkate hoṛkoko metatʼkoa, “Pharaoe menakada, uni do busupʼ ar bae emapea." 
Exodus5:11 Jãhãrege busupʼpe ńam onḍe khon ạgujoṅpe. Menkhan onate apeakʼ kạmiko do thoṛa hõ bale komaotapea.” 
Exodus5:12 Onate onko do busupʼ bodolte lanḍha jogaṛ lạgitʼ Misor disạm reakʼ sanam jaegako pasnao idiyena. 
Exodus5:13 Onko sordarko do usạrae lạgitʼko metatʼkoa, “Busupʼ jogaṛ ape jokhecʼ dinre tinạkʼ iṭạpe benaoetʼ tahẽkan ńitokʼ hõ ṭhik unạkʼge benao lagaoapea.”" 
Exodus5:14 Mitʼ din Pharaoren sordarko do onkoko bahal akatʼko Israelkoren cakʼlaokoko dal baṛaketʼkoa arko metatʼkoa, “Din hilokʼ tinạkʼkate iṭạ benao reakʼ katha tahẽkan ńit do cedakʼ bape daṛeakʼkana? Ape do teheń hõ bape kạmi daṛe akada ar hola hõ bape daṛe akada.”" 
Exodus5:15 Onate Israelren cakʼlaoko do Pharao ṭhen senkate rakʼateko menkeda, “Amren golamko sãote nonka do cedakʼem beohareda?" 
Exodus5:16 Jãhãn busupʼge ale do bale ńameda, menkhan sordarko do iṭạ benaoko metale kana. Ar ńelme, amren golamko dole dal ocokʼkana, menkhan dos do amren hoṛkoakʼ kangea.”" 
Exodus5:17 Pharao do onkoe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape dope kuṛhiạgea. Onatepe meneda, ‘Probhu Isor ńutumte dãṛẽ emokʼ lạgitʼ sen ocoaleme.’" 
Exodus5:18 Do calakʼpe, ar kạmipe. Ape do busupʼ ar baṅ emapea, enhõ tinạkʼgan iṭạ benao reakʼ katha unạkʼgepe benaoa.”" 
Exodus5:19 Unre Israelren cakʼlaoko doko bujhạukeda, onko do muhinreko paṛao akana, ente onko doko men ocolena lahate din hilokʼ tinạkʼkate iṭạko benaoetʼ tahẽkan ńitokʼ hõ ṭhik unạkʼ katege benao lagao akoa." 
Exodus5:20 Onko do Pharao samaṅ khon oḍok hecʼkate Mose ar Aron sãoteko ńapamena. Unkin do onko lạgitʼge kin tạṅgi akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Exodus5:21 Cakʼlaoko do unkinko metatʼkinạ, “Probhu Isor do aben baṛe sạjạiye emaben ma, ente Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ hirkhạwakʼ ben kạmi akada, ar aben do gocʼ ocole lạgitʼ onkoakʼ tire tarwaṛe ben cal akawatʼkoa.”" 
Exodus5:22 Unre Mose do sen ruạṛkate Probhui metadea, “E Probhu Isor, noko jạtrenko kosṭo do cedakʼem emakokana? Ar cedakʼ baṅ iń hõm kol akadiń?" 
Exodus5:23 Pharao ṭhen amakʼ ńutum roṛ tayom khon noko hoṛko cetanre muhin do hecʼ paṛao akana. Ar amren hoṛ do okorem rukhiyạletʼkoa?” 
Exodus6:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do Pharaoakʼ dosa cetʼ hoyokʼkana ona ńelme. Ińakʼ keṭecʼ tire paṛaokate uni do hoṛkoe aṛakʼkoa. Hẽ ińakʼ keṭecʼ tire paṛaokate acʼakʼ disạm khon onkoe laga oḍokkoa.”" 
Exodus6:2 Isor do Mose arhõe metadea, “Iń doń Probhu Isor kana." 
Exodus6:3 Iń sanam daṛeanicʼ Isorge Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭheniń ńel ocokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan Probhu Isor lekate okoe kạnạń mente ona do bạń sodoretʼ tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:4 Iń do onko lạgitʼ ińakʼ bondobosiń doholeda. Ona bondobosreń menleda, onko do bidisiạ lekate okareko tahẽkan ona disạmgeń emakoa." 
Exodus6:5 Misorrenko do Israelko golamko benaoletʼko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ rakʼ ańjomte iń do ona bondobos reakʼ kathań disạkeda. 
Exodus6:6 Onate Israelkom lạiyakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Iń doń Probhu Isor kana. Misorrenkoakʼ bojhatepe ten akan khoniń oḍok ạgupea. Ar golam reakʼ ti khoniń bańcaopea. Ti tiạrkate onko do bebạṛicʼ iń sạjạikoa ariń chaḍaopea." 
Exodus6:7 Ona tayom ińren hoṛ menkate apeń ataṅpea ar aperen Probhu Isoriń hoyokʼa. Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isor doń aperen Isor kana, ar Misorrenkoakʼ bojhatepe ten akan khon ińgeń oḍok ạguakatʼpea." 
Exodus6:8 Okaṭakʼ disạm do Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭhen emokʼ lạgitʼ iń gokʼletʼ ona disạmtegeń idipea ar ona disạm reakʼ ạidạriń emapea. Ar ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Mose do senkate noako katha Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa, menkhan onko do kumãyã talate golam khaṭao khaṭaoteko laṅga caba akan tahẽkante Moseyakʼ katha do bako luturada." 
Exodus6:10 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus6:11 “Am do Misorren Pharao ṭhen senkate metaeme jemon acʼakʼ disạm khon Israelkoe sen ocoako.” 
Exodus6:12 Mose do Probhu Isor roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Israel hoponko ińakʼ katha bako ańjom enḍekhan Pharao do cedakʼe ańjomtińạ, biseskaete ińakʼ katha tinre baṅ pusṭạukʼtiń?”" 
Exodus6:13 Unre Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ, “Aben do Pharao raj ar Israelko baḍae ocoko ben, Probhu Isor do abene hukum akatʼ bena jemon Israelko Misor disạm khon ben oḍok idiko.”" 
Exodus6:14 Noko doko tahẽkana Ruben, Simeon ar Lewi bõsren mathakoge: Israelren maraṅicʼ hopon Rubenren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Hanok, Pạlu, Hesron ar Karmi. Noko do Ruben gusṭikoren apatkoko tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:15 Simeonren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Jemuel, Jamim, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar ar mitʼṭen Kanani maejiuren hopon Sạul; onko do Simeon gusṭiren apatkoko tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:16 Janam lekate Liwiren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Gerson, Kohat ar Merari. Ar Lewi do mitʼsae pe gel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:17 Lewi gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõs reakʼ tạlika lekate nokoge bõskoren mathako tahẽkana; Gersonren hopon do Libni ar Simai, Kohatren hopon doko hoyokʼ kana Amram, Jishar, Hebron ar Usiel; Merariren hopon do Mahli ar Musi. Kohat do mitʼsae pe gel pe bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Noko jotoge Lewi gusṭiren apatko tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:18  
Exodus6:19  
Exodus6:20 Amramren hopon dokin hoyokʼ kana Aron ar Mose. Amram do acʼ babaren miserat Jokebete baplaledea ar uniren do noko hoponko hoylena. Amram do mitʼsae pegel eae bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
Exodus6:21 Jisharren hopon doko hoyokʼ kana Koreh, Nepheg ar Sikri." 
Exodus6:22 Usiel ren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Misayel, Elsaphan ar Sithri." 
Exodus6:23 Aronren hopon doko hoyokʼ kana Nadab, Abihu, Eleasar ar Ithamar. Aron do Aminadabren hoponera Nahsonren misera Elisebae baplaledea ar uni khonge noko doko janamlena." 
Exodus6:24 Korehoren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Asir, Elkana, Abiasaph. Noko do Koreho gusṭiren apatkoko tahẽkana." 
Exodus6:25 Eleasarren hopon doe hoyokʼ kana Pinhas. Aronren hopon Eleasar do Putialren hoponerae baplaledea ar uniren do Pinhase janamena. Nokoge Lewi gusṭiren mathako tahẽkana. 
Exodus6:26 Aron ar Mosege Probhu Isore metatʼkin tahẽkana jemon unkin do phạdko leka Israelko Misor disạm khon kin oḍok idiko. 
Exodus6:27 Mose ar Aronge Misor disạm khon Israelko oḍok idiko reakʼ katha Misorren Pharao raj kin metade tahẽkana. 
Exodus6:28 Probhu Isor do Misor disạmre Mose tulucʼ galmarao jokhecʼe metade tahẽkana, “Ińge Probhu Isor do. Ar okaṭakʼ iń menakatʼme ona jotowakʼge am do Misor disạmren rajem baḍae ocoyea.”" 
Exodus6:29  
Exodus6:30 Menkhan Mose do Probhu Isore metade tahẽkana, “Pharao do ińakʼ katha bae luturakʼa, ente iń do hamal moca hoṛ kạnạń.?”" 
Exodus7:1 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Ńelme, Pharao ṭhen am do Isor lekań hoyocomea, ar amren dadam Aron do amren Nạbigeye hoyokʼa." 
Exodus7:2 Ar okaṭakʼ hukumiń emamkan ona do sanamakʼem sodora. Amren dadam Aron do Pharaoe metaea, jemon acʼakʼ disạm khon Israelkoe sen ocoako." 
Exodus7:3 Menkhan iń do Pharaoakʼ moniń keṭecʼ ocoytaea jemon Misor disạmre aema cinhạ ar hahaṛa kạmikoń kạmi daṛeakʼ. Uni do abenakʼ katha bae ańjoma. Onate iń do Misor disạm cetanre ińakʼ tiyiń tultińạ ar ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạyiń emokʼte ińren phạdko, metakʼme ińren hoṛ Israelko ona disạm khoniń oḍok ạgukoa." 
Exodus7:4  
Exodus7:5 Ińakʼ daṛeń udugte tinre Misor khon Israelkoń oḍok ạgukoa unre Misorrenko bujhạu daṛeakʼa, Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Exodus7:6 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron cetʼlekae hukumatʼkin tahẽkan onkage unkin dokin kạmikeda. 
Exodus7:7 Pharao sãote katha roṛ jokhecʼ Moseyakʼ umer do irạlgel ar Aronakʼ umer do irạlgel pe bochor tahẽkana. 
Exodus7:8 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron tạkin arhõe metatʼkinạ," 
Exodus7:9 “Pharao tinre hahaṛa kạmi udukʼ lạgitʼe metabena, unre Aronem metaea, ‘Pharao samaṅre amakʼ ṭheṅgam giḍiytama,’ ar unre ona ṭheṅga do bińe hoy godokʼa.”" 
Exodus7:10 Ar Probhu Isor okalekae metatʼkin onkage Mose ar Aron do senkatekin kạmikeda. Aron do acʼakʼ ṭheṅga Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko samaṅreye giḍigotʼkeda, ar ona ṭheṅga do bińe hoyena." 
Exodus7:11 Pharao do ạkilan gunidarkoe hoho ạgu ocoketʼkoa. Ar onko hõ akoakʼ jạdu reakʼ jorte onkageko kạmikeda. 
Exodus7:12 Onko do sanamkoge akoakʼ ṭheṅga otreko giḍikeda ar onako ṭheṅga do bińko hoyena, menkhan Aronakʼ ṭheṅga do onkoakʼ joto ṭheṅgakoe utʼketʼtakoa." 
Exodus7:13 Menkhan Probhu Isor do unkin okae metatʼkin tahẽkan onkage hoyena. Pharaoakʼ mon do keṭecʼentaea; onate Mose ar Aronakʼ katha bae ańjomleda. 
Exodus7:14 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Pharaoakʼ mon do keṭecʼ akantaea, onate hoṛko bae sen ocoakokana." 
Exodus7:15 Gapa setakʼ tinre Pharao do gaḍa ghaṭteye calakʼa, unre am do uni tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ nil gaḍa aṛerem teṅgo hataṛkokʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ ṭheṅga biń hoylen ona hõm sapʼ toraea." 
Exodus7:16 Ar unim metaea, ‘Ibrikoren Probhu Isor do noa katha men lạgitʼ am ṭhene kol akadińạ, uniren hoṛko hahaṅkarre senkate jemon uniko sewa daṛeae onate onko baṛe sen ocoakome. Menkhan ńit hạbicʼ am do uniyakʼ katha bam lutur akawada." 
Exodus7:17 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, acʼkangeae Probhu do, ar am do noa cinhạ ńeltem bujhạu daṛeakʼa.’ Unrem mena, ‘iń do ńitokʼ ińakʼ ti reakʼ ṭheṅgate nil gaḍa dakʼ iń dala ar onate gaḍa dakʼ do mãyãmokʼa." 
Exodus7:18 Onate joto hakoko gujukʼa ar nonka bạṛicʼ so oḍokokʼa, Misorrenko do dakʼge bako ńũ daṛeakʼa.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Aron acʼakʼ ṭheṅga hataokate Misor reakʼ sanam gaḍa, nala, pukhri ar jarwa akan dakʼko cetan secʼ ti tiạrkate ạcurem metaea. Onate sanam dakʼ do mãyãmokʼa. Misor disạm reakʼ sanam jaegare mãyãm ńelokʼa; ar dhiri ar kaṭre dohoakatʼ dakʼ hõ mãyãmokʼa.”" 
Exodus7:20 Mose ar Aron do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka jotowakʼ kin kạmikeda. Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko samaṅre Aron do acʼakʼ ṭheṅgae tulketʼte nil gaḍa reakʼ dakʼe dalkeda. Ar gaḍa dakʼ do mãyãm hoyena. 
Exodus7:21 Unre gaḍaren sanam hakoko gocʼena ar nunạkʼ bạṛicʼ so oḍokokʼ ehopʼena, Misorrenko do dakʼge bako ńũ daṛeada. Ar Misor reakʼ sanam jaegarege mãyãm do ńelena." 
Exodus7:22 Unre Misorren gonokko hõ akoakʼ jạdukote ona lekageko udukʼkeda. Onate Pharaoakʼ mon do arhõ keṭecʼentaea. Ar Probhu Isor okae menletʼ onkage hoyena; Mose ar Aronakʼ katha Pharao do bae ańjomleda," 
Exodus7:23 bickom uni doe ạcurente acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. Ar cetʼge bae moneyada. 
Exodus7:24 Misorrenko do dakʼ bako ńũ daṛeakʼte ńũi dakʼ ńam lạgitʼ gaḍa aṛe koreko la baṛakeda. 
Exodus7:25 Nil gaḍa cetanre Probhu Isor noa duke kolketʼ tayom eae din paromena. 
Exodus8:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Senkate Pharao noa katham metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ińren hoṛko sen ocoakome." 
Exodus8:2 Ar onko bam sen ocoako khan iń do goṭa disạm cetanre roṭekoń kolkoa. 
Exodus8:3 Nil gaḍa do roṭekote perejokʼa, ar onko do gaḍa khonko rakapʼ hijukʼte amakʼ oṛakʼ duạrkore, giticʼ oṛakʼkore, amakʼ aṭetʼkore, amren kạmiyạkoakʼ oṛakʼkore, amren hoṛkoakʼ oṛakʼkore, amakʼ culhạre ar amakʼ holoṅ sipiyakʼ gamlareko don bolokʼa." 
Exodus8:4 Onko roṭe do am cetanre ar amren hoṛko cetanre ar amren kạmiyạko cetanreko don baṛaya.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Aron do noa katham metaea, ‘Misor disạm reakʼ joto gaḍa, nala ar pukhri cetanre amakʼ ṭheṅga tultam ar disạm cetanre roṭe ạgukom.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Unre Aron do Misor reakʼ sanam dakʼ cetanre acʼakʼ tiye tiạrkeda. Ar onate roṭeko rakapʼ hecʼente disạmko perecʼ cabakeda. 
Exodus8:7 Ar gonokko hõ akoakʼ jạdu reakʼ jorte onkageko udukʼkeda. Onko hõ Misor disạmre roṭeko ạguketʼkoa. 
Exodus8:8 Pharao do unre Mose ar Aron hohoatʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Probhu Isor nehõrae ben jemon uni do iń ar ińren hoṛko cetan khon roṭekoe ocokʼko. Iń do hoṛkoń sen ocoakoa jemon senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte dãṛẽko samaṅ daṛeakʼ.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mose do Pharaoe metadea, “Roṭeko jemon am ar amakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr bạgikate gaḍareko tahen, onate ma lạiyạńme tinre am ar amren hoṛko lạgitʼ iń nehõrokʼa. Okte do amge ṭhikạńme.”" 
Exodus8:10 Pharaoe roṛ ruạṛadea, “Enḍekhan ona do gapage hoyokʼma.” Moseye menkeda, “Onkage hoyokʼa. Ar onatem bujhạu daṛeakʼa, aleren Probhu leka do ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa." 
Exodus8:11 Roṭe do am ar amakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr, amren kạmiyạko ar amren hoṛko ṭhen khonko oḍok calakʼa. Ar eken gaḍa dakʼregeko tahena.”" 
Exodus8:12 Noa katha menkate Mose ar Aron do Pharao ṭhen khonkin ruạṛena. Ar Pharao cetanre Probhu Isor oka duke kolakatʼ ona babotre Mose do Probhu ṭhene rakʼkeda. 
Exodus8:13 Unre Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ katha lekae kạmikeda. Oṛakʼ-duạr, raca ar ṭạnḍikore tinạkʼ roṭeko tahẽkan sanamgeko gocʼena." 
Exodus8:14 Ar hoṛko do onkoko jarwaketʼkoa ar onate disạmre ạḍi bạṛicʼ so rakapʼena. 
Exodus8:15 Pharao do roṭe khon rukhiyại ńamketʼ khan uniyakʼ mon do arhõ keṭecʼ ruạṛentaea ar unkinakʼ katha do bae moneyada. Probhu Isor cetʼlekae menletʼ onkage hoyena. 
Exodus8:16 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Aron do acʼakʼ ṭheṅga tulkate ot reakʼ dhuṛire da dalem metaea. Onate ona dhuṛi khon sĩkṛĩcʼko hoyokʼa ar goṭa Misor disạmko pereja.”" 
Exodus8:17 Aron ar Mose do onkagekin kạmikeda. Aron do acʼakʼ ti tiạrkate ot reakʼ dhuṛiye dalkeda ar onate manwa ar janwarko cetanre sĩkṛĩcʼko apʼena. Unre Misor disạm reakʼ sanam dhuṛiko do sĩkṛĩcʼ hoyena. 
Exodus8:18 Ar gonokko hõ akoakʼ jạdu reakʼ jorte sĩkṛĩcʼ ạguko reakʼko kurumuṭukeda menkhan bako daṛeada. Ar sĩkṛĩcʼ do manwa ar janwar cetankore abokʼko ehopʼena. 
Exodus8:19 Noa ńelte gonokko do Pharaoko metadea, “Noare do Isorakʼ ti menakʼa.” Menkhan enhõ Pharaoakʼ mon do keṭecʼge tahẽyena; uni do Mose ar Aronakʼ katha bae luturada. Probhu Isor okae menletʼ onkage hoyena." 
Exodus8:20 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Ạḍi setakʼre beredokʼme ar Pharao tinre gaḍa ghaṭteye calakʼa unre uni samaṅre teṅgokʼme. Ar unim metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ińren hoṛko sen ocoakome." 
Exodus8:21 Ar bam sen ocoako khan am ar amren sanam kạmiyạko ar amren hoṛko cetanre ar amakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrkore durum durum kãṛã loṭocʼ iń kolkoa. Misorrenkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar sanam jaega do kãṛã loṭocʼkote perejokʼa. 
Exodus8:22 Menkhan enhilokʼ do Gosen disạmiń begara, ente onḍe do ińren hoṛko girobasokʼ kana. Onḍe do jãhãn kãṛa loṭocʼge bako tahena. Ar onatepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge noa disạmre minạńa." 
Exodus8:23 Ar mitʼṭecʼ bekʼgarakʼ iń dohoya ińren hoṛko ar amren hoṛko talare. Ar gapage noa hahaṛawakʼ do ńelokʼa.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Probhu Isor doe onkakeda. Pharaoakʼ raj oṛakʼre ar uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ oṛakʼkore durum durum kãṛã loṭocʼko boloyena. Ar onkote goṭa Misor disạm do perecʼena. 
Exodus8:25 Unre Pharao do Mose ar Aron hoho ạgu ocoketʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Ape do noa disạmrege jãhãre senkate aperen Isor ńutumte dãṛẽ samaṅpe.”" 
Exodus8:26 Moseye menkeda, “Menkhan noa do cetʼ ṭhikakʼ hoyokʼa? Aleren Probhu Isor ńutumte ale okaṭakʼle samaṅ ona do Misorrenko ṭhen hirkhạwakʼkana. Misorren okaṭakʼko hirkhạwakʼ ona dãṛẽ onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrele samaṅ khan onko do cetʼ dhirite bako tińlea?" 
Exodus8:27 Aleren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ale do hahaṅkar talate pe din reakʼ horte senkate uni ńutumte dãṛẽle samaṅa.” 
Exodus8:28 Pharaoe menkeda, “Aperen Probhu Isor sewae lạgitʼ iń do hahaṅkarteń sen ocoapea. Menkhan ḍher sạṅgiń do alope calakʼa. Ar ńit aben do iń lạgitʼ nehõrokʼ ben.”" 
Exodus8:29 Moseye menkeda, “Am ṭhen khon ruạṛkatege Isor ṭhen liń nehõrokʼa jemon gapage maharaj ar uniren kạmiyạko ar uniren hoṛko cetan khon noko kãṛã loṭocʼko calao cabakʼa. Menkhan Probhu Isor ńutumte janwar dãṛẽ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ senokʼ do maharaj jemon aloe eṛele.”" 
Exodus8:30 Noa tayom Mose do Pharao ṭhen khon ruạṛkate Probhu Isor ṭhene nehõrena," 
Exodus8:31 Probhu Isor hõ Moseyakʼ kathae ańjomkeda. Uni do Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko ar uniren hoṛko cetan khon loṭocʼkoe ocokʼketʼkoa. Mitʼṭen kãṛã loṭocʼhõ ar bako tahẽlena. 
Exodus8:32 Menkhan niạ dhao hõ Pharao do acʼakʼ mone keṭecʼketʼtaea ar hoṛko bae sen ocoatʼkoa. 
Exodus9:1 Niạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Pharao ṭhen senkate menme, Ibrikoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ińren hoṛko sen ocoakome." 
Exodus9:2 Menkhan am do bam sen ocoakokana onkom sapʼ dohoyetʼkoa," 
Exodus9:3 onate ṭạnḍire menakʼko amren sadomko, gadhako, ũṭko, ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko, meromko, cetanre usạrage ińakʼ tite mitʼṭecʼ mahamariń hoeocoya." 
Exodus9:4 Menkhan Israelkoren gại ḍaṅgrako do Misorrenko khoniń begarkoa. Ar onkoren tinạkʼ gại-ḍaṅgra menakʼko onko do mitʼṭen hõ bako gujukʼa.’ ” 
Exodus9:5 Ar Probhu Isor do ona mahamạri reakʼe ṭhik dohokada. Uniye menakada, “Gapage noa disạm cetanre onań paṛao ocoya.”" 
Exodus9:6 Dosar hilokʼ Probhu Isor doe onkakeda. Onate Misorren sanam gại-ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi meromko gocʼ cabayena, menkhan Israelkoren gại-ḍaṅgrako do mitʼṭen hõ bako gocʼlena." 
Exodus9:7 Pharao do hoṛ kolkateye baḍaekeda, Israelkoren mitʼṭen gại-ḍaṅgra hõ bako gocʼakana. Enhõ Pharao do mone keṭecʼketʼtaea; ar hoṛko bae sen ocowatʼkoa." 
Exodus9:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ, “Bhaṭa khon thoṛagan torocʼ hatao ben. Ar Pharaoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre Mose do coṭ secʼe uḍiạuma." 
Exodus9:9 Khan ona do lemeń dhuṛi leka goṭa Misor disạm cetanre pheḍokʼa. Onate goṭa Misorren hoṛko ar janwarkoakʼ hoṛmore ojoko rakabokʼa.” 
Exodus9:10 Unre Mose ar Aron do bhaṭa khon torocʼ hataokate Pharao samaṅre kin teṅgoyena. Ar Mose do coṭ secʼ onae uḍiạuketʼ khan manwa ar janwarkore ojoko rakapʼena. 
Exodus9:11 Gonokko do Mose samaṅre ar bako teṅgo daṛeada, ente onko hõ eṭakʼ Misri hoṛko leka ojo rakapʼatʼkoa." 
Exodus9:12 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Pharaoakʼ mon artetʼgeye keṭecʼ ocoketʼtaea. Onate Probhu Isor okae menletʼ onkage hoyena. Mose ar Aronakʼ katha Pharao do bae luturada. 
Exodus9:13 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do ạḍire beretʼkate Pharao samaṅrem teṅgokʼa, arem metaea, Ibrikoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ińren hoṛko sen ocoakome," 
Exodus9:14 ente noa tayom am ar amren kạmiyạko ar hoṛko cetanre iń do sanam lekan duk iń kola. Ar unrem bujhạu daṛeakʼa, goṭa dhạrtire iń leka ar celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Exodus9:15 Iń do ińakʼ daṛeń uduga ar amren hoṛko cetanre nonkan mahamạriń kola onate dhạrti khonpe marao utạrokʼa. 
Exodus9:16 Menkhan am do jiwetʼ iń dohomea jemon ińakʼ daṛeń udukʼ daṛeam ar goṭa dhạrtire ińakʼ ńutum lại pasnaokʼtiń. 
Exodus9:17 Am do ńitʼ hõ ińren hoṛko upạrtem teṅgo akana ar bam sen ocoako kana. 
Exodus9:18 Ona iạte gapa ṭhik niạ oktege botoranakʼ arel iń kola one onka Misor disạmre tisge baṅ hoyakan. 
Exodus9:19 Ona iạte ṭạnḍire amren tinạkʼ gại ḍaṅgrako ar manwako menakʼko onko ṭhen katha kolme jemonko aḍ daṛeakʼ. Ar jãhãe hoṛ se gại ḍaṅgra oṛakʼte bako hijukʼ ar ṭạnḍiregeko tahen enḍekhan onko do arel ńurakoteko gujukʼa.’ ” 
Exodus9:20 Unre Pharaoren kạmiyạko tinạkʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ kathate botor hecʼatʼko onko do usạra akoren golamko ar gại-ḍaṅgrako oṛakʼteko ạguketʼkoa. 
Exodus9:21 Menkhan okoe ona bako luturatʼ onko do akoren golamko ar gại-ḍaṅgrako ṭạnḍiregeko dohokatʼkoa. 
Exodus9:22 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Serma secʼ amakʼ ti tiyạrme. Onate goṭa misor disạmren hoṛko, janwarko ar ṭạnḍi reakʼ dare nạ̃ṛĩko cetanre arel ńurokʼa.”" 
Exodus9:23 Unre Mose do serma secʼ acʼakʼ ṭheṅgae tulkeda. Ar Probhu Isor do huḍur ar arele kolketʼte ńurokʼ ehopʼena ar ona sãote seṅgel ńurokʼ hõ ehopʼena. Nonkage Probhu Isor do Misor disạmre arele kolkeda. 
Exodus9:24 Eken arel ńurokʼ do baṅ, ona são sãote bijli hõ malkaokʼkan tahẽkana. Misor raj reakʼ etohopʼ khon ńit hạbicʼ goṭa disạmre nonka do ar tishõ baṅ hoyakan tahẽkana." 
Exodus9:25 Misor disạm reakʼ ṭạnḍikore okoe manwa ar gại ḍaṅgrako tahẽkan onko do celege arel khon rukhiyạ do bako ńamleda. Arelte ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam phosol do nosṭo cabayena ar dare reakʼ ḍạrko rạputʼ ńurhạyena. 
Exodus9:26 Menkhan Israelko okareko tahẽkan ona Gosenre do arel baṅ ńurlena. 
Exodus9:27 Pharao do unre Mose ar Aron hohowatʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Niạ bar doń kại akada. Probhu Isor do ṭhikgeye kạmiakatʼa. Iń ar ińren hoṛgele dusigea." 
Exodus9:28 Am do Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrokʼme. Huḍur ar arel do ḍherge hoyakana. Niạ dhao doń sen ocoapea. Nonḍe do ar tahen baṅ hoyokʼtapea.” 
Exodus9:29 Mose do uniye metadea, “Nagraha khon oḍok katege iń do Probhu Isor ṭhen ti tulkateń koejoṅa. Onate huḍur ar arel ńurokʼ hõ thirokʼa. Ar noatem bujhạu daṛeakʼa, dhạrti do Probhu Isorakʼ kangea." 
Exodus9:30 Menkhan ińiń baḍaea, am ar amren kạmiyạko do Probhu Isor ńitʼ hõ bape botorae kana.”" 
Exodus9:31 Arel iạte Misor reakʼ sanam musnạ ar jao do nosṭo cabayena. Ona oktere jao do gele akan tahẽkana ar musnạ hõ bhoṭokʼ akan tahẽkana," 
Exodus9:32 Menkhan guhum ar guḍmạ guhum do baṅ ṭuṭi chacka chakʼ lena ente unhõ belekʼ okte do baṅ hoyakan tahẽkana. 
Exodus9:33 Ona tayom Mose do Pharao ṭhen khone oḍok senena. Ar nagraha khon oḍok kate uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen ti tulkateye koekeda. Unre rimil saḍe ar arel ńurokʼ thirena. Ar dakʼ ńurokʼ hõ thirena. 
Exodus9:34 Menkhan Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko do tinre, huḍur, dakʼ ar arel ńurokʼ thirena unre onko do arhõko kạikeda. Onko do arhõ monko keṭecʼketʼtakoa." 
Exodus9:35 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete cetʼlekae menletʼ onkage Pharaoakʼ mon do keṭecʼentaea; uni do Israelko bae sen ocowatʼkoa. 
Exodus10:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do Pharao ṭhen calakʼme. Iń do Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ moniń keṭecʼ akatʼtakoa jemon ińakʼ ektiạri reakʼ cinhạko ńel daṛeakʼ, ar amhõ jemon amren hoponko ar goṛom gidrạko ṭhenem lại daṛeakʼ cetʼleka Misri hoṛko lelhań benaoletʼkoa ar ińakʼ cinhạkoń udukʼatʼko tahẽkana. Onate apepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Exodus10:2  
Exodus10:3 Mose ar Aron do unre Pharao ṭhen senkatekin menkeda, “Ibrikoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ar tinạkʼ din iń samaṅre bohokʼ bam kuḍburtama? Iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ińren hoṛko sen ocoakome." 
Exodus10:4 Ińren hoṛko bam sen ocoako khan enḍekhan gapage amakʼ disạmre pohokoń kolkoa. 
Exodus10:5 Onko do hecʼkate disạmko chạplạu eseda, ar ot hõ baṅ ńel ńamokʼa. Arel khon okako rukhiyạlen ona do noko pohoko jom cabaea." 
Exodus10:6 Ona tayom am ar amren sanam kạmiyạko ar eṭakʼ sanam Misrikoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr do onko pohokote perejokʼa. Noa disạmte hecʼ tayom amren baba-haṛam ar onkoren hapṛamko hõ nonka do tishõ bako ńelakada.’ ” Ar noa katha roṛ tayom Mose doe ạcurente Pharao ṭhen khone calaoena. 
Exodus10:7 Unre Pharaoren kạmiyạko do uniko metadea, “Noko hoṛ do ar tinạkʼ din aboakʼ jhampa lekako tahena? Onko jemon akoren Isorko sewa daṛeae onate sen ocoakome. Am do cetʼ bam bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana, Misor do dhaṅ dhaser cabakʼkana mente?”" 
Exodus10:8 Mose ar Aron do arhõ Pharao ṭhenkin ạgu ocoyena. Pharao do unkine metatʼkinạ, “Do calakʼpe, ar aperen Probhu Isor sewawaepe. Menkhan ape sãote do ar okoekoko calakʼa?”" 
Exodus10:9 Moseye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Aleren hopon ar hoponerako, aleren haṛam ar buḍhi hoṛko, aleren gidrạko ar aleren ḍaṅgrako-bhiḍiko jotoge ale sãoteko calakʼa, ente Probhu Isor ńutumte ale do mitʼṭecʼ poroble porobokʼa.”" 
Exodus10:10 Unre Pharao doe metatʼkinạ, “Jãhãtis aperen hopon ar hoponerako salakʼ iń sen ocoape khan tobe do aperen Probhu Isor hõ ape sãoteye tahenma. Husiạrokʼpe apeakʼ monsubạ do baṅ ṭhik tapea." 
Exodus10:11 Baṅa, ona do baṅ hoyokʼa, ape ma Probhu Isor sewawae lạgitʼ calakʼpe menetʼkan, enḍekhan herel hopon motogeko senokʼma.” Noa tayom Pharao samaṅ khon Mose ar Aron dokin laga ńir ocoyena." 
Exodus10:12 Ar Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Misor disạm cetanre ti tiạrtam. Onate ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam hạriạ̃ṛakʼko metakʼme arel khon okako rukhiyại ńamletʼ ona do pohoko hecʼkateko jom cabaea.”" 
Exodus10:13 Unre Mose do Misor disạm cetanre acʼakʼ ṭheṅgae tulkeda; Ar Probhu Isor do ona disạm cetanre goṭa siń ar ńindạ purub reakʼ hoeye kolkeda. Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ ona purub reakʼ hoete jhake jhak pohokoe ạguketʼkoa. 
Exodus10:14 Noate goṭa Misor disạm cetanre alekha pohoko do hecʼkateko apʼena. Ar noa lahare nunạkʼ poho do ar tishõ bako ńelakan tahẽkana, ar tishõ bako ńelokʼa." 
Exodus10:15 Nonkate onkote goṭa disạm do chạplạu esetʼena ar ot do hendege ńelena. Ar ṭạnḍiko reakʼ sanam hạriạ̃ṛakʼko ar dare reakʼ okako jo do arel khon sahaṛ akan tahẽkan onako joto do onko pohoko jomkeda. Goṭa Misorre hạriạ̃ṛ dareko do ar cetʼge baṅ tahẽlena. 
Exodus10:16 Unre Pharao do usạra Mose ar Arone hoho ạgu ocoketʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Iń do aperen Probhu Isor ar ape upạrteń kại akada." 
Exodus10:17 Onate dayakate niạ dhao baṛe ikạkạńpe. Ar aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrokʼpe jemon uni do iń cetan khon gujukʼ umule ocokʼ giḍikakʼ.” 
Exodus10:18 Unre Mose do Pharao ṭhen khon ruạṛkate Probhu Isor ṭhene nehõrena. 
Exodus10:19 Ar onate Probhu Isor do hoeye ạcur ocokeda ar pạchim khon mitʼṭecʼ kajak hoeye ạguketʼte pohokoe oṭaṅ idiketʼkoa ar arakʼ jalapurireye khadlekatʼkoa. Onkate goṭa Misor disạmre ar mitʼṭen poho hõ bako tahẽlena. 
Exodus10:20 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Pharaoakʼ mone keṭecʼ ocoketʼtaea; uni do Israelko bae sen ocowatʼkoa. 
Exodus10:21 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Serma secʼ amakʼ ti tiyạrtam. Onate tite ṭunḍuyetʼ leka disạm do ńut cabakʼa.”" 
Exodus10:22 Unre Mose do serma secʼ tiye tulkeda, onate Misor disạm do pe din hạbicʼ kaṛaṅ ńut ńutena." 
Exodus10:23 Ona pe din okoege bako ńepel ńapamlena ar oṛakʼ bạgikate okoe hõ bahrete bako oḍoklena. Menkhan Israelko okareko tahẽkan onḍe do marsalge tahẽkana. 
Exodus10:24 Unre Pharao do Mose hoho ạgu ocokedeteye metadea, “Do calakʼpe, ar Probhu Isor sewawaepe. Aperen hopon ar hoponerako hõ ape sãoteko sen daṛeakʼa, menkhan aperen ḍaṅgra-bhiḍi palko do nonḍeko tahenma.”" 
Exodus10:25 Moseye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Aleren Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ ar eṭakʼakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ janwar do amge jogao aleme." 
Exodus10:26 Aleren ḍaṅgra-bhiḍiko hõ ale sãotegele iditorakoa. Onkoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ khurạ hõ nonḍe do bale giḍi oṭokakʼa. Aleren Probhu Isor sewawae lạgitʼ noko mod khon adomko do jạṛuṛalea. Ar onḍe ạurile senokʼ hạbicʼ bale bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana Probhu Isor sewawae lạgitʼ okoeko janwar lagao aleya.” 
Exodus10:27 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Pharao rajakʼ mone keṭecʼketʼtaea ar onko sen ocoako bae rebenlena. 
Exodus10:28 Pharao do Moseye metadea, “Iń ṭhen khon pharakokʼme. Ar sontorokʼme! Ar tishõ iń samaṅre alom hijukʼa. Ar tisokʼ iń samaṅrem paṛaokʼa enhilokʼ do gujukʼ hoyokʼtama.”" 
Exodus10:29 Moseye menkeda, “Am okam menketʼ onkage hoyokʼma. Ińakʼ sana leka am samaṅre do ar bạń hijukʼa.”" 
Exodus11:1 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Iń do Pharao ar Misor disạmre ar mitʼṭecʼ duk iń kola. Ar ona tayom Pharao do nonḍe khone sen ocoapea. Menkhan tinreye sen ocoape unre uni do nonḍe khone laga oḍokpea." 
Exodus11:2 Am do Israelkom metakoa, mimitʼ herel hoponko ar mimitʼ maejiuko sanamkoge jemon ako aḍepaseren hoṛko ṭhen khon sona ar rupạko koejoṅ.”" 
Exodus11:3 Ar Probhu Isor do Israelko cetanre Misrikoakʼ monre dayae rakapʼ ocoketʼtakoa. Ona chaḍa Mose hõ Pharaoren kạmiyạko ar Misorren hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre mitʼṭen maraṅ hoṛe hoyena. 
Exodus11:4 Mose do Pharaoe metadea, “Probhu Isore meneda, tala ńindạ okte iń do Misor disạm talateń parom calakʼa." 
Exodus11:5 Onate Misor disạm reakʼ sanam gharońjren pạhil hoponko gujukʼa. Siṅghạson ạidạriyicʼ Pharaoren pạhilicʼ hopon khon ehopʼkate janteye riritʼ kạ̃ṛmĩren pạhilicʼ hopon hạbicʼ okoehõ sarecʼ do bako tahena. Ona chaḍa mĩhũ meromkoren hõ pạhil janam akan hoponko gujukʼa. 
Exodus11:6 Goṭa Misor disạmre nonka homor halaṅ hoyokʼa one onka do tishõ baṅ hoyakan ar tishõ baṅ hoyokʼa. 
Exodus11:7 Menkhan Israelko modren jãhãe upạrte mitʼṭen setawakʼ bhokʼ hõ baṅ ańjomokʼa, baṅ do manwa ńelte ar baṅ do janwar upạrte. Jemonpe baḍae daṛeakʼ, Probhu Isor do Misriko ar Israelko talareye bekʼgarkana mente." 
Exodus11:8 Amren kạmiyạko hecʼkate iń samaṅre ikhṛumkateko mena, ‘amren sanam hoṛkoante oḍok calakʼme!’ Ar ona tayom doń oḍok calakʼa.” Noa katha menkate Mose do Pharao ṭhen khon raṅgaokateye oḍok hecʼena." 
Exodus11:9 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Misor disạmre ińakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko jemon ḍherokʼ onate Pharao do amakʼ katha bae ańjoma.”" 
Exodus11:10 Noako hahaṛa kạmi Mose ar Aron do Pharao samaṅre kin kạmikeda, menkhan Probhu Isor do Pharaoakʼ mone keṭecʼketʼte disạm khon Israelko bae sen ocoatʼkoa." 
Exodus12:1 Probhu Isor do Misor disạmre Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ," 
Exodus12:2 “Noa candoge hoyokʼa apeakʼ pạhil cando, apeakʼ bochor reakʼ pạhil cando." 
Exodus12:3 Aben do sanam Israelko jarwakate ben metakoa niạ cando reakʼ gel tạrik hilokʼ mimitʼ gharońjren mukhiyạko do akoakʼ gharońj lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍa hoponko bachao joṅa. Ente mimitʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭenkate bheḍa hopon hataoe hoyokʼa. 
Exodus12:4 Ar jãhã gharońj lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍa hopone huḍińge khan enḍekhan sor oṛakʼ hoṛren bheḍakoakʼ lekha lekate mitʼṭen bheḍa hoponko hataojoṅa. Banar gharońjren hoṛkoakʼ lekha lekate mimitʼ hoṛ tinạkʼko jom daṛeakʼ ona baḍaekate bheḍa hopon hataoko hoyokʼa. 
Exodus12:5 Uni hopon do merom boda se bhiḍi pal khon bachao akade mitʼ bochorren mitʼṭen bheḍa hoponge. Uniyakʼ hoṛmore jãhãn khũt alo baṛe tahentae ma. 
Exodus12:6 Ar niạ cando reakʼ pongel tạrik hạbicʼ uni do dohoye hoyokʼa. Ona tayom enhilokʼ cando hạsur tayom goṭa Israel somaj reakʼ mimitʼ gharońjrenko do apan ạpin bheḍa hoponko gurkoa. 
Exodus12:7 Ona tayom okako oṛakʼre bheḍa hoponakʼ jelko jom onako oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr cạukaṭ banarsa aṛere ar cetanre hõ thoṛa mãyãmpe potaokakʼa. 
Exodus12:8 Enhilokʼ ńindạge onko do ona jel seṅgelreko rapagma ar begor khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ ar haṛhatʼ aṛakʼ sãoteko jom ma. 
Exodus12:9 Ona jel do berelte se dakʼte isinkate do alope joma, menkhan bohokʼ, jaṅga ar bhitri reakʼ hạṭińko sudhạ seṅgelre rapakʼ katepe joma." 
Exodus12:10 Ar setakʼ hạbicʼ do cetʼge alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa. Ar thoṛa sarecʼlen khan ona dope atar giḍikakʼa. 
Exodus12:11 Ona do nonka tahẽkatepe joma; apeakʼ kicricʼ do ḍanḍare paṭhe akae tahenma, jaṅgare panahi ar tire hõ ṭheṅga tahentape ma. Ona do usạrate onape joma. Ar noage Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ bhoj do hoyokʼa." 
Exodus12:12 Iń do ona ńindạge Misor disạm talateń parom calakʼa ar manwakoren pạhil hoponko ar janwarkoren pạhil hoponkoń gocʼkoa. Iń do Misorren sanam deb-debotakoń sạjạikoa; ar ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Exodus12:13 Menkhan apeakʼ oṛakʼre oka mãyãm potao akae tahen onage apeakʼ nisana do hoyokʼa. Ar ona mãyãm ńelte ape doń bad oṭokapea ariń parom calakʼa. Onate ape do Misor disạm reakʼ duk khon rukhiyạpe ńama. 
Exodus12:14 Ape lạgitʼ ona do mitʼṭecʼ disạ dokʼho dinge hoyokʼa. Probhu Isor ńutumte noa porob do mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ niạm lekate piṛhike piṛhipe porobokʼa. 
Exodus12:15 “Ape do eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma. Apeakʼ oṛakʼre oka khạmi tahen ona do pạhil dinregepe ocokʼ giḍikakʼa. Noa eae din bhitrire okoe khạmiyanakʼ piṭhại jom uni do Israelko tala khone marao ocokʼa. 
Exodus12:16 Pạhil ar eae mãhã hilokʼ do mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya. Niạ bar din do apnarakʼ jomakʼko benao chaḍa jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Exodus12:17 Bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porob do jaejug reakʼ niạm lekate piṛhike piṛhipe porobokʼa, ente niạ dinge ape do lạṛhại phạdko leka Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạgupea." 
Exodus12:18 Ape do pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ tạrik reakʼ ạyupʼ khon ehopʼkate ona cando reakʼ bargel mitʼ ńindạ hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma. 
Exodus12:19 Noa eae din hạbicʼ apeakʼ oṛakʼkore khạmi do alope dohokakʼa. 
Exodus12:20 Jãhãregepe tahen niạ eae din do khạmiyanakʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope joma; menkhan bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ baṛe jompe.” 
Exodus12:21 Unre Mose do Israelkoren sanam murubbiko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Apeakʼ gharońj lạgitʼ bheḍa hopon bachaokote bańcaokʼ porob ńutumte gocʼkope." 
Exodus12:22 Ona tayom mitʼ ạṭi busupʼ hataokate bạṭire dohoakan mãyãmrepe topoya ar banarsa cạukaṭ ar cetan kaṭre hõpe jotʼakʼa; ar ạuri setagokʼ hạbicʼ okoehõ oṛakʼ bahrete alope oḍokokʼa. 
Exodus12:23 Misriko ńẽtʼko jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do tinre Misor disạm talateye parom calakʼa ar unre apeakʼ duạr cạukạṭ reakʼ mãyãme ńelle khan uni do ona oṛakʼe bạgi oṭowakʼ are laha calakʼa. Ar okoe noa ḍahao marao reakʼ kạmiye kạmi uni do apeakʼ oṛakʼre bae bolo ocoaea. 
Exodus12:24 “Noa porob do jao okte ape ar aperen bõsko mitʼṭecʼ niạm menkatepe manaoa. 
Exodus12:25 Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm emape reakʼe gokʼ akatʼpe ona disạmre senkate hõ noa porobpe porobokʼa. 
Exodus12:26 Aperen hopon ar hoponerako tinreko kulipea, ‘noa reakʼ mane do cetʼkana mente?’" 
Exodus12:27 Unrepe lạiyakoa, ‘noa do hoyokʼ kana Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ dãṛẽ, ente Misor disạmre tahen jokhecʼ uni do Israelkoakʼ oṛakʼko bad oṭokateye parom senlena. Uni do misrikoe gocʼketʼkoa menkhan ale doe rukhiyạketʼlea.’ ” Inạ tayom Israelko do ombakʼkate Probhu Isorko sewawadea." 
Exodus12:28 Mose ar Aron Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ hukume ematʼkin tahẽkan onkage Israel hoponko do ruạṛ senkateko kạmikeda. 
Exodus12:29 Ona tayom pon gel tạrik reakʼ tala ńindạ okte Probhu Isor do Misor disạmren mitʼke mitʼ pạhil hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Nonkate raj siṅghạsonren ạidạriyicʼ Pharaoren pạhilicʼ hopon khon ehopʼkate hajot oṛakʼre menayicʼren pạhilicʼ hopon hạbicʼ, ar janwarkoren hõ pạhil hoponko gocʼena." 
Exodus12:30 Ona ńindạ Pharao ar acʼren sanam kạmiyạko ar Misor disạmren mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do jạpitʼ khonko ebhenena; ar goṭa Misor disạmre maraṅ rakʼjoṅ ar hae haeyokʼ hoyena, ente mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ hõ baṅ badlena onḍe celege bako gocʼakan." 
Exodus12:31 Pharao do enhilokʼ ńindạge Mose ar Arone hoho ạgu ocoketʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Aben do Israelko soṅgekate ińren hoṛko tala khon oḍokokʼ ben. Ar cetʼleka ben menetʼkan onkage senkate aperen Probhu Isor sewawaepe." 
Exodus12:32 Abenakʼ katha lekage calakʼ jokhecʼ aperen ḍaṅgrako-bhiḍiko hõ iditorakope, ar iń hõ bhor oṭoạńpe.”" 
Exodus12:33 Misriko hõko botorena, ente hoedaṛeakʼa onko hõko gujukʼa. Onate onko do Israelko usạrae lạgitʼko metatʼkoa jemon usạra disạm khonko oḍok calakʼ." 
Exodus12:34 Nonkate Israelko do khạmi ạuriko mesalrege sipiyakʼ holoṅ ḍhimbạ do gamla sudhạ kicricʼreko moṭraketʼte tarenreko ladekeda. 
Exodus12:35 Israelko do Moseyakʼ katha leka misriko sona-rupạ ar kicricʼko koeketʼkoa. 
Exodus12:36 Ar onko okaṭakʼko khojketʼ onage emokʼ lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do misrikoakʼ monre Israelko cetanre dayae janam ocoketʼtakoa. Nonkate onko do misrikoakʼ aema jinisko ạidạriana. 
Exodus12:37 Ona tayom Israelko do Rameses khon Sukot secʼko mohnḍayena. Jotote turui lakh herel hoṛko taṛam idikeda. Onko sãote maejiuko ar gidrạko hõko tahẽkana. 
Exodus12:38 Israelko chaḍa arhõ aema hoṛ ar ḍaṅgrako-bhiḍiko sudhạ mitʼṭen maraṅ mĩhũ-merom palko hõ onko sãoteko tahẽkana. 
Exodus12:39 Oka bin khạmiyanakʼ sipiyakʼ holoṅ ḍhimbạ Misor disạm khonko ạgu daraletʼ onate horre piṭhạko benaokeda. Ar nunạkʼ usạra Misor khonko oḍok ocoyena, onko do holoṅ sãote khạmi mesal reakʼ somoe hõ bako ńamleda ar horre jom lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ hõ bako benao daṛeada." 
Exodus12:40 Misor disạmre Israel hoponko do jotote pon sae pegel bochorko tahẽkana. 
Exodus12:41 Ar pon sae pegel bochor mucạtʼen hilokʼge Probhu Isor do sanam hoṛko lạṛhại phạdko leka Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguketʼkoa. 
Exodus12:42 Probhu Isor do inạ ńindạge pahrakate Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼkote piṛhike piṛhi Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha disạite ona ńindạ do jagwargeko tahenkana. 
Exodus12:43 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ, “Bańcaokʼ porobre bheḍa hopon reaṅ iń do thoṛa niạm iń emaben kana. Eṭakʼ jãhãe jạtren hoṛ noa reakʼ jel do bako jom daṛeakʼa." 
Exodus12:44 Ṭakate kiriń akade golam do khatna tayom ona reakʼ jele jom daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus12:45 Ape talareko tahenkan seko hecʼakan se ṭakateko khaṭao ocokʼkan nonkan jãhãe jạtren hoṛ hõ ona do bako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus12:46 Oka oṛakʼre bheḍa hoponpe gurko ona oṛakʼrege ona do jom hoyokʼa. Oṛakʼ bahrete do alope idiya ar uni bheḍawakʼ mitʼṭen jaṅ hõ alope rạpudtaea. 
Exodus12:47 “Sanam Israelkoge noa porob do manao hoyokʼtakoa. 
Exodus12:48 Ape talareko tahenkan eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãege Probhu Isor ńutumteakʼ noa bańcaokʼ porobe manao enḍekhan lahare uniyakʼ gharońjren sanam herel hoṛ do khatnakʼ hoyokʼtakoa. Ona tayom do Israelko lekako manao daṛeakʼa. Menkhan bin khatna akan hoṛ do noa porob reakʼ jel do bako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus12:49 Israelko lạgitʼ ar ape talareko tahenkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼ hõ inạ mitʼ hukumge tahẽyena.” 
Exodus12:50 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron okaṭakʼe hukumatʼkin onkage Israelko doko kạmikeda. 
Exodus12:51 Ar Probhu Isor do ona dinge lạṛhại phạdko leka Misor disạm khon Israelkoe oḍok ạguketʼkoa. 
Exodus13:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus13:2 “Israelkoren mitʼke mitʼ pạhil koṛa hopon do iń ńutumtem begar dohokoa, onko modre baṅ doe manwakan ar baṅ doko janwarkan. Mitʼke mitʼ pạhil janamokʼ koṛa hopon doko ińren kana.”" 
Exodus13:3 Unre Mose do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Noa din reakʼ katha disại iạte noa dinpe manaoa, ente ape do niạ dinrege Misor reakʼ golam khonpe oḍok hecʼakana. Probhu Isorge acʼakʼ daṛeye udukʼketʼte ona disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼpea. Niạ dinre khạmi mesalakatʼ cetʼge alope joma." 
Exodus13:4 Ape do Abib cando reakʼ noa dinregepe oḍok hecʼakana. 
Exodus13:5 Probhu Isor do tinre Kananrenko, Hittirenko, Amorirenko, Hibiyạrenko ar Jebusirenkoakʼ disạmteye idipea unre ape do noa candorege bochor reakʼ porobpe porobokʼa. Noa kangea ona disạm do one okaṭakʼ Probhu Isor do ape emapea mente aperen hapṛamko ṭhene gokʼletʼ. Onḍe do toa, dumur rasa ar cetʼ jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼa." 
Exodus13:6 “Noa porob manao jokhecʼ eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma. Ar eae din hilokʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼpe porobokʼa. 
Exodus13:7 Niạ eae din apeakʼ jomakʼ piṭhạ do bin khạmiyanakʼ baṛe hoyokʼma. Enhilokʼ apeakʼ goṭa disạmre khạmi ar khạmi mesalakatʼ jãhãn cetʼ jomakʼge alope dohokakʼa. 
Exodus13:8 Enhilokʼ ape do aperen hoponkope metakoa, ‘Misor disạm khon tinreń oḍok hecʼlena unre Probhu Isor iń lạgitʼ okae cekaletʼ ona disạite noań onkayeda.’" 
Exodus13:9 Nonkate Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ noa hukum reakʼ kathape cetʼakoa. Noa niạm manao do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ hoyokʼa one ona do ti ar moloṅ reakʼ cinhạ lekae disạ ocopea, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛete Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼpea." 
Exodus13:10 Ape do bochorke bochor niṭakatʼ dinrege noa niạmpe palona. 
Exodus13:11 Ar Probhu Isor do ape ar aperen hapṛamko ṭhen kiriạkate okaṭakʼe gokʼakatʼ ona gokʼakʼ lekate tinre Kanan disạmte idikate ạidạri lekate onae emapea," 
Exodus13:12 unre ape hõ aperen mitʼke mitʼ pạhil hoponko do Probhu Isor ńutumtepe emokʼa. Janwarkoren mimitʼ pạhil hopon hõ Probhu Isorrenko hoyokʼa. 
Exodus13:13 Menkhan amren gadharen pạhil hoponko do mitʼṭen bheḍa se merom hopontem chaḍao hataokoa. Ar bape chaḍao hataoleko khan gadha hoponakʼ hoṭokʼpe rạpudtakoa. Ar ape do aperen mimitʼ pạhil hopon hõpe chaḍaokoa. 
Exodus13:14 “Ar jãhãtis aperen hoponko noa reakʼ manetetʼko kulilepere onkope lạiyakoa, ‘Probhu Isor do Misor reakʼ golam khon acʼakʼ daṛeteye oḍok ạguakatʼlea." 
Exodus13:15 Ar kạṭhuạ iạte Pharao do tinre bae hecʼ ocoale kan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do Misor disạmren hoṛ ar janwarkoren mimitʼ pạhil hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Onate ińren janwarkoren pạhil hopon do Probhu Isor ńutumteń dãṛẽyetʼkoa ar ińren pạhilicʼ hoponiń chaḍaoede kana. 
Exodus13:16 Noa do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ hoyokʼa oka do ti ar moloṅ reakʼ cinhạ lekae disạ ocomea, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛete Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguketʼbona.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Pharao do tinre Israelkoe bidạkatʼkoa unre Isor do Philisṭikoakʼ disạm talate sojhe hor tahẽkanre hõ ona horte do bae ạyurletʼkoa. Ente Isore menkeda ona disạm talate calakʼ jokhecʼ lạṛhại emanreko paṛaolen khan hoedaṛeakʼa onko do mon ạcurkate arhõ Misorteko ruạṛ botejokʼa. 
Exodus13:18 Onate Isor do hahaṅkar talate arakʼ jalapuri secʼe ạyur idiketʼkoa. Ar Israelko do lạṛhại phạd leka Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼena. 
Exodus13:19 Mose do Josephakʼ jaṅkoe soṅge torakeda, ente Joseph do Israelkoe kiriạ ocoletʼkoa. Uniye metatʼko tahẽkana, “Isor do khạṭigeye ńel todarotpea. Ar nonḍe khonpe oḍok calakʼre ińakʼ jaṅko hõ soṅgete iditorae tińpe.”" 
Exodus13:20 Niạ tayom onko do Sukot nagraha khon mohnḍakate hahaṅkar reakʼ Etamko metakʼ jaegareko ḍerayena. 
Exodus13:21 Probhu Isor do hore udukʼ idiyako lạgitʼ siń do mitʼṭecʼ rimil khunṭire ar ńindạ do marsal emokʼ lạgitʼ seṅgel khunṭire tahẽkate onko laha lahateye calakʼkan tahẽkana. Nonkate onko do siń ar ńindạ jao oktegeko sen daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus13:22 Siń do rimil khunṭi ar ńindạ do seṅgel khunṭi jao okte hoṛko samaṅre tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus14:1 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus14:2 “Israelkom metakoa jemonko ạcur calakʼte jalapuri ar Migdol tala reakʼ Pi-Hakirot ńutumanakʼ jaega ṭhenko ḍerakʼ. Ona jaega do jalapuri aṛe reakʼ Bakʼ al Sephon mohnḍa muhnḍirege menakʼa. 
Exodus14:3 Noa ńelte Pharao doe hudisa Israelko do bako ṭhik daṛeakʼkana cetʼko cekaea mente onko do disạmrege ạcur baṛaete hahaṅkarregeko aṭkao akana. 
Exodus14:4 Ar iń do Pharaoakʼ moniń keṭecʼ ocoytaea ar uni do onkoe khudạu idikoa. Menkhan Pharao ar uniren lạṛhại phạdkoge ińakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼren hoṛko hoyokʼa. Ar noa iạte Misorrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.” Ar Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekako kạmikeda." 
Exodus14:5 Misorren raj Pharao do tinreye lại ocoyena baṅma, Israelko doko dạṛkeda unre Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ mon do pheraoentakoa. Onkoko menkeda, “Noa do cetʼ bon cekakeda? Onko bidạkate aboren golam bon atʼketʼkoa.”" 
Exodus14:6 Noa menkate Pharao do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiko sapṛao lạgitʼe hukumkeda ar acʼren palṭonko jarwaketʼkote soṅgeteye idiketʼkoa. 
Exodus14:7 Uni do turui sae rãt gạḍikoe bachaoana, ar ona chaḍa misrikoakʼ eṭakʼ rãt gạḍiko hõe soṅge torakeda. Ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ rãt gạḍire mimitʼ goṭen senapotikoe dohoketʼkoa." 
Exodus14:8 Probhu do Misorren raj Pharaoakʼ mone keṭecʼ ocoketʼtaea. Ar Israelko dilkate samaṅ secʼko sen idikʼkan tahẽkanre uni do onkoe khudạu idiketʼkoa. 
Exodus14:9 Misorrenko do uniren sanam sadomko, aswariko ar palṭonkoante onkoko khudạu idiketʼkoa. Unre Israelko do jalapuri aṛe Bakʼal Sephonreko ḍera akan tahẽkana ar onko doko tiyokʼ ńõkʼ ocoakan tahẽkana." 
Exodus14:10 Ar Israelko do Pharao ar uniren dolko ako tayomte hijukʼkanko ńelketʼko khan ạḍiko botorena ar Probhu ṭhenko rakʼkeda. 
Exodus14:11 Onko do Moseko metadea, “Misorre do cetʼ topakʼ lạgitʼ jaega baṅ tahẽkante gocʼ giḍikale lạgitʼ noa hahaṅkar jaegatem ạgu akatʼlea? Misor khon oḍok ạgukate ale sãote noa do cetʼem cekakeda?" 
Exodus14:12 Misorre tahẽkanrege cetʼ bale metatʼme tahẽkana, ‘nonḍege tahẽocoaleme; ale do misrikoren golam akangele tahena’? Nonḍe noa hahaṅkarre gujukʼ khon golam akae tahenge ale lạgitʼ do bhage tahẽkana.”" 
Exodus14:13 Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Alope botorokʼa. Okare menakʼpe onḍege tahenpe ar Probhuakʼ bańcao reakʼ kạmi ńelpe. Uni do teheńge ape lạgitʼe onkaea. Okoe misrikope ńeletʼko onko do ar tisge bape ńelkoa." 
Exodus14:14 Ape do eken thir hape akae tahenpe. Probhuge aperen hoykateye lạṛhạiya.” 
Exodus14:15 Niạ tayom Probhu do Moseye metadea, “Am do cedakʼem rakʼeda? Israelko laha secʼ sen idikʼ metakom." 
Exodus14:16 Ar amakʼ ṭheṅga sabme ar jalapuri cetanre amakʼ ti tiạrtam ar jalapuri bar hạṭiń ocoyme. Ar onate Israelko do jalapuri talate rohoṛgeko taṛam parom daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus14:17 Menkhan iń do misrikoakʼ mon nonkań keṭecʼ ocoytakoa, onko do Israelkoko khudạu idikoa ar jalapuriteko bolokʼa. Onate Pharao ar uniren sanam palṭonko, rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko do ińakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼ reakʼko hoyokʼa." 
Exodus14:18 Ona ńelte misriko doko bujhạu daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Exodus14:19 Unre Isorren okoeṭakʼ goḍet do Israelko laha lahateye calakʼkan tahẽkan uni doe ạcurente onko tayom secʼe senena. Ar rimil khunṭi hõ onko samaṅ khon tayom secʼ ocokʼente Israelko ar misriko talare teṅgoyena. Onate misriko secʼ do ńutge ar Israelko secʼ do ńindạre hõ siń leka hoyena. Onkate misriko do goṭa ńindạ Israelko ṭhen bako hecʼsor daṛeada. 
Exodus14:20  
Exodus14:21 Tayomte Mose do jalapuri cetanre acʼakʼ tiye tiyạrketʼtaea; ar Probhu Isor do goṭa ńindạ mitʼṭecʼ purub reakʼ maraṅ hoeye ạguketʼte dakʼ doe bar hạṭiń ocokeda. Uni do dakʼe bar hạṭińketʼ khan jalapuri talate mitʼṭecʼ kuṭhạ̃ṛ hore tearkeda. 
Exodus14:22 Ar Israelko do jalapuri talate kuṭhạ̃ṛgeko parom calaoena. Ar jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do onko dene banar secʼ teṅgo tahẽyena. 
Exodus14:23 Noa ńelte misriko do tayom khon Israelkoko khudạu idiketʼkoa. Ar Pharaoren sadomko, rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko hõ onko tayom tayomte jalapuriteko boloyena." 
Exodus14:24 Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do rimil khunṭi ar seṅgel khunṭi khon misrikoren palṭonko secʼe beṅgetʼkeda ar onko talare mitʼṭecʼ ạulạ jhạulại hoyocokeda. 
Exodus14:25 Ona chaḍa uni do rãt gạḍiko reakʼ pạihạ̃ko hõe totʼgiḍikatʼ takoa; onate rãt gạḍi cakʼlao hoṛ do ạḍi kosṭo hoyen takoa. Unre misriko doko menkeda, “Dela, abo do Israelko bạgikate bon dạṛ joṅma, ente Probhu Isorge Israelko secʼ hoykate abo upạrteye lạṛhại kana.”" 
Exodus14:26 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Jalapuri cetanre amakʼ ti tiạrtam. Onate dakʼ do arhõ mitʼ ruạṛokʼte misriko cetanre, onkoakʼ rãt gạḍikore ar aswariko cetanre paṛaokʼa.”" 
Exodus14:27 Unre Mose do acʼakʼ ti jalapuri secʼe tiạrkeda. Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do arhõ mitʼ ruạṛena. Misriko do unreko ńir baṛakeda, menkhan Probhu Isor do jalapuri reakʼ ḍheoteye ḍombol idiketʼkoa." 
Exodus14:28 Jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do mitʼ ruạṛente rãt gạḍiko ar aswarikoakʼ, metakʼme Israelko tayomteko ńir hijukʼkan Pharaoren goṭa palṭon phạdkoe unum cabaketʼkoa. Onko do ar okoehõ jiwetʼ bako tahẽlena." 
Exodus14:29 Menkhan Israelko do tala horte kuṭhạ̃ṛgeko parom calaoena. Ar dakʼ do onko dene banar secʼ bhit leka teṅgo tahẽkana. 
Exodus14:30 Probhu Isor do enhilokʼ nonkage misrikoakʼ ti khon Israelkoe bańcaoketʼkoa. Ar Israelko do misrikoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko jalapuri aṛekoreko ńelkeda. 
Exodus14:31 Probhu Isor do misriko upạrte acʼakʼ oka daṛeye udukʼketʼ ona ńelte Israelko do monre mitʼṭen botor caṛhaoatʼkoa. Onko do Probhu Isor ar uniren golam Mose cetanre purạ biswạs dohokate calakʼko ehopʼena. 
Exodus15:1 Noa tayom Mose ar Israelko do Probhu Isor ńutumte noa sereńko sereńkeda: “Iń do Probhu Isor ńutumteń sereńa, ente hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼre uniyakʼ ṭhonok maraṅentaea. Sadom ar aswari dolrenko do unige jalapuri reakʼ dakʼreye giḍikatʼkoa." 
Exodus15:2 Probhu Isorge ińakʼ daṛe, unige ińakʼ sereń do; ińakʼ bańcao do unirege menakʼa. Probhuge ińren Isor do; uniyakʼgeń sarhao sereńa. Uni do iń ạpuńren Isor kanae; uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ iń sereńa." 
Exodus15:3 Uniyakʼ ńutum do Probhu Isorge, uni doe lạṛhại bir kana." 
Exodus15:4 Pharaoakʼ rãt gạḍiko ar palṭonko do unige jalapuri reakʼ dakʼreye giḍikatʼkoa; Pharaoren bachao akan palṭonko do arakʼ jalapurireko unum gocʼena. 
Exodus15:5 Onko do khạndri dakʼreko loṭomena dhiri leka jalapurireko tạpukʼena. 
Exodus15:6 “E Probhu Isor, ektiạrite perecʼ amakʼ ona jojom ti do, hẽ ona jojom ti do bạirikoe chaka chunketʼkoa." 
Exodus15:7 Okoe am upạrteko teṅgoyen amakʼ maraṅ ṭhonokte onko do latartem giḍikatʼkoa; ar amakʼ jal jalaokʼkan edre do busupʼ leka onkoe lo maraoketʼkoa. 
Exodus15:8 Amakʼ sãhetʼte dakʼ do jarwayena. Ar ḍheokote perecʼ dakʼ do ḍhipi leka teṅgoyena, ar athantar dakʼ do jalapurire jomaṭ badhaoena." 
Exodus15:9 “Bạiri doe menkeda, ‘onkoń khudạukoa, ariń sapʼkoa, ar onkoakʼ jiniskoń hạṭińjoṅa; iń do onkoakʼ jiniskote apnar iń perejokʼa. Ar tarwaṛe sapʼkate onkoń khudạukoa.’" 
Exodus15:10 Menkhan am dom oṅketʼte hoeyem ạgukeda, ar jalapuri hõ onkoe loṭomketʼkoa. Onko do khạndri dakʼre sisạ lekako tạpukʼena." 
Exodus15:11 “E Probhu Isor, Debko modre am leka do okoe menakʼkoa? Okoe menakʼkoa am leka sonot ar ṭhonokanicʼ ar sarhao sereńkore botoranicʼ do? Ar hahaṛawakʼ kạkʼmiyicʼ hõ okoeyakʼ menakʼtaea?" 
Exodus15:12 Am do amakʼ jojom tiyem tiạrketʼtama, ar dhạrti do onkoe utʼketʼkoa." 
Exodus15:13 Amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛtem chaḍao ạguketʼkoa ar amge onko dom ạyurkoa. Apnarakʼ daṛete amakʼ sonot oṛakʼre amgem ạyur ạgukoa. 
Exodus15:14 Ona katha ańjomkate eṭakʼ jạtrenko do botorteko thar tharaokʼa, ar Philisṭiko do monreko dhak dhakaokʼa." 
Exodus15:15 Edomren sordarko do botorteko keklesedokʼa; ar Moabren mukhiyạko doko thar tharaokʼa, ar botoranakʼ samaṅreko paṛaokʼte Kananrenko do dilko adtakoa. E Probhu Isor, amren hoṛkoakʼ sen joṅakʼ ạuri mucạdokʼ hạbicʼ, amren chaḍao akan hoṛkoakʼ sen joṅakʼ ạuri mucạdokʼ hạbicʼ amakʼ maraṅ daṛe samaṅre onko jạtrenko do dhiri lekako ńur tahena." 
Exodus15:16  
Exodus15:17 Amge amren hoṛko ạgukate poha leka amakʼ bururem rohoekoa. E Probhu Isor, am apnar tite benaoakʼ onage amakʼ tahen oṛakʼ do; E Probhu Isor, amakʼ tite benaoakʼ onage amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do;" 
Exodus15:18 E Probhu Isor, jaejug hạbicʼ amgem rajokʼa.”" 
Exodus15:19 Pharaoren sadomko, rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko tinre jalapurireko boloyena unre Probhu Isor do jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ onko cetanreye ạgu ruạṛkeda. Menkhan Israelko do jalapuri talate kuṭhạ̃ṛgeko taṛam paromena." 
Exodus15:20 Aronren miserat Mạriạm do mitʼṭen maejiu nạbigeye tahẽkana. Uni do toblae sapʼkeda, ar uni tayom tayomte eṭakʼ maejiuko hõ tobla sapʼkate enecʼ enecʼteko oḍok hecʼena." 
Exodus15:21 Moseyakʼ sereń reakʼ roṛ ruạṛre Mạriạm do noa sereńe sereńkeda; “Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe, ente hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼãhãre uniyakʼ ṭhonok do maraṅena. Sadomko ar aswariko do unige doreão dakʼreye khadleketʼkoa.”" 
Exodus15:22 Tayomte Mose do arakʼ jalapuri khon Israelkoe idiketʼkoa. Onko do pạhilre Sur ńutuman mitʼṭen hahaṅkar jaegareko seṭerena. Ona hahaṅkar jaegare onko do pe din hạbicʼ dãṛã dãṛãte okarehõ dakʼge bako ńamleda. 
Exodus15:23 Tayomte onko do Mara ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭen jaegareko seṭerena, menkhan onḍenakʼ dakʼ do haṛhatʼgete bako ńũ daṛeada. Onate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Marako dohokeda (metakʼme “haṛhatʼ ”)." 
Exodus15:24 Ar hoṛko do Mose upạrte karacʼ kurucʼenteko menkeda, “Ńitokʼ ńũi reakʼ dakʼ do okarele ńama?”" 
Exodus15:25 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do Probhu Isor ṭhene rakʼkeda. Uni do Mose mitʼṭen dareye udukʼadea. Mose do dakʼre ona dareye topoketʼ khan dakʼ do ńũi lek hoyena. Probhu Isor do onḍe biḍạureye paṛaoketʼkote onko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ niạm ar ạne bandhaokeda. 
Exodus15:26 Uni doe metatʼko tahẽkana, “Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kathape bataotaea ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼre oka lek reakʼ kan onape onkaea ar uniyakʼ hukumkope luturakʼa ar uni emakʼ sanam niạmpe dohoya, enḍekhan Misriko cetanre okako rog iń ạguletʼ ape cetanre ona bạń ạguya. Ar iń Probhu Isorge ape doń bogepea.”" 
Exodus15:27 Niạ tayom onko do Elimko metakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaega ṭhenko seṭerena. Onḍe do gelbar goṭecʼ dakʼ jharna ar eae goṭecʼ khijur dare tahẽkana. Ona dakʼ jharna sorrege onko doko ḍerayena. 
Exodus16:1 Israelko do Elim khon arhõ uṭhạuente calakʼko ehopʼena. Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼen tayom dosar cando reakʼ gelmõṛẽ din hilokʼ onko do Sin reakʼ hahaṅkar ṭoṭhareko seṭerena. Noa jaega do Elim ar Sinại buru talare tahẽkana. 
Exodus16:2 Sin hahaṅkar ṭoṭhare Israelkoren goṭa dolrenkoge Mose ar Aron upạrteko karacʼ kurucʼena ar aema kathako roṛkeda. 
Exodus16:3 Onkoko menkeda, “Misor disạmre Probhu Isorakʼ tire cedakʼ baṅ bale gocʼ ocolen. Onḍe do jel reakʼ ṭukucʼ samaṅre dohokate lacʼ bikʼ piṭhạ ar jel le jometʼ tahẽkana. Aben do begor jomte gocʼ ocole lạgitʼ noa hahaṅkarte ben ạguakatʼlea.”" 
Exodus16:4 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Iń do serma khon jạṛi dakʼ leka jomakʼ iń ńur ocoya. Ar hoṛko do dinạm hilokʼ bahrete senkate enhilokʼ reakʼ jomakʼko halaṅ joṅa. Ar ińakʼ hukum lekako senokʼa se baṅ ona reaṅ iń biḍạukoa." 
Exodus16:5 Hapta reakʼ turuiyakʼ dinre jemon din hilokʼ reakʼ dobṛa halaṅkate jomakʼko benaojoṅ.” 
Exodus16:6 Unre Mose ar Aron do sanam Israelkin metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor upạrte okako kathape menakatʼ uni do onae ańjomakatʼte teheń ạyupʼgepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, Probhu Isorge Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼpea ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok do gapa setakʼ khangepe ńela. Ar ạliń doliń celekante, ạliń upạrte nunạkʼ kathape roṛeda?”" 
Exodus16:7  
Exodus16:8 Mose do arhõe menkeda, “Ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do tinre jele emapea ar setakʼre piṭhạ unrepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, Probhu Isorge Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼpea. Uni upạrte tinạkʼ kathape roṛakatʼ uni do jotogeye ańjom akada. Ar ạliń doliń celekana? Noako katha do ạliń upạrte do baṅ, menkhan Probhu Isor upạrtegepe roṛakada.”" 
Exodus16:9 Ona tayom Mose do sanam Israelko samaṅre Aron noa katha roṛ lạgitʼe metadea, “Probhu Isor do acʼ upạrte apeakʼ aema kathae ańjomakada, ar onate uni samaṅre calakʼpe.”" 
Exodus16:10 Aron do tinre Israelko sãote kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre onko do hahaṅkar secʼko beṅgetʼketʼ khan, onḍe rimilre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokko ńelkeda." 
Exodus16:11 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus16:12 “Israelko iń upạrte okako kathako roṛakatʼ ona doń ańjom akada. Onko do noa katha lạiyakome, ạyupʼ jokhecʼ onko do jelko joma ar setakʼ do lacʼ bikʼ piṭhạko joma. Ar nonkateko baḍae daṛeakʼa, onkoren Probhu Isor doń ińkangea mente.”" 
Exodus16:13 Ado ạyupʼ jokhecʼ ạḍi utạr gunḍri cẽṛẽko rakapʼ hecʼente onkoakʼ ḍera ṭhạ̃iko perecʼ cabakeda. Ar setakʼ do ḍera beṛhaete sisir ńurakan tahẽkana. 
Exodus16:14 Ar tinre ona sisir hawetʼena unre otre hako cũyạ̃kʼ leka ńelena. Ona do ńelokʼte rataṅ leka ńur akan tahẽkana. 
Exodus16:15 Ona ńelte Israelko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Onako do cetʼ kana?” Ar cetʼkana mente ona do bako baḍae daṛeada. Unre Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Noa do ona piṭhạ kana oka do Probhu Isor jom lạgitʼe emakatʼpe." 
Exodus16:16 Probhu Isor do noa hukume emakatʼpea, mimitʼko jemon gharońj reakʼ jạruṛokʼ lekako halaṅ joṅ. Tạmburen mimitʼko lạgitʼ mitʼ Omor kate (bar liṭar gan) jemonko halaṅ joṅ.”" 
Exodus16:17 Ar Israelko doko onkakeda. Adomko do ḍherko halaṅkeda, ar adomko do thoṛako halaṅkeda." 
Exodus16:18 Menkhan Omor reakʼ ojonte onako soṅketʼ khan okoe ḍherko halaṅketʼ onko do baṅ bạ̃ṛtilentakoa ar okoe thoṛako halaṅketʼ onko hõ baṅ komaolentakoa. Mimitʼkoge gharońj reakʼ jạruṛokʼ lekako halaṅkeda. 
Exodus16:19 Ona tayom Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Setakʼ lạgitʼ do alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa.”" 
Exodus16:20 Menkhan adomko do Moseyakʼ katha bako ańjomletʼte setakʼ lạgitʼ thoṛako dohokada. Onate ona doko tejokeda ar soyena. Noa ńelte Mose do onko cetanre ạḍiye edreyena. 
Exodus16:21 Ar hoṛko do din hilokʼ setakʼre gharońj reakʼ jạruṛokʼ lekako halaṅ joṅkan tahẽkana. Menkhan setoṅ sạrdi idikʼ sãote onako do lekʼkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus16:22 Hapta reakʼ turui din hilokʼ onko do dobṛakate, metakʼme bar Omorkate mimitʼko lạgitʼko halaṅkeda, ar Israelkoren mukhiyạko do ona katha Moseko lạiyadea." 
Exodus16:23 Unre Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Noa do Probhu Isorakʼ katha kangea. Gapa do jirạukʼ mãhã kana, ar Probhu Isor kangeae sonot jirạukʼ mãhã do. Onate tinạkʼpe rapakʼ daṛeakʼ ar tinạkʼpe teke daṛeakʼ ona do onkaepe; ar sarecʼakʼ do dosar hilokʼ lạgitʼ dohokakʼpe.”" 
Exodus16:24 Moseyakʼ hukum lekage onko do setakʼ lạgitʼ sarecʼakʼ hạṭiń doko dohokada. Ar enhilokʼ ona do baṅ so lena, ar tejo hõ bako tejoleda." 
Exodus16:25 Mose do unreye menkeda, “Teheń do onakoge jompe ente teheń do Probhu Isore niṭakatʼ jirạukʼ mãhã kana. Teheń ape do onako ṭạnḍire bape ńel ńama." 
Exodus16:26 Ape do hapta reakʼ turui din onape halaṅa menkhan eaeyakʼ dinre do bape ńama, ente ona din do jirạukʼ din kana.”" 
Exodus16:27 Enhõ eae din hilokʼ thoṛa hoṛ do ona halaṅ lạgitʼ bahreteko senena, menkhan cetʼge bako ńamleda." 
Exodus16:28 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Ar tinạkʼ din ape do ińakʼ hukum ar ińakʼ solhako bape manaoa?" 
Exodus16:29 Ńelpe, ape lạgitʼ jirạukʼ mãhã reakʼ noa bondobos do Probhu Isorgeye dohoakada. Onate turui mãhã hilokʼ uni do bar din reakʼ jomakʼe jogao ape kana. Ar eae mãhã hilokʼ do okoe hõ oṛakʼ bahrete alope oḍokokʼa, bhitrirege tahenpe.”" 
Exodus16:30 Onatege hoṛko do eae hilokʼko jirạuena. 
Exodus16:31 Israelkoakʼ ona jomakʼ do Mannako metakʼkan tahẽkana (metakʼme “Onako do cetʼ kana?”). Noako do ńelokʼte dhạniạ jaṅ leka ponḍge tahẽkana; ar ona reakʼ sebel do dumur rasa piṭhạ leka. 
Exodus16:32 Tayomte Moseye menkeda, “Probhu Isore hukum akada aperen bõsko lạgitʼ mitʼ Omorkate Manna pe rakapʼ dohokakʼa, jemon onkoko ńel daṛeakʼ Probhu Isor do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạgupe tayom hahaṅkarre cetʼ lekan jomakʼe ematʼpe tahẽkana mente.”" 
Exodus16:33 Mose do Arone metadea, “Am do mitʼṭecʼ dohowakʼre mitʼ Omorkate Manna hataokate Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoyme jemon piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ ona do tahen.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ar Manna jemon piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ doho akan tahen ona lạgitʼ Aron do Moseye emakawade Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka gohawakʼ samaṅreye dohokada. 
Exodus16:35 Hoṛko girobas akan nonkan mitʼṭecʼ jaegare, metakʼme Kanan disạm reakʼ simạnate ạuriko hijukʼ hạbicʼ Israelko do pongel bochor hạbicʼ ona Mannako jomkeda." 
Exodus16:36 Mitʼ Omor soṅakʼ do hoyokʼ kana mitʼ keji irạlsae gram. 
Exodus17:1 Ado Probhu Isorakʼ hukumleka Israelko do Sin hahaṅkar ṭoṭha khonko uṭhạuente mitʼ jaega khon armitʼ jaegate calakʼ calakʼte mucạtʼre Rephidimreko ḍerayena. Menkhan onḍe do ńũi reakʼ dakʼ baṅ tahẽkana. 
Exodus17:2 Onate onko do Mose tulucʼ jhogṛayenteko metadea, “Ńũi lạgitʼ dakʼ emaleme.” Moseye metatʼkoa, “Iń tulucʼ do cedakʼpe jhogṛakʼ kana, ar Probhu Isor do cedakʼpe biḍạu aṭkarede kana?”" 
Exodus17:3 Menkhan hoṛko do dakʼ tetaṅ iạte Mose upạrteko karacʼ kurucʼena arko menkeda, “Dakʼ reakʼ ṭonṭate jemon nonḍele gujukʼ ona lạgitʼge cetʼ ale ar aleren hoponko ar hoponerako ar aleren ạsul janwarko Misor khonem ạguakatʼlea?”" 
Exodus17:4 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼketʼteye menkeda, “Iń do noko hoṛko iạte cetʼ iń cekaea? Ar thoṛa khange onko do dhiriteko tińińa.”" 
Exodus17:5 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, Israelkoren adom murubbiko soṅgekate hoṛko lahate calakʼpe. Ar oka ṭheṅgate nil gaḍa reakʼ dakʼem dalletʼ ona hataokate laha idikʼme." 
Exodus17:6 Ona tayom iń do Horeb buru ṭhen am samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ dhiri cetanreń teṅgona. Am do ona dhirim dala ar onate hoṛko lạgitʼ onḍe khon dakʼ oḍokokʼa.” Ar Mose do Israelkoren murubbiko samaṅreye onkakeda. 
Exodus17:7 Hoṛko noa Rephidimreko jhogṛalente ar noako roṛletʼte, “Probhu Isor do abo sãore menaea, se baṅa?” Ona iạte Mose do noa jaega reakʼ ńutum Masa (metakʼme “biḍạu”) ar Meriba (metakʼme “jhogṛae”) dohokeda." 
Exodus17:8 Niạ oktere Amalekikoren palṭonko do Israelko tulucʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼ Rephidimreko jarwayena. 
Exodus17:9 Unre Mose do Josuại metadea, “Am do aboren hoṛko bachaokate Amalekiko upạrte lạṛhại calakʼme. Ar iń do gapage Isorakʼ ona ṭheṅga hataokate buru muthnireń teṅgona.”" 
Exodus17:10 Josuạ do Mose okalekae metade tahẽkan onkageye kạmikeda. Uni do Amalekiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok senena. Ar Mose, Aron ar Hur do ona buru muthniteko rakapʼena." 
Exodus17:11 Ar lạṛhại jokhecʼ Mose do tin hạbicʼ acʼakʼ tiye tul dohokakʼkan tahẽkan unhạbicʼ Israelkoko jitạukʼkan tahẽkana; Arhõ tinre tiye pheḍetʼtae tahẽkana unre do Amalekikoko jitạukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus17:12 Nonkate Moseyakʼ ti do laṅga idiyentaea. Unre unkin do mitʼṭecʼ dhirikin ạgukeda, ar Mose do ona cetanreye duṛupʼena. Ar Aron ar Hur do banar secʼ khon uniyakʼ tikin tul akatʼtae tahẽkana. Onate siń cando ạuriye hạsurokʼ dhạbicʼ uniyakʼ tikin do onkage taheyena." 
Exodus17:13 Onate Josuạ do Amlekiko lạṛhạiteye bhagaoketʼkoa. 
Exodus17:14 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Noa lạṛhại reakʼ katha disạ dohoy lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ puthire ol dohokakʼme ar Josuạ metaeme, iń do dhạrti khon Amalekikoakʼ ńutumiń mohor meṭaotakoa.”" 
Exodus17:15 Tayomte Mose do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benaokate ona reakʼ ńutum do Jehowa-nisiye (metakʼme “Probhu Isorge ińakʼ jhạnḍi”) dohokeda. 
Exodus17:16 Moseye menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ siṅghạson upạrte ti rakapʼ hoyakana, ona iạte piṛhike piṛhi Probhu Isor do Amalekiko birudreye tahena.”" 
Exodus18:1 Isor do acʼren hoṛ Israelko ar Mose lạgitʼ okae ceka akatʼ ona jotowakʼge Moseren hońhartetʼ Midionren naeke Jethrowakʼ luturre senakan tahẽkana. Ar Mose okalekate Misor disạm khon Israelkoe oḍok ạguketʼko ona hõe ańjomkeda. 
Exodus18:2 Mose do acʼren bạhu Sipora Misor disạm khone kolledea, ar Jethro hõ uni ar uniren banar hopon acʼ ṭhene doholetʼkinạ. Moseye menleda, “Iń do eṭakʼ disạmre porjạt iń hoyakana;” Ona iạte acʼren maraṅicʼ hopon do Gersone ńutumkedea." 
Exodus18:3  
Exodus18:4 Ar eṭakʼicʼ hopon do Eliasere ńutumledea (metakʼme “Isorge ińren gokʼṛoyicʼ ”) ente uniye menleda, “Iń babaren Isorgeye goṛo akawạdińạ. Ar unige lạṛhạire Pharaoakʼ ti khone bańcao akadińạ.”" 
Exodus18:5 Isorakʼ buru ṭhen Mose oka hahaṅkarre tạmbu ṭaṅgaokateye ḍeralen onḍege uniren bạhu ar hoponkin soṅgekate hońhartetʼ Jethro doe seṭerena. 
Exodus18:6 Noa lahare uni do Moseye roṛ gotʼade tahẽkana, “Ạliń do abenren hõńharben Jethro kana liń. Abenren bạhu ar abenren hoponkin soṅgekate aben ṭhen liń hijukʼkana.”" 
Exodus18:7 Khobor ańjomkate Mose do acʼren hońhartetʼ sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena. Uni do hońhartetʼe ḍobokʼadea are cokʼadea. Ar boge judạkin kuliyante tạmbu bhitriteye aderkedea. 
Exodus18:8 Probhu Isor do Israelko secʼ tahẽkate Pharao ar Misriko cetanre okae cekaketʼ ona jotowakʼ hońhartetʼe baḍae ocokedea. Ar calakʼ horre akoakʼ kosṭo reakʼ katha ar Isor cetʼlekae bańcaoketʼko ona hõe baḍae ocokedea. 
Exodus18:9 Misrikoakʼ ti khon Israelko bańcaoko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor okae bhạlạiyketʼko onate Jethro do rạskạteye menkeda, “Bhạgangeae Probhu Isor do, one okoe Pharao ar Misrikoakʼ ti khon apeye bańcao akatʼpe! Noko hoṛko do unige misrikoakʼ ti khone bańcao akatʼkoa." 
Exodus18:10  
Exodus18:11 Onate ńit iń bujhạ daṛeakʼ kana, joto debotako khon Probhu Isorgeye maraṅa, ente debotako okako reaṅ Israelko upạrteko gorobokʼkan tahẽkan onako babotre Probhu Isorgeye maraṅa.”" 
Exodus18:12 Inạ tayom Jethro do Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ dãṛẽko lạgitʼ janwarkoe ạguketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom Aron ar Israelren sanam murubbiko do Isor samaṅre Moseren hońhartetʼ sãote jojomko duṛupʼena. 
Exodus18:13 Dosar hilokʼ Mose do hoṛko bicạrkatako lạgitʼe duṛupʼena. Ar hoṛko do setakʼ khon ạyupʼ hạbicʼ Mose samaṅre teṅgo akanko tahẽyena. 
Exodus18:14 Hoṛko sãote Mose nonkae ńelkede khan acʼren hońhartetʼe menkeda, “Aben do hoṛko sãote noa do cetʼ ben ceka kana? Aben do cedakʼ eskar doben bicạreda, ar cedakʼ hoṛko do setakʼ khon ạyupʼ hạbicʼ aben beṛhaeteko teṅgo akana?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mose do hońhartetʼe roṛ ruạṛadea, “Isorakʼ sana baḍae lạgitʼge hoṛko do ạliń ṭhenko hijukʼ kana." 
Exodus18:16 Ar jãhãn jhogṛa jhạṭi rakapʼ lenkhange onko do ạliń ṭhenko hijukʼa ar ạliń doliń bicạr chinḍạu katako kana, ar Isorakʼ niạm ar hukumko liń bujhạu akokana.”" 
Exodus18:17 Unre Moseren hońhartetʼe menkeda, “Aben okaben cekayetʼ ona ạḍi baben bhageyeda." 
Exodus18:18 Onate aben ar abenren hoṛko khạṭigeko laṅga cabakʼa. Kạmi do nunạkʼ hamalgea, aben eskarte ona do baben daṛeakʼa." 
Exodus18:19 Ńitokʼ ạlińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ solha ańjom ben, onate Isor hõ aben sãoteye tahena. Aben do bickom Isor ṭhen hoṛkoren bachaoicʼ lekate hoṛkoakʼ jhogṛa jhạṭi do Isor samaṅre idiyben." 
Exodus18:20 Ona tayom do sanam niạm ar hukumko reaṅ ben husiạrkoa. Ona chaḍa cetʼleka calakʼ hoyokʼa ar cetʼkoko kạmiya ona hõ ben bujhạuakoa. 
Exodus18:21 Ona tayom sanam hoṛko tala khon nonkan lekman hoṛ ben bachaokoa okoe do Isorko batorae ar sạriyakʼreko tahenkan ar behokakʼko hirkhạwakʼ kan. Onkoge aben do mukhiyạ lekate ben bahalkoa, adom do hajarko cetanre, adom do saeko cetanre, adomko do mõṛẽgelko cetanre ar adomko do gelko cetanre." 
Exodus18:22 Noko do jao ghuṛi hoṛkoakʼko bicạrtakoa. Ar noko do huḍińakʼko reakʼko bicạra ar maraṅakʼ bicạrko do aben ṭhenko ạguiya. Nonkate abenakʼ kạmi do rawalokʼtabena ente onko hõ thoṛa bojhako gokʼ goṛowabena. 
Exodus18:23 Isorakʼ hukum ńamkate ben nonkae khan enḍekhan noa kạmi hõ rawalokʼ tabena ar hoṛko hõ sulukte apan ạpin ṭhạ̃iteko ruạṛ daṛeakʼa.” 
Exodus18:24 Mose do acʼren hońhartetʼakʼ solhae ańjomketʼtaea ar uni okae metade onageye kạmikeda. 
Exodus18:25 Uni do sanam Israelko tala khon lekman hoṛkoe bachaoketʼkote mukhiyạko lekateye bahalketʼkoa- adomko do hajarko cetanre, adomko do saeko cetanre, adomko do mõṛẽgelko cetanre ar adomko do gelko cetanre." 
Exodus18:26 Onko do jao ghuṛi hoṛkoakʼko bicạretʼkan tahẽkana. Ar muskilakʼ bicạrko do Mose ṭhenko ạguyetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan huḍińakʼ bicạrko do akogeko bicạr chinḍạuetʼtako tahẽkana." 
Exodus18:27 Tayomte Mose do acʼren hońhortetʼe bidạkadea ar uni do acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Exodus19:1 Misor disạm khon oḍok hecʼen tayom tesar cando Israelko do Sinại hahaṅkarreko seṭerena.
