Exodus19:2 Onko do Rephidim bạgikate Sinại buru samaṅre Sinại hahaṅkarreko ḍerayena. 
Exodus19:3 Mose do burute Isor ṭhene rakapʼena. Ona jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do buru cetan khon hohoadeteye menkeda, “Am do Jakob bõsren Israelkom metakoa," 
Exodus19:4 Onko do apnar mẽtʼtegeko ńelakada, misrikoń cetʼleka letʼkoa mente. Pajhạṛ cẽṛẽ cetʼleka phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼteye idiko onkage iń do Israelko iń ṭheniń ạgu akatʼkoa." 
Exodus19:5 Onate ińakʼ kathako dohoy ar ińakʼ bondobos lekako calakʼ enḍekhan dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko khon onkoge ińren bises sompottiko hoyokʼa, ente dhạrtiren sanam hoṛge ińakʼ ạidạrire menakʼkoa." 
Exodus19:6 Ińren hoṛko hotetege ińren naekekoakʼ rajosṭi do hoyokʼa ar noko jạtrenkoge iń ńutumteń begar akatʼko jạtrenko hoyokʼa. Noa katha do Israelkom baḍae ocokoa.” 
Exodus19:7 Unre Mose do pheḍkate Israelkoren murubbiko mitʼ ṭhene hoho jarwaketʼkoa ar Probhu Isor okako kathae metade tahẽkan ona jotogeye lạiyatʼkoa. 
Exodus19:8 Noa katha ańjomkate hoṛko do mitʼ domteko menkeda, “Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe menakatʼ ale do jotogele onkaea.” Ar hoṛko okako menketʼ Mose do ona Probhu Isore baḍae ocokedea." 
Exodus19:9 Niạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am sãote tinre kathań roṛa unre jemon hoṛko onako ańjom daṛeakʼ onate iń do mitʼṭen rimil tala khon ape ṭheniń hijukʼa. Enḍekhan hoṛko do jao ghuṛi am cetanre purạ biswạsko dohoya.” Ar hoṛko okako menketʼ Mose do ona Probhu Isore lạiyadea." 
Exodus19:10 Probhu Isor do Mose arhõe metadea, “Teheń ar gapa niạ bar din do hoṛko ṭhen senkate onkom saphakoa. Onko do jemon akoakʼ kicricʼ hõko saphaetako ar tesar hilokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛao akanko tahen, ente tesar hilokʼ iń Probhu Isor do sanam hoṛko samaṅre sinại burureń pheḍ hijukʼa." 
Exodus19:11  
Exodus19:12 Hoṛko lạgitʼ buru goṭa beṛhaete am do mitʼṭecʼ simạnam ṭhik dohokakʼa arem sontorkoa, jemon buru cetante aloko rakabokʼ se buruhõ aloko joṭed. Ar okoe ona burui joṭeda uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Exodus19:13 Ar uniyakʼ hoṛmore ti tul baṅkate dhirite tiń goje hoyokʼa ar baṅkhan ạ̃pạ̃ṛite tuń goje hoyokʼa. Manwa se ḍaṅgra uni do jiwetʼ baṅ dohoye hoyokʼa. Eken sakwa oroṅ tayom onko do buru ṭhenko hecʼ daṛeakʼa.” 
Exodus19:14 Inạ tayom Mose do buru khon pheḍ hecʼkate hoṛkoe sapha ocoketʼkoa ar hoṛko hõ akoakʼ kicricʼko saphaketʼtakoa. 
Exodus19:15 Ona tayom Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Tesar hilokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe. Ar niạ oktre okoe hõ aperen bạhu tulucʼ do alope giticʼmidokʼa.”" 
Exodus19:16 Ado tesar hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ huḍur ar bijli malkaokʼ ehopʼena ar buru cetanre mitʼṭecʼ hende rimil ńelena. Ona chaḍa ạḍi murukte sakwa saḍeyena. Noako ńel ar ańjomte ḍeraren sanam hoṛ doko thar tharaoena. 
Exodus19:17 Unre Isor samaṅre senokʼ lạgitʼ Mose do ḍera khon hoṛkoe oḍok idiketʼkoa. Ar hoṛko do buru ṭhen senkateko teṅgoyena. 
Exodus19:18 Ona tayom Sinại buru do dhũạte esetʼena, ente Probhu Isor do burure seṅgel tala khone pheḍ hecʼena. Bhaṭa khon cetʼleka dhũạ rakabokʼ ṭhik onkage rakabokʼ ehopʼena goṭa buru do dal dalaoena." 
Exodus19:19 Ar sakwa reakʼ saḍe do arhõ murukte saḍekʼ ehopʼena. Unre Mose do Isor sãote kathae roṛkeda ar Isor hõ ãṭ aṛaṅteye roṛ ruạṛadea. 
Exodus19:20 Probhu Isor do Sinại buru coṭreye pheḍ hecʼente Moseye hohoadea ar Mose do buru coṭteye rakapʼena. 
Exodus19:21 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do latarte senkate hoṛkom sontorkoa jemon Probhu Isor ńele lạgitʼ simạna aloko parom. Arko onka lekhan ḍher hoṛgeko gujukʼa." 
Exodus19:22 Ar Probhu Isor ṭhenko sorokʼkan naekeko hõko saphakʼma. Ar bako saphakʼ khan Probhu Isor do kajak sạjạiye emakoa.” 
Exodus19:23 Mose do Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Menkhan hoṛko do Sinại buru cetante bako hecʼ daṛeakʼa. Amge coṅ ale mam sontor akatʼle, jemon buru beṛhaete simạnakoń bandhaote am lạgitʼ iń begar dohokakʼ.”" 
Exodus19:24 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do latarte pheḍokʼme. Ona tayom am ar Aron do arhõ cetante rakapʼ hijukʼ ben. Menkhan naekeko ar hoṛko do simạna paromkate iń ṭhen jemon aloko rakapʼ hijukʼ. Arko hijukʼ khan iń do ạḍi bạṛicʼ iń sạjạikoa.”" 
Exodus19:25 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do latarteye pheḍ hecʼente hoṛko sanamakʼe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Exodus20:1 Inạ tayom Isore menkeda," 
Exodus20:2 “E Israelko, ińge amren Probhu Isor do. Misor disạm khon golam oṛakʼ khon ińgeń oḍok ạguakatʼmea." 
Exodus20:3 “Iń samaṅre eṭakʼ Isorko aloko tahentam ma. 
Exodus20:4 “Sekʼwae lạgitʼ jãhãn muṭhạnko alom benao joṅa, baṅ do coṭ sermarenko reakʼ baṅ do otrenko reakʼ baṅ do ot latar dakʼrenko reakʼ." 
Exodus20:5 Onako do alom ḍobokʼakʼa, ar sewa hõ alom sewawakʼa, ente iń Probhuge amren Isor do. Iń do ińakʼ paona bhoktiń khojkana. Okoeko kurudạń onkoakʼ kại reakʼ sạjại do onkoren hoponko ṭhen pe pon piṛhi hạbicʼ iń pańja halawako kana." 
Exodus20:6 Menkhan okoe ińko dulạṛiń ar ińakʼ hukum lekako calakʼ, onko do hajar piṛhi hạbicʼ iń dayawakoa." 
Exodus20:7 “Amren Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum ạuṛi pạthạuṛi do alom ńumtaea. Ente okoeye onkae Probhu Isor do uniye sạjạiyea. 
Exodus20:8 “Jirạukʼ mãhã disạime jemon onam sonot. 
Exodus20:9 Hapta reakʼ turui mãhãm khaṭaokʼa ar amakʼ jotowakʼem kạmiya," 
Exodus20:10 menkhan eae din hilokʼ do amren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jirạukʼ din kana. Enhilokʼ do, am ar amren hoponko ar hoponerako, amren guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩko, amren ḍaṅgrako, amren gadhako se eṭakʼ jãhãn janwarko se amakʼ ato se nagrahare girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko, okoe hõ cetʼge alope kạmiya." 
Exodus20:11 Probhu Isor do turui dinre serma ar ot ar jalapuri ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼe sirjạukeda, menkhan eae din hilokʼ doe jirạuena. Ona iạte Probhu Isor do ona dine bhoratʼa ar acʼ lạgitʼe begar dohokada." 
Exodus20:12 “Amren gogo ar baba ganaokinme. Enḍekhan Probhu Isore emam disạmre ḍher din jiwetʼem tahena. 
Exodus20:13 “Alom khũna. 
Exodus20:14 “Alom laṭghaṭa. 
Exodus20:15 “Alom kombṛoya. 
Exodus20:16 “Okoe upạrte hõ eṛe goha alom ema. 
Exodus20:17 “Eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ oṛakʼ duạr, se bạhutae, se gutitae se kạ̃ṛmĩtae, se ḍaṅgratae se gadhatae ar jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alom lalocakʼa.”" 
Exodus20:18 Israelko do tinre bijli malkaokʼ ar buru khon dhũạ rakabokʼko ńelkeda ar huḍur ar sakwa reakʼ saḍeko ańjomkeda unre onko do sạṅgińre teṅgokate thar tharokʼko ehopʼena. 
Exodus20:19 Onko do Moseko metadea, “Ale tulucʼ katha roṛme, ale dole ańjoma; menkhan Isor ale tulucʼe roṛle khan ale dole gujukʼa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Unre Mose do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Alope botorokʼa. Isor do biḍạureye paṛao ocoakatʼpea jemon apeakʼ monre botor tahente alope kại. Ar ona iạtege uni doe hecʼakana.”" 
Exodus20:21 Hoṛko do sạṅgińreko teṅgo tahẽyena ar Mose do Isor ṭhen ona dhund rimil secʼe rakapʼ calaoena. 
Exodus20:22 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do Israelko noa katham lạiyakoa, ‘iń Probhu Isor do serma khon ape sãote okań roṛketʼ ona do apnarakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńelkeda." 
Exodus20:23 Onate jãhãnakʼ benaokate sewawakʼ lạgitʼ iń sãote alope teṅgoea. Sona se rupạte ape lạgitʼ jãhãn Isorko alope benaojoṅa. 
Exodus20:24 Ape do iń lạgitʼ hasa reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benaope, ar ona cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ dãṛẽ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ ḍaṅgra, merom ar bheḍa samaṅkope. Ar okako ṭhạ̃ire ińakʼ ńutum disại lạgitʼ iń bondobos ona jaegare hecʼkate apeń bhorapea." 
Exodus20:25 Dhirite iń lạgitʼ jãhãn pinḍpe benaore ona dhiri do alope rokʼ-khodaoa. Ona cetanre hạtiạrpe epelle khan ona dope bhõnḍa. 
Exodus20:26 Ińakʼ pinḍ do nonkape benaoa jemon onare siṛhite rakabokʼ alo hoyokʼtape, ente siṛhite rakabokʼ jokhecʼ apeakʼ uluṅ do sodorokʼa.’ ”" 
Exodus21:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Ińakʼ noako niạm do Israelkom samaṅakoa." 
Exodus21:2 “Golam lekate jãhãe Ibri hoṛpe kirińle khan, uni do turui bochor ape tabereye kạmiya, menkhan eae bochorre uni ṭhen khon jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope hataoa uni do sạdhintepe sen ocoaya." 
Exodus21:3 Uni do eskarge ape ṭhene tahẽlen khan eskargeye calakʼa, menkhan acʼren bạhui ạgu daralede khan uniren bạhu hõ uni sãote calao ocoae hoyokʼa." 
Exodus21:4 Ar uni guti acʼren kisạ̃ṛgeye bạhuae khan ar uniren gidrạko janamlentae khan enḍekhan uniren bạhu ar gidrạko do kisạ̃ṛrengeko hoyokʼa; ar uni do eskargeye oḍok calakʼa. 
Exodus21:5 Menkhan uni guti saphateye lại, uni do acʼren kisạ̃ṛ, ar acʼren bạhu ar gidrạkoe dulạṛetʼkoa, ar onko bạgiyako reakʼ jãhãn monsubạ bạnukʼtaea," 
Exodus21:6 enḍekhan uniren kisạ̃ṛ do Isor ṭhene ạguyea. Ar ona tayom do duạr se duạr ganade ṭhen idikate sạlạkte luture pạṭi bhugạgtaea. Onate uni do goṭa jion acʼren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen golam akane tahena. 
Exodus21:7 “Jãhãege acʼren hoponera golamini lekateye ạkhrińle khan, enḍekhan uni kuṛi do golamkoko oḍok calakʼ leka do bae oḍok calakʼa." 
Exodus21:8 Kisạ̃ṛtae uniye bebạsutae khan, one uni hataoe lạgitʼe niṭlede, enḍekhan uni kuṛi do dam sodkate chaḍaokʼ reakʼ hoke emaea; eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen ạkhrińe reakʼ ektiạri do bạnukʼtaea, uni tulucʼ bepạtiạre kạmi akatʼte." 
Exodus21:9 Menkhan kisạ̃ṛ do acʼren hopon lạgitʼ kusite uniye idiakade khan tobe do acʼren hoponera leka joto ạidạri emae hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus21:10 Kisạ̃ṛ do kạ̃ṛmĩye baplaye tayom eṭakʼ jãhãeye baplalekore hõ enhõ uni kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ jom-ńũ ar kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ reakʼ khoroc do emokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar juri-pạri reakʼ hok hõ emae hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus21:11 Onako pea bae purạu daṛeatae khan uni kuṛi do emnetegeye oḍok calao daṛeakʼa jãhãn ṭaka poesa baṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus21:12 “Jãhãege mitʼṭen hoṛe dale ar ona iạte uni hoṛe gocʼlen khan tobe uni dadalicʼ hoṛ hõ khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Exodus21:13 Menkhan goje reakʼ monsubạ baṅ tahentae menkhan Isorge uniye soprot akade khan tobe uni do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃iteye ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa one okaṭakʼ thạ̃i do ape lạgitʼ iń niṭ dohoakatʼ. 
Exodus21:14 Jãhãege laha khon hudis goṭakate mitʼhoṛe goje ar pinḍ ṭhen senkate asraye hatao, enḍekhan uni hoṛ do onḍe khon sapʼ ạgukate goje hoyokʼa." 
Exodus21:15 “Jãhãege acʼren eṅgat se apate dalkin uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Exodus21:16 “Jãhãege mitʼṭen hoṛ kombṛokateye ạkhrińe se uni tireye ńamokʼ, enḍekhan uni hõ khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Exodus21:17 “Jãhãege acʼren eṅgat se apate sarapae uni hõ khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Exodus21:18 “Bar hoṛkin lạṛhại jokhecʼ mitʼ hoṛ do eṭagicʼ dhiriteye tińe se titeye ghusiye, ar onate uni hoṛ bae gocʼlenre hõe kạhilokʼ ar tayomte bes ńokʼkate ṭheṅga tirupʼkateye dãṛã baṛae, tobe khan dadalicʼ do gujukʼ sạjại bae ńama; menkhan ghạl ocoyicʼakʼ kạmi reakʼ kạmhại iạte dadalicʼ do khuṭi purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar uni hõ ran bese lagaoea." 
Exodus21:19  
Exodus21:20 “Jãhãege acʼren guti se kạ̃ṛmĩ ṭheṅgateye dale ar onate uniye gocʼlen khan tobe do uni dadalicʼ hõ sạjạiye hoyokʼa. 
Exodus21:21 Menkhan uni dal ocoyicʼ mitʼ se bar din jiwetʼe tahen enḍekhan dadalicʼ do bae sạjại ocokʼa, ente uni do acʼren ṭaka poesa kanae." 
Exodus21:22 “Lạṛhại jokhecʼ jãhãege bhạrti hoṛmowan maejiue dale ar uniyakʼ hoṛmoren gidrại nosṭokʼ ar uni bhạrti hoṛmowan maejiuakʼ jãhãnakʼ baṅ cekakʼ tobe khan maejiuren jãwãeyakʼ dạbi leka bikʼcạrko okako goṭae onkage uni dadalicʼ doe ḍanḍom ocokʼa. 
Exodus21:23 Menkhan ghoṭna hõe bạṛicʼlen khan tobe do nonka sạjạiye hoyokʼa. Jiwi hala hạli jiwi," 
Exodus21:24 mẽtʼ hala hạli mẽtʼ, ḍaṭa hala hạli ḍaṭa, ti hala hạli ti, jaṅga hala hạli jaṅga;" 
Exodus21:25 lo hala hạli lo, ghao hala hạli ghao, ghạl hala hạli ghạl." 
Exodus21:26 “Jãhãege acʼren guti se kạ̃ṛmĩ mẽtʼe dale ar onate uniyakʼ mẽtʼ bạṛijokʼtae enḍekhan uniyakʼ mẽtʼ khạtire uni guti se kạ̃ṛmĩ do sạdhine oḍok calao daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus21:27 Jãhãege acʼren guti se kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ ḍaṭae dal ńurhạitae enḍekhan uni guti se kạ̃ṛmĩ hõ onkage sạdhine sen daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus21:28 “Mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra jãhãe herel hopon se maejiue rokʼle khan ar onate uniye gocʼlen khan tobe uni ḍaṅgra do dhirite tiń goje hoyokʼa. Ar uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ jel do celege bako joma ar ḍaṅgraren kisạ̃ṛ hõ jãhãnakʼ sạjại baṅ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus21:29 Menkhan rorokʼ ḍaṅgra kan khane ar ḍaṅgraren kisạ̃ṛ sontorkaere hõ bae tole ar uni ḍaṅgra jãhãe herel hopon se maejiue rokʼ goje, tobe khan uni ḍaṅgra do dhirite tiń goje hoyokʼa ar uniren kisạ̃ṛ hõ goje hoyokʼa." 
Exodus21:30 Menkhan kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen khon jãhãe khuti purune dạbiy khan tobe ona khuti purun emkate kisạ̃ṛ do acʼakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạ daṛeataea. 
Exodus21:31 Uni ḍaṅgra jodi jãhãe koṛa hopon se kuṛi hopone rokʼ goje enḍekhan uni cetanre hõ inạ niạmge tahena. 
Exodus21:32 Uni dạṅgra do jãhãe guti se kạ̃ṛmĩye rokʼ goje enḍekhan uni ḍaṅgraren kisạ̃ṛ do uni guti se kạ̃ṛmĩren kisạ̃ṛ pe sae gram rupạ emae hoyokʼtaea, ar uni ḍaṅgra do dhiriteye tiń gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Exodus21:33 “Jãhãe kisạ̃ṛ acʼakʼ jumire menakʼ kuń oṭakʼgeye bạgi oṭokakʼ ar ona kuńre jãhãn ḍaṅgra se gadhae ńurlen khan," 
Exodus21:34 enḍekhan jumiren kisạ̃ṛ do ona reakʼ khuti purun ḍaṅgra se gadharen kisạ̃ṛ emae hoyokʼtaea; tobe gocʼ janwar do acʼrengeye hoyokʼa. 
Exodus21:35 “Mitʼ hoṛren ḍaṅgra do eṭakʼ hoṛren ḍaṅgrae rokʼ gocʼle khan unkin do jiwetʼ ḍaṅgrakin ạkhrińea ar ṭaka kin hạṭińa ar gocʼ ḍaṅgra hõ kin hạṭińea. 
Exodus21:36 Menkhan laha khon uni ḍaṅgrae rorokʼ khan ar kisạ̃ṛ uni ḍaṅgra bae tol dohokae enḍekhan uni kisạ̃ṛ do ḍaṅgra bodolte ḍaṅgra emokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar gocʼ ḍaṅgra do acʼrene hoyokʼa. 
Exodus22:1 “Jãhãe hoṛ ḍaṅgra se bhiḍi kombṛo ạgukate dãṛẽye samaṅe seye ạkhrińe, enḍekhan uni do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra bodolte mõṛẽ goṭen ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭen bhiḍi bodolte ponea bhiḍi em ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus22:2 “Kombṛo do jãhãnakʼ kombṛoe lạgitʼ oṛakʼ bolokʼ jokhecʼe sapʼ ocokʼ are ghạlkateye gocʼlen khan, enḍekhan okoeyakʼ dalte uniye gocʼen uni do khũn iạte dạyi bae tahena." 
Exodus22:3 Menkhan siń cando rakapʼ tayom ona hoylen khan enḍekhan uni do ona khũn lạgitʼ dayiye hoyokʼa. “Kombṛo do kombṛo akatʼ jinis lạgitʼ khạṭige khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea, menkhan uniyakʼ jãhãnakʼ baṅ tahentae khan enḍekhan unige ạkhrińkate ona ṭaka ạdạitae hoyokʼa." 
Exodus22:4 Kombṛo akade ḍaṅgra, gadha se bhiḍi jodi kombṛoyicʼ ṭhen jiwetʼgeye ńamokʼ enḍekhan kombṛoyicʼ do onko mitʼṭen bodolte bareakate ruạṛkae hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus22:5 “Jãhãege uniren ḍaṅgra se bhiḍi jãhãn ṭạnḍire se darkha khetre ạtiń idikateye aṛakʼ gotʼkae ar uni ḍaṅgra se bhiḍi do eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ khetre bolokate phosole jom, enḍekhan uni hoṛ do apnarakʼ khet se darkha reakʼ joto khon bhage phosolte khuti purun emae hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus22:6 “Jãhãn jaega khon seṅgel hecʼkate jạnum jhạuạre lagaokʼ ar tayomte pasnaokʼte puńji dohoakatʼ se ṭạnḍire jarwa akatʼ anaj se goṭa khetge lokʼ, enḍekhan seṅgel okoeye lagaoletʼ unige ona reakʼ khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus22:7 Jãhãege ṭaka poesa se jinisko dohoy lạgitʼ jãhãeye emae ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ khon ona kombṛokʼ enḍekhan kombṛoe sapʼlenre uni kombṛo do ona reakʼ pongel doboṛ ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:8 Menkhan kombṛo bae sapʼ tiyogokʼ enḍekhan oṛakʼren kisạ̃ṛge onae hatao akada se baṅ ona baḍae lạgitʼ uni do Isor ṭhen hạjirokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:9 Eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ dokholre menakʼko nonkan ḍaṅgra se gadha se bheḍa se hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼ se eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ atʼ akan jinis ńelte jãhãegeye men ona do acʼakʼ kana, enḍekhan miṭmaṭ lạgitʼ banar secʼrenge Isor ṭhen hạjirokʼ hoyokʼtạkina. Ar Isor okoe do dusi menteye ṭarhaoe uni do eṭakʼicʼ ona reakʼ doboṛe ruạṛkataea." 
Exodus22:10 “Jãhãe hoṛ acʼren gadha se dạṅgra, bheḍa se jãhãn janwar jãhãe ṭhen dohoye lạgitʼe emae ar uniye gujukʼ se aghate ńam seye recʼ ocokʼ ar okoe hõ noa bako ńellede," 
Exodus22:11 enḍekhan uni hoṛ ona bae ceka akatʼ ona do Probhu Isor samaṅre kiriạkate ona babotre miṭ maṭkakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Uni janwarren mạlik do ona manao hoyokʼtaea ar jãhãn khuti purun bae dạbi daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus22:12 Menkhan uni hoṛ ṭhen khone kombṛo len khan enḍekhan uni do khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:13 Ar bir janwar uniye cirạ akade khan ona sạbud lạgitʼ uniyakʼ kaṭra kuṭrạ hạṭińkoge ạgukate udug hoyokʼtaea. Ar onate uni do khuti purun baṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:14 “Jãhãe ṭhen khon koe ạguyicʼ janwar do mạlik baṅ tahenreye ghạllen khan seye gocʼlen khan enḍekhan okoeye ạgulede uni do ona reakʼ khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:15 Menkhan mạlik samaṅrege onka hoylen khan enḍekhan khuti purun do baṅ lagaoea. Ar ṭakate uni janware bhaṛa ạgu ocoakan khan enḍekhan ona ṭakage uniyakʼ khuti purun do hoyokʼa. 
Exodus22:16 “Jãhãe hoṛ sãote bapla reakʼ katha baṅ hoyakantae nonkan kuạ̃ri kuṛi bulạu idikate jãhãeye laṭghaṭ khan, enḍekhan uni hoṛ do gonoṅ emokʼ lagaoaea ar kuạ̃ri kuṛi do uniren bạhuye hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus22:17 Kuṛiren apattetʼ uni hoṛre bae rạjikʼ khan enhõ uni do bapla gonoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus22:18 “Jãhãe gunidar maejiu do jiwetʼ alope dohokoa. 
Exodus22:19 “Jãhãn janwar sãote jãhãegeye laṭghaṭ enḍekhan uni do gojete hõ goje hoyokʼa. 
Exodus22:20 “Probhu Isor chaḍa jãhãege jãhãe debota ṭhen jãhãnakʼe samaṅ enḍekhan uni hõ goje hoyokʼa. 
Exodus22:21 “Bidisiạ hoṛ sãote bạṛicʼ alope beohara se alope santaoea, ente Misor disạmre ape hõ bidisiạpe tahẽkana." 
Exodus22:22 “Jãhãe rạnḍi maejiu se jãhãe ṭũạr amarko alope kosṭokoa. 
Exodus22:23 Arpe onkae khan ar iń ṭhen uniye rakʼle khan khạṭige iń do uniyakʼ rakʼjoṅ iń luturakʼa. 
Exodus22:24 Unre ińakʼ edre do jalajalaokʼa ar ape do lạṛhạirepe gujukʼa. Onate aperen bạhu doko rạnḍikʼtapea ar gidrạ doko ṭũạrokʼa. 
Exodus22:25 “Ińren jãhãe reṅgecʼ hoṛ ṭaka dharem emae enḍekhan mahajonko leka uni ṭhen khon sud alom hataotaea. 
Exodus22:26 Jãhãeakʼ oyon kicricʼ bondhokem dohoakatʼ khan siń cando hạsurokʼ laharege ona do ruạṛkatae hoyokʼa," 
Exodus22:27 ente uniyakʼ oyokʼ kicricʼ do ona motogetaea. Ar baṅ khan cetʼte uni doe oyokʼa? Ar ona lạgitʼ iń ṭhene rakʼle khan uniyakʼ rakʼ iń ańjomtaea, ente ińakʼ ontor do dayate perecʼgetińa." 
Exodus22:28 “Isor do alope nindạuea se aperen disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ hõ alope sarapaea. 
Exodus22:29 “Apeakʼ phosol ar darkha rasa khon okaṭakʼ emokʼ reakʼ ona emokʼ do alope biloma. Aperen pạhil koṛa hopon do iń imạń hoyokʼtapea. 
Exodus22:30 Aperen ḍaṅgra ar bheḍako hõ onkage lagaoapea. Ar eae din hạbicʼ onkoren hoponko do eṅgat ṭhenko tahena, ar ona tayom irạl mãhã hilokʼ do iń ṭhen emokʼ hoyokʼtapea." 
Exodus22:31 “Ape do ińren begar akan hoṛ kanape. Onate nonkan jãhãn janwarakʼ jel alope joma one okoe do kaṭaha janwar ṭhene gocʼ ocoakan; ona do setape emakoa. 
Exodus23:1 “Eṛe katha alope roṛa. Ar bedhoromakʼ goha hoyokʼa mente bạṛicʼ hoṛko sãote alope joṛhakʼa. 
Exodus23:2 Gel hoṛko behok akatʼ iạte amhõ ona do alom onkaea. Jãhãn mamblare goha emokʼ senkate ḍher hoṛko tulucʼ milạukate hok reakʼ bicạrre tạkicʼakʼ alom hoeocoya. 
Exodus23:3 Jãhãe reṅgecʼ hoṛakʼ bicạrre uniye reṅgecʼgete mamblare alom uni sejokʼa. 
Exodus23:4 “Bạiriren jãhãn ḍaṅgra se gadha jãhã secʼ calakʼem ńele khan enḍekhan uni ṭhenem ruạṛ ạgukaea. 
Exodus23:5 Amko hirkhạwam nonkan hoṛren gadha hamal bojha iạte bhindạṛ akanem ńellere uni hoṛ alom bạgi oṭowaea. Am do uni rakabe lạgitʼem goṛowaea. 
Exodus23:6 “Jãhãe reṅgecʼ hoṛakʼ mamblare behok alom bicạra. 
Exodus23:7 Eṛe katha khon pharakre tahenme ar jãhãn bindusạn se dhorom hoṛ do gujukʼ sạjại alom emaea. Okoe noa behokakʼe kạmi uni do rehay ohoe ńamlea. 
Exodus23:8 Ghus alom joma, ente okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ menakʼ uni hõ ghusteye kãṛã ocokʼa. Ghus do dhorom hoṛakʼ katha hõe ulṭạu ocoya." 
Exodus23:9 “Bidisiạ hoṛ alom santaokoa. Bidisiạ tahen cetʼkana mente ona do ape hõpe baḍaegea, ente Misor disạmre ape hõ bidisiạpe tahẽkana." 
Exodus23:10 “Por por turui bochor ape do khetre caspe ar phosol arjaope," 
Exodus23:11 menkhan eae bochorre do khetre cashõ alope casa ar cetʼ hõ alope rohoeya. Onare oka janamokʼ ona do ape talaren reṅgecʼ hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ hoyokʼa ar oka ńur tahen ona do janwarko joma. Apeakʼ darkha ar jạitun bagwan babotre hõ inạ niạmge tahena. 
Exodus23:12 “Haptare turui din khaṭaokʼpe menkhan eae mãhã hilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. Onate aperen ḍaṅgra ar gadha do jirạuko ńama ar apeakʼ oṛakʼreko janam akan guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko hõ khaṭaokʼ khon rehayko ńama. 
Exodus23:13 “Iń okakoń hukumatʼpe ona reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ manaope. Ar jãhãe debotawakʼ ńutumko alope ńuma, ar apeakʼ mocare hõ alo ańjomokʼ ma." 
Exodus23:14 “Jao bochor iń ńutumte pea porobpe porobokʼa. 
Exodus23:15 Ape do bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobpe porobokʼa. Iń okaṭakʼ iń hukum akatʼpe onkage eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma. Abib cando reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ goṭawakʼ dinre noa dope palona, ente ona candoge ape do Misor disạm khonpe oḍok ạgu ocoakana. Unre okoe hõ jemon iń ṭhen eken ti aloe hijukʼ." 
Exodus23:16 Khetre okape ir ona reakʼ pạhil phosoltepe porobokʼa. Ar cas abadkate mucạtʼre okaṭakʼ phosol do khet khon golatepe ader onate samṭao porobpe porobokʼa. 
Exodus23:17 Bochorre pe dhaokate aperen sanam herel hopon do Probhu Isor samaṅreko hạjirokʼma. 
Exodus23:18 “Iń ńutumte tinre janwarakʼ mãyãmpe samaṅa unre ona sãote khạmi mesalakatʼ piṭhạ do alope samaṅa. Porob jokhecʼ iń ńutumte okoe janwarpe dãṛẽko onkoakʼ itil reakʼ jãhãnakʼ hạṭińko setakʼ hạbicʼ alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa. 
Exodus23:19 Apeakʼ khet khon rakapʼakʼ pạhil phosol reakʼ bhage utạrakʼ hạṭiń do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼtepe idiya. Ar merom hoponakʼ jel do uniren eṅgatakʼ toa sãote alope isina. 
Exodus23:20 “Okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i iń ṭhik dohoakatʼ onḍe idipe lạgitʼ ar horre rukhiyạpe lạgitʼ ape laha lahate iń do mitʼṭen goḍet iń kolekana. 
Exodus23:21 Ape do uniyakʼ kathape ańjoma ar uniyakʼpe manaotaea. Uni upạrte mon alope haṛhatʼ ocoytapea. Apeakʼ hul do bae ikạitapea, ente iń do unirege minạńa." 
Exodus23:22 Uniyakʼ kathape luturakʼ ar iń okakoń lạiyakatʼ onape onkae enḍekhan iń do aperen bạirikoren bạiriń hoyokʼa ar okoe ape upạrteko teṅgokʼ onko upạrteń teṅgokʼa. 
Exodus23:23 Amorirenko, Hittirenko, Pherisirenko, Kananrenko, Hibbirenko ar Jebusirenko oka disạmreko girobasokʼkan ona disạmte ińren goḍet doe ạyur idipea. Iń do onko sanamkoń marao cabakoa." 
Exodus23:24 Ape do onkoren boṅgako se debotako alope sewawakoa ar onḍenko hoṛ cetʼko cekae onka hõ alope kạmiya. Ape do onkoren murtikope rạputʼkoa ar onkoakʼ pujạ reakʼ thanko hõpe rạputʼ gidikakʼa. 
Exodus23:25 Ape do eken aperen Probhu Isorge, metatʼme ińgepe sewawạńạ. Onate apeakʼ jomakʼ ar dakʼre ińakʼ bhor tahena ar ińge apeakʼ sanam ruạ hasokoń ocogtapea." 
Exodus23:26 Apeakʼ disạmre unre okoeyakʼ kukhiren gidrạ hõ bako nosṭokʼa ar okoe hõ bạńjhi do bako tahena. Iń do purạteń bahaopea. 
Exodus23:27 “Jãhae jạtrenko ṭhenpe calakʼre onkoakʼ monre iń reaṅ botoriń caṛhaoakoa ariń andmandao ocokoa. Ar aperen bạiriko do ape khonko ńir pharakokʼa. 
Exodus23:28 Hibirenko, Kananrenko ar Hittirenko ape samaṅ khon laga ńirko lạgitʼ iń do ape laha lahate bhimrulkoń kolkoa." 
Exodus23:29 Tobe mitʼ bochor bhitriteń laga ńirkoa ona do baṅa, ente onań onka lekhan disạm do ujạṛokʼa ar bir janwarkoakʼ lekha do ape lạgitʼ ḍherokʼa." 
Exodus23:30 Ar lekhare ạuripe saṅgekʼ hạbicʼ goṭa disạm ạuripe dokhol hạbicʼ onko jạtrenko do thoṛa thoṛate disạm khoniń oḍokkoa. 
Exodus23:31 “Arakʼ jalapuri khon Palestain disạm reakʼ doreão hạbicʼ ar eṭakʼ secʼ do hahaṅkar khon Uphreṭis gaḍa hạbicʼ apeakʼ disạm reakʼ simạń dohoapea. Ar ona disạmre okoeko girobasokʼkan onko do apeakʼ tireń jimakoa ar ape do onkope laga ńirkoa. 
Exodus23:32 Onko sãote se onkoren debotako sãote cetʼge alope rikita. 
Exodus23:33 Apeakʼ disạmre alope girobas ocoakaoa. Arpe tahẽ ocoako khan onko do iń upạrte kại secʼko or idipea, ar onkoren deb-debikope sewawako khan khạṭige jhãmparepe paṛaokʼa.”" 
Exodus24:1 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Aron, Nadab, Abihu ar Israelkoren eaegel murubbiko soṅgekate am do iń ṭhen rakapʼ hijukʼme. Ar rakapʼ hijukʼ jokhecʼ sạńgińre tahen khonge taberate ińpe sewawạńạ." 
Exodus24:2 Menkhan am do eskarge iń ṭhenem rakapʼ hijukʼa, ar eṭakʼko do aloko hijukʼma. Noko chaḍa eṭakʼ Israel hoponko jemon am sãote aloko rakapʼ hijukʼ.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mose do ruạṛkate Probhu Isorakʼ katha tinre hoṛko ṭhene lạikeda ar uniyakʼ sanam ạnkoe sodorkeda unre hoṛko do mitʼ domteko menkeda, “Probhu Isor cetʼ cetʼkoe menakatʼ ale do ona jotole manaoa.”" 
Exodus24:4 Ar Mose do Probhu Isor okako kathae menletʼ onako jotowakʼe ol dohokeda. Dosar hilokʼ Mose do ạḍi setakʼre buru latarre mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar Israelkoren gelbar khũṭ reakʼ katha disạkate gelbar goṭecʼ khunṭiye benaokeda. 
Exodus24:5 Ona tayom uni do mitʼbar Israel juạnkoe kolketʼkoa ar onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼko porobena ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lekate aema ḍaṅgrako dãṛẽketʼkoa. 
Exodus24:6 Mose do samaṅ akatʼkoakʼ mãyãm khon adha hataokate bhajanreye dohokeda ar adha do ona pinḍ cetanreye chiṭiạukeda. 
Exodus24:7 Ona tayom uni do bondobos olakʼ puthi hataokate hoṛkoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. Unre hoṛko doko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ale dole bataoa ar Probhu Isor okakoe menakatʼ ona jotowakʼle palona.”" 
Exodus24:8 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do hoṛko cetanre mãyãm chiṭiạukateye menkeda, “Noa do ona bondobos reakʼ mãyãm kana, one oka do Probhu Isor ape lạgitʼ noako katha lekageye niṭ dohoakatʼ.”" 
Exodus24:9 Noa tayom Mose, Aron, Nadab ar Israelkoren eae gel murubbiko do buru coṭte rakapʼ senkate Israelren Isorko ńelkedea. Uniyakʼ jaṅga talka do sapha rimilre Nilkanto monite bạisạu akatʼ leka tahẽkana." 
Exodus24:10  
Exodus24:11 Israelkoren noko mukhiyạko do Isorko ńelkedere hõ bako gocʼlena. Onko do uniko ńelkedea arko jom ńũkeda. 
Exodus24:12 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do buru cetanre iń ṭhen rakapʼ hijukʼme ar thoṛa okte hạbicʼ iń ṭhen tahenme. Iń do hoṛko cetʼako lạgitʼ dhiri cạktireń olakatʼ ạn-ạri ar hukumkoń emama.”" 
Exodus24:13 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do acʼren gokʼṛoyicʼ Josuại soṅgekedea are mohnḍayena. Ar ona tayom uni do Isorakʼ buruteye rakapʼena. 
Exodus24:14 Uni do murubbikoe men oṭowatʼkoa, “Ạliń ạuri liń ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ ape do nonḍege tạṅgi hataṛpe. Aron ar Hur do ape sãotekin tahẽyena. Hoṛko jhogṛa emanlenre jemon unkin ṭhenko calakʼ.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mose buruteye rakapʼ calakʼ jokhecʼ buru do rimilte esetʼena," 
Exodus24:16 Ar Sinại burure Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok sodorena. Turui din hạbicʼ buru do rimilte danaṅge tahẽyena. Ona tayom eae din hilokʼre ona rimil tala khon Probhu Isor do Moseye hohoadea. 
Exodus24:17 Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do jolokʼ seṅgel leka buru reakʼ cuṛạre ńelena. 
Exodus24:18 Ar Mose do rakapʼ rakapʼte ona rimil bhitriteye boloyena. Uni do pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ ona bururegeye tahẽyena. 
Exodus25:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus25:2 “Israelko jemon iń lạgitʼ bhokti-sandesko ạgui. Ar apnarakʼ sanate jãhãege jãhãnakʼko ạgui khan ona hõm ataṅtakoa. 
Exodus25:3 Onko do jemon noako sandesko ạguima: Sona, rupạ ar pitạl;" 
Exodus25:4 Nil, beguni ar arakʼ roṅakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm; merom upʼ;" 
Exodus25:5 arakʼ roṅte roṅakatʼ bheḍawakʼ harta ar merom harta; gabla kaṭ; 
Exodus25:6 marsal jol lạgitʼ jạitun reakʼ sunum; ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum, dhup ar jut so mosolako;" 
Exodus25:7 ephod ar koṛam aḍokʼakʼ cetanre bạisạu lạgitʼ boidorjo mạnik dhiri ar eṭakʼ damanakʼ dhiriko. 
Exodus25:8 Israelko hotete iń tahen lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ sonot ṭhạ̃irem benaoa. Onate iń do onko talareń girobasokʼa. 
Exodus25:9 Oka nạmuna udukʼamiń menetʼkan ona lekage am do noa sewa tạmbu ar sanam asbabkom benao ocoya. 
Exodus25:10 “Gabla kaṭte onko do mitʼṭecʼ sindukko benaoma. Ona reakʼ jeleń do bar moka tala, ar usul ar osar do mitʼ moka tala hoyokʼma." 
Exodus25:11 Ona reakʼ bhitri ar bahre do khạṭi sonatem tola ar ona reakʼ beṛhaete do sona reakʼ noksatem noksaea. 
Exodus25:12 Ar chańchre dulkate ponea sona reakʼ kạṛi tearkate ona ponea kuṭhạ reakʼ banarsa aṛe bareakatem lagaoakʼa. 
Exodus25:13 Ona tayom gabla kaṭ reakʼ barea ḍaṅem benao ocoya ar ona do sonatem tola. 
Exodus25:14 Ar sinduk gokʼ idi lạgitʼ ona banar kạṛi talate ona ḍaṅkinem gutu dohokakʼa. 
Exodus25:15 Ar onakin ḍaṅ do sinduk reakʼ kạṛirege gutu dohokakʼ hoyokʼa; onakin do baṅ bocʼ dohoy hoyokʼa. 
Exodus25:16 Ona goha sunduk do amiń emama ar am do noa sindukre onam dohokakʼa. 
Exodus25:17 “Khạṭi sonate ona sinduk lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ daya duṛupʼakʼem benao ocoya, onare do kại puruchunokʼa. Noa daya duṛupʼakʼ reakʼ jeleń do bar moka tala ar osar do mitʼ moka tala." 
Exodus25:18 Ona daya duṛupʼakʼre sonaren barea Kerubem benaokinạ. 
Exodus25:19 Unkin Kerub do sinduk reakʼ banar sa aṛerekin tahena. Ar Kerubkin do daya duṛupʼakʼre nonka benaokin hoyokʼa jemon unkin do mitʼṭecʼ jinisrege kin benaokʼ. 
Exodus25:20 Unkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do cetan secʼ lap lapa akae tahena ar unkinakʼ umul latarre sinduk reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ do tahena. Kerubkin do samna sạmnikin teṅgo tahena ar unkinakʼ mẽtʼãhã do daya duṛupʼakʼ samaṅre tahena. 
Exodus25:21 Noa daya duṛupʼakʼ do sinduk cetanrem dohoya ar oka goha olakʼiń emam ona do sinduk bhitrirem dohokakʼa. 
Exodus25:22 Ar iń do goha sinduk reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ cetanre Kerubkin talare am sãote ńapamkate Israelko lạgitʼ ińakʼ sanam hukumiń emama. 
Exodus25:23 “Am do gabla kaṭte bar moka jeleń, mitʼ moka osar ar mitʼ moka tala usul mitʼṭecʼ ṭebilem benao ocoya." 
Exodus25:24 Ona do khạṭi sonatem tol ocoya ar beṛhaete do sona reakʼ gunsikom benao ocowakʼa. 
Exodus25:25 Ar ṭebil reakʼ beṛhaete pon kạṭupʼ usul batam lagaoa, ar ona cetanre hõ sona reakʼ gunsikom benao ocowakʼa." 
Exodus25:26 Ar ṭebil reakʼ pon konare ponea kuṭhạ cetanre sona reakʼ ponea kaṛi tearkatem lagao ocoya. 
Exodus25:27 Ona kạṛi do ṭebil beṛhaete ona usul bata pheḍre tahena jemon ṭebil gokʼ idiyre ona talate ḍaṅkin bolo daṛeakʼ. 
Exodus25:28 Onakin ḍaṅ do gabla kaṭ reakʼ tearkate sonatem tol ocoya ar onate ṭebil do gokʼ idiy hoyokʼa. 
Exodus25:29 Ṭebil lạgitʼ thạriko, kạ̃ṛchuko, loṭako, bạṭiko one onakote coḍorokʼ onako jotoge khạṭi sonatem benao ocoya." 
Exodus25:30 Ar ṭebilre do iń ńutumte samaṅakʼ piṭhạm dohokakʼa, ar jaoge jemon ona do onḍege tahena." 
Exodus25:31 “Khạṭi Sonate mitʼṭecʼ diuhe reakʼ dohowakʼem benao ocoya. Ona reakʼ latar hĩs ar ona khon rakapʼ akan ḍạnḍiko hõ sona reakʼtem benao ocoya. Ar baha leka bạṭiko, ḍombeko ar bahako do diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hijukʼa ar ona joto do benao mitʼge tahena." 
Exodus25:32 Diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ banar aṛete pepe goṭecʼkate jotote turui goṭecʼ ḍạrem benao ocoya. 
Exodus25:33 Baha ar ḍombe sudhạ badam bahaleka ńelokʼ pea bạṭi do pạhil ḍạr reakʼ tala talate tahena. Ar ona tayom reakʼ ḍạrre hõ onkage pea bạṭi tahena. Ar diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hecʼakan turui goṭecʼ ḍạrko hõ inạ mitʼ lekage hoyokʼa. 
Exodus25:34 Diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ ḍạnḍi tala talate hõ baha ar ḍombe sudhạ badam baha leka ńelokʼ ponea bạṭim dohoya. 
Exodus25:35 Diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hecʼakan turui goṭecʼ ḍạr talare pạhilte barea okare milạu akan ona reakʼ latarre mitʼṭecʼ ḍombe, ar dosarakʼ barea latarre ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍombe ar tesarakʼ barea latarre ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍombem dohoya." 
Exodus25:36 Ḍombe ar ḍạr do jotoge diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hijukʼa ar joto do mitʼṭecʼ jinisge hoyokʼa. 
Exodus25:37 Ona tayom khạṭi sonate eae goṭecʼ mạli benaokate diuhe dohowakʼre nonka dohoy hoyokʼa jemon mạliko jeretʼlere samaṅ senakʼ jaega do marsalokʼ. 
Exodus25:38 Ar sultạ sapha dohoy lạgitʼ cimṭạ ar sultạ reakʼ torocʼ dohoy lạgitʼ jinisko hõ khạṭi sonate benao hoyokʼa. 
Exodus25:39 Diuhe dohowakʼko benao lạgitʼ jotote pegel keji khạṭi sona jạruṛokʼa. 
Exodus25:40 Noa buru cetanre okako nạmunań udukʼatʼme ṭhik onka lekage jotowakʼem benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:1 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbu do gel goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼtem benaoa. Ona orwalko do ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte ar nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte benao hoyokʼa. Ar gạkhuṛ kạrigol hotete onare Kerubkoakʼ chubim dohoya" 
Exodus26:2 Orwal do jotoge inạ mitʼ jokhagem benao ocoya, jeleń do bargel irạl moka ar osar do pon moka." 
Exodus26:3 Orwalko do mõṛẽ goṭecʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼkate mitʼ sãotem joṛao mitʼ ocoya onate ona do barea orwal hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:4 Pạhilakʼ maraṅ orwal reakʼ mitʼ aṛe osar secʼ do nil sutạmte gạlikom benaoakʼa. Ar dosarakʼ orwalre hõ ṭhik onkagem benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:5 Nonkate pạhil maraṅakʼ orwalre mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạli ar dosarakʼ orwalre hõ mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạlikom benao ocoya. Ona banar maraṅ orwal reakʼ gạliko do mohnḍa muhnḍhige tahena. 
Exodus26:6 Ona tayom mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ sona reakʼ bạkupʼakʼko benaokate onako do gạliko talate gutukate ona banar maraṅ orwal gakʼkakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar onakin banar maraṅ orwalte mitʼṭecʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbuge hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:7 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ cetan reakʼ hĩs dapal esetʼkakʼ lạgitʼ meromakʼ upʼte gelmitʼ goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼkom benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:8 Ona orwal kicricʼko do jotoge mitʼ jokha reakʼ hoyokʼa- jeleńte pegel moka ar osar do pon moka. 
Exodus26:9 Onako khon mõṛẽ goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼ do mitʼ sãote joṛao mitʼkate maraṅ okocʼ orwal benao hoyokʼa. Ar sarecʼ turui goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼ do mitʼ sãote joṛao mitʼkate maraṅ okocʼ orwal benao hoyokʼa. Noa maraṅ orwal modre okaṭakʼ bạ̃ṛti tahen ona do tạmbu samaṅ secʼem lạṭum doṛhakakʼa. 
Exodus26:10 Ar pạhilakʼ maraṅ orwal kicricʼ reakʼ osar secʼ reakʼ dhạrire mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạlikom benao ocowakʼa; ar dosarakʼ maraṅ orwal kicricʼre hõ ṭhik onkage gạlikom benao ocowakʼa. 
Exodus26:11 Ona tayom pitạl reakʼ mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ bạkupʼakʼ benaokate ona do gạlirem bạkupʼkakʼa ar ona banar orwal do gakʼkakʼ leka hoyokʼa. Onate banar orwal do mitʼṭecʼ dapalakʼ tạmbuge hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:12 Ar pạhil maraṅakʼ orwal reakʼ okaṭakʼ do tayom secʼ adha ạdhi ṭạmkur tahen ona do onkage tahena. 
Exodus26:13 Merom upʼ reakʼ orwalko do latar reakʼ kicricʼ khon banar secʼ mitʼ moka kate bạ̃ṛtikʼ iạte ona reakʼ banar secʼ ṭạmkurkate goṭa ńapamokʼ tạmbugeye umul esetʼkakʼa. 
Exodus26:14 Ar ona cetan khon dapal esetʼkakʼ lạgitʼ arakʼ roṅ akatʼ bheḍawakʼ hartate mitʼṭecʼ dapalakʼ benao hoyokʼa, ar ona cetan reakʼ dapalakʼ do merom reakʼ hartate." 
Exodus26:15 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbu lạgitʼ gabla kaṭte paṭakom benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:16 Paṭako do gel moka jeleń ar osarte do mitʼ moka tala hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:17 Ar joto paṭakorege barea kate kuṭhạm benao ocoya. Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ joto paṭakoge inạ mitʼ jokhage benao hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:18 Dạkhin secʼ lạgitʼ do bargel paṭako benao hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:19 Ar onako paṭa reakʼ mimitʼ kuṭhạ latarre doṛomkakʼ lạgitʼ pongel goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍoko benao hoyokʼa, ar mimitʼ paṭa lạgitʼ do bareakate, metakʼme mimitʼ kuṭhạ lạgitʼ do mitʼṭecʼkate ganḍom benao ocoya." 
Exodus26:20 Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ eṭakʼ secʼ lạgitʼ, metakʼme utạr secʼ lạgitʼ hõ bargel goṭecʼ paṭa ar mimitʼ paṭa lạgitʼ bareakate jotote pongel goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍokom benao ocoya." 
Exodus26:21  
Exodus26:22 Ar tạmbu reakʼ pạchim secʼ lạgitʼ do arhõ turui goṭecʼ paṭa benao hoyokʼa," 
Exodus26:23 ar tayom secʼ reakʼ banar konac lạgitʼ arhõ barea paṭam benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:24 Noakin paṭa reakʼ banar konac reakʼ barea paṭa sãote mitʼkate latar khon cetan hạbicʼem joṛao mitʼkakʼa. Ar konac reakʼ banar paṭa ar aṛe reakʼ paṭate mitʼ sãote joṛaokakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar banar konacge mitʼ leka hoyokʼa. 
Exodus26:25 Nonkate kuḍạm secʼ irạl goṭecʼ paṭa hoyokʼa ar mimitʼ paṭako reakʼ latarre emakʼ lạgitʼ barea kate jotote gel turui goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍom benao ocowakʼa. 
Exodus26:26 “Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ paṭako lạgitʼ gabla kaṭ reakʼ hurkạṛakʼ ḍaṅem benao ocoya. Noare mitʼ secʼ reakʼ paṭa lạgitʼ do mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ḍaṅ tahena ar eṭakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ paṭa lạgitʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ hurkạṛakʼ, metakʼme pạchim reakʼ paṭa lạgitʼ." 
Exodus26:27  
Exodus26:28 Cetan ar latar reakʼ hurkạṛko modre jeleńakʼ hurkạṛ do paṭa talate noa sa khon hanasa hạbicʼ parom tahena. 
Exodus26:29 Ar onako paṭa do sonatem tol ocoya ar hurkạṛ bolokʼ lạgitʼ sona reakʼ kạṛiko benao ocokate paṭarem lagao ocoya. Ar ona hurkạṛko do sonatem tol ocoya. 
Exodus26:30 “Noa buru cetanre am do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ oka nạmunam udukʼ ocoyen ṭhik onka lekagem benao ocoya. 
Exodus26:31 “Nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte mitʼṭecʼ orwalem tińa." 
Exodus26:32 Ona orwal do gabla kaṭ reakʼ ponea khunṭi sãote lagao akatʼ sona reakʼ hukem dohokakʼa. Ar khunṭiko do sonatem tol ocoya ar onako do rupạ reakʼ ganḍore teṅgo tahena. 
Exodus26:33 Orwal do cetan reakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼre lagao akatʼ bạkupʼakʼ latarre jhulạu tahena. Ar noa orwal tayomrege gohawakʼ tạmbu do tahena. Orwal do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i ar sonot ṭhạ̃i talareye begar dohokakʼa. 
Exodus26:34 Noa sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire goha sinduk cetanre ona reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼem dohokakʼa. 
Exodus26:35 Ar noa orwal bahrere sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ utạr aṛere am do ṭebilem dohoya ar ona reakʼ dạkhin secʼ do diuhe dohowakʼ tahena. 
Exodus26:36 “Tạmbu reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ hõ mitʼṭecʼ orwal benao hoyokʼa. Ona do nil, beguni, ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte noksawakʼge." 
Exodus26:37 Noa orwal lạgitʼ sona reakʼ ạṅkus ar babla kaṭ reakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ khunṭim benao ocoya. Ar khunṭiko do sonatem tol ocoya. Ar khunṭiko bạisạu lạgitʼ do pitạl reakʼ ganḍokom benao ocowakʼa. 
Exodus27:1 “Gabla kaṭ reakʼ mõṛẽ moka jeleń, mõṛẽ moka osar ar pe moka usul mitʼṭecʼ pon konac pinḍem benaoa." 
Exodus27:2 Pinḍ benao jokhecʼ ona ponon konacre ponea dereńem benao ocoya. Onate dereń sudhạ pinḍ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jinisge hoyokʼa. Ar pinḍ do pitạltem tol ocoya. 
Exodus27:3 Pinḍ reakʼ torocʼ giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ jinis ar kạ̃ṛchuko, samaṅakʼ mãyãm dohoy lạgitʼ bạṭi, jel rakab lạgitʼ kãṭãko ar seṅgel dohoy lạgitʼ celaṅko jotoge pitạl reakʼem tear ocoya." 
Exodus27:4 Pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhạ̃ńjri, metakʼme cala lekam benaoa. Ona reakʼ ponon konare ponea rupạ reakʼ kạṛim lagaoa ocoya." 
Exodus27:5 Pinḍ beṛhaete oḍok akan kaṅkha latarre noa jhạńjri dom dohoya. Ona do pinḍ latar khon cetan secʼ adha ạdhi jaegare tahena. 
Exodus27:6 Pinḍ lạgitʼ gabla kaṭte barea ḍaṅem benao ocoya ar onakin do pitạltem tol ocoya. 
Exodus27:7 Noakin ḍaṅ do kạṛi talate gutukakʼ hoyokʼa. Onate pinḍ gokʼ idi jokhecʼ ḍaṅkin do pind reakʼ banarsa aṛere tahena. 
Exodus27:8 Pinḍ do toktatem benao ocoya ar ona reakʼ bhitri secʼ do kholge tahena. Ar burure cetʼ lekam udukʼ ocoyen ṭhik onkagem benao ocoya. 
Exodus27:9 “Goha tạmbu reakʼ beṛhate mitʼṭecʼ raca tahena. Noa reakʼ dạkhin secʼ do mitʼsae moka tahena. Ar uńatʼ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ orwal tahena. 
Exodus27:10 Ona orwal ṭaṅgao lạgitʼ bargel goṭecʼ khunṭikom dohoya. Ar khunṭiko latarre do pitạl reakʼ ganḍoko tahena, ar khunṭi sãote rupạ reakʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar totolakʼ hõm benao ocoya." 
Exodus27:11 Raca reakʼ utạr secʼhõ mitʼsae moka tahena. Onḍe hõ orwal ar bargel goṭecʼ khunṭiko, bargel goṭecʼ pitạl reakʼ ganḍoko ar khunṭiko sãote rupạ reakʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar totolakʼkom benao ocoya." 
Exodus27:12 “Raca reakʼ pạchim secʼhõ mõṛẽgel moka tahena. Onḍehõ orwalko, gel goṭecʼ khunṭiko ar khunṭi latarre ganḍoko tahena." 
Exodus27:13 Ar raca reakʼ purub secʼ hõ mõṛẽgel moka tahena. 
Exodus27:14 Ar onḍenakʼ duạr denebanar lạgitʼ gel mõṛẽ moka jeleń orwal ar pepe goṭecʼ khunṭi ar pepe goṭecʼkate ganḍoko tahena. 
Exodus27:15  
Exodus27:16 “Raca reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ ponea khunṭi, ponea ganḍo ar bargel moka jeleń mitʼṭecʼ orwal tahena. Orwal do nil, beguni, ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńatʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte mitʼṭecʼ noksa reakʼ jinisge hoyokʼa." 
Exodus27:17 Raca beṛhaeteakʼ sanam khunṭikore rupạ reakʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar totolakʼem dohoya ar ganḍo hõ rupạ reakʼem benao ocoya. 
Exodus27:18 Raca do jeleńte mitʼsae moka ar osar do mõṛẽgel moka hoyokʼa. Ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ orwalko do mõṛẽ mokakate usul hoyokʼa ar onko do uńatʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmtem benao ocoya, ar khunṭiko lạgitʼ do rupạ reakʼ ganḍokom benao ocoya." 
Exodus27:19 Sekʼwa tạmbure okako jinis beoharokʼa, ona do jotoge pitạltem benao ocoya. Ar raca reakʼ orwalko reakʼ khunṭiko hõ rupạ reakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Exodus27:20 “Diuheko jemon jol akaege tahen onate Israelkom hukumakoa jemon jạitun reakʼ khạṭi sunum am ṭhenko ạgui. 
Exodus27:21 Noa ńapamokʼ reakʼ tạmbu samaṅre oka orwal tahen ona orwal bahrere Aron ar uniren hoponko do ạyupʼ khon setakʼ hạbicʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre diuheko ńel todarota. Ar Israelko do piṛhike piṛhi niạ niạmko panjaya. 
Exodus28:1 “Am do Israelko mod khon amren boeha Aron ar uniren hoponko Nadab, Abihu, Eliasar ar Ithamor am ṭhenem hoho ạgukoa. Onko do naeke lekate ińko dewa sewawạńạ." 
Exodus28:2 Manot ar sajaokʼ lạgitʼ am do amren dadam Aron lạgitʼ sonot kicricʼem benao ocoaea. 
Exodus28:3 Ar okoe gạkhuṛ kạrigolko akel emokʼicʼ jiuteń perecʼ akatʼko, onkom metakoa jemon onko do Aron lạgitʼ kicricʼko benaote naeke lekate iń sewawạń lạgitʼe begar doho ocokʼ." 
Exodus28:4 Uniyakʼ noa kicricʼre jemon koṛam aḍokʼakʼ, ephod, oyon aṅgrop, onol bonol kicricʼ kuṭrạ, dạhṛi ar ḍanḍare paṭheteakʼ tahen. Ar amren dadam Aron ar uniren hoponko hõ jemon naeke lekate ińko sewawạń onate onko lạgitʼ sonot kicricʼkom benao ocoya." 
Exodus28:5 Ar kicricʼ benao kạmire onko do jemon sona, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musni sutạmko beohar ma." 
Exodus28:6 “Ephod do sona, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmtem benao ocokoa. Noa do mitʼṭen gạkhuṛ kạrigolakʼ ti reakʼ kạmige baṛe hoyokʼma." 
Exodus28:7 Ephod do tarenre tol dohokakʼ lạgitʼ barea phitạ benao ocokate ephod reakʼ banar konacrem tol joṛao ocokoa. 
Exodus28:8 Ar ephod sãote joṛao akatʼ ḍanḍa reakʼ cõhõk bedhaoakʼ hõ ephod lekage sonate, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmtem benao ocokoa." 
Exodus28:9 Am do barea boidorjomoni dhirite ona cetanre Israelren hoponkoakʼ ńutumem galaṅ ocoya. 
Exodus28:10 Onkoakʼ janam lekage turui goṭecʼ ńutum do mitʼṭecʼ dhirire ar sarecʼ turui goṭecʼ ńutum do eṭakʼ dhirirem rokʼ caṛhao ocokoa. 
Exodus28:11 Kạrigolko damanakʼ dhirire cetʼlekako rokʼ caṛhao arko mohor chapakʼ ṭhik onkage onakin dhiri cetanre Israelren hoponkoakʼ ńutumem rokʼ caṛhao ocoytakoa. Banar boidorjomoni dhirige sona reakʼ jhạńjri cetanre bạisạukate taren reakʼ phitạ sãotem tol doho ocokoa. Noa banar dhiri do Probhu Isor samaṅre Israelkoe udukʼkoa. Ar Probhu Isor jemon onko secʼe beṅged onate Aron do Probhu Isor samaṅre noa ńutumko acʼakʼ banar taren cetanreye ladekakʼa. 
Exodus28:12  
Exodus28:13 Sonate benaoakʼ ona paṭetʼ galaṅakʼ sãote barea sikṛim joṛao ocokoa. Ar sikṛi do khạṭi sona reakʼ baber leka uńkatem benao ocokoa. 
Exodus28:14  
Exodus28:15 “Ińakʼ hukum baḍae lạgitʼ koṛam aḍokʼakʼem benao ocoya. Noa do mitʼṭen gạkhuṛ kạrigolakʼ ti reakʼ kạmige baṛe hoyokʼma. Ephod leka noa hõ sonate, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmtem benao ocoya." 
Exodus28:16 Noa do jeleńte mitʼ bitạ ar osarte mitʼ bitạ mitʼṭecʼ ponon konac lạṭum mitʼakatʼ kicricʼge tahena. 
Exodus28:17 Noa cetanre pon sạrte damanakʼ dhirikom bạisạu ocoya. Pạhil sạrre do cuni, podmorag ar morokot;" 
Exodus28:18 dosarakʼ sạrre do pitmoni, nilkanto ar hirạ;" 
Exodus28:19 tesarakʼ sạrre do peroj, tamro, ar koṭahela," 
Exodus28:20 ar ponakʼ sạrre do gomedok, boidurjo ar surjokanto moni. Ar mạnik dhiriko do galaṅ paṭetʼ akatʼ sona cetanrege bạisạu dohoy hoyokʼa." 
Exodus28:21 Israelren gelbar goṭen hoponko lạgitʼ jotote gelbar goṭecʼ mạnik dhiriko tahena. Ar ona reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼre gelbar khũṭren mitʼṭecʼkate ńutum do rokʼ caṛhao hoyokʼa, mohor chapakʼ lekage." 
Exodus28:22 “Noa koṛam aḍokʼakʼ lạgitʼ khạṭi sona do baber leka uńkate barea sikṛim benao ocoya. 
Exodus28:23 Ar sona reakʼ barea kạṛi benao ocokate koṛam aḍokʼakʼ cetan reakʼ banar konacrem lagao ocoya," 
Exodus28:24 ar banar sikṛige ona banar kạṛi sãotem gakʼkakʼa. 
Exodus28:25 Ephod reakʼ samaṅ secʼ taren reakʼ phitạ cetanre sona reakʼ oka jhạńjri tahen ona jhạńjri sãote sikṛi reakʼ eṭakʼ aṛerem aṭkaokakʼa. 
Exodus28:26 Ona chaḍa arhõ barea sona reakʼ kạṛi benao ocokate koṛam aḍokʼakʼ reakʼ eṭakʼ konacrem lagao ocoya. Noa banar do ephod ṭhen koṛam aḍokʼakʼ latarre tahena. 
Exodus28:27 Ona chaḍa arhõ barea sona reakʼ kạṛim benao ocoya ar ephod reakʼ taren phitạ sojhe latar secʼ ephod reakʼ ḍanḍa poṭi cetan reakʼ silại sãotem joṛaokakʼa. 
Exodus28:28 Ona tayom koṛam aḍokʼakʼ latarre oka kạṛi tahen ona sãote ḍanḍa poṭi reakʼ kạṛi do nil babertem tol ocokoa. Onate koṛam aḍokʼakʼ do ephod cetan khon baṅ ocogokʼa. 
Exodus28:29 “Sonot ṭhạ̃ite bolokʼ jokhecʼ Aron do ińakʼ hukum baḍae lạgitʼ noa koṛam aḍokʼakʼ cetanre olakan Israel hoponkoakʼ ńutum do koṛamreye lade joṅa. Noa koṛam aḍokʼakʼ do jao okte Probhu Isor samaṅre tahena. 
Exodus28:30 Koṛam aḍokʼakʼ reakʼ bhãj bhitrire uni do Urim ar Thumimem dohoya. Onate Aron do tinre Probhu Isor samaṅreye hạjirokʼa unre uniyakʼ koṛamre onakin tahena. Ar onate Aron do Probhu Isor samaṅre jao okte Israel hoponkoakʼ bicạrko acʼakʼ koṛamreye asen baṛaea. 
Exodus28:31 “Ephod latarre okaṭakʼ jeleń aṅgrop tahen ona do goṭage nil sutạmte benao hoyokʼa. 
Exodus28:32 Ar bohokʼ bolokʼ lạgitʼ ona talare do jhicʼge tahena. Ar ona khạli jaega jemon alo oṛejokʼ onate ona reakʼ beṛhaete teńakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Exodus28:33 Nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte ḍạlim jo benaokate noa aṅgrop latarre ḍombeko beṛhaetem ṭamkurkakʼa. Ar onako talare sona reakʼ ghạnṭikom lagao ocokoa." 
Exodus28:34 Ar latar reakʼ ańcarre do mitʼṭecʼkate ḍạlim jo ar mitʼṭecʼkate ghạnṭiye sapʼ dohokakʼa. 
Exodus28:35 Probhu Isor sewawae jokhecʼ Aron do noa kicricʼgeye horoga. Uni do tinre sonot ṭhạ̃i samaṅreye calakʼa ar unre onḍe khone oḍok hijukʼa unre noa ghạnṭiko reakʼ saḍe ańjomokʼa ar onate uni do jiwi rukhiyạkʼtaea. 
Exodus28:36 “Mitʼṭecʼ khạṭi sona reakʼ pat benaokate ona cetanre mohor chap akatʼ leka noa kathakom rokʼ caṛhaoa, ‘Probhu Isor ńutumte begarakʼ mente.’" 
Exodus28:37 Ona bata do dạhṛi samaṅ secʼre tahena ar ona do nil baberte tol tahena. 
Exodus28:38 Noa do Aronakʼ cạndire tahena. Ar Israelko oka jinis samaṅ lạgitʼko ạgui ona reakʼ sanam dos bojha do Aronge gogokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Probhu Isor jemon onkoe ataṅko onate Aronakʼ cạndi cetanre noa sona reakʼ pat do jao okte tahena. 
Exodus28:39 “Naekeakʼ bhitri aṅgrop do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼte benao hoyokʼa ar dạhṛi hõ ona mitʼ sutạmtege benao hoyokʼa. Ḍanḍa totolakʼ hõ mitʼṭecʼ noksa akatʼ jinisge tahena. 
Exodus28:40 “Manot ar sajaokʼ lekate am do Aronren hoponko hõ kicricʼko, ḍanḍa totolakʼko ar bohokʼ reakʼ dạṛhim benao ocoakoa." 
Exodus28:41 Amren dadam Aron ar uniren hoponko noam horokʼakote sunumtem ojokʼkoa ar naeke hudạrem bahalkoa. Probhu Isor ńutumte onkom begar dohokoa jemon onko do naeke lekate ińko dewa sewawạń. 
Exodus28:42 Ḍanḍa khon bulu hạbicʼ dapalokʼ lạgitʼ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ huḍiń penkom benao ocoakoa. 
Exodus28:43 Aron ar uniren hoponko tinre ńapamokʼ tạmbureko bolokʼa se sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ pinḍre sewa kạmi lạgitʼko laha idikʼa unre onko do noa kạṭicʼ penko horoga. Nonkate onko do bin dusạnko tahena ar bako gujukʼa. Aron ar uniren bõsko lạgitʼ noage mitʼṭecʼ niạm leka tahẽyena. 
Exodus29:1 “Naeke lekate jemon ińko sewawạń onate iń ńutumte onkom begar dohokoa. Am do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar barea bheḍam hataokinạ. Onkoakʼ hoṛmore jemon jãhãn khũt alo tahen. 
Exodus29:2 Ona tayom mĩhĩ moeda reakʼ piṭhạko, sunum ojokʼakʼ piṭhạko ar thapṛa piṭhạkom benaoa. Noako reakʼ okaṭakʼre hõ khạmi do alom mesalakʼa." 
Exodus29:3 Ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍạlicʼre onakom sajaoa ar uni ḍaṅgra ar bheḍakin sãote ḍạlicʼ hõ iń samaṅrem dohoya. 
Exodus29:4 Ona tayom Aron ar uniren hoponko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenem idikoa ar dakʼtem ạbuk saphakoa. 
Exodus29:5 Tayomte ona bises kicricʼkoante Aron do bhitri reakʼ aṅgrop, ephod latarre horokʼ lạgitʼ jeleń aṅgrop, ephod ar koṛam-ḍhalwam horokʼaea. Ar gạkhuṛ tite benaoakʼ ḍanḍa reakʼ ḍombe sãote ephodem tolaea." 
Exodus29:6 Ona tayom bohokʼ reakʼ dạhṛitem dạhṛiyea ar ona cetanre sona reakʼ sonot mukuṭem horokʼaea. 
Exodus29:7 Ar ona tayom do ojokʼ bahale reakʼ sunum bohokʼrem dulaea arem ojokʼ bahalea. 
Exodus29:8 Uniren hoponko hõm ạgukoa ar kicricʼem horokʼakoa. Aron ar uniren hoponko hõ ḍanḍa totolakʼtem paṭhekoa. Ona tayom bohokʼ dạhṛitem dạhṛikoa. Nonkate Aron ar uniren hoponko do naeke hudạrem bahalkoa. Noa naeke hudạ do hok lekate jaejug hạbicʼ onkoakʼ bõsrege tahẽ akae tahena. 
Exodus29:9  
Exodus29:10 “Ar uni ḍaṅgra do ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅrem ạguyea, ar Aron ar uniren hoponko do uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ bohokʼre akoakʼ tiko dohoytakoa." 
Exodus29:11 Ona tayom ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu samaṅre ḍaṅgram magea. 
Exodus29:12 Ar thoṛa mãyãmem hataoa ar kạṭupʼte pinḍ reakʼ dereńkom ojokʼakʼa ar sarecʼ mãyãm do pinḍ aṛerem dulkakʼa. 
Exodus29:13 Ona tayom lacʼ poṭae dapal akatʼ itil ar im cetan reakʼ gantharko ar banar kunḍi ar onakinre menakʼ itil sudhạm hataoa ar onako do pinḍ cetanrem atar giḍikakʼa. 
Exodus29:14 Menkhan uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ jel, harta ar gubriko do Israelkoakʼ ḍera barhete idikatem atar giḍikakʼa. Noa do kại ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana." 
Exodus29:15 “Ona tayom unkin bheḍakin modre mitʼṭenem ạguyea. Aron ar uniren hoponko do uni bheḍawakʼ bohokʼre akoakʼ tiko dohoytakoa. 
Exodus29:16 Inạ tayom uni bheḍam mageya ar uniyakʼ mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaetem irciwakʼa. 
Exodus29:17 Uni bheḍa do phạṛi phạṛim getʼ kuṭrạyea, ar uniyakʼ jaṅga ar lacʼ bhitri reakʼ hĩsko ạrupʼ saphakate bohokʼ cetanrem dohoya." 
Exodus29:18 Inạ tayom do pinḍ cetanrem atar giḍikaea. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼge, metakʼme Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼge, one ona reakʼ jut so do uniye kusiyakʼ kan." 
Exodus29:19 “Ar uni eṭagicʼ bheḍa hõm hataoea ar Aron ar uniren hoponko do uniyakʼ bohokʼ cetanre akoakʼ tiko dohoytakoa. 
Exodus29:20 Ar bheḍam mageya ar uniyakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare, jojom ti ar jaṅgạkin reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼrem jotʼakoa. Ona chaḍa sarecʼ mãyãm do pinḍ beṛhaetem irciyakʼa." 
Exodus29:21 Ona tayom ojokʼ bahalokʼakʼ thoṛa sunum ar pinḍ khon thoṛa mãyãm hataokate Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ kicricʼrem irciya. Onate kicricʼ sudhạ uni ar uniren hopon do iń ńutumteko begar ocokʼa. 
Exodus29:22 “Ona tayom uni bheḍawakʼ itil, canḍbol reakʼ itil, lacʼ poṭa cetan reakʼ itil, im cetan reakʼ ganthar ar banar kunḍi ar onakinre menakʼ itil ar phạṛi akatʼ jojom bulu hõm hataoa. Nui do sid emokʼren mitʼṭen bheḍage." 
Exodus29:23 Ona tayom Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoakan bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ ḍạlicʼ khon mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ, mitʼṭecʼ sunum piṭhạ, ar mitʼṭecʼ thapṛa piṭhạm hataoa." 
Exodus29:24 Noako do Aron ar uniren hoponko tirem calakoa ar dolao samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Probhu Isor samaṅrem dolaoa. 
Exodus29:25 Ona tayom onkoakʼ ti khon hatao ruạṛkate pinḍ cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sãotem atar giḍikakʼa. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼge one ona reakʼ jut so do uniye kusiyakʼ kan. 
Exodus29:26 Aron naeke hudạre ojokʼ bahale reakʼ porobren nui bheḍawakʼ koṛam reakʼ hĩs hataokate dolao samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Probhu Isor samaṅre onam dolaoa. Ar noa do amakʼ bakhrage hoyokʼa. 
Exodus29:27 “Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ naeke hudạ bahal porobren sid emokʼren bheḍawakʼ khon hataoakʼ dolao samaṅokʼakʼ jel ar samaṅ akatʼ bulu reakʼ jel do Probhu Isor ńutumtem begar dohokakʼa. 
Exodus29:28 Nonkate Israelkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sulukren sanam samaṅokʼakʼ niạko hĩs do jaoge Aron ar uniren hoponko em ocokʼa. Niạ hĩskoge Probhu Isor ńutumte Israelkoakʼ sandes do hoyokʼa. 
Exodus29:29 “Aronakʼ sonot kicricʼko do uniren hoponkoko ńama. Noa kicricʼ horokʼkatege onko do naeke hudạreko ojokʼ bahal ocokʼa. 
Exodus29:30 Aron tayom uniren okoeṭakʼ hopon do naeke lekate ńapamokʼ tạmbure sonot ṭhạ̃ire sewae lạgitʼe bolokʼa uni do eae din hạbicʼ inạ kicricʼge horokʼ akae hoyokʼtaea. 
Exodus29:31 “Ar am do sid emokʼren nui bheḍawakʼ jel hataokate mitʼṭecʼ sonot ṭhạ̃irem teke isina. 
Exodus29:32 Aron ar uniren hoponko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen ḍạlicʼre doho akan piṭhạ sãote ona jelko joma. 
Exodus29:33 Naeke kạmire bahalko lạgitʼ ar iń ńutumte begar dohoko lạgitʼ oka samaṅokʼakʼ jomakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ beoharokʼ ona do Aron ar uniren hoponko jojom hoyokʼtakoa. Eṭakʼ hoṛ ona do bako jom daṛeakʼa, ente ona do sonotakʼ jomakʼ kana." 
Exodus29:34 Sid emokʼ reakʼ bheḍawakʼ jel se piṭhạ setakʼ hạbicʼ sarecʼ tahen khan ona do atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. Okoehõ jemon aloko jom, ente ona do sonotakʼ jomakʼ kana." 
Exodus29:35 “Aron ar uniren hoponko cetanre okakoń hukumatʼme am do ona jotowakʼgem onkaea. Noa sid emokʼ porob do eae din hạbicʼem hoeocoya. 
Exodus29:36 Kại ńutumte puruchunokʼ lạgitʼ eae din hạbicʼ am do dinạmge mitʼṭenkate damkomem samaṅea. Kại ńutumte puruchunokʼ porob hotete pinḍem saphaea ar sunum dulkate iń ńutumte onam begar dohokakʼa. 
Exodus29:37 Pinḍ sapha ocoy lạgitʼ eae din hạbicʼ din hilokʼ puruchun porob hotete ona do iń ńutumtem begar dohoya. Ar onate pinḍ do sonot utạrokʼa. Onare jãhãnakʼge jagokʼ ona do iń ńutumte begar dohokʼa. 
Exodus29:38 “Ona tayom khon ona pinḍ cetanre dinạm hilokʼ bareakate bheḍa hopon samaṅ kin hoyokʼa; unkinakʼ umer do mitʼ bochor hoyokʼ jạṛurạ. 
Exodus29:39 Mitʼṭen do setakʼ jokhecʼ ar eṭagicʼ do ńuhumokʼ jokhecʼ samaṅkin hoyokʼa. 
Exodus29:40 Pạhil bheḍa sãote do mitʼ keji irạl sae gram mĩhĩ holoṅ ar koṭecʼ roḍocʼakʼ mitʼ liṭar jạitun sunum sãote mesalkate samaṅ hoyokʼa. Ona chaḍa coḍor lạgitʼ mitʼ liṭar darkha rasa hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Exodus29:41 Ńuhumokʼ jokhecʼ okoeṭakʼ bheḍam samaṅe uni sãote setakʼ oktere lekage anaj ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so uni doe kusiyakʼ kan. 
Exodus29:42 “Piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ, metakʼme iń samaṅre noa jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do jaoge samaṅ hoyokʼa. Ar iń do onḍege ape sãoteń ńapamokʼa ar am tulucʼ iń galmaraoa." 
Exodus29:43 Israelko sãote onḍegeń ńapamokʼa ar ińakʼ ṭhonok do ona ṭhạ̃iye begar dohokakʼa. 
Exodus29:44 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar pinḍ do iń ńutumteń begar dohokakʼa ar naeke lekate iń sewawạń lạgitʼ Aron ar uniren hoponko hõ iń ńutumteń begar dohokoa. 
Exodus29:45 Iń do Israelren Isor hoekate onko talareń girobasokʼa. 
Exodus29:46 Ar unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do. Iń do onko talareń tahen lạgitʼte Misor disạm khoniń oḍokʼ ạgu akatʼkoa. Ar iń Probhuge onkoren Isor kạnạń." 
Exodus30:1 “Dhup jered lạgitʼ am do gabla kaṭte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍem benaoa. 
Exodus30:2 Ona reakʼ jeleń do mitʼ moka, osar do mitʼ moka ar usul do bar moka. Dereń sudhạ goṭa pinḍ do mitʼṭen jinisge hoyokʼa." 
Exodus30:3 Pinḍ reakʼ chat ar bhit reakʼ beṛhaete ar dereńko do sonatem tol ocoya ar ona beṛhaete do sona reakʼ noksam benao ocowakʼa. 
Exodus30:4 Pinḍ banarsa aṛe noksa latarre bareakate sona reakʼ kạṛim benao ocowakʼa jemon ona bhitrite ḍaṅkin gutukate gokʼ idikʼ. 
Exodus30:5 Ona ḍaṅkin do gabla kaṭ reakʼem benao ocoya ar sonatem tolkakʼa. 
Exodus30:6 Goha tạmbu ṭhen, metakʼme gohawakʼ cetanre menakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ ṭhen oka orwal tahen ona samaṅre noa pinḍem dohokakʼa; ar iń do onḍege am sãoteń ńapamokʼa." 
Exodus30:7 “Dinạm hilokʼ setakʼre diuhe reakʼ mạlikoe jutre Aron do pinḍ cetanre jut so reakʼ dhupe jereda. 
Exodus30:8 Ar ńuhumokʼ jokhecʼ diuhe jol oktere uni do arhõ ona dhupe jereda. Onate aperen bõsko do piṛhike piṛhi Probhu Isor samaṅre jaoge dhup jered hoyokʼtakoa. 
Exodus30:9 Ar niạ pinḍ cetanre eṭakʼ jãhãn dhup do alom jereda se jãhãn jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se anaj samaṅokʼakʼ se coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõ alom samaṅa. 
Exodus30:10 Puruchun lạgitʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ mãyãm do pinḍ reakʼ dereńkorem ojokʼakʼa ar Aron do bochorre mitʼ dhao pinḍe saphaea. Ar nonkate maraṅ naeke do piṛhike piṛhi bochorre mitʼ dhao noa kạmi hoyokʼtaea. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte sonot utạrakʼ pinḍ kana.” 
Exodus30:11 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus30:12 “Israelren hoṛkoakʼ lekha baḍae lạgitʼ tinre hoṛ-lekha hoyokʼa unre mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do rupạte jiwi reakʼ dam Probhu Isor emae hoyokʼtakoa. Onate hoṛ lekha khạtirte oka muhinre paṛaokʼ reakʼ katha ona do onkore baṅ hijukʼa. 
Exodus30:13 Lekha akan hoṛkoakʼ dolte calakʼ ạurire mimitʼ hoṛ do gel gram ojon reakʼ dhorom sekel reakʼ adha sekelkate emokʼ hoyokʼtakoa. Ar niạ adha sekel do Probhu Isorakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Exodus30:14 Okoe lekha akan dolteye bolokʼ, metakʼme okoeyakʼ umer do bargel bochor se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, uni do noa Probhu Isor emae hoyokʼtaea." 
Exodus30:15 Jiwi reakʼ dam lekate Probhu Isor noa emae jokhecʼ kisạ̃ṛko hõ adha sekel khon bạ̃ṛti emokʼ baṅ lagaoakoa, ar reṅgecʼko hõ inạ khon kom do baṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Exodus30:16 Israelko ṭhen khon jiwi-dam reakʼ rupạ hataokate ona do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ kạmire beoharokʼa. Noa jiwi-dam oka do apeakʼ jiwi bodolte emokʼ hoyokʼ ona do Probhu Isor samaṅre Israelkoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dikʼsạwakʼge hoyokʼtakoa.” 
Exodus30:17 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus30:18 “Ti-jaṅga ạbukokʼ lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hanḍha ar ona doṛomkakʼ lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ganḍom benao ocoya. Ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar pinḍ reakʼ adha ṭhạ̃ire onam doṛom ocokoa ar onare dakʼem dohoya. 
Exodus30:19 Ona dakʼte Aron ar uniren hoponko do ti-jaṅgako ạbukokʼa. 
Exodus30:20 Ar jemon aloko gujukʼ ona iạte ńapamokʼ tạmbure bolokʼ lahare onko do ona dakʼte ti jaṅgako ạbuk saphakʼa. Onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼre uni sewawae lạgitʼ pinḍ ṭhen calakʼ lahare hõ ti jaṅgako ạbuk saphakʼa jemon aloko gujukʼ. Nonkage Aron ar uniren hoponko lạgitʼ noa do piṛhike piṛhi jaejugakʼ mitʼṭecʼ niạmge hoyokʼa.” 
Exodus30:21  
Exodus30:22 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus30:23 “Am do soros sorosakʼ jut so mosolako, metakʼme mõṛẽ keji gondhoros, bar keji tala jut so darcini, bar keji tala boc," 
Exodus30:24 ar mõṛẽ keji kidạmem hataoa. Ona chaḍa jạitun sunum hõ pe liṭar talam hataoa. 
Exodus30:25 Jut so jinis tear leka am do noako jut so mosola mitʼ sãote mesalkate ojokʼ bahalokʼ lạgitʼ sunumem benaoa. Ar noage sonot ojokʼakʼ sunum do hoyokʼa. 
Exodus30:26 Noa ojokʼakʼ sunumte am do ńapamokʼ tạmbu, goha sinduk," 
Exodus30:27 ṭebil ar ona cetan reakʼ jinisko, diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ sapapʼakʼ, dhup-pinḍ," 
Exodus30:28 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ ar ona reakʼ sanam bhajanko ar ganḍo sudhạ hanḍha hõ iń ńutumtem begar dohokakʼa. 
Exodus30:29 Onate onako do sonot utạrakʼ jinis hoyokʼa. Onare okaṭakʼ jagokʼ onage iń ńutumte begar hoyokʼa. 
Exodus30:30 “Aron ar uniren hoponko naeke hoekate jemon ińko sapʼsorạń onate onkom ojokʼ bahalkoa ar iń ńutumtem begar dohokoa. 
Exodus30:31 Am do Israelkom baḍae ocokoa je, piṛhike piṛhi onkoakʼ sonot ojokʼakʼ sunum do noage hoyokʼa." 
Exodus30:32 Disạmren hoṛkoakʼ hoṛmore ona sunum jemon alo ojogokʼ ar onako mosolate noa niạm lekate sunum hõ jemon aloko tearma. Noa sunum do sonotakʼ kana; onate onko hõ ona leka bujhạu hoyokʼtakoa. 
Exodus30:33 Ar jãhãege nonkan jut so mosolae tear se naeke chaḍa ar jãhãeakʼ hoṛmore ojogokʼ enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao ocokʼa.” 
Exodus30:34 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do jut so mosola, metakʼme goglu, nothi, kunduru ar Lobanem hataoa. Am do noako reakʼ soman somanem hataoa arem sipi mesala ar jut so dhupem benaoa. Ar okoe jut so jinisko tear onko hotete noam kạmi ocoya. Onare buluṅ hõm emakʼa; noare jãhãn bhejalakʼ alo tahenma ona do sonotakʼge hoyokʼma." 
Exodus30:35  
Exodus30:36 Noa reakʼ thoṛa hataokate onam gunḍạea ar ńapamokʼ tạmbure goha-paṭa samaṅrem dohoya. Ar iń do onḍe am sãoteń ńapamokʼa. Ar noa dhup do sonot utạrakʼ jinis mentem bujhạua. 
Exodus30:37 Okoehõ noa niạm lekate apnar beohar lạgitʼ niạko mosolate jãhãn dhup aloko benao joṅ ma. Ente noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohoakana ar onape disạ dohokakʼa. 
Exodus30:38 Jut so jinis lekate beohar lạgitʼ jãhãe onae benao joṅ enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao ocokʼa.” 
Exodus31:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus31:2 “Ńelme, iń do Jihudạ gusṭiren Uriren hopon Besalel iń bachao akawana. Uri do Hurren hopone tahẽkana." 
Exodus31:3 Iń do Besalelge ińren Jiuteń perecʼ akadea. Uni do ạkilte, bujte, bidiạte ar sanam lekan kạrigol kạmi reakʼ daṛeń emakawadea." 
Exodus31:4 Onate uni do acʼakʼ mon khon hudiskate sona, rupạ ar pitạl cetanre mońj mońj noksakoe benao daṛeakʼa," 
Exodus31:5 ar damanakʼ dhiriko ged ar onare rokʼ bạisạu ar kaṭ reakʼ eṭakʼ sanam lekan kạmiko hõe kạmi daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus31:6 Ona chaḍa uni goṛowae lạgitʼ iń do Dan gusṭiren Ahisamak hopon Oholiab hõń bachao akawana. Ar okoe gạkhuṛ kạrigolko noako kạmi onko hõ nonkan ạkiliń emakawatʼkoa jemon amiń emakawatʼme hukum leka onko hõ sanamakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ. Noako jinis do hoyokʼkana: 
Exodus31:7 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu, goha sinduk ar ona cetan reakʼ ḍhakna, tạmbu reakʼ sanam asbabko," 
Exodus31:8 ṭebil ar ona sãoteakʼ jinisko, khạṭi sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ jinisko, dhudhup pinḍ," 
Exodus31:9 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ ar ona reakʼ thạri-bạṭiko, bhajanko ar ona reakʼ ganḍoko ar naekeakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ Aronakʼ sonot kicricʼ ar uniren hoponko lạgitʼ kicricʼko." 
Exodus31:10  
Exodus31:11 Ojokʼ bahalokʼ lạgitʼ sunum ar sonot ṭhạ̃ire lạgitʼ jut so dhupko. Ar amiń hukum akawatʼme leka onko do jemon onako benao daṛeakʼ.” 
Exodus31:12 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko niạ katha galmaraoako lạgitʼe metadea, “Ape do ińakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãpe manaoa. Noa jirạukʼ mãhã do piṛhike piṛhi ape ar iń talare nonkan mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ hoyokʼa onatepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do ar ińge iń ńutumteń begar dohoakatʼpea." 
Exodus31:13  
Exodus31:14 “Jirạukʼ mãhã manaope, ente ape lạgitʼ noa din do iń ńutumteń begar dohoakada. Ar jãhãe noa din bae manao enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa; ar jãhãe niạ dinreye kạmi enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao giḍi ocokʼa." 
Exodus31:15 Ape do hapta reakʼ turui dinpe khaṭaokʼa menkhan eaeakʼ din do jirạukʼ dinge, ona do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ begar akan din kana. Ar jãhãe ona dinreye kạmi enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Exodus31:16 Israelko do mitʼṭecʼ jaejugakʼ bondobos lekate niạ jirạukʼ mãhã do piṛhike piṛhiko palona. 
Exodus31:17 Niạ din do iń ar Israelko talare jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ kana, ente iń do turui dinre serma ar ot iń sirjạu akada ar eae din hilokʼre do cetʼ hõ bạń kạmileda.”" 
Exodus31:18 Sinại buru cetanre Mose ṭhen niạko kathae roṛ mucạtʼketʼ khan Probhu Isor do goha reakʼ barea dhiri cạktiye emadea. Isor do noakin dhiri cạktire acʼakʼ kạṭupʼte hukume olleda. 
Exodus32:1 Mose do buru khon pheḍ hijukʼe bilometʼkana menteko ńelketʼ khan hoṛko do Aron beṛhaete jarwayenteko metadea, “Hor udukʼ abon lạgitʼ am do debotako benao abonme ente Misor disạm khon okoeye oḍok ạguketʼ bon, uni Moseyakʼ cetʼ hoyakana ona do babon baḍae kana.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aron do roṛ ruạṛatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Aperen bạhuko ar aperen hoponko ar hoponerakoakʼ lutur reakʼ sona pagrako totʼkate iń ṭhen ạguipe.”" 
Exodus32:3 Onko do jotoge akoakʼ lutur reakʼ pagra totʼkate Aronko emadea. 
Exodus32:4 Aron do onkoakʼ ona saj bajkoe galao ocoketʼte chańcreye dulketʼa ar mitʼṭen mĩhũ muṭhạne benaokedea. Ona ńelte Israelko doko menkeda, “E boehako, aperen debotako do nuirege menakʼkoa. Misor disạm khon noko debotage ape doko oḍok ạguakatʼpea.”" 
Exodus32:5 Niạ ńelte Aron do uni mĩhũ samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar noae lại jạhirkeda, “Gapa do Probhu Isor ńutumte porob hoyokʼa.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ar dosar hilokʼ hoṛko do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. Ar ona tayom do jojomko duṛupʼena ar enecʼ-khilḍukʼ lạgitʼko beretʼena. 
Exodus32:7 Onate Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do latarte pheḍ calakʼme. Amren hoṛko okoe do Misor disạm khonem oḍok ạguakatʼko onko doko kharap caba akana." 
Exodus32:8 Onko do ińakʼ hukum khon pharakteko senakana. Onko do ako lạgitʼ mitʼṭen mĩhũ muṭhạnko benao akawana. Ar otre ombakʼkate uniko ḍobokʼae kana ar uni ńutumte janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼkoa arko meneda, ‘E boehako, nuirege aboren debota do menakʼkoa. Noko debotage Misor disạm khonko oḍok ạguakatʼ bona.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Probhu Isor do Mose arhõe metadea, “Noko hoṛ doń baḍae akatʼko tahengea. Noko do keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạt kanako." 
Exodus32:10 Am do alom tạkicʼ daramińạ. Onko upạrte ińakʼ edre do seṅgel leka jolokʼ kantińạ. Iń do onkoń jarkhar cabakoa. Ar ona tayom do am hotete mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jạtiń hoyocokoa.” 
Exodus32:11 Unre Mose do acʼren Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrenteye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiạrkate okoe do amakʼ maraṅ daṛete Misor disạm khonem oḍok ạguakatʼko onko amren hoṛko cetanre cedakʼ nunạkʼ dom edrekʼ kana?" 
Exodus32:12 Ar Misorrenko do niạ katha roṛ reakʼ cedakʼ ạtko ńama, dhạrti khon meṭaoko lạgitʼ am do noa buru ṭoṭha talarem oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa? Amakʼ noa botoranakʼ edre do thirtam. Dayakʼme, amren hoṛko cetanre noa muhin do alom ạguiya." 
Exodus32:13 Amren guti Abraham, Isạhak ar Israelakʼ katha hudisme. Amakʼ ńutumte kiriạkatem metatʼko tahẽkana, onkoren bõs do sermaren ipilko lekam saṅgekoa ar amakʼ gokʼakʼ disạm do jaejug reakʼ ạidạri lekate onkoren hoponkom danakoa.”" 
Exodus32:14 Niạ katha ańjomkate Probhu Isor do daya hecʼadea. Uniren hoṛko cetanre oka muhin ạgui reakʼ kathae menletʼ ona do ar bae ạguleda. 
Exodus32:15 Ona tayom Mose do goha reakʼ banar cạkti dhiriwante buru khone pheḍ hecʼena. Ona dhiri cạktikin reakʼ dene banarsage ol tahẽkana. 
Exodus32:16 Onare Isorakʼ titeakʼ kạmi tahẽkana, ar ona cetanre rokʼ caṛhao akatʼ olhõ uniyakʼge tahẽkana." 
Exodus32:17 Josuạ do hoṛkoakʼ andoṛ ańjomkate Moseye metadea, “Ḍera khon lạṛhại reakʼ sabad ańjom hijukʼ kana.”" 
Exodus32:18 Moseye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Lạṛhạire jitạu reakʼ hoho andoṛ do baṅkana, ar lạṛhạire bhagaoen reakʼ kạumạu reakʼ andoṛ hõ baṅkana. Iń okaṭakʼ iń ańjometʼkan ona do sereń reakʼ aṛaṅkana.”" 
Exodus32:19 Ona tayom Mose do ḍera sore senen khan uni mĩhũ ar hoṛko enejokʼkane ńelketʼkoa. Ona ńelte Mose do edreteye seṅgelena ar ti reakʼ dhiri cạkti kine tawakʼkeda. Onate ona dhiri cạktikin do buru latarte ńurente rạputʼena. 
Exodus32:20 Ar onkoko benao akade uni mĩhũ do seṅgelreye khadlekadea. Ar uniye gejerkedete dakʼreye giḍikeda ar Israelko ona dakʼe ńu ocoketʼkoa. 
Exodus32:21 Ar Arone metadea, “Onko do cetʼko cekaletʼtamte, nonkan bạṛicʼ kại secʼem ạyurketʼkoa?”" 
Exodus32:22 Arone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Alom edrekʼa, am dom baḍaegea noko hoṛ do bạṛicʼreko jobe akana." 
Exodus32:23 Onko do hecʼkateko metadińạ, ‘hor udukʼ idi abon lạgitʼ mitʼṭen debota benao abonme, ente uni Mose, okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼ bon uniyakʼ cetʼ hoyakana ona do babon baḍaekana.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ar niạ katha ańjomkate onkoń metatʼkoa, okoekoakʼ sona pagra menakʼtape onko do ona totʼkate iń ṭhen ạguiype. Ar onko do ińko ạguạdiń khan seṅgelre onań galao ocokeda ar sonaren mĩhũye oḍok hecʼena.”" 
Exodus32:25 Mose do hoṛko bhiṅgṛạu akana menteye ńelketʼkoa. Uni doe bujhạukeda Arongeye bhiṅgṛạu ocoakatʼkoa ar onate bạiri ṭhen cigạri ocokʼ lek ko hoyakana. 
Exodus32:26 Mose do ḍerate bolokʼ horre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Probhu Isor secʼ okoe menakʼpe ape do iń ṭhen hijukʼpe.” Onate Liwi gusṭiren sanamkoge uni ṭhenko jarwayena." 
Exodus32:27 Unre uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ape mimitʼko apan ạpin ḍanḍare tarwaṛe rebedpe, ar ḍera reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire senkate jãhãege samaṅrepe ńamko onkope gocʼkoa, baṅ doe boeha kan, baṅ doe gatekan, baṅ doe aḍepaseren hoṛkan.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Liwiko do Moseyakʼ hukum lekageko kạmikeda. Onate enhilokʼ do pe hajar hoṛko gocʼ ocoyena. 
Exodus32:29 Ona tayom Moseye menkeda, “Teheńge Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohokʼpe, ente apan ạpin hoponko ar boehako upạrte teṅgokʼ hõ bape pạclena. Ona iạte teheń ape do Probhu Isorakʼ bhorpe ńamkeda.”" 
Exodus32:30 Dosar hilokʼ Mose do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do ạḍipe kại akada. Menkhan ńit Probhu Isor ṭhen iń rakapʼ calakʼ kana. Hoedaṛeakʼ apeakʼ puruchun reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobos iń hoeocoya.”" 
Exodus32:31 Mose do Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ senkateye menkeda, “Hae, hae Probhu Isor! Noko hoṛ do ḍhergeko ghạṭ akada. Onko do ako lạgitʼ sonaren debotako benao akawana." 
Exodus32:32 Menkhan ńitokʼ do ma dayakate onkoakʼ ghạṭko ikạ katakom, ar bam onkawako khan amakʼ puthi khon ińakʼ ńutum baṛe meṭao giḍikakʼme.”" 
Exodus32:33 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Okoe iń upạrteko kại akatʼ eken onkoakʼ ńutumge ińakʼ puthi khoniń meṭao giḍikatakoa." 
Exodus32:34 Ańjomme, iń okaṭakʼ jaega reakʼ kathań roṛakatʼ ńitokʼ am do senkate hoṛko onḍe idikom. Ińren goḍet do hore udukʼ idiapea. Ar tinre sạjại reakʼ okte hijukʼa unre onkoń sạjạikoa.”" 
Exodus32:35 Arone benao akade mĩhũ iạte hoṛko okako cekaketʼ onate Probhu Isor do onko cetanre maraṅ okocʼ muhine kolkeda. 
Exodus33:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Amren okoe hoṛko Misor disom khonem oḍok ạguakatʼko onko salakʼ niạ ṭhạ̃i bạgikate ińiń gokʼakawatʼpe disạmte calakʼpe. Iń do Abraham, Isạhak ar Jakob ṭhen noa disạm reakʼgeń kiriạlena, onkoren bõskoń emakoa mente." 
Exodus33:2 Iń do ape laha lahate mitʼṭen serma goḍet iń kolea ar uni do ona disạm khon Kananrenko, Amorirenko, Hittirenko, Pherisirenko, Hiwirenko ar Jebusirenkoe laga ńirkoa." 
Exodus33:3 Onḍe do toa, dumur rasa ar cetʼ jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼa. Menkhan keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạtkantepe iń do ape sãote bạń calakʼa, ariń senlen khan horregeń marao utạrpea.”" 
Exodus33:4 Niạ muhin reakʼ katha ańjomkate hoṛko do rarakʼko ehopʼena. Ar akoakʼ cetʼ abhrange bako horokʼleda," 
Exodus33:5 ente Probhu Iso do Moseye metade tahẽkana, “Israelkom metakoa, onko do, mitʼṭecʼ keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạtren kanako mente. Onate mitʼ ghạṛi hõ onko sãoteń tahen, enḍekhan onko doń marao utạrkoa. Ar ńit onkoakʼ hoṛmore okako abhran menakʼ onako totʼ giḍikakʼma. Ar ona tayom iń hudisa onkore cetʼ iń cekaea mente.”" 
Exodus33:6 Onate Israelko do Horeb burure akoakʼ abhranko totʼ giḍikada; ar tishõ onako do bako horokʼleda. 
Exodus33:7 Mose do Israelkoakʼ ḍera bahre sạṅgiń ńokʼre tạmbui ṭaṅgaoetʼkan tahẽkana ar ona do “Ńapamokʼ tạmbui metakʼkan tahẽkana.” Ar Probhu Isor ṭhen jãhãege jãhãnakʼe khoj enḍekhan uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhene senokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus33:8 Mose tinre ńapamokʼ tạmbuteye bolokʼkan tahẽkana unre hoṛko do apan ạpin tạmbu reakʼ duạr samaṅreko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana ar uni tạmbure ạuriye bolokʼ hạbicʼ uni secʼko beṅgetʼkakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Exodus33:9 Mose ona tạmbure bolo tayom rimil khunṭi do pheḍ hijukʼkan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor tin hạbicʼ Mose tulucʼe galmaraoetʼ tahẽkan unhạbicʼ ona do duạr ṭhenge tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus33:10 Ar hoṛko tinre noa khunṭi tạmbu ṭhenko ńeletʼ tahẽkana unre joto hoṛ apan ạpin tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen otre ombakʼkate Probhu Isorko sewawaekan tahẽkana. 
Exodus33:11 Manwa cetʼleka gate sãote samna sạmni kathako roṛ ṭhik onkage Probhu Isor hõ Mose tulucʼe galmaraoetʼ tahẽkana. Ar noa tayom Mose do Israelkoakʼ ḍerateye ruạṛ senokʼkan tahẽkana menkhan Nunren hopon Josuạ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu khon bae oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana. Ente Josuạ ńutuman nui juạn koṛa do Moseren gokʼṛoyicʼe tahẽkana. 
Exodus33:12 Mose do Probhu Isore metadea, “Am do noko hoṛko idikom metadiń tahẽkana, menkhan iń tulucʼ okoeyem kolea ona do bam lạiyạń kana. Am dom men akada ińren lekageń baḍaeakatʼmea ar ińre amakʼ daya hõ menakʼa." 
Exodus33:13 Amakʼ dayań ńamakatʼ khan tobe do amakʼ hor baṛe udukʼạńme jemoniń baḍae daṛeakʼ am samaṅre dayań ńama mente. Disạime, noko jạtrenko do amren kangeako.”" 
Exodus33:14 Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛketʼa, “Ińge am sãoteń calakʼa ar amiń jirạu ocomea.”" 
Exodus33:15 Mose do uniye metadea, “Iń sãote bam calakʼ khan nonḍe khon do alom kolkalea." 
Exodus33:16 Ale sãote bam senlen khan cekatele baḍaea, amakʼ daya do iń ar amren hoṛko cetanre menakʼa mente? Iń ar amren hoṛko dhạrtiren eṭakʼ hoṛko khonle begarge ona do cekatele bujhạu daṛekea?”" 
Exodus33:17 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am okam menketʼ onageń onkaea, ente ińakʼ daya do am cetanre menakʼa ar am do ińren mentegeń baḍae akatʼmea.”" 
Exodus33:18 Moseye menkeda, “Enḍekhan amakʼ ṭhonok baṛe ńel ocoyińme.”" 
Exodus33:19 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Iń do ińakʼ sanam ṭhonokiń udukʼama. Ar am samaṅre ińakʼ ‘Probhu Isor’ ńutumiń lại jạhira. Ińakʼ sanaleka okoeyiń dayawae unigeń dayawaea, ar okoe hoṛ iń mãyãwae, unigeń mãyãwaea." 
Exodus33:20 Menkhan am do ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã bam ńel daṛeakʼa, ente iń ńel tayom do okoe hõ jiwetʼ ohoko tahẽdaṛelena.”" 
Exodus33:21 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Iń ṭhen niạ ṭhạ̃i secʼ beṅgetʼkate ńelme. Ar ona huṭupʼ dhiri cetanre senkate teṅgokʼme." 
Exodus33:22 Ińakʼ ṭhonok tinre am samaṅte parom calakʼa unre am do buru reakʼ paṛakʼreń oko dohokama ar iń ạuriń parom calakʼ hạbicʼ ińakʼ titeń aḍ esetʼkama. 
Exodus33:23 Ona tayom ińakʼ tiyiń ocokʼle khan am do ińakʼ tayom secʼem ńela, menkhan ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do baṅ ńelokʼa. ”" 
Exodus34:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Pạhilakʼ dhiri cạktikin leka arhõ benaome. Ar amakʼ rạputʼakʼ dhiri cạktikinre okako katha ol tahẽkan niạ nãwã dhiri cạktikinre hõ onkageń olama." 
Exodus34:2 Am do gapa setakʼre sapṛaokate sinại burute rakapʼ hijukʼme. Iń do onḍe buru muthnire am samaṅreń hạjirokʼa. 
Exodus34:3 Ar am sãote okoehõ jemon aloko tahen se okoehõ burure aloko ńelokʼ, ar buru samaṅre dạṅgrako, bhiḍiko ar meromko hõ jemon aloko ạtiń.”" 
Exodus34:4 Mose do unre pạhilakʼ dhiri cạktikin leka arhõ barea dhiri cạktiye benaokeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ạḍi setakʼre sinại buruteye rakapʼ calaoena. Ar dhiri cạktikine sapʼ torakeda. 
Exodus34:5 Probhu Isor do rimil khunṭi khon pheḍ hecʼkate Mose ṭhene teṅgoyena ar acʼakʼ “Probhu Isor ” ńutume lại jạhirketʼtea. 
Exodus34:6 Uni do Mose samaṅteye sen paromena ar noae lại jạhirkeda, “Probhu, Probhu, uni do daya ar mãyãte perecʼicʼ Isor kanae. Uni do usạrate bae edre hodokʼa. Menkhan daya ar sạriyakʼteye kisạ̃ṛgea." 
Exodus34:7 Uniyakʼ asambheṛ daya do hajar piṛhi hạbicʼ tahenkana. Uni do behokakʼ, hul ar kạikoe ikạyetʼ kana, menkhan dusiyicʼ doe sạjạiyedea. Uni do apatakʼ ghạṭko onkoren hoponko ṭhen pe pon piṛhi hạbicʼe pańja halayetʼ kana.”" 
Exodus34:8 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do otre ombakʼkate sewawadeteye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ińre amakʼ daya menakʼ khan ale sãote dela calakʼme. Noko hoṛ doko keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan kanrehõ enhõ am do aleakʼ behokakʼ ar kạiko ikại taleme ar amren hoṛko mentege ataṅleme.”" 
Exodus34:9  
Exodus34:10 Khan Probhu Isor doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ bondobos iń dohoakada. Amren sanam hoṛko samaṅre nonkan hahaṛawakʼkoń kạmiya ona do niạ lahare dhạrtiren cele jạtrenko samaṅre baṅ hoyakana. Ar okoe hoṛko samaṅrem girobasokʼkan onkoko ńela, iń Probhu Isor do ape lạgitʼ okań cekae lạgidokʼkan ona do manwakoakʼ monre botor ar bhuktigeye janam ocoya." 
Exodus34:11 Teheń okań hukumape onape manaoa. Ar iń do Amorirenko, Kananrenko, Hittirenko, Pherisirenko, Hiwirenko, Jebusirenko ape samaṅ khoniń laga ńirkoa." 
Exodus34:12 Sontorokʼpe! Oka disạmpe bolo lạgidokʼkan ona disạmren hoṛko sãote cetʼge alope bondobosa; arpe onkae khan onko do ape talare jhampa lekako hoyokʼa. 
Exodus34:13 Onkoakʼ pinḍkope rạputʼ giḍikatakoa, onkoakʼ pujạ reakʼ dhirikope gejertakoa ar onkoko pujạwako Asera khunṭiko hõpe rạputʼ giḍikatakoa." 
Exodus34:14 Cele debotage alope sewawakoa, ente Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum do ãṭicʼ Isor; uni do mitʼṭen ãṭ Isor kanae." 
Exodus34:15 “Okoe ona disạmreko tahenkan onko sãote cetʼge alope bondobosa, ente onko tinre besapha monte akoren debotako ṭhen apnartetʼko emokʼa ar onko ńutumte janwarko dãṛẽkoa unre apeko neotapea ar ape tulucʼ boṅga ṭhen samaṅakʼ reakʼ jelko joma." 
Exodus34:16 Ona chaḍa onkoren kuṛiko sãote tinre aperen hoponkope baplakoa unre onkoren kuṛiko do akoren boṅgako otoṅ ocokoa arko laṭghaṭa ar aperen hoponko hõ onareko bulạukʼa. 
Exodus34:17 “Ape do dul boṅgako alope benao joṅa. 
Exodus34:18 “Menkhan bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porob porobokʼpe. Iń cetʼ lekań hukum akatʼpe onkage eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma. Abib cando reakʼ niṭ akan oktere ape do noape porobokʼa, ente ona candoge Misor disạm khonpe oḍokʼ hecʼlena." 
Exodus34:19 “Kukhiren mitʼke mitʼ pạhil hoponko do ińren kanako. Aperen sanam janwar palkoren mitʼke mitʼ pạhil ạnḍiạ hoponko hõ ińren kanako. 
Exodus34:20 Menkhan gadharen pạhil ạnḍiạ hopon do mitʼṭen bheḍa hoponte bodol chaḍaoe hoyokʼa. Ar uni hopon bae chaḍaokʼ enḍekhan uni do hoṭokʼ rạpudtae hoyokʼa. Ar aperen mitʼke mitʼ pạhil hoponko hõ chaḍaoko hoyokʼtapea. “Porob jokhecʼ okoehõ iń ṭhen eken ti do alope hijukʼa. 
Exodus34:21 “Ape do hapta reakʼ turui dinpe khaṭaokʼa menkhan eae mãhã hilokʼ do jirạukʼpe. Casokʼ jokhecʼ ar phosol samṭao oktere hõ onkaepe. 
Exodus34:22 Guhum samṭao jokhecʼ pạhil getʼakʼ guhumte eae hapta reakʼpe porobokʼa ar cas abad reakʼ mucạtʼ cando do phosol samṭao porobpe porobokʼa. 
Exodus34:23 Sanam herel hoṛ do bochorre pe dhao Probhu Isor samaṅrepe hạjirokʼa. Ente uni kangeae Israelkoren Isor do. 
Exodus34:24 Disạm talaren sanam jạtrenko do ape samaṅ khoniń laga ńirkoa ar apeakʼ disạm reakʼ simạnakoń baṛhao ocoytapea. Bochorre pe dhaokate tinre aperen Probhu Isor samaṅrepe hạjirokʼa unre okoehõ apeakʼ jaega jumi cetanre laloc alope dohoya. 
Exodus34:25 “Ape do iń ńutumte tinre janwarakʼ mãyãmpe samaṅa unre ona sãote khạmi mesal akatʼ jãhãnakʼge alope samaṅa. Bańcao porob reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jãhãnakʼge setakʼ hạbicʼ do alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa. 
Exodus34:26 Apeakʼ khet baṛge khon rakapʼakʼ pạhil phosol reakʼ bhage utạrakʼ hĩs do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼtepe ạguiya. “Merom hoponakʼ jel do uniren eṅgatakʼ toa sãote alope isina.” 
Exodus34:27 Ona tayom Probhu Iso do Moseye metadea, “Niạko katha ol dohokakʼme ente noako katha lekage am ar Israelko lạgitʼ bondobosiń dohoakada.”" 
Exodus34:28 Sinại burure Mose do Probhu Isor ṭhen pongel siń ar pongel ńindại tahẽkana. Ar inạ oktere uni do piṭhạ se dakʼ cetʼge bae jom-ńũleda. Probhu Isor do dhiri cạktikin cetanre acʼakʼ bondobos reakʼ kathako arhõe olkeda, ar onage gel hukum do hoyena." 
Exodus34:29 Mose do goha dhiri cạktikin banar tire hataokate tinre buru khone pheḍ hecʼena unre bae bujhạu daṛeada, Probhu Isor tulucʼ galmarao iạte uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do malkao akantaea mente." 
Exodus34:30 Aron ar sanam Israelko do Moseyakʼ noa malkaokʼkan mẽtʼãhã ńelte uni ṭhen sorokʼko botorena. 
Exodus34:31 Menkhan onkoe hohoatʼko khan Aron ar Israel mukhiyạko do uni ṭhenko hecʼena. Ar Mose do onko sãoteye galmaraokeda. 
Exodus34:32 Ar inạ tayom do Israelren sanam hoṛko uni ṭhenko hecʼena ar sinại burure Probhu Isore emen sanamakʼ hukume baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Exodus34:33 Mose do hoṛko sãote katha roṛe mucạtʼketʼ khan acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã do kicricʼteye betʼ esetʼketʼtaea. 
Exodus34:34 Menkhan ona tayom jãhãtinrege Probhu Isor sãote galmarao lạgitʼ uni samaṅreye calakʼkan tahẽkan unre uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ kicricʼe ocokʼetʼ tahẽkana. Probhu Isor samaṅ khon ạuriye oḍok hijukʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do oṭakʼge tahenkan tahẽkana. Ar okako hukume ńametʼ tahẽkan onḍe khon oḍok hecʼkate Israelkoe baḍae ocoyetʼko tahẽkana. 
Exodus34:35 Ar hoṛko ńeletʼ tahẽkana, Moseyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do malkao akana. Mose do arhõ acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhãe esetʼkakʼkan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor sãote galmaro lạgitʼ ạuriye calakʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do poṭom esetʼge tahenkan tahẽkana." 
Exodus35:1 Mose do Israelren sanam manḍerrenko jarwaketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do noako dohoy reakʼe hukum akada." 
Exodus35:2 Hapta reakʼ turui dinpe khaṭaokʼa menkhan eaeakʼ din do ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ begarakʼ din hoyokʼa, Probhu Isor ńutumte jirạukʼ dinge. Enhilokʼ okoeye kạmi uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Exodus35:3 Jirạukʼ mãhãre apeakʼ oṛakʼre seṅgel alope jola.” 
Exodus35:4 Mose do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isore hukum akada apeakʼ menakʼtape khon uni ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ạguipe. Ar okoe apnarakʼ kusite emokʼe menetʼkan uni do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ noa jiniskoe ạguiyma: Sona, rupạ ar pitạl;" 
Exodus35:5  
Exodus35:6 nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm, mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm; merom upʼ;" 
Exodus35:7 arakʼ roṅte roṅakatʼ bheḍawakʼ harta, merom harta ar gabla kaṭ;" 
Exodus35:8 diuhe jol lạgitʼ sunum; ojogokʼakʼ sunum ar jut so lạgitʼ mosolako; 
Exodus35:9 ehpod ar koṛam aḍokʼakʼ cetanre bạisạu lạgitʼ boidurjo mạnik ar eṭakʼ damanakʼ dhiriko. 
Exodus35:10 “Ape talaren gạkhuṛ kạrigolko hecʼkate Probhu Isor okae hukumakatʼ onako benaoma. 
Exodus35:11 Sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona cetan reakʼ dapalakʼko; ona reakʼ bạkupʼakʼko, paṭako, hurkạṛakʼko, khunṭiko ar ganḍoko;" 
Exodus35:12 sinduk ar ona reakʼ ḍaṅkin, daya duṛupʼakʼ ar onakin ekʼsetʼakʼ orwal;" 
Exodus35:13 mej ar ona reakʼ banar daṅ ar ona reakʼ sanam asbabko ar Probhu Isorakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ piṭhạ; 
Exodus35:14 diuhe lạgitʼ dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ jinisko, ona reakʼ mạliko ar diuhe jered lạgitʼ sunum;" 
Exodus35:15 dhudhup pinḍ ar ona reakʼ ḍaṅkin; ojogokʼakʼ sunum ar jut so reakʼ dhup; sekʼwa tạmbu duạr reakʼ orwal; 
Exodus35:16 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ pinḍ, ar ona lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ jhạńjri, ar onakin reakʼ ḍaṅkin ar asbabko; ạbukokʼ hanḍha ar ona doṛomkakʼ reakʼ ganḍoko;" 
Exodus35:17 khunṭiko ar ona reakʼ ganḍoko, bakher raca reakʼ orwalko ar bakher raca duạr lạgitʼ ekʼsetʼ orwalko;" 
Exodus35:18 sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ gońjko ar bakher raca reakʼ gońjko ar ona reakʼ baberko; 
Exodus35:19 sonot ṭhạ̃ire sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ kicricʼko, metakʼme naeke Aron lạgitʼ benaoakʼ sonot kicricʼko ar uniren hoponkin lạgitʼ naeke lekate sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼ kicricʼko.”" 
Exodus35:20 Inạ tayom Israelko do Mose samaṅ khonko ruạṛ calaoena.
