Exodus35:21 Ar mone uskurketʼko apnarakʼ kusite Probhu Isor ńutumte sekʼwa tạmbu bekʼnao ar uniyakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ ar naekeakʼ sonot kicricʼko lạgitʼ jạruṛokʼakʼ lekate jotowakʼko ạgukeda. 
Exodus35:22 Herel hoṛ ar maejiuko talare okoe do monre uskurko ńamketʼ onko hõ mũ reakʼ mạ̃kṛiko, pagrako, chachap mundạmko, hạsliko ar sona reakʼ nana parkan gohonako ạgukeda. Ar okoe Probhu Isor ńutumte sona ạgu moneyade uni do sonae ạgukeda." 
Exodus35:23 Ar okoe ṭhen nil roṅakʼ, beguni, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm se merom upʼ, arakʼ roṅ akatʼ bheḍawakʼ upʼ se merom hartako tahẽkan onko hõ onako ạgukeda." 
Exodus35:24 Okoe ṭhen rupạ ar pitạlko tahẽkan onko hõ Probhu Isor emae lạgitʼko ạgukeda. Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ kạmire jạruṛokʼakʼ nonkan gabla kaṭ okoekoakʼ tahẽkana onko hõ onako ạgukeda. 
Exodus35:25 Okoe maejiu do sutạm takoe reakʼ kạmire gạkhuṛko tahẽkan onko do nil, beguni ar arakʼ roṅakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte apnarakʼ titeko takoekeda." 
Exodus35:26 Ar tinạkʼ do ontorre uskurko ńamketʼ ar sutạm takoe reakʼ kạmiko baḍaekan tahẽkan onko maejiuko hõ meromakʼ upʼko takokeda. 
Exodus35:27 Ephod ar koṛam aḍokʼakʼ cetanre bạisạu lạgitʼ mukhiyạko do boidurjo mạnik ar eṭakʼ damanakʼ dhiriko ạgukeda. 
Exodus35:28 Diuhe jered lạgitʼ sunum ar ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum ar jut sowakʼ dhup benao lạgitʼ mosolako ar jạitun sunum hõko ạgukeda. 
Exodus35:29 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete cetʼe cekae lạgidokʼkan tahẽkan ona kạmi lạgitʼ Israelren maejiuko ar herelko talare okoe uskurko ńamketʼ onko do daṛeakʼ bhor Probhu Isor lạgitʼko ạgukeda. 
Exodus35:30 Inạ tayom Mose do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do Jihudạ khũṭren Hur goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Uriạ hopon Besalele bachaoana ar acʼakʼ Jiuteye perecʼkedete uni do ạkilte, bidiạte ar sanam lekan kạmi reakʼ daṛeye emadea." 
Exodus35:31  
Exodus35:32 Jemon uni do acʼakʼ kusi leka sona, rupạ ar pitạlte napae napae nokshakoe benao daṛeakʼ," 
Exodus35:33 ar damanakʼ dhiriko hõe getʼ daṛeakʼte onae rokʼ bạisạu daṛeakʼ ar kaṭ reakʼ eṭakʼ mońj kạmiko hõe kạmi daṛeakʼ," 
Exodus35:34 ona chaḍa Probhu Isor do eṭakʼko hõ noako kạmi cetʼako reakʼ daṛe Besalel ar Dan khũṭren Ahisamakren hopon Oholiab tạkine ematʼkinạ. 
Exodus35:35 Probhu Isor do nana parkan ti reakʼ kạmi nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte tiń ar galaṅakʼ noksa benao reakʼ ektiạri hõe ematʼkoa. Jemon onko do akoakʼ kusi leka nana parkan nokshako benao daṛeakʼa." 
Exodus36:1 “Onate sonot sekʼwa ṭhạ̃i cetʼleka benao hoyokʼa ona bujhạu lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do Besalel, Oholiab ar eṭakʼ kạrigolko hõ bud ar ạkile ematʼkoa jemon onko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka jotowakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ.”" 
Exodus36:2 Mose do noa sanamakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ Besalel ar Oholiab tạkine hohoatʼkinạ ar ona chaḍa nonkan gạkhuṛ kạrigolko hõe hohowatʼkoa okoe do Probhu Isor khon daṛeko ńamakatʼ ar monre uskur menakʼtako. 
Exodus36:3 Sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ Israelkoakʼ ạguakʼ jinisko onko do Mose ṭhen khonko bhujhạu hataoana. Menkhan Israelko do din hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ akoakʼ monsubạ leka jinis ạguiytegeko tahẽyena. 
Exodus36:4 Okoe gạkhuṛ kạrigolko sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼko kạmikan tahẽkan onko do onako ńelketʼ khan kạmi thirkate Mose ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka kạmi lạgitʼ tinạkʼ jạruṛokʼ hoṛko do ona khon hõ ḍher jinisko ạguyeda.”" 
Exodus36:5  
Exodus36:6 Unre Moseyakʼ hukum leka onko do Israelkoakʼ ḍerate senkate sanam hoṛko baḍae ocoketʼkoa, baṅ do herel hoponko ar baṅ do maejiuko jemon sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ jinis ar aloko ạgui. Ar onate hoṛko do jinis ạguko thirena." 
Exodus36:7 Ente okako jinisko jarwaletʼ ona do jạruṛokʼakʼ khon hõ ḍherge tahẽkana. 
Exodus36:8 Okoe hoṛko kạmikan tahẽkan onko modren gạkhuṛ kạrigolko do ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte ar nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte benaoakʼ gel goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼte ńapamokʼ tạmbuko benaokeda. Ar gạkhuṛ kạrigol hotete onare Kerubkoakʼ muṭhạnko dohokeda." 
Exodus36:9 Orwal do jotoge inạ mitʼ jokhatege benao hoylena. Ona reakʼ jeleń do bargel irạl moka ar osar do pon moka tahẽkana. 
Exodus36:10 Orwal do mõṛẽ goṭecʼ, mõṛẽ goṭecʼkate mitʼ sãote joṛao mitʼkate ona do barea maraṅ okocʼ orwalko benaokeda." 
Exodus36:11 Pạhilakʼ maraṅ orwal reakʼ mitʼ aṛe osar secʼ do nil sutạmte gạliko benaoada. Ar dosarakʼ orwalre hõ ṭhik onageko benaoada. 
Exodus36:12 Nonkate pạhil maraṅakʼ orwalre mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạli ar dosarakʼ orwalre hõ mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạliko benaokeda. Noa banar maraṅ orwal reakʼ gạliko do mimitʼ goṭecʼ reakʼ mohnḍa muhnḍire tahẽkana. 
Exodus36:13 Ona tayom mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ sona reakʼ bạkupʼakʼko benaokate onako do gạliko talate gutukate ona banar maraṅ orwalko gakʼkada. Ar ona banar orwal kicricʼte mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ sekʼwa tạmbuge hoyena. 
Exodus36:14 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ cetan reakʼ hĩs dapal esetʼkakʼ lạgitʼ meromakʼ upʼte gelmitʼ goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼko benaokeda. 
Exodus36:15 Mimitʼ orwal kicricʼko do jotoge mitʼ jokha tahẽkana. Ona do jeleńte pegel moka ar osar do pon mokakate tahẽkana. 
Exodus36:16 Ar onako khon mõṛẽ goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼ do joṛao mitʼkate mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ orwal kicricʼ hoyena. Ar sarecʼ turui goṭecʼ orwal kicricʼ do mitʼ sãote joṛao mitʼkate ar mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ orwal kicricʼ hoyena. 
Exodus36:17 Pạhilakʼ maraṅ orwal kicricʼ reakʼ osar secʼ reakʼ dhạrire mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ gạliko benaoada, ar dosarakʼ maraṅ orwal kicricʼre hõ ṭhik onkage gạliko benaoada." 
Exodus36:18 Ona tayom pitạl reakʼ mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ bạkupʼakʼ benaokate ona banar maraṅ orwal kicricʼ do mitʼ sãoteko bạkupʼkada. Onate ona banar orwal kicricʼte mitʼṭecʼ tạmbu hoyena. 
Exodus36:19 Ar arakʼ roṅ akatʼ bheḍawakʼ hartate ona cetan reakʼ dapalakʼko benaoada ar ona cetan reakʼ dapalakʼ hõ merom hartateko benaokeda. 
Exodus36:20 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu lạgitʼ do gabla kaṭte paṭako benaokeda. 
Exodus36:21 Mimitʼ paṭako do gel moka jeleń ar osarte do mitʼ moka tala tahẽkana. 
Exodus36:22 Onko do mitʼ goṭecʼ paṭakore babar goṭecʼ kuṭhạko benaoada. Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ joto paṭakoge inạ mitʼ lekako benaokeda. 
Exodus36:23 Dạkhin secʼ lạgitʼ do bargel paṭako benaokeda. 
Exodus36:24 Onako paṭa reakʼ mimitʼ kuṭhạ latarre doṛomkakʼ lạgitʼ pongel goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍoko hõko benaoada. Ar mimitʼ paṭa lạgitʼ do bareakate, metakʼme mimitʼ kuṭhạ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼkate ganḍoko benaoada." 
Exodus36:25 Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ eṭakʼ secʼ, metakʼme utạr secʼ lạgitʼ hõ bargel goṭecʼ paṭa tahẽkana ar mimitʼ paṭa lạgitʼ bareakate jotote pongel goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍoko benaokeda." 
Exodus36:26  
Exodus36:27 Tạmbu reakʼ pạchim secʼ, metakʼme tayom secʼ lạgitʼ do turui goṭecʼ paṭa ar tayom secʼ reakʼ banar konac lạgitʼ arhõ barea paṭako benaoada." 
Exodus36:28  
Exodus36:29 Noakin paṭa reakʼ banar konac reakʼ barea paṭa sãote latar khon cetan hạbicʼko joṛaokada. Mimitʼ konac reakʼ banar paṭa ar aṛe reakʼ paṭa hõ mitʼ sãoteko joṛaokada. Ar banar konacge mitʼlekako dohokada. 
Exodus36:30 Onate kuḍạm secʼ irạl goṭecʼ paṭa ar mimitʼ paṭako reakʼ latarre emakʼ lạgitʼ barea kate jotote gel turui goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ ganḍoko benaokeda. 
Exodus36:31 Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ paṭako lạgitʼ do gabla kaṭ reakʼ hurkạṛakʼ ḍaṅko benaokeda. Onako modre mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do mitʼ secʼakʼ paṭako lạgitʼ ar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do eṭakʼ secʼakʼ paṭako lạgitʼ ar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do tayom secʼ, metakʼme pạchim secʼ reakʼ paṭako lạgitʼ." 
Exodus36:32  
Exodus36:33 Cetan ar latar reakʼ hurkạṛko modre jeleńakʼ hurkạṛ do paṭa talate niạ sa khon hanasa hạbicʼ parom tahena. 
Exodus36:34 Ar onako paṭa do sonateko tolkada ar hurkạṛ bolokʼ lạgitʼ sona reakʼ kạṛiko benao ocokate paṭareko lagaokeda. Ar ona hurkạṛko do sonateko tolkeda. 
Exodus36:35 Kạrigolko do nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte mitʼṭecʼ orwalko benaokeda. Ar gạkhuṛ kạrigolte onare Kerubkoakʼ muṭhạnko benao ocokeda." 
Exodus36:36 Ona orwal do gabla kaṭ reakʼ ponea khunṭiko benaoada ar khunṭiko do sonateko tolkeda. Ar onako khunṭi lạgitʼ do sona reakʼ ạṅkusko benaoada ar khunṭiko bạisạu lạgitʼ rupạ reakʼ ponea ganḍoko benaokeda. 
Exodus36:37 Tạmbu reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ hõ nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar ũńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte mitʼṭecʼ noksa akatʼ orwalko benaokeda." 
Exodus36:38 Noa orwal lạgitʼ ạṅkus sudhạ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ khunṭiko benaokeda. Khunṭi reakʼ muthni ar ona reakʼ sakomko do sonateko tolkeda. Ar khunṭiko bạisạu lạgitʼ do pitạl reakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ganḍoko benaoada. 
Exodus37:1 Besalel do gabla kaṭte goha sinduke benao ocokeda. Ona reakʼ jeleń do bar moka tala, osar do mitʼ moka tala ar usul do mitʼ moka tala tahẽkana." 
Exodus37:2 Ona reakʼ bhitri ar bahre do khạṭi sonateye tolkeda ar ona reakʼ beṛhaete do sona reakʼ gunsiye benaoada. 
Exodus37:3 Ar chańchre dulkate ponea sona reakʼ kạṛiye benao ocokeda ar ona ponea kuṭhạ reakʼ banarsa aṛere bareakate kạṛiye lagaoada. 
Exodus37:4 Ona tayom gabla kaṭ reakʼ barea ḍaṅe benao ocokeda ar ona hõ sonateye tolkeda. 
Exodus37:5 Sinduk gokʼ idi lạgitʼ ona reakʼ banarsa kạṛi talate ona banar ḍaṅe hurạṛada. 
Exodus37:6 Ona tayom Besalel do khạṭi sonate sinduk reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼe benaokeda. Ona reakʼ jeleń do bar moka tala ar osar do mitʼ moka tala tahẽkana. 
Exodus37:7 Daya duṛupʼakʼre sonaren barea Kerube benaoketʼkina, unkin Kerub doe koṭecʼ benaoketʼkinạ." 
Exodus37:8 Ar unkin Kerub do sinduk reakʼ banar sa aṛerekin tahẽyena. Unkin Kerub do daya duṛupʼakʼ reakʼ denebanar mucạtʼreye benaoketʼkinạ. 
Exodus37:9 Unkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do cetan secʼ lap lapae doho ocoketʼte daya duṛupʼakʼ do unkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte umulena. Ar Kerub dokin samaṅ mitʼkeda ar unkinakʼ mẽtʼãhã do daya duṛupʼakʼ samaṅre taheyena. 
Exodus37:10 Besalel do gabla kaṭte bar moka jeleń, mitʼ moka osar ar mitʼ moka tala usul mitʼṭen ṭebile benaokeda." 
Exodus37:11 Uni do khạṭi sonate onae tol ocokeda ar beṛhaete do sona reakʼ gunsiye benaoada. 
Exodus37:12 Ṭebil reakʼ beṛhaete pon kạṭupʼ usul batae lagaoada. Ar ona bata cetante sona reakʼ gunsiye benaoada. 
Exodus37:13 Chãńchre dulkate sona reakʼ ponea kạṛiye benao ocokeda ar ṭebil reakʼ ponon konare ponea kuṭhạ cetanreye lagao ocokeda. 
Exodus37:14 Ona kạṛi do ṭebil beṛhaete ona usul bata ṭhene bạisạukada jemon ṭebil gokʼ idiyre ona talate ḍaṅkin bolo daṛeakʼ. 
Exodus37:15 Ar ṭebil gokʼ idi lạgitʼ ḍaṅkin hõ gabla kaṭ reakʼe benao ocokeda ar sonateye tolkeda. 
Exodus37:16 Uni do ṭebil reakʼ jinisko khạṭi sonateye benaokeda. Ona do hoyokʼkana, ona reakʼ thạriko, kạ̃ṛchuko, ar coḍorokʼ lạgitʼ bạṭiko ar loṭakoge." 
Exodus37:17 Besalel do khạṭi sonate mitʼṭecʼ diuhe dohowakʼe benaokeda; ar ona reakʼ latar hĩs ar ona khon rakapʼ akan ḍạnḍi doe koṭecʼ benaokeda. baha leka bạṭiko, ḍombeko ar baha do diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hijukʼa ar ona joto do benao mitʼge tahena." 
Exodus37:18 Ona diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ banar aṛete pepe goṭecʼkate jotote turui goṭecʼ ḍạre benaoada. 
Exodus37:19 Pạhil ḍạr reakʼ tala talate baha ar ḍombe sudhạ badam bahaleka ńelokʼ pea bạṭi do pạhil ḍạr reakʼ talareye benaoada. Ar ona tayom reakʼ ḍạrre hõ onkageye dohokeda. Ar diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hecʼakan turui goṭecʼ ḍạrko hõ inạ mitʼ lekageye benaoada. 
Exodus37:20 Diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ ḍạnḍi tala talate hõ baha ar ḍombe sudhạ badam baha leka ńelokʼ ponea bạṭiye benaokeda. 
Exodus37:21 Diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hecʼakan turui goṭecʼ ḍạr talare pạhilte barea okare milạu akan ona reakʼ latarre mitʼṭecʼ ḍombe, ar dosarakʼ barea latarre ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍombe ar tesarakʼ barea latarre armitʼṭecʼ ḍombeye benaoada." 
Exodus37:22 Onako reakʼ ḍombe ar ḍạr do jotoge diuhe dohowakʼ khon oḍok hijukʼa ar joto do mitʼṭecʼ jinisge tahẽkana. Ar ona do jotoge khạṭi sonate koṭecʼ benaoakʼ tahẽkana. 
Exodus37:23 Khạṭi sonate eae goṭecʼ mạli, ar ona reakʼ cimṭạko ar ḍhạknicʼkoe benaokeda." 
Exodus37:24 Pegel keji khạṭi sonate noa diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ jotowakʼ jiniskoe benaokeda. 
Exodus37:25 Besalel do gabla kaṭte mitʼṭecʼ dhudhup pinḍe benaokeda. Ona reakʼ jeleń do mitʼ moka, osar do mitʼ moka, ar usul do bar moka tahẽkana. Ar ona reakʼ dereń do onare joṛao mitʼge tahẽkana." 
Exodus37:26 Ona pinḍ reakʼ chat, ar bhit reakʼ beṛhaete ar dereńko uni do khạṭi sonateye tolkeda. Ar pinḍ reakʼ beṛhaete do sona reakʼ noksakoe benaoada." 
Exodus37:27 Pinḍ banarsa aṛe noksa latarre bareakate sona reakʼ kạṛiye lagaoada jemon ona bhitrite ḍaṅkin gutukate onako gokʼ idi daṛeakʼ. 
Exodus37:28 Ona ḍaṅkin do gabla kaṭte benaokate sonateye tolkeda. 
Exodus37:29 Ona chaḍa riritʼko reakʼ dharate jut so mosola reakʼ nirạ dhup ar ojogokʼ sunum hõe tearkeda. 
Exodus38:1 Besalel do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ gabla kaṭ reakʼ mõṛẽ moka jeleń, mõṛẽ moka osar ar pe moka usul mitʼṭecʼ pon konac pinḍe benaokeda." 
Exodus38:2 Pinḍ reakʼ ponon konacre ponea dereńe benaoada; ar dereńko do pinḍ sãote joṛao mitʼge tahẽkana. Uni do dereńko sudhạ pinḍ do pitạlteye tolkeda. 
Exodus38:3 Ar pinḍ reakʼ jotowakʼ asbabko, metakʼme ṭukucʼko, kạ̃ṛchuko, chichiṭiạu lạgitʼ bạṭi, jel rakab lạgitʼ kãṭãko, bursiko noako jotoge pitạl reakʼe benaokeda." 
Exodus38:4 Pinḍ lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhạńjriye benaokeda. Ar kaṅkha latar secʼre ona doe dohokada. Onate jhạńri do pinḍ latar ar cetan ona adha ạdhire tahẽyena. 
Exodus38:5 Ḍaṅkin gutukakʼ lạgitʼ ona jhạńjri ponon konacre pitạl reakʼ ponea kạṛiye benaoada. 
Exodus38:6 Gabla kaṭte barea ḍaṅe benao ocokeda ar ona ḍaṅkin hõ pitạlteye tolkeda. 
Exodus38:7 Ar ḍaṅ do kạṛi talateye gutukada jemon pinḍ gokʼ idi jokhecʼ ona ḍaṅkin do pinḍ reakʼ banarsa aṛere tahen. Pinḍ do toktakoteye benaokeda ar bhitri do phãkge tahẽyena. 
Exodus38:8 Uni do pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhajane benaokeda. Ar okoeko maejiu sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkan onkoakʼ pitạl reakʼ ạrsite ona bhajan ar ona reakʼ ganḍokoe benaokeda. 
Exodus38:9 Ona tayom Besalel do sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ beṛhaete bakher racae benaokeda. Bakher raca reakʼ dạkhin secʼ mitʼsae moka jaega lạgitʼ do uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte orwalkoe benaokeda. 
Exodus38:10 Ona orwal ṭaṅgao lạgitʼ bargel goṭecʼ khunṭiye benaokeda. Ar ona khunṭiko lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ bargel goṭecʼ ganḍoko ar khunṭiko sãote joṛao lạgitʼ rupạ reakʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar khunṭi jokʼṛao ṭheṅgakoe benaokeda. 
Exodus38:11 Bakher raca reakʼ utạr secʼhõ mitʼsae moka jaega lạgitʼ do bargel goṭecʼ khunṭiko, ar khunṭiko joṛao lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ bargel goṭecʼ ganḍoko ar khunṭi sãote joṛao lạgitʼ rupạ reakʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar joṛaoakʼ ṭheṅgakoe benaokeda." 
Exodus38:12 Bakher raca reakʼ pạchim secʼhõ mõṛẽgel moka jaega lạgitʼ orwalko, gel goṭecʼ khunṭiko, gel goṭecʼ ganḍoko ar khunṭi sãote rupạ reakʼ ạṅkus ar joṛaoakʼ ṭheṅgakoe benaokeda." 
Exodus38:13 Bakher raca reakʼ purub secʼ hõ mõṛẽgel moka jaega tahẽkana. 
Exodus38:14 Uni do onḍenakʼ duạr denebanar lạgitʼ gel mõṛẽ moka jeleń orwal, pepe goṭecʼ khunṭi ar pepe goṭecʼkate ganḍoe benaokeda." 
Exodus38:15  
Exodus38:16 Bakher raca beṛhaeteakʼ joto orwal hõ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmteye benaokeda. 
Exodus38:17 Khunṭi lạgitʼ ganḍoko do pitạlteye benaokeda. Khunṭi sãote joṛao lạgitʼ bạkupʼakʼ ar joṛaoakʼ ṭheṅga do rupạteye benaokeda. Ar khunṭiko reakʼ muthni hõ rupạteye tolkeda. Bakher raca reakʼ joto khunṭirege rupạ reakʼ joṛaoakʼ ṭheṅga do tahẽkana. 
Exodus38:18 Bakher raca lạgitʼ hõ mitʼṭecʼ orwale benaokeda. Noa do nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte nana parkan noksage tahẽkana. Noa orwal do bargel moka jeleń ar bakher raca reakʼ eṭakʼakʼ orwalko leka mõṛẽ moka kate usul tahẽkana." 
Exodus38:19 Noa orwal lạgitʼ ponea khunṭi ar pitạl reakʼ ponea ganḍo benao hoyena. Khunṭi reakʼ ạṅkus ar joṛaoakʼ ṭheṅga hõ rupạte benaoena. Ar khunṭi reakʼ bohokʼ hõ rupạteye tol ocokeda. 
Exodus38:20 Sekʼwa tạmbu ar bakher raca orwal reakʼ gońjko hõ pitạlteye benaokeda. 
Exodus38:21 Sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme goha tạmbu benaokʼre cetʼ cetʼko jinis lagaolen Moseyakʼ hukumte pạhil khonge naeke Aronren hopon Ithamarakʼ ạyurte Liwiko do ona reakʼ hisạbko dohokeda." 
Exodus38:22 Probhu Isor do Mose oka cekae lạgitʼe hukumade tahẽkan ona hukum lekage Jihudạ khũṭren Uriạren hopon Besalel do jotowakʼe benaokeda. Uni do Hurren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. 
Exodus38:23 Dan khũṭren Ahisamakren hopon Oholiab do Besalele goṛowade tahẽkana. Uni do ti reakʼ kạmi metakʼme lalakʼ rorokʼren kạrigole tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte nana parkan galaṅ kạmiren mitʼṭen gạkhuṛ kạrigolgeye tahẽkana." 
Exodus38:24 Dolao samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jotote irạl sae eaegel eae keji pe sae gram sona do noa sonot tạmbure kạmi lạgitʼ beoharena. Ar noa ojon do dhorom reakʼ ojon lekate tahẽkana. 
Exodus38:25 Hoṛ lekhako jokhecʼ okoe Israelkoko lekha ocolen eken onko ṭhen khonge dhorom reakʼ ojon lekate pe hajar gel eae keji eae gram rupạ do ńamlena. Ar jotote turui lakh pe hajar mõṛẽsae mõṛẽgel hoṛ doko lekha ocolena. Onko sanamkoakʼ umer do bargel bochor se ona khon ḍher tahẽkana. Onko do bohokʼ pichạ soṅkate mõṛẽ gram kate rupạko emlena. 
Exodus38:26  
Exodus38:27 Ona modre pe hajar keji rupạte sekʼwa tạmbu ar orwal reakʼ ganḍoko benaokeda. Mimitʼ goṭecʼ ganḍo lạgitʼ pegel keji kate rupạte mitʼsae ganḍoko benaokeda. 
Exodus38:28 Ar sarecʼ mitʼgel eae keji eaegel tala gram rupạte do ạṅkusko, khunṭi reakʼ bohokʼko ar joṛaoakʼ khunṭiko lạgitʼ beoharena." 
Exodus38:29 Ar oneko danketʼ reakʼ pitạl do eaegel mon bar hajar pon sae sekel tahẽkana. 
Exodus38:30 Onakote uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu duạṛko reakʼ ganḍoko, pitạl reakʼ pinḍ ar ona lạgitʼ pitạl reakʼ jhạńjri ar pinḍ reakʼ sanam asbabko," 
Exodus38:31 ar bakher raca reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ ganḍoko ar bakher raca duạr reakʼ ganḍoko, sekʼwa tạmbu ar beṛhaeteakʼ bakher raca reakʼ gońjkoe benaokeda." 
Exodus39:1 Sonot sekʼwa tạmbu oṛakʼ reakʼ sapʼdapʼ kạmire horog lạgitʼ onko do nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte kicricʼko benaokeda. Probhu Isor do Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkana onkage onko do Aronakʼ naeke kạmi lạgitʼ sonot kicricʼko benaokeda." 
Exodus39:2 Ar Besalel do sona, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmkote ephode benaokeda." 
Exodus39:3 Onko do sona koṭecʼ capṛakate tar leka onako getʼ cirạkeda jemon nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm sãote sona reakʼ sutạm hõ beoharokʼ. Noa do mitʼṭen gạkhuṛ kạrigolakʼ ti reakʼ kạmige tahẽkana." 
Exodus39:4 Ephod do tarenre tol dohokakʼ lạgitʼ barea phitạko benaokeda ar ephod reakʼ banar munucạtʼreko joṛaokada. 
Exodus39:5 Ephod sãote joṛao akatʼ ḍanḍa reakʼ cõhõk bedhaoakʼ hõ ńelokʼte ephod lekage hoyena. Ar ona hõ sonate, nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte benao hoyena. Probhu Isor cetʼleka Moseye hukumade tahẽkan onkage sanamakʼ kạmiko kạmikeda." 
Exodus39:6 Ar boidurjo mạnik dhirikin do sona galaṅakʼte hạṛupʼ ạcurakʼko tearkeda, onko do chahapakʼ reakʼ rokʼ caṛhao kạmiyakʼ lekageko rokʼkeda, Israel hoponko reakʼ ńutum lekate. Ar onakin do ephod reakʼ taren kicricʼkinreye lagaokeda, Israelren hoponko reaṅ dikʼsạ mạnik menkate Probhu Isor Moseye hukum akawade tahẽkan leka." 
Exodus39:7  
Exodus39:8 Ona tayom koṛam aḍokʼakʼ benao hoyena. Noa hõ gạkhuṛ kạrigolakʼ ti reakʼ kạmige tahẽkana. Ephod leka noa hõ sonate, nil, beguni, ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte benao hoyena." 
Exodus39:9 Noa do jeleńte mitʼ bitạ ar osarte mitʼ bitạ mitʼṭecʼ ponon konac lạṭum mitʼakatʼ kicricʼge. 
Exodus39:10 Ar onko do noa cetanre pon sạrte damanakʼ dhiriko bạisạukeda. Pạhilakʼ sạrre do cuni, podmorag ar morokot;" 
Exodus39:11 dosarakʼ sạrre do pitmoni, nilkanto ar hirạ;" 
Exodus39:12 tesarakʼ sạrre do peroj, tamro ar koṭahela;" 
Exodus39:13 ar ponakʼ sạrre do gomedok, boidurjo ar surjokanto moni. Ar mạnik dhiriko galaṅ paṭetʼ akatʼ sona cetanrege bạisạu hoyena." 
Exodus39:14 Israelren gelbar goṭen hoponko lạgitʼ jotote gelbar goṭecʼ mạnik dhirihõko bạisạuada. Ona reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼre gelbar khũṭren mitʼṭecʼkate ńutumko rokʼ caṛhaokeda, chachapakʼ rokʼ caṛhaoakʼ lekage." 
Exodus39:15 Koṛam aḍokʼakʼ lạgitʼ khạṭi sona do baber leka uńkate barea sikṛiko benaokeda. 
Exodus39:16 Onko do sona reakʼ barea galaṅakʼ ar sona reakʼ barea kạṛiko benaokeda ar kạṛikin do koṛam aḍokʼakʼ reakʼ banar konacreko lagaoada," 
Exodus39:17 sona reakʼ ona banar sikṛige ona banar kạṛi sãoteko gakʼkada. 
Exodus39:18 Ar onakin banar galaṅakatʼ sikṛi reakʼ banar munucạtʼ do onakin barea paṭetʼ galaṅakʼre lagaokate ephod reakʼ samaṅ secʼ ona reakʼ taren kicricʼreko lagaoada. 
Exodus39:19 Ona chaḍa onko do arhõ barea sona reakʼ kạṛi benao ocokate koṛam aḍokʼakʼ reakʼ eṭakʼ konacreko joṛaoada. Onate onakin do ephod secʼ samaṅ akatʼ, koṛam aḍokʼakʼ reakʼ bhitri aṛere tahẽyena." 
Exodus39:20 Ona chaḍa onko do arhõ barea sona reakʼ kạṛiko benao ocoketʼte ephod reakʼ taren kicricʼ latar nakha ona reakʼ samaṅ senakʼ jopoṛao pheḍreko joṛaokeda, ephod reakʼ cõhõk bekʼdhaoakʼ cetanre." 
Exodus39:21 Ona tayom koṛam aḍokʼakʼ do ona kạṛikin sãote ephod reakʼ mundạmreko tol mitʼkeda nil roṅakʼ baberte. Ar onate koṛam aḍokʼakʼ do ephod reakʼ cõhõk bekʼdhaoakʼ cetanre tahẽyena. Ar noa do Probhu Isor Moseye hukumade tahẽkan leka sanamakʼ kạmiko hoyena. 
Exodus39:22 Ephod bhitrire horokʼakʼ jeleń aṅgrop do nil sutạmteko benaokeda. 
Exodus39:23 Bohokʼ bolokʼ lạgitʼ kiricʼ talare jhicʼgeko dohokada ar jemon alo oṛejokʼ ona lạgitʼ ona beṛhaete ḍombe lekako tolada. 
Exodus39:24 Nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ uńakʼ sutạmte dạlim jo benaokate noa kicricʼ latar reakʼ ḍombe beṛhaeteko dạsiyada." 
Exodus39:25 Ona tayom khạṭi sonate ghạnṭiko benaokeda ar ona ḍạlim tala talateko lagaoada. 
Exodus39:26 Sekʼwa kạmi jokhecʼ horokʼakʼ noa kicricʼ latarre reakʼ ḍombeko do mitʼṭecʼkate ḍạlim ar ghonṭae sapʼ dohokeda. Probhu Isor Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkana onkage jotowakʼ do kạmi hoyena. 
Exodus39:27 Aron ar uniren hoponko lạgitʼ do mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte kicricʼko benaokeda. 
Exodus39:28 Onkoakʼ dạhṛi ar bohokʼ reakʼ ṭupri hõ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmteko benaoekeda ar bhitri reakʼ kicricʼ do uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmteko benaokeda. 
Exodus39:29 Onkoakʼ ḍanḍa totolakʼ do uńakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte ar nil, beguni ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte benao hoyena. Noa do noksa akatʼ jinis lekage hoyena. Probhu Isor Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage jotowakʼ do benao hoyena." 
Exodus39:30 Ona tayom onko do khạṭi sonate mitʼṭecʼ batako benaoada. Noa do mitʼṭecʼ sonot mukuṭge. Chapakatʼ leka ona bata cetanre noa kathako chapada, “Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohowakʼ.”" 
Exodus39:31 Probhu Isor Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage onko do nil roṅakʼ baberte dạhṛi sãoteko tol jalatʼkeda. 
Exodus39:32 Nonkatege sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ jotowakʼ kạmi do sạtena. Ar Probhu Isor Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko do jotowakʼko kạmikeda." 
Exodus39:33 Ona tayom onko do ona sekʼwa tạmbu lạgitʼ benaoakʼ joto do Mose ṭhenko idikeda. Ona do hoyokʼkana sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona reakʼ sanam asbabko, mudạmko, phremko, hurkạṛko, khunṭiko ar ganḍoko;" 
Exodus39:34 arakʼ roṅakatʼ bheḍa harta ar merom harta reakʼ banar umulakʼ ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i dapal reakʼ ḍhakna; 
Exodus39:35 ar ḍaṅkin sudhạ sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona reakʼ ḍhakna; 
Exodus39:36 mej ar ona reakʼ jinisko ar Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅakʼ piṭhạ; 
Exodus39:37 sạr diuheko, khạṭi sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ jinisko, ona reakʼ mạliko ar seṅgel jol lạgitʼ sunum;" 
Exodus39:38 sona reakʼ pinḍ, ojogokʼakʼ sunum, so sunum ar sekʼwa tạmbu duạr reakʼ orwalko;" 
Exodus39:39 Pitạl reakʼ jhạńjri ar pitạl reakʼ pinḍ, ar ona reakʼ ḍaṅkin ar joto lekan asbabko, ganḍoko;" 
Exodus39:40 bakher raca reakʼ khunṭiko, onako reakʼ ganḍoko ar ona reakʼ orwal ar bakher racate bolokʼ reakʼ orwal; bakher raca orwal reakʼ gońj ar baberko; sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ joto lekan sorońjamko;" 
Exodus39:41 sonot ṭhạ̃ire sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ kicricʼko, metakʼme naeke Aron lạgitʼ benaoakʼ sonot kicricʼko ar uniren hoponkin lạgitʼ naeke lekate sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼ kicricʼko." 
Exodus39:42 Probhu Isor Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko do jotowakʼko kạmikeda. 
Exodus39:43 Mose do onkoakʼ joto kạmi ńelteye bujhạukeda, Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage jotowakʼ kạmi do hoyakana. Onate Mose do Israelkoe bhoratʼkoa." 
Exodus40:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Exodus40:2 “Bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil dinre am do sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbuyem bereda." 
Exodus40:3 Ar ona talare goha sinduk dohokate ona reakʼ orwalte ona dom dapal esetʼkakʼa. 
Exodus40:4 Ṭebil hõ bhitrite ạgukate ona cetanre oka dohoy reakʼ onam sajao dohoya. Ar tayom do diuhe dohowakʼem ạguiya ar diuhekom jola. 
Exodus40:5 Sekʼwa tạmbu samaṅre sona reakʼ dhup-pinḍem dohoya ar sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ duạrre do orwalem ṭaṅgaoa. 
Exodus40:6 Sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr samaṅre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ pinḍem benaoa." 
Exodus40:7 Noa pinḍ ar sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ tala ṭhạ̃ire bhajanem dohoya ar onare dakʼtem pereja. 
Exodus40:8 Ona tayom bakher raca reakʼ beṛhaete orwaltem eseda ar ona reakʼ duạrre hõ orwalem lagaoa. 
Exodus40:9 “Tayomte ojokʼakʼ sunumem hataoa ar sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona tala reakʼ jotowakʼ cetanre ona sunumte iń ńutumtem begar dohoya. Onate ona joto do sonotakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Exodus40:10 Thạri bạṭiko sudhạ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ cetanre hõ ojogokʼakʼ sunumte pinḍ do iń ńutumtem begar dohokakʼa. Onate ona do sonot utạrakʼ jinisko hoyokʼa. 
Exodus40:11 Ganḍo sudhạ luihạ cetanre ojogokʼ sunumte iń ńutumtem begar dohoya. 
Exodus40:12 “Ona tayom Aron ar uniren hoponkin do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr samaṅre ạgukate dakʼtekin ạbuk saphakʼa. 
Exodus40:13 Ar Aron do sonot kicricʼem horokʼaea arem ojokʼ bahalea ar iń ńutumtem begar dohoyea jemon naeke lekate ińakʼ sapʼ dapʼ kạmiye kạmi daṛeakʼa. 
Exodus40:14 Aronren hoponkin ạgukate unkin hõ naeke reakʼ kicricʼem horokʼạkina. 
Exodus40:15 Ar ona tayom do ạkinren apat leka unkin hõm ojokʼ bahal kinạ jemon unkin hõ naeke lekate ińakʼ sapʼdapʼ kạmikin kạmi daṛeakʼ. Noa ojokʼ bahalokʼ hotete okoe naeke hudạ lekateye bahalokʼ ona do piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ calakʼa.” 
Exodus40:16 Probhu Isor Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage jotowakʼe kạmikeda. 
Exodus40:17 Dosar bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil dinre sekʼwa tạmbu do beretʼ hoyena. 
Exodus40:18 Ona bered lạgitʼte Mose do ganḍoko bạisạukate phremkoe teṅgokeda. Uni do hurkạṛkoe dohokeda ar khunṭikoe bạisạukeda. 
Exodus40:19 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ hukumleka uni do sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre merom upʼte benaoakʼ kicricʼe aṭetʼkeda ar ona cetanre barea umulakʼe dohokada. 
Exodus40:20 Ona tayom Mose do goha paṭa banar hataokate sinduk bhitrireye dohokeda ar sindukre ḍaṅkine hurạṛkada ar ona cetanre do ḍhalwakʼe dohokeda. 
Exodus40:21 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka sinduk do sekʼwa tạmbu bhitriteye aderkeda ar ona reakʼ orwalteye dapalkada. 
Exodus40:22 Ona orwal bahre utạr secʼ sekʼwa tạmbu talare, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu talare uni do ṭebile dohokeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka uni samaṅre ṭebil cetanre samaṅakʼ piṭhạye sajao dohokada." 
Exodus40:23  
Exodus40:24 Dạkhin secʼ, mej reakʼ tayom secʼre Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka diuhe dohowakʼe dohokeda ar ona cetanre Probhu Isor samaṅre diuhe koe jolkeda." 
Exodus40:25  
Exodus40:26 Orwal samaṅre ona ńapamokʼ tạmbu bhitrire uni do sona reakʼ pinḍe dohokeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ona cetanre mońj so dhupe jeretʼkeda. 
Exodus40:27  
Exodus40:28 Ona tayom uni do sekʼwa tạmbu duạr reakʼ orwale ṭaṅgaokeda. 
Exodus40:29 Sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu duạr ṭhen uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ pinḍe dohokeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ona cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ porobe porobena." 
Exodus40:30 Ona pinḍ ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ tala mala ṭhạ̃ire uni do ona bhajane bạisạukeda ar ti-jaṅga ạbukokʼ lạgitʼ onare dakʼe dohokeda. 
Exodus40:31 Ona bhajan reakʼ dakʼte Mose, Aron ar uniren hoponkin tako do ti ar jaṅgako ạbukokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Exodus40:32 Probhu Isor do Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage onko do ńapamokʼ tạmbure bolokʼ lahare se pinḍ ṭhen calakʼ lahare ti jaṅgako ạbukokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Exodus40:33 Pinḍ ar sekʼwa tạmbu beṛhaete uni do orwale ṭaṅgaokeda ar racae benaokeda ar duạr reakʼ orwale emada. Nonkate Mose do acʼakʼ kạmiye sạtkeda. 
Exodus40:34 Ona tayom rimil hecʼente ńapamokʼ tạmbui dapal esetʼkeda ar sekʼwa tạmbu do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼena. 
Exodus40:35 Sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu do rimilte dapal esetʼena ar Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok perecʼ tahẽkante Mose do onḍe bae bolo daṛeada." 
Exodus40:36 Israelkoakʼ goṭa daṛanre sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre rimil tinre rakabokʼkan tahẽkana unre onko doko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana; 
Exodus40:37 menkhan rimil ạuri rakabokʼ hạbicʼ onko doko koyokʼ horetʼ tahẽkana. 
Exodus40:38 Probhu Isorakʼ noa rimil do Israelkoakʼ goṭa daṛan horre sińre do onkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre ar ńindạ do onare seṅgel tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Leviticus1:1 Mitʼdin Probhu Isor do ńapamokʼ tạmbu khon Moseye hohoadea ar Israelko lạiyako lạgitʼe hukumadea, “Ape modre Probhu Isor ńutumte jãhãe jãhãnakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate emogokʼ reakʼe menetʼ khan uni do mitʼṭen janware ạguyema; ar uni do jemon ḍaṅgra se bheḍa se meromge baṛeye hoyokʼma." 
Leviticus1:2  
Leviticus1:3 “Uni do ona jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ḍaṅgrateye menetʼ khan enḍekhan uni do niphuṭ ạnḍiạ ḍaṅgrage ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. Probhu Isor jemon uni cetanreye kusikʼ onate uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen ḍaṅgrae ạguiyea. 
Leviticus1:4 Ar uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼe ạgu akade ḍaṅgrawakʼ bohokʼre tiye dohoytaea; ar ona do acʼakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ ataṅokʼtaea. 
Leviticus1:5 Ona tayom Probhu Isor samaṅre uni ḍaṅgra do dãṛẽye hoyokʼa ar naeke Aronren hoponko do uniyakʼ mãyãmte ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenakʼ pinḍ beṛhaeteko irciyakʼa. 
Leviticus1:6 Ar samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do uni ḍaṅgrae khalea ar phạṛi phạṛiye getʼ kuṭrạyea. 
Leviticus1:7 Ar naeke Aronren hoponko do pinḍ cetanre seṅgelko jola ar ona cetanre sahanko dohoya. 
Leviticus1:8 Ona tayom do pinḍ reakʼ jolokʼ sahan cetanre uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ bohokʼ, itil ar jel reakʼ kuṭrạko dohoya." 
Leviticus1:9 Ar samaṅedeyicʼ do uniyakʼ jaṅga ar lacʼ bhitri reakʼ sanam hạṭińko dakʼteye ạrupʼ saphaea ar naeke do onako sudhạ goṭa ḍaṅgrage pinḍreye jeretʼ cabayea. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus1:10 “Noa jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do bheḍa se meromteye hoyocoe khan uni do mitʼṭen niphuṭ merom boda se bheḍa baṛeye ạguiyema. 
Leviticus1:11 Ar samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do pinḍ reakʼ utạr secʼre idikate Probhu Isor ńutumteye magea, ar Aronren hoponko do uniyakʼ mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaeteko irciyakʼa." 
Leviticus1:12 Uni samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do phạṛi phạṛiye getʼ kuṭrạyea ar naeke do uniyakʼ bohokʼ, itil, ar jel reakʼ phạṛiko pinḍre jolokʼkan sahan cetanreye dohoya." 
Leviticus1:13 Ar samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do jaṅgako ar lacʼ bhitri reakʼ hĩsko dakʼteye ạrupʼ saphaea ar naeke do onako sudhạ goṭa ḍaṅgrage pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ cabayea. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan. 
Leviticus1:14 “Probhu Isor ńutumte noa jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do jãhãn cẽṛẽkote hoeocoye menetʼ khan samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do mitʼṭen potam se parwa baṛeye ạguiyema. 
Leviticus1:15 Ar naeke do pinḍ ṭhen idikate uniyakʼ bohokʼe peṭer topagtaea ar uniyakʼ mãyãm do roḍocʼ oḍokkate pinḍ reakʼ bhitreye joro hińjitʼ ocoytaea ar pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ cabayea. 
Leviticus1:16 Ar samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do cẽṛẽyakʼ okotʼ ar uni bhitri reakʼ joto mạilạko ocokʼkate pinḍ purub aṛe reakʼ torocʼreye giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus1:17 Uni do phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼre sapʼkate nonkae phạṛiyea jemon aloe topage. Ar ona tayom naeke do pinḍre jolokʼkan seṅgelreye jeretʼ cabayea. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan. 
Leviticus2:1 “Jãhãege Probhu Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅ khan uni do mĩhĩ holoṅteye onkaema. Uni do ona cetanre sunum dulkate onare kundurui dohoya ar Aronren hoponko ṭhen, metakʼme naekeko ṭhene idiya. Ar naeke do ona sunum sudhạ mitʼ cuputʼ holoṅe locaea ar kunduru do jotogeye hataoa ar jotowakʼ samaṅ baṅkate eken niạkoge pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus2:2  
Leviticus2:3 Noa jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ sarecʼakʼ okako jinis tahen ona do Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ hoyokʼa. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅakʼ sanam samaṅokʼakʼ modre jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ noa sarecʼakʼ hạṭiń do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus2:4 “Jãhãege culhạre rapakʼakʼ jãhãn jiniste jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe menetʼ khan uni do bin khạmiyanakʼ mĩhĩ holoṅte benao hoyokʼtaea. Ona do sunum mesalakatʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ se sunum ojokʼ akawatʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ thapṛa piṭhạkoge hoyokʼma. 
Leviticus2:5 Ona jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do luihạre isinokʼ lekanakʼ jiniskan khan ona do sunum mesalakatʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ mĩhĩ holoṅte benao hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus2:6 Ar ona tayom do kecakʼ kuṭrạkate onare sunum dulakʼ hoyokʼa; ar noa do mitʼṭen jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus2:7 Ona jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do luihạre isinakʼ jiniskan khan ona do sunum ar mĩhĩ holoṅte benao hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus2:8 Probhu Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ noako jinis do ạgukate naekeakʼ tire jimại hoyokʼa ar naeke do pinḍ ṭhen onakoe idiya. 
Leviticus2:9 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ purạ samaṅokʼakʼ bodolte oka hạṭiń emokʼ hoyokʼ naeke do pinḍ cetanre eken onae jereda. Noa do seṅgelre mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so do Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus2:10 Noa jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ sarecʼakʼ okako tahen ona do Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ hoyokʼa. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ sanamakʼko khon jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ sarecʼ hạṭińko do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus2:11 “Probhu Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼge ạgukʼ ona do bin khạmiyanakʼ baṛe hoyokʼ ma. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ jiniskore khạmi se rasa do alope jereda. 
Leviticus2:12 Pạhilre rakabokʼ phosol samaṅ lạgitʼ khạmi ar rasa do Probhu Isor ṭhenko idi daṛeakʼa, menkhan oka samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jut so uniye kusiyakʼ onkan samaṅokʼakʼ lekate khạmi ar rasa do pinḍre alope jereda." 
Leviticus2:13 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ okako jinis ạgukʼ onare do buluṅ emakʼ hoyokʼa. Israelren Isor onko lạgitʼ oka bondobose dohoakatʼ onate jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼre buluṅ do baṅ badkakʼ hoyokʼa; joto lekan samaṅokʼakʼre buluṅ do emakʼtege hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus2:14 “Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ pạhil rakapʼakʼ phosol khon jãhãegeko ạgui enḍekhan ona nãwã gele ạgukate seṅgelrem ataea arem huṛuṅ gunḍạya. 
Leviticus2:15 Ar onare sunumem dulakʼa ar ona cetanre kundurum dohoya; noa do mitʼṭen jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus2:16 Ona huṛuṅ gunḍạwakʼ jomakʼ ar sunum reakʼ okaṭakʼ hĩs do purạ samaṅokʼakʼ bodolte emokʼ hoyokʼ naeke do eken ona hĩs ar joto kunduru hataokate Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lekateye jereda. 
Leviticus3:1 “Jãhãege Probhu Isor ńutumte jãhãn sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅe menetʼ khan ar uniren samaṅicʼ do pal ḍaṅgrako khone ạgu ocokʼ khan, uni do eṅga se ạnḍiạ jãhãnicʼkangeye jemon niphuṭ utạricʼe hoyokʼ." 
Leviticus3:2 Samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do ạgu akade janwarakʼ bohokʼre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr thene gureya. Ona tayom Aronren hoponko, metakʼme naeke do ona mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaeteko irciyakʼa." 
Leviticus3:3 Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ janwar khon thoṛa hĩs naekeye emakoa. Noako hĩs do hoyokʼ kana janwarakʼ lacʼ bhitri reakʼ judạ judạ hĩsko reakʼ itil ar onako sãote ganthar reakʼ itilko," 
Leviticus3:4 banar kunḍi ar ona sãote ḍanḍa ṭhenakʼ itilko ar kunḍi sãote oḍok akatʼ inboro cetan reakʼ gantharko. 
Leviticus3:5 Onako do pinḍ reakʼ jolokʼkan sahan cetanre one okare jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jolokʼkan ona cetanre Aronren hoponko do onako jeretʼ cabaya. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus3:6 “Probhu Isor ńutumte sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jãhãe ḍaṅgra se bheḍae samaṅe enḍekhan uni do ạnḍiạ se eṅga jãhãnicʼkangeye uni do niphuṭ utạricʼ hoyokʼ jạruṛa. 
Leviticus3:7 Samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãe mitʼṭen bheḍa hopone ạguiye enḍekhan uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus3:8 Uni do bheḍa hoponakʼ bohokʼ cetanre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅreye gureya. Ona tayom Aronren hoponko do uni reakʼ mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaeteko irciyakʼa. 
Leviticus3:9 Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼ reakʼ porob lạgitʼ samaṅedekạnicʼ do noa sulukren samaṅokʼ janwarakʼ thoṛa hĩsko oḍokkate naeke emae hoyokʼtaea. Noako hĩs do hoyokʼkana uni janwarakʼ itil, itilte perecʼ canḍbol, lacʼ bhitri reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ hĩs reakʼ itil ar onako sãote jalatʼmitʼ akan itil," 
Leviticus3:10 banar kunḍi ar ona sãote jalatʼmitʼ akan ḍanḍa ṭhenakʼ itil ar kunḍi sãote oḍok hecʼakan inboro reakʼ ganthar. 
Leviticus3:11 Naeke do noako samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jomakʼ mente pinḍreye jereda. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana. 
Leviticus3:12 “Ar samaṅokʼicʼ do merome samaṅe khan enḍekhan uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus3:13 Uni do meromakʼ bohokʼ cetanre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅreye gureya. Ar noa tayom Aronren hoponko do uniyakʼ mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhateko irciyakʼa. 
Leviticus3:14 Ar samaṅicʼ do samaṅ akade janwar khon thoṛa hĩs oḍokkate Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ naeke emae hoyokʼtaea. Noako hĩs do hoyokʼkana uni janwarakʼ judạ judạ hĩs reakʼ itilko ar onako sãote jalatʼmitʼ akan itilko," 
Leviticus3:15 banar kunḍi ar ona sãote jalatʼmitʼ akan ḍanḍa reakʼ itilko ar kunḍi sãote oḍok hecʼ akan inboro reakʼ gantharko. 
Leviticus3:16 Naeke do noako samaṅokʼakʼ jomakʼ lekate pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan. Ar samaṅ akade janwarakʼ itil do jotoge Probhu Isorakʼ kana." 
Leviticus3:17 Jãhãregepe girobasokʼ ape do itil ar mãyãm do alope joma. Ar noage piṛhike piṛhi ape lạgitʼ niạm do tahẽyena. ” 
Leviticus4:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko noa katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Monre behok reakʼ monsubạ bạnukʼtae ar Probhu Isore mana akatʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼe ceka akatʼ khan," 
Leviticus4:2  
Leviticus4:3 “Uni kạkạiyicʼ do ojokʼ bahal ocoakan naekekan khane ar ona iạte sanam hoṛ dusiko hoyokʼ, enḍekhan ona lạgitʼ uni do kại reakʼ puruchun lekate Probhu Isor ṭhen mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ ḍaṅgra ạguiye hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus4:4 Uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạguiyea. Ar uniyakʼ bohokʼre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar Probhu Isor samaṅreye gureya. 
Leviticus4:5 Ona tayom maraṅ naeke do uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate ńapamokʼ tạmbuteye adera. 
Leviticus4:6 Ar ona mãyãmre acʼakʼ kạṭupʼe caḍoetaea ar thoṛa mãyãm do Probhu Isor samaṅre ona sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ orwal secʼ eae dhaoe irciya. 
Leviticus4:7 Inạ tayom thoṛa mãyãm hataokate ńapamokʼ tạmbure Probhu Isor samaṅre one okare jut so mosola reakʼ pinḍ menakʼ ona reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa. Ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãmte do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen one okare jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ pinḍ menakʼ ona aṛereye dulkakʼa. 
Leviticus4:8 Ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼe ạguakan ḍaṅgra khon uni do sanam itile oḍoka. Onako do hoyokʼkana lacʼ bhitriko reakʼ itil ar onako sãote jalatʼ mitʼakan itil," 
Leviticus4:9 banar kunḍi ar ona sãote ḍanḍa ṭhenakʼ itil ar kunḍi sãote oḍok hecʼakan gantharko. 
Leviticus4:10 Sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ ḍaṅgra khon itil oḍok akatʼ lekage nui samaṅ akade ḍaṅgrawakʼ itil hõ oḍok hoyokʼa. Ona tayom naeke do onako itil hataokate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ pind cetanreye jeretʼ cabaya. 
Leviticus4:11 Menkhan sarecʼ hĩsko, metakʼme, harta, jel, bohokʼ, jaṅga, lacʼ ar gubriko do ḍera bahrete idikate mitʼṭecʼ sapha ṭhạ̃ire one okare torocʼ giḍikʼ ona cetanre sahan reakʼ seṅgelteye atar giḍikakʼa." 
Leviticus4:12  
Leviticus4:13 “Ar goṭa Israel jạtrenko bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ monsubạ doho baṅkate Probhu Isore mana akatʼ jãhãnakʼge begor baḍaeteko onkae enḍekhan onko do ona bako baḍae akatʼre hõ dusiko hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus4:14 Ar tinreko bujhạu daṛeakʼa baṅmako kại akada unre onko do kại ńutumte dãṛẽye lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅre ạguiye hoyokʼtakoa. 
Leviticus4:15 Ona tayom Israelkoren mukhiyạko do Probhu Isor samaṅre uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ bohokʼre tiko dohoytakoa. Ar naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre uniye gureya. 
Leviticus4:16 Ar ona tayom maraṅ naeke do uni ḍaṅgra khon thoṛa mãyãm hataokate ńapamokʼ tạmbuteye adera. 
Leviticus4:17 Uni do ona mãyãmre acʼakʼ kạṭupʼkoe topoetaea ar Probhu Isor samaṅre sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ orwal secʼ eae dhaoe irciya. 
Leviticus4:18 Ona tayom thoṛa mãyãm hataokate uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbure Probhu Isor samaṅre oka jut so dhudhup pinḍ menakʼ ona reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa. Ar ona tayom do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen one okare jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ menakʼ ona aṛereye dulkakʼa. 
Leviticus4:19 Ar ḍaṅgrawakʼ sanam itilko oḍokkate uni do pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ cabaya ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼicʼ eṭakʼ ḍaṅgra hõe onkayea. Nonkate naeke do Israelkoakʼ kại ńutumteye puruchuna ar onkoakʼ kại do ikạkʼtakoa. 
Leviticus4:20  
Leviticus4:21 Naeke do uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ sarecʼakʼ hạṭińko ḍera bahreteye oḍok idiya ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼicʼ eṭakʼ ḍaṅgra lekageye atareya. Ar noage goṭa Israel jạtrenkoakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus4:22 “Jãhãe mukhiyạ hoṛ monre bạṛicʼakʼ jãhãnakʼ doho baṅkate acʼren Probhu Isore mana akatʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼe cekae enḍekhan uni hõ dusi hoṛe hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus4:23 Ar tinre uniyakʼ behokakʼ udukʼaea unre uni do samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ merom boda ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus4:24 Uni do bodawakʼ bohokʼre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ dãṛẽ mente Probhu Isor samaṅreye gureya; noa do kại ńutumte mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana. 
Leviticus4:25 Ona tayom naeke do kại ńutumte samaṅ akade janwar khon thoṛa mãyãm kạṭupʼte hataokate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pind reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa; ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãm do ona pinḍ aṛereye dulkakʼa. 
Leviticus4:26 Uni do sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ janwarakʼ itil lekage uniyakʼ sanam itilko do pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Ar nonkate naeke do mukhiyạ hoṛakʼ puruchun reakʼe kạmikataea ar nonkate uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus4:27 “Israelko modren jãhãege monre kại reakʼ monsubạ doho baṅkate Probhu Isore mana akatʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼe cekae enḍekhan uni hõ dusi hoṛe hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus4:28 Ar tinre uniyakʼ kại reakʼ udukʼaea unre uni do samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen niphuṭicʼ merome ạguyea. 
Leviticus4:29 Uni do meromakʼ bohokʼre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye gureya. 
Leviticus4:30 Ona tayom naeke do kạṭupʼte uniyakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa; ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãm do pinḍ aṛereye dulkakʼa. 
Leviticus4:31 Ar sulukren samaṅ akade janwarakʼ itil oḍok lekage nui samaṅ akade janwarakʼ itile oḍoktaea ar pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ cabaya. Ar noa reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼa. Nonkate naeke do uni hoṛakʼe puruchuna ar uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus4:32 “Kại ńutumte dãṛẽ lạgitʼ jãhãege bhiḍi hopone ạguiye, enḍekhan uni do niphuṭ utạricʼ bhiḍi ạguiye hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus4:33 Ar uni do bhiḍiyakʼ bohokʼre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren janwar dãṛẽko reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire idikateye gureya. 
Leviticus4:34 Ona tayom naeke do kạṭupʼte uni samaṅ akade bhiḍiyakʼ mãyãm hataokate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ pinḍ reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa; ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãm do pinḍ aṛereye dulkakʼa. 
Leviticus4:35 Ar sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ bhiḍiyakʼ itil oḍok lekage uni do uniyakʼ hõ sanam itilkoe oḍoka. Ar ona tayom Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mente uni do ona itilko pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Nonkate naeke do uni hoṛakʼe puruchuna ar onate uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus5:1 “Jãhãe hoṛ apnar ńelakʼ se ańjomakʼ jãhãnakʼ babotre bicạrre goha emokʼ reakʼ ạte ńamlere hõ thir hapegeye tahen enḍekhan uni do kại hoyokʼtaea ar ona behokʼ lạgitʼ uni do dạyireye paṛaokʼa. 
Leviticus5:2 “Ar jãhãe begor baḍaete jãhãn besaphawakʼe joṭetʼ eman lekhan uni do besapha ar dusi hoṛe hoyokʼa, baṅ do besapha janwar ar ạsul janwarakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkan ar baṅ do leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅkan kạṭicʼ jãhãnkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkan." 
Leviticus5:3 “Manwae chutokʼ nonkan jãhãn besaphawakʼ jãhãege begor baḍaeteye joṭetʼ lekhan uni hõ baḍae tayom do dusiye hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus5:4 “Begor sontorteye kiriyạkʼ nonkan jãhãnakʼ reaṅ jãhãe begor hudiskate boge-bạṛicʼe kiriạkʼ enḍekhan begor baḍaeteye onka akatʼre hõ uni do dusireye paṛaokʼa. 
Leviticus5:5 “Noako behok reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jãhãnakʼe onkaete jãhãe dusireye paṛaokʼ enḍekhan uni do ona behok akatʼ reakʼ aṅgoc hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus5:6 Unre ona behok reakʼ juribana lekate uni do Probhu Isor ńutumte kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bhiḍi pạṭhi se merom pạṭhi ạguiye hoyokʼtaea, ar naeke do uniyakʼ puruchun reakʼe kạmikataea." 
Leviticus5:7 “Uni hoṛ do bhiḍi pạṭhi bae ạgu daṛeae, enḍekhan uniyakʼ ona behok reakʼ ḍanḍom lekate Probhu Isor ńutumte barea potam se barea parwa lagaoaea. Unkin modre mitʼṭen do kại ńutumte ar eṭagicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ." 
Leviticus5:8 Unkin ạgukate uni do naekeakʼ tireye jimạkinạ ar naeke do pạhilre kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ ạguakan cẽṛẽye samaṅ maṛaṅea. Uni do bae phạṛiyea menkhan bohokʼe mocṛao tapagtaea. 
Leviticus5:9 Ona tayom uni cẽṛẽ khon thoṛa mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaeteye irciya, ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãm do roḍocʼ oḍokkate pinḍ aṛereye joro hińjida; noa do kại ńutumte mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana." 
Leviticus5:10 Ar eṭakʼicʼ cẽṛẽte do niạm lekate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅkate naeke do uniyakʼ puruchun reakʼe bebostawaea; ar onate uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus5:11 “Ar uni hoṛ barea potam se barea parwa hõ bae ạgu daṛeakin, enḍekhan kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ uni do mitʼ keji irạlsae gram mĩhĩ holoṅ ạguiy hoyokʼtaea. Noa do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ kante onare sunum ar kunduru do baṅ mesalakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus5:12 Uni do ona holoṅ naeke ṭhene idiya. Ar naeke do sanamakʼ samaṅ baṅkate ona khon mitʼ cuputʼ locakate Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ jinis cetanreye atar gidikakʼa; noa do kại ńutumte mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana. 
Leviticus5:13 Ar uni cetʼ lekae kại akatʼ onkage naeke do puruchun reakʼe kạmikataea ar onate uni do ikạye ńama. Ar samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ sarecʼakʼ hĩsko do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis lekage naekeakʼ hoyokʼtaea.” 
Leviticus5:14 Noa tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadeteye metadea," 
Leviticus5:15 “Jãhãe hoṛ monre kại reakʼ monsubạ doho baṅkate Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohoakan jinisko babotreye kại enḍekhan uni do kại reakʼ juribana lekate Probhu Isor samaṅre mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ bheḍa ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. Ar noa do dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ kana. Ona chaḍa dhorom reakʼ sekel lekate tinạkʼ rupạte bheḍawakʼ dam ṭhik dohokʼ unạkʼ rupạ do khuti purun lekate uni emae hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus5:16 Ar ona sonot jinis babotreye kại akatʼ iạte uni do puruchun lekate noa emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ona chaḍa bheḍawakʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do naeke tire emokʼ hoyokʼa. Ar naeke do uni bheḍa idikate kại reakʼ puruchunokʼ ńutumteye samaṅea ar onate uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus5:17 “Jãhãe begor baḍaete Probhu Isore mana akatʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼe cekae enḍekhan uni do dusireye paṛaokʼa ar onate uni do dạyireye paṛaokʼa. 
Leviticus5:18 Unre uni do acʼakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ oneye ṭhik dohoakatʼ damren mitʼṭen bhiḍi ạgukate naekeakʼ tireye jimạyea. Ar begor baḍaeteye kại akatʼ iạte naeke do puruchun reakʼe kạmikataea; ar onate uni do ikạye ńama. 
Leviticus5:19 Noa do kại ńutumte mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana, ente uni do Probhu Isor samaṅreye dusigea.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Jãhãe hoṛ ṭhen khon jimạwakʼ se jạmine dohoakatʼ se jor julumkate hataoakʼ jãhãn jiniskote cholteye ṭhokakateye hataoakatʼ se jãhãeakʼ atʼ akan jinis ńamkate eṛeye roṛ se eṛe eṛeye kiriyạkʼ, nonkan jãhãe kại hoṛ Probhu Isorre bepạtiạr iạteye dusilen khan, enḍekhan uni okaṭakʼe kombṛo akatʼ se ṭhokakateye hatao akatʼ se uni ṭhen jimạ tahẽkan se atʼ akan jinise ńamakatʼ se oka jinis cetanre eṛe eṛeye kiriạkʼkan ona do uni hoṛ ruạṛkatae hoyokʼtaea. Ar khuti purun hõ purạge emkatae hoyokʼa ar ona sãote ona jinis reakʼ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs reakʼ dam hõ ḍher emae hoyokʼtaea. Ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼ hilokʼ hõ jinisren mạlik ona emkatae hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus6:2  
Leviticus6:3  
Leviticus6:4  
Leviticus6:5  
Leviticus6:6 Behok reakʼ juribana lekate uni do amem ṭhik akawade damren mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ bheḍa do Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅe lạgitʼ naeke ṭhene ạguiyea. 
Leviticus6:7 Ar naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼe kạmikataea. Ar noako reakʼ jãhãnakʼtegeye dusi akanʼ, uni doe ikạ ocokʼa.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus6:9 “Aron ar uniren hoponkom baḍae ocokoa, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ niạm do nonka leka hoyokʼa. Ona samaṅokʼakʼ jinis do goṭa ńindạ ar setakʼ hạbicʼ pinḍ reakʼ seṅgel cetanre tahena, ar pinḍ reakʼ seṅgel do jol akaege dohokakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus6:10 Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ naeke do acʼakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ ar huḍiń penṭ horokʼkate pinḍ cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ torocʼ rakapʼkate pinḍ aṛereye dohokakʼa. 
Leviticus6:11 Ar ona tayom uni do kicricʼ bodolkate ḍera bahre sapha ṭhạ̃ire ona torocʼe idiya. 
Leviticus6:12 Menkhan pinḍ cetan reakʼ seṅgel do jol dohokakʼge hoyokʼa, ona do baṅge ĩṛĩcʼ ocowakʼ hoyokʼa. Din hilokʼ setakʼ bela naeke do ona seṅgel cetanre sahane emakʼa ar onare jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼe dohoyte sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ itilkoe jereda." 
Leviticus6:13 Ar pinḍ reakʼ seṅgel do jao okte joltege tahena, ar baṅge ĩṛĩcʼ ocowakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus6:14 “Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ niạm do nonkaleka. Aronren hoponko do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko pinḍ ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅreko ạguiya. 
Leviticus6:15 Ar naeke do purạ samaṅokʼakʼ bodolte ona khon mitʼ cuputʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ, sunum ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼ jinis cetanre dohoakan sanam kunduru hataokate pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Ar noa reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼa." 
Leviticus6:16 Samaṅokʼakʼ jinis reakʼ sarecʼakʼ hạṭińko do Aron ar uniren hoponkoko joma. Ona do khạmi begor mesalkate jojom hoyokʼtakoa jãhãn sonot ṭhạ̃ire, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ racare." 
Leviticus6:17 Ar khạmi mesalkate ona do jemon alo rapagokʼ. Noa do iń ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ jinis reakʼ onkoń ematʼkoa. Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ leka jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ noa hĩs hõ sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus6:18 Aron bõsren sanam herel hoponkoge ona doko jom daṛeakʼa. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ jinis reakʼ noa hĩs do piṛhike piṛhi onkoakʼge hoyokʼa. Ar jãhãege ona hĩse joṭed uni do Probhu Isor ńutumte begarokʼ hoyokʼtaea.” 
Leviticus6:19 Probhu Isor do Mose arhõe metadea," 
Leviticus6:20 “Arone ojokʼ bahal ocokʼ dinre Aron ar uniren hopon do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate jaoge mitʼ keji irạl sae gram mĩhĩ holoṅ Probhu Isor samaṅreko ạguiya. Ar ona reakʼ adha do setakʼ jokhecʼ ar adha do ạyupʼ jokhecʼko samaṅa. 
Leviticus6:21 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate ona holoṅ do sunumre sipi mesalkate luihạre isinkate kecakʼ kecakʼge Probhu Isor samaṅre ạgui hoyokʼa. Ar noa reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼa. 
Leviticus6:22 Aron tayom uniren okoeṭakʼ hopon do maraṅ naeke hudạ lạgitʼe ojokʼ bahal ocokʼ uni hõ noa porobe hoeocoya. Noa do Probhu Isorakʼ kana, ar ona do jotoge atar cabae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus6:23 Naeke ạguwakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do jotoge atar cabae hoyokʼa; ona do baṅ jomogokʼa.” 
Leviticus6:24 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus6:25 “Aron ar uniren hoponkom metakoa, noa do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ kana. Ar jeredokʼ samaṅedekạnicʼ janwar do teṅgenokʼ ṭhạ̃ire Probhu Isor samaṅre kại ńutumte samaṅedekanicʼ janwar hõ gure hoyokʼa. Noa samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jel do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana." 
Leviticus6:26 Okoeṭakʼ naeke noa samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼe kạmi uni do noa reakʼ jele joma. Uni do jãhãn sonot ṭhạ̃ire, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ racare ona jojom hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus6:27 Ar noa jel okoeye joṭed uni do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Janwarakʼ mãyãmte kicricʼre daglen khan enḍekhan ona do sonot ṭhạ̃ire ạrupʼ saphae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus6:28 Ar hasa reakʼ okaṭakʼ ṭukucʼre noa samaṅokʼ reakʼ jel isinokʼ ona do rạputʼ giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa, menkhan pitạl reakʼ jinisre isinokʼ khan ona do gasao saphae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus6:29 Ar naekeakʼ gharońjren sanam herel hopon do onako jom daṛeakʼa. Noa do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus6:30 Sonot ṭhạ̃ire kại ńutumte samaṅokʼicʼ janwarakʼ mãyãm do ńapamokʼ tạmbure aderlen khan ona reakʼ jel do baṅ jom hoyokʼa, ar ona do atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus7:1 “Noa do hoyokʼ kana dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ niạm. Samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ noa jel do sonot utạrakʼ kana. 
Leviticus7:2 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼicʼ janwar teṅgene ṭhạ̃ire dos ńutumte samaṅ akade janwar hõ gure hoyokʼa ar uniyakʼ mãyãm do pinḍ beṛhaete irciyakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus7:3 Ar uniyakʼ sanam itilko do samaṅ hoyokʼa, metakʼme itilte perecʼ canḍbol, lacʼ bhitri hĩsko reakʼ itil," 
Leviticus7:4 ar banar kunḍi ar ona sãote jalatʼmitʼ akan ḍanḍa ṭhenakʼ itil ar kunḍi sãote oḍok hecʼakan ganthar. 
Leviticus7:5 Naeke do noako hataokate Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mente pinḍ cetanreye jereda. Noa do dos ńutumte mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana. 
Leviticus7:6 Naekeakʼ gharońjren sanam herel hoponge ona doko jom daṛeakʼa, menkhan sonot tạmbu reakʼ ṭhạ̃irege. Noa do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana." 
Leviticus7:7 “Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ niạm do mitʼ lekage onkae hoyokʼa. Okoeṭakʼ naeke niạ banar samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼte samaṅetʼkạnicʼakʼ puruchun reakʼe kạmikataere ona jel do naekeyakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus7:8 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ okoe naekeye kạmi uni do samaṅakade janwarakʼ harta acʼ lạgitʼe doho daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus7:9 Culhạre sekao se celaṅre se taoware atawakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis do uni naekeyakʼge hoyokʼa one okoe do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼe kạmikatae. 
Leviticus7:10 Sunum mesal akatʼ se rohoṛteakʼ sanam jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis khon Aronren hoponko do soman hĩsgeko ńama. 
Leviticus7:11 “Noa do hoyokʼ kana Probhu Isor ńutumte ạguakʼ sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ niạm. 
Leviticus7:12 Jãhãege sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte gunmanao emaeye menetʼ khan uni do noa gun makʼnao samaṅokʼakʼ sãote sunumre mesalakʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ, sunum ojokʼakʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ thapṛa piṭhạ ar sunumre sipiyakʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ reakʼ piṭhạ," 
Leviticus7:13 ar gun makʼnao johar lạgitʼ sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ jinis sãote thoṛa khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ hõ tahena. 
Leviticus7:14 Probhu Isor emae lạgitʼ uni do joto lekanakʼ jinis khon mitʼṭecʼ mitʼṭecʼkateye ạguiya. Ar okoeṭakʼ naeke do sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ janwarakʼ mãyãme irciy noako do uniyakʼge hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus7:15 Gun manao johar lạgitʼ noa samaṅokʼakʼ jel do enhilokʼge jom cabae hoyokʼa, ar setakʼ hạbicʼ do baṅ sarecʼkakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus7:16 “Noa sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ do manot dohowakʼ purun lạgitʼ kan khan se samaṅetʼkạnicʼ do acʼakʼ monsubạte onae onkae enḍekhan ona samaṅ akatʼ jel do enhilokʼge jom hoyokʼa. Ar sarecʼ tahen khan dosar hilokʼ hõ ona do jomogokʼgea," 
Leviticus7:17 menkhan tesar din hạbicʼ tahẽlen khan ona do atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus7:18 Ar tesar hilokʼ hõ ona jel jomogokʼ enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ona samaṅakʼ bae ataṅa. Ar samaṅ akatʼicʼakʼ hõ ona do baṅ ataṅokʼtaea, ente ona jel do unre chutakʼ jinisge hoyokʼa. Ar okoe ona jele jom uni do ona kại lạgitʼ dạyike tahena." 
Leviticus7:19 “Sulukren samaṅokʼ reakʼ jelre jãhãn chutakʼ jinis jakʼlen khan enḍekhan ona do baṅ jom hoyokʼa, ona do atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar baṅ jakʼlen khan okoe sapha menakʼko onkoko jom daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus7:20 Jãhãege chute tahenre Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅ akatʼ sulukren samaṅokʼ reakʼ jele jom enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone biṭlạha ocokʼa. 
Leviticus7:21 Jãhãege manwa se janwarakʼ jãhãn chutakʼ jinis se eṭakʼ jãhãn chutakʼ hirkhạwakʼ jinise joṭed ar ona tayom Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅ akatʼ sulukren samaṅokʼ reakʼ jele jom enḍekhan uni hõ acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone biṭlạha ocokʼa.” 
Leviticus7:22 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Ape do ḍaṅgra, merom se bhiḍiyakʼ jãhãn itilge alope joma." 
Leviticus7:23  
Leviticus7:24 Gocʼ janwar se bir janware or cirạ akade janwarakʼ itil do eṭakʼ kạmirepe beohar daṛeakʼa menkhan jom do bape jom daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus7:25 Okoe janwarkote Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ hoyokʼ uniyakʼ itil okoeye jom uni hõ acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone biṭlạha ocokʼa. 
Leviticus7:26 Jãhãregepe girobasokʼ, ape do jãhãn cẽṛẽ se janwarakʼ mãyãm alope joma." 
Leviticus7:27 Ar jãhãe hoṛ mãyãme jom khan uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone marao giḍi ocokʼa.” 
Leviticus7:28 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Jãhãege Probhu Isor ńutumte sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãn janware ạguiye uni do mitʼ hĩs Probhu Isor ńutumte emokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus7:29  
Leviticus7:30 Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ noa hĩs, metakʼme koṛam reakʼ jel ar ona cetan reakʼ itil uni do apnar tite naekeye emaea. Ar naeke do koṛam reakʼ jel dolek samaṅokʼakʼ menkate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa ar ona do Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ hoyokʼa, menkhan itilko do pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ giḍikakʼa." 
Leviticus7:31  
Leviticus7:32 Sulukren samaṅicʼ janwarakʼ jojomsa bulu phạṛi reakʼ jel do naeke emae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus7:33 Aronren okoeṭakʼ hopon do sulukren samaṅicʼ janwarakʼ mãyãm ar itile samaṅ uni do bakhra lekate jojom bulu phạṛi reakʼ jele ńama. 
Leviticus7:34 Israelkoakʼ sanam sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ khon iń ńutumte dolek dohoakatʼ koṛam reakʼ jel ar samaṅakʼ bulu reakʼ jel do naeke Aron ar uniren hoponkoń ematʼkoa. Noa do Israelko ṭhen khon onkoakʼ bakhra hĩs kana.” 
Leviticus7:35 Aron ar uniren hoponko oka hilokʼ khon naeke menkate Probhu Isor sapʼsorae lạgitʼko ojokʼ bahal ocoakan enhilokʼ khonge Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅicʼ janwarakʼ niạ hĩs do onkoakʼ bakhra menkate ṭhik dohoakana. 
Leviticus7:36 Ar oka hilokʼko ojokʼ bahal ocolen enhilokʼge Probhu Isor do Israelkoe hukumatʼko tahẽkana jemon piṛhike piṛhi onkoren bõs do noako ńam. 
Leviticus7:37 Noa do hoyokʼkana jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ, dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ, ojokʼ bahal porob reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ niạmkoge." 
Leviticus7:38 Probhu Isor do sinại hahaṅkarre Israelko oka hilokʼ acʼ ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ạguiye metatʼko tahẽkan enhilokʼge uni do sinại burure Mose noako niạme emade tahẽkana. 
Leviticus8:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus8:2 “Am do Aron ar uniren hoponko nonḍem ạgukoa. Ar ona sãote onkoakʼ kicricʼko, ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum, kại ńutumte samaṅokʼren ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ reakʼ ḍạlicʼ hõm ạgu daraya." 
Leviticus8:3 Ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen sanam Israelkom jarwakoa.” 
Leviticus8:4 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose do sanamakʼe kạmikeda. Ar Israelren sanamko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenko jarwayena. 
Leviticus8:5 Unre Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do noako hoyocoe reakʼe hukum akawạdińa.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Ar noa katha menkate uni do Aron ar uniren hoponkoe ạguketʼkoa are ḍạbrạ sapha ocoketʼkoa. 
Leviticus8:7 Ona tayom Aron do bhitri reakʼ kicricʼe horokʼadete ḍanḍa totolakʼteye paṭhekedea. Ar ephod latar reakʼ kicricʼ ar ona cetanre ephode horokʼadea ar ephod sãote joṛao mitʼakatʼ ḍanḍa reakʼ ḍombete ephod doe tolkada. Onate ephod do uniyakʼ hoṛmore tahẽyena. 
Leviticus8:8 Ar ona cetanre uni do koṛam ḍhalwae horokʼadea ar onare Urim ar Thumime dohoadea. 
Leviticus8:9 Ona tayom dạhṛi do Aronakʼ bohokʼreye horokʼadete sonot mukuṭ, metakʼme ona sona reakʼ pat do dạhṛi reakʼ samaṅ secʼe lagaoadea. Ar Mose do Probhu Isore hukumade leka sanamakʼgeye kạmikeda." 
Leviticus8:10 Ona tayom uni do sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona bhitri reakʼ sanamakʼ cetanre ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunume ojokʼada ar nonkate Probhu Isor ńutumte onakoe begarkeda. 
Leviticus8:11 Uni do sunum reakʼ thoṛa hataokate pinḍ cetanre eae dhaoe ircikeda. Ar ona sunumte pinḍ ar ona reakʼ sanam thạri-bạṭiko ar gamlako sudhạ Probhu Isor ńutumteye begarkeda. 
Leviticus8:12 Ona tayom uni do ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ thoṛa sunum hataokate Aronakʼ bohokʼreye dulkeda ar Probhu Isor ńutumteye ojokʼ bahalkedea. 
Leviticus8:13 Ona tayom uni do Aronren hoponkoe ạguketʼkote aṅgrope horokʼatʼkoa ar ḍanḍa reakʼ paṭheakʼteye paṭheketʼkote bohokʼe dạhṛiketʼkoa. Ar Mose do sanamakʼge Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekae kạmikeda. 
Leviticus8:14 Ona tayom uni do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼicʼ ḍaṅgrae ạgukedea. Unre Aron ar uniren hoponko do ḍaṅgrawakʼ bohokʼre akoakʼ tiko dohoketʼtakoa. 
Leviticus8:15 Ar ona tayom Mose do uni ḍaṅgrae dãṛẽkedete uniyakʼ mãyãme hataokeda ar pinḍ saphae lạgitʼ kạṭupʼte ona mãyãm hataokate pinḍ reakʼ dereńkoe ojokʼada. Ar sarecʼakʼ mãyãm do pinḍ aṛereye dulkada. Nonkate uni do puruchun reakʼe kạmiketʼte pinḍ do Probhu Isor ńutumteye begarkada. 
Leviticus8:16 Ona tayom uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ lacʼ bhitri reakʼ sanam itil, ar im cetan reakʼ gantharko ar banar kunḍi onako do pinḍ cetanreye atar giḍikada." 
Leviticus8:17 Menkhan ḍaṅgrawakʼ jel, harta ar gubriko do ḍera bahrete idikateye atar giḍikada. Mose do jotowakʼge Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekae kạmikeda." 
Leviticus8:18 Ona tayom uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren bheḍae ạgukedea. Unre Aron ar uniren hoponko do bheḍawakʼ bohokʼre akoakʼ tiko dohokeda. 
Leviticus8:19 Ar Mose do uni bheḍae makʼkedea ar uniyakʼ mãyãm hataokate pinḍ beṛhaeteye irciwada. 
Leviticus8:20 Ar bheḍaye getʼ phạṛikedete uniyakʼ bohokʼ, jel ar itil doe atarkeda." 
Leviticus8:21 Uni do bheḍawakʼ jaṅga ar lacʼ bhitri reakʼ hĩsko dakʼteye ạrupʼ saphakeda ar bheḍa do goṭate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ pinḍ cetanreye atarkedea. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan. Ar Mose do jotowakʼge Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekae kạmikeda." 
Leviticus8:22 Ona tayom uni do eṭakʼ bheḍa, metakʼme samaṅokʼren bheḍae ạgukedea. Unre Aron ar uniren hoponko do uni bheḍa cetanre akoakʼ tiko dohoketʼtakoa." 
Leviticus8:23 Mose do uni bheḍae dãṛẽkedea ar uniyakʼ ṭhoṛa mãyãm hataokate Aronakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojomti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼreye jotʼadea. 
Leviticus8:24 Ona tayom uni do Aronren hoponko hõe ạguketʼkote onkoakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojomti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼre mãyãme jotʼatʼkoa. Ar inạ tayom do pinḍ beṛhaete mãyãme irciyada. 
Leviticus8:25 Uni do bheḍawakʼ itil, canḍbol reakʼ itil, lacʼ poṭa cetan reakʼ itil, im cetan reakʼ ganthar, ar itilte esetʼ banar kunḍi ar jojomsa bulu reakʼ phạṛiye hataokeda." 
Leviticus8:26 Ar ona tayom do Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoakan bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ reakʼ ḍạlicʼ khon mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ, sunum piṭhạ ar mitʼṭecʼ thapṛa piṭhạ hataokate ona do itil ar bulu cetanreye dohokeda." 
Leviticus8:27 Onako uni do Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ tireye calatʼkote dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate ona do Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaokeda. 
Leviticus8:28 Ona tayom uni do onkoakʼ ti khon onako hatao ruạṛkate ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ cetanreye jeretʼkeda. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus8:29 Ona tayom uni do acʼakʼ bakhra reakʼ hĩs, metakʼme ojokʼ bahalokʼ samaṅokʼren bheḍawakʼ koṛam reakʼ hĩs hataokate dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaokeda. Ar Mose do jotowakʼge Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekae kạmikeda." 
Leviticus8:30 Ona tayom Mose do thoṛa ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum ar pinḍ khon thoṛa mãyãm hataokate Aron ar uniren hoponko ar onkoakʼ kicricʼko cetanreye ircikeda. Nonkate Aron ar uniren hoponko ar onkoakʼ kicricʼko Probhu Isor ńutumteye begarkeda. 
Leviticus8:31 Ona tayom Mose do Aron ar uniren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen noa jelpe isina ar onḍege ojokʼ bahalokʼ polob reakʼ ḍạlicʼre menakʼ piṭhạ tulucʼpe joma, ente iń do noań hukumatʼme tahẽkana, am ar amren hopon do ona reakʼ jojom hoyokʼtapea mente." 
Leviticus8:32 Ar jom tayom okako jel ar piṭhạ sarecʼ tahen ona dope atar giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus8:33 Ar apeakʼ noa ojokʼ bahalokʼ onusṭhan do eae din hạbicʼ tahena. Onate noa onusṭhan ạuri mucạdokʼ hạbicʼ noa ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr bahre do alope oḍokokʼa. 
Leviticus8:34 Teheń oka hoyen ona do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumtege apeakʼ puruchun reakʼ hoyena. 
Leviticus8:35 Ar jemon alope gujukʼ onate teheń khon eae din hạbicʼ siń ńindạ ńapamokʼ tạmbu bhitrirepe tahena ar Probhu Isorakʼ khojakʼ lekape kạmiya. Ente iń do noa hukumgeń ńam akada.” 
Leviticus8:36 Mose hotete Probhu Isor oka hukume emletʼ tahẽkan Aron ar uniren hoponko do ona sanamakʼko kạmikeda. 
Leviticus9:1 Ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ irạlakʼ din hilokʼre Aron ar uniren hoponko ar Israelren mukhiyạko do Moseye hohowatʼkoa. 
Leviticus9:2 Uni do Arone metadea, “Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ am do mitʼṭen ạnḍiạ mĩhũ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍam ạguyea ar unkin do Probhu Isor samaṅrem dohokinạ. Unkin do jemon niphuṭ utạrkin hoyokʼ." 
Leviticus9:3 Ar Israelkom metakoa jemon onko do Probhu Isor samaṅre kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen mĩhũ ar mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopon ar sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭen bheḍako ạguko. Mĩhũ ar bheḍa hopon banarge jemon mitʼ bochor umerrenkin hoyokʼ ar jemon unkin do niphuṭ utạrkin hoyokʼ. Ar onko sãote jemon sunum mesalakatʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jinis hõko ạgu darae. Noako nonkae hoyokʼtakoa ente Probhu Isor do onko ṭhene ńel ocokʼa.”" 
Leviticus9:4  
Leviticus9:5 Onko do Moseyakʼ hukum leka ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅre jotowakʼ jinisko ạgukeda ar sanam Israelko do Probhu Isor samaṅreko teṅgoyena. 
Leviticus9:6 Unre Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isorakʼ mạhima ape samaṅre jemon sodorokʼ ar onate uni do noako kạmi lạgitʼe hukum akatʼpea.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Ona tayom uni do Arone metadea, “Am do pinḍ ṭhen senkate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼem samaṅte amakʼ ar ona sãote hoṛkoakʼ kại reakʼ puruchunme. Ona chaḍa hoṛkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hõ samaṅme ar onkoakʼ kại reakʼ puruchunme; ente Probhu do onageye hukumakada.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Onate Aron do pinḍ ṭhen senkate acʼakʼ kại samaṅokʼren bạchure gurkedea. 
Leviticus9:9 Unre uniren hoponko do mĩhũ reakʼ mãyãm hataokate acʼ ṭhenko ạgukeda. Ar Aron do ona mãyãmre acʼakʼ kạṭupʼkoe topoketʼte pinḍ reakʼ dereńreye ojokʼada ar sarecʼ mãyãm do pinḍ aṛereye dulkada. 
Leviticus9:10 Probhu Isor Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Aron do kại ńutumteye samaṅkede mĩhũ reakʼ itil, banar kunḍi ar ganthar cetan reakʼ hĩsko do pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼkeda." 
Leviticus9:11 Menkhan jel ar harta do ḍera bahrete idikateye atar giḍikada. 
Leviticus9:12 Ona tayom Aron do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍae dãṛẽkedea. Ar uniren hoponko do bheḍawakʼ mãyãm ạgukate uniko emadea ar Aron do ona pinḍreye irciwada. 
Leviticus9:13 Onko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼicʼ bheḍawakʼ bohokʼ ar jelko begarketʼte Aronko emadea ar uni do pinḍ cetanre onakoe jeretʼkeda. 
Leviticus9:14 Bheḍawakʼ lacʼ bhitri reakʼ hĩsko ar jaṅgako ạrupʼ saphakate uni do pinḍ cetan reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ cetanre dohokate onako hõe jeretʼkeda. 
Leviticus9:15 Ona tayom Aron do hoṛkoren samaṅokʼren janwarkoe ạguketʼkoa. Uni do hoṛkoakʼ kại ńutumte merome dãṛẽkedea ar lahate leka uni hotetege kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. 
Leviticus9:16 Ona tayom uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren barea janware ạguketʼkinạ ar Probhu Isore emakan niạm lekage unkin hõe samaṅketʼkinạ. 
Leviticus9:17 Setakʼ bela reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ chaḍa uni do jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ ạguakʼ jinis khon thoṛa hataokate pinḍ cetanreye atarkeda. 
Leviticus9:18 Uni do hoṛkoren sulukren samaṅokʼicʼ ḍaṅgra ar bheḍae dãṛẽketʼkinạ. Ar acʼren hoponko do uni reakʼ mãyãmko soradea ar uni do pinḍ beṛhaeteye irciwada. 
Leviticus9:19 Menkhan uni ḍaṅgra se bheḍawakʼ sanam itilko, metakʼme canḍbol reakʼ itil, lacʼ bhitri reakʼ itil, banar kunḍi ar gantharko do koṛam reakʼ jel cetanreko dohokeda, ar Aron do onako itil hataokate pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼkeda." 
Leviticus9:20  
Leviticus9:21 Ar Mose cetʼlekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage uni do dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate koṛam reakʼ jel ar jojom bulu reakʼ phạṛi do Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaokeda. 
Leviticus9:22 Ona tayom Aron do hoṛko secʼ ti tiyạrkateye bhoratʼkoa. Uni do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼe sạtʼketʼ khan pinḍ khone pheḍena." 
Leviticus9:23 Inạ tayom Mose ar Aron do ńapamokʼ tạmbu bhitrite kin boloyena. Ar onḍe khon oḍok hecʼkate unkin do hoṛkin bhoratʼkoa. Unre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do hoṛko samaṅre sodorena. 
Leviticus9:24 Ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon seṅgel oḍok hecʼente pinḍ cetan reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sanam itilkoe jomkeda. Ar noa ńelte hoṛ doko sạhnạskeda ar taberenteko sewakeda. 
Leviticus10:1 Aronren hopon Nadab ar Ạbihu do ạkinakʼ seṅgel reakʼ ḍhạknicʼre seṅgel hataokate ona cetanre dhupkin curucʼada. Unkin do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bahre eṭakʼ seṅgelte Probhu Isor ńutumte dhupkin samaṅkeda. 
Leviticus10:2 Onate Probhu Isor ṭhen khon seṅgel oḍok hecʼente unkine atarketʼkinạ, ar unkin do Probhu Isor samaṅrekin gocʼena." 
Leviticus10:3 Unre Mose do Arone metadea, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘okoe iń ṭhenko hijukʼ onko do sonot mente jemonko manaoiń. Ar sanam hoṛko samaṅre jemon iń ṭhonokokʼ.’ ” Ar Aron do hapegeye tahẽyena." 
Leviticus10:4 Tayomte Mose do Mesayel ar Elsaphone hohowatʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Nonḍe hijukʼben; ar sonot tạmbu oṛakʼ samaṅ khon abenren bhạcạmtạkinakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do ḍera bahrete idiben.” Mesayel ar Elsaphon do Aronren kaka goṅgo boeha, metakʼme Usielren hoponkin tahẽkana." 
Leviticus10:5 Moseyakʼ hukum leka unkin do hecʼkate Nadab ar Ạbihuakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ ḍera bahretekin oḍok idikeda. Unre unkinakʼ mạ̃ṛĩre naeke kicricʼ do horokʼge tahẽkana. 
Leviticus10:6 Ona tayom Mose do Aron ar uniren banar hopon Eliasar ar Ithamare metatʼkinạ, “Duk iạte bohokʼ totolakʼ do aloben raṛaea ar kicricʼ hõ alo ben oṛeja. Arben onkae khan aben hõ ben gujukʼa ar goṭa Israel jạtrenko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do sodorokʼa. Menkhan Probhu Isor okoekin seṅgelteye gocʼketʼkin unkin lạgitʼ aperen peṛa pạrbhạko, metakʼme eṭakʼ Israelko doko rakʼ homor daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus10:7 Menkhan abenakʼ hoṛmore do Probhu Isorakʼ ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum emakana, onate ńapamokʼ tạmbu bahre do alo ben oḍokokʼa, arben oḍoklen khan aben hõ ben gujukʼa.”" 
Leviticus10:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Arone metadea," 
Leviticus10:9 “Am ar amren hoponkin ape do bubulakʼ ńũkate ńapamokʼ tạmbure alope bolokʼa, arpe bololen khan ape hõpe gujukʼa. Noa do piṛhike piṛhi mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ niạmge tahena." 
Leviticus10:10 Ar okaṭakʼ sonotakʼkan ar okaṭakʼ do begor sonotakʼkan ar okaṭakʼ do chutakʼkan ar okaṭakʼ do chutakʼ baṅkan ona bujhạukate calakʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Leviticus10:11 Ona chaḍa Probhu Isor do Mose hotete Israelko okako niạme emakatʼko ona hõ onkope cetʼakoa.” 
Leviticus10:12 Ona tayom Mose do Aron ar uniren sarecʼ banar hopon Eliasar ar Ethamare metatʼkinạ, “Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ khon jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ oka sarecʼ hĩsko tahen ona do pinḍ aṛere idikatepe joma, menkhan khạmi begor mesalte jojom hoyokʼa. Noa do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana." 
Leviticus10:13 Onate sonot ṭhạ̃ire idikatepe joma. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ noa hĩs do am ar amren hoponkoakʼ kana. Noa hukum do ińiń ńam akada. 
Leviticus10:14 Menkhan Probhu Isor ńutumte dolek akatʼ koṛam reakʼ jel ar bulu reakʼ phạṛi do am ar amren hopon ar hoponera jotogeko jom daṛeakʼa. Menkhan noa do mitʼṭecʼ sapha ṭhạ̃irepe joma. Israelkoakʼ sanam sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ noa hĩs do am ar amren hopon ar hoponerako lạgitʼ kana. 
Leviticus10:15 Seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ tinre itilko ạgukʼa unre Probhu Isor samaṅre ona do dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate dolao lạgitʼ bulu phạṛi ar koṛam reakʼ jel ạgui hoyokʼa. Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka noa bulu reakʼ phạṛi ar koṛam reakʼ jel do am ar amren hoponko ar hoponerakoakʼ bakhra kana.” 
Leviticus10:16 Kại ńutumte okoeṭakʼ merom bodae samaṅlen Mose do uniyakʼ jel reaṅ khojkateye baḍaekeda uni doe jeretʼ caba akana. Onate uni do Aronren sarecʼ banar hopon Eleasar ar Ithamar cetanre raṅgaoenteye metatʼkinạ," 
Leviticus10:17 “Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ reakʼ jel do sonot ṭhạ̃ire cedakʼ baben jomleda? Noa do sonot utạrakʼ jiniskana. Probhu Isor samaṅre Israelkoakʼ kại khon puruchun lạgitʼge onko doko ematʼben tahẽkana. 
Leviticus10:18 Uni bodawakʼ mãyãm do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ite baṅ idi ocolente ińakʼ hukum leka sonot ṭhạ̃ire ona jel do jom reakʼ lek tahẽkan tabena.” 
Leviticus10:19 Aron do Moseye metadea, “Teheń Probhu Isor samaṅre unkinakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ onusṭhanre noako ghoṭona paṛaoạdińa. Ar teheńakʼ dinre kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ ona jel jomle khan cetʼ Probhu Isore kusikokʼa?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ar Mose do onae ańjomketʼ khane kusiyena. 
Leviticus11:1 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron Israelko galmaraoakoe metatʼkinạ, “Ot cetanren sanam janwarko modre okoeko pạgur ar ona sãote khurạ paṛakʼgetako metakʼme bar hạṭińte paṛakʼgetako eken onkoakʼ jelgepe jom daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus11:2  
Leviticus11:3  
Leviticus11:4 Adom janwar do ekenko pạgura, ar adom janwarko do eken paṛakʼ khurạgeako; onko do alope jomkoa. Ũṭ doko pạgurgea menkhan khurạ do baṅ hạṭińtakoa; onate onko hõ ape lạgitʼko besaphagea." 
Leviticus11:5 Saphon kulại hõko pạgurgea menkhan khurạ do baṅ hạṭińtakoa, onate onko hõko besaphagea." 
Leviticus11:6 Kulại doko pạgurre hõ khurạ do baṅ hạṭińtakoa, onate onko hõko besaphagea." 
Leviticus11:7 Sukri do bar hạṭińte khurạ menakʼtakogea, menkhan bako pạgura, onate onko hõ ape lạgitʼ doko besaphagea." 
Leviticus11:8 Onkoakʼ jel do alope joma ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ hõ alope joṭeda. Noko doko besaphagea. 
Leviticus11:9 “Jalapuri ar gaḍa dakʼre okoe jiwiyanko menakʼko onko modre okoekoakʼ il ar cũyạkʼ menakʼ onko dope jom daṛeakogea. 
Leviticus11:10 Menkhan okoekoakʼ il ar cũyạkʼ bạnukʼtako onko do hirkhạwan jinis mente bujhạukope baṅ do sobotʼ sobotʼ ạcur baṛaeko baṅ do eṭakʼ jãhãn jiwiyankoge. 
Leviticus11:11 Ente hirkhạwan jiwiyan kanako onate onko jom do baṅ ganokʼa ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ hõ hirkhạwakʼ jinis mente bujhạupe. 
Leviticus11:12 Dakʼre menakʼko menkhan il ar cũyạkʼ bạnukʼtako nonkan jiwiyanko do hirkhạwan mente bujhạukope. 
Leviticus11:13 “Adom cẽṛẽ hõ menakʼkoa okoe doko besaphage, ar onate onko hõ alope jomkoa. Onko doko hoyokʼkana, pajhaṛ, gidi, hende gidi," 
Leviticus11:14 kũṛĩtʼ, joto lekan jalo, joto lekan kạhũ, ũṭ cẽṛẽ, dundu, gaṅga kũṛĩtʼ, joto lekan dakʼ kẽhẽ," 
Leviticus11:15  
Leviticus11:16  
Leviticus11:17 hende dundu, gạṛuṛ, kokor," 
Leviticus11:18 ponḍ kokor, dereń kokor, bon bayar," 
Leviticus11:19 kisni, joto lekan kõkʼ, ḍạblạ kuṭạpʼ ar bạduṛ." 
Leviticus11:20 “Ar pon jaṅgateko calakʼ sanam uḍạukʼko hõ hirkhạwan jiwiyan kanako. 
Leviticus11:21 Tobe onko modre okoe do gunṭhi menakʼtako ar otreko don baṛae onko modren adomko dope jom daṛeakoa. 
Leviticus11:22 Onko doko hoyokʼkana buḍhi sosrocʼ, ḍheńca sosrocʼ ar joto lekan pohoko." 
Leviticus11:23 Menkhan eṭakʼ pon jaṅga menakʼtako uḍạukʼ tejoko hõko besaphagea. 
Leviticus11:24 “Noko iạte ape dope besaphakʼa. Ar okoe onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye joṭed uni do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:25 Ar jãhãege onkoren mitʼṭecʼ reakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye joṭed enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼe saphaetaea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:26 “Okoeko janwarakʼ khurạ cirạgetakore hõ bar hạṭiń bạnukʼtako se okoeko janwar do bako pạgur onko hõ ape lạgitʼko besaphagea. Ar okoe noakoe joṭed uni do besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:27 Pon jaṅgate taṛam jiwiyanko modre okoe do talkateko taṛam onko hõko besaphagea. Ar okoe onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye joṭed uni do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:28 Ar jãhãege onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye idiy uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼe saphaetaea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ape lạgitʼ noko jiwiyanko doko besaphagea. 
Leviticus11:29 “Huḍiń jiwiyanko modren okoe do otreko ạcur baṛae onko modre biji, goḍo, cerceṭecʼ;" 
Leviticus11:30 ghirni, torhotʼ, kakṛa ar raekakaṛbakʼ noko do ape lạgitʼko besaphagea." 
Leviticus11:31 Kạṭicʼ jiwiyanko modre noko do ape lạgitʼko besaphagea. Nokoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ okoeye joṭed uni hõ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:32 Noko modren mitʼṭecʼ hõ jãhãnakʼ jinis cetanreye gocʼkate ńur akan tahen enḍekhan ona hõ besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Baṅ do kaṭ reakʼ jãhãn bhajan, baṅ do kicricʼ, baṅ do harta, baṅ do bosta, jãhãn sapapʼakʼge, ar onate jãhãnakʼgeko kạmi ona joto do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Ona jinis do dakʼre topo dohokakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besaphage tahena, ar ona tayom do saphawakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus11:33 Noako reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ hasa reakʼ bhajanre ńurokʼ enḍekhan ona reakʼ jotowakʼge besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar onate ona do rạputʼ giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus11:34 Ona bhajan reakʼ dakʼ jãhãnakʼ jomakʼ jinis cetanre ńurokʼ enḍekhan ona jomakʼ jinishõ besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar ona bhajanre jãhãn ńũńũakʼ tahen enḍekhan ona hõ besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus11:35 Nokoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ jãhãnakʼ cetanre ńurlen khan ona hõ besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Nonkanko culhạreko ńurlen khan ona do rạputʼ giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. Ona culhạ do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus11:36 Ar onko modren jãhãege jharna se kuńreye ńurlen khan enḍekhan ona jharna se kuń do besaphawakʼ baṅ hoyokʼa; menkhan onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ jãhãegeye joṭed unige besaphae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus11:37 Khetre er lạgitʼ doho akan jãhãn itạ cetanre nokoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ ńurokʼ enḍekhan ona do besaphawakʼ baṅ hoyokʼa; 
Leviticus11:38 menkhan itạ cetanre dakʼ emakʼ tayom onare onkoakʼ jãhãn mạ̃ṛĩ ńurlen khan ona itạ do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus11:39 “Apepe jomko nonkan jãhãn janware gocʼlen khan ar jãhãe uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye joṭetʼ lekhan uni do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:40 Ar jãhãe uni gocʼ akan janwarakʼ jele jom enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼe saphaetaea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ar jãhãege uni gocʼ akanicʼakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ titeye sapʼ idiy enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼ saphaetae hoyokʼtaea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus11:41 “Huḍiń janwarko modre okoe do otreko ṭuṅdạṅ baṛae onko do hirkhạwan jiwiyanko mente bujhạukope. Onko do alope jomkoa. 
Leviticus11:42 Otreko ṭunḍạṅ baṛae jãhãn kạṭicʼ jiwiyanko hõ alope jomkoa. Onko sanamkoge hirkhạwan jinis kanako one okoe do lacʼteko taṛam se jaṅgateko taṛam onko sanamkogeko besaphagea. 
Leviticus11:43 Onko iạte alope hirkhạ ocokʼa. Ar onko iạte alope besapha ocokʼa. Ar alope bhõnḍokʼa 
Leviticus11:44 Iń do aperen Probhu Isor kạnạń. Onate ape do iń ńutumte begar akae tahenpe ar sonotko hoyokʼpe, ente iń doń sonotgea. Ot cetanre ạcur baṛae kạṭicʼ jãhãn janwarte hõ alope besapha ocokʼa," 
Leviticus11:45 ente iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do; ar aperen Isor hoyokʼ lạgitʼ iạte iń do Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea. Ar ińiń sonotgete apehõ sonotko hoyokʼpe. 
Leviticus11:46 “Janwarko, cẽṛẽko ar dakʼren jiwiyanko ar ot cetanre ạcur baṛae joto lekan kạṭicʼ janwarko reaṅ noage ińakʼ niạm tahẽyena." 
Leviticus11:47 Okaṭakʼ do saphawakʼ ar okaṭakʼ do besaphawakʼ, okoeṭakʼ janwarakʼ jelpe jom daṛeakʼa ar okoeṭakʼ janwarakʼ jel do bape jom daṛeakʼa ona do bujhạukatepe calakʼa.”" 
Leviticus12:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus12:2 “Am do Israelkom metakoa, jãhãe maejiue bhạrti hoṛmolen khan ar uniren koṛa gidrại hoylen khan uni do acʼakʼ candoteakʼ lekage besapha akane tahena. Uni do eae din hạbicʼ besaphageye tahena." 
Leviticus12:3 Ar gidrạ do irạl din hilokʼreye khatna ocoyea. 
Leviticus12:4 Ar ona tayom uni maejiu do acʼakʼ mãyãm oḍokokʼ khon saphakʼ lạgitʼ pegel pe din hạbicʼ koyokʼ hor akae tahen hoyokʼtaea. Ar saphakʼ reakʼ din ạuri purạukʼ hạbicʼ uni do jãhãn sonotakʼ jinis bae joṭetʼ daṛeakʼa se sonot ṭhạ̃ite bae sen daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus12:5 Ar maejiuren do kuṛi gidrại hoylen khan hõ acʼakʼ candoteakʼ lekage besapha akane tahena, ar bar hapta hạbicʼ besaphageye tahena. Ar mãyãm oḍokokʼ khon saphakʼ lạgitʼ turuigel turui din hạbicʼ koyokʼ hor akae tahen hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus12:6 “Menkhan koṛa se kuṛi gidrạ janam tayom uniyakʼ chut meṭaokʼ reakʼ dinko purạulen khan uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr samaṅre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ naeke ṭhen mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopon ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen potam se parwa hopon idi kin hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus12:7 Ar naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre onkoe samaṅkoa ar onate uniyakʼ chut do meṭaokʼtaea, ar ona tayom uni do acʼakʼ mãyãm oḍokokʼ reakʼ chut khone saphakʼa. Noa do gidrại janame tayom maejiuakʼ niạm kana."
