Leviticus12:8 Samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ bhiḍi hopon bae juṛạu daṛeae khan uni do barea potam ar baṅkhan barea parwa hopon ạgukin hoyokʼtaea. Unkin modre mitʼṭen do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ar eṭagicʼ do kại ńutumteye samaṅea. Nonkate naeke do chute meṭaokataea ar uni doe sapha utạrokʼa.” 
Leviticus13:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ," 
Leviticus13:2 “Jãhãe hoṛ hoṛmo reakʼ hartare jãhãn laṭa loṭo se bhumri se mitʼ bar ṭaklakʼ ṭiklạkʼ rakapʼae ar ona tayom do murhucʼjom rog leka ńelokʼtae, enḍekhan uni do naeke Aron se uniren jãhãeṭakʼ hopon ṭhene ạgu ocokʼma." 
Leviticus13:3 Ar naeke do uniyakʼ harta reakʼ ona roge ńeltaea. Ar onḍenakʼ upʼko ponḍ akan khan ar rog do hartate bolo akan khan ona do murhucʼjom rog mente bujhạu hoyokʼa. Unre naeke do ona ńel tayom besapha menteye lại sodorea. 
Leviticus13:4 Ar uniyakʼ harta reakʼ ona ṭaklakʼ ṭiklạkʼre ponḍge menakʼ khan ar harta bhitri hạbicʼ baṅ bolo akan khan ar onḍenakʼ upʼko hõ baṅ ponḍ akan khan, enḍekhan naeke do eae din hạbicʼ hoṛko khon uni hoṛe begar dohokaea." 
Leviticus13:5 Ar eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõe ńel doṛhaetaea. Ar inạko dinte ona rog harta bhitri hạbicʼ baṅ bololen khan enḍekhan uni do arhõ eae din begarreye dohokaea. 
Leviticus13:6 Ar eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõe ńeltaea. Ar inạko dinte hartare pasnao baṅkate cabalen khan uni do saphageae menteye lại sodorea, ente ona do eken bhumri kana ar jãhãnakʼ do baṅkana. Unre uni hoṛ do acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea ar ona tayom doe sapha utạrokʼa." 
Leviticus13:7 “Naeke do uni hoṛ saphageae menteye lại sodore tayom hõ uni hoṛakʼ hartare bhumri pasnao idikʼ enḍekhan uni do arhõ naeke ṭhen senkateye ńel ocoytaea. 
Leviticus13:8 Unre naeke do arhõe ńeltaea. Ar inạko dinte rog do sạrige hartare pasnao akan khan uni do besapha menteye lại sodorea, ente ona rog do murhucʼjom rog kana." 
Leviticus13:9 “Jãhãe hoṛakʼ hartare murhucʼjom rog ńellen khan uni do naeke ṭhen idiye hoyokʼa ar naeke do onae ńeltaea. Ar hartare laṭa loṭo rakapʼ akan khan ar onḍenakʼ upʼ hõ ponḍge menakʼ khan ar ona laṭa loṭo cetanre berel ghao menakʼ khan," 
Leviticus13:10  
Leviticus13:11 enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do mareyakʼ murhucʼjom rog kantaea. Ar naeke do uni hoṛ besapha menteye lại sodorea. Ar uni do begar dohoye reakʼ jạruṛ bạnukʼa ente uni ma besaphage menae. 
Leviticus13:12 Menkhan rog do uniyakʼ goṭa hoṛmore pasnao akantae khan ar bohokʼ khon jaṅga hạbicʼ menakʼtae," 
Leviticus13:13 enḍekhan naeke do mońjteye ńelea. Ar sạrige goṭa hoṛmore menakʼtae ar ponḍge khan uni do sapha menteye lại sodorea. Menkhan goṭa hoṛmo ponḍge menakʼtae iạte uni do besaphayicʼ doe baṅkana. 
Leviticus13:14 Menkhan ona tayom hõ jodi uni hoṛakʼ hoṛmore berel ghao ńellentae khan uni doe besaphagea. 
Leviticus13:15 Ar naeke do ona ghao ńeltayom besapha menteye lại sodorea. Ente uniyakʼ rog do besaphagea; ona do murhucʼjom rog kana. 
Leviticus13:16 Ona tayom berel ghao arhõ ponḍ ruạṛlentae khan uni do arhõ naeke ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus13:17 Unre naeke do arhõe ńeltaea. Ar uniyakʼ goṭa hoṛmo reakʼ rog sạrige ponḍgetae khan uni do sapha mentegeye lại sodorea, ente uni doe saphagea." 
Leviticus13:18 “Ar jãhãeakʼ hoṛmore ojo janamkate boge tayom ona jaegare ponḍge phoka se arakʼ macha ponḍ ṭiklạkʼ dag ńelokʼ enḍekhan uni do naeke ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus13:19  
Leviticus13:20 Ar naeke do onae ńeltaea. Ar harta bhitri hạbicʼ ona boloakan ar onḍenakʼ upʼko hõ ponḍge pherao akan khan naeke do besapha menteye lại sodorea, ente murhucʼjom rog do ona jaegare hoyakantaea." 
Leviticus13:21 Menkhan naeke do jãhãn ponḍ upʼ onḍe bae ńelńam ar harta bhitri hạbicʼ ona baṅ bolo akan ar caba lạgidokʼkan enḍekhan naeke do eae din hạbicʼ eṭakʼko khon begarreye dohoyea. 
Leviticus13:22 Menkhan hartare ona pasnao idikʼkan khan naeke do besapha menteye sodorea, ente ona do mitʼṭecʼ rog kana." 
Leviticus13:23 Menkhan ona baṅ pherao akan ar baṅ pasnao akan khan ona do ojo reakʼ dag kana. Ar naeke do unre sapha menteye lại sodorea. 
Leviticus13:24 “Jãhãe hoṛmoreye lo emanlen khan ar ona lo reakʼ berel ghaore arakʼ se ponḍ ṭiklạkʼ pherao akan," 
Leviticus13:25 enḍekhan naeke do ona hõ biḍạukateye ńela. Ar onḍenakʼ upʼko ponḍge khan ar rog do harta bhitri hạbicʼ bolo akan khan enḍekhan ona ojo jaegare murhucʼjom rog hoyakana mente bujhạu hoyokʼa. Ar naeke do besapha mente uniye lại sodorea, ente noa do mitʼṭecʼ murhucʼjom rog kana." 
Leviticus13:26 Menkhan naeke biḍạukate, onḍenakʼ upʼko begor ponḍ ar harta bhitri hạbicʼ baṅ bolo akane ńel bickom milạu ruạṛ akan, enḍekhan naeke do eae din hạbicʼ eṭakʼko khon begargeye dohokaea." 
Leviticus13:27 Ona eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõe biḍạutaea, ar unre hartare pasnao akane ńel enḍekhan naeke do besapha menteye lại sodorea, ente ona do murhucʼjom rog kana." 
Leviticus13:28 Menkhan onkage tahen ar hartare baṅ pasnao akan ar milạu idikʼkan, enḍekhan lo iạte phulạu akana mente bujhạu hoyokʼa. Unre naeke do sapha menteye lại sodorea, ente ona do eken mitʼṭecʼ lo dag kana." 
Leviticus13:29 “Ar jãhãe herel se maejiuakʼ bohokʼ se gocore rog reakʼ lokhon ńelokʼtae," 
Leviticus13:30 enḍekhan naeke do onae biḍạutaea. Ar rog do harta bhitri hạbicʼ bolo akan ar onḍenakʼ upʼko sasaṅ ar pạlkuge khan uni hoṛ do besapha menteye lại sodorea, ente ona do bohokʼ ar goco reakʼ murhucʼjom rog kana." 
Leviticus13:31 Menkhan naeke do ona roge ńela ar harta bhitri hạbicʼ baṅ bolo akan khan ar onare hende upʼ bạnukʼ khan naeke do eae din hạbicʼ eṭakʼko khon begarreye dohokaea. 
Leviticus13:32 Ona tayom eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõ biḍạukateye ńeltaea ona do pasnao akana se baṅ ar ona reakʼ upʼko hõ pạlku akana se baṅa ar harta bhitrite boloakana se baṅa," 
Leviticus13:33 enḍekhan babatʼ jaega badkate uni hoṛakʼ eṭakʼ upʼko do hoyo giḍikatae hoyokʼa. Ar inạ tayom naeke do arhõ eae din eṭakʼko khon begargeye dohokaea. 
Leviticus13:34 Ona eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõe biḍạutaea ar unre hartare ona baṅ pasnao akan ar bhitrite hõ baṅ bolo akan, enḍekhan naeke do sapha menteye lại sodorea. Ar uni do kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are saphakʼa." 
Leviticus13:35 Sapha lại tayom uniyakʼ hoṛmore ona babatʼ do arhõ pasnao idilentae khan," 
Leviticus13:36 enḍekhan naeke do arhõe ńel dohṛaetaea. Ar babatʼ do arhõ pasnao akantae khan ar pạlku upʼko sasaṅge khan ona do baṅ biḍạu hoyokʼa, ente uni hoṛ doe besaphagea." 
Leviticus13:37 Menkhan naeke do lahate lekageye ńel ar ona babatʼ jaegare hende upʼko janamokʼ enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do boge akana. Ar naeke do sapha akana menteye lại sodorea. 
Leviticus13:38 “Jãhãe herel se maejiuakʼ hartare ṭaklạkʼ ṭiklạkʼ, metakʼme ponḍ ṭaklạkʼ ṭiklạkʼ dag ńelokʼ," 
Leviticus13:39 enḍekhan naeke do ona hõ biḍạukateye ńela. Ona dagko ponḍge khan bujhạu hoyokʼa hartare poṭakʼ rog hoyakana mente ar onate uni hoṛ do jãhãn loksan baṅ hoyokʼtaea, uni doe saphagea." 
Leviticus13:40 “Jãhãe hoṛakʼ bohokʼ upʼko ńur iạteye ceḍege khan enḍekhan uni doe saphagea. 
Leviticus13:41 Bohokʼ samaṅ reakʼ upʼko ńur iạte jãhãeye cạ̃idạge khan uni hõe saphagea. 
Leviticus13:42 Menkhan uniyakʼ ceḍe bohokʼ se cạ̃idạ bohokʼre rog reakʼ jãhãn arakʼ macha ponḍ dag ńelokʼ khan bujhạu hoyokʼa uniyakʼ bohokʼre se cạndire murhucʼjom rog hoyakana. 
Leviticus13:43 Ar naeke do biḍạukate murhucʼjom rog leka bohokʼre se cạndire arakʼ macha bharaogeye ńeltae," 
Leviticus13:44 enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa uni hoṛ do murhucʼjom rog hoyakantaea ar onateye besaphagea. Ar naeke do besapha menteye lại sodorea. 
Leviticus13:45 “Nonkan rog okoeyakʼ hoyokʼ uni do oṛecʼ kicricʼ horog hoyokʼtaea. Ar upʼ do aṛakʼge tahentaea. Uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼ betʼkate ãṭ aṛaṅte ‘besapha, besapha,’ roroṛ hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus13:46 Uniyakʼ hoṛmore tinạkʼ din rog tahentae unạkʼ din uni do besapha akane tahena. Ar ḍera bahrere eskar tahen hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus13:47 “Ar jãhãn kicricʼre murhucʼ jom rog menakʼ khan baṅ do upʼ reakʼ kicricʼge cetʼ baṅ do musnạ reakʼ kicricʼge cetʼ baṅ do hartare se harta reakʼ jiniskorege hoyokʼ," 
Leviticus13:48  
Leviticus13:49 ar ona jaegare thoṛa hạṛiạr se arakʼ macha ponḍge ńelokʼ enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do eṭakʼ lekan murhucʼ jom rog kana. Ar ona do naeke udukʼae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus13:50 Ar naeke do mońjte ńelkate eae din hạbicʼ eṭakʼ jinisko khon begarreye dohokakʼa. 
Leviticus13:51 Ona tayom eae din hilokʼ naeke do arhõ onae ńel doṛhaea. Ar inạko dinre kicricʼ se otorre se bharnare se hartare se harta reakʼ jinis cetanre rog pasnao akan khan tobe bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do murhucʼ jom rog kana ar onako jinis do besaphagea. Unre ona do atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa, ente ona do mitʼ lekan murhucʼ jom rog kana. Onate seṅgelre atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus13:52  
Leviticus13:53 “Menkhan naeke do ona kicricʼre se otorre se bharnare se hartare se harta reakʼ jinis cetanre baṅ pasnao akane ńel," 
Leviticus13:54 enḍekhan uni do ona jinis ạrupʼ saphae lạgitʼe hukuma. Ar ona tayom arhõ eae din hạbicʼ eṭakʼakʼ jinisko khon begarreye dohokakʼa. 
Leviticus13:55 Ona tayom naeke do arhõ onae ńela. Ar pasnao baṅkate onkage menakʼ khan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do besaphagea. Ona jinis reakʼ bahre ar bhitri jãhã secʼrege murhucʼjom rog tahen, ona do seṅgelre atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus13:56 Ar saphaketʼ tayom ona jaega do arhõ polsoge ńelokʼ enḍekhan naeke ona polso jaega doe oṛecʼ giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus13:57 Menkhan ona jinisre arhõ polso dag ńelokʼ khan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona do pasnao akana. Ar ona murhucʼjom rogakʼ jinis do seṅgelre atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus13:58 Ona jinis saphae tayom polso dag baṅ ńelokʼ khan ona do arhõ sapha doṛhae hoyokʼa, ar onate ona do saphakʼa.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Noako niạm lekate murchucʼjom rogakʼ, upʼ se musnạ kicricʼ, se otorre se bharnare se hartare se harta reakʼ jãhãn jinisre sapha se besapha mente lại sodor hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus14:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus14:2 “Murhucʼjom rog hoyakan nonkan jãhãe hoṛakʼ saphakʼ reakʼ dinre niạ niạmge manao hoyokʼa. Uni do naeke ṭhene calakʼa. 
Leviticus14:3 Ar naeke do ḍera bahrete idikateye biḍạutaea. Ar uni hoṛ do murhucʼjom rog khone boge akan khan," 
Leviticus14:4 enḍekhan naeke do uni saphakʼ lạgitʼ barea jiwetʼ sapha cẽṛẽ, debdạru kaṭ, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar husopʼ dare reakʼ ḍạr ạgu torae lạgitʼe metaea." 
Leviticus14:5 Ona tayom naeke do hasa bhajanre jharna khon rakapʼ ạguakatʼ dakʼ cetanre unkin cẽṛẽ modre mitʼṭen do goje reakʼe hukuma. 
Leviticus14:6 Ar jiwetʼicʼ cẽṛẽ, debdạru kaṭ, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar husopʼ dạṛ do jharna dakʼ cetanre gocʼ akade cẽṛẽwakʼ mãyãmreye topoya." 
Leviticus14:7 Ar naeke do murhucʼjom rog khone sapha ocokʼkan hoṛ eae dhao mãyãme irciwaea ar sapha akanae menteye lại sodorea. Ar uni jiwetʼicʼ cẽṛẽ do ṭạnḍi secʼe aṛakʼgotʼkaea. 
Leviticus14:8 Ar sapha ocokʼicʼ do acʼakʼ hoṛmo ar bohokʼ reakʼ sanam upʼko ar pạlku upʼkoe hoyo saphaea, ar kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa. Ar ona tayom do sapha akane hoyokʼa. Uni do ḍerateye bolo daṛeakʼa menkhan eae din hạbicʼ acʼakʼ tạmbu bahrere tahen hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus14:9 Ona eae mãhã hilokʼ uni do acʼakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ sanam upʼ, metakʼme uniyakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ, goco, mẽtʼ kuṭi reakʼ upʼ ar hoṛmo reakʼ upʼko hõ hoyo saphaetae hoyokʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea ar dakʼreye ḍạbrạ saphakʼa, ar ona tayom doe sapha utạrokʼa." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ar irạlakʼ dinre do barea bheḍa hopon ar mitʼ bochorren mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopone ạgu darakinạ. Onko mimitʼko do niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ jạruṛa. Ar ona sãote uni do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mõṛẽ keji ponsae gram sunum mesalakatʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ ar mitʼ liṭar pe poa sunum ạgui hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus14:11 Ar okoeṭakʼ naeke uniyakʼ saphakʼ reakʼe kạmikatae uni do samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼe ạguakatʼ uniyakʼ jinisko ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạguiya. 
Leviticus14:12 “Ar naeke do unkin bhiḍi modren mitʼṭene hataoea ar mitʼ liṭer pe poa sunum tulucʼ dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅa ar dolek samaṅokʼakʼ ńutumte Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa. 
Leviticus14:13 Sonot tạmbu reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire okare kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼren janware dãṛẽ ocokʼ onḍege uni bhiḍi do dãṛẽye hoyokʼa. Ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jel reakʼ lekage dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jel hõ naekeakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Noa jel do sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus14:14 Naeke do dos ńutumte samaṅ akade janwarakʼ mãyãm khon thoṛa hataokate uni hoṛakʼ lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojom ti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼreye jotʼaea. 
Leviticus14:15 Ar inạ tayom ona sunum do acʼakʼ leṅga ti talkareye dula. 
Leviticus14:16 Ar jojom ti reakʼ kạṭupʼko sunumre cạbukʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅre eae dhaoe irciya. 
Leviticus14:17 Ona tayom acʼakʼ ti reakʼ sarecʼakʼ sunum khon thoṛa hataokate uni hoṛakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojom ti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼre dos ńutumte dãṛẽ reakʼ mãyãm cetanreye lagaoaea. 
Leviticus14:18 Ar ti reakʼ sarecʼ sunum do bohokʼreye ojokʼaea. Nonkate Probhu Isor samaṅre uni ńutumteye puruchuna. 
Leviticus14:19 “Okoe hoṛe sapha ocokʼ naeke do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼicʼ janware samaṅete uniyakʼe puruchunkataea. Ona tayom uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren janware dãṛẽyea ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko sãote pinḍ cetanre samaṅkate uni reakʼe puruchuna, ar nonkate uni doe sapha utạrokʼa." 
Leviticus14:20  
Leviticus14:21 “Menkhan uni doe reṅgecʼ hoṛkan khan ar onako ạgui reakʼ daṛe bạnukʼtae enhõ dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ uni do mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon ạguiye hoyokʼtaea, ar naeke do puruchun ńutumteye dolaoea. Ar ona sãote uni hoṛ do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ keji irạl sae gram sunum mesalakatʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ, mitʼ liṭar pe poa sunum ar barea potam hopon baṅkhan barea parwa hopon ạgukin hoyokʼtaea, noa do uniyakʼ daṛeakʼ bahre do baṅkana. Ar unkin cẽṛẽ modre mitʼṭen do kại ńutumte ar eṭagicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼicʼ ńutumteye samaṅkina." 
Leviticus14:22  
Leviticus14:23 Ona tayom irạl din hilokʼre saphakʼ lạgitʼ uni hoṛ do noako jinis ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅre naeke ṭhen ạgui hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus14:24 Ar naeke do dos ńutumte samaṅokʼren bheḍa ar sunum do dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa. 
Leviticus14:25 Uni dãṛẽ akade bheḍa khon thoṛa mãyãm hataokate naeke do uni hoṛakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojom ti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼreye jotʼaea. 
Leviticus14:26 Uni do acʼakʼ leṅga ti talkare thoṛa sunume duljoṅa ar jojom ti reakʼ kạṭupʼte rakapʼkate eae dhao Probhu Isor samaṅreye irciya. 
Leviticus14:27  
Leviticus14:28 Uni hoṛakʼ jojom lutur reakʼ gonḍare ar jojom ti ar jojom jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼre okakore naeke do dos ńutumte dãṛẽ reakʼ mãyãme jotʼade tahekan ona jaegakore hõ ona sunume jotʼaea. 
Leviticus14:29 Probhu Isor samaṅre puruchun lạgitʼ uni do ti reakʼ sarecʼakʼ sunum uni hoṛakʼ bohokʼreye ojokʼaea. 
Leviticus14:30 Naeke do potam se parwa uni jãhãeṭakʼgeye kulạu daṛeakin unkingeye hataokina. Ona tayom unkin cẽṛẽ modre mitʼṭen do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menkate, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sãoteye samaṅkinạ. Nonkate naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre uniyakʼ saphakʼ reakʼe puruchuna.”" 
Leviticus14:31  
Leviticus14:32 Murhucʼjom rog menakʼtae hoṛ okoe do saphakʼ lạgitʼ daṛe bạnukʼtae eken uni hoṛ lạgitʼ kana noa niạm do. 
Leviticus14:33 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron galmaraoatʼkinteye metatʼkinạ," 
Leviticus14:34 “Okaṭakʼ disạm do ạidạri menteń emape lạgidokʼkan ona disạmte bolokate onḍe jãhãn mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼre murhucʼjom rog iń paṛao ocoy," 
Leviticus14:35 enḍekhan oṛakʼren mạlik do naeke ṭhen senkateye mena, ‘ińakʼ oṛakʼre cetʼ coṅ murhucʼjom rog lekań ńeleda.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Ar naeke do oṛakʼre ạuriye bolokʼre oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼko oḍok ạgui reakʼe hukuma jemon oṛakʼ reakʼ cetʼge besapha mente alo sodorokʼ. Ar ona tayom do oṛakʼte bolokateye biḍạu aṭkara. 
Leviticus14:37 Bhit reakʼ rog biḍạu jokhecʼ bhitre hạriạṛ ar arakʼ macha khoepakʼge menakʼ khan ar bhit khon copotʼge ńelokʼ," 
Leviticus14:38 enḍekhan uni do ona oṛakʼ khone oḍokokʼte duạr do eae din hạbicʼe sińkakʼa. 
Leviticus14:39 Ar eaeakʼ dinre uni do ruạṛ hecʼkate arhõe biḍạu aṭkara. Unre ona rog bhitre pasnao akan khan," 
Leviticus14:40 uni doe hukuma jemon onḍenakʼ dhiriko oḍokte nagraha bahre jãhãn besapha ṭhạ̃ireko giḍikakʼ. 
Leviticus14:41 Ar oṛakʼ bhitri reakʼ sanam bhitko huritʼ saphakate ona reakʼ lopotʼ do nagraha bahre jãhãn besapha ṭhạ̃ireko giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus14:42 Inạ tayom ocokʼen dhiriko reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire nãwã dhiri bạisạukate nãwã hasate potaokakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus14:43 “Ar dhiriko huritʼ ocokʼkate ar hasate potaokatere hõ bhitre rog ńelokʼ," 
Leviticus14:44 enḍekhan naeke do arhõ senkate onae ńela. Ar rog do oṛakʼre pasnao akan khan bujhạu hoyokʼa murhucʼjom rog kana mente ar oṛakʼ do besaphagea. 
Leviticus14:45 Unre oṛakʼ reakʼ dhiriko, potao akatʼ hasako ar kaṭko jotoge rạputʼ gidikakʼ hoyokʼa ar nagraha bahre jãhãn besapha ṭhạ̃ire idikate giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus14:46 “Jãhãege oneko siń akatʼ dinre oṛakʼteye bolokʼ enḍekhan uni do enhilokʼ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus14:47 Ar jãhãege ona oṛakʼreye jom seye gitijokʼ uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼ saphaetae hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus14:48 “Ona oṛakʼ potao tayom naeke do arhõe biḍạu doṛhaea ar rog baṅ pasnao akan khan ona oṛakʼ do saphagea menteye lại sodora, ente oṛakʼre rog do bạnukʼa." 
Leviticus14:49 Oṛakʼ saphae lạgitʼ naeke do barea cẽṛẽ, debdạru kaṭ, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar husopʼ dare reakʼ ḍạre hataoa." 
Leviticus14:50 Ar ona tayom do hasa bhajanre dohoakatʼ jharna dakʼ cetanre mitʼṭen cẽṛẽye dãṛẽyea; 
Leviticus14:51 ar ona debdạru kaṭ, husopʼ dare reakʼ ḍạr, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ar jiwetʼicʼ cẽṛẽ do uni gocʼkedeyicʼ cẽṛẽyakʼ mãyãmreye topoyea ar oṛakʼ cetanre eae dhaoe irciyakʼa." 
Leviticus14:52 Ar cẽṛẽyakʼ mãyãm, ạtukʼ reakʼ dakʼ, jiwetʼicʼ cẽṛẽ, debdạru kaṭ, husopʼ dare reakʼ ḍạr ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạmte ona oṛakʼe saphaea." 
Leviticus14:53 Ona tayom uni jiwetʼicʼ cẽṛẽ do nagraha bahrereye aṛakʼgotʼkaea. Ar nonkate ona oṛakʼ do saphakʼa.” 
Leviticus14:54 Noa do murhucʼjom rog, babatʼ rog, kicricʼre se oṛakʼko reakʼ murhucʼjom rog, laṭa loṭoko, bhumriko ar ṭaklakʼ ṭiklạkʼko rog reaṅ niạm kana." 
Leviticus14:55  
Leviticus14:56  
Leviticus14:57 Noako khon manwa se jãhãnakʼ jinisge tinre saphawakʼ ar tinre besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa ona do noa reakʼ niạmrege udukʼakana. Ar noa kangea murhucʼjom rog reakʼ niạm do. 
Leviticus15:1 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ," 
Leviticus15:2 “Israelko galmaraoako ben, jãhãe herel hoṛakʼ herelteakʼ khon jãhãn besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼ enḍekhan ona iạte uni do besaphae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus15:3 Ar herelteakʼ iạte besaphakʼ reakʼ do nonka kana: baṅ do uniyakʼ hoṛmo khon oḍokokʼkantae ar baṅ do oḍokokʼ bond akantae uni do ona iạtegeye besaphagea. 
Leviticus15:4 Ar okaṭakʼ aṭetʼre uniye giticʼ are duṛupʼ ona joto do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus15:5 Hoṛmo khon besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkantae hoṛakʼ aṭetʼ okoeye joṭed uni hõ acʼakʼ kiricʼko saphaetae hoyokʼtaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:6 Ar okoe uniyakʼ duṛupʼakʼreye duṛupʼ uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼ saphaetae hoyokʼtaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:7 Jãhãe hoṛakʼ besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkan ar uni okoeye joṭede uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼ saphae hoyokʼtaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besaphageye tahena." 
Leviticus15:8 Okoe hoṛakʼ besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkantae ar jãhãe sapha hoṛe thoae enḍekhan sapha akan hoṛ do kicricʼ saphaetae hoyokʼtaea ar acʼ hõe ḍạbrạ saphakʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:9 Jãhãe hoṛakʼ hoṛmo khon besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkantae ar uni jãhãtegeye calakʼ ar jãhãregeye duṛubokʼ ona ṭhạ̃i do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus15:10 Ar uniyakʼ duṛupʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i jãhãegeye joṭed uni hõ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ar uniyakʼ duṛupʼakʼ okoeye kuṭuṅ uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼ saphaetae hoyokʼtaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:11 Besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkantae hoṛ ti begor ạbukte jãhãeye joṭede enḍekhan uni hoṛ hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼko saphae hoyokʼtaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:12 Besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkantae hoṛ jãhãn hasa reakʼ bhajane joṭed enḍekhan ona do rạputʼ giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa, ar kaṭ reakʼ bhajan do ạrupʼ saphae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus15:13 “Jãhãe hoṛakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼ thirlentae khan uni do saphakʼ lạgitʼ eae dine lekhaea ar eae hilokʼ do kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa ar unre doe sapha utạrokʼa. 
Leviticus15:14 Ar irạlakʼ dinre uni do barea potam hopon arbaṅ khan barea parwa hopon ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạgukinạ ar naeke ṭhene jimạkinạ. 
Leviticus15:15 Unre naeke do unkin modre mitʼṭen do kại ńutumte ar eṭagicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menteye samaṅkinạ. Ar besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼ iạte okoe chutgeye tahẽkan uni saphakʼ lạgitʼ naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅreye puruchuna. 
Leviticus15:16 “Jãhãe herel hoṛakʼ herelteakʼ khon besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼtae enḍekhan uni do ḍạbrạ saphakʼ hoyokʼtaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:17 Jãhãn kicricʼ se harta reakʼ jinisre uniyakʼ hoṛmo khon oḍokokʼakʼ jinis laṭkaolen khan ona do dakʼte ạrupʼ saphae hoyokʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ ona do besapha akan tahena." 
Leviticus15:18 Jãhãe herel hoṛ acʼren bạhutetʼ sãoteye giticʼmitʼlen khan ar herelteakʼ reakʼ itạ oḍoklentae khan unkin do bana hoṛge ḍạbrạ saphakʼ hoyokʼtạkina, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akankin tahena." 
Leviticus15:19 “Maejiu do candoteakʼ hoyokʼkan iạte uni do eae din hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ar inạko dinre uni okoeye joṭede uni hõ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus15:20 Inạko dinre jãhãnakʼrege uniye duṛubokʼ ona do jotoge besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus15:21 Ar okoe uniyakʼ aṭetʼakʼe joṭedtae uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼ ạrupʼ saphaetae hoyokʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:22 Ar uni maejiu okaṭakʼreye duṛupʼ akan ar ona jãhãeye joṭed, enḍekhan uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:23 Uniyakʼ aṭetʼakʼ se duṛupʼakʼ okoeye joṭed uni hõ ńindạ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Leviticus15:24 Jãhãe herel hoṛ nonkan maejiu sãoteye giticʼmidokʼ ar uniyakʼ candoteakʼ reakʼ mãyãm uniyakʼ hoṛmore laṭkaokʼ enḍekhan uni do eae din hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ar inạ eae din uni okaṭakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼ ona hõ besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus15:25 “Candoteakʼ chaḍa jãhãe maejiu ḍher din khon mãyãm oḍokokʼtege tahentae se dinko parom calaoen tayom hõ mãyãm oḍokokʼ baṅ thirokʼtae enḍekhan uni doe besaphagea. 
Leviticus15:26 Candoteakʼ jokhecʼ cetʼleka hoyokʼ onkage mãyãm oḍokokʼ dinkore uni okaṭakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼ ar okaṭakʼreye duṛupʼ ona do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus15:27 Okoe ona aṭetʼakʼ se duṛupʼakʼe joṭed uni hõ besapha akane hoyokʼa; uni do kicricʼko saphae hoyokʼtaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena." 
Leviticus15:28 Uniyakʼ ona mãyãm oḍokokʼ thirlenre hõ uni do eae din hạbicʼ onka tahen hoyokʼtaea ar eae din hilokʼre doe sapha utạrokʼa. 
Leviticus15:29 Ar irạlakʼ dinre uni do barea potam hopon arbaṅ khan barea parwa hopon ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅre naeke ṭhene ạgukinạ. 
Leviticus15:30 Ar naeke do unkin modre mitʼṭen do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ menteye samaṅkinạ. Nonkate naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅreye puruchuna uniyakʼ saphakʼ lạgitʼ.” 
Leviticus15:31 Mucạtʼre Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ, “Israelko talare ińakʼ ḍera tạmbu menakʼa. Onate sanam lekan besaphawakʼ khon pharakre ben dohokoa jemon ḍera tạmbu besaphakʼte aloko gujukʼ.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Herel hoṛakʼ herelteakʼ itạ, maejiukoakʼ mãyãm oḍokokʼ, herel se maejiukoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jãhãn besaphawakʼ ar besapha maejiu tulucʼe giticʼmidokʼ ar noako iạte besapha akane hoyokʼ enḍekhan uni lạgitʼ kangea noako ạn do." 
Leviticus15:33  
Leviticus16:1 Aronren hoponkin do Probhu Isor samaṅre sen soren iạtekin gocʼen tayom Probhu do Moseye galmaraoadea. 
Leviticus16:2 “Uniye menkeda, “Amren dadam Aron metaeme, goha sinduk cetan reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ samaṅre menakʼ orwal tayom secʼ reakʼ sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire acʼakʼ kusi leka jemon aloe bolokʼ. Are onkae khan uni doe gujukʼa, ente iń do rimil khunṭire daya duṛupʼakʼ cetanreń sodorokʼa." 
Leviticus16:3 “Ar onḍe bolokʼ lahare jemon nonkae sapṛaokʼ. Uni do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍae ạguiye. 
Leviticus16:4 Uni do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ sonot kicricʼe horoga ar bhitrire hõ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ huḍiń kicricʼe horoga. Ar mĩhĩ musnạ reakʼ paṭheyakʼte ḍanḍae paṭhekʼa ar bohokʼ do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼteye dạhṛikʼa. Noa do sonotakʼ kicricʼko kana. Ar noa horog lahare uni doe ḍạbrạ saphakʼa. 
Leviticus16:5 Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ uni do Israelko ṭhen khon barea merom boda ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen bheḍae hataoea. 
Leviticus16:6 Ar Aron do acʼ ar acʼ bõsrenkoakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼren ḍaṅgrae samaṅea. 
Leviticus16:7 Ona tayom unkin merom boda do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạgukinạ. 
Leviticus16:8 Uni do gulibãṭkateye ńela, okoeṭakʼ boda do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ kanae ar okoeṭakʼ doe Asasel ren kana." 
Leviticus16:9 Ar okoeṭakʼ merom boda do Probhu Isorren menteye ńelokʼ Aron do kại ńutumte unigeye dãṛẽyea. 
Leviticus16:10 Menkhan gulibãṭkate okoeṭakʼ merom boda do Asasel ńutumteye rakabokʼ uni do jiwetʼtege Probhu Isor samaṅre ạguiye hoyokʼa ar kại ńutumte puruchun lạgitʼ hahaṅkarre aṛakʼkae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus16:11 “Aron do acʼ ar acʼ bõsrenkoakʼ kại ńutumte puruchun lạgitʼ ạguakade uni ḍaṅgrae gurea. 
Leviticus16:12 Ar Probhu Isor samaṅre okaṭakʼ pinḍ menakʼ ona khon jolokʼkan aṅgra seṅgel hataokate mitʼṭecʼ ḍhạknicʼreye dohoya ar gunḍạ akatʼ bar cuputʼ dhupe hataoa. Ar orwal reakʼ bhitri secʼe adera. 
Leviticus16:13 Onḍe uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre seṅgel cetanre dhupe jereda. Ar ona dhup reakʼ dhũạte goha sinduk cetan reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ do danaṅokʼa ar onate uni do bae gujukʼa. 
Leviticus16:14 Ar ona tayom do uni ḍaṅgrawakʼ thoṛa mãyãm kạṭupʼte hataokate daya duṛupʼakʼ reakʼ samaṅ secʼe irciyakʼa. Ona tayom arhõ kạṭupʼkote thoṛa mãyãm hataokate daya duṛupʼakʼ samaṅre eae dhaoe irciyakʼa. 
Leviticus16:15 “Ar ona tayom uni do hoṛkoakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅ akade merom bodae gurea ar uniyakʼ mãyãm do orwal bhitri secʼe adera ar ḍaṅgra mãyãmte okae cekaletʼ onkage nui bodawakʼ mãyãmte hõe onkaea. Ar sinduk reakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼre ar samaṅ secʼre ona mãyãme irciyakʼa. 
Leviticus16:16 Ar Aron do Israelkoakʼ jãhãnakʼ ghạṭ iạte, onkoakʼ besaphawakʼ iạte ar onkoakʼ bebatao iạte sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire nonkageye puruchuna. Uni do Israelkoakʼ besaphawakʼko talare teṅgo akan ńapamokʼ tạmbu lạgitʼ hõ inạ mitʼ lekageye onkaea." 
Leviticus16:17 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire tin hạbicʼ Aron do acʼ ar acʼren bõsrenkoakʼ ar goṭa Israel jạtrenkoakʼ kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼ kạmi sạtkate ạuriye oḍok hijukʼ hạbicʼ okoe hõ ńapamokʼ tạmbure bako tahẽdaṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus16:18 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu khon oḍok hecʼkate Aron do Probhu Isor samaṅre pinḍ reakʼ besaphawakʼ reakʼe puruchuna. Uni do ḍaṅgra ar merom bodawakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate pinḍ reakʼ dereńkoreye ojokʼakʼa. 
Leviticus16:19 Pinḍ sapha ar Israelko sonotko lạgitʼ uni do kạtupʼte mãyãm hataokate ona ar onko cetanre eae dhaoe irciya. 
Leviticus16:20 “Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i, ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar pinḍ ńutumte puruchun reakʼ kạmi sạtkate Aron do uni jiwetʼicʼ merom bodae ạguiyea." 
Leviticus16:21 Ar acʼakʼ banar ti do uni merom bodawakʼ bohokʼreye dohoya ar Israelkoakʼ sanam behokakʼ ar bebatao, metakʼme onkoakʼ sanam ghạṭko reakʼ aṅgockate merom bodawakʼ bohokʼreye ladewaea. Ar ona kạmi lạgitʼe sapṛao akan hoṛ hotete uni do hahaṅkarteye kolgotʼkaea." 
Leviticus16:22 Uni hoṛ do idikate hahaṅkarreye aṛakʼ oṭokaea. Ar uni merom boda do nisun jaegakore onkoakʼ sanam ghạṭkoe gokʼ baṛaea. 
Leviticus16:23 “Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire bolokʼ lahare Aron okako mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼe horog ona do ńapamokʼ tạmbure ruạṛkate arhõ onḍege doho oṭokakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus16:24 Ona tayom uni do sonot tạmbu oṛakʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire senkateye ḍạbrạkʼa ar acʼakʼ kicricʼe horoga. Ar oḍok hecʼkate acʼ ar acʼren hoṛkoakʼ kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼe kạmiya. 
Leviticus16:25 Ar kại ńutumte samaṅ akade janwarakʼ itil do pinḍ cetanreye jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus16:26 Ar okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do Asasel lạgitʼ merom bodae aṛakʼgotʼkae uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa, ar ona tayom do ḍera bhitriteye bolokʼa." 
Leviticus16:27 Kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ kại ńutumtekin samaṅakan ḍaṅgra ar merom boda one unkinakʼ mãyãm do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire aderen, unkin do ḍera bahrete idikate harta, jel ar gubri sudhạ atar giḍikạkin hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus16:28 Ar okoe hoṛ ona atar giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ bahreteye calakʼ uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa ar ona tayom do ḍera bhitriteye bolokʼa. 
Leviticus16:29 “Inạ tayom okań menetʼ ona do ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tahẽ utạrakʼ niạmge tahena. Bochor reakʼ eae cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre ape do apeakʼ ontorpe nindhạn ocoytapea. Enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. Israelkoge cetʼ ar Israelko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛkoge cetʼ, ona do sanamko manao hoyokʼtapea," 
Leviticus16:30 ente niạ dinrege kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼ kạmikatepe saphakʼa, ar ona tayom do Probhu Isor samaṅre apeakʼ sanam kại khonpe sapha utạrokʼa." 
Leviticus16:31 Ar enhilokʼ do apeakʼ jirạukʼ dinge hoyokʼa. Niạ dinre apan ạpin ontorpe nindhạntapea. Ar noage ape lạgitʼ tahẽ utạrakʼ niạm do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus16:32 Jãhãe naekege maraṅ naeke lekate tinre acʼ apattetʼakʼ hudạreye ojokʼ bahal ocokʼa unre uni hõ noa kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼ kạmi hoyokʼtaea. Uni do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼkate sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ, ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ, pinḍ reakʼ, naeke reakʼ ar goṭa Israel jạtrenkoakʼ besaphawakʼ ar kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼe kạmiya." 
Leviticus16:33  
Leviticus16:34 “Noa do ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ niạm kana. Uni do Israelkoakʼ sanam kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ bochorre mitʼ dhao kạmi hoyokʼtaea.” Ar Mose do Probhu Isore hukum akawade leka jotowakʼgeye kạmikeda. 
Leviticus17:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus17:2 “Probhu Isorakʼ noa hukum do Aron ar uniren hoponko ar sanam Israelkom baḍae ocokoa. 
Leviticus17:3 Israel gharońjrenko modren jãhãe hoṛ ḍaṅgra se merom se bheḍa dãṛẽye monejoṅ enḍekhan uni do Probhu Isorakʼ ḍera tạmbu samaṅre, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ menkate dãṛẽye hoyokʼa. Ar onka baṅkate jãhãe ḍera talare se ḍera bahrereye dãṛẽye enḍekhan uni do mãyãm iạte dạyireye paṛaokʼa. Ar ona mãyãm khạtirte acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao ocokʼa." 
Leviticus17:4  
Leviticus17:5 Israelkoren okoeko janwar ṭạnḍireko samaṅokʼkan onko do Probhu Isor ṭhen ạguko reakʼ hukum emakana. Ar onko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor ńutumte sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ menkate samaṅko hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus17:6 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍre naeke do uni janwarakʼ mãyãme irciyakʼa ar Probhu Isore kusiyakʼ jut so lekate janwarakʼ itil doe jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. 
Leviticus17:7 Probhu Isorre bepạtiạr iạte boda-bhutko ńutumte janwar dãṛẽkate apnartetʼ aloko ạkhrińokʼma. Noa do mitʼṭecʼ niạm leka piṛhike piṛhi manao idiy hoyokʼtakoa. 
Leviticus17:8 “Onkom metakoa, jãhãe Israel se onko talareye girobasokʼkan jãhãe jạtren hoṛge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ samaṅokʼakʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen bae ạgui, enḍekhan uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao ocokʼa." 
Leviticus17:9  
Leviticus17:10 “Jãhãe Israel hoṛ se onko talareye girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jãhãn jạtren hoṛge mãyãme jom enḍekhan uni doń dea giḍikaea ar acʼakʼ jạtrenko khoniń meṭao utạrea," 
Leviticus17:11 ente mãyãmrege jiwi do tahen kana. Onate apeakʼ jiwi bodolte iń do pinḍ cetanre apeakʼ kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ iń bebosta akatʼpea. Ar mãyãmre jiwi menakʼte ona do kại reakʼe puruchuneda. 
Leviticus17:12 Ona iạte iń do Israelkoń men akawatʼkoa, onko ar ako talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼko hõ jemon mãyãm aloko jom." 
Leviticus17:13 Jãhãe Israelko se onko talareye girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jãhãn jạtren hoṛge jãhãn janwar se cẽṛẽ jomkoa menteye gocʼko enḍekhan mãyãm do hasare topakakʼ hoyokʼtaea," 
Leviticus17:14 ente sanam jiwiyankoakʼ jiwi do onkoakʼ jiwetʼ mãyãmrege menakʼa. Ona iạtege iń do Israelkoń metakokana jemon janwarakʼ mãyãm aloko jom, ente mitʼke mitʼ jiwiyankoakʼ jiwi do onkoakʼ mãyãm kana. Ar okoe ona mãyãme jom uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone meṭao ocokʼa." 
Leviticus17:15 “Jãhãege gocʼ janwar se bir janwar tite cirạ ocoakan janwarakʼ jele jom, baṅ do Israelkoge cetʼ baṅ do onko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛkoge cetʼ, uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa. Ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena, ar ona tayom do chut meṭaokʼtaea." 
Leviticus17:16 Menkhan kicricʼko bae saphaetae ar ḍạbrạ hõ bae ḍạbrạkʼ enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ bedhorom iạte dạyireye paṛaokʼa.” 
Leviticus18:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Aperen Probhu Isor doń ińkangea." 
Leviticus18:2  
Leviticus18:3 Onate ape okarepe girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan ar Misor disạmren hoṛko okakoko cekayetʼ tahẽkan onka do alope kạmiya ar ińiń idiyetʼpe ona Kanan disạmren hoṛko lekahõ alope colona. Ar onḍenko hoṛko leka hõ alope calakʼa. 
Leviticus18:4 Ape do ińakʼ ạn-ạrikope dohoya. Ar iń emakʼ niạmko joton salakʼpe manaoa. Iń aperen Probhu Isorge noa doń menetʼkana. 
Leviticus18:5 Ińakʼ niạm ar ạn-ạriko manao hoyokʼtapea, ente okoeye manaoa uni do ona hotetege jiwetʼe tahena. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus18:6 “Ape jãhãege aperen nijerren hoṛko tulucʼ alope giticʼmidokʼa. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus18:7 Ape modren jãhãege acʼren eṅgatetʼ sãoteye giticʼmidokʼte apattetʼ aloe bemanotema. Ente uni doe acʼren eṅgattetʼ kana; uni tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼ do baṅ ganokʼtaea. 
Leviticus18:8 Kạki eṅgat ar kạki goṅgo boeha kuṛi tulucʼ hõ giticʼmidokʼ do baṅ ganokʼtapea. Arpe onkae khan babape bemanotea. 
Leviticus18:9 Nijer misera ar kạki goṅgo boeha kuṛi sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, baṅ doe apattetʼren hoponera kan ar baṅ doe eṅgattetʼren hoponera kan, ar mitʼ oṛakʼre kin janamokʼ se eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃irekin janamokʼ." 
Leviticus18:10 Hopon se hoponeraren kuṛi sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, ona iạte do apnartetʼgeye bemanotokʼa." 
Leviticus18:11 Kạki gogowakʼ kukhi khone janam akan misera sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Uni doe misera kana. 
Leviticus18:12 Babaren misera sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, ente uni do ạpumakʼ hoṛmo hạṭiń kanae." 
Leviticus18:13 Gogoren boeha kuṛi sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, ente uni do eṅgamakʼ hoṛmo hạṭiń kanae." 
Leviticus18:14 Babaren boehakoren bạhuko sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, ente uni doe hopongo kana." 
Leviticus18:15 Kimintetʼ sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Ente uni doe hopontetʼren bạhukana onate uni tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼ do baṅ ganokʼa. 
Leviticus18:16 Boeharen bạhu sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Arem onka lekhan boehamem bemanotea. 
Leviticus18:17 Maejiu ar uniren hoponera sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Ar uni maejiuren hopontetʼ se hoponeraren kuṛi sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa, ente uni do maejiuren hoṛmo hạṭiń kanae. Ar noa do mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi kangea." 
Leviticus18:18 Bạhu jiwetʼ tahenre bạhuren boeha kuṛi baplaye hõ baṅ ganokʼa. 
Leviticus18:19 “Candoteakʼ hoyokʼ oktere maejiu sãote giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. 
Leviticus18:20 Eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛren bạhu sãote giticʼmidokʼte apnar besaphakʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. 
Leviticus18:21 “Ape modre jãhãege acʼren hopontetʼ se hoponera Molok debota ńutumte seṅgelre aloko samaṅkoma se okalekate hõ acʼren Isorakʼ ńutum aloe besonot ocoytaema. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus18:22 “Maejiuko tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼ leka herel tulucʼ herel giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Noa do mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼ utạrakʼ kạmikana. 
Leviticus18:23 Janwar sãote giticʼmidokʼte jãhãe herel hoṛ apnar aloe besapha ocokʼma. Ar jãhãn janwar sãote jãhãe maejiuakʼ giticʼmidokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Noako do mitʼṭecʼ dusṭạmi ar hirkhạwakʼ kạmikana. 
Leviticus18:24 “Nonkanakʼ kạmikate ape modre okoe hõ aloe besapha ocokʼma, ente ape samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoń laga ńirko onko hõ apnarte onkageko besapha akana." 
Leviticus18:25 “Nonkate onkoakʼ disạm hõ disạm besapha akantakoa. Onate bedhoromakʼ iạte disạm hõń sạjạyeda ar disạm hõ acʼren hoṛkoe ulạ giḍikako kana. 
Leviticus18:26 Menkhan ape do ińakʼ niạm ar ạn-ạriko manaope. Ape jạtren se ape talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jãhãe jạtren hoṛko hõ jemon nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ aloko kạmi. 
Leviticus18:27 Laha khon okoe ona disạmreko girobasokʼ kan onko do onkako kạmikante disạmko besapha akada. 
Leviticus18:28 Ape hõ disạmpe besaphae enḍekhan laha jạtrenko leka disạm hõ apeye ulạ giḍikapea. 
Leviticus18:29 “Jãhãege nonkan bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi enḍekhan uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone marao ocokʼa. 
Leviticus18:30 Ińakʼ hukumko senakʼpe ar onḍe seṭerkate lahaten hoṛko leka do alope colona. Ar noako kạmikate alope besapha ocokʼa. Ar iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do.” 
Leviticus19:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoako lạgitʼe metadea, “Iń aperen Probhu Isor doń sonotgete apehõ sonotko hoyokʼpe." 
Leviticus19:2  
Leviticus19:3 Aperen gogo-baba manotkope ar ińakʼ jirạukʼ mãhã manaope. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:4 Boṅga sekʼwa do baṅ ganokʼtapea se apnarakʼ dewa sewae lạgitʼ tite jãhãn debota do alope benao joṅa. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:5 “Probhu Isor ńutumte sulukren samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅre Probhu Isor jemon ape cetanreye kusikʼ onkape kạmiya. 
Leviticus19:6 Porob hilokʼ se ona dosar hilokʼ bhitrire uni samaṅakadeyicʼ reakʼ jel do jom cabae hoyokʼtapea. Ar tesar hilokʼ hõ jodi thoṛa sarecʼ tahen enḍekhan ona dope atar giḍikakʼa," 
Leviticus19:7 ente tesar hilokʼ ona jel do besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar jãhãe ona jele jom enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ona samaṅokʼakʼ bae ataṅtaea. 
Leviticus19:8 Okoe onae jom ona behokakʼ iạte uni do dạyireye paṛaokʼa, ente onate ińakʼ sonot jinis do besonotakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar uni hoṛ do acʼ jạtrenko khone marao ocokʼa." 
Leviticus19:9 “Phosol ir jokhecʼ aṛe reakʼ phosolko alope ira ar khetre okako ńur tahen ona hõ alope halaṅa. 
Leviticus19:10 Darkha khet khon darkha gotʼ tayom ona khon darkha alope gotʼ dohṛaea ar ńur akan darkha jo hõ alope halaṅa. Ona do reṅgecʼ orecʼko ar eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼpe sarecʼ oṭokakʼa. Ar iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:11 “Alope kombṛoya, okoehõ alope ṭhokakoa ar eṛe hõ alope roṛa." 
Leviticus19:12 Iń ńutumte eṛe eṛe alope kiriạkʼa ar aperen Isorakʼ ńutum alope besonota. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:13 “Am aḍepaseren hoṛ alom julumea ar jãhãnakʼ alom rejeya. Khaṭaoicʼ reakʼ mujuri do enhilokʼge emkataeme; ona do setakʼ hạbicʼ alom doho aṅgaea. 
Leviticus19:14 Luturte bae ańjom hoṛ do alogepe sarapaea ar mẽtʼte bae ńeńelkạnicʼ hõ alope tohotʼ ocoyea. Ape do aperen Isor botoraepe. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:15 “Behok lekate alope bicạra. Bicạr do alope kạṭicʼ lạṭuya; menkhan mimitʼko lạgitʼ hok reakʼ bicạr chinḍạupe. 
Leviticus19:16 Okoe hoṛakʼ hõ alom nindạua. Ar am aḍepaseren hoṛakʼ jiwi upạrte hõ alom teṅgona. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:17 “Eṭakʼko cetanre amakʼ monre kurud alom dohoya. Eṭakʼkoakʼ dosko menakʼ khan udukʼakome jemon ona iạte dusire amhõ alom paṛaokʼ. 
Leviticus19:18 Alom hala hạliya, se okoe cetanre hõ monre khĩs alom dohoya. Ar am aḍepaseren hoṛ do apnar lekam dulạṛea. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus19:19 “Ińakʼ niạm manaope. Ar judạ judạ jạtren janwarko alope (otoṅ) milạu mitʼ ocokoa. Mitʼ khetre bar lekan itạ hõ alope era. Ar bar lekan sutạm reakʼ teńakʼ kicricʼ hõ alope horoga. 
Leviticus19:20 “Eṭakʼicʼ sãote baplakʼ reakʼ ṭhik akantae ar ṭakate bae chaḍao ocoakan nonkan jãhãe kạ̃ṛmĩ sãote jãhãegeye giticʼmidokʼ enḍekhan uni do sạjạiye hoyokʼa. Ar unkin do bakin gocʼ ocokʼa ente kuṛi do bae chaḍao ocoakana. 
Leviticus19:21 Menkhan uni hoṛ do Probhu Isor ńutumte dos reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menkate ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen mitʼṭen bheḍa ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus19:22 Ar naeke do dos ńutumtren uni bheḍa Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạguiyea ar uniyakʼ kại reakʼe puruchuna. Onate uniyakʼ kại do ikạkʼtaea. 
Leviticus19:23 “Apeakʼ disạmre senkate jãhãn jo darepe rohoe lekhan pe bochor hạbicʼ ona reakʼ jo do bin khatna akan leka hudispe. Ar onako dinre ona reakʼ jo jom do baṅ ganokʼtapea. 
Leviticus19:24 Ponakʼ bochorre dare reakʼ sanam jo do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok lạgitʼ uni ńutumte samaṅpe. 
Leviticus19:25 Ar mõṛẽakʼ bochor khon ona dare reakʼ jo dope jom daṛeakʼa. Onate apeakʼ darekore do ḍher jo jokʼa. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:26 “Mãyãm sudhạ jãhãn jel alope joma. Alope guniya ar alope bhabaoa. 
Leviticus19:27 Bohokʼ reakʼ beṛhaete alope kaṭopʼ ạcura ar goco hõ alope bạṛija. 
Leviticus19:28 Gocʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ rakʼ homor jokhecʼ hoṛmo alope getʼ cirạkʼa. Hoṛmore khodạ se sikạ hõ alope sikạkʼa. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:29 “Amren hoponera do kusumbi alom hoeocoyea. Arem onka ocoye khan disạmre kusumbiko ḍher idikʼte mucạtʼre disạm do nosṭamite perejokʼa. 
Leviticus19:30 Ińiń hukum akatʼ jirạukʼ mãhã reakʼ dinko manaope ar ińakʼ ḍera tạmbu do sonot dohoype. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:31 “Okoe gocʼ hoṛkoe ḍakaoko uni ṭhen do alope calakʼa, ente uni do apeye bhõnḍpea. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus19:32 “Haṛam hoṛkoko hecʼlenre teṅgokʼpe ar onko manotkope. Ar aperen Isor botoraepe. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus19:33 “Ape talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko sãote bạṛicʼ alope beohara. 
Leviticus19:34 Apnar jạtrenko sãote cetʼlekape beoharetʼ onkage onko sãote hõ beoharpe. Ar apnar leka dulạṛkope, ente ape hõ Misorrenko talare upriạpe tahẽkana. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus19:35 “Bicạr reakʼ ray emokʼre se jeleńakʼ jãhãnakʼ jokhaere se jãhãn hamalakʼ sosoṅre alope behoka. 
Leviticus19:36 Apeakʼ tulạ, baṭkhara ar eṭakʼakʼ sosoṅakʼ jinisko do jotoge jemon ṭhik leka tahentape. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. Misor disạm khon ińgeń oḍok ạguakatʼpea." 
Leviticus19:37 Ińakʼ sanam niạmko manaope ar ińakʼ sanam ạn-ạriko dohoype. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do.” 
Leviticus20:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko noa katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Jãhãe Israel se Israel talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãe hoṛge Molok debota ṭhen acʼren hopon se hoponerae samaṅe enḍekhan uni do gocʼ giḍikae hoyokʼa. Ar disạmren hoṛge uni do dhiriteko tiń gojema." 
Leviticus20:2  
Leviticus20:3 Uni do mẽtʼ ar mẽtʼteń ńelea, ente uni jạtrenko khon uni doń marao giḍiyea, ente Molok debota ṭhen acʼren gidrại samaṅedete ińakʼ sonot tạmbui bhõnḍ ocoyeda ar ińakʼ ńutum hõe besonot ocoyetʼkana." 
Leviticus20:4 Molok debota ṭhen hopontetʼe samaṅe jokhecʼ disạmren hoṛko ńeńel tulucʼ hõ bako ńeńel ar samaṅetʼkạnicʼ hõ bako goje," 
Leviticus20:5 enḍekhan uni samaṅetʼkạnicʼ ar uni gharońjrenko do mẽtʼ ar mẽtʼteń ńelkoa. Uni ar acʼ sãotenko okoe do ińre pạtiạu baṅkate Molok debota ṭhen jamaṛ akan menakʼko onko do Israel jạtrenko khoniń meṭao giḍikoa. 
Leviticus20:6 “Okoe hoṛ ińre pạtiạu doho baṅkate bhutko tulucʼ se bạṛicʼ jiuko tulucʼ jopoṛao menakʼtae nonkan hoṛko ṭhene ạkhrińokʼ enḍekhan uni do mẽtʼ ar mẽtʼteń ńeleya ar uniyakʼ jạtrenko khoniń meṭao giḍikaea. 
Leviticus20:7 Iń ńutumte begarokʼte sonotko hoyokʼpe, ente iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus20:8 Ińakʼ niạmko sapʼ dohoype ar onaleka calakʼpe. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do, ar iń lạgitʼge ape doń begar dohoakatʼpea." 
Leviticus20:9 “Jãhãeakʼ kathare gogo ar baba lạgitʼ bemanot tahen uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar ona bemanot iạte gujukʼ do apnargeye dạyikana. 
Leviticus20:10 “Jãhãege acʼ aḍepaseren maejiu sãote, metakʼme eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛren bạhu sãote aloe laṭghaṭ ma, ar baṅ khan laṭghaṭicʼ ar loṭghuṭiyicʼ unkin bana hoṛgekin gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Leviticus20:11 Okoe acʼren kạki gogo tulucʼe giticʼmidokʼ uni do apattetʼe bemanot edekana. Are onka lekhan uni ar acʼren kạki gogo banarge gocʼkin hoyokʼa. Ar unkin do gujukʼ lạgitʼ apnarge dạyikin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus20:12 Jãhãege kimintetʼ sãoteye giticʼmidokʼ enḍekhan unkin bana hoṛge gocʼkin hoyokʼa. Unkinakʼ giticʼ midokʼ do baṅ ganokʼa. Ar ạkinakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do apnarge dạyikin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus20:13 Maejiu tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼ leka jãhãe herel hoṛ do herel tulucʼe giticʼmidokʼ enḍekhan ona do hirkhạ utạrakʼ kạmi hoyokʼa. Ar onate unkin do gocʼkin hoyokʼa. Ar ạkinakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do apnarge dạyikin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus20:14 Okoe hoṛ jãhãe hoponera ar uniren eṅgattetʼe baplakin uniyakʼ ona do hirkhạwakʼ kạmige hoyokʼtaea. Ar jãhãe onkanakʼe kạmi khan uni hoṛ ar unkin eṅgahon jotoge seṅgelre khadleko hoyokʼa jemon nonkan hirkhạwakʼ kạmi ape talare ar alo hoyokʼ. 
Leviticus20:15 Jãhãe hoṛ janwar sãoteye laṭghaṭ lekhan uni hoṛ ar janwar banarge gocʼkin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus20:16 Janwar sãote jãhãe maejiue laṭghaṭ lekhan maejiu ar uni janwar banarge gocʼkin hoyokʼa. Unkin do gocʼ kintege hoyokʼa. Ar ạkinge ona gujukʼren dạyikin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus20:17 “Nijạr miserat se kạki gogoren kuṛi baplayete uni tulucʼe giticʼmidokʼ noa do mitʼṭecʼ lajao paṛaoakʼ kạmi hoyokʼa. Uni misera do baṅ doe eṅgat secʼren kan ar baṅ doe apat secʼren kan ona do baṅ ganokʼa. Ar okoe onakoe onkae onko do hoṛ samaṅreko gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar miseratetʼe bemanot ocoyedete uni hoṛ do dạyireye paṛaokʼa. 
Leviticus20:18 Jãhãe maejiuakʼ candoteakʼ hoyokʼkantae oktere uni sãote jãhãeye giticʼmidokʼte maejiuakʼ jãhãn morjada bae emakʼ ar uni maejiu hõ apnarte morjada bae dohoy. Enḍekhan unkin do jạtrenko khonkin marao ocokʼa. 
Leviticus20:19 Okoehõ jemon eṅgattetʼren boeha kuṛi se hatomtetʼ sãote aloe giticʼmidokʼ. Noa iạte peṛakʼ reakʼ bemanotakʼge hoyokʼa. Ar noa iạte unkin do dạyirekin paṛaokʼa. 
Leviticus20:20 Jãhãege kạkit era se goṅgot era sãoteye giticʼmidokʼ enḍekhan uni do kakattetʼ ar mamottetʼ tạkine bemanotkinạ. Ona iạte unkin do bana hoṛge dạyikin hoyokʼa. Ar unkin do begor gidrạwantege kin gujukʼa. 
Leviticus20:21 Boeha jiwetʼ tahenre jãhãege uniren bạhui baplaye uni do mitʼṭecʼ hirkhạwakʼgeye kạmiya. Ar nonkate acʼren boeha doe bemanot ocoyea. Ar unkinren do cele gidrạge bako hoyokʼtạkina. 
Leviticus20:22 “Oka disạmteń idiyetʼpe ona disạm jemon aloe ulạ giḍikape ona lạgitʼ ińakʼ niạm ar ạn-ạriko manao hoyokʼtapea. 
Leviticus20:23 Ape samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoń laga ńirko onko leka do alope colona. Onkoakʼ colon iạte onko do hirkhạ mẽtʼteń ńeletʼkoa. 
Leviticus20:24 Iń doń metatʼpe tahẽkana, onkoakʼ disạm do apeakʼge hoyokʼa. Iń do toa, dumur rasa ạtukʼkan ona disạmge ạidạri menkateń emapea. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do. Ińge eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko khoniń begar dohoakatʼpea." 
Leviticus20:25 Ona iạte janwarko ar cẽṛẽko modren okoe doko saphakokan ar okoe doko besaphage onkope begarkoa. Okoe janwarko se cẽṛẽko se otreko ạcur baṛaekan kạṭicʼ jiwiyanko modre iń do besaphakoń begar akatʼko, onko modren okoeṭakʼte hõ jemon hirkhạwanko alope hoyokʼ." 
Leviticus20:26 Iń Probhu Isor doń sonotgete ape hõ sonotko hoyokʼpe; ar ińge ińren hoṛ hoyokʼ lạgitʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko khoniń begar akatʼpea. 
Leviticus20:27 “Jãhãe herel hoṛ se maejiu hoṛ bhutko se bạṛicʼ jiuko tulucʼ helmelko dohoy enḍekhan onko doko gocʼ ocokʼa. Onko do dhiriteko tiń gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar akoakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do akogeko dạyikokʼa.” 
Leviticus21:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do naekeko, metakʼme Aronren hoponko galmarao akome, onkoren peṛako modre jãhãegeye gocʼlenre ona iạte naeke do acʼ apnartetʼ aloe besaphakʼma." 
Leviticus21:2 Tobe gogo-baba, hopontetʼ-hoponera, boehattetʼ nonkan sorren hoṛko lạgitʼ do acʼteye besaphakʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus21:3 Ona chaḍa bin baplayicʼ okoe misera do gharońjre menae uni lạgitʼ hõe besapha daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus21:4 Gomke hoṛ huyạte acʼ jạtrenko talare aloe besaphakʼma jemon onate aloe besonotokʼ. 
Leviticus21:5 “Naekekoakʼ bohokʼ hoyo poṭorokʼ, goco getʼ se hoṛmo reakʼ jãhã jaegare alo jemonko getʼ ghaotako." 
Leviticus21:6 Ar onako onkaete akoren Isorakʼ ńutum jemon aloko besonot. Onko do Isor ńutumte begar akanko tahena. Naeke do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅakʼko samaṅa ar Probhu Isor lạgitʼ begar akanko tahena. Ar noa samaṅokʼakʼ jinisge akoren Isor ńutumte samaṅakʼ jomakʼ mente hoyokʼtakoa. 
Leviticus21:7 Kusumbiko, loṭghoṭi maejiu, se jãwãe ṭhen khone bạgi ocoakan maejiu baplako hõ baṅ ganokʼtakoa. Ente onko do Isor ńutumteko begar doho ocoakana." 
Leviticus21:8 E Israelko, naekeko Isor ńutumte begar doho akan hoṛ mente bujhạukope, ente onko do aperen Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼko kạmikana. Onate begar akan hoṛ menkate hudiskope, ente iń Probhu Isor doń sonotgea ar iń lạgitʼge ape doń begar dohoakatʼpea." 
Leviticus21:9 Jãhãe naekeren hoponera loṭghuṭi iạteye ńurlen khan enḍekhan uni do acʼ apattetʼe besonot ocoyedekana. Ar uni kuṛi do seṅgelre atar giḍikae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus21:10 “Maraṅ naeke, metakʼme boehako modre okoeyakʼ bohokʼre ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum dul akan ar bahalokʼ reakʼ porob hotete okoeṭakʼ maraṅ naeke do sonot kicricʼ horog reakʼ ạidạriye ńamakatʼ, uni do duk sodor lạgitʼ bohokʼ bae koṭoetaea ar acʼakʼ kicricʼko hõ bae oṛejtaea." 
Leviticus21:11 Mạ̃ṛĩ menakʼ onkan ṭhạ̃ite bae calakʼa. Jãhãe gocʼ hoṛ iạte, se acʼren gogo babakin gujukʼ iạte hõ bae besapha daṛeakʼa ar acʼren Isorakʼ sonot ḍera bạgikate okatehõ bae oḍokokʼa se ona reakʼ sonottetʼ do bae nosṭo ocoya, ente uniren Isor do ojokʼ bahalokʼ sunumteye begar dohoakadea. Ar Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus21:12  
Leviticus21:13 Uni do mitʼṭen ḍạṅgwạ kuṛiye bapla daṛeaea. 
Leviticus21:14 Rạnḍi se jãwãetetʼ ṭhen khone bạgi ocoakan se loṭghoṭi iạte apnare besapha ocoakan nonkan maejiu baplako do baṅ ganokʼtaea. Eken acʼ jạtren ḍạṅgwạ kuṛigeye bapla daṛeakoa," 
Leviticus21:15 jemon goṭa bõsrenko talare acʼren hoponko aloe besonot ocoko. Ente iń Probhu Isorge naekekoń begar dohoakatʼkoa.” 
Leviticus21:16 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus21:17 “Am do Aron metaeme, hoṛmore dos menakʼ nonkan okoehõ Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ pinḍ ṭhen alo jemonko calakʼ." 
Leviticus21:18 Kãṛã hoṛ, leḍha hoṛ, cepṛe mũ hoṛ, hoṛmo reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ hĩsge hara bạ̃ṛti akantae hoṛ, ṭhunṭa hoṛ, kubdhạ hoṛ, bãoṛã hoṛ, mẽtʼ bạṛicʼ hoṛ, ghao menakʼtae hoṛ, ekasirạ hoṛ, metakʼme hoṛmore dos menakʼtae nonkan jãhãe hoṛge pinḍ ṭhen do bae sor daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus21:19  
Leviticus21:20  
Leviticus21:21 Hoṛmore dos menakʼtae nonkan Aron bõsren jãhãege pinḍ ṭhen senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre jãhãnakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ bae samaṅ daṛeakʼa. Ar dos menakʼtaete pinḍ ṭhen senkate Isor ńutumte jãhãn jomakʼ hõ bae samaṅ daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus21:22 Isor ńutumte samaṅakʼ jomakʼ modre sonotakʼ ar sonot utạrakʼ joto jomakʼge uni doe jom daṛeakʼa," 
Leviticus21:23 menkhan uniyakʼ hoṛmore dos menakʼtaete sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ orwal ṭhen se pinḍ samaṅre senkate ińakʼ ṭhạ̃iko reakʼ sonottetʼ do bae nosṭo daṛeakʼa. Iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do, ińge naekekoń begar dohoakatʼkoa.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Mose do senkate noako katha Aron ar uniren hoponko ar sanam Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Leviticus22:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose galmaraoadeteye metadea," 
Leviticus22:2 “Am do Aron ar uniren hoponkom metakoa, iń ńutumte Israelkoakʼ samaṅakʼ sonot jinis khon jemon sahaṛ akanko tahen. Ar ińakʼ ńutum jemon aloko besonot. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Leviticus22:3 Am do onkom metakoa piṛhike piṛhi onkoren bõsko talare jãhãege besapha akane tahen ar Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅ akatʼ jãhãn sonotakʼ jinis ṭhene hijukʼ enḍekhan uni do iń samaṅ khone marao giḍi ocokʼa. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus22:4 Hoṛmo reakʼ harta ruạ se besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼ oktere Aron bõsren jãhãege ạuriko saphakʼ hạbicʼ samaṅ akatʼ sonotakʼ jinis do bako jom daṛeakʼa. Mạ̃ṛĩre jakʼ akan jãhãn jinisge jãhãeye joṭed se herelakʼ itạ se jãhãn besapha huḍiń jiwiyanko se bhõnḍ akan hoṛe joṭede-metakʼme onko hotete hoṛko besaphakʼ, enḍekhan uni do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Ar ạuriye ḍạbrạ saphakʼ hạbicʼ samaṅakʼ jãhãn sonotakʼ jinis do bae jom daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus22:5  
Leviticus22:6  
Leviticus22:7 Menkhan cando hạsur tayom doe jom daṛeakʼa, ente ona do uniyakʼ jomakʼ kana." 
Leviticus22:8 Uni do jãhãn gocʼicʼ janwar se bir janware cirạ akade janwarakʼ jel jomkate apnartetʼ bae besapha daṛeakʼa. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus22:9 “Naekeko okań hukum akatʼko ona do manao hoyokʼtakoa. Ar bako manao khan onko do dusiko hoyokʼa ar besapha iạteko gujukʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge onko doń begar dohoakatʼkoa. 
Leviticus22:10 “Naeke gharońjren hoṛko chaḍa ar okoehõ samaṅakʼ sonotakʼ jinis do bako jom daṛeakʼa. Naekeren jãhãe peṛa se kạmiyạko hõ ona do bako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus22:11 Menkhan naekeye kiriń akade guti ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼreye janam akan nonkan jãhãe guti do onae jom daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus22:12 Naekeren hoponera jodi naeke chaḍa eṭakʼ jãhãegeye baplako enḍekhan uni do samaṅakʼ sonot jinis bae jom daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus22:13 Menkhan naekeren jãhãe rạnḍi hoponera se jãwãetetʼe bạgi akade begor gidrạwan kuṛi do apatakʼ oṛakʼre tahen lạgitʼe ruạr hecʼakan khan uni do acʼ apat reakʼ hĩse ńama. Naekeakʼ gharońjrene baṅkan nonkan okoehõ ona do bako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus22:14 Jãhãege hiṛińte samaṅakʼ sonotakʼ jinise jomle khan uni do naeke ṭhen khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar ona jinis reakʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń bạ̃ṛti dam emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus22:15 Naeke do Probhu Isor ńutumte Israelkoakʼ samaṅakʼ sonotakʼ jinis eṭakʼko jemon aloe jom ocoko ar ona reakʼ sonottetʼ hõ jemon aloe nosṭo ocoy ar nonkate onko do khuti purun emokʼ lạgitʼ dusire aloe paṛao ocoko. Iń Probhu Isorge onko doń begar dohoakatʼkoa.” 
Leviticus22:16  
Leviticus22:17 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus22:18 “Am do Aron ar uniren hoponko ar sanam Israelkom metakoa, jãhãe Israel se onko talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãege manotakʼ purạu lạgitʼ se apnarakʼ kusi leka Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼe ạgui," 
Leviticus22:19 enḍekhan uni do mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ ḍaṅgra, bheḍa, se merom boda ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. Ar onkanicʼe baṅkan khan ona samaṅokʼakʼ do baṅ ataṅokʼtaea." 
Leviticus22:20 Dos menakʼtae nonkan jãhãnicʼge jemon aloe ạguiye, ente onate jãhãn bhạlạiy do baṅ hoyokʼtaea." 
Leviticus22:21 Jãhãege manot akatʼakʼ purun lạgitʼ apnar kusite Probhu Isor ṭhen sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅe men khan uni do mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ ḍaṅgra, bheḍa se merom boda ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. Ar uniyakʼ hoṛmore jãhãn dos tahẽlen khan uni do samaṅokʼakʼ menkate baṅ ataṅokʼa." 
Leviticus22:22 Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ menkate okoehõ jemon kãṛãko, jaṅ rạputʼgetako se ghao akan ar ghao khon bele oḍokokʼkan se udri ruạ menakʼtae nonkan janwar do aloko ạgukoma. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate onkan celege jemon pinḍ cetanre alo rakapʼko." 
Leviticus22:23 Menkhan okoe ḍaṅgra se bheḍawakʼ jãhãnakʼ hĩsge bạ̃ṛti hara akantae seye khaṭoge onkan ḍaṅgra se bheḍa apnarakʼ kusi lekae samaṅ daṛeaea, tobe manotakʼ purun lạgitʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mente ona do baṅ ataṅokʼtaea." 
Leviticus22:24 Jãhãe janwarakʼ bele do lin posakʼ se koṭecʼ gejergetae khan se getʼ giḍi akantae khan onkanicʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte alope samaṅea. Ar apeakʼ disạmte senkate hõ ona do alope onkaea. 
Leviticus22:25 Eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ jãhãe hoṛakʼ ti khon nonkan janwar hataokate aperen Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menkate alope samaṅkoa. Onkore dos menakʼte jãhãn bhạlạiyrege bako lagaokʼa.” 
Leviticus22:26 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus22:27 “Janam tayom ḍaṅgra, bheḍa se meron boda hopon acʼren eṅgattetʼ sãote eae din hạbicʼpe tahẽ ocoaea. Ar irạlakʼ din khon do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lekateye ataṅokʼa." 
Leviticus22:28 Gại ar uniren bạchur se bhiḍi ar uniren hopon do mitʼ dinte alope dãṛẽkinạ. 
Leviticus22:29 Probhu Isor ńutumte jãhãn kusiteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅ khan uniye kusiyakʼ leka baṛe hoyokʼtapema. 
Leviticus22:30 Samaṅkede hilokʼge uniyakʼ jel do jom cabaetae hoyokʼtapea; ar dosar hilokʼ setakʼ hạbicʼ do cetʼge alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus22:31 Ape do ińakʼ hukumpe manaoa ar ona lekape calakʼa. Ar ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus22:32 Ińakʼ sonot ńutum do alope besonot ocoya. Ar sonot menkate baṛe manaoińpe. Iń Probhu Isorge ape doń begar dohoakatʼpea. 
Leviticus22:33 Ar aperen Isor hoyokʼ lạgitʼge iń do Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼpea. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.” 
Leviticus23:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Iń Probhu Isorge ape lạgitʼ porobkoń goṭa dohoakada; ar onako do mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼ mentepe lại sodora." 
Leviticus23:2  
Leviticus23:3 Hapta reakʼ turui dinpe kạmiya menkhan eaeyakʼ dinre dope jirạukʼa, metakʼme ona do sonot jarwakʼ din kana. Enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. Jãhãregepe girobasokʼ ona din do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jirạukʼ dinge hoyokʼa.”" 
Leviticus23:4 Probhu Isor okako porobe niṭ dohoakatʼ, metakʼme okako sonot jarwakʼkan ona reakʼ niṭakʼ dinpe lại sodora:" 
Leviticus23:5 Bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ tạrik reakʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcao porob do ehobokʼa. 
Leviticus23:6 Ona cando reakʼ gel mõṛẽ tạrik do Probhu Isor ńutumte bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porob ehobokʼa. Ar ape do eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ jojom hoyokʼtapea. 
Leviticus23:7 Noa eae din reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ do sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Leviticus23:8 Inạ eae din reakʼ dinạm hilokʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ar eae mãhã hilokʼ do sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Leviticus23:9 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko arhõ galmaraoakoe metadea, “Iń okaṭakʼ disạmiń emape lạgitʼdokʼ kan onḍe senkate tinạkʼ dhao phosolpe rakab unạkʼ dhao pạhil getʼakʼ phosol reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ạṭi do naeke ṭhenpe idiya." 
Leviticus23:10  
Leviticus23:11 Ar naeke do ona ạṭi Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa. Ar onate Probhu Isor do ape cetanreye kusikʼa. Naeke do jirạukʼ mãhã dosar hilokʼ hõ ona do dolao hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus23:12 Naeke oka hilokʼ ona ạṭiye dolaoa enhilokʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ bheḍa hopon samaṅe hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus23:13 Ona sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate sunum mesalakatʼ pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ hõ samaṅ hoyokʼtaea. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan. Ar inạ sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekate mitʼ liṭar darkha rasa hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus23:14 Aperen Isor ṭhen noa samaṅokʼakʼ ạuripe em hạbicʼ noa nãwã anaj reakʼ khon ape do bape jom daṛeakʼa. Ona chaḍa ona khon benaoakʼ jãhãn piṭhạ se seṅgelre rapakʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼa. Ar jãhãregepe girobasokʼ piṛhike piṛhi ape lạgitʼ noa do mitʼṭecʼ niạmge tahẽyena. 
Leviticus23:15 “Jirạukʼ mãhã dosar hilokʼ, metakʼme oka hilokʼ dolao samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ phosol reakʼ ạṭipe ạgui, enhilokʼ khon eae haptape lekhaea." 
Leviticus23:16 Ar niạ eae hapta reakʼ jirạukʼ mãhã reakʼ dosar hilokʼ, metakʼme dolao samaṅokʼakʼ tayom mõṛẽgelakʼ din do Probhu Isor ńutumte nãwã guhum reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobpe porobokʼa." 
Leviticus23:17 Probhu Isor ńutumte dolao samaṅokʼakʼ lekate oṛakʼ khon pạhil rakapʼakʼ phosol khon thoṛape ạguiya. Ar ona dolao samaṅokʼakʼ jinis do pe keji tala holoṅte khạmiyanakʼ barea piṭhạ benao hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus23:18 Noa piṭhạ sãote eae goṭecʼ mitʼ bochorren niphuṭ utạrko bheḍa hopon, mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar barea bheḍa ạgukin hoyokʼa. Ar noko janwarkote Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa, ar ona sãote din hilokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõpe samaṅa. Noako do jotoge seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, one ona reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼkan." 
Leviticus23:19 Ona tayom ape do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor umerren barea bheḍa hoponpe samaṅkinạ. 
Leviticus23:20 Naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre unkin barea bheḍa hopon ar pạhilre rakapʼakʼ phosol khon benaoakʼ ona piṭhại dolaoa. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅakʼ sonot jinis kana okaṭakʼ do naekeakʼ bakhra kan. 
Leviticus23:21 Enhilokʼ ape do mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya. Enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. Ar jãhãregepe girobasokʼ noa niạm do piṛhike piṛhi ape lạgitʼ tahẽyena. 
Leviticus23:22 “Apeakʼ jumi reakʼ phosolpe ir jokhecʼ aṛe reakʼ phosol do alope ira ar ńur akan gele hõ alope halaṅa. Onako do reṅgecʼ-orecʼko ar disạmreko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼ bạgi oṭowakʼ hoyokʼtapea. Ar ińkangeạń Probhu aperen Isor do.” 
Leviticus23:23 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Bochor reakʼ eae cando reakʼ pạhil din do apeakʼ jirạukʼ din mentepe manaoa. Ona do sakwa oroṅ salakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dikʼsạ din lekatepe lại sodora ar mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya." 
Leviticus23:24  
Leviticus23:25 Enhilokʼ do cetʼ hõ alope kạmiya. Enhilokʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa.” 
Leviticus23:26 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Leviticus23:27 “Niạ eae cando reakʼ gelakʼ din do kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼ din kana. Ona din do apeakʼ mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar apnarakʼ jiwipe nindhạntapea. Ar apeakʼ ona din do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Leviticus23:28 Enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya, ente enhilokʼ do kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼ din kana." 
Leviticus23:29 Enhilokʼ okoe acʼakʼ jiwi bae nindhạntae uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone marao ocokʼa. 
Leviticus23:30 Enhilokʼ jãhãe jãhãnakʼe kạmi enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ jạtrenko khoniń marao utạrea. 
Leviticus23:31 Enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. Ar jãhãregepe girobasokʼ piṛhike piṛhi noa niạmge tahẽyena. 
Leviticus23:32 Enhilokʼ do ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jirạukʼ din. Enhilokʼ do jiwipe nindhạntapea. Ona cando reakʼ areakʼ din ạyupʼ khon dosar hilokʼ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ ape do noa jirạukʼ dinpe manaoa.” 
Leviticus23:33 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Eae cando reakʼ gel mõṛẽakʼ dinre Probhu Isor ńutumte chạuni porob ehobokʼa, ar ona porob do eae din hạbicʼ calakʼa." 
Leviticus23:34  
Leviticus23:35 Niạ eae din reakʼ pạhil din do apeakʼ sonot jarwakʼ hoyokʼtapema. Ar enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Leviticus23:36 Ar inạ eae din reakʼ dinạm hilokʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ hoyokʼtapea. Ona tayom irạlakʼ din do sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Noa mucạtʼ din do porob reakʼ maraṅ jarwakʼ hoyokʼtapea; enhilokʼ do cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Leviticus23:37 “Noa porobko do jotoge Probhu Isore ṭhik dohoakada. Jemon niạ oktere seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅ daṛeakʼ ar onate apeakʼ sonot jarwakʼ do hoyokʼtapea. Ar cetʼkope samaṅa onako do hoyokʼkana jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, janwar samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ." 
Leviticus23:38 Okaṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko do lahareń lại akatʼpe onako modre noako samaṅokʼakʼ do baṅ sabokʼa. Onako do hoyokʼkana, Probhu Isorakʼ jirạuk’ mãhã reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, Probhu Isor emae sanamakʼ dan, manot akatʼakʼ ar apnarakʼ kusiteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko." 
Leviticus23:39 “Eae cando reakʼ gel mõṛẽakʼ dinre jumi khon phosol rakapʼkate Probhu Isor ńutumte eae din hạbicʼ noa chạuni porobpe porobokʼa. Ar niạ eae din reakʼ pạhil din ar irạlakʼ din do apeakʼ jirạukʼ din hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus23:40 Pạhilakʼ dinre ape lạgitʼ dare reakʼ joto khon bhageakʼ jo, khijur sakam, suṛukucʼ dareko ar jhạṛpạ dareko reakʼ ḍạrkope ạguiya. Ona tayom eae din ape do aperen Probhu Isor samaṅrepe rạskạ hulạsokʼa." 
Leviticus23:41 Ar jao bochor eae din hạbicʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte apeakʼ noa porobpe porobokʼa. Piṛhike piṛhi noa do ape lạgitʼ niạm lekate tahẽyena. Ar noa porob do eaeyakʼ candorepe porobokʼa. 
Leviticus23:42 Eae din hạbicʼ ape do ḍera oṛakʼrepe tahena. Israel bõsren okoeko janam akan onko sanamkoge niạ jokhecʼ do ḍera oṛakʼre tahen hoyokʼtakoa. 
Leviticus23:43 Onate aperen bõsko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń do Israelko Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguketʼkote ḍera oṛakʼreń girobas ocoketʼkoa. Ar iń Probhuge aperen Isor do.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Inạ tayom Mose do senkate Probhu Isore ṭhik dohoakatʼ sanam porob reakʼ katha Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Leviticus24:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus24:2 “Am do Israelkom hukumakoa jemon jạitun reakʼ khạṭi sunum am ṭhenko ạguiyte diuheko jaoge jemon jol akaege tahen. 
Leviticus24:3 Ńapamokʼ tạmbure goha sinduk reakʼ orwal bahrere Aron do ạyupʼ khon setakʼ hạbicʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre diuheko jaogeye sajao dohoya. Ar noa niạm do piṛhike piṛhi tahena. 
Leviticus24:4 Uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoakan khạṭi sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ diuheko jaogeye ńeljuta. 
Leviticus24:5 “Am do mĩhĩ holoṅ hataokate gelbar goṭecʼ piṭhạm rapaga. Ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ piṭhạ lạgitʼ do pe keji turui sae gram holoṅem hataoa. 
Leviticus24:6 Ar Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoakan khạṭi sona reakʼ ṭebilre ona piṭhạ do turui goṭecʼkate bar sạrtem sajao dohokakʼa. 
Leviticus24:7 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ piṭhạ sạrre khạṭi kunduru hõm dohoya. Ar piṭhạ bodolte noage Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼem samaṅa. 
Leviticus24:8 Jirạukʼ mãhã pichạ noa piṭhạ do Israelko secʼ khon Probhu Isor samaṅre sajaokatem dohokakʼa. Onkoakʼ niạ piṭhạ dohokakʼ niạm do piṛhike piṛhi tahena. 
Leviticus24:9 Noa piṭhạ do Aron ar uniren hoponko sonot tạmbu reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire jojom hoyokʼtakoa, ente Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko modre noa do mitʼṭecʼ sonot utạrakʼ jinis kana. Ar noa do onkoakʼ jao okte reakʼ bakhra kana.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Israelko modren mitʼ hoṛren eṅgattetʼ do Israel ar appattetʼ do Misri hoṛe tahekana. Ar ḍera talare uni hoṛ do mitʼṭen Israel hoṛ sãote lạṛhạiye ehopʼena. 
Leviticus24:11 Unre uni Israel maejiuren hopon do Probhu Isorakʼ ńutume nindạukeda are sarapada. Onate hoṛko do Mose ṭhen uniko idikedea. Uni koṛaren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Salomot tahẽkana. Uni do Dan bõsren Dibriren hoponerae tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isor acʼakʼ monsubạ onkore ạuriye pusṭạuako hạbicʼ uni do hajotreko dohokadea. 
Leviticus24:12  
Leviticus24:13 Noate Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Leviticus24:14 “Sarapicʼ uni hoṛ do ḍera bahrete idiyepe. Ar okoe ona sarap emokʼko ańjomakade onko joto hoṛ do uniyakʼ bohokʼ cetanre tiko dohoytakoma, ar ona tayom Israelko do dhirite uniko tiń gojema." 
Leviticus24:15 Ar Israelkom baḍae ocokoa jãhãege acʼren Isore sarapae enḍekhan uni do noa lạgitʼe dạyi ocokʼa. 
Leviticus24:16 Bạṛicʼ monsubạte okoe Probhu Isorakʼ ńutume ńum uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar Israelko do dhirite uniko tiń gojea. Israelkoge cetʼ ar onko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛkoge baṅ cetʼ, jãhãege bạṛicʼ monsubạte Probhu Isorakʼ ńutumko ńum uni do gojetege hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus24:17 “Ar jãhãege jãhãeye khũne enḍekhan uni hõ goje hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus24:18 Jãhãege eṭakʼ hoṛren ḍaṅgrae goje enḍekhan uni do mitʼṭen jiwi bodolte ar mitʼṭen jiwi emkate khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus24:19 Jãhãege jãhãeye hạne ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ khuti hoyokʼtae enḍekhan uni okae ceka akatʼ unire hõ onkae hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus24:20 Jaṅ rạputʼ bodolte jaṅ, mẽtʼ bodolte mẽtʼ, ḍaṭa bodolte ḍaṭa. Uni eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ okae khuti akatʼtae acʼakʼ hõ onage khutitae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus24:21 Janware gocʼle khan uni do khuti purun emokʼ hoyokʼtaea, menkhan manwae gocʼle khan uni hõe gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Leviticus24:22 Israelko ar onko talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtrenko, jotoko cetanre inạ mitʼ niạmge tahẽyena. Ar ińkangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Mose do Israelko noa reakʼ sanam kathakoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Ar okoe hoṛ sarape emlen uni do ḍera bahrete idikate dhiriteko tiń gocʼkedea. Ar Probhu Isor do Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko doko kạmikeda. 
Leviticus25:1 Probhu Isor do Sinại burure Mose galmaraoadeteye metadea, “Israel hoponkom metakoa, okaṭakʼ disạmiń emako lạgidokʼkan ona disạmteko bololen khan onḍenakʼ jumiko hõ jemon Probhu Isor ńutumte jirạue ńam." 
Leviticus25:2  
Leviticus25:3 Ape do turui bochor jumire itạpe era ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩpe kamana ar phosolpe ira. 
Leviticus25:4 Menkhan eae bochorre do jumikope jirạu ocowakʼa. Noa jirạukʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumtege hoyokʼa. Unre jumire jãhãn itạ alope era ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩ hõ alope kamana. 
Leviticus25:5 Ar jumire acʼte okako janamokʼ ona do alope ira ar alope samṭaoa se bin kamanakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ reakʼ jo hõ alope goda. Jumi do mitʼ bochorpe jirạu ocowakʼa. 
Leviticus25:6 Jirạukʼ bochorre jumire acʼte oka janamokʼ onage apeko lạgitʼ, guti kạ̃ṛmĩko lạgitʼ, ape talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren kạmiyạko lạgitʼ, eṭakʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ," 
Leviticus25:7 ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ar disạm talaren bir janwarko lạgitʼ jomakʼ hoyokʼa. Unre jumire oka hoyokʼ onagepe joma. 
Leviticus25:8 “Eae jirạukʼ bochorre, metakʼme eae jirạukʼ bochorpe lekhaya. Ar ona eae jirạukʼ bochor paromlen khan pongel are bochor hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus25:9 Ar ona dosar bochor reakʼ eae cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre, metakʼme kại reakʼ puruchun dinre apeakʼ disạmre sanam jaegare sakwape oroṅa." 
Leviticus25:10 Noa mõṛẽ gelakʼ bochor do Probhu Isor ńutumtepe begar dohoya ar disạmren sanam hoṛko ṭhen chaḍaokʼ reakʼpe lại sodora. Ape lạgitʼ niạ do ‘hulạsokʼ bochor hoyokʼa.’ Niạ bochorre ape mimitʼko do apan ạpin bõsrenko ar apan ạpin gharońjrenko reakʼ sompottirepe ruạṛ calakʼa. 
Leviticus25:11 Mimitʼ mõṛẽgelakʼ bochor reakʼ mucạtʼ bochor do ape lạgitʼ hulạsokʼ bochor hoyokʼa. Ona bochorre ape do itạ alope era ar acʼte janamokʼ jumi reakʼ hõ alope ira se bin kamanakʼ darkha jõ hõ alope goda. 
Leviticus25:12 Noa do hulạsokʼ bochor hoyokʼtapea ar ona do sonot mentepe manaoa. Ar jumi khon oka ńamokʼ onagepe joma. 
Leviticus25:13 “Hulạsokʼ bochorre ape mimitʼko apan ạpin gharońj reakʼ sompottire ruạṛ senokʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Leviticus25:14 Ape talare jumi kiriń-ạkhriń jokhecʼ okoe cetanre hõ alope behoka. 
Leviticus25:15 Okoe jumiye kiriń uni do hulạsokʼ bochor tayom tinạkʼ bochor hoyakan ona hisạbkate ona jumiye kirińa ar okoe ona jumiye ạkhriń uni hõ hisạbkateye ńela darakan hulạsokʼ bochor ạuri hijukʼte jumire tinạkʼ dhao phosol rakabokʼa mente. 
Leviticus25:16 Ar ḍher bochorge phosol rakabokʼ khan jumi reakʼ dam do bạ̃ṛti ńokʼ sab hoyokʼa menkhan kom dhao phosol rakabokʼ leka khan dam komao hoyokʼa, ente jumi khon tinạkʼ dhao phosol rakabokʼ ona reakʼ lekha lekatege ạkhrińokʼkana." 
Leviticus25:17 Okoe cetanre hõ alope behoka. Ar sanamkoge aperen Isor botoraepe, ente iń Probhuge aperen Isor do." 
Leviticus25:18 “Ińakʼ niạm manaope ar ińakʼ ạn-ạriko senakʼpe; onate disạmre khạtirjomape girobasokʼa. 
Leviticus25:19 Unre ape do jumi khon purạ phosolpe ńama ar lacʼ bikʼpe jomte khạtirjomape tahena. 
Leviticus25:20 Arpe menkhan, ‘eae bochor bale er ar phosol hõ bale ir enḍekhan cetʼle joma?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Enḍekhan turuiyakʼ bochorre iń do nonkań bhorapea jemon pe bochor hạbicʼ phosol calakʼtape. 
Leviticus25:22 Onate irạlakʼ bochor itạ erokʼ jokhecʼ hõ mareakʼ phosol khonpe joma ar areyakʼ bochor phosol ạuripe rakab hạbicʼ onepe doho jarwa akatʼ phosol khonakʼpe joma. 
Leviticus25:23 “Jaejug lạgitʼ okoeyakʼ jumi hõ baṅ ạkhrińokʼa, ente joto jumi do ińakʼ kana ar iń samaṅre ape do porjạtrenko lekape girobasokʼa." 
Leviticus25:24 Ape mimitʼkoakʼ kiriń akatʼ jumi jemon arhõpe chaḍao ruạṛ daṛeakʼ ona reakʼ bebostape dohokakʼa. 
Leviticus25:25 Aperen jãhãe Israel boeha reṅgecʼ iạte acʼakʼ gharońj reakʼ jumi khon thoṛa hĩse ạkhriń enḍekhan uniren joto khon sorren peṛa hecʼkate ona jumiye chaḍaokataema. 
Leviticus25:26 Ar uniren chaḍao lạgitʼ celege bako tahentae enḍekhan apnarge kulạu juṛạukate onae chaḍaotaea," 
Leviticus25:27 tobe oneye ạkhrińletʼ ona tayom bochor khone lekhaea ar sarecʼ bochorko reakʼ ṭakate oka jumiye kirińletʼ ona ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar inạ tayom do acʼakʼ jumireye sen ruạṛ daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus25:28 Menkhan ṭaka ruạṛkakʼ leka daṛe baṅ tahentae enḍekhan oka jumiye ạkhriń akatʼ ona do hulạsokʼ bochor hạbicʼ okoeye kiriń akatʼ uniyakʼ tirege tahena. Ar hulạsokʼ bochor ona jumi do ruạṛkatae hoyokʼa ar unre uni do apnarakʼ jumireye pheḍ daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus25:29 “Pạcrite esetʼ jãhãn nagraha reakʼ jãhãn oṛakʼ jãhãeye ạkhriń enḍekhan ạkhriń tayom mitʼ bochor hạbicʼ chaḍao ruạṛ reakʼ ạidạri tahentaea. Ar inạko dinre uni doe chaḍao daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus25:30 Menkhan mitʼ bochor bhitrire ona bae chaḍao daṛeakʼ enḍekhan okoe onae kiriń akatʼ uni ar uniren bõskoakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar hulạsokʼ bochorre hõ ona do ruạṛkakʼ baṅ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus25:31 Menkhan okako ato pạcrite esetʼ bạnukʼ onḍenakʼ oṛakʼko do disạm reakʼ ot baṛge lekage bujhạu hoyokʼa. Ona dope chaḍao daṛeakʼa ar hulạsokʼ bochorre ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus25:32 Sompotti lekate Liwiko do ato, nagraha ar onako reakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko do jao okteko chaḍao daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus25:33 Liwikoko ạkhriń akatʼ sompotti, metakʼme Liwikoakʼ ato ar nagrahare onkoakʼ ạkhriń akatʼ oṛakʼ duạr jãhãe Liwi hoṛ chaḍao joṅe men khan hulạsokʼ bochorre uni do onae chaḍao daṛeakʼa, ente Israelko modre Liwikoakʼ ato ar nagraha reakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr do onkoakʼ sompotti kana." 
Leviticus25:34 Menkhan onkoakʼ ato ar nagraha reakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do bako ạkhriń daṛeakʼa; ona do onkoakʼ jaejug reakʼ sompotti kana. 
Leviticus25:35 “Aperen jãhãe Israel boeha reṅgecʼ iạte acʼakʼ jom ńũ reakʼ bae bebosta daṛeakʼ, enḍekhan uni do ape talarege jemone girobas daṛeakʼ ona lạgitʼ porjạtrenko cetʼlekape goṛowako onkage uni hõpe goṛowaea." 
Leviticus25:36 Uni ṭhen khon jãhãn sud alope hataoa, bickom uni hoṛ jemon ape talareye tahẽdaṛeakʼ ona lạgitʼ aperen Isor botoraepe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ṭaka pańcate emkate sud hatao do baṅ ganokʼa ar uni ṭhen jãhãn jomakʼ jinis ạkhriń lekhan jãhãn lab hatao ho baṅ ganokʼa. 
Leviticus25:38 Ińge Probhu aperen Isor do. Ińge Kanan disạm emape lạgitʼ ar aperen Isor hoyokʼ lạgitʼ Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼpea. 
Leviticus25:39 “Aperen jãhãe Israel boeha reṅgecʼ khạtirte apnartetʼe ạkhrińokʼ enḍekhan uni do golam lekate alope khaṭaoea. 
Leviticus25:40 Eṭakʼ jạtren kạmiyạko sãote metakʼme, eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko sãote cetʼlekape beohar uni sãote hõ onkage beoharpe. Onate uni do hulạsokʼ bochor hạbicʼe kạmiya." 
Leviticus25:41 Ar ona tayom do uni ar uniren hoponko aṛakʼako hoyokʼa. Uni do unre acʼ bõsren ar hapṛamkoakʼ jumiteye ruạṛ senokʼa. 
Leviticus25:42 Israel do ińren golam kanako; ińge Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa; onate onko do ar tishõ golam lekate bako ạkhrińokʼa. 
Leviticus25:43 Okoe cetanre hõ alope jor juluma; ape do aperen Isor botoraepe. 
Leviticus25:44 “Ape aḍepasere okoe jạtrenkoko tahenkan onko mod khon ape do guti kạ̃ṛmĩkope kiriń daṛeakoa. 
Leviticus25:45 Ar ape talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtrenko khon ar ape bõsren okoe do ape disạmreko janam akan onko khon hõ ape lạgitʼ guti kạ̃ṛmĩpe hatao daṛeakoa. 
Leviticus25:46 Noko guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩko do sompotti reakʼ hĩs lekate aperen gidrạkope em daṛeakoa. Ar golam lekate jaejugpe doho daṛeakoa, menkhan aperen Israelkore do bape jor julum daṛeakʼa." 
Leviticus25:47 “Ape modre jãhãe porjạtren hoṛ kisạ̃ṛe hoylen khan ar aperen jãhãege reṅgecʼ halotre paṛaokate uni ṭhen se acʼren bõsko ṭhene ạkhrińlen khan," 
Leviticus25:48 enḍekhan uni do apnartetʼ chaḍaokʼ reakʼ ạidạri tahentaea. Ar acʼren nijạr boeha do uniye chaḍao daṛeaea. 
Leviticus25:49 Ona chaḍa hoponba se maraṅba se kaka goṅgo boeha se bõsren nonkan jãhãege uni sãote uniyakʼ mãyãm reakʼ ṭan menakʼtae unihõ uniye chaḍao daṛeaea. Ar acʼteye kulạu juṛạu daṛeakʼ khan uni do apnarte hõe chaḍao daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus25:50 Oka bochor uniye ạkhrińokʼ ona bochor khon ehopʼkate hulạsokʼ bochor hạbicʼ tinạkʼ bochor hoyokʼ ona do uniren kisạ̃ṛe hisạba are ńela. Ar inạko bochorre mitʼṭen kạmiyạicʼ oka paona hoyokʼtae ona lekate ona chaḍaokʼ reakʼ dam hõ ṭhik hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus25:51 Ar ruạṛ hijukʼ bochor ḍherge bilomge khan enḍekhan oka damte acʼe ạkhriń akan ona dam reakʼ mitʼ hĩs apnar chaḍaokʼ lạgitʼ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus25:52 Hulạsokʼ bochor reakʼ jodi thoṛa bochor sarecʼ tahen khan ona reakʼ hisạb leka ṭaka emkate acʼ apnarte chaḍaokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus25:53 Bochor hisạbte dohoakade kạmiyạ hoṛ leka uni do ńele hoyokʼa ar uniren kisạ̃ṛ uni cetanreye jor julumeda se baṅ ona hõ ńel hoyokʼtapea. 
Leviticus25:54 Noako reakʼ jãhãn upạite uni bae chaḍao ocoakan khan enḍekhan uni ar uniren hoponko do hulạsokʼ bochorre aṛakʼako hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus25:55 Israelko do ińren golam kanako. Ińge Misor disạm khoniń oḍokʼ ạgu akatʼkoa; onko do ińrenge golam akanko tahena. Ar ińkangeạń Probhu aperen Isor do. 
Leviticus26:1 “Jãhãn debotakoakʼ muṭhạnge alope benao joṅa. Ape lạgitʼ kaṭren jãhãn muṭhạn se jãhãn pujạwakʼ dhirire jãhãn muṭhạn alope benaojoṅa. Ar pujạwako lạgitʼ dhiriren benao jãhãn muṭhạn hõ disạmre alope dohokoa. Iń kangeạń Probhu aperen Isor do. 
Leviticus26:2 Ape do ińakʼ jirạukʼ din ar bochorko manao hoyokʼtapea; ar ińakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ipe manota. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus26:3 “Ińakʼ sanam niạmkope manao ar ińakʼ hukum lekape senokʼ enḍekhan iń do okte nạpitre dakʼ iń kolapea. Onate apeakʼ jumire purạ phosolpe ńama ar dareko hõ jo bahakʼ tapea. 
Leviticus26:4  
Leviticus26:5 Unre apeakʼ guhum enokʼ reakʼ din do darkha jo god hạbicʼ hoyokʼtapea ar darkha jo god do erokʼ din hạbicʼ hoyokʼtapea. Unre ape do lacʼ bikʼpe joma ar disạmre khạtirjomape tahena. 
Leviticus26:6 “Unre iń do disạmre sulukiń emokʼa. Ar suluktepe jạpitʼjoṅa; okoe hõ bako botor ocopea. Iń do disạm khon kaṭaha janwarkoń laga ńirkoa. Cele palṭonge apeakʼ disạmre do bako cahṭao daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus26:7 Aperen bạirikope laga ńirkoa ar onko do ape samaṅreko gujukʼa. 
Leviticus26:8 Ape do eken mõṛẽ hoṛte mitʼsae bạiriko ar mitʼsae hoṛte gel hajar bạiripe laga ńirkoa, ar bạiriko do ape samaṅreko gujukʼa." 
Leviticus26:9 Unre iń do daya mẽtʼteń ńelpea ar apeń bạḍ ocopea ariń saṅge ocopea, ar ape sãote ińakʼ bondobosiń bandhaoa." 
Leviticus26:10 Nãwã anaj dohoy lạgitʼ murạikoko khạliy jokhecʼ hõ laha bochor reakʼ anaj khonge apeakʼ jomakʼ do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus26:11 Iń do bạń dea giḍikapea. Ape talaregeń girobasokʼa. 
Leviticus26:12 Ape sãotegeń dãṛãna ar aperen Isoriń hoyokʼa ar ape do ińren hoṛpe hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus26:13 Ińge Probhu aperen Isor do. Misor disạm khon ińgeń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea jemon Misri hoṛkoren golamko ar alope tahen. Apeakʼ taren reakʼ ãṛãṛ rạputʼkate ińge apeakʼ bohokʼ iń sojhetapea. 
Leviticus26:14 “Menkhan ińakʼ katha bape ańjom ar noako hukum reakʼ bape manao," 
Leviticus26:15 ar ińakʼ niạmko bape hetawakʼ ar ińakʼ ạn-ạrikope nindạu ar ińakʼ hukumko bape senakʼte ińakʼ bondobospe rạpud," 
Leviticus26:16 enḍekhan ape cetanre noakoń ạguya, iń do ackage apeakʼ hoṛmore khoy rogko, mẽtʼ bolokʼ rog ar jiwi loraokʼ rogkoń ạguiya. Ar ape do noako rog iạte bape ńeńela ar hoṛmo reakʼ daṛeko ńur cabakʼtapea. Unre itạpe erlere hõ jãhãn lab do baṅ hoyokʼtapea, ente apeakʼ phosol do bạirikoko joma." 
Leviticus26:17 Iń do mẽtʼ ar mẽtʼteń ńelpea ar bạiriko ṭhenpe bhagao ocokʼa. Ar hirkhạwape hoṛge apeko ḍanṭaopea ar celege bako khudạupere hõ ape dope ńir baṛaea. 
Leviticus26:18 “Ar noa tayom hõ ińakʼ katha bape ańjom enḍekhan apeakʼ kại reakʼ eae doboṛiń sạjạipea. 
Leviticus26:19 Iń do apeakʼ daṛe reakʼ bạḍạigeń rạputʼ giḍitapea. Ar apeakʼ bohokʼ cetan reakʼ rimil do mẽṛhẽtʼ leka ar jaṅga latar reakʼ ot do pitạl lekań keṭecʼ ocoya. 
Leviticus26:20 Unre ape do ạuṛiyakʼpe khaṭao gujukʼa. Unre apeakʼ jumikore jãhãn phosolge baṅ hoyokʼa, ar darekore hõ baṅ jokʼa." 
Leviticus26:21 “Apeakʼ monre bạiri lekape hudisiń ar ińakʼ katha bape luturakʼ enḍekhan apeakʼ kại reakʼ sạjại do eae doboṛiń ḍhertapea. 
Leviticus26:22 Ape talare jojom kaṭaha janwarkoń kolkoa. Onko do aperen gidrạkoko jomkoa, ar aperen mĩhũ-meromkoko maraokoa ar aperen hoṛko komaokʼtapea. Onate apeakʼ horko do khạlige tahena." 
Leviticus26:23 “Niạko ghoṭna tayom hõ ińakʼ ḍanṭao bape manao ar iń birudrepe taṛam," 
Leviticus26:24 enḍekhan iń apnarge bạiriko secʼte apeakʼ kại reakʼ eae doboṛ sạjạyiń emapea. 
Leviticus26:25 Ińakʼ bondobospe rạputʼ akatʼte ape cetanre lạṛhạikoń ạguiya. Unre bạiriko ńelte nagrahatepe bolokʼre iń do mahamạriń kola, ar onate bạirikoakʼ tirepe paṛaokʼa." 
Leviticus26:26 Iń do apere akaliń kola. Unre gel goṭen maejiu do mitʼṭecʼ culhạre piṭhạko rapakʼapea, ar jojom jokhecʼ piṭhạ do soṅkatepe emokʼa. Ar lacʼ bikʼ do bape jom ńama." 
Leviticus26:27 “Niạko tayom hõ ińakʼ kathako bape luturakʼ ar iń birudpe senokʼ," 
Leviticus26:28 enḍekhan raṅgaote ape upạrteń colona ar apeakʼ kại reakʼ eae doboṛiń sạjạipea. 
Leviticus26:29 Unre reṅgecʼte aperen gidrạkoakʼ jelpe joma.
