Leviticus26:30 Iń do apeakʼ pujạ reakʼ than boṭkocʼkoń marao giḍikatapea, dhup reakʼ pinḍkoń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa ar aperen bin jiwiyan debotako cetanre apeakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkoń ṭhikikakʼa, ar edre mẽtʼteń ńelpea." 
Leviticus26:31 Iń do apeakʼ atoko, nagrahako ar dewa-sewa oṛakʼkoń marao giḍikatapea. Ar apeakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko bạń ataṅtapea." 
Leviticus26:32 Apeakʼ disạm do nonkań jarkhara ona ńelte aperen bạiriko hõ botorteko keklesedokʼa. 
Leviticus26:33 Ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareń chirchạturpea ar tarwaṛeteń khudạu baṛapea. Apeakʼ disạm reakʼ sanam jumiko, atoko ar nagrahako do jarkharokʼtapea." 
Leviticus26:34 “Tinre aperen bạirikoakʼ disạmrepe tahena unre jarkhar akan apeakʼ disạm do jirạukʼ bochor reakʼ suke joma. Hẽ unre apeakʼ disạm do jirạue ńama ar acʼakʼ jirạukʼ bochor reakʼ suke joma. 
Leviticus26:35 Apnarakʼ disạmrepe girobasokʼ jokhecʼ apeakʼ jumiko jirạukʼ reakʼ bochor bae ńamleda menkhan tinre ujạṛ akan tahena unre jumiko do jirạue ńama. 
Leviticus26:36 Aperen okoe do bạirikoakʼ disạmre jiwetʼko tahen onkoakʼ ontorre nonkan botor iń caṛhao ocoya, onko do hoete sakam reakʼ saḍeko ańjomlere hõ botorteko ńir pharakokʼa. Lạṛhại botorte cetʼleka manwako ńir pharakokʼ onkage onko hõko ńirjoṅa. Ar bako lagalekore hõ onko doko ńir pharakokʼa arko tohotʼ bhindạṛokʼa." 
Leviticus26:37 Bako laga ocokʼre hõ lạṛhại khon bańcaokʼ lạgitʼ ńir pharakokʼ hoṛ leka am iń lad ludko bhindạṛokʼa. Ar ape do bạiriko samaṅre bape teṅgo daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus26:38 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare chirchạturkatepe gujukʼa, ar apeakʼ disạm do bạirikoko utʼgotʼkakʼa." 
Leviticus26:39 Ona tayom aperen okoe onḍeko tahen onko do akoren ar hapṛamkoakʼ dos iạteko caba idikʼa. 
Leviticus26:40 “Ińre bepạtiạu ar iń birudre teṅgokʼ iạte iń hõ onko upạrteń teṅgona ar bạirikoakʼ disạmteń idikoa. Menkhan onḍe ako ar akoren hapṛamkoakʼ dosko aṅgocte ontorko nidhạntakoa ar dos akatʼ iạte sạjại reakʼko ataṅ," 
Leviticus26:41  
Leviticus26:42 enḍekhan iń do Isahak, Jakob ar Abraham sãote ińakʼ bondobos reakʼ katha ar onkoakʼ disạm reakʼ kathań disạya." 
Leviticus26:43 Ar jarkhar iạte akoakʼ disạmko bạgiyakʼ tayom onkoakʼ disạm do jirạukʼ bochor reakʼ suke joma. Onko do ińakʼ bicạrko nihạ̃t akatʼte ar ińakʼ ạn-ạriko hirkhạ akatʼte sạjạiko ńamgea. 
Leviticus26:44 Enhõ bạirikoakʼ disạmre tahen jokhecʼ bạń dea giḍi utạrkoa se bạń hirkhạ sạṅgiń utạrkoa jemon aloko marao utạrokʼ ar onko sãote ińakʼ bondobos hõ alo cabakʼ. Iń kangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do. 
Leviticus26:45 Onko lạgitʼge onkoren hapṛamko sãote ińakʼ bondobos reakʼ kathań disạya. Ente onkoren hapṛamkoren Isoriń hoyokʼ iạte eṭakʼ jạtrenko talate Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼkoa. Ar iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.” 
Leviticus26:46 Noa do onako ạn-ạri ar hukum ar niạmko kana okaṭakʼ do sinại burure Mose hotete Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ bondobos menkate Israelko lạgitʼe bandhaoletʼ tahẽkan. 
Leviticus27:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose galmaraoadeteye metadea, “Israelkom metakoa, jãhãege apnarakʼ bises manot akatʼakʼ purun lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅ, enḍekhan ona samaṅokʼakʼ bodolte okaṭakʼ dam emokʼ hoyokʼ ona do nonka leka: bargel khon turuigel umerren herel hoṛko lạgitʼ do dhorom reakʼ tulạ lekate adha keji rupạ;" 
Leviticus27:2  
Leviticus27:3  
Leviticus27:4 ar ona umerren maejiuko lạgitʼ do pesae gram rupạ; 
Leviticus27:5 mõṛẽ bochor khon bargel umerren koṛa hoponko lạgitʼ do barsae gram rupạ; ar ona umerren kuṛi hoponko lạgitʼ do mitʼsae gram rupạ; 
Leviticus27:6 mitʼ cando khon mõṛẽ bochor umerren koṛa gidrạko lạgitʼ do mõṛẽgel gram rupạ; ar ona umạrren kuṛi gidrạko lạgitʼ do pegel gram rupạ," 
Leviticus27:7 turuigel bochor se ona cetanren herel hoṛko lạgitʼ do mitʼsae tala gram rupạ, ar ona umerren maejiuko lạgitʼ do mitʼsae gram rupạ emokʼ hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus27:8 “Ar manotakʼe samaṅetʼ kạnicʼ doe reṅgecʼ hoṛkan khan ar niṭ akatʼ reakʼ dam emokʼ reakʼ daṛe bạnukʼtae khan uni do naeke ṭhen idiye hoyokʼa. Ar naeke do unre uniyakʼ daṛe leka ona reakʼ dame ṭhikaea. 
Leviticus27:9 “Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jãhãn janware emokʼ reakʼe manot akatʼ khan enḍekhan Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅede janwar do sonot mente bujhạue hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:10 Uni janwar bodolte eṭakʼ janwar do ohoe em daṛelea. Uni do bhage bodolte bạṛicʼicʼ se bạṛicʼicʼ bodolte mońjicʼ emokʼ hõ baṅ ganokʼtaea. Uni do mitʼṭen janwar bodolte eṭakʼ armitʼṭen janware emokʼ enḍekhan banarge sonot mente bujhạukin hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:11 Probhu Isor ṭhen baṅ ataṅokʼicʼ nonkan jãhãn besapha janwar jãhãe manotakʼ lạgitʼe emokʼ enḍekhan uni janwar do naeke ṭhen idiye hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:12 Ar naeke do uni janwar ńelkate uniyakʼ oka dame ṭhik onage uniyakʼ dam do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:13 Ar manote dohoyetʼkạnicʼ jodi uni chaḍaoe menjoṅ enḍekhan uni janwarakʼ dam sãote uni do arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs dam ḍher emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus27:14 “Jãhãe hoṛ Probhu ńutumte sonot menkate acʼakʼ oṛakʼe sonot akatʼ khan naeke do oṛakʼ ńelkate ona reakʼ oka dame ṭhik onage ona reakʼ dam do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:15 Ar acʼakʼ sonot akatʼakʼ oṛakʼ chaḍao ruạṛe men enḍekhan uni do ona oṛakʼ reakʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs dam ḍher emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar ona tayom do arhõ acʼakʼ oṛakʼ hoe ruạṛokʼtaea. 
Leviticus27:16 “Jãhãe hoṛ acʼakʼ gharońj reakʼ sompotti reakʼ mitʼ hĩs Probhu Isor ńutumteye sonot khan enḍekhan ona jumire tinạkʼ itạ rohoeyokʼ ona lekate ona reakʼ dam do sab hoyokʼa. Mimitʼ mitʼsae irạlgel keji jao reakʼ itạ lạgitʼ adha keji rupạ reakʼ dam hõ sab hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:17 Ar hulạsokʼ bochorre acʼakʼ jumi Probhu Isor ńutumteye sonot khan enḍekhan naeke oka dame ṭhikae onage jumi reakʼ dam do hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:18 Menkhan hulạsokʼ bochor tayom acʼakʼ jumiye sonot ocoe khan enḍekhan naeke do hulạsokʼ bochor hisạbte ona reakʼ dame ṭhik dohoya. Onate naeke okaṭakʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ purạ dam khon niạ dam do komaokʼa. 
Leviticus27:19 Jãhãe hoṛ jumi samaṅ tayom arhõe chaḍao ruạṛ khan ona jumi reakʼ ṭhik akatʼ dam sãote uni do arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs dam ḍher emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar ona tayom jumi do uniyakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus27:20 Jumi bae chaḍao ruạṛtae se eṭakʼ jãhãeko ṭhene ạkhriń enḍekhan ona do ar bae chaḍao daṛeakʼa. 
Leviticus27:21 Hulạsokʼ bochorre tinre jumi khalasokʼa unre Probhu Isor ńutumte jarkharokʼ reakʼ sarapakʼ tabere tahen jumi lekage ona do Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotge tahena. Ar ona do unre naekeakʼ sompotti hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:22 Apnarakʼ gharońj reakʼ jumi reaṅ jãhãn hĩs baṅkan nonkan jãhãn kirińakʼ jumi jãhãe Probhu Isor ńutumteye sonot khan," 
Leviticus27:23 enḍekhan naeke do ruạṛ ńam bochor hạbicʼ hisạbkate ona reakʼ dame ṭhik dohoya. Ar enhilokʼge jumi reakʼ dam do Probhu Isor ńutumte sonot jinis lekate emkakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus27:24 Ar ona jumi okoe ṭhen khone kiriń ona do hulạsokʼ bochor arhõ uni ṭhen, metakʼme lahaten jumiren mạlik ṭhen ruạṛokʼa." 
Leviticus27:25 Jotowakʼ dam do sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ Sekel leka hoyokʼa. Ar dhorom reakʼ mitʼ Sekel do gel gram soman ojon kana. 
Leviticus27:26 “Jãhãege mĩhũ-meromren pạhil ạnḍiạ hopon do Probhu Isor ńutumte alope sonotkoa, ente joto mĩhũ-meromren pạhil ạnḍiạ hopon do Probhu Isorren kanako. Baṅ doe ḍaṅgrakan ar baṅ doe bheḍakan jotoge Probhu Isorren kanako." 
Leviticus27:27 Menkhan jãhãn besapha janwarren pạhil hoponkan khane enḍekhan naekeye ṭhik dohoakatʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs dam bạ̃ṛti emkate uniye chaḍao daṛeaea. Ar bae chaḍaoe khan uni do ona ṭhik dohoakatʼ damtege ạkhrińe hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:28 “Jãhãe hoṛ acʼren jãhãnicʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte marao reakʼe sarapae enḍekhan uni do ar bae ạkhriń daṛeaea se bae chaḍao daṛeaea. Baṅ do gharońj reakʼ jumige cetʼ ar manwa se mĩhũ-meromge cetʼ. Nonkanakʼ jãhãnakʼge maraoakʼ reakʼ sarapakʼ tabere sodorokʼ ona jotoge Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotakʼ jinis kana. 
Leviticus27:29 Jãhãe hoṛ Probhu Isor ńutumte sarapakʼ tabereye sodorokʼ enḍekhan uni do baṅ chaḍaoe hoyokʼa, uni do gocʼ giḍikae hoyokʼa." 
Leviticus27:30 “Jumi khon oka ńamokʼ ona reakʼ gel hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do Probhu Isorakʼ kana- ona do jumi reakʼ phosolge cetʼ ar dare reakʼ joge cetʼ. Ona do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohokakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Leviticus27:31 Jãhãege ona gel hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs chaḍaoe menjoṅ enḍekhan ona reakʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs bạ̃ṛti emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Leviticus27:32 Gại ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi meromko mod khon gel hạṭińre mitʼ hạṭiń, metakʼme gupikoakʼ ṭheṅga latarteko parom akan sanam gelko khon mitʼṭen do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar doho akanko kanako." 
Leviticus27:33 Noko gelko modre bhageko se bạṛicʼko ona do baṅ ńel hoyokʼa se mitʼṭen bodolte eṭagicʼ emokʼhõ baṅ ganokʼa. Ar jãhãe hoṛe onkae khan enḍekhan uni gelicʼ ar uni bodolte okoeṭakʼe emokʼ uni hõ Probhu Isor ńutumteye sonot ocokʼa ar uni do bae chaḍao daṛeaea.” 
Leviticus27:34 Probhu Isor do sinại burure Mose hotete noako hukumge Israelko lạgitʼe emlena. 
Numbers1:1 Israelko Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼen tayom dosar bochor reakʼ dosar cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ Probhu Isor do sinại hahaṅkarre ńapamokʼ tạmbure Mose galmaroadeteye metadea," 
Numbers1:2 “Am do gusṭi ar gharońjko lekate Israelko modren okoeko herel hoponakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon ḍher, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhạiko oḍok calao daṛeakʼ onkan mitʼke mitʼ herel hoponakʼ ńutum olkate mimitʼ dol lekate Aron ar am do onko ben lekhakoa." 
Numbers1:3  
Numbers1:4 Onko do mimitʼ gusṭi khon mitʼ hoṛkate amko goṛowama, ar uni hoṛ do onko gusṭiren mathae hoyokʼa." 
Numbers1:5 Okoe amko goṛowam onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Ruben gusṭiren Sedeurren hopon Elisur," 
Numbers1:6 Simeon gusṭiren Surisadaeren hopon Selumiel," 
Numbers1:7 Jihudạ gusṭiren Aminadabren hopon Nahason," 
Numbers1:8 Isakar gusṭiren Juarren hopon Nethanel," 
Numbers1:9 Sebulon gusṭiren Helonren hopon Eliab," 
Numbers1:10 Josephren hoponko modre Ephrayim gusṭikoren Amihudren hopon Elisama ar Manase gusṭiren Pedasurren hopon Gamaliel," 
Numbers1:11 Benjamin gusṭiren Gideonren hopon Abidan," 
Numbers1:12 Dan gusṭiren Amisadaeren hopon Ahieser," 
Numbers1:13 Aser gusṭiren Okranren hopon Pagiel," 
Numbers1:14 Gad gusṭiren Deulren hopon Eliasaph," 
Numbers1:15 Ar Napthali gusṭiren Enanren hopon Ahira.” 
Numbers1:16 Israelko tala khon okoe hoṛko bahal ocoyen onko doko hoyokʼkana onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ gusṭiren mukhiyạko ar Israelkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ khũṭren mathakoge. 
Numbers1:17 Probhu Isor okoekoakʼ ńutume menletʼ Mose ar Aron do onko kin hohowatʼkoa ar inạ bochor reakʼ dosar cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ do sanam Israel hoponko mitʼ ṭhenkin jarwaketʼkoa. Ar Israel hoponko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ ńutum lekate onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ opromko emkeda. Ar unkin do bargel se ona khon ḍher umeran herel hoponkoakʼ ńutumkin ol caṛhaoketʼtakoa. 
Numbers1:18  
Numbers1:19 Sinại hahaṅkarre Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose do hoṛkoe lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers1:20 Israelren maraṅicʼ hopon Ruben bõsrenko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti umer hoyakantako, metakʼme okoeko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍokʼ calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate onkoakʼ ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:21 Ruben gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel turui hajar mõṛẽsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:22 Simeon bõsrenko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate jotokoakʼ ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:23 Simeon gusṭi khon tinạkʼ hoṛko ńamen onkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel are hajar pesae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:24 Gad bõsrenko mod khon okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate sanamkoakʼ ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:25 Gad gusṭi khon tinạkʼ hoṛko ńamen onkoakʼ lekha do pongel mõṛẽ hajar turui sae mõṛẽgel. 
Numbers1:26 Jihudạ bõsrenko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:27 Jihudạ gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do eaegel pon hajar turuisae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:28 Isakar bõsko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:29 Isakar gusṭiko khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel pon hajar ponsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:30 Sebulon bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti hoyakantako, metakʼme okoeko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:31 Sebulon gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel eae hajar ponsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:32 Josephren hoponko talare Ephrayem bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon ḍher, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:33 Ephrayem gusṭiko khon okoeko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel hajar mõṛẽsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:34 Manase bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:35 Manase gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pegel bar hajar barsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:36 Benjạmin bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:37 Benjạmin gusṭiren tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pegel mõṛẽ hajar ponsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:38 Dan bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:39 Dan gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do turuigel bar hajar eae sae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:40 Aser bõsrenko modren okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:41 Aser gusṭirenko khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel mitʼ hajar mõṛẽsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:42 Napthali bõsrenko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon ḍher, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gusṭi ar gharońj reakʼ oprom lekate ńutum ol caṛhaoentakoa." 
Numbers1:43 Napthali gusṭi khon tinạkʼko ńamen onko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel pe hajar ponsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:44 Mose, Aron ar Israelren gelbar mukhiyạko hotete noko hoṛ doko lekha ocolena. Onko do jotoge apan ạpin bõsren mathako tahẽkana." 
Numbers1:45 Sanam Israelko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti tahẽkan, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ lekako tahẽkan, onko do gharońj lekateko lekha ocoyena." 
Numbers1:46 Onkoakʼ lekha do jotote turui lakh pe hajar mõṛẽsae mõṛẽgel tahẽkana. 
Numbers1:47 Menkhan onko sãote Liwi gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do baṅ hoylena. 
Numbers1:48 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoade tahẽkana," 
Numbers1:49 “Liwi gusṭiren do alom lekhakoa, se hoṛ lekhako jokhecʼ hõ eṭakʼ Israelko sãote alom mitʼkoa." 
Numbers1:50 Goha tạmbu reakʼ asbabko ar ona reakʼ sanamakʼ ńel jut reakʼ bhar do onko cetanrem dohoya. Onkoakʼ kạmi do hoyokʼa sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona reakʼ asbabko gokʼ bhạriạ idiya. Ar noa ńel jut reakʼ bhar hõ onko cetanrem dohoya ar onko do noa beṛhaete ḍerakʼ hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers1:51 Sekʼwa tạmbu tinre uṭhạukʼa unre Liwikoge ona doko samṭaoa arko bereda. Ar eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛ onḍeye sorokʼ enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Numbers1:52 Apan ạpin dol lekate Israelko do akoakʼ tạmbuko bereda. Ar jotoge akoakʼ niṭ akatʼ ṭhạ̃ire apan ạpin nisạn ṭhen phạd phạdko ḍerakʼa. 
Numbers1:53 Israelko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre jemon alo paṛaokʼ onate Liwiko do sekʼwa tạmbu beṛhaeteko ḍerakʼa. Ar sekʼwa tạmbu ńej jut reakʼ bhar hõ onkorege tahena.” 
Numbers1:54 Probhu Isor Mose okalekae hukumade tahekan onkage Israelko doko kạmikeda. 
Numbers2:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaraoatʼkinạ," 
Numbers2:2 “Israel hoponko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ beṛhaeteko ḍerakʼma. Ar apan ạpin nisạn ar gusṭi reakʼ cinhạ ṭhenko tahenma. 
Numbers2:3 “Jihudạ dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ purub secʼreko ḍerakʼma. Jihudạ gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼkana: Aminadab hopon Nahason ar uniren hoṛ doko hoyokʼ kana eaegel pon hajar turuisae hoṛ. 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5 Jihudạ gusṭi reakʼ mitʼ aṛere do Isakar gusṭirenko ar eṭakʼ aṛere do Sebulon gusṭiren hoṛko ḍerakʼma. Isakar gusṭiren mukhiyạ do Juar hopon Nethanel ar uniren hoṛ doko hoyokʼ kana mõṛẽgel pon hajar ponsae. Sebulon gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Helonren hopon Eliab ar uniren hoṛ doko hoyokʼ kana mõṛẽgel eae hajar ponsae. 
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7  
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9 Jihudạ dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼ lakh irạlgel turui hajar ponsae. Noko do pạhilre mohnḍakʼ hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers2:10 “Ar dạkhin secʼ do Ruben dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛko ḍerakʼa. Ruben gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Sedeurren hopon Elisur ar uniren hoṛ doko hoyokʼkana pongel turui hajar mõṛẽsae. 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12 Ruben gusṭirenko reakʼ mitʼ aṛere Simeon gusṭirenko ar eṭakʼ aṛere do Gad gusṭiren hoṛko ḍerakʼa. Simeon gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Surisadaeren hopon Selumiel ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel are hajar pesae. Gad gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Duel hopon Eliasaph ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana pongel mõṛẽ hajar turuisae mõṛẽgel. 
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16 Ruben dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼ lakh mõṛẽgel mitʼ hajar ponsae mõṛẽgel. Noko do dosar dol lekate mohnḍakʼ hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers2:17 “Ona tayom Liwi gusṭirenko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu uṭhạukateko mohnḍakʼa. Noko do joto dol reakʼ nisạnrenko talareko tahena. Onko do cetʼleka ḍerareko tahẽkan onkage uṭhạukʼ hoyokʼtakoa. Ar mimitʼko do akoakʼ dol reakʼ nisạn sãote tahen hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers2:18 “Pạchim secʼre do Ephrayem dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛko ḍerakʼa. Ephrayem gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼkana Ahimudren hopon Elisama ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel hajar mõṛẽsae. 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20 Ephrayem gusṭirenkoakʼ mitʼ aṛere do Manase gusṭirenko ar eṭakʼ aṛere do Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko ḍerakʼa. Manase gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Pedasur hopon Gamaliel ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pegel bar hajar barsae. Benjạmin gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Gideonren hopon Abidan ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pegel mõṛẽ hajar ponsae. 
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24 Ephrayem dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼ lakh irạl hajar mitʼsae. Noko do tesar dol lekateko mohnḍakʼa. 
Numbers2:25 “Dan dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛko do utạr secʼreko ḍerakʼa. Ar Dan gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Amisadaeren hopon Ahieser ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do turuigel bar hajar eae sae. 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27 Dan gusṭirenkoakʼ mitʼ aṛere do Aser gusṭiren ar eṭakʼ aṛere do Napthali gusṭiren hoṛko ḍerakʼa. Aser gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼ kana Okranren hopon Pagiyel ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana pongel mitʼ hajar mõṛẽsae. Napthali gusṭiren mukhiyạ doe hoyokʼkana Enanren hopon Ahira ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel pe hajar ponsae. 
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31 Dan dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼ lakh mõṛẽgel eae hajar turuisae. Noko do joto khon tayomte apnarakʼ dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛ sãoteko mohnḍakʼa.” 
Numbers2:32 Noko joto do Israelkoakʼ bõs menteko lekha ocolena. Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dol reakʼ nisạnren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jotote turui lakh pe hajar mõṛẽsae mõṛẽgel tahẽkana. 
Numbers2:33 Probhu Isor do Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelkoakʼ lekha jokhecʼ Liwiko doko bad ocolena. 
Numbers2:34 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Israelko do jotowakʼko cekayetʼ tahẽkana. Ar uniyakʼ hukum lekage onko do apan ạpin dolreko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ hukum lekage apan ạpin gusṭi ar gharońj lekateko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:1 Noa kangea Aron ar Mose bõsrenko reakʼ katha do one tinre Probhu Isor do sinại burure Moseye galmaraoade tahẽkan. 
Numbers3:2 Aronren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana: Nadab, Abihu, Eleasar ar Ithamar. Onko modre Nadab do maraṅicʼe tahẽkana. Onko do naeke menkste sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼko ojokʼ bahal ocolena." 
Numbers3:3  
Numbers3:4 Menkhan Nadab ar Abihu do sinại hahaṅkarre Probhu Isor ńutumte ạuṛi seṅgelre dhupkin jeretʼletʼte Probhu Isor samaṅrekin gocʼena. Unkinren do cele hoponge bako tahẽkana, menkhan Eleasar ar Ithamar do ạkinren apat Aron sãote naeke lekatekin kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Numbers3:5 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers3:6 “Am do Liwi gusṭiren hoṛkom ạgukoa ar Aronakʼ tirem jimạkoa jemon onko do Aronko goṛowae. 
Numbers3:7 Ar sanam Israelko secʼ khon ńapamokʼ tạmbure Aron tabere sekʼwa kạmi reakʼ sapʼdapʼ kạmireko goṛowaema. 
Numbers3:8 Onko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ asbab reakʼko ńel juta ar sekʼwa tạmbure Israelkoakʼ dạyik leka sapʼdapʼ reakʼko kạmi ma. 
Numbers3:9 Liwiko do Aron ar uniren hoponkom emakoa. Israelko tala khon noko do Aronakʼ tirem jimạkoa. 
Numbers3:10 Naeke lekate kạmi lạgitʼ am do Aron ar uniren hoponkom ojokʼ bahalkoa. Onko chaḍa ar jãhãege naeke reakʼe kạmi uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa.” 
Numbers3:11 Probhu Isor do Mose arhõe galmaraoadea," 
Numbers3:12 “Israelkoren pạhil koṛa hopon bodolte iń do Israelko tala khon Liwikogeń bachao akawana. Liwiko do ińren kanako," 
Numbers3:13 ente Israelkoren sanam pạhil koṛa hopon doko ińren kana. Misor disạmre pạhil koṛa hopon gocʼko jokhecʼ Israelko talare mitʼke mitʼ pạhil koṛa hopon do iń lạgitʼgeń begar dohoakatʼkoa- ar ona do manwakoge cetʼ ar janwarkoge baṅ cetʼ. Onko do ińren kanako; ar iń doń Probhu Isor kana.” 
Numbers3:14 Sinại reakʼ hahaṅkarre Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaroadea," 
Numbers3:15 “Gharońj ar gusṭiko lekate am do Liwikom lekhakoa. Mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren sanam herel hoponkom lekhakoa.” 
Numbers3:16 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Mose do Liwikoe lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers3:17 Liwiren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do Gerson, Kohat ar Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Kohatren hopon Libni ar Simai do barea gusṭiren apatkin tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:19 Kohatren hopon Amram ar Jishar, Hebron ar Usiel do pon gusṭiren apatko tahẽkana." 
Numbers3:20 Meraren hopon Mahli ar Musi do bar gusṭiren apatkin tahẽkana. Noa kangea gusṭikoren apat lekate Liwi gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsrenkoakʼ oprom do. 
Numbers3:21 Gerson do Libni ar Simại bõsren hapṛame tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:22 Noa bõsren mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren sanam herel hoponko lekha ocoyen khan jotote eae hajar mõṛẽsae hoṛko hoyena. 
Numbers3:23 Ar Gersonrenko do pạchim aṛe sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ tayom secʼre ḍerakʼ lạgitʼko men ocoyena. 
Numbers3:24 Gerson gusṭiren mukhiyạ do Layel hopon Eliasaphe tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:25 Ar ńapamokʼ tạmbure Gerson hoponkoakʼ dạyik do tahẽkana sekʼwa tạmbu, ar ona cetanre merom upʼ reakʼ dapalakʼ, ńapamokʼ tạmbu duạr reakʼ ekʼsetʼ orwal," 
Numbers3:26 bahre raca reakʼ orwal, sekʼwa tạmbu ar pinḍ beṛhaeteakʼ bakher raca duạr reakʼ orwal, ar ona reakʼ baberko ar onako sãoteakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko." 
Numbers3:27 Kohat do Amrami, Jishari, Hebroni ar Usiel bõsren hapṛame tahẽkana." 
Numbers3:28 Niạ bõsren mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren sanam herel hoṛkoakʼ lekha do irạl hajar turuisae tahẽkana. Noko cetanrege sonot ṭhạ̃i ńeljut reakʼ bhar do dohoyena. 
Numbers3:29 Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ dạkhin secʼ do Kohat gusṭirenko ḍerakʼ reakʼe metatʼko tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:30 Kohat bõskoren mukhiyạ do Usielren hopon Elsaphane tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:31 Kohatrenkoakʼ dạyik do tahẽkana goha sinduk, ṭebil, diuhe dohowakʼ, pinḍkin, sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ asbabko ar sonot utạr ṭhạ̃i reakʼ orwal ńel jut ar onako sãoteakʼ eṭakʼ jotowakʼ kạmiko." 
Numbers3:32 Liwikoren maraṅ mukhiyạ do Aronren hopon Eleasere tahẽkana. Sonot ṭhạ̃i ńel jut reakʼ bhar okoeko cetanre tahẽkan onko ńel todarotko lạgitʼ do Eleasere bachao ocolena. 
Numbers3:33 Merari do Mahli ar Musi bõsren hapṛame tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:34 Niạ bõsren do mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren sanam herelko lekha ocoyen khan, onkoakʼ lekha do turui hajar barsae hoyena." 
Numbers3:35 Merari bõsren mukhiyạ do Abihayelren hopon Suriele tahẽkana. Onko do sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ utạr secʼre ḍerakʼ lạgitʼko men ocolena. 
Numbers3:36 Merarikoakʼ dạyik do tahẽkana sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ paṭako, hurkạṛko, khunṭiko ar ona reakʼ ganḍoko ar ona reakʼ joto jinisko," 
Numbers3:37 bakher raca reakʼ berhaeteakʼ khunṭiko ar ganḍoko, onako reakʼ gońjko ar onako reakʼ baberko ar onako sãoteakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ bhar hõ onkore tahẽkana." 
Numbers3:38 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅre, metakʼme sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ purub secʼre do Mose, Aron ar uniren hoponko ḍerakʼ lạgitʼ metatʼko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ dạyik do tahẽkana Israelko lekate sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ sanamʼ kạmiko jemonko kạmi. Onko chaḍa ar jãhãege sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ ṭhonok ṭhạ̃iteye bolokʼ uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Numbers3:39 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose ar Aronakʼ lekhare bõs lekate Liwi gusṭiren herel hoponkoakʼ lekha do bargel bar hajar tahẽkana. Noko samankoge mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerrenko tahẽkana. 
Numbers3:40 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea, “Am do Israelko talare pạhil janam akan mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren sanam herel hoponkom lekhakoa arem ol caṛhaokoa." 
Numbers3:41 Israelkoren sanam pạhil herel hoponko bodolte Liwiko ar Israelkoren mĩhũ-merom hoponko bodolte Liwikoren pạhil mĩhũ-merom hoponko do ińren menteko lekhakʼa. Ar iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.” 
Numbers3:42 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose do Israelko talare pạhil janam akan nonkan sanam herel hoponkoe lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers3:43 Pạhilko janam akan nonkan sanam mitʼ cando ar ona khon ḍher umerren herel hoponkoakʼ ńutum ol rakapʼen khan, onkoakʼ lekha do jotote bargel bar hajar barsae eaegel pe hoyena." 
Numbers3:44 Probhu Isor do Mose arhõ galmaraoadeteye metadea," 
Numbers3:45 “Am do Israelkoren sanam pạhil herel hoponko bodolte Liwiko ar Israelkoren pạhil mĩhũ-merom hopon bodolte Liwikoren pạhil mĩhũ-merom hopon mente lekhako hoyokʼa. Liwiko do ińren kanako; ar iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Numbers3:46 Liwikoakʼ joto lekha khon Israelkoren pạhil herel hoponkoakʼ lekha do barsae eaegel pe hoṛ ḍherko tahẽkante onko mimitʼko chaḍaoko lạgitʼ am do gel gram ojon reakʼ dhorom sekel reakʼ mõṛẽ sekelkate rupạm ạdạikoa. 
Numbers3:47  
Numbers3:48 Onko chaḍaoko reakʼ noa rupạ do Aron ar uniren hoponkom emakoa.” 
Numbers3:49 Liwiko bodolte Israelko chaḍaoko tayom Israelkoakʼ oka lekha bạ̃ṛti tahẽkan Mose do onko chaḍaoko reakʼ rupại hataokeda. 
Numbers3:50 Ar Israelkoren pạhil herel hoponko ṭhen khon dhorom reakʼ sekel lekate gelpe keji turui sae mõṛẽgel gram rupại hataokeda. 
Numbers3:51 Mose do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ona chaḍaoakʼ reakʼ rupạ do Aron ar uniren hoponkoe ematʼkoa. 
Numbers4:1 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaraoatʼkinạ," 
Numbers4:2 “Liwiko talare Kohat bõsrenko khon, gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate Kohatren hoponben lekhakoa." 
Numbers4:3 Kohatren pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umerren okoeko herel hoṛ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ eken onko ben lekhakoa. 
Numbers4:4 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbure Kohatrenkoakʼ kạmi do hoyokʼa sonot utạrakʼ jinisko ńel todarot. 
Numbers4:5 Ḍera uṭhạukʼre Aron ar uniren hoponko do sekʼwa tạmbu bhitrite bolokate goha sinduk reakʼ dapalakʼ orwal raṛa pheḍkate onate sindukko poṭoma. 
Numbers4:6 Ar ona tayom do takhas (susuk) hartateko dapalkakʼa ar ona cetanre mitʼṭecʼ nil roṅakʼ kicricʼko aṭetʼakʼa, ar goha sinduk reakʼ ḍaṅkinko hurạṛkakʼa." 
Numbers4:7 Onko do samaṅakʼ piṭhạ dohowakʼ ṭebil cetanre mitʼṭecʼ nil roṅakʼ kicricʼko aṭetʼakʼa ar ona cetanre thạriko, bạṭiko, kạ̃ṛchuko ar cokʼḍor loṭakoko dohoya. Ar okaṭakʼ piṭhạ jao okte ṭebilre tahen ona do ṭebil cetanrege tahena." 
Numbers4:8 Noako cetanre mitʼṭecʼ arakʼ roṅakʼ kicricʼ aṭetʼkate takhas (susuk) hartateko poṭomkakʼa ar ṭebil reakʼ ḍaṅkin do ṭhik jaegareko gutu dohokakʼa. 
Numbers4:9 Marsal emokʼ lạgitʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ joto diuheko ar sultạ saphae reakʼ cimṭạko ar ona reakʼ ḍhạknicʼko ar sunum dohoy lạgitʼ bhajanko do mitʼṭecʼ nil roṅakʼ kicricʼteko poṭomkakʼa. 
Numbers4:10 Ar ona tayom asbabko sudhạ diuhe dohowakʼ do takhas (susuk) hartate bedhaokate gokʼ idiy reakʼ tokta cetanreko dohoya. 
Numbers4:11 Sona reakʼ pinḍ cetanre mitʼṭecʼ nil roṅakʼ kicricʼ aṭetʼkate onko do takhas (susuk) hartateko poṭomkakʼa ar pinḍ reakʼ ḍaṅkin hõ ṭhik jaegare hurạṛkakʼa. 
Numbers4:12 Sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ kạmire beoharokʼakʼ sanam jinisko do nil roṅakʼ kicricʼte bedhaokate takhas (susuk) reakʼ hartate poṭomkate gokʼ idiy reakʼ tokta cetanreko dohoya. 
Numbers4:13 Rupạ pinḍ reakʼ sanam torocʼko giḍikate onko do mitʼṭecʼ beguni roṅakʼ kicricʼ ona cetanreko aṭetʼakʼa. 
Numbers4:14 Ona tayom onko do ona cetanre sekʼwa kạmi reakʼ sanam thạriko, bạṭiko, kạ̃ṛchuko, ḍhạknicʼko, jel rakapʼ kaṭa kạ̃ṛchũko ar mãyãm irciyakʼ bạṭiko ar pinḍ reakʼ sanam asbabko dohoya. Onko do ona cetanre takhas (susuk) hartako aṭetʼakʼa ar ona reakʼ ḍaṅkin do ṭhik jaegareko gutukakʼa." 
Numbers4:15 “Aron ar uniren hoponko tinre noa sonot jinis ar sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ asbab poṭom reakʼ kạmiko sạta ar hoṛko hõ ḍera samṭaokate uṭhạukʼ lạgitʼko sapṛaokʼa unre Kohatren hoponko do noako gokʼ idi lạgitʼko hijukʼa. Menkhan onko do sonotakʼ okaṭakʼ jinisge bako joṭetʼ daṛeakʼa. Arko joṭetʼ lekhan onko doko gujukʼa. Ńapamokʼ tạmbure okako jinis tahen ona do Kohatren hoponkoko gokʼ idiya. 
Numbers4:16 Diuhe reakʼ sunum, jut so mosolako reakʼ dhup, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunum noako reakʼ bhar do naeke Aronren hopon Eliaser cetanre tahena. Goṭa sekʼwa tạmbu ar ona reakʼ sanamakʼ, metakʼme sonot ṭhạ̃i ar ona reakʼ asbabko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do Eliaser cetanrege tahena.”" 
Numbers4:17 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaroatʼkinạ," 
Numbers4:18 “Liwiko tala khon Kohat gusṭiren hoṛko jemon aloko maraokʼ. 
Numbers4:19 Ar sonot utạrakʼ jinis ṭhen senkate aloko gujukʼ bickom, jiwetʼko tahen ona lạgitʼ Aron ar uniren hoponko do sonot tạmbure bolokate apan ạpin kạmi ar apan ạpin bojhako hạṭińakoa." 
Numbers4:20 Menkhan sonotakʼ sanamakʼ jinisko ńel todarot lạgitʼ Kohatrenko do bhitrite bako bolo daṛeakʼa, mitʼ ghạṛi lạgitʼhõ baṅ. Arko bololen khan onko doko gujukʼa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers4:22 “Gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate am do Gerson hoponkom lekhakoa. 
Numbers4:23 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umerren Gerson bõsren okoe do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ eken onkogem lekhakoa. 
Numbers4:24 “Ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmi lạgitʼ ar bojhako gokʼ idire Gerson bõsrenkoakʼ dạyik do hoyokʼkana sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ, ar ona cetanre aṭetʼakʼ merom upʼ reakʼ dapalakʼ, ar ona cetanre bheḍa harta reakʼ dapalakʼ ar takhas (susuk) harta reakʼ dapalakʼ ar ńapamokʼ tạmbure bolokʼ duạr reakʼ orwalko gokʼ idiya." 
Numbers4:25  
Numbers4:26 Ona chaḍa sekʼwa tạmbu ar pinḍ beṛhaeteakʼ bakher raca reakʼ orwal, ar bakher racate bolokʼ duạr reakʼ orwalko, sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ barahiko ar noako kạmire jạruṛokʼakʼ sanam jinisko gokʼ idiya. Ar nonkanakʼ tinạkʼ kạmi menakʼ ona jotoge Gersonren hoponko kạmi hoyokʼtakoa." 
Numbers4:27 Bojha gokʼ bhạriạ kạmi se ar eṭakʼ jãhãn kạmige, onko do jotoge Aron ar uniren hoponkoakʼ hukum leka kạmi hoyokʼtakoa. Ar okako jinis gokʼ bhạriạ lagao ako ona do onkope jimạwakoa." 
Numbers4:28 Ńapamokʼ tạmbure Gerson khũṭrenkoakʼ kạmi do noako kangea. Ar onkoakʼ kạmi ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do naeke Aronren hopon Ithamar cetanre tahena. 
Numbers4:29 “Gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate aben do Merari hoponko ben lekhakoa. 
Numbers4:30 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umerren Merari hoponko okoe do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ eken onko ben lekhakoa. 
Numbers4:31 Ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ kạmire Merarikoakʼ dạyik do hoyokʼ kana sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ joto paṭako, hurạṛkakʼ ḍaṅkin, khunṭiko ar ganḍoko gokʼ idiy." 
Numbers4:32 Ona chaḍa, beṛhaetaeakʼ bakher raca reakʼ sanam ganḍoko ar khunṭiko, tạmbu reakʼ gońjko, bakher raca reakʼ orwal reakʼ barahiko ar onako reakʼ sanam asbabko ar onako kạmire jạruṛokʼakʼ sanam jinisko gokʼ idi hoyokʼtakoa. Ar okoe okaṭakʼko goga onape ṭhik akoa." 
Numbers4:33 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Merari bõsrenkoakʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmi reakʼ dạyik. Ar onkoakʼ kạmiko ńel todarot lạgitʼ bhar do naeke Aronren hopon Ithamar cetanre tahena.” 
Numbers4:34 Gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate Mose, Aron ar Israelren mukhiyạko do Kohatrenkoe lekhaketʼkoa." 
Numbers4:35 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umer hạbicʼ okoe do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ," 
Numbers4:36 gusṭi lekate onkoakʼ lekha do jotote bar hajar eaesae mõṛẽgel tahẽkana. 
Numbers4:37 Noage Kohat bõsrenkoakʼ lekha do tahẽkana. Mose hotete Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Mose ar Aron do onkokin lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers4:38 Gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate Gersonrenko hõko lekha ocoyena. 
Numbers4:39 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umer hạbicʼ okoeko ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼ," 
Numbers4:40 gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate onkoakʼ lekha do bar hajar turuisae pegel hoyena. 
Numbers4:41 Ar noage Gerson bõsrenkoakʼ lekha do tahẽkana. Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Mose ar Aron do onkokin lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers4:42 Gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate Merarirenko hõko lekha ocoyena. 
Numbers4:43 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umer hạbicʼ okoe do ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmi lạgitʼko hijukʼ," 
Numbers4:44 gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate onkoakʼ lekha do jotote pe hajar barsae hoyena. 
Numbers4:45 Noage Merari bõsrenkoakʼ lekha do tahẽkana. Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose ar Aron do onkokin lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers4:46 Mose, Aron ar Israelren mukhiyạko do nonkage gusṭi gusṭi ar gharońj gharońj lekate sanam Liwiko lekhaketʼkoa." 
Numbers4:47 Pegel khon mõṛẽgel bochor umer hạbicʼ okoe do ńapamokʼ tạmbure sapʼsosor ar jinisko gokʼ idi daṛeakʼ onkoakʼ lekha do jotote irạl hajar mõṛẽsae irạlgel hoyena. 
Numbers4:48  
Numbers4:49 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Mose hotete mimitʼko apan ạpin sapʼdapʼ kạmi ar gogokʼ lạgitʼko ṭhik ocoyena. Ar Probhu Isor oka hukume emlen onkage Mose do Liwikoe lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers5:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers5:2 “Israelkom hukumakoa ḍeraren okoeko hoṛ do murhucʼ jom rog menakʼtako se okoeyakʼ hoṛmo khon besaphawakʼ oḍokokʼkan se mạ̃ṛĩ iạteko besaphage onkan hoṛ jemon ḍera khonko oḍok ocokʼ. 
Numbers5:3 Baṅ doe maejiukan ar baṅ doe herel hoṛkan uni do oḍok giḍikae hoyokʼa. Nonkan hoṛ iạte ḍera jemon alo besaphakʼ onate onko do bahrete oḍok giḍikako hoyokʼa, ente iń do onḍe Israelko sãoteń tahenkana.”" 
Numbers5:4 Ar Israel hoponko doko onkakeda. Onko do ḍera khon onkan hoṛko oḍokketʼkoa. Probhu Isor Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko doko kạmikeda. 
Numbers5:5 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers5:6 “Israel hoponkom metakoa, manwa okako kại ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kạmikate jãhãe herel se maejiu Probhu Isorre bepạtiạre hoylen khan uni doe dusi ocokʼa." 
Numbers5:7 Uni okae kại akatʼ ona do aṅgoc hoyokʼtaea. Ar okoe cetanreye behok akatʼ uni do khuti purun emkatae hoyokʼtaea. Okaṭakʼ jinis reaṅe behok akatʼ ona jinis reakʼ dam sãote arhõ mõṛẽ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs dam ḍher emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers5:8 Khuti purun hatao lạgitʼ uni hoṛren jãhãe sor peṛa bae tahen khan ona do Probhu Isorakʼge hoyokʼa. Ona khuti purun ar uniyakʼ kại reakʼ puruchunren bheḍa do naekege emae hoyokʼa. 
Numbers5:9 Israel hoponko okaṭakʼ sonotakʼ jinis naeke ṭhenko ạgui ona do jotoge uniyakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers5:10 Mitʼke mitʼ samaṅakʼ jinis do naekeakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Naekeakʼ tire jimạwakʼ jinis hõ uniyakʼge hoyokʼa.” 
Numbers5:11 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea, “Israel hoponkom baḍae ocokoa, jãhãeren rinicʼtetʼ bạṛicʼakʼ horteye taṛam ar jãwãetetʼ cetanre bepạtiạr iạte eṭakʼ herel sãoteye laṭghaṭ, ar acʼren jãwãe bae baḍae ar danaṅge tahen- ente uni upạrte jãhãn goha emokʼko bako tahen ar ona kạmire bae sapʼ ocoakan-" 
Numbers5:12  
Numbers5:13  
Numbers5:14 ar rinicʼtetʼ cetanre inditʼ iạte jãwãetetʼ do monre jolon hecʼae enḍekhan uni do acʼren oṛakʼ hoṛ naeke ṭhene idiyea; ar rinicʼtetʼ bae bhõnḍ akanre hõ hereltetʼe inditʼae enḍekhan uni hõ naeke ṭhene idiyea. Ona sãote acʼren rinicʼtetʼ ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ keji irạlsae gram jao reakʼ holoṅ idi torae hoyokʼtaea. Uni do noare jãhãn sunum se kunduru bae mesalakʼa ente noa do indidokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, metakʼme Probhu Isor ṭhen behokakʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana." 
Numbers5:15  
Numbers5:16 “Ar naeke do uni maejiu Probhu Isor samaṅreye teṅgoyea. 
Numbers5:17 Ona tayom mitʼṭecʼ hasa reakʼ bhajanre thoṛa dakʼ ar sekʼwa tạmbu pinḍạ reakʼ thoṛa dhuṛi hataokate ona dakʼreye curuja. 
Numbers5:18 Ar Probhu Isor samaṅre maejiue teṅgoyea ar uni maejiuakʼ bohokʼ upʼe raṛaetaea ar behokakʼ sodor lạgitʼe ạguakatʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis, metakʼme indidokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis uniyakʼ ańjlereye dohoaea. Ar naeke do acʼakʼ tire sarapakʼ haṛhatʼ dakʼe dohoya." 
Numbers5:19 Ar ona tayom do maejiu kiriạ ocokateye metaea, “Bapla tayom jãhãe hoṛ am sãote bae laṭghaṭ akatʼ khan ar bạṛicʼ horte taṛamkate bam bhõnḍ akan khan noa sarapakʼ haṛhatʼ dakʼ do jãhãnakʼ alo baṛeye khutiytam ma." 
Numbers5:20 Menkhan bapla tayom bạṛicʼ horte senkate jãhãe tulucʼ loṭghoṭi reakʼem kạmi akatʼ arem bhõnḍ akan khan- 
Numbers5:21 ar inạ hạbicʼ menkate naeke do uni maejiu cetanre sarap paṛaokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼe kiriạ ocoyea are mena, ‘Probhu Isor do ḍanḍae borocʼ ocoytam ma ar lacʼe puṭritʼ ocoytam ma onate amren hoṛ sarap arko kiriạkʼre amakʼ ńutumko ńuma." 
Numbers5:22 Ar niạ sarapakʼ dakʼ do amakʼ lacʼre bolokʼte amakʼ lacʼ phulạkʼa ar ḍanḍa do borojokʼtama.’ “Ar uni maejiu doe mena, ‘onage hoyokʼma.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Naeke do onako sarap hartareye ola ar ona cetanre dakʼ dulkate ona ol do haṛhatʼ dakʼreye giḍikakʼa. 
Numbers5:24 Ar sarap reakʼ ona haṛhatʼ dakʼ do uni maejiue ńũ ocoyea ar uniyakʼ lacʼre bhijạukʼte ạḍitetʼ haṛhadea. 
Numbers5:25 Naeke do maejiuakʼ ti khon indidokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hataokate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa ar pinḍ ṭhene ạguiya. 
Numbers5:26 Ona tayom naeke do samaṅokʼakʼ khon mitʼ cuputʼ hataokate pinḍreye jereda. Ar ona tayom do maejiu ona dakʼe ńũ ocoyea. 
Numbers5:27 Maejiu do bhonḍkate jãwãe cetanre bepạtiạre tahen enḍekhan uni do sarapakʼ ona dakʼe ńũiy tayom ạḍitetʼ lacʼ hasoyea. Uniyakʼ lacʼ do phulạukʼtaea ar ḍanḍa hõ borojokʼtaea ar uni do acʼ jạtrenko talare mitʼṭen sarapanicʼe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers5:28 Menkhan maejiu do bhõnḍ baṅkateye saphage khan tobe do uni okaṭakʼteye dusi ocolen ona khon doe khalasokʼa ar gidrạ eṅgatokʼ reakʼ daṛe hõ tahentaea. 
Numbers5:29 “Jãhãe maejiu bapla tayom bạṛicʼ horte senkateye bhõnḍlen khan se jãhãe herel hoṛ indidokʼ iạte rinicʼtetʼ cetanreye jolonokʼ enḍekhan uni do niạ niạmtege kạmikatae hoyokʼa. Uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre acʼren rinicʼtetʼe idiyea ar naeke do ona niạm lekageye kạmikataea. 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Nonkate jãwãetetʼakʼ behokakʼ lạlis khon chaḍaoe ńama, menkhan maejiue behok lekhan ona reakʼ kuṛại doe ńamgea.”" 
Numbers6:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers6:2 “Am do Israel hoponkom baḍae ocokoa, jãhãe herel hopon se maejiuge nạsri lekate Probhu Isor ńutumte begar tahen lạgitʼe manot akatʼ khan," 
Numbers6:3 enḍekhan uni do darkha rasa se jãhãn bubulakʼ khon sahaṛ akane tahenma. Uni do darkha rasa se bubulakʼ khon benaoakʼ sirkạ hõ aloe ńũiyma. Uni do ṭaṭka darkha rasa, darkha jo se kismis hõ aloe ńũ-jom ma." 
Numbers6:4 Ar tinạkʼ din nạsri menteye tahen unạkʼ din darkha rasa reakʼ jãhãnakʼge bae jom daṛeakʼa baṅ do ona reakʼ jaṅ ar baṅ do cokakʼ cetʼge bae ńũ-jom daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers6:5 “Tinạkʼ din nạsri mente begar tahen reakʼe kiriạ akan unạkʼ din uni do bohokʼ upʼ bae hoyo poṭortaea. Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar akante uni do Probhu Isorrenge tahen hoyokʼtaea. Uni do acʼakʼ upʼe hara jeleń ocoytaea. 
Numbers6:6 Uni do jãhãn mạ̃ṛĩ ṭhen hõ bae sor daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers6:7 Gogo-baba, boeha-misera jãhãegeko gocʼlenre hõ apnarte bae besapha daṛeakʼa, ente uniyakʼ bohokʼre Isor ńutumte begar doho akan reakʼ cinhạ menakʼa." 
Numbers6:8 Uniyakʼ niạ begar doho akan tahen do purạ okte Probhu Isor ńutumte tahen hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers6:9 “Jãhãe ackage uni samaṅreye gujukʼ ar onate Probhu Isor ńutumteye dohoakatʼ upʼ besaphakʼtae enḍekhan uni do eae mãhã hilokʼ, metakʼme uni do saphakʼ hilokʼ bohokʼ hoyo poṭorokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers6:10 Ar irạl mãhã hilokʼ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạrre naeke ṭhen barea potam ar baṅkhan barea parwa idikin hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers6:11 Mạ̃ṛĩ ṭhene tahẽkante uni doe besaphagea ar uni saphakʼ lạgitʼ naeke do mitʼṭen cẽṛẽ hataokate kại ńutumteye samaṅea ar eṭakʼicʼ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ńutumteye samaṅea. Ar enhilokʼ uni do acʼakʼ bohokʼ upʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteye sonot ocoytaea," 
Numbers6:12 ar ona sãote acʼ apnar hõ lahate leka Probhu Isor ńutumte begar tahen reakʼe kiriyạkʼa. Ona chaḍa dos akatʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ uni do mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopone ạguiyea. Ar tinạkʼ din Probhu Isor ńutumte begar akane tahẽkan onako din do bạtilokʼtaea, ente onako dinre uni do besapha akane tahẽkana." 
Numbers6:13 “Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭen nạsri hoṛ do begar tahen reakʼ din purạulentae tayom uni do noa manao hoyokʼtaea. Uni do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhene hijukʼa. 
Numbers6:14 Ar onḍe Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lekate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ bheḍa hopon, kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen mitʼ bochor umerren niphuṭ utạricʼ bhiḍi hopon ar sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen niphuṭ utạricʼ bheḍa ạguiye hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers6:15 Niạko sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍorokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis ar mitʼ ḍạlicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ hõ lagaoea. Niạko piṭhạ do sunumre sipiyakʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ reakʼ piṭhạ ar sunum mesalakatʼ thapṛa piṭhạge hoyokʼ jạruṛa. 
Numbers6:16 Naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre idikate noakoe dohoya ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼe kạmiya. 
Numbers6:17 Ona chaḍa uni bheḍa do Probhu Isor samaṅre sulukren dãṛẽ ńutumte samaṅe jokhecʼ ḍạlicʼ reakʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõe samaṅa. 
Numbers6:18 Ona tayom ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen nạsri hoṛ do Probhu Isor ńutumteye dohoakatʼ acʼakʼ upʼe hoyo poṭor ocoytaea. Ar noa upʼ do sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ latarre seṅgelreye khadle giḍikakʼa. 
Numbers6:19 Probhu Isor ńutumte dohoakatʼ upʼ hoyo poṭor tayom naeke do bheḍawakʼ mitʼṭecʼ isinakʼ phạṛi ar ḍạlicʼ khon mitʼṭecʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ ar thapṛa piṭhạ hataokate uni nạsri hoṛe calaea. 
Numbers6:20 Ona tayom naeke do dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dolaoa. Noa do sonotakʼ jinis kana ar ona do naekeyakʼge hoyokʼa. Ona chaḍa dolao akatʼ koṛam reakʼ jel ar samaṅ akatʼ bulu hõ naekeyakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Noako hoylen tayom uni nạsri hoṛ do darkha rasae ńũ daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers6:21 “Noakangea nạsri hoṛ lạgitʼ niạm do. Probhu Isor ńutumte begar tahen reakʼ kiriạ lekate noako samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ samaṅ hoyokʼtaea. Ona chaḍa uni do acʼakʼ daṛe lekate arhõ thoṛa emokʼ lạgitʼe kiriạlen khan ona hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar uniyakʼ kiriạ akanakʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar tahen reakʼ niạm lekate emokʼ hoyokʼtaea.” 
Numbers6:22 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers6:23 “Am do Aron ar uniren hoponkom metakoa, jemon noa menkate Israel hoponko ạsirbadko emako." 
Numbers6:24 ‘Probhu Isor do ame bhoram ma are horho jaṅgeme ma; 
Numbers6:25 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã am secʼe marsal ocoyma; are dayawam ma. 
Numbers6:26 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãha am secʼe samaṅma ar suluke dohoam ma.’ 
Numbers6:27 “Nonkage onko do Israelko cetanre ińakʼ ńutumko ńuma, ar iń do onkoń bhorakoa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Oka hilokʼ sekʼwa tạmbuko beretʼ sạtketʼ enhilokʼ Mose do ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunumte goṭa tạmbu ar ona reakʼ asbabko Probhu Isor ńutumteye begarkeda. Uni do pinḍ ar ona reakʼ thạri-bạṭiko cetanre ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunume dulketʼte onako hõe begarkeda. 
Numbers7:2 Ona tayom Israelkoren mukhiyạko, metakʼme khũṭren mathako do sandesko ạgukeda. Noko gusṭikoren mathako cetanrege hoṛ lekhako reakʼ bhar do tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:3 Dan sandes lekate onko do turui goṭecʼ ṭapor sagaṛ ar gelbar goṭen ḍaṅgra Probhu Isor samaṅreko ạguketʼkoa. Onate mimitʼ mukhiyạ secʼ khon mitʼṭenkate ḍaṅgra ar babar hoṛ secʼ khon mitʼṭecʼkate ṭapor sagaṛ em hoyena. Onko do noako ạgukate sekʼwa tạmbu samaṅreko dohokeda. 
Numbers7:4 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers7:5 “Noko ṭhen khon onako ataṅme jemon ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ kạmire onakom lagao daṛeakʼ. Ar noako do Liwikoakʼ kạmi lekate onkom hạṭińakoa.” 
Numbers7:6 Onate Mose do onako sagaṛ ar ḍaṅgrako Liwikoe hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Numbers7:7 Gersonkoakʼ kạmi lekate uni do barea sagaṛ ar ponea ḍaṅgrae ematʼkoa," 
Numbers7:8 ar Merarikoakʼ kạmi lekate ponea sagaṛ ar irạl goṭen ḍaṅgrae ematʼkoa. Ar noko ńel jutko reakʼ bhar do naekeren hopon Ithamar cetanreye dohokeda. 
Numbers7:9 Mose do Kohatrenko cetʼge bae ematʼkoa, ente sonotakʼ jinisko reakʼ ńel todarot bhar do onko cetanrege tahẽkana ar onako gokʼ idi reakʼ bhar hõ." 
Numbers7:10 Ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunumte pinḍ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob ehobokʼ tayom khon mukhiyạko do akoakʼ sandesko ạgukate pinḍ samaṅre dohoyko ehopʼena. 
Numbers7:11 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoade tahẽkana, “Pinḍre din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mukhiyạko do akoakʼ sandesko ạguima.”" 
Numbers7:12 Pạhil hilokʼ okoeṭakʼ mukhiyạ acʼakʼ sandese ạguketʼ uni doe hoyokʼ kana Jihudạ gusṭiren matha Aminadabren hopon Nahason. 
Numbers7:13 Uniyakʼ sandes do jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunumte sipiyakʼ holoṅ ar mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon rupạ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bạṭi; 
Numbers7:14 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:15 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:16 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:17 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko joto do Aminadabren hopon Nahasonren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:18 Dosar hilokʼ Isakar gusṭiren mukhiyạ Juarren hopon Nethanel do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:19 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana sunumte sipiyakʼ holoṅ ar mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon rupạ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bạṭi; 
Numbers7:20 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ sona reakʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:21 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:22 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:23 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Juarren hopon Nethanelren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:24 Tesar hilokʼ Sebulon gusṭiren mukhiyạ Helonren hopon Eliab do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:25 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:26 ar dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:27 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:28 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:29 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Helonren hopon Eliabren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:30 Ponakʼ dinre Ruben gusṭiren mukhiyạ Sedeurren hopon Elisur do sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:31 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭen rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:32 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:33 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:34 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:35 sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Sedeurren hopon Elisurren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:36 Mõṛẽakʼ dinre Simeon gusṭiren mukhiyạ Surisadalren hopon Selumiel do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:37 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭen rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:38 ar dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:39 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:40 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:41 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Surisadalren hopon Selumielren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:42 Turuiyakʼ dinre Gad gusṭiren mukhiyạ Deuelren hopon Eliasaph do sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:43 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:44 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:45 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:46 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:47 sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Deuelren hopon Eliasaphakren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:48 Eaeakʼ dinre Ephrayim gusṭiren mukhiyạ Amihudren hopon Elisama do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:49 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:50 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:51 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:52 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:53 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Ephrayemren hopon Elisamaren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:54 Irạlakʼ dinre Manase gusṭiren mukhiyạ Pedasurren hopon Gamaliel do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:55 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:56 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:57 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:58 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:59 sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Pedasurren hopon Gamalielren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:60 Areakʼ dinre Benjạmin gusṭiren mukhiyạ Gideonren hopon Abidan do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:61 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:62 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:63 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:64 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:65 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Gideonren hopon Abidanren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:66 Gelakʼ dinre Dan gusṭiren mukhiyạ Amisadaeren hopon Ahieser do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:67 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:68 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:69 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:70 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:71 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Amisadaeren hopon Ahieserren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:72 Gelmitʼakʼ dinre Aser gusṭiren mukhiyạ Okranren hopon Pạgiel do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:73 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ thạri ar eae sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:74 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:75 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:76 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:77 sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Okranren hopon Pạgielren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:78 Gelbar dinre Napthali gusṭiren mukhiyạ Enanren hopon Ahira do acʼakʼ sandese ạgukeda. 
Numbers7:79 Uniyakʼ sandes do tahẽkana jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ, mitʼ keji pesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ thạri ar eaesae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi;" 
Numbers7:80 dhupte perecʼ mitʼsae gram ojon sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ thạri; 
Numbers7:81 jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa, mitʼ bochor umerren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon;" 
Numbers7:82 kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda; 
Numbers7:83 sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa, mõṛẽ goṭen merom boda ar mitʼ bochor umerren mõṛẽ goṭen bheḍa hopon. Noko do Enanren hopon Ahiraren sandesko tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:84 Ojokʼ bahalokʼ reakʼ sunumte pinḍ reakʼ samaṅokʼ porob ehopʼ tayom Israelren mukhiyạko oka sandesko ạguletʼ ona do hoyokʼ kana gelbar goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ thạri, gelbar goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭi ar gelbar goṭecʼ sona reakʼ huḍiń thạri." 
Numbers7:85 Dhorom reakʼ ojon lekate mimitʼ goṭecʼ rupạ thạri reakʼ ojon do mitʼ keji pesae gram ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ rupạ bạṭi reakʼ ojon do eae sae gram tahẽkana. Rupạ reakʼ ojon do jotote bargel pon keji tahẽkana. 
Numbers7:86 Dhorom reakʼ ojon lekate dhupte perecʼ sona reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ huḍiń thạri reakʼ ojon do tahẽkana mitʼsae gram. Gelbar goṭecʼ sona reakʼ ojon do jotote mitʼ keji barsae gram tahẽkana. 
Numbers7:87 Ona chaḍa jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ jotote gelbar goṭen ḍaṅgra, gelbar goṭen bheḍa ar mitʼ bochor umerren gelbar goṭen bheḍa hoponko tahẽkana. Noako sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko hõ tahẽkana. Kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do gelbar goṭen merom bodako tahẽkana." 
Numbers7:88 Sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do jotote bargel ponea ḍaṅgra, turui gel bheḍa, turui gel merom boda ar turui gel mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon. Noako do pinḍ ojokʼ bahal tayom samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ar sanamakʼ sandes lạgitʼko ạgu ocolena." 
Numbers7:89 Ona tayom Mose do tinre Probhu Isor tulucʼ galmarao lạgitʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbuteye bolokʼkan tahẽkana unre sekʼwa sindukre menakʼ daya duṛupʼakʼ cetan Kerubkin tala khon uniyakʼ aṛaṅ do Moseye ańjometʼ tahẽkana. Ar nonkate Probhu Isor do Mose tulucʼe galmaraoetʼ tahẽkana. 
Numbers8:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers8:2 “Aron metaeme, diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ eae goṭecʼ diuhe do nonka dohoy hoyokʼa jemon onko reakʼ marsal do diuhe dohowakʼ samaṅ secʼ marsalokʼ.”" 
Numbers8:3 Aron do onkageye dohokeda. Moseye emocoakan Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage diuhe dohowakʼ samaṅ secʼ marsalokʼ lạgitʼ ona reakʼ mạlikoe jeretʼkeda. 
Numbers8:4 Diuhe dohowakʼ do nonka leka benao hoylena ona reakʼ ganḍo khon bahako hạbicʼ jotoge sona reakʼ koṭecʼ benaoakʼ tahẽkana. Probhu Isor do Mose cetʼleka nạmunae udukʼade tahẽkan ṭhik onkage diuhe dohowakʼ do benao hoyena. 
Numbers8:5 Probhu Isor do Mose galmaraoadeteye metadea," 
Numbers8:6 “Am do Israel hoponko tala khon Liwikom begarkoa arem saphakoa. 
Numbers8:7 Onko do nonka lekam saphakoa: onko cetanre saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼem irciyakoa. Ar ona tayom do holatʼte goṭa hoṛmoko hoyo saphakʼa ar kicricʼko saphaetakoa. 
Numbers8:8 Ona tayom onko do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar uni sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅko ạguiya. Ar am do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ armitʼṭen ḍaṅgram hataoea. 
Numbers8:9 Inạ tayom do ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅre Liwikom ạgukoa ar sanam Israel hoponko mitʼ ṭhenem jarwakoa. 
Numbers8:10 Probhu Isor samaṅre Liwikom ạgukoa ar Israel hoponko do onko cetanre akoakʼ tiko capoea. 
Numbers8:11 Ar Aron do Probhu Isor samaṅre Israel hoponko ṭhen dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Liwikoe samaṅkoa jemon Probhu Isorakʼ sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼko hoyokʼ. 
Numbers8:12 Ona tayom Liwiko do unkin ḍaṅgra cetanre tiko capoetakoa ar am do Probhu Isor ńutumtem samaṅkinạ, mitʼṭen do kại ńutumten dãṛẽ mente ar eṭakʼicʼte do Liwikoakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ńutumte." 
Numbers8:13 Am do Aron ar uniren hoponko samaṅre Liwikom teṅgo ocokoa ar Probhu Isor ṭhen dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate onkom samaṅkoa. 
Numbers8:14 Nonkate Israelko khon Liwikom begarkoa, ar onate onko do ińrenko hoyokʼa." 
Numbers8:15 “Ar Liwiko sapha baṛakate dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate onko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼko hoyokʼa. 
Numbers8:16 Sanam Israelko tala khon nokoge purạte ińrenko hoyokʼa, ar okoeren hõko baṅkana. Mimitʼ Israel maejiukoren pạhil koṛa hoponko bodolte iń do Liwikogeń hatao akawana." 
Numbers8:17 Pạhil janam akan nonkan mitʼke mitʼ Israel hopon do ińren kanako manwakorenge cetʼ ar mĩhũ-meromkorenge cetʼ. Misrikoren pạhil hopon gocʼko jokhecʼ iń do Israelren pạhil koṛa hoponko iń lạgitʼ iń begar dohoakatʼkoa. 
Numbers8:18 Pạhilreko janam akan onko sanam Israel hoponko bodolte ńitokʼ iń do Liwikoń ataṅ akatʼkoa. 
Numbers8:19 Israelko talare noko do Aron ar uniren hoponkoń dan akawatʼkoa, jemon onko do Israelko secʼ khon ńapamokʼ tạmbure onkoakʼ kại ńutumte puruchun reakʼko kạmi. Ar jemon Israelko sonot ṭhạ̃i ṭhenko senlenre hõ jãhãn muskil alo hoyokʼtako.”" 
Numbers8:20 Probhu Isor do Liwiko reaṅ Mose cetʼlekae hukumade tahẽkan Mose, Aron ar eṭakʼ sanam Israelko do onkage Liwiko hoteteko kạmi ocokeda." 
Numbers8:21 Liwiko do apnarko sapha maṛaṅena ar kicricʼko saphaketʼtakoa. Ar ona tayom Aron do Probhu Isor ńutumte dolek samaṅokʼakʼ lekate onkoe samaṅketʼkoa ar saphako lạgitʼ onkoakʼ kại ńutumteye puruchunkeda. 
Numbers8:22 Inạ tayom Liwiko do Aron ar uniren hoponko tabere ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmiko ehopʼena. Ar Probhu Isor do Mose cetʼlekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage onko do Liwiko hoteteko kạmi ocokeda. 
Numbers8:23 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaroadea," 
Numbers8:24 “Liwiko reaṅ do noa niạmge tahena, onko modre bargel mõṛẽ se ona khon bạ̃ṛti umerren hoṛ do ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmi lạgitʼko bolokʼa," 
Numbers8:25 menkhan mõṛẽgel bochor umer tayom do kạmi khon jirạuko ńama; ar bako kạmiya. 
Numbers8:26 Unre noko hoṛ do ńapamokʼ tạmbure akoren boehako sãote ńeljut kạmireko goṛo daṛeakoa menkhan jãhãn kạmire hat do bako lagao daṛeakʼa. Ar am do noa niạm lekage Liwikom bondobosakoa.” 
Numbers9:1 Israelko Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼen dosar bochor reakʼ pạhil candore Probhu Isor do Sinại reakʼ hahaṅkarre Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers9:2 “Israelko jemon niṭ akatʼ oktere bańcaokʼ porobko porobokʼ. 
Numbers9:3 Onko do niṭ akatʼ oktere, metakʼme niạ cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre siń cando hạsurokʼ tayom sanamakʼ niạm leka niạ porobko palonma.”" 
Numbers9:4 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do Israel hoponko bańcaokʼ porobokʼ lạgitʼe metatʼkoa. 
Numbers9:5 Onate bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre siń candoe hạsuren tayom onko do sinại hahaṅkarreko porobena. Ar Probhu Isor do Mose okalekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko do jotowakʼko kạmikeda. 
Numbers9:6 Ona jokhecʼ onko modren thoṛa hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ mạ̃ṛĩko joṭetʼletʼte ar besaphako tahẽkante enhilokʼ bańcaokʼ porob bako palon daṛeada. Onate onko do enhilokʼge Mose ar Aron ṭhenko calaoena. 
Numbers9:7 Onko do Moseko metadea, “Ale do mitʼṭecʼ mạ̃ṛĩle joṭetʼletʼte besaphare menakʼlea. Onate cetʼ Israelko sãote niṭ akan oktere Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ bale samaṅ daṛeakʼa?”" 
Numbers9:8 Moseye roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Probhu Isorakʼ hukum ạuripe baḍae hạbicʼ tạṅgi hataṛpe.”" 
Numbers9:9 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers9:10 “Israelkom metakoa, onko se onko bõsko modren jãhãege mạ̃ṛĩye joṭetʼakatʼ iạte besaphage menae khan se sạṅgiń reakʼ daṛan horreko tahẽkante bako porob daṛeakatʼ onko hõ Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobko porob daṛeakʼa." 
Numbers9:11 Onko do dosar cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre siń cando hạsurokʼ tayom noa porobko porobokʼa. Ar bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ ar haṛhatʼ aṛakʼ sãote bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ jelko joma. 
Numbers9:12 Menkhan setakʼ hạbicʼ do cetʼge sarecʼ dohokakʼ baṅ hoyokʼa se uniyakʼ jãhãn jaṅko hõ baṅ rạpudtae hoyokʼa. Bańcaokʼ porob palon jokhecʼ sanam niạmko manao hoyokʼa. 
Numbers9:13 Menkhan besapha hoṛe baṅkan se daṛan horren hoṛ hõe baṅkan ar bańcaokʼ porob bae manao, enḍekhan uni do niṭ akatʼ oktere Probhu Isor ńutumte bae samaṅletʼte acʼakʼ jạtrenko khone marao ocokʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ kại reakʼ kuṛạiye ńama." 
Numbers9:14 “Israelko talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãege Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobe porobokʼ, enḍekhan uni do porob reakʼ niạm lekate porobokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Israel ar eṭakʼ jạtren sanamkoge niạ mitʼ niạmge manao hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
Numbers9:15 Oka hilokʼ sekʼwa tạmbu, metakʼme goha tạmbu umul hoyen hilokʼge ona do Probhu Isorakʼ rimilte danaṅ esetʼena. Ar ạyupʼ khon setakʼ hạbicʼ sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre ona rimil do seṅgel muṭhạn leka ńelena." 
Numbers9:16 Ona tayom khon onkage hoyokʼ ehopʼena. Ar sekʼwa tạmbu do ona rimilte danaṅge tahẽyena ar ńindạ do seṅgel muṭhạn leka ńelokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:17 Ar sekʼwa tạmbu cetan khon tinre rimil ocogokʼkan tahẽkana unre Israelko do onḍe khonko uṭhạukʼkan tahẽkana. Menkhan okare ona rimil teṅgokʼkan tahẽkan onḍege onko doko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:18 Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekageko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekageko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana. Ar sekʼwa tạmbu cetan khon rimil ạuri ocogokʼ hạbicʼ Israelko do onḍeko tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:19 Sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre rimil tinre ḍher din tahenkan tahẽkana unre Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼko bataoetʼ tahẽkana ar bako uṭhạukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:20 Oka oka do sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre rimil thoṛa din tahenkan tahẽkana. Ar Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage ḍerareko tahenkan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ hukum lekageko uṭhạukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:21 Oka oka do ạyupʼ khon setakʼ hạbicʼ rimil tahenkan tahẽkana. Ar setakʼ bela tinre rimil ocogokʼkan tahẽkana unre onko do arhõko uṭhạukʼkan tahẽkana. Baṅ do sińkan ar baṅ do ńindạkan onko do rimil ocokʼlen khangeko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers9:22 Bar din hoyokʼ se mitʼ cando hoyokʼ se ona khon ḍher din hoyokʼ, tinạkʼ din rimil sekʼwa tạmbu cetanre tahenkan tahẽkan unạkʼ dinge Israelko do ḍerareko tahenkan tahẽkana. Menkhan rimil ocokʼlen khan onko do arhõko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Numbers9:23 Probhu Isorakʼ hukumtege onko doko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukumtegeko mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana. Mose hotete emakʼ hukum lekage onko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumko dohoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:1 Probhu Isor do Mose galmaraoadeteye metadea," 
Numbers10:2 “Rupạ reakʼ barea pepṛẽtʼ benao ocoyme. Israelko hoho jarwako lạgitʼ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolko uṭhạu ocoko lạgitʼ am do noam oroṅa. 
Numbers10:3 Tinre banar pepṛẽtʼ oroṅokʼa unre Israelko do jotoge ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen am samaṅreko jarwakʼa. 
Numbers10:4 Ar mitʼṭecʼ oroṅokʼre Israelkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsren mukhiyạko do am samaṅreko jarwakʼa. 
Numbers10:5 Pạhil dhao tinre pepṛẽtʼ oroṅokʼa unre okoe do purub secʼreko ḍera akan onkoko uṭhạukʼa. 
Numbers10:6 Dosar dhao oroṅlen khan dạkhin secʼren dolko uṭhạukʼa. Noa do hoyokʼa mohnḍakʼ reakʼ saḍege. 
Numbers10:7 Ar mitʼ domte hoṛkom jarwako khan banar pepṛẽtʼgem oroṅa menkhan onakin reakʼ saḍe do begar begarge tahena. 
Numbers10:8 “Noa pepṛẽtʼ do Aronren hoponko, metakʼme naekekoko oroṅa. Noa do amren ar am bõsrenko lạgitʼ jaejug hạbicʼ mitʼṭecʼ niạmge hoyokʼa." 
Numbers10:9 Apnarakʼ disạmre tahen jokhecʼ aperen bạiriko sãotepe lạṛhạire banar pepṛẽtʼ mitʼ dhaotepe oroṅa. Unre aperen Probhu Isor do ape lạgitʼe dạndikʼte bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạpea. 
Numbers10:10 Apeakʼ rạskạ ar porob oktere, ape lạgitʼ niṭ akan eṭakʼ eṭakʼ porobkore ar cando reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅre pepṛẽtʼpe oroṅa. Onate ape do Isor samaṅrepe hạjir ocokʼa. Ar iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do.”" 
Numbers10:11 Dosar bochor reakʼ dosar cando reakʼ bargelakʼ dinre goha tạmbu cetan khon rimil do ocokʼena. 
Numbers10:12 Ar Israel hoponko unre sinại hahaṅkarko bạgiyatʼte onḍe khonko mohnḍayena. Ar Paran hahaṅkarre ona rimil ạuri teṅgokʼ hạbicʼ onko do calakʼtegeko tahẽyena. 
Numbers10:13 Mose hotete Probhu Isor emakʼ hukum lekate onko do pạhil dhaoko mohnḍayena. 
Numbers10:14 Pạhilre do Jihudạ nisạnren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolko mohnḍayena. Onkoren mukhiyạ do Aminadabren hopon Nahasone tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:15 Isakar gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Juarren hopon Nethanel cetanre tahẽkana," 
Numbers10:16 ar Sebulon gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Helonren hopon Eliab cetanre tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:17 Inạ tayom do sekʼwa tạmbuko raṛa pheḍkeda ar Gersonren ar Merarirenko onako gokʼ idikeda. 
Numbers10:18 Ona tayom do Rubenakʼ nisạnren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolrenko mohnḍayena. Ruben gusṭiren mukhiyạ do Sedeurren hopon Elisure tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:19 Simeon gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Surisadaeren hopon Selumiel cetanre tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:20 Ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do tahẽkana Duel hopon Eliasaph cetanre. 
Numbers10:21 Noko tayom Kohatkoren do sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ sonot jiniskoanteko mohnḍayena. Onko seṭerokʼ laharege sekʼwa tạmbu do umul reakʼ katha tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:22 Noko tayom do Ephrayim nisạnren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolko mohnḍayena. Ephrayim gusṭiren mukhiyạ do Amihudren hopon Elisamae tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:23 Manase gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Pedasur hopon Gamaliel cetanre tahẽkana," 
Numbers10:24 ar Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Gideon hopon Abidan cetanre tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:25 Jotoko khon tayom do Dan nisạnren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolren hoṛko mohnḍayena. Noko do rurukhiyạ dol lekate sanam dolko khon tayomteko mohnḍayena. Dan gusṭiren mukhiyạ do Amisadae hopon Ahiesere tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:26 Aser gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Okran hopon Pagiel cetanre tahẽkana," 
Numbers10:27 ar Napthali gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ bhar do Enan hopon Ahira cetanre tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:28 Israelren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolko do nonkageko mohnḍalena. 
Numbers10:29 Inạ tayom Mose do acʼren hońhartetʼ Reuelren hopon Hobabe metadea, “Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm emale lạgitʼe gokʼ akawatʼle ale do ona disạm secʼle mohnḍakʼkana. Onate abenhõ ale sãote dela hijukʼ ben. Ale do abenle bhạlại bena, ente Probhu Isor do Israelrenkoe bhạlạikoa menteye gokʼakada.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ạliń do bạliń calakʼa. Ạliń do aleakʼ disạm ar ạlińren hoṛko ṭhengeliń ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
Numbers10:31 Menkhan Moseye menkeda, “Baṅ, baṅ, alo ben bạgiyalea. Aben doben baḍaea hahaṅkarre okare ḍerakʼ hoyokʼtalea mente, ar abenge aleren mẽtʼ lutur ben hoyokʼtalea." 
Numbers10:32 Ale sãote ben hijukʼ khan enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ale oka bhạlại lạgitʼe gokʼ akawatʼle ona reaṅ bhag hõle emabena.” 
Numbers10:33 Nonkate Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ buru khonko mohnḍayente pe din reakʼ horko sen idiyena. Ar jirạukʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaega sendra ńam lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk do pe din hạbicʼ onko laha lahate sen idiyena. 
Numbers10:34 Ḍera khonko uṭhạukʼre Probhu Isorakʼ rimil do siń bhor Israelko cetanre tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers10:35 Goha sinduk tinre mohnḍakʼkan tahẽkana unre Moseye menetʼ tahẽkana, “E Probhu Isor de beretʼme. Amren bạiri doko chirchạtur cabakʼma ar okoe amko kurudamkan onko do am samaṅ khonko ńir pharakokʼ ma.”" 
Numbers10:36 Ar ona rimil tinre teṅgo thirokʼkan tahẽkana unre Moseye menetʼ tahẽkana, “E Probhu Isor, ojut ojut Israelko ṭhen hecʼ ruạṛokʼme baṛe.”" 
Numbers11:1 Israelko talare oka duk ar kosṭo hoyokʼkan tahẽkan onate onko do Probhu Isor samaṅreko karacʼ kurujokʼkan tahẽkana. Ona ańjomte Probhu Isor doe edreyena. Uniyakʼ seṅgel do onko talare jolokʼ ehopʼena ar ḍeraren thoṛa hoṛ doko lo gocʼena. 
Numbers11:2 Noa iạte onko do Mose ṭhenko rakʼkeda ar uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda. Ar onate seṅgel do ĩṛĩcʼena. 
Numbers11:3 Probhu Isorakʼ noa seṅgel onko talare jolokʼkan tahẽkante ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Tabera hoyena. 
Numbers11:4 Israelko sãote eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren okoeko hoṛko tahẽkan onko do eṭakʼ lekan jomakʼ lạgitʼ laloc hecʼatʼkoa. Onko ńelte Israelko do rakʼate memenko ehopʼena, “Hae, jel baṛele jom ńamle khan!" 
Numbers11:5 Ale do Misor disạmre begor damte hakole jometʼko tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa taher, tormuj, kaḍa peaj, peaj ar rạsun reakʼ katha hõle disạyeda." 
Numbers11:6 Menkhan nonḍe do jiwetʼ hoṛmo udạs cabayentalea. Manna chaḍa ar cetʼge bale ńeleda.” 
Numbers11:7 Manna do ńelokʼte dhạniạ jaṅ ar guggul leka tahẽkana. 
Numbers11:8 Ar hoṛko do onako halaṅ ạgujoṅkan tahẽkana ar jantere ar baṅ khan ukhuṛreko huṛuṅ gunḍạyetʼ tahẽkana. Onko do celaṅre ona andakʼkate piṭhạko benaoetʼ tahẽkana. Ona reakʼ sebeltetʼ do sunumte benaoakʼ piṭhạ leka tahẽkana. 
Numbers11:9 Ńindạ do ḍerakore sisir ar ona sãote Manna hõ ńurokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers11:10 Moseye ańjomkeda mimitʼ gharońjren hoṛ do akoakʼ nij nij tạmbu ṭhenko rakʼjoṅ kana. Noa iạte Probhu Isor doe edreyena ar Mose hõ onkoreye ạṛisena. 
Numbers11:11 Uni do Probhu Isore metadea, “Iń amren golam do cedakʼ muhinrem paṛaokedińa? Am bekusi ocome leka do cetʼ iń ceka akatʼte, noko hoṛkoakʼ bojha iń cetanrem ladeakawạdińa?" 
Numbers11:12 Iń do cetʼ noko hoṛko kukhireń ńam akawana? Noko do cetʼ iń janam akatʼkoa? Nokoren hapṛamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ reakʼem gokʼatʼko tahẽkan onḍe hobor nunu gidrạko leka cedakʼ idiko lạgitʼem mitạńkana? 
Numbers11:13 Noko hoṛko lạgitʼ jel do okareń ńama? Onko do iń ṭhenko rakʼeda ‘jelko joma.’ 
Numbers11:14 Onkoakʼ bojha do ạḍi hamalgea, iń eskarte ona do ohogeń gokʼ daṛelea." 
Numbers11:15 Iń cetanrem nonkae khan nonḍe ńitge baṛe gojeńme. Ar amakʼ dayań ńamakatʼ khan ińakʼ mẽtʼte nonkan bạṛicʼ dosa do alom ńel ocoyińạ.” 
Numbers11:16 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Israelko talare okoe do mukhiyạ arko lekman hoṛkan onko modren nonkan eaegel murubbiko iń ṭhenem ạgukoa. Onko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen hecʼkate am sãote teṅgokʼ lạgitʼem metakoa." 
Numbers11:17 Iń do onḍeń pheḍ hijukʼa ar am tulucʼ iń galmaraoa. Am cetanre okoe Jiu menae uni do onko cetanre hoń emokʼa. Hoṛkoakʼ bojha gog lạgitʼ onkoge amren gokʼṛokoko hoyokʼa. Onate am eskar bojha gogokʼ do baṅ lagaoama. 
Numbers11:18 Am do hoṛkom metakoa, ‘ape do gapage Probhu Isor ńutumte begarokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe, ente gapage jelpe joma. Ape do Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼte jel reakʼ kathape menleda ar noa hõpe roṛleda, noa khon Misor disạmrege bhagepe tahẽkana. Onate ńitokʼ uni do jele emapea arpe joma." 
Numbers11:19 Ona jel do eken mitʼ din, bar din, mõṛẽ din, gel din, se bargel dinpe joma ona do baṅ," 
Numbers11:20 menkhan goṭa candoge mũ moca khon hirkhạge ạuri oḍokokʼ hạbicʼpe joma. Noako hoyokʼa ente okoe ape talare menae uni Probhu Isorpe nihạ̃t akadea ar uni samaṅre rakʼatepe menakada, Misor disạm bạgiyakʼ do ṭhikakʼ baṅ hoylentalea.’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Noa katha ańjomte Moseye menkeda, “Lạṛhại daṛeakʼ lekan nonkan turui lakh hoṛ iń sãore menakʼkoa, ar am dom meneda goṭa mitʼ candoge jelem jom ocokoa." 
Numbers11:22 Onkoren sanam mĩhũ-meromem gur lekore hõ onko lạgitʼ do cetʼge oho hoylena. Ar jalapuriren sanam hako sapʼkate ạgulekore hõ onko do ohoko anṭaolena.” 
Numbers11:23 Probhu Isor do Moseye roṛ ruạṛadea, “Probhu Isorakʼ daṛe do cetʼ komgea? Ińakʼ katha amre sạrikana se baṅa ona do ńitgem ńela.”" 
Numbers11:24 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do bahrete senkate Probhu Isor okae menketʼ hoṛko onae baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Uni do Israelkoren eaegel murubbiko ạgukate ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅreye teṅgoketʼkoa. 
Numbers11:25 Unre Probhu Isor do ona rimilreye pheḍ hecʼente Mose sãoteye galmaraokeda. Ar Mose cetanre okoe Jiue tahekan uni do onko eaegel murubbiko cetanre hõe emena. Ar tinre uni Jiu onkoreye hecʼena unre onko do thoṛa ghạṛicʼ lạgitʼ nạbi lekate kathako roṛkeda. 
Numbers11:26 Unre Eldad ar Medad ńutuman bar hoṛ do ḍera bhitrire kin tahẽkana. Unkin hõ bachao akan murubbiko modre kin tahẽkana, ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen bạkin sen akan tahẽkana. Enhõ unkin cetanre uni Jiue hecʼena. Unre unkin hõ ḍera talare nạbi lekate katha roroṛkin ehopʼena." 
Numbers11:27 Unre mitʼṭecʼ juạn hoṛ do dạṛ idikate Moseye metadea, “Eldad ar Medad do ḍerare nạbi lekate kathakin roroṛkana.”" 
Numbers11:28 Unre Nun hopon Josuạ do Moseye metadea, “E baba Mose, unkin thirokʼ baṛe metakinme.” Josuạ do juạn okte khon Moseren mitʼṭecʼ gokʼṛoyicʼe tahẽkana." 
Numbers11:29 Moseye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińakʼ manotge am ṭhen do maraṅena? Ińiń khojogokʼakʼ do noage Probhu Isorren sanam hoṛge jemon nạbiko hoyokʼ ar Probhu Isor do acʼren Jiu onko cetanreye emokʼ.”" 
Numbers11:30 Inạ tayom Mose ar Israelren murubbiko do ḍerateko ruạṛ senena. 
Numbers11:31 Tayomte Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ hoeye ạgukeda. Ar ona hoe do jalapuri khon gunḍri cẽṛẽkoe oṭaṅ ạguketʼkote ḍera beṛhaete mitʼ din reakʼ hor hạbicʼ nonkae ńurhạketʼkoa, onko do ot khon bar moka hạbicʼ lade ghuguko aṭetʼ tahẽyena." 
Numbers11:32 Enhilokʼ siń ar ńindạ ar ona dosar din hạbicʼ hoṛko do bahrete oḍok senkate gunḍri cẽṛẽko halaṅ ạguketʼkoa. Onko mimitʼko do mitʼ hajar irạl sae keji kateko halaṅketʼkoa. Ar onko do ḍera beṛhaeteko aṛetʼkatʼkoa. 
Numbers11:33 Menkhan onkoakʼ jelko togocʼ akatʼ ar ạuriko udrege Probhu Isor do hoṛko cetanre pit caṛhaoentaea. Ar onkoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa. 
Numbers11:34 Ona iạte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Kebrot-Hattawako ńutumkeda (mane do “Lalockoakʼ topa”), ar laloc iạte gocʼen hoṛ do onḍeko topaketʼkoa." 
Numbers11:35 Inạ tayom hoṛko do Kebrot-Hattawa bạgikate Hasoretre senkateko tahẽyena. 
Numbers12:1 Mose do Kus jạtren mitʼṭen maejiue baplaledea. Nui Kus jạtren maejiu iạte Mạriạm ar Aron do Mose upạrte katha roroṛkin ehopʼena," 
Numbers12:2 “Probhu Isor do cetʼ eken Mose tulucʼe galmaraoeda? Ạliń tulucʼ do cetʼ bae roṛakada?” Probhu Isor do noako katha reakʼe ańjomkeda. 
Numbers12:3 Mose do ạḍi mạ̃hir hoṛe tahẽkana, uni do dhạrtiren sanam manwako khon hõ mạ̃hirge." 
Numbers12:4 Aron ar Mạriạmakʼ katha ańjom sãote Probhu Isor do Mose, Aron ar Mạriạm takoe metatʼkoa, “Pe hoṛge ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen oḍok hijukʼpe.” Niạ katha ańjomkate onko do pe hoṛge onḍeko oḍok hecʼena." 
Numbers12:5 Unre Probhu Isor do rimil khunṭi khon ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen teṅgo akan Aron ar Mạriạme hohowatʼkinạ. Arkin hecʼ soren khan Probhu Isor doe metatʼkinạ, “Ińakʼ katha ańjom ben. Ape talare jãhãege nạbiye tahen khan iń Probhu Isorge dorson hotete uni ṭheniń sodorokʼa ar kukmũ talate uni sãoteń galmaraoa." 
Numbers12:6  
Numbers12:7 Menkhan ińren golam Mose sãote do bạń onka akada. Uni do ińakʼ gharońj reakʼ kạmireye pạtiạrgea. 
Numbers12:8 Iń do uni tulucʼ samna sạmni kathań roṛeda, jãhãn kukmũ talate do baṅ. Probhu Isor oka lekae ńel ocokʼ uni do onkae ńeleńkana. Inạ tayom hõ ińren golam Mose upạrte katha roroṛ do baben botorlena?”" 
Numbers12:9 Aron ar Mạriạm upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ pit do caṛhaoentaea. Ar uni doe calaoena. 
Numbers12:10 Ona rimil khunṭi tinre ńapamokʼ tạmbu bạgikate cetante rakabokʼ ehopʼena unre ńelena, Mạriạmakʼ hoṛmore murhucʼ jom rog do him leka ponḍge rakapʼena. Ar Aron hõ Mạriạm secʼe beṅgetʼketʼ khan hoṛmore murhucʼ jom roge ńelketʼtaea." 
Numbers12:11 Ona ńelte uni do Moseye metadea, “E ạlińren kisạ̃ṛ, bebuj iạte okaliń kại akatʼ ona do alom sabtạlińa." 
Numbers12:12 Okoe gidrạ do eṅgat kukhi khon adha jelge jomakantaye janam akan Mạriạm do onka alom hoeocoya.” 
Numbers12:13 Unre Mose do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoate Probhui metadea, “E Isor, uni baṛe bogeyeme.”" 
Numbers12:14 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Uniren apattetʼ uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhãreye thoae khan enḍekhan uni do cetʼ ona eae din lajao paṛare bae tahẽkokʼa? Uni do eae din ḍera bahrere dohokae hoyokʼa, ar ona tayom doe ruạṛ ạgu ocokʼa.”" 
Numbers12:15 Ona iạte Mạriạm do eae din hạbicʼ ḍera bahrete idikateye doho ocoyena. Ar uni ạuri ruạṛ ạguiye hạbicʼ hoṛko do bako uṭhạulena. 
Numbers12:16 Inạ tayom Israelko do Hasoret bạgikate Paran hahaṅkarte senkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers13:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers13:2 “Israelko okaṭakʼ disạm emakoń menetʼkan ona Kanan disạm cikʼyạ ạgui lạgitʼ am do gelbar gusṭirenko khon mitʼ hoṛkate mukhiyạko kolkom.” 
Numbers13:3 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum ńamkate Mose do onkageye kạmikeda. Uni do Paran hahaṅkar ṭoṭha khon okoekoe kolketʼko onko sanamkoge Israelkoren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. 
Numbers13:4 Onko doko hoyokʼ kana, Ruben gusṭiren Sukur hopon Samua;" 
Numbers13:5 Simeon gusṭiren Hori hopon Saphot; 
Numbers13:6 Jihudạ gusṭiren Jephun hopon Kaleb; 
Numbers13:7 Isakar gusṭiren Joseph hopon Jigal; 
Numbers13:8 Ephrayim gusṭiren Nun hopon Hosea; 
Numbers13:8 Ephrayim gusṭiren Nun hopon Hosea; 
Numbers13:9 Benjamin gusṭiren Raphu hopon Palṭi; 
Numbers13:10 Sebulon gusṭiren Sodi hopon Gadiel; 
Numbers13:11 Joseph gusṭiren, metakʼme Manase gusṭiren Susi hopon Gadi;" 
Numbers13:12 Dan gusṭiren Gemal hopon Amiel; 
Numbers13:13 Aser gusṭiren Mikayel hopon Sethur; Napthali gusṭiren Bopsi hopon Nabhi ar Gad gusṭiren Maki hopon Geuel. 
Numbers13:14  
Numbers13:15  
Numbers13:16 Mose do noko hoṛko Kanan disạm cikʼyạ ạgui lạgitʼe kolletʼkoa. Ar Nunren hopon Hosea do Josuại ńutumkedea. 
Numbers13:16 Mose do noko hoṛko Kanan disạm cikʼyạ ạgui lạgitʼe kolletʼkoa. Ar Nunren hopon Hosea do Josuại ńutumkedea. 
Numbers13:17 Mose do Kanan disạmte kolko jokhecʼ onkoe metatʼkoa, “Dạkhin nakha secʼte senkate buru ṭoṭhatepe rakapʼ calakʼa." 
Numbers13:18 Ar cetʼlekan disạm kana onape ńela. Arpe ńela, onḍe okoeko girobasokʼ kan onko doko nijorgea seko daṛeangea ar lekhareko komgea seko ḍhergea," 
Numbers13:19 ar oka disạmreko girobasokʼ kan ona do bhagegea se baṅa. Okako nagrahareko tahenkan onako do pạcri esetʼgea se baṅa? 
Numbers13:20 Onḍenakʼ otre bhage phosol omon akana se baṅa? Ar dare nạ̃ṛĩko menakʼa se baṅa? Ape do onḍenakʼ joko ạgui reakʼpe kurumuṭuya.” Onako din do darkha jo belekʼ reakʼ okte tahẽkana. 
Numbers13:21 Unre onko do senkate Sin hahaṅkar khon ehopʼkate Hamat secʼ Rehob hạbicʼ disạmko ńelkeda. 
Numbers13:22 Onko do dạkhin nakha secʼte senkate Hebron nagrahateko seṭerena. Hebron nagraha do Misor reakʼ Soan nagraha khon eae bochor laha reakʼ tahẽkana. Onḍe do Ahiman, Sesae ar Thalmae ńutuman Anak bõsren pe hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Numbers13:23 Ar mukhiyạko do Eskol buru lodamkote senkate darkha jo reakʼ thokako getʼkeda. Onko modren bar hoṛ do ḍaṅre gutukate onakin gokʼ ạgukeda. Ona chaḍa thoṛa dạlim ar loa jo hõko ạgu torakeda. 
Numbers13:24 Israelko do thoka sudhạ darkha joko getʼletʼte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Eskol lodamko ńutumkeda. 
Numbers13:25 Ar pon gel din cikʼyạ tayom onko do onḍe khonko ruạṛ hecʼena. 
Numbers13:26 Onko mukhiyạ do Paran hahaṅkar reakʼ Kadeste Mose, Aron ar sanam Israel ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar ona disạm reakʼ jotowakʼko lạiyatʼkoa ar jo hõko udukʼatʼkoa." 
Numbers13:27 Onko do Moseko metadea, “Okaṭakʼ disạmtem kolletʼle ale do onḍele senlena. Ona disạm do sạrige toa, dumur rasa ạtukʼ disạm kana ar eṭakʼ cetʼ jãhãn reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼa. Noako do onḍenakʼ jo kangea." 
Numbers13:28 Menkhan onḍe okoeko girobasokʼkan onko do daṛe hoṛ kanako ar onkoakʼ nagrahako do usul pạcrikote esetʼgea. Ar onḍe do Anak bõsren hoṛ hõle ńel akatʼkoa. 
Numbers13:29 Ar Amalekiko do disạm reakʼ dạkhin nakhareko tahenkana; Hittirenko, Jebusirenko ar Amorirenko do buru ṭoṭhakore ar Kananrenko do jalapuri aṛe ar Jordan gaḍa aṛeteko girobasokʼ kana.”"
