Numbers13:30 Unre Mose samaṅre okoeko hoṛ onḍeko tahẽkan Kaleb do onko hape ocoketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Onḍe senkate disạm bon dokholgea. Ona do khạṭige bon daṛeakʼa.”" 
Numbers13:31 Menkhan uni sãote okoeko senlen onko doko menkeda, “Onko sãote lạṛhại do ohoge bon daṛelena; onko do abo khonko daṛegea.”" 
Numbers13:32 Oka disạmko ńel ạguketʼ onko do Israelko ṭhen ona disạm reakʼ nindạu kathako roṛkeda, “Okaṭakʼ disạmle ciyạ ạguketʼ ona disạm do hoṛ jojom mitʼṭecʼ disạm kana. Okoe hoṛko onḍele ńel akatʼko onko do darmoṭ darmoṭ hoṛ kanako." 
Numbers13:33 Onḍe do Nephilimkoren bõsko hõle ńel akatʼkoa. Anak bõsren hoṛ do Nephilim jạtren kanako. Ona ńelte ale do sosrocʼ lekale bujhạuena ar onko hõ onkageko hudisketʼlea.” 
Numbers14:1 Niạ katha ańjomkate Israelko do rarakʼko ehopʼena. Ar goṭa ńindạko rakʼ aṅgakeda. 
Numbers14:2 Onko do Mose ar Aron upạrteko karacʼ kurucʼena. Ar jotoko mitʼkate unkinko metatʼkinạ, “Misor disạmre se hahaṅkarregele gocʼlen khan bhage hoykokʼa." 
Numbers14:3 Probhu Isor do cedakʼ lạṛhạire gujukʼ lạgitʼ ona disạmteye idiyetʼlea? Onḍenko hoṛ do aleren bạhuko ar gidrạkoko recʼlea. Ona khon Misorte ruạṛ calakʼge cetʼ bhage baṅ tahẽkantalea?” 
Numbers14:4 Onko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Dela, mitʼṭen mukhiyạ bon teṅgoyea ar Misorte bon ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
Numbers14:5 Niạ obosta ńelte Mose ar Aron do Israelren goṭa dolrenko samaṅre otre kin taberena. 
Numbers14:6 Ar okoeko hoṛ do disạm cikʼyạ lạgitʼko senlen onko modren Nun hopon Josuạ ar Jephun hopon Kaleb do ạkinakʼ kicricʼkin oṛecʼkeda ar Israelren goṭa dolren hoṛkin metatʼkoa, “Okaṭakʼ disạm cikʼyạ lạgitʼle senlen ona do ạḍi napae disạm kana." 
Numbers14:7  
Numbers14:8 Probhu Isor aboreye kusilen khan enḍekhan toa ar dumur rasa ạtukʼ ona disạmtegeye idibona, ar onageye emabona." 
Numbers14:9 Menkhan ape do Probhu Isor upạrte alope hula. Ona disạmren hoṛ hõ alope botorakoa; ente onko do bon kedokʼ mańjan daṛeakogea. Onko do ohogeko rukhiyạ daṛelena. Alogepe botorakoa ente Probhu Isor do abo soṅgere menaea.” 
Numbers14:10 Menkhan onko do Josuạ ar Kaleb dhirite tiń gocʼkin lạgitʼko mepenena. Unre ńapamokʼ tạmbu khon Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do sanam Israel hoponko samaṅre sodorena. 
Numbers14:11 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Onko do ar tinạkʼ din ińko nihạ̃tińạ? Onko talare cinhạkoń udukʼ akatʼrehõ ar tinạkʼ din ińre bepạtiạuko tahena?" 
Numbers14:12 Iń do onkore mahamạriń paṛao ocoya ar onkoń gokʼ akawatʼko disạm reakʼ ạidạri do onko khoniń recʼ ocoya, menkhan onko khon hõ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jạtrenkoge am khoniń sirjạukoa.”" 
Numbers14:13 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do Probhu Isore metadea, “Amem onkae khan enḍekhan ona katha do Misorren hoṛkoakʼ luturre calakʼa. Ente amren hoṛ do onko tala khonge amakʼ daṛetem ạgu akatʼkoa." 
Numbers14:14 Unre Misorrenko do ona katha niạ disạmren hoṛko lạiyakoa. Ar E Probhu Isor, niạ disạmren hoṛko ańjomakada, am do Israelrenko sãotem tahenkana, ar E Probhu Isor, am do samna sạmnim sodorakana. Onkoko ańjom akada, amakʼ rimil khunṭi do onko cetanre menakʼa ar siń do rimil khunṭire ar ńindạ do seṅgel khunṭire onko laha lahatem calakʼkana." 
Numbers14:15 Onate sanamko mitʼ sãotem gocʼko enḍekhan eṭakʼ jạtrenko okoe do am reaṅ kathako ańjomakatʼ onkoko mena," 
Numbers14:16 Probhu Isor do kiriạ akawatʼko disạmte bae idi daṛe akokante hahaṅkarreye gocʼketʼkoa. 
Numbers14:17 “Ńitokʼ do E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daṛe baṛe udugtam. Cetʼlekam menakatʼ, baṅma," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Probhu Isor do ạḍi anecʼ edrekʼicʼ ar dayateye kisạ̃ṛgea uni do behok ar hul ikʼkạyicʼ kanae menkhan dusiyicʼ doe sạjạiyea; ar apatkoakʼ kại do hoponko ṭhen pe pon piṛhi hạbicʼe pańja halayetʼkana.’ 
Numbers14:19 Misor disạm bạgiyakʼ khon ńitʼ hạbicʼ cetʼlekam ikạ akatʼko onkage amakʼ ona asambheṛ dayate onko hoṛakʼ ghạṭko ikạkatakom.” 
Numbers14:20 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Amakʼ katha lekage onkoakʼ kạiyiń ikạkatʼtakoa." 
Numbers14:21 Menkhan ińiń jiwetʼge noa katha cetʼleka sạrikan onkage goṭa dhạrti hõ ińakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼgea ar noa cetʼleka sạrikan onkage," 
Numbers14:22 noko hoṛren mitʼ hoṛhõ ona disạm do bako ńela, one okaṭakʼ disạm lạgitʼ onkoren hapṛamko ṭheniń kiriạlen. Ente noko hoṛ do Misorre ar hahaṅkarre ńelakʼ ińakʼ hahaṛa kạmi ar cinhạ kạmiko ńelkate hõ ińko nihạ̃t akadińạ ar gel dhaoko biḍạu aṭkar akadińạ. Okoe ińko nihạ̃t akadiń onko do okoehõ ona disạm bako ńel tioga." 
Numbers14:23  
Numbers14:24 Menkhan ińren golam Kalebakʼ monre onkanakʼ do bạnukʼa uni do purạte ińakʼ kathakoe senakʼkana. Onate uni okaṭakʼ disạmteye senlen ona disạmiń idiyea ar uni bõsrenko do ạidạri lekate onako ńama. 
Numbers14:25 Onako buru tala otetre ńitokʼ do Amelekiko ar Kananrenko girobasokʼ kana. Ape do gapage ạcurokʼte Arakʼ dõreao reakʼ horte hahaṅkar secʼpe mohnḍakʼa.” 
Numbers14:26 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaraoatʼkinạ," 
Numbers14:27 “Noko bạṛicʼ jạtrenko do ar tinạkʼ din iń upạrteko karacʼ kurujokʼa? Iń do onkoakʼ karacʼ kurujokʼ iń ańjomakada.” 
Numbers14:28 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Aron Israelko memene metatʼkinạ, “Kiriạkateń meneda, iń Probhu Isor oka katha roroṛ iń ańjom akatʼpe onageń onkawapea." 
Numbers14:29 Ape modren okoe do bargel bochor se ona khon ḍher umerrenko lekha ocolen, metakʼme okoe iń upạrteko karacʼ kurucʼlen, onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do niạ ṭoṭharege seyakʼtakoa." 
Numbers14:30 Ar girobasokʼ lạgitʼ oka disạm emapeyiń gokʼletʼ eken Jephun hopon Kaleb ar Nunren hopon Josuạ chaḍa ar okoe hõ ona disạmte bako bolo ńama. 
Numbers14:31 Aperen okoeko hopon ar hoponerako recʼ ocokʼ reakʼ kathape menletʼ onkoge iń do ona disạmteń idikoa. Onkoge onepe nindạu akatʼ disạmko ạidạri joṅa. 
Numbers14:32 Apeakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko do niạ hahaṅkarrege seyakʼtapea. 
Numbers14:33 Ar hahaṅkarre ạuripe gujukʼ arpe seyakʼ hạbicʼ apeakʼ bepạtiạu iạte aperen hopon ar hoponerako do pongel bochor hạbicʼ nonḍege bhiḍiko gupi baṛakoa. 
Numbers14:34 Disạm cikʼyạre oka pongel din lagaolen ona mimitʼ din reakʼ mitʼ bochorkate jotote pongel bochor hạbicʼ ape do apeakʼ behokakʼ lạgitʼ kosṭope joma arpe bujhạua daṛeakʼa, ape upạrteń teṅgolen khan oka hal hoyokʼtapea mente." 
Numbers14:35 Noko bạṛicʼ jạtren hoṛko okoe do iń upạrte dolko pakaoetʼ onko sanamkoge niạ hahaṅkarreń marao cabakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Numbers14:36 Disạm cikʼyạ ạgui lạgitʼ Moseye kolletʼko modren okoeko hoṛ do ạuṛiyakʼ kathako pasnaoletʼte Mose upạrte karacʼ kurujokʼ lạgitʼko uskurketʼko," 
Numbers14:37 metakʼme okoeko hoṛ do ona disạm reaṅ bạṛicʼ katha roṛ baṛae lạgitʼ dạyiko tahẽkan onko joto do Probhu Isor samaṅre mahamạriteko gocʼena. 
Numbers14:38 Eken Nun hopon Josuạ ar Jephunren hopon Kaleb jiwetʼkin tahẽyena. 
Numbers14:39 Mose do Probhu Isorakʼ sanam kathako Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Ar onate onko do ạḍiko bhabnayena. 
Numbers14:40 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ onko do ona buru ṭoṭha secʼ calakʼ lạgitʼ sapṛaoenteko menkeda, “Nõkʼõele teargea. Ale dole kại akada; ńitokʼ do Probhu Isore gokʼakatʼ disạmtegele calakʼa.”" 
Numbers14:41 Menkhan Moseye metatʼkoa, “Cedakʼ ape do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum upạrtepe calakʼ kana? Apeakʼ noa kạmi do baṅ jo bahakʼ tapea." 
Numbers14:42 Alope rakapʼ calakʼa, ente Probhu Isor do ape soṅgere bạnuiya. Bạiriko ṭhenpe bhagao ocokʼa." 
Numbers14:43 Onḍe ape do Amalekiko ar Kananrenko samaṅrepe paṛaokʼa. Ar Probhu Isor khonpe sahaṛ akante uni do ape tulucʼ bae tahena. Onate ape do lạṛhạirepe gujukʼa.” 
Numbers14:44 Enhõ onko do dilkate ona buru ṭoṭha secʼko laha idiyena. Menkhan Mose do bae senlena ar Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk hõ ḍerarege tahẽyena. 
Numbers14:45 Onko ńelte buru ṭoṭharen Amalekiko ar Kananrenko do pheḍ hecʼkate onkoko jhuṭiạuketʼkoa ar Horma nagraha hạbicʼko laga idiketʼkoa. 
Numbers15:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko noa katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Okaṭakʼ disạm do apeakʼ disạm menkateń emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe sen tayom kusi ocoyiń lạgitʼ jut so lekate apeakʼ palren ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko se meromko ạgukate iń ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ar samaṅokʼren mimitʼ janwarko sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ- baṅ do jeredokʼakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ baṅ do bises manotakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ baṅ do apnarakʼ kusiteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ baṅ do jãhãn porob reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼkan. Samaṅokʼicʼ janwar do bheḍa hopone hoylen khan uni sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ holoṅ hõ jạruṛa. Ona holoṅ do mitʼ keji irạlsae gram ar sunum do mitʼ liṭar lagaokʼa. Ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do mitʼ liṭer darkha rasa ạgui hoyokʼa." 
Numbers15:2  
Numbers15:3  
Numbers15:4  
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Janwar doe bheḍakan khan jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunumte sipiyakʼ holoṅ ạgu darae hoyokʼa. Ar pe keji turuisae gram holoṅ ar soa liṭar sunum ạgui hoyokʼa. 
Numbers15:7 Coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do soa liṭer darkha rasa ạgui hoyokʼa. Ona tayom Probhu Isor kusi ocoye lạgitʼ jut so menkate Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers15:8 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼren se bises manotakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ iń ṭhen ḍaṅgrape ạguye khan," 
Numbers15:9 enḍekhan ona sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunum mesalakatʼ holoṅ hõ ạgui hoyokʼtapea. Ona holoṅ do mõṛẽ keji ponsae gram ar sunum do mitʼ liṭer pe poa lagaokʼa. 
Numbers15:10 Niạ sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ liṭer pe poa darkha rasa hõ ạgui hoyokʼa. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so iń doń kusiyakʼkan. 
Numbers15:11 “Mimitʼ ḍaṅgra se bheḍa, ar mimitʼ bheḍa hopon se merom boda nonkage dãṛẽko hoyokʼa." 
Numbers15:12 Jãhãtinạkʼ janwargepe samaṅko mitʼke mitʼ janwar do niạ niạm lekage samaṅko hoyokʼa. 
Numbers15:13 Probhu Isor khusi ocoye lạgitʼ jut so menkate seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ oktere mitʼke mitʼ Israelko do noa niạmtege samaṅ hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers15:14 Eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãe hoṛ se ape talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jãhãe hõ Probhu Isor kusi ocoye lạgitʼ jut so lekate seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅ enḍekhan uni do ape leka jotowakʼge korao hoyokʼtaea. Ar niạ niạm do piṛhike piṛhi tahena. 
Numbers15:15 Ape somajre sanamko lạgitʼ niạ niạmge tahẽyena-baṅ do apere ar baṅ do ape talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare. Piṛhike piṛhi niạ niạm do tahẽidikʼa. Ona babotre Probhu Isor samaṅre ape cetʼleka onkage eṭakʼ jạtrenko hõ. 
Numbers15:16 Ape lạgitʼ ar ape talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼ inạ mitʼ hukum ar inạ mitʼ ạn-ạrige tahẽyena.” 
Numbers15:17 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko niạ katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Okaṭakʼ disạmteń idiyetʼpe onḍe senkate disạm reakʼ phosolpe jomre ona phosol do Probhu Isor ńutumte tulokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mentepe samaṅa." 
Numbers15:18  
Numbers15:19  
Numbers15:20 Pạhil rakabokʼ phosol reakʼ holoṅte do piṭhạ benaokate khạrại reakʼ tulokʼ samaṅokʼ lekage onape tul samaṅa. 
Numbers15:21 Pạhilre rakapʼakʼ anaj reakʼ noa samaṅokʼakʼ do piṛhike piṛhi iń ńutumte samaṅ hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers15:22 “Bhul iạte Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ noako hukum reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ bape manao ar ona hukum emokʼ hilokʼ khon piṛhike piṛhipe onkae ar ona bhul do sanamkoakʼ bin baḍaege tahen, enḍekhan ona baḍae tayom Probhu Isor kusi ocoye lạgitʼ jut so lekate goṭa Israel jạtrenko do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ạgukate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅa. Ona sãote jaoge jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ hoyokʼa ar kại ńutumte mitʼṭen merom boda hõ samaṅe hoyokʼa." 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24  
Numbers15:25 Naeke do goṭa Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ ona behokakʼ reakʼe puruchuna. Onate onko do ikạko ńama, ente baḍaekate do bako onka akada ar onkoakʼ bhul iạte Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅa." 
Numbers15:26 Noate goṭa Israel jạtrenko ar onko talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ hõ ikạko ńama, ente sanamkoge bhulreko tahẽkana." 
Numbers15:27 “Menkhan eken mitʼ hoṛ bhulkate behokakʼe kạmi akatʼ khan enḍekhan uni do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor umerren merom pạṭhi ạguiye hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers15:28 Okoe hoṛ bhulkate nonkanakʼe ghạṭ khan naeke do Probhu Isor samaṅre uni hoṛakʼ ghạṭ reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼe kạmikataea. Ar ona puruchun tayom uni do ikạye ńama. 
Numbers15:29 Andhateye ghạṭ akatʼ nonkan mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ lạgitʼ hõ inạ niạmge tahẽyena. Uni do baṅ doe Israelkan baṅ doe eṭakʼ jạtren kan. 
Numbers15:30 “Menkhan Israelko se onko talareko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko modren jãhãege baḍaekateye ghạṭ enḍekhan uni do Probhu Isore nindạuede kana. Onate uni do acʼ jạtrenko khone marao ocokʼa. 
Numbers15:31 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ kathae nihạ̃t akatʼte ar uniyakʼ hukume bebatao akatʼte khạṭigeye marao ocokʼa, ar uniyakʼ dos do unirege paṛaokʼa.”" 
Numbers15:32 Israelko hahaṅkarreko tahekanre mitʼ hoṛ do jirạukʼ mãhãre sahan ńam bakʼṛakane ńelena. 
Numbers15:33 Ar okoe uni sahan halaṅko ńelkede onko do Mose, Aron ar sanam Israelko ṭhenko idikedea." 
Numbers15:34 Menkhan nonkan hoṛ do cetʼ cekaye hoyokʼa ona reaṅ jãhãnakʼ baṅ men akante uni doko bondi dohokadea. 
Numbers15:35 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Uni hoṛ do goje hoyokʼa. Israelko ḍera bahrete uniko idiyema ar dhiriteko tiń gojema.”" 
Numbers15:36 Onate Israelko do Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ḍera bahrete idikate dhiriteko tiń gocʼkedea. 
Numbers15:37 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko niạ katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Ape do apeakʼ oyonakʼ reakʼ ańcarpe dạsiytapea ar mitʼke mitʼ dạsi do nil sutạmte kicricʼ sãotepe ḍuriyạkakʼa. Noa do piṛhike piṛhipe onkaea." 
Numbers15:38  
Numbers15:39 Dạsikope ḍuriạwakʼa jemon onakope ńellere ińakʼ sanam hukumko reakʼ kathape disại ar onape manao. Enḍekhan ape do ińre bepạtiạukʼte apeakʼ ontor ar mẽtʼ reakʼ rij roṅre bape ạkhrińokʼa. 
Numbers15:40 Unre ińakʼ sanam hukumko manao reakʼ kathape disạya ar aperen Isor ńutumte begar akan hoṛpe tahena. 
Numbers15:41 Iń doń aperen Probhu Isor kana. Ar aperen Isor hoyokʼ lạgitʼge Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼpea. Ar ińkangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do.” 
Numbers16:1 Liwi gusṭiren Jisharen hopon Korah ar Ruben gusṭiren Eliabren hopon Dathan ar Abiram ar Peletren hopon On do Mose upạrteko teṅgoyena. Korah do Liwiren hopon Kohatren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. Noko sãote barsae mõṛẽgel Israelko okoe do somajre manotan hoṛko tahẽkan onko hõko tahẽkana. 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Onko do Mose ar Aron upạrte dol pakaokate hecʼenteko menkeda, “Aben do ạḍi ben taṛam lahayeda. Goṭa Israel somajren mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do Probhu Isor ńutumteko begar ocoakana ar Probhu Isor hõ onko sãote menaea. Menkhan Probhu Isorren hoṛko cetanre cedakʼ apnarteben usulokʼ kana?”" 
Numbers16:4 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do otreye taberena. 
Numbers16:5 Uni do Korah ar uni dolren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Gapage Probhu Isor doe udukʼ abona okoe do uniren kanako ar okoe do uni ńutumteko begar ocoakana. Unige acʼren hoṛko acʼ samaṅreye sen ocoakoa. Ar okoeye bachao akawan unige acʼ samaṅreye sor ocoaea." 
Numbers16:6 E Korah, am ar amakʼ dolren hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ kạmipe. Ape do gapage Probhu Isor samaṅre dhup dạnire seṅgel ar dhuppe jereda. Ar Probhu Isor okoeye bachaoe unige acʼ ńutumte begar dohoakade hoṛe hoyokʼa. E Liwi hoponko apege ḍherpe taṛam lahayeda.”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Mose do Korah arhõe metadea, “E Liwi hoponko ńitokʼ do ińakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Numbers16:9 Ape lạgitʼ do cetʼ onage baṅ ḍhera je, Israelkoren Isor do somajren eṭakʼ hoṛko khon acʼ ṭhene begar ạguakatʼpea jemon Probhu Isorakʼ sekʼwa tạmburepe kạmi ar somajren hoṛko sapʼsorako lạgitʼ onko samaṅrepe teṅgo daṛeakʼ?" 
Numbers16:10 Uni do sanam Liwiko acʼ ṭhene ạguakatʼpea, menkhan ape do ńitokʼ naeke hudạ hõ hatjoṅpe meneda." 
Numbers16:11 Am ar amren hoṛkoge Probhu Isor upạrte dolpe pakaoeda. Ar Aron doe celekante, uni upạrtepe karacʼ kurujokʼkana?”" 
Numbers16:12 Inạ tayom Mose do Eliabren hopon Dathan ar Abirame hohoatʼkinạ menkhan unkin dokin roṛgotʼkada, “Ạliń do bạliń calakʼa." 
Numbers16:13 Niạ hahaṅkarre gocʼ ocole lạgitʼge nonkan disạm khonem oḍok ạguakatʼlea onḍe do toa ar dumur rasa reakʼ jãhãn okulạnge baṅ tahẽkana. Ar niạge cetʼ baṅ ḍhera? Arhõ aleren mạlik hoyokʼem monejoṅkana. 
Numbers16:14 Ona chaḍa toa ar dumur rasa ạtukʼkan disạmte hõ bam ạgu akatʼlea jaega-jumi ar darkha khethõ bam ạidạri ocoakatʼlea. Noko hoṛ do cetʼ kãṛãge dohokom khojkana? Baṅ, ạliń do bạliń calakʼa.”" 
Numbers16:15 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do ạḍiye edreyena ar Probhu Isore metadea, “Onkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do alom ataṅtakoa. Onko ṭhen khon iń do mitʼṭen gadha hõ bạń hatao akadea ar onkoakʼ cetʼ hõ bạń loksan akatʼtakoa.”" 
Numbers16:16 Ona tayom Mose do Korahe metadea, “Gapa amakʼ dolren sanamko Probhu Isor samaṅrem hạjirkoa. Ona sãote am ar amakʼ dolrenko ar Aron hõm hạjir ocoya." 
Numbers16:17 Mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ dhup dạnire dhupe jereda; ar jotote barsae mõṛẽgel dhup dạnire dhup jeretʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅre samaṅ hoyokʼa. Am ar Aron hõ dhup dạnire dhup jeretʼkate samaṅ hoyokʼtabena.” 
Numbers16:18 Moseyakʼ katha leka mimitʼ hoṛ apan ạpin dhup dạnire seṅgel ar dhupante ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr samaṅre Mose ar Aron sãote senkateko teṅgoyena. 
Numbers16:19 Korah do tinre Mose ar Aron upạrte somajren sanam hoṛko jarwakate ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhene teṅgoyena unre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do onko samaṅre sodorena. 
Numbers16:20 Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone metatʼkinạ," 
Numbers16:21 “Aben do eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko khon begarokʼ ben, jemon ńitge onkoń maraoko.”" 
Numbers16:22 Menkhan Mose ar Aron do otre ombakʼ hapeyentekin menkeda, “E Isor, am do sanam manwakoren babańcaoicʼ kanam. Eken mitʼ hoṛe kại akatʼte cetʼ goṭa Israel somaj cetanre amakʼ edrem sodortama?”" 
Numbers16:23 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers16:24 “Israelkom metakoa jemon onko do Korah, Dathan ar Abiramakʼ tạmbu ṭhen khonko ocogokʼ.”" 
Numbers16:25 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do beretʼente Dathan ar Abiram ṭhene senena ar Israelren murubbiko hõ uniko pańjakedea. 
Numbers16:26 Mose do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Noko bạṛicʼ ar ṭhok hoṛkoakʼ tạmbu ṭhen khon ocogokʼpe. Onkoakʼ jãhãnakʼ jinisge alope joṭeda; arpe onkae khan onkoakʼ kại iạte ape hõpe marao ocokʼa.”" 
Numbers16:27 Niạ katha ańjomkate hoṛko do Korah, Dathan ar Abiramakʼ tạmbu ṭhen khonko ocokʼena. Unre Dathan ar Abiram do ạkinren bạhu ar gidrạkowante tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen oḍok hecʼentekin teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
Numbers16:28 Mose do unre Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Niạtepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, iń okań cekayetʼ ona lạgitʼge Probhu Isor do nonḍeye kol akadińạ; noa do ińakʼ cetʼge baṅkana." 
Numbers16:29 Manwakoakʼ gujukʼ leka nokoakʼ gujukʼ hoylen khan manwako paṛaoako leka noko hõ paṛaoako khan enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa Probhu Isor do bae kol akadińạ. 
Numbers16:30 Menkhan Probhu Isor do jãhãnakʼe cekae ar ot do mocae cahabte onko sanamkoe utʼgotʼkako ar jiwetʼtege patalpuriteko calakʼ enḍekhanpe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, noko hoṛko do Probhu Isorko nihạ̃t akadea.”" 
Numbers16:31 Moseyakʼ noa katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege onko hoṛkoakʼ jaṅga latar reakʼ ot do bar hạṭińena," 
Numbers16:32 ar ot reakʼ moca do cahapʼente Korah gharońjren sanam hoṛe utʼgotʼkatʼkoa. 
Numbers16:33 Onkoakʼ oka tahẽkan onako sudhạ onko do jiwetʼtege patalpuriteko ńurena. Ar ona tayom paṛakʼ do bondena. Ar Israelko tala khonko marao utạrena. 
Numbers16:34 Onkoakʼ rakʼ ańjomte beṛhaeten Israelko do ãṭ aṛaṅte noa katha roroṛ tulucʼko dạṛkeda, “Ot do ape hõe utʼpea.”" 
Numbers16:35 Ar barsae mõṛẽgel hoṛ okoe do dhupko samaṅetʼ tahẽkan onko do Probhu ṭhen khon seṅgel oḍokente sanamkoe atar cabaketʼkoa. 
Numbers16:36 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers16:37 “Naeke Aronren hopon Eliasar metaeme jemon uni ona atar akan ṭhạ̃i khon dhup dạniko oḍok ạgukate torocʼko thoṛa sạṅgińreye uḍiạugotʼkakʼ, ente dhup dạniko do iń ńutumte begar dohoakana." 
Numbers16:38 Kại gunạkʼte tinạkʼ hoṛko gocʼen dhup dạniko do onko hoṛkoakʼ kangea. Menkhan Probhu Isor samaṅre hạjirletʼ iạte onako do uni ńutumte begar dohoakana. Onate am do onakom kuṭạm capṛa ocoya ar pinḍrem bạisạukakʼa. Jemon Israelko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ leka tahen.” 
Numbers16:39 Ar naeke Eliasar do onkoko atar gocʼ ocoyen hoṛkoko ạguletʼakʼ pitạl reakʼ dhup dạnikoe jarwakeda. Ar ona tayom doe kuṭạm capṛa ocoketʼte pinḍreye bạisạukada. 
Numbers16:40 Mose hotete Probhu Isor oka lekae hukumletʼ onkage uni do sanamakʼe kạmikeda. Noa do Israel hoponko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ dikʼsạwakʼ leka hoyena, Aron bõsrenko chaḍa ar okoehõ dhup jered lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre bako sen daṛeakʼa; ar jãhãegeye calakʼ enḍekhan uni hõ Korah ar uniyakʼ dolrenko leka hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers16:41 Inạ dosar hilokʼ Israel somajren sanamkoge Mose ar Aron upạrte karacʼ kurujokʼko ehopʼena arko menkeda, “Probhu Isorren hoṛ do abenge ben gocʼketʼkoa.”" 
Numbers16:42 Menkhan somajren sanam hoṛko tinre Mose ar Aron upạrte jarwakate ńapamokʼ tạmbu secʼko samaṅkeda unre ackage ńapamokʼ tạmbu do ona rimilte danaṅena ar Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok sodorena. 
Numbers16:43 Unre Mose ar Aron do ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅrekin hecʼena," 
Numbers16:44 ar Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers16:45 “Aben do noko hoṛko khon pharakokʼ ben; ńitge onko doń marao cabakoa.” Noa katha ańjomkate unkin do otre kin ombakʼena. 
Numbers16:46 Ona tayom Mose do Arone metadea, “Amakʼ dhup dạni hataome ar pinḍ reakʼ seṅgel ecʼkate onare dhup emakʼme ar usạra onko hoṛko ṭhen senkate kại ńutumte puruchunme. Probhu Isorakʼ edre do sodor akana, mahamạri ehopʼakana.”" 
Numbers16:47 Unre Aron do Moseyakʼ katha leka dhup dạnire seṅgel ar dhup hataokate onko hoṛko ṭhene ńir calaoena. Menkhan hoṛkore mahamạri do ehopʼakan tahẽkana, ar Aron do dhupe samaṅketʼte onkoakʼ kại ńutumteye puruchunkeda." 
Numbers16:48 Uni do jiwetʼko ar gocʼko talare senkateye teṅgoyena ar mahamạri do thirena. 
Numbers16:49 Korah iạte okoeko gocʼen onko chaḍa arhõ gelpon hajar eaesae hoṛ do mahamạriteko gocʼena. 
Numbers16:50 Mahamạri thiren khan Aron do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạrre Mose ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena. 
Numbers17:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers17:2 “Israelko ṭhen senkate onkom metakoa onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ khũṭko leka mimitʼ khũṭren mukhiyạ ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼkate jotote gelbar goṭecʼ ṭheṅga jemon amko emam. Ar am do onako ṭheṅgare onko mimitʼkoakʼ ńutumem ola. 
Numbers17:3 Liwi khũṭ reakʼ ṭheṅgare do Aronakʼ ńutumem ola, ente hapṛamkoakʼ khũṭ lekate mimitʼ khũṭren mukhiyạko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼkate ṭheṅga tahena." 
Numbers17:4 Ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ goha sinduk samaṅre okare ape sãoteń ńapamokʼ onḍe ona ṭheṅgakom dohoya. 
Numbers17:5 Ar ińiń bachao akatʼ hoṛkoakʼ ṭheṅgare do bhoṭokʼ sagenokʼa. Ar nonkate aben upạrte Israel hoponkoakʼ karacʼ kurujokʼ do iń samaṅ khoniń thir ocoya.” 
Numbers17:6 Mose do sanam kathako Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa, ar hapṛamkoakʼ khũṭ lekate onkoren mimitʼ khũṭren mukhiyạko do mitʼṭecʼkate gelbar goṭecʼ ṭheṅgako emadea. Ona ṭheṅgako modre Aronakʼ ṭheṅga hõ tahẽkana." 
Numbers17:7 Mose do onako ṭheṅga hataokate goha tạmbure Probhu Isor samaṅreye dohokeda. 
Numbers17:8 Ar dosar hilokʼ Mose do goha tạmbuteye boloyen khan Liwi khũṭrenko dohoakatʼ ṭheṅgako modre eken Aronakʼ ṭheṅgare bhoṭokʼ sagen akan, baha akan ar badam jo hõ bele akane ńelkeda." 
Numbers17:9 Unre Mose do Probhu Isor samaṅ khon joto ṭheṅgakoe oḍok ạgukeda ar Israelko samaṅreye dohokeda. Ar onko mukhiyạ do ona ṭheṅgako ńelkeda, ar apan ạpinakʼ ṭheṅgako halaṅkeda." 
Numbers17:10 Inạ tayom Probhu do Moseye metadea, “Ṭhoṭhok hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ ńutumte Aronakʼ ṭheṅga do arhõ goha sinduk samaṅre dohokakʼme. Onate am do iń upạrte onkoakʼ karacʼ kurujokʼakʼem thir ocoytakoa, onate onko do ar bako gujukʼa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Probhu Isor do Mose oka lekae hukumade tahẽkan onkageye kạmikeda. 
Numbers17:12 Noako ńelte Israelko do Moseko metadea, “Hae, ale dole gocʼena, arle maraoena, ar jotogele marao cabayena!" 
Numbers17:13 Jãhãege Probhu Isorakʼ sekʼwa tạmbu ṭhene sorokʼ uni doe gujukʼa; enḍekhan ale do cetʼ sanamkogele gujukʼa?” 
Numbers18:1 Probhu Isor do Arone galmaraoadeteye metadea, “Sonot tạmbu upạrte okako behokakʼ hoyokʼ ona reakʼ dạyi do am, amren hoponko ar amakʼ bõsren hoṛko cetanre paṛaokʼa. Ona chaḍa naeke kạmire oka behokakʼ hoyokʼ ona reakʼ dạyi hõ am ar amren hoponko gogokʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Numbers18:2 Amren hapṛamkoren khũṭko khon eṭakʼ sanam Liwikom ạgukoa, jemon onko do am sãote goha tạmbu samaṅre sapʼdapʼ kạmire am ar amren hoponko goṛo daṛeape." 
Numbers18:3 Onko do am tabere tahẽkate goha tạmbu reakʼ sanamakʼko kạmiya, menkhan sonot tạmbu reakʼ jãhãn jinis ṭhen se pinḍ ṭhen do bako sen daṛeakʼa. Arko senlen khan onko jotogeko gujukʼa." 
Numbers18:4 Onko do kạmireko goṛowama; ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu ńel jut reakʼ bhar, metakʼme tạmbu reakʼ sanam lekan kạmi reakʼ bhar do onko cetanre tahena. Menkhan Liwiko chaḍa ar okoehõ ape ṭhen do bako hecʼdaṛeakʼa." 
Numbers18:5 Israelko cetanre ińakʼ edre jemon alo sodorokʼ ona lạgitʼ sonot tạmbu ar pinḍ ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do ape cetanrege tahena. 
Numbers18:6 Dan lekate apeakʼ tire jimạwape lạgitʼ iń do Israelrenko mod khon Liwikogeń bachao akawana. Ar ńapamokʼ tạmbure kạmi lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen onkogeń samaṅ akatʼkoa. 
Numbers18:7 Menkhan naeke lekate eken am ar amren hoponge pinḍ ar orwal bhitri reakʼ kạmipe kạmi daṛeakʼa. Naekeakʼ hudạ do dan lekateń emape kana. Liwiko chaḍa ar jãhãege ona ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ ṭhạ̃iteye hijukʼ enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa.” 
Numbers18:8 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Arone metadea, “Iń ṭhen okako jinis samaṅokʼ ona reakʼ sanamakʼ dạyik ar bhar do amgeń emakawatʼmea. Iń ńutumte Israelkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sanamakʼ sonot jinis do am ar amren bõskoakʼ bakhra kangea." 
Numbers18:9 Sonot utạrakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ, metakʼme jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ Israelko jãhãnakʼge iń ṭhenko ạgui ar okaṭakʼ hạṭiń do pinḍ reakʼ seṅgelre baṅ jeredokʼ ona do apeakʼge hoyokʼa; ona do am ar amren bõskoakʼ kana." 
Numbers18:10 Sonotakʼ jinis cetʼleka jojom hoyokʼ onkagepe joma. Ona do aperen sanam herel hoponko jom daṛeakʼa. Ona do sonotakʼ mente bujhạu hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers18:11 Israelkoakʼ emakʼ dolao samaṅokʼakʼ jinis hõ amakʼge hoyokʼa. Ona do am ar amren bõskoakʼ bakhra lekateń emapekana. Amakʼ gharońjren okoe saphako tahen eken onkoge onako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers18:12 “Israelko do akoakʼ pạhil rakapʼakʼ khon bhage utạrakʼ jạitun sunum, nãwã darkha rasa ar anaj oka do Probhu Isor ńutumteko em ona jotowakʼ do amiń ematʼmea." 
Numbers18:13 Probhu Isor ṭhen ạguwakʼ onkoakʼ jumi reakʼ phosol hõ apeakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar apeakʼ gharońjren okoe saphako tahen eken onkoge onako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers18:14 Israelko talare sarapakʼko tabere lại sodorokʼ mitʼke mitʼ jinisko do amakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Numbers18:15 Probhu Isor ṭhenko samaṅokʼ mimitʼ pạhil koṛa hoponko do amrenko hoyokʼa. Baṅ doe manwakan ar baṅ doe janwarkan. Manwaren pạhil koṛa hoponko do khạṭigem chaḍaokoa ar besapha janwarren pạhil ạnḍiạ hoponko hõm chaḍaokoa. 
Numbers18:16 Mitʼ cando umerrenko hoylen tayom onkoakʼ chaḍaokʼ reakʼ dam lekate, metakʼme gel gram ojon reakʼ dhorom sekel reakʼ mõṛẽ sekel rupạte, manwaren pạhil hoponem chaḍaokoa." 
Numbers18:17 Menkhan pạhile janam akan nonkan ạnḍiạ ḍaṅgra se bheḍa se merom boda hopon chaḍaoko do baṅ ganokʼa. Noko doko sonotgea. Am do pinḍ cetanre onkoakʼ mãyãmem irciya ar seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lekate onkoakʼ itilem jereda. Noa reakʼ jut so Probhu Isor doe kusiyakʼa. 
Numbers18:18 Dolao samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ koṛam reakʼ jel ar jojomsa bulu reakʼ jel leka noako jel hõ amakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Numbers18:19 Probhu Isor ńutumte Israelkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sanam sonotakʼ jinis do am ar amren hoponkoakʼ jao okte reakʼ bakhra kana. Noa do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre am ar am bõsren sanamko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ bondobos kana.” 
Numbers18:20 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Arone metadea, “Israelkoakʼ disạmre am do okaṭakʼ sompotti hõ bam ạidạrijoṅa ar jumi reakʼ oka hạṭiń hõ bam ńama. Israelko talare iń kangeạń amren hạṭiń do, ar iń kangeạń amren sompotti do." 
Numbers18:21 “Israelkoakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń okaṭakʼ do ińko imạń onage iń do Liwikoń ematʼkoa. Ńapamokʼ tạmbure sapʼdapʼ kạmi bodolte onko do onako ńama. 
Numbers18:22 Ńit khon eṭakʼ Israelko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen bako sen daṛeakʼa. Arko senlen khan akoakʼ kại reakʼ kuṛại iạteko gujukʼa. 
Numbers18:23 Liwikoge ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ kạmiko kạmiya ar ona reakʼ behokakʼ lạgitʼ onkoge dạyiko tahena. Piṛhike piṛhi niạ niạmge tahena. Eṭakʼ Israelko talare Liwiko do sompotti reakʼ ạidạri bako ńama. 
Numbers18:24 Israelkoakʼ rojgarakʼ khon gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń okaṭakʼ do Probhu ńutumteko ạgui onage onkoń ematʼkoa. Ar onatege iń Probhu Isor do onko reaṅ iń menakada, Liwiko do Israelko talare sompottiren ạidạri bako hoyokʼa.”" 
Numbers18:25 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Liwiko noa katha galmaraoakoe metadea, “Israelkoakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińpe ńam tayom ape hõ ona khon gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅ hoyokʼtapea." 
Numbers18:26  
Numbers18:27 Noa samaṅokʼakʼge apeakʼ khạrại reakʼ phosol ar apeakʼ darkha lelen kunḍ reakʼ darkha rasa mente lekhakʼtapea. 
Numbers18:28 Ar eṭakʼ Israelko ṭhen khon onkoakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń okape ńam ona khon ape hõ Probhu Isor ńutumte nonkage samaṅ hoyokʼtapea. Niạ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń khon Probhu Isorakʼ hĩs lekate naeke Aronpe emaea. 
Numbers18:29 Jãhãnakʼgepe emocokʼ ona khon bhage utạrakʼ hĩs, okaṭakʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohoakan, ona reakʼ jotowakʼge Probhu Isor ńutumtepe ema." 
Numbers18:30 “Bhage utạrakʼ hạṭińko Probhu Isorpe emae tayom okaṭakʼ sarecʼ tahen ona do apeakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ phosol ar apeakʼ lelen kunḍ reakʼ darkha rasa lekate lekhakʼtapea. 
Numbers18:31 Ar apeakʼ gharońj reakʼ jãhã ṭhạ̃irege onape jom daṛeakʼa ente ona do ńapamokʼ tạmbure apeakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại kana. 
Numbers18:32 Onate apeakʼ jãhãn dosge baṅ hoyokʼtapea, ente bhage utạrakʼ hĩsge Probhu Isorpe emakawadea. Enḍekhan Israelko emakʼ sonotakʼ jinisko besonot reakʼ dusite bape dusi ocokʼa ar bape gujukʼa.”" 
Numbers19:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaraoatʼkinạ. 
Numbers19:2 “Niạ do iń emakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ạn-ạri kana: aben do Israelkoben metakoa jemon nonkan niphuṭ utạricʼ mitʼṭen arakʼ gạiko ạguam okoe do hoṛmore jãhãn dos bạnukʼtae ar uniyakʼ tarenre tishõ arãṛ baṅ lade akawade. 
Numbers19:3 Uni ạgukate naeke Eliasar ṭhenpe jimạyea. Ar ḍera bahre idikate uni samaṅrepe gurea. 
Numbers19:4 Ona tayom naeke Eliasar do acʼakʼ kạṭupʼte thoṛa mãyãm hataokate ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅre eae dhaoe irciya. 
Numbers19:5 Ar uni samaṅrege gạiyakʼ harta, jel, lacʼ ar gubriko sudhạpe atar giḍikakʼa." 
Numbers19:6 Uni gại tinreye atarokʼa unre naeke do debdạru reakʼ kaṭ, husopʼ ḍạr ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ sutạm ona cetanreye khadlekakʼa." 
Numbers19:7 Inạ tayom naeke do acʼakʼ kicricʼko dakʼteye saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa. Ar inạ tayom do ḍera bhitriteye bolo daṛeakʼa, menkhan ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akan tahen hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers19:8 Okoe uni gạiye atare uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼko saphae hoyokʼtaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Numbers19:9 Sapha menae nonkan jãhãe hoṛ uni gạiyakʼ torocʼko hạr samṭaokate ḍera bahre jãhãn sapha ṭhạ̃iteye oḍok idiya. Ar ona torocʼ do Israelkoakʼ saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼ benao lạgitʼe dohokakʼa. Noa do chut khon saphakʼ lạgitʼ beohar hoyokʼa. 
Numbers19:10 Okoe hoṛ uni gạiyakʼ torocʼe samṭao idiy uni hõ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Noage Israelko ar onare girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼ piṛhike piṛhi mitʼṭecʼ niạm do tahẽna. 
Numbers19:11 “Jãhãege jãhãn mạ̃ṛĩye joṭed enḍekhan uni do eae din hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Numbers19:12 Uni do tesar ar eae din hilokʼ saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼte saphakʼ hoyokʼtaea ar ona tayom doe saphakʼa. Menkhan tesar ar eae hilokʼ hõ apnar bae saphakʼ enḍkhan uni do besapha akangeye tahena. 
Numbers19:13 Jãhãege jãhãn mạ̃ṛĩye joṭed tayom apnarte bae saphakʼ enḍekhan uni do Probhu Isorakʼ sekʼwa tạmbui besapha ocoytaea. Ar onate uni hoṛ do Israelko tala khon meṭao utạre hoyokʼa. Uniyakʼ hoṛmore saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼ baṅ irci akawadete uni do besapha akangeye tahena ar uniyakʼ besapha do uni cetanrege tahẽ utạrokʼa. 
Numbers19:14 “Jãhãe hoṛ tạmbu bhitrireye gocʼlen khan noa niạmge manao hoyokʼa- ar okoe ona tạmbu bhitriteko bolokʼ ar okoe ona tạmbureko tahẽkan onko jotoge eae din hạbicʼ besapha akanko tahena. 
Numbers19:15 Ar onḍenakʼ okako bhajan do oṭakʼge tahẽkan onako hõ besapha akan hoyokʼa. 
Numbers19:16 “Lạṛhại iạte se ṭạnḍireye gocʼakan nonkanicʼe joṭetʼ akade hoṛ hõ eae din hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. Jãhãege topa se manwa jaṅe joṭed uni hõ eae din hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Numbers19:17 “Nonkan hoṛkoakʼ chut meṭaokʼ lạgitʼ do okoeṭakʼ gạiye atar ocoakan uniyakʼ thoṛa torocʼ miṭen celaṅre dohokate onare jharna dakʼ dulakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers19:18 Ar ona tayom sapha menae nonkan mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ do husopʼ reakʼ ḍạr ona dakʼreye topoya ar ona tayom do tạmbu ar ona bhitri reakʼ jinisko ar hoṛko cetanreye irciya. Manwa jaṅ se topa se mạ̃ṛĩye joṭetʼ akatʼ hoṛ cetanrehõ ona dakʼ do irciyae hoyokʼa. 
Numbers19:19 Sapha menae hoṛ do chut hoṛ cetanre tesar ar eae din hilokʼre ona dakʼe irciaya ar eae din hilokʼ do uniye saphakʼa. Ar okoeye sapha ocokʼkan uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea are ḍạbrạ saphakʼa ar enhilokʼ ạyupʼ khon doe saphakʼa. 
Numbers19:20 Besapha tayom jãhãe apnarte bae saphakʼ enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ somaj khone meṭao ocokʼa, ente apnarte sapha baṅkate uni do Probhu Isorakʼ sonot tạmbui besapha ocoyeda. Saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼ unire baṅ irci akante uni doe besaphagea." 
Numbers19:21 Israelko lạgitʼ noa do mitʼṭecʼ tahẽ utạrakʼ niạmge hoyokʼa. “Okoe hoṛ noa saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼe irciy uni hõ acʼakʼ kicricʼkoe saphaetaea. Ar jãhãege noa saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼe joṭed enḍekhan uni do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahena. 
Numbers19:22 Besapha akan hoṛ jãhãnakʼgeye joṭed onage besaphawakʼ hoyokʼa ar uni joṭetʼakʼ jinis okoeye joṭed uni hõ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ besapha akane tahen.” 
Numbers20:1 Bochor reakʼ pạhilakʼ candore Israelko do Sin hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ Kades ṭhen senkateko ḍerayena. Ar unre Mạriạm do onḍeye gocʼena arko topakadea. 
Numbers20:2 Ar onḍe dakʼ baṅ tahẽkante Israelko do Mose ar Aron upạrte dolko pakaokeda. 
Numbers20:3 Onko do Mose sãoteko jhogṛayena arko menkeda, “Probhu Isor samaṅre aleren boehako tinreko gocʼena unre ale hõle gocʼlen khan bhage hoekokʼa." 
Numbers20:4 Aben do Probhu Isorren hoṛko noa hahaṅkarte ben ạguakatʼlea jemon aleren janwarko sudhạ nonḍele gujukʼ. 
Numbers20:5 Misor disạm khon cedakʼ noa khaṅgoṭ jaegate doben ạguketʼlea? Niạ jaegare baṅ do jomakʼ menakʼ, baṅ do loa jo menakʼ, baṅ do darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar ḍạlim menakʼ; nonḍe do dakʼ hõ bạnukʼa.”" 
Numbers20:6 Noa iạte Mose ar Aron do onko ṭhen khon senkate ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenkin ombakʼ hapeyena. Unre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do unkin samaṅre sodorena. 
Numbers20:7 Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea," 
Numbers20:8 “Am do ona ṭheṅga hataome ar dadam Aron taben Israel hoponko mitʼ ṭhen jarwakʼ lạgitʼ metakoben. Ar am do Israelko samaṅre menakʼ maraṅ dhirim metawakʼa ar ona do dakʼe emokʼa. Israel hoponko ar onkoren janwarko jemon dakʼko ńũ daṛeakʼ ona iạte am do dhiri khon dakʼem oḍok akoa.” 
Numbers20:9 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Mose do uni samaṅ khon ona ṭheṅgae hataokeda. 
Numbers20:10 Ar unkin do ona maraṅ dhiri ṭhen hoṛkin jarwaketʼkoa. Ona tayom Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “E ṭhoṭhok hoṛko, noa dhiri khon cetʼ dakʼ liń oḍokapea?”" 
Numbers20:11 Niạ katha menkate Mose do tiye tulketʼte acʼakʼ ṭheṅgate ona dhirire bar dhaoe dalkeda; ar onate dhiri khon dakʼ do oḍokokʼ ehopʼena ar Israel hoponko ar onkoren janwarko ona dakʼko ńũkeda. 
Numbers20:12 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaroatʼkinạ, “Aben do iń cetanre baben bhorsalena ar Israelko samaṅre sonot mente baben manaoledińa. Onate Israelko okaṭakʼ disạmiń emako ona disạmte onko do baben idi daṛeakoa.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ar ona dakʼ do Meribako metatʼa (metakʼme, “Jhogṛa”). Nonḍe Israelko do Probhu Isor tulucʼko jhogṛayena ar Probhu Isor do nonḍege onko talare apnarakʼ sonottetʼe sodorkeda." 
Numbers20:14 Tayomte Mose do Kades khon hoṛe kolketʼkote Edom disạmren raj ṭhene roṛgotʼkada, “Amren Israel boehako kanale, ale do mitʼṭecʼ katha lạiyamle meneda. Am do aleakʼ duk reakʼ katha dom baḍaegea." 
Numbers20:15 Aleren hapṛamko do Misor disạmteko senlena ar onḍe do ḍher bochor girobas akanle tahẽkana. Menkhan Misorren hoṛ do ale ar aleren hapṛamko cetanre bebạṛicʼko beoharetʼ tahẽkana ar onate ale do Probhu Isor ṭhenle rakʼkeda. Ar uni do aleakʼ rakʼe ańjomketʼtalete acʼren dutko kolkate Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguketʼlea. “Ar ńitokʼ ale do amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ simạ ṭhen Kadesre menakʼlea. 
Numbers20:16  
Numbers20:17 Am do amakʼ disạm talate baṛe sen ocoaleme. Ale do amakʼ jãhãn phosol se darkha khet talate do bale calakʼa, se kuń reakʼ dakʼ hõ bale ńũiya. Ale do ḍahartegele parom calakʼa ar amakʼ rajosṭi ạurile taṛam parom hạbicʼ etom se końe secʼ hõ bale ạcurokʼa.”" 
Numbers20:18 Menkhan Edomren raj doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa, noa talate do bale parom calao ocoapea. Arpe parom calakʼ khan ale do lạṛhại lạgitʼle oḍok hijukʼa ar ape cetanre jhaple ema.”" 
Numbers20:19 Israelko do uniko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ale do sodor ḍahartegele parom calakʼa. Ale ar aleren janwarko amakʼ disạm reakʼ dakʼle ńũ emanle khan enḍekhan ona reakʼ dam hõle em oṭokakʼa. Ale do ekenle parom calakʼa, ar jãhãnakʼ do baṅa.”" 
Numbers20:20 Edomrenko do arhõko roṛgotʼkada, “Baṅa, nonkate do bale parom ocoapea.” Inạ tayom Edomrenko do lạṛhại phạdante akoakʼ daṛe udug lạgitʼ Israel hoponko upạrteko oḍok hecʼena." 
Numbers20:21 Ar Edomrenko akoakʼ disạm talate parom ocoako bako rebenlente Israelko do onko ṭhen khonko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Numbers20:22 Inạ tayom Israelko do Kades khonko uṭhạuente Hor buruko seṭerena. 
Numbers20:23 Onḍe Edom reakʼ simạna ṭhen Probhu Isor do Mose ar Arone galmaraoatʼkinạ," 
Numbers20:24 “Aron do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Okaṭakʼ disạm Israel hoponkoń emako onḍe uni do bae bolo daṛeakʼa ente aben do Meribare dakʼ iạte ińakʼ hukum birudben kạmileda. 
Numbers20:25 Am do Aron ar uniren hopon Eleasar Hor burute rakapʼ ạgukinme. 
Numbers20:26 Ar onḍe Aronakʼ hoṛmo khon naeke kicricʼem bojtaea ar uniren hopon Eleasarem horokʼaea, ente Aron do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calakʼa; ar onḍegeye gujukʼa.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mose do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekae kạmikeda. Onko do sanam Israelko samaṅre Hor buruteko rakapʼena. 
Numbers20:28 Ona tayom Mose do Aronakʼ hoṛmo khon naeke kicricʼe bocʼketʼte uniren hopon Eleasare horokʼadea. Ar Aron do ona buru muthniregeye gocʼena. Ona tayom Mose ar Eleaser do buru khonkin pheḍ hecʼena. 
Numbers20:29 Ar Israel hoponko do tinreko baḍaekeda, Aron doe gocʼena unre goṭa Israel jạtrenko pegel din hạbicʼ uni lạgitʼko homor halaṅkeda." 
Numbers21:1 Aradren Kanan raj do Negebreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ar Israel hoponko Athrim reakʼ horteko hijukʼ kana menteye ańjomketʼ khan uni do onko tulucʼe lạṛhạiyena ar onkoren thoṛa hoṛe sapʼ idiketʼkoa. 
Numbers21:2 Unre Israelko do Probhu Isor ṭhen manotketʼteko menkeda, “Aradren noko hoṛko aleakʼ tire bam soprotko, enḍekhan ale do onkoakʼ ato ar nagrahale marao giḍikakʼa.”" 
Numbers21:3 Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ nehõre ańjomketʼtakoa ar Kananrenko do onkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. Ar Israel hoponko do onkoakʼ atoko ar nagrahako maraoketʼtakoa. Ona iạte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Hormako (ona reakʼ mane do “ḍahao maraokʼ ”) dohokeda. 
Numbers21:4 Inạ tayom Israelko do Edom disạm aṛete ạcur senokʼa mente Hor buru khon arakʼ jalapuri secʼko laha idiyena. Menkhan onko do horreko edre-ạṛisente Mose ar Isor upạrte karacʼ kurujokʼko ehopʼena arko menkeda, “Niạ hahaṅkarre gujukʼ lạgitʼ do cedakʼ Misor khonem oḍok ạguketʼlea? Nonḍe do piṭhạ hõ bạnukʼa ar dakʼ hõ bạnukʼa, ar noa mitʼlekan jomakʼ iạtele ạṛis cabayena.”" 
Numbers21:5  
Numbers21:6 Unre Probhu Isor do onko talare mitʼlekan seṅgel bińkoe kolketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ gerte ạḍi utạr Israelko gocʼena. 
Numbers21:7 Unre hoṛko do senkate Moseko metadea, “Ale do Probhu Isor ar am upạrte kathale roṛ akatʼte ạḍile kại akada. Am do ńitokʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrokʼme jemon ale ṭhen khon bińkoe pharakʼko.” Unre Mose do hoṛko lạgitʼe nehõrena." 
Numbers21:8 Ar Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea, “Am do mitʼṭen bińem tearea ar mitʼṭecʼ ḍaṅrem akakaea. Ar biń ṭhene ger ocoakan hoṛ do uni bińe beṅgetʼae khangeye jiwedokʼa.”" 
Numbers21:9 Unre Mose do pitạlren mitʼṭen biń benaokate mitʼṭecʼ ḍaṅreye akakadea. Ar jãhãe biń ger hoṛge tinre uni pitạlren biń secʼe beṅgetʼetʼ tahẽkana unrege uni doe bogekʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers21:10 Inạ tayom Israel hoponko do uṭhạuente Obotre senkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers21:11 Ona tayom Obot khonko uṭhạuente Iya-Habarim reakʼ hahaṅkarre senkateko ḍerayena. Iya-Habarim do Moab purub hahaṅkar secʼre tahẽkana. 
Numbers21:12 Ona tayom onḍe khon uṭhạuente onko do Sered buru tala otetre senkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers21:13 Ar onḍe khon arhõ uṭhạukate onko do Arnon gaḍa paromkateko ḍerayena. Ar Amorikoakʼ disạm khon oka hahaṅkar ehopʼakan onare noa Arnon gaḍa hõ tahẽkana. Ona gaḍa reakʼ mitʼ secʼ do Moab ar eṭakʼ secʼ do Amorikoakʼ disạm tahẽkana. 
Numbers21:14 Probhu Isorakʼ lạṛhại ńutumanakʼ puthire menakʼa, “Nagraha secʼ sen akan Supha ṭoṭha reakʼ Owaheb ar Arnon ar ona reakʼ nalako ar buru nala reakʼ dhasna, noako do Moab simạnarege japakʼ akana.”" 
Numbers21:15  
Numbers21:16 Onḍe khon mohnḍakate Israelko do Beyar ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ kuń ṭhenko seṭerena. Niạ kuń ṭhenge Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea, “Hoṛko mitʼ ṭhen jarwakom, onko do dakʼiń emakoa.”" 
Numbers21:17 Unre Israel hoponko noa sereńko sereńkeda: “E kuń, bhumbuk rakabokʼme. Ape do noa kuń reaṅ sereńpe." 
Numbers21:18 Noa kuń do rapajkoakʼ cakʼlao ṭheṅga jorteko lakeda, noa do mukhiyạkoakʼ ṭheṅga jorteko kholao akada.” Ona tayom Israelko do ona hahaṅkar ṭoṭha khon Mathante," 
Numbers21:19 Ar Mathan khon Nahalielte, ar Nahaliel khon Bamotte, ar Bamot khon Moab reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍiteko calaoena. Ona otet Pisga reakʼ usul utạrakʼ buru khon hahaṅkar reakʼ Jisimon ńutumanakʼ jaega do ńel ńamokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Numbers21:20  
Numbers21:21 Israel hoponko do Amorikoren raj Sihon ṭhen hoṛ kolkateko nehõradea," 
Numbers21:22 “Amakʼ rajosṭi talate parom calao ocoaleme baṛe. Ale do hor bạgikate jãhãn jumi se darkha khet talate bale calakʼa, se kuń reakʼ dakʼ hõ bale ńũiya. Amakʼ rajosṭi ạurile parom calakʼ hạbicʼ ḍahartegele calao idikʼa.”" 
Numbers21:23 Menkhan Sihon raj do acʼakʼ rajosṭi talate Israelko bae parom ocowatʼkoa. Uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdante hahaṅkarre Israelko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena. Uni do Jahas nagrahare seṭerkate Israelko sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. 
Numbers21:24 Niạ lạṛhạire Israelko do uniko gocʼkedea ar Arnon khon Jabok gaḍa hạbicʼ uniyakʼ disạmko ạidạriyana. Onko do eken Amonrenkoakʼ simạ hạbicʼko ạidạriyana, ente Amonrenkoakʼ disạm reakʼ simạna do usạrateko parom hotʼ daṛeakʼ onka do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Numbers21:25 Israelko do Hesbon ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko sudhạ Amorikoakʼ sanam nagrahako dokholana ar onḍe girạbasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Numbers21:26 Hesbon do Amorikoren Sihon rajakʼ nagraha tahẽkana. Uni do Moab disạmren lahaten raj sãote lạṛhạikate Arnon gaḍa hạbicʼ sanam disạmkoe dokhol akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Numbers21:27 Ona iạte kạhtuk jokʼṛaoko doko menakada: “Ape do Hesbon nagrahate hecʼkate arhõ benao doṛhaepe. Sihon reakʼ nagraha hõ arhõ benao rakabpe. 
Numbers21:28 Hesbon nagraha khonakʼ seṅgel do oḍok hecʼente Moab ar nagrahakoe jarkharkeda ar Arnon gaḍa aṛe girobasokʼkanko do ona seṅgelteye atarketʼkoa. 
Numbers21:29 Hae hae E am Moab! E Kemos debotaren hoṛko, ape dope dhaṅdhaser ocoakana. Kemosren hoponko doko dạṛkeda ar uniren hoponerako do Amorikoren Sihon raj ṭhenko bondi ocoakana." 
Numbers21:30 Menkhan ale do onko upạrtele lạṛhại akana. Hesbon khon Dibon hạbicʼle dhaṅdhaser akada. Ar Medeba do Noph reakʼ ona jaega hạbicʼ calao akana, ale do onale dhaṅdhaser akada.”" 
Numbers21:31 Inạ tayom Israelko do Amorikoakʼ disạmre girạbasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Numbers21:32 Mose do Jaser nagrahate cikʼyạkoe kolkatʼko tayom Israelko do ona nagraha reakʼ aḍepase atokoko dokholana ar Amorikoko laga ńirketʼkoa. 
Numbers21:33 Ona tayom onko doko ạcurente Bason disạm reakʼ ḍaharteko laha idiyena. Unre Basonren raj Og ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko oḍok hecʼente onko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ Edrei nagrahareko seṭerena. 
Numbers21:34 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye galmaraoadea, “Og raj do alom botoraea, ente uniyakʼ disạm uni ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do amakʼ tireń jimạ akatʼkoa. Amorikoren Sihon raj, okoe do Hesbonreye rajokʼkan tahẽkan, uniyakʼ oka dosań hoyocoletʼtae onkage nuiyakʼ hõ hoyokʼtaea.”" 
Numbers21:35 Unre onko do Og ar uniren hoponko ar sanam lạṛhại phạdko gocʼketʼkoa. Ar celehõ jiwetʼ bako doholetʼkoa. Ar uniyakʼ disạm hõko dokholkeda. 
Numbers22:1 Inạ tayom Israel hoponko do Moab reakʼ buru otet jaegare senkate Jerikho nagraha samaṅ secʼ jordan gaḍa hanasareko ḍerayena. 
Numbers22:2 Ar Israel hoponko Amoriko cetanre okako cekaketʼ ona joto do Sipor hopon Moabren Balak raje ńelkeda. 
Numbers22:3 Ar nunạkʼ saṅge hoṛ ńelkate Moabren hoṛ do botor caṛhaoatʼkoa. Israelko ńelte onko do sạrige ạḍitetʼko botorena. 
Numbers22:4 Onko do Midiạnren murubbikoko lạiyatʼkoa, “Ḍaṅgrako ṭạnḍireko ạtiń leka noko dolrenko do abo beṛhaeteakʼ sanamakʼko siṭhạ cabaea.” Onate Moabren raj Sipor hopon Balak do Beor hopon Biliam hoho ạguiye lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Unre Biliam do Uphreṭis gaḍa aṛe reakʼ acʼren hoṛkoakʼ disạmre Pethor nagrahareye tahẽkana. Balak doe roṛgotʼkada, “Misor disạm khon mitʼ dol hoṛko oḍok hecʼakana. Ar goṭa disạmko chạplạu ạcur akana ar iń samaṅreko girobasokʼ kana." 
Numbers22:5  
Numbers22:6 Noko hoṛ do iń khon hõko daṛegea; onate dela hijukʼme ar onko sarapakome. Ar onka khan pasecʼ onko doń bhagaokoa ar ińakʼ disạm khoniń laga ńir daṛeakoa. Iń do noa kathań baḍaegea, am okoeyem bhorako onko do sạrige bhorko ńama ar okoeyem sarapako onkore sarap do paṛaokʼgea.”" 
Numbers22:7 Unre bhạg ńel ocoy lạgitʼ Moab ar Midiạnren mukhiyạko do ṭaka-poesa soṅgekateko mohnḍayena. Ar Balak okae metatʼko tahẽkan onkage senkate Biliamko metadea. 
Numbers22:8 Unre Biliam do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ńindạ do nonḍege tahẽ aṅgakʼpe. Ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe roṛ ruạṛạń onageń baḍae ocopea.” Onate Moabren onko mukhiyạ do uni sãoteko tahẽyena." 
Numbers22:9 Isor do hecʼkate Biliame kulikedea, “Am sãoten noko hoṛ doko okoe kana?”" 
Numbers22:10 Biliam do Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Moabren raj Siporren hopon Balak do iń ṭhen kathae roṛgotʼ akada," 
Numbers22:11 ‘ńelme Misor disạm khon mitʼ dol hoṛko oḍokʼ hecʼakana ar disạmko chạplạu ạcur akada. Onate ńitokʼ hecʼkate am do iń secʼte onko hoṛko sarapakome. Enḍekhan pasecʼ onko do lạṛhạiteń bhagaokoa ar nonḍe khoniń laga ńir daṛeakoa.’ ” 
Numbers22:12 Menkhan Isor do Biliame metadea, “Noko hoṛ sãote alom calakʼa ar onko hoṛ hõ jãhãnakʼ alom sarapakoa, ente onko do ińren bhoran hoṛ kanako.”" 
Numbers22:13 Dosar hilokʼ Biliam do setakʼ jạpitʼ khon beretʼkate Balake kolakatʼko mukhiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do apeakʼ disạmte ruạṛ calakʼpe. Ente Probhu Isor do ape sãote sen ocoạń do bae rebenkana.”" 
Numbers22:14 Moabren mukhiyạko do ruạṛ calaoente Balakko lạiyadea, “Biliam do ale sãote hijukʼ bae rebenlena.”" 
Numbers22:15 Unre Balak do arhõ eṭakʼ mukhiyạkoe kolketʼkoa. Onko do lahaten mukhiyạko khon lekhate jemon ḍher onkage manotan hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Numbers22:16 Onko do Biliam ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Sipor hopon Balak do noa kathae meneda, uni ṭhen calakʼ jãhãnakʼge jemon aloe tạkicʼme." 
Numbers22:17 Uni do ạḍiye manotmea ar okam khoj onageye onkawama. Uni doe khojkana jemon senkate uni secʼ khon onko hoṛkom sarapako.” 
Numbers22:18 Biliame roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Balak do sona rupạte perecʼ acʼakʼ raj oṛakʼe imạńre hõ iń do ińren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bahre senkate jãhãnakʼ ohogeń cekalea- baṅ do huḍińakʼkan ar baṅ do maraṅakʼ kạmikan." 
Numbers22:19 Tobe ape hõ ńindạ do nonḍege tahẽ aṅgakʼpe; ente Probhu Isor okae mitạń onage apeń baḍae ocopea.” 
Numbers22:20 Ona ńindạ Isor do hecʼkate Biliame galmaraoadea, “Noko hoṛ hõ hohoam lạgitʼko hecʼakana onate onko sãote calakʼme, menkhan iń okań metam eken onagem kạmiya.”" 
Numbers22:21 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre Biliam do jạpitʼ khone beretʼente acʼren gadha eṅgare decʼkate Moabren mukhiyạko sãoteye mohnḍayena," 
Numbers22:22 menkhan uni calakʼe ńelkede khan Isor do uni cetanreye edreyena. Ar uni tạkicʼ darame lạgitʼ Probhu Isorren goḍet do horreye teṅgoyena. Biliam do gadha eṅgare decʼkateye calakʼkan tahẽkana. Ar acʼren barea gutikin hõ acʼ sãotekin tahẽkana. 
Numbers22:23 Gadha eṅga do Probhu Isorren goḍet tarwaṛe sapʼkate teṅgo akane ńelkede khan hor bạgikate eṭakʼ secʼe pheḍena. Ar Biliam do gadha eṅga arhõ horte calakʼ lạgitʼe dalkedea. 
Numbers22:24 Probhu Isorren goḍet do ona tayom barea darkha khet reakʼ nanha hor talareye teṅgoyena. Ar ona hor reakʼ banarsa aṛe do pạcri tahẽkana. 
Numbers22:25 Gadha eṅga do Probhu Isorren goḍete ńelkede khan pạcri aṛe ńokʼte calakʼe ehopʼena. Onate Biliam do mitʼ jaṅga gasaoentaea. Unre Biliam do arhõ gadha eṅgae dalkedea. 
Numbers22:26 Inạ tayom Probhu Isorren goḍet doe sen lahayente nonkan mitʼṭecʼ nanha horreye teṅgoyena onḍe do leṅgasa se jojomsa ạcurokʼ reakʼ jãhãn jaegage baṅ tahẽkana. 
Numbers22:27 Unre gadha eṅga do Probhu Isorren goḍet ńelte Biliam sudhại burumena. Onate Biliam doe raṅgaoena ar ṭheṅgate gadha eṅga arhõe dalkedea. 
Numbers22:28 Probhu Isor do gadha eṅgawakʼ mocae jhicʼketʼtaea. Uni do Biliame metadea, “Cetʼ iń cekaketʼmete am do pepe dhaoem dalkedińa?”" 
Numbers22:29 Biliam do gadha eṅgae roṛ ruạṛadea, “Am do bokam ńam akadińạ. Ińakʼ tire tarwaṛe tahẽlen khan enḍekhan ńitge amiń samakʼ gocʼkema.”" 
Numbers22:30 Gadha eṅga do Biliame metadea, “Iń do cetʼ amren uni gadha doń baṅkana one iń cetanre jonom bhorem dejokʼkan? Am sãote cetʼ jãhãtisiń nonka akatʼa?” Biliame menkeda, “Baṅ, onka do bam onka akada.”" 
Numbers22:31 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Biliamakʼ mẽtʼe jhicʼketʼtaea ar Probhu Isorren goḍet do tire tarwaṛeante horre teṅgo akane ńelkedea. Ar onate uni doe ombakʼena ar otreye taberena. 
Numbers22:32 Probhu Isorren goḍet do uniye kulikedea, “Amren gadha eṅga do pe dhao cedakʼem dalkedea? Am do iń samaṅrege iń upạrtem calakʼkante am tạkicʼ darame lạgitʼ iń hecʼakana." 
Numbers22:33 Gadha eṅga do iń ńelte pepe dhaoge iń samaṅ khone sahaṛ akana. Uni bae ocokʼlen khan, khạṭige am doń gocʼkema ar gadha do jiwetʼiń dohokea.”" 
Numbers22:34 Unre Biliam do Probhu Isorren goḍete metadea, “Iń doń kại akada. Bạń bujhạu daṛeada, am dom tạkicʼ daram edeńkana mente. Ińre kusi bạnum khan enḍekhan iń doń ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
Numbers22:35 Probhu Isorren goḍet do Biliame metadea, “Am do onko hoṛko sãote calakʼme, menkhan iń okaṭakʼ iń metam eken onagem roṛa.” Unre Biliam do Balake kolletʼko mukhiyạko sãoteye calaoena." 
Numbers22:36 Biliamakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ kathae ańjomketʼ khan Balak do daram ạguiye lạgitʼ Arnon gaḍa aṛere Moabrenkoakʼ nagrahateye oḍokʼ senena. Noa nagraha do acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ ses simạna tahẽkana. 
Numbers22:37 Balak do Biliame metadea, “Iń do cetʼ usạra bạń tolob akatʼmea? Tobe cedakʼ iń ṭhen do bam hecʼlena? Am puruskarme reakʼ daṛe do cetʼ bạnukʼtińạ?”" 
Numbers22:38 Biliame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do ńitokʼ am ṭheniń hecʼakana. Menkhan iń apnarakʼ jãhãnakʼ roroṛ reakʼ daṛe do bạnukʼtińạ. Isor okaṭakʼe baḍae ocoyiń eken onageń roṛa.”" 
Numbers22:39 Inạ tayom Biliam do Balak sãote Kiriat Husot atoteye calaoena. 
Numbers22:40 Balak do ḍaṅgra ar bheḍae dãṛẽketʼkoa ar thoṛa jel do Biliam ar uni sãote okoeko mukhiyạko tahekan onkoe ematʼkoa. 
Numbers22:41 Ar dosar hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ Balak do Biliame soṅgekedete Bamot Bakʼal buruteye rakapʼena. Ar Biliam do onḍe khon Israelkoren eken mitʼ hĩs hoṛgeye ńelketʼkoa. 
Numbers23:1 Ona tayom Biliam do Balake metadea, “Nonḍe iń lạgitʼ eae goṭecʼ pinḍ benaome ar onare samaṅko lạgitʼ eae goṭecʼ ḍaṅgra ar eae goṭecʼ bheḍa bondobosạńme.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balak do Biliamakʼ katha lekageye kạmikeda ar unkin do mimitʼ pinḍre mimitʼ goṭecʼ ḍaṅgra ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ bheḍakin samaṅketʼkoa. 
Numbers23:3 Ona tayom Biliam do Balake metadea, “Okoe janwarkoante jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼem samaṅketʼ am do onko ṭhenge tahẽhataṛokʼme ar iń do onteń senlenge. Pasecʼ Probhu Isor do iń sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼgeye hijukʼkan. Ar iń ṭhen okae sodor onage amiń lạiyama.” Niạ katha menkate Biliam do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ burureye rakapʼena one onare jãhãn dare nạ̃ṛĩge baṅ tahẽkan." 
Numbers23:4 Unre Isor do uni sãoteye ńapamena. Ar Biliam doe menkeda, “Iń do eae goṭecʼ pinḍ iń benao akada ar mitʼke mitʼ pinḍ cetanre mitʼṭenkate ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭenkate bheḍań samaṅketʼkoa.”" 
Numbers23:5 Unre Probhu Isor do Biliamakʼ mocare katha dohoadeteye metadea, “Am do Balak ṭhen ruạṛ senkate noako katha lạiyaeme.”" 
Numbers23:6 Unre Biliam do Balak ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena. Are ńelkeda, Balak do Moabren sanam mukhiyạko tulucʼ samaṅ akatʼko janwar ṭhene teṅgo akana." 
Numbers23:7 Unre Biliam do Isor emakʼ noa katha roroṛe ehopʼena: “Balak do Aram disạm khon ińe ạgukedińạ, purub reakʼ buruko khon Moab raj do ińe ạgukedińạ. Uni doe menkeda, ‘iń ńutumte dela Jakob sarapaeme, Israelrenko upạrte bin bhạlạiyakʼ katha baṛe lạiyạńme.’" 
Numbers23:8 Isor bae sarap akatʼko hoṛ do, cekateń sarapakoa? Probhu Isor okoe upạrte bin bhạlại reakʼ katha bae roṛakatʼ, onko upạrte cekate iń do bin bhạlại reakʼ katha doń roṛa?" 
Numbers23:9 Iń do buru muthni khoniń ńelketʼkoa; ar buru cetan khon onkoń ạribạndhi akatʼkoa. Nonkan mitʼṭen jạtrenkoń ńelketʼkoa okoe do eṭakʼko khon pharakreko tahenkan; onko do eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko sãote midokʼko lekako baṅkana. 
Numbers23:10 Jakob bõsrenko do alekha dhuṛi leka onko do okoeye lekha daṛekekoa? Israelakʼ pon hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińhõ cetʼ jãhãeye lekha daṛekekoa? Onko dhorom hoṛko lekage ińakʼ gujukʼ hõ baṛe hoyokʼtińma; ar ińakʼ sesokʼ hõ onko lekage hoyokʼma.” 
Numbers23:11 Noa katha ańjomkate Balak do Biliame metadea, “Noa do cetʼem cekawạdińa? Iń do ińren bạiriko sarapako lạgitʼ iń ạguketʼmea ar am do onkom bhoratʼkoa.”" 
Numbers23:12 Biliame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor ińakʼ mocare okaṭakʼ kathae emadiń ona do cetʼ begor lạiyteń tahẽdaṛeakʼa?”" 
Numbers23:13 Tayomte Balak do Biliame metadea, “Dela iń sãote ar mitʼ jaegare hijukʼme. Onḍe khon am do Israelkom ńelkoa. Onkoren sanamkogem ńelńamkoa ona do baṅ, eken onkoren mitʼ mucạtʼrengem ńelńam daṛeakoa. Ar onḍe khon iń ńutumte onkom sarapakoa.”" 
Numbers23:14 Niạ menkate Balak do Pisga buru muthnire okare Sophim ṭạnḍi menakʼ onḍe uniye idikedea. Onḍe uni do eae goṭecʼ pinḍ benaokate mimitʼ goṭecʼ cetanre mitʼṭenkate ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭenkate bheḍae samaṅketʼkoa. 
Numbers23:15 Ona tayom Biliam do Balake metadea, “Am do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ janwarko sorrege tahẽhataṛokʼme, ar iń do Probhu Isor sãoteń ńapam hecʼlenge.”" 
Numbers23:16 Probhu Isor do Biliam sãoteye ńapamente uniyakʼ mocare kathae dohoadea, “Am do Balak ṭhen ruạṛ senkate noa katham lạiyaea.”" 
Numbers23:17 Khan Biliam do Balak ṭhene ruạṛ senena. Uni doe ńelkeda Balak do Moabren mukhiyạkoante samaṅakatʼko janwar ṭhengeye teṅgo akana. Balak do uniye kulikedea, “Probhu Isor do cetʼe metatʼmea?”" 
Numbers23:18 Biliam do unre Isor emakʼ niạ katha lạlạiye ehopʼkeda: “E Balak raj ma beretʼme, ar ańjomme; E Sipor hopon, ińakʼ katha baṛe luturakʼme." 
Numbers23:19 Isor do manwae baṅkana onate uni do eṛe kathae roṛa; uni do manwa khon hõ bae janam akana, onate moneye bodoltaea. Uni okae men ona do hoyokʼgea, ar acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ do jaogeye purạueda." 
Numbers23:20 Iń do onko ạsirbadako lạgitʼ hukum iń ńam akada. Uni do Israelkoe bhor akawatʼkoa, iń do bạń bodol daṛeakʼa." 
Numbers23:21 Uni do Jakobre cetʼ ghạṭge bae ńel akada, ar Israelkoakʼ bhạgre jãhãn dukge bae dohoakada. Onkoren Probhu Isor do onko sãorege menaea, ar onkoren rajakʼ sạhnạs do onko ṭhenge menakʼa." 
Numbers23:22 Uni do Misor khon onkoe oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa, bir ḍaṅgrawakʼ daṛe leka onkoakʼ daṛe do." 
Numbers23:23 Jakob cetanre jãhãn gonokko do ohoge cahṭao daṛelena; Israelko cetanre jãhãn mantar hõ ohoge cahṭaolena. Jakob, metakʼme Israel reaṅ do ńitokʼ noa katha menogokʼa, ‘Isor okae ceka akatʼ ona ńelme.’" 
Numbers23:24 Noko hoṛko do kul eṅga lekako teṅgo rakapʼa, ar dhạcri kul lekage onko doko beretʼa. Sendra gocʼko reakʼ mãyãm ar jel ạuriko jom hạbicʼ onko do bako jirạukʼa.”" 
Numbers23:25 Niạ katha ańjomkate Balak doe menkeda, “Thirokʼme, onko do sarap hõ alom sarapakoa ar bhor hõ alom bhorakoa.”" 
Numbers23:26 Biliame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do cetʼ bạń lạiyatʼmea, Probhu Isor okae mitạń onage roroṛ hoyokʼtińạ mente?”" 
Numbers23:27 Tayomte Balak do Biliame metadea, “Dela, ar mitʼ jaegateń idimea. Pasecʼ Isor do kusite onḍe khon iń ńutumte onkoe sarapako.”" 
Numbers23:28 Niạ menkate Balak do Piạr burute one onḍe khon hahaṅkar reakʼ Jisimon ńel ńamokʼ onḍe Biliame idikedea. 
Numbers23:29 Unre Biliame menkeda, “Nonḍe iń lạgitʼ eae goṭecʼ pinḍ benaome ar eae goṭen ḍaṅgra ar eae goṭen bheḍa samaṅko lạgitʼ bondobosạńme.”" 
Numbers23:30 Biliamakʼ katha lekage Balak doe onkakeda. Uni do mimitʼ pinḍre mimitʼ goṭen ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭenkate bheḍae samaṅketʼkoa. 
Numbers24:1 Biliam do tinreye ńelkeda, Probhu Isorakʼ sana do Israelko bhorako onate uni do eṭakʼ dhao leka gonokko reakʼ goṛo hatao do bae kurumuṭuleda. Uni do hahaṅkar secʼ mẽtʼãhãe samaṅketʼtaea." 
Numbers24:2 Uni doe ńelkeda, Israelko do akoakʼ khũṭ lekageko ḍera akana. Unre Isorren Jiu do uni cetanreye hecʼena," 
Numbers24:3 Ar uni do Isorakʼ noa katha lạlạiye ehopʼena: “Bior hopon Biliam do noa kathae meneda, okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ do jhicʼge menakʼtae uni do noa kathae meneda," 
Numbers24:4 Okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ kathae ańjometʼkan ar sanam daṛeanicʼ reakʼ dorsone ńeletʼkan, ar okoe do otreye ombakʼ hape akan ar okoe do mẽtʼ jhicʼ akantae," 
Numbers24:5 uni do noa kathae meneda: E Jakob, amakʼ tạmbuko do tinạkʼ mońj! E Israel, tinạkʼ mońj amakʼ tahen jaega do!" 
Numbers24:6 Onako do buru tala otetko leka, gaḍa aṛe reakʼ bagwanko leka, Probhu Isore rohoe akatʼ Aguru dareko leka, dakʼ aṛe reakʼ debdạru dareko lekage." 
Numbers24:7 Taren reakʼ kanḍa khon dakʼ do dul oḍokokʼa, ar uniren bõs do aema dakʼreko tahena. Onkoren raj do Ogag khon hõe usulokʼa, onkoakʼ rajosṭi do ṭhonokte arhõ maraṅokʼa." 
Numbers24:8 Isor do Misor khon onkoe oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa, ar unige onkoren bir ḍaṅgrawakʼ daṛe leka do. Onko upạrte okoe jạtrenko teṅgona onko doe utʼ cabakoa, onkoakʼ jaṅ doe rạpudtakoa, ar sarte onko doe tuńkoa." 
Numbers24:9 Dhạcri kul ar kul eṅgal leka onko doko burumokʼa arko kunḍlạṅ hapekokʼa, unre onko beretʼko reakʼ do okoeye dilkea? Okoe apeko bhorape onkage onkore hõ bhor paṛaokʼma; ar okoe sarapko emape, onkage onko cetanre hõ sarap paṛaokʼma.”" 
Numbers24:10 Niạ katha ańjomkate Balak do Biliam cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoena. Ar acʼakʼ tiye ghusiketʼteye menkeda, “Ińren bạiriko sarapako lạgitʼ iń hoho ạguletʼmea menkhan am do niạ ghalokʼ pe dhaoem bhoratʼkoa." 
Numbers24:11 Am do ńitge nonḍe khon amakʼ disạmte ruạṛ calakʼme. Iń do ạḍitetʼ manotmeyiń menleda menkhan Probhu Isor do bae ńam ocowatʼmea.” 
Numbers24:12 Biliam do Balake roṛ ruạṛadea, “Amem kolletʼko hoṛ do cetʼ bạń metatʼko tahẽkana," 
Numbers24:13 Balak do sona ar rupạte perecʼ raj oṛakʼe imạńre hõ enhõ ińakʼ sana leka bhage ar bạṛicʼ do bạń men daṛeakʼa se Probhu Isorakʼ hukum birud hõ bạń sendaṛeakʼa, menkhan Probhu Isor okae mitạń eken onageń roṛ daṛeakʼa?" 
Numbers24:14 Iń do ńitokʼ ińren hoṛko ṭheniń ruạṛ calakʼ kana, menkhan ona lahare amiń sontor oṭokam kana noko jạtrenko do tayom daram amren hoṛko cetanre cetʼko cekaea mente.”" 
Numbers24:15 Unre Biliam do Isor emakʼ noa katha roroṛe ehopʼena: “Beor hopon Biliam do noa kathae meneda, okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ beṅgetʼge menakʼtae uni do noa kathae meneda," 
Numbers24:16 Okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ kathae ańjometʼkan ar maraṅ Isor ṭhen khon bud ar ạkile ńametʼ, ar okoe do sanam daṛeanicʼ reakʼ dorsone ńeletʼ, okoe do otreye ombakʼ hape akan, ar okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ jhicʼ akantae, uni do noa kathae meneda:" 
Numbers24:17 ‘ńitokʼ baṅre hõ iń do uniń ńelńame kana, ar iń sorrene baṅkanre hõ enhõ uni doń ạritʼ edekana. Mitʼṭecʼ ipil doe rakapʼa Jakobakʼ bõsre, mitʼṭecʼ raj ṭheṅgage Israelko mod khon rakapʼ hijukʼa. Uni do Moab ar Setren hoponkoakʼ bohokʼe gejertakoa." 
Numbers24:18 Bạiriko do Edom, metakʼme Seyirko dokhol joṅa, menkhan Israelko do birbanṭa hoṛ leka ektiạriko hameṭ joṅa." 
Numbers24:19 Jakobakʼ bõs khon mitʼṭen raje rakapʼ hijukʼa, ar nagrahare sarecʼ akan Edomrenko uni doe marao utạrkoa.’ ”" 
Numbers24:20 Amalekiko ńelte Biliam do Isorakʼ noa katha roroṛe ehopʼena: “Eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko modre Amalekiko do maraṅko tahẽkana, menkhan onkoakʼ sesokʼ do maraokʼge hoyokʼa.”" 
Numbers24:21 Ona tayom Biliam do Keniko ńelte Isorakʼ noa katha roroṛe ehopʼena: “Apeakʼ tahen jaega do kajakgetapea; ente apeakʼ tukạ do huṭupʼ dhirire hạmbutʼ akana. 
Numbers24:22 Menkhan sesre E Kenirenko ape dope marao utạrokʼa; Ạsurrenko do ar tinạkʼ din bondi kateko dohokapea?” 
Numbers24:23 Ona tayom Biliam do Isorakʼ noa katha roroṛe ehopʼena: “Hae! Isor noakoe hoe ocoyre, unre cetʼ jãhãe jiwetʼe tahẽdaṛeakʼa?" 
Numbers24:24 Kitim dip aṛe khon jahajko do hecʼkate Ạsurrenko ar Eberrenkoe copotʼkoa; menkhan Kitimren hoṛ doko marao utạrokʼa.” 
Numbers24:25 Inạ tayom Biliam do beretʼkate oṛakʼ secʼe mohnḍayena ar Balak hõ acʼakʼ horteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Numbers25:1 Israel hoponko tinre Siṭim nagraha ṭhenko tahẽkana unre onko do Moabren maejiuko sãoteko laṭghaṭkeda. 
Numbers25:2 Noko maejiuko do akoren debotako ńutumte janwar dãṛẽko reakʼ porobre Israelkoko neotaketʼkoa, ar Israelko hõ onko sãote jom-ńũkate onkoren debotakoko ḍobokʼatʼkoa." 
Numbers25:3 Nonkate Israelko do Pior burure Bakʼal debota sewawaere seledokʼko ehopʼena. Onate Probhu Isor do onko cetanre ạḍiye edreyena. 
Numbers25:4 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Israelkoren sanam mukhiyạkom sapʼkoa arem gocʼkoa ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do siń reakʼ marsalre iń samaṅrem giḍikakʼa. Tobe anecʼ Israel hoponko cetan khon ińakʼ edre do ocogokʼtińạ.”" 
Numbers25:5 Unre Mose do Israelren bikʼcạrkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape talaren tinạkʼ hoṛ do Piorre Bakʼal debotawakʼ pujạreko seledokʼkan onko jotogepe gocʼkoa.”" 
Numbers25:6 Onate Mose ar Israelren sanamko ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen tinreko rakʼjoṅkan tahẽkana unre mitʼṭen Israel hoṛ do onko samaṅrege mitʼṭen Midiạnren kuṛi do acʼakʼ gharońj lạgitʼe idikedea. 
Numbers25:7 Noa ńelketʼ khan naeke Aronren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Eleasarren hopon Pinehas do manḍerrenko ṭhen khon beretʼkate borlome hataokeda ar uni Israel hoṛ tayom tayomte uniyakʼ tạmbu bhitriteye boloyena ar borlomte bana hoṛe gathao mitʼketʼkinạ. Ar ona tayom Israelko mod khon mahamạri do thirena. 
Numbers25:8  
Numbers25:9 Menkhan okoe ona mahamạriteko gocʼen onkoakʼ lekha do bargel pon hajar tahẽkana. 
Numbers25:10 Unre Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers25:11 “Naeke Aronren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Eleasarren hopon Pinehas do Israelko cetan khon ińakʼ edreye sạṅgińketʼtińạ. Israelko modre uni do ińakʼ bakhra babotre iń lekageye ahkaokʼ kana. Onate ińakʼ bakhra reakʼ ạḍi ahkaoteakʼ tahẽkanre hõ iń do bạń marao utạrletʼkoa." 
Numbers25:12 Ona iạte unim metaea, iń do uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhạlại reakʼ iń bondobos akada." 
Numbers25:13 Uni do acʼren Isorakʼ bakhra reakʼe ahkaokʼkante ar Israelkoakʼ kại reakʼ puruchune kạmi akatʼte uni lạgitʼ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń bandhao akada jemon naeke hudạ do uni ar uni bõsrenko talare jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽakan tahen.” 
Numbers25:14 Ar okoeṭakʼ Israel hoṛ do Midiạnren kuṛi sãoteye gocʼ ocoyen uniyakʼ ńutum do Simerai tahẽkana. Uni do Sạluren hopon ar Simeon gusṭikoren mitʼṭen mukhiyạ hoṛe tahẽkana. 
Numbers25:15 Ar okoeṭakʼ Midiạnren kuṛiye gocʼ ocolen uniyakʼ ńutum do Kosbi tahẽkana. Uni do Midiạn disạmren Sur ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ bõskoren mukhiyạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
Numbers25:16 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers25:17 “Midiạniko do bạiri mente hudiskope ar gocʼ giḍikakope," 
Numbers25:18 ente Piorren debota sewawae ar Kosbiyakʼ katha iạte bhul horteko idiketʼpete onko do bạiriko hoyakana. Am dom baḍaegea, nui Kosbige onkoren peṛa ar mitʼṭen Midiạn sordarren hoponerae tahẽkana. Piorren Bakʼal debota sewawae iạte tinre ape talare mahamạri ńelena unre uni maejiugeye gocʼ ocolena.”" 
Numbers26:1 Mahamạri thiren tayom Probhu Isor do Mose ar naeke Aronren hopon Eleasare metatʼkinạ," 
Numbers26:2 “Israelko modre okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon ḍher, metakʼme okoe do lạṛhạite oḍok calakʼ lekako hoyakan, onko do gharońj gharońj lekate ben lekhakoa.”" 
Numbers26:3 Onate Mose ar naeke Eleasar do Jerikho mohnḍa mohonḍi jordan gaḍa aṛe Moab reakʼ otet ṭhạ̃ire mukhiyạko kin metatʼkoa," 
Numbers26:4 “Probhu Isor Mose okae hukum akawade ona lekate ape do bargel ar ona khon ḍher umeran herel hoṛpe lekhakoa.” Ar okoeko Israel hopon do Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼlen hoṛ lekha jokhecʼ onkoakʼ ńutum hõ ol caṛhaoen takoa. 
Numbers26:5 Israelren pạhilicʼ hopon Rubenakʼ bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Hanok khon Hanoren bõsko, Palu khon Pạlui bõsko," 
Numbers26:6 Hesron khon Hesroni bõsko ar Kormi khon Kormiạ bõsko. 
Numbers26:7 Nokoko do Ruben gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsko. Noko mod khon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana pongel pe hajar eae sae pegel. 
Numbers26:8 Pạluren hoponakʼ ńutum do Eliab tahẽkana," 
Numbers26:9 ar Eliabren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Nemuel, Dathan ar Abiram. Dathan ar Abiram do Israelkoren mukhiyạkin tahẽkana okoe do Mose ar Aron upạrtekin teṅgolen. Arhõ Korah dolrenko Probhu Isor upạrte tinreko teṅgolena unre nukinhõ ona dolrenkin tahẽkana." 
Numbers26:10 Korah sãote nukin banahoṛge ot doe utʼletʼkina; ar Korah dolren barsae mõṛẽgel hoṛ do seṅgelreko atar gocʼena. Noako do Israelko lạgitʼ sontorokʼ reakʼ cinhạ lekako tahẽyena. 
Numbers26:11 Menkhan Korahren hoponko do un jokhecʼ bako gocʼlena. 
Numbers26:12 Simeon bõsrenko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Nemuel khon Nemueli bõsko, Jamin khon Jamini bõsko, Jakin khon Jakini bõsko," 
Numbers26:13 Serah khon Serahi bõsko ar Sạul khon Sạuli bõsko. 
Numbers26:14 Noko do Simeon gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren kanako. Ar noko modkhon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana bargel bar hajar barsae. 
Numbers26:15 Gadren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Sephon khon Sephoni bõsko, Hagi khon Hagi bõsko, Suni khon Suni bõsko," 
Numbers26:16 Osni khon Osni bõsko, Eri khon Eri bõsko," 
Numbers26:17 Arod khon Arodren bõsko ar Areli khon Areli bõsko. 
Numbers26:18 Noko do Gad gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsko. Noko modkhon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel hajar mõṛẽ sae tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:19 Jihudạren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Sela khon Sela bõsko, Peres khon Peres bõsko ar Serah khon Serah bõsko. Jihudạren do Er ar Onan ńutuman arhõ barea hoponkin tahẽkana. Nukin do laharege Kanan disạmrekin gocʼena." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21 Peresren bõskoakʼ bõs do hoyokʼ kana Hesron khon Hesroni bõsko ar Hamul khon Hamuli bõsko. 
Numbers26:22 Noko do Jihudạ gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko kanako. Noko mod khon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do tahẽkana eaegel turui hajar mõṛẽsae. 
Numbers26:23 Isakarren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Tolai khon Tolai bõsko, Pua khon Puni bõsko," 
Numbers26:24 Jasub khon Jasubi bõsko ar Simron khon Simroni bõsko. 
Numbers26:25 Noko doko hoyokʼ khan Isakar gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko. Noko mod khon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana turui gel pon hajar pesae. 
Numbers26:26 Sebulonren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Sered khon Seredi bõsko, Elon khon Eloni bõsko ar Jahleyel khon Jahleyeli bõsko." 
Numbers26:27 Noko doko hoyokʼ kana Sebulon gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko. Noko mod khon lekhare turui gel hajar mõṛẽsae hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:28 Manase ar Ephrayem khon Josephren bõsko: 
Numbers26:29 Manase bõsren bõs doko hoyokʼ kana Makir khon Makiri bõsko ar Gilead khon Gilead bõsko. Gilead do Makirren hopone tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:30 Gileadren bõskoakʼ bõs do hoyokʼ kana Leser khon Leseri bõsko, Helok khon Helok bõsko," 
Numbers26:31 Asriel khon Asrieli bõsko, Sikem khon Sikemi bõsko," 
Numbers26:32 Semida khon Semidayi bõsko ar Hepher khon Hepheri bõsko. 
Numbers26:33 Hepherren hopon Selophadren do cele hoponge bako tahẽkana. Menkhan eken kuṛi hoponko tahẽkana. Onko kuṛikoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana, Mahla, Moa, Hogla, Milkạ ar Thirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Noko doko hoyokʼ kana Manase gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko. Noko mod khon lekhare mõṛẽgel bar hajar eae sae. 
Numbers26:35 Ephrayem bõsren bõs doko hoyokʼ kana Suthel khon Suthela bõsko, Bekhor khon Bekhori bõsko ar Tahan khon Tahani bõsko." 
Numbers26:36 Suthela bõskoren bõs doko hoyokʼ kana Eren khon Ereni bõsko. 
Numbers26:37 Noko do Ephrayim gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren hoṛ kanako. Ar noko mod khon lekhare pegel bar hajar mõṛẽsae hoṛko tahẽkana. Bõs lekate nokoge Josephren bõsko tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:38 Benjạminren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Bela khon Belayi bõsko, Asbel khon Asbeli bõsko, Ahiram khon Ahirami bõsko," 
Numbers26:39 Sephum khon Sephumi bõsko ar Hupham khon Huphami bõsko. 
Numbers26:40 Ardo ar Naman hotete Belaren bõskoakʼ bõs do hoyokʼ kana Ardo khon Ardi bõsko ar Naman khon Namani bõsko. 
Numbers26:41 Noko do Benjamin gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Noko mod khon lekhare pongel mõṛẽ hajar turui sae. 
Numbers26:42 Dan bõsrenko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Suham khon Suhami bõsko. Noko doko tahẽkana Dan gusṭiren hoṛko. 
Numbers26:43 Noko modkhon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do tahẽkana turui gel pon hajar ponsae. 
Numbers26:44 Aserren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Imna khon Imnayi bõsko, Iswi khon Iswiyi bõsko ar Beria khon Beriyi bõsko." 
Numbers26:45 Beriaren bõskoakʼ bõs do hoyokʼ kana Heber khon Heberi bõsko ar Malkiel khon Malkieli bõsko. 
Numbers26:46 Aserren hoponerawakʼ ńutum do Seraha tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:47 Noako do Aser gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Noko mod khon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do mõṛẽgel pe hajar ponsae tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:48 Napthaliren bõsko: noko doko hoyokʼ kana Jahseyel khon Jahseyeli bõsko, Guni khon Guni bõsko," 
Numbers26:49 Jeser khon Jeseri bõsko ar Silem khon Selemi bõsko. 
Numbers26:50 Noako do Napthali gusṭiren judạ judạ bõs kana. Noko mod khon hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel mõṛẽ hajar ponsae. 
Numbers26:51 Lekhayen Israelkoakʼ lekha do jotote turui lakh mitʼ hajar eae sae pegelko tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:52 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers26:53 “Am do hoṛkoakʼ lekha lekate disạmem hạṭińakoa jemon onaren ạidạriko hoedaṛeakʼ. 
Numbers26:54 Okaṭakʼ gusṭiren hoṛko saṅgege ona gusṭiren do ḍher ar okaṭakʼ gusṭiren hoṛko thoṛage ona gusṭiren lạgitʼ do thoṛa jaegam emakoa. Mimitʼ gusṭiren hoṛ do akoakʼ lekha lekage jaegako ạidạri joṅa. 
Numbers26:55 Okoe gusṭirenko okare jaegako ńama ona do loṭarikatem emakoa. Mimitʼ bõsrenkoakʼ hạṭiń do uniyakʼ gusṭi ńutumte emakʼ ṭoṭharege tahentaea. 
Numbers26:56 Gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do thoṛa hoyokʼ ar baṅ do ḍher hoyokʼ loṭarikatege jaega dom ṭhik akoa.” 
Numbers26:57 Bõs lekate lekha akatʼko Liwi do Gerson khon Gersoni bõs, Kohat khon Kohati bõs ar Merari khon Merari bõs kanako." 
Numbers26:58 Gerson, Kohat ar Merari bõskoakʼ bõs do hoyokʼ kana Libni bõsko, Hebroni bõsko, Mahli bõsko, Musi bõsko ar Korah bõsko. Kohatren ar mitʼ bõsrenkoakʼ ńutum do Amram tahẽkana." 
Numbers26:59 Amramren oṛakʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Jokebed tahekana. Misor disạmre Liwi gusṭiko talare uniyakʼ janam do hoylena. Uniyakʼ kukhire Amramren hopon Aron, Mose, ar unkinren misera Mạriạmakʼ janam hoylena." 
Numbers26:60 Aronren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Nadab, Abihu, Eleasar ar Ithamar." 
Numbers26:61 Nadab ar Abihu do Probhu Isor samaṅre niạm bahre seṅgelre dhupkin samaṅletʼte unkin dokin gocʼena. 
Numbers26:62 Mitʼ cando se ona khon ḍher umerren Liwi herel hoponkoakʼ lekha do bargel pe hajar tahẽkana. Israelko modre noko do eṭakʼ jãhãn jaega bako ạidạri ocolente ar eṭakʼ Israelko sãote hõ nokoakʼ lekha do baṅ hoylena. 
Numbers26:63 Jerikho mohnḍa mohnḍi jordan gaḍa aṛe Moab reakʼ otetre lekhako jokhecʼ Mose ar naeke Eleasar do noko hoṛkin lekhaketʼkoa. 
Numbers26:64 Menkhan Mose ar naeke Aron do tinre sinại hahaṅkarre Israelkokin lekhaletʼkoa unre noko do okoehõ bako tahẽkana. 
Numbers26:65 Probhu Isor do noko Israeko reaṅgeye menleda, onko do khạṭige hahaṅkarreko gujukʼa. Onko modre Jephunren hopon Kaleb ar Nunren hopon Josuạ chaḍa ar okoe hõ jiwetʼ do bako tahẽkana." 
Numbers27:1 Selophadren hoponerako do Josephren hopon Manase bõsrenko tahẽkana. Manaseren hopon Makir, Makirren hopon Gilead, Gileadren hopon Hephor ar Hephorren hopon Selophad. Selophadren hoponerakoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana, Mahla, Noa, Hogla, Milkạ ar Thirsa." 
Numbers27:2 Noko kuṛiko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ bolokʼ horre senkate Mose ar naeke Eleasar ar sanam mukhiyạko ar Israelko samaṅre teṅgoyenteko menkeda," 
Numbers27:3 “Aleren baba do hahaṅkarreye gocʼena. Ar Korahren okoeko hoṛ do Probhu Isor upạrte dolko pakaoletʼ onko dolrehõ uni do bae tahẽkana; uni do acʼ apnarakʼ kạitegeye gocʼena. Ar uniren do cele hoponge bạnukʼkotaea. 
Numbers27:4 Menkhan aleren babawakʼ ńutum do acʼakʼ bõs khon cedakʼ maraokʼtaea? Onate aleren babaren bõsren hoṛko sãote ale hõ sompotti reakʼ ạidạri emaleme baṛe.” 
Numbers27:5 Unre Mose do onko babotre Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana. 
Numbers27:6 Ar Probhu Isor do uniye roṛ ruạṛadea," 
Numbers27:7 “Selophadren hoponera do ṭhik kathageko meneda. Onkoren babawakʼ bõsren hoṛko sãote khạṭige sompotti reakʼ ạidạrim emakoa. Ar onko jemon akoren babawakʼ sompottiko ńam onam ńeltakoa. 
Numbers27:8 Israelkom metakoa jãhãege hopon begorteye gocʼlen khan tobe uniyakʼ sompotti reakʼ ạidạri do uniren hoponerae ńama. 
Numbers27:9 Ar uniren hoponera hõ bae tahen khan tobe do uniren boehako uniyakʼ sompottiren ạidạrikoko hoyokʼa. 
Numbers27:10 Ar uniren boeha hõ bako tahen tobe sompotti reakʼ ạidạri do uniren apattetʼren boehako ńama. 
Numbers27:11 Ar apattetʼren jãhãe boeha hõ bako tahen tobe khan uni bõsren joto khon sorren peṛa do uniyakʼ sompottiren ạidạriye hoyokʼa. Ona sompotti do unigeye ńama. Mose emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekate noage Israelkoakʼ ạn reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhara do hoyokʼa.” 
Numbers27:12 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do Abarim burute decʼkate oka disạm Israelkoń ematʼko ona baṛe beṅgetʼakʼme." 
Numbers27:13 Amren boeha Aron cetʼleka hapṛamko ṭhene senakan onkage amhõ amren hapṛamko ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtama. 
Numbers27:14 Ente Sin hahaṅkarre Israelko tinre dakʼ lạgitʼ kạphạriạukʼko ehopʼletʼa unre Israelko samaṅre iń sonotiń reakʼ hukum do baben bataoleda.” Ona do Sin hahaṅkarre Kades ṭhenakʼ Meribah reakʼ dakʼge. 
Numbers27:15 Noa katha ańjomkate Mose do Probhu Isore metadea, “E Probhu Isor, okoe doe manwakoren jiwi emokʼicʼ Isorkan, unige Israelko cetanre nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛe teṅgoyema, jemon mukhiyạ lekate sanamakʼre hoṛkoe ạyur daṛeako. Onate Probhu Isorren hoṛko bin gupiyicʼ leka ar bako tahena.”" 
Numbers27:16  
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Probhu Isor do Moseye roṛ ruạṛadea, “Nunren hopon Josuạre Isorren Jiu menaea. Am do ạguyem ar uni cetanre amakʼ ti capoetam." 
Numbers27:19 Ar naeke Eleasar ar Israelko samaṅre unim ạguiyea ar onko samaṅrege kạmi reakʼ bharem emaea. 
Numbers27:20 Ar okaṭakʼ ektiạrim em ocoakan ona reakʼ hõ thoṛam emaea jemon sanam Israelko uniyakʼko ańjomtae. 
Numbers27:21 Uni do naeke Eleasar ṭhen senokʼ hoyokʼtaea, ar Eleasar do uni ńutumte Urim ar Thumim reakʼ daṛete Probhu Isorakʼ hukume baḍaejoṅa. Eleasarakʼ hukum lekage uni ar Israelren eṭakʼko do calakʼ hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mose do Isorakʼ hukum lekageye kạmikeda. Ar Josuạ do naeke Eleasar ar Israelko samaṅreye hạjirkedea. 
Numbers27:23 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka uni cetanre ti capokateye bhoradea. 
Numbers28:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko noako hukumako lạgitʼe metadea, “Kusi ocoyiń reakʼ jut so lekate iń ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ape do niṭ akatʼ oktere iń ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ alope hiṛińa.”" 
Numbers28:2  
Numbers28:3 Uni do noako hukumako lạgitʼ hõe metadea, “Seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre din hilokʼ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ aperen mitʼ bochor umerren barea niphuṭ utạr bheḍa hopon ạgukin hoyokʼtapea." 
Numbers28:4 Unkin modren mitʼṭen bheḍa hopon do setakʼ jokhecʼpe samaṅea ar eṭagicʼ do cando hạsur tayom. 
Numbers28:5 Ona sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ keji irạl sae gram holoṅ hõ ạgui hoyokʼtapea. Noa holoṅ sãote mitʼ liṭar jạitun reakʼ koṭecʼ oḍok sunum hõ lagaokʼa. 
Numbers28:6 Noa do jao hilokʼ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one okaṭakʼ do sinại burure bandhaolen. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so do Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan. 
Numbers28:7 Mimitʼ bheḍa sãote ạguakʼ mitʼ liṭar bubulakʼte coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ do samaṅ hoyokʼa. Sonot tạmbu reakʼ racare Probhu Isor ńutumte noa coḍor samaṅakʼ samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:8 Ar eṭagicʼ bheḍa hopon do cando hạsur tayom samaṅe hoyokʼa. Ona sãote setakʼ reakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ leka ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõ tahena. Noa do seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so do Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan. 
Numbers28:9 “Jirạukʼ mãhãre barea mitʼ bochor umerren niphuṭ utạr bheḍa hopon samaṅkin hoyokʼa. Ona sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ jinis ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunumre sipiyakʼ pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ hõ tahena. 
Numbers28:10 Ar din hilokʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mimitʼ jirạukʼ mãhãre niạ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼge samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:11 “Mimitʼ cando reakʼ pạhil dinre Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ barea ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar mitʼṭen mitʼ bochorren eae goṭen bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Ar onko jotoge jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers28:12 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mimitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote sunumre sipiyakʼ mõṛẽ keji ponsae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa; ar bheḍa sãote do pe keji turui sae gram ar mimitʼ bheḍa hopon sãote mitʼ keji irạl sae gram holoṅ lagaokʼa. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana, seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼge one ona reakʼ jut so do Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan." 
Numbers28:13  
Numbers28:14 Coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mimitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote mitʼ liṭer pe poa darkha rasa emokʼ hoyokʼa; bheḍa sãote do mitʼ liṭar mitʼ poa ar mimitʼ bheḍa hoponko sãote mitʼ liṭer sunum emokʼ hoyokʼa. Noa do cando reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana. Noa do cando pichạ goṭa bochorge korao hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:15 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ coḍorokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom boda hõ kại ńutumte samaṅe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:16 “Bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ tạrikre Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobpe porobokʼa. 
Numbers28:17 Ona cando reakʼ gelmõṛẽ tạrik hilokʼ mitʼṭecʼ porobokʼ hoyokʼa. Unre eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ jojom hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers28:18 Pạhil hilokʼ do mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Numbers28:19 Enhilokʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menkate barea ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar eae goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ar onko do jemon jotoge niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers28:20 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mimitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote sunumre sipiyakʼ mõṛẽ keji ponsae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa; ar bheḍa sãote do pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ ar mimitʼ bheḍa sãote do mitʼ keji irạl sae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:21  
Numbers28:22 Noako sãote kại ńutumte puruchun lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda hõ ạguiye hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers28:23 Setakʼ jokhecʼ jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ chaḍa noako samaṅokʼakʼ hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:24 Nonkage eae din hạbicʼ din hilokʼge Probhu Isor kusi ocoye reakʼ jut so lekate noako jomakʼte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mente samaṅ hoyokʼa. Ar jaoge okaṭakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ coḍorokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menakʼ ona hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:25 Eae din hilokʼ do mitʼṭecʼ sonot ńapamokʼ sabhape hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Numbers28:26 “Eae hapta reakʼ porob dinre, metakʼme pạhilre rakabokʼ phosol samaṅokʼ hilokʼ tinre Probhu Isor ńutumte nãwã phosolpe samaṅa enhilokʼ do mitʼṭecʼ sonot ńapamokʼ sabhape hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya." 
Numbers28:27 Enhilokʼ ape do Probhu Isor kusi ocoye lạgitʼ jut so lekate aperen barea ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar eae goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponkote mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porobpe hoeocoya." 
Numbers28:28 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mimitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote sunumte sipiyakʼ mõṛẽ keji pon sae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtapea; ar bheḍa sãote do pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ ar mimitʼ bheḍa hopon saõte do mitʼ keji irạl sae holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers28:29  
Numbers28:30 Kại puruchun lạgitʼ noako sãote mitʼṭen merom boda hõ ạguiye lagaoapea. 
Numbers28:31 Noako samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ sãote jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hõ samaṅ hoyokʼtapea. Ar onko joto janwarge jemon niphuṭ utạrko tahen.
