Numbers29:1 “Eae cando reakʼ pạhil tạrikre ape do mitʼṭecʼ sonot ńapamokʼ sabhape hoeocoya. Ar enhilokʼ do jãhãn khaṭaoteakʼ kạmi do alope kạmiya. Enhilokʼ do sakwa okʼroṅ din porob hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:2 Probhu Isor kusi ocoye reakʼ jut so menkate ape do enhilokʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar eae goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponpe ạgukoa ar mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ar noko do niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ jạruṛtakoa." 
Numbers29:3 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote sunum mesalakatʼ mõṛẽ keji pon sae gram holoṅ hõ emokʼ hoyokʼa. Ar bheḍa sãote do pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ ar mimitʼ bheḍa hoponko lạgitʼ do mitʼ keji irạl sae holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:4  
Numbers29:5 Kại ńutumte puruchun lạgitʼ do mitʼṭen merom boda hõ samaṅe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:6 Mimitʼ cando ar mimitʼ dinre niṭ akatʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, ona sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa noa samaṅokʼakʼko hõ samaṅ hoyokʼa. Noako do Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ kana one ona reakʼ jut so do Probhu Isore kusiyakʼkan." 
Numbers29:7 “Niạ eae cando reakʼ gel tạrikre hõ mitʼṭecʼ sonot ńapamokʼ sabhape hoeocoya. Ar niạ dinre apeakʼ ontorpe nindhạntapea ar joto lekan kạmiko khon sahaṛ akanpe tahena. 
Numbers29:8 Ar Probhu Isor kusi ocoye reakʼ jut so lekate aperen mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar eae goṭen mitʼ bochorren bheḍa hoponkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pe samaṅa. Menkhan onko mimitʼko do niphuṭ utạrko jemonko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:9 Jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote sunum mesalakatʼ mõṛẽ keji pon sae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa. Ar bheḍa sãote do pe keji turui sae gram holoṅ ar eae goṭen bheḍa hopon onko mimitʼko sãote mimitʼ keji irạl sae gramkate holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:10  
Numbers29:11 Kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar noako sãoteakʼ coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa arhõ mitʼṭen kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda hõ samaṅe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:12 “Eae cando reakʼ mõṛẽgel tạrikre hõ mitʼṭecʼ sonot ńapamokʼ sabhape hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ khaṭaoteakʼ kạmiko alope kạmiya. Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte eae din hạbicʼpe porobokʼa. 
Numbers29:13 Probhu Isore kusiyakʼ jut so lekate seṅgelteakʼ mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ona lạgitʼ gelpe goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponkote mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ar noko joto do niphuṭ utạrkoko hoyokʼma." 
Numbers29:14 Mimitʼ ḍaṅgra sãote jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ sunum mesalakʼ mõṛẽ keji pon sae gram holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼa; ar barea bheḍare mimitʼ goṭen lạgitʼ pe keji turui sae gram ar mimitʼ bheḍa hoponko sãote mitʼ keji irạl sae gram holoṅ ạgui hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:15  
Numbers29:16 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa kại ńutumte samaṅe lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda hõ samaṅe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:17 “Porob reakʼ dosar hilokʼ do barea ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Noko do niphuṭ utạr hoyokʼ jạruṛtakoa." 
Numbers29:18 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponko lekhare tinạkʼko hoyokʼ unạkʼge onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ hoyokʼ jạruṛa; ar ona do lahateakʼ niạm lekage." 
Numbers29:19 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa ar noako sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers29:20 “Porob reakʼ tesar hilokʼ do gelmitʼ goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Ar onko jotoge jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:21 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼ unạkʼge onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ lekha hõ hoyokʼ jạruṛa; ar ona do lahateakʼ niạm lekage." 
Numbers29:22 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom boda hõ kại ńutumte samaṅe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers29:23 “Porob reakʼ ponakʼ dinre gel goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Noko do jotoge jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:24 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼa onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ unạkʼge hoyokʼa; ar ona do hoyokʼa lahateakʼ niạm lekage." 
Numbers29:25 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Numbers29:26 “Porob reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ dinre are goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponko samaṅko hoyokʼa. Ar noko do jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:27 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼa onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ unạkʼge jạruṛa; ar ona do lahateakʼ niạm lekage hoyokʼa." 
Numbers29:28 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Numbers29:29 “Porob reakʼ turuiyakʼ dinre do irạl goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Noko do jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:30 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼa onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ unạkʼge hoyokʼa; ar ona do hoyokʼa lahateakʼ niạm lekage." 
Numbers29:31 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Numbers29:32 “Porob reakʼ eaeyakʼ dinre do eae goṭen ḍaṅgra, barea bheḍa ar gelpon goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hopon samaṅko hoyokʼa. Noko do jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:33 Noko ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼa onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ unạkʼge jạruṛa; ar ona do hoyokʼa lahateakʼ niạm leka." 
Numbers29:34 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Numbers29:35 “Irạl din reakʼ mucạtʼ hilokʼ do bises sabhape hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ khaṭaoteakʼ alope kạmiya. 
Numbers29:36 Probhu Isor kusi ocoye reakʼ jut so menkate uni ńutumte mitʼṭen seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Ona lạgitʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, mitʼṭen bheḍa ar eae goṭen mitʼ bochor umerren bheḍa hoponkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. Noko do jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ." 
Numbers29:37 Ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar bheḍa hoponkoakʼ lekha tinạkʼ hoyokʼa onko sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lekha hõ unạkʼge hoyokʼa; noa do lahateakʼ niạm lekage hoyokʼa." 
Numbers29:38 Jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ona sãoteakʼ jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ chaḍa mitʼṭen merom bodate kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Numbers29:39 “Manot akatʼakʼ purạu ar apnarakʼ sanateakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate okako jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅ onako chaḍa hõ mimitʼ niṭakan porobre ona reakʼ lek lekan samaṅokʼakʼko Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅ hoyokʼtapea.”" 
Numbers29:40 Probhu Isor okako hukum Moseye emade tahẽkan uni do ona Israelkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Numbers30:1 Mose do Israel gusṭiren mukhiyạkoe galmaraoatʼkoa, “Probhu Isore hukum akada jãhãe hoṛ Probhu Isor ṭhen jãhãnakʼ manotakʼ lạgitʼe dohoakatʼ khan se kiriạkate jãhãnakʼe gokʼakatʼ khan, enḍekhan uni do onae purạuma; ente uni okae menakatʼ ona do purạutege hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers30:2  
Numbers30:3 “Jãhãe bin baplayicʼ kuṛi do acʼren apatakʼ oṛakʼre tahen jokhecʼ Probhu ṭhen jãhãnakʼe manot akatʼ khan se jãhãnakʼe gokʼ akatʼ khan ar acʼren apattetʼ ona baḍaekate jãhãnakʼ bae metae, enḍekhan uniyakʼ manotteakʼ se okaṭakʼe gokʼ akatʼ ona do puruạutege hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers30:4  
Numbers30:5 Menkhan ona katha ańjomkate acʼren apattetʼ uniye barone enḍekhan oneye manotakatʼ seye gokʼ akatʼ ona do bạtilokʼtaea. Acʼren apattetʼe baron akade iạte Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ manotteakʼ se gokʼakʼe rạputʼ akatʼre hõe ikạyea. 
Numbers30:6 “Jãhãnakʼ manot akatʼakʼ doho tayom se begor hudiste kiriạkate gokʼ tayom uni kuṛiyakʼ bapla hoyokʼ ar uniren jãwãetetʼ ona katha ańjomkate hõ uni jãhãnakʼ bae metae, enḍekhan uniyakʼ manotteakʼ se okae gokʼ akatʼ ona do purạutege hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers30:7  
Numbers30:8 Menkhan ona katha ańjomkate uniren jãwãetetʼ uniye barone enḍekhan uniyakʼ ona manot akatʼakʼ se begor hudisteye gokʼ akatʼ ona do mạutạkʼtaea ar Probhu Isor hõ uniyakʼ manotakʼ se gokʼakʼ rạputʼ iạteye ikạyea. 
Numbers30:9 “Rạnḍi se jãwãe okoeye bạgi akade nonkan jãhãe maejiu jãhãnakʼ manot lạgitʼe dohoy se jãhãn gokʼakʼe dohoy enḍekhan uni do ona purạu hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers30:10 “Jãwãe sãoteye tahen kan nonkan jãhãe maejiu jãhãn manotteakʼ menakʼtae khan se kiriạkate jãhãnakʼe gokʼakatʼ khan ar acʼren jãwãetetʼ ona ańjomkate hõ jãhãnakʼ bae metae se bae barone, enḍekhan uni do manotteakʼ se joto gokʼakʼge purạu hoyokʼtaea." 
Numbers30:11  
Numbers30:12 Menkhan acʼren jãwãetetʼ ona katha ańjomkate onae mạutạ ocoye menetʼkhan uniyakʼ ona manotteakʼ se gokʼakʼ do mạutạkʼtaea. Ar uniren jãwãetetʼe baron akadete Probhu Isor hõ uniyakʼ manotteakʼ se gokʼakʼ rạputʼ iạteye ikạyea. 
Numbers30:13 Bạhuttetʼakʼ manotteakʼ se jãhãn gokʼakʼ mạutạkʼ reakʼ ạidạri do jãwãetetʼakʼ tahena. 
Numbers30:14 Menkhan acʼren jãwãetetʼ dinke din ona reaṅ baḍaekate hõ hapegeye tahen enḍekhan uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ona manot se gokʼakʼ do keṭejokʼtaea. Ar onako ańjomkate hõ thir hape akane tahen khan uni do bạhuttetʼakʼ manotteakʼ se gokʼakʼe keṭecʼ ocoytaea. 
Numbers30:15 Menkhan jotowakʼ ańjom tayom jãwãetetʼ uniyakʼe mạutạitae khan enḍekhan bạhuttetʼ ona bae purạu akatʼ reakʼ dos do acʼren jãwãetetʼ cetanre paṛaokʼa.” 
Numbers30:16 Niạ babotre jãwãetetʼ ar bạhuttetʼ tala ar apat ar apatakʼ oṛakʼreko tahenkan hoponerako tala reakʼ Probhu Isor do Mose niạko ạn ạrigeye emade tahekana. 
Numbers31:1 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers31:2 “Am do Israelko ńutumte Midiạnkoakʼ behok reakʼ hala hạlime. Ar ona tayom do amren hapṛamko ṭhenem calakʼa. 
Numbers31:3 Unre Mose do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Midiạnko birudre lạṛhại lạgitʼ ape mod khon thoṛa hoṛ sapṛaokope, jemon onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte Midiạnko cetanreko hala hạli daṛeakʼ." 
Numbers31:4 Ape do Israelren mimitʼ gusṭi khon mitʼ hajarkate hoṛko hataokate lạṛhạipe kolkoa.” 
Numbers31:5 Onate Israelren gelbar gusṭiko khon gelbar hajar hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
Numbers31:6 Ar Mose do mimitʼ gusṭiko khon mitʼ hajarkate hoṛ hataokate lạṛhại lạgitʼe kolketʼkoa. Onko sãote naeke Eleasarren hopon Pinhas hõ lạṛhại lạgitʼe kolkedea. Uni do thoṛa sonot jinisko ar pẽpṛẽtʼkine soṅge torakeda. 
Numbers31:7 Probhu Isor Moseye hukumakawade leka onko do Midiạnrenko sãote lạṛhạikate sanam herel hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Numbers31:8 Onko do Midiạnrenko sãote eṭakʼ mõṛẽ goṭen raj hõko gocʼketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana, Ebi, Rekom, Sur, Hur ar Reba. Israelko do Beorren hopon Biliam hõ tarwaṛeteko gocʼkedea." 
Numbers31:9 Onko do Midiạnren maejiuko ar gidrạkoko bondiketʼkoa ar onkoren sanam ḍaṅgrako, meromko, bhiḍiko ar onkoakʼ jiniskoko luṭketʼtakoa." 
Numbers31:10 Ar Midiạnrenko okako nagrahareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan ar nagraha bahre okoeko ḍera akan tahẽkan onkoakʼ sanamakʼ do seṅgelteko jeretʼ giḍikatʼtakoa. 
Numbers31:11 Ona tayom onko do luṭakʼ jinisko, janwarko, manwako soṅgekate Mose, naeke Eleasar ar sanam Israelko ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. Unre onko do Jerikho samaṅ secʼ jordan gaḍa aṛe reakʼ Moab ṭạnḍireko ḍera akan tahẽkana." 
Numbers31:12  
Numbers31:13 Unre ḍerareko tahẽkan Mose, naeke Eleasar ar Israelren mukhiyạko do jotoge onko sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena." 
Numbers31:14 Ar palṭonko, metatʼme okoeko do hajarko cetanren subedarko tahẽkan ar okoe do mitʼsae hoṛko cetanren subedarko tahẽkan onko lạṛhại khonko ruạṛ hecʼen khan Mose do onko cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoena are kuliketʼkoa, “Ape do enḍekhan sanam maejiuko jiwetʼpe dohoakatʼkoa!" 
Numbers31:15  
Numbers31:16 Ńelpe nokoge Biliamakʼ kathate Israel hoponkoko bulạuletʼkoa Peor babotteakʼ kathare Probhu Isor upạrteko bepạtiạr ocoletʼkoa onate Probhu Isorren hoṛko talare mahamạri do paṛaolena. 
Numbers31:17 Ńitokʼ do noko koṛa gidrạko ar tinạkʼ do herelakʼ mẽtʼãhãko ńelakatʼ nonkan joto maejiu do gocʼ giḍikakope; 
Numbers31:18 menkhan okoe do herel tulucʼ bako giticʼmitʼ akan arko kũạrige eken onko moto ape lạgitʼ jiwetʼ dohokope. 
Numbers31:19 “Ar ape modre okoe do hoṛpe gocʼakatʼko se gocʼ hoṛpe joṭetʼ akatʼko khan onko eae din hạbicʼ ḍera bahrere tahen hoyokʼtapea. Ar tesar ar eae din hilokʼ do ape apnartetʼ ar bondikatepe ạguakatʼko hoṛko saphakʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Numbers31:20 Apeakʼ sanam kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼko ar harta reakʼ, kaṭ reakʼ ar meromakʼ upʼte benaoakʼ sanamakʼ jinisko hõ saphae hoyokʼtapea.”" 
Numbers31:21 Eleasar naeke do lạṛhạiko senlen palṭonkoe metatʼkoa, “Noa do hoyokʼ kana Mose hotete Probhu Isore emakan ạn-ạri." 
Numbers31:22 Sona, rupạ, pitạl, mẽṛhẽtʼ, ṭin, sisạ ar jãhãnakʼge okaṭakʼ do seṅgelte baṅ nosṭokʼ onako do seṅgel talatepe paroma ar ona tayom do saphakʼa. Menkhan enhõ onko do saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼte saphae hoyokʼa. Ar okako jinis do seṅgelte nosṭokʼ ona do saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼre topoe hoyokʼa." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Eaeakʼ dinre ape do apeakʼ kicricʼkope saphaea arpe saphakʼa ar ḍera bhitritepe bolo daṛeakʼa.” 
Numbers31:25 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers31:26 “Naeke Eleasar, am ar Israelkoren mukhiyạko ape do luṭkateko ạgu ocoakan joto manwa ar janwarkope lekhakoa." 
Numbers31:27 Ar luṭ ạguakʼ jotowakʼ dope bar hạṭińa ar mitʼ hạṭiń do palṭonko ar sarecʼ hạṭiń do somajren hoṛpe hạṭińakoa. 
Numbers31:28 Palṭonkoakʼ hạṭińre tinạkʼ paṛaokʼ baṅ do manwa, baṅ do ḍaṅgra, baṅ do gadha, baṅ do bheḍa ar meromko onko reakʼ mimitʼ mõṛẽsae khon mitʼṭenkate do Probhu Isor ńutumte bheja menkatepe begarkoa." 
Numbers31:29 Palṭonkoakʼ hạṭiń reakʼ noko bheja do Probhu Isor ńutumte tulokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate naeke Eleasar ṭhenpe jimạkoa. 
Numbers31:30 Israelkoakʼ hạṭiń reakʼakʼko baṅ do manwa, baṅ do ḍaṅgra, baṅ do gadha, baṅ do bhiḍi, merom se eṭakʼ jãhãn janwarko onko reakʼ mimitʼ mõṛẽgelko khon mitʼṭenkatepe begarkoa. Ar onko do Liwikope emakoa okoe cetanre sekʼwa tạmbu reakʼ ńeljut lạgitʼ bhar emakan.”" 
Numbers31:31 Probhu Isor Mose okakoe hukumade tahẽkan onkage uni ar naeke Eleasar do jotowakʼkin kạmikeda. 
Numbers31:32 Palṭonko luṭ ạgu akatʼko khon tinạkʼko sarecʼen onko modre turui lak eaegel mõṛẽ hajar bhiḍi ar meromko," 
Numbers31:33 ar eaegel bar hajar ḍaṅgrako, turuigel mitʼ hajar gadhako ar pegel bar hajar kũạri kuṛiko tahẽkana." 
Numbers31:34  
Numbers31:35  
Numbers31:36 Ar okoe doko lạṛhạilen onkoakʼ hạṭiń reakʼ hĩs do hoyokʼ kana, pe lakh pegel eae hajar mõṛẽ sae bhiḍi ar meromko, pegel turui hajar ḍaṅgrako, pegel hajar mõṛẽ sae gadhako ar gel turui hajar kũạri kuṛiko. Noko modre tinạkʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ bheja menteko hoyen onkoakʼ lekha do turui sae eaegel mõṛẽ goṭen bhiḍi ar meromko, eaegel bar goṭen ḍaṅgra, turui gel mitʼ goṭen gadha ar pegel bar goṭen kũạri kuṛiko." 
Numbers31:37  
Numbers31:38  
Numbers31:39  
Numbers31:40  
Numbers31:41 Probhu Isor do Mose okae hukumade tahẽkan onkage uni do Probhu Isor ńutumte noko do bheja lekate tulokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ naeke Eleasarakʼ tireye jimạketʼkoa. 
Numbers31:42 Ar okaṭakʼ adha hạṭiń Mose do Israelren sarecʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ, metakʼme palṭonakʼ hạṭiń khone begarletʼko onkoakʼ hạṭiń do pe lakh pegel eae hajar mõṛẽsae bhiḍi ar meromko," 
Numbers31:43  
Numbers31:44 pegel turui hajar ḍaṅgrako, pegel hajar mõṛẽsae gadhako, ar gel turui hajar kũạri kuṛiko tahẽkana." 
Numbers31:45  
Numbers31:46  
Numbers31:47 Ar onko Israelko oka adha hạṭińko ńamketʼ onako khon Mose do mimitʼ mõṛẽgel kũạri kuṛiko khon mimitʼ hoṛkate ar mimitʼ mõṛẽgel janwarko khon mitʼṭecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekate Liwikoe ematʼkoa, okoe do sekʼwa tạmbu ńeljut reakʼ bharko em ocolen." 
Numbers31:48 Niạ tayom palṭonren judạ judạ dolkoren subedarko, metakʼme hajarko cetanren mitʼhoṛ ar saeko cetanren mitʼhoṛ do Mose ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Amren golamko, metakʼme ale do ale taberen palṭonkole lekhaketʼkoa onko modren mitʼ hoṛ hõ bale ạdhi akana." 
Numbers31:49  
Numbers31:50 Onate ale mimitʼko do oka sona reakʼ bạjuko, balako, chapakʼ mundạmko, lutur reakʼ pagrako ar hoṭokʼ reakʼ malakole ńamakatʼ, ona do aleakʼ kại reakʼ puruchun lạgitʼte Probhu Isor ṭhen samaṅ lạgitʼle ạgu akada.”" 
Numbers31:51 Unre Mose ar naeke Eleasar do onko ṭhen khon onako sona reakʼ jinisko kin hataokeda. 
Numbers31:52 Mose ar naeke Eleasar do hajar goṭen cetanren ar mitʼsae goṭen cetanrenkoakʼ okako sona do Probhu Isor ńutumtekin samaṅketʼ ona reakʼ ojon do mitʼsae turuigel irạl keji tahẽkana. 
Numbers31:53 Ona chaḍa palṭonko do jotoge apan ạpin lạgitʼ jiniskoko luṭ ạguan tahẽkana. 
Numbers31:54 Probhu Isor jemon Israelko secʼ beṅgetʼ akaeye tahen onate Mose ar naeke Eleasar do hajarko cetanren ar saeko cetanrenko khon ạguwakʼ sona reakʼ jinisko hataokate ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhenkin dohokeda. 
Numbers32:1 Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛkoren do ạḍi aema bhiḍi merom ar ḍaṅgra palko tahẽkantakoa. Onko do Jaser ar Gilead disạm do janwar ạsulko lạgitʼ ạḍi napae jaegakana menteko ńelketʼ khan," 
Numbers32:2 onko do Mose ar naeke Eleasar ar Israelren mukhiyạko ṭhen senkateko menkeda," 
Numbers32:3 “Probhu Isor do Ararot, Dibon, Jaser, Hesbon, Elale, Sebam, Nebo ar Beon ńutumanakʼ okako jaega Israelkoakʼ tabereye ạguakatʼ onako do ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ạḍi mońj ạtiń ṭạnḍiko kana, ar aperen noko gutikoren hõ ạsul janwarko menakʼkotalea." 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 Ale cetanre daya hoylen khan ale amren golamko do noako jaegage sompotti lekate danaleme. Ar jordan gaḍa hanasa do alom idilea.” 
Numbers32:6 Onate Mose do Gad ar Ruben gusṭiren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Aperen boehako do lạṛhạiko oḍok calakʼa ar ape do nonḍe duṛupʼ hape akanpe tahena?" 
Numbers32:7 Probhu Isor Israelko okaṭakʼ disạme emakawatʼko onḍe calakʼ lạgitʼ nokoakʼ ahkaokʼ mon do cedakʼpe rạputʼetʼtakoa? 
Numbers32:8 Disạm ciyạ ạgui lạgitʼ aperen baba-hapṛamko tinre Kades khoniń kolletʼkoa unre onko hõ ṭhik nonkageko kạmileda. 
Numbers32:9 Eskol buru lodam hạbicʼ senkate disạm ciyạ baṛakate onko do Probhu Isore emakʼ disạmte calakʼ lạgitʼ hoṛkoakʼ ahkaokʼ monko rạputʼletʼtakoa. 
Numbers32:10 Ar enhilokʼ Probhu Isor doe edre seṅgelente ar kiriạkateye menleda," 
Numbers32:11 ‘okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ reakʼ katha Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭhen kiriạkateń gokʼletʼ ona disạm do Misor disạm khon oḍok hecʼ akan bargel se ona khon ḍher umerren okoe hõ bako ńela, ente onko do ińakʼ katha purạte bako manaoleda." 
Numbers32:12 Eken Kenisi Jephunren hopon Kaleb ar Nunren hopon Josuạ do ona disomkin ńela, ente unkin do ińakʼ katha purạtekin manao akada.’" 
Numbers32:13 Israelko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do rakapʼena ar uni samaṅre bạṛicʼko kạmikan sanam hoṛko ạuriko marao cabakʼ hạbicʼ pongel bochor hạbicʼ uni do hahaṅkarreye ạcur baṛaletʼkoa. 
Numbers32:14 “Ape kạiyanko do, aperen baba hapṛamko bodoltepe upel akana ar Probhu Isorakʼ edre seṅgel do Israelko cetanre arhõpe sarsao ocoakatʼtaea." 
Numbers32:15 Ar uniyakʼ katha leka jodi bape calakʼ, enḍekhan niạ dhao hõ hahaṅkarre uni do noko hoṛkoe doho giḍikakoa, ar ape iạtege onkoakʼ maraokʼ do hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
Numbers32:16 Unre onko do Mose ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Ale do eken aleren ạsul janwarko ar aleakʼ gharońjko lạgitʼ nagraha benaole menjoṅkana." 
Numbers32:17 Menkhan Israelko akoakʼ jaegare ạurile idi seṭerko hạbicʼ ale hõ lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍabhanḍa horokʼkate onko lahate calakʼle sapṛaogea. Ar inạko dinre aleakʼ gharońjkoren do pạcri esetʼ nagrahareko tahẽ hataṛokʼa jemon niạ disạmren hoṛkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạko ńam. 
Numbers32:18 Ar ale do Israelko akoakʼ sompotti ạuriko ńam hạbicʼ aleakʼ oṛakʼte bale ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Numbers32:19 Ale do Israelko sãote jordan gaḍa hanasa reakʼ sompottiko hõ bale hataoa, ente gaḍa purub secʼ reakʼge coṅ ale male ńametʼkan.”" 
Numbers32:20 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mose do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape onape onkae khan, ar Probhu Isor samaṅre lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍawante bạiriko ạuribo laga ńirko hạbicʼ ape sanamko lạṛhại reakʼ sajte Probhu Isor samaṅte gaḍa hanasape calakʼ," 
Numbers32:21  
Numbers32:22 enḍekhan Probhu Isor gobolre disạm hecʼlen tayom ape dope ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼa ar unre Probhu Isor ar Israel jạtrenko cetan reakʼ dạyik khon rehaepe ńama; ar unre Probhu Isor samaṅre niạ jaega do apeakʼ sompottige hoyokʼa. 
Numbers32:23 Menkhan bape onkae enḍekhan ape do Probhu Isor upạrtepe kạiya. Ar noa baḍaekakʼpe, ona iạte apeakʼ kại khon rehae do bape ńama." 
Numbers32:24 Ape do aperen hoponko lạgitʼ nagrahape benao daṛeakʼa ar merom bhiḍikoakʼ tahen oṛakʼko hõpe benao daṛeakʼa, menkhan okaṭakʼpe gokʼketʼ ona do kạmi purạutege hoyokʼtapea.”" 
Numbers32:25 Unre Gad ar Ruben gusṭirenko do Moseko metadea, “Am do aleren mạlik kanam, am okaṭakʼem hukum ale, amren golamko do onagele kạmiya." 
Numbers32:26 Aleren hoponko, bạhuko, meromko, bhiḍiko ar ḍaṅgrako do Gilead reakʼ ona nagraharegeko tahena." 
Numbers32:27 Menkhan ale do aleren mạlikakʼ katha leka lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍawante Probhu Isor samaṅte gaḍale paromokʼa.” 
Numbers32:28 Unre Mose do noko hoṛko reaṅ naeke Eleasar, Nunren hopon Josuạ ar Israel gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren mukhiyạkoe hukumatʼkoa." 
Numbers32:29 Uni doe metatʼkoa, “Gad ar Ruben gusṭiren herel hoponko lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍawante Probhu Isor samaṅte lạṛhại lạgitʼ ape sãote jordan gaḍako parom calakʼa, ar disạm do ape gobolre hecʼlenre Gilead do sompotti lekate onkope emakoa." 
Numbers32:30 Menkhan onko bako onkae enḍekhan Kanan disạmrege ape sãote onko hõ sompottipe hạṭińakoa.” 
Numbers32:31 Niạ katha ańjomkate Gad ar Ruben gusṭiren hoṛko menkeda, “Probhu Isor okae menakatʼ amren golamko do onagele onkaea." 
Numbers32:32 Ale do Probhu Isor samaṅre lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍawante gaḍa paromkate Kanan disạmtele calakʼa, menkhan aleakʼ sompotti do gaḍa niạ sa aṛerege tahentalea.”" 
Numbers32:33 Unre Mose do Amorikoren Sihon rajakʼ rajosṭi ar Basonren Og rajakʼ rajosṭi do Gad ar Ruben gusṭiren hoṛko ar Manasi adha gusṭiren hoṛkoe hạṭińatʼkoa. Nui Manasi do Josephren hopone tahẽkana. Ato ar nagraha ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ jaega goṭage onko lạgitʼe dohokeda. 
Numbers32:34 Gad gusṭiren hoṛko do Dibon, Atarot, Aroer." 
Numbers32:35 Atrot Saphan, Jaser, Jogbeha," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-Nimra ar Bet-Haran ńutumanakʼ atoko ar nagrahako do pạcriteko esetʼ ạcurkeda ar akoren ḍaṅgrako ar bhiḍiko lạgitʼ hõ oṛakʼko benaokeda. 
Numbers32:37 Ruben gusṭiren hoṛko do Hesbon, Elale, Kirjathayim nagraha ar Nebo, Bakʼal Meon ar Sibma ńutumanakʼ atoko benaokeda. Ar okako atoko benaoketʼ onako do nãwãteko ńutum arokeda. Nebo Bakʼal Meon ato reakʼ ńutum doko bodol akatʼtahẽkana." 
Numbers32:38  
Numbers32:39 Manasi hopon Makirren bõsko do Gilead disạmte senkate laharege disạmko dokhol akatʼ tahẽkana ar onḍe okoe Amoriko tahẽkan onkoko laga ńirketʼkoa. 
Numbers32:40 Onate Mose do Manase bõsren Makeriko lạgitʼ do Gileade ematʼkoa. Ar onko do onḍe tahenko ehopʼena. 
Numbers32:41 Jayer ńutuman Manaseren mitʼ bõsren hoṛ do senkate Amorikoakʼ atoko dokhol akatʼ tahẽkana ar onako reakʼ ńutum do Habot Jayerko dohokeda. 
Numbers32:42 Ar Noba do senkate Kenat ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko dokholkate acʼakʼ ńutum lekate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Nobae dohokeda. 
Numbers33:1 Mose ar Aronakʼ ạyurte Israelko do palṭonko leka Misor disạm khon oḍok tayom judạ judạ jaegare ḍera ḍerateko calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Numbers33:2 Ar daṛan horre okako jaegareko ḍeralen Probhu Isorakʼ hukumte Mose do onae ol dohokeda. Ar okako jaegareko ḍeralen ona do hoyokʼkana: 
Numbers33:3 Bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ dosar hilokʼ bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ gelmõṛẽ tạrikre Israelko do Ramases khonko mohnḍalena. Onko do sanam Misrikoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khonko oḍok hecʼlena. 
Numbers33:4 Ar misriko do unre akoren pạhil hoponkoko topayetʼko tahẽkana. Probhu Isor do onkoren pạhil hoponkoe gocʼletʼkoa ar onkoren debotakoe sạjạiletʼkoa. 
Numbers33:5 Israelko do Ramases bạgi oṭowatʼte Sukotre hecʼkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:6 Ona tayom onko do Sukot bạgiyatʼte hahaṅkar aṛe reakʼ Ethamreko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:7 Etham bạgikate onko do Bakʼal Sephon samaṅ reakʼ Pi-Hakirotte ruạṛ hecʼkate Migdol ṭhenko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:8 Onko do Pi-Hakirot bạgiyatʼte jalapuriko paromkeda ar Etham hahaṅkar ṭoṭhateko rakapʼena ar ona talate pe din reakʼ horte senkate Marareko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:9 Marako bạgiyatʼte Elimreko ḍerayena. Onḍe do gelbar goṭecʼ dakʼ jharna ar eaegel khijur dare tahẽkan. 
Numbers33:10 Tayomte onko do Elim bạgiyatʼte arakʼ jalapuri aṛere senkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:11 Ona tayom onko do arakʼ jalapuri khon uṭhạuente Sin hahaṅkarreko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:12 Sin hahaṅkar bạgikate onko do Dophkare senkateko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:13 Dophka bạgikate Alusreko ḍerayena. 
Numbers33:14 Alus khon uṭhạukate Rephidimre senkateko ḍerayena. Noḍe do hoṛko lạgitʼ jãhãn dakʼ baṅ tahẽkana. 
Numbers34:1 Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko noa hukumakoe metadea, “Kanante bolokate sompotti mente oka disạmpe emocokʼ ona reakʼ simạna do nonka hoyokʼa:" 
Numbers34:2  
Numbers34:3 “Edom disạm reakʼ simạna aṛe reakʼ oka Sin hahaṅkar menakʼ ona reakʼ thoṛa hĩs do apeakʼ disạm reakʼ dạkhin secʼ hoyokʼtapea. Ar Purub secʼ apeakʼ noa dạkhin simạna do buluṅ doreão reakʼ mucạtʼ hạṭiń khon ehopʼkate Akrabim buru horte paromkate Sin buluṅ doreão secʼ ucuń bolokate Kades reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ calakʼa. Ar ona tayom do Hasor Adar secʼ hecʼkate Asmon hạbicʼ calakʼa. 
Numbers34:4  
Numbers34:5 Ona tayom onḍe khon ạcurkate Misor ńutuman okaṭakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa menakʼ ona secʼte jalapurire senkate mucạdokʼa. 
Numbers34:6 “Apeakʼ disạm reakʼ pạchim secʼ simạnako do jalapuri hạbicʼ hoyokʼa. Noage apeakʼ pạchim senakʼ mucạtʼ simạ do tahena. 
Numbers34:7 “Utạr secʼakʼ simạ lạgitʼ do jalapuri khon Hor buru ar Hor buru khon Hamat hạbicʼ mitʼṭecʼ simạna dagpe ṭhika dohokakʼa. Ar onḍe khon ona simạna dag do Sedad secʼte Siphron hạbicʼ parom calakʼa ar Hasar Enante senkate mucạdokʼa. Ar noage hoyokʼa apeakʼ utạr secʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ simạna do. 
Numbers34:8  
Numbers34:9  
Numbers34:10 “Purub secʼ reakʼ simạna lạgitʼ do Hasar Enan khon Sepham hạbicʼ mitʼṭecʼ simạna dagpe ṭhik dohokakʼa. 
Numbers34:11 Noa simạna dag do Sepham khon Enan secʼte Ribla hạbicʼ pheḍ hijukʼa ar Kenerot doreão reakʼ jaegako secʼte calao idikʼa. 
Numbers34:12 Ona tayom niạ simạna dag do jordan reakʼ buluṅ doreãote senkate mucạdokʼa. “Beṛhaetaeakʼ niạko simạna dag bhitrire noage hoyokʼa apeakʼ disạm do.” 
Numbers34:13 Inạ tayom Mose do Israelko hukumatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ape do gulibãṭ hotete Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka disạm do aperen are gusṭi ar Manasekoren adha gusṭi talarepe hạṭińakoa ar apeakʼ sompottipe hoeocoya." 
Numbers34:14 Ente Ruben gusṭirenko, Gad gusṭirenko ar Manaseren adha gusṭiren bõsko do laharege akoakʼ sompottiko ńamakatʼ tahẽkana." 
Numbers34:15 Onko do Jerikho samaṅ secʼ jordan purub aṛere sompottiko ńamkeda.” 
Numbers34:16 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Numbers34:17 “Sompotti lekate okoe disạmko hạṭińape unkin dokin hoyokʼkana naeke Eleasar ar Nunren hopon Josuạ. 
Numbers34:18 Ar sompotti hạṭińape reakʼ kạmire goṛo emakin lạgitʼ mimitʼ gusṭiko khon mitʼṭen mukhiyạ do hataoe hoyokʼa. 
Numbers34:19 Onko mukhiyạko doko hoyokʼ kana: Jihudạ gusṭiren Jephun hopon Kaleb: 
Numbers34:20 Simeon gusṭiren do Amihud hopon Samuel; 
Numbers34:21 Benjạminren gusṭiren do Kision hopon Elidad; 
Numbers34:22 Dan gusṭiren do Jogli hopon Buki; 
Numbers34:23 Josephren hopon Manase gusṭiren mukhiyạ Ephodren hopon Haniel; 
Numbers34:24 Josephren hopon Ephrayem gusṭiren mukhiyạ Siphtanren hopon Kemuel; 
Numbers34:25 Sebulon gusṭiren mukhiyạ Parnak hopon Elisaphan; 
Numbers34:26 Isakar gusṭiren mukhiyạ Asanren hopon Paltiel; 
Numbers34:27 Aser gusṭiren mukhiyạ Selomi hopon Ahihud; 
Numbers34:28 Napthali gusṭiren mukhiyạ Amihud hopon Pedahel.” 
Numbers34:29 Kanan disạmre Israelko talare sompotti lekate jaega hạṭińako lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do noko hoṛkoe doholetʼkoa. 
Numbers35:1 Jerikho samna sạmni jordan gaḍa aṛe Moab otetre Probhu Isor do Mose hotete Israelkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Sompotti ńam tayom ape do ona khon Liwiko tahen lạgitʼ thoṛa ato ar nagrahape emakoa, ar ona sãote onkoren ạsul janwarko ạtiń lạgitʼ jaegahõpe emakoa." 
Numbers35:2  
Numbers35:3 Onate Liwiko do tahen lạgitʼ nagrahako ńama ar onkoren ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko, meromko ar judạ judạ ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi hõko ńama." 
Numbers35:4 “Okako ato ar nagrahako Liwipe emako ona khon ạsul janwar ạtińko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi do ato se nagraha reakʼ pạcri khon beṛhaete mitʼ hajar moka hạbicʼ jemon tahen. 
Numbers35:5 Mimitʼ ato se nagraha do talare dohokate ona bahre utạr ar dạkhin secʼ bar hajar moka, purub ar pạchim secʼ bar hajar mokape soṅakoa. Noage onko do ato se nagraharen ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi lekako ńama." 
Numbers35:6 “Okako ato ar nagrahako Liwikope emako ona modre turui goṭecʼ do asrayokʼ nagrahape benaoakoa. Ar jãhãe hoṛ jãhãegeye gocʼ emanle khan enḍekhan uni do onako asrayokʼ nagraha reakʼ mitʼṭecʼte senkateye dạṛ bańcao daṛeakʼa. Onako chaḍa onko do arhõ pongel bar goṭecʼ atope emakoa. 
Numbers35:7 Ape do jotote pongel irạl ato ar nagrahako Liwikope emakoa ar onako reakʼ beṛhaete mĩhũ-merom ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hõ jemon tahen. 
Numbers35:8 Israelkoakʼ sompotti khon okako ato ar nagrahako Liwikope emako ona do mimitʼ gusṭirenkolekate sompottipe bujhạuakoa. Ar okoe gusṭirenkoakʼ hạṭińre ḍher ato se nagraha paṛaokʼ ona gusṭirenko do ḍher ar oka gusṭirenkoakʼ hạṭińre thoṛa ato ar nagrahako paṛaokʼ ona gusṭirenko khon do kompe hataotakoa.” 
Numbers35:9 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Mose Israelko galmaraoakoe metadea, “Jordan gaḍa paromkate Kanan disạmte senkate ape apnar lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagrahape bachao joṅa jemon jãhãe hoṛ ackage jãhãeye gocʼ lekhan uni do onḍeye dạṛ bańcao daṛeakʼa." 
Numbers35:10  
Numbers35:11  
Numbers35:12 Noako nagraha do hakʼla ruạṛicʼakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ hoyokʼa, jemon uni do khũn iạte Israelkoakʼ bicạrre teṅgokʼ lahare aloe gujukʼ." 
Numbers35:13 Nõkʼõe turui goṭecʼ okako nagraha Liwikope emako ona do ape lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagraha hoyokʼa. 
Numbers35:14 Noako reakʼ pea do jordan gaḍa purub aṛere tahena ar pea do tahena Kanan disạm talare. 
Numbers35:15 Niạ turui goṭecʼ nagraha do Israel hoponko lạgitʼ ar upriạko lạgitʼ okoe do ape talareko berelakan hoṛko lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagraha hoyokʼa. Jãhãe hoṛ ackage jãhãeye gocʼle khan uni do onḍeye ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers35:16 “Jãhãe hoṛ mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼ jiniste jãhãeye mage ar onate uniye gujukʼ tobe uni doe khũniạhi kana. Ar uni khũniạhi hoṛ do goje hoyokʼa. 
Numbers35:17 Okaṭakʼte manwae gujukʼ nonkan jãhãn dhiri jãhãeakʼ tire tahen ar onate jãhãeye tińe ar onate uniye gujukʼ enḍekhan teteńicʼ hoṛ doe khũniạhi kana. Ar uni khũniạhi hoṛ do goje hoyokʼa. 
Numbers35:18 Manwae gujukʼ nonkan jãhãn kaṭ reakʼ jinis jãhãeakʼ tire tahen ar jãhãe dale ar onate uniye gujukʼ enḍekhan uni dadalicʼ hoṛ doe khũniạhi kana. Ar uni khũniạhi hoṛ do goje hoyokʼa. 
Numbers35:19 Khũn akan hoṛakʼ mãyãm reakʼ hala hạli okoeye hatao unige uni khũniạhi do goje hoyokʼtaea; are ńamle khan jemon uni doe gocʼ giḍikae. 
Numbers35:20 Jãhãege kurud iạte jãhãe hoṛe kuhạue se tãṛãkʼaeteye capade ar uniye gujukʼ enḍekhan uni gogocʼicʼ doe khũniạhi kana; uni do gocʼ giḍikae hoyokʼa. Ar khũn akan hoṛakʼ mãyãm reakʼ hala hạli okoeye hatao uni do khũniạhiye ńamle khan jemone goje. 
Numbers35:21  
Numbers35:22 “Menkhan begor bene bạirite jãhãe bhulte jãhãeye kuhạue se jãhãnakʼteye capade se begor ńelte jãhãn dhiri uni cetanreye giḍiyae ar onate uniye gujukʼ, enḍekhan uni hoṛren bạiriye baṅkanre hõ ar uni hạne reakʼ monsubạ baṅ tahẽkantaere hõ noako niạm lekate Israelkoakʼ mãyãm reakʼ hala hạli okoe hataoe menetʼkan uni ar khũniạhĩ talare bicạr hoyokʼa." 
Numbers35:23  
Numbers35:24  
Numbers35:25 Bicạrre manḍerren hoṛko do unre mãyãm reakʼ haha hạli okoe hataoe menetʼ uniyakʼ ti khon khũn iạte dạyi akade hoṛ do rukhiyạkate ona asrayokʼ nagrahate kolkae hoyokʼa okare uni do dạdạṛe menletʼ tahẽkan. Ar sonot sunumte ojokʼakade maraṅ naekeakʼ gujukʼ ạuri hoyokʼ hạbicʼ uni hoṛ do onḍege tahen hoyokʼtaea. 
Numbers35:26 Menkhan uni hoṛ do jãhãtisokʼ ona asrayokʼ nagraha khon bahreteye oḍok hijukʼ ar mãyãm reakʼ haha hạli okoe hataoe menetʼkan uni do nagraha bahrereye uni khũniạhi hoṛe gocʼ daṛeaea, ar ona khũn iạte uni do jãhãn dạyire bae paṛaokʼa." 
Numbers35:27  
Numbers35:28 Ar maraṅ naeke ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ uni hoṛ do asrayokʼ nagraha bhitrirege tahen hoyokʼtaea. Eken maraṅ naekeye gocʼlen khan uni do acʼakʼ jaegateye ruạṛ hecʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers35:29 Disạm bhitrire jãhãregepe girobasokʼ, onḍe piṛhike piṛhi ape lạgitʼ noakoge ạn reakʼ dhara lekate tahena." 
Numbers35:30 “Gohayicʼakʼ goha cetanre ṭehãḍkate khũniạhi do goje hoyokʼa. Tobe eken mitʼ hoṛakʼ goha cetanre ṭehãḍkate okoehõ alope gocʼkoa. 
Numbers35:31 Okoe khuniạhĩ do gujukʼ sạjại ńam lek kane, uni do ṭakate hõ alope chaḍaoea. Uni do gojetege hoyokʼa." 
Numbers35:32 Asrayokʼ nagrahateye dạṛ akatʼ jãhãe hoṛge ṭaka bodolte maraṅ naekeakʼ gujukʼ lahare acʼakʼ ḍinḍạre senkate bae girobas daṛeakʼa. 
Numbers35:33 Apeakʼ disạm do alope besapha ocoya, ente mãyãmpe joro oco lekhan disạm do besaphakʼa. Ar oka disạmre mãyãm jorokʼ onḍe do mãyãm joro ocoyicʼakʼ mãyãm chaḍa ar okalekate hõ ona reakʼ chut do baṅ dapalokʼa." 
Numbers35:34 Ente ape oka disạmrepe tahen ińhõ onḍegeń tahena ar ona iạte disạm do alope besapha ocoya. Ar iń Probhu Isorge Israelko talareń girobasokʼ kana.” 
Numbers36:1 Joseph bõsrenkoakʼ bõs khon Gileadren judạ judạ bõsren mukhiyạko do hecʼkate Mose ar Israelren judạ judạ bõsren mukhiyạko sãote kathako roṛkeda. Gilead do Makirren hopon ar Manaseren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. 
Numbers36:2 Onkoko menkeda, “Israelko modre disạm reakʼ jaega jumi gulibãṭkate ṭhik reakʼ hukum emokʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do aleren mạlike metade tahẽkana aleren boeha Selophadakʼ sompotti do jemon uniren hoponerako ńam." 
Numbers36:3 Menkhan Israelkoren judạ gusṭiren hoṛko sãote noko kuṛiyakʼ bapla hoyokʼ enḍekhan aleren hapṛamkoakʼ sompotti khon onkoakʼ sompotti oḍokkate onkoren jãwãekoakʼ sompotti sãote midokʼtakoa, ar onate abo gusṭirenkoakʼ sompotti khon thoṛa hĩs do oḍokokʼa." 
Numbers36:4 Israelkoakʼ ruạṛ ńam bochorre onkoakʼ sompotti do sesre akoren jãwãekoakʼ gusṭi reakʼ sompotti sãote midokʼa. Ar nonkate aboren hapṛamkoakʼ gusṭi reakʼ sompotti khon onkoakʼ sompotti do oḍok hoyokʼa.” 
Numbers36:5 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Mose do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Josephren hoponkoakʼ noa gusṭiren hoṛko okako menakatʼ ona do ṭhikgea." 
Numbers36:6 Onate Selophadren hoponerako reaṅ Probhu Isor do noae hukumeda, onko do akoakʼ kusi leka jãhãegeko bapla daṛeakoa, menkhan onko do akoren apattetʼakʼ gusṭiren hoṛ hoyokʼ jạruṛtakoa." 
Numbers36:7 Israelkoakʼ sompotti do mitʼ gusṭi khon eṭakʼ gusṭite baṅ calakʼa. Mimitʼ Israelko do hapṛamko ṭhen khonko ńamakatʼ gusṭi reakʼ sompotti sapʼ dohoy hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers36:8 Israelko jemon akoren hapṛam ṭhen khonko ńamakatʼ sompottiren mạlikko tahẽdaṛeakʼ onate Israel gusṭiren mimitʼ kuṛi owarisko do akoren apattetʼakʼ gusṭiren jãhãege baplako hoyokʼtakoa. 
Numbers36:9 Oka sompottige mitʼ gusṭi khon eṭakʼ gusṭite do baṅ calakʼa. Israelren mitʼke mitʼ gusṭi do ńamakʼ sompotti sapʼ dohoy hoyokʼtakoa.” 
Numbers36:10 Unre Mahala, Thirsa, Hogla, Milkạ ar Noateko ńutuman Selophadren hoponerako do Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekageko kạmikeda." 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 Onko do Josephren hopon Manase bõsregeko baplayena. Onate onkoakʼ sompotti do akoren apattetʼakʼ bõs ar gusṭirege tahẽyena. 
Numbers36:13 Jerikho samna sạmni jordan gaḍa aṛe Moab reakʼ otetre Probhu Isor do Mose hotete Israelko noa hukum ar niạme ematʼko tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Mose do jordan gaḍa purub secʼ reakʼ hahaṅkar jaegare, metakʼme Arabatre sanam Israelkoe galmaraoatʼkoa. Ar oka jaegareye galmaraoatʼko ona do Sup samaṅ secʼre tahẽkana. Ona reakʼ mitʼ secʼre do Paran, Tophel, Laban, Haserot ar Di-Sahab tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Horeb khon Seyir buru reakʼ horte Kadesh hạbicʼ calakʼ do gelmitʼ din hạbicʼ lagaokʼa. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Israelko reaṅ Mose okakoe hukumade tahẽkan ona do onkoakʼ dãṛãn horre pongel bochor reakʼ gelmitʼ cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ Probhu Isor do onko ṭhene sodorleda. 
Deuteronomy1:4 Amorikoren raj Sihon ar Edreyi nagraha reakʼ Bason disạmren raj Og bhagaokin tayom uni do onae sodorleda. Sihon do Hesbonre ar Og do Astarotreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy1:5 Mose do Israelko jordan gaḍae paromketʼko tayom Moab disạmre ạn-ạri reakʼ noako katha galmaraoakoe ehopʼena. Uni doe metatʼkoa," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Aboren Probhu Isor do Horeb burureye metatʼbon tahẽkana, ‘noa burure ape do aema dinpe khemaokeda." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Ńitokʼ do ḍera uṭhạukate Amorikoakʼ buru ṭoṭha ar ona aḍepase jaegaren hoṛko ṭhen calakʼpe. Onko do Arabare, usul burure, latar burure, Negebre ar doreão aṛereko girobasokʼ kana. Noako jaega do hoyokʼ kana Kananikoakʼ disạm Lebanon secʼte maraṅ gaḍa phurạt hạbicʼ sanam jaegakoge." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ńelpe, onako jaega doń emakawatʼpea. Iń Probhu Isor do aperen hapṛam Abraham, Isahak, Jakob ar onko tayom do onkoren bõsko oka disạm emako lạgitʼ iń kiriạlen onḍe senkate ape do ona disạm ạidạri joṅpe.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Un jokhecʼ iń do apeń metatʼpe tahẽkana, ‘iń eskarte gokʼ ghõṛakate idipe do ohoń daṛelea." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Aperen Probhu Isor do nunạkʼe saṅge ocoakatʼpea je, teheń ape do sermaren ipil lekape saṅge akana." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do arhõ hajar doboṛe saṅge ocopema ar acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekageye bhorape ma. 
Deuteronomy1:12 Menkhan iń eskar do cekate apeakʼ bojha doń gokʼ sambṛao daṛeatapea? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Ape do apeakʼ gusṭiko khon ạkilanko, bujhạntar hoṛko, namḍak hoṛko bachaokope; jemon onko cetanre ńel todarot reakʼ bhariń em daṛeakʼ.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 “Unrepe roṛ ruạṛạdiń tahẽkana, ‘am okam menetʼkan onage bhage hoyokʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ona iạte aperen gusṭiko khon ạkilanko, bujhạntar hoṛko, namḍak hoṛko hataokate ape cetanre, hajarko cetanre, saeko cetanre, mõṛẽgelko cetanre, gelko cetanre mathako ar judạ judạ kạmiyạkoń bahalketʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Noko bikʼcạrko unreń metatʼko tahẽkana, ‘aperen boehako reakʼ ańjomtakope ar ona leka bicạr chinḍạukatakope baṅ do Israel boehako tala reakʼ jhogṛage baṅ do upriạko tala reakʼ jhogṛakange." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ar bicạrre okoeyakʼ mẽtʼãhã hõ alope beṅgetʼakʼa ar kạṭicʼ lạṭu sanamkoakʼ kathape ańjomtakoa. Bicạr reakʼ kạmi do Isorakʼkangea; onate okoe manwage alope botorakoa. Ar jãhãṭakʼ bicạr kuṭhingepe bujhạu khan ona do iń ṭhenpe ạguiya, ar iń do onań bicạr chinḍạukatakoa." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ape okaṭakʼ cekae hoyokʼtape unre ona hoń lạiyatʼpe tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Inạ tayom aboren Probhu Isorakʼ hukumte abo do Horeb buru bạgikate Amorikoakʼ buru ṭoṭha secʼ bon mohnḍa idiyena. Tinạkʼ maraṅ ar tinạkʼ botoranakʼ hahaṅkar talatebon calaolen ona dope ńelakada. Nonkate abo do Kadesre senkate bon seṭerena. 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ona tayom apeń metatʼpea, ‘abo do Amorikoakʼ buru ṭoṭhate bon seṭerakana; noa do aboren Probhu Isore emabon lạgitʼ." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ar ńelpe, aperen Probhu Isor emakʼ goṭa disạmge ape samaṅre menakʼa. Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka senkate ape do disạm dokhol joṅpe. Ar alope botorokʼa, ar alope as chuṭạukʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Unre ape do hecʼkatepe metadińạ, ‘disạm ciyạ lạgitʼ thoṛa hoṛ baṛe lahare kolkom, jemon onko do disạmko ńel ạguiyteko lại daṛeabon oka horte bon calakʼa ar okako nagraha abo samaṅre paṛaokʼa mente.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Unre apeakʼ katha do bhagegeń bujhạukeda. Onate aperen mimitʼ gusṭiko khon mitʼ hoṛkate jotote gelbar hoṛiń bachaoketʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy1:24 Onko do ape bạgikate ona buru ṭoṭhateko rakapʼ calaoena ar Eskol buru otet hạbicʼ mońjteko ńel ạgukeda. 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ar ona disạm reakʼ thoṛa jo hõ ạgu darakateko menkeda, ‘aboren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emabon lạgitʼdokʼkan ona do sạrige napaegea.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Menkhan ape do ona disạmte calakʼ bape rebenlena. Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ hukum upạrtepe teṅgoyena. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ape do apeakʼ tạmbukorepe hulkeda arpe menkeda, ‘Probhu Isor do aleye kurudale kana. Ona iạte uni do Amorikoakʼ tire jimạkate maraole lạgitʼ Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼlea." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Abo do cekate onḍebo calakʼa? Aboren boehage coṅ aboakʼ mon mako bạṛicʼ akatʼtabon. Onkoko meneda, onḍenko hoṛ do abo khonko daṛeangea arko maraṅgea; onkoakʼ nagrahako hõ maraṅgetakoa ar beṛhaete pạcri hõ usulgetakoa. Onḍe do Anakren hopon hõko ńelketʼkoa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ona ańjomkate apeń metatʼpea, ‘alope botorokʼa, ar onko hoṛ hõ alope botorakoa." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Aperen Isor Probhu Isorge ape laha lahateye calakʼa. Uni do ape mẽtʼãhã samaṅre Misor disạm ar hahaṅkarre cetʼleka ape secʼ hoykateye lạṛhạilen ńitokʼ hõ onkageye kạmiya. Arpe ńeletʼkangea, apat jemon hopon ghõṛakateye idiye onkage noa jaegare ạuripe seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ aperen Probhu Isor do goṭa hore ghõṛa ạgu akatʼpea.’" 
Deuteronomy1:31  
Deuteronomy1:32 Enhõ ape do aperen Probhu Isor cetanre bape bhorsalena. 
Deuteronomy1:33 Unige coṅ ḍera ṭhạ̃i ṭhik lạgitʼ ar hor udukʼ idiape lạgitʼ ńindạ do seṅgel khunṭire ar siń do rimil khunṭire tahẽkate apeye ạyur idiyetʼpe tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Apeakʼ katha ańjomkate Probhu Isor do edrete kiriạkateye menleda, ‘okaṭakʼ disạm aperen hapṛamko emako lạgitʼ iń gokʼatʼko tahẽkan eken Jephun hopon Kaleb chaḍa ar nonḍe bedhorom hoṛko modren mitʼhoṛ hõ ona do bako ńela. Eken Kaleb eskargeye ńela. Uni do purạte Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekae calakʼkante onae ńela ar onḍe okareye dãṛã ạguakatʼ onage iń do uni ar uniren bõskoń emakoa.’" 
Deuteronomy1:35  
Deuteronomy1:36  
Deuteronomy1:37 “Ape iạte Probhu Isor hõ iń cetanre bekusi iạteye men akada, ‘ona disạmre amhõ bam bolo ńama," 
Deuteronomy1:38 menkhan amren gokʼṛoyicʼ Nun hopon Josuạ doe bolokʼa. Am do Josuạ udgạu emaeme, ente unige disạm doe dokhola ar Israelko ạidạri lekateye emakoa." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ar okoeko gidrạko reaṅpe menletʼ baṅma bondikateko idikotapea onko gidrạko, okoe do boge bạṛicʼ papacnao reakʼ akel baṅ hoyakantako, onkoge ona disạmteko bolokʼa. Disạm do onkogeń emakoa ar onko do onako dokhol joṅa." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ńitokʼ ape do tayom secʼ ạcurkate Akaba doreão reakʼ horte hahaṅkar secʼ monhḍakʼpe.’ 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Niạ katha ańjomkate apepe menleda, ‘ale do Probhu Isor birudtele kại akada. Ńitokʼ ale do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekagele lạṛhạiya.’ Ar niạ menkate jotoge lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍape horokʼana. Arpe hudiskeda buru ṭoṭha secʼte rakapʼ calakʼ do algagea mente." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Menkhan Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, ‘onkom metakoa lạṛhại lạgitʼ jemon onḍe aloko rakapʼ calakʼ ente iń do onko sãote bạń tahena; onate onko do bạiri ṭhenko bhagao ocokʼa." 
Deuteronomy1:43 “Iń do onako kathageń baḍae ocoletʼpea menkhan bape luturatʼtińạ. Ape do Probhu Isor upạrte senkatepe phulạuena ar buru ṭoṭhatepe rakapʼ calaoena. 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ona ńelte okoe Amoriko ona burureko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan onko do ape upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena. Ar mitʼ jhãk dumur leka apeko lagaketʼpea ar Seir reakʼ Horma nagraha hạbicʼko tuṛ idiketʼpea. 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ar ruạṛ hecʼkate Probhu Isor ṭhenpe rakʼkeda, menkhan uni do apeakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼ bae ańjomletʼtapea; luture bondketʼtaea." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Nonkate ape do Kadesre ḍher dinpe tahẽyena ar onḍege ḍher dinpe khemaokeda. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Probhu Isor cetʼ lekae hukumạdiń tahẽkan onkage abo do ona tayom ruạṛkate Akaba doreão reakʼ horte hahaṅkar secʼ bon mohnḍa idiyena. Ar Seyir buru ṭoṭha secʼte ạcur ạcurte ḍher din do paromena. 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘ḍher din khon niạ buru ṭoṭhakorepe ạcur baṛae kana; niạ dhao do utạr secʼ ạcurokʼpe.’ 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ona tayom uni do apeko metape lạgitʼe metadińạ, ‘ńitokʼ do aperen Seyirren boeha Esao bõsrenkoakʼ rajosṭi talate calakʼ hoyokʼtapea. Ape ńelte onko do botor caṛhaoakoa menkhan sontor akae tahenpe." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Esao bõsrenko lạṛhại lạgitʼ alope uskạukoa, ente onkoakʼ disạm reakʼ okaṭakʼ hĩs hõ bạń emapea, apeakʼ jaṅga dohoy reakʼ ṭhạ̃i hõ baṅa. Ente Seyir reakʼ noa buru ṭoṭhako Esao do acʼakʼ disạm lekateń emakawadea." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Onko ṭhen khon jomakʼ ar dakʼ do ṭakate kiriń hoyokʼtapea.’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Aperen Probhu Isor do joto kạmiregeye bhor akawatʼpea. Ar noa maraṅ utạr hahaṅkar talate calakʼ jokhecʼ hõ uni do apeye ńel todarot akatʼpea. Niạ pongel bochor aperen Probhu Isor do ape sãoteye tahẽkana ar apeakʼ jãhãn okulạn hõ baṅ hoylentaepea. 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Onate abo do aboren Seyirren boeha Esao bõsrenko bạgikate bon hecʼena. Arabat reakʼ okaṭakʼ hor do Elat ar Esion Geber khon oḍok hecʼakan ona hor bạgikate Moab reakʼ hahaṅkar secʼtebon parom hecʼena. 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, ‘ape do Moabrenko alope buskokoa se lạṛhại lạgitʼ hõ alope uskạukoa, ente onkoakʼ disạm reakʼ oka hĩsge ape do bạń emapea. Iń do sompotti lekate Ar nagraha do Loṭren bõskoń emakawatʼkoa.”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Lahate Emiko do onako ṭoṭharegeko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Emi jạtren hoṛko do daṛeangeko tahẽkana, lekhare hõ ḍher ar Anakiko leka usulgeko tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Anakiko leka Emiko hõ Rephiyiko lekhakʼkan tahẽkana menkhan Moabrenko do Emiko metakokan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Seyirre do Horiko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan tayomte Esao bõsrenko do onḍe khon onkoko laga ńirletʼkoa. Probhu Isor do sompotti lekate Israelko okaṭakʼ disạme ematʼko tahẽkan onḍe onko okako kạmiletʼ Esao bõsrenko hõ ṭhik onageko kạmileda; onko do Horikoko maraoketʼkote onkoakʼ jaegare apnar girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Ona tayom Probhu Isorre menkeda, ‘ńitokʼ do beretʼkate Serod reakʼ soḍokʼte parom calakʼpe.’ Ar abo do ona bon parom ạgukeda." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kades bạgikate Sered soḍokʼ paromokʼte pegel irạl bochor lagao atʼbon tahẽkana. Kades bạgi oṭowakʼ lahare ḍerare okoe palṭonko tahẽkan onko sanamkoge niạ pegel irạl bochor bhitrite Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ reakʼ katha lekateko gocʼena. 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ḍera khon maraoko lạgitʼ Probhu Isorge onko upạrteye kạmikeda, onko ạuriko marao caba utạrokʼ hạbicʼ." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Onko palṭonko gocʼen tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘teheń ape do Ar nagraha aṛete Moab disạm reakʼ simạ bạgikate calakʼ hoyokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy2:17  
Deuteronomy2:18  
Deuteronomy2:19 Menkhan ape do tinre Amonrenko ṭhenpe seṭerokʼa unre onko do alope ạṛiskoa se lạṛhại lạgitʼ alope uskạukoa, ente Amonrenkoakʼ disạm reakʼ okaṭakʼ hĩs hõ ape do bạń emapea. Ona do Loṭ bõsrenko sompotti lekateń em dohoakatʼkoa.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Ona disạm do Rephiyimkoakʼ disạm hõko metakʼkan tahẽkana, ente onko do laha khon onḍeko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana; ar Amonrenko do Samsumi jạtren hoṛko metakokan tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Rephayimko do daṛean ar lekhare ḍhergeko tahẽkana. Ar Anakiko leka usul hoṛko tahẽkana. Probhu Isor do Amonrenko hotete onkoe maraoletʼkoa; ar Amonrenko do Rephayimkoko laga ńirketʼkote onkoakʼ jaegare girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Deuteronomy2:22 Probhu Isor do Esao bõsrenko babotre hõ inạ mitʼ kạmigeye kạmileda. Uni do onko hotete Horikoe maraoletʼkoa. Onko do Horikoko laga ńirketʼkote onkoakʼ jaega Seyirre teheń hạbicʼko girobasokʼ kana. 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kaphtor khon Kaphtoriko hecʼkate Awikoko maraoketʼkote onkoakʼ jaegare girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Ar Awiko do unre Gasa hạbicʼ sanam atoreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Ona tayom Probhu Isor doe metadińa, ‘ape do oḍok hijukʼpe ar Arnon gaḍa paromkate calakʼpe. Ńelpe, iń do Hesbonren Amorikoren Sihon raj ar uniyakʼ disạm do apeakʼ tireń jimạ akada. Ape do uniyakʼ disạm dokhol iạte lạṛhại lạgitʼpe uskạukoa." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Teheń khon dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko talare ape reaṅ mitʼṭecʼ botoriń caṛhao ocoytakoa. Onko do apeakʼ kathako ańjomle khan botorteko thar tharaokʼa ar ape iạte ạḍiko cintạkʼa.’ 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Inạ tayom iń do suluk dohoy lạgitʼ Kedemot hahaṅkar khon Hesbonren Sihon raj ṭhen kathań roṛ gotʼkada," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘amakʼ disạm talate calao ocoaleme baṛe. Ale do etom se końe secʼ bale beṅgeda ar ḍahartegele parom calakʼa. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ar ṭakate ale do amakʼ jomakʼ ar dakʼle kirińtama. Ente aleren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emale lạgidokʼkan ar jordan gaḍa ạurile paromokʼ hạbicʼ amakʼ disạm talate taṛam parom ocoaleme. Seyirren hoṛ Esao bõsrenko ar Aer nagraharen Moabren hoṛko do aboko parom hecʼ ocowatʼbona.’ 
Deuteronomy2:29  
Deuteronomy2:30 Menkhan Hesbonren Sihon raj do bae rạjilena. Aboren Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ mone keṭecʼ ocoketʼtaea jemon aboakʼ tireye paṛaokʼ, ar ńitokʼ do onage hoyakana." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Tayomte Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, ‘ńelpe, Sihon ar uniyakʼ rajosṭi do ape tireń jimạyeda. Am do ńitokʼ senkate uniyakʼ disạm dokhol joṅme ar onḍe girobasokʼpe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 “Inạ tayom tinre Sihon do abo sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoante Johasreye oḍok hecʼena unre aboren Probhu Isor do aboakʼ tire uniye jimạkedea. Ar abo do uni ar uniren sanam hoponko ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko bon maraoketʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy2:33  
Deuteronomy2:34 Ona jokhecʼ abo do uniyakʼ sanam atoko ar nagrahako bon dokholketʼte onkoren herel hoponko, maejiuko ar gidrạko bon marao cabaketʼkoa; onkoren celege jiwetʼ do babon doholetʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Menkhan janwarko ar nagraha khon luṭ akan jinisko do apnar lạgitʼ bon ạgukeda. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Ar Arnon soḍokʼ aṛe reakʼ Aroer nagraha ar ona soḍokʼ tala reakʼ ato khon ehopʼkate Gilead hạbicʼ nonkan jãhãn daṛeanakʼ atoko se nagraha do baṅ tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do babon jitạu daṛeakʼ tahẽkan. Aboren Probhu Isor do onako sanamakʼge aboakʼ tireye jimạkeda. 
Deuteronomy2:37 Eken Amonrenkoakʼ jaega, Jabok gaḍa aṛe reakʼ jaega, buru tala reakʼ jaega ar eṭakʼakʼ okako jaega senokʼe manaletʼ bon tahẽkan, onako jaega do ape hõ bape senlena." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Inạ tayom abon do ạcurente Bason secʼakʼ horte bon sen idiyena. Ar Basonren raj ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do abo sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ Edreyi nagrahareko oḍok hecʼena. 
Deuteronomy3:2 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, ‘am do alom botoraea, ente uni ar uniyakʼ disạm ar lạṛhại phạdko do amakʼ tireń jimạ akatʼkoa. Am do Hesbonreye tahẽkan Amorikoren Sihon rajakʼ oka halotem hoeoco akatʼtae onkage nuiyakʼ hõm hoeocoytaea.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Nonkate aboren Probhu Isor do Basonren Og raj ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko aboakʼ tireye jimạletʼkoa. Ar abon do onko sanamkoge bon gocʼketʼkoa; cele hõ jiwetʼ do babon doholetʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ona jokhecʼ abon do uniyakʼ ato ar nagrahako bon hatketʼtaea. Uniyakʼ turui gel goṭecʼ nagraha reakʼ joto nagrahage bon dokholkeda; ar mitʼṭen hõ babon sarecʼ oṭoleda. Goṭa Argog ṭoṭha, metakʼme Bason tala reakʼ Ogakʼ goṭa rajosṭige abo dobon dokhokeda." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Noako nagrahako do usul pạcrikote esetʼ ạcur tahẽkana ar onare do phaṭok duạr ar hurkạṛko hõ tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Abon do onako ato ar nagrahako purạte bon marao giḍiletʼ tahẽkana. Hesbonren raj Sihon bon cekalede onkage onkoren herel hoponko, maejiuko ar gidrạko ar mimitʼ atoko ar nagrahako jotogebon marao utạrleda." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Menkhan onḍe khon sanam janwar ar luṭ ạguwakʼ jinisko do apnar lạgitʼ bon ạguwan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ona jokhecʼ abo do Arnon gaḍa khon Hermon buru hạbicʼ jordan gaḍa purub secʼ reakʼ jaegako do nukin banar Amorikoren rajakʼ ti khon bon recʼ hataoan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy3:9 Hermon do Sidonren hoṛko Sirion ar Amoriko do Senirko metakʼkana. 
Deuteronomy3:10 Ar onako bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam atoko ar nagrahako, goṭa Gilead ṭoṭha ar Basonren raj Ogakʼ rajosṭi Salka ar Edre hạbicʼ goṭa Bason disạmge abo dobon dokholkeda." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Rephiyikoren sarecʼ hoṛko modre eken Basonren raj Ogge jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ benaoakʼ giticʼ aṭetʼ do jeleńte are moka ar osarte pon moka tahẽkana. Ona do ńitokʼ hõ Amonrenkoakʼ Raba nagrahare menakʼa. 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Abo bon ạidạri akawan jaega khon iń do unre Arnon gaḍa ṭhen Aroer nagraha bahre utạr secʼ reakʼ ṭoṭha ar Gilead buru ṭoṭha reakʼ adha ar onḍenakʼ sanam atoko ar nagraha do Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛkoń ematʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy3:13 Gilead disạm reakʼ sarecʼ hạṭiń ar Og rajakʼ goṭa Bason rajosṭi do Manasi gusṭiren adha hoṛkoń ematʼkoa. “Bason tala reakʼ sanam Argab ṭoṭha do Rephiyikoakʼ disạmko metakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manase hopon Jayir do Gesuri ar Makathikoakʼ simạna hạbicʼ goṭa Argob ṭoṭha dokholkate apnarakʼ ńutum lekaye dohokeda. Onate ńitokʼ Bason do Habot-Jayirko metakʼkana. 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Ar Makir do Gilead ṭoṭhań emadea. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Menkhan Gilead khon Arnon soḍokʼ reakʼ adha simạ hạbicʼ sanam jaega ar onḍe khon Amonrenkoakʼ simạna Jabok gaḍa hạbicʼ iń do Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛkoń ematʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy3:17 Pạchim secʼ onkoakʼ ses simạna do Araba jordan gaḍa reakʼ okaṭakʼ hĩs do Kineret khon Pisga buruko reakʼ dhasna reakʼ Araba doreão, metakʼme buluṅ doreão hạbicʼ sen akana." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ona tayom iń do onkoń metatʼkoa, ‘Aperen Probhu Isor do noa jaegage dokhol lạgitʼe em akatʼpea. Menkhan ape talare okoekoakʼ daṛe menakʼ onko do lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako horokʼkate Israel boehako laha lahate gaḍa paromokʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Tobe apekoakʼ okako ato ar nagrahako pạcrite esetʼ hoyen onḍe aperen bạhuko, gidrạko ar ạsul janwarkope doho oṭo daṛeakoa. Ińiń baḍaea aperen ạsul janwarko doko ḍhergetapea." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Probhu Isor tinạkʼ din ape leka aperen boehako jirạukʼ reakʼ ạt bae emako ar jordan gaḍa hanasare okaṭakʼ disạm aperen Probhu Isor do onkoe emako lạgidokʼkan ona ạuriko ạidạri joṅ hạbicʼ ape do lạṛhạitege tahen hoyokʼtapea. Ar ona tayom do noa jaegape emocokʼa ar nonḍepe ruạṛ hecʼ daṛeakʼa.’ 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Onako dinre iń do Josuạń metadea, ‘aboren Probhu Isor do nukin raj cetanre okae cekaketʼ ona do amakʼ mẽtʼtegem ńelkeda. Ar okarepe calakʼkan onḍenakʼ sanam rajosṭiko reakʼ hõ Probhu Isor do onkageye hoeocoya." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Onko do alope botorakoa; aperen Probhu Isorge ape secʼ hoykateye lạṛhạiya.’ 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ar onako dinre iń do Probhu Isor ṭhen nẽhorenteń menkeda," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘E Probhu Isor, am do maraṅ arem daṛeangea ar amren guti onam udukʼae kana. Serma ar dhạrtire okoe debota menakʼkoa, amem kạmikanakʼkoe kạmi daṛeke ar amem udukʼ akatʼ daṛekoe udukʼ daṛeke?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Jordan gaḍa paromkate ona napae utạr disạm, metakʼme ona buru disạm ar ona Lebanon disạm baṛe ńel ocoạńme.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Menkhan ape iạte Probhu Isor do iń cetanreye edreyente ińakʼ kathako do bae ańjomletʼtińạ. Uni doe metadińạ, ‘ḍher hoyakana. Niạ babotre iń do ar alom mitạńa." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Am do Pisga buru muthnite rakapʼkate utạr- dạkhin ar purub-pạchim secʼ beṅgedme. Jordan gaḍa bam parom daṛeakʼre hõ amakʼ mẽtʼte disạm do mitʼdhao ńelme. 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ar Josuạ cetʼe cekaea ona baṛe lạiyaeme; ona sãote udgạu ar dil emaeme, ente uni do lahate senkate hoṛkoe parom idikoa ar okaṭakʼ disạm ńel lạgitʼem menetʼ tahẽkan ona do onkom ạidạriakoa.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Ona iạte abo do Bet-peor mohnḍa muhnḍi reakʼ buru tala reakʼ otetre bon tahẽyena. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “E Israelko, iń okaṭakʼ niạm ar ạn-ạriko cetʼapeń menetʼkan ona ńitokʼ ańjompe. Ape do noako manao idiy hoyokʼtapea jemon jiwetʼpe tahen ar aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe senkatepe ạidạri joṅ." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Iń do okaṭakʼ hukumiń emapekan ona sãote jãhãnakʼ alope juṭucʼakʼa ar ona khon jãhãnakʼ hõ alope meṭao giḍikakʼa. Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ hukumgepe manao idiya. 
Deuteronomy4:3 “Probhu Isor do Bakʼal-Peorre okae cekaletʼ ona ma nijạrakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńelakatʼ. Apeko modren okoe do Peorren Bakʼal debotako sewawae kan tahẽkan aperen Probhu Isor do onko mimitʼko ape tala khone marao akatʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Menkhan ape okoe do aperen Probhu Isorpe sapʼ dohoakade ape do sanamkoge ńitokʼ hõ jiwetʼge menakʼpea. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Ińren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bataokate ape hõ ạn-ạrikoń cetʼ akawatʼpea; jemon oka disạm ạidạri lạgitʼpe calakʼkan ona disạmre onape manao daṛeakʼ. Ar joton salakʼ onakope manao idiy. 
Deuteronomy4:6 Noako manao idi talate eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko samaṅre apeakʼ bud ạkil do sodorokʼtapea. Ar noako niạm reaṅ ańjomkateko mena, ‘onko do jạtren lekate sạrigeko maraṅgea arko ạkilangea ar budan hoṛkanako.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Nonkan ar okoe maraṅ jạtren menakʼkoa one onkoren Isor do ako ṭhenko tahenkan, cetʼleka aboren Probhu Isor bon hohowaere sorreye ńamokʼkan?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Nonkan ar okoe jạtren menakʼkoa one onkoakʼ niạm ar ạn-ạriko ape ṭhen teheń iń emakʼ niạm leka hokte perecʼge? 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Jiwetʼ jonom sontor akae tahenpe ar ape cetanre nojor dohoype jemon mẽtʼte okape ńelakatʼ ona alope hiṛiń ar apeakʼ ontor khon alope meṭao ocoy. Noako ape do aperen hoponko ar goṛom gidrạkope cetʼakoa. 
Deuteronomy4:10 Ar enhilokʼ reakʼ katha monre disạ dohokakʼpe oka hilokʼ Horeb burure Probhu Isor samaṅrepe hạjirlen. Enhilokʼ uni do ińe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘ińakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ hoṛko iń samaṅre jarwakom jemon onko do niạ dhạrtire jiwetʼ jonom ińgeko sewawạń ar onkoren hoponko hõ ińakʼ hukum reakʼko cetʼako.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Unre ape do ona buru latarre senkatepe teṅgolena; ar ńutte esetʼ akan buru ar dhundte perecʼ rimil do serma hạbicʼ jolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy4:12 Unre seṅgel tala khon Probhu Isor do ape ṭhen kathae roṛleda. Ar ape do uniyakʼ kathape ańjomkeda menkhan uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bape ńelńamleda, eken uniyakʼ aṛaṅ motogepe ańjomleda." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Uni do ape ṭhen acʼakʼ bondobos, metakʼme uniyakʼ gel hukume sodorleda. Uni do ona gel hukum manao idi reakʼe metatʼpe tahẽkana ar dhiri reakʼ barea paṭareye olletʼ tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Jordan gaḍa paromkate okaṭakʼ disạmpe ạidạri lạgidokʼkan ona disạmre senkate okako niạm ar ạn-ạriko manao hoyokʼtapea ona reakʼ sikhnạt emokʼ lạgitʼ unre Probhu Isor do ińe hukumạdiń tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Horeb burure oka hilokʼ Probhu Isor do seṅgel tala khon ape ṭhene roṛletʼ enhilokʼ ape do uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã bape ńelńamletʼtaea. Ona iạte ape do ape cetanre nońjorpe dohoya," 
Deuteronomy4:16 jemon bạṛicʼ horte senkate jãhãn murhutʼko alope benaokoa se jãhãn muṭhạn hõ alope benaojoṅa- baṅ do herelakʼge cetʼ baṅ do maejiuakʼge cetʼ," 
Deuteronomy4:17 baṅ do otren jãhãn janwarkoakʼge, baṅ do coṭren uḍạu baṛaekan cẽṛẽkoakʼge," 
Deuteronomy4:18 baṅ do lacʼte taṛametʼkan jiwiyankoakʼge, baṅ do dakʼren jãhãn hakokoakʼge onako cetʼge alope sewawakʼa." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Serma secʼ beṅgetʼkate siń-cando, ńindạ-cando ar ipilko, metakʼme coṭ sermare menakʼakʼ jiniskote apeakʼ mẽtʼ do alo baṛe bulạukʼtapema ar dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko cetanre emakʼ aperen Probhu Isorakʼ noa jinisko reakʼ alope sewawakʼa." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Disạipe, Probhu Isor do apeye bachao akatʼpea ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ seṅgel bhaṭa metakʼme Misor khone oḍok ạguakatʼpea jemon uniren hoṛpe hoyokʼ ar ape do ńitokʼ onagepe hoyakana." 
Deuteronomy4:21 “Ape iạte Probhu Isor do iń cetanre hõe edre akana. Uni do kiriạkateye men akada, sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ mońj disạm aperen Probhu Isor do apeye emape lạgidokʼkan, onḍe jordan gaḍa paromkate iń do bạń calao daṛeakʼ." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Iń do nonḍegeń gujukʼa, jordan gaḍa do bạń parom daṛeakʼa; menkhan ape do gaḍa paromkate ona mońjakʼ disạmpe ạidạri lạgidokʼ kana." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Aperen Isor ape lạgitʼ okae bondobos akatʼ, ona reakʼ sontorokʼpe, ona do alope hiṛińa. Ar aperen Probhu Isore mana akatʼ jãhãn muṭhạnko alope benaojoṅa," 
Deuteronomy4:24 ente aperen Probhu Isor doe jojom seṅgel kana; ar acʼakʼ paona bhokti lạgitʼ do ãṭokʼicʼ Isorge. 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ape ar aperen bõsko ona disạmre ḍher dinpe girobasokʼ tayom tinre bạṛicʼ horte senkate sewawako lạgitʼ muṭhạnkope benaojoṅa ar aperen Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onape onkaete unipe khĩs ocoye," 
Deuteronomy4:26 enḍekhan teheńge iń do un okte lạgitʼ serma ar ot do ape upạrte goha dohokateń meneda, ape do jordan gaḍa paromkate okaṭakʼ disạmpe ạidạri lạgidokʼkan ona disạmre thoṛa dintegepe ses utạrokʼa. Ar onḍe ḍher din do bape girobas daṛeakʼa, khạṭigepe marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Probhu Isor do ạḍi lekan jạtrenko talareye chirchạtur ocopea ar okoeko talareye laga ńirpe onko talare ape do thoṛa hoṛge jiwetʼpe tahena. 
Deuteronomy4:28 Onḍe ape do manwa tite kaṭren ar dhiriren benao muṭhạnkope sewawakoa okoe do bako ńeńel, bako ańjom, bako jom daṛeakʼ ar sãhetʼ hõ bako sãhetʼ daṛeakʼ." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Menkhan ape do aperen Probhu Isor secʼ monpe ạcurtapea ar onate unipe ńamea, tobe apeakʼ goṭa mon, goṭa jiwi ar ontorte unipe sendrayea." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ar tinre kosṭorepe paṛaokʼa ar noako ape cetanre hijukʼa unre tayom daram reakʼ ona dinkore aperen Probhu Isor ṭhenpe ruạṛ hijukʼa arpe bataotaea. 
Deuteronomy4:31 Aperen Probhu Isor doe dayakʼicʼ Isor kana; uni do bae bạgiyapea se bae maraopea, menkhan kiriạkate aperen hapṛamko lạgitʼ oka bondobose dohoakatʼ ona do alope hiṛińa." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Isor do dhạrtire manwa sirjạukede tayom khon ar apeko bidạl reakʼ laha dinko khon khoj hataokate ńelpe; serma reakʼ mitʼ mucạtʼ khon eṭakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ kulijoṅpe, okako hoyakan ona lekan maraṅ ar jãhãnakʼko hoyakana se baṅa, se ona lekan jãhãnakʼ ańjom akana se baṅa," 
Deuteronomy4:33 se ape leka eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko seṅgel tala khon Isorakʼ roṛ ańjomkate jiwetʼ menakʼkoa se baṅa. 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ape do kuli joṅpe, aperen Probhu do apeakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre Misor disạmre ape lạgitʼ okae cekaletʼ onka jãhãn debota jãhãtisokʼ biḍạu hotete, hahaṛa kạmi hotete, cinhạ kạmikote, lạṛhại talate, keṭecʼ ar daṛeanakʼ tite ar maraṅ ar botoranakʼ kạmiko hotete jãhãn jạtren hoṛko eṭakʼ jạtrenko tala khon apnar lạgitʼe oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa se baṅa." 
Deuteronomy4:35 “Ape jemonpe baḍae daṛeakʼ, Probhu kangeae Isor do ar uni chaḍa cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa, ona iạtege noako dope ńel ocolena." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Uni do acʼakʼ ḍanṭao tabere ạgupe lạgitʼ serma khon acʼakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoletʼpea ar ape do dhạrtire uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ seṅgel, ar ona seṅgel tala khon uniyakʼ aṛaṅpe ańjomleda." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Uni do aperen hapṛamkoe dulạṛketʼkoa ar ona tayom do onkoren bõskoe bachao hataoana. Ar onate acʼ hạjir tahẽkate acʼakʼ maraṅ daṛete Misor disạm khon apeye oḍok ạguketʼpea. 
Deuteronomy4:38 Uni doe onka akada jemon maraṅ ar daṛean jạtrenko ape samaṅ khone laga ńirkote onkoakʼ disạmte apeye idi daṛeape ar sompotti lekate onae em daṛeape; ar teheń do onage hoyakana. 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Teheń ape do niạ katha baḍaekakʼpe ar ontorre rebetʼ dohokakʼpe, Probhu Isorge coṭ sermaren ar latar otren Isor kanae, uni chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ape ar ape tayom aperen hoponko jemon bhạlại hoyokʼtako ar aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm jaejug lạgitʼe emape lạgidokʼ kan onare jemon ḍher din jiwetʼpe tahẽdaṛeakʼ onate iń do onako ạn-ạri ar hukumkoń emape kana onako manao idipe baṛe.” 
Deuteronomy4:41 Inạ tayom Mose do jordan gaḍa reakʼ purub secʼre pea nagrahae bachaokeda jemon jãhãege jãhãeye gocʼlere bańcaokʼ lạgitʼ onḍeye dạṛ bańcao daṛeakʼa. Monre jãhãn raṅgao doho baṅkate ackage onkanakʼe kạmi lekhan uni do ona asrayokʼ nagrahareye dạṛ bańcao daṛeakʼa. Ar okako nagrahare jiwi rukhiyại lạgitʼe ńir bańcao daṛeakʼ onako do hoyokʼkana Rubenrenko lạgitʼ bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ Beser, Gadrenko lạgitʼ Gilead reakʼ Ramot ar Manaseko lạgitʼ Bason reakʼ Golan." 
Deuteronomy4:42  
Deuteronomy4:43  
Deuteronomy4:44 Mose do Israelko samaṅre noako ạn-ạrikoe samaṅatʼkoa. Misor khon oḍok hecʼen tayom uni do jordan reakʼ purub secʼ Hesbonren Amori raj Sihon reakʼ disạmre Bet-Peor mohnḍa muhnḍi reakʼ buru tala otetere Israelko ṭhen sontorokʼ reakʼ noako katha, niạm ar hukumkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Ar misor disạm khon oḍokʼ hecʼkate Mose ar Israelko do Sihon rajko bhagaokedea." 
Deuteronomy4:45  
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Onko do Sihon ar Basonren raj Ogakʼ disạmko ạidạriana. Amorikoren nukin rajakʼ rajosṭi do jordan gaḍa reakʼ purub secʼre tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Arnon otet aṛe reakʼ Aroer nagraha khon Sion buru, metakʼme Hormon buru hạbicʼ noakin rajosṭige tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Onakin modre jordan purub secʼ goṭa Araba ṭoṭha hõ tahẽkana. Noa do Pisga buru dhasna latar menakʼ doreão hạbicʼ sen akana. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose do sanam Israelko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “E Israelko, teheń ape ṭhen okako niạm ar hukumiń sodoretʼkan ona baṛe ańjompe. Ar onako cetʼ dohokakʼpe ar joton salakʼ manao idiype." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Aboren Probhu Isor do Horeb burure abo lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobose doholeda. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ona bondobos do aboren hapṛamko ṭhen bae emlena, menkhan abo ṭhen, metakʼme teheń okoe do nonḍe jiwetʼ menakʼbon abo sanamko ṭhenge." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Probhu Isor do ona buru cetanre seṅgel tala khon abo samaṅre kathae roṛleda. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Unre seṅgel botorte buru coṭte bape rakapʼlente iń do Probhu Isor ar ape talare teṅgokate uniyakʼ katha ape ṭheniń sodorleda. Unre Probhu Isor doe menleda," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ińge Probhu amren Isor. Misor disạm khon golam oṛakʼ khon ińgeń oḍok ạguakatʼmea. 
Deuteronomy5:7 ‘Iń samaṅre eṭakʼ Isorko aloko tahentam ma. 
Deuteronomy5:8 ‘Sekʼwae lạgitʼ jãhãn muṭhạnko alom benaojoṅa, baṅ do coṭ sermarenko reakʼ baṅ do otrenko reakʼ baṅ do ot latar dakʼrenko reakʼ." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Onako do alom ḍobokʼakʼa, ar sewa hõ alom sewawakʼa, ente iń Probhuge amren Isor do. Iń do ińakʼ paona bhoktiń khojkana. Okoeko kurudạń onkoakʼ kại reakʼ sạjại do onkoren hoponko ṭhen pe pon piṛhi hạbicʼ iń pańja halawako kana." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Menkhan okoe ińko dulạṛiń ar ińakʼ hukum lekako calakʼ onko do hajar piṛhi hạbicʼ iń dayawakoa. 
Deuteronomy5:11 ‘Amren Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum ạuṛi pạthạuṛi do alom ńumtaea. Ente okoeye onkae Probhu Isor do uniye sạjạiyea. 
Deuteronomy5:12 ‘Aperen Probhu Isor cetʼ lekae hukum akatʼme onkage jirạukʼ mãhã disạime ar ona sonotme. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Hapta reakʼ turui dinem khaṭaokʼa ar amakʼ jotowakʼem kạmiya," 
Deuteronomy5:14 menkhan eae din hilokʼ do amren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jirạukʼ din kana. Enhilokʼ do am ar amren hopon ar hoponerako, amren guti kạ̃ṛmĩko, amren ḍaṅgra, se gadha se eṭakʼ jãhãn janwarko se amakʼ ato se nagrahare girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko, okoe hõ cetʼge alope kạmiya. Onate amren guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩ hõ am leka jirạuko ńama." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Disạime, amhõ Misor disạmre guti se kạ̃ṛmĩm tahẽkana ar amren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite onḍe khone oḍok ạgu akatʼmea. Ona iạte uni do jirạukʼ mãhã manao reakʼ hukume em akatʼmea." 
Deuteronomy5:16 ‘Amren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bataotaeme ar amren gogo ar baba ganaokinme. Enḍekhan Probhu Isore emam disạmre ḍher din jiwetʼem tahena ar bhạlại hoyokʼtama. 
Deuteronomy5:17 ‘Alom khũna. 
Deuteronomy5:18 ‘Alom laṭghaṭa. 
Deuteronomy5:19 ‘Alom kombṛoya. 
Deuteronomy5:20 ‘Okoe upạrte hõ eṛe goha alom ema. 
Deuteronomy5:21 ‘Jãhãe hoṛren bạhu alom lalocaea. Ar eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ oṛakʼ duạr, jaega-jumi, guti-kạ̃ṛmĩ, daṅgratae se gadhatae se am aḍepaseren hoṛakʼ jãhãnakʼge alom lalocakʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Probhu Isor do noako hukum ona buru cetanre seṅgel, rimil ar kaṛaṅ ńut khon sanamko ṭhen ãṭ aṛaṅteye sodorleda. Ona chaḍa uni do ape ṭhen ar jãhãnakʼ bae menleda. Tayomte uni do barea dhiri reakʼ paṭare onako olkate ińe emadińạ." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Enhilokʼ buru jolokʼkan tahẽkanre ar dhũnd tala khon uniyakʼ aṛaṅpe ańjom tiyokʼketʼre aperen sanam gusṭikoren sordarko ar murubbiko do iń ṭhenko rakapʼ hecʼlena. 
Deuteronomy5:24 Unre ape dope menleda, ‘aboren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ ṭhonok ar daṛeye ńel ocoketʼbona ar seṅgel tala khon uniyakʼ aṛaṅle ańjomakada. Teheń ale dole bujhạu daṛeakʼkana, Isor jãhãe ṭhen kathae roṛle khan hõ uni do jiwetʼe tahẽdaṛeakʼa mente." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ado cedakʼle gocʼ giḍi ocokʼa? Niạ maraṅ daṛeakʼ seṅgel doe atar cabalea; ar ḍher ghạṛicʼ aboren Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅle ańjom lekhan ale dole gujukʼgea. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Manwako modre okoe menaea, abo leka seṅgel tala khon jiwetʼ Isorakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomkate hõ jiwetʼ menaegea mente?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Aboren Probhu Isor okae menakatʼ, ona do sorkate amge ańjom ạguiyme. Ar uni okae metam ona baḍae ocoleme; ar ale do ańjomkate ona lekagele senokʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Iń sãote tinre kathape roroṛkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do apeakʼ kathae ańjomletʼ tahẽkana ar ińe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘noko hoṛko am cetʼko metatʼme ona joto doń ańjomakada. Onko okaṭakʼko menakatʼ onage bhagea." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ińko botorạń ar ińakʼ sanam hukumko dohoy lạgitʼ jaejug onkoakʼ mon baṛe nonkage tahentakoma. Onate onko ar onkoren hoponko do jaejug hạbicʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtakoa. 
Deuteronomy5:30 “‘Onko do tạmbute ruạṛ senokʼ baṛe metakom," 
Deuteronomy5:31 menkhan am do iń ṭhen nonḍe tahenme. Iń do hukumko ar ạn-ạrikoń emama okaṭakʼ do onko cetʼako hoyokʼtam, jemon ạidạri lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ disạmiń emako lạgidokʼkan onḍe onako manao idiy.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Onate aboren Probhu Isor do ape okaṭakʼ cekae lạgitʼe hukum apekan ona do joton salakʼ manao hoyokʼtapea; ar ona khon do bape ghańjeṛ daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Ape jemonpe bańcao tahen, apeakʼ jemon bhạlại hoyokʼ ar okaṭakʼ disạmpe ạidạrijoṅ onḍe ḍher din jemonpe tahẽdaṛeakʼ onate aperen Probhu Isor oka horte senokʼe hukum akatʼpe ona hortege taṛampe." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor do niạko hukum ar ạn-ạriko cetʼape lạgitʼ ińe hukum akawadińạ, jemon jordan gaḍa paromkate okaṭakʼ disạm ạidạri lạgitʼpe calakʼkan onḍe onape manao idiy." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Onate ape ar aperen hoponko, goṛom gidrạko do Probhu Isorpe botoraete uniyakʼ noa hukum ar ạn-ạriko jiwetʼ jonompe manao idite ḍher din jiwetʼpe tahena." 
Deuteronomy6:3 E Israelko, ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe ar sontor akae tahente noako manaope, jemon toa ar dumur rasa ạtukʼkan disạmre senkate aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate apeakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtape ar lekharepe saṅge idikʼ." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “E Israelko ańjompe, aboren Probhu Isor doe mitʼ goṭengea." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ape do apeakʼ goṭa ontorte, goṭa jiwite, goṭa daṛete aperen Probhu Isor dulạṛepe." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Niạko hukum okaṭakʼ do teheń apeń emapekan ona do apeakʼ ontorre rebetʼ dohokakʼpe. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Ar aperen hoponko hõ ghane ghạṛicʼ onako cetʼakope. Oṛakʼrepe duṛupʼkokʼre, horte calakʼre, gitijokʼre ar aṭetʼ khon beredokʼre ape do niạkope cetʼakoa." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ar dikʼsạ dohoy reakʼ cinhạ lekate ona do apeakʼ tirepe tolkakʼa ar mạndạli leka cạndirepe dohoya. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Apeakʼ oṛakʼ duạr reakʼ kapaṭre ar phaṭok duạrre onakope ol dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Aperen hapṛamko Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭhen aperen Probhu Isor do kiriạkate okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ lạgitʼe gokʼakawatʼpe onḍe uni doe idipea. Onḍe do maraṅ ar napae napae nagrahako menakʼa okaṭakʼ ape bape benao akatʼ," 
Deuteronomy6:11 nokan bhage bhage jiniskote perecʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko ar okako jinis apnarte bape arjao akatʼ, dakʼ ḍạḍiko oka bape benao akatʼ ar nonkan darkha khetko ar jạitun bagwanko one onako reakʼ dareko bape rohoe akatʼ. Menkhan jom-ńũkate onḍe sontor akae tahenpe ar Probhu Isor do alope hiṛińea, one okoe do Misor disạm khon golam oṛakʼ khone oḍok ạgu akatʼpe." 
Deuteronomy6:12  
Deuteronomy6:13 “Ape do aperen Probhu Isorpe ḍobokʼaea, ar eken uni eskargepe sewawaea ar uni ńutumtegepe kiriạkʼa." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ape aḍepasere menakʼko eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren debotako do alope pańjakoa," 
Deuteronomy6:15 ente ape talare aperen okoe Isor menae uni do ãṭicʼ Isor kanae; ar debotakope pańjaleko khan uni do ape upạrteye edre seṅgelokʼa, ar dhạrti khone marao giḍikapea." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Aperen Probhu Isor do alope biḍạuea, cetʼleka Mesarepe biḍạu aṭkarlede." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Aperen Probhu Isor oka hukumko ar sontor tahen reakʼ katha ar niạmkoe emakan ona do khạṭige manao hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ar jemon bhạlại hoyokʼtape onate Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ do ṭhik ar bhageakʼkan onape kạmiya. Onate Probhu Isor do aperen hapṛamko ṭhen kiriạkate okaṭakʼ mońjakʼ disạm emokʼ reakʼ kathae gokʼletʼ, ona disạmte senkate onape ạidạri daṛeakʼa ar Probhu Isor okae menakatʼ onkage ape samaṅ khon bạirikope laga ńir daṛeakoa." 
Deuteronomy6:19  
Deuteronomy6:20 “Tayom daram dinkore aperen hoponko tinreko kulipea, ‘aboren Probhu Isorakʼ noako sontorokʼ reakʼ katha, niạm ar hukumkope em ocoakan onako reakʼ mane do cetʼ kana?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Unre onkope metakoa, ‘Misor disạmre abo do Pharaoren golam bon tahẽkana, menkhan Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite onḍe khone oḍok ạguakatʼ bona." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Probhu Isor do aboakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre Pharao ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼren sanamko cetanre ar Misor disạm cetanre maraṅ ar botoranakʼ cinhạko ar hahaṛa kạmikoe kạmileda. 
Deuteronomy6:23 Menkhan onḍe khon uni doe oḍok ạguakatʼ bona jemon aboren hapṛamko ṭhen oka disạm emokʼ reakʼe gokʼletʼ ona disạme emabon. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Teheń leka jemon jao okte aboakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼ ar jiwetʼbon tahẽ daṛeakʼ onate Probhu Isor do noako niạm pańjae ar uni sewawae reakʼe hukum akada. 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ar aboren Probhu Isor samaṅre uniyakʼ hukumleka noa ạn-ạriko pańjae reakʼ monsubạ tahen tabon, enḍekhan onage abo lạgitʼ dhorom do hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Ape okaṭakʼ disạm ạidạri joṅ lạgitʼpe calakʼkan onḍe do aperen Probhu Isorgeye idipea ar ape samaṅ khon ḍher jạtrenkoe laga ńirkoa. Onko doko hoyokʼkana Hittirenko, Girgasirenko, Amorirenko, Kananrenko, Pherisirenko, Hiwirenko ar Jebusirenko. Noko eae jạtrenko doko saṅgegea ar daṛete hõ ape khonko daṛegea." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Ar aperen Probhu Isor do tinre apeakʼ tireye jimạkoa unre sanamkope marao utạrkoa. Onko sãote jãhãn bondobosge alope dohoya ar onkore daya hõ alope dayakʼa. 
Deuteronomy7:3 Onko sãote baplakʼ reakʼ hõ alope bondobosa. Aperen kuṛiko hõ onkoren hoponko alope emakoa ar onkoren kuṛiko hõ aperen hoponko lạgitʼ alope ạgukoa," 
Deuteronomy7:4 ente onko kuṛiko do iń ṭhen khon aperen hoponkoko pharakkoa ar onkoren debotako sewa ocokoa. Onate Probhu Isorakʼ edre seṅgel do ape upạrte jolokʼa ar apeye marao utạrpea. 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ape do onko jạtrenkoakʼ pinḍkope rạputʼ giḍikatakoa, ar pujạ reakʼ dhirikope gejertakoa, Asera khunṭiko hõpe rạputʼ giḍikatakoa ar boṅga muṭhạnko do seṅgelrepe khadle giḍikakoa." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ente ape do nonkan mitʼṭen jạtrenko kanape aperen Isor ńutumtepe begar doho ocoakana. Ape do jemon Probhu Isorren hoṛ ar uniren sompottipe hoyokʼtae onate dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko tala khone bachao akatʼpea. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Eṭakʼ jạtrenko khonpe ḍherge iạte Probhu Isor do apeye dulạṛ akatʼpea seye bachao akatʼpea ona do baṅa, ente eṭakʼ jạtrenko khon apeakʼ lekha do thoṛagea." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Uni doe onka akada apere uniyakʼ dulạṛ iạte ar aperen hapṛamko ṭhene kiriạlen iạte. Ar onate uni do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ titeye oḍok ạguakatʼpea ar Misorren Pharao rajakʼ ti khon ar golam oṛakʼ khone chaḍao akatʼpea. 
Deuteronomy7:9 Onate baḍae dohokakʼpe, aperen Probhu kangea Isor do. Uni doe pạtiạrangea; okoe uniko dulạṛe ar uniyakʼ hukumko manao onko lạgitʼ uni okae bondobos akatʼ ona do hajar piṛhi hạbicʼe rukhiyạyea ar onkoe dulạṛkoa." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Menkhan okoe uniko kurudaekan onkoe doe hala ruạṛakoa are marao giḍikoa; ar ona onkae lạgitʼ do bae biloma. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Onate teheń ape okako hukum ar niạmko ar bicạrkoń emapekan ona do joton salakʼ manaope. 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Ar niạko niạm secʼpe moneyakʼ ar joton salakʼ onape manao, enḍekhan aperen Probhu Isor do aperen hapṛamko ṭhen okae gokʼletʼ ar ape lạgitʼ okae bondobos akatʼ onae rukhiyạitaea are dulạṛpea." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Uni do apeye dulạṛpea, are bhorapea ar aperen hoṛkoe saṅge ocopea. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ lạgitʼ aperen hapṛamko ṭhene gokʼletʼ tahẽkan ona disạmteye aderpea. Onate aperen do ḍher hopon ar hoponerako hoyokʼtapea, ar apeakʼ jumi khon ḍher anajko, darkha rasako ar sunumkope ńama, ar aperen bhiḍi, merom, ḍaṅgrako hõ ạḍi ḍherko hoyokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Ape do eṭakʼ hoṛko khon ḍher bhorpe ńama. Aperen okoe hõ bạńjhi do bako tahena ar aperen ạsul janwarko hõ bańjhi do bako tahena. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Probhu Isor do sanam lekan rog bighin khone rukhiyạpea. Misorre oka botoranakʼ rog bighinkope ńelakatʼ onako ape cetanre bae paṛao ocoya, menkhan okoe apeko kurudape onko cetanre uni do noakoe paṛao ocoya." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Aperen Probhu Isor apeakʼ tire okoe jạtrenkoe jimạko onko dope marao utạrkoa. Onko do daya hõ alope dayawakoa ar onkoren debotako hõ alope sewawakoa, ente ona do apeakʼ jhampa lekako hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Ape dope hudiskea, ‘noko jạtrenko do abo khon hõko saṅgegea; ar cekate onko dobon laga ńir daṛekekoa?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Menkhan ape do alope botorakoa. Pharao ar goṭa Misor disạm cetanre aperen Probhu Isor okae cekaletʼ ona baṛe disạipe. 
Deuteronomy7:19 Aperen Probhu Isor do botoranakʼ biḍạu hotete, hahaṛa kạmi ar cinhạko hotete ar acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite apeye oḍok ạguketʼpe ona do apeakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńelakada. Ar ńitokʼ okoe jạtrenko ńeltepe botorokʼkan onko cetanrehõ unigeye onkaea." 
Deuteronomy7:20 “Inạ tayom onko modren okoeko jiwetʼko tahen ar ape khon okore okoeko tahen onko talare aperen Probhu Isor do ńele hõe kolkoa ar onko sanamko marao utạrokʼa. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ape do alope botorakoa, ente aperen Probhu Isor do ape talare menaea, uni doe maraṅgea are botorangea." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Aperen Probhu Isorge ape samaṅ khon onko jạtrenko bại bạiteye laga ńirkoa. Onko sanamko mitʼdomte alope laga ńirkoa, ar baṅ khan ape beṛhaeten bir janwarko baḍhaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Aperen Probhu Isor do apeye soprotapea onko ạuriko marao utạrokʼ hạbicʼ. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Onkoren raj do apeakʼ tireye jimạyea ar ape do onkoakʼ ńutum dhạrti khonpe meṭao utạrtakoa. Cele hõ bako teṅgo daram daṛeapea; ape dope marao cabakoa. 
Deuteronomy7:25 Onkoren boṅga muṭhạnko do seṅgelrepe khadle giḍikakʼa. Ar onkoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ sona, rupạ do alope lalocakʼa. Ar ape lạgitʼ hõ alope hataoa, ente onape onkae khan onakoge apeakʼ jhampa leka hoyokʼa. Ar aperen Isor ṭhen hõ ona do hirkhạwanakʼ jinis kana." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Jãhãn hirkhạwakʼ jinisko oṛakʼte alope adera. Onako do mon ar ontorte hirkhạwakʼpe ar giḍikakʼpe, ente onako cetanre do maraokʼ reakʼ sarap menakʼa. Ar oṛakʼtepe ader khan ape cetanre hõ sarap paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Teheń okako hukum iń emapekan ona reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ manao reakʼ luturakʼpe, jemon jiwetʼpe tahen arpe saṅge idikʼ ar Probhu Isor aperen hapṛamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ disạm emape lạgitʼ kiriạkateye gokʼletʼ onḍe bolokate onape ạidạri daṛeakʼ." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Disạipe, aperen Probhu Isor do pongel bochor hạbicʼ hahaṅkarreye dãṛã ạyur ocoketʼpea mente. Apeakʼ bạḍạiko rạpudtape lạgitʼ ar monre menakʼtapeakʼ, metakʼme uniyakʼ hukumkope manaoa se baṅa, ona biḍạu aṭkarpe lạgitʼ uni do noae kạmi akada." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Uni doe nindhạn ocoketʼpea, reṅgecʼ ocoketʼpea ar Mannae jom ocoketʼpea one ona reakʼ katha ape ar aperen hapṛamkoakʼ baḍae baṅ tahẽkan. Onate niạ sikhnạte emapekana, manwa do eken piṭhạ motote jiwetʼ bako tahena, menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ moca khon oḍokokʼkan mitʼke mitʼ kathatege jiwetʼko tahena." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Niạ pongel bochorre apeakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼko hõ baṅ marelena ar jaṅga hõ baṅ bharaolentapea. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ar niạ katha apeakʼ ontorre baḍae dohokakʼpe, baba cetʼleka hopone ḍanṭaoe onkage aperen Probhu Isor hõ apeye ḍanṭaopea." 
Deuteronomy8:6 “Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ hukumpe manaotaea, ar uniyakʼ hortepe taṛama ar unipe sewawaea." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Aperen Probhu Isor oka mońj disạmteye ạyur aderetʼpe onḍe do buru ar lodamkore bhumbukokʼ ḍạḍi ar dakʼ nalako menakʼa. 
Deuteronomy8:8 Onḍe do guhumko, jaoko, darkha joko, loa dareko, ḍạlim dareko, jạitun dareko ar dumur rasako menakʼa." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Ona disạmre do ḍher jomakʼpe ńama ar okaṭakʼ reakʼ okulạn hõ baṅ tahentapea. Onḍenakʼ dhirire do mẽṛhẽtʼ menakʼa. Ar onḍenakʼ buru khon tambape la rakapʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy8:10 “Onḍe do jom-ńũkatepe tirpitokʼa ar aperen Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ ona mońj disạm lạgitʼ unipe sarhaoea. 
Deuteronomy8:11 Sontor akae tahenpe teheń uniyakʼ okako hukum ar niạmkoń emapekan onako bebatao iạte aperen Isor do alope hiṛińea. 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ar sontor akae bape tahen, enḍekhan tinre jom ńũkatepe tirpitokʼa ar napae napae oṛakʼ duạr benaokatepe girobasokʼa," 
Deuteronomy8:13 unre aperen palren ḍaṅgrako, meromko, bhiḍikoko saṅge idikʼtapea ar aema sona-rupạ hoyokʼtapea ar jotowakʼ ḍherokʼtapea," 
Deuteronomy8:14 Unre ape do bạḍại iạtepe phulạukʼa ar golam oṛakʼ khon okoeye oḍok ạgu akatʼpe uni aperen Isorpe hiṛińea.
