Deuteronomy8:15 Uni do maraṅ ar botoranakʼ hahaṅkar secʼte, seṅgel biń ar kidiń kaṭkomko talate ar khaṅgoṭ jaega secʼteye taṛam ạgu ocoketʼpea. Uni do dhiri khon ape lạgitʼ dakʼe oḍok ocokeda." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Uni do hahaṅkarre Mannae jom ocoketʼpea, ona reakʼ katha aperen hapṛamko do bako baḍaekan tahẽkana. Ape biḍạu aṭkarpe ar apeakʼ bạḍại rạpudtape lạgitʼ uni do onae ematʼpe tahẽkana jemon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ apeakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Ape do mone montepe menkea, ‘ińakʼ nij daṛete, ińakʼ tite kạmikate niạko dhon doń hoyocoakada.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do alope hiṛińa; unige niạko hoyocoe reakʼ daṛeye emakatʼpea, ar nonkage uni do aperen hapṛamko ṭhen oka bondobos reakʼ katha kiriạkateye menletʼ ona do ńitokʼe purạu lạgidokʼ kana." 
Deuteronomy8:19 “Ar jãhãtisokʼ aperen Isor hiṛińkate debotako secʼpe ạcurokʼte onkope sewawako, enḍekhan teheń ape upạrte noa katha do khạṭitegeń roṛeda, ape dope marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Probhu Isor do ape samaṅre jạtrenkoe marao giḍi akatʼko leka Probhu Isorakʼ bebatao iạte ape hõpe marao utạrokʼa. 
Deuteronomy9:1 “E Israelko, ańjompe, okoe jạtrenko ape khon lekhareko ḍherge ar daṛe hõko daṛege ar onkoakʼ serma ṭuṅgạu usul pạcriko ar maraṅ maraṅ nagrahako ńitokʼ ape do onako dokhol lạgitʼ jordan gaḍape parom lạgidokʼkana." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Onḍenko hoṛ doko Anakiko kana; onko doko usul usulgea arko daṛeangea. Ape do Anakiko reaṅ hõpe baḍaegea; ar noa katha hõpe ańjomakada, ‘Anakiko upạrte teṅgokʼ lạgitʼ nonkan cele jạtrenkoge bạnukʼkoa mente.’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Menkhan ape do niạ katha baḍae dohokakʼpe, aperen Probhu Isor do ḍahao maraoakʼ seṅgel leka ape lahate jordan gaḍae parom maṛaṅokʼ kana. Unige onkoe kạbukoa are marao utạrkoa; unige ape ṭhene bhagao ocokoa; Ar Probhu Isor ape ṭhen oka as reakʼ kathae emakan onkage uni doe laga ńirkoa ar thoṛa ghạṛicʼtegeye marao utạrkoa." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Aperen Probhu Isor do ape samaṅ khon onkoe laga ńirko tayom aperen okoehõ jemon mone monte aloko menma, ‘iń doń bindusạngete Probhu Isor do noa disạm ạidạri lạgitʼ nonḍeye ạguakadińạ.’ Ona do sạriyakʼ do baṅkana; noko jạtren hoṛkoakʼ dusṭạmi iạtege Probhu Isor do ape samaṅ khone laga ńirko lạgidokʼ kana." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ar bindusạn se dhorom iạte onkoakʼ disạm ạidạri lạgitʼpe calakʼ kana ona do baṅa bickom aperen Probhu Isorge aperen hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭhen kiriạkate okaṭakʼe menletʼ ona purạu lạgitʼge uni do noko jạtrenkoakʼ dusṭạmi iạte ape samaṅ khone laga ńirkoa." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Onate baḍae dohokakʼpe, apepe bindusạngete Probhu Isor do niạ mońj disạm ạidạri lạgitʼe emapekana ona do baṅa. Ente ape do mitʼṭen keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạtrenko kanape." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Hahaṅkarre aperen Probhu Isorakʼ edre cetʼlekape rakapʼ ocoletʼtaea ona baṛe disạipe, ar tishõ alope hiṛińa. Misor disạmpe bạgi oṭowakʼ hilokʼ khon nonḍe seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ ape do Probhu Isor birudrepe ṭhok ạguakada." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ edrepe rakapʼ ocoletʼtae jokhecʼ uni do ape marao giḍikapeye menleda. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ bondobos ape lạgitʼe dohoakatʼ ona bondobos olakatʼ dhiri paṭakin hatao lạgitʼ iń do buru coṭre pongel siń ar pongel ńindạń tahẽkana. Unre iń do dakʼ hõ bạń ńũleda ar piṭhạ hõ bạń jomleda. 
Deuteronomy9:10 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ nij tite olakʼ nonkan barea dhiri paṭa tinreye emadiń tahẽkana, unre ape sanamkoge Probhu Isor samaṅrepe jarwa akan tahẽkana ar enhilokʼ uni do seṅgel tala khon okako hukum ape ṭhen burureye sodorketʼ onage onakin dhiri paṭare ol tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy9:11 “Ar pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ paromen khan Probhu Isor do ona bondobos olakʼ dhiri paṭakine emadińạ. 
Deuteronomy9:12 Ona tayom uni doe metadińa, ‘ar alom biloma ńitge latarte pheḍ calakʼme, ente okoeko hoṛ Misor disạm khonem oḍok ạguakatʼko onko do bạṛicʼ horteko mohnḍa akana. Oka horte calakʼ lạgitʼ iń hukumatʼko tahẽkan ar inạkʼtege onko do eṭakʼ secʼko ghańjeṛ akana ar sewae lạgitʼ dulakʼ muṭhạnko benao akawana.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińa, ‘iń do noko hoṛkoń ńelakatʼkoa; noko do keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạtren kanako." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ar alom tạkicʼ daramińạ; onko doń marao utạrkoa ar dhạrti khon onkoakʼ ńutumiń meṭao utạrtakoa. Ar ona tayom do am hotete arhõ daṛean ar maraṅ mitʼṭen jạtrenkoń sirjạukoa.’ 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Inạ tayom iń do buru khoniń pheḍ hecʼena; unrehõ burure seṅgel do jolokʼkan tahẽkangea, ar ińakʼ tire do bondobos olakʼ dhiri cạktikin tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Iń doń ńelkeda, ape do aperen Probhu Isor upạrtepe kại akada; ar sewae lạgitʼ dulicʼ mĩhũ muṭhạnpe benao akawana. Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ horte taṛam lạgitʼe hukum akawatʼpe inạkʼtege ape do eṭakʼ secʼpe ghańjeṛ akana." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Onate iń do ona dhiri cạktikin ińakʼ ti khoniń giḍikada. Ar apeakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre onakin do rạputʼena. 
Deuteronomy9:18 “Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre nonkanakʼ kạikate ape do uniyakʼ edrepe rakapʼ ocoketʼtaete iń do lahate leka arhõ pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ Probhu Isor samaṅre ikhṛum hapegeń tahẽyena; dakʼ se piṭhạ cetʼge bạń jom ńũleda. 
Deuteronomy9:19 Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ edre iạteń botorena, ente marao giḍikape leka uni doe edre seṅgellena. Menkhan niạ dhao hõ Probhu Isor do ińakʼ kathae ańjomkeda." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Aron marao giḍikae reakʼ edre hõ rakapʼade tahẽkana menkhan ona jokhecʼ Aron lạgitʼ hoń nehõrlena. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Apeakʼ ona kại reakʼ jinisko, metakʼme aperen benaoicʼ uni mĩhũ hataokate seṅgelreń khadlekadea. Ar ona tayom doń koṭecʼ gejerkedete dhuṛi lekań lopotʼ lopotʼkeda ar buru khon ạtu pheḍokʼkan dakʼreń giḍikada." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Ape do Taberare, Masare, Kibrotre, ar Hatawarehõ Probhu Isorakʼ edrepe rakapʼ ocoletʼtaea." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Probhu Isor do Kades Barnea khonpe mohnḍakʼ jokhecʼe metatʼpe tahẽkana, ‘okaṭakʼ disạmiń emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe senkate ona baṛe ạidạri joṅpe.’ Menkhan ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ hukum upạrtepe ṭhokkeda. Ape do Probhu Isor hõ bape pạtiạuadea, ar uniyakʼ katha hõ bape luturada." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Iń do ape tis khoniń baḍae akatʼpe un khongeń ńelakada, ape do Probhu Isor upạrtepe ṭhok ạguakada." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Probhu Isor do marao giḍipe reakʼ kathae menletʼ iạte iń do pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ Probhu Isor samaṅre ikhṛum akaniń tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ar uni ṭhen noa menkateń koeleda, ‘E Probhu Isor am do amren hoṛko alom marao giḍikoa. Ente onko do amren hoṛ kangeako ar amge amakʼ maraṅ daṛetem chaḍao akatʼkoa ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite Misor khonem oḍok ạgu akatʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Amren guti Abraham, Isahak ar Jakobakʼ katha baṛe disạime. Noko keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan jạtrenkoakʼ kạṭhuạ mon ar onkoakʼ ghạṭko secʼ do alom beṅgetʼakʼa." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Arem onkae khan oka disạm khonem oḍok ạgu akatʼle ona disạmren hoṛko mena, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ disạmte bae idi daṛeatʼkote se onkoe kurudakokante gocʼko lạgitʼ hahaṅkarteye oḍok ạguakatʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Menkhan noko do amren hoṛkangeako, amakʼ sompottige okoe do amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiạrkatem oḍok ạguakatʼko.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Ona jokhecʼ Probhu Isor doe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘barea dhiri cạktikin lahateakʼ leka rokʼ tearme ar buru coṭte iń ṭhen rakapʼ hijukʼme. Ar ona sãote kaṭ reakʼ mitʼṭen sinduk hõ benaokate ạgu daraeme." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Lahateakʼ okaṭakʼ dhiri cạkti kinem rạputʼ giḍiakatʼ ar ona cetanre okaṭakʼ ol tahẽkan onage iń do niạkin dhiri cạktire hõń ola. Ar ona tayom do sindukre onakinem dohokakʼa.’ 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ona iạte iń do gabla kaṭte mitʼṭen sindukiń benao ocokeda ar lahate leka barea dhiri cạkti hõń benaokeda. Ar ona tayom do onakin hataokate buru coṭteń rakapʼena. 
Deuteronomy10:4 Probhu Isor do pạhilakʼ dhiri paṭakinre okae olletʼ tahẽkan niạ banar cetanrehõ onage olkate ińe emadińạ. Ona kathako do hoyokʼ kana uniyakʼ gel hukum okaṭakʼ do burure mitʼ ṭhenpe jarwalenre seṅgel tala khone sodorletʼ. 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka iń do buru khon latarte pheḍkate oneń benaoletʼ sindukre onakin dhiri cạktiń dohokada. Ar onakin do ńithõ onḍege menakʼa.” 
Deuteronomy10:6 Ar Israel hoponko do Be-erot Bene-jakan khon mohnḍakate Moserotreko seṭerena. Onḍege Aron doe gocʼena ar uni doe topa ocoyena. Uniren hopon Eleasar do uni bodolte maraṅ naekeye hoyena. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ona tayom Israelko do Gudgodateko senena ar onḍe khon Jotbathateko seṭerena. Jotbathare do huḍiń dakʼ soḍokʼko tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy10:8 Unre Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ bondobos sinduk gokʼ idiy lạgitʼ ar sekʼwa kạmi ńutumte uni samaṅre teṅgokʼ lạgitʼ ar acʼakʼ ńutumte bhorako lạgitʼ Liwikoe bachaoletʼkoa. Ar onko do teheń hạbicʼko kạmikana. 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ona iạte Liwiko do akoren Israel boehako talare sompotti reakʼ jãhãn hạṭiń se ạidạri do bako ńamleda; aperen Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka Isorge onkoren sompottiye tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Lahate leka iń do niạ dhao hõ pongel siń ar pongel ńindạ buru cetanreń tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor do ińakʼ kathae ańjomketʼtińạ. Ar ape maraope reakʼ sana do baṅ tahẽkantaea. 
Deuteronomy10:11 Probhu Isor doe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘onko ạyur idikom, jemon onkoren hapṛamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ disạm emako lạgitʼ iń gokʼletʼ senkate onako ạidạri daṛeakʼ.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “E Israel, amren Probhu Isor do am ṭhen khon ńit cetʼe khojkana? Uni doe khojkana jemon amren Isorem botorae ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼ hortem taṛam, unim dulạṛe ar amakʼ goṭa monte ar amakʼ goṭa jiwite unim sewawae, ar amakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ teheń am ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ okako hukum ar niạmiń emokʼkan ona baṛe dohoyme." 
Deuteronomy10:13  
Deuteronomy10:14 “Serma ar ona cetan reakʼ sanamakʼko ar ot ar ona reakʼ sanamakʼko jotoge aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kana. 
Deuteronomy10:15 Enhõ uni do aperen hapṛamkoe bạsutatʼkote apeye dulạṛketʼpea. Uni do sanam jạtrenko tala khon onkoren bõsko, metakʼme apeye dulạṛketʼpea ar teheń hõ uniren bachao akan jạtrenkoge menakʼpea." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ona iạte apeakʼ ontorre baṛe khatnakʼpe; menkan keṭecʼ hoṭokʼanko do ar alope hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy10:17 Aperen Probhu Isor do sanam isorkoren Isor ar sanam probhu koren Probhu kanae. Uni do maraṅ utạricʼ, daṛeanicʼ ar botoranicʼ Isor kanae. Uni do okoeyakʼ mẽtʼãhã hõ bae beṅgetʼakʼa ar ghushõ bae hataoa." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Uni do ṭũạr amar ar rạnḍikoakʼ hoke chinḍạuetʼtakoa ar ape talareko girobasokʼkan por jạtrenko hõe jom ocoyetʼkote acʼakʼ dulạṛe sodoreda. Are horokʼ bande ocoyetʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Apehõ por jạtrenko dulạṛkope, ente Misorre apehõ por jạtrenkope tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Ape do aperen Probhu Isor ḍobokʼaepe ar unige sewawaepe; unirege jamaṛ akan tahenpe ar uni ńutumtege kiriạkʼpe. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Unikangea aperen ṭhonok ar unige aperen Isor do. Ape do apeakʼ mẽtʼte oka maraṅ ar botoranakʼ hahaṛa kạmikope ńelakatʼtae ona do ape lạgitʼgeye onka akada. 
Deuteronomy10:22 Aperen okoeko hapṛam do Misorteko senlen onko do lekhare eken eae gel hoṛko tahẽkana ar ńitokʼ aperen Isor do sermaren ipilko lekae saṅge ocoakatʼpea. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor dulạṛepe ar uni okae khojkan ona baṛe kạmipe ar uniyakʼ niạmko, hukumko bataotaepe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Teheń disạ dohokakʼpe, noako katha do ape ṭhengeń meneda, aperen hoponko ṭhen do baṅa, ente onko do aperen Isorakʼ benao rakapʼakʼ reakʼ do bako baḍaea ar ńelhõ bako ńelakada. Onko do uniyakʼ ṭhonok ar uniyakʼ daṛeanakʼ tiạrakatʼ ti hõ bako ńel akatʼtaea." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Misor talare Misorren raj Pharao ar uniyakʼ goṭa disạm cetanre uni okako cinhạ kạmiye kạmiletʼ ar eṭakʼakʼkoe cekaletʼ onako hõ bako ńelakada. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Misorren palṭonko, onkoren sadomko ar gạḍiko cetanre Probhu Isor okae cekaletʼ ar onko tinre apeko khudạuletʼpere cetʼleka arakʼ doreão reakʼ dakʼreye unum ocoketʼko ar cetʼlekae maraoketʼko ona hõ bako ńelakada." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Ar nonḍe ạuripe seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ ape lạgitʼ hahaṅkarre uni okae cekaletʼ ona hõ aperen hopon ar hoponerako do bako ńelakada. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Uni do Ruben gusṭiren Eliabren hopon Dathan ar Abiram cetanre okae cekaletʼ, metakʼme cetʼleka Israelko samaṅre otre cahapʼ ocoketʼte unkin ar unkin gharońjren hoṛko, onkoakʼ tạmbuko ar onkoren sanam jiwiyankoe utʼ ocoketʼko ona hõ bako ńelakada." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Menkhan ape do Probhu Isorakʼ maraṅ maraṅakʼ kạmiko apnarakʼ nij mẽtʼtepe ńelakada. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Ar okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼ ape do jordan gaḍape parom lạgidokʼkan onḍe senkate jemon onape dokhol daṛeakʼ ar Probhu Isor aperen hapṛamko ṭhen toa ar dumur rasate perecʼ okaṭakʼ disạm emako reakʼe gokʼletʼ tahẽkana onḍe ḍher din jemon jiwetʼpe tahen onate teheń okań hukumapekan onape manaoa. 
Deuteronomy11:9  
Deuteronomy11:10 Ar okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe calakʼkan ona disạm do Misor leka do baṅkana one oka khonpe oḍok hecʼakan. Ape do onḍe itạpe eretʼ tahẽkana, ar anaj khetre cetʼleka dakʼ paṭao hoyokʼ onkage jaṅgate dakʼ arecʼ reakʼpe kạmikan tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Menkhan jordan gaḍa paromkate oka disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe calakʼkan ona do buru boṭkocʼ ar sokṛa disạm kana; ona disạmre do serma khon dakʼ ńamokʼa. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ona disạm do Probhu Isorgeye ńel todarotetʼ kana. Bochor reakʼ ehopʼ khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do jao ghuṛi ona disạm cetanre menakʼtaea. 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Ape do aperen Probhu Isorpe dulạṛea ar goṭa mon ar ontorte uni sewawae reakʼ okaṭakʼ iń hukum akatʼpe ona pạtiạr salakʼpe manaoa. 
Deuteronomy11:14 Arpe onkae khan Probhu Isor do okte nạpitre, apeakʼ disạmre dakʼe kola ar onate ḍher anaj, darkha jo ar sunumpe ńama." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Probhu Isor do aperen palren janwarko lạgitʼ ghãsko ṭạnḍireye janam ocoya. Ona chaḍa ape hõ lacʼ bikʼpe joma. 
Deuteronomy11:16 “Menkhan sontor akae tahenpe, ar baṅ khan eṛeyakʼrepe paṛaokʼte Probhu Isor ṭhen khonpe pharakokʼa ar debotakope sewawakoa." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Onate Probhu Isor do ape cetanre edrete pit caṛhaokʼtaea ar serma reakʼ duạrkoe bond ocoya, onate dakʼ hõ bae kola ar jumire phosol hõ baṅ hoyokʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ mońj disạm Probhu Isorre emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe thoṛa dintegepe marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Apeakʼ mon ar ontorre ińakʼ noako kathape rebetʼ dohokakʼa, ar disạ dohoy reakʼ cinhạ lekate tire hõpe tolkakʼa ar mạndạli leka cạndirepe dohoya." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ar aperen hoponko onakope cetʼakoa. Oṛakʼre duṛupʼkokʼ oktere, calakʼ oktere, gitijokʼ oktere ar beredokʼ oktere noako reaṅpe galmaraoakoa." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Apeakʼ oṛakʼ duạr reakʼ kapaṭre ar phaṭok duạrre onakope ol dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Ar noakope onkae khan Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ lạgitʼ aperen hapṛamko ṭhene kiriạlen ona disạmre ape ar aperen hoponko do coṭ serma reakʼakʼko leka ḍher dinpe bahaokʼa. 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Ape do aperen Probhu Isor dulạṛepe, ar uniyakʼ horte calakʼpe ar unire sapʼ kajak akae tahente okako hukumiń emapekan ona joton salakʼ manaope." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Ar ape onape onkae enḍekhan Probhu Isorge ape samaṅ khon onko jạtrenkoe oḍokkoa, ar ape do ape khon maraṅ ar daṛean jạtrenkope bhagaokoa." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Dạkhin reakʼ hahaṅkar khon Lebanon hạbicʼ ar Phurạt gaḍa khon jalapuri hạbicʼ jãhãrege jaṅga talkape dohoy onage apeakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Jãhãn jạtrenge ape samaṅre bako teṅgo daram daṛeapea. Ar ona disạmre jãhãtegepe calakʼ aperen Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate onḍenko hoṛkoakʼ monre ape reaṅ mitʼṭen botore caṛhao ocoytakoa. 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Ńelpe, teheń ape samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ bhor ar mitʼṭecʼ sarapiń dohokeda." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Teheń ape ṭhen aperen Probhu Isorakʼ oka hukumkoń ematʼpe onape manaotae, enḍekhan ona bhor do apere paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bape bataotae ar oka horte calakʼ reakʼ hukumiń ematʼpe ona khonpe ghańjeṛokʼte debotakope pańjako, enḍekhan ape cetanre do sarap paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Dokhol lạgitʼ ape okaṭakʼ disạmtepe bolo lạgidokʼkan ar aperen Probhu Isor tinre onḍeye idipea unre Gerisim buru cetan khon ona bhor reakʼ kathape lại sodora ar sarapakʼ katha do Ebal buru khonpe lạiya. 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ape dope baḍaegea, jordan gaḍa pạchim senakʼ hor aṛe reakʼ Gilgal ar ona sor reakʼ Arabreko tahenkan Kananikoakʼ disạm talare More reakʼ Elon dareko ṭhen ona barea buru do menakʼ mente." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Ape do aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme em lạgidokʼkan ona dokhol lạgitʼ jordan gaḍape paromokʼkana. Ar dokholkate tinre onḍepe girobasokʼa unre teheń okako niạm ar hukumkoń ematʼpe ona baṛe dohoype. 
Deuteronomy11:32  
Deuteronomy12:1 “Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼe em akatʼpe onḍe dhạrti ṭuṅdạṅ bhor noako niạm ar hukumko joton salakʼpe manaoa. 
Deuteronomy12:2 Okoe jạtrenkoakʼ bedokhol lạgitʼpe calakʼkan onḍe usul buru ar boṭkocʼkore ar hạriạṛ dare buṭạkore akoren debotako sewawako kan tahẽkan onako jaega dope marao giḍikakʼa. 
Deuteronomy12:3 Onkoakʼ than boṭkocʼko, onkoakʼ sewawakʼ dhiriko, murhutʼ khunṭiko ar debotawakʼ muṭhạnkope rạputʼ giḍikakʼa ar nonkate onako jaega khon onkoren debotakoakʼ ńutumpe meṭao utạra." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ dekʼwa sewa do onkoakʼ sewa leka do alope onkaea. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isor do apnar sodorokʼ lạgitʼ aperen gusṭiko emakʼ jaega khon okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i acʼ lạgitʼe bachao joṅ onḍege sewawae lạgitʼ calakʼpe. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Ape do aperen jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ, apeakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń, tulokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar manotakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, kusiteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar aperen ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko ar meromkoren pạhilicʼ hoponge onḍepe idikoa." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Onḍege aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre apeakʼ gharońjrenko salakʼpe jom ńũiya ar uniyakʼ bhor iạtepe ńamakatʼ apeakʼ khaṭao akan reakʼ kuṛại iạtepe rạskạkʼa. 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Aperen Probhu Isor do sulukte girobasokʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ sompottiye emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe do ńit hõ ạuripe seṭerokʼa. Ar ona disạmpe bololenre jãhãege acʼakʼ kusi sanaleka aloe kạmima. 
Deuteronomy12:9  
Deuteronomy12:10 Aperen Probhu Isor do sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan ar jordan gaḍa paromkate tinre onḍepe girobasokʼa unre uni do beṛhaeten bạiriko sãote lạṛhại khone jirạu ocopea, ar nirạite onḍepe girobasokʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Unre uni do acʼ sodorokʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i acʼ tahen lạgitʼe bachaojoṅ onḍege ape do oneń hukum akawatʼpe jotowakʼ jinisko idikate apeakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ, apeakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń, tulokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar Probhu Isor ṭhenpe manotakatʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko uni ṭhenpe ạguiya." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ar onḍe aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre ape ar apren hoponko, hoponerako, aperen guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko, ato ar nagraharen Liwiko okoe do apnarakʼ mente jãhãn jaega-jumi se sompotti bạnukʼtako onko sanamko sãotepe rạskạ midokʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Ńelpe, apepe kusiyakʼ jãhãn ṭhạ̃ire jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do alope samaṅa." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Aperen gusṭiko khon emakʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i Probhu Isore bachao joṅ onḍege jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa ar onḍege ińiń hukum akatʼ reakʼ jotowakʼpe kạmiya. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Enḍekhan aperen Probhu Isor do apeye bhorapete okoeko janwarkoe emape onko do jãhãn atore se nagrahare gocʼkate apeakʼ kusileka jelpe jom daṛeakʼa, cetʼleka aperen sapha ar besapha sanam hoṛ selepʼ jel se jhaṅkaṛ jelpe jom daṛeako." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Menkhan mãyãm jom do baṅ ganaokʼtapea; ona do dakʼ leka otrepe dul giḍikakʼa. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Ona chaḍa apeakʼ, anaj, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunum reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń, ar ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko, meromkoren pạhil hoponko, apeakʼ manot akatʼakʼko, tulokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko ar kusiteakʼ danko do apeakʼ nij ato se nagrahakore jom do baṅ ganokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Aperen Probhu Isore bachao akatʼ ṭhạ̃ire uni samaṅre jojom hoyokʼtapea. Ape, aperen gidrạko, aperen guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar apeakʼ ato ar nagraharen Liwiko do onako joma ar apeakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ kuṛại iạte aperen Probhu Isor samaṅrepe rạskạ midokʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Apeakʼ disạmre tinạkʼ dinpe girobasokʼ unạkʼ din ape do Liwikope ńel todarotkoa. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Aperen Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate apeakʼ disạm reakʼ simạnakoe phaelao ocoytapere men, ‘jel jojom sanayetʼlea,’ unre apeakʼ kusi leka jelpe jom daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Aperen Probhu Isor do apnar sodorokʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iye bachao joṅ ar ape khon ona ḍherge sạṅgińokʼ khan, tobe iń emakʼ hukum lekate Probhu Isorre emakan aperen ḍaṅgra ar bheḍa do pal khon hataokatepe gur daṛeakoa ar apan ạpin ato ar nagrahakore apeakʼ sana leka jelpe jom daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Selepʼ ar jhaṅkaṛ jel lekage ape do jelpe joma. Sapha ar besapha sanamkoge ona dope jom daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Menkhan sontor akae tahenpe mãyãm do alope joma, ente mãyãmkangea jiwi do, onate jel sãote jiwi hõ alope joma." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Ona do alogepe joma, dakʼ leka otrepe dul giḍikakʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Ape ar ape tayom jemon aperen hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtako onate ape do mãyãm alope joma; inạ khan Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre ṭhikakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy12:26 “Probhu Isore bachao akatʼ ṭhạ̃ire apeakʼ sonot jinisko ar manot akatʼakʼ jinisko idiy hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ cetanre apeakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jel ar mãyãmpe samaṅa. Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍre aperen samaṅicʼ janwarakʼ mãyãmpe dula, menkhan uniyakʼ jel dope jom daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Ape ar aperen hoponko ar hoponerako jemon jao okte bhạlại hoyokʼtako onate iń emakʼ noako hukum joton salakʼ manaope, ente onape onkale khan aperen Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre ṭhikakʼpe kạmiya." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Ar okoeko jạtrenko bedokholko lạgitʼpe calakʼkan aperen Probhu Isor do ape samaṅ khon onkoe marao utạrkoa. Menkhan onkope bedokholko tayom onkoakʼ disạmrepe girobasokʼa unre ape do sontorokʼ hoyokʼtapea jemon onkoren debotakoakʼ jhạlire alope paṛaokʼ ar alope kuliya, ‘noko jạtrenko do okaleka akoren debotako sewawako kan tahẽkana mente?’ Arpe men boteja, ‘abo hõ bon onkaea.’" 
Deuteronomy12:30  
Deuteronomy12:31 Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ dekʼwa sewa do onkoakʼ sewa leka alope onkaea, ente onko do debotakoko sewawakore joto lekanakʼ hirkhạwakʼko kạmikana one okaṭakʼ do Probhu Isore hirkhạwakʼkan. Onko do debotako ńutumte seṅgelre akoren gidrạkoko khadleyetʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Iń okakoń hukumatʼpe onako sanamakʼpe manaoa; ar noa sãote cetʼ hõ alope juṭucʼakʼa, ar niạ khon jãhãnakʼ hõ alope kaṭaoa." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ape modren jãhãn nạbi se kukmũ ńelkate tayom daram reakʼ kathae lại daṛeakʼ nonkanicʼ jãhãeye upellen khan ar ape ṭhen jãhãn hahaṛa cinhạ se kạmi reakʼ kathae men ar sạrige ona hoyokʼ. Ar uni hoṛ hõ ape ṭhen nãwãn nonkan debotako reaṅ katha lạiyapeteye men, ‘dela bon pańjakoma arbon sewawakoma,’" 
Deuteronomy13:2  
Deuteronomy13:3 Enḍekhan uni nạbi se kukmũ ńeńel hoṛakʼ katha alope ańjomtaea. Ente aperen Probhu Isor do mon ar ontortepe dulạṛedekana se baṅa ona ńel lạgitʼ biḍạureye paṛao ocoyetʼpea. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka calakʼ hoyokʼtapea ar uni botorae hoyokʼtapea. Ape do uniyakʼ hukumkope manaoa arpe bataotaea; unipe sewawaea ar unirege jamaṛ akaepe tahena. 
Deuteronomy13:5 Menkhan uni nạbi se uni kukmũ ńeńelicʼ hoṛ dope gocʼ giḍikaea, ente aperen Probhu Isor, okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguakatʼpe ar golam oṛakʼ khone chaḍao akatʼpe, uni upạrteye uskạu akatʼpea ar aperen Probhu Isor oka horte calakʼ reakʼe hukumakatʼpe ona hor khon ruạṛpe lạgitʼe kurumuṭukana. Onate ape tala khon uni bạṛicʼicʼ dope marao giḍikaea." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Dhạrti reakʼ mitʼ simạna khon eṭakʼ simạna hạbicʼ ape beṛhaeten sor ar sạṅgińren okoe do debotako sewawako kan, ar okoe do amren hapṛamkoren bin baḍayicʼ uni debota secʼ amren boeha se amren hopon ar hoponerako se amren bạhu se amren gate am ńamkate bạṛicʼ horte calakʼ lạgitʼe metam, ‘dela, debotako laṅ sewawakoa,’" 
Deuteronomy13:7  
Deuteronomy13:8 enḍekhan uniyakʼ do alom luturakʼa ar ańjom hõ alom ańjomtaea. Uni do alom dayawaea; ar alom aṛagea, se alom rukhiyạyea." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Uni do gojetege hoyokʼa. Ar uni gocʼ giḍikae reakʼ kạmi do amakʼ titege ehob hoyokʼtama, ar inạ tayom do eṭakʼkoko seledokʼa." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Misor disạm reakʼ golam oṛakʼ khon okoeye oḍok ạguakatʼme amren Probhu Isor secʼ khon ruạṛmeye kurumuṭuyetʼ khan uni do dhiritem tiń gojea. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Onate Israel do sanamkoge niạ katha ańjomkate botor caṛhaoakoa ar ape modren okoe hõ nonkan bạṛicʼ kạmi do bako kạmiya. 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Aperen Probhu Isor okako ato se nagrahako girobasokʼ lạgitʼe em lạgidokʼkan ona jãhãṭakʼ reaṅ hoedaṛeakʼape ańjom ńama," 
Deuteronomy13:13 onḍenko Israelko modren thoṛa bạṛicʼ hoṛ do onḍenko hoṛko niạ menkate bạṛicʼ horteko or idiakatʼko, ‘dela bon, debotako bon sewawako ma,’ okoe do abo ṭhenko nãwãge." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Ar onage hoyokʼ khan ape do mońj okocʼte suṭhik hataokate biḍạu aṭkarpe. Ar sạrikana mente sạbudlen khan bạṛicʼ utạrakʼ kạmi ape talare hoyakante," 
Deuteronomy13:15 onḍenko sanam hoṛge gocʼ giḍikako hoyokʼa. Ar ape do ona ato ar nagraha, onaren hoṛko ar janwarko purạtepe marao cabakoa." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Ar onḍenakʼ luṭ ạguwakʼ joto jinisko do nagraha reakʼ tala kulhirepe dohoya ar sanamakʼ jinisko, ona ato ar nagraha hõ aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ leka purạtepe jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. Ona jaega do jaejug hạbicʼ ḍhipi leka tahena; ar ona do tishõ baṅ benao hoyokʼ." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Probhu Isor jemon acʼakʼ botoranakʼ edre khone ruạṛokʼ onate apeakʼ tire noako jinis reakʼ mitʼṭen hõ jemon alo ńelokʼ, ente onare do maraokʼ reakʼ sarap menakʼa. Enḍekhan uni do daya are mãyãwapea ar aperen hapṛamko ṭhen kiriạkateye gokʼletʼ iạte aperen bõskoe bạḍ ocokoa," 
Deuteronomy13:18 ente teheń okako hukumiń emapekan onape bataotae ar aperen Probhu Isorakʼ nońjorre ṭhikakʼpe kạmi. 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Ape do aperen Probhu Isorren hoponko kanape. Ona iạte gocʼ hoṛko lạgitʼpe rakʼ homor joṅre hoṛmore alope getʼ cirokʼa, se bohokʼ samaṅ secʼ alope hoyo poṭorokʼa." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭen begar akan jạtrenko kanape. Dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko mod khon Probhu Isor do apegeye bachao akatʼpea jemon uniren ạidạri porjakope hoyokʼ. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Ape do jãhãn hirkhạwakʼ jinisko alope joma. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Okoeko janwarakʼ jelpe jom daṛeakʼ onko doko hoyokʼ kana ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi, merom," 
Deuteronomy14:5 jhaṅkaṛ, selepʼ jel, ṭiklạkʼ jel, bir merom, bhạ̃uṭiạ jel, ar kạpil gại." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Okoeko janwarakʼ khurạ bar hạṭińte cirạge ar okoeko pạgur onko janwarakʼ jel dope jom daṛeakʼgea. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Menkhan ekenko pạgur se eken khurạ moto hạṭińgetako onkan janwarkoakʼ jel do bape jom daṛeakʼa. Ũṭ, kulại, saphon kulạiyakʼ jel do alope joma, ente onko doko pạgurgere hõ khurạ do baṅ bar hạṭińgetakoa. Onate onko doko besaphagea." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Sukri doko besaphagea; khurạ hạṭińgetakore hõ bako pạgura. Onkoakʼ jel do alope joma ar joṭetʼ hõ alope joṭeda. 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Dakʼreko tahen jiwiyanko modre okoekoakʼ il ar cũyạkʼ menakʼtako eken onkogepe jom daṛeakoa," 
Deuteronomy14:10 menkhan okoekoakʼ il ar cũyạkʼ bạnukʼtako onko do alope jomkoa. Onko do ape lạgitʼko besaphagea. 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Jãhãn sapha cẽṛẽ dope jom daṛeakogea; menkhan noko do alope jomkoa; buru pajhaṛ, seṅgel gidi, hako sapʼ pajhaṛ, tarse koṭapʼ, jalo, kũṛĩtʼ, ar onko jạtrenko, mitʼke mitʼ kạhu ar onko jạtrenko, ũṭ cẽṛẽ, ńindạ pajhaṛ, dakʼ kẽhẽ, ṭirmuṭi ar onko jạtrenko, kokor, dundu, dereń kokor, bonbayar, gidi, kikir, ḍheṅka kõkʼ ar onko jạtrenko, ḍablạ kuṭạm ar barduṛũcʼ." 
Deuteronomy14:12  
Deuteronomy14:13  
Deuteronomy14:14  
Deuteronomy14:15  
Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 “Ar sanam cĩuṭi pipṛiko hõ ape lạgitʼko besaphagea; onko do alope jomkoa," 
Deuteronomy14:20 Menkhan sanam sapha uḍạukʼko dope jom daṛeakogea. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Gocʼ akan nonkan jãhãn jiwiyanko hõ alope jomkoa, ente ape do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ begar akan jạtrenko kanape. Apeakʼ ato se nagrahareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko ona dope em daṛeakoa ar ona do onkoko jom daṛeakʼa, se eṭakʼ porjạtrenko ṭhen dope ạkhriń daṛeakoa." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Jao bochor apeakʼ jumire okako phosol hoyokʼ ona reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń dope begar dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Aperen Probhu Isor botoraepe ar apeakʼ anaj ar phosol reakʼ, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunum reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do emokʼ hoyokʼtapea. Ar aperen palren ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi, meromkoren pạhilicʼ hopon reakʼ jel do aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre nonkan ṭhạ̃ire jojom hoyokʼtapea one okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃ire sodorokʼ lạgitʼte acʼakʼ tahen oṛakʼ menteye bachaojoṅ." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Menkhan ona ṭhạ̃i do sạṅgińre menakʼ khan ar Probhu Isor nunạkʼe bhor akatʼpete ona gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińko sạṅgiń hor iạte bape idi daṛeakʼ khan," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ona dope ạkhrińa ar ona ạkhriń reakʼ ṭaka do aperen Probhu Isore bachao akawan ṭhạ̃itepe idi oṭokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Ar ona ṭakate apeakʼ kusi leka jiniskope kirińa, jemon ḍaṅgra, merom, bhiḍi, darkha rasa, eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ se apeakʼ kusi leka jãhãnakʼgepe kiriń daṛeakʼa. Ona tayom do apeakʼ gharońjrenko tulucʼ aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre jom ńũkatepe rạskạkʼa." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Ar okoe Liwiko apeakʼ ato se nagrahareko girobasokʼkan onko do alope hiṛińkoa, ente onko do apnarakʼ mente jãhãnakʼ cetʼge, metakʼme jaega jumi do bạnukʼtakoa." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Mimitʼ tesar bochor reakʼ sesre apeakʼ ona bochor reakʼ phosol reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do nagraha bahrete ạgukatepe jarwaea. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Ar onate Liwiko, okoe do apnarakʼ mente cetʼ jaega jumi se sompotti bạnukʼtako ar onḍe menakʼko porjạtrenko, rạnḍiko ar ṭũạr amarko onako jom daṛeakʼa. Onate apeakʼ sanam kạmire aperen Probhu Isor doe bhorapea." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Eae bochor mucạtʼre rin khonpe khalaskoa. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ape do noa dharatepe khalaskoa: Mimitʼ Israel mahajon do eṭakʼ Israelkoe khalaskoa. Rin khalas lạgitʼ Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ okteye ṭhik dohoakatʼ ona sodor tayom Israel boehako ṭhen khon rin halae reakʼ do bape dạbi daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Menkhan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko ṭhen dope dạbi daṛeakʼa, ar aperen boehakoakʼ rin dope khalaskatakoa." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kathare batao akanpe tahen ar teheń okako hukumiń emapekan ona reakʼpe moneyakʼ, enḍekhan ape modre okoehõ bape reṅgejokʼa, ente sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ disạm aperen Probhu Isore emape lạgidokʼkan uni do onḍe ạḍiye bhorapea." 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 Aperen Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekateye bhorapea, ar onate ape do jạt jạtren hoṛko rinpe emakoa, menkhan ape do okoe ṭhen khon hõ rin bape hataoa ar baṅ lagaoapea. Ape do ạḍi utạr jạtrenkope ḍanṭaokoa menkhan okoe hõ ape do bako ḍanṭaopea." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan ona disạmre aperen boehako modre jãhãege reṅgecʼreye paṛaokʼ, enḍekhan unire apeakʼ ontor do alope keṭejtapea, se uni reṅgecʼ boeha lạgitʼ apeakʼ ti do muṭ akae alope dohoytapea." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Apeakʼ ti do jemon khulạge tahen; ape do uniyakʼ jạruṛokʼakʼ leka pańcape emaea. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Sontorokʼpe, apeakʼ monre dusṭạmi hudis do alope rakapʼ ocoya je, eaeakʼ bochor, metakʼme rin khalas reakʼ bochor hecʼakana mente. Ar noa hudiskate reṅgecʼre paṛao akan boeha secʼ alope kurkunḍujokʼa ar eken ti alope bidạgotʼkaea. Arpe onkae khan uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen ape upạrteye raga ar bicạre khoja onate apepe behoketʼ iạte dusirepe paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ar monre haso dohokate do alope emaea; enḍekhan Probhu Isor do apeakʼ sanam kạmireye bhorapea ar jãhãnakʼrege hatpe lagao onaregepe jo bahakʼa. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ do dhạrtireko tahengea. Onate noań hukumape kana, aperen boehako secʼ ar disạmren reṅgecʼ ar nacar hoṛko secʼ apeakʼ ti do khulạge tahentape ma." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Jãhãe Ibri herel se maejiu hoṛ ape ṭhene ạkhrińokʼ, enḍekhan turui bochor ape ṭhen golame khaṭaokʼa ar eaeakʼ bochorre doe sạdhin ocokʼa." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ar sạdhine oktere uni do eken ti alope bidạ gotʼkaea. 
Deuteronomy15:14 Ape do kharsala monte aperen merom se bhiḍi, se khạrại reakʼ anaj ar darkha jo lelen kunḍ khon darkha rasape emaea. Aperen Probhu Isor oka lekae bhor akawatʼpe onkage uni hõpe emaea." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Disạipe, Misor disạmre ape hõ golampe tahẽkana ar aperen Probhu Isor doe chaḍao akatʼpea. Ona iạte iń do noako hukumiń emapekana." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Menkhan uni guti do apeakʼ gharońjren hoṛkoe dulạṛko ar ape ṭhen sukrege menae iạte bae bạgiyape," 
Deuteronomy15:17 enḍekhan uni do sạlạkte luturpe pạṭi tabtaea; ar onate uni do goṭa jion aperen golam akane tahena. Ar aperen kạ̃ṛmĩ cetanrehõpe onkaea. 
Deuteronomy15:18 “Aperen guti se kạ̃ṛmĩ do sạdhintepe sen ocoaere hamal do alope hudisa; ente niạ turui bochor ape ṭhen khaṭaokʼ reakʼ dam do barea mujurikin reakʼ soman kana. Onkope sạdhinleko khan aperen Probhu Isor do sanamakʼe bhoratapea. 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Aperen ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi ar meromkoren mimitʼ pạhil janam akan ạnḍiạ hoponko do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumtepe begar dohokoa. Ar ḍaṅgraren pạhil hoponko hõ kạmire alope lagaokoa ar bhiḍi ar meromren pạhil hoponkoakʼ upʼ hõ alope kạpciy takoa." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Aperen Probhu Isorre bachao akawan ṭhạ̃ire jao bochor ape do gharońjrenko sãote onako reakʼ jelpe joma. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Menkhan onko janwarko modren jãhãeṭakʼge niphuṭ utạricʼ bae tahen, metakʼme leḍha se kãṛã se uniyakʼ hoṛmore jãhãn dos tahen, enḍekhan uni do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte alope samaṅea." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Onkanko do apeakʼ nagraharegepe jomkoa. Sapha-besapha jãhãe hoṛge jhaṅkaṛ se selepʼ jelakʼ jel lekagepe jom daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Menkhan uniyakʼ mãyãm do alope joma; dakʼ leka ona do otrepe dul giḍikakʼa. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Abib candore ape do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobpe porobokʼa. Niạ Abib candorege uni do ńindạ jokhecʼ Misor disạm khon apeye oḍok ạguletʼpea. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Acʼ apnartetʼe sodorokʼ iạte Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ tahen jaega lekate okaṭakʼe bachao joṅ, onḍege aperen ḍaṅgra se merom se bhiḍi palko khon janwar hataokate aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobpe porobokʼa." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Uni janwarakʼ jel do khạmi mesalakatʼ piṭhạ sãote alope joma. Menkhan eae din hạbicʼ apeakʼ duk disạite bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma, ente Misor disạm khon usạratepe oḍok hecʼakana. Onate Misor disạm khon oḍok hijukʼ reakʼ katha jiwetʼ jonompe disạ dohokakʼa." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Niạ eae din apeakʼ simạre ar ape talare khạmi mesalakatʼ jãhãn jinis alo baṛe ńamokʼma. Porob reakʼ pạhil din ạyupʼ jokhecʼ okaṭakʼ jelpe samaṅ ona do setakʼ hạbicʼ alope sarecʼ dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ ar okaṭakʼ nagraharege bańcaokʼ porobren janwar do alope samaṅkoa; 
Deuteronomy16:6 okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃ire uni do apnartetʼ sodorokʼ lạgitʼte acʼakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lekateye bachao joṅ eken onḍegepe samaṅkoa. Oka hilokʼ Misor disạm khonpe oḍokʼ hecʼakan jao bochor ona dinre siń cando hạsur tayom bańcaokʼ porobren janwarpe samaṅkoa. 
Deuteronomy16:7 Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iye bachao joṅ onḍege ona reakʼ jelpe isina arpe joma. Ar dosar hilokʼ do apeakʼ oṛakʼtepe ruạṛ calakʼa. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Turui din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe joma ar eae din hilokʼ do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ sonot jarwakʼpe hoeocoya ar enhilokʼ do jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope kạmiya. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Phosolre datrompe calao hilokʼ khon eae haptape lekhaea. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Ar ona tayom apeakʼ kusiteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼte aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte eae hapta reakʼ porobpe porobokʼa. Ar aperen Probhu Isore bhor akawatʼpe leka niạ samaṅokʼakʼ jinispe emokʼa. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Aperen Probhu Isor apnare sodorokʼ iạte okaṭakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃iye bachao joṅ onḍe uni samaṅre aperen hopon ar hoponerako, aperen guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar ape talareko girobasokʼkan Liwiko, porjạtrenko, ṭuạ̃r amarko ar rạnḍi maejiuko- sanamkoge mitʼtepe rạskạ midokʼa." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Misor disạmre ape hõ golampe tahẽkan ona katha disạite joton salakʼ noako hukumpe manaoa. 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Apeakʼ khạrại ar darkha lelenkunḍ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon jotowakʼpe samṭao tayom eae din do ḍera porobpe porobokʼa. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Ape, aperen hopon ar hoponerako, aperen guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar ape talareko girobasokʼkan Liwiko, porjạtrenko, ṭũạr amarko, rạnḍi maejiuko ar ape sanamkoge niạ porobrepe rạskạkʼa." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iye bachao joṅ onḍe ape do uni ńutumte eae din hạbicʼ niạ porobpe porobokʼa, ente apeakʼ rakapʼakʼ sanam phosol ar sanamakʼ kạmire aperen Probhu Isor do apeye bhorapea ar purạtepe rạskạjoṅa." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Aperen Probhu Isore bachao akawan ṭhạ̃ire bochorre pe dhao, metakʼme bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobpe porobokʼ jokhecʼ, eae hapta reakʼ porobre ar chamḍa porobre aperen sanam herel hoṛko do Probhu Isor samaṅre hạjirokʼ hoyokʼtakoa. Unre Probhu Isor samaṅre eken ti okoe hõ alo jemonko hijukʼma." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Aperen Probhu Isore bhor akawatʼpe leka ape mimitʼko thoṛare hõ jemonpe ạgu darae. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ ato ar nagrahae emape lạgidokʼkan ona reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ lạgitʼ bikʼcạrko ar sordarkope dohokoa. Onko do hok reakʼ lekate hoṛkoakʼko bicạr chinḍạukatakoa. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Behok lekate alope bicạra se okoeyakʼ mẽtʼãhã hõ alope beṅgetʼakʼa. Ghus hõ alope hataoa, ente ghus do ạkilankoakʼ mẽtʼe kãṛã ocoytakoa ar bin dusạn hoṛakʼ katha hõe ulṭạu ocoya." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Okaṭakʼ disạm do aperen Probhu Isore emape lạgidokʼkan, onḍe jemonpe dokhol daṛeakʼ onate hok reakʼ manaope." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte pinḍpe benaore ona pantere sekʼwae lạgitʼ Asera khunṭi reakʼ jãhãn kaṭko alope bitʼjoṅa," 
Deuteronomy16:22 se jãhãṭakʼ dhiri khunṭi hõ alope bitʼjoṅa, ente aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen noako do hirkhạwakʼ kana." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte nonkan ḍaṅgra se merom boda se bheḍa hõ alope samaṅkoa okoe do niphuṭ utạrko baṅkan, ente uni do onakoe hirkhạwakʼa." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Aperen Probhu Isore emape lạgidokʼkan ato se nagrahare hoedaṛeakʼa, ape modren jãhãe herel hoṛ se maejiu Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ bondobos rạputʼkate uniyakʼ nońjorre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye onkae." 
Deuteronomy17:3 Ar hoedaṛeakʼa uni do ińakʼ hukum birudre senkate debotakoe sewawako ar onko debota se siń cando, ńindạ cando se sermaren ipilkoe sewawako." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Ar onako reakʼpe baḍae lekhan, ona reakʼ mońjtepe suṭhik hataoa. Ar sạrikan khan ar Israelko talare hirkhạwanakʼ kạmi hoyakana mente sạbudokʼ khan," 
Deuteronomy17:5 enḍekhan okoe herel hoṛ se maejiu nonkae kạmiakatʼ uni do ato se nagraha reakʼ bahre phaṭok duạr ṭhen idikate dhiritepe tiń gojea. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ar gocʼ ocokʼicʼ do bar se pe hoṛakʼ gohako reakʼ gohawakʼ iạte goje hoyokʼa; menkhan eken mitʼ hoṛakʼ goha iạte do alope onkaea. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Uni hoṛ goje lạgitʼ do gohakoge pạhilre dhiriteko tiń maṛaṅema, ar ona tayom do eṭakʼ hoṛkoko tińea. Ar nonkate ape tala khon uni bạṛicʼ hoṛpe marao giḍikaea." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Apeakʼ nonkanakʼ mamblako adalotre bicạr lạgitʼ muskilge bujhạukʼ khan- baṅ do khun khun talare ar baṅ do hok hok talare ar baṅ do hạn hạn talare enḍekhan ona mambla do Probhu Isore bachao akawan ṭhạ̃ite idiy hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy17:9 Unre ape do un jokhecʼren bikʼcạricʼ ar Liwiko talaren naekeko ṭhenpe calakʼa. Onko ṭhenpe kulijoṅa ar apeakʼ bicạr reakʼ rayko lạiyapea. 
Deuteronomy17:10 Probhu Isor bachao akawan thạ̃ire onko okaṭakʼ rayko baḍae ocope ona lekage ape dope kạmiya. Tobe sontor akae tahenpe, onko okaṭakʼko metape ona reakʼ cetʼge alope bad oṭokakʼa." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Onko do ạn-ạri reaṅ okako cetʼape ar okaṭakʼ rayko emokʼ ona lekagepe kạmiya. Ar okaṭakʼko metape ṭhik ona lekagepe onkaea, oka secʼge alope ghańjeṛa." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Jãhãe hoṛ bạḍại salakʼ uni bikʼcạricʼakʼ katha se aperen Probhu Isorren sapʼdapʼicʼ naekeakʼ katha bae ańjom, enḍekhan uni do khạṭige gocʼ giḍikae hoyokʼa. Ar Israelko tala khon nonkan bạṛicʼ hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Enḍekhan ona katha ańjomkate hoṛko do botor caṛhao akoa ar nonka bako bạḍạiyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan ona dokhol tayom tinre onḍepe girobasokʼa arpe mena, ‘dela, aḍepaseren jạtrenko leka, abo hõ mitʼṭen raj bon bachao joṅa,’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 unre aperen Probhu Isor okoeye ṭhikape unigepe rajea. Ar uni do aperen Israel boehako modren mitʼ hoṛge jemone hoyokʼ. Okoe aperen Israel boehae baṅkan nonkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ do alope rajkoa. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Uni raj do acʼ lạgitʼ ḍher sadomko aloe dohojoṅma ar inạ tayom arhõ aema sadomko ńamjoṅ lạgitʼ Misor disạmte Israelko aloe kolkoma, ente Probhu Isore menakada, ‘ona disạmte do ar tishõ alope ruạṛ calakʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Uni do aema aloe bạhu joṅma; onate uni do eṭakʼ secʼe ghańjeṛokʼa. Uni do apnar lạgitʼ sona rupạ aema aloe jarwajoṅma. 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Liwiko modren okoe doko naekekan ar onko ṭhen ạn-ạri reakʼ okako puthi menakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ jokhecʼ onako puthi khon acʼ lạgitʼ joto ạn-ạriko reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nokole oljoṅa. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ona do acʼ ṭhengeye dohokakʼa ar jiwetʼ jonom onae paṛhaoa jemon Probhu Isore botoraete ạn-ạri reakʼ kathakoe manao idiy. 
Deuteronomy17:20 Onate eṭakʼ Israel boehako khon bae usulokʼa ar ạn-ạri khon bae ghańjeṛokʼa. Onate uni ar uni bõsrenko Israelko cetanre ḍher dinko raj daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Liwi Naekeko ar Liwi gusṭiren eṭakʼ hoṛko do Israelko leka jãhãn jaega jumi se sompotti do bako ńama. Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ okako jinis ạgukʼ ar Probhu Isor okako jinis emae hoyokʼ onage onko doko joma. 
Deuteronomy18:2 Israel boehako talare sompotti mente onko do cetʼge baṅ tahentakoa. Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate Isorge onkoren sompotti doe hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Disạm hoṛko okoe do ḍaṅgra, merom boda, bheḍako samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼko ạguko onko reakʼ phạṛi, banar jambe reakʼ jel ar remetʼ do naekeko emaea; noako do naekeakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Apeakʼ pạhil rakapʼakʼ phosol, nãwã darkha rasa, sunum, merom ar bhiḍikoakʼ pạhil getʼakʼ upʼ hõ naekepe emaea," 
Deuteronomy18:5 ente aperen Probhu Isor do aperen sanam gusṭirenko tala khon Liwiko ar onkoren bõskogeye bachao akawana, jemon jao okte onko do Probhu Isorko sapʼsorae." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Israelkoakʼ disạmren jãhãe Liwi hoṛ acʼakʼ nagraha khon Probhu Isore bachao akatʼ ṭhạ̃iteye hijukʼ," 
Deuteronomy18:7 enḍekhan eṭakʼ Liwi boehako leka uni hõ acʼren Probhu Isor ńutumte sekʼwa kạmiye kạmi daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Acʼren apate doho oṭoakatʼ jiniskoe ạkhriń akatʼrehõ onḍenko Liwiko sãote uni do hạṭińre soman ạidạriye hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Aperen Probhu Isor ape okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe senkate onḍenko jạtren hoṛ oka bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi ona do alope cetʼjoṅa. 
Deuteronomy18:10 Ape talare nonkan hoṛ aloko tahenma one okoe do acʼren hopon seṅgelre samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobe hoyocoe ar okoe doe gukʼni seye janokʼkan se darakan dinko reakʼe lại, okoe do jạdu biddạkoe udug," 
Deuteronomy18:11 okoe do bhutko hoteteye kạmikan, okoe do bạṛicʼ jiu sãoteye peṛakʼ ar okoe do gocʼ hoṛkoe ḍakaoko." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Onko do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ hirkhạwan hoṛ kanako. Ar nokoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ iạtege aperen Isor do onko jạtrenko ape samaṅ khone laga ńirkoa. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Ape do aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre bin dusạnko leka baṛe tahenpe. 
Deuteronomy18:14 “Okoe jạtren hoṛkope bedokholko lạgidokʼkan onko do jạdu biddạ ar janokʼkoakʼ kathako luturakʼa, menkhan aperen Probhu Isor do onakoe mana akada." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Aperen Probhu Isor do Israel boehako tala khon iń leka mitʼṭen nạbiye teṅgoapea. Ar uniyakʼ katha leka ape do calakʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Horeb burure oka hilokʼ sanamko Probhu Isor samaṅrepe jarwalen enhilokʼge ape do aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen onagepe khojleda. Apepe menleda, ‘ale do aleren Probhu Isorakʼ katha alo baṛele ańjomma se niạ maraṅ seṅgel hõ alole ńelma; ar baṅkhan ale dole gujukʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 “Probhu Isor do ińe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘onko do bhagegeko menakada." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Iń do onkoren Israel boehako tala khon onko lạgitʼ am leka mitʼṭen nạbiyiń teṅgo akoa. Ar uniyakʼ mocatege ińakʼ kathakoń roṛa, ar iń oka lạlạiyiń hukumae onage uni doe roṛa." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Uni nạbi do ińakʼ ńutumte oka kathae lại ar jãhãege ona katha bae ańjom, enḍekhan ińge uni hoṛ do dạyireń paṛao ocoyea." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Menkhan iń oka bạń hukum akawade nonkan katha jãhãe nạbi ińakʼ ńutumte dilkate se debotakoakʼ ńutumte kathae roṛ, enḍekhan uni do gocʼ giḍikae hoyokʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Jãhãn mitʼṭecʼ katha iạte mone montepe mendaṛekea, ‘Probhu Isor do noa kathae menakada se baṅ ona do cekatele baḍaea?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Jãhãe nạbi Probhu Isor ńutumte jãhãn kathae roṛ ar ona do eṛeteakʼ hoyokʼ khan se onka baṅ hoylen khan, enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa ona katha Probhu Isor do bae roṛ akada. Menkhan uni nạbige dilkateye roṛ akada. Uni do alope botoraea." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe onko boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko tinreye marao utạrkoa ar onkoakʼ ato, nagraha ar oṛakʼkorepe girobasokʼa," 
Deuteronomy19:2 unre sompotti lekate aperen Probhu Isor emakʼ disạm do pe ṭhenpe hạṭińa. Onako modre Asrayokʼ nagraha lekate pea nagrahape begar dohokakʼa ar onḍe senokʼ reakʼ hor hõpe benaojoṅa. Jemon khũniạhi hoṛ do ona Asrayokʼ nagrahateye ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 “Ar khũniạhi hoṛ onḍeye ńir bańcaokʼte jiwiye bańcaotae reakʼ bondobos do nonka kana. Jãhãege acʼ pheḍren hoṛ begor kurudaeteye khũn emanlere," 
Deuteronomy19:5 jemon mitʼ hoṛ do eṭakʼ hoṛ sãote birte sahan makʼe sen akana. Ar onḍe sahan mamakʼ jokhecʼ mitʼ hoṛakʼ ṭeṅgocʼ do ḍanḍom khon bocʼkate eṭakʼ hoṛe josokʼ ar onate uni hoṛe gujukʼ. Unre khũniạhi hoṛ do onako asray nagraha reakʼ mitʼ nagrahate ńir senkate acʼakʼ jiwiye bańcao daṛeataea. 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ar baṅkhan mãyãm halayicʼ do raṅgaote uniye lagayea ar asrayokʼ nagraha ạuriye tiyogrege uni doe gojeya, menkhan mon khon ona bae kạmi akatʼte uni do gujukʼ reakʼ dusire bae paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ona iạte ińiń hukum apekana ape lạgitʼ pea nagrahape begar dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Aperen Probhu Isor dulạṛe ar jao okte uniyakʼ horte taṛam lạgitʼ teheń okako hukumiń emapekan ona joton salakʼpe pańjae enḍekhan aperen hapṛamko ṭhen kiriạkateye gokʼletʼ iạte Probhu Isor do apeakʼ simạnakoe baṛhao ocoytapea ar goṭa disạmgeye emapea. Unre ape lạgitʼ pea nagraha do Asrayokʼ nagraha lekatepe begar dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy19:9  
Deuteronomy19:10 Ape do noape nonkaea jemon sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ disạm aperen Probhu Isore emape lạgidokʼkan ona disạm cetanre bin dusạn hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm alo jorokʼ ar mãyãm reakʼ doste ape hõ dusire alope paṛaokʼ. 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Menkhan jãhãe hoṛ edre iạte jãhãe goje lạgitʼ tãṛãkʼ akane tahen ar uniye gojete ona Asrayokʼ nagrahateye ńir bańcaokʼ," 
Deuteronomy19:12 enḍekhan acʼakʼ nagraharen mukhiyạko do hoṛ kolkate ona nagrahateko sapʼ ạguyea ar mãyãm halayicʼakʼ tireko jimạyea jemon uniye goje. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Unre uni do alogepe dayawaea. Israelko tala khon bin dusạn hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dospe meṭao utạra. Ar onate bhạlại hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼe emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe aperen hapṛamko ṭhik dohoakatʼ simạna reakʼ cinhạ do alope ocoga. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Jãhãe birudre dusi se behok akatʼ reakʼ lạlis rakapʼlen khan, eken mitʼ hoṛakʼ gohate ghạṭ seye kại akada mente do ohoe dusi ocolena; bar se pe hoṛakʼ goha chaḍa jãhãnakʼge sạriyakʼkana mente do ohoge sạbudokʼa." 
Deuteronomy19:16 “Hạne reakʼ monsubạte jãhãe birudre behokakʼe lạlis," 
Deuteronomy19:17 enḍekhan ona babotre unkin bana hoṛge naeke se bikʼcạricʼ ṭhen idikate Probhu Isor samaṅre teṅgokin hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Ar bikʼcạricʼ do mońjte suṭhik hataokateye ńelkatakina. Ar gokʼhayicʼ do eṛeyicʼ menteye sapʼ ńamokʼ," 
Deuteronomy19:19 enḍekhan acʼren boeha cetanre oka cekawaeye menletʼ onage uni cetanre hõ hoyocoe hoyokʼa. Ar ape tala khon nonkanko hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Inạkhan noa ańjomkate eṭakʼ Israelko do botor hecʼakoa ar nonkan behokakʼ do tisge bako kạmiya. 
Deuteronomy19:21 Uni hoṛ do daya hõ alope dayawaea, jiwi bodol jiwi, mẽtʼ bodol mẽtʼ, ḍaṭa bodol ḍaṭa, ti bodol ti ar jaṅga bodol jaṅga reakʼpe hala hạliya." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Lạṛhại senkate bạiri secʼrenko ape khon ḍher sadomko, lạṛhại gạḍiko ar palṭonko ńelkate alope botorokʼa, ente aperen Probhu Isor okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạgu akatʼpe uni do ape sãoteye tahena." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Lạṛhại lạgitʼpe oḍokʼ calakʼ lahare naeke do samaṅ secʼ hecʼkate palṭonkoe metakoa, ‘E Israelko ańjompe, teheń ape do aperen bạiriko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼpe calakʼkana. Dil dohojoṅpe; ar alope botorokʼa se alope lạbṛujokʼa; bạiriko ńelte alope thar tharaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy20:3  
Deuteronomy20:4 Ente bạiriko sãote lạṛhạikate jitạu ocope lạgitʼ iạte aperen Probhu Isor do ape sãoteye calakʼ kana.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Ona tayom onkoren mukhiyạko mena, ‘ape talare jãhãe nãwãte oṛakʼ benaokate ona bae uḍhạu akatʼ khan uni do oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calakʼma; ar baṅkhan lạṛhạire uniye gocʼlen khan eṭakʼko do ona oṛakʼko uḍhạu joṅa." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Jãhãe darkha bagwan benaokate ona reakʼ jo bae jomakatʼ khan uni do oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calakʼma; ar baṅkhan lạṛhạireye gocʼlen khan eṭakʼko do ona bagwanko dokhol joṅa. 
Deuteronomy20:7 Bapla bondobos tayom jãhãe bae bapla akan khan uni hõ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calakʼma; ar baṅkhan lạṛhạireye gocʼlen khan eṭakʼ hoṛ do uni maejiue baplayea.’ 
Deuteronomy20:8 Naekeko do arhõko mena, ‘ape talare jãhãeko botorokʼkan khan se dil bako ạikạuetʼ khan, enḍekhan ona ńelte eṭakʼ Israel boehakoakʼ mon alo bhiṅgṛạukʼ onate uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calakʼma.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Palṭonko ṭhen katha roṛ mucạtʼkate mukhiyạko do palṭonkoakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dol cetanre akoren subedarko bahalkoa. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Ar jãhãn ato se nagraha upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼpe oḍok senlenre onḍenko hoṛ sulukokʼ lạgitʼpe metakoa. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Onko hoṛ do sulukokʼ lạgitʼko rạjikʼte phaṭok duạrko jhicʼape enḍekhan sanamkoge ape taberen hoṛko hoyokʼa ar ape lạgitʼko kạmiya. 
Deuteronomy20:12 Menkhan sulukokʼ baṅkate ape upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko teṅgokʼ enḍekhan ona nagrahape gherao eseda. 
Deuteronomy20:13 Aperen Probhu Isor do tinre ona nagraha apeakʼ tireye jimạya unre onḍenko herel hoṛ dope gocʼ cabakoa. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Menkhan maejiuko, gidrạko, janwarko ar ona nagraha reakʼ eṭakʼakʼ jinisko do luṭakʼ jinis lekate ape lạgitʼpe ạgu daṛeakʼa. Bạirikoakʼ disạm khon luṭ ạguwakʼ okako jinis aperen Probhu Isor apeye emape ona dope hạṭiń daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ar okako nagraha sạṅgińre menakʼ, ona do ape jạtrenkoakʼ nagraha do baṅkana, ar onako cetanrehõ onkagepe hoeocoya." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isor do okoe jạtrenkoakʼ ato ar nagrahako somppoti lekateye emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe okoe hõ jiwetʼ do alope dohokoa. 
Deuteronomy20:17 Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ape Hittiko, Amoriko, Kananiko, Phạrusiko, Hiwiko ar Jebusiko jotoge purạtepe marao cabakoa." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Ar bape onka lekhan onkoren debotako sewawako reakʼ hirkhạwakʼ kạmipe cetʼjoṅa ar onate aperen Probhu Isor upạrtepe kạiya. 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Jãhãn ato se nagraha ḍher din hạbicʼ gherao tayom ona dokhol lạgitʼpe lạṛhạire onḍenakʼ jãhãn darere ṭeṅgocʼ do alope calaoa, ente onako reakʼ jo do apegepe joma. Onate dareko do alope makʼ giḍikakʼa. Ente ṭạnḍi reakʼ dareko do manwa doko baṅkana apeko hạnpea mente." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Menkhan okako do jo dare baṅkan ona dope makʼ giḍi daṛeakʼa ar oka nagraharen hoṛ ape upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko teṅgokʼ onko ạuripe bhagaoko hạbicʼ onako dare dope makʼ daṛeakʼa ekʼsetʼakʼkope benaojoṅre. 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼe emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe ṭạnḍire jãhãe khun akanpe ńelle khan, ar okoe uniye khunkede ona reakʼ jãhãnakʼ bape baḍae daṛeakʼ." 
Deuteronomy21:2 Enḍekhan aperen murubbiko ar bikʼcạrko do bahrete senkate ona mạ̃ṛĩ khon sor reakʼ ato se nagrahako soṅa tinạkʼ sạṅgińre menakʼa mente. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Ar mạ̃ṛĩ khon okaṭakʼ nagraha do joto khon sorre menakʼ nagraharen murubbiko do nonkan mitʼṭen phẽṭaṛko hataoea okoe do kạmire baṅ lagaoakade ar tarenre tishõ arãṛ baṅ lade akawade. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Ar okare tishõ bako casakatʼ se itạ hõ bako erakatʼ ar onḍe mitʼṭecʼ ạtukʼ soḍokʼ menakʼ, nonkan mitʼṭecʼ sokṛa soḍokʼte uniko idiyea. Ar ona soḍokʼre uni phẽṭaṛakʼ hoṭokʼko rạpudtaea." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Ona tayom naekeko, metakʼme Liwi gusṭiren hoṛko do sapʼsosor kạmi lạgitʼko hecʼ sorokʼa, onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte hoṛko bhorakoa ar reṭepeṭe, dapal tapamre hoṛkoakʼko bicạr chinḍạutakoa ente aperen Probhu Isor do onkoe bachao akatʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ona tayom onko sor ato se nagraharen murubbiko do hoṭokʼ rạputʼ akatʼtae phẽṭaṛ cetanre akoakʼ tiko ạrupʼ saphaetakoa. 
Deuteronomy21:7 Ar inạ tayomko mena, ‘aleakʼ ti do niạ mãyãm bae joroakada ar ona hoyokʼ hõ bale ńelakada." 
Deuteronomy21:8 E Probhu Isor, amem chaḍao akatʼko Israelko baṛe ikạkako me. Nui hoṛakʼ mãyãm iạte amren hoṛko alom dusikoa.’ Ar onate mãyãm reakʼ dos khon ikạpe ńama." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Nonkate ape tala khon bin dusạn hoṛakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dospe meṭao daṛeakʼa, ente unre Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onage hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Bạiriko sãote lạṛhại senkate tinre aperen Probhu Isor apeakʼ tire onkoe jimạkoa ar ape do onkope bondikoa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 unre onkoren mońje ńelokʼ maejiu ńelte jãhãeye kusi emanlen khan uni do bạhuttetʼ menteye doho daṛeaea. 
Deuteronomy21:12 Ar maejiu do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye idiyea. Ona tayom uni maejiu do hoyo munḍrikʼ hoyokʼtaea ar ramakoe getʼ giḍiytaea," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ar bondikate ạguiye jokhecʼ acʼakʼ hoṛmore okako kicricʼ tahẽkantae onakoe giḍikataea. Inạ tayom uniyakʼ oṛakʼre tahẽkate maejiu do mitʼ cando hạbicʼ acʼren go-baba lạgitʼe rakʼ homora. Ar ona tayom uni hoṛ do maejiue baplayete uniren jãwãeye hoyokʼa ar maejiu hõ uniren bạhui hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy21:14 Menkhan tayomte maejiu bae kusiyae khan uni okare calakʼe men onḍege sen ocowae hoyokʼa. Uni do bae ạkhriń daṛeaea se kạ̃ṛmĩ lekate hõ bae doho daṛeaea, ente uni doe bemanot akadea." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Nonka hoedaṛeakʼa, mitʼ hoṛren do barea bạhu menakʼkintaea, unkin modre mitʼṭene dulạṛea ar eṭakʼicʼ do baṅa. Ar unkin bana hoṛren koṛa hoponkin janamokʼ ar bae dulạṛedekan bạhuren pạhil koṛa hopone janamokʼ," 
Deuteronomy21:16 enḍekhan sompotti emokʼ jokhecʼ okoeṭakʼ bạhu bae dulạṛede tahẽkan uniren hopon badkate eṭakʼ bạhuren pạhilicʼ koṛa ạidạri emae do baṅ ganokʼtaea, ente okoeṭakʼ bạhu bae dulạṛede tahẽkan uniren hoponge pạhilreye janam akana." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ar bạhu bae dulạṛedekanren hoponge acʼakʼ sompotti reakʼ eṭakʼ hopon khon bar doboṛ emkate unige pạhilicʼ hopon mente aṅgoce hoyokʼtaea. Ente uni hoponkangeae apattetʼakʼ daṛe reakʼ pạhilicʼ jo do. Ar pạhil hopon reakʼ ạidạri do unigeye ńama. 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Jãhãeren koṛa hopon ḍhiṭ ar ṭhokicʼe hoyokʼ, ar go-babawakʼ katha bae ańjom ar unkinakʼ ḍanṭao bae manao," 
Deuteronomy21:19 enḍekhan uniren go-baba do ạkinakʼ ato se nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrre murubbiko ṭhenkin idiyea. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Unkin do murubbiko kin metakoa, ‘ạlińren nui hopon do ạḍitetʼ ḍhiṭicʼ kanae are ṭhokgea; uni do bae hetawạliń kana. Uni doe ńũ bulokʼkana ar ṭaka poesae tahas nahas cabayetʼa.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Unre ona ṭhạ̃iren sanam herel hoṛ do dhirite uniko tiń gojea. Ar nonkate ape tala khon uni bạṛicʼ hoṛ doe caba utạrokʼa. Ar Israelko do noa katha ańjomkate botor caṛhaoakoa. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Jãhãe hoṛ gujukʼ sạjại ńam lek kanae menteye dos akatʼ khan ar gocʼkate darereko ṭaṅgao dohoakade khan," 
Deuteronomy21:23 enḍekhan setakʼ hạbicʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do darere aka dohokakʼ baṅ ganokʼa. Enhilokʼge uni do topakae hoyokʼa, ente onkanko hoṛ do Probhu Isorren sarapan hoṛkanako. Ar Probhu Isor do sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan ona do alope besapha ocoya." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Aperen Israel boeharen ḍaṅgra se uniren bhiḍi se merome sen atʼakanpe ńellekore hape akae alope tahena. Ape do uni ṭhenpe ruạṛ idikaea. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Uni boeha do ape aḍepaserene baṅkanre hõ se bape baḍae akade khan, enḍekhan uni atʼicʼ do ape ṭhenpe ạguiyea ar uni boeha sendra ạuriye hijukʼ hạbicʼ apeakʼ oṛakʼregepe doho hataṛkaea. Ar uniye hecʼlen khanpe em ruạṛkaea." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Aperen boeharen gadha se oyonakʼ se uniye atʼakatʼ eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼgepe ńelle khan hõpe onkaea, ar alope duṛupʼ hapekokʼa." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Aperen boeharen gadha se ḍaṅgra horre bhindạṛ akanpe ńellere hape akae alope tahena. Uni jemone beretʼ daṛeakʼ ona lạgitʼpe kurumuṭuiya. 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Jãhãe maejiuge herelakʼ sajte jemon aloe sajokʼma se jãhãe herel hoṛ hõ maejiuakʼ horokʼakʼte aloe sajokʼma. Ente Probhu Isor do onka kạmiyicʼ doe hirkhạwaea. 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Hortepe calakʼ jokhecʼ darere se ot cetanre jãhãn cẽṛẽyakʼ tukạpe ńamlere ar onḍe eṅgattetʼ do hoponkoe hạmbutʼ akatʼko se belekoe obor akatʼtae, enḍekhan hopon sudhạ eṅgattetʼ do alope idiyea." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Hopon dope idi daṛeakoa menkhan eṅgattetʼ do aṛakʼkae hoyokʼtapea. Nonkate ape do bhạlại hoyokʼtapea ar ḍher din jiwetʼpe tahena. 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Oṛakʼ benao jokhecʼ chad reakʼ beṛhaetepe kãt ạcurkakʼa, jemon jãhãe chad khon ńurhạkateye gocʼlen khan oṛakʼren hoṛko uniyakʼ gujukʼ iạte dạyi aloko hoyokʼ." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Darkha khetre bar lekan itạ do alope rohoea; entepe rohoe lekhan ona itạ reakʼ phosol ar khet reakʼ darkha jo banarge ape lạgitʼ do barongea. 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Ḍaṅgra ar gadha mitʼ sãote siyokʼ lạgitʼ alope joṛao mitʼkinạ. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Bar jạt sutạm metakʼme bhiḍi upʼ ar musnạ sutạm mesalkate benaoakʼ kicricʼ hõ alope horoga. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Ar apeakʼ oyonakʼ reakʼ ponon ańcarre ḍuriạpe tolakʼa. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Jãhãe hoṛ baplakate bạhuttetʼ sãoteye giticʼmidokʼ tayom ar bae kusiyae khan ar uniyakʼ bodnam pasnaoteye men, ‘iń do nui kuṛiń baplaledea, menkhan unire kũạritetʼ reakʼ porman bạń ńamleda,’" 
Deuteronomy22:14  
Deuteronomy22:15 unre kuṛiren gogo-baba do kũạritetʼ proman lạgitʼ ato se nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrre murubbiko ṭhen ạkinren kuṛi idikate apattetʼe mena, ‘nui hoṛ sãote ińren hoponerań baplaledea menkhan ar bae kusiyae kana," 
Deuteronomy22:16  
Deuteronomy22:17 ar ńitokʼ do bodname pasnaoetʼtaea, baṅma kũạritetʼ reakʼ proman unire bae ńamleda. Menkhan nõkʼõe ńelpe ińren hoponerańakʼ kũạri reakʼ porman.’ Ar noa menkate uni do murubbiko samaṅre uniye beoharletʼ reakʼ kicricʼe ḍhala." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Unre murubbiko do uniren jãwãeko sạjạiyea. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Onko do juri banalekate uni ṭhen khon mitʼ keji rupạko ạdạiyea ar kuṛiren apattetʼko emaea, ente uni do Israelren mitʼṭen kũạri kuṛi ńutumte bodname pasnao akada. Ar kuṛi do uni hoṛren bạhu mentegeye tahena ar uniren jãwãe do tisge bae bạgi daṛeaea." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Menkhan sạrikan khan ar kuṛi do kũạ̃ritetʼ mente bae pormanlen khan," 
Deuteronomy22:21 tobe kuṛi do acʼ apattetʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr ṭhen idiye hoyokʼa. Ar onḍe herel hoṛko do dhirite uniko tiń gojea. Kuṛi do apattetʼakʼ oṛakʼre tahen jokhecʼe laṭghaṭletʼ iạte Israelko talare mitʼṭecʼ hirkhạwakʼe kạmiakada. Ar ape tala khon nonkan bạṛicʼan hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa. 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Jãhãe hoṛ jãhãe eṭakʼ hoṛren bạhu sãoteye giticʼmidokʼkane ńel len khan tobe uni herel ar maejiu bana hoṛge gocʼ giḍikin hoyokʼa. Israelko tala khon nonkan bạṛicʼ hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa. 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Bapla ṭhik akantae nonkan jãhãe kũạri kuṛi atore se nagrahare ńamkate jãhãe uni sãoteye giticʼmidokʼ," 
Deuteronomy22:24 enḍekhan unkin banarge onḍenakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen idikate dhirite tiń gocʼkin hoyokʼa. Kuṛi do noa iạtege goje hoyokʼa uni do ato se nagrahare tahẽkate hõ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ bae kikiạuleda, ar herel do eṭakʼ hoṛren bạhui nosṭokede iạte. Ape talare nonkan bạricʼ hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Bapla ṭhik doho akantae nonkan jãhãe kuṛi nisun jaegare ńamkate jãhãe jorkate uni tulucʼe giticʼmidokʼ enḍekhan okoe hoṛe kạmi akatʼ eken uni motogeye gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy22:26 Kuṛi do jãhãnakʼ alope cekaea; gujukʼ sạjại ńam lek uni do jãhãnakʼ bae ceka akada. Noa do mitʼ hoṛ acʼ pheḍren hoṛ upạrte jhãp emkate khunkede lekanakʼ kana," 
Deuteronomy22:27 ente uni hoṛ eskarge kuṛi do maṭreye ńamledea are kikiạuletʼre hõ uni bańcaoe lạgitʼ onḍe celege bako tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Menkhan bapla baṅ ṭhik akantae nonkan kũạri kuṛi ńamkate jãhãe jorkate uni sãoteye giticʼ midokʼ arkin sapʼ ńamokʼ," 
Deuteronomy22:29 enḍekhan uni hoṛ do kuṛiren apattetʼ adha keji rupại emaea. Ar kuṛiye nosṭokedete uni do baplaye hoyokʼtaea. Ar tisge bae bạgi daṛeaea. 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Kạki eṅgattetʼ baplako do baṅ ganokʼa; onate uni do apattetʼren bạhu sãoteye laṭghaṭte apattetʼe bemanotea. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Koṭecʼ cạkrạ akadeyicʼ se getʼ cạkrạ akadeyicʼ hoṛ do okoe hõ Probhu Isorakʼ manḍerre bako seletʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Jãhãe bidhuạ hoṛ hõ Probhu Isorakʼ manḍerre bae seletʼ daṛeakʼa; gelpon piṛhi hạbicʼ uniren do cele hõ bako seletʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Jãhãe Amoni se Moabi hõ Probhu Isorakʼ manḍerre bae seletʼ daṛeakʼa; gelpon piṛhi hạbicʼ uniren cele hõ manḍerre bako bolo daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Ente Misor disạm khon oḍok hecʼkate apeakʼ dãṛãn horre onko do jomakʼ ar dakʼante bako daramletʼpea, bickom sarapape lạgitʼ Mesopoṭamia disạm reakʼ Pethor nagraha khon Beor hopon Biliam do ṭakateko ạguledea." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isor do Biliamakʼ katha bae luturada; ar ape bako dulạṛletʼpe iạte uni do sarap bodolteye bhoratʼpea. 
Deuteronomy23:6 Tinạkʼ din jiwetʼpe tahen unạkʼ din onko bhạlạiko reakʼ alope kurumuṭuiya. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Menkhan Edomrenko do alope hirkhạwakoa, ente onko do aperen boeha kanako. Misorrenko hõ alope hirkhạwakoa, ente onkoakʼ disạmre ape do porjạtrenko lekatepe tahekana." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Onkoren tesar piṛhiren gidrạko do Probhu Isorakʼ manḍerreko seletʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Bạiriko upạrte lạṛhại senkate ḍera benao tayom sanam lekan besaphawakʼko khon pharak akaepe tahena. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ape talaren jãhãege ńindạ jokhecʼ jãhãnakʼ iạteye besapha len khan, uni do ḍera bahrete senokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ar ạyubokʼ dela deli doe ḍạbrạ saphakʼa. Ar siń cando hạsur tayom do ḍerateye bolo daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Ṭạnḍite lạgitʼ metakʼme bahrete calakʼ lạgitʼ ḍera bahre mitʼṭecʼ jaegape ṭhik dohokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Apeakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako modre ot lae lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ khonta hõ dohoy hoyokʼtapea. Ar ṭạnḍite metakʼme bahre calakʼ lahare onatepe la ghạḍluga ar ṭạnḍite baṛakate hasatepe topa oṭokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Ape rukhiyạpe lạgitʼ ar aperen bạiriko apeakʼ tire soprotko lạgitʼ aperen Probhu Isor do apeakʼ ḍera talareye dãṛãna. Onate apeakʼ ḍera do sonotpe dohoya jemon ape talare hirkhạwakʼ jãhãnakʼ ńelte aloe dea giḍipe. 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Jãhãeren guti do ape ṭhen hecʼkate asraye hatao enḍekhan uniren kisạ̃ṛakʼ tire alope jimạ ruạṛkaea. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Uni guti do ape talare okare tahene menjoṅ onḍege tahẽ ocoaea; ar alope santaoea. 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Jãhãe Israelren maejiu jemon mundilren kusmbi aloe hoyokʼ; ar jãhãe Israel herel hõ mundilren kusmbi metakʼme alo jemone jogna ocokʼ. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Herelge cetʼ ar maejiu kusmbige cetʼ uniyakʼ rojgarakʼ ṭaka do mundilte manot purạu lạgitʼ aperen Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte alope ạguiya, ente Probhu Isor do nonkan herel ar maejiue hirkhạwako kana." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Jãhãe Israel boehako ṭhen khon sud alope hataoa, baṅ do ṭaka cetanre ar baṅ do jomakʼ jinis cetanre, baṅ do eṭakʼ jãhãn jinis cetanre ape do sudge alope hataoa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Menkhan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko ṭhen khon dope hatao daṛeakʼa eken Israel boehako chaḍa. Nonkape senakʼ khan okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe calakʼkan onḍe ape do jãhãnakʼrege hatpe calao onarege Probhu Isor doe bhorapea. 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen jãhãnakʼge manot lạgitʼpe dohoy enḍekhan ona purạu lạgitʼ do alope biloma, ente aperen Probhu Isor do tishõ ona khon bae khalaspea. Ar onate ape do kạirepe paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Menkhan manotakʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼ bape doholere kại do baṅ hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Mocate okaṭakʼ manotakʼ reakʼ kathape roṛ ona do purạutege hoyokʼtapea, ente amakʼ mocatege Probhu Isor samaṅre manotakʼ reakʼem roṛ akada." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Eṭakʼ jãhãeakʼ darkha khetre senkate apeakʼ kusi leka darkha jope jom daṛeakʼa, menkhan idiy lạgitʼ do bape gocha daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ape pheḍren hoṛakʼ teṅgo akan phosolrepe bololenre ona reakʼ gelepe hulecʼ daṛeakʼa, menkhan datromte do bape getʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Bapla tayom jãhãege bạhuttetʼ cetanre jãhãnakʼ dose ńamtae ar uni cetanreye bekusikʼte bapag dolele olae ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼteye kolgotʼkae," 
Deuteronomy24:2 ar uni maejiu do acʼakʼ oṛakʼte senkate jãhãeye baplaye ar uniren dosaricʼ jãwãe hõ tayomte bae kusiyae ar uni cetanreye onkae, se uni jãwãetetʼ hõe gujukʼ" 
Deuteronomy24:3  
Deuteronomy24:4 enḍekhan uniren pạhilicʼ jãwãe, one okoeye bạgilede uni do ar bae bapla daṛeaea, ente uni doe besaphagea. Ar nonkanakʼ bapla Probhu Isor doe hirkhạwakʼa. Sompotti lekate okaṭakʼ disạm aperen Probhu Isore emape lạgidokʼkan ona disạm cetanre kại alope paṛao ocoya." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Thoṛa din lahareye bapla akan nonkan hoṛ lạṛhại lạgitʼ do alope kolea se uni cetanre jãhãnakʼ bhar hõ alope ema. Uni do bapla akade bạhu tulucʼ kusi rạskạre tahen lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor hạbicʼ chuṭạge tahẽocoae hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Okoe hõ jante dhiri, se jante reakʼ cetan dhiri hõ bandhok menkate alope hataoa, ente onkayicʼ hoṛ do jiwige bandhoke hataoeda." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ar jãhãe hoṛ jãhãe Israel boeha kombṛo idikate guti menteye hataoe seye ạkhrińe, enḍekhan uni kombṛo hoṛ do gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ape tala khon onkan bạṛicʼ hoṛ dope marao utạrkoa." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Murhucʼ jom rog menakʼtae hoṛ khon sontorokʼpe ar Liwi naekeko okako hukumape onako joton salakʼ manaope. Iń okań hukum akawatʼko ape hõ sontor salakʼ onka leka calakʼpe. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Misor disạm khonpe oḍok hecʼen tayom horre Probhu Isor do Mạriạm cetʼe cekalede ona baṛe disạipe. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ape pheḍren hoṛ rin dhar lekate jãhãnakʼpe emae khan bondhok lekate jãhãnakʼ jinis hatao lạgitʼ uniyakʼ oṛakʼte alope bolokʼa. 
Deuteronomy24:11 “Ape do bahrerege teṅgonpe ar okoe rin dharpe emakawade unige bondhok lạgitʼ jinisko ape ṭhene ạguiya. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ kan khane enḍekhan uniyakʼ bondhok dohoakatʼ kicricʼ cetanre alope giticʼa. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Menkhan cando hạsurokʼre onape ruạṛkataea jemon onate oyokateye jạpitʼ daṛeakʼ. Ar onate uni do apeakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼe koeya, ar aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre dhoromge hoyokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Paona babotre reṅgecʼ orecʼ ar din mạjuriko cetanre alope behoka baṅ doe aperen Israel boehakan ar baṅ doe apeakʼ disạmren upriạ hoṛkan. 
Deuteronomy24:15 Siń cando hạsurokʼ laharege uniyakʼ kuṛại do emkatae hoyokʼa, ente uni doe reṅgecʼ hoṛ kana ar ona kuṛại cetanregeye ṭehãḍ akana. Ar bape onkale khan kại hoyokʼtapea, ar uni do ape upạrte Probhu ṭhene raga ar kạirepe paṛaokʼa." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Hoponakʼ kại gunạkʼte apat do bae gocʼ ocokʼa se apatakʼ kại gunạkʼte hopon hõ bae gocʼ ocokʼa. Mimitʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ kại gunạkʼte gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Upriạ ar ṭũạr amarko lạgitʼ behokakʼ reakʼ do alope bicạra. Ar rạnḍi maejiuko ṭhen khon bandhok lekate kicricʼ hõ alope hataoa. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Disạipe, Misor disạmre ape hõ golampe tahẽkana ar aperen Probhu Isor do onḍe khone chaḍao ạgu akatʼpea. Ona iạte noako kạmi lạgitʼ iń hukumape kana." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Apeakʼ jumi reakʼ phosolpe samṭao jokhecʼ ạṭi ạguiype hiṛiń lekhan ona ạgui lạgitʼ do alope ruạṛ calakʼa. Ona do upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍiko lạgitʼ bạgi oṭokakʼpe. Enḍekhan aperen Probhu Isor do jotowakʼ kạmireye bhorapea." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Jạitun jo dal ńurhại tayom ḍạrko secʼ do ar alope beṅgetʼ dohṛaea. Okaṭakʼ tahen ona do upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍiko lạgitʼ bạgi oṭokakʼpe." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Apeakʼ darkha bagwan khon darkha jope godre dosar dhao alope ńel dohṛaea. Okaṭakʼ tahen ona do upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍiko lạgitʼ bạgi oṭokakʼpe." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Disạipe, ape hõ Misor disạmre golampe tahẽkana. Ona iạte iń do noakoń hukum apekana." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Hoṛko talare jhogṛa jhạṭi hoylenre ar adalot hạbicʼ senlen khan bikʼcạrko do bin dusiyicʼ do bin dusi ar dusiyicʼ do dusi menkateko bicạr chinḍạukatakoma. 
Deuteronomy25:2 Ona rayre dusiyicʼ do dale reakʼ hukum hoylen khan bikʼcạricʼ do uniye taber ocoyea ar dos akatʼ lekate lekhakate acʼ samaṅregeye dal ocoyea. 
Deuteronomy25:3 Menkhan pongel ṭheṅga khon bạ̃ṛti dale do baṅ hoyokʼa. Niạ khon bạ̃ṛti dalle khan Israel boeha do sanam hoṛko samaṅreye bemanot ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Ekʼen kan ḍaṅgra do moca alom toltaea. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Boeha boeha mitʼ gharońjreko tahenre jãhãe begor gidrạwanteye gocʼlen khan, uniren rạnḍi maejiu do gharońj bahre eṭakʼ jãhãre bae bapla daṛeakʼa. Uniren erweltetʼ koṛa do uniye baplayea ar uni do dadattetʼ lạgitʼ bõse teṅgokoa." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ar uniren pạhilicʼ hoponge uniren gocʼ akanicʼ dadattetʼakʼ ńutume rukhiyạya ar uni boehawakʼ ńutum Israelko tala khon baṅ meṭaokʼtaea. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Menkhan erweltetʼ koṛa uni rạnḍi maejiu baplaye bae rạjikʼ enḍekhan uni maejiu do ato se nagraha reakʼ phaṭok-duạrre murubbiko ṭhen senkateye mena, ‘erweliń koṛa do ińren jãwãeyakʼ ńutum Israelko talare rukhiyại lạgitʼ bae rạjikʼkana. Ar ińre oka dạyik menakʼtae ona manao hõ bae khojkana.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Unre onḍenko murubbi do uni hoṛ hohowaeteko bujhạuaea. Ar ona tayom hõ uni baplaye lạgitʼ bae rạjikʼ," 
Deuteronomy25:9 enḍekhan uniren hilit era do murubbiko samaṅrege erweltetʼ koṛa ṭhen sen sorkate uniyakʼ panaheye bojtaea ar mẽtʼãhãreye thoaea are mena, ‘dadattetʼakʼ bõs okoe rukhiyại bae men uni do nonkawaege ṭhika.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ar Israelko talare uni hoṛakʼ bõs do ‘Bocʼ panahe bõsko’ metakʼa. 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Bar hoṛkin lạṛhại oktere unkin modren mitʼ hoṛren maejiu do acʼren jãwãe bańcaoe lạgitʼ sen sorkate eṭakʼ herel hoṛakʼ hereltetʼe racakʼ lekhan," 
Deuteronomy25:12 enḍekhan uni maejiuakʼ ti do samakʼ giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. Uni do alogepe dayawaea. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Apeakʼ thạilạkʼre mitʼṭecʼ do ḍher ojon reakʼ ar mitʼṭecʼ do kom ojon reakʼ nonka bar lekan baṭkhara do alo baṛe tahentapema. 
Deuteronomy25:14 Apeakʼ oṛakʼre mitʼṭecʼ do lạṭu ar mitʼṭecʼ do kạṭicʼ nonkan bar lekan sosoṅakʼ hõ alo tahenma. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan onḍe jemon ḍher dinpe bahaokʼ onate ṭhik lekan sosoṅakʼ baṭkhara ar tulạpe dohoya. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Okoeye nonkae, metakʼme, ṭhokʼkayicʼ hoṛ do aperen Probhu Isore hirkhạwaea." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Misor disạm khonpe oḍok hecʼen tayom Amalekiko horre ape sãote okako cekaletʼ ona do alope hiṛińa. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Onko do aperen tayomreko tahẽkan hoṛko okoe do laṅga ar reńgecʼteko tahẽkan onko cetanre jhãpko emleda. Onko do Isor bako botoradea. 
Deuteronomy25:19 Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm do sompotti lekate dokhol lạgitʼe emapekan onḍe beṛhaeten bạiriko sãote lạṛhạikate tinreye jirạu ocopea unre dhạrti khon Amalekikope marao utạrkoa. Noa katha do alogepe hiṛińa. 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm sompotti lekateye emape lạgidokʼkan ona hatkate tinre onḍepe girobasokʼa," 
Deuteronomy26:2 unre aperen Probhu Isore em akawatʼpe ona disạmre okako phosolpe hoyocoe ona reakʼ pạhil rakapʼakʼ khon thoṛa phosol hataokate khạclạkʼrepe dohoya. Ar Probhu Isor sodorokʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iye bachaojoṅ onḍepe idiya. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Unre okoeṭakʼ naeke onḍeye tahen unipe metaea, ‘teheń ińren Probhu Isor samaṅreń jạhireda, okaṭakʼ disạm emabon lạgitʼ aboren hapṛamko ṭhene gokʼletʼ ona disạmteń bolo akana.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Unre naeke do apeakʼ ti khon onako khạclạkʼ hataokate aperen Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ samaṅreye dohoya. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Ar ona tayom do Probhu Isor samaṅrepe mena, ‘Aleren hapṛam do Aramren mitʼṭen uḍạcal hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni do eken thoṛa hoṛante Misor disomteye senlena ar onḍeye tahẽkanre uni hotete mitʼṭen maraṅ ar daṛean jạtrenkoakʼ janam hoylena ar onkoakʼ lekha do ḍherge tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Menkhan Misorren hoṛ do abo sãote bhage bako beoharleda. Onko do ạḍi kosṭoko ematʼbon tahẽkana ar abo cetanre hamal bojhako ladeyatʼ bon tahẽkana. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Unre abo do aboren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen bon rakʼleda. Ar uni do aboakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼe ańjomketʼtabona ar aboakʼ harkhet sasete ńelkeda; ar cetʼleka bon santao ocokʼkan ona hõe ńelkeda. 
Deuteronomy26:8 Onate acʼakʼ keṭecʼ ti ar tiạrakatʼ sopote ar maraṅ botoranakʼ kạmite, cinhạkote ar hahaṛa kạmikoe udukʼatʼbonte Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguketʼbona." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Uni do nonḍeye ạguketʼbona ar toa-dumur rasate perecʼ noa disạme ematʼbona. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ona iạte E Probhu Isor, am emakʼ ot baṛge reakʼ pạhil rakapʼakʼ phosol khonakʼ am ṭheniń ạguakada.’ Ar noa menkate aperen Probhu Isor samaṅre khạclạkʼpe dohoya ar unipe sewawaea." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Ape ar gharońjrenko Probhu Isor oka bhage bhageakʼ jiniskoteye bhor akawatʼpe onate ape do, Liwiko ar ape talare menakʼko upriạ hoṛko sãotepe rạskạ joṅa." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Tesarakʼ bochor, metakʼme, gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń emokʼ bochorre, apeakʼ arjaoakʼ sanam phosol reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińpe begar sạtlere arpe tirpitlenre Liwiko, upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍi maejiukope emakoa. Onate onko do apeakʼ disạmre jom-ńũkateko tirpitokʼa." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Ona tayom ape sanamko aperen Probhu Isorpe metaea, ‘iń do amakʼ hukum lekage ińakʼ arjaoakʼ khon am ńutumteń begar dohoakatʼ hạṭiń do oṛakʼ khon oḍokkate Liwiko, upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍi maejiukoń emakawatʼkoa. Amakʼ hukum do bạń bebatao akada ar onako reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ bạń hiṛińakada." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Gocʼko lạgitʼ homor halaṅ dinre hõ am ńutumte begar dohoakatʼ hạṭińko reakʼ khon cetʼge bạń jomakada, se chut iń tahẽkan jokhecʼ hõ oṛakʼ khon bạń oḍokleda, se ona khon jãhãn hạṭiń hõ gocʼko ńutumte bạń dan akada. Iń do ińren Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekageń kạmi akada. Amem hukumakatʼ jotowakʼgeń kạmi akada." 
Deuteronomy26:15 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ sonot tahen ṭhạ̃i khon baṛe beṅgedme ar amren hoṛ baṛe beṅgetʼakome, metakʼme Israelko baṛe bhoraleme. Aleren hapṛamko ṭhen amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate toa ar dumur rasate perecʼ okaṭakʼ disạmem emakawatʼle noa disạm hõ bhorakʼtaleme.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Aperen Probhu Isor teheń noako ạn ar bicạrko dohoy reakʼe hukum apekana. Ape do sontor salakʼ goṭa mon ar ontorte onape manaoa. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Ar teheńge lại sodorpe. Probhu kangeae aperen Isor do ar uniyakʼ horregepe taṛama mente. Arpe aṅgocetʼ kana, uniyakʼ hukumko ar bicạrkope dohoya ar uniyakʼ katha lekape calakʼa." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Probhu Isor hõ teheńgeye lại sodoretʼkana, acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate ape do uniren kanape. Onate uniyakʼ hukum leka senokʼ hoyokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Uni doe lại sodoretʼkana, sarhao, man ar sabasi secʼte sirjạuren sanam jạtrenko cetanre uni doe dohopeya ar aperen Isor Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate apege uni ńutumte begar akan jạtrenpe hoyokʼa.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mose do Israelren murubbiko soṅgekate hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Okako hukum teheńiń emapekan onape dohoya arpe manaoa." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Jordan gaḍa paromkate aperen Probhu Isore emakawatʼpe disạmte bolokate lạṭu lạṭu dhiripe cake rakaba ar cuntepe potaokakʼa," 
Deuteronomy27:3 ar onako cetanre ạn-ạri reakʼ kathakope ol dohokakʼa. Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ leka toa ar dumur rasate perecʼ okaṭakʼ disạmteye idipe lạgidokʼkan onḍepe bololen tayom," 
Deuteronomy27:4 metakʼme jordan gaḍa parom tayom ińakʼ hukum leka Ebol burure ona dhirikope bereda ar cuntepe potaokakʼa. 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe dhiri reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍpe benaoa. Menkhan dhiriko cetanre mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jãhãnakʼ khanḍage alope epela. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ noa pinḍ do pahṭa dhiriko reakʼtegepe benaoa ar ona cetanre aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅa. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Onḍe do sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porob hõpe porobokʼa ar samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko jomkate aperen Probhu Isor samaṅrepe rạskạkʼa. 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ar okako dhiripe cake rakab ona cetanre noa ạn-ạri reakʼ sanamakʼ kathako pusṭạutepe ol dohokakʼa.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Inạ tayom Mose do Liwi naekeko ar sanam Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “E Israelko, thirkate ańjompe. Teheń ape do aperen Probhu Isorren hoṛpe hoyakana." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ape do uniyakʼ bataotaepe. Ar teheń okako hukum ar ạn-ạrikoń emapekan ona dohoype.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Enhilokʼge Mose do hoṛkoe galmaraoatʼkoa," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Jordan gaḍa paromkate tinre Probhu Isorakʼ ạsirbad reakʼ katha roṛogokʼa unre Simeonren, Liwiren, Jihudạren, Isakarren, Josephren ar Benjamin khũṭren hoṛko do Gerisim buru cetanreko tahena." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ar tinre sarapakʼ reakʼ katha roṛogokʼa unre Rubenren, Gadren, Aserren, Sebulonren, Danren ar Napthali khũṭren hoṛko do Ebol buru cetanreko tahena." 
Deuteronomy27:14 “Ar Liwiko do sanam Israelko samaṅre ãṭ aṛaṅte noa kathako mena; 
Deuteronomy27:15 ‘Onko hoṛ doko sarapangea, okoe do chãńchre dulakʼ muṭhạnko, kaṭren se dhiriren murhutʼko rokʼ benaoetʼko ar sewawako lạgitʼ danaṅ ṭhạ̃ireko dohoyetʼko. Noko sanam murhutʼko do Probhu Isor ṭhen hirkhạwan jinis kanako, ar eken kạrigolakʼ titegeko benao akana.’ Unre sanamkoko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do eṅgat ar apate bemanotetʼkin.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ jumi reakʼ simạnakoe ocokʼ giḍiyetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do kãṛã hoṛ bhul horteye idiyede.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, one okoe do upriạko, ṭũạr amarko ar rạnḍi maejiuko cetanreye behoketʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do acʼren kạki eṅgat tulucʼe laṭghaṭetʼkan, ente uni do acʼren apattetʼe bemanot edekana.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do janwarko sãoteye laṭghaṭetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do kạki gogo se kaka babaren hoponera sãoteye laṭghaṭetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do acʼren hanhartetʼ sãoteye laṭghaṭetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do danaṅre hoṛe khunetʼko.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do bindusạn hoṛ khun ocoye lạgitʼ ghuse hataoetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 ‘Sarapangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do noa ạn-ạri reakʼ mimitʼ hukumko leka bae senokʼkan ar ona reakʼ daṛe bae aṅgocetʼkan.’ Unre sanam hoṛko mena, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ purạ batao akaepe tahen ar teheń okań hukumapekan ona joton salakʼpe dohoy, enḍekhan dhạrtiren eṭakʼ jạtrenko khon ape doe usulpea:" 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kathare batao akaepe tahen enḍekhan noako sanamakʼ bhorpe ńama ar ona do ape sãote hõ tahena. 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Apeakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i ar khet-baṛgeko reakʼ jotowakʼ cetanre bhor paṛaokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Ar bhorpe ńamte apeakʼ gharońjren hopon ar hoponerako hõ bhoranko hoyokʼa, ar apeakʼ khet baṛgere ḍher phosol hoyokʼtapea ar mĩhũ- merom ar bhiḍiko hõ ḍherko bạḍokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Apeakʼ phosol reakʼ khạclạkʼ ar holoṅ reakʼ ḍạlicʼ hõ bhoranakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Ar din hilokʼ jionre bhorpe ńama. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Bạiri lekate okoe ape upạrteko teṅgokʼ onko do Probhu Isorgeye nonkakoa jemon ape ṭhenko bhagao ocokʼ. Onko do mitʼ horte apere jhãpko ema menkhan eae horteko dạṛ pạnḍuja. 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Apeakʼ murạiko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ bhor tahena ar jãhãnakʼrege hatpe em onarege uni doe jo-baha ocoytapea. Aperen Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ noa disạmregeye bhorapea. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kathakope manao arpe ganao ar uniyakʼ hortepe taṛam enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate, acʼren begar akan jạtrenko lekateye teṅgo rakapʼpea." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Unre dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko ńela, Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum iạtege apeakʼ oprom do hoyokʼa, ar onate apeko botorapea." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Ar okaṭakʼ disạm emape reakʼ Probhu Isor do aperen hapṛamko ṭhene gokʼletʼ ona disạmre ạḍiye bhorapea, metakʼme apeakʼ gharońjkoren hopon ar hoponerako do bhoranko hoyokʼtapea, mĩhũ, merom ar bhiḍiko hõ ḍherko bạḍokʼa ar khetre hõ ḍher phosol hoyokʼtapea."
