Deuteronomy28:12 “Apeakʼ disạmre okte nạpitre dakʼkoe kolte apeakʼ sanamakʼ kạmiko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ murại khon, metakʼme sermae jhicʼapea. Onate aema jạtrenko rinpe emakoa, menkhan ape do okoe ṭhen khon hõ rin bape hataoa." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Probhu Isorgeye nonkae hoeocoya jemon sanamko khonpe usulokʼ, metakʼme jaṅga latarre do bae dohopea. Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ okako hukum teheńiń emapekan onakope luturakʼ khan ar joton salakʼpe manao arpe ganao, enḍekhan jaogepe usulokʼa, ar bape jaṅga latar ocokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Teheń okako hukumiń emapekan, onako modre jãhãṭakʼ khon etom se końe secʼ senkate eṭakʼ Isorko secʼ alope ghańjeṛokʼa ar alope sewawakoa." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Menkhan aperen Probhu Isorakʼ katha bape ańjomtae ar teheńakʼ noako hukum ar niạmko joton salakʼ bape manao ar ganao, enḍekhan noako sarap do ape cetanrege paṛaokʼa ar ape sãorege tahena;" 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Apeakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i ar khet-baṛgeko hõ ape sãote sarapakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Apeakʼ phosol reakʼ khạclạkʼ ar holoṅ reakʼ ḍạlicʼ hõ sarapanakʼ hoyokʼtapea. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Ape hõ Sarapankope hoyokʼte apeakʼ gharońjre hopon ar hoponerako hõko komaokʼa, khetre phosol hõ komaokʼa, mĩhũ-meromko ar bhiḍiko hõ komgeko hoponokʼtapea." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Ar din hilokʼ reakʼ jionre sarapankope hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi iạte Probhu Isor do apeakʼ sanam kạmireye sarap apea, uni do ḍamaḍol ar nisṛạuge apereye kola, ar onatepe heṛ idikʼa ar thoṛa okte khangepe marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Okaṭakʼ disạmpe dokhol lạgidokʼkan Probhu Isor do onḍe nonkae hoeocoya jemon ape talare mahamạriko paṛaokʼte sesre disạm khonpe caba utạrokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Probhu Isor do raj rogte, ruạkote, jaljalaokʼ ruạte, ṭan paṅgla ruạte, dakʼ ṭan ar phosol copakʼ ar jhãorãkʼ rogkoteye ńẽtʼpea; ar ạuripe marao cabakʼ hạbicʼe khudạu baṛapea." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Amakʼ bohokʼ cetan reakʼ serma do tamba leka ar latar ot do mẽṛhẽtʼ leka keṭecʼ hoyokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Probhugeye nonkaea jemon apeakʼ disạmre dakʼ bodolte serma khon dhuṛi ar gitilge ńurokʼa. Ar ạuripe caba utạrokʼ hạbicʼ ape cetanre onako ńurokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Probhu Isorgeye nonkaea jemon ape do aperen bạiriko samaṅrepe bhagao ocokʼ. Ape do mitʼ horte jhãpe ema menkhan onko do eae horteko dạṛ pạnḍuja. Dhạrtiren eṭakʼ sanam rajosṭiren hoṛ do apeakʼ halot ńelte botorteko keklesedokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:26 Apeakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽko ar otren janwarkoakʼ jomakʼge hoyokʼa, onko laga ńirko lạgitʼ do celege bako tahena." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Probhu Isor do Misor disạm reakʼ ojo, ganḍ, dạd ar khasrakoteye ńẽtʼpea ar onako khon celege bako boge daṛeapea." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Uni do koṅka-kuṅki, kãṛã ar andmandteye ńẽtʼpete ạḍiye kosṭo ocopea." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Kãṛã hoṛ ńutre cetʼ lekae ṭạmḍạu baṛae onkage ape hõ sińrepe ṭạmḍạu baṛaea; ar jãhãnakʼ kạmirege bape jo-bahakʼa. Ape do jaoge santao arpe luṭ ocokʼa; ar ona khon bańcaope lạgitʼ celege bako tahena. 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Okoeṭakʼ maejiu sãote baplakʼ lạgitʼem ṭhik dohoy uni tulucʼ do eṭakʼ herel hoṛe giticʼmidokʼa. Oṛakʼpe benao joṅgea menkhan onare bape tahẽ daṛeakʼa. Darkha bagwankope benaogea menkhan ona reakʼ jo do bape jom daṛeakʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:31 Apeakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege aperen ḍaṅgrako gurkotapea, menkhan onkoakʼ mitʼ kuṭrạ jel hõ bape jom daṛeakʼa. Aperen gadhako do jor-julumkateko idikoa, menkhan onko do ar bako em ruạṛkakoa. Aperen bhiḍiko do aperen bạirikoakʼ tireko paṛaokʼa; ar noa muhin khon bańcaope lạgitʼ do celege bako tahena." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Aperen hopon ar hoponerako do eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ ṭhenko soprotkoa. Onko lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor iạte apeakʼ mẽtʼ do kãṛãkʼtapea, menkhan jãhãnakʼ cekae reakʼ cetʼ daṛege baṅ tahentapea." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Bin oprom jạtren hoṛko do apeakʼ jumi reakʼ phosol ar apeakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ kuṛạiko joma ar ape do jiwetʼ jonompe santao ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Ar apeakʼ mẽtʼ okae ńel onatepe koṅka cabakʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Probhu Isorge apeakʼ gunṭhikore, jaṅgakore ar jaṅga reakʼ talka khon bohokʼ hạbicʼ bis-phoṛakoteye ńẽtʼpea ar ona do tisge baṅ bogekʼtapea. Ona bis-phoṛa do jaṅga talka khon bohokʼ hạbicʼ sanam jaegarege hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Ar okoeṭakʼ rajpe bahale Probhu Isor do uni ar ape bondikate idipe lạgitʼ nonkan mitʼ jạtrenko ṭhene jimạpea okoe do bape oromakatʼko ar aperen hapṛamko hõ bako baḍae akatʼko. Onḍe ape do kaṭ ar dhiriren deb-murtikope sewawakoa. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Probhu Isor okoe jạtrenko talareye chirchạturpe onko do apeakʼ ona ńelte botorteko keklesedokʼa, ar ape do landa-dhutʼ ar cigạri baragpe hoyokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Ape do ḍherpe er rehõ komgepe ira, ente pohoko do apeakʼ phosolko jomtapea." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ape do darkha bagwankope benao joṅa arpe joton haraea menkhan tejoko do darkha joko jom cabaetapete bape samṭao daṛeakʼa se ona reakʼ rasa hõ bape ńũ ńama. 
Deuteronomy28:40 Apeakʼ goṭa disạmrege jạitun dare do tahengea menkhan ona reakʼ jo do jhurokʼte sunum do bape ojokʼ ńama. 
Deuteronomy28:41 Okoeko hopon ar hoponerako hoyokʼtape onko hõ ape ṭhen bako tahena, ente onko do bondikateko idiocokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Pohoko do hecʼkate apeakʼ disạm reakʼ dare-nạ̃ṛĩko ar phosolko jom siṭhạ utạra. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Ape talare girobasokʼan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ do ape khonko usulokʼa ar ape dope copotʼ ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Onkoge rinko emapea menkhan ape ṭhen khon do bako hataoa. Ar ape cetanreko tahena ar ape dope jaṅga latar ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Noako sarap do ape cetanrege paṛaokʼa. Ape do aperen Isor Probhu Isorakʼ bape bataoetʼtae iạte ar uni okako hukum ar niạme emakawatʼpe ona bape senakʼkante noako sarap doe khudạu baṛapea are sapʼ tiyokʼpea ar sesre ape dope marao utạrokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:46 Noako sarap do hahaṛa cinhạ ar hahaṛa kạmi lekate ape ar aperen bõsrenko cetanre jaejug hạbicʼ tahena. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Sanamakʼ sareṛakʼko tahẽkan jokhecʼ rạskạ salakʼ aperen Probhu Isor bape sewawade tahẽkante ape do tetaṅ ar ạḍi ṭonṭa talate aperen bạirikope sapʼsorakoa ente Probhu Isorge ape upạrte onkoe kolkoa. Uni do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ arãṛ tarenreye gokʼapea ape ạuripe marao utạrokʼ hạbicʼ. 
Deuteronomy28:48  
Deuteronomy28:49 “Probhu Isor do sạṅgiń khon, dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna khon nonkan mitʼ jạtrenko ape upạrteye ạgukoa one onkoakʼ pạrsi bape bujhạutako. Onko jạtrenko do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ leka ape cetanre sã menteye uḍạu ạgukoa." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Onko do botor mẽtʼãhãwan hoṛko hoyokʼa. Ar murubbiko hõ bako manotkoa ar koṛa hoṛ hõ bako mãyãwakoa. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Onko do aperen mĩhũ-meromko ar khet reakʼ phosolko jom cabaetapea ar sesrepe marao utạrokʼa. Ape lạgitʼ jãhãn phosol, nãwã darkha rasa, sunum se gại ḍaṅgra se bhiḍi meromkoren hopon hõ bako sarecʼkoa, ar ape do sesrepe marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Onko do apeakʼ ato ar nagrahako gherao ạcurtapea, ar sesre oka usul ar keṭecʼ pạcri bhitko cetanrepe bhorsakʼkan ona hõ lạnduṛokʼtapea. Ar aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạme emape lạgidokʼkan ona disạm reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ ato ar nagrahako gherao ạcurtapea." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Arko gherao ạcurakatʼpe oktere bạiriko nonka kosṭoreko paṛao ocopea, unre ape do aperen hoponkope jomkoa, metakʼme aperen Probhu Isore emakawatʼpe aperen hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ jelpe joma." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Unre ape talare okoe dulạṛteye hara akana are sukhi hoṛkan, uniyakʼ ontorre hõ boeha se acʼren dulạṛiạ bạhutae se acʼren hopon ar hoponerakore mãyã baṅ hecʼaea metakʼme jãhãn jomakʼ hõ bae em hạṭińakoa." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Uni do acʼren hoponkoakʼ jele joma ar thoṛa hõ bae emokʼa, ente bạiriko tinre apeakʼ ato se nagraha gheraokate kosṭoreko paṛao ocopea unre noa chaḍa ar uni ṭhen do cetʼ jomakʼge baṅ tahena." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Unre ape modre okoeṭakʼ maejiu do dulạṛteye hara akan are sukhi hoṛkan uni hõ acʼren dulạṛiạ jãwãetetʼ se hopon ar hoponerako cetanre jãhãnakʼ cetʼ mãyãge baṅ tahentaea. Hopon se hoponera janame tayom uni hopon se hoponera ar ona tayom hoṛmo khon oḍok akantae baha, okaṭakʼge onko do bae jom ocokoa. Ente aperen bạiriko tinre apeko gherao esetʼkapea ar kosṭoreko paṛao ocopea unre uni do apnarge acʼakʼ ona hoṛmo khon oḍokʼ akan baha ar hopon do hape hapeteye jomea." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Noa puthire olakan ạn-ạriko joton salakʼpe senakʼte ona lekape colon, metakʼme ‘aperen Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ ar botoranakʼ ńutum bape manot," 
Deuteronomy28:59 enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ape ar apeakʼ bõsko cetanre nonkan hahaṛa ar kuṭhin dukko ar ḍher din tahen ruạkoe paṛao ocoya. 
Deuteronomy28:60 Misor disạmre okako rog bighin ńelte botor caṛhaoatʼpe tahẽkan, onkan rogkoge ape cetanreye paṛao ocoya ar onako khon do bape sahaṛ daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Ona chaḍa Probhu Isor do nonkan rog bighin ar dukreye paṛao ocopea one ona reakʼ katha do ạn-ạri puthire baṅ olakan, ar sesrepe marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Aperen hoṛ do sermaren ipil lekako saṅgelenre hõ aperen Probhu Isorakʼpe bebataoetʼtae iạte thoṛa hoṛge unre jiwetʼpe tahena. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ar okaṭakʼ rạskạte Probhu Isore bhạlại akatʼpe ar aperen hoṛkoakʼ lekhae saṅge ocoakatʼtape ona reakʼ rạskạtege uni doe marao caba utạrpea. Ar okaṭakʼ disạmpe dokhol lạgidokʼkan ona disạm khon rehetʼ sudhạpe totʼ giḍi ocokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Ona tayom Probhu Isor do dhạrti reakʼ mitʼ simạna khon eṭakʼ simạna hạbicʼ sanam jạtrenko talareye chirchạturpea. Onḍe do ape ar aperen hapṛamkoren kaṭ ar dhiriren bin oprom murhutʼkope sewawakoa. 
Deuteronomy28:65 Onko jạtrenko talare suluk do bape ńama, ar jirạukʼ lạgitʼ apnarakʼ jãhãn ṭhạ̃ige baṅ tahentapea. Onḍe Probhu Isor do dhak dhakaokʼkan mon ar loraokʼkan jiwi ar as akan koyokʼ horakatʼ mẽtʼe emapea, ar apeakʼ ontor do be asteye perecʼ ocoytapea." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Apeakʼ jiwi do aka akan baragge tahena ar siń ńindạ botortepe luyutʼ luyudokʼa. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ dope mena, ‘ạyubokʼ ma,’ ar ńindạ jokhecʼ dope mena, ‘setagokʼ ma,’ ente botorte apeakʼ mon do luyutʼ luyudokʼtapea ar mẽtʼ do aema lekanakʼkoe ńel ocopea." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Misorte calakʼ reaṅ iń metatʼpe tahẽkana, tishõ ona horte do taṛam baṅ lagao apea; menkhan Probhu Isor do unre jahajte Misor disạmteye kol ruạṛpea. Onḍe do guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩ lekate bạiriko ṭhen kiriń ocokʼpe khoja menkhan celege bako kirińpea." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Probhu Isor do Horeb burure Mose hotete Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobose doholeda, noako do ona bondobos reakʼ katha kana okaṭakʼ do Moab disạmre Mose Israelko lạgitʼ bondobos bandhao lạgitʼe metade tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mose do sanam Israelko hoho jarwakateye metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do Misor disạmren Pharao raj ar uniren sanam raj-kạmiyạrenko cetanre ar uniyakʼ goṭa disạm cetanre okae cekaletʼ ona do apeakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńel akada." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Onkoakʼ ona maraṅ biḍạu ar Probhu Isore udukʼletʼ cinhạko ar maraṅ maraṅ hahaṛa kạmiko hõpe ńelleda. 
Deuteronomy29:4 Menkhan Probhu Isor ṭhen khon teheń hạbicʼ hõ onako bujhạu reakʼ mon, ńeńel reakʼ mẽtʼ ar ańjom lạgitʼ lutur hõ bape ńamana." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Pongel bochor hạbicʼ Probhu Isorge ape do hahaṅkar talateye idiletʼpea. Onako dinre apeakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼ hõ baṅ lamjakʼlena ar panahe hõ baṅ heṛlentapea. 
Deuteronomy29:6 Unre piṭhạ hõ bape jomleda, darkha rasa se eṭakʼ jãhãn ńuńuteakʼ hõ bape ńamleda. Probhu Isorge ona doe onkaleda jemonpe bujhạu daṛeakʼ, Probhu kangeae aperen Isor do." 
Deuteronomy29:7 “Ar noa ṭhạ̃irepe seṭeren tayom Hisbonren raj Sihon ar Basonren raj Og do abo sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼkin oḍok hecʼlena, menkhan unkin dobon bhagaoketʼkina." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Ar unkinakʼ disạm hatkate sompotti lekate Rubenrenko, Gadrenko ar Manase khũṭren adha hoṛko do ona bon em akatʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ona iạte ape do noa bondobos reakʼ sanam hukumko joton salakʼ dohoype jemon sanamakʼ kạmire bhạlại hoyokʼtape. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Teheń ape do sanamkoge Probhu Isor samaṅre hecʼkatepe teṅgo akana- aperen sordarko ar mukhiyạko, aperen murubbiko ar kạmiyạko ar eṭakʼ sanam Israelko hõ nonḍe menakʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy29:11 Ape samaṅre aperen hopon ar hoponerako; ar apeakʼ ḍerareko tahenkan eṭakʼ jạtren upriạ hoṛko okoe do sahanko mamakʼkan ar dakʼko lo rakapʼ apekan. 
Deuteronomy29:12 Aperen Probhu Isor teheń ape lạgitʼ oka khạṭiteakʼ gokʼakʼ ar bondobose dohoakatʼ ona gokʼakʼ ar bondobos manao lạgitʼge nonḍe hecʼkatepe teṅgo akana. 
Deuteronomy29:13 Probhu Isor do teheń onae dohoakada jemon aperen hapṛam Abraham, Isạhak ar Jakob ṭhen gokʼakʼ ar ape ṭhene kiriạlen lekate aperen Isore hoedaṛeakʼ ar teheń do acʼren hoṛe hoe ocopea." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Ińren Probhu Isor samaṅre hecʼkate teheń okoeko teṅgo akan eken onko lạgitʼ khạṭiteakʼ kiriạ ar bondobos reakʼ iń lại sodoreda ona do baṅa, menkhan okoe do ńitʼhõ ạuriko janamokʼ onko lạgitʼ hõń meneda." 
Deuteronomy29:15  
Deuteronomy29:16 “Apepe baḍaegea, Misor disạmre cetʼ lekape tahẽkana mente ar cetʼ lekate eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmko talate paromkate nonḍe hecʼkatepe seṭer akana." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Unire ape do onko talare kaṭte, dhirite, sonate ar rupạteko benao akatʼko onkoren hirkhạwan murhutʼko ar boṅgakope ńelletʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Teheń ape talare nonkan herel hoṛ se maejiu se jãhãe gusṭirenko aloko tahenma okoe do aperen Probhu Isor bạgikate onko boṅgako sewawako lạgitʼe lilkạrokʼkan. Ar jãhãe nonkanicʼ menae khan uni do ape talare mitʼṭecʼ rehetʼ leka kanae okoe do sesre bis ar nagdanae upcạu ocoy. 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ar noa kiriạ reakʼ kathako ańjom jokhecʼ okoe hoṛ do mone monete bhạganicʼ menteye hudisokʼ ar mone monteye men, apnarakʼ sana leka senlenre hõ nirạiteye tahena, enḍekhan ape sanamko cetanre uni do sorbonase paṛao ocoya." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Probhu Isor do tishõ uni ikạkae do bae rạjikʼa. Ar uniyakʼ raṅgao ar ãṭ do uni hoṛ upạrte dhũạkʼa. Noa puthire oka sarap reakʼ kathako roṛakan ona sanamakʼ do uni cetanre paṛaokʼa. Ar Probhu Isor do dhạrti khon uniyakʼ ńutumme meṭao utạrtaea. 
Deuteronomy29:21 Uni do Israelren sanam gusṭiko tala khon bin bhạlại lạgitʼ unigeye bachaoea, ar noa ạn-ạri puthire olakan bondobosre okako sarapanakʼ katha roṛakan ona lekage unireye paṛao ocoya." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Nonkate noa disạm cetanre oka hạnko hijukʼ ar Probhu Isor okako rog bighin noa disạm cetanreye kol ona reaṅ aperen bõsko ar sạṅgiń disạm khon hijukʼkan bidisiạko hõ noako ńela. 
Deuteronomy29:23 Goṭa disạmge buluṅ ar gondhokte ḍahao reḍha akana. Onare cetʼge baṅ er ar rohoeyokʼa, se onare cetʼge baṅ janamokʼa ar ghãs hõ baṅ omonokʼa. Noa disạm do Sodom, Gomora, Adma ar Seboyim leka hoyokʼa one oka do Probhu Isor raṅgao ar edreteye jalao maraoletʼ." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Ona ńelte eṭakʼ sanam jạtren hoṛko mena, ‘Probhu Isor do cedakʼ noa disạm doe nonka akada? Cedakʼ uniyakʼ noa jaljalao edre do?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 “Ar ona reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ do hoyokʼa, ‘ente noa jạtrenko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ bondobosko bạgi giḍiakada, one oka do Misor disom khon oḍok ạguko tayom onko lạgitʼe bandhaoletʼ." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Onko do eṭakʼ nãwã deb-debikoko sewawatʼkoa arko ḍobokʼatʼkoa, one onko ḍobokʼako reakʼ hukum Probhu Isor doe mana akatʼ." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Onatege Probhu Isorakʼ edre do noa disạm cetanre jol rakabokʼ kana ar noa puthire olakʼ sanamakʼ sarapko do noa disạm cetanreye dul akada. 
Deuteronomy29:28 Uniyakʼ raṅgao ar botoranakʼ jolokʼkan edre iạte onko do disạm khone or totʼ akatʼkoa ar eṭakʼ disạmreye giḍiakatʼkoa, ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onḍege menakʼkoa.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Danaṅakʼ reakʼ jotowakʼko do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ bisoe kana, menkhan sodorakʼ jotowakʼ do jaejug lạgitʼ abo ar abokoren hopon ar hoponerako lạgitʼkana, jemon noa ạn-ạri reakʼ sanamakʼ kathako bon senakʼte ona bon purạu." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Apeko samaṅre oka bhor ar sarapiń sodorketʼ ona sanamakʼge ape cetanre hijukʼa. Ona tayom Probhu Isor okoe jạtrenko talare tinreye chirchạturpea ar onko talarepe girobasokʼa unre ape do noako kathape moneyakʼa. 
Deuteronomy30:2 Ar onako dinre ape ar aperen hopon ar hoponerako tinre Probhu Isor ṭhenpe ruạṛ hijukʼa ar teheń okako hukumiń emapekan onape dohoyte mon ar ontorte uniyakʼ sana lekape taṛama," 
Deuteronomy30:3 unre Probhu Isor do bondi dosa khone chaḍao ruạṛ ạgupea. Uni doe mãyãwapea ar okoe jạtrenko talareye pasnaope onko tala khon arhõe halaṅ samṭao ruạṛpea. 
Deuteronomy30:4 Serma reakʼ ses simạnakorepe giḍi ocokʼre hõ Probhu Isor do onḍe khone halaṅ samṭao ạgupea. 
Deuteronomy30:5 Uni do aperen hapṛamkoakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ ạgupea ar ape do arhõ onape hat ruạṛa. Uni do ạḍiye bhạlạiypea ar aperen hapṛamko khon hõ ḍhere saṅge ocopea. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ar jemon apeakʼ goṭa mon ar ontorte unipe dulạṛete jiwetʼpe tahen ona lạgitʼ ape ar aperen bõsko ontorreye khatna ocopea. 
Deuteronomy30:7 Aperen Probhu Isor do aperen bạiriko cetanre noako sarape ạguiya one okoe do apeko hirkhạ apekan arko santaoetʼpe. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Unre ape do arhõ Probhu Isorakʼpe bataotaea ar uniyakʼ okako hukum teheń iń emapekan onape manaoa. 
Deuteronomy30:9 “Unre aperen Probhu Isor do sanamakʼteye bhạlạiypea. Uni do kạmikoreye bhorapea ar aperen hopon ar hoponerakoe saṅgekoa, mĩhũ-meromkoe bạḍ ocokoa ar jumi reakʼ phosole ḍher ocoytapea. Aperen hapṛamko cetanre uniyakʼ oka rạskạ tahẽkan ape cetanre hõ ona rạskạ iạtegeye bhạlạiypea." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Khạjuk aperen Probhu Isorakʼpe bataotae ar noa ạn-ạri puthire olakan uniyakʼ sanam hukum ar niạmkope manao arpe senakʼte mon ar ontorte uni secʼpe ruạṛ hijukʼ. 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Teheń okań hukum apekan ona manao ar ona leka senokʼ ape lạgitʼ jãhãn keṭecʼakʼ do baṅkana se noa hukum hõ ape khon ḍher sạṅgińakʼ do baṅkana. 
Deuteronomy30:12 Noa hukum do sermare dohokakʼ jinis hõ baṅkana, onatepe men botecʼkea, ‘sermate do okoeye dejokʼte onae ạgua bona ar ańjomkate ona leka bon sen daṛekokʼ?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Noa do jalapuri cetan reakʼ jãhãn jinis hõ baṅkana, onepe menke, ‘jalapuri paromkate do okoe bhala onae ańjom ocolea jemon onale manao ar ona lekale sen daṛekokʼ?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do ape soṅgetege menakʼa; ona do apeakʼ mocare ar ontorre dohokakʼpe ar ona leka colonpe. 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Ńelpe, teheń ape samaṅre okań sodoretʼ ona do Jion se bhạlại ar Gujukʼ se bin bhạlại reakʼ kangea." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Teheń ape ṭhen ińakʼ hukum do noage, aperen Probhu Isorpe dulạṛea, uniyakʼ hortepe calakʼa ar uniyakʼ hukum ar niạmkope manaotaea. Enḍekhan ape do jiwetʼpe tahena ar lekhatepe saṅge idikʼa, ar okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe senokʼkan onḍe aperen Probhu Isor do apeye bhorapea." 
Deuteronomy30:17 “Menkhan apeakʼ ontor uni khon ocogokʼtape ar uniyakʼ bape bataotae ar eṭakʼ debotako ṭhenpe ḍobog arpe sewawako," 
Deuteronomy30:18 enḍekhan teheńiń metapekana, ape do khạṭigepe ḍahao marao utạrokʼa. Ar jordan gaḍa paraomkate okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe senokʼkan onḍe ḍher din jiwetʼ bape tahena." 
Deuteronomy30:19 “Teheń serma ar ot do ape upạrteń goha ocoyetʼkinạ, iń do jion ar moron, bhor ar sarapge ape samaṅreń dohoakada. Jionge bachao joṅpe, jemon ape ar aperen hopon ar hoponerako jiwetʼpe tahen ar aperen Probhu Isorpe dulạṛete uniyakʼ kathape ańjom ar unirepe sapʼ kajak akae tahen, ente noakorege apeakʼ jion do menakʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm emape lạgitʼ aperen hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob ṭhene kiriạlen onḍegepe girobasokʼa.”" 
Deuteronomy30:20  
Deuteronomy31:1 Mose do Israelren sanamkoe metatʼkoa," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Ińakʼ umer do mitʼsae bargel bochor hoyakana. Iń do ar bạń kạmi daṛeakʼkana. Probhu Isor doe men akawạdińạ, iń do jordan gaḍa bạń parom daṛeakʼa." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Aperen Probhu Isor do acʼge gaḍae parom idipea are ạyurpea. Ar ape samaṅ khon onko jạtrenkoe marao cabakoa ar ona disạmpe dokhol joṅa. Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekage Josuạ do gaḍa paromkate ape laha lahateye calakʼa. 
Deuteronomy31:4 Amorikoren Sihon raj ar Og rajakʼ disạm Probhu Isor cetʼlekae jarkharletʼ onkage uni do onko jạtrenkoe maraokoa. 
Deuteronomy31:5 Onko do apeakʼ tireye jimạkoa ar oka cekae reakʼ iń hukumatʼpe onape onkaea. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Daṛeanko hoyokʼpe ar monre dil dohoype. Onko ńelte alope botorokʼa se alope thar tharaokʼa, ente Probhu Isorge ape sãoteye tahena. Uni do tishõ bae bạgiyapea.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Inạ tayom Mose do Josuại hohoadea ar sanam Israelko samaṅre uniye metadea, “Daṛean hoyokʼme ar monre dil joṅme ente amge noko hoṛko sãote ona disạmte calakʼ hoyokʼtama one okaṭakʼ Probhu Isor do nokoren hapṛamko ṭhen emokʼ lạgitʼe gokʼletʼ. Ar amge ona disạm do sompotti lekatem hạṭińakoa." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Probhu Isor do acʼge am laha lahateye senokʼa ar am sãoteye tahena. Uni do tishõ bae bạgi giḍimea. Alom botorokʼa, ar alom torasokʼa.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mose do ạn-ạriko olkate Liwi gusṭiren naekeko, okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ goha sindukko gokʼ bhạriạ idiyetʼ tahẽkan, onko ar Israelren sanam murubbiko onae ematʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Uni doe hukumatʼkoa, “Mimitʼ eaeakʼ bochorre, metakʼme rin khon chaḍaokʼ bochorre chạuni porob jokhecʼ Israelko tinre Probhu Isor samaṅre hạjirokʼ lạgitʼ uniyakʼ bachao akatʼ ṭhạ̃iteko calakʼa unre noa ạn-ạripe paṛhao ańjomakoa." 
Deuteronomy31:11  
Deuteronomy31:12 Herel hoṛ, maejiuko, aperen gidrạko apeakʼ judạ judạ ato ar nagraharen eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko mitʼ ṭhenpe jarwakoa, jemon onako ańjom daṛeakʼte aperen Probhu Isorko botorae ar ạn-ạriko joton salakʼko palon daṛeakʼ." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Nonkate onkoren hopon ar hoponerako, okoe do noa ạn-ạri reakʼ katha bako baḍaekan, onko hõ onako ańjoma ar noa sikhnạtko ńama, jordan gaḍa paromkate okaṭakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼpe calakʼkan onḍe onko do jiwetʼ jonom Probhu Isorko botoraea.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Amakʼ gujukʼ din do sor hecʼakana. Am do Josuạ hohowaeme ar ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen hạjirokʼme. Onḍe uni do kạmi reakʼ bhariń emaea.” Onate Mose ar Josuạ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu ṭhen senkate Probhu Isor samaṅrekin teṅgoyena." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Unre Probhu Isor do rimil reakʼ khunṭi talare ona tạmbureye sodorena ar ona rimil khunṭi do tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen senkate teṅgoyena. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea, “Am do amren hapṛamko ṭhen giticʼ lạgitʼem calakʼkana, menkhan noko hoṛ okaṭakʼ disạmko bolo lạgidokʼkan onḍe onko do ạnạṛi deb debi ṭhenko ạkhrińokʼa arko laṭghaṭa. Onko do ińko bạgiyińạ ar oka bondobosiń doholetʼ ona hõko rạpuda." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ar unre onko upạrte ińakʼ edre jolokʼtińa ariń bạgi giḍiyakoa ar onko khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãń danaṅtińạ; arko marao utạrokʼa. Unre onko cetanre duk-kosṭo ar muhinko hecʼ paṛaokʼa. Ar enhilokʼko mena, ‘aleren Probhu Isor ale sãore bạnuite alere noa muhin do paṛao akana.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Debotako secʼ ạcurkate oka bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi ona iạte iń do khạṭige ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãń danaṅtińạ. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Ńitokʼ ape do noa sereń ol dohokakʼpe. Noa do Israelkope cetʼakoa ar onkope sereń ocokoa, jemon onko upạrte mitʼṭecʼ goha leka hoyokʼ." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Onkoren hapṛamko ṭhen gokʼakʼ ona toa ar dumur rasa ạtukʼkan disạmte tinreń idikoa ar tinre lacʼ bikʼko joma arko tirpitokʼa unre onko do eṭakʼ debota secʼko ạcurokʼte, onkoko ḍobokʼakoa ar ińko nihạ̃tińa ar ińakʼ bondobosko rạpuda." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Onko cetanre tinre ḍher duk-kosṭoko hijukʼa unre niạ sereńge onko upạrte goha lekae teṅgona, ente onkoren bõsko do noa sereń bako hiṛińa. Ente kiriạ akawatʼko gokʼakʼ disạmte idiko laharege iń doń baḍaea onkoakʼ ontore cetʼ menakʼa mente.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Ar Mose do enhilokʼ ona sereń olkate Israelkoe cetʼatʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Probhu Isor do Nunren hopon Josuạ noae hukumadea, “Daṛeanicʼ hoyokʼme ar monre dil dohoyme. Ente oka disạm emokʼ lạgitʼ iń gokʼletʼ ariń kiriạlen onḍe do amgem idikoa. Ar ińge am sãoteń tahena.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Mose do ses hạbicʼ noa ạn-ạri reakʼ sanamakʼ kathako mitʼṭecʼ puthireye ol dohokada. 
Deuteronomy31:25 Ar ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos reakʼ sinduk gogokʼ Liwikoe metatʼkoa," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Ạn-ạri reakʼ noa puthi idikate Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos reakʼ sinduk aṛere dohokakʼpe. Noa do Israelko upạrte goha leka tahena. 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ar cetʼ lekan keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan ar huhulko kanpe ona doń baḍaegea. Ape talare jiwetʼ iń tahenrege Probhu Isor upạrtepe huhulkan khan ińiń gujukʼ tayom do tinạkʼ artetʼpe onkaea! 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ape do ape gusṭiren murubbiko ar sanam kạmiyạko iń samaṅre jarwakope. Iń do noa metakoń khojkana ar serma ar ot hõ onko upạrte goha mente doho hõń khojkana. 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ińiń baḍaea, ińakʼ gujukʼ tayom ape dope kharapokʼa ar oka horte calakʼ reakʼ iń hukumakatʼpe ona khon dope ghańjeṛokʼa. Ar onate darakan dinkore ape cetanre muhinko hecʼ paṛaokʼa, ente Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onagepe kạmiya ar apeakʼ tite benao akatʼko boṅga murhutʼ iạte unipe khĩs ocoyea." 
Deuteronomy31:30 “Ona tayom Mose do noa sereń reakʼ kathako pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ sanam Israelkoe ańjomatʼkoa: 
Deuteronomy32:1 “E serma, ińakʼ kathako luturakʼme; E Ot, ińakʼ moca reakʼ katha ańjomtińme." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ińakʼ cecetʼakʼ do jạṛi dakʼ leka ńurokʼma, ińakʼ katha do sisir dakʼ leka rińjikʼma. Legecʼ ghãs cetanre poroe poroe dakʼ leka, ar aṛakʼ sakamko cetanre achaṛ dakʼko lekage." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ ńutumiń jạhirtaea. Ape do aboren Isorakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ sarhaotaepe. 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Uni kangeae asray buru do, uniyakʼ kạmi do sạbitgetaea; uniyakʼ sanam horko do hok reakʼ kana. Uni do ṭekʼhãḍicʼ Isor kanae, unire jãhãn behokakʼ do bạnukʼanaṅ; uni do sạri are dhoromgea." 
Deuteronomy32:5 “Acʼren hoṛko do unire bạṛicʼko beohar akada. Onkoakʼ dos dạgi iạte uniren hopon ar hoponera doko baṅkana. Onko do bin pạtiạran ar phepṛa hoṛ kanako. 
Deuteronomy32:6 E bebuj, ar bin ạkilan jạtrenko! Probhu Isor do cetʼ nonkagepe halawaea? Uni do cetʼ aperen baba ar sisirjạuicʼ doe baṅkana? Unige coṅ ape mae sirjạu akatʼpe; ar jạtrenko lekate unige ape doe kajak akatʼpea." 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Sedaeakʼ ona dinko reakʼ katha disạipe; aperen ḍher din laharen hapṛamkoakʼ kathako baṛe hudispe. Onako din reakʼ kathako aperen apatko ṭhen kulijoṅpe, onko do apeko lạiyapea; ar haṛam hoṛko kulikope, onko do apeko bujhạuapea." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Maraṅ Isor do tinre eṭakʼ jạtrenko sompottiye hạṭińatʼkoa, ar manwa hoponko tinre eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtreye hạṭińketʼkoa, unre Israel jạtrenkoakʼ lekhae disạ dohṛaketʼte eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ simạnakoe ṭhik dohoatʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Probhu Isorakʼ bakhra do acʼren hoṛkoge; ar Jakob doe Israel jạtena acʼakʼ ạidạri bakhra. 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Uni do hahaṅkar disạmreye ńamkedea, hińjrạukʼkan mitʼ nisun jaegare. Uni doe esetʼ ạcurkedea, are jotonkedea; ar mẽtʼ reakʼ joti lekage uni doe horhokedea." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ acʼakʼ tukại ebhenetʼtae hoponko cetanre phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼe phad phadaoetʼtaea, ar cetʼleka onko cetanre uni do lap lapae uḍạukʼkan, ar cetʼleka onko rakapʼko lạgitʼ acʼakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼe lap lapakakʼkan, ar cetʼleka acʼakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte onkoe gugu idiyetʼko." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Probhu do eskarge uniye ạyur ạguyedea, uni sãote cele debota hõ bako tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Uni do pirthimi reakʼ usul jaegareye decʼ sen ocokedea disạm reakʼ mitʼ buru khon eṭakʼ burute; ar ot baṛge reakʼ phosole jom ocokedea. Uni do dumur rasa hõe cepecʼadea buru khoṅkor khon ńamokʼakʼge, uni do cạṭạni dhiri khon jạitun sunum hõe emadea." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Uni do palrenkoakʼ dahe ar bhiḍi meromko reakʼ toa, ar bhiḍi hoponkoakʼ jele jom ocokedea, Basan disạmren palren merom bodakoakʼ itil do guhum reakʼ mĩhĩ holoṅ tulucʼe jom ocokedea. E Israel, am do darkha reakʼ rasagem ńũ akada." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Menkhan Jisurun doe moṭayena are phandakeda. E Jisurun, am do ḍher jomte ạḍim moṭayena. Ona tayom uni do acʼren sisirjạuicʼ Isore bạgi giḍiadea, ar acʼakʼ asrayokʼ buru hõe nihạ̃t giḍikada." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Ạnạṛi Isor sewawae iạte uni do ạḍiko ãṭ ocokedea, ar hirkhạwakʼkoteko khĩs ocokedea." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Onko do bạṛicʼ jiuko teṅgenatʼkoa. okoe do Isorko baṅkan, onko do nãwã boṅga ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena, okoe do sor din lahareko upelakan, okoe do aperen hapṛamko bako botorakokan tahẽkan." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Ape do ona asray burupe nihạ̃t giḍiakada okoe doe aperen babakan; uni Isor dope hiṛiń akadea okoe do eṅgat leka bedon talate noa dhạrtiteye ạguakatʼpe. 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Ona ńelte Probhu Isor do acʼren hopon ar hoponerako khon acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhãe danaṅketʼtaea, ente onko do edreteko khĩs ocoakadea." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Uni doe menkeda, “Iń do onko khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãń danaṅtińạ, ar sesre cetʼ hoyokʼtako onań ńela; ente onko do peṛta pirthimi ar bin pạtiạran hoponko kanako." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Isore baṅkan nonkanicʼko sewawaekante ar bako botorạńkante onko do ińko ãṭ ocoakadińa; ar onkoren boṅga murhutʼko iạte ińko khĩs ocoakadińa. Okoe do jạtrenko baṅkan onkoakʼ tire soprotkate onkoń jaljalao ocokoa; ar mitʼṭen bebuj jạtrenkoakʼ tire soprotkate onkoń khĩs ocokoa. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ińakʼ edre do seṅgel leka salgao akana; ona seṅgel do khạndri Seol hạbicʼ jolokʼkana. Ona seṅgel do dhạrti ar ona reakʼ sanamakʼ phosolkoe joma ar buruko reakʼ rehetʼko hõe jeretʼakʼa. 
Deuteronomy32:23 “Iń do joto lekan muhinko ạgukate onko upạrteń jarwaea; ar ińakʼ sarko do onko cetanreń teraṅa. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Onko do reṅgecʼteko loraokʼa ar durdurạukʼ ruạ ar bisanakʼ rogteko capoṭokʼa. Onko upạrte iń do kaṭaha janwarko ar dhuṛire leńokʼkan bisan bińkoń kolkoa. 
Deuteronomy32:25 Onkoren hopon ar hoponerako do nagraha bahrere tarwaṛe reakʼ hạnteko gujukʼa, ar oṛakʼ bhitrire botorteko udạsokʼa. Onkoren juạn koṛa ar kuṛiko, kạṭicʼ gidrạko ar haṛam buḍhiko doko marao utạrokʼa." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Iń doń menleda, onko doń kaṭra kuṭrạ cabakoa, manwako tala khon onkoakʼ disạ doń meṭao utạra." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Menkhan iń doń baḍaekan tahẽkana bạiriko do bạḍạiteko perejokʼa ar begor bujhạuteko roṛa baṅma onkoakʼge jitạu do hoyakana; Probhu Isor do noako reakʼ cetʼge bae ceka akada.” 
Deuteronomy32:28 Israel jạtrenko talare bhage solha emokʼ hoṛge bạnukʼkoa, ente onko do jãhãn buj sujge bạnukʼtakoa." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ạklinanko tahẽlen khan honaṅ ona kathako bhujhạukea ses dosa cetʼ hoyokʼtakoa mente. 
Deuteronomy32:30 Mitʼ hoṛ do cekate hajar hoṛkoe lagakoa, ar bar hoṛ ńelte cekate gel hajar hoṛko ńir pharakokʼa, onkoakʼ asray buru bạirikoakʼ tire onko bae ạkhrińleko khan, ar Probhu Isor hõ bạirikoakʼ tire onko bae soprot leko khan?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bạirikoakʼ asray buru do aboakʼ asray buru leka do baṅkana, noa do aboren bạirikoakʼ bicạr phanḍaoakʼ kana." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Probhu Isore meneda, “Onkoakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ do Sodom reakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ khon ar Gomora reakʼ khet khonge omon akana. Onkoakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩre do bis menakʼa, ar darkha thopako do haṛhatʼgetakoa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Onkoakʼ darkha rasa do bińakʼ bis leka, ayaṅ bińakʼ botoranakʼ bis lekage." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Ona do iń ṭhen doho-baege menakʼa, ińakʼ dhon oṛakʼre mohor chapakatʼge." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Behok reakʼ sạjại emokʼ reakʼ ạidạri do ińakʼge; okoeyakʼ oka kuṛại onage uniń emaea. Okte purạulen khan bạirikoakʼ jaṅga do leńjedokʼtakoa; onkoakʼ maraokʼ reakʼ din do sor hecʼakana. Onko lạgitʼ oka ṭhik dohoakan, ona do usạrage onkore paṛaokʼa.”" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Probhu Isor tinreye ńela, acʼren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe do caba akana, guti se sạdhin okoeyakʼ daṛege bạnukʼa, unre uni doe acʼren hoṛko sejokʼa, ar acʼren gutiko cetanreye mãyãkʼa." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Unre uni doe mena, “Okayenako onkoren debotako do? Okayena onkoakʼ ona buru do one okareko asraylen?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Okayenako onko debotako do okoe do onkoren teṅgen janwarkoakʼ itilko jomletʼ, ar onkoakʼ coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ ar darkha rasako ńũletʼ? Ńitokʼ onko do hecʼkateko goṛowape ma, ar asray hõko emape ma." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Ńitokʼ hudisokʼpe ar ńelpe ińkangeạń uni do; iń chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa. Ińge gogocʼicʼ ar ińge jiwetʼicʼ, ińge ghạghạlicʼ, ińge bokʼgeyicʼ; ińakʼ ti khone bańcao daṛeakʼ nonkan celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Iń do serma secʼ ti tiạr kateń meneda, jaejugiń jiwetʼ leka iń meneda," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ińakʼ malkaokʼkan tarwaṛe iń doń lasertińạ, ar bicạr reakʼ ray purạu lạgitʼte ona doń saba, ar ińren bạirikoń sạjạikoa, okoe ińko hirkhạwạń onko do kuṛạiyiń emkatakoa." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Makʼ gocʼ ar bondi akan hoṛkoakʼ mãyãmiń ńũ ocoyte ińakʼ sarkoń bul ocoytińa; ar ińakʼ tarwaṛe do jele joma, bạiriren mukhiyạkoren mathako reakʼge." 
Deuteronomy32:43 E sanam jạtren hoṛko, Probhu Isorren hoṛko sãote uni baṛe sarhaoepe, ente acʼren gutikoakʼ mãyãm reakʼe hala hạliya, uni do acʼren bạirikoe sạjạikoa ar acʼakʼ disạm ar acʼren hoṛkoakʼ kại ikại reakʼe bondobosa." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose ar Nunren hopon Josuạ do senkate noako sereń sanam hoṛkin ańjomatʼkoa. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mose do sanam Israelko noako katha galmaraoakoe mucạtʼketʼ khane metatʼkoa, “Okako katha ape samaṅre goha leka tahen lạgitʼ teheńiń metatʼpe onape disạ dohokakʼa ar ạn-ạriko joton salakʼpe manaote aperen hopon ar hoponerakope hukum daṛeako." 
Deuteronomy32:46  
Deuteronomy32:47 Ape lạgitʼ noa do ạuṛi katha baṅkana, menkhan apeakʼ jion kangea. Jordan gaḍa tinrepe paromokʼa ar ona disạmpe dokhola unre noako kathape dohoya ar ḍher din jiwetʼpe tahena.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do Moseye metadea," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Am do Jerikho samaṅ reakʼ Moab disạm reakʼ Abarim buru reakʼ Nebo muthnite dejokʼme ar sompotti lekate Israelko okaṭakʼ Kanan disạmiń emako lạgidokʼkan ona mitʼ dhao ńelme. 
Deuteronomy32:50 Amren dadam cetʼleka Hor reakʼ burureye gocʼente acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senen onkage amhõ Nebo bururem gujukʼa ar amren hapṛamko ṭhenem senokʼa. 
Deuteronomy32:51 Cedakʼ je, Sin hahaṅkarre Kades reakʼ Meriba-dakʼ ṭhen Israel hoponko talare iń tulucʼ biswạsben rạputʼleda ar Israel hoponko talare baben sonotledińạ." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Onate okaṭakʼ disạm Israelkoń emako lạgidokʼkan ona do eken sạṅgiń khonem ńela menkhan onḍe do bam bolo ńama.” 
Deuteronomy33:1 Isorren hoṛ Mose do acʼakʼ gujukʼ lahare Israelko noa menkateye bhoratʼkoa," 
Deuteronomy33:2 “Probhu Isor do Sinại khone hecʼena, Ar Seyir khon abo cetanre marsale emena; uniyakʼ marsal do Paran buru khon jhakjhakaoena. Uni do lakh lakh sonot serma goḍetko tala khone hecʼena; ar uniyakʼ jojomsa reakʼ tire do durdurạukʼkan seṅgel tahẽkana." 
Deuteronomy33:3 “Sạrige uni do acʼren hoṛkoe dulạṛetʼkoa. Sonot goḍetko do acʼakʼ tire menakʼkoa, sanamkoge uniyakʼ umulreko taṛameda; ar uniyakʼ hukumko senakʼkana." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Abo ṭhen Mose okako ạn-ạrikoe emakan, ona do Jakob bõsrenkoakʼ dhon kana." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Tinre Israelren mukhiyạko, ar onko sãote Israel khũṭren sanamkoko jarwayena. unre Jisurun raj do Probhu Isorgeye tahẽkana.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 Ruben reaṅ Mose doe menkeda, “Ruben do jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma, uniyakʼ gujukʼ do sạṅgińkakʼme; uniren hoṛkoakʼ lekha alo baṛe komaokʼma.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Jihudạ reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, Jihudạwakʼ katha baṛe luturakʼme; ar acʼren hoṛko talare ruạṛ ạguiyeme. Uni do acʼakʼ banar titeye lạṛhại kana; bạiriko upạrte uni sãore baṛe tahenme.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Liwi reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Amakʼ Thumim do Lewi emaeme, ar amakʼ Urim do amren dhoromicʼ, one uni Masa ṭhenem bulạulede, one uni tulucʼ Meriba dakʼ ṭhenem reṭepeṭelen." 
Deuteronomy33:9 One uni acʼ eṅgat apat reakʼe menketʼ, bạń bạsutạkin kana, Ar acʼren boehako bae puchạuletʼko, ar acʼren hoponko bae baḍaeletʼko, uni do amakʼ kathakoe dohoyeda ar amakʼ bondoboskoe manaoeda." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Onko do Jakob amakʼ bicạrko cetʼaea, ar Israel do amakʼ ạnge, onko do am samaṅre dhupko dohoya. Ar amakʼ pinḍre goṭa jeretʼ cabakʼ samaṅokʼakʼkoge." 
Deuteronomy33:11 E Probhu Isor, am do uniyakʼ sompotti baṛe bhorakʼtaeme, ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼ kạmire kusikʼme. Uniren bạirikoakʼ ḍanḍa baṛe rạpudtakome, ar okoe uniko hirkhạwae onkoakʼ ḍanḍa hõ rạpudtakome, jemon aloko teṅgo ruạṛ daṛeakʼ.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjạmin reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “E Probhu Isor okoeyem dulạṛedekan uni do khạtirjoma unireye tahena; ar jao ghuṛi uni doe aḍ dohokaea; uniyakʼ tarenregeye tahena.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Joseph reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Probhu Isor do jemon uniyakʼ disạme bhorakʼtae coṭ serma reakʼ sorosakʼ dante ar latarre jarwa akan athantar dakʼte," 
Deuteronomy33:14 siń cando reakʼ soros soros dante ar cando cando upcạukʼ reakʼ phosolte," 
Deuteronomy33:15 mare buruko reakʼ boge utạrakʼte, jaejug reakʼ ḍuṅgriko reakʼ dhonte," 
Deuteronomy33:16 prithimi reakʼ bhage bhage jiniskote, ar jolokʼkan jhạuạre okoeye tahẽkan uniyakʼ dayate. Josephakʼ bohokʼre noako ạsirbad baṛe pheḍ hijukʼma; boehako modre okoeye mukhiyạkan uniyakʼ bohokʼre noako bhor baṛe paṛaokʼma." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Uniren pạhil janam adar doe ṭhonokana, uniyakʼ bohokʼre kạpil gại reakʼ dereńge menakʼa. Onate uni do prithimiren sanam jạtrenkoe hoṭakʼ pạsirkoa, ar ses simạnare menakʼko jạtrenko hõ. Ephrayimren do lakh lakh ar Manaseren do hajar hajar hoṛko hoyokʼa.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Sebulon reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Sebulon do bahre kạmire kusi akane tahenma, ar Isakar do oṛakʼ bhitri reakʼ kạmikorege." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Unkin do jạt jạtrenko burutekin rakapʼkoa; ar onḍe do lekren dãṛẽkin samaṅkoa. Unkin do jalapuri reakʼ sareṛokʼakʼ kin cepeja, ar gitilre do danaṅakʼ acelkoge.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Bhạgangea uni do, okoe do Gad rajosṭi reakʼ simạnae baṛhaoetʼ. Uni do dhạcri kul lekae tahena ar bạirikoakʼ ti ar coṭ bohokʼ hạbicʼe cirạitakoa." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Uni do acʼ lạgitʼ bhage jumiye bachaojoṅa; mukhiyạwakʼ kuṛại do uni lạgitʼge dohoakana. Lạṛhạire jarwa akan sordarko talare unige Probhu Isorakʼ hukume manao akatʼtaea, uni do Probhu Isorakʼ niạme dohoakada oka do Israel hoponko em ocoakan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Dan doe dhạcri kul hopon kana okoe do Bason khone don hijukʼkan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Napthali reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Napthali do Probhu Isorakʼ mãyãteye perecʼgea; uniyakʼ bhorte uni doe perecʼakana. Gạlil doreão ar ona reakʼ dạkhin disạm am do ạidạri joṅme.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aser reaṅ uni doe menkeda, “Aser do eṭakʼko khon ḍher ạsirbade ńama; ar acʼren boehako ṭhen bạsutạnicʼe hoyokʼma, uni do acʼakʼ jaṅgakin sunumreye caḍoetaema." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Mẽṛhẽtʼ ar pitạl reakʼ hurkạṛte uniyakʼ duạr do tol tahentaea. Ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahen unạkʼ din hoṛmore daṛe tahentaea.” 
Deuteronomy33:26 Uni doe menkeda, “E Jisurun Isor leka do celege bạnukʼkoa. Amren gokʼṛoyicʼ hoyokʼ lạgitʼ uni do rimil reakʼ gạḍite, acʼakʼ mạhimawante rimilteye decʼ hijukʼkana." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Okoe doe jug hilokʼren Isorkan unige amren asarae do; acʼakʼ jaejug reakʼ tite uni do ame sapʼ dohokama. Am samaṅren sanam bạiriko uni doe laga ńirkoa; are mena, ‘noko mohor meṭaokom.’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Onate Israel do khạtirjomae tahena. Jakob reakʼ jharna do eskarge tahena; onḍe do ḍher phosol ar nãwã darkha rasa hoyokʼa, ar onare do serma reakʼ sisir dakʼe jorowakʼa." 
Deuteronomy33:29 E Israel, bhạgangeam am do! Am do Probhu Isorren bańcao akan jạtren kanam, am leka do ar cele jạtrenkoge bạnukʼkoa. Unige amren gokʼṛoyicʼ ḍhal do, ar unige amakʼ gorbokʼ reakʼ tarwaṛe. Bạiriko do am samaṅre botorteko thar tharaokʼa, ar onkoakʼ usul jaega dom lebetʼ gańjaotakoa.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Ona tayom Mose do Moab ṭạnḍi khon Nebo burute, Jerikho mohnḍa muhunḍire menakʼ Pisga reakʼ muthnireye decʼena. Ar Probhu Isor do onḍe khon goṭa disạme udukʼadea. Uni do Gilead khon Dan hạbicʼ goṭa jaega," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Napthali reakʼ sanam jaega, Ephrayim ar Manaseakʼ jaega ar pạchim secʼ jalapuri aṛe hạbicʼ Jihudạ reakʼ sanam jaegae udukʼadea." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Ona chaḍa uni do Negeb disạm ar khijur disạm Jerikho nagraha ar ona sor jordan gaḍa dạkhin secʼ reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍi khon Seyir hạbicʼ sanam jaegae udukʼadea. 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Noage ona disạm do one Abraham, Isạhak ar Jakob ṭhen kiriạkateń menletʼ, ‘Noa disạm do aperen bõskoń emakoa.’ Ar noa disạm do amakʼ mẽtʼteń ńel ocoketʼmea, menkhan gaḍa paromkate onḍe calakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼtama.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Probhu Isor okae menletʼ onkage Probhu Isorren guti Mose do Moab disạmreye gocʼena. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Moab disạm reakʼ Beth-peor ṭhen okaṭakʼ buru tala otet tahẽkan onḍege Probhu Isor do uniye topakadea, menkhan uniyakʼ topa okare menakʼa ona do teheń hạbicʼ okoehõ bako baḍaea." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Gujukʼ jokhecʼ Moseyakʼ umer do mitʼsae bargel bochor tahẽkana. Ar unhõ uni do ńeńel reakʼ daṛe se hoṛmo reakʼ daṛe hõ baṅ komaolentaea. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Ar Israelko do Moab reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire Mose lạgitʼ pegel din hạbicʼko homor halaṅkeda. Ar ona tayom do homor halaṅokʼ reakʼ dinko mucạtʼena. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Nunren hopon Josua cetanre Mose do tiye capoade tahẽkante uni do ạkilte ar Jiuteye perecʼena. Onate Israelko do uniyakʼ katha leka calakʼko ehopʼena ar Probhu Isor Mose hotete okae hukumletʼ ona dokʼhoko ehopʼena. 
Deuteronomy34:10 Teheń hạbicʼ Israelko talare Mose lekan ar cele nạbiyakʼ janam hõ baṅ hoyakana one uni tulucʼ Probhu Isor do gate leka samna sạmniye galmaraoetʼ tahẽkan. 
Deuteronomy34:11 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete Misor disạmre Pharao raj ar uniren kạmiyạko ar uniyakʼ goṭa disạm cetanre okako hahaṛa kạmi ar cinhạkoe kolletʼ onka do celege bako daṛeakawada. 
Deuteronomy34:12 Ar sanam Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre Mose okaṭakʼ maraṅ daṛeye udukʼletʼ se okako botoranakʼ kạmikoe kạmiletʼ onka do celege tishõ bako kạmi daṛeakawada. 
Joshua1:1 Probhu Isorren guti Moseyakʼ gujukʼ tayom Probhu Isor do Moseren gokʼṛoyicʼ Nanren hopon Josuại metadea," 
Joshua1:2 “Ińren guti Mose doe gocʼena. Ona iạte ńitokʼ do amge noko Israelko ona jordan gaḍa paromokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛaokom ar okaṭakʼ disạm onkoń emako lạgidokʼkan onḍe bolokʼme. 
Joshua1:3 Ar okako jaegare apeakʼ jaṅga talka lebedokʼ onako joto do apeń emapea. Mose ṭhen iń do onageń gokʼleda. 
Joshua1:4 Apeakʼ disạm do hahaṅkar khon Lebanon hạbicʼ ar purub reakʼ maraṅ gaḍa Uphreṭis hạbicʼ ar pạchim reakʼ maraṅ jalapuri hạbicʼ metakʼme Hittikoakʼ goṭa ṭoṭha. 
Joshua1:5 Ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼem tahen celege am upạrte do ohoko teṅgo daṛelena. Cetʼleka Mose sãoteń tahẽkan onkage am sãote hõń tahena; iń do tishõ bạń bạgi giḍimea ar bạń alaemea. 
Joshua1:6 “Am do daṛean hoyokʼme, ar monre dil dohoyme, ente okaṭakʼ disạm emokʼ reakʼ katha nokoren hapṛamko ṭheniń gokʼletʼ, ona disạm do ạidạri lekate amge onkom hạṭińakoa." 
Joshua1:7 Daṛean hoyokʼme ar dil dohoyme. Ińren guti Mose okako ạn-ạrikoe em oṭoakatʼ onako moneyakʼme ar dohoyme ona khon thoṛa hõ alom hante natekʼa. Ar onate jãhãregem calakʼ onḍege sarhekʼtama. 
Joshua1:8 Ạn-ạri reakʼ niạ puthire okako ol menakʼ ona do jao okte amakʼ mocare tahenma. Ar ona jemonem pańja daṛeakʼ onate siń-ńindạm khondrondjoṅa. Onate jotowakʼrege sarhekʼtama ar bhạlại hoyokʼtama. 
Joshua1:9 Iń do amiń hukum akatʼmea, onate daṛean hoyokʼme ar monre dil dohojoṅme. Ar alom botorokʼa se alom as chuṭạukʼa, ente jãhãtegem senokʼ onḍege amren Probhu Isor do am sãoteye tahena.”" 
Joshua1:10 Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do hoṛkoren mukhiyạkoe metatʼkoa," 
Joshua1:11 “Ḍerate senkate hoṛko metakope jemon akoakʼ jomakʼ ar ńũiyakʼkote sapṛao akanko tahen. Ente onkoren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm do sompotti lekateye emako lạgidokʼkan onḍe senkate dokhol lạgitʼ pe din bhitrite nonḍe khon jordan gaḍa paromokʼ hoyokʼtakoa.” 
Joshua1:12 Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren sanamko ar Manase adha gusṭiren hoṛko do Josuại metatʼkoa," 
Joshua1:13 “Probhu Isor do apeye jirạu ocoakatʼpea ar noa disạm hõ apeye emakatʼpea.’ 
Joshua1:14 Jordan reakʼ purub secʼ okaṭakʼ jaega Mose apeye emakatʼpe onḍe do aperen bạhuko, gidrạko ar ạsul janwarkoko tahẽ daṛeakʼa, menkhan ape talare okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok sen daṛeakʼ onko do aperen boehako lahate gaḍa paromokʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Joshua1:15 Probhu Isor do tinạkʼ din ape leka aperen boehako jotowakʼ khon bae jirạu ocoko ar tinạkʼ din aperen Probhu Isore emakan disạm ạuriko dokhol unạkʼ din aperen boehakope goṛowakoa. Ar ona tayom dope ruạṛ hijukʼte apeakʼ jaega purạtepe dokholjoṅa one Probhu Isorren guti do jordan purub secʼ apeye emakawatʼpe.” 
Joshua1:16 Onko do Josuạko metadea, “Am okam hukumakatʼle ona dole manaoa ar okarem kolle onḍegele calakʼa." 
Joshua1:17 Cetʼleka ale do Moseyakʼ kathale manao ạguakatʼ, onkage amakʼ hõle manaoa. Amren Probhu Isor do Mose sãote cetʼlekae tahẽkan onkage ape sãote hõ baṛeye tahenma." 
Joshua1:18 Ar jãhãege amakʼ hukum upạrteye teṅgokʼ ar amakʼ katha leka bae calakʼ enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa. Am do eken daṛean hoyokʼme ar dil dohojoṅme.” 
Joshua2:1 Nunren hopon Josuạ do Siṭim khon barea disạm cikʼyạkin niạ katha menkate oko okoteye kolkatʼkinạ, “Aben do ona disạmte senkate Jerikho nagraha mońjteben ciyạ ạguiya.” Ar unkin do inạ katha ańjomkate Jerikho nagrahatekin calaoena. Ar onḍe do Rahab ńutuman mitʼṭen kusumbiyakʼ oṛakʼre senkate kin tahẽyena." 
Joshua2:2 Unre Jerikho nagraharen rajakʼ luturre seṭerena baṅma disạm cikʼyạ lạgitʼ Israelren bar hoṛ do ạyupʼ jokhecʼ nonḍe kin hecʼakana. 
Joshua2:3 Raj do ona katha ańjomkate Rahab ṭhene roṛgotʼkada, “Okoekin hoṛ hecʼkate amakʼ oṛakʼre kin bolo akan unkin oḍok ạgukinme, ente unkin do goṭa disạm ciyạ lạgitʼkin hecʼakana.”" 
Joshua2:4 Menkhan Rahab do unkine oko dohokatʼkinạ. Uni doe menkeda, “Hẽ, unkin hoṛ do iń ṭhenkin hecʼlengea menkhan, oka khonkin hecʼlena ona do bạń baḍaea." 
Joshua2:5 Unkin do ạyupʼ jokhecʼ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr sińkakʼ laharege kin calaoena. Ar okaṭakʼ hortekin oḍok senena ona do bạń baḍaea. Ape do ńitokʼge unkin tayomtepe senlen khan hoedaṛeakʼa unkin pe sapʼ daṛeakina.” 
Joshua2:6 Menkhan Rahab do unkin hoṛ chad cetanreye idiketʼkinte ṭisi reakʼ ḍạṭhicʼteye topa okokatʼkinạ. 
Joshua2:7 Rahabakʼ katha ańjomkate onko hoṛ do disạm cikʼyạkin sapʼkin lạgitʼko oḍokena. Ar jordan gaḍa one oka secʼte taṛam paromokʼ ona horko sapʼkeda. Ar nagraha bahreko oḍok senen sãote phaṭok duạr doko sińkeda. 
Joshua2:8 Ar disạm cikʼyạkin ạurikin jaegakʼrege Rahab do chadte idiketʼkinteye metatʼkinạ, “Ińiń baḍaea Probhu Isor do niạ disạme emakatʼpea. Ar ape reaṅ botor do ale talare paṛaoakana. Ar disạmren hoṛko hõ ape botorte jiwi oṭaṅ akantakoa." 
Joshua2:9  
Joshua2:10 Misor disạm khon oḍok hecʼen tayom Probhu Isor cetʼleka arakʼ doreão reakʼ dakʼ ape samaṅ khone ańjetʼ ocoletʼ ona hõle ańjomakada. Sihon ar Og ńutuman jordan gaḍa purub secʼren Amorikoren barea rajakʼ oka dosape hoyoco akatʼ tạkin ona hõle ańjom akatʼa. 
Joshua2:11 Ar noako ańjomkate aleakʼ joto as do caba akantalea ar ape botorte aleakʼ dilko hõ ses akan talea. Aperen Probhu Isorge sermaren ar dhạrtiren Isor kanae. 
Joshua2:12 Iń do aben cetanreń pạtiạu akana, onate ńitokʼ aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte iń kiriạwạń ben jemon, aleakʼ gharońj cetanre hõ pạtiạran ben tahen. Ar nonkan mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ imạń ben jemoniń bujhạu daṛeakʼ," 
Joshua2:13 ińren go-baba, boeha-misera ar onkoren sanam hoṛkoakʼ jiwi ben rukhiyạite jiwetʼben doholea.”" 
Joshua2:14 Ona katha ańjomkate unkin hoṛ dokin menkeda, “Ạliń do ạlińakʼ katha leka bạliń kạmi enḍekhan ape bodolte ạlińakʼ jiwi calakʼma. Ar ạlińakʼ katha okoe ṭhen hõ bam sodor enḍekhan tinre Probhu Isor do niạ disạm aleye emalea unre ale do ape sãote mońjle beohara ar ape cetanre pạtiạrankole tahena.”" 
Joshua2:15 Ar uni maejiu oka oṛakʼreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan ona do nagraha beṛhaeteakʼ pạcri reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hĩs tahẽkana; onate jalna secʼte babere ticʼketʼte unkine pheḍgotʼkatʼ kinạ. 
Joshua2:16 Ar unkine metatʼkinạ, “Aben sasapʼ okoeko senakan onko jemon aloko sendra ńam ben onate buru secʼte calakʼ ben. Ar onḍe pe din oko akan tahen ben; ar ona tayom onko hoṛko ruạṛ hecʼlen khan abenakʼ horte ruạṛ calakʼ ben.”" 
Joshua2:17 Unkin do maejiu kin metadea, “Tinre niạ disạmtele bolokʼa unre okaṭakʼ jalnatem pheḍetʼliń ona jalnare arakʼ baber tol baṅ tahen ar amren go-baba, boeha-misera ar amakʼ gharońjrenko ạgukate amakʼ oṛakʼre bam dohoko, enḍekhan ạliń okam kiriạ ocoketʼliń ona khon do chaḍao akanliń tahena.”" 
Joshua2:18  
Joshua2:19 Unre jãhãege amakʼ oṛakʼ khon ḍaharteye oḍokokʼ enḍekhan uni do acʼge acʼakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ dạyike hoyokʼa. Ale do uni lạgitʼ dạyi bale tahena. Menkhan okoe am tulucʼ noa oṛakʼreko tahen onko cetanre jãhãege tiye tul enḍekhan uniyakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do alege dạyile tahena. 
Joshua2:20 Ar ạlińakʼ noako katham lại pasnao enḍekhan ạliń okam kiriạ ocoakatʼ liń ona khon do chaḍao liń ńama. 
Joshua2:21 Maejiue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ṭhikgea, aben okaṭakʼ ben menetʼ onkage hoyokʼma.” Ar noa menkateye bidạgotʼkakʼ kinạ ar unkin do ạkinakʼ hortekin ruạṛ calaoena. Ar Rahab do ona arakʼ baber jalnareye tol dohokada." 
Joshua2:22 Unkin Israel hoṛ do ona jaega bạgikate burutekin rakapʼena ar pe din onḍekin oko tahẽyena. Ar sendrako oḍok senlen hoṛ do goṭa hor unkinko sendraketʼkinạ ar bako ńamletʼkinte onko doko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Joshua2:23 Ona tayom unkin Israel hoṛ hõ kin ruạṛena. Unkin do buru khon pheḍkate gaḍakin paromena ar Nunren hopon Josuạ ṭhen senkate okako hoylen ona jotowakʼ kin baḍae ocokedea. 
Joshua2:24 Unkin do Josuạkin metadea, “Noa katha do sạri kana je, Probhu Isor do goṭa disạmge aboakʼ tireye jimạ akada. Abo botorte onḍenko hoṛ do jiwi oṭaṅ akantakoa.”" 
Joshua3:1 Josuạ do ạḍi setakʼreye beretʼente sanam Israelko soṅgekate Siṭim khon uṭhạuente jordan gaḍa ṭhene calaoena. Ar gaḍa ạuriko paromokʼ hạbicʼ onḍegeko tahẽyena. 
Joshua3:2 Pe din tayom mukhiyạko do ḍera reakʼ sanam jaegare senkate hoṛko noako hukumatʼkoa, “Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sinduk Liwi naekeko tinre gokʼ idikanpe ńelkoa unre ape do apeakʼ jaegape bạgi oṭowakʼa ar onkope pańja idikoa." 
Joshua3:3  
Joshua3:4 Ar onatepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa okaṭakʼ horte calakʼ hoyokʼtapea mente, ente noa lahare tisge noa horte do bape senakana. Menkhan ape do goha-sinduk khon bar hajar moka sạṅgińrepe tahena, ona sor do alope calakʼa.”" 
Joshua3:5 Inạ tayom Josuạ do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Apnar baṛe saphakʼpe, ente gapa Probhu Isor do ape talare maraṅ hahaṛawakʼe kạmiya.”" 
Joshua3:6 Ona tayom uni do naekekoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do goha-sinduk gokʼkate hoṛko laha lahate gaḍape paromokʼa. ” Onate onko do goha-sinduk gokʼkate hoṛko laha lahateko calao idiyena." 
Joshua3:7 Unre Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Teheń khon sanam Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼre amakʼ manotiń ḍher ocoya, jemonko bujhạu daṛeakʼ, iń cetʼleka Mose sãoteń tahẽkan onkage am sãore hõ minạńa mente." 
Joshua3:8 Am do goha-sinduk gokʼ idiyetʼkan naekekom metakoa jordan gaḍa ḍhipre seṭer tayom jemon laha ńokʼ senkate dakʼre teṅgo akaeko tahen.” 
Joshua3:9 Josuạ do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do nonḍe hijukʼpe ar aperen Probhu Isor okae menakatʼ ona ańjompe." 
Joshua3:10 Aperen jiwetʼ Probhu Isor do ape sãore menae ar uni do Kananrenko, Hittirenko, Hiwiko, Pherisiko, Gergasiko, Amorirenko ar Jebusiko khạṭige ape samaṅ khone laga ńirkoa ar ona do nonkatepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Joshua3:11 One okoe doe goṭa dhạrtiren Probhu Isorkan uniyakʼ goha-sinduk do ape lahate tala jordan gaḍate bolokʼa. 
Joshua3:12 Ar ńitokʼ ape do Israelren gelbar gusṭiko khon mimitʼ hoṛkate gelbar goṭen hoṛ bachao joṅpe. 
Joshua3:13 Ar tinre goṭa prithimiren Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sinduk gokʼ idikan naekeko jordan gaḍa reakʼ dakʼreko bolokʼa ar unre ạtukʼkan dakʼ do thir hapekʼa ar ona reakʼ dakʼ do ḍhip leka teṅgo tahena.” 
Joshua3:14 Hoṛko do jordan gaḍa paromokʼ lạgitʼ tinre ḍerako uṭhạuketʼtakoa unre goha-sinduk gokʼ idikan naekeko do onko laha lahateko mohnḍayena. 
Joshua3:15 Phosol samṭao reakʼ purạ okte jordan gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ do ḍhip khon se oḍokʼkan tahẽkana. Menkhan goha-sinduk gogokʼ naekeko do jordan gaḍa ṭhen seṭerkate dakʼreko boloyen khan cetan khon ạtu hijukʼkan dakʼ do thir hapeyena. Ona dakʼ do sạṅgiń reakʼ Sartham nagraha sor Adam ato ṭhen dun dun teṅgoyena; onate dakʼ do Araba doreão secʼ, metakʼme buluṅ doreão secʼ ạtu calakʼ do thirena. Onate Israelko do Jerikho nagraha reakʼ samaṅ secʼte gaḍako paromena." 
Joshua3:16  
Joshua3:17 Ar tin hạbicʼ sanam Israelko jordan gaḍa ạuriko parom cabakʼ un hạbicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sinduk gokʼ idiyetʼkan naekeko do jordan gaḍare kuṭhạ̃ṛ otreko teṅgo tahẽyena; ar sanam hoṛ do kuṭhạ̃ṛgekoge parom calaoena. 
Joshua4:1 Ar nonkate Israelkoren goṭa jạtrenko jordan gaḍako paromen khan Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea," 
Joshua4:2 “Am do mimitʼ gusṭiko khon mimitʼ hoṛkate jotote gelbar hoṛ bachao joṅme. 
Joshua4:3 Onkom metakoa, tala gaḍa reakʼ oka jaegare naekekoko teṅgo akan ona jaega khon jemon gelbar goṭecʼ dhiriko halaṅ ạgui ar ape sãoteko senokʼ ar teheń ńindạ oka ṭhạ̃irepe tahena onḍege ona hõko idiyma.”" 
Joshua4:4 Josuạ do Israelren mimitʼ gusṭiko khon mimitʼ hoṛkate okoe gelbar hoṛe bachaoletʼko onko hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Jordan gaḍate bolokate aperen Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sinduk ṭhen senokʼpe ar Israelkoren gelbar gusṭiko lạgitʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼkate gelbar goṭecʼ dhiri gokʼ ạguiype." 
Joshua4:5  
Joshua4:6 Noako dhiri do ape talare mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ leka tahena. Ar tayom daram din aperen hopon ar hoponerako ona dhiri reakʼ maneko kulilepere onkope lại daṛeakoa, Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sinduk tinre jordan gaḍa talate gokʼ paromokʼkan tahẽkana unre ona gaḍa reakʼ ạtukʼ do teṅgo thirlena. Noako dhiri do Israelko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ leka tahena jemon jaejug hạbicʼ ona katha doe disạ ocoko.”" 
Joshua4:7  
Joshua4:8 Israelko do Josuạwakʼ hukum lekageko kạmikeda. Probhu Isor do Josuại metade tahẽkan lekage Israelko do akoren gelbar gusṭiko lạgitʼ jordan gaḍa tala khon gelbar goṭecʼ dhiriko halaṅ ạgukeda. Ar ona tayom do onako idiketʼte okare ńindạko tahẽyen onḍegeko dohokeda. 
Joshua4:9 Jordan gaḍa reakʼ oka ṭhạ̃ire goha-sinduk gogokʼ naekeko teṅgo akan tahẽkan onḍe Josuạ do arhõ gelbar goṭecʼ dhiriye dohokeda. Ona dhiriko do teheń hạbicʼ onḍege menakʼa. 
Joshua4:10 Gaḍa paromokʼ babotre Mose do Josuại hukumade tahẽkana. Onate hoṛko lạiyako lạgitʼ Josuại em akawade Isorakʼ hukum leka hoṛko jotowakʼ ạuriko cekae hạbicʼ goha-sinduk gogokʼ naekeko do gaḍareko teṅgo tahẽkana ar hoṛko do usạra gaḍako paromena. 
Joshua4:11 Ar sanamkoko paromen khan naekeko do Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sindukante hoṛko samaṅteko rakapʼ hecʼena. 
Joshua4:12 Mose okae hukum oṭoletʼ tahẽkan onkage Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren sanamko ar Manasi gusṭiren adha hoṛko do lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoente Israelko lahate gaḍako paromkeda. 
Joshua4:13 Lạṛhại lạgitʼ pongel hajar hoṛ do khanḍa bhanḍawante Probhu Isor samaṅre lạṛhại lạgitʼ gaḍa paromkate Jerikho reakʼ ṭạnḍireko senena. 
Joshua4:14 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do sanam Israelko samaṅre Josuại maraṅ ocokedea. Ona iạte hoṛko do Mose leka Josuạ hõ jonom bhorko manaokedea. 
Joshua4:15 Probhu do Josuại metadea," 
Joshua4:16 “Goha-sinduk gogokʼ naekeko jordan gaḍa khon rakapʼ hijukʼ metakom.” 
Joshua4:17 Ona iạte Josuạ do naekeko jordan gaḍa khon rakapʼ hijukʼe hukumatʼkoa. 
Joshua4:18 Ar onate Probhu Isorakʼ goha-sindukko gokʼ idiyetʼkan tahẽkan naekeko do tala gaḍa khon ghuṭuteko rakapʼ hecʼen sãote gaḍa dakʼ do arhõ ạtukʼ ehopʼena ar lahate leka dakʼ do banar sa se rakapʼena. 
Joshua4:19 Bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre hoṛko do jordan gaḍa khonko rakapʼ hecʼente Jerikho purub simạ reakʼ Gilgolre senkateko ḍerayena," 
Joshua4:20 ar Josuạ do jordan gaḍa khon halaṅ ạgu akatʼ gelbar goṭecʼ dhiri do nonḍegeye dohokeda. 
Joshua4:21 Ona tayom uni do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Tayom daram din aperen bõsko tinre dhiri reakʼ mane onkoren apatkoko kulikoa," 
Joshua4:22 unrepe lạiyakoa, ‘Israelko do kuṭhạ̃ṛ otte taṛamate noa jordan gaḍako parom hecʼakana.’" 
Joshua4:23 Ar arakʼ jalapuri ạurile parom hijukʼ hạbicʼ aperen Probhu Isor do cetʼleka doreãoe ańjetʼ ocoletʼ onkage jordan gaḍa hõe ańjetʼ ocokeda. Ar gaḍa ạuripe parom hijukʼ hạbicʼ aperen Probhu Isor do ale samaṅre jordan gaḍae ańjetʼ ocoletʼ tahẽkana. 
Joshua4:24 Uni do noae kạmikeda jemon dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼ, Probhu Isorakʼ ti do daṛeangea ar jao ghuṛi jemon aperen Probhu Isorpe botorae.”" 
Joshua5:1 Jordan gaḍa pạchim secʼren Amorikoren sanam rajko ar doreão aṛe reakʼ sanam Kanani rajko tinreko ańjomkeda, abo bon parom hijukʼre Probhu Isor cetʼleka jordan gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ, metakʼme Israelko samaṅ khone ańjetʼ ocoletʼ un khon onkoakʼ as do chuṭạuentakoa; Israelko samaṅre teṅgokʼ reakʼ dil ar do baṅ hoylentakoa." 
Joshua5:2 Un jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Am do cokmuki dhiri reakʼ churi benaome ar onate Israelkom khatna ocokoa.”" 
Joshua5:3 Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do cokmuki dhiri reakʼ churikoe benao ocokeda ar Gibeat Haralothre (metakʼme “Khatna buru”) Israelkoe khatna ocoketʼkoa. 
Joshua5:4 Oka lạgitʼ uni noae kạmiketʼ ona do niạ lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍokʼ calakʼ leka okoeko herel hoṛ do Misor disạm khonko oḍokʼ hecʼlen onko do Misor bạgiyakʼ tayom hahaṅkarregeko gocʼena. 
Joshua5:5 Ar sanamkogeko khatna ocolen tahẽkana; menkhan Misor khon oḍok hecʼen tayom horre ar hahaṅkarre okoekoakʼ janam hoylen onko do okoehõ bako khatna ocoakan tahẽkana. 
Joshua5:6 Misor khon oḍok hecʼen tayom okoe do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼ leka umer hoyakan tahẽkan onko sanam ạuriko gujukʼ hạbicʼ Israelko do pongel bochor hahaṅkarre ạcur baṛae hoylentakoa, ente onko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka bako senlena. Ar Probhu Isor kiriạkate onkoren hapṛamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ disạm emako lạgitʼe gokʼletʼ ona toa ar dumur rasa ạtukʼkan disạm do bako ńel ńama." 
Joshua5:7 Onate uni do onko bodolte onkoren hoponkoe teṅgoketʼkoa ar Josuạ do onkoe khatna ocoketʼkoa. Ar dãṛãn horre bako khatna ocoakan tahẽkante un hạbicʼ hõ bin khatnako tahẽkana. 
Joshua5:8 Sanam hoṛkogeko khatna ocoyena ar onko ạuriko bogekʼ hạbicʼ ona jaega reakʼ ḍeraregeko tahẽyena. 
Joshua5:9 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Misorre oka henostarepe tahẽkan teheń ona do ape khoniń sạṅgińkeda.” Ar onate teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona jaega do Gilgolko metakʼkana." 
Joshua5:10 Israelko do ona cando reakʼ gelponakʼ din reakʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Jerikho ṭạnḍi reakʼ Gilgolre bańcaokʼ porobko porobena. 
Joshua5:11 Ar ona dosar hilokʼge ona disạm reakʼ phosol khon benaoakʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ ar isinakʼ anajko jomkeda. 
Joshua5:12 Onko do oka hilokʼ ona disạm reakʼ jomakʼko jomketʼ ona dosar hilokʼ khonge Manna ńurokʼ do thirena. Ar inạ tayom Israelko do Manna ar bako ńamleda. Ona bochor khon onko do Kanan disạm reakʼ phosol jojomko ehopʼena. 
Joshua5:13 Jerikho sorko seṭeren khan Josuạ do bocʼ tarwaṛe tire menakʼtae mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ acʼ samaṅre teṅgo akane ńelkedea. Unre Josuạ do uni ṭhen sorenteye kulikedea, “Am do okoe secʼren kanam aleren, se bạiriko secʼren?”" 
Joshua5:14 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Okoe secʼren hoṛ hõń baṅkana. Iń do Probhu Isoren palṭon dolren senapoti kạnạń; ar ńitokʼ do nonḍeń hecʼakana.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do otreye ombakʼente uniye ḍobokʼ adea are kulikedea, “Ińren Probhu Isor do cetʼ acʼren guti jãhãnakʼ metae lạgitʼe menjoṅkana?”" 
Joshua5:15 Probhu Isorren palṭon dolren senapotiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amakʼ jaṅga reakʼ kharpa bojtam, ente am oka ṭhạ̃irem teṅgo akan ona do sonotgea.” Ar Josuạ do kharpae bocʼketʼtaea." 
Joshua6:1 Ona jokhecʼ Israelko lạgitʼ Jerikho nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr do kajakte siń esetʼ akan tahẽkana. Onḍe khon do okoe hõ bako oḍok hecʼ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana ar bolo hõ bako bolo daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Joshua6:2 Unre Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Ńelme, iń do Jerikho nagraha, ar onaren raj ar onaren sanam bir lạṛhạiko amakʼ tireń jimạ akatʼkoa." 
Joshua6:3 Ape do sanam palṭonkowante nagraha beṛhaete mitʼ dhao ạcurokʼpe; ar turui din hạbicʼ onkaepe. 
Joshua6:4 Ar eae naekeko do bheḍa dereń reakʼ eae goṭecʼ sakwa do bondobos-sinduk laha lahate idikʼa. Ar eaeakʼ dinre ape do nagraha beṛhaete eae dhaope ạcurokʼa ar ona sãote naekeko do sakwako oroṅa. 
Joshua6:5 Ar tinre naekeko do mitʼ dhãote sakwako oroṅa unre sanam hoṛko ãṭ aṛaṅtepe hohoya. Onate nagraha reakʼ pạcri bhit do lạnduṛ ńurokʼa ar Israelko do onateko decʼ bolokʼa.” 
Joshua6:6 Unre Nunren hopon Josuạ do naekeko hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ape do goha-sinduk gogpe ar eae naekeko do eae goṭecʼ sakwa sapʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk laha lahateko calakʼma.”" 
Joshua6:7 Ona tayom hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Ape do laha idikʼpe ar nagraha beṛhaete ạcurokʼpe. Ar palṭonko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk laha lahateko calakʼma.”" 
Joshua6:8 Josuạ do hoṛko galmaraoakoe sạtketʼ khan Probhu Isor samaṅre eae naekeko do eae goṭen bheḍa dereń reakʼ sakwa oroṅ oroṅteko mohnḍayena ar onko tayomte do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos-sinduk. 
Joshua6:9 Ar okoe naekeko sakwako oroṅetʼ tahẽkan onko laha lahate do khanḍa bhanḍako sapʼakatʼ palṭonko ar sinduk tayom tayomte do rurukhiyạkoge. Ar naekeko do goṭa hor sakwa oroṅtegeko tahẽyena. 
Joshua6:10 Josuạ do laharege hoṛko noae hukumatʼko tahẽkana, “Ape do ãṭ aṛaṅte alope hohoya se aṛaṅate alope roṛa se mocate jãhãn saḍe hõ alope oḍoka. Menkhan oka hilokʼ ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoń metape eken enhilokʼge ãṭ aṛaṅtepe hohoya.”" 
Joshua6:11 Nonkate Josuạwakʼ hukumte Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do nagraha beṛhaete mitʼ dhaoko ạcur ạgukeda. Ar ona tayom do akoakʼ ḍerateko ruạṛ calaoena ar ńindạ do ḍerareko aṅgayena. 
Joshua6:12 Dosar hilokʼ Josuạ do ạḍi setakʼre jạpitʼ khone beretʼena ar naekeko do Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko gokʼkeda. 
Joshua6:13 Ar eae naekeko do eae goṭen bheḍa dereń reakʼ sakwa oroṅ oroṅte Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk laha lahateko senena. Ar khanḍa banḍawante palṭonko do onko laha lahate ar Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk tayomre do rurukhiyạ dolko; ar purạ okte sakwa reakʼ saḍe do ańjomena. 
Joshua6:14 Nonkage dosar hilokʼ hõ onko do nagraha beṛhate mitʼ dhaoko ạcurena ar ḍerateko ruạr calaoena. Onko do turui din onkageko kạmikeda. 
Joshua6:15 Eaeakʼ dinre onko do ạḍi setakʼreko beretʼena ar eae dhao nagraha beṛhaeteko ạcurena. Eken enhilokʼge onko do eae dhao nagraha beṛhaeteko ạcurena. 
Joshua6:16 Ar eae dhao ạcurokʼ jokhecʼ tinre naekeko do sakwa mitʼ dhaoteko oroṅkeda unre Josuạ do hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoepe, ente Probhu Isor do nagrahae jimạ akatʼbona." 
Joshua6:17 Nagraha ar ona bhitri reakʼ sanamakʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte sarapakʼ ar nosṭokʼ lạgitʼ hoyokʼa. Eken Rahab kusumbi ar uni oṛakʼren okoeko menakʼko onko moto jiwetʼko tahena, ente abonren disạm cikʼyạkin hoṛe oko doholetʼkinạ." 
Joshua6:18 Menkhan okako jinis do sarapanakʼ tabere menakʼ ona khon pharakre tahenpe jemon ona khon jãhãnakʼ apnar lạgitʼpe ạgujoṅte ape cetanre bạṛicʼakʼpe ạgujoṅ. Arpe onka lekhan Israelkoakʼ ḍera cetanre bạṛicʼakʼpe ạguiya ar muhinrepe paṛao ocokoa. 
Joshua6:19 Sanam sona, rupạ ar pitạl ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jinisko Probhu Isor ńutumte begar akana; ar ona iạte onako do uniyakʼ khajańci kandhare calakʼa.”" 
Joshua6:20 Sakwa saḍe são sãote hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko hohokeda. Ar sakwa saḍe iạte tinre hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko hohokeda unre Jerikho nagraha reakʼ pạcri do lạnduṛ ńurena. Onate sanam hoṛ do nagraha bhitriteko boloyena arko dokholkeda. 
Joshua6:21 Onko do khanḍa banḍawante herel ar maejiuko, gidrạ ar haṛam buḍhiko, ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko, gadhako ar eṭakʼ sanam jiwiyankoko marao cabaketʼkoa." 
Joshua6:22 Ar okoe disạm cikʼyạkin do disạm ńel ạgui lạgitʼkin hecʼlen Josuạ do unkine metatʼkinạ, “Uni kusumbi ṭhen oka ben kiriạlen ona leka uniyakʼ oṛakʼte senkate uni ar uniren sanam hoṛko oḍok ạguko ben.”" 
Joshua6:23 Niạ katha ańjomkate unkin disạm cikʼyạkin juạn hoṛ do Rahabakʼ oṛakʼte bolokate uni ar uniren go-baba, boehako ar oṛakʼren hoṛkokin oḍok ạguketʼkoa. Onko do Rahabakʼ gharońjren sanamkoko oḍok ạguketʼkote Israelkoakʼ ḍera bahrereko tahẽ ocoatʼkoa." 
Joshua6:24 Ona tayom onko do goṭa nagraha ar ona bhitri reakʼ jotowakʼko jeretʼ giḍikada, menkhan sona, rupạ, tama ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jinisko do Probhu Isorakʼ khajańci oṛakʼreko jarwakeda." 
Joshua6:25 Ar Josuạ do okoe kin hoṛ disạm cikʼyạ lạgitʼ Jerikhoteye kolletʼkin ar Rahab kusumbi unkine oko doholetʼ kinte Josuạ do uni, ar uniren apattetʼakʼ gharońjren ar oṛakʼren eṭakʼkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa. Ar rahab do Israelko talare teheń hạbicʼe girobasokʼ kana." 
Joshua6:26 “Inạ tayom Josuạ do kiriạyenteye menkeda, “Jerikho nagraha okoe hoṛ arhõe benao rakab unire do Probhu Isorakʼ sarap paṛaokʼa: Pạhilicʼ hoponakʼ jiwite uni do ona reakʼ rehetʼe rakaba, ar huḍińicʼ hoponakʼ jiwite ona reakʼ phaṭok duạrkoe gathaoa.”" 
Joshua6:27 Probhu Isor do Josuạ sãoteye tahẽyena, ar uniyakʼ ńutum do goṭa disạmre pasnao idiyena." 
Joshua7:1 Jerikho nagraha maraokʼ reakʼ sarapanakʼ jinisko babotre Israelko do pạtiạrangeko tahẽkana. Menkhan Jihudạ gusṭiren Kạrmi hopon Akhan do onako jinis khon thoṛa do acʼ lạgitʼe dohokeda. Uni do Sabdaeren hopon Serahren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. Uni do noa kạmi iạte Israelko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ pite caṛhao ocoketʼtaea. 
Joshua7:2 Josuạ do Jerikho nagraha khon Ae nagrahate hoṛe kolketʼko. Ona nagraha do Bethel nagraha purub Beth-awer nagraha sorre tahẽkana. Hoṛko kolko jokhecʼ uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Senkate disạm do mońjte ńel ạguiype.” Ar onate hoṛko do Ae nagrahate senkate hape hapete khoborko ạgukeda." 
Joshua7:3 Ona tayom onko do Josuạ ṭhen ruạṛ hecʼenteko menkeda, “Ae nagraha upạrte sanam hoṛ calakʼ reakʼ jạruṛ do bạnukʼa. Ona dokhol lạgitʼ do bar se pe hajar hoṛ kolkom. Noa iạte sanam hoṛ do alom haron ocokoa, ente onḍenko hoṛkoakʼ lekha do thoṛagea.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ona iạte pe hajar gan hoṛ onḍeko senena; menkhan onko do Ae nagraharen hoṛko ṭhenko bhagao ocoyenteko dạṛ pạnḍucʼkeda. 
Joshua7:5 Nagraha reakʼ phaṭok khon Ae nagraharen hoṛko do Israelkoko khudạu idiketʼkote Sabarim reakʼ tapol jaegare onkoren pegel turui hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Onate Israelkoakʼ mon reakʼ jor do rạputʼentakoa. 
Joshua7:6 Unre Josuạ ar Israelkoren murubbiko do apnarakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼte Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk samaṅre ạyupʼ hạbicʼ otre ombakʼ hape akanko tahẽyena. Ar akoakʼ bohokʼre dhuṛiko chiṭiạuana. 
Joshua7:7 Josuại menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, noko jạtrenko jordan gaḍa paromkate cedakʼ maraoko lạgitʼ Amorikoakʼ tirem jimạketʼkoa? Hae ale do jordan hanasa regele bhagele tahẽkana!" 
Joshua7:8 E Probhu Isor, bạiriko ṭhen Israelkoko bhagao ocoyen tayom do ar mementeakʼ cetʼ menakʼtińạ?" 
Joshua7:9 Kananiko ar niạ disạmren eṭakʼ hoṛko niạ katha ańjomkate aleko gherao esetʼlea ar dhạrti khon aleakʼ ńutumko meṭao utạrtalea. Ar inạ tayom do cekate amakʼ ńutumem rukhiyại tama?” 
Joshua7:10 Unre Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Ma beretʼme. Cedakʼem ombakʼ hape akana?" 
Joshua7:11 Israelko doko kại akada; iń okaṭakʼ bondobos manao lạgitʼ iń metatʼko tahẽkan ona do bako pańja akada. Ar okako jinis do sarapakʼ tabe reakʼ kan ona reakʼ thoṛako hatao akada; arko kombṛo akada, eṛe kathako roṛakada ar akoakʼ jinisko sãote onako dohoakada." 
Joshua7:12 Ona iạte Israelko do akoren bạiriko samaṅre bako teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼ kana; arko dạṛeda, ente onko do ḍahao maraokʼ reakʼ sarapakʼ taberen hoṛko hoyakana. Ḍahao maraokʼ sarapakʼ tabe reakʼ jinisko ape ṭhen menakʼa. Onako ạuripe ocokʼ cabae hạbicʼ ape sãore iń do bạń tahena." 
Joshua7:13 “Am do senkate iń ńutumte hoṛko begarkom. Arem metakoa onko jemon gapa lạgitʼ apnartetʼ sapha akanko tahen ma. Israelkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘E Israel, ape modren nonkanakʼ jinis menakʼa one okaṭakʼ do ḍahao maraokʼ sarapanakʼ tabe reakʼ kan. Onako ape tala khon ạuripe oḍok giḍikakʼ hạbicʼ aperen bạiriko samaṅre bape teṅgo daṛeakʼa." 
Joshua7:14 Onate, setakʼ bela apeakʼ gusṭirenko lekate iń samaṅre hecʼkatepe teṅgokʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ gusṭirenko ińakʼ tireko sapʼ ńamokʼ ona gusṭiren do bõsrenko lekateko laha hijukʼa; ona modre okaṭakʼ bõsrenko ińakʼ tireko sapʼ ńamokʼ ona bõsren hoṛko do gharońj lekateko laha hijukʼa; ona modre oka gharońjren do ińakʼ tireko sapʼ ńamokʼa ona gharońjren hoṛko do mimitʼ hoṛkateko laha hijukʼa." 
Joshua7:15 Ar okaṭakʼ do ḍahao marao sarapakʼ tabe reakʼkan ona okoe hoṛ ṭhen ńamokʼ uni hoṛ ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼ do seṅgelre atar giḍikakʼ hoyokʼa. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobose bemanot akada ar nonkan mitʼṭecʼe kạmi akada one okaṭakʼ do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ lajao paṛaoakʼkan.” 
Joshua7:16 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre Josuạ do gusṭi lekate Israelko Probhu Isor samaṅreye ạguketʼkoa, ar onate Jihudi gusṭirenkoko sapʼ ńamena." 
Joshua7:17 Ona tayom Jihudạ gusṭiren bõskoko lahayen khan Serah bõsrenko sapʼena. Ona tayom Serah bõsren murubbiko do mimitʼ hoṛkateko laha hecʼena khan Sabdiye sapʼena. 
Joshua7:18 Tayomte Sabdi gharońjren hoṛko mimitʼ hoṛkate samaṅ secʼko hecʼen khan Jihudạ gusṭiren Karmiren hopon Akhane sapʼena. Karmi do Sabdiren hopon Serahren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. 
Joshua7:19 Josuạ do unre Akhane metadea, “E bạbu, sạri katha menkate Israelkoren Isor sarhao ar ṭhonokʼ emaeme; ar am okam ceka akatʼ ona lạiyạńme, alom okoea.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akhane roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Noa katha do sạri kana, Israelkoren Probhu Isor upạrteń kại akada. Ar okań kạmi akatʼ ona do noa kana," 
Joshua7:21 iń do luṭ reakʼ jinisko khon Sinạr disạm reakʼ mońjakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kicricʼ, bar keji tala rupạ ar turui sae gram ojon reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ sona ḍhimbạ reakʼ laloc bạń sambṛao daṛeakʼte onań ạgu akada. Onako do ińakʼ tạmbure ot latarreń topa oko akada ar ona latarre do rupạ menakʼa.”" 
Joshua7:22 Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do hoṛe kolkatʼkoa. Onko do ńir senkate ona tạmbure bolokateko ńelkeda onḍe thoṛa jinis do topa oko menakʼa, ar onako reakʼ latar utạrre do rupạ menakʼa." 
Joshua7:23 Onko do tạmbu khon onako oḍok ạguketʼte Josuạ ar Israelko samaṅre ạgukate Probhu Isor samaṅreko dohokada. 
Joshua7:24 Josuạ ar sanam Israelko Serah bõsren Akhan do Akor lodamteko idikedea. Ar uni sãote ona kicricʼ, rupạ, sona ḍhimbạ, Akonren gidrạko, uniren ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko, gadhako ar uniyakʼ tạmbure cetʼ cetʼko tahẽkan ona jotoko iditorakeda." 
Joshua7:25 Ona tayom Josuại menkeda, “Abo cetanre cedakʼ muhin dom ạgukeda? Teheń Probhu Isor do amre hõ muhine paṛao ocoya.” Unre sanam Israelko do pạhilre Akhan ar ona tayom do uni gharońjren sanamko dhiriteko tiń gocʼketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom do jotowakʼko jeretʼ giḍikada." 
Joshua7:26 Akhanakʼ hoṛmo cetanre onko do ạḍi utạr dhiriko puńjikeda. Ona do teheń hạbicʼ hõ menakʼgea. Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ edre khone ạcurena. Ar onate ona jaega do Akor lodamko metakʼkana. 
Joshua8:1 Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Alom botorokʼa ar alom hadosokʼa. Amren sanam lạṛhại phạdante am do Ae nagraha cetanre arhõ jhãp emme. Iń do Ae nagraharen raj, uniyakʼ nagraha ar disạm hõ amakʼ tireń jimạ akada." 
Joshua8:2 Jerikho nagraha ar onaren raj cetanre okam cekaletʼ Ae nagraha ar onaren raj cetanre hõ onkagem cekaea. Menkhan onḍenakʼ luṭ ạguakʼ jinisko ar janwarko ape apnar lạgitʼpe hatao daṛeakoa. Ar am do nagraha tayom secʼre mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdkom oko dohokoa.” 
Joshua8:3 Unre Josuạ do Ae nagraha akromon lạgitʼ gelpe hajar lạṛhại birkoe bachaoanteye oḍok calaoena. Ar ńindạ jokhecʼ onko do noae hukumatʼkoa, “Ańjompe, ape mod khon thoṛa lạṛhại phạd do nagraha tayom secʼrepe oko dohokakoa. Ar nagraha khon ḍher sạṅgiń do alope calakʼa. Sanamkoge sapṛao akaepe tahena." 
Joshua8:4  
Joshua8:5 Iń do ińren sãoten hoṛkoante nagraha secʼ iń laha idikʼa. Ar lahate leka onko do tinre abo sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hijukʼa unre ale do onko samaṅ khonle dạṛ pharakokʼa. 
Joshua8:6 Ar onko do aleko laga idilea, arko mena, ‘lahate leka abo samaṅ khonko ńir pharakokʼkana.’ Nonkate ale do nagraha khon sạṅgińtele idikoa. Ar tinre onko khonle ńir pharakokʼa," 
Joshua8:7 unre ape do ona oko akan jaega khon oḍok hecʼkate nagrahape dokhola. Aperen Probhu Isorge ona do ape tireye jimạya. 
Joshua8:8 Ape do nagraha dokholkate seṅgelpe jeretʼakʼa. Probhu Isor okalekae hukumakatʼ onkagepe kạmiya. Ape cetanre niạ hukumge tahẽyena.” 
Joshua8:9 Inạ tayom Josuạ do onkoe kolkatʼkoa. Onko do Ae nagraha reakʼ pạchim secʼre senkate mitʼṭecʼ jaegareko okoyena. Ona jaega do Bethel ar Ae reakʼ talare tahẽkana. Josuạ do enhilokʼ ńindạ sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko sãoteye tahẽyena. 
Joshua8:10 Dosar hilokʼ Josuạ do ạḍi setakʼre acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom uni ar Israelkoren mukhiyạko do onko laha lahate Ae nagraha secʼko mohnḍa idiyena. 
Joshua8:11 Josuạ sãoten lạṛhại phạdko do sanamkogeko laha idiyena ar nagraha sor senkate nagraha samaṅ secʼreko jarwayena. Ar Ae nagraha utạr secʼreko ḍerayena. Nagraha ar onkoakʼ ḍera talare do Akor buru nala tahẽkana. 
Joshua8:12 Josuạren mõṛẽ hajar lạṛhại phạdko do nagraha reakʼ pạchim secʼ Bethel ar Ae tala reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegareko oko tahẽyena. 
Joshua8:13 Nonkate Israelko do akoren lạṛhại phạdko lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛao dohokatʼkoa ar okoe do ḍerareko tahena onko do utạr secʼreye dohoketʼkoa ar okoe oko akanko tahen onko do nagraha reakʼ pạchim secʼre. Ar enhilokʼ ńindạ Josuạ do lodamreye aṅga hạṭińena. 
Joshua8:14 Israelko ńelte Aeren raj do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate acʼren onko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ sanam hoṛkoante nagraha khone oḍokente Araba ṭạnḍire mitʼṭecʼ niṭ akatʼ jaegateye senena. Menkhan bae baḍae daṛeada nagraha tayom secʼre uni upạrte mitʼṭen lạṛhại phạd doko oko akana mente. 
Joshua8:15 Josuạ ar sanam Israelko do onko ńelte botor caṛhaoatʼko leka hahaṅkar horteko ḍạṛkeda. 
Joshua8:16 Unre Ae nagraharen hoṛ do Israelko khudạuko lạgitʼ akoren sanam hoṛko hohowatʼkoa. Onko do Josuạko khudạu idikedea ar nonkate nagraha khon sạṅgińteko idiocoyena. 
Joshua8:17 Ar Israel tayom tayomteko ńir calaoen khan Ae nagrahare mitʼṭen herel hoṛ hõ ar bako sarecʼlena. Onko do nagraha reakʼ phaṭok jhicʼakatʼge Israel tayomteko ńir calaoena. 
Joshua8:18 Unre Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Amakʼ ti reakʼ tarwaṛe do Ae nagraha secʼ tiạrtam, ente amakʼ tirege nagraha doń jimạ akada.” Josuạ do unre acʼakʼ tarwaṛe Ae nagraha secʼe tiạrketʼtaea;" 
Joshua8:19 ar são sãote oko akan tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdko do akoakʼ jaega khon beretʼente nagraha secʼko dạṛ idikeda. Ar onḍe bolokateko dokholkeda ar thoṛa okterege nagrahare seṅgelko jeretʼada. 
Joshua8:20 Aeren hoṛko do tayom secʼko beṅgetʼ ruạṛketʼ khan akoakʼ nagraha khon coṭte dhũạ rakabokʼko ńelkeda; menkhan oka secʼge onko do bako dạṛ daṛeada, ente okoe Israelko hahaṅkar secʼko dạṛetʼkan tahẽkan onko do inạkʼtege onko upạrte jhãpko emkeda." 
Joshua8:21 Josuạ ar sanam Israelko do tinreko ńelkeda, akoren oko akan lạṛhại phạdko do nagrahako dokholkeda ar nagraha khon dhũạ rakabokʼ kana unre onko hõ Ae nagraharen hoṛko cetanre jhãpko emkeda." 
Joshua8:22 Ar oko akan tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdko hõ Aeren hoṛko akromonko lạgitʼ nagraha khonko oḍok hecʼena. Onate Aeren hoṛ do Israelren banar dol talareko paṛaoena. Ar Israelko do onko sanamko gocʼketʼkoa, okoehõ jiwetʼ bako doholetʼkoa." 
Joshua8:23 Menkhan Ae nagraharen raj do jiwetʼtege Josuạ ṭhenko sapʼ ạgukedea. 
Joshua8:24 Okaṭakʼ ṭạnḍire, metakʼme oka hahaṅkarre Ae nagraharen hoṛ do Israelkoko khudạu idiletʼko onḍege Aeren hoṛko gocʼ ocoyen tayom sanam Israelko do Ae nagrahateko ruạṛ hecʼena ar nagrahare okoeko tahekan onko sanamko gocʼketʼkoa." 
Joshua8:25 Enhilokʼ Ae nagraharen sanam hoṛ, metakʼme gelbar hajar maejiu ar herelko gocʼ ocoyena." 
Joshua8:26 Ae nagrahare okoeko tahẽkan onko ạuriko marao cabako hạbicʼ Josuạ do tarwaṛeye tul akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Joshua8:27 Probhu Isor cetʼ leka Josuại hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko do ona nagraharen janwarko ar luṭakʼ jinisko ako lạgitʼko ạgu darawana. 
Joshua8:28 Ar Josuạ do Ae nagrahae jeretʼatʼte jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍahao maraoakʼ ḍhipi lekae hoyocokeda; ona do teheń hõ mitʼṭecʼ jarkharakʼ ṭhạ̃ige menakʼa. 
Joshua8:29 Uni do Ae nagraharen raje gocʼkedea ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼ darereye aka dohokadea. Ar ńindạ jokhecʼ uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ pheḍkate nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr bolokʼ horre giḍikae reakʼe hukumkeda. Ar hoṛko do uni cetanre dhiriko giḍi puńjikeda. Ona do teheń hạbicʼ hõ menakʼgea. 
Joshua8:30 Inạ tayom Israelko ṭhen emakʼ Probhu Isorren guti Moseyakʼ hukum leka Josuạ do Ebal buru cetanre Israelko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe tearkeda. Moseyakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ puthire cetʼleka ol menakʼ onkage uni doe benao ocokeda. Pinḍ benaore jãhãn pahṭa dhirite do baṅ ar onare mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jãhãn jontropati hõ baṅ beoharlena. Ona pinḍ cetanre Israelko do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ ar suluk samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
Joshua8:31  
Joshua8:32 Ebal burure Israelko samaṅre Josuạ do dhiri cetanre Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrikoe nokol ucạṛkeda. 
Joshua8:33 Israelko ar onko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko, onkoren mukhiyạko, kạmiyạko ar bikʼcạrko, metakʼme Israel somajren sanam hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos-sinduk reakʼ banarsa aṛereko teṅgo akan tahẽkana; onko do sinduk gogokʼ naekeko samaṅreko tahẽkana. Ar onkoren adha hoṛko do Gerisim buru samaṅre ar adha hoṛko do Ebal buru samaṅreko teṅgoyena. Probhu Isorren guti Mose do laharege noa kathae roṛletʼ tahẽkana tinre uni do Israelko bhorako reakʼ hukume ńamletʼ tahẽkan." 
Joshua8:34 Ona tayom Josuạ do ạn-ạri reakʼ sanamakʼ bhor ar sarapakʼ reakʼ oka katha ol tahẽkan ona jotoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. 
Joshua8:35 Noa babotre Mose okako hukume emlen ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ Josuạ do bae badleda goṭa Israel somajrenge onae paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. Niạ somajre do maejiuko, gidrạko ar onko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jạtrenko hõko tahẽkana." 
Joshua9:1 Jordan gaḍa pạchim secʼren rajko do noako reakʼ joto kathako ańjomkeda. Onko do usul buru ṭoṭha ar ona latar ṭoṭha disạmkoren ar Lebanon hạbicʼ jalapuri ḍhip aṛete okako disạm tahẽkan onakoren rajgeko tahẽkana. Onko do Hitiko, Amoriko, Kananiko, Pherisiko, Hiwiko ar Jebusikoren rajgeko tahẽkana." 
Joshua9:2 Onko do Israelko reaṅ sanamakʼ katha ańjomkate Josuạ ar Israel upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko mitʼ motena. 
Joshua9:3 Jerikho ar Ae nagraha reakʼ Josuạ okae cekaletʼ ona reakʼ katha tinre Gibeon nagraharen Hiwikoko ańjomkeda unre onko do mitʼṭecʼ calakiko kạmikeda. Onkoren thoṛa hoṛ do Josuạ ṭhenko mohnḍayena. Onko do akoren gadha cetanre mare mare bosta ar oṛecʼ ar tạli akatʼ darkha rasa dohowakʼ harta reakʼ mare kumkoko ididarakeda. 
Joshua9:4  
Joshua9:5 Onko do mare ar tạli akatʼ panahi ar mare kicricʼko horokʼkeda. Ar horte lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ jomakʼko hataoketʼ ona hõ kecakʼ ar rohoṛ piṭhạ tahekana. 
Joshua9:6 Nonkate onko do Gilgolre Israelkokʼ ḍerare Josuạ samaṅreko seṭerena. Onko do Josuạ ar Israelkoko metatʼkoa, “Ale do ạḍi sạṅgiń disạm khonle hecʼakana; onate ma bondobos baṛe bandhao alepe.”" 
Joshua9:7 Unre Israelko do Hiwikoko metatʼkoa, “Ape do pasecʼ ale aḍepaseren hoṛ kangeape. Ar sạrige onka kan khan cetʼlekate ape sãote bondobos dole dohoya?”" 
Joshua9:8 Onko do Josuạko metadea, “Ńelme, ale do amren golamko kanale.” Unre Josuạ do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ape dope okoe kana, ar oka khonpe hecʼakana?”" 
Joshua9:9 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum ańjomkate amren golamko do ạḍi sạṅgiń khonle hecʼ akana. Misor disạmre uni okae cekaletʼ ona reakʼ sombat hõle baḍae akada." 
Joshua9:10 Ona chaḍa uni do Hisbonren raj ar Astarotre girobasokʼkan Basonren Og raj metakʼme jordan gaḍa purub secʼren Amorikoren rajkin cetanre okam ceka akatʼ ona hõle ańjom akada. 
Joshua9:11 Aleren mukhiyạko ar aleakʼ disạmren sanamkoge noako hukum akatʼlea, horte lạgitʼ jomakʼ soṅgete jemonle iditora joṅ ar am sãote ńapamkatele metam, ‘ale do amren golam kanale de mitʼṭen bondobos baṛe emaleme.’" 
Joshua9:12 Ape ṭhen hijukʼ hilokʼ ale do oṛakʼ khon lolo lolo piṭhạwantele oḍok hecʼlena, menkhan ńitokʼ ńelme, ona piṭhạko hõ rohoṛte kecakʼ akantalea." 
Joshua9:13 Darkha rasa dohoy reakʼ kumko hõ perecʼkatele ạguleda ar onako hõ nãwãge tahẽkana menkhan, ńitokʼ onako cetʼleka oṛecʼ akantalea. Ar sạṅgiń reakʼ horte hijukʼ hijukʼte jaṅga reakʼ panahi ar aṅgropko hõ mareyentalea.”" 
Joshua9:14 Israelko do eken onkoakʼ jomakʼko ńelkeda menkhan Probhu Isor do bako kuliledea. 
Joshua9:15 Josuạ do onko sãote mitʼṭene bondoboskeda ar baṅ gocʼko reakʼ hõ onko tulucʼe cukạukeda, ar Israel somajren mukhiyạko hõ ona reaṅko gokʼkeda." 
Joshua9:16 Gibeonko sãote cukạu pe din tayom khange Israelkoko ańjomkeda, ako aḍepaseren hoṛkangeako ar onko do sorregeko girobasokʼ kana." 
Joshua9:17 Unre Israelko do onkoakʼ elaka secʼko mohnḍayena ar pe din hilokʼre onḍeko seṭerena. Onkokoakʼ elakare do Gibeon, Kephira, Beerot ar Kiriat-Jearim nagrahako tahẽkana." 
Joshua9:18 Menkhan Israelko do onko bako akromonletʼkoa, ente onkoren mukhiyạko do Israelren Probhu Isor ńutumte onko ṭhenko kiriạ akana. Ar onate sanam Israelko do mukhiyạko upạrteko karacʼ kurucʼena." 
Joshua9:19 Onate mukhiyạko do onkoko metatʼkoa, “Ale do Israelkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte onko ṭhenle kiriạ akana onate onko cetanre ńitokʼ do ti babon calao daṛeakʼa." 
Joshua9:20 Tobe abo do onko lạgitʼ niạ bon kạmiya, onko do babon gocʼkoa jemon onko ṭhen oka bon kiriạ akan ona rạputʼ iạte Probhu Isorakʼ edre abore alo paṛaokʼ.”" 
Joshua9:21 Onko do arhõko menkeda, “Onko do jiwetʼko tahenma.” Onate Gibeonko babotre mukhiyạkoakʼ katha leka onko do Israel somajren sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ sahan mamakʼ ar dakʼ ạgu hoṛko hoyena." 
Joshua9:22 Inạ tayom Josuạ do Gibeonko hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ale khon ạḍi sạṅgińrepe tahenkana mente cedakʼpe ṭhokaketʼlea? Ape ma ale sorrege coṅpe girobasokʼkan."
