Joshua9:23 Onate ape cetanre niạ sarap tahẽyena, ińren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ sahan mamakʼ ar dakʼ ạgui reakʼ kạmipe kạmiya. Niạ golam reakʼ kạmi khon do ar tisge rehae bape ńama.”" 
Joshua9:24 Onko do Josuạko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Niạ goṭa disạmge ape emape lạgitʼ ar ape samaṅ khon niạ disạmren sanamko marao giḍiko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ hukum amren Probhu Isor acʼren guti Moseye emade tahẽkan ona do pusṭạutege ale amren golamko ṭhen roṛ akan tahẽkana. Ar onate ale do ape reaṅ sanamakʼko ańjomkate botorte niạ kạmile kạmi akada." 
Joshua9:25 Ale do ńitokʼ amakʼ tirege menakʼlea; am okaṭakʼ bhagem metakʼkan ona baṛe ale cetanre kạmime.” 
Joshua9:26 Ona iạte Josuạ do Israelkoakʼ ti khon onkoe bańcaoketʼkoa; ar bae gocʼ ocowatʼkoa. 
Joshua9:27 Ar Josuạ do enhilokʼge Gibeonkoe hukumatʼkoa jemon onko do Israelko lạgitʼ ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iye bachao joṅ ona ṭhạ̃ire Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ lạgitʼ sahan ar dakʼ ạgui reakʼ kạmiko kạmiy. Ar teheń hạbicʼ onko do ona kạmigeko kạmikana. 
Joshua10:1 Jerusalemren raj Adoni-Sedek doe ańjom ńamkeda, Josuạ do Ae nagraha hatkateye jarkhar akada ar Jerikho ar onaren rajakʼ cetanre okae ceka akatʼ onkage Ae ar onaren rajakʼ halot hõe hoyocoakada. Uni do arhõe ańjomkeda, Gibeonko do Israelko sãoteko bondobos akada ar onko sãote menakʼkoa." 
Joshua10:2 Onate uni ar uniren hoṛko do botor caṛhaoatʼkoa, ente Gibeon do raj nagraha lekan nagrahage tahẽkana. Noa do Ae nagraha khon hõ maraṅ nagraha tahẽkana ar onaren sanam herel hoṛ do daṛeangeko tahẽkana" 
Joshua10:3 Ona iạte Jerusalemren raj Adoni-Sedek do Hebronren raj Hoham, Jarmutren raj Piram, Lakhisren raj Japhiạ ar Eglonren raj Debir ṭhen niạ nehõre kolkeda," 
Joshua10:4 “Ape do dela hijukʼte Gibeon nagraha akromon lạgitʼ goṛowạńpe, ente onko do Josuạ ar Israelko sãoteko bondobos akada.”" 
Joshua10:5 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko mõṛẽ goṭen Amori rapajko, metakʼme Jerusalem, Hebron, Jarmut, Lakhis ar Eglonren rapajko do akoren lạṛhại phạdko jarwa mitʼketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom do akoren lạṛhại phạdko soṅgekate Gibeon sor senkateko ḍerayena ar nagrahako akromonkeda." 
Joshua10:6 Unre Gibeonrenko do Gilgal reakʼ ḍerate senkate Josuạ ṭhen sombatko kolkeda, “Amren golamko do alom bạgi giḍilea. Ma usạra hecʼkate goṛowaleme, ente Amorikoren rajko do buru ṭoṭha khon hecʼkate ale upạrte akoren lạṛhại phạdkoko jarwa akatʼkoa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Niạ sombat ańjomkate Josuạ do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoante Gilgal khone oḍok hecʼena. Ar uni sãote Israelren sanam birbanṭa hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Joshua10:8 Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Alom botorakoa; onko do amakʼ tireń soprotkoa. Onko do okoege am samaṅre bako teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa.”" 
Joshua10:9 Gilgal khon oḍok kate goṭa ńindại taṛam senen tayom Josuạ do ackage onkoe akromonketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:10 Probhu Isor do Israelko samaṅre onkoe andmandao ocoketʼkoa. Onate Probhu Isor do Gibeonre Israelko hotete onkoren ḍher hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. Beth-Harante rakapʼ calao akan horre Probhu Isor do Israelko hotete onkoe khudạu idiketʼkote Aserka ar Makeda hạbicʼ goṭa hore ńẽtʼ idiketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:11 Israelko samaṅ khon tinre onko do Beth-Haran bạgikate Aserkate pheḍ hecʼakan horteko ḍạṛ paskaokʼkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do serma khon lạṭu lạṭu arel onko cetanreye ńuratʼkoa. Onate Israelko sãote lạṛhạire tinạkʼko gocʼen ona khon areltege ḍher hoṛko gocʼena. 
Joshua10:12 Oka hilokʼ Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ tire Amorikoe jimạketʼko enhilokʼge Josuạ do Israelko samaṅre Probhu Isore metadea, “E siń cando, Gibeon cetanre teṅgo thir akae tahenme, E ńindạ cando, Ajalon buru sokṛare senkate teṅgokʼ hapekokʼme.”" 
Joshua10:13 Onate siń cando doe teṅgo thirena ar ńindạ cando hõe teṅgoyena, one tin hạbicʼ Israel do acʼren bạiriko cetanre ạuriye hala purạu.” Noa katha do Jaserakʼ puthire ol akana. Unre siń cando do tala sermareye teṅgo thirena ar hạsurokʼ do mitʼ dine dirikeda." 
Joshua10:14 Inạ laha se tayom nonkan din do ar tishõ bań hoyakana Probhu Isor do manwakoakʼ katha nonkae dohoakada mente. Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do Israelko huyạteye lạṛhạilena. 
Joshua10:15 Ar inạ tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoante Gilgal reakʼ ḍerateye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Joshua10:16 Onko mõṛẽ goṭen Amorikoren raj do Makeda nagraha ṭhenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ danderreko ńir okoyena. 
Joshua10:17 Ar danderre oko akan mõṛẽ rajko reakʼ sombat tinre Josuạko baḍae ocokedea unre uni doe menkeda, “Dander reakʼ duạrre lạṭu dhiri giṛgạu ạgukate esetʼkakʼpe ar ona pahrae lạgitʼ thoṛa hoṛko dohokope." 
Joshua10:18  
Joshua10:19 Menkhan hape akae alope tahena; aperen bạiriko laga idikope, tayom secʼ khon akromonkope ar akoakʼ nagrahate alope sen ocoakoa. Aperen Probhu Isor do apeakʼ tire onkoe jimạ akatʼkoa.”" 
Joshua10:20 Nonkate Josuạ ar Israelko do Amoriạkoko ńẽtʼ cabaketʼkoa. Onate joto lekako gocʼena; menkhan tinạkʼ sarecʼko tahẽkan onko do akoakʼ pạcrite esetʼ nagrahareko aderketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:21 Inạ tayom Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do Makeda reakʼ ḍerate Josuạ ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. Israelko upạrte ar celege jãhãnakʼ roroṛ bako dilleda. 
Joshua10:22 Ona tayom Josuại menkeda, “Dander reakʼ duạr jhijpe ar onko mõṛẽ goṭen raj iń ṭhen oḍok ạgukope.”" 
Joshua10:23 Onate ona dander khon onko mõṛẽ goṭen rajko oḍok ạguketʼkoa. Noko do Jerusalem, Hebron, Jarmut, Lakhis ar Eglonren rajko tahẽkana." 
Joshua10:24 Onko raj do tinre Josuạ ṭhenko ạguketʼkoa unre uni do sanam Israelkoe hohowatʼkoa ar acʼ sãote okoeko senapoti lạṛhạiko senlen onkoe metatʼkoa, “Dela hijukʼpe ar noko rajko totkare lebetʼkope.” Onate onko do sen sorkate rajkoakʼ totkako lebetʼketʼtakoa." 
Joshua10:25 Josuạ do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Alope botorokʼa, ar alope as chuṭạukʼa. Daṛeanko hoyokʼpe ar monre dil dohoype. Ente okoe bạiriko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼpe oḍok calakʼ onko sanamkoakʼ dosa Probhu Isor do nonkageye hoe ocoytakoa.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ona tayom Josuạ do onko raje gocʼketʼkoa ar mõṛẽ goṭen darereye akakatʼkoa. Ar ạyupʼ dela deli hạbicʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do darere akage tahẽyena. 
Joshua10:27 Ar siń candoe hạsurokʼ jokhecʼ Josuạwakʼ hukumte hoṛko do dare khon onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko pheḍkeda ar okaṭakʼ danderreko oko akan tahẽkan onarege onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko giḍikada. Ar dander reakʼ duạr do lạṭu dhiriteko esetʼkada. Ona do teheń hạbicʼ hõ onḍege menakʼa. 
Joshua10:28 Josuạ do enhilokʼge Makedae hatkeda. Uni do ona nagraha ren raj ar sanam hoṛe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa ar onḍenko sanam jiwiyanko hõe maraoketʼkoa, celege jiwetʼ bae doholetʼkoa. Jerikhoren rajre okae cekaletʼ onkage Makedaren rajakʼ dosa hõe hoe ocokeda." 
Joshua10:29 Josuạ do Israelkoren sanamkoante Makeda khon Libna secʼe laha idiyente onae akromonkeda. 
Joshua10:30 Probhu Isor do ona nagraha ar onḍenko rajko Israelkoakʼ tireye jimạketʼkoa. Ar Josuạ do ona nagraharen hoṛko ar sanam jiwiyankoe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa, celege jiwetʼ bae doholetʼkoa." 
Joshua10:31 Inạ tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoante Libna khon Lakhis secʼe laha idiyena. Uni do Lakhis hõe esetʼ ạcurketʼte onae akromonkeda. 
Joshua10:32 Probhu Isor do Lakhis hõ Israelkoakʼ tireye jimạkeda. Ar Josuạ do dosar hilokʼ onae hatkeda. Uni do Libna nagrahae cekaletʼ onkage Lakhisren hoṛko ar onaren sanam jiwiyankoe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:33 Unre Geserren Horam raj do Lakhisren hoṛko goṛowako lạgitʼe oḍokʼ hecʼlena menkhan Josuạ do uni ar uniren lạṛhại phạdkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Ar sesre celege jiwetʼ bako sarecʼlena. 
Joshua10:34 Ona tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoante Lakhis khon Eglon secʼe laha idiyena. Onko do Eglonko esetʼ ạcurketʼte onako akromonkeda. 
Joshua10:35 Ar enhilokʼge onko do Eglonko hatkeda ar onḍenko hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Lakhisre cetʼlekae cekaletʼ onkage Josuạ do Eglonren sanam jiwiyankoe caba utạrketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:36 Inạ tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoante Eglon khon Hebronte senkate ona nagrahae akromonkeda. 
Joshua10:37 Onko do nagrahako hatketʼte onḍenko hoṛko, onkoren raj, ar ona aḍepase atokoren sanam hoṛko ar Hebronren sanam jiwiyankoko marao cabaketʼkoa. Ar Eglonre cetʼlekae cekaletʼ onkage Josuạ do Hebron ar onaren sanam hoṛkoe marao cabaketʼkoa." 
Joshua10:38 Ona tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoanteye ạcur senente Debir nagrahae akromonkeda. 
Joshua10:39 Onko do ona nagraha, ar onaren raj ar ona reakʼ atokoko hatketʼte sanam hoṛko gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. Onko do onḍenko sanam jiwiyankoko marao utạrketʼkoa. Josuạ do celege jiwetʼ bae doholetʼkoa; uni do Libna ar onaren raj ar Hebron reakʼ oka dosae hoyocoletʼtae Debir ar onaren rajakʼ dosa hõ onkageye hoyocokeda." 
Joshua10:40 Nonkate Josuạ do sanam jaega, metakʼme buru disạm, ar buru dhasna disạm, Begeb ar bilạn disạm, ar onakoren sanam rajkoe bhagaoketʼkoa ar celege jiwetʼ bae doholetʼkoa. Israelren Probhu Isor oka lekae hukumletʼ tahẽkan onkage uni do sanam jiwiyankoe marao utạrketʼkoa." 
Joshua10:41 Josuạ do Kades-Barnea khon Gasa hạbicʼ ar goṭa Gosen reakʼ Gibeon hạbicʼ sanam hoṛkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. 
Joshua10:42 Nonkate uni do mitʼ dhaore lạṛhại oḍokkate onko rajko ar onkoakʼ disạmkoe hatkeda, ente Israelkoren Probhu Isor do onko huyạteye lạṛhạilena." 
Joshua10:43 Inạ tayom Josuạ do sanam Israelkoante Gilgal reakʼ ḍerateye ruạṛ calaoena. 
Joshua11:1 Hasorren raj Jabin do noako ańjomkate Madonren raj Jobab ar Simronren ar Aksaphren rajkin ṭhen sombate kolkeda. 
Joshua11:1 Hasorren raj Jabin do noako ańjomkate Madonren raj Jobab ar Simronren ar Aksaphren rajkin ṭhen sombate kolkeda. 
Joshua11:2 Ona chaḍa uni do utạr secʼren okoe rajko tahẽkana onko sanamko ṭhen hõ sombate kolkeda. Onako rajosṭi do buru disạmre, Kinerot dạkhin Araba reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire, latar buru ṭoṭhare ar pạchim reakʼ Dorer buru ṭoṭhare tahẽkana." 
Joshua11:3 Uni do purub ar pạchim secʼren Kananiko ṭhen ar buru elakaren Amoriko, Hittiko, Pherisiko ar Jebusiko ṭhen ar Hermon buru latar reakʼ Mispa ṭoṭharen Hiwiko ṭhen hõ sombate kolkeda." 
Joshua11:4 Onko rajko do akoren sanam lạṛhại phạdko sãoteko oḍok hecʼena. Onko do doreão reakʼ gitil leka ạḍi utạrko hoyena. Onko sãote do sadom ar rãt-gạḍiko hõ tahẽkana. 
Joshua11:5 Onko rajko do mitʼṭecʼ niṭ akatʼ jaegareko jarwayente Israelko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ Mirom ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dakʼ jharna ṭhenko ḍerayena. 
Joshua11:6 Unre Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea, “Onko do alom botorakoa, ente gapa niạ okte bhitrite Israelko samaṅre onko sanamkoń marao cabakoa. Ar am do onkoren sadomkoakʼ jaṅga sirem ged takoa ar rãt-gạḍikom jeretʼ giḍikatakoa.”" 
Joshua11:7 Unre Josuạ do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdante Mirom reakʼ dakʼ jharna ṭhen onko upạrte ackageko seṭerena ar onkore jhãpko emkeda. 
Joshua11:8 Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ tire onkoe jimạkatʼkoa. Israelko do onko gocʼ gocʼte maraṅ Sidon, Misrephot-Mayim ar purub secʼ reakʼ Mispa lodam hạbicʼko khudạu idiketʼkoa. Ar mucạtʼ hạbicʼ okoehõ jiwetʼ do bako tahẽlena." 
Joshua11:9 Probhu Isor do Josuạ cetʼlekae hukumade tahẽkan onkage bạiriko cetanreye kạmikeda. Uni do sadomkoakʼ jaṅga sire getʼketʼtakoa ar rãt-gạḍiko doe jeretʼ giḍikada. 
Joshua11:10 Ona tayom Josuạ doe ruạṛ calaoente Hasore hatkeda ar onḍenicʼ raje gocʼkedea. Hasor do onako rajosṭi modre maraṅ utạrakʼ nagraha tahẽkana. 
Joshua11:11 Israelko do Hasorren sanamkoko maraoketʼkoa, mitʼṭen jiwiyanko hõ jiwetʼ do bako doholetʼkoa. Ar inạ tayom Josuạ do nagrahae jeretʼ giḍikada." 
Joshua11:12 Josuạ do onko rajkoakʼ nagrahakoe hatketʼte onḍenko rajkoe bondiketʼkoa. Probhu Isorren guti Moseyakʼ hukum lekage uni do onko sanamkoe marao cabaketʼkoa. 
Joshua11:13 Menkhan ḍuṅgriko cetanre okako nagraha tahẽkan Israelko do onako reakʼ okaṭakʼge bako jeretʼleda, menkhan Josuạ do eken Hasor nagrahae jeretʼ giḍikada." 
Joshua11:14 Niạko nagraha khon okako jinis ar ạsul janwarko luṭlen ona do Israelko apnar lạgitʼko idiwana; menkhan sanam hoṛko doko marao cabaketʼkoa, mitʼṭen jiwiyanko hõ jiwetʼ do bako doholetʼkoa." 
Joshua11:15 Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Mose okako hukume emade tahẽkan onage uni do Josuại baḍae ocoledea, ar Josuạ do onako hukume manaoleda. Probhu Isor do Mose okakoe hukumade tahẽkan Josuạ do ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ bae bemanotleda." 
Joshua11:16 Nonkate Josuạ do goṭa disạmgeye hatkeda. Onako modre usul buru ṭoṭhako, goṭa Negeb, Gosen ṭoṭha, latar buruko ṭoṭha, Araba buru nala ar Israel utạr reakʼ usul buru ṭoṭha ar latar bilạn ṭạnḍiko tahẽkana." 
Joshua11:17 Seyir buru rakapʼ calakʼ reakʼ Halak buru khon Hermon buru latar Lebanon lodamre menakʼ Bakʼal-gad hạbicʼ sanam ṭoṭhage Josuạ doe hatkeda. Uni do onako jaegaren rajko sapʼkateye gocʼketʼkoa. 
Joshua11:18 Josuạ do ḍher din hạbicʼ noko rajko sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. 
Joshua11:19 Eken Gibeonre tahenkan Hiwiko chaḍa ar oka nagraharen hoṛ hõ Israelko sãote jãhãn bondobos bako doholeda; Israelko do sanamkoge lạṛhạireko bhagaoketʼkoa. 
Joshua11:20 Probhu Isor do onko hoṛkoakʼ mone keṭecʼ ocoletʼtakoa jemon Israelko upạrte lạṛhạikate ḍahao maraokʼ sarapakʼren hoṛko hoyokʼ ar daya baṅ ńamkateko gujukʼ. Niạ hukumge Probhu Isor do Moseye emade tahẽkana. 
Joshua11:21 Inạ tayom Josuạ do buru ṭoṭhate senkate Anakiko hõe gocʼketʼkoa. Niạ ṭoṭha modre do Hebron, Debir, Anab nagraha, Jihudạ ar Israel reakʼ sanam buru jaegako tahẽkana. Uni do Anakiko ar onkoakʼ nagrahako ar atokoe marao cabaketʼtakoa." 
Joshua11:22 Israelkoakʼ disạm modre okoe Anakiko hõ jiwetʼ do ar bako tahẽlena; eken Gasa, Gad ar Asdodre thoṛa gan Anakiko jiwetʼko tahẽyena." 
Joshua11:23 Probhu Isor Mose okae hukumade tahẽkan onkage Josuạ do goṭa disạme dokholana ar gusṭikoakʼ sompotti lekate ona do Israelko talareye hạṭińatʼkoa. Unre disạmre lạṛhại do thirakan tahẽkana. 
Joshua12:1 Araba bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ purub hĩs reakʼ sanamakʼ Arnon lodam khon Hermon buru hạbicʼ jordan gaḍa purub secʼren Amorikoren raj Sihon ar Basonren raj Og doko bhagaoketʼkinte Israelko do unkinakʼ elakako dohkol akawan tahẽkana. 
Joshua12:2 Amorikoren raj Sihon do Hesbon khon raje calaoetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Arnon lodam aṛe reakʼ Aroer khon, metakʼme lodam reakʼ adha khon Amonrenkoakʼ disạm reakʼ simạna Jabok gaḍa hạbicʼ goṭa elakae calaoetʼ tahẽkana. Niạ elaka talare Gileadkoakʼ hõ adha hĩs tahẽkana." 
Joshua12:3 Ona chaḍa Kinerot doreão khon Araba doreão, metakʼme buluṅ doreão ar Bet-jesimot reakʼ hor hạbicʼ ar dạkhin secʼ Pisga buru latar hạbicʼ ar Araba bilạn ṭạnḍi purub reakʼ hĩs hõ raje calaoetʼ tahẽkana." 
Joshua12:4 Rephayiko modre okoe sarecʼko tahẽkan onko modre Basonren raj Og hõe tahẽkana. Uni do Astarot ar Edreyi khone rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Joshua12:5 Hermon buru, Saleka, Gesuriko ar Makatiko reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ goṭa Bason disạm ar Hisbonren raj Sihon rajosṭi reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ Gilead reakʼ sarecʼ hĩs hõ uniyakʼ tabere tahẽkana." 
Joshua12:6 Israelko ar Probhu Isorren guti Mose do nukin raje bhagaoletʼkina. Uni do unkinakʼ jaegako sompotti lekate Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren sanamko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛkoe ematʼko tahẽkana. 
Joshua12:7 Lebanon lodam reakʼ Bakʼal-Gal khon Seyir buru secʼ rakapʼ calao akan Halak buru hạbicʼ jordan gaḍa pạchim secʼren rajko do Josuạ ar Israelko ṭhenko bhagao ocoakan tahẽkana. Josuạ do onkoakʼ jaegako sompotti lekate Israelkoren judạ judạ gusṭirenkoe hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Joshua12:8 Niạko jaega do hoyokʼ kana usul buru ṭoṭha, latar buru ṭoṭhako, Araba, buru dhasnako, purub secʼ reakʼ buluṅ doreão elaka ar Negeb. Niạko do Hittiko, Amoriko, Kananiko, Pherisiko, Hiwiko ar Jebusikoakʼ elaka tahẽkana." 
Joshua12:9 Niạko jaegaren okoeko rajko bhagao ocolen onko doko hoyokʼ kana; Jerikhoren raj, Bethel ṭhenakʼ Aeren raj," 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalemren raj, Hebronren raj, Jarmutren raj, Lakhisren raj, Eglonren raj, Geserren raj," 
Joshua12:11  
Joshua12:12  
Joshua12:13 Debirren raj, Gederren raj," 
Joshua12:14 Hormaren raj, Aradren raj," 
Joshua12:15 Libnaren raj, Adulamren raj, Makedaren raj, Bethelren raj, Tapuaren raj, Hepherren raj," 
Joshua12:16  
Joshua12:17  
Joshua12:18 Aphekren raj, Lasaronren raj," 
Joshua12:19 Madonren raj, Hasorren raj," 
Joshua12:20 Simron-Meronren raj, Aksapren raj," 
Joshua12:21 Tanakren raj, Magidodren raj," 
Joshua12:22 Kedesren raj, Karmel reakʼ Jokneamren raj, Dorer reakʼ buru jaegaren Dorer raj, Gilgal reakʼ Goimren raj ar Tirsaren raj; nokoko raj do jotote pegel mitʼ hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Joshua12:23  
Joshua12:24  
Joshua13:1 Josuạ do umer ḍher idiyente tinreye haṛamena unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Am dom haṛamena, ar ḍher umer hoyakana menkhan disạm reakʼ ḍher jaega ńithõ menakʼgea one okaṭakʼ do ạuri dokholokʼ." 
Joshua13:2 Okako jaega ńithõ ạuri dokholokʼ onako modre Misor reakʼ purub secʼ Sihor gaḍa khon ehopʼkate utạr secʼ Ekron reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ Palesṭirenko ar Gesurrenkoakʼ goṭa elaka menakʼa. Niạko elaka do Kananikoakʼ elaka kana. Onḍe do Gasa, Asdod, Askelon, Gat ar Ekron ńutuman mõṛẽ rapajkoakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ nagraha menakʼa, ar dạkhinre do Awikoakʼ elaka kana. Ona chaḍa arhõ aema jaega do dokhol bạki menakʼa, ona do hoyokʼ kana Sidonrenkoakʼ Meara khon Amorikoakʼ sima reakʼ Apheka hạbicʼ Kananiko reakʼ sanam elaka," 
Joshua13:3  
Joshua13:4  
Joshua13:5 Giblikoakʼ elaka, purub secʼ Hermon buru latar Bakʼal-Gad khon Hamat hạbicʼ goṭa Lebanon ar Lebanon khon Misrephot-Mayim hạbicʼ buru elaka, metakʼme Sidonkoakʼ goṭa disạm. Iń apnarge Israelko samaṅ khon onko jotogeń laga ńirkoa. Ar cetʼ lekań hukum akatʼ onkage niạ disạm do sompotti lekate Israelkom emakoa." 
Joshua13:6  
Joshua13:7 Israelkoren are gusṭi ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛge sompotti lekate onam hạṭińakoa.” 
Joshua13:8 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko, Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛko do jordan gaḍa purub secʼ reakʼ jaegako do sompotti lekate laharegeko ńamakatʼ tahẽkana. Probhu Isorren guti Mose do onko lạgitʼ ona jaegageye ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
Joshua13:9 Onkoakʼ niạ jaega do ehopʼakana Arnon lodam aṛe reakʼ Aroer nagraha khon ar ona lodam reakʼ adha ato khon. Onako modre menakʼa Dibon hạbicʼ Medeba reakʼ goṭa bilạn ṭạnḍi ar Amonrenkoakʼ disạm reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ Hesbonren Amori raj Sihonakʼ goṭa atokoge. 
Joshua13:10  
Joshua13:11 Gilead elaka, Gesuriko ar Makathikoakʼ elaka, goṭa Hermon buru ar Salka hạbicʼ goṭa Bason disạm hõ onare menakʼa." 
Joshua13:12 Niạ do tahẽkana Basonren raj Ogakʼ rajosṭi. Uni do Astaroth ar Edreyi khone rajokʼkan tahẽkana. Rephiyiko talare un anecʼ hõ okoe do jiwetʼko tahẽkan onko modre uni hõe tahẽkana. Mose do onkoe bhagaoketʼkote onkoakʼ disạme hatleda. 
Joshua13:13 Menkhan Israelko do Gesuriko ar Makathirenko bako laga ńirletʼkoa; ona iạte teheń hạbicʼ onko do Israelko talare menakʼkoa. 
Joshua13:14 Mose do Liwi gusṭirenko oka sompottige bae ạidạri ocoatʼkoa, ente Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage onko do Israelkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte seṅgelre samaṅakʼ jiniskoge onkoakʼ sompotti do hoyokʼa." 
Joshua13:15 Mose do Ruben gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko okako jaegae ematʼko tahẽkan ona do Arnon lodam aṛe reakʼ Aroer nagraha khon ar lodam reakʼ adha ato khon ehopʼakan tahẽkana. Onako modre Medeba beṛhaeteakʼ goṭa bilạn ṭạnḍi," 
Joshua13:16  
Joshua13:17 Hesbon ar bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ adha ato ar nagrahako. Noa ato ar nagrahako do hoyokʼkana Dibon, Bamot-Bakʼal, Boet-Bakʼal-Meon," 
Joshua13:18 Jahas, Kedemot, Mephat," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriạtheyim, Sibna, ar lodamko modre buru cetan reakʼ Selet nagraha," 
Joshua13:20 Beot-Piyạr, Pigsa buru dhasnako ar Boet-Jesimot." 
Joshua13:21 Niạko do tahẽkana bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ ato ar nagraha ar Hesbonren Amorikoren raj Sihonakʼ goṭa rajosṭige. Mose do nui raj ar Ewi, Rekem, Sur, Hur ar Reba ńutuman Midiạnren sordarkoe bhagaoletʼkoa. Noko do inạ elareko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana ar Sihonren raj tabereko tahẽkana." 
Joshua13:22 Lạṛhạire okoeko gocʼ ocolen tahẽkan onko chaḍa Israelko do Beor hopon gonok Biliam hõko gocʼledea. 
Joshua13:23 Ar jordan gaḍa do Rubenrenko reakʼ pạchim simạnare tahẽkana. Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Ruben gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsren hoṛko sompotti lekateko ńamleda. 
Joshua13:24 Mose do Gad gusṭiren judạ judạ bõskoren hoṛko okako jaegae ematʼko tahẽkan onako modre do Jaser, Gilead reakʼ sanam atoko ar Raba ṭhenakʼ Aroer hạbicʼ Amonrenkoakʼ adha elakako hõ tahẽkana." 
Joshua13:25  
Joshua13:26 Ona chaḍa onako modre Hesbon khon Ramot-Mispa ar Betonim hạbicʼ ar Mahanayim khon Debir hạbicʼ sanam jaega," 
Joshua13:27 ar lodam tala reakʼ Bet-Haram, Bet-Mimra, Sukot, Saphon ar Hesbonren raj Sihonakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sarecʼ hĩsko ar Kineret doreão reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ jordan gaḍa purub aṛe secʼte goṭa elaka tahẽkana." 
Joshua13:28 Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Gad gusṭiren judạ judạ hoṛko sompotti lekateko ńamleda. 
Joshua13:29 Mose do Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛkoren judạ judạ bõsko oka jaegae ematʼko tahẽkan ona do hoyokʼ kana Mahanayem khon ehopʼkate goṭa Bason disạm. Niạ do tahẽkana Basonren raj Ogakʼ goṭa rajosṭi. Ona modre tahẽkana Jayir reakʼ joto atoko, metakʼme turui gel atoko," 
Joshua13:30  
Joshua13:31 Gilead reakʼ adha jaega ar Astarot ar Edreyi nagraha. Niạ banar nagraha khon Basoren raj Og doe rajokʼkan tahẽkana. Niạ jaegakin do Manaseren hopon Makirren adha hoṛkoren judạ judạ bõskoko emocolena. 
Joshua13:32 Mose do Jordan hanasare Jerikho reakʼ purub secʼ Moab reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire ona jaega do sompotti lekateye hạṭińatʼko tahẽkana. 
Joshua13:33 Menkhan uni do Liwi gusṭirenko oka sompotti hõ bae ematʼkoa; onko ṭhen Probhu Isor okae gokʼletʼ ona lekage Israelren Probhu Isorge onkoren sompottiye tahẽkana. 
Joshua14:1 Eṭakʼ Israelko do Kanan disạmre sompotti lekate jaega jumiko ńamkeda. Naeke Eliaser, Nunren hopon Josuạ ar Israelren judạ judạ gusṭi ar gharońjren mukhiyạko do onako hạṭińatʼkoa." 
Joshua14:2 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete okae hukumletʼ onkage Israelkoren are tala gusṭiko modre gulibãṭkate sompottiko hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Joshua14:3 Ar barea tala gusṭirenko Mose do laharege jordan purub secʼre sompottiye ematʼko tahẽkana, menkhan Israelko talare Liwi gusṭiko do jãhãn sompotti bae ematʼkoa." 
Joshua14:4 Manase ar Ephrayim ńutuman Josephren hoponkin hotete barea gusṭi benaolena. Liwiko do jumi reakʼ bhag bako ńamleda, menkhan girobasokʼ lạgitʼ ar jinisko dohoy lạgitʼ adom adom atoko, nagrahako ar gại-ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi merom ạtińko lạgitʼ beṛhaeteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ńamkeda." 
Joshua14:5 Probhu Isor do Mose cetʼleka hukumade tahẽkan onkage Israelko do disạmko hạṭińana. 
Joshua14:6 Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do Gilgalte Josuạ ṭhenko senena ar Kenisi Jephunren hopon Kaleb do uniye metadea, “Probhu Isor do Kades-Barneare acʼren hoṛ Mose ṭhen iń ar am reaṅ okae menletʼ ona dom baḍaegea." 
Joshua14:7 Probhu Isorren guti Mose do disạm cikʼyạ ạgui lạgitʼ tinre Kades-Barnear khone kolledińa unre ińakʼ umer do pongel bochor tahẽkana. Ar iń do disạm ńelkate okań bujhạu daṛeakʼ tahẽkan onalekage uni ṭhen sombatiń idiletʼa," 
Joshua14:8 menkhan okoe boehako iń sãoteko senlen onko do hoṛkoko as chuṭạuletʼkoa. Menkhan iń do ińren Probhu Isorakʼ katha purạteń manao ạguakada. 
Joshua14:9 Ona iạte Mose enhilokʼ iń ṭhen okae gokʼletʼ tahẽkan, ‘am okaṭakʼ jaegam ńel ạguakatʼ ona do jaejug lạgitʼ am ar amren bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti lekatege tahena, ente am do ińren Probhu Isorakʼ katha purạtem manao ạguakada.’" 
Joshua14:10 “Buluṅ doreãore tinre Israelko doko ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor do Mose noa kathae metade tahẽkan ar un khon uniyakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate niạ pongel mõṛẽ bochor iń do jiwetʼe dohoakadińạ, ar ńitokʼ ińakʼ umer do irạl gel mõṛẽ bochor hoyakantińạ." 
Joshua14:11 Mose oka hilokʼe kollediń enhilokʼ leka teheń hạbicʼ hõ daṛege minạńa; ar ńitokʼ hõ lạṛhại calakʼ ar sanamakʼ kạmi reakʼ daṛe menakʼgetińạ. 
Joshua14:12 Nokʼõe noa buru ṭoṭha enhilokʼ emokʼ reakʼe gokʼạdiń tahẽkana ńit ona baṛe imạńme. Unre amem ańjomleda, Ananikiko do onḍeko girobasokʼ kana ar onkoakʼ nagraha do maraṅgea ar beṛhaete pạcri esetʼgetakoa. Menkhan Probhu Isor iń sãoteye tahen khan uniyakʼ katha lekage onkoń laga ńirkoa.”" 
Joshua14:13 Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do Jephunren hopon Kalebe bhoradea ar sompotti lekate Hebron nagrahae emadea. 
Joshua14:14 Ar enhilokʼ khon Hebron do Kenisiren Jephun hopon Kalebakʼ ạidạrire menakʼa, ente uni do Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ katha purạteye manaoleda." 
Joshua14:15 Ananikiko modre Arbo ńutuman mitʼṭen ektiạran hoṛakʼ ńutum leka Hebron do lahate Kiriạt-Arbako metakʼkan tahẽkana. Inạ tayom disạmre lạṛhại do thir akan tahẽkana. 
Joshua15:1 Gulibãṭ lekate Jihudạ gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko oka jaegako ńamketʼ ona reakʼ simạna do Edom disạm reakʼ simạna hạbicʼ, metakʼme Sin hahaṅkar reakʼ dạkhin simạ hạbicʼ calao idiyena." 
Joshua15:2 Onkoakʼ dạkhin reakʼ simạna dag do buluṅ doreão dạkhin aṛe reakʼ huḍiń doreão khon ehopʼkate Akrabimte rakapʼ calakʼ hor reakʼ dạkhin secʼ paromkate Sin hahaṅkar secʼte Kades-Barnear reakʼ dạkhinte calao akana. Onḍe khon ona simạna dag do Hesron paromkate Adar hạbicʼ senente Karkate ạcur calaoena. 
Joshua15:3  
Joshua15:4 Onḍe khon Asmon secʼ sen idiyente Misor ńutuman okaṭakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa menakʼ ona sãote mitʼente jalapurire senkate mucạtʼena. Ar niạge hoyena apeakʼ dạkhin reakʼ simạna do. 
Joshua15:5 Purub senakʼ simạna do hoyokʼ kana buluṅ doreão secʼ senakan jordan gaḍa dul mitʼakan hạbicʼ. Jordan gaḍa okare buluṅ doreãote senkate dul mitʼakan ar onḍe okaṭakʼ huḍiń doreão menakʼ onḍe khon utạr seakʼ simạna dag do ehopʼkate Beth-holga hạbicʼ senkate Beth-Araba reakʼ utạr secʼ lekate Rubenren hopon Bohanakʼ dhiri hạbicʼ sen idiyena. 
Joshua15:6  
Joshua15:7 Ar ona do Akor tapol khon Debir hạbicʼ rakapʼ calaoente utạr secʼakʼ lodam reakʼ dạkhin reakʼ Adumimte rakapʼ calakʼ hor reakʼ samaṅ secʼ Gilgal hạbicʼ sen idiyena. Ar Gilgal khon En-Semser reakʼ ạtukʼkan dakʼ hạbicʼ sen idiyente ona do En-Rogel ṭhen mucạtʼena. 
Joshua15:8 Onḍe khon ona do Jebusikoakʼ nagraha reakʼ, metakʼme Jerusalem reakʼ dạkhin dhasnako reakʼ jaega hạbicʼ senkate Ben-Hinom buru muthnite rakapʼ calaoena. Ar onḍe khon simạna do Rephayim tapol reakʼ utạr simạna reakʼ Hinom tapol reakʼ pạchimre okaṭakʼ buru menakʼ onḍe hạbicʼ rakapʼena." 
Joshua15:9 Ona tayom simạna do buru cetan khon Nephto reakʼ dakʼ jharna secʼ calao idiyena. Onḍe khon Ephron buru reakʼ atoko sorte oḍok senkate Bala secʼ, metakʼme Kiriat-Jearim secʼ pheḍ hecʼena." 
Joshua15:10 Ar Bala khon pạchim secʼ ạcurente ona do Seyir buru secʼ rakapʼ calaoena; ona tayom do Jearim buru, metakʼme Kesalon utạr reakʼ dhasna secʼ senkate Bet-Semseste pheḍ hecʼente Timna hạbicʼ calaoena." 
Joshua15:11 Ona tayom ona simạna do Ekron utạr reakʼ dhasna secʼ senkate Sikron secʼ ạcurente sojhe Bala buru secʼ calao idiyena ar Jabneyel seṭerkate jalapuri hạbicʼ mucạtʼena. 
Joshua15:12 Pạchim secʼ reakʼ simạ do hoyokʼkana jalapuri aṛe. Niạ do hoyokʼ kana Jihudạ gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ jaega reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ simạna. 
Joshua15:13 Josuạ do Probhu Isore hukumletʼ lekage Jephunren hopon Kaleb do Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega talare Kiriạt-Arba, metakʼme Hebron nagrahae ematʼko tahẽkana. Arba do Anakikoren hapṛame tahẽkana." 
Joshua15:14 Kaleb do Sesae, Ahiman ar Talmae ńutuman pea Anakiko Hebron khone laga ńirketʼkoa. Noko do Anakren hoponko tahẽkana." 
Joshua15:15 Onḍe khon Kaleb do Debir nagraharen hoṛko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe calaoena. Lahate Debir reakʼ ńutum do Kiriạt-Sepher tahẽkana. 
Joshua15:16 Kaleb doe menleda, “Jãhãege Kiriạt-Sephere hat, uni sãotege ińren hoponera Aksa doń baplakaea.”" 
Joshua15:17 Niạ katha ańjomkate Kenas hopon Kaleb bokot Othniyel do onae hatkeda. Ar onate Kaleb do Othniyel sãote acʼren hoponerae baplakadea. 
Joshua15:18 Othniyel ṭhen sen tayom uni do Aksae uskạukedea jemon apat ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ jumiye hatao. Ar gadha khon Aksae pheḍen khan Kaleb do uniye kulikedea, “E biṭi, cetʼem khojkana?”" 
Joshua15:19 Uniye menkeda, “E baba, ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha dohoytińme. Am do tinre Negeb hahaṅkar jaegam emakana unre dakʼ jharnako hõ imạńme.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Kaleb do onḍenakʼ usul ar latar jaega reakʼ dakʼ jharnakoe emadea." 
Joshua15:20 Jihudạ gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko okaṭakʼ sompottiko emocoyen ona do hoyokʼ kana- 
Joshua15:21 Edom sor reakʼ Negebre onkoakʼ ṭoṭha reakʼ dạkhinre okaṭakʼ nagraha ar atoko ńamletʼ onako reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana; Kobsel, Edar, Jagor," 
Joshua15:22 Kena, Dimona, Adad," 
Joshua15:23 Kedes, Hasor, Ethnan," 
Joshua15:24 Seph, Telem, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 Hasor-hadatta, Kiriot-Herson, metakʼme Hasor," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, Molada, Hasor-Gada, Hesmon, Bet-Pelot, Hasar-Sual, Berseba, Bisiatea," 
Joshua15:27  
Joshua15:28  
Joshua15:29 Bala, Eyim, Esam, Eltelad, Kosil, Horma, Siklag, Madmana ar Sonsana," 
Joshua15:30  
Joshua15:31  
Joshua15:32 Lebat, Silhim, Ayin ar Remon. Jotote bargel are goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍe pase atokoko ńamletʼ tahẽkana." 
Joshua15:33 Latar buru ṭoṭhako modre okako nagraha ar atokoko ńamletʼ onako do hoyokʼ kana: Estaol, Sora, Asna," 
Joshua15:34 Sanao, En-ganim, Tapua, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Soko, Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 Saryim, Adithayim, Gedera ar Gederthayim. Niạ gelpon goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Hadesa, Megdal-Gad, Dilian, Mispe, Joktheyel, Lakis, Boskat, Eglon," 
Joshua15:38  
Joshua15:39  
Joshua15:40 Kobon, Lohmam, Ketlis," 
Joshua15:41 Goderot, Bet-Dagon, Nama ar Makeda. Niạ gel turui goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Ethar, Asan, Ephta, Asna, Netsib, Kiyila, Aksib ar Maresa. Niạ are goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:43  
Joshua15:44  
Joshua15:45 Ekron nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ jaega ar atoko," 
Joshua15:46 Ekron pạchim secʼ Asdad reakʼ sanam atoko," 
Joshua15:47 Asdad ar ona aḍepase reakʼ jaega ar atoko, Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa ar jalapuri aṛe reakʼ Gasa ar ona aḍepase reakʼ sanam jaega ar onako atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:48 Usul buru ṭoṭhako modre okako nagrahako ńamletʼ onako do hoyokʼ kana: Samir, Jatir, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriạt-Sana, metakʼme Debir," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Estemo, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gosen, Holon ar Gilo. Niạ gelmitʼ goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Duma, Esan, Janim, Bet-Tapua, Apeka, Humta, Kiriat-Arba, metakʼme Hebron ar Seyir. Niạ are goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:53  
Joshua15:54  
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Siph, Juta, Jisrayel, Jokdeam, Sanoah, Kayin, Gibea ar Timna. Niạ gel goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:56  
Joshua15:57  
Joshua15:58 Halhul, Bet-Sur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Mirat, Bet-Anot ar Eltekon. Nia turui goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-Bakʼal, metakʼme Kiriat-Jearim ar Raba. Niạ barea nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:61 Hahaṅkar ṭoṭhare okako jaegako ńamletʼ onako do hoyokʼkana. Bet-Araba, Midin, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsan, Ermelah ar En-Gedi. Niạ turui goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua15:63 Jihudạ gusṭi do menkhan Jebusiko bako laga ńir daṛeatʼkoa. Jebusiko do Jerusalemren hoṛko tahẽkana. Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko sãote Jibusiko do teheń hạbicʼ onḍeko girobasokʼkana. 
Joshua16:1 Gulibãṭ lekate Joseph gusṭiren hoṛko oka jaegako ńamketʼ ona reakʼ simạna do hoyokʼ kana Jerikho samaṅ senakʼ Jerikho dakʼ jharna purub secʼ reakʼ jordan gaḍa hạbicʼ. Ona tayom simạna do hahaṅkar talate senkate Bethel reakʼ buru ṭoṭha secʼ rakapʼ calaoena. 
Joshua16:2 Bethel khon ona do Luste senena ar Lus khon Atarotte Arkikoakʼ jaega hạbicʼ. 
Joshua16:3 Ona tayom simạna do pạchim secʼ pheḍ hecʼente latar reakʼ Bet-Horon ṭoṭha hạbicʼ Jophletkoakʼ elakate senkate onḍe khon Geser hạbicʼ calaoena ar jalapurire senkate mucạtʼena. 
Joshua16:4 Josephren hopon Manase ar Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko do niạko sompottigeko ńamkeda. 
Joshua16:5 Ephrayim gusṭiren judạ judạ bõskoakʼ jaega do hoyokʼ kana: purub secʼ onkoakʼ sompotti reakʼ simạna do Atarot-Adar khon ehopʼkate cetan reakʼ Bet-Horonte senkate jalapuri hạbicʼ calaoena. Ona tayom utạr secʼte ona simạna do Mikmathot khon ạcurkate purub secʼ Tanot-Silo paromkate Jano purub secʼ calaoena. 
Joshua16:6  
Joshua16:7 Jano khon ona do pheḍ hecʼente Atarot ar Nara secʼte Jerikho reakʼ simạna aṛete jordan gaḍa hạbicʼ senena. 
Joshua16:8 Utạr reakʼ simạna do Tapua khon pạchim secʼ rohoṛ gaḍa Kana secʼte jalapurire mucạtʼ akana. Niạ do hoyokʼ kana Ephrayim gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti. 
Joshua16:9 Ona chaḍa Manase gusṭi reakʼ sompottiko reakʼ thoṛagan nagraha ar onko aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Ephrayim gusṭirenko ńamletʼ tahẽkana. 
Joshua16:10 Geserre okoe Kananiko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan onko do bako laga ńirletʼkoa. Onate teheń hạbicʼ hõ onko do Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko sãoteko girobasokʼkana; tobe Ephrayim gusṭiren guti lekate onko do begari kạmi lạgitʼ golamko hoyakana. 
Joshua17:1 Manase do Josephren maraṅicʼ hopone tahẽkante gulibãṭ hotete uniren gusṭiko hõ mitʼṭecʼ jaegako emocolena. Manaseren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Makir. Makir do Gileadren apate tahẽkana. Makir do mitʼṭen maraṅ birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkante Gilead ar Bason reakʼ ạidạri do laharegeye ńamakatʼ tahẽkana. 
Joshua17:2 Menkhan Manase gusṭiren sarecʼ bõsren hoṛko, metakʼme Abieser, Helek, Asriyel, Sikem, Hepher ar Semida bõsren hoṛko do Kanan disạm reakʼ jaega jumiko emoco akan tahẽkana. Bõsko secʼ khon nokoge Josephren hopon Manaseren sarecʼ hoponko tahẽkana." 
Joshua17:3 Manaseren hopon Makir, Makirren hopon Gilead, Gileadren hopon Hepher ar Hepherren hopon Selophad. Selophadren do eken kuṛi hoponko tahẽkana, koṛa hopon do baṅa. Onko kuṛikoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Mahla, Noyah, Hogla, Milkạ ar Tirsa." 
Joshua17:4 Noko kuṛiko do naeke Eliaser ar Nunren hopon Josuạ ar murubbiko ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Aleakʼ gusṭiren hoṛko talare ale hõ sompotti reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hĩs emale lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do Moseye hukumade tahẽkana.” Noa katha ańjomkate Josuạ do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka onkoren apatren boehako sãote onkoakʼ sompotti reakʼ ạidạriye ematʼkoa." 
Joshua17:5 Jordan reakʼ purub secʼ Gilead ar Bason chaḍa hõ Manase gusṭirenko do hạṭińre arhõ gel goṭecʼ jumiko ńamkeda," 
Joshua17:6 Ente Manase gusṭiren noko kuṛiko do ako gusṭiren koṛa hoponko sãote sompotti reakʼ ạidạriko ńamkeda; ar Manase gusṭiren sarecʼ bõsko do Gilead ṭoṭhako ńamkeda. 
Joshua17:7 Manase gusṭikoakʼ simạna do Aser khon ehopʼkate Sikem ṭhenakʼ Mikmithat hạbicʼ senena. Ar ona tayom do dạkhin secʼ sen idiyena, onate En-Tapuaren hoṛko do Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ elakakore paṛaoena." 
Joshua17:8 Tapua reakʼ aḍepase jaegako do Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ hạṭińrege paṛaolena menkhan Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ simạna sãote ropokʼ mitʼakan Tapua nagraha do Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ ạidạrire paṛaoena. 
Joshua17:9 Ona tayom ona simạna do dạkhin Kana reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa hạbicʼ pheḍ hecʼena. Ephrayim gusṭiko reakʼ adomakʼ ato ar nagrahako do Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ simạnare paṛao akan tahẽkana. Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ simạna do rohoṛ gaḍa utạr secʼte senkate jalapurire mucạtʼena. 
Joshua17:10 Ephrayem gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega do rohoṛ gaḍa dạkhinre tahẽkana ar utạrre do tahẽkana Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega. Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ pạchim senakʼ simạna do jalapuri hạbicʼ, ar utạr secʼ reakʼ do Asren gusṭikoakʼ simạna hạbicʼ ar purub secʼ do Isakar gusṭiko reakʼ simạna hạbicʼ tahẽkana." 
Joshua17:11 Isakar ar Asren gusṭikoakʼ simạna tala reakʼ Betʼ-Sean, Iblean ar onako aḍepase reakʼ sanam atoko do Manase gusṭirenkoko emoco akan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Dorren, En-Dorren, Tanak ar Magidoren hoṛko sudhạ niạko nagraha ar onako aḍeparen sanam atoko Manase gusṭirenko emocoakan tahẽkana. Ar mucạtʼ secʼ reakʼ pea nagraha ar onako sãoteakʼ atoko do buru ṭoṭhare tahẽkana." 
Joshua17:12 Menkhan Manase gusṭiren hoṛko do onako ato ar nagrahako bako hat daṛeada, ente Kananiko doko khạṭi akawan tahẽkana, ona jaega do bako bạgiyakʼa." 
Joshua17:13 Tobe Israelko tinreko daṛe idiyena unre Kananiko do akoren golam lekate kạmi lạgitʼko sapʼpaṭetʼketʼkoa. Ar disạm khon do bako laga ńirletʼkoa. 
Joshua17:14 Joseph gusṭiren hoṛko do senkate Josuạko metadea, “Sompotti lekate cedakʼ am do eken mitʼ hạṭińem ematʼlea? Probhu Isorakʼ ạsirbad iạte aleakʼ lekha do ḍhergetalea.”" 
Joshua17:15 Josuạ do roṛ ruạṛatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Aperen hoṛko lekhare nunạkʼko ḍherge khan ar Ephrayim buru ṭoṭhare bape sahobokʼkan khan tobe do Pherisiko ar Rephiyikoakʼ disạm reakʼ bir gajaṛko makʼ saphakate jumiko benao joṅpe.”" 
Joshua17:16 Joseph gusṭiren hoṛko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Buru reakʼ onako jaegare ale do bale sahobokʼa ar okoe Kananiko bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ Bet-Sean ar ona aḍepase atokore ar Jisreyel lodamreko girobasokʼ kan onko sanamko do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍiko menakʼtakoa.”" 
Joshua17:17 Josuạ do Josephren bõsko, metakʼme Ephrayim ar Manase gusṭiren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Aperen hoṛ hõko saṅgegea, ar daṛe hõ ḍhergetapea. Ape do eken mitʼṭecʼ hạṭiń do bape ńama." 
Joshua17:18 Bir-gajaṛte perecʼ buru ṭoṭhako hõpe ńama. Ona makʼ saphae hoyokʼtapea. Gajaṛ ar ona sãoteakʼ sanam jumiko do apeakʼ ạidạrire tahena. Kananikoakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍi tahẽlenre hõ arko daṛegere hõ ape do onkope laga ńir daṛeakoa. 
Joshua18:1 “Ar Israel hoponko do Silote senkateko jarwayena ar ńapamokʼ tạmbuko beretʼkeda. Goṭa disạmge Israelko tabere hecʼenre hõ onkoren eae gusṭiren hoṛko do unhõ sompotti bako ńamakatʼ tahẽkana.” 
Joshua18:2  
Joshua18:3 Onate Josuạ do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ disạm sompotti lekateye emakawatʼpe ona hat lạgitʼ do ar tinạkʼpe biloma?" 
Joshua18:4 Ape do mimitʼ gusṭiko khon pepe hoṛkate bachaokope. Onko do jemon mońjte disạm ńelkateko ol ạgui ar iń do onkoń kolkoa jemon akoakʼ gusṭirenko sompottiko hạṭiń daṛeako. Ar kạmi sạt baṛakate iń ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼ. 
Joshua18:5 Onko do goṭa disạm eae ṭhenko hạṭińa. Ar dạkhin secʼ Jihudạ gusṭirenko oka jaegako emocoakan onko do onḍegeko tahena, ar utạr secʼ do Josephren bõsrenkoge." 
Joshua18:6 Disạm reakʼ ona eae hạṭiń reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ babotre jotowakʼ olkate iń ṭhenpe ạguiya, ar iń do aboren Probhu Isor samaṅre ape lạgitʼ iń gulibãṭa." 
Joshua18:7 Tobe Liwiko do ape sãote jãhãn hạṭiń bako ńama, ente Probhu Isorren naeke lekate sekʼwa kạmi kangea onkoakʼ sompotti do. Gad ar Ruben gusṭiren hoṛko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko do laharege jordan gaḍa purub secʼre akoakʼ sompottiko ńamakada. Probhu Isorren guti Mosege ona do onkoe emakawatʼkoa.”" 
Joshua18:8 Ar hoṛko do disạm reaṅ jotowakʼ olkate ạgui lạgitʼko oḍok calakʼkan tahẽkanre Josuạ do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Senkate disạm do mońjte jotowakʼ ńelpe ar olkate iń ṭhen ạguiype. Ar ona tayom do nonḍe Silorege, Probhu Isor samaṅre ape lạgitʼ iń gulibãṭa.”" 
Joshua18:9 Onate onko hoṛ do disạm reakʼ sanam jaegateko calaoena. Onko do disạm reakʼ sarecʼ hĩs eae ṭhenko hạṭińketʼte mimitʼ hạṭiń reakʼ nagraha ar atoko reakʼ ńutum ar onko reaṅ jotowakʼ mitʼ mitʼte olkate Silo reakʼ ḍerate Josuạ ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼena. 
Joshua18:10 Josuạ do Silore Probhu Isor samaṅre Israelko lạgitʼe gulibãṭkeda ar onkoakʼ gusṭi lekate disạm do onḍeye hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Joshua18:11 Gulibãṭkate Benjamin gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena. Ar ona gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsko do oka jaega ematʼko ona do gulibãṭ lekate Jihudạ ar Joseph gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega talare paṛaoena. 
Joshua18:12 Utạr secʼ onkoakʼ jumi reakʼ simạna do jordan gaḍa khon ehopʼkate Jerikho reakʼ utạr senakʼ dhasna paromkate pạchim senakʼ buru ṭoṭha talate senkate Bet-Awen hahaṅkar hạbicʼ sen idiyena. 
Joshua18:13 Onḍe khon simạna do Lus, metakʼme Bethel dạkhin reakʼ dhasna secʼte senkate latar Bet-Horon reakʼ dạkhinre okaṭakʼ buru menakʼ ona buru cetan reakʼ Atarot-Adarte pheḍ calaoena." 
Joshua18:14 Ona tayom ona simạna do Bet-Horon dạkhin buru reakʼ pạchim secʼte senkate dạkhin secʼ ạcur calaoena ar Kiriot-Bakʼal, metakʼme Kiriot-Jearim hạbicʼ calao idiyena. Kiriot-Jearim do tahẽkana Jihudạ gusṭikoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha. Noa do hoyokʼ kana Benjamin gusṭirenkoakʼ pạchim senakʼ simạna." 
Joshua18:15 Onkoakʼ dạkhin reakʼ simạna do pạchim Kiriot-Jearim reakʼ simạna khon ehopʼkate Nepthoah reakʼ dakʼ jharna hạbicʼ calaoena. 
Joshua18:16 Ona tayom ona simạna do Rephayim lodam utạr reakʼ Ben-Hinom lodam samaṅ reakʼ buru latar hạbicʼ pheḍ calaoena. Ona tayom ona do Hinom lodam talate senkate Jebusikoakʼ nagraha dạkhin secʼ reakʼ dhasnakote senkate En-Rogel hạbicʼ calao idiyena. 
Joshua18:17 Ona tayom ona simạna do utạr secʼ ạcur calaoente En-Semes secʼte Adumimte rakapʼ calakʼ hor samaṅ reakʼ Gelilotte senkate Rubenren hopon Bohanakʼ dhiri hạbicʼ pheḍ hecʼena. 
Joshua18:18 Ona tayom ona do Araba utạr reakʼ dhasnakote senkate Arabate pheḍ calaoena. 
Joshua18:19 Ona tayom ona simạna do Bet-Hogla utạr reakʼ dhasna secʼte buluṅ doreão utạr reakʼ doreãore, metakʼme jordan gaḍare dul mitʼena. Ona do tahẽkana Benjạmin gusṭirenkoakʼ dạkhin secʼ reakʼ simạna." 
Joshua18:20 Onkoakʼ purub secʼ reakʼ simạna do tahẽkana jordan gaḍa. Ar noage Benjamin gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ simạna tahẽkana. 
Joshua18:21 Benjamin gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ hạṭińre oka ato ar nagrahako paṛaolen onako do hoyokʼ kana, Bet-Hogla, Emek-Kesis," 
Joshua18:22 Bet-Araba, Semarayim, Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 Awim, Para, Ophra," 
Joshua18:24 Kephar-Amoni, Ophni ar Geba. Onko do niạ gelbar goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ sanam atokoko ńamleda." 
Joshua18:25 Ona chaḍa onko do Gibeon, Rama, Be-Erot," 
Joshua18:26 Mispa, Kephira, Mosa, Rekem, Irpeyel, Tarala, Sela, Ha-Eleph, Jebusikoakʼ nagraha Jerusalem, Gibea ar Kiriotko ńamleda. Onko do jotote gel pon goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ joto atokoko ńamkeda." 
Joshua18:27  
Joshua18:28  
Joshua19:1 Dosar dhaoe gulibãṭketʼ khan Simeon gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar uniyakʼ judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ jaegako ṭhikkeda. Onkoakʼ sompotti do Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega talare paṛaoena. 
Joshua19:2 Simeon gosṭirenkoakʼ sompotti talare do Ber-Seba, Seba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hasa-Sual, Bala, Esem, Eltolad, Bethul, Horma, Siklag, Bet-Markabot, Hasar-Susa," 
Joshua19:4  
Joshua19:5  
Joshua19:6 Bet-Lebaot ar Saruhen ńutuman gelpe nagraha ar onako aḍepase reakʼ sanam atokoko ńamkeda. 
Joshua19:7 Ona chaḍa Ayin-Rimon, Ethar ar Asan ńutuman ponea nagraha ar onako aḍepase reakʼ joto atoko ar Bakʼalat-Ber, metakʼme Negeb reakʼ Rama hạbicʼ onako nagraha beṛhaeteakʼ eṭakʼ sanam atokoko ńamkeda. Niạ do hoyokʼ kana Simeon gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti." 
Joshua19:8  
Joshua19:9 Onako sompotti do Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ bakhra khon hatao hoylena, ente Jihudạ gusṭirenko do jạruṛako khon hõ bạ̃ṛti jaega akoakʼ hạṭińre paṛaolena. Onate Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega talare Simeon gusṭirenko do jaegako ńamleda." 
Joshua19:10 Tesar dhaoe gulibãṭketʼ khan Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar onkoren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ jaegako ṭhikatʼkoa. Onkoakʼ jaega reakʼ simạna do tahẽkana Sarid hạbicʼ. 
Joshua19:11 Onḍe khon simạna do pạchim secʼte Marala hạbicʼ rakapʼ senente Debeset secʼte Jokneam ṭhenakʼ ạtukʼ dakʼ ṭhen bhiṛạuena. 
Joshua19:12 Ona simạna do Sarid khon purub secʼ ạcurente Kislot-tabor ato hạbicʼ calaoena ar ona tayom do Daberat secʼte Saphiate rakapʼ calaoena. 
Joshua19:13 Ona tayom ona simạna do purub secʼte Gat-Hepher ar Et-kasin hạbicʼ sen idiyena. Ona tayom ona do Neah secʼ ạcurente Remonte senena ar Remon reakʼ utạr secʼ ạcurente Hanathonte calaoena ar Eptha-El lodamre oḍokena. 
Joshua19:14  
Joshua19:15 Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ jaegare do tahẽkana Katat, Nahalal, Simron, Idala ar Betlehem. Onkoakʼ bakhrare do gelbar goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko paṛaoena." 
Joshua19:16 Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Sebulon gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti hoyena. 
Joshua19:17 Ponakʼ dhaoko gulibãṭketʼ khan Isakar gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar onkoren judạ judạ bõsrenko jaegako ṭhikatʼkoa. 
Joshua19:18 Onkoakʼ jaegare do paṛaoena, Jisreyel, Kesulot, Sunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hapharayim, Shion, Anaharat, Rabit, Kision, Ebes, Remet, En-Galim, En-hada ar Bet-Pasea." 
Joshua19:20  
Joshua19:21  
Joshua19:22 Onkoakʼ jaega reakʼ simạna do Tabor, Sahasuma ar Bet-Semes secʼte jordan gaḍare senkate mucạtʼena. Onko do gel turui goṭecʼ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ sanam atokoko ńamkeda." 
Joshua19:23 Niạko nagraha ar onako aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Isakar gusṭiren judạ judạ bõskoakʼ sompotti hoyena. 
Joshua19:24 Mõṛẽ dhaoko gulibãṭketʼ khan Aser gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar onkoren judạ judạ bõsrenko jaegako ṭhikatʼkoa. 
Joshua19:25 Onkoakʼ jaegare do paṛaoena Helkat, Hali, Beten, Aksaph," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelek, Amad ar Misal. Pạchim secʼ onkoakʼ jaega reakʼ simạna do Karmel buru ar Sihor-Libnat secʼte purub nakha ạcurente Bet-Dagon secʼ calaoena ar Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ ṭoṭha ar Ephtah lodam secʼte Kabul leṅga ti secʼte utạr secʼ Bet-Emek ar Neyiel hạbicʼ calaoena." 
Joshua19:27  
Joshua19:28 Ona tayom ona simạna do Ebron, Rehob, Hamon ar Kana secʼte maraṅ Sidon hạbicʼ calao idiyena." 
Joshua19:29 Ona tayom ona simạna do Rama secʼ ạcur calaoente pạcri esetʼ Tur nagrahate boloyena. Ona tayom Hosa secʼ ạcur calaoente Aksib ṭoṭha, Uma, Aphek ar Rahob jalapuri hạbicʼ senena. Aser gusṭirenkoakʼ hạṭińre do bargel bar nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko paṛaoena." 
Joshua19:30  
Joshua19:31 Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Aser gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti hoyena. 
Joshua19:32 Turuiyakʼ gulibãṭre do Napthali gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar onaren judạ judạ bõsrenko jaegako ṭhikatʼkoa. 
Joshua19:33 Onkoakʼ jaega reakʼ simạna do Helep ar Sakʼananim reakʼ Elon dare khon ehopʼkate Adami-Nekeb ar Jabniyel paromkate Lakum hạbicʼ sen idiyena ar jordan gaḍa hạbicʼ calaoena. 
Joshua19:34 Ona tayom ona simạna do pạchim secʼte senkate Asnot-Tabor talate senkate Hukokte sen idiyena. Dạkhin Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ simạna hạbicʼ, pạchim secʼ do Aser gusṭirenkoakʼ simạna hạbicʼ ar purub secʼ do jordan gaḍa ṭhenakʼ Jihudạ hạbicʼ Napthali gusṭirenkoakʼ simạna tahẽkana." 
Joshua19:35 Onkoakʼ jaegako modre pạcrite esetʼ noako ato hõ tahẽkana: Sidim, Ser, Hamat, Rakat, Kineret," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Hasor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedes, Edreyi, En-Hasor," 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdal-El, Horem, Bet-anat ar Bet-Semes. Gel are nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do onkoakʼ hạṭińre paṛaoena." 
Joshua19:39 Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Napthali gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti hoyena. 
Joshua19:40 Eaeakʼ gulibãṭ hoyen khan Dan gusṭirenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena ar onaren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ jaegako ṭhikatʼkoa. 
Joshua19:41 Onkoakʼ sompotti modre Sora, Estaol, Ir-semes," 
Joshua19:42 Salabin, Aijalon, Itla, Elon, Timna, Ekron, Elteke, Gibethon, Balat," 
Joshua19:43  
Joshua19:44  
Joshua19:45 Jihud, Bene-Berek, Gat-rimon," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon, Rakon ar Jopa samaṅ reakʼ ṭoṭhako paṛaoena." 
Joshua19:47 Dan gusṭirenko do akoakʼ joto bakhra bako hat daṛeatʼ tahẽkante onko lạgitʼ jaega do huḍińge tahẽkana. Onate onko do Lesem nagrahako akromonketʼte onḍenko hoṛko bhagaoketʼkoa ar sanamko gocʼketʼkote onako hatkeda. Ar onko do Lesemre girobasokʼko ehopʼena ar onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ ńutum lekate ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do “Dan” ko dohokeda. 
Joshua19:48 Niạko nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko do Dan gusṭiren judạ judạ bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti hoyena. 
Joshua19:49 Disạmko hạṭiń sạtketʼ khan Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Nunren hopon Josuạ lạgitʼ disạmre mitʼṭecʼ sompottiko dohokeda. Onko do Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega talare buru ṭoṭha reakʼ timnat-Sera atoko emadea. Uni do ona atogeye khojletʼ tahẽkana. Ar nãwãte benaokate Josuạ do onḍege girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Joshua19:50  
Joshua19:51 Naeke Eleasar, Nunren hopon Josuạ ar Israelkoren judạ judạ gusṭiren mathako do Silore ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen Probhu Isor samaṅre gulibãṭkate niạko jaega Israelkoko ṭhik dohowatʼkoa. Ar nonkate onko do disạm hạṭiń reakʼ kạmiko sạtkeda." 
Joshua20:1 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Josuại metadea," 
Joshua20:2 “Israelkom metakoa, ‘Mose hotete okań hukum akatʼme ona leka jemon onko do asrayokʼ nagrahako benaojoṅ." 
Joshua20:3 Jãhãe ackage se khũn reakʼ monsubạ baṅkate jãhãeye gocʼle khan enḍekhan uni do onḍeye ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa ar mãyãm reakʼ okoeye halae uniyakʼ ti khon rukhiyại ńama. 
Joshua20:4 Uni do niạko asrayokʼ nagraha reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen senkate onḍenko murubbiko acʼakʼ joto kathae lạiyakoa. Ar ona tayom do nagrahareko bolo ocoaea ar tahen lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegako emaea. 
Joshua20:5 Ar mãyãm halayicʼ uniye khudạu ạgulere hõ khũn akatʼ hoṛ do uni ṭhen bako jimạyea, ente uni do goje reakʼ monsubạ baṅ tahẽkantaea se hiskạ hõ baṅ tahẽkantaea." 
Joshua20:6 Uni do bicạr bạisire ạuriye teṅgokʼ hạbicʼ ar un okteren maraṅ naeke ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ ona asrayokʼ nagraharege tahen hoyokʼtaea. Ar inạ tayom do oka khone ńir paskao hecʼlen onḍe acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼa.’ ” 
Joshua20:7 Ona iạte Israelko do asrayokʼ nagraha lekate Napthali gusṭirenko do buru ṭoṭhare menakʼ Gạlil reakʼ Kedesre, Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ do buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Sikemre ar Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ do buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Kiriat-Arbare, metakʼme Hebron doko begar dohokeda." 
Joshua20:8 Jerikho samaṅ jordan gaḍa reakʼ purub secʼ Ruben gusṭirenkoakʼ do bilạn ṭạnḍi hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ Beserre, Gad gusṭirenkoakʼ do Gilead reakʼ Ramotre ar Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ do Bason reakʼ Golanre asrayokʼ lạgitʼ nagrahako ṭhikkeda." 
Joshua20:9 Jãhãe Israel hoponko se onko talareko girobasokʼkan eṭakʼ jãhãn jạtrenko ackage jãhãeye goje enḍekhan uni do onako nagraha reakʼ jãhãṭakʼ mitʼṭecʼte senkateye ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa. Ar mãyãm halayicʼ do bạisire khũniạhiyakʼ bicạr ạuri hoyokʼtae hạbicʼ bae gocʼ daṛeaea. 
Joshua21:1 Liwi gusṭiren mathako do naeke Eleasar, Nunren hopon Josuạ ar Israelkoren judạ judạ bõsren mathako ṭhenko senena." 
Joshua21:2 Onko do Kanan disạm reakʼ Silore onkoko metatʼkoa, “Ale girobasokʼ ar aleren ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ato beṛhaeteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko em hạṭińale lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do Mose hoteteye hukum akawatʼpea.”" 
Joshua21:3 Onate Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekate Israelko do akoakʼ sompotti khon adomakʼ ato ar ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ematʼkoa. 
Joshua21:4 Adoko gulibãṭketʼ khan pạhilre Kohat bõsrenkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena. Noko Liwiko modre okoe do naeke Aron bõsrenko tahẽkan onko do Jihudạ, Simeon ar Benjamin gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon gelpe goṭecʼ ato ar nagrahako ńamkeda." 
Joshua21:5 Kohat bõsren sarecʼ hoṛko do Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon ar onko adha gusṭi metakʼme Dan ar Manase gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon gel goṭecʼ ato ar nagrahako ńamkeda. 
Joshua21:6 Gulibãṭkate Isakar gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon, Aser ar Napthali gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon ar Bason disạmren Manase gusṭiren adha gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon Gerson bõsren hoṛko do gelpe goṭecʼ ato ar nagrahako ńamkeda." 
Joshua21:7 Ruben, Gad ar Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon Merari bõsren judạ judạ gharońjrenko do gelbar goṭecʼ ato ar nagrahako ńamkeda." 
Joshua21:8 Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Israelko do gulibãṭkate niạko ato ar nagraha ar ona sãoteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko Liwikoko ematʼkoa. 
Joshua21:9 Liwikoren Kohat gharońjrenko talare gulibãṭ hoyen khan Aronren hoponkoakʼ ńutum rakapʼena. Onate Jihudạ ar Simeon gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon adomakʼ ato ar nagraha do onkoko ematʼkoa. 
Joshua21:10  
Joshua21:11 Jihudạ gusṭirenko do buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Kiriot-Arba, metakʼme Hebron ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko emocoyena. Arba do Anakikoren apate tahẽkana." 
Joshua21:12 Tobe Hebron beṛhaeteakʼ jaega ar atoko do laharege Jephun hopon Kalebakʼ sompotti lekate em hoylena. 
Joshua21:13 Onate Hebron, Libna, Jatir, Esemoa, Holon, Debir, Ayin, Juta ar Bet-Semes ar onako soṅgeteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do naeke Aronren hoponko ńamkeda. Ona modre Hebron do asrayokʼ nagraha tahẽkana. Niạ banar gusṭi reakʼ jaega khon niạ are goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha do onkoko emocolena." 
Joshua21:14  
Joshua21:15  
Joshua21:16  
Joshua21:17 Ona chaḍa Benjamin gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon hõ Gibeon, Geba, Anathot ar Almon ńutuman ponea ato ar nagraha ar onako sãoteakʼ aṭiń ṭạnḍi hõko emocoyena." 
Joshua21:18  
Joshua21:19 Naekeko, metakʼme Aronren hoponko do jotote gelpe goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha ar ona sãoteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ńamkeda." 
Joshua21:20 Liwiko modren Kohat bõsren sarecʼ gharońjko do Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon adomakʼ ato ar nagrahako ńamkeda. 
Joshua21:21 Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ buru ṭoṭha modre Sikem, Geser, Kibsayim ar Bet-Horon ńutumanakʼ ponea ato ar nagraha ar onako sãote aṭiń ṭạnḍi hõko emocoyena. Inạ modre Sikem do tahẽkana khũniyạhiko lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagraha." 
Joshua21:22  
Joshua21:23 Ona chaḍa dan gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon Elteke, Gibethon, Ajalon ar Gat-rimon ńutumanakʼ ponea ato ar nagraha ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko emocoyena." 
Joshua21:24  
Joshua21:25 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛkoakʼ jaega khon Tanak ar Gat-rimon ńutumanakʼ barea ato ar ona sãoteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi hõ onko doko emocoyena. 
Joshua21:26 Ạsul janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ niạ gel goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha do Kohat bõsren sarecʼ gharońjrenko ńamkeda. 
Joshua21:27 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛkoakʼ jaega khon Bason disạm reakʼ Golan ar Bestera ńutumanakʼ barea ato ar ona sãoteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi do Liwi gusṭiren Gersonkoko emocoyena. 
Joshua21:28 Ona chaḍa Isakar gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon ạsul janwarakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko sudhạ Kision, Daberat, Jarmut ar En-Ganim ńutumanakʼ ponea ato hõ Gersonkoko ńamkeda." 
Joshua21:29  
Joshua21:30 Aser gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon ạsul janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ Misal, Abdon, Helkat ar Rehob ńutumanakʼ ponea ato hõko emocoyena." 
Joshua21:31  
Joshua21:32 Napthali gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon onkoko em ocolena Gạlil reakʼ Kedes, Hamot-Dor ar Kartan ńutuman pea ato ar ona sãoteakʼ ạsul janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko. Inạko modre Kedes do khũniạhiko lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagraha tahẽkana." 
Joshua21:33 Ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ gelpe goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha do Gersonrenkoakʼ judạ judạ gharońjrenko emocoyena. 
Joshua21:34 Liwikoren sarecʼ bõsko, metakʼme Merariko doko em ocoyena Sebulon gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon Jokneam, Karta, Dimna ar Nahalal ńutumanakʼ ponea ato ar onako sãoteakʼ ạṭiń ṭạnḍiko." 
Joshua21:35  
Joshua21:36 Ona chaḍa Ruben gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon ạsul janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko sudhạ Beser, Johas, Kedemot ar Mephat ar Mephat ńutuman ponea atoko emocoyena." 
Joshua21:37  
Joshua21:38 Gad gusṭirenkoakʼ jaega khon Gileadkoakʼ Ramot, Mahanayim, Hesbon ar Jaser ńutumanakʼ ponea ato ar ona sãoteakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko emocoyena. Inạko modre Ramot do khũniạhiko lạgitʼ asrayokʼ nagraha tahẽkana." 
Joshua21:39  
Joshua21:40 Jotote gelbar goṭecʼ ato do Liwikoren sarecʼ bõsko, metatʼme Merarikoren judạ judạ gharońjrenko emocoyena." 
Joshua21:41 Israelkoko hat akatʼ jaega modre ạsul janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko sudhạ jotote pongel irạl goṭecʼ ato ar nagraha do Liwikoakʼ tahẽkana. 
Joshua21:42 Niạko mimitʼ ato ar nagrahako beṛhaete do ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hõ tahẽkana. 
Joshua21:43 Probhu Isor do Israelkoren hapṛamko oka jaega emako reakʼe gokʼatʼko tahẽkan onako jotowakʼgeye ematʼko tahẽkana. Ar Israelko do ona disạmko dokholketʼte onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Joshua21:44 Onkoren hapṛamko ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage uni do beṛhaeteakʼ lạṛhạiko khone jirạu ocoketʼkoa. Cele bạirige onko samaṅre bako teṅgo daṛeada. Probhu Isor do sanam bạiriko onkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. 
Joshua21:45 Probhu Isor do Israelko bhạlạiko reakʼ okae gokʼatʼko tahẽkan ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ sarecʼ do baṅ tahẽlena, uni do jotogeye purạukeda." 
Joshua22:1 Inạ tayom Josuạ do Ruben ar Gad ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isorren guti Mose okaṭakʼe hukumatʼpe tahẽkan ona sanamakʼgepe manao ạguakada. Ona chaḍa ape do jotowakʼre ińakʼ taberepe tahẽkana." 
Joshua22:2  
Joshua22:3 Ḍher din hạbicʼ, metakʼme teheń hạbicʼ ape do aperen boehako bape bạgi giḍi akatʼkoa, ar aperen Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ dạyike ematʼpe tahẽkan ona hõpe sạt akada." 
Joshua22:4 Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ leka uni do lạṛhại khon aperen boehakoe jirạu ocoakatʼkoa; ar onate Probhu Isorren guti Mose do jordan gaḍa hanasare okaṭakʼ jaegae em akawatʼpe ńitokʼ do onḍenakʼ ḍinḍạte ruạṛ calakʼpe. 
Joshua22:5 Menkhan okako hukum ar ạn-ạriko Probhu Isorren guti Moseye em akawatʼpe ona manao reakʼ moneyakʼpe. Ar aperen Probhu Isor dulạṛepe, uniyakʼ horre taṛampe, uniyakʼ sanam hukumko manaope, unire sapʼ kajak akae tahenpe ar apeakʼ goṭa mon ar daṛete uni sewawaepe.”" 
Joshua22:6 Inạ tayom Josuạ do onkoe bhoratʼkoteye bidạkatʼkoa ar onko do akoakʼ jaegateko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Joshua22:7 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko do Mose Bason disạme ematʼko tahẽkana, ar onkoren sarecʼ hoṛko Josuạ do Israel boehako sãote jordan gaḍa pạchim secʼre jaegae ematʼkoa. Josuạ do onko bidạko jokhecʼ bhoratʼkoteye metatʼkoa," 
Joshua22:8 “Ape do ạḍi utạr mĩhũ-merom, sona, rupạ, pitạl, mẽṛhẽtʼ ar aema kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ ar dhonko hoyakantapea. Ńitokʼ ape do noako idiyte ruạṛ senokʼpe. Ar aperen bạiriko ṭhen khonpe luṭ akatʼ jinisko aperen boehako hõ hạṭińakope.”" 
Joshua22:9 Onate Probhu Isor Mose okaṭakʼe hukumade tahẽkan onkage Ruben ar Gad gusṭirenko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛ do apnar lạgitʼ okako jaegako ńamletʼ ona Gilead ṭoṭhate ruạṛ calakʼ lạgitʼ Kanan disạm reakʼ Silore Israelko ṭhen khon bidạko hataokeda. 
Joshua22:10 Ona tayom onko do Kanan disạm reakʼ jordan ṭhenko seṭeren khan gaḍa aṛere mitʼṭen maraṅ okocʼ pinḍko benaokeda. 
Joshua22:11 Ar sarecʼ Israelko doko ańjomkeda, akoakʼ jaegare Kanan disạm simạna reakʼ jordan gaḍa ṭhen onko do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍko benao akada mente," 
Joshua22:12 unre sarecʼ Israelko do onko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ Siloreko jarwayena. 
Joshua22:13 Onko do naeke Eleasarren hopon Phinehas do Gileadre Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛ ṭhenko kolkadea. 
Joshua22:14 Onko do akoren mimitʼ gusṭi khon mitʼ hoṛkate jotote gel goṭen mukhiyạko Phinehas sãoteko kolkatʼkoa. Noko gelko do jotoge Israel bõsren mathako tahẽkana. 
Joshua22:15 Onko do Gileadre Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko ṭhen senkateko menkeda," 
Joshua22:16 “Probhu Isorakʼ manḍerren jotogeko meneda, ‘Israelren Isor upạrte cedakʼ nonka dope kạmikana? Cedakʼ teheń do Probhu Isorakʼ hor khonpe ghańjeṛ akana ar uni upạrte hulkate ape lạgitʼ pinḍpe benao akada?" 
Joshua22:17 Peorre okaṭakʼ bon ghạṭletʼ ona lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do manḍerren hoṛkore mahamạriye kolleda; ar teheń hõ ona chut khon babon sapha utạr akana. Ona ghạṭ khon hõ babon cetʼleda," 
Joshua22:18 ar ńitokʼ arhõ ape do Probhu Isorakʼ hor khon ghańjeṛokʼpe meneda? Teheń Probhu Isor upạrtepe hul enḍekhan gapage uni do aboakʼ goṭa Israel manḍerko cetanre edreye sodortaea. 
Joshua22:19 Okaṭakʼ disạm apeakʼ ạidạrire hoyakan ona chut akan khan ape do parom hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ disạmte hijukʼpe. Nonḍe do Probhu Isorakʼ ḍera tạmbu menakʼa. Ar ale sãotege girobasokʼpe. Menkhan aboren Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ chaḍa ar eṭakʼ jãhãn pinḍ benaokate Probhu Isor ar ale upạrte alope hula. 
Joshua22:20 Okako jinis do ḍahao maraokʼ reakʼ kan ona reaṅ Sera hopon Akan do bepạtiạricʼe hoylente Probhu Isorakʼ edre goṭa Israelko cetanre cetʼ baṅ paṛaolena? Uni do acʼakʼ kại iạte eskar do bae gocʼlena.’ ” 
Joshua22:21 Niạ katha ańjomkate Ruben ar Gad gusṭiren hoṛko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko do Israelkoren judạ judạ bõskoren mathako roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa," 
Joshua22:22 “Sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor! Sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor! Uni mae baḍaege ar Israelko hõko baḍaema. Probhu Isor upạrte jãhãn hul se bebatao reakʼ kạmi hoyakan khan enḍekhan teheń alope rehaelea. 
Joshua22:23 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ hor khon ghańjeṛokʼ lạgitʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ iạte apnar lạgitʼ niạ pinḍle benao akatʼ khan enḍekhan Probhu Isor do acʼgeye sạjạilema." 
Joshua22:24 “Ale do noa botorte pinḍle benao akada, hoedaṛeakʼa ape se aperen bõsko do aleren bõskoko metakoa, ‘Israelkoren Probhu Isor sãote apeakʼ do cetʼ menakʼtapea?" 
Joshua22:25 Probhu Isor do Rubenrenko, Gadrenko, apeko ar ale talare jordan gaḍa do simạna lekateye dohoakada. Onate Probhu Isor cetanre apeakʼ do jãhãn bakhra bạnukʼtapea.’ Ar hoedaṛeakʼa aperen hoponko do aleren hoponko Probhu Isor sewawae khonko bạgi ocokoa." 
Joshua22:26 “Onategele menleda, ‘dela hijukʼte, mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ bon benaojoṅa.’ Menkhan ona do jãhãn jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se eṭakʼ janwar samaṅko lạgitʼ do baṅkana." 
Joshua22:27 Ona do ape ar ale talare ar aboren hoponko talare niạ gohae ema, abon do Probhu Isor samaṅrege aboren jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼko bon samaṅa. Enḍekhan tayom daram dinkore aperen hoponko do aleren hoponko niạ katha bako men daṛeakoa, ‘Probhu Isor cetanre apeakʼ do jãhãn bakhra bạnukʼtapea.’" 
Joshua22:28 “Ale dole hudisleda, onko do ale se aleren hoponko ona kathako metakore onkole roṛ ruạṛakoa, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ leka ńelokʼkan noa pinḍ beṅgetʼakʼpe. Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ janwarko samaṅko lạgitʼ aleren hapṛamko noa do bako benao akada menkhan ape ar ale talare jemon noa do goha leka tahen ona lạgitʼko benao akada.’" 
Joshua22:29 “Aleren Isor Probhu Isorakʼ ḍera tạmbu samaṅre okaṭakʼ pinḍ menakʼ ona chaḍa jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar janwarko samaṅko lạgitʼ eṭakʼ jãhãn pinḍ benaokate Probhu Isor upạrtele hul ar uniyakʼ hor khonle ghańjeṛokʼ ona do ale khon sạṅgińre tahenma.”" 
Joshua22:30 Ruben, Gad ar Manase gusṭiren hoṛko do naeke Phinehas ar Israel manḍerren mukhiyạko, metakʼme Israel bõskoren mathako okaṭakʼko metatʼko onate onko doko kusiyena." 
Joshua22:31 Ar naeke Eleasarren hopon Phinehas do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Teheńle bujhạu daṛeakʼkana, Probhu Isor do abo sãorege menaea, ente niạ ape do Probhu Isor upạrte bepạtiạrakʼ do bape kạmi akada. Ape do Probhu Isorakʼ ti khon Israel hoponkope rukhiyạketʼkoa.”" 
Joshua22:32 Inạ tayom Eleasarren hopon Phinehas ar mukhiyạko do Gileadre Rubenrenko ar Gadrenko ṭhen khon Kanan disạmteko ruạṛ calaoente sanamakʼ katha Israelkoko baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
Joshua22:33 Ar ona ańjomte onko hõko kusiyena ar Isorko sarhaokedea. Rubenrenko ar Gadrenko oka disạmreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan ona marao lạgitʼ onko upạrte lạṛhại reakʼ katha do ar bako roṛleda. 
Joshua22:34 Rubenren ar Gadrenko do ona pinḍ reakʼ ńutumko dohokeda, “Abo talare goha do niạge, Probhu kangeae Isor do.”" 
Joshua23:1 Probhu Isor do Israelko beṛhaeten bạiriko khone jirạu ocoketʼko tayom ḍher din paromena. Ar Josuạ do ḍher umer hoyentaea, are haṛamena." 
Joshua23:2 Mitʼ din uni do sanam Israelko, metakʼme onkoren mukhiyạko, mathako, bikʼcạrko ar kạmiyạko hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, iń do aema umer hoyakantińạ, ariń haṛamena." 
Joshua23:3 Ar aperen Probhu Isor do ape lạgitʼ onko jạtrenko cetanre okae ceka akatʼ ona do apeakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńelana. Aperen Probhu Isor do acʼ apnarge ape huyạteye lạṛhại akana. 
Joshua23:4 Jordan gaḍa khon pạchim jalapuri hạbicʼ okoe jạtrenkoń marao akatʼko ar okoe jạtrenko ńithõ sarecʼ menakʼko onko sanamkoakʼ jaega do apeakʼ gusṭiko talare sompotti lekateń hạṭiń akatʼkoa. 
Joshua23:5 Aperen Probhu Isor do unige onko sarecʼ jạtrenko apeakʼ hor khone ocokʼkoa. Ape samaṅ khon uni doe laga ńirkoa ar ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate onkoakʼ jaegape dokholjoṅa. 
Joshua23:6 “Onate ape do apeakʼ sanam daṛete Moseyakʼ ạn-ạriko reakʼ puthire oka ol menakʼ ona jotowakʼpe manaoa; ar ona khon oka secʼge alope ghańjeṛokʼa. 
Joshua23:7 Okoe jạtrenko ape talare menakʼko onko tulucʼ do alope sulukokʼa; onkoren debotakoakʼ ńutum hõ alope ńuma se onko ńutumte hõ alope kiriạkʼa. Onko alope ḍobokʼakoa se onko samaṅre bohokʼ alope kuḍburtapea. 
Joshua23:8 Ape do aperen Probhu Isorre sapʼ kajak akae tahenpe, cetʼleka teheń hạbicʼ sapʼakae menakʼpe." 
Joshua23:9 “Ape samaṅ khon maraṅ ar daṛean jạtrenko do Probhu Isorgeye laga ńir akatʼkoa. Teheń hạbicʼ okoehõ ape samaṅre bako ṭeṅgo ṭarhao daṛe akawada. 
Joshua23:10 Aperen mitʼ hoṛ do mitʼ hajar hoṛe laga ńir daṛeako kana, ente Aperen Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate uni do ape huyạteye lạṛhại akana." 
Joshua23:11 Onate aperen Probhu Isorakʼ dulạṛ reakʼ purạte moneyakʼpe. 
Joshua23:12 “Menkhan onko jạtrenko modre okoe do jiwetʼ menakʼko ar ape talareko tahenkan ar aperen Probhu Isor bạgikate onko sãotepe gatekʼ se onko sãotepe baplakʼ, se onko tulucʼpe helmelpe dohoy," 
Joshua23:13 enḍekhan khạṭige baḍaekakʼpe, aperen Probhu Isor do ape samaṅ khon ar bae laga ńirkoa. Ona bodolte onko do aperen jhãmpa ar pạsi lekako hoyokʼa arpe sapʼ ocokʼa ar onko do apeakʼ dea reakʼ cạbuk ar mẽtʼ reakʼ jạnumko hoyokʼa. Ar nokʼõe napae okocʼ disạm aperen Probhu Isore emakawatʼpe nonḍe khonpe marao utạrokʼa." 
Joshua23:14 “Dhạrtiren sanamko okaṭakʼ horte senokʼ hoyokʼtako ona horte iń hõ ńitokʼ doń senokʼ kana. Ar noa katha do bhagegepe baḍaea, aperen Probhu Isor bhạlạiype reakʼ okae gokʼ akawatʼpe ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hõ baṅ ạuṛiyakʼ akana. Mitʼke mitʼ gokʼakʼ do purạu akana, ar baṅ puruạuakʼ do mitʼṭecʼ hõ bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Joshua23:15 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ bondobos bape manao, ar senkate debotakope sewawako arpe ḍobokʼako, enḍekhan aperen Probhu Isor do okaṭakʼ bhạlạiype reakʼe gokʼ akatʼ ar cetʼleka onako reakʼ purạu akan onkage Probhu Isor do baṅ bhạlạiype reakʼ oka botore udukʼ akatʼpe ona joto do apereye paṛao ocoya ar okaṭakʼ mońj disạme emakawatʼpe sesre ona khone marao giḍikapea. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ edre do ape upạrte jolokʼtege tahena, ar okaṭakʼ mońj disạme emakawatʼpe ona khon ạḍi usạragepe marao utạrokʼa.”" 
Joshua23:16  
Joshua24:1 Inạ tayom Josuạ do Israelren sanam gusṭirenko Sikemre mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa. Uni do Israelren murubbiko, mathako, bikʼcạrko ar kạmiyạkoe hohowatʼkoa. Onkate onko do Isor samaṅreko hạjirena." 
Joshua24:2 Josuạ do sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Israelkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘sedae jugre aperen hapṛamko do phurạt gaḍa hanasareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana ar debotakoko pujạwako kan tahẽkana. Onko modren mitʼ hoṛe tahẽkana uni do Abraham ar Nahorren apattetʼ Terah." 
Joshua24:3 Menkhan iń do aperen hapṛam Abrahamge gaḍa hanasa khoniń ạgukedea ar Kanan disạm reakʼ sanam jaegakoreń dãṛãbaṛa ocokedea ar uniren bõskoń saṅge ocoketʼkoa. Ar Isahak iń danadea," 
Joshua24:4 ar Isahak do Jakob ar Esao iń danadea. Seyir buru ṭoṭha do sompotti lekate Esaogeń emadea, menkhan Jakob ar uniren hoponko do Misor disạmteko calaoena." 
Joshua24:5 “Ona tayom iń do Mose ar Aron iń kolketʼkinạ. Ar iń do kạmi hotete Misorrenkoń hạnketʼkoa, ar ona tayom do apeń oḍok ạguketʼpea." 
Joshua24:6 Aperen hapṛamko do Misor disạm khon oḍokkate jalapuri ṭhenko hecʼena. Ar Misorrenko do rãt gạḍiko, sadomko ar aswarikoante arakʼ jalapuri hạbicʼko khudạu ạguketʼpea." 
Joshua24:7 Menkhan Israelko do iń ṭhenko rakʼ homorketʼ khan onko ar Misorrenko talareń ńut ocokeda. Ar Misorrenko cetanre jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ iń ruạṛ ocoketʼte onkoń unum cabaketʼkoa. Misorrenko cetanre okań cekaletʼ ona ma apnarakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńelakatʼ. Ar ona tayom do ḍher din hahaṅkarrepe girobasena. 
Joshua24:8 “ ‘Inạ tayom iń do jordan reakʼ purub secʼren Amorikoakʼ disạmteń ạguketʼpea. Onko do ape upạrteko lạṛhạiyena menkhan apeakʼ tire onkoń jimạkatʼkoa. Ar ape samaṅ khoniń marao giḍikatʼkoa ar onkoakʼ disạmpe dokholana. 
Joshua24:9 Tayomte Sipor hopon Moabren raj Balak do Israelko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼe sapṛaoena ar ape sarapape lạgitʼ Beor hopon Biliame hoho ạgukedea. 
Joshua24:10 Iń do Biliamakʼ katha bạń luturada, menkhan uni do apeye bhoratʼpea. Ar ińge Balakakʼ ti khoniń bańcaoketʼpea." 
Joshua24:11 “ ‘Ona tayom ape do Jordan gaḍa paromkate Jerikho nagrahatepe hecʼena. Jerikho nagraharen hoṛko ar Amoriko, Pherisiko, Kananiko, Hittiko, Gergasiko, Hiwiko ar Jebusiko do ape upạrteko lạṛhạiyena, menkhan iń do onko sanamko apeakʼ tireń jimạketʼkoa." 
Joshua24:12 Iń do ape laha lahate ńele koń kolketʼkoa; ar ńele do ape samaṅ khon Amorikoren unkin rajko laga ńirketʼkinạ. Apeakʼ tarwaṛe se akʼ-sarte noape onka akada ona do baṅa. 
Joshua24:13 Ar okaṭakʼ jumire bape khaṭao akan ar okaṭakʼ ato ar nagraha bape benao akatʼ onako apeń ematʼpea. Ar ńitokʼ do onako nagraha ar atokorepe girobasokʼ kana; ona chaḍa okaṭakʼ darkha bape cas akatʼ ar okaṭakʼ jạitun daṛe bape rohoe akatʼ onako reakʼ jo hõ ńitokʼpe jomeda.’ ” 
Joshua24:14 Ona tayom Josuại menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do pạtiạr salakʼ khạṭi ontorte aperen Probhu Isor sewawaepe ar uni ḍobokʼaepe. Aperen hapṛamko phurạt gaḍa hanasa Misor disạmre okoe debotakoko sewawako kan tahẽkan onko do ńitokʼ sạṅgiń giḍikakope ar Probhu Isor sewawaepe." 
Joshua24:15 Ar aperen Probhu Isor sewawae bape menjoṅkan khan enḍekhan teheń ṭhik joṅpe okoepe sewawaea. Aperen hapṛamko Phurạt gaḍa hanasare okoe debotakoko sewawako kan tahẽkan onkope sewawakoa se okoeyakʼ disạmrepe girobasokʼ kan onko Amorikoren debotakope sewawakoa? Menkhan iń ar ińakʼ gharońjrenko do Probhu Isor gele sewawaea.” 
Joshua24:16 Hoṛkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor bạgikate eṭakʼ Isorle sewawako ona do ale khon sahaṛ akan tahenma." 
Joshua24:17 Aboren Probhu Isor do acʼge abo ar aboren hapṛamko Misor disạm khon, golam oṛakʼ khon nonḍeye oḍok ạgu akatʼbona ar aboakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege maraṅ maraṅ hahaṛawakʼ kạmikoe kạmi akada. Aboakʼ goṭa dãṛãn horre tinạkʼ jạtrenko talate bon hecʼakan onkoakʼ ti khon unigeye bańcao akatʼbona." 
Joshua24:18 Niạ disạmren Amoriko ar eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko do Probhu Isorge abo samaṅ khone laga ńir akatʼkoa. Onate ale hõ Probhu Isor gele sarhaoea, ente uni kangeae aboren Isor do.”" 
Joshua24:19 Niạ katha ańjomkate Josuạ do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Menkhan ape do uni bape sewa daṛeaea, ente uni doe sonot Isor kana, acʼakʼ paona bhokti do okoe hõ bae ńam ocoakoa. Uni do apeakʼ kại ar ghạṭko bae ikạitapea." 
Joshua24:20 Ar Probhu Isor bạgikate eṭakʼ Isorkope sewawako enḍekhan uni doe dea giḍikapea ar lahate leka bae bhạlạipea menkhan ape cetanre bạṛicʼakʼe paṛao ocoyte apeye marao cabapea.” 
Joshua24:21 Onate hoṛko do Josuạko metadea, “Baṅa, ale do Probhu Isor gele sewawaea.”" 
Joshua24:22 Unre Josuại metatʼkoa, “Ape do niạ kathate apnarge aperen gohape hoyena, Probhu Isor gepe sewawaea mente.” Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, ale do goha gele hoyena.”" 
Joshua24:23 Josuại menkeda, “Enḍekhan apeko talare okoe ạnạṛi Isor menakʼko ńitokʼ sạṅgiń giḍikakope ar Israelkoren Probhu Isor secʼ moneyakʼpe.”" 
Joshua24:24 Unre sanamkoge Josuạko metadea, “Ale do aleren Probhu Isor gele sewawaea ar uniyakʼ hukumkogele manaotaea.”" 
Joshua24:25 Enhilokʼ Josuạ do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobose ṭarhaokeda ar Sikemre ạn-ạriko manao lạgitʼe hukumatʼkoa. 
Joshua24:26 Ar uni do Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko reakʼ sanamakʼ mitʼṭecʼ puthireye ol dohokeda. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ dhiri hataokate Probhu Isorakʼ sonot jaega ṭhen Elon dare buṭạre onae bạisạukada. 
Joshua24:27 Ar sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Niạ dhiri do abo upạrte goha leka tahena. Probhu Isor abo ṭhen okako kathae menakatʼ ona do niạ dhirigeye ańjom akada. Ar aperen Isorpe baṅe enḍekhan noa do ape upạrtege gohae ema.”" 
Joshua24:28 Inạ tayom Josuạ do sanamko apan ạpin jaegateye kolkatʼkoa. 
Joshua24:29 Niạko ghoṭna tayom Probhu Isorren golam Nunren hopon Josuạ do mitʼsae gel bochor umerreye gocʼena. 
Joshua24:30 Ar hoṛko do Gas buru utạr secʼre uniyakʼ sompottire, metakʼme Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Timnat-serareko topakadea." 
Joshua24:31 Josuạ tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan ar ona tayom dinkore okoeko murubbiko jiwetʼko tahẽkan unạkʼ din Israelko do Probhu Isorko sewawadea. Israelko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor oka bhageakʼkoe kạmiletʼ ona do onkoren murubbiko hõko ńelleda. 
Joshua24:32 Israel hoponko do Misor disạm khon Josephakʼ oka jaṅkoko ạgu daraletʼ, ona do Sikemreko topakada. Noa jaega Jakob do Sikemren apattetʼ Hamorren hoponko ṭhen khon mitʼ sae rupạ ṭakateye kirińleda. Noa jaega do Joseph bõsrenkoakʼ sompotti talare tahẽkana." 
Joshua24:33 Inạ tayom Aronren hopon naeke Eleaser hõe gocʼen khan uni do Gibeareko topakadea. Noa Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do uniren hopon Phinehase emocolena. 
Judges1:1 Josuạwakʼ gujukʼ tayom Israelko do Probhu Isorko kulikedea, “Kananrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ pạhilte do okoeye calakʼtalea?”" 
Judges1:2 Probhu Isor do roṛ ruạṛatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Pạhilre Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko oḍok calakʼma; onkoakʼ tirege disạm doń jimạ akada.”" 
Judges1:3 Noa katha ańjomkate Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do Simeon gusṭiren hoṛkoko metatʼkoa, “Okako jaega aleakʼ hạṭińre paṛao akan onḍenko Kananiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ ale sãote dela hijukʼpe, ar ale hõ apeakʼ jaega hat lạgitʼ ape sãotele calakʼa.” Onate Simeon gusṭiren hoṛko do onko sãoteko oḍok senena." 
Judges1:4 Ar Probhu Isor do Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ tire Kananrenko ar Pherisikoe jimạkatʼkoa. Onkoren gel hajar hoṛ do Besek nagrahareko gocʼ ocoyena. 
Judges1:5 Onḍe onko do Adoni-Besekko ńamkedea ar uni sãoteko lạṛhạiyena ar onko do Kanani ar Pherisikoko bhagaoketʼkoa. 
Judges1:6 Adoni-Besek tinreye dạṛ pharakokʼkan tahẽkana unre onko do uniko khudạu tiyokʼkedete uniyakʼ ti ar jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼko samakʼketʼtaea. 
Judges1:7 Onate Adoni-Beseke menkeda, “Iń do eaegel rapajkoakʼ ti ar jaṅga reakʼ buḍhạ kạṭupʼ iń samakʼ kuṭrạletʼtakoa. Onko do ińakʼ ṭebil latar reakʼ ạiṭhạwakʼko halaṅ jometʼ tahẽkana. Onko cetanre okań cekaletʼ Isor hõ iń cetanre onkageye kạmi akada.” Ar Adoni-Besek do Jerusalemteko idikede khan onḍeye gocʼena." 
Judges1:8 Jihudạ-gusṭiren hoṛko do Jerusalem upạrteko lạṛhạiyena ar onako hatkeda. Onko do nagraharen hoṛko gocʼketʼkote nagrahare seṅgelko jeretʼada. 
Judges1:9 Inạ tayom onko do cetan buru ṭoṭha, Negeb ar latar buru ṭoṭharen Kananiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena." 
Judges1:10 Ar Hebronren Kananiko birudteko lạṛhại idiyente onko do Sesae, Ahiman ar Talmaeko bhagaokedea. Hebron reakʼ lahateakʼ ńutum do Kiriạt-Abra tahẽkana." 
Judges1:11 Onḍe khon onko do Debir nagraharen hoṛko birudteko laha idiyena. Debir reakʼ ńutum do Kiriạt-Sepher tahẽkana. 
Judges1:12 Kalebe menkeda, “Jãhãege Kiriạt-Sephere hat, uni sãotege ińren hoponera Aksa doń baplakaea.”" 
Judges1:13 Niạ katha ańjomkate Kaleb bokot Kenas hopon Othniyel do onae hatkeda. Onate Kaleb do Othniyel sãote acʼren hoponerae baplakadea. 
Judges1:14 Aksa do Othniel ṭhene senen khan apattetʼ ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ jumi koeye lạgitʼe uskurkedea. Ar gadha khon Aksae pheḍen khan Kaleb do uniye kulikedea, “E biṭi cetʼem khojkana?”" 
Judges1:15 Aksae menkeda, “E ba, ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha dohoyme. Am do Negebre jaegam emakawạdińa onate onḍenakʼ dakʼ jharnako hõ imạńme.” Noa katha ańjomkate Kaleb do onḍenakʼ usul ar latar jaegako reakʼ dakʼ jharnako hõe emadea." 
Judges1:16 Mose hońhartetʼren hoponko, okoe do Kanani jạtrenko tahẽkan, onko do khijur-nagraha khon oḍok hecʼkate Arad ṭoṭha reakʼ dạkhin Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ hahaṅkar ṭoṭhateko calaoena ar onḍenko hoṛ sãote girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Judges1:17 Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do onkoren boeha Simeon gusṭiren hoṛko soṅgekate Sephat nagraharen Kananikoko akromonketʼkoa ar onkoakʼ nagrahako marao utạrkeda. Ona iạte nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Hormako dohokeda (metakʼme “Ḍahao maraokʼ ”). 
Judges1:18 Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do Gasa, Askelon ar Ekron nagraha ar onako aḍepase reakʼ jaegako hatkeda." 
Judges1:19 Probhu Isor do Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko sãoteye tahẽkana. Onko do buru ṭoṭhakoko hatletʼgea, menkhan bilạn ṭạnḍiren hoṛko do bako laga ńir daṛeatʼkoa, ente onkoakʼ do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍiko tahẽkantakoa." 
Judges1:20 Moseyakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate Kaleb do Hebron nagrahae em ocolena. Kaleb do Anakren pea hopon Hebron khone laga ńirletʼkoa. 
Judges1:21 Menkhan Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko do Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan Jebusiko bako laga oḍok daṛeatʼko tahẽkana. Onate teheń hạbicʼ Jebusiko do Benjạmin gusṭirenko sãote onḍeko girobasokʼkana. 
Judges1:22 Josephren hoponko do Bethel nagraha hat lạgitʼko calaoena. Ar Probhu Isor do onko sãoteye tahẽkana. 
Judges1:23 Onko do nagraha mońjteko ńel ạguketʼ tayom onḍe thoṛagan hoṛko kolkatʼkoa. Bethel reakʼ laha ńutum do Lus tahẽkana. 
Judges1:24 Onko hoṛ do nagraha khon mitʼ hoṛ oḍok hijukʼkanko ńelkede khan uniko kulikedea, “Nagraha bolokʼ hor udukʼaleme, ale do amakʼ jãhãnakʼ bale lokshan tama.”" 
Judges1:25 Unre uni hoṛ do hore udukʼatʼkoa ar onko do senkate nagraharen sanam hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa, menkhan uni hoṛ ar uni bõsren doko aṛakʼkatʼkoa." 
Judges1:26 Inạ tayom uni hoṛ do Hitikoakʼ disạmte senkate mitʼṭecʼ nagrahae benaokeda ar ona reakʼ ńutum do Luse dohokeda. Teheń hạbicʼ ona nagraha reakʼ ńutum do inạge menakʼa. 
Judges1:27 Manase gusṭiren hoṛko do Bet-Sean, Tanak, Dor, Ibleam ar Megido nagraha ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ atokoren hoṛko bako laga ńir daṛeatʼkoa, ente onako jaegaren Kananiko doko goṭa akatʼ tahẽkana, disạm do bako bạgiyakʼa mente." 
Judges1:28 Israelko tinreko daṛe idiyena unre onko hoṛ do akoren golamko hoe ocoketʼkoa menkhan bako laga ńir utạrletʼkoa. 
Judges1:29 Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko hõ Geser khon Kananiko bako laga oḍokletʼkoa. Kananiko do onḍe onko talaregeko tahẽyena. 
Judges1:30 Sebulon gusṭiren hoṛko hõ Kiṭron ar Mahalol khon Kananiko bako laga oḍokletʼkoa. Onate onko talaregeko tahẽyena, menkhan Sebulon gusṭiren hoṛko do akoren golamko hoe ocoketʼkoa." 
Judges1:31 Aser gusṭiren hoṛko hõ Akkor, Sidon, Ahiạb, Aksib, Helba, Aphik ar Rehobren hoṛko bako laga oḍokletʼkoa." 
Judges1:32 Onate disạmren Kananiko talarege girobasokʼko ehopʼena, ente onko do bako laga oḍokletʼkoa." 
Judges1:33 Napthali gusṭiren hoṛko hõ Bet-semes ar Bet-anatren hoṛko bako laga oḍokletʼkoa menkhan akoren golamko hoe ocoketʼkoa. 
Judges1:34 Amoriko do Dan gusṭiren hoṛko buru ṭoṭhareko aṭok dohoketʼkoa; bilạn ṭạnḍite do bako pheḍ ocowatʼkoa. 
Judges1:35 Amoriko do Har-heserre, Ajalonre ar Sa-albinre tahengeko goṭa uricʼkeda; menkhan Joseph bõsren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe tinre ḍher idiyena unre onko do Amoriko akoren golamko hoe ocoketʼkoa." 
Judges1:36 Amorikoakʼ simạna do Akrabimte rakapʼ calakʼ hor reakʼ Sela khon cetan hạbicʼ rakapʼ calaoena. 
Judges2:1 Probhu Isorren goḍet do Gilgal khon Bokimre hecʼkate Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea ar oka disạm emape lạgitʼ aperen hapṛamko ṭheniń gokʼletʼ ona disạmteń ạgu akatʼpea. Ińiń menakada, ‘ape lạgitʼ oka bondobosiń dohoakatʼ ona do tishõ bạń rạpuda." 
Judges2:2 Ape do noa disạmren hoṛko tulucʼ jãhãnakʼge bondobos alope dohoya ar onkoakʼ pinḍkope rạputʼ giḍikatakoa.’ Menkhan ape do ińakʼ katha bape bataoleda. Cekate nonka dope kạmikeda? 
Judges2:3 Ona iạte ńitokʼ iń metape kana, ape ṭhen khon noko hoṛ do ar bạń laga oḍokkoa; onko do ape lạgitʼ jhampa lekako hoyokʼa, ente onkoren debotakoakʼ jhạlirepe paṛaokʼa. ”" 
Judges2:4 Probhu Isorren goḍet do tinre Israelko ṭhen niạko kathae menkeda unre onko do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena. 
Judges2:5 Ar ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Bokimko dohokeda (metakʼme “Rakʼjoṅ”). Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe onko do janwar samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
Judges2:6 Josuạ do Israelkoe bidạ baṛaketʼko khan onko do apan ạpin hĩs reakʼ jaega dokhol lạgitʼko calaoena. 
Judges2:7 Josuạ tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan ar ona tayom dinkore okoe murubbiko jiwetʼko tahẽkan unạkʼ din Israelko do Probhu Isorko sewawadea. Israelko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor oka bhageakʼkoe kạmiletʼ ona do onkoren murubbiko ko ńelleda. 
Judges2:8 Ar Probhu Isorren guti Nunren hopon Josuạ do mitʼsae gel bochor umerreye gocʼena. 
Judges2:9 Ar Timnat-heres ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegareko topakedea. Ona jaega do Ephrayim gusṭirenkoakʼ buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Gas buru utạr secʼre tahẽkana. 
Judges2:10 Josuạ okteren Israelko do gocʼente akoren hapṛam ṭhenko calaoen khan onkoakʼ jaegare onkoren hoponkoko hecʼena. Onko do Probhu Isor bako baḍae akade tahẽkana ar Israelko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor okakoe cekaletʼ ona hõ bako baḍaekan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:11 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Onko do Bakʼal debotako sewawae kan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:12 Onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor, okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼko tahẽkan uni do jaogeko bạgiyaekan tahẽkana. Onko do ako beṛhaeten jạtren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ debota secʼko ạcurokʼkan tahẽkana arko pujạwako kan tahẽkana, ar onkate Probhu Isorakʼ pitko caṛhao ocoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges2:13 Ar nonkate onko do Probhu Isor bạgikate Bakʼal debota ar Asṭoret debiko sewawae kan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:14 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Israelko luluṭkoakʼ tireye jimạyetʼko tahẽkana. Onko do onkoakʼ jiniskoko luṭetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do onkoren beṛhaeten bạiriakʼ tireye jimạyetʼko tahẽkana, ar onate bạiriko upạrte bako teṅgo daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Judges2:15 Israel hoponko tinre lạṛhạiko oḍok senokʼkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor okae kiriạ akan tahẽkan onkage uniyakʼ ti do onkoakʼ bhạlại alo hoyokʼ lạgitʼ onko upạrteye tahenkan tahẽkana, ar maraṅ muhin talareko paṛaokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Judges2:16 Unre Probhu Isor do onko talare disạm cakʼlaokoe teṅgoyetʼko tahẽkana. Onko do luluṭko reakʼ ti khon Israelkoko rukhiyạyetʼko tahẽkana," 
Judges2:17 Menkhan enhõ Israel hoponko do disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ katha bako luturakʼkan tahẽkana. Probhu Isor cetanre pạtiạu doho baṅkate debotako cetanre apnarko ṭehãḍokʼkan tahẽkana arko sewawako kan tahẽkana. Onkoren hapṛamko Probhu Isorakʼ oka horteko taṛametʼ tahẽkan ona hor khon thoṛa ghạṛicʼ khangeko ghańjeṛokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:18 Probhu Isor do tinre onko lạgitʼ jãhãe disạm cakʼlaoyicʼe teṅgoyetʼko tahẽkana unrege uni do onko tulucʼe tahenkan tahẽkana.
