Ar disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahenkan tahẽkan unạkʼ din bạirikoakʼ ti khon Israelkoe rukhiyạyetʼko tahẽkana. Onko do santao iạte tinreko rakʼetʼ tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do onko cetanreye dayakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:19 Menkhan disạm cakʼlaokoko gocʼlen khan hoṛko do arhõ debota secʼko lawerokʼkan tahẽkana arko sewawako kan tahẽkana ar hapṛamko khon hõ bạṛicʼakʼ horteko taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Onko do okalekate hõ bạṛicʼakʼ hor ar bạṛicʼ hewa bako bạgiyakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges2:20 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Israelko cetanre edreteye menkeda, “Nokoren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ iń bondobosatʼko tahẽkan ona do noko bako manao akada ar ińakʼ katha hõ bako ańjom akada." 
Judges2:21 Ona iạtege Josuạwakʼ gujukʼ oktere okoe jạtrenko disạmreko tahẽkan onko do Israelko samaṅ khon bạń laga ńirkoa. 
Judges2:22 Ar akoren hapṛamko leka ińakʼ horteko calakʼa se baṅa ona do noko jạtrenko hoteteń biḍạukoa.” 
Judges2:23 Probhu Isor do noko jạtrenko soṅge soṅgete bae laga ńirletʼkoa ar onko do disạmregeye dohokatʼkoa. Uni do Josuạwakʼ tire bae jimạletʼkoa. 
Judges3:1 Okoe Israelko Kanan disạmre lạṛhại reakʼ cetʼge bako baḍaekan tahẽkan onko biḍạu aṭkarko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do adom adom jạtrenko disạm talaregeye dohokatʼkoa. 
Judges3:2 Israel hoponko okoe do tishõ bako lạṛhại akan onkoakʼ lạṛhại babotre cetʼako lạgitʼ uni do noae nonkaleda. 
Judges3:3 Onko jạtrenko doko hoyokʼ kana, Philisṭiko ar onkoren mõṛẽ goṭen raj, Kananrenko ar Sidonrenko ar Hiwiko. Bakʼal-hermon buru khon ehopʼkate Homat hạbicʼ Lebanon reakʼ oka buru ṭoṭhako menakʼ onakorege Hiwiko doko tahenkan tahẽkana." 
Judges3:4 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete onkoren hapṛamko okae hukumatʼko tahẽkan ona do Israel hoponkoko manao idiya se baṅa ona biḍạu ạtkarko lạgitʼ iạtege noko jạtrenkoe doholetʼkoa. 
Judges3:5 Ona iạte Israelko do Kananiko, Hittiko, Amoriko, Pherisiko, Hiwiko ar Jebusiko talare girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Judges3:6 Onko do onkoren kuṛikoko baplayetʼko tahẽkana ar ako hõ akoren kuṛiko onkoren koṛako lạgitʼko emokʼkan tahẽkana ar onkoren debotakoko sewawako kan tahẽkana. 
Judges3:7 Ar Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage kạmiko ehopʼena. Onko do akoren Probhu Isorko hiṛińkedete Bakʼal debota ar Asera debi sewawaeko ehopʼena. 
Judges3:8 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Israelko cetanreye edre seṅgelena ar Aram-Nahrayimren raj Kusan-Risithayimakʼ tire onkoe jimạketʼkoa. Ar onko do irạl bochor uni tabereko tahẽyena. 
Judges3:9 Menkhan Israelko do Probhu Isorko rakʼade khan onko lạgitʼ mitʼṭen babańcaoicʼe teṅgowatʼkoa. Uni doe hoyokʼkana Kenas hopon Kaleb bokot Othniyel. 
Judges3:10 Probhu Isorren Jiu do uni cetanreye hecʼena ar uni do Israelkoren raje hoyena. Uni do tinre lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok senena unre Probhu Isor Aramren raj Kusan-Risithayim do uniyakʼ tireye jimạkedea, ar onate uni doe bhagaokedea." 
Judges3:11 Kenas hopon Othniyelakʼ gujukʼ hạbicʼ disạmre pon gel bochor suluk tahẽkana. 
Judges3:12 Israel hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage arhõ kạmiko ehopʼena. Onate Probhu Isor do Israel hoponko upạrte Moabren Eglon raje daṛe ocokedea. 
Judges3:13 Eglon raj do Amoniko ar Amalekiko soṅgekate Israelkoe akromonketʼkoa ar khijur nagrahae hatkeda. 
Judges3:14 Israelko do gel irạl bochor Moab raj Eglonakʼ tabereko tahẽyena. 
Judges3:15 Inạ tayom Israelko do arhõ Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda ar uni do onko lạgitʼ Ehud ńutuman mitʼṭen babańcaoicʼe teṅgowatʼkoa. Uni doe tahẽkana Benjạmin gusṭiren Gera hopon. Uni do leṅgṛageye tahẽkana. Ar Israelko do Moabren raj Eglon ṭhen raj bheja emokʼ lạgitʼko kolkedea. 
Judges3:16 Uni do banar secʼ dharanakʼ mitʼ moka jeleń mitʼṭecʼ chorae benao ocokeda ar acʼakʼ kicricʼ latarre jojomsa bulureye bedhaoana. 
Judges3:17 Ar senkate Moabren raj Eglon do bhejae emadea. Menkhan Eglon raj do moṭa hoṛe tahẽkana. 
Judges3:18 Raj bheja em tayom okoe do bhejako ạguletʼ onko hoṛ doe bidạkatʼkoa," 
Judges3:19 Menkhan acʼ do Gilgal ṭhenakʼ rokʼ akatʼ dhiriko hạbicʼ senkate ruạṛ hecʼenteye menkeda, “E raj, mitʼṭecʼ katha mementeakʼ menakʼtińạ.”" 
Judges3:20 Unre raj do coṭ dolan reaṛ kandhare eskargeye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana, ar Ehud do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ khobor menakʼa; ona do Isor ṭhen khonge hecʼakana.” Niạ katha ańjomkate raj do duṛupʼ khone beretʼena," 
Judges3:21 ar Ehud do leṅga tite acʼakʼ bulu khon chora or oḍokkate rajakʼ lacʼe bhoskaoketʼtaea. 
Judges3:22 Sasapʼakʼ sudhạ chora do lacʼre boloyente itilre aṭkaoena, ar Ehud do chora bae or bocʼleda. Ona chora do tayom secʼ thoṛa oḍok akan tahẽkana." 
Judges3:23 Ona tayom Ehud do pinḍạreye oḍokena ar duạre sińketʼteye kulupkada. 
Judges3:24 Ehud sen tayom kạmiyạko hecʼkateko ńelkeda cetan kandha reakʼ duạr do kulupgea. Onko doko hudiskeda khạṭige uni do bhitri oṛakʼte icʼjoṅe boloakana.” 
Judges3:25 Onko do ḍher ghạṛicʼko koyokʼ horkeda, menkhan enhõ duạr bae jhicʼetʼte onko do lajao dea giḍikate choṛan ạgukate duạrko jhicʼkeda. Arko jhicʼketʼ khan onkoren mạlik do gocʼge otre bhindạṛ akanko ńelkedea." 
Judges3:26 Kạmiyạkoko koyokʼ hor akatʼ oktere Ehud doe ńir pharakente rokʼ akatʼ dhiriko paromkate Seyirateye seṭerena. 
Judges3:27 Onḍe Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭhare sakwae oroṅketʼ khan Israelko do uni sãote buru khon latarteko pheḍ hecʼente uniko pańja idikedea," 
Judges3:28 ente uni doe hukumatʼko tahẽkana, “Ińpe pańjayińa; ente Probhu Isor do aperen bạiri Moabrenko apeakʼ tireye jimạ akatʼkoa.” Onate onko do uniko pańja idikedea ar oka jaega secʼte jordan gaḍa taṛam paromokʼ onako jaegakoko dokholkeda. Ar okoe hõ onako jaega secʼte bako parom ocowatʼkoa." 
Judges3:29 Unre onko do gel hajar Moabikoko gocʼketʼkoa. Noko Moabiko do jotoge daṛeankoko tahẽkana, menkhan onkoren okoehõ bako ńir bańcao daṛeada." 
Judges3:30 Ar enhilokʼ Moab disạm do Israelkoakʼ hatre hecʼena, ar irạlgel bochor hạbicʼ disạmre suluk tahẽyena." 
Judges3:31 Ehud tayom do Anatren hopon Samgar onkoren raje hoyena. Uni do ḍaṅgra gupi ṭheṅgate Philisṭikoren turui sae hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. Uni hõ Israelkoe rukhiyạletʼkoa. 
Judges4:1 Ehude gocʼen tayom Israelko do arhõ Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onage kạmiko dhurạuena. 
Judges4:2 Onate Probhu Isor do Jabin ńutuman mitʼṭen Kanani rajakʼ tire onkoe jimạkatʼkoa. Jabin do Hasor khon raje calaoetʼ tahẽkana. Uniren senaputiyakʼ ńutum do Sisera tahẽkana. Uni do Harosetreye tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Judges4:3 Jabinakʼ do irạl sae mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍiko tahẽkantaea ar uni do bargel bochor hạbicʼ Israelko cetanre ạḍi bạṛicʼ jor julume caloetʼ tahẽkana. Onate Israelko do Probhu ṭhen goṛo ńam lạgitʼko rakʼkeda. 
Judges4:4 Unre Lapidotren oṛakʼ hoṛ Debora do mitʼṭen maejiu nạbiye tahẽkana. Ar unige Israelkoe bicạretʼko tahẽkana. 
Judges4:5 Uni do Ephrayem buru ṭoṭhako reakʼ Rama ar Bethel tala reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ khijur dare buṭạreye duṛupʼkan tahẽkana, ar Israelko do akoakʼ jhogṛa emanko miṭmaṭ lạgitʼ uni ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkana." 
Judges4:6 Uni do Napthali disạm reakʼ Kedes nagraha khon Abinoam hopon Barake hoho ạgu ocokedeteye metadea, “Israelkoren Probhu Isor do niạ hukume emamkana, ‘Napthali ar Sebulon gusṭirenko khon gel hajar hoṛko hataokom ar soṅgekate Tabor burute idikom." 
Judges4:7 Iń do Jabinren senaputi Sisera ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko ar onkoakʼ rãt gạḍiko sudhạ Kison gaḍa ṭheniń idikoa ar amakʼ tireń jimạkoa.’ ” 
Judges4:8 Barak do Deborae metadea, “Iń sãote amem calakʼ khan, enḍekhan doń senokʼgea, ar baṅ khan do bạń calakʼa.”" 
Judges4:9 Deborae menkeda, “Am sãoteń calakʼa, menkhan niạ lạṛhại reakʼ sabasi do bam ńama, ente Probhu Isor do mitʼṭen maejiuakʼ tire Siserae jimạyea.” Ar niạ katha menkate Debora do Barak sãote Kedesteye senena." 
Judges4:10 Ar Barak do Sebulon ar Napthali gusṭiren hoṛkoe hohowatʼkoa. Onate gel hajar hoṛ do uni sãoteko senena ar Debora hõ onko tulucʼe calaoena. 
Judges4:11 Ar Herob ńutuman mitʼṭen Kenani hoṛ do eṭakʼ Kenaniko, metakʼme Mose hońhartetʼ bõsrenko bạgikate Kedes ṭhen Sananim reakʼ elon dare sorre tạmbui beretʼ akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges4:12 Sisera do tinre niạ khobore ańjomkeda baṅma Abinoamren hopon Barak do Tabor buruteye rakapʼ akana unre uni do are sae mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍiko ar uniren sanam hoṛko jarwakate Haroset-hagoyim khon Kison gaḍa aṛeteye senena. 
Judges4:13  
Judges4:14 Unre Debora do Barake metadea, “Am do laha idikʼme, Probhu Isor do teheńge amakʼ tire Siserae jimạ akadea. Probhu Isor do am laha lahateye senakana. ” Unre Barak do Tabor buru khone pheḍ hecʼena ar uni tayomte gel hajar hoṛko senena." 
Judges4:15 Barak do tinre onko cetanre jhãpe emkeda unre uni samaṅre Probhu Isor do Sisera ar uniyakʼ sanam rãt gạḍi ar lạṛhại phạdkoe andmandao ocoketʼkoa. Unre Sisera do acʼakʼ rãt bạgikateye dạṛkeda. 
Judges4:16 Barak do menkhan Haroset-hagoyim hạbicʼ onkoakʼ rãt gạḍiko ar lạṛhại phạdkoe khudạu idiketʼkoa. Uni do Siseraren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa, mitʼ hoṛ hõ sarecʼ do bae doholetʼkoa." 
Judges4:17 Ar Sisera doe ńir paskaoente Kenini Herobren bạhu Jayelakʼ tạmbureye boloyena, unre Hasorren raj Jabin ar Kenini Herobakʼ bõsrenko talare gate tahẽkana." 
Judges4:18 Ar Jayel do tạmbu khone oḍokente Sisera hoho adeteye metadea, “E baba, dela bhitrite bolokʼme; ar alom botorokʼa.” Onate Sisera do uniyakʼ tạmbuteye boloyena ar Jayel do kombolte uniye oyo poṭomkedea." 
Judges4:19 Siserae menkeda, “Dakʼ tetaṅedeń kana, den thoṛa ńũ ocoyińme.” Jayel do toa reakʼ kum jhicʼadeteye ńũ ocokedea ar tayomte arhõe poṭom dohṛakadea." 
Judges4:20 Ona tayom Sisera do uniye metadea, “Am do tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhen teṅgokokʼme. Ar jãhãege hecʼkateye kulime bhitrire jãhãe menaea se baṅa enḍekhan menme, ‘bạnuiya.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Sisera doe laṅga akan tahẽkante onḍegeye jạpitʼkeda. Unre Jayel do tạmbu reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ khil ar hạtuṛe hataokeda. Ar hape hapete senkate Siserawakʼ cạndire onae kuṭạm bitʼadea ar ona do otre bitʼ hapeyena. Ar onate Sisera doe gocʼena. 
Judges4:22 Barak do Sisera sendra sendrate onḍeye seṭerena. Unre Jayel do uni hoho ạguiye lạgitʼ bahrete oḍok hecʼenteye menkeda, “Dela hijukʼme, okoeyem sendra baṛayedekan uniń udukʼama.” Barak do uni sãote bhitrite boloyenteye ńelkedea Sisera doe gocʼakana ar uniyakʼ cạndire tạmbu reakʼ khil do bolo akana." 
Judges4:23 Enhilokʼ Isor do Kananikoren Jabin raj Israelko tabereye ạgukedea. 
Judges4:24 Ar uni upạrte din din Israelko doko daṛe idiyena ar mucạtʼre uniko marao giḍikadea. 
Judges5:1 Enhilokʼ Debora ar Abinoamren hopon Barak do noa sereńkin sereńkeda: 
Judges5:2 Israelkoren mukhiyạko do lạṛhạire hoṛkoko ạyurketʼkoa, onko do akoakʼ kusiteko laha idiyena. Probhu Isorakʼ sabasige hoyokʼtaema!" 
Judges5:3 E rapajko, ańjompe baṛe; E disạm cakʼlaoko, luturakʼpe; iń do Probhu Isor ńutumteń sereńa, Israelkoren Probhu Isor ńutumteń sarhao sereńa." 
Judges5:4 E Probhu Isor, am do tinre Seyir khonem mohnḍayena, Edom disạm khonem oḍokena, unre dhạrti do daldalaoena ar serma khon dakʼem jạṛi ocokeda." 
Judges5:5 Unre Probhu Isor samaṅre buruko do daldalaoena, Israelkoren Probhu Isor samaṅre Sinại buru hõ dalmalaoena." 
Judges5:6 Anatren hopon Samgar ar Jayel bidạlre hortenko do sodor ḍahar bạgikate ạcur bihur horko pańjakeda. 
Judges5:7 Unre Israelkoakʼ atokore celege bako tahẽkana, ar tin hạbicʼ iń Debora do Israelkoren eṅgat leka bạń tahẽkan, un hạbicʼ onkoakʼ atoko do khạlige tahẽkana." 
Judges5:8 Onko do nãwã isorko secʼ monko lawerketʼtakoa Ar onkoakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen lạṛhại hoyena. Unre pongel hajar Israelkoakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼ ḍhal hõ baṅ tahẽkana, ar mitʼṭecʼ borlom hõ baṅ tahẽkana." 
Judges5:9 Ińakʼ mone do Israelkoren onko mukhiyạko secʼ lawerena ar apnarakʼ kusite lạṛhạiko oḍok senena; Probhu Isorakʼ sabasige hoyokʼtaema baṛe! 
Judges5:10 Ape okoe do ponḍ gadha eṅgare decʼkate ar kombol reakʼ godire duṛupʼkate hortepe calakʼkan, ape do niạko reaṅ baṛe sereńpe." 
Judges5:11 Ańjompe, dakʼ lo ṭhạ̃ire hoṛko doko khae khoyeda; ar Israelakʼ atoren hoṛko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do bańcaokʼ reakʼe roṛeda. Noa ańjomkate hoṛko do Nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenko senena." 
Judges5:12 Ebhenokʼme E Debora, ebhenokʼme! Ebhenokʼme ar sereń joṅme. E Abinoamren hopon Barak, ma beretʼme; ar lạṛhạire sapʼ ńam akanko do jhuṭiạu idikom." 
Judges5:13 Ona tayom sarecʼ hoṛko do manotan hoṛko ṭhenko hecʼena; ar Probhu Isorren hoṛko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ iń ṭhenko hecʼena. 
Judges5:14 Adomko hoṛ do Ephrayim khonko hecʼena Amalekiko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan ṭhen; onko doko hecʼena Benjamin gusṭiren hoṛko tayomte. Makir khon do mukhiyạko hecʼena, ar Sebulon khon do cakʼlao ṭheṅga sasapʼkoge." 
Judges5:15 Isạkarren senaputiko do Debora sãoteko senena; Isạkarren hoṛko do buru nalateko pheḍ calaoena Barak tayom tayomtege. Rubenren lạṛhại phạdko do monko kajakketʼtakoa. 
Judges5:16 E Rubenren hoṛko, bhiḍi chaṛko talare do cedakʼpe duṛupʼ akana? Ape do cetʼ gupikoakʼ tiriyạ ańjompe khojleda? Ar Rubenren lạṛhại phạdko do mot baṅ mitʼlentakoa." 
Judges5:17 Gileadren hoṛko do jordan hanasareko tahẽyena. Ar Dan gusṭirenko do cedakʼ jahaj ṭhenko tahẽyena? Ar Aser gusṭirenko do jalapuri aṛereko tahẽyena; tahẽyenako bondor ṭhenge. 
Judges5:18 Lạṛhạire Sebulonren hoṛko do gujukʼ hạbicʼ jiwiko alaekeda; Napthaliren hoṛko hõ ṭạnḍi reakʼ usul jaegakore. 
Judges5:19 Rapajkoko hecʼena arko lạṛhạiyena, unre Kananren raj doko lạṛhạiyena; Tanak ṭhen, Megido reakʼ dakʼko ṭhenge, menkhan mitʼ kuṭrạ rupạ hõ bako luṭana." 
Judges5:20 Serma khon ipilkoko lạṛhạiyena, apan ạpin ḍahar khon lạṛhạiyenako Sisera birudre." 
Judges5:21 Ona sedae reakʼ gaḍa dakʼ ona Kison gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ do bạirikoe ạtu idiketʼkoa. E ińakʼ jiwi, keṭecʼkate lahakʼme baṛe." 
Judges5:22 Ona tayom ot do daldalaoena sadomkoakʼ kaṛapʼ kaṛapʼ khurạte daṛean sadomko calaoena kamsa kodokʼ kamsaoate. 
Judges5:23 Probhu Isorren goḍete menkeda, “Meros baṛe sarapaeme, ạḍitetʼ sarapaeme onḍenko hoṛ do; lạṛhạire Probhu Isor tulucʼ bako seletʼlena, ar daṛeanko upạrte hõ baṅa.”" 
Judges5:24 Kenini Heborren bạhu Jayel do, bhạgangeae maejiuko modre; uni doe bhạgangea tạmbureko tahenkan maejiuko modre." 
Judges5:25 Sisera dakʼe khojletʼre uni do toae ạguadea; ar mońj okocʼ bạṭite dahegeye emadea. 
Judges5:26 Uni do tạmbu reakʼ khile hataokeda, ar jojomtire hạtuṛe sapʼkeda; ar Siserae do khile kuṭạm jalatʼadete bohokʼe posakʼketʼtaea ar cạndireye kuṭạm tapʼadea." 
Judges5:27 Uniyakʼ jaṅga ṭhen Sisera doe bhindạṛena ar onḍege uni doe bhindạṛ tahẽyena; ar uniyakʼ jaṅga ṭhen okareye bhindạṛen onḍege uni doe gocʼena. 
Judges5:28 Siseraren eṅgattetʼ do khiṛki duạr khone oyoṅkeda, ar pińjrạ khon ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiko hijukʼ do cedakʼ bilomokʼ kana? Rãt gạḍiko reakʼ pạ̃ihạ̃ saḍe do cedakʼ baṅ ańjomokʼ kana?”" 
Judges5:29 Uniren mukhiyạ ạkilan erakoko roṛ ruạṛadea; ar uni hõ mone monte roroṛe ehopʼena," 
Judges5:30 “Khạṭige onko do luṭakʼ jinisko ńamakada ar ako talareko hạṭiń joṅkana; mimitʼ herel hoṛ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen se barea kuṛi ar Sisera lạgitʼ do nana parkan kicricʼ, tiń galaṅakʼ kicricʼko, hoṭokʼ beṛhaeteakʼ baha galaṅakatʼ kicricʼko noa sanamakʼge cetʼ bako luṭ akada?”" 
Judges5:31 E Probhu Isor, amren bạiriko nonkageko marao cabakʼma; menkhan okoe amko dulạṛme Onko do siń cando leka daṛeanko hoyokʼma. Inạ tayom disạmre pongel bochor hạbicʼ suluk tahẽkana." 
Judges6:1 Israelko do arhõ Probhu Isorakʼ nońjorre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage kạmiko ehopʼena. Onate uni do Midiạnrenkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa ar eae bochor hạbicʼ onko gobolreye dohoketʼkoa. 
Judges6:2 Israelko cetanre Midiạnrenkoakʼ santao do nunạkʼ ḍher idiyena je, Israelko do buru reakʼ paṛakʼre, danderre ar buru cetan reakʼ gaṛkore asrayokʼko ehopʼena." 
Judges6:3 Israelko do tinre phosolko eretʼ tahẽkana unre Midiạnrenko, Amalekiko ar purub disạmren hoṛko hecʼkate onkoakʼ disạmko luṭ idiyetʼkan tahẽkana." 
Judges6:4 Onko do Israelkoakʼ disạmre jhãp emkate Gasa hạbicʼ sanam jaega reakʼ phosolko nosṭoyetʼ tahẽkana. Israelko jomkate jiwetʼko tahẽ daṛeakʼ nonkan jãhãnakʼge Midiạnrenkoakʼ ti khon baṅ rukhiyạkʼkan tahẽkana, onkoren bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako ar gadhako hõ baṅa." 
Judges6:5 Onko do akoren ạsul janwarko ar tạmbuko salakʼ pohoko leka jhãke jhãkko hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges6:6 Midiạnrenko do Israelko tulucʼ ạḍi bạṛicʼko beoharetʼ tahẽkana, ar onate onko do Isor ṭhenko rakʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges6:7 Midiạnrenkoakʼ santao iạte Israelko do tinre Probhu Isor ṭhen rarakʼko ehopʼena unre Probhu Isor do mitʼṭen nạbi onko ṭhene kolkedea. Uniye menkeda, “Israelkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘golam oṛakʼ Misor disạm khon ińgeń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea." 
Judges6:8  
Judges6:9 Misor reakʼ ektiạri khon ar sanam sasantaokoakʼ ti khon ińgeń rukhiyạ akatʼpea. Ape samaṅ khon ińgeń laga ńir akatʼkoa ar onkoakʼ disạmiń emakatʼpea. 
Judges6:10 Ińiń metatʼpe tahẽkana, ińkangeạń Probhu aperen Isor do. Ar okoeyakʼ disạmrepe girobasokʼkan onko Amorikoren debotako do alope sewawakoa;’ menkhan ape do ińakʼ katha bape ańjomleda.”" 
Judges6:11 Mitʼdin Probhu Isorren goḍet do hecʼkate Ophra ato reakʼ Elon dare buṭạreye duṛupʼena. Ona jaega do Abieser bõsren Joasakʼ ạidạrire tahẽkana. Onḍe uniren hopon Gideon do Midiạnrenko ṭhen khon guhum okoe lạgitʼ darkha lelen kunḍre onae enokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges6:12 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do Gideon ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye metadea, “E daṛean bir, Probhu Isor do am sãore menaea.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideone menkeda, “Menkhan E ińren Probhu Isor, am ale sãote menam khan enḍekhan ale cetanre noako do cedakʼ hoyokʼkana? Ar okayena uniyakʼ ona hahaṛa kạmiko one uniyakʼ katha aleren hapṛamko ṭhen khonle ańjomakatʼ, Probhu Isorge Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼkoa mente? Menkhan ńitokʼ uni do aleye dea giḍiakatʼlea ar Midiạnrenkoakʼ tireye jimạ akatʼlea." 
Judges6:14 Probhu Isor do uni secʼ ạcurenteye menkeda, “Amakʼ niạ daṛetege Do calakʼme ar Midiạnrenkoakʼ ti khon Israelko bańcaokom, ente ińgeń koletʼmea.”" 
Judges6:15 Gideone menkeda, “Menkhan E ińren Probhu Isor, iń do cekate Israelkoń bańcaokoa? Manase gusṭiko modre alege joto khon nicạṛ utạrko kanale, ar aleakʼ gharońjrenko modre hõ ińgeń huḍiń utạricʼ kana.”" 
Judges6:16 Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Iń do am sãoteń tahena, ar onate sanam Midiạnrenko do mitʼ hoṛ lekagem haraokoa.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideone menkeda, “Amakʼ dayań ńamakatʼ khan, jemoniń bujhạu daṛeakʼ, sạrige am do iń sãote katham roṛeda ar onate mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ baṛe imạńme." 
Judges6:18 Ar ruạṛ hecʼkate am samaṅre ińakʼ dan ạuriń dohowam hạbicʼ alom calakʼa. ” Uni doe menkeda, “Am ạurim ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ koyokʼ hor akaeyiń tahena.”" 
Judges6:19 Gideon do bhitrite bolokate mitʼṭen merom hopon gurkateye isinkedea ar gel irạl keji holoṅ tulucʼ thoṛa bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạye benaokeda. Ona tayom onako bahrete ạgukate Elon dare buṭạre Probhu Isorren goḍet samaṅreye dohokeda. 
Judges6:20 Unre Isorren goḍet do uniye metadea, “Jel ar bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ do niạ dhiri cetanre dohoyme, ar rase hõ dulakʼme.” Ar Gideon doe onkakeda." 
Judges6:21 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍetakʼ tire okaṭakʼ ṭheṅga tahẽkan ona reakʼ agalte ona jel ar bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạye ṭunḍukeda. Onate dhiri khon seṅgel rakapʼente jel ar piṭhạye atarkeda, Ar Probhu Isorren goḍet doe chanena." 
Judges6:22 Gideon do Probhu Isorren goḍet kanae menteye bujhạuketʼ khane menkeda, “Hae hae, E Probhu Isor, iń do Probhu Isorren goḍet samna sạmniń ńelkedea!”" 
Judges6:23 Menkhan Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Suluk hoyokʼtam ma, ar alom botorokʼa. Am do bam gujukʼa.”" 
Judges6:24 Unre Gideon do Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaoketʼte ona reakʼ ńutum do Jehowa-Shalome dohokeda (mane do “Probhu Isorge suluktetʼ”). Ar ona pinḍ do teheń hạbicʼ Abieser gusṭikoakʼ Ophrare menakʼa. 
Judges6:25 Ona ńindạge Probhu Isor do Gideone metadea, “Ạpumakʼ ḍaṅgra pal khon uni eae serma umerren dosaricʼ ḍaṅgram hataoea. Ar ona tayom Bakʼal debota ńutumte ạpum okaṭakʼ pinḍ do gaṛ lekan ṭhạ̃ireye benao akatʼ ona rạputʼ gejerme ar ona aṛere okaṭakʼ Asera-muṭhạn menakʼ ona hõ makʼ rạpudme." 
Judges6:26 Ona tayom ona jaega cetanre amren Isor Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭen mońj okocʼ pinḍ benaome. Ar ona tayom onem makʼ giḍiakatʼ Asera muṭhạn reakʼ kaṭte dosaricʼ ḍaṅgrate mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅme.” 
Judges6:27 Ona iạte Gideon do acʼren kạmiyạko mod khon gel hoṛe soṅgeketʼkote Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekae kạmikeda. Menkhan acʼakʼ gharońj ar atoren hoṛko botorte sińre baṅkate ńindại kạmikeda. 
Judges6:28 Setakʼ jokhecʼ atoren hoṛko do jạpitʼ khon beretʼkate tinreko ńelkeda Bakʼal debotawakʼ pinḍ do rạputʼ gejer akana ar Asera-muṭhạn hõ makʼ giḍi akana ar mitʼṭen nãwã pinḍ benaokate onare dosaricʼ ḍaṅgrae samaṅ akana. 
Judges6:29 Unre onko do hạni nại kupulikʼko ehopʼena, “Noa do okoeye kạmi akada? ” Ar suṭhikko hataoketʼ khan, Joasren hopon Gideone kạmi akada menteko baḍaekeda." 
Judges6:30 Ar onko do Joas ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Amren hopon oḍok ạguiyem. Uni do gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea, ente Bakʼal debotawakʼ pinḍe rạputʼ giḍi akada ar Asera-muṭhạn hõe makʼ giḍi akada.”" 
Judges6:31 Menkhan Joas do acʼ birudre teṅgo akan hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ Bakʼal debota ńutumtepe lạṛhạiya? Apege cetʼ unipe dogea? Jãhãege uni ńutumteye lạṛhại unige gapa ạuri setagokʼreye gocʼ ocokʼa. Bakʼal do sạrigeye jãhãn debota kan khan uni do apnargeye lạṛhạima, ente uniyakʼ pinḍge rạputʼ giḍi ocoakana.”" 
Judges6:32 En hilokʼ Gideonakʼ ńutum uni do Jerubakʼale dohoketʼtaea (mane do “Bakʼalge uni tulucʼe lạṛhạima”). Ar Gideon do Bakʼal debotawakʼ pinḍe rạputʼ giḍiletʼte Joase menkeda, “Gideon upạrte Bakʼalge uni tulucʼe lạṛhạima. ”" 
Judges6:33 Ar Midiạnrenko, Amalekiko ar purub disạmren lạṛhại phạdko jotoko mitʼente jordan gaḍako paromkeda ar Jisreyel buru nalare senkateko ḍerayena." 
Judges6:34 Unre Probhu Isorren Jiu do Gideone daṛe ocokedea. Ar Gideon do sakwae oroṅkeda ar Abieser gusṭirenko acʼ ṭhen hecʼkateko jarwayena. 
Judges6:35 Uni do Manase gusṭirenko ṭhen hõ khobore kolkeda ar onko hõ uni ṭhenko jarwayena. Uni do Aser, Sebulon ar Napthali gusṭirenko ṭhen hõ khobore kolkeda ar onko hõ daramko lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena." 
Judges6:36 Unre Gideon do Isore metadea, “Ńelme, iń do khạrạire bhiḍi upʼ iń dohoyeda. Amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate ińakʼ tite Israelko bańcaoko lạgitʼem ṭhik dohoakatʼ enḍekhan eken ona upʼ cetanrege sisir paṛaokʼma ar sarecʼ jaegako do rohoṛge tahenma. Enḍekhaniń bujhạu daṛeakʼa, amem menakatʼ lekage ińakʼ tite Israelkom bańcaokoa.”" 
Judges6:37  
Judges6:38 Ar onkage hoyena; dosar hilokʼ Gideon do ạḍi setakʼre jạpitʼ khon beretʼkate ona bhiḍi upʼe hotʼkeda ar sisir dakʼ oḍokena. Ar onate mitʼ bạṭi dakʼ hoyena. 
Judges6:39 Ona tayom Gideon do Isore metadea, “Iń cetanre alom raṅgaokʼa. Iń do eken ar mitʼ dhaoiń biḍạumea. Ńitokʼ do bhiḍi upʼ rohoṛge tahenma ar otre do sisir ńurhạkʼma. ”" 
Judges6:40 Enhilokʼ ńindạ Isor do onageye onkakeda. Eken bhiḍiyakʼ upʼ moto rohoṛ tahẽyena ar sarecʼ joto jaegare do sisir ńurhạyena. 
Judges7:1 Jerubakʼal, metakʼme Gideon ar uniren sanam hoṛko do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate Harod ṭoṭha reakʼ dakʼ jharna ṭhenko ḍerayena. Ar onko utạr reakʼ More buru ṭhenakʼ buru nalare do Midiạnrenkoakʼ ḍera tahẽkana." 
Judges7:2 Probhu Isor do Gideone metadea, “Midiạnrenko onkoakʼ tireń soprotko lạgitʼ do amren hoṛkoakʼ lekha ḍhergetakoa. Ariń onka lekhan Israelko do apnarko sarhaokʼa arko men boteja, akoakʼ daṛetegeko bańcao akana." 
Judges7:3 Onate hoṛkom baḍae ocokoa, okoeko botorokʼkan onko do Gilead buru bạgikate oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calao daṛeakʼa.” Onate bargel bar hajar hoṛ doko ruạṛ calaoena ar gel hajar hoṛko sarecʼena." 
Judges7:4 Unre Probhu Isor do Gideone metadea, “Ńit hõ ḍher hoṛko sarecʼ akana. Onko do dakʼ ṭhen idikom. Ar iń do onḍe onkoń bachaokoa. Ariń men khan, ‘nui hoṛ am sãoteye senokʼa, ’ enḍekhan uni doe calakʼa; ariń men, ‘nui hoṛ am sãote bae calakʼa, ’ enḍekhan uni do bae calakʼa.”" 
Judges7:5 Onate Gideon do hoṛko dakʼ ṭhene idiketʼkoa. Onḍe Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Seta leka caṭokʼkate okoe dakʼko ńũi onko khon okoe ikhṛumkate dakʼko ńũi onkom begarkoa.”" 
Judges7:6 Ar pe sae hoṛ do ańjlekate dakʼko ńũkeda ar sarecʼko jotoge ńũi lạgitʼko ikhṛumena. 
Judges7:7 Unre Probhu Isor do Gideone metadea, “Okoe pe sae hoṛ do alaṅte caṭokʼkate dakʼko ńũketʼ onko hotetege iń doń bańcaopea ar apeakʼ tire Midiạnrenkoń jimạkoa. Ar eṭakʼko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ joṅma.”" 
Judges7:8 Onate Gideon do pe sae hoṛ dohokate sarecʼ Israelko oṛakʼteye kol ruạṛkatʼkoa. Ar jomakʼko ar sakwako doe koe dohoketʼkote onko pe sae hoṛko ṭhene tahẽyena. Midiạnrenkoakʼ ḍera do tahẽkana Gideonkoakʼ ḍera reakʼ latar secʼre. 
Judges7:9 Enhilokʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do Gideone metadea, “Beretʼme, ar pheḍ senkate onkoakʼ ḍera cetanre jhãp emme. Iń do amakʼ tireń jimạ akatʼkoa." 
Judges7:10 Ar onko cetanre jhãp emem botorokʼkan khan enḍekhan amren guti Pura soṅgeyem ar onkoakʼ ḍerate pheḍ calakʼme," 
Judges7:11 ar onkom ańjomkoa cetʼko meneda mente. Onate Gideon do acʼren guti Purai soṅgekedete lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍera ṭhene senena. 
Judges7:12 Unre Midiạnrenko, Amalekiko ar purub disạmren hoṛko do ona buru nalare poho lekako tahẽkana. Onkoren ũṭko do gaṅga gitil leka lekhare ạḍi saṅgeko tahẽkana." 
Judges7:13 “Gideon do tinre onḍe senkateye seṭerena unre mitʼṭen hoṛ do acʼren gate sãote mitʼṭecʼ kukmũ reakʼ kathae lạiyaekan tahẽkana. Uni doe menetʼ tahẽkana, “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ iń kukmũkeda. Iń doń ńelkeda Jao reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ do Midiạnrenkoakʼ tạmbure guṛdạu hecʼena. Ona do onkoakʼ tạmbure nunạkʼ murukte josena, ar onate onkoakʼ tạmbu do lạnduṛena.”" 
Judges7:14 Uniren gateye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Noa do Israelkoren Joasren hopon Gideonakʼ tarwaṛe chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana. Isor do Midiạnrenko ar onkoakʼ goṭa ḍerage Gideonakʼ tireye soprota.”" 
Judges7:15 Gideon do ona kukmũ reakʼ katha ar ona reakʼ manetetʼ ańjomkate ombakʼente Isore sewawadea. Ar ona tayom do Israelkoakʼ ḍerate ruạṛ hecʼkate ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoateye menkeda, “Ma beretʼpe, Isor do Midiạnrenkoakʼ ḍera ape tireye soprotakada.”" 
Judges7:16 Uni do onko pe sae hoṛko pe ṭhene hạṭińketʼkoa ar mimitʼkoakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼkate sakwa, mitʼṭecʼkate khạli kanḍa ar onako kanḍare mosal hõe ematʼkoa." 
Judges7:17 Ona tayom uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do ińpe beṅgetʼạńạ ar iń cetʼ iń cekae ape hõpe onkaea. Ḍera ṭhen seṭerkate iń okań cekaea ape hõ ṭhik onagepe onkaea." 
Judges7:18 Iń ar iń sãoten sanamko tinre sakwako oroṅa unre ḍera beṛhae khon ape hõ sakwape oroṅa ar ãṭ aṛaṅtepe mena, ‘Probhu Isor ńutumte ar Gideon ńutumte.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Ar Midiạnrenko do tala ńindạ horhokoko bodolokʼkan tahẽkanre Gideon ar uni sãoten mitʼsae hoṛ do ḍera ṭhenko seṭerena. Onko do akaoakʼ sakwako oroṅketʼte ti reakʼ kanḍako rạputʼketʼtakoa. 
Judges7:20 Pe dolren hoṛge mitʼ dhaoteko rạputʼkeda. Ar leṅga tire mosal ar jojomtire sakwa hataokate onko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko hohokeda, “Probhu Isor ńutumte tarwaṛe ar Gideon ńutumte tarwaṛe.”" 
Judges7:21 Ḍera beṛhaete Gideonren hoṛko do tinre akoakʼ ṭhạ̃ireko teṅgo thirena unre sanam Midiạnrenko do kạumạu ar ńir baṛaeko ehopʼena. 
Judges7:22 Pe sae sakwa saḍekʼ oktere Probhu Isor do ḍera bhitriren hoṛkoe andmandaoketʼkote onko do mitʼ hoṛ armitʼ hoṛ cetanre tarwaṛeante lạṛhạiko ehopʼena. Onate Midiạnren lạṛhại phạdko do Tabat ṭhen Beth-sita hạbicʼko dạṛkeda. 
Judges7:23 Unre Israelko modren Napthali, Aser ar Manasi gusṭiren sanam hoṛko hoho ocoyena ar onko do Midiạnrenko khudạu idiketʼkoa." 
Judges7:24 Ar Gideon do Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ sanam jaegare hoṛ kolketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Midiạnrenko upạrte pheḍ hijukʼpe ar onko seṭerokʼ laharege Beth-bara hạbicʼ huḍiń gaḍa ar jordan gaḍa reakʼ taṛam paromokʼ jaegako dokhol maṛaṅpe. Onate Ephrayimren sanam hoṛko mitʼente Beth-bara hạbicʼ sanam huḍiń gaḍa ar jordan gaḍa reakʼ taṛam paromokʼ jaegako hatkeda." 
Judges7:25 Onko do Oreb ar Seb ńutuman Midiạnren barea mukhiyạko sapʼketʼkinạ ar Oreb do Oreb reakʼ dhiri ṭhen ar Seb do seb reakʼ darkha lelenkunḍ jaegareko gocʼkedea. Onko do Midiạnrenko khudạu idiketʼkoa ar Oreb ar Seb tạkinakʼ bohokʼ do jordan hanasa Gideon ṭhenko idikeda. 
Judges8:1 “Ephrayimren hoṛ do Gideonko kulikedea, “Ale tulucʼ nonka do cedakʼem beoharkeda? Midiạnrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍokʼ calakʼ jokhecʼ cedakʼ bam hohoatʼlea?” Ar nonkage onko do keṭecʼ keṭecʼ katha Gideonko ańjomadea." 
Judges8:2 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape khon do cetʼ ḍhergeń ceka akada? Ephrayim okaṭakʼ darkha joko halaṅ ạguakatʼ ona do cetʼ Ạbieserakʼ tumạlakʼko khon baṅ ḍhergea?" 
Judges8:3 Isor do apeakʼ tire Midiạnren mukhiyạ Oreb ar Sebe soprot akatʼkinạ. Ape khon do cetʼ ḍhergeń ceka akada?” Onate Gideon upạrte onkoakʼ raṅgao do cabayentakoa. 
Judges8:4 Gideon ar uniren pe sae hoṛ do Midiạnrenko khudạu idiketʼkote jordan ṭhen hecʼkate gaḍako paromena. Unre onko do ạḍiko laṅga akan tahẽkana," 
Judges8:5 Onate Gideon do Sukotren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren lạṛhại phạdko thoṛa piṭhạ jom ocokope; enteko laṅga akana. Ar iń do ńitokʼ Midiạnren raj Seba ar Salmuna tạkiniń khudạuetʼkinạ.”" 
Judges8:6 Menkhan Sukotren mukhiyạkoko menkeda, “Cedakʼ amren lạṛhại phạdko do piṭhạle jom ocokoa? Seba ar Salmuna tạkinakʼ kuṭrạ akatʼ ti do cetʼ amakʼ tirem ạguakada?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Tinre Probhu Isor do Seba ar Salmuna ińakʼ tireye soprotkinạ unre apeakʼ noa katha iạte hahaṅkar reakʼ rạṅgạini jạnumte apeakʼ dea hartań oṛejtapea.”" 
Judges8:8 Gideon do onḍe khon Penuelteye rakapʼ calaoena ar onḍenko hoṛ hõ piṭhại koeketʼkoa. Menkhan Sukotren hoṛko cetʼlekako metade onkage onko hõko menkeda. 
Judges8:9 Unre Gideon do Penuelren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do tinre jitạukateń ruạṛ hijukʼa unre noa gaṛ doń bhaṅla bhaṭ oṭokakʼa.”" 
Judges8:10 Seba ar Salmuna do gelmõṛẽ hajar lạṛhại phạdante Karkorrekin tahẽkana. Purub disạmren lạṛhại phạdko modre nokoge sarecʼko tahẽkana ar mitʼ lakh bargel lạṛhại phạdko doko gocʼ ocolena. 
Judges8:11 Nobah ar Jogbeha reakʼ purub secʼreko tahẽkan hoṛkoakʼ horte senkate Gideon do ackage onko lạṛhại phạdko cetanre jhãpe emkeda. Unre onko do ạḍi nirdạndiko tahẽkana. 
Judges8:12 Sebah ar Salmuna ńutuman Midiạnren unkin banar raj dokin dạṛkeda. Menkhan Gideon do unkine khudạu idiketʼkinteye sapʼketʼkinạ, ar onkoren goṭa lạṛhại phạdko do Gideon iạte ạḍi botor caṛhaoatʼkoa." 
Judges8:13 Inạ tayom Joasren hopon Gideon do Heros ńutumanakʼ horte lạṛhại khone ruạṛena. 
Judges8:14 Uni do horre Sukotren mitʼṭen juạn koṛa sapʼkateye kulikedea. Uni juạn koṛa do Sukotren eaegel eae maraṅ hudạren hoṛkoakʼ ar murubbikoakʼ ńutume ol adea. 
Judges8:15 Ar Gideon do Sukotre senkate onḍenko hoṛe metatʼkoa, “Nukin ńelkinpe Seba ar Salmuna. Nukin lạgitʼge posṛa kedeńtepe menleda, ‘cedakʼ amren lạṛhại phạdko do piṭhạle jom ocokoa? Seba ar Salmunawakʼ ti do cetʼem kuṭrạ ạgu akada?’" 
Judges8:16 Gideon do Sukotren murubbikoe sapʼketʼkoa ar hahaṅkar reakʼ rạṅgạini jạnumte deae dal oṛecʼketʼtakoa. 
Judges8:17 Uni do Penuelakʼ gaṛe dhaṅdhaserkeda ar onḍenko hoṛe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. 
Judges8:18 Ona tayom uni do Seba ar Salmuna tạkine kuliketʼkinạ, “Taborre cetʼ lekan hoṛ apeakʼ titeko gocʼ ocoakana?” Onkinkin roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am lekan hoṛ, mimitʼko do rajren hoponko leka.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideone menkeda, “Onko do ińren boehako tahẽkana, ińren mitʼ lacʼ boehage. Jiwetʼ Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, onko jiwetʼpe doholeko khan iń hõ apeko jiwetʼ iń dohokepea.”" 
Judges8:20 Inạ tayom uni do acʼren maraṅicʼ hopon Jethore metadea, “Unkin gocʼkinme.” Menkhan Jethorakʼ umer komge tahẽkante uni do botorte tarwaṛege bae oḍokleda." 
Judges8:21 Unre Seba ar Salmuna tạkin kin menkeda, “Amge hecʼkate gocʼlińme, ente am cetʼleka onkage amakʼ kạmiko hõ.” Onate Gideon do hecʼkate unkine gocʼketʼkinạ ar unkinren ũṭakʼ hoṭokʼre tahẽkan condro-har doe raṛa hataokeda." 
Judges8:22 Tayomte Israelko do Gideonko metadea, “Am do Midiạnrenkoakʼ ti khonem bańcao akatʼlea, onate am ar amren bõskoge aleren disạm cakʼlaokoko hoyokʼma.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideon do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ale do okoege aperen disạm cakʼlaoko bale hoyokʼa. Iń hõ baṅ ar ińren hoponko hõ baṅ; Probhu Isorge aperen disạm cakʼlaoyicʼe hoyokʼa.”" 
Judges8:24 Uni do arhõe metatʼkoa, “Menkhan ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nehõr menakʼtińạ. Apeakʼ luṭ reakʼ hạṭiń khon mitʼṭecʼkate lutur reakʼ pagra imạńpe.” Uni do noa iạteye menkeda, ente Midiạnrenko do Ismael bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana ar onako oktere Ismael bõsrenko do luturre sona reakʼ pagrako horokʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges8:25 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ale do kusitege onale emokʼa.” Onate onko do mitʼṭecʼ kicricʼko aṭetʼkeda ar mimitʼko do akoakʼ luṭ reakʼ hạṭiń khon mitʼṭecʼkate lutur reakʼ pagrako dohokeda." 
Judges8:26 Onate tinạkʼ sonae ńamketʼ ona reakʼ ojon do bargel keji mõṛẽsae gram hoyena. Ona chaḍa uniyakʼ ńamakʼ condro-har, jhur jhuri, Midiạnren rajkoakʼ horokʼakʼ beguni kicricʼko se ũṭkoakʼ hoṭokʼ reakʼ malako do baṅ sapʼlena." 
Judges8:27 Gideon do onako sonate mitʼṭecʼ ephode benao ocoketʼa ar acʼakʼ ato Ophrareye dohokeda. Ar Israelko do onḍe ona ephod sewawakʼko ehopʼena arko laṭghaṭkeda. Gideon ar uniyakʼ gharońjrenko lạgitʼ onage mitʼṭecʼ jhampa leka hoyena. 
Judges8:28 Nonkage Israelko do Midiạnrenko kobojketʼkoa; onate onko do bohokʼ ar bako rakapʼ daṛeada. Gideonakʼ jionre sarecʼ pongel bochor do disạmre suluk tahẽkana. 
Judges8:29 Ona lạṛhại tayom Joasren hopon Jerubakʼal do oṛakʼe ruạṛ calaoena. 
Judges8:30 Uniren do ạḍi utạr bạhuko tahẽkante acʼrenge eae gel hoponko tahẽkantaea. 
Judges8:31 Sikemre uniren do mitʼṭen miluạ bạhui tahẽkantaea. Uniren hõ mitʼṭen hopone tahẽkana. Gideon do uniyakʼ ńutum Abimeleke doholetʼtaea. 
Judges8:32 Joasren hopon Gideon do haṛamkateye gocʼena. Ar Abieserkoakʼ Ophrare uniren apat Joasakʼ topareko baekadea. 
Judges8:33 Gideonakʼ gujukʼ tayom Israelko do arhõ Probhu Isor bạgikate Bakʼal debota sewawaeko ehopʼena. Onko do Bakʼal-Beritge akoren debota menteko dohowana. 
Judges8:34 Okoe do beṛhaeten bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạletʼko onkoren uni Probhu Isor doko hiṛińkedea. 
Judges8:35 Jerubakʼal, metakʼme Gideon cetʼlekae bhạlạiyletʼko onko do uniyakʼ gharońj lạgitʼ onka bako kạmileda." 
Judges9:1 Jerubakʼalren hopon Abimelek do Sikemre acʼ mamottetʼtako ṭhen senkate onko ar acʼ eṅgattetʼren eṭakʼ sanam bõskoe metatʼkoa," 
Judges9:2 “Sikemren sanam hoṛko kulikope onko lạgitʼ bhageakʼ do okaṭakʼ hoyokʼa- Jerubakʼalren eaegel hoponge disạm cakʼlaokoko hoyokʼ bhage hoyokʼa, se mitʼ hoṛ hoyokʼge bhage hoyokʼa? Alope hiṛińa ińhõ apeakʼ mãyãm ar jelren kangeạń.”" 
Judges9:3 Abimelekren mamottetʼtako do Sikemren hoṛko noako lạiyatʼko khan onko do Abimelek secʼ tahengeko kusiyena. Onkoko menkeda, Abimelek do aboren peṛakanae." 
Judges9:4 Ar onko do Bakʼal- Beritakʼ mundil khon eaegel goṭecʼ rupạko emadea. Onate Abimelek do bhạṅguạ ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoe bhaṛaketʼkoa. Onko do uni soṅgeren hoṛko hoyena. 
Judges9:5 Uni do Ophrare acʼ apatakʼ oṛakʼte senkate acʼren eaegel boehako, metakʼme Jerubakʼalren sanam hoponko inạ mitʼ dhiri cetanregeye gocʼketʼkoa. Menkhan Jerubakʼalren joto khon huḍiń utạricʼ hopon Jotham do okoreye tahẽkanteye bańcaoena." 
Judges9:6 Ona tayom Sikem ar Bet-Miloren sanam hoṛko mitʼente Sikem reakʼ khunṭi ṭhen Elon dare aṛere senkate Abimelekko rajkedea. 
Judges9:7 Ar Jotham do noa kathako lạiyade khan uni do Gerisim buruteye rakapʼente ãṭ aṛaṅte hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Sikemren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe, inạkhan Isor hõ apeakʼ kathae ańjoma." 
Judges9:8 Dareko do mitʼdin ako cetanre mitʼṭen rajko teṅgoyea menteko oḍok calaoena. Onko do jạitun dareko metadea, ‘am do aleren raj baṛe hoyokʼme.’" 
Judges9:9 Menkhan jạitun dare doe metatʼkoa, ‘ińakʼ oka sunumte Isor ar manwako manotokʼkan onako bạgikate cetʼ iń do sanam dareko cetanreń lewer kodorokʼa?" 
Judges9:10 Inạ tayom dareko do Loa dareko metadea, ‘am do aleren raj hoyokʼme.’" 
Judges9:11 Menkhan Loa dareye roṛ ruạṛkeda, ‘iń do ińakʼ bhage ar heṛem jo emokʼ baṅkate cetʼ sanam dareko cetanreń lewer kodorokʼa?’" 
Judges9:12 Inạ tayom dareko do darkha nạ̃ṛĩko metadea, ‘am do aleren raj hoyokʼme.’" 
Judges9:13 Menkhan darkha nạ̃ṛĩ hõe roṛ ruạṛkeda, ‘ińakʼ jo reakʼ oka rasate Isor ar manwako rạskạkʼkan ona baṅkate cetʼ iń do sanam dareko cetanreń lewer kodorokʼa?’" 
Judges9:14 Mucạtʼre joto dareko do jạnumanakʼ dareko metadea, ‘amge aleren raj baṛe hoyokʼme.’" 
Judges9:15 Unre jạnumanakʼ dare do onkoe metatʼkoa, ‘Aperen raj mente sạrigepe teṅgoyiń khan enḍekhan dela hijukʼte ińakʼ umulre asray hataope. Ar bape onkae khan enḍekhan jạnum jhạuạ khon seṅgel oḍok hijukʼte Lebanon reakʼ debdạru darekoe joma.’" 
Judges9:16 “Enḍekhan ańjompe, Abimelek raj benaokate ape do cetʼ biswạsteakʼ ar bhageakʼ kạmipe kạmi akada? Ape do cetʼ Jerubakʼal ar uniyakʼ gharońjrenko upạrte bhageakʼ ar oka lek reakʼ kan onape onka akada?" 
Judges9:17 Iń baba do acʼakʼ jiwi alaekate ape lạgitʼe lạṛhạilena ar Midiạnrenkoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạketʼpea. 
Judges9:18 Menkhan teheń ape do uniyakʼ gharońjrenko upạrtepe huletʼkana. Inạ mitʼ dhiri cetanre uniren eaegel hoponkope khũn akatʼkoa ar uniren kạ̃ṛmĩren hopon Abimelek do Sikemren hoṛko cetanre rajpe benao akadea, ente uni doe aperen peṛakana." 
Judges9:19 Menkhan teheń Jerubakʼal ar uni gharońjrenko lạgitʼ pạtiạr ar bhageakʼ reakʼpe kạmi akatʼ khan Abimelek do aperen rạskạwạnicʼe hoyokʼma ar ape hõ uniren rạskạwanko baṛe hoyokʼpe! 
Judges9:20 Menkhan bape onka akatʼ khan Abimelek bhitri khon seṅgel oḍokʼ hijukʼte apeko, metakʼme Sikemren ar Bet-Miloren hoṛkoe atarpea; metakʼme Sikemren ar Bet-Miloren hoṛko khon hõ seṅgel oḍok hijukʼte Abimeleke lo torojea.”" 
Judges9:21 Ona tayom Jotham do Ber ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegateye dạṛkeda. Uni do acʼren boeha Abimelek botorte onḍege girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Judges9:22 Abimelek do pe bochor Israelko cetanre raje calaokeda. 
Judges9:23 Inạ tayom Isor do Abimelek ar Sikemren hoṛko talare mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ jiue kolkedea. Onate Sikemren hoṛko do Abimelek sãote bepạtiạrko kạmikeda. 
Judges9:24 Isorgeye nonkakeda jemon Jerubakʼalren eaegel hoponkoakʼ mãyãm cetanre oka behokakʼ hoyakan ona iạte onkoren boeha Abimelek cetanre ar gogocʼ kạmire okoeko gokʼṛokoko tahẽkan onko Sikemren hoṛko cetanre hala ruạṛokʼ. 
Judges9:25 Sikemren hoṛko do Abimelek upạrte buru cetanre thoṛa hoṛko dohoketʼkoa, ar onko do danaṅre tahẽkate ona horte calakʼkan hoṛko cetanreko luṭetʼ tahẽkana. Ar ona katha do Abimelek hõko baḍae ocokedea." 
Judges9:26 Onako dinre Ebedren hopon Gakʼal do acʼren boehako soṅgekate Sikemteye hecʼena ar Sikemren hoṛko do unireko pạtiạuena. 
Judges9:27 Onko do akoakʼ khetre senkate darkha joko lenkeda arko porobena. Onko do akoren debotawakʼ mundilte senkateko jom-nũkeda ar Abimelekko sarapadea. 
Judges9:28 Ebedren hopon Gakʼal doe menkeda, “Abimelek doe okoekante Sikemren hoṛ do uni gobolre bon tahena? Uni do cetʼ Jerubakʼalren hopon doe baṅkana? Ar Sebul do cetʼ uniren subedar doe baṅkana? Ape do bickom Sikemren apattetʼ Hamorren bõsko gobolre tahenpe. Cedakʼ abo do Abimelek gobolre bon tahena?" 
Judges9:29 Jodi hoṛko ińakʼ hukumko manao enḍekhan iń do Abimelekiń ocogea. Ariń menkea, ‘amren lạṛhại phạdante dela oḍok hijukʼme.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Ebedren hopon Gakʼalakʼ ona katha Sikemren mukhiyạ Sebul do onae ańjomketʼ khan ạḍiye raṅgaoena. 
Judges9:31 Uni do hape hapete Abimelek niạ kathae baḍae ocokedea, “Ebedren hopon Gakʼal ar uniren boehako do Sikemre hecʼkate am upạrte hoṛkin uskuretʼkoa." 
Judges9:32 Onate am ar amren hoṛko do ạyupʼ jokhecʼ hecʼkate horre tãṛãkʼ akan tahenpe. 
Judges9:33 Ar setakʼ siń candoe rakabokʼ jokhecʼ am do nagraha upạrtem laha idikʼa. Ar Gakʼal ar uniren hoṛko do tinre am upạrteko oḍok hijukʼa unre am do oka cekaeyem menetʼkan onam onkaea.” 
Judges9:34 Onate Abimelek ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do ńindạ jokhecʼko oḍokente pon hạṭińteko hạṭińena ar Sikem ṭhenko oko tahẽyena. 
Judges9:35 Ebedren hopon Gakʼal do nagraha khon oḍokkate tinre phaṭok-duạr ṭhene teṅgo akan tahẽkana. Unre Abimelek ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do oko akan jaega khonko oḍok hecʼena. 
Judges9:36 Gakʼal do onko ńelte Sebule metadea, “Ńelkom, buru cetan khon tinạkʼ hoṛko pheḍ hijukʼ kana.” Sebule roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am do buru reakʼ umulkoge hoṛkom metakokana.”" 
Judges9:37 Menkhan Gakʼal do arhõe menkeda, “Ńelkom, usul utạrakʼ buru khon hoṛko pheḍ hijukʼkana, ar mitʼ dol do gonokkoakʼ dare secʼ khonko hijukʼkana.”" 
Judges9:38 Unre Sebul do uniye metadea, “Ńitokʼ do okayentama mocatem roṛletʼ maraṅ maraṅakʼ katha do? Amem menakada, ‘Abimelek doe cele kante uniyakʼ gobolre bon tahena? Noko hoṛko ma bacom puchạuletʼko. Ńitokʼ do oḍokokʼte onko sãote lạṛhạime.”" 
Judges9:39 Unre Gakʼal do Sikemren hoṛkoe ạyur idiketʼkote Abimelek sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. 
Judges9:40 Abimelek do Gakʼale khudạu idikedea, onate uni doe dạṛ pạnḍucʼkeda. Ar ńir paskaokʼ jokhecʼ uni dolren ḍher hoṛgeko ńẽtʼ ocoyente nagraha reakʼ phaṭokʼ hạbicʼ goṭa horko giḍi tahẽyena." 
Judges9:41 Ar Abimelek do Arumareye tahẽyena ar Sebul do Sikem khon Gakʼal ar uniren boehakoe laga oḍokketʼkoa. 
Judges9:42 Dosar hilokʼ Sikemren hoṛko do tinre bilạn ṭạnḍi secʼko oḍok calakʼkan tahẽkana unre ona sombat do Abimelekko baḍae ocokedea. 
Judges9:43 Khan Abimelek do acʼren hoṛko pe hạṭińteye hạṭińketʼkoa ar onko do bilạn ṭạnḍire tãṛãkʼ akaeko tahẽyena. Ar Nagraha khon hoṛko oḍokʼ hijukʼe ńelketʼko khan uni do onkoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa. 
Judges9:44 Abimelek ar uni dolren hoṛko do samaṅ secʼko ńir calaoente nagraha bolokʼ reakʼ horreko teṅgoyena. Ar bilạn ṭạnḍire okoeko tahẽkan onko eṭakʼ bar dol do onko cetanre jhãpko emkeda arko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges9:45 Goṭa dinko ńẽtʼketʼkote Abimelek do nagrahae hatkeda ar onḍenko hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Ona tayom nagrahae ḍahao maraoketʼte onare buluṅe chiṭiạuada. 
Judges9:46 Niạ sombat ańjomkate Sikem gaṛren hoṛko do El-Berit debotawakʼ mundil reakʼ bhitri oṛakʼreko boloyena. 
Judges9:47 Ar Abimelek do tinreye ańjomkeda, hoṛko do onḍe senkateko jarwa akana unre uni do acʼren hoṛkoante Salmon buruteye rakapʼena. Uni do ṭeṅgocʼe hataokeda ar dare khon mitʼṭecʼ ḍạre makʼ ạgukeda. Ona tayom acʼren hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Okań cekaketʼpe ńelkedeń ape hõ usạra onkaepe.”" 
Judges9:48  
Judges9:49 Onate sanamkoge dare khon ḍạrko makʼ ạguketʼte Abimelek tayomteko mohnḍayena. Ar ona tayom do ona bhitri oṛakʼ cetanreko ladekeda ar seṅgelko jeretʼada. Onate Sikem gaṛren sanam hoṛ doko atar cabayena. Onḍe do mitʼ hajar herel hoṛ ar maejiuko tahẽkana. 
Judges9:50 Inạ tayom Abimelek do Tebeste senkate onae hatkeda. 
Judges9:51 Nagraha bhitrire mitʼṭecʼ gaṛ tahẽkana; ar nagraharen sanam herel ar maejiu do onḍeko ńir okoyena. Onko do gaṛte bolokate onḍenakʼ duạrko siń esetʼketʼte chadteko rakapʼena. 
Judges9:52 Abimelek do ona gaṛ ṭhen senkate onae akromonkeda; ar gaṛre seṅgel jeretʼakʼ lạgitʼ gaṛ reakʼ duạr secʼe laha idiyena," 
Judges9:53 unre mitʼṭen maejiu do jante dhiri reakʼ cetanakʼ hĩse hataoketʼte Abimelekakʼ bohokʼreye giḍiwadea ar uniyakʼ bohokʼe paṛakʼketʼtaea. 
Judges9:54 Unre Abimelek do usạrate acʼakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ koṛae metadea, “Amakʼ tarwaṛe oḍokkate gojeńme jemon onko aloko men daṛeakʼ, ‘mitʼṭen maejiuakʼ tite uni doe gocʼ ocoakana mente.’ ” Ar onate uni koṛa do tarwaṛeteye phạṛikedea are gocʼena." 
Judges9:55 Abimeleke gocʼena menteko ńelkede khan Israelko do oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Judges9:56 Abimelek do eaegel boehakoe gocʼletʼkote apattetʼ cetanre okae behokletʼ onkage Isor do uniyakʼ paona sạjạiye emkatʼtaea. 
Judges9:57 Sekemren hoṛko okaṭakʼko behokletʼ Isor do ona reakʼ paona sạjại onko hõe ematʼkoa. Ar nonkate Jerubakʼalren hopon Jothamakʼ sarap do uni cetanre paṛaoena. 
Judges10:1 Abimelek tayom Tola ńutuman Isakar gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛ do Israel hoponko rukhiyạko lạgitʼe hecʼena. Tola doe hoyokʼ kana Puaren hopon ar Dodoren do goṛomtetʼ koṛa. Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Semirre uni doe girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges10:2 Uni do bargel pe bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrketʼtakoa. Tayomte uni doe gocʼena ar Semirreko topake dea. 
Judges10:3 Tola tayom Gilead ṭoṭhare Jayir do bargel bar bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrketʼtakoa. 
Judges10:4 Jayirren do pegel hoponko tahẽkantaea; ar onko do pegel gadhare decʼkateko dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana. Gilead reakʼ pegel ato do onkoakʼ gobolre tahẽkana. Teheń hạbicʼ ona atoko do Hawot-Jayirko metakʼ kana. 
Judges10:5 Ar Jayire gocʼen khan uni do Kamonreko topakadea. 
Judges10:6 Israel hoponko do arhõ Probhu Isorakʼ nońjorre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage kạmiko ehopʼena. Onko do Bakʼal debotako ar Astarot debiko ar Aramrenko, Sidonrenko, Moabrenko, Amonrenko ar Philisṭikoren debotako sewawakoko ehopʼena. Nonkate Israelko do Probhu Isorko bạgikedete ar bako sewawadea." 
Judges10:7 Ona iạte uni do onko cetanre edrete pit caṛhaoadea ar Philisṭiko ar Amonrenkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. 
Judges10:8 Inạ bochor onko do Israelkoko lạhutʼ cabaketʼkoa. Onko do jordan purub secʼ Amorikoakʼ disạm Gileadre girobasokʼkan Israelko gel irạl bochor hạbicʼ kosṭoreko dohoketʼkoa. 
Judges10:9 Ar Amonrenko do Jihudạ, Benjamin ar Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ jordan gaḍako paromkeda. Ar Israelko do ạḍitetʼ kosṭoreko paṛaoena." 
Judges10:10 Onko do Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼateko menkeda, “Aleren Isor bạgikate sạrige ale do am upạrte ạḍile kại akada ente Bakʼal debotale sewawaekan tahẽkana.”" 
Judges10:11 Probhu Isor do Israelkoe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Misriko, Amoriko, Amonrenko ar Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon iń do cetʼ bạń bańcaoletʼpea?" 
Judges10:12 Tinre Sidonrenko, Amalekiko ar Maonirenkoakʼ santao iạte goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń ṭhenpe rakʼkeda unre hõ onkoakʼ ti khoniń bańcaoletʼpea." 
Judges10:13 Menkhan ape do iń bạgikate debotakope sewawako kana, onate ar bạń bańcaopea." 
Judges10:14 Okoe debotakope bachaoan tahẽkan onko ṭhenge senkate ragpe. Onkoge muhinreko bańcaope ma.” 
Judges10:15 Menkhan Israelko do Probhu Isorko metadea, “Ale dole ghạṭ akada. Am okaṭakʼ bhagem hudisetʼ alere onage onkaeme baṛe, menkhan dayakate niạ dhao do rukhiyạleme.”" 
Judges10:16 Inạ tayom onko talare tinạkʼ debotako tahẽkan onko jotoko ocokʼ giḍikatʼkoa ar Probhu Isor sewawaeko ehopʼena. Israelkoakʼ kosṭo ńelte Probhu Isor do monre duke ńamkeda. 
Judges10:17 Inạ tayom Amonrenko do riạu mitʼkate lạṛhại calakʼ lạgitʼ Gileadre senkateko ḍerayena. Ona iạte Israelko hõko oḍokente Mispare senkateko ḍerayena. 
Judges10:18 Unre Gileadren mukhiyạko do akoreko mepenena, “Okoe hoṛ pạhilre Amonrenkoe ńẽtʼko unige Gileadren mạlike hoyokʼa.”" 
Judges11:1 Ona jokhecʼ Jiptha do lạṛhại bire tahẽkana. Menkhan uniren eṅgattetʼ do mitʼṭen kusumbiye tahẽkana ar uniren apattetʼakʼ ńutum do Gilead tahẽkana. 
Judges11:2 Gileadren bạhu do koṛa hoponkoe janamadea. Onko do harakate Jiptha noa menkateko laga ńirkedea, “Am do aleakʼ sompotti reakʼ ạidạri bam ńama, ente am do eṭakʼ maejiuren hopon kanam.”" 
Judges11:3 Onate Jiptha do acʼren boehako khone dạṛketʼte Tob disạmte senkate girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Onḍeko adom kharap hoṛ do uni beṛhaeteko jarwayena ar uni sãote gatekʼko ehopʼena. 
Judges11:4 Inạ thoṛa din tayom Amonrenko do Israelko upạrte tinre lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena unre Gileadren murubbiko do Tob disạm khon Jiptha ạguiye lạgitʼko senena. 
Judges11:5  
Judges11:6 Onkoko menkeda, “Amonrenko sãote bon lạṛhạiya, onate dela hijukʼme ar aleren subedar hoyokʼme.”" 
Judges11:7 Jiptha do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do cetʼ bape kurud akawạdińa ar iń babawakʼ oṛakʼ khon cetʼ bape laga oḍok akadińạ? Ar ńitokʼ do muhinrepe paṛao akante iń ṭhenpe hecʼakana?”" 
Judges11:8 Gileadren murubbiko do uniko metadea, “Menkhan ńitokʼ do am ṭhenle ruạṛ hecʼakana jemon ale sãotem senokʼte Amonrenko sãotem lạṛhại. Ar Gileadre girobasokʼkan sanamko cetanren mạlik hoyokʼme.”" 
Judges11:9 Jiptha doe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Amonrenko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ ińpe ruạṛ idiyediń kana ar Probhu Isor hõ ińakʼ tire onkoe soprotketʼkoa; enḍekhan unre cetʼ iń do sạrige aperen mạlikiń hoyokʼa?”" 
Judges11:10 Gileadren murubbiko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Probhu Isorge aleren gohae hoyena, am okam menketʼ onagele onkaea.”" 
Judges11:11 Onate Jiptha do Gileadren murubbiko sãoteye senena ar hoṛko do akoren matha ar senaputiko hoe ocokedea. Uni do Mispare senkate Probhu Isor samaṅre onako kathae roṛkeda. 
Judges11:12 Inạ tayom Jiptha do hoṛ kolkate Amonren raje kulikedea, “Am ar iń talare nonkanakʼ cetʼ hoyakante am do ińakʼ disạm upạrtem oḍok hecʼakana?”" 
Judges11:13 Amonren raj do Jiptharen hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Israelko do Misor disạm khon oḍok hecʼkate jordan gaḍa aṛe aṛeteakʼ jaegako ar Arnon gaḍa khon Jabok gaḍa hạbicʼ ińakʼ sanam jaegako dokhol akada. Ona ńitokʼ mońj mońjte ruạṛkạtińme.”" 
Judges11:14 Jiptha do Amonren raj ṭhen arhõ hoṛ kolkateye roṛ gotʼkada, “Jipthaye meneda, Israelko do Moab se Amonrenkoakʼ disạm do bako dokhol akada." 
Judges11:15  
Judges11:16 Misor khon oḍokʼ hecʼ tayom Israelko do hahaṅkar ṭoṭha secʼte arakʼ jalapuri hạbicʼko senlena ar ona tayom do Kadesteko calaolena. 
Judges11:17 Ona tayom Israelko do Edomren raj ṭhenko roṛ gotʼkada, ‘amakʼ disạm talate calakʼ reakʼ hukum emaleme baṛe.’ Menkhan Edomren raj do ona katha bae luturada. Onko do Moabren raj ṭhen hõ hoṛko kolletʼkoa menkhan uni hõ bae rạjilena. Ar onatege Israelko do Kadesreko tahẽyena." 
Judges11:18 Ona tayom onko do hahaṅkar talate senkate Edom ar Moab disạm secʼteko ạcurente Moab reakʼ purub secʼte senkate Arnon gaḍa reakʼ eṭakʼ aṛereko ḍerayena. Menkhan Moab disạmte do bako bololena, ente Arnon gaḍage Moab reakʼ simạna tahẽkana." 
Judges11:19 Ona tayom Israelko do Amorikoren Sihon raj, okoe do Hesbon khon raje calaoetʼ tahẽkan, uni ṭhen hoṛ kolkateko roṛ gotʼkada, ‘aleakʼ disạmte senokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ disạm talate sen ocoaleme baṛe.’" 
Judges11:20 Menkhan Sihon do Israelko bae pạtiạuatʼkote acʼakʼ disạm talate calakʼ reakʼ hukum bae ematʼkoa. Uni do acʼren sanam hoṛkoe jarwaketʼkoa ar Jahasreye ḍerayente Israelko upạrteye lạṛhạiyena. 
Judges11:21 Unre Israelkoren Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ tire Sihon ar uniren sanam hoṛkoe soprotkatʼkoa ar Israelko do onkoko bhagaoketʼkoa. Ar ona disạmreko girobasokʼkan sanam Amorikoakʼ jaega do Israelkoko hatkeda. 
Judges11:22 Onko do Arnon khon Jabok hạbicʼ ar hahaṅkar ṭoṭha khon jordan hạbicʼ Amorikoakʼ sanam jaegako hatkeda. 
Judges11:23 Israelkoren Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛ Israelko samaṅ khon tinre Amorikoe laga oḍokketʼkoa unre ona ruạr hatao reakʼ do cetʼ amakʼ ạidạri menakʼa? 
Judges11:24 Amren Kemos debota okaṭakʼ ạidạriye emakawatʼme ona do cetʼ amakʼ ạidạrire bạnukʼa? Ṭhik onkage aleren Probhu Isor ale samaṅ khon okoeye laga ńir akatʼko onkoakʼ jaegagele ạidạri akawana. 
Judges11:25 Am do cetʼ Moabren raj Siphorren hopon Balak khon hõm bhagegea? Uni do tishõ Israelko sãote bae jhogṛalena se bae lạṛhạilena. 
Judges11:26 Teheń pe sae bochor Israelko do Hesbon ar Aroer nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ ato ar Arnon gaḍa aṛe secʼteakʼ sanam atokorele girobasokʼ kana. Inạko dinre cedakʼ am do onako arhõ bam hatleda? 
Judges11:27 Niạko babotre iń do am upạrte cetʼge bạń behok akada, bickom iń upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼem oḍok hecʼakante amgem behok akada. Bikʼcạricʼ Probhu Isorge ńitokʼ Israelko ar Amonrenko talareye bicạrma.”" 
Judges11:28 Menkhan Jipthawakʼ roṛ gotʼakʼ niạ sombatre Amonren raj do bae luturada. 
Judges11:29 Unre Probhu Isorren Jiu do Jiptha cetanreye hecʼena. Onate Jiptha do Gilead ar Manase ṭoṭha talate senkate Gilead reakʼ Mispateye calaoena ar onḍe khon Amonrenko birudteye laha idiyena. 
Judges11:30 Jiptha do niạ menkate Probhu Isor ṭhen mitʼṭecʼe manotketʼteye menkeda, “Ińakʼ tire Amonrenkom jimạleko khan Amonrenko sãote lạṛhạire jitạukate oṛakʼ iń ruạṛ hijukʼre daramiń lạgitʼ okoeye oḍok hijukʼ unige Probhu Isorrene hoyokʼa. Ar unige mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ menteń samaṅea.”" 
Judges11:31  
Judges11:32 Inạ tayom Jiptha do Amonrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok senena ar Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ tire Amonrenkoe soprotʼketʼkoa. 
Judges11:33 Uni do Aroer khon Minni ṭhen Abel-Keramim hạbicʼ bargel nagraha ar atoren hoṛkoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa. Ar nonkate Israelko do Amonrenko akoakʼ gobolreko dohoketʼkoa. 
Judges11:34 Jiptha do tinre Mispare acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼena unre darame lạgitʼ okoeye oḍok hecʼen uni do acʼren hoponerageye tahẽkana. Uni do tobla ru rute ar enecʼateye hijukʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do Jiptharen sadher hoponerae tahẽkana. 
Judges11:35 Jiptha do acʼren hoponerae ńelkede khan acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼteye menkeda, “Hae, hae, E biṭi tiń, am do cedakʼ sorbonasrem paṛaokedińa! Ạḍi muhinregem paṛao ocokedińa, ente iń do Probhu Isor ṭhen onkań manot dohoakatʼ ona do bạṅ rạputʼ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Judges11:36 Kuṛiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E baba, amakʼ mocatege Probhu Isor ṭhenem roṛ kại akatʼte amakʼ katha lekage ińre baṛe kạmime. Ente Probhu Isor do amren bạiri Amonrenko cetanre halae reakʼe emakatʼmea.”" 
Judges11:37 Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Menkhan ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nehõr dohoytińme. Iń do gidrạren eṅgat bạń hoedaṛeakʼa; onate gate kuṛiko sãote burukore senkate bar cando hạbicʼ rakʼ homor ocowạńme.”" 
Judges11:38 Jiptha doe menkeda, “E biṭi, do calakʼme.” Ar noa menkate uni do bar cando lạgitʼe bidạkadea. Unre uni ar eṭakʼ kuṛiko do burukore ạcur baṛae tulucʼ rakʼ homorko ehopʼena, ente gidrạren eṅgat do ar tishõ bae hoedaṛeakʼa." 
Judges11:39 Ado bar cando paromen khan uni do acʼ apattetʼ ṭhene ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar Jiptha do Probhu Isor ṭhen okae manotletʼ onkage acʼren hoponera cetanreye kạmikeda. Ar kuṛi do kũạri tahenregeye gocʼena. Niạ ghoṭna khon Israelko talare mitʼṭecʼ niạm ehopʼena. 
Judges11:40 Gilead Jiptharen hoponerawakʼ katha disạite homor halaṅ lạgitʼ Israelren kuṛiko do jao bochor pon din lạgitʼ oṛakʼ khonko oḍok calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges12:1 Tayomte Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko do akoren lạṛhại phạdko hohowatʼkote gaḍa paromkate Saphonteko calaoena. Onḍe onko do Jipthako metadea, “Amonrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ cedakʼ bam hohowatʼlea? Ale do am sudhạ amakʼ oṛakʼle jeretʼ giḍikakʼa.”" 
Judges12:2 Jiptha do roṛ ruạṛatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ińren hoṛkoante Amonren hoponko tulucʼ lạṛhạire bestoń tahẽkana. Iń doń hohowatʼpe tahẽkangea menkhan onkoakʼ ti khon do bape rukhiyạledeńa." 
Judges12:3 Iń doń ńelkeda ape do bape goṛowạńkana onate jiwi cuputʼkate Amonrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ iń oḍok calaoena ar Probhu Isor do onko cetanreye jitạu ocokedińa. Menkhan ńitokʼ ape do cedakʼ iń tulucʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼpe hecʼakana?” 
Judges12:4 Jiptha do unre Gileadren sanam hoṛe hoho jarwaketʼkote Ephrayimrenko upạrteye lạṛhạiyena, ente Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko menleda, “E Gileadrenko, ape do Ephrayim ar Manase gusṭi bạgiyakʼ hoṛko kanape.” Ona lạṛhạire Gileadrenko do onkoko bhagaoketʼkoa." 
Judges12:5 Onate Gileadrenko do Jordan gaḍa reakʼ oka jaegare taṛamte paromokʼ ar Ephrayim ṭoṭha secʼ senokʼ jaegakoko hatkeda. Ar Ephrayim gusṭiren sarecʼ jãhãe hoṛge tinreko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Parom ocoạńme,” Unre Gileadren hoṛko do uniko kuliyede tahẽkana, “Am do cetʼ Ephrayim hoṛ kanam?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛetʼ tahẽkana, “Baṅa,”" 
Judges12:6 Enḍekhan onkoko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Bhagegea, tobe mase menme, ‘Sibboleth.’ ” Onate uni do katha ṭhik leka bae roṛ daṛeakʼteye mena, “Chiboleth, ” Ar onate sapʼkate uni do jordan gaḍa reakʼ taṛam paromokʼkan jaegaregeko gojekan tahẽkana. Nonkate unre pongel bar hajar Ephrayimko gocʼketʼkoa." 
Judges12:7 Gileadren Jiptha do turui bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrketʼtakoa. Ar uniye gocʼen khan uni do Gilead reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ atoreko topakedea. 
Judges12:8 Jiptha tayom Bethlehem atoren Ibsan do Israelkoren bikʼcạricʼe hoyena. 
Judges12:9 Uniren do pegel koṛa hopon ar pegel kuṛi hoponko tahẽkana. Uni do acʼ bõsrenko bahreren hoṛko tulucʼ acʼren hoponerakoe baplaketʼkoa ar acʼren hoponko lạgitʼ pegel bạhuko hõe ạguketʼkoa. Ibsan do eae bochor Israelkoren bikʼcạricʼe tahẽkana. 
Judges12:10 Ibsane gocʼen khan uni do Bethlehemreko topakedea. 
Judges12:11 Ibsan tayom do Sebulon gusṭiren Eylon do gel bochor Israelkoe bicạrketʼkoa. 
Judges12:12 Ar uniye gocʼen khan Sebulon ṭoṭha reakʼ Aijalonre uniko topakadea. 
Judges12:13 Eylon tayom Pirathon Hilelren hopon Adbon do Israelkoren cakʼlaoicʼe hoyena. 
Judges12:14 Uniren do pongel hopon ar pegel goṛomtetʼ koṛako tahẽkana. Onko do eaegel gadhakoreko decʼ baṛaekan tahẽkana. Ar Adbon do irạl bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrketʼtakoa. 
Judges12:15 Ar uniye gocʼen khan Amalekikoakʼ buru ṭoṭhare Ephrayim reakʼ Pirathonreko topakadea. 
Judges13:1 Israel hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ nońjorre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage kạmiko ehopʼena. Onate Probhu Isor do pongel bochor hạbicʼ Philisṭikoakʼ gobolreye dohokatʼkoa. 
Judges13:2 Onako dinre Sora atoren Manoho ńutuman Dan gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniren oṛakʼ hoṛ do bạńjhigeye tahẽkante cele gidrạge bako tahẽkantaea. 
Judges13:3 Probhu Isorren goḍet do uniren bạhu ṭhen ńel ocoyenteye menkeda, “Bạńjhigetem gidrạge bako hoyakantama, menkhan am dom bhạrti hoṛmokʼa ar mitʼṭen koṛa hoponem janamea." 
Judges13:4 Am do sontor akae tahenme jemon darkha rasa se jãhãn bubulakʼ se chutakʼ jãhãnakʼge alom joma. 
Judges13:5 Ar okoe gidrạm janame uni do tishõ alom hoyo poṭorea, ente uni do janam khonge Isor ńutumte nạsri ye hoyokʼa. Uni do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon Israelkoe bańcaokoa.”" 
Judges13:6 Unre maejiu do jãwãetetʼ ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Isorren mitʼṭen hoṛ do iń ṭhene hecʼlena. Isorren goḍet lekage uniyakʼ muṭhạn do tahẽkana ạḍitetʼ botorge. Ar oka khone hecʼena ona do bạń kuli ledea ar uni hõ acʼakʼ ńutum do bae lạiyạdińa." 
Judges13:7 Uni doe metadińạ, ‘am dom bhạrti hoṛmokʼa ar amren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyokʼtama. Onate am do ńit khon darkha rasa se jãhãn bubulakʼ se jãhãn chutakʼ jinisko alom joma, ente janam khon gujukʼ hạbicʼ uni do Isor ńutumte nạsriye hoyokʼa.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Niạ katha ańjomkate Manoho do Probhu Isor ṭhen niạ menkateye koekeda, “E Probhu Isor, nehõrokʼ kạnạń Isorren okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do ạliń ṭhenem kollede, uni do arhõ jemone hijukʼ ar okoeṭakʼ gidrại janamokʼ uni lạgitʼ cetʼ cekae jaruṛa ona jemone sikhạuliń.”" 
Judges13:9 Isor do Manohowakʼ koejoṅe ańjomketʼtaea ar Isorren goḍet do arhõ uni maejiu ṭhene hecʼena. Unre uni do khetreye duṛupʼakan tahẽkana, ar unre acʼren jãwãetetʼ do onḍe bae tahẽkana." 
Judges13:10 Onate uni maejiu do usạra senkate acʼren jãwãetetʼe metadea, “Enhilokʼ okoeṭakʼ hoṛ iń ṭhene ńel ocolen uniye hecʼakana.”" 
Judges13:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate Manoh doe beretʼena ar bạhutetʼ sãote uni hoṛ ṭhen senkateye metadea, “Ińren oṛakʼ hoṛ sãote okoeye galmaraoletʼ uni do cetʼ am kangeam?” Uniye menkeda, “Hẽ, uni kangeạń.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoho do uniye kulikedea, “Amakʼ kathako tinre purạukʼa unre gidrạ do cetʼlekan jione khemaoa ar uni do cetʼe kạmiya?”" 
Judges13:13 Probhu Isorren goḍete roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren bạhu okań men akawade ona reakʼ jotowakʼge jemon joton salakʼe manao." 
Judges13:14 Darkha rasa khon oka hoyokʼ ona reakʼ cetʼge uni do bae jom ńũ daṛeakʼa. Darkha rasa se jãhãn bubulakʼ se jãhãn chutakʼ cetʼge bae jom daṛeakʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ iń hukum akawade ona mitʼke mitʼ manao hoyokʼtaea.” 
Judges13:15 Unre Manoho do Probhu Isorren goḍete metadea, “Merom boda hoponakʼ jel isinkate ạuriliń ạguam hạbicʼ; am do thoṛa ghạṛicʼ tahẽ hataṛokʼme.”" 
Judges13:16 Probhu Isorren goḍete roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń ben sapʼ doholiń khan hõ abenakʼ jãhãn jomakʼ do bạń joma. Menkhan jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ ben menetʼ khan ona do Probhu Isor ńutumtege onkae ben.” Uni do Probhu Isorren goḍete tahẽkan Manoho do ona bae bujhạu daṛeada." 
Judges13:17 Onate Manoho do Probhu Isorren goḍete kulikedea, “Amakʼ ńutum do cetʼtam? Ente amakʼ katha purạukʼre ạliń do amliń manotmea.”" 
Judges13:18 Uniye menkeda, “Ńutum do cedakʼem kuliyediń kana? Ińakʼ ńutum do okoege bako bujhạu daṛeakʼa.”" 
Judges13:19 Manoho do unre mitʼṭen merom boda ar uni sãote anaj samaṅokʼ jinisko ạgukate Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ dhiri cetanreye samaṅkeda. Ar Probhu Isorren goḍet do unre mitʼṭecʼ hahaṛawakʼe kạmikeda, ar Manoho ar uniren bạhuttetʼ do onakin ńeletʼkan tahẽkana." 
Judges13:20 Seṅgel reakʼ lepʼ tinre pinḍ khon cetante serma secʼ rakabokʼkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do ona lepʼ seṅgelte coṭteye rakapʼ calaoena. Ar noa ńelte Manoho ar uniren bạhuttetʼ do otrekin ombakʼ hapeyena," 
Judges13:21 ar Manoho do unreye bujhạukeda, uni do Probhu Isorren goḍete tahẽkana mente. Ar Probhu Isorren goḍet do unkin ṭhen ar bae ńel ocolena." 
Judges13:22 Unre Manoho ar uniren bạhuttetʼkin menkeda, “Alaṅ do Isorlaṅ ńelkedea, ar khạṭige laṅ gujukʼa.”" 
Judges13:23 Menkhan uniren bạhuttetʼe menkeda, “Probhu Isor do alaṅ gocʼlaṅ reakʼ monsubạge tahẽlentae khan alaṅakʼ tite jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ do bae ataṅkea, se noako hõ bae ńel ocokelaṅa, se niạko katha hõ bae jạhirkelaṅa.”" 
Judges13:24 Tayomte maejiuren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone hoyena ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Samsone dohoketʼtaea. Samson doe hara idiyena ar Isor do uniye bhoradea. 
Judges13:25 Samson do tinre Sora ar Estaol tala reakʼ Mahan-dan ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegareye tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorren Jiu do uniye uskurkedea. 
Judges14:1 Samson do Timnạteye senena, ar onḍe mitʼṭen Philisṭikoren kuṛiye kusiyadea." 
Judges14:2 Onḍe khon ruạṛ hecʼkate uni do acʼren go-babae metatʼkinạ, “Iń do Timnạre mitʼṭen Philisṭi kuṛiń ńel ạguakadea; uni sãotege baplakạń ben.”" 
Judges14:3 Uniren eṅgat apatkin menkeda, “Aboren peṛako se aboren jạtrenko talare cetʼ jãhãn kuṛi do bạnukʼkoa, ar baplakʼ lạgitʼ begor khatna akan Philisṭiko ṭhenem calakʼkana?” Menkhan Samson do apattetʼe metadea, “Baṅa baba, iń lạgitʼ do unige ạguiye ben. Iń do uniregeń kusi akana.”" 
Judges14:4 Uniren eṅgat apat do Probhu Isor khonge hoyakan ona do bạkin bujhạu daṛeada, ente uni do Philisṭiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ạte ńam baṛayetʼ tahẽkana. Onako dinre Philisṭiko do Israelko cetanre mạlikiko calaoetʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges14:5 Tayomte Samson do acʼren go-baba sãote Timnạteye senena. Ar Timnạ reakʼ darkha bagwan ṭhene seṭeren khan mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do hạnḍrạuate Samson secʼe laha hecʼena. 
Judges14:6 Unre Probhu Isorren jiu do uni cetanreye decʼena, ar onate eken tite merom hopon leka uni dhạcri kule or cirạkedea. Menkhan okae cekaketʼ ona do acʼren eṅgat apat hõ bae baḍae ocoletʼkinạ." 
Judges14:7 Tayomte uni do kuṛi ṭhen senkate uni sãoteye galmarokeda ar kuṛi hõ uniye kusiyadea. 
Judges14:8 Inạ thoṛa din tayom uni kuṛi baplaye lạgitʼ Timnạteye calaoena. Ar calakʼ jokhecʼ uni dhạcri kulakʼ jaṅko ńela mente onteye ạcurena. Uni do dhạcri kulakʼ pańjra jaṅre dumur chata ar onare rasa hõe ńamkeda. 
Judges14:9 Uni do dumure jhõṛaketʼkote rasa hataokate ona jom jomteye calaoena. Ona tayom uni do eṅgat ar apat ṭhen senkate unkin hõ ona rasae ematʼkinte unkin hõkin jomkeda. Menkhan dhạcri kulakʼ pańjra jaṅ khon ona rasae ạgu akatʼ ona do bae lạiyatʼkinạ. 
Judges14:10 Ar Samsonren apattetʼ do uni kuṛi ńele lạgitʼe senena. Unre Samson do onḍe mitʼṭecʼ bhoj reakʼe bebostakeda ente jãwãe koṛa doko onkayetʼ tahẽkana. 
Judges14:11 Samson onḍeye seṭeren khan Philisṭiko do soṅgeae lạgitʼ pe gel koṛakoko ńamadea. 
Judges14:12 Samson do onko sãotenkoe metatʼkoa, “Mitʼṭecʼ iń kudum apea. Ar ape do bhoj reakʼ niạ eae din bhitrire noa reakʼpe roṛ ruạṛ daṛeạń khan iń do pe gel mĩhĩ musnạ oyonakʼ ar pe gel goṭecʼ kicricʼ iń emapea." 
Judges14:13 Ar bape lại daṛeạń khan ape do pe gel mĩhĩ musnạ reakʼ oyonakʼ ar pe gel goṭecʼ kicricʼ ińpe imạńa.” Onkoko menkeda, “Amakʼ kudum lạime, onale ańjoma.”" 
Judges14:14 Samsone menkeda, “Jojomicʼ khon do jomakʼ hecʼena, ar daṛeanicʼ khon do heṛemakʼge.” Onko do pe din hạbicʼ noa kudum reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ bako daṛeada." 
Judges14:15 Ar eae din hilokʼ onko do senkate Samsonren bạhuko metadea, “Amren jãwãeyem mạluṅea ar niạ kudum reakʼ manetetʼem lạiyaleya. Ar baṅkhan am ar amakʼ gharońjren sanamko seṅgeltele ḍahao maraopea. Ar ale do cetʼ reṅgecʼ ocole lạgitʼ nonḍem neota akatʼlea?”" 
Judges14:16 Samsonren bạhu do unre Samson ṭhen rakʼ rakʼteye menkeda, “Am dom kurudạńkana, ar bam dulạṛedińa. Am do ińren hoṛko mitʼṭecʼem kudum akawatʼkoa menkhan ona reakʼ mane do iń hõ bam lạiyạdińạ.” Samsone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińren go-baba hõ ona reakʼ mane do bạń lại akatʼkinạ, enḍekhan am do cedakʼ iń lạiyama?”" 
Judges14:17 Bhoj reakʼ mucạtʼ din hạbicʼ acʼren bạhu doe rakʼkeda. Ar eae din hilokʼ Samson do acʼren bạhu onae lạiyadea, ente uni doe ạṛis caba akade tahẽkana. Ar unre acʼren bạhu do ona reakʼ manetetʼ acʼren hoṛkoe lạiyatʼkoa." 
Judges14:18 Eae din hilokʼ cando ạuriye hạsurokʼre atoren onko hoṛ do Samsonko metadea, “Dumur rasa khon do ar cetʼ heṛema? Ar dhạcri kul khon do okoeye daṛeana?” Samson do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren phẽṭaṛte bape sile khan ińakʼ kudum reakʼ mane do ohogepe lại daṛelea.”" 
Judges14:19 Inạ tayom Probhu Isorren jiu do purạ daṛete Samson cetanreye hecʼena. Ar uni do Askilonte senkate onḍenko pe gel hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa ar onkoakʼ jotowakʼe luṭketʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ kicricʼ ạgukate okoe acʼakʼ kudum reakʼ manetetʼko lạiletʼ onkoe ematʼkoa. Ona tayom uni do edrete acʼren apatakʼ oṛakʼteye calaoena. 
Judges14:20 Unre acʼren soṅgetenko modre uniren mitʼṭen gate do uniren bạhuko goṅadea. 
Judges15:1 Guhum gegetʼ okte Samson do mitʼṭen merom hoponante acʼren bạhu tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. Uniye menkeda, “Iń do bhitrite ińren bạhu ṭheniń calakʼ kana.” Menkhan kuṛiren apattetʼ do bhitrite bae bolo ocoadea." 
Judges15:2 Uniren apattetʼe menkeda, “Iń doń hudiskeda, uni dom hirkhạwae kana, ar onate iń do amren gateakʼ tireń jimạ akadea. Uniren huḍińicʼ boeha kuṛi do uni khon hõe cehragea; uni bodolte am do huḍińicʼge hataoem.”" 
Judges15:3 Unre Samson do onkoe metatʼkoa. “Ńitokʼ do Philisṭikoakʼ iń lokshan daṛeatakoa, ar onate jãhãn dos do baṅ hoyokʼtińạ." 
Judges15:4 Noa menkate uni do bahrete oḍok senkate pe sae toyoye sapʼketʼkoa ar mimitʼ joṛa toyokoakʼ canḍbol canḍbole tolmitʼketʼ takote talare mitʼṭecʼkate mosale tolatʼkoa. 
Judges15:5 Ona tayom do mosalre seṅgele lagaoatʼte Philisṭikoakʼ khet reakʼ phosol talareye aṛakʼkatʼkoa. Nonkate uni do onkoakʼ tolakʼ ạṭi ar phosolko ar onkoakʼ jạitun bagwankoe jeretʼ poṭorketʼtakoa. 
Judges15:6 “Philisṭiko do tinreko kuliyana, “Okoe noa doe kạmi akada?” Unreko lại ocoyena, “Timnại hoṛren jãwãe koṛa Samson do noae kạmi akada, ente uniren hõńhartetʼ do Samsonren bạhu hataokate uniren gateakʼ tireye jimạ akadea.” Onate Israelko do senkate Samsonren bạhu ar uniren hońhartetʼ seṅgelreko atar giḍikatʼkinạ." 
Judges15:7 Unre Samson do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Apeakʼ noa kạmi cetanre ạuriń halae hạbicʼ iń do bạń thirokʼa.”" 
Judges15:8 Niạ menkate ạḍi bạṛicʼe hạnketʼkoa ar ḍher hoṛgeye gocʼketʼkoa. Ona tayom uni do senkate Etam reakʼ huṭupʼ dhiri ciritʼreye tahẽyena. 
Judges15:9 Philisṭiko do unre Jihudạ ṭoṭhare senkateko ḍerayena ar Lehiko gheraokeda. 
Judges15:10 Jihudạren hoṛko kuliyana, “Cedakʼ ale upạrtepe rakapʼ hecʼakana? ” Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Samson tolkate idiye lạgitʼ nonḍele hecʼakana. Ar ale cetanre okae ceka akatʼ ale hõ uni cetanrele onkaea.”" 
Judges15:11 Unre Jihudạren pe hajar hoṛ do Etam dhiri huṭupʼ reakʼ ciritʼ ṭhen senkate Samsonko metadea, “Philisṭikoko bicạretʼ bon kan ona do cetʼ bam baḍaekana? Alere noa do cetʼem ceka akatʼa? ” Samsone roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ińre okako ceka akatʼ iń hõ onko cetanreń onka akada.”" 
Judges15:12 Onko do uniko metadea, “Ale do am tolkate Philisṭikoakʼ tire jimạkam lạgitʼle hecʼakana.” Samsone menkeda, “Enḍekhan kiriạwạńpe, bape gojeńa mente.”" 
Judges15:13 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Bale onkamea. Ale do eken tolkate onkoakʼ tirele jimạkama; ar sạrige bale gocʼmea.” Noa menkate onko do barea nãwã baberte uniko tolkedete buru khonko idikedea." 
Judges15:14 Uni do tinre Lehi ṭhene seṭerena unre Philisṭiko do hohowate uni secʼ hijukʼko ehopʼena. Unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do purạ daṛete uni cetanreye hecʼena. Onate uniyakʼ ti reakʼ baberko do lo busupʼ leka hoyena ar uniyakʼ ti do raṛayentaea. 
Judges15:15 Unre uni do gadhawakʼ berel jambeye hataokeda ar onate mitʼ hajar hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges15:16 Ar Samson doe menkeda, Mitʼṭen gadhawakʼ jambete lade mude hoṛ, mitʼṭen gadhawakʼ jambetege hajar hoṛkoń gocʼketʼkoa.”" 
Judges15:17 Uni do noa menkate ona jambeye giḍikada. Ar ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Ramat-lehiye metatʼa (Ona reakʼ mane do “Jambe-buru”). 
Judges15:18 Inạ tayom Samson do ạḍi ãṭ tetaṅkedea. Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene koeketʼteye menkeda, “Am do amren gutim jitạu ocoakadea. Ar ńitokʼ do tetaṅteń gujukʼte cetʼ bin khatna akan hoṛkoakʼ tirem paṛao ocoyińa?”" 
Judges15:19 Unre Isor do Lehire mitʼṭen ghaḍlakʼe paṛakʼ ocoketʼte ona khon dakʼ oḍok hecʼena. Ar ona dakʼe ńũketʼ khan Samson do daṛe ńamketʼteye cerṭha ruạṛena. Onate ona jharna reakʼ ńutum do Enhakkore dohokeda (Ona reakʼ mane do “Koejoṅ kạnicʼ reakʼ jharna”). Ar jharna do ńit hõ Lehire menakʼgea. 
Judges15:20 Philisṭiko oktere Samson do bargel bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrketʼtakoa. 
Judges16:1 Mitʼdin Samson do Gasate senkate mitʼṭen kusumbi kuṛiye ńelkedea ar uni ṭhene boloyena. 
Judges16:2 Gasaren hoṛko do Samson onḍeye sen akana menteko ańjomketʼ khan ona jaegako gherao ạcurkeda ar goṭa ńindạ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen uni lạgitʼko tãṛãkʼ tahẽyena. Ar onko do ńindạ jokhecʼ thir hapeko tahẽyenteko menkeda, “Setakʼlen khange uni dobon gojea.”" 
Judges16:3 Menkhan Samson do onḍe eken tala ńindạ hạbicʼe giticʼena. Ar ona tayom do beretʼkate hurkạṛ sudhạ banar khunṭi ar kapaṭkine pạṭupʼ totʼkeda. Ar onako acʼakʼ tarenreye gokʼketʼte Hebron samaṅ reakʼ buruteye rakapʼ calaoena. 
Judges16:4 Tayomte Sorek buru nalaren mitʼṭen maejiure Samsonakʼ mon do gaḍaoentaea. Uni kuṛiyakʼ ńutum do Dolila tahẽkana. 
Judges16:5 Philisṭikoren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do uni maejiu ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Samsonakʼ noa maraṅ daṛe do cetʼre menakʼtaea ar cetʼ lekate uni dole tol daṛekea jemonle koboj daṛeae. Onate ale mimitʼko do gelpe keji barsae gram kate rupạle emama." 
Judges16:6 “Noa katha ańjomkate Dolila do Samsone metadea, “Amakʼ noa maraṅ daṛe do cetʼre menakʼa ar cetʼte tollem khanem kạbu daṛekokʼa.”" 
Judges16:7 Samsone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Akʼ reakʼ eae goṭecʼ berel tãtte jãhãegeye tolliń khan iń do eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛ leka daṛe hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Judges16:8 Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoicʼ do unre onkanakʼ eae goṭecʼ nãwã tãt Dolilae emadea. Ar onate uni do Samsone tolkedea. 
Judges16:9 Unre thoṛagan hoṛ do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ bhitriregeko tãṛãkʼ akan tahẽkana. Dolila do Samson hohowadeteye metadea, “E Samson, Philisṭiko do am sapʼme lạgitʼko hecʼakana.” Onate uni do busupʼ baber leka onako phaṭ phuṭe topakʼkeda. Nonkate uniyakʼ daṛe cetʼre menakʼtae ona do danaṅrege tahẽyena." 
Judges16:10 Unre Dolila do Samsone metadea, “Am do bokam benaokedińa, ar iń ṭhen eṛem roṛakada. Niạ dhao do ṭhikte lạiyạńme cetʼte am do tol daṛekokʼa?”" 
Judges16:11 Samsone menkeda, “Tisge baṅ beohar akan nonkan barahite jãhãe ińe tolliń khan enḍekhan iń do jãhãe eṭakʼ hoṛko lekań hoyokʼa.”" 
Judges16:12 Unre Dolila do nãwã barahikote Samsone tolkedea. Ar thoṛa hoṛ do oṛakʼ bhitrire tãṛãkʼ akaeko tahẽkana. Dolilae menkeda, “E Samson, Philisṭiko do tolme lạgitʼko hecʼakana.” Menkhan Samson do sutạm leka onako barahiye topakʼ giḍikada." 
Judges16:13 Dolila do unreye roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Ńit hạbicʼ hõ iń ṭhen eṛekatham roṛketʼte bokam benao akadińạ. Cetʼ tem tol oco daṛekokʼa ona ṭhikte lạiyạńme.” Samsone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ eae goṭecʼ jaṭa upʼ otor sutạmrem teń seletʼletiń khan ar bhańj khunṭi sãotem tol uricʼ lekhange ińakʼ daṛe do ńurokʼa ar ne hoṛ lekageń hoyokʼa." 
Judges16:14 Unre Dolila do uniyakʼ eae goṭecʼ jaṭa upʼ otor sutạmreye tiń mitʼketʼte bhańj khunṭi sãoteye tolketʼteye menkeda, “E Samson, Philisṭiko do sapʼme lạgitʼko hecʼ akana.” Unre Samson do jạpitʼ khone beretʼente bhańj khunṭi do otor sutạm sudhại or totʼkeda." 
Judges16:15 Onate Dolila do uniye metadea, “Cekatem meneda, ińem dulạṛedińa mente? Amakʼ mon do ińre bạnukʼtama. Niạ ghalokʼ pe dhao bokam benaokedińa. Ar amakʼ noa maraṅ daṛe cetʼre menakʼtama ona do bam baḍae ocoledińa.”" 
Judges16:16 Nonkage Dolila do din hilokʼe ạṛis cabakede khan, uni doe ạṛisena." 
Judges16:17 Onate Samson do joto katha uniye lạiyadea. Samsone menkeda, “Ińakʼ bohokʼre tisge holatʼ do baṅ calao akana. Janam khonge iń do Isor ńutumte mitʼṭen nạsri hoṛ kạnạń. Ińiń hoyo poṭorlen khange ińakʼ daṛe do iń khon ocogokʼa. Ar onate iń do eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛ leka daṛe hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Judges16:18 Dolila do tinreye bujhạukeda, uniyakʼ mon reakʼ joto kathae lại akadea mente unre uni do Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada, “Ape do ar mitʼ dhao dela hijukʼpe. Uni do mon reakʼ joto kathae lại akadińạ.” Onate Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoko do soṅgete rupạko ạgu darakeda." 
Judges16:19 Dolila do acʼakʼ hoborre Samsone jạpitʼ ocokedea ar uniyakʼ eae goṭecʼ jaṭa upʼ hoyo poṭortae lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hoṛe hohowadea. Nonkate uni do santaoeye ehopʼkeda ar uniyakʼ daṛe hõ oḍok calaoentaea. 
Judges16:20 Ona tayom Dolila doe metadea, “E Samson, Philisṭiko do am sapʼme lạgitʼko hecʼakana.” Samson do jạpitʼ khon ebhenkateye hudiskeda, lahate lekage irci giḍikate bahreteye oḍok calakʼa mente. Menkhan bae baḍaekan tahẽkana, Probhu Isor do uniye bạgi giḍi akadea mente." 
Judges16:21 Unre Philisṭiko do uniko sapʼkedete uniyakʼ banar mẽtʼko hoṭor totʼketʼtaea ar Gasateko idikedea. Onko do pitạl reakʼ sikṛiteko tolkadea ar hajot khanare idikate jante riritʼ kạmireko dhurạukedea. 
Judges16:22 Menkhan uniyakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ do hoyo poṭor tayom arhõ janam rakabokʼ ehopʼena. 
Judges16:23 Inạ tayom Philisṭikoren disạm cakʼlaoko do akoren debota Dagon ạḍi okocʼ dãṛẽ teṅgenae lạgitʼ ar rạskạkʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena. Onkoko menkeda, “Aboren Isor do aboakʼ tire aboren bạiri Samsone jimạ akadea.”" 
Judges16:24 Ar hoṛko hõ Samson ńelkate noa katha menkate akoren Debota sarhaoate memenko ehopʼena, “Aboren Isor do aboakʼ tire aboren bạiriye jimạ akadea; uni do aboakʼ jumi ar phosole nosṭo akada ar aboren ḍher hoṛkoe gocʼ akatʼkoa.”" 
Judges16:25 Ona tayom onko do rạskạkʼko ehopʼena ar ãṭ aṛaṅteko menkeda, “Samson doe oḍok ocokʼma; ale do uniyakʼ kheloḍle ńeltaea.” Onate onko do hajot khana khon Samsonko oḍok ạgukedea ar Samson do kheloḍ udukʼakoe ehopʼena. Onko do barea khunṭi talare Samsonko teṅgokedea." 
Judges16:26 Ar okoeṭakʼ koṛa do uniyakʼ tiye sapʼ akatʼtae tahẽkan Samson do uniye metadea, “Oka khunṭiko cetanre mundil teṅgo akan onako sapʼ ocoạńme jemon onareń ṭenḍar daṛeakʼ.”" 
Judges16:27 Unre mundilre ạḍi utạr herel ar maejiuko jarwa akan tahẽkana, ar Philisṭikoren disạm cakʼlaoko hõko tahẽkana. Ar chat cetan khon pe hajar herel ar maejiuko do Samsonakʼ kheloḍko ńeletʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges16:28 Unre Samson do Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda, “E Probhu Isor, mitʼ dhao baṛe disạiyińme. E Isor, dayakate ar mitʼ dhao daṛe imạńme jemon ińakʼ banar mẽtʼ iạte Philisṭiko cetanreń hala ruạṛ daṛeakʼ.”" 
Judges16:29 Ar tala reakʼ okakin khunṭi cetanre mundil teṅgo akan tahẽkan Samson do ona banare sapʼkeda. Uni do acʼakʼ jojom tite mitʼṭecʼ ar leṅga tite armitʼṭecʼ khunṭi hạṛupʼketʼteye japakʼena. 
Judges16:30 Ona tayom uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Philisṭiko sãote iń hõń gujukʼma!” Niạ menkate uni do kajakteye ḍhekakeda. Onate disạm cakʼlaoko ar bhitriren hoṛko cetanre mundil do rạputʼ ńurena. Nonkate uni do jiwetʼ tahenre tinạkʼ hoṛe gocʼletʼko ona khon ḍher hoṛ acʼakʼ gujukʼreye gocʼketʼkoa." 
Judges16:31 Tayomte uniyakʼ apatakʼ gharońjrenko ar uniren boehako do mạ̃ṛĩ iditae lạgitʼko hecʼena. Onko do uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ idikate Sora ar Esṭaol talare acʼ apat Manohoakʼ topareko baekadea. Samson do bargel bochor hạbicʼ Israelkoakʼ bicạrketʼtakoa. 
Judges17:1 Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭhare Mikạ ńutuman mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. 
Judges17:2 Uni do eṅgattetʼe metadea, “Amakʼ oka gelpe keji bar sae gram rupạ kombṛolentam ar okaṭakʼ lạgitʼ sarap emokʼ iń ańjomletʼme ona do iń ṭhenge menakʼa, ona do ińgeń hataoleda.” Unre uniren eṅgattetʼ doe menkeda, “E beṭa, Probhu Isore bhoramma!”" 
Judges17:3 Ar uni do ona gelpe keji barsae gram rupạ do acʼren eṅgattetʼe ruạṛadea. Unre eṅgattetʼ doe menkeda, “Niạ rupạ do Probhu Isor ńutumteń samaṅetʼkana ar ińren hopon do onate rokʼ benao akade mitʼṭen boṅga muṭhạn ar chãńcre dul benaoakade ar mitʼṭen boṅga muṭhạne benao joṅ. Ar iń do onatege noa rupạ amgeń ruạṛama.”" 
Judges17:4 Mikạ do ona rupạ eṅgattetʼe ruạṛade khan uniren eṅgattetʼ do bar keji tala rupạ hataokate sonhare emadea. Ar uni do mitʼṭen goṛhon muṭhạn ar chãńcre dulicʼ ar mitʼṭen muṭhạne benao ocokeda, ar unkin banar muṭhạnge Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼreye dohokatʼkinạ." 
Judges17:5 Mikạwakʼ do mitʼṭecʼ mundil tahẽkana. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ ehpod ar debota muṭhạnko benaokate acʼren mitʼṭen hopon do naeke hudạreye dohokedea. 
Judges17:6 Israelko talare unre hõ cele rajge bako tahẽkana. Onate okoe okaṭakʼ bhageye hudisetʼ tahẽkan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. 
Judges17:7 Onako oktere Jihudạ ṭoṭhare Bethlehemren mitʼṭen juạn Liwi do Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko sãoteye girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges17:8 Uni do eṭakʼ jãhãreye tahena mente jaega sendrae lagitʼ Bethlehem bạgikateye oḍok calaoena. Ar Ephrayim buru ṭoṭhareye tahẽnkan uni Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. 
Judges17:9 Mikạ do uniye kulikedea, “Am do oka khonem hecʼakana?” Uniye menkeda, “Iń do Jihudạ ṭoṭha reakʼ Bethlehem nagraren mitʼṭen Liwi hoṛ kạnạń. Ar jãhãrege tahen reakʼ jaegań ńam onḍegeń tahena.”" 
Judges17:10 Mikạ do uniye metadea, “Am do enḍekhan iń sãotege tahenme ar ińren naeke hoekate baba leka hoyokʼme. Iń do bochorre mitʼsae bargel gram rupạ ar jomakʼ ar kicricʼkoń emama.” Niạ katha ańjomkate uni Liwi do bhitriteye boloyena ar uni ṭhen tahen lạgitʼe rạjiyena. Mikạ do acʼren hopon leka uni liwi koṛae dohokedea." 
Judges17:11  
Judges17:12 Uni Liwi hoṛ do acʼakʼ kạmireye bahal ocoyen khan naeke lekate uniyakʼ oṛakʼreye tahẽyena. 
Judges17:13 Mikại menkeda, “Mitʼṭen Liwi tinre ińren naekeye hoyakana unre ińiń baḍaea, Probhu Isor do ińakʼe bhạlạiytińạ.”" 
Judges18:1 Onako dinre Israelko talare cele rapajkoge bako tahẽkana. Ar Israel gusṭiko modre Dan gusṭiren hoṛko do unhạbicʼ hõ jãhãn sompottige bako dokhol daṛe akawan tahẽkana. Ar onate onko do girobasokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegako sendra baṛayetʼ tahẽkana. 
Judges18:2 Ona iạte Dan gusṭirenko do Sora ar Estaol khon akoren mõṛẽ goṭen bir banṭa hoṛ do khobor hatao lạgitʼko kolkatʼkoa jemon onko do mońj okocʼte disạmko ciyạ ạgu daṛeakʼ. Onate onko do bir banṭa hoṛko metatʼkoa, “Ape do disạm reakʼ mońjtepe ciyạ ạguitabona.” Onate onko hoṛ do Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭhate senkateko boloyena ar ńindạ do Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼreko tahẽ aṅgayena." 
Judges18:3 Unre onko do uni Liwi koṛawakʼ aṛaṅko oromketʼtaea. Ar bhitrite bolokateko kulikedea, “Nonḍe do okoeye ạgu akatʼmea? Ar am do nonḍe cetʼem ceka kana ar cedakʼ baṅem hecʼakan?”" 
Judges18:4 Uniye menkeda, “Mikạ do iń lạgitʼ ḍhere kạmi akada. Uni do betonteye doho akadińạ ar uniren naekeń hoyakana.”" 
Judges18:5 Onko do uniko metadea, “Dayakate am do Isor ṭhen khon baḍaeme aleakʼ dãṛãn do jo bahakʼtalea se baṅa.”" 
Judges18:6 Naeke do onkoe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape do sulukte calao joṅpe; Ente Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekape senokʼ kana.”" 
Judges18:7 Onko mõṛẽ hoṛ do unre onḍe khon Layisteko senena. Onkoko ńelkeda onḍenko hoṛ do Sidonrenko leka khạtirjoma, sulukte ar bin botorko girobasokʼ kana. Ona jaegare nonkan celege bạnukʼkoa, onko cetanre santaoko calao daṛeakʼ. Ona chaḍa onko do Sidonrenko khon hõ ḍher sạṅgińreko girobasokʼ kana ar eṭakʼ jãhãeko sãote jãhãn karbarge bạnukʼtakoa." 
Judges18:8 Onko mõṛẽ hoṛko do tinre Sora ar Estaolteko ruạṛ hecʼena unreko kuli ocoyena, “Ape do onḍe cetʼpe ńelkeda?”" 
Judges18:9 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Oka jaegale ńel ạguketʼ ona do ạḍi mońjgea. Dela, abo do onko bon akromonkoa. Ape do cetʼ duṛupʼ hape akaepe tahena? Onḍe jaega dokhol do alope biloma." 
Judges18:10 Arpe senlen khangepe ńela, onḍenko hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jaegare khạtirjomako girobasokʼ kana. Isor do apeakʼ tire ona jaegae jimạ akawatʼpea. Ar dhạrti reakʼ okaṭakʼ reakʼ okulạn hõ onḍe do bạnukʼ anaṅ.”" 
Judges18:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate Dan gusṭiren turui sae hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoente Sora ar Estaol khonko mohnḍayena. 
Judges18:12 Horre onko do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ Kiriat-Jearim ṭhenko ḍerayena. Onate Kiriat-Jearim reakʼ pạchim secʼ do teheń hõ Mahane-Danko metakʼ kana (mane do “Danrenkoakʼ ḍera”). 
Judges18:13 Onḍe khon onko do Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭhateko rakapʼente Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼteko boloyena. 
Judges18:14 Ar okoeko hoṛ do Layisre senkate khoj khoborko ạguletʼ tahẽkan onko do akoren hoṛko metatʼkoa, “Apepe baḍaegea, niạ oṛakʼre do mitʼṭecʼ ehpod, debotakoakʼ muṭhạn rokʼ bekʼnao muṭhạnko ar dulakʼ muṭhạnko menakʼa? Onate ńitokʼ cetʼpe cekaea ma hudispe.”" 
Judges18:15 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko do Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼren uni Liwi koṛawakʼ oṛakʼteko boloyena ar boge bạṛicʼ reakʼ khoborko hataokeda. 
Judges18:16 Ar Dan gusṭiren onko turui sae hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ horre senkateko teṅgoyena. 
Judges18:17 Unre uni naeke do turui sae hoṛko sãote onḍeye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. Ar disạm reakʼ khoj khobor okoeko ạguletʼ onko mõṛẽ hoṛ do bhitrite bolokate goṛhon muṭhạnko, ephod, deb muṭhạnko ar dul muṭhạnkoko hataoketʼkoa."
