Judges18:18 Ar tinre Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼ khon onakoko oḍok ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana unre uni naeke doe metatʼkoa, “Noa do cetʼpe cekayeda?”" 
Judges18:19 Uniko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Thirokʼme, ar moca betʼkate ale sãote hijukʼme; ar aleren naeke hoyokʼme ar aleren baba leka hoyokʼme. Mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ gharońjren naeke hoyokʼ khon Israelkoren mitʼ gusṭiren naeke hoyokʼge cetʼ baṅ bhagea?”" 
Judges18:20 Niạ katha ańjomkate uni naeke doe kusiyena. Uni do acʼtege ona ephod, deb muṭhạnko ar goṛhon muṭhạnkoante onko hoṛ sãoteye oḍok calaoena." 
Judges18:21 Ar hoṛko do akoren kạṭicʼ gidrạko, janwarko ar akoakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko do akoren phạdkoakʼ lahare dohokate onḍe khonko uṭhạuena." 
Judges18:22 Mikạwakʼ oṛakʼ khon thoṛa sạṅgiń ńokʼko senen khan Mikạ do aḍepaseren hoṛko mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa. Ar ona tayom do Dan gusṭirenkoe sen tiyokʼketʼkoa. 
Judges18:23 Onko do Dan gusṭiren hoṛko tayom tayomte ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoko ehopʼena. Unre Dan gusṭiren hoṛko do ạcurente Mikạko metadea, “Cetʼ hoyakante, lạṛhại lạgitʼ hoṛkom jarwayetʼkoa?”" 
Judges18:24 Mikại roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape do aleren boṅgako ar aleren naeke hõpe idi torayedekana. Inạ tayom aleakʼ do ar cetʼ tahẽyena? Ar cekatepe meneda, cetʼ hoyakantama?”" 
Judges18:25 Dan gusṭiren hoṛko menkeda, “Am do jãhãnakʼ kathage alom roṛa. Nonḍe nonkan etaṅ cạndiyan hoṛ menakʼkoa onko do amakʼ katha ańjomkateko hạn botecʼmea ar amakʼ gharońjren hoṛ doko gujukʼa.”" 
Judges18:26 Niạ menkate Dan gusṭiren hoṛ do akoakʼ horteko mohnḍayena. Mikạ doe ńelkeda, onko do acʼ khon hõko daṛegea. Onate uni hõ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena." 
Judges18:27 Onko do Mikạren naeke ar sanam boṅga muṭhạnko soṅgekate Layisteko calaoena. Ar onḍe okoe do suluk ar khạtirjomako tahẽkan onko sanamko gocʼketʼkoa ar onkoakʼ nagrahako jeretʼ giḍikatʼtakoa. 
Judges18:28 Unre Layisrenko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ nonkan cele hoṛge bako tahẽkana, ente onkoakʼ nagraha do Sidon khon ḍher sạṅgińre tahẽkana ar eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛko sãote hõ onko do jãhãn helmelge baṅ tahẽkantakoa. Onkoakʼ nagraha do Beth-Rahab nagraha ṭhenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ tapol otre tahẽkana. Dan gusṭiren hoṛko do arhõ nagrahako benaoketʼte onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Judges18:29 Nagraha reakʼ laha ńutum Layis tahẽkanre hõ onko do akoren hapṛamkoakʼ ńutum lekate ona reakʼ ńutum do Danko dohokeda. Dan do Israelren hopone tahẽkana. 
Judges18:30 Dan gusṭiren hoṛko do ako lạgitʼ onḍe mitʼṭecʼ goṛhon muṭhạnko benaokedea. Ar disạmren hoṛko bondi dosare ạuriko calakʼ hạbicʼ Dan gusṭiren hoṛko lạgitʼ do Jonathan ar uniren bõskoge naeke kạmiko kạmikan tahẽkana. Jonathan do Gersem bõsren ar Gersem do Moseren hopone tahẽkana. 
Judges18:31 Silore tinạkʼ din Isorakʼ oṛakʼ tahẽkan unạkʼ din hạbicʼ Dan gusṭiren hoṛko do Mikạren goṛhon muṭhạn do ako ṭhenko dohokada. 
Judges19:1 Israelko talare tinre cele rapajge bako tahẽkanre mitʼṭen Liwi hoṛ do Ephrayim buru ṭoṭhareye girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ Bethlehem atoren mitʼṭen chuṭki erae ạguan tahẽkana. 
Judges19:2 Uni chuṭki era do loṭghuṭi iạteye bạgi ocoyen khan acʼren apatakʼ oṛakʼ Bethlehemteye ruạṛ calaoena. Uni do onḍe pon candoe tahẽyen khan uniren jãwãetetʼ do ruạṛ ạguiye lạgitʼte senena. Ar uni sãote acʼren guti koṛa ar mitʼ joṛa gadha hõe idi toraketʼkinạ. Unre uni maejiu do acʼ apatakʼ oṛakʼteye idiketʼkinạ. Ar uniren hońhartetʼ hõ uniye ńelkede khan ạḍiye kusiyena. 
Judges19:3  
Judges19:4 Ar onḍe tahen lạgitʼte nehõradea. Onate uni Liwi do acʼren hońhartetʼakʼ oṛakʼre pe dine tahẽyena are jom ńũkeda. 
Judges19:5 Ado ponakʼ din ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate ruạṛokʼ lạgitʼe sapṛaoena menkhan uniren hońhartetʼ doe menkeda, “Jom ńũi ben, ado ben calakʼa.”" 
Judges19:6 Onate uni do jom lạgitʼe duṛupʼena. Ar hońhartetʼ doe menkeda, “Teheń ńindạ hõ tahen ben ar rạskạkʼ ben.”" 
Judges19:7 Uni Liwi do calakʼ lạgitʼe sapṛaolenre hõ hońhartetʼe jormoṭkedete ona ńindạ hõ onḍegeye tahẽyena. 
Judges19:8 Ado mõṛẽakʼ din ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate ruạṛokʼ lạgitʼe sapṛaoen khan acʼren hońhartetʼ doe menkeda, “Jom ńũi ben, ar ạyupʼ bela hạbicʼ tahen ben.” Ar unkin dokin jom ńũkeda." 
Judges19:9 Ona tayom Liwi do acʼren chuṭki era ar gutiyante tinre calakʼ lạgitʼe sapṛaoena unre hońhartetʼe menkeda, “Ńelben, ber doe khaṭogea are ạyubokʼ lạgidokʼ kana. Onate nonḍege tahen ben ar rạskạ joṅben. Ar gapa do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate abenakʼ oṛakʼte ruạṛben.”" 
Judges19:10 Menkhan uni hoṛ do onḍe tahẽ aṅgakʼ bae kusilena. Onate uni do gadhae palanketʼkinte acʼren chuṭki erawante onḍe khon ruạṛokʼe ehopʼena. Onko do tinre Jebusi, metakʼme Jerusalem sorko seṭerena unre bela doe hạsurokʼkan tahẽkana. Unre guti do acʼren kisạ̃ṛe metadea, “Dela bon, Jebusikoakʼ nagrahare senkate bon tahẽ aṅgakʼa.”" 
Judges19:11  
Judges19:12 Uniren kisạ̃ṛ doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa, okoe Israelko baṅkan onkoakʼ nagrahare do babon calakʼa. Abo do bickom Gibeare senkate bon tahẽ aṅgakʼa.”" 
Judges19:13 Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Abo do Gibea baṅkhan Ramare seṭerokʼ bon kurumuṭuiya ar ńindạ do onakin nagraha reakʼ mitʼṭecʼte senkate bon aṅga hạṭińokʼa.”" 
Judges19:14 Onate onko do calakʼtegeko tahẽyena. Ar Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibea ṭhenko seṭeren khan siń cando doe hạsurena. 
Judges19:15 Unre onko do aṅga hạṭińokʼ lạgitʼ hor bạgikate Gibeateko boloyena ar nagraha reakʼ kulhire senkateko duṛupʼena, menkhan ńindạ tahẽ aṅgakʼ lạgitʼ okoe hõ apnarakʼ oṛakʼte bako hoho aderletʼkoa." 
Judges19:16 Enhilokʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Ephrayim buru ṭoṭharen mitʼṭen haṛam hoṛ do acʼakʼ khet khon kạmi baṛakate Gibeateye boloyena. Uni do ona nagraharegeye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana, menkhan onḍenko hoṛ do Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Judges19:17 Ar nagraha reakʼ kulhire hortenkoe ńelketʼko khan uni haṛam hoṛ doe kuliketʼkoa, “Ape dope okoe kana ar oka khonpe hecʼakana?”" 
Judges19:18 Uni hoṛe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ale do Jihudạ reakʼ Bethlehem khonle hecʼakana ar Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭhatele calakʼkana. Iń doń onḍenicʼkangea. Iń do Jihudạ reakʼ Bethlehemteń senlena ar ńitokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteń ruạṛ kana, menkhan okoe hõ akoakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ lạgitʼ do bako metadińa." 
Judges19:19 Aleren gadhakin lạgitʼ busupʼ ar lobokʼ hõ menakʼgea ar amren nui kạ̃ṛmĩ ar soṅgeten guti koṛa lạgitʼ piṭhạ ar darkha rasa hõ menakʼgea. Amren golam do ar cetʼ reakʼ jạruṛ hõ bạnukʼtalea.” 
Judges19:20 Unre uni haṛam hoṛe menkeda, “Amakʼ suluk baṛe hoyokʼtam ma. Ar jãhãnakʼge jạruṛem bujhạu ona reakʼ bhar do ińre dohoyme. Menkhan ńindạ do niạ tala kulhire alope tahẽ aṅgakʼa.”" 
Judges19:21 Noa menkate uni haṛam hoṛ do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye idiketʼkoa ar onkoren gadhakoe jom ocoketʼkoa. Ar onko hõ ti-jaṅga ạbuk baṛakateko jom ńũkeda. 
Judges19:22 Ado khạtirjomako tahẽkanre nagraharen kharap hoṛko do hecʼkate ona oṛakʼko gheraokeda. Onko do silpiń ḍhae ḍhae dal baṛakate haṛam hoṛko metadea, “Okoe hoṛ amakʼ oṛakʼteye hecʼakan uni do ale ṭhen oḍok ạguiyem. Ale do uni sãotele loṭghuṭiya.”" 
Judges19:23 Unre oṛakʼren mạlik doe oḍokente onkoe metatʼkoa, “Baṅa, E boehako; nehõrokʼ kạnạń, nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ do alope kạmiya. Ente uni do ińren peṛa kanae; unire noa bạṛicʼ kạmi do alope kạmiya." 
Judges19:24 Ińren kũạri kuṛi ar uni hoṛren chuṭi era nonḍe menakʼkinạ. Iń do ape ṭhen unkin geń oḍok ạgukinạ. Ape do unkin bạṛicʼkinpe ar apeakʼ oka monsubạ menakʼtape onage unkin cetanre kạmipe, menkhan nui hoṛ cetanre bạṛicʼakʼ jãhãnakʼ do alope cekaea.”" 
Judges19:25 Menkhan onko hoṛ do uniyakʼ kathare bako rạjilena. Unre Liwi hoṛ do acʼren chuṭki era sapʼkate bahrete onko ṭhene oḍok gotʼkadea. Onko do goṭa ńindạ jorkate uni tulucʼko laṭghaṭkeda ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo cetanre akoakʼ kusi lekako kạmikeda. Ona tayom onko do aṅga marsalokʼ jokhecʼko aṛakʼkadea. 
Judges19:26 Unre uni maejiu do acʼren jãwãetetʼ okareye tahẽkan uni haṛamakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr ṭhen hecʼkateye sohor bhindạṛena. Ar cando ạuriye rakabokʼ hạbicʼ onḍege bhindạṛgeye tahẽkana. 
Judges19:27 Ado setakʼ jokhecʼ uniren jãwãe do beretʼente mohnḍa lạgitʼ tinre silpińe jhicʼkeda unre acʼren chuṭki era duạr ganaḍere ti dohokate bhindạṛ akane ńel ńamkedea. 
Judges19:28 Unre uniye metadea, “Beretʼme, dela bon calakʼa.” Menkhan jãhãn roṛ ruạṛ do bae ńamleda. Unre Liwi hoṛ do gadhare acʼren rinicʼtetʼe decʼkedete oṛakʼteye mohnḍayena." 
Judges19:29 Ar oṛakʼ senkate uni do mitʼṭecʼ churi hataokate uniyakʼ jaṅko salakʼ gelbar ṭhecʼe getʼ kuṭrạkedea ar Israelkoakʼ sanam jaegareye kolkeda. 
Judges19:30 Ar okoe onako ńelketʼ onko mimitʼkoko menkeda, “Israelko Misor khonko oḍok hecʼen hilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ nonkanakʼ kạmi do baṅ hoyakana ar ńel hõ baṅ ńel akana. Ape do niạ babotre hudispe, sopolhaepe ar cetʼ bon cekaea ona reakʼ lạipe.”" 
Judges20:1 Inạ tayom Gileadren Israelko ar Dan khon Ber-seba hạbicʼ sanam jaegaren hoṛko oḍokʼ hecʼena ar Mispare Probhu Isor ṭhenko jarwayena. 
Judges20:2 Niạ katha do Benjamin gusṭiren hoṛko ańjom tiyokʼkeda. Ar Isorren okoeko hoṛko jarwayen onko modre Israel gusṭikoren sanam mukhiyạko ar pon lakh tarwaṛe cakʼlao hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko do baḍae sanaketʼkoa, ona hirkhạwakʼ kạmi do cekate hoyena." 
Judges20:3  
Judges20:4 Unre Liwi gusṭiren onko hoṛ do, metakʼme gocʼ ocoakan maejiuren jãwãeye menkeda, “Iń ar ińren bạhu do Benjamin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibeare ńindạ liń tahẽkana." 
Judges20:5 Ńindạ jokhecʼ Gibearen hoṛ do iń sendrayiń lạgitʼ oṛakʼko gheraokeda. Onko do iń gojeńko menleda, menkhan ona bodolte ińren chuṭki era tulucʼ jorkateko laṭghaṭkeda, ar onate uni doe gocʼena." 
Judges20:6 Israelko talare nonkan bạṛicʼ ar hirkhạwakʼko kạmi akatʼte ińren chuṭi era doń phạṛikedea ar Israelkoakʼ gelbar goṭecʼ jaegare ona doń kolkeda. 
Judges20:7 Ńitokʼ do E Israelko, niạ babotre sopolhakate mitʼṭecʼ roṛ ruạṛ imạńpe.”" 
Judges20:8 Noate sanam hoṛ mitʼ domte teṅgoyenteko menkeda, “Okoe hõ oṛakʼte do babon calakʼa; ar aboko modre mitʼhoṛ hõ babon ruạṛa." 
Judges20:9 Abo do gulibãṭkate Gibearen hoṛko upạrte bon rakapʼ calakʼa. 
Judges20:10 Israelkoren sanam gusṭiko mod khon mimitʼ mitʼsae hoṛ khon gel hoṛ, hajarko khon mitʼsae ar gel hajar khon mitʼ hajar hoṛ bon bachaokoa. Onko do senkate lạṛhại phạdko lạgitʼ jomakʼko ạguiya; ar abo do Benjamin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibeate senkate Israelko talare oka hirkhạwakʼko kạmi akatʼ ona reakʼ bon halawakoa.”" 
Judges20:11 Onate Israelkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gusṭiren hoṛko do mitʼdomte jarwakate Gibea upạrteko teṅgoyena. 
Judges20:12 Onko do Benjamin ṭoṭha reakʼ sanam jaegare hoṛ kolkateko kuliyana, “Apeko modre nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi do cekatepe kạmikeda?" 
Judges20:13 Gibearen onko bạṛicʼ hoṛ do aleakʼ tire jimạkope jemon onkole gocʼkote Israelko tala khon hirkhạwakʼle ocokʼ giḍikakʼ. Menkhan Benjaminrenko do akoren Israel boehakoakʼ katha bako luturada. 
Judges20:14 Onko do Israelko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ akoakʼ nagraha ar atoko khon oḍokkate Gibeare senkateko jarwayena. 
Judges20:15 Enhilokʼ onko do akoakʼ atoko ar nagraha khon bargel turui hajar lạṛhại phạdko jarwaketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa onko sãote Gibearen eae sae tarwaṛe calaokoko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:16 Sanam lạṛhại phạdko modre eae sae leṅgṛa hoṛko tahẽkana okoe do gạkhuṛ salakʼ ginḍwạri hotete dhiriko capatʼ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Judges20:17 Israelren sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ lekha do pon lakh tahẽkana. Onko do sanamkoge lạṛhạire ạḍi gạkhuṛko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:18 Onko do Bethelre senkate Isor ṭhen khon baḍae sanaketʼkoa Benjạminrenko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ onko modre okoe do lahateye rakapʼ calakʼa. Probhu Isor doe baḍae ocoketʼkoa, Jihudạ gusṭirenko sen maṛaṅokʼa." 
Judges20:19 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre beretʼkate Israelko do Gibea ṭhenko ḍerayena. 
Judges20:20 Ona tayom onko do Benjaminrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍokente onḍe onko upạrte lạṛhại phạdko sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
Judges20:21 Ar Benjaminrenko do Gibea khonko oḍok hecʼena ar enhilokʼ bargel bar hajar Israelko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges20:22 Unre Israelko do senkate ạyupʼ hạbicʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼateko menkeda, “Ale do cetʼ aleren boeha Benjaminko upạrte arhõ lạṛhại lạgitʼle rakapʼ calakʼa?” Probhu Isor doe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Do calakʼpe.” Ar noa iạte Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do dil salakʼ pạhil din oka jaegareko lạṛhại len onḍege arhõ lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoena." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Dosar hilokʼ onko do Benjạmin gusṭiren upạrteko laha idiyena. 
Judges20:25 Ar Benjạminrenko hõ onko tạkicʼ daramko lạgitʼ Gibea khonko oḍokente arhõ gel irạl hajar Israelkoko gocʼketʼkoa. Onko sanamkoge tarwaṛe calao lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:26 Unre Israelren sanam hoṛ do arhõ Bethelte senkate Probhu Isor samaṅre duṛupʼkate rarakʼko ehopʼena. Enhilokʼ onko do ạyupʼ hạbicʼko upạskeda ar Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
Judges20:27 Onako dinre Isorakʼ bebosta sinduk do Bethelrege tahẽkana, ar Aronren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Eliaser hopon Pinhas do ona samaṅre teṅgokateye sewayetʼ tahẽkana. Ona iạte Israelko do onḍe Probhu Isorakʼ sana baḍae lạgitʼko kuliyana, “Ale do aleren boeha Benjamin gusṭiren upạrte arhõ lạṛhại lạgitʼle calakʼa se baṅa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Do calakʼpe, ente gapage apeakʼ tire onkoń jimạkoa.”" 
Judges20:28  
Judges20:29 Unre Israelko do Gibea beṛhaete akoren lạṛhại phạdko oko dohokatʼkoa. 
Judges20:30 Tesar hilokʼ sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko do Benjạminrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ lahate leka Gibea ṭhenko sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
Judges20:31 Ar Benjạminreko do Israelko daramko lạgitʼ nagraha khon sạṅgińteko senena. Onko do lahate lekage Israelko gocʼketʼkoa. Onate Bethel ar Gibea secʼ okaṭakʼ hor calao akan onare pegel hoṛko gocʼena. 
Judges20:32 Onate Benjaminrenko menkeda, “Lahate lekage bon bhagaoetʼkoa.” Ar Israelkoko menkeda, “Dela bon pạcokʼma, enḍekhan nagraha bahreko oḍok hijukʼte horte bon idikoa.”" 
Judges20:33 Ona tayom Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do akoakʼ jaega khon ocokʼente Bakʼal-Tamarre lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoena. Ar Israelren oko akan lạṛhại phạdko do akoakʼ jaega khon, metatʼme Mare Gebako bạgiyatʼte onḍe khonko oḍok hecʼena." 
Judges20:34 Unre Israelren gel hajar bachao hoṛko do Gibea reakʼ samaṅ secʼ lạṛhạiko ehopʼena, ar onate ạḍi kajak lạṛhại hoyena; menkhan Benjaminren do bako bujhạu daṛeada, onkoakʼ maraokʼ do sorakana mente." 
Judges20:35 Probhu Isor do enhilokʼ Israelkoakʼ tire Benjamin gusṭirenkoe jimạketʼkoa ar onko do bargel mõṛẽ hajar mitʼsae Benjaminren hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Onko sanamkoge tarwaṛe calaokoko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:36 Inạ tayom Benjaminrenko bujhạu daṛeada, onko doko haraokʼkana mente. Ar Gibeare okoe phạdko oko akan tahẽkan onko cetanre bhorsakatege Israelko do Benjạminrenko samaṅ khonko pạclena." 
Judges20:37 Ar oko akan tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdko do ackage Gibea upạrte jhãpko emkeda ar nagrahare bolokate sanam hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges20:38 Onkoko tãṛãkʼ akan tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdko sãote Israelkoren eṭakʼ lạṛhại phạdko do niạ cinhạko ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkana, nagraha khon cetante dhũạ rakabokʼko ńel lekhan jemonko ạcur ruạṛokʼa." 
Judges20:39  
Judges20:40 Menkhan onkoakʼ nagraha khon tinre khunṭi leka dhũạ do coṭte rakabokʼ ehopʼena unre onko do ạcurkateko ńelkeda, goṭa nagraha khon dhũạ do coṭte rakabokʼ kana." 
Judges20:41 Ar unre Israelko doko ạcur ruạṛena ar ona iạte Benjaminrenko do ạḍi botor caṛhaoatʼkoa. Onkoko bujhạu daṛekeda, ako cetanre maraokʼ do seṭerena mente." 
Judges20:42 Ar onate onko do Israelko samaṅ khon hahaṅkar secʼ dạṛ pharakokʼko ehopʼena, menkhan lạṛhại khon rehae do bako ńamleda. Eṭakʼ Israelko do nagraha ar atoko khonko oḍok hecʼente onḍege onkoko gocʼketʼkoa." 
Judges20:43 Onko do Benjạminren hoṛko khudạu idiketʼkoa ar Gibea purub secʼ akoakʼ jirạukʼ jaegareko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges20:44 Onate Benjạminren gel irạl hajar lạṛhại phạdko gocʼena. Onko sanamkoge daṛean lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:45 Ar Benjaminren sarecʼko do ạcurkate hahaṅkar reakʼ Rimon buru secʼko dạṛkeda ar Israelko do horrege onkoren mõṛẽ hajar hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Ona tayom hõ Israelko do gidom hạbicʼko khudạu idiketʼkote arhõ bar hajar hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. 
Judges20:46 Enhilokʼ jotote bargel mõṛẽ hajar Benjaminren lạṛhại phạdko gocʼocoyena. Onko sanamkoge bhage lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
Judges20:47 Menkhan Benjaminren turui sae hoṛ do hahaṅkar reakʼ Rimon buruteko ńir paskaoena ar pon cando onḍegeko tahẽyena. 
Judges20:48 Ar Israelko do ruạṛkate Benjạminren sarecʼ sanam hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa ar nagraha ar atore onkoren jãhãegeko ńamketʼko onko jotogeko gocʼketʼkoa. Onko do nagraha ar atote bolokate seṅgelte jotowakʼko jeretʼ giḍikada. 
Judges21:1 Israelko do Mispare kiriạkateko menkeda, onko modre okoe hõ Benjamin gusṭiren hoṛko sãote akoren kuṛiko bako baplakoa." 
Judges21:2 Ar onko do Bethelte senkate Probhu Isor samaṅre duṛupʼkate ạyupʼ hạbicʼ ãṭ aṛaṅte rakʼateko menkeda, “E Probhu, Israelkoren Isor, Israelko talare cedakʼ nonka do hoyena? Cedakʼ teheń do Israelko tala khon mitʼṭen gusṭirenko doko atʼena." 
Judges21:3  
Judges21:4 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍire hoṛko do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍko benaokeda ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
Judges21:5 Mispare onko do mitʼṭecʼ kajakko kiriạyena, ona do noage je, Mispare Probhu Isor samaṅre jãhãege bae hạjirokʼ enḍekhan uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar onate onko do apan ạpin kupulikʼko ehopʼena, “Israelren sanam gusṭiko khon okoe Mispate Probhu Isor samaṅre bako hecʼakana?”" 
Judges21:6 Onko do onkoren boeha Benjaminrenko lạgitʼ duk kateko menkeda, “Israelko tala khon teheń mitʼṭen gusṭiren doko thoṛayena." 
Judges21:7 Menkhan okoe sarecʼko tahẽyen onkoakʼ do cetʼlekate bapla reakʼ bon bebostaea? Abo ma Probhu Isor ńutumte bon kiriạ akan, aboren kuṛiko onkoren koṛako sãote babon baplakoa mente.”" 
Judges21:8 Onko do mitʼ hoṛ armitʼ hoṛko kuliyana, “Israel gusṭiko modre cetʼ nonkan jãhãe hoṛ menaea, okoe do Mispare Probhu Isor samaṅre bae hạjir akan?” Unreko baḍaekeda, Jabes Gilead khon do celege onḍe bako senakana," 
Judges21:9 ente hoṛ lekhako jokhecʼ Jabes Gileadren jãhãe hoṛge onḍe do bako ńamlena. 
Judges21:10 Onate onkoren daṛean lạṛhại birko mod khon gelbar hajar hoṛko kolkatʼkoa jemon onko do Jabes Gileadre senkate kạṭicʼ gidrạko ar maejiuko sudhạ sanam hoṛko gocʼko. 
Judges21:11 Onkoko menkeda, “Ape do mitʼke mitʼ herel hopon ar okoe do kũạri kuṛiko baṅkan nonkan mitʼke mitʼ maejiuko hõpe gocʼkoa.”" 
Judges21:12 Onko bir do Jabes Gileadren hoṛko modre ponsae kũạri kuṛiko ńamketʼkoa; ar onko do Kanan disạmre menakʼ Silo reakʼ ḍerateko idiketʼkoa. 
Judges21:13 Inạ tayom onko jarwa akan Israelko do Rimon burute hoṛ kolkate Benjaminrenko sãote kathako roṛkeda ar sulukokʼko jạhirkeda. 
Judges21:14 Nonkate Benjạminrenko doko ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar Jabes Gileadre jiwetʼ dohoakatʼko kuṛiko sãote onkoakʼ bapla hoyena, menkhan kuṛikoakʼ lekha do thoṛayena." 
Judges21:15 Hoṛko do Benjaminren gusṭiko lạgitʼ dukokʼko ehopʼena, ente Probhu Isor do Israel gusṭiko talare mitʼṭecʼ phaṭole dhorao akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Judges21:16 Onkoren murubbiko doko menkeda, “Benjạminren maejiuko doko marao ocoakana. Ar ńitokʼ okoeko herel hoṛko jiwetʼ doho ocoakan onko baplako lạgitʼ abo do okare kuṛi bon ńamkoa?" 
Judges21:17 Israelko tala khon mitʼṭen gusṭiren jemon aloko meṭao utạrokʼ onate jiwetʼ menakʼko Benjạmin bõsren rukhiyạko hoyokʼa. 
Judges21:18 Aboren kuṛiko do onko tulucʼ babon bapla daṛeako, ente bon kiriạ akana, jãhãege Benjạminrenko lạgitʼ acʼren hoponerae emokʼ enḍekhan uni do sarapanicʼe hoyokʼa.”" 
Judges21:19 Ona tayom onkoko menkeda, “Jao bochor Silore Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ porob hoyokʼa.” Ar Silo nagraha do Bethel utạr secʼakʼ okaṭakʼ hor do Bethel khon Sikem secʼ calao akan ona purub ar Lebona khon dạkhin secʼre menakʼa." 
Judges21:20 Onko do Benjaminrenko niạ sopolhako ematʼkoa, “Ape do senkate darkha khetre tãṛãkʼ akan tahenpe ar ạribạndhipe." 
Judges21:21 Ar onḍenko kuṛi do tinre enecʼ lạgitʼko oḍok hijukʼa unre ape mimitʼko darkha khet khon oḍok kate onko mod khon okoepe kusiyako onkope or idikoa ar Benjạmin ṭoṭhatepe calakʼa. 
Judges21:22 Ado tinre onkoren apat se boehako ale ṭhen lạlis lạgitʼko hijukʼa unrele metakoa, ‘onko kuṛiko do dan alepe ar alere dayakʼpe. Lạṛhại jokhecʼ onko lạgitʼ kuṛiko do bale ńamletʼkoa. Niạ babotre apeakʼ jãhãn dos do bạnukʼa, ente ape apnarte aperen kuṛiko bape emakana.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Onate Benjạminreko doko onkakeda. Ar kuṛiko tinreko enejokʼ kan tahẽkana unre onko baplako lạgitʼ mitʼ hoṛkateko sapʼ idiketʼkoa. Ona tayom onko do apnarakʼ jaegate ruạṛ senkate ato ar nagrahako benaokeda ar girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
Judges21:24 Inạ tayom Israelko do ona jaega bạgiyatʼte akoakʼ gusṭi ar bõsrenkoakʼ jaegateko calaoena. 
Judges21:25 Unre hõ Israelko talare cele rajge bako tahẽkana. Ar okoe oka bhageye hudisetʼ tahẽkan onkageko kạmikan tahẽkana. 
Ruth1:1 Bikʼcạrkoakʼ bidạlre Israelkoakʼ disạmre mitʼṭecʼ akal hoylena. Unre Jihudạ disạm reakʼ Bethlehem atoren mitʼṭen hoṛ do acʼren bạhu ar barea hoponkin soṅgekate thoṛa okte lạgitʼ Moab disạmte senkate girobasokʼe ehopʼena. 
Ruth1:2 Uni hoṛakʼ ńutum do Elimek tahẽkana. Ar uniren bạhuakʼ ńutum do Naomi ar banar hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Mahlon ar Kilion. Onko do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ Bethlehemren Ephati hoṛko tahẽkana. Ar onko do Moab disạmte senkate onḍegeko tahẽyena. 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleke gocʼen khan Naomi ar uniren banar hopon sarecʼko tahẽyena. 
Ruth1:4 Naomiren hopon do Moab disạmren kuṛikin baplaketʼkinạ. Unkin kuṛikin modre mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Orpa ar eṭagicʼakʼ ńutum do Rut tahẽkana. Mahlon ar Kilion do Moab disạmre gel bochor tahẽkan tayomkin gocʼena. Naomi do jãwãetetʼ ar banar hoponkine atʼketʼkin khane acʼ eskarena. 
Ruth1:5  
Ruth1:6 Naomi do Moab disạmre tahẽkanregeye ańjomkeda, Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoe disạ akatʼkoa ar jomakʼ reakʼe bebosta akatʼkoa. Onate uni do acʼren banar kimintetʼ soṅgekate Moab disạm khon ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼe sapṛaoena." 
Ruth1:7 Ar okareko tahẽkan onḍe khon banar kimintetʼ soṅgekate uni doe oḍokena ar Jihudạ disạm reakʼ horte calakʼe ehopʼena. 
Ruth1:8 Naomi do acʼren banar kimintetʼgeye metatʼkinạ, “Aben do bạhu bana hoṛge abenren eṅgat apatakʼ oṛakʼte ruạṛ senokʼ ben. Ar cetʼleka aben do gocʼakan jãwãere ar ińre pạtiạr ben tahẽkan onkage Probhu Isor hõ abenre daya baṛe tahentae ma." 
Ruth1:9 Probhu Isor do abene bhora ben ma jemon arhõ sulukte jãwãe tulucʼ ben soṅsar daṛeakʼ.” Ar noa menkate uni doe cokʼatʼkinạ ar onko do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena. 
Ruth1:10 Unkin dokin menkeda, “Baṅa Go, ạliń do aben sãote abenren hoṛko ṭhenliń ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
Ruth1:11 Naomiye menkeda, “Baṅa, bạhu, aben do oṛakʼtege ruạṛ calakʼ ben. Cedakʼ ạliń tulucʼ do ben calakʼa? Ạlińakʼ kukhire do cetʼ arhõ hoponkin janamokʼ reakʼ as menakʼa onate abenren jãwãekin hoedaṛekokʼ?" 
Ruth1:12 Aben do bạhu, oṛakʼtege Do ruạṛ calakʼ ben. Ente ạlińakʼ do baplakʼ reakʼ umer hõ ar bạnukʼtạlińa. Ạliń do ạlińren hopon janamkin reakʼ aste ạlińren jãwãe ṭhen teheń ńindạge liń giticʼmitʼlen khan ar ạlińren hoponkin hoylen khan," 
Ruth1:13 enḍekhan aben do cetʼ unkin harakʼ hạbicʼ ben tạṅgikakʼa? Ar unkin iạte cetʼ baben baplakʼa? Baṅa, bạhu, ona do baṅ hoyokʼa. Abenakʼ khon ạlińakʼ jiwi do ḍher haṛhatʼ getalińạ, ente Probhu Isor do ạliń upạrteye teṅgo akana.”" 
Ruth1:14 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko do arhõ ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena. Ona tayom Orpa do acʼren hanhartetʼe cokʼadete bidại hataokeda menkhan Rut do uni tulucʼe tahẽyena. 
Ruth1:15 Unre Naomiye menkeda, “Ńelben bạhu, abenre ńatat era do acʼren hoṛko ar acʼren debota ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena. Aben hõ uni leka calao joṅben.”" 
Ruth1:16 Menkhan Rute menkeda, “Ńelben, aben bạgikate calakʼ lạgitʼ do alo ben jormoṭ lińạ, se aben sãote senokʼ lạgitʼ hõ alo ben baron lińạ. Aben okate ben calakʼa ạliń hõ onḍege liń calakʼa ar okare ben tahena ạliń hõ onḍege liń tahena. Abenren hoṛge ạlińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar abenren Isorge ạlińren Isore hoyokʼa." 
Ruth1:17 Ar aben okare ben gujukʼ ạliń hõ onḍege liń gujukʼa ar onḍege jemon ạlińakʼ topa hõ hoyokʼ. Gujukʼ chaḍa eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ iạte laṅ begarokʼ enḍekhan Probhu Isor do jemon bạṛicʼ sạjạiye imạń.” 
Ruth1:18 Naomi do tinreye bujhạukeda, Rut do uni tulucʼ calakʼgeye mone muruk akada unre ar cetʼge bae metadea." 
Ruth1:19 Inạ tayom bana hoṛ senokʼ kin ehopʼena ar mucạtʼre Bethlehemre kin seṭerena. Ar Bethlehem kin seṭeren khan goṭa ato unkin iạte umjhạuena. Atoren maejiuko menkeda, “Nui do cetʼ uni Naomi doe baṅkana?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naomiye menkeda, “Iń do Naomi (metakʼme ‘landa’) do ar alope hohoạńạ, bickom Mara (metakʼme ‘haṛhatʼ’) hohoạńpe, ente sanam daṛean Isor do ińakʼ jiwiye haṛhatʼ akatʼtińạ." 
Ruth1:21 Ale do jhaṅgoe paṭoele senlena menkhan Probhu Isor do eken tiye ruạṛ ạgukedeńạ. Probhu Isor do tinre iń upạrte gohae emeda ar sanam daṛean Isor do tinre kosṭoreye paṛao akadińạ unre cedakʼ Naomi dope hohoạń kana.?” 
Ruth1:22 Nonkate Naomi do acʼren kimintetʼ Rut soṅgekate Moab disạm khone ruạṛ hecʼena. Unkin do jao irokʼ ehobokʼ jokhecʼ Bethlehem tekin seṭerena. 
Ruth2:1 Jãwãe secʼte Naomiren do mitʼṭen manotan kisạ̃ṛ peṛae tahẽkana. Uni do Elimelek bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana. Ar uniyakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Boas. 
Ruth2:2 Mitʼ din Rut do Naomiye metadea, “Ạliń do cetʼ khette senkate hulạkʼ liń halaṅ ạguiya? Ar okoe ạlińreye dayakʼte onae halaṅ ocowạliń uni tayomrege liń tahena.” Naomi do uniye metadea, “Hẽ bạhu, ma calakʼ ben.”" 
Ruth2:3 Unre Rut doe oḍokena ar khetre senkate phosol gegetʼko tayom tayomte hulạkʼ halaṅe dhurạuena; ar uni okare hulạkʼe halaṅetʼ kan tahẽkan ona do Elimelek bõsren Boasakʼ khetge tahẽkana. 
Ruth2:4 Unre Boas do Bethlehem khone hecʼena ar phosol gegetʼkan tahẽkan hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor ape sãore baṛeye tahenma.” Onko hõ uniko men ruạṛadea, “Probhu Isor hõ ame bhoram ma.”" 
Ruth2:5 Ar Boas do phosol gegetʼ kạmikoe ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkan gutiye kulikedea, “Uni juạn kuṛi doe okoe kana?”" 
Ruth2:6 Uni ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkan guti doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Moab disạm khon Naomi sãote okoe maejiue hecʼakan uni kangeae nui do." 
Ruth2:7 Uni doe metadiń tahẽkana, phosol gegetʼko tayomte ạṭi tala reakʼ hulạkʼko dayakate halaṅ ocoạńme. Ar uni do setakʼ khon ńit hạbicʼ nonḍege menaea; eken thoṛa ghạṛicʼ sate latarreye jirạulena.”" 
Ruth2:8 Unre Boas do Rute metadea, “E mại, ańjomme. Am do niạ khetrege hulạkʼ halaṅme ar nonḍe ińren kạmiyạ kuṛiko sãote tahenme." 
Ruth2:9 Ar jumi reakʼ oka aṛere phosol gedokʼkan ona ńelkate kạmiyạ kuṛiko tayom tayomte onḍe calakʼme. Iń do hoṛkoń men akatʼkoa jemon am aloko ạṛisme. Ińren hoṛ okoe do dakʼko lolokan, tetaṅlem khan am do onḍe senkate dakʼ ńũime baṛe.”" 
Ruth2:10 Noa katha ańjomkate Rut do ombakʼkate uni ḍobokʼ adeteye menkeda, “Dayate nunạkʼem moneyạń kan, noa do cekate hoyena? Iń doń porjạtren hoṛ kan coṅ.”" 
Ruth2:11 Boase roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren jãwãe gocʼ tayom hanharme lạgitʼ okam ceka akatʼ ona sanamakʼgeń ańjom akada, ar noa hõń ańjom akada, amren go-baba ar janam jaega bạgikate bin baḍae mitʼṭen jạtrenko talare tahen lạgitʼem hecʼakana." 
Ruth2:12 Onate Probhu Isor do ame bhoram kana. Ar Israelkoren Probhu Isor, okoeyakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre asray ńam lạgitʼem hecʼakan, uni do jemon amakʼ bakhratam purạteye emkatam.”" 
Ruth2:13 Unre Rute menkeda, “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ, am do daya mẽtʼtem ńeleń kana. Ar amren kạ̃ṛmĩ ṭhen noa udgạu reakʼ katham roṛketʼte am do jiwi raṛecʼem emadińạ, ente iń do amren kạmiyạ kuṛiko sãote teṅgokʼ lekgeń baṅkana.”" 
Ruth2:14 Ado jojom okte hoyen khan Boas do uniye metadea, “Nonḍe hijukʼte piṭhạ hataome ar sirkạre topokate jomme.” Unre Rut do phosol gegetʼkan hoṛko ṭhen senkateye duṛupʼen khan Boas do thoṛa ata anaje emadea. Ar Rut do lacʼ bikʼe jomketʼ tayom hõ thoṛa sarecʼ tahẽyena." 
Ruth2:15 Ona tayom Rut do hulạkʼ halaṅe beretʼen khan Boas do acʼren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ạṭiko reakʼ tala khon hulạkʼe halaṅlere hõ uni do alope egerea." 
Ruth2:16 Bickom phosol gegetʼ jokhecʼ thoṛa dope hulạkʼ oṭokakʼa ar onape halaṅ ocoaea, ar alope dhomkaoea.”" 
Ruth2:17 Rut do ạyupʼ hạbicʼ ona khetre hulạkʼe halaṅkeda. Ar halaṅakʼkoe gum saphaketʼ khan ona jao do gel irạl keji hoyena. 
Ruth2:18 Ar onako hataokate atoteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ar tinạkʼ hulạkʼe halaṅketʼ ona do acʼren hanhartetʼe ńelkeda. Ar lacʼ bi jom tayom sarecʼ okae dohoakatʼ tahẽkan ona oḍok kate hanhartetʼe emadea. 
Ruth2:19 Naomi do uniye kulikedea, “Teheń do bạhu okare ben halaṅkeda, ar okare ben kạmikeda? Abene talasakatʼ ben Isor do uniye bhoraema.” Unre Rut okoeyakʼ khetreye halaṅletʼ ona do hanhartetʼe lạiyadea. Uniye menkeda, “Okoeyakʼ khetreń halaṅketʼ uniyakʼ ńutum do Boasaea.”" 
Ruth2:20 Niạ katha ańjomkate Naomi do acʼren kimintetʼe metadea, “Probhu Isor, okoe do jiwetʼko se gocʼko acʼakʼ daya khon bae bad akatʼko unigeye bhoraema.” Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Uni do aboren sor peṛa kangeae. Okoe peṛa cetanre ińren jãwãeakʼ sanamakʼ chaḍaokʼ reakʼ ar rukhiyạ reakʼ ạidạri menakʼtae uni do onko modren mitʼ hoṛ kanae.”" 
Ruth2:21 Rute menkeda, “Uni do arhõe men akadińạ acʼakʼ sanamakʼ phosol ạuri getʼ cabakʼ hạbicʼ jemon uniren hoṛko sãoteń tahen.”" 
Ruth2:22 Unre Naomi do acʼren kimintetʼe metadea, “E bạhu, eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ khetre jemon okoe hõ aloko ạṛis ben onate uniren kạmiyạ kuṛiko sãote tahenge aben lạgitʼ bhagea.”" 
Ruth2:23 Ar onate jao ar guhum ạuri getʼ cabakʼ hạbicʼ Rut do Boasren kạmiyạ kuṛiko sãote tahẽkate hulạkʼe halaṅkeda. Ar acʼren hanhartetʼ sãoteye tahẽyena. 
Ruth3:1 Thoṛa din tayom Naomi do Rute metadea, “E bạhu, amakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bebosta hatao hoyokʼtińạ jemon gharońj hoyokʼ taben." 
Ruth3:2 Okoeren kạmiyạ kuṛiko sãote nunạkʼ din ben kạmiketʼ uni Boas do aboren peṛa kanae. Ar teheń ńindạ uni do acʼakʼ khạrạire jaoe ewera. 
Ruth3:3 Onate aben do um saphakate sunum ojokʼjoṅ ben ar rokʼ nạkicʼkate mońj utạrakʼ kicricʼ horokʼ bandekate ona khạrạite calakʼ ben. Menkhan jom ńũ ạuri sạtokʼ hạbicʼ alo ben ńel ocokʼa. 
Ruth3:4 Ar tinre uni do giticʼ lạgitʼe calakʼa unre aben do uniyakʼ giticʼ jaega ben ńel oṭokakʼa. Ar ona tayom do onḍe senkate uniyakʼ jaṅga cetan khon uniyakʼ oyon kicricʼ ben ocoga ar onḍe ben gitijokʼa. Ar cetʼ cekae hoyokʼ tabena ona do unigeye lại abena.” 
Ruth3:5 Rut doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Aben okaben menketʼ, ona jotowakʼ geliń kạmiya.”" 
Ruth3:6 Tayomte uni do khạrạire senkate acʼren hanhartetʼe metade tahẽkan leka jotowakʼe kạmikeda. 
Ruth3:7 Boas do jom ńũkateye tirpiten khan uni do puńji akatʼ anaj reakʼ mitʼ aṛere senkateye giticʼena. Ar Rut do hape hapete senkate uni cetan khon oyonakʼ ocokʼkate onḍeye giticʼena. 
Ruth3:8 Tala ńindạ Boas do acka comkao gotʼenteye ạcurena. Uniye ńelkeda mitʼṭen maejiu do acʼakʼ jaṅga ṭhene giticʼ akana. 
Ruth3:9 Uni do uniye kulikedea, “Am dom okoe kana?” Rut doe menkeda, “Iń do amren kạ̃ṛmĩ Rut kạnạń. Amakʼ oyonakʼ latarre amren nui kạ̃ṛmĩ baṛe asray emaeme, ente am do ińakʼ dạyik gogokʼ peṛakoren miṭen hoṛ kanam.”" 
Ruth3:10 Boase roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor do ame bhoram ma. Ńit hạbicʼ okaṭakʼ pạtiạrem udukʼ akatʼ ona khon hõ niạ dhao do ḍher pạtiạrem udukʼ akada, ente kisạ̃ṛ se reṅgecʼ jãhãe koṛa hoṛko ṭhen do bam calao akana." 
Ruth3:11 Alom botorokʼa, am okam khoj onage hoyokʼa. Ińakʼ atoren sanam hoṛgeko baḍaea, am do mitʼṭen bhage kuṛi kanam." 
Ruth3:12 Iń do amakʼ dạyikʼ gogokʼ peṛako modren mitʼ hoṛ kangeạń, menkhan iń khon hõ sor peṛa ar mitʼ hoṛ menaea." 
Ruth3:13 Teheń ńindạ do nonḍege tahenme. Ar uni do gapa setakʼge amakʼ dạyik hataoe rạjikʼ khan tobe ma bhagege; are onka ocoange. Menkhan bae rạjikʼ khan iń do jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, amakʼ dạyik iń hataoa. Ar am do ạuri setagokʼ hạbicʼ nonḍege giticʼ akan tahenme.”" 
Ruth3:14 Onate Rut do setakʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ jaṅga ṭhene giticʼ tahẽyena. Boase metade tahẽkana, mitʼṭen maejiu khạrạiteye hecʼlen ona do okoege jemon aloko baḍae. Ar onate Rut do ạuri aṅga marsalokʼregeye beretʼena." 
Ruth3:15 Unre Boase menkeda, “Amakʼ oyonakʼ note ạguiyme ar ataṅme. ” Ar Rut doe ataṅkeda. Unre Boas do turui haṭakʼ jaoe upʼadete bohokʼreye dipiladea ar uni do atoteye boloyena. Rut do tinre acʼren hanhartetʼ ṭhene senena unre uniye kulikedea, E bạhu, cetʼ hoyena?” Boas acʼ lạgitʼ cetʼ cetʼkoe cekaketʼ Rut do ona sanamakʼe lạikeda." 
Ruth3:16  
Ruth3:17 Uni do arhoe menkeda, “Uni do turui haṭakʼ jao emkateye metadińạ, ‘hanharme ṭhen eken ti do alom ruạṛ calakʼa.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Niạ katha ańjomkate Naomiye menkeda, “E bạhu, ses hạbicʼ ma tạṅgi hataṛ ben cetʼ hoyokʼa mente. Teheńge niạ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bebosta ạuri hoyokʼ hạbicʼ uni do bae thirokʼa.”" 
Ruth4:1 Boas do phaṭok-duạr ṭhen senkateye duṛupʼena. Ar Boas okoe sor peṛa reakʼ kathae menletʼ unre uni do onkateye parom calakʼkan tahẽkana. Boas do uni hohoadeteye metadea, “E boeha, nonḍe hecʼkate duṛupʼlen me.” Unre uni hoṛ do onḍe senkateye duṛupʼena." 
Ruth4:2 Ona tayom Boas do atoren gel goṭen murubbiko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Dela, nonḍe duṛupʼlenpe.” Unre onko do onḍeko duṛupʼena." 
Ruth4:3 Boas do uni sor peṛae metadea, “Naomi do Moab disạm khon ruạṛ hecʼkate aboren boeha Elimelekakʼ jumi ạkhrińe meneda." 
Ruth4:4 Onateń hudiskeda ona reaṅ baḍae ocome jạruṛtińạ. Nonḍe menakʼko hoṛko ar iń jạtren murubbiko samaṅre amge ona do kirińme. Ar amge jumi chaḍao hataoem menetʼ khan ona do amge hataome. Menkhan ona bam khojkan khan lạiyạńme, ente ona chaḍao hatao reakʼ pạhil ạidạri do amakʼ kangea ar ona tayom do ińakʼ kana.” Unre uni sor peṛa doe menkeda, “Ṭhikgea, iń do onań chaḍao hatao joṅa.”" 
Ruth4:5 Onate Boase menkeda, “Oka hilokʼ ona jumi Naomi ṭhen khonem kiriń hataoa enhilokʼ uni gocʼicʼakʼ sompotti sãote uniyakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ Moabi rạnḍi maejiu Rut hõ ataṅe hoyokʼtama.”" 
Ruth4:6 Niạ katha ańjomkate uni sor peṛa doe menkeda, “Ona do bạń daṛeakʼa, ente iń apnarakʼ sompotti iạte unre muskilreń paṛaokʼa. Ar bạń chaḍao hatao daṛeakʼ kante amge ona do hataome.”" 
Ruth4:7 Israelkoakʼ disạmre sompotti kiriń ạkhriń ar chaḍao babotre ạn-tạrire ạgui lạgitʼ niạ ạnge tahẽkana: mitʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ panahi totʼkate eṭakʼ hoṛe emaekan tahẽkana, ar nonkate onkoakʼ kạmi do ạn-tạrire hijukʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ruth4:8 Onatege uni sor peṛa do Boase metadea, “Amge ona do kiriń hataome.” Ar noa menkate uni do acʼakʼ panaheye totʼketʼtaea." 
Ruth4:9 Unre Boas do murubbiko ar onḍenko sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do teheń Elimelek, Kilion ar Mahlon tekoakʼ sanam sompotti do Naomi ṭhen khoniń kirińketʼ onaren gohako do apegepe tahẽyena." 
Ruth4:10 Ar gocʼ akanicʼakʼ sompotti ar ńutum jemon rukhiyạkʼtae onate Mahlonren rạnḍi bạhu Rut hõ ińren bạhu menteń ataṅede kana. Ar onate bõsko tala khon ar atorenko tala khon gocʼ akanicʼakʼ ńutum do baṅ meṭaokʼtaea. Ape do teheń noa sanamakʼren gohakope hoyena.” 
Ruth4:11 Unre okoe do phaṭok duạr ṭhenko duṛupʼ akan tahẽkan murubbiko menkeda, “Hẽ, ale do gohale hoyena. Ar okoeṭakʼ maejiu do amakʼ oṛakʼteye calakʼkan Probhu Isor do jemon Rahel ar Lea lekae hoeocoye, one okoe do Israel jạtrenkoe benao rakapʼletʼko. Ephratare am do dhon durib hameṭjoṅ me ar Bethlehem ren sanamko do amakʼ ńutumko ńumtama." 
Ruth4:12 Probhu Isor do nui maejiuakʼ kukhire okoeṭakʼ hopone emam uni hotete amakʼ bõs do Tamorakʼ kukhiren Jihudạren hopon Peresakʼ bõs leka baṛe hoyokʼma.” 
Ruth4:13 Inạ tayom Boas do Rute baplakedea ar uniren bạhui hoyena. Ar Boas do uni ṭhene boloyen khan Probhu Isor do Rutakʼ kukhire gidrại emadea ar uniren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone hoyena. 
Ruth4:14 Onate eṭakʼ maejiuko do Naomiko metadea, “Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma, ente uni do teheń mitʼṭecʼ dạyik gogokʼicʼ peṛae ematʼmea. Israelkoakʼ disạm talare sanamkoge uniko sarhaoema." 
Ruth4:15 Nui gidrạ do amakʼ buḍhi pạṛiạre jemon jiwiye raṛejtam are ńelme, ente amren kiminme, one amren eae goṭen hoponko khon hõ ḍhere dulạṛetʼme, uniyakʼ kukhire gidrạwakʼ janam do hoyakana.”" 
Ruth4:16 Unre Naomi do gidrại hoborkedea ar uniren hehewicʼe hoyena. 
Ruth4:17 Ar aḍepaseren maejiukoko menkeda, “Naomiren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyakana.” Onko do uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum Obedko dohoketʼtaea. Obed do Jisạiren apate tahẽkana ar Jisại do Dạudren apate tahẽkana." 
Ruth4:18 Peresakʼ bõs tạlika do nonka leka: Peresren hopon do Hesron; 
Ruth4:19 Ar Hesronren hopon do Ram; Ramren hopon do Aminadab; 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabren hopon do Nahason; Nahasonren hopon do Solomon; 
Ruth4:21 Solomonren hopon do Boas; Boasren hopon do Obed; 
Ruth4:22 Obedren hopon do Jisại ar Jisạiren hopon do Dạud. 
1Samuel1:1 Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Ramathayim Sophim nagrahare Elkana ńutuman mitʼ hoṛ do Ephrayim gusṭiren hoṛko sãoteye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Uniren apatakʼ ńutum do Jeroham tahẽkana. Jeroham do Elihuren hopone tahẽkana, Elihu do Tohuren hopon ar Tohu do Suphren hopone tahẽkana." 
1Samuel1:2 Elkanaren do barea bạhukin tahẽkantaea; mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Hanna ar eṭagicʼakʼ ńutum do Peninna. Peninnaren do gidrạko hoylena menkhan Hannaren do cele gidrạge bako hoyakan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:3 Elkana do jao bochor acʼakʼ nagraha khon Siloteye calakʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do onḍe senkate sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor sewawae ar uni ńutumte janwarkoe samaṅetʼko tahẽkana. Unre onḍe do naeke Eliaserren banar hopon Probhu Isorren naeke kin tahẽkana. Unkinakʼ ńutum do Hopni ar Pinehas tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:4 Janwar samaṅko hilokʼ Elkana ar uniren bạhu Peninna ar uniren sanam gidrạko do acʼakʼ samaṅakatʼ jel reakʼ mitʼṭecʼkate hĩse hạṭińako kan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:5 Menkhan Hanna do bar hạṭińe emaekan tahẽkana, ente uni do bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛede tahẽkana. Menkhan Probhu Isor do Hannaye bạńhi ocoakade tahẽkana." 
1Samuel1:6 Probhu Isore nonka akatʼ tahẽkante uniren hirạmtetʼ do ạḍiye khijlạuede tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ monkoe haṛhatʼ ocoyetʼtae tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:7 Ar nonkage bochorke bochor do parom calakʼkan tahẽkana. Hanna do jãhãtinrege Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye senokʼkan tahẽkan unrege uni do Peninna ṭhene khijlạu ocokʼkan tahẽkana. Onate uni doe rakʼetʼ tahẽkana ar cetʼge bae jom ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:8 Noa ńelte uniren jãwãe Elkana do uniye kulikedea, “E Hanna, cedakʼem rakʼeda? Ar cedakʼ cetʼge bam jom ńũiyeda? Nunạkʼ do cetʼ reakʼ duktam? Iń do cetʼ am ṭhen gel goṭen koṛako khon hõ bạń sorosa?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Mitʼdin Hanna do Siloreye tahẽkanre jom ńũ baṛakateye beretʼena ar mundilteye boloyena. Unre naeke Eli do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr ṭhenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mạcireye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:10 Hanna do mon reakʼ kosṭote Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼate koejoṅe ehopʼena. 
1Samuel1:11 Ar Probhu Isor ṭhen manot dohokateye menkeda, “E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, amren kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ mon reakʼ duk secʼ baṛe beṅgedme ar ańjomtińme. Ar iń bam hiṛiń akadińte amren kạ̃ṛmĩ jodi mitʼṭen hoponem danae enḍekhan jonom bhor uni do am ńutumteń emokʼa. Ar uniyakʼ bohokʼre tisge holatʼ do bạń lagaoakʼa.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Hanna do Probhu Isor ṭhen ạḍi ghạṛicʼe koejoṅkan tahẽkante Eli do uniye ạribạndhiyede tahẽkana. 
1Samuel1:13 Hanna do mone monteye koejoṅkan tahẽkante uniyakʼ luṭikin do laṛaokʼkantae tahẽkana menkhan aṛaṅ do baṅ ańjomokʼkan tahẽkana. Onate Eli hudiskeda maejiu doe bul akana. 
1Samuel1:14 Uni doe metadea, “Bubulakʼ ńũkate am do ar tinạkʼ ghaṛicʼem bul hapekokʼa. Bubulakʼ do ar alom ńũiya.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Hanna doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E ińren Baba, ona do baṅa. Iń do mitʼṭen dukhi hoṛ kạnạń; iń do darkha rasa hõ bạń ńũ akada, ar bubulakʼ hõ bạń ńũ akada. Iń do Probhu Isor samaṅre ińakʼ ontorgeń duletʼtiń tahẽkana." 
1Samuel1:16 Amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ maejiu mente do alom hudisea. Iń do ạḍi utạr mon duk ar kosṭo iạte nunhạbicʼ iń koejoṅkan tahẽkana.” 
1Samuel1:17 Unre Eliye menkeda, “Amakʼ jiwi baṛe raṛejokʼtam ma. Israelkoren Isor ṭhen okam khojakatʼ ona jemone emam.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hannae menkeda, “Nui kạ̃ṛmĩ cetanre amakʼ daya tahenma.” Ar niạ menkate uni doe calaoena are jom ńũkeda. Uniyakʼ monre ar jãhãn duk do baṅ tahẽlena." 
1Samuel1:19 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼ onko do beretʼkate mundilre senkate Probhu Isorko sewawadea. Ar ona tayom do akoakʼ oṛakʼ Ramoteko ruạṛ calaoena. Tayomte Elkana do acʼren bạhu Hanna ṭhene boloyena ar Probhu Isor hõ Hannae luturadea. 
1Samuel1:20 Onate Hanna doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar okte purạuen khan mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Ar Hanna doe menkeda, “Iń do Probhu Isor ṭhen khoniń koe hatao akawana,” Ar gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Samuele dohoketʼtaea." 
1Samuel1:21 Elkana do jao bochor leka arhõ acʼakʼ gharońjrenko soṅgekate Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼren janwar samaṅe ar manot doho akatʼakʼ purạu lạgitʼe senena," 
1Samuel1:22 menkhan Hanna do bae senlena. Uni do acʼren jãwãetetʼe metadea, “Gidrạ toa nunui bạgile khange iń do Probhu Isor samaṅreń idiyea jemon jonom bhor onḍegeye tahẽdaṛeakʼ.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Uniren jãwãe Elkana do uniye metadea, “Am okaṭakʼ bhagem hudisetʼ onage onkaeme. Ar gidrạ do nunu ạuriye bạgi hạbicʼ nonḍege tahenme. Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼe purạuma.” Ar onate Hanna do oṛakʼregeye tahẽyena ar gidrạ nunu ạuriye bạgi hạbicʼe jotonkedea." 
1Samuel1:24 Ado gidrạ toa nunui bạgiketʼ khan Hanna do pea ḍaṅgra, gel irạl keji holoṅ, harta reakʼ thulire mitʼ thuli darkha rasa ar gidrạ soṅgekate Silote Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye calaoena. Unre gidrạ do huḍińgeye tahẽkana." 
1Samuel1:25 Onḍe onko do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgrako dãṛẽkedea ar gidrạ do Eli ṭhene idikedea. 
1Samuel1:26 Hannae menkeda, “E baba, amge ińren goha dohokateń kiriạkʼ kana, iń kangeạń uni maejiu do one am samaṅre nonḍe teṅgokate Probhu Isor ṭheniń koejoṅkan tahẽkan." 
1Samuel1:27 Iń do nui gidrạ ńame lạgitʼ iń koeleda, ar Probhu Isor ṭhen okań khojletʼ uni do onageye em akawạdińa." 
1Samuel1:28 Ona iạte gidrạ do Probhu Isorgeń emadea. Ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahen unạkʼ din nui do Probhu Isorrene tahena.” Ar onko do bohokʼ kuḍburkate Probhu Isorko sewawadea. 
1Samuel2:1 Ona tayom Hanna do koejoṅateye menkeda, “Probhu Isor iạtegeń rạskạkʼ kana; Probhu Isorge ińe jitạu oco akadińạ. Ińren bạiri samaṅrege iń do khulạsate rạskạ sereńiń sereńetʼ kana; ente ińren bạiriyakʼ ti khonem bańcao kedeńte iń do ạḍiń rạskạkʼ kana." 
1Samuel2:2 Probhu Isor leka sonoticʼ do okoe hõ bạnugicʼan, ente am chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa; aboren Isor leka asrae buru do ar cetʼge bạnukʼa." 
1Samuel2:3 Ape do ạḍại bạḍại katha alope roṛa, ar bạḍại reakʼ katha do moca khon alope oḍoka; ente Probhu Isor doe nonkanicʼ Isor kana okoe do jotowakʼe baḍaekan, unige kạmi reakʼe tulạyetʼ kana." 
1Samuel2:4 Daṛeankoakʼ akʼ do rạputʼ akana, menkhan bhindạṛ akanko do daṛeanteko beretʼena." 
1Samuel2:5 Okoekoakʼ lacʼ bige tahẽkan onko do ńitokʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ eṭakʼkoakʼko kạmikana; menkhan okoe reṅgecʼko tahẽkan onko do reṅgecʼ cabayentakoa. Ar bạńjhiye tahẽkanicʼ do eae goṭen hoponren eṅgate hoyakana, menkhan ḍher hopon menakʼkotayicʼ doe nijor akana, uni do gidrạ bae janam daṛeako kana." 
1Samuel2:6 Probhu Isorgeye gogocʼa ar Probhu Isorgeye jiwetʼa; unige patal purireye khadlewa ar unige onḍe khone owar rakapʼa. 
1Samuel2:7 Probhu Isorge manwa doe kisạ̃ṛ are reṅgecʼ ocoyea; ente uni kangeae cokʼpotʼicʼ ar uni kangea usul ocoyicʼ. 
1Samuel2:8 Uni do dhuṛi khon nacaricʼe rakapʼedea, ar okulạnicʼ do torocʼ khone beretʼedea. Cetan hudạren hoṛko sãote uni do onkoe duṛupʼ ocokoa, ar manot reakʼ siṅghạsone emakoa; ente dhạrti reakʼ kham khunṭiko do Probhu Isorakʼge, uni do onako cetanre pirthimiye dohoakada." 
1Samuel2:9 Uni do acʼ bhuktiyae kanko jaṅga do bae tohotʼ ocokoa, ar bedhorom hoṛ do ńutreko ḍahao maraokʼa; ente okoe manwa hõ apnarakʼ daṛete do bae jitạu daṛeakʼa." 
1Samuel2:10 Probhu Isorren bạiriko doko chaka chunokʼa, uni do sermare onko upạrteye huḍura; ar dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ uni do hoṛkoe bicạrkoa. Uni do acʼren raje daṛe ocoyea ar acʼren ojokʼ bahalicʼ hoṛ doe jitạu ocoyea.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Inạ tayom Elkana do Ramate acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena, menkhan Samuel do naeke Eli ṭhen tahẽkate Probhu Isore sewawae kan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel2:12 Eliren hopon do dusṭạmi hoṛkin tahẽkana. Unkin do Probhu Isorakʼ jãhãnakʼge bạkin moneyakʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel2:13 Unkin do hoṛko sãote nonkakin beoharetʼ tahẽkana: jãhãe hoṛren samaṅokʼakʼren janwarakʼ jel tinre tekekʼa unre naekeren guti do pea jaṅgawakʼ mitʼṭecʼ lạṭu kaṭa kạ̃ṛchue ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel2:14 Onate uni do celaṅ se karahe se gamlareye gutuyetʼ tahẽkana ar ona kạ̃ṛchure tinạkʼ jel rakabokʼkan tahẽkan naeke do ona jotoge acʼ lạgitʼe idiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar Israelren tinạkʼ hoṛ Siloteko hijukʼkan tahẽkan unkin do onko sanamko tulucʼ nonkage kin beoharetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel2:15 Ona chaḍa, itil do seṅgelre ạuri atar giḍikakʼrege naekeren guti do janware samaṅ akade hoṛe metaekan tahẽkana, “Seṅgelre atar lạgitʼ naeke jel emaeme. Ente uni do am ṭhen khon tekeakʼ jel do baṅ, menkhan berelakʼ jelgeye hataoa.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Unre uni hoṛe men, “Pạhilre itil atar maṛaṅme, ar ona tayom do amakʼ kusi leka jel idime,” Enḍekhan uni hoṛe metaea, “Ńitge emokʼ hoyokʼtama; ar baṅ khan jorkateń idiya.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre juạn naekekinakʼ kại do ạḍi bạṛicʼ ńelena, ente unkin do Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jiniskokin nindạuetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel2:18 Menkhan huḍiń gidrạ Samuel do mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm reakʼ ephod horokʼkate Probhu Isore sapʼsorae kan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel2:19 Hanna do jao bochor jãwãetetʼ tulucʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼe calakʼre Samuel lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń aṅgrop benaokateye idiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel2:20 Ar Eli do Elkana ar uniren bạhuttetʼe bhorakin jokhecʼe menetʼ tahẽkana, “Nui maejiu Probhu Isor ṭhen okoeṭakʼ hopone dan akade uni bodolte Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ kukhire arhõ gidrại emaea.” Ar inạ tayom onko do akoakʼ oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel2:21 Probhu Isor do Hanna sạrigeye dayawadea. Onate Hanna doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uniren do jotote pea hopon ar barea kuṛikin hoyentaea. Ar huḍiń Samuel do Probhu Isor ṭhen tahẽkate hara idikʼe ehopʼena. 
1Samuel2:22 Eli do unre ạḍiye haṛam akan tahẽkana. Ar Israelko tulucʼ acʼren hoponkinakʼ beohar reakʼ katha ar okoeko maejiu do sapʼsosor kạmi lạgitʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkan onko tulucʼ loṭghuṭi reakʼ katha hõ uniyakʼ luturre hecʼena. 
1Samuel2:23 Uni do unkine metatʼkinạ, “Aben do cetʼben ceka kana? Abenakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do noko hoṛko lại akadińa." 
1Samuel2:24 E bạbu, Probhu Isorren hoṛko oka kathako roroṛkaniń ańjometʼko ona do baṅ bhagea." 
1Samuel2:25 Manwa do manwa upạrteye kại khan Isor do onae miṭmaṭ daṛeakʼa; menkhan Probhu Isor upạrte manwae kại enḍekhan uni lạgitʼ do okoeye nehõr daṛekokʼa?” Menkhan unkin do apatakʼ katha bạkin luturada, ente Probhu Isor do unkin gocʼkin reakʼe goṭa akatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel2:26 Ar huḍiń koṛa Samuel do sẽṛã idikʼtegeye tahẽyena ar Probhu Isor hõ manwako ṭhen khon dulạṛ ńame ehopʼena. 
1Samuel2:27 Mitʼdin Isorren mitʼṭen hoṛ do Eli ṭhen hecʼkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘amren hapṛamko tinre Misorre pharao gobolreko tahẽkana unre onko ṭhen iń do cetʼ pusṭạute bạń sodorlena?" 
1Samuel2:28 Israelkoren sanam gusṭiko mod khon iń do cetʼ Liwikoge bạń bachao akawana, onate onko do ińren naeke hoekate ińakʼ pinḍ ṭhen hecʼkate dhupko jered ar ephod horokʼkate iń samaṅreko hecʼdaṛeakʼ? Israelkoren sanam jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ bhag do cetʼ onko ar onkoren bõskoge bạń emakatʼkoa?" 
1Samuel2:29 Enḍekhan ińakʼ oṛakʼre okako samaṅokʼ reakʼ hukumiń emakatʼ ape do cedakʼ ona janwar dãṛẽ ar eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼkope bemanoteda? Ińren hoṛ Israelkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko reakʼ joto khon bhageakʼ hạṭińte apnartetʼko jom tirpitokʼkante cedakʼ am do iń khon hõ amren hoponkin bạ̃ṛtim manotetʼkinạ?’ 
1Samuel2:30 “Ona iạte Israelkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń doń khạṭigeń menleda, am ar amren hapṛamakʼ bõsren hoṛ do jaejug iń sewawạń reakʼko kạmiya;’ menkhan ńitokʼ Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ona do ar baṅ hoyokʼa. Okoe ińko manotiń iń hõ onkogeń manotkoa ar okoe ińko nisṛạuiń onko do ako hõko nisṛạu ocokʼa." 
1Samuel2:31 Ńelme, okte hijukʼ kana tinre amren bõsko ar amren hapṛamkoakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe nonkań maraotakoa, amren bõsko do mitʼṭen hõ haṛam umer hạbicʼ bako bańcaokʼa." 
1Samuel2:32 Am do ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ durdosam ńela. Israelkoakʼ jãhãtinạkʼgeń bhạlạitako am bõsren okoehõ haṛam umer hạbicʼ jiwetʼ do bako tahena. 
1Samuel2:33 Enhõ am bõsren sanamko do ińakʼ pinḍ khon bạń chaṭao cabakoa jemon onko iạte hiḍir hiḍir mẽtʼdakʼ jorokʼte amakʼ ńeńel reakʼ daṛe cabakʼtam ar ontorre dukem ńam; ar am bõsren jotokoge juạn umerregeko gujukʼa. 
1Samuel2:34 “ ‘Amren banar hopon Hopni ar Pinehas do mitʼ dintege kin gujukʼa, ar onage hoyokʼa am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ." 
1Samuel2:35 Menkhan iń do iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭen pạtiạricʼ naekeń teṅgo joṅa, one uni do ińakʼ mone bujhạute ińakʼ sana lekae kạmi. Iń do uniyakʼ bõskoń ṭarhao dohoya ar uni do jaoge ińren bachao hoṛkoe sapʼ sorakoa." 
1Samuel2:36 Ar am bõsren okoeko jiwetʼko tahen onko do mitʼṭecʼ rupạ ar mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ lạgitʼ uni ṭhen hecʼkate otre ombakʼkateko sewawaea ar mitʼṭen naeke hudạ ńam lạgitʼko nehõrokʼa jemon thoṛa jomakʼe ńam.’ ” 
1Samuel3:1 Huḍiń koṛa Samuel do Eli tabere tahẽkate Probhu Isore sapʼsoraekan tahẽkana. Ar onako dinre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do ḍher do baṅ ańjomokʼkan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ dorson hõ mitʼ talao do bań ńamokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel3:2 Un jokhecʼ Eliyakʼ mẽtʼ do nunạkʼ nijor idiyentaea, uni do ṭhikleka bae ńeńelkan tahẽkana. Mitʼ din ńindạ Eli do acʼakʼ jaegareye giticʼ akan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel3:3 Ar Isor ńutumte okaṭakʼ diuhe jeretʼ tahẽkan ona do un hạbicʼ hõ baṅ ĩṛĩcʼ akan tahẽkana. Unre Samuel do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreye giticʼ akan tahẽkana. Ona oṛakʼre Isorakʼ goha sinduk tahẽkana. 
1Samuel3:4 Un jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do Samuele hohoadea. Ar Samuel doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Nõkʼõe minạńgea.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Noa menkate uni do Eli ṭhen ńir senkateye menkeda, “Minạńgea, am do cetʼ ińem hohoạń kana?” Eliye menkeda, “Baṅ, iń do bacoń hohoakatʼme. Am do senkate giticʼkokʼme.” Unre Samuel do senkateye giticʼena." 
1Samuel3:6 Probhu Isor do arhõ Samuele hohoadea ar Samuel do beretʼkate Eli ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Minạńgea; am do cetʼ ińem hohoạń kana?” Eliye menkeda, “Baṅ, iń do bạń hohoakatʼmea. Do senkate giticʼkokʼme.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Samuel do unhạbicʼ hõ Probhu Isor do bae orom akade tahẽkana; ar Probhu Isor hõ unhạbicʼ uni tulucʼ katha bae roṛakatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel3:8 Probhu Isor do tesar dhao Samuele hohoadea ar Samuel do beretʼkate Eli ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Iń do minạńgea, ar amgem hohoakadińạ.” Unre Eli doe bujhạu daṛeada uni do Probhu Isorgeye hohoaekana." 
1Samuel3:9 Ona iạte Eli do Samuele metadea, “Am do senkate giticʼ ruạṛokʼme. Ar niạ dhao uniye hohoam khan menme, ‘E Probhu Isor ma roṛme, amren guti doń ańjometʼgea.’ ” Unre Samuel do senkate acʼakʼ jaegareye giticʼ ruạṛena." 
1Samuel3:10 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do hecʼkate onḍeye teṅgoyena ar eṭakʼ dhao lekageye hohokeda, “Samuel, E Samuel.” Unre Samuele menkeda, “Ma roṛme, amren guti doń ańjometʼgea.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Probhu Isor do Samuele metadea, “Ńelme, Israelko talare nonkanakʼ iń cekae lạgidokʼ kana one uniyakʼ katha ańjomte sanamkoko comkao rakabokʼ." 
1Samuel3:12 Iń do Eliyakʼ bõs reaṅ okako kathań roṛakatʼ ona reakʼ pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ Eli upạrte jotowakʼgeń purạua. 
1Samuel3:13 Iń do uniń menakadea, bedhorom iạte uniren bõsko do jaejug hạbicʼ iń sạjạikoa. Eli doe baḍaekan tahẽkana, acʼren hoponkin do apnartege bohokʼre sạjạikin ạgu akawana, menkhan uni do sontorkin reakʼ bae kurumuṭuleda." 
1Samuel3:14 Ona iạte Eliyakʼ bõsko reaṅ iń do kiriạkateń meneda, janwar samaṅokʼakʼ se eṭakʼ jãhãn samaṅokʼakʼ hotete hõ uniyakʼ bõsko reakʼ behokakʼko do tisge baṅ puruchunokʼ takoa.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Ar Samuel do setakʼ hạbicʼ giticʼgeye tahẽyena, ar ona tayom beretʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạrkoe jhicʼkeda; menkhan niạ dorson reakʼ katha Eli ṭhen lạlại do bae dilleda." 
1Samuel3:16 Unre Eli do uniye metadea, “E Samuel.” Samuele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ma roṛme.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eliye kulikedea, “Isor do cetʼe menakatʼ mea? Ar iń ṭhen ona do alom danaṅkakʼa. Uni okae menakatʼ ona reakʼ thoṛagan hõ iń ṭhenem danaṅ dohokakʼ enḍekhan uni do maraṅ sạjạiye emam ma.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Unre Samuel do Eli sanamakʼ kathae lạiyadea, cetʼge bae oko dohokada. Ona ańjomkate Eli doe menkeda, “Uni doe Probhu Isor kana; uni oka bhageye hudisetʼ onage baṛeye onkaema.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Nonkage Samuel doe hara idiyena ar Probhu Isor do uni sãoteye tahẽyena ar nạbi lekate roṛakʼ oka kathage Probhu Isor do bae ạuṛiyakʼ ocoletʼtaea. 
1Samuel3:20 Onate Dan ṭoṭha khon Berseba hạbicʼ sanam Israelko doko baḍaekeda, Samuel do Probhu Isorren mitʼṭen nạbiye hoyakana." 
1Samuel3:21 Ar Probhu Isor do Silore arhõ dorsonte ńel ocokʼe ehopʼena ente Silore uni do acʼakʼ katha hotete Samuel ṭhene sodorokʼkan tahẽkana; 
1Samuel4:1 Samuel okae menetʼ tahẽkan ona do sanam Israelko ṭhen seṭerokʼkan tahẽkana. Mitʼ dhao Israelko do Philisṭiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena. Ar Ebeneserreko ḍerayena ar Philisṭiko do Aprere. 
1Samuel4:2 Unre Philisṭiko do Israelko upạrte lạṛhại phạdko sapṛaoketʼkoa. Ar lạṛhại ehopʼen khan Israelko do Philisṭiko ṭhenko bhagao ocoyena. Lạṛhại ṭạnḍire Philisṭiko ṭhen Israelren pon hajar phạdko gocʼocoyena. 
1Samuel4:3 Ado Israelren lạṛhại phạdko akoakʼ ḍerateko ruạṛ calaoen khan onkoren murubbikoko metatʼkoa, “Philsiṭiko ṭhen Probhu Isor do cedakʼ teheńe bhagao ocoketʼbona? Dela, Probhu Isorakʼ goha sinduk do Silo khon bon ạguiya jemon Probhu Isor do abo sãote tahẽkate bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạ bon.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Onate onko do Silote hoṛ kolkate sanam daṛean Probhu Isor, okoe do Kerubkin talareye tahenkan, uniyakʼ goha sindukko ạgukeda. Isorakʼ ona goha sinduk sãote Eliren hopon Hopni ar Pinehas tạkin hõkin tahẽkana." 
1Samuel4:5 Probhu Isorakʼ goha sinduk ḍerate ạguiyen khan Israelren sanamko nunạkʼ ãṭ aṛaṅteko hohokeda je, ona do disạm reakʼ sanam jaegare seṭerena." 
1Samuel4:6 Ar Philisṭiko do noa aṛaṅ ańjomkateko kuliyana, “Ibrikoakʼ ḍerare cetʼ reakʼ sarhao aṛaṅ ańjomokʼkana?” Onkoko baḍaekeda, Probhu Isorakʼ goha sinduk do Israelkoakʼ ḍerate hecʼakana." 
1Samuel4:7 Noa kathako ańjomketʼ khan onko do botorenteko menkeda, “Isor do onkoakʼ ḍerateye hecʼakana.” Onko do arhõko menkeda, “Hae! Noa lahare tisge nonka do baṅ hoyakana." 
1Samuel4:8 Hae, hae, uni daṛean Isorakʼ ti khon do okoeye rukhiyạ bona? Hahaṅkarre ạḍi lekan moṛokte nui Isorge hahaṅkarre Misri hoṛkoe gocʼletʼkoa." 
1Samuel4:9 E Philisṭiko, dil akae tahenpe, ar herel hopon kanpe ona baṛe udug tabonpe. Ar baṅkhan Ibriko cetʼleka aperen golamko hoylen onkage ape hõ onkoren golampe hoyokʼa. Apepe herel hopon kan ona baṛe udugpe ar lạṛhạipe.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Unre Philisṭiko doko lạṛhạiyena ar Israelkoko bhagao ocoyente apan ạpin oṛakʼteko dạṛkeda. Israelko do ḍhergeko gocʼ ocoyena; ar onkoren pegel lạṛhại phạdko gocʼena. 
1Samuel4:11 Ar Isorakʼ goha sinduk do bạirikoko idikeda. Ar Eliren banar hopon Hopni ar Pinehas hõkin gocʼena. 
1Samuel4:12 En hilokʼ Benjamin gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛ do lạṛhại phạdko tala khone ńir paskaoente Siloteye calaoena. Unre uniyakʼ kicricʼko do oṛecʼge ar bohokʼ hõ dhuṛite losoponḍo tahẽkantaea. 
1Samuel4:13 Uni do tinre Siloteye seṭerena unre Eli do hor aṛere acʼakʼ mạcireye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Uni do andmandao monteye koyokʼ hor akatʼ tahẽkana, ente Isorakʼ sinduk lạgitʼ uniyakʼ koṛam do dhak dhakaokʼ kantae tahẽkana. Ar uni hoṛ do tinre nagrahate bolokate jotowakʼ katha hoṛkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa unre onko talare rakʼjoṅ ar kạuạ rạuạ ańjomena." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli do ona rakʼ ańjomteye kuliketʼkoa, “Niạ gulmal do cetʼ reakʼ kana?” Unre uni hoṛ do usạra senkate Eliye baḍae ocokedea." 
1Samuel4:15 Unre Eliyakʼ umer do aregel irạl bochor hoyakantae tahẽkana. Ar mẽtʼ reakʼ ńeńel daṛe do nijor akantae tahẽkante ńeńel hõ bae ńeńelkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel4:16 Uni hoṛ do Eliye metadea, “Iń do lạṛhại phạdko tala khoniń ńir paskao hecʼakana, ar teheńgeń dạṛ akada.” Eli doe kuliyana, “E bạbu, cetʼ khobor hoyakana?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Okoe hoṛ sombate ạguketʼ uni doe menkeda, “Philisṭiko samaṅ khon Israelko doko dạṛkeda ar ạḍi utạr hoṛko gocʼ ocoakana. Amren banar hopon Hopni ar Pinehas hõkin gocʼ ocoyena ar Isorakʼ sinduk hõ bạirikoko idikeda.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Isorakʼ goha sinduk reakʼ katha ańjomtora Eli do phaṭok duạr aṛere acʼakʼ mạci khon tayom secʼe guṛdạu ńurena. Onate uniyakʼ hoṭokʼ do rạputʼentaea are gocʼena, enteye haṛam thalakʼ thulukʼ caba akan tahẽkana ar hoṛmo hõ bhạrige tahẽkantaea. Uni do pongel bochor Israelkoakʼe bicạrletʼtakoa." 
1Samuel4:19 Eliren kimintetʼ, metakʼme Pinehasren bạhu do unre bhạrti hoṛmoe tahẽkana ar khalasokʼ reakʼ din do sor hecʼ akantae tahẽkana. Isorakʼ sinduk bạirikoakʼ tire senakan ar uniren hońhartetʼ ar jãwãetetʼkin gocʼ akan reakʼ sombate ańjomketʼ sãote uni do bedon rakapʼadea. Are sombotʼenteye khalasena." 
1Samuel4:20 Unre uni doe gujukʼkan tahẽkana ar okoe maejiuko uni ṭhenko tahẽkan onko do uniko metadea, “Alom botorokʼa, amren do koṛa gidrại hoyakana.” Menkhan uni do cetʼge bae roṛ ruạṛleda ar jãhãn kathage bae moneyada." 
1Samuel4:21 Isorakʼ sinduk do bạirikoakʼ tire calaoen iạte ar uniren jãwãe ar hońhartetʼe gocʼen iạte uniye menkeda, “Israelkoakʼ ṭhonok do calaoena.” Ar ona iạte uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Ikabode dohoketʼtaea." 
1Samuel4:22 Uni doe menkeda, “Israelkoakʼ ṭhonok do calaoena, ente Isorakʼ sinduk do bạirikoakʼ tire calaoena.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Philisṭiko do Isorakʼ sinduk Ebeneser khon Asdod nagrahateko idikeda. 
1Samuel5:2 Isor reakʼ sinduk onko do Dagonakʼ mundilte idikate Dagonakʼ muṭhạn aṛereko dohokada. 
1Samuel5:3 Dosar hilokʼ hoṛko do setakʼre beretʼkateko ńelkeda Dagon do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk samaṅre otre taberteye bhindạṛ akana. Ar unre onko do Dagonakʼ muṭhạnko teṅgoketʼte acʼakʼ jaegareko dohokeda. 
1Samuel5:4 Ona dosar hilokʼ hõ onko do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkateko ńelkeda Dagon do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk samaṅre otre taberteye bhindạṛ akana. Uniyakʼ ti ar bohokʼ do rạputʼkate duạr ganaḍe cetanre ńur akana, ar hoṛmo do goṭage menakʼa." 
1Samuel5:5 Noa iạte Dagonren naeke ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko do Asdodren Dagonakʼ mundilre bolokʼ jokhecʼ teheń hạbicʼ okoe hõ ona mundil reakʼ duạr ganaḍere do bako lebedokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel5:6 Ar Probhu Isor do Asdod ar ona aḍepase jaegaren hoṛkoe toras ocoketʼkoa ar ojo ruạkoteye ńẽtʼketʼkoa. 
1Samuel5:7 Niạ ńelte Asdodren hoṛko menkeda, “Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk do abo ṭhen ar babon dohokakʼa, ente uni do abo ar aboren debota Dagon cetanre ạḍi bạṛicʼe kạmi akada.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Onate onko do hoṛ kolkate Philisṭikoren sanam disạm cakʼlaoko mitʼ ṭhen hoho ạgukateko kuliketʼkoa, “Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk dobon cekaea?” Onkoko menkeda, “Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk do Gad nagrahate idikʼma.” Onate Asdodren hoṛ do Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk do Gadteko idikeda." 
1Samuel5:9 Onko do sinduk onḍeko idiketʼ khan Probhu Isor do ona nagraha upạrte tiye rakapʼketʼtaea. Onate onḍenko hoṛ do ạḍiko botorena. Isor do nagraharen kạṭicʼ lạṭu sanam hoṛkoe hạnketʼkoa, ar onate sanamkoge ona ojo ruạ ńamketʼkoa." 
1Samuel5:10 Unre onko do Isorakʼ ona sinduk Ekron nagrahateko kolgotʼkada. Isorakʼ sinduk do Ekronte idiyen khan Ekronren hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko menkeda, “Onko do abo ar aboren hoṛko gocʼ bon lạgitʼge Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk do abo ṭhenko ạguakada.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Onate onko do hoṛ kolkate Philisṭikoren disạm cakʼlaoko mitʼ ṭhen hoho jarwakateko metatʼkoa, “Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk do nonḍe khon kol giḍikakʼpe. Ona do acʼakʼ jaegatege ruạṛ calakʼma. Ar baṅ khan ona do abo ar aboren hoṛkoe gocʼ cababona.” Isor do ona nagrahae hạnletʼ tahẽkante hoṛkoakʼ monre gujukʼ botor do bololena." 
1Samuel5:12 Ar okoeko hoṛ bako gocʼlen onko hõ ona ojo ruạ do ńamletʼkoa. Onate nagraharen hoṛkoakʼ rakʼ homor reakʼ aṛaṅ do serma hạbicʼ seṭerena. 
1Samuel6:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do Philisṭikoakʼ disạmrege tahẽyena. 
1Samuel6:2 Tayomte Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoko do naekeko ar gonokko hohoatʼkote onko ṭhenko kuliyana, “Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do bon cekaea? Ado ma lạiyalepe, ona do oka lekate acʼakʼ jaegarele kol ruạṛkakʼa?”" 
1Samuel6:3 Onkoko menkeda, “Israelkoren Isorakʼ sinduk kol ruạṛpe menetʼ khan ekenakʼ do alope kol ruạṛkakʼa. Ape do khạṭige uni ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ dos- samaṅokʼakʼpe kola. Enḍekhan ape do mońjpe tahena arpe baḍae daṛeakʼa, cedakʼ uniyakʼ keṭecʼ ti ape cetan khon baṅ ocogokʼ kana mente.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Unre disạm cakʼlaoko doko kuliyana, “Dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lekate ale do uni ṭhen cetʼle kola?” Onkoko menkeda, “Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ lekha lekate ape do mõṛẽ goṭecʼ sona reakʼ ojo ar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ sonaren goḍo kolgotʼkakope, ente hoṛko cetanre ar onkoren disạm cakʼlaoko cetanre inạ mitʼ lekan dukge hecʼakana." 
1Samuel6:5 Okaṭakʼ ojo ruạ do apeakʼ hoṛmore hoyakan ar okoe goḍoko apeakʼ disạmko jarkharetʼkan onkoakʼ muṭhạn benaope ar Israelkoren Isor mạhimawaepe. Ado pasecʼ uni do ape cetan khon ar aperen Debotako ar disạm cetan khon acʼakʼ keṭecʼ tiye ocogtaea. 
1Samuel6:6 Ape do Pharao ar misriko leka apeakʼ mon do cedakʼpe keṭecʼetʼtapea? Israelkoren Isor do misriko tinre lelhae benaoletʼko unre onko do Israelkoko sen ocowatʼko tahẽkana, arko senlena." 
1Samuel6:7 “Ńitokʼ ape do mitʼṭecʼ nãwã sagaṛ benaope ar toa kin emokʼ nonkan barea gại hataokinpe one unkin cetanre tishõ arãṛ baṅ lade akawatʼkin. Ar unkin do ona sagaṛrepe joṛaokinạ, menkhan unkinren mĩhũ hopon do unkin khonpe ocokʼkinạ." 
1Samuel6:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do ona sagaṛ cetanrepe dohoya ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ okako sona reakʼ jinis Probhu Isor ńutumtepe kol onako do mitʼṭecʼ baksare sinduk aṛerepe dohoya. Ar nonkape kolgotʼkakʼa jemon ona sinduk do calakʼ. 
1Samuel6:9 Ar noa sinduk do apnar disạm reakʼ ḍaharte Bet-semeste calakʼ enḍekhanpe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, noa duk do Probhu Isor secʼ khonge hecʼakawatʼ bona. Menkhan ona horte baṅ calakʼ enḍekhan bujhạupe abo cetanre niạ duk do uni khon baṅ hecʼakana, noa do emontege abore paṛao akana.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Onko do unre onkageko kạmikeda. Hoṛko do toa emokʼ barea gại ạgukate sagaṛreko joṛaoketʼkinạ ar unkinren mĩhũ do oṛakʼreko aṭkao dohokatʼkinạ. 
1Samuel6:11 Ona tayom onko do ona sagaṛ cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko dohokeda ar ona aṛere ona baksa hõ one onare sonaren goḍo ar sona reakʼ ojoko tahẽkan. 
1Samuel6:12 Ar unkin gại do unre leṅga ar jojomsa secʼ ghańjeṛ baṅkate bhokrao bhokraote sojhe ḍaharte Bet-semes secʼkin calao idiyena. Ar Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoko hõ sagaṛ tayom tayomte Bet-semes reakʼ simạna hạbicʼko calaoen. 
1Samuel6:13 Unre Bet-semesren hoṛko do buru tala otetre guhumko gegetʼkan tahẽkana. Arko koyokʼketʼ khan sindukko ńelńamkeda ar ạḍiko kusiyena. 
1Samuel6:14 Bet-semesre hecʼkate sagaṛ do Josuạwakʼ khet talare mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ dhiri aṛere teṅgoyena. Ar Israelko do ona sagaṛ reakʼ kaṭte unkin gại do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
1Samuel6:15 Inạ lahare Liwiko do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ar sona reakʼ jinis sudhạ baksako pheḍketʼte ona maraṅ dhiri cetanreko dohokeda. Ar enhilokʼ Bet-semesren hoṛko do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. 
1Samuel6:16 Philisṭikoren onko mõṛẽ goṭen disạm cakʼlaoko do jotowakʼ ńelkate enhilokʼge Ekronteko ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Samuel6:17 Probhu ńutumte dos-samaṅokʼakʼ lekate Philisṭiko do okako nagrahako khon mitʼṭecʼkate sona reakʼ ojoko kolletʼ tahẽkan onako do hoyokʼ kana Asdod, Gasa, Askilon, Gad ar Ekron." 
1Samuel6:18 Onko mõṛẽ goṭen rapajko tabere Philisṭikoakʼ do mõṛẽ goṭecʼ pạcri esetʼ nagraha ar onako são reakʼ begor pạcri atoko khon sonaren goḍoko kolletʼkoa. Philisṭikoakʼ ṭoṭha do tahẽkana Bet-semesre Josuạwakʼ khet tala reakʼ maraṅ dhiri hạbicʼ, one ona cetanre onko do Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko pheḍ doholetʼ tahẽkan. Ar ona do teheń hạbicʼ hõ onḍege menakʼa." 
1Samuel6:19 Bet-semesren adom hoṛ do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk bhitri secʼko oyoṅletʼte Probhu Isor do onkoe gocʼ giḍikatʼkoa. Uni do unre onḍenko mõṛẽ hajar eaegel hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. Are ńẽtʼletʼkote hoṛko do rakʼ homorko ehopʼena. 
1Samuel6:20 Onkoko menkeda, “Nui sonot Probhu Isor samaṅre do okoeye ṭikạu tahẽdaṛeakʼa? Ńit khon uni ṭhen do okoeye kol ocokʼa?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ona tayom onko thoṛa hoṛkoante Kiriạt-Jearimren hoṛko ṭhenko roṛgotʼkada, “Philisṭiko do Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko ruạṛgotʼ akada. Ar pheḍ hijukʼte sinduk do ape ṭhen idipe.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Unre Kiriat-Jearimren hoṛko do hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko idikeda. Onko do sinduk idikate buru cetan reakʼ akoakʼ nagrahare Abinadabakʼ oṛakʼreko dohokada ar ona ńel todarot lạgitʼ Abinadabren hopon Eleasar do Probhu Isor ńutumteko begarkedea. 
1Samuel7:2 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do Kiriat-Jearimre dohoyen tayom ḍher din do paromena, metatʼme bargel bochor paromena. Onako oktere Israelko do Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼ jiwi do ragokʼkan tahẽkantakoa." 
1Samuel7:3 Onate Samuel do sanam Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Apeakʼ goṭa ontorte arhõ Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe menetʼ khan ape tala khon eṭakʼ jạtren debotako ar Astaratakʼ muṭhạn ocokʼ giḍikakʼpe ar Probhu Isor secʼ apnarakʼ mon ṭarhaokate eken unige sewawaepe. Enḍekhan uni do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạpea.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Niạ katha ańjomkate Israelko do onkoren Bakʼal debota Astarat muṭhạnkoko ocokʼ giḍikatʼte eken Probhu Isorge sewawaeko ehopʼena. 
1Samuel7:5 Unre Samuele menkeda, “Mispare sanam Israelko jarwakope. Iń do ape lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭheniń nehõrokʼa.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Onate onko joto do Mispareko jarwayena. Onko do dakʼ lo rakapʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅreko dulkeda ar enhilokʼ onḍe upạskateko menkeda, “Ale do Probhu Isor upạrtele kại akada.” Samuel do Mispa khon Israelkoakʼe bicạretʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel7:7 Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoko do Israelko Mispareko jarwa akan menteko ańjomketʼ khan onko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena. Ar Israelko do ona katha ańjomkate Philisṭiko iạteko botorena. 
1Samuel7:8 Onko do Samuelko metadea, “Aboren Probhu Isor do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon jemone bańcao bon ona lạgitʼte Probhu Isor ṭhen ragme.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Unre Samuel do nunu bae bạgi akatʼ mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopone hataoana ar uni do bhiḍi hoponte Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ e samaṅkeda. Uni do Israel hoponko ńutumteye rakʼkeda ar Probhu Isor hõ uniye roṛ ruạṛadea. 
1Samuel7:10 Samuel do tinre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅetʼ tahẽkana ona jokhecʼ Philisṭiko do Israelko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena. Menkhan enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do Philisṭiko upạrteye huḍurkeda. Ar ona iạte onko do botorteko ạulạu cabayena ar Israelko ṭhenko bhagao ocoyena. 
1Samuel7:11 Israelko do unre Mispa khonko oḍok hecʼente Philisṭikoko khudạuketʼkoa ar Bet-kar ato reakʼ latar ṭhạ̃i hạbicʼko ńẽtʼ idiketʼkoa. 
1Samuel7:12 Unre Samuel do mitʼṭecʼ dhiri hataokate Mispa ar Sen ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ jaega talare dohoketʼteye menkeda, “Niạ hạbicʼ Probhu Isor do aboe goṛo akatʼbona.” Niạ menkate uni do ona reakʼ ńutum Ebenesere dohokeda (ona reakʼ mane do “gokʼṛowakʼ dhiri”)." 
1Samuel7:13 Nonkate Philisṭiko doko koboj ocoyena. Inạ tayom onko do ar Israelkoakʼ simạnakote ar bako bololena. Samuel tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din Probhu Isor do Philisṭiko birudteye tahẽkana. 
1Samuel7:14 Ekron khon Gad hạbicʼ Israelkoakʼ oka nagraha ar atoko Philisṭikoko ạidạrian tahẽkan Israelko do arhõ onako ńam ruạṛkeda. Ar Israelko do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon beṛhaeteakʼ sanam jaegareko rukhiyạ dohṛakeda. Nonkate Aramrenko ar Israelko talare suluk tahẽyena. 
1Samuel7:15 Ar Samuel do jiwetʼ bhor Israelkoe bicạretʼketʼkoa. 
1Samuel7:16 Uni do jao bochor Bethel, Gilgal ar Mispare senkate Israelkoakʼ bicạretʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel7:17 Ar ona tayom uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ Ramateye ruạṛ calakʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do onḍe hõ Israelkoe bicạretʼko tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaoletʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel8:1 Samuel doe haṛamen khan Israelkoakʼ bikʼcạrtako lạgitʼ acʼren hopone ojokʼ bahalketʼkinạ. 
1Samuel8:2 Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Joel ar dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Obiyạ tahẽkana. Ar unkin do Ber-sebare kin bicạretʼ tahẽkana," 
1Samuel8:2 Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Joel ar dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Obiyạ tahẽkana. Ar unkin do Ber-sebare kin bicạretʼ tahẽkana," 
1Samuel8:3 Menkhan unkin do ạkinren apattetʼ leka do bạkin calakʼkan tahẽkana. Unkin do behok secʼte dhon hameṭjoṅ reakʼ aste dhorom reakʼ horkin bạgiyatʼ tahẽkana. Unkin do ghus hataokate hok reakʼakʼ kin behok ocoyetʼ tahẽkana ar behok do hok reakʼ lekakin hoyocoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Samuel8:4 Ona iạte Israelkoren murubbiko doko mitʼena ar Ramare senkate Samuelko lạiyadea, “Ńelme, am dom haṛamena ar amren hoponkin do amakʼ horte bạkin taṛameda, onate eṭakʼ jạtrenko leka abo bicạrbon lạgitʼ mitʼṭen raj baṛe teṅgoaleme.”" 
1Samuel8:5  
1Samuel8:6 “Ar ale calaole lạgitʼ mitʼṭen raj ojokʼ bahalem,” Menkhan Samuel do hoṛkoakʼ niạ katha do bhage bae metatʼa. Ona iạte uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen koejoṅe ehopʼena." 
1Samuel8:7 Unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Hoṛ okako metamkan onage onkaeme. Ente am do bako nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼmea, menkhan onko do ińgeko nihạ̃t giḍi akadińạ jemon onko cetanre aloń rajokʼ." 
1Samuel8:8 Misor disạm khon onko oḍok ạguko tayom khon teheń hạbicʼ ińre okako kạmi akatʼ onko do am cetanre hõ onkageko kạmi akada; ar iń bạgikate debotako sewawako kana. 
1Samuel8:9 Ńitokʼ do onkoakʼ katha manao takome; menkhan onkom sontorkoa arem galmarao akoa, onko cetanre okoeye rajokʼa uni do onko cetanre cetʼ lekae colona mente.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Ar okoeko raj reakʼko khojletʼ Samuel do Probhu Isorakʼ sanam katha onkoe baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
1Samuel8:11 Uniye menkeda, “Okoe do raj lekate ape cetanreye rajokʼ uniyakʼ beohar do nonka hoyokʼtaea; uni do aperen hoponko lạṛhại phạdko lekate kạmireye lagaokoa; onko modren adomko do rãt gạḍi cakʼlaokoko hoyokʼa, ar adomko do aswariko hoyokʼa ar adomko do rãt gạḍi laha lahateko dạṛ idiya." 
1Samuel8:12 Uni do acʼ lạgitʼ adom do hajarko cetanre, adomko do mõṛẽgelko cetanre senaputiye dohokoa. Ar eṭakʼko do acʼakʼ jumi cas ar phosol samṭao kạmire ar lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa ar rãt gạḍiko reakʼ soroṅjamko benao lạgitʼe lagaokoa." 
1Samuel8:13 Aperen hoponerako do mahkaokʼ sunum, isin basaṅ ar piṭhạ rapakʼ kạmireye lagaokoa." 
1Samuel8:14 Uni do apeakʼ joto khon bhage jumi, darkha rasa ar jạitun bagwanko hataokate acʼren kạmiyạkoe emakoa." 
1Samuel8:15 Apeakʼ anaj ar darkha rasa reakʼ mitʼ hĩs hataokate uni do acʼren rajren kạmiyạko ar eṭakʼ kạmiyạkoe emakoa. 
1Samuel8:16 Uni do aperen guti kạ̃ṛmĩ ar aperen bhage juạnko ar gadhako hataokate acʼakʼ kạmireye lagaokoa. 
1Samuel8:17 Aperen bhiḍi palkoren gel hạtiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń uni doe hataoa ar ape do uniren golampe hoyokʼa. 
1Samuel8:18 Enhilokʼ ape do unipe khojakade raj iạtepe raga, ar Probhu Isorpe hohowaere hõ uni do bae luturatapea.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Menkhan hoṛko do Samuelakʼ niạ katha bako moneyatʼtaea. Onkoko menkeda, “Baṅa, ale do mitʼṭen rajgele khojkana." 
1Samuel8:20 Enḍekhan ale do eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko lekale hoedaṛeakʼa. Aleren raj do aleye bicạrkatalea ar ale laha khone lạṛhạiya.” 
1Samuel8:21 Ar Samuel do hoṛkoakʼ sanam kathako ańjomkate Probhu Isor ṭhene lạikeda. 
1Samuel8:22 Onate Probhu Isor do Samuele metadea, “Am do onkoakʼ katha ańjomme ar onko do mitʼṭen raj teṅgoakome.” Unre Samuel do Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Do, ape do apan ạpin oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼpe.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Kis ńutuman Benjạmin gusṭiren mitʼṭen manotan kisạ̃ṛ hoṛe tahẽkana. Ar Kis do Abiyelren hopone tahẽkana, Abiyel do Seroren hopon, Sero do Bekoratren hopon ar Bekorat do Aphihelren hopone tahẽkana." 
1Samuel9:2 Kisren do Sạul ńutuman mitʼṭen hopone tahẽkantaea. Uni do juạn ar ńelokʼte ạḍi napae koṛae tahẽkana. Israelko modre uni lekan ńelokʼte mońj do ar okoe hõ bako tahẽkana. Uni do eṭakʼko khon mitʼ phuṭ usule tahẽkana. 
1Samuel9:3 Sạulren apattetʼ Kisren tinạkʼ gadha eṅgako tahẽkan onko do mitʼ dinko atʼena. Onate Kis do acʼren hopon Sạule metadea, “Am do mitʼṭen guti soṅgekate gadha eṅga sendrako lạgitʼ calakʼme.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Unre Sạul do sendra sendrate Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha ar Salesa ṭoṭhakoteye calaoena, menkhan onko do bae ńamletʼkoa. Ona tayom unkin do Salim ṭoṭhatekin senena, menkhan onḍe hõ gadha eṅgako do bạkin ńamletʼkoa. Ona tayom unkin do Benjạmin ṭoṭhatekin calaoena, ar onḍe hõ bạkin ńamletʼkoa." 
1Samuel9:5 Unkin do tinre Suph ṭoṭhatekin boloyena unre Sạul do acʼ soṅgeten gutiye metadea, “Alaṅ do dela laṅ ruạṛ calakʼa. Arbaṅ khan baba do hoedaṛeakʼa gadha eṅgakoakʼ cintạ badkate alaṅ lạgitʼe cintạkʼa.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Menkhan uni guti doe menkeda, “Ńelme, niạ nagrahare Isorren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahena. Uni do sanamkoko manotea ar uni okae men ona do sạri sạrige hoyokʼa. Dela, alaṅ hõ uni ṭhen laṅ calakʼa. Hoedaṛeakʼa uni doe lại daṛeakʼa oka horte calakʼ hoyokʼ talaṅa mente." 
1Samuel9:7 Sạul do acʼren gutiye metadea, “Onḍe laṅ calakʼ khan tobe do uni hoṛ lạgitʼ cetʼ laṅ iditoraea? Alaṅakʼ thạilạkʼre oka jomakʼ tahẽkan ona ma cabayen. Isorren hoṛ emae leka jãhãn sandes hõ bạnukʼ talaṅa. Menkhan cetʼ menakʼtalaṅa?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Uni gutiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ńelme, iń ṭhen do pe gram rupạ menakʼa. Isorren hoṛ do onageń emaea, ar uni doe lại alaṅa oka horte calakʼ hoyokʼ talaṅa mente.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Lahateakʼ dinkore Israel disạmren jãhãe hoṛ Isor ṭhen khon jãhãnakʼ reaṅ baḍae joṅko men khan onko do calakʼ lahareko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Dela, ńeńelicʼ ṭhen bon calakʼa.” Ar ńitokʼ okoe do nạbiye men ocokʼkan uni do lahateakʼ dinkore ńeńelicʼe men ocokʼkan tahẽkana.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Sạul do acʼren gutiye metadea, “Besgem menakada; dela, alaṅ hõ onḍe laṅ calakʼa.” Ar noa menkate unkin do Isorren hoṛ oka nagrahareye tahẽkan onḍekin senena." 
1Samuel9:11 Ar nagraha reakʼ ona hortekin rakapʼ calakʼkan tahẽkanre unkin do adom kuṛiko sãotekin ńapamena. Onko kuṛiko do dakʼ loloko oḍok hijukʼkan tahẽkana. Unkin do onko kuṛikin kuliketʼkoa, “Ńeńelicʼ do cetʼ nonḍe menaea?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛatʼkinạ, “Hẽ, menaegea; aben do thoṛa laha ńokʼ calakʼben ar usạrae ben. Uni do teheńge aleakʼ nagrahareye hecʼakana, ar boṭkocʼ coṭre hoṛko do teheń janwar samaṅokʼakʼko hoeocoya." 
1Samuel9:13 Aben do nagrahate ben bololen khange uni sãote ben ńapamokʼa. Arben ńelea uni do boṭkocʼte jom lạgitʼe rakapʼ calakʼ kana. Ar uni ạuriye calakʼ hạbicʼ hoṛko do bako jom-ńũiya, ente uni do samaṅakʼ jiniskoe ạsirbadakʼa; ar ona tayom okoeko hoho ocoakan onkoko joma. Aben do ńitge rakapʼ calakʼben, enḍekhan uni sãote ben ńapam daṛeakʼa.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Niạ katha ańjomkate unkin do nagrahate kin rakapʼ calaoena. Ar nagraha talare senkatekin ńelkedea Samuel do boṭkocʼte rakapʼ calakʼ iạte ạkin secʼgeye hijukʼ kana. Ar horre uni tulucʼkin ńapamena. 
1Samuel9:15 Sạul hijukʼ laha hilokʼ Probhu Isor do Sạmuel ṭhen niạ kathae sodorleda," 
1Samuel9:16 “Gapa niạ jokhecʼ Benjạmin gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛ do am ṭheniń kolea. Ar am do ińren hoṛko metakʼme Israelkoren mukhiyạ hoyokʼ lạgitʼ unigem ojokʼ bahalea. Unige Philistikoakʼ ti khon ińren hoṛkoe bańcaokoa. Iń do ińren hoṛko secʼ iń moneakada, ente onkoakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼ do ińakʼ lutur hạbicʼ seṭer akana.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Probhu Isor do Sạule ńelkede khan Sạmuele metadea, “Ńelme, nui kangeae uni hoṛ do, one uni reakʼ kathań lạiyatʼme tahẽkan. Nuige ińren hoṛkoe bicạrkoa.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Sạul do phaṭok-duạr ṭhen Sạmuele kulikedea, “Dayakate lại ạlińme ńeńelicʼakʼ oṛakʼ do okare.”" 
1Samuel9:19 Sạmuele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń kangeạń ńeńelicʼ do. Am do iń lahate boṭkocʼre rakapʼ calakʼme, ente teheń aben do iń sãoteben joma. Ar gapa setakʼ doń bidạgotʼkabena ar amakʼ monre oka menakʼ onań lạiyama." 
1Samuel9:20 Pe din lahare amren okoe gadha eṅgako atʼakan onko lạgitʼ do ar alom cintạkʼa; onko doko ńamakana. Israel disạm reakʼ sanam bhageakʼ jinisko do okoe lạgitʼ kana? Ona do cetʼ am ar am apatren bõsrenko lạgitʼ do baṅkana?” 
1Samuel9:21 Sạule roṛkeda, “Am do cedakʼ niạ katha dom mitạń kana? Israelkoakʼ sanam gusṭiko modre Benjạmin gusṭige sanam khon huḍiń utạrakʼ kana, ar iń do ona gusṭiren hoṛ kạnạń. Arhõ Benjạmin gusṭiren tinạkʼ bõsko menakʼle onako modre aleakʼ bõsren do celegele baṅkana.”" 
1Samuel9:22 Samuel do unre Sạul ar uniren gutiye soṅgeketʼkinte jojom oṛakʼteko boloyena ar neota akanko modre joto khon manotakʼ jaegare unkine duṛupʼketʼ kinạ. Neota akanko do lekhare pe gel hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Samuel9:23 Ar okoe hoṛe isin akatʼ Samuel do uniye metadea, “Okaṭakʼ jel do begar dohokakʼ lạgitʼ iń metatʼme tahẽkan ona ạguime.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Onate uni do senkate bulu ar ona sãoteakʼ jel ạgukate Sạul samaṅreye dohokeda. Ar Samuel do Sạule metadea, “Noa do am lạgitʼge doho akan tahẽkana; ne jomme. Am do teheń nonḍem joma iạte hoṛko neotako jokhecʼge noa do am lạgitʼiń begar dohoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel9:25 Inạ tayom onko do ona usul ṭhạ̃i khon nagrahateko ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar Samuel do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ chatre Sạul sãoteye galmaraokeda. 
1Samuel9:26 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre onko do jạpitʼ khonko beretʼena. Ar marsalen khan Sạul chatreye tahẽkanrege Samuel do uniye metadea, “Ma sapṛaokʼme ńitokʼ doń bidạkama.” Sạul ar Sạmuel dokin sapṛaoena arkin oḍok calaoena." 
1Samuel9:27 Ar nagraha reakʼ simạna ṭhenkin seṭeren khan Sạmuel do Sạule metadea, “Amren guti do calao lahakʼ metaeme, menkhan am do thoṛa ghạṛicʼ lạgitʼ nonḍe teṅgonme. Isor okae menetʼ onań ańjom ocomea.” Onate uniren guti doe calao lahayena." 
1Samuel10:1 Ona tayom Samuel do mitʼṭecʼ sunum reakʼ botol ạgukate Sạulakʼ bohokʼreye dulkeda. Ar cokʼadeteye metadea, “Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko cetanre mukhiyạ menteye ojokʼ bahalketʼmea." 
1Samuel10:2 Am do iń ṭhen khon senkate teheń Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ simạna Selsah ńutuman jaegare Rahelakʼ topa ṭhen bar hoṛem ńamkinạ. Unkin dokin lạiyama, ‘okoe gadha eṅgako sendram oḍok akan onko doko ńamakana. Menkhan ńitokʼ amren baba do gadha eṅgako reakʼ cintạ badkate am lạgitʼ cintạreye paṛao akana. Uniye meneda, acʼren hopon lạgitʼ ńitokʼ do cetʼe cekaea?’" 
1Samuel10:3 “Ona tayom am do onḍe khon sen laha nõkʼkate Tabor ṭoṭha reakʼ Elon dare ṭhenem senlen khange Isorren pe hoṛ do sewae lạgitʼ Bethelteko rakapʼ calakʼ kanem ńamkoa. Arem ńela, onko modren mitʼ hoṛ do pea merom boda hopon, ar mitʼ hoṛ do pea piṭhạ ar mitʼ hoṛ do mitʼ celaṅ darkha rasae idiyeda." 
1Samuel10:4 Onko do amko joharama ar barea piṭhạko emama ar am do onkoakʼ ti khon onam hataoa. 
1Samuel10:5 “Ona tayom am do Gibea-elohim nagrahatem calakʼa. Onḍe do Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍera menakʼa. Ar nagrahatem seṭerlen khan nonkan mitʼ dol nạbiko sãotem ńapamokʼa onko do Isorakʼ emakʼ katha roṛ roṛte sewae reakʼ cetan jaega khonko pheḍ hijukʼa. Ar onko dolren samaṅ secʼren hoṛko do binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, tiriạ ar tabla ru-ruteko calakʼa." 
1Samuel10:6 Unre Probhu Isor do acʼren jiuteye sarbharaomea, ar onate amhõ onko sãote nạbi leka katham roṛa. Ar eṭakʼ lekan hoṛem hoyokʼa." 
1Samuel10:7 Niạko cinhạ hoylenre am do okaṭakʼ cekae lektam onagem onkaea; Isor do am sãoteye tahena. 
1Samuel10:8 “Am do iń lahate Gilgolte pheḍ calakʼme. Iń do jeredokʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ lạgitʼ am ṭheniń hijukʼkana. Ar iń ạuriń hijukʼ hạbicʼ am do eae din iń hạbicʼem koyokʼ hora. Ar iń do hecʼkateń lạiyama cetʼ cekae hoyokʼtama.” 
1Samuel10:9 Samuel ṭhen khon calakʼ jokhecʼ Sạul doe ạcuren khan Isor do uniyakʼ mone bodolketʼtaea. Ar enhilokʼge cinhạ lekate roṛakʼ ghoṭnako hoyena. 
1Samuel10:10 Sạul ar uniren guti do Gibeate kin seṭeren khan mitʼ dol nạbiko sãotekin ńapamena. Unre Isorren Jiu do Sạule sarbharao ocokedea, ar uni do nạbiko talare senkate Isorakʼ katha lạlạiye ehopʼena." 
1Samuel10:11 Okoe laha khon Sạulko oprom akade tahẽkan onko do nạbiko sãote Isorakʼ katha roroṛko ńelkede khan apan ạpin memenko ehopʼena, “Kisren hoponakʼ do cetʼ hoyakana? Sạul hõ cetʼ enḍekhan nạbiko modren mitʼ hoṛ kanae?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Onate onḍenko hoṛko menkeda, “Menkhan noko do okoeren hopon kanako?” Ona iạte “Sạul hõ cetʼ nạbiko modren mitʼ hoṛ kanae?” Ar noa katha do kạhtuk hoyena." 
1Samuel10:13 Isorakʼ emakʼ katha roṛ sạtkate Sạul do sewae reakʼ cetan jaegateye rakapʼena. 
1Samuel10:14 Sạulren kakattetʼ do Sạul ar uniren gutiye kuliketʼkinạ, “Okate ben calaolena?” Sạule menkeda, “Gadha eṅga sendrako lạgitʼ liń senlena, menkhan onko do okarege bạliń ńamletʼkote Sạmuel ṭhen liń calaoena.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Sạulren kakattetʼe menkeda, “Lạiyạń ben Sạmuel do cetʼe menkeda?”" 
1Samuel10:16 Sạul do acʼren kakattetʼe metadea, “Uni do pusṭạuteye metatʼlińạ, gadha eṅga doko ńamakana.” Menkhan uniyakʼ rajokʼ reaṅ Samuel oka kathae men akawade ona do kakattetʼ bae lạiyadea." 
1Samuel10:17 Tayomte Samuel do Mispare Probhu Isor samaṅre Israelkoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
1Samuel10:18 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Israelkoren Probhu Isore menakada, ‘Misor disạm khon ińgeń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea, ar Misorrenkoakʼ ti khon okako rajosṭi do ape cetanre santaoko calaoetʼ tahẽkan onkoakʼ ti khon hõ ińgeń bańcao akatʼpea.’ ”" 
1Samuel10:19 Samuel do arhõ menkeda, “Menkhan aperen Isor, okoe do sanam lekan muhin ar muskil khone bańcao akatʼpere hõ, ape do unigepe nihạ̃t giḍi akadea arpe meneda, ‘ale cetanre mitʼṭen raj baṛe emalem.’ Onate ńitokʼ ape do apan ạpin gusṭi ar bõs lekate Probhu Isor samaṅre hạjirokʼpe.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Sạmuel do Israelkoren sanam gusṭikoe hohowatʼkoa. Onko gusṭiko mod khon Benjạmin gusṭiren doko bachao ocoyena.
