1Samuel10:21 Ona tayom Benjạmin gusṭiren sanam bõsko do samaṅ secʼko ạgu ocoyena. Ar onko mod khon Mitri bõsko bachao ocoyena. Nonkate mucạtʼre Kisren hopon Sạule bachao ocoyena. Ar uniyakʼ khoj paṛaoen khan uni do bae ńamlena. 
1Samuel10:22 Unre hoṛko do Probhu Isorko kulikedea, “Nonḍe do cetʼ ar jãhãe menakʼkoa?” Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ńelpe, uni do asbabko talareye oko akana.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Unre hoṛko do ńir senente onḍe khon Sạulko ạgukedea. Ar hoṛko talareye teṅgoyen khan uni do sanamko khon mitʼ phuṭ usule ńelena. 
1Samuel10:24 Unre Samuel do sanamkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ Probhu Isore bachao akade hoṛpe ńelńame kana?” Sanam hoṛko modre uni lekanko do ar okoege bạnukʼkoa. Unre hoṛkoko menkeda, “Raj do jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma.”" 
1Samuel10:25 Unre Samuel do rajosṭi ḍanṭao reakʼ niạm lekate hoṛko ṭhene lại jạhirkeda. Uni do onako mitʼṭecʼ puthire olkate Probhu Isor samaṅreye dohokeda. Ar ona tayom hoṛko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteye bidạkatʼkoa. 
1Samuel10:26 Sạul hõ acʼakʼ oṛakʼ Gibeateye ruạṛ calaoena. Ar okoe birbanṭakoakʼ ontorre Isor do udgạue ematʼko eken onkoge uni sãoteko senena. 
1Samuel10:27 Menkhan mitʼ bar bạṛicʼ hoṛ doko menkeda, “Nui hoṛ do cetʼ lekateye rukhiyạ bona?” Onko do uniko nihạ̃tkedea ar cetʼ sandesge bako emadea. Menkhan khan Sạul do hapegeye tahẽyena." 
1Samuel11:1 Amoniạ Nahas do senkate Jabes-Gileade esetʼ ạcurkeda. Unre Jabesren hoṛko do Nahasko metadea, “Ale sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobos bandhaome, enḍekhan ale do am taberele tahena.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Amoniạ Nahas do roṛ ruạṛatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Mitʼṭecʼ sorto iạte ape sãoteń bondobos daṛekea. Ar ona do hoyokʼ kana, ape sanamkoakʼ jojom sa reakʼ mẽtʼ hoṭor todtape hoyokʼa. Arpe onkaete sanam Israel jạtrenkoń bemanotkoa.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Niạ katha ańjomkate Jabesren murubbiko do Nahasko metadea, “Eae din somoe emalem. Ar inạ talare Israel disạm reakʼ sanam jaegare hoṛkolkate khoborle kola. Ar jãhãe ale rukhiyạle lạgitʼ bae hijukʼ enḍekhan ale do am taberele tahena.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Hoṛko do tinre khobor emokʼ lạgitʼ Sạulakʼ nagraha Gibeate senkate onḍenko hoṛko lạiyatʼkoa unre onḍenko hoṛ do kạuạ rạuwạ rarakʼko ehopʼena. 
1Samuel11:5 Ar unre Sạul do gupi ṭạnḍi khon ḍaṅgrakoante oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do, “Cetʼ hoyakana menteye kuliyana? Ar cedakʼ hoṛ doko rakʼeda?” Unre Jabesren hoṛ do okako lại oṭokatʼ onako baḍae ocokedea." 
1Samuel11:6 Hoṛkoakʼ kathae ańjomketʼ khan Isorren Jiu do Sạul cetanreye hecʼena, ar edrete uni doe seṅgelena." 
1Samuel11:7 Uni do barea ḍaṅgrae hataoketʼkinte unkine samakʼ kaṭra kuṭrạketʼ kinạ. Ar ona tayom onako kaṭra kuṭrạ do hoṛ kolkate Israel disạm reakʼ sanam jaegareye kolkeda ar noa katha lại pasnao lạgitʼe metatʼkoa, “Jãhãege Sạul ar Sạmuel sãote bae midokʼ onkoren gại ḍaṅgrawakʼ halot hõ nonkage hoyokʼtakoa.” Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ monre mitʼṭecʼ botore rakapʼ ocoketʼtakoa, ar onko do mitʼte jotoko oḍok hecʼena." 
1Samuel11:8 Sạul do Besekre onkoe lekhaketʼkoa. Onate Israelren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ lekha do pe lakh ar Jihudạren do pe gel hajarko hoyena. 
1Samuel11:9 Gibearen hoṛko do Jabes khon okoe khoborko ạguletʼ onkoko metatʼkoa, “Jabes-Gileadren hoṛko senkatepe metakoa, gapa tikin bhitritege onko doko bańcao ocokʼa.” Ar noa katha Jabesren hoṛko baḍaeketʼ khan ạḍiko kusiyena." 
1Samuel11:10 Onko do Amonrenko metatʼkoa, “Gapage ale do ape taberen hoṛle hoyokʼa. Ar apeakʼ oka kusi onage ale cetanre kạmipe.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Dosar hilokʼ Sạul do acʼren hoṛko pe dolteye hạṭińketʼkoa. Ona tayom aṅga marsalokʼ okte onko do Amonrenkoakʼ ḍerate bolokate tikin hạbicʼko gocʼketʼkoa. Ar tinạkʼ jiwetʼko tahẽyen onko doko chirchạtur cabayena, ar mitʼ sãote bar hoṛ hõ bạkin tahẽlena." 
1Samuel11:12 Hoṛko do hecʼkate Samuelko metadea, “Okoeye menleda Sạul do ale cetanre bae raj daṛeakʼa? Onko do aleakʼ tire jimạkakome; onko dole gocʼ cabakoa.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Menkhan Sạule menkeda, “Teheń do celege baṅ gocʼko hoyokʼa, ente teheń dinre Probhu Isor do Israelkoe bańcao akatʼkoa.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Unre Samuel do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, Dela, abo do Gilgolte senkate Sạulakʼ raj hudạ reakʼ katha arhõbon lại jạhira.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Onate hoṛko do Gilgolte senkate Probhu Isor samaṅre Sạul do raj hudạreko bahalkedea. Ar onḍe Probhu Isor ńutumte sulukren samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda ar Sạul ar Israelrenko do ạḍiko rạskạyena. 
1Samuel12:1 Inạ tayom Sạmuel do Israelkoren sanamkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape okakope men akawạdiń onako jotowakʼ doń ańjom akada ar ape cetanre mitʼṭen raj hõń bahal akawatʼpea." 
1Samuel12:2 Ńelpe, ńitokʼ do ape ạyurpe lạgitʼ aperen do mitʼṭen raj menaea. Iń doń haṛamena, ariń pạnḍu caba akana, ar ińren hoponkin hõ ape samaṅrege menakʼkinạ. Iń do juạn umer khon teheń hạbicʼ apeń ạyur ạguakatʼpea." 
1Samuel12:3 Iń do nonḍege minạńa; ar iń upạrte apeakʼ jãhãnakʼ roroṛteakʼ menakʼtape khan enḍekhan Probhu Isor ar uniren ojokʼ bahal akan hoṛko samaṅrege roṛpe. Ar goha emokʼpe, okoeren ḍaṅgra se gadha behok lekateń hatao akadea mente? Ar jãhãe ṭhen khon ghus hataokate mocań bond akatʼ tińạ mente? Noako reakʼ jãhãṭakʼgeń kạmi akatʼ khan tobe khan ona reakʼ khuti puruniń emokʼa.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Unre hoṛko menkeda, “Baṅa, am do ale okoe cetanre hõ bam behok akada, ar okoe cetanre hõ bạṛicʼ do bam beohar akada ar okoe ṭhen khon hõ cetʼge bam hatao akada.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Sạmuel do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Teheń do Probhu Isor kangeae goha do, ar uniren ojokʼ bahal akan hoṛko hõ goha kanako, ape do iń ṭhen khon jãhãn jinisge bape ńamleda.” Unre hoṛkoko menkeda, “Uni kangeae goha do.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samuel do hoṛko arhõe metatʼkoa, “Hẽ, Probhu Isorge goha do, one okoe do Mose ar Arone bahalletʼkin ar aperen hapṛamko Misor disạm khon kin oḍok ạguletʼko tahẽkan." 
1Samuel12:7 Enḍekhan niạ dhao do apege sapṛaokʼpe. Probhu Isor do ape ar aperen hapṛamko lạgitʼ okako dhorom reakʼe kạmi akatʼ ona jotowakʼ reaṅ Probhu Isor samaṅrege apeakʼ doskoń udukʼapea. 
1Samuel12:8 “Jakob do Misor disạmteye senena, ar aperen hapṛamko tinre Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda unre Probhu do Mose ar Arone kolketʼkinạ. Unkin do Misor disạm khon aperen hapṛamkokiń oḍok ạguketʼkoa ar niạ disạmrege girobasokʼ lạgitʼkin bondobosatʼkoa." 
1Samuel12:9 Menkhan onko do Probhu Isorko hiṛińkedea. Onatege uni do golam hoyokʼ lạgitʼ Hasorren senaputi Siserawakʼ tire, Philisṭikoakʼ tire, ar Moab disạmren rajkoakʼ tire onkoe jimạkatʼkoa. Onko do aperen hapṛamko sãoteko lạṛhạiyena." 
1Samuel12:10 Unre aperen hapṛam do Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼketʼteko menkeda, ‘ale dole kại akada; ale do Probhu Isor bạgikate Bakʼal ar Astoretle pujạ akawatʼkinạ; ńitokʼ bạirikoakʼ ti khon baṛe rukhiyạleme, ar ale do amgele sewawama.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Unre Probhu Isor do Jerubakʼal, ar Barak, Jephtoha ar Samuel tekoe kolletʼkote ape beṛhaeten bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạketʼpea. Ar ona tayom ape nirạite girobasokʼpe ehopʼena." 
1Samuel12:12 “Menkhan Amonkoren Nahas raj do tinre ape upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ hijukʼkanpe ńelkedea unre Probhu Isor do aperen raje tahẽkanre hõ ińpe metadińạ, ‘ale cetanre mitʼṭen raje hoyokʼma.’" 
1Samuel12:13 Ńitokʼ ńelpe, nui kangeae aperen raj do, one unipe khojlede arpe bachao akawan. Probhu Isor do ape cetanre mitʼṭen raje bachao bahal akadea." 
1Samuel12:14 Ape do Probhu Isorpe botorae, arpe sewawae ar uniyakʼpe bataotaete uni upạrte bape taṛam, ar okoe apeye ḍanṭaope uni aperen raj ar aperen Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekape calakʼ, enḍekhan do bhagegea." 
1Samuel12:15 Menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ bape batao ar uniyakʼ hukum upạrtepe taṛam, enḍekhan cetʼleka aperen hapṛamko sạjạiye ematʼko tahẽkan onkage ape hõe emapea." 
1Samuel12:16 “Ńitokʼ do ma sapṛaokʼpe; Probhu Isor apeakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre oka maraṅakʼe kạmi ona ńelpe. 
1Samuel12:17 Ńitokʼ do guhum gegetʼ somoe kana, se baṅa? Iń do Probhu Isoriń metaea jemon uni do huḍur ar dakʼe kol. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa arpe ńela, rajpe koeyante Probhu Isor ṭhen tinạkʼ maraṅpe behok akada mente.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Inạ tayom Samuel do Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda ar uni do enhilokʼge huḍur ar dakʼe kolkeda. Unre sanamkoge Probhu Isor ar Sạmuelko botoratʼkinạ. 
1Samuel12:19 Unre onko sanamko do Samuelko metadea, “Amren Probhu Isor ṭhen amren gutiko lạgitʼ koeme jemon alole gujukʼ, ente rajle koeante aleakʼ judạ judạ kạiko sãote niạ kại hõ juṭucʼentalea.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Alope botorokʼa. Apepe kại akatʼrehõ enhõ Probhu Isor ṭhen khon pharakokʼ baṅkate goṭa ontorte uni sewawaepe." 
1Samuel12:21 Uni khon do alope sạṅgińokʼa, entepe onkale khan ape do eṛe debotako ṭhenpe calakʼa. Onko doko ạuṛiyakʼgea ar bako bhạlại daṛeapea onko do rukhiyạ hõ bako rukhiyạ daṛeapea." 
1Samuel12:22 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ maraṅ ńutum iạte acʼren hoṛko tisge bae bạgi daṛeakoa, ente uni do acʼakʼ sanatege acʼren hoṛe hoyocoakatʼpea." 
1Samuel12:23 Iń do ape lạgitʼ koejoṅ tishõ aloń thirokʼte Probhu Isor upạrte aloń kại. Iń do dhorom ar sạriyakʼ reakʼ horte calakʼ reakʼiń cetʼapea. 
1Samuel12:24 Ape do eken Probhu Isor botoraepe ar apeakʼ goṭa ontorte pạtiạr salakʼ uni sewawaepe. Hudispe, ape lạgitʼ uni do tinạkʼ maraṅ maraṅakʼe kạmi akada." 
1Samuel12:25 Menkhan behokakʼpe kạmi idi enḍekhan ape ar aperen raj sanamgepe marao utạrokʼa.” 
1Samuel13:1 Sạul do juạn umerre raj hoykate Israel disạmre thoṛa bochor rajosṭi calao tayom Israelko tala khon pe hajar hoṛe bachaoana. Onko modre bar hajar hoṛ do uni sãote Mikmasre ar Bethel reakʼ buru ṭoṭhareko tahẽyena ar mitʼ hajar do Benjạmin gusṭirenkoakʼ Gibeare Jonathon sãoreko tahẽyena. Ar eṭakʼ Israelko do akoakʼ oṛakʼteye kolkatʼkoa. 
1Samuel13:2  
1Samuel13:3 Ar Gebeare Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdko do okareko ḍera akan tahẽkan ona do Jonathone akromonkeda ar ona do Philisṭikoko ańjomkeda. Unre Sạul do disạm reakʼ sanam jaegare sakwa oroṅkateye menkeda, “Ibrikoko ańjomma.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Onate Israelren sanam hoṛko ańjomkeda, Sạul do Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍerae akromon akada ar Philisṭiko do Israelkoko hirkhạwako kana. Unre Israelkoko hoho ocoyena jemon onko do Gilgolte senkate Sạul sãoteko midokʼ." 
1Samuel13:5 Unre Philisṭiko do Israelko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena. Ar onko sãote pegel hajar rãt gạḍiko, turui hajar aswariko ar jalapuri reakʼ gitil leka alekha lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana." 
1Samuel13:6 Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do ạḍi muhinreko paṛao akana menteko ńelketʼ khan onko do danderkore, jhupuṭoṛokore, buru khorloṅkore, cạṭạni lopakʼkore, ḍonḍhorkore ar khạ̃yukʼkoreko okoyena." 
1Samuel13:7 Ar ḍher Ibriko do jordan gaḍa paromkate Gad ar Gilead ṭoṭhateko calaoena. Menkhan Sạul do Gilgolreye tahẽyena, ar uni sãoten lạṛhại phạdko do botorte thartharaokʼko ehopʼena." 
1Samuel13:8 Sạul do Samuelakʼ katha leka uni lạgitʼ eae din hạbicʼe koyokʼ horkeda, menkhan Sạmuel do Gilgolte bae hecʼlena. Ar acʼren lạṛhại phạdko hõ uni bạgikate hante nate calakʼko ehopʼena." 
1Samuel13:9 Onate Sạul do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jinis acʼ ṭhen ạgui lạgitʼe metatʼkoa. Ar acʼge ona jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. 
1Samuel13:10 Ar samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅ sạtketʼ khan Samuel doe seṭerena. Unre Sạul do uni joharae lạgitʼ uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍok senena. 
1Samuel13:11 Sạmuel do uniye metadea, “Noa do cetʼem cekakeda?” Sạule roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińiń ńelkeda, hoṛko do ińko bạgiyạńkana ar am hõ ṭhik oktere bam hecʼlena, ar note Philisṭirenko hõ Mikmasre hecʼkateko ḍera akana." 
1Samuel13:12 Onateń hudiskeda, Philisṭiko do Gilgolre akromoniń lạgitʼko hijukʼkana menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ daya ńam lạgitʼ do bạń kurumuṭu kana. Onate ińakʼ monsubạ baṅ tahẽkanre hõ ona jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ iń samaṅkeda.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Sạmuele menkeda, “Am do bebuj lekam kạmiakada. Amren Probhu Isor okae hukumatʼme tahẽkan ona do bam manaoleda. Onam manao lekhan Israelko cetanre amakʼ rajokʼ do jaejug hạbicʼe dohoketama." 
1Samuel13:14 Menkhan ńitokʼ amakʼ rajokʼ do ḍher din baṅ ṭikạu tahena. Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ kusileka mitʼṭen hoṛe ńam akadea ar unige acʼren hoṛkoren mukhiyạ menteye bahal akadea, ente uniyakʼ hukum do bam ańjom akada.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Inạ tayom Samuel do Gilgol bạgikate Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibeateye senena. Sạul do acʼ sãoten hoṛkoe lekhaketʼkoa ar onko do turui saeko tahẽkana. 
1Samuel13:16 Tayomte Sạul ar acʼren hopontetʼ Jonathan ar onko sãoten hoṛko do Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibeate senkateko tahẽyena ar Philisṭiko do Mikmasre ḍera akangeko tahẽyena. 
1Samuel13:17 Ar Philisṭikoakʼ ḍera khon pe dol huhul lạṛhại phạdko oḍokena. Onko modren mitʼ dol do Ophra hor aṛe reakʼ Sual ṭoṭha secʼko calaoena. 
1Samuel13:18 Ar mitʼ dol do Bet-horon secʼ ar eṭakʼ dol do ona buru ṭoṭha secʼ one onḍe khon hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ Seboyim buru lodam ńelńamokʼ. 
1Samuel13:19 Onako dinre Israel disạmre cele kamarge bako tahẽkana onate Philisṭiko doko hudisetʼ tahẽkana kamarko tahẽlen khan Ibriko do tarwaṛe ar borlomko benaokea. 
1Samuel13:20 Ar onate onko do nahel reakʼ phal, kuḍi, ṭeṅgocʼ ar datrom dhar ocoy lạgitʼ Philisṭiko ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼkan tako tahẽkana." 
1Samuel13:21 Ar nahel reakʼ phal, kuḍi, phala ar kuńcko dhar ocoy lạgitʼ dam lekate irạl gram rupạ lagaoako kan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel13:22 Onate lạṛhại jokhecʼ ńelena, Sạul ar uniren hopontetʼ Jonathan chaḍa unkin sãoten ar okoe lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ tire jãhãn tarwaṛe se borlomge baṅ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel13:23 Ar Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko do ḍera khon oḍokkate Mikmas reakʼ horre senkateko tahẽyena. 
1Samuel14:1 Mitʼdin Sạulren hopontetʼ Jonathan do acʼren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ koṛae metadea, “Dela, Philisṭikoakʼ ḍera telaṅ calakʼa.” Menkhan uni do acʼren apattetʼ hõ bae baḍae ocoledea." 
1Samuel14:2 Unre Sạul do Gibea simạna reakʼ Migron ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegare ḍạlim dare buṭạreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar uni sãote turui sae hoṛko tahẽkana," 
1Samuel14:3 onko modre do Ahiạ ńutuman mitʼ hoṛe tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ hoṛmore do ephod tahẽkantaea. Ahiạ do Ehiṭubren hopone tahẽkana, ar Ahiṭub do Ikabotren boehae tahẽkana, ar Ikabot do Pinehasren hopone tahẽkana ar Pinehas do Eliren hopone tahẽkana; ar Eli do Silore Probhu Isorren naekeye tahẽkana. Unre Jonathanakʼ oḍok calakʼ reakʼ katha do okoege bako baḍaekan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel14:4 Ar okaṭakʼ ciritʼ horte paromkate Jonathan do Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍera ṭhen calakʼ reakʼ kathae menletʼ ona ciritʼ hor reakʼ banar aṛege dhiri reakʼ usul pạcri leka khaṛage tahẽkana. Ona mitʼ aṛe reakʼ ńutum do Boses ar eṭakʼ aṛe reakʼ ńutum do Sene tahẽkana. 
1Samuel14:5 Ona reakʼ mitʼ aṛe do utạr reakʼ Mikmas secʼ ar eṭakʼ aṛe do dạkhin reakʼ Geba secʼ. 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathan do acʼren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ koṛae metadea, “Dela, alaṅ do begor khatna akan hoṛkoakʼ ḍera telaṅ calakʼa. Pasecʼ Probhu Isor do abon lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼe cekaea, ente uni do acʼakʼ sana lekage thoṛa hoṛkote hõ ar ḍher hoṛko bhagao daṛeakoa.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ uni koṛae menkeda, “Amakʼ mone joṅakʼ lekage baṛe hoyokʼma. Ar amakʼ monsubạ lekageń calakʼa.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Jonathane menkeda, “Enḍekhan dela, onko samaṅ secʼ laṅ calakʼa ar onko ṭhen laṅ ńel ocokʼa." 
1Samuel14:9 Onkoko metalaṅ khan, ‘teṅgokʼ ben, ale do aben ṭhenle hijukʼkana,’ enḍekhan alaṅ do onḍe khon ar balaṅ lahakʼa ar balaṅ rakapʼ calakʼa." 
1Samuel14:10 Arko metalaṅ khan, ‘ale ṭhen rakapʼ hijukʼ ben,’ enḍekhan laṅ rakapʼ calakʼa. Ar Probhu Isor aboakʼ tireye jimạ akatʼko onage hoyokʼa alaṅ ṭhen uniyakʼ cinhạ do.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Niạ menkate unkin do Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdko samaṅre senkate kin ńel ocoyena. Unre Philisṭiko doko menkeda, “Hạnkin ńelkinpe, danderrekin okolen unkin dokin oḍok hijukʼkana.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Onkoakʼ ḍeraren hoṛko do Jonathan ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa sasapʼicʼ hoṛko metadea, “Ale ṭhen rakapʼ hijukʼben nahãkʼle ńel ocobena.” Unre Jonathan do acʼren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼe metadea, “Iń tayomte rakapʼ hijukʼme. Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ tireye jimạ akatʼkoa.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonathan do kaḍa koḍoye rakapʼ calaoena ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛ hõ uni tayomteye rakapʼena. Ar Philisṭiko do Jonathanakʼ tire gujukʼko ehopʼena ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛ hõ uni tayomte Philisṭiko gocʼkoe ehopʼena. 
1Samuel14:14 Jonathan ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛ do lạṛhại ehobokʼrege adha ekor jaegare bargel hoṛkin gocʼketʼkoa. 
1Samuel14:15 Unre Philisṭikoakʼ lạṛhại ṭạnḍi reakʼ ḍerare ar sanam lạṛhại phạdko talare mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ botor rakapʼatʼkoa; onate Mikmas reakʼ ḍera ar huhul dolren lạṛhại phạdko hõ botorte thar tharaokʼko ehopʼena, ar ona sãote dhạrti laṛaokʼ hõ hoyena. Ona maraṅ botor do Isor ṭhen khonge hecʼatʼkoa." 
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin ṭoṭha reakʼ Gibeare Sạulren paharadar lạṛhại phạdkoko ńelkeda, Philisṭi lạṛhại phạdko doko chirchạtur akana." 
1Samuel14:17 Unre Sạul do acʼ sãoten hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Lạṛhại phạdko jarwakate sapṛaokope ar ńelkope, okoe abo talare bạnukʼkoa.” Ar onko doko ńelkeda Jonathan ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ do onḍe bạnukʼkinạ." 
1Samuel14:18 Sạul do Ahiyại metadea, “Am do Isorakʼ sinduk ạguiyme.” (Onako dinre sinduk do Israelko ṭhenge tahẽkana.)" 
1Samuel14:19 Sạul do tinre naeke sãoteye galmaraokan tahẽkana unre Philisṭikoakʼ ḍerare gulmal hoyokʼ ańjomena ar ḍher idikʼtege tahẽyena. Onate Sạul do naekeye metadea, “Tahẽ ocoge, baṅ lagaokʼa.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Inạ tayom Sạul ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do sanamko mitʼdomte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena. Onkoko ńelkeda, Philisṭiko do ako ako upạrtege tarwaṛeko calaoeda ar onko talare maraṅ ạulạuge ńelokʼkana." 
1Samuel14:21 Inạ lahare okoe Ibriko do Philisṭiko talareko tahẽkan onko ar okoe ḍerateko senlen unre onko hõ Sạul ar Jonathan sãoten Israelko sãoteko seletʼena. 
1Samuel14:22 Ar Ephrayim buru ṭoṭhareko oko akan tahẽkan Israelko hõ Philisṭikoko dạṛeda mente ańjomketʼ khan onko hõ oḍok hecʼkate lạṛhạireko seletʼena ar Philisṭikoko khudạu idiketʼkoa. 
1Samuel14:23 Nonkate Probhu Isor do enhilokʼ Israelkoe bańcaoketʼkoa, ar Bet-Aben paromkate hõ lạṛhạitegeko tahẽyena." 
1Samuel14:24 Enhilokʼ Israelko do ạḍi kosṭote dinko paromkeda, ente Sạul do mitʼṭecʼe kiriạ ocoletʼkoa, ạuri ạyubokʼ hạbicʼ ar bạiriko cetanre ạuriye halae hạbicʼ jãhãege jãhãnakʼko jom enḍekhan onko cetanre sarap baṛe paṛaokʼ ma. Onate enhilokʼ hoṛko do okoehõ cetʼge bako jomleda." 
1Samuel14:25 Onko do nonkan mitʼ jaegare senkateko boloyena onḍe do dare nạ̃ṛĩko tahẽkana. Ar onḍe ot cetanre thoṛa dumur rasako ńamkeda. 
1Samuel14:26 Onkoko ńelkeda, mitʼṭecʼ chata khon dumur rasa do ńurokʼkana menkhan kiriạ akan iạte botorte okoe hõ bako jomleda." 
1Samuel14:27 Menkhan Jonathan do bae baḍaekan tahẽkana, acʼren apattetʼ do hoṛko mitʼṭecʼe kiriạ ocoakatʼkoa mente. Onate uni do acʼakʼ ti reakʼ ṭheṅga agalte chatareye gutukeda ar rasa hataokate tite jojome ehopʼena. Ar uniyakʼ hoṛmore daṛe do ruạṛ hecʼena." 
1Samuel14:28 Unre mitʼṭen lạṛhại phạd do uniye metadea, “Amren ạpum do lạṛhại phạdko kajak mitʼṭecʼe kiriạ ocoakatʼkoa, ‘jãhãege teheń jãhãnakʼe jom enḍekhan uni cetanre sarap paṛaokʼa.’ Onate hoṛko do nunạkʼko nijor akana.”" 
1Samuel14:29 “Unre Jonathane menkeda, “Iń baba do hoṛkoe kosṭo ocoyetʼkoa. Ńelpe, niạ rasa thoṛagan mocareń idiketʼ sãote hoṛmore daṛe do ruạṛ hecʼadińạ." 
1Samuel14:30 Bạiriko ṭhen khon luṭakʼ jomakʼko khon teheń hoṛkoko jom daṛeakʼ khan ạḍi bhage hoekokʼa, ar Philisṭiko do arhõ ḍher bon gocʼ daṛekekoa.”" 
1Samuel14:31 Israelko do enhilokʼ Mikmas khon Ayalon hạbicʼ Philisṭiko gocʼ idiketʼkoa arko laṅga cabayena. 
1Samuel14:32 Onate onko do luṭ reakʼ jinisko cetanre hatko emketʼte bhiḍi, ḍaṅgra, mĩhũ sapʼkate otre gurkate mãyãm sudhạ jel jojomko ehopʼena." 
1Samuel14:33 Unre hoṛko do senkate Sạulko metadea, “Ńelme, onko do mãyãm sudhạ jelko jomketʼte Probhu Isor upạrteko kạiyeda.” Uniye menkeda, “Ape do bepạtiạrkope hoyakana. Do, begor bilomte mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ dhiri nonḍe giṛgạu ạguiype.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Hoṛko talare senkatepe metakoa onko do jemon akoren phẽṭaṛ se bheḍa nonḍe iń ṭhen ạgukateko gurkoma ar ona tayomko jomma. Mãyãm sudhạ jel jomkate okoehõ jemon Probhu Isor upạrte aloko kại.” Ar enhilokʼ hoṛko do akoren phẽṭaṛ ạgukate onḍeko gurketʼkoa." 
1Samuel14:35 Ar Sạul do Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda. Ar onage Probhu Isor ńutumte uniyakʼ benaoakʼ pạhil pinḍ hoyena. 
1Samuel14:36 Tayomte Sạule menkeda, “Dela bon, teheń ńindạ do Philisṭiko bon lagakoa ar setakʼ hạbicʼ onkoakʼ jinisko bon luṭtakoa. Onkoren mitʼṭen hõ jiwetʼ do babon dohokoa.” Hoṛkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am okaṭakʼ bhagem hudisetʼ ona baṛe onkaeme.” Menkhan naekeye menkeda, “Dela bon, abo do pạhilre Isor ṭhen bon kuliyange.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Unre Sạul do Isore kulikedea, “Iń do cetʼ Philisṭikoń laga ńirkoa? Onko do cetʼ Israelkoakʼ tirem jimạkoa?” Enhilokʼ Isor do Sạul cetʼge bae roṛ ruạṛadea." 
1Samuel14:38 Ona iạte Sạule menkeda, “Lạṛhại dolren mukhiyạko, dela nonḍe hijukʼpe. Teheńakʼ niạ kại do cekate hoyena, ona reakʼ khoj khobor bon hataoa." 
1Samuel14:39 Israelkoren babańcaoicʼ jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, ińren hopon Jonathan hõ onae onka akatʼ khan khạṭige uni hõ gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea.” Menkhan hoṛko do jotoge hape akanko tahẽyena." 
1Samuel14:40 Sạul do unre sanam Israelkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do mitʼ secʼre teṅgokʼpe, iń ar ińren hopon Jonathan tạliń do eṭakʼ secʼre liń teṅgokʼa.” Hoṛkoko menkeda am okaṭakʼ bhagem hudisetʼ onage onkaeme.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Unre Sạul do Israelkoren Probhu Isore metadea, “Niạ reakʼ roṛ ruạṛaleme baṛe.” Ar unre Sạulren hopon Jonathan cetanre dos do paṛaoena ar sarecʼ hoṛko do chaṛko ńamkeda." 
1Samuel14:42 Sạule menkeda, “Iń ar ińren hopon Sạul talare gulibãṭ hoyokʼma.” Ar onate dos do Jonathan cetanre paṛaoena." 
1Samuel14:43 Sạul do unre Jonathane metadea, “Lạiạńme, am do cetʼem ceka akada?” Jonathan do uniye metadea, “Ińakʼ ṭheṅga agalte thoṛagan dumur rasań jomakada, ar onate cetʼ iń do gujukʼ hoyokʼtińạ?”" 
1Samuel14:44 Sạule menkeda, “Hẽ Jonathan, am do gujukʼtege hoyokʼtama. Isor do am sạjạiye emamma, ar khạṭige sạjạiye emama.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Menkhan hoṛko do Sạulko metadea, “Okoe iạte Israelko niạ maraṅ bańcaoko ńamakatʼ uni Jonathan do cetʼ gujukʼ hoyokʼtea? Tisge baṅa; jiwetʼ Isor ńutumtele kiriạkʼ kana, uniyakʼ mitʼṭecʼ upʼ hõ otre do baṅ ńurokʼtaea, ente uni teheń okae ceka akatʼ ona do Isor sãote tahẽkategeye onka akada.” Nonkate hoṛko do Jonathanko rukhiyạkedea, ar uni do bae gocʼ ocolena." 
1Samuel14:46 Inạ tayom Sạul do ar Philisṭiko bae khudạuletʼkoa, ar Philisṭiko hõ akoakʼ disạmteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Samuel14:47 Sạul do Israelkoren raj hoyen tayom disạm beṛhaeten sanam bạiriko sãote, metakʼme Moabrenko, Amonrenko, Edomrenko, Sobaren rajko ar Philisṭiko sãoteye lạṛhạilena. Ar jãhã secʼge uniye calakʼkan tahẽkan onḍege ạḍiye khutiketʼtakoa." 
1Samuel14:48 Uni do birbanṭa leka lạṛhạikate Amalekikoe bhagaoketʼkoa ar luluṭkoakʼ ti khon Israelkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa. 
1Samuel14:49 Jonathan, Jesbi ar Molkisui ńutuman Sạulren do pe hoponko tahẽkantaea. Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponeratakʼ ńutum do Merob ar huḍińicʼ hoponeratakʼ ńutum do Mikhal tahẽkana." 
1Samuel14:50 Uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Ahinoạm tahẽkana. Uni do Ahimasren hoponerae tahẽkana. Sạulren maraṅ subedarakʼ ńutum do Abner tahẽkana. Uni do Sạulren kakattetʼ Nerren hopone tahẽkana. 
1Samuel14:51 Sạulren apat Kis ar Abnerren apat Ner do Abiyelren hoponkin tahẽkana. 
1Samuel14:52 Sạulakʼ rajokʼ oktere Philisṭiko sãote maraṅ lạṛhại hoylena. Jãhãe daṛean hoṛ se birbanṭa herel hoṛe ńelle khange uni do lạṛhại phạdreye hataoedekan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel15:1 Sạmuel do Sạule metadea, “Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛ Israelko cetanre raj hudạre bahale lạgitʼ ińe kolledińạ. Ńitokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ kathare luturakʼme." 
1Samuel15:2 Sanam daṛean Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Israelko tinre Misor khonko oḍokʼ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Amalekiko do onko upạrteko teṅgolente onko doń sạjạikoa." 
1Samuel15:3 Ńitokʼ am do senkate Amalekiko tulucʼ lạṛhạime ar onkoakʼ cetʼko menakʼ ona jotowakʼem marao giḍikatakoa; onko do alom dayawakoa. Onkoren herel ar maejiuko, koṛa ar-kuṛi gidrạko, toa ńuńukan gidrạko, ḍaṅgra-biḍhiko, ũṭko, gadhako jotom gocʼ cabakoa.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Unre Sạul do Telayim nagrahare hoṛkoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. Onate Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ lekha do bar lakh ar Jihudạ gusṭiren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ lekha do gel hajar hoyena. 
1Samuel15:5 Sạul do Amalekikoakʼ nagraha ṭhen senkate onḍe rohoṛ gaḍa ṭhene tãṛãkʼ tahẽyena. 
1Samuel15:6 Uni do Kenikoe metatʼkoa, “Israelko tinre Misor khonko oḍok hecʼlena unre ape do onkope dayawatʼko tahẽkana. Onate ape do Amalekiko tala khon eṭakʼ secʼ calao joṅpe, jemon Amalekiko sãote aloń marao giḍipe.” Unre Keniko do Amalekiko tala khonko oḍok calaoena." 
1Samuel15:7 Sạul do unre Hewila ṭoṭha khon Misor purub secʼ Sur hahaṅkar ṭoṭha hạbicʼ sanam Amalekikoe bhagaoketʼkoa. 
1Samuel15:8 Amalekikoren Og raj do jiwetʼteye sapʼkedea ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko doe marao cabaketʼkoa. 
1Samuel15:9 Menkhan Sạul ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do Og jiwetʼko dohokedea ar Amalekikoren mońj mońj ḍaṅgrako, bheḍako, bạchurko ar bheḍa hoponko, metakʼme cetʼko bhageakʼ tahẽkan ona joto doko dohoana. Onako marao giḍikakʼ do bako rạjilena, menkhan okạjwạ ar rogako doko marao giḍikatʼkoa." 
1Samuel15:10 Unre Probhu Isor do niạ katha Sạmuel ṭhene sodorkeda," 
1Samuel15:11 “Sạul do ińakʼ monduk reakʼe hoyakana, ente uni do iń ṭhen khone pharak akana ar ińakʼ hukume bebatao akada.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Sạmuel doe khĩsena ar goṭa ńindạ Probhu Isor ṭhene rakʼ aṅgakeda." 
1Samuel15:12 Ar dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate Sạul sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. Uni do onḍeko lạiyadea, Sạul do Karmel burure acʼakʼ manotakʼ lạgitʼ onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benaokate Gilgolteye senakana." 
1Samuel15:13 Unre Sạmuel do Sạul ṭhene senena. Khan Sạul do uniye metadea, “Probhu Isore bhoram ma. Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumiń batao akada.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Sạmuele menkeda, “Enḍekhan bheḍawakʼ rakʼ do ińakʼ luturre cekate hijukʼ kana? Ar gại-ḍaṅgrawakʼ bhokraokʼ hõ cekateń ańjometʼkana?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Sạule roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Onko do Amalekiko ṭhen khonko ạguakana. Amren Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ iạtege lạṛhại phạdko do mońj mońj ḍaṅgra ar bheḍako dohoakatʼkoa; tobe sarecʼakʼ jotowakʼ dole marao giḍi akada.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Sạmuel do unre Sạule metadea, “Thirkokʼme. Calaoen ńindạ Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe men akawạdiń onań lạiyama.” Sạule menkeda, “Ma lạiyạńme.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Sạmuele menkeda, “Mitʼ din am do amakʼ nońjorre huḍińicʼem tahẽkana, menkhan enrehõ cetʼ Israelkoakʼ sanam gusṭikoren matha do bam hoyakana? Probhu Isorge Israel disạm cetanre raj lekateye ojokʼ bahalketʼmea." 
1Samuel15:18 Uni do mitʼṭecʼ kạmi lạgitʼe kolletʼmea are metatʼme tahẽkana, ‘am do senkate kạiyanko, metakʼme Amalekikom marao giḍikakoa. Onko ạuriko ḍahao maraokʼ hạbicʼ onko tulucʼem lạṛhạiya.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Am do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum cedakʼ bam ańjomleda? Am do cedakʼ luṭakʼ jinisko cetanre jhãpem emkeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onam kạmikeda?” 
1Samuel15:20 Sạule menkeda, “Menkhan iń do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumiń batao akada. Oka kạmi lạgitʼ Probhu Isore kolledeń onageń kạmi akada. Iń do Amalekikoń marao utạr akatʼkoa ar onkoren raj Og doń sapʼ ạguakadea." 
1Samuel15:21 Ar ḍahao maraoakʼ jinisko khon lạṛhại phạdko do thoṛa mońj mońj ḍaṅgra ar bheḍako ạguakatʼkoa, jemon Gilgolre amren Probhu Isor ńutumte onkoko samaṅ daṛeako.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Unre Sạmuele menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ hukumpe batao lekhan uni tinạkʼe kusikʼ, unạkʼ do jeredokʼakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar janwar samaṅokʼakʼte bae kusikʼa. Janwar samaṅokʼakʼ khon uniyakʼ hukum manao ar bheḍawakʼ itil khon uniyakʼ katha bataotaege ḍher bhagea." 
1Samuel15:23 Huhul ar gunidari kạmi do inạ mitʼ lekan kạikangea; bebatao ar boṅga sewa hõ inạ lekan kại kangea. Am do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bam batao akatʼte uni hõ am do raj lekateye nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼmea.” 
1Samuel15:24 Unre Sạul do Sạmuele metadea, “Iń doń kại akada. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum ar amakʼ kathako bạń manao akada. Hoṛko botorte iń do onkoakʼ katha lekageń kạmi akada." 
1Samuel15:25 Ńitokʼ ińre dayakʼte ińakʼ kại baṛe ikạ kạtińme, ar iń sãote calakʼme jemon iń do Probhu Isoriń sewa daṛeae.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Menkhan Sạmuel do uniye metadea, “Am sãote do bạń calakʼa. Am do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumem bebatao akatʼte Probhu hõ Israelkoren raj lekateye nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼmea.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Niạ menkate Sạmuel do calakʼ lạgitʼe ạcuren khan Sạul do uniyakʼ kicricʼ ańcare sapʼketʼtaea; ar onate uniyakʼ kicricʼ do oṛecʼentaea. 
1Samuel15:28 Unre Sạmuel do uniye metadea, “Probhu Isor do teheń am ṭhen khon Israelkoakʼ rajosṭi hõ nonkageye recʼ hataokeda ar am khon hõ bhage amakʼ disạmren mitʼ hoṛe emadea." 
1Samuel15:29 Okoe doe Israelkoren ṭhonokicʼ kan uni do eṛe katha bae roṛa se mon hõ bae bodoltaea. Uni do manwa doe baṅ kana, onate mone bodoltaea mente.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Sạule menkeda, “Iń doń kại akada; enhõ ińakʼ nehõr do niạge, iń jạtren murubbiko ar Israelko samaṅre ińakʼ manot baṛe dohoytińme. Jemon iń do amren Probhu Isorriń sewa daṛeae onate iń sãote dela calakʼme.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Onate Sạmuel do Sạul sãoteye senena ar Sạul do Probhu Isore sewawadea. 
1Samuel15:32 Tayomte Sạmuele menkeda, “Amalekikoren Og raj do iń ṭhen ạguiyepe. Niạ katha ańjomkate Og do ladacʼ luducʼ Samuel ṭhene hecʼena. Uni doe hudiskeda gujukʼ reakʼ haso ńitokʼ do ar bạnukʼa." 
1Samuel15:33 Menkhan Sạmuele menkeda, “Amakʼ tarwaṛete ḍher maejiukoren hoponko gocʼ ocoakan onkage maejiuko talare eṅgamren hopon hõe adokʼtaea.” Ar niạ katha menkate Sạmuel do Gilgolre Probhu Isor samaṅre Og raj doe samakʼ khanḍa khunḍikedea." 
1Samuel15:34 Ona tayom uni do Ramoteye ruạṛ calaoena ar Sạul do Gibeat-Sạul nagrahateye ruạṛena. 
1Samuel15:35 Sạmuel tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din uni do Sạul sãote ar bae ńapamlena. Israelko cetanre Sạule rajkedete Probhu Isorakʼ duk reakʼe hoylente Sạmuel do uni lạgitʼe dukokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel16:1 Probhu Isor do Sạmuele metadea, “Sạul do Israelkoren raj mente doń nihạ̃t giḍiakadea, onate am do ar tinạkʼ din uni lạgitʼem dukokʼa? Am do ńitokʼ dereńre sunum hataokate oḍokokʼme. Ente iń do Bethlehem atoren Jisại ṭheniń kolmea. Uniren hoponko mod khon iń ńutumte mitʼṭen raj hoyokʼ lạgitʼ iń bachao dohoakadea.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Sạmuele menkeda, “Cekate iń doń calakʼa? Sạul niạ kathae ańjom lekhan uni do khạṭigeye gocʼ giḍikạńạ.” Probhu Isore menkeda, “Am do mitʼṭen phẽṭaṛ mĩhũm iditorayea arem mena, Probhu isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼem hecʼakana." 
1Samuel16:3 Ar ona samaṅokʼakʼem samaṅ jokhecʼ Jisạiyem neotaea. Ona tayom cetʼ cekae hoyokʼtama onań lạiyama. Ar okoeyakʼ kathań lạiyam unige iń ńutumtem ojokʼ bahalea.” 
1Samuel16:4 Sạmuel do Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekageye kạmikeda. Ar tinre Bethlehemteye seṭerena unre atoren murubbiko do botorte thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ uni sãote ńapamokʼko oḍok hecʼena. Onko doko kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ suluk montegem hecʼakana?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Sạmuele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, iń do suluk montegeń hecʼakana. Iń do Probhu Isor ńutumte janwar samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼgeń hecʼakana. Ape do sonotokʼpe iń sãote niạ samaṅokʼakʼre seledokʼpe.” Niạ menkate uni do Jisại ar uniren hoponkoe sonot ocoketʼkoa ar ona samaṅokʼakʼre seledokʼ lạgitʼe neotaketʼkoa." 
1Samuel16:6 Onkoko hecʼen khan Sạmuel do Eliabe ńelkede khan mon monteye menkeda khạṭige Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ hoṛ do acʼ samaṅreye teṅgo akana. 
1Samuel16:7 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Sạmuele metadea, “Uniyakʼ rup se tinạkʼe usula ona do alom ńela, ente uni doń nihạ̃t akadea. Manwa okaṭakʼe ńel onate do jãhãnakʼ do baṅ cekakʼa, ente manwa do bahre rupko ńela menkhan Probhu Isor do ontorgeye ńeleda.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Ona tayom Jisại do Abinadabe hohoadete Samuel samaṅteye taṛam ocokedea. Sạmuele menkeda, “Probhu Isor do nui hõ bae bachao akadea.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Ona tayom Jisại do Samae uni samaṅreye taṛam ocokedea; menkhan Samuele menkeda, “Probhu Isor do nui hõ bae bachao akawana.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Nonkate Jisại do acʼren eae goṭen hoponko Sạmuel samaṅteye taṛam ocoketʼkoa, menkhan Sạmuel do Jisạiye metadea, “Probhu Isor do noko modren okoe hõ bae bachao akawana.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Ona tayom uni do Jisạiye kulikedea, “Noko chaḍa cetʼ ar koṛa do bạnukʼkotama?” Jisạiye menkeda, “Jotoko khon huḍińicʼ sarecʼ menaea; uni do bhiḍikoe gupikana.” Sạmuele menkeda, “Hoṛ kolkate nonḍe hoho ạguiyem. Ar ạuriye hijukʼ hạbicʼ jojom do babon duṛupʼa.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Onate Jisại do hoṛ kolkate acʼren huḍiń utạricʼ hopone hoho ạgukedea. Uni do juruṅ juruṅ arakʼgeye tahẽkana ar ńelokʼte hõ mońj ar mẽtʼkin hõ ạḍi napae tahẽkantaea. Unre Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Nui kangeae uni do, am do unige ojokʼ bahalem.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Unre Sạmuel do dereń reakʼ sunumante uniren boehako talareye ojokʼkedea. Ar enhilokʼ khon Probhu Isorren Jiu do Dạud cetanreye hecʼena. Inạ tayom Sạmuel do Ramoteye ruạṛ senena. 
1Samuel16:14 Unre Probhu Isorren Jiu do Sạule bạgiyadea ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ jiu hecʼkate maraṅ botor udukʼaye ehopʼena. 
1Samuel16:15 Ona ńelte Sạulren kạmiyạko do uniko metadea, “Isor ṭhen khon mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ jiu hecʼkate am do maraṅ botore udukʼam kana." 
1Samuel16:16 E aleren mạlik, am samaṅre jarwa akan noko golamko hukum akome jemon senkate nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛko sendra ạguiye okoe do bhage peṛesaṅe banam daṛeakʼ. Ar tinre uni bạṛicʼ jiu do Isor ṭhen khone hijukʼa unre uni do peṛesaṅe banama ar onate mońjem ạikạua.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Onate Sạul do acʼren kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Enḍekhan nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛ sendra ńamepe okoe do bhage peṛesaṅe banam daṛeakʼ ar iń ṭhenpe ạguiyea.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Uniren kạmiyạko modre mitʼ hoṛe menkeda, “Iń do Bethlehemre Jisạiren mitʼṭen hoponiń ńelakadea. Uni do ạḍi bhage peṛesaṅe banam daṛeakʼa. Uni do mitʼṭen dilan bir hõ kanae. Ar ạḍi napae kathae roṛa ar ńelokʼte hõe napaegea, ar Probhu Isor do uni sãote menaea.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Niạ katha ańjomkate Sạul do Jisại ṭhen hoṛ kolkateye roṛgotʼkada jemon uni do acʼren koṛa Dạud acʼ ṭhene kolkae. 
1Samuel16:20 Unre Jisại do jauḍicʼ piṭhạ, harta reakʼ thulire darkha rasa ar mitʼṭen merom hopon noako mitʼṭen gadhareye ladekeda ar acʼren koṛa Dạud do Sạul ṭhene kolkadea." 
1Samuel16:21 Dạud do Sạul ṭhene hecʼen khan acʼakʼ kạmireye dohokedea. Ar Sạul do uni ạḍitetʼe dulạṛede tahẽkana ar Sạulren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼe hoyena. 
1Samuel16:22 Unre Sạul do Jisại ṭhen kathae kolgotʼkada, “Dạud do ińakʼ kạmirege dhurạu akae tahẽocoaeme, ente uni do ạḍiń kusi akawadea.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Isor ṭhen khon tinre uni bạṛicʼ jiu do Sạul cetanreye hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Dạud do acʼakʼ peṛesaṅe banametʼ tahẽkana. Nonkate Sạul do ạḍi mońje ạikạuetʼ tahẽkana ar suluke ńametʼ tahẽkana, ar uni bạṛicʼ jiu hõ uni khone ocokʼ calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:1 Philisṭiko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdkoko jarwaketʼkote Jihudạ gusṭirenkoakʼ Sokoteko senena. Onko do onḍe senkate Soko ar Aseka tala reakʼ Ephesdamin atoreko ḍerayena. 
1Samuel17:2 Sạul ar Israelko hõ jarwakate Ela lodamreko ḍerayena ar Philisṭi sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdkoko sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
1Samuel17:3 Unre Philisṭiko do mitʼ secʼ reakʼ burure ar Israelko do eṭakʼ secʼ reakʼ burureko teṅgoyena. Ona talare do Ela buru nala tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:4 Philisṭiren Guliạt ńutuman mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛ do onkoakʼ lạṛhại phạd khone oḍok hecʼena. Uni do Gat nagraharen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni do usulte turui moka talae tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:5 Uniyakʼ bohokʼre do pitạl reakʼ tupri tahẽkana ar hoṛmore do hako cuạ̃kʼ leka pitạl reakʼ aṅgrop tahẽkantaea, ona reakʼ ojon do turuigel keji tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:6 Uni do gunṭhi khon iḍi hạbicʼ pitạlte esetʼ tahẽkantaea, ar tarenre do pitạl reakʼ tarwaṛe tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:7 Uniyakʼ borlom ṭheṅga do kicricʼ teteńkoakʼ turleka tahẽkana ar ona coelo mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ hamal do eae keji barsae tahẽkana. Ar uniyakʼ ḍhal asenicʼ do uni laha lahateye calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:8 Ar Goliạt do teṅgokate ãṭ aṛaṅte Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdkoe metatʼkoa, “Lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdko do cedakʼpe sajao akatʼkoa? Iń do mitʼṭen Philisṭi hoṛ kạnạń ar ape ma eken Sạulren gutikanpe. Ape modkhon mitʼ hoṛ bachaoepe; ar uni do iń ṭhene pheḍ hijukʼma." 
1Samuel17:9 Ar iń tulucʼ lạṛhạikate ińe gocʼ daṛeạń khan ale do aperen golamle hoyokʼa; menkhan bae gocʼ daṛeạń enḍekhan ape do aleren golamkope hoyokʼa ar aleakʼpe kạmiya.” 
1Samuel17:10 Uni Philisṭi hoṛ do arhõe menkeda, “Iń do teheń Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdko ṭiṭkạrikateń metape kana, iń sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hoṛ emokʼpe.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Uniyakʼ noako katha ańjomkate Sạul ar eṭakʼ Israelko do ạḍi botor caṛhaoatʼkoa. 
1Samuel17:12 Dạudren apattetʼ Jisại do Jihudạ ṭoṭha reakʼ Ephrath, metakʼme Bethlehem atoreye girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Uniren do irạl goṭen koṛako tahẽkantaea. Ar Sạul rajokʼ oktere uni doe haṛam akan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:13 Jisạiren hoponko modre pạhilko pene hoṛ do Sạul sãore tahẽkate lạṛhại lạgitʼko calaolena. Ar okoeko lạṛhại lạgitʼko senlen onko modren maraṅicʼakʼ ńutum do Eliab, dosaricʼ do Abinadab ar tesaricʼakʼ ńutum do Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 Uniren hoponko modre Dạud do jotoko khon huḍiń utạricʼe tahẽkana. Ar pạhilko pene hoṛ do Sạul sãoteko senlena," 
1Samuel17:15 menkhan Dạud do Sạul ṭhene tahẽkana, ar apattetʼren bhiḍiko ạtińko lạgitʼ hõ Bethlehemteye calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:16 Onko Philisṭiko do pongel din hạbicʼ dinạm hilokʼ siń cando rakabokʼ ar hạsurokʼ jokhecʼ oḍok hecʼkateko ńel ocokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:17 Mitʼ din Jisại do acʼren hopon Dạude metadea, “Dadamteko lạgitʼ niạ gel irạl keji ata anaj ar niạ gel goṭen piṭhạ usạrate lạṛhại phạd reakʼ ḍerate idime," 
1Samuel17:18 ar niạ gel goṭecʼ ceṛa chale do hajar cetankoren subedarko lạgitʼ idime. Ar amren dadamteko cetʼleka menakʼkoa ona ńel ạguiyme ar onko ṭhen khon jãhãnakʼ cinhạ ạgu daraeme. 
1Samuel17:19 Sạul ar amren dadamteko ar sanam Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdko do Ela otetre menakʼkoa ar Philisṭiko sãoteko lạṛhại kana.” 
1Samuel17:20 Dạud do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate mitʼṭen gupiyicʼ ṭhen acʼren bhiḍiko reakʼ bhare emadea. Ona tayom Jisạiakʼ hukum leka joto jinisko hataokateye mohnḍayena. Uni do tinre ḍera ṭhene seṭerena unre Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do rạgạu hohoate sạr sạrteko oḍok hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:21 Israelko ar Philisṭiko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ samna sạmni akoren lạṛhại phạdkoko sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
1Samuel17:22 Unre Dạud do acʼakʼ jinisko horhoicʼ ṭhen doho oṭokate lạṛhại phạdko talareye ńir boloyente dadatetʼtako boge judại kuli baṛeketʼkoa. 
1Samuel17:23 Uni do tinre dadattetʼtako sãote kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre Gat nagraharen uni Philisṭi bir banṭa Guliạt do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko khon oḍok hecʼkate lahate lekage katha roroṛe ehopʼena, ar Dạud do uniye ńelkedea." 
1Samuel17:24 Ar Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do uni hoṛ ńelte botorte uni samaṅ khonko ńir pharakena. 
1Samuel17:25 Israelkoko roṛetʼ tahẽkana, “Uni hoṛ okoe do ghane ghạṛicʼe oḍok hijukʼkan, uni mape ńelekange? Uni do Israelkoe ṭiṭkạriyetʼkoa. Uni hoṛ jãhãegeye gocʼ daṛeae enḍekhan raj do uni hoṛ ạḍi utạr dhon-duribe emaea. Ar acʼren hoponera hõ uni sãoteye baplakaea ar Israel disạmre uniyakʼ gharońjrenko do khajna ar rajakʼ eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge emokʼ baṅ lagaoaea.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Okoeko hoṛ sorreko teṅgo akan tahẽkan Dạud do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Uni Philisṭi gocʼkate Israelko cetan khon niạ henostae ocokʼ lekhan uni do cetʼ cekawaea? Ar nui bin khanta akan Philisṭi doe cele kante jiwetʼ Isorren lạṛhại phạdkoe henostawako kana?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Onate hoṛ okako roṛetʼkan tahẽkan onkageko baḍae ocokedea, jãhãege uni Philisṭi hoṛe gocʼle khan uni do cetʼko cekawaea mente." 
1Samuel17:28 Dạudren maraṅicʼ boeha Eliab do hoṛko sãote uniyakʼ galmaraoe ańjomketʼ khane raṅgaoena. Uni doe metadea, “Nonḍe do cedakʼem hecʼakana? Hahaṅkarre bhiḍiko do okoe jimạrem bạgi oṭoakawatʼkoa? Amakʼ bạḍại ar dusṭami reakʼ katha doń baḍaegea. Am do lạṛhại ńeńelgem hecʼakana?”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dạud doe menkeda, “Iń do cetʼ iń ceka akatʼte? Iń ma ekeniń kuliakawan.”" 
1Samuel17:30 Niạ menkate uni do eṭakʼ hoṛko ṭhen senkate inạ kathageye kuliketʼkoa ar hoṛko do lahate lekageko roṛ ruạṛadea. 
1Samuel17:31 Dạud okae menketʼ eṭakʼko do ona ańjomkate Sạulko baḍae ocokedea. Unre Sạul do uniye hohowadea. 
1Samuel17:32 Dạud do Sạule metadea, “Uni Philisṭi ńelte okoeyakʼ mon hõ alo andesalekʼma. Amren golam doe senokʼa ar uni sãoteye lạṛhạiya.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Sạule menkeda, “Am do uni Philisṭi sãote cekatem lạṛhạiya? Ente am dom chokragea, ar uni Philisṭi do chokra khonge mitʼṭen lạṛhại bir kanae.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Dạud do Sạule metadea, “Amren golam do acʼ apatren bhiḍikoe gupikoa. Unre jãhãn dhạcri kul se bana hecʼkate pal khon bhiḍiye ạtkirko tahẽkanre iń do ńir senkate dal gocʼkate uniyakʼ moca khon ińren bhiḍikoń rukhiyạyetʼko tahẽkana. Ar ińe teṅgo daramliń khan iń do uniyakʼ goco sapʼkateń humạkʼede tahẽkana ariń gojekan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:35  
1Samuel17:36 Dhạcri kul ar banako do amren golamakʼ tite cetʼlekako gocʼ ocoakan, onkage nui bin khatna akan Philisṭi hoṛakʼ dosa hõ hoyokʼtaea, ente uni do jiwetʼ Isorren lạṛhại phạdkoe henosta akatʼkoa.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Dạud do arhõe menkeda, “Probhu Isor, okoe do dhạcri kul ar banako khone rukhiyạ akadiń, unige uni Philisṭi hoṛ khone rukhiyạyińạ.” Unre Sạul do Dạude metadea, “Enḍekhan do calakʼme, Probhu Isor do am sãoteye tahenma.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Noa menkate Sạul do acʼakʼ lạṛhại posak Dạude horokʼadea. Uni do bohokʼre pitạl reakʼ ṭupri ar hoṛmore do mẽṛhẽtʼ aṅgrope horokʼadea. 
1Samuel17:39 Dạud do acʼakʼ lạṛhại sanaphana cetanre Sạulakʼ tarwaṛeye tolana ar taṛam reakʼe kurumuṭukeda, ente noa lahare tishõ uni do bae hewa akan tahẽkana. Uni do Sạule metadea, “Niạko horokʼkate do bạń sen daṛeakʼa, ente noa lahare tisge bạń horokʼakada. Ar noa menkate uni do onakoe totʼ giḍikada." 
1Samuel17:40 Ona tayom uni do acʼakʼ ṭheṅgae hataokeda ar jharna soḍokʼ khon mõṛẽ goṭecʼ cĩkạ̃ṛ cĩkạ̃ṛ dhiriye bachaoante acʼakʼ gukʼpi jholareye dohokeda. Nonkan jhola do eken gukʼpigeko beoharetʼ tahẽkana. Ar ona tayom do acʼakʼ ginḍwạri sapʼkate uni Philisṭi hoṛ secʼe laha idiyena. 
1Samuel17:41 Uni Philisṭi hõ Dạud secʼ sor hijukʼe ehopʼena. Ar uniren ḍhal asenicʼ do uni samaṅ samaṅteye hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:42 Uni Philisṭi do Dạud secʼe beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan uniye chibaṅadea, ente Dạudakʼ umer do komge tahẽkantaea. Ar ńelokʼte uni do ruṅ ruṅ arakʼ ar mońjgeye tahẽkana." 
1Samuel17:43 Goliạt do Dạude metadea, “Iń do cetʼ seta kạnạń onate ṭheṅgawante iń ṭhenem hijukʼkana?” Uni do acʼren debotako ńutumte Dạude sarapadea." 
1Samuel17:44 Uni do Dạud arhõe metadea, “Dela hijukʼme; amakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jel do coṭren uḍạukʼ cẽṛẽko ar bir janwarkoń jom ocokoa.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Unre Dạud do uni Philisṭiye metadea, “Am do tarwaṛe, borlom ar chorawante iń ṭhenem hijukʼkana, menkhan iń do phạdkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte am ṭheniń hijukʼ kana, one okoe dom henosta akawade." 
1Samuel17:46 Teheńge Probhu Isor do ińakʼ tireye soprotmea. Ar iń do amiń bhindạṛmea ar bohokʼ iń makʼ kuṭrạitama. Ar teheńge Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽko ar otren janwarkoń jom ocokoa. Ona ńelte dhạrtiren sanamgeko baḍae daṛeakʼa, Israelkoren do mitʼṭen Isor menaetakoa." 
1Samuel17:47 Ar tinạkʼ hoṛ nonḍe menakʼko onko hõko baḍae daṛeakʼa, tarwaṛe se borlomte Probhu Isor do bae bańcaoa, ente niạ lạṛhại do Probhu Isorakʼ kangea; ar uni do aleakʼ tireye jimạpea.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Uni Philisṭi hoṛ do tinre Dạud darame lạgitʼe laha hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Dạud hõ uni ṭhen lạṛhại thạrko secʼe ńir laha idiyena," 
1Samuel17:49 ar acʼakʼ jhola khon mitʼṭecʼ dhiriye hataoketʼte ginḍwạrireye dohokeda ar ghiriạ ghiriạte uni Philisṭi hoṛ do cạndireye capatʼkedea ar ona do uniyakʼ cạndire gạḍiạuena. Ar dhiriteye josen são sãote uni Philisṭi hoṛ do taberte otreye bhindạṛena. 
1Samuel17:50 Unre Dạud do ńir senkate uni Philisṭi hoṛakʼ tarwaṛe bocʼkate uniye gocʼkedea ar uniyakʼ bohokʼe makʼ kuṭrạketʼtaea. Nonkate Dạud do eken ginḍwạri ar mitʼṭecʼ dhirite uni Philisṭiye bhagaokedea. Uniyakʼ tire jãhãn tarwaṛe baṅ tahẽkanre hõ uni do Philisṭi hoṛe ńẽtʼkedea are gocʼkedea. Philisṭiko tinreko ńelkeda akoren birbão hoṛe gocʼena unre onko do dạdạṛko ehopʼena. 
1Samuel17:51  
1Samuel17:52 Unre Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛ do ridgạu menteko hohokeda ar Philisṭiko Gat ar Ekron hạbicʼko laga idiketʼkoa. Onate Philisṭikoren ghạl akan hoṛ do Sarayim khon Gat ar Ekron hạbicʼko gocʼena. 
1Samuel17:53 Ar Israelko do khudạu khonko ruạṛen tayom onkoakʼ ḍerako luṭketʼtakoa. 
1Samuel17:54 Dạud do uni Philisṭi Goliạtakʼ bohokʼ Jerusalemteye idikeda, ar uniyakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa ar lạṛhại reakʼ sanaphana do acʼakʼ tạmbureye dohokada." 
1Samuel17:55 Dạud do uni Philisṭi sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ calakʼe ńelkede khan Sạul do acʼren subedar Abnere kulikedea, “Henda abner, nui doe okoeren hopon kana?” Abnere roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E moharaj, amakʼ jiwi jiwetʼ lekage, iń do ohoń lại daṛelea.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Unre raje menkeda, “Khoj hataome uni koṛa doe okoeren hopon kana.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Ona tayom Dạud do uni Philisṭi hoṛ gocʼkateye ruạṛ hecʼen khan Abner do Sạul ṭhene idikedea. Unre Goliạtakʼ bohokʼ do uniyakʼ tire tahẽkana. 
1Samuel17:58 Sạul do uniye kulikedea, “E bạbu, am dom okoeren hopon kana?” Dạude menkeda, “Iń do Bethlehem atoren amren golam Jisạiren hopon kạnạń.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Sạul tulucʼ Dạudakʼ galmaro mucạtʼen khan Jonathanakʼ jiwi do Dạudakʼ jiwi tulucʼ tolentaea. Onate Jonathan do acʼakʼ jiwi leka Dạude dulạṛkedea. 
1Samuel18:2 Ar enhilokʼ khon Sạul do Dạud acʼ ṭhene dohokedea; uniren apat ṭhen do ar bae sen ruạṛ ocowadea. 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathan do acʼakʼ jiwi leka Dạude dulạṛkedete uni tulucʼ mitʼṭecʼe bondoboskeda. 
1Samuel18:4 Uni do acʼakʼ aṅgrop bocʼkate Dạude horokʼadea, ar acʼakʼ lạṛhại reakʼ sapapʼakʼ, acʼakʼ tarwaṛe, acʼak akʼ-sar ar ḍanḍa paṭhekʼakʼ hõe emadea." 
1Samuel18:5 Ar Sạul do Dạud jãhãtegeye kolkaekan tahẽkan onḍegeye calakʼkan tahẽkana ar bud salakʼe kạmi purạuetʼ tahẽkana. Ona iạte Dạud do lạṛhạiko cetanreye dohokedea. Onate sanam hoṛ do unireko kusiyena ar onko sãote Sạulren kạmiyạko hõ. 
1Samuel18:6 Dạud do uni Philisṭi Goliạte gocʼkede tayom tinre hoṛko oṛakʼteko ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Israelkoakʼ sanam nagrahako khon maejiuko do enecʼate, tabla ru rute ar peṛesaṅ banam banamate Sạul darame lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena." 
1Samuel18:7 Onko do enecʼ enecʼte niạko sereńkeda, “Sạul doe gocʼketʼkoa hajarke hajar, Dạud doe gocʼketʼkoa ojute ojut.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Niạ sereń ańjomkate Sạul do ạḍiye edreyena. Uni do bekusiteye menkeda, “Dạud reaṅ onko do ojute ojutko meneda menkhan iń reaṅ do hajarke hajar. Niạ tayom Dạud do rajosṭi ńam chaḍa ar cetʼ sarecʼ tahẽyentaea?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Ar inạ tayom khon Sạul do Dạud hiskạwaeye ehopʼena. 
1Samuel18:10 Dosar hilokʼ Isor ṭhen khon mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ jiu do hecʼkate Sạul cetanreye jãpaṛena. Onate uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼre bhitrireye chaṭ paṭao baṛaekan tahẽkana. Ar Dạud do eṭakʼ dinko leka uni samaṅre peṛesaṅ baname ehopʼena. Unre Sạulakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼ borlom tahẽkana. 
1Samuel18:11 Uni do mone moneteye menkeda, “Dạud do bhitreń sobokʼ jaladea.” Ar niạ menkate borlome sohoradea, menkhan Dạud do bar dom uni samaṅ khone aḍena." 
1Samuel18:12 Sạul do Dạud botoraeye ehopʼena, ente Probhu Isor do Dạud sãoteye tahẽkana menkhan Sạul khon doe sahaṛ akan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel18:13 Ona iạte Sạul do acʼ ṭhen khon Dạude pharakkedea ar hajarko cetanre subedare bahalkedea. Onate Dạud do lạṛhại phạdkoren mukhiyại hoyena ar disạm hoṛko samaṅreye oḍok bolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel18:14 Probhu Isor do uni sãoteye tahẽkante jotowakʼrege bud salakʼ kạmikateye jo bahakʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel18:15 Ar Dạud do sanamakʼ kạmiregeye jo bahakʼ kana menteye ńelketʼ khan Sạul do uni botoraye ehopʼena. 
1Samuel18:16 Menkhan Israel ar Jihudạren sanam hoṛ do Dạudko dulạṛede tahẽkana, ente lạṛhại phạdkoren mukhiyại hoyente disạm hoṛko talareye bolo oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel18:17 Mitʼdin Sạul do Dạude metadea, “Ińren maraṅicʼ hoponera Merab do am sãoteń baplakaea. Onate am do eken iń secʼ khon birbanṭa leka Probhu Isor lạgitʼ lạṛhạime.” Sạul do Dạud cetanre acʼakʼ ti rakabtae bae menetʼ tahẽkanre hõ Philisṭikoakʼ tite uni gocʼ ocoye do moneteye khojgokʼkan tahẽkangea." 
1Samuel18:18 Dạud do Sạule metadea, “Iń baṅ iń celekan ar ińakʼ ghãrońj ar Israelko talare ińren ạpuńakʼ bõs baṅ cetʼkan, onate rajren jãwãe gomkeńiń hoedaṛekokʼ?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Dạud sãote Sạulren hoponera Merabakʼ bapla reakʼ okte seṭeren khan ńelena Merabakʼ bapla do Dạud badkate Mehola atoren Adriyel sãote hoyentaea. 
1Samuel18:20 Menkhan Dạud do Sạulren armitʼṭen hoponera Mikale dulạṛede tahẽkana. Hoṛko do ona katha tinre Sạulko baḍae ocokedea unre Sạul doe kusiyena. 
1Samuel18:21 Uni do mone moneteye menkeda, “Dạud do ińren hoponerań emaea jemon hoponerań do uniren jhampa lekae hoyokʼ ar Philisṭikoakʼ ti uni upạrte paṛaokʼ.” Niạ hudiskate Sạul do Dạude metadea, “Ińren jãwãe goṅkeńem hoyokʼ reakʼ do niạge amakʼ dosar ạt kana.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Sạul do acʼren kạmiyạko noae hukumatʼkoa, “Dạud hape hapete galmaraoepe, ‘raj do am cetanre ạḍiye kusiakana, ar uniren sanam kạmiyạko hõ amko kusiyam kana. Onate rajren jãwãe goṅke do amge hoyokʼme.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Onko do noa katha Dạudko baḍae ocokede khan uni doe menkeda, “Rajren jãwãe gomkeń hoyokʼ do cetʼ ạḍi algagepe bujhạueda? Iń doń reṅgecʼ hoṛ kana, mitʼṭen sadharon hoṛ kạnạń.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Dạud okae menketʼ kạmiyạko do senkate Sạul onako lạiyadea. 
1Samuel18:25 Unre Sạule metatʼkoa, “Dạud metaepe, raj do jãhãnakʼ gonoṅ hõ bae hataoa, eken bạiriko cetanre halae lạgitʼ mitʼsae Philisṭikoakʼ khatnakʼakʼge.” Nonkate Philisṭikoakʼ tite jemon Dạude marao utạrokʼ, noage Sạulakʼ monsubạ do tahẽkana." 
1Samuel18:26 Kạmiyạko do ona katha Dạudko baḍae ocokede khan Dạud doe kusiyena ar rajren jãwãe gomke hoyokʼ lạgitʼe rebenena. Ar noa lạgitʼ oka okteko niṭade tahẽkan ona ạuri seṭerokʼrege Dạud ar uniren hoṛ do senkate barsae Philisṭiko gocʼketʼkoa. Ar Dạud do rajren jãwãe goṅke hoyokʼ lạgitʼ onko Philisṭikoakʼ khatnakʼakʼe ạgukeda ar Sạule emadea. Unre Sạul do Dạud sãote acʼren hoponera Mikale baplakadea. 
1Samuel18:27  
1Samuel18:28 Sạul do unreye bujhạu daṛekeda, Probhu Isor do Dạud sãote menaea ar acʼren hoponera Mikal hõ Dạude dulạṛ edekana," 
1Samuel18:29 unre Dạud cetanre botor do arhõ ḍherentaea. Ar ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ Dạud do uniren bạiriye hoyena. 
1Samuel18:30 Inạ tayom Philisṭikoren subedarko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok hijukʼko ehopʼena. Ar tinạkʼ dhaoko oḍok hecʼen unạkʼ dhaoge Sạulren kạmiyạko khon Dạud do bud salakʼe kạmiketʼteye jo bahayena. Ar nonkate uniyakʼ ńutum do manot idiyena. 
1Samuel19:1 Sạul do acʼren hopon Jonathan ar acʼren sanam kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa jemon onko do Dạudko goje. Menkhan Sạulren hopon Jonathan do Dạud ạḍiye dulạṛede tahẽkana. 
1Samuel19:2 Uni do Dạude metadea, “Ạpuń do aben gocʼben reakʼe kurumuṭuyeda. Onate gapa setakʼ do sontorte tahen ben. Ar mitʼṭecʼ danaṅ jaegare senkate okokokʼ ben." 
1Samuel19:3 Ar oka ṭạnḍire oko akan ben tahen onḍe do ạlińren baba sãoteliń senokʼa. Ar abenakʼ katha liń lạiyaea ar okae men onage liń baḍae ocobena.” 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathan do acʼren apat Sạul ṭhen Dạude sarhaokedea, are menkeda, “E maharaj, amren golam Dạud upạrte jãhãnakʼ do alogem cekaea. Am upạrte uni ma jãhãnakʼ bacoṅe kại akatʼ, bickom uni okae ceka akatʼ onate ḍhergem upkạr akana." 
1Samuel19:5 Uni do acʼakʼ jiwi cuputʼkate uni Philisṭi hoṛe gocʼkedea, ar Probhu Isor do goṭa Israel lạgitʼ maraṅ bańcaoe hoeocokeda; ar ona ńelte am dom kusilena. Enḍekhan ńitokʼ do cedakʼ ạuṛiyakʼte Dạud gojete mitʼṭen bindusi hoṛakʼ mãyãm joro ocoyte uni upạrtem kạiya.”" 
1Samuel19:6 Unre Sạul do Jonathanakʼ katha ańjomkate kiriạyenteye menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda uni do bae gocʼ ocokʼa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Tayomte Jonathan do Dạude hohowadea ar uniyakʼ sanam kathae lạiyadea. Uni do Sạul ṭhene idikedea ar Dạud do lahate lekage Sạul ṭhene tahẽyena. 
1Samuel19:8 Tayomte arhõ lạṛhại tinre ehopʼena unre Dạud do oḍok senkate Philisṭiko sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. Uni do onkoren ạḍi utạr hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa, ar onko do uni samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda." 
1Samuel19:9 Ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ jiu do Sạul cetanre hecʼkateye decʼena. Unre Sạul do acʼakʼ oṛakʼreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ tire do mitʼṭecʼ borlom tahẽkana, ar Dạud do peṛesaṅe banametʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel19:10 Unre uni do borlomte Dạud bhitre sobokʼ jalade reakʼe kurumuṭukeda, menkhan Dạud do uni samaṅ khone ocokʼente borlom do bhitre bitʼena. Ar enhilokʼ ńindạ Dạud doe dạṛketʼte rukhiyại ńamkeda." 
1Samuel19:11 Dạud cetanre nońjor dohoy lạgitʼ Sạul do uniyakʼ oṛakʼte hoṛe kolketʼkoa jemon dosar hilokʼ setakʼre uniye gocʼ daṛeae. Menkhan Dạudren bạhu Mikal do jotowakʼe baḍae ocokedeteye metadea, “Teheń ńindạ bam dạṛ enḍekhan gapage am dom gocʼ ocokʼa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Onate Mikal do jalna secʼte latarte Dạude pheḍ gotʼkadea ar uni doe dạṛ bańcaoena. 
1Samuel19:13 Unre Mikal do gharońjren boṅga muṭhạnko hataokate aṭetʼreye dohoketʼkoa ar aṭetʼ reakʼ bohokʼ secʼ do merom upʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bạlise dohokeda; ar ona tayom do kicricʼte onakoe poṭomkeda. 
1Samuel19:14 Ar Sạul do Dạud sabe lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼko khan Mikale menkeda, “Uni doe ruạkʼ kana.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Noa khobor ańjomkate Sạul do Dạud ńel ạguiye lạgitʼ onkoge arhõe kol dohṛaketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Aṭetʼ sudhạ Dạudpe kuṭuṅ ạguiyea; ar iń do uniń gojea.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Onko hoṛ do oṛakʼte bolokate aṭetʼakʼ cetanre onko boṅga muṭhạnko ar bohokʼ secʼre merom upʼ reakʼ bạlisko ńelkeda. 
1Samuel19:17 Unre Sạul do Mikale metadea, “Cedakʼ nonka dom ṭhokakedińa? Ińren bạirim aṛakʼkedete uni doe dạṛkeda.” Mikal doe menkeda, “Uni doe metadińạ, ‘sen ocoạńme, ar baṅkhan iń khũnmea.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Ar Dạud doe dạṛketʼte jiwiye bańcaoketʼtaea. Uni do Ramare Sạmuel ṭhene senena ar acʼ upạrte Sạul okakoe ceka akatʼ ona jotowakʼe baḍae ocokedea. Ona tayom Dạud ar Sạmuel do Nayot burure senkate girobasokʼ kin ehopʼena. 
1Samuel19:19 Sạul do khobore ńamkeda, Dạud do Rama reakʼ Nayotre menaea." 
1Samuel19:20 Niạ katha ańjomkate uni do Dạud sapʼ ạguiye lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Onko hoṛ do senkateko ńelkeda mitʼ dol nạbi do Sạmuel tabere tahẽkate Isorakʼ kathako lạlạikana. Unre Sạulren hoṛko cetanre hõ Isorren jiue hecʼena ar onko hõ nạbi lekate Isorakʼ katha lạlạiko ehopʼen. 
1Samuel19:21 Sạul do ona kathako baḍae ocokede khan arhõ hoṛe kolketʼkoa menkhan onko hõ senkate nạbi lekate Isorakʼ katha roroṛko ehopʼena. Khan Sạul do tesar dhao arhõ hoṛe kolketʼkoa ar onko hõ nạbi lekate katha roroṛko ehopʼena. 
1Samuel19:22 Mucạtʼre Sạul do acʼtetʼge Ramateye senena ar Sekure menakʼ maraṅ kuń ṭhen senkateye kuliyana, “Samuel ar Dạud do okare menakʼkinạ?” Mitʼ hoṛ doe menkeda, “Rama reakʼ Nayotre menakʼkinạ.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Onate Sạul do Rama reakʼ Nayot secʼe mohnḍayena. Menkhan Isorren jiu do uni cetanreye hecʼena. Ar uni do goṭa hor nạbi lekate Isorakʼ katha lại lạite Nayotteye seṭerena. 
1Samuel19:24 Uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼe totʼketʼte Samuel samaṅre nạbi lekate Isorakʼ katha roroṛe ehopʼena. Uni do goṭa siń ar goṭa ńindạ kicricʼ chaḍageye tahẽyena. Ona iạte hoṛko mena, “Sạul hõ cetʼ enḍekhan nạbiko modren mitʼhoṛ kanae?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Ona tayom Dạud do Rama reakʼ Nayot khone dạṛketʼte Jonathan ṭhene senena ar uniye kulikedea, “Ạliń do cetʼ liń ceka akada? Ar ạlińakʼ dos baṅ cetʼkan? Abenren baba upạrte cetʼ liń kại akatʼte, uni do gocʼ liń lạgitʼe kurumuṭu kana?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathane menkeda, “Tishõ baṅa, aben do baben gocʼ ocokʼa. Ńelben, ạlińren baba do huḍiń ar maraṅ jãhãn kạmige ạliń ạuriye baḍae ocoliń hạbicʼ bae kạmikana. Enḍekhan niạ katha do ạliń ṭhen khon cedakʼe danaṅa? Noa do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Menkhan Dạud do arhõ kiriạkateye menkeda, “Abenren baba do bhagetegeye baḍaea aben do ạliń ben dulạṛetʼ lińạ. Onate pasecʼ uni do mone moneteye hudiseda, Jonathan noa babotre baṅ baḍae ocoyege bhagea, ente uni do duke ńama. Menkhan jiwetʼ Isor ńutumte ar abenakʼ jiwetʼ leka ạliń ar gujukʼ talare do eken mitʼ taṛamge pharak menakʼa.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Unre Jonathan do Dạude metadea, “Aben oka cekae ben metaliń onage ạliń do liń kạmiya.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Dạude menkeda, “Ńelben, gapa do molokʼ cando kana. Ar raj sãote ạlińakʼ do jojom duṛupʼ reakʼ katha menakʼtạlińa. Menkhan aben do sen ocoạliń ben. Ạliń do meyaṅ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ ṭạnḍire oko akanliń tahena." 
1Samuel20:6 Ar abenren baba do ạlińe khojleliń khan enḍekhan ben metaea, ‘Dạud do Bethlehemte acʼakʼ oṛakʼte usạra calakʼ lạgitʼ iń ṭhen nehõrkate hukume khojkeda," 
1Samuel20:7 ente, onḍe do onkoren bõskoakʼ bochor reakʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ porob hoyokʼkana.’ Uniye menle khan, ‘Bhagegea,’ enḍekhan abenren golam doliń khạtirgea; menkhan uniye raṅgao botejokʼ enḍekhan baḍae ben, ạliń lạgitʼ bạṛicʼakʼ doe ṭhik dohoakada." 
1Samuel20:8 Onate aben do ńitokʼ ạlińre dayakʼben, ente Probhu Isor samaṅre aben do mitʼṭecʼ bondobos ben dohoakada. Ar ạliń liń dos akatʼ khan tobe do abenge gocʼliń ben, abenren babawakʼ tire jimạliń reakʼ cetʼ jãhãn jạruṛ menakʼa.?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonathane menkeda, “Tishõ nonka do aloben hudisa. Ạliń liń baḍae daṛele khan ạpuń do khuti taben lạgitʼe goṭa uricʼakada mente, enḍekhan ạliń do khạṭige liń baḍae ocobena.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Unre Dạude menkeda, “Niạ babotre abenren baba bạṛicʼe beohar, enḍekhan ona do okoeye baḍae ocolińạ?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathane menkeda, “Dela, ṭạnḍi secʼ laṅ calakʼa.” Ar niạ menkate bana hoṛ mitʼ sãotekin oḍok calaoena." 
1Samuel20:12 Ona tayom Jonathan do Dạude metadea, “Israelren Probhu Isorge gohae tahenma, gapa se meyaṅ ạliń do ạlińren baba sãote kathaliń roṛa. Unre aben secʼ mońj liń bujhạu khan unrege hoṛ kolkate liń baḍae ocobena." 
1Samuel20:13 Ar ạlińren baba abenakʼ bhạlại bae khoj ar ạliń bạliń baḍae ocoben ar nirạite bạliń kolben enḍekhan Probhu Isor do sạjạiye emalińma ona botor sạjạige. Probhu Isor do cetʼleka ạlińren baba sãoteye tahẽkan aben sãote hõ onkage baṛeye tahenma. 
1Samuel20:14 Ar ạliń jiwetʼ liń tahen enḍekhan Probhu Isor cetʼlekae pạtiạrạnicʼ kan onkage aben hõ pạtiạrạnicʼ tahen ben. Menkhan ạliń liń gocʼlen khan ạliń bõsko lạgitʼ jaejug pạtiạrạnicʼ tahen ben; ar Probhu Isor do dhạrti khon Dạudren mitʼke mitʼ bạirikoe maraoko hạbicʼ hõ pạtiạrạnicʼ tahen ben.” 
1Samuel20:15  
1Samuel20:16 Jonathan do unre Dạud ar uniren bõsko sãote mitʼṭecʼe bondoboskeda, “Probhu Isorge Dạudren bạiriko cetanreye hala hạliyma.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathan do acʼ apnar lekage Dạude dulạṛede tahẽkante uni do Dạud arhõe kiriạ ocokedea. 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathan do Dạude metadea, “Gapa do molokʼ cando reakʼ porob kana. Ar abenakʼ duṛupʼakʼ onḍe khạlige tahelen khan aben doben baḍaeyokʼa bạnukʼbena mente." 
1Samuel20:19 Aben okare ben okolen meyaṅ arhõ usạra senkate onḍe ḍạṅ akatʼ dhiri ṭhen okokokʼben. 
1Samuel20:20 Ạliń do baṅma jãhãnakʼ ńelkate sar liń aṛakʼ akada onka ona ḍạṅ dhiri sorre pea sar liń tuńa. 
1Samuel20:21 Ona tayom mitʼṭen koṛa niạ menkate liń kolea, ‘Do, sarko sendra ạguiyme.’ Ar unre liń menle khan, ‘sarko iń secʼre menakʼa, ạguiyme.’ Enḍekhan aben doben hijukʼa, ente jiwetʼ Isor ńutumte liń metaben kana aben doben khạtirjomagea, ar botor do bạnukʼanaṅ." 
1Samuel20:22 Menkhan uni koṛa liń metae, ‘am secʼre sarko menakʼa,’ enḍekhan aben do calakʼben, ar bujhạuben Probhu Isorge calakʼe metaben kana mente." 
1Samuel20:23 Disạiben, aben ar ạliń talare oka bondobos hoyen onaren goha do Probhu Isorge jaejug hạbicʼe taheyena.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ona tayom Dạud do ṭạnḍire senkateye okoyena. Ar ambas ńindạ reakʼ porob seṭeren khan raj do lahate lekage bhit aṛere acʼakʼ duṛupʼakʼre duṛupʼkate jojome ehopʼena. Unre Jonathan doe beretʼena jemon Abner senkate Sạul aṛereye duṛupʼ daṛeakʼ. Ar Dạudakʼ duṛupʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i do khạlige tahẽyena. 
1Samuel20:25  
1Samuel20:26 Enhilokʼ Sạul do cetʼge bae menleda, enteye hudiskeda, hoedaṛeakʼa Dạud do jãhãnakʼ iạteye besapha akana; ar khạṭige uni do bae saphawa." 
1Samuel20:27 Dosar hilokʼ, metakʼme molok cando porob reakʼ dosar hilokʼ hõ Dạudakʼ ṭhạ̃i do khạlige tahẽyena. Unre Sạul do acʼren hopon Jonathane kulikedea, “Jisạiren hopon do cedakʼ jojom bae hecʼlena? Hola hõ bae hecʼlena, ar teheń hõ baṅ.”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathane roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Dạud do Bethlehemte calakʼ lạgitʼ ạḍiye nehõrạdiń tahẽkana." 
1Samuel20:29 Uni doe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘dayakate sen ocoạliń ben; ente ạliń bõsren hoṛko do nagrahare mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobokʼ kana ar ạlińren dada do onḍe hạjir tahen lạgitʼe hukum akawatʼlińa. Onate ạliń cetanre daya menakʼtaben khan sen ocoạliń ben jemon ạlińren boehako liń ńel ạguko daṛeako.’ Ona iạte uni do maharajakʼ bhojre bae hecʼ daṛeakada.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Noa katha ańjomkate Sạul do Jonathan cetanre edrete pit caṛhaoentaea. Uni doe metadea, “Eya peṛta ar huhul ạimạiren hopon! Am do cetʼ bạń baḍae akatʼmea, Jisạiren hopon secʼem hoyakana mente am do am cetanre ar amren eṅgam cetanre lajaoem ạguakawana?" 
1Samuel20:31 Tinạkʼ din Jisạiren hopon niạ dhạrtire jiwetʼe tahen unạkʼ din am do bam ṭarhao tahena, ar amakʼ rajosṭi hõ baṅ ṭikạu tahena. Onate ńitge hoṛ kolkate iń ṭhen ạguiyem, uni do gujukʼtege hoyokʼtaea.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonathan do acʼren apattetʼe metadea, “Uni do cedakʼ gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea? Uni do cetʼe ceka akatʼte?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Unre Sạul do Jonathan goje lạgitʼ borlome sohoradea. Ar onate Jonathan doe bujhạukeda, acʼren apat do Dạud goje reakʼe ṭhik dohoakada." 
1Samuel20:34 Unre Jonathan do ạḍitetʼe edreyente ṭebil khone beretʼena ar enhilokʼ reakʼ bhoj do thoṛa hõ bae jomleda. Acʼren apattetʼ Dạude opomankedete uni do monre ạḍi duke ńamkeda. 
1Samuel20:35 Dạud sãote Jonathanakʼ oka bondobos hoylen ona lekage dosar hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ Jonathan do ṭạnḍireye odok calaoena. Ar uni sãote mitʼṭen huḍiń koṛa hõe tahẽkana. 
1Samuel20:36 Uni do koṛae metadea, “Iń okaṭakʼ sar iń teraṅ am do ńir senkate ona sendra ạguiyme.” Ado tinre uni koṛae ńir senokʼkan tahẽkana unre uni laha secʼ sare teraṅkeda." 
1Samuel20:37 Jonathanakʼ sar okare ńuren onḍe uni koṛae senen khan uni hohoadeteye metadea, “Sar do am hana aṛe secʼre menakʼa.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Ona tayom uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Usạra ńir calakʼme, alom thirokʼa.” Ar koṛa do sar halaṅkate acʼren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhene ruạṛ hecʼena." 
1Samuel20:39 Uni koṛa do niạko reaṅ cetʼge bae bujhạuleda, ona do eken Jonathan ar Dạudkin bujhạukeda." 
1Samuel20:40 Inạ tayom Jonathan do acʼakʼ akʼ-sar do koṛae emadeteye metadea, “Am do niạkowante nagrahate ruạṛ calakʼme.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Uni koṛae calaoen khan Dạud do ona ḍạṅ akatʼ dhiri reakʼ dạkhin secʼ khone rakapʼ hecʼena. Uni do Jonathan samaṅre otreye ombakʼente pe dhaoe ḍobokʼadea. Ona tayom unkin dokin cokʼana ar rarakʼkin ehopʼena, tobe Dạud do ḍhergeye rakʼkeda." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonathan do Dạude metadea, “Aben do nirạite calakʼben, ente alaṅ do Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkate laṅ men akada, ‘Aben ar ạliń talare ar aben ar ạlińren bõsko talare jaejugren goha do Probhu Isorgeye tahẽyena.’ ” Inạ tayom Dạud do bidại hataokeda ar Jonathan do nagrahateye ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Samuel21:1 Ona tayom Dạud do Nob atore naeke Ahimelek ṭhene senena. Unre Ahimelek do botorte thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ Dạud samaṅreye oḍok hecʼena. Uni do Dạude kulikedea, “Cedakʼ eskar do menama? Ar am sãote cedakʼ eṭakʼko do bạnukʼkoa?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dạud do naeke Ahimeleke roṛ ruạṛadea, “Raj do mitʼṭecʼ kạmi reakʼe bhar akawạdińa, ar oka kạmi lạgitʼe kolakadiń ona reakʼ ar okoege jemon jãhãnakʼ aloko baḍae daṛeakʼ. Ar ona iạte ińren hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ niṭakatʼ ṭhạ̃ire iń lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor iń menakawatʼkoa." 
1Samuel21:3 Am ṭhen jãhãnakʼ menakʼa? Den, mõṛẽ goṭen piṭhạ imạńme se jãhãnakʼ menakʼ khan onage imạńme.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Naeke do Dạude roṛ ruạṛadea, “Jãhã lekan piṭhạ iń ṭhen do bạnukʼa, menkhan samaṅakʼ reakʼ sonot piṭhạ menakʼa. Amren hoṛko jãhãe maejiuko ṭhen bako boloakan khan onko doko jom daṛeakʼa.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dạude menkeda, “Aleakʼ niạm lekate ale do sạrige jãhãe maejiu ṭhen bale boloakana. Lạṛhại phạdkoante tinre jãhãnakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ iń oḍokokʼ unre ińren lạṛhại phạdko do saphako tahena. Tobe teheń do ḍher sapha menakʼkoa.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Onate naeke do ona sonotakʼ piṭhạ Dạude emadea, ente ona piṭhạ chaḍa ar eṭakʼ jãhãn piṭhạ uni ṭhen do baṅ tahẽkana. Ar enhilokʼge ona piṭhạ do Probhu Isor samaṅ khon ocokʼkate ona ṭhạ̃ire lolo piṭhạko dohoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel21:7 Doeg ńutuman Sạulren mitʼṭen Edomren guti do enhilokʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ kạmi lạgitʼ onḍeye tahẽkana. Uni do Sạulren gutikoren sordare tahẽkana. 
1Samuel21:8 Dạud do Ahimeleke kulikedea, “Nonḍe am ṭhen jãhãn borlom se tarwaṛe bạnukʼa? Ente rajakʼ jạruṛ kạmi tahẽkante ińakʼ tarwaṛe se eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa soṅgete do bạń ạgu daṛeakada.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Naekeye menkeda, “Ela buru nalare Philisṭikoren okoe Goliạtem gocʼlede uniyakʼ tarwaṛe menakʼa. Ona do kicricʼte bedhao akatʼ ehpod danaṅre aka doho menakʼa. Am do onam hatao daṛeakʼa. Ona chaḍa ar jãhãn tarwaṛe nonḍe do bạnukʼa.” Dạude menkeda, “Ona lekan tarwaṛe ar jãhãre menakʼa? Menakʼ khan ona hõ imạńme.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Dạud do enhilokʼge Sạul ṭhen khone dạṛketʼte Gat nagraharen Akis raj ṭhene hạjirena; 
1Samuel21:11 Menkhan Akisren hoṛ do Akisko metadea, “Nuige baṅ disạmren raj do? Nui reaṅge cetʼ hoṛko do enecʼ sereńateko menleda, ‘Sạul doe gocʼketʼkoa hajar hajar Dạud doe gocʼketʼkoa ojut ojut?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud do cintạ hecʼadea ar Gatren Akis raje botoradea. 
1Samuel21:13 Ona iạte uni tinạkʼ din onko ṭhene tahẽyen unạkʼ din onko samaṅre koṅka lekae bhankeda. Ar tinre uniko sapʼkedea unre uni do koṅka leka duạr reakʼ kapaṭkore ạuṛige dag baṛaeye ehopʼena ar acʼakʼ ulidakʼ do goco cetanre tiṛạ toṛoy joro ocokeda. 
1Samuel21:14 Unre Akis do acʼren hoṛe metakʼkoa, “Ńele kangeape tho koṅka hoṛ kanae, enḍekhan cedakʼ iń ṭhenpe ạgu akadea?" 
1Samuel21:15 Koṅka reakʼ cetʼ nunạkʼ okulạn hoyakana, onate iń samaṅrepe ạguakadea? Ar nonkan hoṛ do cedakʼ ińakʼ oṛakʼtepe ạguakadea?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Dạud do Gat khone dạṛketʼte Adulam ṭhenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ danderreye okoyena. Ona katha ańjomkate uniren dadattetʼtako ar uni apatakʼ bõsren hoṛ do uni ṭhenko calaoena. 
1Samuel22:2 Okoe do muhinre ar rinteko perecʼ akan tahẽkan ar okoe do duk-bhabnareko tahẽkan onko mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do Dạud ṭhen senkateko jarwayena. Ar Dạud do onkoren subedare hoyena. Nonkate ponsae herel hopon do uni sãoteko mitʼena. 
1Samuel22:3 Ar Dạud do onḍe khon Moab disạm reakʼ Mispateye senena. Ar Moabren raje metadea, “Isorakʼ sana ińre cetʼkan ona ạuriń baḍae ńam hạbicʼ ińren eṅgạń ar ạpuń do dayakate am ṭhen tahẽ ocowạkinme.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Ona tayom uni do acʼren eṅgat-apate ạguketʼkinte Moabren raj ṭhene doho oṭokatʼkinạ. Ar tinạkʼ din Dạud buru gaṛreye tahẽyen unạkʼ din unkin do Moab raj ṭhenkin tahẽyena. 
1Samuel22:5 Ar Gad ńutuman mitʼṭen nạbi do Dạude metadea, “Buru gaṛre do ar alom tahena, am do Jihudạ disạmte calakʼme.” Unre Dạud do ona ṭhạ̃i bạgikate Heretʼ birteye boloyena." 
1Samuel22:6 Sạule do Dạud ar uni sãotenkoakʼ khobor ńam akana menteye baḍaekeda. Unre uni do Gibea nagrahare buru coṭ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhãwãr dare buṭạreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Unre uniyakʼ tire do borlom tahẽkana ar uniren sanam kạmiyạ hoṛ do uni beṛhaeteko teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel22:7 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Benjamin gusṭiren hoṛko ańjompe, Jisạiren hopon do cetʼ jaega-jumi ar darkha bagwankoe emakatʼpea? Uni do cetʼ hajarko cetanre ar sae saeko cetanre subedare bahalpea?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ape do iń upạrtepe soṛojontro akada ar Jisạiren hopon sãote ińren hopon okae bondobos akatʼ ona do okoehõ bape baḍae ocoakadińa. Ińren hopon do teheń ińren guti iń upạrte tãṛãgokʼ lạgitʼe uskurkedea ar ona katha hõ bape baḍae ocoakadińa se iń lạgitʼ okoe hõ duk do bạnukʼtapea.” 
1Samuel22:9 Edomren hoṛ Doeg do unre Sạulren kạmiyạko sorregeye tahẽkana. Uni doe menkeda, “Iń do Jisạiren hopon Nob atore Ahiṭubren hopon Ahimelek ṭhen senokʼ iń ńelakadea." 
1Samuel22:10 Ar Ahimelek do uni reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ sana do cetʼ kana mente onae kuliyana. Uni do jomakʼ hõe emadea ar Philisṭi Goliạtakʼ tarwaṛe hõe emadea.” 
1Samuel22:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate Sạul raj do Ahiṭubren hopon naeke Ahimelek ar uniren apatakʼ bõsren hoṛko, metakʼme Nobren joto naekeko hoho ạguko lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Ar onko joto do raj ṭhenko hecʼena." 
1Samuel22:12 Unre Sạule menkeda, “Ańjomme, E Ahiṭubren hopon.” Uniye menkeda, “Ma roṛme, maharaj.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sạul do uniye metadea, “Am ar Jisạiren hopon aben do iń upạrte cedakʼ ben soṛojontrokeda? Iń upạrte tãṛãkʼkate jemone hul daṛeakʼ onate am do piṭhạ ar tarwaṛem emadea ar unire Isorakʼ sana do cetʼ kana mente ona hõm kuliyana.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek do raj roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “E maharaj, amren sanam kạmiyạko khon amren jãwãe gomkem Dạud leka pạtiạr do ar okoe menaea? Uni do amren pahra khataren mukhiyạ kanae ar amakʼ gharońj talaren hõ mitʼṭen manoticʼge." 
1Samuel22:15 Iń do cetʼ pạhil dhao enhilokʼge uni reaṅ Isorakʼ sana cetʼkana menteń kuliakawana? Tishõ baṅa. E maharaj, amren uni guti se uniren apatakʼ bõsren hoṛko hõ alom dusikoa. Niạko babotre amren nui guti do cetʼge bae baḍaea.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Menkhan raje menkeda, “E Ahimelek, am ar ạpumakʼ bõsren sanam hoṛ do khạtige gujukʼ hoyokʼtapea.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Ona tayom raj do acʼ aṛere teṅgo akan lạṛhại phạdkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do senkate Probhu Isorren noko naekeko gocʼ giḍikakope. Noko doko Dạud secʼ akana. Arko baḍaekan tahẽkana, Dạud doe dạṛeda, enhõ onko do ona katha bako baḍae ocoledińa.” Menkhan rajren kạmiyạko do Probhu Isorren naekeko cetanre ti rakabtako do bako rạjilena." 
1Samuel22:18 Unre raj do Doege metadea, “Enḍekhan amge senkate naekeko gocʼkom.” Edomren Doeg do enhilokʼ irạlgel mõṛẽ naekeye gocʼketʼkoa. Unre naekekoakʼ hoṛmore do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ ephod tahẽkana." 
1Samuel22:19 Ona tayom uni do naekekoakʼ ato Nob do tarwaṛeteye ńẽtʼkeda ar onaren herel hoponko, maejiuko, ńir keṭecʼ gidrạko, bale gidrạko, gadhako, ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko sudhạ tarwaṛeteye gocʼ cabaketʼkoa." 
1Samuel22:20 Ahiṭubren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Ahimelekren hopon do jãhãlekateye ńir paskaoente Dạud ṭhene dạṛkeda. Uniyakʼ ńutum do Abiathar tahẽkana." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiathar do Dạude khoboradea, Sạul do Probhu Isorren naekekoe gocʼketʼkoa." 
1Samuel22:22 Niạ katha ańjomkate Abiathare metadea, “Edomren Doeg enhilokʼ onḍe ńelkateń bujhạuleda, uni do senkate khạṭige Sạule baḍae ocoyeya. Amren ạpumakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ dạyi doń iń kangea." 
1Samuel22:23 Am do iń ṭhenge tahenme, alom botorokʼa. Ar okoe amakʼ jiwi hatao lạgitʼe kurumuṭuletʼ uni do ińakʼ jiwi hatao lạgitʼ hõe kurumuṭu kana. Am do iń ṭhen nirạitem tahẽdaṛeakʼa.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Hoṛko do senkate Dạudko lạiyadea, “Ńelme, Philisṭiko do Kayila nagraha upạrteko lạṛhại kana ar onḍenakʼ khạrại reakʼ anajko luluṭ kana.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Unre Dạud do Probhu Isore kulikedea, “Iń do cetʼ senkate onko Philisṭikoń ńẽtʼkoa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Hẽ, Do calakʼme. Philisṭiko ńẽtʼkate Kayila nagraha rukhiyạime.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Menkhan Dạudren hoṛko menkeda, “Jihudạ disạmre abo do luyutʼ cuputʼ menakʼ bona; Kayilaren Philisṭi lạṛhại phạdko upạrte bon calakʼ do cetʼ artetʼ botoranakʼ baṅkana?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Unre Dạud do arhõ Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana ar Probhu Isor do roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Kayilate Do calakʼme, Philisṭiko do amakʼ tireń soprot akatʼkoa.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Dạud do unre acʼren hoṛkoante Kayilateye calaoena ar Philisṭiko sãoteye lạṛhạiyena ar onkoren ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍikoe luṭ ạguketʼkoa. Ar Philisṭiren ḍher hoṛe gocʼketʼkote Kayilaren hoṛkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa." 
1Samuel23:6 Ahimelekren hopon Abiathar do Dạud ṭhen Kayilateye dạṛketʼ oktere soṅgete maraṅ naekewakʼ ehpod hõe idi daraleda. 
1Samuel23:7 Dạud Kayilare menaea menteye ańjomketʼ khan Sạule menkeda, “Niạ dhao Isor do ińakʼ tire Dạude jimạ akadea, ente phaṭok-duạranakʼ ar hurkạṛanakʼ nagrahateye boloakante uni do apnarteye siń esetʼ akana.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Ar Sạul do Kayilare senkate Dạud ar uniren hoṛ gherao esetʼko lạgitʼ acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
1Samuel23:9 Dạud do tinreye baḍaekeda, Sạul do uni upạrteye soṛojontro kana unre uni do naeke Abiathare metadea, “Amakʼ ephod nonḍe ạguiyme.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Ar unreye menkeda, “E Israelkoren Probhu Isor, iń amren golam do khạṭitegeń baḍaekana, Sạul do iń iạte Kayila nagraha ujạṛ lạgitʼ nonḍe hijukʼe monejoṅ kana." 
1Samuel23:11 Kayilaren hoṛ do cetʼ uniyakʼ tireko soprotińạ? Ar okań ańjomakatʼ onkage cetʼ Sạul do nonḍe sạrigeye hijukʼa? E Israelren Probhu Isor, iń amren golam lạiyạńme baṛe. Probhu Isore menkeda, “Hẽ, uni doe hijukʼgea.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Unire Dạud do arhõe kuliyana, “Kayilaren hoṛ do cetʼ iń ar ińren hoṛko Sạulakʼ tireko soprotlea?” Probhu Isore menkeda, “Hẽ, soprotmegeako.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Noa katha ańjomkate Dạud do acʼ sãoten turui sae hoṛkoante Kayila bạgikateye oḍok calaoena ar mitʼ ṭhạ̃i khon ar mitʼ ṭhạ̃ite ńir baṛaeye ehopʼena. Ar Sạul do Dạud Kayila khone dạṛketʼ reakʼ kathae ańjomketʼ khan onḍe do ar bae senlena. 
1Samuel23:14 Dạud do hahaṅkar reakʼ buru gaṛkore ar Siph hahaṅkar reakʼ buru ṭoṭhareye tahẽyena. Ar Sạul do dinke din Dạude sendra baṛakedea menkhan Isor do uniyakʼ tire Dạud bae soprotledea. 
1Samuel23:15 Siph hahaṅkar reakʼ Horesre tahen jokhecʼ Dạud doe ańjomkeda, Sạul do Dạud goje lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼakana." 
1Samuel23:16 Unre Sạulren hopon Jonathan do Horesre Dạud ṭhen hecʼkate Isor cetanre bhorsakʼ reakʼe udgạukedea. 
1Samuel23:17 Jonathane menkeda, “Aloben botorokʼa; ạlińren baba Sạulakʼ tire do baben sapʼ ocokʼa. Aben do Israel disạmren rajben hoyokʼa, ar ạliń do abenren dosaricʼge. Ạlińren baba hõ niạ katha doe baḍaegea.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Ar unkin bana hoṛ do Probhu Isor samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ bondobos kin dohokeda. Ar Jonathan do oṛakʼe ruạṛ calaoena menkhan Dạud do Horesregeye tahẽyena. 
1Samuel23:19 Siph atoren hoṛ do Gibeate Sạul ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Dạud do ale talaregeye okoakana. Uni do Hores ṭhenakʼ Jesimonakʼ dạkhinre Hakila buru reakʼ gaṛ lekan ṭhạ̃ikoreye tahenkana." 
1Samuel23:20 E maharaj, am do amakʼ kusi lekage hijukʼme. Ar aleakʼ kạmi do rajakʼ tire uni soprotkaege.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Sạule roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do apeye bhorapema, ente iń lạgitʼ ape do mãyã menakʼtapea." 
1Samuel23:22 Ape do senkate arhõ mońjte khoj hataope; uni okareye tahenkana mente ar okateye calakʼ kana ar onḍe okoe uniye ńel akadea ona baḍae ạguiype. Ińiń ańjom akada uni do ạḍi cạtur hoṛ kanae. 
1Samuel23:23 Uniyakʼ joto okokʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i ciyạ ạguiytaepe. Ar ona tayom khạṭi khoborantepe ruạṛ hecʼlenre iń do ape sãoteń senokʼa. Ar disạm talareye tahen enḍekhan uni do Jihudạren sanam bõsko tala khoniń sendra oḍokea.” 
1Samuel23:24 Onko hoṛ do unre Sạul laha lahateko mohnḍayente Siphteko ruạṛ calaoena. Unre Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante Jesimon dạkhinre menakʼ Araba reakʼ Maon hahaṅkarreye tahẽkana. 
1Samuel23:25 Sạul ar uniren hoṛ do Dạud sendrayeko ehopʼena. Ar Dạud do ona khobor ańjomkate onḍe khon Maon hahaṅkar reakʼ huṭupʼ dhiri cạṭạnite senkateye tahẽyena. Ar Sạul do ona khobore ńamketʼ khan Dạude khudạukedea. 
1Samuel23:26 Sạul do buru niạ aṛeteye calaoena ar Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante buru hanasa aṛeteye calaoena. Onko do Sạul ṭhen khon dạṛ paskaokʼ lạgitʼko akbakao baṛaekan tahẽkana. Sạul do Dạud ar uniren hoṛkoe khudạu tiyokʼ ạguiyetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Samuel23:27 Ar inạkʼ khange mitʼṭen hoṛ do Sạul ṭhen hecʼenteye menkeda, “Philisṭiko do disạmre jhãpko emakada, onate usạrate ruạṛ calakʼme.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Niạ katha ańjomkate Sạul do Dạud ar bae khudạuledea uni do Philisṭiko upạrteye laha idiyena. Ona iạte ona ṭhạ̃i reakʼ ńutum do, “Paskaokʼ reakʼ huṭupʼ dhiriko ńutumkeda.”" 
1Samuel23:29 Dạud do onḍe khone uṭhạuente En gedi reakʼ buru gaṛkore senkateye tahẽyena. 
1Samuel24:1 Sạul do Philisṭiko khudạu khone ruạṛ hecʼen khan hoṛko do uniko khoboradea je, Dạud do Engedi reakʼ hahaṅkarre menaea." 
1Samuel24:2 Unre Sạul do Israelko mod khon pe hajar hoṛe bachaoante Dạud ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ khoj hatao lạgitʼ bir merom buruko metakʼ jaega ṭhene senena. 
1Samuel24:3 Ar horte calakʼ calakʼte mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃ireye hecʼena onḍe do bhiḍi meromkoakʼ chaṛ tahẽkana. Ar ona sorre mitʼṭecʼ dander tahẽkana. Sạul do khalasokʼ lạgitʼ ona danderreye boloyena. Menkhan ona danderrege Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do bhitri secʼreko duṛupʼ oko akan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel24:4 Unre Dạudren hoṛko menkeda, “Probhu Isor oka din reakʼ kathae metatʼme tahẽkan ona din do teheń seṭer akana. Uni doe menleda, ‘amren bạiri do amakʼ tireń soprotea ar unire am oka bhagem hudis onam onkawaea.’ ” Unre Dạud doe beretʼente hape hapete Sạulakʼ aṅgrop reakʼ ańcare getʼ kuṭrạketʼtaea." 
1Samuel24:5 Sạulakʼ aṅgrop khon ańcare getʼ kuṭrạketʼtae khan Dạud do mon sobokʼentaea. 
1Samuel24:6 Uni do acʼren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ upạrte, Probhu Isorren ojokʼ bahalicʼ upạrte tiyiń rakab tiń Probhu Isor do ona tishõ bae aṛakʼ akawạdińa, ente uni do Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ kanae.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Niạ katha menkate Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoe thamaoketʼkoa ar Sạul cetanre jhãp bae emocoatʼkoa. Ar Sạul do dander khone oḍokente acʼakʼ horteye calao idiyena. 
1Samuel24:8 Ona tayom Dạud hõ dander khone oḍokente ãṭ aṛaṅte Sạul hohoateye metadea, “E ińren mạlik, maharaj!” Ar Sạul do tayom secʼe beṅgetʼ ạcurketʼ khan Dạud do otre ombakʼkate Sạule ḍobokʼadea." 
1Samuel24:9 Ar ona tayom do Sạule metadea, “Cedakʼ hoṛkoakʼ kathate ben pạtiạukʼ kana ạliń do abenakʼ loksan taben lạgitʼ liń kurumuṭu kana mente." 
1Samuel24:10 Teheń abenakʼ mẽtʼtege coṅ ben ńelketʼ, Probhu Isor do cetʼleka niạ danderre ạlińakʼ tireye soprotletʼ bena. Ar adomko do aben gocʼben lạgitʼko metatʼ liń tahẽkana, menkhan aben cetanre mãyã hecʼatʼ lińạ. Onate liń metatʼkoa ińren mạlik cetanre ti do ohoń rakapʼ daṛelea, ente uni do Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ kanae." 
1Samuel24:11 E ạlińren ạpuń, nõkʼõe ńelben, ạlińakʼ tire abenakʼ aṅgrop reakʼ ańcar kuṭrạ. Ạlińge abenakʼ aṅgrop khon ańcar liń getʼ kuṭrạ akatʼa menkhan aben do bạliń gocʼletʼ bena. Enḍekhan aben do ńitokʼ ben bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana je, aben cetanre ạlińakʼ jãhãn behokakʼ se hulteakʼ do bạnukʼa. Ar aben upạrte kại hõ bạliń kại akada, menkhan enhõ aben do ạliń gocʼliń lạgitʼ ben sendra baṛayetʼlińạ." 
1Samuel24:12 Probhu Isorge aben ar ạliń reakʼ baṛeye bicạrma ar ạliń upạrte okaben behok akatʼ ona reakʼ kuṛạiye emaben ma; enhõ aben upạrte ti do bạliń rakab tạlińa. 
1Samuel24:13 Sedaeren hoṛkoakʼ kạhtuk menakʼa, ‘bedhorom khonge bedhorom do oḍok hijukʼa,’ ona iạte ạliń do aben upạrte ti bạliń rakab tạlińa." 
1Samuel24:14 “Israelren raj do cele pańjaye lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼakana? Ar okoeye khudạu baṛayede kana? Cedakʼ aben do mitʼṭen gocʼ seta do ben khudạu baṛayedea, cedakʼ aben do mitʼṭen mermeṭecʼ ben khudạuede kana?" 
1Samuel24:15 Probhu Isorge aben ar ạliń talare bikʼcạricʼe hoyokʼma are bicạr chinḍạu katalaṅ ma. Unige ạlińakʼ mamblae ńeljut ma ar abenakʼ ti khone rukhiyạ liń ma.” 
1Samuel24:16 Dạud do kathae mucạtʼketʼ khan Sạule menkeda, “E jãwãe, noa do cetʼ katha ben meneda?” Ar noa menkate Sạul do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe ehopʼena." 
1Samuel24:17 Uni do Dạude metadea, “Aben do ạliń khon hõ ḍher ben dhoromgea, ente ạliń do aben tulucʼ ḍher bạṛicʼ liń beohar akatʼre hõ aben do bhage ben beohar akada." 
1Samuel24:18 Ạliń lạgitʼ bhageakʼ ben kạmikan ona do teheń ben baḍae ocoketʼ lińạ. Probhu Isor do abenakʼ tireye soprotletʼ lińre hõ baben gocʼletʼ lińạ. 
1Samuel24:19 Jãhãe hoṛ acʼren bạiri cetanre ạt ńamkate uniyakʼ begor loksante cetʼ uniye aṛagea? Teheń ạliń cetanre oka ben kạmiketʼ ona iạte Probhu Isorgeye bhạlại ben ma. 
1Samuel24:20 Ńitokʼ do liń baḍae daṛeakʼ kana, aben do khạṭige raj ben hoyokʼa ar aben hotetege Israelakʼ rajosṭi do teṅgo ṭarhaokʼa." 
1Samuel24:21 Onate ńitokʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạ ạliń ben, jemon ạlińren tayom bõsko baben marao utạrko ar ạlińakʼ ńutum hõ ạlińren ạpuńakʼ bõs khon alo ben mohor meṭao giḍikakʼa." 
1Samuel24:22 Ar Dạud do Sạul ṭhen onageye kiriạyena. Ona tayom Sạul do oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena, ar Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante gaṛko metakʼkan ona buruteye rakapʼ calaoena." 
1Samuel25:1 Tayomte Samuel doe gocʼena. Ar Israelren sanam hoṛko do jarwa mitʼkate uni lạgitʼko homor halaṅkeda. Onko do Ramare uniyakʼ oṛakʼregeko topakadea. Ona tayom Dạud do Paran hahaṅkarteye calaoena. 
1Samuel25:2 Unre Maon atore mitʼṭen maraṅ kisạ̃ṛ hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ kạmiko do Karmelre tahẽkantaea. Uniren do pe hajar bhiḍi ar mitʼ hajar meromko tahẽkana. Ar un jokhecʼ uni do Karmelre bhiḍiko upʼe kạpciyetʼtako tahẽkana. 
1Samuel25:3 Uni hoṛakʼ ńutum do Nabal ar uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Abigael tahẽkana. Maejiu do budan ar ńelokʼte hõ napaegeye tahẽkana, menkhan uniren jãwãetetʼakʼ beohar do corcoṭaṅ ar bạṛicʼge tahẽkantaea. Uni do Kaleb bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana." 
1Samuel25:4 Dạud do ona hahaṅkaregeye tahẽkanre khobore ńamkeda, Nabal do acʼren bhiḍiko upʼe kạpciyetʼkoa." 
1Samuel25:5 Unre Dạud do gel goṭen juạn koṛa uni ṭhen kolketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Karmelren Nabal ṭhen calakʼpe ar iń ńutumte johar emkate metaepe, ‘Am ar am gharońjren hoṛkoakʼ ar amakʼ jotowakʼge bhạlại hoyokʼtam ma.’" 
1Samuel25:6
