1Samuel25:7 Ar ona tayompe metaea, iń doń ańjomkeda onḍe do bhiḍikoakʼ upʼ kạpciytako reakʼ kạmi calakʼ kana. Uniren gukʼpiko tinạkʼ din ale sãoteko tahẽkan unạkʼ din onko sãote bạṛicʼ do bale beohar akada ar tinạkʼ din Karmelreko tahẽkan onkoren celege bako kombṛolena." 
1Samuel25:8 Uni do acʼren gutikoe kulileko khange ona katha doe baḍae daṛeakʼa. Onate ińren noko juạn koṛako jemone dayawako, ente onko do uniyakʼ rạskạkʼ reakʼ dinre uni ṭhenko hecʼakana. Ona iạte daṛeakʼ bhor jemon uniren noko guti ar uniren hopon Dạud cetanre baṛeye dayakʼma.”" 
1Samuel25:9 Unre Dạudren hoṛko do senkate ona joto katha Nabalko baḍae ocokedea ar koyokʼ horreko tahẽyena. 
1Samuel25:10 Nabal do Dạudren hoṛkoe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Okoe kanae Dạud do? Ar Jisạiren hopon baṅe cele kan? Nebetar do ḍher gutikoge akoren kisạ̃ṛ bạgikateko calakʼ kana." 
1Samuel25:11 Ińren kạpcikan hoṛko lạgitʼ oka jomakʼ ar ńũńũakʼ iń dohoakatʼ ar gur akatʼko janwar reakʼ hataokate cetʼ nonkan hoṛiń emakoa okoe reaṅ do cetʼge bạń baḍaekan?” 
1Samuel25:12 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko hoṛ doko ruạṛ senena ar sanamakʼ katha Dạudko lạiyadea. 
1Samuel25:13 Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape mimitʼko ḍanḍare tarwaṛe toltape.” Onate onko do ḍanḍare tarwaṛeko tolkeda ar Dạud hõe onkakeda. Ar ona tayom Dạud do ponsae hoṛe soṅgewana ar barsae hoṛ do asbabko horhoe lạgitʼko tahẽyena." 
1Samuel25:14 Unre mitʼṭen guti do Nabalren oṛakʼ hoṛ Abigaele metadea, “Hahaṅkar khon Dạud do aboren kisạ̃ṛ joharae lạgitʼ hoṛe kolletʼkoa, menkhan aboren kisạ̃ṛ do onkoe tergeń daramketʼkoa." 
1Samuel25:15 Onko hoṛ do ale sãote ạḍi mońjko beoharetʼ tahẽkana. Tinạkʼ din ṭạnḍire onko ṭhenle tahẽkan ale sãote bạṛicʼ do bako beoharleda ar aleakʼ jãhãnakʼ jinis hõ baṅ kombṛolen talea. 
1Samuel25:16 Ar tinạkʼ din onko sorre tahẽkate bhiḍile gupiletʼko unạkʼ din onko do siń-ńindạ ale beṛhaete rurukhiyạ bhit lekako tahẽkana. 
1Samuel25:17 Ado ma hudisme am do ńitokʼ cetʼem cekaea, ente aleren kisạ̃ṛ ar uniren sanam hoṛko cetanre bạṛicʼakʼ do niṭ akana. Menkhan aboren kisạ̃ṛ do mitʼṭen bodmejaji hoṛ kanae, uni do okoeyakʼ kathage bae ańjoma." 
1Samuel25:18 Abigael do noa katha ańjomkate ar bae bilomleda. Uni do bar sae piṭhạ, bar kum darkha rasa, isin tearakʼ mõṛẽ goṭen bhiḍi reakʼ jel, mõṛẽ bosta atawakʼ anaj, mitʼsae thopa kismis ar bar sae thopa loa hataokate gadhakoreye ladekeda." 
1Samuel25:19 Ar ona tayom do acʼren gutikoe metatʼkoa, “Iń laha lahate calakʼpe, ar iń do ape tayomteń hijukʼ kana.” Abigael do acʼren jãwãe Nabal hõ niạ katha do bae baḍae ocoledea." 
1Samuel25:20 Abigael do tinre acʼren gadhare decʼkate buru daṛaṅ secʼteye pheḍ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Dạud hõ acʼren hoṛkoante ar mitʼṭecʼ daṛaṅ secʼte uni ṭhene pheḍ hijukʼkan tahẽkana. Onate Abigael do onko tulucʼe ńapamena. 
1Samuel25:21 Noa thoṛa lahare Dạude menleda, “Ạuṛiyakʼge hahaṅkarre nui hoṛakʼ sanamakʼ iń horholeda jãhãnakʼge alo kombṛokʼtaea mente. Iń do uniń upkạrledea menkhan ona bodolte uni do bạṛicʼgeye hala akawạdińa." 
1Samuel25:22 Isor do Dạudren bạiriko khạṭige cetʼlekae sạjạiko onkage ińhõ gapa setakʼ hạbicʼ Nabalakʼ oṛakʼren mitʼṭen herel hoṛ hõ jiwetʼ do bạń dohokoa.” 
1Samuel25:23 Abigael do Dạude ńelkede khan usạrate gadha khone pheḍena ar otre ombakʼkate Dạude ḍobokʼadea. 
1Samuel25:24 Ar ona tayom do Dạudakʼ jaṅgare giḍiyenteye menkeda, “E ińren mạlik, joto dos do ińakʼ kangea. Dayakate amren kạ̃ṛmĩ roṛ ocoạńme ar ińakʼ katha ańjomtińme." 
1Samuel25:25 Ińren mạlik do uni kharap hoṛakʼ, metakʼme Nabalakʼ katha jemon aloe sapʼ dohokakʼ. Ente uniyakʼ ńutum cetʼleka onkage uni do. Uniyakʼ ńutum reakʼ mane do, keṭecʼ hoṭokʼ, ar unire do onage menakʼa. Ińren mạlik acʼren hoṛkoe kolletʼko onko sãote iń amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do bạń ńapamlena." 
1Samuel25:26 “E ińren mạlik, jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte ar am ńutumteń kiriyạkʼ kana, amren bạiriko ar okoe do amakʼ loksan lạgitʼko kurumuṭui onkoakʼ dosa do Nabal leka hoyokʼtakoa, ente Probhu Isor do apnar tite hala hạli reakʼe akoṭ akatʼmea." 
1Samuel25:27 Amren kạ̃ṛmĩ acʼren mạlik lạgitʼ oka sandese ạguakatʼ ona do jemon uni soṅgeten hoṛko emocokʼ. 
1Samuel25:28 Amren kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ behokakʼ do dayakate ikạkakʼme. Probhu Isor do khạṭige ińren mạlikakʼ bõse teṅgo ṭarhaoa, ente uni do Probhu Isorakʼgeye lạṛhại kana. Ar ńit hạbicʼte amre cetʼ bạṛicʼakʼge baṅ ńel akana ar baṅ ńamokʼa." 
1Samuel25:29 Ińren mạlik goje lạgitʼ jãhãeye khudạulere hõ ińiń baḍaea Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ jiwiye poṭom okokataea are rukhiyạyea. Menkhan amren bạirikoakʼ jiwi do ginḍwạrite dhiri ghiriyạ giḍikakʼ lekageye capatʼ giḍikoa. 
1Samuel25:30 Probhu Isor do ińren mạlikakʼ bhạlại reakʼ gokʼakʼe purạutaea ar Israelren mukhiyạ lekateye teṅgo ṭarhaoea. 
1Samuel25:31 Unre ińren mạlik do ạuṛiyakʼte mãyãme joroakatʼ se acʼakʼ titeye hala akatʼ iạte acʼakʼ bibek do bae dusiyea se ontorre jãhãn duk hõ bae ạikạua. Ar Probhu Isor do tinre ińren kisạ̃ṛe bhạlạiyea unre nui kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ katha jemon aloe hiṛiń.” 
1Samuel25:32 Dạud do unre Abigaele metadea, “Israelren Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtaema, ente uni do teheń iń sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe kolakatʼmea." 
1Samuel25:33 Amakʼ buj do sarhaokokʼ ma, ar am hõ bhoranicʼ baṛe hoyokʼme, ente teheń am do ińakʼ tite mãyãmiń joro ocoy ar hala hạlikʼ khonem rukhiyạkedeńạ." 
1Samuel25:34 Amakʼ loksan khon okoe do sạṅgińreye doho akadiń uni Israelren jiwetʼ Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, usạrate hecʼkate iń sãote bam ńapamlen khan setakʼ hạbicʼ Nabalakʼ oṛakʼren cele herel hoṛge jiwetʼ do bako tahẽkokʼa.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Ona tayom Dạud do acʼ lạgitʼe ạgu akatʼ jotowakʼ jinisko Abigaelakʼ ti khon hataoketʼteye metadea, “Ńitokʼ do sulukte ruạṛ calakʼme. Iń do amakʼ joto kathań ańjomakada ar amakʼ nehõriń dohoakada.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigael do Nabal ṭhen tinreye ruạṛ calaoena unre raj oṛakʼre leka uniyakʼ oṛakʼre kheloḍ ehopʼ akane ńelkeda. Unre Nabal do bubulakʼ ńũkateye kusiyena ar ạḍiye ńũ bulena. Ona iạte Abigael do ạuri setagokʼ hạbicʼ cetʼge bae metadea. 
1Samuel25:37 Setakʼ bela tinre Nabal do bul khone cetaoena unre acʼren oṛakʼ hoṛ do jotowakʼ kathae lạiyadea. Onate Nabalakʼ ontor do sobokʼentaea ar dhiri lekae keṭkeṭeyena. 
1Samuel25:38 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ sạjại do gel din tayom Nabal cetanre pheḍ hecʼen khan uni doe gocʼena. 
1Samuel25:39 Nabalakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ khobore ańjomketʼ khan Dạud doe menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Uni do Nabal upạrteye teṅgoyena, ente Nabal do ińe opoman akadińạ. Uni do behokakʼ khone rukhiyạ akadińạ, ar Nabalakʼ behokakʼ do Nabal cetanregeye paṛao ocoakada.” Tayomte Dạud do Abigael baplaye lạgitʼ uni ṭhen raebarkoe kolketʼkoa." 
1Samuel25:40 Dạudren hoṛko do Karmelre Abigael ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Dạud do am baplameye khojkana, onate uni do am ṭhene kollakatʼlea.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Niạ katha ańjomkate Abigael do otre ombakʼente Dạud ńutumteye menkeda, “Iń do amren kạ̃ṛmĩ kạnạń; amren gutiko sapʼsorako ar jaṅga ạbukko lạgitʼ doń sapṛaogea.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Niạ katha roṛkate Abigael do usạrateye sapṛaoena ar mõṛẽ goṭen kạ̃ṛmĩyante gadhare decʼkate Dạudren hoṛko soṅgeteye calaoena. Ar onḍeye seṭeren khan Dạud do uniye baplakedea. 
1Samuel25:43 Noa lahare Dạud do Jisreyel atoren Ahinoame baplaledea. Ahinoam ar Abigael bana hoṛge uniren bạhukin hoyena. 
1Samuel25:44 Ar Sạul do acʼren hoponera, Dạudren bạhu Mikal do Palṭi sãoteye baplaledea. Palṭi do Galim atoren Layisren hopone tahẽkana." 
1Samuel26:1 Siphren hoṛ do Gibeate Sạul ṭhen senkateko metadea, “Jesimon purub secʼre menakʼ Hakila burure Dạud doe oko akana.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Unre Sạul do pe hajar bachao hoṛkoante Siph hahaṅkarre Dạude sendra baṛakedea. 
1Samuel26:3 Ar Sạul do Jismon khon purub secʼ hor aṛe reakʼ Hakila burureye ḍerayena ar unre Dạud do hahaṅkarreye tahẽkana. Ar Dạud doe bujhạukeda Sạul do acʼ sendra hahaṅkarteye hecʼakana. 
1Samuel26:4 Onate uni do hoṛe kolketʼkoa ar sạrigeye baḍaekeda, Sạul do acʼ sendra lạgitʼe hecʼakana." 
1Samuel26:5 Ar Dạud do Sạul okareye ḍera akan tahẽkan onḍeye senen khan Sạul ar uniren subedar Ner hopon Abner do giticʼ akane ńelketʼkinạ. Unre Sạul do ḍera reakʼ maljalko talare ar uni beṛhaete do lạṛhại phạdko giticʼ akana. 
1Samuel26:6 Unre Dạud do Hitti hoṛ Ahimelek ar Seruya hopon Joabren boeha Abisae tạkine metatʼkinạ, “Sạulakʼ ḍerate iń tulucʼ do okoeye calakʼa?” Abisaeye menkeda, “Ińiń calakʼa.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Dạud ar Abisae do Sạulren lạṛhại phạdko talare kin boloyena. Unre Sạul do ḍera reakʼ maljal talareye jạpitʼ akatʼ tahẽkana. Ar uniyakʼ borlom do acʼakʼ bohokʼ secʼre otre bitʼ akatʼ tahẽkana. Uniren subedar Abner ar lạṛhại phạdko do uni beṛhaeteko giticʼ akan tahẽkana. 
1Samuel26:8 Noa ńelte Abisae do Dạude metadea, “Isor do teheń acʼren bạiri amakʼ tireye soprot akadea. Ma hukumạń me, ińakʼ borlomte uni do otren sobokʼ jaladea. Bar dhao do baṅ lagaoạńạ.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Baṅa, uni do alom gojea. Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ cetanre hat lagaokate jãhãe do cetʼ bin dusạne tahẽ daṛekokʼa.?" 
1Samuel26:10 Jiwetʼ Isor ńutumteń meneda, Probhu Isorge uni do sạjạiye emaea. Uni do acʼtegeye gujukʼa, ar baṅ khan lạṛhạire senkateye marao utạrokʼa." 
1Samuel26:11 Menkhan Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ hoṛ cetanre hat lagao do tishõ Probhu Isor do bae aṛakʼ akawạdińa. Dela, ńitokʼ do uniyakʼ bohokʼ ṭhen khon borlom ar dakʼ bhajan laṅ hataoa ar laṅ ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Ona tayom Dạud do Sạulakʼ bohokʼ ṭhen khon uniyakʼ borlom ar dakʼ bhajan hataokateye calaoena. Onko do celehõ bako ńelletʼkinạ, ar baḍae hõ bako baḍaeleda, ar okoe hõ bako ebhenlena. Jotoge acetko jạpitʼ akatʼ tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isor do kajak jạpitʼe ematʼko tahẽkana." 
1Samuel26:13 Inạ tayom Dạud do ḍera khon thoṛa sạṅgiń reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ burure rakapʼkateye teṅgoyena. 
1Samuel26:14 Ar lạṛhại phạdko ar Nerren hopon Abner hohowadeteye metadea, “E Abner, jãhãnakʼ cetʼ bam roṛa?” Abnere roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am dom okoe kante, rajem hohowae kana?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dạude menkeda, “Am do cetʼ mitʼṭen bir kanam? Israelko modre am leka do cetʼ jãhãe menakʼkoa? Cedakʼ enḍekhan bạiriko khon amren mạlik maharaj do bam pahra doholedea? Amren mạlik maharaj goje lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hoṛ do onḍeye calaoena." 
1Samuel26:16 Am do ṭhikakʼ bam kạmi akada. Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń metam kana, am ar amren hoṛko do gujukʼ lek kanape, ente aperen mạlik, okoe doe ojokʼ bahal ocoakan, uni do bạiriko khon bape horho akadea. Rajakʼ bohokʼ ṭhen oka borlom ar dakʼ bhajan tahẽkan onakin do okayena?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sạul do Dạudakʼ aṛaṅe oromketʼteye menkeda, “E jãwãe, noa do cetʼ abenakʼ aṛaṅkangea?” Dạude menkeda, “Hẽ, maharaj, noa do abenren gutiyakʼ aṛaṅkangea.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Ona tayom uni do arhõe menkeda, “Cedakʼ ạlińren mạlik do acʼren gutiye khudạu baṛayede kana? Ạliń do cetʼ liń ceka akatʼte? Ar cetʼ liń behok akada?" 
1Samuel26:19 E ạlińren maharaj, ạlińren mạlik, ńitokʼ do dayakate abenren gutiyakʼ katha ańjom ben. Probhu Isorge ạliń upạrteye teṅgo akatʼ ben khan tobe do ạlińakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ uni ṭhen ataṅokʼma. Ar manwako onka akatʼ khan tobe do Probhu Isorakʼ sarap onkore paṛaokʼma, ente teheń do Probhu Isore em akatʼ sompottire ạlińakʼ oka bhag menakʼ ona khon laga ńir liń reakʼko kurumuṭu kana. Onko doko meneda, ‘Do calakʼme, ar debotako pujạwakome.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Menkhan aben ṭhen ạlińakʼ nehõr do noage, Probhu Isor bạnui nonkan sạṅgiń jãhã ṭhạ̃ire ạlińakʼ mãyãm jemon alo jorokʼ. Burure cetʼleka hoṛ do citri cẽṛẽ sendarko calakʼ onkage Israelkoren raj hõ mitʼṭen tejo sendraye lạgitʼe oḍokʼ hecʼakana.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Unre Sạule menkeda, “Aliń doliń kại akada. E jãwãe, aben do dela ruạṛ hijukʼ ben. Teheń ạlińakʼ jiwi do aben ṭhen ạḍi damakʼge tahẽkana; ạliń do abenakʼ loksan reakʼ ar bạliń kurumuṭuya. Sạrige noa maraṅ behok iạte lelha leka liń kạmi akada.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Khan Dạude roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E maharaj, nõkʼõe ona borlom do, abenren jãhãe hoṛ hecʼkate onako idiyaben ma." 
1Samuel26:23 Probhu Isor do mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ acʼakʼ pạtiạr ar dhorom reakʼ kuṛạiye emaea. Probhu Isor do teheń ạlińakʼ tireye soprotletʼ bena, menkhan ạliń do Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ cetanre ti rakab do bạliń khojkana." 
1Samuel26:24 Teheń ạliń ṭhen abenakʼ jiwi tinạkʼ damanakʼ hoyen onkage Probhu Isor ṭhen ạlińakʼ jiwi hõ onka damanakʼ hoyokʼ tạlińa. Uni do joto lekan muhin khone bańcaoliń ma.” 
1Samuel26:25 Unre Sạul do Dạude metadea, “E jãwãe, bhạgangea ben, aben do khạṭige maraṅ maraṅakʼ ben kạmiya arben jitạukʼa.” Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼakʼ horteye calaoena ar Sạul hõ oṛakʼteye ruạṛena." 
1Samuel27:1 Dạud do mone monteye hudiskeda, “Iń do Sạulakʼ tirege mitʼdin gujukʼ hoyokʼtińạ, onate Philisṭikoakʼ disạmtege dạṛ pharakokʼ bhage hoyokʼ tińạ. Enḍekhan Israel disạmre uni do ar bae sendra baṛayińạ, ar iń hõ uniyakʼ ti khon rukhiyạń ńama.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Niạ hudiskate Dạud do acʼ sãoten turui sae hoṛ soṅgekate ona ṭhạ̃iye bạgiyatʼte Maokren hopon Akis ṭhenko parom calaoena. Akis do Gatren raje tahẽkana. 
1Samuel27:3 Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do Gatre Akis ṭhen girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Uniren hoṛko sãote do onkoakʼ gharońjrenko, ar Dạud sãote do uniren banar bạhu, Jisrayel atoren Ahinoam ar Karmel atoren Abigael tạkin kin tahẽkana. Abigael do Nabalren rạnḍi bạhui tahẽkana." 
1Samuel27:4 Sạul do tinreye baḍaekeda, Dạud do Gatteye dạṛ akada unre ar bae sendra baṛaledea." 
1Samuel27:5 Mitʼdin Dạud do Akise metadea, “Am nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan niạ disạm reakʼ jãhãn mitʼṭecʼ atore thoṛa jaega imạńme jemon onḍe senkateń girobas daṛeakʼ. Amren guti do cedakʼ am sãote raj nagrahareye tahena?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Unre Akis do Dạud Siklag nagrahae danadea. Ar un khon teheń hạbicʼ Siklag do Jihudạ rajakʼ tabere tahẽyena. 
1Samuel27:7 Dạud do Philisṭikoakʼ disạmre mitʼ bochor pon candoe tahẽkana. 
1Samuel27:8 Ar inạko dinre uni do acʼren hoṛkoante Gesuriko, Girsiko ar Amalekiko cetanre jhãpe emetʼ tahẽkana. Noko jạtren hoṛ do ḍher laha khonge Tur khon Misor hạbicʼ goṭa ṭoṭhare berel akanko tahẽkana." 
1Samuel27:9 Dạud do jãhã ṭoṭharege jhãpe emetʼ tahẽkan uni do onḍenko herel ar maejiu jotogeye gocʼetʼko tahẽkana, ar onkoren bhiḍiko, ḍaṅgrako, gadhako, ũṭko ar onkoakʼ kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼkoe luṭ ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar tinre uni do Akis ṭhene ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre Akise kulikan tahẽkana, “Teheń do okare luluṭem senlena?” Unre Dạud doe roṛ ruạṛetʼ tahẽkana, Negeb reakʼ Jihudạ ṭoṭhare, Jiramelikoakʼ ṭoṭha se Kenikoakʼ ṭoṭhateń senlena." 
1Samuel27:10  
1Samuel27:11 Dạud do jãhãe herel hoṛ se maejiu Gatte ạguko lạgitʼ jiwetʼ do bae dohoyetʼko tahẽkana, ente uni doe hudisetʼ tahẽkana, onko do akoakʼ reaṅ sanamakʼ kathako lạiya, Dạud do noakoe kạmi akada mente. Philisṭikoakʼ disạmte hecʼkate Dạud do nonkageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana," 
1Samuel27:12 menkhan Akis do Dạude pạtiạuaekan tahẽkana are hudisetʼ tahẽkana Dạud do niạko kạmi iạte acʼ jạtren Israel hoṛko ṭhen hirkhạwạnicʼe hoyokʼa ar onate jaejug ińren golam akane tahena. 
1Samuel28:1 Dạud Siklagre tahen jokhecʼ Philisṭiko do Israelko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ akoren lạṛhại phạdkoko jarwaketʼkoa. Unre Akis do Dạude metadea, “Khạṭigem bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana, am ar amren hoṛko do lạṛhại phạdko sãote seledokʼte iń sãote calakʼ hoyokʼtapea.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dạude menkeda, “Bhagegea, amem ńela iń amren guti do cetʼ iń ceka daṛeakʼa mente.” Akise menkeda, “Bhagegea. Iń do jiwetʼ bhor ińren rurukhiyạyicʼ menteń dohomea.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Noa laharege Samuel doe gocʼ akan tahẽkana, ar Israelren sanam hoṛ do uni lạgitʼko homor halaṅleda ar uniyakʼ nagraha Ramareko topa akade tahẽkana. Okoe gocʼ hoṛkoren jiu tulucʼ kathako roṛ ar bạṛicʼ jiuko sãote jopoṛaoko dohoy Sạul do nonkan hoṛko disạm khone laga ńirletʼko tahẽkana." 
1Samuel28:4 Philisṭiko do mitʼ sãoteko jarwa mitʼente Sunemreko ḍerayena. Ar Sạul hõ Israelren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkote Gilboa burureye ḍerayena. 
1Samuel28:5 Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko ńelte Sạul do botor caṛhaoadea ar dhak dhakaokʼe ehopʼena. 
1Samuel28:6 Ar cetʼe cekaea mente Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana, menkhan Probhu Isor do kukmũte hõ baṅ, Urim ar Thumimte hõ baṅ se nạbiko hotete hõ bae roṛ ruạṛadea." 
1Samuel28:7 Unre Sạul do acʼren kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Nonkan mitʼṭen maejiu sendra ńamepe, okoe do gocʼ hoṛkoren jiu tulucʼ kathae roṛ daṛeakʼ, jemon uni ṭhen senkateń kuli daṛeae cetʼ iń cekaea mente.” Onkoko metadea, “Edonre onkan mitʼṭen maejiu menaea.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Niạ katha ańjomkate Sạul do eṭakʼ lekan kicricʼe horokʼkeda ar acʼakʼ oprome okoketʼte bar hoṛ soṅgekate ńindạ jokhecʼ uni maejiu ṭhene senena. Ar uni maejiue metadea, “Am do boṅga bintikate gocʼ hoṛren jiu tulucʼ helmel dohoyte okoeyiń ńume uni nonḍem rakapʼ ocoyea.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Unre maejiue menkeda, “Am do khạṭigem baḍaea Sạul do noako reaṅ cetʼe ceka akada mente. Okoe gocʼ hoṛren jiu sãote kathae roṛ se bạṛicʼ jiuko tulucʼ jopoṛaoe dohoy uni do nonkan hoṛko disạm khone laga ńir akatʼkoa. Enḍekhan cedakʼ am do iń lạgitʼ nonkanakʼ jhạli dom oḍaoeda jemon onate ińakʼ gujukʼ hoyokʼtiń?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Unre Sạul do Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateye menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Isor ńutumteń metam kana, niạ iạte am cetanre cetʼ sạjạige baṅ hijukʼa.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Khange uni maejiue menkeda, “Enḍekhan am lạgitʼ do okoeyiń rakapʼ ạguiyea?” Sạule menkeda, “Samuel ạguiyem.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Uni maejiu do Sạmuele ńelkede khan ạḍi garteye kikiạu gotʼkeda ar Sạule metadea, “Cedakʼem ṭhokakedińa? Am mam Sạul kange coṅ.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Raj do uniye metadea, “Alom botorokʼa; cetʼem ńeleda?” Maejiue menkeda, “Iń do mitʼṭen debota ot khon rakapʼ hijukʼ kaniń ńelekana.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Sạul do uniye kulikedea, “Uni do okoe lekae ńelokʼ kana?” Uni doe menkeda, “Mitʼṭen haṛam hoṛ rakapʼ hijukʼ kaniń ńelekana; uni do cadorteye oyoakana.” Onate Sạul doe bujhạukeda, uni doe Samuel kana. Ar otreye ombakʼente uniye ḍobokʼadea." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuel do Sạule kulikedea, “Cedakʼ rakapʼ ạgukateyem ạṛisedeń kana?” Sạule menkeda, “Ạḍi muhinreń paṛao akana. Philisṭiko do iń upạrteko lạṛhạikana ar Isor hõe bạgi giḍi akadińạ. Uni do nạbiko hotete hõ baṅ, ar kukmũte hõ bae roṛ ruạṛạń kana. Ona iạte ńitokʼ cetʼ cekae jạruṛtińạ ona baḍae lạgitʼge amiń rakapʼ ạgu ocoakatʼmea.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Sạmuele menkeda, “Probhu Isorgeye bạgi giḍi akatʼme khan ar am upạrteye senakan khan enḍekhan am do cedakʼem kuliyediń kana?" 
1Samuel28:17 Iń hotete uni okaṭakʼe roṛletʼ onageye kạmi akada. Uni do amakʼ ti khon rajosṭiye hatao akada ar am pheḍren hoṛ Dạude emakawadea. 
1Samuel28:18 Am do Probhu Isorakʼ katha bam ańjomakada ar Amelekiko upạrte uniyakʼ oka edre tahẽkan amakʼ kạmi hotete ona hõ bam sodor akada, ar onatege teheń uni do am upạrte noae nonka akada." 
1Samuel28:19 Probhu Isor do Philisṭikoakʼ tire am ar am sãoten Israelkoe soprotpea. Gapa am ar amren hoponko do iń tulucʼpe soṅgekʼa. Uni do Israelren lạṛhại phạdko hõ Philisṭikoakʼ tireye soprotkoa.” 
1Samuel28:20 Samuelakʼ katha ańjomkate Sạul do ạḍitetʼ botor caṛhaoadea ar unrege otre tocʼ tocʼe bhindạṛena. Uni do goṭa din ar goṭa ńindạ cetʼge bae jomakatʼ tahẽkante uniyakʼ hoṛmore daṛege baṅ tahẽlena. 
1Samuel28:21 Uni maejiu do Sạul ṭhen senkateye ńelkedea, Sạul do ạḍi bạṛicʼ botor caṛhao akadea. Onate uniye metadea, “Ńelme, amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do amakʼ hukume batao akada. Ar okaṭakʼ cekae lạgitʼem metadiń ona do jiwi cuputʼ kategeń kạmi akada." 
1Samuel28:22 Ńitokʼ do dayakate amren kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha ańjomme. Iń do am samaṅre thoṛa jomakʼ iń ạguiya. Ar onam jomle khan horte calakʼ reakʼ daṛem ńama. 
1Samuel28:23 Menkhan Sạul do jom lạgitʼ bae rạmjạulenteye menkeda, “Baṅa, iń do bạń joma.” Menkhan uniren hoṛko hõ uni maejiu sãote jormoṭeko ehopʼena. Unre uni do onkoakʼ kathae ańjomkeda ar ot khon beretʼkate parkomreye duṛupʼena." 
1Samuel28:24 Uni maejiuren do mitʼṭen lodgopʼ phẽṭãṛe tahẽkana. Uni do usạrateye gurkedea ar thoṛa holoṅ sipikate bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhại benaokeda. 
1Samuel28:25 Ar ona tayom do Sạul ar uniren hoṛko samaṅreye ạgukeda ar onko do onako jomkeda. Ar onko doko uṭhạuente ńindạge onḍe khonko ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Samuel29:1 Unre Philisṭiko do Ophekre akoren sanam lạṛhại phạdko jarwaketʼkoa. Ar Israelko do Jisrayelakʼ dakʼ jharna ṭhenko ḍerayena. 
1Samuel29:2 Philisṭiren disạm cakʼlaoko do sae saeko ar hajarkoante laha secʼko calao idiyena, ar onko tayomte do Dạud ar uniren hoṛko." 
1Samuel29:3 Onko ńelte Philisṭikoren subedar doko kuliyana, “Noko Israelko do nonḍe cedakʼ menakʼkoa?” Akise menkeda, “Nui do Israelren raj Sạulren golam Dạud kanae. Nui do ḍher din ar bochor khon iń ṭhen menaea. Uni do Sạule bhiṅgṛạu akade tayom khon teheń hạbicʼ unire jãhãn dosge bạń ńam akada.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Niạ katha ańjomkate Philisṭi subedarko do Akis cetanre raṅgaoenteko menkeda, “Nui hoṛ do ruạṛkaeme. Okare jaegam emakawade onḍegeye ruạṛ calakʼma. Abo sãote lạṛhại do bae sen daṛeakʼa. Uni do lạṛhại senkate abo upạrteye teṅgokʼa. Uniren mạlike kusi ocoye khan aboren hoṛkoakʼ bohokʼtegeye kusi ocoyea." 
1Samuel29:5 Nui do cetʼ uni Dạud doe baṅkana, one uni babotre enecʼateko sereńletʼ, ‘Sạul doe gocʼketʼkoa hajar hajar ar Dạud doe gocʼketʼkoa ojut ojut?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Unre Akis do Dạud hohoadeteye metadea, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń metamkana, ińiń baḍaea am dom soṛa hoṛkana. Noko lạṛhại phạdko talare oḍok bolokʼ do iń nońjorre boge kangea. Amem hecʼen hilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ amre jãhãn behokakʼ do bạń ńelakada, menkhan eṭakʼ rapajko amre kusi do bạnukʼkoa." 
1Samuel29:7 Onate am do ruạṛ calakʼme; ar nonkan jãhãnakʼ alom kạmiya one onate Philisṭikoren rapajko am cetanre bekusi aloko tahen. 
1Samuel29:8 Unre Dạud doe kuliyana, “Menkhan iń do cetʼ iń caka akatʼte? Ińiń hijukʼ hilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ iń amren gutiyakʼ cetʼ dosem ńamakatʼte ińren mạlik maharajren bạiriko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ bạń calao daṛeakʼa.”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akise roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ińiń baḍaea iń ṭhen do Isorren mitʼṭen goḍet lekagem bhagea; enhõ Philisṭikoren rapajko iń soṅgete lạṛhại lạgitʼem calakʼ do bako khojkana." 
1Samuel29:10 Onate am ar amren mạlikren okoeko hoṛ am soṅgeteko hecʼakan ape do gapa setakʼre beretʼkate marsalokʼ são sãote oḍokʼ calakʼpe.” 
1Samuel29:11 Onate Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do Philisṭikoakʼ disạmte ruạṛ calakʼ lạgitʼ setakʼreko beretʼena, ar Philisṭiko do Jisreyelteko rakapʼ calaoena." 
1Samuel30:1 Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante tesar hilokʼ Siklagteye seṭerena. Menkhan inạko dinre Amalekiko do Negebre Philisṭikoakʼ ṭoṭhare ar Siklagreko luṭ akatʼ tahẽkana. Onko do Siklag ńẽtʼkate seṅgelteko ḍahao marao akatʼ tahẽkana ar onḍeko tahẽkan sanam maejiuko ar huḍiń lạṭu joto do bondikateko idiakatʼko tahẽkana. Menkhan gocʼ do okoe hõ bako gocʼakatʼko tahẽkana, eken ruạṛ calakʼ jokhecʼko soṅge toraletʼko tahẽkana." 
1Samuel30:2  
1Samuel30:3 Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante Siklagteye ruạṛ hecʼen khan nagraha do seṅgelte ḍahao marao akatʼe ńelkeda ar akoren bạhuko, hoponko, hoponerako do bondikateko idiakatʼkoa." 
1Samuel30:4 Noa ńelte Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do kạuạ rạuwạ rarakʼko ehopʼena. Ar nonka hoyena rakʼ rakʼteko aralkoral cabayena. 
1Samuel30:5 Dạudren banar bạhu, Jisreyelren Ahinoam ar Karmel Nabalren rạnḍi bạhu Abigael tạkin hõkin bondi idioco akan tahẽkana." 
1Samuel30:6 Unre Dạud do ạḍi muhinreye paṛaoena, ente hopon ar hoponerako iạte uniren hoṛkoakʼ mon do Dạud cetanre nonka haṛhatʼentakoa, onko do dhirite Dạud tińe lạgitʼko roṛ baṛayetʼ tahẽkana. Menkhan Dạud do acʼren Probhu Isor cetanre bhorsakate ontorre dile ńam ruạṛkeda." 
1Samuel30:7 Unre Dạud do Ahimelekren hopon maraṅ naeke Abiathare metadea, “Iń ṭhen Ephod ạguiyme.” Ar ona ạgu hoyen khan Dạud do Probhu Isore kulikedea, “Iń do cetʼ onko hạhạnkoń khudạukoa? Onko do cetʼ iń sapʼ tiyokʼ daṛeakoa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Hẽ, do khudạukom. Ar khạṭigem sapʼ tiyokʼkoa ar sanamkom bańcao daṛeakoa.”" 
1Samuel30:8  
1Samuel30:9 Unre Dạud do acʼren turui sae hoṛe soṅgeketʼkoa. Onko do Besor ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ buru nala ṭhenko seṭerena. Ar onḍe thoṛa hoṛkoe doho oṭokatʼkoa. 
1Samuel30:10 Ente barsae gan hoṛ do laṅga iạte ona nala do bako parom daṛeada. Menkhan Dạud do ponsae hoṛkoante bạirikoe khudạu idiketʼkoa. 
1Samuel30:11 Uniren hoṛko do ṭạnḍire mitʼṭen misri hoṛko ńamkedea. Onko do Dạud ṭhenko ạgukedea ar jomakʼko emadete uni doe jomkeda. 
1Samuel30:12 Ona tayom loa piṭhạ ar bar thoka kismisko jom ocokedea. Uni do pe siń pe ńindạ jomakʼ se ńũiyakʼ cetʼge bae jomakatʼ tahẽkana, onate niạko jomkate uni doe cerṭha ruạṛena." 
1Samuel30:13 Dạud do uni hoṛe kulikedea, “Am dom okaren hoṛ kana? Ar oka khonem hecʼakana?” Uni hoṛ doe menkeda, “Iń do mitʼṭen misri hoṛ kạnạń, Ar Amalekikoren mitʼṭen gutige. Teheń pe din khon iń doń ruạkʼ kana, onate ińren kisạ̃ṛ do ińe bạgi giḍiakadińạ." 
1Samuel30:14 Ale do Negeb reakʼ Korethikoakʼ dạkhin nakha reakʼ, Jihudạ reakʼ thoṛa hĩs ar Kaleb reakʼ dạkhin ṭoṭhate luluṭle senlena ar Siklog do seṅgeltele jharkhar akada.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dạude menkeda, “Onko luluṭko ṭhenem idi daṛeạńạ?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Isor ńutumte kiriạwạńme bam gojeńa se ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen bam jimạkạńạ. Enḍekhan iń do onko ṭheniń idimea.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Uni do onko ṭhen Dạude idikedea. Unre onko do ṭạnḍire hanḍe nanḍeko pasnao akan, jojom arko ńũńũkan, ar bubulakʼ ńũkateko enecʼ sereń joṅkan tahẽkana, ente Philisṭikoakʼ disạm ar Jihudạkoakʼ ṭoṭha khon onko do ḍher jinisko luṭ ạguakatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Samuel30:17 Unre Dạud do enhilokʼ ạyupʼ bela khon ehopʼkate dosar hilokʼ ạyupʼ hạbicʼ onko sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. Onkoren cele hõ rukhiyạ do bako ńamleda, eken ponsae juạn koṛa do ũṭre decʼkateko dạṛ pạnḍucʼkeda." 
1Samuel30:18 Amalekiko okaṭakʼ luṭkateko ạguletʼ ona do jotowakʼgeye rukhiyạkeda. Ar acʼren banar bạhukin hõe bańcaoketʼkinạ. 
1Samuel30:19 Onkoren thoṛa se ḍher umerren hoṛ, onkoren hopon ar hoponerako ar okako jinis Amalekikoko luṭ idiletʼ ona do jotowakʼgeye ruạṛ ạgukeda." 
1Samuel30:20 Uni do Amalekikoren sanam ḍaṅgrako bhiḍikoe ạguketʼkoa. Uniren hoṛko do eṭakʼ pal janwarko laha lahateko laga idiketʼkoa. Onko doko menkeda, “Noko do Dạudren luṭ jinis kanako.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Okoe barsae hoṛ Besor nalare laṅga iạte Dạud sãote bako calao daṛeatʼ tahẽkan, onko ṭhen Dạud doe ruạṛ hecʼena. Onko hoṛ do Dạud ar uni sãoten hoṛko daram ạguko lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼlena. Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do onko ṭhenko seṭeren khan Dạud do onkoakʼ khoj khobore hataokeda." 
1Samuel30:22 Menkhan Dạud sãote okoe haḍrap hoṛko tahẽkan onkoko menkeda, “Okoe abo sãote bako senlen onko do ona rukhiyạ ạguakatʼakʼ khon do babo emakoa. Onko do eken akoren bạhu ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerakoko idikotakoma.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Dạude roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa, E ińren boehako, Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe emakawatʼ bon ona do alope nonkaea. Uni doe rukhiyạ akatʼbona ar aboren luluṭko aboakʼ tireye soprotketʼkoa." 
1Samuel30:24 Apeakʼ niạko kathare okoehõ bako rạjikʼa. Okoe do lạṛhạiko senlen ar okoe do jinisko horhoyetʼ tahẽkan onko jotoge inạ mitʼ leka hạṭińko ńama.” 
1Samuel30:25 Enhilokʼ khon Dạud do Israelko lạgitʼ ona lekage niạme ṭhikkeda ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona do onkage menakʼa. 
1Samuel30:26 Siklogte ruạṛ hecʼkate Dạud do Jihudạ gusṭiren murubbiko ṭhen luṭteakʼ jinis reakʼ thoṛa hĩse kolkeda. Onko do uniren gateko tahẽkana. Uni do onko ṭhen niạ kathae roṛgotʼkada, “Probhu Isorren bạiriko ṭhen khon luṭ ạguwakʼ jinisko reakʼ thoṛa dan do ape ṭheniń kolkeda.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Ar okoe murubbiko ṭhen onako kol hoyen onako do Bethlehemrenko lạgitʼ, Negeb reakʼ Ramotrenko lạgitʼ, Jatirrenko lạgitʼ," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroerrenkko lagitʼ, Sipmotrenko lạgitʼ, Estemoarenko lạgitʼ, Rakalrenko lạgitʼ tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Jerameli ar Kenikoakʼ nagraharenko lạgitʼ ar Hormarenko lạgitʼ, Borasanrenko lạgitʼ, Athakrenko lạgitʼ, Hebronrenko murubbiko lạgitʼ hõ tahẽkana ar okako ṭhạ̃ire Dạud ar uniren hoṛko dãṛãletʼ tahẽkan onḍenko murubbiko ṭhen hõ uni do onakoe kolkeda." 
1Samuel30:29  
1Samuel30:30  
1Samuel30:31  
1Samuel31:1 Philisṭiko do Israelko tulucʼko lạṛhạiyena ar Israelko do onko samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. Onko modren ḍherkoge Gilboa burure Philisṭiko hoteteko gocʼ ocoyena. 
1Samuel31:2 Philisṭiko do Sạul ar uniren hoponko khudạu idiketʼkote Jonathan, Abinadab ar Malkisau tekoko gocʼketʼkoa." 
1Samuel31:3 Ona tayom Sạul upạrte lạṛhại do artetʼ sạrdi idiyena. Dhinkiạko hõ uniko ńamkedea arko hạnkedea. 
1Samuel31:4 Unre Sạul do acʼren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛe metadea, “Amakʼ tarwaṛe oḍokkate ińakʼ hoṛmo sobokʼ tabme. Ar baṅkhan onko bin khatna hoṛko hecʼkateko bemanotińạ.” Menkhan uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛ do bae rebenlena, ente uni do ạḍitetʼ botor caṛhao akawade tahẽkana. Unre Sạul do acʼakʼ tarwaṛe cetanreye bhindạṛena." 
1Samuel31:5 Uni khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ do Sạule gocʼena menteye ńelkede khan acʼ hõ acʼakʼ tarwaṛereye bhindạṛena are gocʼena. 
1Samuel31:6 Nonkate enhilokʼ do Sạul, ar uniren pea hopon, ar uniren khanḍa bhanḍa akʼsenicʼ ar uni sãoten hoṛko mitʼ domteko gocʼena." 
1Samuel31:7 Ar okoe Israelko do buru lodam reakʼ eṭakʼ aṛe secʼreko tahẽkan ar okoe do jordan gaḍa hanasa aṛereko tahẽkan onko do tinreko ńelkeda Israelren lạṛhại phạdko dạṛkeda, ar Sạul ar uniren hoponko gocʼ ocoyena unre onko hõ akoakʼ nagraha bạgikateko dạṛkeda, ar Philisṭiko do hecʼkate onako nagrahako dokholkeda." 
1Samuel31:8 Dosar hilokʼ Philisṭiko do gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ jinisko luṭ idijoṅ lạgitʼko hecʼen khan Gilboa burure Sạul ar uniren pea hoponkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ giḍi akanko ńelkeda. 
1Samuel31:9 Onko do Sạulakʼ bohokʼko makʼ kuṭrạketʼte uniyakʼ kicricʼ ar khanḍa bhanḍako hataoketʼtaea. Ar niạ rạskạ sombat do onkoren boṅga oṛakʼkore ar hoṛko ṭhen lại pasnao lạgitʼ Philisṭi disạm reakʼ sanam jaegate sombatko kolkeda. 
1Samuel31:10 Ona tayom Sạulakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa hataokate Astarot reakʼ mundilreko dohokada ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo do Betsan nagraha reakʼ bhitreko akakada. 
1Samuel31:11 Philisṭiko Sạul cetanre okako cekaketʼ ona katha do Jabes Gileadren hoṛko ańjomkeda. 
1Samuel31:12 Unre onḍenko dilgiriạ hoṛ do goṭa ńindạ taṛamate senkate Betsam reakʼ pạcri bhit khon Sạul ar uniren hoponkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko pheḍkeda ar Jabeste idikate onḍeko atar giḍikeda. 
1Samuel31:13 Ona tayom onko do onkoakʼ jaṅko hataokate onḍenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hesel dare buṭạreko topakada ar eae mãhã hạbicʼko upạskeda. 
2Samuel1:1 Sạulakʼ gujukʼ tayom Dạud do Amelekikoe bhagaoketʼkote Siglokteye ruạṛ hecʼena ar onḍe bar dine tahẽyena. 
2Samuel1:2 Ar tesar hilokʼ Sạulren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍera khon mitʼṭen hoṛ do Dạud ṭhene hecʼena. Uniyakʼ kicricʼ do oṛecʼ oṛecʼ ar bohokʼre do dhuṛi tahẽkantaea. Uni do Dạud ṭhen hecʼkate otre ombakʼkateye ḍobokʼadea. 
2Samuel1:3 Dạud do uniye kulikedea, “Am do oka khonem hecʼakana?” Uni doe menkeda, “Iń do Israelkoakʼ ḍera khoniń ńir paskao hecʼakana.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Dạud do uniye kulikedea, “Cetʼ hoyakana? Ma lạiyạńme.” Uniye menkeda, “Hoṛko do lạṛhại ṭạnḍi khonko dạṛakada. Ar ḍher hoṛgeko gocʼena ar Sạul ar Jonathan tạkin hõkin gocʼ ocoyena.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Okoe koṛa niạ khobore ạguletʼ Dạud do uniye kulikedea, “Cekatem baḍaekeda Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathan tạkin hõkin gocʼena?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Uni koṛa doe menkeda, “Iń do unre Gilboa reakʼ burureń tahẽkana ar Sạul do acʼakʼ borlomre ṭenḍarkateye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. Ar un jokhecʼ rãt gạḍi ar aswariko doko khudạu tiyokʼ idiyedekan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel1:7 Uni do tayom secʼe ạcuren khan ińe ńel ńamkedeńteye hohowạdińa. Ar iń doń metadea, ‘hẽ minạńgea.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Uni doe kulikedińa, ‘am dom okoe kana?’ Unreń metadea iń do mitʼṭen, ‘Amaleki hoṛ kạnạń.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Uni doe metadińạ, ‘dayakate dela nonḍe hecʼkate, gojeń me, ente ạḍi bạṛicʼ iń sasetokʼ kana ar ńitokʼ hõ jiwetʼge minạńa.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Onate iń do senkate uniń gocʼkedea. Enteń bujhạu daṛeada, uni do bae bańcaokʼa. Iń do uniyakʼ bohokʼ khon mukuṭ ar uniyakʼ ti reakʼ ṭoḍoriń bocʼketʼtaea ar ińren mạlik am ṭheniń ạgu akada.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud ar uni sãoten hoṛko do akoakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼtakoa. 
2Samuel1:12 Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathan ar Probhu Isorren lạṛhại phạdkoren okoe Israelko lạṛhạireko gocʼen onko lạgitʼ onko do ạyupʼ hạbicʼko rakʼ homorkeda arko upạskeda. 
2Samuel1:13 Ar okoeṭakʼ koṛa ona khobore ạguletʼ Dạud do uniye kulikedea, “Am do okaren hoṛ kanam?” Uniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Niạ disạmre girobasokʼkan mitʼṭen porjạtren hopon, mitʼṭen Amaleki hoṛ kạnạń.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Probhu Isore ojokʼ bahal akade hoṛ goje lạgitʼ ti tultam do cetʼ thoṛa hõ bam botorlena?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Dạud do acʼren mitʼṭen hoṛ hohoadeteye metadea, “Uni do gocʼ giḍikaeme.” Ar onate uni doe gocʼkedea." 
2Samuel1:16 Dạud do unre uni koṛae metadea, “Amakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ dạyi dom amkangea, ente amakʼ moca kathage am upạrte gohae emeda, Probhu Isorren ojokʼ akade hoṛem gocʼ akadea mente.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathan lạgitʼ Dạud do unre niạ homor halaṅ sereńe sereńkeda. 
2Samuel1:18 Uni doe hukumkeda niạ sereń do jemon Jihudạ gusṭirenkoko cetʼ ocokʼ. Niạ sereń do Jasar ńutumanakʼ puthire ol akana. 
2Samuel1:19 “E Israel, Amren ṭhonokan hoṛ do amakʼ ona usul jaegare gocʼgeko giticʼakana. Hae, birbanṭako doko marao utạrena!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gatre niạ khobor do alope lạiya, ar Askelon reakʼ hor horte hõ alope lại sodora; arpe onkae khan Philisṭikoren hoponera doko rạskạ joṅa, onko bin khatna hoṛkoren hoponera doko hulạs joṅa." 
2Samuel1:21 E Gilboa reakʼ buruko, apere sisir ar jạṛi dakʼ do alo baṛe ńurokʼma, ape talare abal ot reakʼ anaj baṛgeko hõ alo baṛe tahenma; ente onḍege birbanṭa hoṛkoakʼ ḍhal do bemanotakʼ hoyakana, Sạulakʼ ḍhalre sunum ojokʼakʼ do ar baṅ hoyokʼa." 
2Samuel1:22 Gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm ar birbanṭakoakʼ jel baṅ ńamlen khan Jonathanakʼ sar do baṅ ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana; ar Sạulakʼ tarwaṛe hõ begor tirpitte baṅ ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel1:23 Jiwetʼ tahenre Sạul ar Jonathan do dulạṛiạ ar bhage hoṛkin tahẽkana; unkin do gujukʼre hõ bạkin begarlena. Unkinakʼ tạpis do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ khon hõ tạpisge, ar daṛe do dhạcri kul khon hõ bạ̃ṛtige tahẽkana." 
2Samuel1:24 E Israelkoren hoponerako, Sạul lạgitʼ rakʼjoṅpe. Uni do damanakʼ arakʼ kicricʼe horokʼ akawatʼpea, apeakʼ kicricʼkore abhrankoteye sajakatʼtapea." 
2Samuel1:25 Hae, onko birbanṭa do lạṛhại talare cetʼlekako marao cabayena! Ona usul jaegare Jonathan doe gocʼ bhindạṛ akana." 
2Samuel1:26 Hae, Jonathan, ińren boeha! Am lạgitʼ ińakʼ do maraṅ duktiń. Ińren do tinạkʼ dulạṛiạ; iń lạgitʼ amakʼ dulạṛ do kuṛikoakʼ dulạṛ khon hõ ḍherge tahẽkana." 
2Samuel1:27 Hae, birbanṭako do cetʼlekako marao gotʼena, ar onkoakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa hõ nosṭoyentakoa!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Dạud do Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana, “Iń do cetʼ Jihudạ ṭoṭha reakʼ jãhãn mitʼṭecʼ nagrahateń calakʼa?” Probhu Isore menkeda, “Hẽ, calakʼme.” Dạude kulikedea, “Iń do okateń calakʼa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hebronte rakapʼ calakʼme.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Unre Dạud do acʼren banar bạhu, metakʼme Jisreyelren Ahinoam ar Karmel Nabalren rạnḍiyicʼ Abigaelante Hebronteye rakapʼ calaoena." 
2Samuel2:3 Ar okoeko hoṛ uni são sãoteko tahẽkan onko hõ onkoakʼ gharońj sudhại idiketʼkoa. Onko do Hebron reakʼ atokore girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
2Samuel2:4 Unre Jihudạren hoṛko do Hebronteko hecʼena ar Dạud do Jihudạ gusṭiren raj menteko ojokʼ bahalkedea. Hoṛko do Dạud niạ sombatko lạiyadea, Jabes-Gileadren hoṛge Sạul doko topa akadea." 
2Samuel2:5 Unre uni do hoṛ kolkate Jabes-Gileadren hoṛko niạ kathae metatʼkoa, “Aleren mạlik Sạulpe topakede iạte unire okaṭakʼ pạtiạrpe udukʼ akatʼ onate Probhu Isore bhorape ma." 
2Samuel2:6 Uni do ńitokʼ acʼakʼ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrtetʼ apeye udukʼape ma, ar apeakʼ ona kạmi iạte ińhõ ape tulucʼ mońjiń beohara." 
2Samuel2:7 Onate ape do keṭejokʼpe ar dilanko hoyokʼpe. Aperen mạlik Sạul doe gocʼena ar Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do raj lekate ińko ojokʼ bahal akadińạ.” 
2Samuel2:8 Onako dinre Sạulakʼ lạṛhại phạdren senaputi Ner hopon Abner do Sạulren hopon Isaboth jordan gaḍa hanasa Mahaniạmteye idiakade tahẽkana. 
2Samuel2:9 Ar Isbot do Gilead, Asuri, Jisreyel, Ephrayim, Benjamin, metakʼme sanam Israel disạm cetanreye raj akade tahẽkana." 
2Samuel2:10 Sạulren hopon Isaboth do pongel bochor umerre Israel disạmren raje hoylena ar bar bochor raje calaoleda. Menkhan Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do Dạud tabereko tahẽkana. 
2Samuel2:11 Dạud do Hebron khon Jihudạ gusṭiko cetanre eae bochor hạbicʼ raje calaokeda. 
2Samuel2:12 Mitʼdin Nerren hopon Abner do Sạulren hopon Isbotren hoṛkoante Mahaniạm khon Gibeonteye senena. 
2Samuel2:13 Unre Serua hopon Joab ar Dạudren hoṛko oḍok hecʼena. Ar Gibeon reakʼ pukhri ṭhenko samna sạmniyena. Mitʼ dol do pukhri niạsa aṛere ar eṭakʼ dol do pukhri hanasa aṛereko duṛupʼena. 
2Samuel2:14 Unre Abner do Joabe metadea, “Banar dolren thoṛa juạnko rakapʼ hecʼkate iń samaṅreko lạṛhạima.” Joabe menkeda, “Bhagege, onkage hoyokʼma.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Unre Benjamin-gusṭi ar Sạulren hopon Isaboth secʼ khon gelbar hoṛ ar Dạud secʼ khon gelbar hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼko bachao ocoyena. 
2Samuel2:16 Ar banar dolren hoṛge mitʼ hoṛ armitʼ hoṛakʼ bohokʼ jhuṭiạukate tarwaṛete kokhareko sobokʼ bitʼena ar mitʼ dhaote otre bhindạṛenteko gocʼena. Ona iạte Gibeon reakʼ ona jaega do Hilkath Hasurimko dohokeda (metakʼme, “Tarwaṛe ṭạnḍi”)." 
2Samuel2:17 Enhilokʼ do ạḍitetʼ lạṛhại hoyena ar onate Abner ar Israelren hoṛko do Dạudren hoṛ ṭhenko bhagao ocoyena. 
2Samuel2:18 Joab, Abisae ar Asahel ńutuman Seruaren pea hopon onḍeko tahẽkana. Asahel do birren jel leka murukteye dạṛ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel2:19 Uni do Abnere khudạu idikedea ar etom końe sen baṅkate uni tayom tegeye ńir calaoena. 
2Samuel2:20 Unre Abner do tayom secʼ ạcurkateye kulikedea, “Am dom Asahel kana?” Asahele menkeda, “Hẽ, ṭhikgem menakada.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Unre Abner do uniye metadea, “Am do etom ar baṅkhan końe secʼ ạcurokʼte jãhãege bhagaokate uniyakʼ lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa hataome.” Menkhan Asahel do uniye khudạu idikedea." 
2Samuel2:22 Abner do Asahel arhõe metadea, “Teṅgokʼme, ar alom khudạuińạ. Am gocʼme do bạń menjoṅ kana. Ariń onkae khan cekate amren boeha Joab ṭhen doń ńel ocokʼa?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Asahel do enhõ ruạṛokʼ bae rạjilena. Unre Abner do acʼakʼ borlomte Asahelakʼ lacʼe sobokʼketʼtaea, ar borlom do uniyakʼ dea secʼte oḍok hecʼena. Ar Asahel do onḍege bhindạṛenteye gocʼena. Asahel oka jaegare bhindạṛenteye gocʼen onḍe tinạkʼ hoṛko hecʼen onko do sanamge onḍeko teṅgo tahẽyena," 
2Samuel2:24 menkhan Joab ar Abisae do Abnerkin khudạu idikedea. Nonkate unkin do Gibeon reakʼ hahaṅkar talate calakʼ hor reakʼ Giah samaṅre Amah buru ṭhenkin seṭerena. Unre siń cando doe hạsurokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel2:25 Ar unre Abner tayomre do Benjạmin-gusṭiren hoṛko jarwa akan tahẽkana. Arko mitʼ dolente mitʼṭecʼ buru cetanre rakapʼkateko teṅgoyena. 
2Samuel2:26 Unre Abner do Joab hohoadeteye metadea, “Tarwaṛe do cetʼ jaejug hạbicʼ jojomtegeye tahena? Bam bujhạueda mucạtʼtetʼ do haṛhatʼgea mente? Amren hoṛko onkoren boeha khudạuko khon do tinrem manakoa?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Jiwetʼ Isorre kiriạkateń meneda, am bam roṛlere hõ setakʼrege hoṛko do amren boeha khudạuko thirkokʼa.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ar noa menkate uni do sakwae oroṅkeda. Unre sanam hoṛko thir hapeyena. Onko do ar Israelko bako khudạuletʼkoa ar lạṛhại hõ bako lạṛhạilena. 
2Samuel2:29 Abner ar uniren hoṛko do goṭa ńindạ Araba otet talate taṛam idikate jordan gaḍako paromena. Ona tayom Bithron talate taṛam idikate onko do Mahanayimteko seṭerena. 
2Samuel2:30 Joab do Abner ar bae khudạuledea uni doe ruạṛ hecʼena. Ar acʼren hoṛkoe jarwa mitʼketʼko khan Asahel ar Dạudren gelare hoṛ do onḍe bạnukʼkoa mente ńelena. 
2Samuel2:31 Menkhan Benjạminren okoeko do Abner sãoteko tahẽkan Dạudren hoṛko do onkoren pesae turuigel hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. 
2Samuel2:32 Onko do Asahelko kuṭuṅ idikedete Bethlehemteko senena ar uniren apatakʼ topareko topakedea. Ona tayom Joab ar uniren hoṛko do goṭa ńindạko taṛam idiketʼte setakʼ jokhecʼ Hebronteko seṭerena. 
2Samuel3:1 Sạul ar Dạudren lạṛhại phạdko talare ḍher din hạbicʼ lạṛhại calaoena. Dạud doe daṛe idiyena ar Sạulren lạṛhại phạdko doko nijor idiyena. 
2Samuel3:2 Hebronre tahen jokhecʼ Dạudren do arhõ hoponko janamena. Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Amon; uni do Jisreyel Ahinoamren hopone tahẽkana. 
2Samuel3:3 Uniren dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Kileab; uni doe tahẽkana Karmel Nabalren rạnḍi maejiu Abigaelren hopon. Tesaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Absalom; uni do Gesur raj Talmaeren hoponera Makherren hopone tahẽkana. 
2Samuel3:4 Ponicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Adoniạ; uni do Hogetren hopone tahẽkana. Mõṛẽyicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Sephaṭia; uni do Abitalren hopone tahẽkana. 
2Samuel3:5 Turuyicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Ithream; uni do Dạudren bạhuttetʼ Eglaren hopone tahẽkana. Dạudren nokoko hopon do Hebronreko janamlena. 
2Samuel3:6 Sạul ar Dạudren lạṛhại phạdko talare tinre lạṛhại calakʼkan tahẽkana unre Sạulren hoṛko modre Abner do acʼte daṛeanicʼe hoylena. 
2Samuel3:7 Ar Rispa ńutuman Sạulren mitʼṭen miluạ erae tahẽkantaea. Uni do Ayaren hoponerae tahẽkana. Mitʼdin Isboset do Abnere metadea, “Iń ạpuńren miluạ era tulucʼ do cedakʼem giticʼmitʼena?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Isabosetakʼ katha ańjomkate Abner do ạḍi raṅgaoenteye menkeda, “Iń do cetʼ Jihudạ secʼren seta kạnạń? Teheń hạbicʼ amren ạpum Sạulakʼ gharońjre ar uniren peṛa pạrbhạko ar gateko talare pạtiạrạnicʼ hoṛ kạnạń. Iń do Dạudakʼ tire bạń jimạ akatʼmea. Ar am do uni maejiu sãoteyem dusiyedeń kana!" 
2Samuel3:9 Probhu Isor do Dạud ṭhen kiriạkate okaṭakʼe gokʼletʼ onka iń bạń kạmi, metatʼme Sạulakʼ bõs khon rajosṭi hataokate Dan khon Berseba hạbicʼ Israel ar Jihudạ cetanre Dạudakʼ siṅghạson bạń teṅgoe enḍekhan Isor do Abner sạjạiye emaema ar ona do ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạige.”" 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Isboset do ar mitʼṭecʼ katha hõ Abner ṭhen roroṛ bae dilleda, ente uni doe botoradea." 
2Samuel3:12 Inạ tayom Abner do Dạud ṭhen hoṛ kolkate noa kathae menkeda, “Niạ disạm do okoeyakʼ kana? Am do iń tulucʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobos bandhaome baṛe. Iń do sanam Israelko am secʼ ạguko reakʼ iń goṛowama.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Dạude menkeda, “Bhagegea, am tulucʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń bandhaoa, menkhan am ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ mementeakʼ menakʼtińạ. Am do tinre arhõ iń ṭhenem hijukʼa unre Sạulren hoponera Mikal begor iń samaṅre alom hijukʼa.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Ona tayom Dạud do Sạulren hopon Isboset ṭhen hoṛkolkate noae baḍae ocokedea, “Ińren bạhu Mikạl imạńme. Iń do Philisṭikoakʼ mitʼsae khatnakʼakʼkote uniń baplaledea.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Unre Isbosetakʼ hukumte Mikalren jãwãetetʼ Layisren hopon Polṭiyel ṭhen khon Mikal doe ạgu ocoyena. 
2Samuel3:16 Uniren jãwãe Polṭiyel do goṭa hor rakʼ rakʼte Bahurim hạbicʼe pańja ạgukedea. Unre Abner do uniye metadea, “Am do oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼme.” Ar unre uni do oṛakʼteye ruạṛ senena." 
2Samuel3:17 Inạ lahare Abner do Israelren murubbiko ṭhene menletʼ tahẽkana, “Ape do Dạud raje lạgitʼpe menletʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel3:18 Ńitokʼ do ma onage onkaepe. Probhu Isor do Dạud reaṅe kiriạ akana, uni do acʼren guti Dạud hotete Philisṭikoakʼ tite khon ar onkoren eṭakʼ sanam bạiriko khon uniren hoṛ Israelkoe bańcaokoa.”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abner do Benjạminreko sãote hõ kathae roṛkeda. Ona chaḍa Israelko ar Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko okaṭakʼ cekae lạgidokʼko menetʼkan ona sanamakʼ Dạud baḍae ocoye lạgitʼ uni do Hebronteye senena. 
2Samuel3:20 Abner do acʼ sãote bargel hoṛ soṅgekate tinre Hebronte Dạud ṭhene seṭerena unre Dạud do uni ar uniren hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. 
2Samuel3:21 Ar Abner do Dạude metadea, “Israelren sanamko jemon am tulucʼ mitʼṭecʼ bandhaoakʼreko hijukʼ ar amakʼ kusileka onko cetanrem raj daṛeakʼ onate ińren mạlik maharaj ṭhen onko jarwako lạgitʼ ńitge iń do calakʼ hoyokʼtińạ.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud do Abnere sen ocoadea ar uni do sulukteye ruạṛena." 
2Samuel3:22 Unre Dạudren hoṛko ar Joab do bạirikoko bhagaoketʼkote aema luluṭakʼ jinisanteko ruạṛ hecʼena. Unre Abner do Hebronre Dạud ṭhen bae tahẽkana, ente Dạud do uniye bidạ akade tahẽkana ar uni do sulukteye sen akan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel3:23 Joab ar uniren lạṛhại phạdkoko ruạṛ hecʼen khan hoṛko do Joabko metadea, Nerren hopon Abner do raj ṭhene hecʼlena ar raj do uniye bidạ akadea ar uni do sulukteye ruạṛ senena." 
2Samuel3:24 Unre Joab do raj ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Am do cetʼem cekakeda? Abner do am ṭhene hecʼlenre cedakʼem sen ruạṛ ocokedea? Ńitokʼ uni doe ruạṛ calao akana." 
2Samuel3:25 Am do Nerren hopon Abnerem baḍae akadegea; uni do am sãote cholkate amakʼ khoj khobor hatao ar cetʼkom ceka kana ona baḍae joṅ lạgitʼe hecʼlena. 
2Samuel3:26 Niạ menkate Joab do Dạud ṭhen khone oḍok senente Abner sendraye lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Onko do Sirạ ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kuń ṭhen khon uniko ruạṛ ạgukedea. Menkhan Dạud do ona reakʼ bae baḍaeleda. 
2Samuel3:27 Abner do Hebronteye ruạṛ hecʼena khan Joab do uni sãote oko okote galmaraoae reaṅ cholte nagraha reakʼ phaṭok talareye idikedea. Ar ona tayom do lacʼre sobokʼ kedeteye gocʼkedea. Nonkate uni do acʼren boeha Asahelakʼ mãyãm reakʼe halakeda. 
2Samuel3:28 Joab ar uniren boeha Abisae do Abnerkin gocʼkedea, ente uni do unkinren boeha Asahel Gibiạn reakʼ lạṛhạireye gocʼledea. Tayomte Dạud do ona khobor ńamkateye menkeda, “Nerren hopon Abnerakʼ mãyãm reakʼ babotre iń ar ińakʼ rajosṭi do Probhu Isor samaṅre jaejug lạgitʼ bindusạngea. Joab ar uniren apatakʼ bõsren sanamkoge jemon ona mãyãm reakʼ dạyiko hoyokʼ. Joabakʼ bõsrenko sanam ghạṛicʼ jemon jãhãe baṅ jãhãe hereltetʼ khon boḍedakʼ oḍokokʼtako se murhucʼjom rog ńamko, jãhãege ṭheṅgate tiyokʼkateko taṛamma, arko khũn ocokʼma ar jomakʼ okulạnreko paṛaokʼma.”" 
2Samuel3:29  
2Samuel3:30  
2Samuel3:31 Inạ tayom Dạud do Joab ar uni soṅgeten sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do apan ạpin kicricʼ oṛecʼkate coṭ horogpe ar homor halaṅate Abnerakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ laha lahate calakʼpe.” Ar Dạud hõ mạ̃ṛĩ gokʼ idikoe pańja idiketʼkoa." 
2Samuel3:32 Ar abner do Hebronreye topa ocoyena. Ar raj do Abnerakʼ topa ṭhen ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe ehopʼena, ar sanam hoṛko rakʼkeda." 
2Samuel3:33 Unre raj do Abner reaṅ nonkae homorkeda; “Abner do bebuj hoṛko lekae gocʼena! 
2Samuel3:34 Amakʼ ti do tol baṅ tahẽkantama, ar jaṅgare hõ sikṛi do baṅ tahẽkana. Kharap hoṛkoakʼ tire cetʼleka hoṛko gujukʼ, onkage am hõm gocʼ ocoyena!” Niạ katha ańjomkate hoṛko do arhõ Abner lạgitʼ rarakʼko ehopʼena." 
2Samuel3:35 Bela tahenrege jemon Dạud jãhãnakʼe jom ona lạgitʼ hoṛko do uniko jormoṭkedea; menkhan Dạud do kiriạkateye menkeda, “Siń candoe hạsurokʼ lahare piṭhạ se eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ iń jom enḍekhan Isor do sạjạiye imạńma ar ona do bạṛicʼ sạjạige.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Sanam hoṛko do noako ańjomketʼ khan ạḍiko kusiyena. Sạrige, raj okakoe kạmiketʼ onate onko do ạḍiko kusiyena." 
2Samuel3:37 Enhilokʼ Dạudren hoṛko ar Israelren sanamkoko baḍaekeda, Nerren hopon Abner goje reaṅ do rajakʼ jãhãn hat baṅ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel3:38 Raj do acʼren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ bape baḍaea, teheń Israel disạmren mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ mukhiyại gocʼena mente?" 
2Samuel3:39 Raj lekate ińiń ojokʼ bahal oco akanrehõ teheń iń doń nijorena ar Seruyaren hoponko bạń dormoj daṛeako kana. Probhu Isorge behoketʼkoakʼ kuṛại doe emakoma.” 
2Samuel4:1 Abner do Hebronreye gocʼena menteye ańjomketʼ khan Sạulren hopon Isboset do dile atʼketʼtaea ar Israelko hõ botor caṛhaoatʼkoa. 
2Samuel4:2 Sạulren hopontetʼ secʼren luluṭkoren barea sordarkin tahẽkana. Unkin mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Bana ar eṭakʼicʼakʼ ńutum do Rekab tahẽkana. Unkin bana hoṛgekin tahẽkana Benjạmin gusṭiren Berot Rimon hoṛren hopon. Ar Berot do Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hĩsgeko sapʼetʼ tahẽkana," 
2Samuel4:3 ente Berotren hoṛko do Gitayimte ńir paskaokate teheń hạbicʼhõ onḍe upriạ lekako girobasokʼ kana. 
2Samuel4:4 Sạulren hopon Jonathanren do mitʼṭen hopone tahẽkana. Uni do leḍhageye tahẽkana. Jisreyel khon tinre Sạul ar Jonathanakʼ gujukʼ khobor hecʼena unre uniyakʼ umer do mõṛẽ bochor tahẽkana. Ona khobor ańjomkate gidrạren dhại buḍhi do uni hoborkate usạrateye dạṛetʼkan tahẽkan jokhecʼ gidrại giḍiledete uniyakʼ jaṅga do leḍhayentaea. Ar uni gidrạwakʼ ńutum do Mephiboset tahẽkana. 
2Samuel4:5 Berotren Rimon hoṛren hopon Rekab ar Bana do mitʼdin tikin okte Isbosete jirạu akan tahẽkanre uniyakʼ oṛakʼtekin boloyena. 
2Samuel4:6 Unkin do guhum hatao bhankate oṛakʼ bhitritekin boloyena. Unre Isboset do acʼakʼ giticʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ khaṭ cetanreye giticʼ jirạu joṅkan tahẽkana. Rekab ar Bana do uniyakʼ oṛakʼre bolokate lacʼkin bhoskaoketʼtaea arkin gocʼkedea, ar ona tayom do uniyakʼ bohokʼkin kuṭrạketʼte onḍe khonkin dạṛkeda. Unkin do goṭa ńindạ Araba reakʼ horte taṛamate Hebronte Dạud ṭhenkin idikeda. Arkin metadea, “Amren bạiri Sạul, okoe do amakʼ jiwi hatao reakʼe kurumuṭiyetʼ tahẽkan, uniren hopon Isbosetakʼ bohokʼ do nõkʼõe liń ạguakada. Teheń Probhu Isor do aboren mạlik maharaj secʼte Sạul ar uniren hopon cetanreye halakeda.”" 
2Samuel4:7  
2Samuel4:8  
2Samuel4:9 Dạud do Berotren Rimon hoṛren hopon Rekab ar uniren boeha Bana tạkine metatʼkinạ, “Okoe do sanam lekan muhin khone rukhiyạ akadiń uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isorre kiriạkateń meneda," 
2Samuel4:10 okoe hoṛ do bhage sombate ạguakada mente Sạulakʼ gujukʼ khobore emadiń tahẽkan uni do sapʼkate Siklogreń gocʼocoledea. Ente uni lạgitʼ do ona siropage emae reakʼ tahẽkantińạ. 
2Samuel4:11 Enḍekhan mitʼṭen bindusạn hoṛ okoe do uniyakʼ oṛakʼre bolokate aṭetʼreye khũn akade, uni bạṛicʼ hoṛ cetʼ artetʼge bạń sạjạiyea. Ona iạte iń do apeakʼ ti khon uniyakʼ mãyãm reakʼ iń hala hạliya ar dhạrti khon apeń meṭao cabapea.”" 
2Samuel4:12 Niạ menkate Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa ar onko do unkinko gocʼketʼkinạ. Onko do unkinakʼ ti-jaṅgako getʼ begarketʼ tạkina ar hoṛmo do Hebron reakʼ pukhri aṛereko akakada. Menkhan onko do Isbosetakʼ bohokʼ hataokate Hebronre Abnerakʼ topareko baekada. 
2Samuel5:1 Israelren sanam gusṭikorenko do Hebronre Dạud ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Am ar alekoakʼ hoṛmore do inạ mitʼ mãyãmge ạtukʼkana." 
2Samuel5:2 Sạul do aleren raje tahẽkanre Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdko do amgem ạyuretʼko tahẽkana; ar Probhu Isor do amgeye metatʼme tahẽkana acʼren hoṛko, metatʼme Israelko ńel todarotkom ar onkoren mukhiyạ hoyokʼme.”" 
2Samuel5:3 Israel disạmren sanam murubbiko do Hebronren raj Dạud ṭhenko jarwayena. Unre raj do Probhu Isorge gohayicʼe dohokedete onko sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda. Ar onko do Israel cetanre Dạudko rajkedea. 
2Samuel5:4 Dạud do tinre raje hoyena unre uniyakʼ umer do pegel bochor tahẽkantaea; ar pongel bochor hạbicʼ raje calaokeda. 
2Samuel5:5 Uni do Hebron khon Jihudạ disạm cetanre eae bochor tala ar Jerusalem khon goṭa Israel ar Jihudạ cetanre pegel bochore rajlena. 
2Samuel5:6 Raj ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do Jebusiạko akromonko lạgitʼ Jerusalem secʼko laha idiyena. Unre Jebusiạko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Onko do Dạudko metadea, “Nonḍe do bam bolo daṛeakʼa; kãṛã ar leḍhakoge amko laga ńirmea.” Onko doko hudisetʼ tahẽkana Dạud do onḍe bae bolo daṛeakʼa." 
2Samuel5:7 Menkhan Dạud do Sion reakʼ gaṛe hatkeda; onate ona do Dạud nagrahako ńutumkeda. 
2Samuel5:8 Enhilokʼ Dạude menletʼ tahẽkana, “Jãhãege, Jebusiạko, metatʼme onko kãṛãko ar leḍhako hạnkoe menetʼ khan uni do dakʼ nalako secʼte calakʼ hoyokʼtaea. Iń do onkoń hirkhạwako kana.” Ona iạte hoṛkoko mena, “Kãṛã ar leḍhako do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bako bolo daṛeakʼa.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Inạ tayom Dạud do ona gaṛre girobasokʼe ehopʼena ar ona reakʼ ńutum do Dạud nagrahae dohokeda. Millo khon ehopʼkate ona gaṛ reakʼ beṛhaete uni do nagrahae benaokeda. 
2Samuel5:10 Uni do dinke dine daṛe idiyena, ente sanam daṛean Probhu Isor do uni sãoteye tahẽkana." 
2Samuel5:11 Turren raj Hiram do Dạud ṭhen adom hoṛe kolketʼkoa ar onko sãote debdạru kaṭko, chutạr mistriko ar raj mistriko hõe kolketʼkoa. Onko do Dạud lạgitʼ mitʼṭen raj oṛakʼko benaokeda." 
2Samuel5:12 Dạud do unreye bujhạukeda, Probhu Isor do Israelko cetanre acʼakʼ raj hudại ṭarhaoketʼa ar acʼren hoṛko, metatʼme Israelko lạgitʼ acʼakʼ rajosṭiye maraṅketʼtaea." 
2Samuel5:13 Dạud do Hebron bạgikate Jerusalemte senkate arhõ chuṭki erakoe dohoana ar aema gidrạko janamena. 
2Samuel5:14 Jerusalemre uniren okoeko gidrạko janamlen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Simiyi, Sobab, Nathon ar Solomon." 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhar, Elisua, Nepheg, Japhia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elisama, Eliayada ar Eliphelot." 
2Samuel5:17 Philisṭiko do tinreko ańjomkeda, Dạud do Israelko cetanre raj hudạreye ojokʼ bahal akana unre onko do sanam lạṛhại phạdkoante uni hạne lạgitʼ sendra baṛayeko ehopʼena. Ar Dạud do ona kathae ańjomketʼ khan gaṛ ńutumanakʼ buruteye rakapʼ calaoena." 
2Samuel5:18 Ar Philisṭiko do hecʼkate Rephayim reakʼ buru otetekoreko pasnao idiyena. 
2Samuel5:19 Unre Dạud do Probhu Isor ṭhene kuliyana, “Iń do cetʼ Philisṭikoń ńẽtʼkoa? Am do cetʼ ińakʼ tire onkom jimạkoa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, Do calakʼme. Iń do khạṭige amakʼ tire Philisṭikoń soprotkoa.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Unre Dạud do Bakʼal Perasimteye senena ar onḍe Philisṭikoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Uniye menkeda, “Probhu Isor do ińren bạiriko iń samaṅ khone phoṛ idiketʼkoa ḍubạ dakʼ phoṛokʼ lekage.” Ona iạte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Bakʼal Perasimko dohokeda." 
2Samuel5:21 Ar Philisṭiko do akoren murhutʼko onḍeko giḍi oṭokatʼko khan Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do onkoko idiketʼkoa. 
2Samuel5:22 Tayomte Philisṭiko do arhõ hecʼkate Rophayim otetreko pasnaoena. 
2Samuel5:23 Unre Dạud do Probhu Isore kulikede khan uni doe metadea, “Mitʼ mohnḍa onko secʼ do alom calakʼa; menkhan onko tayom secʼ reakʼ konḍea dareko samaṅ secʼte onkom ńẽtʼkoa." 
2Samuel5:24 Ar konḍea darekore tinre lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ saḍem ańjoma unre am dom oḍok hijukʼa. Ona reakʼ mane do hoyokʼ kana, Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdko ńẽtʼko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do am laha lahateye calao akana.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekageye kạmikeda. Uni do Geba khon Gesor hạbicʼ goṭa hor Philisṭikoe gocʼ idiketʼkoa. 
2Samuel6:1 Dạud do arhõ Israelko mod khon pegel hajar bachao akan hoṛko mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa. 
2Samuel6:2 Dạud ar uniren sanam hoṛko Isorakʼ Sinduk do Bakʼale Jihudạ khon Jerusalemte idi lạgitʼ Bakʼal Jihudạ khonko mohnḍayena. Niạ sinduk do sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte oprom tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isor do sindukren Kerub kin talareye tahẽnkana." 
2Samuel6:3 Isorakʼ ona sinduk onko do buru cetan reakʼ Abinadabakʼ oṛakʼ khonko oḍok ạguketʼte mitʼṭecʼ nãwã sagaṛreko dohokeda. Us ar Ahio ńutuman Abinadabren hoponkin do taṛam taṛamte ona nãwã sagaṛkin laga idiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel6:4 Ar Isorakʼ ona sinduk do sagaṛ cetanre tahẽkana ar Ahio do ona laha lahateye calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel6:5 Dạud ar Israel jạtren sanam hoṛ Probhu Isor samaṅre debdạru kaṭte benaoakʼ sanam lekan bajnako ar binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, tabla, kortal ar ghạnṭikoante sereń sereńteko calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel6:6 Ado Nakhonakʼ khạrại ṭhenko seṭeren khan ḍaṅgra dokin tohotʼena; ar Us do tiye lahaketʼte Isorakʼ sinduke sapʼkeda. 
2Samuel6:7 Usakʼ niạ bebhukti kạmi ńelte Probhu Isorakʼ edre do uni cetanre paṛaoena. Ona iạte Probhu Isor do uniye ńẽtʼkedea, ar onate uni do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk pheḍreye gocʼena." 
2Samuel6:8 Us cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ noa edre ńelte Dạud do bae kusilena. Ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Peres Usko metakʼkana. 
2Samuel6:9 Enhilokʼ Dạud do Probhu Isor ạḍiye botoradea. Uniye menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do enḍekhan cekate iń ṭhen ạgukʼa?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Unre Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk acʼakʼ nagrahate ạgu bae rebenlena. Uni do ona Gatren Obed-Idomakʼ oṛakʼreye doho oṭokada. 
2Samuel6:11 Gatren Obed-Idomakʼ oṛakʼre Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do pe cando tahẽyena. Onate Probhu Isor do uni ar uniyakʼ gharońjren sanamkoe bhoratʼkoa. 
2Samuel6:12 Dạud raj doe ańjom ńamkeda je Isorakʼ sinduk Obed-Idomakʼ oṛakʼre tahẽkan iạte Probhu do uniyakʼ oṛakʼren sanamko ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼkoe bhorada. 
2Samuel6:13 Ar okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko ạguyetʼ tahẽkan onko do turui taṛamko taṛamketʼ tahẽkanre Dạud do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar mitʼṭen phẽṭãṛe samaṅede tahẽkana. 
2Samuel6:14 Dạud do Musnạ reakʼ ephod horokʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅre uniyakʼ sanam daṛete enejokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Samuel6:15 Unre Dạud ar Israelren sanamko rạskạte hoho hohowate ar sakwa oroṅ oroṅte Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko ạgukeda. 
2Samuel6:16 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do Dạudakʼ nagrahate seṭerena khan Sạulren hoponera Mikal do jalna khon oyoṅkate onakoe ńelkeda. Ar Probhu Isor samaṅre Dạud do donate enecʼkane ńelkedete uniye nihạ̃tkedea. 
2Samuel6:17 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ạgukate onko do Dạude beretʼakatʼ tạmbureko dohokeda. Ar Dạud do unre Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. 
2Samuel6:18 Jeredokʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅketʼ khan Dạud do sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte hoṛkoe bhoratʼkoa. 
2Samuel6:19 Ona tayom uni do sanam hoṛko, metatʼme jarwa akan Israelren sanam herelhoṛ ar maejiuko mimitʼ goṭecʼ piṭhạ, ar mimitʼ dholma jel ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ kismis piṭhại ematʼkoa. Ar ona tayom onko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Samuel6:20 Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼakʼ gharońjren hoṛko ạsirbad ako lạgitʼ tinreye ruạṛ hecʼena unre Sạulren hoponera Mikal do uni daram ạguye lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena are menkeda, “Israelkoren raj teheń do cetʼlekae manotena! Uni do kharap hoṛko leka acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩko samaṅre hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼkoe totʼ giḍiketʼtaea.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Dạud do Mikale metadea, “Iń do Probhu Isor samaṅrege onań onka akada. Uni do acʼren hoṛko samaṅre, metatʼme Israelko cetanre cakʼlaoicʼ menteye ojokʼ bahalko lạgitʼ amren ạpum se uniyakʼ gharońjren okoege bae bachaoletʼkoa menkhan ińgeye bachao akadińạ. Ona iạte iń do Probhu Isor samaṅreń rạskạkʼ kana." 
2Samuel6:22 Iń do noa khon arhoń copodokʼa ar iń ṭhen arhoń huḍińokʼa. Menkhan am okoe kạ̃ṛmĩkoakʼ katham roṛetʼkan onko do ińko manotińạ.” 
2Samuel6:23 Ar Sạulren hoponera Mikal do ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ bạńjhigeye tahẽyena. 
2Samuel7:1 Ona tayom raj do raj oṛakʼre tahene ehopʼena ar Probhu Isor do uni beṛhaeten bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạkedea. 
2Samuel7:2 Mitʼ do raj do Nathan nạbiye metadea, “Ńelme, iń do debdạru kaṭ reakʼ oṛakʼreń girobasokʼ kana menkhan Isorakʼ sinduk do tạmbure menakʼa.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathan do raje roṛ ruạṛadea, “Amakʼ monre oka cekae reakʼ menakʼ onage onkaeme. Probhu Isor do am soṅgere menaea.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Menkhan enhilokʼ ńindạge Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Nathan ṭhen seṭerena; Uniye menkeda," 
2Samuel7:5 “Am do senkate ińren guti Dạudem metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ińakʼ tahen lạgitʼ am do cetʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼem benaoa?" 
2Samuel7:6 Misor disạm khon Israelkoń oḍok ạguko hilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ jãhã oṛakʼre hõ bạń tahẽkana. Iń do tạmburege tahẽkate mitʼ tahen jaega khon eṭakʼ tahen jaegateń senlena. 
2Samuel7:7 Okoe nạbiko cetanre ińren hoṛko jotonko lạgitʼ bhariń ematʼko tahẽkan, ar Israelko sãote judạ judạ jaegare ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkan jokhecʼ okoe mukhiyạ hõ bạń metatʼko tahẽkana, cedakʼ debdạru reakʼ kaṭte iń lạgitʼ oṛakʼ bape benaoeda.’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Ńitokʼ ińren guti Dạud metaeme, sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘ińren hoṛ do Israelkoren cakʼlaoyicʼ hoyokʼ lạgitʼ ińge gupi ṭạnḍi khon, bhiḍi palrenko tayom khoniń ạgu akatʼmea." 
2Samuel7:9 Ar okako jaegatem senlen onḍege iń hõ am sãoteń senlena ar am samaṅ khon sanam bạirikoń marao caba akatʼkoa. Ar dhạrtire iń do amakʼ ńutumiń maraṅ ocoya. 
2Samuel7:10 Ińren hoṛ Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegań ṭhik dohoyte onḍege cara lekań rohoekoa, jemon onko do akoakʼ jaegare sulukteko girobas daṛeakʼ ar ińren hoṛ Israelko cetanre cakʼlaoyicʼ iń bahale tayom onko cetanre bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ okako santao hecʼlen onka do ar bako daṛeakʼa. Iń do sanam bạirikoakʼ ti khon amiń rukhiyạmea. “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do arhõń meneda, iń apnarge amren bõskoń teṅgo rakapʼkoa." 
2Samuel7:11  
2Samuel7:12 Amakʼ bahaokʼ dinko mucạtʼlen khan am do amren hapṛamko ṭhenem calakʼre am bodolte am bõsren mitʼ hoṛ, amren hopongeń duṛubea ar uniyakʼ rajosṭiyiń ṭarhaotaea." 
2Samuel7:13 Amren uni hoponge ińakʼ ṭhonok lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaoa. Ar uniyakʼ raj siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena. 
2Samuel7:14 Iń do uniren apatiń hoyokʼa ar uni do ińren hopone hoyokʼa. Ar uniye behok lekhan eṭakʼ hoṛ cetʼleka sạjạiko ńam uni hõ onkageń sạjạiyea. 
2Samuel7:15 Menkhan ińakʼ dulạṛ do tishõ uni cetan khon bạń ocoga, cetʼleka Sạul cetan khoniń ocokʼletʼte amakʼ hor khoniń ocokʼ giḍilede." 
2Samuel7:16 Amakʼ bõs ar rajosṭi do am samaṅre jaejug ṭarhao akae tahena. Ar amakʼ siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Niạ dorson reakʼ sanamakʼ kathako Nathan do Dạude lạiyadea. 
2Samuel7:18 Niạko katha ańjomkate Dạud raj do tạmbu bhitriteye boloyena ar Probhu Isor samaṅre duṛupʼkateye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ińge baṅ cetʼ ar ińakʼ bõsge baṅ cetʼ, amge nunạkʼ hạbicʼem ạyur ạguakadińạ." 
2Samuel7:19 E Probhu Isor am samaṅre noage ḍher do baṅ hoyakana; inạ sãote amren gutiyakʼ bõsrenkoakʼ tayom daram katha hõm lạiyeda. E Probhu Isor, niạge jemon manwa lạgitʼ amakʼ bondobos hoyokʼ." 
2Samuel7:20 “Dạud do am ṭhen ar cetʼe men daṛekea? E Probhu Isor, amren guti mam baḍae akadege." 
2Samuel7:21 Amakʼ katha iạte ar amakʼ sana lekate niạ bhạlạiyakʼem kạmi akada ar amren gutiyem baḍae ocoakadea. 
2Samuel7:22 E Probhu Isor, am dom maraṅgea! Am leka do ar celege bạnukʼkoa ar am chaḍa eṭakʼ jãhãn Isor hõ bạnukʼkoa; noa katha do aleakʼ luturtegele ańjomakada." 
2Samuel7:23 Amren Israel jạtrenko leka dhạrtire ar eṭakʼ jãhãn jạtrenko menakʼkoa okoe do am jạtrenko hoeocoko lạgitʼ ar amakʼ ṭhonok sodor lạgitʼ onko chaḍaoko lạgitʼem calaolen? Ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko samaṅre amakʼ ńutumte amren hoṛko lạgitʼ maraṅ ar botoranakʼ kạmim kạmiakada, cetʼleka amren hoṛko Misor disạm khon eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren ar debotakoakʼ ti khonem chaḍao ạguakatʼko?" 
2Samuel7:24 Amren hoṛ Israelko do jaejug amren hoṛko hoyokʼ lạgitʼem teṅgo akatʼkoa, ar E Probhu Isor, am do onkoren Isorem hoyakana." 
2Samuel7:25 “Ńitokʼ do E Probhu Isor, amren guti ar uniyakʼ bõs reaṅ okaṭakʼem gokʼakatʼ ona baṛe jaejug rukhiyạ akae dohoyme. Ar amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage kạmime." 
2Samuel7:26 Onate amren guti Dạudakʼ bõs do am samaṅre ṭarhao akae tahena ar jaejug amakʼ ṭhonokge hoyokʼa. Unre hoṛko mena, ‘sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu do Israelkoren Isor kanae.’" 
2Samuel7:27 “E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu, Israelkoren Isor, amren guti ṭhen niạ reaṅ do sodortegem menakada, ‘am lạgitʼ iń do mitʼṭecʼ bõsrenkoń benao rakapʼkoa.’ Onate am ṭhen niạ koejoṅ amren gutiyakʼ monre dil hoyakana." 
2Samuel7:28 E Probhu, amkangeam Isor do. Amakʼ katha do sạrigea, ar noa bhạlạiakʼ reakʼ iń ṭhenem gokʼakada." 
2Samuel7:29 Ńitokʼ am do kusite amren gutiyakʼ bõsko bhorakʼme jemon onko do jaejug am samaṅreko tahen. E Probhu Isor, apnartege ona katha dom men akada ar amakʼ bhorte amren nui gutiyakʼ bõskore jaejug ạsirbad tahẽ akae tahena.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Dạud do Philisṭikoe bhagaoketʼko khan acʼakʼ gobolreye ạguketʼkoa. Uni do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon Metheg-ama nagrahae hatkeda. 
2Samuel8:2 Dạud do Moabrenko hõe bhagaoketʼkoa. Uni do Moabrenkoe ńẽtʼketʼkote otreye giticʼketʼkoa ar baberteye jokhaketʼkoa. Pạhil bar baber jokharen hoṛ doko gocʼ ocoyena ar mitʼ baber jokharen hoṛ do jiwetʼko doho ocoyena. Inạ tayom Moabrenko do Dạud gobolre tahẽkate khajna emaeko ehopʼena. 
2Samuel8:3 Tayomte Sobaren raj Rehobren hopon Hadadeser do tinre phurạt gaḍa hạbicʼ arhõ ektiạri ńam ruạṛ lạgitʼe senena unre Dạud do uni sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. 
2Samuel8:4 Dạud do acʼren mitʼ hajar eae sae aswariko ar bargel hajar otten lạṛhại phạdkoe hatketʼkoa. Onkoren mitʼsae rãt gạḍiren sadomko dohokate sarecʼ sanam sadomkoakʼ do jaṅga sire samakʼketʼtakoa. 
2Samuel8:5 Damesekreko tahẽnkan Aramrenko do tinre Sobaren raj Hadadser goṛowae lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena unre Dạud do onkoren bargel bar hajar hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. 
2Samuel8:6 Dạud do Aramrenkoakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ Damesekre acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa. Onate Aramrenko do uni gobolre tahẽkate khajna emokʼko ehopʼena. Nonkate Dạud do jãhã ṭhạ̃igeye calakʼkan tahẽkan Probhu Isor do onḍegeye jitạu ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Samuel8:7 Hadadeserren hoṛkoakʼ sona reakʼ ḍhalko Dạud do Jerusalemteye ạgukeda. 
2Samuel8:8 Betah ar Berothae ńutumanakʼ Hadadeserakʼ barea nagraha khon Dạud raj do ạḍi utạr pitạlkoe ạgukeda. 
2Samuel8:9 Ar Hamatren raj Toi doe ańjomkeda, Dạud do Hadadeserren goṭa lạṛhại phạdkoe bhagao akatʼkoa." 
2Samuel8:10 Ar Dạud do Hadadeser sãoteye jitạu akante uni boge judạ ar johar emae lạgitʼ Toi do acʼren hopon Joram Dạud ṭhene kolkedea. Nui Hadadeser sãote Toi do aema dhaoe lạṛhạilena. Ar Joram do Dạud lạgitʼ sona, rupạ ar pitạl reakʼ jinisko soṅgeteye ạgudaraleda." 
2Samuel8:11 Niạ lahare Dạud do Aramrenko, Moabrenko, Amonrenko, Philisṭiko ar Amalekeki jạtrenkoe dobnaoketʼkote onkoakʼ sona, rupạ, ạgukate Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar dohokada, ar Sobaren raj Rehobren hopon Hadadeser ṭhen khon okakoe luṭ ạgu akatʼ tahẽkan ona hõe begar dohoakatʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Joram emakʼ jinisko hõ Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar dohoakada." 
2Samuel8:12  
2Samuel8:13 Dạud do buluṅ lodamre gel irạl hajar Aramren hoṛko gocʼkateye ruạṛ hecʼen khan uniyakʼ sunam do goṭa beṛhaete pasnao idiyena. 
2Samuel8:14 Edom disạm reakʼ sanam jaegakore uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa ar onate Edomrenko hõ uni gobolreko tahẽyena. Ar Dạud do jãhãtegeye calakʼkan tahẽkan Probhu Isor do onḍegeye jitạu ocoyedekan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel8:15 Dạud do goṭa Israel disạm cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena. Uniren hoṛko cetanre uni do hok ar dhorom reakʼe bicạretʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel8:16 Seruyaren hopon Joab do uniren maraṅ subedare tahẽkana ar Ahiludren hopon Jehosaphat do uniyakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam itihãskoe ol dohoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel8:17 Ar Ahiṭubren hopon Sadok ar Abiatharren hopon Ahimelok tạkin do naekekin tahekana ar Seraya do rajren olokʼicʼe tahẽkana. 
2Samuel8:18 Jehuyadaren hopon Benaya do Kerethi ar Pelethikoren mathakin tahẽkana, ar Dạudren hoponko do rajren sosolhako ar naekeko tahẽkana." 
2Samuel9:1 Mitʼdin Dạud doe kuliyana, “Ńit hạbicʼ cetʼ Sạul gharońjren jãhãe jiwetʼ menakʼkoa, one onko lạgitʼ Jonathan khạtirte dayań udukʼ daṛeke?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Siba ńutuman Sạulren mitʼṭecʼ gutiye tahẽkana. Hoṛko do uniko hohowadete Dạud ṭhenko idikedea. Ar raj do uniye kulikedea, “Amge cetʼ Siba do?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, amren guti Siba doń ińkangea.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Raj doe kuliyana, “Sạulakʼ gharońjkoren cetʼ jãhãe jiwetʼ menakʼkoa one onko cetanre dayań udukʼ daṛeke?” Siba do roṛ ruạṛketʼte raje metadea, “Jonathanren mitʼṭen hopon ńitʼ hõ jiwetʼ menaegea, ar uni do banar jaṅga leḍhagetaea.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Raje kuliyana, “Okare menaea?” Sibae menkeda, “Uni do Lodebarre Amielren hopon Makirakʼ oṛakʼreye tahẽnkana.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Unre Dạud do Lodebarte hoṛ kolkate Amielren hopon Makirakʼ oṛakʼ khon uniye ạgukedea. 
2Samuel9:6 Sạulren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jonathanren hopon Mephiboset do Dạud ṭhene hecʼena ar otre ombakʼkateye ḍobokʼadea. Dạude menkeda, “E Mephiboset.” Uni doe menkeda, “Ma roṛme, amren golam kangeạń.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Alom botorokʼa. Iń do amren ạpum Jonathan khạtirte khạṭige dayań udukʼama. Amren goṛomme haṛam Sạulakʼ sanamakʼ jaega jumiń ruạṛama, ar am do jao ghuṛi ińakʼ ṭebilrem jom ńũiya.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Niạ katha ańjomkate Mephiboset do uni ḍobokʼ adeteye menkeda, “Amren guti doe celekante, iń lekan mitʼṭecʼ gocʼ setam beṅgetʼae kana.”" 
2Samuel9:9 Unre raj do Sạulren guti Siba hohowadeteye metadea, “Sạul ar uniyakʼ gharońjre cetʼko tahẽkan ona joto do uniren goṛomtetʼ koṛań emadea." 
2Samuel9:10 Am, amren hoponko ar amren gutiko do uniyakʼ jumi caskate phosolpe samṭaoa jemon amren kisạ̃ṛren goṛomtetʼ koṛa do jomakʼ hoyokʼtae; menkhan amren kisạ̃ṛren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Mephiboset do jao okte ińakʼ ṭebilreye jom ńũiya.” Sibaren do gelmõṛẽ goṭen hopon ar bargel gutiko tahẽkantaea." 
2Samuel9:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate Siba do raje metadea, “Ińren mạlik maharaj do acʼren guti okaṭakʼ kạmiye metae onage uni doe kạmiya." 
2Samuel9:12 Mika ńutuman Mephibosetren mitʼṭen huḍiń koṛa gidrại tahẽkana; ar Sibakʼ gharońjren sanamkoge Mephibosetren gutiko tahẽkana. 
2Samuel9:13 Ar Mephiboset do Rajakʼ ṭebilreye jom ńũiyetʼ tahẽkante Jerusalemreye tahenkan tahẽkana. Uni do banar jaṅgage leḍha tahẽkantaea. 
2Samuel10:1 Amonkoren raje gocʼen khan uniren hopon Hanun do uni bodolteye rajena. 
2Samuel10:2 Dạude menkeda, “Hanunren apattetʼ Nahas ińre cetʼleka pạtiạranicʼe tahẽkan onkage iń hõ Hanunre pạtiạr akaniń tahena.” Ona iạte uniren apatakʼ gujukʼre uniyakʼ jiwi raṛecʼtae lạgitʼ uni do adom hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Onate Dạudren hoṛ do Amonrenkoakʼ disạmteko calaoena." 
2Samuel10:3 Menkhan Amonren mukhiyạko do akoren kisạ̃ṛ Hanunko metadea, “Am do cetʼ noam hudiseda, Dạud do ạpume manotede tahẽkante jiwi raṛejtam lạgitʼ hoṛe kolakatʼkoa? Uni disạm ciyại lạgitʼe kolakatʼkoa jemon nagraha reakʼ khoj khoborko hatao daṛeakʼte tayomte onako marao daṛeakʼ.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Unre Hanun do Dạudren hoṛko sapʼkate mitʼ sa aṛe reakʼ gocokoe hoyoketʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ jeleń aṅgrop reakʼ adha, metakʼme ḍanḍa hạbicʼe getʼ kuṭrạketʼtakoa are kolgotʼkatʼkoa." 
2Samuel10:5 Dạud do ona kathae ańjomketʼ khan onkoe kolletʼko hoṛ sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ arhõ adom hoṛkoe kolkatʼkoa, ente onko hoṛ do lajaoteko thakao caba akan tahẽkana. Raj doe roṛ gotʼkada, “Gocoko ạuri harakʼ hạbicʼ ape do Jerikhorege tahẽ hataṛokʼpe; ar ona tayom do ruạṛ hijukʼpe.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Amonrenko tinreko bujhạu daṛeada, onko do Dạud ṭhenko kurud ocoakana mente. Unre onko do Bethrehobren ar Sobaren bargel hajar otten lạṛhại phạdko, ar Makaren mitʼ hajar hoṛko ar Toabren gelbar hajar hoṛkoe bhaṛaketʼkoa." 
2Samuel10:7 Niạ ańjomkate Dạud do Joab ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe kolkatʼkoa. 
2Samuel10:8 Unre Amonrenko do oḍok hecʼkate akoakʼ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen lạṛhại lạgitʼ akoren phạdko sapṛaoketʼkoa. Soba ar Rehobren Arami hoṛko ar Toab ar Makaren lạṛhại phạdko do eṭakʼ secʼre bilạn ṭạnḍireko thạrena. 
2Samuel10:9 Joab doe ńelkeda acʼ samaṅ secʼ ar acʼ tayom secʼre Aramren lạṛhại phạdkoko sapṛao akana. Onate uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko tala khon adomkoe bachaoketʼkote onko upạrteye thạrketʼkoa. 
2Samuel10:10 Ar sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko do acʼren boeha Abisae tabere Amonrenko upạrteye thạrketʼkoa. 
2Samuel10:11 Joab do acʼren boehae metadea, “Aramrenko iń khon daṛeanko hoyokʼ enḍekhan am do iń goṛowạń lạgitʼem hijukʼa, ar Amonrenko am khon daṛeanko hoyokʼ enḍekhan iń do amiń goṛowama." 
2Samuel10:12 Dil dohoyme; alaṅren hoṛko lạgitʼ ar aboren Isorakʼ nagrahako lạgitʼ dela, dil salakʼ bon lạṛhạilenge. Ar Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye onkaema.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Niạ menkate Joab do acʼren lạṛhại phạdkowante Aramrenko tulucʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼe laha idiyen khan onko do uni samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. 
2Samuel10:14 Aramrenko dạdạṛko ńelketʼko khan Amonrenko hõ Joabren boeha Abisoe samaṅ khonko dạṛketʼte nagraha bhitriteko boloyena. Ar Joab hõ Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Samuel10:15 Aramrenko do Israel ṭhenko bhagao ocoyena menteko ńelketʼ khan onko do arhõko jarwa mitʼena. 
2Samuel10:16 Ar Hadadeser raj do hoṛ kolkate Phurạt gaḍa hanasareko girobasokʼkan Aramrenkoe ạguketʼkoa. Ar onko do Helamteko hecʼena. Hadadeserren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedar Subak do onkoren ạyuricʼe tahẽkana. 
2Samuel10:17 Ado Dạud ona kathako baḍae ocokede khan uni do goṭa Israelren lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkoa ar Jordan gaḍa paromkate Helamteye calaoena. Onate Aramrenko do Dạud upạrte akoren lạṛhại phạdko thạrketʼkoa," 
2Samuel10:18 menkhan onko do Israelko samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. Unre Dạud do onkoren eae sae rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko ar pongel hajar aswarikoe gocʼketʼkoa. Uni do onkoren subedar Subak hõe ńẽtʼkedea; onate Subak do onḍeye gocʼena. 
2Samuel10:19 Hadadeser taberen rajko do tinreko ńelkeda, Israel ṭhenko bhagao ocokʼkana mente unre onko do Israelko sãote sulukokʼ lạgitʼ bondobosko bandhaokeda ar onko gobolreko tahẽyena. Ar unkhon Aramrenko do Israelko botorte Amonrenko ar bako goṛowatʼkoa." 
2Samuel11:1 Bochor reakʼ etohopʼ kana, ar rapajko do lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok calakʼa. Un jokhecʼ Dạud hõ lạṛhại lạgitʼ Joab ar uniren eṭakʼ subedarko ar Israelren lạṛhại phạdkoe kolketʼkoa. Onko do Amonrenkoko jarkharketʼkote Raba nagrahako gheraokeda. Menkhan Dạud do Jerusalemregeye tahẽyena." 
2Samuel11:2 Mitʼdin maraṅ dakʼ lo ber Dạud do acʼakʼ aṭetʼ khon beretʼkate raj oṛakʼ reakʼ chatreye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana. Unre uni do chat cetan khon mitʼṭen maejiu ḍạbrạkʼ kane ńelkedea. Maejiu do ńelokʼte ạḍi napaeye tahẽkana. 
2Samuel11:3 Unre Dạud do uni maejiu reakʼ khoj hatao lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Mitʼṭen hoṛ doe menkeda, “Uni do Eliamren hoponera Uriạ Hitiren oṛakʼ hoṛ Bethseba kanae.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Ar Dạud do acʼ ṭhen ạguiye lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Ado maejiue hecʼen khan Dạud do uni sãoteye loṭghuṭikeda. Unre maejiu do acʼakʼ candoteakʼ khone sapha gotʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar ona tayom maejiu do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Samuel11:5 Ar maejiu do bhạrti hoṛmo akana menteye bujhạuketʼ khan ona khobor do Dạud ṭhene kolkeda. 
2Samuel11:6 Unre Dạud do Joab niạ kathae roṛgotʼadea, “Uriạ Hiti do iń ṭhen kolkae me.” Onate Joab do Dạud ṭhene kolkedea." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriạ do Dạud ṭhene hecʼen khan Joab ar lạṛhại phạdko reaṅ boge judạ khobor ar lạṛhại cetʼleka calakʼ kana onae kulikedea. 
2Samuel11:8 Ona tayom uni do Uriại metadea, “Amakʼ oṛakʼte senkate ti jaṅga ạbukokʼte jirạukʼme.” Uriạ do raj oṛakʼ khone oḍokena ar raj do uni lạgitʼ thoṛa sandese kolkeda." 
2Samuel11:9 Menkhan Uriạ do acʼakʼ oṛakʼte bae senlena. Uni do rajren sanam kạmiyạko sãote raj oṛakʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạr aṛeregeye giticʼena. 
2Samuel11:10 Dạud ona kathako baḍae ocokede khan uni do Uriại metadea, “Am ma lạṛhại khonem ruạṛ hecʼakan, enḍekhan cedakʼ amakʼ oṛakʼte do bam calaolena?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriạ do Dạude metadea, “Israel ar Jihudạren lạṛhại phạdko do goha sindukante tạmbure menakʼkoa, ar ińren subedar Joab hõ ṭạnḍire menaea. Ar iń do cekate ińakʼ oṛakʼte senkateń jom-ńũiya ar ińren bạhu tulucʼ iń giticʼ midokʼa? Amreń kiriạkʼ kana, nonkan kạmi do tishõ ohogeń kạmi daṛelea.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Unre Dạud do uniye metadea, “Teheń hõ nonḍege tahenme; ar gapa doń kol ruạṛmea.” Onate Uriạ do enhilokʼ ar ona dosar hilokʼ hõ Jerusalemregeye tahẽyena." 
2Samuel11:13 Ar Dạud do Uriại neotakedea ar acʼ sãoteye jom-ńũ ocokedete uniye bul ocokedea. Ar ạyupʼen khan Uriạ do rajren kạmiyạko talare acʼakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼena, menkhan acʼakʼ oṛakʼte do bae senlena." 
2Samuel11:14 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼ Dạud do mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhi olkate Uriạ hotete Joab ṭhene kolkeda. 
2Samuel11:15 Onare niạ kathae olkeda, “Okare kajak lạṛhại hoyokʼkan onḍe Uriạ do lạṛhại phạdko laharem dohoyea, ar uni tayom khonpe ocogokʼte unipe ńẽtʼ ocoyea jemone gujukʼ." 
2Samuel11:16 Onate nagrahako gherao jokhecʼ Joab do Uriạ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ jaegateye kolkedea okare daṛean lạṛhại birko tahẽkan. 
2Samuel11:17 Ar nagraharen hoṛ do oḍok hecʼkate Joab sãote lạṛhạiko ehopʼena ar unre Dạudren lạṛhại phạdren adomkoko gocʼ ocoyena ar ona sãote Uriạ Hiti hõe gocʼena. 
2Samuel11:18 Joab do hoṛ kolkate lạṛhại reakʼ joto khobor do Dạude baḍae ocokedea. Ar Joab do khobo idiyetʼkan hoṛe metadea, “Lạṛhại reakʼ niạ khobor raj ṭhen seṭerlen khan pasecʼ uni doe edrekʼa are metama, ‘nagraha reakʼ nunạkʼ sor do cedakʼpe senlena? Pạcri cetan khon sarteko tuńpe ona do cetʼ bape baḍaekan tahẽkana?" 
2Samuel11:19  
2Samuel11:20  
2Samuel11:21 Jerubaset hopon Abimelek do okoe ṭhene gocʼ ocolena? Mitʼṭen maejiu hotetege cetʼ baṅa, one Tobesre pạcri cetan khon jante dhiriye giḍiwade tahẽkanteye gocʼlede. Ar cedakʼ ape do pạcri sorpe senlena?” Uni niạ kathae metam khan unim metaea, amren guti Uriạ Hiti doe gocʼena.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Unre uni hoṛ doe mohnḍayena ar Dạud ṭhen seṭerkate Joab okae metade tahẽkana onae baḍae ocokedea. 
2Samuel11:23 Uni do Dạude metadea, “Pạhilre onko do ale khon ḍher daṛe salakʼ ale upạrteko oḍok hecʼlena, menkhan ale do nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼle khudạu idiketʼkoa." 
2Samuel11:24 Nonkate dhinkiạko do pạcri cetan khon amren gutiko cetanre sar aṛakʼko ehopʼena. Onate rajren adom hoṛ doko gocʼena. Ar amren guti Uriạ hõe gocʼena.” 
2Samuel11:25 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Joab metaeme jemon mon aloe bạrijtae, ente lạṛhại jokhecʼ tarwaṛe do celege rehay bae emakoa. Nagraha upạrte arhõ kajakte lạṛhạipe jemon onape jarkhar daṛeakʼ. Am do niạ kathate Joabem udgạuea.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Uriạ Hitiren bạhu do acʼren jãwãeyakʼ gujukʼ khobore ańjomketʼ khan homor halaṅe ehopʼena. 
2Samuel11:27 Ado homor halaṅ reakʼ okte sạten khan Dạud do acʼakʼ oṛakʼte uniye ạgukedea. Ar acʼren bạhui hoyena ar mitʼṭen gidrại janamkedea. Menkhan Dạud okae cekaketʼ onate Probhu Isor do bae kusilena. 
2Samuel12:1 Probhu Isor do unre Dạud ṭhen Nathan nạbiye kolkedea. Uni do Dạud ṭhen senkateye metadea, “Mitʼ nagrahare bar hoṛkin tahẽkana. Unkin modre mitʼ hoṛ do kisạ̃ṛ ar eṭakʼicʼ do ạḍitetʼ reṅgecʼe tahẽkana." 
2Samuel12:2 Kisạ̃ṛ hoṛren do ạḍi utạr ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍiko tahẽkantaea. 
2Samuel12:3 Menkhan uni reṅgecʼ hoṛakʼ do cetʼge baṅ tahẽkantaea, uniren do eken mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopone tahẽkana. Uni do kirińkateye ạsulede tahẽkana. Uni do acʼ ar acʼren hopon ar hoponerako sãote dohokateye ạsul harayede tahẽkana. Ar uni reṅgecʼ hoṛ okae jometʼ tahẽkan uni bhiḍi hopon hõ onageye jometʼ tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ bạṭi khongeye ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar uni ṭhengeye guṅgutʼkan tahẽkana. Uni ṭhen do hoponera lekageye tahẽkana." 
2Samuel12:4 Mitʼdin mitʼṭen peṛa do uni kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ ṭhene hecʼena. Menkhan kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do uni peṛa acʼren ḍaṅgra se bhiḍite peṛaye do bae khojleda. Ona bodolte uni reṅgecʼ hoṛren bhiḍi hopon ạgukate acʼren peṛa lạgitʼe isinkedea.” 
2Samuel12:5 Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud do uni kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoena. Uni do Nathane metadea, “Probhu Isore jiwetʼ lekage, okoe hoṛ nonkae kạmi akatʼ uni do gocʼ ocokʼ lek kanae." 
2Samuel12:6 Uni do thoṛa hõ mãyã udukʼ baṅkate nonkae kạmi akatʼte bhiḍi hopon reakʼ pon doboṛ dam em ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea.” 
2Samuel12:7 Unre Nathan do Dạude metadea, “Am kangeam uni hoṛ do. Israelren Probhu Isor do noa kathageye meneda, ‘ińge Israel cetanre raj menkateń ojokʼ bahal akatʼmea ar Sạulakʼ ti khoniń rukhiyạ akatʼmea." 
2Samuel12:8 Amren mạlikakʼ sanamakʼ iń emakawatʼmea ar uniren bạhuko hõ amakʼ hoborreń ematʼmea. Israel ar Jihudạren sanam gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ dạyik hõń emakawatʼmea. Niạko hõ am lạgitʼ ḍherteakʼ baṅ hoylen khan iń do arhõń emkema. 
2Samuel12:9 Menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan ona kạmikate cedakʼ uniyakʼ katha dom nihạ̃t akada? Uni Hiti hoṛ Uriạ do tarwaṛetem gocʼ ocokedea ar uniren bạhu do amren bạhu mentem hatao akadea, ar Amonrenko hotetem gocʼ ocoakadea." 
2Samuel12:10 Am do ińem nihạ̃t akadińạ ar uni Uriạren bạhu do amren bạhu mentem dohoakadea, ona iạte amakʼ gharońj do khũniạhi reakʼ ti khon tishõ rukhiyạ bae ńama.’" 
2Samuel12:11 “Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, ‘iń do amakʼ gharońj khonge am do muhinreń paṛao ocomea. Amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege amren erako do amren hoṛiń emaea. Uni do sanamko samaṅre amren erako tulucʼe giticʼ midokʼa." 
2Samuel12:12 Am do oko okotem kạmi akada menkhan iń do ḍig ḍig marsalre jotoko samaṅre onań kạmi ocoya, hẽ sanam Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Unre Dạud do Nathane metadea, “Iń do Probhu Isor upạrteń kại akada.” Nathane roṛ ruạṛadea, “Probhu Isor do amakʼ kạiye ikạ akatʼtama; am do bam gujukʼa." 
2Samuel12:14 Menkhan noam kạmi akatʼte am do Probhu Isorren bạiriko nindạu reakʼ ạtem ematʼkoa. Ona iạte amren okoeṭakʼ gidrại janam akan uni do khạṭigeye gujukʼa.” 
2Samuel12:15 Ar Nathan do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ar Uriạ hoṛren bạhuttetʼakʼ hoṛmore Dạudren okoeṭakʼ koṛa gidrại janamlen Probhu Isorakʼ hạnte uni do ạḍitetʼe ruạ kạhilena. 
2Samuel12:16 Unre Dạud do uni gidrạ lạgitʼ Isor ṭhen nehõrokʼe ehopʼena. Uni doe upạskeda ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼte senkate otreye giticʼ aṅgayena. 
2Samuel12:17 Raj oṛakʼren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko do ot khon berede lạgitʼ uni ṭhenko calaoena, menkhan uni do beretʼ bae rebenlena ar onko sãote hõ bae jom-ńũleda." 
2Samuel12:18 Ruạ eae din tayom uni gidrạ doe gocʼena. Ar Dạudren kạmiyạko do gidrạ gocʼen reakʼ baḍae ocoye do bako dilleda. Onkoko menkeda, “Gidrạtae jiwetʼe tahẽkanre bon metade tahẽkanre hõ aboakʼ katha bae ańjomleda. Ar ńitokʼ do cekate bon metaea gidrạ doe gocʼena? Ar bon metae khan hoedaṛeakʼa uni do acʼakʼ jãhãnakʼe hạn botejtaea.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Kạmiyạko talare khae khoe joṅkane ńelketʼko khan Dạud doe bujhạukeda, gidrạ doe gocʼentaea. Uni doe kuliyana, “Gidrạ do cetʼe gocʼena?” Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Hẽ, gocʼenae.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Unre Dạud do ot khone beretʼena ar ḍạbrạ saphakate sunume ojokʼana ar kicricʼe bodolente Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte senkate otre ombakʼkateye sewakeda. Ar ona tayom do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼente jomakʼ ạgui reakʼe hukumkeda. Ar uni samaṅre jomakʼko ạguketʼ khan uni doe jomkeda. 
2Samuel12:21 Onate uniren kạmiyạko doko kulikedea, “Cedakʼ nonka dom kạmiyeda? Am do gidrạ jiwetʼe tahẽkanrem upạskeda arem rakʼkeda, menkhan uniye gocʼen khan dom beretʼena arem jom-ńũ kana.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Dạude menkeda, “Gidrạ jiwetʼe tahenre iń doń upạskeda ariń rakʼkeda, ente ińiń hudisan tahẽkana, hoedaṛeakʼa Probhu Isor do ińe dayawạńạ ar uni doe jiwedokʼa."
