2Samuel12:23 Menkhan uni tinreye gocʼena unre cetʼ lạgitʼ iń upạsa? Uni do cetʼ iń ruạṛ ạgu daṛeaea? Ińge uni ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtińạ. Uni do ar tishõ iń ṭhen do bae ruạṛ hijukʼa.” 
2Samuel12:24 Dạud do acʼren bạhu Bethseba jiwi raṛecʼe emadea ar uni tulucʼ arhõe giticʼ mitʼena. Ar uniren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyena. Dạud do uniyakʼ ńutum Solomone dohoketʼtaea. Probhu Isor do uni gidrại dulạṛede tahẽkante uniyakʼ ńutum do Jedidia dohoytae lạgitʼ Nathan nạbiye kolkedea. 
2Samuel12:25  
2Samuel12:26 Joab do Amonrenkoakʼ raj nagraha Rabare jhãpe emketʼte onae hatkeda. 
2Samuel12:27 Joab do Dạud ṭhen hoṛ kolkateye roṛ gotʼkada, “Iń do Raba upạrteń lạṛhạiyena ar dakʼ nagrahako hõń hatakada." 
2Samuel12:28 Am do sarecʼ nagrahako cetanre jhãp em lạgitʼ lạṛhại phạdko jarwakate onako hatme. Ar baṅkhan ińge nagrahakoń dokhol lekhan nagraha reakʼ ńutum do ińakʼ ńutumtege hoyokʼa.” 
2Samuel12:29 Unre Dạud do sanam lạṛhại phạdante Rabateye senena ar nagrahakore jhãpe emketʼte onakoe hatkeda. 
2Samuel12:30 Uni do onḍenicʼ rajakʼ bohokʼ khon mukuṭe bocʼketʼtaea. Ona do pegel are keji sonate benao tahẽkana ar onare damanakʼ dhiriko hõ bạisạu tahẽkana. Ona mukuṭ do Dạudko horokʼadea. Ar Dạud do ona nagraha khon ạḍi utạr luṭakʼ jiniskoe idikeda. 
2Samuel12:31 Uni do nagraharen hoṛkoe oḍok idiketʼkoa ar ạri, mẽṛhẽtʼ, kuḍi ar ṭeṅgocʼkoteye kạmi ocoketʼkoa. Uni do iṭạ bhaṭare kạmireye lagaoketʼkoa. Amonrenkoakʼ sanam nagrahare uni do onkageye kạmi ocokeda. Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoante Jerusalemteye ruạṛ hecʼena." 
2Samuel13:1 Tayomte nonka hoyena. Dạudren hopon Absalomren do Tamar ńutuman ńelokʼte mońj mitʼṭen miserae tahẽkantaea. Ar Dạudren hopon Amnon do uni ạḍiye dulạṛede tahẽkana. 
2Samuel13:2 Amnon do acʼren misera Tamar ńame lạgitʼ iạteye ruạ utạrena. Kũạ̃ri kuṛiye tahẽkante, uni jãhãnakʼe cekaeye do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼ lekae hudisetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel13:3 Dạudren dadattetʼ Simeyaren hopon Jonadab do Amnonren gateye tahẽkana. Uni do ạḍi cạtur hoṛe tahẽkana. 
2Samuel13:4 Uni do Amnone metadea, “E raj kũạr, din dinte cekate nonka dom osogokʼ kana? Iń do cetʼ bam lạiyạńạ?” Amnone menkeda, “Iń do Absalomren misera Tamar iń dulạṛ edekana.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadabe menkeda, “Am do aṭetʼre giticʼkokʼme ar ruạkʼ kanam mente bhanme. Ar amren ạpum tinre am ńeńele hijukʼa unre unim metaea, ‘dayakate ińren misrań Tamar iń ṭhen kolkaeme jemon uni do hecʼkate thoṛa jomakʼe jom ocoyiń. Ar ona jomakʼ do iń samaṅregeye tearma jemon onań ńel are jom ocoyiń.”" 
2Samuel13:6 Amnon do ruạkʼ kanae menteye giticʼ hapeyena. Ar raj do uni ńeńele hecʼen khan uniye metadea, “Dayakate ińren miserań Tamar do iń ṭhen kolkaeme ar uni do jemon hecʼkate iń samaṅre thoṛa piṭhại benaoạńma are jom ocoyińma.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Unre Dạud do niạ menkate Tamar ṭhen hoṛe kolketʼkoa, “Do dadam Amnonakʼ oṛakʼte calakʼme ar thoṛa jomakʼ tear oṭoaeme.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Niạ katha ańjomkate Tamar do dadattetʼ Amnonakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. Unre Amnon do aṭetʼreye giticʼ akan tahẽkana. Tamar do uni samaṅrege holoṅe thapṛaketʼte piṭhại rapakʼ isinkeda. 
2Samuel13:9 Ar ona tayom do tawate ona piṭhạko idikate uni samaṅreye dohokeda, menkhan Amnon do ona jojom bae rebenlena. Amnon do sanam hoṛ oṛakʼ khon oḍokokʼe metatʼkoa, onate onko jotoge oṛakʼ khonko oḍokena." 
2Samuel13:10 Unre Amnon do Tamare metadea, “Jomakʼ hataokate dela ińakʼ kandhate aderme. Ar jom ocoyińme.” Onate Tamar do tearakʼ piṭhạkoante dadattetʼ Amnonakʼ kandhateye boloyena." 
2Samuel13:11 Menkhan jom lạgitʼ tinre uni ṭhene idikeda unre Amnon do uni jhuṭiạukedeteye metadea, “Dela iń tulucʼ giticʼmitʼlen me.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamar do uniye metadea, “Alo dada, alom jormoṭeńa. Ente Israelko talare nonkanakʼ do baṅ ganokʼa. Nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi do alogem kạmiya." 
2Samuel13:13 Ińakʼ do cetʼ hoyokʼtińạ? Cekate ińakʼ lajao doń okoetińạ? Ar amhõ Israelko talare mitʼṭen kharap hoṛ menteko baḍaemea. Nehõram kạnạń, am do boroṅ raj ṭhen senkate metaeme; enḍekhan uni do amakʼ tireye jimạyińạ.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Menkhan Amnon do Tamarakʼ katha bae ańjomleda. Ar Tamar khon daṛegeye tahẽkante uniye jormoṭkedea ar uni tulucʼe laṭghaṭkeda. 
2Samuel13:15 Inạ tayom Amnon do uni kurudaye ehopʼena. Ar tinạkʼe dulạṛedekan tahẽkan ona khon hõ bạ̃ṛti kurudaye ehopʼena. Amnon do uniye metadea, “Beretʼme ar calao joṅme.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Tamar do uniye metadea, “Baṅa dada baṅ, ińre oka bạṛicʼakʼem kạmiketʼ ńitokʼ ińem oḍok giḍiliń khan ona khon hõ ḍher bạṛicʼakʼem kạmiya.” Menkhan Amnon do uniyakʼ katha bae ańjomleda." 
2Samuel13:17 Uni do acʼren guti hohowadeteye metadea, “Nui ạimại do bahrete oḍok giḍikaeme ar silpiń sińkakʼme.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Unre guti do Tamare oḍok gotʼkadete silpiń reakʼ huṛkạṛe lagaokada. Uni kuṛi do mitʼṭecʼ tilpạṅ talpaṅ kicricʼe horokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana, ente rajren kũạri kuṛi do nonkan kicricʼgeko horokʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel13:19 Unre Tamar do bohokʼre torocʼe ojokʼana ar oneye horokʼ akatʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea. Ar ona tayom do bohokʼ capokate ãṭ aṛaṅte rakʼ rakʼteye calaoena. 
2Samuel13:20 Tamarren dadattetʼ Absalom do uniye kulikedea, “Amnon do cetʼ ame nosṭo akatʼmea? E mại, niạ babotre okoehõ cetʼge alom lạiyakoa, ente uni doe amren boeha kana. Ar noa iạte mon do alom bạṛijtama.” Un khon Tamar do acʼren boeha Absalomakʼ oṛakʼre mulingeye tahẽyena." 
2Samuel13:21 Dạud raj do noa katha ańjomkate ạḍiye raṅgaoena. 
2Samuel13:22 Ar Absalom hõ Amnon do boge bạṛicʼ cetʼge bae metadea. Amnon do uniren miserae nosṭokedete Absalom do uni kurudaye ehopʼena. 
2Samuel13:23 Niạ bar bochor tayom Ephrayim simạna ṭhen Bakʼal-Hasorre Absalomren bhiḍikoakʼ upʼko kạpciyetʼtako tahẽkana. Unre Absalom do rajren sanam hoponko onḍeye neotaketʼkoa. 
2Samuel13:24 Uni do raj ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Amren guti do acʼren bhiḍikoakʼ upʼe kạpciyetʼtakoa. Onate raj do cetʼ acʼren gutikoante iń ṭhene hijukʼa?”" 
2Samuel13:25 Raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa beṭa, ale joto hoṛ do bale calakʼa; arle calaolen khan amakʼ jhamela hoyokʼtama.” Absalom do ạḍiye jormoṭkedere hõ uni do calakʼ bae rebenlena, menkhane bhoradea." 
2Samuel13:26 Unre Absalom do raje metadea, “Am bam calakʼ khan tobe do ińren boeha Amnon ale sãote sen ocoaeme.” Raj do uniye kulikedea, “Cedakʼ ape tulucʼ doe calakʼa?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Menkhan Absalome jormoṭkede khan uni do Amnon ar uni sãote joto raj kũạrkoe kolkatʼkoa. 
2Samuel13:28 Absalom do acʼren hoṛko noae hukumatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, darkha rasa ńũkate tinre Amnon doe moṅgonokʼa unreń metape khan, ‘Amnon ńẽdepe,’ Unre ape do unipe gojeya. Ar alope botorokʼa. Ente ińgeń hukumape kana. Diljoṅpe ar daṛeanko hoyokʼpe.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Onate Absalomren hoṛko do uniyakʼ hukum lekage Amnonko gocʼkedea. Noa ńelte rajren eṭakʼ hoponko do apan apin khaccarre decʼkateko dạṛkeda. 
2Samuel13:30 Onko horreko tahẽkanrege Dạud doe ańjomkeda, Absalom do rajren sanam hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa, onko modre okoehõ jiwetʼ do bạnukʼkoa." 
2Samuel13:31 Niạ katha ańjomkate raj doe teṅgoyena ar acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea ar otreye giticʼ hapeyena. Uniren gutiko hõ apan ạpin kicricʼ oṛecʼkate uni sorreko teṅgo hapeyena. 
2Samuel13:32 Menkhan Dạudren dadattetʼ Simeyaren hopon Jonadab doe menkeda, “E ińren mạlik alom hudisa, joto raj kũạrgeko gocʼ ocoakana mente; eken Amnon motogeye gocʼ ocoakana. Ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, one oka hilokʼ Amnon do Absalomren misera Tamare nosṭolede enhilokʼ khonge Absalom do noae goṭa akatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel13:33 Rajren joto kũạrko gocʼ akana hudiskate ińren mạlik maharaj do alo jemone mondukokʼ, ente eken Amnon motogeye gocʼ ocoakana.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Ar Absalom hõe dạṛ akatʼ tahẽkana. Unre okoe hoṛ do rajren pahradare tahẽkan uni do, buru aṛeteakʼ Horonayim hor horte ạdi gadel hoṛ hijukʼ kane ńelketʼkoa." 
2Samuel13:35 Ar Jonadab do raje metadea, “Hanko ńelkom, raj kũạrko hijukʼkana. Amren guti okaṭakʼ iń metatʼme tahẽkan onage hoyena.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Uniyakʼ katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege rajren hoponko doko hecʼ seṭerena ar ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena. Unre Raj ar uniren kạmiyạko hõ ạḍitetʼko rakʼkeda. 
2Samuel13:37 Absalom hõe dạṛketʼte Gesurren raj Amihudren hopon Talmai ṭhene senena. Dạud do acʼren hopon Amnon lạgitʼ din hilokʼe homor halaṅetʼ tahẽkana. Ar Absalom do Gesurre senkate pe bochore tahẽyena. 
2Samuel13:38  
2Samuel13:39 Dạud raj do uni ṭhen calakʼ reakʼ ạḍi mon tahẽkantaea, ente Amnonakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jiwi do raṛecʼ akan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel14:1 Seruyaren hopon Joabe baḍaekeda, raj do Absalom lạgitʼ jiwi ragokʼ kantaea." 
2Samuel14:2 Onate Joab do Tekoate hoṛ kolkate onḍe khon mitʼṭen cạtur maejiue hoho ạgukedea. Uniye metadea, “Am do homor halaṅokʼ reakʼem bhana. Am do hokʼmor halaṅ reakʼ kicricʼ horogme ar hoṛmore sunum alom ojoga. Ar nonkan maejiu lekam udugokʼa am do ḍher din khonem hokʼmor halaṅeda." 
2Samuel14:3 Ona tayom raj ṭhen senkate noa katham roṛa.” Ar Joab do uni cetʼe roṛa onae lạiyadea. 
2Samuel14:4 Tekoaren uni maejiu do unre raj ṭhen senkate otre ombakʼente uni ḍobokʼadeteye menkeda, “E maharaj, rukhiyạyińme baṛe!”" 
2Samuel14:5 Raj do uniye kulikedea, “Cetʼ muskilakʼrem paṛao akana?” Uni doe menkeda, “Sạri kathageń meneda, ińren jãwãe doe gocʼena, ar iń doń rạnḍi akana." 
2Samuel14:6 Iń amren kạ̃ṛmĩren do barea koṛakin tahẽkantińa. Mitʼdin unkin do ṭạnḍire jhogṛakʼ kin ehopʼena ar onḍe unkin chaḍaokin leka do celege bako tahẽkana. Onate unkin modre mitʼṭen do dosaricʼe gocʼkedea. 
2Samuel14:7 Ńitokʼ ińren jãwãeakʼ bõsren hoṛko do iń amren kạ̃ṛmĩ upạrteko teṅgo akana arko meneda, ‘Dini uni hoṛ oḍok ạgualeme okoe do acʼren boehae gocʼakade. Ale do uniren boehawakʼ jiwi reakʼle hala hạliya. Enḍekhan sompottiren ạidạriyicʼ mente do ar okoege bako tahena.’ Onko do ińakʼ sarecʼ akan aṅgra hõ ĩṛĩj tińko khojkana. Onka hoylen khan ińren jãwãeakʼ ńutum do dhạrti khon meṭaokʼtaea ar uniren bõsko hõ bako tahena.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Raj do maejiue metadea, “Do oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼme. Iń do am babotre mitʼṭecʼ iń bebostaea.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Unre Tekoaren maejiu do raje metadea, “E ińren mạlik maharaj, dostetʼ do iń ar ińakʼ gharońj cetanrege paṛaokʼma. Raj ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson do miridosge tahenma.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Raje menkeda, “Jãhãe jãhãnakʼe metam khan onko do iń ṭhenem ạgukoa; enḍekhan ghuriạ ar bako jalaomea.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Maejiue menkeda, “Maharaj do acʼren Probhu Isor ńutumteye kiriạkʼma jemon mãyãm pańjako do ar aloko gogocʼ. Ar baṅ khan ińren hoponiń hõko gojea.” Raje menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, amren hoponakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ upʼ hõ otre baṅ ńurokʼtaea.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Unre maejiue menkeda, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ katha baṛe roṛ ocowạńme.” Uni doe menkeda, “Ma roṛme.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Maejiue menkeda, “Enḍekhan Isorren hoṛko upạrte onkan mitʼṭecʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do cedakʼem hudisjoṅ kana? Maharaj nonkan katha tinreye roṛa unre uni do cetʼ apnarge bae dusikʼ kana? Ente uni do acʼren laga oḍokicʼ hopon acʼakʼ oṛakʼte bae ạgu ruạṛ edekana." 
2Samuel14:14 Otre dakʼ dul giḍile khan cetʼleka ona ar baṅ hạr ruạṛokʼ onkage abo hõ bon gujukʼa. Menkhan Isor do jiwi bae hataoa bickom nonkae bebostaea jemon ocokʼ giḍi akade hoṛ acʼ khon pharakre aloe tahen. 
2Samuel14:15 “Hoṛko botorko udukʼạdiń tahẽkanre ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj do niạ katha lạiyae lạgitʼ iń hecʼlena. Iń doń hudisan tahẽkana, raj sãote kathań roṛ legaea; hoedaṛeakʼa uni do ińakʼ kathae ańjomtińa." 
2Samuel14:16 Iń ar ińren hoponiń do Isorakʼ sompotti khon, metakʼme acʼren hoṛko tala khon marao giḍi liń lạgitʼ okoe hoṛe kurumuṭukan uniyakʼ ti khon hoedaṛeakʼa maharaj doe rukhiyạ lińạ." 
2Samuel14:17 “Ńitokʼ iń amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do noań hudiseda, ińren maharajakʼ katha jemon suluke imạń, ente boge-bạṛicʼ bicạrre ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj do Isorren mitʼṭen goḍet lekanicʼ kanae. Amren Probhu Isor do am sãotege baṛeye tahenma.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Unre raj do uni maejiue metadea, “Okań kulime ona reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ do iń ṭhen khon alom okoya.” Maejiue menkeda, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj ma roṛme.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Raje kuliyana, “Niạ babotre am tulucʼ cetʼ Joabakʼ ti menakʼa?” Maejiue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj, amre kiriạkateń meneda, am okam roṛakatʼ ona khon etom se końe secʼ do celege ohoko ghańjeṛlena. Hẽ amren guti Joabge niạ kạmi lạgitʼe men akawạdińa ar unige noako kathae lại cetʼ akawạdińa." 
2Samuel14:20 Kathako sojhekakʼ lạgitʼge amren guti Joab do noae kạmi akada. Disạmre cetʼ hoyokʼkana baṅ hoyokʼkana ona do ińren kisạ̃ṛgeye baḍaea. Uniyakʼ akel do Isorren goḍet lekage.” 
2Samuel14:21 Raj do Joabe metadea, “Bhagegea, iń do amakʼ nehõrteakʼ iń dohoyeda. Do senkate uni koṛa Absalom ạgu ruạṛem.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Ar Joab do otre ombakʼente raje ḍobokʼadea are sarhaokedea. Ona tayom Joabe menkeda, “E ińren mạlik, teheń amren golam doń baḍaekeda, iń do am ṭhen dayań ńamakada, ente maharaj do ińakʼ nehõr joṅakʼe ańjom akatʼtińạ.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Ona tayom Joab do Gesurte senkate Absalom do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ ạgukedea. 
2Samuel14:24 Raj doe menkeda, “Uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼregeye tahenma. Ar ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do alo jemone ńeltiń.” Onate Absalom do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena; ar rajakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bae ńelleda." 
2Samuel14:25 Goṭa Israel disạmre Absalom leka ńelokʼte mońj do ar okoe hõ bako tahẽkana. Mońj ńelokʼ iạte uni do jotoko khon bạ̃ṛti sarhaoe ńametʼ tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ jaṅga talka khon coṭ bohokʼ hạbicʼ okare hõ cetʼ khutge baṅ tahẽkantaea. 
2Samuel14:26 Bochor reakʼ mucạtʼre uni do upʼe getʼ ocoyetʼtae tahẽkana, ente uniyakʼ upʼ reakʼ hamal do dher idikʼkan tahẽkana. Are soṅle khan ona reakʼ hamal do bar keji tala hoyokʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel14:27 Absalomren do mitʼṭen kuṛi ar pe koṛa hoponko tahẽkantaea. Kuṛiyakʼ ńutum do Tamar tahẽkana. Uni do ńelokʼte ạḍi mońje tahẽkana. 
2Samuel14:28 Absalom do bar bochor Jerusalemreye tahẽkana; menkhan rajakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bae ńelleda. 
2Samuel14:29 Ona tayom uni do raj ṭhen calakʼ iạte Joabe hohoadea, menkhan Joab do uni ṭhen senokʼ bae rebenlena. Uni do dosar dhao arhõ Joabe hohoadea, menkhan niạ dhao hõ Joab do uni ṭhen senokʼ bae rebenlena." 
2Samuel14:30 Unre Absalom do acʼren gutikoe metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, ińakʼ khet panterege Joabakʼ khet hõ menakʼtaea. Uni do onare Jaoe er akada. Ape do senkate onare seṅgel junḍiyakʼpe.” Ar Absalomren gutiko do senkate ona khetre seṅgelko junḍiyada." 
2Samuel14:31 Unre Joab do Absalomakʼ oṛakʼte hecʼkate uniye metadea, “Amren gutiko do cedakʼ ińakʼ baṛgere seṅgelko junḍiyada?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Absalom do roṛ ruạṛketʼte Joabe metadea, “Nonḍem hijukʼ iạte am ṭhen hoṛiń kolletʼkoa jemon raj ṭhen senkate noam kuliye, ‘cedakʼ iń do Gesur khon nonḍeń hecʼena? Onḍe tahenge cetʼ iń lạgitʼ boge baṅ tahẽkana?’ Ńitokʼ jemon rajakʼ mẽtʼãhãń ńel daṛeakʼ ona bebostaeme. Ar jãhãnakʼ iń dos akatʼ khan uni do ińe gojeńma.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Unre Joab do raj ṭhen senkate ona kathae lạiyadea. Ar raj do Absalome hohoade khan uni do raj samaṅre otreye ombakʼena. Unre raj do Absalome cokʼadea. 
2Samuel15:1 Noa tayom Absalom do acʼ apnar lạgitʼ rãt gạḍi ar sadomkoe jogaṛketʼkoa ar acʼ laha lahate calakʼ lạgitʼ mõṛẽgel hoṛe bahalketʼkoa. 
2Samuel15:2 Ar Absalom do ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate nagraha reakʼ phaṭok-duạr secʼ calakʼ hor aṛereye teṅgokʼ kan tahẽkana. Unre jãhãege jãhãn mambla iạte raj ṭhen bicạr lạgitʼe hijukʼre Absalom do hohokate uniye kuliyede tahẽkana, “Am do okaṭakʼ atoren kanam?” Uni hoṛ doe menetʼ tahẽkana, “Iń amren guti do Israelren hana se noa gusṭiren hoṛ kạnạń.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Ar Absalom do unre uniye metaekan tahẽkana, “Ńelme, amakʼ lạlisakʼ do ṭhikgetama, menkhan amakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ rajren do cele hoṛge bạnukʼkoa.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Ona tayom uni do arhõe menetʼ tahẽkana, “Hae, iń do disạmren bikʼcạricʼ iń tahẽlen khan! Enḍekhan jãhãege iń ṭhen mambla se bicạr lạgitʼko hecʼkokʼ onkoakʼ do hok reakʼ iń bicạrketakoa.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Ona chaḍa jãhãege uni ḍobokʼae lạgitʼko sorokʼkan tahẽkan onko do koke kateye cokʼako kan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel15:6 Israelren tinạkʼ hoṛ raj ṭhen bicạr lạgitʼko hijukʼkan tahẽkan Absalom do onko tulucʼ nonkageye beoharetʼ tahẽkana. Nonkate uni do Israelkoakʼ mone kombṛoyetʼtako tahẽkana. 
2Samuel15:7 Pon bochor tayom Absalom do raje metadea, “Probhu Isor ṭheniń manot akatʼakʼ purạu lạgitʼ iń do Hebronte sen ocoạńme." 
2Samuel15:8 Iń amren guti do Aram reakʼ Gesurreń tahẽkan jokhecʼ manot kateń menleda, ‘Probhu Isor do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ idiyiń enḍekhan Hebronte senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ iń samaṅa.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Raj do uniye metadea, “Sulukte senjoṅme.” Unre Absalom do Hebronteye calaoena." 
2Samuel15:10 Absalom do Israelren sanam gusṭiko ṭhen noa katha menkate oko okote hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa, “Sakwa reakʼ saḍe ańjom toragepe mena, ‘Absalom do Hebronren raje hoyena.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Unre Jerusalem khon barsae hoṛ do Absalom sãoteko calaoena. Onko do peṛa lekateko idi ocolena ar jãhãnakʼ begor baḍaekate soṛa montege soṅgeteko senlena. 
2Samuel15:12 Samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ jokhecʼ Absalom do Dạudren sosolhayicʼ Gili nagraha khon Ahitophel hoho ạguiye lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Nonkate soṛojontro do arhõ diṛho idiyena, ente disom hoṛko do Absalom ṭhenko saṅge idiyena." 
2Samuel15:13 Mitʼṭen hoṛ Dạud ṭhen hecʼkateye metadea, “Israelkoakʼ mon do Absalom secʼ ạcur akantakoa.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Unre Dạud do Jerusalemre acʼren okoeko kạmiyạ hoṛko tahẽkan onkoe metatʼkoa, “Dela, abon do nonḍe khon bon dạṛa. Ar baṅkhan okoehõ Absalomakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ do bako ńama. Abo do ńitge oḍok calakʼ hoyokʼtabona, ente usạrage ruạṛ hecʼkate uni do muhinreye paṛao oco bona ar nagraharen sanam hoṛkoe marao cabakoa.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Rajren kạmiyạko do uniko metadea, “Aleren mạlik maharajakʼ monsubạ lekage ale dole sapṛaogea.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Unre raj doe mohnḍayena ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼren sanamko uniko pańjakedea. Ar raj oṛakʼ horhoe lạgitʼ acʼren gel goṭen chuṭki erakoe doho oṭokatʼkoa. 
2Samuel15:17 Raj ar uni sãoten sanam hoṛ do nagraha mucạtʼre senkateko teṅgoyena. 
2Samuel15:18 Ar Dạudren hoṛko do uni samaṅteko laha idiyena. Onko modre Kerethiko, Pelethiko ar Gatren turui sae hoṛko tahẽkana okoe do Gat khon raj sãoteko hecʼlen tahẽkan." 
2Samuel15:19 Unre raj do Gatren Itaiye metadea, “Ale sãote am do cedakʼem hijukʼ kana? Do ruạṛ senkate Absalom raj sãote tahenme. Ente am dom bidisiạ hoṛ kana; ar amakʼ disạm khon am dom oḍok hecʼakana." 
2Samuel15:20 Hola gem hecʼakana. Ar teheńge ale tulucʼ ṭahapʼ ṭạṭupʼ dãṛãbãṛa ocome do ṭhikakʼ baṅ hoyokʼa? Ińge bạń baḍaea iń do okateń calakʼ kana. Do ruạṛ calakʼme ar amakʼ disạmren hoṛko soṅgete idi torakom. Asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrge ape tulucʼ baṛe tahenma.” 
2Samuel15:21 Menkhan Itaiye do raje roṛ ruạṛadea, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda ar ińren mạlik ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, baṅ doń gujukʼ baṅ doń jiwedokʼ, ińren mạlik maharaj jãhãregeye tahen iń amren guti hõ onḍegeń tahena.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud do Itaiye metadea, “Enḍekhan ma laha idikʼme.” Unre Gatren Itaiye do acʼren sanam hoṛko ar acʼ gharońjren hoṛkoanteye laha idiyena." 
2Samuel15:23 Dạudren hoṛko tinreko calakʼkan tahẽkana unre disạmren sanam hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena. Raj ar uniren sanam hoṛ do Kedron lodamko paromketʼte hahaṅkar secʼko laha idiyena. 
2Samuel15:24 Raj do tinre nagraha khone oḍok calakʼkan tahẽkana unre naeke Sadok ar sanam Liwiko hõ uni sãoteko tahẽkana. Liwiko do Isorakʼ goha sindukko gokʼ idiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar nagraha khon sanam hoṛ ạuriko oḍok hijukʼ hạbicʼ Liwiko do Isorakʼ sindukko dohokeda ar naeke Abiathar hõ onko sãoteye tahẽkana. 
2Samuel15:25 Ado sanam hoṛko oḍoken khan Raj do Sadoke metadea, “Isorakʼ sinduk do nagrahate idi ruạṛ me. Ente Probhu Isorre dayań ńamle khan uni doe ruạṛ idiyińạ ar noa sinduk ar uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i arhõe ńel ocoyińạ." 
2Samuel15:26 Menkhan uniye menkeda, ‘am cetanre bạń kusiya,’ enḍekhan uni oka bhageye hudis onage ińreye cekae ma.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Ona tayom raj do naeke Sadoke metadea, “Jotowakʼ mam ńeletʼkange. Amren hopon Ahimas ar Abiatharren hopon Jonathan soṅgekate Do sulukte ape do nagrahate ruạṛ calakʼpe." 
2Samuel15:28 Ar tin hạbicʼ iń baḍae ocoyiń lạgitʼ am ṭhen khon khobor baṅ hecʼạń un hạbicʼ hahaṅkarre oka jaegare taṛamte paromokʼ onḍegeń tạṅgi hataṛa.” 
2Samuel15:29 Onate Sadok ar Abiathar do Isorakʼ sinduk Jerusalemte kin idi ruạṛkeda ar onḍegekin tahẽyena. 
2Samuel15:30 Dạud do rakʼ rakʼte jạitun buruteye rakapʼ calaoena. Uni do bohokʼ poṭom esetʼkate eken jaṅgae taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Hoṛko hõ jotoge uni sãote bohokʼ poṭomkate rakʼ rakʼte rakabokʼko ehopʼena. 
2Samuel15:31 Unre Dạudko lạiyadea, “Absalom tulucʼ soṛojontroko modre Ahitophel hõ menaea.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Dạud do nonka menkate koejoṅe ehopʼena, “E Probhu Isor, Ahitophelakʼ sopolha baṛe ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytaeme.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Ar hoṛko buru coṭre oka ṭhạ̃ire Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkan onḍenko seṭeren khan Erekren Husai do uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hecʼena. Uniyakʼ kicricʼko do oṛecʼ oṛecʼ ar bohokʼ do dhuṛite loso ponḍo tahẽkantaea. 
2Samuel15:33 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Am iń sãotem calakʼ khan ińakʼ bojha do ḍherokʼ tińạ." 
2Samuel15:34 Menkhan nagrahate ruạṛ senkate Absalom metaeme, ‘E maharaj iń do amren guti menkategeń tahena; cetʼleka iń do ạpumren gutiyiń tahẽkan onkage ńitokʼ hõ amren gutige minạńa.’ Enḍekhan am do Ahitophelawakʼ sopolha iń lạgitʼem bhoṭ ocoya." 
2Samuel15:35 Naeke Sadok ar Abiathar tạkin hõ onḍe am sãotekin tahena. Ar raj oṛakʼre okam ańjom onage unkinem baḍae ocokina. 
2Samuel15:36 Sadokren hopon Ahimas ar Abiatharren hopon Jonathan hõ onḍe onko sãote menakʼkinạ. Ar jãhãnakʼ hoylen khan unkin hotetege onam baḍae ocoyińạ.” 
2Samuel15:37 Dạudren gate Husae do tinre nagrahateye boloyena unre Absalom hõ onḍeye seṭerena. 
2Samuel16:1 Dạud do buru muthni khon thoṛae laha idiyen khan Mephibosetren guti Siba sãoteye ńapamena. Uni soṅgete do barea gadhakin tahẽkana ar unkinre do bojha lade tahẽkana. Ona bojhakinre do barsae piṭhạ, mitʼsae thoka kismis, mitʼsae thoka loa reakʼ piṭhạ ar harta reakʼ thulire mitʼ thuli darkha rasa tahẽkana." 
2Samuel16:2 Raj do Sibae kulikedea, “Noako do okoe lạgitʼem ạguakada?” Sibae roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Gadhakin do raj gharońjrenko dejokʼ lạgitʼ, piṭhạ ar jo do hoṛko jom ocoko lạgitʼ ar darkha rasa do onko lạgitʼge okoe do hahaṅkarreko loraokʼ.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Raje kuliyana, “Amren kisạ̃ṛren goṛomtetʼ koṛa do okare menaea?” Siba doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni do Jerusalemrege menaea, ente uni doe meneda, ‘teheń Israelko do goṛomiń haṛamakʼ rajosṭi ińko em ruạṛạńạ.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Niạ katha ańjomkate Raj do Sibae metadea, “Mephibosetakʼ sanam sompotti do ńitokʼ amiń ematʼmea.” Sibae menkeda, “Iń do amakʼ jaṅga reakʼ dhuṛi lek geń baṅ kana; ińren mạlik maharaj do daya baṛeye udukʼạń ma.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Dạud raj do tinre Bahurimteye seṭerena unre Sạulakʼ bõsren mitʼṭen hoṛ do onḍe khone oḍok hecʼena. Uni do Geraren hopon Simaiye tahẽkana. Uni doe sarap ạguyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel16:6 Unre Dạudakʼ etom-końeren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar rurukhiyạ dolko tahẽkanre hõ uni do Dạud ar uniren gutiko dhirite tińkoe ehopʼena. 
2Samuel16:7 Simaiye do sarap em emteye menkeda, “Men ocogokʼme, men ocogokʼme, eya mãyãm jokʼroyicʼ, eya dusṭạmi hoṛ!" 
2Samuel16:8 Okoeyakʼ ṭhạ̃irem rajokʼkan uni Sạul bõsren sanam hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm reakʼ Probhu Isor do amreye hala akada. Ar Probhu Isor do amakʼ ona rajosṭi amren hopon Absalome emakawadea. Am dom khũniyạhi kana ar onatege nonkan dosarem paṛao akana.” 
2Samuel16:9 Noako katha ańjomkate Seruyaren hopon Abisae do raje metadea, “Nui gocʼ seta do ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj cedakʼe sarapae kana? Den uniyakʼ bohokʼ hesetae lạgitʼ aṛakʼạńme.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Raje menkeda, “E Seruyaren hoponko, noa reaṅ ape sãote ińakʼ do cetʼ? Probhu Isorge, ‘Dạud sarapaeme’ noa kathae metaekan khan, tobe uni do okoeye kuli daṛekea, ‘cedakʼ nonka dom kạmikana?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Dạud do unre Abisae ar uniren sanam kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren hoponge ińakʼ jiwi hatao reakʼe kurumuṭu kan khan Benjamin gusṭiren nui hoṛ do cetʼ artetʼge bae onkaea. Uni okae cekayetʼkan ona baṛe onka ocoaepe, ente Probhu Isorge ona onkae lạgitʼe metaekana." 
2Samuel16:12 Hoedaṛeakʼ Probhu Isor do ińakʼ niạ kosṭoe ńela, ar teheń okaṭakʼ sarapiń ńametʼ ona bodolte ińakʼe bhạlạitińạ.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼren hoṛkoante horteye calao idiyena ar Simaiye do sarap em emte ar raj secʼ dhiri capatʼ capatʼte ar dhuṛi uḍiạu uḍiạute buru daṛaṅ secʼteye calaoena. 
2Samuel16:14 Raj ar uni soṅgeten hoṛko do okateko calakʼkan tahẽkan onḍeko seṭerena arko loraoena. Ona tayom Dạud do ona ṭhạ̃ireye jirạuena. 
2Samuel16:15 Ar Absalom ar Israelren sanam hoṛ do Jerusalemteko hecʼena. Ar Ahitophel hõ onko sãoteye tahẽkana. 
2Samuel16:16 Unre Dạudren gate Erekren Husai do Absalom ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Maharaj jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma! Maharaj jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma.”" 
2Samuel16:17 Absalom do Husạiye kulikedea, “Amren gate lạgitʼ pạtiạr do nõkʼõetam? Cedakʼ am do amren gate sãote bam senlena?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Husại do Absalome metadea, “Probhu Isor ar noko hoṛko, metakʼme Israelren sanam hoṛ okoeko bachao akade, iń do unirengeń hoyokʼa. Ar uni sãotegeń tahena." 
2Samuel16:19 Ona chaḍa iń do okoeyiń sapʼ soraea? Uniren hoponge cetʼ baṅa? Cetʼleka ạpumiń sapʼsorae kan tahẽkan onkage am hõń sapʼsorama.” 
2Samuel16:20 Absalom do Ahitophele metadea, “Ńitokʼ do cetʼ bo cekaea? Am do cetʼ solham emkińạ?" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitophel doe roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Raj oṛakʼ horhoe lạgitʼ ạpum do acʼren okoe chuṭki erakoe bạgi oṭoakatʼko am do onko tulucʼ giticʼ midokʼme. Enḍekhan Israelren sanam hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, am do amren ạpum ṭhen hirkhạwạnicʼem hoyokʼa. Onate am sãoten sanam hoṛ doko am sejokʼa.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Unre hoṛko do chat cetanre Absalom lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tạmbuko ṭaṅgaokeda ar uni do sanam Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre acʼ apatren chuṭki erako tulucʼ giticʼ midokʼ lạgitʼ onḍeye boloyena. 
2Samuel16:23 Onako dinre Ahitophelakʼ sopolha do Isor emakʼ sopolha menteko hudisetʼ tahẽkana. Dạud ar Absalom hõ Ahitophelakʼ sopolha do onkage kin hudisetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitophel do Absalom arhõe metadea, “Teheń ńindạ gelbar hajar hoṛante Dạud khudạue lạgitʼ sen ocoạńme." 
2Samuel17:2 Ente tinre uni do laṅga ar lorao akane tahena unrege uni cetanre jhãpiń ema. Ar nunạkʼ botoriń udukʼaea, acʼ sãoten hoṛ hõ botorteko dạṛ pạnḍuja. Unre eken raj eskargeń gojea," 
2Samuel17:3 Ar sanam hoṛko do am ṭheniń ruạṛ ạgukoa. Am okoeyakʼ gujukʼem khojkan uni chaḍa ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛ tinreko ruạṛ hijukʼa unre do suluk hoyokʼa. 
2Samuel17:4 Absalom ar Israelren sanam murubbiko ṭhen niạ sopolha do bogeakʼ mente bujhạuena. 
2Samuel17:5 Menkhan Absalome menkeda, “Erekren Husại hoho ạguyepe, uniyakʼ jãhãnakʼ mementeakʼ menakʼtae khan bon ańjomtaea.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Ado Husạiye hecʼen khan Absalom do uniye metadea, “Ahitophel do noa sopolhae emakatʼlea. Uni okae menakatʼ cetʼ ona bon onkaea? Ar babon onkae khan am do cetʼem menkea?”" 
2Samuel17:7 Husại do Absalome metadea, “Niạ dhao Ahitophel oka sopolhae emakan ona do baṅ bhagea." 
2Samuel17:8 Am dom baḍaegea, ạpum ar uniren hoṛko do lạṛhại bir kanako. Onko do hopon recʼakade raṅgao akan birren bana eṅga lekan kanako. Ona chaḍa amren ạpum do lạṛhạire ạḍi gạkhuṛ hoṛ kanae; uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko talare bae giticʼ aṅgakʼa." 
2Samuel17:9 Uni do ńitokʼ jãhãn dander se jãhãn jaegareye oko akana. Ar lạṛhại ehobokʼ sãote amren lạṛhại phạdko gocʼlen khan tobe okoe ona kathako ańjom onko doko mena, ‘Absalomren lạṛhại phạdko do ḍhergeko gocʼ ocoyena.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Unre joto khon daṛean ar dhạcri kul leka dilan lạṛhại phạd hõ botorte disạ adokʼtaea, ente Israelren sanam hoṛkogeko baḍaea, ạpum do mitʼṭen lạṛhại bir kanae ar uni sãote okoe menakʼko onko hõko daṛeangea." 
2Samuel17:11 “Onate noa sopolhań emam kana: Dan khon Ber-seba hạbicʼ doreão aṛe reakʼ alekha gitil leka Israelren sanam hoṛ am ṭhenko jarwakʼma ar am hõ onko tulucʼ lạṛhại oḍok calakʼme. 
2Samuel17:12 Onate jãhãregeye tahen onḍege abo do uni cetanre jhãp bon em daṛeakʼa ar otre sisir ńurokʼ leka uni cetanre bon hecʼ paṛaokʼa. Uni se uniren cele hoṛ hõ jiwetʼ babo dohokoa. 
2Samuel17:13 Ar jãhã nagrahategeye bolokʼ enḍekhan abo sanam Israelko do baber bon idiya ar nagraha sudhạ tul rakapʼkate lodamre bon giḍikakʼa, ar one onḍe nagraha reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhiri hõ ńur akan baṅ tahena.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Absalom ar Israelren sanam hoṛko menkeda, “Ahitophelakʼ sopolha khon Erekren Husaiyakʼ sopolhage bhagea.” Ente Absalom cetanre jarkhar ạgui lạgitʼ Probhu Isorge Ahitophelakʼ bhage sopolhae ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytae lạgitʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel17:15 Husai do naeke Sadok ar Abiathare metatʼkinạ, “Ahitophel do Absalom ar Israelren murubbiko niạ sopolhae emakawatʼkoa, menkhan iń do noa sopolhań ematʼkoa." 
2Samuel17:16 Aben do ńitge Dạud ṭhen khobor kolkate lạiyae ben, ‘Hahaṅkar reakʼ oka jaegare taṛamate gaḍa paromokʼ teheń do onḍe alom tahẽ aṅgakʼa; am do gaḍa paromokʼtege hoyokʼtama. Ar baṅkhan raj ar uni sãoten sanam hoṛko do gujukʼ hoyokʼtakoa.’ ”" 
2Samuel17:17 Ona jokhecʼ Jonathan ar Ahimas do Enrogelre kin tahẽkana. Mitʼṭen kạ̃ṛmĩ do unkinakʼ khobore baḍaekan tahẽkana ar unkin do senkate Dạud raj khoborko kin emaekan tahẽkana, ente unkin lạgitʼ nagrahate oḍok bolokʼ do muhin reaṅge tahẽkana." 
2Samuel17:18 Menkhan mitʼṭen juạn koṛa do unkine bujhạuketʼkinạ ar senkate Absalome lạiyadea. Onate unkin do usạrate senkate Bahurimre mitʼ hoṛakʼ oṛakʼre kin boloyena. Uniyakʼ racare do mitʼṭecʼ kuń tahẽkana. Unkin do ona kuńre bolokate kin okoyena. 
2Samuel17:19 Ar uni hoṛren oṛakʼ hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ ḍhaknate kuń reakʼ mocae ḍhakna esetʼkada ar ona cetanre busupʼe chiṭiạuada. Ar onate okoehõ bako bujhạu daṛeada. 
2Samuel17:20 Absalomren hoṛ do ona oṛakʼte hecʼkate uni maejiuko kulikedea, “Ahimas ar Jonathan do okare menakʼkinạ?” Maejiu doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Unkin do ạtukʼ gaḍakin parom idikeda.” Onko hoṛ do khoj baṛakate bako ńamletʼkinte Jerusalemteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Samuel17:21 Hoṛko ruạṛ calaoen tayom unkin do kuń khon rakapʼkate Dạud raj khobor emae lạgitʼkin calaoena. Arkin metadea, “Am do ńitge mohnḍakʼme ar gaḍa paromokʼme; Ahitophel do am upạrte nonka sopolhae emakana.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Onate Dạud ar uni soṅgeten hoṛ do oḍokente jordan gaḍako paromena. Onko do ạuri aṅga marsalokʼrege jordan gaḍako paromkeda, ar mitʼ hoṛ hõ bako sarecʼ tahẽlena." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitophel do tinreye ńelkeda, acʼakʼ sopolha leka kạmi baṅ hoylena unre uni do acʼren gadhare decʼkate acʼakʼ atoteye calaoena. Ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jotowakʼ bebosta oṭokateye pạsi gocʼena. Ar acʼren apatakʼ topareko baekadea." 
2Samuel17:24 Dạud do Mahanayimteye senena ar Absalom do Israelren sanam hoṛkowante jordan gaḍae paromena. 
2Samuel17:25 Absalom do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko cetanre Joab bodolte Amasae bahalkedea. Amasae do Ithra ńutuman mitʼṭen Israelren hopone tahẽkana. Ithra do Nahasren hoponera Abigaele baplaledea. Abigael do Joabren eṅgattetʼ Seruyaren miserate tahẽkana. 
2Samuel17:26 Absalom ar Israelko do Gilead ṭoṭhate senkateko derayena. 
2Samuel17:27 Dạud do Mahanayimteye senen khan Amonrenkoakʼ Raba nagraha ren Nahas ren hopon Sobi, Ledeba khon Amiyel ren hopon Makir ar Rogelim Gilead ren Barsilae teko do Dạud ar uni sãoten hoṛko lạgitʼ aṭetʼakʼko, gamlako ar hasa reakʼ bhajanko ạgukeda. Ar Dạud ar uniren hoṛko jom ocoko lạgitʼ onko do guhum, jao, holoṅ, atawakʼ anaj, malhan, dạl, ramṛa," 
2Samuel17:28  
2Samuel17:29 dumur rasa, dahe, gotom ar bhiḍikoko ạguketʼkoa. Onko doko hudiskeda, hahaṅkarre onko do reṅgecʼ ar tetaṅteko lorao akana." 
2Samuel18:1 Dạud do acʼ sãoten hoṛkoe jarwaketʼkoa ar hajarko cetanre ar saeko cetanre subedarkoe bahalketʼkoa. 
2Samuel18:2 Dạud do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko pe hạṭińte hạṭińketʼkoteye kolkatʼkoa. Uni do pạhilakʼ hạṭińkoren do Joab latarre, dosarakʼ hạṭińkoren do Joabren boeha, metakʼme Seruyaren hopon Abisae latarre ar tesarakʼ hạṭińkoren do Gatren Itai latarreye dohoketʼkoa. Raj do lạṛhại phạdkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń hõ khạṭige ape sãoteń calakʼa.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Menkhan hoṛko do uniko metadea, “Am do alom calakʼa. Ente alele dạṛle khan onko do celege bako hudislea. Ar aleren adha hoṛko gocʼlenre hõ bako monealea, menkhan am do gel hajar somanicʼ kanam. Am do ńitokʼ nagrahare tahẽkate alem goṛowale khan ạḍi bhage hoyokʼa.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Raje roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape oka bhagepe hudisetʼkan onageń onkaea.” Onate raj do nagraha reakʼ phaṭok-duạr ṭhene teṅgo tahẽyena, ar hoṛko do hajar hajarkate ar sae saekate hạṭińente onḍe khonko oḍok calaoena." 
2Samuel18:5 Ar raj do Joab, Abisae ar Itai tekoe hukumatʼkoa, “Iń khạtirte uni koṛa Absalom tulucʼ do jutte beoharpe. Absalom reaṅ raj do subedarko sãote tinreye galmarao kan tahẽkana unre lạṛhại phạdrenko hõ ona kathako ańjomletʼa." 
2Samuel18:6 Ar lạṛhại phạdko do Israelko upạrte bilạn ṭạnḍiteko oḍok calaoena. Ar Ephrayim reakʼ birreko lạṛhạiyena. 
2Samuel18:7 Onḍe Dạudren hoṛko ṭhen Israelren lạṛhại phạdko doko bhagao ocoyena. Enhilokʼ ạḍi maraṅ lạṛhại hoyena ar bargel hajar hoṛko gocʼena. 
2Samuel18:8 Unre lạṛhại do goṭa ṭoṭha pasnao idiyena ar lạṛhạite tinạkʼ hoṛ bako gocʼlen ona khon ḍher do bir iạteko gocʼena. 
2Samuel18:9 Ar Absalom do acʼkage Dạudren hoṛko samaṅreye paṛaoena. Unre uni do acʼren khacarre decʼkateye dạṛetʼkan tahẽkana. Ar khaccar do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ ela dare reakʼ ḍạrko talateye dạṛetʼkan tahẽkanre Absalomakʼ bohokʼ do ela darere ḍhaṅentaea. Ar okoe khacar cetanreye decʼakan tahẽkan uni doe parom calaoena menkhan Absalom doe aka tahẽyena. 
2Samuel18:10 Mitʼṭen hoṛ do uniye ńelkede khan senkate Joabe lạiyadea, ‘Iń do ńitokʼge mitʼṭecʼ ela darere Absalom aka akaniń ńel oṭoakadea.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joab do uni hoṛe metadea, “Cetʼem menkeda? Am do cetʼ unim ńelakadea? Am do cedakʼ onḍege otre bam samakʼ ńurledea? Onam onka lekhan gel Sekel rupạ ar lạṛhại bir reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍanḍa totolakʼ iń emkema.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Uni hoṛ doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Mitʼ hajar Sekel rupạ soṅkate ińakʼ tirem emlenre hõ rajren hopon cetanre ti do ohogeń tul daṛelea. Alele ańjomakada raj do Abisae, Itai ar am noae hukum akawatʼpea, ‘Ape do uni koṛa Absalompe rukhiyạyea.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Iń do uni cetanre phikirteń kạmi lekhan raj do khạṭigeye baḍae daṛekea, ente raj ṭhen do okoteakʼ cetʼge baṅ tahena, ar unre amhõ iń secʼ do bam tahẽkokʼa,”" 
2Samuel18:14 Joabe menkeda, “Am tulucʼ somoe do ohoń nosṭo daṛelea.” Ar niạ menkate uni do borlome sapʼtoraketʼte Absalom do kokhareye sobokʼadea. Absalom do unhõ ela darere jiwetʼge aka akane tahẽkana." 
2Samuel18:15 Joabren gel goṭen khanḍa bhanḍa akʼsen koṛako do Absalomko gheraokedea arko gocʼkedea. 
2Samuel18:16 Ona tayom Joab do sakwae oroṅkeda. Unre lạṛhại phạdko do Israelrenko ar bako khudạuletʼkoa, ente Joab do onkoe thamaoketʼkoa." 
2Samuel18:17 Onko do bir reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ danderre Absalomko giḍikadea ar uni cetanre dhiriko capatʼ puńjikeda. Ar Israelren sanamko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Samuel18:18 Absalom tinre jiwetʼe tahẽkana unre uni do apnar lạgitʼ buru lodamre mitʼṭecʼ raj nisạne benaoan tahẽkana. Uni doe menleda, “Ińakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ ińren do cele hoponge bạnukʼkotińa.” Onate acʼakʼ ńutumte ona nisạn khunṭi reakʼ ńutume doholeda. Ar teheń hạbicʼ ona nisạn khunṭi do Absalom khunṭiko metakʼkana." 
2Samuel18:19 Sadokren hopon Ahimase menkeda, “Iń do ńir senkate raj do niạ khobor iń lạiyaea, Probhu Isor do bạirikoakʼ ti khon uniye bańcao akadea.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Joab do uniye metadea, “Teheń do rạskạ khobor alom lạiyaea, eṭakʼ din lạiyaeme. Teheń do alogem lạiyaea ente teheń do rajren hopone gocʼakana.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Niạ tayom Joab do mitʼṭen Kusren hoṛe metadea, “Am okam ńelakatʼ senkate ona raj lạiyaeme.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Kusren hoṛ do Joab ḍobokʼ adeteye ńir senena." 
2Samuel18:22 Sadokren hopon Ahimas do Joab arhõe metadea, “Jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ nui Kusren hoṛ tayom tayomte ńir sen ocoạńme.” Joabe menkeda, “E bạbu cedakʼ ńir senokʼem meneda? Kuṛại ńam lekan jãhãn khobor do bạnukʼ coṅ.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimase menkeda, “Jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ, iń do ńir senokʼ iń meneda.” Onate Joab doe menkeda, “Acha, Do calakʼme.” Unre Ahimas do otteye dạṛ idiketʼte uni Kusren hoṛ doe tayom oṭokadea." 
2Samuel18:24 Un jokhecʼ Dạud do nagraha bhitri ar bahre phaṭok-duạr reakʼ tala ṭhạ̃ireye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Unre uniren pahradar do duạra reakʼ chat secʼte pạcri cetanreye decʼena. Ar bahre secʼe beṅgetʼketʼ khan mitʼṭen hoṛ do ńir hijukʼkane ńelkedea. 
2Samuel18:25 Pahradar do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohowate ona katha raje baḍae ocokedea. Raje menkeda, “Eskargeye hijukʼkan khan uni do bhage khoborgeye ạguyeda.” Ar uni hoṛ doe hecʼ sor idikʼkana." 
2Samuel18:26 Pahradar do arhõ mitʼ hoṛ ńir hijukʼkane ńelkedea. Uni do ãṭ aṛaṅte horhoyicʼ hohoadeteye metadea, “Ńelme, ar mitʼ hoṛe ńir hijukʼ kana.” Raje menkeda, “Uni hõ bhage khoborgeye ạguyeda.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Unre pahradare menkeda, “Pạhilicʼ hoṛ do Sadokren hopon Ahimas lekae ńir hijukʼ kana.” Raje menkeda, “Uni doe bhage hoṛ kana, ar bhage khoborgeye ạguyeda.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimas do ãṭ aṛaṅte raj hohoadeteye menkeda, “Jotoge bhagegea.” Ona tayom uni do otre ombakʼkate raj ḍobokʼadeteye menkeda, “Amren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtae ma. Ińren mạlik maharaj upạrte okoe tiko tulletʼ tahẽkan onko do aboakʼ tireye soprot akatʼkoa.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Raj doe kuliyana, “Koṛa Absalom do cetʼ besge menaea?” Ahimase roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Joab do tinre maharajren guti ińe kolkạńkan tahẽkana unre iń do gulmal hoyokʼ iń ńelkeda. Menkhan cetʼ iạte hoyokʼkana iń amren guti do bạń baḍae daṛeada.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Raje menkeda, “Mitʼ aṛere teṅgokʼme ar ńelhorme.” Onate uni do ocokʼkate onḍeye teṅgo hapeyena." 
2Samuel18:31 Ona tayom uni Kusren hoṛ do onḍe seṭeren khane metadea, “E ińren mạlik maharaj bhage khoborgeń ạguakada. Okoe do am upạrteko teṅgolen onko sanamko cetanre teheń Probhu Isor do ame jitạu ocoakatʼmea.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Raj do uni Kusren hoṛe kulikedea, “Uni koṛa Absalom do cetʼ besge menaea?” Uni Kusren hoṛ doe menkeda, “Ińren mạlik maharajren bạiriko okoe do amakʼ lokshan lạgitʼko teṅgo akan onko sanamkoakʼ obosta do uni juạn koṛa leka hoyokʼtako ma.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Niạ katha ańjomkate rajakʼ mon do dukte perecʼentaea. Uni do phaṭok-duạr cetan reakʼ kandhate senkate rarakʼe ehopʼena. Uni do niạ katha men menteye rakapʼ calaoena, “Hae, ińren hopon Absalom, hae ińren hopontiń, hae ińren hopontiń do!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Joabko lạiyadea, raj do Absalom ńutumteye rakʼetʼ kana are homor halaṅeda." 
2Samuel19:2 Niạ katha ańjomkate ona jitạukʼ din do lạṛhại phạdko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ hokʼmor halaṅakʼ dinge hoyena, ente enhilokʼge lạṛhại phạdko doko ańjomkeda, raj do acʼren hopon lạgitʼe hae haeyokʼ kana." 
2Samuel19:3 Ar enhilokʼ Dạudren lạṛhại phạdko do lạṛhạire bhagao ocoakan hoṛko leka lajaote gasacʼ gusucʼko ruạṛ hijukʼ hoṛ leka hape hapete nagrahateko boloyena. 
2Samuel19:4 Raj do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã betʼkate noa menkate ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe dhurạuena, “Hae, ińren hopon Absalomtiń! Hae, Absalom, ińren hopontiń, ińren hopontiń do!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Unre Joab do oṛakʼ bhitrite bolokate raje metadea, “Okoe do amakʼ jiwi, amren hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ jiwi, amren bạhuko ar chuṭki erakoakʼ jiwiko rukhiyạ akatʼtako onko sanam hoṛko am dom opomanketʼkoa." 
2Samuel19:6 Okoe amko kurudam kan onkogem dulạṛetʼkoa, ar okoe amko dulạṛetʼme onko dom kurudako kana. Teheń do saphatem bujhạu ocoyeda, subedarko ar onkoren hoṛko am ṭhen do cele hõko baṅkana. Ińiń ńeleda, ale sanamkole gocʼ ocolen khan ar eken Absalom eskar jiwetʼe tahẽlen khan am do ạḍim kusikokʼa." 
2Samuel19:7 Ńit am do bahrete oḍokokʼme ar amren hoṛko galmaraoakote udgạu emakom. Ente Probhu Isorreń kiriạkʼ kana, bam onka lekhan teheń ńindạ mitʼṭen hoṛ hõ am sãote bako tahena. Amakʼ koṛa umer khon teheń hạbicʼ tinạkʼ bạṛicʼakʼkorem paṛaolen onako khon noage maraṅ utạr bạṛicʼakʼ do hoyokʼa.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Unre raj doe beretʼena ar senkate phaṭok-duạr ṭhene duṛupʼena. Ar raj do phaṭok-duạr ṭhene duṛupʼ akana menteko baḍaeketʼ khan sanam hoṛ do uni ṭhenko hecʼena. Ar Absalom secʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko dạṛ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel19:9 Unre Israelren sanam gusṭiko talaren hoṛko do reṭepeṭekʼ tulucʼ roroṛko ehopʼena, “Raj do bạirikoakʼ ti khone bańcao akatʼbona; Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon unigeye rukhiyạketʼ bona. Menkhan ńitokʼ do Absalom iạtege disạm khone dạṛ akada." 
2Samuel19:10 Okoe do abo cetanre rajok lạgitʼ bon ojokʼlede uni Absalom do lạṛhạireye gocʼena. Enḍekhan raj ruạṛ ạguiye lạgitʼ do jãhãnakʼ cedakʼ bape roṛeda?” 
2Samuel19:11 Goṭa Israel disạmre oka roṛogokʼkan ona do rajakʼ luturre seṭerena. Ona iạte Dạud raj do naeke Sadok ar Abiathar ṭhen senkate niạ kathae roṛgotʼatʼ kinạ, “Aben do Jihudạren murubbiko niạ katha ben kulikoa, ‘raj do acʼakʼ raj oṛakʼte ruạṛ ạguiye do cedakʼpe bilomeda?" 
2Samuel19:12 Ape ma uniren boehako kangepe, uniyakʼ jel ar uniyakʼ jaṅ kanpe. Enḍekhan raj ruạṛ ạguiye do cedakʼpe bilomeda?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Ape do Amasa iń reakʼ niạ kathape metaea, ‘am do cetʼ ińakʼ jel ar jaṅ dom baṅ kana? Isorre kiriạkateń metam kana, ńit khon am do Joab bodolte ińren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarem hoyokʼa.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Nonkate Dạud do Jihudạren sanam hoṛkoakʼ mon do mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ mon lekae lạbitʼ ocoketʼtakoa. Ar niạ katha raj ṭhenko roṛ gotʼkada, “Am ar amren sanam gutiko ma ruạṛ hijukʼpe.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Unre raj do jordan gaḍa hạbicʼe ruạr hecʼena. Ar Jihudạren hoṛko do raj daram ạguiye lạgitʼ Gilgalteko hecʼena jemon raj do jordan gaḍako parom ạguiye. 
2Samuel19:16 Bahurim atoren Benjamin-gusṭiren Gera hopon Simai do bae bilomletʼte Jihudạren hoṛko soṅgekate Dạud raj daram ạguye lạgitʼe calaoena. 
2Samuel19:17 Uni sãote Benjạmin gusṭiren mitʼ hajar hoṛko tahẽkana ar Sạulakʼ gharońjren guti Siba ar uniyakʼ gharońjren gelmõṛẽ hoponko ar bargel gutiko hõko tahẽkana. Onko do raj jordan gaḍa ạuriye paromrege usạrate senkate jordan gaḍa ṭhenko seṭerena. 
2Samuel19:18 Rajakʼ gharońjren sanamko ạguko lạgitʼ ar rajakʼ sanaleka kạmi lạgitʼ onko do taṛamte paromokʼ jaega ṭhen gaḍako paromena. Ar raj do tinre jordan gaḍae paromokʼa ṭhik unrege Gera hopon Simai do hecʼkate raj samaṅre ombakʼenteye menkeda," 
2Samuel19:19 “Ińren mạlik do ińakʼ dos alo baṛeye sabtińma. Ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj do oka hilokʼ Jerusaleme bạgi oṭoatʼ enhilokʼ amren guti okań behokletʼ ona do alo baṛem disạitiń ma. Maharaj do mon khon jemon onae sạṅgiń giḍikakʼ. 
2Samuel19:20 Ińiń baḍaea, iń doń kại akada. Ona iạte teheń Joseph bõsrenko modre ińge sanamko khon lahare ińren mạlik maharaj tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ nonḍeń hecʼakana.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Unre Seruya hopon Abisae menkeda, “Simai do Probhu Isorren ojokʼicʼ hoṛe sarapade tahẽkante cetʼ gocʼ ocokʼ lek doe baṅ kana?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Dạude roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E Seruyaren hoponko, niạ reaṅ am tulucʼ ińakʼ do cetʼ? Teheń cedakʼ ape do iń upạrtepe teṅgokʼ kana? Teheń Israelko modren jãhãe hoṛ goje do cetʼ lek kana? Iń do cetʼ noa katha bạń baḍaea, teheń hõ Israelren raj kạnạń mente?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Ona tayom raj do Simaiye kiriạwadea, “Am do bam gocʼ ocokʼa.”" 
2Samuel19:24 Inạ tayom Sạulren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Mephiboset do raj sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hecʼena. Uni do raj sen tayom nirạite arhõ ạuriye ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ acʼakʼ jaṅga bae joton akatʼtae tahẽkana, goco hõ bae hoylena ar kicricʼ hõ bae sapha akatʼtae tahẽkana." 
2Samuel19:25 Raj do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ hecʼen khan Mephiboset do uni tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hecʼena. Unre raj do uniye kulikedea, “Mephiboset, iń tulucʼ do cedakʼ bam senlena?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Uni doe menkeda, “E ińren mạlik maharaj, iń amren guti doń leḍhagea, onateń menleda, ‘ińren gadhare decʼkate raj sãoteń calakʼa.’ Menkhan ińren guti Siba do iń tulucʼ eṛeye kạmi akada." 
2Samuel19:27 Uni do ińren mạlik maharaj ṭhen ińakʼe durnam akada. Ińren mạlik maharaj do Isorren mitʼṭen goḍet leka kanae; onate am kusiyakʼ lekage baṛe ińre kạmime. 
2Samuel19:28 Goṛomiń haṛamren bõsko do ińren mạlik maharaj ṭhen gujukʼ lek kangeako, menkhan enhõ am do amren hoṛko tulucʼ amakʼ ṭebilre jom-ńũi lạgitʼ iń amren guti hõ ṭhạ̃iyem tearadiń tahẽkana. Enḍekhan maharaj ṭhen nehõrokʼ lạgitʼ do ar cetʼ menakʼtińạ?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Raj do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ jãhãn roroṛteakʼ jạruṛ do bạnukʼa. Iń doń goṭa akada, am ar Siba do jaega jumiben hạṭiń joṅa.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mopheboset do raje metadea, “Unige jotowakʼe hatao ma. Ińren mạlik maharaj do nirạite oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼakana onage iń lạgitʼ do ḍhera.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Raj Jerusalemteye ruạṛ hijukʼ lahare Gileadren Barsilae do Rogelim khon hecʼkate raj bidạye lạgitʼ uni sãote jordan ṭhene hecʼlena. 
2Samuel19:32 Barsilae do ạḍiye haṛam caba akan tahẽkana; uniyakʼ umer do irạlgel bochor tahẽkana. Raj do tinre Mahanayimreye tahẽkana unre unige raj lạgitʼ jomakʼe bebostaleda, ente uni do ạḍi kisạ̃ṛ hoṛe tahẽkana." 
2Samuel19:33 Raj do Barsilaeye metadea, “Dela iń sãote paromokʼte Jerusalemre iń ṭhen tahenme. Ińgeń ạsulmea.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Menkhan Barsilae do raje roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ar tinạkʼ bochor baṅ jiwetʼ iń tahen, onate raj tulucʼ Jerusalemteń calakʼa?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ńitokʼ ińakʼ umer do irạlgel bochor. Okaṭakʼ bhage ar bạṛicʼ ona do cetʼ ńit iń men daṛeakʼa? Amren guti ńitokʼ okań jom-ńũi ona reakʼ sebeltetʼ do cetʼ iń lại daṛekea? Sekʼreńkoakʼ sereń do cetʼ ńit hõń ańjom ńama? Amren guti do cedakʼ ińren mạlik maharaj ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ bojha leka doń hoyokʼa? 
2Samuel19:36 E maharaj cedakʼ nonkan kuṛại dom imạń kana? Baṅ, baṅ, iń do eken am sãote jordan gaḍań paromokʼa," 
2Samuel19:37 ar ona tayom do ruạṛ ocoạńme jemon ińakʼ oṛakʼre ińren go-babakinakʼ topa ṭheniń gujukʼ. Nũkʼũe ńeleme amren guti Kimham; unige am sãote jordan gaḍae parom ocoge. Ar unire oka bhagem hudis onage onkawaeme.” 
2Samuel19:38 Raje menkeda, “Ṭhikgea, Kimham do iń sãote gaḍae paromokʼa, ar am okam khoj onage unireń onkaea. Ona chaḍa iń ṭhen okam khoj onageń onkaea.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Inạ tayom sanam hoṛ do gaḍako paromena, ar raj hõ gaḍae paromena. Raj do Barsilae cokʼadea are bhoradea ar Barsilae do arhõ gaḍae paromketʼte acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Samuel19:40 Nonkate Jihudạren sanamko ar Israelren adha hoṛko do rajko parom ạgukedea. Ona tayom raj do Gilgalteye senena ar Kimham hõ uni tulucʼe calaoena. 
2Samuel19:41 Israelren sarecʼ hoṛko do raj ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Aleren boeha Jihudạren hoṛko do cedakʼko kombṛo ạguketʼmea? Onko do cedakʼ am ar am gharońjrenko ar am sãoten sanam hoṛko gaḍa paromkateko ạguketʼpea?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Jihudạren sanamko do Israelren hoṛko metatʼkoa, “Raj doe aleren hoṛkante noale nonka akada. Menkhan ape do cedakʼpe raṅgaokʼ kana? Ale do cetʼ rajakʼ jomakʼ khon jãhãnakʼle jomakada? Se jãhãnakʼ bạksise emakatʼlea?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Israelren hoṛko do Jihudạrenko metatʼkoa, “Ale do gel gusṭikoren kanale ar onate Dạud raj cetanre ape khon ḍher ạidạri menakʼtalea. Menkhan ape do cedakʼ nonkape nindạuketʼlea? Aboren raj ruạṛ ạguiye reakʼ katha alege cetʼ pạhilte bale roṛleda?” Menkhan Israelren hoṛko khon Jihudạren hoṛkoakʼ kathage bạ̃ṛti keṭecʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel20:1 Benjamin-gusṭiren Bikri hopon Seba ńutuman mitʼṭen haḍrap hoṛ do unre onḍeye tahẽkana. Uni do sakwa oroṅketʼteye menkeda, “Dạud cetanre aleakʼ do jãhãn dạbiteakʼ bạnukʼtalea, Jisạiren hopon cetanre jãhãn ạidạri hõ bạnukʼtalea. E Israelko, ape do apan ạpin oṛakʼte ruạṛ joṅpe.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Unre Israelren sanam hoṛ do Dạudko bạgiyadete Bikri hopon Sebako pańjakedea. Menkhan Jordan khon Jerusalem hạbicʼ Jihudạren hoṛko do goṭa hor raj são sãoteko calaoena. 
2Samuel20:3 Dạud Jerusalemre acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼen khan okoe gel goṭen chuṭki era oṛakʼ horhoe lạgitʼe doho oṭoletʼko onko do mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼreye dohokatʼkoa ar oṛakʼ horhoe lạgitʼe bebostakeda. Uni do onko jom-ńũ ar kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼkoe ematʼkoa menkhan onko ṭhen do ar bae bolo baṛalena. Ar onko do onḍe rạnḍi maejiu lekako tahẽyena ạuriko gujukʼ hạbicʼ. 
2Samuel20:4 Inạ tayom raj do Amasae metadea, “Pe din bhitrite Jihudạren hoṛko iń ṭhenem hohoạgukoa ar am hõ nonḍem tahena.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa do Jihudạren hoṛ hohowako lạgitʼe calaoengea menkhan raje ṭhik akade tahẽkan khon hõ bạ̃ṛti okteye hataokeda. 
2Samuel20:6 Unre Dạud do Abisaeye metadea, “Absalom aboakʼ tinạkʼ bae loksan akatʼ ona khon hõ Bikri hopon Seba do ḍhere loksan tabona. Ńitokʼ am do ińren hoṛkoante uni khudạue lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼme. Ar baṅkhan uni do jãhãn pạcrite esetʼ nagrahae sendra ńamle khan abo ṭhen khone dạṛ paskaokʼa.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Unre Joab ar uniren hoṛko do, Kerethiko ar Pelethiko ar sarecʼ birbanṭako do Abisae tabere tahẽkate Bikri hopon Seba khudạue lạgitʼ Jerusalem khonko oḍokena." 
2Samuel20:8 Onko do Gibeonre menakʼ maraṅ dhiri ṭhenko seṭeren khan Amasae sãoteko ńapamena. Joab do unre lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ kicricʼe horokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana ar ḍanḍa paṭheakʼ khapre hõ tarwaṛe tahẽkantaea. Uni do tohotʼ gurokʼ hoṛ leka laha secʼe sen idiyen khan khap khon tarwaṛe do otre ńurentaea. 
2Samuel20:9 Joab do Amasae metadea, “E boeha cetʼ leka menama?” Ar niạ menkate cokʼae lạgitʼ jojom tite uniyakʼ gocoye sapʼketʼtaea." 
2Samuel20:10 Menkhan Amasa do Joabakʼ ti reakʼ tarwaṛe do bae kheyalleda. Ar Joab do tarwaṛete uniyakʼ lacʼe boskaoketʼtaea. Onate uniyakʼ lacʼ do bogocʼ oḍokente otre ńurena. Ar Amasa ńẽde reakʼ jạṛuṛ do baṅ hoylena. Uni doe gocʼena. Inạ tayom Joab ar uniren boeha Abisae do Bikri hopon Seba kin khudạu idikedea. 
2Samuel20:11 Joabren mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ do Amasawakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ ṭhen teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Okoe Joabe dulạṛede ar okoe doe Dạud secʼren kan uni do Joabe pańjayema.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amasawakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do unhõ tala ḍaharre mãyãmre jobe akan tahẽkana. Joabren uni hoṛ doe ńelkeda, lạṛhại phạdko jotoge Amasae ṭhen hecʼkateko teṅgokʼ kana, onate uni do ḍahar khon khetre Amasae or pheḍkedea ar mitʼṭecʼ kicricʼteye poṭomkadea." 
2Samuel20:13 Amasa hor khone ocokʼkede khan sanam hoṛ do Joabko pańja idikedete Bikri hopon Sebako khudạu idikedea. 
2Samuel20:14 Seba do Israelren sanam gusṭiko talate ar Beriyikoakʼ ṭoṭhako secʼte Abel-Betmaka hạbicʼe senena. Ar hoṛko do onḍeko Sebako khudạu idikedea ar nagrahateko boloyena. 
2Samuel20:15 Ona tayom Joab sãote sanam lạṛhại phạdko do hecʼkate Abel-Betmakako gheraokeda. Onko do nagraha bahre pạcri sãote mitʼṭecʼ daṛaṅ pinḍhạko upʼ rakapʼkeda. Ar ona tayom tinre bhitri reakʼ pạcri rạputʼko ehopʼena unre mitʼṭecʼ budan maejiu do nagraha bhitri khon ãṭ aṛaṅte hohowateye menkeda, “Ańjompe, ańjompe, Joab nonḍe hijukʼ metaepe jemon uni tulucʼ iń galmarao daṛeakʼ.”" 
2Samuel20:16  
2Samuel20:17 Ar Joab do uni secʼe laha idiyen khane uni do Joabe kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ Joab kanam?” Uni doe menkeda, “Hẽ, iń doń Joab kangea.” Maejiue menkeda, “Amren kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ katha baṛe ańjomme.” Uni doe menkeda, “Ańjometʼgeạń.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Maejiue menkeda, “Sedaeren hoṛko menetʼ tahẽkana, ‘Abelte senkate sopolha hataome. Ar nonkate onko do sanamakʼ babotreko miṭmaṭetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Samuel20:19 Ale do Israelko talare ale do sulukokʼ ar pạtiạranko kanale. Am do Israelko tala reakʼ gogo lekan nagraha marao giḍikakʼ do cedakʼem khojkana. Probhu Isorakʼ sompotti ar Israelko do cedakʼ utʼko reakʼ dom kurumuṭu kana?” 
2Samuel20:20 Joab doe menkeda, “Utʼ kakʼ se jarkhar reakʼ kạmi iń khon do sahaṛ akae tahenma, hẽ sahaṛ akaege tahenma." 
2Samuel20:21 Katha do onka baṅkana. Ephrayim disạm reakʼ buru ṭoṭharen Bikri hopon Seba ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ do Dạud upạrte tiye tulakada. Am do eken uni hoṛ moto ińakʼ tire soprotkaeme, enḍekhan niạ nagraha khon iń doń calao joṅa.” Maejiu do Joabe metadea, “Uniyakʼ bohokʼ do pạcri cetantele capatʼgotʼama.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Ona tayom uni maejiu do ạkilan kathakowante nagraharen sanam hoṛko ṭhene senena. Ar hoṛko do Bikri hopon Sebakʼ bohokʼko makʼ ńurhạketʼte Joabko capatʼgotʼadea. Unre Joab do sakwae oroṅkeda ar uniren hoṛko do nagraha khonko uṭhạuente apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛena. Ar Joab do Jerusalemren raj ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Samuel20:23 Joab do Israelren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoren maraṅ subedare tahẽkana ar Jehoyada hopon Benaya do Dạudren rurukhiyạko Kerithiko ar Pelethikoren subedare tahẽkana; 
2Samuel20:24 ar kạmire okoeko jormoṭ ocokʼkan tahẽkan onko ńel todarotko reakʼ bhar do Adoram cetanre tahẽkana; Ahilud hopon Jehosaphat do Itihãs olokʼicʼe tahẽkana; 
2Samuel20:25 Sewa do rajren olokʼicʼ; ar Sadok ar Abiathar do naekekin tahẽkana 
2Samuel20:26 ar Jayirren Ira hõ Dạudren sosolhayicʼ naekeye tahẽkana. 
2Samuel21:1 Dạude rajokʼkan tahẽkanre pe bochor akal hoylena ona do bochorke bochorge. Ona iạte Dạud do Probhu Isor ṭhen niạ reaṅe kuliyana. Ar Probhu Isor do roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Noa do Sạul ar uniyakʼ bõsrenko iạte hoyakana. Onkoge mãyãm reakʼ dusi kanako; Sạul do Gibeonrenkoe gocʼletʼkoa.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Ona iạte raj do Gibeonrenkoe hohowatʼkote onko tulucʼe galmaraokeda. Gibeonren hoṛ do Israel hoponko talare bako tahẽkana. Onko do Amorikoren sarecʼko kanako. Onko alo maraoko lạgitʼge Israelko doko kiriạlena, menkhan Sạul do Israel ar Jihudạ lạgitʼe ãṭokʼkan tahẽkante onko sanamkoge gocʼko reakʼe kurumuṭuleda." 
2Samuel21:3 Dạud do Gibeonkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ape lạgitʼ do cetʼ iń ceka daṛekea? Ar apeakʼ loksanko cetʼ lekateń puruntapete Probhu Isorakʼ ạidạriren Israelpe bhor daṛekekoa?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Gibeonrenko do uniko metadea, “Sạul ar uni bõsrenko ṭhen aleakʼ oka dạbiteakʼ menakʼtale ona do sona ar rupạ reaṅ do baṅkana se Israelko gocʼ giḍikako reaṅ hõ baṅkana.” Dạude kuliketʼkoa, “Enḍekhan ape lạgitʼ do cetʼ iń cekawapepe menjoṅkana?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Onko do rajko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Okoe hoṛ aleye jarkhar akatʼle ar Israelkoakʼ simạna tala khon marao giḍi utạrle lạgitʼte bạṛicʼakʼe phundi akatʼ," 
2Samuel21:6 uniyakʼ bõs khon eae goṭen herel hoṛ aleakʼ tire soprotaleme. Ale do Probhu Isorren bachao hoṛko, metakʼme Sạulakʼ nagraha Gibeonre Probhu Isorakʼ burure Probhu Isor samaṅre onkole gocʼkoa ar sanamko samaṅre onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkole giḍikakʼa.” Raj doe metatʼkoa, “Iń do apeakʼ tire onkoń soprotkoa.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Dạud do Sạulren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jonathanren hopon Mephiboset do jiwetʼe dohokedea, ente Sạulren hopon Jonathan ṭhen uni do Probhu Isor samaṅreye kiriạlena." 
2Samuel21:8 Unre raj do Aya hoponera Rispawakʼ kukhiren Sạulren banar hopon Armoni ar Mephiboset ar Sạul hoponerat Merabakʼ kukhiren Meholathi Barsilairen hopon Adiyelren mõṛẽ goṭen hoponko do Gibeonkoakʼ tireye soprotketʼkoa. Onko do mitʼṭecʼ buruteko idiketʼkote Probhu Isor samaṅreko gocʼketʼkoa ar sanamko samaṅre onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko giḍikada. Onko eae hoṛ do mitʼ dhaoteko gocʼketʼkoa; phosol gegetʼ jokhecʼ, metakʼme jao gegetʼ ehobokʼre onko doko gocʼ ocoyena." 
2Samuel21:9  
2Samuel21:10 Unre Ayaren hoponerat Rispa do gõṛẽ kicricʼ idikate mitʼṭecʼ dhiri cetanreye aṭetʼana. Pạhil phosol gegetʼ khon ehopʼkate tinạkʼ din ona mạ̃ṛĩko cetanre serma khon jạ̃ṛĩ dakʼ ạuri ńurokʼ hạbicʼ siń do cẽṛẽko ar ńindạ do bir janwarko ona mạ̃ṛĩ ṭhen bae sor ocoatʼkoa. 
2Samuel21:11 Sạulren chuṭki era Aya hoponera Rispa okae cekakan ona do Dạudko lạiyadea. 
2Samuel21:12 Unre Dạud do Jabes-Gileadren hoṛko ṭhen khon Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathanakʼ jaṅkoe ạgukeda. Philisṭiko do Gilboare Sạulko gocʼkede khan unkin bana hoṛakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do Bet-San nagraha reakʼ khạrạireko ṭaṅgaoleda. Jabes-Gileadren hoṛko do onḍe khon onakin mạ̃ṛĩko kombṛo ạguakatʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel21:13 Dạud do onḍe khon Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathanakʼ jaṅkoe ạgu ocokeda. Ar sanam hoṛko samaṅre okoeko gocʼ ocolen onkoakʼ jaṅ hõko halaṅ jarwakeda. 
2Samuel21:14 Dạudren hoṛko do Sạul ar uniren hopon Jonathanakʼ jaṅ do Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ Selare uniren apat Kisakʼ topareko topakada. Rajakʼ hukum lekage onko do sanamakʼko kạmikeda. Ona tayom disạm lạgitʼ Isor ṭhenko koeketʼ khan uni do koejoṅe ańjomketʼtakoa. 
2Samuel21:15 Philisṭiko ar Israelko talare arhõ lạṛhại ehopʼena. Dạud do acʼren phạdankote Philisṭiko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok calaoena. Unre uni do lạṛhại lạṛhạiteye laṅga cabayena. 
2Samuel21:16 Ar Isbi-Benob ńutuman mitʼṭen Rophayi do nãwã sajte sajkate Dạud goje lạgitʼe hecʼena. Uniyakʼ borlom reakʼ ojon do pon keji hamal ar ona do pitạl reakʼ tahẽkana. 
2Samuel21:17 Menkhan Seruya hopon Abisae do Dạude rukhiyạkedea. Uni do Philisṭi hoṛe ńẽtʼkedea are gocʼkedea. Unre Dạudren hoṛko do kiriạwate Dạudko metadea, “Ar tishõ ale sãote lạṛhại do alom oḍok calakʼa, Israel reakʼ diuhe do alom ĩṛĩcʼ ocoya.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Inạ tayom Philisṭiko sãote Gobre arhõ lạṛhại hoyena. Unre Husathi hoṛ Sibekae do Sippoy ńutuman mitʼṭen Rophayie gocʼkedea. 
2Samuel21:19 Gobre Philisṭiko sãote ar mitʼṭecʼ lạṛhạire Betlehemren Jare-oregim hopon Elhanan do Gatren Goliate gocʼkedea. Nui Goliạtakʼ borlom do kicricʼ teteńkoakʼ tur leka tahẽkana. 
2Samuel21:20 Ona tayom ar mitʼṭecʼ lạṛhại Gatre hoylena. Ona lạṛhạire mitʼṭecʼ usul hoṛe tahẽkana one uniyakʼ banar ti ar banar jaṅgare turui goṭecʼkate jotote bargel pon goṭecʼ kạṭupʼ tahẽkantae. Uni hõ mitʼṭecʼ Rophayi hoṛe tahẽkana. 
2Samuel21:21 Uni do tinre Israelkoe henostayetʼko tahẽkana unre Dạud dadattetʼ Semae hopon Jonathan do uniye gocʼkedea. 
2Samuel21:22 Noko ponon hoṛ do Gatre girobasokʼ kan Rophayi hoṛko tahẽkana. Dạud ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ tite noko doko gocʼ ocoyena. 
2Samuel22:1 Probhu Isor do Sạul ar eṭakʼ bạirikoakʼ ti khon tinre Dạude rukhiyạkedea unre Probhu Isor ńutumte Dạud do niạ sereńe sereńkeda: 
2Samuel22:2 Probhu Isorge ińren usul buru, ińakʼ aotan gaṛ ar ińren chakʼḍaoicʼ;" 
2Samuel22:3 Isor kangeae ińren usul buru do, unirege iń doń asray akana. Uni do ińren ḍhal kanae, rurukhiyạicʼ dereńge, unige ińakʼ usul gaṛ, ińakʼ asray ṭhạ̃i. Sasantaokoakʼ ti khon amge bańcaoińme." 
2Samuel22:4 Probhu Isor do sarhao ńam lek kanae, iń do uniń hohowae kana; onate ińren bạirikoakʼ ti khon iń do rukhiyạń ńameda." 
2Samuel22:5 Moron reakʼ ḍheokoteń esetʼ ạcurlena, maraokʼ reakʼ banbạsiteń toraslena." 
2Samuel22:6 Patal puri reakʼ barahikoteń tolakana, ar gujukʼ reakʼ pạsi do iń lạgitʼ oḍao tahẽkana." 
2Samuel22:7 Iń do muhinre ińren Probhu Isoriń hohowadea ar goṛo ńam lạgitʼ uni ṭheniń rakʼkeda. Uni do acʼakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khon ińakʼ aṛaṅe ańjomketʼtińạ; ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ do uniyakʼ luturre seṭerena. 
2Samuel22:8 Unre dhạrti do daldalaoena ar ḍikạ ḍakekʼ ehopʼena, buru reakʼ rehetʼko daldalaoena; uniyakʼ edrete onako do dal dalaoena." 
2Samuel22:9 Uniyakʼ mũ khon dhũạ do coṭte rakapʼena, ar moca khon ḍahao marao reakʼ seṅgel oḍokena. Ar uniyakʼ moca reakʼ seṅgelte koelako jolena." 
2Samuel22:10 Uni do sermae liwetʼketʼteye pheḍ hecʼena; uniyakʼ jaṅga latarre do hende rimil tahẽkana. 
2Samuel22:11 Uni do Kerubre decʼkateye uḍạu hecʼena, ar hoe reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼteye ạphir hecʼena." 
2Samuel22:12 Ńutte uni doe esetʼ ạcurena; ar beṛhaete dakʼ reakʼ dạriạ hende rimilge tahẽkana. 
2Samuel22:13 Uni samaṅ reakʼ rãt khon seṅgel aṅgrako jol oḍokena. 
2Samuel22:14 Probhu Isor do serma khone huḍurkeda; ar maraṅ Isorakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomena. 
2Samuel22:15 Uni do sarkoe aṛakʼketʼte bạirikoe chirchạturketʼkoa ar bijlikoteye andmandaoketʼkoa. 
2Samuel22:16 Probhu Isorakʼ dhomkaote ar sahẽtʼte jalapuri reakʼ nalako ńelena, ar dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼko do oṭakʼena." 
2Samuel22:17 Uni do coṭ khon tiye tiyạrketʼteye sapʼkedińa, ar khạndri dakʼ khone owar rakapʼkedińa." 
2Samuel22:18 Ińren daṛean bạirikoakʼ ti khon uni doe bańcaokedińa; iń kurudạńko reakʼ ti khon onkoakʼ daṛe do iń khon hõ ḍhergetakoa. 
2Samuel22:19 Muhinre onko do ińko esetʼ ạcur ledeńạ, menkhan Probhu Isorgeye sapʼ sãohakedińa." 
2Samuel22:20 Uni do mitʼṭecʼ phaelao jaegateye oḍok ạgukedińa; ar ińre kusiye tahẽkante uni doe rukhiyạkedińa. 
2Samuel22:21 Ińakʼ dhorom kạmi lekatege Probhu Isor doe dan akawạdińa, ińakʼ kạmi reakʼ napaetetʼ iạtege uni do kuṛạiye emadińạ;" 
2Samuel22:22 Ente Probhu Isorakʼ horrege iń doń dãṛãn kana; ar bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate ińren Isor khon bạń ocokʼ akana. 
2Samuel22:23 Isorakʼ joto ạn-ạriko do iń samaṅre menakʼa; ar uniyakʼ ạn ạri khon do bạń ocokʼ akana. 
2Samuel22:24 Uni samaṅre iń do bin dusạngeń tahẽkana, ar kại khon hõ pharakreń tahẽlena." 
2Samuel22:25 Onate Probhu Isor do kuṛạiye emakawạdińa uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege dhorom kạmi lekate ińakʼ mońjakʼ kạmikote. 
2Samuel22:26 E Probhu Isor, am do biswạsiko tulucʼ do biswạstem beohareda ar dhoromko tulucʼ do dhoromem beohareda," 
2Samuel22:27 Ar khạṭiko tulucʼ do khạṭigem beohareda, ar phẽpṛakʼko do amakʼ bud reakʼ phundi udukʼakome." 
2Samuel22:28 Am do nacar jạtrenkom rukhiyạyetʼkoa, ar bạḍạiko tumbutʼ ocoko lạgitʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ do onko secʼge menakʼa." 
2Samuel22:29 E Probhu Isor, amge ińakʼ diuhe do; amge ińakʼ ńut dom marsal ocoyetʼtińạ." 
2Samuel22:30 Amakʼ goṛote lạṛhại phạdko cetanre iń do jhãpiń em daṛeakʼa, ińren Isorakʼ goṛote pạcrikoń don parom daṛeakʼa." 
2Samuel22:31 Isorakʼ horre jãhãn bin sạbitanakʼ do bạnukʼanaṅ; ar Probhu Isorakʼ katha do khạṭi mente sạbud akana. Uni do acʼre hirlạjoṅ kan sanam hoṛren ḍhal kanae. 
2Samuel22:32 Probhu eskar chaḍa ar okoe Isor menaea? Aboren Isor chaḍa cetʼ jãhãn aotan buru menakʼa? 
2Samuel22:33 Isorge ińren kajak asray unige ińakʼ horkoe sạbit ocoakada. 
2Samuel22:34 Uni do posta-jel leka jaṅga reakʼ daṛeye emakawạdińa; ar sanam usul jaegakoreye teṅgo ocoakadińạ. 
2Samuel22:35 Uni ṭhen khonge ińakʼ ti do lạṛhạiye cetʼakada, onate ińakʼ ti do pitạl reakʼ akʼe gakʼ daṛeakʼ kana." 
2Samuel22:36 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ rurukhiyạ ḍhal do ińem emakawạdińa; ar amakʼ goṛo doe maraṅ akadińạ." 
2Samuel22:37 Am do ińakʼ taṛam horem phaelao akada, onate jaṅga do baṅ tohotʼlentińa." 
2Samuel22:38 Ińren bạirikoń khudạuketʼkoa ariń jarkharketʼkoa; ar onko ạuriko gocʼ cabakʼ hạbicʼ tayom secʼ do bạń ruạṛlena. 
2Samuel22:39 Onko doń marao giḍi akatʼkoa, ariń gejer caba akatʼkoa, ar alo jemonko beretʼ daṛeakʼ; ente ińakʼ jaṅga latarreko ńurakana." 
2Samuel22:40 Amge ińakʼ ḍanḍare lạṛhại lạgitʼ daṛeyem emakawạdińạ, ar iń upạrtenko do ińakʼ jaṅga ṭhenem tumbutʼ ocoketʼkoa." 
2Samuel22:41 Ińren bạiriko iń khonem laga ńirketʼkoa; ar okoe ińko kurudạńkan onko doń marao giḍi akatʼkoa. 
2Samuel22:42 Onko do goṛo ńam lạgitʼko hohoyetʼkana, menkhan onko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ do celege bako hecʼlena. Onko do Probhu Isor secʼko koyokʼ hor akada, menkhan uni do bae roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa." 
2Samuel22:43 Dhạrti reakʼ dhuṛi leka onko doń holoṅ ḍigirketʼkoa; ar ḍahar reakʼ losotʼ leka jaṅgateń lebetʼ gańjaoketʼkoa. 
2Samuel22:44 E Probhu Isor, ińren huhulkan hoṛko khon am dom bańcao akadińạ, ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko cetanre iń do matha mentem dohoakadińạ; okoe bạń orom akatʼko tahẽkan onko hõ iń gobolrenko hoyena." 
2Samuel22:45 Bidisiạ hoṛ doko luhum suhumińạ; ińakʼ katha ańjom torageko bataotińạ. 
2Samuel22:46 Onko doko tolmojokʼa; ar thar tharaoakʼte gaṛ khonko oḍok hijukʼa. 
2Samuel22:47 Probhu Isor doe jiwetʼgea. Ińakʼ asray cạṭạini do sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Ińren Isor, okoe doe ińren rurukhiyạicʼ burukan, uni doe usulokʼma." 
2Samuel22:48 Uni do eṭakʼ jạtrenko iń tabereye ạguyetʼkoa ar iń huyạte unige sạjạiye emakokana. 
2Samuel22:49 Uni do bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạ edeńkana. E Isor, am do ińren bạiriko khonem usul akadińạ, ar jor julumkan hoṛko khon amgem rukhiyạ edeńkana." 
2Samuel22:50 E Probhu Isor, ona iạtege eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare amakʼ ṭhonokiń sodortama ar amakʼ ńutumiń maraṅtama." 
2Samuel22:51 Probhu Isor do acʼren raj ḍher dhaoe jitạu ocoyea; hẽ, acʼren ojokʼicʼ lạgitʼ Dạud ar uniren bõsko lạgitʼ uni do acʼakʼ jaejug asambheṛ dayae udukʼetʼ kana." 
2Samuel23:1 Jisạiren hopon Dạudakʼ ses katha do noa kana: “Okoeye rakapʼ ocoakan, Jakobren Isor okoeye ojokʼ bahallede, Israelko talare liṭhur sekʼreńicʼ, hoṛ doe meneda," 
2Samuel23:2 Probhu Isorren Jiu do iń hotete kathae roṛeda, uniyakʼ katha do ińakʼ luṭire menakʼa." 
2Samuel23:3 Israelren Isore meneda, Israelren asray-buru do ińe mitạń kana, ‘Okoe hoṛ dhoromteye ḍanṭaoko ar Isore botorae," 
2Samuel23:4 Uni do bae rimil akatʼ setakʼ siń cando reakʼ marsal lekanicʼ kanae; ar jạ̃ṛĩ dakʼ tayom siń cando reakʼ marsalre ot khon omonokʼkan ghãs lekanicʼ kanae.’ 
2Samuel23:5 Isor ṭhen ińakʼ bõs do cetʼ onka do baṅkana? Iń iạte uni do mitʼṭecʼ jaejugakʼ bondobose dohoakada. Ona bondobos reakʼ sanamakʼko ṭhik leka sajao are khạṭi dohoakada. Ińakʼ bańcao doe jo baha ocoya, ar ińakʼ monsubạ doe puruntińạ." 
2Samuel23:6 Menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛ do totʼ giḍi ocokʼ jạnum leka kanako, one onko do tite ohoko sapʼlen." 
2Samuel23:7 Okoe onko sapʼkoe men uni do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa se borlom beohar hoyokʼtaea; onate jãhãrege onkoko tahen onḍege seṅgelteko lo marao ocokʼa.” 
2Samuel23:8 Dạudren birbanṭa hoṛkoakʼ ńutum do nonka leka: Tahkemonren Joseb-Boseboth do pene birbanṭakoren mathae tahẽkana. Mitʼṭen lạṛhạire uni do irạlsae hoṛe gocʼletʼkote Esniren Adinoko metaekan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:9 Uni tayom dosaricʼ doe tahẽkana Eleasar. Uni do Ahoyi bõsren Dodoren hopone tahẽkana. Philisṭiko tinre lạṛhại lạgitʼko jarwakʼkan tahẽkana unre onko henostako lạgitʼ okoe pene birbanṭa Dạud sãoteko tahẽkan onko modre Eleasar hõe tahẽkana. Ar lạṛhạire Israelkoko pạcen khan," 
2Samuel23:10 Eleasar do lạṛhại thạ̃ire teṅgoyente Philisṭiko ńẽńẽtʼe ehopʼena. Ar onko ńẽtʼ ńẽtʼteye laṅgayen khan uniyakʼ tire tarwaṛe do laṭkao uricʼena. Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jite hoyocokeda. Ar lạṛhại phạdko tinre Eliasar ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼena unre gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ jinisko luṭ chaḍa cekae reakʼ ar cetʼ hõ baṅ tahẽlentakoa. 
2Samuel23:11 Uni tayom doe hoyokʼkana Hararen Age hopon Samaye. Mitʼ dhao Philisṭiko mạsri baṛgere hecʼkateko jarwayen khan Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do onko ṭhen khonko dạṛkeda. 
2Samuel23:12 Menkhan Samay do tala baṛgere teṅgokate ona baṛgeye rukhiyạkeda ar Philisṭikoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa. Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do maraṅ jitạue hoeocokeda. 
2Samuel23:13 Mitʼ dhao phosol gegetʼ jokhecʼ pegel birbanṭa modre onko pene birbanṭa do Adulam danderte Dạud ṭhenko hecʼena. Unre Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko do Rephayim reakʼ buru lodamre hecʼkateko ḍera akan tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:14 Un jokhecʼ Dạud do hahaṅkar reakʼ aotan gaṛreye tahẽkana ar Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko do Bethlehemreko tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:15 Unre Dạud do dakʼ tetaṅkede khane menkeda, “Jãhãege Bethlehem phaṭok-duạr ṭhenakʼ kuń khon thoṛa dakʼko ạguạń khan honaṅ!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko pene birbanṭa hoṛ do Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko talate senkate Bethlehem reakʼ phaṭok-duạr ṭhenakʼ kuń khon dakʼ ạgukate Dạudko emadea. Menkhan Dạud do ona dakʼ bae ńũleda; ona bodolte Probhu Isor ńutumte otreye dulkeda. 
2Samuel23:17 Uni doe menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, noa dakʼ iń ńũ ona do iń khon sahaṛ akae tahenma. Noa do cetʼ onko hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm do baṅkana okoe do jiwi cuputʼkate ạguko senlen?” Dạud do ona ńũńũ bae rebenlena. Onko pene birbanṭa hoṛkoakʼ kạmige nonka tahẽkana." 
2Samuel23:18 Seruya hopon Joabren boeha Abisae do onko pene hoṛren subedare tahẽkana. Uni do borlomte pesae hoṛe gocʼletʼkoa ar uni hõ onko pene birbanṭako leka ńutume hạran tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:19 Uni do pene hoṛko khon hõ ḍher manote ńamleda. Onate onko pene hoṛko modre bae lekhalenre hõ onkoren subedare tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:20 Kabsilren Jehoyada hopon Bonae do mitʼṭecʼ birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni hõ maraṅ maraṅakʼkoe kạmileda. Moab Ariyelren barea hopone gocʼletʼkinạ. Mitʼdin him ńurokʼ hilokʼ uni do mitʼṭecʼ danderte bolokate mitʼṭecʼ dhạcri kule gocʼledea. 
2Samuel23:21 Uni do usul mitʼṭen Misri hoṛe gocʼledea. Uni Misri hoṛakʼ tire borlom tahẽkanre hõ uni do mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅgawante uni secʼe laha idilena. Ar uni Misri hoṛakʼ ti khon borlom recʼkate ona borlomtege uniye gocʼledea. 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoyada hopon Bonaeakʼ kạmi hõ onkage tahẽkana. Uni hõ onko pea birbanṭa leka ńutume hạran tahẽkana. 
2Samuel23:23 Onko pene hoṛko modre bae lekhalenre hõ “Pegel” ńutuman dolren hoṛko khon hõ uni do bạ̃ṛti manote ńamleda. Dạud do acʼakʼ rurukhiyạ reakʼ bhar do Bonae cetanregeye doholeda 
2Samuel23:24 “Pegel” Ńutuman dolre do nokoko tahẽkana: Joabren boeha Asahel, Dodoren hopon Elhanan," 
2Samuel23:25 Harodren Sema, Harodren Elika," 
2Samuel23:26 Peletren Heles, Tekuaren Ikesren hopon Ira," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathotren hopon Abieser, Husatren Sibekai," 
2Samuel23:28 Ahohren Salmon, Nethopharen Maharai," 
2Samuel23:29 Nethopharen Bana hopon Helob, Benjamin-gusṭiren Gibe Ribaeren hopon Ithoy," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathonren Benaya Gakʼas reakʼ tapol otren Hidai," 
2Samuel23:31 Arbaren Abi Albon, Bahurimren Asmawet," 
2Samuel23:32 Sakʼalbonren Eliahba, Benejasen, Jonathan," 
2Samuel23:33 Hararren Sama, Hararren Sarar hopon Ahiam," 
2Samuel23:34 Makaren Ahasbai hopon Eliphelet, Giloren Ahitophel hopon Eliam," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmelren Hesro, Arabren Parai," 
2Samuel23:36 Sabaren Nathan hopon Igal, Gadren Bani," 
2Samuel23:37 Amonren Selek, Seruaren hopon Joabakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ Berotiạ Nohoroe," 
2Samuel23:38 Jitriạ Era, Jitriạ Gareb," 
2Samuel23:39 ar Hiti Uriạ. Onḍe do jotote pegel eae birbanṭa hoṛko tahẽkana. 
2Samuel24:1 Probhu Isor do arhõ Israelko cetanre pit caṛhaoentaea. Uni do onko upạrte Dạude uskurkedeteye metadea, “Am do senkate Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛkom lekhakoa.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Unre raj do acʼ sãoten subedar Joabe metadea, “Ape do Dan khon Ber-seba hạbicʼ Israel gusṭiko talare senkate hoṛ lekhakope jemon iń do onkoakʼ lekhań baḍae daṛeakʼ.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Joab do raje metadea, “Amren Probhu Isor do hoṛkoakʼ lekha mitʼsae doboṛ ḍher baṛeye hoyocoema, ar ińren mạlik maharaj do acʼakʼ mẽtʼtege ona baṛeye ńel ma. Menkhan ińren mạlik maharaj do cedakʼ nonka kạmi doe khojkana?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Menkhan Joab ar subedarko ṭhen rajakʼ hukum do tahẽyena; ar onate onko do Israelren hoṛ lekhako lạgitʼ raj samaṅ khonko oḍok calaoena. 
2Samuel24:5 Onko do Jordan paromkate Gat ṭoṭha buru lodam tala nagraha reakʼ dạkhinre Aroerre senkateko ḍerayena, ar ona tayom do Jaserteko calaoena." 
2Samuel24:6 Ona tayom onko do Gilead ar Tahtim-Hadasi ṭoṭhateko calaoena. Ar ona tayom do Danre senkate Sidon secʼko ạcurena. 
2Samuel24:7 Ona tayom onko do Tur reakʼ gaṛ nagraha ar Hiwiko ar Kananikoakʼ goṭa nagrahako calaoena. Ar sesre onko do Jihudạ reakʼ dạkhin secʼ Ber-sebateko calaoena. 
2Samuel24:8 Nonkate onko do goṭa disạm ạcur ạcrute are cando bargel din tayom Jerusalemteko ruạṛ hecʼena. 
2Samuel24:9 Joab do raj ṭhen hoṛkoakʼ lekhae emkeda. Onate ńelena, tarwaṛeko calao daṛeakʼ nonkan hoṛ Israelren irạl lakh ar Jihudạren do mõṛẽ lakh hoṛko tahẽkana." 
2Samuel24:10 Disạm hoṛe lekha ocoketʼko tayom Dạudakʼ mon do sobokʼentaea. Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen koekateye menkeda, “Noa kạmikate iń doń ghạṭ akada. E Probhu Isor, ńitokʼ do am ṭheniń nehõrokʼ kana, amren gutiyakʼ ghạṭ baṛe ocokʼkakʼme. Iń do lelha hoṛ lekań kạmi akada.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre Dạud do jạpitʼ khone beretʼen khan uniren ńeńelicʼ, metakʼme Gad nạbi ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorena," 
2Samuel24:12 “Am do senkate Dạud niạ katha lạiyaeme, ‘am lạgitʼ iń do pea sạjạiyiń dohoakada. Onako khon okaṭakʼem bachao joṅ ona lekage amreń paṛao ocoya.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Unre Gad do Dạud ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Amakʼ disạmre cetʼ eae bochor akal hoyokʼem khojkana? Se bạiriko khudạu baṛamete pe cando hạbicʼ ńir oko baṛayem khojkana? Se pe mãhã hạbicʼ amakʼ disạmre mahamạrim khojkana? Okoeye kol akadiń uni do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛaea ona reakʼ ńitokʼ hudiskate lạiyạńme.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Unre Dạud do Gade metadea, “Iń do ạḍi muhinreń paṛao akana. Manwa tire jemon aloń paṛaokʼ; ona khon boroṅ, Probhu Isorakʼ tire bon paṛaokʼma, ente uniyakʼ daya do asambheṛgetaea.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Ar Probhu Isor do unre setakʼ khon ehopʼkate niṭ akatʼ okte hạbicʼ Israel cetanre mitʼṭecʼ mahamạriye kolkeda. Onate Dan khon Ber-seba hạbicʼ goṭa disạmren hoṛko tala khon eaegel hajar hoṛko gocʼena. 
2Samuel24:16 Jerusalem marao lạgitʼ serma goḍet do tinre tiye tulketʼtaea unre Probhu Isor do ona bạṛicʼ sạjại khon mone ạcurketʼtaea. Ar okoe serma goḍet do hoṛkoe maraoetʼko tahẽkan uniye metadea, “Inạkʼkakʼme, ḍher hoyakana. Amakʼ ti do or ruạṛtam.” Un jokhecʼ Probhu Isorren goḍet do Jebusiạ Arownakʼ khạrại ṭhene teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
2Samuel24:17 Okoe serma goḍet do hoṛkoe ńẽtʼetʼko tahẽkan Dạud do uniye ńelkede khan Probhu Isore metadea, “Ińgeń ghạṭ akada ar ińgeń behok akada. Menkhan noko bhiḍiko do cetʼko ceka akada? Onate eken iń ar iń ạpuńren bõskoge baṛe sạjạilem.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Enhilokʼ Gad do Dạud ṭhen senkateye metadea, “Am do Jebusiạren Arownakʼ khạrạite senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benaome.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Unre Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumte Gadakʼ katha leka onḍeye calaoena. 
2Samuel24:20 Arowna do tinre raj ar uniren hoṛko acʼ secʼ hijukʼkane ńelketʼkoa unre uni do senkate otreye ombakʼente raje ḍobokʼadea. 
2Samuel24:21 Arownae menkeda, “Ińren mạlik maharaj do acʼren guti ṭhen cetʼ lạgitʼe hecʼakana?” Dạude roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ benao lạgitʼte iń do amakʼ khạrại kirińiń menjoṅkana, jemon hoṛko cetanre hecʼakan mahamạri thirokʼ.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arowna do Dạude metadea, “Ińren mạlik maharaj oka bhagem hudisetʼ onage ińakʼ nonḍe khon samaṅme. Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ḍaṅgra do nonḍege menakʼkoa ar sahan lạgitʼ hõ enokʼ paṭako ar ḍaṅgrakoakʼ arãṛ menakʼa." 
2Samuel24:23 E maharaj, Arowna do noako raje emaekana.” Arowna do arhõe meneda, “Amren Probhu Isor do amakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe ataṅtam ma.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Raj do Arownae metadea, “Baṅa, ona do baṅ hoyokʼa. Iń do khạṭige damte onań kirińa. Begor damte ńamokʼ nonkan jãhãnakʼge Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do bạń samaṅa.” Niạ menkate Dạud do mõṛẽ Sekel rupạte ona khạrại ar ḍaṅgraye kirińketʼkoa." 
2Samuel24:25 Ona tayom do Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren dãṛẽkoe samaṅketʼkoa. Nonkate disạm lạgitʼ koejoṅ hoyen khan Probhu Isor doe ańjomketʼtakoa ar Israel disạmre mahamạri hõ thirena. 
1Kings1:1 Dạud raj doe haṛam idiyena ar umer hõ ạḍi ḍher hoyentaea. Ar ḍher kicricʼkote oyokatere hõ uni do bae lolokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Kings1:2 Ona iạte uniren kạmiyạko do uniko metadea, “Ale do aleren mạlik maharaj lạgitʼ mitʼṭen kũạri kuṛile sendra ạguyea. Uni do raj ṭhen tahẽkate uniye jotonea. Ar aleren mạlikakʼ hoṛmo hõ jemon lolokʼtae onate uniyakʼ koṛam ṭhene gitijokʼma.”" 
1Kings1:3 Onate onko do mitʼṭen mońj okocʼ kuṛi ńame lạgitʼ goṭa Israel disạmre sendrayeko ehopʼena. Tayomte onko do Sunemiạ Abisogko ńamkedea ar uni do raj ṭhenko ạgukedea. 
1Kings1:4 Kuṛi do ńelokʼte ạḍitetʼ napaegeye tahẽkana. Ar Abisog do raj ṭhen tahẽkate uni jotone ehopʼena, menkhan raj do uni bae jakʼ joṭetʼledea." 
1Kings1:5 Hagit hopon Adoniạ do acʼte usulokʼte roṛ baṛaeye ehopʼena, “Ińge rajiń hoyokʼa.” Ar noa menkate uni do rãt gạḍiko ar aswarikoe jogaṛketʼkoa ar acʼ laha lahate calakʼ lạgitʼ mõṛẽgel hoṛe bachaoana." 
1Kings1:6 Uniren apattetʼ do tishõ uniyakʼ kạmire bae tạkicʼ daram akadea, se bae men akadea, “Cedakʼ nonka dom kạmikana?” Uni do Absalom leka ńelokʼte mońjgeye tahẽkana; ar Absalom bokottetʼe tahẽkana." 
1Kings1:7 Adoniạ do Seruạren hopon Joab ar naeke Abiạthar sãoteye solhakeda, ar unkin do unikin goṛowadea." 
1Kings1:8 Menkhan Sadok naeke ar Jehoyada hopon Bonae, Nathan nạbi, Simai, Reyi ar Dạudren birbanṭa hoṛko do Dạud secʼgeko tahẽyena." 
1Kings1:9 Adoniạ do On-regel aṛere Sohelot dhiri ṭhen ḍaṅgrako, bheḍako, lodgopʼ lodgopʼ bạchurkoe samaṅketʼkote acʼren boehako, metatʼme rajren hoponko ar Jihudạren sanam rajren kạmiyạkoe neotaketʼkoa." 
1Kings1:10 Menkhan uni do Nathan nạbi, Bonae, Dạudren birbanṭa hoṛko ar uniren boeha Solomonteko do bae neotaletʼkoa." 
1Kings1:11 Unre Nathan do Solomonren eṅgattetʼ Bethsebae metadea, “Aleren mạlik Dạud begor baḍae ocoyete Hagitren hopon Adoniạ do raje hoyakan ona do cetʼ bam ańjom akada?”" 
1Kings1:12 Amren hopon Solomonakʼ jiwi do cekatem rukhiyạitaea ona reakʼ solhań emam kana. 
1Kings1:13 Am do ńitge Dạud raj ṭhen senkate menme, ‘E ińren mạlik maharaj, amren kạ̃ṛmĩ ṭhen niạ do cetʼ bam gokʼleda, am tayom do amren hopon Solomonge raje hoyokʼa mente ar unige amakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa. Enḍekhan cekate Adoniạ do raje hoyakana?’" 
1Kings1:14 Am do raj sãote tinre katham roṛa unre onḍe senkate ińhõ amakʼ kathareń suhũkʼakʼa.” 
1Kings1:15 Unre Bethseba do raj sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ uniyakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. Unre raj do ạḍitetʼe haṛam thalakʼ thulukʼ caba akan tahẽkana ar Sunemiạ Abisog do uniye jotonede tahẽkana. 
1Kings1:16 Bethseba do raje joharadea. Raj do uniye kulikedea, “Jãhãnakʼem khojkana?”" 
1Kings1:17 Bethseba do uniye metadea, “E ińren mạlik, amge amren Isor ńutumte kiriạkate amren kạ̃ṛmĩ ṭhenem menleda, amren hopon Solomonge am tayom raj doe hoyokʼa ar unige amakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa." 
1Kings1:18 Menkhan ńitokʼ Adoniại raj akan ona babotre ińren mạlik maharaj do cetʼge bae baḍaekana. 
1Kings1:19 Uni do ạḍi utạr ḍaṅgrako, lodgopʼ lodgopʼ bạchurko ar bheḍakoe samaṅketʼkoa ar rajren sanam hoponko, naeke Ạbiạthar ar subedar Joab hõe neota akadea, menkhan amren guti Solomon do bae neotaledea." 
1Kings1:20 E ińren mạlik maharaj, sanam Israelko do amko koyokʼ hor akatʼmea. Onko do am ṭhen khon baḍae sanayetʼkoa ińren mạlik maharajakʼ do acʼ tayom siṅghạsonre okoeye duṛubea mente." 
1Kings1:21 Ar baṅkhan ińren mạlik maharaj do tinre acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senokʼa unre iń ar ińren hopon Solomon do dusi hoṛ menteko hudislińạ.” 
1Kings1:22 Raj sãote Bethsebawakʼ katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege Nathan do onḍeye seṭer gotʼena. 
1Kings1:23 Unre mitʼ hoṛ do raje metadea, “Nathan nạbi do nonḍeye hecʼ akana.” Unre Nathan do raj samaṅre senkate otre ombakʼkateye joharadea." 
1Kings1:24 Ona tayom uni do raje metadea, “E ińren mạlik maharaj, am do cetʼ noam lại sodoreda je, am tayom do Adoniạge raje hoyokʼa mente, ar unige amakʼ siṅghạsonrey duṛupʼa?" 
1Kings1:25 Ente uni do teheń senkate ạḍi utạr ḍaṅgra, lodgopʼ lodgopʼ bạchurko ar bheḍakoe samaṅ akatʼkoa ar rajren hoponko, senaputiko ar naeke Ạbiạthar hõe neota akadea. Onko do ńitokʼ uni sãoteko jom-ńũiyeda arko meneda, ‘Adoniạ raj do jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼe tahenma.’" 
1Kings1:26 Amren guti iń, ar naeke Sadok, Jehoyadaren hopon Banae ar amren guti Solomon noko do okoe hõ bae neotaletʼkoa." 
1Kings1:27 Ińren mạlik maharaj tayom okoe siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ uni do cetʼ ińren mạlik maharaj ar uniren kạmiyạko begor baḍae ocokote uni do cetʼ ṭhikakʼe kạmi akada?” 
1Kings1:28 Unre Dạud raje menkeda, “Bethseba hohowaepe.” Onate Bethseba do raj samaṅreye teṅgoyena." 
1Kings1:29 Unre raj do kiriạyenteye menkeda, “Okoe do sanam muhin khone bańcao akadiń, uni jiwetʼ Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda," 
1Kings1:30 Israelkoren Isor ńutumte okaṭakʼ iń kiriạ akan ona do teheń khạṭigeń purạua. Amren hopon Solomonge iń tayom raje hoyokʼa ar unige ińakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa.” 
1Kings1:31 Unre Bethseba do otre ombakʼkate raje ḍobokʼadeteye menkeda, “Ińren mạlik maharaj do jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼe tahen ma.”" 
1Kings1:32 Ar Dạud raj doe menkeda, “Naeke Sadok, Nathan nạbi ar Jehoyadaren hopon Banae iń ṭhen hoho ạgukope.” Ar onko do raj ṭhenko hecʼena." 
1Kings1:33 Dạud do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do ińren rurukhiyạ dolko soṅgekope ar ińren hopon Solomon do ińren khaccarre dejepe ar Gihon tapol otette idiyepe." 
1Kings1:34 Sadok naeke ar Nathan nạbi do onḍe Israelkoren raj mente uni kin ojokʼ bahalea. Ar ona tayom do sakwa oroṅkate ãṭ aṛaṅtepe mena, ‘Solomon raj do jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma.’" 
1Kings1:35 Inạ tayom ape do uni tayom tayomtepe ruạṛ hijukʼa. Ar uni do ińakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa ar ińakʼ jaegareye rajokʼa. Ar iń do Israel ar Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ iń ojokʼ bahalkedea.” 
1Kings1:36 Unre Jehoyadaren hopon Banae do raje metadea, “Amen. Aboren mạlik maharajren Isor do onkage baṛeye kạmima." 
1Kings1:37 Isor do cetʼleka ińren mạlik maharaj sãoteye tahẽkan onkage Solomon tulucʼ hõe tahenma ar ińren mạlik Dạudakʼ rajosṭi khon uniyakʼ rajosṭi do arhõ ṭhonok anakʼe hoeocoytae ma!” 
1Kings1:38 Unre naeke Sadok, Nathan nạbi, Jehoyadaren hopon Banae, Korethiạ ar Polethiạko do senkate Dạud rajakʼ siṅghạsonre Solomonko duṛupʼkedete Gihonteko idikedea." 
1Kings1:39 Unre naeke Sadok do sonot tạmbu khon dereńte sunume ạgukeda ar Solomone ojokʼ bahalkedea. Ona tayom onko do sakwako oroṅkeda ar Israelko do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoateko menkeda, “Solomon raj do jaejug baṛe jiwetʼe tahenma.”" 
1Kings1:40 Ona tayom hoṛko do tiriyạ oroṅ oroṅte ar ạḍi rạskạ salakʼ Solomon tayom tayomteko ruạṛ hecʼena. Onko do nunạkʼko rạskạyena, onkoakʼ andoṛte ot hõ dal dalaoena." 
1Kings1:41 Unre Adoniạ ar uniren sanam neota akan hoṛko do ạuriko jom sạtrege ona reakʼ andoṛko ańjomkeda. Sakwa reakʼ saḍe ańjomte Joab doe kuliyana, “Nagrahare nonka gulmal do cedakʼ hoyokʼkana?”" 
1Kings1:42 Uniyakʼ ona katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege naeke Abiạtharren hopon Jonathan do onḍeye seṭerena. Ar Adoniạ do uniye metadea, “Dela, hijukʼme. Am dom bhage hoṛ kana khạṭige mońj sombatem ạguakada.”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonathane roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa. Aboren mạlik Dạud do Solomone raj akadea." 
1Kings1:44 Ar raj do uni sãote Sadok naeke, Nathan, Jehoyadaren hopon Banae, Korethiạ ar Polethiạkoe kol akatʼkoa. Onko do rajakʼ duṛupʼakʼre uniko duṛupʼkedea,"
