1Kings1:45 ar Sadok naeke ar Nathan nạbi do Gihonre raj lekate unikin ojokʼ bahalkedea. Onḍe khon hoṛko do rạskạ salakʼko ruạṛ hạjukʼkan reakʼ andoṛge nagrahare hoyokʼkana. Ape do ona reakʼ anḍoṛgepe ańjomeda. 
1Kings1:46 Ona chaḍa Solomon raj do siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana, ar rajren kạmiyạko do aboren mạlik Dạud maharajko joharaekana arko meneda, ‘amren Isor do am khon hõ Solomonakʼ ńutume maraṅtaema ar amakʼ rajosṭi khon uniyakʼ rajosṭi do arhõe ṭhonok ocoytaema.’ Unre raj do acʼakʼ aṭetʼ cetanrege ombakʼkate Isor sewawadeteye menkeda, ‘Israelkoren Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Ińakʼ siṅghạsonren ạidạriyicʼ teheń uni doe ńel ocokedińa.’ ”" 
1Kings1:47  
1Kings1:48  
1Kings1:49 Adoniạren neota akan hoṛko do niạ kathako ańjomketʼ khan ạḍiko botorena ar beretʼkate apan ạpin horteko calao baṛayena. 
1Kings1:50 Menkhan Adoniạ do Solomon botorte senkate pinḍ reakʼ dereńreye sapʼena. 
1Kings1:51 Unre Solomonko baḍae ocokedea, Adoniạ do am botorte pinḍ reakʼ dereńe sapʼ hapeketʼteye menkeda, “Solomon raj do teheń iń ṭhene kiriạkʼma, jemon acʼren guti aloe gocʼ giḍikae.”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Bhage hoṛ kanae menteye sạbud ocolen khan enḍekhan uni do bohokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ upʼ hõ otre baṅ ńurokʼtaea; menkhan unire jãhãn bạṛicʼakʼ ńamokʼ enḍekhan uni doe gujukʼa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Noa menkate Solomon do hoṛ kolkate pinḍ khon Adoniại ạgu ocokedea. Ar Adoniạ do hecʼkate Solomon raj samaṅre otreye ombakʼ hapeyena. Solomone menkeda, “Do amakʼ oṛakʼte calakʼme.”" 
1Kings2:1 Dạudakʼ gujukʼ okte sor hecʼentae khan uni do acʼren hopon Solomon noako sikhạuna emadeteye metadea," 
1Kings2:2 “Dhạrtiren sanamko okaṭakʼ horte calakʼ hoyokʼtako iń hõ ńitokʼ do ona hortegeń mohnḍa akana. Onate am do keṭejokʼme, ar mitʼṭen keṭecʼ herel hopon leka udugokʼme." 
1Kings2:3 Amren Probhu Isorakʼ sanaleka uniyakʼ horte calakʼme ar Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrire ol akan Probhu Isorakʼ joto niạmko, hukumko, sopolhako ar gohawakʼkom dohoya. Nonkate jãhãnakʼgem kạmi ar jãhãtegem calakʼ onḍegem jo bahakʼa." 
1Kings2:4 Enḍekhan Probhu Isor do iń ṭhen okae gokʼakatʼ ona sanamakʼe purạua. Ona gokʼakʼ do hoyokʼkana, ‘amren bõsko goṭa monte pạtiạr salakʼ iń samaṅre taṛam lạgitʼ sontorte akoakʼ jionko khemao enḍekhan Israelkoakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ bõsre hoṛkoakʼ okulạn do baṅ hoyokʼa.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Seruyaren hopon Joab do iń lạgitʼ okaṭakʼe ceka akatʼ ar Israelren lạṛhại phạdkoren banar senaputi cetanre, metakʼme Nerren hopon Abner ar Jetherren hopon Amasa tạkin cetanre okae ceka akatʼ ona dom baḍaegea. Uni do unkine khũn akatʼkinạ, ar sulukokʼ oktere hõ uni do lạṛhại reakʼ dinko leka unkinakʼ mãyãme joro ocoakada ar ona mãyãm do uniyakʼ ḍanḍa totolakʼre ar jaṅga reakʼ panahere laṭkao akana." 
1Kings2:6 Am do ạkil salakʼ kạmime, ar haṛam umerre uni do sulukte patal purite alom sen ocoaea." 
1Kings2:7 Menkhan Geliad Barsilairen hoponko cetanre do pạtiạr baṛe tahenme. Ar am sãote amakʼ ṭebilre okoeko jom-ńũiyetʼkan onko talare onko hõ jaegam emakoa. Amren boeha Absalom ṭhen khoniń ńir paskaolen jokhecʼ onko do ạḍiko goṛowạdiń tahẽkana. 
1Kings2:8 Disạime, Bahurimren Benjạmin gusṭiren Gera hopon Simai hõ am soṅgere menaea. Ar oka hilokʼ Mehaniạmteń senlen enhilokʼ uni do ạḍi bạṛicʼe sarapadiń tahẽkana. Jordanre iń tulucʼ ńapamokʼe hecʼlenre Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạlena, uni do bạń gojea." 
1Kings2:9 Menkhan ńitokʼ do bin dusi mente alom hudisea. Am dom ạkilanicʼ kana; unire cetʼem cekaea ona do amge bhagem bujhạu daṛeakʼa. Uniyakʼ haṛam umerre mãyãmem joro ocoytaea ar patal puritem kolkaea.” 
1Kings2:10 Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uni do Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakedea. 
1Kings2:11 Uni do Israelko cetanre pongel bochor hạbicʼ raje tahẽkana ar eae bochor do Hebronre ar pegel pe bochor do Jerusalemre. 
1Kings2:12 Ar Solomon do apattetʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼena ar uniyakʼ rajosṭi do ạḍi kajakentaea. 
1Kings2:13 Tayomte Hagitren hopon Adoniạ do Solomonren eṅgat Bethseba ṭhene senena. Bethaseba do uniye kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ sulukokʼ lạgitʼte nonḍem hecʼakana?” Uniye menkeda, “Hẽ, sulukokʼ lạgitʼgeń hecʼakana. Ińakʼ do am sãote thoṛa galmarao menakʼtińạ.” Bethsebae menkeda, “Ma roṛme.”" 
1Kings2:14  
1Kings2:15 Unre uniye menkeda, “Am dom baḍaegea rajosṭi do ińakʼge tahẽkana. Ar Israelren sanamkogeko hudisetʼ tahẽkana ińge rajiń hoyokʼa mente. Menkhan bhạg bodolente rajosṭi do ińren boehawakʼ tire calaoena, ente ona do Probhu Isor ṭhen khongeye ńam akada." 
1Kings2:16 Ńitokʼ am ṭhen ińakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nehõr joṅakʼ menakʼtińạ. Am do alogem ruạṛkạńạ.” Uniye metadea, “Ma roṛme.”" 
1Kings2:17 Unre uni do roroṛe ehopʼena, “Am do Solomon rajem metaea Sunemren Abisog do iń tulucʼ jemone baplaye. Uni do amakʼ kathae dohoya.”" 
1Kings2:18 Bethsebae roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Bhagegea, amakʼ katha do rajiń lạiyaea.”" 
1Kings2:19 Ado Bethseba tinre Adoniạwakʼ katha lại lạgitʼ Solomon raj ṭhene senena unre raj doe beretʼente uniye joharadea ar ona tayom do acʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼena. Raj do acʼ eṅgat lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ duṛupʼakʼe ạgu ocoketʼte acʼakʼ jojomsa aṛereye dohokeda ar eṅgattetʼ do onareye duṛupʼena. 
1Kings2:20 Bethsebae menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń machań nehõrama; ar alogem ruạṛkạńạ.” Raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E Go, ma roṛme, iń do bạń ruạṛmea.”" 
1Kings2:21 Unre Bethsebae menkeda, “Amren boeha Adoniạ sãote Sunemren Abisegakʼ bapla hoyokʼma.”" 
1Kings2:22 Solomon do acʼren eṅgattetʼe metadea, “Adoniạ lạgitʼ Sunemrem Abisag do cedakʼem khojekana? Am do uni lạgitʼ rajosṭi hõm koe daṛekińạ, ente uni do ińren maraṅicʼ boeha kanae; hẽ ar uni lạgitʼ, naeke Abiạthar lạgitʼ ar Seruyaren hopon Joab lạgitʼ hõ onam koe daṛekińạ.”" 
1Kings2:23 Inạ tayom Solomon raj do Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateye menkeda, “Noa aroj lạgitʼ jodi Adoniạwakʼ jiwi baṅ hataokʼtae enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ińe sạjạyińma, ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạige." 
1Kings2:24 Okoe do ińren ạpuńakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akadińạ ar acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭen raj bõse teṅgo akawadiń uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, teheńge Adoniạ doe gocʼ ocokʼa.”" 
1Kings2:25 Ona tayom Solomon raj do Jehuyadaren hopon Banaeye hukumadea, ar Banae do Adoniại gocʼkedea." 
1Kings2:26 Ona tayom raj do Abiạthare metadea, “Am do amakʼ jaega Anatholte ruạṛ calakʼme. Am do gocʼ ocokʼ lek kanam, menkhan ńitokʼ do bạń gocʼmea, ente ińren ạpuń Dạud oktere Probhu Isorakʼ sindukem gokʼ ạguleda ar iń ạpuńakʼ sanamakʼ duk ar kosṭoren bhạgiyạdarem hoylena.”" 
1Kings2:27 Nonkate Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ naeke hudạ khon Abiạthare ocokʼkedea. Probhu Isor do Silore Eliren bõs reaṅ okae menletʼ uniyakʼ ona katha do nonkage purạuena. 
1Kings2:28 Niạko khobor do Joabakʼ luturre seṭerena. Uni do Absalom secʼ bae tahẽkanre hõ Adoniạ secʼe tahẽkana, onate uni doe ńir paskaoente Probhu Isorakʼ tạmbure senkate pinḍ reakʼ dereńe sapʼ hapekeda." 
1Kings2:29 Solomon raj doe baḍae ocoyena je, Joab do ńir paskaoente Probhu Isorakʼ tạmbureye bolo akana ar pinḍ ṭhen menaea. Unre Solomon do Jehuyadaren hopon Banaeye hukumadea, “Am do senkate uni gojeme.”" 
1Kings2:30 Onate Banae do Probhu Isorakʼ tạmbure bolokate Joabe metadea, “Raj do oḍok hijukʼ lạgitʼe hukum akada.” Menkhan Joabe menkeda, “Baṅ, iń do nonḍegeń gujukʼa.” Banae do ona khobor raje baḍae ocokedeteye menkeda, “Joab do noa roṛ ruạṛadińa.”" 
1Kings2:31 Unre raj do Banaeye hukumadea, “Uni okaṭakʼe menetʼkan onage onkaeme. Uni gocʼkate topakae me. Joab okoe bin dusạn hoṛkoakʼ mãyãme joro ocoakatʼ onako reakʼ dos do iń ar ińren ạpuńakʼ bõs khon nonkage ocokʼ giḍikakʼme." 
1Kings2:32 Ar uni tinạkʼ mãyãme joro ocoakatʼ ona reakʼ do Probhu Isorgeye hala ruạṛaea, ente ińren ạpuń begor baḍae ocoyete uni do bar hoṛe gocʼketʼkinạ. Unkin do lạṛhại phạdkoren senaputi Nerren hopon Abner ar Jihudạ lạṛhại phạdkoren senaputi Jether ren hopon Amasa." 
1Kings2:33 Unkinakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dos do Joab ar uniyakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ bohokʼ cetanre jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma. Menkhan Dạud ar uni bõsren hoṛko cetanre ar uniyakʼ gharońj ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ sạjại do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma.” 
1Kings2:34 Unre Jehuyadaren hopon Banae do senkate Joabe gocʼkedea. Ar hahaṅkar ṭoṭhare acʼakʼ oṛakʼreko topakadea. 
1Kings2:35 Unre raj do Joab bodolte Jehuyadaren hopon Banae do senaputiye bahalkedea ar Abiạtharakʼ jaegare do Sadoke bahalkedea. 
1Kings2:36 Ona tayom raj do hoṛ kolkate Simaiye hoho ạgukedeteye metadea, “Am do Jerusalemre mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benaokate onḍege tahenme, ar okatehõ alom oḍok baṛakʼa." 
1Kings2:37 Ar oka hilokʼ onḍe khon oḍok kate kedron nalam paromokʼa enhilokʼ baḍaeme, am do khạṭigem gujukʼa; amakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dos do amakʼ bohokʼ cetanrege paṛaokʼa.”" 
1Kings2:38 Simai do raje roṛ ruạṛadea, “Am do bhagegem menakada. Ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj okae menakatʼ amren guti do onageye kạmiya.” Inạ tayom Simai do ḍher din Jerusalemreye tahẽyena." 
1Kings2:39 Menkhan pe bochor tayom Simairen barea guti do Makaren hopon Gatren raj Akhis ṭhenkin dạṛkeda. Simaiko metadea, uniren guti do Gatre menakʼ kinạ." 
1Kings2:40 Unre Simai do gadhare decʼkate acʼren guti sendrakin lạgitʼ Gatte Akhis ṭhene senena ar onḍe khon unkine ruạṛ ạguketʼ kinạ. 
1Kings2:41 Tayomte Solomonko baḍae ocokedea, Simai do Jerusalem khon Gatte senkate arhõe ruạṛ hecʼena." 
1Kings2:42 Unre raj do Simai hoho ạgukedeteye metadea, “Iń do cetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkate bạń sontorletʼmea, oka hilokʼem oḍokokʼa enhilokʼ do khạṭigem gujukʼa mente? Unre am do ińem metadiń tahẽkana bhagegem roṛakada ar ona lekageń senokʼa." 
1Kings2:43 Enḍekhan cedakʼ am do Probhu Isor ṭhenem kiriạlena ar ińakʼ hukum bam bataoleda?” 
1Kings2:44 Solomon do Simai arhõe metadea, “Ińren ạpuń Dạud cetanre okaṭakʼem behok akatʼ ona do amakʼ ontore baḍaegea. Ńitokʼ do Probhu Isorge amakʼ behokakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ kuṛạiye emama." 
1Kings2:45 Menkhan Solomon raj cetanre do bhor tahena, ar Dạudakʼ siṅghạson do Probhu Isor samaṅre jaejug hạbicʼ ṭarhao akan tahena.”" 
1Kings2:46 Raj do inạ tayom Jehuyadaren hopon Banaeye hukumadea ar Banae do senkate Simaiye gocʼkedea. Nonkate Solomonakʼ rajosṭi do kajakte ṭarhao tahẽyena. 
1Kings3:1 Solomon do Misorren raj Pharaoren hoponerae baplakedete uni tulucʼ gatekʼ reakʼe ehopʼkeda. Solomonakʼ raj gaṛ, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar Jerusalem beṛhaete pạcri ạuriye sạt hạbicʼ acʼren bạhu do Dạudakʼ nagrahareye dohokedea." 
1Kings3:2 Ar hoṛko do unrehõ than boṭkocʼkore akoren janwarkoko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana, ente un hạbicʼ hõ Probhu Isor dewa sewawae lạgitʼ jãhãn oṛakʼ hõ baṅ benao akan tahẽkana." 
1Kings3:3 Solomon do Probhu Isore dulạṛedekan tahẽkana, onate acʼren apattetʼ Dạudakʼ hukum lekageye senokʼkan tahẽkana; menkhan uni do than boṭkocʼkore janwarkoe dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupe jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings3:4 Mitʼdin raj do janwar samaṅko lạgitʼ Gibeonteye senlena, ente dãṛẽ samaṅko lạgitʼ onḍenakʼ than boṭkocʼge maraṅ utạrakʼ tahẽkana. Ar Solomon do onḍe mitʼ hajar janwarkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda." 
1Kings3:5 Gibeonre ńindạ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do kukmũ talate Solomon ṭhene sodorena. Isor do uniye metadea, “Iń ṭhen okam khoj ona reakʼ jotowakʼge amiń emama.”" 
1Kings3:6 Unre Solomone roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińren ạpuń amren guti do ḍher pạtiạrem udukʼ akadea, ente uni do amre pạtiạre tahẽkana ar dhorom ar soṛageye tahẽkana. Teheń siṅghạsonre duṛupʼ lạgitʼ am do mitʼṭen hoponem emakawadea ar nonkate amakʼ asambheṛ pạtiạrem udukʼae kana." 
1Kings3:7 “E ińren Probhu Isor, ińren ạpuń Dạudakʼ jaegare ńitokʼ do amren guti rajem hoyoco akadea. Menkhan ińakʼ umer do komgea, onate bạń baḍaea cetʼ lekate ińakʼ dạyikiń palona." 
1Kings3:8 Ar amren guti do nonḍe amem bachao akawan hoṛko talarege menaea. Ar onko do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jạtren kanako, one onko do ohoko lekha caba daṛelen." 
1Kings3:9 Onate amren hoṛko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhik ar okaṭakʼ do bhul kan ona baḍae lạgitʼ amren gutiyakʼ ontorre bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe emaeme; ente amren noko maraṅ jạtrenko ḍanṭaoko reakʼ daṛe do okoeyakʼ menakʼa?” 
1Kings3:10 Solomon noae khojketʼte Probhu Isor do ạḍiye kusiyena. 
1Kings3:11 Isor do uniye metadea, “Am do ḍher din bahaokʼ reakʼ, se am lạgitʼ dhon-durib, se amren bạirikoakʼ gujukʼ hõ bam khojlakʼa menkhan mońjte bicạr chinḍạu reakʼ bujgem khojakada," 
1Kings3:12 Onate am okaṭakʼem khojakatʼ onageń emama. Iń do amakʼ ontorre nonkan ạkil ar bud bicạr reakʼ daṛeń emama ńelme noa lahare nonka do celege bako tahẽkana ar tayomte hõ onka do ar bako hoyokʼa. 
1Kings3:13 Ona chaḍa am oka bam koeyakatʼ ona hõń emam kana. Iń do nonkan dhon-durib ar manotiń emama one am lahaten cele rajakʼge baṅ tahẽkan ar am tayom hõ baṅ tahentakoa.” 
1Kings3:14 Amren ạpum Dạud leka ińakʼ sanam niạm ar hukumkom manao idi ar ińakʼ hortem taṛam enḍekhan ḍher diniń bahao ocomea.” 
1Kings3:15 Inạ tayom Solomon doe ebhenena are bujhạukeda, uni doe kukmũkan tahẽkana. Tayomte Solomon do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena ar Probhu Isorakʼ goha tạmbu samaṅreye teṅgoyena ar ạḍi utạr janwarkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. Ar ona tayom do acʼren sanam kạmiyạko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda." 
1Kings3:16 Mitʼdin barea kusumbi maejiu do raj ṭhenkin hecʼena. 
1Kings3:17 Unkin modre mitʼ hoṛ doe menkeda, “E ińren mạlik, ạliń do mitʼ oṛakʼrege liń tahẽnkana. Ar onḍe liń tahẽkanre ińren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrạń janamkedea." 
1Kings3:18 Ińren gidrạwakʼ janam pe din tayom nui maejiuren hõ mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyentaea. Ona oṛakʼre do ar celege bako tahẽkana, eken ạliń bar hoṛge liń tahẽkana." 
1Kings3:19 Ńindạ jokhecʼ nui maejiu do acʼren gidrại ten gocʼkedetaea. 
1Kings3:20 Ar tala ńindạ amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do tinreń jạpitʼ akatʼ tahẽkana, unre uni do beretʼkate ińren gidrạ hataokate acʼakʼ hạmbutʼreye dohokedea ar acʼren gocʼicʼ gidrạ do ińakʼ hạmbutʼreye doho oṭokadea." 
1Kings3:21 Ado ạuri aṅga marsalokʼre ińren gidrạ do toa nunuwae lạgitʼ iń beretʼen khan gidrạ do gocʼgeń ńelkedea. Ar setakʼ marsalen khan mońjteń ńelkedea uni do ińren gidrạ doe baṅkana.” 
1Kings3:22 Unre eṭakʼ maejiu doe menkeda, “Baṅ, baṅ, jiwetʼ gidrạ doe ińren kana ar gocʼicʼ do uniren.” Menkhan pạhilicʼ maejiu do ạḍi murukteye menkeda, “Baṅa, gocʼicʼ doe amren kana ar jiwetʼicʼ doe ińren kana. Nonkate unkin do raj samaṅrege jhogṛakʼ kin ehopʼena." 
1Kings3:23 Raje metatʼkinạ, “Nuiye meneda, ‘ińren gidrạ doe jiwetʼgea.’ Ar hạni hõe meneda, ‘baṅa, amren gidrạ doe gocʼgea ar ińren doe jiwetʼicʼ kana.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Unre raje menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛe ạguwạńpe.” Ar raj do mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛeko ạguadea." 
1Kings3:25 Uni doe hukumkeda, “Jiwetʼicʼ gidrạ do talate paṛagepe ar nukin hạṭiń ạkinpe.”" 
1Kings3:26 Ado okoeren gidrạ jiwetʼgeye tahẽkan uni do gidrạ lạgitʼ mon khad badaoentaete raje metadea, “E ińren mạlik, nehõram kạnạń, gidrạ do alogem gojea; unige emaeme baṛe.” Menkhan eṭakʼ maejiu doe menkeda, “Uni do ińren hõ baṅ ar amren hõ aloe hoyokʼma. Uni do talate paṛage hoyokʼa.”" 
1Kings3:27 Unre raj doe hukumkeda, “Jiwetʼicʼ gidrạ do pạhilicʼ maejiu emaepe. Ar alope paṛagea; ente uni kangeae uniren eṅgattetʼ do. ”" 
1Kings3:28 Rajakʼ bicạr ańjomkate Israelren sanamkoakʼ monre raj cetanre botor caṛhaoena, ente onkoko ńelkeda, bicạr chinḍạu lạgitʼ Isor do monre ạkile emakawadea." 
1Kings4:1 Solomon raj do goṭa Israelko cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
1Kings4:2 Uniren maraṅ kạmiyạko doko hoyokʼkana: Sadokren hopon Asriạ nui do rajren sosolhayicʼ naekeye tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:3 Sisraren banar hopon Elihoreph ar Ahiạ do rajren olokʼ hoṛ kin tahẽkana; Ahiludren hopon Jehosaphat do Itihãs olokʼicʼe tahẽkana; 
1Kings4:4 Jehuyadaren hopon Banae do maraṅ senaputiye tahẽkana; Sadok ar Abiạthar do naeke kin tahẽkana; 
1Kings4:5 Nathanren hopon Asriạ do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ raj karbariạko cetanreye tahẽkana; Nathanren hopon Sabud do rajren gate ar sosolhayicʼe tahẽkana; 
1Kings4:6 Ahisar cetanre do raj doṅgol ńel todarot reakʼ bhar tahẽkana; Abdaren hopon Adoniram do kạmiyạ hoṛko cetanren sordare tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:7 Solomon do sanam Israelko cetanre gelbar goṭen cakʼlaokoe bahalketʼkoa. Onko do raj ar raj gharońjrenko lạgitʼ jomakʼko juṛạuetʼ tahẽkana. Onko mimitʼko do bochorre mitʼ candokate jomakʼko jogaṛ akokan tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:8 Onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana: Ephrayim buru ṭoṭharen Ben-Hur. 
1Kings4:9 Makas, Salbim, Bet-Semes ar Elon-Beth-Hanonren Bin-Deker." 
1Kings4:10 Arubothre, Sekhore ar Hepher reakʼ sanam ṭoṭhare do Bin-Hesed cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Kings4:11 Naphat-Dorrer reakʼ sanam ṭoṭhare do Bin-Abinadab. Uni do Solomonren hoponera Taphate baplaledea. 
1Kings4:12 Tanakre, Megidore ar Sorethan ṭhen ar Jesreyel dạkhin reakʼ Bet-San nagraha khon Abel Mehola ar Jokmea hạbicʼ Bet-San reakʼ sanam ṭoṭhare do Ahiludren hopon Bana cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Kings4:13 Ramot Geliadre do Bin-Geber. Uni do Geliad Manasiren hopon Jayir reakʼ sanam ato ar Bason reakʼ Argab ṭoṭharen cakʼlaoicʼe tahẽkana. Argab ṭoṭha do pạcrite esetʼ ṭoṭha tahẽkana ar Rupạ reakʼ hurkạṛakʼ duạr sudhạ maraṅ maraṅ turuigel goṭecʼ atokoge. 
1Kings4:14 Mohaniyamre do Ediren hopon Ahinadab. 
1Kings4:15 Naptalire do Ahimas. Uni do Solomonren hoponera Basomate baplaledea. 
1Kings4:16 Aser ar Bealotre do Hasae hopon Banae. 
1Kings4:17 Isakarre do Parua hopon Jehosaphat. 
1Kings4:18 Benjạminre do Elaren hopon Simiyi. 
1Kings4:19 Geliadre, metakʼme Emorikoren Sihon raj ar Basonren raj Ogakʼ disạmre do Uri hopon Geber. Niạ ṭoṭhare do unige acʼ eskar cakʼlaoyicʼe tahẽkana." 
1Kings4:20 Jihudạ ar Israelkoakʼ lekha do jalapuri aṛe reakʼ gitil leka tahẽkana. Ar ạḍi sukre tahẽkate onko do dinko khemaoetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:21 Phurạt gaḍa khon ehopʼkate Misor ar Philisṭikoakʼ disạm reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ sanam rajosṭiko do Solomonakʼ gobolrege tahẽkana. Solomon tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ dinge niạko disạmren hoṛko do bhejako emaekan tahẽkana ar uni gobolreko tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:22 Solomon lạgitʼ dinạm hilokʼ okako jomakʼ jạruṛokʼkan tahẽkan ona do nonka leka: mõṛẽ ṭon tala holoṅ, gelmitʼ ṭon suji," 
1Kings4:23 gel goṭen posao ḍaṅgra, ạtiń ṭạnḍiren bargel ḍaṅgra ar mitʼsae bhiḍiko; ona chaḍa jhaṅkar jel, selepʼ jel, ṭiklạkʼ jel, lodgopʼ lodgopʼ sim-geḍeko." 
1Kings4:24 Solomon do Phurạt gaḍa pạchim secʼ reakʼ sanam rajosṭiko, metatʼme Tipsa khon Gasa hạbicʼe rajokʼkan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam jaegakore do suluk tahẽkana." 
1Kings4:25 Solomonakʼ jionre Jihudạ ar Israel, metakʼme, Dan khon Berseba hạbicʼ sanamkoge apan ạpin darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa dareko tahẽkana ar onko do khạtirjomako girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Kings4:26 Solomonakʼ rãt gạḍi lạgitʼ do pongel hajar oṛakʼ ar gelbar hajar aswariko tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:27 Disạm cakʼlaoko do akoakʼ pạli reakʼ candore Solomon raj ar uniyakʼ ṭebilre okoeko jometʼkan tahẽkan onko sanamko lạgitʼ jomakʼko jogaṛetʼ tahẽkana. Arko ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana jemon okaṭakʼ reakʼ hõ uniyakʼ ṭonṭa alo hoyokʼtae. 
1Kings4:28 Rãt gạḍiren sadomko ar eṭakʼ sadomko lạgitʼ onkoren mitʼke mitʼ kạmi reakʼ bhar lekate onko do Jao ar busupʼko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:29 Isor do jalapuri aṛe reakʼ gitil leka asambheṛ bud ạkil ar bicạr chinḍạu ar bujhạu reakʼ daṛe Solomone danadea. 
1Kings4:30 Purub disạm ar Misorren sanam ạkilan hoṛko khon Solomonakʼ ạkil do ḍherge tahẽkana. 
1Kings4:31 Sanam hoṛko khon, se Esraeren Ethon ar Mahalelren hopon Hemen, Kolkol ar Dorda khon hõ ḍher ạkilane tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ ńutum do aḍepase sanam jạtrenko talare pasnao idiyentaea." 
1Kings4:32 Uni do pe hajar kạhtukkoe ol akada ar mitʼ hajar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ sereńe joṛao akada. 
1Kings4:33 Uni do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare khon ehopʼkate bhitre janamokʼ ghãs hạbicʼ sanam dare reakʼe biborone lại akada. Uni do janwarko, cẽṛẽko, leńokʼ ṭunḍaṅkan jiwiyanko ar hakoko reaṅe lại akada." 
1Kings4:34 Dhạrtiren okoeko raj do Solomonakʼ ạkil reaṅko ańjomakatʼ tahẽkan onko do uniyakʼ ạkil reakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ akoren hoṛko koletʼko tahẽkana. Ar nonkate sanam jạtren hoṛ do uni ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings5:1 Turren raj Hiram do tinreye ańjomkeda, Solomon do acʼ apatakʼ jaegare raj hudạreye ojokʼ bahal ocoakana unre uni do Solomon ṭhen acʼren hoṛkoe kolkatʼkoa, ente Dạud tulucʼ uni do gate peṛa leka jopoṛao tahẽkantaea." 
1Kings5:2 Solomon do Hiram ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada," 
1Kings5:3 “Baḍaegeam ińren ạpuń Dạud do beṛhaeten bạiriko tulucʼe lạṛhạikan tahẽkana, ar Probhu Isor do uniren bạiriko ạuriye jaṅga latarko hạbicʼ uni do acʼren Probhu Isor ńutumte jãhãn dewa sewa oṛakʼ bae benao akatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings5:4 Menkhan ńitokʼ ińren Probhu Isor do joto secʼ khon sulukteye dohoakadińạ. Ar ńitokʼ do cele bạirige bạnukʼkotińa ar jãhãn ghoṭna hõ baṅ hoyakana. 
1Kings5:5 Ona iạte iń do ińren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ mundil iń benaoa. Probhu Isor do ińren ạpuńe metade tahẽkana, ‘amren okoeṭakʼ hopon do amakʼ siṅghạsonreń duṛube unige iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ mundile benaoa.’" 
1Kings5:6 “Onate hukum emokʼme iń lạgitʼ Lebanon disạm khon debdạru dareko jemon makʼ ạgukʼ. Ińren hoṛ hõ amren hoṛko sãoteko tahena ar am cetʼleka mujurim ṭhik dohoako onkage iń do amren hoṛkoń emakoa. Entem baḍaegea Sidonrenko do dare makʼ ar gegetʼreko gạkhuṛgea.” 
1Kings5:7 Hiram do Solomon ṭhen khon niạ katha ańjomkate ạḍi kusiyenteye menkeda, “Teheń do Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtaema, ente noko maraṅ jạtrenko cetanre rajokʼ lạgitʼ Dạud do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ ạkilan hopone dan akawadea.”" 
1Kings5:8 Hiram do Solomon noa khobore kol ruạṛadea, “Amem kol akatʼ khobor doń ńamakada. Debdạru ar saro kaṭ reaṅ do amakʼ joto monsubạgeń purạutama." 
1Kings5:9 Ińren hoṛko do Lebanon khon jalapurite onako pheḍ ạguya. Ar ona tayom do onakote bhora benaokate jalapuri cetante amakʼ nirik akatʼ ṭhạ̃iteko idi seṭergotʼama. Onko do onḍeko raṛa pheḍa ar am do onakom idijoṅa. Ar ińakʼ khojogokʼakʼ do noage ińren kạmiyạko jemon jomakʼem bebostawako. 
1Kings5:10 Nonkate Hiram do Solomon jạṛuṛae bhor debdạru kaṭ ar saro kaṭkoe emadea," 
1Kings5:11 Ar Solomon hõ Hiram ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼren hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ pe hajar turui sae ṭon guhum ar pon hajar irạl sae liṭar jạitun reakʼ sunume emadea. Nonkage Solomon do bochorke bochor onae emadea. 
1Kings5:12 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ leka Solomon ạkile emadea. Solomon ar Hiram talare do suluk tahẽkana ar unkin do mitʼṭecʼ bondoboskin bandhaoana. 
1Kings5:13 Solomon raj do goṭa Israel khon pegel hajar hoṛ kạmireye jormoṭketʼkoa. 
1Kings5:14 Ar jao cando uni do pạli pạlite onko mod khon gel hajar hoṛ Lebanonteye koletʼko tahẽkana. Onko do Lebanonre mitʼ cando ar akoakʼ oṛakʼre bar candokateko tahẽnkan tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ noako kạmi ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do Adoniram cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Kings5:15 Solomon tabere do eaegel hajar gokʼ bhạriạkoko tahẽkana ar buru khon dhiri la ạgui lạgitʼ do irạlgel hajar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Kings5:16 Ar onkoakʼ kạmiko ńel todarot lạgitʼ do pe hajar pe sae kạmiyạkoko tahẽkana. 
1Kings5:17 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ gathao lạgitʼ onko do rajakʼ hukumte ghaḍlakʼ khon maraṅ maraṅ damanakʼ dhiriko la ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings5:18 Solomon ar Hiramren mistriko ar Gibearenko do ona dhiriko getʼkate mundil oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ kaṭ ar dhiriko sapṛaoetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:1 Misor disạm khon Israelkoko oḍok hecʼen tayom ponsae irạl gelakʼ bochorre Israelko cetanre Solomonakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochor reakʼ Sib candore, metakʼme dosar candore Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benaoe ehopʼena." 
1Kings6:2 Solomon raj do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ oka oṛakʼe benaoletʼ ona do jeleńte turuigel moka, osarte bargel moka ar usulte pegel moka tahẽkana." 
1Kings6:3 Mundil reakʼ asolakʼ kandha samaṅre okaṭakʼ pinḍạ tahẽkan ona do oṛakʼ reakʼ jokha lekate bargel moka osar ar oṛakʼ samaṅ secʼ khon ona reakʼ jeleńtetʼ do gel moka tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:4 Oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitko lạgitʼ do uricʼ batakoanakʼ khiṛkiye benaoada. 
1Kings6:5 Ar asolakʼ kandha ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ pe aṛe bhit jalatʼte pe mahla mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaokeda. Ar onare ạḍi utạr khuṛpikoe dohokeda. 
1Kings6:6 Latar mahla reakʼ kandhako do mõṛẽ moka osar, ar dosar mahla reakʼ kandhako do turui moka osar ar tesar mahla reakʼ kandhako do eae moka kate osar tahẽkana, ente mundil oṛakʼ bhit reakʼ bahre secʼ doe khap akawatʼ tahẽkana. Onate ona pe mahla oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ mundil reakʼ bhitre jãhãn saṅghako lagao do jạṛuṛ baṅ hoylena." 
1Kings6:7 Khạdre okako dhiri lakʼ rokʼkate benao hoylen eken onage ạgukate mundil oṛakʼ benaoreko beoharkeda. Ar mundil oṛakʼ tinreko bekʼnaokan tahẽkana unre onḍe do jãhãn kuṭạsi, se ṭeṅgocʼ se jãhãn mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ saḍege baṅ ańjomlena." 
1Kings6:8 Latar mahlate bolokʼ reakʼ duạr do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ dạkhin secʼre tahẽkana; ar onḍe khon mitʼṭecʼ siṛhi do bar mahla ar ona tayom do pe mahla hạbicʼ rakapʼ akana. 
1Kings6:9 Nonkate uni do mundil oṛakʼe benaokeda ar sạt hõe sạtkeda. Uni do saṅgha ar debdạru reakʼ kaṭte ona reakʼ chat hõe dapʼkeda. 
1Kings6:10 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ pe aṛege uni do thoṛa kandhakoe benao ocokeda. Ona kandhako reakʼ usultetʼ do mõṛẽ moka tahẽkana ar debdạru kaṭ reakʼ saṅghate chate benao ocokeda. Ona saṅgha reakʼ mitʼ secʼ do mundil oṛakʼ bhit reakʼ khap cetanre dohoyena. 
1Kings6:11 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Solomon ṭhen niạge roṛlena," 
1Kings6:12 “Ińakʼ katha lekam senokʼ, ar ińakʼ niạmkom pańjae ar ińakʼ sanam hukumko taberem tahen enḍekhan okaṭakʼ mundilem benaoetʼkan ona reaṅ amren ạpum ṭhen okań gokʼletʼ ona do am hoteteń purạua." 
1Kings6:13 Ar Israelko talareń girobasokʼa ar ińren hoṛ Israelko do bạń bạgi giḍikoa.” 
1Kings6:14 Solomon do nonkate mundil oṛakʼe benao sạtkeda. 
1Kings6:15 Ot khon chat hạbicʼ uni do debdạru kaṭ reakʼ toktate pạcri reakʼ bhitri secʼe esetʼkeda ar ot do saro kaṭ reakʼ toktateye esetʼkeda. 
1Kings6:16 Mundil oṛakʼre sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhitri kandha benao lạgitʼ uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ tayom secʼre bargel moka jaega do ot khon chad hạbicʼ debdạru kaṭteye begarkeda. 
1Kings6:17 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i samaṅ reakʼ asolakʼ maraṅ kandha do pongel moka jeleń tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:18 Mundil oṛakʼ tala reakʼ debdạru kaṭ cetanre do nạ̃ṛĩ dare reakʼ jo ar saṛ baha reakʼ muṭhạnkoe rokʼ ocoakatʼ tahẽkana. Onako jotowakʼge debdạru kaṭ reakʼ tahẽkana, menkhan jãhãn dhiri do baṅ ńel ńamlena." 
1Kings6:19 Mundil oṛakʼ talare Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk dohoy lạgitʼ Solomon do nonkan sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃iye benaokeda. 
1Kings6:20 Ona ṭhạ̃i do bargel moka jeleń, bargel moka osar ar bargel moka usul tahẽkana. Uni do khạṭi sonate ona reakʼ bhitri secʼe tol ocokeda ar pinḍ hõ debdạru kaṭteye esetʼkeda." 
1Kings6:21 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ asolakʼ kandha reakʼ bhit hõ uni do sonateye esetʼ ocokeda ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i samaṅre sona reakʼ sikṛiye lagaoada. Ona sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ bhit hõ sonateye esetʼkeda. 
1Kings6:22 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri secʼ uni do goṭage sonateye tolkeda, Ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ pinḍ hõ sonateye tolkeda." 
1Kings6:23 Ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire uni do jạitun kaṭren mitʼ joṛ Kerube benaoketʼkinạ. Unkin Kerubkinakʼ goṛhon ar muṭhạn do mitʼge tahẽkana. Ar unkin Kerub do gel moka kate usulkin tahẽkana. Kerubkinakʼ banar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do mõṛẽ moka kate jeleń tahẽkan tạkina. Mitʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ khon dosar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ do gel moka tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:24  
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26  
1Kings6:27 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire uni do Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do laplapageye dohokatʼ tạkina. Mitʼṭecʼ Kerubakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do mitʼṭecʼ bhitre ar eṭagicʼ Kerubakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do eṭakʼ bhite joṭetʼ tiyokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana ar oṛakʼ talare unkinakʼ eṭakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼkin do apan ạpin phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ agaltetʼkin jopokʼ tiyokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:28 Ar Kerubkin banarge sonateye tol esetʼkatʼkinạ. 
1Kings6:29 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ barea kandha reakʼ goṭa bhitge Kerub, khijur dare ar saṛ bahako reakʼ muṭhạnkoe rokʼ ocoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings6:30 Ar banar kandha reakʼ ot hõ sonateye tol ocokeda. 
1Kings6:31 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ silpiń do jạitun kaṭteye benao ocokeda. Ar ona duạr reakʼ cetan ganaḍe ar dene banar cạukạṭ do mõṛẽ poholanakʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:32 Banar kapaṭre uni do Kerub, khijur dare ar saṛ bahako reakʼ muṭhạnkoe goṛhonada ar sonateye tol ocokeda ar unkin Kerubkin ar khijur darekore hõ sonageye kuṭạm bạisạuada." 
1Kings6:33 Asolakʼ kandha reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ do jạitun reakʼ kaṭte mitʼṭecʼ pon kona cạukaṭgeye benaoada ar saro kaṭte do barea silpińe benao ocokeda. Ar kobja lagao akatʼ barea toktate mimitʼ kapaṭko do benao hoyena. Onate kapaṭ do lạṭumokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings6:34  
1Kings6:35 Ona kapaṭko cetanre uni do Kerubko, khijur dare ar saṛ baha reakʼ muṭhạn rokʼkate sona reakʼ pate bạisạuada." 
1Kings6:36 Ar napaete la-getʼakatʼ pe sạr reakʼ dhiri ar debdạru dare reakʼ mitʼ sạr reakʼ moṭa kaṭte do bhitri raca reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ bhitkoe benaokeda. 
1Kings6:37 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do Ponakʼ bochor reakʼ Sib candore rehetʼ bạisạulena. 
1Kings6:38 Goṭawakʼ lekate mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi do gelmitʼ bochor reakʼ Bul cando, metakʼme irạlakʼ candore sạt utạrena. Solomon do niạ mundil benao sạtte eae bochor lagaoade tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon do raj doṅgol benao sạtte gelpe bochor lagaoade tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:2 Uni do raj doṅgolre Lebanon bir oṛakʼ ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaokeda. Niạ oṛakʼ do mitʼsae moka jeleń, mõṛẽgel moka osar ar pegel moka usul tahẽkana. Debdạru kaṭ reakʼ pon sạr khunṭiko cetanre debdạru kaṭ reakʼ saṅghako bạisạu tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:3 Khunṭi cetanre bạisạu akatʼ saṅghako cetanre do debdạru kaṭteko dapʼkeda; ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ sạrre gelmõṛẽ goṭecʼkate pongel mõṛẽ goṭecʼ saṅgha tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:4 Oṛakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ bhit samna sạmni do pe sạrte jalna dohoyena. 
1Kings7:5 Duạr reakʼ cạukaṭko do pon kona tahẽkana; ar jalnako hõ pe sạrte samna sạmni benao tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:6 Ona tayom uni do kham khunṭi ńutumanakʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benao ocokeda. Ona do jeleńte mõṛẽgel moka ar osarte do pegel moka. Ar ona samaṅre do mitʼṭecʼ sateanakʼ pinḍại doho ocokeda, ar ona sate do khunṭiko cetanre bạisạu tahẽkana. Ona khunṭiko samaṅre sate latarre mitʼṭecʼ saṅgha hõ tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:7 Bikʼcạr oṛakʼ ńutumte uni do mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaokeda; onḍe do uniyakʼ siṅghạson tahẽkana. Noa oṛakʼ do bikʼcạr lạgitʼ benao hoyena. Oṛakʼ reakʼ bhit do latar khon cetan hạbicʼ debdạru kaṭteye esetʼkeda. 
1Kings7:8 Ar acʼakʼ tahen oṛakʼ do bikʼcạr oṛakʼ tayomre inạ mitʼ lekageye benao ocokeda. Pharaoren okoeṭakʼ hoponerae baplalede uni lạgitʼ hõ inạ lekage ar mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benao ocokeda. 
1Kings7:9 Raj dolan reakʼ maraṅ bakher raca ar sanam dolanko reakʼ rehetʼ khon chat hạbicʼ jotoge ṭhik jokhate getʼakʼ damanakʼ dhirite benaolena. Ona dhiriko do ạrikote somante getʼakʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:10 Dolanko reakʼ rehetʼ do maraṅ maraṅ damanakʼ dhirite gathao tahẽkana. Onako reakʼ adomakʼ do gel moka arhõ adom adomakʼ do irạl moka tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:11 Rehetʼ dhiriko cetanre do ṭhik jokhate getʼakʼ damanakʼ dhiriko ar debdạru kaṭ tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:12 Pinḍạ sudhạ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bhitri reakʼ bakher raca lekage raj doṅgol reakʼ maraṅ bakher raca beṛhaeteakʼ bhitko hõ napaete getʼ akatʼ pe sạr dhiri ar debdạru dare reakʼ mitʼ sạr dạriạ kaṭte benao akan tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:13 Solomon raj do Turte hoṛ kolkate Hirame hoho ạgu ocokedea. 
1Kings7:14 Uniren eṅgattetʼ do mitʼṭecʼ rạnḍi maejiu ar Naphtali gusṭiren hoponerae tahẽkana. Uniren apattetʼ do Turren hoṛe tahẽkana. Ar Hiram do pitạl kạrigole tahẽkana. Hiram do pitạl reakʼ sanam lekan kạmikoe baḍaekan tahẽkana ar ona kạmire uni do ạḍi gạkhuṛ kạrigole tahẽkana. Uni do Solomon raj ṭhene hecʼena ar okako kạmiye emocoyen onakoe kạmikeda. 
1Kings7:15 Hiram do pitạl reakʼ barea khunṭiye benaokeda. Ona mimitʼ goṭecʼ reakʼ jeleń do gel irạl moka ar beṛhaeteakʼ beṛ do bargel moka tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:16 Ar ona khunṭikin cetanre emakʼ lạgitʼ uni do pitạl reakʼ barea chatnakine dul benaokeda. Chatnakin reakʼ usul do mõṛẽ moka kate tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:17 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ khunṭi chatnare lạgitʼ uni do pitạl reakʼ goṛhon akatʼ eae goṭecʼ sikṛi ar bar sạr pitạl reakʼ ḍạlim jo muṭhạne benaokeda. 
1Kings7:18  
1Kings7:19 Khunṭi reakʼ muthnikin cetanre pon moka do sikiyạm baha reakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:20 Ar muthnikin reakʼ latar secʼ do gulạnḍge tahẽkana. Ona gulạnḍ beṛhaete do sikṛiko lagao tahẽkana. Mimitʼ muthni reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ sikṛi sãote sạr sạrte pitạl reakʼ bar sae dạlim joko hõ bạisạu tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:21 Hirạm do ona banar pitạl reakʼ khunṭi do mundil reakʼ pinḍạreye bạisạukeda. Dạkhin secʼ okaṭakʼe bạisạuketʼ ona reakʼ ńutum do Jạkine dohokeda (metakʼme, “Okoeye bạisạuketʼ ”) ar Utạr secʼre okae dohoketʼ ona reakʼ ńutum do Boase dohokeda (metakʼme “Onarege daṛetetʼ do”)." 
1Kings7:22 Sikiyạm baha leka goṛhon pitạl reakʼ muthnikin do ona khunṭikin cetanrege bạisạu tahẽkana. Ar nonkate ona khunṭi benao reakʼ kạmi do sạtena. 
1Kings7:23 Ona tayom Hirạm do pitạl reakʼ chãńcreye dulketʼte dakʼ dohoy lạgitʼ maraṅ okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ gulạnḍge karaheye benao ocokeda, ona karahe reakʼ kaṅkha khon kaṅkha hạbicʼ jokha do gel moka tahẽkana, khạndri do mõṛẽ moka, ar kaṅkha beṛhaeteakʼ jokha do pegel moka tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:24 Karahe reakʼ kaṅkha latarre do mimitʼ mokare gel goṭecʼkate bar sạrte pitạl nạ̃ṛĩ dareko reakʼ jo tahẽkana. Okaṭakʼ chańcre karahe benao hoylen ona chańcrege jo reakʼ nạmunako tahẽkante joto do mitʼṭecʼ jinisge hoyena. 
1Kings7:25 Ona karahe do gelbar goṭecʼ pitạlren ḍaṅgrako cetanre doṛom akan tahẽkana; onko modre pea do utạr secʼ, pea do pạchim secʼ, pea do dạkhin secʼ, pea do purub secʼko samaṅ akatʼ tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ ṭiki do bhitri secʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:26 Ona karahe do pon kạṭupʼ dạriạ tahẽkana. Ar ona reakʼ kaṅkha do bạṭi reakʼ kaṅkha, sikiyạm baha muṭhạn leka tahẽkana. Onare do pongel pon hajar liṭar dakʼ sahobokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:27 Hiram do Pitạl reakʼ gel goṭecʼ gaṛsãoḍi lekan jiniskoe benaokeda. Ona mimitʼ goṭecʼ reakʼ jokha do pon moka jeleń, pon moka osar ar pe moka usul tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:28 Gaṛsãoḍi beṛhaeteakʼ pitạl reakʼ pat do pheremre bạisạu tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:29 Ar ona pat cetanre do dhạcri kul, daṅgra ar Kerubakʼ muṭhạnko tahẽkana ar dhạcri kul ar daṅgra latarre do baha leka noksa akawatʼ tahẽkana. Gaṛsãoḍi reakʼ cetan pherem sãote bạisạu akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ gamla dohoy lạgitʼ binḍi tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:30 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ gaṛsãoḍi do pitạl reakʼ kuṭhạ sudhạ pitạl reakʼ ponea caka tahẽkana. Ar gamla doṛomokʼ lạgitʼ pon konare pitạl reakʼ ponea ṭibhi tahẽkana. Ona hõ bahako lekage noksa akawatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:31 Gamla dohoy reakʼ binḍire do mitʼṭecʼ gulạnḍge phaelao jaega tahẽkana. Ona phaelao jaega reakʼ jokha do hoyokʼkana mitʼ moka tala. Ona phaelao jaega do beṛhaete rokʼ akatʼ goṛhonakʼ tahẽkana. Ar gamla do ona phaelao jaegareko bạisạuketʼ khan binḍi khon gamla reakʼ usul do mitʼ moka hoyena. Gaṛsãoḍi reakʼ patko do gulạnḍ baṅ, menkhan ponkona tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:32 Patko latarre do ponea caka tahẽkana ar caka reakʼ kuṭhạko do gaṛsãoḍi sãote joṛạo mitʼakan tahẽkana. Ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ caka do mitʼ moka tala kate usul tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:33 Cakako do rãt gạḍi reakʼ caka lekage tahẽkana; kuṭhạ, caka reakʼ beṛ, sik ar tala reakʼ bukạtetʼ jotoge dulakʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:34 Mimitʼ gaṛsãoḍi reakʼ pon konare ponea ganḍo tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:35 Gaṛsãoḍi cetanre pitạlte benaoakʼ tala moka mitʼṭecʼ gulạnḍge jinis tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:36 Ona gulạnḍakʼ jinis reakʼ bahre secʼ do hạṭiń, hạṭiń Kerub, dhạcri kul ar khijur dareko reakʼ muṭhạnko rokʼ goṛhon akatʼ tahẽkana. Mimitʼ hạṭiń reakʼ phakre do ṭibhi khunṭiko tahẽkana, ar ona ṭibhiko cetanre do baha leka noksako benao tahẽkana. Ona gulạnḍakʼ jinis do gaṛsãoḍi sãotege benao hoylena." 
1Kings7:37 Nonkate uni do gel goṭecʼ gaṛsãoḍiye benaokeda. Onako do mitʼ chãcrege dul hoylena ar ona reakʼ jokha ar muṭhạn do mitʼ lekage tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:38 Uni do mimitʼ gaṛsãoḍiko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ kate pitạl reakʼ gel goṭecʼ gamlae benao ocokeda. Mimitʼ gamla reakʼ beṛ do pon moka osar tahẽkana ar onare irạl sae irạl gel liṭar dakʼ sahobokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings7:39 Uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ dạkhin secʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ar utạr secʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ gaṛsãoḍiye dohokeda; ar dạkhin purub konare do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ gamlae dohokeda. 
1Kings7:40 Ona chaḍa uni do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bhajanko, bạṭiko ar kạ̃ṛchuko hõe benaokeda. Nonkate Hiram do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ Solomon raj hotete okako kạmiye ehopʼletʼ onae sạtkeda. Onako do hoyokʼkana:" 
1Kings7:41 Barea kham khunṭi, ar onakin cetan reakʼ gulạnḍge barea muthni, ar ona muthni cetanre sajaokʼ lạgitʼ banar sạr noksa akatʼ uńakʼ sikṛiko;" 
1Kings7:42 Ona sikṛiko lạgitʼ pon sae dạlim jo ar tham khunṭi muthni reakʼ chatna sajao lạgitʼ mimitʼ sạr sikṛi lạgitʼ bar sạr ḍạlim jo; 
1Kings7:43 gel goṭecʼ gaṛsãoḍi ar gel goṭecʼ gamla; 
1Kings7:44 maraṅ okocʼ karahe ar ona latarren gelbar goṭen ḍaṅgrako; 
1Kings7:45 torocʼ karaheko, kạ̃ṛchuko ar bạṭiko. Hirạm do Solomon rajakʼ hukumte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ okako jiniskoe benaoletʼ ona do jhak jhak pitạl reakʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire Sukot ar Sorethan tala reakʼ mitʼ jaegare raj do noako jinis ot reakʼ chãcreye dul benao ocoleda. 
1Kings7:47 Jinisko lekhate nunạkʼ ḍher tahẽkana, Solomon do onako bae soṅ ocoleda; onate pitạl reakʼ ojon do baṅ baḍaelena." 
1Kings7:48 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ okako jinis Solomon raje benao ocoletʼ ona do hoyokʼkana: Sona reakʼ pinḍ, samaṅakʼ piṭhạ dohowakʼ sona reakʼ ṭebil;" 
1Kings7:49 khạṭi sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar onako do sonot utạrakʼ jaegare tahẽkana, jojomsa aṛere mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ar leṅgasa aṛere mõṛẽ goṭecʼ; sona reakʼ baha, diuhe ar cimtạ;" 
1Kings7:50 khạṭi sona reakʼ bạṭiko, sultạ saphae reakʼ cimṭạko, bạṭiko, kạ̃ṛchuko ar seṅgel aṅgra dohoy reakʼ celaṅko ar bhitri kandha reakʼ, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ duạr lạgitʼ ar mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ maraṅ kandha reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ sona reakʼ kobjako." 
1Kings7:51 Nonkate solomon raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼe kạmi sạtkeda. Ona tayom uni do acʼren apat Dạud okako jinis Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar doholetʼ onakoe ạgukeda. Onako modre do sona, rupạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bhajanko tahẽkana. Ar uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ khajańci kandhare onakoe dohokeda." 
1Kings8:1 Inạ tayom Solomon raj do Dạud nagraha, metakʼme Sion khon Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk ạgui lạgitʼ Israelren murubbiko, gusṭiren mathako ar Israelren mukhiyạko Jerusalemre acʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa." 
1Kings8:2 Onate Ethanim candore, metakʼme eaeakʼ candore porobokʼ jokhecʼ Israelren onko sanam hoṛ do Solomon raj ṭhenko hecʼena." 
1Kings8:3 Ado Israelren sanam murubbikoko jarwayen khan naekeko do sindukko gokʼkeda. 
1Kings8:4 Onko ar naekeko do Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk, ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar sanam sonotakʼ bhajanko gokʼ idikeda." 
1Kings8:5 Solomon raj ar uni ṭhenko jarwa akan sanam Israelko do sinduk samaṅre nunạkʼ bheḍa ar ḍaṅgrako samaṅketʼkoa, onko do lekha hõ bako lekha daṛeatʼkoa." 
1Kings8:6 Ona tayom naekeko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk niṭ akatʼ ṭhạ̃ire, mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri kandhare, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarreko dohokada." 
1Kings8:7 Onate Kerubkinakʼ lap lapa akan phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte sinduk ar ona gogokʼakʼ ḍaṅkin hõ dapal tahẽyena. 
1Kings8:8 Ar ḍaṅkin do nonka jeleń tahẽkana je, onakin reakʼ mitʼ mucạtʼtetʼ do bhitri kandha reakʼ samaṅ secʼakʼ maraṅ kandha, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon ńel ńamokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i bahre khon do baṅ ńel ńamokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar teheń hạbicʼ ona do onḍege menakʼa." 
1Kings8:9 Israelko Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼen tayom Horeb burure Probhu Isor do onko lạgitʼ tinre bondobose bandhaokeda unre Mose okakin dhiri cạkti sindukreye doholetʼ ona chaḍa ar cetʼge onare do ar baṅ tahẽkana. 
1Kings8:10 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon naekekoko oḍok hecʼen sãote Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bhitri do rimilte perecʼena. 
1Kings8:11 Ar ona rimil iạte naekeko do sewa kạmi bako kạmi daṛeada, ente Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte oṛakʼ do perecʼ akan tahẽkana." 
1Kings8:12 Unre Solomone menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, amem menleda khạndri rimilrem tahena." 
1Kings8:13 Ńitokʼ do am lạgitʼ napae okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ iń benao akada; ar noa do jaejug lạgitʼ amakʼ tahen oṛakʼge hoyokʼa.” 
1Kings8:14 Ar noa menkate raj do jarwa akan sanam Israelko secʼe ạcurente onkoe bhoratʼkoa. Unre hoṛko doko teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
1Kings8:15 Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtaema. Uni do ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen acʼakʼ mocate okae gokʼletʼ ona do acʼ apnartetʼgeye purunkeda. Uni doe menleda," 
1Kings8:16 ‘ińren hoṛko Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguletʼko tayom Israelkoakʼ jãhãn nagraha do bạń bachaoana one onḍe apnar sodorokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tahen oṛakʼ benaokʼ. Menkhan ińren Israelko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ do Dạudgeń bachaoan tahẽkana.’ 
1Kings8:17 “Israelren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ monsubạ do ińren ạpuń Dạudakʼ ontorre tahẽkangea. 
1Kings8:18 Menkhan Probhu Isor do ińren ạpuń Dạude metade tahẽkana, ‘iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ monsubạ amakʼ ontorre menakʼtam ona do bhagegea." 
1Kings8:19 Tobe oṛakʼ do alom benaoa, ona do amren hopongeye benaoa, okoe doe amren hoponkange. Unige iń lạgitʼ oṛakʼe benaoa.’" 
1Kings8:20 ‘Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼe purạu akada. Ińren ạpuń oka hudạreye tahẽkan iń do ona hudạgeń ńam akada. Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate iń do Israelkoakʼ siṅghạsonreń duṛupʼ akana ar Israelren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ niạ oṛakʼ iń benao akada. 
1Kings8:21 Ar onḍe ona goha tạmbu dohoy reakʼ thạ̃iyiń ṭhik dohoakada one onare Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ bondobos menakʼ, okaṭakʼ do Misor disạm khon aboren hapṛamkoe oḍok ạguketʼko tayom onko lạgitʼe bandhao akatʼ tahẽkan.”" 
1Kings8:22 Ona tayom Solomon do onḍe jarwa akan Israelko samaṅre Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ ṭhen teṅgokate serma secʼ tiye tiyạrketʼtaea. 
1Kings8:23 Uni doe menkeda, “E Probhu Israelkoren Isor, coṭ sermare se latar otre am lekan cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa. Amren gutiko okoe do mon ar ontorte amakʼ horteko calakʼkan onko do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛem udukʼako kana ar bondobosem bandhao akada." 
1Kings8:24 Amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okam gokʼletʼ am do onam purạu akada. Ar mocate okam menletʼ kạmite hõ onam purạu akada, ar ona do ale hõle ńeletʼ kana." 
1Kings8:25 “Ńitokʼ do E Israelren Probhu Isor, amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okam gokʼletʼ ona baṛe purạume. Amem menleda uniren hoponko uni leka jotowakʼ kạmire amakʼ sana lekako calakʼ enḍekhan Israelakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ uniyakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ okulạn do baṅ hoyokʼa." 
1Kings8:26 E Israelren Isor, amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okaṭakʼem gokʼletʼ ona baṛe purạume." 
1Kings8:27 “Menkhan Isor do cetʼ sạrige dhạrtiren manwako sãoteye girobasokʼa? Sermare, se coṭ serma reakʼ sanam jaegare hõ amakʼ okulạn hoyokʼkan khan ińakʼ benaoakʼ niạ oṛakʼre amakʼ jaega do cetʼ hoyokʼtama?" 
1Kings8:28 Enhõ E ińren Probhu Isor, amren gutiyakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõr baṛe luturakʼme. Teheń amren guti do am ṭheniń rakʼjoṅ kana ariń nehõrokʼ kana ona baṛe ańjomtińme." 
1Kings8:29 Ar okaṭakʼ jaega reakʼem menakatʼ, ‘niạ ṭhạ̃i do ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ hoyokʼa,’ ona ṭhạ̃i secʼ, metakʼme niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ siń ńindạ beṅgetʼ akae baṛe tahenma; ar niạ ṭhạ̃i secʼ samaṅkate amren guti tinreye koejoṅa unre uniyakʼ koejoṅ baṛe ańjomtaeme." 
1Kings8:30 Niạ ṭhạ̃i secʼ samaṅkate amren guti ar amren Israel hoṛko am ṭhenko nehõrokʼre onkoakʼ luturakʼ me. Ar amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon ańjomtakome ar ikạkakome. 
1Kings8:31 “Jãhãe hoṛ eṭakʼ hoṛ upạrte behok iạteye dusilen khan ar acʼ apnar cetanre sarap ạgui lạgitʼe kiriạ ocokʼ khan ar amakʼ oṛakʼre senkate uni do pinḍ samaṅreye kiriạlen khan," 
1Kings8:32 enḍekhan serma khon uniyakʼ katha ańjomtaeme ar ona leka kạmime. Unre amren gutim bicạrete dos akatʼ reakʼ kuṛại uniyakʼ bohokʼrem ladeaete dusi mentem sạbudea ar eṭakʼicʼ hõ uniyakʼ kạmi leka kuṛạiyem emaea ar bin dusi kanae mentem sạbudea. 
1Kings8:33 “Am birudre kại gunạkʼte amren hoṛ Israelko akoren bạiri ṭhen khonko bhagao ocolenre ar am ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼlenre ar koejoṅ oṛakʼre amko sarhaome ar am ṭhen nehõrkateko koejoṅ," 
1Kings8:34 unre serma khon onkoakʼ ańjomtakome ar onkoakʼ kạiko ikạitakome ar okaṭakʼ disạm onkoren hapṛamkom ematʼko tahẽkan onḍe baṛe arhõ ruạṛ ạgukom. 
1Kings8:35 “Am birudre amren hoṛkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte tinre rimil esedokʼte bae daga unre onko do niạ jaegare ruạṛkate amko sarhaome ar am ṭhenko koejoṅ ar akoakʼ kại khonko ruạṛokʼ," 
1Kings8:36 enḍekhan am do serma khon ona ańjomtakome ar amren gutiko, metakʼme amren hoṛ Israelkoakʼ kạiko ikại takome. Ar jionre ṭhik leka calakʼ reakʼ cetʼakome ar somppoti lekate okaṭakʼ disạmem emakawatʼko ona disạm cetanre dakʼ ocoyme." 
1Kings8:37 “Disạmre akal se mahamạri ńellenre, ar phosol jhãoralenre se gocʼlenre, ar phosolko pohokoko jom cabaetakore, ar bạiriko onkoakʼ nagrahako gherao esetʼletakore, ar jãhãlekan ruạ se muhinko hecʼ paṛao akore," 
1Kings8:38 unre amren Israel hoṛko jãhãege mon khon kastaokate niạ mundil secʼ ti tiạrkateko koejoṅ se am ṭhenko nehõrokʼ," 
1Kings8:39 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon onkoakʼ ańjomtakome ar ikạkakome; ar onkoakʼ kạmiko lekate bicạrtakome, ente am do onkoakʼ ontorem baḍaekana." 
1Kings8:40 Am dom onkaea jemon aleren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạmem emakatʼko onḍe amren hoṛko do piṛhike piṛhiko sewawam. 
1Kings8:41 “Ona chaḍa amren Israel hoṛko baṅkan nonkan jãhãe upriạ hoṛ amakʼ maraṅ ńutum ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti reakʼ katha ańjomte amakʼ mundil lạgitʼ sạṅgiń disạm khon hecʼkate niạ mundil secʼ samaṅkateye koejoṅ," 
1Kings8:42  
1Kings8:43 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khon ańjomtaeme. Ar uni okae khoj uni lạgitʼ ona baṛe onkaeme jemon dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko baḍae daṛeam ar amren hoṛko leka onkohõ amko sewawam arko baḍae daṛeakʼ, iń benaoakʼ niạ oṛakʼ do amakʼ oṛakʼ kangea mente." 
1Kings8:44 “Amren hoṛko onkoren bạiriko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼem kollekore onko jãhãregeko tahen onḍe khon amem bachao akawan niạ nagraha secʼ ar am lạgitʼ iń benao akatʼ niạ oṛakʼ secʼ samaṅkateko koejoṅ," 
1Kings8:45 enḍekhan serma khon onkoakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõr ańjomtakome ar onko secʼ baṛe tahenme. 
1Kings8:46 “Onko do am upạrteko kại lekhan- bako kạiya nonkan hoṛ do bạnukʼkoa- ar onko cetanrem edrekʼte bạirikoakʼ tirem jimạko ar sạṅgiń disạmte bondikateko idi ocokʼ," 
1Kings8:47 unre ona disạmre akoakʼ monko ạcurtako arko kastaokʼte nehõrokʼteko men, ‘ale dole kại akada, arle behok akada ar bạṛicʼ hortele taṛam akada,’ enḍekhan onkoakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtakome." 
1Kings8:48 Ar ona disạmre mon ar ontorte am secʼko ạcur ruạṛokʼ ar okaṭakʼ disạm do onkoren hapṛamkom emakatʼko ona disạm secʼ, amem bachao akawan nagraha secʼ, am lạgitʼ benao akatʼ niạ oṛakʼ secʼ samaṅkate am ṭhenko koejoṅ," 
1Kings8:49 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon onkoakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõrjoṅakʼ ańjomtakome ar onko sejokʼme. 
1Kings8:50 Amren okoe hoṛko do am upạrteko kại akatʼ onko hoṛko ikạkakome ar am birud reakʼ sanamakʼ dosko hõ ikạitakome. Onko okoe do bondikateko idi akatʼko onko hoṛkoakʼ mon nonka hoeocoyme jemon onko cetanre daya hecʼako; 
1Kings8:51 ente Israelko do amren hoṛ kangeako, ar amren sompotti kanako okoe do Misor disom khon, one mẽṛhẽtʼ galao reakʼ culhạ khonem oḍok ạgu akatʼko." 
1Kings8:52 “Amren golam ar amren Israelkoakʼ nehõrjoṅakʼ baṛe moneyakʼtakome, ar amko hohowamre onkoakʼ katha ańjomtakome." 
1Kings8:53 E Probhu Isor, aleren hapṛamko Misor disạm khon oḍok ạguko jokhecʼ amren guti Mose hotete amakʼ roṛ saḍeakʼ lekate amren sompottiko hoyokʼ lạgitʼ dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko tala khon am do Israelkom begar dohoakatʼkoa.”" 
1Kings8:54 Solomon do Probhu Isor ṭhen niạko koejoṅ ar nehõre mucạtʼketʼ khan pinḍ samaṅ khone beretʼena; ar un ghạṛicʼ uni do ikhṛumkate serma secʼ ti tiyạr akaegeye tahẽkana. 
1Kings8:55 Uni doe beretʼente jarwa akan sanam Israelko ãṭ aṛaṅte niạ menteye bhoratʼkoa," 
1Kings8:56 “Bhạgangeae Probhu Isor do, one okoe acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate acʼren Israel hoṛkoe jirạu ocoakatʼko. Uniren guti Mose hotete okako bhạlại reakʼe gokʼletʼ ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha hõ uni do bae ạuṛiyakʼ ocoakada." 
1Kings8:57 Aboren Probhu Isor do cetʼleka aboren hapṛamko sãoteye tahẽkan onkage uni do abo sãote hõe tahenma. Uni do tishõ alo jemone bạgi giḍiyabon se alo jemone aṛakʼ giḍikabon. 
1Kings8:58 Abo do uniyakʼ joto horte calakʼ lạgitʼ ar aboren hapṛamko ṭhen okako hukum ar ạn-ạrikoe emakan ona manao lạgitʼ aboakʼ ontorre pạtiạu baṛeye dan abonma. 
1Kings8:59 Ar okako katha roṛate Probhu Isor ṭhen koejoṅ iń samaṅ akatʼ ona do siń ar ńindạ aboren Probhu Isorakʼ disạ tahentaema jemon uni do acʼren gutiko ar acʼren Israel hoṛko dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ jạruṛokʼakʼ lekateye bebostawabon. 
1Kings8:60 Nonkate dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa, Probhugeye Isor kana mente ar uni chaḍa eṭakʼ cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa." 
1Kings8:61 Teheń Probhu Isorakʼ ạn ar hukumko manao idi lạgitʼ apeakʼ ontor cetʼleka purạte Probhu Isor secʼ menakʼtape onkage jao okte baṛe tahentape ma.” 
1Kings8:62 Ona tayom raj ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko do Probhu Isor samaṅre samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. 
1Kings8:63 Solomon raj do bargel bar hajar ḍaṅgra ar mitʼ lakh bargel hajar bheḍate sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porobe porobena. Nonkate raj ar sanam Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼko uḍhạukeda. 
1Kings8:64 Ar Solomon do enhilokʼge Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ samaṅ senakʼ raca reakʼ tala hĩs do Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar dohokeda ar onḍe uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porobe porobena ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ itile samaṅkeda, ente pitạl reakʼ okaṭakʼ pinḍe benaoletʼ tahẽkan ona do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ ar itil samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do huḍińge tahẽkana." 
1Kings8:65 Nonkate Solomon ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko do ona jokhecʼ aboren Probhu Isor samaṅre eae din arhõ eae din, jotote gelpon din hạbicʼ mitʼṭecʼko porobena. Onko do lekhare ạḍi saṅgeko tahẽkana; onko do Hamat khon Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa hạbicʼ sanam ṭoṭha khonko hecʼakan tahẽkana." 
1Kings8:66 Ona dosar hilokʼ raj do hoṛkoe bidạ baṛakatʼkoa. Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Dạud ar uniren hoṛ Israelko okae bhạlại akatʼko ona lạgitʼ kusi ar rạskạte hoṛko do rajko sarhaokedea ar oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Kings9:1 Nonkate Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ, raj dolan ar acʼ apnar kusi leka okako kạmiye menletʼ onako sanamakʼe sạtkeda." 
1Kings9:2 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do dosar dhao uni ṭhene ńel ocoyena cetʼleka Gibeonre mitʼ dhaoe ńel ocolen. 
1Kings9:3 Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Am okaṭakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõrem dohoakatʼ ona doń ańjom akada. Amakʼ benaoakʼ niạ mundil do jaejug hạbicʼ ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lekate iń ńutumteń begar dohoakada. Niạ cetanre ińakʼ mẽtʼ ar mon do jao okte tahentińạ." 
1Kings9:4 “Ar amren ạpum Dạud leka khạṭi ontorte, dhoromte iń samaṅrem taṛam ar ińakʼ sanam hukum ar ạn-ạrikom batao," 
1Kings9:5 enḍekhan iń do jaejug hạbicʼ Israelko cetanre amakʼ siṅghạson iń teṅgo keṭejtama. Niạ katha do amren ạpum Dạud ṭhen hõń gokʼletʼ tahẽkana, ‘Israelakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ okulạn do baṅge hoyokʼa.’" 
1Kings9:6 “Menkhan ape se aperen hoponko ińakʼ hor khonpe ghańjeṛokʼ ar ape ṭhen emakan ińakʼ hukum ar ạn-ạriko manao baṅkate debotakope sewawako," 
1Kings9:7 enḍekhan Israelko okaṭakʼ disạmiń emakatʼko ona khon doń laga oḍokpea. Ar okaṭakʼ mundil do ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lạgitʼ iń begar dohoakatʼ ona hõ ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khoniń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. Unre Israel do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen kạhtuk ar cigạri lekako hoyokʼa. 
1Kings9:8 Niạ mundil do ńitokʼ maraṅ utạrakʼ hoyakanre hõ unre ona aṛete okoeko parom calakʼ onko do unreko comkao godokʼa ar cigạrikateko mena, ‘Probhu Isor do cedakʼ niạ disạm ar niạ mundil doe nonka ocokeda?’" 
1Kings9:9 Unre hoṛkoko roṛ ruạṛa, ‘noa reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼko onko hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do onkoe bạgi giḍi akatʼkoa. Onko do debota secʼko ghańjeṛ akana ar onkoko sewawako kana. Ar onatege Probhu Isor do onko cetanre noa bạṛicʼakʼe paṛao ocoakada.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj dolan benaote Solomon do bargel bochor lagaoade tahẽkana. 
1Kings9:11 Turren raj Hirạm do Solomonakʼ monsubạ leka debdạru ar saro kaṭ ar sonakoe jogaṛade tahẽkante Solomon do Gạlil reakʼ bargel atoye danadea. 
1Kings9:12 Hiram do onako ato ńel lạgitʼ Tur khone hecʼena, menkhan ona ńelkate bae kusilena." 
1Kings9:13 Uni do Solomone metadea, “E boeha, am do cetʼ lekan atokom emadińạ?” Uni do onako reakʼ ńutum Kabul disạme metatʼa (ona reakʼ mane do “Cetʼ kạmi reakʼge baṅa”). Ar teheń hạbicʼ onako do inạ ńutumge menakʼa." 
1Kings9:14 Hirạm do jotote pon ṭon tala khon hõ ḍher sona Solomon raje emade tahẽkana. 
1Kings9:15 Solomon raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ, acʼakʼ raj dolan, Milo, Jerusalem reakʼ pạcri, Hasor, Megido ar Geser benao lạgitʼ ạḍi utạr hoṛko kạmireye jormoṭketʼkoa." 
1Kings9:16 Inạ lahare Misorren Pharao raj do Geser hatkate seṅgelteye ḍahao marao akatʼ tahẽkana ar onḍeko tahẽkan Kananrenko doe gocʼletʼkoa. Tayomte ona jaega do acʼren hoponera, metakʼme, Solomonren bạhu ńutumte baplare dan sandes lekateye emlena." 
1Kings9:17 Ona iạte Solomon do Geser arhõe benao dohṛakeda. Ona chaḍa uni do latar Bet-Horon," 
1Kings9:18 Bakʼ alatʼ, Jihudạ hahaṅkar reakʼ Tamor," 
1Kings9:19 acʼakʼ sanam gola-nagrahako ar rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko lạgitʼ nagrahakoe benaokeda, metakʼme, Lebanonre ar acʼakʼ ḍanṭao gobolre okako rajosṭi tahẽkan onako modre okako benao dohṛae menletʼ ona do jotogeye benaokeda." 
1Kings9:20 Ar okoe do Israelko baṅkan, metakʼme Amoriko, Hittiko, Peresiko, Jebusikoren bõsko onko do unhõ jiwetʼko tahẽkana, Israelko do onko bako marao giḍi daṛeatʼko tahẽkana, menkhan Solomon do onkoge golam lekate kạmi lạgitʼe sapʼ paṭetʼletʼkoa, ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onko do ona kạmigeko kạmikana." 
1Kings9:21  
1Kings9:22 Menkhan uni do Israelko modren okoe hõ golam do bae benaoletʼkoa; onko do acʼren lạṛhại birko, acʼren kạmiyạko, acʼ latarren subedarko, mukhiyạko, rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko ar aswarikoko tahẽkantaea." 
1Kings9:23 Ona chaḍa Solomon do jotowakʼ kạmiko ńel todarot lạgitʼ mõṛẽ sae mõṛẽgel asol asol kạmiyạ hoṛko tahẽkantaea. Ar okoeko hoṛko kạmikan tahẽkan noko do onkoakʼ kạmiko ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings9:24 Pharaoren hoponera do Dạud nagraha bạgikate acʼ lạgitʼ benao akatʼ raj dolanteye hecʼen khan Solomon do Milo nagrahae benaokeda. 
1Kings9:25 Probhu Isor ńutumte Solomon do okaṭakʼ pinḍe benaoletʼ onḍe uni do bochorre pe dhao jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porobe hoyocoyetʼ tahẽkana. Ona sãote uni do Probhu Isor samaṅre dhupko hõe jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. Onate Solomon do, Salom mundil reakʼ joto kạmigeye sạt akatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings9:26 Solomon raj do arakʼ jalapuri aṛe Edom disạm reakʼ Elot nagraha ṭhen Esion Geberre dakʼ jahajkoe benao ocokeda. 
1Kings9:27 Ar hoṛko sãote jahajre kạmi lạgitʼ Hirạm do acʼren gạkhuṛ cakʼlaokoe kolketʼkoa. 
1Kings9:28 Onko do Ophirte senkate gel turui tala ṭon sona ạgukate Solomon rajko emadea. 
1Kings10:1 Solomonakʼ namḍak ar uni hotete sodorakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao reakʼ katha ańjomkate Seba disạmren rạni do kuṭhin kuṭhin kuklikote uni biḍạue lạgitʼe hecʼena. 
1Kings10:2 Uni do ḍher hoṛko ar ũṭkoante Jerusalemte hecʼkateye seṭerena. Unre ũṭ cetanre ḍher sona, jut so mosolako, ar damanakʼ mạnik dhiriko tahẽkana. Uni do Solomon ṭhen hecʼkate monre cetʼko tahẽkantae ona jotowakʼe baḍae ocokedea." 
1Kings10:3 Ar Solomon do uniyakʼ joto kukli reakʼ roṛ ruạṛe emadea. Raj ṭhen nonkan cetʼge kuṭhin do baṅ tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do bae bujhạu oco daṛeade. 
1Kings10:4 Sebaren rạni do Solomonakʼ ạkil ar uniyakʼ raj dolankoe ńelkeda. 
1Kings10:5 Uni do arhõe ńelkeda uniyakʼ ṭebil reakʼ jomakʼ, uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ tahen jaega, mońj mońj horokʼ bande akatʼ uniren sapʼsosorko, uniren darkha rasa dudulko ar ona siṛhi, one okaṭakʼ siṛhite uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye rakapʼ calakʼkan tahẽkan. Ar noako ńelte uni doe ṭhak utạrena." 
1Kings10:6 Uni do raje metadea, “Ińakʼ disạm khon amakʼ kạmi ar ạkil reaṅ okaṭakʼ kathań ańjomletʼ ona do sạrikangea." 
1Kings10:7 Menkhan nonḍe hecʼkate ińakʼ mẽtʼte ạuriń ńel hạbicʼ bạń pạtiạukʼkan tahẽkana. Sạrige, niạ reakʼ adha hõ iń ṭhen do baṅ lại akana. Okaṭakʼ khobor iń ńamakatʼ amakʼ ạkil ar dhon do ona khon hõ ạḍi bạ̃ṛtigea." 
1Kings10:8 Amren hoṛ do ạḍi sukre menakʼkoa! Ar okoe do jao okte am samaṅreko tahenkan ar amakʼ ạkil reakʼ kathako ańjometʼ onko kạmiyạko doko bhạgangea. 
1Kings10:9 Amren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhaoge baṛe hoyokʼtae ma, one okoe do am cetanreye kusi akante Israelakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akatʼme. Uni do Israelko jaejug hạbicʼe dulạṛetʼkote hok bicạr ar dhorom rukhiyại lạgitʼgeye raj akatʼmea.”" 
1Kings10:10 Uni do pon ṭon tala khon hõ bạ̃ṛti sona, ar ạḍi utạr jut so mosolako ar damanakʼ mạnik dhiriko raje emadea. Sebaren rạni do Solomon tinạkʼ jut so mosolakoe emade unạkʼ do tishõ disạmre ar baṅ ạgu akan tahẽkana." 
1Kings10:11 Ona chaḍa Hiramakʼ okako jahajte Ophir khon sonako ạguiyetʼ tahẽkan onako jahajte sero kaṭko ar mạnik dhiriko hõko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:12 Ar raj do onako sero kaṭte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj dolan reakʼ khunṭiko ar sekʼreń dolko lạgitʼ binạ banamko ar peṛesaṅkoe benao ocokeda. Teheń hạbicʼ ar tishõ unạkʼ sero kaṭ do disạmre ar baṅ ạguakan tahẽkana ar ńelhõ bań ńelakan tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:13 Solomon raj do dan lekate ạḍi lekanakʼ jinisko Sebaren rạniye emade tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa rạni cetʼkoe khojletʼ ona sanamakʼge uni doe emadea. Inạ tayom rạni do acʼren hoṛkoante acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Kings10:14 Jao bochor Solomon ṭhen oka sona hijukʼkan tahẽkan ona reakʼ ojon do bargel turui ṭon tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:15 Ona chaḍa bekʼpariko ar bạnij bepariko hõ sonako ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:16 Solomon raj do sona kuṭạm capṛa ocokate barsae ḍhalkoe benao ocokeda. Mimitʼ goṭecʼ ḍhalre eae keji irạl sae gram sona lagaolen tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:17 Ona chaḍa kuṭạm capṛa akatʼ sonate uni do pe sae kạṭicʼ ḍhalko hõe benao ocokeda. Ona mimitʼ goṭecʼ ḍhalre bar kejikate sona tahẽkana. Uni do Lebanon bir oṛakʼre onakoe dohokeda. 
1Kings10:18 Inạ tayom raj do hạti sonḍa reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ siṅghạsone benao ocokeda ar khạṭi sonateye tolkeda. 
1Kings10:19 Ona siṅghạson reakʼ siṛhi do turui goṭecʼ dhapko tahẽkana ar siṅghạson tayom cetan secʼ do gulạnḍge tahẽkana. Duṛubokʼ jaega reakʼ banar secʼ do ti dohowakʼ tahẽkana ar ona jalatʼre do teṅgo akan mitʼṭen dhạcri kulakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:20 Ona turui goṭecʼ dhap reakʼ banarsa aṛerege mimitʼ goṭecʼkate jotote gelbar goṭen dhạcri kulakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. Onkan siṅghạson do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ rajosṭikore ar tishõ baṅ benao akan tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:21 Solomonakʼ ńuńuwakʼ sanam bhajanko hõ sona reakʼ ar Lebanon bir oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam bhajanko hõ khạṭi sonate benao tahẽkana. Rupạ reakʼ benaoakʼ do cetʼge baṅ tahẽkana, ente Solomonakʼ oktere rupạ reakʼ dam ḍher do baṅ tahẽkana." 
1Kings10:22 Doreãore Hiramakʼ jahaj sãote rajakʼ hõ maraṅ maraṅ Tạrsis jahajko tahẽkana. Pe bochor por por onako jahajte sona, rupạ, hạti sonḍa, hạṛũko ar marakʼkoko ạguiyetʼko tahẽkana." 
1Kings10:23 Solomon raj do dhạrtiren eṭakʼ sanam rapajko khon ạkilan ar kisạ̃ṛ idikʼtegeye tahẽyena. 
1Kings10:24 Solomonakʼ ontorre Isor do oka ạkile emade ona ạkilte perecʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ dhạrti reakʼ sanam disạm khon uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼko kurumuṭuyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:25 Ar okoeko hijukʼkan tahẽkan onko sanamkoge thoṛa baṅ thoṛa jãhãnakʼ sandesko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. Onako modre sona ar rupạ reakʼ bhajanko, kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼko, khanḍa bhanḍako, jut so mosolako, sadomko ar khaccorkoko tahẽkana." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon do ạḍi utạr rãt gạḍiko ar sadomkoe jogaṛketʼkoa. Uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiko do mitʼ hajar ponsae ar sadomkoakʼ lekha do gelbar hajar tahẽkana. Uni do onako rãt gạḍiko dohoy lạgitʼ nagrahako ar Jerusalemre acʼ ṭhene dohoyetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:27 Jerusalemre rupạ do dhiri leka, ar debdạru kaṭko do latar buru ṭoṭha reakʼ loa dareko lekae hoyocokeda." 
1Kings10:28 Misor ar Kilikiạ khon do Solomon lạgitʼ sadomko ạgu ocokʼkan tahẽkana. Rajren bạnij bepariko do Kilikiạ khonko kiriń ạguiyetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Kings10:29 Misor disạm khon ạguwakʼ mimitʼ rãt gạḍiko reakʼ dam do eae keji irạl sae gram rupạ ar mimitʼ goṭen sadomakʼ dam do eae keji irạl sae gram rupạ tahẽkana. Onko bepariko do Hittiko ar Aramren sanam rapajko ṭhenko ạkhrińetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:1 Solomon raj do pharaoren hoponera chaḍa arhõ aema bidisiạ maejiukoe dulạṛetʼko tahẽkana. Onko do Moabren, Amoniren, Edomren, Sidonren ar Hittirenko tahẽkana." 
1Kings11:2 Onko do onako jạtren khongeko hecʼlena one okoe reaṅ Probhu Isor do Israelkoe metatʼko tahẽkan, “Onko do alope baplakoa, ente onko do khạṭige akoren debotako secʼ apeakʼ monko ạwiltapea.” Menkhan Solomon do onkogeye dulạṛketʼkoa." 
1Kings11:3 Uniren do eae sae erako tahẽkantaea, ar onko do raj gharońjren hoponerageko tahẽkana; ona chaḍa uniren do pe sae chuṭki era hõko tahẽkantaea. Ar uniren erako do bạṛicʼ horteko idikedea." 
1Kings11:4 Solomonakʼ haṛam umerre uniren erako do debotako secʼ uniyakʼ monko ạwilketʼtaea. Onate acʼren apat Dạud leka uniyakʼ ontor do Probhu Isor secʼ purạte do baṅ tahẽkantaea. 
1Kings11:5 Uni do Sidonikoren debota Astoret ar Amonikoren debota Milkom sewawạkine ehopʼena. 
1Kings11:6 Ar Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmikeda. Uniren apat Dạud cetʼleka Probhu Isore botoraekan tahẽkan onka do bae kạmikan tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:7 Jerusalem purub reakʼ buru cetanre uni do Moabren hirkhạwạnicʼ debota Kemos ar Amonikoren hirkhạwạnicʼ debota Molok ńutumte sewawạkin lạgitʼ than boṭkocʼ koe benaokeda. 
1Kings11:8 Uniren sanam bidisiạ erako okoe do apan ạpin debotako lạgitʼ dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan ar janwarko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkan onko sanamko lạgitʼ hõ onageye kạmikeda. 
1Kings11:9 Onate Probhu Isor do Solomon cetanre ạḍitetʼe edreyena, ente okoe acʼ ṭhen bar dhaoe ńel ocolen uni Israelkoren Probhu Isor secʼ khon mon do ạcur akantae tahẽkana." 
1Kings11:10 Uni do deb debiko secʼ alo ghańjeṛokʼ lạgitʼe manaledegea menkhan Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bae manaoleda. 
1Kings11:11 Onate Probhu Isor do Solomone metadea, “Amakʼ noa beohar iạte ar ińakʼ bondobos ar niạmko bam bataoetʼte khạṭige amakʼ rajosṭi doń recʼmea ar amren mitʼṭen gutiyiń emaea." 
1Kings11:12 Menkhan amren ạpum Dạudakʼ katha disạite amakʼ jionre ona do bạń onkaea, menkhan amren hopon ṭhen khon ona doń recʼ hataoa." 
1Kings11:13 Amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ jotowakʼ do bạń recʼ cabamea, menkhan ińren guti Dạudakʼ katha ar ińiń bachao akawan Jerusalem reakʼ katha disạite mitʼ gusṭirenko do amren hoponiń danaea.”" 
1Kings11:14 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Solomon upạrte Edomren Hadad bạiri lekateye teṅgokedea. Uni do Edomren raj bõsreye janamlena. 
1Kings11:15 Dạud do tinre Edom disạm upạrteye lạṛhạilena unre uniren senaputi Joab do gocʼ hoṛko topako lạgitʼ Edomteye senlena. Ar onḍe tahen jokhecʼge uni do Edomren sanam herel hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa. 
1Kings11:16 Joab ar Israelren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do Edomre turui candoko tahẽkana ar onḍenko sanam herel hoponko gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. 
1Kings11:17 Menkhan Hadad do acʼ apatren adom kạmiyạko sãote Misorteye dạṛleda. Ona jokhecʼ uni do gidrạgeye tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:18 Onko do Midiạn khon mohnḍakate Paranteko parom senlena ar onḍe khon thoṛa hoṛ soṅgekate Misorren Pharao raj ṭhenko senlena. Ar Pharao do oṛakʼ-duạr khet-baṛge ar jomakʼko Hadade emadea. 
1Kings11:19 Pharao do Hadad cetanre nunạkʼ kusiye tahẽkana je, uni do acʼ bạhu Tahpenesren bokot kuṛi sãote Hadade baplakedea." 
1Kings11:20 Tahpenesren bokot kuṛiyakʼ kukhire Hadadren do mitʼṭen hopone janamena; uniyakʼ ńutum do Genubat tahẽkana. Tahpenes do uni gidrạ raj oṛakʼreye dohokedea ar uni do onḍege eṅgat towa nunuye bạgikeda. Ar Genubat do onḍe Pharaoren hopon ar hoponerako tulucʼgeye tahẽyena. 
1Kings11:21 Misorre tahenrege Hadad doe ańjomkeda, Dạud do acʼren hapṛamko sãoteye topa ocoakana ar senaputi Joab hõe gocʼena. Unre Hadad do Pharaoe metadea, “Ńitokʼ do sen ocoạńme jemon ińakʼ disạmteń ruạṛ sen daṛeakʼ.”" 
1Kings11:22 Pharaoe kulikedea, “Nonḍe do cetʼ reakʼ okulạn menakʼtamte, amakʼ disạmte ruạṛ calakʼem menjoṅ kana?” Hadade roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Cetʼ reakʼge okulạn do baṅ hoyokʼkana, menkhan enhõ iń do ruạṛ calakʼ hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
1Kings11:23 Solomon upạrte Isor do ar mitʼṭen bạiriye teṅgokedea. Uni doe hoyokʼkana Elijadaren hopon Reson. Uni do acʼren kisạ̃ṛ Sebaren raj Hadadser ṭhen khone dạṛ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:24 Dạud do tinre sebaren lạṛhại phạdkoe gocʼetʼko tahẽkana unre Reson do thoṛa hoṛkoante luluṭ dole benaokeda ar acʼ do onaren mukhiyại hoyena. Noko hoṛko do Damesek nagrahako hatketʼte onḍe rajosṭi calaoko ehopʼ akan tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:25 Solomon tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din Reson do Israelko sãote bạiriye tahẽkana ar onako dinre Hadad hõ Israelko upạrteye kạmikan tahẽkana. Israelko upạrte mitʼṭen bạiri menkate Reson do Aram disạmreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:26 Nabatren hopon Jerobiam hõ Solomon raj upạrteye hulkeda. Uni do Solomonren mitʼṭen gutiye tahẽkana, uni do Sereda atoren mitʼṭen Ephrayim hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Serua; uni do rạnḍigeye tahẽkana." 
1Kings11:27 Raj upạrte Jerobiamakʼ hul reakʼ do mitʼṭecʼ karon tahẽkana. Solomon do Milo nagraha tinreye benaoetʼ tahẽkana ar acʼren apat Dạudakʼ nagraha reakʼ pạcrikoe jut aro ocoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:28 Unre Jerobiam do onḍeye kạmikan tahẽkana ar kạmi reakʼ ạḍi ńutum tahẽkantaea. Solomon do uni koṛa metakʼme Jerobiam do bes kạmiyạ hoṛ kanae menteye ńelkede khan uni do Josephakʼ bõsren sanam gutiko ńel todarotko reakʼ bhare emadea. 
1Kings11:29 Mitʼdin Jerobiam do Jerusalem bahreteye oḍok senena. Ar Siloren Ạhiạ nạbi sãote horreye ńapamena. Unre Ạhiạwakʼ hoṛmore mitʼṭecʼ nãwã cador tahẽkana. Ar horre unkin chaḍa ar celege bako tahẽkana. 
1Kings11:30 Unre Ạhiạ do acʼakʼ cador hataokate gel bar ṭhecʼe getʼ kuṭrạkeda. 
1Kings11:31 Ar ona tayom do Jerobiame metadea, “Gel goṭecʼ kuṭrạ halaṅ rakabme, ente Israelren Probhu Isor do ame metamkana, ‘ńelme, iń do Solomonakʼ ti khon rajosṭiń recʼ hataoa ar gel goṭecʼ rajosṭi do amiń emama." 
1Kings11:32 Menkhan ińren guti Dạud lạgitʼ ar Israelren sanam gusṭiko reakʼ ṭoṭha khon ińiń bachao akawan Jerusalem lạgitʼ eken mitʼ gusṭi do Solomon secʼko tahena. 
1Kings11:33 Iń doń onkaea, ente onko gel gusṭirenko do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińạ ar Sidonren debi Astarot, ar Moabren debota Kemos ar Amonikoren debota Milkomko sewawae kana. Solomonren apattetʼ Dạud okae cekayetʼ tahẽkan onko do bako onkayeda. Onko do ińakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼ baṅkan onako kạmikana, ar ińakʼ niạm ar hukumko hõ bako bataoeda." 
1Kings11:34 Enhõ Solomonakʼ ti khon goṭa rajosṭi do bạń hataoa. Ińren guti Dạud, okoe doń bachaoan tahẽkan ar okoe do ińakʼ hukum ar niạmkoe bataoetʼ tahẽkan uni lạgitʼge Jerusalem do jion bhor raj hudạń dohoya." 
1Kings11:35 Iń do uniren hoponakʼ ti khon rajosṭiń hataoa ar amakʼ tire gel gusṭirenko reakʼ bhariń emama. 
1Kings11:36 Ar ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lekateń bachao akawan Jerusalem nagraha do jemon iń samaṅre ińren guti Dạudakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mạli tahen onate uniren hopon do mitʼ gusṭirenko reakʼ bhariń emaea. 
1Kings11:37 Menkhan iń do amge Israelko cetanre raj doń hoyocomea ar amakʼ ontor reakʼ sana lekatem rajokʼa. 
1Kings11:38 Ińakʼ hukum lekam kạmi ar ińakʼ hortem calakʼ ar ińren guti Dạud leka ińakʼ hukum ar niạmkom pańjaete ińakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre okaṭakʼ ṭhik onam kạmi enḍekhan iń do am sãoteń tahena. Ar Dạud lekage amakʼ bõsrenko do raj hudạreń teṅgo keṭecʼkoa ar amakʼ tire Israelkoń jimạkoa. 
1Kings11:39 Onkoakʼ bebatao iạte iń do Dạud bõsrenkoń copotʼkoa, menkhan piṛhike piṛhi do baṅa.”" 
1Kings11:40 Ona iạte Solomon do Jerobiam goje lạgitʼe kurumuṭiyetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan uni do Misorren raj Sisak ṭhene dạṛkeda ar Solomon ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ onḍegeye tahẽyena." 
1Kings11:41 Solomonakʼ rajokʼ reaṅ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ghoṭna reakʼ kathako, metakʼme uniyakʼ kạmi ar ạkil reakʼ kathako do uniyakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ Itihas puthire ol akana." 
1Kings11:42 Solomon do Jerusalemre pongel bochor hạbicʼ goṭa Israel jạtrenko cetanreye rajlena. 
1Kings11:43 Ona tayom uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. Ar acʼren apat Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ona tayom acʼren hopon Rehobiam do uni bodolteye rajena. 
1Kings12:1 Rehobiam do Sikemteye senena, ente sanam Israelko do uni raje lạgitʼ onḍeko senakan tahẽkana." 
1Kings12:2 Unre Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do Misor disạmreye tahẽkana, ente uni do Solomon raj samaṅ khone dạṛletʼ tahẽkana. Ar onḍeye tahẽkanrege uni do Rehobiamakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ khobore ańjomkeda." 
1Kings12:3 Hoṛko do Jerobiamko hoho ạgukede khan uni ar sanam Israelko do Rehobiam ṭhen senkateko menkeda," 
1Kings12:4 “Amren ạpum do ale cetanre mitʼṭecʼ hamal arãṛe lade akawatʼlea, menkhan ńitokʼ ale cetanre lade akan ona hamal arãṛ baṛe rawal kataleme; enḍekhan ale do amle sapʼ sorama.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rehobiame roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ńitokʼ do ruạr calakʼpe ar pe din hilokʼre hijukʼpe.” Onate onko hoṛ doko ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Kings12:6 Okoe murubbiko acʼren apattetʼ Solomon oktereko sapʼ soraekan tahẽkan Rehobiam do onko sãote galmaraoketʼteye menkeda, “Ma solha emạńpe onko hoṛ do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛakoa?”" 
1Kings12:7 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Teheń noko hoṛko tulucʼ bhagem beoharte onkom kusi ocoko ar onkoakʼ nehõr joṅakʼem ańjomtako enḍekhan onko do jiwetʼ bhor am ṭhen gutiko khaṭaokʼa.”" 
1Kings12:8 Menkhan Rehobiam do murubbikoakʼ solha bae hetawatʼte juạn koṛako tulucʼe solhawana, one okoe do acʼ sãoteko haralen ar uniko sapʼ soraekan tahẽkan." 
1Kings12:9 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Hoṛko meneda, ‘amren ạpum okaṭakʼ hamal arãṛe gokʼ akawatʼle ona ńitokʼ rawal kataleme.’ Niạ babotre apeakʼ sopolha do cetʼ? Iń do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛakoa? ”" 
1Kings12:10 Onko juạnko doko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Okoeko hoṛ amren ạpumakʼ hamal arãṛ rawal reakʼ kathako menetʼkan am do onkom metakoa, ińren ạpuńakʼ ḍanḍa khon hõ ińakʼ sicʼ kạṭupʼ do moṭagea." 
1Kings12:11 Ar amren ạpum okaṭakʼ hamal arãṛe ladeyatʼko tahẽkan ona do arhõ hamal ocoytakome. Amren ạpum do cạbukteye dalletʼkoa menkhan am do kidiń kaṭkomkotem dalkoa.” 
1Kings12:12 Rajakʼ katha leka pe din hilokʼre Jerobiam ar sanam Israelko do Rehobiam ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼena. 
1Kings12:13 Raj do murubbikoakʼ sopolha bae hetawatʼte ạḍi keṭecʼ kathateye roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa. 
1Kings12:14 Uni do onko juạnkoakʼ sopolha lekageye metatʼkoa, “Ińren ạpuń do apeakʼ arãṛe hamal ocoleda menkhan iń do artetʼgeń hamal ocoya. Ińren ạpuń do cạbukteye dalletʼpea, menkhan iń do kidiń kaṭkomkoteń dalpea.”" 
1Kings12:15 Nonkate raj do hoṛkoakʼ katha bae luturada. Siloren Ạhiạ hotete Probhu Isor do Nabatren hopon Jerobiamakʼ oka kathae menletʼ ona purạu lạgitʼ Probhu Isor khonge noa ghoṭna do hoyena. 
1Kings12:16 Israelkoko ńelkeda raj do onkoakʼ katha bae ańjomeda unre onko do rajko metadea, “Dạud cetanre jãhãn dạbiteakʼ do bạnukʼtalea. Jisạiren hopon cetanre aleakʼ ạidạri hõ bạnukʼanaṅ. E Israelko Do apan ạpin oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼpe. E Dạud, ńitokʼ amakʼ gusṭi do amtege ńel joṅme.” Onate Israelko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Kings12:17 Menkhan Jihudạ gusṭirenko reakʼ atoko ar nagrahakore okoe Israelkoko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan Rehobiam do onko cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
1Kings12:18 Okoe do kạmi lạgitʼko jormoṭ ocokʼkan tahẽkan ar onko cetanre okoeyakʼ bhar tahẽkan Rehobiam do uni Adoram Israelko ṭhene kolkadea, “Menkhan onko do dhirite uniko tiń gocʼkedea. Unre Rehobiam raj do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍire decʼkate Jerusalemteye dạṛkeda." 
1Kings12:19 Nonkate Israelko do Dạud bõsrenko cetanreko hulkeda; ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onkage menakʼa. 
1Kings12:20 Jerobiamakʼ ruạṛ hijukʼ reakʼ khobor ańjomkate Israelko do hoṛ kolkate akoakʼ sabhareko hoho ạgukedea ar sanam Israelko cetanre uniko rajkedea. Ar eken Jihudạ gusṭikoren hoṛkoge Dạudakʼ bõsre pạtiạrko tahẽyena. 
1Kings12:21 Jerusalemte seṭerkate Rehobiam do Jihudạ ar Benjạmin gusṭiren sanam hoṛko lạṛhại lạgitʼe jarwaketʼkoa. Onate mitʼ lakh irạlgel hajar lạṛhại phạdko hoyena. Noa do hoyena jemon Israelko sãote lạṛhạikate rajosṭi do arhõ jemon Solomonren hopon Rehobiamakʼ tire ruạṛ hijukʼ. 
1Kings12:22 Menkhan Isorren hoṛ Semaya ṭhen Isorakʼ niạ katha do sodorena," 
1Kings12:23 “Am do Jihudạren raj Solomonren hopon Rehobiam, Jihudạ ar Benjạmin gusṭiren sanam hoṛko ar sarecʼ sanam hoṛkom metakoa," 
1Kings12:24 Probhu Isore meneda apnar Israelko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ do alo jemonko oḍok calakʼ. Onko do oṛakʼteko ruạṛokʼma, ente noa do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmikana.” Onate onko do Probhu Isorakʼ kathako bataoketʼte Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Kings12:25 Ona tayom Jerobiam do Eprayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ Sikem do gaṛ nagraha lekae benaokeda ar onḍe girobasokʼe ehopʼena. Uni do onḍe khon senkate Penuel hõ gaṛ lekae benaokeda. 
1Kings12:26 Jerobiame hudiskeda, “Pasecʼ raj do arhõ Dạudakʼ bõsre ruạṛ calakʼa." 
1Kings12:27 Ente hoṛko Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre samaṅokʼakʼ porob lạgitʼko calakʼ khan onko do akoren kisạ̃ṛ Jihudạren raj Rehobiam gobolreko tahẽ ruạṛokʼa. Ar onko do ińko gojeńa ar Rehobiam ṭhenko ruạṛ calakʼa.” 
1Kings12:28 Unre Jerobiam raj do sopolhakate sonaren barea mĩhũi benao ocoketʼkinạ. Ar ona tayom do hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Jerusalemte calakʼ do ape lạgitʼ ạḍi kosṭogea. E Israelko, nokin kangeakin aperen debota do, nokinge Misor disom khon apekin oḍok ạgu akatʼpea.”" 
1Kings12:29 Unkin mĩhũ modre mitʼṭen do Bethelre ar eṭagicʼ do Danreye dohoketʼkinạ," 
1Kings12:30 onate hoṛko do sewae lạgitʼ Dan hạbicʼ calakʼko ehopʼena. Ar noage onko lạgitʼ do maraṅ kạige hoyentakoa. 
1Kings12:31 Jerobiam do usul boṭkocʼkore mundile benaokeda ar nonkan hoṛko tala khon naekeye bahalketʼkoa one okoe do Liwi bõsrenko baṅkan. 
1Kings12:32 Jihudạ ṭoṭha talare oka porob hoyokʼkan tahẽkan ona porob leka irạlakʼ cando reakʼ gel mõṛẽakʼ din hilokʼre uni do Bethelre hõ mitʼṭecʼ porob reakʼe bebostakeda ar acʼe benao akade mĩhũ ńutumte pinḍ cetanre janware samaṅkedea. Uni do Bethel reakʼ usul than boṭkocʼkore hõ acʼ benaoakʼ mundilre naekekoe bahalketʼkoa. 
1Kings12:33 Irạl cando reakʼ gel mõṛẽakʼ dinre Bethelre acʼ benaoakʼ pinḍre uni do janwarkoe samaṅketʼkoa. Ona reakʼ okte do apnar bachaoakʼge tahẽkantaea. Nonkate uni do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ porobe hoyocokeda ar janwarko samaṅko lạgitʼ pinḍe benaokeda. 
1Kings13:1 Jerobiam do janwar samaṅko lạgitʼ tinre pinḍ aṛereye teṅgo akan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka Isorren mitʼṭen hoṛ do Jihudạ khon Bethelteye seṭerena. 
1Kings13:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka pinḍ upạrteye roṛ saḍekeda, “E pinḍ, E pinḍ, Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Dạud bõsre Josiạ ńutuman mitʼṭen hopone janamokʼa. Ar usul than boṭkocʼkore okoe naekeko ńitokʼ am cetanre janwarko samaṅetʼko uni do onko naekeko am cetanreye samaṅkoa ar manwakoakʼ jaṅ hõe atar giḍikatakoa.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Ar enhilokʼge Isorren hoṛ do mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ reakʼ kathae menkeda. Uni doe menkeda, “Probhu Isor do niạ cinhạ reakʼ kathae roṛeda, noa pinḍ do oṛejokʼa ar ona cetan reakʼ torocʼ hõ taral basal ocokʼa.”" 
1Kings13:4 Bethel reakʼ pinḍ upạrte Isorren hoṛakʼ katha ańjomkate Jerobiam do pinḍ cetanre ti tiạrkateye menkeda, “Uni sabepe.” Menkhan uni hoṛ sabe lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ tiye tiạrketʼtae ona do borocʼentaea. Ona do ar bae or ruạṛ daṛeada." 
1Kings13:5 Ona chaḍa Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka Isorren hoṛe roṛketʼ cinhạ leka pinḍ do oṛecʼena ar ona reakʼ torocʼ do taral basalena. 
1Kings13:6 Unre raj do Isorren hoṛe metadea, “Amren Probhu Isor nehõraeme ar iń lạgitʼ koeme jemon ińakʼ ti do arhõ mońj ruạṛokʼ.” Onate Isorren hoṛ do Probhu Isore nehõradea ar rajakʼ ti do arhõ lahate leka hoyentaea." 
1Kings13:7 Raj do Isorren hoṛe metadea, “Ińakʼ oṛakʼre hecʼkate jom-ńũiyme ar iń do mitʼṭecʼ sandesiń emama.”" 
1Kings13:8 Menkhan Isorren hoṛ do raje roṛ ruạṛadeteye metadea, “Amakʼ sompotti reakʼ adham imạńre hõ am sãote do bạń calakʼa se nonḍe jãhãn jomakʼ se dakʼ hõ bạń ńũiya." 
1Kings13:9 Niạ reakʼ karon do, Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka niạ hukumiń ńam akada, iń do jemon jãhãn jomakʼ se ńũiyakʼ hõ aloń ńũi ar oka horteń hecʼakan ona horte hõ aloń ruạṛ calakʼ.”" 
1Kings13:10 Onate uni do oka horte Bethel khone hecʼlen ona horte ruạṛ baṅkate eṭakʼ horteye mohnḍayena. 
1Kings13:11 Unre mitʼṭen haṛam nạbi do Bethelreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ar enhilokʼ Isorren hoṛ okaṭakʼe cekayetʼ tahẽkan unre uniren hoponko do senkate sanamakʼko lạiyadea. Ar uni hoṛ raj okae metade tahẽkan onko do akoren apat onako lạiyadea. 
1Kings13:12 Onkoren apattetʼ doe kuliketʼkoa, “Uni do oka horteye ruạṛena?” Jihudạren uni Isorren hoṛ oka horteye ruạṛ calaoen ona do uniren hoponko ńelledea." 
1Kings13:13 Unre uni do acʼren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń lạgitʼ ma gadha palanạńpe.” Arko palanade khan uni do onareye decʼena." 
1Kings13:14 Ar ona tayom do Isorren hoṛ sendraye lạgitʼe oḍok calaoena. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ ela dare buṭạre uni hoṛ duṛupʼ akane ńelkede khane kulikedea, “Amge cetʼ Isorren uni hoṛ do, one Jihudạ disạm khonem hecʼakan?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, iń doń uni kangea.”" 
1Kings13:15 Unre nạbi do uniye metadea, “Iń sãote dela ruạṛme ar jom-ńũime.”" 
1Kings13:16 Isorren hoṛe menkeda, “Am sãote iń do bạń ruạṛ sen daṛeakʼa ar niạ jaegare jomakʼ se ńuiyakʼ hõ bạń jom-ńũ daṛeakʼa." 
1Kings13:17 Isor doe hukum akadińạ, jemon nonḍe do jom hõ aloń jom ar ńũ hõ aloń ńũi ar oka horteń hecʼakan ona horte aloń ruạṛokʼ.”" 
1Kings13:18 Uni nạbiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do am lekan mitʼṭen nạbi kangeạń. Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka mitʼṭen dut do ińe men akawạdińa jemon ińakʼ oṛakʼteń ruạṛ idime jemon am do senkatem jom-ńũ daṛeakʼ.” Menkhan uni do eṛe kathae metadea." 
1Kings13:19 Ar unre Isorren hoṛ do uni sãoteye ruạṛ calaoena ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼreye jom-ńũkeda. 
1Kings13:20 Unkin do unhõ ṭebil ṭhen kin duṛupʼ akan tahẽkanrege okoe do Isorren hoṛe ruạṛ ạgulede uni ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorena. 
1Kings13:21 Ar unre uni nạbi do Jihudạ khon hecʼakan Isorren hoṛ ãṭ aṛaṅteye metadea, “Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, am do Probhu Isorakʼ katham bebatao akada ar Probhu Isor emakʼ hukum bam manao akada." 
1Kings13:22 Oka jaegare jom-ńũi reakʼe manaletʼme onḍege am do ruạṛ senkatem jom-ńũkeda. Onate amren hapṛamkoakʼ topare am do bam topa ocokʼa.” 
1Kings13:23 Isorren hoṛ doe jom-ńũ sạtketʼ khan nạbi do mitʼṭen gadha cetanre uni lạgitʼe palankeda. 
1Kings13:24 Ado Isorren hoṛe mohnḍayen khan mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do horre uniye ńamkedea are gocʼkedea. Ar uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do horre giḍi akan tahẽyena ar ona mạ̃ṛĩ sorre gadha ar dhạcri kul teṅgo akan kin tahẽyena. 
1Kings13:25 Ar hoṛko do ona horteko parom calakʼkan tahẽkanre giḍi akan mạ̃ṛĩ ar ona aṛere mitʼṭen dhạcri kul hõ teṅgo akanko ńelkedea. Ar onko do uni haṛam nạbiyakʼ atore senkateko lạikeda. 
1Kings13:26 Ona katha ańjomkate nạbi doe menkeda, “Uni doe Isorren hoṛ kana okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bae bataoletʼ. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ okaṭakʼ katha uniye metade tahẽkan onkage uni do dhạcri kulakʼ tireye jimạkedea ar dhạcri kul do uniye or cirạkedeteye gocʼkedea.”" 
1Kings13:27 Ona tayom nạbi do acʼren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Gadhare iń lạgitʼ palanpe.” Ar uniren hoponko doko onkakeda." 
1Kings13:28 Ona tayom uni do senkateye ńelkeda horre mạ̃ṛĩ do giḍi akana ar ona sorre gadha ar mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do teṅgo akan menakʼkinạ. Dhạcri kul do ona mạ̃ṛĩ bae jom akada ar gadha hõ bae ghạl akadea. 
1Kings13:29 Isorren hoṛ topaye ar rakʼ homor lạgitʼ nạbi do uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye rakapʼketʼte gadhareye ladekeda ar acʼakʼ atoteye ruạṛ senena. 
1Kings13:30 Uni do acʼ lạgitʼ benao akatʼ topare uniye topakadea. Uni ar acʼren hoponko do niạ menkate uni lạgitʼ homor halaṅko ehopʼena, “Hae boehatiń, hae!" 
1Kings13:31 Uni topa baṛakate nạbi do acʼren hoponkoe metatʼkoa, “Isorren hoṛ okareye topa ocoakan onarege iń hõń gocʼlen khan topayińpe, ar ińakʼ jaṅ do uniyakʼ jaṅ aṛerege dohokakʼpe;" 
1Kings13:32 ente Bethel reakʼ pinḍ ar Samariạ reakʼ sanam atoko reakʼ usul than boṭkocʼko reakʼ mundil upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka onako reaṅ uniye roṛ saḍe akatʼakʼ do khạṭige hoyokʼa.” 
1Kings13:33 Niạ tayom hõ Jerobiam do acʼakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon bae ruạṛlena bickom than boṭkocʼko lạgitʼ sanam hoṛko mod khon naekeye bahalketʼkoa. Okoe naeke hoyokʼe khojketʼ unige usul than boṭkocʼren naeke lekateye bahalede kan tahẽkana. 
1Kings13:34 Niạko kạmi Jerobiam bõsrenko lạgitʼ do kại hoyena jemon onko doko ḍahao maraokʼte dhạrti khonko caba utạrokʼ. 
1Kings14:1 Ona oktere Jerobiamren hopon Abiạ doe ruạ kạhilena. 
1Kings14:2 Unre Jerobiam do acʼren bạhuttetʼe metadea, “Am do nonkan kicricʼkom horokʼ bandea jemon Jerobiamren bạhu kanam mente alom oromokʼ. Ar ona tayom do Silotem calakʼa. Onḍe do Ạhiạ nạbi menaea. Unige ińe metadiń tahẽkana, noko hoṛkoren rajiń hoyokʼa mente." 
1Kings14:3 Am do soṅgete gel goṭecʼ piṭhạ, thoṛa thuṛi mạṭhại ar mitʼ cukạkʼ dumur rasa uni lạgitʼ idi toraeme. Ar unigeye lạiyama gidrạwakʼ do cetʼ hoyokʼtaea mente.”" 
1Kings14:4 Jerobiamren bạhu do ona lekageye kạmikeda ar Silote Ạhiạwakʼ oṛakʼteye senena. Unre Ạhiạ do nunạkʼe haṛam thalakʼ thulukʼ caba akan tahẽkana; uni do mẽtʼte hõ bae ńeńelkan tahẽkana.
