1Kings14:5 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Ạhiyại metade tahẽkana, “Jerobiamren bạhu do acʼren hopontetʼ reaṅ kulime lạgitʼ am ṭhene hijukʼ kana. Uniren hopontetʼ doe ruạ kạhil akana. Ar am do niạkom roṛ ruạṛaea. Uni do nonḍe hecʼkate eṭakʼ mitʼṭen maejiu menkateye udugokʼa.”" 
1Kings14:6 Ar Ạhiạ do duạr ṭhen uniyakʼ taṛam reakʼ sabade ańjomketʼ khane menkeda, “Dela bolokʼme, Jerobiamren bạhu. Am do cedakʼ nonka dom udugokʼ kana? Iń do bạṛicʼ khobor emam lạgitʼgeń men ocoakana." 
1Kings14:7 Am do senkate Jerobiam noa katham lạiyaea, Israelkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do hoṛko mod khon amgeń usulletʼmea ar ińren hoṛ Israelko cetanre mukhiyạ lekateń doholetʼmea." 
1Kings14:8 Ar Dạudakʼ bõs khon rajosṭi recʼ hataokate amiń ematʼme tahẽkana, menkhan ińren guti Dạud leka do bam hoylena. Dạud do ińakʼ hukumkoe bataoetʼ tahẽkana ar mon-ontorte ińre pạtiạre tahẽkana. Ińakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bhageakʼ kan eken onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings14:9 Am lahate okoeko tahẽkan onko khonhõ am do ḍher bạṛicʼem kạmi akada. Am do apnar lạgitʼ debotakom benao akawana ar chańcre dulakʼ muṭhạnem benao akada. Am dom be kusi ocoakadińa arem bạgi giḍi akadińạ. 
1Kings14:10 Ona iạte iń do Jerobiamakʼ bõs cetanre usạrage muhiniń paṛao ocoya. Uniyakʼ bõs khon mitʼke mitʼ herel hoṛ doń marao utạrkoa- baṅ doe golamkan ar baṅ doe sạdhin kan. Hoṛ do cetʼ leka gõeṭha rapakʼkateko torocʼ ocoyetʼkan onkage Jerobiamakʼ bõskoń marao utạra. 
1Kings14:11 Uniyakʼ bõsren okoeko nagrahareko gujukʼ onko do setakoko jomkoa ar bilạn ṭạnḍire okoeko gujukʼ onko do cẽṛẽkoko jomkoa. Iń Probhuge niạ katha doń meneda.’ 
1Kings14:12 “Am do ńitokʼ oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼme. Ar nagrahatem bolokʼ torage hoponme doe gujukʼa. 
1Kings14:13 Israelren sanam hoṛ do uni lạgitʼko rakʼ homora arko topakaea. Jerobiamren nijạr hoṛko modre eken unigeye topa ocokʼa, ente Jerobiamakʼ bõsre eken uniren hopontetʼ cetanrege Israelren Probhu Isor do bhuktiye ńelakada." 
1Kings14:14 “Probhu Isor do acʼ apnar ńutumte Israelkoren hoṛko cetanre nonkan mitʼ hoṛe rajea okoe do Jerobiam bõsrenkoe marao utạrko. Ona din do teheńkangea, hẽ, ńitokʼ kangea." 
1Kings14:15 Probhu Isor do Israelkoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa, onate onko do dakʼre hilạukʼ kan pạṭiol ghãs lekako hoyokʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm onkoren hapṛamkoe ematʼko tahẽkan ona mońj disạm khone or totʼkoa ar Phurạt gaḍa hanasareye giḍikakoa, ente onko do Asera muṭhạn benaokate Probhu Isorko edre ocoakadea." 
1Kings14:16 Jerobiam okakoe kại akatʼ ar Israelko okae kại ocoakatʼko ona iạte Probhu Isor do onkoe bạgi giḍiyakoa.” 
1Kings14:17 Inạ tayom Jerobiamren bạhu doe ruạṛ calaoena ar Tirsa nagrahateye seṭerena. Ar duạr reakʼ ganaḍeye lebetʼketʼ sãote hopontetʼ doe gocʼena. 
1Kings14:18 Probhu do acʼren guti Ạhiạ nạbi hotete oka kathae roṛletʼ onkage Israelren sanam hoṛ do hopontetʼ lạgitʼko homorkeda arko topakadea. 
1Kings14:19 Jerobiamakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi, uniyakʼ lạṛhạiko ar rajokʼ reakʼ katha do “Israel rajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire olakana." 
1Kings14:20 Ar bargel bar bochor rajokʼ tayom uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Nadab do raje hoyena. 
1Kings14:21 Solomonren hopon Rehobiam do Jihudạreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar tinre raje hoylena unre uniyakʼ umer do pongel mitʼ bochor tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isor do Israel gusṭirenkoakʼ sanam jaega mod khon okaṭakʼ nagraha acʼ tahen lạgitʼe bachaoan tahẽkan ona Jerusalem nagrahare Rehobiam do gel eae bochorre rajena. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Nama tahẽkana; uni do Amoni jạtrene tahẽkana. 
1Kings14:22 Ar Jihudạren hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onage kạmiko ehopʼena. Akoren hapṛamko khon hõ akoakʼ kại hotete Probhu Isorakʼ pit do arhõ bạ̃ṛtiko rakapʼ ocoketʼtaea. 
1Kings14:23 Ona chaḍa onko do ako lạgitʼ mitʼke mitʼ usul burure ar mitʼke mitʼ dare buṭạkore than boṭkocʼko benaokeda ar sonot dhiri ar Asera muṭhạnko benao joṅana. 
1Kings14:24 Onkoakʼ disạmre do herel kusumbi hõko tahẽkana. Ar okoe jạtrenko Probhu Isor do Israelko samaṅ khone sạṅgiń giḍiletʼko onkoakʼ sanam hirkhạwanakʼ kạmiko do Jihudạren hoṛko kạmikan tahẽkana. 
1Kings14:25 Rehobiamakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽakʼ bochorre Misorren Sisak raj do Jerusaleme akromonkeda. 
1Kings14:26 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam dhon-duribkoe luṭ idikeda. Uni do sanamakʼgeye idikeda, uni do Solomone benao ocoletʼ sona reakʼ ḍhalko hõe luṭ idikeda." 
1Kings14:27 Onate Rehobiam raj do onako bodolte rupạ reakʼ ḍhalkoe benao ocokeda. Ar raj dolan reakʼ duạr ṭhen okoe lạṛhại phạdko horhoyetʼ tahẽkan onkoren senaputi ṭhen onako rukhiyại lạgitʼ bhare emkeda. 
1Kings14:28 Raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte tinreye bolokʼkan tahẽkana unre Pahradarkoren lạṛhại phạdko do onako ḍhal sapʼkate uni sãoteko calakʼkan tahẽkana ar tayomte pahra oṛakʼre arhõko dohokakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Kings14:29 Rehobiamakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi, metakʼme uni okakoe cekayetʼ tahẽkan ona joto do “Jihudikoren rajkoakʼ Itihãs reakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
1Kings14:30 Rehobiam ar Jerobiam talare do jaoge lạṛhại hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings14:31 Tayomte Rehobiam do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar Dạud nagrahareko topakadea. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Nama; uni do mitʼṭen Amoni jạtren maejiue tahẽkana. Rehobiam tayom do acʼren hopon Abiam uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
1Kings15:1 Nobaṭren hopon Jerobiamakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Abiạm do Jihudạren raje hoyena. 
1Kings15:2 Uni do Jerusalemre pe bochore rajlena. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Maka; uni do Abisalomren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
1Kings15:3 Abiamren apattetʼ okakoe kạiletʼ uni hõ onako kạmigeye ehopʼena. Uniren hapṛam Dạud leka uniyakʼ ontor do Probhu Isor secʼ purạte do baṅ tahẽkantaea. 
1Kings15:4 Enhõ Dạudakʼ katha disạite uniren Probhu Isor do Jerusalemre mitʼṭecʼ mạliye emena, metakʼme uniyakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hopone emena ar Jerusalem do ḍahao maraokʼ khone rukhiyạkeda," 
1Kings15:5 ente Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ ṭhikakʼ kan onage Dạud doe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Eken Uriạ hitti hoṛakʼ ghoṭna chaḍa uniyakʼ goṭa jionre Probhu Isorakʼ oka hukumge bae bemanotleda. 
1Kings15:6 Rehobiam ar Jerobiam talare okaṭakʼ lạṛhại ehopʼlen ona do Abiamakʼ jiwetʼ bhor tahẽkana. 
1Kings15:7 Abiamakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko, metakʼme uni okaṭakʼe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkan ona do “Jihudạ rajakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. Abiam ar Jerobiam talare do lạṛhại hoyokʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Kings15:8 Tayomte Abiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena, ar Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Asaye rajena." 
1Kings15:9 Israelkoren raj Jerobiamakʼ rajokʼ bargel bochor oktere Asa do Jihudạren raje hoyena. 
1Kings15:10 Uni do pongel mitʼ bochor hạbicʼ Jerusalemreye rajena. Uniren goṛomtetʼ buḍhiyakʼ ńutum do Maka tahẽkana. Uni do Abisalomren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
1Kings15:11 Uniren hapṛam Dạud leka Asa do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bhageakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. 
1Kings15:12 Uni do disạm khon herel mundil kusumbikoe laga ńirketʼkoa ar hapṛamkoren benao sanam boṅga muṭhạnko hõe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa. 
1Kings15:13 Uni do acʼren goṛomtetʼ buḍhi Maka hõ rạni hudạ khone ocokʼkedea, ente uni do hirkhạwạnicʼ Asera muṭhạne benaoleda. Ar Asa do ona muṭhạne makʼ rạputʼketʼte kedron soḍokʼre idikateye atar giḍikada." 
1Kings15:14 Uni do than boṭkocʼko bae marao utạrletʼre hõ jiwetʼ bhor Probhu Isorgeye botoradea. 
1Kings15:15 Uni ar acʼren apattetʼ okako sona-rupạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko Isor ńutumtekin begar doholetʼ uni do onako Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye ạgukeda. 
1Kings15:16 Asa ar Israelren Basa raj do jiwetʼ bhor ạkin talarekin lạṛhại kan tahẽkana. 
1Kings15:17 Israelren Basa raj do Jihudạren hoṛko upạrte senkate Rama nagraha do gaṛ lekae benao rakapʼkeda jemon Jihudạren raj Asa ṭhen okoe hõ aloko sen hecʼ daṛeakʼ. 
1Kings15:18 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ar apnarakʼ raj khajańci oṛakʼre okako sona ar rupạko tahẽkan onako sanamakʼe oḍokkeda. Onako do acʼren gutikoakʼ tite Aramren raj Benhadad ṭhene kolkeda. Benhadad do Tabrimonren hopon Hesbonren goṛomtetʼ koṛae tahẽkana. Uni do unre Damesekreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. Asa do uni ṭhene roṛgotʼkada," 
1Kings15:19 “Ińren ạpuń ar amren ạpum leka dela, alaṅ hõ mitʼṭecʼ laṅ bondobos laṅ bandhaoma. Iń do noako sona ar rupạko dan lekateń kolatʼmea. Am do ńitokʼ Israelren raj Basa sãote okaṭakʼ bondobos menakʼ ona baṛe rạpudme, enḍekhan uni do iń ṭhen khone ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
1Kings15:20 Asa rajakʼ kathate Benhadad doe rạjiyena ar Israelkoakʼ ato ar nagrahako upạrte acʼren subedarkoe kolketʼkoa. Uni do Ison, Dan, Abel-Betmaka ar goṭa Kinerot ar ona sãoteakʼ Napthali ṭoṭhae hatkeda." 
1Kings15:21 Ado Basa niạ kathae ańjomketʼ khan Rama nagraha kajakte benao rakab reakʼ kạmiye bondketʼte Tirsateye ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Kings15:22 Ona tayom Asa raj do Jihudạren sanamko cetanre hukume emkeda, ar okoe hõ bae badletʼkoa. Onate hoṛko do Ramare Basae beohar akatʼ dhiri ar sanam kaṭko idikeda. Ar Asa raj do onakote Benjạmin reakʼ Geba ar Mispa gaṛ lekae benaokeda." 
1Kings15:23 Asakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko, lạṛhạire jitạukʼ reakʼ katha, ar uni cetʼkoe cekaletʼ ar okako ato nãwãteye benao aroletʼ ona do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. Haṛam umerre Asa do jaṅgare mitʼṭecʼ rog ńamkedea." 
1Kings15:24 Tayomte Asa do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar acʼren hapṛam Dạudakʼ nagrahare acʼren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uni hopon Jehosaphet do uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
1Kings15:25 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochorre Jerobiamren hopon Nadab do Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do Israelko cetanre bar bochore rajlena. 
1Kings15:26 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kan onage uni doe kạmikan tahẽkana. Uni do acʼren apat lekae calakʼkan tahẽkana, metakʼme acʼren apat Israelko cetʼ lekae kại ocoletʼko onkage uni hõe kạmikeda." 
1Kings15:27 Isạkar gusṭiren Ạhiạren hopon Basa do Nadab upạrteye soṛojontrokeda. Nadab ar Israelko do tinre Philisṭikoakʼ Gibethonko gherao ạcurkeda unre Basa do Gibethonre Nadabe gocʼkedea. 
1Kings15:28 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre Basa do Nadabe gocʼkedea ar uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
1Kings15:29 Uni do raj hoykate Jerobiam gharońjren sanamkoe gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Siloren Ạhiạ nạbi hotete oka kathae roṛletʼ ona lekage Basa do Jerobiamakʼ gharońjren sanamkoe marao cabaketʼkoa. 
1Kings15:30 Niạ reakʼ karon do hoyena, Jerobiam do apnartetʼe kạileda ar Israelko hõe kại ocoletʼkoa ar onae onkaketʼte uni do Israelkoren Isorakʼ pite caṛhao ocoketʼtaea." 
1Kings15:31 Nadabakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko, metakʼme uni okakoe kạmiletʼ ona do “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol akana." 
1Kings15:32 Asa ar Israelkoren raj Basa do rajokʼ bhor lạṛhạitege kin tahẽyena. 
1Kings15:33 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre goṭa Israel disạm cetanre Ạhiạren hopon Basa do Tirsare rajokʼe ehopʼena. Uni do bargel pon bochore rajena. 
1Kings15:34 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Jerobiam lekageye calakʼkan tahẽkana, metakʼme Jerobiam cetʼleka Israelkoe kại ocoletʼko uni hõ onkageye kạmikeda." 
1Kings16:1 Unre Basa upạrte Hananiren hopon Jehu ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha sodorena," 
1Kings16:2 “E Basa, am do dhuṛi khoniń halaṅ rakapʼketʼmea ar Israelkoren mukhiyạń hoyoco akatʼmea. Menkhan am do Jerobiamakʼ hortegem taṛameda ar ińren Israel hoṛkom kại ocoyetʼkoa ar onkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte ińem bekusi ocoakadińạ." 
1Kings16:3 Onate am ar am bõsrenkoń maraopea. Ar am bõsrenko do Nabatren hopon Jerobiamren bõs lekań hoyocoya. 
1Kings16:4 Amren okoeko hoṛ nagrahareko gujukʼ onko do setakoko jomkoa ar ṭanḍire okoeko gujukʼ onko do cẽṛẽko jomkoa.” 
1Kings16:5 Basawakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ, uniyakʼ lạṛhạire jitạukʼ reakʼ ar uni okakoe ceka akatʼ ona do “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol akana." 
1Kings16:6 Tayomte Basa do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar Tirsareko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Ela do raje hoyena. 
1Kings16:7 Hananren hopon Jehu nạbi hotete Basa ar uniyakʼ bõsko upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorlena, ente Jerobiamakʼ bõsrenko leka uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan ona kạmikote Probhu Isore bekusi ocokedea ar Jerobiamakʼ bõskoe marao giḍikada." 
1Kings16:8 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ bargel turui bochor oktere Basaren hopon Ela do Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do Tirsare bar bochore rajlena. 
1Kings16:9 Simri ńutuman uniren mitʼṭen senaputi do uni upạrteye soṛojontroyetʼ tahẽkana. Elawakʼ tinạkʼ rãt gạḍiko tahẽkan onako reakʼ adha do Simri cetanre bhar tahẽkana. Ela do un jokhecʼ Arsawakʼ oṛakʼre bulokʼ lạgitʼ bubulakʼe ńuńukan tahẽkana. Arsa cetanre do Tirsa reakʼ raj dolanko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar tahẽkana. 
1Kings16:10 Jihudạren raj Asawakʼ rajokʼ bargel eaeyakʼ bochorre Simri do ona oṛakʼre bolokate Elae gocʼkedea. Ar ona tayom uni do Ela bodolte raje hoyena. 
1Kings16:11 Raj lekate siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ etohopʼrege Simri do Basa bõsren sanamkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Uniren gateko peṛako modre cele herel hoṛge jiwetʼ do bae doholetʼkoa. 
1Kings16:12 Jehu nạbi hotete Probhu Isor do Basa upạrte okae roṛletʼ onkage Simri do Basawakʼ bõsren sanamkoe marao giḍikatʼkoa. 
1Kings16:13 Inạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, Basa ar uniren hopon Ela do ạḍitetʼkin ghạṭleda, unkin do Israelko hõkin kại ocoletʼkoa. Unkin do boṅga murhutʼkote Israelren Probhu Isorkin khĩs ocoledea." 
1Kings16:14 Elawakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko, metakʼme uni okakoe kạmiletʼ ona do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
1Kings16:15 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ bargel eaeyakʼ bohcorre Simri do Tirsare eae din raje calaokeda. Ona jokhecʼ Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do Philisṭikoakʼ Gibethonko gherao akatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings16:16 Israelko do ḍerare tinreko ańjomkeda, Simri do raj upạrte soṛojontrokate uniye gocʼ akadea unre onko do enhilokʼge ḍerare maraṅ senaputi Omri do Israelren rajko bahalkedea." 
1Kings16:17 Unre Omri ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko do Gibethon khonko rakapʼ calaoente Tirsako gheraokeda. 
1Kings16:18 Simri do nagraha hatena menteye ńelketʼ khan raj doṅgolteye boloyena ar seṅgele lagaoada. Ar unre acʼ hõe lo gocʼena. 
1Kings16:19 Acʼakʼ kại iạtege uni doe gocʼena, ente Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. Uni do Jerobiam lekae senokʼkan tahẽkana, metakʼme Jerobiam Israelko cetʼ lekae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan uni hõ onkageye kạmikeda." 
1Kings16:20 Simriyakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko ar uniyakʼ hul reakʼ katha do “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
1Kings16:21 Inạ tayom Israelko do bar hạṭińteko hạṭińena. Onko modren adha do Ginetren hopon Tibni rajeko khojkeda ar eṭakʼ adhako do Omri rajeko khojkeda. 
1Kings16:22 Menkhan Omri secʼren hoṛ do Ginetren hopon Tibni secʼren hoṛko bhagaoketʼkoa. Ar onate Tibniye gocʼen khan Omrigeye rajena. 
1Kings16:23 Jihudạren raj Asakʼ rajokʼ pegel mitʼ bochorre Omri do Israelkoren raje hoyena. Uni do gelbar bochor raje tahẽkana, ona modre turui bochor do Tirsareye rajena." 
1Kings16:24 Uni do eaegel irạl keji rupạte Semer ṭhen khon Samariạ buruye kirińkeda ar buru coṭre mitʼṭecʼ nagrahae benaokeda ar bururen lahaten mạlik Semerakʼ ńutum lekage nagraha reakʼ ńutume dohokeda. 
1Kings16:25 Omri do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana ar uni lahate okoe rajko tahẽkan onko sanamko khon hõ uni do ḍhere kạiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings16:26 Uni do Nabatren hopon Jerobiam lekageye senokʼkan tahẽkana, metakʼme Jerobiam cetʼ leka Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan Omri hõ onkageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Onate Israelko do boṅga murhutʼ hotete akoren Probhu Isorko edre ocokedea." 
1Kings16:27 Omriyakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha ar lạṛhạire uniyakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
1Kings16:28 Tayomte Omri do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uni do Samariạreko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Ahabe rajena. 
1Kings16:29 Jihudạren raj Asawakʼ rajokʼ pegel irạl bochorre Omriren hopon Ahab do Israelkoren raje hoyena. Uni do bargel bar bochor Samariạ khon Israelko cetanreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings16:30 Omri hopon Ahab hõ Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạricʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana, uni lahare okoeko rajko tahẽkan onko sanamko khon hõ ḍher bạṛicʼakʼkoe kạmikan tahẽkana." 
1Kings16:31 Nabatren hopon Jerobiam okakoe kạiletʼ onako do thoṛawakʼgeye metakʼkan tahẽkana. Eken ona do baṅa, uni do Sidonkoren raj Et-bakʼalren hoponera Esebele baplakedea ar Bakʼ-al debota sewawaye ehopʼena." 
1Kings16:32 Uni do Samariạre Bakʼal debota lạgitʼ oka mundile benaoletʼ onḍe uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda. 
1Kings16:33 Uni do mitʼṭecʼ Asera muṭhạn hoe benaokeda ar ona lahare Israelren sanam rapajko Israelren Probhu Isor tinạkʼko bekusi ocolede uni do acʼakʼ kạmi hotete ona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiye bekusi ocokedea. 
1Kings16:34 Ahabakʼ oktere Bethelren Hiel do Jerikho nagraha arhõe benao ruạṛkeda. Nunren hopon Josuạ hotete Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka ona nagraha reakʼ rehetʼ gathao lạgitʼ Hielren maraṅicʼ hopon Abiramakʼ jiwi alae hoyentaea ar ona reakʼ phaṭok silpiń lagao lạgitʼ do uniren huḍińicʼ hopon Segub hõ jiwi emokʼ hoyentaea. 
1Kings17:1 Gilead reakʼ Tisbe atoren Eliạ do Ahabe metadea, “Iń okoeyiń sewawaekan Israelren uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isorre kiriạkateń meneda, iń ạuriń men hạbicʼ darakan bochorkore sisir hõ baṅ ńurokʼa, ar dakʼ hõ bae daga.”" 
1Kings17:2 Tayomte Probhu Isor do Eliạ metadea," 
1Kings17:3 “Niạ jaega bạgikate am do purub secʼ calakʼme ar jordan purub reakʼ Kirit soḍokʼ ṭhen oko hataṛkokʼme. 
1Kings17:4 Ar ona soḍokʼ reakʼ dakʼem ńũiya ar onḍe jomakʼ idiyam lạgitʼ iń do mitʼṭecʼ bhonḍa kạhũń ṭhik doho akadea.” 
1Kings17:5 Onate Probhu Isor do Eliạ okae metade tahẽkan onageye kạmikeda. Uni do Jordan purub reakʼ Kirit soḍokʼte senkateye tahẽyena. 
1Kings17:6 Ar bhonḍa kạhũ do setakʼ ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ piṭhạ ar jele idiaekan tahẽkana ar uni do ona soḍokʼ reakʼ dakʼe ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings17:7 Disạmre bae dakʼetʼ tahẽkante ona soḍokʼ reakʼ dakʼ hõ ańjetʼena. 
1Kings17:8 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha Eliạ ṭhen sodorena," 
1Kings17:9 “Ńitokʼ do Sidonren Sarephat ṭhen senkate tahenme. Onḍe iń do jomakʼ jogaṛam lạgitʼ mitʼṭen rạnḍi maejiu iń ṭhik doho akadea.” 
1Kings17:10 Ona iạte uni do Sarephatteye calaoena. Ar atote bolokʼ horreye seṭeren khan mitʼṭen rạnḍi maejiu sahan ńańam kane ńelkedea. Ar uni hohoadeteye metadea, “Ńũi lạgitʼ thoṛa dakʼem ạgu daṛekińạ?”" 
1Kings17:11 Maejiu do tinreye calakʼkan tahẽkana unre arhõ hohoadeteye metadea, “Dayakate iń lạgitʼ mitʼ kecakʼ piṭhạ hõ ạgu daraeme.”" 
1Kings17:12 Uni maejiue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, iń ṭhen do mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ hõ bạnukʼa. Hanḍhare eken mitʼ muṭ holoṅ ar cukạkʼre thoṛa sunum menakʼa. Iń do oṛakʼte idi lạgitʼ thoṛagan sahaniń halaṅeda; onate iń ar ińren hoponiń lạgitʼ thoṛa jomakʼ iń benaoa. Ar ona tayom do jom kateliń gujukʼa.”" 
1Kings17:13 Eliạ do uniye metadea, “Alom botorokʼa. Am okam menketʼ oṛakʼte senkate onage onkaeme. Menkhan amakʼ oka menakʼtam ona khon pạhilte iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍetʼḍetʼ piṭhạ benaokate nonḍe ạguạńme. Ar ona tayom do am ar amren hopon lạgitʼ benaome." 
1Kings17:14 Israelren Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, dakʼ ạuriye emokʼ hạbicʼ holoṅ reakʼ hanḍha ar sunum reakʼ cukạkʼ hõ baṅ khạlikʼa.”" 
1Kings17:15 Unre senkate uni do Eliạ lạgitʼ okae men ocolen onae tearkeda. Onate Eliạ ar uni maejiu ar uniren hopon do ḍher din hạbicʼko jomkeda. 
1Kings17:16 Eliạ hotete Probhu Isor oka kathae men ocolen onkage holoṅ reakʼ hanḍha ar sunum reakʼ cukakʼ do baṅ khạlilena. 
1Kings17:17 Thoṛa din tayom uni maejiuren hopon doe ruạyena. Ar ruạ kạhilte uni doe gocʼena. 
1Kings17:18 Maejiu do unre Eliại metadea, “E Isorren hoṛ, iń do cetʼ iń khuti akatʼtama? Am do cetʼ ińakʼ kại reakʼ katham disạ ocoyińte ińren hopon goje lạgitʼem hecʼakana?”" 
1Kings17:19 Eliại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Dini amren hopon iń ṭhen ạguiyem.” Uni do maejiuakʼ hobor khon uni hopontetʼe hataokedete oka oṛakʼre acʼe tahẽkan onḍeye idikedea ar acʼakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼkedea." 
1Kings17:20 Ona tayom Probhu Isor hohoadeteye metadea, “E Probhu, ińren Isor, iń okoeṭakʼ rạnḍi maejiuakʼ oṛakʼren tahenkan uniren hoponem gocʼ ocoakadete cedakʼ unire noa duk dom paṛao ocoyeda?”" 
1Kings17:21 Ona tayom uni do pe dhao gidrại taber loṭomkedete Probhu Isore hohowadea, “E Probhu ińren Isor, gidrạwakʼ jiwi baṛe ruạṛ kataeme.”" 
1Kings17:22 Probhu Isor do Eliạwakʼ kathae ańjomkeda ar ar uniren hopon do jiwiye ńam ruạṛkeda are jiwetʼ ruạṛena. 
1Kings17:23 Unre Eliạ do gidrại hoborkedete latar kandhateye pheḍkedea. Ona tayom uniren eṅgattetʼ ṭhene jimạkedeteye metadea, “Nũkʼũe ńeleme, amren hopon do jiwetʼge menaea.”" 
1Kings17:24 Uni maejiu do unre Eliại metadea, “Iń do ńitokʼ iń bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana am dom Isorren hoṛ kana, ar Probhu Isor am hotete okae men ona do sạrigea.”" 
1Kings18:1 Inạ ḍher din tayom, bae dakʼetʼ tahẽkan tesarakʼ bochorre Probhu Isor do Eliại metadea, “Do Ahab sãote ńapamokʼme. Ar iń do disạmre dakʼ iń kola.”" 
1Kings18:2 Onate Eliạ do Ahab sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. Unre Samariạre do maraṅ akal hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Kings18:3 Ahab do Obediạye hoho ạgukedea. Nui Obediạ cetanrege raj dolan ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do tahẽkana. Probhu Isor cetanre Obediạ do ạḍi pạtiạu tahẽkantaea. 
1Kings18:4 Isebel do tinre Probhu Isorren nạbikoe gocʼetʼko tahẽkana unre Obediạ do mitʼsae nạbiko mõṛẽgel mõṛẽgelkate barea danderreye oko doholetʼkoa. Uni do onko lạgitʼ jomakʼ ar dakʼ hõe bebostayetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings18:5 Obediại hecʼen khan Ahab do uniye metadea, “Am do disạm reakʼ sanam dakʼ jharna ar soḍokʼko ṭhen calakʼme. Hoedaṛeakʼa sadomko ar khaccorkoakʼ jiwi bańcaotako lạgitʼ thoṛa ghãskom ńam botecʼke. Onate aboren janwarko do gocʼ giḍikako baṅ lagao abona.”" 
1Kings18:6 Unkin do ńel ạcur lạgitʼ disạmkin hạṭińkeda. Ahab do mitʼ secʼe senena ar Obediạ do eṭakʼ secʼ. 
1Kings18:7 Obediạ do horteye calakʼkan tahẽkanre Eliạ sãoteye ńapamena. Obediạ do uniye ńel oromkede khan otre ombakʼkate joharadeteye menkeda, “E ińren mạlik Eliạ, sạrigem am kangea?”" 
1Kings18:8 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ iń kangeạń. Am do senkate amren kisạ̃ṛ baḍae ocoyem, Eliạ do nonḍe menaea.”" 
1Kings18:9 Obediạ doe menkeda, “Cetʼ iń ceka akatʼte, amren guti do gojeń lạgitʼ Ahabakʼ tirem jimạyediń kana?”" 
1Kings18:10 Amren jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń metamkana, nonkan jạtrenko se rajosṭiko bạnukʼa one okare ińren mạlik do am sendrame lạgitʼ hoṛ bae kol akatʼko. Onko jạtrenko se rajosṭire tinreko lạikeda onḍe do bạnuma unre uni do onkoe kiriạ ocoyetʼko tahẽkana, ar sạrige onko do bako sendra ńam daṛeakatʼmea." 
1Kings18:11 Ar ńitokʼ am do ińren mạlik ṭhen senkate memenem mitạń kana, Eliạ do nonḍe menaea mente." 
1Kings18:12 Ińiń bạgiyam khange Probhu Isorren Jiu do eṭakʼ jãhã secʼe idimea ar iń do bạń baḍae daṛeakʼa. Ar senkate Ahab iń lạiyae ar bae ńamme enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ giḍikạńạ. Menkhan huḍiń khonge amren guti do Probhu Isoriń botorae kana. 
1Kings18:13 Isebel do tinre Probhu Isorren nạbikoe gocʼ giḍiyetʼko tahẽkana unre ińiń ceka akatʼ reakʼ do cetʼ ińren mạlik bae ańjomakada? Probhu Isorren nạbiko modren mitʼsae hoṛ do mõṛẽgel mõṛẽgelkate barea danderreń oko doholetʼkoa ar onkoakʼ jomakʼ ar dakʼ hõń bebosta akokan tahẽkan. 
1Kings18:14 Am do ńitokʼ ińren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen senkate memenem mitạń kana, Eliạ nonḍe menaea mente. Uni doe gocʼ giḍikạńạ.”" 
1Kings18:15 Eliại menkeda, “Iń okoeyiń sewawae kan, metakʼme sanam daṛeanicʼ jiwetʼ Probhu Isorre kiriạkateń meneda, iń do khạṭige teheń do Ahab samaṅreń hạjirokʼa.”" 
1Kings18:16 Unre Obediạ do Ahab sãoteye ńapamente ona kathae lạiyadea ar Ahab do Eliạ sãote ńapamokʼe senena. 
1Kings18:17 Eliại ńelkede khan Ahabe menkeda, “Am kangeam, E Israelren jạnum?”" 
1Kings18:18 Eliại menkeda, “Iń do jạnum doń baṅkana, menkhan am ar ạpum bõsren hoṛge Israelren jạnum kanape. Ape do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bạgikate Bakʼal debotape sewawae kana." 
1Kings18:19 Ńitokʼ am do hoṛ kolkate Israelren sanamko Karmel burure iń ṭhen jarwakom. Ar Isebelakʼ ṭebilre Bakʼal debotaren okoe pon sae mõṛẽgel nạbi ar Aseraren pon sae nạbiko do jom ńu ocokom ar nonḍe ạgukom.” 
1Kings18:20 Unre Ahab do Israel reakʼ sanam jaegare khobore kolketʼte Karmel burure onko nạbikoe jarwaketʼkoa. 
1Kings18:21 Eliạ do hoṛko samaṅre senkateye menkeda, “Ar tinạkʼ din barea lạukạre lebetʼ akanpe tahena? Probhu doe Isorkan khan unige sewawaepe, ar Bakʼalgeye Isorkan khan enḍekhan unige sewawaepe.” Menkhan hoṛko do cetʼge bako roṛ ruạṛleda." 
1Kings18:22 Unre Eliạ do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isorren nạbiko modre eken ińge sarecʼ minạńa, menkhan Bakʼal debotaren nạbiko do pon sae tala menakʼkoa." 
1Kings18:23 Ńitokʼ barea ḍaṅgrakin ạgu ocokʼma. Unkin modre onko mitʼṭenko bachao joṅma ar getʼ khanḍa khunḍikate sahan cetanreko dohoyema, menkhan onare seṅgel do aloko lagaoakʼma. Ar iń hõ eṭagicʼ ḍaṅgrań getʼ khanḍa khunḍiyea ar sahan cetanreń dohoyea ar seṅgel hõ bạń lagaoakʼa." 
1Kings18:24 Ona tayom onko do akoren debotako hohoaea ar iń hõ Probhu Isoriń hohoaea. Ar jãhãege seṅgelteye roṛ ruạṛ abon uni kangeae Isor do.” Niạ katha ańjomkate sanamkoko menkeda, “Am do bhagegem menakada.”" 
1Kings18:25 Eliạ do Bakʼal debotaren nạbikoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra bachaokate getʼ khanḍa khunḍikate tear maṛaṅepe, ente ape do lekharepe ḍhergea. Ar ona tayom do aperen debota hohoaepe, menkhan seṅgel do alope lagaoakʼa.”" 
1Kings18:26 Okoeṭakʼ ḍaṅgra onkoko hataoan uniko getʼ khanḍa khunḍikedete mońjteko tearkedea. Ona tayom onko do setakʼ khon tikin hạbicʼ Bakʼal debotako hohoadea. Ar ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoaeko ehopʼena, “E Bakʼal debota, de roṛ ruạṛaleme baṛe.” Menkhan cetʼ roṛ ruạṛge bako ńamleda. Ar onko do pinḍko beṛahaete enejokʼko ehopʼena." 
1Kings18:27 Tikin okte Eliạ do siṛogate onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoaepe, uni doe debota kana. Pasecʼ uni doe ganḍonokʼ kana, hoedaṛeakʼa uni do icʼ joṅe sen akana, hoedaṛeakʼa uni do horre menaea. Hoedaṛeakʼa uni doe jạpitʼ akada, uni do berede hoyokʼtapea.”" 
1Kings18:28 Onate onko do arhõ ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoate memenko ehopʼena ar onkoakʼ niạm lekate hoṛmo khon mãyãm ạuriko oḍok hạbicʼ churikote getʼ cirạkʼ ar jạnumkote akoakʼ hoṛmo ghạlko ehopʼena. 
1Kings18:29 Onko do tikin khon tarasiń okte reakʼ janwar samaṅokʼ okte hạbicʼ boktaokʼtegeko tahẽyena. Menkhan jãhãn aṛaṅge bako ńamleda, ar cele hõ bae roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, ar mone hõ bae moneyatʼkoa." 
1Kings18:30 Unre Eliạ do sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń ṭhen hijukʼpe.” Onko do uni ṭhenko senena. Eliạ do Probhu Isorakʼ rạputʼ akan pinḍe jut arokeda." 
1Kings18:31 Uni do Jakobren hoponkoakʼ mimitʼ gusṭi lạgitʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼkate gel bar goṭecʼ dhiriye hataoana. Nui Jakobge Probhu Isore metade tahẽkana, “Amakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Israel.”" 
1Kings18:32 Ona dhirikote Eliạ do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar ona beṛhaeteye ghaḍlakʼ ạcurkeda one onare gelbar keji itạ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhuli bạisạu daṛekokʼ. 
1Kings18:33 Ona tayom uni do pinḍ cetanre sahan sajaokate ḍaṅgrae getʼ khanḍa khunḍikedete sahan cetanreye dohokeda ar onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ponea kanḍate dakʼ ạguipe ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jel ar sahan cetanre dulpe.”" 
1Kings18:34 Ona tayom uni doe metatʼkoa, “Arhõ dulpe.” Arko onkakeda. Uni doe hukumkeda, “Tesar dhao arhõ onkaepe.” Onko do tesar dhao hõko onkakeda." 
1Kings18:35 Unre pinḍ cetan khon dakʼ do beṛhaete ạtuyente pinḍ beṛhaeteakʼ nala do perecʼena. 
1Kings18:36 Ado ạyubokʼ okte Eliạ nạbi doe hecʼena are koekeda, “E Probhu, Abraham, Isahak ar Israelren Isor, teheń am do baḍae ocokom, Israelkoren Isor dom am kangea ar iń do amren guti kạnạń, ar amakʼ hukumtege noako doń kạmikana." 
1Kings18:37 E Probhu Isor roṛ ruạṛạńme baṛe, jemon noko hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼ, am kangeam Isor do ar amge onkoakʼ monem ạcur ruạṛ akatʼ takoa.”" 
1Kings18:38 Unre coṭ khon Probhu Isorakʼ seṅgel do pheḍ hecʼente samaṅakʼ jelko, sahanko, dhiriko ar hasakoe jomkeda ar nala reakʼ dakʼ hõe jal ańjetʼkeda." 
1Kings18:39 Noa ńelte sanam hoṛ do otre taberente ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoateko menkeda, “Probhu kangeae Isor do, Probhu kangeae Isor do.”" 
1Kings18:40 Unre Eliạ do noae hukumkeda, “Bakʼal debotaren nạbiko sapʼkope. Onkoren mitʼ hoṛ hõ alope paskao ocokoa.” Unre hoṛko do onkoko sapʼketʼkoa. Ar Eliạ do Kisạn soḍokʼte idikate onkoe gocʼketʼkoa." 
1Kings18:41 Ona tayom Eliạ do Ahabe metadea, “Am do senkate jom ńũiyme, ente dakʼ reakʼ saḍe do botorge ańjomokʼ kana.”" 
1Kings18:42 Onate Ahab do jom ńũi lạgitʼe senena, menkhan Eliạ do Karmel buruteye rakapʼena. Uni doe ikhṛumente banar gunṭhikinre mẽtʼãhãe dohoketʼtaea." 
1Kings18:43 Ona tayom acʼren gutiye metadea, “Am do senkate doreão secʼ beṅged me.” Uni do senente ńelkateye menkeda, “Onḍe do cetʼge baṅ ńelokʼkana.” Nonkage Eliạ do eae dhao senkate ńeńele metadea." 
1Kings18:44 Eae dhaore guti do hecʼkateye menkeda, “Manwawakʼ ti leka mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń rimil do doreão khon rakapʼ hijukʼ kana. Unre Eliạ do uniye metadea, “Am do senkate Ahab metaeme jemon acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiko joṛaokateye senjoṅ, ar baṅkhan dakʼ iạte bae sen daṛeakʼa.”" 
1Kings18:45 Inạkʼtege rimil do dhundena, hoe hõ rakapʼ hecʼena ar ạḍi ãṭe dakʼkeda. Ahab do rãt gạḍite Jisreyelteye mohnḍayena." 
1Kings18:46 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ daṛe do Eliạ cetanre hecʼena. Uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼko ḍanḍareye rebetʼketʼte Ahab lahate Jesreyelteye ńir calaoena. 
1Kings19:1 Eliạ okakoe cekaketʼ ar cetʼleka nạbikoe gocʼketʼko Ahab do ona sanamakʼ Isebele lạiyadea. 
1Kings19:2 Ar Isebel do sanam katha ańjomkate hoṛ kolkate Eliạ ṭhene roṛ gotʼkada, “Gapa niạ okte bhitrite amakʼ jiwi onko hoṛkoakʼ leka bạń hoyocoe enḍekhan debotako jemon sạjạiko emạń ar ona do ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạige.”" 
1Kings19:3 Noa iạte Eliạ do botor caṛhaoadete jiwi bańcaotae lạgitʼe dạṛkeda. Uni do Jihudạ ṭoṭha reakʼ Ber-sebate seṭerkate acʼren guti do onḍegeye bạgi oṭowadea," 
1Kings19:4 Menkhan acʼ do hahaṅkar talate mitʼ din reakʼ horteye laha idiyena. Ar onḍe mitʼṭecʼ rothem jhạuạ latarre duṛupʼkate gujukʼ lạgitʼe koekeda. Uni doe menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ḍherge hoyakana. Nitokʼ do ińakʼ jiwi baṛe hataotińme; ente ińren hapṛamko khon mońj do bạnuńa.”" 
1Kings19:5 Inạ tayom uni do ona jhạuạ latarre giticʼenteye jạpitʼkeda. Ona jokhecʼ mitʼṭen serma goḍet do uni joṭetʼkedeteye metadea, “Ma beretʼme, ar jomme.”" 
1Kings19:6 Uni doe beṅgetʼketʼ khan acʼakʼ bohokʼ secʼre dhipạu akan dhirire rapakʼ akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ piṭhạ ar cukạkʼre dakʼe ńel ńamkeda. Ar ona jom baṛakate uni do arhõe giticʼ ruạṛena. 
1Kings19:7 Probhu Isorren goḍet do dosar dhao arhõ hecʼkate joṭetʼ kedeteye metadea, “Ma beretʼme, ar jomme, ente unạkʼ jeleń hor calakʼ reakʼ daṛe do bạnukʼtama.”" 
1Kings19:8 Onate uni do beretʼkateye jomkeda. Ar ona jomkateye daṛeyente uni do pongel siń pongel ńindạ taṛamate Isorakʼ Horeb buruteye seṭerena. 
1Kings19:9 Ar onḍe mitʼṭecʼ danderreye giticʼ aṅgayena. Onḍe Probhu Isor do Eliạ ṭhen seṭerenteye kulikedea, “E Eliạ, nonḍe do cetʼem ceka kana?”" 
1Kings19:10 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor do jemon acʼakʼ paona bhotiye ńam onate ạḍiń gagojokʼ kana, ente Israelko do amakʼ teṅgoakʼ bondobosko bạgi akawada, ar amakʼ pinḍkoko rạputʼ giḍi akada ar amren nạbikoko gocʼ akatʼkoa. Ar iń eskarge sarecʼ minạńa ar nitokʼ do ińhõ gojeń reakʼko kurumuṭu kana.”" 
1Kings19:11 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Am do oḍok hecʼkate buru coṭre iń samaṅre teṅgokʼme.” Un jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do onkateye parom calakʼkan tahẽkana, ar uni samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ daṛeanakʼ hoe do burukoe oṛecʼketʼte bar hạṭińena ar sanam dhiriko do rạputʼ gejerena, menkhan ona hoere Probhu Isor do bae tahẽkana. Ar ona hoe tayom do dhạrti laṛaoena, menkhan onare hõ Probhu Isor do bae tahẽkana." 
1Kings19:12 Dhạrti laṛao tayom do seṅgel ńelena, menkhan ona seṅgel talare hõ Probhu Isor do bae tahẽkana. Ona seṅgel tayom do khae khoe leka sabad ańjomena." 
1Kings19:13 Ar Eliạ do ona ańjomkate acʼakʼ oyonakʼte mẽtʼãhãe betʼketʼtaea ar bahrete senkate dander reakʼ moca ṭhene teṅgoyena. Ona tayom uni do niạ kathae ańjomkeda, “E Eliạ, nonḍe do cetʼem ceka kana?”" 
1Kings19:14 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor do jemon acʼakʼ paona bhoktiye ńam onate iń do ạḍiń gagojokʼ kana, ente Israelko do amakʼ teṅgoakʼ bondobosko bạgi akawada, ar amakʼ pinḍkoko rạputʼ giḍi akada ar amren nạbikoko gocʼ akatʼkoa. Eken iń eskarge sarecʼ minạńa ar ńitokʼ do iń hõ gojeń reakʼko kurumuṭu kana.”" 
1Kings19:15 Unre Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Oka hortem hecʼakan ona hortege ruạṛ senkate Damesek reakʼ hahaṅkarte calakʼme. Ar onḍe seṭerkate Hasayel do Aramren raj mentem ojokʼ bahalea." 
1Kings19:16 Ona chaḍa Nimsiren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Jehu do Israelren raj mentem ojokʼ bahalea, ar amakʼ hudạre nạbi hoyokʼ lạgitʼ do Abel Meholaren Saphat hopon Elisayem ojogea." 
1Kings19:17 Ar Hasayelakʼ tarwaṛe khon jãhãegeko paskaokʼ onko do Jehu hoteteko gujukʼa ar Jehuwakʼ tarwaṛe khon okoeko paskaokʼ onko do Elisa hoteteko gujukʼa. 
1Kings19:18 Menkhan iń do Israelren eae hajar herel hoponkoń sarecʼ doho akawana, okoe do Bakʼal-deb ṭhen bako ikhṛum akan ar cokʼ hõ bako cokʼ akawade.”" 
1Kings19:19 Tayomte Eliạ do onḍe khone oḍok calaoente Saphatren hopon Elisa sãoteye ńapamena. Uni do gelbar joṛa ḍaṅgrawante jumiye cacas kan tahẽkana ar uni do siyokʼ jokhecʼ tayom utạrakʼ nahelreye tahẽkana. Ar Eliạ do uni ṭhen senkate acʼakʼ oyonakʼ bocʼkate uniye lade oṭoadea. 
1Kings19:20 Unre Elisae do acʼren ḍaṅgrakin bạgi oṭokate Eliạ tayom tayomteye ḍạṛ idikeda. Ar Elisaeye menkeda, “Nehõrokʼ kạnạń, ińren go-baba tạkin baṛe cokʼ maṛaṅ ocoạńme. Ar ona tayom do am sãoteń senokʼa.” Eliại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Do calakʼme, menkhan disạime, noa do Isorakʼ kạmikana.”" 
1Kings19:21 Onate Elisa do uni bạgikateye ruạṛ calaoena. Uni do acʼren ḍaṅgrae gurketʼ kinạ ar nahel kaṭte jele isinketʼte hoṛkoe ematʼkoa ar onko do onako jomkeda. Ar ona tayom do Eliạ sãote calakʼ lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena ar uniren sapʼ dapʼicʼe hoyena. 
1Kings20:1 Aramren raj Benhadad do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkoa. Uni do pegel bar rapajko ar ạḍi utạr sadomko ar rãt gạḍiko soṅgekate Samariạ akromon lạgitʼe gherao ạcurkeda. 
1Kings20:2 Uni do thoṛa hoṛko nagrahateye kolkatʼkote Israelren Ahab raj niạ kathae baḍae ocokedea, “Benhadade meneda," 
1Kings20:3 ‘amakʼ sona ar rupạ do ińakʼ kana, ar amren napae napae bạhuko ar gidrạko hõ ińren kanako.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Israelren raj doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińiń meneda, ińren mạlik maharaj, am okam menetʼ ona do ṭhikgea. Iń ar ińakʼ jotowakʼge amakʼ kangea.”" 
1Kings20:5 Tayomte onko hoṛ do Ahab ṭhen arhõ ruạṛ hecʼenteko menkeda, “Benhadade meneda, ‘amakʼ sona ar rupạ, bạhuko ar gidrạko emạń lạgitʼ iń do hoṛ iń kolletʼkoa." 
1Kings20:6 Menkhan gapa niạ oktere ińren gutiko am ṭheniń kolkoa. Onko do amakʼ raj oṛakʼ ar amren gutikoakʼ oṛakʼreko sendraea ar okako jinis do amakʼ mẽtʼre damanakʼ kan ona jotoko ạgu daraea.’ ” 
1Kings20:7 Unre Israelren raj do disạmren sanam murubbiko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ńelpe, nui hoṛ do bạṛicʼ lạgitʼe kurumuṭukana, ente uni do ińren erako gidrạko ar sona-rupạkoń emae lạgitʼe dạbiyetʼ kana ar iń hõ ona emae reakʼ iń hẽkʼ akawadea.”" 
1Kings20:8 Unre murubbiko ar sanam hoṛko menkeda, “Uniyakʼ katha do alom ańjomtaea ar oka dạbiteakʼ hõ alom manaotaea.”" 
1Kings20:9 Onate Ahab do Benhadadren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren mạlik maharajpe metaea, uniyakʼ pạhil dạbiteakʼ lekate jotowakʼgeń kạmiya, menkhan dosarakʼ dạbiteakʼ do bạń purun daṛeataea.” Ar hoṛko do onage Benhadadko lạiyadea." 
1Kings20:10 Benhadad do unre Ahab ṭhen niạ sombate kolkeda, “Ińren sanam hoṛko mimitʼ muṭkate emako leka dhuṛi hõ jodi Samariạre tahentam enḍekhan debotako do ińko sạjạyińma ar ona do ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạige.”" 
1Kings20:11 Israelren raje menkeda, “Unipe metawaea, ‘okoe hoṛ tarwaṛeante ńit hõ lạṛhạire bae pheḍakan uni do lạṛhạire jitạukate ruạṛ hecʼakan hoṛ leka aloe phulạukʼ ma.’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Benhadad ṭhen niạ khobor tinre seṭerena unre uni ar eṭakʼ rajko do tạmbure bubulakʼko ńuńukan tahẽkana. Uni do acʼren hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Jhãp em lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe.” Onate onko do nagraha akromon lạgitʼko sapṛaoena." 
1Kings20:13 Inạ okte Israelren Ahab raj ṭhen mitʼṭen nạbi hoṛ do hecʼkate niạ kathae lạikeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘am do cetʼ onko maraṅ lạṛhại phạdkom ńeletʼko kangea? Iń do teheńge amakʼ tire onkoń jimạkoa ar onatem baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabe kuliyana, “Menkhan okoe hotete uni doe onkaea?” Nạbi doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ṭoṭharen disạm cakʼlaoko tabere okoe lạṛhại juạnko menakʼko onkoge onako onkaea.” Ahabe kuliyana, “Lạṛhại do okoeye ehopʼ lahaya?” Nạbiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amgem ehopʼ lahaya.”" 
1Kings20:15 Ahab do niạ katha ańjomkate eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạm cakʼlaoko taberen lạṛhại juạnkoe jarwaketʼkoa. Onate onko do barsae pegel bar hoṛko hoyena. Ar ona tayom uni do Israelren sanam lạṛhại phạdko mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼko khan onko do eae hajar lạṛhại phạdko hoyena. 
1Kings20:16 Onko do tikin okteko oḍok hecʼena. Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ṭoṭharen disạm cakʼlaokoren onko lạṛhại juạnkoge pạhilteko oḍok calaoena. Benhadad ar uni sãoten pegel bar rapajko do ńu bulkatere hõ bubulakʼko ńuńukan tahẽkana. Ona jokhecʼ Benhadad do khoj khobor hatao lạgitʼ okoe hoṛkoe kolletʼko onko do uniko metadea, “Samariạ khon hoṛko oḍok hijukʼ kana.”" 
1Kings20:17  
1Kings20:18 Uni doe menkeda, “Sulukokʼ lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼakanre hõ jiwetʼtepe sapʼkoa, ar lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼakanre hõ jiwetʼtepe sapʼkoa.”" 
1Kings20:19 Ar inạkʼtege onko lạṛhại juạnko do ako tayomreko tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdante akromonko ehopʼena. 
1Kings20:20 Ar mitʼke mitʼ tạkicʼ daram hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Ona ńelte Aramrenko doko dạṛkeda ar Israelko do onkoko khudạu idiketʼkoa. Menkhan Aramren raj Benhadad do acʼren adom aswariko soṅgekate sadomre decʼkateye dạṛkeda. 
1Kings20:21 Israelren raj doe laha idiyente sarecʼ sadomko ar rãt gạḍikoe maraoketʼtakoa ar Aramrenkoakʼ ạḍiye loksanketʼ takoa. 
1Kings20:22 Tayomte uni nạbi do Israelren raj ṭhen hecʼkateye menkeda, “Amakʼ daṛe do ḍhertam ar cetʼ cekae hoyokʼtama ona hudisokʼme, ente Aramren raj do kalom arhõe akromonmea.”" 
1Kings20:23 Aram rajren gutiko hõ niạ sopolha rajko emadea, “Onkoren debotako do bururen debota kanako, onate onko do abo khon hõko daṛegea. Menkhan onko sãote bilạn ṭạnḍire bon lạṛhại enḍekhan khạṭige onko do bon bhagao daṛeakoa." 
1Kings20:24 Am do mitʼṭecʼ kạmime. Rapajko ocokʼkate onkoakʼ jaegare subedarko bahalkom. 
1Kings20:25 Ona chaḍa okoe lạṛhại phạdko gocʼentam onkage arhõ lạṛhại phạdko benao rakapʼkom, sadom bodolte sadom ar rãt gạḍi bodolte rãt gạḍi. Enḍekhan abo do bilạn ṭạnḍire Israelko sãote lạṛhạire bon jitạukʼa. Ar unre khạṭige onko khon do daṛeanko bon hoyokʼa.” Uni do onkoakʼ kathateye rạjiyena ar onka lekae kạmikeda." 
1Kings20:26 Dosar bochor Benhadad do Aramrenkoe jarwaketʼkote Israelko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ Aphekteye rakapʼ calaoena. 
1Kings20:27 Ar Israelko hõko jarwayena. Ar onkoakʼ jomakʼko reakʼ bebosta hoyen khan onko do Aramrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena. Ar Aramrenko samaṅreko ḍerayena. Unre onko ńelte ako do barea huḍiń merom palren lekako hudisena, ente Aramrenko do goṭa disạmko chạplạu esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings20:28 Unre Isorren mitʼ hoṛ do hecʼkate Israelren raje metadea, “Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Aramrenko doko hudiseda Probhu Isor doe bururen Isor kana, bilạn ṭạnḍiren doe baṅkana; ona iạte iń do onko maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko amakʼ tireń jimạkoa, ar nonkatepe baḍae daṛeakʼa je, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Eae din hạbicʼ onko do mohnḍa muhnḍi ḍera akangeko tahẽyena. Ar eae din hilokʼre onko do lạṛhạiko ehopʼena. Ar Israelko do mitʼ dinre mitʼ lakh Aramren lạṛhại phạdkoko gocʼketʼkoa. 
1Kings20:30 Ar sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko do Aphekteko dạṛkeda ar onḍe onkoren bargel eae hajar lạṛhại phạdko cetanre bhit dasao ńurena. Ar Benhadad do onḍeye dạṛketʼte oṛakʼ bhitri reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kandhareye okoyena. 
1Kings20:31 Benhadadren kạmiyạko do uniko metadea, “Ńelme, alele ańjomakada Israelren rapajko do dayawanko kanako. Dela, abo do gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate ar bohokʼre baber reakʼ binḍi tolkate Israelren raj ṭhen bon calakʼa. Hoedaṛeakʼa uni do jomakʼte jiwiye rukhiyạitama.”" 
1Kings20:32 Onko do gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate ar bohokʼre baber reakʼ binḍi tolkate Israelren raj ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Amren guti Benhadade meneda, jemon dayakate jiwetʼem dohoye.” Raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni do cetʼ ńit hõ jiwetʼge menaea? Uni doe ińren boeha kana.”" 
1Kings20:33 Onko hoṛ do bhagegea menteko hudisketʼte usạrako mengotʼkeda, “Hẽ, Benhadad do khạṭige amren boeha kanae.” Raje menkeda, “Do senkate ạguiyepe.” Ado Benhadade oḍokʼ hecʼen khan Ahab do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍireye decʼkedea." 
1Kings20:34 Benhadade menkeda, “Amren ạpum ṭhen khon ińren ạpuń okako atoye hatakatʼ ona do amiń ruạṛama. Ińren ạpuń cetʼleka Samariạre bajarkoe bạisạuletʼ onkage amhõ Damesek reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jaegakore bajarkom bạisạu daṛeakʼa.” Ahabe menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ bondobos lekate am doń aṛakʼmea.” Ar noa menkate uni do Benhadad sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda are aṛakʼkadea." 
1Kings20:35 Probhu Isorakʼ hukumte cela-nạbiko modren mitʼ hoṛ do acʼren sãotenicʼe metadea, “Dayakate daleńme baṛe.” Menkhan uni hoṛ do bae rạjilena." 
1Kings20:36 Unre uni nạbiye menkeda, “Am do Probhu Isorakʼ katham bebataoketʼte iń ṭhen khonem calakʼ são sãote mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do ame gocʼmea.” Ar uni hoṛe calaoen torage mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do uni ńel ńamkedeteye gocʼkedea." 
1Kings20:37 Uni nạbi do ar mitʼ hoṛe ńamkedeteye metadea, “Dayakate daleńme.” Ar uni hoṛ do uniye dal ghạlkedea." 
1Kings20:38 Ona tayom uni nạbi do hor aṛere teṅgokate raj lạgitʼe koyokʼ hor akatʼ tahẽkana. Uni do acʼakʼ bohokʼe dạhṛiketʼtaete mẽtʼhãe danaṅketʼtaea ar acʼakʼ bhese bodolkeda. 
1Kings20:39 Ar raj do ona horteye calakʼkan tahẽkan jokhecʼ nạbi do raj hohoadeteye metadea, “Amren guti do lạṛhại talareń senlena. Unre mitʼṭen hoṛ do mitʼṭen bondi akade hoṛ ạgukedeteye metadińạ, ‘nui hoṛ horho hataṛeme. Are atʼlen khan uniyakʼ jiwi bodolte amakʼ jiwi calakʼtama, ar baṅ khan pegel are keji rupạ do juribana lekate emokʼ hoyokʼtama.’" 
1Kings20:40 Menkhan amren guti do kạmi reakʼ bhiṛreye tahẽkanre uni do okate coe calaoena.” Unre Israelren raje menkeda, “Ona sạjạige amre paṛaokʼa. Amakʼ mocatege ona dom menakada.”" 
1Kings20:41 Unre uni nạbi do usạra mẽtʼhãe ńel ocoyente bohokʼ khon kicricʼe ocokʼkeda ar Israelren raj do nạbiko modren mitʼhoṛ kanae menteye oromkedea. 
1Kings20:42 Uni nạbi do raje metadea, “Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘okoe do ḍahaokʼ maraokʼ reakʼ sarapiń emade tahẽkan am do unim aṛakʼkedea. Onate uniyakʼ jiwi bodolte amakʼ jiwi ar uniren hoṛko bodolte amren hoṛkoakʼ jiwi hataokʼa.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Onate Israelren rajakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mulinetaea ar edrete acʼakʼ raj dolan Samariạteye calaoena. 
1Kings21:1 Inạ tayom Jisriyelren Nabatakʼ darkha bagwan khạtirte mitʼṭecʼ ghoṭna hoyena. Niạ darkha bagwan do Jisriyelren Samariạ rajakʼ Ahabakʼ raj doṅgol aṛerege tahẽkana. 
1Kings21:2 Ahab do Nabate metadea, “Amakʼ darkha bagwan imạńme ona do sobji bagwaniń benaoa, ente ona do ińakʼ raj doṅgol aṛerege menakʼa. Ona bodolte iń do arhõ bhage darkha bagwaniń emama arem menkhan ona reakʼ ṭhik dam hõń emama.”" 
1Kings21:3 Menkhan Nabate roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ạpuń ar goṛomiń ṭhen khoniń ńamakatʼ sompotti amiń emam ona Probhu Isor do aloe hoyocoyma.”" 
1Kings21:4 “Ińren ạpuń ar goṛomiń ṭhen khon ńamakʼ sompotti do bạń em daṛeama.” Ahab do Jisriyelren Nabatakʼ niạ katha iạte acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhãe kurkunḍucʼketʼtaea ar oṛakʼteye calaoena. Uni do aṭetʼre eṭakʼ secʼ samaṅkateye giticʼ hapeyena ar cetʼhõ bae jom-ńũleda. 
1Kings21:5 Niạ ńelte acʼren bạhu Isebel do uniye kulikedea, “Cedakʼem mon duk akana? Cedakʼ bam jom ńũiyeda?”" 
1Kings21:6 Raj do uniye roṛ ruạṛadea, “Jisriyelren Nabatiń metade tahẽkana uniyakʼ darkha bagwan jemon iń ṭhene ạkhriń ar ona bodolte eṭakʼ mitʼṭecʼ darkha bagwan hõ emaeyiń menleda, menkhan uni do acʼakʼ ona darkha bagwan imạń bae rebenlena.”" 
1Kings21:7 Unre uniren bạhu Isebel doe menkeda, “Am do cetʼ Israelkoren raj dom baṅkana? Ma beretʼme, ar jom-ńũiyme, ar rạskạkʼme. Jisriyelren Nabatakʼ darkha bagwan do ińiń emama.”" 
1Kings21:8 Unre Isebel do Ahabakʼ ńutumte olakʼ ciṭhiko olkate ona cetanre Ahabakʼ chapkoe emada ar Nabat nagrahare girobasokʼ kan murubbiko ar lekman hoṛko ṭhene kolkeda. 
1Kings21:9 Uni do ona ciṭhireye olkeda, “Ape do upạs lạgitʼ lại sodorpe ar hoṛko talare Nabat do laha reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mońj utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire duṛupʼakʼpe emaea." 
1Kings21:10 Ar uni samaṅ reakʼ duṛupʼakʼ ṭhạ̃ire do barea bạṛicʼ hoṛpe duṛupʼkinạ. Unkin do niạ mente uni upạrte gohakin emma, uni do Isor ar raj upạrte bemanotakʼ kathae roṛ akada mente. Ar ona tayom onḍe khonpe or oḍokea ar dhiritepe tiń gojeya.”" 
1Kings21:11 Onate Nabatakʼ nagraharen murubbiko ar lekman hoṛ do Isebelakʼ olakʼ ciṭhi lekako kạmikeda. 
1Kings21:12 Onko do upạs reakʼko lại sodorketʼte Nabat do hoṛko talare mitʼṭecʼ mońj utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ireko durupʼkedea. 
1Kings21:13 Ar ona tayom barea dusṭami hoṛ do hecʼkate Nabat samaṅrekin duṛupʼente uni upạrte niạ gohakin emkeda, uni do Isor ar raj upạrte bemanotakʼ kathae roṛ akada. Ona tayom hoṛko do nagraha bahrete Nabatko or oḍok idikedete dhiriteko tiń gocʼkedea." 
1Kings21:14 Ona tayom onko mukhiyạko do Isebel ṭhen khoborko kolkeda, Nabat do dhiriteye tiń gocʼ ocoakana." 
1Kings21:15 Ar Nabat do dhiriteye tiń gocʼ ocoakana menteye ańjomketʼ khan Isebel do Ahabe metadea, “Do calakʼme, ar Jisriyelren Nabatakʼ darkha bagwan okaṭakʼ do am ṭhen ạkhriń bae menletʼ ona hatme. Ente uni do ar jiwetʼ do bạnuiya, uni doe gocʼena.”" 
1Kings21:16 Nabatakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ katha ańjomkate Ahab do darkha bagwan dokhol lạgitʼe senena. 
1Kings21:17 Unre Tisbiren Eliạ ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha sodorena," 
1Kings21:18 “Samariạre Israelren Ahab raj sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼme. Uni do ńitokʼ Nabatakʼ darkha bagwanre menaea. Uni do ona hatjoṅ lạgitʼ onḍeye sen akana. 
1Kings21:19 Unim metawea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘am do cetʼ mitʼṭen hoṛ gocʼkate uniyakʼ sompotti bam dokhol lạgidokʼ kana?’ Ona tayom unim metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Setako okare Nabatakʼ mãyãmko caṭokʼ jom akatʼ onḍege onko do amakʼ mãyãm, hẽ amakʼ mãyãm hõko caṭokʼ jomtama.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahab do niạ katha ańjomkate Eliại metadea, “E ińren bạiri, niạ dhao dom ńam akadińạ.” Eliại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, ńam akatʼmegeạń, ente Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan ona onkae lạgitʼge am dom kiriń akana." 
1Kings21:21 Onate Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do am cetanre muhinkoń ạguiya. Ariń marao giḍikama. Golamge cetʼ sạdhinge cetʼ am bõsren mitʼke mitʼ herel hoṛ doń marao cabakoa." 
1Kings21:22 Amren bõsko do Nabatren hopon Jerobiam ar Ahiạren hopon Basakʼ bõsren lekań hoyocoytakoa, ente am do ińakʼ pitem caṛhao ocoakatʼtińạ ar Israelkom kại ocoakatʼkoa." 
1Kings21:23 Ona chaḍa Isebel reaṅ hõń meneda, Jisriyel reakʼ bhit ṭhen uni do setako jomea." 
1Kings21:24 Amren okoeko hoṛ nagrahareko gujukʼ onko do seta ṭhenko jom ocokʼa ar okoe ṭạnḍireko gujukʼ onko do cẽṛẽko ṭhenko jom ocokʼa.’ ” 
1Kings21:25 Bạhuttetʼakʼ uskurte Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtre okaṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kan onage kạmi lạgitʼ Ahab doe ạkhriń ocoakan tahẽkana. Uni leka ar okoehõ nonka do bako kạmiakada. 
1Kings21:26 Israelko samaṅ khon Probhu Isor do okoe Amorikoe laga ńirletʼko onko leka boṅga murhutʼkoe pujạwakote bạṛicʼakʼe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings21:27 Ahab do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomkate acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea ar gõṛẽ kicricʼe horokʼketʼte upạse ehopʼena. Uni do gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼ kategeye giticʼkokʼ kan tahẽkana ar mạ̃hir monteye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana. 
1Kings21:28 Unre Probhu Isor do Tisberen Eliại metadea," 
1Kings21:29 “Ńeleme Ahab do iń samaṅre cetʼ lekae nindhạn akana! Uniye nindhạn akante uniyakʼ jionre niạ muhin do bạń ạguiya, menkhan uniren hoponakʼ jionre ar uniyakʼ bõsko cetanreń paṛao ocoya.”" 
1Kings22:1 Aram ar Israel talare pe bochor hạbicʼ jãhãn lạṛhạige baṅ hoylena. 
1Kings22:2 Tesar bochorre Jihudạren Jehosaphat raj do Israelren raj sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. 
1Kings22:3 Israelren raj do acʼren kạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Ramot Gilead je aboakʼkan ona do cetʼpe baḍaegea? Abo do Aramren raj ṭhen khon hatao ruạṛ lạgitʼ cetʼge babon ceka kana.”" 
1Kings22:4 Unre uni do Jehosaphate metadea, “Am do cetʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼ iń tulucʼ Ramot-Gileadtem calakʼa?” Jehosaphat do uniye metadea, “Ale ar ape dobon mitʼgea, ińren sadomko do amren hõ kanako.”" 
1Kings22:5 Jehosaphat do niạ katha hõe menkeda, “Pạhilte am do Probhu Isorakʼ solha hataome.”" 
1Kings22:6 Onate Israelren raj do nạbikoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ lekha do ponsae tahẽkana. Uni do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ramot-Gilead upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ iń oḍok calakʼa seyiń ikạkakʼa?” Onkoko menkeda, “Do calakʼme, ente Probhu Isor do rajakʼ tire onae jimạ akada.”" 
1Kings22:7 Menkhan Jehosaphate menkeda, “Nonḍe do cetʼ Probhu Isorren jãhãe nạbi bạnuiya one uni ṭhen bon kulijoṅ daṛeke?”" 
1Kings22:8 Israelren raj do Jihudạren Jehosaphat raje metadea, “Ńit hõ nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛ menaea one uni hotete Probhu Isor bon kuli daṛeke, menkhan uni doń kurudae kana, ente uni do ińakʼ bhạlại reakʼ katha do tishõ bae roṛ akada, bạṛicʼakʼgeye nạbiya. Uni doe hoyokʼkana Imlạ hopon Mikạ.” Jehosaphate roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Raj do jemon onkan katha aloe roṛ.”" 
1Kings22:9 Unre Israelren raj do acʼren mitʼṭen gutiye metadea, “Ńitge Imla hopon Mikạ nonḍe hoho ạguiyem.”" 
1Kings22:10 Israelren raj ar Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat do raj posak horokʼkate Samariạ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen guhum saphae khạrạire ạkinakʼ siṅghạsonre kin duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar sanam nạbiko do unkin samaṅre tayom daram dinko reakʼko nạbiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:11 Unre Kenanren hopon Sedekiạ do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ dereń benaokate noae roṛkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, Aramrenko ạuriko marao utạrokʼ hạbicʼ am do noatem rokʼ pạsirkoa.”" 
1Kings22:12 Eṭakʼ nạbiko hõ inạ kathageko menkeda. Onko doko menkeda, “Ramot-Gileadte rakapʼ calakʼme ar jitạukʼme, ente Probhu Isor do maharajakʼ tire onae jimạ akada.”" 
1Kings22:13 Ar okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do Mikạ hoho ạguiye lạgitʼe senlen uni do nạbiye metadea, “Ńelme, eṭakʼ nạbiko do jotoge rajakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ kathageko meneda. Ar amakʼ katha hõ onkoakʼ katha lekage baṛe hoyokʼ ma. Am do bhạlại reakʼ kathagem roṛa.”" 
1Kings22:14 Menkhan Mikại menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isorre kiriạkateń meneda, Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ memene mitạń eken onageń roṛa.”" 
1Kings22:15 Mikại hecʼen khan raj do uniye kulikedea, “E Mikạ, ale do cetʼ Ramot-Gilead upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼle rakapʼ calakʼa se baṅa?” Mikạ doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, do calakʼme, ar jhãp emkate jitạukʼme, ente Probhu Isor do amakʼ tiregeye jimạ akada.”" 
1Kings22:16 Raj do uniye metadea, “Ar tinạkʼ dhao iń kiriạ ocomea baṅma, Probhu Isor ńutumte sạriyakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼ hõ bam lạiyạńạ mente?”" 
1Kings22:17 Mikại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińiń ńelkeda, Israelko do gupiyicʼ begor bhiḍi leka buru cetanreko chirchạtur akana. Onate Probhu Isore meneda, ‘nokoren do cele mạlikge bạnukʼkotakoa, onate onko do sulukte apan ạpin oṛakʼteko senjoṅma.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Unre Israelren raj Jehosaphate menkeda, “Iń do cetʼ laharege bạń men akawatʼmea, uni do iń reaṅ bạṛicʼakʼ chaḍa bhạlại reakʼ katha do bae roṛa mente?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikạ do roroṛe ehopʼena, “Enḍekhan Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomme. Ińiń ńelkeda, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana ar uniyakʼ jojomsa ar uniyakʼ leṅgasa aṛere do sermaren sanam goḍetko menakʼkoa." 
1Kings22:20 Unre Probhu Isor doe menkeda, ‘Ramot-Gilead akromon lạgitʼ okoe Ahabe bulạu idiye uni do onḍegeye gujukʼa. Unre mimitʼ hoṛ do mimitʼ leka kathako menkeda." 
1Kings22:21 Mucạtʼre mitʼṭen jiu do hecʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, ‘uni do ińiń bulạu idiyea.’" 
1Kings22:22 Probhu Isor do uniye kulikedea, ‘cetʼ lekatem bulạuea?’ Uni doe menkeda, ‘iń do senkate uniren sanam nạbikoakʼ mocare eṛe roroṛ jiu iń hoyokʼa.’ Probhu Isore menkeda, ‘amge uni dom bulạu idi daṛeaea. Amge senkate onkaeme.’" 
1Kings22:23 Onate Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ amren noko nạbikoakʼ mocare eṛe katha roṛren jiue emakatʼkoa. Amakʼ ḍahao maraokʼ lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do am lạgitʼ bạṛicʼakʼgeye men akada.” 
1Kings22:24 Unre Kenanren hopon Sedekiạ do sen sorente johare Mikại thapakedeteye metadea, “Probhu Isorren jiu am tulucʼ katha roṛ lạgitʼ iń ṭhen khon oḍok kate oka horteye senlena?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am do enhilokʼgem baḍae daṛeakʼa one oka hilokʼ okokʼ lạgitʼ bhitri oṛakʼtem bolokʼa.”" 
1Kings22:26 Israelren raj do unre noa hukume emkeda, “Mikạ do nagraharen subedar Amon ar Joas ṭhen arhõ kol ruạṛkaepe." 
1Kings22:27 Arpe metakinạ raje men akada nui hoṛ do jemon hajotreye doho ocokʼ ar nirạite raj ạuriye ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ thoṛa dakʼ ar thoṛa piṭhạ chaḍa ar cetʼge jemon alo kin emae.” 
1Kings22:28 Unre Mikại menkeda, “Nirạitem ruạṛ hecʼlen khan baḍaeme iń hotete Probhu Isor do katha bae roṛakada.” Ona tayom uni do arhõe menkeda, “Ape sanamkoge ińakʼ katha ańjomkakʼpe.”" 
1Kings22:29 Inạ tayom Israelren raj ar Jihudạren Jehosaphat raj do Ramot Gilead akromon lạgitʼ kin senena. 
1Kings22:30 Ahab do Jehosaphate metadea, “Hoṛko jemon aloko orom daṛeạń onate iń do eṭakʼ sajokʼakʼ iń horoga ariń lạṛhạiya, menkhan am do amakʼ raj sajokʼakʼge horogme.” Ar niạ menkate Israelren raj do eṭakʼ sajokʼakʼ horokʼkate lạṛhại lạgitʼe senena." 
1Kings22:31 Ar Aramren raj do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiren pegel bar subedarko noae hukumatʼko tahẽkana, “Israelren raj chaḍa huḍiń ar maraṅ okoe sãotehõ alope lạṛhạiya.”" 
1Kings22:32 Onko rãt gạḍiren subedarko do Jehosaphat ńelteko hudiskeda, uni kangeae Israelkoren raj do. Onate onko do ạcurente uni akromone lạgitʼko senen khan Jehosaphat doe kikiạu gotʼkeda." 
1Kings22:33 Onate subedarkoko bujhạukeda, uni do Israelren raj doe baṅkana, onate ar bako khudạuledea." 
1Kings22:34 Menkhan mitʼṭen hoṛ do ạuṛige acʼakʼ sare aṛakʼketʼ khan ona do Israelren rajakʼ koṛamre bitʼena. Unre raj do acʼren rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoyicʼe metadea, “Rãt gạḍi ạcurkate lạṛhại tala khon oḍok idiyińme. Ente iń do ạḍiń ghạl akana.”" 
1Kings22:35 Goṭa dinge ạḍi botor lạṛhại hoyena ar Israelren raj do Aramrenko samaṅrege rãt gạḍire duṛupʼ akane tahẽyena. Ar uniyakʼ ona ghạl khon mãyãm ạtukʼ ehopʼente otre ńurokʼ ehopʼena ar ạyubokʼ jokhecʼ doe gocʼena. 
1Kings22:36 Ar siń cando hạsurokʼ jokhecʼ lạṛhại phạdko noa kathako lại ocoyena, “Ape mimitʼko do apan ạpin oṛakʼte ruạṛokʼpe.”" 
1Kings22:37 Nonkate Israelren raj doe gocʼena ar uni do Samariạteye ạgu ocoyena. Ar hoṛko do onḍegeko topakadea. 
1Kings22:38 Samariạ reakʼ pukhrire uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiko ạrupʼketʼtaea ar Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka setako do onḍe uniyakʼ mãyãmko caṭokʼ jomkeda ar kusumbiko do ona pukhrireko ḍạbrạyena. 
1Kings22:39 Ahabakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha, metakʼme uni okakoe cekaletʼ ona reakʼ kathako, hạti sonḍate rajakʼ okaṭakʼ oṛakʼe benaoletʼ ona reakʼ ar okako nagraha do gaṛ nagrahakoe hoyocoletʼ onako reakʼ katha do, “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
1Kings22:40 Ar Ahab do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoen khan uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Ahasiạ do raje hoyena. 
1Kings22:41 Israelren raj Ahabakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre Asaren hopon Jehosaphat do Jihudạren raje hoylena. 
1Kings22:42 Jehosaphat do pegel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar bargel mõṛẽ bochor hạbicʼ Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgat do Silhi hoponera Asubae tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:43 Jehosaphat do jotowakʼrege acʼren apattetʼakʼ hortegeye taṛametʼ tahẽkana, ar tishõ ona hor do bae bạgiyada. Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Menkhan than boṭkocʼko do bae marao utạrleda ar hoṛko do onḍe janwarko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhup hõko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Kings22:44 Ar uni do Israelren raj sãoteye bondobos akatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:45 Jehosaphatakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha ar lạṛhạire uniyakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ katha do, “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
1Kings22:46 Acʼren apat Asawakʼ rajokʼ tayom hõ okoe herel kusumbiko sarecʼko tahẽkan uni do disạm khon onkoe laga ńirletʼko tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:47 Ona jokhecʼ Edom disạmre do cele rajge bako tahẽkana. Mitʼṭen disạm mukhiyạge onḍe doe rajokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:48 Jehosaphat do Ophirte senkate sona ạgui lạgitʼ maraṅ maraṅ Tạrsis jahajkoe benaokeda, menkhan onako do ar baṅ senlena, ente Esion-Geberre rạputʼ gejerena." 
1Kings22:49 Unre Ahabren hopon Ahasiạ do Jehosaphate metadea, “Ińren hoṛko do amren hoṛko sãote jahajteko calakʼma.” Menkhan Jehosaphat do bae rạjilena." 
1Kings22:50 Tayomte Jehosaphat do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uni bodolte uniren hopon Jehoram do raje hoyena. 
1Kings22:51 Jihudạren raj Jehosaphatakʼ rajokʼ gel eaeyakʼ bochorre Ahabren hopon Ahasiạ do Samariạren raje hoyena. Uni do Israelko cetanre bar bochor raje tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:52 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do acʼren eṅgat apat ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam lekae senokʼkan tahẽkana. Jerobiam cetʼleka Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan Ahasiạ hõ onkageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Kings22:53 Uni do Bakʼal debotae sewawae kan tahẽkana ar acʼren apatʼ cetʼkoe cekaletʼ tahẽkan uni hõ onkage Israelren Probhu Isorre khĩs ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Kings1:1 Ahabe gocʼen tayom Moab disạmrenko do Israel upạrteko hulkeda. 
2Kings1:2 Ahasiạ do Samariạre acʼakʼ oṛakʼ cetan kandha reakʼ jalna khone ńuren iạteye ghạllena. Unre uni do mitʼbar hoṛ kolkate noa kathae roṛgotʼkada, “Ape do Ekronren debota Bakʼal-sebub ṭhen senkate kulijoṅpe, iń do niạ ghạl khoniń boge ruạṛokʼa se baṅa.”" 
2Kings1:3 Menkhan Probhu Isorren goḍet do Tisberen Eliại metadea, “Am do senkate Samariạren raje kol akatʼko hoṛko sãote ńapamkatem metakoa, ‘Israelre Isor do cetʼ bạnuiya, onate Ekronren debota Bakʼal-sebub ṭhen kulijoṅpe calakʼ kana?" 
2Kings1:4 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, okaṭakʼ aṭetʼrem giticʼ akan ona khon do ar bam beretʼ ruạṛ daṛeakʼa. Am do khạṭigem gujukʼa.’ ” Niạ menkate Eliạ doe calaoena." 
2Kings1:5 Ado onko hoṛ do raj ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼen khan uni doe kuliketʼkoa, “Cedakʼpe ruạṛ hecʼena?”" 
2Kings1:6 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Mitʼṭen hoṛ do ale sãote ńapamkateye metatʼlea, ‘okoe aleye kol akatʼle uni raj ṭhen ruạṛ senkate jemonle metae, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Israelre Isor do cetʼ bạnuiya, onate am do Ekronren debota Bakʼal-sebub ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼ hoṛem koletʼkoa? Onate am okaṭakʼ aṭetʼrem giticʼ akan ona khon do ar bam beretʼ ruạṛ daṛeakʼa. Am do khạṭigem gujukʼa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Raj do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ ape sãoteye ńapamen ar niạ kathae metatʼpe uni do ńelokʼte cetʼ lekan hoṛ kanae?”" 
2Kings1:8 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Uniyakʼ hoṛmo do upʼte perecʼ ar ḍanḍare do harta reakʼ totolakʼ menakʼtaea.” Raje menkeda, “Uni do Tisberen Eliạ kanae.”" 
2Kings1:9 Inạ tayom raj do mitʼṭen subedar ar uniren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdko Eliạ ṭhene kolkatʼkoa. Unre Eliạ do mitʼṭecʼ burureye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar uni subedar do Eliạ ṭhen rakapʼ senkateye menkeda, “E Isorren hoṛ, raj do pheḍ hijukʼe metamkana.”" 
2Kings1:10 Eliạ do roṛ ruạṛketʼte subedare metadea, “Isorren hoṛ kan khaniń enḍekhan serma khon seṅgel ńurokʼte am ar amren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdko jemone ḍahao maraoko.” Unre serma khon seṅgel ńurente uni subedar ar uniren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdkoe ḍahao maraoketʼkoa." 
2Kings1:11 Niạ katha ańjomkate raj do eṭagicʼ subedar ar uniren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdko Eliạ ṭhene kolketʼkoa. Uni subedar do Eliại metadea, “E Isorren hoṛ, raj do ńitge pheḍ hijukʼe metamkana.”" 
2Kings1:12 Eliại menkeda, “Isorren hoṛ kan khaniń enḍekhan serma khon seṅgel ńurokʼte am ar amren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdko jemone ḍahao maraoko.” Unre serma khon Isorakʼ seṅgel ńurente uni ar uniren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdkoe ḍahao maraoketʼkoa." 
2Kings1:13 Inạ tayom raj do armitʼṭen subedar ar uniren mõṛẽgel lạṛhại phạdkoe kolketʼkoa. Ar nui tesaricʼ subedar do cetante rakapʼkate Eliạ samaṅre ikhṛumente nehõrkateye menkeda, “E Isorren hoṛ, dayakate iń ar amren mõṛẽgel gutikoakʼ jiwi baṛe rukhiyại taleme." 
2Kings1:14 Ńelme, serma khon seṅgel ńurente lahaten banar subedar ar onkoren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoko ḍahao maraoena. Menkhan niạ dhao do ińakʼ jiwi rukhiyạitiń me.”" 
2Kings1:15 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do Eliại metadea, “Uni sãote pheḍ calakʼme, ar alom botoraea.” Onate Eliạ do uni sãote pheḍkate raj ṭhene senena." 
2Kings1:16 Uni do raje metadea, “Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Israelre cetʼ Isor do bạnuiya, onate Ekronren deboda Bakʼal-sebub ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼ hoṛem kolletʼkoa? Ar noam kạmi akatʼte am do aṭetʼ khon ar bam beretʼ ruạṛ daṛeakʼa. Khạṭigem gujukʼa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Eliạ hotete Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ kathae roṛketʼ ona lekage Ahasiạ doe gocʼena. Ahasiạren do cele hoponge bako tahẽkante uniyakʼ jaegare Jehorame rajena. Jihudạren raj Jehosaphatren hopon Jehoramakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochorre uni do raje hoylena. 
2Kings1:18 Ahasiạwakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ katha do, “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Kings2:1 Probhu Isor do tinre mitʼṭecʼ hoe bharḍo talate sermate Eliạ rakapʼ idiye menetʼ tahẽkana unre Eliạ ar Elisae do Gilgol khonkin oḍok hecʼena. 
2Kings2:2 Eliạ do Elisaye metadea, “Am do nonḍege tahẽ hataṛokʼme; Probhu Isor do Bethelte calakʼe menakawạdińa.” Elisae doe menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte ar amakʼ jiwi ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana am do bạń bạgiwama.” Onate unkin do Bethelte kin senena." 
2Kings2:3 Bethelren cela-nạbiko do Elisae ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Am do cetʼ bam baḍaea, Probhu Isor do teheń amren mạlik am ṭhen khone idiyea mente?” Elisaye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, baḍaegeạń. Ape do niạ babotre ar jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope roṛa.”" 
2Kings2:4 Inạ tayom Eliạ do uniye metadea, “Elisae, am do nonḍe tahẽ hataṛokʼme; Probhu Isor do Jerikhote calakʼe mitạńkana.” Elisaye menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte ar amre kiriạkateń meneda, iń do bạń bạgiwama.” Onate unkin do Jerikho tekin calaoena." 
2Kings2:5 Jerikhoren cela-nạbiko do Elisae ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Am do cetʼ bam baḍaea, Probhu Isor do teheń amren mạlik do am ṭhen khone idiyea mente?” Elisae roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, baḍaegeạń. Ar niạ babotre ape do ar jãhãnakʼ cetʼge alope roṛa.”" 
2Kings2:6 Inạ tayom Eliạ do uniye metadea, “Am do nonḍege tahẽ hataṛokʼme; Probhu Isor do jordan gaḍa hanasa parom calakʼe mitạńkana.” Uniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte ar amakʼ jiwi ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, iń do bạń bạgiwama.” Onate unkin do calakʼtege kin tahẽyena." 
2Kings2:7 Eliạ ar Elisae do jordan gaḍa aṛere senkate kin teṅgoyen khan unkin khon thoṛa sạṅgiń ńokʼre mõṛẽgel cela-nạbiko hõ hecʼkateko teṅgoyena. 
2Kings2:8 Eliạ do acʼakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ oyonakʼe lạṭumkeda ar onate jordan gaḍa dakʼe dalkeda. Onate dakʼ do bar hạṭińena ar unkin do rukhạṛge kin paromena. 
2Kings2:9 Arkin parom calaoen khan Eliạ do Elisaye metadea, “Lạiyạń me, am ṭhen khon ạuriń rakapʼ ocokʼre iń do am lạgitʼ cetʼ iń cekaea?” Elisaye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amakʼ jiu reakʼ dobṛa baṛe ińre paṛaokʼma.”" 
2Kings2:10 Eliại menkeda, “Am do mitʼṭecʼ muskilakʼgem koe akadińạ. Enhõ am ṭhen khoniń idi ocokʼre ińem ńel ńameń khan am do onam ńama; ar bam ńel ńameń khan do bam ńama.”" 
2Kings2:11 Unkin do galmarao tulucʼ kin calakʼkan tahẽkanre ackage mitʼṭen seṅgel reakʼ rãt gạḍi ar seṅgelren sadomko hecʼkate unkinko begarketʼ kinạ ar Eliạ do mitʼṭecʼ hoe bharḍo talate sermateye rakapʼ ocoyena. 
2Kings2:12 Elisae do ona ńelte ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “E ińren ạpuń, E ińren ạpuń, ńelme, Israelakʼ rãt gạḍi ar aswariko.” Inạ tayom Elisae do ar bae ńel ńamledea. Unre uni do acʼakʼ kicricʼe or cirạketʼtaea." 
2Kings2:13 Ona tayom Eliạwakʼ hoṛmo khon ńurakʼ oyonakʼe halaṅketʼte jordan gaḍa aṛereye teṅgoyena. 
2Kings2:14 Ar ona oyonakʼte uni do dakʼe dalketʼteye menkeda, “Eliạren Probhu Isor ńitokʼ do okare menama?” Are dalketʼ khan dakʼ do bar hạṭińena, ar rukhạṛgeye paromena." 
2Kings2:15 Jerikhoren okoe nạbiko onḍeko teṅgo akan tahẽkan onko do Elisae hijukʼko ńelkede khanko menkeda, “Eliạren jiu do Elisae cetanreye thamgạḍi akana.” Onko do Elisae sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼko senena ar otre ombakʼkate ḍobokʼ adeteko metadea," 
2Kings2:16 “Ale do amren mõṛẽgel daṛean gutiko nonḍe menakʼlea; ale do senkate amren mạlik le sendra ạguiyea. Hoedaṛeakʼa Probhu Isorren Jiu do uni rakapʼ idikate jãhãn buru se jãhãn soḍokʼreye doho oṭoakadea.” Elisae doe menkeda, “Baṅ, alope calakʼa.”" 
2Kings2:17 Menkhan onkoko jormoṭkede khan lajaoenteye metatʼkoa, “Ṭhikgea, Do calakʼpe.” Unre onko mõṛẽgel hoṛko do Eliạ sendraye lạgitʼko calaoena. Ar pe din hạbicʼko sendrakedea ar bako ńamledea." 
2Kings2:18 Unre Elisae do Jerikhoreye tahẽkana. Onko do Elisae ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼen khan onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń do cetʼ bạń manaletʼ pea?”" 
2Kings2:19 Mitʼdin ona nagraharen hoṛko do Elisaeko metadea, “E aleren mạlik, am mam ńeletʼkange niạ nagraha do sạrige napaegea, menkhan noa reakʼ dakʼ do baṅ bhagea ar ot iạte maejiukoakʼ hoṛmoren gidrạ hõko nosṭokʼ kana.”" 
2Kings2:20 Elisae menkeda, “Iń ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ nãwã cukạkʼ ạgukate onare thoṛa buluṅ dohoype.” Unre onko do uni ṭhen onako ạgukeda." 
2Kings2:21 Elisae do unre dakʼ reakʼ jharna ṭhen senkate onare buluṅe chiṭiạuatʼteye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do noa dakʼ iń bogekeda. Noa dakʼ do ar tisge baṅ gujukʼa ar gidrạko hõ bako nosṭokʼa.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 Elisaeakʼ katha leka teheń hạbicʼ ona dakʼ do mońjge menakʼa. 
2Kings2:23 Elisae do onḍe khon Bethelteye senena. Ar horte calakʼ jokhecʼ ạḍi utạr huḍiń koṛako do nagraha khonko oḍokʼ hecʼente uni siṛogadeteko metadea, “E ceḍe, ceḍe bohokʼ, ma rakapʼ calakʼme.”" 
2Kings2:24 Elisae do onko secʼ ạcurenteye beṅgetʼatʼkoa ar Probhu Isor ńutumteye sarapatʼkoa. Unre bir khon barea banakin oḍok hecʼente onko modren pongel bar goṭen koṛa kin khanḍa khunḍiketʼkoa. 
2Kings2:25 Inạ tayom uni do karmel buruteye senena ar onḍe khon Samariạreye ruạṛ senena. 
2Kings3:1 Jihudạren raj Jehosaphatakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Ahabren hopon Jehoram do Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do Samariạre tahẽkate gelbar bochor raje calaoketʼa. 
2Kings3:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana, tobe acʼren eṅgat ar apat leka do bae tahẽkana. Uniren apattetʼ Bakʼal debota sewawae lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ dhiri khunṭiye teṅgoletʼ tahẽkan ona dhiri khunṭi uni doe rạputʼ giḍiletʼa." 
2Kings3:3 Ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam Israelko cetʼ lekae kại ocoletʼko onkage Jehoram hõe kạmikeda. Ar ona khon do bae ruạṛlena. 
2Kings3:4 Moabren raj Misaren do ạḍi utạr bhiḍiko tahẽkantaea. Uni do khajna lekate mitʼ lakh bhiḍi hopon ar mitʼ lakh bhiḍi upʼ Israelren raje emaekan tahẽkana. 
2Kings3:5 Menkhan Ahab gujukʼ tayom Moabren raj do Israelren raj upạrteye hulkeda. 
2Kings3:6 Unre Jehoram raj do Samariạ khone oḍok hecʼente Israelren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkoa. 
2Kings3:7 Ona chaḍa Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat ṭhen hõ niạ sombate kolkeda je, “Moabren raj do iń upạrteye hul akada. Onate Moab upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ am do cetʼ iń tulucʼem calakʼa?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, am sãoteń calakʼa. Iń ar am dolaṅ alaṅ kangea, ińren sanamko doko amrenhõ kana, ińren sadomko hõ amren kangeako.”" 
2Kings3:8 Jehosaphat do noa hõe kuliyana, “Abo do oka horte bon rakapʼ calakʼa?” Jehorame roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Edom reakʼ hahaṅkar talate.”" 
2Kings3:9 Unre Jihudạren raj ar Edomren raj sãote Israelren raj hõe oḍok hecʼena. Onko do eae din hạbicʼ ạcur ạcurteko calaoena. Unre lạṛhại phạdkoren se onko sãoten janwarko lạgitʼ dakʼ do baṅ tahẽkana. 
2Kings3:10 Ona ńelte Israelren raje menkeda, “Hae, hae! Probhu Isor do Moabakʼ tire jimạ bon lạgitʼge cetʼ pea rapajko mitʼ sãoteye hohoakatʼ bona?”" 
2Kings3:11 Jehosaphate menkeda, “Nonḍe do cetʼ Probhu Isorren jãhãe nạbi bạnukʼkoa one uni hotete Probhu Isor bon kuli daṛeke?” Israel rajren mitʼṭen gutiye menkeda, “Nonḍe do Saphatren hopon Elisae menaea. Uni do Eliạren sapʼ dapʼicʼe tahẽkana.”" 
2Kings3:12 Jehosaphate menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ katha do uni ṭhen menakʼa.” Onate Israelren raj, Edomren raj ar Jehosaphat do Elisae ṭhenko senena." 
2Kings3:13 Elisae do Israelren raje metadea, “Am tulucʼ ińakʼ do cetʼ? Am do amren ạpum ar amren eṅgamren nạbiko ṭhen calakʼme.” Israelren raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa, bạń calakʼa, ente Moabakʼ tire jimạle lạgitʼ Isorge ale pepe rapajkoe jarwa mitʼ akatʼlea.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisaye menkeda, “Okoeyiń sewawae kan uni sanam daṛean jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat nonḍe bae tahẽlen khan iń do am secʼ beṅgetʼ hõ bạń beṅgetʼkea, ar mone ho bạń moneyam kea." 
2Kings3:15 Ńitokʼ do nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛ ạguiyepe okoe do peṛesaṅe banam daṛeakʼ.” Uni hoṛ do tinre peṛesaṅe banametʼ tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorakʼ daṛe do Elisae cetanre hecʼena. 
2Kings3:16 Ar Elisa doe menkeda, “Probhu Isor do niạ buru lodamre soḍokʼko benaoe metapekana, ente hoe se dakʼ bape ńel ńametʼkanre hõ niạ soḍokʼko do dakʼte perejokʼa ar dakʼpe ńama ar aperen ḍaṅgra-bhiḍiko ar eṭakʼ janwarko hõ dakʼko ńũiya." 
2Kings3:17  
2Kings3:18 Probhu Isor ṭhen noa do alga kạmikana. Ona chaḍa uni do Moab disạm hõ apeakʼ tireye jimạ akada. 
2Kings3:19 Ape do pạcrite esetʼ mitʼke mitʼ nagraha ar mitʼke mitʼ atokope marao utạra. Ar mimitʼ bhage darepe makʼ giḍikakʼa, dakʼ reakʼ sanam jharnakope bondkakʼa ar bhage bhage jumire dhirikope capatʼakʼa ar onape nosṭo giḍikakʼa.”" 
2Kings3:20 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ oktere Edom disạm secʼ khon dakʼ ạtu hecʼente disạm do dakʼte perecʼena. 
2Kings3:21 Inạkʼtege Moabrenko doko ańjomleda, onko pea rapajko do ako upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼakana. Onate onko do lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako sapʼ daṛeakʼ nonkan sanam herel hoṛko jarwaketʼkote disạm reakʼ simạreko thạrketʼkoa." 
2Kings3:22 Ar setakʼ jokhecʼ tinre jạpitʼ khonko beretʼena unre siń cando do dakʼreye jhalkaokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar Moabrenko ṭhen ona dakʼ do mãyãm leka ńelena. 
2Kings3:23 Onkoko menkeda, “Ona do mãyãm kana! Rapajko do khạṭige ako akogeko mapakʼ gopocʼ akana. E Moabrenko, dela, abo do senkate bon luṭ joṅa.”" 
2Kings3:24 Menkhan Moabrenko do tinre Israelkoakʼ ḍera ṭhenko senena unre Israelko doko oḍok hecʼena ar onko cetanre jhãpko emkeda ar Moabrenko doko dạṛkeda. Ar Israelko do Moabrenko gocʼ gocʼte onkoakʼ disạmteko boloyena. 
2Kings3:25 Onko do nagrahako ḍahao maraokeda ar bhage bhage hasakore dhiriko capatʼada. Onko do dakʼ reakʼ sanam jharnako bond oṭokada ar bhage darekoko makʼ giḍikada. Eken Kirhareset nagraha bako marao daṛeada, onate ginḍwạri cakʼpatʼko do ona nagrahako gheraokeda arko hatkeda." 
2Kings3:26 Moab raj do tinreye ńelkeda lạṛhạireko bhagao ocokʼkana unre uni do lạṛhại phạdko talate Edomren raj ṭhen senokʼ lạgitʼ acʼ sãote eae sae tarwaṛe cakʼlaokoe soṅgeketʼkoa, menkhan bae sen daṛeada." 
2Kings3:27 Unre uni do acʼren pạhil hopon, okoe do acʼ tayom raje hoykokʼ uni do nagraha reakʼ pạcri cetanre idikateye dãṛẽkedea ar seṅgelreye samaṅkedea. Uni do Israelko cetanre ạḍi ãṭe edreyena, ar Israelko doko uṭhạuente akoakʼ disạmteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Kings4:1 Ar cela-nạbiko modren mitʼṭen maejiu do ãṭ aṛaṅte Elisaeye metadea, “Amren guti ińren jãwãeye gocʼakan ona dom baḍaegea, uni do Probhu Isor botorae hoṛe tahẽkana. Menkhan ńitokʼ iń jãwãeren mitʼṭen paonadar do ińren hoponkin acʼren golame hoyocokine mente unkin idikin lạgitʼe hecʼakana.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisaeye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Cetʼ lekate am doń goṛo daṛekema? Lạiạńme oṛakʼre do cetʼ menakʼtama?” Maejiue menkeda, “Amren kạ̃ṛmĩyakʼ do eken thoṛagan sunum chaḍa ar cetʼge bạnukʼtaea.”" 
2Kings4:3 Elisaeye menkeda, “Am do senkate amren sanam peṛako ṭhen khon ạḍi utạr khạli bhajanko koe ạguiyme, menkhan thoṛa do alom ạguiya." 
2Kings4:4 Ona tayom am ar amren hoponkin ape do oṛakʼte bolokate duạrpe sińa. Ar ona tayom onako bhajanre sunumem dula ar mitʼṭecʼkate bhajan perecʼlen khan ona ocokʼkate eṭakʼ secʼrem dohoya.” 
2Kings4:5 Maejiu do unre uni ṭhen khon senkate hoponkin seletʼ oṛakʼte bolokate duạre sińkeda. Ar hoponkin do bhajan ạgukin ehopʼena ar uni do sunum dudule ehopʼena. 
2Kings4:6 Ado sanamakʼ bhajanko perecʼketʼ khan uni do acʼren mitʼṭen hopone metadea, “Ar mitʼṭecʼ bhajan ạguiyme.” Hopontetʼe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ bhajan hõ sarecʼ do ar bạnukʼa.”" 
2Kings4:7 Unre maejiu do Isorren hoṛ ṭhen senkate joto kathae lạikeda. Uni doe menkeda, “Am do senkate sunum ạkhrińme ar amakʼ rinko sodkakʼme. Ar okaṭakʼ sarecʼ tahen onate do ạsulokʼpe.”" 
2Kings4:8 Mitʼdin Elisae do Sunemteye senena. Ar onḍenicʼ mitʼṭen kisạ̃ṛ maejiu do uni jom ocoye lạgitʼ ạḍiye arojadea. Ar inạ tayom tinạkʼ dhao ona horteye calakʼkan tahẽkan unạkʼ dhaoge ona oṛakʼre jom lạgitʼe bolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings4:9 Maejiu do acʼren jãwãetetʼe metadea, “Nũkʼũi okoeṭakʼ hoṛ jaoge alaṅ ṭhene hijukʼkan, uni do Isorren mitʼṭen sonot hoṛ kanae menteń bujhạu daṛeakʼkana." 
2Kings4:10 Onate dela, alaṅ do chat cetanre mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń kandha laṅ benaoa ar onare uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ aṭetʼakʼ, ṭebil, ceyar ar mitʼṭecʼ diuhe dohowakʼ laṅ benaoa. Enḍekhan abo ṭhene hijukʼre onḍeye tahẽ daṛeakʼa.”" 
2Kings4:11 Mitʼdin Elisae do hecʼente ona cetan kandhate senkateye giticʼ jirạuena. 
2Kings4:12 Ar acʼren guti Gehosiye metadea, “Do, Sunemi maejiu hohoaeme.” Ado uniye hohoade khan maejiu do hecʼkate Gehosi samaṅreye teṅgoyena." 
2Kings4:13 Elisae do acʼren gutiye metadea, “Unim metaea, uni do alaṅ lạgitʼ ạḍiye kosṭo akana, onate uni do cetʼ laṅ cekawaea? Alaṅ do cetʼ uni lạgitʼ raj se subedar ṭhen jãhãnakʼ laṅ nehõrokʼa?” Uni maejiue roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do ińren hoṛko talare mońjge minạńa.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisaeye menkeda, “Enḍekhan uni lạgitʼ do cetʼ laṅ cekaea?” Gehosiye menkeda, “Uniren do koṛa gidrạ bạnukʼkotaea ar uniren jãwãe hõe haṛam cabayena.”" 
2Kings4:15 Tayomte Elisaeye menkeda, “Uni hohoaeme.” Adoe hohoade khan uni do duạr ṭhen hecʼkateye teṅgoyena." 
2Kings4:16 Elisaeye menkeda, “Hijukʼkan bochor ṭhik niạ oktere amakʼ hoborre mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại tahena.” Maejiue menkeda, “Baṅa, E ińren mạlik, E Isorren hoṛ, amren kạ̃ṛmĩ do alom eṛeyińạ.”" 
2Kings4:17 Tayomte maejiu doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar Elisae okae menletʼ onkage dosar bochor inạ oktere uni do gidrạren eṅgate hoyena. 
2Kings4:18 Ar gidrạ doe hara idiyena. Mitʼdin uniren apattetʼ do phosol gegetʼkan hoṛko sãoteye tahẽkanre, uni gidrạ do apattetʼ ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Bohokʼ hasoyedińa, uh bohokʼ hasoyedińa.” Unren apattetʼ do mitʼṭen gutiye metadea, “Hoborkate uniren eṅgattetʼ ṭhen idiyem.”" 
2Kings4:19  
2Kings4:20 Uni guti do gidrại hoborkedete uniren eṅgattetʼ ṭhene jimạkedea ar uni gidrạ do tikin hạbicʼ eṅgatakʼ hoborreye tahẽyena, ar ona tayom doe gocʼena." 
2Kings4:21 Maejiu do acʼren gocʼicʼ gidrạ cetante idikate Isorren hoṛakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼkadea. Ar ona tayom do duạr sińkateye oḍokena. 
2Kings4:22 Uni do senkate acʼren jãwãetetʼ hohoadeteye metadea, “Ńitge mitʼṭen guti ar mitʼṭen gadha iń ṭhen kolkinme. Iń do usạrate Isorren hoṛ ṭhen senkate arhõń ruạṛ hijukʼa.”" 
2Kings4:23 Uniren jãwãetetʼe menkeda, “Uni ṭhen teheń do cedakʼem calakʼa? Teheń do ambas ńindạ hõ baṅkana, ar jirạukʼ mãhã hõ baṅkana.” Uni doe menkeda, “Onate do baṅ cekakʼa.”" 
2Kings4:24 Ona tayom uni do gadhareye palanketʼte uniren gutiye metadea, “Gadha do usạrate laga lagayem, ar ạuriń metam hạbicʼ alom akoṭea.”" 
2Kings4:25 Nonkate uni doe oḍok hecʼena ar Karmel burute Isorren hoṛ ṭhene seṭerena. Isorren hoṛ do maejiu sạṅgińre tahẽkanregeye ńelkede khan acʼren guti Gehosiye metadea, “Hạni ńeleme, Sunemiạ maejiu." 
2Kings4:26 Am do ńir senkate kuliyem, uni, uniren jãwãe ar uniren gidrạ onko do bogege menakʼkoa se baṅa.” Maejiue menkeda, “Hẽ jotogele bogegea.”" 
2Kings4:27 Menkhan maejiu do Karmel burure Isorren hoṛ ṭhen seṭerkate uniyakʼ jaṅgareye giḍiyena. Gehosi do uni ocoge lạgitʼe hecʼen khan Isorren hoṛe menkeda, “Uni do alom ocogea. Uniyakʼ monre ạḍi duk menakʼtaea, menkhan Probhu Isor do iń ṭhen khon onae danaṅ akada, ar bae lại akawạdińa.”" 
2Kings4:28 Maejiue menkeda, “E ińren mạlik, iń do cetʼ am ṭhen mitʼṭen gidrạ lạgitʼ iń koeleda? Iń do cetʼ bạń metatʼme tahẽkana, alom eṛeyińạ mente?”" 
2Kings4:29 Unre Elisae do Gehosiye metadea, “Am do paṭhe keṭejokʼme ar ińakʼ ṭheṅga hataokate ńir calakʼme. Ar jãhãe sãotem ńapam emanlen khan unim joharaea ar jãhãege ame joharam khan alom roṛ ruạṛaea. Ińakʼ ṭheṅga do gidrạwakʼ mẽtʼãhãrem dohoya.”" 
2Kings4:30 Menkhan gidrạren eṅgattetʼ doe menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ar amre kiriạkateń meneda, iń do bạń bạgiwama.” Onate Elisae doe beretʼente maejiu tayom tayomteye calaoena." 
2Kings4:31 Gehosi do laha lahate senkate gidrạwakʼ mẽtʼãhã cetanre ṭheṅgae dohokeda menkhan jãhãn aṛaṅ hõ baṅ ańjomlena. Onate Gehosi do Elisae tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe ruạṛ calaoena ar uniye metadea, “Gidrạ do bae ebhenlena.”" 
2Kings4:32 Elisae do oṛakʼre senkateye ńelkeda acʼakʼ aṭetʼre gocʼicʼ gidrạ doe giticʼ ocoakana. 
2Kings4:33 Unre uni do eskarge ona oṛakʼte bolokate duạre sińkeda ar Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda. 
2Kings4:34 Ona tayom aṭetʼ cetanreye rakapʼente gidrạwakʼ mocare acʼakʼ moca, uniyakʼ mẽtʼ cetanre acʼakʼ mẽtʼ ar ti cetanre acʼakʼ ti dohokateye taber loṭomkedea. Ar tinre gidrại taber loṭomkedea unre gidrạwakʼ hoṛmo do loloyena." 
2Kings4:35 Ona tayom uni doe ocokʼente oṛakʼ bhitrire dãṛã baṛaeye ehopʼena. Ar ona tayom arhõ uni do aṭetʼreye rakapʼente ar mitʼ dhao gidrạye taber loṭomkedea. Niạ dhao gidrạ do eae dhaoe ạchimkeda ar mẽtʼe beṅgetʼketʼtaea. 
2Kings4:36 Unre Elisae do Gehosi hohoadeteye metadea, “Sunemi maejiu hohoaeme.” Ar Gehosi do uniye hohoadea. Maejiue hecʼena khan Elisaeye menkeda, “Amren hoponme do idiyem.”" 
2Kings4:37 Unre maejiu do oṛakʼte bolokate uniyakʼ jaṅgareye giḍiyena ar ombakʼ kateye ḍobokʼadea. 
2Kings4:38 Elisae do Gilgolteye ruạṛ calaoena. Unre ona ṭoṭhare akal hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. Mitʼdin cela-nạbiko do uni sãoteko duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Unre acʼren mitʼṭen gutiye metadea, “Lạṭu ṭukucʼ condaete noko lạgitʼ suṛạ dakae tabon me.”" 
2Kings4:39 Unre cela-nạbiko modren mitʼ hoṛ do aṛakʼ sitʼ ạgui lạgitʼ baṛgete senkate bir taher nạ̃ṛĩye ńel ńamkeda. Ar mitʼ gocha haṛhatʼ taher joye gotʼ jarwakeda. Ona tayom ruạṛ hecʼkate onakoe getʼ kuṭi baṛaketʼte ṭukucʼreye khadlekeda, menkhan onako do cetʼkana mente okoege bako baḍaekan tahẽkana." 
2Kings4:40 Ar suṛạ daka hoṛko jom ocoko lạgitʼ tinreko hạṭińkeda, ar tinre ona jojomko ehopʼena unre onko do ãṭ aṛaṅte memenko ehopʼena, “E Isorren hoṛ, ṭukucʼre do gogocʼakʼ menakʼa!” Ar ona do bako jom daṛeada." 
2Kings4:41 Unre Elisae menkeda, “Thoṛa holoṅ ạguiype.” Uni do ona holoṅ ona ṭukucʼre erketʼteye menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do hoṛko jom ocokope.” Onate ṭukucʼre tahẽkan bạṛicʼakʼ do caba utạrena." 
2Kings4:42 Bakʼal Salisa khon mitʼṭen hoṛ do Isorren hoṛ lạgitʼ pạhil samṭaoakʼ phosol khon bargel goṭecʼ jao reakʼ piṭhạ ar ona sãote thoṛa thuṛi nãwã phosol hõe ạgu darakeda. Elisaeye menkeda, “Noa do jom lạgitʼ hoṛko hạṭińakome.”" 
2Kings4:43 Unre uniren gutiye menkeda, “Mitʼsae hoṛko samaṅre ona do cekateń dohoya?” Elisaeye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Onage jom lạgitʼ hạṭińakome, ente Probhu Isore meneda, ‘onko do onako joma ar thoṛa do sarecʼ tahena.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Unre uni guti do hoṛko samaṅre onae dohokeda. Ar Probhu Isor okae menletʼ onkageko jomketʼ tayom arhõ ṭhoṛa do sarecʼ tahẽyena. 
2Kings5:1 Naman do Aram rajren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedare tahẽkana. Uniren mạlik samaṅre uni do mitʼṭen maraṅ ar manotanicʼ hoṛe tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isor do uni hotetege Arame jitạu ocoleda. Uni do mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkana, menkhan uniyakʼ hoṛmore do murhucʼ jom rog tahẽkantaea." 
2Kings5:2 Aramren luluṭko do Israel disạmte dolke dolko calakʼkan tahẽkana. Mitʼ dhao onko do mitʼṭen huḍiń kuṛi gidrạ hõ bondikateko idi torakedea. Ar uni do Naman bạhuren kạ̃ṛmĩye hoylena. 
2Kings5:3 Mitʼdin kuṛi do acʼ kisạ̃ṛren bạhuttetʼe metadea, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ do Samariạren nạbi sãote eken mitʼ dhaoe ńapamlen khange uni do murhucʼ jom rog khone boge utạrokʼa." 
2Kings5:4 Israel khon ạguyicʼ uni kuṛi okae menletʼ Naman do senkate acʼren mạlik onae lạiyadea. 
2Kings5:5 Unre Aramren raj do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Ṭhikgea, Do calakʼme. Iń do Israelren raj ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhiń kola.” Ar onate Naman do pesae aregel keji rupạ, eaegel irạl keji sona ar gel joṛa kicricʼanteye oḍok calaoena." 
2Kings5:6 Ar okaṭakʼ ciṭhi do Israel raj ṭhene idiketʼ onare ol tahẽkana, “Ińren subedar Naman hotete niạ ciṭhi am ṭheniń kolkeda jemon murhucʼ jom rog khon unim bogeye.”" 
2Kings5:7 Unre Israelren raj do ciṭhi paṛhaokate ona or cirạketʼteye menkeda, “Iń do cetʼ Isor kạnạń? Iń do cetʼ gocʼkate arhõ jiwiń em ruạṛ daṛeakʼa? Murhucʼ jom rog khon bogekʼ lạgitʼ cedakʼ uni do iń ṭhen nui hoṛe kolkedea? Ńelpe, uni do iń sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ susiye ńam bakʼṛakana.”"
