2Kings5:8 Isorren hoṛ Elisae do tinreye ańjomkeda, Israelren raj do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼ akatʼtaea, unre uni do noa khobore kolkeda, “Cedakʼ kicricʼ dom oṛecʼketʼtama? Uni hoṛ do iń ṭhen kolkaeme. Inạ khane baḍae daṛeakʼa, Israelre mitʼṭen nạbi menaea mente.”" 
2Kings5:9 Onate Naman do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiko ar aswarikoante Elisaeyakʼ oṛakʼ duạr ṭhen senkateye teṅgoyena. 
2Kings5:10 Unre Elisae do mitʼṭen hoṛ hoteteye roṛ gotʼkada, “Jordan gaḍate senkate am do eae dhao umokʼme. Inạ khan am dom boge utạrokʼa.”" 
2Kings5:11 Menkhan Naman do ạḍiye raṅgaoente onḍe khone calaoena are menkeda, “Iń doń hudisleda khạṭige uni do iń ṭhene oḍokʼ hijukʼa ar teṅgokate acʼren Probhu Isore hohoaea ar murhucʼ jom rog cetanre acʼakʼ tiye dohoytaea ar ińakʼ roge bogeytińạ." 
2Kings5:12 Damesek reakʼ Abana ar Parpar gaḍa dakʼ do cetʼ Israel reakʼ sanam gaḍa dakʼko khon baṅ sorosgea? Iń do cetʼ onḍe umkate bạń sapha daṛekokʼa?” Ar niạ menkate uni do raṅgaoteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Kings5:13 Namanren gutiko do unre uni ṭhen senkateko metadea, “E hujur, uni nạbi jodi jãhãn maraṅ kạmi lạgitʼe menkem enḍekhan cetʼ ona bam onkakea? Ar umkate saphakʼe metamkan onate cetʼ artetʼ onkae lek do baṅkan tama?”" 
2Kings5:14 Unre Naman do Isorren hoṛakʼ katha leka senkate jordanre eae dhaoe unumena. Onate uniyakʼ hoṛmo do bogeyena ar huḍiń gidrạkoakʼ hoṛmo leka arhõ mońj ruạṛentaea. 
2Kings5:15 Unre Naman ar uni sãoten sanam hoṛ do Isorren hoṛ ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. Naman do uni samaṅre teṅgokateye menkeda, “Ńitokʼ doń baḍae daṛeakʼkana, Israelren Isor chaḍa dhạrtire ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa. Am do ńitokʼ amren guti ṭhen khon niạ sandes baṛe ataṅme.”" 
2Kings5:16 Nạbiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Okoeyiń sewawae kan uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, iń do mitʼṭecʼ jinis hõ bạń hataotama.” Namane jormoṭkedere hõ uni do bae rạjilena." 
2Kings5:17 Namane menkeda, “Jãhãnakʼge bam hatao enḍekhan dayakate barea gadha jemonkin idi daṛeakʼ nonkan hasa amren guti baṛe emaeme, ente amren nui guti do Probhu Isor chaḍa tisge jãhãn debota ṭhen jeredokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do bae samaṅa." 
2Kings5:18 Menkhan niạ babotre jemon Probhu Isor do acʼren gutiye ikạkạń. Ińren kisạ̃ṛ do tinre Rimon debotawakʼ mundilre ińre ṭenḍarkateye bolokʼa ar Rimone ḍobokʼae unre ińhõ ḍobokʼ lagaoạńạ. Niạ babotre jemon Probhu Isor do ińe ikạkạń.” 
2Kings5:19 Elisaeye menkeda, “Sulukte senjoṅ joṅme.” Naman do uni ṭhen khon thoṛa sạṅgińe senen khan Isorren hoṛ Elisaeren guti Gehosi do mone moneteye menkeda, “Aramren Naman okae ạguletʼ ona baṅ hataokate ińren mạlik do maṅnategeye aṛakʼkadea. Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, uniń khudạu tiyogea ar uni ṭhen khon jãhãnakʼ iń hataogea.”" 
2Kings5:20  
2Kings5:21 Niạ menkate Gehosi do Naman tayom tayomteye senena. Ar Naman do acʼ secʼ ńir hijukʼkane ńelkede khan uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ rãt gạḍi khone pheḍena. Uni doe kulikedea, “Sanamakʼ ṭhikgea tho?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehosiye menkeda, “Jotowakʼge ṭhikgea. Menkhan ińren kisạ̃ṛ do niạ katha lạiyam lạgitʼe kolakadińạ, Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha khon cela-nạbiko modre bar hoṛ do ńitge uni ṭhen kin seṭer akana. Onate dayakate am do unkin lạgitʼ pegel are keji rupạ ar bar joṛa kicricʼ baṛe emokʼme.”" 
2Kings5:23 Namane menkeda, “Pegel are keji do cedakʼ? Am do eaegel irạl keji hataome.” Ar onako hatao lạgitʼ uni do Gehosiye jormoṭkedea ar eaegel irạl keji rupạ barea thạilạkʼreye tolketʼte bar joṛa kicricʼe emadea. Uni do acʼren barea gutikin onakoe ematʼkinạ ar unkin do Gehosi laha lahatekin gokʼ idikeda." 
2Kings5:24 Ado ḍuṅgri buru ṭhen hecʼkate Gehosi do gutikin ṭhen khon onako hataokate oṛakʼreye dohokada. Ar ona tayom doe bidạkatʼkinte unkin dokin ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Kings5:25 Ona tayom uni do bhitrite senkate acʼren kisạ̃ṛ Elisae samaṅreye teṅgoyena. Elisae do uniye kulikedea, “Gehosi, am do okatem senlena?” Gehosiye menkeda, “Amren guti do okatehõ bacoń senlen.”" 
2Kings5:26 Menkhan Elisae do uniye metadea, “Uni hoṛ do tinre am sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ rãt gạḍi khone pheḍena unre ińakʼ mon do cetʼ am sãote baṅ senlentińạ? Ṭaka-poesa, kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ, jạitun bagwan, darkha bagwan, mĩhũ-meromko, bhiḍiko ar guti kạ̃ṛmĩko hataoko reakʼ okte do cetʼ ńitokʼ kangea?" 
2Kings5:27 Onate Namanakʼ murhucʼ jom rog do am ar amren bõsko talare jaejug hạbicʼ tahena.” Unre Gehosi do Elisae samaṅ khone calaoena ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo do murhucʼ jom rogte him leka ponḍentaea. 
2Kings6:1 Mitʼdin cela-nạbiko do Elisaeko metadea, “Ńelme, oka jaegare am sãote duṛupʼkatele galmarao ona jaega abo lạgitʼ do huḍińgea." 
2Kings6:2 Onate amem hukumale khan ale do jordan gaḍa ṭhen senkate mitʼṭecʼkate khunṭi jogaṛ ạgukate abo lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tahen jaegale benaoa.” 
2Kings6:3 Unre onko modren mitʼ hoṛe menkeda, “Am hõ amren gutiko sãote dela calakʼme.” Elisaeye menkeda, “Ṭhikgea, dela bon calakʼa.”" 
2Kings6:4 Niạ menkate uni do onko sãoteye calaoena. Ar onko do Jordan ṭhen senkate dare mamakʼko ehopʼena. 
2Kings6:5 Onko modre mitʼ hoṛ do tinre dareye mamakʼ kan tahẽkana unre uniyakʼ ṭeṅgocʼ do dakʼre ńurentaea. Uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Hae, hae! E ińren mạlik, ona doń koe ạguakatʼ tahẽkana.”" 
2Kings6:6 Unre Isorren hoṛe kulikedea, “Ona do okare ńur akana?” Uni do ona jaegae udukʼketʼ khan Elisae do mitʼṭecʼ kaṭ ạgukate onḍeye capatʼ khadlekada ar onate ṭeṅgocʼ do cape rakapʼena." 
2Kings6:7 Unre uniye menkeda, “Ma rakabme.” Onate uni hoṛ do ti tiạrkate onae rakapʼkeda." 
2Kings6:8 Ona jokhecʼ Aramren raj do Israelko upạrteye lạṛhạikan tahẽkana. Uni do acʼren subedarko sãote solha mitʼkateye menkeda, “Phalna jaegakore bon ḍerakʼa.”" 
2Kings6:9 Unre Isorren hoṛ do Israelren raj ṭhene roṛ gotʼkada, “Sontorokʼme, phalna jaega secʼ do alom calakʼa, ente Aramrenko do onḍeko calakʼ kana.”" 
2Kings6:10 Onate Israelren raj do Isorren hoṛe hukum akatʼ jaegate hoṛ kolkateye sontorkatʼkoa. Ar nonkate raj do apnare rukhiyạkʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Kings6:11 Onate Aramren raj do ạḍiye raṅgaoena. Uni do acʼren subedarko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ma lạipe, abo talare Israelren raj secʼ do okoe menaea?”" 
2Kings6:12 Uniren subedar modren mitʼ hoṛe menkeda, “E ińren mạlik, abo modre do okoege bạnukʼkoa; menkhan am do amakʼ giticʼ kandhare okam roṛ ona katha hõ Israelren nạbi Elisae do Israelren raje lạiyae kana.”" 
2Kings6:13 Unre raj do noae hukumkeda, “Do senkate uni sendra ńamepe okare menaea, jemon iń do hoṛ kolkate uniń sapʼ ạgu daṛeae.” Tayomte khobor baḍaeyena, uni do Dathonre menaea." 
2Kings6:14 Unre raj do sadomko, rãt gạḍiko ar maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko onḍeye kolketʼkoa. Onko do ńindạ jokhecʼ senkate nagrahako gherao ạcurkeda." 
2Kings6:15 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre Isorren hoṛren guti do beretʼkate bahreteye senen khane ńelkeda sadomko ar rãt gạḍikoante mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdko do nagrahako gherao ạcur akada. Unre uni guti doe menkeda, “Hae, hae! E ińren mạlik, alaṅ do cetʼ laṅ cekaea?”" 
2Kings6:16 Nạbiye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Alom botorokʼa. Okoe alaṅ sãote menakʼko onko do hanko khon hõko saṅgegea.”" 
2Kings6:17 Ona tayom Elisae doe koekeda, “E Probhu Isor, uniyakʼ mẽtʼ baṛe jhicʼkatae me jemone ńeńel.” Unre Probhu Isor do uni gutiyakʼ mẽtʼe jhicʼketʼaea. Uni doe ńelkeda Elisae beṛhaeteakʼ burure do seṅgel reakʼ rãt gạḍi ar sadomkote perecʼgea." 
2Kings6:18 Ar bạiriko do tinre Elisae secʼko pheḍ hijukʼkan tahẽkana unre uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda, “E Probhu noko hoṛ do ạndhuạ ocokom.” Elisaeyakʼ koe lekage Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ mẽtʼe ạndhuạ ocoketʼtakoa." 
2Kings6:19 Elisae do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Noa do ona hor hõ baṅkana ar ona nagraha hõ baṅkana. Ape do iń tayomte hijukʼpe; ar ape okoepe sendrayedekan uni hoṛ ṭheniń idipea.” Niạ menkate uni do Samariạte onkoe idiketʼkoa." 
2Kings6:20 Nagrahate bolokate Elisaeye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ńitokʼ onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do saṛ ocoytakome jemonko ńeńel.” Unre Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ mẽtʼe jhicʼketʼtakoa arko ńelkeda, onko do Samariạreko seṭer akana." 
2Kings6:21 Israelren raj do onko ńelte Elisaeye metadea, “E baba, onko do cetʼ iń gocʼkoa?”" 
2Kings6:22 Uniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Baṅa, onko do alom gocʼkoa. Am apnarakʼ tarwaṛe ar sarte okoeyem bondi akatʼko onko do cetʼem gocʼkoa? Onko do jomakʼ ar ńũiyakʼ emakom, jemon jom ńũkate akoren mạlik ṭhenko ruạṛ sen daṛeakʼ.”" 
2Kings6:23 Onate raj do onko lạgitʼ maraṅ okocʼe bhojkeda. Arko jom ńũ baṛaketʼ khan onkoe bidạkatʼkoa ar onko do akoren mạlik ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. Onate Aramren lạṛhại phạdko do Israel raj talare luluṭko bạgikeda. 
2Kings6:24 Inạ thoṛa din tayom Aramren raj Benhadad do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwaketʼkoa ar Samariạko gherao ạcurkeda. 
2Kings6:25 Unre nagrahare maraṅ akal ńelena. Niạ gherao do nunạkʼ din hạbicʼ hoyena je, mitʼṭen gadhawakʼ bohokʼ do mitʼ keji rupạte ar mitʼ keji reakʼ pon hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń parwa icʼ do eae gram rupạte ạkhrińokʼ ehopʼena." 
2Kings6:26 Israelren raj do mitʼdin nagraha reakʼ pạcri cetanreye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkanre mitʼṭen maejiu do ãṭ aṛaṅte uniye metadea, “E ińren mạlik maharaj, goṛowạńme baṛe.”" 
2Kings6:27 Raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor bae goṛowạń khan iń do cekateń goṛowama? Khạrại khon, se darkha lelenḍ kunḍ khon?”" 
2Kings6:28 Ona tayom uniye kulikedea, “Cetʼ hoyakana?” Uni maejiue menkeda, “Nui maejiu do ińe metadiń tahẽkana, ‘teheń do amren hopon jome lạgitʼ emokʼme, ar gapa do ińren hopon jome lạgitʼ iń emokʼa.’" 
2Kings6:29 Onate ạliń do ińren gidrạ isinkate liń jomkedea. Ar dosar hilokʼ uniń metadea, ‘ńitokʼ do amren gidrạ emokʼme.’ Menkhan uni doe oko akadea.”" 
2Kings6:30 Maejiuakʼ katha ańjomte raj do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea. Uni do unrehõ pạcri cetanreye tahẽkana. Onate hoṛkoko ńelkeda, uniyakʼ horokʼakʼ latarre do gõṛẽ kicricʼteye bande akana." 
2Kings6:31 Uniye menkeda, “Teheń Saphatren hopon Elisaeyakʼ bohokʼ tarenre tahentae enḍekhan Isor do ińe sạjạiyińma, ona do ạḍi bạṛicʼ sạjạige!”" 
2Kings6:32 Elisae do unre acʼakʼ oṛakʼreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar uni sãote murubbikoko tahẽkana. Raj do mitʼṭen hoṛ Elisae ṭhene kolkadea, menkhan uni hoṛ onḍe ạuriye seṭerokʼrege Elisae do murubbikoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ uni khuniạhi do bape ńele kana okoe do ińakʼ bohokʼ makʼ ńur tiń lạgitʼ mitʼ hoṛe kolekana? Ńelpe, uni hoṛe hecʼlen khan duạrpe sińa ar alogepe jhicʼaea. Ar uni tayomte do uniren mạlikakʼ sabadge cetʼ baṅ ańjomokʼ kana?”" 
2Kings6:33 Elisae do unhõ kathae roroṛ kan tahẽkana un jokhecʼ uni hoṛ doe hecʼena. Ona tayom raj do hecʼkateye menkeda, “Noa muhin do Probhu Isor ṭhen khonge hecʼakana. Enḍekhan Probhu Isor lạgitʼ do cedakʼ iń biloma?”" 
2Kings7:1 Elisaeye menkeda, “Probhu Isor okae menetʼ ona baṛe ańjompe. Uniye meneda, gapa Samariạ reakʼ phaṭokre gelbar gram rupạte turui keji holoṅ ar gelbar gram rupạte gelbar keji jao ạkhrińokʼa.”" 
2Kings7:2 Raj do okoe gutiye goṛowade tahẽkan uni guti do Isorren hoṛe metadea, “Ńelme, Probhu Isor do serma reakʼ duạrkoe jhicʼlere hõ onka do ohoge hoylena?” Elisaeye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amakʼ mẽtʼtege noa dom ńela, menkhan am do ona reakʼ cetʼge bam jom ńama.”" 
2Kings7:3 Unre nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr bolokʼ horre ponea murhucʼ jom rog hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Abo do nonḍe tahẽkate cedakʼ bon gujukʼa?" 
2Kings7:4 Ar bon men nagrahate do babo calakʼa onḍe do akal hoyokʼkana arbo gujukʼa. Ar nonḍe tahenrehõ bon gujukʼa. Ona khon bickom dela, abon do Aramrenkoakʼ ḍerate senkate onkoakʼ tire bon soprotokʼa. Onko jiwetʼko dohole bon khan ma bogege arko gocʼ bon khan mabon gujukʼge.”" 
2Kings7:5 Noa menkate ńuhumokʼ laha onko do Aramrenkoakʼ ḍerateko senena. Ar senkateko ńelkeda onḍe do mitʼ hoṛ hõ bạnukʼkoa. 
2Kings7:6 Probhu Isor do rãt gạḍi, sadomko, ar maraṅ mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ sabad Aramrenkoe ańjom ocoketʼkoa. Onate Aramren lạṛhại phạdko do ako akoreko mepenena, “Ńelpe, Israelren raj do abore jhãp em lạgitʼ Hittiren raj ar Misorren rajkine bhaṛa ạguakatʼkinạ.”" 
2Kings7:7 Noa menkate onko do ạyubokʼ laharege akoakʼ tạmbuko, sadomko, gadhako bạgiyatʼkoa arko dạṛkeda. Onko do jiwi botorte ḍera cetʼleka tahẽkan onkage bạgi oṭoada." 
2Kings7:8 Onko murhucʼ jom rugiko do ḍera ṭhen seṭerkate mitʼṭecʼ tạmbu bhitriteko boloyena. Onko do jom ńukate sona, rupạ, ar kicricʼko idiketʼte onakoko oko dohokada. Ona tayom ruạṛ hecʼkate ar mitʼṭecʼ tạmbuteko boloyena ar ona reakʼ jiniskoko idikeda arko oko dohokada." 
2Kings7:9 Inạ tayom do ako akoreko mepenena, “Aboakʼ kạmi bhage do baṅ hoyokʼkana. Teheń do mitʼṭecʼ bhage sombat reakʼ din kana ar abo do lại baṅkate hapege menakʼ bona. Ar setakʼ hạbicʼ bon bilomle khan abore sạjại do paṛaokʼgea. Dela, ńitge abo do raj oṛakʼte senkate khobor bon baḍae ocokoa.”" 
2Kings7:10 Onate onko do senkate nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrren pahradarko metatʼkoa, “Ale do Aramrenkoakʼ ḍeratele senlena. Onḍe do mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ hõ bạnukʼkoa, cetʼ sabadge bạnukʼa; eken sadomko ar gadhako tol akan menakʼkoa ar tạmbuko do cetʼleka tahẽkan onkage bạgikate onko doko calao akana.”" 
2Kings7:11 Phaṭok duạrren pahradarko do khoborko lạikeda ar ona do raj oṛakʼ bhitrire tahenkanko hõko baḍae ocoketʼkoa. 
2Kings7:12 Raj do ńindạ jokhecʼ beretʼkate acʼren gutikoe metatʼkoa, “Aramrenko cetʼko ceka akatʼ onań lạiyape kana. Onko doko baḍaegea abo do reṅgecʼte menakʼ bona mente; onate onko do ḍera bạgikate ṭạnḍireko oko akana. Onko doko hudiseda khạṭige abo bon oḍok hijukʼa ar unre onko do jiwetʼteko sapʼbona ar nagrahateko bolokʼa.”" 
2Kings7:13 Uniren mitʼṭen gutiye menkeda, “Nagrahare tinạkʼ sadom sarecʼ menakʼko onko modkhon mõṛẽ goṭen sadomante adomko doko oḍokokʼma. Nonḍenko sanam Israelko leka onko do khạṭigeko gujukʼa, onate cetʼ hoyakana ona baḍae lạgitʼ onko bon kolkoa.”" 
2Kings7:14 Unre onko do sadom sudhạ barea rãt gạḍiko bachaoana, ar raj do Aramren lạṛhại phạdko sendrako lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼkinạ. Uni do rãt gạḍi cakʼlaokin noae hukumatʼkinạ, “Aben do senkate baḍae ạguiben cetʼ hoyakana mente.”" 
2Kings7:15 Unkin do jordan gaḍa hạbicʼkin sendraketʼkoa ar unkin do senkatekin ńelkeda Aramrenko do ampa ạmpiko dạṛketʼte akoakʼ sanam jinisko ar kicricʼko horreko bạgi giḍi oṭoada. Ar unkin kol ocolenkin hoṛ do sen ruạṛkate jotowakʼ khobor rajkin lạiyadea. 
2Kings7:16 Unre hoṛko doko oḍok hecʼente Aramrenkoakʼ ḍerako luṭkeda. Onate Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekage turui keji holoṅ do gelbar gram rupạte ar gelbar keji jao do gelbar gram rupạte ạkhrińena. 
2Kings7:17 Okoeṭakʼ guti do raje goṛowade tahẽkan uni cetanre raj do phaṭok ńel todarot reakʼ bhare emadea, menkhan hoṛko do nonkako oḍok senena, uni do phaṭok reakʼ horreko lebetʼ gańjao oṭokedete onḍegeye gocʼena. Isorren hoṛ Elisae do acʼakʼ oṛakʼre raj okaṭakʼ kathae metade tahẽkan onkage uni doe gocʼena." 
2Kings7:18 Uni do raj oka lekae metade tahẽkan onkage hoeyena. Uni doe menleda, “Gapa niạ jokhecʼ Samariạ reakʼ phaṭokre turui keji holoṅ do gelbar gram rupạte ar gelbar keji jao do gelbar gram rupạte ạkhrińokʼa.”" 
2Kings7:19 Uni guti do Isorren hoṛe metade tahẽkana, “Ńelme, Probhu Isor do serma reakʼ duạre jhicʼlere hõ noa do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa?” Isorren hoṛe roṛ ruạṛleda, “Am do amakʼ mẽtʼtegem ńela, menkhan ona reakʼ do cetʼge bam jom ńama.”" 
2Kings7:20 Ar onkage uni cetanre hoyena, ente phaṭok reakʼ horre uni doko lebetʼ gańjaokedea are gocʼena.”" 
2Kings8:1 Elisae do okoeṭakʼ maejiuren hopone jiwetʼlede uni maejiue metadea, “Am do amakʼ gharońjrenko tulucʼ jãhãregem daṛeakʼ onḍege thoṛa din lạgitʼ tahẽ hataṛokʼme, ente Probhu Isor do niạ disạmre akale kola, ar eae bochor hạbicʼ ona akal do tahena.”" 
2Kings8:2 Maejiu do Isorren hoṛakʼ katha lekageye kạmikeda. Uni ar acʼ gharońjrenko do onḍe khonko calaoente eae bochor hạbicʼ Philisṭikoakʼ disạmreko tahẽyena. 
2Kings8:3 Eae bochor tayom uni do Philisṭikoakʼ disạm khone ruạṛ hecʼen khan acʼakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar jaega-jumiko ńam ruạṛ lạgitʼ raj ṭhene calaoena. 
2Kings8:4 Unre raj do Isorren hoṛren guti Gehosi sãoteye galmarokan tahẽkana. Uni doe kuliyede tahẽkana, “Elisae oka maraṅ maraṅakʼkoe kạmi akatʼ onako reakʼ lạiyạńme.”" 
2Kings8:5 Ado Gehosi tinre raje lạiyaekan tahẽkana Elisae do gocʼicʼ cetʼlekae jiwetʼ ruạṛledea mente ar ṭhik ona jokhecʼge Elisae okoeṭakʼ maejiuren hopone jiwetʼlede uni maejiu do raj ṭhen senkate acʼakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar ot-baṛgeko ńam ruạṛ lạgitʼ nehõrokʼe ehopʼena. Gehosi do unreye menkeda, “E ińren mạlik maharaj, nui kangeae uni maejiu do one okoeren hopon Elisae doe jiwetʼ ruạṛlede.”" 
2Kings8:6 Unre raj do ona reaṅ maejiue kulikede khan uni do jotowakʼe lạikeda. Onate raj do maejiu babotre mitʼṭen guti bahal kedeteye metadea, “Uniyakʼ jotowakʼ ruạṛkataeme ar disạime bạgi oṭowakʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ uniyakʼ jumire oka arjao akan ona hõ ruạṛkataeme.”" 
2Kings8:7 Inạ tayom Elisae do Damesekteye calaoena. Ar unre Aramren raj Benhadad doe ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana. Unre rajko lạiyadea, “Isorren hoṛ do nonḍeye hecʼakana.”" 
2Kings8:8 Ar raj do Hosaele metadea, “Am do soṅgete mitʼṭecʼ sandes idi toraeme ar Isorren hoṛ sãote ńapamokʼme. Ar uni hotete Probhu Isor ṭhen khon baḍae joṅme, iń do niạ ruạ kạhil khoniń bogekʼa se baṅa.”" 
2Kings8:9 Unre Hosael do sandes lekate Damesek reakʼ joto khon bhageakʼ jinisko pongel ũṭreye ladekeda ar Elisae sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. Uni do Elisae samaṅre senkate teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Amren hopon Aramren Benhadad raj do niạ katha kulime lạgitʼe kol akadińạ, ruạ kạhil khon uni doe boge ruạṛokʼa se baṅa.”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisaeye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am do ruạṛ senkate unim lạiyaea, khạṭigeye boge ruạṛokʼa, menkhan Probhu Isor do iń ṭhene sodor akada, uni doe gujukʼa." 
2Kings8:11 Niạ menkate Hosael ạuriye lajaokʼ hạbicʼ Elisae do uni secʼ beṅgetʼ akaegeye tahẽyena. Ona tayom Isorren hoṛ do rarakʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings8:12 Hosael do uniye kulikedea, “E ińren mạlik cedakʼem rakʼeda?” Elisaeye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ente iń doń baḍaegea Israelkoakʼ cetʼkom loksantakoa mente. Am do onkoakʼ gaṛkore seṅgelem jeretʼakʼa, ar tarwaṛete onkoren juạnkom gocʼkoa, onkoren kạṭicʼ gidrạ do otrem tawakʼ gocʼkoa ar onkoren bhạrti hoṛmowan maejiukoakʼ lacʼ dom getʼ cirạitakoa.”" 
2Kings8:13 Unre Hosaele menkeda, “Iń amren golam iń seta doń celekante nonkan dil reakʼ iń kạmi daṛekea?” Elisaeye menkeda, “Amge Aramren rajem hoyokʼ onage Probhu Isor do ińe ńel ocoakadińạ.”" 
2Kings8:14 Inạ tayom Hosael do Elisae ṭhen khon acʼren mạlik ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena. Binhadad do uniye kulikedea, “Elisae do cetʼe metatʼmea?” Hosaele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni doe metadińạ khạṭigem bogekʼa.”" 
2Kings8:15 Menkhan ona dosar hilokʼ Hosael do mitʼṭecʼ kombol lohotʼkate rajakʼ mẽtʼãhãe dapalketʼtaea, ar onate raj doe gocʼena. Ona tayom Hosael do Benhadadakʼ jaegare raje hoyena." 
2Kings8:16 Israelren raj Ahabren hopon Jehoramakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽgel bochorre tinre Jehosaphat do Jihudạren raje tahẽkana unre Jehosaphatren hopon Jehoram do Jihudạre rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings8:17 Jehoram do pegel bar bochor umer tahẽkanre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre irạl bochor hạbicʼ raje calaoketʼa. 
2Kings8:18 Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛko lekage uni do Israelren rajkoakʼ horteye calakʼkan tahẽkana, ente uni do Ahabren mitʼṭen hoponerae baplaledea. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings8:19 Enhõ Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Dạudakʼ katha disạite Jihudạ marao giḍikakʼ do bae khojleda, ente uni do Dạud ar uni bõsrenko jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ mạli emako reakʼe gokʼade tahẽkana." 
2Kings8:20 Jehoram oktere Edom disạmren hoṛko do Jihudạ upạrte hulkate ako lạgitʼ mitʼṭen rajko ṭhik doho akawan tahẽkana. 
2Kings8:21 Onate Jehoram do acʼakʼ sanam rãt gạḍikoante Seyirteye calaoena. Ar Edomrenko do uni ar uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiren subedarkoko gheraoketʼkoa, menkhan uni do ńindạ jokhecʼ beretʼenteye oḍokena ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko hõko ńir paskaoente oṛakʼteko ruạṛena." 
2Kings8:22 Edom do teheń hạbicʼ hõ Jihudạ upạrteko bhiṅgṛạu akana. Ar inạko oktere Lebnarenko hõko hulleda. 
2Kings8:23 Jehoramakʼ eṭakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi reakʼ kathako do “Jihudạkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings8:24 Tayomte Jehoram do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uniren hopon Ahasiạ do uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
2Kings8:25 Israelren raj Ahabren hopon Jehoramakʼ rajokʼ gelbar bochorre Jihudạren raj Jehoramren hopon Ahasiạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings8:26 Ar tinre raje hoyena unre uniyakʼ umer do bargel bar bochor tahẽkantaea ar uni do mitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgat Athaliạ do Israelren raj Omriren goṛomtetʼ kuṛiye tahẽkana. 
2Kings8:27 Ahasiạ do Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ hortegeye taṛametʼ tahẽkana ar onko lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana, ente bapla hotete Ahabakʼ gharońj tulucʼ uniyakʼ jopoṛao do hoylentaea." 
2Kings8:28 Aramren raj Hosael upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ Ahasiạ do Ahabren hopon Jehoram sãote Ramot-Gileadteye senena. Unre Aramren hoṛ do Jehoramko ghạlkedea. Ar ona ghạl khon bogekʼ lạgitʼ Jehoram do Jisriyelteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ahabren hopon Jehoram doe ghạl akan tahẽkante Jihudạren raj Jehoramren hopon Ahasiạ do uni ńele lạgitʼ Jisriyelteye calaoena. 
2Kings8:29  
2Kings9:1 Elisae do cela-nạbiko mod khon mitʼ hoṛ hohoadeteye metadea, “Ḍanḍa paṭhe keṭejme ar niạ sunum cukạkʼ hataokate am do Ramot-Gileadte calakʼme." 
2Kings9:2 Onḍe senkate Nimsiren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jehosaphatren hopon Jihum sendra ńameya. Ar uni ṭhen senkate uniren gateko ṭhen khonem ocogea ar mitʼṭecʼ kandharem aderea." 
2Kings9:3 Ona tayom cukạkʼ reakʼ sunum uniyakʼ bohokʼre dulkatem mena, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Israelren raj mente iń do amiń ojokʼ bahalketʼmea.’ Ona tayom duạr jhicʼkate am dom ńir oḍokokʼa, ar alogem biloma.”" 
2Kings9:4 Onate uni juạn nạbi do Ramot-Gileadteye senena. 
2Kings9:5 Onḍe seṭerkate uni do subedarko mitʼ jaegare duṛupʼ akane ńelketʼkoa. Uni doe menkeda, “E subedar, am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ sombatiń ạguakada.” Jihuye kulikedea, “Aleko modre ona sombat do okoe lạgitʼ kana?” Uniye menkeda, “Subedar, am lạgitʼ kangea.”" 
2Kings9:6 Onate Jihu doe beretʼente oṛakʼ bhitriteye boloyena. Unre uni nạbi do Jihuwakʼ bohokʼre cukạkʼ reakʼ sunum dulketʼteye menkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Probhu Isorren hoṛko cetanre, metakʼme Israelko cetanre iń do raj menteń ojokʼ bahalketʼmea." 
2Kings9:7 Am do amren mạlik Ahabakʼ bõsem marao utạrtaea. Isebel do ińren gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko ar Probhu Isorren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ gutikoakʼ oka mãyãme joro ocoakatʼ ona reakʼ iń hala ruạṛaea." 
2Kings9:8 Ahabakʼ bõsren jotogeko marao utạrokʼa. Golamge cetʼ ar sạdhinge cetʼ, Ahabakʼ bõsren mitʼke mitʼ herel hopon doń gocʼ cabakoa." 
2Kings9:9 Iń do uniyakʼ bõsko Nabatren hopon Jerobiamakʼ bõs ar Ahiạren hopon Basakʼ bõs lekań hoeocoya. 
2Kings9:10 Isebel do Jisriyelre setako jomea, uni do okoege bako topakaea.’ ” Niạ menkate uni nạbi do duạr jhicʼketʼteye ńir oḍokena." 
2Kings9:11 Jihui oḍok hecʼen khan onko modren mitʼ hoṛ do uniye kulikedea, “Jotowakʼ bhage gea tho? Uni pagla do cetʼ lạgitʼe hecʼlena?” Jihuye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni hoṛ mape baḍae akadege ar cetʼ lekan kathakoe roṛ ona hõpe baḍaegea.”" 
2Kings9:12 Onkoko menkeda, “Niạ katha do ṭhik baṅkana, khulạsate lạiyaleme.” Unre Jihuye menkeda, “Uni doe metadińạ, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Israelren raj lekate iń do amiń ojokʼ bahalketʼmea.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Unre onko subedarko do usạrate akoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼko bocʼketʼte siṛhi cetanre Jihuakʼ jaṅga latarreko aṭetʼkeda. Ar ona tayom do sakwa oroṅkate ãṭ aṛaṅateko menkeda, “Jihu kangeae raj do.”" 
2Kings9:14 Ona tayom Jehosaphatren hopon, metakʼme Nimsiren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Jihu do Joram upạrteye soṛojontrokeda. Ona jokhecʼ Joram ar sanam Israelko do Ramot-Gilead rukhiyại lạgitʼ Aramren raj Hosael upạrteko lạṛhạikan tahẽkana." 
2Kings9:15 Menkhan Aramren raj Hosael sãote lạṛhại jokhecʼ Aramrenko do Joram one hoṛmoreko ghạllede ona khon bogekʼ lạgitʼ uni do Jisriyelteye ruạṛ senakan tahẽkana. Jihu do acʼ sãoten subedarkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń tulucʼpe tahen khan tobe do ńelpe Jisriyelte khobor em lạgitʼ okoe hoṛ hõ jemon nagraha khon hape hapete aloko oḍok calakʼ.”" 
2Kings9:16 Ona tayom Jihu do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍire decʼkate Jisriyelteye senena, ente Joram do onḍe kạhilge aṭetʼreye giticʼ akan tahẽkana ar Jihudạren raj Ahasiạ hõ uni ńele lạgitʼ onḍeye senakan tahẽkana." 
2Kings9:17 Jihuren lạṛhại phạdko hijukʼkane ńelketʼko khan Jisriyel gaṛ cetanreye teṅgo akan pahradar do hohoateye menkeda, “Iń do lạṛhại phạdko hijukʼ kaniń ńel ńametʼkoa.” Unre Jorame hukumkeda, “Mitʼṭen aswari onko ṭhen kolkaepe. Uni do onko ṭhene kulijoṅa, ‘apeakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ do cetʼ bhagegea?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Uni aswari do Jihu sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena are menkeda, “Raje meneda, ‘amakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ do cetʼ bhagegea?’ ” Jihuye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ baḍae reakʼ amakʼ do cetʼ? Am do iń tayom tayomte hijukʼme.” Uni pahradar do unre khobore emkeda, “Khobor idiyicʼ hoṛ do onko ṭhene seṭerena, menkhan bae ruạṛ hijukʼkana.”" 
2Kings9:19 Unre raj do dosaricʼ armitʼṭen aswariye kolkadea. Uni hõ onko lạṛhại phạdko ṭhen seṭerkateye menkeda, “Raje kulikana, ‘apeakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ do cetʼ bhagegea?’ ” Jihuye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ baḍae reakʼ amakʼ do cetʼ? Am do iń tayomte hijukʼme.”" 
2Kings9:20 Uni pahradar do khobore emkeda, “Uni do onko ṭhene seṭerakana, menkhan uni hõ bae ruạṛ hijukʼ kana. Rãt gạḍi reakʼ calao ńelte bujhạukʼ kana Nimsiren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Jihuge rãt gạḍi doe calaoeda. Uni do raṅgao akan hoṛ lekage rãte calaoeda.”" 
2Kings9:21 Unre Joram doe hukumkeda, “Ińakʼ rãt gạḍire sadom joṛaokope.” Ar sadomko joṛaoketʼko khan Israelren raj Joram ar Jihudạren raj Ahasiạ do apan ạpin rãt gạḍire decʼkate Jihu sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ kin oḍok calaoena. Ar Jisriyelren Nabatakʼ jumi ṭhen Jihu sãotekin ńapamena." 
2Kings9:22 Joram do Jihuye kulikedea, “Jihu, amakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ do cetʼ bhagegea?” Jihui roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amren eṅgam Isebelakʼ boṅga sewa ar gunidar kạmiko nunạkʼ bạ̃ṛti hoyokʼkana je, cekate ińakʼ hijukʼ do bhage hoedaṛekokʼa?”" 
2Kings9:23 Niạ katha ańjomkate Joram do usạrate gạḍi ạcurkate Ahasiại hohoadeteye metadea, “Ahasiạ, noa do hul kana.”" 
2Kings9:24 Unre Jihu do daṛeakʼ bhor akʼe ṭuniạuketʼtaete Joramakʼ dạbi talareye tuńkedea. Ar sar do uniyakʼ mãyãm kunḍi secʼte boloyena ar uni do rãt gạḍi khone ńurena. 
2Kings9:25 Unre Jihu do acʼ sãoten subedar Bidkare metadea, “Ma kuṭuṅ idiyem ar Jisreyelren Nabatakʼ jumire giḍikaeme. Disạime, uniren apat Ahab tayomte rãt gạḍite laṅ calakʼkan tahẽkanre Probhu Isor do Ahab upạrte niạ kathae menleda," 
2Kings9:26 ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, iń do hola Nabat ar uniren hoponkoakʼ mãyãmiń ńel akada, ar niạ jumi cetanre khạṭige uni reakʼ am ṭheniń hala ruạṛa.’ Enḍekhan Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka ńitokʼ kuṭuṅ rakapʼkate ona jumire giḍikaeme.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ar okaṭakʼ hoyen ona ńelte Jihudạren Ahasiạ raj do Beth-Hagan reakʼ horteye dạṛkeda. Jihu do uniye khudạu idikedete ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Uni hõ gojepe.” Unre hoṛko do Ibleam ṭhen Gur ńutumanakʼ rakabokʼ horre Ahasiạ do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍiregeko ghạlkedea, menkhan uni do Megidatteye dạṛkeda ar onḍegeye gocʼena." 
2Kings9:28 Ar uniren gutiko do rãt gạḍite Jerusalemteko idikedea ar Dạud nagrahare uniren hapṛamko sãote uni lạgitʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkan topareko baekadea. 
2Kings9:29 Ahabren hopon Joramakʼ rajokʼ gelmitʼakʼ bochorre Ahasiạ do Jihudạren raje hoylena. 
2Kings9:30 Inạ tayom Jihu do Jisriyelteye senena. Ona kathae ańjomketʼ khan Isebel doe aenom kajarena ar rokʼ nạkicʼkate jalna khone uyuṅ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings9:31 Jihu do tinre phaṭokteye bolokʼkan tahẽkana unre Isebel do uniye metadea, “E Simri lekan khũniạhi, apnar mạlik khukhũnicʼ! Amakʼ hijukʼ reakʼ monsubạ do cetʼ bhagegea?”" 
2Kings9:32 Jihu do jalna secʼ beṅgetʼ rakapʼkateye menkeda, “Iń secʼ okoe menakʼpea? Okoe menakʼpea?” Unre adom mạ̃yạ̃ṛiko do uniko oyoṅkedea." 
2Kings9:33 Jihui metatʼkoa, “Uni do latarte giḍigotʼkaepe.” Unre onko do latarte Isebelko ḍhaka ńurkedea ar Jihuwakʼ rãt gạḍiren sadomko do uniko lebetʼ gańjaokedea. Onate uniyakʼ mãyãm do ṭunṭiyentaete pạcrire ar sadomkoakʼ hoṛmore paṛaoena." 
2Kings9:34 Ona tayom Jihu do bhitrite senkateye jom-ńũkeda. Uni doe menkeda, “Uni sarapicʼ maejiu do topaye reakʼ bebostaepe, ente uni do rajren hoponerae tahẽkana.”" 
2Kings9:35 Menkhan hoṛko do uni topaye lạgitʼko senen khan bohokʼ khạpri, ti ar jaṅga chaḍa ar cetʼge bako ńamletʼtaea." 
2Kings9:36 Onko do ruạṛ hecʼkate Jihuko lạiyade khan uni doe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Tisberen Eliạ hotete ṭhik niạ kathageye menleda, ‘Jisriyelakʼ jumire setako do Isebelakʼ jelko joma." 
2Kings9:37 Ona jumi reakʼ otre Isebelakʼ hoṛmo do guricʼ leka giḍi akan tahena ar okoege bako orom daṛeakʼa ona do Isebelakʼ hoṛmo kana mente.’ ” 
2Kings10:1 Samariạre Ahabren eaegel hoponko tahẽkana. Jihu do ciṭhi olkate Samariạte Jisriyelren subedarko ṭhen, murubbiko ṭhen ar Ahabren bõs rurukhiyạko ṭhene kolkeda. Uniye olkeda," 
2Kings10:2 “Aperen kisạ̃ṛren bõsko do ape ṭhen menakʼkoa ar rãt gạḍi, sadomko, pạcrite esetʼ nagrahako ar khanḍa bhanḍako hõ menakʼgea. Onate niạ ciṭhi ńam são sãote aperen kisạ̃ṛren sanam khon bhage ar lekmanicʼ hopon bachaokate Ahabakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubepe, ar ona tayom do aperen kisạ̃ṛakʼ bõs lạgitʼ lạṛhạipe.”" 
2Kings10:3  
2Kings10:4 Menkhan onko do botor caṛhaoatʼkoteye menkeda, “Barea raj Jihu upạrte bạkin teṅgo daṛeada enḍekhan abo do cetʼ bo daṛeakʼa?”" 
2Kings10:5 Onate raj oṛakʼren sordar, nagraharen murubbiko ar Ahab bõsren rurukhiyạko do niạ katha Jihuko roṛ gotʼadea, “Ale do amren golam kanale. Am cetʼem metale onagele onkaea. Ale do okoege bale rajkoa; am okaṭakʼ bhagem hudisetʼkan onage onkaeme.”" 
2Kings10:6 Unre Jihu do onko ṭhen niạ menkate ciṭhiye olkeda, “Iń secʼpe tahen khan ar ińakʼ hukumpe manaoetʼ khan aperen kisạ̃ṛren bõsrenkoakʼ bohokʼ makʼkate gapa niạ okte Jisriyelte iń ṭhen ạguiype.” Ahabren onko eaegel bõsko do unre nagraharen napṛakʼ hoṛko ṭhenko tahẽkana. Onko do onkoko ńel todarotetʼko tahẽkana." 
2Kings10:7 Jihuakʼ ciṭhi seṭeren tayom hoṛko do onko eaegel jotogeko sapʼketʼkoa arko gocʼketʼkoa. Ona tayom khạclạkʼre onkoakʼ bohokʼko bhoraoketʼte Jisriyelte Jihu ṭhenko kolkeda. 
2Kings10:8 Unre mitʼ hoṛ do hecʼkate Jihui metadea, “Onko do onkoakʼ bohokʼko ạguakada.” Unre Jihui hukumkeda, “Onako do nagraha reakʼ phaṭok bolokʼ horre bar ṭhen ḍhipikate setakʼ hạbicʼ dohokakʼpe.”" 
2Kings10:9 Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre Jihu do bahreteye senena. Uni do sanam hoṛko samaṅre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Apeakʼ do jãhãn dos bạnukʼa. Ińge ińren kisạ̃ṛ upạrte soṛojontrokate uniń gocʼakadea, menkhan noko sanamko do okoeye gocʼketʼkoa?" 
2Kings10:10 Baḍae dohokakʼpe, Ahabren bõsko upạrte Probhu Isore roṛakatʼ mitʼṭecʼ katha hõ baṅ ạuṛiyagokʼa. Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Eliạ hotete oka hoyokʼ reakʼ kathae menletʼ onae onka akada.”" 
2Kings10:11 Tayomte Jihu do Jisriyelre Ahabakʼ bõsren sarecʼ hoṛko, uniren sanam manotan hoṛko, uniren gateko ar uniren naekekoe gocʼketʼkoa. Ar onkoren do celege jiwetʼ bako tahẽlena." 
2Kings10:12 Inạ tayom Jihu doe oḍokente Samariạ secʼe mohnḍayena. Ar horre gupikoakʼ ato Bet-Ekodre Jihudạren Ahasiạ rajren bõskoe ńapamketʼkoa. Uni do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Okoe kanape ape do? Onkoko menkeda, “Ale dole Ahasiạ bõsren hoṛ kana. Ale do Isebel rạniren hoponko ar raj gharońjrenko johar emako lạgitʼle calakʼkana.”" 
2Kings10:13  
2Kings10:14 Unre Jihui hukumkeda, “Onko do jiwetʼte sapʼkope.” Ar hoṛko do jiwetʼte onkoko sapʼketʼkoa ar onḍenakʼ kuń ṭhenko gocʼketʼkoa. Onko do lekhare pongel bar hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko modren mitʼ hoṛ hõ jiwetʼ do bae doholetʼkoa." 
2Kings10:15 Ar Jihu do onḍe khone calaoen khan Rekabren hopon Jehonadab sãoteye ńapamena. Uni do Jihu sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼgeye hecʼlena. Jihu do uni joharadeteye metadea, “Cetʼ leka am secʼ minạń onkage cetʼ amhõ iń secʼ menama?” Jehonadabe roṛ ruạrkeda, “Hẽ, minạńgea.” Jihui menkeda, “Onka khan ti baṛe tiạrtam.” Jehonadab tiye tiạrketʼtae khan Jihu do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍireye rakapʼkedea." 
2Kings10:16 Ona tayom Jihuye menkeda, “Iń sãote hijukʼme ar Probhu Isor lạgitʼ ińakʼ tinạkʼ gagoc menakʼ ona baṛe ńelme.” Niạ menkate uni do rãt gạḍiteye idikedea." 
2Kings10:17 Jihu do Samariạte hecʼkate Ahab bõsren sarecʼ sanam hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Probhu Isor do Eliạ cetʼ lekae metade tahẽkan onkage Jihu do onkoe marao utạrketʼkoa. 
2Kings10:18 Ona tayom Jihu do sanam hoṛko jarwaketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Ahab do Bakʼal thoṛageye sewawade tahẽkana, menkhan Jihu do ona khon hõ ḍhere sewawaea." 
2Kings10:19 Ńitokʼ ape do Bakʼal debotaren sanam nạbiko, sekʼwako ar naekeko hoho ạgukope. Ar ńelpe okoehõ jemon aloko sarecʼ tahen, ente Bakʼal debota ńutumte maraṅ okocʼ janwar dãṛẽko lạgitʼ iń doń bebostayetʼkana. Onate jãhãe bae hijukʼ enḍekhan uni doe gocʼ ocokʼa.” Menkhan Jihu do Bakʼal debota sewawaekanko marao giḍikako lạgitʼge niạ phundi doe aṭaoleda." 
2Kings10:20 Jihui menkeda, “Bakʼal debota ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ sabha hohokʼma.” Onate hoṛko do ona reakʼko lại sodorkeda." 
2Kings10:21 Unre Jihu do Israel reakʼ sanam jaegare khobore kolkeda. Onate Bakʼal debotaren sanam sekʼwako do hecʼkateko jarwayena, ar mitʼ hoṛhõ bako sarecʼlena. Onko do Bakʼal debotawakʼ mundilreko boloyen khan nonkako bhiṛkeda, mundil do hoṛkote perecʼ cabayena." 
2Kings10:22 Unre Jihu do kicricʼ godamren sordare metadea, “Bakʼal debota sekʼwa sanamko lạgitʼ kicricʼ ạguiyme.” Onate uni do onko lạgitʼ kicricʼe ạgukeda." 
2Kings10:23 Ar ona tayom Jihu ar Rekab hopon Jehonadab do Bakʼal debotawakʼ mundiltekin boloyena. Jihu do Bakʼal sekʼwakoe metatʼkoa, “Mońjtepe sendrakoa jemon ape sãote Probhu Isorren gutiko aloko tahen, eken Bakʼal debota sekʼwa hoṛgeko tahenma.”" 
2Kings10:24 Unre onko do janwar dãṛẽ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. Jihu do irạlgel hoṛko niạ menkate sontorte bahrere teṅgo ocoketʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Okaṭakʼ bhariń ematʼpe onko modre mitʼ hoṛ hõ jodi jãhãeye ńir paskao ocoye enḍekhan uni ńir paskaoicʼ bodolte uniyakʼ jiwi hataokʼtaea.”" 
2Kings10:25 Jihu do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobe sạtketʼ sãote pahradarko ar subedarkoko hukumkeda, “Bhitrite bolokʼpe ar onko gocʼ cabakope; mitʼ hoṛhõ jemon aloko dạṛ daṛeakʼ.” Unre onko do tarwaṛete onkoko gocʼketʼkoa. Pahradar ar subedarko do mundil bahrete mạ̃ṛĩkoko giḍi baṛakatʼte bhitri oṛakʼteko boloyena." 
2Kings10:26 Bakʼal debotawakʼ mundil khon pujạ reakʼ dhiriko oḍokkate onakoko atar giḍikada. 
2Kings10:27 Ona tayom onko do Bakʼal debotawakʼ pujạ dhiriko gejerkeda ar mundil hõko rạputʼkeda. Hoṛko do unkhon teheń hạbicʼ ona do pạikhana oṛakʼ menteko beohar ạguiyeda. 
2Kings10:28 Nonkate Jihu do Israelko tala khon Bakʼal debota pujại bondkeda. 
2Kings10:29 Menkhan Nabatren hopon Jerobiam Israelko okae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan ona khon uni do bae ruạṛ hecʼlena. Ona do hoyokʼkana Bethel ar Danre sonaren mĩhũ sewawạkin reakʼ. 
2Kings10:30 Probhu Isor do Jihui metadea, “Am do ińakʼ mẽtʼre hok reakʼgem kạmi akada ar onam onka akatʼte amren bõsko do pon piṛhi hạbicʼ Israel reakʼ siṅghạsonreko duṛupʼa.”" 
2Kings10:31 Enhõ Jihu do goṭa ontorte Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko manao lạgitʼ bae sontorlena. Jerobiam Israelko okakoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan uni hõ ona khon do bae ruạṛlena. 
2Kings10:32 Ar Probhu Isor do onako okte khon Israel disạm reakʼ simạnakoe huḍiń idikeda. Ar Hasael do Israelkoakʼ disạm reakʼ jordan gaḍa purub secʼakʼ sanam jaegare onkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Onako jaega do hoyokʼkana Arnon soḍokʼ aṛe reakʼ Aroer hạbicʼ sanam Gilead ar Bason disạm. Noa do tahẽkana Gad, Ruben ar Manase ṭoṭhako." 
2Kings10:33  
2Kings10:34 Jihuakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathako ar lạṛhạire uniyakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol akana. 
2Kings10:35 Ar Jihu do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uni do Samariạreko topakedea. Uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Jehoas do raje hoyena. 
2Kings10:36 Jihu do Samariạre bargel irạl bochor Israel cetanre raje calaokeda. 
2Kings11:1 Jihudạren raj Ahasiạren eṅgattetʼ tinreye ńelkeda, acʼren hopon doe gocʼ ocoyena unre uni do Jihudạ rajren sanam hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa." 
2Kings11:2 Menkhan sanam raj hoponko ạuriko gocʼ ocokʼre Jehoram rajren hoponera Ahasiạren misera Jehosaba do Ahasiạren hopon Joase kombṛo idikedea. Athaliạ ṭhen khon okore dohoye lạgitʼge Jehosaba do Joas ar uniren jokʼtonicʼ mitʼṭecʼ giticʼakʼ oṛakʼreye dohokatʼkinạ. Ar onate Joas do bae gocʼ ocolena. 
2Kings11:3 Uni do acʼren jokʼtonicʼ sãote turui bochor Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre okogeye tahẽkana; unre Athaliạ do disạmreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings11:4 Eaeakʼ bochorre Jehoyada naeke do rurukhiyạkoren subedarko ar pahradarkoren subedarkoe hoho ạguketʼkoa ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre acʼ ṭhene hohoatʼkoa. Uni do onko sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreye kiriạ ocoketʼkote rajren hopone udukʼatʼkoa. 
2Kings11:5 Ona tayom uni do hukumatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Okaṭakʼ cekae hoyokʼtape ona do noage: ape okoe do jirạukʼ mãhãre kạmi lạgitʼpe calakʼa, unre pe hạṭińko modre mitʼ hạṭińrenko do raj doṅgolpe horhoea," 
2Kings11:6 ar mitʼ hạṭińrenko do Sur-phaṭok duạr ṭhenpe tahena ar mitʼ hạṭińrenko do pahradarkoakʼ kuḍạm reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenko tahena. Nonkate ape do koejoṅ oṛakʼpe horhokakʼa. 
2Kings11:7 Aperen eṭakʼ bar dolrenko okoe do jirạukʼ mãhãre chuṭipe ńam ape jotokoge koejoṅ oṛakʼre rajpe horhoyea. 
2Kings11:8 Ar ape do apan ạpin khanḍa bhanḍa sapʼkate raj beṛhaetepe tahena. Ar jãhãege ape ṭhene hijukʼ uni dope gocʼ giḍikaea. Ar jãhãtege raje calakʼ ape do uni sopor soporpe tahena.” 
2Kings11:9 Naeke Jehoyada do subedarko oka lekae hukumatʼko onkage onko doko kạmikeda. Subedarko do jotoge apan ạpin hoṛkoante, metakʼme okoe do jirạukʼ mãhãre kạmi reakʼ pạli bodolko hecʼlen ar okoe do kạmi khonko ruạṛ calakʼkan tahẽkan subedarko do onko salakʼ naeke Jehoyada ṭhenko hecʼena." 
2Kings11:10 Unre Jehoyada do Dạud rajakʼ okako borlom ar ḍhalko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre tahẽkan onako hataokate subedarkoe ematʼkoa. 
2Kings11:11 Ar pahradarko do raj rukhiạye lạgitʼ sanamkoge khanḍa bhanḍa sapʼkate mundil oṛakʼ samaṅ reakʼ pinḍ ṭhen dạkhin secʼ khon utạr hạbicʼko teṅgoyena. 
2Kings11:12 Unre Jehoyada do rajren hopone oḍok ạgukedete uniyakʼ bohokʼre mukuṭe horokʼadea ar uniyakʼ tire bondobos reakʼ puthiko caladea. Onko do raj menteko ojokʼ bahalkedea ar disạm hoṛko do ti thayoate ar ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoateko menkeda, “Moharaj do jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma.”" 
2Kings11:13 Pahradar ar hoṛkoakʼ hoho ańjomte Athaliạ do Probhu lsorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. 
2Kings11:14 Uni doe ńelkeda raj do tham khunṭi aṛereye teṅgo akana. Ar Subedarko ar sakwa okʼroṅko do raj beṛhaeteko teṅgo akana ar disạmren sanam hoṛ doko rạskạkʼ kana ar sakwako oroṅeda. Niạ ńelte Athaliạ do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼte ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Hul! Hul!”" 
2Kings11:15 Unre Jehoyada naeke do okoe cetanre lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ bhare emade tahẽkan uni subedare hukumadea, “Uni do lạṛhại phạdko talare dohokate nonḍe khon oḍok idiyepe. Ar okoe uni tayomteye hijukʼ uni hõ gojepe.” Niạ lahare uni doe hukumatʼko tahẽkana, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ talare Athaliạ goje do ṭhik baṅ hoyokʼa." 
2Kings11:16 Onate Athaliạ doe sapʼ ocoyena ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ racare sadomkoakʼ bolokʼ horre idikateko gocʼkedea. 
2Kings11:17 Ona tayom Jehoyada do raj ar hoṛko talare noa bondobose bandhaokeda, onko do Probhu Isorren hoṛ lekako calakʼa. Ona chaḍa uni do raj ar hoṛko talare mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda." 
2Kings11:18 Ona tayom disạmren sanam hoṛ do Bakʼal debotawakʼ mundilte senkate onako rạputʼ giḍikada. Onko do onḍenakʼ pinḍ ar murhutʼkoko rạputʼ giḍikatʼkoa ar Bakʼal debotaren naeke Matan do pinḍ samaṅreko gocʼkedea. Tayomte Jehoyada naeke do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre pahradarkoe bahalketʼkoa. 
2Kings11:19 Ona tayom uni do subedarko, rurukhiyạko, sarecʼ pahradarko ar disạmren sanam hoṛko soṅgekate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon raje oḍok ạgukedea. Unkin do pahradarkoakʼ phaṭok bhitrite bolokate raj oṛakʼtekin boloyena ar raj do siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼkedea." 
2Kings11:20 Onate disạmren sanam hoṛko rạskạyena ar nagraha do suluk ruạṛena. Ar Athaliạ do raj oṛakʼreye gocʼ ocoyena. 
2Kings11:21 Joas tinre rajokʼe ehopʼena unre uniyakʼ umer do eken eae bochor tahẽkantaea. 
2Kings12:1 Jihuakʼ rajokʼ eaeyakʼ bochorre Joas do raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre uni do pongel bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Sibiạ tahẽkana; uni do Ber-seba nagraharen kuṛiye tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:2 Naeke Jehoyada tinạkʼ din Joasren sosolhayicʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din Joas do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:3 Menkhan than boṭkocʼko do uni hõ bae marao utạrleda; hoṛko do un hạbicʼ hõ onakore janwarko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupkoko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:4 Joas do naekeye metadea, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sonotakʼ dan lekate tinạkʼ ṭaka poesa ạgukʼ onape hataoa arpe doho jarwaea. Onako do hoyokʼkana- hoṛko lekhako jokhecʼ ạguakʼ ṭaka, manot purạu lạgitʼ ạguakʼ ṭaka ar koejoṅ oṛakʼte apnar kusi leka ạguakʼ ṭaka." 
2Kings12:5 Ar mimitʼ naekeko do akoren hoṛko ṭhen khon ṭaka poesa hataokate koejoṅ oṛakʼ jut aroe kạmire ona jemonko beohar ma.” 
2Kings12:6 Menkhan Joasakʼ rajokʼ bargel pe bochorre naekeko do unhõ koejoṅ oṛakʼ do bako jut aro akatʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:7 Ona iạte Joas do Jehoyada ar eṭakʼ naekeko hohoatʼkoteye kuliyana, “Koejoṅ oṛakʼ do cedakʼ bape jut aroyeda? Hoṛko ṭhen khon ṭaka hataokate ape ṭhen do alope dohokakʼ bickom koejoṅ oṛakʼ jut aroe lạgitʼ emokʼpe.”" 
2Kings12:8 Naekeko doko rạjiyena, hoṛko ṭhen khon ṭaka poesa hataokate ako ṭhen do bako dohoya ar apnarte koejoṅ oṛakʼ jut aroe reakʼ kạmi hõ bako kạmiya." 
2Kings12:9 Unre Jehoyada naeke do mitʼṭecʼ baksa hataokate ona reakʼ ḍhakna cetanre mitʼṭecʼe bhugạkʼkeda. Ona do pinḍ aṛere Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bolokʼ duạr reakʼ jojomsa aṛereye dohokada. Okoe naekeko koejoṅ oṛakʼ bolokʼ duạrko horhoyetʼ tahẽkan onko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạguakʼ sanam ṭaka ona baksareko dohoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:10 Nonkate tinreko ńelkeda ona baksare aema ṭaka jarwa akana unre rajren hoṛ ar naekeko hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạguakʼ ṭaka lekhakate thạilạkʼreko bhoraokakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:11 Ar tinạkʼ hoyena ona soṅ tayom ona ṭaka do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ okoeko ńel jutetʼ tahẽkan onko do hoṛkoakʼ tireko jimạyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar ona ṭaka do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroyetʼkan hoṛko, metakʼme chutạr mistriko, oṛakʼ benao mistriko," 
2Kings12:12 raj-mistriko ar dhiri gegetʼ mistriko mujuri lekateko emakokan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe kạmi lạgitʼ onko do kaṭ ar getʼakʼ dhirikoko kirińetʼ tahẽkana ar ona kạmi lạgitʼ okoeyakʼ oka lagaokʼkan tahẽkan ona lạgitʼko khorocetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings12:13 Koejoṅ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ oka ṭakako ạguiyetʼ tahẽkan onate do rupạ reakʼ bạṭiko, sultạ saphae reakʼ cimṭạko, chichiṭiạu bạṭiko, pẽpṛẽtʼko, se Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sona-rupạ reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bhajanko do bako benao ocoleda." 
2Kings12:14 Ńel todarotko do ona ṭaka mistrikoko emakokan tahẽkana jemon onko do koejoṅ oṛakʼ jut aroe reakʼ kạmireko beohar daṛeakʼ. 
2Kings12:15 Menkhan onko ńel todarotkan hoṛko ṭhen khon hisạb hatao reakʼ jạṛuṛ do baṅ tahẽkana, ente onko do purạte pạtiạr salakʼko kạmikan tahẽkana." 
2Kings12:16 Dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ ṭaka do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ baksare bako dohoyetʼ tahẽkana; ona do naekekoakʼ bakhra kana. 
2Kings12:17 Onako dinre Aramren raj Hasael doe rakapʼ calaoente Gat upạrteye lạṛhạiyena ar onae hatkeda. Ona tayom Jerusalem akromon lạgitʼ uni doe laha idiyena. 
2Kings12:18 Unre Jihudạren raj Joas do acʼ ar acʼren hapṛamkoren, metakʼme Jihudạren Jehosaphat raj, Jehoram ar Ahasiạ emakʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte begarakʼ sanam jinisko Aramren raj Hasael ṭhene kolkeda. Ona chaḍa uni do Probhu Isorakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre ńamakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ joto sona hõ uni ṭhene kolkeda. Onate Hasael do Jerusalem bạgikateye calaoena." 
2Kings12:19 Joasakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathako do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings12:20 Uniren gutikin do uni upạrte soṛojontrokate Silla calakʼ horre Bet-milore unikin gocʼkedea. 
2Kings12:21 Okoe gutikin unikin gocʼlede unkin dokin hoyokʼkana Simeatren hopon Josakar ar Somerren hopon Jehosabad. Joase gocʼen khan Dạud nagrahare acʼren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare acʼren hopon Amasiạ do raje hoyena. 
2Kings13:1 Jihudạren raj Ahasiạren hopon Joasakʼ rajokʼ bargel pe bochorre Jihuren hopon Jehoahas do Samariạre Israelkoren raj lekate geleae bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings13:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam Israelko cetʼ lekae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan onkage uni hõe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkana; ar ona khon do bae ruạṛlena. 
2Kings13:3 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Israel upạrte pit caṛhaoentaea; ar uni do Aramren raj Hasael ar uniren hopon Benhadadakʼ tire ghane ghạṛicʼe soprotetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Kings13:4 Inạ tayom Jehoahas do Probhu Isor ṭhene nehõrena ar Probhu Isor do uniyakʼe ańjomketʼtaea, ente Aramren raj do ạḍi bạṛicʼ Israelko cetanre jor julume calaoetʼ tahẽkana ar ona do uniye ńelkeda." 
2Kings13:5 Unre Probhu Isor do Israelko mitʼṭen babańcaoicʼe ematʼkoa. Onate Israelko do Aramrenkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạko ńamkeda. Ona iạte onko do lahate leka arhõ sulukte girobasokʼko ehopʼena. 
2Kings13:6 Menkhan Jerobiam Israelko cetʼlekae kại ocoletʼko onko do uniyakʼ bõsrenko reakʼ onako kại khon bako ruạṛlena, menkhan kạmi iditegeko tahẽyena. Ona chaḍa Asera muṭhạn do unhõ Samariạrege tahẽyena." 
2Kings13:7 Mõṛẽgel aswariko, gel goṭecʼ rãt gạḍi ar gel hajar palṭonko chaḍa Jehoahasren lạṛhại phạdren do ar celege bako tahẽkana, ente Aramren raj do sarecʼ sanamkoe marao giḍi utạrletʼkoa. Uni do ot lekage jaṅgateye lebetʼ gańjaoletʼkoa." 
2Kings13:8 Jehoahasakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ kathako ar lạṛhạire jitạukʼ reakʼ katha do “Israel rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings13:9 Ar Jehoahas do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uni do Samariạreko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Jehoase rajena. 
2Kings13:10 Jihudạren raj Joasakʼ rajokʼ pegel eaeyakʼ bochorre Jehoahasren hopon Jehoas do Samariạren raje hoyena. Uni do gel turui bochor raje calaoleda. 
2Kings13:11 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam cetʼleka Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan Jehoas hõ onkageye kạmi ocoketʼkoa, ar ona khon uni do bae ruạṛlena." 
2Kings13:12 Jehoasakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha ar okaṭakʼ daṛete uni do Jihudạren Amasiạ raj sãoteye lạṛhạilen ona do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings13:13 Ar Jehoas do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uniren hopon Jerobiam do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. Ar Jehoas do Samariạre Israelren rajko sãoteye topa ocoyena. 
2Kings13:14 Inạ lahare Elisae doe ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana ar ona kạhilrege uni doe gocʼena. Uni gujukʼ lahare Israelren raj Jehoas do uni ńeńele senlena ar rakʼ rakʼteye menleda, “E ińren ạpuń, E ińren ạpuń, rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko leka am do Israelren rurukhiyạyicʼ kanam.”" 
2Kings13:15 Unre Elisae do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ akʼ sar ạguiytam.” Uni do onae ạguketʼ khan Elisaeye menkeda, “Akʼ sar sabme.” Onate uni do onae sapʼkeda. Tayomte Elisae do rajakʼ ti cetanre acʼakʼ ti dohokateye menkeda," 
2Kings13:16  
2Kings13:17 “Purub senakʼ jalna jhijme.” Uni doe jhicʼkeda. Ona tayom Elisaeye menkeda, “Ma tuń me.” Jehoas do jalna jhicʼkateye tuńkeda. Unre Elisae doe menkeda, “Noa do hoyokʼkana Probhu Isorakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ sar, Aram cetanre jitạukʼ reakʼ sarge. Am do Aramrenko Aphekrem bhagaokoa arem marao utạrkoa.”" 
2Kings13:18 Ona tayom Elisaeye menkeda, “Ma sarko hatao ruạṛme.” Ar raj do onakoe hataoketʼ khan Elisaeye menkeda, “Ma otre dalme.” Ar raj do pe dhao otreye dalkeda." 
2Kings13:19 Unre Isorren hoṛ do raṅgaoenteye menkeda, “Mõṛẽ se turui dhao otre dadal jạruṛ tahẽkantama; enḍekhan am do Aramrenko purạtem marao caba daṛekekoa. Menkhan ńitokʼ do eken pe dhaoem bhagao daṛeakoa.”" 
2Kings13:20 Tayomte Elisaeye gocʼen khan uni doko topakedea. Moabrenko do jao bochor Israel disạmte luluṭ lạgitʼko bolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings13:21 Mitʼ dhao Israelko do mitʼ hoṛko topayede tahẽkanre ackage mitʼ dol luluṭkoko ńelketʼko khan onko do Elisaeakʼ topare mạ̃ṛĩko giḍikada. Khange uni hoṛakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do Elisaeakʼ jaṅ sãote jakʼen soṅgete uni doe jiwetʼ ruạṛena are teṅgoyena. 
2Kings13:22 Jehoahasakʼ goṭa rajokʼ oktere Aramren raj Hasael do Israel cetanreye jor julumetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings13:23 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Abraham, Isahak ar Jakob lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ bondobose doholetʼ ona iạte uni do Israelko cetanre daya are mãyãkʼkan tahẽkante onkoe luturatʼkoa. Onate teheń hạbicʼ hõ marao giḍiko se apnar samaṅ khon sạṅgiń giḍikako do bae khojleda." 
2Kings13:24 Aramren raj Hasaele gocʼen khan uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Benhadad do raje hoyena. 
2Kings13:25 Unre Jehoahasren hopon Jehoas do ona nagrahako arhõe hat ruạṛkeda one okako do Hasaelren hopon Benhadad do acʼren apat Jehoahas ṭhen khon lạṛhạireye jitạu akatʼ tahẽkan. Jehoas do pe dhao Benhadad lạṛhạireye bhagao ledete Israelkoakʼ nagrahakoe rukhiyạleda. 
2Kings14:1 Israelren raj Jehoahasren hopon Jehoasakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochorre Jihudạren raj Joasren hopon Amasiạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings14:2 Raje hoyokʼ jokhecʼ uniyakʼ umer do bargel mõṛẽ bochor tahẽkantaea. Uni do Jerusalemre bargel are bochor hạbicʼ raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Jehoyadin tahẽkana; uni do Jerusalemren maejiue tahẽkana. 
2Kings14:3 Amasiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan uniren hapṛam Dạud leka do baṅa. Uni do acʼren apat Joas leka sanamakʼgeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings14:4 Menkhan than boṭkocʼko do bae marao utạrleda, ar hoṛko hõ onḍe janwarkoko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings14:5 Ado rajosṭi acʼakʼ tire hecʼen khan okoekin guti do rajkin gocʼlede, metakʼme uniren apatkin gocʼlede uni do unkine gocʼketʼkinạ." 
2Kings14:6 Menkhan Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrire oka ol menakʼ ona leka uni do uniren hoponko bae gocʼletʼkoa. Ona puthire Probhu Isorakʼ niạ hukum ol tahẽkana, “Hoponkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte apat se apatakʼ kại iạte hoponko do bako gocʼ ocokʼa, menkhan mimitʼko do akoakʼ kại gunạkʼtegeko gujukʼa." 
2Kings14:7 Amasiạ do buluṅ doreãore gel hajar Edomrenkoe gocʼletʼkoa ar lạṛhạikate Selae hatkeda ar ona reakʼ ńutum do Joktheyele dohokeda; ona ńutum do teheń hạbicʼ hõ menakʼgea. 
2Kings14:8 Ona tayom uni do Jehuren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jehoahasren hopon Israelren raj Jehoas ṭhene roṛgotʼkada, “Dela, hijukʼme mẽtʼ mẽtʼ laṅ beṅgetʼange.”" 
2Kings14:9 Menkhan Israelren raj do Jihudạren raj ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada, “Lebanon reakʼ aṭkuṭi jạnum do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada, ‘ińren hopon sãote amren hoponera baplayem.’ Ona tayom mitʼṭen bir janwar do hecʼkate ona aṭkuṭi jạnumkoe lebetʼ gańjaokeda." 
2Kings14:10 Edomren hoṛkom bhagao akatʼkote amakʼ mon do sạrige bạḍạite perecʼ akana. Ma ṭhonokokʼte dhirpurkokʼme, ar amakʼ oṛakʼrege tahenme. Cedakʼ muhin dom hoho ạgujoṅkana ar ona sãote Jihudạ reakʼ maraokʼ hõ?”" 
2Kings14:11 Menkhan Amasiạ do ona bae luturada. Onate Israelren raj Jehoas do uniye akromonkedea. Uni ar Jihudạren Amasiạ raj do Jihudạ reakʼ Bet-Semesrekin samna sạmniyena. 
2Kings14:12 Unre Israelkoakʼ tire Jihudạ doe bhagao ocoyena ar sanamko apan ạpin oṛakʼteko dạṛkeda. 
2Kings14:13 Israelren raj Jehoahas do Bet-Semesre Ahasiaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Joasren hopon Jihudạren raj Amasiại bondikedea. Ona tayom Jehoas do Jerusalemte senkate onḍenakʼ pạcri reakʼ Ephrayim phaṭok duạr khon konac reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼ ponsae moka jeleń mitʼ hạṭińe rạputʼkeda." 
2Kings14:14 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ar raj oṛakʼ khajańci reakʼ sona, rupạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko tinạkʼ tahẽkan ona sanamakʼe idikeda. Ona chaḍa uni do jạmin lekate adom adom hoṛkoante Samariạteye ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Kings14:15 Jehoasakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kathako, ar lạṛhạire uniyakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ katha ar Jihudạren Amasiạ raj upạrte uniyakʼ lạṛhại reakʼ katha do, “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Kings14:16 Tayomte Jehoas do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene ruạṛ calaoena ar uni do Samariạre Israelren rajko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uniren hopon Jerobiam do uni bodolte raje hoyena. 
2Kings14:17 Israelren raj Jehoahasren hopon Jehoasakʼ gujukʼ tayom Jihudạren raj Joasren hopon Amasiạ do arhõ gelmõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
2Kings14:18 Amasiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathako do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings14:19 Jerusalemre Amasiạ upạrte soṛojontro hoyen khan uni do Lakhisteye ruạṛ calaoena, menkhan Lakhiste hoṛ kolkate uni do onḍeko gocʼkedea." 
2Kings14:20 Uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do sadomre ladekate Jerusalemteko ạgukeda ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. 
2Kings14:21 Ona tayom Jihudạren sanam hoṛ do Amasiạwakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Asariạko rajkedea. Unre uniyakʼ umer do gel turui bochor tahẽkantaea. 
2Kings14:22 Amasiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senen khan Asariạ do Elat nagraha arhoe benao arokeda ar Jihudạ gobolreye ạgukeda. 
2Kings14:23 Jihudạ raj Joasren hopon Amasiạwakʼ rajokʼ gelmõṛẽakʼ bochorre Israelren raj Jehoas hopon Jerobiam do Samariạre raje hoyena ar uni do pongel mitʼ bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings14:24 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam Israelko cetʼlekae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan uni hõ onkageye kạmikeda. 
2Kings14:25 Israelren Probhu Isor do acʼren guti Gat-Hepherren Amitaeren hopon Jona nạbi hotete oka kathae roṛletʼ ona katha lekage Jerobiam do Hamat ṭoṭha khon Araba doreão hạbicʼ Israelkoakʼ disạm reakʼ lahateakʼ simạna do arhõ acʼakʼ dokholreye ạgukeda. 
2Kings14:26 Noa reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, Probhu Isor do Israelren sạdhin se guti jotoge ạḍi bạṛicʼ sasetokʼkane ńelletʼkoa; ar onko goṛowako leka do celege bako tahẽkana." 
2Kings14:27 Probhu Isorakʼ sana do baṅ tahẽkana, serma latar khon Israelakʼ ńutum marao giḍikakʼ do. Ona iạte uni do Jehoasren hopon Jerobiam hotete onkoe bańcaoketʼkoa." 
2Kings14:28 Jerobiamakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ, lạṛhạire uniyakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ ar mitʼ jokhecʼ Jihudạ gobolre tahẽkan Damesek ar Hamat cetʼ leka Israel lạgitʼ arhõe hatketʼ onako reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Kings14:29 Inạ tayom uni doe gocʼena ar acʼren hapṛamko ṭhen, metakʼme Israelren rajko ṭhene calaoena ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Sakhariạ do raje hoyena." 
2Kings15:1 Israelren Jerobiam rajakʼ rajokʼ bargel eaeyakʼ bochorre Jihudạren raj Amasiạren hopon Asariạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings15:2 Uni do gel turui bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre mõṛẽgel bar bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Jekoliạ tahẽkana; uni do Jerusalemren maejiue tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:3 Asariạ do acʼren apat Amasiạ lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:4 Menkhan than boṭkocʼko do bae marao giḍileda; ar hoṛko hõ onakore janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:5 Tayomte Probhu Isor do raje ghạlkede khan uni do jiwetʼ bhor murhucʼ jom rogteye jạbunena. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ begar oṛakʼreye girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar rajren hopon Jotham do raj oṛakʼren mạlike hoyena ar disạm hoṛko ḍanṭaokoe ehopʼena. 
2Kings15:6 Asariạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:7 Tayomte Asariạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uni do Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Jotham do raje hoyena. 
2Kings15:8 Jihudạren raj Asariạwakʼ rajokʼ pegel irạlakʼ bochorre Jerobiamren hopon Sakhariạ do Israelren raj lekate turui cando raje calaoleda. 
2Kings15:9 Uni hõ acʼren hapṛamko lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do cetʼleka Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan Sakhariạ hõ onkageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:10 Jabesren hopon Salum do Sakhariạ upạrteye soṛojontrokeda ar hoṛko samaṅrege uniye akromon kedeteye gocʼkedea ar acʼ do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
2Kings15:11 Sakhariạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:12 Probhu Isor do Jihu okae metade tahẽkan, “Amakʼ bõsren pon piṛhi hạbicʼ Israelakʼ siṅghạsonreko duṛupʼa” ar ona do purạuena." 
2Kings15:13 Jihudạren raj Usiạwakʼ, metakʼme Asariạwakʼ rajokʼ pegel areakʼ bochorre Jabesren hopon Salum do raje hoyena ar Samariạre mitʼ cando raje calaokeda." 
2Kings15:14 Ona tayom Gadiren hopon Menahem do Tirsa khon Samariạte senkate Jabesren hopon Salume akromonkedete uniye gocʼkedea ar uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
2Kings15:15 Salumakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ katha ar uni upạrte soṛojontro reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:16 Tayomte Menahem do tirsa khon oḍok kate Tipsa nagraha ar onḍenko hoṛko ar ona aḍepase ṭoṭharen sanamkoe akromonketʼkoa, ente onko do akoakʼ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr jhicʼ bako rạjilena. Ona iạte uni do Tipsae marao utạrkeda ar sanam bhạrti hoṛmo maejiukoakʼ lacʼkoe getʼ cirạketʼtakoa." 
2Kings15:17 Jihudạren raj Asariạwakʼ rajokʼ pegel areakʼ bochorre Gadiren hopon Menahem do Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do Samariạre gel bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings15:18 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmikeda. Uniyakʼ rajokʼ bhor uni do onako kạkại tegeye tahẽyena one cetʼleka Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan. 
2Kings15:19 Inạ tayom Asurren raj Pul do Israele akromonkeda. Unre Menahem do Pulakʼ goṛote disạmre acʼakʼ rajosṭi kajaktae lạgitʼ pegel are ṭon rupại emadea. 
2Kings15:20 Menahem do noa ṭaka Israel hoṛko ṭhen khon jor-julumkateye uṭhạuleda. Ar Asurren raj emae lạgitʼ mimitʼ kisạ̃ṛ hoṛko do turui sae gram rupạ emokʼ hoyentakoa. Onate Asurren raj do disạm bạgiyatʼteye calaoena. 
2Kings15:21 Menahemakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:22 Tayomte Menahem doe gocʼente acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Pekahiạ do raje hoyena. 
2Kings15:23 Jihudạren raj Asariạwakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽgelakʼ bochorre Menahemren hopon Pekahiạ do Samariạre Israelren raj lekate bar bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings15:24 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. Nabatren hopon Jerobiam cetʼ leka Israelkoe kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan onkage Pekahiạ hõe kạmikeda. 
2Kings15:25 Remaliạren hopon Peka ńutuman uniren mitʼṭen subedar do uni upạrteye soṛojontrokeda. Peka do Gileadren mõṛẽgel hoṛ soṅgekate Samariạ raj oṛakʼ gaṛre Pekahiạ, Orgob ar Oriyi tekoye gocʼketʼkoa. Pekahiạ gocʼkate Peka do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena." 
2Kings15:26 Pekahiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:27 Jihudạren raj Asariạwakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽgel dosar bochorre Remaliạren hopon Peka do Samariạren raje hoyena. Uni do bargel bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings15:28 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do Israelko cetʼ lekae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan onkage Peka hõe kạmikeda. 
2Kings15:29 Israelren raj Pekawakʼ oktere Asurren raj Tiglot-Pilese do hecʼkate Iyon, Abel-beth-Maka, Janoa, Kedes, Hasor, Gilead, Gạlil ar Napthali reakʼ sanam ṭoṭhae ạidạriana ar hoṛko bondikate Asurteye idiketʼkoa." 
2Kings15:30 Tayomte Usiạren hopon Jothamakʼ rajokʼ bargel bochorre Elaren hopon Hosea Remaliạren hopon Peka upạrteye soṛojontrokeda ar uniye gocʼkedete uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
2Kings15:30 Tayomte Usiạren hopon Jothamakʼ rajokʼ bargel bochorre Elaren hopon Hosea Remaliạren hopon Peka upạrteye soṛojontrokeda ar uniye gocʼkedete uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
2Kings15:31 Pekawakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:32 Remaliạren hopon Israelren raj Pekawakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochorre Jihudạren raj Usiạren hopon Jotham do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings15:33 Uni do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoyena ar Jerusalemre gel turui bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Jerusa tahẽkana; uni do Sadokren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:34 Uniren apat Usiạ lekage Jotham do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings15:35 Menkhan uni do than boṭkocʼko bae marao utạrleda. Ar hoṛko hõ onakore janwar dãṛẽ ar dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. Jotham do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ pạcri reakʼ cetan senakʼ duạre jut aro ocokeda. 
2Kings15:36 Jothamakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings15:37 Probhu Isor do ona okte khon Aramren raj Resinar Remaliạren hopon Peka do Jihudạ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe kolkedea. 
2Kings15:38 Tayomte Jotham do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uniren hapṛam Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Inạ tayom uniren hopon Ahas do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
2Kings16:1 Remaliạren hopon Pekawakʼ rajokʼ gel eaeyakʼ bochorre Jihudạren raj Jothamren hopon Ahas do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings16:2 Uni do bargel bochor umer tahẽkanre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre gel turui bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren hapṛam Dạud do cetʼ leka Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre bhageakʼe kạmikan tahẽkan onka Ahas do bae kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings16:3 Uni do Israelren rajko lekageye calakʼkan tahẽkana; ar Probhu Isor Israelko samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoe laga ńirletʼko onkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko lekage uni do acʼren hopon seṅgelreye samaṅledea. 
2Kings16:4 Uni do than boṭkocʼkore, buru cetankore ar mimitʼ hạriạṛ dare buṭạkore janwarkoe dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupkoe jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings16:5 Aramren raj Resin ar Remaliạren hopon Israelren raj Peka do Jerusalem upạrte rakapʼ hecʼkate Ahas sudhạ nagrahae gherao ạcurkeda, menkhan uni do Ahas bae bhagao daṛeadea." 
2Kings16:6 Onako dinre Aramren raj Resin do Elat nagraha khon Jihudạren hoṛkoe laga ńirketʼkote ona do arhõ Aramakʼ tabereye ạgukeda. Ona tayom Edomrenko do Elatte senkate girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Ar teheń hạbicʼ onko do onḍege menakʼkoa. 
2Kings16:7 Tayomte Ahas do Asurren raj Tiglot-Pileser ṭhen niạ katha roṛ lạgitʼ hoṛkoe kolkatʼkoa, “Iń do amren guti ar amren hopon kạnạń. Am do hijukʼte Aramren raj ar Israelren rajakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme. Unkin do ińkin akromoneń kana.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahas do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ khajańci khon sona ar rupại ạguketʼte sandes lekate Asurren raj ṭhene kolkeda. 
2Kings16:9 Asurren raj doe rạjiyena ar uni do Dameseke akromonketʼte onae hatkeda. Ar onḍenko hoṛkoe bondi idiketʼkoa ar Resin doe gocʼkedea. 
2Kings16:10 Unre Ahas raj do Damesekte Asurren raj Tiglot-Pileser sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe senena. Uni do onḍenakʼ pinḍ ńelte ona benao reakʼ monsubạ ar ona reakʼ nạmuna do naeke Uriạ ṭhene kolkeda. 
2Kings16:11 Damesek khon Ahas raje kolletʼ sanam goṭawakʼ lekage naeke Uriạ do mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar Ahas raje ruạṛ hijukʼ laharege ona doe sạtkeda. 
2Kings16:12 Damesek khon ruạṛ hecʼkate raj do ona pinḍe ńelkeda ar ona pinḍ ṭhen senkate ona cetanreye samaṅkeda. 
2Kings16:13 Uni do onḍe acʼakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, anaj samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍorakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅkeda ar acʼakʼ sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ mãyãm hõe ircikeda." 
2Kings16:14 Ar Probhu Isor samaṅre dohoakan pitạl reakʼ pinḍ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar nãwã pinḍ reakʼ tala khon ocokʼkate nãwã pinḍ reakʼ utạr secʼreye dohokeda. 
2Kings16:15 Ona tayom Ahas raj do Uriạ naeke noae hukumadea, “Ona maraṅ pinḍ cetanre do setakʼ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar ạyupʼ bela reakʼ anaj samaṅokʼakʼ porobem porobokʼa. Ona chaḍa ona cetanre rajakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ ar disạmren sanam hoṛkoakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar onkoakʼ anaj samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍorokʼ samaṅokʼakʼem samaṅa. Sanam jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ janwar samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ mãyãm do ona pinḍ cetanrem irciwakʼa. Menkhan Isorakʼ hukum ńam lạgitʼ do ona pitạl reakʼ pinḍgeń beohara.”" 
2Kings16:16 Ar naeke Uriạ do Ahas rajakʼ hukum leka jotowakʼe kạmikeda. 
2Kings16:17 Ahas raj do bhajan bạisạu akan binḍi aṛe reakʼ sanam patkoe getʼ giḍikada ar onḍe khon bhajankoe ocokʼ giḍikada. Pitạlren ḍaṅgrako cetanre oka maraṅ okocʼ karahe bạisạu tahẽkan ona ocokʼ giḍikatʼte uni do mitʼṭecʼ dhiri cetanreye dohokada. 
2Kings16:18 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jirạukʼ mãhã ńutumte oka cala benao akan tahẽkan Ahas do Asurren raj botorte onae ocokʼ dohokada ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bahre secʼ rajakʼ bolokʼ lạgitʼ oka hor benao akan tahẽkan ona hõe ocokʼkada. 
2Kings16:19 Ahasakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings16:20 Tayomte Ahas do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar Dạud nagrahare acʼren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Hiskiạko rajkedea. 
2Kings17:1 Jihudạren raj Ahasakʼ rajokʼ gelbar bochorre Elaren hopon Hosea do Samariạre Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do are bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings17:1 Jihudạren raj Ahasakʼ rajokʼ gelbar bochorre Elaren hopon Hosea do Samariạre Israelren raje hoyena. Uni do are bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Kings17:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtre oka bạricʼakʼ kan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana, menkhan Israelren lahatenko raj leka do bae kạmileda." 
2Kings17:3 Asurren raj Salmaneser do Hosea akromone lạgitʼe rakapʼ hecʼena. Ar onate Hosea do Salmaneser taberen raje hoyena ar uni khajna emaye ehopʼena. 
2Kings17:3 Asurren raj Salmaneser do Hosea akromone lạgitʼe rakapʼ hecʼena. Ar onate Hosea do Salmaneser taberen raje hoyena ar uni khajna emaye ehopʼena. 
2Kings17:4 Menkhan Asurren raj doe baḍaekeda, Hosea do mitʼṭen badmas hoṛkanae mente, ente uni do Misorren raj So ṭhen goḍetkoe kolletʼkoa ar Asurren raj do jao bochor oka khajnae emaekan tahẽkan ona do ar bae emokʼkana. Ona iạte Salmaneser do Hoseae sapʼkedete hajotreye bhoraokedea." 
2Kings17:4 Menkhan Asurren raj doe baḍaekeda, Hosea do mitʼṭen badmas hoṛkanae mente, ente uni do Misorren raj So ṭhen goḍetkoe kolletʼkoa ar Asurren raj do jao bochor oka khajnae emaekan tahẽkan ona do ar bae emokʼkana. Ona iạte Salmaneser do Hoseae sapʼkedete hajotreye bhoraokedea." 
2Kings17:5 Asurren raj do goṭa disạme akromonketʼte Samariạteye senena ar pe bochor bhor onae gherao dohokada. 
2Kings17:6 Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ areyakʼ bochorre Asurren raj do Samariạ hatkate Israelko Asurteye bondi idiketʼkoa. Uni do Halare, Haber gaḍa aṛe Gosan ṭoṭhare ar Mediạkoakʼ nagrahakoreye girobas ocoketʼkoa." 
2Kings17:6 Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ areyakʼ bochorre Asurren raj do Samariạ hatkate Israelko Asurteye bondi idiketʼkoa. Uni do Halare, Haber gaḍa aṛe Gosan ṭoṭhare ar Mediạkoakʼ nagrahakoreye girobas ocoketʼkoa." 
2Kings17:7 Noako hoylena, ente Misor khon, Misorren raj Pharaoakʼ gobol khon okoe do onkoe oḍok ạguletʼko Israelko do akoren uni Probhu Isor upạrteko kạiletʼ tahẽkana. Onko do debotakoko sewawako kan tahẽkana ar onko samaṅ khon Probhu Isor do okoe jạtrenkoe laga ńirletʼko tahẽkan onko lekako taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Israelren rajko oka ạri cạliko benao oṭoletʼ ona lekageko calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Kings17:8  
2Kings17:9 Israelko do hape hapete Probhu Isor upạrte ạḍi bạṛicʼko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar okako jaegakoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onako nagraha baṅ do huḍińakʼ kan baṅ do maraṅakʼkan ona jaegakore ako lạgitʼ than boṭkocʼko benaojoṅ kan tahẽkana. 
2Kings17:10 Onko mimitʼko do usul buru cetanre ar hạriạṛ dare buṭạ latarkore dhiriko ar Asera khunṭiko bạisạu joṅkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings17:11 Probhu Isor do okoe jạtrenko onko samaṅ khone laga ńirletʼko onko leka noko hõ than boṭkocʼkore dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa onko do arhõ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate Probhu Isorko khĩs ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Kings17:12 Onko do boṅga murhutʼkoko sewawako kan tahẽkana, menkhan Probhu Isor do onakoe baron letʼkorehõ onko do onageko kạmikan tahẽkana." 
2Kings17:13 Probhu Isor do acʼren sanam nạbiko ar ńeńelko hotete Israelko ar Jihudiko niạ menteye sontorletʼkoa, “Apeakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ hor khon ruạṛokʼpe ar sanam ạn-ạriko okaṭakʼ do aperen hapṛamko manao lạgitʼ iń ematʼko tahẽkan ar ińren gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko hoteteń baḍae ocoakatʼpe ona lekage ińakʼ sanam hukumko ar niạmko manaope.”" 
2Kings17:14 Menkhan onko do ona katha bako luturada. Onkoren hapṛamko okoe do akoren Probhu Isor ṭhen bako ṭehãḍokʼkan tahẽkan, onko lekage monko keṭecʼketʼ takoa." 
2Kings17:15 Onko do uniyakʼ joto niạm, onkoren hapṛamko lạgitʼ bandhaoakʼ uniyakʼ bondobos ar onko ṭhen uniyakʼ emakʼ sontor katha do bako aṅgocleda. Onko do ạuṛiyakʼren boṅgako sewawatʼkote ako hõko ạuṛiyakʼena. Probhu Isor do Israelko okoeko leka calakʼe baronletʼko onkage onko do beṛhaeten jạtrenko lekako kạmikan tahẽkana." 
2Kings17:16 Onko do akoren Probhu Isorakʼ sanam hukum bạgikate ako lạgitʼ dulakʼ barea mĩhũ muṭhạn ar mitʼṭecʼ Asera khunṭiko benao joṅan tahẽkana. Onko do sermaren ipilkoko sewawako kan tahẽkana ar Bakʼal debota hõko sewawae kan tahẽkana. 
2Kings17:17 Onko do Apnarren gidrạko seṅgelreko khadleyetʼko tahẽkana. Arko janokʼkan tahẽkana ar cinhạko ńelte tayom daram reakʼ katha lại reakʼko hewakʼkan tahẽkana ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan ona kạmi lạgitʼko ạkhrińokʼkan tahẽkante Probhu Isorko khĩs ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Kings17:18 Onate Israelren hoṛko cetanre Probhu Isor do ạḍi bạṛicʼe edreyena ar acʼ samaṅ khon onkoe ocokʼketʼkoa. Ar eken Jihudạ gusṭiren sarecʼko tahẽyena," 
2Kings17:19 menkhan Jihudạ gusṭiren hõ akoren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka senokʼ baṅkate Israelko lekako kạmikeda. 
2Kings17:20 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do sanam Israelkoe nihạ̃t giḍiketʼkoa. Uni do harket sasetreye dohoketʼkoa ar luluṭkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa, ar mucạtʼre acʼ samaṅ khone ocokʼ giḍikatʼkoa." 
2Kings17:21 Probhu Isor do Dạudakʼ bõs khon Israelko tinreye cirạ begarketʼkoa unre onko do Nabatren hopon Jerobiam akoren rajko benaokedea. Ar Jerobiam do Probhu Isorakʼ hor khon Israelkoe ghańjeṛ idiketʼkote onko do maraṅ okocʼe kại ocoketʼkoa. 
2Kings17:22 Israelren hoṛko do Jerobiamakʼ sanamakʼ kại reakʼ horteko taṛametʼ tahẽkana, ar ona khon do bako ạcur ruạṛlena." 
2Kings17:23 Mucạtʼre Probhu Isor do acʼren sanam gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko hotete emakʼ sontor katha lekate acʼ samaṅ khone ocokʼ giḍikatʼkoa. Ona iạte Israelren hoṛko do akoakʼ disạm khonko bondi ocoyente Asur disạmteko idi ocoyena, ar teheń hõ onko do onḍege menakʼkoa." 
2Kings17:24 Asurren raj do Israel hoṛkoakʼ jaega purun lạgitʼ Babel, Kuth, Awa, Hamat ar Sepharwayim khon hoṛko ạgukate Samariạ nagraha ar atokoreye dohoketʼkoa. Ar onko do onako jaegare girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
2Kings17:25 Onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼen pạhil secʼ onko do Probhu Isor bako sewawae kan tahẽkana, onate uni do onko talare dhạcri kulkoe kolketʼkoa. Ar onko do onkoren hoṛkoko gocʼketʼkoa." 
2Kings17:26 Unre Asurren raj ṭhen niạ khobor kollena, “Okoeko hoṛ bondikate Samariạre girobasokʼ lạgitʼem kol akatʼko onko do bako baḍaea ona disạmren Isor do cetʼ lekateko kusi ocoyea mente. Onate Isor do onko talare dhạcri kulkoe kolketʼkoa ar onkoko gocʼ ocokʼkana." 
2Kings17:27 Unre Asurren raj do acʼren hoṛko noae hukumatʼkoa, “Okoe naekeko Samariạ khonpe bondi ạgu akatʼko onko mod khon mitʼ hoṛ onḍe kolkaepe jemon uni do onḍe senkateye girobasokʼ ar ona disạmren Isor cetʼ lekateye kusikʼ onae cetʼako”" 
2Kings17:28 Unre Samariạ khon idi ocoyen naekeko mod khon mitʼ hoṛ do Bethelre senkate girobasokʼe ehopʼena ar onko cetʼakoe ehopʼena cetʼ lekate Probhu Isorko sewawaea mente. 
2Kings17:29 Enhõ mimitʼ jạtren hoṛko do oka ato ar nagrahareko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan onḍe onko do apan ạpin debotako benao joṅana ar Samariạren hoṛko benao akatʼ tahekan than boṭkocʼko reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ mundilkore onkoko dohokatʼkoa. 
2Kings17:30 Nonkate Babelrenko do Sukot-Benot muṭhạn, Kutren hoṛko do Nergalakʼ muṭhạn ar Hamatren hoṛko do Asimaren muṭhạnko benao joṅana," 
2Kings17:31 ar Awiko do Nibas ar Tartakakʼ muṭhạn ar Sepharwayimko do Adramelek ar Anamelek ńutuman Sepharwayim debota ńutumte akoren gidrạko seṅgelreko samaṅketʼkoa. 
2Kings17:32 Onko do Probhu Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkangea ar than boṭkocʼko reakʼ mundilkore naeke kạmi lạgitʼ apnar mod khon hoṛko bahalketʼkoa. 
2Kings17:33 Onko do Probhu Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkana, menkhan ona sãote okako disạm khonko ạgu ocolen onako disạm reakʼ cạli leka onko do akoren debotako hõko sewawako kan tahẽkana." 
2Kings17:34 Teheń hạbicʼ onko do ona niạmgeko manao ạguiyeda. Onko do Probhu Isor bako sewawae kana, ente Probhu Isor do okoe Jakobakʼ ńutum Israele doholetʼtae uni Jakobren hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ niạmko, hukumko ar ạn-ạriko bako manaoleda." 
2Kings17:35 Probhu Isor do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhao jokhecʼ noa hukume ematʼko tahẽkana, “Ape do cele deb debotage alope sewawakoa se alope ḍobokʼakoa ar alope sapʼsorakoa se onko ńutumte jãhãnakʼge alope samaṅa." 
2Kings17:36 Menkhan Probhu Isor, okoe do daṛeanakʼ tite Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼpe unige sewawaepe, ar unige ḍobokʼaepe ar uni ńutumte joto samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅpe." 
2Kings17:37 Uni okaṭakʼ niạmko, ạn-ạriko, ar hukumko ape lạgitʼe ol akatʼ ona do joton salakʼ manaope. Ar deb debotako do alope sewawakoa." 
2Kings17:38 Ape lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ bondobos iń dohoakatʼ ona baṛe disạ dohokakʼpe; ar cele debotakoge alope sewawakoa," 
2Kings17:39 bickom aperen Probhu Isorge dewa ar sewawaepe. Aperen sanam bạirikoakʼ ti khon unigeye bańcaopea.” 
2Kings17:40 Menkhan onko jạtrenko do ona katha bako luturatʼte akoakʼ hewa leka kạmi iditegeko tahẽyena. 
2Kings17:41 Onko do Probhu Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkangea menkhan debotako hõko sewawako kan tahẽkana. Ar teheń hạbicʼ onkoren hoponko ar goṛom gidrạko hõ akoren hapṛamko lekageko taṛameda. 
2Kings18:1 Elaren hopon Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ tesar bochorre Jihudạren raj Ahasren hopon Hiskiạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings18:1 Elaren hopon Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ tesar bochorre Jihudạren raj Ahasren hopon Hiskiạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Kings18:2 Uni do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre bargel are bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Abi tahẽkana; uni do Sakariạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings18:3 Hiskiạ do acʼren hapṛam Dạud lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. 
2Kings18:4 Uni do than boṭkocʼkoe maraokeda, ar sekʼwa dhirikoe rạputʼ giḍikada ar Asera khunṭikoe makʼ rạputʼkada. Ar Moseye benaolede pitạlren biń hõe rạputʼ khanḍa khunḍikedea, ente Israelko do un hạbicʼ hõ uni biń ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. Pitạlren bińakʼ ńutum do Nehustan tahẽkana." 
2Kings18:5 Hiskiạ do Israelren Probhu Isor cetanreye jamaṛ akane tahẽkana. Uni lahate ar uni tayomte Jihudạren rapajko modre uni leka do ar okoege bako tahẽkana. 
2Kings18:6 Uni do Probhu Isorre sapʼ kajak akane tahẽkana ar jao okte uniyakʼ horteye taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Probhu Isor do Mose okae hukumade tahẽkan onage uni doe manao idiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings18:7 Probhu Isor do uni são sãoteye tahenkan tahẽkana. Ar jãhãnakʼgeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkan onaregeye jo bahakʼkan tahẽkana. Asurren raj upạrte hulkate uni do golam ar bae khaṭaolena. 
2Kings18:8 Gasa ar onako ṭoṭha talare Philisṭiko okakoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan uni do onkoe akromonketʼkoa are bhagaoketʼkoa. 
2Kings18:9 Hiskiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre, metakʼme Elaren hopon Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ eaeyakʼ bochorre Asurren raj Salmaneser do Samariạ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe rakapʼ calaoente nagrahae gherao ạcurkeda." 
2Kings18:9 Hiskiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre, metakʼme Elaren hopon Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ eaeyakʼ bochorre Asurren raj Salmaneser do Samariạ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe rakapʼ calaoente nagrahae gherao ạcurkeda." 
2Kings18:10 Pe bochor gherao esetʼ tayom Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ turui bochorre ar Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ areakʼ bochorre Asurrenko do Samariạko hatkeda. 
2Kings18:10 Pe bochor gherao esetʼ tayom Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ turui bochorre ar Israelren raj Hoseawakʼ rajokʼ areakʼ bochorre Asurrenko do Samariạko hatkeda. 
2Kings18:11 Ar Asurren raj do Israelkoe bondiketʼkote Asur disạmteye idiketʼkoa ar Halare ar Habor gaḍa aṛe reakʼ Geson ṭoṭha ar Medekiạkoakʼ nagrahakoreye girobas ocoketʼkoa. 
2Kings18:12 Noako do hoylena, ente onkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha onko do bako manaoleda, bickom uniyakʼ bondobos, metakʼme Probhu Isorren guti Moseyakʼ sanam hukumko bako bataoleda. Onko do onako hukum reakʼ katha lutur hõ bako luturada ar manao hõ bako manaoleda." 
2Kings18:13 Hiskiạ raje rajokʼ gelponakʼ bochorre Asurren raj Senakerib do Jihudạ reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ sanam nagrahakoe akromonketʼte onakoe hatkeda. 
2Kings18:14 Unre Jihudạren Hiskiạ raj do Lakisre Asurren raj niạ kathae roṛ gotʼadea, “Iń doń behok akada. Am do ruạṛ calakʼme. Ar iń ṭhen okam khoj onageń emama.” Onate Asurren raj do Jihudạren Hiskiạ raj ṭhen khon gelbar ṭon rupạ ar mitʼ ṭon khon hõ ḍher sonae khojkeda." 
2Kings18:15 Onate Hiskiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar rajakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre tinạkʼ rupạ tahẽkan jotoge uniye emadea. 
2Kings18:16 Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ silpińko ar duạr reakʼ kobjako oka do sonate tol tahẽkan unre ona raṛakate Asurren raje emadea. 
2Kings18:17 Asurren raj do Lakis khon Tartan, Rabsari ar Rabsaki noko pene hoṛ do maraṅ utạr lạṛhại phạdkoante Jerusalemren raj Hiskiạ ṭhene kolkatʼkoa. Onko do Jerusalemte senkate dhubi ṭạnḍi reakʼ ḍahar aṛe usul jaega reakʼ pukhri sãote joṛao akatʼ dakʼ nala ṭhenko teṅgoyena." 
2Kings18:18 Onko do rajko hohoade khan raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạ do Hilkiạren hopon Eliakim, rajren olokʼicʼ Sibna ar Itihãs olokʼicʼ Asaphren hopon Joa noko pene hoṛ do oḍok hecʼente onko ṭhenko senena." 
2Kings18:19 Unre Rabsake do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Hiskiạ do noa kathape metaea, Asurren raj maharaje meneda, ‘am do cetʼ cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana?" 
2Kings18:20 Am do lạṛhại reakʼ bud ar daṛe menakʼtama mentem hudis joṅkan, khan noako do amakʼ luṭi reakʼ katha kana. Ar okoe cetanrem bhorsakʼkante iń upạrtem huhul kana?" 
2Kings18:21 Am do ona loṭocʼ pạṭiol ṭheṅga, metakʼme Misor cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana. Okoe ona pạṭiol ṭheṅga cetanreye bhorsakʼkan uni do ti pạṭi tabokʼtaea. Ar Misorren raj Pharao cetanre okoeye bhorsakʼ uni cetanre hõ onkage hoyokʼa.’" 
2Kings18:22 Menkhan aperen Probhu Isor cetanrepe bhorsakʼ kana mentepe mitạń, enḍekhan uni do cetʼ uni Isor doe baṅkana one uniyakʼ than boṭkocʼko ar pinḍko Hiskiạ doe marao giḍiakatʼtae ar one Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoe metakokan Jerusalem reakʼ pinḍ samaṅrege dewa sewae hoyokʼtakoa mente?" 
2Kings18:23 “Ape do iń hũyạte aperen raj arhõ metaepe, ‘daṛeakʼ khanem ińren kisạ̃ṛ Ạsurren raj sãote niạ bạji dohoyme, uni do bar hajar sadomkoe emama ar am do onkore dejokʼ lekan hoṛ emokʼme." 
2Kings18:24 Ar ona hõ bam daṛeakʼ khan ińren kisạ̃ṛren huḍiń utạricʼ do cekatem tạkicʼ daramea, am do Misor reakʼ rãt gạḍi ar aswariko cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana?" 
2Kings18:25 Ona chaḍa iń do cetʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen khon begor hukum hataokate niạ jaega akromon lạgitʼ iń rakapʼ hecʼakana? Niạ disạm upạrte lạṛhạikate ona marao lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do acʼge ińe menakawạdińa.’ ” 
2Kings18:26 Unre Hiskiạren hopon Eliakim ar Sibna ar Joa do Rabsakiko metadea, “Amren golamko ṭhen dayakate Arami pạrsite katha roṛme, ente ale do onale bujhạu daṛeakʼa. Pạcri cetanren hoṛko samaṅre Ibri pạrsite do alom metalea.”" 
2Kings18:27 Menkhan Rabsake doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ do cetʼ eken aperen kisạ̃ṛ kanae ar ape ṭhen niạko katha lại lạgitʼe kol akadińạ? Pạcri cetanre duṛupʼ akan noko hoṛko, okoe ape leka akoakʼ pạikhana ar putu jojom hoyokʼtako onko ṭhen hõ cetʼ bae kol akadińạ?”" 
2Kings18:28 Ona tayom Rabsake do teṅgoyente ãṭ aṛaṅte Ibri pạrsiteye menkeda, “Ape do maraṅ rajakʼ, metakʼme Asurren rajakʼ katha ańjompe." 
2Kings18:29 Maharaj do nonkae menetʼkana, Hiskiạ do alo jemone eṛepe. Uni do uniyakʼ ti khon bae rukhiyạ daṛeapea." 
2Kings18:30 Hiskiạ do nonka menkate Probhu Isorre aloe bhorsa ocope ma, ‘Probhu Isor do khạṭige apeye bańcaopea; ar niạ nagraha do Ạsurren rajakʼ tire bae jimạkakʼa.’" 
2Kings18:31 “Ape do Hiskiạwakʼ katha alope ańjoma. Ạsurren raje meneda, ‘ape do iń tulucʼ sulukokʼpe ar iń ṭhen oḍok hijukʼpe. Enḍekhan ape do uniyakʼ darkha bagwan reakʼ jo ar loa dare reakʼ jope joma ar apnarakʼ kuń khon dakʼpe ńũiya." 
2Kings18:32 Ona tayom hecʼkate apeakʼ nij disạm leka ar mitʼ disạmteń idipea. Ona disạm do hoyokʼkana anaj ar nãwã darkha rasa ạtukʼ disạm, piṭhạ ar darkha bagwan reakʼ disạm, jạitun ar dumur rasa reakʼ disạmtege. Ar ińakʼ katha lekape kạmi enḍekhan ape do bape gujukʼa bickom jiwetʼpe tahena. ‘Hiskiạ tinreye mena Probhu Isor do apeye rukhiyạpea, unre uniyakʼ katha do alope ańjomtaea, ente ona katha menkate uni doe ạnḍicʼetʼpea." 
2Kings18:33 Eṭakʼ jạtren jãhãn debota do cetʼ Asurren rajakʼ ti khon acʼakʼ disạme rukhiyạ daṛe akada?
