2Kings18:34 Hamat ar Arphadren debotako doko okayena? Ar Sepharwayimren, Hena ar Ibaren debotako do okare menakʼkoa? Onko do cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon Samariạko rukhiyạ daṛe akawada?" 
2Kings18:35 Niạko disạmren sanam debotako talare jãhãege cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon apnarakʼ disạmko rukhiyạ daṛeakada? Enḍekhan Probhu Isor do cekate ińakʼ ti khon Jerusaleme rukhiyạ daṛekea?’ ” 
2Kings18:36 Menkhan hoṛko do hapegeko tahẽyena, cetʼge bako roṛ ruạṛleda, ente Hiskiạ raj do jãhãnakʼ roṛ ruạṛe baronletʼkoa." 
2Kings18:37 Inạ tayom raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạko do Hiskiạren hopon Eliakim, rajren olokʼicʼ Sibna ar Itihãs olokʼicʼ Asaphren hopon Joa noko do akoakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼte Hiskiạ ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena ar Rabsake cetʼkoe roṛketʼ ona jotowakʼko lạiyadea." 
2Kings19:1 Hiskiạ raj do niạ kathae ańjomketʼ khan acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea ar gõṛẽ kicricʼe horokʼketʼte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. 
2Kings19:2 Uni do raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạ Eliạkim, rajren olokʼicʼ Sibna, naekeko ar mukhiyạko gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ akatʼge Amasren hopon Jesaea nạbi ṭhene kolkatʼkoa." 
2Kings19:3 Onko do Jesaeako metadea, “Hiskiạ do nonkae meneda, teheńakʼ din do gạr, nisṛạu ar opoman reakʼ din kana. Aleakʼ dosa do nonka lekage hoyakantalea je, gidrạkole janamko lạgidokʼ kana menkhan janamko reakʼ daṛe do bạnukʼtalea." 
2Kings19:4 Ạsurren raj do jiwetʼ Isor nisṛạue lạgitʼ Rabsakeye kolakadea menkhan amren Probhu Isor do hoedaṛeakʼa onako sanamakʼ katha ańjomkate uniye sạjạiyea. Onate am do onko lạgitʼ koeme okoe do ńit hạbicʼ jiwetʼ menakʼko.” 
2Kings19:5 Hiskiạ rajren kạmiyạko do tinre Jesaea nạbi ṭhenko hecʼena unre Jesaea do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Aperen kisạ̃ṛpe metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘okaṭakʼem ańjomakatʼ, metakʼme Ạsur rajren gutiko iń upạrte oka henosta kathako roṛ akatʼ onate am do alom botorokʼa." 
2Kings19:6  
2Kings19:7 Ańjomme, iń do unire mitʼṭecʼ jiuiń kolea ar onate uni do mitʼṭecʼ sombate ańjoma ar acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calakʼa ar iń do onḍege tarwaṛeteń makʼ gojea.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Rabsake doe ańjomkeda, Ạsurren raj do Lakis bạgikate Libna upạrteye lạṛhại kana. Ona iạte uni hõ onḍeye calaoena." 
2Kings19:9 Ạsurren raj Senakerib doe ańjomkeda, Kus disạmren Tirhak raj do acʼ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼakana. Onate uni do goḍet kolkate Hiskiạ ṭhene roṛ gotʼkada," 
2Kings19:10 “Ape do Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ nonka metaepe, ‘okoe cetanrem bhorsakʼkan uni Isor doe meneda, Ạsurren rajakʼ tire Jerusalem do baṅ soprotokʼa. Uniyakʼ ona eṛe kathate am do alom bulạu ocokʼa." 
2Kings19:11 Ạsurren raj do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmko cetʼlekae marao giḍiakatʼ ona do khạṭigem ańjom akada; enḍekhan cekate am dom hudiseda onam rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa mente? 
2Kings19:12 Ińren hapṛamko do okoe jạtren hoṛko marao giḍiletʼko onkoren debotako, metakʼme Gosan, Haran, Reseph ar Telasarreko girobasokʼkan Edonren debotako do cetʼ onkoko rukhiyạ daṛeatʼko tahẽkana?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamatren raj, Arpadren raj, Sepharwayim nagraharen raj se Hena ar Ibahren raj doko okayena? ”" 
2Kings19:14 Hiskiạ do goḍetkoakʼ ti khon ciṭhi hataokateye paṛhaokeda. Ona tayom uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokate Probhu Isor samaṅre ciṭhiye samaṅkeda. 
2Kings19:15 Ar Hiskiạ do Probhu Isor ṭhen noae koekeda, “E Probhu Isor Israelkoren raj, am do Kerubkin talarem tahẽnkana, ar am eskarge dhạrtiren sanamakʼ rajosṭiren Isor kanam. Am do serma ar otem benao akada." 
2Kings19:16 E Probhu Isor, luturakʼ tińme; ar amakʼ mẽtʼ baṛe beṅgedtam, ńelme; jiwetʼ Isor henostawae lạgitʼ Senakerib do cetʼko kathae roṛetʼkana ona ańjomme." 
2Kings19:17 E Probhu Isor, noa katha do sạrikana, Ạsurren rapajko do noko jạtrenko ar onkoakʼ disạmko marao giḍiakada." 
2Kings19:18 Onkoren debotako do seṅgelre giḍikateko nosṭo caba akatʼkoa. Onko do Isor doko baṅkana, onko do manwa tite benaoakʼ eken kaṭ ar dhiri kanako; ona iạtege onko doko marao giḍi daṛeatʼko tahẽkana." 
2Kings19:19 E aleren Probhu Isor, de ńitokʼ Ạsurren rajakʼ ti khon rukhiyạleme, jemon dhạrtiren sanam rajosṭirenko baḍae daṛeakʼ, am eskarge Probhu do ar amkangeam Isor do.”" 
2Kings19:20 Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea do Hiskiạ ṭhen niạ kathae kolkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, Asurren raj Senakerib reaṅ amakʼ koejoṅ do uniye ańjom akada." 
2Kings19:20 Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea do Hiskiạ ṭhen niạ kathae kolkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, Asurren raj Senakerib reaṅ amakʼ koejoṅ do uniye ańjom akada." 
2Kings19:21 Uni upạrte Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Kũạri kuṛi Sion am doko nisṛạumea arko landa-dhutʼama. Jerusalemren hoṛko do am tayomre bohokʼko rukuya." 
2Kings19:22 Am do okoeyem henosta akadea? Ar okoe upạrte opoman reakʼ katham roṛeda? Am do okoe upạrtem kikiạukʼ kana ar okoe cetantem beṅgetʼ parom akada? Am do Israelren uni sonoticʼ upạrtege noakom nonka akada. 
2Kings19:23 Amren golamko hotete Probhu Isor dom landa-dhutʼae kana, amakʼ sanam rãt gạḍikoante bururem decʼakana, Lebanon reakʼ usul utạrakʼ cuṛạrem rakapʼ akana, ar ona reakʼ usul usul debdạru ar bhage bhage saro darekom makʼ giḍiakada, ar ona reakʼ bir bhitrikorem boloakana," 
2Kings19:24 Uprikoakʼ jaegare do kuńem la akada ar onḍenakʼ dakʼem ńũ akada. Amakʼ jaṅgate am do Misor reakʼ gaḍakom lebetʼ rohoṛakada. 
2Kings19:25 Am do cetʼ bam ańjomakada, ḍher din laha khonge ona doń niṭakatʼ tahẽkana mente, ar ḍher din laharege ona reakʼ iń goṭa dohoakada? Ńitokʼ do onań hoyocokeda. Ar onatege pạcrite esetʼ nagrahako do dhiri puńjirem hoyocoakada." 
2Kings19:26 Onḍenko hoṛ doko nijor akana ar ạḍi bạṛicʼko botor akana arko lajao akana. Onko do khet reakʼ ghãs leka, omon rakapʼ akan hạriạṛ gạchi leka, chad cetanre janam akan ghãs leka ạuri hara rakabokʼregeko tolmojokʼ kana." 
2Kings19:27 Menkhan am do okarem tahenkana ar tinrem hijukʼ kana arem calakʼ kana ar cedakʼ iń upạrtem raṅgaokʼkana ona jotogeń baḍaea. 
2Kings19:28 Am do iń upạrtem edre akana ar amakʼ bạḍại reakʼ katha do ińakʼ luturre hecʼakana onate iń do mureń nakolmea ar mocareń jhinmea; ar oka hortem hecʼakan ona hortegeń ruạṛ gotʼkama.’ 
2Kings19:29 “E Hiskiạ, am lạgitʼ cinhạ do nõkʼõe: nes acʼte oka janamokʼ onape joma, ar kalom ona khon oka janamokʼ onage jompe. Menkhan satom do itạpe era ar phosolpe ira ar darkha bagwan benaokate ona reakʼ jope joma." 
2Kings19:30 Jihudạ gusṭiren okoeko hoṛ do unhạbicʼ jiwetʼko tahen onko do ar mitʼ dhaoko jo bahakʼa. Ar dare leka latar secʼko rehedokʼa ar cetan secʼ doko jo bahakʼa. 
2Kings19:31 Ar sarecʼ hoṛko do Jerusalem khonko oḍokokʼa ar sion buru khon do rukhiyạko ńamakatʼ mitʼ dol hoṛko hijukʼa. Phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ ãṭ do onageye hoeocoya. 
2Kings19:32 “Ona iạte Ạsurren raj reaṅ Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Uni do niạ nagrahate bae bolokʼa se nonḍe do mitʼṭecʼ sar hõ bae aṛaga. Ar ḍhalante niạ samaṅte bae hijukʼa se gherao esetʼkate dejokʼ ar pheḍokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼge bae benaojoṅa." 
2Kings19:33 Uni do okaṭakʼ horteye hecʼakan ona hortegeye ruạṛ calakʼa; niạ nagrahare do bae bolokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda. 
2Kings19:34 Iń do ińren ar ińren guti Dạud lạgitʼ niạ nagrahań esetʼ ạcura ariń rukhiyạya.’ ” 
2Kings19:35 Enhilokʼ ńindạ Probhu Isorren goḍet do oḍok senkate Ạsurrenkoakʼ ḍeraren mitʼ lakh irạlgel mõṛẽ hajar hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. Dosar hilokʼ setakʼre hoṛko do tinreko beretʼena unre sanam jaegare mạ̃ṛĩko ńelkeda. 
2Kings19:36 Onate Ạsurren raj Senakerib do acʼren lạṛhại phạdanteye ruạṛ calaoena ar Niniwi nagrahare senkateye tahẽyena. 
2Kings19:37 Mitʼdin Senakerib do acʼren debota Nisrokakʼ mundilreye dewa sewayetʼkan tahẽkanre Adramelek ar Sareser ńutuman uniren hoponkin do onḍe bolokate tarwaṛete unikin gocʼkedea ar Ararat disạmtekin dạṛkeda. Ar uniren hopon Esarhadon do raje hoyena. 
2Kings20:1 Onako dinre Hiskiạ do gujukʼ dạkhile ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana. Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbi do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, am do amakʼ oṛakʼ duạr sạriạutam, ente am dom gujukʼgea, ar bam bogekʼa.”" 
2Kings20:1 Onako dinre Hiskiạ do gujukʼ dạkhile ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana. Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbi do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, am do amakʼ oṛakʼ duạr sạriạutam, ente am dom gujukʼgea, ar bam bogekʼa.”" 
2Kings20:2 Niạ katha ańjomkate Hiskiạ do bhit secʼ samaṅkate Probhu Isor ṭhene koekeda," 
2Kings20:3 “E Probhu Isor, disạime baṛe, am samaṅre oka leka pạtiạrạnicʼ iń tahẽkana ar goṭa ontorte am botoram tulucʼ iń dãṛãnkan tahẽkana ar amakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼkan onageń kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana.” Ar niạ menkate Hiskiạ do hũk hũke rakʼkeda." 
2Kings20:4 Ar Jesaea do raj oṛakʼ reakʼ tala raca ạuriye paromokʼrege uni ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha sodorena," 
2Kings20:5 “Am do ruạṛ senkate ińren hoṛkoren mukhiyạ Hiskiạm metaea, amren hapṛam Dạudren Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘iń do amakʼ koejoṅiń ańjom akada ar amakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ iń ńelakada. Iń do amiń bogemea. Ar ńitokʼ khon pe din hilokʼre am do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼtem calakʼa." 
2Kings20:6 Amakʼ bahaokʼ din do arhõ gelmõṛẽ bochor iń juṭucʼatʼtama. Ar Ạsurren rajakʼ ti khon niạ nagraha hõń rukhiyạya. Iń lạgitʼ ar ińren guti Dạud lạgitʼ noa nagraha doń rukhiyạigea.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Jesaeae menkeda, “Loa piṭhạ ạguiype.” Hoṛko do onako ạguketʼ khan Hiskiạwakʼ bis phoṛareko thopramadea, adoe bes utạrena." 
2Kings20:8 Hiskiạ do Jesaea nạbiye kulikedea, “Probhu Isor ińe bogeyiń ar pe din hilokʼte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteń sen daṛeakʼ reakʼ cinhạ do cetʼkana?”" 
2Kings20:9 Jesaea doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor acʼakʼ gokʼake dohoy ona lạgitʼ uni do mitʼṭecʼ cinhại dohoya. Onate ma lạime, umul do cetʼ gel dhap lahakʼ se gel dhap tayomokʼa?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hiskiạ doe menkeda, “Umul gel dhap lahakʼ do algagea, bickom ona do gel dhap tayom ocoyme.”" 
2Kings20:11 Unre Jesaea nạbi do Probhu Isore hohoade tahẽkana. Onate Ahasakʼ siṛhi khon umul do tinạkʼ dhap pheḍ hecʼlen Probhu Isor do ona khon gel dhape tayom ocokeda. 
2Kings20:12 Unre Babel raj Baladanren hopon Merodak Baladan do Hiskiạwakʼ ruạ kạhil akan reakʼ khobore ańjomketʼ khan uni ṭhen ciṭhi ar sandeskoe kolkeda. 
2Kings20:13 Hiskiạ do kusite onko goḍetkoe ataṅ aderketʼkoa ar acʼakʼ sanam khajańci oṛakʼ, sona, rupạ, jut so mosola, daman sunumko, khanḍa bhanḍako ar murạikoe udukʼatʼkoa. Hiskiạwakʼ raj oṛakʼre se uniyakʼ rajosṭire nonkan cetʼge baṅ tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do bae udukʼ akawatʼko." 
2Kings20:14 Unre Jesaea nạbi do Hiskiạ raj ṭhen senkateye kulikedea, “Onko hoṛko do cetʼko menkeda, ar oka khonko hecʼlena?” Hiskiạ doe menkeda, “Onko do sạṅgiń disạm, Babel khonko hecʼlena.”" 
2Kings20:15 Nạbi do uniye kulikedea, “Onko do amakʼ raj oṛakʼre cetʼ cetʼko ńelkeda?” Hiskiại menkeda, “Ińakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼge onko doko ńelkeda. Ińakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre nonkan cetʼge bạnukʼa one okaṭakʼ do bạń udukʼ akawatʼko.”" 
2Kings20:16 Unre Jesaea do Hiskiại metadea, “Probhu Isor okae menetʼ ona ańjomme." 
2Kings20:17 Probhu Isore meneda, nonkan din hijukʼa tinre amakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼ ar amren hapṛamkoko jogao dohoakatʼte teheń hạbicʼ menakʼ onako jotoge Babelte idi ocokʼa, cetʼge baṅ bạgi oṭokʼa." 
2Kings20:18 Amren adom bõsko, amren hoponko, okoe dom janam akatʼko onko do Babel rajakʼ oṛakʼre mạ̃yạ̃ṛi akae tahẽkate sapʼ sosor kạmiko kạmiya.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hiskiại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ oka katham menketʼ ona do bhagegea.” Uni do niạ kathae menkeda, enteye hudisleda acʼakʼ jion bhor hoedaṛeakʼa suluk ar nirạiteye tahẽdaṛeakʼa." 
2Kings20:20 Hiskiạwakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko ar lạṛhạire jitạukʼ reakʼ kathako ar cetʼlekate uni do pukhri ar suṛoṅgoko benaokate nagrahare dakʼe ạguletʼ ona do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings20:21 Tayomte Hiskiạ doe gocʼena ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Manase do raje hoyena. 
2Kings21:1 Manase do gelbar bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre mõṛẽgel mõṛẽ bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Hephsiba tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:2 Probhu Isor do Israelko samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoe laga ńirletʼko tahẽkan Manase do onko leka hirkhạwakʼko kạmikate Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:3 Uniren apat Hiskiạ do okako than boṭkocʼkoe marao giḍiletʼ onako uni do arhõe jut arokeda. Israelren Ahab raj cetʼ lekae cekaletʼ onkage uni hõ Bakʼal debota ńutumte pinḍko ar mitʼṭecʼ Asera khunṭiye benaokeda. Uni do sermaren sanam ipilkoe sewawako kan tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:4 Okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ reaṅ Probhu Isore menletʼ, “Iń do jaejug hạbicʼ Jerusalemreń tahena,” Probhu Isorakʼ ona oṛakʼre uni do pinḍkoe benaokeda." 
2Kings21:5 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ banar racarege sermaren ipilko ńutumte adomakʼ pinḍkoe benaokeda. 
2Kings21:6 Uni do acʼren hopon seṅgelreye samaṅkedea. Uni do maya-biddạkoe beoharetʼ tahẽkana ar cinhạko ńelte tayom daram reakʼ kathakoe guniyetʼ tahẽkana ar okoe do bhutko ar bạṛicʼ jiuko sãote jopoṛaoko dohoyetʼ tahẽkan onko tulucʼe solhayetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre ḍher bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate uniye khĩs ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:7 Uni do oka Asera muṭhạne benao akatʼ tahẽkan ona do koejoṅ oṛakʼreye dohokeda. Niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ reaṅge Probhu Isor do Dạud ar uniren hopon Solomone metatʼkin tahẽkana, “Niạ oṛakʼ ar Israelren sanam gusṭiko tala khoniń bachao akawan niạ Jerusalemge iń lạgitʼ jaejug tahen oṛakʼ iń hoeocoya." 
2Kings21:8 Israelko do eken ińakʼ sanam hukumko joton salakʼko pańjae ar ińren guti Mose okaṭakʼ ạn-ạrikoe emakawatʼko ona lekako calakʼ enḍekhan iń do onkoren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạmiń emakatʼko ona disạm do bạgiyakʼ ar baṅ hoyokʼtakoa.” 
2Kings21:9 Menkhan hoṛko do ona katha bako ańjomleda. Manase do bạṛicʼ horteye ạyurketʼkoa; ar Probhu Isor do okoe jạtrenko Israel hoponko samaṅ khone marao giḍiletʼko onko khon hõ ḍher bạṛicʼakʼe kạmikeda. 
2Kings21:10 Unre Probhu Isor do acʼren gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko hotete niạ kathae menkeda," 
2Kings21:11 “Jihudạren raj Manase do niạko bạṛicʼakʼe kại akada. Uni lahate okoe Amorikoko tahẽkan uni do onko khonhõ artetʼ bạṛicʼe kạmi akada ar acʼren boṅga murhutʼko hotete Jihudạ do kại secʼe ạyur idiakadea. 
2Kings21:12 Onate iń Israelren Probhu Isoriń meneda, iń do usạrage Jerusalem ar Jihudạ cetanre nonkan muhiniń ạguiya, ar ona reakʼ katha okoeko ańjoma onko sanamgeko thar tharaokʼa." 
2Kings21:13 Samariạ upạrte okaṭakʼ sosoṅakʼ baber ar Ahabakʼ bõsko upạrte okaṭakʼ sạhul baberiń beoharletʼ onage iń do Jerusalem upạrteń beohara. Cetʼ leka thạri bạṭiko gasao mańjao onkage iń do Jerusalemiń mańjao saphaea ar hạrupʼkateń dohokakʼa. 
2Kings21:14 Ińren hoṛkoren sarecʼ hĩsko doń bạgi oṭoakoa ar bạirikoakʼ tireń jimạkoa. Onkoren sanam bạiriko do onkoakʼko luṭtakoa ar jotowakʼ jor julumkateko idiy takoa," 
2Kings21:15 ente ińakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onage onko doko kạmi akada ar oka hilokʼ onkoren hapṛamko do Misor khonko oḍok hecʼlen enhilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ onko do ińko khĩs ocoakadińạ.” 
2Kings21:16 Inạ chaḍa Manase do bin dusạn hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm nunạkʼe joro ocoakada je, ona mãyãmte Jerusalem reakʼ mitʼ simạ khon eṭakʼ simạna hạbicʼ perecʼlen tahẽkana. Uni do Jihudạren hoṛkoe kại ocoletʼkote onko do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings21:17 Manaseakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ ar uniyakʼ kại reakʼ kathako do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings21:18 Tayomte Manase do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uni do raj oṛakʼ reakʼ bagwanre, metakʼme Usakʼ bagwanreko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Amon do raje hoyena." 
2Kings21:19 Amon do bargel bar bochor umerre raje hoylena. Ar Jerusalemre bar bochor raje calaoketʼa. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Mesulemet tahẽkana; uni do Jotba atoren Harusren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:20 Amon do acʼren apat Manase lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:21 Acʼren apattetʼ oka horteye taṛametʼ tahẽkan uni hõ inạ hortegeye taṛamkeda; acʼren apattetʼ okoe murhutʼkoe sewawako kan tahẽkan uni hõ onkogeye sewawatʼkoa. 
2Kings21:22 Uni do acʼren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isore bạgiyade tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ horte hõ bae senokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings21:23 Amonren kạmiyạko do uni upạrteko soṛojontroketʼte raj oṛakʼrege uniko khũnkedea. 
2Kings21:24 Menkhan okoe do Amon raj upạrteko soṛojontroletʼ disạmren hoṛko do onko jotoko gocʼketʼkoa ar uniren hopon Josiạ do uniyakʼ jaegareko rajkedea. 
2Kings21:25 Amonakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings21:26 Ar Usakʼ bagwanre acʼ lạgitʼ ṭhik dohowakatʼ topare uni doko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Josiạ do raje hoyena. 
2Kings22:1 Josiạ do irạl bochor umerre raje hoylena ar pegel mitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Jedida tahẽkana; uni do Baskat atoren Adayaren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings22:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar uniren hapṛam Dạudakʼ hortegeye calakʼkan tahẽkana ar etom se końe secʼ do bae taṛametʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings22:3 Josiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre uni do Mesulamren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Asaliạ hopon rajren olokʼicʼ Saphan do niạ katha menkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye kolkedeteye metadea," 
2Kings22:4 “Am do maraṅ naeke Hiskiạ ṭhen calakʼme ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre lạgitʼ hoṛkoakʼ ạguakʼ okaṭakʼ ṭaka poesa do horhokoko uṭhạu akatʼ ona reakʼ hisạb jemon ṭhik lekako dohokakʼ. 
2Kings22:5 Ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ ńel todarot lạgitʼ okoeko bachao ocoakan ona ṭaka do jemon onkoakʼ tireko jimạkakʼ. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ńel todarotko do ona ṭaka jemon chutạr mistriko, oṛakʼ benao mistriko ar raj mistriko onkoakʼ paona lekako emkatako. Ona chaḍa koejoṅ oṛakʼ jut aroe lạgitʼ onko do kaṭ ar mońjte getʼakʼ dhiri jemonko kiriń ạgui." 
2Kings22:6  
2Kings22:7 Onkoakʼ tire okaṭakʼ ṭaka emakan ona reakʼ hisạb do baṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtakoa, ente onko do pạtiạr salakʼgeko kạmikana.”" 
2Kings22:8 Unre maraṅ naeke Hilkiạ do rajren olokʼicʼ Saphane metadea, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạn-ạri reakʼ puthiń ńam akada.” Ar Hilkiạ do ona puthi Saphone emade khan uni do onae paṛhaokeda." 
2Kings22:9 Ona tayom Saphan do ona puthi raj ṭhen idikateye menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre oka ṭaka tahẽkan ona do amren kạmiyạkoko oḍokketʼte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi ńel todarotkoakʼ tireko jimạ akada.”" 
2Kings22:10 Unre olokʼicʼ do niạ katha raje baḍae ocokedea, “Naeke Hilkiạ do mitʼṭecʼ puthiye emakawạdińa.” Ar niạ menkate Saphan do raj onae paṛhao ańjomadea." 
2Kings22:11 Ạn-ạri reakʼ puthire oka ol tahẽkan ona ańjomte raj do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaea. 
2Kings22:12 Uni do naeke Hilkiạ, Saphanren hopon Ahikam, Mikaren hopon Akbor, Saphan ar rajren gokʼṛoyicʼ Asayateko noae hukumatʼkoa," 
2Kings22:13 “Nokʼõe noa puthi okaṭakʼ ńam akan onare okako katha olakan onako katha reaṅ ape do senkate iń lạgitʼ ar nonḍe ar sanam Jihudạren hoṛko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen kulijoṅpe. Probhu Isor do abo upạrte edreteye jal jalao akana, ente aboren hapṛamko do niạ puthi reakʼ katha leka bako taṛamleda ar bako manaoleda ar onare okako katha ol menakʼ ona leka hõ bako kạmileda." 
2Kings22:14 Niạ katha ańjomkate naeke Hilkiạ, Ahikam, Akbar, Saphan ar Asaya do maejiu nạbi Hulda ṭhen senkate uni tulucʼko galmaraokeda. Hulda do kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ rurukhiyạicʼ Salumren bạhui tahẽkana. Ar Salum do Harhasren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Tikwaren hopone tahẽkana. Hulda do Jerusalem reakʼ dosar atoregeye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
2Kings22:15 Hulda do uniye metadea, “Israelren Probhu Isor do memene metadińạ, okoe iń ṭhen apeye kolakatʼpe senkate unipe metaea Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Jihudạren raj niạ puthire olakʼ okakoe paṛhao akatʼ ona lekage iń do mitʼke mitʼ muhinko niạ jaega cetanre ar uniren hoṛko cetanreń paṛao ocoya." 
2Kings22:16  
2Kings22:17 Onko do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińạ ar debotako ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ kana ar akoakʼ titeko benao akatʼko sanam murhutʼkote ińko khĩs ocoyediń kana; ona iạte niạ jaega upạrte ińakʼ edre do salgaokʼkan tińạ ar ona do baṅge ĩṛĩjokʼa.’ 
2Kings22:18 Probhu Isor ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼ okoeye kol akatʼpe uni Jihudạren rajpe metaea, Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘niạ jaega ar uniren hoṛko upạrte okaṭakʼ sarap ar maraokʼ reakʼ kathań roṛ akatʼ ona ańjomte amakʼ mon do kastaokʼkana, amakʼ kicricʼem oṛecʼetʼ tama ar iń samaṅrem rakʼeda. Ar noakom nonka akatʼte iń Probhu Isor do amakʼ koejoṅiń ańjom akada." 
2Kings22:19  
2Kings22:20 Ona iạte iń do usạrage amren hapṛamko ṭheniń idimea ar am do suluktem topa ocokʼa. Ar niạ jaega cetanre okako muhiniń paṛao ocoy ona do amakʼ mẽtʼ bae ńela.’ ” Unre onko do Huldawakʼ katha ańjomkate raj ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Kings23:1 Josiạ raj do hoṛ kolkate Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam murubbikoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
2Kings23:2 Uni do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, naekeko, nạbiko, disạm hoṛko ar lekman hoṛkoante Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre okaṭakʼ bondobos puthi ńamlen ona reakʼ sanam kathakoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa." 
2Kings23:3 Raj do tham khunṭi aṛere teṅgokate Probhu Isorakʼ horte calakʼ lạgitʼ goṭa mon ar ontorte uniyakʼ sanam hukumko, ạn-ạriko manao lạgitʼ, metakʼme niạ puthire olakʼ bondobos reakʼ sanam katha manao lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅreye gokʼana. Unre sanam hoṛko hõ raj sãote inạgeko gokʼana." 
2Kings23:4 Unre raj do Bakʼal debota ar Asera ar sermaren ipilko ńutumte benaoakʼ sanam jinisko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon oḍok giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ maraṅ naeke Hilkiạ, ar huḍiń naekeko ar pahradarkoe hukumatʼkoa. Uni do Jerusalem bahre Kedron soḍokʼ reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire onakoe atar giḍikada ar torocʼko do Jerusalemteye idikeda." 
2Kings23:5 Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako ar Jerusalem beṛhaeteakʼ than boṭkocʼkore dhup jered lạgitʼ Jihudạren rapajko do boṅga sewawako lạgitʼ okoe naekekoko ojokʼ bahalletʼko, metakʼme okoe do Bakʼal debota, ńindạ cando, siń cando, ipilko, ar sermaren eṭakʼ ipilko ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onko doe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa." 
2Kings23:6 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon Asera muṭhạn hataokate Jerusalem bahre Kedron soḍokʼte idikate onakoe atar giḍikada. Ona tayom onako gunḍạkate ona reakʼ dhuṛi do hoṛkoakʼ topa cetanreye chiṭiạukada. 
2Kings23:7 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre herel kusumbikoakʼ okako kandha tahẽkan onako hõe rạputʼ giḍikada. Onḍe do maejiuko Asera lạgitʼ kicricʼko tińetʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Kings23:8 Josiạ do Jihudạ reakʼ nagraha ar atoko khon sanam naekeye ạguketʼkoa ar Geba khon Berseba hạbicʼ okako than boṭkocʼre onko do dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onakoe bhõnḍ ocokeda. Uni do Josuạwakʼ phaṭok-duạrte bolokʼ horre okako than boṭkocʼ tahẽkan onako hõe rạputʼ giḍikada. Niạ phaṭok do nagraha reakʼ maraṅakʼ phaṭok duạr khon leṅga secʼre tahẽkana. 
2Kings23:9 Than boṭkocʼkoren naekeko do Jerusalem reakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍre sewa kạmi do bako daṛeakʼ kan tahẽkana, menkhan eṭakʼ eṭakʼ naekeko sãote bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ doko jom daṛeakʼkan tahẽkangea." 
2Kings23:10 Ar Molek debota ńutumte jãhãege nijạrren gidrạko seṅgelre jemon aloko samaṅ daṛeako ona lạgitʼ Josiạ do Ben-Hinom buru nala reakʼ Tophet ńutuman than boṭkocʼ hõe bhõnḍ ocokeda. 
2Kings23:11 Jihudạren rapajko oka rãt gạḍiko ar sadomko siń-cando ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼko emlen Josuạ do onko sadomkoe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa ar rãt gạḍikoe jeretʼ giḍikada. Noko sadom do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ hor aṛere, tala racare, Nathan-melek ńutuman mitʼṭen gutiyakʼ kandha aṛereko dohoyetʼko tahẽkana." 
2Kings23:12 Raj oṛakʼ reakʼ chatre Ahas rajakʼ kandha ṭhen Jihudạren rapajko okako pinḍko benaoletʼ ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ banar racare Manase okako pinḍe benaoletʼ Josiạ do onako hõe rạputʼ gejerketʼte Kedron soḍokʼreye giḍikada. 
2Kings23:13 Jerusalem purub secʼ dhaṅ dhaserakʼ buru reakʼ dạkhin secʼre okako than boṭkocʼ tahẽkan onako hõ uni doe bhõnḍ ocokeda. Israelren raj Solomon do Sedonikoren Astoret debota lạgitʼ, Moabikoren Kemos debota lạgitʼ ar Amonren Melok debota lạgitʼ niạko than boṭkocʼ doe benaoleda." 
2Kings23:14 Josiạ do sewa reakʼ dhiriko hõe rạputʼ gejerkada ar Asera khunṭiko hoẽ makʼ khanḍa khunḍikada ar ona ṭhạ̃ire uni do manwakoakʼ jaṅkoe ḍạṅkada. 
2Kings23:15 Nabatren hopon Jerobiam Israelko cetʼlekae kại ocoyetʼko tahẽkan ar Bethelre oka pinḍ ar than boṭkocʼkoe benaoletʼ Josiạ do onako hõe marao giḍikada. Josiạ do ona than boṭkocʼkoe rạputʼ gejerkeda ar Asera khunṭi do seṅgelreye atarkada. 
2Kings23:16 Ona tayom uni do beṛhaeteye beṅgetʼ ạcurkeda ar buru ṭhen okako topa tahẽkan onḍe khon jaṅkoe ạguketʼte pinḍ cetanreye atarketʼte onae bhõnḍ ocokeda. 
2Kings23:17 Raje menkeda, “Ńelokʼkan hana nisạn do cetʼkana?” Nagraharen hoṛko menkeda, “Ona do Isorren hoṛkoakʼ topa reakʼ cinhạ kana. Uni do Jihudạ khon hecʼkate Bethel reakʼ pinḍ upạrte okae roṛ saḍeletʼ ṭhik onkage am dom kạmiakada.”" 
2Kings23:18 Uniye menkeda, “Ona do tahẽ ocoge; ar okoehõ jemon ona reakʼ jaṅko aloko nosṭoe.” Ona iạte hoṛko do ona reakʼ jaṅko ar okoe nạbi Samariạ khone hecʼlen uniyakʼ jaṅko cetʼ leka tahẽkan onageko dohokada." 
2Kings23:19 Samariạ nagraha ar atoko reakʼ than boṭkocʼkore Israelren rapajko okako mundilko benaoletʼte Probhu Isorko khĩs ocolede Josiạ do onako hõe dhaṅ dhaserketʼte Bethel reakʼ than boṭkocʼko lekae hoyocokeda. 
2Kings23:20 Josiạ do onako pinḍ cetanrege onḍenko naekekoe gurketʼkoa ar onako cetanre manwakoakʼ jaṅkoe atarkeda. Ar ona tayom uni do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Kings23:21 Inạ tayom raj do sanam hoṛko noae hukumatʼkoa, “Bondobos reakʼ puthire cetʼ leka olakan onkage ape do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porob porobokʼpe.”" 
2Kings23:22 Israelkoren disạm cakʼlaoko oktere se Israel ar Jihudạren rapajko oktere nonkan bańcaokʼ porob do bako porob akan tahẽkana. 
2Kings23:23 Menkhan Josiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Jerusalemre Probhu Isor ńutumte niạ bańcaokʼ porobko porobena. 
2Kings23:24 Ona chaḍa okoe do bhutko tulucʼ ar okoe do bạṛicʼ jiuko tulucʼ helmelko dohoyetʼ tahẽkan Josiạ do onko hõe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa. Uni do gharońjren murtiko, boṅgako, Jihudạ ar Jerusalemre oka bạṛicʼakʼ jiniskoe ńelketʼ onako sanamakʼe sạṅgiń giḍikada. Ar naeke Hilkiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạn-ạri reakʼ oka puthiye ńamletʼ ona reakʼ sanam katha jemon ṭhik lekate manao idikʼ ona lạgitʼ Josiạ do noakoe kạmikeda." 
2Kings23:25 Uni do acʼakʼ goṭa mon, ontor ar daṛete Mose emakʼ sanam ạn-ạriko leka Probhu Isorakʼ horteye taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Uni lahate se uni tayomte ar okoe rajge uni leka do bako tahẽkana." 
2Kings23:26 Enhõ Manase do oka kạmikate Probhu Isore khĩs ocoledete Jihudạ upạrte oka botoranakʼ edreteye jal jalaoen ona khon uni do bae ruạṛlena. 
2Kings23:27 Ona iạte Probhu Isore menkeda, “Iń samaṅ khon cetʼ leka Israelkoń sạṅgiń giḍiletʼko onkage Jihudạ hõń sạṅgiń giḍikaea, ar okaṭakʼ nagrahań bachaoan tahẽkan Jerusalem ar ona reaṅ iń menletʼ, ‘ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ hoyokʼa mente’ ona koejoṅ oṛakʼ doń nihạ̃t giḍikakʼa.”" 
2Kings23:28 Josiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings23:29 Josiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere Misorren Pharao raj Neko do Asurren raj goṛowae lạgitʼ phurạt gaḍa secʼe senena. Unre Josiạ hõ uni teṅgo darame lạgitʼe oḍok calaoena, menkhan Pharao Neko do uni tulucʼe lạṛhạiyente Josiạ do Megidoreye gocʼocoyena." 
2Kings23:30 Josiạren lạṛhại phạdko do rãt gạḍire uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko ladeketʼte Megido khon Jerusalemteko ạgukeda ar uniye ṭhik dohoakatʼ topareko baekadea. Tayomte disạmren hoṛko do uniren hopon Jehoahasko ojokʼ bahalkedete uniren apatakʼ jaegareko rajkedea. 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahas do bargel pe bochor umerre Jihudạren raje hoylena. Uni do Jerusalemre pe cando raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Hamutal tahẽkana; uni do Libna nagraharen Jeremiạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings23:32 Jehoahas do acʼren hapṛamko leka Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Pharao Neko do Hemat disạm reakʼ Riblare uniye aṭok dohokedea jemon uni do Jerusalemre aloe raj daṛeakʼ. 
2Kings23:33 Pharao Neko do pon ṭon rupạ ar pegel are keji sona khajna lekate Jihudạ disạm cetanreye ladeatʼkoa. 
2Kings23:34 Ar Josiạren eṭagicʼ hopon Eliakim do uniren apat Josiạ bodolteye rajkedea ar Eliakimakʼ ńutume bodolketʼte Jehoyakime dohoketʼtaea. Pharao Neko do Jehoahas Misorteye idikedea, ar Jehoahas do onḍegeye gocʼena." 
2Kings23:35 Pharao Nekowakʼ dạbiteakʼ lekate Jehoyakim do sona ar rupạ uniye emadea. Ar ona emae lạgitʼte disạmren hoṛko cetanre khajnae ladeatʼkoa ar disạmren mimitʼko hõ khajnae ṭhikatʼkote sona ar rupạ do disạmren hoṛko ṭhen khone ạdại hataoketʼa. 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakim do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena. Uni do gelmitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Sebida tahẽkana; uni do Ruma atoren Podaeren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings23:37 Jehoyakim do acʼren hapṛamko lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings24:1 Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ oktere Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Jihudạ disạme akromonkeda. Jehoyakim do pe bochor uniyakʼ gobolreye tahẽkana. Menkhan tayomte uni do Nebukadnesar upạrteye hulkeda. 
2Kings24:2 Probhu Isor do Jehoyakim upạrte Babelrenko, Aramrenko, Moabrenko ar Amonren luluṭ hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Probhu Isor do acʼren guti, metakʼme nạbiko hotete okaṭakʼ kathae roṛ saḍeletʼ onkage uni do Jihudạ disạm marao lạgitʼ onkoe kolketʼkoa." 
2Kings24:3 Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekage Jihudạre noako do hoylena jemon uni do acʼ samaṅ khon onkoe sạṅgiń daṛeako. Noako do hoylena Manaseakʼ sanam kại iạte ar bin dusạn hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm joro ocoytako khạtirte. Uni do onkoakʼ mãyãmte Jerusaleme perecʼkeda, ar Probhu Isor do ona ikại lạgitʼ bae rạjilena." 
2Kings24:4  
2Kings24:5 Jehoyakimakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha do “Jihudạren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Kings24:6 Tayomte uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uniren hopon Jehoyakim do uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
2Kings24:7 Misorren raj do lạṛhại lạgitʼ acʼakʼ rajosṭi khon ar bae oḍok baṛalena, ente Babelren raj do Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa khon phurạt gaḍa hạbicʼ goṭa rajosṭigeye dokhol akatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakin do gel irạl bochor umerre raje hoylena ar pe cando Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Nehusṭa tahẽkana; uni do Jerusalem nagraha Elnathanren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings24:9 Jehoyakin do acʼren apat lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings24:10 Onako dinre Babelren raj Nebukadenesar ren lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalemte hecʼkate onako gheraokeda. 
2Kings24:11 Uniren lạṛhại phạdko do tinre nagrahako gherao akatʼ tahẽkana unre Nebukadenesar do acʼge nagrahateye boloyena. 
2Kings24:12 Unre Jihudạren raj Jehoyakin, uniren eṅgattetʼ, uniren gokʼṛoyicʼ, uniren subedarko ar uniren gutiko jotoge Nebukadenesarakʼ tireko jimạyena. Nebukadenesarakʼ rajokʼ irạlakʼ bochorre uni do Jehoyakin bondikateye idikedea." 
2Kings24:13 Probhu Isor okalekae menletʼ onkage Nebukadenesar do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ khon joto dhon duribkoe oḍok idikeda ar Israelren raj Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre lạgitʼ sonate okako jinise benao ocoletʼ onako jotowakʼ uni doe samakʼ khanḍa khunḍikeda. 
2Kings24:14 Ona chaḍa Jerusalemren sanamko, metakʼme sanam gutiko ar lạṛhại birko, sanam kạrigolko ar kamarko jotote uni do gel hajar hoṛe bondi idiketʼkoa. Disạmren reṅgecʼ hoṛ chaḍa ar celege bako sarecʼ lena." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadenesar do bondi lekate Babelte Jehoyakine idi akade tahẽkana. Uni do Jerusalem khon rajren eṅgattetʼ, uniren bạhuttetʼ, uniren kạmiyạko ar disạmren lekman hoṛko hõ bondikateye idiketʼkoa." 
2Kings24:16 Uni do lạṛhại lạgitʼ lek lekan ar daṛean eae hajar lạṛhại birko ar mitʼ hajar kạrigolko bondikate Babelteye idiketʼkoa. 
2Kings24:17 Uni do Jehoyakinakʼ jaegare uniren kakattetʼ Motaniạye rajkedea ar uniyakʼ ńutume bodolketʼtaete Sedekiại dohoketʼtaea. 
2Kings24:18 Sedekiạ do bargel mitʼ bochor umerre raje hoylena. Uni do Jerusalemre gelmitʼ bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Hamutal tahẽkana; ar uni do Libna nagraha Jirimiạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Kings24:19 Jehoyakim leka Sedekiạ hõ Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Kings24:20 Jerusalem ar Jihudạren hoṛko iạte Probhu Isor do edreteye jal jalaoena ar mucạtʼre acʼ samaṅ khon onkoe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa. Tayomte Sedekiạ do Babelren raj upạrteye hulkeda. 
2Kings25:1 Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ areyakʼ bochor reakʼ gelakʼ cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoante Jerusalem upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe mohnḍayena. Uni do nagraha bahrereye ḍerayena ar nagraha beṛhaete pinḍhạkoe benao ạcurkeda. 
2Kings25:2 Sedekiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gelmitʼ bochor hạbicʼ nagraha do gherao esetʼge tahẽkana. 
2Kings25:3 Ar ponakʼ cando reakʼ areyakʼ dinre nagrahare akal iạte nonka hoyena, hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ cetʼge baṅ tahẽlena." 
2Kings25:4 Tayomte nagraha pạcri reakʼ mitʼ jaegareko bhugạkʼkeda. Ar Babelrenko do nagrahako gherao esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkanre hõ ńindạ jokhecʼ Jihudạren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do rajakʼ bagwan ṭhenakʼ banar pạcri reakʼ phaṭok duạrte nagraha khonko oḍokena ar raj do Araba secʼe dạṛkeda. 
2Kings25:5 Ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do uni khonko begarente onko doko chirchạtur cabayena ar unre Babelren lạṛhại phạdko do rajko khudạu idikedea ar Jerikho reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍireko sapʼ tiyokʼkedea. 
2Kings25:6 Onko do uniko bondikedea ar Riblate Babelren raj ṭhenko idikedea. Onḍe uni upạrte sạjại reakʼ hukum hoyena. 
2Kings25:7 Lạṛhại phạdko do Sedekiạ samaṅrege uniren hoponko gocʼketʼkoa. Ona tayom onko do uniyakʼ mẽtʼko hoṭor totʼketʼtaea ar pitạl reakʼ sikṛite tolkate Babelteko idikedea. 
2Kings25:8 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar rajokʼ gel areyakʼ bochor reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ cando reakʼ eaeyakʼ dinre rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do Jerusalemteye hecʼena. 
2Kings25:9 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre, raj oṛakʼre ar Jerusalem reakʼ joto oṛakʼre seṅgele jeretʼada. Ar asol asol oṛakʼko hõe jeretʼ giḍikada." 
2Kings25:10 Rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar tabere menakʼko Babelren lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalem reakʼ pạcriko rạputʼ giḍikada. 
2Kings25:11 Ar nagraharen sarecʼ hoṛko okoe do Babel raj secʼko hoylen onko sanamkoge rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do bondikateye idiketʼkoa," 
2Kings25:12 menkhan darkha bagwan ńel todarot ar jumi cas lạgitʼ thoṛa reṅgecʼ hoṛ do disạmreye doho oṭokatʼkoa. 
2Kings25:13 Babelrenko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ pitạl tham khunṭi kin, pitạl reakʼ ganḍoko ar pitạl reakʼ maraṅakʼ luihạ do rạputʼ khanḍa khunḍikate Babelteko idikeda." 
2Kings25:14 Ona chaḍa onko do sanam ṭukucʼko, kạ̃ṛchũko, sultạ saphae reakʼ cimṭạko, belcako ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ eṭakʼ sanam pitạl reakʼ jiniskoko idikeda." 
2Kings25:15 Ar seṅgel dohoy lạgitʼ ḍhaknako, bạṭiko ar sona-rupạ reakʼ eṭakʼ sanamakʼ jinisko hõ rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar doe idikeda." 
2Kings25:16 Solomon raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ barea tham khunṭi, maraṅ karahe ar ganḍokoe benao ocoletʼ ona reakʼ sanam pitạlko do ojon daṛekokʼ khon hõ ḍherge tahẽkana." 
2Kings25:17 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ khunṭi do gel irạl moka usul ar ona reakʼ muthni do pe moka usul tahẽkana. Muthni beṛhaete do pitạl reakʼ sikṛi ar pitạl reakʼ ḍạlim jokote sajao tahẽkana. 
2Kings25:18 Jihudikoren maraṅ naeke Seruya, ar dosaricʼ naeke Sephaniạ ar pene pahradarko do uni rurukhiyạ dolren subedare bondi idiketʼkoa." 
2Kings25:19 Ar unre okoe do nagrahareko tahẽkan onko mod khon uni do lạṛhại birko cetanre bahal akan mitʼṭen guti ar rajren mõṛẽ goṭen sopolhakoe sapʼketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa subedarren olokʼicʼ, okoe do lạṛhại phạdre hoṛkoe bhoraoetʼko tahẽkan uni ar nagrahareko ńamen arhõ turuigel hoṛkoe sapʼketʼkoa." 
2Kings25:20 Nebusaradan do onko sanamkoe bondiketʼkote Riblate Babelren raj ṭhene idiketʼkoa. 
2Kings25:21 Ar raj do Hamat disạm reakʼ Riblare noko sanam hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Nonkate Jihudạren hoṛko bondikate apnarakʼ disạm khon sạṅgińteko idiocoyena. 
2Kings25:22 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do okoe hoṛko Jihudạ disạmreye sarecʼ oṭoletʼko tahẽkan onko cetanre Saphanren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ do disạm cakʼlaoicʼ menteye bahalkedea." 
2Kings25:23 Babelren raj do Gedaliạ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ menteye bahal ocoakana menteye ańjomketʼ khan Jihudạren sarecʼ subedarko ar onkoren hoṛko, metakʼme Nethaniạren hopon Ismael, Kareyer hopon Johanan, Netopha Tanhumetren hopon Seruya ar Makathiren hopon Jasaniạ ar onkoren hoṛko do Mispate Gedaliạ ṭhenko hecʼena." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliạ do onko ar onkoren hoṛko ṭhen kiriạkateye menkeda, “Ape do Babelren cakʼlaoko alope botorakoa. Disạmre girobasokʼpe ar Babelren raj do mạlik mente aṅgocepe, onate ape do bhage hoyokʼtapea.”" 
2Kings25:25 Menkhan eaeyakʼ candore Elisamaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metatʼme Nethaniạ hopon Ismael do gel hoṛko soṅgekate Gedaliạ ar Jihudạren okoeko hoṛ do Babel reakʼ Mispare uni sãoteko tahẽkan onko sanamkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Nui Ismael do raj bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana." 
2Kings25:26 Onate Babelrenko botorte Jihudạren kạṭicʼ lạṭu sanam hoṛko ar subedarko do Misorteko dạṛkeda. 
2Kings25:27 Jihudạren raj Jehoyakine bondi idi ocokʼ reakʼ pegel eae bochorre Ewil Merodak do Babelren raje hoyena. Uni do inạ bochor reakʼ gelbar cando reakʼ bargel eaeyakʼ dinre Jehoyakin do hajot khone aṛakʼkedea. 
2Kings25:28 Uni do Jehoyakin sãote mońjteye galmaraokeda ar Babelre uni sãote okoe rajko tahẽkan onko khon hõ ḍher manotakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye duṛupʼkedea. 
2Kings25:29 Jehoyakin do jel khana reakʼ kicricʼe bocʼkeda ar jion reakʼ sarecʼ dinko do raj sãote jom ńũkateye paromkeda. 
2Kings25:30 Ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din raj do din hilokʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhata lekae emaekan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamren hopon do Seth, Sethren hopon do Enos," 
1Chronicles1:2 Enosren hopon do Kenan, Kenanren hopon do Mahalalel, Mahalalelren hopon do Jared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Jaredren hopon do Enok, Enokren hopon do Mathusala, Mathusalaren hopon do Lamek ar Lamekren hopon Noha." 
1Chronicles1:4 Noharen hopon do Sem, Ham ar Japhet." 
1Chronicles1:5 Japhetren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Gomer, Magog, Madal, Jawan, Tubạl, Mesek ar Tirạs." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomerren hoponko do Askenas, Diphat ar Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Jawaren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Elisa, Tarsis, Kitim ar Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hamren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana, Kus, Misrạyim, Put, ar Kanan." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kusren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Seba, Hạwila, Sabta, Raema ar Sabteka. Raemaren hopon dokin hoyokʼ kana Seba ar Dedan" 
1Chronicles1:10 Kusren do mitʼṭen hopone hoylena uniyakʼ ńutum do Nimrod tahẽkana. Uni do dhạrtire mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:11 Ludio, Anamio, Lehebio, Naptuhiko, Pạthrusiko, Kạsluhiko ar Kerh do Misorren bõsko tahẽkana. Ar Kạsluhiko do Philisṭikoren hapṛamko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles1:12  
1Chronicles1:13 Kananren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Sidon tahẽkana. Uni tayom do Hethe janamena. Jebusiko, Amoriko, Girgạsiko, Hiwiko, Arkiko, Siniko, Arwadiko, Semariko ar Hamathiko do Kanan bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles1:14  
1Chronicles1:15  
1Chronicles1:16  
1Chronicles1:17 Shemren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Elam, Ạsur, Arpaksad, Lud, Aram, Us, Hul, Gether ar Mesek." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksadren hoponakʼ ńutum do Selah ar Selahren hoponakʼ ńutum do Eber. 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberren do barea hoponkin tahẽkana. Unkin modre mitʼ hoṛakʼ ńutum do Peleg; uni oktere dhạrti begarlen iạte uni do niạ ńutumko doholetʼtaea. Pelegren boehawakʼ ńutum do Joktan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktanren hoponko doko hoyokʼ kana Almodad, Seleph, Hasarmawet Jerah," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Usạl Diklạ," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal, Abimayel, Seba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophir, Hawila ar Jobab." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophir, Hawila ar Jobab." 
1Chronicles1:24 Noa do hoyokʼkana Semrenkoakʼ bõs tạlika: Semren hopon do Arpaksad, Arpaksadren hopon do Sela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Selaren hopon do Eber, Eberren hopon do Peleg, Pelegren hopon do Reu; Reuren hopon do Serug, Serugren hopon do Nahor, Nahorren hopon do Tera; Teraren hopon do Abraham; ar Abrahamren hoponkin do Isahak ar Ismael." 
1Chronicles1:26  
1Chronicles1:27  
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahamren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Isahak ar Ismael. Unkinren bõsko doko hoyokʼkana: Ismaelren maraṅicʼ hopon Nebayot, uni tayom do Kedar, Adbeyel, Mibsam, Misma, Duma, Masa, Hadad, Thema, Jetur, Naphis ar Kedma." 
1Chronicles1:29  
1Chronicles1:30  
1Chronicles1:31  
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahamern chuṭki era Keturaren hopon Simran, Joksan, Medan, Midiạn, Jisbak ar Suah. Seba ar Dedan do Joksanren hoponkin tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiạnren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Ephah, Epher, Hanok, Abida ar Eldah. Noko joto do Ketuaren hoponko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamren hopon Isahakren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Esao ar Israel. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esaoren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Eliphas, Reuel, Jeus, Jalam, ar Korah." 
1Chronicles1:36 Eliphasren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, Teman, Omar, Sephi, Gatam, Kena, Timna ar Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuelren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Nahat, Serah, Sama Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seyirren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon, Ana, Dison, Eser, ar Disan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotanren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Hori ar Hemam. Ar Timna do Lotanren miserae tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:40 Sobalren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Alian, Manahat, Ebal, Sepho ar Onam. Sibeonren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Aia ar Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Anaren hoponakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼ kana Dison. Ar Disonren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Hamran, Esban, Ithran ar Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Eserren hoponkoakʼ ṅutum do hoyokʼ kana Bilhan, Sawan ar Jakan. Disonren hoponkin do Us ar Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israelko talare raj ạuriko hoyokʼre Edom disạmre okoe do rajokʼko ehopʼlen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana: Beorren hopon Bela. Uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Dinhaba tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela gocʼ tayom Bosra nagraharen Serahren hopon Jobab do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela gocʼ tayom Bosra nagraharen Serahren hopon Jobab do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:45 Joabakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jaegare Temanikoakʼ disạmren Husam do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:46 Husamakʼ gujukʼ tayom Bedadren hopon Hadad do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoylena. Uni do Moab disạmren Midiạnrenkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Awit tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadatakʼ gujukʼ tayom Masreka nagraharen Samla do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samla gujukʼ tayom uni bodolte ona ṭoṭha reakʼ gaḍa hanasaren Rehobot nagraharen Sạul do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:49 Sạulakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jaegare Akborren hopon Balhana do raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles1:50 Balhanawakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ jaegare Hadad do raje hoyena. Uniyakʼ raj nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Pau ar uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Mehetabel tahẽkana. Uni do Matredren hoponera Mesahabren goṛomtetʼ kuṛiye tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles1:51 Ar Hadad doe gocʼena. Edomren sordarko doko tahẽkana, Timna, Alwa, Jethet, Oholibama, Ela, Pinon, Kenas, Teman, Mibsar, Magdiel ar Iram; noko do Edomren bõsko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles1:52  
1Chronicles1:53  
1Chronicles1:54  
1Chronicles2:1 Israelren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, Ruben, Simeon, Liwi, Jihudạ, Isakar, Sebulon ar sebulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Napthali, Gad ar Aser." 
1Chronicles2:3 Jihudạren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Onan, Er, Sela. Noko pe hoṛ do Batsuawakʼ kukhiren hoponko tahẽkana. Bathsua do mitʼṭen Kanani maejiue tahẽkana. Niạ ńutuman Jihudạren maraṅicʼ hopon do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre bạṛicʼ hoṛe tahẽkante uni doe gocʼledea." 
1Chronicles2:4 Jihudạ hoponren bạhu Tamorakʼ kukhire Jihudạren hopon Peres ar Serehowakʼ janam hoylena. Jihudạren do jotote mõṛẽ goṭen hoponko tahẽkantaea. 
1Chronicles2:5 Pereshren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Hesron ar Hamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Serehoren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, Simri, Ethon, Hemon, Kolkul ar Dara. Noko do jotote mõṛẽ hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles2:7 Simriren goṛomtetʼ koṛa metakʼme Karmiren hopon Akhon, one uniyakʼ ar mitʼṭen ńutum do Akor tahẽkantae, uni do maraokʼ lạgitʼ ṭhik dohoakatʼ jinise hataoletʼte Israel cetanre muhine ạguleda." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ethonren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ ńutum do Asoriạ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hesronren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jirhomel, Ram ar Kalubae." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramren hopon doe hoyokʼkana Amminadab. Ar Amminadabren hopon do Nahoson; uni do Jihudạ gusṭiren mukhiyại tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahosonren hopon Solmon ar Solmonren hopon do Boas; 
1Chronicles2:12 Boasren hopon do Obed ar Obedren hopon do Jisại. 
1Chronicles2:13 Jisạiren maraṅicʼ hopon do Eliab, dosaricʼ do Abinadab, tesaricʼ do Sommo," 
1Chronicles2:14 Ponicʼ do Nathanel, mõṛẽyicʼ Roddoy," 
1Chronicles2:15 Turuyicʼ do Otsom ar eaeyicʼ do Dạud. 
1Chronicles2:16 Onkoren miserako dokin hoyokʼkana Serua ar Abigol. Abisae, Joab ar Asahal noko do Seruaren hoponko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigol do Amasaren eṅgattetʼe tahẽkana, ar Ismaelren Jethor do Amasaren apate tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles2:18 Hesronren hopontetʼ Kalubaeren bạhu Asubawakʼ kukhire ar Jiriyotakʼ kukhire gidrạkoko hoylena. Asubaren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jesor, Sobab ar Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Asubae gocʼen khan Kalubae do Ephrathae baplakedea. Ephratawakʼ kukhire do Hure janamlena. 
1Chronicles2:20 Hurren hopon Uri ar Uriren hopon Bothsolel. 
1Chronicles2:21 Tayomte Hesron do turuigel bochor umerre Makerren hoponera, metakʼme Gileadren miserae baplakedete uni ṭhene boloyena. Ar uni bạhuttetʼakʼ kukhire do Sogube janamena." 
1Chronicles2:22 Sogubren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Jayir. Ar Sogub ar Jayir do Gileadren apattetʼ Maker bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana. Gilead ṭoṭhare Jayirakʼ tabere bargel pe goṭecʼ ato tahẽkana. Menkhan Gesur ar Aram do hecʼkate Hobbot Jayir, Konat ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko, metakʼme turuigel atokin ạidạriyana." 
1Chronicles2:23  
1Chronicles2:24 Hesron do Kaleb-Ephratareye gocʼen khan uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ kukhire uniren hopon Asuhure janamena. Asuhur do Takoe ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ atoye benao rakapʼleda. 
1Chronicles2:25 Hesronre maraṅicʼ hopon Jirhomelren maraṅicʼ koṛawakʼ ńutum do Ram tahẽkantaea; uni tayom do Buna, Oron, Otsom ar Ahiyawakʼ janam hoylena." 
1Chronicles2:26 Atara ńutuman Jirhomelren ar mitʼṭen bạhui tahẽkantaea. Ar uniren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Onom tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles2:27 Jirhomelren maraṅicʼ hopon Ramren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Mas, Jamin ar Ekor." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onomren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Sommoy ar Jada. Sommoyren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Nadab ar Abisur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisurren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Abihoyel tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ kukhire do Ahban ar Moliwakʼ janam hoylena. 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadabren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Selod ar Appoyim. Selod do begor gidrạwantegeye gocʼena. 
1Chronicles2:31 Appoyimren hopon Jishi, Jishiren hopon Seson ar Sesonren hopon Aholoi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Sommoyren boeha Jadaren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Jethor ar Jonathan. Jethor do begor gidrạwantegeye gocʼena. 
1Chronicles2:33 Jonathanre hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Pelot ar Sasa. Nokin do Jirhomel bõsrenkin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesonren do eken hoponerat motoe tahẽkana, jãhãe koṛa hopon do bako tahẽkantaea. Uniren do Jarha ńutuman mitʼṭen Misorren gutiye tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles2:35 Seson do acʼren guti Jarha sãote acʼren hoponerae baplakedea ar uni hoponerawakʼ kukhire do Attaye janamena. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attayren hopon do Nathan, ar Nathanren hopon Sabod," 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabodren hopon do Ephlol, ar Ephlolren hopon do Obed," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedren hopon do Jehu, ar Jehuren hopon do Asariạ," 
1Chronicles2:39 Asariạren hopon do Helos, ar Helosren hopon do Eliyasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eliyasaren hopon do Sismoy, ar Sismoyren hopon do Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:41 Sollumren hopon Jikomiạ ar Jikomiạren hopon do Elisama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Jirhomelren boeha Kalubaeren hoponko modre Mesa do maraṅicʼe tahẽkana. Mesare hopon do Ship, ar Shipren hopon do Maresha ar Maresharen hopon do Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebronren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Koroho, Topuho, Rekom ar Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Semaren hopon do Rehom, Rehomren hopon do Jorkiyom. Rekomren hopon do Sommoy, ar Sommoyren hopon do Mayon ar Mayonren hopon do Beth-sur." 
1Chronicles2:45  
1Chronicles2:46 Kalubaeren chuṭki era Oiphawakʼ kukhire do Haron, Mothsa ar Gasesakʼ janam hoylena. Haronren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum hõ Gases doholena." 
1Chronicles2:47 Jehodoyren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Regom, Jothom, Geson, Pelot, Oipha ar Shaph." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kalubaeren chuṭki era Makhawakʼ kukhire do Seber, Tirhon, Shap ar Sibawakʼ janam hoylena. Shap do Modmona ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ atoye benaoleda ar Seba do Mokbena ar Gibia atokine benaoleda. Kalebren hoponerawakʼ ńutum do Aksha tahẽkantaea." 
1Chronicles2:49  
1Chronicles2:50 Niạge hoyena Kalebakʼ bõs reakʼ katha: Ephratharen maraṅicʼ hopontetʼ Hurren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Sobal, Solom ar Hareph. Sobal do Kiriat-Jiarim ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ atoye benao rakapʼleda;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Ar Solom do Bethlehem atoe benaoleda ar Hareph doe benaoleda Beth-Gader ato. 
1Chronicles2:52 Kiria-Jiarim okoeko benao rakapʼletʼ onko Sobal bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Horoa, Monuhotiaren adha hoṛko ar Kiriat-Jiarimren hoṛko. Kiriat-Jiarimren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Jitriyo, Puthiyo, Sumathiyo ar Misrasiyoko. Ar noko khon Sorathiyo ar Esṭayelio bõsko benaolena." 
1Chronicles2:53  
1Chronicles2:54 Solom bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Bethlehemren hoṛko, Notophotiko, Oṭot-Beth-Joaber hoṛko, Monhotiạren adha hoṛko, Sorayiko ar Jabesre girobasokʼkan olokʼko, metakʼme Tiriyathiko, Simiyạthiko ar Sukhathiko. Noko doko tahẽkana Kiniạko okoe do Rekhobiạkoren hapṛam Hamat bõsren hoṛko tahẽkan." 
1Chronicles2:55  
1Chronicles3:1 Dạudren okoe hoponko do Hebronreko janamlen onko doko hoyokʼkana maraṅicʼ hopon do Amon, one uniren eṅgat do Jisriyelren Ahinoyem; dosaricʼ hopon Daniel, one uniren eṅgat do Karmilren Abigole tahẽkana;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Dạudren okoe hoponko do Hebronreko janamlen onko doko hoyokʼkana maraṅicʼ hopon do Amon, one uniren eṅgat do Jisriyelren Ahinoyem; dosaricʼ hopon Daniel, one uniren eṅgat do Karmilren Abigole tahẽkana;" 
1Chronicles3:2 tesaricʼ hopon do Absalom, one uniren eṅgat do Gesorren raj Talmạiren hoponera Makaye tahẽkan; ponicʼ hopon do Adoniạ, one uniren eṅgat do Hogite tahẽkan;" 
1Chronicles3:3 mõṛẽyicʼ hopon do Sophaṭiạ, one uniren eṅgat do Abiṭole tahẽkan; turuicʼ hopon do Jitriyom, one uniren eṅgat do Dạudren ar mitʼṭen bạhu Eglui tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles3:4 Dạud do Hebronre eae bochor raje calaoleda, ar ona jokhecʼ Hebronre uniren noko turui goṭen hoponko janamlena. Ar Dạud do pegel pe bochor Jerusalemre raje calaoeda," 
1Chronicles3:5 Ar onḍe Omiyelren bạhu Bethsebawakʼ kukhire uniren do ponea hoponko janamlena. Onko doko hoyokʼ kana Simiyi, Sobab, Nathon ar Solomon." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ona chaḍa uniren do arhõ are goṭen hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Jibhor, Elisuạ, Eplelot, Nogoho, Nephog, Japhiạ, Elisama, Eliyada, ar Elipheloṭ." 
1Chronicles3:7  
1Chronicles3:8  
1Chronicles3:9 Noko doko hoyokʼkana Dạudren hopon, ar onkoren boeha kuṛiyakʼ ńutum do Tamor. Ona chaḍa Dạudren chuṭki erakoakʼ kukhire arhõ hoponkoko janamlena." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomonren hopon Rohobiam, Rohobiamren hopon Abiạ, Abiạren hopon Asa, Asaren hopon Jehosapat," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehosaphatren hopon Jihoram, Jihoramren hopon Ahosiạ, Ahosiạren hopon Joas," 
1Chronicles3:12 Joasren hopon Amasiạ, Amasiạren hopon Asariạ, Asariạren hopon Jothom," 
1Chronicles3:13 Jothamren hopon Ahos, Ahosren hopon Hiskiạ, Hiskiạren hopon Manasi," 
1Chronicles3:14 Manasiren hopon Amon ar Amonren hopon Josiạ. 
1Chronicles3:15 Josiạren pạhilicʼ hopon do Johanan, dosaricʼ do Jihowakim, tesaricʼ do Sidikiạ, ponicʼ do Solum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Jihowakimren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Jikoniạ ar Sidikiạ. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bondi Jikoniaren hopon Solṭiel," 
1Chronicles3:18 Molkiram, Poday, Sinothsor, Jikomiạ, Hosama ar Nodobiạ." 
1Chronicles3:19 Podayren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Serubabil ar Simiyi. Serubabilren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Moslum ar Honaniạ. Ar unkinren miseratakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Solomit. 
1Chronicles3:20 Ona chaḍa Serubabilren do arhõ mõṛẽ goṭen hoponko tahẽkana; onko doko hoyokʼkana Hosuba, Ohel, Berikhiạ, Hosdiạ ar Jusob-Hesod." 
1Chronicles3:21 Honaniạ bõsren hoṛko do Polṭiạ ar Jisayaho; ona chaḍa ona bõsre Rophayelren, Arnonren, Obodiạren ar Sokhoniạren hoponkoko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sokhoniạ bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Samariạ ar uniren hoponko; onko hoponkoakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Hoṭus, Jigal, Bariho, Niạriạ ar Saphoṭ. Noko do jotote turui goṭenko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles3:23 Niạriạren do pe hoponko tahẽkantaea onko do hoyokʼkana Eliyonoe, Hiskiạ, Osrakim." 
1Chronicles3:24 Eliyạnren eae goṭen hopon doko hoyokʼkana Hodbiạ, Eliyasib, Polai, Akub, Johanan, Dolae ar Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Jihudạ bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Peres, Hisron, Kormi, Hur ar Sobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Sobalren hopon do Raya, ar Rayaren hopon do Johot ar Johotren hopon do Ahumoy ar Lohod. Noko do Sorathiạ bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:3 Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do Oṭam atoye benao rakapʼletʼ uniren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, Jisriyel, Jisma ar Jidbos. Ar onkoren miseratakʼ ńutum do Hotsolil-Poni tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:4 Pạnuelren hopon Gador ar Esorren hopon do Hus. Nukin banar do Ephratharen maraṅicʼ hopon Hur bõsren hoṛkin tahẽkana. Ar Hur do Bethlehem atoye benao rakapʼleda. 
1Chronicles4:5 Takoya ato okoeye benao rakapʼletʼ uni Ashurren bạhukinakʼ ńutum do Hila ar Nara tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles4:6 Narawakʼ kukhire do Ahusom, Hephor, Toimini ar Ohosṭrir nokoakʼ janam hoylena. Noko do Nararen hoponko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:7 Hilaren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Serot, Jitsohor ar Etnon." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kosren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Anub ar Subeba. Kos do Harumren hopon Ahorholer bõsren hapṛame tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabes do acʼren boehako khon arhõ manotan hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniren eṅgat do uniyakʼ noa ńutum dohokateye menleda, “Ạḍi kosṭote nui doń janamledea.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabes do Israelren Isor hohoadeteye metade tahẽkana, “Bhorạńme ar ińakʼ sompotti ḍherkạtińme. Ar amakʼ daṛe do iń são sãote tahenma ar sanam muhin khon rukhiyạyińme jemon kosṭo aloń ńam.” Ar Isor do uniyakʼ nehõrjoṅakʼe ańjomketʼtaea." 
1Chronicles4:11 Suherren boeha Kolubren hopon do Mohir, ar Mohirren hopon do Esṭon ar Esṭonren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Beth-rapha, Paseho ar Tohinno. Noko sanamkoge Reka atoren hoṛko tahẽkana. Tohinno do Isronahos atoye benao rakapʼleda." 
1Chronicles4:12  
1Chronicles4:13 Konseren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Othniel ar Sorae ar Othnielren hopon Hothot. 
1Chronicles4:14 Miyonothoyren hopon Ophra ar Soraeren hopon Joab. Joab do Gi-Horsim atoye benao rakapʼleda. Ona ato do Gi-horsimko metakʼkan tahẽkana, ente onḍenko sanam hoṛge kạrigolko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:15 Jiphunniren hopon Kalebren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Eru, Ela, Noyom. Elaren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Konos." 
1Chronicles4:16 Jiholilren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Ship, Shipha, Tiriyạ ar Osayel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Esraren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jethor, Merod, Ephor ar Jalon. Merod do Pharaoren mitʼṭen hoponera Bithiyại baplaledea. Uniyakʼ kukhire Mạriạm, Sommoy ar Jisbohoakʼ janam hoylena. Jisboho do Esṭiạ ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ atoye benao rakapʼleda. Merodren Jihudi bạhuakʼ kukhire do Jerod, Hebor ar Jikuthiyelakʼ janam hoylena. Jerod do Godor ato, Hebor do Sokho ato ar Jikuthiyạ do Sanoho atoye benao rakapʼleda." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Nohumren misera do Hodiại baplaledea. Uniren gidrạ dokin hoyokʼkana Gormiạ Kiyilar apattetʼ ar Makhathiạ Esṭimiạren apattetʼ. 
1Chronicles4:20 Simonren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Amon, Rinn, Bin-hanon ar Tilon. Jisiren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Sohet ar Bin-sohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Jihudạren hopon Selawakʼ bõsren hoṛ modreko tahẽkana Er, Lada, Beth-asbeyer okoe do mihi musnạ kicricʼko tińetʼkan tahẽkan onkoren sanam bõsko, Jokim ar Kosebarren hoṛko, Joas, Saroph ar Jasu Bilhom Selar hopon Er do Leka atoye benao rakapʼleda ar Lada do Maresha atoye benaoleda. Joas ar Saroph do Moabren disạm cakʼlaokin tahẽkana. Niạko do mare dinko reakʼ tạlika tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:22  
1Chronicles4:23 Sela bõsren hoṛko modre okoe do Notayim ar Goderareko girobasokʼ kan hoṛko do kuṅkạlko tahẽkana. Onko do rajakʼ kạmi lạgitʼte onḍeko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeonren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Nomuel, Jarib, Seroho ar Sạul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Sạulren hopon doe hoyokʼkana Solum, ar Solumren hopon do Mibsom ar Mibsomren hopon do Misom." 
1Chronicles4:26 Misomren mitʼṭen hopon do Homuyel, Homuyelren hopon do Sokur ar Sokurren hopon do Simoyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simoyiren do gel turui hopon ar turui goṭen kuṛiko tahẽkana, menkhan uniren boehakoren do ḍher gidrạko bako tahẽkana. Ona iạte onkoren sanam gusṭiko modre Jihudi gusṭiko leka nunạkʼ gidrạ do bako tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:28 Simeon gusṭiren hoṛko do Ber-seba, Molada, Hasor-sual, Bilha, Etsom, Tolad, Bothuyel, Horma, Siglog, Beth-morkaboth, Hasor-sushim, Beth-biri ar Saryimreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. Dạudakʼ rajokʼ hạbicʼ niạko ato do onkoakʼge tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:29  
1Chronicles4:30  
1Chronicles4:31  
1Chronicles4:32 Onkoakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ atoko reakʼ ńutum do Oṭam, Onan, Rimmon, Tokhen ar Ason tahẽkana. Bakʼal hạbicʼ niạ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ato beṛhaeteakʼ jaegako do onko tabere tahẽkana. Ar noakorege onko doko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana ar ako apnarakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bõs reakʼ tạlikako dohoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:33  
1Chronicles4:34 Noko do Simeon gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Jehu one onkoren hapṛam do Sorai ar Osiyelkin tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Eliyenoe, Jakoba, Jisohai, Asai, Adayel, Jisimiyel, Bonae ar Siphir hopon Sis one onko do Alon, Jidyiyo, Simri ar Samariạtekoren hapṛamko tahẽkana. Ar onko bõsren hoṛko do ạḍiko saṅge idiyena." 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 Onate ạsul janwarko ạtińko reakʼ jaega sendrae lạgitʼ noko hoṛ do Gador bahre tapol ot reakʼ purub secʼ senkate bhage ghãs jaegako ńamkeda. Jaega do ạḍi maraṅ, nisun ar napaege tahẽkana. Onḍe do lahate Ham bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:40  
1Chronicles4:41 Simeon gusṭiren noko hoṛko do Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ oktere onḍeko senlena. Onko do ḍerate senkate onkoko akromonketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa onko do onḍenko Miyuniạko cetanre jhãpko emketʼte onkoko marao utạrketʼkoa. Ar onkoakʼ cetʼ cinhạge bako doholeda. Ona tayom onko do onkoakʼ jaegare girobasokʼko ehopʼena, ente onḍe do akoren ạsul janwarkoakʼ aema ghãsko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles4:42 Simeonko modre mõṛẽ sae hoṛ do Jisir hopon Polṭiạ, Niạriạ, Rophariạ ar Useyel do onkoren mukhiyạ benaokate Seyir ńutuman buru ṭoṭhako akromonkeda." 
1Chronicles4:43 Lahate Amalekiạkoren thoṛa hoṛ do Seyirteko dạṛketʼte onḍeko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Simeonrenko do onko hoṛkoko gocʼ giḍikatʼkote onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onko do onḍeko girobasokʼ kana. 
1Chronicles5:1 Israelren maraṅicʼ hopon Ruben do acʼ apatakʼ aṭetʼe bhõnḍletʼte maraṅicʼ hopon reakʼ ạidạriye atʼletʼ tahẽkana. Ona ạidạri do Israelren eṭakʼ hopon Josephren hoponko emocolena. Onate bõsbudạre uniyakʼ ṭhạ̃i do maraṅicʼ hopon lekate baṅ ol akana. 
1Chronicles5:2 Arhõ boeharen gusṭiko modre Jihudạ gusṭikoren do joto khon daṛeanko tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ gusṭi khonge mukhiyại bachao ocolenrehõ maraṅicʼ hopon reakʼ ạidạri do Josephgeye ńamleda. 
1Chronicles5:3 Israelren maraṅicʼ hopon Rubenren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Hanok, Pollu, Hesron ar Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joel bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Joelren hopon Simiyi, Simiyiren hopon Gog, Gogren hopon Simiyi," 
1Chronicles5:4 Joel bõsren hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana Joelren hopon Simiyi, Simiyiren hopon Gog, Gogren hopon Simiyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 Simiyiren hopon Mika, Mikaren hopon do Raya, Rayaren hopon do Bakʼal ar Bakʼalren hopon Bera. Bera do Rubenkoren mukhiyại tahẽkana. Asurren raj Tiglog-Pilesor do uni bondikateye idiledea." 
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Ruben gusṭirenkoakʼ tạlika do bõsbudạ lekate ollena. Onko modre Jeyiyel, Sakhariạ ar Asosren hopon Bela noko do mathako tahẽkana. Asos do Semaren hopone tahẽkana ar Sema do Joelren hopone tahẽkana. Noko do Orowa khon Nobo ar Bakʼal-Miyon hạbicʼko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ruben gusṭirenkoakʼ tạlika do bõsbudạ lekate ollena. Onko modre Jeyiyel, Sakhariạ ar Asosren hopon Bela noko do mathako tahẽkana. Asos do Semaren hopone tahẽkana ar Sema do Joelren hopone tahẽkana. Noko do Orowa khon Nobo ar Bakʼal-Miyon hạbicʼko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:8  
1Chronicles5:9 Gileadre onkoren ạsul janwarkoko saṅge idiyen khan purub secʼ reakʼ hahaṅkar ṭoṭha oka khon ehopʼ akan ona hạbicʼko dokholkeda. Noa hahaṅkar jaega do phurạt gaḍa reakʼ pạchim secʼre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles5:10 Sạulakʼ rajokʼ oktere Rubenrenko do Hagariạko upạrte lạṛhạikate onkoko gocʼletʼkoa. Onko do Gilead purub secʼ, metakʼme Hagariạkoakʼ sanam jaega dokholkate onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
1Chronicles5:11 Gad gusṭiren hoṛko do Rubenrenko aṛe Bason disạm reakʼ Solkha hạbicʼ reakʼ jaegakoreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles5:12 Onko modre matha do nokoko tahẽkana Joel, Saphom, Janoy ar Saphot. Noko do Basonreko tahenkan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:12 Onko modre matha do nokoko tahẽkana Joel, Saphom, Janoy ar Saphot. Noko do Basonreko tahenkan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:13 Gad gusṭiren sarecʼ hoṛko do noko eae hoṛren, metakʼme Mikhayel, Mosllum, Seba, Joray, Jakon, Siyạ ar Eber bõsren hoṛko secʼko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:14 Noko do Huriren hopon Abihoyel bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Huriren apat do Jaroho, Jarohoren apat do Gilead, Gileadren apat do Mikhayel, Mikhayelren apat do Jisisoy, Jisisoyren apat do Johoda ar Johodaren apat do Bus." 
1Chronicles5:15 Abdiyelren hopon Ahi do bõskoren mukhiyại tahẽkana ar Abdiyel do Guniren hopone tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles5:16 Gad gusṭiren hoṛko do Bason disạmre, Gileadre ar onḍenakʼ atokore ar Saron ṭoṭha reakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam jaegareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:17 Jihudạren raj Jotham ar Israelren raj Jerobiamakʼ rajokʼ oktere noko hoṛkoakʼ ńutum do bõsbudạre ol caṛhaolentakoa. 
1Chronicles5:18 Ruben gusṭi, Gad gusṭi ar Manasi gusṭiren adha hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼ pongel pon hajar eae sae turuigel daṛean hoṛ sapṛao akanko tahẽkana. Onko do ḍhal, tarwaṛe ar akʼsar behoharko baḍaekan tahẽkana ar lạṛhạire ạḍi gạkhuṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Onko do Hagariạko, metakʼme Jiṭuren, Naphisren ar Nadabren hoṛko upạrteko lạṛhạiyena." 
1Chronicles5:20 Noko sãote lạṛhại jokhecʼ Isor do onkoe goṛowatʼko tahẽkana. Uni do Hagariạko ar onkoren sanam hoṛko onkoakʼ tireye jimạletʼkoa, ente lạṛhại jokhecʼ onko do Isor ṭhenko koejoṅkan tahẽkana. Ar uni cetanreko bhorsalen iạte uni do onkoakʼ koejoṅe ańjomletʼ takoa." 
1Chronicles5:21 Onko do Hagariạkoren mõṛẽgel hajar ũṭ, bar lakh tala bhiḍi ar bar hajar gadhako luṭjoṅana ar mitʼ lakh hoṛko bondi idiketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ona chaḍa ḍher bạiriko gocʼena, ente Isorakʼ ạyurtege noa lạṛhại do hoylena. Ar Israelko ạuriko bondi idi ocokʼ hạbicʼ onḍegeko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:23 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko do Bason khon Bakʼal-Harmen, Senir ar Harmen buru hạbicʼ oka jaegareko tahẽkan onḍe girobasokʼko ehopʼena. Onko do lekhare ạḍi ḍherko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:24 Onkoakʼ bõsren mathakoakʼ ńutum do nonka leka tahẽkana Ephor, Jisi Eliyel, Asriyel, Jirimiạ, Hodbiạ ar Johodiyel. Noko birbanṭa hoṛ do ạḍi namḍak hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles5:25 Menkhan onkoren hapṛamko do Isorre pạtiạr bako tahẽlena. Ar disạmren okoe jạtrenko Isor do onko samaṅ khone marao utạrletʼko onkoren debotako ṭhenko ạkhrińena. 
1Chronicles5:26 Unre Israelren Isor do Asurren raj Pulakʼ, metakʼme Tiglot-Pileserakʼ monre edrey rakapʼ ocoketʼtaea. Uni do Rubenrenko, Gadrenko ar Manasi gusṭiren adha hoṛkoko bondi idiketʼkote Helho, Habor ar Hara elakare ar Gosen gaḍa aṛereye idiketʼkoa; ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onko do onḍege menakʼkoa." 
1Chronicles6:1 Liwiren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Gerson, Kohat ar Morari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohatren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Omram, Jishor, Hebron ar Usiyel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Omramren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Haron, Mose ar Mạriạm. Haronren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Nadam, Abihu, Eliaser ar Ethamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eliaserren hopon do Pinhas, Pinhasren hopon do Abisue," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisueren hopon Buki, Bukiren hopon Usi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Usiren hopon Sorohiạ, Sorohiạren hopon Morayoth," 
1Chronicles6:7 Morayothren Omoriạ, Omoriạren hopon Ahiṭub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahiṭubren hopon Sadok, Sadokren hopon Ahimas," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimasren hopon Asariạ, Asariạren hopon Johanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Johananren hopon Asariạ. Uni do Jerusalemre Solomone benaoletʼ mundilre naeke reakʼe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles6:11 Asariạren hopon Amariạ, Amariren hopon Ahiṭub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahiṭubren hopon Sadok, Sadokren hopon Sollum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Sollumren hopon Hilkiạ, Hilkiạren hopon Asariạ," 
1Chronicles6:14 Asariạren hopon do Sorae, Soraeren hopon do Jihosadek." 
1Chronicles6:15 Probhu Isor do tinre Nebukadenesar hotete Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko bondikateye kolletʼkoa ar ona jokhecʼ Jihosadek hõ onḍeye kolledea. 
1Chronicles6:16 Liwiren hopon do Gerson, Kohat ar Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gersonren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Libni ar Simiyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kohatren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Omram, Jishor, Hebron ar Usiyel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merariren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Mohali ar Musi. Hapṛamkoakʼ bõs lekate nokoakʼ ńutum do Liwikoakʼ bõs tạlikare ol rakapʼlena. 
1Chronicles6:20 Gersonren hopon do Libni, Libniren hopon Johot, Johotren hopon Simmo," 
1Chronicles6:21 Simmoren hopon Joah, Joahren hopon Eddo, Eddoren hopon Seroho, Serohoren hopon Jiyotroy." 
1Chronicles6:22 Kohatren mitʼṭen hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Aminadab, Aminadabren hopon do Koroho, Korohoren hopon do Asir," 
1Chronicles6:23 Asirren hopon do Elkana, Elkanaren hopon do Ebiyasaph, Ebiyasaphren hopon do Asir," 
1Chronicles6:24 Asiren hopon do Tohat, Tohatren hopon do Uriyel, Uriyelren hopon do Usiạ, Usiạren hopon do Sạul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkanaren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Amasai ar Ahimat," 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimotren hopon do Elkana, Elkanaren hopon do Sophi, Sophiren hopon do Nohot," 
1Chronicles6:27 Nohotren hopon do Eliab, Eliabren hopon do Jiroham, Jirohamren hopon do Elkana ar Elkanaren hopon do Samuel." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuelren pạhilicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Joel ar dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Abiạ. 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuelren pạhilicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Joel ar dosaricʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Abiạ. 
1Chronicles6:29 Morariren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ ńutum do Moholi, Moholiren hoponakʼ ńutum do Libni, Libniren hoponakʼ ńutum do Simiyi, Simiyiren hopon Us," 
1Chronicles6:30 Usren hopon Simiyi, Simiyiren hopon Hogiyo ar Hogiyoren hopon do Asae." 
1Chronicles6:31 Goha sinduk Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạguyen tayom Dạud do thoṛa hoṛko cetanre sereń reakʼ bhare ematʼkoa. 
1Chronicles6:32 Solomon do Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ạuriye benao hạbicʼ onko hoṛko do ḍera tạmbu samaṅre, metakʼme ńapamokʼ tạmbu samaṅrege sereń durạṅate Probhu Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkana. Onko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ niạm ṭhik doho akan tahẽkana ona lekage onko doko kạmikan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles6:33 Niạ sewa kạmire okoe hoṛko ar onkoren okoeko bõskoko bahal ocolen onko doko hoyokʼkana: Kohatrenko modre do gaenaha Hemone tahẽkana. Hemon do Joelren hopone tahẽkana, ar Joel do Samuelren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:33 Niạ sewa kạmire okoe hoṛko ar onkoren okoeko bõskoko bahal ocolen onko doko hoyokʼkana: Kohatrenko modre do gaenaha Hemone tahẽkana. Hemon do Joelren hopone tahẽkana, ar Joel do Samuelren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:34 Samuel do Elkanaren hopon, Elkana do Jihoramren hopon, ar Jihoram do Eliyelren hopon, ar Eliyel do Toharren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:35 Toha do Suphren hopon, Suph do Elkanaren hopon, Elkana do Mahotren hopon, Mahot do Amasaeren hopon." 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasae do Elkanaren hopon, Elkana do Joelren hopon, Joel do Asariạren hopon, Asariạ do Saphoniạren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasae do Elkanaren hopon, Elkana do Joelren hopon, Joel do Asariạren hopon, Asariạ do Saphoniạren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:37 Saphoniạ do Tohatren hopon, Tohat do Asirren hopon, Asir do Ebiyashopren hopon, Ebiyashop do Korohoren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:38 Koroho do Jishorren hopon Jishor do Kohatren hopon, Kohat do Liwiren hopon ar Liwi do Israelren hopone tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles6:39 Hemonren peṛa Asaph ar uniren sereń dolko do Hemonakʼ jojomsa secʼreko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar Asaph do Berikhir hopone tahẽkana, Berikhir do Simiyiren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:40 ar Simiyi do Mikhayelren hopon, Mikhayel do Baseyerren hopon, Basey do Molkiyạren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:41 Molkiya do Ethner hopon, Ethne do Serohoren hopon, Seroho do Adayaren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:42 Aday do Ethonren hopon, Ethon do Simmir hopon, Simmi do Simiyiren hopon;" 
1Chronicles6:43 Simiyi do Johotren hopon, Johot do Gersonren hopon ar Gerson do Liwiren hopone tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles6:44 Onkoren peṛako metakʼme Morariren sereń dol do Hemonakʼ leṅgati secʼreko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana. Ethon doe tahẽkana Kisren hopon, Kis do Obdiren hopon, Obdi do Mollukren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:45 Molluk do Hosbiyạren hopon, Hosbiyạ do Amasiạren hopon, ar Amasiạ do Hilkiạren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilikiạ do Amsirren hopon, Amsi do Baniren hopon, Bani do Semorren hopon," 
1Chronicles6:47 Semor do Moholiren hopon, Moholi do Musiren hopon, Musi do Morariren hopon ar Morari do Liwiren hopon." 
1Chronicles6:48 Onkoren peṛa eṭakʼ Liwiko do ḍera tạmbu, metakʼme Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ eṭakʼ sanamakʼ kạmireko bahal ocoakan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles6:49 Menkhan Aron ar uni bõsren hoṛko do Isorren guti Moseyakʼ sanam hukum lekate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ ar dhudhup pinḍ cetanre samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅetʼ tahẽkana ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire jạruṛokʼakʼ kạmiko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar Israel jạtrenkoakʼ kại puruchun reakʼ hõko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles6:50 Aronren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ ńutum do Eliasar tahẽkana, ar Eliaserren hopon do Pinhas, Pinhasren hopon do Abusui," 
1Chronicles6:51 Abisuiren hopon Bukki, Bukkiren hopon Usi, Usiren hopon do Sorahiạ," 
1Chronicles6:52 Sorahiạren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Morayot, Morayotren hopon do Amoriạ, Amoriạren hopon do Ahiṭub," 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahiṭubren hopon do Sadok ar Sadokren hopon do Ahimas. 
1Chronicles6:54 Kohatiạ Aron bõsren hoṛko lạgitʼ pạhilre gulibãṭ hoylen iạte tahen lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ nagraha ar atoko hạṭińreko ńamletʼ onako modre Jihudạ ṭoṭha reakʼ Asrayokʼ nagraha Hebron ar ona ạḍepase reakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hõ tahẽkana. Menkhan nagraha beṛhaeteakʼ khet baṛgeko do Jiphuniren hopon Kalebe emocolena. Ona chaḍa Aron bõsren hoṛko do Libna, Jottiạ, Esṭimiạ, Hilen, Dobir, Ason, Beth-semes ar noako beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko lạgitʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles6:55  
1Chronicles6:56  
1Chronicles6:57  
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Benjạmin gusṭiren jaegako khon doko emocoyena Geba, Alemet, Onathot ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko. Jotote gelpe nagraha ar ato do Kohat bõsrenko talareko hạṭińatʼkoa." 
1Chronicles6:61 Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛkoakʼ ṭoṭhako khon gel goṭecʼ nagraha ar ato do gulibãṭ lekate Kohatren sarecʼ hoṛko ńamkeda. 
1Chronicles6:62 Bõs lekate Gerson bõsrenko do Isakar, Aser, Napthali nagrahako emocoyena ar Bason reakʼ Manasi gusṭi ṭoṭha khon gelpe nagraha ar atoko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ruben, Gad ar Sebulon gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭha khon gulibãṭkate gelbar goṭecʼ nagraha ar atoko do bõs lekate Morari bõsren hoṛko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:64 Nonkate Israelko do niạko nagraha ar atoko ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do Liwikoko ńamkeda. 
1Chronicles6:65 Jihudạ, Simeon ar Benjamin gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭhako khon okako nagraha ar atoko roṛ rakapʼlen onako hõ gulibãṭ lekateko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ar adom Kohat bõsrenko do Ephrayim gusṭi ṭoṭha khon mitʼ bar nagraha ar atokoko ńamkeda. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha khon Asrayokʼ nagraha Sikem, Gesor, Jokmiam, Beth-Haron, Oyalon ar Gat-Rimon ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:68  
1Chronicles6:69  
1Chronicles6:70 Ona chaḍa Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko do akoakʼ ṭoṭha khon ar Biliom ar onako beṛhaetaeakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko emocoyena. 
1Chronicles6:71 Gersonrenko do Manase gusṭiren adha gusṭiren hoṛkoakʼ ṭoṭha khon janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ Bason reakʼ Golan ar Astorothko ńamkeda. 
1Chronicles6:72 Onko do Isakar gusṭiko reakʼ ṭoṭha khon Kedes, Daborot, Ramoth ar Anem ar niạko beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi hõko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:73  
1Chronicles6:74 Asren gusṭikoakʼ ṭoṭha khon onko do Mosal, Abdon, Hukok, Rahab ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:75  
1Chronicles6:76 Napthali gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭhako khon janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ Gạlil reakʼ Kedos, Hommon ar Kiriyathiam hạbicʼko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ar sarecʼ Liwiko, metakʼme Merariko do Sebulon gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭha khon janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍi sudhạ Rimon ar Taborko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:78 Onko do Jerikho reakʼ purub secʼ jordan gaḍa hanasare Ruben gusṭiko reakʼ ṭoṭha khon hahaṅkar reakʼ Beth-sor, Jahosa, Kodemoth ar Mephat ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:79  
1Chronicles6:80 Onko do Gad gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭha khon Gilead reakʼ Ramot, Mohoniam, Hisbon ar Jaser ar onako beṛhaeteakʼ janwar ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ńamkeda." 
1Chronicles6:81  
1Chronicles7:1 Isakarren do ponea hoponko tahẽkana onko doko hoyokʼkana Toloy, Puạ, Jasub ar Simron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Toloyren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Usi, Rophae, Jiriyel, Johomoy, Jibsom ar Samuel. Noko do nij nij bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Dạudakʼ rajokʼ oktere Toloyakʼ bõsren okoeko hoṛakʼ ńutum do lạṛhại hoṛ lekate bõsbudạko ńum ocolen onko do lekhare bargel bar hajar turui sae hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:3 Usiạren mitʼṭen hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Jisrahiạ. Jisrahiạren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Mikayel, Obodiạ, Joel ar Jisiạ. Jisrahiạ sudhạ noko mõṛẽ hoṛ do bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:3 Usiạren mitʼṭen hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Jisrahiạ. Jisrahiạren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Mikayel, Obodiạ, Joel ar Jisiạ. Jisrahiạ sudhạ noko mõṛẽ hoṛ do bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:4 Onkoren bạhuko ar gidrạko do ạḍi ḍherko tahẽkana; onate onkoakʼ bõsbudạ lekate lạṛhại calakʼ lạgitʼ sapṛao akan hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pegel turui hajarko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:5 Isakar gusṭiren sanam bõsrenko modre jotote irạlgel eae hajar lạṛhại phạd koakʼ ńutum do lekha hoylena. 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjạminren do pea hoponko tahẽkana, onko doko hoyokʼkana Bela, Bekhor ar Jidiyel." 
1Chronicles7:7 Belaren mõṛẽ goṭen hopon doko hoyokʼkana Isbon, Usi, Usiyel, Jiremoth ar Eri. Noko do nij nij bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ bõsbudạre bargel bar hajar ar pegel hoṛ do lạṛhại dol lekate ńutumko olletʼtakoa." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekhorren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Somira, Joas, Eliyeshor, Eliyo-Onoy, Omri, Jiromoth, Abiạ, Onathot ar Alemoth." 
1Chronicles7:9 Onkoakʼ bõs-budạre mukhiyạkoakʼ ńutum ar bargel hajar barsae lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ńutum ollen tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:10 Jidiyelren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ ńutum do Bilhon tahẽkana. Bilhonre hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jiyus, Benjamin, Ahud, Konana, Sethonn, Tạrsis ar Ahisohor." 
1Chronicles7:11 Jidiyelakʼ bõsren noko hoṛko do bõsren mukhiyạ ar birbanṭako tahẽkana. Onkoren do gel eae hajar barsae hoṛ do lạṛhại lạgitʼ sapṛao akanko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:12 Suppim ar Huppim do Erren hopone tahẽkana ar Husim do Aherren hopone tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:13 Napthaliren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Johosiyel, Guni, Jethsor ar Sollum. Nokoren apatren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Bilha tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasiren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Osriyel ar Gileadren apat Makhir. Manasiren do Aramren chuṭki erawakʼ kukhireye janamlena. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makhir do Huppim ar Suppimren lạgitʼ bạhui ạguletʼkinạ. Makhirren miseratakʼ ńutum do Makha tahẽkana. Manasi bõsren ar mitʼ hoṛe tahẽkana uni do Solphad. Uniren do jotoge kuṛi hoponko tahẽkantaea. 
1Chronicles7:16 Makhirren bạhuakʼ kukhire do Peres ńutuman mitʼṭen hopone janamlena. Uniren boehawakʼ ńutum do Seres ar uniren hoponkinakʼ ńutum do Ulom ar Rekom tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulomren mitʼṭen hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Bodan tahẽkana. Nokin do Gilead bõsren hoṛkin tahẽkana. Gilead do Makirren hopon ar Makir do Manasiren hopone tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:18 Gileadren misera Hemolekotren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Ishod, Abisior ar Mohola." 
1Chronicles7:19 Samiren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Ahiyon, Sekhom, Likhi ar Aniyam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ephrayimren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ ńutum do Sutheloho, ar Suthelohoren hopon dio Berod, Berodren hopon do Tohot, Tohotren hopon do Eliyada, Eliyadaren hopon do Tohot." 
1Chronicles7:21 Tohotren hopon do Sabod ar Sabodren hopon do Sutheloho. Ephrayimren do arhõ barea hoponkin tahẽkana unkinakʼ ńutum do Ethsor ar Eliad. Unkin do disạmrekin janamlena ar Gadren hoṛkoakʼ titekin gocʼ ocoyena, ente unkin do Gadkoren janwar kombṛoko lạgitʼ onḍekin senlen tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:22 Unkinren apat Ephrayim do ḍher din hạbicʼ unkin lạgitʼe rakʼ homorleda. Uniren peṛa pạrbhạko do jiwi raṛecʼtae lạgitʼko hecʼlena. 
1Chronicles7:23 Inạ tayom uni do acʼren bạhu tulucʼe giticʼmitʼen khan uniren bạhu doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa hopone janamkedea. Ephrayim do uniyakʼ ńutum Beriai dohoketʼtaea, ente uniyakʼ oṛakʼre ghoṭna paṛao akan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:24 Uniren hoponerawakʼ ńutum do Sira tahẽkana. Ar Sira do cetan ar latar Beth-Aron ar Usen-Sira atoye benao rakapʼleda. 
1Chronicles7:25 Boyirren hopon Rephoho, ar Rephohoren hopon do Resoph, Resophren hopon do Teloho, Telohoren hopon do Tohon," 
1Chronicles7:26 Tohonren hopon do Ladon, Ladonren hopon do Ammihud, Ammihudren hopon do Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Elisamaren hopon do Nun ar Nunren hopon do Josuạ. 
1Chronicles7:28 Bethel ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko, purub secʼ Naron, pạchim secʼ Gesor ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko do Ephrayimakʼ jaega jumi ar tahen oṛakʼko tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Sikem ar ona reakʼ atoko khon Oya ar ona reakʼ atoko hạbicʼ onkoakʼ ṭoṭha tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:29 Manasi reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ Beth-san, Tanok, Mogiddo, Dor ar niạko beṛhaeteakʼ joto atoko do onkoakʼ tahẽkana. Israelren hopon Josephren bõsko do niạ nagraha ar atokoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:30 Asren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jimno, Jisba ar Boriạ. Ar Seroho do onkoren miserate tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:31 Boriạren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Hebor ar Molkiyel. Molkiyel do Birsatren apattetʼe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heborren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jophleṭ, Somer ar Hothom. Ar Suạ do onkoren miserate tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jophleṭren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Pasok, Bimhol ar Osat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Semorren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Ahi, Rogoh, Jihubbo ar Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Semorren boeha Helomren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Sophoho, Jimmo, Selosh ar Amol." 
1Chronicles7:36 Shopherren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Suho, Hornephor, Sual, Beri, Jimri," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bethsor, Hod, Sommo, Silosh, Jetron ar Bera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Jethorren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Jephuni, Pishop ar Ora." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ulren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Aroho, Honniel ar Rithsiạ." 
1Chronicles7:40 As gusṭiren noko hoṛko do nij nij bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Noko mimitʼko do bachao akan birbanṭa ar maraṅ mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Asakʼ bõsbudạre olakan hoṛko modre lạṛhại calakʼ sapṛao akan hoṛkoakʼ lekha do bargel turui hajar tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjaminren pạhilicʼ hopon doe hoyokʼkana Bela, dosaricʼ do Asbel Tesaricʼ do Ohorho," 
1Chronicles8:2 Ponicʼ do Noha ar mõṛẽyicʼ do Rapha. 
1Chronicles8:3 Belaren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Addor, Gera, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisui, Naman, Ahoho," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sophun ar Hurom." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehudren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Naman, Ahiạ ar Gera. Noko doko tahẽkana Gebare girobasokʼ kan hoṛkoren bõs mukhiyạko. Gera do acʼren banar boeha Geba khon jorkateye oḍok giḍikatʼkinạ; onate unkin do Manhote senkate girobasokʼ kin ehopʼena. Gera do Us ar Ahihudren apate tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Sohoriạm do acʼren banar bạhu Husim ar Barake bạgiletʼkin tahẽkana. Moab disạmre uniren eṭakʼicʼ bạhu Hodserakʼ kukhire uni ar noko hoponkoko janamlena: Joab, Sibiạ, Mesa, Molkom," 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 Jius, Sokhiạ ar Mirmo. Noko do nij nij bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles8:11 Husimakʼ kukhire uniren arhõ barea hopon Ahiṭub ar Elpalelakʼ janam hoylena. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpaler hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Ebor, Misiyạm, Semod, Boriạ ar Sema. Ona ar Lod ato ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ eṭakʼ atoko do Semode benao rakapʼleda. Beriạ ar Sema do Oyalonre girobasokʼ kan hoṛren bõskoren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Gadren hoṛko do nokogeko laga ńirletʼkoa." 
1Chronicles8:13  
1Chronicles8:14 Beriạren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Ahiạ, Sasok, Jiromoth, Sobdiạ, Orad, Edor, Mikhayel, Jispa ar Joha." 
1Chronicles8:15  
1Chronicles8:16
