1Chronicles8:17 Elpalelren hopon doko hoyokʼkana, Sabdiạ, Mosllum, Hiski, Hebor, Jimmoroy, Jisliyạ ar Joab." 
1Chronicles8:18  
1Chronicles8:19 Simiyiren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jakim, Sikhri, Sobdi, Eliyonoy, Silthoy, Eliyel, Odaya, Borua ar Simroth." 
1Chronicles8:20  
1Chronicles8:21  
1Chronicles8:22 Sasokren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Jispon, Ebor, Eliyel, Abodon, Sikhri, Hanon, Hananiạ, Elem, Anthokhiạ, Jephodiạ ar Ponnuel." 
1Chronicles8:23  
1Chronicles8:24  
1Chronicles8:25  
1Chronicles8:26 Jirohomren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Simsaroy, Shohariạ, Othaliạ, Jaresiạ, Eliạ ar Sikhri." 
1Chronicles8:27  
1Chronicles8:28 Noko sanamkoge nij nij bõsren mukhiyạ ar bõsbudạ lekate mimitʼko do mathako tahẽkana. Ar noko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles8:29 Okoe hoṛ do Gibeon atoye benao rakapʼletʼ uni do onḍeye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Uniren bạhuakʼ ńutum do Maka tahẽkana; 
1Chronicles8:30 Uniren pạhil hopon do Abdon, uni tayom do Sur, Kis, Bakʼal, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahio, Sekariạ ar Milkot. Milkotren hopon doe hoyokʼkana Simiyạ. Noko hõ Jerusalemre akoren hoṛko ṭhenko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles8:32  
1Chronicles8:33 Nerren hopon do Kis ar Kisren hopon do Sạul. Sạulren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Jonathon, Malkisua, Abinadab ar Esbal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonathanren hopon do Meri-Bakʼal ar Meri-Bakʼalren hopon do Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikaren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Pithon, Melek, Tarea ar Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahosren hopon do Jehoyada, Jehoyadaren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Alemet, Asmawet ar Simri. Simriren hopon do Mosa," 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosaren hopon do Binea, Binearen hopon do Rapha, Rapharen hopon do Eleasa ar Elesaren hopon do Asel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Aselren turui goṭen hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Asrikam, Bokeru, Ismael, Searia, Obadiạ ar Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Atselren boeha Esokren hoponko modre pạhilicʼ doe hoyokʼkana Ulum, Dosaricʼ do Jius ar tesaricʼ do Eliphelot." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulomer hoponko do lạṛhại birko tahẽkana. Noko do akʼsarko beoharetʼ tahẽkana. Onkoren do ạḍi utạr hopon ar goṛomtetʼ hoponkoko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ lekha do mitʼsae mõṛẽgel hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:1 “Israelren rapajkoakʼ puthire sanam Israelkoakʼ bõsbudạ do ol akana. Jihudạren hoṛkoakʼ bepạtiạu iạte onko do Babelteko bundi idiocolena. 
1Chronicles9:2 Ar okoe do pạhilteko ruạṛ hecʼen ar apnarakʼ nagraha ar atore apnarakʼ jaega jumi cetanre arhõ girobasokʼko ehopʼen onko do naekeko, Liwiko, koejoṅ oṛakʼren sapʼsorko ar eṭakʼ Israelkoko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:3 Jihudạ, Benjamin, Ephrayim ar Manase gusṭiren okoe hoṛko do Jerusalemre girobasokʼko ehopʼen onko doko hoyokʼkana:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Jihudạ gusṭi khon: 
1Chronicles9:5 Jihudạren hopon Sela bõsren Asai ar uniren hoponko. Asai do acʼ apatren maraṅicʼ hopone tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:6 Jihudạren hopon Seroho bõsren Joyel. Jihudạ gusṭiren okoe hoṛko do Jerusalemre girobasokʼko ehopʼen onkoakʼ lekha do turui sae aregel. 
1Chronicles9:7 Benjamin gusṭiko khon: Mosllumren hopon Sollu. Uniren hapṛamko modre do Hodbiạ ar Hosnui tekinkin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:8 Jirohomren hopon Jiboniạ. Mithriren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metatʼme Usiạren hopon Ela. Sophṭiạren hopon Mosllum. Uniren hapṛamko modre Ruyel ar Jiboniạ hõkin tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:9 Noko do nij nij bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Benjaminakʼ bõsbudạ lekate okoe hoṛko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onkoakʼ lekha do aresae mõṛẽgel turui hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:10 Noko naekeko do Jerusalemreko tahenkan tahẽkana. Jidiạ, Hihodiạ, Jakhin ar Hilkiạren hopon Asariạ. Asariạ do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre kạmi reakʼ bhare ńamakatʼ hoṛko modre maraṅicʼe tahẽkana. Uniren hapṛamko modre do Mosllum, Sadok, Morayet ar Ahiṭubko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12 Jihuramren hopon do Adaya. Uniren hapṛamko modre do Johosera, Mosllum, Mosillomit ar Imore tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:13 Noko do apan ạpin bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Okoe naekeko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼkan tahẽkan onkoakʼ lekha do mitʼ hajar eae sae turui gel hoṛko tahẽkana. Noko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre kạmi reakʼ bhar ńam lek hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:14 Okoe Liwiko do Jerusalemreko tahenkan onko doko hoyokʼkana: Hosubren hopon do Samariại. Uniren hapṛamko modre do Asrikam, Hosbiạ ar Morari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Bokbokor, Heros, Galol ar Mikhar hopon Mottoniạ. Mottoniạren hapṛamko modre do Sikhri ar Ashaphkin tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:16 Samariạren hopon do Abadiạ. Uniren hapṛamko modre do Galol ar Jiduthon tạkinkin tahẽkana. Elkanaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metatʼme Asren hopon Berikhiạ. Uni do Noṭaphatiạkoakʼ atoreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:17 Mundil rurukhiyạko okoe do Jerusalemreko tahekan onko doko hoyokʼkana: Sollum, Akub, Tolmon, Ahiman ar onkoakʼ bõsren hoṛko. Noko hoṛko do Liwi gusṭiren ḍera reakʼ rurukhiyạkoko tahẽkana. Koriren hopon Sollum do onkoren mukhiyại tahẽkana. Uniren hapṛamko modre Ebiyasoph ar Koroho. Sollum ar uni bõsren hoṛko metatʼme Korohoko do koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ pạcriko horhoe reakʼ bhare ńamletʼ tahẽkana. Teheńhõ onko do raj doṅgol purub secʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạrreko tahenkana. Ar onkoren hapṛamko cetanre hõ ṭhik onkage Probhu Isore tahen tạmbu duạr horhoe reakʼ bhar tahẽkantakoa." 
1Chronicles9:18  
1Chronicles9:19  
1Chronicles9:20 Ona jokhecʼ Eliaserren hopon Pinehas cetanre do rurukhiyạko ńel todarotko reakʼ bhar tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor hõ uni sãoteye tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:21 Moselemiạren hopon Sakhariạ do ńapamokʼ tạmbu reakʼ duạr horhoyicʼe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:22 Duạrko horhoe lạgitʼ okoeko bachao ocolen tahẽkan onkoakʼ lekha do jotote barsae gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. Ar onkoakʼ atokore okoekoakʼ bõsbudạ tahẽkan onkoakʼ ńutum ol tahẽkana. Dạud ar Sạmuel do noko hoṛkoge dạyikan pahradarko mentekin bahaletʼkoa. 
1Chronicles9:23 Onko ar onko bõsren hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ, metakʼme ḍera tạmbu reakʼ duạrko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ar rurukhiạko do purub, pạchim, utạr ar dạkhin niạ pon secʼgeko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:25 Onkoren boehako hõ atoko khon hecʼkate pạli pạlite eae dinkate kạmireko goṛoako kan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:26 Liwikoren okoe pon hoṛ do asol rurukhiyạkoko tahẽkan onkore do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ murại kandhako cetanre hõ onkoakʼ bharko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:27 Onko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ aṛeregeko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana, ente ona oṛakʼ rurukhiyạ reakʼ bhar do onko cetanrege tahẽkana, ar dinạm hilokʼ setakʼre onko do duạr hõ jhicʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:28 Liwiko modre adomko cetanre koejoṅ oṛakʼre sewa kạmi reakʼ jinisko rukhiyại reakʼ bhar tahẽkantakoa. Onko do oḍok ar ader jokhecʼ onakoko lekhayetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:29 Ar eṭakʼko cetanre do koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko ar joto ńuńuwakʼ bạṭiko, holoṅ ar darkha rasa, sunum, gotom ar jut so mosolako rukhiyạ reakʼ bhar tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles9:30 Menkhan jut so mosolako mesal reakʼ bhar do naekeko modre adomko cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:31 Liwiko modre Koroho Sollumren maraṅicʼ hopon Mottothiạ cetanre do anaj samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko rapakʼkate ạgui reakʼ bhar tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:32 Mimitʼ jirạukʼ mãhãre ṭebil cetanre samaṅokʼakʼ oka piṭhạ sajao dohokakʼ hoyokʼkan tahẽkan ona benao reakʼ bhar do Liwiko modre Kohat cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:33 Liwi gusṭiren bõs mukhiyạko okoe do sereń durạṅreko tahẽkan onko do koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ kandhareko tahẽnkan tahẽkana. Onko do sereń durạṅre siń nindạ bestoko tahenkan tahẽkante onko cetanre eṭakʼ jãhãn kạmi reakʼ bhar do baṅ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:34 Bõs tạlika lekate noko jotoge Liwi gusṭiren apan ạpin bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Ar noko do Jerusalemregeko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:35 Jiyiyel do Gibiyon atoye benao rakapʼletʼte onḍegeye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Uniren bạhuttetʼakʼ ńutum do Maka tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:36 Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponakʼ ńutum do Abdon tahẽkana, ona tayom do Sur, Kis, Bakʼal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahio, Sekariạ ar Milkot." 
1Chronicles9:38 Milkotren hopon Simiyam. Noko do Jerusalemre akoren hoṛko ṭhenko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nerren hopon Kis, Kisren hopon do Sạul ar Sạulren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Jonathon, Malkisua, Abinadab ar Esbal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonathanren hopon Meri-Bakʼal, Meri-Bakʼalren hopon do Mika ar Mikaren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Pithon, Melek, Tarea ar Ahas." 
1Chronicles9:41  
1Chronicles9:42 Ahosren hopon do Jaro: ar Jaroren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Alemet, Asmawet ar Simri. Simriren hopon do Mosa." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosaren hopon do Binea, Binearen hopon do Rapha Eliasa ar Eliasaren hopon do Asel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aselren do turui goṭen hoponkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Asrikam, Bokeru, Ismael, Searia, Obadiạ ar Hannan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Mitʼ dhao Philisṭiko do Israelko sãoteko lạṛhạiyena ar Israelko do onko samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. Onko modre ḍherkoge Gilboe burure Philisṭiko hoteteko gocʼ ocoyena. 
1Chronicles10:2 Philisṭiko do Sạul ar uniren hoponko laga idiketʼkote uniren hopon Jonathon, Abinadab ar Mollki-Suạko takoko gocʼketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ona tayom Sạul upạrte ạḍi ãṭ lạṛhại do calao idiyena. Ar akʼsar sipạhiko do uniko ńel ńamkede khanko ghạlkedea. 
1Chronicles10:4 Unre Sạul do acʼren khanḍa bhanḍa akʼsenicʼ hoṛe metadea, “Amakʼ tarwaṛe oḍokkate ińakʼ hoṛmo sobokʼ tabme. Ar baṅkhan onko bin khatna hoṛko hecʼkateko henostayińạ.” Menkhan uniren khanḍa bhanḍa asenicʼ hoṛ do bae rebenlena, ente uni do ạḍitetʼge botor caṛhao akawade tahẽkana. Unre Sạul do acʼakʼ tarwaṛe cetanreye bhindạṛena." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ar uni khanḍa bhanḍa akʼsenicʼ do Sạule gocʼena menteye ńelkede khan acʼ hõ acʼakʼ tarwaṛereye bhindạṛena are gocʼena. 
1Chronicles10:6 Nonkate enhilokʼ Sạul, ar uniren pea hopon ar uni sãoten hoṛko do mitʼ domteko gocʼena." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ar bilạn ṭạnḍireko tahẽkan Israelko do tinreko ńelkeda, Israelkoren lạṛhại phạdkoko dạṛkeda ar Sạul ar uniren hopon hõko gocʼ ocoyena unre onko hõ atoko ńir bạgiyada, ar Philisṭiko do hecʼkate onako nagrahako dokholkeda." 
1Chronicles10:8 Dosar hilokʼ Philisṭiko do gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ jinisko luṭ idijoṅ lạgitʼko hecʼen khan Gilboa burure Sạul ar uniren hoponkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do giḍi akanko ńelkeda. 
1Chronicles10:9 Onko do Sạulakʼ bohokʼko makʼ kuṭrạketʼte uniyakʼ sajbaj ar khanḍa bhanḍako hataoketʼtaea. Ar akoren sanam debotako ar hoṛko ṭhen lại pasnao lạgitʼ onko do Philisṭi disạm reakʼ sanam jaegate sombatko kolkeda. 
1Chronicles10:10 Ona tayom onko do Sạulakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa hataokate akoren debotakoakʼ mundilreko dohokada ar uniyakʼ bohokʼ do Dagon debotawakʼ mundilreko aka dohokada. 
1Chronicles10:11 Philisṭiko Sạul cetanre okako cekaketʼ ona do Jabes Gileadren hoṛko ańjom ńamkeda. 
1Chronicles10:12 Unre onḍenko lạṛhại birbanṭa hoṛko do senkate Sạul ar uniren hoponkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do Jabesteko ạgukeda. Ar Jabes reakʼ ela dare buṭạre onkoakʼ jaṅkoko topakada ar eae din hạbicʼko upạskeda. 
1Chronicles10:13 Probhu Isor cetanre pạtiạr bae tahẽkante Sạul doe gocʼena. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ katha bae bataoetʼ tahẽkana; ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon sopolha baṅ hataokate okoe do bạṛicʼ jiuko tulucʼ helmel menakʼtako onkanko hoṛ ṭhen khon sopolhae hataoetʼ tahẽkana. Onate Probhu Isor do uniye gocʼ ocokedea ar raj do Jisạiren hopon Dạud ṭhene jimạkada. 
1Chronicles10:14  
1Chronicles11:1 Israelren sanam hoṛ Hebronte Dạud ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Am ar aleakʼ hoṛmore do inạ mitʼ mãyãmge ạtukʼkana." 
1Chronicles11:2 Sạule rajokʼkan tahẽkanre amge Israelren lạṛhại phạdkom ạyuretʼko tahẽkana; ar amren Probhu Isor doe men akatʼmea amge jemon uniren hoṛko, metakʼme Israelkom ńel todarotkoa ar onkoren mukhiyạm hoyokʼa.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Unre Israel disạmren sanam murubbiko do Hebronre Dạud ṭhenko jarwayena. Unre Dạud do Probhu Isorge gohayicʼ dohokate onko sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda, ar Samuel hotete roṛakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekate onko do Israel disạmren raj lekate Dạudko ojokʼ bahalkedea." 
1Chronicles11:4 Tayomte Dạud ar sanam Israelko do Jerusalemre, metakʼme Jebusiteko calaoena. Ar onḍe do Jebusirenko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles11:5 Onko do Dạudko metadea, “Am do nonḍe ohom bolo daṛelena.” Enhõ Dạud do Sion reakʼ gaṛkoe ạidạri joṅana. Ar onage ńitokʼ do Dạud nagrahako metakʼkana." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dạude menleda, “Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ pạhilte Jebusiko cetanre jhãpe em unige maraṅ subedar doe hoyokʼa” Onate Seruạre hopon Joab do onko cetanre jhãp em lạgitʼe calaoena, ar onate uni do maraṅ subedarko hoyocokedea." 
1Chronicles11:7 Inạ tayom Dạud do ona gaṛre girobasokʼe ehopʼena; onate ona nagraha do Dạud nagrahako metatʼa. 
1Chronicles11:8 Uni do Millo ṭhen nagrahae benao rakapʼkeda ar Joab nagraha reakʼ sarecʼakʼ hĩskoe jut arokeda. 
1Chronicles11:9 Dạud do din din arhõe daṛe idiyena, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isor do uni sãoteye tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles11:10 Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate Dạud jemon goṭa disạm cetanre acʼakʼ ạidạriye teṅgo daṛeakʼ ona lạgitʼ daṛean hoṛko modre okoe mukhiyạko tahẽkan onko do sanam Israelko soṅgekate uni secʼko hoyente uniyakʼ raj daṛeko keṭecʼketʼtaea. Onko daṛean hoṛkoakʼ katha do noa kana: Jasbiam ńutuman Hokmoniạkoren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkan uni do “Pe gel” ńutuman bir banṭaren mukhiyại tahẽkana. Uni do mitʼ dhao borlomte pe sae hoṛe sobokʼ gocʼletʼkoa. 
1Chronicles11:11  
1Chronicles11:12 Uni tayom dosaricʼ do Eleasare tahẽkana. Uni do Ahoyi bõsren Dodoren hoponge. Uni do pea birbanṭako modren mitʼhoṛe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles11:13 Philisṭiko do tinre lạṛhại lạgitʼ Pos-domimreko jarwalena unre Eleasar do Dạud sãoteye tahẽkana. Ar mitʼ jaegare jao reakʼ goḍare Israelren lạṛhại phạdko do Philisṭiren samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. 
1Chronicles11:14 Menkhan onko pe birbanṭa hoṛ do tala baṛgere senkateko teṅgoyena. Onko do ona baṛgeko rukhiyạkeda ar Philisṭikoko maraoketʼkoa. Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do onkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa ar maraṅ jitạukʼgeye danatʼkoa. 
1Chronicles11:15 Mitʼ dhao pe gel birbanṭako modre pe hoṛ do Adullum dander ṭhen okaṭakʼ maraṅ dhiri tahẽkan onḍe Dạud ṭhenko hecʼena. Unre mitʼ dol Philisṭi lạṛhại phạdko do Rophayem bilạn ṭạnḍireko ḍera akan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles11:16 Un jokhecʼ Dạud do hahaṅkar reakʼ gaṛ lekan mitʼṭecʼ jaegareye tahẽkana ar Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko do Bethlehemreko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles11:17 Unre Dạud do ạḍi ãṭ tetaṅkedea, onate uni doe menkeda, “Jãhãege Bethlehem phaṭok-duạr ṭhenakʼ kuń khon thoṛa dakʼko ạguạń khan!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Niạ katha ańjomkate onko pene birbanṭa hoṛ do Philisṭiren lạṛhại phạdko talate senkate Bethlehem reakʼ phaṭok-duạr ṭhenakʼ kuń khon dakʼ lo rakapʼkate Dạud ṭhenko idikeda. Menkhan Dạud do ona bae ńũleda; ona bodolte ona dakʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte otreye dulkeda. 
1Chronicles11:19 Uni doe menkeda, “E Isor, noa dakʼ iń ńũiya ona do baṅa. Ente okoe do jiwi cuputʼkate ạguko senlen onko hoṛkoakʼ mãyãm do cetʼ iń ńũiya?” Onko do akoakʼ jiwi cuputʼkate ona dakʼko ạguletʼte Dạud do ona ńuńu bae rebenlena. Ar onko pene birbanṭa hoṛkoakʼ kạmige nonka tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles11:20 Joabren boeha Abisae do onko pene hoṛren subedare tahẽkana. Uni do borlomte pesae hoṛe gocʼletʼkoa ar uni hõ onko pene birbanṭako leka ńutume hạran tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles11:21 Uni do onko pene hoṛko khon hõ ḍher manote ńamleda. Onate onko pene hoṛko modre bae lekhalenre hõ unige onkoren subedare hoyena. 
1Chronicles11:22 Kabsilren Jehoyada hopon Bonae hõ mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni hõ maraṅ maraṅakʼkoe kạmileda. Uni do Moab Ariyelren barea hopone gocʼletʼkinạ. Ar him ńurokʼ hilokʼ uni do mitʼṭecʼ danderte bolokate mitʼṭen dhạcri kule gocʼledea. 
1Chronicles11:23 Arhõ uni do misrikoren mitʼṭen hoṛ okoe do eae moka usule tahẽkan uni hõe gocʼledea. Unre uni misri hoṛakʼ tire do tãt reakʼ bim leka mitʼṭecʼ borlom tahẽkana, menkhan uni hoṛ do enhõ mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅgawante uni misri secʼe laha idilena. Ar uni misri hoṛakʼ ti khon borlom recʼkate ona borlomtege uniye gocʼkedea." 
1Chronicles11:24 Jehuyada hopon Bonaeyakʼ kạmi hõ onkage tahẽkana. Uni hõ onko pea birbanṭa leka ńutume hạran tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles11:25 Onko pe hoṛko leka baṅ hudislere hõ uni do “Pe gel” ńutuman dolren hoṛko khon hõ bạ̃ṛti manote ńamleda. Dạud do acʼakʼ rurukhiyạ reakʼ bhar do Bonae cetanregeye doholeda. 
1Chronicles11:26 Onko daṛean hoṛko doko hoyokʼkana: Joabren boeha Asahel, Bethlehem Dodoren hopon Elhanan," 
1Chronicles11:27 Harodren Sema, Harodren Elika," 
1Chronicles11:28 Peletren Heles, Tekuaren Ikesren hopon Ira,, Anathotren hopon Abieser," 
1Chronicles11:29 Husatren Sibekai, Ahohren Ithoy," 
1Chronicles11:30 Nethopharen Maharai, Natophatren Bana hopon Helob," 
1Chronicles11:31 Benjamin-gusṭiren Gibe, Ribaeren hopon Ithoy, Pirathonren Benaya," 
1Chronicles11:32 Gaser binlạn ṭạnḍi khon Huroy, Abortiyạ Abiyel," 
1Chronicles11:33 Bahurimren Asmawet, Sakʼalbonren Eliahba," 
1Chronicles11:34 Gisạniạ Hasemren hoponko, Horariạ Sakhorren hopon Jonathan," 
1Chronicles11:35 Horariạ Sakhorren hopon Ahiam, Urren hopon Eliphal," 
1Chronicles11:36 Makeratiạ Hephor, Poloniạ Ahiạ," 
1Chronicles11:37 Jitriạ Hisro, Esboyren hopon Naraoy," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathonren boeha Joel, Hogriren hopon Mibhor," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathonren boeha Joel, Hogriren hopon Mibhor," 
1Chronicles11:39 Amonren Selek, Seruaren hopon Joabakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa akʼsenicʼ Berotiạ Nohoroe," 
1Chronicles11:40 Jitriạ Era, Jitriạ Gareb, Hiti Uriạ, Aholoyren hopon Sabod, Ruben Sisaren hopon Adina uni do Rubenikoren mukhiyại tahẽkana ar uni sãote pe gel hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles11:41  
1Chronicles11:42  
1Chronicles11:43 Makaren hopon Hanan, Mittiạ Jishaphat," 
1Chronicles11:44 Asṭarotiạ Usiạ, Aroyeyir Hothomren banar hopon Sam ar Jiyiyel," 
1Chronicles11:45 Simriren hopon Jidiyel ar uniren boeha Tisiạ Joha," 
1Chronicles11:46 Mohobiạ Eliyel, Elnamren banar hopon Jiriboy ar Josboy, Moabiạ Jithma," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliyel, Obed ar Mosobayir Jasiyel." 
1Chronicles12:1 Kisren hopon Sạul samaṅ khon Dạude pharak ocoyen khan ḍher hoṛge Siglogre Dạud ṭhenko hecʼena. Ar lạṛhại jokhecʼ okoeko lạṛhại phạd do Dạudko goṛowade tahẽkan onko modre noko hõko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:2 Noko do akʼsar sasapʼkoko tahẽkana ar onko do leṅga ti ar jojomtite hõ bạṭulko tuń daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Onko do Benjạmin gusṭiren Sạul bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko modre nokoko hoṛko tahẽkana: 
1Chronicles12:3 Gibitiạ Somaeren hopon Ahiyesor ar Joas nukin do mukhiyạ hoṛkin tahẽkana; Asmobothren hopon Jesiyel ar Pelot, Borakha, Anathotiạ Jehu:" 
1Chronicles12:4 Gibiyạren Jismiạ- uni do “Pe gel” ńutuman birbanṭakoren mitʼṭen mukhiyại tahẽkana; Jirimiạ, Johosiyel, Johanan, Goderathiạ Josabod:" 
1Chronicles12:5 Eliyusoe, Jirimoth, Baliạ, Samariạ, Horophiạ Sophaṭiạ;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Korohoko modre Elkana, Jisiạ, Asrol, Joyesor, Jasbiam:" 
1Chronicles12:7 Gadoriạ Jirohamren hopon Joyela ar Sabdiạ. 
1Chronicles12:8 Gadiạkoren thoṛa hoṛ do akoakʼ dol bạgikate hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ gạṛ lekanakʼ jaegare Dạud ṭhenko hecʼlena. Onko do lạṛhạiko cetʼakatʼ daṛean birko tahẽkana. Onko do ḍhal ar borlom ṭhik lekako calao daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do dhạcri kul leka botorge tahẽkana ar birren jel leka onko do ạḍi murukko dạṛ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:9 Hudạ secʼ lekate onko doko tahẽkana: Pạhilicʼ do Esor, dosaricʼ do Obidiạ, tesaricʼ do Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 ponicʼ do Mismonna, mõṛẽyicʼ do Jirimiạ," 
1Chronicles12:11 turuiyicʼ do Attoy, eaeyicʼ do Eliyel, irạlicʼ do Johanan, areyicʼ do Elsabed, gelicʼ do Jirimiạ ar Gelmitʼ icʼ do Magbnnoy." 
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Noko Gadiạko do lạṛhại phạdren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Onko modre okoe do huḍiń utạricʼe tahẽkan unige mitʼsae hoṛ somane tahẽkana ar okoe joto khon maraṅicʼe tahẽkan uni do eskarge mitʼ hajar hoṛko somane tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:15 Ona bochor reakʼ pạhil candore jordan gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ tinre perecʼlena unre nokoge paromkate gaḍa purub ar gaḍa pạchim bilạn ṭạnḍire girobasokʼkan sanamkoko laga ńirletʼkoa. 
1Chronicles12:16 Ona chaḍa Benjạmin gusṭiren eṭakʼ hoṛko ar Jihudạren thoṛa hoṛko do Dạudakʼ gaṛ lekan jaegare uni ṭhenko hecʼlena. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ar Dạud do onko sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ oḍok hecʼenteye menkeda, “jodi sulukokʼ lạgitʼ iń goṛowạń lạgitʼpe hecʼakan khan enḍekhan ape sãote midokʼ iń khaṛagea, menkhan jãhãn behokakʼ bạń kạmi akatʼre hõ jodi calaki kate bạirikoakʼ tire jimạyiń lạgitʼ nonḍepe hecʼakan enḍekhan aperen hapṛamkoren Isor do onae ńelma ar apeye bicạrpema.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Okoe do tayomte “Pegel” dolkoren mukhiyại hoylen uni Amasae cetanre Probhu Isorren Jiu doe hecʼena. Ar unre uni doe menkeda, “E Dạud, ale do amren kangeale! E Jisạiren hopon, Ale do am secʼrege menakʼlea. Bhạlại hoyokʼtam ma, amakʼ bhạlạige baṛe hoyokʼma, onkoakʼ bhạlại hõ hoyokʼtakoma, okoe do amko goṛowam kan, ente amren Isor do ame goṛowam kana.” Unre Dạud do onkoe ataṅketʼkote acʼren bạiriko cetanren mukhiyạkoe benaoketʼkoa.”" 
1Chronicles12:19 Dạud do tinre Philisṭiko sãote Sạul upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe calakʼkan tahẽkana unre Manase gusṭiren thoṛa hoṛ do akoakʼ dol bạgikate Dạud ṭhenko senlena. Mekhan Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do Philisṭirenko bako goṛowatʼkoa, ente Philisṭiren cakʼlaoko do ako talare galmarao tayom Dạudko bidạkedea. Onkoko menkeda, “Uni do ale bạgikate acʼren kisạ̃ṛ Sạul sãoteye mitʼlen khan ale do bohokʼ ńurokʼ talea.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Dạud do Siglogteye ruạṛ calakʼ jokhecʼ Manase gusṭiren okoeko hoṛ do akoakʼ dol bạgikate uni ṭhenko senlen onko doko hoyokʼkana, Adon, Josabad, Jidiyel. Mikhayel, Josabad, Elihu ar Silthoy. Noko do Manase gusṭiren mimitʼ hajar lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles12:21 Eṭakʼ hạhạn bạiriko upạrte noko do Dạudko goṛowade tahẽkana. Noko sanamkoge maraṅ daṛean birko tahẽkana ar Dạudren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:22 Nonkate dinke din hoṛko do Dạud goṛowae lạgitʼ hijukʼko ehopʼena. Ar sesre Isorren lạṛhại phạdko leka mitʼṭen maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko benao rakapʼena. 
1Chronicles12:23 Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka lạṛhạikate Sạulakʼ rajosṭi Dạudakʼ tire jimại lạgitʼ okoe do khanḍa bhanḍawante Hebronre Dạud ṭhenko hecʼlen onkoakʼ lekha do nonka tahẽkana: 
1Chronicles12:24 Lạṛhại lạgitʼ sajao sapṛao akan ḍhal ar borlomko calao daṛeakʼ Jihudạ gusṭiren turui hajar irạl sae hoṛko. 
1Chronicles12:25 Simeon gusṭiren eae hajar mitʼsae daṛean lạṛhại hoṛko. 
1Chronicles12:26 Liwi gusṭiren do pon hajar turui sae hoṛ. 
1Chronicles12:27 Onko modre do Aron bõsren mukhiyạ Jehoyada hõe tahẽkana, one uni sãote pe hajar eae sae hoṛko tahẽkan." 
1Chronicles12:28 Ona chaḍa Sadok ńutuman mitʼṭen daṛean lạṛhại bire tahẽkana ar uni bõsren bargel bar subedarko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:29 Sạulakʼ nij gusṭiren, metakʼme Benjamin gusṭiren pe hajar hoṛ. Menkhan niạ gusṭiren ḍher hoṛge unhõ Sạul gharońjrenko secʼko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ephrayem gusṭiren bargel hajar irạlsae daṛean birbanṭako tahẽkana. Noko do nij nij bõsre namḍak hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:31 Manase gusṭiren adha bõsren do gel irạl hajar hoṛko tahẽkana. Noko hoṛko do ńutum ńum ocokateko men ocolena jemon onko do hecʼkate Dạudko raje. 
1Chronicles12:32 Esakhar gusṭiren bar sae mukhiyạko. Onko do budan hoṛko tahẽkana arko bujhạu daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana Israelko tinre cetʼ cekae hoyokʼtakoa mente. Onko sãoteko do ako taberen ako gusṭiren hoṛkogeko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:33 Sebulon gusṭiren do mõṛẽgel hajar gạkhuṛ lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. Onko do joto lekan khanḍa bhanḍawanteko lạṛhại daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Onko do ạḍi pạtiạr salakʼ Dạudko goṛowade tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:34 Napthali gusṭiren do mitʼ hajar subedarko tahẽkana. Onko sãote do ḍhal ar borlom calao daṛeakʼ pegel eae hajar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles12:35 Dan gusṭiren do bargel irạl hajar turui sae gạkhuṛ lạṛhại phạdko. 
1Chronicles12:36 Aser gusṭiren do pongel hajar gạkhuṛ lạṛhại phạdko. 
1Chronicles12:37 Sanam lekan khanḍa bhanḍawante jordan purub secʼ khon mitʼ lakh bargel hajar hoṛko hecʼlena. Noko doko hecʼlena Ruben, Gad ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko modrenkoge." 
1Chronicles12:38 Noko sanamkoge gạkhuṛ lạṛhại birko tahẽkana. Sanam Israelko cetanre Dạud raje lạgitʼ onko do mon murukkate Hebronteko hecʼlena. Dạud raje lạgitʼ eṭakʼ Israelko hõko mitʼ motlena. 
1Chronicles12:39 Noko hoṛko do pe din Dạud sãote tahẽkateko jom ńũkeda. Ar onḍenko hoṛ hõ onko lạgitʼ jom ńũiyakʼko bebostakeda. 
1Chronicles12:40 Ona chaḍa Isakar, Sebulon ar Napthali ṭoṭha khon hõ hoṛko do ũṭko, gadhako, khaccarko ar ḍaṅgrako cetanre decʼkate onko lạgitʼ jomakʼko ạguleda. Israel disạmren hoṛkoakʼ monre rạskạ tahẽkante onko do ḍher holoṅ, loa ar kismis, darkha rasa, sunum ar ḍaṅgrako, meromko ar bheḍako anteko hecʼlena." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dạud do acʼren mitʼke mitʼ mukhiyạko, metakʼme hajar lạṛhại phạdkoren subedar ar sae sae lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko sãoteye sopolhawana." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ona tayom uni do Israelren goṭa dolkoe metatʼko, “Bhagepe hudisetʼ khan ar niạge aboren Probhu Isorakʼ sanakan khan dela, abo do Israel ṭoṭharen aboren sarecʼ boehako ṭhen ar onko sãote naekeko ar Liwiko okoe do onkoakʼ atokore ar janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍikore menakʼko onko ṭhen hõ khobor bon kola jemon onko hõ hecʼkate abo sãoteko seletʼ daṛeakʼ." 
1Chronicles13:3 Dela bon, aboren Isorakʼ goha sunduk do abo ṭhen bon ruạṛ ạguiyma; Sạulakʼ rajokʼ oktere abo do sinduk secʼge babon lutur akawatʼ tahẽkana.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Unre goṭa dolrenkoge ona ạgui lạgitʼko rạjiyena, ente joto hoṛko ṭhenge ona do lek kana menteko hudiskeda." 
1Chronicles13:5 Onatege Kiriat-Jiyarim khon Isorakʼ sinduk ạgui lạgitʼ Dạud do Misor reakʼ Sihor gaḍa khon Homat reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ sanam Israelkoe jarwa mitʼketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles13:6 Jihudạ disạm reakʼ Bala, metakʼme Kiriat-Jiyarim khon Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ạgui lạgitʼ Dạud ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko onḍeko senena. Niạ sinduk do Probhu Isor ńutumtege oprom tahẽkana, ente uni do onḍe Kerubkin talareye tahenkan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles13:7 Hoṛko do Abinadabakʼ oṛakʼ khon Isorakʼ sinduk oḍok kate mitʼṭecʼ nãwã sagaṛ gạḍi cetanre ladekateko idiyetʼ tahẽkana. Unre Us ar Ahiạ do ona sagaṛ gạḍikin calaoetʼ tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles13:8 Dạud ar sanam Israelko do Probhu Isor samaṅre akoakʼ goṭa daṛeteko enecʼ sereńetʼ tahẽkana ar peṛesaṅ, binạ banama, tabla, kortal ar pẽpṛẽtʼanteko rạskạkʼkan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles13:9 Onko do Kidạn reakʼ khạrại ṭhenko seṭeren khan ḍaṅgra dokin tohotʼena ar Us do sinduk sapʼ lạgitʼ acʼakʼ tiye lahakeda. 
1Chronicles13:10 Onate Us cetanre Probhu Isor do edreteye perecʼena. Ar sinduke sapʼketʼ iạte uni doe hạnkedea. Ar onate uni do Isor samaṅre onḍegeye gocʼena. 
1Chronicles13:11 Us cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ edre ńelte Dạud do bae kusilena. Ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona jaega do Peres-Usko metakʼkana. 
1Chronicles13:12 Enhilokʼ Dạud do Probhu Isor ạḍiye botoradea. Uniye menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do enḍekhan cekate iń ṭhen ạgukʼa?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ar Dạud do acʼakʼ nagraha acʼ ṭhen sinduk do bae idileda. Uni do ona idikate Gatren Obed-Idomakʼ oṛakʼreye dohokada. 
1Chronicles13:14 Idomakʼ oṛakʼre acʼakʼ gharońjrenko ṭhen sinduk do pe cando tahẽyena. Ar Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ gharońj ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼe bhoratʼtaea. 
1Chronicles14:1 Tayomte Turren raj Hiram do Dạud ṭhen adom hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Ar onko sãote Dạud lạgitʼ raj oṛakʼ benaoa mente debdạru kaṭko, raj mistriko ar chutạr mistriko hõe kolketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles14:2 Unre Dạud doe bujhạukeda, Probhu Isor do Israelko cetanre acʼakʼ raj hudại teṅgo dohoakada ar uniren hoṛko, metatʼme Israelko lạgitʼ acʼakʼ rajosṭiye maraṅketʼtaea." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dạud do Jerusalemre arhõe baplayena ar uniren do arhõ aema gidrạko hoyentaea. 
1Chronicles14:4 Jerusalemre uniren okoeko hoponko janamlen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Simiyi, Sobab, Nathon ar Solomon." 
1Chronicles14:5 Jibhor, Elisuạ, Eplelot," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogoho, Nephog, Japhiạ," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Eliyada ar Elipheloṭ." 
1Chronicles14:8 Philisṭiko tinreko ańjomkeda, goṭa Israel cetanre Dạud do raj hudạreye ojokʼ bahal ocoakana mente unre onko do akoren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ante akromone lạgitʼko calaoena. Ona ańjomkate Dạud hõ onko upạrteye oḍok hecʼena." 
1Chronicles14:9 Philisṭiko do hecʼkate Rephayim ṭhen jhãpko emkeda. 
1Chronicles14:10 Unre Dạud do Isor ṭhene kuliyana, “Iń do cetʼ Philisṭiko cetanre jhãp iń ema se baṅa? Am do cetʼ ińakʼ tire onkom jimạkoa?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Do calakʼme, iń do amakʼ tireń jimạkoa.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Unre Dạud ar uniren hoṛko do Bakʼal-Perasimte senkate onkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Dạud doe menkeda, “Isor do banbạsi dakʼ leka ińakʼ tite ińren bạirikoe phoṛ idiketʼkoa.” Ona iạte ona jaega reakʼ ńutum do Bakʼal Perasimko dohokeda." 
1Chronicles14:12 Philisṭiko do akoren murhutʼko onḍegeko giḍi oṭoletʼko tahẽkana. Ar Dạudakʼ hukumte hoṛko do onko murhutʼko seṅgelreko atar giḍikatʼkoa. 
1Chronicles14:13 Philisṭiko do arhõ ona tapol otetreko akromonketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles14:14 Unre Dạud do arhõ Isor ṭhene kuliyana, ar Isor do uniye roṛ ruạṛadea, “Ape do sojhete onko ṭhen do alope calakʼa, bickom tayom secʼte senkate konḍeya dareko samaṅ secʼ khonpe ńẽtʼkoa." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ar konḍeya darekore tinre lạṛhại phạdko parom calakʼ reakʼ sabad lekam ańjoma unre am do lạṛhại lạgitʼem oḍok hijukʼa. Noa reakʼ mane do hoyokʼkana, Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdko ńẽtʼko lạgitʼ Isor do am laha lahateye calao akana.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dạud do Isorakʼ hukum lekageye kạmikeda. Onko do Gibeon khon Gesor hạbicʼ goṭa hor Philisṭikoren lạṛhại phạdkoko gocʼ idiketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles14:17 Nonkate Dạudakʼ ńutum do goṭa disạm pasnao idiyentaea, ar Probhu Isor do sanam jạtrenko talare uni reaṅ mitʼṭecʼ botore rakapʼ ocoketʼtakoa." 
1Chronicles15:1 Dạud nagrahare acʼ lạgitʼ oṛakʼ duạre benao sạtketʼ tayom Dạud do Isorakʼ sinduk lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃iye ṭhikketʼte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ tạmbui ṭaṅgaokeda. 
1Chronicles15:2 Inạ tayom uni doe menkeda, “Isorakʼ sinduk do Liwiko chaḍa ar okoe hõ jemon aloko gokʼ bhạriại ente Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk gokʼ idi ar jaejug hạbicʼ uniyakʼ sewae lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do onkogeye bachao akawana.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk lạgitʼ Dạud okare ṭhạ̃iye ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkan onḍe ạgui lạgitʼ uni do sanam Israelko mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles15:4 Aron bõsren okoe hoṛko ar okoe Liwikoe jarwaketʼko onko doko hoyokʼkana: 
1Chronicles15:5 Kohatakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Uriạl ar arhõ mitʼsae bargel hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:6 Merari bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Asae ar arhõ barsae bargel hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:7 Gersonakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Joel ar arhõ mitʼsae pegel hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:7 Gersonakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Joel ar arhõ mitʼsae pegel hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:8 Elisaphonakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Somoyi ar arhõ barsae hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebronakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Eliyel ar arhõ irạl gel hoṛko; 
1Chronicles15:10 Usiạwakʼ bõsren hoṛko mod khon mukhiyạ Aminnadab ar arhõ mitʼsae gelbar hoṛko. 
1Chronicles15:11 Ona tayom Dạud do naeke Sadok ar Ạbiathar ar Liwi Uriạl, Asai, Joyel, Somoyiạ, Eliyel ar Amminadab takoe hohowatʼkoa." 
1Chronicles15:12 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do Liwi gusṭikoren judạ judạ bõsren mukhiyạko kanape; ape ar aperen sãoten Liwiko do Isor ńutumte apnartetʼpe begar dohokʼa, jemon oka ṭhạ̃iyiń sapṛao dohoakatʼ ona ṭhạ̃ire Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ạgukatepe doho daṛeakʼ." 
1Chronicles15:13 Pạhil dhao ona bape ạgu daraletʼte abo cetanre aboren Probhu Isor do edreteye perecʼlen tahẽkana. Ar uniyakʼ hukum leka ona do cetʼlekate ạgui hoyokʼa ona do uni ṭhen khon baṅ baḍae hoylena.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Onate naekeko ar Liwiko do Isor ńutumte apnarko begarena jemon onko do Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sindukko ạgu daṛeakʼ. 
1Chronicles15:15 Probhu Isore udukʼ akatʼ Moseyakʼ hukum leka Liwiko do Isorakʼ sinduk gokʼ ạgui reakʼ ḍaṅkin gokʼkate onako ạgukeda. 
1Chronicles15:16 Dạud do Liwikoren mukhiyạkoe metatʼkoa, onko do jemon bajnakote, metatʼme, binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, kortalko ruwate rạskạkʼ lạgitʼ sereń dolko bahalko." 
1Chronicles15:17 Onate Liwiko do Joelren hopon Hemon ar uni bõsren hoṛko mod khon Berikhiạ hopon Asaph ar onkoren peṛa Morariko mod khon Kusawaren hopon Ethonko bahalketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles15:17 Onate Liwiko do Joelren hopon Hemon ar uni bõsren hoṛko mod khon Berikhiạ hopon Asaph ar onkoren peṛa Morariko mod khon Kusawaren hopon Ethonko bahalketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles15:18 Onko sãote onko bõsren tayom sạrren naekeko hõko bahalketʼkoa. Onko doko hoyokʼkana Sakhariạ, Ben, Jasayel, Somiramoth, Jihiyel, Unni, Eliyab, Bonae, Maseyo, Motithiyạ, Elipholehu, Mikneo ar Obed-Idom ar Jiyiyel ńutuman duạrren barea pharadarkin." 
1Chronicles15:19 Pitạl reakʼ kortal ruru reakʼ bhar do gaenaha Hemon, Asoph ar Ethon cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles15:20 Ar ãṭ aṛaṅte binạ banam banam lạgitʼ bhar do Sakhariạ, Asiyel, Somiramoth, Jihiyel, Unni, Eliab, Maseyo ar Bonaeteko cetanre dohoyena." 
1Chronicles15:21 Latar rạṛte peṛesaṅ bakʼnamkoakʼ bhar do Motithiạ, Elipholehu, Mikneo, Obed-Idom, Jiyiyel ar Asosiyer cetanre dohoyena." 
1Chronicles15:22 Sereń ạyur lạgitʼ do Liwi mukhiyạ Kononiạ cetanre paṛaoena. Uni do sereń guruye tahẽkante uni cetanre ona dạyik do dohoyena. 
1Chronicles15:23 Sinduk horhoe reakʼ bhar do Berikhiạ, Elkana, Obed-Idom ar Jihiyi cetanre paṛaoena. Isorakʼ sinduk samaṅre pẽpṛẽtʼ oroṅ reakʼ bhar do naeke Soboniạ, Jehosaphat, Nothnel, Amasae, Sakhariạ, Bonae ar Eliyesor cetanre paṛaoena." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Inạ tayom Dạud do, Israelkoren murubbiko ar lạṛhại phạdkoren hajarko cetanren subedarko rạskạ salakʼ Obed-Idomakʼ oṛakʼ khon Probhu Isorakʼ ona bondobos sinduk ạgui lạgitʼko calaoena." 
1Chronicles15:26 Okoe Liwiko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sindukko gokʼ ạguiyetʼ tahẽkan onko do Isorgeye ạyuretʼko tahẽkante eae goṭen phẽṭaṛ ar eae goṭen bheḍako samaṅketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles15:27 Sinduk gokʼ idiyetʼkan Liwiko, gaenahako ar sereń dolrenkoe ạyuretʼko Kononiạ do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼe horokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana. Ar Dạud hõ mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ ar ephode horokʼleda." 
1Chronicles15:28 Nonkate sanam Israelko do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohowate, pẽpṛẽtʼ ar sakwa oroṅate, kortal ruwate, binạ banama ar peṛesaṅ banamate Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk do Jerusalemteko ạgukeda." 
1Chronicles15:29 Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk do tinre Dạudakʼ nagrahate seṭerena unre Sạulren hoponera Mikạl do jalna khone oyoṅ akatʼ tahẽkana. Ar Dạud raj do enejokʼ ar rạskạ joṅe ńelkede khan uni do mon monte Dạude nihạ̃tkedea. 
1Chronicles16:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ạgukate ona do Dạude beretʼakatʼ tạmbureko dohokeda. Ar inạ tayom do Isor samaṅre jeredokʼakʼ samaṅakʼ ar sulukren samaṅakʼko samaṅkeda. 
1Chronicles16:2 Ona jotowakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob sạten khan Dạud do Probhu Isor ńutumte hoṛkoe bhoratʼkoa. 
1Chronicles16:3 Ona tayom uni do Israelkoren mimitʼ maejiuko ar herel hoponko mimitʼ goṭecʼkate piṭhạ, ar mitʼ kuṭi jel ar kismiskoe hạṭińatʼkoa." 
1Chronicles16:4 Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk samaṅre dewasewa kạmi lạgitʼ Dạud do adom Liwikoe bahalketʼkoa jemon onko doko koejoṅ arko gunmanao johar daṛeakʼ ar Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ ńutumko sarhao daṛeakʼ. 
1Chronicles16:5 Noko hoṛkoren mukhiyạ do Asaphe tahẽkana, dosaricʼ do Sakariại tahẽkana, ona tayom do Jiyiyel, Somiramoth, Jihiyel, Motithiạ, Eliyab, Bonae, Obed-Edom ar Jiyiyel. Noko do binạ banam ar peṛesaṅko banametʼ tahẽkana ar Ashaph do kortale rurukan tahẽkana;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Ar naeke Bonae ar Johosiyel do Isorakʼ ona bondobos sinduk samaṅre jaoge sakwakin oroṅetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles16:7 Enhilokʼ Dạud do pạhilre Probhu Isor ńutumte sarhaoe reakʼ niạ sereń reakʼ bhar do Asaph ar uniren hoṛko cetanreye emkeda: 
1Chronicles16:8 Probhu Isorge sarhaoepe, ar unige gun manao joharaepe; uniyakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko baḍae ocokope." 
1Chronicles16:9 Uni ńutumte sereńpe, uni sarhao sereńaepe; uniyakʼ sanam hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ katha lạipe." 
1Chronicles16:10 Uniyakʼ ṭhonoktetʼ reakʼ sarhaotaepe; okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ khạndritetʼ baḍae sanayetʼko onkoakʼ ontor do rạskạkʼtakoma. 
1Chronicles16:11 Probhu Isor ar uniyakʼ daṛe bujhạu reakʼ kurumuṭuipe; sanam ghạṛicʼ uni sãote helmelokʼ reakʼ gagoj baṛe dohoype. 
1Chronicles16:12 E uniren guti Israelkoren bõsko, uniye bachao akawan Jakobren hoponko, uniyakʼ maraṅ kạmi reakʼ kathako baṛe disạ dohoype; uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko reakʼ katha ar bicạrre oka sạjại reakʼ kathae menakatʼ ona disạ dohoype." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Unige aboren Probhu Isor do; goṭa dhạrti do uniyakʼ ḍanṭaote calakʼkana. 
1Chronicles16:15 Ar okaṭakʼ katha reakʼ hukume emakatʼ hajar hajar bõsrenko lạgitʼ, uniyakʼ ona bondobos reakʼ katha jaejug hạbicʼ baṛe disạ dohoype." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ona bondobos do Abraham lạgitʼe bandhaoleda ar Isạhak ṭhen hõe gokʼletʼa. 
1Chronicles16:17 Uni do acʼakʼ bondobos Jakob ṭhen niạm lekate ar Israelko ṭhen do jaejug bondobos lekateye lại sodor akada. 
1Chronicles16:18 Uni doe menleda, “Iń do Kanan disạmiń emama, ar onage amakʼ paona sompotti do hoyokʼtama.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Onko do thoṛako tahẽkana, hẽ ạḍi thoṛako tahẽkana, ar onko do onḍe porjạtrenko lekako tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles16:20 Onko do tinre onḍe eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare eṭakʼ eṭakʼ rajosṭiko talareko ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles16:21 unre uni do okoege onko bae santao ocowatʼkoa. Onko iạte rajkoe dhomkaoetʼko tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles16:22 uni doe metakokan tahẽkana, “Ińren ojokʼ akan hoṛko alope joṭetʼkoa; ińren nạbikoakʼ jãhãnakʼge alope loksan takoa.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko, ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe; uniyakʼ emakʼ bańcao reakʼ katha dinke din lại pasnaope." 
1Chronicles16:24 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko modre uniyakʼ ṭhonok lại sodorpe; sanam hoṛko talare uniyakʼ sanam hahaṛa kạmiko reakʼ katha lại pasnaope. 
1Chronicles16:25 Probhu Isorgeye maraṅa ar sanamko cetanre unige sarhaoanicʼ lek kanae; sanam debotako khon hõ uni doe botorangea. 
1Chronicles16:26 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren debotako doko ạuṛiyakʼgea, menkhan Probhu Isor do maraṅ serma sirjạuicʼ kanae." 
1Chronicles16:27 Unige man ar ṭhonokteye esetʼ ocoakana; uniyakʼ oṛakʼre do daṛe ar rạskạ menakʼa. 
1Chronicles16:28 E jạt jạtren sanam gusṭirenko, sanam daṛe ar ṭhonok do Probhu Isorakʼ kangea." 
1Chronicles16:29 Sanam sarhaoteakʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ mente aṅgocpe; ar samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko uni samaṅre ạguipe. Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ sonot reakʼ kathako hudiskate uni manotepe. 
1Chronicles16:30 E dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko, ape do uni samaṅre thar tharaokʼpe. Dhạrti do khạndri khon bạisại akana, ona do tisge baṅ ḍikạ ḍakekʼa." 
1Chronicles16:31 Serma do rạskạkʼma, ar dhạrti do hulạsokʼma; eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare onko doko lại jạhirma, “Probhu Isorgeye rajokʼ kana mente.”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Doreão ar ona bhitri reakʼ jotowakʼ do hińjrạukʼ rakabokʼma; ṭạnḍi ar ona reakʼ jotowakʼko hulạsokʼma. 
1Chronicles16:33 Enḍekhan bir reakʼ dareko hõ Probhu Isor samaṅreko sereńa, ente uni do dhạrti reakʼ bicạr lạgitʼe hijukʼkana." 
1Chronicles16:34 Probhu Isorge gunmanao joharaepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; ar uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽ akae tahenkana." 
1Chronicles16:35 Ape do menpe, “E Probhu, aleren Isor, ale rukhiyạleme baṛe; eṭakʼ jạtrenko tala khon mitʼ ṭhạ̃ire ạguleme baṛe ar ale rukhiyạleme, jemon ale do amakʼ sonot ńutumle ńumtam arle sarhao daṛeam arle õṛhẽ sereń daṛeamte amle sabasi daṛe am." 
1Chronicles16:36 Sirjạu reakʼ etohopʼ khon jaejug hạbicʼ Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtae ma.” Inạ tayom sanam hoṛko menkeda, “Amen, Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtaema.”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Din hilokʼ reakʼ jaruṛokʼakʼko sapʼ sosor lạgitʼ Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk ṭhen Asaph ar uniren hoṛkoe dohoketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles16:38 Ar onko goṛowako lạgitʼ uni do Obed-Idom ar uniren turui gel irạl hoṛ hõe dohoketʼkoa. Jiduthonren hopon Obed-Idom ar Hosa do rurukhiyạ hoṛkin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles16:39 Dạud do Gibeon reakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼre Probhu Isorakʼ ḍera tạmbu samaṅre naeke Sadok ar uni sãoten naekekoe dohoketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles16:40 Niạ reakʼ monsubạ do tahẽkana okaṭakʼ ạn-ạri Probhu Isor do Israelkoe em akawatʼko ar oka ol tahẽkan ona lekage jemon Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅ daṛeakʼ. 
1Chronicles16:41 Onko sãote Hemon ar Jiduthon ar sarecʼ hoṛko tahẽkana, ar okoekoakʼ ńutum roṛ rakapʼkate bachao hoylena jemon onko do Probhu Isorakʼ jaejug hạbicʼ daya lạgitʼ uniko sarhao daṛeae." 
1Chronicles16:42 Isor ńutumte sereń jokhecʼ pẽpṛẽtʼ kortal ar eṭakʼ bajnako rui lạgitʼ si Hemon ar Jiduthon cetanre bhar tahẽkana. Ar Jiduthon bõsren hoṛko do rurukhiyạ lekateko bahal ocolena. 
1Chronicles16:43 Inạ tayom sanam hoṛko apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena ar Dạud hõ acʼakʼ gharońjren hoṛko bhorako lạgitʼ oṛakʼteye ruạṛena. 
1Chronicles17:1 Raj oṛakʼre girobasokʼ jokhecʼ mitʼdin Dạud do Nathan nạbiye metadea, “Iń do debdạru kaṭ reakʼ oṛakʼreń tahenkana menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk do tạmburege menakʼa.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathan do Dạude roṛ ruạṛadeteye menkeda, “Amakʼ monre oka cekae reakʼ menakʼ onage onkaeme; Isor do am soṅgere menaea.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Enhilokʼ Isorakʼ katha do Nathan ṭhen seṭerena; uniye menkeda," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Am do senkate ińren guti Dạudem metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ am do alom benaoa." 
1Chronicles17:5 Misor disạm khon Israelkoń oḍok ạguko hilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ iń do okaṭakʼ oṛakʼre hõ bạń tahẽkana. Mitʼ tạmbu khon eṭakʼ tạmbure, mitʼ tahen oṛakʼ khon eṭakʼ tahen oṛakʼteń senlena." 
1Chronicles17:6 Ar okoeko mukhiyạko cetanre ińren hoṛko jotonko reakʼ bhariń ematʼko tahẽkan, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jaegare Israelko sãote ạcur baṛaekan oktere onko mukhiyạko do cetʼ jãhãtinreń metatʼko tahẽkana, iń lạgitʼ debdạru kaṭ reakʼ oṛakʼ do cedakʼ bako benaoleda?" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ńitokʼ am do ińren guti Dạud metaeme, sanam daṛean Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ińren hoṛ Israelko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ ińge janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko khon, bhiḍi palko tayom khoniń ạguakatʼmea." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ar jãhãtegem senlen iń hõ onḍe am sãoteń senlena ar am samaṅ khon amren sanam bạirikoń marao giḍi akatʼkoa. Iń do amakʼ ńutum dhạrtiren maraṅ maraṅ hoṛkoakʼ ńutum lekań hoyocoytama. 
1Chronicles17:9 Ińren hoṛ Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaegań ṭhik dohoya ar onḍege cara lekań rohoekoa jemon onko do akoakʼ jaegare sulukteko girobas daṛeakʼ ar ińren hoṛ Israelko cetanre cakʼlao koń bahal akatʼko tayom khon onko bạṛicʼ hoṛko oka santaoko calaoletʼ ona jemon ar aloko daṛeakʼ. Iń do amren sanam bạirikoń kobojkoa. “ ‘Iń do arhoń meneda, iń Probhu Isorge amakʼ bõsrenkoń teṅgo ruạṛkoa." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Amakʼ bahaokʼ dinko mucạtʼlen khan am do amren hapṛamko ṭhenem calakʼre am bodolte am bõsren mitʼ hoṛ, amren hopongeń duṛubea ar uniyakʼ rajosṭiyiń ṭarhaotaea." 
1Chronicles17:12 Amren uni hoponge iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaoa, ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena." 
1Chronicles17:13 Iń do uniren apatiń hoyokʼa ar uni do ińren hopone hoyokʼa. Ar ińakʼ dulạṛ do tishõ uni khon do bạń ocoga, cetʼleka am lahateye tahẽkan cetan khoniń ocokʼletʼ leka." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ińakʼ oṛakʼ ar ińakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug hạbicʼ iń dohoya ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ tahentaea.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Niạ dorson reakʼ sanamakʼ kathako Nathan do Dạude lạiyadea. 
1Chronicles17:16 Niạko katha ańjomkate Dạud raj do tạmbu bhitriteye boloyena ar Probhu Isor samaṅre duṛupʼkateye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ińge baṅ cetʼ ar ińakʼ bõsge baṅ cetʼ, am do nunạkʼ hạbicʼem ạyur ạguakadińạ." 
1Chronicles17:17 E Isor, niạge cetʼ amakʼ mẽtʼre baṅ ḍhera; one amren gutiren bõsakʼ tayom daram reakʼ katha hõm roṛakatʼ. E Probhu Isor, iń do mitʼṭen maraṅ hoṛ mentem udukʼ idiń kana." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Amiren guti okaṭakʼ manotem udukʼade onate iń do am ṭhen cetʼ arhõ ḍheriń roṛ daṛeakʼa? Ar amren guti mam baḍae akadege. 
1Chronicles17:19 E Probhu Isor, am do amren guti lạgitʼ amakʼ kusi sana leka niạ bhageyakʼem kạmi akada ar amren guti hõm baḍae ocoakadea." 
1Chronicles17:20 “E Probhu Isor, am leka do ar celege bạnukʼkoa ar am chaḍa jãhãn Isor hõ bạnukʼkoa; iń do ińakʼ luturtege niạ katha doń ańjomakada." 
1Chronicles17:21 Amren Israel jạtrenko leka dhạrtire do ar jãhãn jạtrenkoge bạnukʼkoa, one okoe do amren hoṛko hoyokʼ lạgitʼem chaḍao akatʼko. Am do Misor disạm khon eṭakʼ jạtrenkom sạṅgiń akatʼkoa. Amakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼ lạgitʼ maraṅ ar botoranakʼ kạmikote am do onam onka akada." 
1Chronicles17:22 Amren hoṛ Israelko do jaejug amren hoṛem hoyocoakatʼkoa, ar am do, E Probhu Isor, onkoren Isorem hoyakana." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Ńitokʼ do E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ ar ińakʼ bõsko reaṅ okam gokʼ akatʼ ona do jaejug hạbicʼ rukhiyạime baṛe. Ar amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage ona do hoyokʼma." 
1Chronicles17:24 Onate ińakʼ bõs do ṭikạu tahena ar jaejug amakʼ ṭhonokʼ hoyokʼa. Unre hoṛko mena, ‘sanam daṛean Probhu Isor do Israelkoren Isor kanae! Sạrige Israelkoren Isor kanae’! Ar amren guti Dạudakʼ bõs do am samaṅre ṭikạu tahena." 
1Chronicles17:25 E ińren Isor, am do iń ṭhen niạ reaṅgem sodor akada, am do iń hotete mitʼṭen bõsrenkom teṅgo rakapʼkoa. Onate am ṭhen niạ koejoṅ lạgitʼ iń dileda." 
1Chronicles17:26 E Probhu ińren Isor! Niạ bhạlạiyakʼ reakʼ iń ṭhenem gokʼakada. 
1Chronicles17:27 Ińakʼ bõs do kusitem bhor akawada jemon niạ bõs do jaejug am samaṅre tahen. E Probhu Isor, am do tinre niạ bõsem bhorakʼa unre ona do jaejug bhoranakʼge tahena.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Dạud do Philisṭikoe bhagaoketʼkoa ar acʼakʼ gobolreye dohoketʼkoa. Uni do Philisṭikoakʼ ti khon Gat ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atokoe hat ruạrkeda. 
1Chronicles18:2 Dạud do Moabrenko hõe bhagaoketʼkoa. Onko do Dạudakʼ gobolre tahẽkate khajna emaeko ehopʼena. 
1Chronicles18:3 Ar Sobaren raj Hoddesor do Phurạt gaḍa hạbicʼ acʼakʼ jaegako arhõ ektiạriạ ńam dohṛae lạgitʼ tinreye calaoena unre Dạud hõ uni sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ Homat hạbicʼe senena. 
1Chronicles18:4 Dạud do acʼakʼ mitʼ hajar rãt gạḍiko, eae hajar aswariko ar bargel hajar lạṛhại phạdkoe akoṭketʼkoa. Onkoren mitʼsae rãt gạḍiren sadomko dohokate sarecʼ joto sadomkoakʼ jaṅga sir doe samakʼketʼtakoa." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ar Damesekren Aramren hoṛko do tinre Sibaren raj Hoddesor goṛowae lạgitʼko hecʼena unre Dạud do onkoren bargel bar hajar hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles18:6 Dạud do Aram rajosṭi reakʼ Damesekre lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa. Onate Aramrenko do uni gobolre tahen hoyentakote khajna emaeko ehopʼena. Nonkate Dạud do jãhã jaegateye calakʼkan tahẽkan onḍege Probhu Isor do uniye jitạu ocoyede tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles18:7 Ar Dạud do Hoddesorren hoṛkoakʼ sona reakʼ ḍhalko Jerusalemteye ạgukeda. 
1Chronicles18:8 Uni do Ṭibhot ar Kun ńutumanakʼ Hoddesorakʼ barea nagraha khon ạḍi utạr rupạkoe ạgukeda. Niạko rupạtege Solomon do maraṅ okocʼ karahe ar tham khunṭiko ar rupạ reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jiniskoe benao ocokeda. 
1Chronicles18:9 Homatren raj Toy do tinreye ańjomkeda, Dạud do Sibaren raj Hoddesorren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe bhagao akatʼkoa mente." 
1Chronicles18:10 Unre uni do Dạud sarhaoe ar johar emae lạgitʼ acʼren hopon Hadaram do Dạud raj ṭhene kolkadea. Toy do nui Hoddesor tulucʼge ạḍi dhaoe lạṛhạilena. 
1Chronicles18:11 Niạ lahare Dạud raj do Idomrenko, Moabrenko, Amonrenko, Philisṭiko ar Amalekakiko ṭhen khon sona ar rupạko ạgukate cetʼleka Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar doholetʼ onkage noako hõe begar dohokeda." 
1Chronicles18:12 Seruaren hopon Abisoe do buluṅ lodamre gel irạl hajar Idomren hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles18:13 Uni do Idom reakʼ adomakʼ jaegakore lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa ar onate Idomren hoṛko do Dạud gobolreko tahẽyena. Ar Dạud do jãhãtegeye calakʼkan tahẽkan onḍege Probhu Isor doe jitạu ocoyede tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dạud do goṭa Israel disạm cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena. Uni do acʼren hoṛko dhorom reakʼ bicạrteye ḍanṭaoetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles18:15 Seruaren hopon Joab do uniren maraṅ subedare tahẽkana ar Ahiludren hopon Jehosaphat do uniyakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ jotowakʼko Itihãs puthireye ol caṛhaoetʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles18:16 Unre Ahiṭubren hopon Sadok ar Abiathorren hopon Abimelek do naekekin tahẽkana ar Sobos do rajren olokʼicʼe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles18:17 Jehoyadaren hopon Bonae do Dạudren rurukhiyạicʼ ar Korethiạ ar Polethiạkoren sordare tahẽkana ar Dạudren hoponko do rajakʼ maraṅ maraṅ hudạreko bahal ocoakan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles19:1 Amonren raj Nahase gocʼen khan uniren hopon Hanun do uni bodolte raje hoyena. 
1Chronicles19:2 Dạude menkeda, “Hanunren apattetʼ do ińre pạtiạre tahẽkante ińhõ Hanun upạrte pạtiạriń tahena.” Onate uniren apatakʼ gujukʼre jiwi raṛecʼ emae lạgitʼ adom hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. Dạudren hoṛko do Hanun jiwi raṛecʼ emae lạgitʼ Amonrenkoakʼ disạmteko calaoena." 
1Chronicles19:3 Menkhan Amonren mukhiyạko do Hanunko metadea, “Cetʼem hudiseda uni do amren ạpum manot emae ar jiwi raṛejtam lạgitʼ hoṛe kol akatʼkoa? Ona do baṅa, uni doe kol akatʼkoa disạm ciyại lạgitʼ jemon amakʼ disạm reakʼ khoj khoborko hatao daṛeakʼ ar tayomte onako jarkhar daṛeakʼ.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Hanun do unre Dạudren hoṛko sapʼkate gocokoe hoyo poṭorketʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ jeleṅ aṅgrop hõ barabạri, metakʼme ḍanḍa hạbicʼe getʼ kuṭrạketʼtakoa are bidạkatʼkoa." 
1Chronicles19:5 Dạud do oneye kolletʼko hoṛakʼ jãhãnakʼ hoyakana menteye baḍaeketʼ khan onko tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ thoṛa hoṛkoe kolkatʼkoa, ente onko hoṛ do ạḍi lajaoreko paṛao akan tahẽkana. Raj do onko ṭhene roṛgotʼkada, “Apeakʼ gocoko ạuri harakʼ hạbicʼ ape do Jerikhorege tahenpe; ar ona tayom do ruạṛ hạjukʼpe.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Amonrenko do tinreko bujhạukeda, onko do Dạud ṭhen hirkhạwan hoṛko hoyakana, unre Hanun ar Amonrenko do Aram-Nohoriạm, Aram-Makha ar Soba khon rãt gạḍiko ar rãt cakʼlaoko bhaṛa ạguko lạgitʼ pe gel are hajar keji rupạko kolkeda." 
1Chronicles19:7 Onko do pe gel bar hajar rãt gạḍiko ar lạṛhại phạdko sudhạ Makha rajko bhaṛa ạgukedea. Uni ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do Medbar ṭhen hecʼkateko ḍerayena ar Amonrenko do apan ạpin nagrahako khon lạṛhại lạgitʼ mitʼdomteko oḍok hecʼena. 
1Chronicles19:8 Niạ ańjomkate Dạud do Joab ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoe kolkatʼkoa. 
1Chronicles19:9 Unre Amonrenko doko oḍok hecʼente onkoakʼ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr bolokʼ horre lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdko sapṛaoketʼkoa. Ar okoeko rajko hecʼlen onko do ṭạnḍiregeko tahẽyena. 
1Chronicles19:10 Joab do acʼ samaṅ ar tayom secʼre Aramren lạṛhại phạdkoko sapṛao akane ńelketʼkoa. Onate uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko mod khon bachao akan adom lạṛhại phạdko onko upạrteye sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles19:11 Ar sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko do acʼren boeha Abisoe tabereye dohokatʼkoa; onate onko do Amonrenko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoena. 
1Chronicles19:12 Joab do acʼren boehae metadea, “Aramrenko iń khon daṛeanko hoylen khan am do ińem goṛowạńa, ar Amonrenko am khon daṛeanko hoyokʼ enḍekhan iń hõ amiń goṛowama." 
1Chronicles19:13 Dil dohoyme; alaṅren hoṛko lạgitʼ ar aboren Isorakʼ nagrahako lạgitʼ ar dela abo do dil salakʼ bon lạṛhạilenge. Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ kan onage uni doe kạmi ma.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Niạ menkate Joab do acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoante Aramrenko sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼe laha idiyen khan Aramrenko do uni samaṅ khonko ńir pharakena. 
1Chronicles19:15 Aramrenko dạdạṛkanko ńelketʼko khan Amonrenko hõ Joabren boeha Abisoe samaṅ khonko dạṛketʼte nagraha bhitriteko boloyena. Onate Joab do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
1Chronicles19:16 Aramrenko do tinreko ńelkeda, Israelko ṭhen khonko bhagao ocokʼkana, unre onko do hoṛ kolkate phurạt gaḍa hanasereko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan Aramrenkoko ạguketʼkoa. Hoddesorren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedar Sobok do onkoe ạyur ạguketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ado Dạud onako baḍae ocokede khan uni do Israelren goṭa lạṛhại phạdrenkoe jarwaketʼkoa ar jordan gaḍa paromkate onko upạrteye laha idiyena ar onko samaṅ secʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdkoe sapṛaoketʼkoa. Unre Aramiạko do Dạud sãoteko lạṛhạiyena. 
1Chronicles19:18 Menkhan onko do Israelko samaṅ khonko dạṛkeda. Unre Dạud do onkoren eae hajar rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko ar pongel hajar lạṛhại phạdkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Uni do onkoren subedar Sobok hõe gocʼkedea. 
1Chronicles19:19 Hoddesor gobolren rajko do tinreko ńelkeda, onko do Israelko ṭhenko bhagao ocokʼkana unre uni do Dạud sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda ar uni gobolreye tahẽyena. Onate Amonrenko do Aramrenko goṛowako lạgitʼ ar bako rebenlena." 
1Chronicles20:1 Hoe lolo din rapajko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ tinreko oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana unre Joab do lạṛhại phạdanteye oḍok calaoena. Uni do Amonkoakʼ disạme jarkharketʼte Rabate senkate onae gheraokeda. Menkhan Dạud acʼ do Jerusalemregeye tahẽyena. Ar Joab do Rabae akromonketʼte onae jarkharkeda. 
1Chronicles20:2 Ar Dạud do onḍenicʼ rajakʼ bohokʼ khon mukuṭe bocʼ hataokeda. Ona mukuṭ do pegel pon keji sonate benao tahẽkana, ar onare damanakʼ dhiriko hõ bạisạu tahẽkana. Ar ona mukuṭ do Dạudakʼ bohokʼreko horokʼadea. Dạud do ona nagraha khon ạḍi utạr maljalkoe luṭ idikeda." 
1Chronicles20:3 Uni do nagraharen hoṛkoe oḍok ạguketʼkoa ar koratte, khontate ar ṭeṅgocʼteye makʼ paṛakʼketʼkoa. Uni do Amonrenkoakʼ joto nagrahako hõe onkakeda. Inạ tayom Dạud do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdante Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena." 
1Chronicles20:4 Tayomte Gesorre Philisṭiko sãote lạṛhại ehopʼena. Ona jokhecʼ Husatiạ Sibekae do Rophayiko bõsren Sippoy ńutuman mitʼṭen hoṛe gocʼkedea, ar onate Philisṭiko doko bhagao ocoyena." 
1Chronicles20:5 Philisṭiko sãote ar mitʼṭecʼ lạṛhạire Jayirren hopon Elkana do Gat Goliạtren hopon Lohime gocʼkedea. Uniyakʼ borlom do kicricʼ teteńkoakʼ bimleka tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles20:6 Gatre ar mitʼṭecʼ lạṛhại hoylena. Ona lạṛhạire mitʼṭen usul hoṛe tahẽkana one uniyakʼ banar ti ar banar jaṅgare turui goṭecʼkate bargel pon goṭecʼ kạṭupʼ tahẽkantae. Uni hõ mitʼṭen Rophayiạ hoṛe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles20:7 Uni do Tinre Israel jạtrenkoe siṛogakokan tahẽkana unre Dạudren boeha Simiyiren hopon Jonathan do uniye gocʼkedea. 
1Chronicles20:8 Gatren noko hoṛko do Ropha bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Dạud ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ tite noko doko gocʼ ocolena. 
1Chronicles21:1 Soetan do Israelko upạrteye teṅgoyena. Uni do Dạudakʼ monre Israelko lekhako lạgitʼe uskurkedea. 
1Chronicles21:2 Dạud do unre Joab ar lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarkoe metatʼkoa, “Berseba khon Dan hạbicʼ Israelko lekhakope. Ona tayom ruạṛ hecʼkate lạiyạńpe jemon onkoakʼ lekhań baḍae daṛeakʼ.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Menkhan Joab doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isor do jemon acʼren hoṛko mitʼsae doboṛe saṅge ocoko. E ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj, noko sanamkoge cetʼ amren guti doko baṅkana? Enḍekhan cedakʼ ińren Probhu Isor do niạ kạmi lạgitʼe khojkana? Ar cedakʼ baṅ am iạte goṭa Israel jạtrenko dusiko hoyokʼ?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Menkhan rajakʼ hukum do Joab ṭhen onage tahẽyena; onate Joab do senkate goṭa Israel disạme dãṛã ạcurketʼte Jerusalemteye ruạṛ hecʼena. 
1Chronicles21:5 Ar okoe do tarwaṛeko calao daṛeakʼ onkoakʼ lekha do Dạude baḍae ocokedea. Onakoakʼ lekha do goṭa Israelko talare gelmitʼ lakh ar Jihudạren do pon lakh eaegel hajar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles21:6 Joab do menkhan ona lekhare Liwi ar Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko do bae doholetʼkoa, ente rajakʼ niạ hukum uni do bhage bae metatʼa." 
1Chronicles21:7 Niạ hukum do Isorakʼ mẽtʼre hõ bạṛicʼakʼge tahẽkana; onate uni do Israel jạtrenkoe sạjạiketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles21:8 Unre Dạud do Isore metadea, “Noa kạmikate in doń ghạṭ akada. Ar ńitokʼ do am ṭheniń nehõrokʼ kana, niạ behokakʼ khon iń amren guti do ikạkạńme baṛe. Iń do lelha hoṛ lekageń kạmi akada.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Unre Probhu Isor do Dạudren gonok nạbi Gade metadea," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Am do senkate Dạud niạ katha metaeme, ‘iń Probhu Isor do pea sạjại modre mitʼṭecʼ bachao hatao joṅiń metam kana. Onako khon okaṭakʼem bachao joṅ ona lekage amreń paṛao ocoya.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Unre Gad do Dạud ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isor do niạko mod khon mitʼṭecʼ bachao hatao joṅe menakatʼmea." 
1Chronicles21:12 Pe bochor hạbicʼ akal, se amren bạiriko ṭhen bhagaokate onko samaṅ khon pe cando hạbicʼ ńir baṛae, se pe mãhã hạbicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ tarwaṛe, metakʼme disạm cetanre mahamạri. Ona pe din Probhu Isorren goḍet do Israel reakʼ sanam jaegare ḍahao marao reakʼe kạmiya. Ado ńitokʼ hudiskate lạiyạńme, okoe ińe kolakadiń uni do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛaea?”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dạud do Gade metadea, “Iń do ạḍi muhinreń paṛao akana. Manwa tire jemon aloń paṛaokʼ, ona khon boroṅ Probhu Isorakʼ tiregeń paṛaokʼma, ente uniyakʼ daya do asambheṛgetaea.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Unre Probhu Isor do Israel cetanre mitʼṭecʼ mahamạriye kolkeda ar onate Israelren eaegel hajar hoṛko gocʼena. 
1Chronicles21:15 Jerusalem nagraha ḍahao marao lạgitʼ Isor do mitʼṭen goḍete kolkedea. Menkhan uni goḍet do tinre ona kạmi lạgitʼe calakʼkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do ona bebạṛicʼ sạjại khon mone ạcurketʼtaea. Uni do ḍahao maraoicʼ goḍete metadea, “Tahẽ ocoakʼme, ḍherge hoyakana, ńitokʼ do ti or ruạṛ tam.” Probhu Isorren goḍet do unre Jebusiạ Arownakʼ khạrại ṭhene teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles21:16 Inạ oktere Dạud do cetan secʼ beṅgetʼketʼteye ńelkeda, Probhu Isorren goḍet do rimilreye teṅgo akana ar uniyakʼ ti reakʼ tarwaṛe do Jerusalem cetanre tul akana. Noa ńelte Dạud ar murubbiko do gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ akatʼ tahẽkanrege otreko taber hapeyena." 
1Chronicles21:17 Unre Dạud do Isore metadea, “Hoṛko lekhako reakʼ hukum do cetʼ ińge bạń emakada? Kại do ińgeń kại akada, ar behokakʼ hõ ińgeń behok akada. Noko ma eken bhiḍi leka, noko do cetʼko ceka akatʼte? E Probhu, ińren Isor, amakʼ ti do iń ar ińakʼ gharońjrenko cetanre baṛe rakabtam, menkhan hoṛko cetanre niạ mahamạri do alo baṛe paṛaokʼma.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍet do Gade hukumadea Dạud do jemon Jibusiạ Arownakʼ khạrạite senkate Probhu Isor ńutumte onḍe mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaoma. 
1Chronicles21:19 Ar Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ hukumte Gadakʼ katha leka onḍeye senena. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ar Arowna do guhum ewer ewerte tinreye ạcurena unre uni do serma goḍete ńelkedea, ar uni sãote uniren okoe ponea hoponko tahẽkan onko doko okoyena." 
1Chronicles21:21 Dạud doe sen laha idiyen khan Arowna do khạrại bạgikate uni samaṅre senkate otre ombakʼkateye ḍobokʼadea. 
1Chronicles21:22 Dạud do uniye metadea, “Amakʼ noa khạrại do iń imạńme. Iń do do nonḍe Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ iń benaoa jemon hoṛkore oka mahamạri hoyokʼkan ona do thirokʼ. Ar purạ damtege ona do iń ṭhen ạkhrińme.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Arowna do Dạude metadea, “Ma ona do amge hataome. Ińren maharaj oka bhageye hudisetʼkan onage baṛeye onkaema. Ńelme, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ iń do ińren ḍaṅgrakoń emokʼkana, ar sahan lạgitʼ do lelenakʼ kaṭ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do guhumiń emokʼkana. Iń do noa sanamakʼge amiń emam kana.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Menkhan Dạud raj do Arownae metadea, “Baṅa, onka do baṅ hoyokʼa. Iń do purạ damtegeń hataoa. Ente okaṭakʼ amakʼkan Probhu Isor lạgitʼ ona do bạń emokʼa, se begor damte ńamakʼ nonkan jãhãn jiniskote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hõ bạń samaṅa.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Niạ menkate Dạud do Arownakʼ ona jumi lạgitʼ eae keji irạl sae sonae emena. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dạud do onḍe Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍe benaokeda ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene nehõrena ar Probhu Isor do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ cetanre serma khon seṅgele kolkeda. 
1Chronicles21:27 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do uni serma goḍete hukumadea ar uni do acʼakʼ tarwaṛeye bhorao ruạṛkeda. 
1Chronicles21:28 Dạud do tinreye ńelkeda, Jebusiạ Arownakʼ khạrạire Probhu Isor do uniye roṛ ruạṛadea unre uni do onḍe arhõ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda." 
1Chronicles21:29 Hahaṅkarre Mose do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ oka ḍera tạmbui benaoletʼ ona ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ pinḍ do ona jokhecʼ Gibeon reakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles21:30 Menkhan Probhu Isorren goḍetakʼ tarwaṛe botorte Dạud do Isorakʼ sana baḍae lạgitʼ ona pinḍ samaṅre bae sen daṛeada. 
1Chronicles22:1 Inạ tayom Dạude menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar Israelkoakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ pinḍ do nonḍege hoyokʼa.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Etạkʼ jạtren okoeko hoṛ do Israel disạmreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan Dạud do onko jarwako lạgitʼe hukumkeda. Onko mod khon uni do dhiri lakʼ rog lạgitʼ hoṛkoe bachaoana jemon onko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ dhiriko lakʼ rokʼ daṛeakʼ. 
1Chronicles22:3 Uni do phaṭok duạr ar kobjako reakʼ jạlại lạgitʼ ạḍi ḍher mẽṛhẽtʼe emena, ar nunạkʼ pitạle emena je, ona do bako ojon daṛeada." 
1Chronicles22:4 Ona chaḍa uni do alekha debdạru kaṭko hõe emena, ente Sidon ar Turren hoṛko do debdạru reakʼ alekha kaṭko Dạud lạgitʼko ạgukeda." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dạude menkeda, “Ińren hopon Solomon do umerteye komaogea ar bae gạkhuṛa, menkhan Probhu Isor lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ benao hoyokʼ ona do sanam jạtren hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼre ńutumanakʼ, jak jomok ar ṭhonokte perecʼ hoyokʼma. Ona lạgitʼ iń do jotowakʼiń jogaṛ dohokakʼa.” Niạ menkate Dạud do acʼakʼ gujukʼ ạurire aema lekanakʼ jiniskoe jogaṛ dohokada." 
1Chronicles22:6 Ona tayom acʼren hopon Solomone hohoadete uni cetanre Israelkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ bhare emadea. 
1Chronicles22:7 Dạud do Solomone metadea, “E beṭa, ińren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ ạḍi monsubạ tahẽkantińạ." 
1Chronicles22:8 Menkhan Probhu Isor do noa kathae baḍae ocokedińa, ‘am do aema mãyãmem joro ocoakada ar ạḍi dhaoem lạṛhại akana. Iń lạgitʼ oṛakʼ do alom benaoa, ente dhạrtire am do ińakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre aema mãyãmem joro ocoakada." 
1Chronicles22:9 Menkhan amren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone hoyokʼtama uni do suluke kusiyakʼa. Uni do beṛhaeten bạirikoakʼ ti khon sulukteń dohokaea. Uniyakʼ ńutum do Solomon dohokʼtaea (metakʼme, monre suluk), ente uniyakʼ rajokʼ oktere Israelko do suluk ar nirạiteko tahena." 
1Chronicles22:10 Unige iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼe benaoa. Uni do ińren hopone hoyokʼa ar iń do uniren apatiń hoyokʼa. Israelko cetanre uniyakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug hạbicʼ tahentaea.’ 
1Chronicles22:11 “E beṭa, Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ am sãote baṛeye tahenma; jo bahakʼme ar Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benaome." 
1Chronicles22:12 Probhu Isor do Israelko ḍanṭaoko reakʼ bhar tinre am cetanreye emokʼa unre uni do bud ar ạkil hõe jimạwama jemon amren Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạrikom dohoytae. 
1Chronicles22:13 Probhu Isor do Mose hotete Israelko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ạn-ạri ar hukumkoe emakan onako jodi sontortem pańjae enḍekhan am dom khạṭigem jo-bahakʼa. Am do daṛeanicʼ hoyokʼme ar monre dil dohoyme. Alom botorokʼa se alom torasokʼa. 
1Chronicles22:14 “Iń do ạḍi kosṭote Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ pe hajar are sae ṭon sona ar pegel are hajar ṭon rupạń jogaṛ dohoakada. Ona chaḍa nunạkʼ ḍher pitạl ar mẽṛhẽtʼkoń jogaṛ akada ona do ohoge soṅlena, dhiri ar kaṭ hõń jogaṛ dohoakada. Am do noare arhõm juṭucʼ daṛeakʼa." 
1Chronicles22:15 Amren do ạḍi utạr kạmiyạkoko tahena; onko doko hoyokʼ kana dhiri lakʼ rokʼren mistriko, raj mistriko ar chutạr mistriko. Ona chaḍa eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ gạkhuṛ hoṛko okoe do sona, rupạ, pitạl ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ mońjko kạmi daṛeakʼ. Ar noako kạmiren kạrigol doko ḍhergea. Am do ńitokʼ kạmi ehobme, ar Probhu Isore do am sãote baṛeye tahenma.”" 
1Chronicles22:16  
1Chronicles22:17 Ona tayom Dạud do acʼren hopon Solomon goṛowae lạgitʼ Israelren sanam mukhiyạko hukumatʼkoteye metatʼkoa," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Aperen Probhu Isor do cetʼ ape sãote bạnugicʼan? Uni do sanam secʼtege cetʼ sulukte bae dohoakatʼpea? Uni do niạ disạmren hoṛko ińakʼ tireye soprotketʼkote disạm do Probhu Isor ar uniren hoṛko tabere hoyakana. 
1Chronicles22:19 Ńitokʼ ape do aperen Probhu Isorakʼ sana baḍae lạgitʼ apeakʼ goṭa jiwi, daṛete ar monte Probhu Isor ńutumte uniyakʼ sonot oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ lạgiyạ paṛaokʼpe, jemon Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos reakʼ sinduk ar sonotakʼ jinisko do ạgukʼte onare dohokʼ.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Dạud do tinreye haṛam cabayena unre uniren hopon Solomon do Israel cetanreye rajkadea. 
1Chronicles23:2 Dạud do Israelren sanam mukhiyạko, naekeko ar Liwikoe jarwa mitʼketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ar okoe Liwikoakʼ umer do pegel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti umer tahẽkan onkoakʼ lekha do pegel irạl hajar tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:4 Noko mod khon bargel pon hajar hoṛko do oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmiko ńel todarot lạgitʼe bahalketʼkoa ar turui hajar hoṛko do kạmiyạko ar bikʼcạrko lạgitʼe dohoketʼkoa ar pon hajar hoṛko do rurukhiyạko lạgitʼe dohoketʼkoa. Ar Dạud okako bajnae benaoletʼ onakote Probhu Isor sarhaoe lạgitʼ sarecʼ pon hajar Liwikoe bahalketʼkoa. 
1Chronicles23:5  
1Chronicles23:6 Liwiren hopon Gerson, Kohat ar Merariakʼ bõs lekate Dạud do Liwiko pe hạṭińteye hạṭińketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gersonakʼ bõsrenko modre do Ladon ar Simiyikin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladonren pea hoponko modre maraṅicʼ do Jihiyel, ona tayom do Sethom ar Joyel." 
1Chronicles23:9 Simiyeren hopon doko hoyokʼkana Salomoth, Hosayel ar Haron. Noko do Ladonakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsren mukhiyạko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles23:10 Simiyiren ponea hopon doko hoyokʼkana, Johot, Sin, Jiyus ar Boriạ." 
1Chronicles23:11 Noko modre pạhilicʼ do Johot, ar dosaricʼ do Sin; menkhan Jiyus ar Boriạren hoponkoakʼ lekha do komge tahẽkante onko do jotoge mitʼ bõsren menteko lekhayetʼko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kohatren ponea hopon doko hoyokʼkana Amram, Jishor, Hebron ar Usiyel." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amramren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Haron ar Mose. Haron ar uniren bõsko do jaejug lạgitʼ Isor ńutumteko begar ocoyena jemon onko do sonot utạrakʼ jinisko reakʼ bharko ataṅ daṛeakʼ, ar Probhu Isor samaṅre seṅgelteakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ko samaṅ daṛeakʼ, ar uni samaṅre sekʼwa kạmiko kạmi daṛeakʼ ar uni ńutumte bhorko emdaṛeakʼ." 
1Chronicles23:14 Menkhan Isorren hopon Moseren sarecʼ hoponko do Liwiko modreko lekhayetʼko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:15 Moseren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Gersam ar Eliaser. 
1Chronicles23:16 Gersamren bõsko modre Sobuel do mukhiyại tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliyesorren bõsko modre Rohobiạ do mukhiyại tahẽkana. Eliyeserren do cele hoponge bako tahẽkantaea, menkhan Rohobiyạren hoponkoakʼ lekha do ạḍi utạr tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles23:18 Jesorren bõsko modre Solomit do mukhiyại tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:19 Hebronren hoponko modre pạhilicʼ do Jiriạ, dosaricʼ do Amoriạ, tesaricʼ Johosiyel ar ponicʼ do Jikomiam." 
1Chronicles23:20 Usiyelren hoponko modre Mikạ do pạhilicʼ ar Jesiạ do dosaricʼe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles23:21 Merariren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Maheli ar Musi. Maheliren hopon dokin hoyokʼkana Eliaser ar Kis. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eliaser do cele hoponge bako tahẽkantaea, menkhan eken kuṛigeko tahẽkana. Kisren hoponko, metakʼme uniren kakattetʼren hoponko do onko kuṛiko baplaletʼkoa." 
1Chronicles23:23 Musiren pea hopon doko hoyokʼkana Maheli, Edor ar Jiromoth." 
1Chronicles23:24 Nokoge bõslekate Liwi gusṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõskoren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Noko do bõsren hoṛko talare okoekoakʼ umer do bargel se ona khon bạ̃ṛti tahẽkan onko do lekha kate ńutum ol hoylentakoa, ar onkoge Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼren sapʼsosor kạmiyạ hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles23:25 Dạude menleda, “Israelren Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko suluke emakatʼkoa ar uni do jaejug hạbicʼ Jerusalemreye girobasokʼa." 
1Chronicles23:26 Onate sekʼwa kạmire bebohar lạgitʼ ḍera tạmbu se eṭakʼ jãhãn jinis Liwiko do ar gokʼ idi baṅ lagao akoa.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Dạudakʼ ses reakʼ hukum lekate bargel bochor khon ehopʼkate ona khon ḍher umerren Liwikoakʼ lekhage hoylena. 
1Chronicles23:28 Noko Liwikoakʼ kạmi do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sapʼsor ar Aronren bõsko goṛowako reakʼko kạmikan tahẽkana. Ona modre koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ raca ar ona aṛe reakʼ kandhako ńel todarot reakʼ bhar, ar sanam sonotakʼ jinisko sapha dohoy ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ bhar hõ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles23:29 Onko cetanre okako kạmi reakʼ bhar tahẽkan ona do hoyokʼkana: samaṅakʼ piṭhạ, anaj samaṅ reakʼ holoṅ, bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ, rapakʼ piṭhạ ar sunum mesalakʼ holoṅ. Ona chaḍa joto lekanakʼ sosoṅakʼ ar porimanko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar hõ tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles23:30 ar dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ teṅgokate Probhu Isor sarhaoe ar õṛhẽye ar jirạukʼ mãhãre, ambas reakʼ porobre ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ porobre tinre Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobko hoyocoya ona jokhecʼ hõ jemon Probhu Isorko sarhaoe arko õṛhẽ daṛeaea. Probhu Isor samaṅre jaoge, uniyakʼ hukum lekate ar uniye udukʼ akatʼko leka sapʼsor reakʼko kạmiko daṛeakʼ." 
1Chronicles23:31  
1Chronicles23:32 Nonkate Liwiko do ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼko ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sapʼsor kạmi lạgitʼ onkoren boeha Aron bõsrenkoakʼ tabere tahẽkateko kạmikan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles24:1 Aron bõsren hoṛko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolreko hạṭiń ocolena. Aronren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana Nadab, Abihu, Eliaser ar Ithamor." 
1Chronicles24:2 Aron ạuriye gujukʼrege Nadab ar Abihu do gidrạ ạurikin ńamkorege kin gocʼena; ar Eliaser ar Ithamor do naeke kạmikin kạmikan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles24:3 Sadok ńutuman Eliaserren do mitʼṭecʼ bõs ar Ahimelok ńutuman Ethamorren mitʼṭen hoponakʼ goṛote Dạud do naekekoakʼ kạmi lekate onko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolreye hạṭińletʼkoa. 
1Chronicles24:4 Onate Ethamor bõsren hoṛko khon Eliaser bõsren hoṛko talare ạḍi ḍher mukhiyạko ńamena. Ona iạte Eliaser bõsren gel turui mukhiyạko lạgitʼ onkoren gel turui dolre ar Ethamor bõsren irạl goṭen mukhiyạko lạgitʼ onko do irạl goṭecʼ dolreko hạṭińena. 
1Chronicles24:5 Eliaser ar Ithamar, niạ banar bõsren mukhiyạko do koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ ar Isorren kạmiyạkoko tahẽkante okoe secʼhõ sen baṅkate gulibãṭkate naeke kạmiko hạṭińana." 
1Chronicles24:6 Raj ar uniren maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạko samaṅre ar naeke Sadok, Abiạthorren hopon Ahimelok, naeke bõsren mukhiyạko ar Liwiko samaṅre Nathanielren hopon Somoyiạ ńutuman mitʼṭen Liwi olokʼicʼ do gulibãṭ lekate onko mukhiyạkoakʼ ńutum do tạlikareye ol caṛhaoletʼtakoa. Ar pạli pạlikate Eliaserren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsko mod khon mitʼ hoṛ ar ona tayom do Ithamorren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bõsko mod khon mitʼ hoṛ lạgitʼ gulibãṭ hoyena." 
1Chronicles24:7 Unre pạhilre do Jihoyaribakʼ ńutum rakapʼena, dosar dhao do Jidoyirakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:8 Tesar dhao do Harimakʼ, ponakʼ dhao do Siyorimakʼ ńutum," 
1Chronicles24:9 Mõṛẽakʼ dhaore do Molkiạwakʼ, turuiyakʼ dhaore do Miyaminakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:10 Eaeakʼ dhao do Hokoserakʼ, irạlakʼ dhao do Abiạwakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:11 areakʼ do Jesuwakʼ, gelakʼ dhao do Sokheniạwakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:12 gelmitʼakʼ dhaore do Eliasibakʼ, gelbar dhaore do Jakimakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:13 gelpeakʼ dhaore do Hupakʼ, gelponakʼ dhaore do Jesobarakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:14 gel mõṛẽakʼ dhao do Bilgar, gel turuiakʼ dhao do Emerewakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:15 gel eaeakʼ dhao do Hesirakʼ, gel irạlakʼ dhaore do Hopiseserakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:16 gel areakʼ dhaore do Pothahiạwakʼ, bargelakʼ dhaore do Jeheskelakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:17 bargel mitʼ dhaore do Jakhinakʼ, bargel bar dhaore do Gamulerakʼ," 
1Chronicles24:18 bargel pe dhaore do Dolayakʼ ar bargel ponakʼ dhaore do Maseyakʼ ńutum rakapʼena. 
1Chronicles24:19 Onkoren hapṛam Arone emade tahẽkan Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekate Aron do onko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ niạme ṭhik doholetʼ onkage Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte senkate sapʼsosor kạmi lạgitʼ nonkage onkoakʼ pạliko ṭhiketʼtakoa. 
1Chronicles24:20 Liwi gusṭiren sarecʼ bõskoakʼ katha do nonka leka: Amram bõsren Sobuel ar Rohobiạ do bõskoren apatkin tahẽkana; Sobuelakʼ bõsren mukhiyạ do Jehodiạ ar Rohobiạ bõsren mukhiyạ do Jisiyiại tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles24:21  
1Chronicles24:22 Jehosorakʼ bõsren apat Solomot ar Solomot bõsren mukhiyạ do Johot. 
1Chronicles24:23 Hebron bõsren modre pạhilicʼ do Jiriạ, dosaricʼ do Amoriạ, tesaricʼ do Johosiyel ar ponicʼ do Jikomiạ noko do bõskoren apatko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles24:24 Usiyel bõsren Mikạ ar Jisiạ do bõskoren apatkin tahẽkana; Mikạ bõsren mukhiyạ do Samir ar Jisiyi bõsren mukhiyạ do Sakariại tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles24:25  
1Chronicles24:26 Merariren hopon do Mahale, Musi ar Jasiạ;" 
1Chronicles24:27 Jasiạ bõsren Binạ Sohom, Sukur ar Ebri do bõsren apatko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahale bõsren do Eliaser ar Kis; Eliaserren do hoponge bako tahẽkantaea. 
1Chronicles24:29 Kisakʼ bõsren mukhiyạ do Jirhomele tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles24:30 Musiyakʼ bõsren Mahale, Edor ar Jiromoth do bõskoren apatko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles24:31 Noko hõ Dạud raj, Sadok, Ahimelok ar naeke ar Liwikoakʼ bõsren mukhiyạko samaṅre onkoren boehako, metakʼme Aron bõsren hoṛko lekako gulibãṭleda. Ar baṅ do maraṅicʼ boeha kane baṅ do huḍińicʼ boeha kane onko sanamko lạgitʼ inạ mitʼ lekageko gulibãṭleda." 
1Chronicles25:1 Sekʼwa oṛakʼ reakʼ sapʼ sosor kạmi lạgitʼ Dạud ar lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko do Asaph, Hemon ar Jiduthonren hoponkoko begarketʼkoa jemon onko do peṛesaṅ, binạ banam ar kortal ru seletʼ sereń talate Isorakʼ kathako sodor daṛeakʼ. Ar okoeko noako kạmikan tahẽkan onkoa tạlika do nonka leka:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Asaphren hopon Sukur, Joseph, Nathaniel ar Asarel. Onko do rajakʼ hukum lekate Asaphakʼ ạyurte sereń talate Isorakʼ kathako sodoretʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles25:3 Jiduthanren turui goṭen hoponko do Gedaliạ, Sori, Jisayaho, Simiyi, Hosbiạ ar Mottithiạ. Onko do akoren apattetʼ Jiduthanakʼ ạyurte peṛesaṅ banamate Probhu Isor sarhao ar õṛhẽ talate uniyakʼ kathako sodoretʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles25:4 Hemonren hopon Bukiạ, Mottoniạ, Usiyel, Sobuyel, Jirimoth, Honaniạ, Honani, Eliyatha, Giddoloti, Romamoti-Esor, Josebkasa, Mollothi, Hothir ar Mohosiyoth." 
1Chronicles25:5 Noko joto do rajren gunạnicʼ Hemonren hoponko tahẽkana. Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate Hemon daṛe ocoye lạgitʼ Isor do gelpon hoponko ar pea hoponerae emade tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:6 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ noko jotoge akoren apattetʼ Asaph, Jiduthon ar Hemonakʼ ạyur tabereko tahẽkana. Onko do rajakʼ hukumte kortal ar binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ banamate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko sereń durạṅetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles25:7 Probhu Isor ńutumte onkoren bõsrenkoakʼ sereń durạṅre sikhit ar gạkhuṛ hoṛkoante onkoakʼ lekha do barsae irạlgel irạl hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:8 Koṛako khon haṛam hạbicʼ, cecetʼko ar cetʼjoṅko jotokoakʼ kạmi reakʼ pạli do gulibãṭkate ṭhik doholena." 
1Chronicles25:9 Asaph secʼ khon pạhilre gulibãṭkate Josephakʼ ńutum rakapʼena. Dosar dhao gulibãṭre do Godaliakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni, ar uniren peṛa pạrbhạko ar hoponkoante gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles25:10 Tesar dhao gulibãṭre do Sokurakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkoante gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:11 Ponakʼ gulibãṭre do Jisriyelakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkoante gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:12 Mõṛẽakʼ gulibãṭre do Nathanielakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:13 Turuiyakʼ gulibãṭre do Bukiyakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:14 Eaeyakʼ gulibãṭre do Jisarelakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:15 Irạlakʼ gulibãṭre do Jisayahowakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạko do gelbar goṭenko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:16 Areakʼ gulibãṭre do Mottoniạwakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:17 Gelakʼ gulibãṭre do Simiyiwakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:18 Gelmitʼakʼ gulibãṭre do Asarelakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:19 Gelbarakʼ gulibãṭre do Hosbiạwakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:20 Gelpeakʼ gulibãṭre do Sobuyelakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:21 Gelponakʼ gulibãṭre do Mottothiạwakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:22 Gel mõṛẽakʼ gulibãṭre do Jiromotakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:23 Gel turuiyakʼ gulibãṭre do Honaniạwakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana," 
1Chronicles25:24 Gel eaeyakʼ gulibãṭre do Josbokasakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:25 Gel irạlakʼ gulibãṭre do Honaniakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:26 Gel areakʼ gulibãṭre do Mollothiakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:27 Bargelakʼ gulibãṭre do Eliathorakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:28 Bargel mitʼakʼ gulibãṭre do Hothiakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:29 Bargel barakʼ gulibãṭre do Giddolotiakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:30 Bargel tesarakʼ gulibãṭre do Mohosiạtakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles25:31 Ar bargel ponakʼ gulibãṭre do Romamoti- Esorakʼ ńutum rakapʼena; uni ar uniren hoponko ar peṛa pạrbhạkote gelbar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:1 Rurukhiyạko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolreko hạṭińlen tahẽkana. Korohoko mod khon Asaph bõsren Koriren hopon Moselimiạ do bõskoren apate tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:2 Moselimiạren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana, pạhilicʼ do Sakariạ, dosaricʼ do Jidiyel, Tesaricʼ do Sobdiạ, Ponicʼ do Jothniyel," 
1Chronicles26:3 mõṛẽyicʼ do Elom, turuiyicʼ do Jihohanon, eaeyicʼ do Elihoinoy." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obed Edom do bõskoren apate tahẽkana. Isor do Obed-Edom irạl goṭen hoponkoe emadea are bhoradea. Uniren hoponko doko hoyokʼkana; pạhilicʼ do Somoyiạ, dosaricʼ do Jihosabod, tesaricʼ do Joyaho, ponicʼ do Sakor, mõṛẽyicʼ do Nothnel, Turuyicʼ do Ammiyel, eaeyicʼ do Isakar ar irạlicʼ do Piyullotoy." 
1Chronicles26:5  
1Chronicles26:6 Obed-Edomren hopon Somoyiaren do adom hoponko tahẽkana; onko mimitʼko onkoren mukhiyạko tahẽkana, ente onko do lạṛhại birko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:7 Somoyiren hopon doko hoyokʼkana; Atni, Rophayel, Obed, Elsabod. Somoyi bõsren Elihu ar Somothiạ hõ daṛean hoṛkin tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:8 Noko sanamkoge Obed-Edom bõsren hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko ar onkoren hoponko ar bõsrenko do lek lekan ar daṛean hoṛko tahẽkana. Obed-Edom bõsren hoṛko do jotote turuigel bar hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:9 Moselimiạren hoponko ar uni bõsrenko do daṛean hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko do jotote gel irạl hoṛko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:10 Morari bõsren Hosaren ponea hoponko modre pạhilicʼ do Simri, dosaricʼ do Hilkiạ, tesaricʼ do Ṭoboliạ, ponicʼ do Sakariạ. Simri do ạikhạ pạhilicʼ hopon do bae tahẽkana, menkhan uniren apattetʼ do mukhiyạ menteye doholedea. Hosaren hoponko ar uni bõsren hoṛko do jotote gelpe hoṛko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:11  
1Chronicles26:12 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolre hạṭiń akan noko rurukhiyạko do akoren mukhiyạko tabere tahẽkate onkoren gusṭi boehako lekage Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sewa kạmi reakʼ dạyikko ńamleda. 
1Chronicles26:13 Bõs lekate huḍiń khon haṛamko onko jotoko lạgitʼge gulibãṭ do hoylena jemon oka dolrenko do oka phaṭok duạreko kạmiya mente. 
1Chronicles26:14 Purub secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr lạgitʼ guli do Selimiạ ńutumte rakapʼena. Ona tayom do uniren hopon Sakariạ lạgitʼ gulibãṭ hoyen khan uni ńutum reakʼ guli do utạr secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr lạgitʼ rakapʼena. Uni do mitʼṭen akelan sosolhayicʼe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:15 Dạkhin secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr lạgitʼ guli do Suppim ar Hosawakʼ ńutumte rakapʼena. 
1Chronicles26:16 Pạchim secʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạr lạgitʼ guli do Suppim ar Hosawakʼ ńutumre rakapʼena. Niạ phaṭok duạr do cetan secʼakʼ ḍahar cetan reakʼ Sollekhot ńutumanakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen tahẽkana. Noko Liwiko do pạli pạliteko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Purub secʼ do turui hoṛ, utạr secʼ pon hoṛ ar dạkhin secʼ do pon hoṛ pahradar din hilokʼko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar murại oṛakʼre do babar hoṛkate kin tahenkan tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:17  
1Chronicles26:18 Pạchim secʼakʼ raca lạgitʼ ḍahar secʼ pon hoṛ ar racare bar hoṛkin tahenkan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:19 Noage Koroho ar Morari bõsren rurukhiyạkoakʼ hạṭińokʼ reakʼ do tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:20 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ dhon bhanḍar ar Isor ńutumte begar dohoakatʼ jinisko reakʼ ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do sarecʼ Liwiko mod khon Ahiyạ cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:21 Gersen Ladonren hopon doe hoyokʼkana Jihiyeli. Jihiyeliren hopon Sethom ar uniren boeha Joel cetanre do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ dhon bhanḍar ńel todarot reakʼ bhar tahẽkana. Nukin do onkoren apan ạpin bõsren mukhiyạ kin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:21 Gersen Ladonren hopon doe hoyokʼkana Jihiyeli. Jihiyeliren hopon Sethom ar uniren boeha Joel cetanre do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ dhon bhanḍar ńel todarot reakʼ bhar tahẽkana. Nukin do onkoren apan ạpin bõsren mukhiyạ kin tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:22
