1Chronicles26:23 Amramiạ, Jishoriạ, Hebroniạ ar Usiyeliạko hõ kạmi reakʼ bharko emocolena." 
1Chronicles26:24 Sobuyel ńutuman Moseren hopon Gersom bõsren mitʼṭen hoṛ do dhon rurukhiyicʼren sordare tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:25 Gersemren hopon Eliaser hotete Solomoth do Sobuel bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana. Eliaserren hopon Rohobiạ, Rohobiạren hopon Jisayaho, Jisayahoren hopon Joram, Joramren hopon Sikhri, Sikhriren hopon Solomoth." 
1Chronicles26:26 Dạud raj do Israelren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ mukhiyạko, hajar ar sae cetanren subedarko ar maraṅ subedarko okaṭakʼ jinisko Isor ńutumteko begar doholetʼ Solomoth ar uni bõsren hoṛko do onako jinis reakʼ bhanḍarko ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:27 Lạṛhạire luṭ akatʼ adomakʼ jinisko onko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe ńutumte uni lạgitʼko begar dohoakatʼ tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles26:28 Ona chaḍa ńeńelicʼ Sạmuel, Kisren hopon Sạul, Nerren hopon Abner ar Soruaren hopon Joab do okako jinis Isor ńutumteko begar doholetʼ, metakʼme begar dohoakatʼ sanamakʼ jinisko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do Solomoth ar uni bõsren hoṛko cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles26:29 Jisohoriạko mod khon Kananiạ ar uniren hoponko do koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmire do bako lagao ocolena, menkhan onko do Israel disạm cetanre kạmiyạko ar bikʼcạr kạmireko bahal ocoyena." 
1Chronicles26:30 Hebroniạko mod khon Hosbiạ ar uni bõsren mitʼ hajar eae sae daṛean hoṛ do Probhu Isorakʼ ar rajakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ jordan gaḍa reakʼ pạchim secʼren Israelko cetanreko bahal ocoyena. 
1Chronicles26:31 Hebronko modre Jiriạ do mukhiyại tahẽkana. Dạudakʼ rajokʼ pon gelakʼ bochorre onkoakʼ bõs tạlika mod khonko bachao ocoyena ar Geliad reakʼ Jaserre Hebroniạko modre aema lạṛhại birko ńamena. 
1Chronicles26:32 Jiriạwakʼ bõsren bar hajar eae sae hoṛ do daṛeankoko tahẽkana. Onko do apan ạpin gharońjren mathako tahẽkana. Dạud raj do Isor ar rajakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ Rubenrenko, Gadrenko ar Manase gusṭiren adha hoṛko cetanre Hebronrenkoe bahalketʼkoa." 
1Chronicles27:1 Noko doko hoyokʼkana Israel khũṭren mathako, hajarko ar sae-sae lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko ar onko taberen kạmiyạkoakʼ tạlika. Noko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ lạṛhại phạdrenko babotre sanamakʼ reaṅ rajko goṛowaekan tahẽkana. Gelbar goṭecʼ dol reakʼ jotowakʼrege bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. Onko do bochor bhor mimitʼ goṭecʼ dolre mimitʼ cando kateko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:2 Pạhil cando lạgitʼ lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ bhar do Sobdiạlren hopon Jaebiam cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:3 Uni do Perosren hopone tahẽkana. Ar pạhil cando lạgitʼ sanam subedarkoren matha hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:4 Dosar cando lạgitʼ lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ bhar do Ahahiạ Dodahai cetanre tahẽkana. Uni tabere Milkoth do dolren matha hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:5 Tesar cando lạgitʼ subedar do naeke Jehoyadaren hopon Bonaye tahẽkana. Uni do tesar dolren matha hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:6 Nui doe uni Bonae kana okoe do “Pegel” ńutuman lạṛhại birkoren matha hoṛe tahẽkan. Uniren hopon Amisabad hõ ona dolrengeye tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:7 Ponakʼ cando lạgitʼ ponakʼ dolren subedar do Joabren boeha Asahele tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniren hopon Sobdiạ do subedare hoylena. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:8 Mõṛẽakʼ cando lạgitʼ mõṛẽakʼ dolren subedar do Jisrahiạ Somhuth. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:9 Turuiakʼ cando lạgitʼ do Tokoyiạ Ekesren hopon Era do dolren subedare tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:10 Eaeakʼ cando lạgitʼ eaeakʼ dolren subedar do Poloniạ Helose tahẽkana; uni do Ephrayem gusṭiren hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:11 Irạlakʼ cando lạgitʼ irạlakʼ dolren subedar do Husatiạ Sibokhoye tahẽkana; uni do Seroho bõsren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:12 Areyakʼ cando lạgitʼ areyakʼ dolren subedar do Anathotiạre Abiyesore tahẽkana; uni do Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:13 Gelakʼ cando lạgitʼ dolren subedar Noṭophotiạ Mohorae do matha hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni do Seroho bõsren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:14 Gelmitʼ cando lạgitʼ, gelmitʼ dolren subedar do Piriạthoniren Bonaye tahẽkana. Uni do Epharyim gusṭiren mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre do bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:15 Gelbar cando lagitʼ, gelbar dolren subedar do Noṭophotiạ Hildoye tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ dolre bargel pon hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:16 Israel khũṭkoren matha cakʼlaokoakʼ tạlika do nonka leka: Rubenren matha Sikri hopon Elieser, Simeonren matha do Makʼkaren hopon Sephaṭia," 
1Chronicles27:17 Lewi khũṭren matha do Kemuel hopon Hasabia, Aronren hoponkoren matha do Sadok," 
1Chronicles27:18 Lewi khũṭren matha do Dạudren boeha Elihu, Isakar-khũṭren matha do Mikayelren hopon Omri," 
1Chronicles27:19 Sebulon khũṭren matha do Obadiạ hopon Ismaya, Napthali- khũṭren matha do Asriyal hopon Jeremot," 
1Chronicles27:20 Ephrayim khũṭren hopon do Asasia hopon Hosea; Manase-khũṭren adha hoṛkoren matha do Pedayren hopon Joel," 
1Chronicles27:20 Ephrayim khũṭren hopon do Asasia hopon Hosea; Manase-khũṭren adha hoṛkoren matha do Pedayren hopon Joel," 
1Chronicles27:20 Ephrayim khũṭren hopon do Asasia hopon Hosea; Manase-khũṭren adha hoṛkoren matha do Pedayren hopon Joel," 
1Chronicles27:21 Gileadren Manase khũṭren adha hoṛkoren matha Sekaria hopon Ido, Benjạmin khũṭren matha Abner hopon Jasiyel," 
1Chronicles27:22 Dan khũṭren matha Jehoram hopon Asarel. Nokoge Israel khũṭkoren mathako tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:23 Dạud do bargel se ona khon kom umerren hoṛ do bae lekhaletʼkoa, ente Probhu Isor do Israelkoakʼ lekha sermaren ipil lekae hoyocokoa menteye gokʼletʼ tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:24 Seruya hopon Joab do hoṛ lekhae ehopʼletʼgea, menkhan uni do bae sạt daṛeada. Ar hoṛ lekha khạtirte Israelko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do paṛaolena. Ona iạte Dạud rajakʼ itihãs puthire hoṛkoakʼ jãhãn gunti do baṅ ol akana." 
1Chronicles27:25 Rajakʼ khajańciko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do Adiyel hopon Asmawet cetanre tahẽkana. Ar khet-baṛge, atoko, nagrahako ar usul horho oṛakʼkore okako khajańci oṛakʼ tahẽkana onako reakʼ bhar do Usiạ hopon Jonathan cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:26 Cacasko ńeltodarotko reakʼ bhar do Kelub hopon Esriye cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:27 Darkha bagwan reakʼ bhar do Ramathi Simaye cetanre tahẽkana. Ar bagwan khon oka darkha rasa ńamokʼkan tahẽkan ona murại reakʼ bhar do Sphmi hoṛ Sabdiye cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:28 Pạchim secʼ copotʼ ot ṭoṭhakore jạit dare ar loa dare reakʼ bhar do Gederi hoṛ Bakʼal-hanan cetanre tahẽkana. Ar jạit sunum kunḍko reakʼ bhar do Joas cetanre. 
1Chronicles27:29 Saronre okoe gại-ḍaṅgrako ạtińkan tahẽkan onko cetanre do Saroniạ Sotray cetanre bhar tahẽkana. Ar buru lodam oteteren gại-ḍaṅgrako cetanre do Adlai hopon Saphat cetanre tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:30 Ismaeliạ Obilakʼ do ũṭko cetanre bhar tahẽkantaea. Ar Merothi hoṛ Jehdiay do gadhako cetanre bhar tahẽkantaea. 
1Chronicles27:31 Merom ar bhiḍiko cetanre do Hagri hoṛ Jasisakʼ bhar tahẽkana. Ar Dạud rajakʼ sompotti ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do nokoko ńel todarotetʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles27:32 Dạudren kakattetʼ Jonathan do budanicʼ, sopolhayicʼ ar olokʼicʼe tahẽkana. Ar rapajren hoponko cecetʼakʼ emako reakʼ bhar do Hakmoni hopon Jehiyel cetanre tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitophel do rajren sopolhayic, ar Arki hoṛ Husại do rajren gateye tahẽkana." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitophelakʼ gujukʼ tayom do Abiathor ar Banaeren hopon Jehoyada nukin do rajren sopolha hoṛkin tahẽkana. Ar rajren lạṛhại phạdren senapoti do Joabe tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles28:1 Dạud do Israelren sanam kạmiyạko Jerusalemre hijukʼ lạgitʼe hukumatʼkoa. Onate sanam lạṛhại birko hecʼlena. Onko doko tahẽkana eṭakʼ eṭakʼ khũṭren mukhiạko, rajren gelbar goṭen lạṛhại phạdkoren senapotiko, hajar ar saeko cetanren senapotiko, raj ar rajren hoponkoakʼ sompotti ńel todarotko hoṛko, raj oṛakʼren kạmiyạko ar lạṛhại birko." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ar Dạud raj do teṅgoyente onkoe metatʼkoa, “E ińren boehako ar ińren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha baṛe luturakʼpe. Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk lạgitʼ, metakʼme aleren Isorakʼ jaṅga dohoytae lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ mone tahẽkantińạ, ar iń do ona benao lạgitʼ hõń sapṛaolena." 
1Chronicles28:3 Menkhan Isor doe metadińạ, ‘iń lạgitʼ oṛakʼ do alom benaoa, ente am do mitʼṭen lạṛhại bir kanam ar am do mãyãmem joro ocoakada.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 “Enhõ Israelren Probhu Isor do jaejug Israelko cetanre raj hoyokʼ lạgitʼ ińakʼ goṭa gharońjrenko tala khon ińe bachao ledińa. Uni do mukhiyạ lekate Jihudại bachaoledea, ona tayom Jihudạ khũṭrenko khon iń babawakʼ khũṭe bachaoana ar Israelko cetanre raj hoyokʼ lạgitʼ uniyakʼ kusi lekate ińren boehako tala khon ińgeye bachaoledeńa." 
1Chronicles28:5 Uni do aema hoponkoe emadińa, ar onko hoponińko modre Probhu Isorakʼ rajosṭi Israelakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ uni do ińren hopon Solomone bachao akawana." 
1Chronicles28:6 Uni do ińe men akawạdińạ, ‘amren hopon Solomon kangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do ińakʼ oṛakʼ ar bakher racae benaoạń, ente ińge ińren hopon hoyokʼ lạgitʼ iń bachao akawana ar iń do uniren apatiń hoyokʼa." 
1Chronicles28:7 Uni do ńit hoyokʼkan lekage ińakʼ hukumkoe manao enḍekhan uniyakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug hạbicʼ iń dohoya.’ 
1Chronicles28:8 “Onate sanam Israelko, metakʼme Probhu Isor do somajren hoṛko ar aboren Isor samaṅre iń do ape ńitokʼ noań hukumape kana, ape do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ sanamakʼ hukumko manao lạgitʼ moneyakʼpe jemon noa mońj disạmrepe tahẽdaṛeakʼa ar jaejug reakʼ sompotti lekate aperen bõskope em daṛeako." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Ar ińren hopon Solomon, am do am apatren Isor samaṅrem taṛam ar amakʼ mon ar ontorte unim sewawaea, ente Probhu Isor do sanamkoakʼ ontore baḍaekana ar ganḍonjoṅakʼ hõe baḍaegea. Uniyakʼ monsubạ baḍae reakʼem kurumuṭule khanem baḍae daṛeakʼ, menkhan unim bạgiye enḍekhan uni hõ jaejug lạgitʼe nihạ̃tmea." 
1Chronicles28:10 Ńitokʼ do moneyakʼme, ente sekʼwae lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do amgeye bachao akatʼmea. Am do daṛean hoyokʼme ar kạmime.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Ona tayom Dạud do acʼren hopon Solomon do sekʼwa oṛakʼ reakʼ pinḍạ, ona reakʼ dolanko, khajańci oṛakʼko, cetan ar bhitri reakʼ kandhako ar kại dapal reakʼ ṭhạ̃ikoe noksawadea." 
1Chronicles28:12 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bakher raca, ona beṛhaeteakʼ kandhako, Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ khajańciko ar samaṅokʼ jinisko dohoy reakʼ oka noksa Sonot jiu do Dạud ṭhene sodorletʼ ona do jotoge Solomone baḍae ocokedea." 
1Chronicles28:13 Naeke ar Liwikoakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolrenkoakʼ kạmi, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi ar ona kạmire beoharokʼ sanamakʼ jinisko reaṅ uniye hukumadea." 
1Chronicles28:14 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ okako sona ar rupạ reakʼ jinisko beoharokʼ onako lạgitʼ uni do tinạkʼ sona ar rupạ jạruṛa onae hukumadea. 
1Chronicles28:15 Mitʼke mitʼ sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar diuheko lạgitʼ tinạkʼ sona ar beohar lekate mitʼke mitʼ rupạ reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar diuheko lạgitʼ tinạkʼ rupạ lagaokʼa ona reakʼe hukumadea. 
1Chronicles28:16 Samaṅakʼ piṭhạ dohoy lạgitʼ sona reakʼ mej lạgitʼ sona ar rupạ reakʼ mejko lạgitʼ tinạkʼ rupạ lagaokʼa onae hukumadea. 
1Chronicles28:17 Jel rakab reakʼ kaṭa kạ̃ṛchuko, samaṅokʼakʼ mãyãm dohoy reakʼ bạṭiko ar kanḍa ar dhudhup pinḍ lạgitʼ tinạkʼ khạṭi sona lagaoakʼ ar mitʼke mitʼ sona ar rupạ reakʼ bhajan lạgitʼ tinạkʼ sona ar rupạ lagaokʼa onae hukumadea. Ona chaḍa, Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk dapal lạgitʼ okoe sonaren Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ kin laplapa akae tahen unkin lạgitʼ tinạkʼ khạṭi sona lagaokʼa ona hõe baḍae ocokedea." 
1Chronicles28:18  
1Chronicles28:19 Dạude menkeda, “Probhu Isor iń ṭhen okaṭakʼ nạmunae sodorletʼ tahẽkan uniyakʼ ạyurte iń do onań akaokeda, ar ona nạmuna reakʼ khạṭi-nạṭi bujhạu reakʼ akel do uniye emadiń tahẽkana.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Dạud do acʼren hopon Solomon noa katha hõe metadea, “Daṛean hoyokʼme, ar dil dohoyme ar kạmime. Ar alom botorokʼa, ar alom hadosokʼa, ente Probhu Isor, do am sãoreye menaea. Probhu Isorakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ sekʼwa oṛakʼ ạuri benao sạtokʼ hạbicʼ uni do bae aṛakʼmea se bae bạgiyama." 
1Chronicles28:21 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolren naekeko ar liwikohõ sapṛaoge menakʼkoa. Ar joto kạmire goṛowam lạgitʼ gạkhuṛ hoṛko menakʼkoa. Mukhiyạko ar sanam hoṛ do amakʼ hukumko senakʼa.” 
1Chronicles29:1 Ona tayom Dạud raj do sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ińren hopon Solomonge Isor doe bachao akadea; uniyakʼ umer do komgetaea ar gạkhuṛ hõ bae gạkhuṛa. Menkhan noa kạmi do ạḍi maraṅakʼ kana, ente noa maraṅ dolan do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ kana, jãhãe manwa lạgitʼ do baṅa." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ińakʼ ektiạri lekate iń do ińren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ noakoń jogaṛ dohoakada, sona reakʼ jinisko lạgitʼ do sona, rupạ reakʼ jinisko lạgitʼ do rupạ, pitạl reakʼ jinisko lạgitʼ do pitạl, mẽṛhẽtʼ jinisko lạgitʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ ar kaṭ reakʼ jinisko lạgitʼ do kaṭ. Ona chaḍa boidurjomoni, bạisạu lạgitʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ mạnik dhiriko, cikmik dhiriko, nana parkan roṅ reakʼ dhiriko ar sanam lekanakʼ damanakʼ dhirikoń dohoakada ar ḍher kańc dhiriko hõń dohoakada." 
1Chronicles29:3 Noa sonot sekʼwa oṛakʼ lạgitʼ okań jogaṛ dohoakatʼ ona chaḍa hõ ińren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ cetanre ińakʼ dulạṛ udug lạgitʼ ńitokʼ ińakʼ sona ar rupạń emeda. 
1Chronicles29:4 Ona oṛakʼ reakʼ bhit dapal lạgitʼ ar kạrigolkoakʼ jotowakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ iń do jotote mitʼsae gel eae ṭon ophir sona ar barsae eaegel pe ṭon khạṭi rupạń emena. Teheń ape hõ cetʼ kusite Probhu Isor ńutumte apnar samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ dan emokʼpe khojkana?” 
1Chronicles29:5  
1Chronicles29:6 Unre Israelren khũṭkoren mukhiyạko, judạ judạ khũṭkoren mukhiyạko, hajar lạṛhại phạdko ar sae lạṛhại phạdko ar rajakʼ kạmi reakʼ ńel todarotko do kusiteko dankeda." 
1Chronicles29:7 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ onko do mitʼsae aregel ṭon sona, gel hajar sona reakʼ muhạr, pesae aregel ṭon rupạ, eae sae bar ṭon pitạl ar pe hajar are sae ṭon mẽṛhẽtʼko dankeda." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ar okoeko ṭhen damanakʼ dhiriko tahẽkana onko hõ Probhu Isorakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre dohoy lạgitʼ Gersonren Jehayelko emadea. 
1Chronicles29:9 Onko do kusi monte ar khulạsate goṭa ontorte Probhu Isorko emadete ạḍiko rạskạyena. Ar Dạud raj hõ ạḍiye rạskạyena. 
1Chronicles29:10 Dạud do sanam hoṛko samaṅre noa menkate Probhu Isor sarhaoeye ehopʼena, “E Probhu Isor, aleren hapṛam Israelren Isor, etohopʼ khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ amakʼ sarhaoge hoyokʼtam ma." 
1Chronicles29:11 E Probhu, ṭhonokʼ, daṛe, jakjomok, jitạu ar sarhao do amakʼge, ente serma ar dhạrti reakʼ jotowakʼge amakʼ kana. E Probhu Isor, am do sanamakʼ cetanrem rajokʼkana; amakʼ ṭhạ̃i do sanamko cetanrege." 
1Chronicles29:12 Dhon ar man do am ṭhen khonge hijukʼkana; amge jotowakʼem ḍanṭaoeda. Amakʼ tirege daṛe ar ektiạri do menakʼa; manwa rakapʼko ar daṛe emako reakʼ ektiạri hõ amakʼge. 
1Chronicles29:13 “Ńitokʼ do, E aleren Isor, amle sarhaoetʼme kana, amakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ ńutumle sarhaoetʼtama." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Menkhan E Probhu Isor, iń baṅiń okoekan ar ińren hoṛ baṅko okoekan, ale do kusite nonkale dan daṛeke? Aleakʼ jotowakʼge coṅ am ṭhen khonge hijukʼkan. Am ṭhen khon okale ńamakatʼ onage ale do amle em akatʼmea." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ale do amakʼ mẽtʼre aleren sanam hapṛamko leka bidisiạ hoṛ kanale. Dhạrtire aleakʼ dinko do umul leka, aleakʼ do jãhãn asge bạnukʼtalea." 
1Chronicles29:16 E aleren Probhu Isor, amakʼ sonot ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ nõkʼõe okako jinisle ạguakatʼ ona jotowakʼ do amakʼkangea ar am ṭhen khonge jotowakʼ hecʼakana." 
1Chronicles29:17 E ińren Isor, ińiń baḍaea, am do ontorem biḍạu aṭkaretʼkana ar dhorom iạtem kusikʼkana. Noako jinis do mon ar ontor khon kusiteń em akatʼmea. Ar ńitokʼ do ona ńelteń rạskạkʼ kana, amren hoṛko okoe do nonḍe menakʼko onko hõko kusikʼkana." 
1Chronicles29:18 E Probhu Isor, aleren hapṛam Abraham, Isahak ar Israelren Isor, amren hoṛkoakʼ ontorre nonkan monsubạ jaejug hạbicʼ dohoyme ar amre onkoakʼ ontor baṛe pạtiạr dohoytakome." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ińren hopon Solomon do khạtirjoma danaeme jemon amakʼ hukum, amakʼ katha ar amakʼ niạmkoe palon daṛeakʼ ar iń okaṭakʼ dalan benao lạgitʼ iń sapṛao akatʼ ona jemone benao daṛeakʼ.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Tayomte Dạud do sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do aperen Probhu Isor sarhaoepe.” Unre onko jotoge akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea ar Probhu Isor ar raj ńutumte ombakʼenteko ḍobokʼadea." 
1Chronicles29:21 Dosar hilokʼ onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte janwar samaṅokʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobko porobena. Ar sanam Israelko lạgitʼ onko do mitʼ hajar ḍaṅgra, mitʼ hajar bheḍa ar mitʼ hajar bheḍa hoponko samaṅketʼkoa ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ ar anajkote eṭakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda." 
1Chronicles29:22 Enhilokʼ onko do Probhu Isor samaṅre rạskạ salakʼko jom ńũkeda. Onko do Dạudren hopon Solomon do dosar raj menteko aṅgockedea ar Sadok do naeke menkate Probhu Isor ńutumteko ojokʼ bahalkedea. 
1Chronicles29:23 Unre Solomon do acʼren apat Dạud bodolte raj lekate siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼena. Ar sanamakʼre uni doe jo bahayena ar sanam Israelko do uniyakʼ katha lekako calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles29:24 Sanam mukhiyạko ar lạṛhại phạdko ar Dạud rajren eṭakʼ hoponko jotoge Solomon tabere tahenko aṅgockeda. 
1Chronicles29:25 Probhu Isor do sanam Israelkoakʼ mẽtʼre Solomone maraṅkedea ar nonkan ṭhonoke danadea noa lahare Israelren cele rajge bako ńamleda. 
1Chronicles29:26 Jisạiren hopon Dạud do sanam Israelko cetanre pongel bochor hạbicʼ raje tahẽkana ar eae bochor do Hebronre ar pegel pe bochor do Jerusalemre raje tahẽkana. 
1Chronicles29:27  
1Chronicles29:28 Uni do ḍher bochor jiwetʼ tahẽkanre dhon ar mane arjawan tahẽkana ar ạḍi haṛam umerreye gocʼena. Uniren hopon Solomon do acʼ apat bodolteye rajena. 
1Chronicles29:29 Ar ńeńelicʼ Samuelren nạbi Nathan ar ńeńelicʼ Gad reakʼ itihãs puthire Dạud raje rajokʼ reakʼ sanam kathako do etohopʼ khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ ol menakʼa. 
1Chronicles29:30 Uniyakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ khạṭi-nạṭi ar ektiạri reakʼ katha ar uniyakʼ, Israelakʼ ar eṭakʼ disạmren sanam rapajko soṅgete okako ghoṭna hoylen onako sanam katha do ona itihãs puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Chronicles1:1 Dạudren hopon Solomon do acʼakʼ rajosṭi ạḍi kajakge acʼ tabereye dohokeda, ente uniren Probhu Isor do uni sãoteye tahẽkana ar ạḍiye maraṅkedea." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomon do sanam Israelko, metakʼme hajar lạṛhại phạdkoren ar sae sae lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko, bikʼcạrko ar Israelren sanam bõsren mukhiyạko jarwa mitʼko lạgitʼe hukumkeda." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ona tayom uni ar sanam hoṛko do Gibiạn reakʼ ona than boṭkocʼ ṭhenko senena, ente Isorakʼ ńapamokʼ tạmbu do onḍege tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do Probhu Isorren guti Mose hahaṅkarre tahẽkanreye benaoletʼ tahẽkan." 
2Chronicles1:4 Menkhan Isorakʼ sinduk do Jerusalemre tahẽkana, ente Dạud do Kiriat-Jiạrim khon onae ạguketʼte Jerusalemre okaṭakʼ tạmbui beretʼletʼ onḍegeye dohokeda." 
2Chronicles1:5 Menkhan Hurren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Urren hopon Botsolel do pitạl reakʼ okaṭakʼ pinḍe benao ocoletʼ tahẽkan ona do Gibiạnre Probhu Isorakʼ ḍera tạmbu samaṅre tahẽkana. Ona iạte Solomon ar sanam hoṛko do onḍeko senena. 
2Chronicles1:6 Unre Solomon do ona pitạl reakʼ pinḍ ṭhen senkate Probhu Isor samaṅre ona cetanre mitʼ hajar janwarkote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobe hoyocokeda. 
2Chronicles1:7 Ar enhilokʼ ńindạ Isor do Solomon ṭhene sodorenteye metadea, “Iń ṭhen okam khoj ona reakʼ jotowakʼge amiń emama.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomon do Isorre roṛ ruạṛadea, “Am do ińren ạpuń Dạud cetanre asambheṛ dulạṛem udukʼ akada ar uniyakʼ jaegare ińem raj akadińạ." 
2Chronicles1:9 E Probhu Isor, ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okam gokʼ akatʼ ona baṛe ńitokʼ purạume, ente nonkan mitʼ jạtrenko cetanrem raj akadińạ okoe do dhạrtiren dhuṛi leka ohoko lekha caba daṛelen." 
2Chronicles1:10 Iń do bud ar ạkil imạńme jemon ińakʼ dạyikiń purạu daṛeakʼ, ente amren noko maraṅ jạtrenko ḍanṭaoko reakʼ daṛe do okoeyakʼ menakʼa?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Unre Isor do Solomone metadea, “Amakʼ mon reakʼ sana do bhagegea. Am do dhon-durib, sonman se bạirikoakʼ gujukʼ hõ bam khoj akada, se ḍher dinem bahaokʼ reakʼ hõ bam khoj akada. Ona khon boroṅ amren okoe hoṛko cetanreń raj akatʼme onko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ bud ar ạkilgem khoj akada." 
2Chronicles1:12 Ona iạte am do bud ar ạkilem em ocoyena. Ona chaḍa iń do nonkan dhon-durib ar manotiń emama one am lahaten cele rajakʼge baṅ tahẽkan ar am tayom hõ baṅ tahentakoa.” 
2Chronicles1:13 Inạ tayom Solomon do Gibiạn reakʼ than boṭkocʼre, okare ńapamokʼ tạmbu tahẽkan, onḍe khon uni do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ calaoena ar Israelko cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomon do ạḍi utạr rãt gạḍiko ar sadomkoe jogaṛketʼkoa. Onate uniyakʼ do mitʼ hajar ponsae rãt gạḍiko ar gelbar hajar sadomko hoyentaea. Ar noako rãt gạḍi do nagrahakore ar Jerusalemre acʼ ṭhene dohokeda. 
2Chronicles1:15 Jerusalemre sona ar rupạ do dhiri lekae hoyocokeda ar debdạru kaṭko do latar buru ṭoṭha reakʼ loa dareko lekae hoyocokeda. 
2Chronicles1:16 Solomonren sadomko do Misor ar Kilikiạ khonko ạguyetʼko tahẽkana. Rajren bạnij bepariko do Kilikiạ khonko kiriń ạguyetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles1:17 Misor disạm khon ạguwakʼ mimitʼ rãt gạḍiko reakʼ dam do eae keji irạl sae gram rupạ ar mimitʼ goṭen sadomakʼ dam do eae keji irạl sae gram rupạ tahẽkana. Onko bepariko do Hittiko ar Aramren sanam rapajko ṭhenko ạkhrińetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomon do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ ar apnar lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ raj oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼe hukumkeda. 
2Chronicles2:2 Uni do eaegel hajar hoṛko bojha gokʼ lạgitʼ ar irạlgel hajar hoṛko do burure dhiri gegetʼ lạgitʼ ar pe hajar turui sae hoṛko do onko ńel todarotko lạgitʼe dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomon do Turren raj Hirạm noa khobore koladea, “Ińren ạpuń Dạudakʼ mitʼṭecʼ raj oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ cetʼleka debdạru kaṭkom kolletʼ tahẽkan onkage iń hõ debdạru kaṭko kolạńme." 
2Chronicles2:4 Ńitokʼ iń do ińren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ ar uni ńutumte ona samaṅ lạgitʼ iń sapṛao akana, jemon uni samaṅre jut so mosolako jeredokʼ, ar jaoge samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ piṭhạ hõ jemon sajao akae tahen ar dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ, jirạukʼ mãhã hilokʼre, ambas ńutre ar aboren Probhu Isor niṭakatʼ judạ judạ porobre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobiń porob daṛeakʼ. Ar niạko palon do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ niạm kana." 
2Chronicles2:5 “Okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ benao iń menjoṅkan ona do maraṅakʼ hoyokʼa, ente aboren Isor do sanam debotako khon hõe maraṅgea." 
2Chronicles2:6 Menkhan uni lạgitʼ oṛakʼ do okoeye benao daṛekea? Ente serma, se serma rajrehõ uniyakʼ jaega do cetʼ okulạn hoyokʼa? Uni samaṅre eṭakʼ eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko jeredokʼ ṭhạ̃i chaḍa ar cekate iń do uni lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ iń benao daṛekea?" 
2Chronicles2:7 “Ińren ạpuń Dạud do gạkhuṛ kạrigolkoe ṭhik doho akatʼkoa onko do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemre iń ṭhen menakʼkoa. Ar onko sãote kạmi lạgitʼ nonkan mitʼṭen gạkhuṛ kạrigol koleme okoe do sona, rupạ, pitạl ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ kạmiye baḍae, beguni, arakʼ ar nil roṅakʼ sutạm reakʼ kạmi ar lakʼ rokʼ reakʼ kạmiko hõe kạmi daṛeakʼ." 
2Chronicles2:8 Ona chaḍa debdạru, saro kaṭko, rokot condon kaṭko hõ Lebanon khon kolạńme, ente ińiń baḍaea amren hoṛko do onḍenakʼ kaṭ mamakʼ kạmireko gạkhuṛgea. Ińren hoṛko do amren hoṛ sãoteko kạmiya jemon onko do ạḍi utạr kaṭko emdaṛeạń, ente okaṭakʼ iń benao lạgidokʼkan ona do ạḍi maraṅ ar hahaṛawakʼge hoyokʼa." 
2Chronicles2:9  
2Chronicles2:10 Iń do amren hoṛko, metakʼme dare mamakʼko do pe hajar turui sae ṭon holoṅ, pe hajar turui sae ṭon jao, pon lakh pon sae liṭar darkha rasa ar pon lakh pon sae liṭar jạitun sunumiń emakoa." 
2Chronicles2:11 Turren raj Hirạm do Solomon niạ ciṭhiye ol ruạṛadea, “Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoe dulạṛetʼkoa ar onatege am doe raj akatʼmea.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hirạm do arhõe olkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isor doe bhạgangea, one okoe do ot ar sermae sirjạu akatʼ. Uni do Dạud raj nonkan mitʼṭen akelan hopone em akawadea uniyakʼ bud ar bujhạu reakʼ daṛe menakʼtae ar okoe do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ ar apnar lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ raj oṛakʼe benao lạgidokʼkan." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Iń do am ṭhen Hirạm ńutuman mitʼṭecʼ ạḍi gạkhuṛ ar budan kạrigoliń kolkedea. 
2Chronicles2:14 Uniren eṅgat do Dan gusṭikoren hoponera kanae ar uniren apattetʼ do Turren hoṛ kanae. Uni do sona, rupạ, pitạl, mẽṛhẽtʼ, dhiri, kaṭ ar beguni, jeṅgetʼ arakʼ, nil sutạm ar mihi musnạ sutạm reakʼ kạmi ạḍi bhageye baḍaea. Ar joto lekan lakʼ rokʼ kạmire uni doe gạkhuṛgea ar jãhã lekan nạmuna reakʼge uni do kạmi daṛeakʼa. Uni do aperen kạrigolko sãote ar ińren kĩsạ̃ṛ, amren ạpum Dạudren kạrigolko sãoteye kạmiya." 
2Chronicles2:15 “Onate ińren mạlik am oka lekam menakatʼ ona lekage jao, guhum, jạiutun reakʼ sunum ar darkha rasa do ale ṭhenem kola." 
2Chronicles2:16 Ale do Lebanon khon amakʼ jạruṛokʼ leka sanam kaṭko makʼkate mitʼ dhaote tolkate doreãore cape ocokate Japho nagraha hạbicʼle idiya. Ar ona tayom do Jerusalemte onakom idi ocokoa.” 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomon do acʼren apat Dạudakʼ hoṛ lekhako lekage Israelko talareko girobasokʼ kan sanam bidisiạkoe lekha ocoketʼkoa. Onate onkoakʼ lekha do mitʼ lakh mõṛẽgel pe hajar turui sae hoṛko hoyena. 
2Chronicles2:18 Onko mod khon eaegel hajar hoṛko do bojha gokʼ lạgitʼ, ar irạlgel hoṛko do buru khon dhiri getʼ ạgui lạgitʼ ar onko hoṛkoakʼ kạmiko ńel todarot tako lạgitʼ do pe hajar turui sae hoṛkoe bahalketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomon do Jerusalem reakʼ Mạriạ burure Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼe ehopʼena. Niạ bururege Jibusiạ Arownakʼ khạrạire Probhu Isor do uniren apat Dạud ṭhene ńel ocolena. Ar Dạud do niạ ṭhạ̃ige koejoṅ oṛakʼ lạgitʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles3:2 Solomonakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochor reakʼ dosar cando reakʼ dosarakʼ dinre Solomon do kạmiye ehopʼkeda. 
2Chronicles3:3 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ uni do jokha lekate turuigel moka jeleń bargel moka osar rehetʼe bạisạukeda. 
2Chronicles3:4 Oṛakʼ samaṅ reakʼ pinḍạ reakʼ jokha do osarte bargel moka ar ona reakʼ chat do mitʼsae bargel moka usul benao hoyena ar ona reakʼ bhitritetʼ do khạṭi sonateye dapalkada. 
2Chronicles3:5 Oṛakʼ reakʼ asolakʼ kandha do pạhilre saro kaṭ reakʼ toktateye dapalkeda ar ona tayom do khạṭi sonateye tolkeda, ar khijur dare ar sikṛi reakʼ muṭhạnkoe noksawada." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ona chaḍa damanakʼ dhirikote uni do oṛakʼe sajaokeda. Okaṭakʼ sonae beoharketʼ ona do Parawayim disạm reakʼ sona tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles3:7 Ar bhitkore do Kerubkinakʼ muṭhạne lakʼ rokʼ ocokeda ar ona reakʼ saṅghako, duạr reakʼ ganaḍeko, bhit ar duạr do sonateye tol ocokeda." 
2Chronicles3:8 Ona tayom uni do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃iye benaokeda. Ona do bargel moka osar ar bargel moka jeleńe dohokeda. Ar bhitri do bargel pe ṭon ponsae keji khạṭi sonateye tolkeda. 
2Chronicles3:9 Sona reakʼ gojalko do turui sae mõṛẽgel gram ojon tahẽkana. Uni do cetan kandhako hõ sonateye tol ocokeda 
2Chronicles3:10 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire uni do Kerubkinakʼ muṭhạne benaokeda ar sonateye tolketʼkinạ. 
2Chronicles3:11 Ar unkin banar Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do mõṛẽ moka jeleń tahẽkana. Mitʼṭen Kerubakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do mitʼ bhitre ar eṭakʼ Kerubakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do eṭakʼakʼ bhitre jakʼ tahẽyena, ar oṛakʼ talare unkinakʼ eṭakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do ạkin ạkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ jakʼ tiyạkʼ akan tahẽkana. Nukin Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ jokha do lap lapa akatʼre bargel moka tahẽkana. Unkin do jaṅgatekin teṅgo akan tahẽkana ar mul kandha secʼkin samaṅ akatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles3:12  
2Chronicles3:13  
2Chronicles3:14 Solomon do nil, beguni, ar arakʼ sutạm ar mĩhĩ musnạ sutạmte orwalkoe benao ocokeda ar onare Kerubkinakʼ muṭhạne rokʼ jalatʼada." 
2Chronicles3:15 Koejoṅ oṛakʼ samaṅre uni do barea tham khunṭiye benaokeda. Onakin do pegel mõṛẽ moka usul tahẽkana. Ar mimitʼ muthni reakʼ jokha do mõṛẽ moka kate tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles3:16 Uni do uńakʼ sikṛi benaokate tham reakʼ muthnikin cetanreye dohokeda, ar mitʼsae ḍạlim jo benaokate ona sikṛireye gathaoada." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ona tham khunṭikin do koejoṅ oṛakʼ samaṅ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ do dạkhinre ar eṭakʼakʼ do utạrreye teṅgo dohokeda. Ar dạkhinre okaṭakʼ tahẽkan ona reakʼ ńutum do Jạkine dohokeda (metakʼme “okoeye bạisạuketʼ ”) ar utạr secʼre okaṭakʼ tahẽkan ona reakʼ ńutum do Boase dohokeda (metakʼme “Onarege daṛetetʼ do”). 
2Chronicles4:1 Solomon do bargel moka jeleń, bargel moka osar ar gel moka usul mitʼṭecʼ pitạl reakʼ pinḍe benao ocokeda." 
2Chronicles4:2 Ona tayom uni do pitạl reakʼ chãńchreye dulketʼte dakʼ dohoy lạgitʼ maraṅ okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ gulạnḍge karaheye benao ocokeda. Karahe reakʼ kaṅkha khon kaṅkha hạbicʼ jokha do gel moka tahẽkana, khạndri do mõṛẽ moka ar kaṅkha beṛhaeteakʼ jokha do pegel moka tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles4:3 Karahe reakʼ bahre secʼ beṛhaeteakʼ latarre mimitʼ moka reakʼ jaegare gel goṭecʼkate bar sạrte ḍaṅgrawakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. Okaṭakʼ chańch talare karahe benao hoylen ona chańch talarege ḍaṅgrakoakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkante jotoge mitʼṭecʼ jinisge hoyena. 
2Chronicles4:4 Karahe do gelbar goṭecʼ pitạlren ḍaṅgrako cetanre doṛom akan tahẽkana. Onko modre pea do utạr secʼ, pea do pạchim secʼ, pea do dạkhin secʼ ar pea do purub secʼko samaṅ akatʼ tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ ṭiki do bhitri secʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles4:5 Karahe do pon kạṭupʼ dạriạ tahẽkana. Ona reakʼ kaṅkha do bạṭi reakʼ kaṅkha leka tahẽkana ar sikiyạm baha leka tahẽkana. Onare do turuigel turui hajar liṭar dakʼ sahobokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles4:6 Uni do gel goṭecʼ karaheye benao ocokeda ar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do dạkhin secʼre ar mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do utạr secʼreye dohokeda. Onakore do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jiniskoko ạrupʼ saphayetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan naekeko do ona maraṅakʼ karahege akoakʼ ti jaṅga ạbukokʼ lạgitʼko beoharetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles4:7 Ar okaleka roṛlen onkage uni do gel goṭecʼ sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼe benao ocoketʼte koejoṅ oṛakʼ talare dạkhin secʼre mõṛẽ goṭecʼ ar utạr secʼre mõṛẽ goṭecʼe dohokeda. Ona chaḍa uni do gel goṭecʼ ṭebile benao ocoketʼte koejoṅ oṛakʼ bhitrire mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do dạkhinre ar eṭakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ do utạrreye dohokeda. Uni do mitʼsae sona reakʼ bạṭiko hõe benao ocokeda. 
2Chronicles4:8  
2Chronicles4:9 Uni do naekeko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ racae sapṛaokeda; ar ona tayom do ar mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ racae benao ocoketʼte ona lạgitʼ silpińkoe benao ocokeda ar ona silpińko do pitạlteye tol ocokeda. 
2Chronicles4:10 Ar maraṅ utạrakʼ karahe do raca reakʼ dạkhin purub kona secʼreye dohokeda. 
2Chronicles4:11 Ona chaḍa Hirạm do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bhajanko, bạṭiko ar kạ̃ṛchukoe benaokeda. Nonkate uni do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ Solomon raj hotete okako kạmiye ehopʼletʼ onae sạtkeda. Onako do hoyokʼkana:" 
2Chronicles4:12 Barea tham khunṭi, ar onakin cetan reakʼ gulạnḍge barea muthni, ar ona muthni cetanre sajaokʼ lạgitʼ banar sạr noksa akatʼ uńakʼ sikṛiko;" 
2Chronicles4:13 Ar ona sikṛiko lạgitʼ pon sae ḍạlim jo ar tham khunṭi muthni reakʼ chatna sajao lạgitʼ mimitʼ sạr sikṛi lạgitʼ bar sạr dạlim jo tahẽkana; 
2Chronicles4:14 karahe ar onako bạisạu lạgitʼ baksa; 
2Chronicles4:15 maraṅ okocʼ karahe ar ona latarren gelbar goṭen ḍaṅgrako; 
2Chronicles4:16 karaheko, kạ̃ṛchuko ar jel rakapʼakʼ kạ̃ṛchuko hõ tahẽkana. Hirạm do Solomon rajakʼ hukumte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ okako jiniskoe benaoletʼ ona do jhak jhak pitạl reakʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles4:17 Raj do onako Jordan reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire Sukot ar Sorethan tala reakʼ mitʼ jaegare noako jinis do ot reakʼ chãchreye dul benao ocoleda. 
2Chronicles4:18 Niạko jinis Solomon do nunạkʼ ḍhere benao ocoleda je, onate pitạl reakʼ ojon do baṅ baḍaelena." 
2Chronicles4:19 Isorakʼ oṛakʼre Solomon do okako jinise benao ocoletʼ onako do hoyokʼkana: sona reakʼ pinḍ; samaṅakʼ piṭhạ dohowakʼ ṭebil; 
2Chronicles4:20 ar okaleka lại hoylen onkage sonot utạrakʼ jaega samaṅre jered lạgitʼ khạṭi sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ar ona reakʼ diuheko; 
2Chronicles4:21 khạṭi sona reakʼ bahako, diuheko ar cimṭạko;" 
2Chronicles4:22 sultạ saphae lạgitʼ khạṭi sona reakʼ cimṭạko, sona reakʼ bạṭiko, kạ̃ṛchuko ar seṅgel aṅgra dohoy reakʼ celaṅko; ar bhitri kandha reakʼ, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ jinis reakʼ duạr lạgitʼ ar mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ maraṅ kandha lạgitʼ sona reakʼ kobjako. Ar duạrko do sonategeye tol ocoakatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles5:1 Nonkate Solomon raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼe kạmi sạtkeda. Ona tayom uni do acʼren apat Dạud okako jinis Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar doholetʼ onakoe ạgukeda. Onako modre do sona, rupạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ bhajanko tahẽkana. Onako uni do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ dhon bhanḍarreye dohokada." 
2Chronicles5:2 Inạ tayom Solomon raj do Dạud nagraha, metakʼme Sion khon Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk ạgui lạgitʼ Israelren murubbiko, gusṭiren mathako ar Israelren mukhiyạko Jerusalemre acʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles5:3 Onate eaeakʼ candore porobokʼ jokhecʼ Israelren onko sanam hoṛ do Solomon raj ṭhenko hecʼena. 
2Chronicles5:4 Israelren sanam murubbikoko jarwayen khan Liwiko do sindukko gokʼkeda. 
2Chronicles5:5 Onko ar naekeko do sinduk, ńapamokʼ tạmbu ar sanamakʼ sonotakʼ bhajanko gokʼ idikeda." 
2Chronicles5:6 Solomon raj ar uni ṭhenko jarwa akan sanam Israelko do sinduk samaṅre nunạkʼ bheḍa ar ḍaṅgrako samaṅketʼkoa, onko do bako lekha daṛeatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ona tayom naekeko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk do niṭ akatʼ ṭhạ̃ire, koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri kandhare, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire Kerubkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarreko dohokada." 
2Chronicles5:8 Onate Kerubkinakʼ lap lapa akan phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte sinduk ar ona gokʼ ạguakʼ ḍaṅkin do danaṅge tahẽyena. 
2Chronicles5:9 Onakin ḍaṅ do nonka jeleń tahẽkana, onakin reakʼ mitʼ mucạtʼ do bhitri kandha reakʼ samaṅ secʼakʼ asolakʼ kandha, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon ńel ńamokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i bahre khon do baṅa. Ar teheń hạbicʼ ona do onḍege menakʼa." 
2Chronicles5:10 Israelko Misor disạm khonko oḍok hecʼen tayom Horeb burure Probhu Isor do onko lạgitʼ tinre bondobose bandhaokeda unre Mose okakin dhiri cạkti do sinduk bhitrireye doholetʼ ona chaḍa ar cetʼge onare do ar baṅ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles5:11 Ona tayom sanam naekeko do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khonko oḍok hecʼena. Onko do jãhã dolren liwi kangeko, unre jotogeko sapha ocolena. Ar okoe naekeko doko sereńetʼ tahẽkan, metakʼme Asaph, Hemen, Jiduthon ar onkoren hoponko ar onko bõsren hoṛko do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼkate pinḍ reakʼ purub secʼre teṅgokate kortal, peṛesaṅ, binạ banamko banametʼ tahẽkana. Ar naekeko do tinre bahreteko oḍok hecʼena unre sakwa oroṅko ar sereńko do mitʼdomte mitʼ rạṛte Probhu Isorko mạhimawadea arko sarhaokedea. Sakwa, kortal ar eṭakʼ bajnako sãote onko do ãṭ aṛaṅate Probhu Isor ńutumte niạ sereńko sereńkeda, “Uni doe bhagegea, uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana.” Unre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do rimilte perecʼena. Ona rimil iạte naekeko do sewa kạmi bako kạmi daṛeada, ente Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte oṛakʼ do perecʼ akan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles5:12  
2Chronicles5:13  
2Chronicles5:14  
2Chronicles6:1 Unre Solomone menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, am do rimil talarem tahena mentem menleda. Iń do ńitokʼ am lạgitʼ napae okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ iń benao akada; ar noa do jaejug lạgitʼ amakʼ tahen oṛakʼ hoyokʼa.”" 
2Chronicles6:2  
2Chronicles6:3 Niạ menkate raj do jarwa akan sanam Israelko secʼe ạcurente onkoe bhoratʼkoa. Unre hoṛko doko teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles6:4 Ona tayom uniye menkeda, “Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtaema. Uni do ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen acʼakʼ mocate okae gokʼletʼ ona do acʼgeye purunkeda. Uni doe menleda," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘ińren hoṛko Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguketʼko tayom ińiń sodorokʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i lekate mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ Israelkoakʼ jãhãn gusṭi reakʼ nagraha hõ bạń bachaoana, se ińren hoṛ Israelko cetanre mukhiyạ hoyokʼ lạgitʼ hõ jãhãe hoṛko bạń bachao akawana," 
2Chronicles6:6 menkhan ńitokʼ do ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lekate Jerusalemiń bachaoana ar ińren hoṛ Israelko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ do Dạudgeń bachao akadea.’ 
2Chronicles6:7 “Israelren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ monsubạ do ińren ạpuń Dạudakʼ ontorre tahẽkangea. 
2Chronicles6:8 Menkhan Probhu Isor do ińren ạpuń Dạude metade tahẽkana, ‘iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ monsubạ ontorre menakʼtam ona do bhagegea." 
2Chronicles6:9 Tobe oṛakʼ do alom benaoa, ona do amren hopone benaoa, one okoe doe amren hoponkan. Unige iń lạgitʼ ona oṛakʼe benaoa.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼe purạu akada. Ińren ạpuń oka hudạreye tahẽkan iń do ona hudạgeń ńam akada. Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate iń do Israelkoakʼ siṅghạsonreń duṛupʼ akana ar Israelren Probhu Isor lạgitʼ niạ oṛakʼgeń benao akada. 
2Chronicles6:11 Ar onḍe do Probhu Isorakʼ goha sinduk dohoakada one onare Israelko reakʼ bondobos menakʼ.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Ona tayom Solomon do onḍe jarwa akan Israelko samaṅre Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ ṭhen teṅgokate banar tiye tulketʼtaea. 
2Chronicles6:13 Uni do mõṛẽ moka jeleń, mõṛẽ moka osar ar pe moka usul pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ macane benao ocoletʼte tala racareye dohokeda. Uni do ona macanre decʼkate sanam Israelko samaṅreye ikhṛumena ar banar ti serma secʼ tiyạr ketʼteye menkeda," 
2Chronicles6:14 “E Probhu Isor, Israelkoren Isor, coṭ sermare se latar otre am lekan do ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa. Amren gutiko okoe do mon ar ontorte amakʼ horteko calakʼ onko secʼ amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ bondobos baṛe rukhiyại me." 
2Chronicles6:15 Amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okam gokʼletʼ am do onam purạu akada. Ar mocate okam menletʼ kạmite hõ onam purạu akada, ar ona do ale hõle ńeletʼ kana." 
2Chronicles6:16 “Ńitokʼ do E Israelren Probhu Isor, amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okam gokʼletʼ ona baṛe purạume. Amem menleda, uniren hoponko uni leka amakʼ ạn-ạri leka calakʼ reakʼko moneyakʼ khan Israelakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ uniyakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ okulạn do baṅ hoyokʼa." 
2Chronicles6:17 E Israelren Isor, amren guti ińren ạpuń Dạud ṭhen okaṭakʼem gokʼletʼ ona baṛe purạukʼ ma." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Menkhan Isor do cetʼ sạrige dhạrtiren manwako sãoteye girobasokʼa? Sermare, se coṭ serma reakʼ sanamakʼ jaegare hõ amakʼ okulạn hoyokʼ khan ińakʼ benaoakʼ niạ oṛakʼre amakʼ jaega do cetʼ hoyokʼgea?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Enhõ E ińren Probhu Isor, amren gutiyakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõr baṛe luturakʼme. Teheń amren guti do am ṭheniń rakʼjoṅ kana ariń nehõr joṅ kana ańjomtińme baṛe." 
2Chronicles6:20 Ar okaṭakʼ jaega reakʼ katham menakatʼ, nonḍege amakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ oṛakʼ do hoyokʼa ona jaega secʼ metakʼme, niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ do siń ńindạ beṅgetʼ akae baṛe tahenma. Ar niạ ṭhạ̃i secʼ samaṅkate amren guti do tinreye koejoṅa unre uniyakʼ koejoṅ baṛe ańjomtaeme." 
2Chronicles6:21 Niạ ṭhạ̃i secʼ samaṅkate amren guti ar amren Israel hoṛko am ṭhenko nehõrokʼre onkoakʼ hõ luturakʼtako me. Amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon ańjomtakome ar ikạkakome. 
2Chronicles6:22 “Jãhãe hoṛ eṭakʼ hoṛ upạrte behok iạteye dusilen khan ar acʼ apnar cetanre sarap ạgui lạgitʼe kiriạ ocokʼ khan ar amakʼ oṛakʼre senkate uni do pinḍ samaṅreye kiriạlen khan," 
2Chronicles6:23 enḍekhan serma khon uniyakʼ katha ańjomtaeme ar ona leka kạmime. Unre amren gutikom bicạrkote dos akatʼ reakʼ jo do bohokʼrem ladeaete dusi mentem sạbudea ar bin dusiyicʼ do uniyakʼ kạmi leka kuṛạiyem emaete bin dusi kanae mentem sạbudea. 
2Chronicles6:24 “Am upạrte kại gunạkʼte amren hoṛ Israelko do akoren bạiri ṭhen khonko bhagao ocokʼte arhõ am ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼ ar koejoṅ oṛakʼre amko sarhaome am ṭhenko koejoṅ arko nehõram," 
2Chronicles6:25 unre serma khon ańjomtakome ar amren Israel hoṛkoakʼ kại ikạitakome ar okaṭakʼ disạm onkoren hapṛamkom ematʼko tahẽkan onḍe arhõm ruạṛ ạgukoa. 
2Chronicles6:26 “Am upạrte amren hoṛkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte tinre rimil esedokʼte bae daga unre onko do niạ jaegare ruạṛkate amko sarhaome ar am ṭhenko koejoṅ ar kosṭo iạte kại khonko ruạṛokʼ," 
2Chronicles6:27 enḍekhan am do serma khon ona ańjomtakome ar amren gutiko, metatʼme amren hoṛ Israelkoakʼ kại ikạ katakom. Ar jionre ṭhik leka calakʼ cetʼakome ar somppoti lekate okaṭakʼ disạmem emakawatʼko ona disạm cetanre dakʼ ńur ocoyme." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Disạmre akal se mahamạri ńellenre, ar phosol jhãoralenre se gocʼlenre, ar phosolko pohokoko jom maraoletakore, ar bạiriko onkoakʼ jãhã nagrahako gherao esetʼlekore, ar jãhãlekan ruạ se muhinko hecʼakore," 
2Chronicles6:29 amren Israel hoṛko unre jãhãege kastaokate mon reakʼ dukte niạ mundil secʼ ti tiạrkateko koejoṅ se am ṭhenko nehõrokʼ," 
2Chronicles6:30 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon onkoakʼ ańjomtakome ar ikạkakome. Ar onkoakʼ kạmiko lekate bicạrtakome, ente am do onkoakʼ mon reakʼ jotom baḍaea ar eken amge sanam manwakoakʼ ontorem baḍaekana." 
2Chronicles6:31 Am dom onkaea jemon aleren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạmem emakawatʼko onḍe amren hoṛko piṛhike piṛhiko botoram ar amakʼ horteko taṛam idi. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Ona chaḍa amren Israel hoṛko baṅkan nonkan jãhãe bidisiạ hoṛko amakʼ maraṅ ńutum ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti reakʼ katha ańjomkate sạṅgiń disạm khon hecʼkate niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ secʼ ạcurkateko koejoṅ," 
2Chronicles6:33 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khon ańjomtakome. Ar onko okako khoj onage onka akome jemon dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko baḍae daṛeam ar amren Israel hoṛko leka onko hõ amko sewawam arko baḍae daṛeakʼ, iń benaoakʼ niạ oṛakʼ do amakʼ oṛakʼ kangea mente." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Am do tinre amren hoṛko onkoren bạiriko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼem kollekore onko jãhãregeko tahen onḍe khon amem bachao akatʼ niạ nagraha secʼ ar am lạgitʼ iń benao akatʼ niạ oṛakʼ samaṅkate am ṭhenko koejoṅ," 
2Chronicles6:35 enḍekhan serma khon onkoakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõr baṛe ańjomtakome ar onko sejokʼme. 
2Chronicles6:36 “Onko do am upạrteko kại lekhan: ar bako kạiya nonkan hoṛ do bạnukʼkoa: ar onko cetanrem edrekʼte bạirikoakʼ tirem jimạko ar sạṅgiń disạmte bondikateko idi ocokʼ," 
2Chronicles6:37 ar bondi dosarege ona disạmre monko ạcurtako arko kastaokʼte nehõrokʼteko men, ‘ale dole kại akada, arle behok akada ar bạṛicʼ hortele taṛam akada,’ enḍekhan onkoakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtakome. ”" 
2Chronicles6:38 Ona disạmre mon ar ontorte am secʼko ạcur ruạṛokʼ ar okaṭakʼ disạm onkoren hapṛamkom emakawatʼko ona disạm secʼ, amem bachao akawan nagraha secʼ, am lạgitʼ iń benao akatʼ niạ oṛakʼ secʼ samaṅkateko koejoṅ," 
2Chronicles6:39 enḍekhan amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i serma khon onkoakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõrjoṅakʼ ańjomtakome ar onko sejokʼme. Amren okoe hoṛko do am upạrteko kại akatʼ onko hoṛ hõ ikạkakome. 
2Chronicles6:40 “E ińren Isor, niạ jaegare okako koejoṅ hoyokʼ ona secʼ jemon ńitokʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ ar lutur jhicʼge baṛe tahenma." 
2Chronicles6:41 “E Probhu Isor, ńitokʼ do amakʼ jirạukʼ ṭhạ̃ite hijukʼme; dela hijukʼme ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ sinduk hijukʼma. E Probhu Isor, amren naekeko do dhorom reakʼ kicricʼko horogma. Am okam bhạlại akatʼ ona lạgitʼ am bhuktiamko doko rạskạ joṅma." 
2Chronicles6:42 E Probhu Isor, amem ojokʼ bahal akatʼko hoṛkoakʼ koejoṅ do alom dea giḍikakʼa; amren guti Dạud okaṭakʼ khạndri dulạṛem udukʼ akawade ona baṛe disạ dohokakʼme.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomonakʼ koejoṅ mucạtʼen são sãote serma khon seṅgel do pheḍ hecʼente jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jotowakʼ jiniskoe atarkeda ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼena. 
2Chronicles7:2 Onate naekeko do onḍe bako bolo daṛeada. 
2Chronicles7:3 Seṅgel pheḍ hijukʼko ńelketʼte ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ coṭre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokko ńelketʼte sanam Israelko do dhirite tol akatʼ racareko ombakʼente Probhu Isorko ḍobokʼadea ar niạ menkateko sarhaokedea, “Uni doe bhạgangea; uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Ona tayom raj ar sanam hoṛko do Probhu Isor samaṅre samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. 
2Chronicles7:5 Solomon raj do bargel bar hajar ḍaṅgra ar mitʼ lakh bargel hajar bheḍae samaṅketʼkoa. Nonkate raj ar sanam Israelko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼko uḍhạukeda. 
2Chronicles7:6 Naekeko do akoakʼ ṭhạ̃ireko teṅgoyena ar Liwiko hõ Probhu Isor ńutumte banam ar rui lạgitʼ akoakʼ jaegareko teṅgoyena. Ar naekeko ar Liwiko do samna sạmniko teṅgoyente sakwako oroṅkeda ar sanam Israelko doko teṅgo tahẽyena. Liwikoakʼ niạ banam ar ruruwakʼko Dạud raj do Probhu Isor sarhaoe lạgitʼe benao ocoleda ar onakoe banam are ruyetʼ tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor sarhaoateye menetʼ tahẽkana, “Uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana.”" 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ samaṅ senakʼ raca reakʼ tala hĩs do Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar dohokeda ar onḍe uni do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porobe porobena ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ itile samaṅkeda, ente pitạl reakʼ okaṭakʼ pinḍe benaoletʼ tahẽkan ona do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ ar itil samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ do huḍińge tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles7:8 Ona jokhecʼ Solomon ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko do, metakʼme Homat ṭoṭha khon Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa hạbicʼ sanam ṭoṭha khonko hecʼakan maraṅ utạr dolko do eae din hạbicʼ pinḍ samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. Ar irạlakʼ dinre onko do mitʼṭecʼ sabhako hoyocokeda ar eae din hạbicʼ arhõko porobena." 
2Chronicles7:9  
2Chronicles7:10 Ar eae cando reakʼ bargel pe din hilokʼre raj do hoṛko nij nij oṛakʼteye kolkatʼkoa. Dạud, Solomon ar uniren hoṛ Israelko cetanre Probhu Isor do okae bhạlại akatʼko onate rạskạte ar kusi monte oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Chronicles7:11 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj doṅgol benao lạgitʼ Solomonakʼ monre okako tahẽkan ona sanamakʼ uni do napaeteye sạtkeda. 
2Chronicles7:12 Tayomte mitʼ din ńindạ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do Solomon ṭhene ńel ocoyenteye metadea, “Iń do amakʼ koejoṅ iń ańjom akada ar samaṅokʼakʼ porobokʼ reakʼ oṛakʼ lekate iń lạgitʼ niạ jaegageń bachao akawana." 
2Chronicles7:13 “Iń do tinre sermań bonda ar dakʼ bạń emokʼa, se disạm ḍahao marao lạgitʼ pohokoń hukumako, se ińren hoṛko talare moṛokiń kola," 
2Chronicles7:14 unre ińren hoṛko, okoe do ińren hoṛ menteko hoho ocokʼkan onko do mạ̃hir seletʼko koejoṅ se ińakʼ dayako khoj ar bạṛicʼ hor khonko ruạṛ, enḍekhan serma khon onań ańjomtakote onkoakʼ kạikoń ikạ katakoa ar lahate leka onkoakʼ disạm iń teṅgo ruạṛakoa." 
2Chronicles7:15 Niạ jaegare okaṭakʼ koejoṅ hoyokʼ ona lạgitʼ ińakʼ mẽtʼ ar lutur do jhicʼge tahena. 
2Chronicles7:16 Niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ iń doń bachao akawante ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ lekate iń ńutumteń begar dohoakada. Niạ cetanre jao okte ińakʼ mẽtʼ ar ontor do jhicʼge tahena. 
2Chronicles7:17 “Amren ạpum Dạud cetʼ lekae calakʼkan tahẽkan am hõ onkage iń samaṅre calakʼme ar ińakʼ sanam hukum ar niạmko dohoyme," 
2Chronicles7:18 enḍekhan amakʼ raj siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ iń ṭikạu dohoya, ente iń do amren ạpum Dạud ṭhen iń gokʼletʼ tahẽkana, ‘Israelko ḍanṭaoko lạgitʼ amakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ okulạn do baṅ hoyokʼa.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Menkhan ińakʼ hor khonpe pharakokʼ ar okako niạm ar hukumkoń emakawatʼpe onape bạgiyakʼte debotakope sewawako arpe ḍobokʼako," 
2Chronicles7:20 enḍekhan iń okaṭakʼ disạmiń emakawatʼpe ona khon rehetʼ sudhạń totʼ giḍikapea ar iń ńutumte okaṭakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ iń begar dohoakatʼ ona hõ ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khoniń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. Unre sanam jạtrenko ṭhen ona oṛakʼ do landa-dhutʼakʼ iń hoeocoya. 
2Chronicles7:21 Niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ do ńitokʼ nunạkʼ maraṅakʼ hoyakanre hõ unre okoe noa aṛeteko parom senokʼ onko do comkao godokʼteko kuliya, ‘Probhu Isor do cedakʼ niạ disạm ar niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ cetanreye onkakeda?”" 
2Chronicles7:22 Ar hoṛkoko roṛ ruạṛa, ‘noa reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạguletʼko onko hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do onkoe bạgi giḍi akatʼkoa. Onko do debota secʼko ghańjeṛ akana ar onkoko sewawako kana; ar onatege uni do onko cetanre noa bạṛicʼakʼe paṛao ocoakada.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar acʼakʼ oṛakʼ benaote Solomon do bargel bochor lagaoade tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles8:2 Ar Hiram okako atoye emade tahẽkan Solomon do bargel bochor tayom onako arhõe benao rakapʼkeda ar Israelko onḍeye girobas ocoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles8:3 Ona tayom Solomon do Homat-Sobatre senkate onae dokholkeda. 
2Chronicles8:4 Uni do hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ nagraha ar Homat ṭoṭha reakʼ sanamakʼ khajańci nagrahako arhõe benao rakapʼkeda. 
2Chronicles8:5 Uni do cetan reakʼ Bet-horon phaṭok duạr ar huṛkạṛakʼ pạcrikoe benaoketʼte onae keṭecʼkeda. 
2Chronicles8:6 Uni do Balat nagraha ar ona reakʼ joto do gola nagrahae benaokeda ar rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko lạgitʼ hõ mitʼ bar nagrahakoe benaokeda. Jerusalemre, Lebanonre ar acʼakʼ ḍanṭao gobolre okako rajosṭi tahẽkan onako modre okako benao dohṛae menletʼ ona sanamakʼkoe benaokeda." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ar okoe do Israelko baṅkan, metakʼme Amoriko, Hittiko, Peresiko, Jebusikoren bõsko do unhõ jiwetʼko tahẽkana," 
2Chronicles8:8 ar Israelko okoe jạtrenko bako marao giḍiletʼko Solomon do onkoge golam lekate kạmi lạgitʼe sapʼ paṭetʼletʼkoa. Ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onko do ona kạmigeko kạmikana. 
2Chronicles8:9 Menkhan Israelko do acʼakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ golam mente bae benaoletʼkoa; onko do acʼren lạṛhại birko tahẽkana, uniren subedarko ar uniyakʼ rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko ar aswarikoren senaputiko hõko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ona chaḍa Solomonren do bar sae mõṛẽgel sordar kạmiyạkoko tahẽkantaea onko do golamkoakʼ kạmiko ńel todarotetʼkan tahẽkan. 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon do Pharaoren hoponera lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ oṛakʼe benaoletʼ tahẽkan uni do Dạud nagraha khon onḍeye ạgukedea. Uni doe menkeda, “Ińren bạhu do Israelren raj Dạudakʼ oṛakʼre do bae tahena, ente okako jaegare Probhu Isorakʼ sinduk ạgu hoylen onako ṭhạ̃i do sonotgea.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ pinḍạ samaṅre Solomon do Probhu Isorakʼ oka pinḍe benaoletʼ tahẽkan ona cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobe porobokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles8:13 Moseyakʼ hukum leka jirạukʼ mãhãre, ambasre ar bochorre pea porob, metakʼme bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobre, eae hapta reakʼ porobre, ar ḍera porobre- onako din reakʼ niạm lekate samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles8:14 Uniren apat Dạudakʼ hukum lekate uni do naekeko dạyike emako lạgitʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dolreye hạṭińketʼkoa ar dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ kạmi lekate sarhao sereń lạgitʼ ar naekeko goṛowako lạgitʼ uni do Liwikoe bahalketʼkoa. Mitʼke mitʼ phaṭok duạr lạgitʼ uni do rurukhiyạko dol lekateye bahalketʼkoa, ente nonkage Isorren hoṛ Dạud doe hukumletʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles8:15 Dạud raj do khajańci reakʼ jãhãnakʼ babotre ar eṭakʼ jãhãnakʼ babotre naekeko ar Liwiko okaṭakʼ hukume em oṭowatʼko tahẽkan ona do bako bemanot leda. 
2Chronicles8:16 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ khon ehopʼkate ona sạtokʼ reakʼ din hạbicʼ Solomonakʼ sanam kạmiko do ṭhik lekage hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar nonkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do benao sạtena. 
2Chronicles8:17 Ona tayom Solomon do Edom disạm reakʼ doreão aṛere menakʼ Esion-Geber ar Elotteye calaoena. 
2Chronicles8:18 Ar Huram do acʼren hoṛko, jahajko ar adom gạkhuṛ cakʼlaoko Solomone koladea. Noko do Solomonren hoṛko soṅgekate Ophirte senkate eaegel tala ṭon sonako ạguketʼte Solomon rajko emadea." 
2Chronicles9:1 Seba disạmren rạni do Solomonakʼ namḍak ańjomkate kuṭhin kuṭhin kuklikote uni biḍạue lạgitʼ Jerusalemteye hecʼena. Uni do ḍher hoṛko ar ũṭkoante Solomon ṭhene seṭerena. Ar ạḍi utạr jut so mosolako, sona ar moni muktako hõe ạgu darakeda. Uni do Solomon ṭhen hecʼkate monre cetʼko tahẽkantae ona jotowakʼe baḍae ocokedea." 
2Chronicles9:2 Ar Solomon do uniyakʼ joto kukli reakʼ roṛ ruạṛe emadea; Solomon ṭhen nonkan cetʼge kuṭhin do baṅ tahẽkana one okaṭakʼ do bae bujhạu oco daṛeade. 
2Chronicles9:3 Sebaren rạni do Solomonakʼ ạkil ar uniyakʼ raj dolankoe ńelkeda. 
2Chronicles9:4 Uni do arhõe ńelkeda uniyakʼ ṭebil reakʼ jomakʼ, uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ tahen jaega, mońj horokʼ bande akatʼ uniren sapʼsosorko, uniren darkha rasa dudulko ar ona siṛhi, one okaṭakʼ siṛhite uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye rakapʼ calakʼkan tahẽkan. Ar noako ńelte uni doe ṭhak utạrena." 
2Chronicles9:5 Uni do raje metadea, “Ińakʼ disạm khon amakʼ kạmi ar ạkil reaṅ okaṭakʼ kathań ańjomletʼ ona do sạrikangea." 
2Chronicles9:6 Menkhan nonḍe hecʼkate ińakʼ mẽtʼte ạuriń ńel hạbicʼ bạń pạtiạukʼkan tahẽkana. Sạrige, niạ reakʼ adha hõ iń ṭhen do baṅ lại akana. Okaṭakʼ khobor iń ńamakatʼ amakʼ ạkil ar dhon do ona khon hõ ḍher bạ̃ṛtigea." 
2Chronicles9:7 Amren hoṛ do ạḍi sukre menakʼkoa! Okoe do jao okte am samaṅreko tahenkan ar amakʼ ạkil reakʼ kathako ańjometʼ onko kạmiyạko doko bhạgangea. 
2Chronicles9:8 Amren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhaoge baṛe hoyokʼtae ma, okoe do am cetanreye kusi akante acʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akatʼme jemon amren Probhu Isorakʼ rajosṭim benao daṛeakʼ. Uni do Israelkoe dulạṛetʼkoa ar jaejug hạbicʼ ṭarhao ocoko lạgitʼte uni do hok reakʼ bicạr ar dhorom rukhiyại lạgitʼgeye raj akatʼmea.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Uni do pon ṭon tala khon hõ bạ̃ṛti sona raje emadea, ar ạḍi utạr jut so mosolako ar damanakʼ mạnik dhiriko hõe emadea. Seba rạni do Solomon oka lekan mosolakoe emade onkan jut so mosola do ar tisge baṅ ńelakan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ona chaḍa Hirạm ar Solomonren okoe gutiko do Ophir khon sonako ạguyetʼ tahẽkan onko do condon kaṭko ar mạnik dhiriko hõko ạguyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:11 Ar Solomon raj do onako condon kaṭte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ siṛhi ar sekʼreń dolko lạgitʼ binạ banamko ar peṛesaṅkoe benao ocokeda. Noa lahare Jihudạ disạmre nunạkʼ chondon kaṭ do Jihudạ disạmre ar baṅ ńelakan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:12 Seba rạni okae monsubạketʼ are koeketʼ ona jotowakʼge Solomon raj do uniye emadea. Ar rạni uni lạgitʼ okae ạguletʼ ona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiye emadea. Inạ tayom rạni do acʼren hoṛkoante acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Chronicles9:13 Jao bochor Solomon ṭhen oka sona hijukʼkan tahẽkan ona reakʼ ojon do bargel turui ṭon leka. 
2Chronicles9:14 Ona chaḍa bekʼpariko ar bạnij bepariko hõ sonako ạguyetʼ tahẽkana ar Arobren sanam rapajko ar disạm cakʼlaoko hõ Solomon ṭhen Sona ar rupạko ạguyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:15 Solomon raj do sona kuṭạm capṛa ocokate barsae ḍhalkoe benao ocokeda. Mimitʼ goṭecʼ ḍhalre eae keji irạl sae gram sona lagaolen tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:16 Kuṭạm capṛa akatʼ sonate pe sae kạṭicʼ ḍhalko hõe benao ocoletʼ tahẽkana. Ona mimitʼ goṭecʼ ḍhalre pe keji are sae gram sona lagaolena. Uni do Lebanon reakʼ bir oṛakʼre onakoe dohokada. 
2Chronicles9:17 Inạ tayom raj do hạti sonḍa reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ siṅghạsone benao ocokeda ar khạṭi sonateye tol ocokeda. 
2Chronicles9:18 Ona siṅghạson reakʼ siṛhi do turui goṭecʼ dhapko tahẽkana ar ona sãote sona reakʼ jaṅga lebedokʼakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ganḍo hõe lagao ocoakatʼ tahẽkana. Duṛubokʼ jaega reakʼ banar tire do hatol tahẽkana ar hatol aṛere do dhạcri kule teṅgo akan reakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:19 Ona turui goṭecʼ dhap reakʼ banarsa aṛere jotote gelbar goṭen dhạcri kulakʼ muṭhạn tahẽkana. Eṭakʼ jãhãn rajosṭire nonkan siṅghạson do tishõ baṅ benao akan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:20 Solomonakʼ ńuńuakʼ sanam bhajanko do sona reakʼ tahẽkana ar Lebanon bir oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼ bhajanko hõ khạṭi sonate benao tahẽkana. Solomon oktere rupạ reakʼ dam ḍher do baṅ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:21 Ar rajakʼ adomakʼ maraṅ maraṅ jahajko do Hiramren hoṛko soṅgekate Tạrsiste calakʼkan tahẽkana. Pe bochor por por ona Tạrsis reakʼ jahajko do sona, rupạ, hạti sonḍa, hạṛũko ar marakʼkoko ạguyetʼko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles9:22 Solomon raj do dhạrtiren eṭakʼ sanam rajko khon ạkilanicʼ ar kisạ̃ṛe tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:23 Isor do Solomonakʼ ontorre oka ạkile emade tahẽkan ona ạkilte perecʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ dhạrtiren sanam rapajko do uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼko kurumuṭuyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:24 Ar okoeko hijukʼkan tahẽkan onko do sanamkoge thoṛa baṅ thoṛa jãhãnakʼ sandesko ạguyetʼ tahẽkana. Onako modre sona ar rupạ reakʼ jinisko, kiricʼ khạnḍwạkʼko, khanḍa bhanḍako, jut so mosolako, sadomko khaccarko tahẽkana. Ar bochorke bochor nonkage calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles9:25 Sadom ar rãt gạḍiko lạgitʼ Solomonakʼ do pon hajar oṛakʼ tahẽkana. Uniren do gelbar hajar aswariko tahẽkana; onko do rãt gạḍi dohoy reakʼ nagrahakore ar Jerusalemre apnar ṭhene dohoyetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:26 Uni do Phurạt gaḍa khon Philisṭikoakʼ disạm ar Misor disạm reakʼ simạ hạbicʼren rapajko cetanreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:27 Solomon raj do Jerusalemre rupạ do dhiri lekae jarwakeda ar debdạru kaṭko do latar buru reakʼ loa dareko lekae hoyocokeda. 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomonren Sadomko do Misor ar eṭakʼ disạm khonko ạguyetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:29 Solomonakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do pạhil khon ses utạrakʼ hạbicʼ Nathan nạbiyakʼ olakʼre, Siloni Ahiawakʼ nạbi kathare olakana ar Nabatren hopon Jerobiam reaṅ do “dorson ńeńelicʼ Idoakʼ dorson” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon do Jerusalemre pongel bochor hạbicʼ goṭa Israel jạtrenko cetanreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ona tayom uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena; uni do acʼren apat Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ar ona tayom do uniren hopon Rehobiam do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehobiam do Sikemteye senena, ente sanam Israelko do uni raje lạgitʼ onḍeko senlena." 
2Chronicles10:2 Unre Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do Misor khone ruạṛ hecʼena. Uni do Solomon raj samaṅ khone dạṛletʼte onḍeye tahẽkana. Ar onḍe tahen jokhecʼge uni do Rehobiamakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ khobore ańjomleda. 
2Chronicles10:3 Hoṛko do Jerobiamko hoho ạgukede khan uni ar sanam Israelko do Rehobiam ṭhen senkateko menkeda," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Amren ạpum do ale cetanre mitʼṭecʼ hamal arãṛe lade akawatʼlea, menkhan ńitokʼ am do aleakʼ hamal arãṛ baṛe rawal kataleme; enḍekhan ale do am ṭhenle khaṭaokʼa.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehobiame roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Ape do pe din hilokʼre arhõ ruạṛ hijukʼpe.” Onate onko hoṛ doko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Chronicles10:6 Okoe murubbiko acʼren apattetʼ Solomon oktereko sapʼ soraekan tahẽkan Rehobiam do onko sãote galmaraoketʼteye menkeda, “Sopolhawạńpe onko hoṛ do cetʼ iń roṛ ruạṛakoa?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Teheń onko hoṛko sãote bhagem beoharte onkom kusi ocoko ar onkoakʼ nehõr joṅakʼem ańjomtako enḍekhan onko do jao okte amren golam menteko tahena.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Menkhan Rehobiam do murubbikoakʼ solha bae hetawatʼte juạn koṛako tulucʼe solhawana, okoe do acʼ sãoteko haralen ar uniko sapʼsorae kan tahẽkan." 
2Chronicles10:9 Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Hoṛko meneda, ‘amren ạpum okaṭakʼ hamal arãṛe gokʼ akawatʼle ona do ńitokʼ rawal kataleme.’ Niạ babotre apeakʼ sopolha do cetʼ? Abo do cetʼbon roṛ ruạṛakoa? ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Onko juạnkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Okoeko hoṛ do amren ạpumakʼ hamal arãṛ rawal reakʼ kathako menetʼ onkom metakoa, ińakʼ sicʼ kạṭupʼ do ińren ạpuńakʼ ḍanḍa khon hõ moṭagea." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ar amren ạpum okaṭakʼ hamal arãṛe ladeyatʼko tahẽkan ona do arhõ hamal ocoytakome. Amren ạpum do cạbukteye dalletʼkoa menkhan am do kidiń kaṭkomkotem dalkoa.” 
2Chronicles10:12 Rajakʼ katha leka pe din hilokʼre Jerobiam ar sanam Israelko do Rehobiam ṭhenko senena. 
2Chronicles10:13 Raj do murubbikoakʼ sopolha bae hetawatʼte ạḍi keṭecʼ kathateye roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles10:14 Ar onko juạnkoakʼ sopolha lekageye metatʼkoa, “Ińren ạpuń do apeakʼ arãṛe hamal ocoleda menkhan iń do artetʼgeń hamal ocoya. Ińren ạpuń doe cạbukteye dalletʼpea, menkhan iń do kidiń kaṭkomkoteń dalpea.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Nonkate raj do hoṛkoakʼ katha bae luturada. Siloren Ạhiạ hotete Probhu Isor do Nabatren hopon Jerobiamakʼ oka kathae menletʼ ona purạu lạgitʼ Isor khonge noa ghoṭna do hoyena. 
2Chronicles10:16 Israelkoko ńelkeda raj do onkoakʼ katha bae ańjomeda unre onko do rajko metadea, “Dạud cetanre jãhãn dạbiteakʼ do bạnukʼtalea. Jisạiren hopon cetanre aleakʼ ạidạri hõ bạnukʼtalea. E Israelko, ape do apan ạpin oṛakʼte ruạṛ calakʼpe. E Dạud, ńitokʼ amakʼ gusṭi do amtege ńel joṅme.” Onate Israelko do apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Chronicles10:17 Menkhan Jihudạ gusṭirenko reakʼ atoko ar nagrahakore okoe Israelkoko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan Rehobiam do onko cetanre rajokʼe ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles10:18 Ar okoe do kạmi lạgitʼko jormoṭ ocokʼkan tahẽkan ar onko cetanre okoeyakʼ bhar tahẽkan Rehobiam do uni Adoram Israelko ṭhene kolkadea, “Menkhan onko do dhirite uniko tiń gocʼkedea. Unre Rehobiam raj do acʼakʼ rãt gạḍire decʼkate Jerusalemteye dạṛkeda." 
2Chronicles10:19 Nonkate Israelko do Dạudren bõsko cetanreko hulkeda; ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onkage menakʼa. 
2Chronicles11:1 Jerusalem seṭerkate Rehobiam do Jihudạ ar Benjạmin gusṭiren sanam hoṛko lạṛhại lạgitʼe jarwaketʼkoa. Onate mitʼ lakh irạlgel hajar lạṛhại phạdko hoyena. Noa do hoyena jemon Israelko sãote lạṛhạikate rajosṭi do arhõ Rehobiamakʼ tireko ruạṛ ạguy. 
2Chronicles11:2 Menkhan Isorren hoṛ Semaya ṭhen Isorakʼ niạ katha do sodorena," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Am do Jihudạren raj Solomonren hopon Rehobiam ar Benjạmin ṭoṭharen sanam Israelko ar Jihudạrenkom metakoa," 
2Chronicles11:4 Probhu Isore meneda akoren boehako upạrte jemon lạṛhại do aloko oḍok calakʼ. Menkhan oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calakʼma, ente noa do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmikana.” Onate onko do Probhu Isorakʼ kathako bataoketʼte Jerobiam upạrte lạṛhại do ar bako senlena." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobiam do Jerusalemre girobasokʼe ehopʼena ar Jihudạ disạm rukhiyại lạgitʼ Bethlehem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:6  
2Chronicles11:7 Beth-Sur, Soko, Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gat, Maresa, Siph," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adorayim, Lakis, Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Sora, Aijalon ar Hebron ńutumanakʼ Jihudạ ar Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ adomakʼ atoko ar nagrahako do pạcriteye esetʼketʼte onakoe keṭecʼkeda." 
2Chronicles11:11 Uni do onako rukhiyại lạgitʼ subedarkoe dohoketʼkoa. Onḍe uni do onko lạgitʼ jomakʼko, sunumko ar darkha rasakoe dohokeda." 
2Chronicles11:12 Uni do onako ato ar nagrahakore ḍhal ar borlomkoe dohoketʼte onako do ạḍiye kajakketʼa. Nonkate Jihudạ ar Benjạmin ṭoṭha do acʼ gobolre tahẽyena. 
2Chronicles11:13 Israelren sanam ṭoṭharen naekeko ar Liwiko do uni secʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles11:14 Onko do akoren janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko ar sompottikoko bạgiyatʼte Jihudạ ar Jerusalemteko hecʼena, ente Jerobiam ar uniren hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ naeke hudạ khon onkoko ocokʼletʼkoa." 
2Chronicles11:15 Jerobiam do than boṭkocʼko lạgitʼ ar bạṛicʼ jiuko lạgitʼ ar acʼe benao ocolede mĩhũ muṭhạn lạgitʼ acʼren naekekoe bahalletʼkoa. 
2Chronicles11:16 Israelren sanam gusṭiko modre okoe do Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ sana baḍaejoṅ lạgitʼko udgạulen onko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte Liwiko soṅgekate Jerusalemteko hecʼena. 
2Chronicles11:17 Onko do pe bochor hạbicʼ Jihudạ rajosṭi ar Solomonren hopon Rehobiamakʼ tiko keṭecʼletʼtaea, ente niạ pe bochor do Dạud ar Solomonakʼ horteko taṛamleda." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobiam do Dạudren hopon Jerimotren hoponera Mahalate baplaledea. Mahalatren eṅgattetʼ do Abihayiel do Jisạiren hopon Eliabren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles11:19 Mahalatakʼ kukhire do Jeus, Semariạ ar Saham ńutuman pea hoponkoakʼ janam hoylena." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ona tayom Rehobiam do Absalomren hoponera Makaye baplakedea. Uniyakʼ kukhire do Ạbiạ, Atai, Sisa ar Selomit takoakʼ janam hoylena." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobiam do acʼren eṭakʼ bạhuko ar chuṭi erako khon Absalomren hoponera Maka do ạḍi bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛede kan tahẽkana. Uniren do jotote gel irạl bạhuko ar turui gel chuṭki erako, bargel irạl hoponko ar turui gel hoponerako tahẽkantaea." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobiam do Makaren hopon Ạbiạ do raj mente hoeocoye lạgitʼ uniren boehako mod khone maraṅkedea. 
2Chronicles11:23 Uniren adom hoponko do Jihudạ ar Benjạmin ṭoṭha reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ nagrahateye kolketʼkoa. Ar ạḍi utạr anajkoe ematʼkoa ar bạhukoe ńamatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehobiamakʼ raj hudạ tinre keṭecʼena are daṛe idiyena unre uni ar sãoten sanam Israelko do Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko bạgiyada. 
2Chronicles12:2 Probhu Isorre bepạtiạu iạte Rehobiamakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽakʼ bochorre Misorren Sisak raj do Jerusaleme akromonkeda. 
2Chronicles12:3 Sisak sãote do gelbar sae rãt gạḍiko, turui gel hajar aswariko ar alekha Lubiren, Sukiren ar Kusiren lạṛhại phạdko do Misor khonko hecʼlena." 
2Chronicles12:4 Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ nagrahakoe ạidạriante Jerusalem hạbicʼe hecʼena. 
2Chronicles12:5 Semaya nạbi do unre Rehobiam ar Jihudạ mukhiyạko ṭhene hecʼena. Onko mukhiyạko do Sis botorte Jerusalemre hecʼkateko jarwalena. Semaya do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘ape dope bạgi giḍiakadińạ, ona iạte iń do ńitokʼ Sisakakʼ tireń jimạ akatʼpea.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Onate raj ar Israelren mukhiyạko do apnartetʼ nindhạnenteko menkeda, “Probhu Isor doe dhoromgea.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Ar Probhu Isor do tinreye ńelkeda, onko do apnartetʼko nindhạnena unre uni do Semayaye metadea, “Onkoko nindhạn akante bạń marao utạrkote sạjại khon thoṛań aṛakʼkoa. Ińakʼ edre do Sisak hotete Jerusalem cetanre do bạń dul buhạu ocoya," 
2Chronicles12:8 menkhan onko do uni gobolre tahen hoyokʼtakoa. Onate iń sewawạń reakʼ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmren rajko sapʼsorako talare oka begartetʼ menakʼ onako bujhạu daṛeakʼa.” 
2Chronicles12:9 Misorren raj Sisak do Jerusaleme akromonketʼte Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam dhon-duribkoe idikeda. Uni do sanamakʼgeye idikeda, ar Solomone benao ocoletʼ sona reakʼ ḍhalko hõe idikeda." 
2Chronicles12:10 Onate Rehobiam raj do onako bodolte rupạ reakʼ ḍhalkoe benao ocokeda. Ar raj dolan reakʼ duạr ṭhen okoe lạṛhại phạdko horhoyetʼ tahẽkan onkoren senaputi ṭhen onako rukhiyại lạgitʼ bhare emkeda. 
2Chronicles12:11 Ar raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte tinreye bolokʼkan tahẽkana unre pahradarko do onako ḍhal sapʼkate uni sãoteko calakʼkan tahẽkana ar tayomte do pahra oṛakʼreko dohokakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles12:12 Rehobiam do apnartetʼe nindhạnlente uni cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ oka edre tahẽkan ona do thirena ar uni do bae marao ocolena. Unrehõ Jihudạre do thoṛa bhage hoṛko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles12:13 Rehobiam raj do Jerusaleme kajakkeda ar raje calao idikeda. Uni do tinre raje hoylena unre uniyakʼ umer do pongel mitʼ bochor umer tahẽkana. Israelren gusṭikoakʼ sanam jaegako modre okaṭakʼ nagraha do Probhu Isorakʼ tahen oṛakʼ menteye bachaoletʼ ona Jerusalem nagrahare Rehobiam do gel eae bochore rajlena. Rehobiamren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Nakʼama; uni do Amoni maejiue tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles12:14 Rehobiạm do Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼ bae moneyatʼte okaṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmikeda. 
2Chronicles12:15 Rehobiamakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha etohopʼ khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ do Semaya nạbiyakʼ olakʼ kana ar ńeńelicʼ Eddowakʼ olakʼ bõs tạlikare hõ ol menakʼa. Rehobiam ar Jerobiam talare do jaoge lạṛhại hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles12:16 Tayomte Rehobiam do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar Dạud nagrahareko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Ạbiại do raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles13:1 Jerobiamakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Abiạ do Jihudạren raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles13:2 Uni do Jerusalemre pe bochore rajlena. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Maka; uni do Gibiạ Uriạlren hoponerae tahẽkana. Abiạ ar Jerobiam talare lạṛhại hoylena. 
2Chronicles13:3 Unre Abiạ do pon lakh bachao akan lạṛhại birkoante lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok senena ar Jerobiam hõ irạl lakh bachao akan lạṛhại birko uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe sapṛaoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiạ do Ephrayem reakʼ buru ṭoṭhare Semarayim buru cetanre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Jerobiam ar Israelren sanam hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe." 
2Chronicles13:5 Ape do cetʼ bape baḍaea, Israelren Probhu Isor do jaejug reakʼ bondobos hotete Dạud ar uni bõsren hoṛko ṭhen jaejug hạbicʼ Israelko lạgitʼ raj hudại emakada mente?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Enhõ Dạudren hopon Solomonren guti Nabatren hopon Jerobiam do acʼren mạlik upạrteye hulkeda. 
2Chronicles13:7 Jerobiam do adomko okoḍa ar bhạṅgwạ hoṛko jarwakate Solomonren hopon Rehobiam upạrteye teṅgoyena. Ona jokhecʼ Rehobiam do juạn koṛa ar gạkhuṛ secʼte do komgeye tahẽkana; ar onko teṅgo daramko leka daṛe hõ baṅ tahẽkantaea. 
2Chronicles13:8 “Ńitokʼ Dạudren hoponkoakʼ tire Probhu Isorakʼ okaṭakʼ rajosṭi menakʼ ape do ona upạrte teṅgokʼpe menetʼkana. Ape do sạrige gadel lạṛhại phạdko kanape ar ape talare do sonaren mĩhũ muṭhạnko menakʼkoa ar Jerobiam do aperen debotako hoyokʼ lạgitʼte onkoe benao akatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles13:9 Ape do Probhu Isorren naekeko, metakʼme Aronren hoponko ar Liwikope laga ńir akatʼkoa ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmren hoṛko leka apnar lạgitʼ naekepe bahal akatʼkoa. Naeke lekate apnartetʼ begarokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãege mitʼṭen damkom ar eae goṭen bheḍae ạguko unige onko debotakoren naekeye hoedaṛeakʼa." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Menkhan ale do onka dole baṅkana, Probhu Isorge aleren Isor do. Ale do bale bạgi giḍiakadea. Okoeko naeke do Probhu Isorko sewawae kan onko do Aron bõsren hoṛ kanako, ar Liwiko hõ akoakʼ niṭ akatʼakʼ reakʼgeko kạmikana." 
2Chronicles13:11 Onko do dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅeda ar jut so dhupko jeretʼeda. Onko do saphawakʼ ṭebilre dohoakan samaṅakʼ piṭhạko sajao dohokakʼ kana ar din hilokʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼre diuheko jeretʼeda. Ale do aleren Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekatele kạmikana, menkhan ape do unipe bạgi giḍiakadea." 
2Chronicles13:12 Isor do ale sãore menaea; unikangeae aleren mukhiyạ do. Uniren naekeko do sakwako oroṅetʼte ape upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ ale sãote menaea. E Israelren hoṛko, aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor upạrte do alope lạṛhạiya, ente bape jo baha daṛeakʼa.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Jerobiam do hape hapete Jihudạren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ tayom secʼ mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdkoe kolketʼkoa; onate uniren mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdko do Jihudạ samaṅ secʼre ar mitʼ dol lạṛhại phạdko do Jihudạ tayom secʼreko tãṛãkʼena. 
2Chronicles13:14 Jihudạren hoṛko do ạcuren khanko ńelkeda, lạṛhại phạdko do ako samaṅ ar tayom banar secʼrege menakʼko. Unre onko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda. Ar naekeko do akoakʼ sakwako oroṅkeda ar Jihudạren hoṛko do lạṛhại lạgitʼko hohokeda. Ar onko do lạṛhại reakʼ tinreko hohokeda unre Abiạ ar Jihudạren hoṛko samaṅ khon Isor do Jerobiam ar sanam Israelkoe bhagaoketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles13:15  
2Chronicles13:16 Jihudạ samaṅ khon Israelko doko dạṛkeda ar Isor do Jihudikoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles13:17 Abia ar uniren hoṛko do ạḍi utạr hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Onate Israelkoren bachao akan hoṛko mod khon mõṛẽ lakh hoṛko gocʼena. 
2Chronicles13:18 Nonkate Israelren hoṛko doko bhagao ocoyena, ar Jihudạren hoṛ doko jitạuena, ente onko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor cetanreko bhorsalena." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abia do Jerobiame khudạukedea ar uni ti khon Bethel, Jesana ar Ephron nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ ṭoṭhakoe hatkeda." 
2Chronicles13:20 Abiạ oktere Jerobiam do ar bae daṛelena. Probhu Isor do uniye ńẽtʼkedea ar uni doe gocʼena. 
2Chronicles13:21 Ar Abiạ do daṛe idikʼtegeye tahẽyena. Uniren do gelpon bạhuko ar bargel bar hoponko ar gel turui hoponerako tahẽkantaea. 
2Chronicles13:22 Abiạwakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha ar uni okakoe roṛletʼ ona do Eddor nạbiyakʼ Itihãs puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles14:1 Tayomte Abiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar uni do Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Asa doe rajena. Asakʼ oktere disạmre gel bochor suluk tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre bhageakʼgeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles14:3 Uni do debotakoakʼ pinḍko, than boṭkocʼko ar pujạwakʼ dhirikoe rạputʼ gejer giḍikakʼ kan tahẽkana ar Asera muṭhạnko hõe makʼ giḍikada." 
2Chronicles14:4 Uni do Jihudạren hoṛko akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka senokʼ ar uniyakʼ ạn-ạriko ar hukumko manao idiy lạgitʼe metakokan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles14:5 Uni do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ mimitʼ atoko ar nagrahako reakʼ than boṭkocʼko ar dhudhup-pinḍkoe marao giḍikada. Uniyakʼ tabere rajosṭi do sulukte perecʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles14:6 Disạmre suluk tahẽkante adom adomakʼ atoko doe pạcri esetʼ ocokeda. Onako oktere Asa tulucʼ do okoe hõ bako lạṛhạiylena, ente Isor do sulukteye doholedea." 
2Chronicles14:7 Uni do Jihudạren hoṛkoe metatʼko tahẽkana, “Dela bon, noako ato beṛhaete pạcri bon benaoa ar onare usulge pahra oṛakʼ benaokate, phaṭok duạr ar huṛkạṛko bon benaoakʼa ar bon keṭeja. Disạm do ńit hõ aboakʼ tirege menakʼa, ente abo do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka bon calakʼ kana; onate joto secʼ khon uni do sulukreye doho akatʼbona.” Ar nonkate onko do jotowakʼ kạmireko jo bahayena." 
2Chronicles14:8 Jihudạ gusṭiwakʼ ṭoṭhare Asa rajren do ḍhal ar borlom akʼsen lạṛhại phạdko do pe lakh hoṛko tahẽkana, ar Benjạmin gusṭi reakʼ ṭoṭhare do ḍhal ar akʼ sar sasapʼko bar lakh irạlgel hajar lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. Noko sanamkoge bir baṅṭako tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles14:9 Tayomte Kus disạmren Seraho do gel lakh lạṛhại phạdko ar pe sae rãt gạḍiwante Jihudạren hoṛko upạrteye oḍok hecʼente Maresa hạbicʼe laha hecʼena. 
2Chronicles14:10 Unre Asa hõ uni upạrteye oḍok calaoena ar banar dolge Maresa ṭhenakʼ Sephata reakʼ buru lodamre lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaoena. 
2Chronicles14:11 Unre Asa do uniren Probhu Isor hohowadeteye metadea, “E Probhu Isor, cetʼleka daṛeankom goṛowako onkage am do nijorko hõm goṛo daṛeakoa. Ona iạte E aleren Probhu Isor, ale goṛowaleme baṛe, ente ale do am cetanrele bhorsakʼkana ar amakʼ ńutumtege noko maraṅ dolrenko upạrtele oḍok hecʼakana. E Probhu Isor, am kangeam aleren Isor do; manwa do am upạrte alom jitạu ocokoa.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Unre Asa ar Jihudạren hoṛko samaṅ khon Probhu Isor do Kusrenkoe ńẽtʼketʼkoa. Onate Kusren hoṛko doko dạṛkeda. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do Gera hạbicʼ onkoko khudạu idiketʼkoa. Ar Kusrenko do nunạkʼko gocʼketʼkoa onko do celege jiwetʼ bako sarecʼletʼkoa. Probhu Isor ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko samaṅre sanamgeko marao cabayena. Ar Jihudạren hoṛko do ạḍi utạr luṭakʼ jiniskoko ạgukeda. 
2Chronicles14:14 Onko do Gera beṛhaeteakʼ sanam atokoko marao giḍikada, ente onḍenko hoṛko do Probhu Isor ạḍiko botoradea. Ar luṭ reakʼ aema jinisko tahẽkante onko do onako atoko luṭkeda." 
2Chronicles14:15 Onko do mĩhũ meromko tahẽkantako hoṛakʼ tạmbuko ńẽtʼkeda ar onkoren bhiḍiko, meromko, ar ũṭkoko ạguketʼkoa. Ona tayom onko do Jerusalemteko ruạṛena." 
2Chronicles15:1 Isorren jiu do Obedren hopon Asariạ cetanreye decʼena. 
2Chronicles15:2 Unre Asariạ do Asa tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍok senenteye menkeda, “E Asa, E Jihudạ ar Benjạminren sanam hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Ape tinạkʼ din Probhu samaṅrepe tahen unạkʼ din uni hõ ape sãoteye tahẽna. Uniyakʼ monejoṅakʼ baḍaeteakʼ menakʼtape khan ona dope daṛeakʼa, menkhan unipe bạgiyae enḍekhan uni hõ apeye bạgi giḍipea." 
2Chronicles15:3 Israelko do ḍher din hạbicʼ sạri Isor chaḍa, naeke chaḍa ar ạn-ạriko chaḍageko calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles15:4 Menkhan duk reakʼ dinre onko do Israelren Probhu Isor secʼko ạcurente uniyakʼ monejoṅakʼ baḍaeko khojkeda arko baḍaekeda. 
2Chronicles15:5 Onako dinre jãhãte oḍok calakʼ ar hijukʼre jãhãn sulukge baṅ tahẽkana, ente sanam jaegare ạlmạlge tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles15:6 Mitʼ jạtrenko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko cetanre, mitʼ nagraharenko do eṭakʼ nagraharenko cetanre bạṛicʼ lạgitʼko kurumuṭukan tahẽkana, ente Isor ạḍi lekan be bhạlại iạteye kosṭoyetʼko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles15:7 Menkhan ape do daṛeanko hoyokʼpe, ar alope as chuṭạukʼa, ente kạmi reakʼ kuṛại dope ńamgea.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa do niạ katha ańjomkate, metakʼme Obedren hopon Asariạwakʼ nạbi katha ańjomkate dil hecʼadea. Uni do Jihudạ ar Benjạmin reakʼ goṭa ṭoṭha khon ehopʼkate ar acʼe ạidạriyan tahẽkan Ephrayim buru ṭoṭha reakʼ atoko ar nagrahako khon hirkhạwan murhutʼ boṅgakoe marao giḍikatʼkoa. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ pinḍạ samaṅre dohoakan Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ do arhõe benao arokeda." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ona tayom uni do Jihudạ ar Benjạinren sanam hoṛko ar Ephrayim, Manase ar Simeon ṭoṭhakoren okoeko hoṛ do onko talareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onkoe jarwa mitʼketʼkoa. Ar Probhu Isor do Asa sãote menaea menteko ńelketʼ khan Israelren ḍher hoṛgeko uni secʼena." 
2Chronicles15:10 Asawakʼ rajokʼ gel mõṛẽakʼ bochor reakʼ tesarakʼ candore noko hoṛko do Jerusalemre hecʼkateko jarwayalena. 
2Chronicles15:11 Ar okako jinisko luṭ ạguletʼ onako mod khon un jokhecʼ onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte eae sae ḍaṅgra ar eae hajar bhiḍiko samaṅketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles15:12 Onko do noako gokʼkeda, goṭa mon ar ontorte akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekako calakʼa mente;" 
2Chronicles15:13 ar onko modren huḍińko ar lạṭuko, herelko ar maejiuko jãhãege Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka bae calakʼ uni doe gocʼ giḍi ocokʼa." 
2Chronicles15:14 Onko do rạskạte ãṭ aṛaṅte sakwa ar pẽpṛẽtʼ oroṅate Probhu Isor ṭhenko kiriạyena. 
2Chronicles15:15 Niạ kiriạ iạte Jihudạ disạmren sanam hoṛ doko rạskạyena, ente goṭa ontortege onko doko kiriạlena. Onko do Isorakʼ monejoṅakʼko baḍae lạgitʼgeko khojletʼa arko baḍaekeda." 
2Chronicles15:16 Asa raj do acʼren goṛomtetʼ buḍhi Maka do rạni leka tahẽkantae hudạ khone ocokʼkedea, ente uni do hirkhạwạnicʼ Asera muṭhạne benaoleda. Ar Asa do ona muṭhạne makʼ rạputʼketʼte kedron soḍokʼre idikateye atar giḍikada." 
2Chronicles15:17 Uni do Israel khon than boṭkocʼko bae marao giḍi utạr daṛeatʼ tahẽkanre hõ uni do jiwetʼ bhor Probhu Isorgeye botoradea. 
2Chronicles15:18 Uni ar uniren apattetʼ okako sona-rupạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko Isor ńutumtekin begar doholetʼ onako do Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye idikeda. 
2Chronicles15:19 Asawakʼ rajokʼ pegel mõṛẽ bochor hạbicʼ ar jãhãn lạṛhạige baṅ hoylena. 
2Chronicles16:1 Asawakʼ rajokʼ pegel turui bochorre Israelren Basa raj do Jihudạren hoṛko upạrte senkate Rama nagraha do gaṛ lekae benao rakapʼkeda jemon okoe hõ Jihudạren raj Asa ṭhen aloko sen hecʼ daṛeakʼ. 
2Chronicles16:2 Unre Asa do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ar apnarakʼ raj khajańci oṛakʼ khon sona ar rupạkoe oḍokketʼte Aram disạmren raj Benhadad ṭhene kolkeda. Unre Benhadad do Damesek nagrahareye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ar Asa do uni ṭhen kathae roṛgotʼkada," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ińren ạpuń ar amren ạpum leka dela, alaṅ hõ mitʼṭecʼ laṅ bandhaokakʼrege. Iń do sona ar rupạko dan lekateń kolatʼmea. Am do ńitokʼ Israelren raj Basa sãote okaṭakʼem bandhao akatʼ ona baṛe rạpudme, enḍekhan uni do iń ṭhen khone ruạṛ calakʼa.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Asa rajakʼ kathate Benhadad doe rạjiyena ar Israelkoakʼ ato ar nagrahako upạrte acʼren subedarkoe kolketʼkoa. Onko do Ison, Dan, Abel-mayim ar Napthali atoko reakʼ sanam murại nagrahakoe hatkeda." 
2Chronicles16:5 Basa do niạ kathae ańjomketʼ khan Ramare gaṛ nagraha benaoe thirena. 
2Chronicles16:6 Unre Asa raj do Jihudạren sanam hoṛkoe ạguketʼkote Basa okako dhiri ar kaṭko beoharetʼ tahẽkan onako do Rama khone idikeda. Onakote uni do Geba ar Mispare gaṛ lekae benaokeda. 
2Chronicles16:7 Onako dinre ńeńelicʼ Hanani do hecʼkate Jihudạren Asa raje metadea, “Amren Probhu Isor cetanre bhorsa baṅkate am do Aramren raj cetanrem bhorsalente Aram rajren lạṛhại phạdko do amakʼ ti khonko puskucʼena." 
2Chronicles16:8 Kusrenko ar Lubiạko do ḍher rãt gạḍiko ar aswariko sudhạge cetʼ bako tahẽkana. Unre am do Probhu Isor cetanre bhorsa akanem tahẽkante uni do amakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles16:9 Okoe do Probhu Isorko botorae onko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do dhạrti reakʼ sanam jaegakore tahena. Am do lelhawakʼem kạmi akada. Ńit khon am do ghane ghạṛicʼ lạṛhạirem paṛaokʼa.” 
2Chronicles16:10 Niạ katha ańjomkate uni do ńeńelicʼ cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoente hajot khanareye bhoraokadea. Ar onako dinre Asa raj do adom hoṛko cetanreye julumkeda. 
2Chronicles16:11 Asa rajakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ “Jihudạ ar Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa raj rajokʼ pegel areakʼ bochorre uni do jaṅgare mitʼṭecʼ rog ńamkedea. Ar noa rog do sạrdi idiyentaere hõ uni do Probhu Isorakʼ goṛo hatao baṅkate eken ḍaktarkoakʼ goṛogeye hataokeda. 
2Chronicles16:13 Tayomte uniyakʼ rajokʼ pongel mitʼakʼ bochorre uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena. 
2Chronicles16:14 Ar ạḍi lekan jut so mosola ar aema lekan mońj so teakʼ jinisate aṭetʼreko giticʼkadea ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uni do acʼ lạgitʼ topa okareye ṭhik doholetʼ onḍegeko topakedea. Hoṛko do uni manote lạgitʼ maraṅ okocʼ seṅgelko jolkeda. 
2Chronicles17:1 Asawakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Jehosaphat raje hoyena. Uni do Israel upạrte apnartetʼe keṭecʼena. 
2Chronicles17:2 Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ sanam pạcrite esetʼ nagraha ar atokore lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa ar Jihudạ disạm ar uniren apate dokholan tahẽkan Ephrayim reakʼ atoko ar nagrahakore hõ lạṛhại phạdkoe dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles17:3 Probhu Isor do Jehosaphat sãoteye tahẽkana, ente uniren hapṛam Dạud pạhilre cetʼlekae calakʼkan tahẽkan onkage uni hõe calakʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do Bakʼal debota do baṅa bickom uniren hapṛamkoren Isorgeye dewa sewawae kan tahẽkana ar Israelko leka calakʼ baṅkate Isorakʼ hukum lekae calakʼ kan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles17:4
