2Chronicles17:5 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do uni tabere rajosṭiye ṭarhaokeda. Ar Jihudạren sanam hoṛko do Jehosaphat dan sandesko emadea; onate uniyakʼ dhon-durib do ḍherena ar manot hõ ḍherentaea. 
2Chronicles17:6 Probhu Isorakʼ horte calakʼ do ạḍi ahkaokʼ mon tahẽkantaea. Ona chaḍa uni do Jihudạ disạm khon than boṭkocʼko ar Asera-muṭhạnkoe marao giḍi utạrletʼa. 
2Chronicles17:7 Uniye rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre Jihudạ reakʼ sanam atokoren ar nagrahakoren hoṛko cetʼako lạgitʼ uniren guti Benhayil, Obadiạ, Sekariạ, Nathanel ar Mikay takoye kolketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles17:8 Onko sãote do Semaya, Nethania, Sebadia, Asahel, Semiramoth, Jehonatha, Adomiạ, Tobiạ ar Tob-adonia ńutuman adom Liwiko ar Elisama ar Jehoram ńutuman barea naeke kin tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles17:9 Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ puthi soṅgekate onko do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ sanam jaegare senkate ona khonko cetʼatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles17:10 Jihudạ disạm aḍepase reakʼ sanam rajosṭiko cetanre Probhu Isor ṭhen khon nonkan botor rakapʼatʼkoa onko do Jehosaphat sãote ar bako lạṛhạilena. 
2Chronicles17:11 Adom adom Philisṭiko do Jehosaphat ṭhen khajna lekate dan sandesko ar rupạkoko ạgukeda ar Arabrenko do eaehajar eaesae bheḍako ar eaehajar eaesae meromko emadea. 
2Chronicles17:12 Jehosaphat do onkate artetʼgeye daṛe idiyena. Uni do Jihudạ disạmre adomakʼ gaṛko ar murại nagrahakoe benaokeda. 
2Chronicles17:13 Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahakore aema jiniskoe jogao dohokada ar Jerusalemre do gạkhuṛ lạṛhại birkoe dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles17:14 Bõs lekate onkoakʼ lekha ar subedarkoakʼ ńutum do nonka leka tahẽkana: Jihudạ gusṭiko khon pạhilicʼ subedar Adna ar uniren pe lakh gạkhuṛ lạṛhại birko; 
2Chronicles17:15 dosaricʼ subedar Jehohanan ar uniren bar lakh irạlgel hajar lạṛhại birko; 
2Chronicles17:16 tesaricʼ subedar do Sikri hopon Amasiạ ar uniren bar lakh lạṛhại birko. Amasiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmire kusite apnartetʼe emlena. 
2Chronicles17:17 Benjạmin gusṭirenko khon namḍak birbanṭaren subedar Eliyada ar uniren akʼ sar ar ḍhal sasapʼ bar lakh lạṛhại birko; 
2Chronicles17:18 dosaricʼ subedar Jehosabad ar uniren mitʼ lakh irạl gel hajar gạkhuṛ lạṛhại birko; 
2Chronicles17:19 Noko lạṛhại birko do rajakʼ kạmi lạgitʼko bahal ocoakan tahẽkana. Noko chaḍa hõ Jihudạ reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ ato ar nagrahakore hõ lạṛhại phạdko doho ocolena. 
2Chronicles18:1 Jehosaphatakʼ do ạḍi utạr dhon duribko tahẽkantaea ar manot hõ tahẽkana. Uni do bapla hotete Ahab tulucʼ gateye hoylena. 
2Chronicles18:2 Thoṛa bochor tayom Ahab sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ uni do Samariạteye senena. Ahab do uni ar uni sãoten hoṛko jom ocoko lạgitʼ aeme bhiḍi ar ḍaṅgrakoe gurketʼkoa. Israelren raj Ahab do Jihudạren Jehosaphat raj do Ramot-gileade akromon iạte acʼ tulucʼ calakʼ lạgitʼ nehõradeteye metadea, “Ramot-gilead upạrte cetʼ iń soṅgetem calakʼa. Jehosaphate roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń ar am, ińren hoṛ ar amren hoṛko doko mitʼgea; ale do am sãote lạṛhại calakʼ lạgitʼle rạjigea.”" 
2Chronicles18:3  
2Chronicles18:4 Tobe Jehosaphat raj do Israelren raj niạ katha hõe metadea, “Pạhilte am do Probhu Isorakʼ solha hataome.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Onate Israelren raj do nạbikoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. Ar onkoakʼ lekha do ponsae tahẽkana. Uni do onkoe kuliketʼkoa, “Ramot-gilead upạrte lạṛhại bon calakʼa se bon ikạkakʼa?” Onkoko menkeda, “Do calakʼme, ente Isor do rajakʼ tire onae jimạ akada.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Menkhan Jehosaphate menkeda, “Nonḍe Probhu Isorren jãhãe nạbi do cetʼ bạnukʼkoa one bon kuli daṛekeko?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Israelren raj do Jihudạren Jehosaphat raje metadea, “Ńit hõ nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛ menaea one uni hotete Probhu Isor ṭhen bon kuli daṛeke, menkhan iń do uniń kurudae kana, ente uni do ińakʼ bhạlại reakʼ katha do tishõ bae roṛ akada, ar jao ghuṛi ińakʼ bạṛicʼ reakʼ kathageye roṛa. Uni doe hoyokʼkana Imlạ hopon Mika.” Unre Jehosaphate roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Raj do onka baṛe aloe roṛma.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Unre Israelren raj do acʼren mitʼṭen guti hohowadeteye metadea, “Am do ńitge Imlạ hopon Mika hoho ạguyem." 
2Chronicles18:9 Israelren raj ar Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat do raj posak horokʼkate Samariạ nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen guhum saphae khạrạire unkin do ạkinakʼ siṅghạsonre kin duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar sanam nạbiko do unkin samaṅre tayom daram dinko reakʼko nạbiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles18:10 Unre Kenanren hopon Sedekiạ do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ dereńe benaokan tahẽkana uni doe menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, Aramrenko ạuriko marao utạrokʼ hạbicʼ am do noatem rokʼ pạsirkoa.”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Eṭakʼ nạbiko hõ inạ kathageko menkeda. Onko doko menkeda, “Ramot-gileadte rakapʼ calakʼme ar jitạukʼme, ente Probhu Isor do maharajakʼ tire onae jimạ akada.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do Mika hoho ạguye lạgitʼe senlen uni do nạbiye metadea, “Ńelme, eṭakʼ nạbiko do jotoge rajakʼ jo bahakʼ reakʼ kathageko meneda. Amakʼ katha hõ onkoakʼ katha hõ onkoakʼ leka jemon hoyokʼ ma. Ar bhạlại reakʼ kathage roṛme.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Menkhan Mika doe menkeda, “Jiwetʼ Isorre kiriạkateń meneda, ińren Isor okae roṛ ińhõ inạgeń roṛa.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Ado Mikại hecʼen khan raj do uniye kulikedea, “E Mika, ale do cetʼ Ramot-gilead upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼle rakapʼ calakʼa se baṅa?” Mika doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ma rakapʼ calakʼpe, ona akromonpe ar jitạukʼpe, ente onḍenko hoṛ do apeakʼ tireko jimạ ocoakana.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Raj do uniye metadea, “Ar tinạkʼ dhao kiriạ kateń metama, Probhu Isor ńutumte sạriyakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge alom mena mente?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Mikại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińiń ńelkeda, Israelko do gupiyicʼ begor bhiḍi leka buru cetanreko chirchạtur akana. Onate Probhu Isore meneda, ‘nokoren do cele mạlikge bạnukʼkotakoa, onate onko do sulukte apan ạpin oṛakʼteko ruạṛ joṅma.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Unre Israelren raj Jehosaphate menkeda, “Cetʼ laharege bạń men akawatʼmea, uni do iń reaṅ bạṛicʼakʼ chaḍa bhạlại reakʼ katha do bae mena?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikạ do roroṛe ehopʼena, “Enḍekhan Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe. Iń doń ńelkeda Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana ar uniyakʼ jojomsa ar leṅgasa aṛere do sermaren sanam goḍetko menakʼkoa." 
2Chronicles18:19 Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, ‘Ramot-gilead akromon lạgitʼ Israelren raj Ahab do okoe onḍeye bulạu idiyea jemon uni do onḍegeye gujukʼ? Unre mimitʼ hoṛ do mimitʼ leka kathako roṛkeda." 
2Chronicles18:20 Mucạtʼre mitʼṭen jiu do hecʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, ‘ińiń bulạu idiyea.’ Probhu Isor do uniye kulikedea, ‘cetʼ lekatem bulạueya?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Uni doe menkeda, ‘iń do senkate uniren sanam nạbikoakʼ mocare eṛe roroṛ jiu iń hoyokʼa.’ Probhu Isore menkeda, ‘amge uni dom bulạu idi daṛeaea. Amge senkate onkaeme.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ amren noko nạbikoakʼ mocare eṛe roṛren jiue emakadea. Amakʼ ḍahao maraokʼ lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do am lạgitʼ bạṛicʼakʼgeye men akada. 
2Chronicles18:23 Unre Kenanren hopon Sedekiạ do sen sorente johare Mikai thapakedeteye metadea, “Probhu Isorren jiu am tulucʼ katha roṛ lạgitʼ iń ṭhen khon oḍokkate oka horteye senlena?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Am do enhilokʼgem baḍae daṛeakʼa one oka hilokʼ okokʼ lạgitʼ bhitri oṛakʼtem bolokʼ.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Israelren raj do noae hukumatʼkoa, “Mikạ do nagraharen subedar Amon ar Joas ṭhen arhõ kol ruạṛkaepe." 
2Chronicles18:26 Unkinpe metakinạ raje men akada nui do jemon hajotreye doho ocokʼ ar nirạite raj ạuriye ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ uni do thoṛa dakʼ ar thoṛa piṭhạ chaḍa ar cetʼge alope emaya.” 
2Chronicles18:27 Unre Mikai menkeda, “Nirạitem ruạṛ hecʼlen khan baḍaeme Probhu Isor do iń hotete katha bae roṛakada.” Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Ape sanamkoge ińakʼ katha ańjom dohokakʼpe.”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Inạ tayom Israelren Ahab raj ar Jihudạren Jehosaphat raj do Ramot gilead akromon lạgitʼ kin senena. 
2Chronicles18:29 Ahab do Jehosaphate metadea, “Hoṛko jemon aloko orom daṛeạń onate iń do eṭakʼ posak horokʼ kateń lạṛhạiya, menkhan am do amakʼ raj posakge horogme. Ar niạ menkate Israelren raj do eṭakʼ posak horokʼkate lạṛhại lạgitʼe senena." 
2Chronicles18:30 Aramren raj do acʼren rãt gạḍiren subedarko noae hukumatʼko tahẽkana, “Ape do Israelren raj chaḍa ar okoe sãotehõ alope lạṛhạiya.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Rãt gạḍiren subedarko do Jehosaphat ńelteko hudiskeda, uni kangeae Israelkoren raj do. Onate onko do ạcurente uni akromone lạgitʼko senena menkhan Jehosaphat doe kikiạu gotʼkeda, unre Probhu Isor do uniye goṛowadea ar onate onko do uni ṭhen khonko calaoena." 
2Chronicles18:32 Onate subedarkoko bujhạukeda, uni do Israelren raj doe baṅkana, onate ar bako khudạuledea." 
2Chronicles18:33 Menkhan mitʼṭen hoṛ do ạuṛige acʼakʼ sare aṛakʼketʼ khan Israelren raj do tala koṛamre bitʼadea. Unre raj do acʼren rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoyicʼe metadea, “Rãt gạḍi ạcurme ar lạṛhại tala khon bahrete idiyińme. Ente iń doń ghạl akana.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Goṭa din bhor ạḍi botor lạṛhại hoyena ar Israelren raj do Aramrenko samaṅrege rãt gạḍire duṛupʼ akane tahẽyena, ar siń cando hạsurokʼ jokhecʼ doe gocʼena." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat do Jerusalemte acʼakʼ raj doṅgolte nirạiteye ruạṛ hecʼena. 
2Chronicles19:2 Unre Hananren hopon ńeńelicʼ Jehu do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Bạṛicʼ hoṛko goṛowako ar okoe do Probhu Isorko hirkhạwae onko dulạṛko am do cetʼ lek getama? Ona iạte Probhu Isorakʼ edre do am cetanre pheḍ hecʼakana." 
2Chronicles19:3 Tobe amre thoṛa bhageakʼ hõ menakʼa, ente am do disạmren Asera-muṭhạnkom marao giḍi akatʼkoa ar Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ monem keṭecʼakada.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehosaphat do Jerusalemreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Uni do Ber-seba khon ehopʼkate Ephrayim reakʼ buru ṭoṭha hạbicʼ hoṛko ṭhen senkate onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor secʼ arhõ mone ruạṛketʼtakoa. 
2Chronicles19:5 Uni do disạm talare, metakʼme Jihudạ reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ pạcrite esetʼ ato ar nagrahakore bikʼcạrkoe bahalketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles19:6 Uni do bikʼcạrkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do sontorte jotowakʼpe kạmiya, ente jãhãe manwa lạgitʼ do baṅa bickom Probhu Isor lạgitʼgepe bicạra. Bicạr reakʼ ray emokʼ oktere uni do ape sãoteye tahena." 
2Chronicles19:7 Probhu Isorge baṛe botoraepe. Ar sontorte bicạrpe, ente behok, mẽtʼãhã beṅgetʼakʼ ar ghus jojomko tulucʼ aboren Isorakʼ do cetʼ helmelge bạnukʼtaea.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Jehosaphat do Jerusalemre hõ Probhu Isor huyạte bikʼcạr reakʼ ray emokʼ lạgitʼ ar jhogṛa jhạṭi miṭ maṭkatako lạgitʼ adom Liwiko, naekeko ar Israel bõsren mathakoe bahalketʼkoa. Raj ar uniren hoṛko do Jerusalemteko ruạṛ hecʼen khan uni do bikʼcạrkoe hukumatʼkoa, “Probhu Isorge botoraepe ar pạtiạr salakʼ goṭa monte kạmipe." 
2Chronicles19:9  
2Chronicles19:10 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ato ar nagrahakore girobasokʼ kan hoṛko ṭhen khon jãhã lekan mamblage hijukʼ: baṅ do mãyãm joro ocoakanakʼ, baṅ do ạn-ạri ar niạmko, baṅ do hukumkoge: ape do onkope sontorkoa jemon Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre dusi aloko hoyokʼ. Ar baṅ khan ape ar aperen hoṛko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do pheḍ hijukʼa. Ar nonkage kạmipe, jemon dusi alope hoyokʼ." 
2Chronicles19:11 “Probhu Isor do sanamakʼre maraṅ naeke Amoriạ ar rajakʼ jotowakʼre Jihudạ gusṭiren mukhiyạ Ismael ren hopon Sebadia do ape cetanrekin bahal ocoyena, ar Liwiko do apeko goṛowapea. Ape do dil salakʼpe kạmiya. Ar okoe dhorom reakʼe kạmi Probhu Isor do uni sãotegeye tahena.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Inạ tayom Moabrenko, Amonrenko ar Meyunikoren adom hoṛko do Jehosaphat upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼena." 
2Chronicles20:2 Unre adom hoṛko do hecʼkate Jehosaphatko metadea, “Doreão hanasa Aram disạm khon maraṅ mitʼ lạṛhại phạdko do am upạrteko hijukʼ kana. Onko do Hasason-tamar, metakʼme Engedireko seṭerakana.”" 
2Chronicles20:3 Onate Jehosaphat do botor caṛhaoadeteye goṭawana, Probhu Isor ṭhen goṛoye hataoa mente. Uni do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ikore upạs reakʼe lại sodorkeda." 
2Chronicles20:4 Jihudạren hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena; ar Jihudạ reakʼ sanam atoko khon hõ hoṛko hecʼena. 
2Chronicles20:5 Unre Jehosaphat do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ nãwã racare Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko samaṅre teṅgoyenteye menkeda," 
2Chronicles20:6 “E Probhu, aleren hapṛamkoren Isor, am dom semaren Isor kana. Am do sanam jạtrenkoakʼ rajosṭikom ḍanṭaoeda. Daṛe ar ektiạri do amakʼ tirege ar celege am do bako teṅgo daram daṛeama." 
2Chronicles20:7 E aleren Isor, amren hoṛ Israelko samaṅ khon niạ disạmren hoṛkom laga ńirketʼkote amren guti Abraham bõsren hoṛko jaejug lạgitʼem em akatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles20:8 Onko do onḍeko girobasokʼ kana ar am lạgitʼge mitʼṭecʼ sonot oṛakʼ benaokateko menakada," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘jãhãn muhinko ale cetanre hecʼpaṛaokʼ- baṅ do lạṛhại, baṅ do mahamạri ar baṅ do akal-enḍekhan ale do niạ oṛakʼ samaṅre, metakʼme am samaṅrele teṅgona, ente am do niạ oṛakʼregem tahẽnkana. Aleakʼ kosṭo jokhecʼ ale do am ṭhengele raga, ar aleakʼ rakʼ joṅakʼem ańjomtalete alem bańcaolea.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Ńitokʼ do Amonrenko, Moabrenko ar Seyir bururen hoṛko nonḍeko hecʼakana. Israelko tinre Misor khonko oḍok hecʼlena unre am do onkoakʼ disạmte bam bolo ocowatʼko tahẽkana. Ar onatege onko bako marao cabako baṅkate onko ṭhen khonko calaolena." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ạidạri lekate okaṭakʼ sompotti alem emakatʼle, ńitokʼ ńelme onko do ona bodolte nonḍe khon laga oḍokle lạgitʼko hijukʼkana." 
2Chronicles20:12 E aleren Isor, am do cetʼ bam bicạrkoa? Noko maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko teṅgo daramko lạgitʼ daṛe aleakʼ do bạnukʼ talea. Ar cetʼle cekaya ona hõ bale baḍaea, menkhan eken am secʼgele koyokʼ hor akada.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Unre Jihudạren sanam hoṛko do akoren maejiuko, hoponko, hoponerako ar gidrạko salakʼ Probhu Isor samaṅreko teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles20:14 Unre onko modren Jahasiyel ńutuman Asaph bõsren mitʼṭen Liwi cetanre Probhu Isorren jiu doe decʼena. Jahasiyel do Sekariạren hopone tahẽkana, Sekariạ do Benayaren hopone tahẽkana, Benaya do Jaiyelren hopone tahẽkana ar Jaiyel do Mataniạren hopone tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles20:15 Jahasiyele menkeda, “E Jehosaphat raj ar okoe do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemrepe girobasokʼ kan, ape sanamkoge ańjompe. Probhu Isor do ape ṭhen niạ kathae roṛeda, ‘onko maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko ńelte alope botorokʼa se alope as chuṭạukʼa. Niạ lạṛhại do apeakʼ do baṅ kana, Isorakʼ kana." 
2Chronicles20:16 Gapa ape do onko upạrtepe oḍok calakʼa. Ar unre onko do Sisko metakʼ buru horteko rakapʼ hijukʼa. Ape do Jeruel ńutumanakʼ hahaṅkar ṭhenakʼ tala otet secʼre onkope ńapamkoa. 
2Chronicles20:17 Niạ lạṛhạire ape do bape lạṛhạiya. E Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, ape do sạr sạrte teṅgokʼpe ar Probhu Isor oka lekae bańcaope ona baṛe ńelpe. Ar alope botorokʼa ar alope as chuṭạukʼa. Gapage onko upạrte oḍok senokʼpe ar Probhu Isor do ape soṅgereye tahena.’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Unre Jehosaphat do otreye ombakʼena ar Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko hõ Probhu Isor samaṅre otreko ombakʼena. 
2Chronicles20:19 Ona tayom Kohatren ar Korahe bõsren Liwiko do teṅgoyente ãṭ aṛaṅte Israelren Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea. 
2Chronicles20:20 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre onko do Tekoa hahaṅkar secʼko oḍok calaoena. Ar oḍok calakʼ lahare Jehosaphat do teṅgoyenteye metatʼkoa, “E Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Ape do aperen Probhu Isor cetanre bhorsa dohoype, enḍekhanpe ṭarhao tahẽ daṛeakʼa. Uniren nạbiko cetanre pạtiạu dohoype, ar onatepe jo bahakʼa.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Jehosaphat do hoṛko sãoteye sopolhaketʼte Probhu Isor ńutumte sereń ar uniyakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ sonottetʼ sarhaotae lạgitʼ hoṛkoe bahalketʼkoa jemon onko do lạṛhại phạdko laha lahate niạ kathako roṛ idi, “Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ente uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼkana.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Hoṛko tinre sereń ar sarhaoko ehopʼena unre Probhu Isor do Jihudạko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ hijukʼkan Amonrenko, Moabrenko ar Seyir bururen hoṛko upạrte lạṛhại phạdkoe tãṛãkʼ dohokatʼkoa. Ar unre Amonrenko ar Moabren hoṛko do Seyir bururen hoṛko upạrteko rakapʼ calaoen khan sanamkoko gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. Ar Seyirrenko gocʼ cabaketʼko khan onko do ako ako mapakʼ gopocʼko dhurạuena. Ar nonkate onko doko bhagao ocoyena." 
2Chronicles20:23  
2Chronicles20:24 Jihudạren hoṛko do hahaṅkar reakʼ usul pahra oṛakʼte seṭerkate maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko secʼko koyokʼkeda ar mạ̃ṛĩko do otre giḍi akanko ńelkeda; ar okoege bako paskao akan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles20:25 Unre Jehosaphat ar uniren hoṛko do luṭ reakʼ jinisko ạguy lạgitʼko senen khan onako mạ̃ṛĩ sãote nunạkʼ jinisko, kicricʼko ar dhon duribko ńamkeda, onko do bako idi caba daṛeada. Luṭ reakʼ jinisko nunạkʼ tahẽkana ona luluṭ cabaete pe din lagaoatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ponakʼ dinre onko do Beraka reakʼ buru tala otetreko jarwayente Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea. Ona iạte teheń hõ ona jaega do Beraka buru tala otetko metakʼkana (metakʼme, “sarhaoakʼ”)." 
2Chronicles20:27 Ona tayom Jehosaphat tayom tayomte Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko do rạskạkʼ salakʼ Jerusalemteko ruạṛ calaoena, ente onkoren bạiriko cetanre Probhu Isor doe jitạu ocoketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles20:28 Onko do binạ banam, peṛesaṅ ar sakwa oroṅ oroṅte Jerusalemte ruạṛ hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko boloyena." 
2Chronicles20:29 Israelren bạiriko upạrte Probhu Isor do cetʼ lekae lạṛhạiyen ona katha ańjomkate eṭakʼ disạmren sanam hoṛko do Probhu Isor reaṅ mitʼṭecʼ botor hecʼatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles20:30 Onate Jehosaphat raj do sulukteye tahẽyena, ente uniren Isor do sanam secʼtege suluke emade tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles20:31 Jehosaphat do pegel mõṛẽ bochor umerre Jihudạren raje hoylena ar bargel mõṛẽ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Asuba tahẽkana; uni do Silhiren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles20:32 Jehosaphat do acʼren apattetʼ Asawakʼ hortegeye taṛametʼ tahẽkana ar tishõ ona hor do bae bạgiyada. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles20:33 Menkhan than boṭkocʼko do unhõ bae marao utạrleda, ente hoṛko do hapṛamkoren Isor secʼ unhõ mon bako ạcurakatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles20:34 Jehosaphatakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha do etohopʼ khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ Hananiren hopon Jehuye olleda; ar ona do “Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles20:35 Tayomte Jihudạren raj Jehosaphat do Israelren raj Ahasia sãoteye mitʼena. Ar Ahasiạ do bedhoromakʼe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles20:36 Jehosaphat do uni sãote mitʼkate Tạrsiste calakʼ lạgitʼ adomakʼ lạṭu lạtu jahaj benao lạgitʼe rạjiyena. Onako do Esion-geberreko benaokeda. 
2Chronicles20:37 Unre Maresaren Dodayahuren hopon Elieser do Jehosaphat upạrte noae nạbikeda, “Ahasia sãote mitʼte okam benao akatʼ ona do Probhu Isore rạputʼ gejera.” Tayomte onako jahaj do rạputʼena, ar Tạrsistehõ bae calao daṛeada." 
2Chronicles21:1 Tayomte Jehosaphat do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. Ar uni bodolte uniren hopon Jehoram do raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles21:2 Uniren boehako, metakʼme Jehosaphatren hoponkoakʼ ńutum do nonka leka tahẽkana, Asaria, Jehiyel, Sekariạ, Asaria, Mikayel ar Sephatiạ. Noko sanamkoge Israelren raj Jehoshapatren hoponko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles21:3 Onkoren apattetʼ do sona, rupạ, ar damanakʼ jinisko ar Jihudạ disạmre pạcrite esetʼ ato ar nagrahakoe ematʼkoa, menkhan Jehoram do maraṅicʼ hopone tahẽkante uni do rajosṭiye emade tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles21:4 Jehoram do acʼ apattetʼakʼ rajosṭi apnar gobolreye ạguketʼteye keṭecʼkeda. Uni do acʼren sanam boehako ar Israelren adom adom lạṭu hudạren hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoram do pegel bar bochor umer tahẽkantaere raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre irạl bochor raje calaoketʼa. 
2Chronicles21:6 Ar Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛko lekage uni do Israelren rajkoakʼ horteye calakʼkan tahẽkana, ente uni do Ahabren mitʼṭen hoponerae baplaledea. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles21:7 Enhõ Probhu Isor do Dạud lạgitʼ okae bondobose bandhaoletʼ onate uniyakʼ bõsko do bae marao utạrleda. Uni do Dạud ar uni bõsrenko jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ mạli emakoa menteye gokʼletʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles21:8 Jehoram oktere Edom disạmren hoṛko do Jihudạ upạrte hulkate ako lạgitʼ mitʼṭenko rajkedea. 
2Chronicles21:9 Onate Jehoram do acʼren subedarko ar rãt gạḍikoante onḍeye senena. Ar Edomrenko do uni ar uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiren subedarkoko gherao esetʼketʼkoa, menkhan uni do ńindạ jokhecʼ beretʼente Edomrenko ar onkoren rãt gạḍiren mukhiyạkoe ńẽtketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles21:10 Onate Edomrenko do teheń hạbicʼ Jihudạ upạrteko bhiṅgṛạu akana. Jehoram do acʼren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isore bạgi akawade tahẽkante Libnarenko hõ ona jokhecʼko hulkeda. 
2Chronicles21:11 Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ burukore than boṭkocʼkoe benaokeda ar ona lạgitʼ Jerusalemren hoṛko do boṅgako sewawakoko ehopʼena ar Jihudạren hoṛko do bạṛicʼ horteko senena. 
2Chronicles21:12 Unre Jehoram do Eliạ nạbi ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhiye ńamkeda. Onare ol tahẽkana, “Amren hapṛam Dạudren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘am do amren ạpum Jehosaphat se Jihudạren Asa rajakʼ horte do bam taṛameda, menkhan Israelren rapajko lekagem taṛameda. Am iạte Ahab bõsren hoṛko leka Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko do boṅga sewa secʼko ạcur akana. Ona chaḍa am do amren boehakom gocʼ ocoakatʼkoa, onko do am khon hõ bhagegeko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles21:13  
2Chronicles21:14 Onate Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ amren hoṛko, amren hoponko ar amren bạhuko cetanre mahamạriye paṛao ocoya ar amakʼ sanam sompottikoe maraotama." 
2Chronicles21:15 Ar am do lacʼre maraṅ rog paṛaoama ar ona rog iạte amakʼ lacʼ do bogocʼ oḍokokʼ tama.’ ” 
2Chronicles21:16 Probhu Isor do Jehoram upạrte Philisṭiko ar Kusrenko sorre okoe Arabrenko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onkoakʼ monre bạiri lekae hoyocoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles21:17 Onko do Jihudạrenko akromonketʼkoa ar onḍe bolokate raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼ jinisko, Jehoramren hoponko ar uniren bạhukoko bondi idiketʼkoa. Uniren huḍińicʼ hopon Jehoahas chaḍa ar celege bako sarecʼlena." 
2Chronicles21:18 Niạko ghoṭna tayom Probhu Isor do Jehoramakʼ lacʼre nonkan mitʼṭecʼ roge kolkeda ona do ar baṅ beslentaea. 
2Chronicles21:19 Ar dosar bochor reakʼ mucạtʼ secʼ ona ruạ iạte uniyakʼ lacʼ do bogocʼ oḍokentaea ar ạḍi kosṭo ńamkateye gocʼena. Hoṛko do uniren hapṛamko manotko lạgitʼ cetʼleka seṅgelko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onka do bako kạmileda. 
2Chronicles21:20 Jehoram do pegel bar bochor umerre raje hoylena ar irạl bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniyakʼ gujukʼre okoe hõ bako duklena. Ar Dạudakʼ nagrahare uniko topakadea menkhan rapajkoakʼ topare do bako baeledea. 
2Chronicles22:1 Jerusalemren hoṛko do Jehoramren huḍińicʼ hopon Ahasia do apattetʼakʼ jaegareko rajkedea, ente luluṭko do Arabrenko sãote luluṭ hecʼkate Jehoramren sanam hoponkoko gocʼletʼkoa. Onatege Jihudạren raj Jehoramren hopon Ahasiạ do rajokʼe ehopʼena." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahasiạ do bargel bar bochor umerre raje hoylena ar mitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Athaliạ tahẽkana; uni do Omriren goṛomtetʼ kuṛiye tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles22:3 Ahasiạ hõ Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ hortegeye taṛametʼ tahẽkana, ente uniren eṅgattetʼ do bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ sopolhae emaekan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles22:4 Ahasiạ do Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛko lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana, ente uniren apatakʼ gujukʼ tayom ona bõsren hoṛkoge uni do sopolhako emaekan tahẽkana. Onate uni doe ńurena." 
2Chronicles22:5 Onkoakʼ sopolha leka uni do Israelren Ahab rajren hopon Jehoram sãote Ramot-gileadte Aramren raj Hosael upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok calaoena. Unre Aramrenko do Jehoramko ghạlkedea. Ar ona ghạl khon bogekʼ lạgitʼ Jehoram do Jisriyelteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ahabren hopon Jehoram doe ghạl akan tahẽkante Jihudạren raj Jehoramren hopon Ahasiạ do uni ńele lạgitʼ Jisriyelteye calaoena. 
2Chronicles22:6  
2Chronicles22:7 Ar noa hotete Isor do Ahasiại ńur ocokedea. Ahasiạ do onḍe seṭerkate Joram sãote Nimsiren hopon Jehu upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe calaoena. Nui Jehuge Probhu Isor do Ahabakʼ bõsko ḍahao marao lạgitʼe bahalledea. 
2Chronicles22:8 Jehu do tinre Ahabakʼ bõsren hoṛkoe sạjạiyetʼko tahẽkana unre uni do Ahasiạren gokʼṛoko Jihudạren mukhiyạko ar uniren sanam boehakoren hoponkoe ńelńamketʼko khan onkoe gocʼketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles22:9 Ona tayom uni do Ahasiạ sendraye lạgitʼe oḍokena. Ahasiạ do unre Samariạreye oko akan tahẽkana ar hoṛko do uniko sapʼkedete Jehu ṭhen idikateko gocʼkedea. Arko topakadea, ente onkoko metade tahẽkana, “Nui do Jehosaphat ren goṛomtetʼ koṛa kanae uni do goṭa ontorte Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekae calakʼkan tahẽkan.” Ar Ahasiạwakʼ bõsre raj hoyokʼ leka ektiạri do okoeyakʼge baṅ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ahasiạren eṅgattetʼ do tinreye ńelkeda acʼren hopon doe gocʼ ocoyena unre uni do Jihudạ rajren sanam hoponkoe gocʼ giḍikatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles22:11 Menkhan sanam raj hoponko ạuriko gocʼ ocokʼre Jehoram rajren hoponera Ahasiạren misera Jehosaba do Ahasiạren hopon Joase kombṛo idikedea. Ar Athaliạ ṭhen khon okore dohoye lạgitʼge Jehosaba do Joas ar uniren jokʼtonicʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼreye dohokatʼkinạ. Onate Athaliạ do uni bae gocʼ daṛeadea. Jehosaba do naeke Jehoyadaren bạhui tahẽkante Athaliạ oka turui bochor disạmreye rajokʼkan tahẽkan onako dinre Joas do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre okogeye tahẽyena. 
2Chronicles22:12  
2Chronicles23:1 Eaeakʼ bochorre Jehoyada do apnartetʼe daṛeyente Jehoramren hopon Asariạ, Jehohanan hopon Ismael, Obedren hopon Asariạ, Adayren hopon Maseya ar Sikri hopon Elisaphat teko sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaokeda. Noko sanamkoge sae saeko cetanren subedarko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles23:2 Noko do Jihudạ reakʼ sanam jaegare senkate sanam nagraha ar atoko khon Liwiko ar Israelkoren sanam bõsren mukhiyạkoe jarwa mitʼketʼkoa. Onko do Jerusalemte hecʼkate jotoko mitʼdomte Isorakʼ oṛakʼre Joas raj tulucʼ mitʼṭecʼko bondoboskeda. Jehoyada do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Dạudren bõsko babotre Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe gokʼ akatʼ ona lekate rajren hoponge rajosṭi doe calaoa." 
2Chronicles23:3  
2Chronicles23:4 Ńitokʼ apeakʼ kạmi do hoyokʼa: okoeko naeke ar Liwiko jirạukʼ mãhãre mundilreko kạmi onkoren pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińrenko do phaṭok duạrpe horhoea," 
2Chronicles23:5 pe hạṭiń reakʼ dosar hạṭińrenko do raj oṛakʼpe pahraea ar pe hạṭiń reakʼ tesar hạṭińrenko do asolakʼ duạr ṭhenpe tahena ar sarecʼ sanamko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bakher racareko tahena. 
2Chronicles23:6 Naekeko ar sapʼsosor kạmire tahen Liwiko chaḍa ar okoe hõ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre do bako bolokʼa. Onko doko bolokʼa, ente onko do Isor ńutumteko begar doho ocoakana, menkhan eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka bahrereko tahẽna." 
2Chronicles23:7 Ar Liwiko do apan ạpin khanḍa bhanḍa sapʼkate raj beṛhaeteko tahena. Ar jãhãege mundil oṛakʼteye bolokʼ unigeye gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar jãhãtege raje calakʼ onḍege ape do uni sopor soporpe tahena.” 
2Chronicles23:8 Naeke Jehoyada okae hukumketʼ Liwiko ar Jihudạren sae sae cetanren subedarko do onkageko kạmikeda. Subedar do jotoge apan ạpin hoṛko, metakʼme jirạukʼ mãhãre okoe do pạli bodolko hecʼlen ar okoe do kạmi khonko ruạṛ calakʼkan tahẽkan onkoko ạguketʼkoa. Onko dolren okoehõ naeke Jehoyada do chuṭi bae ematʼkoa." 
2Chronicles23:9 Dạud rajakʼ okako borlom, kạṭicʼ ar lạṭu ḍhalko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre tahẽkan onako hataokate uni do subedarkoe ematʼkoa." 
2Chronicles23:10 Raj rukhiyạye lạgitʼ Jehoyada do noko hoṛko khanḍa bhanḍa sapʼkate mundil oṛakʼ samaṅ reakʼ pinḍ ṭhen dạkhin secʼ khon utạr secʼ hạbicʼe teṅgoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles23:11 Ona tayom Jehoyada ar uniren hoponko do rajren hoponko oḍok ạgukedete uniyakʼ bohokʼre mukuṭko horokʼadea. Onko do uniyakʼ tire bondobos reakʼ puthiko caladea ar raj menteko ojokʼ bahalkedea. Unre hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoateko menkeda, “Maharaj do jiwetʼe tahenma.”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Athaliạ do hoṛkoakʼ ńir baṛae ar rajko sarhaoede reakʼ hoho ańjomkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte onko ṭhene calaoena. 
2Chronicles23:13 Uni doe ńelkeda, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ reakʼ horre raj do acʼakʼ khunṭi ṭhene teṅgo akana ar subedarko ar sakwa okʼroṅko do raj beṛhaeteko teṅgoakana. Ar disạmren sanam hoṛ doko rạskạkʼ kana ar sakwako oroṅeda ar sekʼreńko do bajnawateko sereńeda. Noa ńelte Athaliạ do acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼte ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Hul! hul!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Unre Jehoyada naeke do lạṛhại phạdko cetanreye bahal akatʼko subedarko bahrete hohowatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Uni do lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ sạr tala talate oḍok idiyepe. Ar okoe uni tayomteye hijukʼ uni hõpe gojeya.” Niạ lahare uni doe hukumatʼko tahẽkana, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ talare Athaliạ goje do baṅ ṭhika." 
2Chronicles23:15 Onate onko do Athaliạko sapʼkedea ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sadom duạrte bolokʼ horre idikateko gocʼkedea. 
2Chronicles23:16 Ona tayom Jehoyada do hoṛko ar raj talare bondoboskoe bandhaokeda, onko do Probhu Isorren hoṛko tahena." 
2Chronicles23:17 Ona tayom sanam hoṛko do Bakʼal debotawakʼ mundilte bolokate murtiko rạputʼ giḍikatʼkoa. Onko do pinḍ ar murtikoko rạputʼ gejerketʼkoa. Ar Bakʼal debotaren naeke Matan do pinḍ samaṅregeko gocʼkedea. 
2Chronicles23:18 Ona tayom Jehoyada do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do naekekoakʼ tireye jimạkeda. Noko do Liwiko tahẽkana. Noko cetanrege Dạud do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhare emleda jemon onko do Dạudakʼ hukum leka rạskạ salakʼ sereń sereńte Moseyakʼ ạn-ạri lekate Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porobko porob daṛeakʼ. 
2Chronicles23:19 Ar jãhãe besapha hoṛko jemon aloko bolo daṛeakʼ onate uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ phaṭokʼkore rurukhiyạkoe dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles23:20 Jehoyada do subedarko, lekman hoṛko, mukhiyạko ar disạmren sanam hoṛko soṅgekate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon raje oḍok ạgukedea. Onko do cetan duạr secʼte raj oṛakʼteko boloyena ar raj do siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼena." 
2Chronicles23:21 Athaliyại gocʼ ocoyen khan nagraha do nijhumena ar disạmren sanam hoṛko rạskạyena. 
2Chronicles24:1 Eae bochor umerre Joas do raje hoyena ar Jerusalemre pongel bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgat reakʼ ńutum do Sibiạ; uni do Ber-seba nagraharen hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles24:2 Jehoyada naeke jiwetʼe tahekan bhorge Joas do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre oka bhage tahẽkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoyada do bareyae bạhuade tahẽkana ar uniren koṛa hopon ar kuṛi hoponko hoyentaea. 
2Chronicles24:4 Tayomte Joas do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe lạgitʼe mon murukkeda. 
2Chronicles24:5 Uni do naeke ar Liwiko hohoatʼkoteye metatʼkoa, “Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe lạgitʼ sanam Israelko ṭhen khon khajna uṭhạu lạgitʼ Jihudạ reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahakote calakʼpe. Ar niạ kạmi do usạra kạmipe.” Menkhan Liwiko do bako usạraleda." 
2Chronicles24:6 Onatege raj do maraṅ naeke Jehoyada hoho ạgukedeteye metadea, “Goha tạmbu lạgitʼ Probhu Isorren guti Mose do Israelko cetanre oka khajnae ṭhik dohoakatʼ ona Jihudạ ar Jerusalem khon uṭhạu lạgitʼ Liwiko do cedakʼ bam kolletʼkoa?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Uni bạṛicʼ maejiu Athaliạren hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ rạputʼkateko bololena ar sonotakʼ jinisko Bakʼal debotawakʼ pujạ lạgitʼko beoharleda. 
2Chronicles24:8 Rajakʼ hukum leka mitʼṭecʼ dan baksa benaokate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạr bahrere doho hoyena. 
2Chronicles24:9 Ona tayom Jihudạ ar Jerusalemre mitʼṭecʼe lại sodorkeda, Isorren guti Mose hahaṅkarre Israelko cetanre oka khajnae bharatʼko tahẽkan hoṛko do onkage jemon Probhu Isor ṭhenko ạguy." 
2Chronicles24:10 Onate mukhiyạko ar hoṛko do kusite akoakʼ khajna ạgukate ona dan baksare dohoko ehopʼena; ar onate dan baksa do perejokʼ ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles24:11 Liwiko do dinạm hilokʼ ona dan baksa do rajren kạmiyạko ṭhenko idiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar tinre ona perejokʼkan tahẽkana unre rajren olokʼicʼ ar maraṅ naekeren kạmiạyicʼ do ona dan baksakin khạliyetʼ tahẽkana ar ona tayom do arhõ ona jaegarekin dohokakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles24:12 Okoe cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe reakʼ bhar tahẽkan raj ar Jehoyada do onkoakʼ tire onako ṭakakin jimạwakʼkoa. Ar onko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ arhõ jut aroe lạgitʼ rajmistriko ar kaṭmistriko ar mẽṛhẽtʼ ar pitạlren kạrigolko kạmireko dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles24:13 Ar okoe do jut aroe reakʼko kạmikan tahẽkan onko do ạḍiko khaṭaokʼkan tahẽkana, ar onkoakʼ kạmi do laha idikʼkan tahẽkana. Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do lahate lekako hoyocokeda ar ona do ạḍi keṭecʼ hoyena." 
2Chronicles24:14 Kạmi mucạtʼkate sarecʼ ṭaka do raj ar Jehoyada ṭhenko ạgukeda ar ona ṭakate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ niạko jinisko benao ocokeda: ona do sewa kạmire ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jinisko, kạṛchuko ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ sona ar rupạ reakʼ jinisko benao ocokeda. Ar tinạkʼ din Jehoyada jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porobko porobokʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles24:15 Jehoyada doe haṛamena ar dinte purungeye tahẽkana ar mitʼsae pegel bochor umerreye gocʼena. 
2Chronicles24:16 Israelko modre Isor ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ bhageakʼe kạmiletʼte uni do Dạudakʼ nagrahare rapajko sãoteko topakedea. 
2Chronicles24:17 Jehoyada gujukʼ tayom Jihudạren mukhiyạko do hecʼkate rajko ḍobokʼadea ar raj do onkoakʼ kathae ańjomkeda. 
2Chronicles24:18 Onko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bạgikate Asera-muṭhạn ar boṅgako sewawakoko ehopʼena. Onkoakʼ niạ kại iạte Isorakʼ edre do Jihudạ ar Jerusalem cetanre paṛaoena. 
2Chronicles24:19 Probhu Isor do hoṛko acʼ ṭhen ruạṛ ạguko lạgitʼ nạbikoe kolletʼkoa ar hoṛkoe sontorketʼkore hõ onko do bako ańjomleda. 
2Chronicles24:20 Unre Isorren jiu do Jehoyada naekeren hopon Sekariạ cetanreye decʼena. Uni do hoṛko samaṅre teṅgoyenteye menkeda, “Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ hukum do cedakʼpe bemanot akada? Ape do bape jo bahakʼa. Ape do Probhu Isorpe bạgi akadete uni hõ apeye bạgi giḍi akatʼpea. ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Menkhan hoṛko do Sakariạ upạrteko soṛojontrokeda ar rajakʼ hukumte Probhu Isorakʼ baker racare dhiriteko tiń gocʼkedea. 
2Chronicles24:22 Sakariạren apattetʼ Jehoyada do Joas ṭhen oka pạtiạrtetʼe udukʼletʼ Joas do ona bae disạletʼte uniren hopone gocʼ ocokedea. Sakariạ do gujukʼ jokhecʼe menleda, “E Probhu niạ baṛe hala ruạṛme.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Dosar bochor Aramren lạṛhại phạdko do Joas upạrteko hecʼena. Onko do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemko akromonketʼte joto mukhiyạko gocʼ cabaketʼkoa ar Damesekre akoren raj ṭhen luṭ reakʼ sanamakʼ jinisko kolkeda. 
2Chronicles24:24 Jihudạren hoṛko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorko bạgiyade tahẽkante Aramren lạṛhại phạdko do thoṛageko tahẽkanre hõ Probhu Isor do maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko onkoakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa. Nonkate Aramrenko hotete Joas doe sạjại ocoyena. 
2Chronicles24:25 Ar Aramrenko do Joas raj ghạlgeko bạgi oṭoadea. Joas do naeke Jehoyadaren hopone gocʼ ocoledete uniren gutiko hõ uni upạrte soṛojontrokate aṭetʼregeko gocʼkedea. Are gocʼen khan uni do Dạud nagrahareko topakadea, menkhan rapajkoakʼ topare do bako topaledea." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ar okoekin guti do raj upạrtekin soṛojontroletʼ tahẽkan unkin dokin hoyokʼkana Simeat ńutuman Amoni maejiuren hopon Sabad ar Simrit ńutuman mitʼṭen Moabi maejiuren hopon Jehosabad. 
2Chronicles24:27 Joasren hoponkoakʼ biboron, ar uni reaṅ ạḍi utạr nạbi katha ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut aroe reakʼ katha do “Rapajkoakʼ Itihãs ńutuman puthire ol menakʼa. Ona tayom uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Amasiạ do raje hoyena." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amasiạ do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre bargel are bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Jehoyadin tahẽkana; uni do Jerusalemren maejiue tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles25:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre okaṭakʼ bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana tobe goṭa monte do bae kạmikan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles25:3 Ado acʼakʼ tire rajosṭi keṭecʼen khan okoekin guti do, metakʼme uniren apattetʼkin gocʼlede uni hõ unkine gocʼketʼkinạ." 
2Chronicles25:4 Menkhan unkinren hoponko do bae gocʼletʼkoa bickom Moseyakʼ puthi reakʼ ạnre oka ol tahẽkan ona lekageye kạmikeda. Ona puthire Probhu Isorakʼ hukum niạ hukum ol tahẽkana, “Gidrạkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte apat se apatakʼ kại gunạkʼte gidrạko do bako gocʼ ocokʼa, menkhan mimitʼko do apnarakʼ kại gunạkʼtege gujukʼ hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amasiạ do Jihudạren sanam hoṛkoe hoho jarwaketʼkote bõsko lekate goṭa Jihudạ ar Benjạminren hoṛko mod khon hajarko cetanren subedarko ar saeko cetanren lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko do gobolreye dohokatʼkoa. Uni do bargel bochor se arhõ bạ̃ṛti umerren hoṛko lekha kateye ńelketʼkoa, pe lakh hoṛ do lạṛhạite oḍok calakʼ leka menakʼkoa ar onko do borlom ar ḍhalko beohar daṛeakʼa." 
2Chronicles25:6 Uni do pe hajar are sae keji rupạte Israel khon mitʼ lakh birbanṭae bhaṛa ạguketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles25:7 Menkhan Isorren mitʼṭen hoṛ do hecʼente uniye metadea, “E maharaj, Israelren noko lạṛhại phạdko do am sãote jemon aloko calakʼ, ente Probhu Isor do Israelko sãote, metakʼme Ephrayimko sãote hõ bạnuya." 
2Chronicles25:8 Onkom idi torako ar dil salakʼem lạṛhạilen khan hõ bạiriko ṭhen Isor doe bhagao ocomea, ente jitạu ocome se bhagao ocome reakʼ dare do eken Isorakʼge menakʼtaea.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Unre Amasiạ do Isorren hoṛe metadea, “Noko Israelren lạṛhại phạdko lạgitʼ iń oka pe hajar are sae rupạń emakatʼ ona reakʼ do cetʼ hoyokʼa?” Isorren hoṛe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Isor do ona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiye em daṛeama.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Unre Amasiạ do Epharyim khonko hecʼlen lạṛhại phạdkoe bidạkatʼkote oṛakʼteye kolgotʼkatʼkoa. Onko lạṛhại phạdko do Jihudạren hoṛko cetanre ạḍitetʼko edreyente oṛakʼteko ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Chronicles25:11 Amasiạ do dilkate buluṅ doreãore acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoe ạyurketʼkoa. Ar Seyirren gel hajar hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles25:12 Jihudạren lạṛhại phạdko do arhõ gel hajar hoṛ jiwetʼteko sapʼketʼkoa ar buru muthnire idikate latarteko ṭhelao ńurketʼkoa. Ar onko sanamgeko talga tạuạkʼena. 
2Chronicles25:13 Ar okoe lạṛhại phạdko do Amasiại kol ruạṛletʼko tahẽkan onko do Samariạ khon Bet-horon hạbicʼ Jihudạ reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahako akromonkeda. Onko do pe hajar hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa ar ạḍi utạr jinisko luṭ idikeda. 
2Chronicles25:14 Amasiạ do Edomrenko gocʼkateye ruạṛ hijukʼkan tahẽkanre Seyirren hoṛko do boṅgakoko idi toraketʼkoa. Ar onko do acʼren debotako menkateye dohoketʼkote onko sewawako ar onko ńutumte dhup jeretʼe ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles25:15 Noa iạte Probhu Isor do Amasiạ cetanreye edreyena. Uni do mitʼṭen nạbiye kolkedea. Uni nạbiye menkeda, “Onko hoṛkoren debotako okoe do amakʼ ti khon bako bańcao daṛeatʼko onkoakʼ goṛo do cedakʼem khojkana?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Nạbiyakʼ katha ạuri mucạdokʼrege raj do uniye metadea, “Ale do cetʼ rajren sosolhayicʼ menkate amle bahal akatʼmea? Thirokʼme, ar baṅ khan am dom gocʼ ocokʼa.” Onate nạbi doe thirena, ar enhõe menkeda, “Ińiń baḍaea, am do noam kạmi akada ar ińakʼ sopolha bam luturatʼte Isor do ame maraome lạgitʼe goṭa akada.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Tayomte Jihudạren raj Amasiạ do acʼren sopolhako sãoteye galmaraoketʼte Jehuren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jehoahas ṭhene roṛ gotʼkada, “Dela, hijukʼme mẽtʼ mẽtʼ laṅ beṅgetʼange.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Menkhan Israelren raj do Jihudạren raj ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada, “Lebanon reakʼ aṭkuṭi jạnum do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare ṭhen kathae roṛ gotʼkada, ‘ińren koṛa sãote amren hoponera baplayem.’ Ona tayom Lebanonren mitʼṭen bir janwar do hecʼkate aṭkuṭi jạnumkoe lebetʼ gańjao oṭokada." 
2Chronicles25:19 ‘Edomrenkoń ńẽtʼ akatʼkoa,’ noa katha mone monete hudiskate am do gorbotem phulạu akana. Ńitokʼ do apnarakʼ oṛakʼre tahenme. Cedakʼ muhin dom hoho ạgujoṅkana ar ona sãote Jihudạ reakʼ maraokʼ hõ?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Menkhan Amasiạ do ona katha bae luturada. Noa do Isor khon hoyena, ente hoṛko do Edomren debotakoakʼ goṛoko khojletʼte Isor do Jehoahasakʼ tire onkoe jimạletʼkoa." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ona iạte Israelren raj Jehoahas do onkoe akromonketʼkoa. Uni ar Jihudạren raj Amasiạ do Jihudạ reakʼ Bet-Semesrekin samna sạmniyena. 
2Chronicles25:22 Israelko ṭhen Jihudạ doko bhagao ocoyena ar onko mimitʼko do apan ạpin oṛakʼte dạṛ pạnḍucʼkeda. 
2Chronicles25:23 Israelren raj Jehoahas do Bet-Semesre Ahasiaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Joasren hopon Jihudạren raj Amasiại bondikedea. Ona tayom Jehoahas do Jerusalemte senkate onḍenakʼ pạcri reakʼ Ephrayim duạr khon konac reakʼ duạr hạbicʼ ponsae moka jeleń bhite rạputʼkeda." 
2Chronicles25:24 Ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ joto sona rupạ ar jinisko reakʼ bhar do Obed-Edom cetanre tahẽkan ona jotowakʼge uni doe idikeda. Ona chaḍa uni do raj oṛakʼ reakʼ dhon durib ar jạmin menkate adom hoṛkoe iditoraketʼkote Samariạteye ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Chronicles25:25 Israelren raj Jehoahasren hopon Jehoasakʼ gujukʼ tayom Jihudạren raj Joasren hopon Amasiạ do arhõ gelmõṛẽ bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles25:26 Amasiạwakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ “Jihudạ ar Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles25:27 Amasiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ hor khone ocokʼen khan hoṛko do Jerusalemre uni upạrteko soṛojontrokeda. Onate uni do Lakisteye dạṛkeda, menkhan hoṛko do Lakhiste hoṛ kolkate onḍeko gocʼkedea." 
2Chronicles25:28 Uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do sadomre ladekate Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahateko ạgukeda ar uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea. 
2Chronicles26:1 Ona tayom Jihudạren sanam hoṛko do uniren apatakʼ jaegare Usiạko rajkedea. Unre uniyakʼ umer do gel turui bochor tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:2 Amasiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoen khan Usiạ do Elot nagraha arhõe benao rakapʼkeda ar Jihudạ gobolreye ạgukeda. 
2Chronicles26:3 Usiạ do gel turui bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre mõṛẽgel bar bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do Jekoliạ tahẽkana; uni do Jerusalemren maejiue tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:4 Usiạ do acʼren apat Amasiạ lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:5 Sakariạwakʼ oktere uni do Isorakʼ sana lekageye calakʼkan tahẽkana. Sakariạ do Isor botorae reakʼ sopolhae emaekan tahẽkana. Tinạkʼ din Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekae calaoen unạkʼ din Isor hõ uniye jo baha ocoyede tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:6 Uni do Philisṭiko upạrteye lạṛhạiyena ar Gat, Jabne, ar Asdod reakʼ bhitkoe rạputʼ giḍikada. Ona tayom uni do Asdod ṭoṭhare ar Philisṭikoakʼ judạ judạ jaegare pạcrite esetʼ adomakʼ atoko arhõe benao rakapʼkeda." 
2Chronicles26:7 Isor do Philisṭiko, Gurbakʼalre girobasokʼ kan Arabrenko ar Meuniko upạrteye goṛowadea." 
2Chronicles26:8 Amonrenko do Usiạ khajnako emaekan tahẽkana. Uni doe daṛe idikʼkan tahẽkante Misor reakʼ simạ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ ńutum do pasnao idiyentaea. 
2Chronicles26:9 Usiạ do Jerusalem reakʼ konacʼ duạr ṭhen, sokṛa duạr ṭhen, ar pạcri reakʼ konacre usulge pahra oṛakʼe benaoketʼte onakoe kajakkeda." 
2Chronicles26:10 Uniren do latar buru ṭoṭhakore ar bilạn ṭạnḍikore ạḍi utạr ạsul janwarko tahẽkantaea; ar onate uni do hahaṅkarre usul usul pahra oṛakʼkoe benaokeda ar aema kuńkoe la ocokeda. Uniren hoṛko do bhage hasareko cas abadetʼ tahẽkana ar burure darkha bagwanko benaoetʼ tahẽkana, ente uni do cas baskoe kusiyakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles26:11 Usiạren do gạkhuṛ lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkantaea. Onko do Hananiạ ńutuman mitʼṭen subedar tabereko tahẽkana ar Jeiyel ar Makʼaseya sordar tạkinakʼ lekha lekate onko do mimitʼ dolkate lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛao tahenkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:12 Onkoakʼ lekha do jotote pe lakh eae hajar mõṛẽ sae tahẽkana. Noko lạṛhại birko do bar hajar turui sae bõsren mukhiyạko tabereko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles26:13  
2Chronicles26:14 Usiạ do goṭa lạṛhại phạdko lạgitʼ ḍhal, borlom, bohokʼ aḍokʼakʼ, hoṛmo aḍokʼakʼ, ar akʼ sarko ar ginḍwạriko lạgitʼ do dhirikoe benao ocokeda." 
2Chronicles26:15 Uni do Jerusalemren gạkhuṛ hoṛkoakʼ benaoakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa do usul pahra oṛakʼkore ar pạcri konac reakʼ cetanreye dohokada jemon onḍe khon sarko tuń daṛeakʼ ar lạṭu lạṭu dhirikoko ṭuṭi daṛeakʼ. Uniyakʼ ńutum do sạṅgiń disạm hạbicʼ pasnaoena. Uni do Isorakʼ daṛe ńamkateye daṛe idiyena. 
2Chronicles26:16 Usiại keṭecʼ idiyen khan uniyakʼ monre bạḍại boloyena ar onate uni doe ńurena. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre bolokate dhudhup pinḍre dhup jeredkate Probhu Isor upạrteye kạikeda. 
2Chronicles26:17 Onate maraṅ naeke Asariạ ar Probhu Isorren irạlgel dilan naekeko do raj tayom tayomte bhitriteko boloyena. 
2Chronicles26:18 Onko do uni teṅgo daramkedeteko metadea, “E Usiạ, Probhu Isor ńutumte amakʼ dhup jered reakʼ ektiạri do bạnukʼtama. Aronren bõsko, okoe do dhup jered lạgitʼko begar ocoakan, eken onko motoge ạidạri menakʼtakoa. Niạ sonot ṭhạ̃i khon do oḍok calakʼme, ente am dom ghạṭ akada. Noa iạte Probhu Isor do khạṭigeye sạjạimea.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Ar Usại do ạḍitetʼe raṅgaoena; unre uniyakʼ tire dhup jered lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhup dạni tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre dhup pinḍ samaṅre naekeko cetanre tinreye raṅgaoena unre uniyakʼ moloṅre murhucʼ jom rog ńelena. 
2Chronicles26:20 Unre maraṅ naeke Asariạ ar eṭakʼ sanamko do uni secʼko beṅgetʼketʼ khan uniyakʼ moloṅre murhucʼ jom rogko ńelkeda. Onate onko do usạrateko oḍok giḍikadea. Ar acʼhõ usạrate oḍok hijukʼe khojkeda, ente Probhu Isor do uniye ńẽtʼakade tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles26:21 Usiạ raj do ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ do murhucʼ jom rog tahẽkana. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ begar oṛakʼreye girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana, ente Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khone getʼ begar ocoakan tahẽkana. Onate rajakʼ bhar do acʼren hopon Jotham cetanreye paṛaoena." 
2Chronicles26:22 Usiạwakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ Amosren hopon Jisại nạbiye ol dohokeda. 
2Chronicles26:22 Usiạwakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ Amosren hopon Jisại nạbiye ol dohokeda. 
2Chronicles26:23 Tayomte Usiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena. Ar uni do rapajkoakʼ topa aṛe reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃ire uniren hapṛamko sãoteko topakadea, ente hoṛkoko menkeda, “Uni do murhucʼ jom rog hoṛe tahẽkana.” Ar uniyakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Jotham do raje hoyena." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham raj do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre gel turui bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgattetʼakʼ ńutum do tahẽkana Jerusa; uni do Sadokren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles27:2 Jotham do uniren apattetʼ leka Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa uni do uniren apattetʼ leka do bae bhulleda; dhup jered lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte do bae bololena. Enhõ hoṛko do bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles27:3 Jotham do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ cetan senakʼ duạre jut aro ocokeda ar Ophel buru pạcri reakʼ ḍher jaegakoe kajakkeda. 
2Chronicles27:4 Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ burukore pạcrite esetʼ atokoe benaokeda ar bir ṭoṭhakore do gaṛkoe benaokeda ar usul pahra oṛakʼko hõe benaokeda. 
2Chronicles27:5 Amonikoren raj upạrteye lạṛhạiyente onkoe bhagaoketʼkoa. Onate Amoniko do ona bochor pe hajar are sae keji rupạ, mitʼ hajar irạlsae ṭon guhum ar mitʼ hajar irạlsae ṭon jaoko emena. Dosar ar Tesar bochorre hõ onko do inạkʼkategeko emkeda." 
2Chronicles27:6 Nonkate Jotham doe daṛe idiyena, ente uni do pạtiạr salakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ horteye calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles27:7 Jothamakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha, uniyakʼ sanam lạṛhại reakʼ katha ar uniyakʼ cạl-colonko reakʼ katha do Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol akana." 
2Chronicles27:8 Uni do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre gel turui bochorre rajena. 
2Chronicles27:9 Tayomte Jotham do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar uni do Dạudakʼ nagrahareko topakadea. Ona tayom uniren hopon Ahas do uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahas do bargel bochor umer tahẽkantaere raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre gel turui bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren hapṛam Dạud cetʼ leka Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre bhageakʼe kạmikan tahẽkan onka uni do bae kạmikan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles28:2 Uni do Israelren rajko lekageye calakʼkan tahẽkana ar Bakʼal debota sewawae lạgitʼ chańcre dulakʼ muṭhạne benao ocoleda. 
2Chronicles28:3 Uni do Bin Hinomakʼ buru lodamre dhupkoe jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana ar Probhu Isor do Israelko samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoe laga ńirletʼko tahẽkan onkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko lekage uni hõ acʼren hoponko seṅgelreye samaṅletʼkoa. 
2Chronicles28:4 Uni do than boṭkocʼkore, buru cetankore ar mimitʼ hạriạṛ dare buṭạkore janwarkoe dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana ar dhupkoe jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ona iạtege Probhu Isor do Aram rajakʼ tire uniye jimạkadea. Aramrenko do uniko bhagaokedea ar uniren ḍher hoṛko bondiketʼkote Damesekteko idiketʼkoa. Uni hõ Israelren raj Pekawakʼ tireye jimạ ocoyena. Israelren raj do uniren ạḍi utạr hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Remaliạ hopon Peka do mitʼ dinte Jihudạren mitʼ lakh bargel hajar lạṛhại phạdkoe gocʼketʼkoa, ente Jihudạren hoṛko do akoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorko bạgi giḍi akade tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles28:6  
2Chronicles28:7 Sikri ńutuman Ephrayimren mitʼṭen bir banṭa hoṛ do rajren hopon Makʼaseya ar raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạ Asrikam, ar raj latarrenicʼ Elkana takoe gocʼketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles28:8 Israelko do onkoren jạt boehako tala khon maejiuko ar koṛa hoponko ar kuṛi hoponkoko bondi idiketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ lekha do bar lakh tahẽkana. Onko do ḍher jinisko hõ Samariạteko luṭ idikeda. 
2Chronicles28:9 Probhu Isorren Oded ńutuman mitʼṭen nạbi do Samariạreye tahẽkana. Uni do lạṛhại phạdko tinre Samariạteko ruạṛ hecʼena unre onko sãote ńapamenteye menkeda, “Aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do Jihudạ upạrteye raṅgaoente onko do apeakʼ tireye jimạketʼkoa. Menkhan raṅgao khạtirte cetʼlekape gocʼketʼko ona katha do serma hạbicʼ seṭer akana." 
2Chronicles28:10 Ar ńitokʼ ape do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko aperen golam hoyocokope menjoṅkana. Menkhan aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen ape do cetʼ dusipe baṅkana? 
2Chronicles28:11 Ńitokʼ ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Aperen jạt boehako tala khon okoe bondikatepe ạgu akatʼko onko do kol ruạṛkakope, ente Probhu Isorakʼ raṅgao do ape cetanre menakʼa.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Unre lạṛhại khon okoeko ruạṛ hecʼlen Ephrayimren adom mukhiyạko do onko upạrteko teṅgoyena. Onko mukhiyạko doko hoyokʼkana Johanan hopon Asariạ, Mesillemot hopon Berekiạ, Salumren hopon Jehiskiạ ar Hadlalren hopon Amasa." 
2Chronicles28:13 Onkoko menkeda, “Bondi hoṛko do nonḍe alope ạgukoa; arpe ạguleko khan Probhu Isor ṭhen ale hõ dusile hoyokʼa. Aleakʼ kại ar dos sãote cetʼ ape do arhõ jãhãnakʼ jutucʼakʼpe khojkana? Ape dope dusigea ar Probhu Isorakʼ edre hõ Israelko cetanre menakʼtaea." 
2Chronicles28:14 Unre lạṛhại phạdko do mukhiyạko ar sanam hoṛko samaṅre onko bondiko ar luṭ reakʼ jinisko jimạkeda. 
2Chronicles28:15 Onko mukhiyạko do unre luṭ reakʼ jinisko khon kicricʼko hataokate bondi akanko modre okoe do uluṅgeko tahẽkan onko sanamko ematʼkoa. Onko do akoakʼ kicricʼko, jomakʼko ar panahekoko ematʼkoa ar onkoakʼ ghaokore sunume dulatʼtakoa. Ar laṅga akanko do gadhakore ladekate Jerikho, metakʼme Khijur nagrahate onkoren hoṛko ṭhenko ruạṛkatʼkoa. Tayomte onko do Samariạteko ruạṛ hecʼena." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ona jokhecʼ Ahas raj do goṛo ńam lạgitʼ Ạsurren raj ṭhen hoṛkoe kolketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles28:17 Niạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, Edomrenko do arhõ hecʼkate Jihudạ cetanre jhãpko emketʼte hoṛkoko bondi idiketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles28:18 Ar Philisṭiko hõ buru latar ṭoṭha reakʼ atoko ar Jihudạ reakʼ Negebre arhõ jhãpko emkeda. Onko do Bet-semes, Aijalon, Gederot ar aḍepase reakʼ Soko, Timnạ, ar Gimsoko ạidạriante onḍe girobasokʼ ko ehopʼena." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ahas raj iạte Probhu Isor do Jihudại copotʼ ocokeda, ente Ahas do Jihudạre bạṛicʼakʼoe ḍher ocokeda ar Probhu Isor sãote hõ bepạtiạranicʼe tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ạsurren raj Tiglat-Pileser do uni ṭhene hecʼlengea menkhan uni do daṛe ocoye bodolteye cipạkedea. 
2Chronicles28:21 Unre Ahas do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar raj oṛakʼ khon ar mukhiyạko ṭhen khon mitʼ bar damanakʼ jiniskoe hataoketʼte Asurren raj do khajna menteye emadea, menkhan onate uni do cetʼge baṅ hoylentaea." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ahas raj do niạ kosṭo oktere Probhu Isor cetanre artetʼgeye bepạtiạrena. 
2Chronicles28:23 Uni do Damesekren debotakoko bhagaoledete onko lạgitʼ dãṛẽkoe samaṅketʼkoa. Uni doe hudiskeda, “Aram rajren debotako do onkoko goṛowako kana, onate iń hõ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ onko debotako ṭhen janwariń dãṛẽkoa.” Menkhan onko debotageko hoyokʼkana uniyakʼ ar goṭa Israelre sorbonas hoyokʼ reakʼ karon do." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahas do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko mitʼ ṭhene jarwaketʼte onakoe makʼ khanḍa khunḍikeda. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạrkoe bondkada ar Jerusalem reakʼ goṭa jaegare pinḍkoe benaokeda. 
2Chronicles28:25 Uni do debotako ńutumte dhup jered lạgitʼ Jihudạ reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ nagraha ar atokore than boṭkocʼkoe benao ocoketʼte uniren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ edreye rakapʼ ocoketʼtaea. 
2Chronicles28:26 Ahasakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha ar uniyakʼ cạl-colonko reakʼ katha do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ “Jihudạ ar Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles28:27 Tayomte Ahas do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene calaoena ar Jerusalem nagrahareko topakadea, menkhan Israelkoren rapajkoakʼ topare do bako topaledea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Hiskiạko rajkedea." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hiskiạ do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre bargel are bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Abi tahẽkana; uni do Sakariạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles29:2 Hiskiạ do acʼren hapṛam Dạud lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmikan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles29:3 Uniyakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochor reakʼ pạhil candore uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạrkoe jhicʼkeda are jut arokeda. 
2Chronicles29:4 Uni do purub secʼakʼ racare naeke ar Liwiko jarwa ketʼkoteye metatʼkoa," 
2Chronicles29:5 “E Liwiko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe; ape do apnarren ar aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ saphaepe. Niạ sonot jaega khon sanam besapha jinisko sạṅgiń giḍikakʼpe." 
2Chronicles29:6 Aboren hapṛam doko bepạtiạr ocoakana; onko do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageko kạmi akada ar uniko bạgi giḍi akadea. Probhu Isorakʼ tahen oṛakʼ khon eṭakʼ secʼko ghańjeṛ akana ar uniko dea giḍi akadea. 
2Chronicles29:7 Onko do pinḍạ reakʼ duạrko bond akada ar diuheko ĩṛĩcʼ akada. Niạ sonot oṛakʼre Israelren Isor ńutumte dhup do bako jeretʼleda se jãhãn jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hõ bako samaṅleda. 
2Chronicles29:8 Onate Jihudạ ar Jerusalem cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do pheḍ hecʼakana. Ape do apnarakʼ mẽtʼtegepe ńeleda onko cetanre botoranakʼ ar jarkharakʼe hoyocoakada; onko ńelte hoṛko do ṭiṭkạri kathako roṛeda. 
2Chronicles29:9 Noa iạtege aboren hapṛamko do lạṛhạireko gocʼena ar aboren bạhuko ar koṛa hoponko ar kuṛi hoponkoko bondi ocoakana. 
2Chronicles29:10 Iń do ńitokʼ Israelren Probhu Isor sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobos reakʼ iń khojkana jemon uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre abo cetanre alo paṛaokʼ. 
2Chronicles29:11 E ińren hoponko, ape do ńitokʼ ar alope duṛupʼ hapekokʼa, ente Probhu Isor samaṅre teṅgokʼ ar uniren sapʼ sosoricʼ lekate kạmi ar dhup jered lạgitʼ uni do apegeye bachao dohoakatʼpea.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Unre onko Liwiko do kạmireko dhurạuena- ar Kohatrenko mod khon Amasiạren hopon Mahat ar Asariạren hopon Joel: Merarirenko mod khon Abdiren hopon Kis ar Jehalelren hopon Asariạ; Gersonrenko mod khon Simaren hopon Joah ar Joahren hopon Edon; 
2Chronicles29:12 Unre onko Liwiko do kạmireko dhurạuena- ar Kohatrenko mod khon Amasiạren hopon Mahat ar Asariạren hopon Joel: Merarirenko mod khon Abdiren hopon Kis ar Jehalelren hopon Asariạ; Gersonrenko mod khon Simaren hopon Joah ar Joahren hopon Edon; 
2Chronicles29:13 Elisaphan bõsrenko mod khon Simri ar Jeuel; Ashap bõsrenko mod khon Sekariạ ar Mataniạ; 
2Chronicles29:14 Hemanren bõsko mod khon Jehuel ar Simại ar Jeduthunren bõsko mod khon Semaya ar Usiyel. 
2Chronicles29:15 Onko do akoren Liwi boehakoko jarwaketʼkoa ar Probhu Isor ńutumte apnartetʼko begarena. Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ar rajakʼ katha leka Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ saphae lạgitʼ bhitriteko boloyena. 
2Chronicles29:16 Ar onḍe tinạkʼ besaphawakʼ jinisko ńamketʼ onako joto do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ racareko oḍok ạgukeda. Ar Liwiko do Kedron lodamteko oḍok giḍikeda. 
2Chronicles29:17 Onko sanamkoge pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ sonot lạgitʼko ehopʼena ar irạl din hilokʼ do pinḍạ hạbicʼko hecʼena. Arhõ irạl din hạbicʼ onko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼko saphakeda ar pạhil cando reakʼ gel turuiyakʼ dinre onako sạtkeda. 
2Chronicles29:18 Ona tayom onko do Hiskiạ raj ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Ale do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ pinḍ ar ona reakʼ bhajanko ar samaṅakʼ piṭhạ dohowakʼ ṭebil ar ona reakʼ jotowakʼ jinisko seletʼ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼle sapha akada." 
2Chronicles29:19 Probhu Isorre bepạtiạu iạte Ahas raj do acʼakʼ rajokʼ oktere okako jinise badletʼ tahẽkan onako ale do arhõ ṭhik baṛakatele sapha akada. Onako do ńitokʼ Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ samaṅre menakʼa.” 
2Chronicles29:20 Dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre Hiskiạ raj do nagraharen maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạkoe jarwaketʼkote Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. 
2Chronicles29:21 Onko do rajosṭi lạgitʼ, mundil oṛakʼ lạgitʼ ar Jihudạ hoṛko lạgitʼ kại samaṅokʼakʼ lekate eae goṭen ḍaṅgra, eae goṭen bheḍa, eae goṭen bheḍa hopon ar eae goṭen meromko ạguketʼkoa. Ona tayom raj do naekeko, metakʼme Aronren bõsko Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ cetanre onko samaṅko lạgitʼe hukumkeda." 
2Chronicles29:22 Naekeko do pạhilre onko ḍaṅgrako gur maṛaṅketʼkote onko mimitʼkoakʼ mãyãm do pinḍreko irciyada; ar ona tayom do bheḍako ar mucạtʼre bheḍa hoponko gurketʼkote onko mimitʼkoakʼ mãyãm hõko ircikeda. 
2Chronicles29:23 Ona tayom naekeko do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼren meromko raj ar sanam hoṛko samaṅreko ạguketʼkoa jemon onko do onkoakʼ bohokʼre tiko dohoytako. 
2Chronicles29:24 Inạ tayom naekeko do onko meromkoe gurketʼkoa ar sanam Israelkoakʼ kại ńutumte pinḍ cetanre ona mãyãmte kại reakʼ puruchune hoyocokeda. Sanam Israelko lạgitʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại iạte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ hukum do rajgeye ematʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles29:25 Dạud raj, ar uniren ńeńelicʼ Gad ar Nathan nạbiyakʼ hukum lekate Hiskiạ raj do Liwikoe metatʼkoa jemon onko do kortal, binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ banamante Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko bolokʼ. Ar Probhu Isorge acʼren nạbiko hotete niạ hukume emlen tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles29:26 Ona iạte Liwiko do Dạudakʼ bajnako ar naekeko do akoakʼ sakwakoante onḍe senkateko teṅgoyena. 
2Chronicles29:27 Ona tayom Hiskiạ do pinḍ cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob reakʼe hukumkeda. Ar niạ samaṅokʼakʼ porob ehopʼen khan Probhu Isor ńutumte sereń hõko sereńkeda ar ona sãote Israelren raj Dạudakʼ bajna ar sakwa hõko oroṅkeda. 
2Chronicles29:28 Sekʼreń dolko do sereń ar sakwa oroṅko do sakwa oroṅtegeko tahẽyen khan sanam hoṛko do otre taberkate Probhu Isorko ḍobokʼadea. Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob ạuri mucạdokʼ hạbicʼ onkageko hoyocokeda. 
2Chronicles29:29 Ado samaṅokʼakʼko sạten khan raj ar uni sãoten sanamko doko ikhṛumente Probhu Isorko ḍobokʼadea. 
2Chronicles29:30 Hiskiạ raj ar uniren gutiko do Dạud ar ńeńelicʼ Ashapakʼ joṛao akatʼ sereńate Probhu Isor ńutumte oṛhẽ sereń lạgitʼ Liwikoe hukumatʼkoa. Unre onko do kusite sarhao sereńko sereńkeda ar otre ombakʼkateko sewawadea. 
2Chronicles29:31 Inạ tayom Hiskiyại menkeda, “Ńitokʼ do Probhu Isor ṭhen apnrartetʼpe emakana. Ape do ńitokʼ hijukʼpe ar janwar samaṅokʼakʼ ar sarhao samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte ạguipe.” Unre sanamkoge onako ạgukeda ar okoe do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼko menetʼ tahẽkan onko do ona jiniskoko ạgukeda." 
2Chronicles29:32 Onko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ eaegel ḍaṅgrako, mitʼsae bheḍako ar barsae bheḍa hoponko ạguketʼkoa. Noko do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼren dãṛẽko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles29:33 Samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ okoe janwarkoko begar doholetʼko onkoakʼ lekha do turui sae ḍaṅgra ar pe hajar bhiḍi ar meromko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles29:34 Naekekoakʼ lekha thoṛage tahẽkante onko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼren sanam janwarkoakʼ harta do bako ur daṛeada; onate kạmi ạuriko sạt hạbicʼ ar eṭakʼ naekeko ạuriko saphakʼ hạbicʼ onkoren Liwi boehako do onkoko goṛowatʼkoa, ente apnar saphakʼ babotre naekeko khon Liwikoge bạ̃ṛtiko moneyakʼkan tahẽkana" 
2Chronicles29:35 Sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ itil jeredokʼ porob ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porob ar ona sãote coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ porobko seletʼ aema samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena. Nonkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sapʼsor kạmi do arhõ ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles29:36 Isor do acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼ ạḍi usạraye kạmiletʼte Hiskiạ ar sanam hoṛko doko rạskạyena. 
2Chronicles30:1 Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porobokʼ lạgitʼ hoṛko do jemon Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko hijukʼ ona iạte Hiskiạ do sanam Israel ar Jihudạre khobore kolkeda ar Ephrayim ar Manase gusṭiren hoṛko ciṭhiye olatʼkoa. Raj ar uniren gutiko ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko do, dosarakʼ candore bańcaokʼ porobko porobokʼa menteko goṭa ṭhikkeda. Ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, ḍher naekeko do apnartetʼ bako sapha akan tahẽkana ar hoṛko hõ Jerusalemre bako hecʼ jarwa akan tahẽkante jao okte ona do bako kạmi daṛeakatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles30:2  
2Chronicles30:3  
2Chronicles30:4 Niạ goṭateakʼ do raj ar sanam hoṛko ṭhen lek kana mente hudisena. 
2Chronicles30:5 Israelren Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcaokʼ porob porobokʼ lạgitʼ jemon sanamkoge Jerusalemteko hijukʼ ona iạte onko do Ber-seba khon Dan hạbicʼ Israelkoakʼ sanam jaegare hoṛ kolkateko lại pasnaokeda. Onko do ḍher bochor khon niạm lekate mitʼ ṭhen jarwakate niạ porob do bako porob akana. 
2Chronicles30:6 Rajakʼ hukumte raj ar uniren gutiko ṭhen khon ciṭhi hataokate hoṛko do Israel ar Jihudạ reakʼ sanam jaegakote senkate niạko lại sodorkeda, “E Israelko, ape do Abraham, Isahak ar Israelren Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe, onate okoe do Ạsur rajakʼ ti khonko rukhiyạlen onko ṭhen, metakʼme ape ṭhen uni hõe ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
2Chronicles30:7 Ape do aperen hapṛamko ar aperen Israel boehako leka do alope hoyokʼa. Onko do onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor cetanre bepạtiạrko tahẽkante ạḍiye sạjạiyletʼkoa. Ape do onape ńeletʼkangea. 
2Chronicles30:8 “Aperen hapṛamko leka hoṭokʼ do alope keṭejtapea bickom Probhu Isorakʼ tire jimạkʼpe. Ar okaṭakʼ sonot oṛakʼ uni do jaejug lạgitʼ acʼ ńutumteye begar dohoakatʼ ape do ona oṛakʼte hijukʼpe ar aperen Probhu Isor sewawaepe jemon ape cetan khon uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre ocogokʼtae. 
2Chronicles30:9 Probhu Isor ṭhenpe ruạṛ hijukʼ enḍekhan aperen boehako, aperen hopon ar hoponerako okoe doko bondi idiakatʼko onko cetanre daya hecʼakoa. Unre onko do niạ disạmteko ruạṛ hecʼ daṛeakʼa, ente aperen Probhu Isor do daya ar mãyãteye perecʼgea. Uni ṭhenpe ruạṛ hecʼlen khan uni do bae dea giḍikapea.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Khobor akʼsenko do Ephrayim ar Manase reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahako ar Sebulon hạbicʼko senena, menkhan onḍenko hoṛ do onkoko landa-dhutʼatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles30:11 Enhõ Aser, Manasi ar Sebulon gusṭiren adom hoṛ do Jerusalemteko hecʼena." 
2Chronicles30:12 Isorakʼ ti do Jihudạren hoṛko cetanre hõ tahẽkana, onate Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka raj ar uniren gutikoakʼ hukum palon lạgitʼ onkoakʼ mone mitʼketʼtakoa." 
2Chronicles30:13 Dosar cando do bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobokʼ lạgitʼ ạḍi utạr hoṛ do Jerusalemre hecʼkateko jarwayena. 
2Chronicles30:14 Ar pujại lạgitʼ janwar dãṛẽko reakʼ okako pinḍ ar dhudhup pinḍko Jerusalemre tahẽkan onko do onakoko ocokʼketʼte Kedron reakʼ lodamreko giḍikada. 
2Chronicles30:15 Onko do dosar cando reakʼ gel ponakʼ dinre bańcaokʼ porobren bheḍa hoponko gurketʼkoa. Noa iạte naekeko ar Liwiko doko lajaoente apnarko sapha maṛaṅena ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ạgukeda. 
2Chronicles30:16 Ona tayom Isorren hoṛ Moseyakʼ ạn-ạri lekate onko do niṭ akatʼ jaegareko teṅgoyena. Ar naekeko do Liwikoakʼ ti khon mãyãm hataokateko ircikeda. 
2Chronicles30:17 Unr hoṛko modren ḍherkoge apnartetʼ bako sapha akan tahẽkana. Onate onko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ bańcaokʼ porobren bheḍa hopon do Liwikoge gur lagaoatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles30:18 Ephrayim, Manasi, Isakar ar Sebulon gusṭiren ḍher hoṛkoge apnar saphako baṅkate niạm upạrte bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ bhojko jomkeda. Menkhan Hiskiạ do onko ńutumte koekateye menkeda, “Mundil reakʼ niạm lekate bako sapha akanre hõ enhõ okoe do onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼ lạgitʼko mon muruk akatʼ, onko sanamko jemon dayawạnicʼ Isor baṛeye ikạkako.”" 
2Chronicles30:19  
2Chronicles30:20 Ar Probhu Isor do Hiskiạwakʼ koejoṅ ańjomte hoṛkoe ikạ katʼkoa. 
2Chronicles30:21 Okoe Israelko Jerusalemreko jarwalen onko do ạḍi rạskạ salakʼ eae din hạbicʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobko porobena; ar Liwiko ar naekeko do dinạm hilokʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte banam ar ruwate sarhao sereńko sereńetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles30:22 Probhu Isorakʼ sewa kạmire okoe Liwiko do gạkhuṛko tahẽkan Hiskiạ do onkoe udgạuketʼkoa. Onko do sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobente eae din hạbicʼko jom-ńũkeda ar onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea. 
2Chronicles30:23 Ona tayom sanam hoṛko do arhõ eae din hạbicʼ ona porobko porobokʼa menteko ṭhikkeda; onate arhõ eae din rạskạ salakʼko porobena. 
2Chronicles30:24 Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ do sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼ hajar ḍaṅgra ar eae hajar bhiḍikoe emena ar maraṅ hudạren hoṛko lạgitʼ do mitʼ hajar ḍaṅgra ar gel hajar bhiḍi. Ar naekeko modren ḍherkoge apnartetʼko saphayena. 
2Chronicles30:25 Jihudạren sanam hoṛko, naekeko, Liwiko, Israel khonko hecʼ akan hoṛko ar Israelre ar Jihudạre girobasokʼkan okoe bidisiạkoko hecʼlen onko sanamkogeko rạskạyena." 
2Chronicles30:26 Jerusalemre do ạḍi rạskạ hoyena; Israelren raj Dạudren hopon Solomon tayom Jerusalemre nonka porob do ar bako porob akan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles30:27 Tayomte okoe Liwiko do naekeko tahẽkan onko doko teṅgoyente hoṛko ạsirbadko ematʼkoa, ar Isor do onkoakʼ koejoṅe ańjomketʼtakoa, ente onkoakʼ koejoṅ do uniyakʼ sonot jaega serma hạbicʼ seṭerlen tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ado porob mucạtʼen khan onḍeko jarwa akan Israelko doko oḍokente Jihudạ nagrahate senkate sewawakʼ dhiriko, Asera muṭhạnko, than boṭkocʼko ar pinḍkoko marao giḍikada. Onko do Jihudạ, Benjạmin, Ephrayim ar Manase gusṭikoakʼ goṭa ṭoṭhate senkate onkageko kạmikeda. Nokoko marao cabaketʼko tayom Israelko do apan ạpin ato ar nagrahateko ruạṛ calaoena." 
2Chronicles31:2 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porob, sapʼdapʼ kạmi ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sarhao ar õṛhẽ sereń lạgitʼ Hiskiạ do naekeko ar Liwikoakʼ mimitʼ kạmi lekate onkoren judạ judạ dolkoe bahalketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles31:3 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạrire cetʼ leka olakan onkage setakʼ ar ạyupʼ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ar jirạukʼ mãhã, ambas ńut ar niṭakatʼ porob oktere jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ raj do acʼakʼ sompotti khone dankeda." 
2Chronicles31:4 Naeke ar Liwiko jemon Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạri manao babotre apnartetʼ purạte jamaṛ akanko tahẽdaṛeakʼ onate onkoakʼ paona hĩs emkatako lạgitʼ uni do Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa. 
2Chronicles31:5 Niạ hukum oḍokokʼ são sãote Israelko do akoakʼ phosolko, nãwã darkha rasa, sunumko ar dumur rasa reakʼ pạhil hĩs ar khetre jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ ona reakʼ pạhil hĩs onko do ạḍi ḍherko dankeda. Ona chaḍa onko do jotowakʼ reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińko emena ar ona do ạḍi utạr hoyena." 
2Chronicles31:6 Israel ar Jihudạren okoeko hoṛ do Jihudạ reakʼ ato ar nagrahareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko hõ akoren ḍaṅgrako, bhiḍiko ar meromko reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭińko ạguketʼkoa ar onkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohowakʼ jinis reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń ạgukateko ṭhikikeda." 
2Chronicles31:7 Tesar candore niạ kạmiko ehopketʼte onko do eae candoreko sạtʼkeda. 
2Chronicles31:8 Hiskiạ ar uniren kạmiyạko do hecʼkate ona ṭhiki ńelte Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea ar uniren hoṛ Israelko hõ sarhaoe ematʼkoa. 
2Chronicles31:9 Hiskiạ do ona ṭhiki reakʼ katha naeke ar Liwikoe kuliketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles31:10 Onate Sadokakʼ bõsren Asariạ ńutuman maraṅ naeke do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre hoṛko do tinre akoakʼ dan ạguko ehopʼena unkhon aleakʼ jomakʼ hõ sareṛ idiyena, ente Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoe bhor akatʼkoa, ar noako jinis do ḍher sarecʼ akana." 
2Chronicles31:11 Unre Hiskiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre khajańci kandhako benao lạgitʼe hukumkeda ar onako benaokeda. 
2Chronicles31:12 Ona tayom hoṛko do dan-sandes, ar jotowakʼ jinis reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń ar Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohoakatʼ jinisko pạtiạr salakʼ khajańci oṛakʼte ạguko ehopʼena. Konaniạ ńutuman mitʼṭen Liwi cetanre noako jinis ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do tahẽkana ar uniren boeha Simai do uniren gokʼṛoyicʼe tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles31:13 Nukin bar hoṛ tabere Hiskiạ raj ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼren maraṅ kạmiạyicʼ Asariạwakʼ hukumte Jehiyel, Asasiạ, Nahat, Asahel, Jerimot, Josabad, Eliyel, Jismikhiạ, Mahat ar Benae noko do ńel todarot reakʼ bharko ńamkeda." 
2Chronicles31:14 Hoṛkoakʼ kusi lekateakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis reakʼ bhar do purub secʼ reakʼ duạr horhoyicʼ Liwi Imnaren hopon Kori cetanre tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isor emae joto dan-sandes ar sonot utạrakʼ jinisko hạṭiń reakʼ bhar hõ uni cetanrege tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles31:15 Naekekoakʼ nagraha ar atokore onkoren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dol lekate umerte lạṭu se kạṭicʼ onkoren soṅgeten naekeko ṭhik leka hạṭińako lạgitʼ Kori tabere Eden, Miniamin, Jesuạ, Semaya, Amariạ ar Sekaniạ noko do pạtiạr salakʼko kạmi kan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles31:16 Ona chaḍa eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dol lekate okoe naekeko do din hilokʼ reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko bolokʼkan tahẽkan onkohõ jomakʼko hạṭińako kan tahẽkana. Onko do pe bochor ar ona khon bạ̃ṛti umerren herel hoponko tahẽkana onkoakʼ ńutum do naekekoakʼ bõs tạlikare ol tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles31:17 Bõs tạlikare naekekoakʼ ńutum do apatkoakʼ bõs lekate ol hoylena ar bargel bochor ar ona khon bạ̃ṛti umerren Liwikoakʼ ńutum ar dạyik do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ dol lekate ol hoylena. 
2Chronicles31:18 Ona chaḍa onkoren bạhuko ar koṛa hoponko ar kuṛi hoponko, metakʼme goṭa somaj reakʼ ńutum do bõs tạlikare ol hoylena, ente naekeko ar Liwiko do pạtiạr salakʼ Isor ńutumte apnartetʼko begar doholena." 
2Chronicles31:19 Okoe naekeko, metakʼme Aronren okoe bõsko do nij nij nagraha ar ato beṛhaeteakʼ jaegareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko jomakʼ hạṭińako lạgitʼ mimitʼ nagraha ar atore adom hoṛkoakʼ ńutum hõko doholeda. Onko do mimitʼ naekeko ar bõs tạlikare ol akan mitʼke mitʼ Liwiko jomakʼko hạṭińako kan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hiskiạ do Jihudạ reakʼ joto jaegare nonkageye kạmikeda. Uniren Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ, sạriạkʼ ar dhoromteakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles31:21 Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼ lạgitʼ Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi ar ạn-ạriko manao babotre jãhãnakʼgeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkan ona do goṭa mon ar ontortegeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana, ar onatege uni doe jo bahakʼ kan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hiskiạ do pạtiạr salakʼ jotowakʼe sạtketʼ tayom Asurren raj Senakerib do hecʼkate Jihudạ cetanre jhãpe emkeda. Uni do pạcrite esetʼ ato ar nagrahakoe gheraokeda, are hudiskeda onako doe jitạujoṅa." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hiskiạ doe ńelkeda Senakerib doe seṭer lạgidokʼ kana ar Jerusalem upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe mon muruk akada. 
2Chronicles32:3 Unre uni do acʼren subedar ar birbanṭako sãote sopolhakate nagraha bahre reakʼ dakʼ jharnako dhapao esetʼ lạgitʼe goṭakeda. Ar ona kạmire onko do uniko goṛowadea. 
2Chronicles32:4 Ḍher hoṛko jarwayente sanam dakʼ jharna ar disạm talate calakʼ kan ạtukʼ dakʼko bondkeda. Onkoko menkeda, “Ạsurren raj hecʼkate cedakʼ nunạkʼ dakʼ doe ńama?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Hiskiạ do pạcri reakʼ joto rạputʼ akan hĩsko ar usul pahra oṛakʼkoe jut aro ocoketʼteye keṭecʼkeda. Ona chaḍa pạcri bahrete uni do ar mitʼṭecʼ bhite benaokeda ar Dạud nagraha reakʼ Miloye kajakkeda. Uni do ạḍi utạr khanḍa bhanḍa ar ḍhalkoe benao ocokeda. 
2Chronicles32:6 Uni do hoṛko cetanre subedarkoe bahalketʼkoa ar nagraha phaṭok duạr ṭhenakʼ phaelao jaegareye jarwaketʼkote niạ menkateye udgạuketʼkoa," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Ape do daṛean ar dilanko hoyokʼpe. Ạsurren raj ar uniren saṅge lạṛhại phạdko ńelte alope botorokʼa se alope hadosokʼa, ente uni sãote okoe menakʼko onko khon abo soṅgete okoe menae uni do arhõe maraṅgea." 
2Chronicles32:8 Uni sãote do eken manwakoakʼ daṛe menakʼa, menkhan abo goṛowabon lạgitʼ ar abo secʼte lạṛhại lạgitʼ do aboren Probhu Isor menaea.” Hoṛko do Jihudạren Hiskiạ rajakʼ katha ańjomkate uniyakʼ kathareko ṭehãḍena." 
2Chronicles32:9 Tayomte Ạsurren Senakerib raj ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do Lakisko gheraokeda ar adom hoṛ do Jerusalemteye kolkatʼkoa. Uni do Jihudiren Hiskiạ raj ṭhen ar onḍe jarwa akan Jihudạren sanam hoṛko ṭhen noa kathae roṛ gotʼkada," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Ạsurren raj Senakerib doe meneda, ‘cele cetanrepe ṭehãḍ akante ape do gherao ocoakanre hõ Jerusalemrege menakʼpea?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Reṅgecʼ ar tetaṅte jemonpe gujukʼ onate Hiskiạ do niạ kathateye bulạuetʼpea baṅma, aperen Probhu Isorge Ạsurren rajakʼ ti khone bańcaopea mente." 
2Chronicles32:12 Hiskiạ do cetʼ apnartetʼge ona than boṭkocʼ ar pinḍko bae marao giḍi akada? Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko do cetʼ bae menakatʼkoa, eken mitʼṭecʼ pinḍrege sewae hoyokʼa ar ona cetanre dhup do jered hoyokʼa mente?" 
2Chronicles32:13 “ ‘Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmren sanam jạtrenko lạgitʼ iń ar ińren hapṛamko okaṭakʼle ceka akatʼ ona do cetʼ bape baḍaea? Onko jạtrenkoren debota do cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon akoakʼ disạmko rukhiyạ daṛe akawada? 
2Chronicles32:14 Noko jạtrenko okoe do ińren hapṛamkoko marao giḍiletʼko onkoren debotako modre okoe do ińakʼ ti khon uniren hoṛkoe bańcao daṛeatʼko tahẽkana? Enḍe khan cekate aperen Isor do ińakʼ ti khon apeye bańcaopea? 
2Chronicles32:15 Ńitokʼ Hiskiạ do nonka alo baṛeye eṛepe are bulạupe ma. Uni do alope pạtiạuaea, ente jãhãe jạtren se jãhã rajosṭiren debota iń se ińren hapṛamkoakʼ ti khon acʼren hoṛko bae bańcao daṛeakatʼkoa. Enḍekhan tinạkʼ khạṭigea je, aperen debotako do ińakʼ ti khon bako bańcao daṛeapea mente.’ ”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Senakerib ren hoṛko do Probhu Isorren hoṛko ar uniren guti Hiskiạ upạrte arhõ aema kathako roṛkeda. 
2Chronicles32:17 Ona chaḍa Senakerib do Israelren Probhu Isor opomane lạgitʼte ciṭhire uni upạrte niạ kathae olkeda, “Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmren jạtkoren debotako cetʼleka ińakʼ ti khon akoren hoṛko bako bańcao daṛeakatʼko, ṭhik onkage Hiskiạren Isor hõ ińakʼ ti khon acʼren hoṛko bae bańcao daṛeakoa.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Ar Jerusalemren okoeko hoṛ do pạcri cetanre tahẽkan onko botor udukʼako lạgitʼ Ibri pạrsite ãṭ aṛaṅte memenko ehopʼena jemon nagrahako dokhol daṛeakʼ. 
2Chronicles32:19 Onko do manwa titeko benaokʼ dhạrtiren sanam jạtkoren debotako reaṅ okako roṛketʼ onkage Jerusalemren Isor reaṅ hõko roṛkeda. 
2Chronicles32:20 Ona iạte Hiskiạ raj ar Amosren hopon Jesaea do koejoṅ hotete sermaren Isor ṭhen rakʼ joṅkin ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles32:20 Ona iạte Hiskiạ raj ar Amosren hopon Jesaea do koejoṅ hotete sermaren Isor ṭhen rakʼ joṅkin ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles32:21 Onate Probhu Isor do mitʼṭen goḍete kolkedea uni do Ạsurren rajakʼ ḍeraren sanam lạṛhại birko, mukhiyạko ar subedarkoe marao giḍikatʼkoa. Onate Senakerib doe lajaoente apnarakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calaoena. Ar acʼren debotawakʼ mundilteye boloyen khan unire adom hoponko do uniko gocʼkedea." 
2Chronicles32:22 Nonkate Probhu Isor do Ạsurren raj Senakerib ar eṭakʼ sanamkoakʼ ti khon Hiskiạ raj ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa. Uni do jotowakʼ secʼ khon nirạiteye dohoketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles32:23 Ar ḍherkoge Jerusalemre Probhu Isor ńutumte dan-sandesko ạgukeda ar Jihudạ raj do Hiskiạ lạgitʼ damanakʼ sandese ạgukeda. Onate ona okte khon sanam jạtren hoṛko do ạḍiko manotkedea. 
2Chronicles32:24 Onako dinre Hiskiạ do gujukʼ dạkhile ruạyena. Ar Hiskiạ do Probhu Isor ṭhene koeketʼ khan Probhu Isor doe roṛ ruạradea ar mitʼṭecʼ hahaṛa cinhại emadea. 
2Chronicles32:25 Menkhan Hiskiạ do monre bạḍại hecʼadea. Uni cetanre cetʼleka bhore ńamketʼ ona leka do bae kạmileda; onate uni cetanre, Jihudạ ar Jerusalem cetanre Probhu Isor doe edreyena." 
2Chronicles32:26 Unre Hiskiạ do acʼakʼ mon reakʼ bạḍạitetʼe bujhạuketʼ khan uni doe nindhạnena ar uni sãote Jerusalemren hoṛko hõ. Ona iạte Hiskiạ oktere Probhu Isorakʼ edre do onkore baṅ hecʼ paṛaolena. 
2Chronicles32:27 Hiskiạwakʼ do ạḍi utạr dhon-durib tahẽkantaea. Uniyakʼ sona, rupạ, muni, mukta, jut so mosola, ḍhal ar sanam lekan damanakʼ jinisko dohoy lạgitʼ uni do mitʼṭecʼ khajańci oṛakʼe benaokeda." 
2Chronicles32:28 Ona chaḍa anajko, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunum dohoy lạgitʼ hõ murạikoe benao ocokeda ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ janwar ar bhiḍi-merom dohoko lạgitʼ oṛakʼko hõe benao ocokeda." 
2Chronicles32:29 Uni do apnar lạgitʼ ạḍi utạr atoko ar nagrahakoe benao rakapʼkeda. Uniren ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi, meromkoakʼ lekha do ạḍi ḍher hoyena, ente Isor do ạḍi utạr dhonkoe emade tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hiskiạ do Gihon dakʼ jharna reakʼ nalaye dhapao esetʼketʼte Dạud nagraha reakʼ pạchim secʼte dakʼe idiketʼa. Uni do joto kạmiregeye jo bahayena. 
2Chronicles32:31 Disạmre okaṭakʼ hahaṛa kạmi ńellen ona reaṅ kuliye lạgitʼ tinre Babelren mukhiyạko do goḍetko kolkedea unre Isor do uni biḍạue lạgitʼ iạteye bạgi oṭo akade tahẽkana, jemon uniyakʼ monre menakʼakʼ sodorokʼtae." 
2Chronicles32:32 Hiskiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha ar Isor botorae reaṅ do Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbiyakʼ dorson puthire ar “Jihudạ ar Israel rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles32:32 Hiskiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha ar Isor botorae reaṅ do Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbiyakʼ dorson puthire ar “Jihudạ ar Israel rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles32:33 Tayomte Hiskiạ do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar Dạud bõsrenkoakʼ topa ṭạnḍi aṛereko topakadea. Uniye gujukʼ jokhecʼ Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛ do uniko manotkedea. Ar uniren hopon Manase do uni bodolteye rajena. 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase do gelbar bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre mõṛẽgel mõṛẽ bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Chronicles33:2 Probhu Isor do Israelko samaṅ khon okoe jạtrenkoe laga ńirletʼko tahẽkan onko leka hirkhạwakʼko kạmikate Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles33:3 Uniren apat Hiskiạ do okako than boṭkocʼkoe marao giḍiletʼ onako uni do arhõe jut arokeda. Ona chaḍa uni do Bakʼal debota ńutumte pinḍko ar mitʼṭecʼ Asera khunṭiye benaokeda. Uni do sermaren ipilkoe sewawako kan tahẽkana are ḍobokʼako kan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles33:4 Okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ reaṅ Probhu Isore menletʼ, “Iń do jaejug Jerusalemren tahena,” Probhu Isorakʼ ona oṛakʼre uni do pinḍkoe benaokeda." 
2Chronicles33:5 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ banar racarege uni do sermaren ipilko ńutumte adomakʼ pinḍkoe benaokeda. 
2Chronicles33:6 Ar Bin-Hinom buru lodamre uni do acʼren hoponko seṅgelreye samaṅketʼkoa. Okoe do bạṛicʼakʼ cinhạkote tayom daram reakʼ kathako lại daṛeakʼkan tahẽkan, onko jạdu udukʼko ar gukʼniko ar bhutko hotete ar bạṛicʼ jiuko sãote jopoṛaoko dohoyetʼ tahẽkan onko tulucʼe solhayetʼ tahẽkana. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre ḍher bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate uniye bekusi ocoyede tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles33:7 Uni do okoe murtikoe lakʼ rokʼ ocoketʼko onko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼreye dohokatʼkoa. Niạ oṛakʼ reaṅge Probhu Isor do Dạud ar uniren hopon Solomone metatʼkin tahẽkana, “Niạ oṛakʼ ar Israelren sanam gusṭiko tala khoniń bachao akawan niạ Jerusalemge iń lạgitʼ jaejug tahen oṛakʼ iń benaoa." 
2Chronicles33:8 Ar Israelko okako hukumiń em akatʼko, metakʼme Mose hotete okako ạn-ạri ar niạmkoń emakan ona joton salakʼko pańjae enḍekhan okaṭakʼ disạm do aperen hapṛamkoń em akatʼko onḍe khon onko do ar tishõ bạń laga ńirkoa.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko bạṛicʼ horteye ạyurketʼkoa; ona iạte Probhu Isor do okoe jạtrenko Israel hoponko samaṅ khone marao giḍiletʼko onko khon hõ ḍher bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko ehopʼena. 
2Chronicles33:10 Probhu Isor do Manase ar uniren hoṛko ṭhen kathae roṛetʼ tahẽkangea menkhan onko do ona bako luturatʼtaea. 
2Chronicles33:11 Onate Probhu Isor do onko upạrte Ạsur rajren subedarkoe ạguketʼkoa. Onko do Manaseko bondikedea ar hoṛmore ạṅkusko lagaoadete pitạl reakʼ sikṛikoteko hạṛi paṭakateko idikedea. 
2Chronicles33:12 Ar Manase do muhinreye paṛaoen khan uni do acʼren Probhu Isor ṭhen dayae khojkeda ar acʼren hapṛamkoren Isor samaṅreye nindhạnena. 
2Chronicles33:13 Uniyakʼ koejoṅ ańjomte Probhu Isor do daya hecʼadea ar uniyakʼ nehõr joṅakʼe ańjomketʼtaete Jerusalem ar uniyakʼ rajosṭiye ruạṛ ạguketʼtaea. Unre Manase doe bujhạukeda, Probhu kangeae Isor do." 
2Chronicles33:14 Tayomte uni do Dạud nagraha bahre reakʼ pạcri do buru lodam reakʼ Gihon dakʼ jharna khon Ophel buru beṛhae pạchim secʼ hako phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ hor hạbicʼ arhõ usul pạcriye benaoketʼte onae kajak ruạṛkeda. Uni do Jihudạ reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ sanam ato ar nagrahakore subedarkoe bahalketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles33:15 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon debotakoakʼ muṭhạnkoe oḍok giḍikatʼkoa. Uni do Jerusalemre ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ buru cetanre okako pinḍe benao ocoletʼ onako hõe oḍok keda. Ar nagraha bahreteye giḍikada.
