2Chronicles33:16 Ona tayom uni do Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ arhõe jut arokeda ar ona cetanre helmel ar gun makʼnao samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅkeda. Uni do Jihudạren hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa jemon onko do Israelren Probhu Isorko sewawae. 
2Chronicles33:17 Ar hoṛko do unhõ than boṭkocʼkore janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼko tahẽkana, menkhan onko do akoren Probhu Isor ńutumtegeko samaṅetʼko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles33:18 Manaseakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha, Isor ṭhen uniyakʼ koejoṅ ar Israelren Probhu Isor ńutumte ńeńelko okako kathako metade tahẽkana ona jotowakʼ do “Israelren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa." 
2Chronicles33:19 Uniyakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ katha, ar uniyakʼ nehõr joṅte Isorakʼ daya reakʼ katha, uniyakʼ sanam kại ar bepạtiạr reakʼ katha, Isor samaṅre ạuri nindhạnokʼre than boṭkocʼkoe benao ocoletʼ ar Asera muṭhạn ar lakʼ rokʼ akatʼko murtiko reakʼ joto katha do ńeńelkoakʼ puthire olakana." 
2Chronicles33:20 Tayomte Manase do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhene senena ar raj oṛakʼrege uni doko topakadea. Ar uniyakʼ jaegare do uniren hopon Amon do raje hoyena. 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon do bargel bar bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre bar bochor raje calaoketʼa. 
2Chronicles33:22 Uni do acʼren apat Manase lekage Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar Manase okoe murhutʼkoe rokʼ benaoletʼko Amon do onkogeye sewawako kan tahẽkana ar janwarko hõe dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles33:23 Menkhan uniren apat Manase leka Probhu Isor ṭhen do bae nindhạnlena; uni do kạkạitegeye tahẽyena. 
2Chronicles33:24 Amonren kạmiyạko do uni upạrteko soṛojontroketʼte raj oṛakʼrege uniko khũnkedea. 
2Chronicles33:25 Menkhan Amon raj upạrteko soṛojontroletʼ disạmren hoṛko do onko jotoko gocʼketʼkoa ar uniren hopon Josiạ do uniyakʼ jaegareko rajkedea. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiạ do irạl bochor umerre raje hoylena ar pe gel mitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. 
2Chronicles34:2 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar uniren hapṛam Dạudakʼ hortegeye calakʼkan tahẽkana; ar ona hor khon oka secʼge bae ghańjeṛlena. 
2Chronicles34:3 Uniyakʼ rajokʼ irạlakʼ bochorre uniyakʼ umer komge tahẽkanre hõ uniren hapṛam Dạudren Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼ reaṅgeye mone murukkeda. Uniye rajokʼ gelbar bochor oktere uni do than boṭkocʼko, Asera muṭhạnko, lakʼ rokʼ murtiko ar dul benao murhutʼko Jerusalem ar Jihudạ khone sạṅgińketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles34:4 Uni samaṅre Bakʼal debotawakʼ pinḍko do rạputʼ giḍikada; ar onako cetanre oka dhup dạniko tahẽkan onakoe makʼ rạputʼ ocokeda ar Asera muṭhạn, lakʼ rokʼ murtiko ar dul goṛhon murtikoe rạputʼ gejerketʼkoteye holoṅ ḍigirketʼkoa. Ar onakore okoe do janwarko dãṛẽyetʼko tahẽkan onkoakʼ topa cetanre onako dhuṛiye chiṭiạukada." 
2Chronicles34:5 Pinḍko cetanre naekekoakʼ jaṅkoe atarketʼtakoa. Nonkate uni do Jihudạ ar Jerusaleme saphakeda. 
2Chronicles34:6 Manase, Ephrayim ar Simeon ṭoṭha reakʼ ato ar nagrahakore ar ona aḍepase reakʼ jarkharakʼkore, Napthali ṭoṭha hạbicʼ joto jaega reakʼ sanam pinḍ ar Asera muṭhạnkoe rạputʼ gejerkeda ar lakʼ rokʼ murtiko hõe gejerketʼkoa ar ar Israel reakʼ sanam jaegare uni do dhup dạnikoe makʼ kaṭra kuṭrạkeda. Ar ona tayom do Jerusalemteye ruạṛ hecʼena." 
2Chronicles34:7  
2Chronicles34:8 Josiạwakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre uni do disạm ar mundil oṛakʼ saphae tayom acʼren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ jut araoe lạgitʼ Asaliạ hopon Saphan, nagraharen subedar Makʼaseya ar Itihãs olokʼicʼ Joahasren hopon Joaha takoe kolketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles34:9 Onko do maraṅ naeke Hiskiạ ṭhenko senena ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼte tinạkʼ ṭaka poesako ạgu hoylen, metakʼme rurukhiyạ Liwiko oka ṭaka poesa Manase ar Ephrayim gusṭirenko ṭhen khon ar Israelren sarecʼ sanam hoṛko ar Jihudạ ar Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko ar Jerusalemrenko ṭhen khon ạgulen ona do maraṅ naeke ṭhenko jimạkada." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ona tayom onako ṭaka do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi ńel todarot lạgitʼ okoeko cetanre bhar tahẽkan onkoko ematʼkoa. Ar ńel todarotko do mundil oṛakʼ jut aroe lạgitʼ mistrikoko ematʼkoa," 
2Chronicles34:11 metakʼme Jihudạren rapajko oka oṛakʼko marao ocoletʼ onako lạgitʼ onko do chutạr mistriko ar raj mistriko tạkako ematʼkoa jemon onko do mońjte getʼakʼ dhiri ar oṛakʼre joṛao lạgitʼ kaṭko kiriń ạgu daṛeakʼ. 
2Chronicles34:12 Menkhan onko mistriko do pạtiạr salakʼko kạmikeda. Onko ńel todarotko lạgitʼ onko cetanre do Jahat ar Obadiạ ńutuman Morari bõsren barea Liwi ar Kohat bõsren Sakariạ ar Mesulam ar okoe Liwiko do mońj bajnako daṛeakʼ kan tahẽkan. 
2Chronicles34:13 Noko do bojha gogokʼ hoṛko cetanre bahal akanko tahẽkana ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiren hoṛko hõko ńel todarotetʼko tahẽkana. Liwiko modre adomko do olokʼko, kạmiyạko ar rurukhiyạkoko tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles34:14 Onko do tinre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạgu akatʼ ṭaka poesako oḍok ạguyetʼ tahẽkana unre naeke Hilkiạ do Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ puthiye ńamkeda. 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilkiạ do unre rajren olokʼicʼ Saphane lạiyadea, “Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ạn-ạri reakʼ puthiń ńam akada.” Ar niạ menkate ona puthi do Saphane emadea." 
2Chronicles34:16 Saphan do ona puthi raj ṭhen idikateye menkeda, “Amren gutiko cetanre oka kạmi reakʼ bhar tahẽkan ona do jotowakʼgeko kạmi akada." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre oka ṭaka tahẽkan onko do ona oḍokʼkate ńel todarotko hoṛko ar kạmiyetʼkan hoṛko ematʼkoa.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Unre olokʼicʼ Saphan do niạ katha raje baḍae ocokedea, “Naeke Hilkiạ do mitʼṭecʼ puthiye emakawạdińa.” Ar niạ menkate Saphan do raje paṛhao ańjomadea." 
2Chronicles34:19 Raj do ạn-ạri reakʼ kathako ańjomkate acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼkeda. 
2Chronicles34:20 Uni do Hilkiạ, Saphanren hopon Ahikam, Mikaren hopon Abdon, Saphan ar rajren gokʼṛoyicʼ Asayateko niạ hukume ematʼkoa," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Okaṭakʼ puthi ńamen onare cetʼ ol menakʼa ona do senkate Israel ar Jihudạren sarecʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen kulijoṅpe. Aboren hapṛamko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka bako senlente ar niạ puthire olakan lekahõ bako kạmiletʼte uniyakʼ edre do abore paṛao akana.” 
2Chronicles34:22 Unre Hilkiạ ar acʼ sãote raj okoekoe kolletʼko onko do niạ reaṅ baḍae lạgitʼ maejiu nạbi Hulda ṭhenko senena. Hulda do kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ rurukhiyạicʼ Salumren bạhui tahẽkana. Salum do Hasraren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Toknatren hopone tahẽkana. Uni do Jerusalem reakʼ dosarakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye tahenkan tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles34:23 Hulda do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Israelren Probhu Isor do memene metadińạ, okoe iń ṭhen apeye kolakatʼpe senkate unipe metaea Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Jihudạren raj samaṅre ona puthire ol akan oka sarapanakʼ kathako paṛhao hoyakan onako muhin do niạ jaega ar onaren hoṛko cetanregeń paṛao ocoya." 
2Chronicles34:24  
2Chronicles34:25 Onko do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińạ ar debotako ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ kana ar onkoakʼ titeko benao akatʼko sanam boṅga murhutʼkote ińko khĩs ocoyediń kana. Ona iạte niạ jaega cetanre ińakʼ edre doń paṛao ocoygea ar ińakʼ edre seṅgel do baṅge ĩṛĩjokʼa. 
2Chronicles34:26 Probhu Isor ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼ okoeye kol akatʼpe uni Jihudạren rajpe metaea Israelren Probhu Isore meneda," 
2Chronicles34:27 ‘niạ jaega ar onaren hoṛko upạrte okań menakatʼ ona ańjomkate amakʼ mon do kastao akantama ar iń samaṅrem nindhạn akana ar amakʼ kicricʼ oṛecʼkateyem rakʼ homor akada. Ar noakom nonka akatʼte iń Probhu Isor do amakʼ koejoṅiń ańjom akada. 
2Chronicles34:28 Ona iạte iń do usạrage amren hapṛamko ṭheniń idimea ar am do suluktem topa ocokʼa. Niạ jaega cetanre ar okoe do nonḍeko girobasokʼ kan onko cetanre okako muhiniń paṛao ocoy ona do amakʼ mẽtʼ bae ńela.’ ” Onko do Huldawakʼ ona katha ańjomkate raj ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. 
2Chronicles34:29 Unre raj do hoṛ kolkate Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam murubbikoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles34:30 Uni do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, naekeko, Liwiko, disạm hoṛko, lekman hoṛkoante Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre okaṭakʼ bondobos puthi ńamlen ona reakʼ sanamakʼ kathakoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles34:31 Raj do acʼakʼ jaegare teṅgokate Probhu Isorakʼ horte calakʼ lạgitʼ goṭa mon ar ontorte uniyakʼ sanam hukumko, ạn-ạriko manao lạgitʼ, metakʼme niạ puthire olakʼ bondobos reakʼ sanamakʼ katha manao lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅreye kiriạ ocoketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles34:32 Ona tayom uni do Jerusalem ar Benjạminren jarwa akan sanam hoṛko hõ inạ lekageye kiriạ ocoketʼkoa. Jerusalemren hoṛko do Isorakʼ, metakʼme onkoren hapṛamkoren Isorakʼ bondobos reakʼ manao ar ganaoko ehopʼena." 
2Chronicles34:33 Josiạ do Israelko tabereko tahẽkan sanam disạm khon Hirkhạwan joto lekan boṅga murtikoe sạṅgiń giḍiketʼkoa ar Israelre jarwa akan sanamko salakʼ uni do Probhu Isore sewawadea. Uni tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din hoṛko do onkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ horteko calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles35:1 Josiạ do Jerusalemre Probhu Isor ńutumte bańcao porobe porobena. Pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre hoṛko do bańcaokʼ porobre bheḍako gurketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles35:2 Uni do naekeko akoakʼ kạmireye bahalketʼkoa ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre dewa sewa kạmireye udgạuketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles35:3 Liwiko, okoe do sanam Israelkoko cetʼako kan tahẽkan ar Probhu Isor ńutumte okoe doko begar ocolen uni do okoe metatʼkoa, “Israelren raj Dạudren hopon Solomon do okaṭakʼ mundile benaoletʼ tahẽkan onḍe ape do sonotakʼ sindukpe dohokakʼa. Ona do tarenre ar baṅ gokʼ lagaoapea. Ńitokʼ ape do aperen Probhu Isor ar uniren hoṛko sapʼ sorakope." 
2Chronicles35:4 Israelren Dạud raj ar uniren hopon Solomonakʼ olakʼ leka, apeakʼ nijakʼ bõs lekate niṭ akatʼ dolre sapʼsosor kạmi lạgitʼ sapṛao tahenpe." 
2Chronicles35:5 “Ape jạtren hoṛko, metakʼme Israel bõskoren mitʼke mitʼ hạṭińrenko lạgitʼ adom Liwiko do akoakʼ bõs lekate ona hạṭińren hoṛko soṅgete idikate sonot oṛakʼ reakʼ racare teṅgokʼpe." 
2Chronicles35:6 Ape do bańcaokʼ porobren bheḍako gurkate sapha maṛaṅokʼpe ar Mose hotete emakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka ape jạtren hoṛko jemon bańcaokʼ porobko porob daṛeakʼ ona bebostaepe.” 
2Chronicles35:7 Ona tayom Josiạ do onḍe jarwa akan sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ńutumte pegel hajar merom ar bheḍa hoponko ar pe hajar ḍaṅgrae emena. Raj do acʼakʼ sompotti khon noko doe danketʼkoa. 
2Chronicles35:8 Rajren kạmiyạko hõ apan ạpin kusileka disomren hoṛko, naekeko ar Liwiko ńutumteko danketʼkoa. Hilkiạ, Sakariạ ar Jehiyel ńutuman Isorakʼ oṛakʼren mukhiyạko do bańcaokʼ porob reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ bar hajar turui sae merom ar bhiḍiko ar pe sae ḍaṅgrako naekekoko ematʼkoa." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniạ ar uniren bar boeha Semaya ar Nathanel, Hasabiạ, Josabad ar Jeyel noko mukhiyạ hoṛ do bańcaokʼ porob lạgitʼ mõṛẽ hajar merom ar bhiḍiko ar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅgrako Liwi ṭhenko danketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles35:10 Nonkate sapʼsosor kạmi reakʼ bebosta hoyena ar rajakʼ hukum leka naekeko do apan ạpin jaegare ar Liwiko hõ akoakʼ judạ judạ dolrenko lekateko teṅgoyena. 
2Chronicles35:11 Liwiko do bańcaokʼ porobren merom ar bheḍako gurketʼkoa ar naekeko do onkoakʼ ti khon mãyãm hataokateko chiṭiạukeda, ar Liwiko do janwarko khalketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles35:12 Moseyakʼ puthire olakʼ hukum leka onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅko lạgitʼ mimitʼ bõsren judạ judạ hạṭińren hoṛko emako lạgitʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jiniskoko begar dohokeda. Onko do ḍaṅgrako reakʼ hõ onkageko kạmikeda. 
2Chronicles35:13 Niạm lekate onko do bańcaokʼ porobren bheḍa do seṅgelreko rapakʼ isinkedea ar samaṅokʼakʼ jel do ṭukucʼre, celaṅre, luihạre isinkate usạrate idikate hoṛkoko jom ocoketʼkoa." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ona tayom onko do apnar ar naekeko lạgitʼko bebostakeda, ente naekeko, metakʼme Aronren bõsko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ar itilko ńindạ hạbicʼko samaṅkeda. Ona iạte Liwiko do apnar ar Aron bõsren naekeko lạgitʼko bebostawana." 
2Chronicles35:15 Dạud, Ashap, Heman ar rajren ńeńelicʼ Jeduthun tekoakʼ hukum leka Ashap bõsren sekʼreńko ar bajnadarko do apan ạpin jaegareko tahẽkana. Ar mitʼke mitʼ phaṭok duạrre do rurukhiyạkoko tahẽkana. Onko do kạmi bạgi oṭowakʼ jạruṛge baṅ hoylentakoa, ente onkoren Liwi boehako do onko lạgitʼko bebosta akatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles35:16 Nonkate Josiạ rajakʼ hukum leka bańcaokʼ porob manao lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍ cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ lạgitʼ enhilokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ sanam sewa kạmi reakʼ bebosta hoyena. 
2Chronicles35:17 Ar okoe Israelkoko jarwa akan tahẽkan onko do ona jokhecʼ bańcaokʼ porob ar bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porob do eae din hạbicʼko manaokeda. 
2Chronicles35:18 Samuel nạbi tayom ar Israelko do bańcaokʼ porob tishõ nonka do bako porob akan tahẽkana. Naekeko, Liwiko ar Jerusalemren hoṛko sãote jarwa akan Jihudạ ar Israelren sanam hoṛkoante Josiạ cetʼ leka bańcaokʼ porobe poroben onka do Israel rajko modre ar okoege bako porob daṛeatʼ tahẽkana." 
2Chronicles35:19 Josiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre niạ bańcaokʼ porobko porobena. 
2Chronicles35:20 Josiạ do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam kạmikoe sạtketʼ khan Misorren raj Neko do phurạt gaḍa ṭhen Karkemiste lạṛhại lạgitʼe rakapʼ hecʼena. Unre Josiạ hõ uni teṅgo darame lạgitʼe oḍok calaoena. 
2Chronicles35:21 Menkhan Neko do hoṛ kolketʼkoteye roṛgotʼkada, “E Jihudạren raj, iń sãote amakʼ do cetʼtam? Am akromonme lạgitʼ do bạń hijukʼ kana, menkhan onko hoṛkogeń akromonetʼkoa okoe tulucʼ do lạṛhạiyiń ehopʼ akantiń. Isor do usạrae lạgitʼgeye mitạńkana, onate Isor do iń sãotege menae ar am do alom teṅgo daramińạ, ar baṅ khanem marao utạrokʼa.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Josiạ do bae ruạṛlena, bickom uni sãote lạṛhại lạgitʼ eṭakʼ kicricʼ horokʼkateye sapṛaoena. Isorakʼ hukumte Neko okae metade ona do bae luturatʼte Megido reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok senena." 
2Chronicles35:23 Unre dhinkiạko do Josiạ rajko tuńkede khan acʼren hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “ Nonḍe khon idiyińpe, ạḍi kajakiń ghạl akana.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Onate onko do uniyakʼ rãt gạḍi khonko kuṭuṅ pheḍkedea ar eṭakʼ rãt gạḍireko ladekedete Jerusalemteko idikedea, ar onḍegeye gocʼena. Uni do uniren hapṛamkoakʼ topareko baekadea ar Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren sanam hoṛ do uni lạgitʼko homor halaṅkeda." 
2Chronicles35:25 Josiạ lạgitʼ Jirimiạ do homor halaṅ sereńe joṛaokeda ar teheń hõ sanam gaenahako Josiạwakʼ homor sereńko sereńeda. Ar Israelko talare niạ do mitʼṭecʼ niạm lekage hoyena ar homor sereń reakʼ puthire hõ ona do ol hoyena. 
2Chronicles35:26 Josiạwakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha ar Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạri lekate Isor botorae reakʼ sanam kathako pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ “Israel ar Jihudạren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. 
2Chronicles35:27  
2Chronicles36:1 Tayomte disạmren hoṛko do Josiạwakʼ jaegare uniren hopon Jehoahasko rajkedea. 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahas do bargel pe bochor umerre raje hoyena ar Jerusalemre pe cando raje calaokeda. 
2Chronicles36:3 Misorren raj Neko do Jerusalem khon uniye ocokʼkedea ar Jihudạ cetanre khajna lekate pon ṭon rupạ ar pegel are keji sonae ladeadea. 
2Chronicles36:4 Misorren raj do uniren dadattetʼ Eliakim do Jihudạ ar Jerusalem cetanre raje dohokadea ar uniyakʼ ńutume bodolketʼtaete Jehoyakime dohoketʼtaea. Ar Neko do Misorte Joahase sapʼ idikedea. 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoyakim do bargel mõṛẽ bochor umerre raje hoyena ar gelmitʼ bochor Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uni do acʼren Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles36:6 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do uniye akromonkedete pitạl reakʼ sikṛite tolkate Babelteye idikedea. 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnesar do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon jinisko idikate Babelre acʼakʼ mundilreye dohokada. 
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoyakimakʼ eṭakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ katha ar uni okako hirkhạwakʼe kạmiletʼ ar uni upạrte okako ńamlen ona joto do “Israel ar Jihudạren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs” ńutumanakʼ puthire ol menakʼa. Ar ona tayom uniren hopon Jehoyakin do uniyakʼ jaegareye rajena. 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoyakin do gel irạl bochor umerre raje hoylena ar pe cando gel din Jerusalemre raje calaokeda. Uni hõ Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
2Chronicles36:10 Bochor mucạtʼre Nebukadnesar raj do hoṛ kolkate uni ar uni sãote Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ damanakʼ jinisko Babelteye idikedea, ar Jehoyakinren bokottetʼ Sedekiạ do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren raje dohokedea." 
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekiạ do bargel mitʼ bochor umerre raje hoylena ar Jerusalemre gelmitʼ bochor raje calaokeda. 
2Chronicles36:12 Uni hõ Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Jirimiạ nạbi, okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ kathae lạiyetʼ tahẽkan, uni samaṅre bae nindhạnlena." 
2Chronicles36:13 Ona chaḍa Nebukadnesar, okoe do Isor ńutumte uniye kiriạ ocolede, uni upạrteye hulkeda. Uni do hoṭokʼe keṭecʼketʼtaea ar ontore kuṭhinketʼtaete Israelren Probhu Isor secʼ do ar bae ruạṛlena." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ona chaḍa naekekoren sanam mukhiyạko ar disạm hoṛko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko leka hirkhạwakʼ kạmikateko kạikeda ar Probhu Isor Jerusalemre okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ do acʼ ńutumteye begar doholetʼ ona hõe bhonḍ ocokeda. 
2Chronicles36:15 Israelkoren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor do ghane ghane hoṛ kolkate onkoe sontoretʼko tahẽkana, ente uni do acʼren hoṛko ar acʼakʼ tahen oṛakʼ cetanre daya tahẽkantaea." 
2Chronicles36:16 Menkhan onko do Isoren kol hoṛkoko landa-dhutʼako kan tahẽkana, ar onkoakʼ kathako chi baṅakʼ kan tahẽkana ar uniren nạbikoko ṭiṭkạriyetʼko tahẽkana. Mucạtʼre Probhu Isorakʼ edre do uniren hoṛko upạrte caṛhaoena; ar rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ jãhãn hor do ar baṅ tahẽlen takoa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Onko upạrte Probhu Isor do Babelren raje ạgukedea. Uni raj do mundil oṛakʼre onkoren juạnkoe gocʼketʼkoa, uni do juạn kuṛi ar koṛako, haṛamko se umerte laha akanko okoege bae mãyãwatʼkoa. Isor do onko sanamkoge uni rajakʼ tireye jimạkatʼkoa." 
2Chronicles36:18 Babelren raj do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ lạṭu kạṭicʼ sanamakʼ jinis ar dhon-durib, raj ar uniren kạmiyạkoakʼ dhonko Babelteye idikeda." 
2Chronicles36:19 Uniren hoṛko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼko jeretʼada ar Jerusalem reakʼ pạcriko rạputʼkeda. Onko do onḍenakʼ lạṭu lạṭu joto oṛakʼko jeretʼada ar sanam damanakʼ jinisko nosṭo giḍikada. 
2Chronicles36:20 Okoe gujukʼ ti khon rukhiyạko ńamketʼ onko do Babelteye idiketʼkoa, ar Paras reakʼ raj ạuri teṅgokʼ hạbicʼ onko do Nebukadnesar raj ar uniren hoponkoren golamko hoyena." 
2Chronicles36:21 Niạ oktere Israel disạm do acʼakʼ jirạukʼ-bochorreye jirạuena. Jirimiạ hotete roṛlen Probhu Isorakʼ katha eae gel bochor ạuri purạukʼ hạbicʼ onkoakʼ disạm reakʼ sanam jumiko do khạlige tahẽyente jirạuena. 
2Chronicles36:22 Jirimiạ hotete roṛlen Probhu Isorakʼ katha purạukʼ lạgitʼ Parasren raj Koresakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Probhu Isor do Koresakʼ ontorre nonkan uskure danadea ona iạte uni do acʼakʼ sanam rajosṭire roṛte ar ol hotete noae lại sodorkeda: 
2Chronicles36:23 “Parasren raj Kores do niạ kathae meneda, ‘sermaren Probhu Isor do dhạrti reakʼ sanam rajosṭi ińe em akawạdińa ar Jihudạ reakʼ Jerusalemre acʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼe bachao akadińạ. Uniren hoṛko modre, metakʼme ape talare okoeye khojkan uni do onḍeye calakʼma ar uniren Probhu Isor do uni sãoreye tahenma.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Jirimiạ hotete roṛlen Probhu Isorakʼ katha purạukʼ lạgitʼ Parasren raj Korese rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Probhu Isor do Koresakʼ ontorre nonkan uskure danadea onate uni do sanam rajosṭire roṛte ar ol hotete noae lại sodorkeda: 
Ezra1:2 “Parasren raj Kores do niạ kathae meneda, ‘sermaren Probhu Isor do dhạrti reakʼ sanam rajosṭi ińe em akawạdińa ar Jihudạ reakʼ Jerusalemre acʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼe bachao akadińạ." 
Ezra1:3 Uniren hoṛko modre, metakʼme ape talare okoeye khojkan uni do Jerusalemte senkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼe benaoma, ente uni do Jerusalemre menaea. Ar okoe onḍeko senokʼ onkoren Isor do onko soṅgetegeye tahena." 
Ezra1:4 Isorren hoṛko okoe do ńithõ jiwetʼ menakʼko onko do jãhãregeko girobasokʼkan onko modre Jerusalemte okoe calakʼko menjoṅkan onko aḍepaseren hoṛko do sona, rupạ, emateakʼ jinisko ar janwarkoko em goṛoakoma ar Jerusalemre Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ apnarakʼ kusite dan sandesko emokʼma.’ ”" 
Ezra1:5 Noate Jihudạ ar Benjạminren bõs mukhiyạko, naekeko ar Liwiko talare okoekoakʼ ontorre Isor do monsubại janam ocoketʼtako onko mimitʼko do Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼko sapṛaoena." 
Ezra1:6 Onko aḍepaseren sanam hoṛko do sona, rupạ reakʼ bhajan, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko, janwarko ar damanakʼ jiniskoko ematʼkote onkoko goṛowatʼkoa ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ apnarakʼ kusi leka danko emena." 
Ezra1:7 Ona chaḍa Nebukadnesar do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ okako jinis Jerusalem khon idikate acʼren debotawakʼ mundilreye doholetʼ, Kores raj do khajańci sordar Mithredath hotete onakoe oḍok ạgukeda. Ar Mithredath do Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Sesbasar onakoe lekhawadea." 
Ezra1:8  
Ezra1:9 Onako jinis do nonka leka tahẽkana: pegel sona reakʼ gamlako, mitʼ hajar rupạ reakʼ gamlako, bargel are goṭecʼ churiko," 
Ezra1:10 pegel sona reakʼ bạṭiko, ponsae gel goṭecʼ rupạ reakʼ bạṭiko ar mitʼ hajar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko." 
Ezra1:11 Onḍe do jotote mõṛẽ hajar ponsae sona ar rupạ reakʼ jinisko tahẽkana. Bondi dosare bidisiạre girobasokʼ kan hoṛko do tinre Babel khon Jerusalemteko hecʼena unre Sesbasar do niạko jinis soṅgeteye ạgu darakeda. 
Ezra2:1 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do okoeko hoṛ bondikate Babelteye idiletʼko onko modren ḍherkoge Jerusalem ar Jihudạre apan ạpin nagraha ar atoteko ruạṛ hecʼena. 
Ezra2:2 Noko hoṛko do Serubabel, Jesua, Nehemiạ, Seraya, Reyelaya, Mordekae, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigwai, Rehum, ar Bakʼana sãoteko ruạṛ hecʼlena. Ar okoe Israel herel hoponko ruạṛ hecʼlen onkoakʼ lekha do nonka leka tahẽkana:" 
Ezra2:3 Paros bõsren hoṛko do bar hajar mitʼsae eaegel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:4 Sephatiạren do pe sae eaegel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:5 Araren do eae sae eaegel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Ezra2:6 Pahat-Moabakʼ bõsren do Jesuạ ar Joabakʼ bõsren bar hajar irạl sae gelbar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:7 Elamren do mitʼ hajar barsae mõṛẽgel pon hoṛ; 
Ezra2:8 Saturen do are sae pon gel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Ezra2:9 Sakaeren do eae sae turuigel hoṛ; 
Ezra2:10 Baniren do turui sae pongel bar hoṛ; Bebairen turui sae bargel pe hoṛ: Asgadren do mitʼ hajar barsae bargel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:11  
Ezra2:12  
Ezra2:13 Adonikamren do turui sae turuigel turui hoṛ; 
Ezra2:14 Bigwairen do bar hajar mõṛẽgel turui hoṛ: 
Ezra2:15 Adiniren ponsae mõṛẽgel pon hoṛ; 
Ezra2:16 Jeheskiạ hopon Ater bõskoren do aregel irạl hoṛ: 
Ezra2:17 Besairen do pesae bargel pe hoṛ; 
Ezra2:18 Jorahoren do mitʼsae gelbar hoṛ: 
Ezra2:19 Hasumren do barsae bargel pe hoṛ: Gibarren do aregel mõṛẽ hoṛ; Bethlehem atoren do mitʼsae bargel pe hoṛ; 
Ezra2:20  
Ezra2:21  
Ezra2:22 Netopharen do mõṛẽgel turui hoṛ: 
Ezra2:23 Anathotren do mitʼsae bargel irạl hoṛ; 
Ezra2:24 Asmawetren pongel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:25 Kiriath-Jearim Kephira ar Beyerothren do eae sae pongel pe hoṛ; 
Ezra2:26 Rama Gebaren do turui sae bargel mitʼ hoṛ; 
Ezra2:27 Mikmasren do mitʼsae bargel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:28 Bethel ar Airen do barsae bargel pe hoṛ; 
Ezra2:29 Neboren do mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ; Magbisren do mitʼsae mõṛẽgel turui hoṛ; dosaricʼ Elamren do mitʼ hajar barsae mõṛẽgel pon hoṛ; 
Ezra2:30  
Ezra2:31  
Ezra2:32 Harimren do pesae bargel hoṛ; 
Ezra2:33 Lod, Hadid ar Ononren do eae sae bargel mõṛẽ hoṛ;" 
Ezra2:34 Jerikhoren do pesae pongel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Ezra2:35 Senakʼren do pe hajar turui sae pegel hoṛ; 
Ezra2:36 Naekekoakʼ lekha do nonka: Jidayakʼ bõsren Jesua bõsren do are sae eae gel pe hoṛ; 
Ezra2:37 Imerren do mitʼ hajar mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ; 
Ezra2:38 Pasurren do mitʼ hajar barsae pongel eae hoṛ; 
Ezra2:39 Harimren do mitʼ hajar gel eae hoṛ; 
Ezra2:40 Liwikoakʼ lekha do nonka: Jesua ar Kadmiyel bõsren Hodawi bõsren do eaegel pon hoṛ; 
Ezra2:41 Sekʼreńkoakʼ lekha do nonka; Asaph bõsren mitʼsae bargel irạl hoṛ. 
Ezra2:42 Koejoṅ oṛakʼren rurukhiyạkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼsae pegel are hoṛ. Noko doko hoyokʼkana Salum, Aṭer, Ṭalmon, Akub, Haṭita ar Sobai bõsren hoṛko." 
Ezra2:43 Koejoṅ oṛakʼren sapʼsosorko doko hoyokʼkana: Sipha, Hasupha ar Tabotren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:44 Keros, Siah ar Padonren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, Hagab ar Akubren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:46 Hagab, Samlai ar Hananren hoponko; Gidel, Gohar ar Reayalren hoponko; Resin, Nekod ar Gasamren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:47  
Ezra2:48  
Ezra2:49 Us, Paseya ar Besairen hoponko;" 
Ezra2:50 Asna, Meyunim ar Nephismren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuk, Hakupha ar Harhuren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:52 Baslut, Mehida ar Harsaren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:53 Barkos, Sisera ar Temaren hoponko;" 
Ezra2:54 Nesia ar Hatipharen hoponko. 
Ezra2:55 Solomonren golamkoren bõsko: Noko doko hoyokʼkana Sotai, Hasopherot, Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 Jakʼala, Darkon, Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 Sephaṭia, Hatil, Pokeret-Hasebayim ar Amiren hoponko." 
Ezra2:58 Koejoṅ oṛakʼren sapʼsorko ar Solomonren gutikoren hoponko do jotote pesae aregel bar hoṛko tahẽkana; 
Ezra2:59 Tel-Melah, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adan ar Emer ṭoṭha khon okoeko hecʼlen tahẽkan onko do Israel mente bako sabud daṛeada." 
Ezra2:60 Onko doko hoyokʼkana: Delay, Ṭobiạ ar Nekoda bõsren turui sae mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ;" 
Ezra2:61 Noko mod khon Hobai, Hakos ar Barsilai bõsko do bõs tạlikare akoakʼ bõsko khojleda menkhan bako ńamletʼtakote naekeko mod khon onko doko chaṭao ocoyena. Barsilai do ona ńutumtegeye hoho ocokʼkan tahẽkana, ente Gileadiạ Barsilairen mitʼṭen hoponerae baplaledea." 
Ezra2:62  
Ezra2:63 Ar disạm cakʼlaoyicʼe hukumleda Urim ar Thumim beohar lạgitʼ naekeko ạuriko ńamokʼ hạbicʼ okoe hõ jemon ona sonot utạrakʼ jomakʼ aloko jomma. 
Ezra2:64 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼen goṭa goṭa manḍerren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel bar hajar pesae turuigel tahẽkana. 
Ezra2:65 Ona chaḍa eae hajar pe sae pegel eae hoṛ do guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar barsae hoṛ do sekʼreń dolrenko tahẽkana. 
Ezra2:66 Onkoren do eae sae pegel turui goṭen sadomko ar bar sae pongel mõṛẽ goṭen khaccorko," 
Ezra2:67 ponsae pegel mõṛẽ goṭen ũṭko ar turui hajar eae sae bargel goṭen gadhako tahẽkana. 
Ezra2:68 Ar Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko seṭeren tayom onko bõsren adom adom mathako do lahateakʼ ṭhạ̃ire Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ arhõ benao lạgitʼ danko emkeda. 
Ezra2:69 Onko mimitʼko do akoakʼ daṛe leka niạ kạmi lạgitʼ ponsae mõṛẽ keji sona, pe hajar barsae mõṛẽgel keji rupạ ar naekeko lạgitʼ mitʼsae kicricʼ do khajańci oṛakʼreko dohokeda." 
Ezra2:70 Ar naekeko, Liwiko, sekʼreńko, koejoṅ oṛakʼren rurukhiyạko ar sapʼsosorko ar eṭakʼ hoṛko, metakʼme sanam Israelko do apan ạpin ato ar nagrahare girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Ezra3:1 Israelko do apan ạpin ato ar nagrahare girobasokʼko ehopʼen tayom eaeakʼ candore sanam hoṛko do mitʼ domte Jerusalemreko jarwayena. 
Ezra3:2 Ar ona tayom Josadakren hopon Jesua ar uni sãoten naekeko ar Solṭielren hopon Serubabel ar uni sãoten hoṛko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobokʼ lạgitʼ Isorren hoṛ Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrire olakʼ lekate Israelren Isorakʼ pinḍko benaokeda. 
Ezra3:3 Onko do aḍepaseren hoṛko botoratʼkore hõ lahateakʼ rehetʼ cetanrege pinḍko benao arokeda ar ona cetanre setakʼ ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ oktere Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko ehopʼena. 
Ezra3:4 Ona tayom onko do sostor reakʼ katha leka Chạuni porobko porobena ar niạm lekate dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ niṭakatʼ lekha leka jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅetʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezra3:5 Ona tayom khon onko do dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, ambas ńindạ reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, Probhu Isor ńutumte niṭakatʼ porob reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar apnarakʼ kusite ạguakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅko ehopʼena." 
Ezra3:6 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ baṅ hoyakan tahẽkanre hõ onko do eaeakʼ cando reakʼ pạhil din khon Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobokʼko ehopʼena. 
Ezra3:7 Onko do rajmistriko ar chutạr mistriko ṭakako ematʼkote Sidon ar Turren hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ, darkha rasa ar sunumko ematʼkoa jemon onko do Parasren Keros rajakʼ hukum lekate Lebanon khon Jappho hạbicʼ jalapurite debdạru kaṭkoko ạgu daṛeakʼ." 
Ezra3:8 Jerusalemre Isorakʼ oṛakʼre seṭeren tayom dosar bochor reakʼ dosar candore Solṭiạlren hopon Serubabel, Josadakren hopon Jesua ar onkoren sarecʼ boehako do kạmiko ehopʼkeda. Noko boehako doko hoyokʼkana naekeko, liwiko ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko okoe do bondi dosa khon Jerusalemteko ruạṛ hecʼlen tahẽkan. Bargel bochor ar ona khon ḍher umerren liwiko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ ńel todarotreko bahal ocoyena." 
Ezra3:9 Jesua ar uniren hoponko ar boehako, Hodbiạ bõsren Kadmiyel ar uniren hoponko, Henadadren hoponko ar onkoren hoponko ar boehako okoe do mitʼte Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkan onkoko ńel todarotketʼkoa. Noko do jotoge liwiko tahẽkana." 
Ezra3:10 Ado rajmistriko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ tinreko bạisạukeda unre Israelren raj Dạudakʼ hukum leka Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok hoyokʼ lạgitʼ naekeko do akoakʼ kicricʼko horokʼketʼte sakwako hataokeda ar liwiko mod khon Ashapren hoponko do kortalante apan ạpin jaegareko teṅgoyena. 
Ezra3:11 Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao ar ṭhonok reakʼ sereń sereńteko menkeda, “Uni doe bhạlạyạnicʼ kana, Israelko cetanre uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana.” Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ bạisạuen khan sanam hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea." 
Ezra3:12 Menkhan ḍherkoge tinre rạskạteko andoṛkeda unre okoe do lahateakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼko ńelletʼ onkan ḍher haṛam naekeko, liwiko ar bõsren mathako do niạ koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ ńelte ạḍi ãṭko rakʼkeda." 
Ezra3:13 Hoṛko do nunạkʼko andoṛkeda je, okaṭakʼ do rạskạteakʼ ar okaṭakʼ do homorteakʼ rakʼ kana ona do okoege bako bujhạu daṛeada. Ona aṛaṅ do ḍher sạṅgiń khon hõ ańjomena." 
Ezra4:1 Jihudạ ar Benjạminkoren bạiriko doko ańjomkeda, bondiko doko ruạṛ hecʼakana ar Israelren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ mundilko benaokana." 
Ezra4:2 Unre onko bạiriko do Serubabel ar bõskoren mathako ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Mundil oṛakʼ benao kạmire ale hõ ape sãotele kạmiya, ente ale hõ aperen Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼle kurumuṭuyeda. Ạsurren raj Esarhadon do nonḍeye ạgu akatʼle tayom khon ale hõ Isor ńutumte janwarkole samaṅetʼkoa.”" 
Ezra4:3 Menkhan Serubabel, Jesua ar Israelren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ mukhiyạkoko menkeda, “Aleren Isor ńutumte oṛakʼ benaore ale tulucʼ apeakʼ do cetʼ bakhra hõ bạnukʼtapea. Parasren Keros rajakʼ hukum leka Israelren Probhu Isor ńutumte ale eskarge onale onkaea.”" 
Ezra4:4 Unre onkoakʼ disạmreko girobasokʼ kan eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko do Jihudạren hoṛkoakʼ tiko lạbṛukʼ ketʼtakoa ar botor udukʼakoko ehopʼena jemon ona oṛakʼ aloko benao daṛeakʼ. 
Ezra4:5 Onko upạrte kạmikate onkoakʼ monejoṅakʼko rạputʼ ocoytako lạgitʼ Paras rajren kạmiyạko ṭakako ematʼkoa. Onko do Keros rajakʼ rajokʼ oktere ar uni tayom Doreabosakʼ rajokʼ oktere hõ inạ kạmigeko kạmikeda. 
Ezra4:6 Ahasberosakʼ rajokʼ ehopʼrege onko bạiriko do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko upạrte mitʼṭecʼ olakʼ hoteteko lạliskeda. 
Ezra4:7 Parasren raj Artaksasto oktere hõ Bislam, Mitredat, Tabeyel ar uniren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ soṅgetenko do Artaksasto ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhiko olkeda. Ona ciṭhi do Arami pạrsite torjomakate ol hoylena." 
Ezra4:8 Jerusalem upạrte Artaksasto raj ṭhen disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Rehum ar olokʼicʼ Simsaiyakʼ ciṭhi tahẽkana. 
Ezra4:9 (Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Rehum ar olokʼicʼ Simsai do niạ ciṭhikin olkeda. Unkin sãote bikʼcạrko, kạmiyạko, cạlạuako, Erekrenko, Babelrenko, Susarenko metakʼme, Elamiko, ar sarecʼ jạtrenko one onko maraṅ ar manotan Osnarbnipal do Samariạ ato ar nagraha ar phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ ṭoṭhakoreye girobas ocoletʼko.)" 
Ezra4:10  
Ezra4:11 Onko do Artaksasto raj ṭhen okaṭakʼ ciṭhiko olletʼ ona do nonka tahẽkana: “Amren gutiko, metakʼme phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛeren hoṛko do Artaksasto raj ṭhenle oleda." 
Ezra4:12 Maharaj do baḍae jạruṛtaea je, am ṭhen khon okoe Jihudiko ale ṭhenko hecʼakan onko do Jerusalemteko sen akana ar huhul ar bạṛicʼ nagraha arhõko benao rakapʼeda; onko do ona reakʼ bhit ar rehetʼko bạisạu aroyeda." 
Ezra4:13 Maharaj do arhõ baḍae jạruṛaea je, ona nagraha ar bhitko benao dohṛakʼ enḍekhan onko hoṛ do khajna, bheja, se mạsul do ar bako emokʼa. Ar onate rajakʼ do lokshan hoyokʼtaea." 
Ezra4:14 Ale do raj oṛakʼ reakʼ buluṅle jometʼte raje bemanotokʼ do bale khojkana. Ona iạte ale do niạ khobor raj ṭhenle kolkeda. 
Ezra4:15 Onate raj do acʼren hapṛamkoakʼ Itihãs puthire sendrakateye ńelma. Ona puthire ol menakʼa, Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ huhul nagraha kana; niạ nagraha do rapajko ar disạmkoren cakʼlaoko ạḍi sasete em akatʼkoa ar ḍher laha khonge ona nagrahare do hulko hõ hoe hijukʼkana. Ar ona iạtege nagraha do ḍahao maraolena." 
Ezra4:16 Ale do rajle baḍae ocoyede kana, niạ nagraha do arhõ benao rakabokʼ ar ona reakʼ bhitko benao ruạṛokʼ, enḍekhan phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ ṭoṭha do am tabere ar baṅ tahena.”" 
Ezra4:17 Raj do ona ciṭhi reakʼ niạ roṛ ruạṛe kolkeda: “Subedar Rehum, olokʼicʼ Simsai ar Samariạ ar phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ judạ judạ ṭoṭhare girobasokʼ kan judạ judạ hudạren cetan kạmiyạko ṭhen niạ ciṭhiń oletʼ kana. Apeakʼ bhạlại baṛe hoyokʼma." 
Ezra4:18 Okaṭakʼ ciṭhi iń ṭhenpe kol akatʼ ona do torjomakate paṛhao ańjomakana. 
Ezra4:19 Ar ińiń hukumketʼ khan ona reakʼ khoj do hatao hoyakana ar baḍae ńam akana je, ḍher jug laha khonge ona nagraha do rapajko upạrteye hul ạguyeda; ona do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ jaega kana onḍenko hoṛ do ḍanṭaore tahen bako kusiyakʼa." 
Ezra4:20 Daṛean rapajko do Jerusalem khon phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ goṭa ṭoṭhako rajokʼ kan tahẽkana ar onḍenko hoṛko hõ khajna, bheja ar mạsulko emokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezra4:21 Ńitokʼ do onko hoṛko hukumakope jemon akoakʼ kạmiko thirtako ar ińakʼ hukum ạuriko ńam hạbicʼ ona nagraha do alo jemonko benao rakab. 
Ezra4:22 Sontorokʼpe, niạ kạmi do alope ḍhilisiliya. Raj ar sorkarakʼ lokshan do cedakʼpe ḍher ocowakʼa?”" 
Ezra4:23 Artaksasto rajakʼ ciṭhi do Rehum, olokʼicʼ Simsai ar judạ judạ maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạkoko paṛhao ańjomatʼko são sãote onko do Jerusalemren Jihudiko ṭhenko calaoena ar onkoakʼ kạmi jormoṭkateko bondkatʼ takoa." 
Ezra4:24 Nonkate Jerusalemre Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi do thirena; Parasren raj Darjawesakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochor hạbicʼ ona do thirge tahẽyena. 
Ezra5:1 Darjawes rajakʼ rajokʼ dosarakʼ bochorre Hagae nạbi ar Eddoren hopon Sakariạ nạbi do Israelkoren Isor ńutumte Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren Jihudiko ṭhen Isor emakʼ niạ katha lạlạikin ehopʼena. 
Ezra5:2 Unre Sealṭiyelren hopon Serubabel ar Josadakren hopon Jesua do Jerusalemre Isorakʼ oṛakʼ arhõ benao aroekin ehopʼena. Ar Isorren nạbikin hõ onko sãote tahẽkate goṛoako kin ehopʼena. 
Ezra5:3 Unre phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ ṭoṭharen disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Tatenai, Setharbosenai ar onḍenko maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạko do Jihudiko ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Mundil oṛakʼ benao aroe reakʼ hukum do okoeye emakatʼpea?”" 
Ezra5:4 Onko do arhõko menkeda, “Okoe niạ dolanko benaoetʼkan onkoakʼ ńutum do cetʼ tako?”" 
Ezra5:5 Menkhan Jihudikoren murubbiko secʼ Isorakʼ nońjor tahẽkana. Ar Darjawes ṭhen khobor ạuri kol hạbicʼ ar uni ṭhen khon olakʼ reakʼ roṛruạṛ ạuriko ńam hạbicʼ mukhiyạko do kạmi bako bond ocoletʼkoa. 
Ezra5:6 Phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛeren disạm cakʼlaokin Tatenai, Setharbosenai ar onḍenko maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạko do Darjawes raj ṭhen oka ciṭhiko kolketʼ ona do nonka leka tahẽkana: Maharaj Darjawes, amakʼ bhạlại baṛe hoyokʼma." 
Ezra5:7  
Ezra5:8 Maharaj baḍaekakʼme je, ale do Jihudạ reakʼ maraṅ Isorakʼ oṛakʼtele senlena. Onḍe hoṛko do lạṭu lạṭu dhirikote oṛakʼko benaoeda ar bhitkore do borgako bạisạueda. Ar ạḍi joton salakʼko kạmikana ar kạmiko do laha idikʼ kana." 
Ezra5:9 Murubbikole kuliketʼkoa, “Mundil benao aroe lạgitʼ do okoeye hukum akatʼpea?”" 
Ezra5:10 Ar onkoakʼ ńutum hõle kuli akatʼkoa jemon onkoren mukhiyạkoakʼ ńutumle baḍae ocome arle ol doho daṛeakʼ. 
Ezra5:11 Onko doko roṛ ruạṛatʼlea, “Ale do ot ar sermaren Isorren golam kanale. Ale do ona mundil oṛakʼ arhõle benao aroyeda oka do Israelren mitʼṭen maraṅ raj ḍher serma lahareye benaoletʼ tahekan." 
Ezra5:12 Menkhan aleren hapṛamko do sermaren Isorko bekusi ocoledete uni do Babelren raj Kaldi Nebukadnesar rajakʼ tireye jimạletʼlea. Nebukadnesar do niạ mundile dhaṅ dhaserleda ar hoṛko bondikate Babelteye idiletʼkoa. 
Ezra5:13 Menkhan Babelren raj Koresakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochorre uni do Isorakʼ niạ oṛakʼ arhõ benao lạgitʼe hukumakada. 
Ezra5:14 Uni do Babel reakʼ mundil khon Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sona ar rupạ reakʼ bhajankoe oḍok akada one okaṭakʼ do Jerusalem mundil khon Nebukadnesare idiletʼ tahẽkan. Ar Keros raj do acʼe bahal akade subedar Sesbasarakʼ tire onakoe jimạ akada. 
Ezra5:15 Raj do uniye metade tahẽkana, Jerusalemre lahateakʼ ṭhạ̃irege jemon Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do arhõ benao ruạṛokʼ ar onako jinis jemon idikate onḍege doho ruạṛokʼ." 
Ezra5:16 Onate Sesbasar do Jerusalemte hecʼkate Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạukeda. Ar enhilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ ona reakʼ benao kạmi calakʼ kana ar ạuri sạtokʼa.” 
Ezra5:17 Ar ńitokʼ maharaje khoj khan tobe do Babelren rajakʼ nothi-potro dohoy jaegare khoj hataokatem ńel daṛeakʼa, Jerusalem reakʼ Isorakʼ niạ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ hukum do Keros raj sạrigeye emakana se baṅa. Ar niạ tayom ale babotre maharaj okae goṭae ona baṛeye baḍae ocolema." 
Ezra6:1 Darjawes raje hukumketʼ khan hoṛko do Babelren rajakʼ nothi-potro dohoy reakʼ jaegare senkate onako sendrakeda. 
Ezra6:2 Onare Media disạmren Ekbatana ńutuman raj nagrahare mitʼṭecʼ guṛhạ puthi ńamena. Onare niạ katha ol tahẽkana: Dikʼsạ dohowakʼ 
Ezra6:3 Kores rajakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Jerusalemren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reaṅ uni do noae hukum akada: “Janwar samaṅko reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jaega lekate mundil do arhõ benao arokʼma ar ona reakʼ rehetʼ do kajakte bạisạu dohṛakʼma. Ona do hoyokʼa turui gel moka usul ar turui gel moka osar. 
Ezra6:4 Onare pe aṭal do lạṭu lạṭu dhiri reakʼ ar mitʼ aṭal do kaṭ reakʼ. Ar jotowakʼ khorocko do rajakʼ dhon bhanḍar khon emokʼma. 
Ezra6:5 Ona chaḍa Nebukadnesar Jerusalem reakʼ mundil khon okako sona ar rupạ reakʼ bhajanko Babelteye idiletʼ tahẽkan onako do arhõ Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ ṭhik jaegare dohokʼma.” 
Ezra6:6 Unre Darjawes raj do noae roṛ ruạṛkeda: “Phurạt gaḍa reakʼ pạchim aṛe reakʼ ṭoṭhakoren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Tatenai ar Setharbosenai ar onḍenko maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạko, ape do ńitokʼ ona jaega khon pharakre tahenpe." 
Ezra6:7 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmire badha alope ema. Jihudikoren subedar ar murubbiko do Isorakʼ ona oṛakʼ lahateakʼ jaegaregeko benaoma. 
Ezra6:8 Ona chaḍa Isorakʼ ona oṛakʼ benao kạmire Jihudikoren murubbiko lạgitʼ cetʼko cekae lagaoape ona reaṅ iń hukum apekana. Ar ona kạmi jemon alo thirokʼ ona lạgitʼ noko hoṛkoakʼ purạ khoroc do rajakʼ khajańci khon emokʼ hoyokʼtapea, metakʼme phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe ṭoṭhako reakʼ raj bheja khon." 
Ezra6:9 Sermaren Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ Jerusalemren naekeko do bạchurko, bheḍako ar bheḍa hoponko, guhum, buluṅ, darkha rasa ar sunum, metakʼme okako jạruṛokʼ ona emokʼ hoyokʼtapea. Onkoakʼ jạruṛokʼ leka dinạm hilokʼ noako do emokʼtege hoyokʼa," 
Ezra6:10 jemon onko do sermaren Isor ńutumte ataṅokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porob daṛeakʼ ar raj ar raj hoponkoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼko koe daṛeakʼ. 
Ezra6:11 Iń do arhõń hukumeda, jodi niạ hukum jãhãe bae batao enḍekhan uniyakʼ oṛakʼ khon mitʼṭecʼ koalipe or boja ar onape coeloya ar unipe sobokʼ tabeya. Ar uniyakʼ niạ behok iạte uniyakʼ oṛakʼ do mạilạ ḍhipi leka hoyokʼtaea." 
Ezra6:12 Jãhãe raj se jãhãe jạtrenge jodi niạ hukume bebatao ar Jerusalem reakʼ ona mundil dhaṅdhaser reakʼe monejoṅ enḍekhan Isor, onḍe okoeye tahẽnkan uni do jemon uniye marao giḍikae. Ar iń Darjawesge niạ hukum doń emena. Noa do jemon joton salakʼ manao idikʼ.”" 
Ezra6:13 Darjawes raj do ona hukume emletʼ iạte phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe ṭoṭhakoren disạm cakʼlao kin Tatenai, Setharbosenai ar onḍenko maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạko do joton salakʼ onako palonkeda." 
Ezra6:14 Hagai nạbi ar Eddor hopon Sakariạ do Isorakʼ katha lekate udgạukin emokʼkan tahẽkana ar ona são sãote Jihudiren murubbiko do gạthni reakʼ kạmiko laha idikeda. Israelkoren Isorakʼ hukum lekate ar Parasren raj Kores, Darjawes ar Artaksastokakʼ hukumte onko do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmiko sạtkeda." 
Ezra6:15 Ar Darjawes rajakʼ rajokʼ turuiyakʼ bochorre Adar cando reakʼ tesarakʼ dinre mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ benao kạmi do sạt utạrena. 
Ezra6:16 Ona tayom Israelko do, metakʼme naekeko, liwiko ar bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan sarecʼ hoṛko do rạskạ salakʼ Isorakʼ oṛakʼko uḍhạukeda." 
Ezra6:17 Isorakʼ oṛakʼ uḍhạu lạgitʼ onko do mitʼsae ḍaṅgra, bar sae bheḍa ar pon sae bheḍa hoponko samaṅketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa sanam Israelkoakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ Israel gusṭiko reakʼ lekha lekate onko do gelbar goṭen meromko samaṅketʼkoa." 
Ezra6:18 Moseyakʼ puthire cetʼleka olakan onkage Jerusalemre Isorakʼ sewa kạmi lạgitʼ naekeko ar liwiko do judạ judạ dolreko bahal ocoyena. 
Ezra6:19 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼen hoṛko do pạhil cando reakʼ gelpon din hilokʼre bańcao porobko porobena. 
Ezra6:20 Naekeko ar liwiko do apnartetʼko sapha maṛaṅena, ar onate sanamkogeko saphayena. Liwiko do apnar lạgitʼ, bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ ar onkoren naekeko lạgitʼ bańcaokʼ porobren bheḍako gurketʼkoa." 
Ezra6:21 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼ akan Israelko ar disạmre girobasokʼ kan Israelko okoe do Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka calakʼa mente aḍepase be-Jihudiko khon apnartetʼko begar doholen onko sanamkoge mitʼ sãote ona jelko jomkeda. 
Ezra6:22 Onko do eae din hạbicʼ rạskạ salakʼ bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ porobko porobena. Onko do rạskạteko perecʼena, ente Ạsurren raj jemon Israelren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmireye goṛowako onate Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ mone ạcruletʼtaea." 
Ezra7:1 Niạko ghoṭna tayom Parasren raj Artaksasto rajokʼ oktere Esra do Babel khone hecʼena. Esra do Serayaren hopone tahẽkana, ar Seraya do Asariạren hopon, Asariạ do Hilkiạren hopon," 
Ezra7:2 Hilkiạ do Salumren hopon, Salum do Sadokren hopon, Sadok do Ahiṭubren hopon," 
Ezra7:3 Ahiṭub do Amariạren hopon, Amariạ do Asariạren hopon, Asariạ do Merayotren hopon," 
Ezra7:4 Merayot do Sehariạren hopon, Sehariạ do Usiren hopon, Usi do Bukiren hopon," 
Ezra7:5 Buki do Abisuạren hopon, Abisuạ do Pinhasren hopon, Pinhas do Eliaserren hopon ar Eliaser do maraṅ naeke Aronren hopone tahẽkana." 
Ezra7:6 Esra do dhorom gurui tahẽkana. Israelren Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ Moseyakʼ ạn-ạriko cetanre uni do bhage bud ar ạkil tahẽkantaea. Uniren Probhu Isorakʼ ti do uni cetanre tahẽkante okae khoj onage raj do uniye emaekan tahẽkana. Artaksasto rajakʼ rajokʼ eaeakʼ bochorre Esra do Jerusalemte tinreye hecʼlena unre uni sãote thoṛa Israelko hõko hecʼ toralena. Onko modre do naekeko, Liwiko, gaenahako ar mundil oṛakʼren rurukhiyạ ar sapʼ sosor kạmi hoṛko tahẽkana." 
Ezra7:7  
Ezra7:8 Isorakʼ bhạlạiyanakʼ ti do Esra cetanre tahẽkante uni do pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil dinre Babel khon mohnḍakate mõṛẽakʼ cando reakʼ pạhil dinre Jerusalemteye hecʼ seṭerena. 
Ezra7:9  
Ezra7:10 Esra do Israel disạmre Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko paṛhao ańjomako, onako manao, ar ona reakʼ niạmko ar hukumko cetʼako lạgitʼ apnartetʼe emena." 
Ezra7:11 Okoe do Israelko emako lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ sanam hukum ar niạmko reaṅ cecetʼakʼe ńamletʼ uni naeke ar dhorom guru Esra ṭhen Artaksasto raj do niạ ciṭhiye olleda; 
Ezra7:12 Sermaren Isorakʼ ạn-ạriren cecetʼicʼ naeke Esra ṭhen iń rajkoren raj Artaksasto do ciṭhiń oleda. Amakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼma baṛe. 
Ezra7:13 Iń do ńit niạ hukumiń emokʼkana je, ińakʼ rajosṭire okoe Israelko ar onkoren naekeko ar Liwiko am sãote Jerusalemte ruạṛ calakʼko menetʼ onko doko sen ruạṛ daṛeakʼa." 
Ezra7:14 Apeakʼ tire aperen Isorakʼ okaṭakʼ ạn-ạri menakʼ ona leka Jihudạ ar Jerusalem reakʼ obosta cetʼleka menakʼ ona khobor hatao lạgitʼ raj ar uniren eae sosolhako do onḍeko kolletʼmea. 
Ezra7:15 Israelren Isor, okoe do Jerusalemreye tahenkan uni ńutumte raj ar uniren sosolhako tinạkʼ sona ar rupạ akoakʼ kusi lekako emokʼkan onam idi toraea." 
Ezra7:16 Ona chaḍa okako sona ar rupạ Babel disạm khonem ńam ar Israelko ar onkoren naekeko Jerusalemre onkoren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ akoakʼ kusite okako em ona jotogem iditoraea. 
Ezra7:17 Am do onako sona ar rupạte ḍaṅgrako, bheḍako ar bhiḍi hoponko ar ona soṅgeteakʼ anaj-samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko mońjte ńelkatem kirińa ar Jerusalemre aperen Isorakʼ oṛakʼre pinḍ cetanre onakom samaṅa." 
Ezra7:18 Ona tayom am ar amren Jihudi boehako do sarecʼakʼ sona ar rupạte aperen Isorakʼ sana leka oka bhagepe hudis onape onkaea. 
Ezra7:19 Aperen Isorakʼ oṛakʼre dewa sewae lạgitʼ oka bhajanko amakʼ tirem emocoyen onako do Jerusalemre aperen Isor samaṅrem hạjira. 
Ezra7:20 Ona chaḍa aperen Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ ar cetʼko jạruṛ ona reakʼ khoroc do rajakʼ khajańci oṛakʼ khonem idiya. 
Ezra7:21 Iń Artaksasto raj do ńitokʼ phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ sanam khajańci oṛakʼren rurukhiyạko niạ hukumiń emako kana je, sermaren Isorakʼ ạn-ạriren naeke Esra ape ṭhen okae khoj ona jotowakʼ ṭhik lekape emaea." 
Ezra7:22 Ape do pe hajar are sae keji hạbicʼ rupạ, gel irạl hajar keji hạbicʼ guhum, bar hajar bar sae liṭar hạbicʼ darkha rasa, bar hajar bar sae liṭar hạbicʼ sunum ar tinạkʼ buluṅ lagaokʼ onape emaea." 
Ezra7:23 Sermaren Isor cetʼlekae hukum akatʼ ona lekage Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ jotowakʼ joton salakʼpe kạmiya. Raj ar uniren hoponkoakʼ rajosṭi upạrte uniyakʼ edre do alo jemon sodorokʼtae. 
Ezra7:24 Ale do arhõle metape kana je, Isorakʼ oṛakʼren jãhãe naekeko, Liwiko, gaenahako, rurukhiyạko, sapʼsosor kạmiko se eṭakʼ jãhãe kạmiyạko cetanre jãhãn khajna se bheja ladeako reakʼ ektiạri do okoeyakʼge bạnukʼtapea." 
Ezra7:25 E Esra, Isor reaṅ amakʼ oka ạkil menakʼ ona lekate am do phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛeren sanam hoṛko bicạrko lạgitʼ nonkan kạmiyạko ar bikʼcạrkom bahalkoa okoe do amren Isore emakan ạn-ạriko baḍae. Ar okoe ona bako baḍae onko do onape cetʼakoa." 
Ezra7:26 Okoe aperen Isorakʼ ạn-ạri se rajakʼ hukum bako manao onko do ṭhik lekape sạjạikoa. Ona sạjại do hoedaṛeakʼ khan gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea se disạm khone laga oḍok ocokʼa se sompottiye behat ocokʼa se hajot khanareye bhorao ocokʼa. 
Ezra7:27 Aboren hapṛamkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtaema. Jerusalemre Isorakʼ oṛakʼre nonkan manot udukʼ reakʼ sana do rajakʼ ontorreye hoe ocoketʼtaea. 
Ezra7:28 Raj ar uniren sosolhako ar uniren sanam ektiạran kạmiyạko samaṅre unige asambheṛe dulạṛkedeńạ. Iń cetanre ińren Probhu Isorakʼ ti tahẽkante dil iń ńamkeda ar iń sãote Jerusalemte ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼ Israelko mod khon mukhiyạko hõń jarwa mitʼketʼkoa. 
Ezra8:1 Artaksasto raje rajokʼkan tahẽkanre tinạkʼ bõs-mukhiyạko do iń sãote Babel khonko ruạṛ hecʼlen onkoakʼ tạlika do nonka leka: 
Ezra8:2 Pinehas bõsko modre Gersom; Ithamar bõsren modre Daniel; Dạud bõsren modre Sekaniạ bõsren Hatus; 
Ezra8:2 Pinehas bõsko modre Gersom; Ithamar bõsren modre Daniel; Dạud bõsren modre Sekaniạ bõsren Hatus; 
Ezra8:3 Parosakʼ bõsko modre Sakariạ ar uni soṅgeten tạlikare ńutum ol akan tako mitʼsae mõṛẽgel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:4 Pahat-Moabakʼ bõsko modre Serahiạren hopon Eliye-honae ar uni soṅgeten barsae hoṛ; 
Ezra8:5 Satuakʼ bõsko modre Jehasiyelren hopon Sekaniạ ar uni soṅgeten pesae hoṛ; 
Ezra8:6 Adinakʼ bõsko modre Jonathanren hopon Ebed ar uni soṅgeten mõṛẽgel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:7 Elamakʼ bõsko modre Athaliạren hopon Jesaeya ar uni soṅgeten eae gel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:8 Sephatiạwakʼ bõsko modre Mikaelren hopon Sebadia ar uni soṅgeten irạl gel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:9 Joabakʼ bõsko modre Jehiyelren hopon Obadiạ ar uni soṅgeten barsae irạlgel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:10 Baniakʼ bõsko modre Josiphiaren hopon Selomit ar uni soṅgeten mitʼsae turuigel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:11 Bebaiyakʼ bõsko modre Bebairen hopon Sakariạ ar uni soṅgeten bargel irạl hoṛ; 
Ezra8:12 Asgadakʼ bõsko modre Hakatanren hopon Johanan ar uni soṅgeten mitʼsae gel hoṛ; 
Ezra8:13 Adonikamakʼ bõsko modre okoe doko ruạṛ hecʼen onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Eliphelet, Jeuel ar Semaya ar onko soṅgeten turui gel hoṛ;" 
Ezra8:14 Bigwayakʼ bõsko modre Uthai ar Sabud ar unkin soṅgeten eae gel hoṛko. 
Ezra8:15 Ahawa secʼ ạtu oḍokʼ calao akan nala ṭhen iń do nokoko hoṛkoń jarwa mitʼketʼkoa ar ona jaegare ale do tạmbule beretʼketʼte onḍe pe dinle tahẽyena. Ar hoṛko ar naekeko talare tolaskate jãhãn Liwiko do bạń ńamletʼkoa. 
Ezra8:16 Unre iń do Elieser, Ariel, Semaya, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Sekaria, ar Mesulam ńutuman mukhiyạko ar Joyarib ar Elnathan ńutuman bar hoṛ cecetʼkin iń hoho ạgu ocoketʼkoa." 
Ezra8:17 Noko hoṛko do Kasiphiạre girobasokʼ kan mukhiyạ Ido ar uni bõsren mundilre sapʼsosorko ṭhen niạ katha lại lạgitʼ iń kolketʼkoa, “Ape do aboren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sapʼsosor kạmi lạgitʼ ale ṭhen hoṛko ạgukope.”" 
Ezra8:18 Aleren Isorakʼ bhạlạiyanakʼ ti do alere tahẽkante onko do Israelren hopon Liwi gusṭiren Mahale bõs tala khon Serebiạ ńutuman mitʼ ṭhen gạkhuṛ hoṛ ar uniren hoponko ar boehakote jotote gel irạl hoṛ ale ṭhenko ạguketʼkoa. 
Ezra8:19 Ona chaḍa onko do Hasabiạ ar Merari bõsren mod khon Jesaeya ar uniren boehako ar onkoren hoponkote jotote bargel hoṛ ar mundil oṛakʼre sapʼdapʼ kạmiko modre barsae bargel hoṛko ạguketʼkoa. Dạud ar uniren kạmiyạko do sapʼ dapʼkoren hapṛamkoko ṭhik doholetʼkoa jemon onko do Liwikoko goṛo daṛeako. Noko barsae bargel hoṛkoakʼ ńutum do tạlikare ol caṛhaoena. 
Ezra8:20  
Ezra8:21 Iń do Ahawa soḍokʼ ṭhen upạs dohoy lạgitʼ iń lại jạhirkeda jemon ale do aleren Isor samaṅre apnartetʼle nindhạn daṛeakʼ ar aleren gidrạko ar aleakʼ sanam sompottikoante nirạitele sen ruạṛ daṛeakʼ. 
Ezra8:22 Horre aleren bạirikoakʼ ti khon ale rukhiyạle lạgitʼ raj ṭhen lạṛhại phạdko ar aswariko koeye doń lajaoena, ente ale do rajle metade tahẽkana, “Okoe do Isorakʼ sana lekako calakʼ onko mimitʼko cetanre uniyakʼ bhạlạiyanakʼ ti menakʼa, menkhan okoe uniko bạgiyae onko sanamko cetanre uniyakʼ edre do paṛaokʼa.”" 
Ezra8:23 Onate ale dole upạskeda ar niạ reaṅ aleren Isor ṭhenle nehõrena, ar uni do aleakʼ koejoṅe ańjomketʼtalea." 
Ezra8:24 Ona tayom iń do gelbar maraṅ naekeko ar onko sãote Serebiạ, Hosbiạ ar onkoren gel Liwi boehakoń begarketʼkoa." 
Ezra8:25 Iń do onko ṭhen onako sona, rupạ ar bhajanko soṅkateń oḍokkeda one okaṭakʼ do raj ar uniren sosolhako, kạmiyạko ar onḍe jarwa akan sanam Israelko Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼko danletʼ tahẽkan." 
Ezra8:26 Iń do onko ṭhen gel are hajar mõṛẽsae keji rupạ, pe hajar keji rupạ reakʼ bhajanko ar pe hajar keji sonań jimạkeda." 
Ezra8:27 Ona chaḍa turui keji tala ojon reakʼ bargel goṭecʼ sona reakʼ bhajanko ar jhak jhak nirạ pitạl reakʼ barea bạṭi hõń ematʼkoa. 
Ezra8:28 Iń do onkoń metatʼkoa, “Niạko bạṭiko do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohoakana. Ona chaḍa niạko sona ar rupạ do aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte apnarakʼ sana leka dan akana." 
Ezra8:29 Ar tin hạbicʼ Jerusalemre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ khajańci oṛakʼren maraṅ naekeko, Liwiko ar Israelkoren bõs mathako samaṅre onako ạuripe soṅako unhạbicʼ sontorte onape rukhiyạ jotona.”" 
Ezra8:30 Inạ tayom naekeko ar Liwiko do Jerusalemte aboren Isorakʼ oṛakʼte idi lạgitʼ soṅakʼ sona, rupạ ar bạṭiko ataṅkeda." 
Ezra8:31 Pạhil cando reakʼ gelbarakʼ dinre ale do Jerusalem calakʼ lạgitʼ Ahawa soḍokʼ ṭhen khonle mohnḍayena. Ar aleren Isorakʼ ti do ale cetanre tahẽkana ar uni do horre bạiri ar ḍạkukoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạketʼlea. 
Ezra8:32 Nonkate ale do Jerusalemtele seṭerente onḍe pe dinle jirạuena. 
Ezra8:33 Ona tayom ponakʼ dinre ale do aleren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ona sona, rupạ ar bhajankole soṅketʼte naeke Uriạren hopon Meremotakʼ tirele jimạkeda. Meremot soṅgete do Pinhasren hopon Eliasere tahẽkana ar unkin sãote do Jesuaren hopon Josabad ar Benuiren hopon Noadiạ. Nukin bana hoṛge Liwikin tahẽkana." 
Ezra8:34 Sanamakʼ jinisge lekha ar soṅkate em hoyena ar ona jokhecʼ reakʼ soṅkha ar ojon do ol dohoyena. 
Ezra8:35 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼen hoṛko do Israelren Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅkeda. Onko do goṭa Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ gelbar goṭen ḍaṅgra, aregel turui goṭen bheḍa, eaegel eae goṭen bheḍa hopon ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ gelbar goṭen meromko emena. Noko jotoge Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ mente em hoyena." 
Ezra8:36 Onko do phurạt gaḍa pạchim aṛe reakʼ disạmko ar nagraharen cakʼlaoko ṭhen rajakʼ parwanako seṭeratʼkoa. Ona hukum ńamkate onko do hoṛkoko goṛowatʼkoa ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ hõ goṛoko emena. 
Ezra9:1 Niạko kạmi sạten khan mukhiyạko do iń ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Israelko ar onkoren naekeko ar Liwiko do onkoakʼ disạmre girobasokʼ kan judạ judạ jạtrenko khon apnartetʼ do bako begar dohoakan tahẽkana. Onko do Kananiko, Hittiko, Perisiko, Jebusiko, Amoniko, Moabiko, Misriko ar Amoriko leka hirkhạwakʼko kạmikana." 
Ezra9:2 Onko do apnartetʼ ar onkoren hoponko lạgitʼ bạhu lekate onko jạtren kuṛiko hataoketʼkoa, ar nonkate onko do sonot jạtrenko tulucʼko mesalena. Noa bepạtiạr reakʼ hor do mukhiyạko ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạkoge pạhilre horko udukʼatʼkoa.”" 
Ezra9:3 Niạ katha ańjomkate mon reakʼ kosṭote iń do horokʼakʼ kicricʼ iń oṛecʼkeda ar ińakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ ar gocoyiń racakʼ totʼketʼte hadosań duṛupʼ hapeyena. 
Ezra9:4 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan noko hoṛkoakʼ bepạtiạr babotre okoe do Israelren Isorakʼ katha disạkateko thar tharaoen onko mimitʼko do iń ṭhen hecʼkateko jarwayena. Ar ạyupʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼ okte hạbicʼ iń do onḍegeń duṛupʼ hape akan tahẽkana. 
Ezra9:5 Ona tayom ạyupʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼ jokhecʼ iń do mon reakʼ duk khoniń beretʼena, ar oṛecʼ kicricʼ ar aṅgrop horokʼ akatʼrege ikhṛumente ińren Probhu Isor samaṅre banar ti tiạrkateń koekeda," 
Ezra9:6 “E ińren Isor, am secʼ beṅgetʼ hõ lajaogeń ạikạueda, ente aleakʼ kại do aleakʼ bohokʼ cetan hara rakapʼ akantalea ar aleakʼ ghạṭ do sermae tiyạkʼ akada." 
Ezra9:7 Aleren hapṛamkoakʼ okte khon ehopʼkate teheń hạbicʼ ạḍitetʼle ghạṭ akada. Aleakʼ kại gunạkʼtege ale ar aleren rapajko, ar naekeko do eṭakʼ rajakʼ tireko bondi ocoakana arko gocʼ ocoakana, onko doko luṭ ocoakana arko bemanot ocoakana ar teheń hõ inạ dosarege menakʼa." 
Ezra9:8 “Menkhan ńit thoṛa okte lạgitʼ aleren Probhu Isor doe daya akatʼlete aleren thoṛa hoṛ do jiwetʼe dohoakatʼlea ar uniyakʼ sonot disạmre mitʼṭecʼ jaegae em akatʼlea. Nonkate aleren Isor do rạskại dan akatʼlea ar aleakʼ golam dosarele tahẽkanre jiwiye raṛecʼketʼtalea. 
Ezra9:9 Ale do golamko kanrehõle golam tahen oktere aleren Isor do bae bạgi giḍi akatʼlea. Paras raj samaṅre uni do pạtiạre beohar akada. Uni do aleye udgạuketʼlea jemon aleren Isorakʼ oṛakʼle benao aroe ar rạputʼ akan jaegako hõle jut ruạṛ. Uni do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemre nirạite tahen reakʼe bebosta akatʼlea. 
Ezra9:10 “Menkhan ńitokʼ do, E aleren Isor, niạ tayom ale do cetʼ jãhãnakʼle mendaṛekea? Am do amren nạbiko hotete okako hukumem em akatʼle ona dole bạgi akawada. Am dom menleda, ‘okaṭakʼ disạm ạidạri lạgitʼpe calakʼkan ona do onḍenko hoṛkoakʼ besapha iạte bhõnḍ akana. Onkoakʼ hirkhạwanakʼ kạmi iạte onko do disạm reakʼ mitʼ simạ khon eṭakʼ simạ hạbicʼ besaphawakʼteko perecʼ akada." 
Ezra9:11  
Ezra9:12 Ona iạte aperen kuṛiko do onkoren hoponko sãote alope baplakoa se aperen koṛako lạgitʼ hõ onkoren kuṛiko alope hataokoa ar tishõ onkoakʼ bhạlại se rakapʼko reakʼ do alope kurumuṭuiya. Onate ape do daṛeankope hoyokʼa ar jumi reakʼ bhage bhage jiniskope jom daṛeakʼa ar jaejug ạidạri lekate disạm do aperen hopon ar hoponerako lạgitʼpe doho oṭo daṛeakʼa.’ 
Ezra9:13 “Aleakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi ar maraṅ ghạṭ iạtege ale cetanre niạko do hoyokʼkana, menkhan enhõ E aleren Isor, aleakʼ kại reakʼ kuṛại lekate am do thoṛagem sạjại akatʼlea ar aleren adomko hoṛ do jiwetʼem tahẽ ocoakatʼkoa." 
Ezra9:14 Ale do cetʼ amakʼ hukumko batao baṅkate bạṛicʼko kạmikan hoṛko tulucʼle bapla midokʼte onko sãotele peṛakʼa? Arle onkae khan am do ale cetanrem edrekʼte alem marao giḍikalea ar celege jiwetʼ do bam doholeya. 
Ezra9:15 E Israelren Probhu Isor, am dom dhoromgea. Ale do teheń hạbicʼ thoṛa hoṛ jiwetʼ menakʼlea. Menkhan am samaṅre do sanamkogele kạiyan hoṛ kana, ar onate ale do okoehõ am samaṅre teṅgokʼ lek dole baṅkana.”" 
Ezra10:1 Esra do tinre Isorakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅre otre ombakʼkate rakʼ rakʼteye koejoṅkan tahẽkana ar kạiye aṅgocetʼ tahẽkana unre Israelkoren ạḍi utạr herel, maejiu ar gidrạko do uni ṭhen hecʼkateko jarwayena. Ar onko hõ ạḍitetʼko rakʼkeda." 
Ezra10:2 Unre Elamren mitʼ bõsren Jehiyelren hopon Sekaniạ do Esrae metadea, “Aboakʼ disạmreko girobasokʼ kan judạ judạ jạtren kuṛiko bon bapla akatʼkote aboren Isor ṭhen do bepạtiạrko bon hoyakana; menkhan enhõ Israelkoakʼ as do ńithõ menakʼgea." 
Ezra10:3 Onate dela bon, aboren Isor samaṅre niạ bon kiriạkʼma, ińren kisạ̃ṛ amakʼ sopolha lekate ar aboren Isorakʼ hukum okoeko botorakʼ kan onkoakʼ solha hotete ale do noko sanam maejiuko ar onkoren gidrạkole bạgi giḍiyakoa. Ar ona do ạn lekatege hoyokʼma." 
Ezra10:4 Ado ma beretʼme; niạ reaṅ kạmi do amakʼ dạyik kangea. Ale do amle goṛowama, onate ma dil salakʼ kạmime.”" 
Ezra10:5 Unre Esra doe beretʼena ar ona katha leka kạmi lạgitʼte maraṅ naekeko, Liwiko ar onḍe jarwa akan Israelkoe kiriạ ocoketʼkoa. Ar onko do sanamkogeko kiriạyena." 
Ezra10:6 Ona tayom Esra do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ khon Eliasibren hopon Jehohananakʼ kandhateye boloyena. Onḍe uni do cetʼge bae jom ńuleda, ente bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan hoṛkoakʼ bepạtiạr iạteye hirdạnikʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Ezra10:7 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan sanam hoṛko jemon Jerusalemre hecʼkateko jarwakʼ onate Jihudạ ar Jerusalem reakʼ sanam jaegare mitʼṭecʼ lại jạhirakʼ do hoyena. 
Ezra10:8 Jãhãege pe din bhitrite bae hạjirokʼ, uniyakʼ somppoti do cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar mukhiyạkoakʼ sopolha lekate dokholokʼtaea ar bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan hoṛkoakʼ somaj khon hõe oḍok ocokʼa." 
Ezra10:9 Pe din bhitrire Jihudạ ar Benjạmin ṭoṭharen sanam hoṛ do Jerusalemre hecʼkateko jarwayena. Ar areyakʼ cando reakʼ bargelakʼ dinre sanam hoṛ do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ reakʼ maedanre ona babotreko duṛupʼena ar jạṛi dakʼ iạteko thar tharaoena. 
Ezra10:10 Unre naeke Esra do teṅgoyente onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do bepạtiạrkope hoyakana, ar judạ judạ jạtren kuṛikope bapla akatʼkote Israelkoakʼ kại tulucʼ arhõ kạipe juṭucʼ akada." 
Ezra10:11 Ńitokʼ ape do aperen hapṛamkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen kại aṅgocpe ar uniyakʼ sana leka kạmipe. Apeakʼ disạmre girobasokʼ kan hoṛko ar eṭakʼ jạtren maejiu khon ape apnartetʼ begarokʼpe.” 
Ezra10:12 Unre sanam hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko menkeda, “Am do ṭhik kathagem roṛ akada; ar cetʼ lekam roṛakatʼ onkage ale dole kạmiya." 
Ezra10:13 Menkhan ńitokʼ do ạḍi dakʼe dakʼeda ar ḍher hoṛ kana bon, onate abo do bahrere babo teṅgo daṛeakʼ kana. Ona chaḍa niạ babotre miṭmaṭ do mitʼ se bar dinre do baṅ hoyokʼa, ente abo do ḍherkoge bon kại akada." 
Ezra10:14 Aboren cetan hudạren kạmiyạkoge goṭa somajren ạyurko jemonko hoyokʼma. Ar ona tayom aboakʼ judạ judạ ato ar nagraha modre okoe do eṭakʼ jạtren kuṛiko bapla akatʼko onko mimitʼko do akoren murubbiko ar bikʼcạrkoante mitʼṭecʼ niṭakatʼ oktere Jerusalemteko hijukʼma. Enḍekhan niạ kại iạte aboren Isorakʼ botoranakʼ edre do abo khon ocogokʼa.” 
Ezra10:15 Eken Asahelren hopon Jonathan ar Tikua hopon Jahseya do niạ katha upạrtekin teṅgoyena; ar Mesulam ar Liwi Sabethae hõ unkin secʼkin tahẽkana. 
Ezra10:16 Ar bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan hoṛko do ona katha lekageko kạmikeda. Naeke Esra do mitʼke mitʼ bõs khon mukhiyạkoe bachaoana. Ar gelakʼ cando reakʼ pạhil din hilokʼ onko do ona babotre ḍunḍhạu lạgitʼko duṛupʼena. 
Ezra10:17 Okoe do eṭakʼ jạtren kuṛiko baplaletʼko tahẽkan onko sanamko babotre ḍunḍhạu reakʼ kạmi do dosar bochor pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil dinreko sạtʼkeda. 
Ezra10:18 Okoe eṭakʼ jạtren kuṛiko baplaletʼko tahẽkan onkoakʼ tạlika do nonka leka: Naekeko modre Josadakʼ hopon Jesua ar uniren boehakoakʼ bõsrenko modre Makʼasia, Eliaser, Jarib ar Godlia." 
Ezra10:19 Noko sanamkoge akoren bạhu bạgiko reakʼko kiriạyena ar onkoakʼ dos gunạkʼte mimitʼ pal khon mitʼṭenkate bheḍa do dos ńutumteko samaṅketʼkoa. 
Ezra10:20 Imerakʼ bõsrenko modre Hanani ar Sebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Harim bõsrenko modre Makʼasia, Eliạ, Semaya, Jahiyel ar Usiạ." 
Ezra10:22 Pasur bõsrenko modre Elioyena, Makʼasia, Ismael, Nethaniel, Josabad ar Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Liwi bõsrenko modre Josabad, Simai, Kelaia metakʼme Kelita, Pethahiạ, Jihudạ ar Elieser." 
Ezra10:24 Sekʼreńko modre Eliasib. Rurukhiyạko modre Salum, Telem ar Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Eṭakʼ Israelko modre- Paros bõsko modre Ramia, Isiạ, Malkia, Miyamin, Eliasar, Malkia ar Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Elam bõsrenko modre Mataniạ, Sekariạ, Jahiye, Abdi, Jeremot, ar Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Satu bõsrenko modre Elioyenae, Eliasib, Matania, Jeremoth, Sabad, ar Asisa." 
Ezra10:28 Bebae bõsrenko modre Jehohanan, Hananiạ, Sabai ar Athlai." 
Ezra10:29 Bani bõsrenko modre Mesulam, Maluk, Adaya, Jasub, Seyal ar Jeremoth." 
Ezra10:30 Pahat-Moab bõsrenko modre Adna, Kelal, Benaya, Makʼasia, Matania, Besalel, Binui, ar Manse." 
Ezra10:31 Harim bõsko modre Eliaser, Jisia, Malkia, Semaya, Simeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk ar Semaria." 
Ezra10:33 Hasum bõsrenko modre Matenai, Matata, Sabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manase ar Simai." 
Ezra10:34 Bani bõsrenko modre Makʼadai, Amram, Uwel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaya, Bedeya, Keluhi, Wania, Meremot, Eliasib, Matenai, Matania ar Jakʼasu," 
Ezra10:36  
Ezra10:37  
Ezra10:38 Binui bõsrenko modre Simai, Selemia, Nathan, Adaya, Maknadebai, Sasai, Saraj," 
Ezra10:39  
Ezra10:40  
Ezra10:41 Asarel, Selemiạ, Semariạ, Salum, Amariạ ar Joseph. Nebo bõsrenko modre: Jeyel, Matithia, Sabad, Sebina, Jadai, Joel ar Benaya." 
Ezra10:41 Asarel, Selemiạ, Semariạ, Salum, Amariạ ar Joseph. Nebo bõsrenko modre: Jeyel, Matithia, Sabad, Sebina, Jadai, Joel ar Benaya." 
Ezra10:42  
Ezra10:43  
Ezra10:44 Noko sanamkoge eṭakʼ jạtren kuṛiko baplaletʼkoa ar adom adom bạhukoakʼ hoṛmore do gidrạko hõko tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah1:1 Noa do hoyokʼ kana Hakaliạren hopon Nehemiạwakʼ katha. Artaksastren rajakʼ rajokʼ bargel bochor reakʼ Kesleb candore iń do Susan raj nagrahareń tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah1:2 Unre Hanani ńutuman ińren boehako modren mitʼ hoṛ ar Jihudạren adom hoṛko do Susanteko hecʼena. Ar iń do Babelre bondi dosa khon okoe hoṛko ruạṛ senakan ar Jerusalem reaṅ onko ṭheniń kuliyana. 
Nehemiah1:3 Onko doko lạiyadińa, “Bondi dosa khon okoe do disạmteko ruạṛ senakan onko do maraṅ harkhet ar henostare menakʼkoa. Jerusalem reakʼ pạcri do rạputʼ akana ar ona reakʼ phaṭok duạrko hõ seṅgelteko jeretʼ akawada.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Niạko katha ańjomkate iń do duṛupʼkate rarakʼ iń ehopʼena. Ar thoṛa din homor halaṅkate iń doń upạskeda ar sermaren Isor ṭheniń koekeda. 
Nehemiah1:5 Ona tayomiń menkeda, “E sermaren Probhu Isor, am dom maraṅ ar botoranicʼ Isor kana, okoe do amko dulạṛetʼme ar amakʼ hukumko senakʼkan onko lạgitʼ do jaejug dulạṛ reakʼ bondobosem rukhiyạ dohoyeda." 
Nehemiah1:6 E Probhu Isor, nehõrokʼ kạnạń, amren guti lạgitʼ, metakʼme Israelko lạgitʼ iń amren guti do am samaṅre siń ńindạ okań koejoṅ kan ona baṛe luturakʼtińme. Ale Israelko am upạrte okale kại akatʼ ona doń aṅgocetʼ kana. Iń ar ińren ạpuń bõsren hoṛko do sạrigele ghạṭ akada." 
Nehemiah1:7 Am upạrte ạḍitetʼle behok akada. Amren guti Mose hotete okako ạn-ạri ar hukumkom em akawatʼle ona dole bebatao akada. 
Nehemiah1:8 “Nehõrokʼ kạnạń, amren guti Mose okaṭakʼ hukumem em akawade ona baṛe disạime. Amem menleda, ‘jodi bepạtiạrkope hoyokʼ enḍekhan iń do eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareń chirchạturpea;" 
Nehemiah1:9 menkhan iń ṭhenpe ruạṛ hijukʼ ar ińakʼ hukumkope dohoy ar ona lekape kạmi, enḍekhan aperen bondi akan hoṛko dhạrti reakʼ mitʼ mucạtʼreko tahenre hõ iń do onḍe khoniń hạr samṭaokoa ar tahen lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iyiń bachao akawan onḍeń idikoa.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Noko do amren guti ar amren hoṛ kangeako, amge amakʼ maraṅ daṛete ar daṛeanakʼ titem chaḍao ạguakatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah1:11 E Probhu Isor, nehõrokʼ kạnạń, amren gutiyakʼ koejoṅ ańjomme ar okoeko botoram kan onko amren gutikoakʼ koejoṅ baṛe luturakʼtakome. Amren guti do teheń jo baha ocoyeme ar raj ṭhen dayawạnicʼ hoeocoyeme.” Iń do darkha rasa dudulicʼ iń tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah2:1 Artaksast rajakʼ bargel bochor reakʼ Nisan candore mitʼ din jojom jokhecʼ raj samaṅre darkha rasa tahẽkana, ar iń do ona idikate rajiń emadea. Niạ lahare tis hõ iń do raj samaṅre mulin do bạń tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ona iạte raj do ińe metadińạ, “Am ma bacom ruạkʼkan, enḍekhan mẽtʼãhã do cekate mulinge ńelokʼkantama? Noa do amakʼ ontor reakʼ kosṭo chaḍa ar cetʼhõ baṅkana.” Iń do noa katha ańjomkate ạḍiń botorena," 
Nehemiah2:3 enhõ rajiń metadea, “Maharaj do jaejug jiwetʼ baṛeye tahenma. Ińren hapṛamko oka nagrahareko topa ocoakan ona nagraha doko dhaṅ dhaser akada ar ona reakʼ phaṭok duạrko do seṅgelteko jeretʼ akada ar ona ańjomkate ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mulin baṅkhan cekakʼtińa?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Raj do ińe metadińạ, “Am do cetʼem khojkana?” Unre iń do sermaren Isor ṭheniń koeyana." 
Nehemiah2:5 Ona tayom rajiń roṛ ruạṛadea, “Maharaj amem kusige khan ar amren guti amakʼ mẽtʼre dayae ńamakatʼ khan enḍekhan ińren hapṛamkoakʼ topa oka do Jihudạre menakʼ ona nagrahate calakʼ reakʼ hukum baṛe imạńme jemon arhõ onań benao rakapʼ daṛeakʼ.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Unre raj aṛere rạni hõe duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar raj do ińe kulikedeńạ, “Tinạkʼ din calakʼ lagaoama, ar tisokʼem ruạṛ hijukʼa?” Iń do mitʼṭecʼ okte reakʼ kathań roṛketʼ khan raj doe kusiyente calakʼ reakʼ hukume emadińạ." 
Nehemiah2:7 Unre arhõ raj iń metadea, “Maharaj ińrem kusige khan enḍekhan phurạt gaḍa hanasaren disạm cakʼlaoko ṭhen ciṭhi olme jemon onko do akoakʼ disạm talate Jihudạteko sen ocoạń." 
Nehemiah2:8 Ona chaḍa uni do acʼren bir rurukhiyạicʼ Ashap ṭhen ciṭhiye ol jemon mundil oṛakʼ buruńj reakʼ duạrako lạgitʼ ar nagraha reakʼ pạcri lạgitʼ ar ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼre lạgitʼ kaṭkoe imạń.” Ińren Isorakʼ bhạlạiyanakʼ ti iń cetanre tahẽkante raj do ińakʼ nehõre dohoketʼtińạ. 
Nehemiah2:9 Uni do iń sãote adom lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko ar sadomkoe kolketʼkoa. Iń do phurạt gaḍa hanasaren disạm cakʼlaoko ṭhen senkate rajakʼ ciṭhiń ematʼkoa. 
Nehemiah2:10 Israelkoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hoṛe hecʼakan reakʼ katha ańjomkate Horoni Sanbalat ar Amoni kạmiyạicʼ Tobiạ tekin do bạkin kusilena. 
Nehemiah2:11 Iń do Jerusalemte senkate onḍe pe din tahen tayom ńindạ jokhecʼ adom hoṛko soṅgekateń oḍokena. Jerusalemre oka cekae lạgitʼ Isor do ińakʼ monreye uskurkedeń ona do okoege bạń lạiyatʼkoa. Iń do okoeṭakʼ janwar cetanreń decʼakan tahẽkan uni chaḍa ar cele janwar hõ iń sãote do bako tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah2:12  
Nehemiah2:13 Enhilokʼ ńindạ iń do oḍokkate buru nala duạrte toyo- kuń ar ona tayom do jobra duạrteń oḍok calaoena ar Jerusalem reakʼ rạputʼ pạcri ar seṅgelte ḍahao akan duạrko reakʼ dosakoń ńelkeda. 
Nehemiah2:14 Ar ona tayom do dakʼ jharna reakʼ duạr ar rajakʼ pukhri secʼ iń laha idiyena; menkhan iń do okoeṭakʼ janwarren decʼakan tahẽkan uniyakʼ do onkate calakʼ reakʼ jãhãn horge baṅ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah2:15 Ona iạte iń do enhilokʼ ńindạge pạcri reakʼ dosa ńel ńelte buru nala talateń senena ar buru nala duạrte arhõń ruạṛ hecʼena. 
Nehemiah2:16 Iń do okateń senlena ar cetʼ iń cekakeda ona do cetan hudạren kạmiyạko bako baḍae daṛeada, ente iń do unrehõ disạmren Jihudiko ar naekeko ar lekman hoṛko se maraṅ hudạren hoṛko se kạmiyạko hõ cetʼge bạń baḍae ocoakatʼko tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah2:17 Tayomte onko maraṅ hudạren kạmiyạkoń metatʼkoa, “Abo harkhet ar sasetre menakʼ bon ona dope ńeletʼgea. Jerusalem do dhaṅ dhaser akana ar ona reakʼ phaṭok duạrko do seṅgelteko jeretʼ akada. Onate dela abo do, Jerusalem reakʼ pạcri arhõ bon beretʼ ruạṛa. Inạ khan henostawan hoṛ mente do ar babon tahena.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ińren Isor cetʼlekae bhạlại akadiń ar raj okae men akawạdiń ona do onkoń baḍae ocoketʼkoa. Onkoko roṛ ruạṛadińa, “Dela enḍekhan, benao bon ehopʼlege.” Ar niạ menkate ona bhage kạmi ehopʼ lạgitʼko sapṛaoena." 
Nehemiah2:19 Menkhan Horoni Sanbalat, Amoni Tobiạ ar Arabi Gesem teko do niạ katha ańjomkateko landa dhutʼatʼlea. Onkoko menkeda, “Ape do cetʼ pe ceka kana? Ape do cetʼ raj upạrtepe hula?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Iń do onkoń roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Sermaren Isor do aleye jo baha ocolea. Ale do uniren gutiko kanale, onate pạcri do arhõle gathao aroya, menkhan Jerusalem do apeakʼ jãhãn sompotti, jãhãn dạbiteakʼ se jãhãn ạidạriyakʼ do baṅkana.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Maraṅ naeke Eliasib ar uni sãoten naekeko do kạmireko dhurạuente bhiḍi duạrko benao arokeda. Onko do Isor ńutumte onako sonotketʼte ona reakʼ silpińko lagaoada. Ona tayom Humaya gaṛ ar Hananel gaṛ hạbicʼ pạcriko gathaoketʼte ona banar hĩs hõko samaṅkeda. 
Nehemiah3:2 Inạ sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Jerikhoren hoṛko gathaokeda ar ona reakʼ sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Emriren hopon Sạkure gathaokeda. 
Nehemiah3:3 Hasena hoponko do hako duạrko jut arokeda. Onko do ona reakʼ kaṭko ar ona reakʼ silpińko, khilko ar huṛkạṛkoko lagaoada." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ona reakʼ sarecʼ hĩs do Uriạren hopon Meremote jut arokeda. Uriạ do Hakosren hopone tahẽkana. Ona sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Berakiạren hopon Mesulamren hopone jut arokeda. Berakiạ do Mesesabelren hopone tahẽkana. Ona reakʼ sarecʼ hĩs do Banaren hopon Sadoke jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:5 Ona sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Tekoaren hoṛko jut arokeda, menkhan onkoren kisạ̃ṛ hoṛko do onkoakʼ ńel todarot tabere kạmi bako rạjilena." 
Nehemiah3:6 Paseyaren hopon Joyada ar Besodeya hopon Mesulam tạkin do mare duạrkin jut arokeda. Unkin do ona reakʼ kaṭko ar ona reakʼ silpińko, ona reakʼ khil ar huṛkạṛko kin lagaoada." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ona reakʼ sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Gibeonren Melaṭia ar Meronothiren Jadon tekin kin jut arokeda. Nukin do Gibeon ar Misparen hoṛkin tahẽkana. Niạ hĩs do phurạt gaḍa pạchim secʼren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ secʼre tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah3:8 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Harhayaren hopon Usiyele jut arokedea. Usiyel do mitʼṭen sonhare tahẽkana. Ona pante reakʼ do Hananiạye jut arokeda. Uni do jut so mosolakoe benaoetʼ tahẽkana. Nonkate onko do osar pạcri hạbicʼ Jerusalem reakʼ lahateakʼ pạcri lekako beretʼ ruạṛkeda. 
Nehemiah3:9 Jerusalem jilạ reakʼ adha hĩs do subedar Hurren hopon Rephaye jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:10 Inạ sarecʼakʼ hĩs do Harumaph ren hopon Jedaye jut arokeda. Niạ hĩs do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ sorrege tahẽkana. Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Hesabneya ren hopon Hatuse jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:11 Harimren hopon Malkiạ ar Pahat-Moabren hopon Hasub do ona tayom reakʼ hĩs ar bhaṭa buruńj kin jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:12 Jerusalem jilạ reakʼ adha hĩs do subedar Halohes hopon Salum ar uniren hoponerako do tayomakʼ hĩsko jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:13 Buru nala reakʼ duạr do Hanun ar Sanoar ren hoṛko jut arokeda. Onko do ona reakʼ silpiń, khil, ar huṛkạṛko lagaokeda. Onko do jobra duạr hạbicʼ mitʼ hajar moka jaega hõko jut arokeda." 
Nehemiah3:14 Beth-Hakem jilạren subedar Rekabren hopon Malkiạ do jobra duạre jut arokeda. Uni do ona reakʼ silpiń, khil ar huṛkạṛe lagaoada." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mispa jilạren subedar Kolhosren hopon Salum do dakʼ jharna duạre jut arokeda. Uni do onare chade benaoada ar ona reakʼ silpiń, khil ar huṛkạṛkoe lagaoada. Rajakʼ bagwan aṛere Sela pukhri reakʼ pạcri khon ehopʼkate Dạudakʼ nagraha khon okaṭakʼ siṛhi do latarte pheḍ hecʼ akan tahẽkan ona hạbicʼe jut arokeda." 
Nehemiah3:16 Bethsur jilạ reakʼ adha hĩsren subedar Asbukren hopon Nehemiạ do pạcri reakʼ dosarakʼ hĩs Dạudakʼ bõsrenkoakʼ topa sor ṭhen la akatʼ pukhri ar birbanṭakoakʼ oṛakʼ hạbicʼe jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:17 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Bani hopon Rehumakʼ tabere Liwikoko jut arokeda. Ar ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Keyila jilạren adha hĩsren subedar Hasabiạ do acʼakʼ ṭoṭha ńutumteye jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:18 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do onkoren boehako, metakʼme Keyila jilạren sarecʼ adha hĩsren hoṛko jut arokeda. Onko do akoren subedar Henadad ren hopon Bawaiakʼ tabere tahẽkateko jut arokeda." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do, metakʼme Misparen disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Jesuạren hopon Eser do khanḍa bhanḍa dohowakʼ oṛakʼte rakabokʼ hor reakʼ samaṅ reakʼ jaega khon pạcri reakʼ konac hạbicʼe jut arokeda." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ona tayom Sabairen hopon Baruk do pạcri reakʼ konac khon maraṅ naeke Eliaserakʼ oṛakʼ duạr hạbicʼ mon lagaokateye jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:21 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Uriạren hopon Meremoth do Eliasibakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ silpiń khon ehopʼkate oṛakʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼe jut arokeda. Uriạ do Hakosren hopone tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah3:22 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Jordan gaḍa bilạn ṭạnḍire girobasokʼ kan naekekoko jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:23 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Benjamin ar Hasub tekin kin jut arokeda. Noa do unkinakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ senakʼ hĩs tahẽkana. Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Makʼaseya ren hopon Asariại jut arokeda. Niạ hĩs do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ aṛe reakʼ hĩs tahẽkana. Makʼaseya do Ananiạ ren hopone tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah3:24 Ona aṛere Henadad ren hopon Binui do Asariạwakʼ oṛakʼ khon ehopʼkate konac hạbicʼ ar mitʼ hĩse jut arokeda 
Nehemiah3:25 Usạiren hopon Palal do konac reakʼ eṭakʼ aṛeye jut arokeda. Noa hĩs do pahradarkoakʼ bakher raca ṭhenakʼ raj oṛakʼ khon oḍok hecʼ akan usul buruńj samaṅ reakʼ tahẽkana. Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Parosren hopon Pedaye jut arokeda ar mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ sapʼ sosorko okoeko do Ophelreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko do purub secʼ reakʼ dakʼ duạr ar sate oḍokʼ akan buruńj hạbicʼko jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:26  
Nehemiah3:27 Onko aṛe reakʼ do Takoaren hoṛko ona sate oḍok akan maraṅ buruńj khon Ophel reakʼ pạcri hạbicʼ ar mitʼ hĩsko jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:28 Sadom duạr samaṅ reakʼ hĩs do naekekoko jut arokeda. Onko mimitʼko do apan ạpin oṛakʼ sor reakʼ pạcriko jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:29 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Imerren hopon Sadoke jut ocokeda. Niạ do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ secʼakʼ tahẽkana. Ar ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do purub duạrren pahradar Sekaniạren hopon Semayae jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah3:30 Ona aṛe reakʼ hĩs do Selemiạ ren hopon Hananiạ ar Salaphren turuicʼ hopon Hanun tạkin do ar mitʼ hĩs kin jut arokeda. Ona aṛe reakʼ hĩs do Berikhiạ ren hopon Mesulame jut arokeda. Noa do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅ secʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah3:31 Ona tayom reakʼ hĩs do Malkiạ ńutuman mitʼṭen sonharre jut arokeda. Niạ do jarwakʼ duạr samaṅre mundil oṛakʼren sapʼ sosorkoakʼ ar bạnij beparkoakʼ oṛakʼ hạbicʼ tahẽkana ar pạcri konac reakʼ koṭha kandha hạbicʼ. 
Nehemiah3:32 Sonhar ar bạnij bepariko do pạcri konac reakʼ koṭha kandha ar bhiḍi duạra tala reakʼ jaegako jut arokeda. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanbalat do pạcri bhit arhõle jut aroyetʼkane ańjomketʼ khan ạḍitetʼe bekusiyena ar edreteye seṅgelena. Uni do Jihudikoe cigạriyatʼkoa. 
Nehemiah4:2 Uni do acʼ sãoten hoṛko ar Samariạren lạṛhại phạdko samaṅreye menkeda, “Noko nijor Jihudiko do cetʼko cekayeda? Noko do cetʼ arhõ benao ruạṛ lạgitʼko muruk akada? Isorakʼ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ cetʼ janwarkoko samaṅkoa? Onko do cetʼ mitʼ dintegeko sạta? Jobra ḍạṅ khon cetʼ jiwetʼ dhiriko oḍok ocoya? Onako ma rapakʼ roṅgo akan coṅ!”" 
Nehemiah4:2 Uni do acʼ sãoten hoṛko ar Samariạren lạṛhại phạdko samaṅreye menkeda, “Noko nijor Jihudiko do cetʼko cekayeda? Noko do cetʼ arhõ benao ruạṛ lạgitʼko muruk akada? Isorakʼ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ cetʼ janwarkoko samaṅkoa? Onko do cetʼ mitʼ dintegeko sạta? Jobra ḍạṅ khon cetʼ jiwetʼ dhiriko oḍok ocoya? Onako ma rapakʼ roṅgo akan coṅ!”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Unre Amoni Tobia do uni aṛereye tahẽkana; uni doe menkeda, “Onko okako benaoetʼkan ona cetante mitʼṭen khĩkṛĩye decʼlen khan hõ dhiri pạcri do dhasao lạnduṛokʼtakoa.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Unre Nehemiạ doe koekeda, “E aleren Isor, ańjomtaleme baṛe cetʼlekale nihạ̃t ocokʼ kana mente. Onkoakʼ henosta do onkoakʼ bohokʼrege baṛe ruạṛ ocoytakome. Am do nonkaeme jemon onko do bondikate luṭ reakʼ jinis lekate eṭakʼ disạmko idi ocokʼ." 
Nehemiah4:5 Onkoakʼ behokakʼ do alom ikại takoa se amakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅ khon onkoakʼ kại do alom meṭaotakoa, ente okoe pạcriko benaoetʼ onko samaṅrege onko do amko henosta akatʼmea.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Pạcri tinạkʼ usulokʼ ona reakʼ adha hạbicʼle gathao akada, ente hoṛko do akoakʼ goṭa monte niạko kạmi akada." 
Nehemiah4:7 Menkhan Sanbalat, Tobiạ, Arabiạko, Amoniạko ar Asdadren hoṛko do tinreko ańjomkeda je, Jerusalem pạcri jut aroe reakʼ kạmi calakʼ kana mente ar paṛakʼko hõ esedokʼ kana unre onko do ạḍiko edreyena." 
Nehemiah4:8 Onko sanamko mitʼkate niạko soṛojontrokeda je, senkate Jerusalem upạrteko lạṛhạiya ar gulmalko ehoba." 
Nehemiah4:9 Menkhan ale do aleren Isor ṭhenle koekeda ar onko botorte siń ńindạ pahrae lạgitʼle bebostakeda. 
Nehemiah4:10 Inạkʼtege Jihudạren hoṛko menkeda, “Kạmiyạ hoṛ doko nijor idikʼkana ar gejer dhiriko do nunạkʼ ḍhera je, ale do pạcri ar bale gathao daṛeakʼkana.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Aleren bạirikoko meneda, “Onko ạuriko baḍaerege onko talare bon senokʼa ar bon gocʼkote kạmi bon bond oṭokakʼa.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Ona iạte okoe Jihudiko do onko sorreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko do hecʼkateko metalekan tahẽkana, “Ale ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Niạ katha ańjomkate iń do pạcri bhitri reakʼ copotʼ jaegakore ar okakore paṛakʼ akan tahẽkan onḍe do bõsrenko lekate hoṛkoń bahalketʼkoa ar onkoakʼ tire tarwaṛe, borlom ar akʼ sariń ematʼkoa." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ona tayom iń do sanamakʼ ńel jut baṛakate lekman hoṛko, maraṅ hudạren hoṛko ar sarecʼ hoṛkoń metatʼkoa, “Onko do alope botorakoa. Menkhan maraṅ daṛeanicʼ ar botoranicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ katha baṛe disạipe ar aperen boehako, koṛa hoponko ar kuṛi hoponko, bạhuko ar oṛakʼ lạgitʼ lạṛhạipe.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Aleren bạiriko tinreko ańjomkeda, ale do onkoakʼ soṛojontro reakʼ kathale baḍae akada ar Isor do ona bae jo baha ocoletʼtakoa, unre ale sanamkoge pạcri ṭhen ruạṛ senkate apan ạpin kạmirele dhurạuena." 
Nehemiah4:16 Enhilokʼ khon ińren adha hoṛ do kạmireko tahẽyena ar sarecʼ adha hoṛ do borlom, ḍhal, mẽṛhẽtʼ ar akʼ sarante sapṛao akanko tahẽyena. Jihudạren okoeko hoṛ do pạcriko gathaoetʼ tahẽkan onko sãote mukhiyạko hõko tahẽkana. Ar okoe mal-jalko gokʼ idiyetʼ tahẽkan onko do mitʼ titeko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar eṭakʼ tite do khanḍa bhanḍako sapʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah4:17  
Nehemiah4:18 Okoeko gathaoetʼ tahẽkan onko mimitʼko do ḍanḍare tarwaṛe tolkateko kạmikan tahẽkana, Ar okoe sakwae oroṅetʼ tahẽkan uni do iń ṭhene tahenkan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah4:19 Tayomte iń do manotan hoṛko, cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar sarecʼ hoṛkoń metatʼkoa, “Kạmi do maraṅgea ar phaelaote menakʼa; onate abo do pạcrire hanḍe nanḍe sạṅgiń macha menakʼ bona." 
Nehemiah4:20 Jãhãege sakwa reakʼ saḍepe ańjom unrege ale ṭhenpe jarwakʼa. Ar aboren Isor do abo ńutumteye lạṛhạiya.” 
Nehemiah4:21 Ar ạḍi setakʼ khon ehopʼkate ạuri ńuhumokʼ hạbicʼ adha hoṛ do borlomko sapʼkakʼ kan tahẽkana ar nonkate ale dole kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah4:22 Unre iń do hoṛko arhõń metatʼkoa, “Mimitʼ hoṛ apan ạpin gutikoante ńindạ do Jerusalemreko tahẽ aṅgakʼma arko horhoema ar sińre doko kạmi tabonma.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Iń se ińren boehako se ińren gutiko se ińren rurukhiyạko ale do okoe hõ kicricʼge bale totʼletʼtalea; ar dakʼ ṭhen senkate hõ ale do apnarakʼ khanḍa bhanḍale idiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah5:1 Tayomte hoṛko ar onkoren bạhuko do akoren kisạ̃ṛ Jihudi boehako upạrte ạḍi gulmalko ehopʼkeda. 
Nehemiah5:2 Adomko doko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Ale ar aleren koṛa ar kuṛi hoponko do lekharele ḍhergea; jom-ńũkate jiwetʼ tahen lạgitʼ bạ̃ṛti anaj jạruṛalea." 
Nehemiah5:3 Eṭakʼkoko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Anaj ńam lạgitʼ ale do aleakʼ jaega jumi, darkha bagwan ar oṛakʼ duạr bondhok doho lagao alekana.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Arhõ eṭakʼkoko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Rajakʼ khajna emokʼ lạgitʼ jaega jumi ar darkha bagwan bondhok dohokate ṭaka hatao lagaoale kana." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ale do mitʼ jạtren hoṛkangeale ar aleren gidrạko hõ onkoren gidrạko leka kangeako enhõ aleren hoponko ar hoponerako do golam menkate emokʼ hoyokʼkantalea, ar aleren hoponerako modre adomko do laharege kạ̃ṛmĩko hoyakana. Ńitokʼ do cetʼ ektiạrige bạnukʼtalea, ente aleakʼ jaega-jumi ar darkha bagwan do eṭakʼ hoṛkoakʼ hoyakana.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Onkoakʼ gulmal ar niạ lạlisko ańjomkate iń do ạḍiń raṅgaoena. 
Nehemiah5:7 Iń do onkoakʼ kathako hudiskateń ńelkeda ar ona tayom do manotan hoṛko ar mukhiyạko dusiketʼkoteń metatʼkoa, “Ape do aperen nij disạmren hoṛko ṭhen khon sudpe jomeda.” Onate iń do onko bicạrko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ sabhań hohokeda." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ińiń menkeda, “Be-Jihudiko ṭhen okoeko boehako ạkhrińlen tabon onko do daṛeakʼ bhor bon chaḍao ạgu akatʼkoa.” Ar ńitokʼ do aperen boehako ạkhrińokʼpe jormoṭetʼkoa, onate onko do arhõ kiriń ruạṛ lagao abona.” Niạ katha ańjomkate onko do hapegeko tahẽyena, ente roṛ ruạṛ reakʼ cetʼge baṅ tahẽkantakoa." 
Nehemiah5:9 Iń do arhõń metatʼkoa, “Ape okape cekakan ona do ṭhikakʼ do baṅkana. Be-Jihudi bạiriko jemon aloko henosta daṛeabon onate aboren Probhu Isor botorae seletʼ calakʼ do cetʼ lek baṅkan tabona?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Hoṛko ṭhen ińakʼ, ińren boehako ar ińren kạmiyạkoakʼ hõ ṭaka ar anaj reakʼ paona menakʼa. Menkhan dela, abo do noako bon ikạkakʼma." 
Nehemiah5:11 Ńitokʼ ape do onkoakʼ jaega jumi, darkha bagwan, jạitun bagwan ar oṛakʼ duạr ruạṛ katakope, ona chaḍa ṭaka, anaj, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunum iạte oka sudpe hatao akatʼ onahõ ruạṛkatakope.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Niạ katha ańjomkate onkoko menkeda, “Ale do jotowakʼle ruạṛkatakoa. Ale do onko ṭhen khon cetʼge bale dạbiya. Am cetʼem men onagele kạmiya.” Ona tayom iń do naekekoń hohowatʼkoa ar manotan hoṛko ar mukhiyạkoń kiriạ ocoketʼkoa jemon gokʼ akatʼ lekako kạmi."
