Nehemiah5:13 Iń do ińakʼ samaṅ secʼ koṭaketʼteń menkeda, “Okoe noa gokʼakʼ bae rukhiyại Isor do onko mimitʼko onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar sompotti khon nonkageye koṭa giḍikakoa. Nonkan hoṛko do nonkageko koṭa giḍi ocokʼa ar onkoakʼ do sanamakʼ cabakʼ takoa.” Niạ katha ańjomkate sanam hoṛko menkeda, “Amen,” ar onko do Probhu Isorko sarhaokedea. Manotan hoṛko do akoakʼ gokʼakʼ lekageko kạmikeda." 
Nehemiah5:14 Artaksasto raje rajokʼ bargelakʼ bochorre iń do Jihudạ disạmren hoṛkoren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ iń bahal ocolena, ar un khon uniyakʼ rajokʼ pegel bar bochor hạbicʼ, metakʼme ona gelbar bochor hạbicʼ iń se ińren boehako do disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ bhejawakʼ jomakʼ do bale jomleda." 
Nehemiah5:15 Menkhan iń lahate okoe disạm cakʼlaokoko tahẽkan onko do hoṛko cetanre hamal bojhako ladeyatʼko tahẽkana ar jomakʼ ar darkha rasa chaḍa hõ onko ṭhen khon mõṛẽ sae bargel gram rupạko hataoetʼ tahẽkana. Onkoren gutiko hõ disạm hoṛko cetanre mạlikiko calaoetʼ tahẽkana. Menkhan iń do Isoriń botoraekante ona leka bạń kạmi akada," 
Nehemiah5:16 bickom iń do niạ pạcri reakʼ kạmire lạgiạ paṛao akaniń tahẽkana. Ińren sanam gutiko hõ kạmi lạgitʼ onḍeko jarwakʼkan tahẽkana. Ale do okoege jumi do bale kirińleda. 
Nehemiah5:17 Ona chaḍa hõ Jihudi ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạko mod khon mitʼsae mõṛẽgel hoṛko ar aḍepase jạtrenko khon okoe do ale ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkan onko do ale sãoteko jom-ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah5:18 Dinạm hilokʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra, turui goṭen bachao akan bheḍa ar adom adom cẽṛẽko do iń lạgitʼko isinetʼko tahẽkana, ar gel mãhã por por sanam lekanakʼ darkha rasa ińko ạguwạńkan tahẽkana. Menkhan iń do tishõ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ jomakʼ jinis do bạń dạbileda, ente niạko dạbiteakʼ do hoṛko cetanre hamal bojha leka tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah5:19 E ińren Isor, noko hoṛko lạgitʼ iń okakoń kạmi akatʼ ona iạte bhạlạyiń do alom hiṛińa." 
Nehemiah6:1 Tayomte Sanbalat, Tobiạ, Arabiạ, Gesam ar aleren sarecʼ bạirikoko ańjom ńamkeda je, iń do arhõ pạcriyiń gathao akada ar ona pạcri talare jãhãn phãkge bạnukʼa. Ar unhạbicʼ hõ phaṭok duạrkore silpiń bạń lagao akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah6:2 Unre Sanbalat ar Gesem do niạ kathakin roṛgotʼkada, “Dela hijukʼme, abo do Ono ṭạnḍi reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ atore bon ńapamlenge.” Menkhan unkin do iń hạniń lạgitʼ kin soṛojontrokeda." 
Nehemiah6:3 Onate iń do hoṛ kolkateń roṛ ruạṛatʼ kinạ, “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ bises kạmiyiń kạmikante bạń sen daṛeakʼ kana. Ar kạmi bạgikate aben ṭhen calakʼte cedakʼ kạmi do bond tahena.?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Onko do pon dhao inạ khoborge iń ṭhenko kolkeda ar jao dhaoge inạ kathageń roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa. 
Nehemiah6:5 Ona tayom mõṛẽ dhaore Sanbalat do inạ khoborantege acʼren guti iń ṭhene kolkedea. Uniyakʼ tire do mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhi tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah6:6 Onḍe ol tahẽkana, “Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen niạ katha ańjomokʼ kana ar Gemes hõe meneda, am ar Jihudiko do hul reakʼpe soṛojontro kana ar onate pạcripe benaoeda. Ona chaḍa niạko khobor lekate bujhạukʼ kana, am do onkoren raj hoyokʼem meneda." 
Nehemiah6:7 Am reaṅ niạ katha jemon Jerusalemre lại saḍekʼ baṅma Jihudạre mitʼṭen raj menaea, onate am do nạbikom bahal akatʼkoa. Ńitokʼ niạ khobor do raj ṭhen seṭerokʼa. Onate dela hijukʼme, abo do mitʼṭecʼ bon sopolhaema.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Iń do noań roṛ ruạṛadea, “Am okam menetʼ onka do cetʼge baṅ hoyokʼkana; noa do amakʼ mongoṛa katha kana.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Onko do aleakʼ kạmi bond lạgitʼte niạ katha iạte botor udukʼ aleko kurumuṭuiyetʼ tahẽkana. E Isor, ńitokʼ do ińakʼ tire daṛe emokʼme." 
Nehemiah6:10 Mitʼdin iń do Delayaren hopon Semayawakʼ oṛakʼteń calaoena. Delaya do Mehetabelren hopone tahẽkana. Semaya do uniyakʼ oṛakʼreye oko akan tahẽkana. Uniye menkeda, “Dela hijukʼme, alaṅ do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre, sonot oṛakʼ talare laṅ ńapamlenge ar silpiń laṅ sińkakʼa, ente hoṛko do am gocʼme lạgitʼko hijukʼ kana; onko do ńindạ okte am gogocʼko hijukʼa.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Menkhan ińiń metadea, “Iń lekan hoṛ do cetʼ dạdạṛ lek kantińạ? Iń lekan hoṛ do cetʼ jãhãe leka mundilte bolokate jiwetʼe tahẽkokʼa? Iń do bạń calakʼa.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Iń doń bujhạu ńamkeda, Isor do uni bae kol akadea; Tobiạ ar Sanbalat do ṭakakin emakawadete iń upạrte noako kathae roṛeda." 
Nehemiah6:13 Uni do ṭakae em ocolena jemone botor ocoyiń ar uniyakʼ katha leka kạmikate jemoniń kại, arko durnam ocoyińte lajaoreko paṛaoiń." 
Nehemiah6:14 E ińren Isor, Tobiạ ar Sanbalat tạkin okaṭakʼ kin kạmi akatʼ ona do disạ dohokakʼme. Maejiu nạbi Noadiạ ar sarecʼ nạbiko okoe do iń botor ocoyiń reakʼko kurumuṭuletʼ onkoakʼ katha hõ disạ dohokakʼme baṛe." 
Nehemiah6:15 Elul cando reakʼ bargel mõṛẽ tạrik reakʼ, mõṛẽgel dosar din hilokʼre pạcri do benao sạtena." 
Nehemiah6:16 Aleren sanam bạiriko niạ katha tinreko ańjomkeda ar aḍepaseren sanam jạtrenko onako ńelkeda unre aleren bạiriko do dilko atʼketʼtakoa, ente onkoko bujhạu daṛeada, niạ kạmi do aleren Isorakʼ goṛotege hoyakana." 
Nehemiah6:17 Onako dinre Jihudạren manotan hoṛko do Tobiạ ṭhen aema ciṭhiko koletʼkan tahẽkana ar Tobiạ ṭhen khon hõ onko do roṛ ruạṛko ńametʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah6:18 Jihudạren ḍher hoṛko do Tobiạ ṭhen kiriạteko tol akan tahẽkana, ente uni do Araho hopon Sekaniạren jãwãegomkete tahẽkana. Ar Tobiạren hopon Jehonan do Berekiạren hopon Mesulamren hoponerae bapla akade tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah6:19 Ona chaḍa onko manotan hoṛko do Tobiạwakʼ bhageakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha ińko baḍae ocoyediń kan tahẽkana ar ińakʼ katha hõ uniko baḍae ocoyede tahẽkana. Ar Tobiạ do botor ocoyiń lạgitʼ iń ṭhen ciṭhiye oletʼkan tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah7:1 Pạcri benao sạten khan iń do silpińkoń sińkada. Ona tayom do duạr rurukhiyạko, sekʼreń dolko ar Liwikoń bahalketʼkoa." 
Nehemiah7:2 Ińren boeha Hanani ar gaṛren mukhiyạ Hananiạ tekin do Jerusalem reakʼ bhariń ematʼkinạ, ente Hananiạ do dhorom hoṛe tahẽkana ar ḍherko khon pạtiạr ar Isor botorae hoṛe tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah7:3 Iń do unkin iń metatʼkinạ, “Setoṅ ạuri sạrdikʼ hạbicʼ Jerusalem reakʼ silpińko jemon alo jhijokʼ. Rurukhiyạko calakʼ lahare jemon duạrko sińkakʼ ar huṛkạṛko lagaokakʼ. Jerusalemren hoṛko mod khon jemon pahradarko bahal ocokʼ. Onkoren adomko do pahara jaegare ar adomko do apan ạpin oṛakʼ sorreko tahenma.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Nonkage bebosta hoyena, ente Jerusalem nagraha do ạḍi maraṅ ar ḍher jaegakowante tahẽkana, menkhan hoṛko do thoṛageko tahẽkana ar oṛakʼ-duạrko hõ unhạbicʼ do baṅ benao akan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah7:5 Isor do ińakʼ monreye hudis ocokedińạ jemon manotan hoṛko, mukhiyạko ar disạm hoṛkoń jarwa mitʼ ocokote onko do bõs tạlikareń caṛhao daṛeako. Okoe do pạhilreko ruạṛ hecʼlen onko hoṛkoakʼ bõs tạlika doń ńamkeda. Onare oka ol tahẽkan ona do nonka leka:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do okoe Israelkoe bondi idiletʼko onko modre ḍherkoge bondi dosa khon Jerusalem ar Jihudạte apan ạpin ato ar nagrahateko ruạṛ hecʼlena. 
Nehemiah7:7 Noko hoṛko do Serubabel, Jesua, Nehemiạ, Seraya, Reyelaya, Mordekae, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigwai, Rehum, ar Bakʼana sãoteko ruạṛ hecʼlena. Israelkoren okoeko herel hoponko ruạṛ hecʼlen onkoakʼ lekha do nonka leka tahẽkana:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Paros bõsren hoṛko do bar hajar mitʼsae eaegel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:9 Sephatiạren pe sae eaegel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:10 Araren do turui sae mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:11 Pahat-Moabakʼ bõsren Jesuạ ar Joabakʼ bõsren hoṛko do bar hajar irạl sae gel irạl hoṛ. 
Nehemiah7:12 Elamren mitʼ hajar barsae mõṛẽgel pon hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:13 Saturen do irạl sae pongel mõṛẽ hoṛ: Sakhaeren do eae sae turuigel hoṛ; Binuiren turui sae pongel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:14  
Nehemiah7:15  
Nehemiah7:16 Bebairen do turui sae bargel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:17 Asgadren do bar hajar pesae bargel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikamren do turui sae turuigel eae hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigwairen do bar hajar turuigel eae hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:20 Adiniren do turui sae mõṛẽgel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:21 Jeheskiạ bõsren do Aterren hoponko aregel irạl hoṛ. 
Nehemiah7:22 Hasumren do pesae bargel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:23 Besairen do pesae bargel pon hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:24 Haripharen do mitʼsae gelbar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeonrenko do aregel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem ar Netopha atoren do mitʼsae irạlgel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathotren mitʼsae bargel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-asmawetren do pongel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriath-Jearim, Kephira ar Beyerothren do eae sae pongel pe hoṛ;" 
Nehemiah7:30 Rama ar Gebaren do turui sae bargel mitʼ hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmasren mitʼsae bargel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel ar Airen mitʼsae bargel pe hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:33 dosaricʼ Neboren do mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:34 dosaricʼ Elamren do mitʼ hajar barsae mõṛẽgel pon hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:35 Harimren do pesae bargel hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikhoren do pesae pongel mõṛẽ hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod, Hadid, ar Ononren do eae sae bargel mitʼ hoṛ;" 
Nehemiah7:38 Senaeren do pe hajar are sae pegel hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:39 Naekekoakʼ lekha do nonka: Jesua bõsko modre Jedaya bõsren do aresae eaegel pe hoṛ: 
Nehemiah7:40 Imerren do mitʼ hajar mõṛẽgel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:41 Pasurren do mitʼ hajar barsae pongel eae hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:42 Harimren mitʼ hajar gel eae hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:43 Liwikoakʼ lekha do nonka: Jesua bõsren Kadmiyel ar Hodawi bõsren eaegel pon hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:44 Sekʼreńkoakʼ lekha do nonka: Asaph hoponko do mitʼsae pongel irạl hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:45 Koejoṅ oṛakʼren rurukhiyạkoakʼ lekha do jotote mitʼsae pegel irạl hoṛ. Noko doko hoyokʼkana Salum, Aṭer, Ṭalmon, Akub, Haṭita ar Sobai bõsren hoṛko." 
Nehemiah7:46 Mundil oṛakʼren sapʼsosorko doko hoyokʼkana: Sipha, Hasupha ar Tabotren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:47 Keros, Siah ar Padonren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana, Hagab ar Salmai bõsrenko;" 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanon, Gidel ar Gehar bõsrenko;" 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaya, Resin ar Nekoda bõsrenko;" 
Nehemiah7:51 Gasam, Us, Paseya;" 
Nehemiah7:52 ar Besairen hoponko, Meyunim ar Nephismren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk, Hakupha ar Harhuren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:54 Baslut, Mehida ar Harsaren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos, Sisera ar Temaren hoponko;" 
Nehemiah7:56 Nesia ar Hatipharen hoponko! 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomonren gutikoakʼ bõsrenko doko hoyokʼkana: Sotai, Sopheret, Peruda," 
Nehemiah7:58 Jakʼala, Darkon, Gidel," 
Nehemiah7:59 Sephaṭia, Hatil, Pokeret-hasebayim ar Amon bõsrenko." 
Nehemiah7:60 Mundilren sapʼdapʼko ar Solomonren gutikoren hoponko jotote pesae aregel bar hoṛ; 
Nehemiah7:61 Tel-melah, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adan ar Emer khon okoeko rakapʼ hecʼlen onko do Israel mente apnarte bako porman daṛeada. Onko doko hoyokʼkana:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Delay, Ṭobiạ, ar Nekoda bõsren turui sae pongel bar hoṛ." 
Nehemiah7:63 Naekeko mod khon Hobai, Hakos ar Barsilai bõsko do bõs talikare akoakʼ bõsko khojleda menkhan bako ńamletʼkote bhonḍ menkate naeke hudạ khonko chaṭao ocoyena. Barsilai do ona ńutumgeko hohowaekan tahẽkana, ente uni do Gileadiạ Barsilairen mitʼṭen hoponerae baplaledea." 
Nehemiah7:64  
Nehemiah7:65 Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do onkoe hukumatʼkoa tinạkʼ din Urim ar Thumim ạidạriyicʼ naeke ạuriye ńamokʼ unạkʼ din hạbicʼ onko do sonot utạrakʼ jomakʼ aloko jomma. 
Nehemiah7:66 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼen goṭa manḍerren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do pongel bar hajar pesae turuigel tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah7:67 Ona chaḍa eae hajar pesae pegel eae guti-kạ̃ṛmĩko ar barsae pongel mõṛẽ hoṛ do sekʼreń dolrenko tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah7:68 Onkoren do eae sae pegel turui sadomko, barsae pongel mõṛẽ khaccorko, ponsae pegel mõṛẽ ũṭko ar turui hajar eae sae bargel gadhako tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah7:69  
Nehemiah7:70 Bõsren mathako modre adomko do mundil reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼko dankeda. Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do khajańci oṛakʼre lạgitʼ turui keji sona, mõṛẽgel goṭecʼ bạṭiko ar naekeko lạgitʼ do mõṛẽsae pegel kicricʼkoe dankeda." 
Nehemiah7:71 Bõsren mathako modre adomko do niạ kạmi lạgitʼ mitʼsae pegel keji sona ar mitʼ hajar ponsae pegel keji rupạ khajańci oṛakʼreko dankeda. 
Nehemiah7:72 Ar sarecʼ hoṛko do jotote mitʼsae pegel keji sona, mitʼ hajar pesae keji rupạ ar naekeko lạgitʼ do turuigel eae goṭecʼ kicricʼko emena." 
Nehemiah7:73 Naekeko, Liwiko, rurukhiyạko, sekʼreń dolko, mundil oṛakʼren sapʼdapʼko ar eṭakʼ hoṛko, metakʼme sanam Israelko do eaeakʼ cando ạurirege apan ạpin ato ar nagrahare girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Nehemiah8:1 Eaeakʼe cando lahare sanam hoṛko do mitʼ sãote dakʼ phaṭok samaṅre maedanreko jarwayena. Unre dhorom guru Esra do Israelko lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ hukum, metakʼme Moseyakʼ ạn-ạri puthi ạgu darako metadea." 
Nehemiah8:2 Eaeyakʼ cando reakʼ pạhil dinre naeke Esra do herel hoṛko, maejiuko ar okoe do ańjomkateko bujhạu daṛeakʼ nonkan manḍerren sanam hoṛko samaṅre ạn-ạri reakʼ puthiye ạgukeda." 
Nehemiah8:3 Ar dakʼ phaṭok samaṅ reakʼ maedan secʼ samaṅkate uni do herel, maejiu ar eṭakʼ okoeko bujhạu daṛeakʼ onko do setakʼ khon tikin hạbicʼe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa, ar hoṛko do goṭa monte ona ạn-ạri puthi reakʼ kathako ańjomkeda." 
Nehemiah8:4 Puthi paṛhao lạgitʼ dhorom guru Esra do kaṭ reakʼ oka macanko benaoletʼ onare rakapʼenteye teṅgoyena. Unre uniyakʼ jojomsa aṛe secʼre do Matithia, Sema, Anaya, Uriạ, Hilkiạ, Makʼaseya tekoko teṅgoyena ar leṅgasa aṛe secʼre do Podae, Misayel, Malkia, Hasum, Hasbadana, Sekariạ ar Mesulam tekoko teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ona tayom Esra do puthiye oṭakʼkeda. Ar sanam hoṛge uniko ńel ńamkedea, ente uni do onko khon cetanreye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. Ar puthiye oṭakʼketʼ khan hoṛko doko teṅgoyena." 
Nehemiah8:6 Unre Esra do maraṅ Probhu Isore sarhaokedea ar sanam hoṛ do ti tul kateko menkeda, “Amen, Amen.” Ar otre ombakʼkate Probhu Isorko sewawadea." 
Nehemiah8:7 Jesua, Bani, Serebia, Jamin, Akub, Sabethai, Hodia, Makʼaseya, Kelita, Asaria, Josabad, Hanan, Pelaia-ar sanam Liwiko do onḍe teṅgo tahekan hoṛko ạn-ạri reakʼko bujhạuatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ar oka paṛhaokʼkan ona jemon hoṛkoko bujhạu daṛeakʼ onate onko do Isorakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ puthi khon paṛhaokate torjomakateko bujhạuatʼkoa. 
Nehemiah8:9 Ona tayom disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Nehemiạ, naekeko ar dhorom guru Esra ar okoe Liwiko do hoṛkoko cetʼako kan tahẽkan onko do sanam hoṛko metatʼkoa, “Teheńakʼ niạ din do aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotakʼ din kana. Ape do alope homora se alope raga.” Uni do niạ kathae menkeda, ente sanam hoṛge ạn-ạri reakʼ katha ańjomkateko rakʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah8:10 Nehemiạ do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do senkate bhage bhage jomakʼ ar heṛem heṛemakʼ darkha rasa ńũipe ar okoeyakʼ jomakʼ bạnukʼtako onko hõ thoṛa emakope. Teheńakʼ din do aboren Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotakʼ din kana. Ar alope dukokʼa, ente Probhu Isore emakʼ rạskạge apeakʼ daṛe do.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Liwiko do sanam hoṛko hape ocoketʼkoteko metakʼkoa, “Ape do hape akae tahenpe, ente teheńakʼ din do sonotakʼ din kana. Ar alope dukokʼa.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Unre disạmren sanam hoṛko do rạskạ salakʼ jom-ńũi lạgitʼ ar jomakʼ hĩs khon kol lạgitʼko ruạṛ calaoena, ente okako katha onkoko baḍae ocolen ona doko bujhạu daṛeada." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ona cando reakʼ dosarakʼ dinre sanam bõsren mathako, naekeko ar Liwiko do ạn-ạriko mońjte bujhạu lạgitʼ dhorom guru Esra ṭhenko jarwa mitʼena." 
Nehemiah8:14 Onko do ạn tạrire noako ńamkeda Probhu Isor do Mose hotete niạ hukume emakana je, eaeyakʼ cando reakʼ porob jokhecʼ Israelko do chamḍa oṛakʼkoreko tahena," 
Nehemiah8:15 ar onkoakʼ atoko ar Jerusalemre onko do niạko lại jạhira, “Cetʼleka ol menakʼ onkage ape do buru ṭoṭhakote senkate chamḍa oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ jạitun dare reakʼ ḍạrko ar bir jạitun reakʼ ḍạrko, mehndi ḍạrko, khijur ḍạrko ar jhạṛpạ dare reakʼ ḍạrkope ạgudaraea.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Ona iạte hoṛko do onako ḍạrko ạguketʼte adomko do akoakʼ oṛakʼ chatre se racare se Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ racare se dakʼ phaṭok ṭhenakʼ phaelao racare se Ephrayim phaṭok ṭhenakʼ phaelao racare apnar lạgitʼ chamḍa oṛakʼko benaokeda. 
Nehemiah8:17 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hecʼakan goṭa dolrenkoge chamḍa oṛakʼ benaokate onakoreko tahẽyena. Nunren hopon Josuạ okte khon enhilokʼ hạbicʼ Israelko do nonka ar bako kạmi akatʼ tahẽkana. Ar onko do ạḍiko rạskạyena. 
Nehemiah8:18 Pạhil hilokʼ khon ehopʼkate mucạtʼ din hạbicʼ Esra do dinạmge Isorakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ puthi khone paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. Hoṛko do eae din hạbicʼko porobena ar irạl hilokʼ do niạm leka mitʼṭecʼ sabhako hoyocokeda. 
Nehemiah9:1 Inạ cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre Israelko do mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena ar gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼketʼte, bohokʼre dhuṛiko ojokʼana arko upạskeda," 
Nehemiah9:2 Israel jạtren hoṛko do eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko khon apnartetʼko begarena. Onko doko teṅgoyente akoakʼ kại ar akoren hapṛamkoakʼ bedhoromakʼko aṅgockeda. 
Nehemiah9:3 Ona tayom teṅgokate adha bela onko do akoren Probhu Isor ńutumte ạn-ạri reakʼ puthi khon paṛhaokateko ańjomkeda ar adha bela do kạiko aṅgocketʼa ar akoren Probhu Isor sewawae tulucʼ dinko khemaokeda. 
Nehemiah9:4 Jesua, Bani, Kadmiyel, sebania, Buni, Serebia, Bani ar Kenani ńutuman Liwiko do macanre teṅgokate ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isorko hohoadea." 
Nehemiah9:5 Tayomte Liwiko mod khon Jesua, Kadmiyel, Bani, Hasabneya, Serebia, Hodia, Sebania, ar Petahia tekoko menkeda, “Ape do teṅgokate aboren Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, okoe do jug khon jaejug hạbicʼ menae.” Ona tayom onko do niạ menkate koejoṅko ehopʼena, “E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ńutum do sarhao ar ṭhonokte perejokʼma; ale emakʼ sanamakʼ sarhao khon hõ am dom maraṅgea." 
Nehemiah9:6 Eken amkangeam aleren Probhu Isor do. Amge serma, maraṅ serma ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼko, dhạrti ar ona cetanre menakʼ jotowakʼko, jalapuri ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼkom sirjạu akada. Amge sanamko jiwim emakawatʼkoa ar sermaren sanamkoge amko sewawam kana." 
Nehemiah9:7 “Am kangeam Probhu Isor do. Abram do amgem bachaoledea ar Kạldikoakʼ disạm Tur khonem oḍok ạguledea ar amge uniyakʼ ńutum do Abrahamem doholetʼtaea. 
Nehemiah9:8 Am do uniyakʼ pạtiạrtetʼem ńelketʼte Kananiko, Hittiko, Amoriko, Perisiko, Jebusiko ar Gergasikoakʼ disạm do uniren bõsko emako lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosem dohowada. Ar am dom dhoromgete amakʼ gokʼakʼem rukhiyạ dohoketʼtama." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Misor disạmre amge aleren hapṛamkoakʼ dukem ńelletʼtakoa; ar arakʼ doreão aṛere onkoakʼ rakʼem ańjomletʼtakoa. 
Nehemiah9:10 Amge Pharao ar uniren sanam kạmiyạko ar uniyakʼ disạmren sanam hoṛko ạḍi utạr cinhạ ar hahaṛa kạmikom udukʼatʼkoa, ente am dom baḍaekan tahẽkana aleren hapṛamko tulucʼ Misrikoakʼ beohar do bạḍạite perecʼ tahẽkana. Ar niạko kạmite am do amakʼ ńutumem rukhiyạleda, ona do teheń hạbicʼ hõ menakʼgea." 
Nehemiah9:11 Amge onko samaṅre jalapurim bar hạṭiń ocoleda, onate kuṭhạ̃ṛgeko paromlena; menkhan okoe onkoko khudạuletʼko onko do athantar dakʼre dhiri giḍikakʼ lekam khadlekatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah9:12 Siń do rimil reakʼ khunṭite ar ńindạ do seṅgel reakʼ khunṭitem ạyurletʼkoa. 
Nehemiah9:13 “Am do Sinại buru cetanrem pheḍ hecʼlena ar serma khon onko sãote katham roṛleda. Ona jokhecʼ am do dhorom reakʼ hukum, ṭhikakʼ ạn-ạriko, bhage niạmko ar hukumkom ematʼko tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah9:14 Amge amakʼ sonot jirạukʼ mãhã reaṅem baḍae ocoletʼkoa ar amren guti Mose hotete hukum ar ạn-ạrikom ematʼkoa. 
Nehemiah9:15 Lacʼ bi ocoytako lạgitʼ amge serma khon jomakʼem ematʼko tahẽkana ar tetaṅ marao ocoytako lạgitʼ do dhiri khon dakʼem oḍok ocoleda. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm emako reakʼem gokʼletʼ tahẽkan onḍe senkate am do ona ạidạri lạgitʼem hukumatʼko tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah9:16 “Enhõ aleren hapṛamko do bạḍạiteko perecʼlena; onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼletʼ takoa ar amakʼ hukumko bebataoleda. 
Nehemiah9:17 Onko do am tabere tahen do bako aṅgocleda, ar okako hahaṛa kạmi onko talarem kạmiletʼ ona hõ bako disạ doholeda. Onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼketʼtakoa ar golam leka Misorte arhõ ruạṛ calakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen mukhiyạko bahalkedea. Menkhan am do ikạyicʼ Isor kanam, am do daya ar mãyãtem perecʼgea; am do thoṛategem tirpitokʼ kana ar amakʼ dulạṛ do asambheṛgea. Onate onko do bam bạgi giḍiakatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah9:18 Onko do ako lạgitʼ chãchre dul benao akade mitʼṭen mĩhũ reakʼ muṭhạn benaokateko menkeda, ‘nuige aperen Isor do; Misor disạm khon unigeye oḍok ạgu akatʼpea.’ Nonkate onko do amko bemanotketʼmea menkhan amakʼ asambheṛ daya iạte hahaṅkarre bam bạgi giḍiletʼkoa. Sińre ạyurko lạgitʼ do rimil khunṭi ar ńindạ lạgitʼ do seṅgel khunṭitem ạyurletʼkoa." 
Nehemiah9:19  
Nehemiah9:20 Ar onko cetʼako lạgitʼ do amren bhạlạiyicʼ atmam danatʼko tahẽkana. Am do onko jom ocoko lạgitʼ serma khon Mannam emalena ar ona do bam bondleda; ar onkoakʼ tetaṅ maraotako lạgitʼ do dakʼem ematʼkoa. 
Nehemiah9:21 Hahaṅkarre pongel bochor hạbicʼem ạsul jotonketʼkoa. Onko do jãhãn okulạnge baṅ hoylentakoa; onkoakʼ kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ hõ baṅ marelena ar onkoakʼ jaṅga hõ baṅ bharaolentakoa. 
Nehemiah9:22 “Tayomte ḍher rajosṭi ar jạtrenko do onkoakʼ tirem jimạketʼkoa, onkoakʼ sanam jaega jumiko Israel jạtrenkom hạṭińatʼkoa. Onko do Hesbonren raj Sihonakʼ disạm ar Basonren raj Ogakʼ disạmem ạidạriatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah9:23 Sermaren ipilko leka onko do alekha hoponkom ematʼkoa ar okaṭakʼ disạmte bolokate ona ạidạri reakʼ katha onkoren hapṛamkom metatʼko tahẽkan ona disạmtem aderketʼkoa. 
Nehemiah9:24 Onkoren hoponko do ona disạmte senkate onako dokholana. Ar ona disạmren Kananikoko kobojketʼkoa. Am do Kananiko, onkoren rapajko ar disạmren judạ judạ jạtrenko do onkoakʼ tirem jimạketʼkoa jemon onko cetanre akoakʼ kusi lekako ceka daṛeakʼ." 
Nehemiah9:25 Onko do pạcrite esetʼ ḍher nagraha ar bhage jumikoko dokholana; ar bhage bhage jiniste perecʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar benao ṭhikakʼ kuńko, darkha bagwanko, jạitun bagwanko ar ạḍi utạr jo teakʼ dareko ạidạriana. Onko do jomkateko tirpitena arko moṭayena ar amakʼ maraṅ bhạlạiteko hesecʼ sekrecʼlena." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Menkhan enhõ onko do bebatao iạte am upạrteko hulkeda; ar amakʼ ạn-ạriko bạgiyada. Amren okoeko nạbi do am secʼ ruạṛ lạgitʼko sontoretʼko tahẽkan onko nạbi doko gocʼketʼkoa; ar am do ạḍi bạṛicʼko opomanketʼmea. 
Nehemiah9:27 Onatege am do bạirikoakʼ tirem jimạletʼkoa ar bạiriko do onkoko santaoetʼko tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ kosṭo oktere onko do am ṭhenko rakʼ homoretʼ tahẽkana ar am do serma khonem ańjomletʼtakoa. Amakʼ maraṅ daya iạte onko bańcaoko lạgitʼ hoṛkom kolletʼkoa. Ar bạirikoakʼ ti khon onkom bańcaoketʼkoa. 
Nehemiah9:28 “Menkhan tinre jirạuko ńametʼ tahẽkana unre onko do arhõ amakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. Ar inạ tayom do bạirikoakʼ tirem jimạyetʼko tahẽkana jemon bạiriko do onkoren mạlikko hoyokʼ. Menkhan tinre arhõ am ṭhenko rakʼetʼ tahẽkana unre serma khon onkoakʼ ańjomkatem dayawako kan tahẽkana arem bańcaoetʼko tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah9:29 “Amakʼ ạn-ạri secʼ ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼ onkom sontorletʼkoa menkhan onkoakʼ beohar do bạḍạite perecʼge tahẽkantakoa; onko do amakʼ sanam hukumko bebataoleda. Amakʼ okako hukum palonkate hoṛko bańcaokʼ ona upạrteko kạileda. Onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼ ketʼtakote amakʼ katha bako ańjomletʼa. 
Nehemiah9:30 Menkhan enhõ ḍher bochor hạbicʼ onkoakʼem sahaoleda. Amren nạbiko ar amren jiu hotete onkom sontorletʼkoa, menkhan onko do ona bako luturatʼ tahẽkana. Onate am do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ tirem jimạletʼkoa." 
Nehemiah9:31 Menkhan amakʼ asambheṛ daya gunạkʼte onko do bam maraoletʼkoa se bam bạgi giḍiletʼkoa ente am do daya ar mãyãte perecʼ Isor kanam. 
Nehemiah9:32 “E aleren Isor, am dom maraṅgea, am do daṛean ar botoranicʼ Isor kanam. Am do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ bondobosem rukhiyạ dohoyeda. Asuren rajkoakʼ okte khon ehopʼkate teheń hạbicʼ okako duk ale cetanre ar aleren rapajko, mukhiyạko, nạbiko, aleren hapṛamko ar aleren sanam hoṛko cetanre calakʼ kan ona do amakʼ mẽtʼre thoṛage baṛe hoyokʼma." 
Nehemiah9:33 Am do ale cetanre okakom hoyocoakatʼ onate do bam behok akada; am do pạtiạr salakʼgem kạmi akada ar ale dole behok akada. 
Nehemiah9:34 Aleren rapajko, mukhiyạko, naekeko ar aleren hapṛamko do amakʼ ạn-ạri bako manao akada; amakʼ hukum se sontor katha hõ bako ańjomleda." 
Nehemiah9:35 Onkoakʼ rajokʼ oktere am emakʼ maraṅ ar rosaṛ disạmre asambheṛ bhạlạiko jomleda, enhõ onko do amko bạgi giḍiwatʼmea ar bạṛicʼ hor khon bako ruạṛlena." 
Nehemiah9:36 “Ńelme, teheń ale do golam kanale, ar okaṭakʼ disạm do aleren hapṛamkom ematʼko tahẽkan onḍe jemon onko do jo ar joto lekan bhage jinisko jom daṛeakʼ menkhan ale do onḍege golamkole hoyakana." 
Nehemiah9:37 Aleakʼ kại iạte okoeko raj do ale cetanre rajosṭim calao ocoyetʼko onko ṭhenge disạm reakʼ ḍher phosol do calakʼ kana. Onko do akoakʼ kusi leka aleakʼ hoṛmo cetanre ar aleren ạsul janwarko cetanre ạidạriko calaoeda. Ale do ạḍi duk ar kosṭore menakʼlea.” 
Nehemiah9:38 Ona tayom hoṛko doko olkeda: “Niạko karonte ale do ńitokʼ apnar talare olkate bondobosle bandhaoeda, ar ona cetanre aleren mukhiyạko, liwiko ar naekeko doko chapakʼ kana.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Okoeko ona cetanreko chapatʼ tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼkana: Hakaliạren hopon disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Nehemiạ ar Sedekiạ," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraya, Asaria, Jirimiạ," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashur, Amaria, Malkiạ," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatus, Sebaniạ, Maluk, Harim, Meremot, Obedia, Daniel, Ginethon, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatus, Sebaniạ, Maluk, Harim, Meremot, Obedia, Daniel, Ginethon, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:5  
Nehemiah10:6  
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulam, Abia, Mijamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Makʼasea, Bilgai, Semaya. Noko do jotoge naekeko tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah10:9 Liwiko mod khon okoeko chapatʼ tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼkana: Asaniạren hopon Jesua, Henadad hoponko modren Binui ar Kadmiyel ar onkoren são kạmiyạko Sebania, Hodiạ, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanan," 
Nehemiah10:10  
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehob, Hasabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakur, Serebiạ, Sebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bani ar Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Disạm hoṛkoren mukhiyạko mod khon okoeko chapletʼ tahẽkan onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Paros, Pahat-Moab, Elam, Satu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Asgad, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonia, Bigwal, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Aṭer, Hiskiạ, Asur, Hodia, Hasum, Besai, Harip, Anathot, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:18  
Nehemiah10:19  
Nehemiah10:20 Magpias, Mesulam, Hesir, Mesesabel, Sadok, Jaddua, Pelaṭiạ, Hanan, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:21  
Nehemiah10:22  
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hananiạ, Hasub, Halohes, Pilha, Sobek, Rehum, Hasabna, Makʼaseya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hananiạ, Hasub, Halohes, Pilha, Sobek, Rehum, Hasabna, Makʼaseya," 
Nehemiah10:24  
Nehemiah10:25  
Nehemiah10:26 Ahiyạ, Hanan, Anan" 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluk, Harim ar Bakʼana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ale sarecʼ hoṛko do, metakʼme naekeko, Liwiko, rurukhiyạko, sekʼreń dolko, mundilren sapʼdapʼko ar Isorakʼ ạn-ạri manao lạgitʼ okoe do aḍepase jạtrenko khonko begar akan, aleren bạhuko ar aleren okoe gidrạko do bujhạu reakʼ akel hoyakantako, ale sanamkoge aleren boehako, metakʼme manotan hoṛko sãotele mitʼena. Ale dole meneda je, ale okale kiriạkʼ lạgidokʼ kan ona bale manao enḍekhan ale cetanre sarap paṛaokʼma. Ale do Isorren guti Mose hotete emakʼ Isorakʼ ạn-ạri lekatele calakʼa ar aleren Probhu Isorakʼ sanam hukum ar niạmko joton salakʼle manaoa." 
Nehemiah10:29  
Nehemiah10:30 Ale do aḍepase jạtrenko sãote aleren hoponerako bale baplakoa se aleren hoponko lạgitʼ hõ onkoren hoponerako bale ạgukoa. 
Nehemiah10:31 Jirạukʼ mãhã se eṭakʼ jãhãn sonotakʼ dinre aḍepase jạtrenko jãhãnakʼ jinis se jomakʼ ạkhriń lạgitʼko ạgui enḍekhan onko ṭhen khon do bale kirińa. Ar mimitʼ eaeyakʼ bochorre ale do aleakʼ jumire bale casa ar sanam rinle ikạ katakoa. 
Nehemiah10:32 Aleren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sapʼsor kạmi lạgitʼ jao bochor mitʼ sekel reakʼ pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń emokʼ reakʼ dạyikle ataṅkeda. 
Nehemiah10:33 Niạko sekelte jemon ṭebil cetanre samaṅakʼ piṭhạ ńamokʼ ar jaoge jomakʼ ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob, jirạukʼ mãhãre samaṅokʼakʼ porob, ambas ar eṭakʼ niṭ akatʼ din reakʼ porobko, sonot jinis samaṅokʼakʼ porob ar Israelkoakʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ porob ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam kạmiko jemon hoyokʼ." 
Nehemiah10:34 Aleakʼ ạn-ạrire cetʼleka ol menakʼ ona leka aleren Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍre jeredokʼ lạgitʼ jao bochor niṭ akatʼ oktere aleren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre mitʼke mitʼ bõsko tinre kaṭ ạgu lagao akoa ona ṭhik lạgitʼ ale do, metakʼme naekeko, liwiko ar hoṛkole gulibãṭkeda." 
Nehemiah10:35 Ale do jao bochor pạhilre rakabokʼ phosol ar mitʼke mitʼ dare reakʼ jo do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼtele ạguiya. 
Nehemiah10:36 Ạn-ạrire cetʼ leka ol menakʼ onkage ale do aleren pạhil hoponko ar ḍaṅgrako, meromko ar bhiḍikoren pạhil hoponko Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko dewa sewakan naeke ṭhenle idikoa." 
Nehemiah10:37 Ona chaḍa aleakʼ holoṅ ar jomakʼ reakʼ pạhilakʼ hĩsko, dare reakʼ pạhilakʼ joko ar nãwã darkha rasa ar sunum reakʼ pạhilakʼ hĩs do aleren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre naekeko ṭhenle ạguiya. Ar aleakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do Liwiko ṭhenle ạguiya, ente aleakʼ joto atokore Liwiko do gel hĩsko hataoeda." 
Nehemiah10:38 Liwiko tinre gel hĩsko hataoa unre onko sãote do Aronren bõsren mitʼṭen naekeye tahena. Ar Liwiko do ona gel hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do Isorakʼ khajańci oṛakʼteko idiya. 
Nehemiah10:39 Ar khajańci oṛakʼ reakʼ okako kandhare sonot jinisko dohoyetʼkan ar sekʼwakan naekeko, rurukhiyạko ar sekʼreń dolrenko okareko tahen onḍe Israelko ar Liwiko do akoakʼ anaj, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunumko ạguiya. Aleren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jãhãnakʼge jạruṛ onage ale dole emokʼa." 
Nehemiah11:1 Disạm hoṛkoren mukhiyạko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ar sarecʼ hoṛko doko gulibãṭkeda jemon onko modren gel hoṛko modre mitʼ hoṛ do jemon Jerusalemreye girobas daṛeakʼ ar sarecʼ are goṭen hoṛ do akoakʼ nij nij atoregeko tahenma. 
Nehemiah11:2 Okoeko hoṛ do akoakʼ kusileka Jerusalemre girobasokʼ lạgitʼko khojketʼ hoṛko do onkoko sarhaoketʼkoa. 
Nehemiah11:3 Ḍher Israelko, naekeko, Liwiko, mundil oṛakʼren sapʼdapʼko ar Solomonren gutikoren hoponko do Jihudạ disạm reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ atokore nij nij jaega jumireko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Jihudạ ar Benjạmin gusṭiren thoṛa hoṛ do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Disạmren okoeko mukhiyạ do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼkana:" 
Nehemiah11:4 Jihudi bõsrenko mod khon Usiạren hopon Athaia ar Barukren hopon Makʼaseya. Usren hapṛamko doko hoyokʼkana Sakariạ, Amaria, Sephaṭia, Mahalel ar Peres." 
Nehemiah11:5 Barukren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Kolhose, Hosae, Adaya, Joyarib, Sekaria ar Siloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Peres bõsren jotote ponsae turuigel irạl daṛean hoṛko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:7 Benjamin bõsrenko mod khon Mesulamren hopon Salu ar uniren gokʼṛoyicʼ Gabai ar Salai. Mesulamren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Joel, Pedaya, Kolaya, Makʼaseya, Ithiyel ar Jeseya. Niạ bõsren jotote aresae bargel irạl hoṛ do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:7 Benjamin bõsrenko mod khon Mesulamren hopon Salu ar uniren gokʼṛoyicʼ Gabai ar Salai. Mesulamren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Joel, Pedaya, Kolaya, Makʼaseya, Ithiyel ar Jeseya. Niạ bõsren jotote aresae bargel irạl hoṛ do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:8  
Nehemiah11:9 Sikriren hopon Joel do onkoren sordare tahẽkana ar Hasenuaren hopon Jihudạ do nagraharen dosaricʼ mukhiyại tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:9 Sikriren hopon Joel do onkoren sordare tahẽkana ar Hasenuaren hopon Jihudạ do nagraharen dosaricʼ mukhiyại tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:10 Naekeko mod khon do Joyaribren hopon Jedaya, Jakin ar Hilkiạren hopon Seraya. Hilkiạren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Mesulam, Sadok, Merayot ar Ahiṭub. Ahiṭub do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ńel todarot kạmiye kạmikan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:11  
Nehemiah11:12 Onkoren arhõ aema são kạmiyạkoko tahẽkana one okoe do mundilreko kạmikan tahẽkan. Niạ bõsren jotote irạl sae bargel bar naekeko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa Jerohamren hopon Adaya ar uni bõsren barsae pongel bar naekeko do Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Noko sanamkoge gharońjren mukhiyạko tahẽkana. Jerohamren hapṛamko doko hoyokʼkana Pelalia, Amsi, Sekaria Pashur ar Malkia. Ona chaḍa Asrelren hopon Amasai ar uni bõsren mitʼsae bargel irạl naekeko hõ Jerusalemreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Noko sanamkoge daṛean lạṛhại birko tahẽkana; Onkoren subedar do Hagedolimren hopon Sabdiyel tahẽkana. Asarelren hapṛamko do Ahsai, Mesilemoth ar Emer tekoko tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:13  
Nehemiah11:14  
Nehemiah11:15 Liwiko mod khon Hasubren hopon Semaya; Hasuburen hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Asrikam, Hasabiạ ar Buni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Ona chaḍa do Sabethai ar Josabad ńutuman Liwiko modre bar hoṛ do mathakin tahẽkana, unkin cetanre do Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bahre secʼakʼ kạmi ńeltodarot reakʼ bhar tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:17 Ona chaḍa Mikạren hopon Mataniạ, okoe do gunmanao johar ar sarhao sereń ạyurkoren sordare tahẽkana. Mikạren hapṛam dokin tahẽkana Sabdi ar Asapha. Nukin sãote Bakbukiại tahẽkana okoe do são kạmiyạko modren dosaricʼe tahẽkan. Somuyiren hopon Abda hõe tahẽkana; Samuyiren hapṛam dokin tahẽkana Galal ar Jeduthun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Sonot nagrahare Liwiko do jotote barsae irạlgel pon hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Phaṭok rurukhiyạko doko hoyokʼkana Akub, Ṭalmon ar onkoren sãotenko. Noko mitʼsae eaegel bar hoṛ do phaṭok duạrko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:20 Israelkoren sarecʼ hoṛko, naekeko ar Liwiko do Jihudạ reakʼ sanam nagraha ar atokore apan ạpin hapṛamkoakʼ jaega jumireko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ar mundil oṛakʼren sapʼdapʼ hoṛko do Ophel burureko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do Siha ar Gispa cetanre tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalemre Liwikoren sordar do Baniren hopon Usiye tahẽkana. Baniren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Hasabia, Matani, Mikạ ar Asaph. Asaph bõsren hoṛko do gaenahako lekate Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sapʼdapʼ kạmiko kạmikan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:23 Noko sekʼreń dolrenko do rajakʼ hukum tabereko tahẽkana. Ar ona hukum lekage onkoakʼ dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ kạmiko ṭhik dohoyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:24 Hoṛkoakʼ sanamakʼ bisoete rajren sopolhayicʼ do Mesesabelren hopon Petahiại tahẽkana. Mesesabelren hapṛam do Seraho ar Jihudạ tekin kin tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah11:25 Jihudạ gusṭiren hoṛko do okako ato ar ona reakʼ khet baṛgekoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onako do noakoge Kiriat-arba ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko, Dibon ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko, Jikab-sil ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko," 
Nehemiah11:26 Jesua, Molada, Beth-pelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 Hasar-sual, Ber-seba ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko," 
Nehemiah11:28 Siklag, Mekona ar ona sorteakʼ atoko," 
Nehemiah11:29 En-rimon, Sora, Jarmut," 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa, Adulam ar ona sorteakʼ atoko, Lakis ar ona sorteakʼ atoko ar Aseka ar ona sorteakʼ atoko. Onko do Ber-seba khon ehopʼkate Hinom buru lodam hạbicʼ sanam jaegakoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah11:31 Benjạmin gusṭiren hoṛko okako atokoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onako do hoyokʼkana Geba, Mikmas, Aijare, Bethel ar ona sorteakʼ atoko," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathot, Nob ar Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor, Rama, Gitayim, Hadid, Seboyim, Nebalat, Lod, Ono ar kạrigolkoakʼ lodamge." 
Nehemiah11:34  
Nehemiah11:35  
Nehemiah11:36 Ona chaḍa thoṛa Liwiko, okoe do Jihudạ ṭoṭhareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan, onko do Benjạmin ṭoṭhare senkate girobasokʼko ehopʼena." 
Nehemiah12:1 Okoeko naeke ar liwiko do Sealṭiyelren hopon Serubabel ar Jesua sãote bondi dosa khonko ruạṛ hecʼlen onko doko hoyokʼkana: Naekeko modre Seraya, Jeremiạ, Esra," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluk, Haṭus," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania, Rehum, Meremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Genthoi, Abiạ, Mijamin, Makʼadia, Bilga, Semaya, Joyarib, Jedaya," 
Nehemiah12:5  
Nehemiah12:6  
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amok, Hilkiạ ar Jedaya. Noko do Jesua oktere naeke ar onko bõsren mathako tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:8 Liwiko modre Josuại, Binui, Kadmiyel, Serebiạ, Jihudạ ar Matania. Nui Mataniạ ar uni bõsrenko cetanrege gun manao sereńko ńel todarot reakʼ bhar do tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:9 Ar Bakbukia ar Uno do dewa sewa kạmi oktere onko samna sạmni kin teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah12:10 Josuạren hopontetʼakʼ ńutum do Joyakin, Joyakinren hopon do Eliasib, ar Eliasibren hopon do Joyada;" 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyadaren hopon do Jonathan ar Jonathanren hopon do Jaddua. 
Nehemiah12:12 Joyakim oktere naeke bõsko modre okoeko mathako tahẽkan onko doko hoyokʼkana: Serayaren hopon Meraya, Jirimiạren hopon Hanaiạ," 
Nehemiah12:13 Esraren hopon Mesulam, Amariaren hopon Jehohanan," 
Nehemiah12:14 Maulkiren hopon Jonathan, Sebaniaren hopon Joseph," 
Nehemiah12:15 Harimren hopon Adma, Merayot bõsren Helkai," 
Nehemiah12:16 Idoren hopon Sekaria, Ginethonren hopon Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:17 Abiạren hopon Sikri, Miniamin bõsren mitʼ hoṛ, Moadiạ bõsren Pilṭai," 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga hopon Samua, Semaya hopon Johanathan" 
Nehemiah12:19 Joyarib hopon Matenai, Jedayaren hopon Usi," 
Nehemiah12:20 Salariren hopon Kalai, Amokren hopon Eber," 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilkiạ hopon Hasabia, Jedayaren hopon Nethaniel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Eliasib, Joyada, Johanan ar Jadua teko oktere Liwiko ar naekekoakʼ bõsren mathakoakʼ ńutum do tạlikare ol hoylena, ar ona do Perosren raj Darjawesakʼ rajokʼ oktere sạtena." 
Nehemiah12:23 Liwi bõsren mathakoakʼ ńutum do Eliasibren hopon Johanan okte hạbicʼ bõsbudạ puthire ol caṛhao hoylena. 
Nehemiah12:24 Liwikoren mukhiyạ Hasabia, Serebia, Kadmiyelren hopon Josua ar onkoren bõsren hoṛko do Isorren hoṛ Dạudakʼ katha lekage eṭakʼ dolren samna sạmni teṅgokate Isor sarhao arko gun manao joharae kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, Bukbukia, Obadia, Mesulam, Talmon ar Akub do rurukhiyạkoko tahẽkana. Noko do phaṭok sor reakʼ khajańci oṛakʼko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:26 Josuạren hopon, metakʼme Josabadren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Joyakim ar disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Nehemiạ ar naeke ar dhorom guru Esra oktere noko doko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem reakʼ pạcri Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ reakʼ porob jokhecʼ Liwiko okareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onḍe khon Jerusalemteko ạgu ocoyena jemon onko do kortal, binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ banam salakʼ sarhaoteakʼ sereńko sereńte rạskạ salakʼ ona porobko palon daṛeakʼ," 
Nehemiah12:28 Jerusalem beṛhaeteakʼ jaega Netophatikoakʼ atoko khon, Beth-gilgal khon, Geba ar Asmawet ṭoṭha khon gaenahako ạgu jarwaketʼkoa. Noko Liwi gaenahako do Jerusalem beṛhaeteakʼ jaegakore atoko benaoan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:29  
Nehemiah12:30 Naeke ar Liwiko do apnartetʼko saphayena ar hoṛko hõko saphaketʼkoa; ar ona tayom do pạcri ar phaṭok duạrko saphakeda. 
Nehemiah12:31 Ona tayom iń do Jihudạ mukhiyạko ona pạcri cetanreń idiketʼkoa ar gun manao johar lạgitʼ barea maraṅ sereń dolkoń bahalketʼkoa. Mitʼ dolrenko do pạcri cetante jojomsa aṛe jobra phaṭok duạr secʼ gente getecʼko sen idiyena. 
Nehemiah12:32 Ar onko tayomte do Hosaya ar Jihudạren adha mukhiyạko sen idiyena. 
Nehemiah12:33 Ar onko sãoteko senena Asaria, Esra, Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Jihudạ, Benjạmin, Semaya ar Jirimiạ. Ona chaḍa sakwawante adom naekeko hõko senena. Onko doko hoyokʼkana Sakaria ar uniren são kạmiyạko Samaya, Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Makʼai, Nethanel, Jihudạ ar Hanani. Sekariạren hapṛamko doko tahẽkana Jonathan, Semaya, Matania, Mika, Sakur ar Asaph. Noko do Isorren hoṛ Dạudakʼ katha leka aema lekan bajnawanteko sen idiyena. Ar dhorom guru Esra do noa dol laha lahateye sen idiyena." 
Nehemiah12:35  
Nehemiah12:36  
Nehemiah12:37 Dakʼ jharna phaṭok duạr ṭhen okare pạcri do cetan secʼ rakapʼ calao akan onḍe onko do sojhe Dạudakʼ nagrahate rakabokʼ siṛhiteko rakapʼ calaoente Dạudakʼ oṛakʼ aṛete purub secʼ reakʼ dakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenko senena. 
Nehemiah12:38 Dosar sereń dolko do onko tayom secʼko laha idiyena. Iń ar sarecʼ adha hoṛko do pạcri cetante onko tayomte gente getecʼle sen idiyena. Onko do tunduru buruńj parom idikate osar pạcri hạbicʼko senena. 
Nehemiah12:39 Ona tayom do Ephrayim phaṭok duạr, Jisana phaṭok duạr, Hako phaṭok duạr, Hananelakʼ gaṛ ar Saeko reakʼ gaṛ aṛete bhiḍi phaṭok duạr hạbicʼko senena. Ar ona tayom do horhokoakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼ senkateko thirena." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ona tayom banar sereń dolko do gun manao johar emkate onko do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre akoakʼ jaegare senkateko teṅgoyena. Iń ar iń sãote cetan hudạren adha kạmiyạko hõle teṅgoyena. 
Nehemiah12:41 Eleakim, Makʼaseya, Minilamin, Mikaya, Elioenae ńutuman naekeko do akoakʼ sakwawante iń sãoteko tahẽyena." 
Nehemiah12:42 Ona chaḍa Makʼaseya, Semaya, Eliaser, Usi, Jehohanan, Malkia, Elam ar Eserteko hõko tahẽyena. Ar sereń dolren hoṛko do Jesrahiakʼ ạyur lekako sereńkeda." 
Nehemiah12:43 Isor do ḍher rạskại danatʼkote enhilokʼ hoṛko do maraṅ okocʼ mitʼṭen samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobena arko hulạsena. Ar onkoren maejiuko ar gidrạko hõko rạskạyena. Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ noa rạskạ reakʼ andoṛ do ḍher sạṅgiń hạbicʼ ańjomena. 
Nehemiah12:44 Khajańci oṛakʼre okako danko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkan ar pạhil rakabokʼ phosolko ar gel hĩsko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkan ona ńel todarot lạgitʼ unre hoṛkoko bahalketʼkoa. Onko do ato beṛhaeteakʼ khet baṛgeko khon ạn lekate naeke ar liwiko lạgitʼ hoṛko ṭhen khon phosol reakʼ hĩsko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. Unre Jihudạren hoṛ do kusiteko emokʼkan tahẽkana, ente sekʼwakan naeke ar liwikoakʼ kạmi iạte onko doko kusikʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah12:45 Dạud ar uniren hopon Solomonakʼ hukum leka naekeko ar liwiko do akoren Isorakʼ sewa kạmi ar saphakʼ reakʼ kạmiko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar sekʼreń dolko ar rurukhiyạko hõ akoakʼ niṭakʼ kạmiko kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah12:46 Ḍher bochor lahare Dạud ar Asaphakʼ oktere Isor ńutumte sarhao ar gun manao johar reakʼ sereń lạgitʼ sekʼreń dolko ar sereń dol ạyurkoko bahal ocolena. 
Nehemiah12:47 Serubabel ar Nehemiạ oktere hõ Israelko do jotoge gaenaha ar rurukhiyạkoakʼ dinạm hilokʼ reakʼ kuṛạiko emkatako kan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa onko do eṭakʼ liwikoakʼ kuṛại hõ begarkateko dohokakʼ kan tahẽkana ar liwiko hõ Aron bõsrenkoakʼ paona lạgitʼko begar dohokakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah13:1 Hoṛko do Moseyakʼ puthi khon paṛhao ańjomatʼko khan ńelena, onḍe do nonka ol menakʼa Amonren ar Moabrenko do Isorren hoṛkoakʼ somajre bako seletʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Nehemiah13:2 Niạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, Mose bidạlre onko do jomakʼ ar ńũi lạgitʼ dakʼ hõ Israelko bako ematʼko tahẽkana, ar onko sarapako lạgitʼ Biliamko bhaṛa ạguledea. Menkhan aboren Isor do sarap bodolteye bhoratʼ bon tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah13:3 Hoṛko do Ạn-ạri reakʼ niạ katha ańjomkate sal mesal jạtren sanam hoṛko Israel somaj khonko begarketʼkoa. 
Nehemiah13:4 Inạ lahare naeke Eliasib, okoe do aboren Isorakʼ khajańci oṛakʼ reakʼ bhare ńamletʼ tahẽkan, uni do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ kandha Tobiại emade tahẽkana, ente Tobiạ do uniren peṛaye tahẽkana. Ona kandhare lahate do phosol samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko, dhup ar mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko dohokʼkan tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa onḍe do liwiko, sekʼreń dolko ar rurukhiyạko lạgitʼ hukum akatʼ anajko, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunumko reakʼ gelakʼ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩsko dohoyetʼkan tahẽkana ar naekeko lạgitʼ oka emokʼ kan tahẽkan ona hõ onḍegeko dohoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah13:5  
Nehemiah13:6 Menkhan noako tinre hoyokʼ kan tahẽkana unre Jerusalemre do bạń tahẽkana, ente Babelren raj Artaksastowakʼ pegel bar bochor rajokʼ oktere iń do raj ṭheniń ruạṛ senlena. Niạ thoṛa din tayom rajakʼ hukum hataokate iń do Jerusalemteń ruạṛ hecʼena." 
Nehemiah13:7 Eliasib do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre Tobiạ mitʼṭecʼ kandhai emade tahẽkante oka bạṛicʼakʼe kạmiletʼ ona do Jerusalemte ruạṛ hecʼkate ona reakʼ iń ańjomkeda. 
Nehemiah13:8 Onate iń do edrete Tobiạwakʼ sanam jinisko ona kandha khoniń oḍok giḍikatʼtaea. 
Nehemiah13:9 Ona tayom ińakʼ hukumte ona oṛakʼ iń sapha ocokeda ar Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ar dhupko ạgukate arhõ onḍegeń dohokada." 
Nehemiah13:10 Iń do noa hõń baḍaekeda je, sereń dolko ar eṭakʼ liwiko do kuṛại bako ńamakatʼte akoakʼ kạmi bạgikate onko do nij nij khet baṛgeteko ruạṛ akana." 
Nehemiah13:11 Onate iń do cetan hudạren kạmiyạkoń ruhetʼketʼkoteń kuliketʼkoa, “Isorakʼ oṛakʼre kạmi lạgitʼ cetʼ cetʼko jạruṛokʼ ona emokʼ do cedakʼpe ḍhilisiliyeda?” Ona tayom iń do onko liwikoń hoho ạguketʼkoa ar nij nij hudạreń bahal ruạṛketʼkoa." 
Nehemiah13:12 Ona tayom Jihudạren sanam hoṛko do akoakʼ anajko, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunumko reakʼ gelakʼ hĩs reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do khajańci oṛakʼteko ạgukeda." 
Nehemiah13:13 Naeke Salemis, dhorom cecetʼicʼ Sadok ar Pedaya ńutuman mitʼṭen liwi noko do khajańci oṛakʼ reakʼ bhariń ematʼkoa ar Sakurren hopon, metakʼme Mataniaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Hanan do onkoren gokʼṛoyicʼ menkateń bahalkedea. Noko do sanam hoṛgeko pạtiạu akokan tahẽkana. Onko cetanre onkoren gusṭi boehakoakʼ hĩs hạṭińako reakʼ dạyik hõń ematʼkoa." 
Nehemiah13:14 E ińren Isor, niạko kạmi lạgitʼ disạyińme baṛe. Ińren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ar onaren sapʼdapʼ kạmi lạgitʼ pạtiạr salakʼ okań ceka akatʼ ona do alom muchạu giḍikakʼa." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ona jokhecʼ iń ńelkeda Jihudạren hoṛko do jirạukʼ mãhãre darkhako lelen kana, phosolko samṭaoeda ar ona phosol, darkha rasa, loa jo ar eṭakʼ sanamakʼ bojhako do gadhareko ladeyeda. Ona chaḍa onko do jirạukʼ mãhãre Jerusalemte onako aderetʼkana. Onate jirạukʼ mãhãre jomakʼ jinis ạkhriń babotre onkoń sontorkatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan Turren hoṛko do hako ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko ạgukate jirạukʼ mãhãre Jerusalemre Jihudạren hoṛ ṭhenko ạkhrińetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nehemiah13:17 Unre iń do Jihudạren manotan hoṛkoń ruhetʼketʼkote onkoń metatʼkoa, “Noa do cetʼpe ceka kana? Ape do jirạukʼ mãhãre behokakʼpe kạmiyetʼte cedakʼpe besonotetʼ kana." 
Nehemiah13:18 Aperen hapṛamko do cetʼ nonkage bako kạmileda, ona iạte aboren Isor do abo cetanre, niạ nagraha cetanre bạṛicʼakʼ bae hoyocoakada? Ńitokʼ ape do jirạukʼ mãhã bape sonotetʼte Isor do Israelko cetanre arhõpe bekusi ocoyede kana.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Iń do niạ hukumiń emokʼ kana je, jirạukʼmãhã ehobokʼre tinre Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok duạrko cetanre ńut pheḍ hijukʼa unre jemon phaṭok duạr doko sińkakʼ ar jirạukʼ mãhã ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ ona do bondge tahenma. Jirạukʼ mãhãre jãhãn bojhage bhitrite alo jemon ạgukʼ ar ona ńel lạgitʼ iń do ińren adom kạmiyạko phaṭok duạr ṭheniń bahalketʼkoa." 
Nehemiah13:20 Onate bepariko ar okoe do joto lekan jinisko ạkhrińetʼ tahẽkan onko do mitʼ bar ńindạ Jerusalem bahrereko aṅga hạṭińena. 
Nehemiah13:21 Iń do onko sontor katʼkoteń metatʼkoa, “Ape do pạcri ṭhen cedakʼpe aṅga hạṭińokʼ kana? Arhõ jodi niạ kạmigepe kạmi enḍekhan ape upạrte bebostań hataoa.” Ar unkhon onko do jirạukʼ mãhãre ar bako hijukʼkan tahẽkana." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ona tayom iń do liwikoń hukumatʼkoa onko do apnartetʼko sapha maṛaṅokʼte jirạukʼ mãhã sonot dohoy lạgitʼ senkate jemon phaṭok duạrko horhoe. E ińren Isor, noa iạte hõ disạ dohoyińme ar amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛte dayawạńme." 
Nehemiah13:23 Ona jokhecʼ iń do niạ hõń ńelkeda je, Jihudạren adom hoṛko do Asdod, Amoni ar Moabi kuṛikoko bapla akatʼkoa." 
Nehemiah13:24 Onko talaren ḍher gidrạkoge Asdod se eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ pạrsiko roṛeda. Onko do Jihudi pạrsite roroṛ do bako baḍaea. 
Nehemiah13:25 Iń do onkoń ruhetʼketʼkoa ar onko cetanre jemon sarap hecʼako ona hõń metatʼkoa. Onkoren adomko doń dalketʼkoa ar bohokʼ upʼkoń racakʼ tutʼketʼtakoa. Isor ńutumte noań kiriạ ocoketʼkoa jemon porjạtren koṛako sãote akoren hoponerako aloko baplako ar akoren hoponko hõ jemon porjạtren kuṛiko tulucʼ aloko baplako. 
Nehemiah13:26 Ona tayom iń do onkoń metatʼkoa, “Israelren raj Solomon do nonkan bapla iạtegeye kạileda. Eṭakʼ jãhãn jạtrenko modre uni lekan raj do ar celege bako tahẽkana ar Isor do uniye dulạṛede tahẽkana ar uni do sanam Israelko cetanreye rajledea, menkhan enhõ uni do porjạtren maejiuko hotete ạḍiye kạileda." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ńitokʼ do cetʼ ona kathage ańjom hoyokʼ tabona, ape hõ niạ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmigepe kạmikana, metakʼme porjạtren maejiukope baplayetʼkote aboren Isor ṭhen bepạtiạrkope hoyakana?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Maraṅ naeke Eliasibren hopon Jehoyadaren mitʼṭen hopon do Horoni hoṛ Sanbalatren kuṛiye bapla akadea. Ona iạte iń ṭhen khon uni koṛa doń laga ńirkedea. 
Nehemiah13:29 E ińren Isor, nokoakʼ katha disạ dohoyme, ente noko do naeke hudạko bhõnḍ akada ar naeke ar liwikoakʼ kạmi reakʼ bondobosko rạputʼ akada." 
Nehemiah13:30 Nonkate iń do sanamko tala khon porjạtrenkoakʼ jotowakʼ iń sạṅgiń giḍikada. Tayomte naeke ar liwikoakʼ kạmi lekate onko mimitʼko do kạmiń hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Nehemiah13:31 Ona chaḍa okte nạpitre kaṭko ar pạhilte rakabokʼ phosol ạgui reakʼ hõń bebostawatʼkoa. E ińren Isor, iń bhạlạyiń lạgitʼ disạyińme baṛe." 
Esther1:1 Ahasberos raj do tinre Susan gaṛre acʼakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼkate rajosṭiye calaoetʼ tahẽkana unre niạko ghoṭna do hoylena. Nui Ahasberos do bharot disạm khon Kus hạbicʼ mitʼsae bargel eae disạm cetanreye rajokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Esther1:2  
Esther1:3 Uniyakʼ rajokʼ tesar bochorre uni do acʼren sanam cetan hudạren hoṛko ar kạmiyạko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. Onko modre Paras ar Madae disạmren Senaputiko manotan hoṛko ar disạmkoren cetan hudạren hoṛko tahẽkana. 
Esther1:4 Uni do turui cando hạbicʼ acʼakʼ rajosṭire acel pacel dhon durib ar raj lekate acʼakʼ ṭhosoke udukʼatʼkoa. 
Esther1:5 Niạko tayom uni do Susan gaṛre jarwa akan cetan ar latar hudạren sanamko lạgitʼ eae din hạbicʼ raj doṅgol reakʼ bagwanreye bhojkeda. 
Esther1:6 Ona bagwan sajao lạgitʼ do ponḍ ar lil kicricʼ reakʼ orwalkoe beoharkeda. Onako do ponḍ ar beguni roṅakʼ mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm reakʼ baberte rupạ mạ̃kṛiko ar marbel dhiriko khunṭire tol ṭarhao akan tahẽkana. Marbel dhiriko, jhinuk ar aema lekan roṅ reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ damanakʼ dhiriko reakʼ aṭetʼ bạisạuatʼre sona ar rupạ reakʼ duṛupʼakʼko tahẽkana." 
Esther1:7 Ar ńuńuakʼko do nana parkan sona reakʼ bạṭikoreye emokʼkan tahẽkana. Rajakʼ murji lekage raj doṅgolre darkha rasa do asambheṛge tahẽkana. 
Esther1:8 Rajakʼ hukumte neota akanko do akoakʼ mon bhor ńu reakʼ hukumko emocolena, ente tinạkʼko khoj unạkʼge emako lạgitʼ raj do acʼren gutikoe hukumatʼko tahẽkana." 
Esther1:9 Ahasberosakʼ raj doṅgolre Bạsti rạni hõ maejiuko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe bhojkeda. 
Esther1:10 Eaeakʼ dinre Ahasberos raj do darkha rasae ńuketʼ khan ạḍiye kusiyena ar Mohumon, Bistha, Harbona, Bigtha, Abagtha Sethar ar Karkas ńutuman acʼren noko eae goṭen mạ̃yạ̃ṛikoe hukumatʼkoa Bạsti rạni do rạni mukuṭko horokʼaete acʼ samaṅre jemonko oḍok ạguiye. Rạni do ńelokʼte ạḍi napaeye tahẽkante raj do hoṛko ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạko samaṅre uniyakʼ rup ńel ocoetae lạgitʼe menleda." 
Esther1:11  
Esther1:12 Rajren sapʼdapʼko do rajakʼ hukum rạniko baḍae ocokede khan Bạsti rạni do onko sãote hijukʼ bae rebenlena. Onate raj do edreteye seṅgelena. 
Esther1:13 Raj do ạn ar bicạrren gạkhuṛ hoṛko tulucʼ niạ babotreye sopolhawana. 
Esther1:14 Onko sopolhako modre Karsena, Sethar, Admatha, Tarsis, Meres, Marsena, ar Memukan teko cetanre raj do ạḍiye bhorsakʼ kan tahẽkana. Raj samaṅre Paras ar Madae disạmren noko eae hoṛ do rajosṭiko modre joto khon maraṅ hudạren hoṛko tahẽkana ar noko cetanrege maraṅ hudạren hoṛko jarwako reakʼ dạyik do tahẽkana." 
Esther1:15 Raj doe kuliyana, “Ạn lekate Bạsti rạni do cetʼ cekaye hoyokʼa? Ente uniren sapʼ sosorko hotete Ahasberos raj okaṭakʼ hukumletʼ rạni do ona bae manaoleda.”" 
Esther1:16 Raj ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạko samaṅre Memukan doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Bạsti rạni do eken raj upạrteye behok akada ona do baṅa, menkhan Ahasberos rajren sanam cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar disạmren sanam hoṛko upạrte hõe behok akada." 
Esther1:17 Ente Rạniyakʼ nonkan beohar reakʼ katha do sanam maejiuko talare baḍaeyokʼa ar onko do akoren jãwãeko nihạ̃tkoa, enteko mena, ‘Ahasberos raj samaṅre senokʼ lạgitʼ hukum ńamkate hõ Bạsti rạni do uni samaṅre bae senlena.’" 
Esther1:18 Paras ar Madaeren manotan maejiuko do rạniyakʼ noa beohar reakʼ katha ańjomkate teheńge akoren jãwãeko sãote inạ mitʼ lekageko beohara. Ar onate nihạ̃t ar raṅgao do bạ̃ṛti idikʼa. 
Esther1:19 Onate maharaj bogeye bujhạu khan tobe uni do mitʼṭecʼ raj parwanae emokʼma, Bạsti rạni do ar tisge Ahasberos raj samaṅre bae hecʼ daṛeakʼa. Ar niạ hukum do Paras ar Madae reakʼ ạn puthire ol caṛhaokʼma ar ona do baṅ bodolokʼa. Ona chaḍa maharaj do Bạsti rạni khon hõ lekicʼ eṭakʼ ar mitʼṭen do rạni hudại emaema." 
Esther1:20 Rajakʼ niạ hukum do tinre acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam jaegakore lại pasnaokʼa unre disạmren sanam maejiuko do akoren jãwãeko manotkoa.” 
Esther1:21 Niạ sopolha raj ar uniren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko do bhageko metatʼa. Onate raj do Memukonakʼ katha lekageye kạmikeda. 
Esther1:22 Uni do acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam disạmkore onkoakʼ akhorte ar mimitʼ jạtrenkoakʼ pạrsi lekate ciṭhiye kolkeda je, mitʼke mitʼ herel hoṛ do acʼakʼ gharońjren matha kanae ar uniyakʼ gharońjre acʼakʼ pạrsigeye beoharma." 
Esther2:1 Noako tayom Ahasberosakʼ raṅgao thirentae khan uni do Bạsti rạniyakʼ katha, metakʼme Bạsti okae cekaletʼ ar uni reaṅ okae hukumletʼ onae disạkeda." 
Esther2:2 Unre rajren kạmiyạkoko menkeda, “Maharaj lạgitʼ mońj kũạ̃ri kuṛiko ńamokʼma." 
Esther2:3 Ar maharaj do acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam disạmkore kạmiyạkoe bahalko jemon onko do mońj kũạ̃ri kuṛiko sendra ńamkote Susan gaṛ reakʼ raj doṅgol Haremteko kol daṛeako. Ar Hegai ńutuman okoeṭakʼ mạ̃yạ̃ṛi cetanre maejiuko ńeltodarotko reakʼ bhare ńamakatʼ uni do onkoe ńel todarotkoma. Ar onkoakʼ cehrakʼ lạgitʼ cetʼ cetʼko jạruṛokʼ onako jemone emakoma. 
Esther2:4 Ona tayom maharaj okoeṭakʼe kusiyae unige Bạsti rạni bodolte rạniye hoyokʼma.” Niạ sopolha raj do bogegeye metatʼa. Ar ona lekage uni doe kạmikeda. 
Esther2:5 Onako dinre Mordekae ńutuman Benjạmin gusṭiren mitʼṭen Jihudi hoṛ do Susan gaṛreye tahẽkana. Uni do Jayirren hopone tahẽkana, ar Jayir do Simạiren hopone tahẽkana ar Simại do Kisren hopone tahẽkana." 
Esther2:6 Jihudạren raj Jekoniạ, metakʼme Jehoyakin sãote okoeko hoṛ do Babelren Nebukadnesar raj Jerusalem khone bondi idiletʼko onko modre Mordekairen hapṛam hõe tahẽkana." 
Esther2:7 Mordekai kakattetʼren do Hadasa ńutuman mitʼṭen hoponerae tahẽkana. Kuṛiren eṅgat apat bạkin tahẽkante Mordekae do acʼgeye ạsul harakedea. Ar uni kuṛige, okoe do Esterko metaekan, uni do rupte mońj ar ńelokʼte hõ ạḍi cehrageye tahẽkana. Kuṛiren eṅgat apatkin gocʼen khan Mordekae do acʼren hopon era lekae joton harakedea." 
Esther2:8 Rajakʼ hukum ar uniyakʼ parwana oḍoken khan aema kuṛiko do Susan gaṛteko ạguketʼkoa ar Hegaiyakʼ jimạreko dohoketʼkoa. Ester hõ raj doṅgolte idikate Hegai ṭhene doho ocoyena. 
Esther2:9 Ester do Hegaiyakʼ nońjorre bhagegeye tahẽkana ar Ester hõ uni ṭhen khon mońj beohare ńamkeda. Hegai do pạhil khonge uniyakʼ rup baṛhaokʼtae lạgitʼ ojokʼakʼkoe emadea ar uniyakʼ niṭakatʼ jomakʼko hõe emadea. Uni do raj oṛakʼ khon eae goṭen kạ̃ṛmĩ kuṛikoe soṅgeadea ar Harem reakʼ mońj utạr jaegare uni ar uniren soṅge kuṛikoe dohoketʼkoa. 
Esther2:10 Ester do acʼakʼ jạt ar bõsbudạ reakʼ oprom do bae lạileda, ente Mordekai do ona reakʼe baron akade tahẽkana." 
Esther2:11 Ester cetʼleka menaea ar cetʼko hoyokʼkana ona baḍae lạgitʼ Mordekai do din hilokʼ Haremakʼ raca samaṅreye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana. 
Esther2:12 Ahasberos raj ṭhen kuṛikoakʼ calakʼ pạli ạuri seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ onko do mitʼ bochor rup baṛhao ocoytako reakʼ bebosta tahẽkana. Onko do turui cando gondhoros ar turui cando do jut so mosola ar sajaokʼ reakʼ jinisko beoharetʼ tahẽkana. 
Esther2:13 Ar raj ṭhen jãhãe kuṛiyakʼ senokʼ okte hoylen khan Harem khon raj samaṅre idiye lạgitʼ uni okae khoj onageye emocokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Esther2:14 Ar uni do ạyupʼ jokhecʼ onḍeye senokʼa ar setakʼ do rajren chuṭki erakoren horhoyicʼ mạ̃yạ̃ṛi Sagas jimạre Haremteye ruạṛ hijukʼa. Ar Raj do kusikate ńutum ńumkate ạuriye hohowae hạbicʼ uni do raj ṭhen ar bae sen daṛeakʼa. 
Esther2:15 Mordekai do acʼren kakattetʼ Abhạyilren okoeṭakʼ hoponera do acʼren hoponera lekateye ạsul haralede uni kuṛi, metakʼme Esterakʼ tinre raj ṭhen calakʼ reakʼ okte seṭerentaea unre Haremren ńel todaroticʼ uni mạ̃yạ̃ṛi Hegai oka idiye metade ona chaḍa ar cetʼge uni do bae khojleda. Ar jãhãege Estere beṅgetʼaekan tahẽkan unige Esterre mẽtʼ do ḍhaṅokʼkantae tahẽkana." 
Esther2:16 Ahasberos rajakʼ rajokʼ eae bochor reakʼ gelakʼ candore, metakʼme Tobet candore Ester do raj doṅgolte raj ṭhenko idikedea." 
Esther2:17 Eṭakʼ maejiuko khon raj do Esterge bạ̃ṛtiye dulạṛkedea ar eṭakʼ kũạri kuṛiko khon uni do raj ṭhen bạ̃ṛti daya ar dulạṛe ńamkeda. Onate raj do bohokʼre rạni ṭupriye horokʼadea ar Bạstiwakʼ jaegare Estere rạnikedea. 
Esther2:18 Ona tayom raj do acʼren cetan hudạren hoṛko ar uniren kạmiyạko lạgitʼ Ester ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼe bhojkeda. Uni do tabe disạmkore khajnae aṛakʼatʼkoa ar rajakʼ murji leka sandeskoe danatʼkoa. 
Esther2:19 Dosar dhao kũạ̃ri kuṛiko jogaṛko jokhecʼ Mordekai do raj dolan reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen duṛubokʼ lạgitʼe bahal ocoakan tahẽkana. 
Esther2:20 Ester do Mordekayakʼ katha lekage acʼakʼ bõsbudạ reakʼ oprom ar jạt reakʼ katha doe danaṅ akatʼ tahẽkana. Ester do Mordekai ṭhene ạsul hara ocokʼre okalekae calakʼkan tahẽkan unhõ onkage uni doe calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Esther2:21 Mordekae do raj dolan reakʼ phaṭok duạrre sapʼ sosor kạmireye tahẽkan jokhecʼ raj dolanren horhoko modre Bigthan ar Teres ńutuman rajren barea guti do Ahasberos goje reakʼ kin soṛojontrokeda. 
Esther2:22 Mordekai do soṛojontro reakʼ kathae baḍaeketʼ khan Ester rạniye baḍae ocokedea. Ar rạni do Mordekai ńutumte raj onae baḍae ocokedea. 
Esther2:23 Ona babotre tinre suṭhik hataokate baḍaeyena katha do sạrikana mente unre unkin guti doko pạsiketʼkinạ. Ar niạ katha do raj samaṅrege Itihãs puthire ol caṛhaoena. 
Esther3:1 Niạko ghoṭna tayom Ahasberos raj do Agag Hamedatharen hopon Haman do rajosṭiren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiyạko khon cetan hudạre dohokedeteye manotkedea. 
Esther3:2 Unre raj dolan reakʼ phaṭok duạrre tahen kạmiyạko do ikhṛumate Hamanko ḍobokʼaekan tahẽkana, ente raj do uni reaṅ onkageye hukumakatʼ tahẽkana. Menkhan Mordekae do ikhṛum hõ bae ikṛumokʼkan tahẽkana ar ḍobokʼ hõ bae ḍobokʼae kan tahẽkana." 
Esther3:3 Ona iạte raj phaṭok duạrren kạmiyạko do Mordekaiko metadea, “Rajakʼ hukum do cedakʼ bam manaoeda?”" 
Esther3:4 Nonkage din hilokʼko metaekan tahẽkanre hõ uni do onkoakʼ katha bae ańjomletʼtakoa. Onate onko do ona katha Hamanko baḍae ocokedea. Onko do Mordekayakʼ niạ beohar ṭarhaokʼtaea se baṅa ona ńelko mepenena, ente Jihudikanae mente onkoe lạiyatʼko tahẽkana." 
Esther3:5 Mordekai do ikhṛum hõ baṅ ar manot hõ baṅ emokʼkan reakʼe baḍaeketʼ khan Haman do ạḍiye raṅgaoena. 
Esther3:6 Ar Mordekayakʼ jạt reaṅe baḍaeketʼ khan uni goje do huḍiń bisoegeye metatʼa. Ona bodolte uni do mitʼṭecʼ pontha sendraye ehopʼena jemon Ahasberosakʼ goṭa rajosṭi khon Mordekairen hoṛko, metakʼme Jihudikoe marao cabako." 
Esther3:7 Ahasberos rajakʼ rajokʼ gelbar bochor reakʼ pạhil candore, metakʼme Nisan candore mitʼṭecʼ din ar cando bachao lạgitʼ hoṛko do Haman samaṅre puretʼ, metakʼme gulibãṭko ehopʼena. Onate gelbar cando reakʼ, metakʼme Adar candore guli do rakapʼena." 
Esther3:8 Haman do unre Ahasberos raje metadea, “Amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ tabe disạmkore judạ judạ jạtrenko modre mitʼṭecʼ jạtrenko doko pasnao akana. Eṭakʼ sanam jạtrenko khon onkoakʼ ạn-ạriko do begargetakoa ar rajakʼ ạn hõ onko do bako manaoeda. Onate onko jiwetʼ dohoko do baṅ bhagea." 
Esther3:9 Ado raj bhageye hudis khan onko do marao utạrko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ hukume emokʼma. Onate rajakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre dohoy lạgitʼ rajakʼ kạmi ạkʼyurkoakʼ tire iń do pesae aregel ṭon rupạń emokʼa.” 
Esther3:10 Unre raj do chap emakʼ lạgitʼ acʼakʼ kạṭupʼ khon mundạm totʼkate Jihudikoren bạiri Agag Hamadathren hopon Hamane emadea. 
Esther3:11 Raj do Hamane metadea, “Ṭaka hõ ar hoṛko hõ amren kangekoa; onate ṭaka ar hoṛko idikate oka bhagem hudisetʼ ona onkaeme.”" 
Esther3:12 Ona tayom pạhil cando reakʼ gelpeyakʼ dinre raj do olokʼkoe hohowatʼkoa. Onko do mitʼke mitʼ tabe disạm reakʼ horop ar mitʼke mitʼ jạtrenkoakʼ pạrsi leka Hamanakʼ hukum do disạm cakʼlaoko ar judạ judạ mukhiyạko ṭhen ol kateko baḍae ocoyena. Ciṭhiko do Ahasberosakʼ ńutumtege ol hoyena ar raj do acʼakʼ mundạmte onako cetanreye chapada. 
Esther3:13 Rajakʼ goṭa tabe disạmkore sombat asenko hotete ciṭhi do kol hoyena. Ona ciṭhire do nonka hukum emena Adar cando reakʼ gelpeyakʼ dinre Jihudiren sanam juạnko, haṛamko, maejiuko, gidrạko, metakʼme sanam Jihudiko do gocʼko hoyokʼa ar mohor meṭao utạrko hoyokʼa. Ona chaḍa onkoakʼ jinisko hõ luṭtako hoyokʼa." 
Esther3:14 Ạn lekate ona hukum reakʼ nokol do tabe disạmkore kolkate sanam jạtren hoṛko baḍae ocoyena jemon onko do unhilokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛao akanko tahen. 
Esther3:15 Rajakʼ hukum ńamkate sombat asenko do usạrateko oḍokena ar Susan gaṛrehõ ona hukum lại jạhirena. Ona tayom raj ar Haman do darkha rasa ńũńũkin duṛupʼena ar Susan nagraharen Jihudiko doko hae nisạsena. 
Esther4:1 Mordekae do jotowakʼ sombatkoe baḍaeketʼ khan acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼte gõṛẽ kicricʼe horokʼkeda ar torocʼ ojokʼkate nagraha talare senkate ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼe ehopʼena. 
Esther4:2 Nonkate uni do raj doṅgol reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼe senena menkhan bhitrite do bae bolo daṛeada, ente gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate bhitrite bolokʼ reakʼ hukum do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Esther4:3 Mitʼke mitʼ tabe disạmkore okare rajakʼ parwana ar hukum seṭeren onḍenko Jihudiko talare hõ maraṅ rakʼjoṅ, hae haeyokʼ ar upạsokʼko ehopʼena. Ar ḍher hoṛge gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate torocʼreko giticʼena." 
Esther4:4 Esterren kạ̃ṛmĩko ar mạ̃yạ̃ṛiko do hecʼkate tinre Mordekayakʼ kathako lạiyadea unre uni do monre ạḍi duke ńamkeda. Gõṛẽ kicricʼ bodolte Mordekai ṭhen uni do kicricʼe kolkeda menkhan Mordekai do ona bae hataoleda. 
Esther4:5 Unre Ester do rajen sapʼdapʼicʼ Hathake hohoadea ar Mordekaiyakʼ cetʼ hoyakana ar cedakʼ hoyena ona baḍae lạgitʼe kolkedea. 
Esther4:6 Unre Hathak do raj doṅgol reakʼ phaṭok duạr samaṅre nagraha reakʼ maedanre Mordekai ṭhene senena. 
Esther4:7 Ar Mordekai do acʼre oka hoyakan ar Jihudiko maraoko lạgitʼ Haman tinạkʼ ṭaka raj khajańcire emokʼ lạgitʼe gokʼ akatʼ ona jotowakʼ do Hathake lạiyadea. 
Esther4:8 Susanre emakʼ Jihudiko maraoko reaṅ okaṭakʼ raj parwana oḍok akan ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nokol do Hathake emadea, jemon uni do Estere udukʼ daṛeae ar onate uniye bujhạu daṛeakʼ. Ar Ester do raj samaṅre senkate acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼe nehõrokʼ." 
Esther4:9 Hathak do ruạṛ senkate Mordekai okae metade tahẽkan ona joto do Estere baḍae ocokedea. 
Esther4:10 Unre Ester do Mordekai niạ katha lạiyae lạgitʼ Hathake hukumadea," 
Esther4:11 “Rajren sanam kạmiyạko ar raj tabe disạmren sanam hoṛko baḍaea je, jãhãe herel se maejiuge rajakʼ hukum begorte bhitrite raj ṭhene senokʼ enḍekhan uni lạgitʼ do mitʼṭecʼ ạnge menakʼa- ona do uniyakʼ gujukʼ. Tobe okoe hoṛ secʼ raj do acʼakʼ sona ṭheṅgae ạwiltae eken unige jiwetʼe tahena. Menkhan pegel din hoyokʼkana raj ṭhen calakʼ lạgitʼ iń do bạń hoho ocoakana.”" 
Esther4:12 Esterakʼ sanam katha do Mordekaiko baḍae ocokedea. 
Esther4:13 Mordekae do Ester niạ kathae roṛ gotʼadea, “Niạ katha do alom hudisa je, raj doṅgolre menakʼmete Jihudiko modre eken am eskarge rukhiyạm ńama.”" 
Esther4:14 Menkhan niạ oktere hape akangem tahen enḍekhan eṭakʼ secʼte Jihudiko do rukhiyạko ńama arko bańcaokʼa, menkhan am dom gujukʼa ar am apumren bõs hõko marao utạrokʼa. Okoe baḍaea pasecʼ niạ okte lạgitʼge am do rạni hudạm ńam akatʼ!”" 
Esther4:15 Unre Ester do Mordekai niạ kathae roṛ ruạṛadea," 
Esther4:16 “Am do senkate Susanre menakʼko sanam Jihudikom jarwakoa ar iń ńutumte joto hoṛ upạspe dohoya. Ape do pe siń pe ńindạ cetʼge alope jom ńũiya. Ar ape cetʼ lekape upạs onkage iń ar ińren kạ̃ṛmĩko hõle upạsa. Ona tayom ạn upạrte jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ enhõ iń do raj ṭheniń calakʼa. Ar ona khạtirte gujukʼ hoyokʼtiń khan hõ iń doń khaṛagea.” 
Esther4:17 Onate Mordekai do senkate Esterakʼ sanam hukum lekae kạmikeda. 
Esther5:1 Tesar hilokʼ Ester do rạniyakʼ sajbaj horokʼkate raj doṅgol bhitri raj dorbarte senkateye teṅgoyena. Unre raj do siṅghạsonre duṛupʼkate duạr secʼe samaṅ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Esther5:2 Uni do Ester rạni raj dorbarre teṅgo akane ńelkede khan kusite acʼakʼ ti reakʼ sona ṭheṅgae ạwiladea. Unre Ester doe sen sorente ona ṭheṅga reakʼ agaltetʼe joṭetʼkeda. 
Esther5:3 Raje kuliyana, “Ester rạni, cetʼ hoyakana? Ar am do cetʼem khojkana? Adha rajosṭim koeyeńre hõ onań emama.”" 
Esther5:4 Estere roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Maharaj bhagem moneyetʼ khan enḍekhan am lạgitʼ oka bhojiń sapṛao akatʼ onare Maharaj ar Haman jemon seletʼkin tahen.”" 
Esther5:5 Unre raj doe hukumkeda, “Esterakʼ katha leka jemon kạmi hoyokʼ onate ńitge nonḍe Haman ạguiyepe.” Ar Ester okaṭakʼ bhoje sapṛao akatʼ onare Raj ar Hamankin seletʼena." 
Esther5:6 Darkha rasa ńuńu tulucʼ raj do Estere kulikedea, “Am do cetʼem khojkana? Am okam khoj onagem emocokʼa. Amakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ lạiyạńme? Rajakʼ adha kanrehõ enhõ onam emocokʼa.”" 
Esther5:7 Ester rạni doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Ińakʼ nehõr ar monejoṅakʼ do niạge-" 
Esther5:8 Maharajakʼ nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan ar ińakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ dohoytińem menetʼ khan tobe gapa okaṭakʼ bhojiń sapṛao lạgidokʼkan onare hõ Maharaj ar Haman do jemon seletʼkin tahen. Ar unre iń do maharajakʼ kukli reakʼ roṛ ruạṛiń emokʼa.” 
Esther5:9 Enhilokʼ Haman do kusite bahreteye oḍok calaoena. Menkhan uni do tinre raj dolan reakʼ phaṭok duạrre Mordekaiye ńamkedea, ar Mordekai do uni ńelkate hõ bae teṅgolena ar manot hõ bae udukʼadea unre uni do Mordekai upạrte ạḍiye edreyena." 
Esther5:10 Menkhan enhõ Haman do apnartetʼe sambṛaoente oṛakʼteye calaoena. Oṛakʼte senkate acʼren bạhu Seres ar gatekoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
Esther5:11 Ona tayom uni do onko ṭhen acʼakʼ dhon durib reakʼ katha, acʼren hoponkoakʼ katha, ar oka pontha iạte raj ṭhen khon manote ńamketʼ ar cekate eṭakʼ cetan hudạren hoṛko ar kạmiyạko khone maraṅ ocoyena ona joto katha do gorbokate lại akoe ehopʼena." 
Esther5:12 Hamane menkeda, “Eken ona do baṅ Ester rạni oka bhoje sapṛaoletʼ tahẽkan onare iń chaḍa raj sãote ar okoe hõ bako neota ocolena. Uni do gapa arhõ raj sãote ińe neota akadińạ." 
Esther5:13 Menkhan jãhãtinrege raj doṅgol reakʼ duạrre uni Jihudi Mordekai duṛupʼ akaniń ńele unrege iń do monre suluk bạń ạikạua.” 
Esther5:14 Unre acʼren bạhu Seres ar acʼren sanam gatekoko metadea, “Am do mõṛẽgel moka usul mitʼṭecʼ pạsi kaṭ benaome ar setakʼre rajakʼ hukum hataokate onare Mordekai pạsiye reakʼ bebostaeme. Ona tayom kusi monte raj sãote bhojre seledokʼme.” Niạ katha Haman do ạḍi bhageye metatʼa ar uni do ona pạsikaṭe benao ocokeda." 
Esther6:1 Enhilokʼ ńindạ raj do bae jạpitʼ daṛeakʼ kan tahẽkana. Uni doe hukumkeda rajosṭi reakʼ Itihãs puthi jemon acʼ ṭhen ạgukʼ. Ar ona tayom do ona puthi khone paṛhao ańjom ocoyena. 
Esther6:2 Onḍe ńelena Bigthan ar Teres ńutuman rajren barea horhokin do Ahasberos raj goje reakʼkin soṛojontroletʼre Mordekai do ona reakʼ khobor raje baḍae ocolede tahẽkana. 
Esther6:3 Raje kuliyana, “Noa iạte Mordekai do cetʼ jãhãn manot em akawadea?” Uniren kạmiyạkoko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Uni do cetʼge baṅ ceka akawadea.”" 
Esther6:4 Raje kuliyana, “Dorbarre okoe menakʼkoa?” Unre Haman do acʼe benao akatʼ pạsikaṭre Mordekai pạsiye reakʼ raj ṭhen aroj lạgitʼ bahre dorbarre hecʼkateye teṅgo akan tahẽkana." 
Esther6:5 Rajren gutiko doko menkeda, “Dorbarre Hamane teṅgo akana.” Raje menkeda, “Haman bhitriteye hijukʼma.”" 
Esther6:6 Haman bhitriteye boloyen khan raj do uniye kulikedea, “Raja jãhãe manoteye menjoṅ khan uni lạgitʼ do cetʼ cekae hoyokʼa?” Unre Haman do mone monteye menkeda, iń chaḍa raj do manot ar okoeye emaea?”" 
Esther6:7 Ona iạte uniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Raj do okoe manoteye menetʼkan uni lạgitʼ maharajakʼ mitʼṭecʼ raj kicricʼ ạgukʼma ar okoeṭakʼ sadomakʼ bohokʼre raj mukuṭ horokʼ menakʼ uni sadom hõe ạgu ocokʼma." 
Esther6:8  
Esther6:9 Ona tayom ona kicricʼ ar sadom do rajren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko modre mitʼ hoṛakʼ tire emokʼma. Ar raj okoeṭakʼ manoteye menetʼkan uni do ona kicricʼe horokʼaema ar sadomre uniye dejete nagraha reakʼ moedanre uni laha lahate lại jạhirokʼma, ‘raj okoe manoteye men unire hõ nonkage hoyokʼa.”" 
Esther6:10 Unre raj do Hamane hukumadea, “Am do ńitge senkate raj kicricʼ ar sadom ạguiyem ar cetʼ lekam menketʼ onkage raj doṅgol reakʼ phaṭok duạrreye duṛupʼ akan uni Jihudi Mordekae onkawaeme. Ar am cetʼkom menketʼ onako reakʼ cetʼge alom ḍhilisiliya.”" 
Esther6:11 Onate Haman do raj kicricʼ ar sadome ạgukedea ar ona kicricʼ Mordekaiye horokʼadete sadomreye decʼkedea ar nagraha reakʼ moedanre uni laha lahate noae lại jạhirkeda, “Raj okoe manoteye men unire hõ nonkage hoyokʼa.”" 
Esther6:12 Inạ tayom Mordekai do arhõ raj dolan reakʼ phaṭo duạr ṭhene senena. Menkhan Haman do dukte bohokʼe tol esetʼente usạrate oṛakʼteye calaoena. 
Esther6:13 Ar uni cetanre oka hoyen ona do acʼren bạhu Seres ar uniren sanam gatekoe lạiyatʼkoa. Hamanren bạhu Seres ar uniren sopolhako do uniko metadea, “Okoe samaṅre amakʼ niạ ńurokʼ ehopʼakan uni Mordekai do Jihudi bõsren hoṛkan khane enḍekhan uni upạrte am do ohom teṅgo daṛelena, ar khạṭigem marao utạrokʼa.”" 
Esther6:14 Onko do unhõ Haman sãote kathako roroṛkan tahẽkanrege rajren gutiko do hecʼkate usạrate Esterakʼ bhojre seledokʼ lạgitʼ Hamanko idikedea. 
Esther7:1 Ona tayom raj ar Haman do dosar dhao Ester rạni sãote jom lạgitʼ kin senena. 
Esther7:2 Unkin do tinre darkha rasakin ńuńukan tahẽkana unre raj do arhõe kuliyana, “Ester rạni, am do cetʼem khojkana? Am okam khoj onagem emocokʼa. Amakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ do cetʼ tam? Adha rajosṭim khoj khan ona hõm ńama.”" 
Esther7:3 Ester rạniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Maharaj, am nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan ar maharaj do ińreye kusi akan khan enḍekhan ińakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ do noage iń ar iń jạtren hoṛkoakʼ jiwi rukhiyạitaleme baṛe," 
Esther7:4 ente ale gocʼle ar marao utạrle lạgitʼte iń ar iń jạtren hoṛko dole ạkhriń akana. Ale do eken guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩ hoyokʼ lạgitʼle ạkhrińlen khan do hape akangeń tahẽkokʼa, ente onkan kosṭo reakʼ katha maharaj baḍae ocoye do lek baṅ tahẽkokʼa.”" 
Esther7:5 Unre Ahasberos raj do rạniye kulikedea, “Okoe kanae uni hoṛ do? Ar uni do okare menaea? Nonkan kạmi reakʼ dil do okoeyakʼ hoyakantaea?”" 
Esther7:6 Estere menkeda, “Uni dusṭạmi bạiri do nui Hamange.” Unre Haman do raj ar rạni samaṅre ạḍiye botorena." 
Esther7:7 Raj doe raṅgaoente darkha rasa dohokateye beretʼena ar oḍokente raj doṅgol reakʼ bagwanteye boloyena. Unre Haman doe bujhạu daṛeada raj do acakʼ bhạge ṭhik dohoakada onate jiwi rukhiyạitae lạgitʼ Ester rạni ṭhene tahẽyena. 
Esther7:8 Raj doṅgol reakʼ bagwan khon raj do bhoj oṛakʼteye ruạṛ hecʼena ar unre Ester oka duṛupʼakʼre ṭenḍarkateye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkan onare Haman doe ombakʼ akan tahẽkana. Unre raj do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “Nui do cetʼ iń samaṅrege ińren rạniye jormoṭea?” Rajakʼ moca khon niạ katha oḍokokʼ são sãote hoṛko do Hamanakʼ mẽtʼãhãko betʼketʼtaea." 
Esther7:9 Unre Harbona ńutuman rajren mitʼṭen sapʼsosoricʼe menkeda, “Hamanakʼ oṛakʼre mõṛẽgel moka usul mitʼṭecʼ pạsikaṭ sapṛao doho menakʼa. Mordekai, okoe do rajakʼ jiwi rukhiyại lạgitʼ khobore ạguletʼ uni lạgitʼge Haman do onae sapṛao dohoakatʼ tahẽkana.” Raje menkeda, “Onarege uni pạsiyepe.”" 
Esther7:10 Onate Haman okaṭakʼ pạsikaṭ Mordekai lạgitʼe sapṛao doholetʼ hoṛko do onarege Hamanko pạsikedea. Ar ona tayom do rajakʼ edre thirentaea. 
Esther8:1 Enhilokʼ Ahasberos raj do Jihudikoren bạiri Hamanakʼ sompotti do Ester rạniye emadea. Inạ tayom Mordekai do raj samaṅreye hạjirena, ente Ester do uni tulucʼ acʼakʼ sạgại babotre raje baḍae ocoledea." 
Esther8:2 Raj do acʼakʼ chap akatʼ mundạm Haman ṭhen khon okae hatao ruạṛletʼ ona totʼkate Mordekaiye emadea. Ar Ester do Hamanakʼ sompotti cetanre Mordekaiye dohokadea. 
Esther8:3 Ester do rajakʼ jaṅgareye giḍiyena ar rakʼ rakʼte arhõ uni ṭhen nehõrkateye menkeda. Jihudiko upạrte Agagi Haman oka dusṭạmi phundiye aṭao akatʼ ona baṛe bondme. 
Esther8:4 Unre raj do acʼakʼ sona reakʼ ṭheṅga Ester secʼe ạwilkeda ar Ester doe beretʼente raj samaṅreye teṅgoyena. 
Esther8:5 Estere menkeda, “Maharaje kusikʼkan khan, ar uni nońjorre dayań ńamakatʼ khan ar kạmi do hok reakʼ kan khan ar iń cetanre kusi menae khan, enḍekhan goṭa tabe disạmre Jihudiko maraoko lạgitʼ Agagi Hamadatharen hopon Haman oka ciṭhiye olletʼ ona bạtil lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ hukum emokʼme." 
Esther8:6 Ińakʼ jạt ar ińren hoṛko cetanre hecʼ paṛaokʼ ghoṭnako do cekateń sahao daṛekea?” 
Esther8:7 Onate Ahasberos raj do Ester rạni ar Jihudi Mordekai tạkine metatʼkinạ, “Haman do Jihudiko upạrteye kạmiletʼte uniyakʼ sompotti do Ester iń emadea ar hoṛko do uniko pạsikedea." 
Esther8:8 Menkhan rajakʼ ńutumte olakʼ ar rajakʼ mundạm reakʼ chapakʼ jãhãn hukumge baṅ bạtilokʼa. Onate ńitokʼ bhage ben hudisetʼ khan Jihudiko lạgitʼ raj ńutumte ar mitʼṭecʼ parwana ol ocoyben ar onare rajakʼ mundạm reakʼ chap emakʼben.” 
Esther8:9 Onako din reakʼ tesar cando, metakʼme Siwan cando reakʼ bargel tesar hilokʼre rajren olokʼkoko hoho ocoyena. Ar Mordekaiyakʼ hukum lekate Bharot khon Kus hạbicʼ mitʼsae bargel eae tabe disạmren Jihudiko, tabe disạm cakʼlaoko, cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ṭhen ciṭhi ol hoyena. Ar niạ ciṭhiko do mimitʼ tabe disạm reakʼ harop ar mimitʼ tabe disạm reakʼ pạrsi lekate ar Jihudikoakʼ harop ar pạrsi lekate olena." 
Esther8:10 Mordekai do unre Ahasberos raj ńutumte ciṭhikoe olketʼte rajakʼ mundạme chapada. Ar ona tayom do rajren khacaṛ sadomre decʼkate aswarikoakʼ tite ciṭhikoe kolkeda. 
Esther8:11 Ahasberos raj do ona ciṭhire Adar cando reakʼ, metakʼme gelbar cando reakʼ gelpeyakʼ dinre uniyakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ mimitʼ nagraharen Jihudiko jemon mitʼ ṭhenko jarwakʼte akoakʼ jiwi rukhiyạitako reakʼ ạidạriye ematʼkoa. Jãhãn jạt se tabe disạmren hoṛko jodi Jihudiko ar onkoren maejiuko ar hoponko ar hoponerako cetanre akromonko calao enḍekhan Jihudiko hõ akoren bạirikoko marao utạrko ar onko bạirikoakʼ sompotti luṭ reakʼ ạidạriko ńamkeda." 
Esther8:12  
Esther8:13 Rajakʼ hukum do sanam tabe disạmre ạn lekate lại jạhirena ar mitʼke mitʼ jạtrenkoko baḍae ocoyena Jihudiko do enhilokʼ akoren bạiriko cetanreko hala daṛeakʼa. 
Esther8:14 Rajren khacaṛ sadomkore decʼkate sombat asenko do usạrate rajakʼ hukumanteko oḍokena. Ar Susan gaṛre hõ ona hukum do lại jạhirena. 
Esther8:15 Mordekai do mĩhĩ musnạ sutạm reakʼ beguni kicricʼ cetanre lil ar ponḍ roṅ reakʼ raj kicricʼ horokʼkate ar sona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mukuṭ bohokʼre horokʼkate raj samaṅ khone oḍok calaoena. Ar Susan nagraharen hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko hulạsena. 
Esther8:16 Jihudiko lạgitʼ okte do ạḍi rạskạ, hulạsokʼ ar manot reakʼ hoyena." 
Esther8:17 Joto tabe disạm ar nagrahakore okare rajakʼ hukum seṭeren onḍenko Jihudiko do hulạsateko porobena. Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren ḍher hoṛ doko Jihudiyena, ente onko do Jihudiko ạḍiko botoratʼkoa." 
Esther9:1 Adar cando reakʼ, metakʼme gelbar cando reakʼ gelpeakʼ dinre rajakʼ hukum kạmi purạukʼ reakʼ okte do seṭerena. Enhilokʼ Jihudikoren bạiriko do onko domaoko reakʼko asokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan ghoṭna do ulṭạuena. Okoe do Jihudikoko hirkhạwako kan tahẽkan onkoge Jihudi ṭhenko jaṅga latar ocoyena." 
Esther9:2 Okoe do Jihudiko marao utạrkoko menletʼ Jihudiko do onko akromonko lạgitʼ Ahasberos rajakʼ sanam tabe disạmre nij nij nagrahareko jarwayena. Ar onko upạrte celege bako teṅgo daṛeada, ente eṭakʼ sanam jạtren hoṛko do onkoko botorako kan tahẽkana." 
Esther9:3 Tabe disạmren sanam cetan hudạren kạmiyạko, disạmren cakʼlaoko ar rajren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ kạmiyạko do Jihudikoko goṛowatʼkoa, ente onko do Mordekaiko botoradea." 
Esther9:4 Mordekai do raj doṅgolre maraṅicʼe hoyena; uniyakʼ ńutum do sanam tabe disạmkore pasnao idiyena ar dinke dine daṛe idiyena. 
Esther9:5 Ar Jihudiko do akoren bạiriko gogocʼko ehopʼena ar okoe onkoko hirkhạwako kan tahẽkan onko cetanre do akoakʼ kusi lekako kạmikeda. 
Esther9:6 Susan gaṛre onko do mõṛẽsae hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa. Onko do Jihudạren bạiri Hamadatharen hopon Hamanren gel goṭen hoponko gocʼketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼkana Parsandatha, Dalphon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Parmasta, Arisai, Aridai ar Baisetha. Menkhan onko do luṭakʼ jinisre ti bako lagaoleda." 
Esther9:7  
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Susan gaṛre okoeko gocʼ ocolen onkoakʼ lekha do enhilokʼge rajko baḍae ocokedea. 
Esther9:12 Raj do unre Ester rạniye metadea, “Susan gaṛre Jihudiko do mõṛẽsae hoṛ ar Hamanren gel goṭen hoponko gocʼ akatʼkoa. Rajakʼ sarecʼ tabe disạmkore baṅ cetʼko cekawakatʼ. Ńitokʼ amakʼ ńehõr joṅakʼ do cetʼ tam? Ńitʼhõ jãhãnakʼgem khoj onagem emocokʼa. Ar onkage hoyokʼa.”" 
Esther9:13 Ester rạniye roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Maharaj bhageye bujhạuetʼ khan tobe teheń leka gapa hõ Susanren Jihudiko jemon hukumko ńam; ar Hamanren gel goṭen hopon doko pạsi ocokʼma.”" 
Esther9:14 Raj do ona hoyokʼ reakʼgeye hukumkeda. Susanre rajakʼ ona hukum do lại jạhirena ar hoṛko do Hamanren gel goṭen hoponko pạsiketʼkoa. 
Esther9:15 Susanren Jihudiko do Adar cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena ar onḍe do pesae hoṛko gocʼketʼkoa, menkhan jãhãn luṭakʼ jinis do bako hataoleda." 
Esther9:16 Inạko dinre rajakʼ tabe disạmren sarecʼ Jihudiko hõ akoakʼ jiwi rukhiyạitako lạgitʼ ar onkoren bạirikoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhenko jarwayena. Onko do akoren eae gel mõṛẽ hajar bạiriko gocʼketʼkoa menkhan jinisko do bako luṭletʼtakoa. 
Esther9:17 Adar cando reakʼ gelpeakʼ dinrre niạ ghoṭna hoyena ar gelponakʼ dinre doko jirạuena. Ar enhilokʼ do bhoj ar hulạsanakʼ din lekateko palonkeda. 
Esther9:18 Menkhan Susanren Jihudiko do gelpe ar gelponakʼ dinre mitʼ sãoteko jarwa mitʼena. Ona tayom gel mõṛẽakʼ dinre onko doko jirạuena ar enhilokʼ do bhoj ar hulạsanakʼ din lekateko palonkeda. 
Esther9:19 Ona iạte atoren Jihudiko, metakʼme okoe do begor pạcrite esetʼ jaegakoreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko do Adar cando reakʼ gelponakʼ dinre do rạskạwakʼ din ar bhoj reakʼ din ar eṭakʼko jomakʼ kolako reakʼ din lekateko palonkeda." 
Esther9:20 Mordekai do niạko ghoṭnae ol dohokeda ar Ahasberos rajakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sor sạṅgiń sanam tabe disạmren Jihudiko ṭhen ciṭhi olkateye kolkeda. 
Esther9:21 Uni do hukume emena onko do jao bochor Adar cando reakʼ gelpon ar gel mõṛẽakʼ niạ banar dinge jemonko palon. 
Esther9:22 Niạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, niạkin dinre Jihudiko do akoren bạirikoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạko ńamleda ar inạ candoge onkoakʼ duk ar hae haeyokʼ do sukte pheraolena. Uni do onkoe olatʼkoa jemon onakin din do hulạsateko manao arko bhoj ar eṭakʼko ṭhen do jomakʼ ar reṅgecʼko do sandesko emakote ona dinko manao." 
Esther9:23 Onate Jihudiko cetʼlekako ehopʼletʼ ar Mordekai cetʼ lekae olletʼ onkage banar din palon lạgitʼko rebenena. 
Esther9:24 Inạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, sanam Jihudikoren bạiri Agagi Hamadatharen hopon Haman do Jihudiko gocʼko ar marao utạrko reakʼe soṛojontroleda ar ona iạte uni doe Puretʼ akatʼ, metakʼme gulibãṭ akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Esther9:25 Menkhan raj do Hamanakʼ soṛojontro tinreye baḍaekeda unre uni do ona olakʼ hukume emena jemon Jihudiko upạrte Haman oka dusṭạmi phundiye aṭaoletʼ ona do uniyakʼ bohokʼrege paṛaokʼ ar uniren hoponko hõ jemonko pạsi ocokʼ. 
Esther9:26 Ona iạtege “Puretʼ” katha khon niạkin din do “Purimko” metakʼkana. Ar ona ciṭhire cetʼko ol tahẽkan ar onko cetanre cetʼko hoylen ona iạte Jihudiko doko ṭhik doholeda je, mitʼṭecʼ niạmko dohoya. Onko ar onkoren hoponko okoe do Jihudi jạtko hatao akatʼ onko sanamkoge ona ciṭhi reakʼ hukum ar niṭ akatʼ okte leka jao bochor niạ banar din jemonko palon." 
Esther9:27  
Esther9:28 Tabe disạm reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ nagrahare mitʼke mitʼ gharońjre piṛhike piṛhi niạ bar dinko disạya arko palona. Onate Jihudiko tala khon Purim reakʼ ona banar din palon do tisge baṅ bondokʼa ar onkoren hoponkoakʼ mon khon hõ baṅ meṭaokʼa. 
Esther9:29 Ona iạte Abihayilren hoponera Ester rạni ar Jihudi Mordekai do Purim reakʼ niạ ạn ṭarhao lạgitʼ niạ dosarakʼ ciṭhi ektiạri salakʼkin olkeda. 
Esther9:30 Ar Ahasberos rajosṭi reakʼ mitʼsae bargel eae goṭecʼ tabe disạmren Jihudiko ṭhen Mordekai do suluk ar rukhiyạ reakʼ ciṭhiye kolkeda. 
Esther9:31 Ona ciṭhi kol hoylena jemon onko do niṭ akan oktere Jihudi Mordekai ar rạni Esterakʼ hukum leka Purim reakʼ niạ banar din palon lạgitʼko ṭarhao daṛeakʼ, one cetʼ leka onko do akoren ar onkoren bõsko lạgitʼ judạ judạ upạs ar rakʼ homor reakʼ dinko ṭhikletʼ tahẽkan." 
Esther9:32 Esterakʼ hukumte Purim reakʼ niạko niạm do kajak utạrena ar ol dohoyena. 
Esther10:1 Ahasberos raj do acʼakʼ goṭa rajosṭi, ar sạṅgiń disạmkore hõ khajnae ladeatʼkoa." 
Esther10:2 Uniyakʼ ektiạri ar daṛe reakʼ kathako ar Mordekai cetʼ lekate cetan hudại ńamketʼ are maraṅ ocoyena onako katha uni do Madae ar Parasren rapajkoakʼ Itihãs puthire ol menakʼa. 
Esther10:3 Ahasberos raj tayom do Mordekaige dosaricʼe tahẽkana. Uniren sanam jạt-boehako do uniko manotkedea arko bạsutae kan tahẽkana, ente uni do acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼ bhạlạiyakʼgeye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana ar sanam Jihudiko rukhiyạko reakʼgeye kurumuṭuyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Job1:1 Kus disạmre Job ńutuman mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni do bindusạn ar dhorom hoṛgeye tahẽkana. Uni do Isore botorae kan tahẽkana ar bạṛicʼakʼ khon sạṅgińreye tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Job1:2 Uniren do eae goṭen koṛa ar pea kuṛi hoponko tahẽkantaea. 
Job1:3 Ar eae hajar bhiḍiko, pe hajar ũṭko, mõṛẽsae joṛa ḍaṅgra ar mõṛẽsae gadhako tahẽkantaea. Purub disạmren hoṛko modre unige jotoko khon kisạ̃ṛgeye tahẽkana." 
Job1:4 Uniren hoponko do pạli pạlite apan ạpin oṛakʼreko bhojetʼ tahẽkana ar onko tulucʼ jom ńũi lạgitʼ hoṛ kolkate akoren pea boeha kuṛiko neotayetʼko tahẽkana. 
Job1:5 Onkoakʼ bhoj reakʼ dinko sạtlen khan Job do onko hoho ạgukateye sonotetʼko tahẽkana. Uni do setakʼre onko lạgitʼ mimitʼ goṭenkate jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobe hoeocoyetʼ tahẽkana.
