Uni doe hudisetʼ tahẽkana, “Ińren hopon ar hoponerako do pasecʼko kại akada ar mone monete Isorko henosta akadea.” Job do nonka jaogeye kạmikan tahẽkana." 
Job1:6 Mitʼdin sermaren goḍet do Probhu Isor samaṅreye senena ar Soetan hõ uni sãoteye hạjirena. 
Job1:7 Unre Probhu Isor do Soetane kulikedea, “Am do oka khonem hecʼena?” Soetan do Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Dhạrti khon hante nate dãṛãbaṛa dãṛãbaṛate nonḍeń hecʼena." 
Job1:8 Unre Probhu Isor do Soetane metadea, “Ińren guti Job do cetʼem kheyal akadegea? Dhạrtire uni lekan do ar celege bạnukʼkoa. Uni do bindusạn are dhoromgea. Uni do ińe botorạń kana ar sanam lekan bạṛicʼakʼ khon sạṅgińreye tahenkana.”" 
Job1:9 Unre Soetane menkeda, “Job do cetʼ emni emnitegeye botoram kana?" 
Job1:10 Am do cetʼ uni beṛhaete ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ ar okako menakʼtae ona beṛhaete cetʼ bam esetʼ ạcurakadea? Am do unim bhor akawadea, onate uniren ạsul janwarkote disạm do perecʼ akana." 
Job1:11 Menkhan ma ti tiạrkate uniyakʼ jotowakʼre hạneme, enḍekhan khạṭige uni do am samaṅre henosta reakʼ kathae roṛa.”" 
Job1:12 Unre Probhu Isor do Soetane metadea, “Bhagegea, uniyakʼ okako menakʼ ona do amakʼ tireń jimạkeda, menkhan uniyakʼ hoṛmo cetanre mitʼṭecʼ kạṭupʼ hõ alom calaoa.” Unre Soetan do Probhu Isor samaṅ khone oḍok calaoena." 
Job1:13 Mitʼdin Jobren hopon ar hoponerako do akoren maraṅ utạricʼ boehawakʼ oṛakʼreko jom-ńũiyetʼkan tahẽkana. 
Job1:14 Nonkan jokhecʼ mitʼṭen hoṛ do hecʼkate Jobe metadea, “Amren ḍaṅgrakote do jumiko casetʼ tahẽkana ar gadha eṅgakohõ sorregeko ạtińkan tahẽkana." 
Job1:15 Unre Sibayiko do luluṭ hecʼkate onkoko idiketʼkoa. Ar amren gutiko doko gocʼketʼkoa. Am khoboram lạgitʼ eken iń eskargeń paskao hecʼ akana.” 
Job1:16 Uni hoṛ do unhõ kathae roroṛkan tahẽkanrege ar mitʼ hoṛ do hecʼkateye menkeda, “Serma khon Isorakʼ seṅgel ńurente amren bhiḍiko ar gutikoe maraoketʼkoa. Ar am khoboram lạgitʼ iń eskargeń sarecʼ akana.”" 
Job1:17 Dosaricʼ hoṛ do unhõ kathae roroṛkan tahẽkanrege ar mitʼ hoṛ do hecʼkateye khobore lạikeda, “Kolodiạko do pe hạṭińte hạṭińkate amren ũṭkoko idiketʼkoa. Onko do amren gutikoko gocʼketʼkoa. Ar am khoboram lạgitʼ eken iń eskargeń paskao akana.”" 
Job1:18 Tesaricʼ hoṛ do unhõ kathae roroṛkan tahẽkanrege ar mitʼ hoṛ do hecʼkateye menkeda, “Amren hopon ar hoponerako do akoren maraṅicʼ boehawakʼ oṛakʼreko jom-ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Job1:19 Unre hahaṅkar khon ackage mitʼṭecʼ birbão hoe rakapʼ hecʼena ar ona oṛakʼre bajaoena. Onate oṛakʼ do onko cetanre ńurena ar onko doko gocʼ cabayena. Ar am khoboram lạgitʼ eken iń eskargeń sarecʼ akana.” 
Job1:20 Niạ katha ańjomkate Job doe beretʼente mon reakʼ kosṭote kicricʼe oṛecʼkeda are munḍrạyena. Ona tayom otre ombakʼkate Isor sewawadeteye menkeda," 
Job1:21 “Eṅgatakʼ lacʼ khon iń do uluṅgeń hecʼlena ar uluṅgeń calakʼa. Probhu Isorgeye emadiń tahẽkana ar Probhu Isorgeye idiketʼkoa; Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtaema.” 
Job1:22 Niạko hoyenre hõ Job do bae kạileda se Isor hõ bae dusiledea. 
Job2:1 Mitʼdin serma goḍetko do Probhu Isor samaṅreko hạjirena, ar Soetan hõ uni samaṅre hạjirokʼ lạgitʼ serma goḍetkoe ạguketʼkoa." 
Job2:2 Probhu Isor do Soetane kulikedea, “Am do oka khonem hecʼena?” Soetan do Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea, “Dhạrtire hante nateń dãṛãbaṛakeda ariń hecʼena.”" 
Job2:3 Unre Probhu Isor do Soetane metadea, “Ińren guti Job secʼem kheyal akada? Dhạrtire uni lekan ar celege bạnukʼkoa. Uni do bin dusạn are dhoromgea. Uni do ińe botorạń kana ar bạṛicʼakʼ khon sạṅgińreye tahenkana. Ar ńit hạbicʼ uni do jãhãnakʼ bae dos akatʼre hõ ạuṛiyakʼte uniyakʼ bạṛicʼ lạgitʼem uskurediń kana.”" 
Job2:4 Soetane menkeda, uniyakʼ jionge uni ṭhen do jiwi kana; manwa do jiwi bańcaotae lạgitʼ oka menakʼtae ona jotowakʼgeye emokʼa." 
Job2:5 Ti tiyạrtam ar hạneme, khạṭige uni do am upạrte henosta reakʼ kathae roṛa.”" 
Job2:6 Unre Probhu Isor do Soetane metadea, “Bhagegea; uni do amakʼ tireń jimạkedea, menkhan uni do alom gojea.”" 
Job2:7 Inạ tayom Soetan do Probhu Isor samaṅ khone oḍok calaoena ar Jobakʼ bohokʼ khon jaṅga talka hạbicʼ hasote perecʼ ghaoe kolladete kosṭo emaye ehopʼena. 
Job2:8 Unre Job do torocʼre duṛupʼkate mitʼṭecʼ kelhatʼ hataokate gạdurokʼe ehopʼena. 
Job2:9 Unre uniren bạhu doe menkeda, “Am do cetʼ ńitokʼ hõ bin dusigeam mentem dạbiyetʼkana? Isor dusiyete gujukʼme baṛe.”" 
Job2:10 Menkhan Job do uniye metadea, “Am do mitʼṭen dundhi maejiu leka katham roṛeda. Abo do cetʼ Isor ṭhen khon eken bhạlạige bon ataṅa, ar be bhạlạiyakʼ do baṅa?” Niạko hoyenre hõ Job do acʼakʼ kathate bae kạileda." 
Job2:11 Temani Eliphas, Suhi Bildad, Namathi Sophar ńutuman Jobren pea gate tinre Jobakʼ muhin reakʼ kathako ańjomkeda unre onko do akoakʼ oṛakʼ khonko mohnḍayena. Ar jarwakateko sopolhawana, onko do senkate uni sãoteko dukokʼa ar jiwi raṛecʼko emaea." 
Job2:12 Onko do sạṅgiń khon bako orom daṛeadea. Onate onko do ãṭ aṛaṅte rarakʼko ehopʼena ar apnarakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼte bohokʼ cetante dhuṛiko uḍiyạukeda. 
Job2:13 Ar ona tayom do eae siń ar eae ńindạ uni sãote otreko duṛupʼ tahẽyena. Ar uni do cetʼhõ bako metadea, ente uniyakʼ harkhet do ạḍitetʼ maraṅge tahẽkana." 
Job3:1 Ona tayom Job do kathae roṛkeda ar acʼakʼ janam dine sarapatʼteye menkeda," 
Job3:2  
Job3:3 “Ińakʼ janam din do meṭaokʼma, ona ńindạ hõ maraokʼma oneko roṛletʼ, ‘koṛa gidrại hoyakana.’" 
Job3:4 Ona din do ńutokʼma; serma khon Isor do enhilokʼ reakʼ aloe moneyakʼma, ona cetanre jãhãn marsal hõ alo paṛaokʼma." 
Job3:5 Dhund ar moron ńutge onakin apnar joṅma; rimil do uniye danaṅ esedema, ar kaṛaṅ ńut do onae botor ocoyma." 
Job3:6 Kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńut do ona ńindại sabma; bochor reakʼ dinkore alo lekhakʼma, se jãhãn cando talare hõ alo tahenma." 
Job3:7 Ona ńindạ do bạńjhige baṛe hoyokʼma, rạskạ reakʼ cetʼ sereńge onare alo ańjomokʼma." 
Job3:8 Din sakʼrapko do onako sarapakʼma ar Libiathonko buskurema onko do ona dinko sarapakʼma. 
Job3:9 Ona dinren aṅga marsalokʼren ipilkoko ńutokʼma; uni do marsal lạgitʼ ạuṛiyakʼgeye duṛupʼ tahenma; jemon aṅga marsal alo baṛeye ńelńam," 
Job3:10 ente eṅgạńakʼ kukhi reakʼ silpiń do bae bondleda, ar harkhet khon sạṅgińre hõ bae doholedińa." 
Job3:11 “Cedakʼ lacʼre tahenrege bạń gocʼlena? Kukhi khon oḍoktora cedakʼ bạń gocʼlena? 
Job3:12 Eṅgạńakʼ gunṭhikin do cedakʼkin ataṅ daramkedińa? Cedakʼ baṅ uni do acʼakʼ toae ńu ocolediń? 
Job3:13 Inạ khan honaṅ sulukteń giticʼkokʼa, ariń jạpitʼkea ariń jirạukokʼa." 
Job3:14 Iń do rajko ar mukhiyạko sãoteń tahẽkokʼa ar okoe apnar lạgitʼ dalanko benaoletʼ ona do teheń dhaṅdhaser akana. 
Job3:15 Iń do disạm cakʼlaoko sãoteń tahẽkokʼa one okoe do sonate kisạ̃ṛko tahẽkan, ar rupạte oṛakʼko perecʼletʼ tahẽkan." 
Job3:16 Okoe bale gidrạ siń reakʼ marsal bae ńelakatʼ, lacʼre gocʼ akan uni bale gidrạ leka otre cedakʼ bạń hosor giḍi ocolena?" 
Job3:17 Onḍe do dusṭạmi hoṛko bako haḍrapa, ar laṅga akan hoṛ doko jirạu akana." 
Job3:18 Bondi akan jotoge onḍe do khạtirjomako tahena; sasantaokoakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅ onḍe do ar baṅ ańjomokʼa. 
Job3:19 Onḍe do huḍiń ar maraṅ sanamkoge menakʼkoa, ar golamko do onḍe kisạ̃ṛko khonko sạdhingea." 
Job3:20 “Okoe dukre menakʼko, onko do cetʼ iạte marsalko ńameda ar cetʼ iạte haṛhatʼ jion hõ jiwiko ńameda?" 
Job3:21 Onko do gujukʼko khojkana menkhan bako ńameda, onko do dhon khon hõ ona lạgitʼ bạ̃ṛtiko khojeda." 
Job3:22 Onko do bebạṛicʼko hulạsokʼ kana, ar ạḍitetʼko rạskạkʼ kana topako ńellenre." 
Job3:23 Okoe manwawakʼ hor acʼ ṭhen danaṅge okoe do Isore eṭetʼ esetʼ akade, cedakʼ uni manwa do marsale emocokʼ kana?" 
Job3:24 Ińakʼ kuhrạuge ińakʼ jomakʼ do hoyakana, ar ińakʼ geraṅ do gaḍa dakʼ leka bhumbukokʼ kana." 
Job3:25 Okań botorakʼ kan tahẽkan onage hecʼ paṛao akawạdińa; ar oka hoyokʼ reakʼ iń botorokʼkan tahẽkan onage ińre hoyakana. 
Job3:26 Ińakʼ do sukge bạnukʼa, ar jãhãn nirại ar jirạu hõ bạnukʼa, eken dukge menakʼtińạ.”" 
Job4:1 Niạ katha ańjomkate Timani Eliphas doe roṛ ruạṛkeda," 
Job4:2 “Jãhãege am sãote kathae roṛ enḍekhan am do cetʼem ạṛisokʼa? Menkhan katha begor roṛte cetʼ jãhãeye tahẽ daṛeakʼa? 
Job4:3 Hudiskate ńelme, tinạkʼ hoṛ do sopolham emakatʼkoa ar lạbṛukʼ ti dom keṭecʼ ocoakada." 
Job4:4 Okoe jion reakʼ horreko tohotʼ akan onko do amakʼ kathare goṛoko ńamakada; ar lạbṛukʼ gunṭhikom keṭecʼ ocoakatʼtakoa. 
Job4:5 Menkhan ńitokʼ do am cetanre kosṭo hecʼakana, ar am dom keklesetʼ akana; duk do ame ghạl akatʼmea ar am dom as chuṭạu akana." 
Job4:6 Isor jem botorae kan ona reakʼ bhorsa do cetʼ bam ńameda? Amem bin dusạnge onare cetʼ as do bạnukʼtama? 
Job4:7 “Hudiskate ńelme, bin dusạn hoekate jãhãeye marao akana? Dhorom hoṛko do cetʼ jãhãreko ses utạr akana?" 
Job4:8 Ińiń ńelakada okoe bạṛicʼakʼko cas ar duk reakʼ itạko er onko do onakoge irjoṅa. 
Job4:9 Isorakʼ sahẽtʼte onko doko marao utạrokʼa ar uniyakʼ edre reakʼ oṅteko mohor meṭao utạrokʼa. 
Job4:10 Dhạcri kulakʼ hạnḍrạukʼ ar taras, ar takʼrasicʼakʼ taras hõ thirokʼ kana." 
Job4:11 Sikạr bako ńamle khan dhạcri kul doko gujukʼa, ar kul hopon doko chirchạturokʼa." 
Job4:12 “Mitʼṭecʼ katha iń ṭhen hape hapete hecʼena, ar ona khae khoe do ińakʼ luturre bajaoena." 
Job4:13 Manwa do ńindạ tinre galasaṅe jạpida unre kukmũteń akbakaokʼ kana; 
Job4:14 botor ariń lukutʼ lukudokʼ kana, ińakʼ jaṅko do dal dalaokʼkantińạ." 
Job4:15 Mitʼṭen jiu do iń samaṅteye sen paromena, ar ińakʼ hoṛmo do rumui rumuiyentińạ." 
Job4:16 Uni jiu doe teṅgo hapeyena, menkhan cetʼ lekan boron kana ona do bạń bujhạu daṛeada. Ińakʼ mẽtʼãha samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ cetʼ coṅ teṅgoyena, ar ạḍi bại bạite noa aṛaṅiń ańjomkeda," 
Job4:17 ‘manwa do cetʼ Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhãre dhorome hoedaṛeakʼa? Uniren sisirjạuicʼakʼ mẽtʼre cetʼ saphae hoedaṛeakʼa? 
Job4:18 Isor do acʼren gutiko hõ bae bhorsa akokana ar acʼren serma goḍetko hõ bhule ńametʼtakoa," 
Job4:19 tobe okoe hasa oṛakʼreko tahenkan onkoakʼ rehetʼtetʼ do dhuṛi kana, tejoko leka okoeko lebetʼ gańjao ocokʼkan, onko do Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhãre artetʼge dusiko hoyokʼa!" 
Job4:20 Setakʼ khon ạyupʼ hạbicʼtegeko chir chạturokʼ kana, ar mẽtʼ danaṅrege onko doko marao utạrokʼ kana." 
Job4:21 Onkoakʼ jotowakʼ do tạmbu baber leka racakʼ topakʼ ocokʼtakoa, ar onko do bebujko lekateko gujukʼa.’" 
Job5:1 “Mase hohoeme, okoeye roṛ ruạṛama? Ar okoeṭakʼ serma goḍet ṭhen do goṛom khoja?" 
Job5:2 Khĩs do bebujicʼ hoṛe ses utạrea ar hiskạ do lelhayicʼe gojea. 
Job5:3 Bebujicʼ do rehedokʼ iń ńelakadea ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ do sarapokʼ kana. 
Job5:4 Uniren hoponko khạtirjoma do bako tahena; onko do bicạr ṭhạ̃irege jotowakʼko ada, onkoren rurukhiyạko do celege bako tahena." 
Job5:5 Reṅgejokʼ hoṛ do akoakʼ phosolko joma, onko do jạnum tala khon hõ jomakʼko halaṅa; ar tetaṅetʼko do dhon-durib lạgitʼko ahkaokʼa." 
Job5:6 Ot khon duk do baṅ oḍokokʼa, se jumi khon duk hõ baṅ janamokʼa." 
Job5:7 Cetʼleka seṅgel do coṭ secʼ pạsirokʼ, onkage duk jom lạgitʼ manwa doe janamokʼ kana." 
Job5:8 “Menkhan iń do Isorakʼ goṛogeń hataokea, ar uni ṭhen ińakʼ arjiń dohokea." 
Job5:9 Uni do nonkan maraṅakʼkoe kạmiyeda one ona reakʼ khạndritetʼ do oho jokhalena; uni do nonkan hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmikana ona do tisge oho lekha cabalena. 
Job5:10 Uni do dhạrtire jạṛi dakʼe emokʼ kana ar jumire dakʼe koleda. 
Job5:11 Nindhạn hoṛkoe usuletʼkoa; ar homor halaṅko do nirạiteye dohoyetʼkoa. 
Job5:12 Cạtur hoṛkoakʼ goṭawakʼ do bae jo baha ocowakʼ kana, onate onko do cetʼge baṅ hoyokʼ kantakoa." 
Job5:13 Uni do ạkilanko cạture hudisetʼkoa, ar eṛekoakʼ phundire do baṅ jo bahakʼkana." 
Job5:14 Siń marsalrege onko do ńut pheḍ hecʼako kana; ar tikin okte do ńindạ lekako hạtṛạu baṛaeyeda. 
Job5:15 Uni do dharanakʼ alaṅ khon ṭũạr amarkoe bańcaoetʼkoa; ar daṛeankoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạyetʼkoa. 
Job5:16 Ona iạte nandhan hoṛko doko asokʼkana ar behokakʼ do bond utạrokʼ kana. 
Job5:17 “Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do Isore sudhrạuede. Onate sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ ḍanṭao do alom nihạ̃ta," 
Job5:18 ente uni doe ghạghạlgea, arhõ onae bedhaokakʼa; uni doe hạhạna, arhõ acʼakʼ titegeye bogea." 
Job5:19 Turui goṭecʼ muhin khon uni doe rukhiyạmea, ar eae goṭecʼ muhinre hõ cetʼ khutige baṅ hoyokʼtama." 
Job5:20 Akalre uni do gujukʼ khone rukhiyạmea, ar lạṛhạire tarwaṛe reakʼ ghạl khone bańcaomea." 
Job5:21 Alaṅ reakʼ hạn khon uni doe rukhiyạmea; ar muhin hecʼlenre am do bam botorokʼa. 
Job5:22 Jarkhar ar akalre landa joṅme; ar bir janwarko do alom botorakoa. 
Job5:23 Amakʼ jumire jãhãn dhirige baṅ tahena; ar bir janwarko do bako hạn mea. 
Job5:24 Baḍaekakʼme, amakʼ tạmbu do nirạigea; amakʼ sompotti reakʼ hisạb hataole khan amakʼ do cetʼge baṅ loksan akantama." 
Job5:25 Amem baḍaea, amren do aema gidrạko hoyokʼtama ar amren hoponko do ṭạnḍi reakʼ ghãs lekako hoyokʼa." 
Job5:26 Cetʼleka oktere phosol rakabokʼ onkage purạ dinem bahaokʼa arem topa ocokʼa. 
Job5:27 “Ale do biḍạukatele ńel akada, noako do sạrigea; onate ańjomme ar amakʼ jionre kạmi lagaome.”" 
Job6:1 Unre Job doe roṛ ruạṛkeda," 
Job6:2 “Ińakʼ kosṭo jodim soṅ daṛeakʼ khan, ińakʼ sanam harkhet jodi tulạtem tulạ daṛeakʼ khan," 
Job6:3 enḍekhan khạṭige ona do gaṅga gitil reakʼ ojon khonhõ hamalkokʼa; ona iạte ińakʼ katha reakʼ jãhãn jhinge bạnukʼtińạ. 
Job6:4 Sanam daṛeanicʼ reakʼ sar do ińre bitʼakana, ińakʼ jiwi do onako reakʼ bise jojom kana; Isorakʼ botoranakʼ kạmiko do iń upạrte sạr sạrte teṅgo akana." 
Job6:5 Bir gadha do ghãse ńamle khan cetʼe raga, se busupʼe ńamle khan ḍaṅgra doe bhokraokʼa?" 
Job6:6 Sabakʼakʼ do cetʼ buluṅ begor jomogokʼgea, se bele reakʼ ponḍtetʼre cetʼ jãhãn sebel menakʼgea?" 
Job6:7 Iń do ona jojom baṅ sanań kana; iń ṭhen ona do liṭiyakʼ jomakʼ leka kana. 
Job6:8 “Ah! ińakʼ nehõr jemon rukhiyạkʼ tiń, Isor do ińakʼ as jemone purạukạtiń," 
Job6:9 iń doe talga tạuạgińma ar ti tiạrkateye gocʼ hodeńma! 
Job6:10 Enḍekhan niạge jiwi raṛecʼ do hoyokʼtińạ, ar bin sahao haso talare hõ niạ rạskạge tahena, uni sonoticʼakʼ katha doń aṅgocgea." 
Job6:11 “Tạṅgi reakʼ jãhãn daṛege bạnukʼtińạ, ar as dohoy leka nonkan cetʼge bạnukʼtińạ, oneń tạṅgi akae tahen." 
Job6:12 Ińakʼ daṛe do cetʼ dhiri reakʼ daṛe kana? Hoṛmo do cetʼ pitạlte benao akantinạ? 
Job6:13 Apnarte goṛowạń reakʼ daṛege bạnukʼtińạ; iń ṭhen khon ma jotowakʼge coṅ sạṅgiń akan. 
Job6:14 “As chuṭạukʼ kan hoṛ do sanam daṛeanicʼ bae botorae kanrehõ, enhõ uniren gateko do unire pạtiạr tahen lek kanako." 
Job6:15 Menkhan ińren gateko cetanre do ohoń bhorsa daṛelena; onko do nonkan ạtukʼ dakʼ lekanako one okte oktere bondokʼ kan arhõ okte oktere do gaḍa perecʼ cape rakabokʼ kan. 
Job6:16 Borop ar him do lekʼkante ạtukʼ dakʼe boḍe ocoyeda ar daṛe idikʼ kana," 
Job6:17 arhõ lolo din do ona ạṭukʼ dakʼ ańjedokʼ kana ar acʼakʼ hor khon chan adokʼ kana. 
Job6:18 Ona horte senokʼkan hortenko do ona khonko sa calakʼ kana, ar onko do hahaṅkarreko sen adokʼ kana arko marao utạrokʼ kana." 
Job6:19 Temaren hortenko do dakʼ reakʼko khojetʼa, Sebaren bepariko do askateko koyokʼ horeda." 
Job6:20 Onko do khạṭi akanko tahẽkan iạte kosṭoko ńameda; ar onḍe senkate doko as chuṭạukʼ kana. 
Job6:21 Ape hõ onkage iń do cetʼge bape goṛo daṛeạńạ; ińakʼ botoranakʼ dosa ńelte ape hõpe toras akana. 
Job6:22 Iń do cetʼ jãhãtis iń menakada, ‘jãhãnakʼ imạńpe, apeakʼ dhon-durib khon danạńpe," 
Job6:23 Bạirikoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińpe, ar okoeko cipạ edeńkan onko khon em chaḍaoińpe?’" 
Job6:24 “Cetʼạńpe, iń do thir hape akaniń tahena; ar okareń bhul akatʼ ona baṛe udukʼạńpe." 
Job6:25 Hok reakʼ katha do daṛegea, menkhan apeakʼ reṭepeṭekʼre do jãhãn labge bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Job6:26 Ińakʼ kathare jãhãnakʼ dos sapʼ reakʼpe meneda? Ar as chuṭạu akan hoṛakʼ katha do hoe lekape hudiseda. 
Job6:27 Ape do ṭũạr amarko lạgitʼpe gulibãṭetʼkana ar gate do ạkhrińkope khojkana. 
Job6:28 Menkhan ńitokʼ do iń secʼ beṅgedpe, iń do ape samaṅre eṛe do bạń roṛa." 
Job6:29 Hudis ruạṛpe, behokko do alope hoyokʼa; arhõ hudispe, ente iń do ńithõ dhoromge minạńa." 
Job6:30 Ińakʼ alaṅre do cetʼ jãhãnakʼ behokakʼ menakʼa? Iń do cetʼ boge ar bạṛicʼ do bạń bujhạu akada? 
Job7:1 “Niạ dhạrtire manwa do ạḍi khaṭaokʼ lagaoaea, ar din mujuriko leka uni do dine ṭalaoa." 
Job7:2 Guti cetʼleka ạyubokʼ reakʼ koyokʼ hor akaeye tahen, ar din mujuri hõ cetʼleka acʼakʼ kuṛại lạgitʼe asokʼ," 
Job7:3 onkage candoke cando ińre bin jo bahakʼ do paṛao akana; iń do ńindạke ńindạ eken dukiń ńameda. 
Job7:4 Gitijokʼ jokhecʼ doń meneda, tinreń beretʼa? Menkhan ńindạ do jeleńokʼ kana, ar aṅga marsalokʼ hạbicʼ doń erseń torseń baṛaekana." 
Job7:5 Hoṛmo do tejoko ar ghao reakʼ sondrokote esetʼ akantińạ; harta do oṛecʼ akantińạ ar garaṅdakʼ jorokʼkana. 
Job7:6 Ińakʼ dinko do kicricʼ teteńakʼ mạku khon hõ usạrakʼkana; ar jãhãnakʼ begor astege ses godokʼkana. 
Job7:7 “E Isor, ińakʼ jiwi baṛe disạitiń me noa do mitʼṭecʼ sahẽtʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana; iń do suk reakʼ ar bạń ńel ńama." 
Job7:8 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ do ar bae ńel ńameńa; am dom sendrayińạ, menkhan iń do ar bạń tahena." 
Job7:9 Rimil cetʼleka chan adokʼkan, onkage Sheolte calakʼicʼ do bae ruạṛa." 
Job7:10 Uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼte ar bae ruạṛ hijukʼa; acʼakʼ jaegare hõ uni do bako disạyea. 
Job7:11 “Onate thir akan do ar bạń tahena. Ińakʼ mon reakʼ hasote kathań roṛa; ar haṛhatʼ jiwite ińakʼ dukiń lại sodora. 
Job7:12 Iń do cetʼ jalapuri se doreãoren danob kạnạń onate tạṅkhiyiń lạgitʼ horhokom dohoakatʼkoa? 
Job7:13 Tinreń hudiseda ińakʼ aṭetʼ do jiwi raṛecʼe imạńa ar ińakʼ jạpitʼ do duke komaotińa," 
Job7:14 unre aema lekan kukmukotem botor ocoyedeń kana, ar aema lekan cholkotem udạsedeń kana." 
Job7:15 Onate niạ jaṅ hoṛmowante jiwetʼ tahen khon jãhãeye limbạtʼ gojeń onageń khojkea. 
Job7:16 Ińakʼ jiwi doń hirkhạwakʼ kana; jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼ tahen do bạń khojkana. Iń do aṛakʼkạńme; Ińakʼ bahaokʼ din do thoṛagetińa. 
Job7:17 “Manwa doe celekante unạkʼem maraṅedea, ar uni doe celekante onkam moneyae kana?" 
Job7:18 Din hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ dom tolasede kana, ar jao ghuṛiyem biḍạu aṭkar edekana." 
Job7:19 Iń khon eṭakʼ secʼ do cetʼ bam beṅgeda, ulidakʼ utʼ lạgitʼ hõ cetʼ somoe do bam imạńa?" 
Job7:20 E manwaren horhoyicʼ, ińiń kại akatʼ khan enḍekhan onate amakʼ do cetʼtam. Amakʼ jos menkate do cedakʼem doho akadińạ? Iń do cetʼ amren bojhań hoyakana?" 
Job7:21 Am do cedakʼ ińakʼ dos ar kại bam ikạyetʼtińạ? Iń ma usạrage coṅ dhuṛire gitijokʼ hoyokʼtiń; am dom sendrayińạ, menkhan iń do bạń tahena.”" 
Job8:1 Unre Suhia Bildad doe menkeda," 
Job8:2 “Am do ar tin hạbicʼ niạko katham roṛa? Amakʼ kathako do hoe bharḍo leka kana. 
Job8:3 Isor do cetʼ hok upạrteye kạmikana? Sanam daṛeanicʼ do cetʼ ṭhikakʼ doe beṭhikeda? 
Job8:4 Amren hopon ar hoponerako do khạṭige uni upạrteko kại akada, ona iạte kại reakʼ sạjại do onko tireye dohoakada." 
Job8:5 Menkhan ahkaokʼ tulucʼ Isor ṭhen koejoṅme ar sanam daṛeanicʼ ṭhen nehõrokʼme," 
Job8:6 am do khạṭi ar dhoromem tahen khan enḍekhan uni do ńitgeye beṅgetʼama ar amakʼ dhorom ṭhạ̃ire arhõe duṛupʼ ruạṛmea. 
Job8:7 Amakʼ tayom daram dinko do nonka jo bahakʼtama unrem hudisa pạhilakʼ dosa do niạ khon bạṛicʼge tahẽkana. 
Job8:8 “Laha piṛhiren hoṛko ṭhen kulijoṅme; ar onkoren hapṛamkoko cekaletʼ reakʼ khoj hataome. 
Job8:9 Abo do hola mahnderren kangeabon ar cetʼge babon baḍaea, dhạrtire aboakʼ dinko do umul leka paromokʼ kana." 
Job8:10 Onko ṭhen khon am do cecetʼakʼ ar solham ńama; ar onko okako baḍae onageko lạiyama. 
Job8:11 “Oda ot chaḍa pạṭiol do baṅ hara rakabokʼa; ar dakʼ begor pạṭiạl do baṅ moṛaokʼa. 
Job8:12 Hara rakabokʼ jokhecʼ onako ạuri gedokʼre, ar dakʼ bae ńamlere ona do ghãs khon hõ usạra tolmocʼ godokʼa." 
Job8:13 Okoe Isorko hiṛińe onkoakʼ dosa do onkage hoyokʼa; okoe Isor bako botorae onkoakʼ as do onkage marao utạrokʼa. 
Job8:14 Okoe cetanre uniye bhorsakʼ ona do baṅ keṭecʼa, ona biswạs do bindi ganakʼ leka kana." 
Job8:15 Onareye ṭenḍarlen khan ona do rạpudokʼtaea, ar onareye sapʼ kajakokʼ khan enḍekhan ona do bae sapʼ ṭarhao daṛeakʼa." 
Job8:16 Uni do siń cando reakʼ marsalte mitʼṭecʼ rosaṛ cara leka, bagwan reakʼ sanam jaegare uniyakʼ ḍạrko do pasnao akana." 
Job8:17 Ona reakʼ rehetʼ do dhiri ḍạṅ beṛhaete pasnao akana; ar dhiri talare mitʼṭecʼ nirại ṭhạ̃iye ńamakada. 
Job8:18 Menkhan tinre uniyakʼ ṭhạ̃i khone totʼ giḍi ocokʼa unre ona ṭhạ̃i do uni bae aṅgoceteye mena, ‘iń do tisge bạń ńelakatʼmea.’" 
Job8:19 Ńelme, inạ chaḍa uniyakʼ do jãhãn rạskạge bạnukʼa; ona otre do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ carako omonokʼa." 
Job8:20 “Bindusạn hoṛ do tisge Isor bae bạgi giḍiaea, se bạṛicʼko kạmikan hoṛkoakʼ ti do bae daṛe ocoya." 
Job8:21 Ńitokʼ hõ amakʼ moca do landateye perejtama ar amakʼ luṭikin do hulạsteye perecʼmea. 
Job8:22 Okoe ińko hirkhạwạń onko doko lajao ocokʼa; bạṛicʼkoakʼ tạmbu do ar baṅ tahena.” 
Job9:1 Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job9:2 “Ṭhik katha kana, ińiń baḍaegea noa do sạrikana. Menkhan Isorakʼ mẽtʼre cekate manwa do dhoromicʼe hoyokʼa?" 
Job9:3 Jãhãege uni sãote reṭepeṭekʼe khoj, enḍekhan hajar goṭecʼe kuklile khan uni do mitʼṭecʼ reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ hõ bae em daṛeakʼa." 
Job9:4 Uniyakʼ akel do khạndrigea, ar daṛe hõ asambheṛgetaea; uni upạrte teṅgokate okoe haleye rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa?" 
Job9:5 Uni do ackage buru-boṭkocʼkoe ocoga, edrete onakoe marao utạra;" 
Job9:6 Acʼakʼ jaega khon pirthimi doe dal dalaoa, ona reakʼ khunṭikoe thar tharao ocoya." 
Job9:7 Uniye baron lekhan siń cando hõ marsal bae ema ar ipilko hõ bako jolokʼa. 
Job9:8 Uni do eskarte sermakoe pasnaoeda ar jalapuri reakʼ ḍheoko cetanteye taṛameda. 
Job9:9 Uni do buḍhi parkom, arãṛ lalakʼko ar soren ipilko ar dạkhin secʼren ipilkoe sirjạu akatʼkoa." 
Job9:10 Uni do baṅ bujhạu ńamokʼ maraṅakʼkoe kạmikana ar nonkan hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmikana oka do baṅ lekhakʼ. 
Job9:11 “Uni do iń samaṅteye dãṛãnkana, ar bạń ńelńame kana; uni do sorteye paromokʼ kana, ar bạń orom daṛeae kana." 
Job9:12 Uniye rerecʼ khan okoe uni doe tạkicʼ daram daṛekea? Okoe uniye kuli daṛekea, ‘am do cetʼem cekayeda mente?’" 
Job9:13 Isor do acʼakʼ edre bae or ruạṛtaea; dakʼren danob Rahabren gokʼṛoko hõ uni ṭhen doko jaṅga latarokʼa. 
Job9:14 “Enḍekhan cekate uniyakʼ katha reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ doń emaea? Uni lạiyae lạgitʼ okare katha doń sendra ńama? 
Job9:15 Apnarte dhoromicʼ iń hudisokʼ kanre hõ bạń roṛ ruạṛ daṛeae kana; ińren bikʼcạricʼ ṭhen eken daya reakʼgeń koea. 
Job9:16 Ińiń hohoaere ińakʼe ańjomtińlere hõ enhõ ińakʼ kathae ańjoma mente, iń do bạń pạtiạukʼa." 
Job9:17 Uni do birbãoteye gejer lạhutʼkedeńạ ar ạuṛiyakʼte uni doe dal ghaoeń kana. 
Job9:18 Uni do bae sahẽtʼ ocowạń kana bickom haṛhatʼte ińakʼ jiwiye perecʼetʼ tińạ. 
Job9:19 Daṛe reakʼ katha kan khan ma beṅgetʼaeme; ar bikʼcạr reakʼ katha kan khan ańjomtińae mente okoeye metaea? 
Job9:20 Miridosiń tahenre hõ ińakʼ moca do ińe dusiyińạ; ariń dhoromgere hõ enhõ ińakʼ moca do bedhoromicʼ menteye mitạńa. 
Job9:21 Iń doń miridosgea, onate do cetʼ cekakʼtińạ? Iń do apnarakʼ jiwigeń hirkhạwakʼ kana." 
Job9:22 Sanamakʼge somangea, onateń meneda, ‘miridos ar bedhorom-nukin banarge uni doe maraokinạ.’" 
Job9:23 Uphạd ar ackage miridosicʼakʼ gujukʼ hoylenre uni doe landa joṅa. 
Job9:24 Bedhoromkoakʼ tire dhạrti do emakana ar Isor do bikʼcạrkoakʼ mẽtʼe bond akatʼ takoa. Uni bae onka akatʼ khan tobe do okoeye onka akada? 
Job9:25 “Dạdạṛicʼ khon hõ ińakʼ dinko do usạra paromokʼ kana; ona do uḍạu paromokʼ kana, ar bhạlại do bạń ńameda." 
Job9:26 Pạṭiol reakʼ lạukạ leka ona do sohor calakʼ kana; ona do pajhaṛ leka ạphir calakʼ kana. 
Job9:27 Ińiń men, ‘ińakʼ duk doń hiṛińtińa, mulin mẽtʼãhã doń ocoga, ariń kharsalakʼa,’" 
Job9:28 Enhõ ińakʼ sanam harkhetʼkoń botorakʼ kana, ente ińiń baḍaea bin dusạn mente do bam ataṅińạ." 
Job9:29 Iń do tinre dusi menkateń hudis ocokʼa, unre cedakʼ ạuṛiyakʼ doń kosṭokʼa?" 
Job9:30 Iń do sạbunteń ạbukʼ saphakʼre hõ ar kharte tiyiń saphakʼre hõ," 
Job9:31 enhõ am do losotʼrem caḍokạńạ; onate ińakʼ kicricʼko do ińko hirkhạwạńạ. 
Job9:32 “Uni do iń lekan manwa doe baṅkana je, uniń roṛ ruạṛaea se adalotre uni samaṅreń teṅgokʼa." 
Job9:33 “Aha, jodi jãhãe nonkae tahen khan okoe do ạliń talareye bicạr daṛeke one uniyakʼ katha bana hoṛ liń manao daṛeke;" 
Job9:34 jodi jãhãe nonkae tahen khan okoe do Isorakʼ sạjại iń khone ocokʼ daṛeakʼ, jemon uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre aloe botor ocoyiń." 
Job9:35 Ona hoylen khan enḍekhan Isor begor botoraete kathań roṛkea, menkhan ńitokʼ ińakʼ oka dosa hoyakan onate iń do bạń daṛeakʼa." 
Job10:1 “Ińakʼ jiwi do iń bhitrire laṅgayentińạ, ińakʼ duk reakʼ katha do khulạsateń roṛa ar ińakʼ jiwi reakʼ hewer haṛhatʼrege kathań roṛa." 
Job10:2 E Isor, iń do alom bicạr dusiyińạ menkhan iń upạrte oka khanḍa khạnḍi menakʼtam ona baḍae ocoyińme." 
Job10:3 Iń kosṭom imạńte amakʼ do cetʼ lab? Amakʼ ti teakʼ kạmi do cetʼem nihạ̃t giḍikakʼa ar bạṛicʼkoakʼ ponthako dom kusiyakʼa? 
Job10:4 Amakʼ mẽtʼkin do cetʼ harta reakʼ mẽtʼkana? Manwa leka cetʼ am hõm ńeńelkangea? 
Job10:5 Manwa reakʼ din lekage cetʼ amakʼ dinko paromokʼ kana? Onko lekage cetʼ amakʼ bochorko hõ paromokʼ kana? 
Job10:6 Ona iạte cetʼ ińakʼ doskom sendra kana ar ińakʼ ghạṭkom suṭhik bakʼṛa kana? 
Job10:7 Baḍaegeam dusi doń baṅ kana ar amakʼ ti khon okoehõ bako rukhiyạ daṛeạńạ. 
Job10:8 “Amakʼ tikinge iń doe gaṛhao akadińạ, are benao akadińạ; ńitokʼ do cetʼ ruạṛ hecʼkatem marao giḍikạńạ?" 
Job10:9 Disạime, hasa reakʼ bhajan lekam benao akadińạ; am do cetʼ arhõ dhuṛim hoe ocoyińạ?" 
Job10:10 Toa lekagem dul akadińạ ar gotom lekam gaṛdha ocoakadińạ. 
Job10:11 Harta ar jeltem oyo akadińạ, jaṅ ar sirkotem benao akadińạ." 
Job10:12 Jiwim emakawạdińa, ar asambheṛ dulạṛem udukʼakadińạ; amakʼ jotonte ińakʼ jiwim rukhiyạ akatʼtińạ." 
Job10:13 Menkhan noako do amakʼ monrem baeakada, ińiń baḍaea noakoge am dom disạ akada," 
Job10:14 Ińiń kại khan, onam ạribạndhiyetʼ kana ar ińakʼ dos reakʼ sạjại begor do bam aṛagińạ." 
Job10:15 Ińiń dusige khan iń cetanre do muhin hecʼ paṛaoạńạ. Ar bin dusạniń hoylenre hõ bohokʼ do bạń rakapʼ daṛeạtińa, ente lajaoteń perecʼ akana ar kosṭoteń unum akana." 
Job10:16 Dhạcri kul leka bohokʼ iń rakapʼle khan iń iạte am do tãṛãkʼ akanem tahena ar amakʼ botoranakʼ daṛe do arhõm udukʼạńạ. 
Job10:17 Iń upạrte am do nãwã nãwã gohakom teṅgoyetʼkoa ar iń upạrte amakʼ edrem baḍhaoetʼtama; amakʼ akromon do mitʼṭecʼ mitʼṭecʼkate iń upạrte hijukʼkana. 
Job10:18 “Cedakʼ eṅgạńakʼ kukhi khon dom oḍokkedińa? Jãhãn mẽtʼ ạuriye ńeleńre cedakʼ bạń gocʼlena? 
Job10:19 Hae, tishõ bạń benaolen khan, se lacʼ khon sojhe topateń idi ocolen khan!" 
Job10:20 Ińakʼ thoṛa din reakʼ bahaokʼ do cabayena; ar ńitokʼ do aṛakʼkạńme jemon thoṛa ghạṛicʼ iń rạskạ daṛeakʼ. 
Job10:21 Iń do usạrage ńut ar moron dhund disạmteń calakʼa; ar tishõ bạń ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Job10:22 Ona do kaṛaṅ ńutakʼ disạm kana, moron dhund reakʼ disạmge; onḍe do marsal reakʼ rãtge bạnukʼa.”" 
Job11:1 Unre Namathi Sophar doe roṛ ruạṛkeda," 
Job11:2 “Niạko reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ do cetʼ baṅ emogokʼa? Mocawan hoṛ do cetʼ dhorome ṭarhaokokʼa? 
Job11:3 Amakʼ noa ạuṛiyakʼ katha ańjomkate hoṛ do cetʼ hape akanko tahena? Amem landawakore cetʼ am do bako lajao ocomea? 
Job11:4 Am do Isorem metaekana, amakʼ pạtiạure jãhãn khutge bạnukʼa ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼre am dom khạṭigea." 
Job11:5 Aha, Isor jemon katha baṛeye roṛ, am upạrte luṭikin baṛeye jhijtae" 
Job11:6 ar ạkil reakʼ okoakʼkoe baḍae ocome, ente uni do ạḍi lekan bud menakʼtaea. Ar noa baḍaekakʼme amakʼ ghạṭ lekate Isor do sạjại do bae emama." 
Job11:7 Isorakʼ okoakʼko reakʼ khạndritetʼ do cetʼem baḍae daṛeakʼa? Sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ simạna baṅ tinạkʼ sạṅgiń ona do cetʼ suṭhik katem ńel daṛekea? 
Job11:8 Serma khon hõ usulge ona do cetʼem bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana? Seol khon khạndrige, ona hõ cetʼem baḍae daṛeakʼ kana?" 
Job11:9 Onam jokhale khan pirthimi khon hõ jeleńgea ar jalapuri khon hõ osargea. 
Job11:10 Uni do hecʼkate hajotreye bondilem khan ar bicạr ṭhene idilem khan, enḍekhan okoe uni doe akoṭ daṛekea?" 
Job11:11 Uni do bhõnḍ hoṛko khạṭigeye orom akatʼkoa; bạṛicʼ jãhãnakʼe ńelle khan uni do cetʼ bae ạribạndhiya? 
Job11:12 Bir gadha hopon cetʼleka manwa huyạte bae janam daṛeakʼ, onkage lelha hoṛ hõ ạkilan hoṛ bae hoedaṛeakʼa." 
Job11:13 “Menkhan amakʼ mon purạtem emae khan, ar uni secʼ amakʼ tiyem tiyạrle khan," 
Job11:14 amre oka kại menakʼ onam sạṅgiń lekhan, ar bedhorom amakʼ oṛakʼre bam tahẽ ocowakʼ khan," 
Job11:15 enḍekhan am do bin dusạnte bohokʼem rakabtama ar begor botorte kajaktem teṅgokʼa. 
Job11:16 Unre amakʼ kosṭo khạṭigem hiṛińa, ona do ạtukʼkan dakʼ lekagem hudisa." 
Job11:17 Amakʼ jion do tikin khon hõ bạ̃ṛti marsalokʼa ar ńut do setakʼ bela leka hoyokʼa. 
Job11:18 Amakʼ do dil tahena, ente as menakʼgetama; beṛhaetem beṅgeda ar khạtirjomam jirạujoṅa;" 
Job11:19 Giticʼ jirạu joṅre celege bako comkao ocomea. Ar ḍher hoṛ do amakʼ daya ńam lạgitʼko aroja. 
Job11:20 Menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ mẽtʼ do ạndhạukʼtakoa onko do cetʼ asrayge bako ńama; mucạtʼ sãhetʼge hoyokʼa onkoakʼ as do. 
Job12:1 Unre Job doe roṛ ruạṛkeda," 
Job12:2 “Ape do ạkilanko mentepe hudisokʼkana apeakʼ gujukʼ são sãote ạkil hõ gujukʼtapea. 
Job12:3 Menkhan ape leka iń hõ buj do menakʼtińgea; ape khon oka lekate hõ bạń komaoa; okape menetʼ ona do okoe bhala bae baḍaea? 
Job12:4 Iń do Isoriń hohoaekan tahẽkana are ańjometʼtiń tahẽkana, enhõ ińren gateko do ińko landa-dhutʼạń kana." 
Job12:5 Sukren hoṛ do duk kosṭoko nindạueda; onkoko hudiseda ona do leńjedokʼkan hoṛkoakʼ kana. 
Job12:6 Luluṭkoakʼ tạmbure jãhãn gulmalge bạnukʼa; Onko do Isorko edre ocoyedere hõ khạtirjomako tahenkana; Isorge onko do jotowakʼe emako kana. 
Job12:7 “Janwarko ṭhen kulijoṅme, onko do amko cetʼama; coṭren cẽṛẽko ṭhen kulijoṅme, onko hõko lạiyama;" 
Job12:8 dhạrti lạiyaeme, uni do ame cetʼama; doreãoren hako ṭhen kulijoṅme onko hõ amko lạiyama." 
Job12:9 Onko sanamgeko baḍaea Probhu Isorakʼ daṛegeye nonkayeda. 
Job12:10 Uniyakʼ tirege sanam jiwiyankoakʼ jiwi do menakʼa; sanam manwakoakʼ sãhetʼ hõ uniyakʼ tirege menakʼa. 
Job12:11 Alaṅ do cetʼleka jomakʼe cakha ạikạuetʼ onkage lutur hõ katha reakʼe biḍạu aṭkareda. 
Job12:12 Apepe meneda, haṛam hoṛko ṭhen do akel ńamokʼa ar ḍher din bahaokʼicʼ ṭhen do buj menakʼa." 
Job12:13 “Menkhan akel ar daṛe do Isor ṭhenge menakʼa; sopolha ar buj hõ uni ṭhenge. 
Job12:14 Uniye rạputʼ giḍilere celege bako benao ruạṛa; ar jãhãe hoṛe siń esetʼlere celege bako jhijea. 
Job12:15 Uni do dakʼe akoṭ ocole khan akal hoyokʼa; ar onae jhicʼle khan disạm do ḍahao maraokʼa. 
Job12:16 Daṛe ar akel do uniyakʼ kangea; ekʼṛeyicʼ ar eṛe ocokʼicʼ bana hoṛge uni latarren kanakin. 
Job12:17 Uni do sosolhakoakʼ kicricʼ totʼkate onkoe bondikoa ar bikʼcạrko do lelhae hoyocokoa. 
Job12:18 Uni do rajakʼ kicricʼe recʼ hataoa ar uniye bondiyea. 
Job12:19 Uni do naekekoakʼ kicricʼ totʼkate onkoe bondikoa ar daṛeanko doe totʼ giḍikakoa. 
Job12:20 Uni do pạtiạran hoṛkoakʼ mocae bondtakoa ar haṛam hoṛkoakʼ bud doe nosṭo ocoytakoa. 
Job12:21 Cetan hudạren hoṛko cetanre acʼakʼ kurude dula ar daṛeanko doe eken ti ocokoa. 
Job12:22 Ńut reakʼ okoakʼkoe sodor ocoya ar dhund do marsalteye oḍok ạguyeda. 
Job12:23 Uni do jạtrenkoe maraṅetʼkoa arhõe maraokoa, onkoe baḍhao ocokoa arhõe bondi ocokoa." 
Job12:24 Dhạrtiren mukhiyạkoakʼ buj doe sạṅgińʼtakoa; ar nisun jaegakoreye dãṛãbaṛa ocokoa. 
Job12:25 Onko do marsal begorte ńutreko taham tukucʼ baṛaea; ar bul hoṛ lekae konḍa manḍe ocoyetʼkoa. 
Job13:1 “Noako joto do ińakʼ mẽtʼteń ńel akada ar nij luturte ańjomkate onań bujhạuakada. 
Job13:2 Ape okaṭakʼpe baḍae iń hõ ona doń baḍaegea; ape khon oka secʼte hõ bạń komaoa. 
Job13:3 Menkhan sanam daṛeanicʼ sãote galmarao iń khojkana, Isor tulucʼ ińakʼ mambla chinḍạu iń khojkana." 
Job13:4 Ape joto do eṛeakʼ khudạuko kanape; ar jotoge ạuṛiyakʼren raranko kanape. 
Job13:5 Ah! Jotoge thir hape akaepe tahen khan! Ape lạgitʼ do onage ạkilanakʼ kạmi hoykokʼa. 
Job13:6 “Ńitokʼ do ińakʼ jothat katha baṛe ańjompe; ińakʼ luṭi reakʼ ạjij baṛe luturakʼtińpe. 
Job13:7 Isor ńutumte cetʼ behokakʼ kathape roṛa? Uni ńutumte cetʼ eṛeakʼ kathape roṛa? 
Job13:8 Uni secʼge cetʼ kathape roṛ idiya? Isor ńutumte cetʼpe reṭepeṭekʼa? 
Job13:9 Uniye biḍạu aṭkarlepe khan ape do cetʼ bhage hoyokʼtapea? Manwa cetʼ lekae ṭhoka ocokʼ onka do cetʼ unipe ṭhoka daṛekea? 
Job13:10 Mẽtãhãpe beṅgetʼakʼ khan ape do khạṭigepe nisṛạu ocokʼa. 
Job13:11 Uniyakʼ mạhima do cetʼ bae botor ocopea? Uniyakʼ toras do cetʼ apere baṅ paṛaokʼa? 
Job13:12 Apeakʼ disạwakʼ kathako do torocʼ reakʼ kạhtukge; apeakʼ aḍokʼ reakʼ pạcriko do hasa reakʼakʼge. 
Job13:13 “Hape thirlenpe, ar roṛ ocoạńpe; ona tayom do ińre jãhãnakʼge paṛaokʼma." 
Job13:14 Cedakʼ apnar do muhinreń paṛaokʼa ar ińakʼ jiwi doń cuputʼ doho kạtińạ? 
Job13:15 Ńelpe, uni doe gocʼ giḍikạńre hõ enhõ uni cetanre asiń dohoya; ar khạṭige uni samaṅre coloniń sojhetińa." 
Job13:16 Ar onage ińakʼ rukhiyạkʼ reakʼ pontha do hoyokʼa, ente bạṛicʼ hoṛ uni samaṅre ohoe hecʼ daṛelena." 
Job13:17 Ińakʼ katha do mone lagaokate ańjomtińpe; ar okań menetʼ apeakʼ luturre ona rebetʼ dohoype. 
Job13:18 Ińakʼ roroṛteakʼ do ńit iń ṭhik dohoakada, onateń baḍaea, iń do dhorom menteń ṭarhaokʼgea." 
Job13:19 Jãhãege cetʼ iń upạrteye reṭepeṭekokʼa? Ariń daṛeakʼ khan iń doń gujukʼa. 
Job13:20 “E Isor, iń do eken barea jinis emạńme; amakʼ ti do iń cetan khon sahaṛkakʼme, ar amakʼ toraste do alom botor ocoyińạ; enḍekhan am khon do ar bạń danaṅokʼa." 
Job13:21  
Job13:22 Ona tayom hohoạńme, ar iń doń goṅ ruạṛa, ar baṅkhan ińge roṛ ocoạńme ar am do ona reakʼ roṛ ruạṛạńme." 
Job13:23 Lạiạńme, ińakʼ behokakʼ ar kại do cetʼ kana? Ińakʼ dos ar kại baṛe udukʼạńme." 
Job13:24 Cedakʼ mẽtʼãhã dom danaṅ akatʼtama ar bạiri mentem hudis edeńkana? 
Job13:25 Hoete oṭaṅokʼkan sakam do cetʼem toras ocokea? Ar rohoṛ bhusạko do cetʼem khudạukea? 
Job13:26 Iń upạrte do hewer haṛhatʼ katham oletʼkana ar juạn jokhecʼ reakʼ ghạṭkom lekhawạńkana. 
Job13:27 Biṛi paṭate jaṅga dom tolkạtińkana; ińakʼ sanam horkorem tolas edeńkana ar ińakʼ jaṅga talka beṛhaetem simạwạńkana. 
Job13:28 “Manwa do sea jinis lekae garao cabakʼkana ar tejoko jomakatʼ kicricʼ lekae hoyakana. 
Job14:1 Maejiuakʼ kukhireye janam akan manwa do thoṛa din lạgitʼ kanae, uni do jalateye perecʼgea." 
Job14:2 Uni do baha lekae saṛokʼkana ar ona tayom doe tolmojokʼa; uni do umul lekae ńir calakʼkana, ar bae tahenkana." 
Job14:3 Nonkan mitʼ hoṛ cetanre cetʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ do bidokʼkana? Ar bikʼcạr lạgitʼ cetʼ iń samaṅrem ạguyedekana. 
Job14:4 Besaphaicʼ khon cetʼ jãhãe saphaicʼe benao daṛekea? Ona do okoehõ bae daṛeakʼa. 
Job14:5 Manwakoakʼ bahaokʼ din do niṭ dohoakante; uniyakʼ candoko reakʼ lekhawakʼem ṭhik dohoakada; ar uniyakʼ simạnakom ṭhik dohoakatʼte, uni do ona bae parom daṛeakʼa." 
Job14:6 Onate uni secʼ khon amakʼ mẽtʼ ạcurtam, ar jirạu ocoaeme; din ṭakʼlaoko lekage uni do okte khemao ocoaeme." 
Job14:7 “Dare reakʼ hõ as menakʼa; makʼ giḍilenre hõ ona do arhõ omon ruạṛokʼa, ar ona khon arhõ nãwã kahle oḍokokʼa." 
Job14:8 Otre ona reakʼ rehetʼ do haṛamokʼkana, ar hasare ona reakʼ gonḍa do gujukʼkana." 
Job14:9 Enhõ dakʼ reakʼ baste ona do arhõ sagenokʼkana; ar nãwã rohoeyakʼ leka arhõ dạṛko oḍokokʼkana. 
Job14:10 Menkhan manwae gocʼlen khan uni doe caba utạrokʼa; ar sahẽtʼ oḍokokʼ tayom do okateye calakʼ kana? 
Job14:11 Doreão reakʼ dakʼ cetʼ leka ańjedokʼ ar gaḍa cetʼ leka rohoṛokʼ," 
Job14:12 onkage manwae giticʼlen khan ar bae beredokʼa; serma ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ uni do bae ebhenokʼa, uni do jạpitʼ khon ar bae ebhenokʼa." 
Job14:13 “Ohae, Sheolre baṛem oko danaṅ liń khan, amakʼ edre ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼem doholiń khan, ar ona tayom mitʼṭecʼ oktem niṭạńte ińem disạ ocoyiń!" 
Job14:14 Manwa gujukʼ tayom do cetʼ arhõe jiwetʼ ruạṛokʼa? Are onkae khan, ińakʼ khaṭaokʼ reakʼ sanam dinkore nãwã arokʼ lạgitʼ ńel hor akae iń tahena, kạmi khon khalasokʼ din ạuri seṭerokʼ hạbicʼ." 
Job14:15 Unre amem hohoạńạ ariń goṅ ruạṛa; ar amakʼ titeakʼ kạmiyakʼ lạgitʼem uihạrińa. 
Job14:16 Unre am do ińakʼ jaṅga reakʼ taṛamem lekhaea menkhan ińakʼ kại secʼ do bam beṅgeda. 
Job14:17 Ińakʼ ghạṭko do mitʼṭecʼ thạilạkʼre chapkatem bondkakʼa ar ińakʼ sanam kạikom dapalketińạ. 
Job14:18 “Menkhan buruko do dasaokʼ ńurokʼkana, ar huṭupʼ dhiri do acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon ocogokʼkana," 
Job14:19 dakʼ do dhiriko cetʼ lekae heṛ ocoyetʼ ar ạtukʼ dakʼko cetʼ leka hasae gecʼ idiyetʼ, onkage am do manwawakʼ asem maraoetʼtaea." 
Job14:20 Jaejug lạgitʼ unim domonedea, are parom calakʼkana; uniyakʼ cehram bodoletʼtaea arem kol gotʼkae kana." 
Job14:21 Hoponko manot ocokʼ kantaere hõ uni do bae baḍae daṛeakʼkana; arko bemanot ocolenre hõ uni do ona bae ńel joṅkana. 
Job14:22 Uni do eken acʼakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ hasogeye ạṭkareda ar acʼ lạgitʼgeye hińjrạukʼkana.” 
Job15:1 Unre Temaniren Eliphas doe roṛ ruạṛkeda," 
Job15:2 “Jãhãe ạkilan hoṛ do cetʼ nonka ạuṛiyakʼ kathae roṛa se purub reakʼ lolo hoe jomkate lacʼe bi ocoytaea? 
Job15:3 Uni do cetʼ okaj kathateye reṭepeṭekʼa, se bin damanakʼ kathakoe roṛa?" 
Job15:4 Menkhan am do Isor bam botorae kana ar Isor ṭhen koejoṅ hõm akoṭ akatʼtama. 
Job15:5 Amakʼ kại iạtege nonkan kathakom roṛeda ar sean hoṛ leka buligem bachao joṅkana. 
Job15:6 Iń do baṅ, amakʼ mocage am doe dusiyetʼmea; amakʼ luṭikinge am upạrtekin gohayetʼkana." 
Job15:7 “Manwako modre amge cetʼ pạhilrem janam akana? Buruko ạuri sirjạukʼre cetʼ amgem janamlena? 
Job15:8 Isorakʼ goṭawakʼ reakʼ katha do cetʼem ańjomakada? Am eskarge cetʼ sanam ạkil dom hameṭ akawana? 
Job15:9 Nonkan jãhãnakʼem baḍaea oka do ale bale baḍaekan, ar nonkan jãhãnakʼem bujhạueda oka do bale bujhạu daṛeakʼkan?" 
Job15:10 Ale talare nonkan mitʼ hoṛ menaea okoe do haṛam are pạnḍuge; uniyakʼ umer do am babawakʼ umer khon hõ bạ̃ṛtigetaea. 
Job15:11 Isor emakʼ jiwi raṛecʼge cetʼ am lạgitʼ do baṅ ḍhera? Am do ona kathage mạ̃hir salakʼem men ocokʼkana. 
Job15:12 Amakʼ mon do cedakʼ sạṅgińteye idiyetʼmea? Ar raṅgaote amakʼ mẽtʼ do cedakʼ jolokʼkantama? 
Job15:13 Nonkate am do Isor upạrtem raṅgaokʼkana onako katha do amakʼ moca khonem oḍoketʼa. 
Job15:14 Manwa doe celekante, uni do saphae hoedaṛekokʼa? Maejiuakʼ kukhi khon janamicʼ doe celekante, dhorome hoedaṛekokʼa?" 
Job15:15 Isor do acʼren goḍetko cetanre bae bhorsa daṛeakʼkan khan, ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼre serma hõ miridos baṅkan khan," 
Job15:16 enḍekhan manwa, okoe do bạṛicʼ are kharapge ar ghạṭko dakʼ lekae ńũiyetʼ, uni do khạṭi bae hoedaṛeakʼa." 
Job15:17 “Ińakʼ katha ańjomme, amiń bujhạuam kana; iń okań ńelakatʼ onageń lạiyam kana." 
Job15:18 Ạkilan hoṛko do akoren hapṛamko ṭhen khonko ńamleda ar ona do jotogeko sodorleda. 
Job15:19 Eken onkoakʼ tirege disạm do em hoylena, jãhãe bidisiạge onko talare bako hecʼ boloakan tahẽkana." 
Job15:20 Bedhorom hoṛ do jiwetʼ bhor dukko joma; ar kurmutạha hõ tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahen unạkʼ din duke joma. 
Job15:21 Uniyakʼ luturre do torasge bajaokʼkana; ar jotowakʼge mońjge calakʼkana mente tireye hudisa unre luluṭko do uni cetanre jhãpko ema. 
Job15:22 Uniyakʼ jãhãn asge bạnukʼtaea, ńut khone dạṛ pạnḍuja mente; uni lạgitʼ do botoranakʼ gujukʼge ṭhik dohoakana." 
Job15:23 Uni do jomakʼ sendare lạgitʼe ạcur baṛaea are kulijoṅa ona do okare menakʼa mente. Uni doe baḍaekana, ńut reakʼ din do sor akantaea." 
Job15:24 Gạr ar harkhet dokin botor ocoyedea ar daṛeanicʼ rapaj leka unire jhãp em lạgitʼkin sapṛao akana," 
Job15:25 ente uni do Isor upạrte tiye tuletʼtaea ar sanam daṛeanicʼ upạrteye dhomkaoeda. 
Job15:26 Dạriạ ar daṛeanakʼ ḍhalte hoṭokʼ keṭecʼkate Isor upạrte uni doe laha idikʼkana. 
Job15:27 “Uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do itilteye dapal akatʼtaea ar ḍanḍa do dophãṛ dophãṛ itilteye paṭhe akana. 
Job15:28 Uni do dhaṅdhaser nagrahareye girobasokʼ kana; okaṭakʼ oṛakʼre celege bako tahenkan, ar oka oṛakʼ do dhaṅ dhaserokʼ lạgitʼ sapṛao akan, onḍege uni doe girobasokʼ kana." 
Job15:29 Uni do kisạ̃ṛ ar bae tahena, uniyakʼ dhon-sompotti do baṅ ṭikạukʼtaea, hajar hajar janwar hõ bako tahentaea." 
Job15:30 Uni do ńut khon bae paskao oḍok daṛeakʼa; uni do nonkan dareko lekae hoyokʼa one ona reakʼ ḍạrko seṅgelte jhạ̃usạkʼ kan; Isorakʼ moca reakʼ sahẽtʼte uni doe oṭaṅokʼa. 
Job15:31 Ạuṛiyakʼ jinis cetanre pạtiạukʼte alo jemone ṭhoka ocokʼ, ente ona bodolte uni do cetʼge bae ńama." 
Job15:32 Dinko ạurirege acʼakʼ kuṛại do purạteye ńama; uniyakʼ ḍạrko do ar baṅ sarhekʼtaea. 
Job15:33 Uni do nonkan darkha nạ̃ṛĩ lekae hoyokʼa one uniyakʼ berel darkha jo do koṭa ńur akan; uniyakʼ baha do tolmocʼ ńurakan jạitun dare lekae hoyokʼtaea. 
Job15:34 Isor baṅ botoraekan hoṛren do cele gidrạge bako tahena; onkoakʼ ghus reakʼ oṛakʼ duạr do seṅgelte maraokʼtakoa. 
Job15:35 Onkoakʼ kukhire do dusṭạmi tahena ar bạṛicʼakʼko busạkʼjoṅa; ar onkoakʼ lacʼre do phikirkoge gaṛhaokʼtakoa.” 
Job16:1 Unre Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job16:2 “Nonkan katha do ḍhergeń ańjom akada; ạḍi bạpuṛicʼ jiwi rakʼṛecʼko kangeape ape do! 
Job16:3 Apeakʼ katha do hoe idiyetʼkan leka ona do cetʼ tishõ baṅ mucạdokʼtapea? Ar do cetʼ hoyakantapea, onatepe reṭepeṭekʼkana?" 
Job16:4 Ape hõ iń leka hoylentape khan enḍekhan iń hõ ape lekań galmarao daṛekea, ape upạrte ạḍi utạr kathakoń roṛkea ar ape ńelte bohokʼ iń rukukea." 
Job16:5 Menkhan bạń onkakea, bickom mocateń udgạukepea; ińakʼ luṭikin reakʼ jiwi raṛecʼ katha do hasoe raṛecʼketapea." 
Job16:6 “Katha roṛlere hõ ińakʼ haso do baṅ komaokʼtińạ; ar thir akaniń tahẽlenre hõ baṅ cabakʼtińạ. 
Job16:7 E Isor, am do ińem laṅga ocoakadińạ; ińakʼ goṭa gharońjgem marao akatʼtińạ." 
Job16:8 Ińakʼ hoṛmo dom osokʼ akatʼtińạ, onage iń upạrte goha hoyakana; ińak osokʼ akan dosage iń upạrte gohae emetʼkana." 
Job16:9 Isor do ạḍitetʼe ghạl akadińạ edrete iń doe cirạ akadińạ; iń ńelteye togocʼ ḍaṭayetʼ kana; ar iń upạrte mẽtʼ jolokʼkantaea. 
Job16:10 Iń landa-dhutʼạń lạgitʼ hoṛ do mocako cahapʼ akatʼtakoa; siṛogate johareko thapa edeńkana ar iń upạrte mitʼ sãoteko jarwakʼ kana. 
Job16:11 Isor do bedhorom hoṛko ṭhene soprot akadińạ; bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ tireye capatʼ khadle akadińạ. 
Job16:12 Sulukteń tahẽkana menkhan uni doe chaka chun akadińạ; hoṭokʼre sapʼkate uni doe tawakʼ gejerkedińa. Uni do bejha leka tuń joseń lạgitʼe dohoakadińạ. 
Job16:13 Uniren dhinkiạko do ińko esetʼ ạcur akadińạ; kurmutạha leka ińakʼ kunḍikoe paṛakʼ akatʼtińạ ar ińakʼ haṛhatʼ sisir do otreye giḍikatʼtińạ. 
Job16:14 Bar bar ińakʼ rurukhiyạ bhit doe rạputʼetʼtińạ, birbão hoṛ leka uni do iń secʼe ńir hijukʼkana." 
Job16:15 Ińakʼ harta cetanre gõṛẽ kicricʼ iń horokʼakada; ar ińakʼ bạḍại do dhuṛireń laplonḍe akatʼtińạ. 
Job16:16 Rakʼ rakʼte ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do aral koral caba akana, ińakʼ mẽtʼ pipnikinre do moron dhundge menakʼa;" 
Job16:17 Enhõ iń do celege bạń jor julum akatʼkoa ińakʼ koejoṅ do saphagetińa. 
Job16:18 “E ot, ińakʼ mãyãm do alom loṭomtińạ; ińakʼ rakʼ do jaoge ańjomokʼtińma." 
Job16:19 Ńitokʼ hõ ińren goha do sermare menaea; iń secʼ okoe kathae roṛ uni do coṭre menaea. 
Job16:20 Okoe iń secʼ menae uni do ińren gate kanae, ar Isor ṭhen iń do mẽtʼ dakʼ iń joroyetʼtińạ." 
Job16:21 Manawa cetʼleka gate secʼ kathae roṛ onkage eken mitʼ hoṛ iń ńutumte Isor ṭhen kathae roṛ daṛeakʼ khan! 
Job16:22 Ente iń do ar thoṛa bochor khange ona horteń senokʼa, ar ona khon do bạń ruạṛa." 
Job17:1 “Ińakʼ mon do rạputʼ akantińạ, ar bahaokʼ dinko hõ mucạtʼ hijukʼkana, ar kobor hõ iń lạgitʼe ńel horetʼkana." 
Job17:2 Cikʼgạriko do sạrige iń beṛhaete menakʼkoa; onkoakʼ siṛog doń ńel ńameda. 
Job17:3 “E Isor, okaṭakʼ jạminem khojkan ona do amge teṅgonme; iń ńutumte do okoeye jạminkokʼa?" 
Job17:4 Onkoakʼ mon do buj khonem danaṅ akatʼtakoa, onate onko do bam jitạu ocokoa." 
Job17:5 Lab reakʼ aste jãhãe acʼren gatekoe dusileko khan uniren hoponko do duk jojom hoyokʼtakoa. 
Job17:6 “Isor do hoṛkoakʼ kạhtukgeye hoyoco akadińa, mẽtʼãhãre sanam hoṛko thoyạńkan lekage." 
Job17:7 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ do dukte ạndhuạ akantińạ; ar goṭa hoṛmo do umul leka hoyakana. 
Job17:8 Noate dhorom hoṛ do ạḍiko hahaṛakʼa, ar miridosicʼ do bedhoromicʼ upạrteye salgaokʼa." 
Job17:9 Menkhan dhorom hoṛ do akoakʼ horteko laha idikʼa, ar okoeyakʼ ti saphage onko do dinke dinko daṛe idikʼa." 
Job17:10 “Bhagegea, ape do hecʼkate arhõ kurumuṭuipe. Ape talare akelanicʼ do okoehõ bạń ńelekana." 
Job17:11 Ińakʼ bahaokʼ din do caba hijukʼkantińạ, ińakʼ sanam goṭawakʼ do ạuṛiyakʼena, ińakʼ mon reakʼ sana hõ cewecʼentińạ." 
Job17:12 Noko hoṛ do siń doko ńindạ ocoyeda, ar ńutre doko meneda, ‘marsal hijukʼkana.’" 
Job17:13 Ińakʼ oṛakʼ do Sheolgeń asokʼkan khan, ar ńutre ińakʼ giticʼakʼ iń aṭetʼletiń khan," 
Job17:14 ar Sheoliń metae, ‘am dom iń baba kana,’ ar tejo baṛeń metako, ‘ińren eṅgạń’ se ‘ińren miserako kanape,’" 
Job17:15 enḍekhan ińakʼ as do okare? Ar ińakʼ as reakʼ perecʼtetʼ do okoeye ńel tiyoga? 
Job17:16 Ona as do Sheol reakʼ duạr hạbicʼ baṅ pheḍokʼa; ar iń sãote ona do dhuṛire baṅ mesaokʼa.” 
Job18:1 Unre Suhi Bildad do roṛ ruạṛkateye menkeda," 
Job18:2 “Amakʼ katha do tinre mucạdokʼtama? Ṭhik leka hudisme, enḍekhan ale do kathale roṛ daṛeakʼa." 
Job18:3 Cetʼ iạte janwarko leka dom hudisetʼlea? Cedakʼ amakʼ mẽtʼre bebujko lekale hoyakana? 
Job18:4 Am do raṅgaote jiwim cirạyetʼtama; am iạte cetʼ dhạrti do ujạṛokʼa? Se huṭupʼ dhiri do acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon ucạṛokʼa? 
Job18:5 “Bedhoromicʼakʼ diuhe do ĩṛĩjokʼtaea; Uniyakʼ seṅgel lepʼ do baṅ jolokʼa. 
Job18:6 Uniyakʼ tạmbu reakʼ marsal do ńutokʼtaea; uni ṭhen dohoakatʼ diuhe hõ ĩṛĩjokʼa. 
Job18:7 Uniyakʼ calakʼ reakʼ daṛe do nijorokʼtaea; ar acʼ emakʼ sopolhageye tawakʼ bhindạṛea. 
Job18:8 Uniyakʼ jaṅgage jhạli secʼe chaṭa idiyea; ar onage khạ̃ṛireye adereya. 
Job18:9 Uniyakʼ jaṅga iḍi do jhạlire paṛaokʼtaea, ar jhạli doe sapʼ kaṛyo maṭoyea." 
Job18:10 Uni lạgitʼ otre pạsi do oḍao oko akan tahena; ar uniyakʼ horrege oḍao akan tahena. 
Job18:11 Botor do uni beṛhaete tahena; ar taṛam pichạge ona doe khudạu baṛayea. 
Job18:12 Muhin do uni lạgitʼe cahapʼ akatʼa; ar ghoṭna do tãṛãkʼ gure lạgitʼ sapṛaogea. 
Job18:13 Ona do uniyakʼ hoṛmo hartae jomtaea; gujukʼren pạhilicʼ hoponge uniyakʼ hoṛmoe tạhuṛtaea. 
Job18:14 Uniye bhorsakʼkan tạmbu khon do or totʼkateye giḍi ocokʼa; ar torasren rapaj ṭhene idi ocokʼa. 
Job18:15 Uniyakʼ tạmbure apnarakʼ mente cetʼge baṅ tahentaea; uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ire jolokʼkan gondhok do chiṭiạukʼa. 
Job18:16 Latarre uniyakʼ rehetʼko do rohoṛokʼkana ar cetanre uniyakʼ ḍạrko do gujukʼkana. 
Job18:17 Dhạrti khon uniyakʼ dikʼsạko do meṭaokʼtaea; kulhikore uniyakʼ ńutum do baṅ roṛogokʼa. 
Job18:18 Uni do marsal khon ńutteye pharak ocokʼa; ar dhạrti khon doe laga ńir ocokʼa. 
Job18:19 Uniren hoponko do apnar jạtrenko talare bako tahena; uni okareye tahẽkan onḍe do celehõ bako tahena. 
Job18:20 Pạchim disạmren hoṛ do uniyakʼ dosa ńelteko hahaṛakʼa, ar purub disạmren hoṛ do bebạṛicʼko botorokʼa." 
Job18:21 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do sạrige mitʼ lekan getakoa; ar okoe Isor bae baḍae akade uniyakʼ dosa hõ nonkage hoyokʼa.” 
Job19:1 Unre Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job19:2 “Ape do ar tin ghạṛicʼ monre kosṭope imạńa ar kathatepe holoṅ lopoṅ utạrińạ? 
Job19:3 Ape do ḍher dhaope opoman akadińạ; bin lajaokʼko leka iń sãotepe beohar akada. 
Job19:4 Bạṛicʼ secʼ sạrigeń ghańjeṛ akan khan, ona reakʼ kuṛại do eken ińakʼ kangea." 
Job19:5 Iń upạrte sạrige apnar usulokʼpe menetʼ khan, ar ińakʼ nicạṛ dosa iạte ińre dospe sạbudetʼ khan," 
Job19:6 enḍekhan baḍaepe, Isorge iń cetanreye behokeda; ar acʼakʼ jhạlire unigeye esetʼ ạcur akadińạ." 
Job19:7 “Ińre behokakʼ hoyakana menteń kikiạulere hõ jãhãn roṛ ruạṛge bạń ńameda; ariń rakʼlere hõ jãhãn bicạr do bạń ńameda. 
Job19:8 Ińakʼ hore eṭetʼ esetʼ akatʼtińte bạń parom daṛeakʼ kana; uni do ińakʼ sanam horko ńutteye dapal akatʼtińạ. 
Job19:9 Uni do ińakʼ ṭhonoke ocokʼ akada, bohokʼ khon man ṭupriye ocokʼ akatʼtińạ." 
Job19:10 Uni do sanam secʼteye ghạl akadińạ ar iń ạuriń caba utạrokʼ hạbicʼ; uni do dare leka ińakʼ ase or totʼ giḍi akatʼtińạ. 
Job19:11 Iń upạrte uniyakʼ edre do jolokʼkana; acʼren mitʼṭecʼ bạiri menteye hudis edeńkana. 
Job19:12 Uniren bạiri khatarenko do iń upạrteko laha hijukʼ kana; ińre jhãp em lạgitʼ onko do pinḍhạko rakapʼ akada. Ar ińakʼ tạmbu beṛhaeteko esetʼ ạcur akadińạ. 
Job19:13 “Uni do iń ṭhen khon ińren boehakoe begar akatʼkoa; ińren oprom hoṛ do bin oprom hoṛ lekako beoharetʼ kana. 
Job19:14 Ińren peṛa pạrbhạ doko calao akana; ińren gateko do ińko hiṛiń akadińạ. 
Job19:15 Ińren peṛa ar kạ̃ṛmĩko do iń bako orom akadińạ; onko do bidisiạ hoṛ lekako ńeleńkana. 
Job19:16 Ińren gutiń hohoaere uni do bae goṅeń kana, ińiń nehõraekanre hõ bae roṛ ruạṛạń kana." 
Job19:17 Ińren bạhu do ińakʼ sahẽtʼe hirkhạwakʼ kana; ińren boehako hõ bạṛicʼko hudis edeńkana. 
Job19:18 Huḍiń gidrạko hõ ińko hirkhạwạń kana; ińiń beretʼlen khan onko do iń upạrteko roṛetʼkana. 
Job19:19 Ińren sanam gateko do ińko hirkhạwạń kana; ar ińiń dulạṛetʼko tahẽkan hoṛ hõ iń upạrteko teṅgonkana. 
Job19:20 Ińakʼ jelre harta ar jaṅ do jalatʼ caba akana, ar iń do eken jiwetʼ hataṛge minạńa." 
Job19:21 E ińren gateko, ińakʼ dukren sãotenko hoyokʼpe, ente Isorakʼ ti doe ghạl akadińạ." 
Job19:22 Isor leka ape hõ cedakʼpe khudạu edeńkana? Ape do cetʼ kosṭo imạńtegepe tahena? 
Job19:23 “Hae, ińakʼ sanam kathako do ollen khan! Ar puthi reakʼ sakamre onako do ol caṛhaolen khan!" 
Job19:24 Dhiri reakʼ paṭare mẽṛhẽtʼ ar sisạte jaejug lạgitʼ ona do rokʼ doholen khan! 
Job19:25 Ińiń baḍaea ińren babańcaoicʼ doe jiwetʼgea; sesre uni do dhạrtire hecʼkateye teṅgona. 
Job19:26 Ińakʼ hartako marao caba utạrlen tińrehõ iń do jiwetʼ tahenrege Isoriń ńelea. 
Job19:27 Iń apnarge uniń ńelea; eṭakʼko do baṅa, menkhan iń nij mẽtʼte uniń ńelea. Ińakʼ ontor do iń bhitrire latwagokʼkana." 
Job19:28 Apepe menetʼkana, ‘kosṭo reakʼ jạṛko unire menakʼte ale hõ kosṭole emaekana,’" 
Job19:29 enḍekhan tarwaṛe reakʼ botor do abore tahen lek kana, ente Isorakʼ edre do tarwaṛe hotetege sạjạiye ạguiya; ar nonkatepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, bicạr do menakʼgea.”" 
Job20:1 Unre Namathi Sophar do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job20:2 “Ińakʼ hudisakʼko ińe roṛ ruạṛạń kana, ente roṛ ruạṛ lạgitʼ iń canḍokʼ kana." 
Job20:3 Nonkan nisṛạuakʼko ańjomkate henosta edeń lekań bujhạueda; onate ińakʼ buj do roṛ ruạṛ lạgitʼe joreń kana. 
Job20:4 Am do khạṭige sedae khonem baḍaekana, dhạrtire manwae doho ocoyen tayom khon," 
Job20:5 dusṭạmikoakʼ hulạs joṅ do thoṛa ghạṛi lạgitʼ kana. Ar bedhoromkoakʼ rạskạ do eken mitʼ ripitʼ lạgitʼ kana; 
Job20:6 Uniyakʼ usultetʼ do serma hạbicʼ seṭerlenre hõ ar uniyakʼ bohokʼ do rimil hạbicʼ usullenre hõ," 
Job20:7 enhõ uni do acʼakʼ mạilạ lekageye marao utạrokʼa. Okoe uniko ńelakade onko doko mena, ‘okare menaea uni do?’" 
Job20:8 Kukmũ lekage uni doe oṭaṅokʼa, ar bae ńamokʼa; uni do ńindạ reakʼ chol lekageye laga ńir ocokʼa." 
Job20:9 Okoe uniko ńelekan tahẽkan onko do ar bako ńelea; uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i hõ ar bako ńela. 
Job20:10 Uniren hoponko do nandanko ṭhenko koe baṛaya; onkoakʼ ti do uniyakʼ rinko em ruạṛkataea. 
Job20:11 Juạn reakʼ daṛete uniyakʼ jaṅko do perecʼgetaea uni sãote dhuṛire giticʼ akane tahena. 
Job20:12 “Bạṛicʼakʼ uniyakʼ mocare heṛemge ạikạulenre hõ ar alaṅ latarre onae oko dohokakʼre hõ," 
Job20:13 mãyãwakʼte ona bae giḍiyre hõ ar mocare onae kopetʼkakʼre hõ," 
Job20:14 enhõ ona jomakʼ do lacʼte bolokate jojokʼa; ar onare biń bis lekage hoyokʼa. 
Job20:15 Ar okaṭakʼ dhon duribkoe utʼletʼ ona doe becʼ giḍikakʼa; Isor do uniyakʼ lacʼ khon onae oḍok giḍiya. 
Job20:16 Uni do kạrinạṅgiń bińakʼ bise copoja; ar biń do acʼakʼ biste uniye gojea. 
Job20:17 Uni do dahe ar dumur rasa ạtukʼ gaḍako ar bae ńelńama. 
Job20:18 Oka lạgitʼ uniye khaṭao akan ona ạuriye jomrege ona do ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea; bạnij reakʼ labtetʼ hõ uni do bae jom ńama; 
Job20:19 ente uni do nandankoe santaoletʼkoa are bạgiyatʼko tahẽkana, ar okaṭakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr acʼte bae benao akatʼ onae recʼ akawana." 
Job20:20 “Uni do jao oktegeye hạ̃sakʼ kana, ona iạte cetʼge bae rukhiyạ doho daṛeakʼ kana." 
Job20:21 Jom leka do cetʼge sarecʼ baṅ tahentaea; uniyakʼ kisạ̃ṛtetʼ do ar baṅ ṭambhaokʼtaea. 
Job20:22 Ḍher tahentae okterehõ uni do kosṭoreye paṛaokʼa; duk do daṛe salakʼ uni cetanre hijukʼa. 
Job20:23 Uniyakʼ lacʼ bicʼ jokhecʼge Isor do acʼakʼ jolokʼkan edre uni cetanreye dula, ar jạ̃ṛĩ dakʼ lekageye dulaea." 
Job20:24 Uni do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako khone dạṛlere hõ, pitạl reakʼ ạ̃pạ̃ṛi do uniye tuń tabeya." 
Job20:25 Ona jhalkaokʼkan ạ̃pạ̃ṛi reakʼ kạni do uniyakʼ haṛhatʼ sisir khon oḍokokʼa, ar acʼakʼ hoṛmo khon ona doe or oḍoka. Ar ạḍi lekan botor unire hijukʼa." 
Job20:26 Uniyakʼ dhon lạgitʼ ńut doe ńel horetʼkana. Oka seṅgel manwa bako lagao akatʼ ona seṅgel do uniye ḍahao maraoea, ar uniyakʼ tạmburen sarecʼ sanamkoe utʼgotʼkakoa." 
Job20:27 Serma do uniyakʼ behokakʼe sodortaea; ar dhạrti do uni upạrteye teṅgokʼa. 
Job20:28 Banbạsi do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jotowakʼe ạtu iditaea, Isorakʼ edre hilokʼ ona do purạteye buhel iditaea." 
Job20:29 Isor do bedhoromko lạgitʼ onkan bakhrae ṭhik dohoakada; ar ona kangea onko lạgitʼ Isor emakʼ ạidạri do.” 
Job21:1 Unre Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job21:2 “Ińakʼ katha luturakʼtińpe; onage ape emakʼ jiwi raṛecʼ hoyokʼtińma. 
Job21:3 Iń kathań roṛ jokhecʼ do sahaoetińpe; ariń roṛ sạtlere baṛe cigạriwạńpe. 
Job21:4 “Iń do cetʼ manwa upạrteń roroṛkana? Cedakʼ iń do bạń ạṛisokʼa? 
Job21:5 Iń beṅgetʼạńpe ar tharbasaokʼpe; ar tite apeakʼ moca bedtape. 
Job21:6 Niạko kathań hudisle khan botor rakapʼạń kana; ar hoṛmo do thar tharaokʼ kantińạ. 
Job21:7 Bedhoromko do cedakʼ jiwetʼko tahenkana ar cedakʼko haṛamokʼkana? Cedakʼ onko do ḍher dinko bahaokʼkana? 
Job21:8 Onko beṛhaete do onkoren hoponko tahenkana, ar onko mẽtʼãhã samaṅre do onkoren goṛom gidrạkoge." 
Job21:9 Onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr do nicind ar bin botor tahenkana; Isorakʼ sạjại onkore do baṅ paṛaokʼ kana. 
Job21:10 Onkoren sanḍ ḍaṅgra doko akʼbadokʼkana ar bako berthakʼ kana; onkoren gại doko busạgokʼkana ar bako giḍikʼkana. 
Job21:11 Onkoren kạṭicʼko do bhiḍi merom lekako ńir baṛaekana; ar gidrạko do bhiḍi hopon lekako don baṛajoṅkana. 
Job21:12 Onko do tabla ar binạ banamateko sereńeda; ar tiriạ reakʼ saḍeteko rạskạ joṅkana. 
Job21:13 Onko do suk nirạite dinko khemaoeda ar sulukte Sheolteko calakʼkana. 
Job21:14 Enhõ onko do Isorko metaekana, ‘ale khon pharakokʼme; amakʼ horko baḍae do baṅ sanayetʼlea." 
Job21:15 Uni sanam daṛeanicʼ doe celekante, unile sewawaea? Uni ṭhenle koe lekhan ale do cetʼ lab hoyokʼtaea?" 
Job21:16 Menkhan onkoakʼ kisạ̃ṛokʼ do akoakʼ tire bạnukʼa, onate iń do bedhoromkoakʼ solha khon sạṅgińreń tahenkana." 
Job21:17 “Bedhoromkoakʼ diuhe do cetʼ ĩṛĩjokʼtakoa? Tinạkʼ dhao baṅ onkore muhin do paṛaokʼkan? Tinạkʼ dhao baṅ Isorakʼ edre do onkore paṛaokʼkan? 
Job21:18 Tinạkʼ dhao baṅ hoe samaṅre busupʼ lekako hoyokʼkan birbao hoete oṭaṅokʼkan bhusạ leka hõko hoyokʼkan? 
Job21:19 Hoṛko mena, ‘Isor do mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ sạjại uniren hoponko lạgitʼe bae dohokakʼ kana.’ Menkhan Isor do uni hoṛge sạjạiye emaema jemon uni do acʼakʼ dose bujhạu daṛeakʼ." 
Job21:20 Uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼte acʼakʼ maraokʼe ńelma; uni do sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ edre baṛeye ńũima. 
Job21:21 Uniyakʼ bahaokʼ dinko tinre cabakʼa unre cetʼ oneye bạgi akatʼ acʼakʼ gharońj lạgitʼe hudisokʼa? 
Job21:22 “Jãhãege cetʼ Isor do ạkile em daṛekea? Uni ma coṅ serma goḍetko hõe bicạretʼko. 
Job21:23 Mitʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ puruntetʼreye gujukʼkana, purạ puri nirdạndi ar tholge;" 
Job21:24 Uniyakʼ hoṛmo do itilte perecʼgea ar jaṅ reakʼ tumultae do rosanakʼgea. 
Job21:25 Arhõ eṭakʼ hoṛ do tishõ bhageakʼ bae jomeda uni do haṛhatʼ jiwitegeye gujukʼkana. 
Job21:26 Unkin bana hoṛge mitʼleka otrekin giticʼkana; ar tejo doko chạplạu esetʼetʼkinạ. 
Job21:27 “Apeakʼ hudisko do mońjtegeń baḍaea; iń upạrte apeakʼ bạṛicʼ hudisko hõń baḍaegea. 
Job21:28 Apepe meneda, ‘okayena uni kisạ̃ṛ hoṛakʼ oṛakʼ do? Okor okaeyena uni bedhorom hoṛakʼ tạmbu do?’" 
Job21:29 Horte parom senokʼko do cetʼ noa reaṅ bape kuli akatʼkoa? Ape do cetʼ onkoakʼ katha reakʼ jãhãn damge bape emakʼa," 
Job21:30 Bedhorom hoṛ do muhinre bańcaoko ńama ar edrekʼ dinre hõ rukhiyạko ńama? 
Job21:31 Uniyakʼ sobhab reakʼ katha do okoeye lạiyaea? Uni okae ceka akatʼ ona reakʼ kuṛại do okoeye emaea? 
Job21:32 Tinre uni do topareye idi ocokʼa unre sanam hoṛ do uni tayomteko calakʼa, ar gadel hoṛko do uni laha lahateko calakʼa. Uniyakʼ topa do horhokʼtaea; buru lodam reakʼ ot hõ kosṭo bako emaea." 
Job21:33  
Job21:34 Onate apeakʼ noa ạuṛiyakʼ kathakote cetʼ lekate jiwipe raṛejtińa? Apeakʼ roṛ ruạṛ do eṛeteakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana.” 
Job22:1 Unre Temani Eliphas do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job22:2 “Manwa do cetʼ Isore bhạlại daṛekea? Ạkilanicʼ do cetʼ onae onka daṛekea? 
Job22:3 Dhoromem tahẽlen khan sanam daṛeanicʼ do cetʼe kusikokʼa? Miridosem tahẽlen khan uniyakʼ do cetʼ jãhãn lab hoyokʼtaea? 
Job22:4 Isorem botoraekante uni do cetʼe ruhetʼmea? Ona iạte cetʼ am upạrte uni do bicạr lạgitʼe calakʼkana? 
Job22:5 Amakʼ dusṭạmige cetʼ baṅ ḍhergea? Amakʼ ghạṭ reakʼ simạnako hõ bạnukʼtama. 
Job22:6 Ạuṛiyakʼte amren boehako ṭhen khon bondhokem hataoetʼkana; hoṛkoakʼ kicricʼ bhạnduṛkate onkom uluṅetʼko tahẽkana. 
Job22:7 Lorao akanko do dakʼ bam ńu ocoyetʼko tahẽkana; ar reṅgecʼ hoṛ hõ jomakʼ bam emako kan tahẽkana. 
Job22:8 Eken daṛean hoṛkoakʼge disom do hoyena, eken manotan hoṛge onḍeko girobasokʼkana;" 
Job22:9 enhõ rạnḍi maejiuko do eken tiyem bidạyetʼko tahẽkana ar ṭuạ̃r amarkoakʼ ạidạrikom recʼetʼko tahẽkana. 
Job22:10 Ona iạte pạsi do am beṛhaetege oḍao menakʼa, ar ackage toras doe keklesetʼ ocomea," 
Job22:11 amakʼ marsal do ńut akana, ar onate bam ńeńelkana, banbạsi dakʼ do ame chạplạu esetʼ akatʼmea." 
Job22:12 “Isor do cetʼ coṭ sermare bae tahẽnkana? Ipilko ńelkom, tinạkʼ coṭre menakʼkoa!" 
Job22:13 Enhõm meneda, ‘Isor do cetʼ jãhãnakʼe baḍaea? Niạ ńutre Isor do cekateye bicạra?" 
Job22:14 Dạriạ rimil do uniye danaṅ esetʼ akadea, ona iạte uni do bae ńel ńamokʼkana; serma sạṛimre uni doe dãṛãnkana.’" 
Job22:15 Jor jukʼlumko oka horteko senokʼkan amhõ cetʼ ona mare hortegem taṛameda? 
Job22:16 Onko do okte ạuriregeko idi ocoakana; onkoakʼ rehetʼ do gaḍa dakʼ leka ạtu calakʼkana. 
Job22:17 Uni do bhage bhage jiniskote onkoakʼ oṛakʼe perecʼletʼ takoa ar enhõ onko do Isorko metade tahẽkana, ‘am do pharakokʼme. Sanam daṛeanicʼ do cetʼe ceka daṛeabona? Menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ sopolha khon iń do sạṅgińreń tahenkana." 
Job22:18  
Job22:19 Onkoakʼ jarkharokʼ ńelte dhorom hoṛ doko rạskạkʼkana mirisdosko do cigạriwakote onkoko metakokana," 
Job22:20 ‘aleren bạiri do sạrigeko marao akana, onkoakʼ dhon durib do seṅgelte ḍahao marao akantakoa.’" 
Job22:21 Am do Isorakʼ kathare rạjikʼme, uni upạrte bạiri mon do alom dohoytama; enḍekhan amakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtama." 
Job22:22 Uniyakʼ moca khon sopolha ataṅme, ar uniyakʼ katha amakʼ monre dohoyme." 
Job22:23 Sanam daṛeanicʼ ṭhenem ruạṛ hecʼlen khan, tobe do lahate lekam pheraokʼa. Amakʼ tạmbu khon bạṛicʼakʼkom sạṅgiń giḍile khan," 
Job22:24 amakʼ sonako dhuṛireyem giḍikakʼ khan, ar ophir sona do soḍokʼ reakʼ dhiriko talarem capatʼ giḍikakʼ khan," 
Job22:25 enḍekhan amren sona do sanam daṛeanicʼgeye hoyokʼa, ar unige joto khon bhageakʼ rupại hoyokʼtama." 
Job22:26 Unre sanam daṛeanicʼ iạte sạrigem rạskạkʼa ar amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do Isor secʼem rakabtama. 
Job22:27 Uni ṭhenem aroja ar uni do onae ańjomtama, ar amakʼ sanam manotteakʼ em purạutama." 
Job22:28 Okaṭakʼem goṭae onaregem jo bahakʼa, ar amakʼ hor do marsalokʼtama." 
Job22:29 Tinre am dom tumbutʼ ocokʼa unrem mena, ‘ińakʼ bạḍại iạtege noa do hoyakana’ amakʼ mạ̃hir iạtege Isor do ame bańcaomea." 
Job22:30 Ona chaḍa uni do eṭakʼ dusi hoṛko hõe bańcaokoa; ar amakʼ ti saphage iạte onko do bańcaoko ńama.” 
Job23:1 Unre Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job23:2 “Teheń hõ ińakʼ hae haeyokʼ do hewer haṛhatʼgetińạ; ińiń kuhrạukʼ kanrehõ, enhõ Isorakʼ hamal ti do iń cetanre menakʼa." 
Job23:3 Ekeniń baḍae khan okare uniye ńamokʼa, ar uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃iteń sen daṛeakʼ khan," 
Job23:4 enḍekhan uni ṭhen mamblań samaṅketińạ ar sukʼhiyakʼko hotete mocań perecʼketińạ. 
Job23:5 Unre cetʼe roṛ ruạṛkińạ onań baḍae daṛekea, ar okae menke onań bujhạukea." 
Job23:6 Uni do cetʼ maraṅ daṛete iń tulucʼe jhogṛakokʼa? Baṅa, uni do ińakʼe ańjomketińạ." 
Job23:7 Unre mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛ do uni ṭhen mamblae samaṅkea; ar ińren bikʼcạricʼakʼ ti khon jaejug lạgitʼ iń do bańcaoiń ńamkea. 
Job23:8 “Menkhan purub secʼ iń senlen khan uni do onḍe bạnugicʼan; ar pạchim secʼ iń senlenre hõ uni do bae sendra ńamokʼa. 
Job23:9 Utạr secʼre tinreye kạmiya unre hõ uni do bae ńelokʼa; ar dạkhin secʼ iń ạcurlenre hõ uni do bạń ńel ńamea. 
Job23:10 Menkhan iń oka horteń calakʼkan ona doe baḍaekana; are biḍạu aṭkarliń khan iń do khạṭi sona lekageń hoykokʼa. 
Job23:11 Iń do pạtiạr salakʼge uniń pańjayede kana; bạṛicʼ horte baṅ senkate uniyakʼ hortegeń taṛametʼkana. 
Job23:12 Uniyakʼ hukum khon do bạń ocokʼ akana; Ińakʼ jạruṛ jomakʼ khon hõ uniyakʼ moca kathage iń ṭhen do bạ̃ṛti damanakʼ tahẽkana. 
Job23:13 Menkhan jotowakʼre uni do bin bodolicʼ kanae, okoege uni do bako tạkicʼ daram daṛekea; ar uni okae kusiyakʼ onageye kạmikana." 
Job23:14 Uni do iń lạgitʼ okae ṭhik dohoakatʼ onageye kạmiyeda; onkan aema niṭakʼge uniyakʼ do ńit hõ menakʼtaegea. 
Job23:15 Onate uni samaṅre iń do ạḍiń botorokʼa; noakoń hudisle khange uni doń botoraea. 
Job23:16 Isor do ińakʼ mone latwakʼ akatʼtińạ; sanam daṛeanicʼ do ạḍiye botor ocoakadińạ. 
Job23:17 Ńut do ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãe dapal esetʼakatʼtińre hõ enhõ ona do bae thir hape ocodaṛe akadińa, ar kaṛaṅ ńut hõ bae gherao daṛe akadińạ." 
Job24:1 “Sanam daṛeanicʼ do bicạr lạgitʼ okteko cedakʼ bae niṭ akada? Okoe uniko baḍae akade onko do cedakʼ ona din bako ńelńameda? 
Job24:2 Hoṛko do simạna dhiriko ocokʼetʼkana; onko do pal bhiḍiko kombṛoyetʼkoa arko ạtińetʼkoa. 
Job24:3 Onko do ṭũạr amarkoren gadhako laga idi joṅkana ar rạnḍi maejiuren ḍaṅgra do bandhokko dohoyetʼkoa. 
Job24:4 Reṅgecʼ orecʼko do hor khonko laga ńiretʼkoa; onko iạte disạmren sanam reṅgecʼko doko okokokʼkana. 
Job24:5 Reṅgecʼko do bir gadhako leka jomakʼko sendrakana; hahaṅkar ṭoṭhako do onkoren gidrạko lạgitʼ jomakʼko emokʼkana. 
Job24:6 Bilạn ṭạnḍire senkate janwarkoakʼ jomakʼ do ako lạgitʼko jogaṛ joṅkana ar bedhoromkoakʼ bagwan khon ńurakan darkha joko halaṅetʼkana. 
Job24:7 Kicricʼ begorte goṭa ńindạ koṭogeko giticʼ tahen kana; ar rabaṅ dinre hoṛmore oyokʼ lạgitʼ do cetʼge bạnukʼtakoa. 
Job24:8 Onko do buru reakʼ jạṛi dakʼteko lohodokʼ kana ar asray begorte dhiri ṭhenko cokokʼ kana. 
Job24:9 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do eṅgatakʼ hobor khon ṭũạr gidrạko recʼetʼkoa ar rin iạte reṅgecʼ hoṛren hopon do bandhok menteko dohoyetʼkoa. 
Job24:10 Kicricʼ begorte reṅgecʼ hoṛ do koṭogeko dãṛãnkana; onko do reṅgecʼtege anaj reakʼ binḍạko gemereda. 
Job24:11 Onko do bagwanrege jantete jạitun sunumko len oḍokeda; ar tetaṅetʼko tulucʼge darkha joko lelenkana. 
Job24:12 Nagrahakore manwakoakʼ geraṅ ańjomokʼkana, ar ghạl akan hoṛ do goṛo ńam lạgitʼko guhereda; menkhan Isor do onkoakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼ bae moneyakʼkantakoa." 
Job24:13 “Ḍher hoṛge marsal upạrteko huleda; onko do marsal reaṅ bako baḍae orometʼkana ar ona reakʼ horkore hõ bako taṛametʼkana. 
Job24:14 Khuniạhi do ńut tahenrege beretʼkate reṅgecʼ orecʼkoe gocʼetʼkoa, ar ńindạ jokhecʼ doe kombṛoyeda." 
Job24:15 Laṭghaṭkoakʼ mẽtʼ do ńindạ lạgitʼ ńel hor akae tahen kana; uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã betʼ esetʼkateye hudiseda okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ hõ uni do bako ńelekana. 
Job24:16 Ńutlen khange hoṛ do oṛakʼko bhugạkʼeda, ar sińre doko bolo baekokʼkana; menkhan marsal do bako baḍaekana." 
Job24:17 Onko lạgitʼ setakʼ do kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńut kana; ar kaṛaṅ ńut do onkoren gatege. 
Job24:18 “Onko do dakʼ cetan reakʼ photo lekan kanako; onkoakʼ hạṭiń reakʼ jumi do sarapgetakoa, onate darkha bagwan secʼ do celege bako calakʼkana." 
Job24:19 Setoṅ ar ṭan do him dakʼe ańjetʼeda, Sheol hõ onkage kại hoṛkoe utʼetʼkoa." 
Job24:20 Eṅgat kukhi do onkoe hiṛińetʼkoa, ar tejoko do onkoakʼ hoṛmoko jometʼtakoa; bạṛicʼ hoṛ do okoehõ bako disạ dohokoa, onko do dare lekako rạputʼ ńurokʼa." 
Job24:21 Onko do bạńjhi maejiuko jom recʼetʼkoa ar rạnḍi maejiuko hõ bako dayawako kana. 
Job24:22 Menkhan Isor do acʼakʼ daṛete onko daṛeankoe or pheḍkoa; onkoko kisạ̃ṛlenre hõ jiwi reakʼ khạṭitetʼ do bạnukʼtakoa. 
Job24:23 Uni do bedhoromko khạtirjomae jirạu ocokoa, menkhan uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do onkoakʼ hore ńel horetʼtakoa." 
Job24:24 Onko do thoṛa ghạṛicʼ lạgitʼko usulokʼ kana, ar ona tayom do bako ṭarhaokʼkana. Onko doko copotʼ ocokʼa, ar ghãs lekako tolmojokʼa, ar phosol reakʼ gele lekako copeyakʼa." 
Job24:25 Onka baṅ hoylen khan okoe ińakʼ katha do eṛe menteye sạbudkea? Ińakʼ katha je, sạriyakʼ baṅkan ona do okoeye lại daṛekea?”" 
Job25:1 Unre Suhi Bildad do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job25:2 “Rajosṭi do Isorakʼ kangea, Mạliki ar toras hõ uniyakʼge; Uni do coṭ sermare acʼakʼ suluke hoeocoyeda." 
Job25:3 Uniren lạṛhại phạd do cetʼko lekha daṛekokʼa? Uniyakʼ marsal do okoe cetanre baṅ rakapʼ akana? 
Job25:4 Enḍekhan Isor ṭhen manwa do cetʼ miridos bae hoyokʼa? Maejiuakʼ kukhi khon okoeye janam akan uni do cetʼ sapha bae hoedaṛekokʼa? 
Job25:5 Isorakʼ mẽtʼre ńindạ cando ḍig ḍig bae jolokʼ khan ar ipilko hõ uni samaṅre bako sapha khan," 
Job25:6 enḍekhan manwa do cekate sapha doe hoedaṛekokʼa? Uni do mitʼṭen tejo lekanicʼ kanae; manwa hopon do lenḍetʼ chaḍa ar cele hõe baṅkana.” 
Job26:1 Unre Job do roṛ ruạṛketʼteye menkeda," 
Job26:2 “Nijoricʼ do oka lekape goṛowadea ar laṅgayicʼ baṅ oka lekape bańcaokede? 
Job26:3 Bin ạkilanicʼ do tinạkʼpe solhawadea ar tinạkʼ asambheṛ ạkilpe sodoradea? 
Job26:4 Am do okoeyakʼ goṛote noako katha dom roṛetʼ kana? Ar okoeyakʼ katha do amakʼ moca khon oḍok hijukʼkana? 
Job26:5 “Gocʼ hoṛ do botorteko thar tharaokʼ kana; onko do dakʼ ar dakʼ latarre tahenko tulucʼko thar tharaokʼ kana. 
Job26:6 Isor samaṅre Sheol do oṭakʼgea; Abadonakʼ hõ dapalokʼ reakʼ do bạnukʼa. 
Job26:7 Utạr reakʼ rimil do phaelaoreye pasnaoeda; ar phaelao jaegare dhạrti doe aka dohoakada. 
Job26:8 Dakʼko do acʼakʼ dạriạ rimilreye dohokakʼ kana Menkhan ona reakʼ hamalte hõ rimil do baṅ oṛejokʼkana. 
Job26:9 Uni do kunạmi cando reakʼ mẽtʼãhãe dapaleda, ona cetanre acʼakʼ rimile pasnaoeda." 
Job26:10 Marsal ar ńut tala reakʼ simạnare uni do rimil ar doreão talare beṛhaete simạnae dohoakada 
Job26:11 Serma reakʼ khunṭiko do dal dalaokʼkana, ar uniyakʼ dhomkaote hõ thar tharaokʼkana." 
Job26:12 Uni do acʼakʼ daṛete jalapuriye ạulạ ạuli ocoyeda; acʼakʼ budte uni do Rahabe chaka chunekana. 
Job26:13 Uniyakʼ sahẽtʼte sermako do nirola saphakʼ kana; uniyakʼ tikin do ńir paskaokʼkan bińe sobokʼ tabekana. 
Job26:14 Noako do uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ ańcar kana, ar abo do eken uni reaṅ khae khoege bon ańjometʼa; uniyakʼ daṛe huḍur do okoeye bujhạu daṛeketaea?”" 
Job27:1 Job do katha roroṛtegeye tahẽyena. Uni doe menkeda," 
Job27:2 “Okoe ińakʼ hoke hatao akatʼtiń uni jiwetʼ Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼkana, okoe ińakʼ jiwiye hewer haṛhatʼ akatʼtiń uni sanam daṛeanicʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda," 
Job27:3 tinạkʼ din ińre jiwi menakʼ, tinạkʼ din Isorakʼ sahẽtʼ ińakʼ mũre tahen," 
Job27:4 unạkʼ din ińakʼ moca do phạsiarawakʼ bae roṛa, ińakʼ alaṅ hõ phikirteakʼ kathako bae roṛa." 
Job27:5 Ape je, ṭhikpe roṛetʼkan ona do tishõ bạń aṅgoca; ińakʼ gujukʼ din hạbicʼ iń mena, iń do sạriyakʼ kathageń roṛetʼkana." 
Job27:6 Dhoromiń sapʼ uricʼ akada, ar bạń aṛakʼ gotʼkakʼa. Tinạkʼ din jiwetʼ iń tahen unạkʼ din inạkʼ bibek do iń bae dusiyińạ." 
Job27:7 “Ińren bạiri do dusṭạmi hoṛ lekako hoyokʼma; iń upạrte teṅgonicʼ do bedhoromicʼ lekae hoyokʼma. 
Job27:8 Isor do acʼ baṅ botoraekanko tinreye maraokoa, unre onko do cetʼ asge baṅ tahentakoa." 
Job27:9 Onko cetanre kosṭo hecʼlen khan Isor do cetʼ onkoakʼ rakʼe ańjomtakoa? 
Job27:10 Onko do cetʼ sanam daṛeanicʼ iạteko rạskạkʼa? Onko do cetʼ jaoge Isorko hohoaekana? 
Job27:11 Isorakʼ ektiạri reaṅ iń cetʼapea; sanam daṛeanicʼ reaṅ do bạń oko danaṅa. 
Job27:12 Ape sanamkoge coṅ noakope ńeletʼkan, enḍekhan noa ạuṛiyakʼ katha do cedakʼpe roṛeda?" 
Job27:13 “Isor do bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ bhạgre okae dohoakatʼ, ar sanam daṛeanicʼ ṭhen khon haḍrapko oka ạidạriko ńam ona do:" 
Job27:14 Onkoren gidrạko saṅge lenrehõ onko lạgitʼ do botoranakʼ gujukʼ ṭhik dohoakana. Onkoren hoponko do tishõ lacʼ bicʼ jomakʼ bako ńama. 
Job27:15 Onko tayom okoe sarecʼko tahen onko do mahamạriteko gujukʼa; onkoren rạnḍi maejiuko do onko lạgitʼ bako homor halaṅa. 
Job27:16 Onko do dhuṛi leka rupạko ḍạṅlere hõ hasa leka kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼko puńjilere hõ 
Job27:17 onkoakʼ ona kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ do dhorom hoṛgeko horoga, ar miridos hoṛ do rupạko hạṭiń joṅa." 
Job27:18 Onkoakʼ benaoakʼ oṛakʼre do tejoko tahena, ona do pahradarkoakʼ macan oṛakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Job27:19 Onko do kisạ̃ṛgeko jạpida, menkhan ebhenkate sanamakʼ caba utạr akanko ńela." 
Job27:20 Banbạsi leka botor do onkoe esetʼ ạcuretʼkoa, ńindạ reakʼ birbão hoe hõ onkoe oṭaṅ idikoa." 
Job27:21 Purub reakʼ hoe do onkoe idikoa, ar onko doko calakʼa; onkoakʼ jaega khon ona hoe doe oṭaṅ idikoa." 
Job27:22 Ona birbão hoe khon tinre usạrateko ńirjoṅa unre kurmutạha leka ona do onko cetanre paṛaokʼa. 
Job27:23 Ona hoe do cigạriateye thayoya, ar onkoakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon sũ sũkateye laga oḍokkoa." 
Job28:1 “Rupạ reakʼ do khạn menakʼa ar sona nirại ocoy reakʼ hõ ṭhạ̃i menakʼa. 
Job28:2 Hasa khon mẽṛhẽtʼko la totʼeda, ar tamba do gitil dhiri khonko galao totʼeda." 
Job28:3 Dhạrti reakʼ khạndri kaṛaṅ ńutre oka menakʼ manwa do ona sạńgińkate daman dhiri reakʼko ḍunḍhạukana. 
Job28:4 Manwa ṭhạ̃i khon sạṅgińre okare manwa bako calakʼkan onḍe onko do khạnko layeda, ar ona khạnrege onko doko jhilạkʼkana." 
Job28:5 Okaṭakʼ otre phosol janamokʼkan, ona ot latarrege manwa do seṅgel jolkateko ulṭạ ulṭiyetʼkana." 
Job28:6 Onako dhirire do nilkanto mạnik menakʼa, ar otre do sona reakʼ gunḍạge tahenkana." 
Job28:7 Khạn reakʼ hor do gidi kũṛitʼ hõ bako baḍaea, ar jalo cẽṛẽko reakʼ mẽtʼ hõ ona do bako ńelakada;" 
Job28:8 Jãhãn dhomok janwar hõ onḍe do bako lebetʼ akawada, ar cele dhạcri kul hõ ona cetante bako parom akana." 
Job28:9 Ona kạṭhin dhirirege manwa do tiye capoyeda ar buru reakʼ rehetʼ khongeye layeda. 
Job28:10 Ona buru talate sunḍkoe kholaoeda; onḍenakʼ sanam damanakʼ jinisko do uniyakʼ mẽtʼre paṛaokʼkana. 
Job28:11 Uni do jharna reakʼ dakʼ ńurokʼe bond ocoyetʼkana ar okoakʼ jinis do marsalteye oḍok ạguyetʼ kana. 
Job28:12 “Menkhan ạkil do okare ńamkokʼa? Ar bud do okare tahen kana? 
Job28:13 Hoṛ do ona reakʼ dam bako baḍaea; jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre ona do baṅ ńamokʼa. 
Job28:14 Athantar dakʼ doe meneda, ‘ińre ona do bạnukʼa,’ doreão hõe mena, ‘iń ṭhen hõ ona do bạnukʼa." 
Job28:15 Khạṭi sonate hõ ona do ohoge kirińlena, ar ḍher rupạte hõ ona reakʼ dam do baṅ emogokʼa." 
Job28:16 Ophir sonate hõ ona do ohoge kirińlena, Boidurjo mạnik ar nilkanto mạniktehõ ona do baṅ kirińokʼa." 
Job28:17 Sona se damanakʼ kãcte hõ baṅ somanokʼa, nirạ sona reakʼ bhajan bodolte hõ ona do baṅ ńamokʼa." 
Job28:18 Probal ar jiwetʼ dhiri reakʼ hõ dam do bạnukʼa; ar muti mạnikko khon hõ ạkil reakʼ dam do ḍhergea. 
Job28:19 Ona tulucʼ do Kus disạm reakʼ podmorag mạnik hõ baṅ jurikʼa; khạṭi sonate hõ ona do baṅ kirińokʼa. 
Job28:20 “Enḍekhan ạkil do oka khon hijukʼkana? Ar buj do oka khon hijukʼkana? 
Job28:21 Sanam jiwiyankoakʼ mẽtʼ khon ona do danaṅgea, coṭren cẽṛẽko ṭhen khon hõ ona do okore menakʼa." 
Job28:22 Maraokʼ ar gujukʼ dokin menede, ‘ona reakʼ unạn do ạlińakʼ luturte liń ańjomakada.’" 
Job28:23 “Isorge ona reakʼ hor doe bujhạu daṛeakʼa; eken unigeye baḍaea ona do okare tahenkana," 
Job28:24 ente uni do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna hõe ńeletʼkana; ar serma latar reakʼ jotowakʼge uniyakʼ mẽtʼ doe ńeleda. 
Job28:25 Uni do tinre hoere daṛeye emakʼkana ar dakʼko doe soṅ niṭetʼkana," 
Job28:26 tinre uni do jạ̃ṛĩ dakʼ reakʼe bondoboskeda, ar bijli huḍur reakʼ hor hõe bandhaokeda," 
Job28:27 unre uni do ạkile ńelkeda ar onae soṅkeda; uni do mońjteye ńelkeda ar ona reakʼe ḍunḍhạukeda. 
Job28:28 Ona tayom uni do manwae metadea, ‘Probhu Isor botoraege hoyokʼ kana ạkil do, ar bạṛicʼ khon sahaṛokʼge hoyokʼ kana buj do." 
Job29:1 Ona tayom Job do arhõe men idikeda," 
Job29:2 “Ohae, Isor do tinreye ńeleńkan tahẽkana onako cando ar dinkoń ńam ruạṛle khan!" 
Job29:3 Ińakʼ bohokʼ cetanre uniyakʼ diuhe do jolokʼkan tahẽkana, uniyakʼ marsalte iń do unre ńutreń dãṛãnkan tahẽkana." 
Job29:4 Ińakʼ ona jo bahakʼ dinkore Isorakʼ sotasoṅ do ińakʼ tạmbui bhorakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Job29:5 Unre sanam daṛeanicʼ do iń sãoteye tahẽkana ar iń beṛhaetege ińren gidrạko hõko tahẽkana; 
Job29:6 Ińakʼ taṛam horre toage ạtukʼkan tahẽkana, ar huṭupʼ dhiri khon do jạitun sunum reakʼ jharnage bhumbuk oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Job29:7 “Tinre nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭheniń senokʼkan tahẽkana ar onḍenakʼ kulhi dobạṭiạkore duṛupʼakʼ iń benaoetʼ tahẽkana," 
Job29:8 unre juạnko do iń ńelteko gusạukʼkan tahẽkana ar haṛam hoṛ doko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana; 
Job29:9 Cetan hudạren hoṛ do katha bako roṛetʼ tahẽkana onko do tite mẽtʼãhãko betʼetʼtako tahẽkana; 
Job29:10 unre mukhiyạkoakʼ aṛaṅ do thirokʼkan tahẽkana, onkoakʼ alaṅ do tạrure jalatʼ hapekʼkan tahẽkana." 
Job29:11 Okoe ińakʼ kathako ańjometʼ tahẽkan onko doko sarhaoedeń tahẽkana, ar okoe ińko ńeleńkan tahẽkan onko do besko mitạńkan tahẽkana," 
Job29:12 ente goṛo ńam lạgitʼ okoe reṅgecʼ hoṛko rakʼetʼ tahẽkan ar ṭũạr amarkoren cele gokʼṛokoge bako tahẽkan, onko doń rukhiyạyetʼko tahẽkana." 
Job29:13 Gujukʼ lạgidokʼkan hoṛ hõ ińko bhorạńkan tahẽkana; ar rạnḍi dukhikoakʼ mon doń rạskạ ocoyetʼtako tahẽkana. 
Job29:14 Dhorom do kicricʼ lekań horokʼetʼ tahẽkana, ar bhage bicạr do oyonakʼ ar dạṛhiteakʼ lekage tahẽkana;" 
Job29:15 Kãṛãko lạgitʼ do mẽtʼ ar leḍhako lạgitʼ do jaṅga lekań tahẽkana. 
Job29:16 Reṅgecʼ orecʼko lạgitʼ do eṅga-apageń tahẽkana, ar ạnạṛi hoṛkoakʼ mamblako hõń ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana." 
Job29:17 Dusṭạmi hoṛkoakʼ jambe ḍaṭań coakʼ rạputʼetʼtako tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ moca khon do laga sapʼ akankoń chaḍaoetʼko tahẽkana. 
Job29:18 “Hudisetʼ tahẽkạnạń ińren hoṛko talaregeń gujukʼa, ińakʼ dinko do gitil leka saṅge hoyokʼtińạ;" 
Job29:19 Hudisetʼ tahẽkạnạń ińakʼ rehetʼ do dakʼ hạbicʼ seṭerokʼa, ińakʼ ḍạrko cetan reakʼ sisir dakʼ do goṭa ńindạge tahẽ aṅgakʼa." 
Job29:20 Hudisetʼ tahẽkạnạń hoṛko ṭhen ińakʼ man do nãwãge tahena, ińakʼ akʼ hõ ińakʼ tire nãwãge hoyokʼ tińạ." 
Job29:21 “Hoṛko do ińakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼko ńel horetʼ tahẽkana, ińakʼ sopolha iạteko hapekʼkan tahẽkana." 
Job29:22 Ińiń roṛ tayom do cetʼ kathage bako roṛetʼ tahẽkana; onko ṭhen iń do mạ̃hir salakʼ kathań roṛetʼ tahẽkana. 
Job29:23 Jạṛi dakʼ leka cetʼ lekako ńel hor onkage onko do ińakʼ katha lạgitʼko tạṅgiyetʼ tahẽkana; niron din reakʼ jạṛi dakʼ leka onko do ińakʼ kathako ataṅetʼ tahẽkana. 
Job29:24 Hoṛko secʼ beṅgetʼkateń landa lekan onko doko hahaṛakʼkan tahẽkana; ar ińakʼ landare onko do bhorsako ạikạuetʼ tahẽkana. 
Job29:25 Iń do onkoakʼ horkoń bachao akokan tahẽkana ar onkoren mukhiyạko lekań duṛupʼkan tahẽkana; iń do lạṛhại phạdren raj lekageń tahẽkana; ar homor halaṅetʼ hoṛ do jiwi raṛecʼ iń emakokan tahẽkana. 
Job30:1 “Menkhan ńit okoe do iń khon umerteko komaoge onko do ińko landa-dhutʼạń kana; onkoren apatko do ińren bhiḍi gukʼpiko ar setako tulucʼ dohoko lạgitʼ hoń nihạ̃tletʼkoa. 
Job30:2 Onkoakʼ ti reakʼ daṛe do cetʼ kaj reakʼ hoykokʼtińạ? One okoeyakʼ do bhor jion reakʼ daṛege atʼakantako. 
Job30:3 Reṅgecʼ ar ṭonṭate onkoakʼ hoṛmo do rohoṛ khaḍya akantakoa; onko do khaṅkar otgeko hạmbuṛetʼkana. 
Job30:4 Onko do jhạuạ khon sebelakʼ aṛakʼko sitʼ ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana; onkoakʼ jomakʼ do Rothem dare reakʼ rehetʼge tahẽkana. 
Job30:5 Hoṛkoakʼ somaj khonko laga ńir ocoakana; ar kombṛo hoṛ lekako kikiạukʼkana. 
Job30:6 Rohoṛ gaḍa khorloṅreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana; ar ot reakʼ ghaḍlakʼ ar dhiri cạṭạni reakʼ danderkoreko tahenkan tahẽkana. 
Job30:7 Gajaṛre onko do gadha lekako aḍraoetʼ tahẽkana, seṅgel siń talare mitʼ ṭhenko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Job30:8 Onko do bebuj ar lucạ lamoṭ hoṛren hopon kanako disạm khon onko doko laga ńir ocoakana. 
Job30:9 “Ńitokʼ onkoren hoponko do õṛhẽ sereńte ińko landa-dhutʼạń kana; onko ṭhen do kạhtukgeń hoyakana. 
Job30:10 Hirkhạwạń kanako ar iń khon sạṅgińreko tahenkana; ar mẽtʼãhãre thoạń hõ bako bataoetʼkana. 
Job30:11 Isor doe nijor ocoakadińạ are kạbu akadińạ; iń samaṅrege onko do jhinko capatʼ giḍi akatʼtakoa. 
Job30:12 Jojom ti secʼ khonko tudrạu akadińa, jaṅgako ṭhelao pạsiretʼ tińạ; ar iń bạṛijiń lạgitʼ uphạdko benao akada." 
Job30:13 Onko do ińakʼ horko tạkicʼ darametʼtińạ; onko do jãhãe ṭhen khon begor goṛotege ińko sorbonaseń kana. 
Job30:14 Onko do osar dhasaoakʼ bhit talate daraeko kanako; ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ talate lad ladko hijukʼkana. 
Job30:15 Ạḍi lekan botor doe gherao esetʼ edeńkana; hoe leka onako botor do ińakʼ manotko khudạuetʼtińạ; ar rimil leka ińakʼ bhạlại do oṭaṅentińạ. 
Job30:16 “Iń bhitrire jiwi do bumbhạu oḍokokʼkantińạ; kosṭo reakʼ dinko doko muṭhiạu akadińạ. 
Job30:17 Ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ jaṅkore ạḍi ãṭ hasoyedeń kana; ona togocʼ edeń haso do baṅge thirokʼ kana. 
Job30:18 Dạrun dukte oyonakʼ doe ghinghin akantińạ, kurtạ reakʼ hoṭokʼ lekageye bedhao ạcurediń kana." 
Job30:19 Ona tayom uni do losotʼreye giḍikadińa. Iń do dhuṛi ar torocʼ lekageń hoyakana. 
Job30:20 “E Isor, am ṭheniń rakʼeda, menkhan bam ańjometʼtińạ; teṅgo akanạń ar bam moneyạńkana." 
Job30:21 Am do ińre kurmutạha lekam beohareda; amakʼ daṛeakʼ tite am dom ghạl akadińạ. 
Job30:22 Halaṅ rakapʼkate hoerem aṛakʼ edeńkana; birbão hoere giḍikatem sokocʼ edeńkana. 
Job30:23 Baḍaegeạń am do gujukʼ secʼem idiyedeń kana, sanam jiwetʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ dohoakatʼ ṭhạ̃item idiyedeń kana." 
Job30:24 “Okoeye ńur akan ar kosṭore goṛo ńam lạgitʼe rakʼetʼkan uni do cetʼ jãhãeye ghạl daṛekea? 
Job30:25 Okoe dukreko paṛao akan onko lạgitʼ do cetʼ bạń rakʼleda? Reṅgecʼ orecʼko lạgitʼ do cetʼ jiwi baṅ duklentińạ? 
Job30:26 Menkhan tinre bhạlạiyakʼ iń aslena unre do bạṛicʼakʼge seṭeradińạ; marsal reakʼ iń ńel horetʼ tahẽkana menkhan ńut hecʼạdińạ. 
Job30:27 Iń bhitrire heḍejokʼkana ar baṅge thirokʼkantińạ; sasetokʼ dinko iń samaṅre seṭerakana. 
Job30:28 Iń do dondho akatʼ din leka naṅgal naṅgaliń dãṛãnkana; ar manḍerre teṅgokate goṛoń khojkana. 
Job30:29 Iń do toyokoren boeha ar ũṭ cẽṛẽren gateń hoyakana. 
Job30:30 Ińakʼ harta do chaḍaokʼ ńurokʼkantińạ; ar jaṅ do lolote khạurạ akantińạ. 
Job30:31 Ińakʼ peṛesaṅ khon duk reakʼ saḍe oḍokokʼ kana, ar tiriạ khon do homor halaṅ reakʼ saḍege." 
Job31:1 “Bạṛicʼ monte jãhãe kũạri kuṛi secʼ bạń beṅged iạte iń do ińakʼ mẽtʼ sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobos iń dohokeda. 
Job31:2 Sermaren Isor ṭhen khon manwa do cetʼko ńametʼkana? Sermaren sanam daṛeanicʼ ṭhen uniyakʼ baṅ kuṛại cetʼtae? 
Job31:3 Bedhoromko lạgitʼ jarkharakʼ do cetʼ baṅkana? Ar bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan hoṛko lạgitʼ muhin do cetʼ baṅkana? 
Job31:4 Uni do cetʼ ińakʼ dãṛãnko bae ńeleda? Ińakʼ taṛamko reakʼ cetʼ bae lekhayeda? 
Job31:5 “Sạrigeń meneda, iń do eṛeakʼre bạń dãṛãnkana. Ińakʼ jaṅga do phikir tayomte bae ńir calakʼkana." 
Job31:6 Khạṭi tulạte Isor do ińe soṅeńma, enḍekhane baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń doń miridosgea." 
Job31:7 Bạricʼ horteń taṛam akatʼ khan, ar ińakʼ mẽtʼ do ontore kại ocoakatʼtiń khan, se ińakʼ tire kại reakʼ jãhãn dag lạṭkao akan khan," 
Job31:8 enḍekhan okań er akatʼ ona do eṭakʼ hoṛko jom ma, ińakʼ anaj do rehetʼ sudhạko totʼ giḍikakʼma." 
Job31:9 “Ińakʼ mon do jãhãe maejiu secʼ bulạu akantiń khan, se aḍepaseren hoṛkoakʼ duạr ṭheniń tãṛãkʼ akan khan," 
Job31:10 enḍekhan ińren bạhu do eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ jantegeye ridma, ar eṭakʼ hoṛ do uni tulucʼe giticʼ midokʼma." 
Job31:11 Iń lạgitʼ ona do hirkhạwakʼ kạmikana, bikʼcạrko hotete sạjại ńam lekan kại kana." 
Job31:12 Ona kại do nonkan seṅgel kana oka do Sheol hạbicʼ jolokʼkan, ona do ińakʼ jotowakʼe ḍahao maraoetʼkana." 
Job31:13 “Ińren guti kạ̃ṛmĩko do iń upạrte jãhãn mamblako ạgulere ar ona bicạr chinḍạu lạgitʼ bạń rạjikʼ khan," 
Job31:14 enḍekhan Isor do iń samna sạmni tinreye teṅgona unre cetʼ iń cekaya? Uni do cetʼ roṛ ruạṛ iń emawaea? 
Job31:15 Kukhire okoe ińe benao akadiń, uni do cetʼ onko hõ bae benao akatʼkoa? Uni mitʼ hoṛge cetʼ eṅgatakʼ kukhire bae benao akatʼbona?" 
Job31:16 “Reṅgecʼ orecʼko bạń beṅgetʼ akatʼko khan se rạnḍi maejiukoń as chuṭạu ocoakatʼko khan," 
Job31:17 ińakʼ jomakʼ do ṭũạr amarko baṅ emkate eskargeń jomakatʼ khan! 
Job31:18 Menkhan ińakʼ kom umer khonge ạpuń lekań joton hara akatʼkoa ar ińakʼ janam tayom khonge rạnḍi maejiukoń ńel todarot akatʼkoa- 
Job31:19 Jãhãege kicricʼ khạnḍwạkʼ begorte gujukʼ iń ńel akatʼko khan se laṅgaṭ hoṛko koṭogeń ńel akatʼko khan," 
Job31:20 bhiḍi upʼ reakʼ kicricʼteń lolo ocoakadete uniyakʼ mon bae bhor akawạdiń khan," 
Job31:21 bicạrre ińakʼ ektiạri menakʼ iạte ṭũạr amarko cetanre tiyiń rakapʼ akatʼtiń khan," 
Job31:22 enḍekhan taren khon ińakʼ bale dạbi do ńurokʼtińma, ar ińakʼ sopo do joṛao khon chaḍao ńurokʼma," 
Job31:23 ente iń do Isor emakʼ sạjạiyiń botorakʼ kana; uniyakʼ ṭhonok do nunạkʼge ḍhera, uni botorte onako do ohoń kạmi daṛekea." 
Job31:24 “Sona cetanreń bhorsalen khan, se khạṭi sonań metae, ‘am cetanrege ińakʼ bhorsa do,’" 
Job31:25 ar ińakʼ tite oka dhon-duribiń hameṭ akawan ona dhon iạteń hulạs len khan," 
Job31:26 ar siń cando reakʼ jhak jhak marsal ar ńindạ cando reakʼ terdecʼ secʼ beṅgetʼ akaeyiń tahen khan," 
Job31:27 ar onate ińakʼ ontor do hape hapete unkin secʼ sen akan khan, unkin cokʼakin ńutumte ińakʼ tiyiń cokʼạtiń khan," 
Job31:28 enḍekhan noako hõ ińakʼ sạjại ńam reakʼ kại kana, ente onate sermaren Isor bạń aṅgoc edekana."
