Job31:29 “Ińren bạiriyakʼ duk iạte iń do bạń rạskạlena se uniyakʼ kosṭo oktere hõ bạń kusilena. 
Job31:30 Uniyakʼ jiwi upạrte sarapanakʼ katha menkate ińakʼ moca do bạń kại ocoakatʼtińạ. 
Job31:31 Ińakʼ gharońjren hoṛko do niạ kathageko roṛetʼ tahẽkana, ‘Job emakʼ jelte okoe hale lacʼ do bae bi akatʼtaea?’" 
Job31:32 Jãhãe bidisiạ hoṛ hõ horre do bako tahẽ aṅga akana, ente hortenko lạgitʼ ińakʼ duạr do jao okte jhicʼge tahẽkana." 
Job31:33 Eṭakʼ hoṛko leka kại do bạń danaṅ akatʼtińạ ar ińakʼ monre dos hõ bạń oko dohoakatʼa; 
Job31:34 Onate hoṛko do bạń botorako kan tahẽkana, ińakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ hirkhạ botorte oṛakʼre duṛupʼ hape akae hõ bạń tahẽkana." 
Job31:35 “Hae, ińakʼ katha jãhãeko ańjomletiń khan! Suhikate gohań emetʼkana, ińakʼ katha do sạrikana; ar sanam daṛeanicʼ jemon ińakʼe ańjomtiń, ar ińren bạdi jemon ińakʼ doskoe ol udukʼạń." 
Job31:36 Iń do khạṭige tarenre onań gokʼkea ar mukuṭ lekate bohokʼreń horokʼkea. 
Job31:37 Ińakʼ mimitʼ taṛam reakʼ hisạb uniń emawaea; raj kumar leka iń do uni ṭheniń sorkokʼa. 
Job31:38 “Ińakʼ ot baṛge iń upạrteye rakʼ akatʼ khan ar nahel gaḍako do mẽtʼ dakʼko joroyetʼ khan," 
Job31:39 ar ona reakʼ phosol bin damteń jomakatʼ khan se onḍenko mạlik tulucʼ kurmutạhań beohar akatʼ khan," 
Job31:40 enḍekhan onḍe do guhum bodolte aṭkuṭi janamokʼma. Ar jao bodolte ghãs janamokʼma. Nonḍege jobakʼ katha do mucạtʼ akana. 
Job32:1 Job acʼakʼ mẽtʼre dhorome hudisokʼkante onko pene hoṛ do Job roṛ ruạṛaeko thirena. 
Job32:2 Onate Ram gharońjren Busi hoṛ Barkelren hopon Elihu do Job cetanre ạḍiye raṅgaoena, ente Job do Isor lekage dhorome hudisokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Job32:3 Uni do onko pene gateko cetanre hõ ạḍiye edreyena, ente onko do Jobakʼ katha reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ bako emdaṛeakʼ kan tahẽkanre hõ uniko dusiyede tahẽkana." 
Job32:4 Onko sanamko khon Elihu do umerte komaogeye tahẽkante Job roṛ ruạṛae lạgitʼe ńel horakatʼ tahẽkana. 
Job32:5 Ar onko pene hoṛkoakʼ roṛ ruạṛ reakʼ jãhãnakʼ bạnukʼtakoa menteye ńelketʼ khan uni doe edre seṅgelena. 
Job32:6 Ona iạte Barkelren hopon Elihu doe menkeda, “Ińakʼ umer do komaogea, menkhan ape dope haṛam akana, onate ińakʼ roroṛteakʼ sodor lạgitʼ hõ bạń diletʼ tahẽkana, ente iń doń botorokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Job32:7 Iń doń hudisana, umer ḍherkoge katha doko roṛ ocoge, onkoge ạkil reakʼ sikhạunako emokʼma okoe do ḍherko laha idiakan." 
Job32:8 Sạrige manwa talare jiu do menaegea, ar sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ sahẽtʼge uni doe bujhạu ocoyedekana." 
Job32:9 Eken haṛam hoṛ motoge ạkilan hoṛkanko ona do baṅa, ar ḍher umerankoge bạ̃ṛtiko bujhạua ona hõ baṅa." 
Job32:10 “Ona iạteń meneda, ińakʼ katha ańjomtińpe; ińhõ ińakʼ kathakoń roṛ sodora." 
Job32:11 Apepe galmarao tahẽkanre iń doń ńel horakatʼ tahẽkana. Ar cetʼpe roṛa mente ona reakʼpe ḍunḍhạukan tahẽkanre iń do apeakʼ kathakoń ańjometʼ tahẽkana. 
Job32:12 Iń do apeakʼ katha purạteń moneyakʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan ape modre okoehõ jobakʼ katha do bhul mente bape sạbudletʼtaea; ar katha reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ hõ bape emadea." 
Job32:13 Ar niạ katha hõ alope mena, ‘alele bujhạueda, manwa do baṅ Isorge uni doe bhagao daṛeaea.’" 
Job32:14 Job do iń upạrte jãhãn kathage bae menakada; ape lekanakʼ roṛ ruạṛte iń do bạń roṛ ruạṛaea. 
Job32:15 “E Job, noko doko keklesetʼena, noko do ar roroṛteakʼ cetʼge bạnukʼtakoa; onkoakʼ katha do cabayentakoa." 
Job32:16 Noko do ńitko thir hape akana, roṛ ruạṛ baṅkateko hape utạrkana; iń do cetʼ ńel hor lek kantińạ?" 
Job32:17 Ińhõ ńitokʼ do ińakʼ kathań roṛa, ińakʼ motkoń sodortińạ;" 
Job32:18 ente roroṛteakʼ do ḍhergetińạ, ińren jiu do katha roroṛe uskur edeńkana." 
Job32:19 Ińakʼ bhitri do kumte perecʼ darkha rasa leka kantińạ, nãwã harta reakʼ kum oṛejokʼ leka hoyakantińạ." 
Job32:20 Khalasokʼ lạgitʼ katha roroṛtege hoyokʼtińạ; moca jhicʼkate roṛ ruạṛ hoyokʼtińạ. 
Job32:21 Iń do okoeyakʼ mẽtʼãhã hõ bạń beṅgetʼakʼ kana, se jãhãe manwa hõ bạń jormoṭetʼkoa;" 
Job32:22 Iń do jormoṭko hõ bạń baḍaea; ariń onkae khan ińren sisirjạuicʼ do usạrateye rakapʼ idiyińạ. 
Job33:1 “E job, ńitokʼ do ińakʼ katha ańjomtińme; iń okań men ona moneyakʼme." 
Job33:2 Iń do mocań jhicʼetʼtińạ; Ińakʼ katha ińakʼ alaṅre menakʼa. 
Job33:3 Ińakʼ katha do khạṭi ontor khonge hijukʼkana; iń okań baḍae onage ińakʼ luṭikin doe roṛeda. 
Job33:4 Isorren jiu doe benao akadińạ; ar sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ sahẽtʼ doe jiwetʼ akadińạ. 
Job33:5 Amem daṛeakʼ khan roṛ ruạṛạńme; amakʼ katha sạriạutam ar iń samaṅre teṅgokʼme. 
Job33:6 Isor samaṅre iń ar am dolaṅ somangea; iń hõ hasa khongeń benao akana. 
Job33:7 Ińakʼ toras do bae toras ocomea, ar ińakʼ ota do bae hamal ocomea." 
Job33:8 “Am do iń samaṅrege katham roṛetʼkana; ar okam roṛakatʼ onageń ańjomakada; 
Job33:9 Amem meneda, ‘iń doń saphagea, ińakʼ do jãhãn kạige bạnukʼtińạ; iń doń dhoromgea, ińre jãhãn dosge bạnukʼa." 
Job33:10 Enhõ Isor do ińakʼ doskoe ńam bakʼṛakana; uni do acʼren bạiri menteye hudis edeńkana. 
Job33:11 Hạṛi paṭate ińakʼ jaṅgae toletʼtińạ; ińakʼ sanam horkoe takaoetʼtińạ.’ 
Job33:12 “Ińiń metama, noare do bam ṭhikeda, ente manwa khon Isor doe maraṅgea." 
Job33:13 Cedakʼ uni tulucʼ dom jhogṛakʼ kana manwawakʼ jãhãn katha reakʼ roṛ ruạṛge coṅ bae emokʼ? 
Job33:14 Isor do ạḍi lekate kathae roṛetʼkana enhõ manwa do ona bako bujhạu daṛeakʼkana. 
Job33:15 Kukmũte, ńindạ reakʼ cholre, aṭetʼre acetko jạpitʼkakʼre," 
Job33:16 Unre uni do luture jhicʼetʼtakoa are cehaoetʼkote uni doe botor ocoyetʼkoa," 
Job33:17 jemon manwa do akoakʼ bedhorom kạmi khonko ruạṛokʼ ar bạḍại khonko pharak hijukʼ. 
Job33:18 Nonkate uni do khạndṛuṅ khone or rakapʼetʼkoa, ar tarwaṛe reakʼ maraokʼ khon jiwiye rukhiyạitakoa." 
Job33:19 Manwa do rog iạte hasoteye kosṭokʼ kana; jaṅre uni do jaoge hasoyede kana. 
Job33:20 Onate uni do jomakʼe hirkhạwakʼkana, ar sebel sebel jomakʼ hõ baṅ sebel edekana." 
Job33:21 Uniyakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jel do rohoṛ jalatʼ akantaea; ar jaṅko hõ oḍokʼ akantaea. 
Job33:22 Uniyakʼ moron do jarkharokʼ ṭhen sorokʼkana, uniyakʼ jiwi do gujukʼ gogocʼko ṭhen sorakana." 
Job33:23 “Mitʼṭen serma goḍet uni lạgitʼe tahen, hajar goḍetko talare mitʼṭen roṛ dodokʼicʼe tahen uni lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ṭhikkan ona jạhirae lạgitʼ," 
Job33:24 enḍekhan uni cetanre dayakateye men, ‘Sheolte pheḍ calakʼ khon rukhiyạyem; iń do uni iạte chaḍao reakʼ damiń ńamakada.’" 
Job33:25 Uniyakʼ hoṛmo do juạn leka arhõ hoyokʼtaea; juạn jokhecʼ reakʼ daṛege uni doe ńam ruạṛa. 
Job33:26 Uni do Isor ṭhene koejoṅa ar uni doe dayawaea; uni do Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã ńelte rạskạteye andoṛa; Isor do miridos halotreye ruạṛ ạguyea. 
Job33:27 Unre uni do manwa ṭhen hecʼkateye mena, ‘iń doń kạileda ar sojheakʼ doń peṛtaleda, menkhan ińakʼ paona sạjại do bạń ńamleda." 
Job33:28 Sheolte calakʼ hor khon uni doe chaḍao akadińạ; ińakʼ jiwi do marsale ńeljoṅa. 
Job33:29 “Isor do manwa iạte barpe dome onkayeda," 
Job33:30 jemon uniyakʼ jiwi do Sheol khon ruạṛ hijukʼtaea ar uni cetanre jiwetʼko reakʼ marsal paṛaoaea. 
Job33:31 “E Job, moneyakʼme ar ińakʼ katha atentińme hape akae tahenme, adoń roṛa." 
Job33:32 Mementeakʼ jãhãnakʼ menakʼtam khan tobe do lạiyạńme; ente dhorom ṭarhaome lạgitʼgeń monejoṅkana. 
Job33:33 Amakʼ jãhãn roṛteakʼ bạnukʼ khan tobe do ańjomme; ar hape akae tahenme, iń do ạkil reakʼ iń cetʼama.”" 
Job34:1 Ona tayom Elihuye menkeda," 
Job34:2 “E ạkilan hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe; E bujhạntar hoṛko, ińakʼ katha luturakʼtińpe." 
Job34:3 Alaṅ cetʼ leka jomakʼkoe cakha ạikạuetʼkan onkage hoṛkoakʼ lại-kathako biḍạu aṭkarpe. 
Job34:4 Dela bon bachao joṅma, okaṭakʼ do ṭhikakʼ kana; ar okaṭakʼ do bhageakʼ kana mente." 
Job34:5 “Job doe meneda, ‘iń doń miridosgea, menkhan Isor do hok reakʼ bae bicạr akatʼtińạ." 
Job34:6 Hokre minạńre hõ eṛe roroṛicʼ iń lekhakʼ kana; ar bạń dos akatʼre hõ bạń bogekʼ lekań ghạl akana.’ 
Job34:7 Job leka cetʼ jãhãe menaea okoe do dakʼ ńu bikʼ leka ṭiṭkạriye ńamakatʼ? 
Job34:8 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi akatʼ uni do onko sãoteye calakʼkana; uni do dusṭạmi hoṛkoren gateye hoyokʼkana. 
Job34:9 Uni doe meneda, ‘Isor kusi ocoye do manwa lạgitʼ jãhãn labge bạnukʼa.’" 
Job34:10 “Onatege E bujan hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Isor khon bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi do sahaṛ akae baṛe tahenma." 
Job34:11 Manwa do acʼakʼ kạmi lekageye halawaea; ar acʼakʼ colon lekage kuṛạiye emakataea. 
Job34:12 Isor do tishõ bae bedhoromeda, sanam daṛeanicʼ do tishõ hok bae peṛta ocowakʼa." 
Job34:13 Dhạrti reakʼ bhar do cetʼ jãhãe uniye emakawadea? Goṭa pirthimi ńel todarot reakʼ kạmire cetʼ jãhãe uniye dohoakadea? 
Job34:14 Uni do eken acʼakʼ kathageye hudisle khan ar acʼren jiu ar sahẽtʼ do acʼ ṭhengeye ruạṛ idile khan," 
Job34:15 enḍekhan sanam jiwiyanko do mitʼ domteko maraokokʼa, onko do arhõ dhuṛiteko ruạṛ calaokokʼa." 
Job34:16 “Buj menakʼtape khan tobe do ińakʼ katha ańjomtińpe; ar ińakʼ kathako luturakʼpe. 
Job34:17 Dhorom bikʼcạricʼ do cetʼ bae ḍanṭao daṛekekoa? Ape do cetʼ dhorom ar ektiạranicʼpe bicạr dusi daṛekea? 
Job34:18 Uni do rajkoe metakokana, ‘ape dope okoḍagea,’ ar disạm cakʼlaoko doe metakokana, ‘ape do dusṭạmiko kanape.’" 
Job34:19 Uni do rapajkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã bae beṅgetʼatako kana, nacarko bạgi giḍikate kisạ̃ṛko maraṅ mente bae moneyako kana, ente onko jotoge uniyakʼ ti teakʼ kạmiko kangeako." 
Job34:20 Mitʼ ripitʼregeko gujukʼkana, ar tala ńindạgeko gujukʼkana; arko dal dalao ocolen khan onko doko marao utạrokʼa. Jãhãe jãhãnakʼ bako kạmire hõ daṛeanko doko gujukʼkana." 
Job34:21 “Isorakʼ mẽtʼ do hoṛakʼ horkorege menakʼtaea; onkoakʼ mimitʼ taṛamko uni doe ńeletʼtakoa. 
Job34:22 Nonkan jãhãn ńutakʼ ṭhạ̃i se dạriạ umul hõ bạnukʼa one onare bạṛicʼ kạmikan hoṛko oko daṛekokʼ. 
Job34:23 Manwawakʼ bicạr lạgitʼ Isor do jãhãn khoj khobor reakʼ jạruṛge bạnukʼtaea; 
Job34:24 Begor suṭhiktege daṛeanko doe chaka chunetʼkoa ar onkoakʼ ṭhạ̃ire eṭakʼkoe dohoyetʼkoa. 
Job34:25 Uni do onkoakʼ kạmi reakʼ hisạbkoe dohoyetʼte ńindạ jokhecʼgeye maraoetʼkoa ar onko doko dhaṅ dhaser utạrokʼkana. 
Job34:26 Onkoakʼ dusṭạmi iạte sanamko samaṅreye sạjạikoa," 
Job34:27 ente onko do uniyakʼ hor khonko sahaṛ akana; uniyakʼ jãhãn hukumge bako moneyakʼ kana. 
Job34:28 Onkoakʼ santao iạte reṅgecʼ hoṛkoakʼ rakʼ do uni samaṅre seṭerokʼkana; uni do laṅgaṭkoakʼ rakʼ joṅakʼe ańjometʼtakoa. 
Job34:29 Hape akane tahẽlenre hõ okoege uni do bako dusi daṛelea; Mocae jhicʼletaere hõ uni do celege bako ńel ńamea. Enhõ uni do manwa ar jạtrenko cetanreye tahẽnkana," 
Job34:30 jemon Isor baṅ botoraekan hoṛ do aloko raj daṛeakʼ ar hoṛ sapʼko lạgitʼ jhãmpa aloko oḍao daṛeakʼ. 
Job34:31 “Jãhãe hoṛge Isor do bako men akawadea, ‘iń do sạjạiyiń ńamakada, ar bạń behoka;" 
Job34:32 Iń oka bạń ńel orometʼ ona cetʼạńme; ariń behokʼ akatʼ khan, ona do ar bạń onkaea.’" 
Job34:33 Am do Isorem nihạ̃t giḍi akade khan Isor do cetʼ amakʼ sana leka kuṛạiye emama? Ṭarhao tahen do amakʼ kạmikana, ińakʼ do baṅa; onatege amakʼ monejoṅakʼem sodortama." 
Job34:34 “Budan hoṛ do ińko mitạń kana, ạkilan hoṛ do ińakʼ katha ańjomkateko meneda," 
Job34:35 ‘Job do bin bujte kathae roṛetʼkana, uniyakʼ kathare jãhãn ạkilakʼge bạnukʼtaea.’" 
Job34:36 Jobakʼ biḍạu do purạte hoylen khan bhage hoykokʼa, ente uni do dusṭạmi hoṛko leka kathae roṛetʼkana." 
Job34:37 Uniyakʼ kại sãote uni do hul hõe huletʼkana; uni do abo samaṅre Isore henostawae kana ar Isor upạrte ạḍi lekan kathakoe roṛetʼkana.” 
Job35:1 Ona tayom Elihuye menkeda," 
Job35:2 “Amem meneda Isor samaṅre am dom miridosgea, ona katha do cetʼ ṭhikgem hudisetʼ kana?" 
Job35:3 Am do unim metaekana, ‘noate ińakʼ lab do cetʼ? Bạń ghạṭ akatʼ khan iń do cetʼ onań ńama?’" 
Job35:4 “Iń do am ar amren gateko niạ roṛ ruạṛakoń khojkana. 
Job35:5 Serma secʼ beṅgedpe ar; ńelpe, rimil do tinạkʼ coṭre menakʼa mente." 
Job35:6 Amem kại lekhan Isorakʼ do cetʼ jãhãnakʼ hoyokʼtaea? Amakʼ ghạṭko ḍherlenre hõ uniyakʼ baṅ cetʼ cekakʼtae? 
Job35:7 Miridosem hoylen khan uniyakʼ do cetʼ jãhãn upkạr hoyokʼtaea? Amakʼ ti khon uni do cetʼge bae khojkana. 
Job35:8 Amakʼ dusṭạmi do eken manwawakʼgeye khutiya. Ar amakʼ dhorom do eken onkogeye bhạlạikoa. 
Job35:9 “Jor julumko iạte hoṛko doko rakʼetʼkana; ar daṛeankoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼko nehõrokʼ kana. 
Job35:10 Menkhan okoehõ bako meneda, ‘ińren sisirjạuicʼ Isor do okare menaea, okoe do ńindạ jokhecʼ rạskạ sereńe danạńkan?" 
Job35:11 Dhạrtiren janwarko khon uni do aboge ḍher sikhnạte emabon kana ar coṭren cẽṛẽko khon ḍherge ạkile dan abon kana.’ 
Job35:12 Hoṛko tinreko rakʼae kana unre uni do bae ańjometʼtakoa, ente onko do bạḍại ar dusṭạmiteko perecʼgea." 
Job35:13 Onkoakʼ koejoṅre jãhãn labge bạnukʼa, ente Isor do ona bae ańjomtakoa; sanam daṛeanicʼ do mone hõ bae moneyako kana." 
Job35:14 Am dom meneda, uni bam ńel ńame kana, amakʼ mambla do uni samaṅrege menakʼa, ar ona reakʼ bicạr lạgitʼem ńel hohorkana." 
Job35:15 Am do arhõm meneda, uni do edrete sạjại bae emokʼa ar dusṭạmi secʼ do beṅgetʼ hõ bae beṅgeda." 
Job35:16 Ona iạte Job do ạuṛiyakʼ kathae roṛeda; uni do begor baḍaete aema kathae roṛetʼkana.” 
Job36:1 Elihu do arhoe roṛ idikeda," 
Job36:2 “Isor ńutumte iń do arhõ roṛteakʼ menakʼtińạ; ar thoṛa sahao hataṛme, adoń jạhirama." 
Job36:3 Iń do ḍher sạṅgiń khon ạkiliń hameṭ akawana; ińren sisirjạuicʼ do dhorom menteń sạbudea. 
Job36:4 Sạri kathageń roṛetʼa, ińakʼ kathare eṛeakʼ do bạnukʼa; am samaṅre ạkilte perecʼ mitʼ hoṛ menaea." 
Job36:5 “Isor doe jorangea, menkhan manwa do bae nihạ̃tetʼkoa; acʼakʼ buj reakʼ daṛereye jorangea." 
Job36:6 Uni do dusṭạmiko jiwetʼ bae dohoyetʼkoa menkhan okoeko santao ocokʼkan onko do hok reakʼe bicạretʼtakoa. 
Job36:7 Dhorom hoṛko khon acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bae ocokʼeda; uni do rapajko sãote siṅghạsonre onkoe duṛupʼetʼkoa ar jaejug lạgitʼe usul ocoyetʼkoa. 
Job36:8 Menkhan hoṛ do kại iạte sikṛiteko tol ocokʼ kana ar duk reakʼ baberte hõko tol ocokʼ kana," 
Job36:9 uni do onkoakʼ kạmiko ar ghạṭkoe udukʼako kana, cetʼleka gorbokʼ tulucʼko kạiyetʼkana mente." 
Job36:10 Uni do sudhrạukʼ lạgitʼ sopolhae emakokana ar bạṛicʼ khon mon ạcur lạgitʼe hukumako kana. 
Job36:11 Onko do uniyakʼ bataotaete uniko sewawae, enḍekhan onkoakʼ sarecʼ jion do bhạlạiteko khemaoa ar bochorko do suktege." 
Job36:12 Menkhan onko bako ańjom, enḍekhan tarwaṛeteko marao ocokʼa ar bebuj lekako gujukʼa." 
Job36:13 “Isor baṅ botorae hoṛ do raṅgaoko dohoyeda; uniye tolleko khan hõ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ do bako guhera. 
Job36:14 Juạn tahen okterege onko doko gujukʼa, ar mundilren herel kusumbi talaregeko gujukʼa." 
Job36:15 Nacarko do akoakʼ nacar dosa hoteteye rukhiyạyetʼkoa ar onkoakʼ duk hotetege onkoakʼ lutur doe jhicʼetʼtakoa. 
Job36:16 “Uni do kosṭo tala khon oḍok ạgumeye khojkana; ar nonkan phaelao ṭhạ̃iteye idimea okare jãhãn tạkicʼakʼge baṅ tahen. Onḍe amakʼ ṭebil do bhage bhage jomakʼte perecʼ tahena. 
Job36:17 Menkhan ńitokʼ do bedhorom hoṛkoakʼ bicạrtem perecʼgea; onate sạjại ar hok reakʼ bicạrkine sapʼakatʼmea. 
Job36:18 Men sontorokʼme amakʼ raṅgao iạte amakʼ dhon-durib bhul horte aloe bulạu idime; ar okaṭakʼem bhul akatʼ ona do bạṛicʼ horte aloe ḍheka idimema. 
Job36:19 Amakʼ dhon-durib se amakʼ sanam ektiạriko do cetʼ duk khone rukhiyạ daṛeama? 
Job36:20 Ona ńindạ reakʼ do alom asokʼa ona jokhecʼ hoṛ doko gujukʼa. 
Job36:21 Sontor akae tahenme, bạṛicʼ secʼ alom ạcurokʼa, ente kosṭo khon bạṛicʼakʼgem bachao akawana." 
Job36:22 “Isorakʼ daṛe do maraṅgea. Uni lekan cecetʼ icʼ do ar okoe menaea? 
Job36:23 Okoe uni doe sudhrạu daṛekea se uniye men daṛekea, ‘am dom behok akada?’" 
Job36:24 Uniyakʼ kạmi reakʼ sarhao do alom hiṛińa; sereń talatege coṅ manwa ma uniyakʼ kạmiye sarhaoetʼtae. 
Job36:25 Sanam manwa do uniyakʼ kạmiko ńeletʼkana, menkhan onko do sạṅgiń khonge onako ạribạndhiyeda." 
Job36:26 Isor doe maraṅgea menkhan abo do babon bujhạu orom daṛeae kana. Uniyakʼ umer baṅ tinạkʼ ona do ohoge bon baḍae daṛelea. 
Job36:27 “Uni do dakʼ reakʼ ṭhopkoe or rakapʼeda, uni do kuṛhạ khon dakʼe cuạu oḍokeda." 
Job36:28 Rimil do onae upʼ gotʼkakʼ kana, ar manwa cetanre jạṛi dakʼ do ńurokʼkana." 
Job36:29 Okoeye bujhạu daṛekea cetʼlekate uni do rimile pasnao akada? Se uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khone huḍur ocoyeda? 
Job36:30 Uni do acʼ beṛhaete kuṛhạye pasnaoeda ar buruko reakʼ muthnikoe dapaleda. 
Job36:31 Noakote uni do jạt jạtrenkoe bicạretʼkoa ar asambheṛ jomakʼe emako kana. 
Job36:32 Uni do acʼakʼ tite bijliye sapʼetʼkana ar nisạnre jhãp emokʼ lạgitʼ onae hukumakʼkana. 
Job36:33 Sanḍ do uni reakʼe jạhiretʼkana; one uni ghạṭ upạrte raṅgaoteye jaljalaokʼkan. 
Job37:1 “Iń do botorteń thar tharaokʼ kana ińakʼ ontor do dhak dhakaokʼ kantińạ. 
Job37:2 Ańjompe, uniyakʼ aṛaṅ reakʼ gondraokʼ; uniyakʼ moca khon oka saḍe oḍokokʼkan ona ańjompe." 
Job37:3 Goṭa serma latarre ar dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ bijli do malkaokʼ kana. 
Job37:4 Ona tayom uniyakʼ aṛaṅ do hạnḍrạukʼtaea; huḍuretʼ kanae mahatto reakʼ aṛaṅtae. Acʼakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomlentaere, bijli malkaokʼ do bae akoṭ ruạṛeda." 
Job37:5 Isor do hahaṛageye aṛaṅeda; uni do napṛakʼakʼkoe kạmikana one oka do babo bujhạu daṛeakʼkan. 
Job37:6 Ente him doe metakʼ kana, ‘pirthimire ńurokʼme,’ Ar dakʼ doe metakʼ kana, ‘jhomorate dagme.’" 
Job37:7 Mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ acʼakʼ kạmi khone thirakana, jemon sanam manwa do uniyakʼ kạmi reaṅko baḍae daṛeakʼ." 
Job37:8 Unre janwarko do danderteko bolokʼa; ar khorloṅkoreko mạnḍiạukʼa. 
Job37:9 Birbao hoe do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ khone oḍok hijukʼa, ar rabaṅ do hoete oṭaṅ hijukʼ kana." 
Job37:10 Isorakʼ sahẽtʼ khon borop do janamokʼ kana ar phaelao dakʼ do sạkitʼ keṭejokʼ kana. 
Job37:11 Uni do dạriạ rimilkore dakʼe perecʼeda; ar bijli do rimil bhitriteye calaoetʼ kana. 
Job37:12 Uniyakʼ hukumte rimilko do ạcur baṛaekana, uniyakʼ ạcurte ona do goṭa dhạrti ạcur baṛaekana." 
Job37:13 Manwa sạjại emako lạgitʼ se uniyakʼ dhạrtire dakʼ emakʼ lạgitʼ, se acʼakʼ dulạṛ udug lạgitʼ uni do jạṛi dakʼe emetʼ kana." 
Job37:14 “E Job, noa luturakʼme; teṅgo thirkate Isorakʼ hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ katha moneyakʼme." 
Job37:15 Baḍaeam cetʼ leka Isor do rimile ḍanṭaoeda ar cetʼ leka bijliko doe malkao ocoyeda? 
Job37:16 Baḍaeam cekate rimilko do sepeń ṭarhao akana? Purạ puri bidiạwanicʼ reakʼ hahaṛa kạmikoge? 
Job37:17 Dạkhin reakʼ hoe tinre disạmre guṛumokʼ kana unre amakʼ kicricʼko do urgumem bujhạueda. 
Job37:18 Chańcre dulakʼ ạrsi leka keṭecʼakʼ okaṭakʼ rimil ona do cetʼ Isor sãotem pasnao daṛeakʼa? 
Job37:19 “Lạiyaleme uni cetʼle metaea mente; alele bebujgete aleakʼ katha do bale baḍae oco daṛeae kana. 
Job37:20 Cetʼ unile lạiyaea, ińiń roṛa mente; jãhãe manwae khojkea, utʼ ocokʼae mente?" 
Job37:21 Hoete rimil saphakate siń cando tinreye jhalkaokʼ kana unre manwa do uni secʼ bako beṅgetʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Job37:22 Utạr secʼ khon sonali ṭhonok do hijukʼ kana; uni beṛhaete botoranakʼ ṭhonok ńelokʼkana. 
Job37:23 Sanam daṛeanicʼ do babo ńam daṛeaea; daṛe ar hokre uni doe maraṅgea, asambheṛ dhorom iạte bae santaoa." 
Job37:24 Ona iạte manwa do uniko botorae kana; ar okoe apnarte ạkilanko hudisotʼkan onko do bae beṅgetʼ ako kana.” 
Job38:1 Unre Probhu Isor do birbão hoe khon Jobe roṛ ruạṛadea. Uniye menkeda," 
Job38:2 “Okoe kanae uni do, one uni bin bujan reakʼ kathate ińakʼ goṭawakʼteye tạkijokʼ kan?" 
Job38:3 Am do herel leka ḍanḍa paṭheytam; iń do amiń kulimea arem roṛ ruạṛạńạ. 
Job38:4 Dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼ iń benao jokhecʼ am do okarem tahẽkana? Amakʼ bud menakʼ khan enḍekhan lạiyạńme. 
Job38:5 Amem baḍaea ona reakʼ jokha baber do okoeye bandhao akada? Ar okoe ona cetante jokha baber doe ticʼakada? 
Job38:6 Cetʼ cetanre dhạrti reakʼ tham khunṭiko do bitʼ ṭarhao akana? Uniyakʼ konac reakʼ dhiri do okoeye bạisại akada? 
Job38:7 Unre setakʼren ipilko do mitʼ sãoteko sereńleda ar serma goḍetko do rạskạteko anḍoṛleda. 
Job38:8 “Jalapuri do tinre dhạrti reakʼ kukhi khon oḍok hecʼlena unre duạr reakʼ kapaṭ do okoeye siń esetʼleda? 
Job38:9 Unre rimil do uniyakʼ oyonakʼ iń hoyocoleda, ar kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutre gendrecʼteń bedhaoledea." 
Job38:10 Ińge ona reakʼ simạ doń ṭhik doholeda; ona reakʼ kapaṭ ar huṛkạṛkoń lagaoada. 
Job38:11 Ińiń menleda, ‘nonḍe hạbicʼgem hijukʼa, ar laha secʼ do baṅ; nonḍege amakʼ dhomok ḍheoko do thirokʼtama." 
Job38:12 “Am do jãhãtis setakʼem hukum akawadea se aṅga marsal do uniyakʼ horem udukʼ akawadea," 
Job38:13 jemon uni do pirthimi reakʼ ańcar sapʼkate bạṛicʼko onḍe khone koṭa ńur daṛeako? 
Job38:14 Hasare chapkate cetʼ leka ona do pheraokʼkan, onkage siń reakʼ marsal do buru boṭkocʼko kicricʼ lekae bhańj ocoyeda." 
Job38:15 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ marsal doe ĩṛĩcʼ ocoyeda, ar onkoakʼ epel akatʼ ti do rạpudokʼ kana." 
Job38:16 “Jalapuri reakʼ jharnako ṭhen cetʼem bolo akana, se doreão reakʼ tulirem dãṛã akada?" 
Job38:17 Moron reakʼ duạrako dom ńel ocoakana? Ona ńut reakʼ jaega do cetʼem ńelakada? 
Job38:18 Prithimi reakʼ phaelaotetʼem bujhạu tiyạkʼ akada? Ar niạko reakʼem baḍae khan ma lạiyạńme. 
Job38:19 “Marsal thamgạḍikʼ ṭhạ̃i senakʼ hor do okare menakʼa? Ar ńut reakʼ tahen jaega hõ okare menakʼa? 
Job38:20 Am do cetʼ onkoakʼ oṛakʼte onkoakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ite onkom idi daṛeakoa? Onkoakʼ oṛakʼ calakʼ reakʼ hor do cetʼem baḍaegea? 
Job38:21 Am do khạṭigem baḍaea, ente unrem janam akan tahẽkana. Ar amakʼ do ḍher umer hoyakan tama." 
Job38:22 “Am do cetʼ him reakʼ murạirem bolo akana se arel reakʼ murạikom ńel akada? 
Job38:23 Onako do gạr jokhecʼ lạgitʼ iń jogao dohoakada, ona do khanḍa khạnḍi ar lạṛhại reakʼ din lạgitʼ iń jogao dohoakada." 
Job38:24 Oka ṭhạ̃i khon marsal bamberokʼ, se oka khon pirthimire purub reakʼ hoe hijukʼ ona ṭhạ̃i do okare menakʼa?" 
Job38:25 Jhomor dakʼ ar huḍur bijli lạgitʼ do okoeye hor akada," 
Job38:26 jemon hoṛ bạnukʼko disạmre dakʼe jạṛi, one hahaṅkar jaegare celege bako tahen onḍeye dag." 
Job38:27 Jemon ujạṛakʼ jarkhar jaegakoe tirpit ocoy, ar onḍe do ghãs janamokʼ?" 
Job38:28 Jạṛi dakʼren apat do cetʼ menaegea? Sisir dakʼ reakʼ ṭhopʼ do okoeye janam ocoakada? 
Job38:29 Okoeyakʼ kukhi khon him do hijukʼ kana? Ar serma reakʼ rataṅ do okoeye janam ocoakada? 
Job38:30 Dakʼ do dhiri leka saṭkaokʼ kana, Ar doreão reakʼ cetantetʼ do sạkidokʼ kana." 
Job38:31 “Sorenko reakʼ cumkạkʼ ipil dom tol doho daṛekekoa? Se arãṛ lalakʼko reakʼ thokem jhiṅgạl saṅgal daṛekea? 
Job38:32 Manḍer ipilko do cetʼ okte okterem ạyur oḍok daṛekekoa? Buḍhi parkom ar ona soṅgetenko do cetʼem tiyạkʼ oḍok daṛekekoa? 
Job38:33 Am do cetʼ serma reakʼ ạn ạrikom baḍaegea? Dhạrtire cetʼ ona reakʼ ạn ạrikom bandhao daṛekea? 
Job38:34 “Am do cetʼ rimil hạbicʼ amakʼ aṛaṅem rakapʼ ocodaṛeakʼa jemon jạṛi dakʼ ḍher jhomore ãṛgoam? 
Job38:35 Bijli do cetʼ acʼakʼ hortem kol daṛekea? Uni do cetʼ noae metama, ‘nonḍege minạńa mente’?" 
Job38:36 Kạriḍaṅ rimilkore ạkil do okoeye ematʼa, ar kuṛhạkore buj hõ okoeye emakawada?" 
Job38:37 Budte okoe rimil doe lekha daṛeakʼa? Ar serma reakʼ kanḍa do okoeye dũṛũcʼ daṛekea," 
Job38:38 jemon dhuṛiko laṭkao midokʼte ḍhelakko hõ jemṭhe midokʼ kan? 
Job38:39 “Dhạcri kul do tinre gaṛreye giticʼ tahena se gajaṛre tãṛãkʼ akane tahena, unre kul eṅga do cetʼ amgem sendra gocʼ ạguae kana ar reṅgecʼ jokhecʼ dhạcri kul do jomakʼem emae kana?" 
Job38:40  
Job38:41 Bhonḍa kạhuren hoponko tinre Isor ṭhenko rakʼeda ar jomakʼ lạgitʼ hante nateko ạcur baṛaekana, unre okoe onko do jomakʼe kulạu ako kana?" 
Job39:1 “Bururen meromakʼ busạgokʼ okte dom baḍaegea? Ar jel eṅgako bedonokʼ dom ńelakada? 
Job39:2 Onkoakʼ lacʼre tinạkʼ dinko tahen ona dom lekha akada? Onkoakʼ janam okte dom baḍaegetakoa? 
Job39:3 Onko do burumkate hoponko busạkʼetʼkoa ar busạkʼ reakʼ bedon do cabakʼ kantakoa. 
Job39:4 Onkoren hoponko doko harakʼ kana ar khulạ jaegareko daṛe idikʼ kana; onko do eṅgat ṭhen khonko calakʼ kana, ar bako ruạṛ kana." 
Job39:5 “Bir gadha do okoe sạdhine aṛakʼ akawadea? Okoe uniyakʼ tonol doe raṛa akatʼtaea? 
Job39:6 Iń do hahaṅkar ṭhạ̃i iń emakawadea uniyakʼ oṛakʼ mente, ar judạ judạ jaegare tahen oṛakʼ hõń emakawadea." 
Job39:7 Uni do nagraha reakʼ gulmal bae kusiyakʼ kana, ar sagaṛ lagayicʼakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅ hõ uni do bae ańjomeda." 
Job39:8 Uniyakʼ ạtiń jaega do buru ṭoṭhakore; onḍe uni do hạriạṛakʼkoe sendra joṅ kana. 
Job39:9 “Birren sanḍ ḍaṅgra do am ṭhen golam khaṭaokʼe rạjikʼgea? Uni do cetʼ amakʼ goṛa ḍakaḍakʼ ṭhene tahẽ aṅgakʼa? 
Job39:10 Arãṛ reakʼ baberte nahel reakʼ gaḍarem tol daṛekea? Uni do am lạgitʼ cetʼ lodamreye caskea? 
Job39:11 Uniyakʼ asambheṛ daṛe iạte uni cetanrem bhorsakʼa? Amakʼ hamal kạmi do cetʼ unim kạmi ocoaea? 
Job39:12 Pạtiạuae kangeam ruạṛ hecʼamae mente, ar khạrạire anajkoe samṭaoama mente?" 
Job39:13 “Ũṭ cẽṛẽ do rạskạte phạ̃kṛạ̃ke ḍhapʼ ḍhapʼetʼaea, menkhan cetʼ ona do dulạṛ reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ ar il kana?" 
Job39:14 Ũṭ cẽṛẽ do otreko bele giḍikakʼ kana ar hasarege ona do urgumokʼ kana; 
Job39:15 Bae hudiseda ona do jaṅgakote lebetʼ gejerokʼtaea mente se jãhãn bir janwarkoakʼ jaṅgate onako do kolsa posagokʼa. 
Job39:16 Acʼren hoponko sãote begor mãyãteye beohara, baṅma onko do acʼrenko baṅkana; uni do hudis hõ bae hudisa, acʼakʼ khaṭaokʼakʼ do ạuṛiyakʼ hoedaṛeakʼtaea mente," 
Job39:17 ente Isor do ạkil bae em akawadea se bujhạu daṛe hõ bae em akawadea. 
Job39:18 Enhõ uni do tinre phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼe ḍhap ḍhapʼetʼtaea unre sadom ar uniren aswariye landa ạkin kana. 
Job39:19 “Sadom do cetʼ amge daṛem emakawadea? Hoṭokʼ reakʼ dhạcri do cetʼ amgem emakawadea? 
Job39:20 Pohoko leka am dom don ocoyedea? Uniyakʼ ṭhonok hinhinạukʼ do torasakʼ kangea. 
Job39:21 Uni doe paskayeda ar acʼakʼ daṛetegeye rạskạkʼ kana ar lạṛhại jokhecʼ do akromon lạgitʼe lahakʼ kana. 
Job39:22 Uni do torase landawakʼ kana, ar bae botorokʼ kana; tarwaṛe samaṅ khon uni do bae comkaokʼ kana." 
Job39:23 Uniyakʼ sar dohowakʼ ṭhoṅga do rokoṛ rokoṛokʼ kana, borsa ar borlom hõ jhak jhakoakʼ kantaea." 
Job39:24 Uni do khaṭpaṭao ar kãucạ kạuci ote lakopʼ idiyeda, ar sakwa saḍelenre bae teṅgo thir daṛeakʼ kana." 
Job39:25 Sakwa reakʼ saḍe soṅge soṅgete uni do muteye saḍeyeda; ar sạṅgiń khon lạṛhại reakʼ base ńametʼ kana uni do subedarkoakʼ hạnḍrạu ar lạṛhại reakʼ saḍegeye ańjomeda. 
Job39:26 Amakʼ budte cetʼ ṭirmuṭi cẽṛẽ doe uḍạukʼ kana ar dạkhin secʼ calakʼ lạgitʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼkine laplapayeda? 
Job39:27 Amakʼ hukumtege cetʼ pajhaṛ do coṭreye manḍrao baṛae kana ar usul jaegare acʼakʼ tukại benaoeda? 
Job39:28 Uni do usul cạṭạini cetanreye basokʼ kana ar ńindạ do ona reakʼ cuṛạreye tahenkana. Ona cuṛạ kangea uniyakʼ gaṛ do. 
Job39:29 Onḍe khon uni do jomakʼe sendrayeda; uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do sạṅgiń khon sikạre ńel ńameda. 
Job39:30 Uniren hoponko do mãyãmreko jembedokʼ kana; ar jãhãrege gocʼko tahen onḍege uni doe tahẽnkana.” 
Job40:1 Probhu Isor do Job arhõe metadea," 
Job40:2 “Sanam daṛean tulucʼ okoeye reṭepeṭekʼkan uni do cetʼ uniye sudhrạuea? Isor tulucʼ okoeye reṭepeṭekʼkan unige roṛ ruạṛe emokʼma.” 
Job40:3 Unre Job do Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛadea," 
Job40:4 “Iń doń be lekgea, iń do cekateń roṛ ruạṛama? Iń do mocayiń tobetʼ hape akatʼtińạ." 
Job40:5 Iń do mitʼ dhaoiń roṛakada, menkhan roṛ ruạṛ reakʼ cetʼge bạnukʼtińạ; dosar dhaoiń roṛakada, menkhan ar cetʼge bạń roṛa.”" 
Job40:6 Unre Probhu Isor do birbão khon Jobe metadea," 
Job40:7 “Herel hoṛ leka ḍanḍa paṭhe keṭejokʼme; iń do amiń kulimea arem roṛ ruạṛạńạ. 
Job40:8 Am do cetʼ ińakʼ bicạrem bhoṭetʼtińa? Ińgem dusiyediń kante cetʼ am do dhoromem ṭarhaokʼ kana? 
Job40:9 Amakʼ do cetʼ Isor leka daṛe menakʼtama? Uniyakʼ aṛaṅ lekam hạnḍrạukʼ daṛeakʼa? 
Job40:10 Enḍekhan ńitokʼ do ṭhosok ar mante sajokʼme, mạhima ar ṭhonok horokʼ joṅme." 
Job40:11 Amakʼ botoranakʼ edre baṛe bumbhạu oḍokme; ar mitʼke mitʼ bạḍại hoṛ beṅgetʼ pheḍakome ar kiṛdhum ocokome. 
Job40:12 Mitʼke mitʼ bạḍại hoṛ beṅgetʼ pheḍakome ar copotʼ ocokom; ar bedhoromko do akoakʼ ṭhạ̃irege lebetʼ gańjaokom. 
Job40:13 Onko sanamkoge dhuṛire topa oko dohokom; ar mẽtʼãhã do patalre tolkatakom. 
Job40:14 Enḍekhan iń do amiń aṅgocmea, amakʼ daṛege am doe rukhiyạmea." 
Job40:15 “Dakʼ sadom beṅgetʼaeme, am sãote uni hõń benao akadea; uni do ḍaṅgra leka ghãse joma." 
Job40:16 Uniyakʼ daṛe do ḍanḍarege! Ar lacʼ reakʼ sirkoge uniyakʼ jor do! 
Job40:17 Debdạru dare lekae canḍbol do keṭecʼgetaea; dhaṛa reakʼ paṭ sirko hõ baj mitʼgetaea. 
Job40:18 Uniyakʼ jaṅko do pitạl reakʼ nuli leka, ar pańjra reakʼ jaṅko do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ ṭheṅga leka." 
Job40:19 Isorakʼ sirjạuakʼko modre uni doe sorosicʼ kana; uniren sisirjạuicʼge eken uniye gocʼ daṛeaea. 
Job40:20 Burure oka janamokʼ onage uni doe jomeda, ar sanam bir janwarko do onḍegeko enecʼ joṅ kana." 
Job40:21 Poraini jhạuạ latarre uni doe burum akana; ar suṛạ gajaṛ ar dalahireye danaṅ akana. 
Job40:22 Poraini jhạuạko doko umul aḍekana; soḍokʼ reakʼ bạisi dareko doko esetʼ ạcur edekana. 
Job40:23 Gaḍare ḍubạ dakʼ hecʼlenre hõ uni do bae botorokʼ kana; jordan gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ mocare gad gadaoaekanre hõ uni doe khạtirjomagea. 
Job40:24 Uniyakʼ disạ daramre uni do cetʼ jãhãeye sapʼ daṛekea? Se pạsi baberte jãhãe nạthui phuṛạu daṛeketaea? 
Job41:1 “Am do cetʼ bạ̃ṛsite Libiathonem rakapʼ daṛeaea, se baberte uniyakʼ alaṅem tol daṛeketaea?" 
Job41:2 Am do cetʼ mũm nakol daṛekea, se bạ̃ṛsite uniyakʼ jambem pạtitapʼ daṛeketaea?" 
Job41:3 Uni do cetʼ am ṭhen dayae khoj boteja? Ar am tulucʼ cetʼ luhum suhume galmaraokea? 
Job41:4 Jaejug amren guti hoyokʼ lạgitʼ uni do cetʼ am sãoteye bondobosa? 
Job41:5 Cẽṛẽ tulucʼ cetʼ lekako enecʼ baṛae onkage cetʼ uni tulucʼem enecʼkokʼa se amren kuṛi gidrạko lạgitʼ hoṭokʼrem baberaea? 
Job41:6 Jạilạko do cetʼ uni lạgitʼko dor dama? Ar bepariko talare cetʼ uniko hạṭińea? 
Job41:7 Am do kũcte uniyakʼ harta ar kạhlikote uniyakʼ bohokʼem perecʼketaea? 
Job41:8 Am do tite unim capo botecʼkea tobe lạṛhại disạime; ar alom onkaea. 
Job41:9 Uni domone reakʼ joto asge ạuṛiyakʼgea; uni ńel torage hoṛ do dilko adtakoa. 
Job41:10 Uni buskoye reakʼ dil do okoeyakʼge bạnukʼanaṅ; enḍekhan iń samaṅre okoeye teṅgo daṛekokʼa? 
Job41:11 Iń upạrte do okoeyakʼ dạbiteakʼ menakʼtaea, jemoniń em ruạṛkatae? Serma latarre menakʼakʼ jotowakʼge coṅ ińakʼ kan." 
Job41:12 “Libiathonakʼ hoṛmo hạṭińko reakʼ katha, ar uniyakʼ daṛe ar muṭhạn reakʼ kathań lạiya." 
Job41:13 Uniyakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ harta do okoeye khal daṛeketaea? Okoe uniyakʼ aṅgrop doe sobokʼtapʼ daṛeketaea? 
Job41:14 Uniyakʼ ḍaṭate perecʼ botoranakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ silpiń do okoeye jhicʼ daṛekea? 
Job41:15 Uniyakʼ dea reakʼ cũyạkʼ do pante akan ḍhal leka; jeretʼ mitʼ akan chap akawatʼ lekage 
Job41:16 Ona do nonka sopor sopor menakʼa je, ona talate hoe hõ oho parom daṛelena." 
Job41:17 Onako do mitʼṭecʼ sãote eṭakʼakʼ joṛao menakʼa; onako do jalatʼ uricʼ akana, ar baṅ begarokʼa." 
Job41:18 Uniyakʼ ạchimre do marsale jhalkaoeda; uniyakʼ mẽtʼkin do aṅga marsal reakʼ pipnikin leka. 
Job41:19 Uniyakʼ moca khon seṅgel reakʼ dhũạ oḍokokʼ kana; ar ona khon do oṭecʼ seṅgelkoge phurkạu oḍok hijukʼ kana. 
Job41:20 Jolokʼkan pạṭiạl ar heḍejokʼkan ṭukucʼ khon dhũạ oḍokokʼ leka uniyakʼ mũ khon dhũạ oḍokokʼ kana. 
Job41:21 Uniyakʼ sahẽtʼte koela do salgaokʼ kana ar moca khon do seṅgel lepʼ oḍokokʼ kana. 
Job41:22 Uniyakʼ tarenre do daṛe menakʼa; ar uni laha lahate do torasge enecʼ calakʼ kana. 
Job41:23 Uniyakʼ jelko do laṭkao mitʼakana; onako do unire dul mitʼ akana ar baṅge laṛaokʼa. 
Job41:24 Uniyakʼ kunḍi do dhiri leka keṭecʼgea, jante reakʼ latar dhiri lekage keṭecʼgea." 
Job41:25 Uniye beretʼlenre daṛeanko doko lukutʼ lukudokʼa; onko do botorteko pạcokʼa. 
Job41:26 Tarwaṛeteye joslenre hõ uni do bae seṭejokʼa; borlom, kũch ar ạ̃pạ̃ṛĩkote hõ bae cekakʼa." 
Job41:27 Mẽṛhẽtʼ do lanḍha lekae metakʼ kana ar pitạl do sea akan kaṭge. 
Job41:28 Jãhãn ạ̃pạ̃ṛĩge uni do bako laga ńir daṛeaea; ar bạṭul reakʼ dhiri hõ uni ṭhen do cetʼge baṅkana. 
Job41:29 Bạṭul do jạ̃ṛĩ kaḍecʼ leka bujhạukʼ kana; ar borlom reakʼ sohor saḍe doe landawakʼ kana. 
Job41:30 Uniyakʼ latar hĩs do laser kelhatʼ leka; ar losotʼreye sayaṛ kana lelen paṭa leka. 
Job41:31 Jalapuri do celaṅ reakʼ dakʼ lekageye heḍecʼ ocoyeda ar doreão do ojokʼ sunum lekage. 
Job41:32 Ar ona tayomte do jhalkaokʼ kan hore bạgiyakʼ kana; athantar do ponḍ upʼ lekage hudisokʼ kana. 
Job41:33 Dhạrtire do uni lekanicʼ celege bạnuiya; uni do bin botoricʼgeye sirjạu akana. 
Job41:34 Mitʼke mitʼ usulakʼgeye beṅgetʼakʼ kana; uni do sanam dhomokʼ janwarko cetanren raj kanae.” 
Job42:1 Job do unre Probhu Isore metadea," 
Job42:2 “Ińiń baḍaea am do jotowakʼgem daṛeakʼa; amakʼ jãhãn goṭawakʼge baṅ akoṭ akana. 
Job42:3 Am dom kuliyan tahẽkana, ‘uni doe okoe kana, one bin bujhạute solhawakʼe dapal okoyetʼkan?’ Niạ katha do sạrikana je, oka bạń bujhạu akatʼ ona babotre iń do kathań roṛleda; Ińakʼ lek do hahaṛawakʼkoge, okako bạń baḍaeakatʼ tahẽkan." 
Job42:4 Amem menleda, ‘ńitokʼ do ańjomtińme, iń do kathań roṛa; iń do amiń kuklimea ar am dom roṛ ruạṛạńạ.’" 
Job42:5 Lahate ińakʼ lutur do am reaṅe ańjom akada, menkhan ńitokʼ do ińakʼ mẽtʼkin ame ńelketʼmea." 
Job42:6 Onate okań men akatʼ ona do ńitokʼ iń chibaṅakʼ kana, ar dhuṛi ar torocʼre duṛupʼ kateń kastaokʼ kana.”" 
Job42:7 Job do niạko kathae roṛketʼ khan Probhu Isor do Timani Eliphase metadea, “ińren guti Job cetʼlekae menakatʼ am ar amren gateko do iń reakʼ ṭhikakʼ do bape roṛakada; ona iạte ape cetanre edrete pit caṛhao akantińạ." 
Job42:8 Onate ńitokʼ eae goṭen ḍaṅgra ar eae goṭen bheḍa ạgukate ińren guti Job ṭhen senokʼpe ar apnar lạgitʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅpe. Ińren guti Job do ape lạgitʼe koejoṅa ar iń do onań ataṅtaea, apeakʼ lelhatetʼ leka jo do bạń emapea.”" 
Job42:9 Unre Timani Eliphas, Suhi Bildad ar Namathiạ Sophar do Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekako kạmikeda, ar Probhu Isor do Jobakʼ koejoṅe ańjomketʼtaea." 
Job42:10 Job do acʼren gateko lạgitʼe koeketʼ khan Probhu Isor do Jobakʼ dhon dhuribe ruạṛkatʼtaea ar lahateakʼ khon bar dobṛae emadea. 
Job42:11 Uniren boeha ar miserako okoe do laha khonko orom akade tahẽkan onko sanamkoge uniyakʼ oṛakʼre hecʼkateko jom ńukeda. Ar Probhu Isor do uni cetanre okako duke ạguketʼ ona lạgitʼ jiwi raṛecʼko emadea. Onko do mimitʼ hoṛ thoṛa thuṛi ṭaka poesa ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ sona mundạmko emadea. 
Job42:12 Probhu Isor do Jobakʼ jion reakʼ pạhilteakʼ khon tayom teakʼge bạ̃ṛtiye ạsirbadatʼtaea. Uniren do gelpon hajar bhiḍi, meromko, turui hajar ũṭko, mitʼ hajar joṛ ḍaṅgra ar mitʼ hajar gadhako hoyentaea." 
Job42:13 Uniyakʼ oṛakʼre eae koṛa hopon ar eae kuṛi hoponko janamena. 
Job42:14 Uniren maraṅicʼ hoponerawakʼ ńutum do Jemima, dosaricʼ do Kesia ar huḍińicʼ hoponerawakʼ ńutum do Keren-Hapuk tahẽkana." 
Job42:15 Jobren hoponerako leka ńelokʼte mońj kuṛi do disạmre ar bako tahẽkana. Onkoren apat do onkoren boehako sãote onko hõ jumiye hạṭińatʼkoa. 
Job42:16 Inạ tayom Job do arhõ mitʼsae pongel bochor jiwetʼe tahẽkana. Uni do acʼren hopon ar hoponerako ar onkoren hoponko pon piṛhi hạbicʼko ńel tiyokʼledea. 
Job42:17 Nonkate Job doe haṛamena ar purạte dinkoe bahaoketʼ tayome gocʼena. 
Psalms1:1 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do bedhoromkoakʼ sopolha bae senakʼkan, ar kại hoṛkoakʼ horre bae tahenkan, ar ṭiṭkạri nisṛạukoakʼ duṛupʼakʼre hõ bae duṛupʼkan;" 
Psalms1:2 bickom Probhu Isorakʼ ạnrege uniyakʼ rạskạtae do, ar onage uniyakʼ siń ar ńindạ reakʼ dhenkantaea." 
Psalms1:3 Uni do ạtukʼ dakʼ aṛere rohoe akan dare leka kanae, one ona do okte nạpitre jokʼkan, ar ona reakʼ sakamko hõ baṅ tolmojokʼ; uni do jotowakʼ kạmiregeye jo bahakʼkana." 
Psalms1:4 Menkhan bedhoromko do bako onkana; onko do hoete oṭaṅ calakʼkan bhusạ lekanako. 
Psalms1:5 Onate bicạr hilokʼ onko bedhoromko do bako ṭarhaokʼa, ar kạiyan hoṛko hõ dhorom hoṛkoakʼ jarwakʼre bako teṅgo ńama;" 
Psalms1:6 ente Probhu Isor do dhorom hoṛkoakʼ hore moneyakʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ hor do maraokʼtakoa." 
Psalms2:1 Cedakʼ sanam jạtren hoṛ doko gulmaleda? Hoṛko do ạuṛiyakʼ cedakʼko soṛojontro kana? 
Psalms2:2 Dhạrtiren rapajko do Probhu Isor ar uniren ojokʼicʼ upạrteko teṅgonkana, Ar mukhiyạko do mitʼteko milimisi joṅkana." 
Psalms2:3 Onkoko meneda, “Dela, unkinakʼ sikṛi bon topagma, Ar unkinakʼ tonol bon raṛakatakin ma.”" 
Psalms2:4 Probhu Isor do serma reakʼ siṅghạson khone landa kana; Uni do onkoe siṛogakokana. 
Psalms2:5 Uni do edreteye dhomkaokoa, ar acʼakʼ jaljalaokʼkan raṅgaoteye alatʼolotʼ cabakoa." 
Psalms2:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe rajiń ojokʼ akade uni do ińakʼ sonot buru Sionreń duṛupʼ akadea.”" 
Psalms2:7 Raj doe mena, Probhu Isor okae gathao akatʼ Iń do onań lại jạhira; Uni doe metadińạ, am dom ińren hopon kana, teheńge iń do amren apatiń hoyena." 
Psalms2:8 Am do iń ṭhen khojogokʼme, ado porjạtrenko amakʼ sompotti menteń emama ar goṭa dhạrtige amakʼ ạidạrire hijukʼa." 
Psalms2:9 Mẽṛhẽtʼ ṭheṅgate am do onkom rạputʼkoa ar hasa reakʼ bhajan lekam tawakʼ gejer cabakoa.” 
Psalms2:10 Onate E rapajko, ńitokʼ do bujsuj salakʼ calakʼpe; Dhạrtiren disạm cakʼlaoko, ape do sontorokʼpe." 
Psalms2:11 Bhokti salakʼ Probhu Isor dewa sewawaepe, ar ontorre botor salakʼ rạskạkʼpe." 
Psalms2:12 Ape do uni hopon manot emaete cokʼaepe, jemon ape cetanre bekusi aloe tahen ar calakʼ horre alope maraokʼ; ente mitʼ ripitʼrege uniyakʼ edre do jolokʼtaea. Bhạgangeako, one okoe do unireko hilrạjoṅ kan." 
Psalms3:1 E Probhu Isor, ńelme, ińren bạirikoakʼ lekha do tinạkʼ gan. Ńelme, iń upạrte tinạkʼ gan hoṛko teṅgo akana." 
Psalms3:2 Ḍher hoṛge iń reakʼko roṛeda, “Isor do uni bae rukhiyạyea.” (Sela)" 
Psalms3:3 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do beṛhaete ḍhal leka menama. Amge ińakʼ ṭhonok do ar amge ińakʼ bohokʼem rakapʼ ocoakatʼtińạ." 
Psalms3:4 Iń do ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isoriń hohowae kana. Uni do acʼakʼ sonot buru khone roṛ ruạṛạńạ. (Sela) 
Psalms3:5 Iń doń gitijokʼkana, ariń jạpitʼeda ariń ebhenokʼkana, ente Probhu Isorge iń doe sambṛaoedeń kana." 
Psalms3:6 Iń upạrte ar iń beṛhaete hajar hajar hoṛko teṅgo akana, menkhan onko do bạń botorako kana." 
Psalms3:7 E Probhu Isor, dela hijukʼme; E ińren Isor, bańcaoiń me. Am do ińren bạiriko jambereyem ghạletʼkoa ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ḍaṭa dom rạputʼ giḍikatako kana." 
Psalms3:8 Babańcao do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmi kangea, ar amren hoṛko cetanre amakʼ bhor baṛe tahen ma. (Sela)" 
Psalms4:1 E ińren Isor, amakʼ sana lekań calakʼkan ona dom udukʼ akawạdińa; ar amiń hohowamre roṛ ruạṛạńme baṛe. Iń do muhinteń esetʼ akana, menkhan am do sahẽtʼ reakʼ bhạgem emakawạdińạ. Dayawạńme, ar ińakʼ koejoṅ baṛe ańjomtińme." 
Psalms4:2 E manwa, ar tinạkʼ hạbicʼ iń dope henostayińạ? Ar tinạkʼ din bạṛicʼakʼpe dulạṛa ar tinạkʼ din eṛeakʼpe ńam baṛaea? (Sela)" 
Psalms4:3 Baḍae dohokakʼpe, Probhu Isor do acʼ sewawaeko acʼ lạgitʼgeye begar dohoakatʼkoa; ińiń hohowaere uni doe ańjomtińạ." 
Psalms4:4 Edrete alope kạiya. Aṭetʼre giticʼkate mon ḍunḍhạutape ar hape akae tahenpe. (Sela) 
Psalms4:5 Lek lekan dãṛẽko samaṅkope, ar Probhu Isorre bhorsa akae tahenpe." 
Psalms4:6 Ḍher hoṛko mena, “Bhageakʼ do okoeye ńel oco daṛeabona?” E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daya reakʼ mẽtʼãhã do ale cetanre marsal leka baṛe rakapʼ aleme." 
Psalms4:7 Ḍher phosol ar nãwã darkha rasa rakapʼlenre cetʼ leka hoṛkoko rạskạkʼ, ona khon ḍher rạskạte am do ińakʼ ontorem perecʼ akada." 
Psalms4:8 E Probhu Isor, amge bin botortem doho akadińạ, onate iń do sulukteń jạpida." 
Psalms5:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ katha luturakʼme, ar ińakʼ ontor reakʼ khondrondjoṅ moneyakʼme." 
Psalms5:2 E ińren raj, E ińren Isor, amakʼ goṛo lạgitʼ ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ ańjomtińme, ente am ṭhengeń koejoṅ kana." 
Psalms5:3 E Probhu Isor, din hilokʼ setakʼre ińakʼ katham ańjometʼ kana setakʼre iń do am samaṅre ińakʼ koejoṅiń samaṅetʼ kana ar askateń ńel hohorkana." 
Psalms5:4 E Isor, am do bedhoromakʼre rạskạkʼ icʼ dom baṅkana; ente bạṛicʼ hoṛ do am samaṅre bako tahẽ daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms5:5 Bạḍạiko do am samaṅre bako teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa; ar bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan hoṛ dom kurudako kana. 
Psalms5:6 Ar okoe eṛeakʼ kathako roṛ onko dom marao giḍikoa. Okoere khũn ar eṛe reakʼ monsubạ menakʼ Probhu Isor do onkoe hirkhạwako kana. 
Psalms5:7 Menkhan iń do amakʼ asambheṛ dayateń bolokʼa, ar amakʼ sonot oṛakʼ secʼ samaṅkate botoram tulucʼ iń ombagokʼa." 
Psalms5:8 E Probhu Isor, aema bạiri menakʼkotińte amakʼ dhorom horte ạyurińme; ar amakʼ hor sojhe kạtińme." 
Psalms5:9 Ińren bạirikoakʼ oka katha hõ pạtiạuanakʼ do baṅkana, onkoakʼ ontorre do eken nosṭo reakʼ monejoṅakʼge menakʼa, onkoakʼ moca do oṭakʼ akatʼ topa lekana, onko do alaṅte cĩkạ̃ṛ cĩkạ̃ṛ kathako roṛa." 
Psalms5:10 E Isor, onko baṛe bicạr dusikom; onko do akoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ iạteko gurokʼma. Onkoakʼ ạḍi utạr ghạṭko iạte laga giḍikom, ente onko do am upạrteko teṅgo akana." 
Psalms5:11 Menkhan okoe amreko hirlạjoṅkan onko doko rạskạkʼma, onko do rạskạte jaejugko sereń joṅma; am do onkoge baṛe rukhiyạkom, jemon okoe amko dulạṛetʼme onko do am iạteko hulạs daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms5:12 E Probhu Isor, okoe amko botoram, onko cetanre sạrige amakʼ bhor do menakʼgea; ar amakʼ dayate onko do ḍhal lekam danaṅ esetʼ akatʼkoa." 
Psalms6:1 E Probhu Isor, edrete alom egerińạ; ar bekusi iạte hõ alom ḍanṭaoińạ." 
Psalms6:2 E Probhu Isor, dayawạńme, enteń nijorgea. E Probhu Isor, bogeyińme, ente ińakʼ jaṅko do botorte thar tharaokʼ kantińạ," 
Psalms6:3 ar jiwire hõ botor caṛhao akawạdińa. E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din ona do calao idikʼa?" 
Psalms6:4 E Probhu Isor, iń secʼ ạcurokʼme, ar rukhiyạyińme; amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ iạte, bańcaoińme." 
Psalms6:5 Gocʼlenre do ohoń disạ daṛelema; ar patal purire do okoeye gun manao joharama? 
Psalms6:6 Iń do kuhrạu kuhrạuteń laṅga caba akana; goṭa ńindạ rakʼ rakʼte aṭetʼiń lohotʼetʼtińạ, ar mẽtʼ dakʼte ińakʼ parkomiń ḍiń ḍạbureda." 
Psalms6:7 Duk iạte ńeńel reakʼ daṛe hõ komao akantińạ; ar bạiriko iạte ińakʼ mẽtʼ do nijor caba akantińạ. 
Psalms6:8 E bạṛicʼ kạmiyetʼkan hoṛko, ape sanamkoge iń ṭhen khon men ńirjoṅpe, ente Probhu Isor do ińakʼ rakʼe ańjom akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms6:9 Ińakʼ nehõr do Probhu Isore lutur akawada, ar ińakʼ koejoṅe ataṅ akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms6:10 Ińren bạiriko do sanamkogeko lajao ocokʼa arko botorokʼa; onko doko ruạṛokʼa, ar ackage lajaoreko paṛaokʼa." 
Psalms7:1 E Probhu, ińren Isor, iń do amregeń hirlạ akana. Ar okoe ińko khudạu edeńkan onkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme, ar amge bańcaoińme." 
Psalms7:2 Ar baṅkhan onko do dhạcri kul leka jiwiko cirạitińạ; arko kaṭra kuṭrạ cabayińạ, ar iń bańcaoiń lạgitʼ do celege bako tahena." 
Psalms7:3 E Probhu, ińren Isor, nonkanakʼ jãhãnakʼ iń kạmi akatʼ khan, ar bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ jãhãn dag ińakʼ tire menakʼ khan," 
Psalms7:4 ar ińren gateakʼ iń bạṛicʼ akatʼ khan, okoe do ạuṛiyakʼte ińren bạiriye hoylen iń do uni hõń bańcao akadea." 
Psalms7:5 Enḍekhan bạiriko do ińko laga sabeńma; onko do otreko tawagińma arko lebetʼ gańjaoiń ma. Ar ińakʼ manot do dhuṛireko mesao giḍikakʼma. (Sela) 
Psalms7:6 E Probhu Isor, edrete ma beretʼme, ińren bạirikoakʼ raṅgao upạrte ti tiạrtam. Iń lạgitʼ ebhenokʼme, ente amakʼ dhorom bicạr reakʼ katham lại jạhir akada." 
Psalms7:7 Sanam jạtren hoṛ do am beṛhaeteko jarwakʼma; am do sermate ruạṛ senkate onko cetanre rajokʼme. 
Psalms7:8 Probhu Isorge onko doe bicạrkoma. E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ dhorom kạmi ar sạriyakʼtetʼ lekage baṛe bicạrińme." 
Psalms7:9 E dhoromren Isor, am do mon ar ontorem ḍunḍhạueda; amge bedhoromkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼko cabaetakome menkhan amren dhoromko do teṅgo ṭarhao akae dohokom." 
Psalms7:10 Isorge ińren ḍhal do; okoeyakʼ ontor khạṭige onkoge uni doe rukhiyạkoa. 
Psalms7:11 Isor do dhoromren bicạricʼ kanae, uni do bedhoromko jaogeye bicạrkoa." 
Psalms7:12 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko bako ạcur ruạṛlen khan uni do acʼakʼ tarwaṛeye lasertaea ar acʼakʼ akʼe gakʼ tearkakʼa. 
Psalms7:13 Uni do acʼakʼ gogocʼ khanḍaye ṭhik dohoakada, ar acʼakʼ sarkoe seṅgel sar akawada." 
Psalms7:14 Bedhoromicʼ do kukhire bạṛicʼakʼkoe dohoyeda, ar kukhire bạṛicʼakʼe dohoyte bedonreye paṛaokʼa ar eṛeyakʼkoe janam ocoya." 
Psalms7:15 Uni do ghaḍlakʼ la kate ar ona khon hasa rakapʼkateye kholao akada ar acʼakʼ ghaḍlakʼre acʼgeye khańjokʼ akana. 
Psalms7:16 Acʼakʼ bedhorom reakʼ bojha do acʼakʼ bohokʼrege ruạṛ hecʼaea; ar okoeye julumede ona do uniyakʼ bohokʼrege ńurokʼa. 
Psalms7:17 Probhu Isor do dhorom reakʼe bicạra, onate iń do uniń sarhaoea; ar iń do maraṅ Probhu Isorakʼ iń õṛhẽ sereńa." 
Psalms8:1 E Probhu Isor, E aleren kisạ̃ṛ, goṭa dhạrtige amakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ akana; ar sermare amakʼ ṭhonokem bạisạu akada." 
Psalms8:2 Bale gidrạko ar toa nunuko reakʼ moca khon am do daṛe reakʼ gaṛem hoyocoakada; amren bạiriko lạgitʼge noa dom onka akada, jemon amren bạiriko ar hala hạkʼlikan kom kiṛdhum daṛeako." 
Psalms8:3 Iń do amakʼ tite benaoakʼ serma secʼiń beṅgetʼeda ar onḍem ṭarhao akatʼko ńindạ cando ar ipilkoń ńeletʼkoa. 
Psalms8:4 Unreń hudisa, manwa doe celekante, uni reakʼem dạndikʼkana? Ar Manwa Hopon baṅe celekan, onate uniyakʼ kom moneyakʼkana?" 
Psalms8:5 Manwa do serma goḍet khon thoṛaganem huḍiń akadea; uni do ṭhonok ar manot reakʼ mukuṭem horokʼ akawadea. 
Psalms8:6 Amakʼ tite sirjạu reakʼ cakʼlao bhar do unigem emakawadea ar noako jotowakʼ do uniyakʼ jaṅga latarrem dohoakada. 
Psalms8:7 Ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi palrenko ar dhạrtiren eṭakʼ sanam janwarko," 
Psalms8:8 ar coṭre uḍạukʼkan cẽṛẽko, ar jalapuriren hakoko ar jalapurire ạcur baṛaekan sanam jiwiyanko hõ." 
Psalms8:9 E Probhu Isor, aleren kisạ̃ṛ, goṭa dhạrtige amakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ akana." 
Psalms9:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ goṭa ontorte amiń gun manao joharam kana ar amakʼ joto hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathań lại sodora." 
Psalms9:2 Iń do amrege hulạs ariń rạskạkʼa. E maraṅ Isor, amakʼ ńutumteń õṛhẽ sereńa." 
Psalms9:3 Ińren bạiri doko pạc ruạṛ akana; onko do am samaṅreko tohotʼ bhindạṛena arko marao akana; 
Psalms9:4 ente am do ińakʼ mambla dom bicạr chinḍạu akatʼtińạ; ar amakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼkate dhoromtem bicạr akada. 
Psalms9:5 Am do eṭakʼ jạtrenkom dhomkaoetʼkoa ar bedhoromko dom nosṭoyetʼkoa; onkoakʼ ńutum do jaejug hạbicʼem mohor meṭao akatʼtakoa. 
Psalms9:6 Ar bạiriko do jaejug lạgitʼko jarkharena; onkoakʼ nagrahako dom dhaṅdhaser akada; ar onkoakʼ ńutum sudhạ marao cabayentakoa. 
Psalms9:7 Probhu Isor do jaejug hạbicʼe rajokʼkana; uni do bicạr reakʼ siṅghạsone bạisạu akada. 
Psalms9:8 Uni do dhoromte dhạrtirenkoe bicạrkoa, ar sanam jạtrenko hõ dhoromtegeye ḍanṭaokoa." 
Psalms9:9 Okoe santaoreko paṛao akan, Probhu Isorge onkoren asray doe hoyokʼma ar gạr jokhecʼren do aotan gaṛge." 
Psalms9:10 Am okoeko baḍae akatʼme onko do amregeko hirlạ joṅma, E Probhu Isor, ente okoe khạndri hạbicʼ baḍaemeko khojkan, onko do tis hõ bam bạgi giḍi akatʼkoa." 
Psalms9:11 Probhu Isor do Sionre menaea; ape do unige õṛhẽ sereńaepe. Ar uni okae kạmiakatʼ ona do eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen lại sodorpe; 
Psalms9:12 ente mãyãm reakʼ okoeye hala hạliy uni do gocʼ ocoakan hoṛko hõ bae hiṛiń akatʼkoa, ar dukokʼ kankoakʼ rakʼ joṅ hõ bae ḍhilạutakoa." 
Psalms9:13 E Probhu Isor, dayawạńme baṛe; ar ńelme, bạiriko cetʼlekako santao edeńkana. Moron reakʼ duạr khon do amge rakapʼ ruạṛińme," 
Psalms9:14 jemon Sion kuṛi reakʼ phaṭok duạrkore amakʼ man ar mạhimań pasnao daṛeatam ar amakʼ bańcao ńamkate jemoniń rạskạ daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms9:15 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko do apnarko la akatʼ ghaḍlakʼregeko khańjokʼ kana; ar akoko oḍao akatʼ jhạliregeko jhạlikʼ kana. 
Psalms9:16 Dhorom bicạr hotetege Probhu Isor doe baḍae ocokʼkana; bedhoromko do akoakʼ kạmitegeye jhạliyetʼkoa. (Sela) 
Psalms9:17 Okoe jạtrenko do Isorko hiṛińedekan onko bedhoromko do gocʼkate patal puriteko calakʼa. 
Psalms9:18 Reṅgecʼ orecʼko do jaejug hạbicʼ bako hiṛińokʼa; ar nindhạnkoakʼ as do tishõ be as do baṅ tahena. 
Psalms9:19 E Probhu Isor, de teṅgonme manwa do am cetanre alom jitạu ocokoa; am samaṅrege eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ bicạr do hoyokʼma." 
Psalms9:20 E Probhu Isor, onkoakʼ ontorre botor rakapʼ ocoy takome; ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko baḍaema, onko hõ eken manwa kangeako mente. (Sela)" 
Psalms10:1 E Probhu Isor, sạṅgińre do cedakʼem teṅgo akana? Ar gạr jokhecʼ do cedakʼem cokokokʼ kana?" 
Psalms10:2 Bedhorom hoṛko do dhomokʼte nacarkoko santaoetʼkoa, menkhan onko do akoakʼ phorphundigeye sapʼ ocoyetʼkoa." 
Psalms10:3 Bedhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ ontor reakʼ bạṛicʼ monsubạteye gorbokʼ kana; ar lalocicʼ do Probhu Isore sarapae kana ar uniye neṅghao edekana. 
Psalms10:4 Bedhorom hoṛ do ṭheṭamute Probhu Isore neṅghao edeya; uniyakʼ bạṛicʼ monsubạre noa hudisge menakʼa Isor mente ar okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa. 
Psalms10:5 Uni do jitạu reakʼ horte jaogeye laha idikʼkana; uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do amakʼ ḍanṭao bae ńel ńama, ente ona do ạḍi coṭgea; ar acʼren sanam bạiriko doe neṅghaoetʼkoa." 
Psalms10:6 Uni do mone moneteye meneda, “Nonkanakʼ cetʼge bạnukʼa one onate ińe dalhao daṛeạń; ar ińakʼ muskil do tishõ baṅ hoyokʼa.”" 
Psalms10:7 Uniyakʼ moca do sarap, ṭhok ar jorjulumte perecʼgea; uniyakʼ alaṅre do behok ar bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ katha menakʼa." 
Psalms10:8 Uni do atokore danaṅreye tãṛãkʼ baṛaea, ar nisun jaegare miridos hoṛe khũneya ar nindhạnicʼ do danaṅ danaṅteye tạṅkhi edekana." 
Psalms10:9 Uni do danaṅre tahẽkate dhạcri kul lekae tãṛãkʼ akana; nacaricʼ sabe lạgitʼgeye onkayeda, ar jhạli oḍaokateye sabe kana." 
Psalms10:10 Ona tayom do onkoe lebetʼ gańjaokoa; onko dukhạliạko do uniyakʼ jaṅga latarreko paṛaokʼ kana. 
Psalms10:11 Uni do mone moneteye meneda, “Isor doe hiṛiń akada; uni doe dea giḍiakada, ar tishõ bae ńeńela.”" 
Psalms10:12 E Probhu Isor, ma teṅgonme; E Isor, amakʼ ti tiạrme, ar nacarko do alom hiṛińkoa." 
Psalms10:13 Bedhorom hoṛ do Isor cedakʼe nihạ̃t giḍikaea? Ar mone monete cedakʼe meneda, “Uni do iń ṭhen jãhãn hisạb bae hataoa mente?”" 
Psalms10:14 Menkhan E Isor, amakʼ mẽtʼ do haron ar kosṭo bae beṅgetʼ paroma; am do amakʼ tirege ona dohoy me. Nandanicʼ do amakʼ tiregeye alaeyokʼkana; ar ṭũạr amaricʼ do amgem goṛowae kana." 
Psalms10:15 Bedhorom ar bạṛicʼ hoṛakʼ ektiạri do caba utạrme baṛe; ar uniyakʼ sanam behok reakʼ hisạb hataome. 
Psalms10:16 Probhu Isorge jaejugren raj kanae; uniyakʼ disạm khon eṭakʼ jạtren doko maraokʼa. 
Psalms10:17 E Probhu Isor, am do mạ̃hirkoakʼ ontor reakʼ katham ańjomeda; ar amge dilem emakokana, ar onkoakʼ rakʼem ańjometʼtakoa." 
Psalms10:18 Am dom onka akada, jemon ṭũạr amar ar santaokʼkan hoṛko secʼem teṅgo daṛeakʼ. Jemon niạ dhạrtirenko bako botor ocodaṛeako." 
Psalms11:1 Iń do Probhu Isorrege asrayiń hatao akada. Cedakʼpe meneda, “Cẽṛẽ leka uḍạukʼte apeakʼ burute dạṛjoṅpe?”" 
Psalms11:2 Cedakʼpe meneda, “Ontorre okoeko khạṭige ńut khon onko tuńko lạgitʼ bedhorom hoṛko do akoakʼ akʼko gakʼ akatʼtakoa ar onare sarko lagao ṭhik akada?”" 
Psalms11:3 Cedakʼpe meneda, “Dhạrti gharońj reakʼ sanam kham khunṭiko rạputʼ giḍi lekhan enḍekhan Isor botoraeko do cekae reakʼ jãhãnakʼ bạnukʼtakoa?”" 
Psalms11:4 Menkhan Probhu Isor do sermare acʼakʼ sonot mundilre menaea; uniyakʼ siṅghạson do onḍege menakʼtaea. Uni do manwakoe tạṅkhiyetʼkoa; ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do onkoe baḍae aṭkaretʼkoa. 
Psalms11:5 Probhu Isor do acʼ botoraekan koe biḍạu aṭkaretʼkoa, menkhan okoe bedhorom ar jor julumgeko dulạṛetʼ onko do bae moneyako kana." 
Psalms11:6 Uni do bedhoromko cetanre muskilakʼkoe kola; ar onkoakʼ bhạgre jolokʼkan gondhok ar seṅgel hoegeye kola. 
Psalms11:7 Probhu Isor doe dhoromgete dhorom reakʼ kạmikoe dulạṛetʼkana; ar okoeko khạṭige onko do uniko ńelea. 
Psalms12:1 E Probhu Isor, bańcaoińme, am botoramko do ar bạnukʼkoa; ar pạtiạran hoṛko do manwa tala khonko ocokʼ akana." 
Psalms12:2 Manwa do manwa ṭhen eṛeko roṛetʼkana; onko do luṭite kathako roṛa ar ontor do eṛete perecʼgetakoa. 
Psalms12:3 Okoeko men, “Alaṅ reakʼ jortege bon jitạukʼa; ar aboakʼ luṭi do abo secʼge menakʼa, aboren mạlik do okoeye hoekokʼa?” Onkoakʼ luṭi ar bạḍạite perecʼ alaṅ do Probhu Isorge jemone getʼ giḍikatako." 
Psalms12:4  
Psalms12:5 Probhu Isore meneda, “Nacarkoakʼ ujạṛokʼ ar reṅgecʼ orecʼkoakʼ rakʼjoṅte iń do ńitgeń beredokʼa, ar bańcao tahen lạgitʼ okoeyakʼ ontorre monejoṅakʼ menakʼ onko doń bańcao dohokoa.”" 
Psalms12:6 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nirạ kathako kana; ona do seṅgelte rapakʼ sapha akatʼ rupạ leka, ar eae dhao galao akatʼ rupạ lekage." 
Psalms12:7 E Probhu Isor, amgem bańcao dohokoa; ar noa piṛhiren hoṛkoakʼ ti khon jaejug hạbicʼ amge onko mimitʼkom rukhiyạkoa." 
Psalms12:8 Hoṛko bạṛicʼakʼ tinre manotko emakʼa unre bedhoromko do sạdhinte beṛhaeteko dãṛãbaṛaea. 
Psalms13:1 E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din? Am do cetʼ jaejug hạbicʼem hiṛińkạńạ? Iń ṭhen khon ar tinạkʼ din hạbicʼ amakʼ mẽtʼãhã dom ạcur dohokakʼa?" 
Psalms13:2 Ar tinạkʼ din iń do monreń hudisokʼa, ar din hilokʼ ińakʼ ontor do dukte perejokʼtińạ? Ar tinạkʼ din ińren bạiri do iń cetanre jitạu akane tahena?" 
Psalms13:3 E Probhu ińren Isor, iń secʼ beṅgedme ar roṛ ruạṛạńme; ar daṛe emạńme; ar baṅkhan ińre do moron reakʼ jạpitʼge hijukʼa." 
Psalms13:4 Unre ińren bạirikoko mena, “Iń do uniń bhagao akadea.” Ar nirạite bạń tahẽlen khan ińren bạiri doko hulạsokʼa." 
Psalms13:5 Menkhan iń do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛreń bhorsa akana; ar amem bańcao edeńkante ińakʼ ontor do hulạsokʼ kantińạ. 
Psalms13:6 Probhu Isorgeye bhạlại akadińạ, onate uni ńutumteń sarhao sereńa." 
Psalms14:1 Bebuj hoṛ doko mena Isor do bạnugicʼan. Onkoakʼ sobhab do bạṛicʼgea ar kạmiko hõ hirkhạgetakoa. Bhageye kạmikan hoṛ do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa. 
Psalms14:2 Probhu Isor do serma khon latarte manwa secʼe beṅgetʼkeda, ar ńeljoṅe menana sạriyakʼ reakʼ ạkilte jãhãeko taṛameda se baṅa, ar Isorakʼ sana leka jãhãeko kạmikana se baṅa." 
Psalms14:3 Uni doe ńelkeda, sanamkoge sạri hor khonko ocokʼ akana, ar jotoge mitʼ domteko bạṛicʼ akana; bhageakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa, mitʼ hoṛ hõ baṅa." 
Psalms14:4 Bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikanko do cetʼ nunạkʼgeko bebujgea? Hoṛko cetʼleka jomakʼko jometʼkan onkage onko do ińren hoṛko jometʼkoa; onko do Probhu Isor hõ bako hohoae kana. 
Psalms14:5 Isor do acʼren dhorom hoṛko sãote menaea, onate onko hoṛ do ạḍi botor paṛao akoa." 
Psalms14:6 Ape okoe do bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmikan, ape do nacar hoṛkoakʼ kạmipe bạṛicʼetʼtakote lajaorepe paṛaoetʼkoa, menkhan Probhu Isorge onkoren hirlạ do." 
Psalms14:7 Israelkoakʼ babańcao do Sion khonge hijukʼa; Probhu Isor do tinre acʼren hoṛkoakʼ dosae ruạṛkatakoa unre Jakob bõskoren doko rạskạkʼa, ar Israelko hõko kusikʼa." 
Psalms15:1 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ tạmbu oṛakʼre ḍerakʼ lạgitʼ lekicʼ doe okoe kana? Amakʼ sonot burure tahen lạgitʼ lekicʼ baṅe okoe kan?" 
Psalms15:2 Uni kangeae lek ạnicʼ hoṛ do, okoe do bin dusạnte jione khemaoetʼtae, ar dhorom reakʼkoe kạmikan, ar ontor khon sạriyakʼ kathakoe roṛetʼkan," 
Psalms15:3 Uni do eṭakʼko bae nisṛạukoa, acʼren gatekoakʼ hõ bae khutiytakoa, ar aḍepaseren hoṛkoakʼ bodnam hõ bae roṛa," 
Psalms15:4 Uni do hirkhạ ocokʼkan hoṛko khone pharakokʼa, ar Probhu Isor botoraekan hoṛkoe manotkoa, ar jãhãnakʼ loksan hoylentaere hõ gokʼakʼe purạugea," 
Psalms15:5 Uni do sud chaḍa pańcate ṭakae emokʼa, ar ghus bae hataoa ar miridoskoakʼ hõ bae khutiytakoa. Okoe nonkae kạmiyetʼkan uni do jaoge teṅgo ṭak akane tahena." 
Psalms16:1 E Isor, rukhiyạyińme, ente iń do amreń hirlạ akana." 
Psalms16:2 Iń do Probhu Isoriń menakawadea, “Am kangeam ińren kisạ̃ṛ do; am begor bhageakʼ do cetʼte hõ baṅ hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Psalms16:3 Dhạrtire okoe doko Isorren hoṛkan, onko doko maraṅgea; ar onko iạtege iń doń rạskạkʼ kana." 
Psalms16:4 Okoe do debotakoko sewawako kan onkoakʼ duk do ḍherokʼtakoa. Ar onko oka mãyãmko coḍor ona do bạń onkaea; ar debotakoakʼ ńutum do luṭite hõ bạń ńuma. 
Psalms16:5 E Probhu Isor, am kangeam ińakʼ dhon do; ar am kangeam tetaṅedeń kan dakʼ do. Ar amge ińakʼ gulibãṭteakʼ bakhram jogaoetʼtińạ," 
Psalms16:6 ińakʼ simạnare paṛao akan ṭhạ̃iko do hạ̃sgea; ar ińakʼ sompotti ńelkate sạrigem mạluṅ utạrokʼa. 
Psalms16:7 Iń do Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea uni do bhage solhae imạńkana; ar ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ ontor hõe sikhạuedeń kana. 
Psalms16:8 Probhu Isor do jaoge iń samaṅreń ńelekana; uni do ińakʼ jojomsa aṛere menaete iń doń ṭarhao akana. 
Psalms16:9 Ona iạte ińakʼ mon do rạskạte perejokʼ kana, ar ińakʼ ontor doe hulạsokʼ kana ar ińakʼ hoṛmo do khạtirjoma tahentińạ;" 
Psalms16:10 Ente patal purire do bam giḍiyińạ, ar amren sonoticʼakʼ hoṛmo hõ bam nosṭo ocoya." 
Psalms16:11 Amge jion reakʼ horkom baḍae ocoakadińạ; cepel cepel rạskạ do am mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege menakʼa, ar amakʼ jojomti secʼ do jaejug reakʼ sukge menakʼa." 
Psalms17:1 E Probhu Isor, dhorom reakʼ katha ańjomme, ar ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ luturakʼme; ińakʼ bin phạsiara moca reakʼ koejoṅ baṛe ańjomtińme;" 
Psalms17:2 ińre amakʼ bicạr do dhoromanakʼ baṛe hoyokʼma; ar oka sạriyakʼ kan onage amakʼ mẽtʼre sabokʼma. 
Psalms17:3 Am do ińakʼ ontorrem bolo akana ar ńindạ dom biḍạu akadińạ; arem biḍạu aṭkar edeńkana menkhan cetʼge bam ńam akada. Ińiń ṭhik akada jãhãn kại reakʼ kathare ińakʼ moca do ar bạń beohara. 
Psalms17:4 Manwa okakoe kạmi onako baṅkate amakʼ moca reakʼ katha hotete julum reakʼ hor khon iń doń ocokʼ akana. 
Psalms17:5 Amakʼ horrege ińakʼ jaṅgań teṅgo keṭecʼ akatʼtińạ; onḍe khon ińakʼ jaṅga do baṅ ḍikạ ḍake akana. 
Psalms17:6 E Isor, amiń hohowamre ańjomtińme, ar onategeń hohoam kana; ińakʼ katha luturakʼtińme, ar ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme." 
Psalms17:7 Amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ do hahaṛa salakʼ sodorme; ar bạirikoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ okoe do amre asrayko ńam bakʼṛakan, onko do amakʼ jojom titem rukhiyạyetʼkoa." 
Psalms17:8 Mẽtʼ reakʼ moni leka am do rukhiyạyińme; ar okoe ińko hạneńkan onko bạṛicʼ hoṛko khon, ar okoe do gojeń lạgitʼko esetʼ ạcur akadiń onko bạiriko khon, amakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre goṅgotʼ dohokańme." 
Psalms17:9  
Psalms17:10 Onko do goṛdho ontor reakʼ duạrko siń akada; ar onkoakʼ moca khon bạḍại reakʼ katha hõ oḍokokʼ kana. 
Psalms17:11 Onko do ńitokʼ aleko esetʼ ạcur akatʼlea, jãhã secʼ calakʼ reakʼ horge bạnukʼtalea. Onko do ale cetanre nońjorko dohoakada jemon otreko tawakʼ bhindạṛ daṛeale." 
Psalms17:12 Onko do dhạcri kul leka cirạ gocʼle lạgitʼko pagla akana, onko do dhạcri kul leka danaṅreko tãṛãkʼ akana." 
Psalms17:13 E Probhu Isor, ma beretʼme, ar teṅgo daramkote, otre baṛe tawakʼ bhindạṛkom. Amakʼ tarwaṛete bedhoromkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms17:14 E Probhu Isor, onko hoṛkoakʼ ti khon, ar dhạrtiren manwako khon, amakʼ tite ińakʼ jiwi bańcao tińme. Onkoakʼ kuṛại do noa dhạrtirege menakʼa amakʼ dhon duribte onkoakʼ lacʼ do bikʼtakoa, ar onkoren gidrạkoakʼ lekha do ḍherge hoyokʼa, ar gidrạko lạgitʼ akoakʼ dhon doko doho oṭokakʼa." 
Psalms17:15 Menkhan iń do am samaṅ jemon bin dusạniń tahẽ daṛeakʼ, gocʼko khoniń ebhen daṛeakʼ ar am ńelte jemoniń rạskạ daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms18:1 E Probhu Isor, am kangeam ińakʼ daṛe, ar iń do amgeń dulạṛetʼmea." 
Psalms18:2 Probhu Isorge ińren usul buru, unige ińakʼ aotan gaṛ ar ińren babańcaoicʼ; ar ińren Isorge ińren usul buru, unirege iń do asrayiń hataoeda. Uni do ińren dhal kanae, rurukhiyạicʼ dereńge, ar ińakʼ asray gaṛge." 
Psalms18:3 Probhu Isor do sarhao ńam lek kanae, iń do uniń hohowae kana; onate ińren bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạyińạ." 
Psalms18:4 Gujukʼ reakʼ baberteń tol akan tahẽkana. ar banbạsiteń toraslena. 
Psalms18:5 Ar patal puri reakʼ barahikoteń tolakana, gujukʼ reakʼ pạsi do iń lạgitʼ oḍao tahẽkana." 
Psalms18:6 Iń do muhinre ińren Probhu Isoriń hohowadea ar goṛo ńam lạgitʼ uni ṭheniń rakʼkeda. Acʼakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khon uni do ińakʼ aṛaṅe ańjomketʼtińạ; ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ do uniyakʼ luturre seṭerena. 
Psalms18:7 Unre dhạrti do daldalaoena ar ḍikạ ḍakekʼ ehopʼena, ar buru reakʼ rehetʼko do dalmalaoena; uniyakʼ edrete onako do dal dalaoena." 
Psalms18:8 Uniyakʼ mũ khon dhũạ do coṭte rakapʼena, ar moca khon ḍahao maraoakʼ seṅgelge oḍokena. Uniyakʼ moca reakʼ seṅgelte koelako jolena." 
Psalms18:9 Uni do sermae liwetʼketʼteye pheḍ hecʼena; ar uniyakʼ jaṅga latarre do hende rimil tahẽkana. 
Psalms18:10 Uni do Kerubre decʼkateye uḍạu hecʼena, ar hoe reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼteye ạphir hecʼena." 
Psalms18:11 Uni do ńutteye esetʼ ạcurena; uni beṛhaete dakʼ reakʼ dạriạ hende rimilge tahẽkana. 
Psalms18:12 Uni samaṅ reakʼ rãt khon ona dạriạ rimil do ocokʼena; arel ar seṅgel aṅgrakoge oḍok hecʼena. 
Psalms18:13 Probhu Isor do serma khone huḍurkeda; ar maraṅ daṛeyicʼ do arel ar seṅgel aṅgrakore acʼakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocokeda. 
Psalms18:14 Uni do sarkoe aṛakʼketʼte bạirikoe chirchạturketʼkoa, ar bijlikoteye andmandaoketʼkoa." 
Psalms18:15 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ dhomkaote ar mũ reakʼ sãhetʼte, ot latarre do dakʼ ńelena, ar dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼko hõ oṭakʼena." 
Psalms18:16 Uni do coṭ khon tiye tiyạrketʼteye sapʼkedińa, ar khạndri dakʼ khone owar rakapʼkedińa." 
Psalms18:17 Ińren daṛean bạirikoakʼ ti khon ar iń kurudạńko reakʼ ti khon uni doe bańcaokedińa; onkoakʼ daṛe do iń khon hõ ḍhergetakoa. 
Psalms18:18 Muhinre onko do ińko esetʼ ạcur ledeńạ, menkhan Probhu Isorgeye sapʼ sãohakedińa." 
Psalms18:19 Uni do mitʼṭecʼ phaelao jaegateye oḍok ạgukedińa; ar ińre kusiye tahẽkante uni doe bańcaokedińa. 
Psalms18:20 Ińakʼ dhorom kạmi lekatege Probhu Isor doe dan akawạdińa, ar ińakʼ kạmi reakʼ napaetetʼ iạtege kuṛạiye emadińạ;" 
Psalms18:21 Ente Probhu Isorakʼ horrege iń doń dãṛãn kana; bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate ińren Isor khon bạń ocokʼ akana. 
Psalms18:22 Uniyakʼ joto ạn-ạriko do iń samaṅre menakʼa; ar uniyakʼ ạn ạri khon do bạń ocokʼ akana. 
Psalms18:23 Uni samaṅre bin dusạngeń tahẽkana; iń do kại khon hõ pharakreń tahẽlena. 
Psalms18:24 Onate Probhu Isor do kuṛạiye emakawạdińa uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege ińakʼ dhorom kạmi lekate ińakʼ mońjakʼ kạmiko iạtege. 
Psalms18:25 E Probhu Isor, biswạsiko tulucʼ do biswạstegem beohareda ar dhoromko tulucʼ do dhoromem beohareda," 
Psalms18:26 Ar khạṭiko tulucʼ do khạṭigem beohareda, ar phẽpṛakʼko do amakʼ bud reakʼ phundim udukʼako kana." 
Psalms18:27 Am do nacar jạtrenkom rukhiyạyetʼkoa ar bạḍạiko dom tumbutʼ ocoyetʼkoa. 
Psalms18:28 Amge ińakʼ jion reakʼ diuhe dom jol dohoyetʼ kana; ińren Probhu Isor do ińakʼ ńute marsalketʼtińạ. 
Psalms18:29 Amakʼ goṛote lạṛhại phạdko cetanre iń do jhãpiń em daṛeakʼa, ińren Isorakʼ goṛote iń do pạcrikoń don parom daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms18:30 Isorakʼ horre jãhãn bin sạbitanakʼ do bạnukʼanaṅ, Probhu Isorakʼ katha do khạṭi mente sạbud akana. Uni do acʼre hirlạjoṅ kan sanam hoṛren ḍhal kanae." 
Psalms18:31 Probhu eskar chaḍa ar okoe Isor menaea? Aboren Isor chaḍa cetʼ jãhãn aotan buru menakʼa? 
Psalms18:32 Isorge ińakʼ ḍanḍare daṛeye imạńkana unige ińakʼ horkoe sạbit ocoyetʼtińạ. 
Psalms18:33 Uni do posta-jel leka jaṅga reakʼ daṛeye emakawạdińa; ar sanam usul jaegakoreye teṅgo ocoakadińa. 
Psalms18:34 Uni khonge ińakʼ ti do lạṛhạiye cetʼakada, onate ińakʼ ti do pitạl reakʼ akʼe gakʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms18:35 E Probhu Isor amakʼ rurukhiyạ ḍhal do ińem emakawạdińa, ar amakʼ jojom ti doe sapʼ akadińạ; amakʼ joton iạte iń do maraṅiń hoyakana." 
Psalms18:36 Am do ińakʼ taṛam horem phaelao akada, onate jaṅga do baṅ tohotʼlentińa." 
Psalms18:37 Ińren bạirikoń khudạuketʼkoa ar onko doń sapʼtiyokʼketʼkoa; ar ạuriko gocʼ cabakʼ hạbicʼ bạń ruạṛlena. 
Psalms18:38 Onko doń marao giḍi akatʼkoa, ariń gejer caba akatʼkoa, ar alo jemonko beretʼ daṛeakʼ; ente ińakʼ jaṅga latarreko ńur akana." 
Psalms18:39 Amge ińakʼ ḍanḍare lạṛhại lạgitʼ daṛeyem emakawạdińạ, ar iń upạrtenko do ińakʼ jaṅga latarrem dohoakatʼkoa." 
Psalms18:40 Ińren bạiriko do iń ṭhen khonem laga ńirketʼkoa; okoe ińko kurudạńkan onko doń marao caba akatʼkoa. 
Psalms18:41 Onko do goṛo ńam lạgitʼko hohoyetʼkana, menkhan onko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ do celege bako hecʼlena. Onko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko dohaekeda, menkhan uni do bae roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa." 
Psalms18:42 Hoete oṭaṅokʼkan dhuṛi leka onko doń holoṅ ḍigirketʼkoa, ar ḍahar reakʼ losotʼ lekań giḍikatʼkoa." 
Psalms18:43 E Probhu Isor, ińren huhulkan hoṛko khon am dom bańcao akadińạ, ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko cetanre am do matha mentem dohoakadińạ; okoe bạń orom akatʼko onko hõ iń ṭhen golamko khaṭao akana." 
Psalms18:44 Onko do ińakʼ katha ańjom torageko bataotińạ; ar bidisiạ hoṛ doko luhum suhumań kana. 
Psalms18:45 Onko doko tolmojokʼa; ar thar tharaoakʼte gaṛ khonko oḍok hijukʼa. 
Psalms18:46 Probhu Isor doe jiwetʼgea. Ińakʼ asray cạṭạini do sarhao hoyokʼtae ma, ar ińakʼ bańcaokʼren Isor doe usulokʼma." 
Psalms18:47 Uni do eṭakʼ jạtrenko iń tabereye ạguyetʼkoa ar iń huyạte unige sạjạiye emako kana. 
Psalms18:48 Uni do bạirikoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạ edeńkana. E Isor, am do bạiriko khonem usul akadińạ. Ar jor julumkan hoṛko khon amgem rukhiyạ akadińạ." 
Psalms18:49 E Probhu Isor, ona iạtege eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare amakʼ ṭhonokiń sodortama ar amakʼ ńutumiń maraṅtama." 
Psalms18:50 Probhu Isor do acʼren raj ḍher dhaoe jitạu ocoyea; acʼren bachao bahal akatʼko hoṛ lạgitʼ, Dạud do uniren bõsko lạgitʼ, uni do jaejug hạbicʼ acʼakʼ dulạṛe udugtaea." 
Psalms19:1 Sermako do Isorakʼ ṭhonokko lại sodoreda, ar serma do uniyakʼ ti reakʼ kạmikoe udukʼeda." 
Psalms19:2 Dinke din onko khon katha do oḍokʼ hijukʼ kana, ar ńindạ do akelko lại sodoreda." 
Psalms19:3 Onate jãhãn saḍege bạnukʼa ar jãhãn roroṛteakʼ hõ bạnukʼanaṅ. Onako reakʼ aṛaṅ hõ luturte baṅ ańjomokʼ kana," 
Psalms19:4 enhõ onkoakʼ hoho do goṭa dhạrtite pasnaokʼ kana; ar onkoakʼ katha do dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ ḍamḍahekʼ kana. Sermare siń cando lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe tạmbu akawadea; 
Psalms19:5 uni do jãwãe beṭa leka bapla oṛakʼ khone oḍokʼ hijukʼa, ar niṭ akatʼ horteye dạṛ idite enecʼkan birbão hoṛ leka ạḍiye kusikʼa;" 
Psalms19:6 Uni do serma reakʼ mucạtʼ khone rakabokʼa ar eṭakʼ secʼe ạcur calakʼa. Uniyakʼ dãk khon do okoe hõ bako eṛanokʼa. 
Psalms19:7 Probhu Isorakʼ ạn do sạbitgetaea, ona do manwae jiwetʼ ocoyea. Probhu Isorakʼ katha do ṭehãḍokʼakʼ kangea, ona do soṛa monanko akele emakoa." 
Psalms19:8 Probhu Isorakʼ sanam ạnko do sojhe horteye calaoeda, ar ontorre rạskại emokʼ kana. Probhu Isorakʼ hukum do niphuṭgea, ona do ontore cerṭha ocoyeda." 
Psalms19:9 Probhu Isorakʼ botor do sapha utạrgea, ona do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana. Probhu Isorakʼ ạnko do sạrigea, onare bedhoromakʼ do cetʼge bạnukʼ anaṅ." 
Psalms19:10 Ona do sona khon hõ, ar aema sonako khon hõ bạ̃ṛti lalocakʼ jinis leka kana. Ona do rasa khon hõ heṛemgea, ar dumur rasa khon hõ sorosgea." 
Psalms19:11 Ona do amren golame sontorede kana, ar ona manao lekhan ḍher lab hoyokʼa." 
Psalms19:12 Apnarakʼ bhul do okoeye bujhạu daṛeakʼa? Ińakʼ bin baḍae dosko reakʼ baṛe ikạitińme. 
Psalms19:13 Baḍae tulucʼ bạḍạiteakʼ kại khon amren golam do sạńgińre dohokạńme; jemon iń cetanre ona do mạliki aloe calao daṛeakʼ. Enḍekhan iń do khạṭiń hoy daṛeakʼa, ar Isorakʼ maraṅ ghạṭko khon miridos iń tahena." 
Psalms19:14 E Probhu Isor, ińren aotan gaṛ, ińren chakʼḍaoicʼ, ińakʼ moca reakʼ kathako ar ińakʼ ontor reakʼ hudis bundisko do am baṛeye kusi ocomema." 
Psalms20:1 Amakʼ dukokʼ dinre Probhu Isor do amakʼ hohoe ańjomtama; Jakobren Isor do nirạiteye dohome ma. 
Psalms20:2 Acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i khon uni do ame goṛowam ma ar Sion buru khon daṛeye emam ma. 
Psalms20:3 Amakʼ sanam dãṛẽ reakʼ katha uniyakʼ monre disạ tahentae ma, amakʼ jeredokʼakʼ dãṛẽko uni doe ataṅtam ma." 
Psalms20:4 Amakʼ monsubạge baṛeye puruntam ma, ar amakʼ sanam niṭ joṅakʼkoe purạu ma. (Sela)" 
Psalms20:5 Amem jitạukʼre jemonle rạskạ daṛeakʼ ar aleren Isor ńutumte jhạnḍi jemonle rakabtale. Probhu Isor do amakʼ sanam koejoṅe luturakʼtam ma. 
Psalms20:6 Ńitokʼ doń baḍaegea je, Probhu Isor do acʼe ojokʼ akade hoṛe bańcao edeya, ar acʼakʼ jojomti teakʼ bańcaokʼ reakʼ maraṅ daṛete uni do sonot serma khon acʼe ojokʼ akade hoṛakʼ hohoe ańjomtaea." 
Psalms20:7 Ḍher hoṛge akoakʼ rãt gạḍi iạteko bạḍạiyokʼa ar adomko do akoren sadomko iạte, menkhan abo do aboren Probhu Isor iạtege." 
Psalms20:8 Onko doko copotʼ akana, arko sombotʼ bhindạṛ akana menkhan abo do bohokʼ sojhekate bon teṅgo ṭak akana." 
Psalms20:9 E Probhu Isor, bańcaoleme baṛe; E raj, alele hohowamre roṛ ruạṛaleme." 
Psalms21:1 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daṛe ńelte raj doe rạskạkʼ kana; arem jitạu ocolere uni do ạḍiye kusikʼkana." 
Psalms21:2 Am do uniyakʼ monsubạm purạu akatʼtaea, ar moca reakʼ katha hõ bam dea giḍi akada. (Sela)" 
Psalms21:3 Bhạlạiyicʼ reakʼ ạḍi utạr bhorte uni dom koyokʼ daramede kana, ar uniyakʼ bohokʼre nirạ sona reakʼ mukuṭem horokʼae kana." 
Psalms21:4 Uni do am ṭhen jione koeleda, ar am do onam emadea; ar ḍher din bahaokʼ lạgitʼem danadea." 
Psalms21:5 Amem jitạu ocokedete uniyakʼ manot do ḍheretaea; am do man ar ṭhonokem emakawadea. 
Psalms21:6 Am do jaejug hạbicʼem bhor akawadea; ar hạjirge menamte uni dom rạskạ ocoyede kana. 
Psalms21:7 Probhu Isor cetanrege raj doe bhorsakʼ kana; ar maraṅ Isorakʼ khạndri dulạṛ do uniye ṭarhao ocoyea. 
Psalms21:8 Amakʼ titege amren sanam bạirikom sapʼetʼkoa; ar amko hirkhạwamko do jojom titem sapʼpaṭetʼkoa. 
Psalms21:9 Amem sodorokʼre onko do culhạ reakʼ jolokʼkan koela lekam hoyocokoa. Probhu Isor do edreteye utʼgotʼkakoa, ar uniyakʼ seṅgelte onko doe atar giḍikoa." 
Psalms21:10 Dhạrti khon onkoren bõsko do amgem marao cabakoa; ar manwako tala khonem meṭao utạrko. 
Psalms21:11 Onko do am upạrte bạṛicʼ sopolha ar bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼko goṭayetʼre hõ, onko do onare ohoko jitạu daṛelena." 
Psalms21:12 Ente am do onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã ńelkae tinre amakʼ sarkom aṛaga, unre onko doko dạṛ pạnḍuja." 
Psalms21:13 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daṛetege sodorokʼme; ale do amakʼ daṛe reakʼle sarhaotama arle sereńa." 
Psalms22:1 E ińren, Isor E ińren Isor, cedakʼem bạgi giḍiwạdińa? Iń rukhiyạyiń baṅkate, ińakʼ rakʼ koejoṅ ańjom baṅkate, cedakʼem pharak akana?" 
Psalms22:2 E ińren Isor, siń bhoriń hohowam kana, menkhan am do bam roṛ ruạṛạń kana; ar ńindạ hõ iń do thir akan bạń tahẽnkana." 
Psalms22:3 Menkhan am dom sonotgea; ar Israelkoakʼ sarhaoakʼ reakʼ siṅghạson rem duṛupʼ akana. 
Psalms22:4 Am cetanrege aleren hapṛam doko bhorsalena; onko doko bhorsalena, arem rukhiyạletʼkoa." 
Psalms22:5 Onko do am ṭhenko rakʼleda arem rukhiyạketʼkoa; amre bhorsakate onko do lajaore bako paṛaolena. 
Psalms22:6 Menkhan iń do mitʼṭen tejo kạnạń, manwa do baṅa; hoṛ do ińko siṛogạń kana ar manwa doko nihạ̃t edeńkana." 
Psalms22:7 Jãhãegeko ńeleń kan onkogeko landa dhutʼạń kana. Onko do luṭiko binḍucʼeda ar bohokʼ ruku rukuteko meneda," 
Psalms22:8 “Uni ma Probhu Isorreye bhorsakʼkan, enḍekhan unigeye rukhiyạyema; ar unigeye bańcaoema, ente uniregeye kusi akana.”" 
Psalms22:9 Eṅgạńakʼ kukhi khon amgem oḍok ạgukedińa; iń do tinre eṅgạńakʼ towań ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana unre amge amre bhorsakʼ reakʼem udgạu ledeńa. 
Psalms22:10 Janam tayomge amakʼ tireń em ocoakana; ar janam khonge am do ińren Isorrem hoyakana. 
Psalms22:11 Am do iń khon pharakre alom tahena, ente ińakʼ muhin do sor hijukʼ kana, iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Psalms22:12 Iń beṛhaete sanḍ ḍaṅgra menakʼkoa; onko do Bashan disạmren daṛean bayarko lekako esetʼ ạcur akadińạ. 
Psalms22:13 Dhạcri kul cetʼ leka gocʼ jomko lạgitʼe hạnḍrạukʼ, onkage onko do iń upạrte mocako cahapʼ akatʼtakoa." 
Psalms22:14 Iń do dakʼ lekań dul giḍi ocoakana, ińakʼ sanam jaṅ reakʼ joṛaoko do chaḍao akantińạ, ińakʼ ontor do mom leka hoyakante iń bhitrirege cher lambao idikʼkana." 
Psalms22:15 Hasa bhajan reakʼ rạputʼ kelhatʼ leka ińakʼ daṛe do rohoṛ hijukʼ kana, ar ińakʼ alaṅ hõ jambere jaladokʼkana; am do gujukʼ reakʼ dhuṛirem gạḍiạu kedińa." 
Psalms22:16 Iń beṛhaete bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan phạdko do seta lekako esetʼ ạcur akadińạ; onko do ińakʼ ti jaṅgako pạṭi tapʼ akatʼtińạ. 
Psalms22:17 Ińakʼ jaṅkoń lekha daṛeakʼ kana; onko hoṛ do cahapʼkateko ńeleń kana arko ńel mojayediń kana. 
Psalms22:18 Onko do ako talare ińakʼ kicricʼko hạṭiń joṅana ar ińakʼ aṅrop doko gulibãṭetʼtińạ. 
Psalms22:19 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do alom pharakokʼa; E ińakʼ daṛe, iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ ma usạrate hijukʼme." 
Psalms22:20 Tarwaṛe khon ińakʼ jiwi baṛe rukhiyại tińme, onko setakoakʼ capoṭ khon ińakʼ jiwi rukhiyại tińme." 
Psalms22:21 Onko dhạcri kulkoakʼ moca khon de bańcaoińme. Onko bir sanḍ ḍaṅgrawakʼ dereń khon hõ amgem rukhiyạ kedeńạ. 
Psalms22:22 Ińren boehako ṭhen do am reaṅgeń lại jạhira, ar kạlisiạ talare amiń gun manao joharama." 
Psalms22:23 Ape okoe do Probhu Isorpe botorae kan ape do uni sarhaoepe. Jakobren bõsrenko, ape do uni manotepe. Israelren sanam bõsko, ape hõ uni botoraepe." 
Psalms22:24 Nacaricʼ reakʼ nacartetʼ do bae nihạ̃t giḍiya; Uni secʼ acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bae betʼ dohokakʼa, bickom uniyakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼe ańjomketʼtaea." 
Psalms22:25 Maraṅ sabhare ińakʼ oka sarhaoteakʼ menakʼ ona do am ṭhen khonge hijukʼkana ar amre okoekoakʼ botor menakʼ onko samaṅre iń do ińakʼ manotakʼ koń purạutińạ. 
Psalms22:26 Mạ̃hir hoṛ doko jom bikʼa arko tirpitokʼa; okoe Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekako calakʼ onko do uniko sarhaoea. Onko do jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼko tahen ma. 
Psalms22:27 Dhạrti reakʼ ses simạren hoṛko hõ monko ạcurtakote Probhu Isor ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼa; ar eṭakʼ jạtren sanam gusṭirenko do uniko sewawaea. 
Psalms22:28 Hẽ, rajosṭi do Probhu Isorakʼge hoyokʼma; ar sanam jạtrenko cetanren raj doe uni kangea." 
Psalms22:29 Dhạrtiren kisạ̃ṛ hoṛko hõ unre uni samaṅreko jom ńũiya, ar uniko sewawaea; apnarakʼ jiwi bańcao reakʼ dhej bạnukʼtakote okoeyakʼ mitʼ jaṅga do topare menakʼtako, onko hõ uni samaṅreko ikhṛumokʼa." 
Psalms22:30 Darakan bõsrenko do uni ṭhenko khaṭaokʼa, ar ona jugren hoṛko ṭhen Probhu reaṅko lại akoa." 
Psalms22:31 Okoeko ńit hõ bako janam akan, onko ṭhen senkate Hoṛko do uniyakʼ dhorom reakʼ kathako lại jạhira; arko mena, unige noako doe kạmi akada." 
Psalms23:1 Probhu Isor kangeae ińren gukʼpiyicʼ, iń do ohogeń ṭonṭalena." 
Psalms23:2 Uni do ạtiń ṭạnḍi reakʼ legecʼ ghãsreye aḍeńkana, ar jirạu joṅ reakʼ dakʼ ṭhene ạyuredeń kana." 
Psalms23:3 Uni do nãwã daṛeye emạń kana; ar acʼakʼ ńutum iạte dhorom horteye sotokʼ idiyedeń kana. 
Psalms23:4 Gujukʼ umul reakʼ lodamreń taṛamlere hõ muhinko reakʼ do bạń botorokʼ kana, ente am do iń sãore menama; ar amakʼ ṭheṅga ar ṭhuṅgrạ do muhin khonkin bańcaoińạ." 
Psalms23:5 Bạiriko samaṅrege am do jomakʼ ar ńũiyakʼkom juṛạuạń kana, ar bohokʼre sunumem ojokʼạń kana; ar ińakʼ bạṭi do sareṛokʼ kan tińạ." 
Psalms23:6 Ińiń baḍaea ińakʼ goṭa jionge amakʼ bhageakʼ ar dulạṛ do ińkin khudạuińạ arkin soṅgeạńạ; ar iń do jaejug hạbicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreń girobasokʼa. 
Psalms24:1 Dhạrti ar onare menakʼakʼ jotowakʼge Probhu Isorakʼ kana; Prithimi ar onare tahenko hõ uniren kanako; 
Psalms24:2 ente unige khạndri dakʼ cetanre ot reakʼ rehetʼe gathaokeda, ar ona ot ar hasa latar reakʼ dakʼ cetanreye sapʼ dohokeda." 
Psalms24:3 Probhu Isorakʼ burure dejokʼ lek do cetʼ jãhãe menaea? Uniyakʼ sonot jaegare teṅgokʼ lek doe okoe kana? 
Psalms24:4 Eken uni kangeae lekicʼ do, okoeyakʼ ti do miridosgetae, ar ontor hõ khạṭigetae, ar eṛeyakʼ secʼ mon hõ bạnukʼtae. Ar mocare eṛe kiriạ hõ bạnukʼtae." 
Psalms24:5 Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon bhore ńama; ente uni do uniyakʼ sana lekae calakʼ kana ar uniren babańcaoicʼ Isor do onae udukʼaea. 
Psalms24:6 Nonkan hoṛ do Probhu Isorko sewawaea, onko do uniyakʼ mẽtãhãko ńam bakʼṛa kana ar noko kangeako Jakobren bõsko do. (Sela)" 
Psalms24:7 E nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrko, apeakʼ bohokʼ do arhõ rakabtape; E jaejug reakʼ duạrko, apeakʼ silpiń do jhijokʼtapema; ente ṭhonokren raj do bhitriteye bolo lạgidokʼ kana." 
Psalms24:8 Nui ṭhonokren raj doe okoe kana? Uni doe Probhu Isor kana, uni doe birbão are daṛeangea; Uni Probhu Isorge, okoe do lạṛhạireye birbãoicʼkan." 
Psalms24:9 E nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrko, apeakʼ bohokʼ do arhõ coṭte rakabtape; E jaejugren duạrko, apeakʼ silpiń do purạte jhijtape; ente ṭhonokren raj do bhitriteye bolo lạgidokʼ kana." 
Psalms24:10 Okoe kanae ṭhonokren uni raj do? Uni ṭhonokren raj do sanam daṛean Probhu Isor kanae. (Sela) 
Psalms25:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ jiwi do am secʼ iń rakapʼetʼ tińạ." 
Psalms25:2 E ińren Isor, am cetanregeń bhorsa akana, am do lajaore alom paṛao ocoyińạ; ińren bạiriko jemon iń upạrte hulạsokʼ reakʼ ạt aloko ńam." 
Psalms25:3 Okoe amre bhorsae dohoyetʼkan uni do bae lajao ocokʼa, menkhan okoe ạuṛiyakʼteko chol kopoṭetʼ onkoge lajaoreko paṛaokʼa." 
Psalms25:4 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ suṛucʼ horko baḍae ocoyińme, ar amakʼ horte calakʼ baṛe cetʼạńme." 
Psalms25:5 Amakʼ sạriyakʼre ạyurińme ar cetʼạńme, ente ińren babańcaoicʼ Isor dom am kangea; ar amrege sanam ghạṛicʼ iń bhorsakʼ kana." 
Psalms25:6 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ mãyã ar khạndri dulạr reakʼ katha am do alom hiṛińa; onako do jug khonakʼge menakʼtama." 
Psalms25:7 Ińakʼ koṛa umer reakʼ kại ar am upạrte hul reakʼ katha do alom disạ dohokakʼa; amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte disạyińme baṛe, ente E Probhu Isor, am dom bhagegea." 
Psalms25:8 Probhu Isor doe bhagegea are bhạlạiyicʼ kana, onate acʼakʼ hor reakʼakʼko uni do kại hoṛkoe cetʼ akokana." 
Psalms25:9 Uni do nindhạnko dhorom horteye idikoa ar acʼakʼ hor reaṅe cetʼakoa. 
Psalms25:10 Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos ar ạn lekate okoeko calakʼkan, onko ṭhen uniyakʼ sanam hor do asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrte perecʼgea." 
Psalms25:11 Ińakʼ bedhorom reakʼ bojha do ḍhergea, onate E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ńutum rukhiyạitam lạgitʼ ińakʼ ona bedhorom baṛe ikạ kạtińme." 
Psalms25:12 Okoe kanae uni hoṛ, okoe do Probhu Isore botorae kan? Ar okaṭakʼ hor bachao hoyokʼtaea ona do unigeye udukʼaea." 
Psalms25:13 Uni do sulukte acʼakʼ jione khemaoa, ar uniren bõsko do disạmre ạidạriko ńama." 
Psalms25:14 Probhu Isor okoeko botorae kan onko ṭhenge uni do acʼakʼ monsubại sodortaea, ar acʼe dohoakatʼ bondobose baḍae ocokoa." 
Psalms25:15 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ do siń sạṭupʼ Probhu Isor secʼge menakʼa, ente unige Soetanakʼ jhạli khon jaṅgae chaḍaotińạ." 
Psalms25:16 Iń secʼ ạcurokʼme ar dayawạńme, ente iń do eskar ariń bạpuṛicʼgea." 
Psalms25:17 Ińakʼ ontor reakʼ jala do ḍher akantińạ; ińakʼ sanam kosṭo khon baṛe rukhiyạyińme. 
Psalms25:18 Ińakʼ duk ar kosṭo secʼ beṅgedme; ar ińakʼ sanam kạiko ikạ kạtińme. 
Psalms25:19 Ńelkom, ińren bạirikoakʼ lekha do tinạkʼ gana; onko do bebạṛicʼko kurudạń kana." 
Psalms25:20 Ińakʼ jiwi rukhiyạitińme ar bańcaoińme; ar lajaore alom paṛao ocoyińạ, ente iń do amregeń hirlạ akana." 
Psalms25:21 Ińakʼ dhorom ar bhage kạmige iń doe rukhiyạyiń ma, ente iń do amregeń bhorsa akana." 
Psalms25:22 E Isor, Israelko akoakʼ sanam dukko khon chaḍaokome baṛe." 
Psalms26:1 E Probhu Isor, dhorom horre minạń ona baṛe udukʼ akome, ente iń do sạbit colonreń taṛameda; ar Probhu Isorregeń bhorsakʼ kana." 
Psalms26:2 E Probhu Isor, iń do khạṭi mente sạbud ocoyińme; ar biḍạu aṭkarińme, ińakʼ mon ar ontor baṛe biḍạutińme;" 
Psalms26:3 ente amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do jao ghuṛi ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege menakʼa; ar amakʼ pạtiạr reakʼ katha disạkate iń doń taṛameda. 
Psalms26:4 Iń do eṛe hoṛko tulucʼ bạń duṛubokʼkana, ar bhõnḍko sãote hõ bạń gatekʼ kana." 
Psalms26:5 Ar okoeko bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan onko doń hirkhạwako kana; ar bedhorom hoṛko sãote hõ bạń duṛupʼ kana. 
Psalms26:6 E Probhu Isor, iń do miridoste tikiniń ạrupʼtińạ ar amakʼ pinḍ beṛhaeteń ạcur hijukʼa," 
Psalms26:7 jemon ãṭ aṛaṅteń sarhao sereń daṛeam, ar amakʼ sanam hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathań roṛ daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms26:8 E Probhu Isor, am oka oṛakʼrem tahenkan, onḍege amakʼ ṭhonok hõ tahẽnkana, ar ona ṭhạ̃i do ińiń kusiyakʼ kana." 
Psalms26:9 Kại hoṛko tulucʼ alom samṭao seledińạ; okoe mãyãm joroyko kusiyakʼkan, onko sãote hõ alom seledińạ." 
Psalms26:10 Onkoakʼ tire do bạṛicʼ pontha menakʼa, onkoakʼ jojom ti do ghuste perecʼgetakoa." 
Psalms26:11 Mekhan iń do sạbit colonreń taṛameda; onkoakʼ ti khon chaḍaoińme, ar dayawạńme baṛe." 
Psalms26:12 Iń do soman jaegareń teṅgo akana; ar joroko samaṅrege Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea. 
Psalms27:1 Probhu Isorge ińakʼ marsal ar ińren babańcaoicʼ, Iń do okoeyiń botoraea? Probhu Isorge ińakʼ jion reakʼ gaṛ do, ar okoe ńelte botorteń thar tharaokokʼa?" 
Psalms27:2 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do ińakʼ jelko joma mente tinreko hecʼ sorokʼa unre iń upạrtenko ar ińren bạiriko doko tohotʼ gurokʼa. 
Psalms27:3 Palṭon phạdko ińko esetʼ ạcur lińre hõ, enhõ ińakʼ mon do baṅ botorokʼtińạ; ar iń upạrte lạṛhại ehopʼlenre hõ enrehõ iń do bhorsa do tahentińgea." 
Psalms27:4 Probhu Isor ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ iń nehõrokʼ kana; ar okaṭakʼ iń khojokʼ kan ona do niạge ińakʼ goṭa jionre jemon Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreń tahẽdaṛeakʼ, ar uniyakʼ ṭhonokiń ńel daṛeakʼte ona mundilre uni reaṅiń dhen daṛeakʼ;" 
Psalms27:5 Ente muhin hilokʼre uni do acʼakʼ ona gaṛre nirạiteye dohoyińạ, ar acʼakʼ ona tạmbureye oko dohokạńạ, ar ḍuṅgri cetanre uni doe rakabińạ." 
Psalms27:6 Okoeko bạiriko esetʼ ạcur akadiń unre onko khon ińakʼ manot do arhõ ḍherokʼtińạ; iń do uniyakʼ oṛakʼre ãṭ aṛaṅate aema lekan dãṛẽkoń samaṅa; ar Probhu Isor lạgitʼ iń õṛhẽ sereńa ariń sarhaoea. 
Psalms27:7 E Probhu, amiń hohowamre ańjomtińme, ar dawayạńme baṛe, ariń hohowamre roṛ ruạṛạńme." 
Psalms27:8 Ińakʼ ontor do noa kathageye meneda, “Ape do iń hohowạńpe.” E Probhu Isor, iń do amiń hohowama." 
Psalms27:9 Iń khon amakʼ mẽtʼãhã alom bedtama, ar edrete amren golam do alom laga ńireńa; amge ińren goṛoyicʼem tahẽ hecʼakana. E Isor, ińren babańcaoicʼ, iń do alom bạgiwạńạ, ar alom giḍi sayeńa." 
Psalms27:10 Ińren go-baba do ińkin bạgi giḍiyińre hõ Probhu Isor do ińe hạr sãohãyińạ. 
Psalms27:11 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ hor udukʼạńme baṛe; ar ińren bạiriko iạte amakʼ suṛucʼ horte ạyurińme." 
Psalms27:12 Ińren bạirikoakʼ monejoṅakʼre alom alaeyińạ, ente eṛe gohako do iń upạrteko teṅgo akana; onkoakʼ sãhetʼ sãote santao do oḍokokʼ kana." 
Psalms27:13 Probhu Isorakʼ emakʼ bhageakʼ do jiwetʼko modregeń ńel ńama. Noa katha bạń pạtiạuakʼ khan enḍekhan ińakʼ do cetʼ hoyokʼa? 
Psalms27:14 Ape do Probhu Isor cetanre as dohojoṅpe; monre daṛe ar dil baṛe dohoytape ar Probhu Isorre as akae tahenpe. 
Psalms28:1 E Probhu Isor, ińren asray buru, iń do amgeń hohowam kana. Am do ińakʼ kathate lutur alom tubạtʼ katama, ente hape akanem tahen khan enḍekhan patal purite okoeko pheḍakan onko lekage ińakʼ dosa do hoyokʼtińạ."
