Psalms28:2 Goṛo ńam lạgitʼ amiń hohowamre ar amakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i secʼ tiyiń rakabtińre ińakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ baṛe ańjomtińme. 
Psalms28:3 Okoeko phạsiạrage, ar okoe do bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan ar okoe jotoko tulucʼ bhageko roṛetʼkan menkhan ontorre bạṛicʼakʼ menakʼtako, onko sãote sạjạiyiń lạgitʼ do alom or seledińạ." 
Psalms28:4 Okoakʼ kạmi reakʼ ar bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại baṛe emakom; onkoakʼ tite okako kạmi akatʼ ona reakʼ kuṛại emakom; ar okaṭakʼ kuṛạiko ńam onage baṛe emkatakom 
Psalms28:5 Probhu Isorakʼ ti okae kạmi akatʼ onko do ona reakʼ bako hetawakʼkana, onatege uni do onkoe marao giḍikoa, ar bae benao rakapʼkoa." 
Psalms28:6 Bhạgạngeae Probhu Isor do, uni do ińakʼ nehõre ańjom akada." 
Psalms28:7 Probhu Isorge ińakʼ daṛe ar ḍhal do; ińakʼ ontor do unirege hirlạ akana, ar onatege iń do goṛoń ńam akada; iń do õṛhẽ sereńateń sarhaoea." 
Psalms28:8 Probhu Isorge, acʼren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe; unige acʼren ojokʼ akatʼkoren rukhiyạyicʼ gaṛ do." 
Psalms28:9 E Probhu Isor, amren hoṛko rukhiyạkom, ar amren ạidạriko bhorakome; am do onkoren gupiyicʼ hoyokʼme ar jaejug hạbicʼ saṅgha akae dohokom." 
Psalms29:1 E Isorren hoponko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok lại sodorpe, Probhu Isorakʼ daṛe ar ṭhonokge lại sodorpe" 
Psalms29:2 Ape do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok lại pasnaope; ar uniyakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ sonot reakʼ katha disạite manot emaepe. 
Psalms29:3 Dakʼ cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅ do ańjomokʼa; Ar ṭhonokren Isor doe huḍureda; ar sanam dakʼko cetanreye huḍur ocoyeda. 
Psalms29:4 Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅ do daṛete perecʼgea, ar ṭhonokte hõ purungea." 
Psalms29:5 Ona aṛaṅ do debdạru darekoe rạputʼeda; Probhu Isor do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru darekoe rạputʼ kaṭra kuṭrạyeda. 
Psalms29:6 Lebanon buru do mĩhũ lekae don ocoyeda, 6 ar Sirion buru hõ bir ḍaṅgra lekageye don ocoyeda." 
Psalms29:7 Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅ do serma reakʼ bijli leka malkaokʼ kana. 
Psalms29:8 Ar ona aṛaṅte hahaṅkar do dal dalaokʼa; Probhu Isor do Kades reakʼ hahaṅkare dal dalao ocoyeda. 
Psalms29:9 Probhu Isorakʼ daṛe do ela darekoe mocṛa mucṛi ocoyeda, ar birkoe khaḍea ocoyeda; uniyakʼ mundilre jotowakʼgeye meneda, “Uni doe ṭhonokgea.”" 
Psalms29:10 Probhu Isor do maraṅ ḍubạ dakʼre raj akane tahẽkana; uni do jaejugren raj kanae, uni do siṅghạsonre menaea." 
Psalms29:11 Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko daṛeye jogao akokana; ar suluke dan akokanteye bhorako kana. 
Psalms30:1 E Probhu Isor, amiń sarhaomea, ente amgem rakapʼ ạgu akadińạ; ińren bạiriko do iń upạrte bam rạskạ oco akatʼkoa." 
Psalms30:2 E Probhu, ińren Isor, goṛowạń lạgitʼ iń hohowatʼmere am dom boge utạrkedińa." 
Psalms30:3 E Probhu Isor, am do patal puri khonem rakapʼ ạgu akadińạ; ar amgem bańcao doho akadińạ jemon ona khạndṛuṅre pheḍokʼ alo lagaoạń." 
Psalms30:4 E Probhu Isor botorae kanko, ape do uni sereńaepe; ar uni sonottetʼ reakʼ sarhaotaepe;" 
Psalms30:5 Ente uniyakʼ edre do ḍher ghạṛicʼ baṅ tahenkana; uniyakʼ dayatege jion do ńamokʼ kana. Ar ńindạge eken rakʼ rakʼte paromokʼ kana, menkhan rạskạ do setakʼrege seṭerokʼ kana." 
Psalms30:6 Iń do ińakʼ nirại dinreń menetʼ tahẽkana, okoe hõ iń do bae lewe daṛeạńạ." 
Psalms30:7 E Probhu Isor, am do dayate ińakʼ buru do kajaktem teṅgo ocoakatʼa, menkhan am do mẽtʼãhãm danaṅketʼtam khan, iń doń keklesetʼena." 
Psalms30:8 E Probhu Isor, amgeń hohowatʼme tahẽkana; ińren Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrkateń menleda," 
Psalms30:9 “Ińakʼ gujukʼre se patal puriteń calakʼre do cetʼ labtiń? Dhuṛi do cetʼ ame sarhaomea? 
Psalms30:10 E Probhu Isor, ańjomtińme, ar ińre dayakʼme; E Probhu Isor, amge goṛowạńme.”" 
Psalms30:11 Ińakʼ homorokʼ bodolte am do enecʼjoṅem pherao ạdińa; ar gõṛẽ kicricʼem raṛaketʼtińte rạskạ dom oyo ạdińa," 
Psalms30:12 Jemon ińakʼ ontor hape alo tahentiń bickom am lạgitʼgeń sereń. E Probhu, ińren Isor, iń do jaejug amiń sarhaomea." 
Psalms31:1 E Probhu Isor, iń do amregeń hirlạ akana; lajaore tishõ alom paṛao ocoyińạ; amakʼ dhorom bicạr iạte rukhiyạyiń me." 
Psalms31:2 Iń secʼ amakʼ lutur oḍaotam; ar bańcaoiń lạgitʼ usạrate hijukʼme. Iń rukhiyạyiń lạgitʼ asray cạṭạnige hoyokʼme ar ińakʼ aotan gaṛ hõ hoyokʼme. 
Psalms31:3 Amge ińren huṭupʼ dhiri ar aotan gaṛ do; amakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ horem udukʼạńạ arem ạyur idiyińạ. 
Psalms31:4 Iń lạgitʼ danaṅre oḍao akatʼ jhạli khon am do rukhiyạyińme, ente am kangeam ińren aotan gaṛ do." 
Psalms31:5 Amakʼ tire ińakʼ jiwiń jimạyetʼtińạ, ente E Probhu, pạtiạranicʼ Isor, amgem chaḍao akadińạ." 
Psalms31:6 Okoe eṛe boṅgako ḍobokʼ akokan onko doń hirkhạwako kana; menkhan iń do Probhu Isorregeń bhorsakʼ kana. 
Psalms31:7 Amakʼ asambheṛ dayań ńamakatʼte iń doń rạskạkʼ kana, ariń hulạsokʼ kana; ente am do ińakʼ dukem ńel akada, ar ińakʼ kosṭo reakʼ katha hõm baḍaekana." 
Psalms31:8 Bạirikoakʼ tire am do bam dohoakadińạ, bickom mitʼṭecʼ phaelao jaegarem teṅgo akadińạ." 
Psalms31:9 E Probhu Isor, dayawạńme baṛe, ente iń do kosṭore minạńa; dukte ińakʼ mẽtʼ ar hoṛmo do laṅga idikʼ kantińạ." 
Psalms31:10 Hasote ińakʼ jiwi do oḍokokʼ kana, ar hae haete umer hõ parom calakʼkan tińa; bedhorom iạte ińakʼ daṛe do komao idikʼ kana, ińakʼ jaṅko do nijor caba akana." 
Psalms31:11 Bạiriko ṭhen iń do henostageń hoyakana, bạ̃ṛtikaete ińren gateko ṭhen. Ar ńepel oprom hoṛko ṭhen do torasge; kulhireko ńelliń khan onko doko ńir pharakokʼkana." 
Psalms31:12 Gocʼ hoṛ cetʼ lekako hiṛińokʼ onkage onko do ińko hiṛiń akadińạ; iń do rạputʼ bhajan lekań hoyakana. 
Psalms31:13 Iń reaṅ ạḍi hoṛko oktayetʼkan ona hõń ańjometʼgea, iń beṛhaete do botorge menakʼa. Onko do iń upạrte mitʼ sãoteko solha joṅkana, ar gojeń lạgitʼko soṛojontro kana." 
Psalms31:14 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, iń do amregeń hirlạ akana; ariń meneda, “Am kangeam ińren Isor do.”" 
Psalms31:15 Amakʼ tirege ińakʼ okteko do; okoe ińko khudạuedeń kan onko bạirikoakʼ ti khon amge bańcaoińme baṛe. 
Psalms31:16 Amren golam cetanre mẽtʼãhã marsal ocoytam; amakʼ dayate rukhiyạyińme. 
Psalms31:17 E Probhu Isor, iń doń hohoakawatʼmea; lajaore alom paṛao ocoyińạ; bedhoromkoge boroṅ lajaoreko paṛaokʼma, onko do hape akae patal puriteko ńurokʼma." 
Psalms31:18 Bạḍại ar hirkhạ salakʼ okoe do dhorom hoṛko upạrte bemanot kathako roṛ. Onkoakʼ eṛe luṭi do guṅgạkʼtako ma. 
Psalms31:19 Amakʼ bhạlạiyteakʼ do samani maraṅ! Am botoram kanko lạgitʼge ona dom dohoakada; amre hirlạ akanko do amgem bhạlạiyetʼkoa, ona do sanamko samaṅrege." 
Psalms31:20 Onko do amakʼ mẽtʼãhã danaṅre dohokom manwakoakʼ soṛojontro khon hõ danaṅ kom; jhogṛa reakʼ reṭe peṭeko khon amakʼ hirlạrege begar dohokom. 
Psalms31:21 Probhu Isorakʼge sarhaokʼ hoyokʼtae ma. Pạcrianakʼ nagraha khon uniyakʼ dulạṛ do hahaṛageye udukʼ akawạdińạ. 
Psalms31:22 Iń do botorteń menleda, “Am ṭhen khon iń doń begar akana.” Menkhan goṛo ńam lạgitʼ tinreń hohowatʼmea unre am do ińakʼ nehõrrem ańjomketʼtińạ." 
Psalms31:23 E sanam Isor bhokti hoṛ, ape do Probhu dulạṛepe biswạsiko do Probhu Isorgeye rukhiyạkoa menkhan phulạukʼkanko do purạteye sạjạikoa." 
Psalms31:24 Ape okoe do Probhu Isor cetanrepe hirlạ akan ape do monre daṛe dohoype ar dil joṅpe. 
Psalms32:1 Bhạgạngeae uni hoṛ, one okoeyakʼ ghạṭko ikạ akantae, ar okoeyakʼ kạiko dapal akantae." 
Psalms32:2 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, one okoeyakʼ dosko Probhu Isor doe ikạ akatʼtae, ar ontorre jãhãn eṛeteakʼ bạnukʼtae." 
Psalms32:3 Iń do tinre kại bạń aṅgoc akatʼtiń tahẽkana unre goṭa dingeń hae haeyokʼkan tahẽkana ar ińakʼ jaṅko do heṛokʼkantiń tahẽkana; 
Psalms32:4 ente siń ar ńindạ amakʼ ti do unre iń cetanre hamalge tahẽkana; ar setoṅ din reakʼ dãk leka ińakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ daṛe hõ komae idikʼkan tahẽkana. (Sela) 
Psalms32:5 Unre ińakʼ kại do am ṭheniń aṅgockeda, ińakʼ bedhorom do ar bạń oko doholeda. Ińiń menkeda, “Ińakʼ ghạṭko reakʼ katha do ińren Probhu Isor ṭheniń aṅgoca.” Ar am do ińakʼ ghạṭkom ikạkatʼa. (Sela)" 
Psalms32:6 Ona iạte tinạkʼ din ạt menakʼ unạkʼ din amko botoramkan hoṛ do am ṭhenko koejoṅ ma; sạrige, muhin do banbạsi dakʼleka tinre hijukʼa unre ona do onko baṅ paṛao akoa." 
Psalms32:7 Amge ińren danaṅ akan ṭhạ̃i do. Amge gạr khonem horho jaṅge akadińạ chaḍaokʼ reakʼ hulạs sereńte amgem esetʼ ạcur akadińạ. (Sela) 
Psalms32:8 Iń Probhu Isorge bud ar akeliń ema ma ar okaṭakʼ horte calakʼ hoyokʼtam onań udukʼama; ariń beṅgetʼama ariń solhawama. 
Psalms32:9 Sadom se gadha leka do alope hoyokʼa one onko do bujhạu reakʼ daṛege bạnukʼtako; onko do mocare jhinkatege kạbuko hoyokʼa, ar baṅkhan ape ṭhen do bako sorokʼa." 
Psalms32:10 Bedhoromicʼ do ạḍi jala hoyaea, menkhan okoe Probhu Isorre hirlạ akane tahen uni do Probhu Isorakʼ dayageye esetʼ ạcurea." 
Psalms32:11 E Isor botoraekan hoṛko, Probhu Isorge aperen rạskạwạnicʼe hoyokʼma, uni iạtege ape do kusikʼpe; ar ontorre okoepe khạṭige, ape sanamkoge hulạsate sereńpe." 
Psalms33:1 E Isor botoraekan hoṛko, Probhu Isorakʼko reaṅ ape do hulạsate sereńpe; uni sarhao sereńae do khạṭi hoṛkoakʼ kạmikangea." 
Psalms33:2 Peṛesaṅ banamate Probhu Isor do gun manao joharae pe; ar gel taranakʼ banamkote õṛhẽ sereńaepe. 
Psalms33:3 Uni lạgitʼ nãwãnakʼ sereńko sereńpe, ar sereń banamte andoṛaepe." 
Psalms33:4 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sạrigea, uni do sanam kạmireye pạtiạrgea." 
Psalms33:5 Probhu Isor do dhorom kạmi ar dhorom bicạrgeye dulạṛeda; goṭa dhạrtirege uniyakʼ dulạṛ do menakʼa. 
Psalms33:6 Probhu Isorakʼ kathatege serma do sirjạu akana; ar ona reakʼ sanamakʼ do uniyakʼ sahẽtʼte sirjạu akana. 
Psalms33:7 Uni do jalapuri reakʼ dakʼkoe jarwa ocoyetʼa, ar judạ judạ murạikore onako dakʼe dohoyeda." 
Psalms33:8 Dhạrtiren sanam hoṛge Probhu Isorko botorae ma, ar prithimiren sanamkoge uni botorteko thartharaokʼma;" 
Psalms33:9 Ente uni doe menkeda ar sanamakʼ do sirjạuena; uni doe hukumkeda ar sanamakʼ tearena. 
Psalms33:10 Sanam jạtrenkoakʼ goṭawakʼge Probhu Isor doe ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa; ar onkoakʼ hudisko hõ bae jo baha ocoytakoa. 
Psalms33:11 Menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ goṭawakʼ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena; uniyakʼ mon do jug cetan juge tahentaea. 
Psalms33:12 Bhạgangeako onko jạtrenko do, okoeren Isor doe Probhu kan; Bhạgangeako onko hoṛ do, okoe do acʼakʼ nij ạidạri menteye bachao akatʼko." 
Psalms33:13 Probhu Isor do serma khon latarteye oyoṅkeda ar sanam manwakoe ńelketʼkoa. 
Psalms33:14 Okoe dhạrtireko girobasokʼ kan onko do acʼakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khone beṅgetʼako kana. 
Psalms33:15 Sanamkoakʼ ontor uni doe teareda; ar onko okako cekae ona joto doe bujhạueda. 
Psalms33:16 Maraṅ palṭon phạdko tahenre hõ raj do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa; ar maraṅ daṛe tahentaere hõ bir banṭa hoṛ do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms33:17 Rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ sadom cetan reakʼ hirlạ hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea; maraṅ daṛe tahẽlen khan hõ sadom do bae rukhiyạ daṛeaea. 
Psalms33:18 Menkhan Probhu Isorre okoeyakʼ botor menakʼ, ar uniyakʼ dulạṛre okoe asko dohoyetʼ, onko cetanre uniyakʼ daya do tahẽnkana;" 
Psalms33:19 jemon moron khon onkoakʼ jiwi rukhiyạkʼtako ar akalre jiwetʼe doho daṛeako. 
Psalms33:20 Abo do Probhu Isor lạgitʼge bon ńel horeda; uni kangea aboren goṛoyicʼ ar ḍhal do. 
Psalms33:21 Unirege aboakʼ mon do rạskạkʼ kana, ente abo do uniyakʼ ńutumre bon bhorsa akana." 
Psalms33:22 E Probhu Isor, alere amakʼ dulạṛ baṛe tahenma, ente ale do amregele as akana." 
Psalms34:1 Iń do sanam okte Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea; ińakʼ mocare uniyakʼ sereń do mitʼtalaoge tahena. 
Psalms34:2 Iń do Probhu Isor iạteń gorbokʼ kana; ar ona ańjomte nindhạnko doko rạskạkʼ kana. 
Psalms34:3 Iń sãote Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ katha roṛpe; Dela, abo do mitʼ sãote uni bon sarhaoe ma." 
Psalms34:4 Iń do Probhu Isoriń hohowadea, uni doe ańjomketʼtińạ; ar ińakʼ sanam botor khon uni doe bańcaokedińa." 
Psalms34:5 Hoṛko do tinre uni secʼ pạtiạr salakʼko beṅgeda unre onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do kharsalakʼtakoa; onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do baṅ lajao ocokʼtakoa. 
Psalms34:6 Nui nacaricʼ do Probhu Isore hohoadea; ar Probhu Isor do uniyakʼe ańjomketʼtaea ar sanamakʼ kosṭo khon uniye bańcaokedea. 
Psalms34:7 Okoe do Probhu Isorko botorae kan Probhu Isorren goḍet do onko beṛhaeteye ḍerakʼkana ar onkoe rukhiyạyetʼkoa. 
Psalms34:8 Cakha ạikạukate ńelpe Probhu Isor doe bhagegea; bhạgangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do unireye hirlạkʼkan." 
Psalms34:9 E Probhu Isorren hoṛko, ape do uni botoraepe, ente okoe uniko bhoktiae kan onko do cetʼ okulạnge baṅ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Psalms34:10 Juạn dhạcri kulkoakʼ do jomakʼ reakʼ ṭonṭa hoyokʼkana, onko do reṅgecʼteko kosṭokʼkana; menkhan okoe Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekako calakʼ onko do bhageakʼte bako ṭonṭakʼa." 
Psalms34:11 E gidrạko, dela hijukʼpe, ar ińakʼ katha ańjompe; iń doń cetʼapea cetʼ lekate Probhu Isorpe bhoktiaea mente." 
Psalms34:12 Ape modre noa jion khemao do okoeye menetʼkana? Ar suk jomkate ḍher din bahaokʼ lạgitʼ do okoye khojkana? 
Psalms34:13 Enḍekhan uni do alaṅte bạṛicʼ katha aloe roṛma, ar luṭite eṛeakʼ kathako aloe oḍok ocoyma." 
Psalms34:14 Bạṛicʼ kạmi khon sạṅgińre tahenpe, ar bhageakʼ kạmipe; suluk lạgitʼ ahkaokʼpe ar ona do alope aṛakʼ giḍikakʼa." 
Psalms34:15 Dhorom reakʼ horte okoeko calakʼkan onkore do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã menakʼa; onkoakʼ koejoṅ ańjom lạgitʼ uniyakʼ lutur do jhicʼge menakʼtaea. 
Psalms34:16 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan Probhu Isor do onko upạrteye teṅgona, jemon dhạrti khon onkoakʼ ńutum cabakʼtako." 
Psalms34:17 Okoe dhorom reakʼko kạmikan Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ rakʼe ańjometʼtakoa; ar joto lekan kosṭo khon uni doe rukhiyạyetʼkoa. 
Psalms34:18 Okoeyakʼ mon rạputʼ akantako Probhu Isor do onko ṭhengeye tahena; okoeyakʼ ontor talga tạwạkʼ akan onko doe bańcaokoa. 
Psalms34:19 Okoe dhorom horteye calakʼ uniyakʼ do muhinko ḍhergere hõ onako khon Probhu Isor doe bańcaoea. 
Psalms34:20 Uni do uniyakʼ sanam jaṅkoe rukhiyạitaea, onako do mitʼṭecʼ hõ bae rạputʼ ocowakʼa." 
Psalms34:21 Bedhoromkoakʼ gujukʼ do bạṛicʼakʼ tire; ar okoe dhorom hoṛko hirkhạwako kan onko doko bicạr dusi ocokʼa. 
Psalms34:22 Probhu Isorge acʼren golamkoe chaḍaoetʼkoa; okoe unireko hirlạkʼkan okoehõ onko do sạjại bako ńama. 
Psalms35:1 E Probhu Isor, okoe doko iń upạrtenkan onko upạrte amhõ teṅgonme; ar iń upạrte okoeko lạṛhạikan onko upạrte amhõ lạṛhạime." 
Psalms35:2 Lạṭu ar kạticʼ am do banar ḍhalge sabme ar iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ hijukʼte teṅgonme. 
Psalms35:3 Okoe ińko khudạu ạguyedeńkan, onkoakʼ hor do borlomte esedme. Ar iń mitạńme, “Ińge amakʼ bańcao do.”" 
Psalms35:4 Ar okoe iń gojeńko menjoṅkan onko do lajao ar bemanotreko paṛaokʼma; ar okoe do ińakʼ bạṛicʼ reakʼko soṛojontroyetʼ onko do opomankateko ruạṛ calakʼma. 
Psalms35:5 Onko do hoete peṭecʼ lekako oṭaṅokʼma; Hẽ, Probhu Isorren goḍet do onkoe lagako ma." 
Psalms35:6 Onkoakʼ hor do ńut ar leńjetʼge hoyokʼma; Hẽ, Probhu Isorren goḍet do onkoe khudạuko ma." 
Psalms35:7 Onko do khanakha iń lạgitʼ gaḍare jhạliko oḍao akada, ar khanakha iń lạgitʼ khạṛiko la akada." 
Psalms35:8 Onate ackage onkore ujạṛokʼ do hecʼ paṛaokʼma; ar oḍao akatʼ jhạlire akogeko jhạlikʼma, ona ujạṛokʼre akogeko paṛaokʼma." 
Psalms35:9 Unre Probhu Isor iạte iń doń rạskạkʼa; ar uniyakʼ babańcaore iń doń hulạsokʼa. 
Psalms35:10 Unre ińakʼ sanam hoṛmoe mena, “E Probhu Isor, am leka do ar okoe menaea? Amge dukokʼkanko do onkoren bạirikoakʼ ti khonem bańcaoetʼkoa ar okoe onko khonko daṛege; ar okoe doko luluṭko kan onkoakʼ ti khon am do dukokʼko ar ṭonṭakʼkan kom bańcaoetʼkoa.”" 
Psalms35:11 Santaoko do eṛe goha emokʼ lạgitʼko hijukʼkana, ar oka bạń baḍae ona reaṅko jerayedeń kana." 
Psalms35:12 Bhạlại bodol onko do bạṛicʼakʼko halawạń kana; Hae, iń okoḍa do!" 
Psalms35:13 Enhõ onkoakʼ ruạkʼre iń do gõṛẽ kiricʼ iń horokʼleda, ar upạs dohokate ińakʼ jiwiń nandanketʼtińạ; menkhan ińakʼ koejoṅ do iń ṭhenge ruạṛ hecʼena." 
Psalms35:14 Boeha ar gatekoń atʼketʼko leka onko lạgitʼ iń homor halaṅleda; ar homor halaṅ jokhecʼ eṅgattetʼe atʼen leka bohokʼiń kuḍburletʼtińạ. 
Psalms35:15 Menkhan tinreń tohotʼena unre onko do kusiteko mitʼena. Ar iń sasetińko do iń ạuriń baḍaerege iń upạrteko mitʼ akana. Onko do jao ghạṛicʼko roṛ dogeń kana. 
Psalms35:16 Hulạsokʼ jokhecʼ Isor bin botorae ṭiṭkạriko leka onko do iń upạrte togocʼ ḍaṭako ehopʼena. 
Psalms35:17 E Probhu Isor, am do ar tinạkʼ din noakom ńela? Onkoakʼ santao khon rukhiyạyińme baṛe; noko dhạcri kulkoakʼ ti khon ińakʼ jiwi bańcaotińme." 
Psalms35:18 Maraṅ bạisire iń doń sarhaomea ar aema hoṛko talare amiń õṛhẽ sereńa ma. 
Psalms35:19 Eṛe iạte okoe do ińren bạiriko hoyakan onko ṭhen do alom landa dhutʼ ocoyińạ; ar khanakhate okoeko kurudạń kan iń upạrte mẽtʼ do alom ripitʼ ocoakoa. 
Psalms35:20 Onkoakʼ kathako suluk secʼ do bạnukʼa; disạmre sulukte okoeko tahenkan onko upạrte onko do phạsiạrate perecʼ monsubạ menakʼtakoa. 
Psalms35:21 Iń upạrte luṭi binḍucʼkateko meneda, “Hẽ, ale do nij mẽtʼtegele ńel akada.”" 
Psalms35:22 E Probhu Isor, am do noakom ńeleda, am do alom thir hapekokʼa; E Probhu Isor, am do iń sorrege tahenme." 
Psalms35:23 E ińren Isor, E ińren Probhu, ma beretʼme, ar iń sejokʼme, ar iń secʼ katha roṛme." 
Psalms35:24 E Probhu, ińren Isor, dhoromte bicạrkạtińme baṛe; iń upạrte jemon aloko rạskạkʼ." 
Psalms35:25 Ar mon monte alom roṛ ocoakoa, “Bhagege! Okaṭakʼle khojkan tahẽkan onage hoyakana.” Onko do alom roṛ ocokoa, “Onko dole marao akatʼkoa mente.”" 
Psalms35:26 Ińakʼ muhin ńelte okoeko rạskạkʼ kan onko sanamge lajao arko opomanokʼma; okoe iń cetante apnarko udugokʼkan onko do lajao ar opomanreko ńurokʼma. 
Psalms35:27 Dhorom horteń calakʼkan, noa katha ańjomkate okoeko rạskạkʼkan onko do kusiteko hulạsokʼma. Ar jao ghuṛigeko men ma, “Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtaema; uni do acʼren gutikoakʼ bhạlại iạteye kusikʼ kana.”" 
Psalms35:28 Iń do alaṅte amakʼ dhorom bicạr reakʼ kathań roṛa, ar goṭa dinge amiń sarhao sereńa ma." 
Psalms36:1 Bạṛicʼkoakʼ ghạṭ reaṅ ińakʼ ontor do Isorakʼ noa kathae ńam akada, “Bạṛicʼko do Isor bako botoraea.”" 
Psalms36:2 Onko do ako reaṅ cikạ̃ṛ cikạ̃ṛ kathako roṛa, Isor do onkoakʼ kại bae sabtakoa, ar hirkhạ mẽtʼte hõ bae ńelkoa." 
Psalms36:3 Onkoakʼ moca katha do bạṛicʼ ar phạsiạrate perecʼgea; Akelan hoṛko leka calakʼ doko bad akada, ar bhage kạmi hõ bako kạmikana." 
Psalms36:4 Onko do aṭetʼre giticʼkate hõ bạṛicʼ phundiko aṭãoa; onko do bedhorom horre apnartetʼko jimạ akana ar bạṛicʼakʼ do bako hirkhạwakʼ kana. 
Psalms36:5 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do serma hạbicʼ menakʼa; ar amakʼ pạtiạr do coṭ rimilko hạbicʼge." 
Psalms36:6 Amakʼ dhorom do Isorakʼ buruko lekana; amakʼ dhorom bicạr do athantar doreão leka. E Probhu Isor, manwa ar janwar jotoge jiwetʼ baṛe dohokom." 
Psalms36:7 E Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ dam do ohoge emlena; ar amakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ umulre manwa do hirlạko ńama." 
Psalms36:8 Amakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jomakʼ jomte onko doko tirpitokʼa; amakʼ hạ̃s reakʼ ar gaḍa reakʼem ńu ocokoa. 
Psalms36:9 Am do jion reakʼ marsal kanam; amakʼ marsaltege ale dole marsalena. 
Psalms36:10 Okoe amko baḍae akatʼme onkore amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahen ma; ar okoeyakʼ ontor khạṭige onko do jaoge amakʼ dhorom bicạrko ńama. 
Psalms36:11 Iń do bạḍạikoakʼ jaṅga latarre alom dohoyińạ; jemon bạṛicʼ hoṛko aloko laga daṛeạń. 
Psalms36:12 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan ńelme onko doko ńurhạ akana; onko doko giḍi ocoakana, ar bako beretʼ ruạṛ daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms37:1 Am do bạṛicʼ hoṛko iạte alom jal jalaokʼa, se behok kạmiyetʼkanko ńelte alom hiskạkʼa;" 
Psalms37:2 ente ghãs lekage onko do usạrateko rohoṛ kạrcubokʼa ar hạriạṛ nạ̃ṛĩ-sakam leka ḍher din do bako ṭikạu tahẽ daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms37:3 Probhu Isorre biswạs dohoyme ar bhageakʼ kạmime; amakʼ disạmrege tahenme, ar pạtiạrte taṛamme." 
Psalms37:4 Probhu Isor iạte hulạsokʼme; amakʼ mon reakʼ sana do unigeye purạutama. 
Psalms37:5 Amakʼ jion hor reakʼ bhar do Probhu Isorrege dohoyme; ar unire bhorsa akae tahenme, khan unige jotowakʼe purạutama." 
Psalms37:6 Unige amakʼ dhorom do marsal lekae jhak jhak ocoytama; ar amakʼ dhorom kạmiko do tikin reakʼ setoṅ lekae hoeocoya. 
Psalms37:7 Probhu Isor samaṅre thir hape akan tahenme; ar uni ńel horre tahenme. Apnarakʼ kạmi purạu lạgitʼ okoe do bạṛicʼakʼko kạmire acʼakʼ mone lagaoetʼ, uni iạte am do alom jal jalaokʼa." 
Psalms37:8 Edrekʼ do ikạkakʼme, hataṅ alom loloe tama; ar alom jal jalaokʼa, ente ona do eken bạṛicʼ secʼgeye ạyur idiya." 
Psalms37:9 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ doko marao ocokʼa, menkhan Probhu Isorre okoeko bhorsakʼ kan onko do disạmko ạidạri joṅa." 
Psalms37:10 Ar thoṛa ghạṛicʼ khange bạṛicʼko doko marao utạrokʼa; ar ńam baṛalekore hõ onko do bako sendra ńamokʼa. 
Psalms37:11 Menkhan mạ̃hir hoṛko do disạmko ạidạri joṅa; ar asambheṛ bhorko ńamte onko doko hulạsokʼa. 
Psalms37:12 Isor botoraeko upạrte bạṛicʼ hoṛko do phundiko aṭaoa ar onko upạrte ḍaṭako keṭer meṭertakoa. 
Psalms37:13 Probhu Isor doe baḍaea bạṛicʼkoakʼ mucạtʼ din do sor hijukʼ kana, ar onatege uni do onko ńelteye landayeda." 
Psalms37:14 Dukokʼko ar ṭonṭakʼkanko maraoko lạgitʼ, ar dhorom horte calakʼkan hoṛko gocʼko lạgitʼ, onko bạṛicʼ hoṛko do tarwaṛeko bocʼetʼtakoa ar akʼ ko gakʼ akatʼtakoa." 
Psalms37:15 Menkhan onkoakʼ tarwaṛe do onkoakʼ koṛamrege bolokʼa ar onkoakʼ akʼ do rạpudokʼ takoa. 
Psalms37:16 Ḍher bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ do asambheṛ dhon menakʼa, menkhan Isor botoraeko do tinạkʼ menakʼtako onage ḍhera." 
Psalms37:17 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ti do rạpudokʼ takoa, menkhan Probhu Isor botoraeko doe sapʼ sambṛaoetʼkoa." 
Psalms37:18 Sạbit hoṛkoakʼ din hilokʼ reakʼ jion do Probhu Isore baḍaegea; onkoakʼ paona somppoti do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽ akae tahena. 
Psalms37:19 Dukokʼ dinre onko do lajaore bako paṛaokʼa; ar akal dinkore onko do jomakʼko ńama. 
Psalms37:20 Menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛ doko maraokʼa; Probhu Isorren bạiriko do ṭạnḍi reakʼ saj leka, ar dhũạ lekako chanokʼa." 
Psalms37:21 Bạṛicʼko do pańcako hataoa ar bako hala ruạṛa, menkhan Isor botoraeko do daya arko emokʼa." 
Psalms37:22 Probhu Isor okoeye bhorako onko do ạidạriko ńama, menkhan okoe uniye sarapako onko doko marao ocokʼa." 
Psalms37:23 Probhu Isorge daṛean hoṛkoakʼ calakʼ hore ṭhikakoa; ar onkoakʼ jion ńelte uni doe kusikʼa. 
Psalms37:24 Gur lenre hõ onko do bako bhindạṛ tahena, ente Probhu Isorakʼ ti do onkoe sapʼ dohoyetʼkoa." 
Psalms37:25 Iń do juạniń tahẽkana, ar ńitokʼ doń haṛamena, menkhan Isor botoraeko doko bạgi ocoakana se onkoren bõsko doko kokoe kana nonka do bạń ńel akatʼkoa." 
Psalms37:26 Isor botoraeko do jao oktegeko dayakʼa ar pańcako emokʼa; onkoren bõsko do bhorko ńama. 
Psalms37:27 Bạṛicʼakʼ bạgiyakʼme ar bhageakʼ kạmime, onate jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼem tahena." 
Psalms37:28 Probhu Isor do dhorom bicạre dulạṛetʼa; ar acʼ botoraekanko do bae bạgi giḍikoa. Uni do jaejug hạbicʼe rukhiyạkoa, menkhan bạṛicʼ bõsrenko doe marao giḍikoa." 
Psalms37:29 Isor botorae hoṛko do disạmko ạidạrijoṅa ar onḍe do jaejug hạbicʼko tahena. 
Psalms37:30 Isor botoraekoakʼ moca do akel reakʼ kathae lại jạhira; onkoakʼ alaṅ do dhorom bicạr reakʼ kathageye roṛa. 
Psalms37:31 Onkoren Isorakʼ hukum do onkoakʼ ontorre menakʼa; onkoakʼ jaṅga do baṅ leńjedokʼtakoa. 
Psalms37:32 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko do Isor botoraeko lạgitʼ tãṛãkʼ akanko tahena, ar onko gocʼko reakʼko kurumuṭuiya." 
Psalms37:33 Menkhan Probhu Isor do bạṛicʼkoakʼ tire bae aṛakʼ giḍikakoa; bicạrre onko do bae dusi ocokoa. 
Psalms37:34 Probhu Isorre as doho joṅme, ar uniyakʼ horte taṛamme; uni doe maraṅmea ar am do disạmem ạidạrijoṅa. Ar bạṛicʼ hoṛko maraolenre hõ am dom ńelkoa." 
Psalms37:35 Bedhorom hoṛ do ạḍi haḍrap iń ńel akadea, nij hasare harakʼkan hạriạṛ dare leka uni doe jhạṛpạkʼ kana." 
Psalms37:36 Ona tayom uni doe marao cabayena, ar bae tahẽlena; iń doń ńam baṛakedea, ar bae ńamlena." 
Psalms37:37 Sạbit hoṛkoakʼ jion secʼ beṅgedme; ar onko dhorom hoṛko ńelkom. Okoe sulukko dulạṛetʼ onkoren bõs doko tahengea. 
Psalms37:38 Menkhan kạkạiko doko marao cabakʼa; onko bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ bõs do ḍahao maraokʼa. 
Psalms37:39 Isor botoraeko reakʼ bańcaokʼ do Probhu Isor khonge hijukʼa; muhinre unige onkoren bhorsa doe hoyokʼa. 
Psalms37:40 Probhu Isorge onko doe goṛowakoa are rukhiyạkoa; bạṛicʼkoakʼ ti khon unige onkoe bańcaokoa, ar unige onko doe rukhiyạkoa, ente onko do unirege asrayko hatao akada." 
Psalms38:1 E Probhu Isor, edrete alom ruhedińạ, ar raṅgao khạtirte alom ḍanṭaoińạ;" 
Psalms38:2 Ente amakʼ sarko do ińre kiṛbitʼ akana, ar amakʼ ti do ińe sapʼ uricʼ akadińạ." 
Psalms38:3 Amakʼ edre iạte ińakʼ hoṛmo do niphuṭ bạnukʼa, ar kại iạte ińakʼ jaṅko hõ nirại bạnukʼ anaṅ." 
Psalms38:4 Ińakʼ bedhoromre iń doń unum akana; ona do nonkan bojha leka hoyakana ar bạń gokʼ daṛeakʼ kana. 
Psalms38:5 Ińakʼ bebuj iạte ińakʼ ghao khon bạṛicʼge so oḍokokʼ kana, ar ona do seya akana." 
Psalms38:6 Iń doń kubjạ akana, ar ạḍitetʼgeń kaba kubạ cabayena; goṭa din iń do monre duk dohokateń dãṛãn kana." 
Psalms38:7 Ińakʼ ḍanḍare do jal jalaokʼkan hasoge menakʼa, ar ińakʼ horko do nirại bạnukʼtińạ." 
Psalms38:8 Iń doń nijor akana, ariń rạputʼ akana, ar ontor reakʼ hasoteń kạulạ kạulikʼ kana." 
Psalms38:9 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ sanam khojogokʼakʼ dom baḍaegea; ińakʼ lolo sahẽtʼ hõ am ṭhen oko bạnukʼ anaṅ." 
Psalms38:10 Ińakʼ koṛam do dhuk dhukokʼkan tińạ, ar daṛe hõ cabayentińạ, ar mẽtʼ hõ ńut akantińạ." 
Psalms38:11 Ińakʼ noa dosa ńelte gate peṛako do iń khon pharakreko tahenkana, ar ińren peṛa pạrbhạko hõ iń khonko pharakokʼ kana." 
Psalms38:12 Okoe do iń gojeńko menjoṅkan onko do iń lạgitʼ pạsiko oḍao akada; okoe iń hạneńko menjoṅkan onko do maraoiń reakʼ botorko udukʼạń kana; goṭa din onko do ṭhokayiń reakʼ phundiko aṭaoeda. 
Psalms38:13 Iń doń kala akana, ar cetʼge bạń ańjomeda; ariń guṅgạ akana, ar cetʼge bạń roṛ daṛeakʼ kana." 
Psalms38:14 Okoe bae ańjom ar okoeyakʼ mocare jãhãn ạnḍuṅteakʼ bạnukʼtae, onka lekage iń doń hoyakana." 
Psalms38:15 E Probhu Isor, iń do am secʼ iń koyokʼ hor akada; E Probhu, ińren Isor, amgem roṛ ruạṛạńạ;" 
Psalms38:16 ente iń doń menleda, “Tinre jaṅga leńjedokʼtińạ unre ona iạte onko do alom rạskạ ocokoa, ar iń upạrte alom bạḍại ocokoa.”" 
Psalms38:17 Iń doń bhindạṛokʼ kana; ińakʼ kosṭo reakʼ katha do jaoge monre jagao ạńkana. 
Psalms38:18 Ińakʼ dosiń aṅgocetʼ tińạ; iń kại iạte mon do bhabnate perecʼ akantińạ. 
Psalms38:19 Ińren bạiriko do ṭaṭka arko daṛegea; ar okoe ạuṛiyakʼteko kurudạńkan onko doko ḍhergea. 
Psalms38:20 Iń do onkoń bhạlạileko khan onko do ińakʼ khutiytiń reakʼko kurumuṭuyeda; ar bhageakʼkoń ńam baṛaere onko do iń upạrteko teṅgon kana. 
Psalms38:21 E Probhu Isor, am do alom bạgi giḍiwạńạ; E ińren Isor, iń khon pharakre alom tahena." 
Psalms38:22 E Probhu Isor, ińren babańcaoicʼ, iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ usạra hecʼ godokʼme." 
Psalms39:1 Ińiń menkeda, “Iń calakʼ hor reaṅ iń do sontor akae iń tahena, jemon alaṅte aloń kại; ar tin hạbicʼ iń samaṅre bạṛicʼ hoṛko tahena un hạbicʼ ińakʼ moca doń gumạikakʼa.”" 
Psalms39:2 Menkhan mocań bondketʼ tiń khan, okaṭakʼ bhageakʼkan ona bạń roṛletʼte, ińakʼ mon reakʼ kosṭo do ḍherena." 
Psalms39:3 Iń do ontorre jala ehopʼạdińa; ar tinre mon monte katha roroṛiń ehopʼena unre seṅgel jolokʼ ehopʼena. Ar ona tayom doń menkeda," 
Psalms39:4 E Probhu Isor ińakʼ sesokʼ do tis cabakʼa? Iń do ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼ iń tahena; ar ińakʼ jion do tinạkʼ din lạgitʼ kana ona baṛe bujhạu ocoyińme. 
Psalms39:5 Am do ińakʼ dinko bar muṭ ganem doho akatʼtińạ. Amakʼ mẽtʼre ińakʼ jion do cetʼhõ baṅkana. Sạrige michạgeako mitʼke mitʼ manwa do jãhãtinạkʼgeye teṅgo uricʼ akanre hõ. (Sela) 
Psalms39:6 Manwa do umul lekae hijukʼa, ar calakʼ hõ umul lekage; uni do ạuṛiyakʼgeye kạumạu baṛaea; uni do dhone sońj joṅa menkhan ona okoeye joma ona do bae baḍaea." 
Psalms39:7 “E Probhu Isor, enḍekhan iń do ar cetʼ reakʼ asteń tahena? Ińakʼ as joṅakʼ ma jotoge coṅ amrege." 
Psalms39:8 Ińakʼ sanam ghạṭ khon chaḍaoiń me; ar buj thoṛagetako hoṛ ṭhen do alom cigạri ocoyińa. 
Psalms39:9 Iń do thir hapege minạńa, moca do ar bạń cahabtińạ, ente amge noako dom hoyocoakada." 
Psalms39:10 Iń cetan khon amakʼ sạjại do sahaṛkakʼme; amakʼ ti reakʼ dalte iń doń sesena. 
Psalms39:11 Kại iạte tinre manwako keṭecʼ kathatem ḍanṭaoetʼkoa, unre jạrdi leka onkoakʼ saj dom nosṭoyetʼtakoa; ente manwa do ekenko michạgea. (Sela)" 
Psalms39:12 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme; ar goṛowạń lạgitʼ ińakʼ rakʼ joṅ ańjomtińme; ińakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ ńelte am do alom thir hapekokʼa; ente ińren sanam hapṛamko cetʼlekako tahẽkan onkage ińhõ dhạrtire upriạ hoṛko leka minạńa." 
Psalms39:13 Iń khon eṭakʼ secʼ beṅgedme, jemon ạuriń calakʼre, ar ạuriń uṭhạukʼre, arhõń kharsala daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms40:1 Iń do Probhu Isor lạgitʼgeń koyokʼ horakatʼ tahẽkana. Uni do ińakʼe luturada, ar koejoṅe ańjomketʼtińạ." 
Psalms40:2 Uni doe rakapʼ ạgukedińa sasette perecʼ khạnduṛuṅ khon dalahe losotʼ reakʼ ghaḍlakʼ khonge. Uni do dhiri cetanreye teṅgokedińa ar keṭecʼ hasa cetanreye taṛam ocokedińa. 
Psalms40:3 Uni do ińakʼ mocare nãwã sereńe emadińạ, aboren Isorakʼ sarhaoakʼ sereńge. Ḍher hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼrege ona do paṛaokʼa ar monre botor hecʼakoa; onko do Probhu Isorreko bhorsakʼa." 
Psalms40:4 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ do, okoe do Probhu Isor cetanreye bhorsakʼ kan, ar onko secʼ bae ruạṛkan one onko bạḍại ar eṛeyakʼreko tahenkan." 
Psalms40:5 E ińren Probhu Isor, ḍhergetama amakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko do! Ale lạgitʼ okaṭakʼem goṭa akatʼ! Onań roṛ sodorlere, ariń lạilere ona do tishõ baṅ mucạdokʼa. Ar am leka do okoe menaea?" 
Psalms40:6 Am do janwar dãṛẽ hõ bam khojkana, ar jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại ńutumte dãṛẽ hõ bam khojkana; menkhan amakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ luturem emakawạdińa." 
Psalms40:7 Ona iạteń menleda, “Nokʼõeiń hecʼ akana; ar sostorre do iń hijukʼ reaṅ ol menakʼa." 
Psalms40:8 E ińren Isor, amakʼ sana leka calakʼge ińakʼ rạskạ do; ar amakʼ sanam hukumko do ińakʼ ontorre menakʼa.”" 
Psalms40:9 E Probhu Isor, maraṅ bạisire iń do amakʼ dhorom kạmi reaṅ iń lại jạhira; ar am dom baḍaege, iń do luṭikin bạń sikupʼetʼtińạ mente." 
Psalms40:10 Amakʼ dhorom reakʼ katha do ińakʼ ontorre bạń oko dohoya; iń do amakʼ pạtiạr ar bańcao reakʼ kathań lại idiya; amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr reakʼ katha maraṅ bạisire bạń oko dohoya. 
Psalms40:11 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ mãyã iń khon alom sapʼ dohoytama; amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr do jao ghuṛige jemone rukhiyạyiń ma;" 
Psalms40:12 ente aema muhinteń esetʼ ạcurakana; kại do ińe khudạu edeńkana ar ińreye hecʼ paṛao akana. Iń do bạń ńeńel kana; lekhare onako do ińakʼ bohokʼ upʼ khon hõ ḍhergea; dil do ar bạnukʼtińạ. 
Psalms40:13 E Probhu Isor, dayakate bańcaoińme baṛe; E Probhu Isor, iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ dela usạrate hijukʼme." 
Psalms40:14 Okoe do iń gojeń reakʼ kurumuṭure menakʼko onko jotoge lajao arko opomanokʼma; okoe ińakʼ sorbonasko khojkan onko do bohokʼ tumbutʼkateko ruạṛ calakʼma. 
Psalms40:15 Ar okoe iń ńelteko men, “Besge hoyakana!” Onko do lajaokateko ruạṛ calakʼma." 
Psalms40:16 Menkhan amakʼ sana leka calakʼkanko do amregeko kusikʼa arko hulạsokʼa; ar okoe amakʼ bańcaoko dulạṛetʼ onko do jaogeko men ma, “Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma!”" 
Psalms40:17 Iń do reṅgecʼ ariń nacargea, menkhan iń reaṅ do Probhu Isorgeye dạndikʼ kana. E ińren Isor, alom biloma amkangeam ińren gokʼṛoyicʼ ar babańcaoicʼ do." 
Psalms41:1 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do nacarko lạgitʼe dạndikʼkan; akalre Probhu Isor do uniye bańcaoea." 
Psalms41:2 Probhu Isor do uniye rukhiyạyea are bańcao dohoyea; disạmre uni do sukreye tahena. Ar uniren bạirikoakʼ tire uni do bae jimạyea. 
Psalms41:3 Uni do ruạ kạhil iạte aṭetʼreye jalatʼlenre hõ Probhu Isor do jiwi raṛecʼe emaea; ar ruạkʼicʼ do aṭetʼ khone rakapʼ ạguiyea. 
Psalms41:4 Ińiń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, iń do am upạrteń kại akada; de dayakate bogeyińme.”" 
Psalms41:5 Ińren bạiriko do ińakʼ bhageakʼ baṅkateko mena, “Uni do tinreye gujukʼa? Ar tinre uniyakʼ ńutum do cabakʼtaea?”" 
Psalms41:6 Onkoren jãhãege iń ńeńelko hecʼlenre onko do iń tulucʼ bạṛicʼakʼko roṛa; ar iń upạrte nindạu reakʼ kathako jogaṛa ar bahrere senkate onako lại baṛaea. 
Psalms41:7 Iń hirkhạwạń kanko do iń upạrteko khae khoyeda, ar onko do iń ạṛisiń reakʼko dạndikʼkana." 
Psalms41:8 Onkoko meneda, “Unire jãhãn bạṛicʼakʼ paṛao akana, ar okareye ńurakan onḍe khon do bae rakapʼ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Psalms41:9 Okoe doe ińren dulạṛiạ gatekan, okoere ińakʼ nunạkʼ pạtiạu menakʼtiń, ar okoe do iń tulucʼe jom ńũiyetʼkan, uni hõ iń upạrte iḍiye tuletʼtaea." 
Psalms41:10 Menkhan am do, E Probhu Isor, ińre dayakʼme; ar rakabińme, jemon onko cetanreń hala ruạr daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms41:11 Ińiń baḍaea am do ińre dhirpur akae menama, ente bạiri do iń cetanre bae jitạu daṛeada." 
Psalms41:12 Ińakʼ dhorom iạte am dom esetʼ ạcur akadińạ; am do jaejug lạgitʼ am samaṅrem doho akadińạ. 
Psalms41:13 Pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ Israelren Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Amen, amen." 
Psalms42:1 Jel hopon dakʼ lạgitʼ cetʼlekae ahkaokʼ kan, onkage E Isor, ińakʼ jiwi do am lạgitʼ ahkaokʼ kantińạ." 
Psalms42:2 Isor lạgitʼ, jiwetʼ Isor lạgitʼge ińakʼ jiwire tetaṅedeń kana; tinre iń do uni samaṅre senkateń teṅgona?" 
Psalms42:3 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ do ińakʼ din hilokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ hoyakantińạ; ar hoṛ hõko mitạń kana, “Okayenae amren Isor do?”" 
Psalms42:4 Iń do rakʼ rakʼte tinreń andesalekʼ kana, unre disạ hecʼạń kana ḍher porobko manaoetʼkan hoṛko tulucʼ rạskạ ar sarhao sereńate iń do Isorakʼ oṛakʼteń calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Psalms42:5 E ińakʼ jiwi, cedakʼem as chuṭạukʼkana? Cedakʼ nunạkʼ dom cońcol akana? Isorre bhorsa akae tahenme, ente unige ińe bańcaoińạ; onate iń do arhõ uniń sarhaoea." 
Psalms42:6 E ińren Isor, ińakʼ jiwi do be as akantińạ; onate iń do Jordan gaḍa aṛereń teṅgo akana, ar Hormon buru reakʼ cuṛạre ar Mitsui burure teṅgokate amakʼ katha reakʼiń ganḍonokʼ kana." 
Psalms42:7 Onḍe amakʼ jharna reakʼ saḍe do athantarre hohokʼkana; ar amakʼ ḍheoko ar hud hudạukʼkan dakʼko do iń cetante ạtu paromokʼ kana. 
Psalms42:8 Sińre Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ińreye duleda; ar ńindạ do jionren Isor ṭhen ińakʼ koejoṅ ar uniyakʼ sarhao sereńge ińren gate doe hoyokʼkana. 
Psalms42:9 Ińren Isor ṭhen, ińakʼ aotan buru ṭhen, iń do noa kathań roṛa, “Cedakʼ am dom hiṛińkedińa? Ar cedakʼ iń do bạirikoakʼ santao iạte monre duk seletʼiń dãṛãnkana?”" 
Psalms42:10 Ińren bạiriko landa dhutʼạńte tinreko mitạńa, “Okayenae amren Isor do?” Unre ińakʼ dosa do jaṅko gejerokʼ leka hoyokʼ kantińạ." 
Psalms42:11 E ińakʼ jiwi, cedakʼ am dom be asokʼkana? Cedakʼ nunạkʼ dom cońcol akana? Isorre bhorsa dohoyme, ente uni do arhõń sarhaoea; uni do ińren babańcaoicʼ ar ińren Isor kanae." 
Psalms43:1 E Isor, dhorom reakʼ baṛe bicạrtińme, ar bedhorom jạtrenko upạrte iń secʼ katha roṛme; ar phạsiara ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ti khon hõ rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms43:2 Ińren aotan gaṛren Isor dom amkangea; cedakʼ iń dom bạgi giḍiyedeń kana? cedakʼ bạirikoakʼ santao iạte monre duk doń asen baṛayeda? 
Psalms43:3 Amakʼ marsal ar amakʼ sạriyakʼtetʼ baṛe imạńme; onage iń do hore udukʼạńma. Ar amakʼ sonot buruteye idiyińma one okare amem tahenkan," 
Psalms43:4 jemon iń do Isorakʼ pinḍ ṭheniń sor daṛeakʼ. Unige ińren rạskạ ar suk do. E Isor, E ińren Isor, Iń do taranakʼ banamte amiń õṛhẽ sereńama." 
Psalms43:5 E ińakʼ jiwi, cedakʼ am dom be as akana? Cedakʼ nunạkʼ dom cońcol akana? Isor cetanre bhorsa dohoyme, ente iń do arhõń sarhaoea; unige ińren babańcaoicʼ ar ińren Isor kanae." 
Psalms44:1 E Isor, sedaere aleren hapṛamko oktere okaṭakʼem cekaletʼ onko reaṅ katha ale do apnarakʼ luturtele ańjomleda." 
Psalms44:2 Am do amakʼ tite eṭakʼ jạtrenkom laga ńirketʼkote ona jaegare aleren hapṛamkom doholetʼkoa; am do onko hoṛko cetanre nosṭoakʼem ạguleda ar aleren hapṛamkom teṅgo keṭecʼ ocoletʼkoa. 
Psalms44:3 Onko do akoakʼ tarwaṛete noa disạm do bako ạidạrian tahẽkana, ar akoakʼ daṛete hõ bako jitạu daṛeada; amakʼ daṛe, hẽ amakʼ maraṅ daṛete, ar amakʼ ṭhonoktege ona doko onkaleda, ente onkore amakʼ daya do tahẽkana." 
Psalms44:4 E Isor, ińren raj do amge; Jakobakʼ jitạukʼ reakʼ do amgem bebosta akada." 
Psalms44:5 Aleren bạiriko do amakʼ daṛetegele teṅgo daramkoa; ar okoe ale upạrteko teṅgokʼ onko do amakʼ jortegele lebetʼ gańjaokoa. 
Psalms44:6 Ińakʼ akʼ cetanre iń do bạń bhorsakʼkana, ińakʼ tarwaṛe do bae jitạu oco daṛeạńạ;" 
Psalms44:7 Menkhan amge bạiriko cetanre alem jitạu ocoakatʼlea, ar ale upạrtenko do lajaorem paṛao ocoakatʼkoa." 
Psalms44:8 Isor iạtege ale do jaogele gorbokʼ kana; jaejug ale do amgele sarhaomea. (Sela) 
Psalms44:9 Menkhan ńitokʼ am dom bạgi giḍiakatʼlea ar lajaorem paṛao ocoakatʼlea; lạṛhạire aleren palṭonko sãote am do ar bam tahẽnkana. 
Psalms44:10 Bạiriko samaṅ khonem pạc ocoketʼlea; ale upạrtenko do aleko luṭ akatʼlea. 
Psalms44:11 Samaṅe lạgitʼ tiyạkʼ idiye bhiḍi leka onkoakʼ tire am dom aṛakʼ akatʼlea ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talarem chirchạtur akatʼlea. 
Psalms44:12 Am do begor damtege amren hoṛkom ạkhriń akatʼkoa; ar noa iạte cetʼ amakʼ jãhãnakʼ lab hoyakantama? 
Psalms44:13 Aḍepase jạtrenko ṭhen am do alem henosta ocoyetʼlea; ar beṛhaeten hoṛko ṭhen do landa dhudhutʼkom hoyocoakatʼlea. 
Psalms44:14 Judạ judạ jạtrenko ṭhen aleakʼ ńutum do kạhtukgem hoyocoakada; ar hoṛko do ale ńelte bohokʼko rukuyetʼtakoa. 
Psalms44:15 Okoe ińko henostayedeń kan arko durnam edeńkan onkoakʼ katha iạte, ar okoe bạiriko iń cetanre hala ruạṛ lạgitʼko duṛupʼ akan onko iạte, iń do lajaoteń unum akana." 
Psalms44:16  
Psalms44:17 Noako ale cetanre paṛao akante, amle hiṛińakatʼmea ona do baṅa; ar amakʼ bondobosre bepạtiạr akae menakʼlea ona hõ baṅa." 
Psalms44:18 Am khon aleakʼ ontor do baṅ pạc ruạṛ akantalea; ar amakʼ hor khon aleakʼ jaṅga do baṅ ocokʼ akana. 
Psalms44:19 Menkhan am do enhõ nonkan mitʼ jaegare alem rạputʼ caba akatʼlea one okare toyokoakʼ ḍerakan; ar ale do kaṛaṅ ńutrem esetʼ ạcur akatʼlea. 
Psalms44:20 Aleren Isorle hiṛiń akade khan, ar debotako secʼ tile tiạr akatʼtale khan," 
Psalms44:21 enḍekhan Isor do cetʼ ona bae baḍaekan tahẽkana? Uni ma aleakʼ ontor reakʼ jotowakʼge coṅe baḍaege. 
Psalms44:22 Menkhan enhõ am lạgitʼge jao ghuṛi aleren jãhãe baṅ jãhãeko gocʼ ocokʼkana, ar hoṛko do gur ocokʼ bhiḍiko lekageko hudisetʼlea." 
Psalms44:23 E Probhu Isor, ebhenokʼme, cedakʼem jạpitʼ akada? Ma beretʼme, jaejug hạbicʼ do alom bạgi giḍilea." 
Psalms44:24 Cedakʼ mẽtʼãhã dom betʼ akatʼtama? Aleakʼ duk ar santao reakʼ katha do cedakʼem hiṛiń akada? 
Psalms44:25 Ale do dhuṛirele sombotʼ hape akana; ar aleakʼ hoṛmo do otre jalatʼ akantalea. 
Psalms44:26 Dela hijukʼme, ar goṛowaleme; amakʼ asambheṛ dayate chaḍaoleme." 
Psalms45:1 Ińakʼ ontor do bhage kathate cepel cepelokʼ kana; ar raj õnõṛhẽye lạgitʼ ińakʼ kobita do oḍokʼakana; ińakʼ alaṅ do cogoṛ olokʼicʼ akʼ kolom hoyakana. 
Psalms45:2 Am do manwako modre mońj utạricʼ kanam; amakʼ luṭikin reakʼ kathare do rasa dulogokʼkan leka; Isorakʼ jaejug reakʼ bhor do amrege ńurokʼ kana. 
Psalms45:3 E birbanṭa, amakʼ ḍanḍare tarwaṛe toltam; ṭhonok ar mante sajaokʼme." 
Psalms45:4 Sạriyakʼ, mạ̃hir ar dhorom secʼ amakʼ ṭhonokte jitạuicʼ leka mohnḍakʼme; ar amakʼ jojom ti do botoranakʼkoe kạmima." 
Psalms45:5 Rajren bạirikoakʼ koṛamre amakʼ laser sar do bidokʼkana; ar amren bạiriko do amakʼ jaṅga latarreko ńurokʼkana. 
Psalms45:6 E Isor, amakʼ siṅghạson do jug cetan jugge; ar amakʼ ḍanṭao do dhorom reakʼ ḍanṭaokana." 
Psalms45:7 Am do dhoromem dulạṛeda ar bedhorom dom kurudakʼ kana; Onate Isor, amren Isor do, amren soṅgetenko khon hõ bạ̃ṛti hulạs do sunum leka am cetanreye dul akada." 
Psalms45:8 Gondhoros, kunduru ar darcini reakʼ mahkaote amakʼ raj horokʼakʼ do mahkaokʼ kana; ar hạti sonḍa reakʼ raj dolanre taranakʼ banam do ame rạskạ ocoyetʼmea." 
Psalms45:9 Amren bhodro maejiuko modre raj hoponerako hõ menakʼkoa, ar raj hoponera do Ophir reakʼ sonate sajkate amakʼ jojomsa aṛere menaea." 
Psalms45:10 Ańjomme, E biṭi, moneyakʼme ar luturakʼme; ar amren hoṛ do hiṛińkakome; ar am babawakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ katha hõ hiṛińkakʼme." 
Psalms45:11 Enḍekhan raj do amakʼ mońjtetʼreye hạ̃sakʼa; unige amren kisạ̃ṛ do, ar unige ḍobokʼaeme." 
Psalms45:12 Tur nagraharen hoponerako do sandesko ạgu daraya; ar ạḍi kisạ̃ṛ hoṛko do amakʼ dayako khoja. 
Psalms45:13 Raj oṛakʼre raj hoponera do ạḍige mońje ńelokʼa; ar uniyakʼ horokʼ bandeakʼ do sona reakʼ sutạmte rokʼ galaṅ akana. 
Psalms45:14 Noksa akatʼ horoakʼte uni do raj ṭhenko idiyea; ar uni tayomte soṅgeten kũạ̃ri kuṛiko hõ am ṭhenko idi ocokʼa. 
Psalms45:15 Rạskạ ar hulạs salakʼ onko doko idi ocokʼa; ar onko do raj reakʼ dolanteko bolokʼa. 
Psalms45:16 Amren hapṛamkoakʼ jaega do amren hoponkoakʼ hoyokʼa; ar manwako talare am do onkoren bicạrkom tearkoa. 
Psalms45:17 Ar jạt jạtrenko ṭhen iń do amakʼ ńutumiń disạ ocomea; onate eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko do jaejug hạbicʼ amko sarhaomea. 
Psalms46:1 Isorge aboakʼ hirlạ ar daṛe; gạrre uni do gokʼṛoyicʼ kanae. 
Psalms46:2 Dhạrti dal dalaolenre hõ, buruko jalapurire dasao ńurlenre hõ, ona reakʼ dakʼko se rakapʼkate photolenre hõ ar ḍheoko reakʼ tạpiste buruko dal dalaolenre hõ, enhõ abo do oho bon botorlena." 
Psalms46:3  
Psalms46:4 Mitʼṭecʼ gaḍa menakʼa ar ona reakʼ nalako do Isorakʼ nagrahakoe rạskạ ocoyeda, ona sonot ṭhạ̃ikoge okare maraṅ Isorre tahenkan." 
Psalms46:5 Isor do ona nagrahareye tahenkana, onate ona do ṭarhao tahena; ar aṅga torage Isor do onae goṛowakʼa." 
Psalms46:6 Porjạtrenko doko kạumạueda, ar rajosṭiko do rạputʼena; Uni doe aṛaṅkeda, ar dhạrti do leyena." 
Psalms46:7 Sanam daṛeanicʼ Isor do abo soṅgere menaea; Jakobren Isorge aboren gaṛ do. (Sela) 
Psalms46:8 Dela hijukʼpe, Probhu Isorakʼ kạmiko ạribạndhipe, uni do dhạrtire nonosṭowakʼe ạguakada," 
Psalms46:9 Uni do dhạrti reakʼ joto lạṛhạiye thir ocoyeda, uni do akʼe rạputʼ kaca kucạyeda, ar borlom doe kaṭra kuṭrạyeda, ar rãt gạḍi do seṅgelreye atar giḍiyeda." 
Psalms46:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “Thirokʼpe; ar noa katha baḍaepe je, iń kangeạń Isor do; sanam jạtrenko do ińko sarhaoińạ, ar dhạrti hõ ińe sarhaoińạ.”" 
Psalms46:11 Sanam daṛean Isor do abo soṅgere menaea; Jakobren Isorge aboren gaṛ do. (Sela) 
Psalms47:1 E sanam jạtrenko, ape do thayoype; ar Isor ńutumte hulạs aṛaṅpe." 
Psalms47:2 Maraṅ Probhu Isor do botoranicʼ kanae; uni kangeae goṭa pirthimiren raj do. 
Psalms47:3 Uni do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko abo gobolre, ar aboakʼ jaṅga latarreye dohoyetʼkoa." 
Psalms47:4 Unige aboakʼ sompottiye begar dohoakada; ona do Jakobakʼ gorbo reakʼ kangea. (Sela) 
Psalms47:5 Isor do hulạs aṛaṅre menaea, Probhu do sakwa reakʼ sạderege menaea." 
Psalms47:6 Isor õṛhẽ sereńaepe, ar gun manao joharaepe; aboren raj õṛhẽ sereńaepe, ar unige gun manao joharaepe." 
Psalms47:7 Isor kangeae goṭa pirthimiren raj do; onate unige õṛhẽ sereńaepe. 
Psalms47:8 Sanam jạtrenko cetanre Isor doe rajokʼ kana; uni do acʼakʼ sonot siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana. 
Psalms47:9 Jạt jạtrenko modre okoe doko maraṅ hudạren kan, onko do mitʼ ṭhenko jarwakʼa, Onko do Abrahamren Isorren hoṛ menkategeko jarwakʼa. Dhạrtiren sanam disạm cakʼlaokoge Isor gobolren kanako, uni do sanamko khone maraṅgea." 
Psalms48:1 Aboren Isorakʼ nagrahare, ar uniyakʼ sonot burure, Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea ar joto khon bạ̃ṛti sarhao lek kanae" 
Psalms48:2 Isorakʼ tahen jaega do ona Sion burure, ar coṭre benaoakʼ maraṅ rajakʼ nagraha do ńelokʼte ạḍi mońjgea; ona do goṭa dhạrtiye rạskạ ocoyeda." 
Psalms48:3 Ona nagraha reakʼ raj dolanko do Isor acʼge gaṛ lekateye sodor akada. 
Psalms48:4 Rajko do akoren palṭonko jarwakate mitʼ soṅgeteko laha idiyena; 
Psalms48:5 ar ona nagraha ńelte onko doko comkao gotʼena ar ạḍi bạṛicʼko botorenteko dạṛkeda. 
Psalms48:6 Botorte onko do onḍeko thar tharaoena ar bedonte gidrại janamede kan maejiu lekako hoyena. 
Psalms48:7 Purub reakʼ kajak hoete cetʼleka uni do maraṅ maraṅ Tạrsis jahajkoe rạputʼletʼ, onkage onkoe marao giḍikatʼkoa." 
Psalms48:8 Sanam daṛean Probhu Isorakʼ nagraha khon, aboren Isorakʼ nagraha tala khon okale ańjomakatʼ ona do mẽtʼtehõle ńelkeda; uni do jaejug hạbicʼ nagrahae benao akada." 
Psalms48:9 E Isor, amakʼ oṛakʼrege amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ kathagele ganḍonjoṅ kana." 
Psalms48:10 E Isor, amakʼ reaṅ cetʼleka sanam manwako baḍaekan onkage amakʼ sarhao do dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ menakʼa; amakʼ jojom ti do dhorom kạmi reakʼ daṛete perecʼgea." 
Psalms48:11 Amakʼ dhorom bicạr iạte Sion buru doe kusikʼma ar Jihudạ reakʼ atoko do rạskạte perejokʼma. 
Psalms48:12 E Jihudạren hoṛko, ape do Sion buru beṛhaete ạcur hijukʼpe, ar uniyakʼ gaṛko lekha legaepe;" 
Psalms48:13 Ona beṛhaeteakʼ dolanko ạri bạndhiyakʼpe, ar raj dolan reakʼ kandhako ńelpe, jemon aperen hoponko ṭhenpe lại daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms48:14 Nui Isorge aboren do jaejugren Isor kanae; unige gujukʼ hạbicʼ horkoe udukʼ idiyabona. 
Psalms49:1 E sanam jạtrenko, ape do noa katha ańjompe; okoe do noa dhạrtirepe girobasokʼ kan ape sanamkoge ańjompe;" 
Psalms49:2 Napṛakʼko huḍińko, kisạ̃ṛko, reṅgecʼko, ape sanamkoge ańjompe." 
Psalms49:3 Ińakʼ moca khon do ạkil reakʼ kathako oḍok hijukʼa; ar ińakʼ ontor reakʼ khạndri hudisko bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛeye emokʼa. 
Psalms49:4 Iń do cecetʼakʼte perecʼ phen kathakore moniń bạisạutińạ; ar peṛesaṅ sãote sereńate uniyakʼ khạndri hudis reakʼ iń galmaraoa. 
Psalms49:5 Okoe do dhon durib cetanreko bhorsa akan ar ḍher dhon iạteko bạḍạiyokʼkan, akalre uni bạiriyakʼ behokakʼ tinreye esetʼ ạcurińạ, unre do cedakʼ iń botorokʼa?" 
Psalms49:6  
Psalms49:7 Gujukʼ khon do okoe hõ bako bańcao daṛeakoa se chaḍao reakʼ dam Isor hõ bako em daṛeaea, jemon jaejug hạbicʼ jiwetʼe tahente uni do patal purite calakʼ baṅ hoyokʼtae; ente jiwi reakʼ dam do ḍhergetaea, ona dam reakʼ soman do cetʼge bạnukʼa." 
Psalms49:8  
Psalms49:9  
Psalms49:10 Ạkilan hoṛ hõko gujukʼ ona do sanam hoṛgeko baḍaea; okoeyakʼ bibek bạnukʼtako ar okoeyakʼ ontor goṛdhogetako onko do nonkageko maraokʼa; ar akoakʼ dhon do eṭakʼko lạgitʼko doho oṭokakʼa. 
Psalms49:11 Onko doko hudisa akoakʼ oṛakʼ duạr do tahengetakoa, ar tahen ṭhạ̃i hõ piṛhike piṛhi ṭikạu tahena, onate akoakʼ ńutumtege onko do sompotti reakʼ ńutumko emeda." 
Psalms49:12 Menkhan manwa do kisạ̃ṛ ar ạkilanko hoylenre hõ jaejug do bako tahena; uni do janwarko lekageye marao utạrokʼa. 
Psalms49:13 Okoe apnar cetanreko bhorsakʼkan, ar okoe onkoakʼ kathako sãhãkʼakʼ kan, onkoakʼ dosa hõ onkage hoyokʼa. (Sela)" 
Psalms49:14 Bhiḍi palko cetʼleka niṭ akatʼ khạṛreko idi ocokʼ, onkage niṭ akatʼ patal purire onko hoṛ hõko idi ocokʼa; onḍe do gujukʼge onkoren gupiyicʼe hoyokʼa. Din reakʼ etohopʼrege Isor botoraekan hoṛ do onko cetanreko jitạukʼa; ar patal puri do onko hoṛkoakʼ hoṛmoe jomtakoa; onkoakʼ tahen reakʼ jaega do ar cetʼge baṅ tahena." 
Psalms49:15 Menkhan patal puri reakʼ ti khon Isorge chaḍao reakʼ dam lekate ińe rukhiyạyińạ; uni do acʼ ṭhen khạṭigeye idiyińạ. (Sela) 
Psalms49:16 Eṭakʼ hoṛe kisạ̃ṛ akana ńelte do alom botorokʼa, ar uniyakʼ gharońj reakʼ dhon sompotti ḍherlenre hõ alom botorokʼa;" 
Psalms49:17 ente gujukʼre uni do cetʼge bae iditora daṛeakʼa, uniyakʼ dhon sompotti do patal purite hõ baṅ calakʼa." 
Psalms49:18 Uni do acʼakʼ jionre bhạgane hudisokʼre hõ ar jãhãegeye kisạ̃ṛlenre ar bhạganko metaere hõ," 
Psalms49:19 enhõ uni do acʼren hapṛamko ṭhen calakʼtege hoyokʼtaea one onko do siń reakʼ marsa tisge bako ńelńam. 
Psalms49:20 Manwa do kisạ̃ṛ ar ạkilanicʼe hoylenre hõ Isor bae bujhạu daṛeaea; uni do janwarko lekageye marao utạrokʼa. 
Psalms50:1 Maraṅ daṛean Probhu Isor do, kathae roṛeda; purub khon pạchim hạbicʼ dhạrtiren sanamko uni doe hohoakatʼkoa." 
Psalms50:2 Sion khon, mońj utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon, Isorakʼ marsal do pasnao akana." 
Psalms50:3 Aboren Isor doe daraekana, uni do mocae jhijtaea; ar seṅgel do uni laha lahate sanamakʼe atar giḍiya; ar uni beṛhaete ạḍi botorgeye hoe bharḍoea." 
Psalms50:4 Acʼren hoṛkoakʼ bicạr reakʼ hĩs hatao lạgitʼ uni do coṭ reakʼ rimile hohowae kana, ar dhạrti hõe hohoae kana;" 
Psalms50:5 Uni doe meneda, “Iń botorạń kanko do iń ṭhen jarwakom, one okoe do janwar dãṛẽko hotete ińakʼ bondobosko ataṅ akatʼ.”" 
Psalms50:6 Rimil do acʼakʼ dhorom bicạr reakʼ kathakoe lại saḍeakada, ente Isor doe bikʼcạricʼ kana." 
Psalms50:7 “E ińren hoṛko, ańjompe, iń do kathań roṛeda; E Israel, iń do am upạrte gohań emeda; iń doń Isor kana, amren Isorge." 
Psalms50:8 Janwar dãṛẽ iạte do bạń dusiyetʼmea; amakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ma coṅ jaoge iń samaṅre menakʼtam. 
Psalms50:9 Amakʼ goṛaren ḍaṅgrako reakʼ hõ jạruṛ bạnukʼtińạ, ar amakʼ khạṛren meromko hõ baṅa;" 
Psalms50:10 ente birren sanam janwar do ińren kanako, ar buru coṭre ạcur baṛaekan janwarko hõ ińrenge." 
Psalms50:11 Bururen sanam cẽṛẽko hõń baḍae akatʼkoa, ar ṭạnḍiren sanam janwarko hõ ińren kangeako." 
Psalms50:12 Reṅgecʼlińre hõ iń do bạń metama, ente dhạrti do ińakʼ kana ar onare menakʼ sanamakʼ hõ ińakʼ kangea." 
Psalms50:13 Cetʼem hudiseda ḍaṅgrawakʼ jel do ińakʼ jomakʼ kana? Ar meromakʼ mãyãm do ińakʼ ńũńuakʼ kana? 
Psalms50:14 Isor ṭhen amakʼ gun manao joharge amakʼ dãṛẽ do hoyokʼtam ma; ar uni maraṅ utạricʼ ṭhenge amakʼ moneyakʼko hõ purạume. 
Psalms50:15 Amakʼ muhinre hohowạńme; iń do amiń bańcaomea ar am do ińem manotińạ.” 
Psalms50:16 Menkhan Isor do bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ noa kathae meneda, “Ińakʼ ạn reakʼ katha se ińakʼ bondobos reakʼ katha roṛ reakʼ amakʼ do cetʼ jãhãnakʼ ektiạri menakʼtama?" 
Psalms50:17 Am ma ińakʼ ḍanṭaoem hirkhạwakʼ kan ar ińakʼ katha ma bam moneyakʼkan. 
Psalms50:18 Kombṛom ńellere uni dom sãhãkʼae kana, ar loṭghuṭiko tulucʼ dom gatekʼkana." 
Psalms50:19 Bạṛicʼ katha lạgitʼ amakʼ moca do jhicʼgetama, ar amakʼ alaṅ do phạsiạrateakʼ kathae roṛa." 
Psalms50:20 Am do amren boeha upạrte katham roṛa ar uniyakʼem oktawa. 
Psalms50:21 Noako joto do amem onka akada, menkhan iń do moca bạń jhicʼ akatʼtińa; amem hudiseda am lekan mitʼ hoṛ kạnạń, menkhan iń do amakʼ doskoń udukʼama ar amakʼ sanamakʼ do am mẽtʼãhã samaṅreń uduga." 
Psalms50:22 “Okoe Isorpe hiṛiń akade ape do hudisokʼpe; ar baṅkhan iń doń or cirạpea, ar ape bańcaope lạgitʼ do cele hõ bako tahena." 
Psalms50:23 Okoeyakʼ jionre gun manao joharge uniyakʼ dãṛẽkan unige iń doe manot edeńkana; ar okoe ińakʼ horteye calakʼkan uni doń bańcaoea” 
Psalms51:1 E Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte ińre dayakʼme; amakʼ asambheṛ mãyãte ińakʼ sanam dusṭạmiko ikạ kạtińme." 
Psalms51:2 Ińakʼ sanam ghạṭko khon ạrupʼ saphayińme; ińakʼ kại khon sapha utạr kạńme baṛe. 
Psalms51:3 Ińakʼ sanam ghạṭko reakʼ katha do disạ menakʼtińgea; ar ińakʼ kại do jaoge iń samaṅre menakʼa. 
Psalms51:4 Am upạrte, hẽ eken am upạrtegeń kại akada ar am mẽtʼãhã samaṅre okaṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼkan onageń kạmi akada. Onatege amakʼ roṛ do dhoromgea ar amakʼ bicạr hõ nikhutgea." 
Psalms51:5 Iń do janam tora khonge bedhoromre minạńa; ar kại dosarege eṅgạńakʼ kukhireń tahẽkana. 
Psalms51:6 Am do ontorre sạriyakʼ ńeljoṅem khojkana; ar amge ińakʼ ontor reakʼ khạndritetʼre ạkilem cetʼạń kana. 
Psalms51:7 Husopʼ dare reakʼ ḍạrte saphayińme, onate iń doń sapha utạrokʼa; ạrupʼ saphayińme, onate iń do pĩṛĩtʼ pĩṛĩtʼ ponḍ iń hoyokʼa." 
Psalms51:8 Iń do kusi ar hulạs reakʼ aṛaṅ ańjom ocoyińme; ar amem gejer akatʼ ińakʼ jaṅko hõ rạskạ ocowakʼme. 
Psalms51:9 Ińakʼ kại secʼ do alom beṅgetʼakʼa; ińakʼ sanam ghạṭ baṛe ikạitińme. 
Psalms51:10 E Isor, amge ińre khạṭi ontor sirjạume; ar ińakʼ mon baṛe nãwã aroytińme." 
Psalms51:11 Am samaṅ khon alom pharak giḍikạńạ; iń khon amren sonot Jiu do alom idiyea. 
Psalms51:12 Amakʼ babańcao reakʼ rạskạ em ruạṛạńme, ar khaṛa jiute baṛe sambṛaoińme." 
Psalms51:13 Enḍekhan amakʼ hor reaṅ ghạghạṭkoń cetʼ daṛeakoa, ar kạkạiko do am secʼko ạcur ruạṛokʼa." 
Psalms51:14 E Isor, ińren babańcaoicʼ Isor, khuniạhi khon bańcaoińme; onate ińakʼ moca do amakʼ sarhaoe lại jạhira." 
Psalms51:15 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ moca baṛe jhicʼkạtińme, iń do amakʼ sarhaoiń lại jạhira." 
Psalms51:16 Am do janwar dãṛẽ hõ bam kusiyakʼ kana, ar baṅkhan onageń emkema; ar am do jeredokʼakʼ dãṛẽte hõ bam tirpitokʼa." 
Psalms51:17 Kaca kucạ ontorge Isorakʼ ataṅokʼakʼ dãṛẽ do; E Isor, nicạṛ ar mạ̃hir ontor do alom nihạ̃ttińạ." 
Psalms51:18 Amakʼ bhage kusiyakʼte amakʼ Sion bhạlạiyme; ar Jerusalem reakʼ pạcriko benao rakabme. 
Psalms51:19 Enḍekhan dhorom reakʼ dãṛẽkom bạsutakʼa, ar jeredokʼ samaṅakʼ ar goṭa jeredokʼ samaṅakʼkote; am dom rạskạkʼa, ar amakʼ pinḍ cetanre hoṛko do sanḍ ḍaṅgrako samaṅkoa." 
Psalms52:1 E daṛeanicʼ bir banṭa, cedakʼ am do bạṛicʼakʼko iạtem gorbokʼkana? Isorakʼ dulạṛ reakʼ mucạtʼtetʼge bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Psalms52:2 Amakʼ alaṅ do nonosṭowakʼ lạgitʼgeye goṭayeda; E phạsiạricʼ, amakʼ alaṅ do laser holatʼ lekana." 
Psalms52:3 Am do bhageakʼ khon bạṛicʼakʼkogem dulạṛeda, ar sạriyakʼ khon eṛeyakʼ roṛgem kusiyakʼ kana. (Sela)" 
Psalms52:4 E phạsiạricʼ alaṅ, am do okaṭakʼ nonosṭowakʼkan onagem kusiyakʼ kana." 
Psalms52:5 Menkhan Isor do jaejug lạgitʼe marao giḍikama; uni do ame or ạgumea, amakʼ tạmbu khone chingạu ạgumea, ar jiwetʼkoakʼ disạm khone or totʼ giḍikama. (Sela)" 
Psalms52:6 Noa ńelte Isor botoraekanko do botor caṛhaoakoa; onko do amko landa dhutʼama arko mena," 
Psalms52:7 “Hạni ńelepe, uni hoṛ Isor do acʼakʼ gaṛ bae hoyocoadea; uni do dhon sompotti cetanreye bhorsa akana, ar acʼakʼ bạṛicʼ sana reakʼ daṛete daṛeanicʼe hoyakana.”" 
Psalms52:8 Menkhan iń do Isorakʼ oṛakʼre hara idikʼkan Jạitun dare leka; iń do jaoge Isorakʼ asambheṛ daṛeregeń bhorsa akana. 
Psalms52:9 Okaṭakʼem kạmikan onate iń do jaejug hạbicʼ iń sarhaomea; arem bhagete am botoramko samaṅre iń do am ńel horreń tahena. 
Psalms53:1 Bebuj hoṛ doko mena Isor do bạnuiya. onkoakʼ sobhab do bạṛicʼgetakoa, ar kạmiko hõ hirkhạgetakoa; bhage kạmikan hoṛ do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa." 
Psalms53:2 Isor do serma khon latarte manwa secʼe beṅgetʼkeda; ar ńeljoṅe menana sạriyakʼ reakʼ ạkilte jãhãeko taṛameda se baṅa, menkhan okoe hõ Isorakʼ sana leka do bako calakʼ kana." 
Psalms53:3 Uni doe ńelkeda sanamkoge sạri hor khonko ocokʼ akana, ar jotoge mitʼ domteko bạṛicʼ akana; bhageakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa." 
Psalms53:4 Bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikanko do cetʼ nunạkʼgeko bebujgea? Hoṛko cetʼleka jomakʼko jometʼkan onkage onko do ińren hoṛko jometʼkoa; onko do Isor hõ bako hohoaea. 
Psalms53:5 Amre jhãp emokʼkankoakʼ jaṅ do uniye gejertakoa; onko do lahate botor baṅ tahẽkantakore hõ, enhõ ńitokʼ do ạḍi bạṛicʼko botorena; Isor do onkoe bad giḍikatʼkoa, onate onko do lajaorem paṛao ocoakatʼkoa." 
Psalms53:6 Israelkoakʼ babańcao do Sion khonge hijukʼa. Isor do tinre acʼren hoṛkoakʼ dosae ruạṛkatakoa unre Jakob bõskoren doko rạskạkʼa ar Israelko doko kusikʼa. 
Psalms54:1 E Isor, amakʼ daṛete bańcaoińme; ar amakʼ maraṅ daṛete chinḍạukạtińme." 
Psalms54:2 E Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme, ar ińakʼ moca reakʼ katha luturakʼme." 
Psalms54:3 Eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko do iń upạrteko teṅgo akana; Sasantaoko do ińakʼ jiwi marao lạgitʼko kurumuṭu kana; noko hoṛ do Isor bako botoraea. (Sela) 
Psalms54:4 Isorge iń doe goṛowạńa; ar Probhuge iń doe sapʼ dohoyińạ. 
Psalms54:5 Bạiriko ińakʼ okaṭakʼko bạṛicʼetʼkan ona do onkogeye hala ruạṛakoa; E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ iạte onko do marao giḍikakome." 
Psalms54:6 Iń do khaṛa montegeń teṅgenama; E Probhu Isor, amiń sarhaomea, ente am dom bhagegea." 
Psalms54:7 Ińakʼ sanam muhin khon unige iń doe bańcao akadińạ; iń do apnarakʼ mẽtʼte ińren bạirikoakʼ bhagaoiń ńel akadea. 
Psalms55:1 E Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ luturakʼtińme; ińakʼ nehõrokʼre oko alom tahena." 
Psalms55:2 Iń secʼ beṅgedme, ar roṛ ruạṛạńme; ińren bạirikoakʼ katha reakʼ biste ar bạṛicʼkoakʼ santao khạtirte laṅgateń chaṭ paṭaokʼ kana ariń kuhrạueda. Onkoakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi hotete onko do iń cetanre muhinko ạguiyeda, ar edrete ińko santaoedińa." 
Psalms55:3  
Psalms55:4 Noate ińakʼ ontor do dhak dhakaokʼ kantińạ; gujukʼ botorgeye sapʼ akadińạ. 
Psalms55:5 Iń do botor caṛhao akadińạ ar botorteń thar tharaokʼ kana; ar botorteń ḍabao caba akana. 
Psalms55:6 Ińiń meneda, “Hae, cẽṛẽ leka phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽlen tiń khan! Enḍekhan uḍạu senkateń jirạukokʼa." 
Psalms55:7 Hẽ, iń do ạḍi sạṅgińiń calaokokʼa, ar mitʼṭecʼ nisun jaegare senkateń tahẽkokʼa. (Sela)" 
Psalms55:8 Ińakʼ asray gaṛregeń ńir calaokokʼa, ar hoe bharḍo khon sạṅgińteń senkokʼa.”" 
Psalms55:9 E Probhu Isor, onko do marao cabakom, onkoakʼ roṛ do gaḍbaḍao ocoytakome; ente nagrahare iń do jor julum ar lạṛhạiyiń ńel akada." 
Psalms55:10 Onko do cetʼ reakʼ coṅ sendrae lạgitʼ siń ńindạ nagraha reakʼ pạcrikoreko ạcur baṛaekana. Ar nagrahare do dusṭạmi ar bedhorom kạmiko calakʼ kana. 
Psalms55:11 Onare marao utạrakʼ kạmi hõ calakʼkana; santao ar phạsiạra kạmiko hõ nagraha reakʼ kulhi khon baṅ sạṅgiń akana. 
Psalms55:12 Okoe ińe bemanot akadiń uni do ińren bạiri kanae ona do baṅa, enḍekhan iń do onań sahao daṛekea; ar okoe iń khon apnartetʼe maraṅokʼkan uni hõ iń upạrten kanae ona do baṅa, enḍekhan iń do uni khon danaṅ akaniń tahẽkokʼa." 
Psalms55:13 Menkhan ona dom onka akada, iń tur hoṛge, ińakʼ ontorren gate, ińren bhage gatege." 
Psalms55:14 Alaṅ talare khạndri helmel tahẽkana; Isorakʼ oṛakʼre sewako soṅgekate alaṅ do mitʼ sãote laṅ calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Psalms55:15 Ińren bạiriko cetanre ackage moron baṛe hijukʼma; onko do jiwetʼtege patal puriteko calakʼma, ente oṛakʼ duạrre hõ onkoakʼ do bạṛicʼakʼ menakʼa." 
Psalms55:16 Menkhan iń do Isorriń hohoaea, ar Probhu do ińe bańcaoińa." 
Psalms55:17 Setakʼ, tikin ar ạyupʼ iń do botor salakʼiń ạjijaea, ar uni do ińakʼ aṛaṅe ańjomtińạ." 
Psalms55:18 Okaṭakʼ lạṛhại iń upạrte calakʼkan tahẽkan onare iń upạrtenkoakʼ do maraṅ dol tahẽkana, onate uni doe chaḍao ạgukedińa ar nirạiteye dohoakadińạ." 
Psalms55:19 Isor, okoe do etohopʼ khonge siṅghạsonre menae uni doe ańjoma ar onkoe sạjạikoa. (Sela) Onkoakʼ monre do jãhãn bodolge bạnukʼa, ar Isor hõ bako botoraekana." 
Psalms55:20 Ińren uni gate sãote okoe do sulukteko tahẽkan onko cetanrehõ uni gate do tiye rakapʼeda ar acʼakʼ bondobos doe rạputʼkeda. 
Psalms55:21 Uniyakʼ moca reakʼ katha do makhon khon hõ cĩkạṛgea, menkhan uniyakʼ ontorre do lạṛhại menakʼa; uniyakʼ kathako do hoṛmore ojokʼ akatʼ sunum khon hõ noromgea, menkhan onako do khap khon or bocʼ akatʼ tarwaṛe lekage." 
Psalms55:22 Amakʼ sanam bojha do Probhu Isorge ladeaeme, unige am doe bondobosama; ar acʼ botoraeko do tis hõ bae ṭasak ocokoa." 
Psalms55:23 Menkhan E Isor, khuniạhi ar phạsiarako do patal purirem khadlekoa, onkoakʼ bahaokʼ dinko adha ạuri hoyokʼrege; iń do am cetanreń bhorsakʼa." 
Psalms56:1 E Isor, dayawạńme baṛe, ente hoṛko do ińko laga baṛayediń kana. Ar jao ghuṛi lạṛhại iạteko kosṭoyediń kana." 
Psalms56:2 Ińren bạiriko do jaogeko laga baṛayediń kana; ar ḍherkoge bạḍại iạte iń tulucʼko lạṛhại kana. 
Psalms56:3 Botor rakapʼạńre iń do am cetanreń bhorsakʼ kana. 
Psalms56:4 Okoeyakʼ katha reakʼ iń sarhaoetʼkan, uni Isor cetanre, hẽ, uni Isor cetanrege iń doń bhorsa akana; Iń do bạń botorokʼa manwa do cetʼko cekayiń baṅ?" 
Psalms56:5 Onko do siń sạṭupʼ ińakʼ katha reakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ bhedko lại baṛaea ar iń hạneń reakʼ phundiko aṭaoa. 
Psalms56:6 Onko do mitʼ ṭhenko jarwakʼa, ar iń lạgitʼko tãṛãgokʼa; ar gojeń reakʼ ạt ńam lạgitʼ onko do ińakʼ daṛanko tạnkhiyetʼa." 
Psalms56:7 Onko do cetʼ behok akatʼ reakʼ sạjại bako ńama? E Isor, am do edrete jạtrenko marao giḍikakome." 
Psalms56:8 Tinạkʼ dhaoiń ńir baṛa akatʼ ona mam baḍaege; ińakʼ mẽtʼ reakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼte amakʼ kupi perejtam. Noako do cetʼ amakʼ puthire ol bạnukʼa. 
Psalms56:9 Tinre amiń hohowama, unre ińren bạiri doko dạṛ pạnḍuja; ińiń baḍaea Isor do iń secʼge menaea." 
Psalms56:10 Isor, okoeyakʼ katha reakʼ iń sarhao sereńetʼkan, Probhu Isor, okoeyakʼ katha reakʼ iń gun manao joharetʼkan," 
Psalms56:11 iń do uni cetanregeń bhorsakʼ kana; ar bạń botorokʼa, manwa do cetʼe cekayiń baṅ?" 
Psalms56:12 E Isor, am ṭhen okaṭakʼ manotakʼ iń dohoakatʼ ona doń purạuama; ariń gun manao joharama;" 
Psalms56:13 ente gujukʼ reakʼ ti khon am do ińakʼ jiwim rukhiyạ akatʼtińạ ar ńurokʼ khonem bańcao akadińạ, jemon jion reakʼ marsalre Isor samaṅreń dãṛãbaṛa daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms57:1 Ińre mãyãkʼme baṛe, E Isor, ińre dayakʼme, ente amrege iń doń hirlạ akana. Ar amakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ umul reakʼ hirlạrege iń doń tahena tinạkʼ din iń cetan khon noa muhin reakʼ birbão baṅ ocogokʼ." 
Psalms57:2 Iń do maraṅ Isoriń hohowaea; okoe do acʼakʼ sanam kathae rukhiyạ akatʼtae iń do unigeń hohowaea. 
Psalms57:3 Serma khon uniyakʼ goṛo do pheḍ hijukʼkana; okoe ińko laga baṛayediń kan onkoakʼ dos reakʼ katha roroṛ do bae thirokʼa. (Sela) Isor ṭhen khon unire asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrtetʼ do pheḍ hijukʼa. 
Psalms57:4 Reṅgecʼ edekan dhạcri kul leka hoṛko talare iń doń giticʼ akana; onkoakʼ ḍaṭa do borlom ar sar leka, ar alaṅ do laser tarwaṛe lekage." 
Psalms57:5 E Isor, amakʼ man do serma hạbicʼ rakabokʼma; amakʼ ṭhonok do goṭa dhạrtire ńelokʼma." 
Psalms57:6 Onko do ińakʼ dãṛãn horre jhạliko oḍao akada; santao iạte iń doń dormojlen tahẽkana; onko do ińakʼ horre ghaḍlakʼko layeda, menkhan onko do apnarge onareko khańjokʼkana. (Sela)" 
Psalms57:7 E Isor, ińakʼ mon do ṭarhaoge menakʼa, bạń ḍikạḍake akana; iń doń sereńa, ariń õṛhẽmea." 
Psalms57:8 E ińakʼ ontor, ma ebhenokʼ me; binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ, ebhenokʼben; iń do aṅga marsaliń ebhen ocoyea." 
Psalms57:9 E Probhu Isor, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare amiń sarhaomea, ar onko talare amiń õṛhẽ sereńama;" 
Psalms57:10 ente amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do serma hạbicʼ menakʼa, amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ do rimil cetante hõ calakʼ kana." 
Psalms57:11 E Isor, amakʼ mạhima do serma cetan hạbicʼ rakapʼma; ar amakʼ ṭhonok do goṭa pirthimire ńelokʼma." 
Psalms58:1 E bicạretʼkanko, ape dope thir hape akana noa do cetʼ hok reakʼ bicạr hoyokʼ kana? Ape do cetʼ hoṛkoakʼ hok reakʼpe bicạrkatako kana?" 
Psalms58:2 Se, apeakʼ monre behok reakʼ monsubạ menakʼtapea; bicạr reakʼ tulạte dhạrtire ape do santaogepe soṅeda." 
Psalms58:3 Janam khonge phạsiạrako do bạṛicʼ horteko calakʼkana; ar eṛe katha roroṛko hõ janam khonge bạṛicʼ horteko sen adokʼkana. 
Psalms58:4 Biń bis lekage onkoakʼ bis do; onko do kala ayaṅ biń leka akote akoakʼ luturko bond esetʼ akatʼtakoa. 
Psalms58:5 Uni biń do sapoṛiạkoakʼ aṛaṅ bae ańjoma, gạkhuṛ sapoṛiạwakʼ hõ baṅa." 
Psalms58:6 E Isor, phạsiạrakoakʼ ḍaṭa do onkoakʼ mocarege coagtakome; E Probhu Isor, onko dhạcri kulkoakʼ laser ḍaṭa do amge rạputʼ giḍikatakom." 
Psalms58:7 Onko do ạtukʼkan dakʼ lekako chanokʼma; ar akʼre lagao akatʼ sarko hõ rạpudokʼ takoma. 
Psalms58:8 Cetʼleka goṅgha do calakʼ calakʼtegeye chanokʼkan onkage onko hõko chanokʼma; onko do eṅgatakʼ kukhire gocʼ akan gidrạ lekanako one okoe do marsal bako ńelńam. 
Psalms58:9 Apeakʼ ṭukucʼre seṅgel reakʼ ãc ạuri paṛaokʼrege uni do rohoṛ ar jạnum sahanko birbão hoeteye oṭaṅ idiya. 
Psalms58:10 Onko cetanre hala hạli hoylen khan Isor botoraeko doko kusikʼa; onko do phạsiạrakoakʼ mãyãmre jaṅgako ạbukokʼa. 
Psalms58:11 Ona ńelte hoṛkoko mena, “Isor botoraekan hoṛkoakʼ jionre sạri kuṛại do menakʼgea; sạrige eken mitʼ goṭen Isorge menaea one uni dhạrtirege bạṛicʼkoe bicạrko.”" 
Psalms59:1 E Isor, ińren bạirikoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme; iń upạrtenko khon am do usulakʼre dohokạńme." 
Psalms59:2 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼko kạmiyetʼ kan onkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme; ar khuniạhikoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme. 
Psalms59:3 Onko do iń lạgitʼko tãṛãkʼ akana, ar daṛean hoṛko do iń hạneń lạgitʼko jarwa akana; E Probhu Isor, ona do ińakʼ jãhãn bedhorom se kại lạgitʼ do baṅ hoyakana." 
Psalms59:4 Iń do jãhãnakʼ bạń dos akatʼa, enhõ onko do ńir hecʼkate iń upạrteko teṅgo akana. Iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ beredokʼme, ar ińakʼ muhin ńelme." 
Psalms59:5 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu, Israelkoren Isor, am do sanam jạtrenko sạjại emako lạgitʼ ma beretʼme; ar phạsiạrako do alom daya akoa. (Sela)" 
Psalms59:6 Onko do ạyupʼ secʼko ruạṛ hijukʼa, ar seta lekako gondraokʼa, onko do nagraha reakʼ sanam jaegareko dãṛã baṛaea." 
Psalms59:7 Ńelme, onko do moca khon cokakʼ baklakʼko oḍokeda, onkoakʼ luṭi khon do tarwaṛe oḍokokʼ kana onko doko meneda, “Aboakʼ katha do okoe hõ bako ańjom ńama.”" 
Psalms59:8 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do onko ńeltem landajoṅ kana ar onko jạtrenkom landa dhutʼ akokana." 
Psalms59:9 Onko doko daṛeangete iń do am koyokʼ horreń tahen kana, ente E Isor, am kangeam ińren aotan gaṛ do." 
Psalms59:10 Isor do acʼakʼ asambheṛ daya iạte iń ṭhene hijukʼa, ar ińren bạirikoakʼ bhagaoe ńel ocoyińạ." 
Psalms59:11 E Probhu Isor, aleren ḍhal, ińren bạiriko alom gocʼ giḍikoa, ar baṅkhan ińren hoṛ do noako bako disạ dohoya. Am do bickom amakʼ daṛetem nonkakoa jemon hanḍe nanḍeko ạcur baṛae; ar amge baṛe onko do bhagaokom." 
Psalms59:12 Onkoakʼ moca reakʼ kại ar luṭi reakʼ kathare okaṭakʼ ạsis ar eṛeteakʼ menakʼ, onate onkoakʼ bạḍại iạteko sabokʼma." 
Psalms59:13 Am do edrete onko marao giḍikakome, jemon onko do ar bako tahen; ar nonkate dhạrtiren sanamkoko baḍaea, Isorge Jakob bõsrenko cetanreye rajokʼa mente. (Sela)" 
Psalms59:14 Onko do ạyupʼ jokhecʼko ruạṛ hijukʼa, ar seta lekako gundrạukʼa, ar nagraha reakʼ sanam jaegareko dãṛã baṛaea." 
Psalms59:15 Onko do jomakʼ lạgitʼ hante nateko ạcur baṛaea; ar lacʼ baṅ bi lentako khan goṭa ńindạko beṅgetʼ aṅgaya. 
Psalms59:16 Menkhan iń do amakʼ daṛe reakʼ iń sereńa, ar setakʼre rạskạte amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạteń sereńa; ente am kangeam ińren aotan gaṛ, ar muhinren hirlạ." 
Psalms59:17 E Isor, ińakʼ daṛete, iń do amiń õṛhẽ sereńama. Amge ińren aotan gaṛ do; ar amge uni Isor do, okoe do iń lạgitʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ menakʼtae." 
Psalms60:1 E Isor, am do alem dea giḍiakatʼlea, ar alem chiń chạtur akatʼlea; am do ạḍitetʼ bam kusi akana, menkhan am do lahate lekam teṅgo arolea." 
Psalms60:2 Am do dhạrtim daldalao ocoyeda, arem paṛakʼ ocoyeda; am do ona paṛakʼko bondme, ente disạm do ḍikạ ḍakekʼ kana." 
Psalms60:3 Amren hoṛko do akalem ńel ocoakatʼkoa; ar nonkan darkha nạ̃ṛĩ reakʼ rasam ńũ ocoakatʼlea onate ale do bul hoṛko lekale taṛameda. 
Psalms60:4 Okoe amko botoram kan onko do mitʼṭecʼ jhanḍam em akawatʼkoa, jemon ona do sạriyakʼ secʼ tul rakabokʼtako. (Sela)" 
Psalms60:5 Amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiyạrte ale baṛe bańcaolem; ińiń hohowamre ańjomtińme jemon am okoeyem dulạṛetʼko onko do bańcaoko ńam. 
Psalms60:6 Isor do acʼakʼ sonot ńutumteye meneda, “Iń do rạskạ salakʼ Sikemiń hạṭińa, ar Sukot reakʼ tapol jaegań soṅa." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead do ińakʼ kana, ar Manase hõ ińakʼge; Ar Ephrayim do ińakʼ bohokʼ aḍokʼakʼ kana, Jihudạ do ińakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ ṭheṅga kana." 
Psalms60:8 Moab do ińakʼ jaṅga ạbukokʼ bhajan kana; iń do Edomre ińakʼ panahiń capatʼ giḍiytińạ; ar Philisṭi, am do iń lạgitʼ em kikiạukʼa.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ona gaṛ nagrahate do okoeye ạyur idińạ? Ar okoe Edom reakʼ hor doe udukʼạńạ? 
Psalms60:10 E Isor, am do cetʼ alem bạtil akatʼlea? Aleren phạdko tulucʼ do ar bacom calakʼkan." 
Psalms60:11 E Isor, bạiriko upạrte am do goṛowaleme, ente manwakoakʼ goṛo lạgitʼ ona do jãhãn damge bạnukʼa." 
Psalms60:12 Isorakʼ goṛote ale dole jitạukʼa; ar aleren bạiriko uni doe lebetʼ gańjaokotalea. 
Psalms61:1 E Isor, ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ ańjomtińme; ar ińakʼ koejoṅ luturakʼme." 
Psalms61:2 Ińakʼ mon loraolen tińre hõ ar dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạkoreń tahenre hõ iń do onḍe khon hõ amiń hohowama. Ar nonkan usul aotan burure ạyur rakabińme okaṭakʼ do iń khon ḍher pharakre menakʼ. 
Psalms61:3 Am kangeam ińren hirlạ do; bạiriko upạrte amkangeam ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ aotan gaṛ. 
Psalms61:4 Amakʼ tạmbure jemon jaejug hạbicʼ iń tahẽ daṛeakʼ; ar amakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre jemon hirlạń ńam. (Sela) 
Psalms61:5 E Isor, ińakʼ monejoṅakʼko dom ańjomakatʼgea; am okoeko botoram kan ar onko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ạidạrim ṭarhao dohoakatʼ ona do amgem emakawạdińa." 
Psalms61:6 Am do rajakʼ bahaokʼ dinem ḍher ocoyeda; uni do piṛhi cetan piṛhi jiwetʼe tahena. 
Psalms61:7 Uni do jaejug hạbicʼ Isor samaṅreye tahen ma; uni rukhiyạye lạgitʼ amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ ar pạtiạr do amakʼ kạmire lagao ocoyme baṛe. 
Psalms61:8 Iń do jaejug hạbicʼ iń sarhaomea, ar dinke din ińakʼ manotakʼ iń purạua ma." 
Psalms62:1 Ińakʼ jiwi do eken Isorakʼ ńel horrege menaea, ente uni kangeae ińren rurukhạyicʼ do." 
Psalms62:2 Eken unige ińren usul buru ar ińren babańcaoicʼ do; unige ińren gaṛ, iń do bạń bhagao ocokʼa." 
Psalms62:3 Mitʼṭen manwa cetanre ar tinạkʼ din noako santao dope calaoa; jemon laḍe akan bhit ar liḍạlaḍeakʼ eṭetʼakʼ leka jotokote unipe khũn daṛeae? 
Psalms62:4 Uniyakʼ cetan hudạ khon latarte pheḍege onkoakʼ motlob do; ar eṛe kathage onkoakʼ rạskạteakʼ do. Mocatege onko do bhorko emokʼa ar ontorte doko sarapakoa. (Sela) 
Psalms62:5 E ińakʼ jiwi, am do thir hapekate Isorakʼ ńel horme, ente unige am do ase danama." 
Psalms62:6 Eken unige ińren usul buru ar ińren babańcaoicʼ do; unige ińren gaṛ, iń do ṭarhao akaniń tahena." 
Psalms62:7 Ińakʼ bańcao ar manot do Isorrege bhorsa akana; Isorge ińren daṛe, ar ińren usul buru, unige ińren aotan gaṛ." 
Psalms62:8 E ińren hoṛko, Isorge ińren hirlạ; ape do jaoge unire bhorsa akan tahenpe, uni ṭhen apeakʼ ontor dul tape. (Sela)" 
Psalms62:9 Somajren huḍińko do bhap leka, ar napṛakʼko do eṛeakʼge; tulạre onko do jotoge hoe khon hõko rawalokʼa." 
Psalms62:10 Ape do jor julumre alope bhorsakʼa; ar ona luṭakʼre as alope dohojoṅa; ar baḍhaokʼkan dhonre mon hõ alope gaḍaotapea. 
Psalms62:11 Sanamakʼ daṛe do Isorakʼ tirege noa katha uni do aema dhaoe roṛakada, ar ińhõ ona do aema dhaogeń ańjomakada." 
Psalms62:12 E Probhu, amre do asambheṛ dulạṛ menakʼa; ar am do mimitʼko akoakʼ kạmi lekage kuṛạiyem emakokana." 
Psalms63:1 E Isor, am do ińren Isorge. Iń do amiń ńam baṛayetʼmea; noa khaṅgoṭ ar dakʼ bạnukʼ disạmre, one uni do phosol hoeocoy reakʼ daṛege caba akantae, onḍe do am lạgitʼ ińakʼ jiwi tetaṅokʼ kantińạ, ar am lạgitʼ ińakʼ hoṛmo do ahkaokʼ kana." 
Psalms63:2 Nonkage ona sonot ṭhạ̃ire iń doń ńel akatʼmea, ar amakʼ daṛe ar ṭhonok hõń ńelakada." 
Psalms63:3 Amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ńam joṅ do bańcao tahen khon hõ bogegea; ińakʼ moca do ame sarhaomea. 
Psalms63:4 Iń do jiwetʼ tahen bhor amiń sarhaomea; ar am ṭhen iń do ti tulkateń koejoṅa. 
Psalms63:5 Jel ar itilanakʼte tirpitokʼ hoṛ leka ińakʼ jiwi do tirpitokʼ kana; ińakʼ moca do maraṅ rạskạte amakʼgeye õṛhẽ sereńa. 
Psalms63:6 Aṭetʼre giticʼkate amakʼ katha reakʼ iń ganḍonokʼ kana, ar ńindạ do pohrek pohrekre am reakʼ iń dheneda;" 
Psalms63:7 ente am kangeam ińren gokʼṛoyicʼ; amakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ umulre iń doń sereńjoṅ kana. 
Psalms63:8 Ińakʼ jiwi do ame sapʼ uricʼ akatʼmea; ar amakʼ jojom ti do ińe sapʼ doho akadińạ. 
Psalms63:9 Okoe ińakʼ jiwi cabaetiń lạgitʼko sendrayediń kan onko do dhạrti reakʼ joto khon latar jaegateko pheḍokʼa. 
Psalms63:10 Onko do tarwaṛe samaṅreko doho ocokʼa; ar toyokoren jomakʼko hoyokʼa. 
Psalms63:11 Raj do mekhan Isor iạtegeye rạskạkʼa; ar okoe Isorakʼ ńutumteko kiriạkʼkan onko do jotoge uni iạteko sarhaokʼa; menkhan phạsiạrakoakʼ moca do bond ocokʼtakoa. 
Psalms64:1 E Isor, ińakʼ ạrji ańjomtińme; ar bạirikoakʼ botor khon ińakʼ jiwi bańcaotińme." 
Psalms64:2 Bạṛicʼ soṛojontrokoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme; okoe bạṛicʼ kạmiko kạmikan onko hoṛkoakʼ kạumạu khon bańcaoińme. 
Psalms64:3 Onko do tarwaṛe leka akoakʼ alaṅko dhar akatʼtakoa, onkoakʼ haṛhatʼ katha do akʼ sarreko lagao dohoakada;" 
Psalms64:4 jemon danaṅ jaega khon dhorom hoṛko secʼ ona sarko aṛakʼ daṛeakʼ; ar onko do ackageko aṛaga ar bako botorokʼa. 
Psalms64:5 Onkoakʼ bạṛicʼ goṭawakʼ doko diṛho ocoya, ar oko okote pạsi oḍao reakʼko solhaya; onko doko mena, “Okoe hõ onte do bako beṅgeda.”" 
Psalms64:6 Onko do bedhorom reakʼ motlob aṭaokateko mena, “Abo do sanam secʼ hudis cintạkate mitʼṭecʼ bon goṭayeda.” Sạrige manwa mon ar ontor reakʼ khạndritetʼ do ohoge jokha daṛelena." 
Psalms64:7 Menkhan Isor do onko cetanre sare aṛaga; ar onko do ackage sar bitʼakoa arko bhindạṛokʼa. 
Psalms64:8 Onko do akoakʼ alaṅtege muskilko ạgujoṅ kana; onko beṅgetʼakote sanamkoge bohokʼko rukuitakoa. 
Psalms64:9 Unre sanamkoakʼ monre botor caṛhao akoa; ar Isor okaṭakʼe ceka akatʼ onko do onako lại sodora ar ona kathageko moneyakʼa. 
Psalms64:10 Isor bhokti hoṛ do Probhu iạteko rạskạkʼa ar uniregeko hirlạkʼa; ontorre okoeko khạṭige onko do uniko sarhaoea. 
Psalms65:1 E Isor, Sionre amakʼ sarhao do guṛumre hoyokʼkana; aleakʼ joto manotakʼ do am lạgitʼ purunokʼa." 
Psalms65:2 E koejoṅ ańjomicʼ, am ṭhenge sanam manwa doko hijukʼa." 
Psalms65:3 Ińakʼ bedhoromakʼ kạmire iń doń tạpukʼ akana, Menkhan amge aleakʼ sanam kạikom ikạyetʼtalea." 
Psalms65:4 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, one okoeyem bachao joṅ ar am ṭhenem ạguyede, jemon amakʼ racareye girobas daṛeakʼ. Amakʼ oṛakʼre, amakʼ sonot tahen ṭhạ̃i reakʼ bhorte ale dole tirpitokʼa." 
Psalms65:5 E aleren babańcaoicʼ Isor, amakʼ dhorom reakʼ botoranakʼ kạmikote am do aleakʼ hohom luturakʼa. Dhạrtiren sanam manwa, ar sanam khon sạṅgińrenko ar jalapuri hanasaren hoṛko hõ amreko bhorsakʼa." 
Psalms65:6 Amakʼ daṛetege sanam buru ar ḍuṅgriko do teṅgo akana; ar noate sodorokʼ kana am dom daṛeanicʼ kana mente. 
Psalms65:7 Amge jalapuri reakʼ hud hudem thir ocoyeda, ar ḍheoko reakʼ hud hud ar jạtikoakʼ gulmalkom thir ocoyeda." 
Psalms65:8 Sanam hoṛ, se, ḍher sạṅgińren hoṛko hõ amakʼ hahaṛa cinhạ reakʼ kạmi ńelteko botorokʼa; siń cando rakabokʼ khon hạsurokʼ hạbicʼ amge rạskạ sereńte sanam jaegakom perecʼ akada." 
Psalms65:9 Amge dhạrti reakʼ otem hiriakada ar onare dakʼem jạṛiyakʼ kana; amge ona reakʼ sarsao ḍher ocoyme; am ṭhen khonge jạṛi dakʼ do pheḍ hijukʼkana; ar manwako phosolem emako kana. Ar nonkage am do hasam teareda. 
Psalms65:10 Cas akatʼ nahel gaḍako am dom dakʼakʼ kana ar ona reakʼem somankakʼ kana; achaṛ dakʼkote onam lạbitʼeda ar nãwã omonokʼ carakom bhorakʼ kana. 
Psalms65:11 Bochor do ḍher okocʼ bhortem bhạlại akada; ar amakʼ dãṛãn reakʼ horre asambheṛ bhor do jhurokʼ kana. 
Psalms65:12 Ona do jhurokʼkana janwarkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍikore; ar buru lodamre do rạskạ reakʼ sajge menakʼa. 
Psalms65:13 Mitʼke mitʼ ṭạnḍi do bhiḍi palkote perecʼ akana, ar buru nala do anajkote dalopʼ akana; onako do hulạsteko hohoyeda arko sereńeda." 
Psalms66:1 Dhạrtiren manwako, ape jotoge Isor sarhao sereńaepe." 
Psalms66:2 Uniyakʼ sarhao sereńpe; uni do lek leka sarhaoepe. 
Psalms66:3 Isor metaepe, “Amakʼ kạmi ńelte monre botor ar bhokti do rakabokʼ kana. Amakʼ maraṅ daṛe samaṅre amren bạiriko do tumbutʼ hape reakʼko bhankakʼa." 
Psalms66:4 Dhạrtiren sanam manwa do lek leka manotko emama; ar onko do am ńutumteko sarhao sereńa; onko do amko sarhaomea.” (Sela) 
Psalms66:5 Ape do dela hijukʼte Isorakʼ kạmi ńel idipe; manwa lạgitʼ uni okaṭakʼe kạmi akatʼ ona do monre botore rakapʼ ocoyeda. 
Psalms66:6 Uni do jalapuriye rohoṛ ocoleda; ar onko do taṛamte gaḍako paromlena. Dela bon, abo do disạmre uni iạte bon rạskạkʼma." 
Psalms66:7 Uni do acʼakʼ daṛetege jaejug hạbicʼe rajokʼa; uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do sanam jạtrenko cetanre menakʼa. Isor upạrte okoeko teṅgonkan onko do apnarte maraṅ aloko hudisokʼma. (Sela) 
Psalms66:8 Sanam jạtren hoṛko, aboren Isor sarhaoepe; uniyakʼ sarhao sereń jemon ańjom ńamokʼ." 
Psalms66:9 Unige aboye bańcao doho akatʼbona ar aboakʼ jaṅga doe teṅgo ṭarhao ocoakada. 
Psalms66:10 E Isor, am dom bachao akatʼlea; rupạ reakʼ mạilạ oḍok giḍikakʼ leka am do alem sapha akatʼlea." 
Psalms66:11 Amge ale do jhạlirem bolo ocoketʼlea ar aleakʼ deare bojham ghuguwatʼlea. 
Psalms66:12 Am do aleakʼ bohokʼ cetante sadomre decʼkate hoṛkom sen ocoakatʼkoa. Seṅgel ar dakʼ talate ale dole hecʼakana, menkhan am do ạsirbad hotetege." 
Psalms66:13 Iń do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼante amakʼ oṛakʼteń hijukʼa ar am ṭhen ińakʼ manotakʼkoń purạutińạ. 
Psalms66:14 Onako manot reakʼ katha do mocateń roṛleda, ar muhin hilokʼ hõ onań roṛ akada." 
Psalms66:15 Iń do am lạgitʼ lodgopʼ janwarkote jeredokʼakʼ iń samaṅ ama ar ona sãote jeredokʼ bhiḍi reakʼ mońj sogeń samaṅama; iń do ḍaṅgra ar meromgeń dãṛẽama. (Sela) 
Psalms66:16 Okoe Isorpe bhoktiaekan ape do ańjompe; iń lạgitʼ uni okaṭakʼe kạmi akatʼ onań lạiyapea. 
Psalms66:17 Iń do ińakʼ mocateń hohoade tahẽkana; ińakʼ mocare do uniyakʼ sarhao tahẽkana. 
Psalms66:18 Ińakʼ ontorre bedhoromiń dohokakʼ khan Probhu do ińakʼ katha ohoe ańjomlea. 
Psalms66:19 Menkhan Isore ańjomakatʼtiń onare jãhãn bhul do bạnukʼ anaṅ; uni do ińakʼ koejoṅe lutur akawada. 
Psalms66:20 Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma! Uni do ińakʼ koejoṅ bae dea giḍiakada se ińre uniyakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do baṅ bond akana. 
Psalms67:1 E Isor, dayawaleme ar bhoraleme baṛe; amakʼ daya do marsal leka alere paṛaokʼma; (Sela)" 
Psalms67:2 jemon dhạrtiren sanamko amakʼ horko baḍae daṛeakʼ ar sanam jạtrenko am emakʼ bańcao ńamkate ona do kạmireko lagao daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms67:3 E Isor, jạt jạtrenko do amko sarhaome ma; sanam jạtrenkoge onako onkaema." 
Psalms67:4 Jạt jạtrenko doko kusikʼma ar rạskạteko sarhao sereńma, ente am do dhoromte jạt jạtrenkom bicạrkoa ar noa dhạrti do sanam jạtrenko calao banaoa. (Sela)" 
Psalms67:5 E Isor, jạt jạtrenko do amko sarhaomema; sanam jạtrenkoge onako onkaema." 
Psalms67:6 Ot do acʼakʼ phosole em akana; Isor, aboren Isor do, aboe bhor akawatʼbona." 
Psalms67:7 Isor do abone bhor akatʼ bona; ona ńelte dhạrtiren ḍher sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko hõ uniko botoraea. 
Psalms68:1 E Isor ma beretʼme, uniren bạiriko doko chirchạtur cabakʼma ar uni birudrenko do uni samaṅ khonko ńirjoṅma." 
Psalms68:2 Dhũạ leka onko do oṭaṅ idikom; ar seṅgel samaṅre cherokʼkan mom leka bedhoromko do Isor samaṅ khonko mohor meṭaokʼma. 
Psalms68:3 Menkhan Isor botoraekanko doko kusikʼma ar Isor samaṅreko rạskạkʼma; onko do kusiteko hulạsokʼma. 
Psalms68:4 Isor lạgitʼ sereńpe, ar uni õṛhẽ sereńaepe; hahaṅkar talate okoe do rãt gạḍire decʼkateye hijukʼkan uni lạgitʼ usul hor tearpe; uniyakʼ ńutum do Probhu Isor, uni samaṅre hulạsokʼpe." 
Psalms68:5 Isor do acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ire ṭũạrkoren baba kanae ar rạnḍiko secʼrenge. 
Psalms68:6 Apnarakʼ mente okoeyakʼ bạnukʼtae uni do acʼakʼ gharońjren hoṛe hoeocoyetʼkoa; ar bondiko chaḍaokate bhạlại secʼe idiyetʼkoa, menkhan uni tạkicʼ daram edekanko do khaṅgoṭ disomreko tahenkana." 
Psalms68:7 E Isor, am do tinre hahaṅkar talate amren hoṛko laha lahatem calakʼkan tahẽkana, (Sela)" 
Psalms68:8 unre dhạrti do daldalao lena ar serma do dakʼe emlena. Noako do hoylena Isor samaṅre, Sinạiren uni Isor samaṅrege, Isor samaṅre, Israelkoren Isor samaṅre." 
Psalms68:9 E Isor, am do asecʼ tasecʼ dakʼem jạṛikeda; ar khaṅgoṭokʼkan disạm dom daṛe ruạṛ ocokeda." 
Psalms68:10 Ar amren hoṛko do onareko girobaslena; amakʼ bhage sanate, E Isor, am do onkoakʼ okulạnkom meṭaoleda." 
Psalms68:11 Probhu Isor do hoṛkoe hukumatʼkoa; ar bhage sombat lại jạhir maejiuko doko ḍhergea. 
Psalms68:12 Onko maejiu doko meneda, “Lạṛhại phạdkoren raj doko dạṛjoṅ kana, onko doko dạṛjoṅ kana, ar oṛakʼre menakʼko maejiuko do luṭakʼ jinisko hạṭińjoṅ kana." 
Psalms68:13 Bhiḍi chaṛko talare tinre giticʼ akanpe tahena, unre ape do nonkan potamko lekape ńelokʼa one onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do rupạte esetʼge ar il do sonate dalopʼ akan." 
Psalms68:14 Sanam daṛean Isor do tinre disạm talare rajkoe chirchạtur ocoletʼkoa, unre Salmon burure do him ńurokʼkan tahẽkana.”" 
Psalms68:15 Bashan buru reakʼ sạr do ạḍi utạr jaega hạbicʼ menakʼa; ar ona reakʼ cuṛạko do ạḍi utạra. 
Psalms68:16 E aema cuṛạ reakʼ buru, Isor oka burure acʼakʼ tahen reakʼ jaegae bachao akawan am do cedakʼ hiskạte ona secʼem beṅgetʼ akada? Probhu Isorakʼ jaejug reakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i ma ona kange coṅ." 
Psalms68:17 Isorakʼ rãt gạḍi do hajar hajar, lakh lakh; Probhu Isor do onako talare sonot ṭhạ̃ire menaea, cetʼleka uni do Sinại burureye tahẽkan." 
Psalms68:18 Tinre am do sermatem rakapʼena unre lạṛhại kạidikom idiketʼkoa. Ar hoṛko talare, teṅgo daramko talare tahen jokhecʼ am ṭhen do ạḍi utạr dan hecʼlena, jemon am do, E Probhu Isor, onko talarem tahẽ daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms68:19 Bhorangeae Probhu Isor do, uni do dinạm hilokʼge aboakʼ bojhae ladejoṅ kana; unige aboren babańcaoicʼ Isor do. (Sela)" 
Psalms68:20 Aboren Isor doe nonkan Isor kana one okoe doe babańcaoicʼkan; Probhu Isor do gujukʼ khone rukhiyạ bona. 
Psalms68:21 Isor do begor digdhạtege acʼren bạirikoakʼ bohokʼe gejertakoa; ar okoe kạireko jobe akae menakʼko onkoakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ khạpri hõ uni doe gejertakoa. 
Psalms68:22 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Iń do Bashan disạm khon onkoń ạgukoa; jalapuri reakʼ khạndriyakʼko khoniń rakapʼ ruạṛkoa," 
Psalms68:23 jemon amakʼ jaṅga do amren bạirikoakʼ mãyãme lebḍae ar amren seta do ona jemonko caṭokʼ daṛeakʼ.” 
Psalms68:24 E Isor, hoṛko do amakʼ dãṛãnko ńel akada, ar sonot jaega secʼ ińren Isorakʼ senokʼko ńel akada, okoe doe ińren rajkan." 
Psalms68:25 Laha lahate sereńko, ar onko tayomre do bajna darkoge; ar jhurjhuri saḍeyetʼkan kuṛiko do onko tala talate." 
Psalms68:26 Apeakʼ joto jarwakʼre Isor sarhaoepe; ape okoe dope Israel bõsren hoṛkan, ape do Probhu Isor sarhaoepe." 
Psalms68:27 Jotoko khon huḍiń utạricʼ Benjạmin, hankoko calakʼkana uniren bõsko, one okoeyakʼ tire do rajakʼ sạjại menakʼ; hanko Jihudi mukhiyạko, okoe doko saṅgege; hanko Sebulonren mukhiyạko ar hankoko calakʼkan Naphtạliren mukhiyạko." 
Psalms68:28 Amren Isor ṭhen khon amakʼ daṛe do hecʼakana. E Isor, amakʼ daṛe udugme, lahate am do ale secʼ hoekate kạmim udukʼletʼa." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalemre mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ menakʼa: onḍege raj do am ṭhen sandesko idiya. 
Psalms68:30 Onko ar onkoakʼ ạguakʼ rupạ reakʼ ṭakako baṛe lebetʼ gańjaome ar pạṭiol gaṛren bir janwar ar Misor do dhomkao emaeme; dhomkao kom bạchur ar phẽṭaṛko leka onko jạtrenkoge. Ar okoe jạtrenko do lạṛhạiko kusiyakʼkan Isor do onkoe chirchạtur cabakoa. 
Psalms68:31 Misor khon rajren goḍet doko hijukʼa; ar Kusren hoṛko do hare phare Isor secʼ tiko tiạr takoa. 
Psalms68:32 E dhạrtiren rajko, Isor sarhao sereńaepe, ar Probhuge sarhao sereńaepe. (Sela)" 
Psalms68:33 Uni do sedaere rimil talate rãt gạḍiteye calakʼkan tahẽkana. Ańjompe, uni do murukteye meneda."
