Psalms68:34 Lại saḍepe, Isor doe daṛeangea; uniyakʼ ṭhonok do Israelko cetanre menakʼa ar serma hạbicʼ uniyakʼ daṛe do menakʼtaea." 
Psalms68:35 E Isor, amakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ire amem hạjirlenre do botor hijukʼa. Israelren Isor do uniren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe ar ektiạriye emako kana. Isorakʼ sarhaoge baṛe hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms69:1 E Isor, bańcaoińme baṛe, iń do dakʼreń unumokʼ kana." 
Psalms69:2 Iń do khạndri gheorareń unumokʼ kana, onḍe do ińakʼ teṅgokʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ige bạnukʼa. Iń do khạndri dakʼreń paṛao akana; ar ḍubạ dakʼ do iń cetante ạtukʼ kana." 
Psalms69:3 Hoho hohote iń doń laṅga cabayena, ar ińakʼ nạnḍri hõ rohoṛena; ińren Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ horte ińakʼ mẽtʼ hõ dhund cabayentińạ." 
Psalms69:4 Okoe khamakha iń cetanreko edrekʼkan Onkoakʼ lekha do ińakʼ bohokʼ upʼ khon hõ ḍhergea. Ar okoe iń nosṭoyińko menetʼkan onko do ạḍiko daṛegea; onko do eṛe iạte ińren bạiriko hoyakana. Ar bạń kombṛo akatʼre hõ em ruạṛ hoyokʼkan tińạ. 
Psalms69:5 E Isor, am do ińakʼ lelhatetʼ reakʼ katham baḍaegea; ińakʼ dosko ińre oko do bạnukʼa." 
Psalms69:6 E Probhu, sanam daṛeanicʼ Isor, okoe am koyokʼ horreko tahenkan onko do iń iạte lajao jemon aloko ńam. E Israelren Isor, okoe do am baḍaeme reakʼko ahkaokʼkan onko hõ iń iạte alo jemonko bemanot ocokʼma." 
Psalms69:7 Iń do am lạgitʼge opomaniń sahao akada, ar bemanotte ińakʼ moca do danaṅ esetʼakana." 
Psalms69:8 Ińren boehako ṭhen iń do bin opromicʼ iń hoyakana, ar eṅgat lacʼren boehako ṭhen do porjạt lekań hoyakana." 
Psalms69:9 Amakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ ińakʼ oka dulạṛ menakʼ, ona dulạṛge ińakʼ ontor doe jaljalao ocoyeda. Ar okoe amko bemanotetʼme onkoakʼ sanam opomange ińre paṛaokʼkana." 
Psalms69:10 Ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ ar ińakʼ upạs reakʼ kosṭo do ińakʼ durnam lekage hoyakantińạ. 
Psalms69:11 Ar gõṛẽ kicricʼ iń horokʼetʼ tahẽkanre hoṛko do ińko landa dhutʼạńkan tahẽkana. 
Psalms69:12 Okoe nagraha reakʼ duạr ṭhenko duṛupʼkan onko talare ińakʼ kathako rakabokʼ kana; ar bul hoṛko hõ iń iạte sereńko joṛaoeda. 
Psalms69:13 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daya tinre ńamokʼkan tahẽkana unrege iń do am ṭheniń koejoṅkan tahẽkana; E Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛte amakʼ babańcao reakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ ńelte roṛ ruạṛạńme." 
Psalms69:14 Gheora khon bańcaoińme, ar alom unum ocoyińạ; ińren bạirikoakʼ ti khon am do bańcaoiń me. Ar khạndri dakʼ khon bańcaoińme." 
Psalms69:15 Ḍubạ dakʼ jemon iń cetante alo ạtukʼ; ar athantar dakʼ jemon bae unum daṛeạń; ar kuń hõ alo jemone sikupʼ esediń. 
Psalms69:16 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ daya reakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛte roṛ ruạṛạńme baṛe; ar amakʼ asambheṛ dayate iń secʼ ạcurokʼme." 
Psalms69:17 Amren golam secʼ khon amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do alom ạcurtama; iń do muskilreń paṛao akana, ńitge roṛ ruạṛạńme baṛe." 
Psalms69:18 Am do iń ṭhen hecʼkate chaḍao ińme; ar chaḍaoińme, ente ińren do bạiri menakʼkoa." 
Psalms69:19 Ar tinạkʼgan hirkhạ, lajao ar bemanotan hoṛiń hoyakan ona dom baḍaegea; ińren sanam bạiriko hõ am samaṅrege menakʼkoa." 
Psalms69:20 Hirkhạ iạte ińakʼ mon do rạputʼ akana onate iń doń kạhil akana. Ińakʼ dukte jemon eṭakʼkoko dukokʼ ar onage iń doń khojkan tahẽkana, menkhan ona do bạń ńamleda. Jiwi raṛecʼko emdaṛeạń hoṛiń khojletʼkoa, menkhan onkan okoe hõ bạń ńamletʼkoa." 
Psalms69:21 Onko do ińakʼ jomakʼre bisko mesalada ar tetaṅedeń jokhecʼ do sirkạko emadińạ. 
Psalms69:22 Onkoakʼ bhoj reakʼ rạskạ do pạsi hoyokʼtakoma, ar nirạite tahen do onkoakʼ jhạlige." 
Psalms69:23 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do kãṛãkʼtako ma jemon aloko ńeńel, ar onkoakʼ dea do jaejug kubjạ akan tahentako ma." 
Psalms69:24 Amakʼ raṅgao do onko cetanre upʼgotʼkakʼme; amakʼ jaljalaokʼkan raṅgao do onkoe sapʼpaṭetʼkoma. 
Psalms69:25 Onkoakʼ tahen jaega do ujạṛakʼge hoyokʼma; onkoakʼ tạmbure cele hõ aloko tahenma. 
Psalms69:26 Am okoeyem sạjại akade onko do unigeko santao akadea; ar okoeyem dal akatʼko onkoakʼ jaljalaoge onkoakʼ galmarao reakʼ bisoe do hoyokʼkana. 
Psalms69:27 Onko do bedhorom cetan bedhorom ocoakome; jemon amakʼ bańcao reakʼ bhag aloko ńam. 
Psalms69:28 Jiwetʼkoakʼ tạlika khon onkoakʼ ńutum do meṭaokʼtako ma, ar Isor botoraekoakʼ tạlikare onkoakʼ ńutum do alo tahen ma." 
Psalms69:29 Iń do duk ar hasoreń paṛao akana; E Isor, am do bańcaoińme baṛe ar onko khon pharakińme." 
Psalms69:30 Iń do sereńate Isoriń sarhaoea; ar gun manao joharate uniń sarhaoea. 
Psalms69:31 Daṅgra ar dereń ar khurạ seletʼ damkom dãṛẽ khon Probhu Isorge bạ̃ṛtiń kusi ocoyea. 
Psalms69:32 Ona ńelte mạ̃hir hoṛ doko kusikʼa; ar okoe do Isor baḍaeye reakʼpe ahkaokʼ kan, ape do jiwetʼ tahenpe." 
Psalms69:33 Probhu Isor do nacarkoakʼ kathae ańjoma; ar uniren hoṛko, okoe do bundi dosare menakʼko, onko do nicạṛ mẽtʼte bae ńelkoa." 
Psalms69:34 Serma ar ot do unikin sarhaoema; jalapuri ar onaren sanam jiwiyanko do uniko sarhaoema; 
Psalms69:35 Ente Isor do Sione bańcaoa ar Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako do arhõe beretʼ ruạṛa; unre uniren hoṛko do onḍeko girobasokʼa ar ona reakʼ ạidạrikoko hoyokʼa. 
Psalms69:36 Ar uniren golamren bõsren hoṛko do ạidạri lekate onako ńama, ar okoe uniko dulạṛe onko do onḍeko tahena." 
Psalms70:1 E Isor, bańcaoińme; E Probhu, goṛowạń lạgitʼ dela usạrate hijukʼme." 
Psalms70:2 Okoe iń gojeń reakʼko kurumuṭukan onko jotoge lajao ar opomanreko paṛaokʼma; ar okoe do ińakʼ sorbonasko khojkan onko do tumbutʼkateko ruạṛ calakʼma. 
Psalms70:3 Ar okoe iń ńelteko men, “Besge hoyakana!” Onko hõ lajaokateko ruạṛ calakʼma." 
Psalms70:4 Menkhan okoe amakʼ sana lekako calakʼ onko do amrege kusi arko rạskạkʼma; ar okoe amakʼ bańcaoko dulạṛetʼ onko do jaogeko menma, “Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma!”" 
Psalms70:5 Iń do reṅgecʼ ariń nacargea; E Isor, usạrate iń ṭhen hijukʼme. Am do ińren goṛoyicʼ ar babańcaoicʼ kanam; E Probhu, alom biloma." 
Psalms71:1 E Probhu Isor, iń do amregeń hirlạ akana, ar lajaore tishõ alom paṛao ocoyińạ." 
Psalms71:2 Am dom dhoromgete bańcaoińme, ar rukhiyạyińme; ińakʼ katha luturakʼme ar iń rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms71:3 Am do ińren aotan buru hoyokʼme one jao okte am ṭheniń sen daṛeakʼ. Am do ińren usul buru ar aotan gaṛ kanam, ar onatege iń rukhiyạyiń lạgitʼem hukum akada." 
Psalms71:4 E ińren Isor, bedhoromkoakʼ ti khon, bạṛicʼ ar haḍrap hoṛkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme baṛe." 
Psalms71:5 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ as do amrege ar juạn okte khon amge ińren bhorsa do." 
Psalms71:6 Janam khonge iń do amreń bhorsa akana; ińren eṅgạńakʼ kukhi khon amgem oḍok ạgukedińa. Amge ińren jao okteren sarhaoicʼ kanam. 
Psalms71:7 Iń ńelte ḍher hoṛge cahapʼkateko koyokʼ kakʼa, menkhan am do ińren aotan gaṛ kanam." 
Psalms71:8 Ińakʼ mocare amakʼ sarhao sereń do perecʼge tahena, ona do goṭa dinge amakʼ sarhaokʼ reakʼ kathae roṛeda." 
Psalms71:9 Haṛam umerre alom giḍikạńa; ińakʼ daṛe do caba utạrentińạ, ar alom bạgi giḍikạńạ." 
Psalms71:10 Ińren bạiri do iń upạrte kathako roṛeda; ar okoe iń gojeńko menetʼkan onko sanamko doko soṛojontro kana. 
Psalms71:11 Onko doko meneda, “Isor do uniye bạgi giḍi akadea; uni do laga sabepe, uni bańcaoe lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa.”" 
Psalms71:12 E Isor, iń ṭhen khon sạṅgińre do alom tahena; E ińren Isor, iń goṛowạń lạgitʼ dela usạrate hijukʼme." 
Psalms71:13 Iń upạrtenko do lajao arko maraokʼma; ar okoe muhinre paṛaoiń lạgitʼko kurumuṭukan onko do hirkhạ ar opomanteko danaṅ esedokʼ ma. 
Psalms71:14 Menkhan iń do jaoge amreń bhorsakʼa, ar mitʼtalao geń sarhaomea." 
Psalms71:15 Amakʼ dhorom kạmi ar amakʼ bańcaokʼ reakʼ katha do goṭa dinge ińakʼ mocare tahena, ente onako do baṅge lại cabakʼa." 
Psalms71:16 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ dhorom reakʼ katha lại lạgitʼ amakʼ oṛakʼteń bolokʼa; ar amakʼ dhorom kạmi reakʼ kathageń roṛa." 
Psalms71:17 E Isor, juạn okte khon amge sikhnạtem em akawạdińạ; ar teheń hõ amakʼ hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathań porcareda." 
Psalms71:18 E Isor, teheń do haṛamkate upʼko pạnḍu caba akantińre hõ am do alom bạgi giḍiyińạ; tayom bõsrenko ṭhen amakʼ ektiạri reakʼ katha, ar darakan bõsko ṭhen amakʼ daṛe reakʼ katha baṛe lại sodor ocowạńme." 
Psalms71:19 E Isor, amakʼ dhorom reakʼ kạmi do serma hạbicʼ seṭer akana; ar joto maraṅ kạmiko do amgem kạmi akada; E Isor, am samaṅre ar okoe menaea?" 
Psalms71:20 Am do iń cetanre ạḍi kosṭo ar muhinem ạguakada, enhõ ińakʼ jiwi do arhõm jiwetʼ ruạṛtińạ; hasa latar khon rakapʼ ạguakatʼ leka am do arhõm rakapʼ ruạṛińa." 
Psalms71:21 Iń doń meneda ińakʼ manotem ḍhertińa, jemon arhõ jiwi raṛecʼem emạń." 
Psalms71:22 E ińren Isor, amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ iạte iń do taranakʼ banam seletʼ iń sarhaomea; E Israelren sonoticʼ, iń do peṛesaṅ banamateń sarhao sereńama." 
Psalms71:23 Iń do tinre amiń sarhao sereńama unre ińakʼ moca do rạskạteye andoṛa; ińakʼ ontor do ame õṛhẽ sereńama, ente amge iń dom chaḍao akadińạ." 
Psalms71:24 Ińakʼ moca do siń sạṭupʼ amakʼ kạmi reakʼ kathageye lạiya, ente muhinre paṛao ocoyiń lạgitʼ okoeko kurumuṭukan tahẽkan onko do lajao arko bemanot ocoakana." 
Psalms72:1 E Isor, bicạr reakʼ okaṭakʼ ạidạri menakʼtam ona do nui rajge danaeme; nui raj hopon do amakʼ akelge emae me;" 
Psalms72:2 jemon amren hoṛko dhoromteye bicạr daṛeako ar santao ocokʼkanko hõ hok reakʼe bicạrkatako. 
Psalms72:3 Uniyakʼ dhorom kạmi talate hoṛko lạgitʼ buru ḍuṅgrikote esetʼakan disạm do bhạlạiyte perejokʼma. 
Psalms72:4 Uniyakʼ rajosṭiren santao ocokʼkan hoṛko cetanre uni do dhorom reakʼe bicạreda; uni do reṅgecʼkoe bańcaoetʼkoa ar sasantaoko doe chirchạturetʼkoa. 
Psalms72:5 Tinạkʼ din siń cando ar ńindạ candokin tahen unạkʼ din piṛhike piṛhi hoṛko do uniko botoraea. 
Psalms72:6 Irakatʼ ghãs goḍare jạṛi dakʼ ńurlenre cetʼleka hoyokʼ onkage uni hõe hoyokʼma; jemon uni do hasae lohotʼ akatʼ dakʼ lekae hoyokʼ. 
Psalms72:7 Uniyakʼ rajokʼre Isor botoraeko do bạ̃ṛti bhor jemonko ńam; ar tinạkʼ din ńindạ candoe tahen unạkʼ din onkoakʼ jion do bhạlạiyte perejokʼ takoma. 
Psalms72:8 Uniyakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ simạ do mitʼ jalapuri khon eṭakʼ jalapuri hạbicʼ, Uphreṭis gaḍa khon dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ." 
Psalms72:9 Hahaṅkarren hoṛko do uni samaṅreko ombagokʼa. Ar uniren bạiriko do uniko ḍobokʼaea. 
Psalms72:10 Tạrsis ar dipkoren rajko do uni khajnako emaema; Sheba ar Sebaren rajko do sandesko samaṅaea. 
Psalms72:11 Sanam rajko do uniko ḍobokʼae ma. Ar sanam jạtrenko hõ uniko sewawae ma. 
Psalms72:12 Okoeko reṅgecʼge, arko santao ocokʼkan ar dukhạliạko one goṛo ńam lạgitʼko rakʼetʼkan uni do onkoe bańcaokoa." 
Psalms72:13 Uni do nandan ar reṅgecʼkoe dayawakoa ar nacarkoe bańcaokoa. 
Psalms72:14 Santao ar khed reakʼ ti khon onkoakʼ jiwiye rukhiyại takoa; uniyakʼ mẽtʼre onkoakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dam do ḍhergea. 
Psalms72:15 Uni do ḍher din jiwetʼe tahenma; Seba disạm reakʼ sona uni ṭhen baṛe hijukʼma. Ar siń sạṭupʼ uni lạgitʼ koejoṅ hoyokʼ ma; ar goṭa dinge uni cetanre bhor baṛe ńurokʼma. 
Psalms72:16 Disạmre ạḍi uṭạr phosolko hoyokʼma, buru reakʼ cuṛạkore hõ ona do hoyokʼma. Khet reakʼ phosolkore do Lebanon bir reakʼ sae sae saḍege rakabokʼma; nagraha khon oḍokʼ hijukʼkan hoṛ do ṭạnḍi reakʼ ghãs leka ḍherko bạḍokʼma." 
Psalms72:17 Uniyakʼ namḍak do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma; siń cando tinạkʼ din marsale emokʼa unạkʼ din uniyakʼ ńutum tahentae ma. Uni hotete sanam jạtren hoṛ jemon bhorko ńam ma; ar onko do bhạganko metaema. 
Psalms72:18 Probhu Isor, okoe doe Israelkoren Isorkan, uniyakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma; eken unige hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmikana." 
Psalms72:19 Uniyakʼ ṭhonok do jaejug hạbicʼ sarhao hoyokʼtaema; goṭa dhạrti do uniyakʼ ṭhonokte perejokʼ ma. Amen, Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Jisạiren hopon Dạudakʼ sanam koejoṅ do nonḍege mucạtʼ akana. 
Psalms73:1 Okoeyakʼ ontor khạṭige onko Israelko secʼ Isor do sạrigeye bhạlạiyicʼ kana. 
Psalms73:2 Menkhan iń doń bhindạṛokʼkan tahẽkana; ar ińakʼ jaṅga do leńjetʼdokʼ kantiń tahẽkana. 
Psalms73:3 Ńelkedạń, bedhoromko do ạḍi sukre menakʼkoa, ar onko bạḍại hoṛko ńelte ińakʼ mẽtʼ do jolokʼkan tiń tahẽkana;" 
Psalms73:4 ente gujukʼre onko do baṅ hasokoa ar onkoakʼ hoṛmoko hõ lodgopʼge tahena. 
Psalms73:5 Eṭakʼ hoṛko cetʼleka muhinreko paṛaokʼ onko do onka bako paṛaokʼa; Eṭakʼko cetʼleka kosṭoko ńam onko do onka kosṭo bako ńama. 
Psalms73:6 Onate bạḍại do onkoakʼ hoṭokʼ reakʼ mala leka, ar santao do onkoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ kicricʼ kana." 
Psalms73:7 Itil iạte onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do lonḍo lonḍo caba akantakoa; onkoakʼ mon reakʼ bạṛicʼ hudisko do sareṛ akana. 
Psalms73:8 Onkoakʼ kathare do ṭiṭkạri ar hiskạ menakʼa; bạḍạite onko do santao reakʼ botorko udukʼetʼa. 
Psalms73:9 Onko do serma upạrte kathako roṛa. Ar goṭa dhạrtire onkoakʼ katha do ḍamḍahekʼkana. 
Psalms73:10 Onate Isorren hoṛko do bạṛicʼ horteko ruạṛ calakʼa ar onako katha do ạḍi bạ̃ṛtiko ńũjoṅa. 
Psalms73:11 Onkoko mena, “Isor do cekateye baḍaea? Maraṅ Isor ṭhen akel mente cetʼ jãhãnakʼ menakʼa.”" 
Psalms73:12 Noko kangeako onko bạṛicʼ hoṛ do okoe do nirdạndi tahẽkate dhon sompottiko ḍheretʼtako. 
Psalms73:13 Ińakʼ ontor do ạuṛiyakʼge khạṭiń dohoakatʼtińạ, ar ińakʼ ti do ạuṛiyakʼge dhoromiń dohoakada." 
Psalms73:14 Siń sạṭupʼge iń do kosṭoń jomakada; dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ iń do sạjạiyiń jometʼ tahẽkana. 
Psalms73:15 Noako katha hoṛko ṭheniń menle khan, enḍekhan noa piṛhiren amren hoṛko ṭhen iń do pạtiạranicʼ iń hoykokʼa." 
Psalms73:16 Iń do noako babotre bujhạu reakʼ tinreń kurumuṭukeda unre ińakʼ mon do ona kosṭo emokʼe ehopʼena; 
Psalms73:17 Menkhan tinre iń do Isorakʼ sonot oṛakʼteń calaoena unre onkoakʼ mucạtʼ dosa reakʼ kathań bujhạu ńamkeda. 
Psalms73:18 Onko do sạrige leńjedokʼ jaegarem dohoakatʼkoa ar mohor meṭaokʼ talarem ńurhạ giḍi akatʼkoa. 
Psalms73:19 Onko do acʼkageko maraokʼa ar botoranakʼ muhinreko caba utạrokʼa. 
Psalms73:20 Jạpitʼ khon ebhenlenre manwa ṭhen cetʼleka kukmũ do ạuṛiyagokʼ, onkage E Probhu Isor, amem ebhenlenre am ṭhen onko do ạuṛiyakʼko hoyokʼa." 
Psalms73:21 Ińakʼ mon do tinre haṛhatʼlena ar ontor hõ sobokʼlentińa," 
Psalms73:22 unre iń do lelha ar bebujgeń hoylena ar am ṭhen do janwar barag geń tahẽkana. 
Psalms73:23 Enhõ iń do jao ghuṛi am sãorege minạńa; amge ińakʼ jojom tiyem sapʼ akatʼtińạ. 
Psalms73:24 Amakʼ solhateyem calaoińạ ar sesre amakʼ ṭhonokreyem ataṅińạ. 
Psalms73:25 Sermare ińren sanamakʼ dom amkangea; amiń ńamketʼme iạte dhạrtire ińakʼ jãhãnakʼ khojogokʼakʼ do ar bạnukʼtińạ. 
Psalms73:26 Ińakʼ hoṛmo ar mon do sesokʼa, menkhan Isorge ińakʼ ontor reakʼ daṛe do, ar unige ińakʼ jaejugren bakhra kanae." 
Psalms73:27 Okoe am ṭhen khon pharakteko sen akan, onko doko ses utạrokʼa; ar okoe amre bako pạtiạu akan onko dom marao giḍikoa." 
Psalms73:28 Menkhan Isor tulucʼ iń tahen do bhạlạige; Probhu Isor do ińakʼ aotan gaṛiń hoyoco akadea, jemon uniyakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathań porcar daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms74:1 E Isor, jaejug lạgitʼ cedakʼem bạgi giḍi akatʼlea? Amakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiren bhiḍiko upạrte cedakʼ amakʼ edre reakʼ seṅgel do sarsaokʼ kana?" 
Psalms74:2 Hudiskate ńelme amren onko hoṛkoakʼ katha okoe do sedae khonge amren hoṛem hoyocoakatʼko, okoe bõsrenko do amren ạidạriko lekatem chaḍao ạguletʼko. Disạime ona Sion buru reakʼ katha one okaṭakʼ amakʼ tahen oṛakʼem benao akatʼ." 
Psalms74:3 Jaejug reakʼ noa dhaṅdhaseranakʼ secʼ am do taṛam laha hijukʼme; sonot ṭhạ̃ire bạiriko do sanamakʼko jarkhar akada. 
Psalms74:4 Ar am sãote okarele helmelokʼ kan tahẽkan ona ṭhạ̃ire bạiriko doko hạnḍrạu baṛayeda, onḍe onko do akoakʼ cinhạko dohoakada." 
Psalms74:5 Ona ńelte nonka bujhạukʼ kana, okoe coṅ gajaṛ reakʼ dare mag lạgitʼ ṭeṅgocʼko epel akada." 
Psalms74:6 Ṭeṅgocʼ ar hạtuṛte sanam rokʼ kundạu akatʼ kạmiko onko doko dhaṅdhaser caba akada. 
Psalms74:7 Amakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ire onko do seṅgelko jonḍi akawada, amakʼ tahen reakʼ ṭhạ̃i hõ hasa sãoteko mesao akatʼte ona doko bhõnḍ akada." 
Psalms74:8 Onko do mone moneteko menkeda, “Onko do bon sumạrkoa.” Isor saõte helmelokʼ reakʼ sanam jaegako onko doko atar giḍi akada." 
Psalms74:9 Abo iạte jãhãn hahaṛa kạmi hoyokʼkan nonka do ar babon ńeleda; jãhãn nạbiko hõ ar bạnukʼkoa; nonka baṅ ar tinạkʼ din calakʼ ona do aboren okoe hõ bako baḍaea. 
Psalms74:10 E Isor, bạiriko do ar tinạkʼ dinko landa dhudhutʼa? Jaejugge cetʼ onko do amakʼ ńutumko nindạutama?" 
Psalms74:11 Cedakʼ amakʼ ti, ona amakʼ jojom ti dom okoyetʼtama? Ona do kokha khon oḍoktam ar onko caba utạrkom." 
Psalms74:12 Enrehõ E Isor, ạd khonge am do ińren raj kanam; amge noa dhạrtire babańcao reakʼem kạmikana." 
Psalms74:13 Amakʼ daṛetege am do jalapurim bar hạṭiń akada; amge jalapurire dakʼ maṅgaṛkoakʼ bohokʼem gejer akatʼtakoa. 
Psalms74:14 Amge Libiạthan reakʼ bohokʼem gejer akatʼtaea ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo do hahaṅkarren jiwiyankom jom ocoletʼkoa. 
Psalms74:15 Am do jharna ar huḍiń gaḍako reakʼ horem jhicʼ akada; ar jug khon ạtukʼkan gaḍako do amgem ańjetʼ ocoakada. 
Psalms74:16 Siń do amakʼge, hẽ ar ńindạ hõ amakʼge; siń cando, ńindạ cando ar ipilko hõ amgem ṭarhao ocoakatʼkoa." 
Psalms74:17 Dhạrti reakʼ simạnako hõ amgem ṭhik akada; amge rabaṅ din ar lolo dinem hoyocoakada. 
Psalms74:18 E Probhu Isor, alom hiṛińa bạiri do amko landa dhutʼam kana, ar bebujko do amakʼ ńutumko nindạuetʼtama." 
Psalms74:19 Amren nui mala potam do kaṭaha janwarko ṭhen alom soprotea ar am santaokan hoṛkoakʼ jion reakʼ katha do tisge alom hiṛińkakʼa. 
Psalms74:20 Amakʼ bondobos reakʼ katha disạime; ar disạm reakʼ sanam oko akan jaegako do behokakʼte perecʼ akana. 
Psalms74:21 Santao ocokʼkan hoṛ do lajaokate alom ruạṛ ocokoa; nacar ar reṅgecʼko do amakʼ ńutumko sarhaotam ma. 
Psalms74:22 E Isor, am do ma beretʼdokʼte bicạr lạgitʼ amakʼ mambla hạjirme; alom hiṛińa bebuj hoṛko do goṭa din amko landa dhutʼam kana." 
Psalms74:23 Amren bạirikoakʼ kạumạu, am upạrte jao okte hoyokʼkan, ona do alom hiṛińa." 
Psalms75:1 E Isor, amle sarhaoetʼmea, ale do amgele sarhaoetʼmea, ente am do sorrege menama; hoṛko do amakʼ hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathako lại jạhireda." 
Psalms75:2 Am dom meneda, “Ṭhik okteń bachao joṅa, ar ińge hok reakʼiń bicạra." 
Psalms75:3 Dhạrti ar onare tahenkan sanamkoko cabalenre, ińge ona reakʼ khunṭiko doń ṭikạu dohoya. (Sela)" 
Psalms75:4 Iń do phulạukʼkan koń metakoa, ‘alope gorbokʼa,’ ar bạṛicʼko doń metakoa, ‘dereń do alope rakabtapea." 
Psalms75:5 Apeakʼ dereń do coṭte alope rakaba ar hoṭokʼ keṭecʼkate hõ alope roṛa.’ ” 
Psalms75:6 Purub se pạchim se hahaṅkar jaega secʼ khon okoe hõ rukhiyạ lạgitʼ do bako hijukʼa; 
Psalms75:7 Menkhan Isorgeye bicạra; uni do mitʼhoṛe copotʼedea ar mitʼ hoṛ doe usuledea. 
Psalms75:8 Probhu Isorakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼ bạṭi menakʼa, onare do mosola mesao akatʼ cãwãoakʼ darkha rasa menakʼa. Uni do ona bạṭi khone dul oḍoka; ar dhạrtiren sanam bedhorom hoṛko ona reakʼ lenda hõ lendako hińjitʼ joṅa arko ńũiya." 
Psalms75:9 Menkhan iń do jaejug Isor reaṅiń porcara ar Jakobren Isorakʼ iń sarhao sereńaea. 
Psalms75:10 Iń do bedhoromkoakʼ sanam dereńkoń makʼ giḍikakʼa, menkhan Isor botoraekoakʼ dereń doń usul ocoya." 
Psalms76:1 Jihudạ rajosṭiren sanamkoge Isorakʼ kathako baḍaea; Israelkoakʼ rajosṭire uniyakʼ ńutum do maraṅokʼtaea. 
Psalms76:2 Salemre uniyakʼ tạmbu menakʼtaea ar Sionre hõ uniyakʼ tahen oṛakʼ menakʼa. 
Psalms76:3 Uni do onḍege jolokʼkan joto sarkoe rạputʼkeda, uni do ḍhal, tarwaṛe ar lạṛhại sajbajko hõe rạputʼ giḍikeda. (Sela)" 
Psalms76:4 Marsalre am do samani jhak jhak! Sendra buru khon amakʼ ruạṛ hijukʼ do samani ṭhonok! 
Psalms76:5 Jhũk monanko doko siboṛ ocoyena, onko doko jạpitʼ hapekeda; ar joto daṛean hoṛ do ti jaṅga lạbṛukʼen takoa." 
Psalms76:6 E Jakobren Isor, sadom ar rãtgạḍi cakʼlaoko do amakʼ dhomkao iạteko jạpitʼ hapekeda." 
Psalms76:7 Am, hẽ amge ạḍi botoranicʼ kanam; amakʼ edre rakapʼlenre okoe hale am samaṅre doe teṅgo daṛeakʼa?" 
Psalms76:8 Serma khon amakʼ bicạr reakʼem ańjom ocokeda; E Isor, am do bicạr lạgitʼgem beretʼena" 
Psalms76:9 dhạrtiren santaokʼkan hoṛko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ; dhạrti do botorte nijhumena. (Sela) 
Psalms76:10 Khạṭige manwakoakʼ raṅgao hõe sarhaomea, ar ona raṅgao reakʼ sarecʼakʼte apnar baṛe sajokʼme." 
Psalms76:11 Ape do aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen manotakʼko dohoype ar ona purạuaepe. Ar okoe doe botoranicʼkan uni lạgitʼ sanam disạm khon hoṛko do dan sandesko ạguiyma. 
Psalms76:12 Uni do disạm calaokoakʼ bạḍạiye heseketʼtakoa; ar dhạrtiren rapajko do uniko botoraea. 
Psalms77:1 Iń do ãṭ aṛaṅte Isor ṭheniń rakʼeda; ar ãṭ aṛaṅteń guhereda jemon uni doe luturakʼtiń. 
Psalms77:2 Iń do muhinre Probhu Isoriń hohoadea; ar ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ ti do Isor secʼ tul akan tahẽkana, ar iń do bạń laṅgakʼkan tahẽkana; ar ińakʼ ontor do jiwi raṛecʼ bae ńametʼ tahẽkana." 
Psalms77:3 Iń do tinre Isorakʼ kathań hudisokʼkan tahẽkan unre dukteń khadbadaokʼkan tahẽkana; ar hudis hudiste iń doń loraokʼkan tahẽkana. (Sela) 
Psalms77:4 Amge ińakʼ mẽtʼ do beṅgetʼem dohoyetʼtiń tahẽkana; ar iń do ạḍiń ạndukʼ mạndugok ʼkan tahẽkana, ar onate katha hõ bạń roṛ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Psalms77:5 Sedaeakʼ kathakoge iń doń hudisokʼkan tahẽkana, hudisokʼkan tahẽkạnạń ḍher bochor laha reakʼ kathakoge." 
Psalms77:6 Ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ sereń reakʼ joto kathako disạ hecʼạńkan tahẽkana; ar iń do ontorreń ganḍonokʼ kan tahẽkana ar mon monteń ḍunḍhạuetʼ tahẽkana. 
Psalms77:7 Probhu Isor do cetʼ jaejug hạbicʼgeye bạgi giḍiyatʼbona? Uni do cetʼ ar tisge bae daya abona? 
Psalms77:8 Uniyakʼ asambheṛ daya do cetʼ jaejug lạgitʼ caba utạrena? Ar uniyakʼ gokʼakʼ hõ cetʼ mạutạ utạrokʼa? 
Psalms77:9 Isor do cetʼ dayakʼe hiṛińkeda? Uni do cetʼ edre iạte acʼakʼ dayaye bond dohoakada? 
Psalms77:10 Ińiń menkeda, “Noakangea ińakʼ duk do, maraṅ Isorakʼ jojomti hõ bodol akantaea.”" 
Psalms77:11 Probhu Isorakʼ sanam kạmiko reakʼ kathań disạ dohoya; hẽ, sedae reakʼ amakʼ hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathakoń disạya." 
Psalms77:12 Amakʼ sanam kạmiko reaṅiń dhena; ar amakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathakoń ganḍonjoṅa. 
Psalms77:13 E Isor, amakʼ calakʼ hor do sonotgea; aboren Isor lekan maraṅ do cetʼ ar jãhãe debota menakʼkoa?" 
Psalms77:14 Amge uni Isor do one hahaṛawakʼkom kạmikan; ar sanam jạtrenko talare amge amakʼ daṛeyem sodor akatʼtama. 
Psalms77:15 Am do amren hoṛ Jakob ar Josephren bõsko amakʼ daṛe titem chaḍao akatʼkoa. (Sela) 
Psalms77:16 E Isor, jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do amko ńeletʼmea; am ńelte dakʼko do botorena, ar ona athantar dakʼ do daldalaoena." 
Psalms77:17 Rimil do dakʼe emena, ar sermare rimil saḍeyena; amakʼ sarko hõ onte note calaoena." 
Psalms77:18 Amakʼ huḍur reakʼ saḍe do birbãore ańjomena, amakʼ bijli reakʼ malkaote dhạrti doe marsalkeda; dhạrti do dal malaoena ar thar tharaoena." 
Psalms77:19 Am do jalapuri talatem horleda, ar athantar dakʼ talatem ḍaharleda, menkhan amakʼ jaṅga reakʼ cinhạ do baṅ ńellena." 
Psalms77:20 Mose ar Aron hotete bhiḍi pal leka am do amren hoṛkom ạyurletʼkoa. 
Psalms78:1 E iń jạtren hoṛko, ińakʼ binti ańjomtińpe; ar ińakʼ moca reakʼ kathako luturakʼpe." 
Psalms78:2 Iń do mocate kạhtukkoń roṛa; ar sedae reakʼ kukmũkoń phuṭạua. 
Psalms78:3 Abo do noako katha bon ańjom akada arbon baḍaegea, ar aboren hapṛamko hõ abo ṭhenko lại oṭoakada." 
Psalms78:4 Onkoren bõsko ṭhen ona do babon oko dohokakʼa; abo do tayom piṛhirenko ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ sarhaoanakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha bon lạiya; ar uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ katha ar uni okako hahaṛa kạmiye kạmiakatʼ ona reakʼ katha hõ bon lạiya. 
Psalms78:5 Uni do Jakob bõsrenko cetanre acʼakʼ hukume teṅgokeda, Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ uniyakʼ ạn ạrikoe bandhaokeda; ona ạn ạriko akoren gidrạko cetʼako lạgitʼ uni do aboren hapṛamkoe hukumatʼko tahẽkana," 
Psalms78:6 jemon tayom piṛhirenko hõ onako baḍae daṛeakʼ ar akoren gidrạko ṭhen onako lại daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms78:7 Enḍekhan onko do Isorreko bhorsakʼa; ar uniyakʼ kạmiko hõ bako hiṛińa menkhan uniyakʼ hukumko dohoytaea. 
Psalms78:8 Onate onkoren hapṛamko leka onko do ṭenḍos ar huhulko do bako hoyokʼa; onko hapṛamkoakʼ ontor do Isor secʼ pạtiạr baṅ tahekana ar mon hõ baṅ tahẽkantakoa. 
Psalms78:9 Ephrayim hoponko do dhinkiạko tahẽkanre hõ lạṛhại hilokʼ doko pạc ruạṛlena. 
Psalms78:10 Onko do Isorakʼ bondobos bako manaoleda, ar uniyakʼ ạn ạriko leka calakʼ hõ bako aṅgocleda." 
Psalms78:11 Uni cetʼe cekaletʼ ona doko hiṛińkeda, onko do uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ kathako hiṛińkeda one okaṭakʼ onkoe udukʼatʼko tahẽkan." 
Psalms78:12 Israelren hapṛamkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre uni do hahaṛa kạmiye kạmileda; Misor disạmre ar Soan ṭoṭhare uni do onakoe kạmileda. 
Psalms78:13 Uni do jalapuriye bar hạṭińletʼte ona talate onkoe parom idiletʼkoa; uni do dakʼko ḍhipi lekae teṅgo ocoleda. 
Psalms78:14 Siń do rimilte ar ńindạ do seṅgel reakʼ marsalte onko do hore udukʼ idiyakokan tahẽkana. 
Psalms78:15 Hahaṅkarre dhiri paṛakʼ ocokate hasa latar khon onko do dakʼe ńũ ocoletʼkoa. 
Psalms78:16 Buru lekan dhiri khon uni do dakʼ jharnae oḍok ocoleda; ona dakʼ do gaḍa dakʼ lekageye ạtu ocoleda. 
Psalms78:17 Menkhan onko do uni upạrte kạkạitegeko tahẽyena; maraṅ Isor upạrte hahaṅkarre onko doko hulkeda. 
Psalms78:18 Onko do akoakʼ sana leka jomakʼ reakʼ khojkate mon monte Isorko biḍạukedea. 
Psalms78:19 Onko do Isor upạrte noa kathako menkeda, “Hahaṅkarre Isorakʼ do cetʼ jomakʼte ṭebile sajao daṛeakʼa?" 
Psalms78:20 Uni do dhiriye dalkeda ar ona khon dakʼ bumbhạu oḍokena; onate cetʼ uni do piṭhạ hõe em daṛeabona? Uni do cetʼ acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼ jele juṛạu daṛeakʼa? 
Psalms78:21 Noa katha ańjomkate Probhu Isor doe edreyena. Jakob upạrte uniyakʼ ontorre seṅgel do jolena, Israel upạrte uniyakʼ edre do caṛhaoena;" 
Psalms78:22 ente Isorre onko do bako pạtiạulena; uni do onkoe bańcao daṛeakoa mente ona kathare hõ bako bhorsalena. 
Psalms78:23 Enhõ uni do coṭ sermae hukumada ar serma reakʼ duạre jhicʼkeda. 
Psalms78:24 Hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ uni do dakʼ leka Mannae jạṛiyatʼkoa. Ar serma reakʼ phosolgeye ematʼkoa. 
Psalms78:25 Serma goḍetkoakʼ jomakʼ do manwako jomkeda; ar tinạkʼko jom daṛeakʼ unạkʼge onkoe kolatʼkoa. 
Psalms78:26 Uni do serma khon puruạ reakʼ hoeye hoyocokeda; uni do acʼakʼ daṛete dạkhin reakʼ hoeye ạyur ạgukeda. 
Psalms78:27 Uni do dhuṛi lekage jele jạṛiyatʼkoa, jalapuri reakʼ gitil leka cẽṛẽye jạṛiyatʼkoa." 
Psalms78:28 Onkoakʼ ḍerakore, ar onkoakʼ tạmbu beṛhaete uni do onkoe pheḍ ocoketʼkoa." 
Psalms78:29 Onko do lacʼ bikʼko jomkeda; ar okaṭakʼko khojletʼ onageye ematʼkoa. 
Psalms78:30 Ar okaṭakʼ jomakʼ jomko menletʼ ona ạuri cabakʼrege se, onkoakʼ mocare ona tahẽnrege" 
Psalms78:31 Isorakʼ edre do onko upạrte rakapʼena. Uni do onkoren thoṛa daṛean juạnkoe gocʼketʼkoa; Israelren soros utạr hoṛko do acʼakʼ tabereye ạguketʼkoa. 
Psalms78:32 Enrehõ onko do kạkạitegeko tahẽyena, uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko ńelkatere hõ bako pạtiạulena." 
Psalms78:33 Onate onkoakʼ din do ạuṛiyakʼtegeye cabaketʼtakoa. Ar bochorko do torastege. 
Psalms78:34 Uni do onkoe gocʼketʼko tayom sarecʼ hoṛko do uniyakʼ kathako disạkeda; onko do arhõ uni secʼko ạcur ruạṛena ar jitkate uniko ńam baṛakedea. 
Psalms78:35 Onko doko disạkeda Isor kangeae onkoren aotan buru, ar maraṅ Isorge onkoren chakʼḍaoicʼ." 
Psalms78:36 Menkhan onko do unre mocateko luhum suhumkeda, ar alaṅte eṛe kathako roṛkeda." 
Psalms78:37 Onkoakʼ ontor do unire uricʼ baṅ tahẽkana; ar uniyakʼ bondobosre onko do pạtiạr bako tahẽkana. 
Psalms78:38 Enhõ uni do mãyãteye perecʼgete onkoakʼ bedhoromakʼkoe ikạketʼtakoa, onko do bae marao giḍiletʼkoa; acʼakʼ edre do ghane ghạṛicʼe dobnaoketʼtaea, uniyakʼ edre do baṅ sarsao rakapʼlena." 
Psalms78:39 Uni doe hudiskeda onko do eken manwa kanako, onko do oṭaṅokʼkan hoeleka ar bako ruạṛa." 
Psalms78:40 Hahaṅkarre samani dhao uni upạrteko hulleda, ar ona hahaṅkarre samani dhao uniko duk ocokedea?" 
Psalms78:41 Onko do ghane ghane Isorko biḍạukedea, ar Israelren uni sonoticʼko duk ocokedea." 
Psalms78:42 Onko do uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ katha bako disạ doholeda; ar ona din reakʼ katha do bako disạ dohoakada one oka hilokʼ bạirikoakʼ ti khone chaḍaoletʼko tahẽkan," 
Psalms78:43 uni do Misorre cinhại udukʼatʼko tahẽkanre ar Soan ṭoṭhare hahaṛa kạmiye kạmiletʼre. 
Psalms78:44 Onkoakʼ sanam gaḍa reakʼ dakʼe mãyãm ocoletʼtakoa. Ar ona dakʼ do bako ńu daṛeada. 
Psalms78:45 Onko ṭhen uni do kãṛã loṭocʼe kolketʼkoa, onko do onkoko ger gocʼ cabaketʼkoa. Uni do roṭekoe kolketʼkoa, onko do onkoko jalao thakaoketʼkoa." 
Psalms78:46 Onkoakʼ aṛakʼ sakamko do tejokoe ematʼkoa ar onkoakʼ phosol do pohokoe ematʼkoa. 
Psalms78:47 Arel dakʼte onkoakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩkoe bạṛicʼketʼtakoa; ar sisirte do loa darekoe nosṭoketʼtakoa. 
Psalms78:48 Uni do arel dakʼte onkoren ḍaṅgrakoe maraoketʼkoa ar ceṭerte onkoren janwar palkoe maraoketʼkoa. 
Psalms78:49 Uni do onko upạrte acʼakʼ jolokʼkan edre ar duk kosṭoe kolkeda; ona do maraokʼreye bahal akatʼko mitʼ dol goḍet leka hoyena. 
Psalms78:50 Uni do acʼakʼ edre sodorokʼ hor reakʼ tạkicʼakʼkoe ocokʼkeda; uni do gocʼ khon bae rehayletʼkoa menkhan mahamạri ṭhene alaeketʼkoa. 
Psalms78:51 Uni do Misor disạmren mitʼke mitʼ pạhil koṛa hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa, uni do Ham bõsrenko reakʼ tạmburen ar daṛe juạnko hõe gocʼketʼkoa." 
Psalms78:52 Noa tayom acʼren hoṛko do bhiḍi lekae oḍok ạguketʼkoa, ar hahaṅkar talate bhiḍi pal leka uni doe ạyurketʼkoa." 
Psalms78:53 Uni do nirạiteye ạguketʼkoa, onate onko do bako botorlena; menkhan jalapuri do onkoren bạirikoe utʼgotʼkatʼkoa." 
Psalms78:54 Mucạtʼre uni do acʼakʼ sonot disạmteye seṭerketʼkoa, ạguketʼkoae ona buru lodam disạmte oka disạm do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ titeye hatletʼ tahẽkan." 
Psalms78:55 Onko samaṅ khon porjạtren koe laga ńirketʼkoa, ar onkoakʼ jaega jumi soṅkate sompotti lekate onkoe hạṭińatʼkoa; onkoakʼ oṛakʼ duạrre Israel bõsrenkoe girobas ocoketʼkoa." 
Psalms78:56 Menkhan enrehõ onko do maraṅ Isorko biḍạukedea ar uni upạrteko hulkeda; ar uniyakʼ hukum do bako manaoleda. 
Psalms78:57 Onkoren hapṛamko lekage ṭhik hor khon ocokʼkate onko doko behokkeda; onko do peṛta akʼ lekako konḍeayena. 
Psalms78:58 Onko do buru coṭ reakʼ pinḍko beoharkate uniko bekusi ocokedea; ar tite benaoakʼ murtiko pujạwatʼkote uniko edre ocokedea. 
Psalms78:59 Noako ńelte Isor do ạḍiye edreyena; uni do Israelko ar bae luturatʼkoa. 
Psalms78:60 Siloamre acʼakʼ okaṭakʼ kumbạ oṛakʼ tahẽkan onae bạgi oṭowada; noa do ona tạmbu kana one okaṭakʼ do manwa talareye benaoletʼ. 
Psalms78:61 Uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ cinhạ do bondi dosa oktereye kolleda; uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ cinhạ do uniren bạirikoakʼ tireye emkeda. 
Psalms78:62 Acʼren hoṛko uni do bạirikoakʼ tarwaṛereye dohoketʼkoa; acʼren hoṛko cetanre uniyakʼ edre do paṛaoena. 
Psalms78:63 Seṅgelte onkoren juạnkoe gocʼketʼkoa; ar onkoren kũạ̃ri kuṛiko lạgitʼ bapla sereń do baṅ hoylena. 
Psalms78:64 Tarwaṛete onkoren ạyurko doe gocʼketʼkoa; ar onkoren rạnḍi maejiuko do ar bako homor halaṅ daṛeada. 
Psalms78:65 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do jạpitʼ khone ebhenena; uni do darkha rasa reakʼ nisạ kaṭaoen bir lekae jagwarena. 
Psalms78:66 Uni do acʼren bạirikoe pạc ocoketʼkoa; onko do jaejug lạgitʼe opomanketʼkoa. 
Psalms78:67 Tayomte uni do Josephakʼ bõse hirikeda, ar Ephrayem gusṭirenko do bae bachaoana;" 
Psalms78:68 Menkhan Jihudi bõsrenkoakʼ ṭhạ̃igeye bachaoana one okaṭakʼ Sion buru uni doe dulạṛetʼ tahẽkan. 
Psalms78:69 Onḍe uni do acʼakʼ sonot oṛakʼ usulgeye benaokeda, ona do serma ṭuṅgạu hạbicʼge tahẽkana; uni do dhạrti lekage onae benaokeda." 
Psalms78:70 Uni do acʼren golam Dạude bachaokedea, uni bhiḍi khạṛ khon hijukʼicʼge;" 
Psalms78:71 Uni do toa emokʼkan bhiḍiko ńel todarotko kạmi khone ạgukedea, jemon uni do Probhu Isorren hoṛko, metakʼme Jakob bõsrenko, okoe do uniyakʼ sompotti onko Israel jạtrenkoe gupi daṛeako." 
Psalms78:72 Uni do acʼakʼ ontor reakʼ dhoromtetʼ lekageye gupiketʼkoa; Ar gạkhuṛ titeye ạyur idiketʼkoa. 
Psalms79:1 E Isor, eṭakʼ jạtrenko do amakʼ sompottiko hat akada, ar onko do onḍeko bolo akana; amakʼ sonot oṛakʼko bhõnḍ akada; ar Jerusalem do maraokʼ reakʼ dhiri puńjirko hoyoco akada." 
Psalms79:2 Amren golamkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko do coṭren cẽṛẽko jom ocoakatʼkoa; ar am botoramkoakʼ jel do otren janwarkoko ematʼkoa. 
Psalms79:3 Jerusalem beṛhaete onko do dakʼ leka onkoakʼ mãyãmko dul giḍikada; ar onko baeko leka do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa. 
Psalms79:4 Ale do aḍepase jạtrenko ṭhen lelhagele hoyakana, ar ale beṛhaeten hoṛko ṭhen do landa dhutʼren hoṛle hoyakana." 
Psalms79:5 E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din? Am do cetʼ jaejugge edre akanem tahena? Ar tinạkʼ din amakʼ ãṭokʼ reakʼ jala do seṅgel leka jolokʼtege tahena?" 
Psalms79:6 Okoe bako manaome onko jạtrenko cetanre am do amakʼ edre upʼakome, ar onako rajosṭi cetanrehõ onkaeme okoe do amakʼ ńutum bako dohaeyakʼkan;" 
Psalms79:7 ente onkoge Jakobren bõs doko caba akatʼkoa ar uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i hõko marao akada. 
Psalms79:8 Sedaeren hapṛamkoakʼ behokakʼ do alere alom paṛao ocoya; am do usạrage amakʼ dulạṛ udugme, ente ale do ạḍitetʼle botorokʼ kana." 
Psalms79:9 E aleren babańcaoicʼren Isor, amakʼ ṭhonok lạgitʼge goṛowaleme baṛe; amakʼ ńutum bahaokʼ lạgitʼge bańcaoleme ar aleakʼ kạiko ikạ kataleme." 
Psalms79:10 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko do cedakʼko mena, “Okateye calaoena onkoren Isor do?” Onko do ale samaṅrege baḍae ocokom, amren golamkoakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dom hala ruạṛgea mente." 
Psalms79:11 Bondi akankoakʼ geraṅ do amakʼ luturre bajaokʼma; ar okoeko cetanre gujukʼ reakʼ ray em hoyakan onko do amakʼ maraṅ daṛete baṛe bańcaokome. 
Psalms79:12 E Probhu Isor, ale aḍepase jạtrenko do oka leka aleko henostawale kana, ona reakʼ eae doboṛ sạjại baṛe hala ruạṛakome." 
Psalms79:13 Enḍekhan ale, amren hoṛ, okoe do gupi ṭạnḍiren bhiḍiko kanle, ale do jaejug hạbicʼle gun manao joharama ar piṛhi cetan piṛhi le sarhaomea." 
Psalms80:1 E Israelren gupiyicʼ, am do aleakʼ katha luturakʼme; am do Joseph bõsrenko bhiḍi pal lekam ạyuretʼkoa. Am, one Kerub cetanrem duṛupʼ akan, ar amakʼ marsal baṛe bamber ocoyme." 
Psalms80:2 Am do Ephrayim, Benjạmin ar Manasi samaṅre amakʼ daṛe rakapʼ ocoytam ar ale bańcaole lạgitʼ dela hijukʼme." 
Psalms80:3 E Isor, lahate leka rakapʼ ruạṛlem; amakʼ daya reakʼ marsal do ale cetanre paṛaokʼma, onate ale do bańcaole ńama." 
Psalms80:4 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, amren hoṛkoakʼ koejoṅakʼre ar tinạkʼ din edre akanem tahena?" 
Psalms80:5 Jomakʼ jinis lekate am do mẽtʼ dakʼem jom ocoakatʼkoa ar bạṭi bạṭi mẽtʼ dakʼem ńũ ocoakatʼkoa. 
Psalms80:6 Am dom nonka akada jemon aḍepase jạtrenko ale iạteko tapam arko jhogṛakʼ. Aleren bạiriko do ale iạte ako talareko landa joṅkana. 
Psalms80:7 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Isor, am do lahate leka beretʼleme; amakʼ daya reakʼ marsal do ale cetanre paṛaokʼma, onate ale do bańcaole ńama." 
Psalms80:8 Am do mitʼṭen darkha nạ̃ṛĩ leka Misor disạm khonem uṭhạu ạguakatʼlea; ar am do eṭakʼ jạtrenkom laga ńirketʼkote onḍem rohoeketʼlea. 
Psalms80:9 Am do ona lạgitʼ jumim saphakeda; ar ona reakʼ rehetʼ do otre bạisạuente goṭa disạm pasnaoena. 
Psalms80:10 Ona reakʼ umulte buru boṭkocʼko umulena; ar ona reakʼ ḍạrkote usul usul husupʼ darekoe pasnaokeda. 
Psalms80:11 Doreão hạbicʼ uni do acʼakʼ ḍạrkoe pasnaoketʼtaea ar Uphreṭis gaḍa hạbicʼ acʼakʼ kahleko hõ. 
Psalms80:12 Cedakʼ ona rurukhiyạ pạcri dom rạputʼ giḍikada, horte sen paromokʼkan sanamkoge coṅ ona reakʼmako gotʼetʼ tahẽkan?" 
Psalms80:13 Birren sukri do hecʼkate onae togocʼ topakʼeda; ar ṭạnḍiren janwarko hõ onako jomeda. 
Psalms80:14 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Isor, am do ruạṛ hijukʼme; serma khon oyoṅkate ńelme ar noa darkha nạ̃ṛĩ baṛe hiri idiyme." 
Psalms80:15 Okako poha do amakʼ titem rohoe akatʼ, ar okaṭakʼ reakʼ ḍạr do am lạgitʼem daṛe ocoakatʼ;" 
Psalms80:16 ona dare do seṅgelte atar akana, ar makʼgiḍi akana; amren hoṛko do ińakʼ eger iạteko nosṭo akana." 
Psalms80:17 Amem bachao akawan hoṛko cetanre amakʼ ti dohoyme; ar apnar lạgitʼem bachao akade manwa cetanre hõ amakʼ ti dohoytam. 
Psalms80:18 Enḍekhan ar am ṭhen khon bale ruạṛ calakʼa; am do arhõm jiwetʼ ruạṛlea, ar ale do amakʼ ńutumle dohaeyakʼtama." 
Psalms80:19 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, am do lahate leka beretʼ ruạṛlem; ar amakʼ daya reakʼ marsal do ale cetanre paṛaokʼma, onate ale do bańcaole ńama." 
Psalms81:1 Isor, okoe doe aboren daṛeanicʼkan, ape do uni sarhao sereńaepe; ar Jakobren Isor lạgitʼ õṛhẽ sereńpe." 
Psalms81:2 Oṛhẽ sereń ehobpe, ar tobla saḍe ocoype; mońj peṛesaṅ banam salakʼge." 
Psalms81:3 Aboakʼ porob din reakʼ ambasre ar kunạmire sakwa oroṅpe; 
Psalms81:4 ente ona kangea Israelkoakʼ niạm, Jakobren Isorakʼ ạn do." 
Psalms81:5 Uni do sạjại emokʼ lạgitʼ Misor disạm talate tinreye oḍok senena unre Joseph bõsrenko lạgitʼ noa porob do mitʼṭen goha lekateye teṅgokeda. Ar iń do mitʼṭecʼ bạń baḍae akatʼ pạrsiń ańjomkeda. 
Psalms81:6 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Gokʼ bhạriạ khon uniyakʼ bojhań rawalketʼtaea; ar khạclạkʼ khon uniyakʼ ti do khalasentaea." 
Psalms81:7 Muhinrem paṛaoente ińem hohoạdińa ar iń doń bańcaoketʼmea; ar huḍur saḍe reakʼ danaṅ khoniń roṛ ruạṛatʼmea; ar Meriba reakʼ dakʼ ṭheniń biḍạuketʼmea. (Sela) 
Psalms81:8 E ińren hoṛko, ińakʼ sontor katha ańjompe; E Israelko, ape do ińakʼ kathako luturakʼpe." 
Psalms81:9 Aperen do jãhãn debotako aloko tahentape ma; ar eṭakʼ jạtren debotako ṭhen hõ amakʼ bohokʼ do alom kuḍbura. 
Psalms81:10 Ińge Probhu, aperen Isor do; Ińge Misor disạm khon ape doń oḍok ạguakatʼpea. Apeakʼ moca cahabtape, ar iń doń ajoapea." 
Psalms81:11 Menkhan ińren hoṛko do bako luturatʼtińạ; Israel do iń tabere tahen bae rebenlena. 
Psalms81:12 Ona iạte onkoakʼ mon do kạṭhuạ lekageń dohokatʼtakoa, jemon onko do akoakʼ kusi lekako calao daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms81:13 Hae, ińren hoṛko do eken iń tabereko tahẽlen khan, ar Israel do ińakʼ hortegeye taṛamle khan," 
Psalms81:14 enḍekhan iń do onkoren bạirikoń kobojkekoa, ar onkoren bạiriko upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń rakapʼkea." 
Psalms81:15 “Bạiriko do iń samaṅre kiṛdhum akanko tahena, onko do jaejug hạbicʼko sạjạiyokʼa." 
Psalms81:16 Menkhan Israel do sanam khon soros utạrakʼ guhumiń jom ocoyea; sạrige iń do ona rasateń tirpit ocokoa one okaṭakʼ do cạṭạni khon ńamokʼkan.” 
Psalms82:1 Isor do acʼakʼ bạisi talareye teṅgo akana; uni do disạm cakʼlaoko tala khon onkoe bicạretʼkoa are hukumako kana; 
Psalms82:2 “Ape do ar tinạkʼ din behokpe bicạra? Ar tinạkʼ din bedhoromko secʼpe tahena? (Sela) 
Psalms82:3 Reṅgecʼko ar ṭũạr amarkoakʼ hok reakʼ bicạrpe, nacar ar eken ti hoṛkoakʼ hõ hok reakʼ ạidạri rukhiyạitakope," 
Psalms82:4 Nandan ar reṅgecʼko bańcaokope; ar bedhoromkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạkope.” 
Psalms82:5 Disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ do bud ar ạkil bạnukʼtakoa, onko do ńutreko dãṛãnkana; ar dhạrti soṅsar reakʼ rehetʼko dalmalaoeda." 
Psalms82:6 Ińiń menleda, “Ape dope Isor kana, ape do sanamkoge maraṅ Isorren hopon kanape." 
Psalms82:7 Menkhan enhõ ape do manwako lekagepe gujukʼa; Eṭakʼ disạmren cakʼlaoko lekage ape hõpe maraokʼa.” 
Psalms82:8 E Isor, ma beretʼme, dhạrti reakʼ bicạrme, ente sanam jạtrenkoge amakʼ ạidạrire menakʼkoa." 
Psalms83:1 E Isor, alom duṛupʼ hapekokʼa; E Isor, am do moca alom bondtama, roṛme baṛe." 
Psalms83:2 Ńelme, cetʼleka amren bạiri doko hạnḍrạukʼkana ar okoe amko hirkhạwam kan onko do bạḍạite bohokʼ rakapʼkateko teṅgo akana." 
Psalms83:3 Amren hoṛko upạrte onko doko solhayeda, ar amem rukhiyạyetʼko upạrteko soṛojontro kana." 
Psalms83:4 Onkoko meneda, “Dela, jạtrenko bon marao cabakoa, jemon Israelakʼ ńutum aloko disạ dohoy.”" 
Psalms83:5 Onko doko mitʼakana arko soṛojontro kana; ar am upạrte bondobosko bandhaoetʼ kana 
Psalms83:6 tạmbukore ḍera akan Edomrenko, Ismaelrenko, Moabrenko ar Hagriko," 
Psalms83:7 Gebaliko, Amonrenko, Amalekiko ar Turren sãoten Philisṭiko;" 
Psalms83:8 onko do Ạsurrenko sãoteko mitʼakana ar Loṭren hoponko reakʼ sopoko hoyakana. (Sela) 
Psalms83:9 Am do Midiạnrenko okam cekaletʼko, Kison gaḍa aṛeren sisko ar Jabinko leka nokore hõ onkaeme baṛe." 
Psalms83:10 Sisrenko ar Jabin Endorreko mohor meṭaoena; onko do jumi reakʼ guricʼ lekako ńur tahẽyena. 
Psalms83:11 Onkoren cetan hudạren hoṛkoakʼ dosa do Oreb ar Sib lekakome baṛe; ar onkoren disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ dosa hõ Sebah ar Salmuna leka hoyocoe me. 
Psalms83:12 Onko bạirikoko menleda, “Dela bon, ạidạrijoṅa Isorakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ikoge.”" 
Psalms83:13 E ińren Isor, am do hoe bharḍo lekakom, one hoete oṭaṅokʼkan bhusạ lekage." 
Psalms83:14 Birre seṅgel lagaolenre cetʼleka dareko lokʼa ar seṅgel reakʼ lepʼ do cetʼleka burukoe lo ataretʼ," 
Psalms83:15 onkage amakʼ birbão hoete onko khudạukom; ar amakʼ birbão hoete heṛan botor rakapʼ ocoytakome. 
Psalms83:16 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do lajaote perejtakome, jemon E Probhu Isor, onko do amko hohowam." 
Psalms83:17 Onko do jaejug lạgitʼko lajao arko botorokʼma; onko do bemanot ocokʼteko marao utạrokʼma. 
Psalms83:18 Jemonko baḍae daṛeakʼ, amakʼ ńutum do Probhu kana mente, hẽ, eken am kangeam goṭa dhạrtiren maraṅ Isor do." 
Psalms84:1 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, napaegea amakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do!" 
Psalms84:2 Ińakʼ jiwi do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ raca ńel lạgitʼe chaṭ pahṭaokʼ kana, ar ona iạte ińakʼ jiwi do oḍokokʼ kana; jiwetʼ Isor lạgitʼ ińakʼ hoṛmo ar mon do rạskạteye andoṛeda." 
Psalms84:3 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, ińren raj, ar ińren Isor, amakʼ pinḍ sorrege ghaṛwa cẽṛẽ do oṛakʼko ńam akada, ar bhạluạ cẽṛẽ hõ hopon dohoko reakʼ tukại ńam akada." 
Psalms84:4 Bhạgangeako onko do, one okoe do amakʼ oṛakʼreko tahẽnkan; onko do sanam ghạṛicʼ amgeko sarhaomea. (Sela)" 
Psalms84:5 Bhạgangeako onko do okoe am ṭhen khon daṛeko ńam. Bhạgangeako onko do, okoeyakʼ ontorre Sion calakʼ reakʼ hudis menakʼtako." 
Psalms84:6 Onko do rakʼjoṅ lodam talate calakʼ jokhecʼ ona jaega do dakʼ jharnako hoyocoyeda; ar laha dakʼ do borkot iạte onae perecʼeda. 
Psalms84:7 Calakʼ horre onko do daṛe cetan daṛeko ńameda; onko do Sionre Isor samaṅreko ńel ocokʼkana. 
Psalms84:8 E Probhu, sanam daṛeanicʼ Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme; E Jakobren Isor, ińakʼ katha luturakʼme baṛe. (Sela)" 
Psalms84:9 E Isor, aleakʼ ḍhal beṅgetʼakʼme; amren ojokʼicʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã beṅgetʼataeme." 
Psalms84:10 Eṭakʼ jaegare hajar din khemao khon amakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ racare mitʼṭecʼ din khemaoge ḍher bhagea; bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ tạmbure ḍerakʼ khon bickom ińren Isorakʼ duạr ṭhen teṅgo tahenge ḍher bhagea. 
Psalms84:11 Sạrige Probhu kangea siń cando ar ḍhal do; uni do daya ar ṭhonoke emokʼkana. Okoe dhoromteko calakʼ onko do bhage jisin emako uni do bae baṅakoa. 
Psalms84:12 E sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor, okoe amreye bhorsakʼ kan uni doe bhạgangea." 
Psalms85:1 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ disạm lạgitʼ do dayam udukʼ akada; am do Jakob acʼakʼ bondi dosa khonem ruạṛ ạguakadea." 
Psalms85:2 Amren hoṛkoakʼ bedhorom dom ikạ akatʼtakoa; ar onkoakʼ sanam kại dom dapalketʼtakoa. (Sela) 
Psalms85:3 Amakʼ sanam bumhạukʼkan edre dom sạṅgiń giḍi akada ar amakʼ jolokʼkan edre khonem ruạṛ akana. 
Psalms85:4 E aleren babańcaoicʼ Isor, am do lahate leka beretʼ ruạṛlem; ar alere menakʼ amakʼ edre baṛe ocogtam." 
Psalms85:5 Jaejugge cetʼ ale cetanre am do edre akanem tahena? Piṛhike piṛhi am do cetʼ alere bekusi akangem tahena? 
Psalms85:6 Amren hoṛko am iạte jemonko rạskạ daṛeakʼ onate cetʼ onko do bam jiwetʼ ruạṛkoa? 
Psalms85:7 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ daya baṛe udukʼaleme ar ale bańcaoleme." 
Psalms85:8 Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe mitạń iń do onageń ańjoma; uniren hoṛko ṭhen, uni botoraeko ṭhen uni do suluk reakʼ kathae roṛa; menkhan onko do lelha secʼ ar aloko ruạṛma." 
Psalms85:9 Okoe uniko botoraekan sạrige uniyakʼ bańcao reakʼ okte onko ṭhen do hecʼ akana; onate uniyakʼ ṭhonok do aboakʼ disạmre girobasokʼa. 
Psalms85:10 Asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr dokin ńapam midokʼa; dhorom ar suluk dokin cokʼ joṅa. 
Psalms85:11 Disạmre ot khon sạriyakʼ do omon oḍokokʼa; ar serma khon dhorom do latar secʼe oyoṅa. 
Psalms85:12 Okaṭakʼ bhageakʼ kan Probhu Isor do sạrige onae emokʼa, ar aboakʼ disạm do phosole danakʼa." 
Psalms85:13 Bedhorom do uni laha lahateye calakʼa; ar uniyakʼ taṛam lạgitʼ hore benao idiya. 
Psalms86:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ katha luturakʼtińme ar roṛ ruạṛạńme, ente iń do nandan ariń nacargea." 
Psalms86:2 Ińakʼ jiwi bańcaotińme, ente iń do amren bhokto kạnạń; E ińren Isor, okoe golam amreye bhorsakʼkan uni baṛe rukhiyạyem." 
Psalms86:3 E Probhu Isor, iń iạte dayakʼme, ente iń do goṭa din amgeń hohowam kana." 
Psalms86:4 Amren golamakʼ monre rạskạ danạńme, ente E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ ontor do am secʼgeń rakapʼ akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms86:5 E Probhu Isor, am do bhạlạiyicʼ arem dayayicʼ kana; ar okoe amko hohoam onkore do dayatem perecʼgea." 
Psalms86:6 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme; ar ińakʼ nehõrjoṅakʼ luturakʼtińme." 
Psalms86:7 Muhinre amiń hohoama, ente am do ińem roṛ ruạṛạńạ." 
Psalms86:8 E Probhu Isor, debotako modre am lekan do cele hõ bạnukʼkoa; amakʼ kạmi sãote eṭakʼ jãhãn kạmi reakʼ hõ ohoge jurikokʼa." 
Psalms86:9 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ sirjonren sanam jạtrenko do hecʼkate amko manotmea arko ḍobokʼama; ar amko sarhao sereńama." 
Psalms86:10 Am dom maraṅgea ar hahaṛawakʼkom kạmikana; eken amkagem Isor do. 
Psalms86:11 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ hor reaṅ cetʼạńme baṛe, jemon amakʼ sạri horteń taṛam daṛeakʼ; ar am sewawam lạgitʼ ińakʼ bar monan ontor baṛe mitʼ kạtińme." 
Psalms86:12 E Probhu, ińren Isor, ińakʼ goṭa ontorte amiń sarhaomea; ar jaejugiń õṛhẽ sereńama." 
Psalms86:13 Iń lạgitʼ amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ simạ do bạnukʼa; patal puri reakʼ latar utạr jaega khon am do ińakʼ jiwim rukhiyạ akatʼtińạ. 
Psalms86:14 E Isor, bạḍạiko do iń upạrteko teṅgo akana; ar sasantaoko do ińakʼ jiwi hatao lạgitʼko kurumuṭu kana. Am lạgitʼ onko hoṛ do jãhãn bhoktige bạnukʼtakoa." 
Psalms86:15 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do mãyãte perecʼ dayayicʼ Isor kanam; am do usạrate bam edre hodokʼa, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrtetʼ reakʼ mucạtʼtetʼ do bạnukʼa." 
Psalms86:16 Am do iń secʼ ạcurokʼme ar dayawạń me; amren golam baṛe daṛe danaeme; amren kạ̃ṛmĩren hopon rukhiyạyeme. 
Psalms86:17 Amakʼ bhạlại reakʼ sana menakʼ ona baṛe sạbudme, jemon iń hirkhạwạńko do ona ńelte lajaoko ńam; ente E Probhu Isor, amge ińem goṛoakadińạ ar jiwi raṛecʼem imạńkana." 
Psalms87:1 Probhu Isor do sonot buruko cetanre acʼakʼ nagrahae tearjoṅa. 
Psalms87:2 Jakob bõsren eṭakʼ sanam tahen ṭhạ̃i khon uni do Sion reakʼ phaṭok duạrkogeye kusiyada. 
Psalms87:3 E Isorakʼ nagraha, am reaṅ do ạḍi ṭhonok reakʼ katha lạiyogokʼ kana. (Sela)" 
Psalms87:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe sạriyakʼgeko baḍae edeńkan onko reaṅ lại jokhecʼ iń do Rahob ar Babel reakʼ kathań lạiya, ar onko Philisṭiko, Tur ar Kusrenkoakʼ katha hõń lạiya, ‘noko mimitʼko do Sionreko janam akana.’ ”" 
Psalms87:5 Ar Sion reakʼ do lạiyogokʼa, “Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko do onareko janam akana; maraṅ Isor acʼtetʼge Sion doe tul rakaba.”" 
Psalms87:6 Probhu Isor do jạt jạtrenkoe ol caṛhaokoteye mena, “Nui do Sionregeye janam akana.” (Sela)" 
Psalms87:7 Ar sekʼreńko ar enejokʼko doko mena, “Ińakʼ sanam rạskạ reakʼ jharna do amrege menakʼa.”" 
Psalms88:1 E Probhu, ińren babańcaoicʼ Isor, iń do siń sạṭupʼ am ṭheniń rakʼetʼkana." 
Psalms88:2 Am samaṅre ińakʼ koejoṅ baṛe hạjirokʼma; am do ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme; 
Psalms88:3 Ente ińakʼ ontor do dukte perecʼgea; ińakʼ jiwi do patal puri hạbicʼ sen akana. 
Psalms88:4 Okoe patal puriteko calakʼa onko modre iń hõń lekha ocoakana; ar daṛeanicʼ iń hoyakanre hõ iń doń nijor akana ar daṛe bạnukʼtae hoṛ lekageń hoyakana. 
Psalms88:5 Iń do patal purireń khadle giḍi ocoakana; iń do gocʼicʼ, topareye giticʼ akan hoṛ lekageń hoyakana, ar okoekoakʼ katha am do bam disạyetʼ, onko do amakʼ ti khonko getʼ begarakana." 
Psalms88:6 Am do patal puri reakʼ latar utạr jaegarem doho akadińạ, ar kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutrem doho akadińạ." 
Psalms88:7 Amakʼ edre do iń cetanre menakʼa; amakʼ sanam edre reakʼ ḍheote am do ińem tạpukʼ edeńkana. (Sela) 
Psalms88:8 Ar am do ińren hoṛko iń ṭhen khonem idiakatʼkoa; ar onko ṭhen do hirkhạwạnicʼem hoyoco akadińạ. Iń doń esetʼ akana, ar bạń oḍok hecʼ daṛeakʼ kana;" 
Psalms88:9 Duk ar kosṭote ińakʼ mẽtʼ do dhund caba akantińạ. E Probhu Isor, dinạm hilokʼ amiń hohowam kana; iń do am secʼ tiyiń tiyạr akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms88:10 Okoeko gocʼakan, onko lạgitʼ do cetʼ hahaṛawakʼem kạmi akada? Gocʼko do beretʼkate cetʼ amko õṛhẽmea? (Sela)" 
Psalms88:11 Topare amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar norokre pạtiạr reakʼ katha do cetʼ porcarokʼ tama? 
Psalms88:12 Ńut jaegare cetʼ amakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko do bujhạukʼgea? Oka disạmren hoṛ do hoṛko hiṛińko onḍe do cetʼ amakʼ dhorom reakʼ kạmiko bujhạukʼgea? 
Psalms88:13 E Probhu Isor, iń do am ṭhen goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń rakʼeda; setakʼre am ṭhen ińakʼ koejoṅ do seṭerokʼkana." 
Psalms88:14 E Probhu Isor, cedakʼem bạgi giḍiwạń kana? Amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do cedakʼem betʼakatʼtama?" 
Psalms88:15 Gidrạ khonge iń do dukreń tahenkana ar gujukʼ dạkhilreń paṛao akana. Amakʼ botoranakʼ sạjại do iń cetanre pheḍ hecʼakana; iń do ạḍitetʼgeń aschuṭạukʼ kana. 
Psalms88:16 Amakʼ botoranakʼ edre do iń cetante parom calao akana; ar amakʼ botoranakʼ uyukʼ do ińe seskedińa. 
Psalms88:17 Onako do dakʼ leka siń sạṭupʼ ińe esetʼ ạcurakadińạ, ar purạteye unum caba akadińạ." 
Psalms88:18 Ińren gateko ar ińren dulạṛiạko do, iń ṭhen khonem idiakatʼkoa; ar ńitokʼ do ńutkangeae ińren gate." 
Psalms89:1 Iń do jaejugge Probhu Isorakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ iń sereńa; ar bõske bõs sanamko samaṅre amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ reakʼ kathań lại jạhira. 
Psalms89:2 Ińiń lại saḍea je, amakʼ dulạṛ reakʼ kạmi do jaejug hạbicʼ borket idikʼkana mente; ar amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ do sermarem bạisạu akada." 
Psalms89:3 Am dom menakada, “Ińren bachao hoṛko lạgitʼ iń do mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń bandhao dohoakada; ińren golam Dạud ṭhen iń do noań kiriạ akana," 
Psalms89:4 ‘amakʼ bõs do jaejug hạbicʼ iń teṅgo keṭeja; ar piṛhike piṛhi amakʼ siṅghạsoniń ṭarhao dohoya.’ ” (Sela) 
Psalms89:5 E Probhu Isor, serma reakʼ sanamakʼ do amakʼ maraṅ kạmi reakʼe oṛhẽ sereńetʼkana, sonot goḍetko talare amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼko sarhaoeda." 
Psalms89:6 Sermare nonkan cele menakʼkoa okoe do Probhu Isor sãoteye jurikokʼa? Serma goḍetko modre Probhu Isor soman do okoe menaea? 
Psalms89:7 Sonot goḍetkoakʼ bạisire sanamkoge Isor do botor arko bhoktiaea; uni beṛhaeten sanamko khon uni kangeae ḍher botoranicʼ do. 
Psalms89:8 E Probhu, sanam daṛean Isor, okoe menaea am lekan daṛeanicʼ do, E Probhu? Amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼge am doe esetʼ ạcur akatʼmea." 
Psalms89:9 Jalapuri reakʼ ḍheoko do amakʼ ḍanṭaore menakʼa; ar ona reakʼ ḍheoko rakapʼlenre am dom ḍelḍel ocoyeda. 
Psalms89:10 Rahab do gocʼicʼ leka amgem chaka chun akadea; am daṛeanakʼ tite amren bạirikom chirchạtur akatʼkoa. 
Psalms89:11 Serma hõ amakʼge ar dhạrti hõ amakʼge; ot ar ona reakʼ jotowakʼge amem benao akada. 
Psalms89:12 Utạr ar dạkhin do amakʼ sirjạukangea; Tabor ar Hermon buru do am iạte rạskạte kin sereńeda. 
Psalms89:13 Amakʼ ti do ektiạrite perecʼgea; amakʼ tire do daṛe menakʼa, ar amakʼ jojom ti reakʼ daṛe do ohoge tulạulena." 
Psalms89:14 Dhorom ar hok cetanre amakʼ siṅghạson do teṅgo akana; dulạṛ ar sạriyakʼtetʼ do am laha lahate calakʼ kana. 
Psalms89:15 Bhạgangeako onko hoṛ do, okoe do ona rạskạ aṛaṅko ańjomakatʼ; E Probhu Isor, amakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ marsalte onko doko dãṛãn kana." 
Psalms89:16 Goṭa dinge am iạteko rạskạkʼ kana; amakʼ dhoromge onko do coṭteye rakapʼetʼkoa. 
Psalms89:17 Amge coṅ onkoakʼ daṛe reakʼ mońjtetʼma; amakʼ dayatege aleakʼ daṛe reakʼ dereń do coṭteye rakapʼ akantalea. 
Psalms89:18 Aboren raj do Israelren uni sonoticʼe bahal akadea; aboakʼ ona ḍhal do Probhu Isorgeye bahal akadea. 
Psalms89:19 Mitʼ dhao am do dorsonte am botoramkom metatʼko tahẽkana, “Iń do mitʼṭen birbanṭa hoṛiń goṛo akadea; ar onko mod khon mitʼ hoṛiń bachaoante coṭteń rakapʼ akadea." 
Psalms89:20 Ińren golam Dạud doń sendra ńam akadea; ar ińakʼ sonot sunumteń ojokʼ bahalkedea. 
Psalms89:21 Ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do uni sãote tahena; ińakʼ tige uni do daṛeye danaea. 
Psalms89:22 Okoe bạiri hõ uni cetan do bako rakapʼ daṛeakʼa; ar okoe bạṛicʼ hoṛ hõ uni do bako santao daṛeaea. 
Psalms89:23 Uni samaṅrege iń do uni upạrtenkoń chirchạturkoa ar okoe uniko hirkhạwae onko doń maraokoa. 
Psalms89:24 Ińakʼ pạtiạu ar asambheṛ dulạṛ do uni sãote tahena; ar ińakʼ ńutumtege uniyakʼ daṛe dereń do coṭte rakabokʼa. 
Psalms89:25 Iń do jalapuri ar gaḍako cetanre ektiạriń emaea. 
Psalms89:26 Uni do hohowạńteye mitạńa, ‘amge ińren Baba do, ińren Isor, ar ińren aotan buru.’" 
Psalms89:27 Uni do ińren pạhilicʼ hoponiń hoeocoyea; Dhạrtiren rapajko modre uni doń maraṅea. 
Psalms89:28 Jaejug hạbicʼ uni lạgitʼ ińakʼ dulạṛ do tahena; uni lạgitʼge ińakʼ bondobos do ṭikạu tahena. 
Psalms89:29 Iń do uniren bõsko jaejug hạbicʼ iń doho idikoa; tinạkʼ din serma tahena unạkʼ din uniyakʼ siṅghạson hõ tahena. 
Psalms89:30 Uniren gidrạko ińakʼ hukum khonko pharaklen khan ar ińakʼ ạn bako manao lekhan," 
Psalms89:31 ar ińakʼ ạnko bemanot khan ar ińakʼ hukum bako senakʼ khan 
Psalms89:32 enḍekhan iń do ṭheṅgate kại reakʼ sạjạiyiń emakoa, ar onkoakʼ bedhorom iạte hõń sạjạikoa." 
Psalms89:33 Menkhan ińakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do uni cetan khon bạń ocoga; ar ińakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ do bạń ạuṛiyakʼ ocoya. 
Psalms89:34 Ińiń dohoakatʼ bondobos do bạń rạpuda; ińakʼ moca okae menetʼkan ona do bạń bodola. 
Psalms89:35 Ińakʼ sonot gokʼakʼte iń do mitʼ dhaogeń roṛ dohoakada iń do Dạud ṭhen tisge eṛe do bạń roṛa; 
Psalms89:36 Uniren bõsko do jaejug hạbicʼko tahena; ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson do iń samaṅre siń cando leka tahena. 
Psalms89:37 Serma reakʼ pạtiạr ńindạ cando lekage ona do jaejug lạgitʼ tear dohokʼa.” (Sela) 
Psalms89:38 Menkhan am dom bạgi giḍi akadińạ, arem nihạ̃t akadińạ; amge ojokʼicʼ hoṛ upạrtem raṅgao akana." 
Psalms89:39 Amren golam lạgitʼ oka bondobosem dohoakatʼ ona dom hirkhạ akawada; ar ona reakʼ mukuṭ do dhuṛire giḍikatem be sonotakada. 
Psalms89:40 Uniyakʼ rurukhiyạ bhit dom rạputʼ giḍiakada; ar ona reakʼ sanam gaṛ dom marao akada. 
Psalms89:41 Ar uniyakʼ disạm aṛeteko parom calakʼ hoṛ do jotowakʼko luṭ iditaea; ar acʼ aḍepase jạtrenko ṭhen do landa dhutʼicʼe hoyakana. 
Psalms89:42 Amge uni upạrtenko do daṛeankom hoyoco akatʼkoa; ar uniren bạiriko dom rạskạ ocoakatʼkoa. 
Psalms89:43 Am do uniyakʼ tarwaṛem bhotṛo ocoakatʼtaea; ar lạṛhạire uni do bam jitạu ocoadea. 
Psalms89:44 Uniyakʼ jakjomok dom caba utạrkatʼtaea; ar uniyakʼ siṅghạson dom gejerketʼtaea. 
Psalms89:45 Uniyakʼ juạn reakʼ dinkom komao ketʼtaea, ar lajaoakʼtem dapal akadea. (Sela)" 
Psalms89:46 E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din? Jaejugge cetʼ am do okogem tahena? Ar tinạkʼ din amakʼ edre do seṅgel lekam jol ocoytama?" 
Psalms89:47 Hudisme ińakʼ jion do tinạkʼ huḍińgea; ar cetʼ ạuṛiyakʼ lạgitʼ manwa dom benao akatʼkoa? 
Psalms89:48 Okoe kanae uni daṛean hoṛ do, okoe do jiwetʼge menae ar bae gujukʼ? Nonkan okoe menakʼkoa, okoe do patal puri khon apnarteye rukhiyạ daṛekokʼ? (Sela)" 
Psalms89:49 E Probhu Isor, okayena amakʼ ona asambheṛ dulạṛ do? Amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ khạtirte ona dulạṛ reakʼ gokʼakʼ oka do Dạud ṭhenem onkaletʼ." 
Psalms89:50 E Probhu Isor, amren golame henosta ocolenre ona reakʼ baṛe disạime; disạime, eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ ona henosta cetʼleka iń do koṛamreń hobor baṛayetʼkana." 
Psalms89:51 E Probhu Isor, amren bạirikoge ona doko henosta akada; ar amren ojokʼicʼ hoṛ hõ uniyakʼ sanam taṛam pańjare." 
Psalms89:52 Jaejugge Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma! Amen, Amen." 
Psalms90:1 E Probhu Isor, piṛhike piṛhi am kangeam aleren thamgạḍi do." 
Psalms90:2 Buru boṭkocʼ ạuri sirjạukʼre, dhạrti ar pirthimi ạuri sirjạukʼre, ona laha khon jaejug hạbicʼ am kangeam Isor do." 
Psalms90:3 Manwa do dhuṛitem ruạr idiyede kana; amem meneda, “E manwa hoponko, ape do arhõ dhuṛite ruạṛokʼpe.”" 
Psalms90:4 Amakʼ nońjorre hajar bochor parom calaoen do, holanokʼ din leka kana." 
Psalms90:5 Am do manwako ḍubạ dakʼtem ạtu idiyetʼkoa, onko do kukmũ baragge; onko do tolmojokʼ ghãs lekanako." 
Psalms90:6 Setakʼre ona do bahakʼa; ar ạyupʼ do tolmojokʼa, ar rohoṛ cabakʼa." 
Psalms90:7 Amakʼ edrete ale dole ses cabakʼkana; amakʼ jolokʼkan edrete ạḍile botorokʼ kana. 
Psalms90:8 Aleakʼ ghạṭko do am samaṅrem dohoakada; amakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ marsalte aleakʼ oko danaṅ kạiko sodorokʼ kana. 
Psalms90:9 Amakʼ botoranakʼ edre talate aleakʼ din do parom calakʼkana; ar sahẽtʼ lekage aleakʼ bochorko hõ caba hijukʼ kana. 
Psalms90:10 Aleakʼ bahaokʼ din do eken eae gel bochor, ar ḍher khan do irạlgel bochor hõ hoyokʼa; aleakʼ bahaokʼ din jãhãtinạkʼ dinge hoyokʼ onare do eken duk ar kosṭoge menakʼa; bochor do parom calao godokʼkana ar ale hõle maraokʼkana." 
Psalms90:11 Amakʼ edre reakʼ daṛe do okoeye bujhạu daṛeakʼa? Tinạkʼ hoṛakʼ ontorre bhoti menakʼte, amakʼ raṅgaoko bujhạu daṛeakʼa?" 
Psalms90:12 Enḍekhan bujhạu ocoleme, aleakʼ bahaokʼ din do thoṛa getalea mente, jemon aleakʼ ontor do akelte perejokʼtale." 
Psalms90:13 E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din? Ma ruạṛokʼme, amren golamkore mãyãkʼme." 
Psalms90:14 Amakʼ nãwã dulạṛte baṛe tirpitlem, jemon rạskạtele sereń daṛeakʼ ar kusite jionle khemao daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms90:15 Tinạkʼ din khon aleakʼ bạḍại rạpud lạgitʼem kạmikana, ar tinạkʼ bochor dukrele tahẽkan, unạkʼ din am do sukre dohokaleme." 
Psalms90:16 Amren golamko ṭhen amakʼ kạmi ar onkoren gidrạko ṭhen amakʼ ṭhonok sodorme baṛe. 
Psalms90:17 Aboren Probhu Isorakʼ daya do abo cetanre baṛe tahen ma; aleakʼ sanam kạmi kajaktaleme, hẽ, aleakʼ sanam kạmi baṛe kajak utạrtaleme." 
Psalms91:1 Maraṅ Isorakʼ hirlạre okoye tahenkan uni do sanam daṛeanicʼakʼ umulreye tahẽnkana. 
Psalms91:2 Probhu Isor reaṅ do noageń mena, “Unige ińren asray ar ińren gaṛ do; uni kangea ińren Isor do one unireń ṭehãḍakan.”" 
Psalms91:3 Uni do sesendrakoakʼ pạsi khon ar maraokʼ reakʼ ti khone rukhiyạmea. 
Psalms91:4 Acʼakʼ ilkoteye guṅgutʼ esetʼmea, ar uniyakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre am do asrayem ńama; uniyakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ do amakʼ ḍhal ar hoṛmo aḍokʼakʼ phirikana." 
Psalms91:5 Ńindạ reakʼ muhin ar din reakʼ toras do bam botorakʼ kana; 
Psalms91:6 bam botorakʼ kana ńindạ reakʼ mahamạri do se tikin jokhecʼ reakʼ jarkharakʼko hõ. 
Psalms91:7 Hoedaṛeakʼa am pantere hajar hoṛ ar eṭakʼ pantere do gel hajar hoṛko gurlenre hõ noako do am ṭhen baṅge hijukʼa. 
Psalms91:8 Bedhorom hoṛko cetʼleka kuṛạiko ńam ona do eken mẽtʼtem ńela. 
Psalms91:9 “E Probhu Isor, amge ińren hirlạ do.” Am dom goṭa ṭhik akada maraṅ Isorge amren hirlạ kanae;" 
Psalms91:10 onate amakʼ jãhãn sorbonas do baṅ hoyokʼa, ar amakʼ oṛakʼ cetanre jãhãn jhãpko hõ baṅ hijukʼa;" 
Psalms91:11 ente uni do acʼren goḍetko am reaṅe hukumakoa onko do sanam horkore amko horhomea. 
Psalms91:12 Onko do titeko sepeńmea jemon dhirire jaṅga alo bajaokʼtam. 
Psalms91:13 Am do kul ar kạrinạṅgiń biń cetantem taṛama, ar dhạcri kul ar biń kidińkom lebetʼ gańjaokoa." 
Psalms91:14 Probhu Isore meneda, “Dulạṛte okoye sabeńkan, uni doń rukhiyạyea; ar muhin khoniń bańcaoea, ente uni do ińe oromakadińạ." 
Psalms91:15 Uniye hohowạńreń ańjomtaea; ar muhinre uni sãoteń tahena; uni doń rukhiyạyea ariń manotea. 
Psalms91:16 Ar ạḍi diniń bahaoeteń purun ocoyea; ar ińakʼ babańcaoiń ńel ocoyea.” 
Psalms92:1 E Probhu, maraṅ Isor, gel taranakʼ banamte, binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ banamte am sarhaome reakʼ, amakʼ sarhao sereńam reakʼ, ar setakʼre amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ katha ar ńindạ jokhecʼ amakʼ pạtiạr reakʼ katha lại jạhir do samani rạskạ reakʼ kana!" 
Psalms92:2  
Psalms92:3  
Psalms92:4 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ kạmi do ińe rạskạ ocoyediń kana; ar amakʼ sanam kạmiko iạte iń do rạskạteń sarhao sereńama." 
Psalms92:5 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ kạmiko do ạḍi bhagegea ar amakʼ hudisko hõ ạḍi khạndrigea!" 
Psalms92:6 Orlo hoṛ do ona bae baḍae daṛeakʼa; ar bebuj hoṛ hõ ona do bae bujhạu daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms92:7 Bedhorom hoṛko do ghãs lekako hara rakabokʼ kana ar dusṭạmi kạmikanko do usạrateko phulạukʼ kana enhõ onko do jaejug lạgitʼko marao utạrokʼa. 
Psalms92:8 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do jaejug hạbicʼ coṭrem tahẽna." 
Psalms92:9 E Probhu Isor, amren bạiriko doko maraokʼa, hẽ, onko doko caba utạrokʼa; ar dusṭạmiko do jotogeko chirchạturokʼa." 
Psalms92:10 Bir sanḍakʼ usul dereń leka am do ińakʼ bohokʼem usul akatʼtińạ; ar rạskạ salakʼ nãwã sunumte ińem ojokʼ akadińạ. 
Psalms92:11 Ińren bạirikoakʼ bhagao do nij mẽtʼteń ńelakada; okoe iń upạrteko teṅgo akan onko bedhorom hoṛkoakʼ rakʼjoṅ iń do nijakʼ luturteń ańjom akada. 
Psalms92:12 Dhorom hoṛ do khijur dare lekae ḍagḍagaokʼa; uni do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare lekae hara rakapʼa. 
Psalms92:13 Aboren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre okoeko rohoe ocoakan onko do uniyakʼ racareko hara rakabokʼa. 
Psalms92:14 Ar haṛam umạr hạbicʼ hõko jo bahakʼa; onko do soros ar purṭhạko hoyokʼa. 
Psalms92:15 Onate porcarokʼa, Probhu Isor doe dhoromgea; unige ińren daṛe do ar unire jãhãn behok do bạnukʼa." 
Psalms93:1 Probhu Isorge rapaj do; uni do ṭhonok reakʼ kicricʼe horokʼeda, uni do kajakte ḍanḍae paṭhe akatʼtaea; dhạrti do ạḍi keṭecʼte tearakana, ona do tishõ baṅ ḍikạḍakekʼa." 
Psalms93:2 Pạhil khonge amakʼ siṅghạson do teṅgo ṭarhao akana; ar am do jaejug khonge menama. 
Psalms93:3 E Probhu Isor, ḍubạ dakʼ reakʼ do saḍe rakapʼ kana; ar ona dakʼ do hud hud saḍe kana ar ḍheoko do se rakabokʼ kana." 
Psalms93:4 Ḍubạ dakʼ reakʼ saḍe khon ar jalapuri reakʼ rakabokʼkan ḍheoko khon Probhu Isor doe daṛeangea, uni do coṭre menaea." 
Psalms93:5 Amakʼ sanam katha do sạri utạrgea; E Probhu Isor, amakʼ oṛakʼ do sonot reakʼ sajte jaejug sajao akana." 
Psalms94:1 E Probhu Isor, am do hala ruạṛicʼ Isor kanam, E hala ruạṛicʼ Isor, amakʼ marsal baṛe sodorokʼma." 
Psalms94:2 E dhạrtiren bicạricʼ, de beretʼme; ar bạḍạikoakʼ kuṛại baṛe emkatakom." 
Psalms94:3 Ar tinạkʼ din, E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din bedhorom hoṛko do rạskạ reakʼ ạtko ńama?" 
Psalms94:4 Onkoakʼ moca khon eken bạḍạite perecʼ bulige oḍok hijukʼ kana; onko bedhoromko doko phulạukʼ kana. 
Psalms94:5 E Probhu Isor, onko do amren hoṛkoko lebetʼ gańjaoetʼkoa; ar amren hoṛko cetanre doko julumeda." 
Psalms94:6 Onko do rạnḍi dukhi ar upriạ hoṛko sumạrkoa, Ar ṭũạr amarko doko khũnkoa." 
Psalms94:7 Onkoko meneda, “Note do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼ bạnukʼa; Jakobren Isor do bae moneyakʼa.”" 
Psalms94:8 Orlo hoṛko, ape do luturakʼpe; E bebujko, ape do tispe ạkilokʼa?" 
Psalms94:9 Okoe luture sirjạu akatʼ uni do cetʼ bae ańjomeda? Ar okoe mẽtʼe benao akatʼ uni do cetʼ bae ńeńelkana? 
Psalms94:10 Okoe sanam jạtrenkoe ḍanṭaoetʼko are cetʼakokan uni do cetʼ begor sạjại emokʼteye tahẽ daṛeakʼa? 
Psalms94:11 Probhu Isor do manwakoakʼ sanam hudis bundisakʼkoe baḍaegea; uni doe baḍaea, onako joto do ạuṛiyakʼgetakoa." 
Psalms94:12 E Probhu Isor, uni hoṛ doe bhạgangea okoe dom ḍanṭaoede ar amakʼ ạn ạrikom cetʼaekan." 
Psalms94:13 Uni do muhin hilokʼre dile ńama, one bedhoromko lạgitʼ ghaḍlakʼ ạuri tear sạtokʼ hạbicʼ." 
Psalms94:14 Probhu Isor do tishõ acʼren hoṛko bae bạgi giḍiakoa; okoe doko acʼren bachaoko kan onko do bae giḍi sạṅgińkoa. 
Psalms94:15 Bicạr do dhorom ruạṛokʼa; ar sanam sojhe monan hoṛ do onako pańjaya. 
Psalms94:16 Iń ńutumte bạṛicʼko upạrte do okoeye teṅgokʼa? Iń ńutumte dusṭạmiko do okoeye teṅgo daramkoa? 
Psalms94:17 Probhu Isor bae goṛowạń khan, enḍekhan gujukʼ guṛum disạmre calakʼ do ohoń bilomkea." 
Psalms94:18 Ińakʼ jaṅgakin leńjedokʼ kantińạ menteń hudislere, unrege E Probhu Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do ińe sapʼ dohoyedeń kana." 
Psalms94:19 Ińakʼ monre bạṛicʼ dạndiko tinre ḍherokʼ kana, unre amakʼ jiwi raṛecʼ reakʼ katha do ińakʼ ontore rạskạ ocoyetʼtińạ." 
Psalms94:20 Bạṛicʼ bikʼcạrko do bạṛicʼ kạmi lạgitʼ ạnko teara; onko do cetʼ am sãote jãhãn helmel tahẽ daṛekokʼtakoa? 
Psalms94:21 Onko do dhorom hoṛko upạrte dolko pakaoa ar dhoromko gujukʼ sạjại emako lạgitʼko dusikoa. 
Psalms94:22 Menkhan Probhu Isorge ińren aotan gaṛ do; ar ińren Isorge ińren asray buru. 
Psalms94:23 Onkoakʼ behokakʼ do onko cetanregeye ạguiya, onkoakʼ bedhoromakʼge uni doe cabakoa; aboren Isor Probhu Isorgeye onkakoa." 
Psalms95:1 Dela, Probhu Isor ńutumte rạskạte bon sereńaema; aboren rurukhiyạ buru bon andoṛaema." 
Psalms95:2 Dela, sarhao sereńate uni samaṅre bon calakʼma, ar õṛhẽ sereńte uni ńutumte bon rạskạkʼma." 
Psalms95:3 Probhu kangea maraṅ Isor do; sanam debotako cetanre uni kangeae maraṅ raj. 
Psalms95:4 Dhạrti reakʼ sanam khạndriyakʼ ṭhạ̃iko do uni tirege menakʼa; ar buru reakʼ cuṛạko hõ uniyakʼ kangea. 
Psalms95:5 Jalapuri hõ uniyakʼ kangea, ente unige ona doe benao akada; ar ot hõ uniyakʼ titege benao akana." 
Psalms95:6 Dela, abo do uni bon sewawae ma; aboren sirjạuicʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre bon ikhṛumokʼma." 
Psalms95:7 Uni kangeae aboren Isor do, ar abo do uniren kana bon; uniyakʼ gupi ṭạnḍiren bhiḍiko leka uni doe ńel sãohayetʼ bona. Ohae, teheń baṛe ińakʼ kathape ańjomletiń khan!" 
Psalms95:8 Uniye men akada, “Aperen hapṛamko leka apeakʼ ontor do alope keṭejtapea; onko do hahaṅkarre Meribare ar Massa ṭhen ińko biḍạuledińa. Aperen hapṛamko do ińko ńelakadeńre hõ enhõ onko do onḍeko biḍạu aṭkarledińa." 
Psalms95:9  
Psalms95:10 Pongel bochor hạbicʼ ona piṛhirenkote iń do ạḍiń ạṛis cabalena; ińiń menleda, ‘noko hoṛakʼ ontor do eṭakʼ secʼ ghańjeṛ akantakoa; ińakʼ hor do bako baḍaelakʼa.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ona iạte iń do edreteń kiriạlena, ‘onko do ińakʼ jirạukʼ jaegate baṅgeko bolo ńama.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte nãwã sarhao sereńpe; dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko, ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe." 
Psalms96:2 Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe, ar uni sarhaoepe; uniyakʼ bańcaokʼ din reakʼ katha porcarpe." 
Psalms96:3 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen uniyakʼ ṭhonok lạipe; ar sanam hoṛko talare uniyakʼ sanam hahaṛa kạmiko reakʼ katha porcarpe. 
Psalms96:4 Probhu Isorgeye maraṅa ar sanamko cetanre unige sarhaoanicʼ lek kanae; sanam debotako khon uni doe botorangea. 
Psalms96:5 Eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren debotako doko ạuṛiyakʼgea, menkhan Probhu Isor do maraṅ serma sirjạuicʼ kanae." 
Psalms96:6 Man ar mạhima do uni samaṅre; uniyakʼ oṛakʼre do daṛe ar ṭhonokge menakʼa. 
Psalms96:7 E jạt jạtren sanam gusṭirenko, sanam daṛe ar ṭhonok do Probhu Isorakʼ kangea." 
Psalms96:8 Sanam sarhaoteakʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ mente aṅgocpe; ar samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko uniyakʼ racare hijukʼpe. 
Psalms96:9 Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ sonot reakʼ katha hudiskate uni manotepe; dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko, ape do uni samaṅre thar tharaokʼpe." 
Psalms96:10 Jạt jạtrenko ṭhen lại sodorpe, “Probhu Isorgeye raj kana mente. Dhạrti do ṭarhao kajak akana, ona do tisge baṅ ḍikạḍakekʼa; uni do dhoromte sanam jạtrenkoe ḍanṭaokoa.”" 
Psalms96:11 Sermae rạskạkʼma, ar dhạrti doe kusikʼma; jalapuri ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼge hud hudạukʼma;" 
Psalms96:12 Ṭạnḍi ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼge rạskạkʼma. Enḍekhan bir reakʼ sanam dare nạ̃ṛĩko hõ rạskạteko sereńa; 
Psalms96:13 Onko do Probhu Isor samaṅreko sereńa, ente uni doe hijukʼkana. Uni do dhạrtirenko bicạrko lạgitʼe hijukʼkana. Uni do dhoromte dhạrtiye bicạra, ar jạt jạtrenko pạtiạr salakʼe bicạrkatakoa." 
Psalms97:1 Probhu Isorgeye raj kana; dhạrti doe rạskạkʼma, ar sạṅgiń reakʼ dipko hõko kusikʼma." 
Psalms97:2 Rimil ar ńut do uni beṛhaete esetʼ ạcur akana; dhorom ar hok bicạr do uniyakʼ siṅghạson reakʼ rehetʼkana. 
Psalms97:3 Seṅgel do uni laha lahate calakʼ kana; ona seṅgel do uni beṛhaeten sanam bạirikoe ḍahao maraoetʼkoa. 
Psalms97:4 Uniyakʼ bijli reakʼ malkaote marsal lena; ona ńelte dhạrti do thar tharaoena. 
Psalms97:5 Probhu Isor samaṅre, goṭa dhạrti ar buru boṭkocʼko do mom leka cherokʼa." 
Psalms97:6 Serma do acʼakʼ hok reakʼ kathae lại sodoreda, ar sanam jạtrenko do uniyakʼ ṭhonokko ńeleda." 
Psalms97:7 Okoe murhutʼko sewawako kan ar Deb debota iạteko bạḍạiyokʼ kan onko sanamkoge lajaoreko paṛaokʼma; Probhu Isor samaṅre debotako do bohokʼko kuḍbur takoma. 
Psalms97:8 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ dhorom bicạr reakʼ katha ańjomte Sion doe rạskạkʼ kana, ar Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako hõ kusikʼkana." 
Psalms97:9 E Probhu Isor, am do goṭa dhạrtiren maraṅ Isor kanam; sanam debotako cetanre am do menama." 
Psalms97:10 Okoe Probhu Isorko dulạṛede onko do bedhoromko hirkhạwakʼ ma; ente uni do acʼ sekʼwawaekoe bańcaoetʼkoa ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ti khone rukhiyạyetʼkoa. 
Psalms97:11 Isor botoraeko do jionre marsalko em ocokʼa, ar okoekoakʼ ontor khạṭige onkoakʼ jionre do rạskạko ńama." 
Psalms97:12 E Isor sewawae kan hoṛko, Probhuge aperen rạskạwạnicʼe hoyokʼma. Ape ge uniyakʼ sonottetʼ sarhaotaepe." 
Psalms98:1 Probhu Isor ńutumte nãwãnakʼ sereńpe, ente uni do aema hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmi akada; uniyakʼ daṛe, hẽ, uniyakʼ sonot maraṅ daṛete uni doe bańcao akada." 
Psalms98:2 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ bańcao reakʼ kạmiye udukʼ akada; sanam jạtrenko samaṅre acʼakʼ dhorom kạmi reakʼe sodor akada. 
Psalms98:3 Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ acʼakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr reakʼ katha uni doe disạ dohoakada; ar aboren Isorakʼ bańcao reakʼ kạmi do goṭa dhạrtiren hoṛko ńelakada. 
Psalms98:4 Dhạrtiren sanam hoṛ, ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte rạskạkʼpe; ar rạskạte andoṛpe ar sarhao sereńpe." 
Psalms98:5 Peṛesaṅ banamate ar mońj rạṛte Probhu Isor do sarhao sereńaepe. 
Psalms98:6 Pẽpṛẽtʼ ar sakwa oroṅate Probhu raj samaṅre rạskạ sereńpe. 
Psalms98:7 Jalapuri ar onare menakʼ jotoge rạskạteko andoṛma; dhạrti ar onareko tahenkan jotoko rạskạteko andoṛma. 
Psalms98:8 Sanam gaḍako do thayoateko rạskạkʼma, Buru boṭkocʼ do mitʼ sãoteko rạskạ midokʼma." 
Psalms98:9 Probhu Isor samaṅre onko do onako onkaema, ente uni do dhạrti bicạr lạgitʼe hijukʼ kana. Uni do dhoromte dhạrti reakʼe bicạra, ar jạtrenko do hok reakʼe bicạrtakoa." 
Psalms99:1 Probhu Isor doe raj kana; sanam jạtrenko thar tharaokʼma. Uni do Kerubkin cetan siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana; ar dhạrti do dalmalaokʼma. 
Psalms99:2 Sionreye tahenkan Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea; sanam jạtrenko do uni taberen kanako. 
Psalms99:3 Onko jạtrenko do uniko sarhaoema; uni do maraṅ ar botoranicʼ Isor kanae; uni doe sonotgea. 
Psalms99:4 Okoe raj do dhorom bicạre kusiyakʼ uniyakʼ daṛe do amgem ṭarhao akatʼtaea, jemon uni do dhoromteye bicạr daṛeakʼ. Amge Jakob bõsrenko talare hok bicạr ar dhoromem dohoakada," 
Psalms99:5 Aboren Probhu Isor sarhaoepe; uniyakʼ jaṅga lebedokʼ ṭhen ikhṛumokʼte ḍobokʼaepe; ente uni doe sonotgea. 
Psalms99:6 Mose ar Aron hõ uniren naekeko modren kin tahẽkana; okoe uni ṭhenko koejoṅkan tahẽkan onko modre Samuel hõe tahẽkana. Mose, Aron ar Samuel do Probhu Isorko hohowae kan tahẽkana ar uni do onkoe roṛ ruạṛako kan tahẽkana." 
Psalms99:7 Uni do rimil reakʼ khunṭi khone roṛetʼkan tahẽkana; onko do uniyakʼ katha ar hukumko manaoetʼ tahẽkana. 
Psalms99:8 E Isor aleren Probhu Isor, am do onkoakʼem ańjometʼ tahẽkana; am do onkoren ikạyicʼ Isorem tahẽkana, menkhan onkoakʼ bedhoromre dom sạjạiletʼkoa." 
Psalms99:9 Ona iạte aboren Probhu Isor baṛe sarhaoepe; uniyakʼ sonot buru samaṅre ḍobokʼaepe, ente aboren Probhu Isor doe sonotgea." 
Psalms100:1 E dhạrtiren sanam hoṛ, ape do Probhu Isor oṛhẽ sereńaepe." 
Psalms100:2 Ar rạskạte Probhu Isor sewawaepe; ar rạskạ sarhao sereńte uni samaṅre hạjirokʼpe. 
Psalms100:3 Ape do baḍaekakʼpe Probhugeye Isor kana mente. Unige abo doe benao akatʼbona, ar abo do uniren kanabon; abo do uniren kangeabon, ar uniyakʼ gukʼpi ṭạnḍiren bhiḍi kanabon." 
Psalms100:4 Uni sarhao sereńaete uniyakʼ duạrte bolokʼpe, ar uni gun manao joharae tulucʼ uniyakʼ racate bolokʼpe; uni sarhaoepe, ar gun manao joharaepe." 
Psalms100:5 Probhu Isor doe bhạlạiyicʼkana, uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana; ar uniyakʼ pạtiạr do piṛhi cetan piṛhige." 
Psalms101:1 Iń do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar hok reakʼ iń sereńama; E Probhu Isor, iń do amiń oṛhẽ sereńa ma." 
Psalms101:2 Sạbit jion khemao lạgitʼ iń moneyakʼa; Am do iń ṭhen tisem hijukʼa? Iń do sạbit monte ińakʼ oṛakʼreń tahena. 
Psalms101:3 Bạṛicʼakʼ cetʼge ińakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre bạń dohoya. Bạṛicʼ horteko calakʼ hoṛkoakʼ kạmi doń hirkhạwakʼ kana. Onako do ińre baṅge laṭkaokʼạ. 
Psalms101:4 Ińakʼ ontorre phẽpṛa mon do bạń dohoya; bạṛicʼko sãote jãhãn helmel hõ baṅ tahentińạ. 
Psalms101:5 Okoe danaṅre eṭakʼkoakʼko oktayetʼkan onko doń marao giḍikoa; bạḍại mẽtʼan ar dhomok monankoakʼ hõ bạń sahaotakoa. 
Psalms101:6 Disạmren pạtiạr hoṛko secʼ ińakʼ mẽtʼ do tahena jemon onko do iń sãoteko tahẽdaṛeakʼ; ar okoeyakʼ jion khạṭigetako onkoge ińakʼko kạmiya. 
Psalms101:7 Phạsiạrako do ińakʼ oṛakʼre bako tahẽdaṛeakʼa; ar eṛe roroṛko hõ ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre bako tahẽ daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms101:8 Dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ iń do bedhoromkoń mohor meṭaokoa, jemon Probhu Isorakʼ nagraha khon mimitʼ dusṭạmi kạkʼmikoń marao cabako." 
Psalms102:1 E Probhu Isor, am do ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme; ińem goṛowạń khon ińakʼ noa rakʼjoṅakʼge am ṭhen baṛe seṭerokʼma." 
Psalms102:2 Ińakʼ muhinre alom dea giḍikạńạ. Ińakʼ katha luturakʼme; ińiń hohowamre alom biloma. 
Psalms102:3 Ińakʼ dinko do dhũạ leka cabayena; ińakʼ jaṅko do culhạ seṅgelre lo roṅgokʼ kantińạ. 
Psalms102:4 Setoṅ reakʼ tạpiste rohoṛ akan ghãs leka ińakʼ ontor do rohoṛ akana; iń do jom hõń hiṛińeda. 
Psalms102:5 Bạ̃ṛti kuhrạu iạte ińakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jaṅ ar harta chaḍa ar cetʼge bạnukʼa. 
Psalms102:6 Iń do hahaṅkar ren bon bayar lekań hoyakana, ar ujạṛakʼ oṛakʼren dundu lekageń hoyakana." 
Psalms102:7 Iń do bạń jạpitʼ daṛeakʼ kana; iń do sạṛim cetanre eskar akan cẽṛẽ leka minạńa. 
Psalms102:8 Bạiriko do siń sạṭupʼ ińko henostawạń kana; ar iń cetanre okoeko edrekʼkan onko do ińakʼ ńutumko sarapakʼ kana. 
Psalms102:9 Am do ińem giḍi akadińạ; amakʼ ạṛis ar edre iạte iń do bhabnate torocʼ jomte diniń ṭalaoeda; ińakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ do ńũi dakʼ sãote mitʼ akana. 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Ińakʼ dinko do ạyupʼ bela reakʼ umul leka hoyakana; ar ghãs lekageń rohoṛokʼ kana. 
Psalms102:12 Men khan E Probhu Isor, am do jaejug amakʼ siṅghạsonre menama; amakʼ ńutum do piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼ tahena." 
Psalms102:13 Am do Sion baṛe mãyãwakʼme ente uni dayawae reakʼ okte hoyakana, ar niṭ akatʼ somoe hõ seṭerakana." 
Psalms102:14 Amren golamko do uniyakʼ dhiriko hạ̃sakʼ kana; ar ona reakʼ dhuṛi hõko mãyãwakʼ kana. 
Psalms102:15 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum ańjomkate eṭakʼ jạtrenko do botor hecʼakoa; ar amakʼ ṭhonok ńelte dhạrtiren sanam rajko hõ botor caṛhaoakoa. 
Psalms102:16 Probhu Isor do arhõ Sione teṅgo aroeya, ar uni do acʼakʼ ṭhonokteye ńel ocokʼa." 
Psalms102:17 Uni do nandankoakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ roṛ ruạṛe emokʼa; onkoakʼ koejoṅ do bae nihạ̃t gidikatakoa. 
Psalms102:18 Darakan bõsko lạgitʼ noako katha do ol tahena, jemon okoe ńit hõ bako janam akan onko do Probhu Isorko sarhao daṛeae." 
Psalms102:19 Bondikoakʼ hae hae ańjom lạgitʼ ar okoe gujukʼ reakʼ sạjạiko ńamakatʼ onko chaḍaoko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i khon latar secʼe oyoṅa, ar serma khon do dhạrti secʼe beṅgetʼ akada." 
Psalms102:20  
Psalms102:21 Onate eṭakʼ jạtren ar rajosṭiko tinre Probhu Isor sewawae lạgitʼ mitʼ ṭhenko jarwakʼa, unre Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum do Sionre porcarokʼa." 
Psalms102:22  
Psalms102:23 Ińakʼ jion reakʼ horre ińakʼ daṛeye komao akatʼtińạ, ińakʼ bahaokʼ dinkoe khaṭo akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms102:24 Onateń meneda, “E ińren Isor, amakʼ emakʼ bahaokʼ atra horre alo baṛem idiyińạ; ente am do jaejug hạbicʼ menama." 
Psalms102:25 Sedae jugre am do dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼem bạisạu akada; ar serma hõ amakʼ titegem benao akada. 
Psalms102:26 Onako do marao cabakʼa, menkhan am do jaejug hạbicʼem tahena. Onako do kicricʼ lekage mare cabakʼa; ar oyonakʼ lekam bodola, ar onako do kicricʼ leka pherao ocokʼa." 
Psalms102:27 Menkhan am do enkagem tahena; amakʼ bahaokʼ dinko do tishõ baṅ mucạdokʼa. 
Psalms102:28 Amren golamren gidrạko do jiwetʼgeko tahena; onkoren bõsko do am samaṅre ṭarhao akanko tahena. 
Psalms103:1 E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isor sarhaoeme; E ińakʼ ontor, uniyakʼ ṭhonokʼ baṛe sarhaotaeme." 
Psalms103:2 E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isor sarhaoeme; uniyakʼ jãhãn bhạlại reakʼ katha alom hiṛińa." 
Psalms103:3 Amakʼ sanam kại uni doe ikạitama; uni do amakʼ sanam rog bighinkoe bogeytama. 
Psalms103:4 Uni do patal puri khon amakʼ jiwiye owaretʼtama; uni do asambheṛ dulạṛ ar dayateye esetʼ ạcuretʼmea. 
Psalms103:5 Ar bhạlạiyanakʼ jiniskote uni doe tirpit ocoyetʼmea; uni do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ leka nãwã juạn umere danama. 
Psalms103:6 Probhu Isor do lek lekageye kạmikana; uni do julum ocokʼkanko hokʼ reakʼe bicạretʼtakoa. 
Psalms103:7 Cetʼ monsubạte cetʼe cekaea ona do Moseye baḍae ocoakadea; acʼakʼ kạmi do Israelkoe ńel ocoakatʼkoa. 
Psalms103:8 Probhu Isor do daya are mãyãwạnicʼ kana; uni do usạrate bae edre hodokʼa, uniyakʼ daya do asambheṛgetaea." 
Psalms103:9 Uni do dusiko upạrte dinke dine ạnḍuṅa, uni do jaejug hạbicʼ edre do bae disạ dohokakʼa." 
Psalms103:10 Aboakʼ kạiko lek do bae sạjại bona; ar aboakʼ ghạṭko lek do bae hala ruạṛ abona. 
Psalms103:11 Dhạrti khon serma tinạkʼ usul, unạkʼge uni do acʼ botoraekanko cetanre dulạṛ hõ ḍhergetaea." 
Psalms103:12 Pạchim khon purub tinạkʼ sạńgińakʼkan, onkage aboakʼ kại hõ sạṅgińteye ocokʼ giḍikakʼa." 
Psalms103:13 Gidrạko lạgitʼ baba do cetʼ leka mãyã menakʼtae onkage acʼ botoraekanko cetanre uniyakʼ hõ mãyã menakʼtaea. 
Psalms103:14 Abo cetʼ leka bon benao akan ona doe baḍaegea; dhuṛi chaḍa ar cetʼ hõ bon baṅkan ona hõe disạ akatʼgea. 
Psalms103:15 Ghãs lekage aboakʼ bahaokʼ dinko do, ṭạnḍi reakʼ bahako lekage uni doe bahakʼ kana." 
Psalms103:16 Baha cetanteye hoe lekhan baha do baṅ tahena; ar okareye bahalen onḍe hõ uni do bako disạyea. 
Psalms103:17 Menkhan okoe do Probhu Isorko sewawae kan ar uniyakʼ bondobosko manaoetʼkan ar ona reakʼ niạm leka calakʼko menetʼkan onko cetanre uniyakʼ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr do jaejug hạbicʼ piṛhike piṛhi tahena. 
Psalms103:18  
Psalms103:19 Probhu Isor do sermare uniyakʼ siṅghạsone tear akada; uni do jotowakʼ cetanregeye rajokʼa. 
Psalms103:20 E Probhu Isorren daṛean goḍetko, okoe do uniyakʼpe bataoetʼtae ar uniyakʼ hukumpe manaoetʼkan, ape do uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms103:21 E Probhu Isor sewawaekan daṛean dolko okoe do uniyakʼ sana lekape calakʼkan, ape do uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms103:22 E Probhu Isorakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire uniyakʼ sanam sirjonko, ape do uni sarhaoepe; E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isor sarhao sereńae me." 
Psalms104:1 E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isor sarhao sereńaeme; E Probhu, ińren Isor, am dom dayawạnicʼ kana! Am do ṭhonok ar mantem sajao akana." 
Psalms104:2 Kicricʼ lekage am do marsalem horokʼ akawana; rimilge am do tạmbu lekam ṭaṅgao akada. 
Psalms104:3 Amakʼ sermare tahen jaega reakʼ rehetʼ do serma reakʼ dakʼ cetanrem bạisạu akada; ar rimil do amakʼ gạḍim benao akada; ar am do hoe reakʼ phạ̃kṛạkʼtem calakʼ kana. 
Psalms104:4 Hoe do amren goḍetem benao akadea; ar jolokʼkan seṅgel do amren golamem hoyocoakadea; 
Psalms104:5 dhạrti do acʼakʼ rehetʼ cetanrem bạisạu akada; ona do tishõ baṅ ḍikạḍakekʼa. 
Psalms104:6 Dhạrti do kicricʼtem esetʼakatʼ leka jalapuri reakʼ dakʼtem esetʼleda; buru ar boṭkocʼ hõ ona dakʼte unum cabalena. 
Psalms104:7 Menkhan onako dakʼ do amakʼ hukumte calaoena; ona do amakʼ huḍur reakʼ aṛaṅte ńir calaoena. 
Psalms104:8 Buru boṭkocʼko do arhõ usulena, ar joto lodamko do arhõ copotʼena; okaṭakʼ jaegam ṭhik dohoakatʼ tahẽkan onako do onḍe hạbicʼ seṭerena." 
Psalms104:9 Nonkage am do dakʼ reakʼ simạkom ṭhik dohokada, jemon dakʼ do artis hõ simạko paromkate dhạrtire aloe chạplạu daṛeakʼ" 
Psalms104:10 Buru lodamkore amge dakʼ jharnakom kolkeda; ar ona dakʼ do buru talate ạtu calakʼ kana. 
Psalms104:11 Ona do jiwiyanko lạgitʼ dakʼe jogaoeda; onate birren gadhakoakʼ tetaṅ maraokʼ kana. 
Psalms104:12 Dakʼ aṛerege coṭren cẽṛẽ doko tukạyeda, onko do dare reakʼ ḍạrkoreko cero beroyeda." 
Psalms104:13 Amakʼ serma reakʼ tahen jaega khon am do buru boṭkocʼko cetanre dakʼem emokʼkana; amakʼ ona kạmi iạte dhạrti doe tirpitokʼ kana. 
Psalms104:14 Am do ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ ghãs ar manwakoakʼ cas lạgitʼ phosolem janam ocoyeda, jemon uni do ona hasa khon acʼlạgitʼ jomakʼe ńam daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms104:15 Darkha rasa do manwakoakʼ mone rạskạ ocoyeda, sunum do uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhãe malkao ocoyeda, ar piṭhạ do uniyakʼ jiwire daṛeye ạguiyeda." 
Psalms104:16 Probhu Isorakʼ sirjạuakʼ sanam dare nạ̃ṛĩko do ḍher dakʼe ńameda; ar uniye rohoe akatʼ Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dareko hõ dakʼe ńameda. 
Psalms104:17 Ona darekore cẽṛẽkoko tukạyeda; kisni cẽṛẽko hõ saro darereko tukạ joṅkana. 
Psalms104:18 Usul burukore do bir meromko ḍerakʼkana; ar saphon kulại hõ buru reakʼ dhasnare asrayko ńameda. 
Psalms104:19 Okteko niṭ lạgitʼ am do ńindạ candom benao akadea; amakʼ okte lekage siń cando hõe hạsurokʼa. 
Psalms104:20 Ńutem ạgu lekhan do ńindạ hoyokʼkana, ar unre bir janwarko doko jạpitʼjoṅ kana." 
Psalms104:21 Juạn dhạcri kul do sendra jel lạgitʼko hạnḍrạukʼa, ar Isor ṭhen khon jomakʼko khoja." 
Psalms104:22 Siń candoe rakapʼlen khan onko doko calakʼa ar akoakʼ bhugạkʼreko giticʼjokʼa. 
Psalms104:23 Unre manwa do acʼakʼ kạmi lạgitʼe oḍokʼ calakʼa, ar ạyupʼ hạbicʼe khaṭaokʼa." 
Psalms104:24 E Probhu Isor, am do ạḍi utạrakʼkom sirjạu akada; ar amakʼ akelte onako dom benao akada; amakʼ sirjạuakʼ jiniskotege dhạrti do perecʼ akana." 
Psalms104:25 Hane maraṅ jalapuri, maraṅ ar sanam secʼ phaelaoge onḍe do lạṭu kạṭicʼ alekha laṛaokʼkan jiwiyanko menakʼkoa." 
Psalms104:26 Onare do jahajko calakʼ kana, ar onḍe do Libiạthon hõ menaea; uni do onare kheloḍ lạgitʼem benao akadea." 
Psalms104:27 Onko do jotoge amakʼ mẽtʼãhã secʼko koyokʼ akada, jemon ṭhik oktere jomakʼkom em daṛeako." 
Psalms104:28 Amem emakokanre onko doko halaṅjoṅ kana; Amakʼ tiyem khulạuetʼ khan onko do bhage bhage jinisteko bikʼ kana. 
Psalms104:29 Mẽtʼãhãm danaṅetʼtam khan onko doko keklesedokʼ kana; ar onkoakʼ sahetʼem hatao ruạrletako khan onko doko gujukʼa," 
Psalms104:30 Ar amren jiuem kol lekhan doko sirjạukʼa; ar nãwã nãwã jiwite dhạrtim sajaoeda. 
Psalms104:31 Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma; uni do acʼakʼ kạmireye rạskạkʼ kana. 
Psalms104:32 Uni do dhạrti secʼe beṅgetʼ lekhan ona do thar tharaokʼa; uniyakʼ joṭetʼte buru boṭkocʼ khon dhũạ oḍokokʼa.
