Psalms104:33 Iń do goṭa jionge Probhu Isor ńutumteń sereńa; tinạkʼ din jiwetʼ iń tahena unạkʼ din ińren Isor ńutumte sarhao sereńiń sereńa. 
Psalms104:34 Ińakʼ sanam ganḍonjoṅakʼ do jemon sebele bujhạu; iń do Probhu Isorregeń rạskạkʼ kana. 
Psalms104:35 Dhạrti khon kại hoṛ doko ḍahao maraokʼma; ar bedhoromko hõ jotogeko cabakʼma. E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao sereńme; Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms105:1 Probhu Isorge gun manao joharaepe, ar uniyakʼ ńutum dohaeakʼpe; uniyakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha eṭakʼ jạtrenko baḍae ocokope." 
Psalms105:2 Uni lạgitʼ sereńpe ar unige sarhaoepe; ar uniyakʼ sanam hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ katha lại jạhirpe. 
Psalms105:3 Uniyakʼ ṭhonoktetʼ sarhaotaepe; okoe Probhu Isorakʼ khạndritetʼ baḍae sanayetʼko onkoakʼ ontor do rạskạkʼtakoma. 
Psalms105:4 Probhu Isor ar uniyakʼ daṛe bujhạu reakʼ kurumuṭuipe; sanam ghạṛicʼ uni sãote helmel dohoy reakʼ ahkaokʼpe. 
Psalms105:5 E uniren golam Abrahamren bõsko, uniren bachao akan Jakobren hoponko, ape do uniyakʼ maraṅ kạmi reakʼ kathako baṛe disạ dohoype; uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko reakʼ katha ar bicạrre oka sạjại reakʼ kathae menetʼ ona disạ dohokakʼpe." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Unige aboren Probhu Isor do; goṭa dhạrti do uniyakʼ ḍanṭaote calakʼkana. 
Psalms105:8 Okaṭakʼ katha reakʼ hukum uni do hajar hajar bõsrenko lạgitʼe emlen, uniyakʼ ona bondobos reakʼ katha uni do jaejug hạbicʼe disạ dohoya." 
Psalms105:9 Ona bondobos do Abraham lạgitʼe bandhaoleda ar Isạhak ṭhen hõe gokʼletʼa. 
Psalms105:10 Uni do acʼakʼ bondobos Jakob ṭhen niạm lekate ar Israelko ṭhen do jaejug reakʼ bondobos lekateye lại sodor akada. 
Psalms105:11 Uniye metade tahẽkana, “Iń do Kanan disạmiń emama. Ar onage amakʼ bakhra reakʼ sompotti do hoyokʼa.”" 
Psalms105:12 Onko do thoṛako tahẽkanre, hẽ ạḍi thoṛako tahẽkana, ar onḍe do porjạtrenko lekako tahẽkana," 
Psalms105:13 Onko do onḍe eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ rajosṭiko talareko ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkana," 
Psalms105:14 Unre uni do okoehõ onko bae santao ocowatʼkoa. Onko iạte uni do rajkoe dhomkaoetʼko tahẽkana," 
Psalms105:15 uni do onkoe metakokan tahẽkana, “Ińren ojokʼ akan hoṛko alope joṭetʼkoa; ar ińren nạbikoakʼ jãhãnakʼge alope loksan takoa.”" 
Psalms105:16 Ona tayom uni do onkoakʼ disạmre akale hoyocokeda ar jomakʼteye ṭonṭaketʼkoa; 
Psalms105:17 Unre uni do mitʼṭen hoṛ onko lahateye kolkedea Josephgeye kolkedea; ar uni do golam lekateye ạkhriń ocoyena. 
Psalms105:18 Ḍanḍa biṛi reakʼ sikṛite uniyakʼ jaṅga do kosṭoye ńamkeda, uni do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ sikṛiteye tol ocoyena." 
Psalms105:19 Uni okae menletʼ ona tinạkʼ din sạriyakʼ baṅ hoylen, unạkʼ din uni reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼakʼ babotre uni do biḍạureye paṛao ocolena." 
Psalms105:20 Rajakʼ hukumte uniyakʼ sikṛiko do raṛa ocoyena; ar bikʼcạricʼ do uniye aṛakʼkedea. 
Psalms105:21 Uni do acʼakʼ raj dolan ar ona reakʼ sanam sompotti cetanreye dohokedea," 
Psalms105:22 Acʼakʼ sanaleka uni do rajren kạmiyạko ḍanṭaoreye dohoketʼkoa ar murubbiko do sopolhae ematʼkoa. 
Psalms105:23 Ona tayom Israel do Misorteye calaoena; ar Ham bõsrenkoakʼ disạmre Jakob do thoṛa dine tahẽyena. 
Psalms105:24 Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoakʼ bõskoe baḍhao ocoketʼkoa; ar bạiriko khon hõ onkoakʼ daṛeye ḍher ocoketʼtakoa. 
Psalms105:25 Acʼren hoṛko upạrte uni do bạirikoakʼ ontorre hirkhại janam ocokeda, onate onko do uniren golamko sãote budkate calakʼko ehopʼena." 
Psalms105:26 Uni do acʼren guti Mose ar uniye bachaolede Arone kolketʼkinạ; 
Psalms105:27 Onkin hotete Probhu Isor do Ham bõsrenkoakʼ disạmre sanamko samaṅre ạḍi lekan cinhạ ar hahaṛa kạmikoe kạmikeda. 
Psalms105:28 Uni do ńute kolkeda, ar onate ńutena; uniyakʼ katha upạrte onko do bako teṅgolena." 
Psalms105:29 Onkoakʼ dakʼko do mãyãme hoyocoketʼtakoa, onate sanam hakoko gocʼena." 
Psalms105:30 Disạmre roṭe do kilbilạukʼ ko ehopʼena; ar rajakʼ oṛakʼ hạbicʼ don bolokʼko ehopʼena. 
Psalms105:31 Uniyakʼ kathate jhãke jhãk tejoko hecʼena onkoakʼ disạm do kãṛã loṭocʼte perecʼena. 
Psalms105:32 Uni do dakʼ lekage onko cetanre arele ńur ocokeda, ar goṭa disạmre bijli malkaokʼ ehopʼena." 
Psalms105:33 Onkoakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa dare doe maraoketʼtakoa ar disạm reakʼ sanam darekoe rạputʼ giḍikada. 
Psalms105:34 Uniyakʼ kathate pohoko ar sosrocʼkoko hecʼena; 
Psalms105:35 onko do disạm reakʼ dare nạ̃ṛĩ ar phosolko jom cabakeda. 
Psalms105:36 Ona tayom uni do Misorrenkoakʼ pạhil jo, metatʼme pạhil janam hoponkoe maraoketʼkotakoa." 
Psalms105:37 Uni do sona rupạ salakʼ Israelkoe oḍokʼ ạguketʼkoa; ar onko gusṭiko modren okoe hõ bako laṅgalena. 
Psalms105:38 Onkoakʼ calakʼ iạte Misorrenko doko kusilena, ente Israelko do ạḍiko botorakokan tahẽkana." 
Psalms105:39 Onko aḍko lạgitʼ uni do acʼakʼ rimile doholeda, ar ńindạ marsal emokʼ lạgitʼ seṅgele emena." 
Psalms105:40 Onko do jomakʼko khojletʼte uni do gunḍri cẽṛẽkoe kolketʼkoa; ar serma khon piṭhại ematʼkoteye bi ocoketʼkoa. 
Psalms105:41 Uni do dhiriye jhicʼ ocoketʼte, ona khon dakʼe emena; rohoṛ jaega talate ona do gaḍa dakʼ leka ạtu oḍokena." 
Psalms105:42 Acʼren golam Abraham ṭhen oka sonot gokʼakʼe doholetʼ onae disạkeda. 
Psalms105:43 Rạskạ ar rạskạ sereń sãote acʼren bachao akan hoṛko uni doe oḍok ạguketʼkoa. 
Psalms105:44 Uni do eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ disạm do Israelkoe ematʼkoa ar onko jạtrenkoakʼ khaṭao reakʼ jo do acʼren hoṛkoe ematʼkoa," 
Psalms105:45 Jemon onko do uniyakʼ niạmko manao ar uniyakʼ ạn lekako calao daṛeakʼ. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms106:1 Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Ape do Probhu Isor gunmanao joharaepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; ar uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana." 
Psalms106:2 Probhu Isorakʼ bhage kạmi reakʼ do okoe haleye lại daṛekea? Uniyakʼ joto sarhao do okoeye ańjom ocoketaea? 
Psalms106:3 Bhạgangeako onko do, okoe do hok reakʼko bicạretʼ ar jaoge bhage kạmiko kạmikan." 
Psalms106:4 E Probhu Isor, amren hoṛko secʼ dayam udugre iń do alom hiṛińińạ; ar onkom bańcaoko oktere iń secʼ hõ ti tiyạr do alom hiṛińa." 
Psalms106:5 Jemon amem bachao akawan hoṛkoakʼ bhạlạiyiń ńel daṛeakʼ, ar jạtrenkoakʼ rạskạ sãoteń rạskạ daṛeakʼ, ar okoe do amren ạidạrikanko ona reakʼ hĩs lekateń sarhao daṛekokʼ." 
Psalms106:6 Aleren hapṛamko leka ale hõle kại akada; ale dole behok akada, ar kạirele taṛameda." 
Psalms106:7 Misorre tahen jokhecʼ aleren hapṛamko do amakʼ hahaṛa kạmi ńelte cetʼge bako bujhạuleda; onko do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ katha hõ bako disạ doholeda; onko do jalapuri aṛere, arakʼ jalapuri ṭhenko ṭhokkeda." 
Psalms106:8 Enhõ uni do acʼakʼ ńutum khạtirte acʼakʼ maraṅ daṛe sodor lạgitʼe bańcaoketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:9 Uniyakʼ hukumte arakʼ doreão do ańjetʼena; ar hahaṅkar talate calakʼ leka onko do jalapuri talateye parom idiketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:10 Uni do hirkhạkʼ kankoakʼ ti khon onkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa; bạirikoakʼ ti khon onkoe chaḍaoketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:11 Onkoren bạiriko do dakʼteko esetʼena, ar mitʼ hoṛhõ jiwetʼ do bako sarecʼlena." 
Psalms106:12 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ kathate onko doko biswạsena ar uniko sarhaokedea. 
Psalms106:13 Menkhan uniyakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha do ạḍi usạrako hiṛińkeda; onko do uniyakʼ sopolha bako tạṅgileda. 
Psalms106:14 Hahaṅkarre onko do laloc iạte Isorko biḍạukedea. 
Psalms106:15 Onko okaṭakʼko khojletʼ onage uni doe ematʼkoa, menkhan onkore mitʼṭecʼ khoy roge kolkeda." 
Psalms106:16 Tạmbure tahen jokhecʼ Mose ńelte, ar Probhu Isorren sonoticʼ Aron ńelte onko do hiskạ hecʼatʼkoa." 
Psalms106:17 Dhạrti do moca jhicʼkate Datane utʼgotʼkadea. Ar Abiramakʼ dolren doe sikupʼ esetʼketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:18 Onko bhitrire do seṅgel jolena; ar ona seṅgel do bedhoromkoe atar cabaketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:19 Horeb burure onko do mitʼṭen mĩhũko benaokedea ar mitʼṭen dul murhutʼko ḍobokʼadea. 
Psalms106:20 Onkoren ṭhonokren Isor bạgikate onko do ghãs jom ḍaṅgrawakʼ murhutʼko ataṅkeda. 
Psalms106:21 Onkoren babańcaoicʼ Isor doko hiṛińkedea one okoe do Misorre maraṅ ar hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmiletʼ tahẽkan. 
Psalms106:22 Ham bõsrenkoakʼ disạmre hahaṛa kạmi reakʼ katha onko doko hiṛińkeda, ar arakʼ doreãore hoylen botoranakʼ kạmi hõko hiṛińkeda." 
Psalms106:23 Onate uniye menkeda onko doe maraokoa; ar onageye kạmikea menkhan bachao akade Mose do uniyakʼ hijukʼ horreye teṅgoyena, jemon ḍahao maraoko reakʼ edre khone ruạṛ daṛeae." 
Psalms106:24 Tayomte onko do ona mońj disạmko nihạ̃tkeda; onko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha bako pạtiạuada. 
Psalms106:25 Onko do tạmbukore bokbokaokʼko ehopʼena; ar Probhu Isorakʼ katha hõ bako luturada. 
Psalms106:26 Onate uni do noae kiriạyena onko do hahaṅkarreye cabakoa," 
Psalms106:27 ar onkoren bõsko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareye gur ocokoa, ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmteye chirchạturkoa." 
Psalms106:28 Onko do Peor burure Bakʼal debotako pujạwadea ar gocʼ hoṛko ńutumte dãṛẽ akatʼ jelko jomkeda. 
Psalms106:29 Noa bạṛicʼ kạmiko hotete onko do Probhu Isorko edre ocokedea, onate onkore duk do boloyena." 
Psalms106:30 Unre naeke Phinehas doe teṅgoyente noa reakʼe sạjạiketʼkoa, ar duk hõ cabayena." 
Psalms106:31 Phinehasakʼ noa kạmi iạte uni do jaejug hạbicʼ dhorom menteye lekhayena. 
Psalms106:32 Meriba reakʼ dakʼ ṭhen onko do Probhu Isorko edre ocokeda; ar Mose do muskilreye paṛaoena. 
Psalms106:33 Onko do Isorakʼ Jiu birudre ṭhokko ehopʼena, onate Moseyakʼ moca khon nonkan kathako oḍokena, one ona katha roroṛ do lek baṅ tahẽkan." 
Psalms106:34 Isorakʼ hukum bebataokate onko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko bako maraoletʼkoa," 
Psalms106:35 bickom onko jạtrenko sãoteko mesalena ar onkoakʼ ạri cạliko hataoana. 
Psalms106:36 Onkoren murtikoko sewawatʼkoa ar onko do akoren jhampako hoyena. 
Psalms106:37 Onko do bạṛicʼ jiuko ńutumte akoren gidrạkoko dãṛẽketʼkoa. 
Psalms106:38 Onko do bedhoromko, metatʼme akoren gidrạkoakʼ mãyãmko joro ocokeda. Onko do Kananren murhutʼko ńutumteko dãṛẽketʼkoa, onate goṭa disạmge mãyãmte bhoṅḍena." 
Psalms106:39 Ar nonkate onko doko bhoṅḍena; akoakʼ kạmiko iạte Probhu Isor ṭhen bepạtiạrkoko hoyena. 
Psalms106:40 Onate Probhu Isorakʼ edre do onko hoṛ cetanre caṛhaoena; ar okoe acʼakʼ ạidạrireko tahẽkan onko doe hirkhạwatʼkoa. 
Psalms106:41 Uni do eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ tireye soprotkatʼkoa; ar onkoko kurudakokan hoṛ do onko cetanreko mạlikena. 
Psalms106:42 Onkoren bạiriko do ako cetanre santaoko ehopʼkeda; ar onko gobolreko tahẽyena. 
Psalms106:43 Aema dhao uni do onkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa, menkhan onko do akoakʼ kusiteko hulkeda; ar kại gunạkʼteko ḍiṅgrạyena." 
Psalms106:44 Enhõ uni do onkoakʼ rakʼjoṅ iạteye beṅgetʼatʼkoa. 
Psalms106:45 Onko lạgitʼ acʼe dohoakatʼ bondobos reakʼ kathae disạkeda; ar acʼakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ lekate onkoreye mãyãyena. 
Psalms106:46 Aleren hapṛamko leka ale hõle kại akada; ale dole kại akada, ar bedhoromtele calakʼkana." 
Psalms106:47 E Probhu, aleren Isor, ale rukhiyạleme baṛe; ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko tala khon mitʼ ṭhạ̃ire ạguleme, jemon amakʼ sonot ńutumle gun manao johar daṛeakʼ ar amle sarhao daṛeamtele sabasi daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms106:48 Sirjạu reakʼ etohopʼ khon jaejug hạbicʼ Israelkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtaema. Sanam hoṛko menma, “Amen.” Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms107:1 “Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; ar uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana.”" 
Psalms107:2 Probhu Isorren chaḍao akan hoṛko do noa kathako roṛma, ente uni do upạrtenkoakʼ ti khon onkoe chaḍao ạguakatʼkoa;" 
Psalms107:3 Uni do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạm khon mitʼ jaegateye ạgu akatʼkoa, onko do purub, pạchim ar utạr dạkhin khone ạguakatʼkoa." 
Psalms107:4 Onko do hahaṅkar jaegareko ạcur baṛayena; ar girạbasokʼ lạgitʼ oka nagraha hõ bako sendra ńamleda. 
Psalms107:5 Onko do reṅgecʼ ar tetaṅteko kosṭoyena, ar onate onkoakʼ jiwi do jale thaleyena." 
Psalms107:6 Muhinre paṛaoente onko do Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda, ar nonkate uni do onkoe bańcaoketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:7 Uni do sojhe horteye idiketʼkoa jemon nagrahare senkate aloko girobas daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms107:8 Manwako lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko iạte ar uniyakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte onko do uniko sarhaokedea. 
Psalms107:9 Okoeyakʼ ontorre tetaṅ menakʼ uni doe ṭanḍha ocokedea, ar okoeyakʼ ontorre reṅgecʼ menakʼ onko do bhage bhage jiniskoteye tirpit ocoketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:10 Onko do ńutre, kaṛaṅ ńutreko duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana, ar bondi akanko do dukte ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ sikṛiteko kosṭokʼkan tahẽkana;" 
Psalms107:11 ente onko do Isorakʼ katha upạrteko huletʼkan tahẽkana, ar maraṅ Isorakʼ hukumko nindạuetʼ tahẽkana." 
Psalms107:12 Onate uni do kajak khaṭao hotete onkoakʼ goroboe rạputʼketʼtakoa; onko doko tohotʼena, ar onkoren goṛoyicʼ do celege bako tahẽkana." 
Psalms107:13 Muhinre paṛaoente onko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda, ar nonkate uni do onkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:14 Ńut, ar kaṛaṅ ńut khon uni doe oḍokketʼkoa; uni do onkoakʼ sikṛiye rạputʼgiḍikatʼtakoa." 
Psalms107:15 Manwako lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko iạte ar uniyakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte onko do uniko sarhaoema. 
Psalms107:16 Uni do pitạl reakʼ silpińkoe rạputʼ akada ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ huṛkạṛkoe kaṭra kuṭrạ akada. 
Psalms107:17 Lelha hoṛ do akoakʼ pap reakʼ hor iạte, ar akoakʼ ghạṭ iạteko sasetokʼkana." 
Psalms107:18 Onkoakʼ jiwi do sanam lekan jomakʼko hirkhạwada ar gujukʼ duạr ṭhenko seṭerlena. 
Psalms107:19 Muhinre paṛaokate onko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda, ar onate uni onkoe rukhiyạketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:20 Acʼakʼ katha kolkate onkoe bogeketʼkoa; uni do ghaḍlakʼ khone owarketʼkoa. 
Psalms107:21 Manwako lạgitʼ Isorakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko iạte ar uniyakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte onko do uniko sarhaoema. 
Psalms107:22 Onko do gun manaoren dãṛẽkoko dãṛẽkoma, ar rạskạ sereńte uniyakʼ sanam kạmi reakʼ kathako lại jạhirma." 
Psalms107:23 Okoe jahajte jalapurireko dãṛãnkan maraṅ jalapurireko kamkaj joṅkan," 
Psalms107:24 onkoge Probhu Isorakʼ kạmiko ńelakada, ar khạndri dakʼre uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmi hõko ńelakada." 
Psalms107:25 Mitʼ dhao uniyakʼ kathate maraṅ birbão hecʼena, onate maraṅ maraṅ ḍheoko rakapʼena." 
Psalms107:26 Ar jahaj cakʼlaoko do serma hạbicʼ rakabokʼkan ar athan khạndri hạbicʼ pheḍokʼko ehopʼena; muhinre paṛaoente botorte onkoakʼ jiwi do oṭaṅentakoa. 
Psalms107:27 Ar bul hoṛ leka onko do kinḍạ manḍekʼko ehopʼena; arko bud harayena. 
Psalms107:28 Muhinre paṛaokate Probhu Isor ṭhenko rakʼkeda, ar onate uni do onkoe oḍok ạguketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:29 Uni do birbãoe thir ocokeda, ar jalapuri reakʼ ḍheoko do ḍelḍel thirena." 
Psalms107:30 Jalapuri ḍelḍelen khan onko doko kusiyena; ar okaṭakʼ bondorte calakʼko menletʼ onḍegeye idiketʼkoa. 
Psalms107:31 Manwako lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko iạte ar uniyakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte onko do uniko sarhaoema. 
Psalms107:32 Somaj talare onko do uniko gun manao joharaema, ar murubbikoakʼ bạisire uniko sarhaoema." 
Psalms107:33 Uni do gaḍakoe hahaṅkar ocoyeda, ar jharnako doe rohoṛ jaega ocoyeda," 
Psalms107:34 Ar phosol hoyokʼkan jumi do buluṅ ṭạnḍigeye hoyocoyeda. Okoe onḍeko girobasokʼ kan onkoakʼ bedhorom iạtege uni do noakoe hoyocoyeda. 
Psalms107:35 Hahaṅkar do jolae hoyocoyeda ar khaṅgoṭ jaegako do jharnae hoyocoyeda. 
Psalms107:36 Onḍe do reṅgecʼ orecʼ hoṛe berel ocoyetʼkoa; onko do onḍe nagrahako beretʼeda. 
Psalms107:37 Onko do khetre itạko ereda, ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩko rohoe joṅkana, ar bạ̃ṛti phosolko hoyocoyeda." 
Psalms107:38 Uni do onkoe bhorako kana ar onate onko do ạḍiko saṅgekʼkana; uni do onkoren ạtiń janwarko bae komao ocoyetʼkoa. 
Psalms107:39 Santao, muhin ar dukte arhõ onko doko komao idiyena onkoakʼ dosa do arho bạṛicʼ hoyena." 
Psalms107:40 Uni do cetan hudạren hoṛko cetanre bemanote upʼatʼkoa," 
Psalms107:41 Menkhan uni do reṅgecʼ orecʼko bhabna khone owarketʼkoa, ar bhiḍi palrenko leka onkoren hoponkoe saṅge ocoketʼkoa." 
Psalms107:42 Isor botoraekan hoṛ do ona ńelteko rạskạyena, menkhan behoketʼko do mocae tubetʼketʼtakoa." 
Psalms107:43 Okoeye ạkilan hoṛkan uni do ona reaṅe moneyakʼma ar Probhu Isorakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reaṅ hõ mońjteye hetawakʼma. 
Psalms108:1 E Isor, ińakʼ mon do uricʼgea; iń do ińakʼ goṭa ontorteń sereńama ariń õṛhẽmea." 
Psalms108:2 Ebhenokʼ ben, E binạ banam ar peṛesaṅ; iń do aṅga marsaliń ebhen ocoyea." 
Psalms108:3 E Probhu Isor, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare iń do amiń sarhaomea, onko talare am ńutumteń sereńa;" 
Psalms108:4 Ente amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ do serma khon hõ cetangea, amakʼ pạtiạr do rimil khon hõ cetangea." 
Psalms108:5 E Isor, amakʼ man do serma hạbicʼ rakabokʼma; ar amakʼ ṭhonok do goṭa dhạrtire ńelokʼma." 
Psalms108:6 Amakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiyạrte ale baṛe bańcaolem; ińiń hohowamre luturakʼme, jemon am okoeyem dulạṛetʼko onko do bańcaoko ńam." 
Psalms108:7 Isor do acʼakʼ sonot ńutumteye meneda, “Iń do rạskạ salakʼ Sikemiń hạṭińa, ar Sukot tapol hõń soṅ hạṭińa." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead do ińakʼ kana, ar Manase hõ ińakʼge; Ar Ephrayim do ińakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ ṭupri kana, ar Jihudạ do ińakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ ṭheṅga kana." 
Psalms108:9 Moab do ińakʼ jaṅga ạbukokʼ bhajan kana; Edomre ińakʼ panahiń capada, ar Philisṭi cetanre do jitạukʼ reakʼ iń hohoea." 
Psalms108:10 Ona gaṛ nagrahate do okoeye idiyińạ one onare bolokʼ kuṭhinge? Ar Edom reakʼ hor hõ okoeye udukʼạńạ? 
Psalms108:11 E Isor, am do cetʼ alem bạtil giḍi akatʼlea? Aleren phạdko tulucʼ ma ar bacom calakʼkan." 
Psalms108:12 E Isor, bạiriko upạrte ale baṛe goṛowaleme, ente manwakoakʼ goṛo do jãhãn damge bạnukʼa." 
Psalms108:13 Isorakʼ goṛote ale dole jitạukʼa; aleren bạiriko do unigeye jaṅga latarkoa. 
Psalms109:1 E Isor amiń sarhaoetʼmea; am do alom thir hapekokʼa. 
Psalms109:2 Bedhorom ar phạsiạra hoṛko do iń upạrteko cahapʼ akada; onkoakʼ phạsiạra alaṅte iń upạrteko roṛeda. 
Psalms109:3 Onko do kurud kathateko esetʼ ạcur akadińạ, ar khamakhate iń tulucʼko lạṛhại kana." 
Psalms109:4 Ińakʼ dulạṛ bodolte iń upạrteko lạṛhại kana, menkhan iń do koejoṅtegeń tahen kana." 
Psalms109:5 Onko do bhạlại bodolte bạṛicʼakʼko ladewạń kana, ar dulạṛ bodolteko kurudạń kana." 
Psalms109:6 Onko upạrte am do bedhorom bikʼcạrko bahalkom; ar okoe onkoko dusiko onko do onkoakʼ jojomsa aṛereko teṅgokʼma. 
Psalms109:7 Bicạrre onko do dusi menteko sạbudokʼma; ar onkoakʼ koejoṅ do kại mente sabokʼma. 
Psalms109:8 Onkoakʼ bahaokʼ din do khaṭoge hoyokʼma; ar onkoakʼ cetan hudạ hõ eṭakʼ hoṛkoakʼ hoyokʼma. 
Psalms109:9 Onkoren gidrạko doko ṭũạrokʼma; onkoren bạhuko doko rạnḍikʼtakoma. 
Psalms109:10 Onkoren gidrạko do hor horteko koe baṛaema ar akoakʼ rạputʼ oṛakʼ khon sạṅgińte senkate jomakʼko ńam baṛaema. 
Psalms109:11 Mahajon do onkoakʼ sanamakʼe idiytakoma; ar eṭakʼ hoṛko do onkoakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ joko idijoṅma. 
Psalms109:12 Onko cetanreko dayakʼ nonkan okoe hõ aloko tahenma; onkoren ṭũạr gidrạko cetanre okoe hõ mãyã alo baṛee hecʼakoma. 
Psalms109:13 Onkoren bõsko doko gocʼ ocokʼma; ar onkoren gidrạkoakʼ ńutum do mohor meṭaokʼma. 
Psalms109:14 Onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ bedhorom reakʼ katha do Probhu Isorakʼ monre tahenma; onkoren eṅgatkoakʼ kại do alo mohor meṭaokʼma. 
Psalms109:15 Onako do jao okte Probhu Isor samaṅre tahenma, jemon uni do dhạrti khon onkoakʼ disạ hõe maraotako." 
Psalms109:16 Onko do dayakʼ reakʼ katha tisge bako disạleda, bickom nacar reṅgecʼ hoṛ gocʼko lạgitʼko santaoetʼko tahẽkana." 
Psalms109:17 Onko do sarap emokʼko kusiyakʼa, Onate ona ạsis do ako cetanrege paṛaoena; ar bhorako lạgitʼ do mońj bako ạikạua, onate bhor do onko khon sạṅgińte calaoena." 
Psalms109:18 Kicricʼ horokʼ lekage hoṛ sarapako do heowa leka hoyentakoa; ona do dakʼ ńũ lekage ar hoṛmore do sunum ojokʼakawatʼ leka. 
Psalms109:19 Sarap akawatʼ oyonakʼ leka onko doe oyokoma ar ḍanḍa reakʼ totolakʼ leka jao ghuṛiye tolkakoma. 
Psalms109:20 Okoe iń secʼrenko baṅkante, iń reaṅ bạṛicʼko roṛ, onko do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon jemon noa jo geko ńam." 
Psalms109:21 Menkhan am do, E Probhu ińren Isor, amakʼ ńutum khạtirte iń baṛe dayawạńme; ar amakʼ dulạṛ do bhagege iạte iń bańcaoińme." 
Psalms109:22 Iń doń nacar ariń reṅgecʼgea; iń do ontore dukiń ńam akada. 
Psalms109:23 Tarasiń bela reakʼ umul lekage iń doń caba hijukʼkana; ar pohoko lekage iń doń oṭaṅ ocoakana. 
Psalms109:24 Begor jomte ińakʼ gunṭhi kin do laṅga caba akantińạ; ar ińakʼ hoṛmo do roga akana, ariń rohoṛokʼ kana." 
Psalms109:25 Iń do onko ṭhen mitʼṭen landa dhutʼan hoṛ lekań hoyakana; onko do ińko ńelliń khange bohokʼko rukuitakoa. 
Psalms109:26 E ińren Probhu Isor, dayawạńme baṛe; amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ khạtirte rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms109:27 Onkoko baḍaema noa kạmi do amakʼ kangea; ar amge, E Probhu Isor, noa dom kạmi akada." 
Psalms109:28 Onko doko sarapạńma, menkhan am do bhorạńme; onko do iń upạrteko teṅgolen khan lajaoreko paṛaokʼma, menkhan amren golam doe rạskạkʼa." 
Psalms109:29 Iń upạrtenko do opomanko horokʼjoṅ ma, ar lajao do aṅgrop lekako oyokokʼma." 
Psalms109:30 Iń do sanamko samaṅre Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea, ar ḍher hoṛko talare uniń gun manao joharaea;" 
Psalms109:31 ente uni do reṅgecʼ orecʼko aṛereye tahena, jemon behok reakʼ bicạr khon onkoakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitako." 
Psalms110:1 Probhu Isor do ińren Probhui metadea, “Tin hạbicʼ amren bạiriko amakʼ jaṅga latarre bạń dohoko, unhạbicʼ am do ińakʼ jojomsa aṛere duṛupʼme.”" 
Psalms110:2 Amakʼ raj hudạ reakʼ ạidạri Probhu Isor do Sion khone sodor tama; uni doe mena, “Amren bạiriko tala khon am do rajosṭi calaome.”" 
Psalms110:3 Lạṛhại hilokʼ amren hoṛko do akotege lạṛhạiko hijukʼa; ar sonot reakʼ sajte sajkate aṅgakʼ reakʼ kulhi khon sisirdakʼ cetʼleka, onkage am ṭhen amren juạnko do." 
Psalms110:4 Probhu Isor doe kiriạ akana, “Am do jaejug hạbicʼ Melkisedek lekan naeke kanam.” Noa reaṅ uni do ar bae kastaokʼa." 
Psalms110:5 Probhu Isor do amakʼ jojomsa aṛere menaea; uniyakʼ edre hilokʼ do rajkoe caba utạrkoa. 
Psalms110:6 Uni do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenkoe bicạrkoa; ar dhạrti do gocʼkoakʼ hoṛmoteye pereja; uni do dhạrti reakʼ sanam jaegare bạirikoakʼ bohokʼe gejertakoa. 
Psalms110:7 Uni do onkoe laga ńirkoa ar jharna reakʼ dakʼe ńũiya, ar onateye cerṭhakʼte uni doe jitạukʼa." 
Psalms111:1 Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Iń do ińakʼ goṭa jiwite gun maniń joharae kana, gun manao johariń emaea Isor botoraekanko talare, gun manao johariń emaea jarwa akan hoṛko talare." 
Psalms111:2 Probhu Isorakʼ sanam kạmiko do bhagegea; okoe onateko rạskạkʼkan onko do onako reaṅgeko ganḍonokʼ kana. 
Psalms111:3 Uniyakʼ kạmi do gun manao ar ṭhonokte perecʼgea, uniyakʼ dhorom do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana." 
Psalms111:4 Uni do acʼakʼ hahaṛa kạmikoe disạ ocokeda; uni do daya ar mãyãteye perecʼgea. 
Psalms111:5 Acʼ botoraekanko do jomakʼe jogaoako kana; ar acʼe dohoakatʼ bondobos do tisge bae hiṛińa. 
Psalms111:6 Eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ disạm do ạidạri lekate acʼren hoṛko acʼakʼ kạmi reakʼ daṛeye udukʼatʼkoa. 
Psalms111:7 Uniyakʼ sanam kạmire uni do pạtiạr ar dhoromteye perecʼgea; uniyakʼ sanam ạnko do pạtiạrgea. 
Psalms111:8 Ona ạnko do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena; ona do pạtiạrgea ar dhoromte benao akana. 
Psalms111:9 Acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼ uni do chakʼḍaoko reakʼ bondobose dohoakada; uni do hukumte jaejug hạbicʼ acʼakʼ bondobose dohoakada. Uni doe sonotgea; uni do botor ar bhoktiye janam ocoyeda. 
Psalms111:10 Probhu Isor botorae do ạkil reakʼ etohopʼ kana; okoe ona lekako kạmi onko do akelko ńama. Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma. 
Psalms112:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Okoe Probhu Isore botoraekan ar uniyakʼ hukum iạteye rạskạkʼkan uni doe bhạgangea. 
Psalms112:2 Uniren bõsko do dhạrtire daṛeanko hoyokʼa; ontorre okoeye khạṭige uniren bõsko do bhorko ńama. 
Psalms112:3 Uniyakʼ oṛakʼre do dhon duribko tahena; uniyakʼ dhorom do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena. 
Psalms112:4 Okoakʼ ontor khạṭige uni lạgitʼ do ńutre hõ marsalge tahena, ente uni do daya ar mãyãteye perecʼgea are dhoromgea." 
Psalms112:5 Okoe dayate pańcae emokʼkan ar dhoromte jotowakʼe kạmikan uniyakʼ bhạlại do hoyokʼgea. 
Psalms112:6 Uni do sanam ghạṛicʼ teṅgo ṭak akane tahena; ar Isor bhokti hoṛ do jaejug hạbicʼe disạ dohoyea. 
Psalms112:7 Jãhãn bạṛicʼ khobor ańjomkate bae botorokʼa; uniyakʼ mon do khạtirgea ar Probhu Isorreye bhorsa akana. 
Psalms112:8 Uniyakʼ mon do diṛhogete bae botorokʼ kana; sesre uni do acʼren bạirikoakʼ bhagaoe ńela. 
Psalms112:9 Uni do chiṭiạukedae, reṅgecʼ orecʼkoe ematʼkoa; uniyakʼ dhorom do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana, uniyakʼ daṛe ar man do ḍher idikʼtaea." 
Psalms112:10 Bedhorom hoṛ do ona ńelteye ạṛisokʼa; uni do ḍaṭae togoja are cabakʼa. Bedhoromkoakʼ as do nasaokʼtakoa. 
Psalms113:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. E Probhu Isorren golamko, sarhao sereńpe; Probhu Isor sarhao sereńaepe." 
Psalms113:2 Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum sarhao hoyokʼtae ma, ńit ar jaejug hạbicʼ." 
Psalms113:3 Siń cando rakabokʼ nakha khon ehopʼkate hạsurokʼ nakha hạbicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms113:4 Sanam jạtrenko do Probhu Isor gobolre menakʼkoa; serma cetanre hõ uniyakʼ ṭhonok do menakʼa. 
Psalms113:5 Aboren Probhu Isor leka do okoe menaea? Uni do serma khon hõ coṭreye tahẽnkana 
Psalms113:6 uni do eṅgotʼkate dhạrti ar sermae beṅgetʼatʼ kana. 
Psalms113:7 Uni do nandanko dhuṛi khone beretʼetʼkoa, ar reṅgecʼ orecʼko do mande khone rakapʼetʼkoa;" 
Psalms113:8 jemon uni do cakʼlaoko sãote onkoe duṛupʼ daṛeako, ar okoe do acʼren hoṛko modre cetan hudạre menakʼko onko tulucʼe duṛupʼ soṅge daṛeako." 
Psalms113:9 Bạńjhi do gidrạkoren rạskạwạnicʼ gogoye hoyocoyedea ar soṅsar reakʼ purạ ạidạri hõe emaekana. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms114:1 Israel jạtrenko tinre Misor khonko oḍok hecʼena, ar eṭakʼ pạrsite katha roroṛ hoṛko tala khon Jakob bõsrenko do tinreko oḍok hecʼena," 
Psalms114:2 unre Jihudạ do Isorakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i hoyena, ar Israel do ona reakʼ rajosṭige." 
Psalms114:3 Onko ńelte arakʼ doreão do ńir pharakena, ar jordan gaḍa do cetan secʼ ạtukʼ ehopʼena," 
Psalms114:4 Ar usul buruko do bhiḍi leka, ar huḍiń buruko do bhiḍi hoponko leka don baṛae ehopʼena." 
Psalms114:5 E doreão, amakʼ do cetʼ hoyena? Cedakʼ am dom dạṛkeda? E Jordan, dakʼ ạtukʼ do cedakʼem pạc ruạṛ ocokeda?" 
Psalms114:6 E usul buruko, cedakʼ ape do bhiḍiko leka don baṛaepe ehopʼena? E huḍiń buruko, ape hõ cedakʼ bhiḍi hoponko lekape don baṛae kana." 
Psalms114:7 E dhạrti, Probhu Isor samaṅre, Jakobren Isor samaṅre thartharaokʼme." 
Psalms114:8 One uni cạṭạni do jolateye pheraoetʼ, ar keṭecʼ dhiri do dakʼ reakʼ jharnageye hoyocoyetʼ." 
Psalms115:1 Aleakʼ do baṅ, E Probhu Isor, aleakʼ do baṅ, menkhan amakʼ sarhaoge baṛe hoyokʼma; amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạr lạgitʼge hoyokʼma." 
Psalms115:2 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko do cedakʼko mena, “Okare menaea onkoren Isor do?”" 
Psalms115:3 Aboren Isor do sermare menaea; uni do acʼakʼ sana lekageye kạmikana. 
Psalms115:4 Onkoren boṅga murhutʼko do sona ar rupạte manwa tite benaoko kanako. 
Psalms115:5 Onkoakʼ moca do menakʼtakogea menkhan katha do bako roṛ daṛeakʼa, mẽtʼ hõ menakʼtakoa menkhan bako ńeńela;" 
Psalms115:6 lutur hõ menakʼtakoa menkhan bako ańjom ńama, mũ menakʼgea menkhan so hõ baṅ so koa." 
Psalms115:7 Ti menakʼ takogea menkhan bako joṭetʼ daṛeakʼa, jaṅga menakʼtakogea menkhan bako taṛam daṛeakʼa. Alaṅ menakʼgea menkhan roṛ hõ baṅ oḍokokʼtakoa." 
Psalms115:8 Okoe onkoko benao akatʼko ar okoe onko cetanreye pạtiạukʼ are bhorsakʼ onko hõ murhutʼ lekako hoyokʼa. 
Psalms115:9 E Israelko, Probhu Isore ṭehãḍokʼpe uni kangea onkoren gokʼṛoyicʼ ar ḍhal do." 
Psalms115:10 E Aron bõsrenko, Probhu Isorre ṭehãḍokʼpe uni kangeae onkoren gokʼṛoyicʼ ar ḍhal do." 
Psalms115:11 E Probhu Isor botoraeko, Probhu Isorrege ṭehãḍokʼpe uni kangeae onkoren gokʼṛoyicʼ ar ḍhal do." 
Psalms115:12 Probhu Isor do aboakʼ kathae disạ akada, onate uni doe bhor abona; hẽ, uni do Israel bõsrenkoe bhorakoa, uni do Aron bõsrenkoe bhorakoa," 
Psalms115:13 Uni do acʼ botoraekan kạṭicʼ lạṭu sanamkoe bhorakoa. 
Psalms115:14 Probhu Isorge ape ar aperen hoponkoakʼ bõskoe saṅge ocoya. 
Psalms115:15 Probhu Isor, okoe do ot ar sermae sirjạu akatʼ, unige ape doe bhorapema." 
Psalms115:16 Serma do Probhu Isorakʼ serma kana, menkhan dhạrti do manwakoe em akatʼkoa." 
Psalms115:17 Gocʼko do Probhu Isor bako gun manao joharaea; ar okoe patal puriteko pheḍokʼ onko hõ bako gun manao joharaea; 
Psalms115:18 menkhan abo do Probhu Isor bon gun manao joharaea, uni gun man johar bon emaea ńit khon jaejug hạbicʼ. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms116:1 Iń do Probhu Isorgeń dulạṛ edekana, ente uni do ińakʼ nehõre ańjom akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms116:2 Uni do ińakʼ kathae lutur akawada, onate tinạkʼ din jiwetʼiń tahen unạkʼ din iń hohowaea." 
Psalms116:3 Gujukʼ reakʼ baberte iń do toliń tahẽkana, ar patal puri reakʼ jaljalaokʼreń paṛaolena; iń do duk ar kosṭoreń tahẽkana." 
Psalms116:4 Unre Probhu Isor do hohoadeteń metadea, “E Probhu Isor, am ṭheniń nehõrokʼ kana, am do ińakʼ jiwi bańcaotińme.”" 
Psalms116:5 Probhu Isor do daya are dhoromicʼkana; aboren Isor do mãyãteye perecʼgea. 
Psalms116:6 Probhu Isor do sojhe monan hoṛkoe rukhiyạyetʼkoa; iń do asokʼ ṭayokʼreń paṛaolena menkhan unigeye bańcaokedińa. 
Psalms116:7 E ińakʼ jiwi, arhõ khạtirokʼme, ente Probhu Isor do ḍhergeye bhạlại akatʼmea." 
Psalms116:8 E Probhu Isor, amge gocʼko khon ińakʼ jiwi, ar mẽtʼ dakʼ khon ińakʼ mẽtʼ, ar bhindạṛokʼ khon ińakʼ jaṅgakinem rukhiyạ akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms116:9 Iń do jiwetʼko talare Probhu Isor samaṅreń dãṛãbaṛaea. 
Psalms116:10 Tinreń menleda, “Laṅgaṭreń paṛaolena,” unrehõ ińakʼ biswạs do tahẽkangea." 
Psalms116:11 Iń doń botorlena, “Ente sanam manwageko eṛegea.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe bhạlại akadiń ona bodolte cetʼ iń emaea? 
Psalms116:13 Uni do muhin khone bańcaokedińa, onate bańcaokʼ reakʼ bạṭi doń tul rakaba ar ona reakʼ ṭhonokiń lại sodora." 
Psalms116:14 Probhu Isor ṭhen okaṭakʼ manotakʼ iń dohoakatʼ ona do uniren sanam hoṛko samaṅreń purạuaea. 
Psalms116:15 Probhu Isor ṭhen acʼ botoraekoakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ dam do ḍhergea. 
Psalms116:16 E Probhu Isor, sạrige iń do amren golam kạnạń, amren golamge, ar amren kạ̃ṛmĩren gidrạge; amge ińakʼ tonolem raṛa akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms116:17 Iń do am lạgitʼge gun manaoren dãṛẽń samaṅama ar amakʼ sarhao iń lại sodora. 
Psalms116:18 Probhu Isor ṭhen okań manot akatʼ ona do uniren hoṛko samaṅreń purạutińạ; 
Psalms116:19 E Jerusalem, amrege Probhu Isorakʼ bakher racare onań purạua. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms117:1 Probhu Isorge sarhaoepe E sanam boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko; ar jạt jạtrenko do uniyakʼ ńutumko ńumtaema; 
Psalms117:2 ente abore Probhu Isorakʼ dulạṛ do asambheṛgea ar uniyakʼ pạtiạr do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms118:1 Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana." 
Psalms118:2 Israelko doko menma, “Uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana.”" 
Psalms118:3 Aron bõsrenko doko menma, “Uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana.”" 
Psalms118:4 Probhu Isor botoraeko doko menma, “Uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana.”" 
Psalms118:5 Iń do muhinreń paṛaoente Probhu Isoriń hohoadea; ar uni doe ańjomketʼtińạ ar mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃ireye oḍok ạgukedińa. 
Psalms118:6 Probhu Isor do iń sãore menaea, iń do bạń botorokʼa; manwa do cetʼe cekayiń baṅ?" 
Psalms118:7 Ińren gokʼṛoyicʼ lekate Probhu Isor do iń secʼre menaea, onate ińren bạirikoakʼ bhagaokʼ iń ńela." 
Psalms118:8 Manwako cetanre bhorsa baṅkate Probhu Isorre bhorsakʼ do bhagea. 
Psalms118:9 Cetan hudạren hoṛko cetanre bhorsa baṅkate Probhu Isorre bhorsakʼge bhagea. 
Psalms118:10 Sanam jạtrenko do ińko gherao ạcur akadińạ, menkhan Probhu Isor ńutumte onko doń marao cabakoa." 
Psalms118:11 Onko do ińko gherao ạcur akadińạ, sạrige onko do beṛhaeteko esetʼakadińạ, menkhan Probhu Isor ńutumte onko doń marao cabakoa." 
Psalms118:12 Dumur lekageko tudrạu esetʼ akadińạ; ar jạnum jhạuạ reakʼ seṅgel leka onko do usạrateko ĩṛicʼgotʼena. Probhu Isor ńutumte iń do khạṭigeń marao cabakoa. 
Psalms118:13 Iń do jemoniń sombotʼ hapekokʼ onateko ṭhelaoledeńa, menkhan Probhu Isor do ińe goṛo akawạdińạ." 
Psalms118:14 Probhu Isorge ińren daṛe do, ar ińren sereń hõ unige; ar unirege ińakʼ bańcaokʼ do menakʼa." 
Psalms118:15 Dhorom hoṛkoakʼ oṛakʼre bańcaokʼ reakʼ rạskạ ańjomokʼkana; Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do bhageakʼe kạmiakada. 
Psalms118:16 Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do jitạue dan akawạdińạ; Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do bhageakʼe kạmiakada. 
Psalms118:17 Iń do bạń gujukʼa, jiwetʼgeń tahena, ar Probhu Isor okae kạmi akatʼ onań lại jạhira." 
Psalms118:18 Probhu Isor do kajakteye ḍanṭao edeńkana, menkhan gujukʼ reakʼ tire do bae alae akadińạ." 
Psalms118:19 Dhorom reakʼ duạrko jhicʼạńpe, jemon onḍe bolokate uniń sarhao daṛeae." 
Psalms118:20 Nokʼõe coṅ Probhu Isorakʼ duạr ma; noa talatege dhorom hoṛ doko bolokʼa. 
Psalms118:21 Iń do amiń sarhaomea, ente am do ińakʼem ańjom akada; ińakʼ bańcao do amrege menakʼa." 
Psalms118:22 Rajmistriko okaṭakʼ dhiriko nihạ̃t giḍiletʼ onage konac reakʼ asolakʼ dhiri do hoyena; 
Psalms118:23 Probhu Isorge noa doe nonka akada, ar ona do aboakʼ mẽtʼre hahaṛawakʼge hoyena." 
Psalms118:24 Noa kangea ona din do okaṭakʼ Probhu Isor doe ṭhik dohoakatʼ; Dela bon, noa dinre bon rạskạ joṅma." 
Psalms118:25 E Probhu Isor, nehõrokʼ kạnạń bańcaoleme baṛe; E Probhu Isor, nehõrokʼ kạnạń jo bahaokʼ baṛe danạńme." 
Psalms118:26 Okoe Probhu Isor ńutumteye hijukʼkan uniyakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon ale do apele bhorape kana. 
Psalms118:27 Probhugeye Isor kana, uni doe marsal akawatʼlea. Ar porobren dãṛẽko do baberte tol idikope pinḍ reakʼ dereń hạbicʼ." 
Psalms118:28 Amge ińren Isor do, iń do amgeń sarhaomea; amge ińren Isor do, amgeń gun manao joharama." 
Psalms118:29 Probhu Isor gun manao joharaepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽnkana." 
Psalms119:1 Bhạgangeako onko do, okoe sạbitko colonetʼkan ar Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekako calakʼkan." 
Psalms119:2 Bhạgangeako onko do, okoe uniyakʼ kathako ańjometʼkan ar goṭa ontorte uniyakʼ sana lekako calakʼkan." 
Psalms119:3 Onko do jãhãnakʼ bako behoka; onko do Probhu Isorakʼ horregeko taṛama. 
Psalms119:4 Am do ạn ạrikom ṭhik dohoakada jemon joton salakʼ onale manao. 
Psalms119:5 Ohae! Amakʼ ạn leka calakʼ lạgitʼ ińakʼ monre diṛho akae jemoniń tahen. 
Psalms119:6 Enḍekhan amakʼ sanam hukumkoń manao iạte iń do bạń lajao ocokʼa. 
Psalms119:7 Amakʼ dhoromte perecʼ ạn ạri reakʼ sikhạunate khạṭi ontorte amiń sarhaomea. 
Psalms119:8 Iń do amakʼ ạn lekageń calakʼa; ar bạń bạgi giḍimea. 
Psalms119:9 Juạn do cekate acʼakʼ jion khạṭiye doho daṛeketaea? Uni do eken amakʼ kathako leka senakʼ iạtegeye daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms119:10 Ińakʼ goṭa ontorte iń do am baḍaeme lạgitʼ iń ahkaokʼ kana; amakʼ hukum bahre do alom dãṛã ocoyińạ. 
Psalms119:11 Amakʼ katha do ińakʼ ontorreń dohoakada, jemon am upạrte aloń kại." 
Psalms119:12 E Probhu Isor, am dom bhạgangea. Amakʼ ạnko cetʼạńme baṛe." 
Psalms119:13 Amakʼ moca khon okako ạn oḍokokʼkan ona do ińakʼ mocageye sodortama. 
Psalms119:14 Manwa damanakʼ dhone ńam lekhan cetʼlekae rạskạkʼ, onkage amakʼ katha manaote iń doń rạskạkʼ kana." 
Psalms119:15 Iń do amakʼ ạn ạriko reaṅiń ganḍonokʼ kana, ar amakʼ hor reakʼkoń moneyakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:16 Amakʼ ạnrege rạskạ doń ńameda; ar amakʼ katha do bạń hiṛiń daṛeakʼ kana. 
Psalms119:17 Amren nui golam baṛe bhạlạiyeme jemon jiwetʼiń tahen ar amakʼ katha lekań sen daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:18 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ baṛe jhicʼkạtińme jemon amakʼ cecetʼakʼ talare hahaṛawakʼko reaṅ jemoniń ńel daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:19 Iń do dhạrtire girobas akan mitʼṭen porjạt hoṛ kạnạń; amakʼ hukum do iń khon alom danaṅ dohokakʼa. 
Psalms119:20 Amakʼ ạn ạriko baḍae lạgitʼ jao okte ińakʼ jiwi do talga tạwạgokʼ akantińạ. 
Psalms119:21 Am do bạḍại hoṛkom dhomkaoetʼkoa; onko do sarapan hoṛ kanako, onko do amakʼ hukum khonko chingạu akana." 
Psalms119:22 Opoman ar landa dhutʼ do iń khon sạṅgińkakʼme, ente iń do amakʼ katha lekań senokʼkana." 
Psalms119:23 Disạm cakʼlaoko do duṛupʼkate iń birudreko roṛetʼkanre hõ enhõ amren golam do amakʼ ạnregeye ganḍonokʼ kana. 
Psalms119:24 Amakʼ kathage ińakʼ rạskạ do; onako do solhae imạń kana. 
Psalms119:25 Iń do dhuṛireń guṛdạu akana; ar amakʼ katha leka nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme. 
Psalms119:26 Ińakʼ jion reakʼ sanamakʼ doń baḍae ocoakatʼmea, ar am do ińem roṛ ruạṛ akadińạ; amakʼ ạnre sikhạuna emạńme;" 
Psalms119:27 Amakʼ ạn ạri reakʼ hukumko bhujhạu reakʼ daṛe baṛe imạńme; enḍekhan iń do amakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko reaṅiń ganḍon daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms119:28 Dukte ińakʼ jiwi do loraokʼkan tińạ; amakʼ katha lekage daṛe danạńme. 
Psalms119:29 Iń khon eṛeakʼ baṛe sạṅgiń ocoyme; ar dayakate amakʼ cecetʼakʼ danạńme. 
Psalms119:30 Iń do pạtiạr reakʼ horiń bachao akawana; amakʼ ạn ạriko iń samaṅreń dohoakada. 
Psalms119:31 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ katha doń sapʼkajak akada; am do alom lajao ocoyińạ." 
Psalms119:32 Amakʼ hukumko reakʼ horteń ńir calakʼa, ente am do ińakʼ ontorem jhicʼakatʼ tińạ." 
Psalms119:33 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ạnko reaṅ cetʼạńme; Jion reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ iń do ona lekań senokʼa." 
Psalms119:34 Iń bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe emạńme, jemon amakʼ hukum lekań senokʼ ar ińakʼ sanam ontorte onań palon daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms119:35 Amakʼ hukum reakʼ horre ạyurińme, ente iń do onategeń rạskạkʼa." 
Psalms119:36 Behok lab secʼ ińakʼ ontor alo ạcurokʼma, bickom amakʼ katha secʼgeń ạcurokʼ." 
Psalms119:37 Eṛeakʼ jinis secʼ khon ińakʼ mẽtʼ do ạcur ruạṛtiń me; ar amakʼ horte calakʼ lạgitʼ nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme. 
Psalms119:38 Amren nui golam ṭhen okaṭakʼem gokʼakatʼ ona baṛe purạume, jemon amiń botoram." 
Psalms119:39 Ińakʼ opoman sạṅgińkakʼme one oka reaṅiń botorokʼkan; amakʼ ạn ạri do sạrige bhagegea 
Psalms119:40 Amakʼ ạn ạriko doń uihạretʼkana; am dom dhoromgete nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme. 
Psalms119:41 E Probhu Isor amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ udukʼạńme; amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage bańcaoińme. 
Psalms119:42 Enḍekhan okoeko landa dhutʼạńkan onkoń roṛ ruạṛ daṛeakoa, ente iń do amakʼ kathareń bhorsakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:43 Amakʼ sạriyakʼ reakʼ katha ińakʼ moca khon alogem rejeńa, ente amakʼ ạn ạriko cetanrege iń doń as akana." 
Psalms119:44 Iń do jao ghuṛi amakʼ hukumiń senakʼkana, ar jaejug hạbicʼgeń manao idiya." 
Psalms119:45 Iń do begor tạkicʼtege jioniń khemaoa, ente amakʼ ạn ạrikoń uihạreda." 
Psalms119:46 Am okakom menetʼkan ona do ińren raj samaṅreń roṛa; iń do bạń lajaokʼa. 
Psalms119:47 Amakʼ sanam hukumkoń pańjaere iń doń rạskạkʼ kana, ente onakoń dulạṛeda." 
Psalms119:48 Amakʼ sanam hukumko cetanre ińakʼ khạndri ahkaokʼ mon do menakʼa, ente onako doń dulạṛeda; ar amakʼ ạnkoń ganḍonjoṅ kana." 
Psalms119:49 Amren golam ṭhen okaṭakʼem gokʼakatʼ ona baṛe disạime; ona hotetege am do ińem as akadińạ. 
Psalms119:50 Amakʼ katha okaṭakʼ nãwã daṛeye danạń, kosṭokʼ oktere onage ińakʼ jiwi raṛecʼ do hoyokʼtińạ." 
Psalms119:51 Bạḍạiko do ińko landa dhutʼạń kana, menkhan amakʼ hukum khon thoṛa hõ iń do bạń ocokʼakana." 
Psalms119:52 E Probhu Isor, ḍher din lahare emakʼ amakʼ ạn ạriko reakʼ kathań disạite iń do apnarte jiwi raṛecʼiń ńameda." 
Psalms119:53 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ bạṛicʼtetʼ ńelte ạḍitetʼ iń raṅgaokʼ kana, onko do amakʼ hukumko bạgi akada." 
Psalms119:54 Iń do tinạkʼ din noa dhạrtiren hoṛiń hoyakan unạkʼ din amakʼ ạnkoge ińakʼ sereń do hoyokʼa. 
Psalms119:55 E Probhu Isor, iń do amakʼ hukumiń manaoeda, ar ńindạ do amakʼ kathań disạyeda. Ińakʼ heowa do noage je," 
Psalms119:56 iń do amakʼ ạn ạriko lekań senokʼa. 
Psalms119:57 E Probhu Isor, am kangeam ińakʼ dhon do; iń do amakʼ katha leka calakʼ reakʼ iń kiriạkʼ kana." 
Psalms119:58 Iń do mon murukkate amakʼ dayań khojokʼ kana; amakʼ katha leka ińre baṛe dayakʼme. 
Psalms119:59 Ińakʼ dãṛãn reaṅ hudiskateń ńelakada, ar onate amakʼ katha secʼ ińakʼ jaṅgań ạcur akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms119:60 Okakom hukum akawạdiń ona do ạḍi usạrageń manao akada, ar baṅgeń bilomleda." 
Psalms119:61 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ baberte iń doń tol akana menkhan amakʼ hukum do bạń hiṛińakada. 
Psalms119:62 Amakʼ dhoromte perecʼ ạn iạte sarhaome lạgitʼ iń do tala ńindạ hõń beredokʼkana. 
Psalms119:63 Okoe amko botoram ar amakʼ ạn ạriko manaoetʼ iń doń onko sãotenko kana. 
Psalms119:64 E Probhu Isor, dhạrti do amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛte perecʼgea; ar amakʼ ạnko baṛe cetʼạńme." 
Psalms119:65 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ katha lekage amren nui golam dom bhạlạiyede kana." 
Psalms119:66 Ińakʼ jemon bhage bud bicạr ar akel hoyokʼ onate iń baṛe cetʼạń me; iń do amakʼ sanam hukumkoreń bhorsa akana. 
Psalms119:67 Kosṭo ńam lahare iń do eṭakʼ horreń tahẽkan, menkhan ńitokʼ do amakʼ kathareń gobol akana." 
Psalms119:68 Am dom bhagegea arem bhạlạiyetʼa; amakʼ ạnko baṛe cetʼạńme. 
Psalms119:69 Bạḍạiko do eṛeakʼte ińko esetʼ ạcur akadińạ menkhan iń do mon muruk kate amakʼ ạn ạrikoń senakʼkana. 
Psalms119:70 Onkoakʼ ontor do itil leka ạuṛiyakʼgetakoa, menkhan iń do amakʼ sanam hukumre rạskạń ńameda." 
Psalms119:71 Okaṭakʼ kosṭoń ńamakatʼ ona do iń lạgitʼ bhagege hoyakana; onate iń do amakʼ ạnkoń cetʼ daṛe akawada. 
Psalms119:72 Amakʼ moca reakʼ hukum iń ṭhen do hajar hajar sona rupạ khon hõ damangea. 
Psalms119:73 Amakʼ titege ińem tear akadińạ, arem benao rakapʼ akadińạ; iń bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe imạńme jemon amakʼ sanam hukumkoń baḍae daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms119:74 Okoe amko botoram onko do iń ńelteko rạskạkʼa, ente amakʼ gokʼakʼreń bhorsa akana." 
Psalms119:75 E Probhu Isor, ińiń baḍaea amakʼ ạn ạriko do dhoromte perecʼgea; ar amem pạtiạrge iạte ińem duk ocoakadińạ." 
Psalms119:76 Amren golam ṭhen am dom gokʼakada ar ona lekage amakʼ dulạṛ do ińakʼ jiwiye raṛecʼeda. 
Psalms119:77 Ińre amakʼ mãyã hijukʼma jemon jiwetʼiń tahen, ente amakʼ hukum doe rạskạ ocoyedeń kana." 
Psalms119:78 Eṛe katha roṛte ińakʼ lokshan lạgitʼ bạḍạiko doko lajaokʼma; menkhan iń do amakʼ ạn ạriko reaṅgeń ganḍonjoṅa. 
Psalms119:79 Okoe amko botoram ar amakʼ kathako bujhạu daṛeakʼkan onko do iń ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼma. 
Psalms119:80 Amakʼ ạn ạriko senakʼ jokhecʼ ińakʼ ontor do jemon khạṭi tahen, jemon lajaore aloń paṛaokʼ." 
Psalms119:81 Am dom rukhiyạyińạ ar ona ńel horte daṛe do komao hijukʼkantińạ; iń do amakʼ katharege asiń dohoakada. 
Psalms119:82 Amakʼ gokʼakʼ purạukʼ reakʼ ńelhor iạte ińakʼ mẽtʼ do nijor idikʼ kantińạ; iń doń meneda, “Tisokʼ ińakʼ jiwi dom raṛejtińạ.”" 
Psalms119:83 Darkha rasa dohoakatʼ kum cetʼleka dhũạte nosṭokʼ ińhõ onkageń hoyakana; enhõ amakʼ ạn do bạń hiṛińeda. 
Psalms119:84 Amren golamakʼ bahaokʼ do ar tinạkʼ din? Okoe ińko santaoedeń kan onko do tisem bicạrkoa? 
Psalms119:85 Bạḍạiko do iń lạgitʼ ghaḍlakʼko layeda; ar amakʼ hukum do bako manaoeda. 
Psalms119:86 Amakʼ sanam hukumko do pạtiạrgea. Ar hoṛko do eṛe roṛte ińko santaoedeń kana; am do goṛowạńme baṛe. 
Psalms119:87 Dhạrti khon onko do ińko mohor meṭaoedeń kan tahẽkana, menkhan amakʼ ạn ạri do bạń bạgi akada." 
Psalms119:88 Amakʼ khạndri dulạṛte am do nãwã daṛe baṛe emạńme, jemon amakʼ moca reakʼ katha lekań sen daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms119:89 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ goha do sermare jaejug hạbicʼ diṛho akae menakʼa." 
Psalms119:90 Ar amakʼ pạtiạr do piṛhike piṛhi parom calakʼ kana; am do dhạrtim benaokʼ akada, ar ṭarhao menakʼa." 
Psalms119:91 Amakʼ ạn ạriko leka teheńhõ jotowakʼ do ṭarhao menakʼa, ente onako do amakʼ gobolrege menakʼa." 
Psalms119:92 Amakʼ jotowakʼ hukumre rạskạ bạń ńamle khan, iń do dukteń marao cabakokʼa." 
Psalms119:93 Amakʼ ạn ạriko do tishõ bạń hiṛińa, ente ona hotetege am do nãwã daṛem dan akawạdińa." 
Psalms119:94 Rukhiyạyińme baṛe, ente iń doń amren kangea; ar amakʼ ạn ạriko secʼ iń mone akawada." 
Psalms119:95 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko do maraoiń lạgitʼ koyokʼ horre menakʼkoa, menkhan amakʼ kathako iạte iń do khạndriyakʼkoń hudisjoṅ kana." 
Psalms119:96 Ińiń ńelakada jãhãnakʼ reakʼge puruntetʼ do bạnukʼa, menkhan amakʼ hukumko do joto secʼ khonge purungea." 
Psalms119:97 Iń do amakʼ hukum ạḍiń dulạṛeda! Ar goṭa dinge onań ganḍonjoṅ kana. 
Psalms119:98 Amakʼ sanam hukumkoge ińren bạiriko khon akelanicʼe hoyocoyediń kana, ente onako do sanam ghạṛicʼ iń soṅgete tahẽnkana." 
Psalms119:99 Ińren sanam cecetʼko khon iń doń akelanicʼ kana, ente amakʼ sanam kathako iń doń ganḍonjoṅ kana." 
Psalms119:100 Umeran hoṛko khon hõ iń do bạ̃ṛtiń bujhạueda, ente iń do amakʼ ạn ạrikoń senakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:101 Joto lekan kại reakʼ hor khon ińakʼ jaṅga doń ocokʼakada, jemon amakʼ katha lekań sen daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms119:102 Amakʼ ạn ạri reakʼ hor khon iń do bạń ocokʼakana, ente am do apnarte ińem cetʼakawạdińa." 
Psalms119:103 Amakʼ sanam gokʼakʼ do ińakʼ alaṅre heṛemgea! Ona do ińakʼ mocare dumur rasa khon hõ heṛemgea. 
Psalms119:104 Amakʼ ạn ạri khon iń do bicạr reakʼ budiń ńameda, onate iń do sanam eṛeakʼ reakʼ horkoń hirkhạwakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:105 Amakʼ katha do hor udukʼạń reakʼ diuhe kana, ona do ińakʼ calakʼ hor reakʼ marsalge." 
Psalms119:106 Iń do amakʼ dhoromte perecʼ ạn ạri manaokate calakʼ reakʼ iń kiriạ akana, ar ona do kajaktegeń kiriạ akana." 
Psalms119:107 Iń do aema kosṭoń sahao akada; E Probhu Isor, amakʼ katha leka nãwã daṛe baṛe emạńme." 
Psalms119:108 E Probhu Isor, iń do ińakʼ kusileka okaṭakʼ sarhao reakʼ dãṛẽń samaṅam ona baṛe ataṅtińme, ar amakʼ ạn ạriko cetʼạńme." 
Psalms119:109 Ińakʼ jiwi do jao ghuṛi cuputʼkateń calakʼkanre hõ, enhõ amakʼ hukum do bạń hiṛińa." 
Psalms119:110 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do iń lạgitʼ pạsiko oḍao akada, menkhan iń do amakʼ ạn ạriko khon bạń ocokʼ akana." 
Psalms119:111 Amakʼ gohawakʼko jaejug hạbicʼ iń ạidạri akawana; onate ińakʼ ontor do rạskạkʼ kana. 
Psalms119:112 Jao ghuṛi, hẽ mucạtʼ hạbicʼge iń do amakʼ ạnko pańjae lạgitʼ ińakʼ ontoriń lawer akatʼtińa." 
Psalms119:113 Bar monan hoṛko do bạń kusiyakoa, menkhan amakʼ hukum doń dulạṛeda." 
Psalms119:114 Amge ińren asray ar ińakʼ ḍhal do; amakʼ katharege iń do asiń dohoakada. 
Psalms119:115 Ape okoe do bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmikan, ape do iń khon men pharakokʼpe, jemon ińren Isorakʼ hukumkoń doho daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms119:116 Amakʼ gokʼakʼ leka am do sapʼ dohoyińme, onate iń do jiwetʼiń tahena; amre ińakʼ oka as menakʼtiń ona reaṅ am do alom lajao ocoyińạ." 
Psalms119:117 Sabeńme, enḍekhan iń do rukhiyạń ńama, ar amakʼ ạn ạriko jaogeń manao idiya." 
Psalms119:118 Amakʼ ạn khon okoe do sạṅgińteko calakʼkan onko dom nihạ̃t akatʼkoa, ente onkoakʼ phorphundi do ạuṛiyakʼgetakoa." 
Psalms119:119 Dhạrtiren sanam bạṛicʼ hoṛko do mạilạ lekam pharaketʼkoa, ar onatege iń do amakʼ sanam kathakoń dulạṛeda." 
Psalms119:120 Am botorte hoṛmo do caṭokʼkantińạ; ar amakʼ ạn ạriko iạte iń doń botorokʼ kana. 
Psalms119:121 Iń do hok reakʼ iń bicạr akada ar dhoromiń kạmi akada; ar okoe ińko santaoedeń kan onkoakʼ tire do alogem aṛakʼ giḍikạńạ. 
Psalms119:122 Am do amren golamakʼ bhạlại reakʼ bhar hataome; ar bạḍạiko ṭhen do alom santao ocoyińạ. 
Psalms119:123 Amakʼ dhorom khạtirte okaṭakʼem gokʼakatʼ ona purạu lạgitʼ ar amakʼ bańcao ńam reakʼ koyokʼ horte ińakʼ mẽtʼkin do nijor akantińạ. 
Psalms119:124 Amren golam sãote amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ lekate beoharińme baṛe, ar amakʼ ạnko hõ cetʼạńme." 
Psalms119:125 Iń do amren golam kạnạń; bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe imạńme jemon iń do amakʼ kathań bujhạu daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:126 E Probhu Isor, ńitokʼ do kạmire lagaokʼ reakʼ somoe hoyakana; hoṛko do amakʼ hukumko bebatao akada." 
Psalms119:127 Onate iń do amakʼ sanam hukumko sona khon, khạṭi sona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiń dulạṛeda." 
Psalms119:128 Amakʼ sanam ạn ạriko iń do mońjiń metakʼkana, ar sanam eṛeakʼ horkoń hirkhạwakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:129 Amakʼ sanam kathako do mońjgea, onatege iń do onań pańjayeda." 
Psalms119:130 Amakʼ kathako sodorlenre marsale emeda; ona do sojhe monan hoṛkoakʼ buj reakʼ daṛeye emakoa. 
Psalms119:131 Amakʼ hukumko ńam lạgitʼ iń doń uihạretʼ tahẽkana, ar cahapʼkateń ahkaokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Psalms119:132 Okoe amko dulạṛme onkore cetʼlekam tahenkan, onkage iń secʼ ạcurokʼme ar iń dayawạńme." 
Psalms119:133 Amakʼ katha leka ṭhik horte calakʼ lạgitʼ am do ińakʼ jaṅgam kajaketʼtińạ; jãhãn behokakʼ jemon ińre aloe raj daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:134 Santaokan hoṛkoakʼ ti khon chaḍaoińme. Jemon iń do amakʼ ạn ạrikoń manao daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:135 Amakʼ daya reakʼ marsal leka amren nui golamre baṛe paṛaokʼma; amakʼ sanam ạnko cetʼạń me. 
Psalms119:136 Ińakʼ mẽtʼdakʼ do ạtukʼkantińạ ente hoṛko do amakʼ hukum bako manaoeda. 
Psalms119:137 E Probhu Isor, am dom dhoromgea; amakʼ bicạr do hok reakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:138 Amakʼ dhoromte ar maraṅ pạtiạrte am do amakʼ ạn ạrikom emakana. 
Psalms119:139 Ińren bạiriko do amakʼ kathako hiṛiń akatʼte amakʼ manot rukhiyại lạgitʼ khạndri udgạu iń doe ńam akadińạ. 
Psalms119:140 Amakʼ katha do khạṭigea mente sạbud akana, onatege amren golam do onae dulạṛeda." 
Psalms119:141 Iń doń huḍińgea ariń nihạ̃tgea, enhõ iń do amakʼ ạn ạriko bạń hiṛińeda." 
Psalms119:142 Amakʼ dhorom do jaejug hạbicʼkana, ar amakʼ sanam hukumko do sạrigea." 
Psalms119:143 Gạr ar kosṭo ińre hecʼ paṛao akana, menkhan iń do joto hukumkogeń kusiyakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:144 Amakʼ sanam kathako do jaejug dhoromte perecʼgea; ona bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe emạńme jemon jiwetʼ iń tahẽ daṛeakʼ. 
Psalms119:145 Ińakʼ goṭa ontorteń hohowam kana; E Probhu Isor, roṛ ruạṛạńme. Amakʼ sanam ạnkoń manaoa." 
Psalms119:146 Amiń hohowam kana, bańcaoińme baṛe; iń do amakʼ joto kathań senakʼa." 
Psalms119:147 Ạuri aṅga marsalokʼrege iń do beretʼkate goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń rakʼeda; amakʼ gokʼakʼ cetanreń bhorsakʼ kana. 
Psalms119:148 Ńindạ ạuri cabakʼrege ińakʼ mẽtʼ do beṅgedokʼ kana, jemon amakʼ sanam gokʼakʼkoń ganḍon daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms119:149 Amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ lekate ińakʼ katha ańjomme; E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ạn ạri lekate nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme." 
Psalms119:150 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikan onko doko hecʼ sorakana; onko do amakʼ hukum khon sạṅgińreko tahenkana. 
Psalms119:151 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, am do sorre menama, ar amakʼ sanam hukumko do sạrigea." 
Psalms119:152 Amakʼ goha khon laharegeń baḍae akada je, am do jaejug lạgitʼ onam dohoakada." 
Psalms119:153 Ińakʼ duk beṅgetʼakʼme ar rukhiyạyińme, ente iń do amakʼ hukumko bạń hiṛińakada," 
Psalms119:154 Iń secʼ katha baṛe roṛme ar ińiń miridosge ona sạbudme; amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekage nãwã daṛe danạńme. 
Psalms119:155 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko khon bańcao do ḍher sạṅgińgea, ente onko do amakʼ ạn ạri secʼ bako moneyakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:156 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ mãyã do bạ̃ṛtigea; amakʼ ạn ạriko leka nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme." 
Psalms119:157 Ińren bạiri ar santaokan hoṛkoakʼ lekha do ḍhergea, menkhan amakʼ katha khon iń do bạń ocokʼakana." 
Psalms119:158 Bepạtiạrko ńelte iń doń hirkhạkʼ kana, ente onko do amakʼ katha leka bako calakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:159 Ńelme, amakʼ ạn ạriko do tinạkʼ iń dulạṛeda! E Probhu Isor, amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛte nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme." 
Psalms119:160 Amakʼ sanam kathako do sạrigea; amakʼ mitʼke mitʼ dhoromte perecʼ ạn do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena. 
Psalms119:161 Disạm calaoko do ạuṛiyakʼte ińko santaoedeń kana, menkhan ińakʼ ontorre amakʼ katha lạgitʼ botor menakʼa." 
Psalms119:162 Lạṛhạire ńamakʼ jiniskote hoṛko cetʼlekako rạskạkʼ, onkage amakʼ gokʼakʼ lạgitʼ iń doń rạskạkʼ kana." 
Psalms119:163 Eṛeakʼ do kurud ariń hirkhạwakʼ kana, menkhan amakʼ hukumiń dulạṛetʼ kana." 
Psalms119:164 Amakʼ dhoromte perecʼ ạn ạri lạgitʼ iń do dinre eae dhaoiń gun manao joharam kana. 
Psalms119:165 Okoe amakʼ hukumko dulạṛetʼ onko do ạḍi sulukko ńama; ar cetʼte hõ onko do bako tohodokʼa. 
Psalms119:166 E Probhu Isor, amem bańcaoińạ ona asre minạńa, ar iń do amakʼ hukumkoń senakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:167 Iń do amakʼ sanam kathakoń senakʼkana ariń dulạṛeda. 
Psalms119:168 Amakʼ ạn ạriko ar sanam kathań senakʼkana, ente ińakʼ jion reakʼ jotowakʼgem baḍaea." 
Psalms119:169 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ do am samaṅre seṭerokʼma; amakʼ katha lekate bujhạu lạgitʼ daṛe danạńme." 
Psalms119:170 Ińakʼ nehõr do am samaṅre tahenma; ar amakʼ gokʼakʼ lekate bańcaoińme. 
Psalms119:171 Ińakʼ luṭi khon amakʼ sarhao do heḍecʼ oḍokokʼma, ente amge amakʼ ạn reakʼem cetʼạń kana." 
Psalms119:172 Ińakʼ jiwi do amakʼ katha iạteye sereńma, ente amakʼ sanam hukumko do dhoromte perecʼgea." 
Psalms119:173 Amakʼ ti do goṛowạń lạgitʼ sapṛao akan tahenma, ente amakʼ ạn ạriko leka senokʼ reakʼ iń goṭa akada." 
Psalms119:174 E Probhu Isor, amem bańcaoiń iạte iń doń koyokʼ horakada; amakʼ sanam hukumkoge iń ṭhen do rạskạ reakʼ kana." 
Psalms119:175 Iń bańcao dohoyińme jemoniń gun manao joharam; ar amakʼ ạn ạriko do ińe goṛowạńma. 
Psalms119:176 Atʼ akan bhiḍi leka iń doń chingạu akana; amren golam baṛe sendra ńameń me, ente amakʼ hukumko do bạń hiṛiń akada." 
Psalms120:1 Ińakʼ muhinre iń do Probhu Isoriń hohoadea, uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa." 
Psalms120:2 E Probhu Isor, eṛe luṭi ar phạsiạra alaṅ khon rukhiyạyińme baṛe." 
Psalms120:3 E phạsiạra alaṅ, uni do cetʼe emama? Uni do cetʼ arhõ sạjại bae emama?" 
Psalms120:4 Uni do birbanṭawakʼ laser sarko ar Rothem jhạuạ reakʼ aṅgra seṅgelkoe emama. 
Psalms120:5 Hae ińakʼ bhạg do tinạkʼ bạṛicʼ! Iń do Mesekrenko leka upriạ minạńa, ar Kedarren hoṛkoakʼ tạmbureń berel akana." 
Psalms120:6 Okoe sulukko kurudakʼkan onkan hoṛko tulucʼ do ar bạń berelokʼa. 
Psalms120:7 Iń do sulukiń dulạṛeda, menkhan tinre suluk reakʼ kathań roṛeda unre onko do lạṛhạiko khojkana." 
Psalms121:1 Iń do buruko secʼ iń beṅgetʼ rakapʼeda; oka khon ińakʼ goṛo do hijukʼa? 
Psalms121:2 Ot ar sermaren sisirjạuicʼ Probhu Isor khonge ińakʼ goṛo do hijukʼa. 
Psalms121:3 Uni do amakʼ jaṅga bae leńjetʼ ocoytama; amren horhoyicʼ do baṅ dudṛumea. 
Psalms121:4 Okoe Israelkoe horhoyetʼko uni do bae dudṛuma, ar jạpitʼ hõ bae jạpida." 
Psalms121:5 Probhu Isorge amren rurukhiyạyicʼ; Probhu Isorge amakʼ jojom ti secʼ reakʼ umul do. 
Psalms121:6 Sińre do siń cando ar ńindạ do ńindạ cando unkin do jãhãnakʼ bạkin hạnmea. 
Psalms121:7 Joto lekan bạṛicʼakʼ khon Probhu Isorge ame rukhyiạmea; ar unige amakʼ jiwiye horhoytama. 
Psalms121:8 Probhu Isor do din hilokʼe horho jaṅgemea, ńit khon jaejug hạbicʼge." 
Psalms122:1 Iń doń rạskạyena tinre hoṛkoko metadińạ, “Dela bon, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bon calakʼa.”" 
Psalms122:2 E Jerusalem, ale do amakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen senkatele teṅgoyena." 
Psalms122:3 Ona Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ mońj nagraha leka benao rakapʼ hoyakana, onare jãhãn dhaṅdhaserge bạnukʼa." 
Psalms122:4 Sanam gusṭirenko do onḍegeko rakapʼa, Probhu Isorren hoṛkoakʼ sanam gusṭirenkoge; Israele em akawade hukum leka onko do Probhu Isor sarhaoe lạgitʼko rakapʼa." 
Psalms122:5 Bicạr reakʼ siṅghạson do onḍege menakʼa, Dạud gharońjren hoṛkoakʼ siṅghạsonge." 
Psalms122:6 Ape do Jerusalem reakʼ suluk lạgitʼ koejoṅpe, “Ar okoe Jerusalemko kusiyakʼ onko do bhạlại hoyokʼtakoma.”" 
Psalms122:7 Ona beṛhaeteakʼ pạcrikore suluk tahenma, ar ona reakʼ raj dolanre hõ bhạlại tahen ma.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ińren boeha ar gatekoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼge iń doń mena, Jerusalemre suluk tahen ma.”" 
Psalms122:9 Aboren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do onḍe menakʼte iń do Jerusalem reakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ iń kurumuṭuiya. 
Psalms123:1 E serma reakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼ akanicʼ; iń do am secʼiń beṅgetʼ rakapʼeda. 
Psalms123:2 Golamkoakʼ mẽtʼ do cetʼleka kisạ̃ṛ reakʼ ti secʼ ar kạ̃ṛmĩkoakʼ mẽtʼ hõ akoren kisạ̃ṛ era secʼ, onkage aboakʼ mẽtʼ hõ Probhu Isor secʼ menakʼa, one ạuriye daya abon hạbicʼ." 
Psalms123:3 E Probhu Isor alere dayakʼme, alere dayakʼme baṛe, ente nihạ̃t ocokʼkante ale do ạḍitetʼgele perecʼ akana." 
Psalms123:4 Aleakʼ jiwi do nirdandakoakʼ henosta ar bạḍạikoakʼ nihạ̃tkote ạḍitetʼ perecʼ akantalea. 
Psalms124:1 Israelkoko menma, “Probhu Isor ale secʼ bae tahẽlen khan," 
Psalms124:2 hoṛko ale upạrte tinreko teṅgolena, unre Probhu Isor ale secʼ bae tahẽlen khan," 
Psalms124:3 onko do ale upạrteko edre seṅgelkokʼa ar jiwetʼteko utʼkelea," 
Psalms124:4 ar ḍubạ dakʼ hõ aleye unum cabakelea, ar ạtukʼ dakʼ hõ ale cetante ạtukokʼa," 
Psalms124:5 ar se rakabokʼ dakʼko hõ ale cetante paromkokʼa.” 
Psalms124:6 Bhạgangeae Probhu Isor do! Uni do bạirikoakʼ ḍaṭate bae cirạ ocoakatʼ bona. 
Psalms124:7 Aboakʼ jiwi do cẽṛe leka paskaoena jhạkʼlikoakʼ pạsi khon; pạsi topakʼena ar abo do rukhiyạ bon ńamkeda. 
Psalms124:8 Probhu Isor, okoe do ot ar sermae sirjạu akatʼ uni ṭhen khonge aboakʼ goṛo do hijukʼa." 
Psalms125:1 Probhu Isorre bhorsakʼkanko do Sion buru leka jaejug hạbicʼko ṭarhao tahena. 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalem beṛhaete cetʼleka burute esetʼ ạcurge onkage Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoe esetʼ ạcur akatʼkoa, ar ńitokʼ hõe dohoyetʼkoa ar jaejug hạbicʼ hõe dohokoa." 
Psalms125:3 Isor botorae hoṛ do bạṛicʼ kạmire ti jemon aloko lagaokʼ onate Isor emakʼ onkoakʼ disạmre bạṛicʼ hoṛ do bako raj daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms125:4 E Probhu Isor, okoeko bhagege ar ontorreko khạṭige onko baṛe bhạlạiykom;" 
Psalms125:5 Menkhan okoe konḍea horreko tohodokʼ kan Probhu do bedhoromko sãote onkoe sạṅgińkoa. Israelko cetanre suluk baṛe tahenma! 
Psalms126:1 Probhu Isor do tinre lahate leka Sione pherao ruạṛkeda, unre kukmũ ńelketʼ leka bon bujhạukeda." 
Psalms126:2 Unre aboakʼ mẽtʼãha do rạskạte perecʼena, ar alaṅ do hulạskote. Unre eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko roṛetʼ tahẽkana, “Probhu Isorge onko lạgitʼ aema bhageakʼe kạmi akada.”" 
Psalms126:3 Probhu Isor do abo lạgitʼ bhageakʼe kạmi akada, onatebon rạskạkʼ kana." 
Psalms126:4 E Probhu Isor, Negeb reakʼ dakʼ nalako leka alehõ lahate leka pheraoleme." 
Psalms126:5 Mẽtʼ dakʼ joro jorote okoe do itạko eretʼkan onko hõ hulạs salakʼko ira. 
Psalms126:6 Ar okoe hoṛ rakʼ rakʼte itạ erokʼe calakʼkan uni do phosol reakʼ binḍạwante hulạsate khạṭigeye ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Psalms127:1 Probhu Isor do oṛakʼ bae benaole khan rajmistriko do ạuṛiyakʼgeko khaṭaokokʼa; Probhu Isor do nagraha bae rukhiyạle khan enḍekhan ạuṛiyakʼge pahradarko doko horhokeda. 
Psalms127:2 Ape do ạuṛiyakʼge jomakʼ jogaṛ lạgitʼ ạḍirepe beretʼkana ar ạḍi anecʼpe giticʼkana; menkhan Probhu Isor okoeye dulạṛetʼko onko tinreko jạpitʼjoṅa unre uni do onkoakʼ jạruṛokʼkoe emako kana. 
Psalms127:3 Gidrạ do Probhu Isor emakʼ ạidạri kanako, ar kukhiren gidrạ hõ uni emakʼ kuṛạige." 
Psalms127:4 Juạn okteren hoponko do birbanṭawakʼ ti reakʼ sar lekanako. 
Psalms127:5 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do acʼakʼ sarkote ṭhoṅgae perecʼakatʼtae; ar nagraha reakʼ phoṭok duạr ṭhen akoren bạiriko tulucʼ kathako phanḍaore onko do bako lajaokʼa." 
Psalms128:1 Bhạgangeako onko do, okoe do Probhu Isorko botorae kan ar uniyakʼ horteko calakʼkan." 
Psalms128:2 Am do apnar tite khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ jogeye joma ar sukem ńama ar bhạlại hoyokʼtama. 
Psalms128:3 Amakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri kandhare amren bạhu do jote perecʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ lekae hoyokʼa; ar amakʼ jomakʼ ṭebil beṛhaete amren gidrạko do Jạitun dare reakʼ cara lekako hoyokʼa. 
Psalms128:4 Sạrige, Probhu Isor okoeye botorae uni do bhore ńama." 
Psalms128:5 Sion khon Probhu Isor do bhore danam ma; amakʼ jionre Jerusalem reakʼ bhạlại jemonem ńel ńam. 
Psalms128:6 Am do amren goṛom gidrạko jemonem ńel tiyokʼko. Israelko cetanre suluk hijukʼma baṛe. 
Psalms129:1 Israel doe menma, “Gidrạń tahẽkan khonge hoṛko do ạḍiko santaoedeń kana." 
Psalms129:2 Ińakʼ gidrạ umer khon ạḍiko santao akadińre hõ, enhõ onko do iń cetanre bako jitạu daṛe akawada." 
Psalms129:3 Cacasko leka onko do ińakʼ deareko cas akada. Onko do jeleńgeko nala akada; 
Psalms129:4 Menkhan Probhu Isor doe dhorom bicạricʼ kana, uni do bạṛicʼkoakʼ babere getʼ topakʼakada.”" 
Psalms129:5 Okoe Sionko kurudakʼ kan onko doko lajao ocokʼma arko pạc ruạṛokʼma. 
Psalms129:6 Onko do sạṛimre omonakan ghãs leka okaṭakʼ do ạuri hara rakabokʼrege rohoṛ kạrcubokʼ kan; 
Psalms129:7 Onate irokʼicʼ do muṭ hõ baṅ perejokʼtaea, ar okoe onae ạṭiy uni do hobor hõ baṅ hoyokʼtaea." 
Psalms129:8 Okoe onko hoṛ aṛeteko sen paromokʼ onko hõ bako mena, “Apere Probhu Isorakʼ bhor baṛe tahenma; Probhu Isorge apeye bhạlạiype ma.”" 
Psalms130:1 E Probhu Isor, khạndriyakʼko khoniń hohowam kana;" 
Psalms130:2 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ aṛaṅ baṛe ańjomtińme; ińakʼ noa nehõr rakʼjoṅ baṛe luturakʼtińme." 
Psalms130:3 E Probhu Isor, dhorom reakʼ hisạbem hatao khan, enḍekhan E Probhu Isor, okoeye teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa?" 
Psalms130:4 Menkhan am ṭhen do ikạ menakʼa, jemon hoṛko botoram." 
Psalms130:5 Iń do Probhu Isor koyokʼ horre minạńa, ińakʼ ontor do uni koyokʼ horre menakʼa. Iń do uniyakʼ kathare asiń dohoakada." 
Psalms130:6 Pahradarko cetʼleka aṅga marsalokʼ reakʼko koyokʼ horetʼ, hẽ, onko cetʼleka aṅga marsalokʼ lạgitʼko ńel horetʼkan, ona khon hõ ińakʼ ontor do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ horre menaea." 
Psalms130:7 E Israel, Probhu Isorre as dohojoṅme, ente Probhu Isor ṭhen do asambheṛ dulạṛ menakʼa, ar chaḍao reakʼ hõ ḍher ektiạri menakʼtaea." 
Psalms130:8 Unige Israel do acʼakʼ sanam ghạṭko khone saphayea. 
Psalms131:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ mon do baṅ dhomoka, ar ińakʼ mẽtʼ hõ baṅ koyokʼ pakʼroma; ar ińakʼ lekte napṛakʼ ar hahaṛawakʼre iń do bạń taṛameda." 
Psalms131:2 Ińakʼ jiwi do thir ariń hape akatʼtińạ; eṅgat ṭhen khon toa nunu bạgiyakatʼ gidrạ leka, mitʼṭen nunu bạgiyakatʼ gidrạ leka ińakʼ jiwi do iń ṭhen menakʼa." 
Psalms131:3 E Israel, Probhu Isorre amakʼ as dohoyme, ńit khon ar jaejug hạbicʼge." 
Psalms132:1 E Probhu Isor, am do Dạudakʼ sanam kosṭo reakʼ katha disạime." 
Psalms132:2 Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhene kiriạlena, Jakobren uni daṛeanicʼ Isor ṭhen noae gokʼletʼ tahẽkana," 
Psalms132:3 “Iń do ińakʼ oṛakʼte bạń bolokʼa, se aṭetʼre hõ bạń giticʼa;" 
Psalms132:4 ińakʼ mẽtʼre jạpitʼ bạń hecʼ ocowakʼa, ar pipnire dudṛum hõ bạń hecʼ ocowakʼa;" 
Psalms132:5 ar tin hạbicʼ Probhu Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃i bạń sendra ńam, Jakobren uni daṛeanicʼ Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i bạń sendra ńam.”" 
Psalms132:6 Abo do Ephrata khon gokʼakʼ sinduk reakʼ bon ańjomleda, ar Jayerakʼ ṭạnḍirege ona bon ńamleda;" 
Psalms132:7 Delabon, abo do uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ite bon calakʼa, ar uniyakʼ lebedokʼ ganḍore ikhṛumkate bon sewawaea." 
Psalms132:8 E Probhu Isor, ma beretʼme, amakʼ jirạukʼ ṭhạ̃ite hijukʼme; dela hijukʼme, ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ sinduk hijukʼma." 
Psalms132:9 Amren naekeko do dhorom reakʼ kicricʼko horogma, ar am botoram kanko do rạskạteko sereńma." 
Psalms132:10 Amren guti Dạud iạte amem ojokʼ bahal akatʼko hoṛkoakʼ koejoṅ do alom dea giḍikakʼa. 
Psalms132:11 Probhu Isor do Dạud ṭhen noageye kiriạlena one okaṭakʼ do tisge bae rạpud, “Amren mitʼṭen hopon do amakʼ siṅghạsonreń duṛubea." 
Psalms132:12 Amren hoponko ińiń bandhao akatʼ bondobosko manao lekhan ar ińakʼ katha lekako senlen khan one okaṭakʼ iń cetʼako, enḍekhan onkoren hoponko do piṛhike piṛhi amakʼ siṅghạsonreń duṛupʼkoa.”" 
Psalms132:13 Probhu Isor do Sione bachao akawana; uni do tahen lạgitʼ noageye khojleda. 
Psalms132:14 Uniye menleda, “Noa do ińakʼ jaejug reakʼ jirạukʼ ṭhạ̃i kana; iń do nonḍegeń tahena, ente iń do noageń khojleda." 
Psalms132:15 Sion do aema jomakʼkoteń bhorakʼa; ar jomakʼkote onḍenko reṅgecʼ orecʼkoń bi ocokoa. 
Psalms132:16 Iń do Sionren naekeko bańcaokʼ reakʼ kicricʼ iń horokʼakoa; onḍe ińko botorạńkan hoṛ do ãṭ aṛaṅteko sereńa. 
Psalms132:17 Onḍe iń do Dạud lạgitʼ mitʼṭen daṛean bõskoń benao rakapʼkoa; ar ińren ojokʼicʼ lạgitʼ iń do mitʼṭecʼ diuheń tear dohoya. 
Psalms132:18 Ar uniren bạiriko do lajao reakʼ kicricʼ iń horokʼ ocokoa, menkhan uniyakʼ bohokʼre do jhak jhakaokʼ kan mukuṭ tahena.”" 
Psalms133:1 Ńelpe, tinạkʼ bhage ar juta boehako mitʼteko tahen do!" 
Psalms133:2 Ona do bohokʼre dulakatʼ damanakʼ sunum leka one oka do Aronakʼ goco secʼte joro pheḍokʼkan uniyakʼ kicricʼre. 
Psalms133:3 Ona do Hermon buru reakʼ sisir dakʼ leka one oka do ạtu pheḍokʼkan Sion burure; ente Probhu Isor do onḍegeye ạsirbad akawada, ar ona ạsirbad do jaejug jionge." 
Psalms134:1 E Probhu Isorren golamko, okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ńindạ jokhecʼ unipe sapʼsorae kan, ape jotoge Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao sereńpe." 
Psalms134:2 Sonotakʼ ṭhạ̃i secʼ ti tultape ar Probhu Isor sarhao sereńaepe. 
Psalms134:3 Ot ar sermaren sisirjạuicʼ Probhu Isor do Sion khone bhor apema. 
Psalms135:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Probhu Isor gun manao joharaepe; E Probhu Isorren golamko, ar okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼrepe kạmikan, ar okoe do Isorakʼ bakher racarepe kạmikan ape do Probhu Isor sarhao sereńaepe." 
Psalms135:2  
Psalms135:3 Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; uniyakʼ ńutum õṛhẽtaepe, ente ona do ạḍi bhagegea." 
Psalms135:4 Probhu Isor do Jakob acʼ lạgitʼe bachaowana, ar Israel do acʼakʼ ạidạri lekage." 
Psalms135:5 Ińiń baḍaea Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea; aboren Probhu Isor do joto debotako khon hõe maraṅgea. 
Psalms135:6 Ot ar sermare, jalapuri ar khạndriyakʼkore Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ kusi sana lekae kạmikana." 
Psalms135:7 Unige pirthimi reakʼ mucạtʼ khon rimile rakapʼ ocoyeda; unige dakʼ lạgitʼ bijliye tear ocoyeda. 
Psalms135:8 Uni do Misorren pạhil janamkoe ńẽtʼletʼkoa, hoṛren ar janwarren sanamkoge." 
Psalms135:9 E Misor, uni do am talare Pharao ar uniren kạmiyạko birudre acʼakʼ cinhạ ar hahaṛa kạmikoe kạmileda." 
Psalms135:10 Uni do aema jạtrenkoe ńẽtʼletʼkoa ar daṛean rapajkoe gocʼletʼkoa. 
Psalms135:11 Uni do Amorikoren Sihon raj, ar Bashanren Og raj, ar Kananren sanam rapajkoe gocʼletʼkoa." 
Psalms135:12 Uni do onkoakʼ disạm acʼren hoṛ Israelko ạidạri lekateye danatʼkoa. 
Psalms135:13 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ńutum do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana. E Probhu Isor, piṛhi cetan piṛhige amakʼ ńutum disạkʼtama;" 
Psalms135:14 ente Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko dhorom reakʼe bicạrtakoa, ar acʼren golam doe mãyã akoa." 
Psalms135:15 Eṭakʼ jạtkoren sona ar rupạte benao murhutʼko do; manwa tite benaoko kanako. 
Psalms135:16 Onkoakʼ do moca menakʼgea menkhan katha bako roṛ daṛeakʼa, mẽtʼ menakʼtakoa, bako ńeńela;" 
Psalms135:17 lutur menakʼgetakoa menkhan bako ańjom ńama, onkoakʼ mocare do cetʼ sãhetʼge bạnukʼtakoa." 
Psalms135:18 Okoe nokoko benao akatʼko ar okoe onko cetanreye pạtiạukʼ are bhorsakʼ onko hõ murhutʼ lekako hoyokʼa. 
Psalms135:19 E Israel bõsrenko, Probhu Isor sarhaoepe; E Aron bõsrenko, ape do Probhu Isor sarhaoepe." 
Psalms135:20 E Lewi bõsrenko, Probhu sarhao sereńaepe; E Probhu Isor botoraekanko, ape do uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms135:21 E Probhu Isor, okoe do Jerusalemreye tahenkan, uniyakʼ sarhao do Sion khon hoyokʼma. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms136:1 Probhu Isor gun manao joharaepe, ente uni doe bhagegea; uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea." 
Psalms136:2 Isorkoren Isor sarhaoepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:3 Probhukoren Probhu gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:4 Okoe do eskarge maraṅ ar hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmikan uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:5 Okoe do acʼakʼ bujte sermae benao akatʼ uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:6 Okoe do dakʼ cetanre ote bạisạu akatʼ uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:7 Okoe do maraṅ maraṅ marsalkoe sirjạu akatʼ uni gunmanao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:8 Uni do siń lạgitʼ siń candoe sirjạu akadea; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:9 Uni do ńindạ lạgitʼ ńindạ cando ar ipilkoe sirjạu akatʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:10 Okoe do Misorren pạhil janam hoponkoe ńẽtʼletʼko uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:11 Okoe do onko tala khon Israelkoe oḍok ạguletʼko uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:12 Uni do kuṭhin ar daṛeanakʼ tite onkoe oḍok ạguletʼkoa; uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:13 Okoe do Arakʼ doreãoe bar hạṭińletʼ tahẽkan uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:14 Uni do Israelko jalapuri talateye paromletʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:15 Menkhan Pharao ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do arakʼ jalapurireye koṭa giḍikatʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:16 Okoe do acʼren hoṛko hahaṅkar talateye idiletʼko uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:17 Okoe do maraṅ maraṅ rapajkoe ńẽtʼletʼko uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:18 Uni do daṛean rapajkoe gocʼletʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:19 Uni do Amorikoren raj Sihone gocʼledea; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:20 Uni do Basonren raj Oge gocʼledea; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:21 Uni do onkoakʼ disạm ạidạri lekateye ematʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:22 Uni do onkoakʼ disạm ạidạri lekate acʼ botoraekan Israelkoe ematʼkoa; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:23 Uni do aboakʼ bạpuṛicʼ dosaye disạketʼtabona; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:24 Okoe do bạirikoakʼ ti khon aboe bańcaoketʼbon uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:25 Okoe do sanam jiwiyanko jomakʼe emako kan uni gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms136:26 Ape do sermaren Isor gun manao joharaepe; ente uniyakʼ dulạṛ do jaejuggetaea. 
Psalms137:1 Babel reakʼ gaḍa aṛere duṛupʼkate tinre ale do Sion reakʼ kathale disạyetʼ tahẽkana unre ale dole rakʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
Psalms137:2 Onḍenakʼ bạisi darekore aleakʼ banamkole akakakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Psalms137:3 Okoe ale bondikateko idiletʼle onḍe onko do rạskạkʼ lạgitʼko metatʼlea; onko sasantaoko do ale ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ sereń ańjomko khojleda; onkoko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Sion reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ sereń baṛe ańjomalepe.”" 
Psalms137:4 Menkhan upriạ disạmre ale do cekate Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao sereńle sereńa? 
Psalms137:5 E Jerusalem, amiń hiṛińlemre ińakʼ jojomti do okajakʼ alo baṛe hoyokʼtiń." 
Psalms137:6 Amiń disạ doholem khan ar Jerusalem do ińakʼ joto khon rạskạ reakʼ jinis mente bạń hudis lekhan, enḍekhan alaṅ do ińakʼ tạrurege jalatʼ hapekokʼma." 
Psalms137:7 E Probhu Isor, Jerusalem ḍahao maraokʼ dinre Edomrenko cetʼko cekaleda ona baṛe disạime; onkoko menleda, “Lạnduṛpe, ona reakʼ rehetʼ hạbicʼ lạnduṛpe.”" 
Psalms137:8 E Babelren hoponera, am dom ḍahao marao ocokʼa; am do cetʼleka ale cetanrem cekawakatʼ ar okoe amreye onkae uni doe bhạgangea!" 
Psalms137:9 Bhạgangeae uni do okoe amren bale gidrạko hạrkate dhirireye tawakʼko uni doe bhạgangea. 
Psalms138:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ goṭa ontorte iń do amiń sarhaomea; ar debotako samaṅre hõ amiń oṛhẽ sereńama." 
Psalms138:2 Amakʼ sonot oṛakʼ secʼ samaṅkateń ḍoboga, ar amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ ar pạtiạrtetʼ iạte amiń gun manao joharama; ente amakʼ gokʼakʼ purạu lạgitʼ oka lekam sodorakan ona do amakʼ namḍak khon hõ maraṅgea." 
Psalms138:3 Iń do tinreń hohowatʼmea unre am dom roṛ ruạṛạdińa; ińakʼ ontor reakʼ daṛete am do dilanicʼem hoyocokedińa. 
Psalms138:4 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ moca reakʼ katha ańjomkate dhạrtiren sanam rapajko do amko sarhaomea." 
Psalms138:5 Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmi iạteko sereńa, ente Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do maraṅgea." 
Psalms138:6 Probhu Isor do jotowakʼko cetanre menaere hõ enhõ uni do nindhạnkoe beṅgetʼakoa, menkhan bạḍạiko doe sạṅgiń khongeye baḍaekoa." 
Psalms138:7 Tinre iń do gạr talateń calakʼa unre ińakʼ jiwi do rukhiyại tińme; amakʼ ti tiạrte ińren bạirikoakʼ edre cabaetakome, ar amakʼ jojomtite rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms138:8 Probhu Isor do iń lạgitʼ okaṭakʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ onae purạua. E Probhu Isor, amakʼ khạndri dulạṛ do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenma; ar okaṭakʼ apnar titem kạmikan ona do alom aṛakʼ giḍiya." 
Psalms139:1 E Probhu Isor, am dom biḍạu aṭkar akadińạ arem baḍae akadińạ." 
Psalms139:2 Jãhãnakʼgeń cekayetʼ am do jotogem baḍaekana; am do sạṅgiń khonge ińakʼ mon reakʼ hudis bundiskom baḍae daṛeakʼkana. 
Psalms139:3 Am do ińakʼ kạmi ar jirạujoṅ reakʼ bhagetege khojem hataoeda; am do ińakʼ jion hor reakʼ hõ bhagetegem baḍaea. 
Psalms139:4 E Probhu Isor, jãhãnakʼ kathage ạuri roṛre am do ona reakʼem baḍaekana." 
Psalms139:5 Am do joto secʼtegem esetʼ ạcur akadińạ, ar am gobolrem dohoakadińạ." 
Psalms139:6 Amakʼ noa akel do iń lạgitʼ bujhạujoṅ do muskilgea; ona do ạḍitetʼ usula, ohogeń tiokʼ daṛelea." 
Psalms139:7 Amren sonot Jiu ṭhen khon iń do okateń calakʼa? Ar am samaṅ khon do cetʼ jãhãteń dạṛ daṛekea? 
Psalms139:8 Sermateń dejokʼ khan, onḍe hõ amge; patal purireń aṭetʼle khan, onḍe hõ menama;" 
Psalms139:9 Piyạṅ payaṅ reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ iń hatao lekhan, ar jalapuri reakʼ mucạtʼ iń calaolen khan," 
Psalms139:10 onḍe hõ amakʼ ti do ińe ạyurińa, ar amakʼ jojomti do kajakteye sapʼ ṭarhao akadińạ." 
Psalms139:11 Ariń men lekhan, “Ńut doe esetʼ ạcurińạ, ar iń beṛhaete okaṭakʼ marsal menakʼ ona do ńut utạrokʼa,” Enhõ onate jãhãn lab do baṅ hoyokʼa;" 
Psalms139:12 ente ona ńut am ṭhen do baṅ ńuta. Ńindạ do siń lekage marsalgea; am ṭhen do ńut ar marsal banarge somangea. 
Psalms139:13 Am do ińakʼ ontorem sirjạuakada; ar eṅgat kukhirege ińakʼ hoṛmo hạṭińko mitʼ dhaotem benao akada. 
Psalms139:14 Iń doń gun manao joharam kana, ente iń do hahaṛa lekateń benao akana; hahaṛagea amakʼ kạmiko do, ar ona do bhagetegeń baḍaea." 
Psalms139:15 Tinre iń do danaṅreń benao ocolena, ar eṅgat kukhire tinre ińakʼ hoṛmoko benaokʼkan tahẽkana, unre ińakʼ saj am khon oko do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Psalms139:16 Amakʼ mẽtʼ do ińakʼ baṅ benao akan hoṛmoe ńelakada. Iń lạgitʼ niṭ dohoakan dinko ạuri ehobokʼre, amakʼ puthire onako reaṅ jotoge ol akan tahẽkana." 
Psalms139:17 E Isor, amakʼ noa hudisakʼko iń ṭhen do damangea! Ar onako do lekhare ḍhergea." 
Psalms139:18 Onakoń lekhale khan ona reakʼ lekha do gitilko khon hõ ḍherge hoyokʼa. Iń do tinreń ebhenokʼa unre am ṭhengeń tahenkana. 
Psalms139:19 E Isor, ińakʼ khojogokʼ do bạṛicʼ hoṛko marao giḍikakome. E mãyãm joro ocoyetʼkan hoṛko, iń khon pharakokʼpe." 
Psalms139:20 Bạṛicʼ hudiste onko do am reaṅ aema kathako roṛa; ar amren bạiriko do ạuṛi pạthạuṛi amakʼ ńutumko ńumeda. 
Psalms139:21 E Probhu Isor, okoe do amko kurudam kan onko do cetʼ bạń kurudako kana? Ar okoe am upạrteko teṅgonkan onko do cetʼ bạń hirkhạwako kana?" 
Psalms139:22 Onko do purạteń kurudako kana; ar ińren bạiriko mentegeń hudisetʼkoa. 
Psalms139:23 E Isor, bhagete biḍạu aṭkarińme, ar ińakʼ ontor reakʼ dosa baḍaeme; ar biḍạu aṭkarińme, ińakʼ bạṛicʼ hudis reakʼ katha baḍaeme." 
Psalms139:24 Ar ńelme amiń duk ocome nonkan ińakʼ monre menakʼa se baṅa; am do jaejug reakʼ horre ạyurińme. 
Psalms140:1 E Probhu Isor, bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme; sasantaokoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme." 
Psalms140:2 Onko do mon monte bạṛicʼ phundiko aṭaoa ar din hilokʼko jhogṛakʼa. 
Psalms140:3 Onko do biń leka akoakʼ alaṅko laser akada; onkoakʼ luṭire do bińakʼ bisge menakʼa. 
Psalms140:4 E Probhu Isor, bạṛicʼkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme. Ar santaokan hoṛkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạyińme; ińakʼ jaṅga jemon leńjedokʼ tiń onate onko do phundiko aṭaoeda." 
Psalms140:5 Bạḍại hoṛko do iń lạgitʼ pạsi baberko oḍao akada; onko do hor aṛere jhạliko aṭetʼ akada ar iń lạgitʼ jhampako dohoakada. 
Psalms140:6 E Probhu Isor, amiń metam kana, “Am kangeam ińren Isor do.” E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ nehõrjoṅ baṛe luturakʼme." 
Psalms140:7 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ bańcao reakʼ daṛe, lạṛhạire amge ińakʼ bohokʼ aḍtińme." 
Psalms140:8 E Probhu Isor, bạṛicʼkoakʼ monsubạ do alom purạu ocoytakoa; onkoakʼ soṛojontro hõ alom jo baha ocoytakoa, jemon bạḍạite aloko phulạukʼ. (Sela)" 
Psalms140:9 Okoe ińko esetʼ ạcur akadiń ar onkoakʼ moca okako behok akatʼ ona do onkoakʼ bohokʼrege paṛaokʼma. 
Psalms140:10 Onko cetanre jolokʼkan aṅgrage baṛe ńurakoma; ar seṅgelre, khạndri ghaḍlakʼre onko doko khadle giḍi ocokʼma; jemon tishõ onḍe khon aloko rakapʼ daṛeakʼ." 
Psalms140:11 Oktako do disạmre ạidạri aloko ńam ma; ar santaokan hoṛ do muhin jemon jao ghuṛiye khudạu baṛako. 
Psalms140:12 Ińiń baḍaea Probhu Isor do dukokʼko secʼ menaea ar nacarkoakʼ do hok reakʼe bicạra. 
Psalms140:13 Dhorom hoṛ do khạṭige amko sarhaomea, ar ontorre khạṭi hoṛ do am samaṅreko girobasokʼa." 
Psalms141:1 E Probhu Isor, amiń hohowam kana, am do usạrate iń ṭhen hijukʼme; ar amiń hohowamre ańjomtińme baṛe." 
Psalms141:2 Ińakʼ koejoṅ do am samaṅre dhup leka bujhạukʼma, ińakʼ ti kin reakʼ ataṅ do ạyupʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ leka ente iń do am samaṅre hạjirgeń tahen kana." 
Psalms141:3 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãre pharadarko dohokom, ar ińakʼ luṭi silpiń do horhoytińme." 
Psalms141:4 Ińakʼ mon do jãhãn bạṛicʼ jinis secʼ alom sen ocowakʼa, jemon bedhoromko sãote bạṛicʼ kạmire aloń seledokʼ; ar onkoakʼ bhage bhage jomakʼ jemon aloń jom." 
Psalms141:5 Mitʼṭen Isor botorae hoṛ do ińe daleńma, onage ińakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ do hoyokʼa. Uni do ińe egerińma, ar ona do ińakʼ bohokʼre sunum ojokʼ akatʼ leka hoyokʼa; ińakʼ bohokʼ do ona aloe baṅakʼma. Menkhan ińakʼ koejoṅ do jaoge bedhoromkoakʼ kạmi upạrte tahena." 
Psalms141:6 Onkoren bikʼcạrko do buru khonko ḍheka ńur ocokʼma; onko do ińakʼ kathako luturakʼma, ente ona do dumur rasa lekana." 
Psalms141:7 Manwa do cetʼleka hasako cas paṛakʼetʼkan onkage aleakʼ jaṅko do patal puri reakʼ duạr ṭhen chirchạtur akana. 
Psalms141:8 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ mẽtʼ do am secʼge menakʼa; iń do amrege asrayiń hatao akada, iń do gujukʼ reakʼ tire alom alae giḍikạńạ." 
Psalms141:9 Onko do iń lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ jhạliko oḍao akatʼ ona khon rukhiyạyińme; ar bedhoromkoko oḍao akatʼ pạsi khon hõ bańcaoińme. 
Psalms141:10 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko do akoakʼ jhạlirgeko khańjokʼma, ar unre iń do napaetegeń parom calakʼa." 
Psalms142:1 Iń do ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isoriń rakʼae kana; ińakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isor ṭheniń nehõrokʼ kana. 
Psalms142:2 Ar duk reakʼ katha do uni samaṅreń phuṭạueda, ar ińakʼ kosṭo reakʼ katha hõ uni samaṅreń lạiyeda." 
Psalms142:3 Ińre ińakʼ jiwi loraokʼkanre amge ińakʼ jion reakʼ horem baḍayetʼtińạ; ar ińakʼ calakʼ horre hoṛko do hape hapete pạsiko oḍaoeda. 
Psalms142:4 Ińakʼ jojomti secʼ beṅgedme ar ńelme, ińko orom akadiń leka do celege bạnukʼkoa. Iń do dạṛ pharakokʼ lạgitʼ jaega hõ bạnukʼtińạ; ar ińakʼ jiwi lạgitʼ cintạkʼko hõ celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Psalms142:5 E Probhu Isor, iń do am ṭhengeń rakʼleda; iń doń menleda, “Amge ińren hirlạ do, ar jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre ińakʼ bakhra hõ amge.”" 
Psalms142:6 Ińakʼ rakʼjoṅ baṛe luturakʼtińme, ente ạḍi awaṭapareń paṛao akana; okoe ińko khudạu edeńkan onkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme, ente iń khon doko daṛeangea." 
Psalms142:7 Hajot oṛakʼre minạń khon amge bańcaoiń me. jemon amiń sarhao daṛeam. Ar dhorom hoṛ do iń iạteko rạskạkʼa, ente am do bhạlạiytem perecʼedeńa." 
Psalms143:1 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ koejoṅ ańjomtińme, ińakʼ nehõrjoṅ reakʼ rakʼ luturakʼtińme; amakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ ar amakʼ dhoromte roṛ ruạṛạńme." 
Psalms143:2 Iń amren golam do alom bicạrińạ, ente amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre sanam jiwiyankoge dhorom doko baṅkana." 
Psalms143:3 Bạiri do ińe khudạuedeń kana, uni do otreye tawakʼ bhindạṛ akadińạ; ar ḍher din laharen gocʼ hoṛ leka uni do ńutreye berel ocoakadińạ." 
Psalms143:4 Onate iń doń lorao akana; ińre ińakʼ ontor do keklesetʼ akantińạ. 
Psalms143:5 Iń do sedae reakʼ kathań disạyeda, ar amakʼ sanam kạmiko reaṅiń ganḍonjoṅ kana; amakʼ ti okaṭakʼe cekayetʼ ona reakʼgeń hudiseda." 
Psalms143:6 Iń do am secʼ tiyiń tiyạretʼtińạ; khaṅgoṭ ot leka ińakʼ jiwi do amre tetaṅokʼ kana. 
Psalms143:7 E Probhu Isor, usạra roṛ ruạṛ imạńme, ente ińakʼ jiwi do oḍokokʼ kantińạ; iń khon amakʼ mẽtʼãhã alom bedtama, patal purite okoeko pheḍakan onko leka khạndṛuṅre do alom paṛao ocoyińạ." 
Psalms143:8 Setakʼre amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ reakʼ katha ańjomạńme, ente iń do am cetanregeń ṭehãḍ akana; ar okaṭakʼ horte calakʼ hoyokʼ ona hõ udukʼạńme, ente ińakʼ ontor do am secʼgeń rakapʼ akatʼtińạ." 
Psalms143:9 E Probhu Isor, ińren bạirikoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme baṛe, ente iń do amregeń hirlạ akana." 
Psalms143:10 Amakʼ sana leka kạmi lạgitʼ cetʼạńme, ente am dom ińren Isor kana; amren bhạlạiyicʼ Jiu hotete mitʼ são horre ạyurińme." 
Psalms143:11 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ńutum iạte nãwã daṛe baṛe danạńme; ar amakʼ dhorom iạte gạr khon bańcaoińme." 
Psalms143:12 Amakʼ asambheṛ daya iạte ińren bạiriko mohor meṭaokom; ar sanam lekan gạr khon nosṭo giḍikom ente iń do amren golam kạnạń. 
Psalms144:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma, uni do ińren aotan gaṛge; uni do lạṛhại lạgitʼ ińakʼ tikine cetʼakawạdińa, ar ińakʼ kạṭupʼko do tapam lạgitʼge." 
Psalms144:2 Unige ińren pạtiạran gokʼṛoyicʼ, ar ińakʼ gaṛ, ińakʼ usul aotan gaṛ ar babańcaoicʼ; unige ińren ḍhal, iń do uniregeń hirlạkʼ kana; unige ińren hoṛko iń gobolreye ạgukoa." 
Psalms144:3 E Probhu Isor, manwa doe celekante, uni secʼem ạwilokʼkana? Ar manwa hopon baṅe okoekan, one uni secʼem moneyakʼkan?" 
Psalms144:4 Manwa ma eken sahẽtʼ leka ar uniyakʼ dinko do umul leka parom calakʼkana. 
Psalms144:5 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ serma khon pheḍ hijukʼme; ar buru boṭkocʼko joṭedme jemon onako khon dhũạ oḍokokʼ." 
Psalms144:6 Am do bijli kolme ar bạiriko chir chạturkom; ar amakʼ sar aṛagte onko chaka chunkom. 
Psalms144:7 Am do cetan khon amakʼ ti tiạrtam; ar iń rukhiyạyińme, ḍubạ dakʼ khon, hẽ, eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme." 
Psalms144:8 Onkoakʼ moca do phạsiạrate perecʼgea; onko do jojom ti tulkate ạuṛiyakʼko kiriạkʼa. 
Psalms144:9 E Isor, am ńutumte nãwãnakʼ iń sereńa; ar gel taranakʼ banamte amiń oṛhẽ sereńama." 
Psalms144:10 Am do rapajkom jitạu ocoyetʼkoa; amren golam Dạud hõ tarwaṛe reakʼ ti khonem rukhiyạedekana. 
Psalms144:11 Rukhiyạyińme, ar eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ ti khon bańcaoińme; onkoakʼ moca do phạsiạrate perecʼgea; onko do jojom ti tulkate ạuṛiyakʼko kiriạkʼa." 
Psalms144:12 Aleren hoponko do juạn jokhecʼre dare lekako harakʼma, ar aleren hoponerako do raj dolanre rokʼ kundạo akatʼ tham khunṭi lekako hoyokʼma." 
Psalms144:13 Aleakʼ murạiko do joto lekan jomakʼte perecʼ tahenma; ar aleren bhiḍiko do gupi ṭạnḍire hajar hajar ar lakh lakh hoponko janamko ma.
