Psalms144:14 Aleren ḍaṅgrako do hamal hamal bojhako or daṛeakʼma; ar aleakʼ bhitko jemon alo paṛagokʼtale, okoe hõ jemon aloko bondi ocokʼ, ar horkore jemon dukokʼko reakʼ rakʼ alo ańjomokʼ." 
Psalms144:15 Bhạgangeako onko jạtrenko, okoe do nonkako hoyokʼkan. Bhạgangeako onko jạtrenko, one okoeren Probhu doe Isorkan." 
Psalms145:1 E ińren Isor, E raj, iń do amiń sereńama; iń do jaejugiń sarhaomea." 
Psalms145:2 Din hilokʼ iń do amiń sarhaomea; ar jaejug amiń gun manao joharama. 
Psalms145:3 Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea ar joto khon sarhaoanicʼ lek kanae; okoe hõ uniyakʼ maraṅtetʼ do bako bhujhạu daṛeakʼa. 
Psalms145:4 Mitʼ piṛhiren do eṭakʼ piṛhiren hoṛko ṭhen amakʼ kạmi reakʼko sarhao sereńa; onko do amakʼ daṛeanakʼ kạmi reakʼ kathako lại jạhira. 
Psalms145:5 Amakʼ man reakʼ mạhimawanakʼ ṭhonok kạnạń iń do amakʼ hahaṛawakʼko reaṅiń ganḍon joṅa. 
Psalms145:6 Hoṛko do amakʼ botoranakʼ hahaṛa daṛe kạmi reakʼ kathako roṛa, ar iń do amakʼ maraṅtetʼ iń lại sodora." 
Psalms145:7 Ar am tinạkʼem bhạlại akatʼko onko do onako lại baṛaea, ar amakʼ dhorom reakʼ kathakote rạskạteko sereńa." 
Psalms145:8 Probhu Isor do daya are mãyãwạnicʼ kana; uni do usạrate bae edre hodokʼa ar uniyakʼ dulạṛ do asambheṛgetaea. 
Psalms145:9 Probhu Isor do sanamko lạgitʼe bhạlạiyạnicʼ kana; uniyakʼ sirjạu reakʼ jotowakʼ cetanre mãyã menakʼtaea. 
Psalms145:10 E Probhu Isor, am okam sirjạu akatʼ onako do amgeye sarhaomea; ar am botoram kanko do amko gun manao joharama." 
Psalms145:11 Onko do amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ katha ar amakʼ daṛe reakʼ kathako roṛa; 
Psalms145:12 Jemon sanam manwa do amakʼ daṛete perecʼ kạmi reakʼ kathako baḍae daṛeakʼ, ar amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ mạhima hõ." 
Psalms145:13 Amakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug reakʼ rajosṭi kana; amakʼ ḍanṭao do piṛhi cetan piṛhige. 
Psalms145:14 Okoeko ńurokʼkan Probhu Isor do onkoe sapʼ sambṛaoetʼkoa; ar okoeko laḍe akan onko doe sojheyetʼkoa. 
Psalms145:15 As kate sanamkoge am secʼko beṅgetʼakada; am do ṭhik okterege jomakʼem emako kana. 
Psalms145:16 Sanam jiwiyankoakʼ mon reakʼ sana am do ti tiạr katem purạuetʼtakoa. 
Psalms145:17 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sanam horreye dhoromgea, ar sanam kạmireye pạtiạrgea." 
Psalms145:18 Okoe Probhu Isorko hohowae, ar ontorteko hohowae kan, uni do onko ṭhengeye tahenkana." 
Psalms145:19 Okoe uniko botoraekan onkoakʼ monejoṅakʼ doe purạuetʼtakoa; ar goṛowako lạgitʼ onkoakʼ rakʼ ańjomte onkoe rukhiyạyetʼkoa. 
Psalms145:20 Okoe Probhu Isorko dulạṛe uni do onko sanamkoe rukhiyạkoa, menkhan sanam bạṛicʼko uni doe ḍahao maraokoa." 
Psalms145:21 Ińakʼ moca do Probhu Isorakʼgeye sarhao sereńa; ar sanam jiwiyanko do piṛhike piṛhi uniyakʼ sonottetʼko sarhaotaea. 
Psalms146:1 Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. E ińakʼ jiwi, Probhu Isorge gun manao joharaeme." 
Psalms146:2 Iń do goṭa jionge Probhu Isoriń sarhaoea; tinạkʼ din jiwetʼ iń tahena unạkʼ din Isorgeń sarhao sereńaea. 
Psalms146:3 Jãhãn cetan hudạren hoṛ se jãhãe manwa cetanre ape do alope ṭehãḍokʼa; onko do bako bańcao daṛeapea. 
Psalms146:4 Onkoakʼ jiwi oḍoklen tako khan onko do hasareko mesaokʼa, ar enhilokʼge onkoakʼ joto lekan goṭawakʼ do cabakʼtakoa." 
Psalms146:5 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do Jakobren Isore goṛowae kan, okoeyakʼ as do uniren Probhu Isorre." 
Psalms146:6 Probhu Isor do serma ar ot ar jalapuri ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼe sirjạu akada; uni do jaejug hạbicʼe pạtiạrgea. 
Psalms146:7 Uni do santao ocokʼkanko hok reakʼe bicạrtakoa ar reṅgecʼko do jomakʼe emakokana; Probhu Isorge bondi akankoe chaḍaoetʼkoa. 
Psalms146:8 Probhu Isor do kãṛãko ńeńel reakʼ daṛeye emako kana; ar kuḍbur akanko doe sojheyetʼkoa; Probhu Isor do dhorom hoṛkoe dulạṛetʼkoa. 
Psalms146:9 Probhu Isor do upriạ hoṛko hõe beṅgetʼako kana uni do ṭuạ̃r amar ar rạndikoe ńel todarotetʼkoa, menkhan bạṛicʼkoakʼ hor doe konḍeayetʼtakoa." 
Psalms146:10 Probhu Isor do jaejug hạbicʼe rajokʼa; E Sion, piṛhike piṛhi amren Isor doe rajokʼa. Probhu Isorakgeʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms147:1 Probhuakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Aboren Isor oṛhẽ sereńae do bhagegea! Ona do samani mońj! Uni gun manao joharae do lek kangea! 
Psalms147:2 Probhu Isorge Jerusalem doe benao rakaba; ar unige chirchạtur akan Israelkoe jarwakoa. 
Psalms147:3 Rạputʼ monanko doe bogeyetʼkoa; ar onkoakʼ sanam ghaokoe tolkatako kana. 
Psalms147:4 Uni do ipilkoe lekhayetʼkoa ar mimitʼko ńutum ńumkateye hohowako kana. 
Psalms147:5 Aboren Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea, ar uniyakʼ daṛe do ḍhergea; uniyakʼ bud ar akel reakʼ mucạtʼtetʼ do bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Psalms147:6 Probhu Isor do mạ̃hirkoe diṛhoyetʼkoa, menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛko do otreye giḍikako kana." 
Psalms147:7 Ape do Probhu gunmanao joharaete sereńaepe; ar banamate aboren Isorakʼ ńutumte sarhao sereńpe. 
Psalms147:8 Uni do rimilte sermae esetʼeda; ar dhạrti lạgitʼ dakʼe koleda ar burure ghãse janam ocoyeda. 
Psalms147:9 Uni do janwarko jomakʼe danako kana; bhonḍa kạhu hoponkoko ragre onkohõ jomakʼe emako kana. 
Psalms147:10 Uni do sadom reakʼ daṛe hõ bae hạ̃sakʼa, ar lạṛhạyicʼ reakʼ jaṅga hõ bae bạsutakʼ kana;" 
Psalms147:11 menkhan okoe uniko botorae ar uniyakʼ dulạṛre asko dohoyetʼ, onko iạtege Probhu Isor doe rạskạkʼa." 
Psalms147:12 E Jerusalem, Probhu Isor sarhao sereńaeme; E Sion, amren Isor gun manao joharaeme." 
Psalms147:13 Uni do amakʼ phaṭok duạrkoe horhoyetʼtama, ar amre girobasokʼkan hoṛkoe bhorako kana." 
Psalms147:14 Amakʼ simạnakore unige sạjạiye dohoyeda, ar joto khon bhage guhumteye tirpitetʼme kana." 
Psalms147:15 Uni do dhạrtire acʼakʼ hukume koleda; ar ona do ạḍi usạrage manaokʼ kana. 
Psalms147:16 Uni do bhiḍi upʼ leka hime koleda ar torocʼ leka sisir dakʼe chiṭiạueda. 
Psalms147:17 Uni do piṭhạ kecakʼ leka arele ńur ocoyeda; uni emakʼ rabaṅ do okoeye sahao daṛekea? 
Psalms147:18 Acʼakʼ kathae koletʼte uni do arele leyeda; ar acʼakʼ hoeye hoe ocoyre dakʼe ạtu ocoyeda. 
Psalms147:19 Uni do Jakob ṭhen acʼakʼ kathae sodor akada, ar Israelko ṭhen hõ acʼakʼ ạn ạrikoe doho akada." 
Psalms147:20 Eṭakʼ jạtrenko lạgitʼ do bae onka akada; onko do uniyakʼ ạn ạriko bako baḍaea. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms148:1 Probhu Isorakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Serma khon ape do Probhu Isor sarhaoepe; Coṭakʼkore uni sarhaoepe. 
Psalms148:2 E uniren sanam serma goḍetko, uniyakʼ sarhao sereńpe; E uniren sanam daṛeanko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:3 E siń cando ar ńindạ cando, uni sarhaoepe; E jhak jhakaokʼkan ipilko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:4 E serma, uni sarhaoeme; E serma cetan reakʼ dakʼ, uni sarhaoeme." 
Psalms148:5 Onko sanamkoge Probhu Isorko sarhaoema, ente uniye hukumkeda arko sirjạuena." 
Psalms148:6 Onko do jaejug lạgitʼ niṭ akatʼ jaegareko ṭarhao akana; uni do mitʼṭecʼe niạm akada, ona do okoe hõ bako rạputʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Psalms148:7 E dhạrtiren hoṛko ape do Probhu Isor sarhaoepe. E jalapuriren napṛakʼ napṛakʼ jiwiyanko ar jalapuri reakʼ khạndriyakʼko uni sarhaoepe. 
Psalms148:8 E bijli ar arel, him ar kuṛhạ ar uniyakʼ hukum senakʼ birbão uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:9 E sanam buru boṭkocʼ ar joanakʼ dareko ar sanam debdạru dareko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:10 E bir janwar ar sanam ạsul janwarko ar lacʼte taṛamko ar phạ̃kṛãkʼan jiwiyanko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:11 E dhạrtiren rajko ar sanam jạtrenko ar rapajko ar disạm cakʼlao banaoko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:12 E Juạn koṛa kuṛiko ar haṛam buḍhiko ar gidrạko, uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms148:13 Onko jotoge Probhu Isorko sarhaoema, ente eken unigeye maraṅa; Ot ar serma cetanre uniyakʼ mạhima menakʼa." 
Psalms148:14 Uni do acʼren hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ dereńe rakapʼ akada; mitʼṭecʼ sarhaokʼage acʼren bhoktoko lạgitʼ, Israelko lạgitʼ acʼ sorre menakʼko hoṛko lạgitʼ. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma." 
Psalms149:1 Probhu Isor sarhaoepe. Ar Probhu Isor ńutumte nãwã sereń sereńpe, Isor okoeko botorae kan onkoakʼ sabhare uniyakʼ sarhao sereńpe." 
Psalms149:2 Israel do acʼren sisirjạuicʼ iạteye rạskạkʼma, Sionren hoṛko do onkoren raj iạteko kusikʼma." 
Psalms149:3 Onko do enecʼ enecʼte uniko sarhao sereńae ma, tabla ar banamte uniko õṛhẽyema;" 
Psalms149:4 Ente Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko iạteye rạskạkʼa; uni do mạ̃hir hoṛko bańcaokateye manotkoa. 
Psalms149:5 Noa manot ńamkate Isor botoraeko doko rạskạkʼma; onko do apan ạpin aṭetʼre rạskạteko sereńma. 
Psalms149:6 Onkoakʼ mocare Isorakʼ sarhao sereń baṛe tahenma ar tire do banar secʼ dharanakʼ tarwaṛege," 
Psalms149:7 jemon onko do jạtrenko cetanreko hala ruạṛ daṛeakʼ ar onko hoṛko sạjại daṛeako," 
Psalms149:8 ar sikṛite onkoren rajkoko tolko, ar onkoren cetan hudạren hoṛko mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ biṛitekoe tol daṛeako," 
Psalms149:9 ar onko upạrte bicạrre oka ray ol akan ona kạmireko lagao daṛeakʼ. Ar noako jotowakʼ do uniren sanam bhoktokoakʼ mạhima kana. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Psalms150:1 Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. Ape do Isorakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ire uni sarhaoepe, ar uniyakʼ daṛete benaoakʼ serma hõ uniyakʼe sarhaotae ma." 
Psalms150:2 Uniyakʼ daṛete perecʼ kạmi iạte uniyakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtaema, ar uniyakʼ bin mucạtʼ mãyã iạte uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms150:3 Sakwa oroṅte uni sarhaoepe, peṛesaṅ ar binạ banamkote uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms150:4 Tabla ruwate enecʼ enecʼte uni sarhaoepe, taranakʼ banam ar tạriạ oroṅate uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms150:5 Kajak saḍekan kortalte uni sarhaoepe, ar chaṅ chaṅokʼkan kortalte uni sarhaoepe." 
Psalms150:6 Sahẽtʼetʼkan sanam jiwiyanko do Probhu Isorko sarhaoema. Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma. 
Proverbs1:1 Dạudren hopon Israelren raj Solomonakʼ dhorom sopolha. 
Proverbs1:2 Noako ol hoyakana jemon hoṛko do bhage bud ar cecetʼakʼko ńam, jemon onkoakʼ bud bicạr baḍhaokʼtako," 
Proverbs1:3 ar jemon eṭakʼko sãote hudiskateko calakʼ, jemon onko do jotoko tulucʼ lek leka, hok ar dhorom salakʼko beohar," 
Proverbs1:4 jemon lelha hoṛ do budanko hoyokʼ ar juạnko do bud ar ạkilko ńam," 
Proverbs1:5 Ạkilan hoṛ do noa sopolhako ańjomma arko cetʼjoṅ ma. Ar budanko do ańjomkate calakʼ horreko gạkhuṛokʼma. 
Proverbs1:6 Jemon hoṛko do phen reakʼ kathako ar khạndri reakʼ kathako ar ạkilankoakʼ kathako ar kudumko bujhạu daṛeakʼ. 
Proverbs1:7 Probhu Isor botorae do ạkil reakʼ etohopʼ kana, menkhan lelha hoṛ do ạkil ar sikhạunako nihạ̃tetʼ kana." 
Proverbs1:8 E bạbu, ạpumakʼ solha baṛe ańjomtaeme; ar eṅgamakʼ cecetʼakʼko do alom phesṛao giḍikakʼa." 
Proverbs1:9 Onako do amakʼ bohokʼ lạgitʼ ṭhosok mukuṭ ar hoṭokʼ reakʼ do mala kana. 
Proverbs1:10 E gidrạtiń, kạkại hoṛ bạṛicʼ horteko idilem khan alogem rebenokʼa." 
Proverbs1:11 Jãhãegeye metam, “Dela ale sãote hijukʼme, ar khũn lạgitʼ dela tãṛãkʼ akae bon tahenma, ar miridos hoṛ sabe lạgitʼ dela bon coko hataṛokʼma." 
Proverbs1:12 Onko do jiwetʼ hoṛmowante cetʼleka patal purite, metatʼme ona khạndṛuṅteko pheḍokʼkan, onkage dela, abo do jiwetʼte onko bon utʼgotʼkakoma;" 
Proverbs1:13 enḍekhan damanakʼ jinisko bon ńamjoṅa, ar luṭakʼ jiniskote aboakʼ oṛakʼ duạr bon perejtabona." 
Proverbs1:14 Amakʼ bhạg do ale sãotege dohoyme, ar aboakʼ ṭaka reakʼ thạilạkʼ do mitʼṭecʼge tahenma.”" 
Proverbs1:15 E bạbu, onko tulucʼ do alom calakʼa, ar onko khon do sahaṛ akae tahenme;" 
Proverbs1:16 ente onkoakʼ jaṅga do kại secʼge ńir calakʼ kana, ar mãyãm joro ocoy lạgitʼko thare marekʼ kana." 
Proverbs1:17 Hoṛko mena, “Ńeńelkan cẽṛẽ samaṅre pạsi oḍao do nahakgea.”" 
Proverbs1:18 Noko hoṛ do akotege khũnokʼ lạgitʼko tãṛãgokʼ kana, ar ḍhao maraokʼ lạgitʼ apnargeko oko tahenkana." 
Proverbs1:19 Bạṛicʼ upạite jãhãnakʼ lab lạgitʼ okoeko dạdạrkan onko sanamkoakʼ dosa do onkage hoyokʼtakoa; ar okako lab onate onkoakʼ jion do nosṭokʼtakoa. 
Proverbs1:20 Ạkil do hor horte ãṭ aṛanteye hohoyeda, ar bajarkore aṛaṅe ańjom ocoyeda." 
Proverbs1:21 Uni do ãṭ aṛaṅte rão rão kulhikore dobạṭiạkoreye hohoyeda, ar nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ jokhecʼe meneda," 
Proverbs1:22 “E lelha hoṛko, ape do ar tinạkʼ din apeakʼ lelhatetʼpe dulạṛa? landa dhudhutʼko do ar tinạkʼ din onare rạskạko ńama? Ar bebujko hõ ar tinạkʼ din ạkilko kurudakʼa?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ińakʼ ḍanṭaope luturakʼ khan, ińren Jiu do apereń dulkea, ar ińakʼ mon reakʼ kathań baḍae ocokepea." 
Proverbs1:24 Apeń hohowatʼpere ape do bape hetawatʼtińạ, ar tiyiń ạwilletʼre okoe hõ bape moneyada." 
Proverbs1:25 Ape do ińakʼ hukumkoge bape hetawatʼa, doskoń udukʼatʼpere hõ bape aṅgocleda," 
Proverbs1:26 Unre apeakʼ maraokʼ ńelte iń doń landaya, ar muhinrepe paṛaolenre apeakʼ tamasań ńela." 
Proverbs1:27 Muhin do birbão leka apere hecʼlenre, ar hoedakʼ lekae oṭaṅ idilepere, gạr ar dukrepe unumlenre, unre iń do tamasań ńela." 
Proverbs1:28 “Unre bebujkoko hohoạńạ menkhan bạń moneyakoa; ińko ńam baṛayińạ menkhan bako ńam daṛeạńạ. 
Proverbs1:29 Onko do ạkilko kurud akawada ar Probhu Isor botorae hõ bako khojleda. 
Proverbs1:30 Ona iạte onko do ińakʼ solha hõ bako ataṅleda, samka sạṭikʼ lạgitʼ okań menletʼ ona do jaṅgateko lebetʼ gańjaokeda;" 
Proverbs1:31 Akoakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại doko ńamgea, ar apnarakʼ sopolha reakʼ jotege lacʼko perejtakoa." 
Proverbs1:32 Lelha hoṛ do muhinteko calakʼge onkoakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼa, bebujko do akoakʼ nicindokʼgeye ḍahao maraokoa;" 
Proverbs1:33 Menkhan okoe ińakʼ kathako ańjom onko do khạtirjomako girobasokʼa; onko do sulukteko tahena, ar bạṛicʼakʼ do bako botorakʼa.”" 
Proverbs2:1 E bạbu, ińakʼ katha baṛem ańjomletiń khan ar amakʼ ontorre ińakʼ sanam hukumkom bae dohokakʼ khan," 
Proverbs2:2 ar ạkil secʼ monem bitʼ letam khan ar buj secʼ monem ạwil letam khan," 
Proverbs2:3 hẽ bud lạgitʼem hohole khan ar ãṭ aṛaṅte bujem hohoae khan," 
Proverbs2:4 ar rupạ ńam baṛae leka ạkilem ńam baṛae khan ar okowakʼ dhon lekam sendra baṛale khan," 
Proverbs2:5 enḍekhan Probhu Isor botorae do cetʼkana mente, onam bujhạu daṛeakʼa ar Isorakʼ ạkilem ńama;" 
Proverbs2:6 ente Probhu Isorge ạkil doe emokʼ kana, uniyakʼ moca khonge bud ar ạkil do oḍokokʼ kana." 
Proverbs2:7 Uni do khạṭi ontorren hoṛko lạgitʼ bude jogao dohoyeda; ar dhoromte okoeko calakʼkan, onkoren ḍhale hoyokʼte" 
Proverbs2:8 uni do dhorom reakʼ bicạre doho daṛeakʼ, ar uni botoraekankoakʼ hore rukhiyạ daṛeakʼ." 
Proverbs2:9 Ińakʼ katham ańjomle tiń khan, enḍekhan okaṭakʼ do lek reakʼ, okaṭakʼ do hok reakʼ, okaṭakʼ do dhorom reakʼ ar okaṭakʼ do bhạlại reakʼkan ona jotowakʼ reakʼ horkom bujhạu daṛeakʼa;" 
Proverbs2:10 ente ạkil do amakʼ ontorre bolokʼa, ar bud do amakʼ jiwiye rạskạ ocoytama." 
Proverbs2:11 Amakʼ boge bạṛicʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛegeye rukhiyạmea, ar buj do ame pahramea." 
Proverbs2:12 Ạkilge am do bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ hor khone rukhiyạmea; hẽ onko khongeye rukhiyạmea okoe do eṛe kathako roṛ," 
Proverbs2:13 ar ńut horte calakʼ iạte sojhe horko bạgiyakʼkan," 
Proverbs2:14 okoe do bạṛicʼakʼ kạmireko rạskạkʼkan, okoe do phepṛa horreko rạskạkʼkan," 
Proverbs2:15 ar okoe do konḍeya ar bạṛicʼ horteko calakʼkan. 
Proverbs2:16 Ạkilge am do loṭghuṭi reakʼ ti khone rukhiyạmea, ar sebel sebel kathaye roṛetʼkan bạṛicʼ maejiuakʼ ti khon hõ." 
Proverbs2:17 Uni do juạn okterege jãwãetetʼe bạgi akadea ar Isorakʼ bondobose bebatao akada. 
Proverbs2:18 Am do uniyakʼ oṛakʼtem bololen khan gujukʼ secʼem lahakʼa, ar uni tulucʼem soṅgelen khan gujukʼko ṭhenem seṭerokʼa." 
Proverbs2:19 Okoe uni ṭhenko calakʼ onko do ar tisge bako ruạṛ hijukʼa, onko do bańcaokʼ reakʼ hor bako ńama." 
Proverbs2:20 Ạkilge onako khone rukhiyạmea jemon bhage hoṛkoakʼ horte, Isor botoraekankoakʼ hortem taṛam daṛeakʼ." 
Proverbs2:21 Dhorom hoṛge disạmreko girobasokʼa, ar miridos hoṛ hõ onareko ṭikạu tahena;" 
Proverbs2:22 menkhan disạm khon bạṛicʼko doko kaman ocokʼa ar bepạtiạrko doko or totʼ giḍi ocokʼa. 
Proverbs3:1 E bạbu, ińakʼ sikhnạt do alom hiṛińa, amakʼ goṭa ontorre ińakʼ hukumko dohoyme;" 
Proverbs3:2 onate am do ḍher dinem bahaokʼa ar amakʼ do ḍher bhạlại hoyokʼtama. 
Proverbs3:3 Pạtiạr ar dhorom do tishõ aloe bạgiwam ma; amakʼ hoṭokʼre onako bedhao dohokakʼme, ar amakʼ ontorre hõ ol dohokakʼme." 
Proverbs3:4 Onam onkale khan Isor ar manwa samaṅre am do daya ar ńutum hoyokʼtama. 
Proverbs3:5 Amakʼ goṭa ontorte Probhu Isorre bhorsa akae tahenme; ar amakʼ bujre do alom bhorsakʼa. 
Proverbs3:6 Amakʼ calakʼ horre uni do samaṅre dohokaeme; unige amakʼ sanam horkoe sojheytama. 
Proverbs3:7 Apnar mẽtʼre budan do alom hoyokʼa; Probhu Isor botoraeme, ar bạṛicʼakʼ khon pharakre tahenme." 
Proverbs3:8 Inạ khan amakʼ hoṛmo lạgitʼ bhage hoyokʼa ar jaṅko hõ keṭejokʼtama. 
Proverbs3:9 Am do amakʼ dhon duribko reakʼ ar amakʼ phosolko reakʼ pạhilakʼ hĩsko Probhu Isor samaṅaeme ar manot emaeme; 
Proverbs3:10 Inạ khan amakʼ murạiko do phosolkote perejokʼtama ar hanḍhako khon nãwã darkha rasa hõ buhel oḍokokʼa. 
Proverbs3:11 E bạbu, Probhu Isorakʼ ḍanṭao baṛe moneyakʼme, uniye egerlemre alom ạtruńokʼa;" 
Proverbs3:12 ente apat cetʼleka acʼren hopone egere onkage Probhu Isor hõ acʼ okoeye dulạṛe unigeye egerea. 
Proverbs3:13 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do ạkile ńam bakʼṛakan ar buje hameṭ joṅkan," 
Proverbs3:14 ente onare do rupạ reakʼ bạnij khon hõ bạ̃ṛti lab menakʼa, ar sona khon hõ ḍher lab hoyokʼa;" 
Proverbs3:15 Mạnikko khon hõ ạkil do bạ̃ṛti damangea, amakʼ khojakʼ leka jãhãnakʼ jinis tulucʼ ona reakʼ juri do oho hoylena." 
Proverbs3:16 Uniyakʼ jojom tire do ḍher bahaokʼ din menakʼa ar leṅga tire do dhon ar manot menakʼtaea. 
Proverbs3:17 Ona horre do rạskạ menakʼa, ar ona reakʼ sanam horrege bhạlại menakʼa." 
Proverbs3:18 Okoe uniye sabe onko ṭhen do jion dare leka; ar okoe unireko sapʼ kajak akae tahen onko do bhorko ńama. 
Proverbs3:19 Probhu Isorakʼ ạkilte dhạrti do bạisạu akana, ar uniyakʼ bujte serma doe bandhao akada." 
Proverbs3:20 Uni do ạkilte ot latar khon dakʼe oḍok ocoyeda, ar serma khon ṭhopʼ ṭhopʼ sisir dakʼe ńur ocoyeda." 
Proverbs3:21 E bạbu, bud ar ạkil dohojoṅme, ar onage moneyakʼme." 
Proverbs3:22 Ona do amakʼ jiwi lạgitʼ jion hoyokʼa, ar amakʼ hoṭokʼ lạgitʼ do mońj okocʼ malage." 
Proverbs3:23 Unre am do amakʼ horkore khạtirjomam tahena, ar amakʼ jaṅga do bam tohodokʼtama." 
Proverbs3:24 Gitijokʼre ar do bam botorokʼa, ar amakʼ jạpitʼ hõ suk reakʼ hoyokʼtama." 
Proverbs3:25 Ar ackage muhin hecʼlenre alom botorokʼa, ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ḍahao maraokʼ ńelte hõ alom botorokʼa;" 
Proverbs3:26 Ente am do Probhu Isor cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana, ar uni do pạsi khon amakʼ jaṅgae rukhiyại tama." 
Proverbs3:27 Okoe bhạlại ńam lạgitʼko lek kan onko bhạlạiko lạgitʼ tinre daṛe tahen tama unre ona onkae do alom baṅa. 
Proverbs3:28 Goṛowako lạgitʼ daṛe tahentam khan okoe hõ alom metakoa, “Do calakʼme, ar tayomte hijukʼme, gapań emama.”" 
Proverbs3:29 Am aḍepaseren hoṛko upạrte jãhãn bạṛicʼakʼ alom cekaea, ente am pheḍren uni do khạtirjomae girobasokʼ kana." 
Proverbs3:30 Jãhãe hoṛ amakʼ jãhãnakʼ bae lokshanetʼtam khan uni do ạuṛiyakʼte alom dusi ocoyea. 
Proverbs3:31 Jor julumicʼ jãhãeyem ńellere uni do alom hiskạwaea, se uniyakʼ jãhãn hor hõ alom bachaojoṅa;" 
Proverbs3:32 ente Probhu Isor do konḍea horte calakʼ hoṛ doe kurudakoa, menkhan khạṭi ontorren hoṛko tulucʼ do helmele dohoyeda." 
Proverbs3:33 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ oṛakʼre Probhu Isorakʼ sarap tahena, menkhan Isor botoraekoakʼ oṛakʼ doe bhor atakoa." 
Proverbs3:34 Ṭiṭkạrikan hoṛko doe ṭiṭkạriakoa, menkhan nindhạnko doe dayawakoa." 
Proverbs3:35 Ạkilan hoṛ do manotko ńama, menkhan bebujko do lajaoreko paṛaokʼa." 
Proverbs4:1 E hoponko, aperen babawakʼ hukum luturakʼpe, ar ạkil ńam lạgitʼ moneyakʼpe." 
Proverbs4:2 Iń do bhage sikhnạtiń emape kana, onate ińakʼ hukum bebataoko do alope hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs4:3 Iń hõ coṅ iń babaren hoponiń tahẽkan, ar gogowakʼ mẽtʼre do huḍiń ar sadher hopon lekage." 
Proverbs4:4 Unre iń baba doe cetʼạń tahẽkanteye menetʼ tahẽkana, “Amakʼ goṭa ontorte ińakʼ kathako sapʼ dohokakʼme; ar ińakʼ hukumko dohoyme, onate jiwetʼem tahena." 
Proverbs4:5 Ạkil hameṭ joṅme, ar bud hataome; ar ińakʼ katha do alomgem hiṛińa, ona khon alom ocogokʼa." 
Proverbs4:6 Ạkil do alom bạgi giḍiyakʼa, onage am doe horho jaṅgemea; ona dulạṛme, onageye rukhiyạmea." 
Proverbs4:7 Ạkilge asolakʼ do ạkil hatao joṅme; ar amakʼ menakʼakʼkote buj kiriń joṅme. 
Proverbs4:8 Ạkil dulạṛme, onage am doe usulmea; ona sapʼ dohoyeme, onage am doe manotmea." 
Proverbs4:9 Ona do amakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ mońj dạhṛi hoyokʼa ar kuṛại lekate mońj mukuṭe emama.” 
Proverbs4:10 E bạbu, ańjomme, ińakʼ katha ontorre dohokakʼme, inạkhan ḍher bochor jiwetʼem tahena." 
Proverbs4:11 Iń do ạkil reakʼ horiń udukʼ akawatʼmea, ar sojhe horteń ạyuretʼmea." 
Proverbs4:12 Onate amakʼ taṛam horre bam kucitokʼa, ar ńir senokʼre hõ bam tohodokʼa." 
Proverbs4:13 Solha sapʼ dohoyme, alom bạgiyakʼa; ona rukhiyạime, ente onage amakʼ jion kana." 
Proverbs4:14 Bạṛicʼkoakʼ horte alomgem calakʼa, ar bedhorom hoṛkoakʼ horte hõ alom taṛama." 
Proverbs4:15 Ona hor do sa parom gotʼkakʼme, onate hõ alom taṛama; ona horte sen baṅkate laha secʼ sen idikʼme;" 
Proverbs4:16 Ente bạṛicʼ hoṛ do baṛicʼakʼ bako kạmile khan bako jạpitʼ daṛeakʼa; ar jãhãe bako tạkicʼ ocoleko khan mẽtʼ hõ baṅ jạpidokʼtakoa. 
Proverbs4:17 Phạsiạratetʼ do onkoakʼ jomakʼ ar santao do onkoakʼ ńũńũakʼ kana. 
Proverbs4:18 Isor botoraekan hoṛkoakʼ hor do aṅga hijukʼkan marsal leka, one ạuri tikinokʼ hạbicʼ tạpis khon arhõ tạpis idikʼkan." 
Proverbs4:19 Menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ hor do kaṛaṅ ńut; onko do bako baḍaea cetʼreko tohodokʼ kana mente. 
Proverbs4:20 E bạbu, iń okań metamkan ona moneyakʼme, ar ińakʼ katha luturakʼtiń me." 
Proverbs4:21 Kathako do am khon alom danaṅ ocowakʼa, ona do amakʼ ontorre rebetʼ dohoyme." 
Proverbs4:22 Okoe nonkanakʼko kạmiyetʼ onko lạgitʼ do jion kana, ar ona doe logno ocoyetʼkoa." 
Proverbs4:23 Jotowakʼ khon amakʼ ontorge pahra dohoyme, ente ontor khonge amakʼ jion reakʼ jotowakʼ do oḍokʼ hijukʼa." 
Proverbs4:24 Amakʼ moca khon peṛta kathako sạṅgińkakʼme, ar luṭi khon bạṛicʼ kathako hõ pharakme." 
Proverbs4:25 Amakʼ mẽtʼ do sojhete jemone beṅgetʼkakʼ, ar amakʼ ńeńel do samaṅ secʼ baṛe hoyokʼma." 
Proverbs4:26 Amakʼ jaṅgakin reakʼ ḍahar moneyakʼme, inạ khan amakʼ sanam horko do kajakokʼtama." 
Proverbs4:27 Jojom ti secʼ se leṅga ti secʼ alom ghańjeṛokʼa; ar bạṛicʼ khon amakʼ jaṅga sahaṛ akae dohoytam. 
Proverbs5:1 E bạbu, ạkil reakʼ oka kathań lạiyam kan ona baṛe mońjte ańjomtińme; ińakʼ buj reakʼ katha luturakʼme." 
Proverbs5:2 Onate am do boge bạṛicʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛem ńama, ar amakʼ moca khon ạkil do oḍokʼ hijukʼa." 
Proverbs5:3 Bạṛicʼ maejuakʼ luṭi khon do rasa jorokʼkana, ar uniyakʼ alaṅ do sunum khon hõ cikạ̃ṛgetaea;" 
Proverbs5:4 menkhan sesre uni do hewer haṛhatʼgeye hoyokʼa, ar banar secʼ dharanakʼ tarwaṛe lekage." 
Proverbs5:5 Uniyakʼ jaṅga do moron secʼ pheḍ calakʼ kantaea, ona do sojhe Sheol secʼge calakʼ kana." 
Proverbs5:6 Jion secʼakʼ hor do bae moneyakʼa; uniyakʼ calakʼ hor do baṅ sojhetaea, ar do ona bae baḍaea." 
Proverbs5:7 E hoponińko, ńitokʼ do ińakʼ katha ańjompe, ar okaṭakʼ iń menetʼkan ona khon alope ocogokʼa." 
Proverbs5:8 Uni maeju khon amakʼ jaṅga do sahaṛ akae dohoytam,, ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr sorte hõ alom calakʼa;" 
Proverbs5:9 ar baṅkhan amakʼ ṭhonok do eṭakʼ hoṛem emakoa ar amakʼ bahaokʼ din do kurmutạhakoakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Proverbs5:10 Onate ạ̃nạ̃ṛi hoṛ do amakʼ dhonko joma, ar amakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ jo do eṭakʼkoakʼ oṛakʼte calakʼa." 
Proverbs5:11 Jion reakʼ sesa sisire amakʼ hoṛmo ar jel do nosṭokʼtama unre am dom kuhrạua. 
Proverbs5:12 Amem mena, “Hae! Iń do ḍanṭaoiń kurud akada, ar ińakʼ ontor do sudhrạukʼ reakʼ kathae nihạ̃t akada." 
Proverbs5:13 Ińren gurukoakʼ katha bạń ańjomleda, ar ińko cetʼạdiń tahẽkankoakʼ katha bạń luturatʼ tahẽkana." 
Proverbs5:14 Somajren hoṛkoakʼ tire paṛaokate iń doń gujukʼkan tahẽkana.” 
Proverbs5:15 Amakʼ kuń reakʼ dakʼ khonge am do ńũime; ar amakʼ ḍạḍi dakʼ reakʼ dakʼge ńũime. 
Proverbs5:16 Amakʼ ḍạḍi dakʼ do bahrete cedakʼ ạtu oḍokokʼa? Ar amakʼ jharna dakʼ do cedakʼ kulhikote ạtukʼa? 
Proverbs5:17 Amren hoponko do amrengeko tahenma, bạṛicʼ maejiuko do onare bhag alo tahentakoma," 
Proverbs5:18 ar amakʼ bhumbukre bhor tahenma, ar amren juạn jokhecʼren bạhu iạtege rạskạkʼme." 
Proverbs5:19 Uni do dulạṛte perecʼ, ar ńelokʼte napae jel leka; uniyakʼ sohag do jotowakʼteye purunmea. Am do jao ghuṛi unirem moṅgonokʼa." 
Proverbs5:20 E bạbu, cedakʼ am do bạṛicʼ maejiurem moṅgonokʼ kana? Ar ạ̃nạ̃ṛi maejiu do cedakʼem hạṛubea?" 
Proverbs5:21 Manwakoakʼ dãṛãn do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre menakʼa; onkoakʼ sanam horko uni doe tạnkhiyeda. 
Proverbs5:22 Bedhorom hoṛ do bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ jhạlireko paṛaokʼa, uni do apnarakʼ kại babertegeye tol ḍhumbạgokʼa." 
Proverbs5:23 Ḍanṭao bae senakʼte uni doe gujukʼa; Ar acʼakʼ maraṅ lelhatetʼ iạte uni doe sen adokʼa. 
Proverbs6:1 E bạbu, jãhãeren jạmindarem hoyakan khan, ar eṭakʼko lạgitʼ jạmindar hoyokʼ lạgitʼ hõm bandhok akan khan," 
Proverbs6:2 ar okam roṛakatʼ ona reakʼ jhạlirem paṛao akan khan, amakʼ moca reakʼ kathatem sapʼ ocoakan khan," 
Proverbs6:3 enḍekhan E bạbu, ma rukhiyạkʼme, ar chaḍaokʼ lạgitʼ uni ṭhen senkate apnar copodokʼme, ar nerha jerhakʼme," 
Proverbs6:4 amakʼ mẽtʼ do alom jạpitʼ ocowakʼa, ar mẽtʼ hõ alom hạrupʼ ocoytama." 
Proverbs6:5 Sikạriwakʼ ti khon jel hopon leka, laoṭa oḍaoicʼakʼ ti khon cẽṛẽ leka am do paskao oḍokokʼme." 
Proverbs6:6 E asketicʼ, mucʼko ṭhen calakʼme, ar onkoakʼ kạmiko ạṛi bạndhiyte ạkil cetʼjoṅme." 
Proverbs6:7 Onko hukumako reakʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa, onko cetanre jãhãn sordarko se mạlik hõ bạnukʼkoa;" 
Proverbs6:8 enhõ uni do niron dinre jomakʼe doho jarwayeda ar phosol samṭao jokhecʼ hõ jomakʼe jogaṛeda. 
Proverbs6:9 E asketicʼ, ar tin hạbicʼem giticʼkokʼa? Tinre jạpitʼ khon dom beretʼa?" 
Proverbs6:10 Am dom meneda, “Thoṛaganiń jạpitʼ kakʼrege, ar thoṛań giticʼ ńokʼlenge, ar ti kukucʼkate mitʼ ghạṛiń kunḍlạṅ hataṛlenge.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Menkhan mitʼ talao peṛako hecʼamre se ḍạkukoakʼ tirem paṛaolenre cetʼlekam reṅgejokʼ ṭhik onkage am hõm reṅgejokʼa. 
Proverbs6:12 Okoe hoṛ doe kharapge, are bạṛicʼge uni do bạṛicʼakʼ kathako mocateye asen baṛaea;" 
Proverbs6:13 Uni do mẽtʼ ripitʼkateye isạraya, ar jaṅgateye corhoda, ar kạṭupʼteye udukʼ baṛaea," 
Proverbs6:14 mon reakʼ phẽpṛa iạte sanam ghạṛicʼ bạṛicʼakʼ phundiye aṭaoa uni do reṭepeṭe reakʼ itạgeye er idiyeda. 
Proverbs6:15 Ona iạte ackage uni cetanre muhin do hijukʼa; ar ṭuṅ ghuṛirege uni doe marao utạrokʼa, ar bae beretʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs6:16 Probhu Isor do eae goṭecʼ jiniskoe kurudakʼkana onako do uni ṭhen hirkhạwakʼ kana; 
Proverbs6:17 bạḍạite perecʼ mẽtʼ, eṛe alaṅ, miridoskoakʼ mãyãme joro ocoyicʼ ti," 
Proverbs6:18 bạṛicʼ motlobe aṭaoyetʼkan mon, behokakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ ńir calakʼkan jaṅga," 
Proverbs6:19 eṛe roṛ ar eṛe goha emokʼicʼ, ar boehako talare gulmale ehopʼkan hoṛ." 
Proverbs6:20 E Bạbu, am babawakʼ hukumko dohoyme, ar am gogowakʼ sikhnạt hõ alom bạgiwakʼa." 
Proverbs6:21 Jaejug hạbicʼ amakʼ monre rebetʼ dohoyme, ona do amakʼ hoṭokʼre bedhaokakʼme." 
Proverbs6:22 Calakʼ jokhecʼ ona do hore udukʼama, ar jạpitʼ jokhecʼ ame horhomea arem ebhenlen khan am sãote kathae roṛa;" 
Proverbs6:23 ente noako hukum do diuhe leka, noa sikhnạt do marsal leka, ar ḍanṭao reakʼ nisṛạu do jion reakʼ horge." 
Proverbs6:24 Noako do bạṛicʼ maejiuakʼ ti khon, ar ạ̃nạ̃ṛi maejiuakʼ cikạ̃ṛ cikạ̃ṛ katha khone rukhiyạmea." 
Proverbs6:25 Uniyakʼ mońjtetʼ ńelte monre alom lalocokʼa, ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼ pipnire alom jhampa ocokʼa;" 
Proverbs6:26 ente kusmbi kuṛi do mitʼ kecakʼ piṭhạteye ạkhrińokʼa, ar laṭghaṭ maejiu do amakʼ jiwiye sendraetama." 
Proverbs6:27 Seṅgel aṅgra halaṅkate okoe apnarakʼ gochareye dohoy enḍekhan uniyakʼ kicricʼ do cetʼ baṅ lokʼtaea? 
Proverbs6:28 Ar jolokʼkan aṅgra cetante okoeye taṛam enḍekhan uniyakʼ jaṅga hõ cetʼ baṅ lokʼtaea? 
Proverbs6:29 Okoe hoṛ eṭakʼ maejiu ṭhene bolokʼ uniyakʼ dosa do onkage hoyokʼtaea; ar uni do jãhãe maejiugeye joṭede enḍekhan sạjại doe ńamtegea. 
Proverbs6:30 Reṅgecʼ jalate okoeṭakʼ hoṛe kombṛoyetʼ, uni do kombṛo iạte bako kurudaea." 
Proverbs6:31 Enhõ tinreye sapʼ ocokʼa unre hoedaṛeakʼa uni do eae dobṛa em ruạṛkakʼ hoyokʼtaea, pasecʼ acʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ joto dhon hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Proverbs6:32 Okoeye laṭghaṭ uni do buj reakʼ okulạn menakʼtaea; uni do acʼtegeye maraokʼ kana. 
Proverbs6:33 Uniyakʼ bhạgre do ghạl ar bemanot menakʼa; ar uniyakʼ durnam do tisge baṅ muchạukʼtaea; 
Proverbs6:34 ente ontor reakʼ jaljalaokʼ do jãwãetetʼakʼ edreye rakaba; ar hala hạli lạgitʼ uni do jãhãn mãyãge bae uduga. 
Proverbs6:35 Uni do jãhãn khuti purun bae ataṅa, ar ạḍi bạ̃ṛti danaere hõ bae tirpitokʼa." 
Proverbs7:1 E bạbu, ińakʼ kathako ańjomme ar ińakʼ sanam hukumko amakʼ ontorre gathao dohokakʼme." 
Proverbs7:2 Ińakʼ hukum dohoyme, ar jiwetʼ baṛe tahenme. Ińakʼ cecetʼakʼ do amakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ moni leka pahra dohoyme." 
Proverbs7:3 Amakʼ kạṭupʼkore onako bedhao dohokakʼme, ar amakʼ ontorre ol dohokakʼme." 
Proverbs7:4 Ạkil metaeme, “Am do ińren misera kanam,” Ar bud do gate kanae mente bujhạuem;" 
Proverbs7:5 ona do bạṛicʼ maejiuakʼ ti khone rukhiyạmea, ar luhum suhum katha roṛetʼkạnicʼ uni laṭghaṭicʼ maejiuakʼ ti khon hõ." 
Proverbs7:6 Iń do oṛakʼ reakʼ khiṛki duạr khon bhãora bhugạkʼ khoniń oyoṅkan tahẽkana. 
Proverbs7:7 Khaṭo bhudanko mod khoniń ńelkedea, juạnko modre mitʼṭen juạniń tạnkhikedea okoeyakʼ do khaṭo bud tahẽkantae." 
Proverbs7:8 Uni do maejiuakʼ oṛakʼ sorte kulhiteye parom calakʼkan tahẽkana, ona tayom uni do uniyakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena;" 
Proverbs7:9 Unre ạyupʼ jokhecʼ, ńuhum jokhecʼ ńindạ okte, kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutge tahẽkana." 
Proverbs7:10 Ona jokhecʼ mitʼṭen maejiu do uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena; uni do kusmbi kicricʼe horokʼ akada, ar ontor do phạsiạrate perecʼ tahẽkana." 
Proverbs7:11 Uni doe bạṛicʼ maejiu kana, ar ãṭ aṛaṅte kathae roṛeda, uniyakʼ jaṅga do oṛakʼre baṅ tahẽ thirokʼkantaea;" 
Proverbs7:12 Oka do kulhire, oka do bajarre ar oka do dobạṭiạkoreye tãṛãkʼ baṛaekana." 
Proverbs7:13 Uni do uni koṛae cokʼadea ar besorom mocateye metadea," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ińakʼ oṛakʼre dãṛẽko reakʼ jel menakʼa, teheńge iń do dãṛẽń samaṅ akatʼa." 
Proverbs7:15 Ar onate am tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ iń oḍok hecʼakana; ar amiń ńapamketʼmea. 
Proverbs7:16 Misor disạm reakʼ roṅ beroṅ kicricʼte ińakʼ aṭetʼiń sajao akada; 
Proverbs7:17 Gondhoros, oguru ar darcinite aṭetʼiń mahkao ocoakatʼa." 
Proverbs7:18 Dela, setakʼ hạbicʼ dupulạṛ telaṅ moṅgonokʼ ma, Ar khạndri dulạṛte suk laṅ bhog joṅma." 
Proverbs7:19 Ińren jãwãe do oṛakʼre bạnuiya, uni do sạṅgińte dãṛãne calao akana;" 
Proverbs7:20 uni do thạilạkʼ perecʼ ṭakae idiakada, ar kunạmi laha do oṛakʼte bae ruạṛa.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Ạḍi phuslạu kathateye bulạukedete uni do muhinteye idikedea, ar sebel sebel kathateye ạnḍicʼkedea," 
Proverbs7:22 Unre uni do maejiu tayomteye calaoena. Ḍaṅgra cetʼleka gure lạgitʼko tiyạkʼ idiye ar sikṛite tolkate pagla hoṛ cetʼleka sạjạiko ńam, onkage uni hoṛ do bae baḍaekana, noa iạte jiwi calakʼtaea mente." 
Proverbs7:23 Cẽṛẽ cetʼleka usạrate jhampateye ńir bolokʼkan ar mucạtʼre uniyakʼ kunḍire sar ạuri bolokʼ hạbicʼ onkage uni hoṛ hõ bae baḍaekana, noate jiwi do calakʼtaea mente." 
Proverbs7:24 E bạbu, ńitokʼ ińakʼ kathako ańjomtińme, ar okań metamkan ona luturakʼme." 
Proverbs7:25 Amakʼ mon do uni maejiuakʼ horte alom sen ocowakʼa, ar uniyakʼ horre hõ alom dãṛãna;" 
Proverbs7:26 ente uni do aemageye sobokʼ gur akatʼkoa, hẽ ạḍi utạrgeako uniye sumạrakatʼko do." 
Proverbs7:27 Uniyakʼ oṛakʼ do hoyokʼkana Sheolte calakʼ hor, one okaṭakʼ hor do moron reakʼ kandhateye pheḍ akan." 
Proverbs8:1 Ạkil do cetʼ bae hohoyeda? Buj do cetʼ ãṭ aṛaṅte katha bae roṛeda? 
Proverbs8:2 Hoṛ aṛe reakʼ usul jaegare okare hor do dobạṭiạre milạu akan onḍege ạkil do teṅgo akane tahena. 
Proverbs8:3 Nagrahate calakʼ horre phaṭok-duạr ṭhen uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye mena," 
Proverbs8:4 “E hoṛko, iń do apeń hohoape kana, ar sanam hoṛko ṭhen ãṭ aṛaṅteń meneda." 
Proverbs8:5 Lelha hoṛ do, budan hoyokʼ lạgitʼ ạkilko hameṭ joṅa; ar khaṭo bujan hoṛ hõ ạkilko hameṭ joṅa." 
Proverbs8:6 Ańjomme, iń do lek lekan kathań roṛa, ar khạṭi katha roṛ lạgitʼ ińakʼ mocań jhijtińạ." 
Proverbs8:7 Iń do sạri kathageń roṛa; ar bạṛicʼ katha doń hirkhạwakʼ kana, onate ona do bạń lạiya." 
Proverbs8:8 Ińakʼ moca reakʼ sanam kathako do ṭhikgea, onare peṛtawakʼ ar bạṛicʼ monsubạ do bạnukʼa." 
Proverbs8:9 Ar bujhạntar hoṛko ṭhen ińakʼ kathako do pusṭạugea; ar ạkil menakʼtako ṭhen hõ onako do khạṭigea. 
Proverbs8:10 Rupạ khon ińakʼ sikhnạtge ataṅ lạgitʼ ahkaokʼme, ar damanakʼ sona khon ạkil ńam lạgitʼge ahkaokʼme;" 
Proverbs8:11 ente morokotʼ dhiri khon hõ ạkil do damgea; amakʼ khoj leka jãhãn jinis sãote ona do oho jurilena. 
Proverbs8:12 “Iń doń ạkilangea, ińre do buj menakʼa; bidiạ ar boge bạṛicʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛe hõ ińre menakʼgea." 
Proverbs8:13 Probhu Isor botorae do bạṛicʼakʼ kurudakʼge; bạḍại, ṭenḍosokʼ, bạṛicʼ beohar ar peṛta katha iń doń kurudakʼ kana." 
Proverbs8:14 Solha ar sạri bidiạ do ińrege; buj do ińge, jor hõ ińge." 
Proverbs8:15 Rajko do iń hotete rajosṭiko calaoeda, ar mukhiyạko do hokte perecʼ ạnko benaoeda;" 
Proverbs8:16 Iń hotete rapajko ar cetan hudạren hoṛ do mạlikiko calaoeda; onko joto do bicạrakʼko kạmikana. 
Proverbs8:17 Okoe ińko dulạṛedeńkan onko do iń hõń dulạṛkoa; okoe goṭa ontorteko ńam baṛayedeńkan onko do ińko ńameńa. 
Proverbs8:18 Dhon ar man do iń khonge hijukʼa, ar thambaoakʼ dhon ar bhạlại hõ." 
Proverbs8:19 Sona khon hõ, khạṭi sona khon hõ iń emakʼ jo do bhagegea; iń okań emokʼkan ona do bachao akatʼ rupạ khon hõ khạṭigea." 
Proverbs8:20 Iń do dhorom reakʼ horteń taṛameda, ar dhorom bicạr reakʼ horreń dãṛãnkana." 
Proverbs8:21 Okoe ińko dulạṛiń onko do dhon duribko ńama; ińge onkoakʼ murạikoń perecʼkatakoa. 
Proverbs8:22 “Probhu Isor doe sirjạukedeńạ, acʼakʼ sirjạu reakʼ etohopʼre Ạd reakʼ kạmiko modre pạhilakʼge;" 
Proverbs8:23 Pạhil khonge, dhạrti ạuri sirjạure, jaejug khon iń doń dohoakana." 
Proverbs8:24 Tinre jãhãn jalapuri baṅ tahẽkana, ar dakʼte perecʼ jharna baṅ tahẽkana, unre iń doń janamlena." 
Proverbs8:25 Buru boṭkocʼko muṭhạnokʼ ạuri khongeń tahẽkana. 
Proverbs8:26 Tinre dhạrti ar ṭạnḍiko se dhạrti reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhuṛi hõ baṅ benao akan tahẽkan, un khon iń doń tahẽkana." 
Proverbs8:27 Uni do tinre sermae bạisạuetʼ tahẽkana unre iń do onḍeń tahẽkana; uni do tinre jalapuri reakʼ simạnakoe ṭhiketʼ tahẽkana, unre iń do onḍeń tahẽkana." 
Proverbs8:28 Uni do tinre cetan secʼre rimile bạisạuetʼ tahẽkana ar ot latarre jharnakoe bạisạuetʼ tahẽkana," 
Proverbs8:29 ar tinre jalapuri reakʼ simạkoe benaoetʼ tahẽkana jemon dakʼ do uniyakʼ niạm bahrete bae sen daṛeakʼ, ar tinre uni do dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼe ṭhiketʼ tahẽkana," 
Proverbs8:30 unre ińge kạrigol lekate uni aṛereń tahẽkana. Dinke din iń do kusiteń perecʼente uni samaṅre jao ghạṛicʼ iń rạskạkʼkan tahẽkana; 
Proverbs8:31 Uniyakʼ dhạrti iạteń rạskạkʼkan tahẽkana, ar manwa iạte rạskạte perecʼ iń tahẽkana." 
Proverbs8:32 “E bạbu, ńitokʼ ińakʼ katha ańjomme; okoe ińakʼ horteko calakʼkan onko doko bhạgangea." 
Proverbs8:33 Ińakʼ hukumko moneyakʼme, ar ạkilan hoyokʼme, ar alom posṛaya." 
Proverbs8:34 Okoe hoṛ ińakʼ kathako ańjom ar dinạm hilokʼ ińakʼ duạr ṭhen ebhen akane tahen ar ińakʼ silpińko ṭhene tạṅgi hataṛ uni doe bhạgangea. 
Proverbs8:35 Ente okoe ińe ńameńkan uni do jione ńama ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon dayae ńama. 
Proverbs8:36 Menkhan okoe iń bae ńameńkan uni do acʼgeye bạṛijokʼ kana; ar okoe ińko kurudạńkan onko sanamko do gujukʼko dulạṛa.” 
Proverbs9:1 Ạkil do acʼakʼ oṛakʼe benao akada; uni do dhiri reakʼ eae goṭecʼ khunṭiye bitʼakada. 
Proverbs9:2 Uni do janwar gurkate jele isin akada ar darkha rasa sãote mosolae mesal akawada; uni do jomakʼte ṭebile sajao akada. 
Proverbs9:3 Uni do acʼren kạ̃ṛmĩko sanam jaegareye kol akatʼkoa, ar nagraha reakʼ joto khon cetan utạr ṭhạ̃i khon uni do hohoyetʼteye meneda," 
Proverbs9:4 “Lelha hoṛ do nonḍeko hijukʼma.” Okoeyakʼ buj bạnukʼtako onkoe metako kana," 
Proverbs9:5 “Dela hijukʼte, ińakʼ jomakʼ jompe, ińakʼ mosola mesal akatʼ darkha rasa ńũipe;" 
Proverbs9:6 Lelhako sãote gatekʼ do bạgime, inạ khanem bańcaokʼa; am do budan reakʼ horte taṛamme.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Landa dhutʼ hoṛ ṭhen okoe milimisiạ lạgitʼe calakʼ uni doe lajao ocokʼa; bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ dos okoeye ńambaṛae bạṛicʼ hoṛ do unigeye dusiyea. 
Proverbs9:8 Landa dhutʼicʼ hoṛ do dosko alom udukʼaea, arem udukʼae khan ame hirkhạwama; bickom ạkilan hoṛ do uniyakʼ dosko udukʼaeme, uni do ame dulạṛmea." 
Proverbs9:9 Ạkilan hoṛ solha emaeme, inạkhan arhõ ạkilanicʼe hoyokʼa; Isor botorae hoṛ cetʼaeme, uni do arhõ cecetʼakʼe hameṭjoṅa." 
Proverbs9:10 Probhu Isor botorae do ạkil reakʼ etohopʼ kana; ar uni sonoticʼ baḍaeye do buj kana. 
Proverbs9:11 Buj doe menede, “Iń hotete am do ḍher dinem bahaokʼa, ar bochor reakʼ dinkoge juṭucʼama." 
Proverbs9:12 Ạkilanicʼem hoyokʼ khan amakʼ lab hoyokʼtama, menkhan landa dhutʼicʼem hoylen khan eskarge kosṭom ńama.”" 
Proverbs9:13 Lilhi maejiu doe bachaogea uni do jãhãn tạkicʼakʼge bae bataoa, uni do ạkil bạnukʼtaea." 
Proverbs9:14 Uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ duạr aṛere ar nagraha reakʼ cetan utạr ṭhạ̃ireye duṛupʼa. 
Proverbs9:15 Ar okoe ona horteko parom calakʼ uni do onko hohoakoteye metakoa," 
Proverbs9:16 “Lelha hoṛ do nonḍeko hijukʼma.” Ar ạkil bạnukʼtako hoṛ doe metakoa," 
Proverbs9:17 “Kombṛo akatʼ dakʼ do heṛemgea; ar oko reakʼ jomakʼ do sebelgea.” 
Proverbs9:18 Menkhan uni do bako baḍaea, gocʼ hoṛko onḍe menakʼkoa mente; ar uni maejiuren neota hoṛ do Sheol reakʼ khạndṛuńreko tahenkana." 
Proverbs10:1 Solomonakʼ dhorom sopolha. Ạkilan hopon do apatakʼ jionre rạskại ạguiya, menkhan bebuj hopon do eṅgatakʼ jionre duke ạguiya." 
Proverbs10:2 Behok lekate ńamakʼ dhonre jãhãn porho do bạnukʼa, menkhan dhorom do moron khone rurukhiyạwa." 
Proverbs10:3 Probhu Isor do acʼ botoraekanko bae reṅgecʼ ocokoa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ laloc doe ạuṛiyakʼ ocoya." 
Proverbs10:4 Asketokʼ ti do manwae reṅgecʼ ocoyea, menkhan khaṭaokʼkan ti doe kisạ̃ṛokʼa." 
Proverbs10:5 Ạkilan hopon do aghãṛre phosole samṭaoa, menkhan lajao ocokʼ hopon do irokʼ jokhecʼe jạpitʼkakʼa." 
Proverbs10:6 Dhoromicʼakʼ bohokʼre do bhor hijukʼa, menkhan bedhoromicʼakʼ mocare do jor julumge oko tahena." 
Proverbs10:7 Dhorom hoṛko reakʼ disạ do bhore ạguiya, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ ńutum do sea giḍikʼa." 
Proverbs10:8 Okoeyakʼ ontorre ạkil menakʼ uni do hukume bataoa, menkhan bok bokaokʼkan bebuj hoṛ doe maraokʼa." 
Proverbs10:9 Okoe dhoromteye calakʼkan uni do khạtirjomae dãṛãnkana, menkhan okoe peṛta horteye calakʼ uni doe sapʼ ocokʼa." 
Proverbs10:10 Mẽtʼ ripitʼicʼ hoṛ doe haso ocokʼa; ar bok bokaokʼkan bebuj hoṛ doe bạṛijokʼa. 
Proverbs10:11 Dhorom hoṛakʼ moca do jion reakʼ jharna leka, menkhan bedhorom hoṛakʼ mocare do jor bojorge oko tahena." 
Proverbs10:12 Kurud do jhogṛae janam ocoya, menkhan dulạṛ do sanam lekan bedhorome danaṅa." 
Proverbs10:13 Buj menakʼtae hoṛakʼ mocare do ạkil tahena, menkhan pãeṛa ṭheṅga do buj bạnukʼtayicʼ hoṛakʼ dea lạgitʼ kana." 
Proverbs10:14 Ạkilan hoṛ do bidiạkoe dohojoṅa, menkhan bebujakʼ moca do jarkhare hoho ạguiya." 
Proverbs10:15 Kisạ̃ṛkoakʼ dhon do pạcriteko esetʼ akatʼ nagraha lekana. 
Proverbs10:16 Dhoromkoakʼ kuṛại do jion kana, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ arjawakʼte kại do ḍherokʼkana." 
Proverbs10:17 Ḍanṭaoicʼ do jion reakʼ horteye calakʼkana, menkhan nisṛạue phesṛaoetʼkan hoṛ doe sen adokʼa." 
Proverbs10:18 Kurude okoyetʼ kan hoṛ do eṛe kathae roṛa; ar bebuj hoṛ do bodname gahaoa baṛaea. 
Proverbs10:19 Ḍher kathare bedhorom do baṅ okulạnokʼa, menkhan okoe mocae ḍanṭaoetʼtae uni doe budangea." 
Proverbs10:20 Isor botoraekoakʼ alaṅ do khạṭi rupạ leka, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ ontor reakʼ dam do bạnukʼtakoa." 
Proverbs10:21 Isor botoraekoakʼ luṭi do ḍher hoṛgeye ńeljutkoa, menkhan ạkil begorte bebuj hoṛ doko gujukʼa." 
Proverbs10:22 Probhu Isor okoeye bhorae uni doe kisạ̃ṛgea; ar ona bhorre jãhãn duk ar kosṭo do baṅ tahena. 
Proverbs10:23 Bạṛicʼ kạmi do bebujkoakʼ rạskạ kana, menkhan budankoakʼ rạskạ do ạkilge." 
Proverbs10:24 Bedhorom hoṛ do okako botorakʼ onaregeko paṛaokʼa, menkhan Isor botoraekoakʼ khojogokʼa do purunokʼtakoa." 
Proverbs10:25 Hoe bharḍo hecʼlenre bạṛicʼ hoṛ do bako tahena, menkhan Isor botorae hoṛ do jaejug diṛho akane tahena." 
Proverbs10:26 Ḍaṭare sirkạ ar mẽtʼre dhũạ lagaolenre cetʼleka kosṭo ạikạukʼa, onkage kuṛhiyạ hoṛ hõ jãhãregem kolkae onḍege kosṭoko ńama." 
Proverbs10:27 Probhu Isor botorae do bahaokʼ dine baḍhaoa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ din do khaṭokʼtakoa." 
Proverbs10:28 Isor botoraekoakʼ asre do rạskạ menakʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ as do michạgetakoa." 
Proverbs10:29 Probhu Isorakʼ hor do dhorom hoṛko lạgitʼ gaṛ leka, menkhan okoe do bạṛicʼko kạmi onko lạgitʼ do morone ạguiya." 
Proverbs10:30 Isor botorae hoṛko do jao okte diṛho akanko tahena menkhan bedhorom hoṛko do disạmre bako girobas daṛeakʼa. 
Proverbs10:31 Dhorom hoṛkoakʼ moca khon do ạkil reakʼ katha oḍokokʼa, menkhan peṛta katha roroṛ alaṅ doe getʼ giḍi ocokʼa." 
Proverbs10:32 Dhorom hoṛkoakʼ moca do lek lekan kathae roṛa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ moca do eken peṛta kathageye roṛa." 
Proverbs11:1 Eṛe tulạ do Probhu Isore kurudakʼa, menkhan hok reakʼ baṭkhara doe kusiyakʼ kana." 
Proverbs11:2 Bạḍại são sãote opoman hõ hijukʼa, menkhan mạ̃hir sãote do ạkil hijukʼa." 
Proverbs11:3 Khạṭi hoṛko do akoakʼ sạritetʼ hoteteko ạyur ocokʼa, menkhan bin pạtiạukʼ hoṛ do akoakʼ phạsiạratetʼ iạteko marao ocokʼa." 
Proverbs11:4 Isorakʼ edre tisokʼ pheḍ hijukʼa enhilokʼ dhon do jãhãn porhoge baṅ hoyokʼa, menkhan Isor botorae do gujukʼ khone rukhiyạwa." 
Proverbs11:5 Khạṭi hoṛko do Isor botoraeko lạgitʼ sojhe horko benaoa, menkhan bedhoromko do akoakʼ phạsiạratetʼ iạteko maraokʼa." 
Proverbs11:6 Khạṭi hoṛkoakʼ dhorom do onkoe rukhiyạkoa, menkhan bepạtiạuko do apnarakʼ jhạliregeko paṛaokʼa." 
Proverbs11:7 Bedhorom hoṛe gocʼlen khan uniyakʼ ashõ nosṭokʼtaea; Ar uniyakʼ daṛe iạte okakoe asakan tahẽkan ona do nasaokʼtaea. 
Proverbs11:8 Dhorom hoṛ do kosṭo khon bańcaoko ńama, menkhan ona kosṭo do bedhoromko cetanre hecʼ paṛaokʼa." 
Proverbs11:9 Okoe Isor bae botorae uni do mocate aḍepaserenkoakʼ bạṛicʼe ạguiya, menkhan Isor botorae hoṛ do ạkil iạte rukhiyại ńama." 
Proverbs11:10 Isor botoraekoakʼ bhạlại hoylen khan nagraha rạskạkʼa, ar bedhoromkoko ḍahao maraolenre hoṛko do rạskạteko andoṛa." 
Proverbs11:11 Dhorom hoṛko Isorakʼ bhorko ńamle khan nagraha do maraṅokʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ moca hotete nagraha do bạṛijokʼa." 
Proverbs11:12 Okoe acʼ aḍepaseren hoṛkoe nindạuko uni do ạkil reakʼ okulạn menakʼtaea, menkhan okoeyakʼ buj menakʼ uni do acʼakʼ alaṅe sambṛaoeda." 
Proverbs11:13 Okoe eṭakʼko reaṅe khaekhoyetʼkan uni do oko kathakoe lạiyetʼkana menkhan pạtiạr hoṛ do kathae dapala. 
Proverbs11:14 Lek lekate ạyur reakʼ buj begorte jạtrenko doko ńurokʼa, menkhan aema solhakoko hoylen khan jạtrenko do bańcaoko ńama." 
Proverbs11:15 Okoe eṭakʼ hoṛren jạmindare hoyokʼ uni do khạṭige kosṭoe ńama, menkhan okoe jạmindar hoyokʼe baṅetʼkan uni do khạtirjomae tahena." 
Proverbs11:16 Mońje beoharetʼkan maejiu do manote hameṭ joṅa, ar santaokan hoṛ do dhone hạrjoṅa." 
Proverbs11:17 Dayakʼkan hoṛ do apnare bhạlạiyokʼ kana, menkhan kurmutạha hoṛ do apnarakʼe bạṛicʼeda." 
Proverbs11:18 Bedhoromkoakʼ rojgarakʼ do ạuṛiyakʼgetakoa, menkhan Isore botoraekan hoṛ okoe do itạye er uni do sạrige ona reakʼ phosole ira." 
Proverbs11:19 Dhoromre ṭarhaoicʼ do jiwetʼe tahena, menkhan okoe do bạṛicʼakʼe khudạuetʼkan uni do gujukʼe ạguiyeda." 
Proverbs11:20 Okoekoakʼ ontor peṛtage Probhu Isor do onkoe kurudako kana, menkhan khạṭi jion khemaoko cetanre doe kusikʼkana." 
Proverbs11:21 Khạṭigepe baḍaea bedhorom hoṛko do sạjạiko ńamgea, menkhan dhorom hoṛ doko bańcaokʼa." 
Proverbs11:22 Sukri thotnare sona mạkṛi lekanae, buj suj bạnukʼtae uni mońj utạricʼ maejiu do." 
Proverbs11:23 Dhoromko reakʼ monsubạ do bhạlạiye ạguiya, menkhan bedhoromicʼ do as bodolte eken Isorakʼ edrege pheḍ hecʼaea." 
Proverbs11:24 Okoe lahe caheye danetʼkan uni do arhõ bạ̃ṛti hoyokʼtaea; arhõ menakʼkoa okoe do hok reakʼ khon ḍherko dohoyetʼre hõ reṅgecʼreko paṛaokʼ kana. 
Proverbs11:25 Okoe lahe caheko emokʼ onko doko kisạ̃ṛokʼa; ar okoe eṭakʼkoe tirpit ocoko uni do acʼ hõe tirpit ocokʼa. 
Proverbs11:26 Okoe hoṛ phosole dohobaekakʼ uni doko sarapaea, menkhan okoe onae ạkhriń uni do bhoranicʼe hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs11:27 Okoe bhageakʼe ńam bakʼṛakan uni do dayae ńama, menkhan bạṛicʼakʼe ńam baṛaeyicʼ do acʼge ona paṛaoaea." 
Proverbs11:28 Okoe acʼakʼ dhonreye bhorsakʼkan uni doe gujukʼa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do hạriạṛ ghãs leka purṭhại hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs11:29 Okoe acʼakʼ gharońjre bạṛicʼakʼe ạguiyetʼ unire do hoe chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅ tahena; ar bebujko do ạkilan hoṛren golamko hoyokʼa. 
Proverbs11:30 Dhorom hoṛ do eṭakʼkoakʼ jion dare leka; ar okoe eṭakʼkoakʼ mone jitạu akatʼ uni doe ạkilanicʼ kana. 
Proverbs11:31 Noa dhạrtirege Isor botoraekan hoṛ do kuṛạiko ńam khan, enḍekhan bedhorom ar kạiyanko do khạṭige akoakʼ kuṛạiko ńamgea." 
Proverbs12:1 Okoe hoṛ ḍanṭaoe kusiyakʼ uni do ạkile dulạṛeda, menkhan okoe samka sạṭi reakʼ kathae kurudakʼ uni doe orlogea." 
Proverbs12:2 Bhage hoṛ do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon dayako ńama, menkhan okoe bạṛicʼe phundikan uni do Probhu Isor dusi menteye ṭarhaoea." 
Proverbs12:3 Bedhoromakʼte jãhãe hoṛakʼ jionrege kajaktetʼ do baṅ tahena, menkhan Isor botorae hoṛakʼ jion reakʼ rehetʼ do kajak tahena." 
Proverbs12:4 Bhage ar gun menakʼtae bạhu do jãwãetetʼ lạgitʼ mukuṭ kanae, menkhan okoeṭakʼ maejiu do lajao paṛaoakʼkoe kạmikan uni do acʼren jãwãeyakʼ sea jaṅ lekanae." 
Proverbs12:5 Isor botorae hoṛkoakʼ hudisko do bhageakʼkote perecʼgea, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ solhare do phạsiạratetʼ menakʼa." 
Proverbs12:6 Bedhorom hoṛko do mãyãm joroe lạgitʼ tãṛãkʼ akan reakʼ kathako mena, menkhan dhoromko do rukhiyạ reakʼ kathako roṛa." 
Proverbs12:7 Bedhoromko doko marao utạrokʼa, onkoakʼ bõsko do baṅ tahena, menkhan dhorom hoṛkoakʼ bõsko do ṭikạu tahena." 
Proverbs12:8 Manwa cetʼleka budko khaṭao ona lekage sarhaoko ńama, menkhan peṛta hoṛ doko nihạ̃t ocokʼa." 
Proverbs12:9 Acʼte kisạ̃ṛe udugokʼkan menkhan oṛakʼre jomakʼ bạnukʼtayicʼ khon do, kạmikateye ạsulokʼkan sadharon hoṛgeye sorosa." 
Proverbs12:10 Dhorom hoṛ do acʼren janwarkoe jotonkoa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ daya do bạnukʼa." 
Proverbs12:11 Okoe hoṛ acʼakʼ jumireye khaṭaokʼkan uni do bạ̃ṛti jomakʼ tahentaea, menkhan okoe do ạuṛiyakʼkoe khudạu baṛeyetʼkan uni do bud reakʼ okulạn menakʼtaea." 
Proverbs12:12 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do bedhoromkoakʼ luṭakʼ jinis ńańamko khoja, menkhan Isor botorae hoṛkoakʼ jionre do jo ńamokʼa." 
Proverbs12:13 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ kạite perecʼ katha hotete jhạlireye paṛaokʼa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do muhin khone paskaokʼa." 
Proverbs12:14 Manwa do acʼakʼ katha hotetege bhạlạiteye perecʼ daṛeakʼa, ar uniyakʼ kạmi lekate uni do joe ńama." 
Proverbs12:15 Bebuj hoṛ do acʼakʼ horko ṭhikgeye metakʼa, menkhan ạkilan hoṛ do solhae ańjoma." 
Proverbs12:16 Bebuj hoṛakʼ khĩs do baḍae godokʼa, menkhan budan hoṛ do opoman bae moneyakʼ kana." 
Proverbs12:17 Soṛa monte roṛetʼ hoṛ do sạriyakʼgeye roṛa, menkhan eṛe goha do phạsiạrae phuṭạua." 
Proverbs12:18 Saegatʼ katha do tarwaṛe lekae sobokʼa, menkhan ạkilanicʼakʼ katha doe bogea." 
Proverbs12:19 Sạriyicʼakʼ reakʼ katha do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena, menkhan eṛeyicʼakʼ reakʼ katha do thoṛa dinge." 
Proverbs12:20 Okoe bạṛicʼ phundiko aṭaoetʼ onkoakʼ ontorre do phạsiạratetʼ tahena, menkhan okoe bhạlại reakʼ solhako emokʼ onkoakʼ ontorre do rạskạ tahena." 
Proverbs12:21 Dhorom hoṛkoakʼ jionre bạṛicʼakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ jionre bạṛicʼakʼte perecʼ tahena." 
Proverbs12:22 Eṛeyicʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã Probhu Isor doe kurudakʼ kana, menkhan pạtiạrte kạmikan hoṛ do uniren rạskạ reakʼ kanako." 
Proverbs12:23 Budan hoṛ do acʼakʼ bidiạ reaṅ bae lại baṛaea, menkhan bebujko do akoakʼ lelhatetʼko lạṭicʼ baṛaea." 
Proverbs12:24 Khaṭaokʼkan hoṛ doko kisạ̃ṛokʼa, menkhan asketokʼ hoṛ do eṭakʼko tabereko tahena." 
Proverbs12:25 Bạṛicʼ hudis do manawa ontore bạṛijtaea, menkhan udgạu reakʼ katha do manwae rạskạ ocoyea." 
Proverbs12:26 Dhorom hoṛ do bạṛicʼ khone sahaṛokʼ kana, menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛ do onkoe asokʼ ṭayokʼ ocokoa." 
Proverbs12:27 Asketiạ hor do acʼ sendra gocʼicʼ hõ bae teweńea, menkhan kurumuṭuyicʼ do damanakʼ dhone hameṭjoṅa." 
Proverbs12:28 Dhorom reakʼ horre do jion menakʼa, ar ona horre do gujukʼ bạnukʼa." 
Proverbs13:1 Ạkilan hopon do apatakʼ sikhạunae ańjoma, menkhan landa dhutʼicʼ hoṛ do nisṛạu bae hetawakʼa." 
Proverbs13:2 Manwa do acʼakʼ kathatege bhạlạiye lab daṛeakʼa; ar bepạtiạu hoṛko do santaoko gagocakʼa. 
Proverbs13:3 Okoe acʼakʼ mocae sontortae uni do acʼakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitaea, menkhan okoe begor sontorte kathae roṛ uni doe jarkharokʼa." 
Proverbs13:4 Asketicʼ do ńam baṛaeye khoja menkhan cetʼge bae ńama, menkhan khaṭaokʼkan hoṛ do acʼakʼ khojokʼakʼ khon hõ ḍhere ńama." 
Proverbs13:5 Dhorom hoṛ do eṛeakʼko hirkhạwakʼa, menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛ do lajao ar durnamkoko hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs13:6 Isor botorae do dhorom hoṛe rukhiyạyea, menkhan bedhorom do kại hoṛakʼ jarkhare ạguiya." 
Proverbs13:7 Apnarte kisạ̃ṛ udugokʼicʼ do acʼakʼ cetʼge bạnukʼtaea; menkhan reṅgecʼe udugokʼ hoṛ do ḍher dhon menakʼtaea. 
Proverbs13:8 Kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do jiwi bańcaotae lạgitʼ dhone khoroca. Menkhan reṅgecʼ hoṛ do okoe hõ bako botor ocoyea. 
Proverbs13:9 Isor botoraekoakʼ marsal do ḍig ḍig jolokʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ diuhe do ĩṛĩjokʼtakoa." 
Proverbs13:10 Bạḍại do jhogṛa ar reṭepeṭeye sirjạu ocoya, menkhan okoe hukumko ańjometʼ onko ṭhen do ạkil ńamokʼa." 
Proverbs13:11 Khaṭao begorte oka ṭaka ńamokʼ ona do oṭaṅokʼa, menkhan okoe hoṛ khaṭaokate ṭakae doho jarwae uniyakʼ do baḍhaokʼtaea." 
Proverbs13:12 As akanakʼ purạukʼte bilomokʼ khan ontor do rạpudokʼa," 
Proverbs13:13 Okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ kathae nihạ̃t uni do acʼakʼ nosṭokʼe ạgujoṅa, menkhan okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ hukumkoe manao uni do acʼakʼ kuṛạiye ńama." 
Proverbs13:14 Ạkilan hoṛakʼ cecetʼakʼ do jion reakʼ jharna leka; moron reakʼ pạsiko khon sahaṛokʼ lạgitʼ. 
Proverbs13:15 Okoeyakʼ bhage bud menakʼ uni do manote ńama, menkhan bepạtiạr hoṛ doko marao cabakʼa." 
Proverbs13:16 Sontorokʼkan hoṛ do ạkil salakʼe kạmiyeda, menkhan khaṭo budan hoṛ do acʼakʼ lelhatetʼe sodoreda." 
Proverbs13:17 Bạṛicʼ khobor emokʼicʼ do muhinreye paṛaokʼa, menkhan pạtiạricʼ do suluke hoeocoya." 
Proverbs13:18 Okoe hoṛ ḍanṭao bae bạsutakʼkan uni do okulan ar lajaoreye paṛaokʼa, menkhan nisṛạue hetawakʼkan hoṛ doe manot ocokʼa." 
Proverbs13:19 Mon reakʼ sana purạulen khan ontor tirpitokʼa, menkhan bạṛicʼ khon sahaṛokʼ do bebuj lạgitʼ hirkhạwakʼ kana." 
Proverbs13:20 Ạkilanko sãote okoeye senokʼ uni do ạkilane hoyokʼa, menkhan okoe bebuj hoṛkoren gateye hoyokʼ uni doe baṛijokʼa." 
Proverbs13:21 Bạṛicʼakʼ do kạiyanko tayomteye ńir hijukʼa, menkhan bhạlại do Isor botoraekoakʼ kuṛại kana." 
Proverbs13:22 Bhage hoṛ do acʼren goṛom gidrạko lạgitʼ ạidạriye doho oṭokakʼa, menkhan kạiyankoakʼ dhon do Isor botoraeko lạgitʼge doho akan tahena." 
Proverbs13:23 Reṅgecʼkoakʼ jumire do aema phosol arjaokʼa, menkhan behokʼ iạte ona doe recʼocokʼa." 
Proverbs13:24 Okoe acʼren hopon bae ḍanṭaoede uni do acʼren hopon bae dulạṛ edekana, menkhan okoe uniye dulạṛ edekan uni do ḍanṭaoe secʼ hõe moneyakʼ kana." 
Proverbs13:25 Isor botorae hoṛko do lacʼ bikʼko joma, menkhan bedhoromko do lacʼ bikʼ jom bako ńama." 
Proverbs14:1 Ạkilan maejiu do acʼakʼ soṅsare benao rakaba, menkhan bebuj maejiu do acʼakʼ titege soṅsare rạpuda." 
Proverbs14:2 Okoe dhoromteye calakʼ uni do Probhu Isore botoraea, menkhan okoe peṛta horteye calakʼ uni doe nihạ̃tea." 
Proverbs14:3 Bebuj hoṛ do acʼakʼ kathare bạḍạiye sodor ocoya, menkhan ạkilanko do akoakʼ katha iạte rukhiyạko ńama." 
Proverbs14:4 Ḍaṅgra bako tahẽlen khan goṛa do khạlige tahena, menkhan phẽṭaṛakʼ daṛetege phosol do bạ̃ṛti ńamokʼa." 
Proverbs14:5 Pạtiạr goha do eṛe katha bae roṛa, menkhan phạsiạra goha do eṛe kathae roṛa." 
Proverbs14:6 Landa dhutʼicʼ hoṛ do sendrate ạkil bae ńama, menkhan bud menakʼtae hoṛ do usạrage ạkile hameṭ joṅa." 
Proverbs14:7 Bebuj hoṛ ṭhen khon calao joṅme, ente uni khon bidiạ reakʼ katha do bam ńama." 
Proverbs14:8 Acʼakʼ hore orom ona kangea budan hoṛakʼ ạkil do, menkhan chol kopoṭ do bebuj hoṛkoakʼ lelhatetʼge." 
Proverbs14:9 Bebuj hoṛ acʼakʼ kạiye aṅgoctae do nichokokʼ lekae bujhạua menkhan bhage hoṛ do samgekʼgeye bạsutakʼ kana. 
Proverbs14:10 Mon do apnarakʼ haṛhatʼe baḍaekana; menkhan am ar iń do ona reakʼ rạskạre balaṅ seletʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Proverbs14:11 Bạṛicʼkoakʼ oṛakʼ do jarkharokʼtakoa, menkhan dhorom hoṛkoakʼ tạmbu do arhõ lạṭu idikʼa." 
Proverbs14:12 Mitʼṭecʼ hor menakʼa okaṭakʼ do manwakoakʼ mẽtʼre ṭhik bujhạukʼkan, menkhan ona hor mucạtʼre do gujukʼ menakʼa." 
Proverbs14:13 Landaere hõ mon reakʼ duk do tahengea, ar rạskạ mucạtʼre hõ hirdạnige." 
Proverbs14:14 Bepạtiạr hoṛ do akoakʼ beboharteko tirpitokʼkana, menkhan bhage hoṛko do apnarakʼ beboharte bạ̃ṛtiko tirpitokʼkana." 
Proverbs14:15 Lelha hoṛ do sanam kathageko pạtiạukʼa, menkhan sontorokʼ hoṛ do bud salakʼe taṛama." 
Proverbs14:16 Ạkilan hoṛ doe sontorokʼa ar bạṛicʼ khone sahaṛokʼa, menkhan bebuj hoṛ do acʼ cetanre pạtiạue dohoya ar bae sontorokʼa." 
Proverbs14:17 Naseyakʼte raṅgaokʼ hoṛ do lelhayicʼ lakae kạmiya, menkhan bujhạntar hoṛ doe jiwi hataṛa." 
Proverbs14:18 Khaṭo budan hoṛko do lelhawakʼko kạmiya, ar bujhạntar hoṛ do bidiạteko dạhṛikʼa." 
Proverbs14:19 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko doko tabekʼa bhage hoṛko samaṅre, ar phạsiạrko doko tabekʼa Isor botorae hoṛko ṭhen." 
Proverbs14:20 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ do acʼren peṛako hõ bako kusiwaea, menkhan kĩsạ̃ṛ hoṛren do aema gateko tahena." 
Proverbs14:21 Okoe acʼ aḍepaseren hoṛkoe nihạ̃tko uni doe kạiyeda, menkhan okoe reṅgecʼkoe dawawako kan uni doe bhạgangea." 
Proverbs14:22 Okoe bạṛicʼ kạmi lạgitʼ phundiko aṭaoetʼ onko do cetʼ bạṛicʼ secʼ bako calakʼ kana? Menkhan okoe do bhạlại lạgitʼko ponthayetʼ onko lạgitʼ do pạtiạr ar biswạsgeko ńama. 
Proverbs14:23 Joto lekan khaṭaokʼrege lab do menakʼa, menkhan eken luṭi reakʼ roṛte do ṭonṭa menakʼa." 
Proverbs14:24 Ạkilankoakʼ kuṛại do onkoakʼ dhonge, menkhan khaṭo budankoakʼ lelhatetʼ do arhõ lelhatetʼe janam ocoya." 
Proverbs14:25 Okoeṭakʼ goha do sạri kathae roṛ uni do eṭakʼicʼakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitaea, menkhan eṛe gohayicʼ doe soprota." 
Proverbs14:26 Dhorom hoṛ do keṭecʼ bhorsa menakʼtaea ar uniren gidrạko lạgitʼ do aotan gaṛ menakʼa. 
Proverbs14:27 Dhorom do jion reakʼ jharna kana; moron reakʼ jhạliko khon paskaokʼ lạgitʼ. 
Proverbs14:28 Porjako saṅgelen khan rajakʼ do ṭhonok hoyokʼa, menkhan kạmiạko begor mạlikakʼ do jarkharaokʼge." 
Proverbs14:29 Okoe usạrate bae raṅgaokʼ uni doe budan hoṛkana, menkhan usạrate raṅgao godokʼicʼ do lelha hoṛ lekanae." 
Proverbs14:30 Nirại mon do hoṛmo mońje dohoya, menkhan hiskạ do hoṛmoe duk ocoya." 
Proverbs14:31 Okoe reṅgecʼ hoṛe santaoko uni do sisirjạuicʼe henostawae kana, menkhan okoe hoṛ okulankoe dayawako uni do acʼren sisirjạuicʼe manotea." 
Proverbs14:32 Bedhoromicʼ do acʼakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi iạteye ńurhạ ocokʼa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do gujukʼre hõ as tahentakoa." 
Proverbs14:33 Okoeyakʼ buj menakʼ onkoakʼ ontorre do ạkil girobasokʼa, menkhan khaṭo budanko do akoakʼ ạkil jạhir lạgitʼko lạhum tạhum baṛaea." 
Proverbs14:34 Dhorom do jạtrenkoe maraṅkoa menkhan kại do jạtrenkoe bemanotkoa. 
Proverbs14:35 Okoe ạkil salakʼe kạmi raj do uniye bạsutaea, menkhan okoe kạmiạyicʼ do lajao paṛaoakʼe kạmi uni do uniren edreyanicʼe hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs15:1 Mạ̃hir roṛ ruạṛ do raṅgaoe cabaea, menkhan saegatʼ katha do raṅgaoe janam ocoya." 
Proverbs15:2 Ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ alaṅ do bidiại hạṭińeda, menkhan bebujkoakʼ moca do lelhawakʼe oḍokeda." 
Proverbs15:3 Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhã do sanamko secʼge menakʼa; ona do boge ar bạṛicʼ hoṛkoe tunkhiyetʼkoa. 
Proverbs15:4 Mạ̃hir alaṅ do jion reakʼ daṛe kana, menkhan eṛe alaṅ do jiue talga tạuạga." 
Proverbs15:5 Bebuj hoṛ do acʼ apatakʼ ḍanṭaoe nihạ̃ta, menkhan bujhạntar hoṛ do nisṛạue moneyakʼa." 
Proverbs15:6 Dhorom hoṛakʼ oṛakʼ do aema dhon menakʼa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ arjaoakʼ do muhine ạguiya." 
Proverbs15:7 Ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ luṭi do bidiại pasnaoeda, menkhan bebujkoakʼ ontor do onka baṅkana." 
Proverbs15:8 Bedhoromkoakʼ jotowakʼge Probhu Isor doe hirkhạwakʼa, menkhan khạṭi hoṛkoakʼ koejoṅte uni doe kusikʼkana." 
Proverbs15:9 Probhu Isor do bedhoromkoakʼ hore hirkhạwakʼa, menkhan okoe hok reakʼ kạmi lạgitʼko laha idikʼ onko doe dulạṛkoa." 
Proverbs15:10 Okoe ṭhik horko bạgiyakʼ onko lạgitʼ do sạjại menakʼa; ar okoe nisṛạue kurudakʼkan uni doe gujukʼa. 
Proverbs15:11 Probhu Isor samaṅre Sheol ar Abbadon banarge sodorgea; enḍekhan tinạkʼ artetʼge manwakoakʼ mon do! 
Proverbs15:12 Landa dhutʼetʼicʼ do nisṛạu katha bae kusiyakʼa; uni do ạkilanko ṭhen bae calakʼa. 
Proverbs15:13 Ontorre rạskạ tahẽlen khan mẽtʼãhã hõ kusige ńelokʼa, menkhan mon reakʼ bhabnate jiu do talga tạuạgokʼa." 
Proverbs15:14 Okoeyakʼ monre buj menakʼ uni do ạkile sendraea, menkhan khaṭo bujankoakʼ moca do lelhawakʼe ạtińjoṅa." 
Proverbs15:15 Dukokʼ kankoakʼ do joto dinge bạricʼgetakoa, menkhan kharsalayikʼ do joto dingeye hesecʼ sekrejokʼa." 
Proverbs15:16 Be suluk sãote ḍher dhon lab joṅ khon Probhu botorae tulucʼ thoṛawakʼge bhagea. 
Proverbs15:17 Aṛakʼ utu ar ona seletʼ dulạṛge bhagea jel utu daka ar ona seletʼ kurud khon do. 
Proverbs15:18 Raṅgaokʼ hoṛ do jhogṛakʼgeko ehoba, menkhan bae raṅgao hodokʼicʼ do jhogṛae thir ocoya." 
Proverbs15:19 Asaṅpoḍa hoṛakʼ hor do jạnum jhạuạkote ṭạṭi esetʼ akatʼ hor leka, menkhan dhorom hoṛakʼ hor do sạriạugetakoa." 
Proverbs15:20 Ạkilan hopon do apatakʼ jionre rạskạko ạguiya, menkhan khaṭo bujan hoṛ do eṅgattetʼe nihạ̃tea." 
Proverbs15:21 Buj reakʼ okulạn okoeyakʼ menakʼ uni do lelhatetʼreye rạskạkʼ kana, menkhan okoeyakʼ buj menakʼ uni do sojhe horteye taṛameda." 
Proverbs15:22 Solha begor goṭawakʼ do baṅ purạukʼa, menkhan saṅge sosolhakote ona do purạukʼgea." 
Proverbs15:23 Okoe hoṛ lek lekate kathae roṛ uni doe kusikʼa; ente ṭhik oktere katha roṛ do tinạkʼ bhage! 
Proverbs15:24 Budan hoṛakʼ jion reakʼ hor do cetan secʼe idiya, ar onate uni do patal puri khon rukhiyại ńama." 
Proverbs15:25 Probhu Isor do bạḍạikoakʼ oṛakʼe rạputʼeda, menkhan rạnḍi ar dukhikoakʼ simạ doe ṭarhao aroeya." 
Proverbs15:26 Probhu Isor do bạṛicʼ monsubạkoe hirkhạwakʼ kana, menkhan bhạlại reakʼ kathako do uniyakʼ mẽtʼre khạṭigea." 
Proverbs15:27 Lalociạ hoṛ do acʼakʼ gharońjre duke ạguiya, menkhan okoe hoṛ ghuse hirkhạwakʼ uni do jione ńama." 
Proverbs15:28 Dhorom hoṛakʼ ontor do hudiskateye roṛ ruạṛa, menkhan bedhoromkoakʼ moca khon do bạṛicʼ katha ạtu oḍokokʼa." 
Proverbs15:29 Probhu Isor do bạṛicʼko khon pharakreye tahenkana, menkhan uni do acʼ botoraekoakʼ koejoṅe ańjomeda." 
Proverbs15:30 Rạskạte perecʼ mẽtʼ do eṭakʼkoe rạskạ ocoyetʼkoa, ar bhạlại reakʼ sombat do jaṅ ar jele purṭhạyeda." 
Proverbs15:31 Okoe hoṛ nisṛạukoe luturakʼkan uni do ạkilanko sãoteye girobasokʼ kana. 
Proverbs15:32 Okoe hoṛ ḍanṭao bae bạsutakʼ kan uni do apnargeye nihạ̃tokʼa. Menkhan nisṛạu ańjomicʼ do bae hameṭ joṅa. 
Proverbs15:33 Probhu Isor botorae do ạkilokʼ lạgitʼ sikhạuna kana, ar man ńam reakʼ hor do nindhạnokʼgea." 
Proverbs16:1 Manwa do mon monteye ponthayeda, menkhan mocate ona sodorokʼ reakʼ ektiạri do Probhu Isor ṭhen khonge hijukʼ kana." 
Proverbs16:2 Hoṛakʼ do acʼakʼ joto horge acʼ nońjorre saphagetaea, menkhan jiu tulạ bikʼḍạuicʼ do Probhu Isorge." 
Proverbs16:3 Amakʼ kạmiko do Probhu Isorge soprotaeme; onate amakʼ ponthako ṭarhaokʼtama. 
Proverbs16:4 Probhu Isor do jotowakʼe benao akada ona reakʼ nij jos lạgitʼ; Ar bedhoromicʼ hõ ghoṭna din lạgitʼ. 
Proverbs16:5 Bạḍại monan hoṛ do Probhu Isore hirkhạwako kana; khạṭige baḍaepe onko do sạjạiko ńama. 
Proverbs16:6 Pạtiạr ar sạriyakʼtetʼ hotete bedhorom do pharakokʼa; Probhu Isor botorae hoṛ do bạṛicʼ khone sahaṛokʼa. 
Proverbs16:7 Manwa jion ńelte tinre Probhu Isor doe kusikʼa unre uni do acʼren bạiriko hõ sulukteye girobas ocokoa. 
Proverbs16:8 Behokakʼte ḍher arjao khon hokte thoṛa arjaoakʼge bhagea. 
Proverbs16:9 Manwa do acʼakʼ hor tearjoṅ reakʼe ponthayeda, menkhan uniyakʼ taṛam do Probhu Isorgeye sojheyetʼtaea." 
Proverbs16:10 Rajakʼ luṭi reakʼ katha do jiu eserteakʼ katha kana; bicạrre uniyakʼ katha do bae kạiya. 
Proverbs16:11 Sạri tulạ ar ḍạnḍi do Probhu Isor khonakʼge; ar thạilạkʼ reakʼ sạri baṭkharako do uniyakʼ mẽtʼre bhagegea. 
Proverbs16:12 Raj lạgitʼ behokakʼ kạmi do hirkhạwakʼ kana, ente hok reakʼ kạmi hotete siṅghạson do ṭarhao tahena." 
Proverbs16:13 Dhoromkoakʼ luṭige raj doko rạskạ ocoyetʼkoa; ar sạri katha roroṛ hoṛge raj doko kusiaea. 
Proverbs16:14 Rajakʼ raṅgao do moronren goḍet leka, menkhan ạkilan hoṛ do raṅgaoe thir ocoya." 
Proverbs16:15 Rajakʼ mẽtʼãhã kharsalen khan jiwi bańcaokʼa; uniyakʼ daya do sãwãe reakʼ dakʼ rimil lekage. 
Proverbs16:16 Sona khon ạkil hameṭ joṅ do bhagea! Ar rupạ khon buj bachao joṅ hõ bhagea! 
Proverbs16:17 Bạṛicʼ khon sahaṛ tahenge dhoromkoakʼ hor do; Okoe hoṛ acʼakʼ jion reakʼ hor secʼe moneyakʼ uni do acʼakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitaea. 
Proverbs16:18 Bạḍại do bạṛicʼakʼe ạguiya ar phulạukʼ mon do maraokʼge. 
Proverbs16:19 Bạḍạiko sãote luṭakʼ jinis hạṭiń joṅ khon mạ̃hir monte santao ocokʼko sãote tahenge bhagea. 
Proverbs16:20 Okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ kathae luturakʼkan uni do bhạlại hoyokʼtaea, ar okoe Probhu Isor cetanreye ṭehãḍokʼkan uni doe bhạgangea." 
Proverbs16:21 Okoeyakʼ ontorre ạkil menakʼ uni do budane ńumogokʼa, ar heṛem kathate jãhãeye cetʼae khan uni do ạkil ḍherokʼtaea." 
Proverbs16:22 Ạkil do jion reakʼ jharna kana okoeyakʼ buj menakʼtae; ar orlo hoṛ do acʼakʼ lelhatetʼtegeye sạjạiyokʼkana. 
Proverbs16:23 Ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ ontor do uniyakʼ mocae ạyuretʼtaea, ar onate uniyakʼ cecetʼakʼte eṭakʼkoakʼ ạkil do ḍherokʼkana." 
Proverbs16:24 Heṛem kathako do dumur chata leka; ontor lạgitʼ do heṛemgea ar hoṛmo mońjgeye dohoya. 
Proverbs16:25 Mitʼṭecʼ hor menakʼa okaṭakʼ do manwakoakʼ mẽtʼre ṭhik bujhạukʼkan, menkhan ona reakʼ mucạtʼre do moron menakʼa." 
Proverbs16:26 Reṅgecʼ do manwa artetʼgeye khaṭao ocoyea; ar uniyakʼ reṅgecʼ iạteye onka ocoyea. 
Proverbs16:27 Nicạṛ hoṛ do bạṛicʼ kạmi lạgitʼ phundiko aṭaoa; onkoakʼ kathako do jhạusạukʼ kan seṅgel leka. 
Proverbs16:28 Phẽpṛakʼkan hoṛ do jhogṛae janam ocoya, ar okoe nindạu kathae roṛ uni do gate talare phaṭole dhoraoa." 
Proverbs16:29 Santaokan hoṛakʼ jion ńelte eṭakʼko do laloc hecʼakoa ar bạṛicʼ horteko calakʼa. 
Proverbs16:30 Ripitʼetʼkan hoṛ do bạṛicʼakʼkoe moneyakʼa; ar luṭiye lạṭum hapekakʼ hoṛ do bạṛicʼakʼe rikạyeda. 
Proverbs16:31 Pạnḍu upʼ do ṭhonok reakʼ mukuṭ kana; ona do dhorom jionrege ńamokʼa. 
Proverbs16:32 Okoe usạrate bae raṅgao hodokʼ uni do lạṛhại bir khon hõe bhagegea; okoe nagrahae hatetʼkan ona khon okoe apnare sambṛaokʼkan unigeye bhagea. 
Proverbs16:33 Hoṛko doko gulibãṭeda, menkhan ona reakʼ nitokʼ do Probhu Isorgeye ṭhikeda." 
Proverbs17:1 Jhogṛa ar kạphạriạukʼte perecʼ bhoj oṛakʼ khon sulukte tahẽkate mitʼ kecakʼ piṭhạ hõ bhagegea. 
Proverbs17:2 Ạkilteye kạmikan guti do hopon cetanre hukume calaoa, ar boehako talaren leka ạidạrireye bakhra joṅa." 
Proverbs17:3 Rupạ biḍạu aṭkar lạgitʼ do galao reakʼ jinis menakʼa ar sona biḍạu aṭkar lạgitʼ jinis do culhạ, menkhan manwa ontor do Probhu Isorgeye biḍạu aṭkara." 
Proverbs17:4 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do dusṭạmi kathae ańjoma; ar eṛeyicʼ do kharap alaṅ reakʼe luturakʼa. 
Proverbs17:5 Okoe hoṛ reṅgecʼkoe nisṛạuko uni do onkoren sisirjạuicʼe henostawae kana; Okoe eṭakʼkoakʼ muhinreye rạskạkʼkan uni do sạjạiye ńamgea. 
Proverbs17:6 Goṛom gidrạko do haṛam hoṛkoren mukuṭ leka, ar baba do acʼren hoponkoren ṭhonok kanako." 
Proverbs17:7 Nicạṛ monan hoṛkoakʼ maraṅ maraṅ katha roṛ do baṅ sajaokʼa, arhõ cetan hudạren hoṛkoakʼ hõ eṛe roṛ do baṅ sajaokʼa." 
Proverbs17:8 Okoe hoṛ ghuse emokʼ uni ṭhen ona do guni reakʼ dhiri leka; uni jãhã secʼgeye beṅgetʼ ạcur ontege jo bahakʼkana. 
Proverbs17:9 Ghạṭ ikʼkạyicʼ do dulạṛe ńam baṛayeda, menkhan ona lại baṛayicʼ do gate reakʼ bhaṅgone janam ocoya." 
Proverbs17:10 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ mitʼsae dhaoko dale khon, bujhạntar hoṛ do mitʼ dhao eger hõ ona khon bạ̃ṛti bhijạuaea." 
Proverbs17:11 Huletʼkạnicʼ do eken bạṛicʼakʼ secʼgeye capaokʼa; onate uni upạrte mitʼṭen kurmutạha paṭhaonae kol ocokʼa. 
Proverbs17:12 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ okoe do lelhatetʼreye unum akan uni sãote ńapamokʼ khon hoponko recʼakade bana sãote ńapamokʼge bhagea. 
Proverbs17:13 Okoe hoṛ upkạr bodole behoketʼkan, behok do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ tishõ bae bạgiyakʼa." 
Proverbs17:14 Jhogṛa reakʼ ehopʼ do phoṛ oḍokokʼkan dakʼ leka, onate reṭepeṭe ehobokʼrege ona do ikạkakʼme." 
Proverbs17:15 Bạṛicʼicʼ dhorom metae hoṛ ar dhoromicʼ bạṛicʼ metae hoṛ, Probhu Isor do unkin banargeye hirkhawạkin kana." 
Proverbs17:16 Ạkil hameṭ lạgitʼ khaṭo bujan lelha hoṛakʼ tire ṭaka tahẽlen khan cetʼ lab? Ente uniyakʼ ma bujge bạnukʼtae. 
Proverbs17:17 Gate do jaogeye dulạṛa, ar boeha do muhinre goṛowam lạgitʼgeye janamokʼ kana." 
Proverbs17:18 Okoe hoṛakʼ buj reakʼ okulạn menakʼ uni do acʼ aḍepaseren hoṛ ṭhene jạminokʼa. 
Proverbs17:19 Okoe hoṛ bạṛicʼ monte tahene kusiyakʼkan uni do reṭepeṭeye dulạṛa; ar acʼte usulic hoṛ do jarkhare ạgujoṅa. 
Proverbs17:20 Peṛta ontor hoṛakʼ do bhạlạige baṅ hoyokʼtaea; ar phạsiara alaṅ do muhinreye paṛao ocoyea. 
Proverbs17:21 Khaṭo bujan hopon do eṅgat apatʼ lạgitʼ duke ạguiya; ar bebuj hoponren apatakʼ do rạskạge bạnukʼtaea. 
Proverbs17:22 Rạskạkʼkan ontor do hoṛmo mońje dohoya, menkhan rạputʼ mon do hoṛmoe nosṭo ocoya." 
Proverbs17:23 Bedhoromicʼ do gocha khon ghuse hataoeda hok reakʼ horko konḍeyae lạgitʼ. 
Proverbs17:24 Buj menakʼtae hoṛ do ạkile moneyakʼ kana, menkhan khaṭo bujan hoṛakʼ mon do beṛhaeteye beṅgetʼ ạcura." 
Proverbs17:25 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ do apattetʼe ạṛis cabayea, ar eṅgatakʼ mon doe haṛhatʼ ocoytaea." 
Proverbs17:26 Dhorom hoṛ ḍanḍome do baṅ bhagea se coṭ hudạren hoṛakʼ sạriạkʼtetʼ iạte dale hõ baṅ ṭhika. 
Proverbs17:27 Budan hoṛ do apnar sambṛaokʼte kathae roṛa; ar buj menakʼtae hoṛakʼ bohokʼ do reaṛgetaea. 
Proverbs17:28 Thirge tahẽlen khan lelha hoṛ hõ ạkilanicʼ menteye hudisokʼa, ar moca sikupkateye dohole khan uni do bujhạntar hoṛ lekae hudisokʼa." 
Proverbs18:1 Okoe hoṛ apnarte somaj khon begare tahenkan uni do acʼakʼ sana purạutae lạgitʼe kurumuṭuiya, ar mitʼke mitʼ sạri ạkil tulucʼe jhogṛakʼa." 
Proverbs18:2 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ do boge bạṛicʼ bujhạure jãhãn rạskạge bako ńama, menkhan onko do apnarakʼ mot sodorge rạskạko bujhạua." 
Proverbs18:3 Bạṛicʼakʼ do hirkhại ạguiya ar bemanot do henostage. 
Proverbs18:4 Manwawakʼ moca reakʼ katha do hasa latar reakʼ dakʼ leka, menkhan ạkilan hoṛakʼ moca katha do jharna khon ạtu oḍokokʼkan dakʼge." 
Proverbs18:5 Bedhoromicʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã beṅgetʼakʼ do baṅ bhagea, onate dhoromicʼe behokʼ ocokʼa." 
Proverbs18:6 Khaṭo budanicʼakʼ katha iạte mambla hoyokʼa, ar acʼakʼ katha iạtege uni do dale joma." 
Proverbs18:7 Khaṭo budanicʼakʼ mocage uniyakʼ jarkhare ạguiya; ar acʼakʼ katha iạtege jhạlireye paṛaokʼa. 
Proverbs18:8 Nindạuicʼakʼ katha do sebel jomakʼ leka, ona do manwa ontor reakʼ khạndrire bolokʼa." 
Proverbs18:9 Okoe acʼakʼ kạmireye asketokʼ uni do jarkharicʼ ren boeha kanae. 
Proverbs18:10 Probhu Isor do kajak aotan gaṛ kanae; dhoromko onḍeko ńir sen khan rukhiyạko ńama. 
Proverbs18:11 Kisạ̃ṛkoakʼ dhonge onkoakʼ nagraha reakʼ pạcri do; menkhan onko do akoakʼ dhonge rurukhiyạ reakʼ pạcriko hudiseda. 
Proverbs18:12 Manwa ontor reakʼ bạḍại do jarkhare ạguiya," 
Proverbs18:13 Ańjom laharege okoe hoṛe roṛ ruạṛ uni lạgitʼ ona do lelhatetʼ ar lajao reaṅ kana. 
Proverbs18:14 Hoṛakʼ jiu do kạhil ruại sahao daṛeakʼa, menkhan talga tạwạkʼ jiu do okoeye gokʼ daṛeakʼa?" 
Proverbs18:15 Okoeyakʼ monre buj menakʼ uni do ạkile hameṭ joṅa, ar ạkilankoakʼ lutur do ạkile ńam baṛaea." 
Proverbs18:16 Dan do manwa lạgitʼ hore phaelaoa, ona do kisạ̃ṛko ṭhene idi seṭerokʼ kana." 
Proverbs18:17 Mamblare okoe pạhilre acʼ reaṅ kathae roṛ uniyakʼ katha do unrege sạri kana mente bujhạukʼa, one tin hạbicʼ armitʼ hoṛ hecʼkate uniye jeraye." 
Proverbs18:18 Gulibãṭkate jhogṛa do mucạdokʼa ar daṛeanko talare hõ ona doe chinḍạua. 
Proverbs18:19 Boeha hoteteye opoman ocoakan boeha do kajak nagraha khon hõe keṭecʼgea; ar jhogṛa kạphạriạu do raj dolan reakʼ huṛkạṛ leka. 
Proverbs18:20 Manwa do acʼakʼ katha hotete oka joe ńam onate uniyakʼ ontor do perejokʼtaea; ar acʼakʼ katha iạte okae ńam onategeye kusikʼa. 
Proverbs18:21 Moca reakʼ katharege jion ar moron do ṭehãḍokʼa; okoe lek lekan kathako roṛ onko do ona reakʼ joko ńama. 
Proverbs18:22 Okoe hoṛ bạhuye ńamekan uni do bhore ńama uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen khonge dayae ńama. 
Proverbs18:23 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ do daya ńam lạgitʼe nerha jerhakʼa, menkhan kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do saegatʼgeye roṛ ruạṛa." 
Proverbs18:24 Okoeren aema gate menakʼko uniyakʼ jarkhar do ḍherge hoe botecʼjokʼtaea, menkhan nonkan gate menakʼkoa okoe do boeha khon hõ ḍhere pạtiạrge." 
Proverbs19:1 Okoe khaṭo hudisan hoṛ peṛta kathae roṛ uni khon uni reṅgecʼ hoṛgeye bhagea one okoe do sạriyakʼreye dãṛãnkan. 
Proverbs19:2 Ạkil baṅ tahen hõ baṅ bhagea; okoe hoṛ usạrate joto kạmiye menjoṅ uni doe bhulgea. 
Proverbs19:3 Manwa do apnarakʼ lelhatetʼge bạṛicʼ horteye idiyea, menkhan enhõ uniyakʼ ontor do Probhu Isor upạrte rakabokʼtaea." 
Proverbs19:4 Dhon do aema gateye ńamkoa, menkhan reṅgecʼ hoṛ do acʼren gateye adeya." 
Proverbs19:5 Eṛe goha emokʼicʼ do sạjại ńamte hõe ńama; ar okoe gohayicʼ do eṛeye roṛ uni do rehay bae ńama. 
Proverbs19:6 Cetan hudạren hoṛakʼ daya ńam lạgitʼ ḍherkoge uniko bạsutaea, ar dan emokʼicʼren do sanamkoge gateko hoyokʼtaea." 
Proverbs19:7 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ do acʼren peṛa pạrbhạ jotogeko kurudaea ar acʼren gateko hõ acʼ khon pharakreko tahena; ar uniyakʼ nerha jerhare onko do bako luturakʼa. 
Proverbs19:8 Okoe apnarre dulạṛokʼkan uni do bude hameṭeda; ar okoe bud salakʼe calakʼ uni do bhore ńama. 
Proverbs19:9 Eṛe gohayicʼ do sạjạiye ńamgea; ar okoe eṛe gohae em uni doe jarkharokʼa. 
Proverbs19:10 Khaṭo bujanko lạgitʼ hesecʼ sekrejokʼ lek baṅ kan khan golam lạgitʼ rajko cetanre mạlikokʼ do arhõ belekakʼ kana. 
Proverbs19:11 Okoe hoṛakʼ bud menakʼtae ona bud do thoṛate ohoe raṅgao gotʼ ocolea; ar uniyakʼ man kangea ghạṭ ikạkạkʼ do. 
Proverbs19:12 Rajakʼ raṅgao do gondraokʼkan dhạcri kul leka, menkhan uniyakʼ daya do ghãsre ńur akan sisir dakʼ leka." 
Proverbs19:13 Khaṭo bujan hopon do apattetʼe sorbonas edekana, ar jhogṛakʼkan era do ṭopʼ ṭopʼ ńurokʼkan sate dakʼ lekanae." 
Proverbs19:14 Oṛakʼ duạr ar dhon do apat ṭhen khon ńamokʼa, menkhan budan era do Probhu Isor ṭhen khongeye ńamokʼkana." 
Proverbs19:15 Asket do dudṛume janam ocoya; ar asaṅpoḍa hoṛ do reṅgecʼteye haronokʼa. 
Proverbs19:16 Okoe hoṛ Isorakʼ ạn ạrikoe manao uni do acʼakʼ jiwire rukhiyạitaea; menkhan okoe do acʼakʼ jion hor secʼ bae moneyakʼkan uni doe gujukʼa. 
Proverbs19:17 Reṅgecʼ orecʼkoe dayawako kan hoṛ do Probhu Isorgeye dayawae kana; Probhu Isorge uniyakʼ upkạr reakʼ dan doe emokʼkana. 
Proverbs19:18 Amren gidrạ ḍanṭaoem, ente onare do as menakʼa; uniyakʼ gujukʼ do alogem khoja." 
Proverbs19:19 Edre ḍhergetae hoṛ do ḍanḍom ocoaeme; entem rukhiyạ lekhan arhõ onkaetege hoyokʼtama. 
Proverbs19:20 Solha moneyakʼme, ar ḍanṭao manaome; tayomte am do ạkilanicʼ em hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs19:21 Manwa monre ạḍi lekan phundi tahena, menkhan Probhu Isor okaṭakʼe ṭhik dohoakatʼ onage hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs19:22 Manwa do manwa ṭhen khon dulạṛe khojkana; phạsiạra hoṛ khon reṅgecʼ hoṛgeye bhagea. 
Proverbs19:23 Probhu Isor botorae do jion secʼe idiya; okoeyakʼ ona jion menakʼ uni do tirpite tahena, jãhãn muhinge uni ṭhen do baṅ hecʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs19:24 Asaṅpoḍa do thạrire tiye topoytaea; menkhan moca hạbicʼ ti rakabtae hõe asketokʼa. 
Proverbs19:25 Landa dhutʼicʼem dal lekhan lelha hoṛ doe sontorokʼa; ar bujhạntar hoṛem nisṛạule khan uni do ạkile hameṭ joṅa. 
Proverbs19:26 Okoeṭakʼ hopon do apate santaoe ar eṅgattetʼe laga ńiri, uni do onkin cetanre lajao ar henostae ạguiya." 
Proverbs19:27 E bạbu, ińakʼ ḍanṭao bam moneyakʼ khan enḍekhan am do ạkil reakʼ cecetʼakʼ khon eṭakʼ secʼem ghańjeṛokʼa." 
Proverbs19:28 Bạṛicʼ gohayicʼ do hok reakʼ bicạr iạteye landa dhutʼeda; ar bạṛicʼko do behokre unum akanko tahena. 
Proverbs19:29 Landa dhutʼetʼko lạgitʼ do sạjại tear dohoakana, ar khaṭo bujankoakʼ dea lạgitʼ do cạbukge." 
Proverbs20:1 Okoe hoṛ darkha rasa ńũkateye bulokʼ uni doe landa dhudhutʼa, ar okoe bubulakʼe ńũi uni doe jhogṛakʼa; noako ńũkate okoeye bulokʼ uni do ạkilan hoṛ doe baṅkana." 
Proverbs20:2 Rajakʼ raṅgao do dhạcri kulakʼ gondrao leka; uni okoeye raṅgao ocoye uni do acʼakʼ jiwi muskilreye paṛao ocoytaea. 
Proverbs20:3 Jhogṛa ar kạphạriạue bạgiyakʼ hoṛ do manote ńama; ar khaṭo bibekan hoṛ do jhogṛakʼ lạgitʼ sapṛaoe tahena. 
Proverbs20:4 Asketokʼ hoṛ do ṭhik oktere bae siyạkʼa, uni do irokʼ dinreye oḍokokʼa ar cetʼhõ baṅ juṭạuaea." 
Proverbs20:5 Manwa ontor reakʼ monsuba do hasa latarre menakʼ dakʼ leka, menkhan budan hoṛ do onae lo rakaba." 
Proverbs20:6 Ḍhertetʼ hoṛge apanar do pạtiạran hoṛ menteko udugokʼa, menkhan pạtiạrạnicʼ hoṛ do okoeye ńam daṛekea?" 
Proverbs20:7 Isor botorae hoṛ do dhoromreye taṛameda; bhạgangeako uniren bõsko do! 
Proverbs20:8 Raj do tinre bicạr lạgitʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa unre uni do mẽtʼ reakʼ beṅgetʼte sanam bạṛicʼakʼkoe sạṅgińa. 
Proverbs20:9 Okoeye men daṛeakʼa, “Iń do ińakʼ ontoriń khạṭi akada, ar ińakʼ kại khoniń sapha akana?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Baṅ ṭhikakʼ baṭkhara ar sosoṅakʼ noa banarge Probhu Isor doe hirkhạwakʼkana. 
Proverbs20:11 Gidrạ do acʼakʼ kạmikotegeye oromokʼ kana, uniye kạmikanakʼ do napae ar ṭhikakʼ kana se baṅa." 
Proverbs20:12 Ańjom lạgitʼ lutur ar ńeńel lạgitʼ mẽtʼ Probhu Isor do noa banargeye sirjạu akada. 
Proverbs20:13 Jạpitʼ alom dulạṛa, onate am dom reṅgejokʼa; mẽtʼ beṅgedtam, ado bikʼlekam joma." 
Proverbs20:14 Kirińicʼ doe mena, “Ạḍi maṅgna, ạḍi maṅgna.” Ona tayom uni doe kiriń idiya ar ona kiriń jinisteye gorbokʼa." 
Proverbs20:15 Sona menakʼa, ar damanakʼ dhiriko hõ aema menakʼa, menkhan okaṭakʼ moca do ạkil reakʼ kathae roṛ ona reakʼ dam do ḍhergea." 
Proverbs20:16 Ạnạ̃ṛiyicʼ ńutumteye jạmin akan hoṛakʼ kicricʼ hataotaeme, ar bidisiạ hoṛ ńutumteye jạmin akan khan unige bandhok lekate dohoyem." 
Proverbs20:17 Eṛete ńamakʼ piṭhạ do hoṛ ṭhen heṛemgea, menkhan tayomte mocatae do kakoṛte perejokʼa." 
Proverbs20:18 Solhakate goṭaeme; ar buj sujkate lạṛhại reakʼ lại saḍeme. 
Proverbs20:19 Nisṛạukan hoṛ do okoakʼ kathae sodora; onate bạ̃ṛti katha roroṛ hoṛ tulucʼ do alom gatekʼa. 
Proverbs20:20 Jãhãege acʼ eṅgat se apate sarapae, uniyakʼ diuhe do kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutre ĩṛĩjokʼtaea." 
Proverbs20:21 Okaṭakʼ ạidạri hare phare ńam godokʼ onate mucạtʼre bhor do baṅ ńamokʼa. 
Proverbs20:22 Alom mena, “Noa behok reakʼ iń hala ruạṛa.” Probhu Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ horme, uni do ona muhin khone rukhiyạmea." 
Proverbs20:23 Probhu Isor do baṅ ṭhikakʼ baṭkharae hirkhạwakʼ kana; ar eṛe tulạ do baṅ bhagea. 
Proverbs20:24 Birbanṭa hoṛakʼ calakʼ reakʼ hor do Probhu Isorgeye ṭhik khan, enḍekhan manwa do acʼakʼ hor cekateye bujhạu daṛeakʼa?" 
Proverbs20:25 Begor hudiste usạrate Probhu Isor lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ manotakʼ do manwa lạgitʼ jhampa kangea. 
Proverbs20:26 Tente cetʼleka phosol enokʼ, onkage ạkilan raj do acʼakʼ daṛete bạṛicʼkoe chirchạturkoa." 
Proverbs20:27 Manwawakʼ jiu do Probhu Isorakʼ diuhe kana; ona do manwa ontor reakʼ jotowakʼe ḍunḍhạua. 
Proverbs20:28 Pạtiạr ar dhoromte raj do khạtirjomae dohoyede kana; ar pạtiạr hotetege uniyakʼ siṅghạson do ṭarhaokʼtaea. 
Proverbs20:29 Koṛakoakʼ daṛe do onkoakʼ ṭhonok kana, ar haṛamkoakʼ saj do akoakʼ pạnḍu upʼge." 
Proverbs20:30 Dal ghao do bạṛicʼakʼe saphayeda, ar mon reakʼ dal do ontor reakʼ bhitri jaegakoe guricʼ saphayeda." 
Proverbs21:1 Probhu Isorakʼ tire rajakʼ mon do gaḍa dakʼ leka; Probhu Isor jãhã secʼge monae ontegeye mohnaḍayede kana. 
Proverbs21:2 Manwa do sanam horge acʼ ṭhen do sojhegetaea, menkhan Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ ontorre tulạyetʼtaea." 
Proverbs21:3 Probhu Isor ṭhen do janwar dãṛẽ samaṅko khon dhorom ar hok reakʼ kạmige ḍher bạsutakʼ kana. 
Proverbs21:4 Bedhoromkoakʼ mẽtʼ do bạḍạite perecʼgea ar ontor do phulạugea; onkoakʼ diuhege kại kantakoa. 
Proverbs21:5 Khaṭaokʼkan hoṛ do hudis joṅakʼkote khạṭige borkote ńama. Menkhan okoe hoṛ do begor hudiste usạrate kạmiye ehob uni do khạṭige ṭonṭareye paṛaokʼa. 
Proverbs21:6 Eṛe alaṅte okoe dhonko hameṭetʼkan onko do moronko ńam baṛayeda; onko lạgitʼ ona dhon hameṭjoṅ do gujukʼ lahare thoṛagan suk reakʼ sãhetʼkana. 
Proverbs21:7 Bedhoromkoakʼ jor bojor do akotegeye khayotʼ idikoa, ente onko do hokakʼ kạmiko phesṛao giḍiyeda." 
Proverbs21:8 Ghạṭte perecʼ hoṛakʼ jion do khiṛjạṅ khoṛjoṅ, menkhan khạṭi hoṛ do dhoromteye kạmiya." 
Proverbs21:9 Jhogṛayicʼ maejiu tulucʼ mitʼ oṛakʼre tahen khon chat reakʼ mitʼ konare eskar tahenge bhagea. 
Proverbs21:10 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ do hạn reakʼe kurumuṭuiya; ar uni pheḍren hoṛ do uni khon jãhãn dayage bako ńama. 
Proverbs21:11 Landa dhutʼicʼ sạjại lekhan lelhayicʼ do ạkile hameṭ joṅa; ạkilan hoṛ solha emae khan uni do bude hameṭjoṅa. 
Proverbs21:12 Dhoromicʼ Isor do bedhoromicʼakʼ oṛakʼe ạri bạndhiyeda; ar onko bedhoromkoe marao giḍiyetʼkoa. 
Proverbs21:13 Okoe hoṛ reṅgecʼkoakʼ rakʼjoṅre luture tubetʼetʼtae, Uni do tinre acʼe rakʼ homora unre okoe hõ bako luturataea." 
Proverbs21:14 Oko okote emakʼ dan do raṅgaoe dapala, ar gochare emakʼ nońjor do kurkurạukʼ edrege." 
Proverbs21:15 Hokakʼ kạmi lekhan dhorom hoṛ doko rạskạkʼa, menkhan bạṛicʼ kạmiko doko torasokʼa." 
Proverbs21:16 Okoe hoṛ bud reakʼ hor bạgikate eṭakʼ secʼe ghańjeṛokʼ uni do gocʼko sãoteye tahena. 
Proverbs21:17 Okoe hoṛ kusi rạskại dulạṛetʼ uni doe reṅgejokʼa; okoe hoṛ darkha rasa ar mahkaokʼ sunumkoe dulạṛetʼ uni do tishõ bae kisạ̃ṛ daṛeakʼa. 
Proverbs21:18 Ar mucạtʼre dhorom hoṛ bodolte bedhoromko ar bhage hoṛ bodolte bepạtiạrko kosṭoko ńama. 
Proverbs21:19 Jhogṛakʼkan ar kheń kheńokʼkan maejiu sãote mitʼ oṛakʼre tahen khon hahaṅkarre calaokate girobasokʼge bhagea. 
Proverbs21:20 Budankoakʼ oṛakʼre do damanakʼ dhon ar mahkaokʼ sunum tahena, menkhan bebuj hoṛ do onae ublạ ḍublạ cabaya." 
Proverbs21:21 Okoe hoṛ do ahkaokʼ salakʼ sạri ar pạtiạr horteye calakʼ uni do jionre, bhor ar mane ńama." 
Proverbs21:22 Ạkilan hoṛ do daṛeankoakʼ nagraha cetanteye teṅgokʼa ar okaṭakʼ gaṛre onkoko bhorsa akan onae marao giḍikatakoa. 
Proverbs21:23 Okoe acʼakʼ moca ar alaṅe dobnao uni do muhin khon rukhiyại ńama. 
Proverbs21:24 Bạḍại ar dhomokkan hoṛakʼ ńutum do, “Landa dhutʼicʼ;” uni do bạ̃ṛti gorbokʼ tulucʼe kạmiya." 
Proverbs21:25 Asaṅpoḍa hoṛakʼ laloc do uniyakʼ gujukʼgeye ạguiya, ente uniyakʼ ti do kạmi hõ bae kạmiya." 
Proverbs21:26 Nonkan hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe do sanam ghạṛicʼko laloc, menkhan dhorom hoṛ doe emokʼa ar bae cuputʼ ruạṛa." 
Proverbs21:27 Bedhoromkoakʼ dãṛẽ Probhu Isor doe hirkhạwakʼkana, ar ona bạṛicʼ monsubạte ạgulen khan enḍekhan ona do artetʼge hirkhạwakʼ hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs21:28 Eṛe goha do marao cabakʼa, menkhan okoe hoṛ mon lagao kateye ańjom uniyakʼ katha do jaejug tahena." 
Proverbs21:29 Bedhorom hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼãhãre jãhãn lajao do baṅ ńelokʼa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ jion horre taṛam lạgitʼe khạṭigea." 
Proverbs21:30 Jãhãn ạkil, jãhãn bud ar jãhãn goṭawakʼge Probhu Isor upạrte ohoge teṅgo daṛelena." 
Proverbs21:31 Lạṛhại hilokʼ lạgitʼ sadom do sajao doho akadere hõ, jitạukʼ do Probhu Isorrege ṭehãḍokʼ kana." 
Proverbs22:1 Acel pacel dhon khon bhage ńutum hạrjoṅge bhagea; Sona ar Rupạ khon eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ dulạṛ ńamge bhagea. 
Proverbs22:2 Kisạ̃ṛ ar reṅgecʼ hoṛko talare begar do bạnukʼa Probhu Isor do onko sanamkoren bebenaoicʼ kanae. 
Proverbs22:3 Budan hoṛko do muhinko ńel darama arko okokʼa, menkhan lelha hoṛ do muhin ńelkate hõ calakʼtegeko tahena ar ona iạte sạjạiko ńama." 
Proverbs22:4 Nindhạnokʼ ar Probhu Isor botorae reakʼ kuṛại do dhon man ar jione ạguiya. 
Proverbs22:5 Peṛta hoṛakʼ horre do jạnum ar jhampakoge tahena, menkhan okoe apnarte sontore tahen uni do onako khon sahaṛ akaeye tahena." 
Proverbs22:6 Gidrạ do ṭhik horte taṛam cetʼaeme, uniye haṛamlenre hõ ona hor khon do bae ghańjeṛokʼa." 
Proverbs22:7 Kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do nacarko cetanre mạlikiye calaoeda, ar rin jom hoṛ do emokʼicʼren golame hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs22:8 Okoe hoṛ bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ itại eretʼkan uni do muhin reakʼ phosole ira; ar uniyakʼ raṅgao reakʼ ṭheṅga do ạuṛiyagokʼtaea. 
Proverbs22:9 Danetʼkan hoṛ okoe do acʼakʼ jomakʼ reakʼ bhag khon reṅgecʼ orecʼkoe emako kan uni do bhore ńama. 
Proverbs22:10 Landa dhutʼicʼ do laga ńirime, inạkhan jhogṛa do oḍokʼ calakʼa; ar kạphạriạu ar lajao hõ cabakʼa." 
Proverbs22:11 Okoe hoṛ khạṭi ontore dulạṛ ar daya reakʼ kathae roṛ uni do rajge gate peṛa lekae ńamea. 
Proverbs22:12 Probhu Isor do ạkile rukhiyạya, menkhan bepạtiạukoakʼ katha doe ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa." 
Proverbs22:13 Asaṅpoḍa doe mena, “Bahrere dhạcri kul menaea, kulhireń oḍoklen khange iń doe gojeńa.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Eṭakʼ maejiu reakʼ moca do khạndri khạndṛuṅ kana; ar Probhu Isore raṅgaoae kan hoṛ do onaregeye ńurokʼa. 
Proverbs22:15 Gidrạ do sobhabtegeko bebujgea, menkhan ḍanṭao ṭheṅga do uni khon onae laga pharaka." 
Proverbs22:16 Dhon lab lạgitʼ okoe hoṛ reṅgecʼkoe santaoko se okoe hoṛ kisạ̃ṛkoe danako unkin banar hoṛge ṭonṭare kin paṛaokʼa.
