Proverbs22:17 Ạkilankoakʼ kathare lutur oḍaotam, ar okaṭakʼko menetʼ ona ańjomme; ar iń okaṭakʼ sikhnạtiń emamkan ona moneyakʼme." 
Proverbs22:18 Ona cecetʼakʼ amakʼ ontorrem rebetʼ dohole khan do jutgea; ona do sanam ghạṛicʼ amakʼ luṭire tahenma. 
Proverbs22:19 Probhu Isorre jemonem bhorsa daṛeakʼ onate iń do teheń, jotowakʼiń baḍae ocoketʼmea." 
Proverbs22:20 Solha ar ạkil reaṅ am lạgitʼ cetʼ pegel goṭecʼ solha reakʼ katha bạń ol akawatʼmea? 
Proverbs22:21 Iń do cetʼ sạri ar bhorsateakʼ kathako bạń cetʼ akawatʼmea, jemon onam em daṛeako one okoe do amko kol akatʼme?" 
Proverbs22:22 Mitʼṭen hoṛ doe nandange iạte uniyakʼ jinisko alom hataotaea, ar bicạrre harkhetokʼ hoṛ do alom maraoea." 
Proverbs22:23 Ente Probhu Isor do mamblareye onko sejokʼa, ar okoe onkoakʼ jiniskoko recʼ ạguakatʼ uni do onkoakʼ jiwiye hataotakoa." 
Proverbs22:24 Ṭheṭa hoṛ sãote do alogem gatekʼa; ar okoe usạrateye raṅgao hodokʼ uni sãote hõ alom soṅgekʼa. 
Proverbs22:25 Arem onka lekhan am do uni lekam ceda ar jhamparem paṛaokʼa. 
Proverbs22:26 Ti dohokate jãhãeakʼ rin reakʼ jạmin do alom hoyokʼa; 
Proverbs22:27 Ona bam hala ruạr daṛeakʼ khan amakʼ giticʼakʼ aṭetʼ hõ am ṭhen khon idikʼa. 
Proverbs22:28 Amren hapṛamko do simạ reakʼ okaṭakʼ cinhạ dhiriko bandhao oṭo akatʼ, ona do alom ocoga." 
Proverbs22:29 Am do cetʼ nonkan jãhãe hoṛem ńel akatʼkoa oko do gạkhuṛ titeye kạmikan? Uni do rajko lạgitʼe kạmiya, ar hoṛko tabere do baṅa." 
Proverbs23:1 Am do tinre disạm calaoicʼ tulucʼ jojomem duṛupʼa, unre am samaṅre cetʼko menakʼa ona mońjte ạri bạndhime." 
Proverbs23:2 Arem hạbạitage khan enḍekhan sontorokʼme! Ar apnar sambṛaokʼte jomme. 
Proverbs23:3 Uniyakʼ damanakʼ jomakʼre alom lalocakʼa, ente ona jomakʼ tayomre disạm cakʼlaoicʼakʼ jãhãn monsubạ tahẽ botecʼkokʼa." 
Proverbs23:4 Dhon lab lạgitʼ do alom dhãoṛa dhạ̃uṛi baṛaea; ar noa lạgitʼ amakʼ budre hõ alom bhorsakʼa. 
Proverbs23:5 Dhon secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼ calaolen khange ona do cabakʼa, ente ona reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko do janamokʼa ar pajhaṛ leka coṭ secʼe uḍạukʼa." 
Proverbs23:6 Lalocan hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ do alom joma; ar uniyakʼ soṛom soṛom jomakʼko hõ alom hạ̃sakʼa; 
Proverbs23:7 ente uni doe nonkan hoṛ kana okoe do sanam ghạṛicʼ acʼakʼ jomakʼ reakʼ dame hisạb baṛayetʼ. Uni doe metama, “Ne jomme ar ńũime,” Menkhan uniyakʼ mon do am tulucʼ bạnukʼtaea." 
Proverbs23:8 Ar amem lapetʼ akatʼakʼ dom ulạ giḍiya, ar amakʼ jut jut kathako do ạuṛiyagokʼa." 
Proverbs23:9 Khaṭo bujan hoṛko ṭhen alom galmaraoa; onko do amakʼ ạkil reakʼ kathako nihạ̃t giḍiytama. 
Proverbs23:10 Jug reakʼ simạ do alom ocoga se ṭũạr amarkoakʼ khet baṛge hõ alom dokhol joṅa," 
Proverbs23:11 ente onkoren chakʼḍaoicʼ doe daṛeangea; unige am upạrte onkoakʼ mamblae calaoa. 
Proverbs23:12 Am do cecetʼakʼ secʼ mone lagaome, ar ạkil reakʼ katha luturakʼme." 
Proverbs23:13 Gidrạ ḍanṭaoko do alom ikạkakʼa; ṭheṅgatem dal lere hõ uni do bae gujukʼa. 
Proverbs23:14 Pãeṛãte uni do sạjại emaeme inạ khan Sheol khon uniyakʼ jiwim bańcaotaea. 
Proverbs23:15 E bạbu, amakʼ ontor do ạkilte perecʼlentam khan enḍekhan ińakʼ mon hõ rạskạkʼtińạ." 
Proverbs23:16 Amakʼ luṭikin ṭhik kathae roṛ lekhan ińakʼ jiu hõ rạskạkʼtińạ. 
Proverbs23:17 Amakʼ mon do kại hoṛko aloe hiskạwakoma, bickom sanam ghạṛicʼ Probhu Isor botoraete khemaome." 
Proverbs23:18 Enḍekhan amakʼ tayom daram lạgitʼ as tahena, ar ona as do baṅ berthakʼtama." 
Proverbs23:19 E bạbu, katha ańjomme, ar ạkilan hoyokʼme, ar amakʼ mon do ṭhik horte sen ocoyme." 
Proverbs23:20 Okoe darkha rasa bạ̃ṛtiye hoṅgor se okoeko hạbạitage ar bạ̃ṛti jelko jom, onko tulucʼ do alom soṅgekʼa;" 
Proverbs23:21 ente bul bhuteṛ ar hạbạitako doko ḍiṅgrạkʼa, ar dudṛumkan hoṛ do jhador padorakʼteye oyokʼa." 
Proverbs23:22 Am babawakʼ katha ańjomme okoe do jonome emakawatʼme; ar am gogoe buḍhilenre alom neṅghaoea. 
Proverbs23:23 Sạriyakʼ kirińme ar ona do alom ạkhrińa; Hẽ, ạkil, sikhạuna ar buj baṛe kiriń joṅme." 
Proverbs23:24 Dhoromicʼren apat doe hulạsokʼa; ar ạkilanicʼren apat do acʼren hopon hoteteye rạskạkʼa. 
Proverbs23:25 Amren go baba dokin rạskạkʼ ma; ar okoeye janam akatʼme uni doe hulạsokʼma. 
Proverbs23:26 E bạbu, ińakʼ cecetʼakʼ baṛe moneyakʼme; jemon ińakʼ jion ńeltem rạskạkʼ." 
Proverbs23:27 Ńelme, kusmbi kuṛi do khạndri ghaḍlakʼ lekanae, ar sendra baṛae maejiu do sakṛa kuńge." 
Proverbs23:28 Onkan maejiu do ḍạku lekae tãṛãgokʼkana, ar manwa talare bepạtiạu hoṛkoe saṅgeyetʼkoa." 
Proverbs23:29 Okoeye hae haeyokʼkana? Ar okoe doe jare jarekʼ kana? Okoe doe jhogṛakʼ kana? Ar okoe doe bok bokaokʼ kana? Okoe ạuṛiyakʼe ghạl ocokʼ kana? Ar okoeyakʼ mẽtʼ do arakʼgea? 
Proverbs23:30 Okoe ḍher ghạṛicʼ bubulakʼko ńũi onkoakʼ do nonkage hoyokʼa; onko do mesal akatʼ bubulakʼ ńũi lạgitʼko calakʼa. 
Proverbs23:31 Bubulakʼ arakʼge ńelokʼkanre hõ alom beṅgetʼakʼa, ar bạṭire jiṛipʼ jiṛibokʼre hõ, ar hodoṛ mente nạnḍrire bolokʼre hõ." 
Proverbs23:32 Mucạtʼre ona do biń lekae sogakʼa, ar kạrinạṅgiń biń lekae gegera." 
Proverbs23:33 Unre amakʼ mẽtʼ do aema lekanakʼkoe ńela ar mon do aje baje kathakoe hudisokʼa. 
Proverbs23:34 Am do jalapurire giticʼ akan hoṛ lekam hoyokʼa, one badam khunṭi coṭreye giticʼ akan hoṛ lekage." 
Proverbs23:35 Amem mena, “Onko do ińko ghạl akadińạ menkhan baṅ haso ledeńạ, onko do ińko dalkedińạ menkhan bạń bujhạuleda. Ar tinre baṅiń ebhenokʼ arhõ thoṛań ńũkea." 
Proverbs24:1 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko cetanre alom hiskạkʼa, ar onko sãote tahen hõ alom hạ̃sakʼa." 
Proverbs24:2 Ente onkoakʼ mon do jor julum reakʼe ponthaya ar onkoakʼ luṭi do behok reakʼ kathakoe roṛa 
Proverbs24:3 Ạkil reakʼ goṛote oṛakʼ do benaokʼ kana, ar bud iạtege ṭarhao tahenkana." 
Proverbs24:4 Ạkil reakʼ goṛote kandhako do daman ar mońj mońj jisinkote perejokʼ kana. 
Proverbs24:5 Ạkilan hoṛakʼ do maraṅ ektiạri menakʼa, ar budan hoṛ do apnarakʼ daṛeko baḍhaotakoa." 
Proverbs24:6 Lạṛhạiyem calakʼre buj sujtem calakʼa ar ḍher solhako iạtege jit do hoyokʼtama. 
Proverbs24:7 Ạkil do khaṭo budan hoṛko khon pharakre tahena; nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen mocage bae jhija. 
Proverbs24:8 Okoe bạṛicʼakʼe goṭae uni do phundi aṭaoyicʼko metaea. 
Proverbs24:9 Khaṭo bujan hoṛakʼ soṛojontro do kại kana; ar landa dhutʼicʼ do hoṛkoko hirkhạwaea. 
Proverbs24:10 Gạr hilokʼrem lạbṛukʼena menkhan, enḍekhan am dom lebṛecʼgea." 
Proverbs24:11 Okoe gujukʼ lạgitʼko idi ocokʼkan onko baṛe rukhiyạkom; ar khun ocokʼ lạgitʼ okoe kinḍạ manḍeko idi ocokʼkan onko hõ ruạṛ ạgukom. 
Proverbs24:12 Amem menle khan, “Ale do cetʼge bale baḍaea,” Menkhan okoe mone tulạ aṭkaretʼ uni do cetʼ amakʼ katha bae baḍaea? Okoe amakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạyetʼ uni do cetʼ ona bae baḍaea? Uni do mimitʼ manwako akoakʼ kạmi leka kuṛại do cetʼ bae emakoa?" 
Proverbs24:13 E bạbu, dumur rasa jomme, ente ona do bhagegea; ar chata khon rasa jomme, ona do amakʼ tạru lạgitʼ heṛemgea." 
Proverbs24:14 Noa hõ baḍaeme, ạkil do amakʼ ontor lạgitʼ dumur rasa leka kana; ạkilem hameṭ lekhan amakʼ tayom daram as do menakʼgetama, ona as do baṅ berthakʼtama." 
Proverbs24:15 E bedhorom hoṛ, dhorom hoṛakʼ oṛakʼ upạrte alom tãṛãkʼgokʼa, ar uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ire hat alom lagaoa;" 
Proverbs24:16 ente dhorom hoṛ do eae dhaoe leńjetʼlenre hõ uni do arhõe beretʼ ruạṛa, menkhan bedhorom hoṛ do ghoṭna iạteko tohotʼ bhindạṛokʼa." 
Proverbs24:17 Amren bạiriye gurokʼre alom rạskạkʼa; are tohotʼ bhinḍạṛlenre hõ amakʼ mon do aloe hulạsokʼma. 
Proverbs24:18 Arem onkale khan enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ona ńelteye edrekʼa, ar bạiri cetan khon uniyakʼ raṅgaoe ocogtaea." 
Proverbs24:19 Bạṛicʼ kạmi hoṛko iạte alom dur durạukʼa, ar bedhoromko ńelte alom hiskạkʼa." 
Proverbs24:20 Ente bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ do cetʼ asge bạnukʼa, ar bedhoromkoakʼ diuhe do ĩṛĩjokʼtakoa." 
Proverbs24:21 E bạbu, Probhu Isor ar raj botorakinme, ar huhulkan hoṛko tulucʼ do alom mesalokʼa;" 
Proverbs24:22 ente onko cetanre maraokʼ do acʼkage hijukʼa, Probhu Isor ar raj ṭhen khon cetʼlekan muhin hijukʼ ona do okoeye baḍaea?" 
Proverbs24:23 Noako hõ ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ katha kana. Bicạrre hoṛakʼ mẽtʼãhã beṅgetʼakʼ do baṅ bhagea. 
Proverbs24:24 Bạṛicʼ hoṛ okoeye metae, “Am dom dhorom hoṛ kana,” Jạt jạtrenko do uniko sarapaea. ar disạm disạmrenko do uniko hirkhạwaea." 
Proverbs24:25 Menkhan dusiko do okoe dusi menteko dusiyetʼko onko cetanre do bạ̃ṛti bhor paṛaokʼa, ar onko doko kusikʼa." 
Proverbs24:26 Okoe ṭhik kathakoe ạcur ruạṛ, uni do gate leka luṭitaye cokʼakʼ kana." 
Proverbs24:27 Amakʼ khet baṛge ṭhik ṭhakme ar amakʼ bahre kạmi sạtme, ar ona tayom do amakʼ oṛakʼ duạr benaojoṅme." 
Proverbs24:28 Jãhãnakʼ begor baḍaete am aḍepaserenko upạrte goha alom ema, ar eṛe alom roṛa." 
Proverbs24:29 Noa katha alom mena, “Uni cetʼlekae ceka akawạdiń iń hoń onkawaea; ar cetʼlekae cekawakatʼ onkageń halawaea.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Iń do mitʼṭen asaṅpoḍa hoṛakʼ khet aṛeteń parom senlena, khaṭo bujan hoṛakʼ darkha bagwan secʼtege;" 
Proverbs24:31 ńelkedạń sanam jaega do rạṅgạinite perecʼ akana, ar rạṅgạinite baṛge hõ esetʼakana, ar dhiri reakʼ pạcri hõ lạnduṛ akana." 
Proverbs24:32 Ar okań ńelketʼ onań ạribạndhikeda, ar ona ńelte noa cecetʼakʼiń ńamkeda," 
Proverbs24:33 “‘Thoṛaganiń jạpitʼ hataṛ kakʼrege, arhõ thoṛaganiń giticʼ ńokʼlenge, ar ti kukucʼkate mitʼ ghạṛiń kunḍlạṅ hataṛlenge.’" 
Proverbs24:34 Menkhan mitʼ talao peṛako hecʼamre se ḍạkukoakʼ tire paṛaolenre cetʼleka okulạn hijukʼ, ṭhik onkage amakʼ okulạn hõ hijukʼa." 
Proverbs25:1 Noa do Solomone roṛakatʼ arhõ bhage sopolha kana. Jihudạren raj Hiskiạren hoṛko do jogaṛkate noakoko ol ucạṛletʼa. 
Proverbs25:2 Isor do jãhãnakʼ kathae oko dohoy khan ona do uniyakʼ man kana: ar rapajko jãhãnakʼ reaṅge ḍunḍhạukateko sodorle khan ona do onko lạgitʼ man kana. 
Proverbs25:3 Serma cetʼleka usul ar ot cetʼleka khạndrige, onkage rapajkoakʼ mon hõ baṅ ḍunḍhạukʼa." 
Proverbs25:4 Rupạ khon mạilạ chaṭao ocogme, enḍekhan sonhar do onate mońj bhajankoe benao daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs25:5 Bedhorom kạmiyicʼ do raj samaṅ khon ocogem, enḍekhan dhorom kạmi hotete uniyakʼ siṅghạson do ṭarhao tahena." 
Proverbs25:6 Rajakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre apnar do alom sabasikʼa; ar maraṅ hoṛko talare apnarakʼ ṭhạ̃i do alom teṅgoya; 
Proverbs25:7 ente cetʼ leka laha khonem ńelakatʼ onkage cetan hudạren hoṛko samaṅre nicạṛokʼ khon am metamge bhagea, “Nonḍe rakapʼ hijukʼme.”" 
Proverbs25:8 Hare phare kacahạrite do alom calakʼa, ente mucạtʼre am aḍepaseren hoṛ lajaoreye paṛao ocolem khan unre cetʼem cekaea?" 
Proverbs25:9 Am aḍepaseren hoṛko upạrtem mambla lekhan enḍekhan eṭakʼicʼakʼ oko katha do alom sodora; 
Proverbs25:10 Arem onkae khan ańjomicʼ hoṛ do ame nisṛạumea, ar amakʼ bodnam do tishõ baṅ cabakʼtama." 
Proverbs25:11 Tak nạpitre roṛakan katha do rupạ cetanre goṛhon akatʼ sona reakʼ ḍabhako lekana. 
Proverbs25:12 Sona reakʼ pagra se bhage sona reakʼ abhran cetʼleka, onka kangea ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ nisṛạu katha do." 
Proverbs25:13 Pạtiạricʼ paṭhaona uniren mạlik ṭhen do irokʼ jokhecʼ reakʼ him leka kanae; ente okoe uniko kollede uni do uni kisạ̃ṛakʼ jiwiye raṛejtaea. 
Proverbs25:14 Okoe hoṛ dan reakʼ maraṅ maraṅ kathae roṛ menkhan acʼ do ona bae onkae, uni do nonkan kuṛhạ ar hoe leka kanae one onare jãhãn dakʼge bạnukʼ." 
Proverbs25:15 Sombhuri hotete disạm cakʼlaoicʼ doe rạmjạu ocokʼa; ar mạ̃hir alaṅ do jaṅ hõ jaṅe rạpuda. 
Proverbs25:16 Dumur rasam ńamle khan jạruṛam leka jomme, bạ̃ṛtim jomle khan dom uchlạu oḍoka." 
Proverbs25:17 Gatemakʼ oṛakʼte ghane ghạṛicʼ do alom calakʼa, ḍherem calaolen khan uni do bae kusiyama." 
Proverbs25:18 Okoe hoṛ acʼ aḍepaseren hoṛko upạrte eṛe gohae em uni do lạṛhại mutạk, tarwaṛe ar laser sar lekanae." 
Proverbs25:19 Muhinre bepạtiạran hoṛ cetanre bhorsakʼ do lewe lewe ḍaṭa ar leḍha jaṅga leka. 
Proverbs25:20 Okoeyakʼ mon bạṛicʼge uni ṭhen okoeye sereń uni do rabaṅ dinre kicricʼe totʼgiḍikakʼ se ghaore sirkạye duletʼkan hoṛ lekanae. 
Proverbs25:21 Amren bạiri reṅgecʼlere jomakʼ emaeme, ar tetaṅlere ńũiyakʼ emaeme;" 
Proverbs25:22 Entem onka lekhan uniyakʼ bohokʼre seṅgel aṅgram puńjiaea, ar Probhu Isorge kuṛạiye emama." 
Proverbs25:23 Utạr secʼ reakʼ hoe cetʼleka dakʼe ạguiyetʼ, onkage cuglikan alaṅ do kurkunḍucʼ mẽtʼãhãe ńelocoya." 
Proverbs25:24 Jhogṛayicʼ maejiu tulucʼ mitʼ oṛakʼre tahen khon chat reakʼ mitʼ konare eskar tahenge bhagea. 
Proverbs25:25 Tetaṅede kan hoṛ lạgitʼ cetʼleka dakʼ jạruṛa, onka kangea sạṅgiń disạm khon hijukʼkan bhage sombat do." 
Proverbs25:26 Boḍe akatʼ ḍạḍi ar kharapakʼ jharna leka kanae, uni dhorom hoṛ okoe do bedhoromicʼ samaṅreye lewekʼkan." 
Proverbs25:27 Ḍher dumur rasa jom do baṅ bhagea; ar bạ̃ṛti man ńamhõ baṅ bhagea. 
Proverbs25:28 Okoe hoṛ apnarte bae sambṛao daṛeakʼ uni do pạcri bhit rạputʼ akan nagraha leka kanae. 
Proverbs26:1 Niron dinre him ar irokʼ dinre jạputʼ cetʼleka baṅ ṭhik, onkage bebuj hoṛ lạgitʼ manot do lek baṅkana." 
Proverbs26:2 Ghaṛwa se bhạluạ cẽṛẽ cetʼleka hante nateko uḍạu baṛae, onkage ạuṛiyakʼ reakʼ sarap do baṅ pheḍ hijukʼa." 
Proverbs26:3 Sadom lạgitʼ cetʼleka cạbuk, ar gadha lạgitʼ do jhin, onkage pãeṛã do bebujkoakʼ dea lạgitʼkana." 
Proverbs26:4 Bebuj hoṛ do acʼakʼ lelhatetʼ leka alom roṛ ruạṛaea, arem roṛ ruạṛae khan am hõ uni lekam hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs26:5 Bebujicʼ do acʼakʼ bebuj leka baṛe roṛ ruạṛaeme, ar baṅ khan uni do acʼ nońjorre budane hudisokʼa." 
Proverbs26:6 Okoe hoṛ bebujicʼ hotete sombate kol uni do acʼakʼ jaṅgageye samagtaea ar harkhetgeye ńũjoṅa. 
Proverbs26:7 Leḍha hoṛakʼ liṛạṅ loṛoṅokʼkan jaṅga leka kana, bebujicʼakʼ mocare bhage katha do." 
Proverbs26:8 Okoe hoṛ ginḍwạrire acʼakʼ dhiriye sajao dohokakʼ uni do bebujicʼ manote emaekan hoṛ lekanae. 
Proverbs26:9 Bul bhuteṛ hoṛakʼ tire jạnum ḍạr lekana, bebuj hoṛakʼ mocare kạhtukko do." 
Proverbs26:10 Mitʼṭen tutuń hoṛ cetʼleka ạuṛige sare aṛakʼetʼte sanamkoe ghạletʼko, onkage uni hoṛ, okoe do bebujicʼ se horten hoṛko kạmireye lagaoko." 
Proverbs26:11 Seta cetʼleka acʼakʼ becʼ secʼe ạcurokʼ, onkage bebuj hoṛ do arhõ lelhatetʼe kạmiya." 
Proverbs26:12 Am do cetʼ nonkan hoṛkom ńel akatʼkoa okoe do apnarakʼ mẽtʼreye ạkilanicʼ kan? Ona khon boroṅ bebujicʼ reaṅge as menakʼa. 
Proverbs26:13 Asaṅpoḍa doe mena, “Horre dhạcri kul menaea; ar kulhire do jojom kule dãṛã baṛaekana.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Kobjare cetʼleka kapaṭ ạcurokʼ onkage asaṅpoḍa do acʼakʼ aṭetʼe ạcurtaea. 
Proverbs26:15 Asaṅpoḍa do thạrire tiye topoytaea, menkhan moca hạbicʼ ti rakabtae hõe asketokʼa." 
Proverbs26:16 Okoe hudis cintạkateko roṛruạṛ onkan eae hoṛko khon asaṅpoḍa do apnarte budane hudisokʼa. 
Proverbs26:17 Horte calakʼ jokhecʼ okoe hoṛ hoṛakʼ jhogṛareye seledokʼ, uni do setawakʼ luture peṭeretʼkan hoṛ lekanae." 
Proverbs26:18 Okoe koṅka hoṛ jolokʼ ṭhuṭkutʼ ar sarkoe tuń baṛayetʼ one onate gujukʼ hoedaṛekokʼ," 
Proverbs26:19 onkage uni hoṛ do okoe acʼren gate eṛeyedeteye metae, “Iń do ekeniń landawam kana.”" 
Proverbs26:20 Sahan baṅ tiṅgi idiyakʼ khan seṅgel do ĩṛĩjokʼgea; ar katha baṅ gutu galaṅakʼ khan kạphạriạu do cabakʼgea. 
Proverbs26:21 Jolokʼkan aṅgrare arhõ koela emakʼ khan ar seṅgelre arhõ kaṭ emakʼ khan cetʼleka hoyokʼ, onkage jhogṛakʼ hoṛ do jhogṛae salgao ocoya." 
Proverbs26:22 Nindạuicʼakʼ katha do sebel jomakʼ leka; ona do manwa lacʼ bhitri hạbicʼ bolokʼ kana. 
Proverbs26:23 Hasa bhajanre jiṛipʼ jiṛibokʼ lasraoakʼ leka kana, bạṛicʼ monre cĩkạ̃ṛ luṭi do." 
Proverbs26:24 Kurudamkan hoṛ do acʼakʼ luṭite heṛem heṛeme roṛama, menkhan ontorre do phikire dohoyeda." 
Proverbs26:25 Uniyakʼ katha sebelgere hõ alom pạtiạuakʼa, ente uniyakʼ ontorre do eae goṭecʼ hirkhạwakʼko menakʼa." 
Proverbs26:26 Acʼakʼ kurud do calakteye dapallere hõ enhõ acʼakʼ bạṛicʼtetʼ do manḍerre sodorokʼa. 
Proverbs26:27 Okoe hoṛ khạ̃ṛiye lae uni do onaregeye ńurokʼa; ar okoe hoṛ dhiriye guṛgạu gotʼkakʼ ona do acʼge guṛgạu hecʼaea. 
Proverbs26:28 Eṛeyicʼ do alaṅte okoeye ghạl akatʼko onko doe kurudako kana, ar cĩkạ̃ṛ moca do bhaṅla bhaṭe ạgujoṅa." 
Proverbs27:1 Gapa din lạgitʼ do alom sarhaokʼa, ente oka hilokʼ cetʼ hoyokʼa ona do bam baḍaea." 
Proverbs27:2 Eṭakʼ hoṛ baṛeko sarhaome ma, menkhan amakʼ luṭi do alo; hẽ, eṭakʼ hoṛegeko sarhaome ma." 
Proverbs27:3 Dhiri do hamalgea ar gitil hõ hamalgea, menkhan bebuj hoṛakʼ raṅgao do onakin banar khon hõ hamalgea." 
Proverbs27:4 Raṅgao do kurmutạhagea ar edre hõ ạḍi tạpisgea, menkhan mẽtʼ jolokʼ samaṅre do okoehõ bae teṅgo daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs27:5 Jãhãe ame dulạṛme ar ona bae sodor, ona khon bickom jãhãe amakʼ dosko sodorteye udukʼam onage bhagea." 
Proverbs27:6 Bạirikoakʼ cokʼ do sastagea, menkhan gate hoteteakʼ ghạlko do bepạtiạrgea." 
Proverbs27:7 Okoeyakʼ lacʼ bigetae uni do dumur rasa hõ bae moneyakʼa, menkhan okoeyakʼ reṅgecʼ menakʼtae uni ṭhen do haṛhatʼakʼ hõ heṛemgea." 
Proverbs27:8 Tukạ bạgikate uḍạu baṛaekan cẽṛẽ cetʼleka, onkage oṛakʼ bạgikate dãṛã baṛaekan hoṛ hõ." 
Proverbs27:9 Mahkaokʼ sunum ar dhup do monre rạskạ bujhạukʼa; onkage gateakʼ solha do gate ṭhen heṛemgea. 
Proverbs27:10 Apnarren se babaren gate do alom bạgi giḍiyea; Muhinre boehawakʼ oṛakʼte alom calakʼa; sạṅgińre tahen boeha khon do aḍepaseren boehageko bhagea. 
Proverbs27:11 E bạbu, ạkilanicʼ hoyokʼme ar ińakʼ mon rạskạ ocoytińme; inạ khan okoeko landa dhutʼạńkan onkoń roṛ ruạṛ daṛeakoa." 
Proverbs27:12 Bujhạntar hoṛ do muhinko ńelle khan asrayko hataoa, menkhan lelha hoṛ do muhin ńelkatehõ calakʼtegeko tahena ar ona iạte kosṭoko ńama." 
Proverbs27:13 Okoe ạ̃nạ̃ri hoṛren jạmine teṅgokʼ uni do uniyakʼ kicricʼe hataotaema; ar bidisiạ hoṛ ńutumte jạmine teṅgokʼicʼ do unige bandhoke dohoyema. 
Proverbs27:14 Okoe hoṛ ạḍi setakʼre beretʼkate ãṭ aṛaṅte acʼren gate peṛakoe bhorako ona do sarap mentege lekhakʼtaea. 
Proverbs27:15 Cumḍiń ạimại ar tatle tal jorokʼkan sate dakʼ unkin banarge kin somangea. 
Proverbs27:16 Hoe cetʼleka baṅ okokʼ ar jojomtite muṭ akatʼ mahkao sunum reakʼ so cetʼleka baṅ okokʼ, onkage jhogṛakʼkan maejiu hõ bae oko daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs27:17 Mẽṛhẽtʼ do cetʼleka mẽṛhẽtʼe laseretʼa, onkage mitʼṭen hoṛ do acʼren gateakʼ bude laseretʼtaea." 
Proverbs27:18 Loa dareye jotonetʼkan hoṛ do ona reakʼ jogeye joma; ar okoe acʼren kisạ̃ṛe sapʼsoraekan uni doe manot ocokʼa. 
Proverbs27:19 Dakʼ do cetʼleka mẽtʼãhãe ạrsi udukʼetʼ, onkage manwawakʼ mon do uniye ạrsi udukʼedea." 
Proverbs27:20 Sheol ar Norok cetʼleka tishõ bakin tirpitokʼ, onkage manwawakʼ mẽtʼ hõ baṅ tirpitokʼa." 
Proverbs27:21 Rupạ biḍạu aṭkar lạgitʼ do galao reakʼ jinis menakʼa, ar sona lạgitʼ do culhạ, menkhan manwa do acʼakʼ sarhaoakʼreye biḍạu oromokʼa." 
Proverbs27:22 Bebuj hoṛ do anaj sãote ukhuṛre toktem huṛuṅ gunḍạlere hõ, enhõ uniyakʼ lelhatetʼ do bae aṛagea." 
Proverbs27:23 Amren merom ar bhiḍi palrenkoakʼ dosa do amge mońjte baḍaekakʼme, ar amren palrenko secʼ hõ moneyakʼme;" 
Proverbs27:24 ente dhon do jaejug baṅ tahena, raj mukuṭ hõ piṛhike piṛhi do baṅ tahena." 
Proverbs27:25 Khet khon tinre ghãs samṭaokʼa ar nãwã ghãs janamokʼa ar buru khon ghãs samṭao aderokʼa," 
Proverbs27:26 unre bhiḍi hoponko do amakʼ kicricʼko jogaoa, ar merom do nãwã jumi reakʼ damko emama;" 
Proverbs27:27 Ona chaḍa am ar amakʼ gharońj lạgitʼ do aema toam ńama; ar amren juạn kạ̃ṛmĩko hõ ona ńũteko moṭakʼa. 
Proverbs28:1 Bedhoromko do begor khudạukotegeko dạṛ joṅa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do dhạcri kul leka dil akaeko tahena." 
Proverbs28:2 Disạmren hoṛkoakʼ ghạṭ iạte onaren aema cạlạuakoko hoyokʼa, menkhan ạkilan ar budan cạlạuako hotetege disạm reakʼ kajaktetʼ do tahena." 
Proverbs28:3 Nandankoe jor bojorko kumãyã cạlạua hoṛ do baratʼ baratʼ dakʼ lekanae one onate phosol ḍahaokʼ. 
Proverbs28:4 Okoe Probhu Isorakʼ ạnko bạgi giḍiyakʼkan onko do bạṛicʼ hoṛko sarhaokoa, menkhan okoe onako manaoetʼkan onko do bạṛicʼko upạrteko teṅgona." 
Proverbs28:5 Bạṛicʼ hoṛko do hok bicạr reaṅ bako bujhạua, menkhan okoe Probhu Isorakʼ sana lekako calakʼkan onko do boge bạṛicʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛeko ńama." 
Proverbs28:6 Kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ peṛta horteye calakʼ khon uni reṅgecʼ hoṛgeye bhagea one okoe do bin dusạnteye dãṛãnkan. 
Proverbs28:7 Ạn ạrikoe manaoetʼkan uni hopon doe budangea, menkhan okoe do dạrdạharen gatekane uni hopon do apate lajao ocoyea." 
Proverbs28:8 Okoe hoṛ jãhã lekan sudtege acʼakʼ dhone baḍhaotae, uni do nandanko dayawako lạgitʼge onae jarwayeda." 
Proverbs28:9 Probhu Isorakʼ ạn ạri reakʼ katha jãhãe ańjomkate hõ bae senakʼ, enḍekhan uniyakʼ koejoṅ hõ hirkhạwanakʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Proverbs28:10 Soṛa monan hoṛ okoe bạṛicʼ horteye idiye uni do acʼakʼ khạ̃ṛiregeye ńurokʼa, menkhan miridosko do bhạlại hoyokʼtakoa." 
Proverbs28:11 Kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do acʼakʼ mẽtʼreye ạkilan hoṛ kana, menkhan bud menakʼtae reṅgecʼ hoṛ do uniye baḍae oromedea." 
Proverbs28:12 Dhorom hoṛko ektiạriko ńamle khan sanam hoṛakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼa, menkhan bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ tire ektiạri calaolen khan hoṛko bako ńamokʼa." 
Proverbs28:13 Okoe hoṛ acʼakʼ kạiye danaṅkakʼ uni do bae jo baha daṛeakʼa, menkhan okoe onae aṅgoc are bạgiyakʼ uni do dayae ńama." 
Proverbs28:14 Okoe hoṛ behok lạgitʼ jao okteye botorokʼkan uni doe bhạgangea, menkhan okoe acʼakʼ ontorre keṭejtae ar behok lạgitʼ bae botorokʼ kan uni do muhinreye paṛaokʼa." 
Proverbs28:15 Hạnḍrạukʼka dhạcri kul ar ghis ghisạu baṛaekan bana cetʼleka, onkage uni bạṛicʼ hoṛ do one okoe nandankoren cakʼlaoicʼe hoyokʼkan." 
Proverbs28:16 Okoe disạm cakʼlaoicʼakʼ bud bạnukʼtae uni doe santaoa; ar okoe cakʼlaoicʼ laloce hirkhạwakʼ uni do ḍher din jiwetʼe tahena. 
Proverbs28:17 Okoe hoṛ khũnkate bạṛicʼ cintạreye paṛao akan uni do ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼe ńir baṛaea; ar okoehõ aloko goṛowaema. 
Proverbs28:18 Okoe bin dusạnteye calakʼkan uni doe bańcaokʼa, menkhan okoe hoṛ peṛta horteye taṛamkan uni do ackageye ńurokʼa." 
Proverbs28:19 Okoe hoṛ acʼakʼ jumireye khaṭaokʼkan uni do bạ̃ṛti jomakʼ tahentaea, menkhan okoe do ạuṛiyakʼkoe khudạuetʼkan uni do bud reakʼ okulạn menakʼtaea." 
Proverbs28:20 Pạtiạran hoṛ do ḍher bhore ńama, menkhan okoe kisạ̃ṛokʼ lạgitʼe ahkaokʼkan uni do sạjạiye ńama." 
Proverbs28:21 Bicạrre mẽtʼãhã beṅgetʼakʼ do baṅ bhagea; okoeye onkae uni do mitʼkuṭrạ piṭhạ lạgitʼ hõe onka daṛeakʼa. 
Proverbs28:22 Lalocan hoṛ do kisạ̃ṛokʼ lạgitʼe dhãoṛa dhạ̃uṛi baṛaea, menkhan uni do bae baḍaea okulạn do uniye tạṅgi akadeya mente." 
Proverbs28:23 Okoe hoṛ nisṛạu reakʼ kathae roṛ uni khon samka sạṭi reakʼ kathae roroṛicʼge sesre bạ̃ṛti manote ńama. 
Proverbs28:24 Jãhãege eṅgat apatakʼ jinis kombṛokateye men, “Noa do behokakʼ baṅ kana,” uni do jarkharren gate kanae." 
Proverbs28:25 Laloc menakʼtae hoṛ doe jhogṛakʼa, menkhan okoe Probhu Isorreye bhorsakʼ uni doe jo bahakʼa," 
Proverbs28:26 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ do acʼakʼ bujreye bhorsakʼkana, menkhan okoe Isor emakʼ ạkilteye calakʼ uni do khạtirjomae tahena." 
Proverbs28:27 Okoe hoṛ reṅgecʼ orecʼkoe danako uni do okulạnre bae paṛaokʼa, menkhan okoe onko ńelte mẽtʼe bedtae uni do ḍher sarape ńama." 
Proverbs28:28 Bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ tire ektiạri calaolen khan hoṛ doko okokʼa, menkhan onko bạṛicʼ hoṛko maraolen khan dhorom hoṛko ḍherokʼa." 
Proverbs29:1 Jaoge nisṛạu reakʼ katha ańjomkate hõ okoe hoṛ hoṭokʼ keṭecʼgeye dohokatae uni do ackageye jarkharokʼa; ar bae teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa. 
Proverbs29:2 Dhoromkoko saṅgelen khan hoṛkoko rạskạkʼa, menkhan bedhoromko cakʼlaokoko hoylen khan hoṛko doko kũhrạukʼa." 
Proverbs29:3 Okoe hoṛ ạkile dulạṛetʼ uni do apate rạskạ ocoyea, menkhan okoe do kusumbi sãoteye tahen uni do acʼakʼ dhone nosṭoea." 
Proverbs29:4 Hok reakʼ bicạr iạte raj do disạme ṭarhao daṛeakʼa, menkhan okoe ghuse kusiyakʼ uni do disạme jarkhara." 
Proverbs29:5 Okoe hoṛ aḍepaserenkoe lạhum sạhumko uni do acʼakʼ jaṅga lạgitʼ jhạligeye oḍaoeda. 
Proverbs29:6 Bedhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ kại gunạkʼte jhampareye paṛaokʼa, menkhan Isor botorae hoṛ doe rạskạkʼa are sereńa." 
Proverbs29:7 Reṅgecʼ orecʼko jemon hok reakʼ bicạrko ńam onate dhorom hoṛ doko ạri bạndhiyeda, menkhan bedhoromko do noa reakʼ cetʼge bako bujhạua." 
Proverbs29:8 Ṭiṭkạrikan hoṛko do nagrahare gulmalko janam ocoya, menkhan ạkilan hoṛ do manwawakʼ edreko khentoya." 
Proverbs29:9 Budan hoṛ do khaṭo bujan hoṛ upạrteye mambla lekhan uni bebujicʼ doe landaya ar baṅkhane raṅgaokʼa, ar onate cetʼ miṭ maṭge baṅ hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs29:10 Khũniạhi hoṛ do bin dusạn hoṛko kurudaea ar soṛa monan hoṛ do goje lạgitʼko kurumuṭuiya. 
Proverbs29:11 Khaṭo bujan hoṛ do acʼakʼ purạ edreye sodora, menkhan ạkilan hoṛ do apnare sambṛaokʼa." 
Proverbs29:12 Mạliki calaoetʼ hoṛ eṛe kathae luturakʼ khan uniren sanam kạmiyạko hõko bạṛijokʼa. 
Proverbs29:13 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ ar haḍrapko talare begar do bạnukʼa Probhu Isor do bana hoṛge jione dan akatʼkinạ. 
Proverbs29:14 Okoe raj do sạriyakʼte nandankoe bicạrko uniyakʼ siṅghạson do ṭarhao tahentaea. 
Proverbs29:15 Pãeṛã ar nisṛạu do ạkile dana, menkhan okoeṭakʼ hopon do ḍanṭaore bạnui uni do eṅgattetʼe lajao ocoyea." 
Proverbs29:16 Bedhoromkoko saṅge len khan kại do ḍher idikʼa, menkhan dhorom hoṛ do onkoakʼ jarkharokʼko ńela." 
Proverbs29:17 Amren hopon ḍanṭaoeme, uni do sulukreye dohokama ar amakʼ jiwireye rạskạ ocomea." 
Proverbs29:18 Okare Isor do nạbiko hotete acʼakʼ sạriyakʼ bae sodor onḍenko hoṛ doko bhiṅgṛạukʼa; menkhan uni hoṛ doe bhạgangea okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ ạn ạrikoe manaoetʼ. 
Proverbs29:19 Eken katha motote guti do bae ḍanṭaokʼa; ente bujhạulere hõ uni do ona bae manaoa. 
Proverbs29:20 Am do cetʼ nonkan hoṛkom ńel akatʼkoa okoe do katha lại lạgitʼe lahapʼ cahapʼ baṛaekan? Ona khon bickom bebuj hoṛrege bạ̃ṛti as do menakʼa. 
Proverbs29:21 Jãhãe hoṛ acʼren guti gidrạ bạ̃ṛtiye mãyãwae khan, mucạtʼre uni do uniyakʼ sanamakʼren mạlike hoyokʼa." 
Proverbs29:22 Edrekʼ hoṛ do jhogṛae salgaoa, ar etaṅ cạndi hoṛ do ạḍiye ghạṭa." 
Proverbs29:23 Manwa do acʼakʼ bạḍạiteye copodokʼa, menkhan mạ̃hir monan hoṛ do manote ńama." 
Proverbs29:24 Kombṛo tulucʼ bhag hataoicʼ hoṛ do acʼge acʼren bạiriye hoyokʼa; uni do kiriạ ocolere hõ cetʼge bae sodora. 
Proverbs29:25 Manwa okoeye botorae ona botor do uniyakʼ jhampa leka hoyokʼa. Menkhan okoe Probhu Isorreye bhorsakʼkan uni do khạtirjomae tahena. 
Proverbs29:26 Bicạrre disạm cakʼlaoicʼakʼ daya ńam lạgitʼ ḍherkogeko kurumuṭuiya. Menkhan Probhu Isor ṭhen manwa do hok reakʼ bicạrko ńama. 
Proverbs29:27 Dhorom hoṛ do behoketʼ hoṛko hirkhạ mẽtʼteko ńelkoa, ar sojhe horte calakʼ hoṛ do bedhorom hoṛko hirkhạwaea." 
Proverbs30:1 Isorakʼ katha Jake hopon Ạgur ṭhen, hẽ, Ethiyel ar Ukol ṭhen roṛlena. Uni doe menkeda, laṅgayenạń, E Isor laṅgayenạń ariń latwakʼena." 
Proverbs30:2 Sạrige iń doń manwa kanrehõ ińakʼ bud do janwar leka; manwawakʼ oka bud menakʼ ińakʼ do ona hõ bạnukʼa. 
Proverbs30:3 Iń do ạkil bạń hameṭ akawana; ar sonot nagraha reaṅ jãhãn ạkil hõ bạnukʼtińa. 
Proverbs30:4 Okoe sermate doe rakapʼakana are pheḍ hecʼakana? Okoe do tire hoeye cuputʼ akada? Okoe apnarakʼ kicricʼre sanam dakʼe jarwa dohoakada? Dhạrti reakʼ simạnako do okoeye bandhao akada? Uniyakʼ ńutum ar uniren hoponakʼ ńutum do cetʼ? Amem baḍae khan lạiyạńme baṛe. 
Proverbs30:5 Isorakʼ sanam kathako do khạṭigea mente sạbud akana; okoe unireko asrayokʼkan uni do onkoren ḍhale hoyokʼa. 
Proverbs30:6 Uniyakʼ katha sãote eṭakʼ jãhãn katha do alom toṅgeakʼa; arem toṅgeakʼ khan uni do amakʼ doskoe udukʼama, ar am do eṛeyicʼ mentem sạbudokʼa." 
Proverbs30:7 E Probhu Isor, am ṭhen khon barea jinisiń khojkana; jiwetʼ iń tahenrege ona imạń do alom baṅạńạ." 
Proverbs30:8 Phạsiạra ar eṛe katha do iń khon pharakme, reṅgecʼ hõ alom hoeocoyińa ar acel pacel dhon hõ alom imạńa jạruṛokʼ bhor baṛe jom ocoyińme." 
Proverbs30:9 Jemoniń bilenre aloń hiṛińme ariń men, “Probhu doe okoe kana?” Ar reṅgecʼlenre aloń kombṛoe ar ińren Isorakʼ ńutum aloń besonot ocoytae." 
Proverbs30:10 Guti do acʼren kisạ̃ṛ ṭhen alom cugliaea, ar baṅ khan uni doe sarapama arem dusi ocokʼa." 
Proverbs30:11 Nonkan ḍher hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe akoren apatkoko sarapako ar eṅgatakʼ bhạlại bako khojkan," 
Proverbs30:12 Arhõ nonkan hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe akoakʼ nońjorreko khạṭige, menkhan akoakʼ mạilạ khon bako saphakʼ kan," 
Proverbs30:13 onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do bạḍạite perecʼgetakoa, ar onkoakʼ beṅgetʼ hõ hirkhạte perecʼgea," 
Proverbs30:14 Onkoakʼ ḍaṭa do tarwaṛe leka ar jambe do churi leka, jemon onko do dhạrtiren reṅgecʼ orecʼko ar nacarko manwa tala khonko marao daṛeako." 
Proverbs30:15 Jõkren do barea hoponera menakʼkinạ, unkin do “Den, Den” mentekin hohoyeda. Pea jinis menakʼa one oka do tishõ baṅ tirpit, menkhan ponea do tishõ bako mena, “Inạkʼge,”" 
Proverbs30:16 Sheol, bạńhi maejiu ar jumi, dakʼte onako do tishõ baṅ bikʼa, ar seṅgel, ona do tishõ bae mena, “Inạkʼge,”" 
Proverbs30:17 Okaṭakʼ mẽtʼ do apate ṭiṭkạriyede kan ar eṅgatakʼ katha bataore hirkhạ salakʼe baṅetʼ, ona mẽtʼ do gaḍa kạhuko ṭhoṭrao oḍoka, ar gidiren hopon do onako joma." 
Proverbs30:18 Pea jinis iń do ạḍi hahaṛań bujhạua, menkhan ponea jinis do baṅgeń bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs30:19 Cetʼleka pajhạṛ do coṭreye uḍạukʼkan, ar biń do cetʼleka dhiri cetanteye leńokʼ kan, cetʼleka jahaj do jalapurire calakʼkan, cetʼleka juạn kuṛi ṭhen herel hoṛakʼ hor hoyokʼkan." 
Proverbs30:20 Noakangea laṭghaṭ maejiuakʼ colon do; uni do laṭghaṭ tayom ḍạbrạ saphakateye meneda, “Iń do cetʼ bạṛicʼ hõ bạń kạmi akada.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Dhạrti do pea iạte thar tharokʼkana, menkhan ponea reakʼ do bae sahao daṛeakʼa." 
Proverbs30:22 Mitʼṭen golam iạte uniye raj lenre, ar mitʼṭen bebuj iạte jomakʼte uniye bilenre," 
Proverbs30:23 mitʼṭen bebạsutade kuṛi iạte, uniye jãwãelenre, ar mitʼṭen kạ̃ṛmĩ kuṛi iạte, acʼren kisạ̃ṛ era reakʼe ạidạrilere." 
Proverbs30:24 Ponea menakʼkoa dhạrtire, okoeko huḍińge onko do ạkilteko perecʼgea." 
Proverbs30:25 Mucʼko do bin daṛean jạtrenko kanako, enhõ niron dinre jomakʼko jogaṛ joṅkana;" 
Proverbs30:26 Saphon kulại hõ bin daṛean jạtrenko kanako, enhõ huṭupʼ dhirire onko doko oṛakʼjoṅ kana." 
Proverbs30:27 Pohokoren raj do bạnuiya, enhõ onko do sạr sạrteko laha calakʼa;" 
Proverbs30:28 Cerceṭecʼ do titem sapʼ daṛeaea, enhõ uni do rajakʼ oṛakʼreye tahenkana." 
Proverbs30:29 Pea menakʼkoa okoe do ṭhonokante jaṅgako lahayetʼ, menkhan ponea do ṭhonokanteko taṛameda." 
Proverbs30:30 Dhạcri kul do janwarko modre daṛeanicʼ janwar kanae uni do cele janwarko samaṅ khon hõ bae dạṛ pharakokʼa; 
Proverbs30:31 Kheńcerokʼkan sim sạnḍi, ar merom boda, ar acʼren porja laha lahateye calakʼkan raj." 
Proverbs30:32 Amte usulokʼte bebujakʼem kạmi akatʼ khan, se eṭakʼko upạrte bạṛicʼakʼem pontha akatʼ khan, enḍekhan tite moca bedtam." 
Proverbs30:33 Toam urudlere cetʼleka gotom oḍokokʼ, ar mũm mocṛaolere cetʼleka mãyãm oḍokokʼ, onkage raṅgaoem khocao lekhan jhogṛa do hoyokʼgea." 
Proverbs31:1 Lemuel rajakʼ roṛakʼ katha, metakʼme Isorakʼ emakʼ katha okaṭakʼ do acʼ eṅgattetʼ ṭhen khone cetʼletʼ." 
Proverbs31:2 E bạbu, E ińakʼ kukhiren hopon, E ińakʼ manotakʼletʼren hopon, am do cetʼ iń metama?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ạimạikore amakʼ daṛe do alom cabaetama; amakʼ dhon hõ alo onko do rapajkoko maraokoa. 
Proverbs31:4 E Lemuel, rapajko reakʼ lek do baṅ kana, darkha rasa ńũi do; ar bubulakʼ ńũi hõ disạm cakʼlaoko lạgitʼ lek anakʼ hõ baṅkana." 
Proverbs31:5 Bubulakʼ ńũite onko do ạn ạrikoko hiṛińa, ar santaokʼkanko secʼ behokakʼko bicạra." 
Proverbs31:6 Gujukʼ lạgidokʼko do bubulakʼ emakope. Ar darkha rasa do jiwire dukokʼkankoge; 
Proverbs31:7 Onko do ona ńũkate okulạn reakʼ kathako hiṛińma, ar onate duk ar kosṭo monre aloko disại ma." 
Proverbs31:8 E Lemuel, okoe acʼ reakʼ katha bae lại daṛeakʼkan am do uni secʼ katha roṛme; ar jarkhar akan ạidạri rukhiyại lạgitʼ am do noa katha roṛme." 
Proverbs31:9 Alom thir hapekokʼa, hok reakʼ bicạrme; nacar ar reṅgecʼko lạgitʼ ạidạri rukhiyạitakome." 
Proverbs31:10 Bhage bạhu do okarem ńamkea? Uni do mạnik dhiriko khon hõ ạḍitetʼe damangea. 
Proverbs31:11 Jãwãe do purạte unireye bhorsa akana; uniren jãwãe do okaṭakʼte hõ bae ṭonṭakʼa. 
Proverbs31:12 Uni do sanam ghạṛicʼ acʼren jãwãetetʼe bhageyede kana, menkhan bạṛicʼakʼ do baṅa." 
Proverbs31:13 Uni do bhiḍi upʼ ar musnại ńam baṛayeda ar rạskạ salakʼ titeye kạmikana. 
Proverbs31:14 Uni do bạnij beparkoakʼ jahaj lekanae sạṅgiń khon acʼakʼ jomakʼ jiniskoe ạguiyetʼkana. 
Proverbs31:15 Ńindạ tahenrege uni doe beretʼkana; ar gharońjrenko lạgitʼ jomakʼe emokʼkana ar kạ̃ṛmĩ kuṛikotae do niṭakʼ kạmikoe hạṭińako kana. 
Proverbs31:16 Jumi kiriń lahare uni do onae ạribạndhiyetʼa ar ona tayom doe kirińeda; ar acʼakʼ ti reakʼ arojakʼte darkha bagwane benaoeda. 
Proverbs31:17 Uni do daṛe salakʼ ḍanḍa pathe keṭecʼkate kạmire tiye lagaoeda ar ạḍitetʼe khaṭaokʼ kana. 
Proverbs31:18 Ńel jutedae acʼakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ lab do bhagege hoyokʼkana; ar ńindạ uniyakʼ diuhe do baṅ ĩṛĩjokʼkantaea. 
Proverbs31:19 Uni do carkhare acʼakʼ ti kine lagaoetʼtaea ar acʼakʼ tite ḍherae ạcuretʼa. 
Proverbs31:20 Nacarko lạgitʼ uniyakʼ cuputʼ do jhicʼgetaea; uni do reṅgecʼko secʼ acʼakʼ tiye tiyạretʼtaea. 
Proverbs31:21 Him ńurlenre hõ uniyakʼ gharońj lạgitʼ do jãhãn botor bạnukʼa, ente sanamkoge damanakʼ jeṅgetʼ arakʼ kicricʼteko oyokʼkana." 
Proverbs31:22 Uni do pichạuṛikoe tearjoṅ kana; acʼhõ musnạ ar beguni roṅakʼ kicricʼe bandeyeda. 
Proverbs31:23 Uniren jãwãe do nagraha reakʼ duạrre manote ńameda; onḍe uni do murubbiko tulucʼe duṛupʼkana. 
Proverbs31:24 Uni maejiu do musnạ kicricʼ benao kateye ạkhrińeda; ar ḍanḍa paṭheakʼ kicricʼ do bạnij beparikoe emako kana. 
Proverbs31:25 Daṛe ar man do uniyakʼ horokʼ bandenakʼkana; ar darakan dinko reakʼ do bae bhabnakʼ kana. 
Proverbs31:26 Uni do bud salakʼ kathae roṛa; ar dulạṛ salakʼe galmaraoa. 
Proverbs31:27 Uni do gharońj reakʼ sanam secʼe ạribạndhiya; ar khaṭaokateye joma. 
Proverbs31:28 Uniren gidrạko do sanamko samaṅre bhạganko metaea; ar uniren jãwãe hõ uni sarhaoeteye mena," 
Proverbs31:29 “Ḍher maejiukoge bhage ghirni erako hoyakana, menkhan am do sanamko khonem sorosgea.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Mońj beohar do eṛegea, ar cõhõk hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea, menkhan okoe maejiu do Probhui botorae uni do sarhaoe ńama." 
Proverbs31:31 Uniyakʼ kạmi iạte sarhaoepe; ar uniyakʼ kạmiko do duạrareko sarhaotaema. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Sosolhayicʼakʼ katha; uni do Jerusalemren raj ar Dạudren hopon kanae. 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Uni doe meneda, “Ạuṛiyakʼgea, ạuṛiyakʼgea! Okaṭakʼge tahẽ utạrokʼ lạgitʼ do baṅkana. Jotowakʼge ạuṛiyakʼgea!”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Siń cando latarre manwa okae khaṭaokʼkan ona khaṭaokʼ reakʼ porho do cetʼ tae? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mitʼ bidạl calakʼa, ar eṭakʼ bidạl hijukʼa, menkhan dhạrti do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽna." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Siń candoe rakabokʼ kana are hạsurokʼ kana, ar apnarakʼ jaegate usạrateye ruạṛkana arhõ onḍe khone rakabokʼ kana." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Hoe do dạkhin secʼe hoeyeda, ar ona tayom do utạr secʼ ạcur calakʼ kana; ona do ạcur ạcurte acʼakʼ horteye ruạṛ hijukʼ kana." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Joto gaḍa do jalapurire dul mitʼ akana, enhõ jalapuri do tisge baṅ perejokʼ kana; onḍe khon oka gaḍako oḍokʼ hecʼakan ona reakʼ dakʼ do arhõ onḍege ruạṛ calakʼ kana." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Jotowakʼge ạcur ạcurte hijukʼa ar nijorokʼ kana; onako manwa do bae lại caba daṛeakʼa. Mẽtʼ do ńeńelte bae tirpidokʼa, ar lutur hõ ańjomte baṅge perejokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Okaṭakʼ hoyen ona do arhõ hoyokʼa, ar oka kạmi hoyakan ona do arhõ kạmi hoyokʼa; siń cando latarre do nãwãnakʼ mente cetʼge bạnukʼa." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Nonkan jãhãnakʼ tahẽdaṛekokʼa one ona reaṅ hoṛko men, “Ńelpe, niạ do nãwãgea.” Menkhan ona ma ḍher laha khonge tahẽkan, ona do jug jug khonge tahẽkana." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Laha jugren hoṛkoakʼ katha do okoeyakʼ hõ disạ bạnukʼa; okoe tayom daramko janamokʼ onkoakʼ katha hõ onko tayom janamokʼko do bako disạya. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Iń doń sosolhayicʼ kana; iń do Jerusalemre Israelkoren rajiń tahẽkana. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Serma latarre okako cekae hoyokʼ ona do ạkil hotete biḍạu ar ḍunḍhạu lạgitʼ iń mone murukleda. Ariń ńelkeda, Isor do manwako cetanre tinạkʼ duke lade akatʼkoa!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Siń cando latarre jãhãnakʼge cekae hoyokʼ ona jotogeń ńelkeda; ariń ńelkeda jotowakʼge ạuṛiyakʼgea, eken hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Okaṭakʼ konḍeawakʼ kan ona do baṅ sojhekʼa; ar bạnukʼakʼ do ohom lekha daṛelea. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Iń do mone moneteń menkeda, “Iń lahate okoe Jerusalemreko rajokʼkan tahẽkan onko khon iń do ạkilteń sorosgea; ińakʼ bud ar ạkil do ḍhergetińạ.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ona tayom iń do bud, ạkil ar bebuj reaṅ bujhạu lạgitʼ iń kurumuṭukan tahẽkana. Ar onateń bujhạukeda, hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana;" 
Ecclesiastes1:18 ente ạkil ḍherlen khan ona sãote ạṛisokʼ hõ ḍherokʼa; ar buj tinạkʼ ḍherokʼ unạkʼge duk hõ ḍher idikʼa. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Iń do apnartetʼ iń menjoṅana, “Suk do cetʼ kana, ar ona aṭkar lạgitʼ iń doń hesecʼ sekrejokʼa jemon onań biḍạu aṭkar daṛeakʼ.” Menkhan ińiń ńelkeda, ona hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ińiń menkeda, “Landare hõ bebuj menakʼa, ar hesecʼ sekrejokʼre hõ baṅ cetʼ porho!”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Iń do ạkilte ạyur ocokʼ tulucʼge darkha rasa ńũkate hoṛmoń loloketʼtińạ ar bebuj leka kạmikate apnartetʼ kusikʼ reakʼ iń kurumuṭukeda. Iń do ńeńel iń menana, serma latarre manwawakʼ thoṛa din reakʼ jionre uni lạgitʼ bhageakʼ do okaṭakʼ kana- ạkil horte senokʼ se bebuj horte calakʼ." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Iń do napṛakʼ napṛakʼ kạmikoń kạmikeda. Iń do apnar lạgitʼ aema oṛakʼ koń benaoana ar aema darkha bagwankoń tearkeda. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Iń do huḍiń ar maraṅ aema bagwankoń tearkeda ar onare joto lekan jowanakʼ darekoń rohoekeda. 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Iń do apnar lạgitʼ pukhrikoń la ocokeda jemon bagwan reakʼ darekore dakʼ iń em daṛeakʼ. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Iń do ạḍi utạr guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩkoń kirińketʼkoa, ar aema guti kạ̃ṛmĩko do ińakʼ oṛakʼreko janamena. Iń lahate Jerusalemre okoeko tahẽkan onko khon ińren do ạḍi utạr ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍiko tahẽkana." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Iń do ạḍi utạr sona-rupạ ar judạ judạ rapajkoakʼ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạm reakʼ dhonko ạgukate apnar lạgitʼ iń jogao dohoan tahẽkana. Iń do ạḍi utạr sekʼreńko ar herel rạskạ ocoko lạgitʼ chuṭki erakoń ńamketʼkoa. 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Iń lahate Jerusalemre okoeko tahẽkan onko khon hõ iń do ḍher dhoniń hameṭana. Ar akel do unhõ ińe ạyuredeń tahẽkana. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ińakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼ iń hudisetʼ tahẽkan onageń kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana; ar joto lekan rạskạwakʼregeń seletʼ mitʼlena. Jotowakʼ kạmirege mon do kusikʼkan tahẽkana, ar niạge ińakʼ sanam khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ kuṛại tahẽkana." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Enhõ okakoń ceka akatʼ ar oka ńam lạgitʼ iń khaṭaolen ona secʼ tinreń ạribạndhikeda unreń ńelkeda jotowakʼge ạuṛiyakʼ kana. Noako sanamakʼ do eken hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana. Siń cando latarre okaṭakʼge porhowanakʼ do baṅkana. 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ona tayom iń do ạkil, khepa ar bebuj reakʼ kathań cintạkeda. Lahaten rapajko cetʼlekako kạmikan tahẽkan ona do cetʼ bon baḍae daṛekea, tayomren raj do onka lekae kạmi idiya mente?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ińiń ńelkeda, ńut khon marsal cetʼleka sorosge, onkage bebuj khon ạkil hõ sorosgea." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ạkilan hoṛakʼ do mẽtʼ menakʼtaea, menkhan bebuj hoṛ do ńutreye dãṛãnkana; menkhan iń do niạgeń bujhạu daṛeada, unkin bana hoṛakʼ mucạtʼ dosa do mitʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ona tayom iń do apnarakʼ monreń menkeda, “Bebuj hoṛ oka dosa hoyokʼtae ińakʼ hõ inạ dosage hoyokʼtińạ. Enḍekhan unạkʼ ạkilan hoṛ hoykate ińakʼ do cetʼ lab hoyena? Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Cetʼleka hoṛko do bebuj hoṛko bako disạ dohoko onkage ạkilan hoṛ hõ ḍher din do bako disạ dohokoa; tayom daram dinkore nukin bana hoṛgeko hiṛińkinạ. Bebuj hoṛ cetʼlekae gujukʼ onkage ạkilan hoṛ hõe gujukʼa. 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Onate iń do ińakʼ jioniń ạṛisada, ente siń cando latarre oka kạmikʼ kan iń ṭhen ona do kosṭo reaṅ hoyena- ar jotoge ạuṛiyakʼgea, hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Siń cando latarre okako jinis lạgitʼ iń khaṭao akan onako ńitokʼ doń kurudakʼ kana, ente iń tayomte okoeye hijukʼ uni lạgitʼge jotowakʼ do doho oṭokakʼ hoyokʼtińạ." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Uni hoṛ do ạkilan se lelhayicʼe hoyokʼa ona do okoeye baḍaea? Enhõ uni do ińakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ mạlike hoyokʼa, oka do siń cando latarreń khaṭaolen ariń hameṭakatʼ. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Onate siń cando latarre okań khaṭaolen onate ińakʼ ontor do as chuṭạu entińạ. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Niạ reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana bud, ạkil ar lekman iạte mitʼ hoṛ doe khaṭao daṛeakʼa, menkhan ona tayom uniyakʼ jotowakʼ do ạidạri lekate nonkan mitʼ hoṛ lạgitʼ doho oṭokakʼ hoyokʼtaea okoe do ona lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge bae khaṭao akan. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea ar ạḍi kosṭo reakʼ kangea." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Siń cando latarre manwa okae khaṭaokʼkan are cintạ bhabnakʼkan ona kuṛại reakʼ uniyakʼ do cetʼ porho hoyokʼtaea? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Dinạm hilokʼ uniyakʼ kạmire duk ar bhabna do tahẽnkangea; ar ńindạ hõ uniyakʼ mon do baṅ jirạukʼkana. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼ kana. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Enḍekhan manwa lạgitʼ jom-ńũ ar apnarakʼ kạmire rạskạjoṅ chaḍa bhage ar cetʼge bạnukʼa. Ińiń ńelkeda niạ sanamakʼ do Isor ṭhen khonge hijukʼ kana," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ente uni bae emlen khan okoeye jom daṛekea seye rạskạ daṛekokʼa? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Okoe Isore kusi ocoye uni do bud, ạkil ar rạskại danaea, menkhan kại hoṛ do dhon-durib jogaṛ lạgitʼ ar ona jogao reakʼ kạmiye emaea, jemon ona do uni hoṛe emawae one okoe do Isore kusi ocoyedekan. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea, hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Jotowakʼ lạgitʼge mitʼṭecʼ okte menakʼa; serma latarre mitʼke mitʼ kạmi reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ niṭ akatʼ okte do menakʼgea- 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Janamokʼ okte ar gujukʼ okte, rohoe okte ar totʼ giḍikakʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 gujukʼ lạgitʼ okte ar bogekʼ lạgitʼ okte, rạputʼ giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ okte ar benao lạgitʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 rakʼjoṅ okte ar landae okte, homor halaṅ okte ar enecʼ lạgitʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 dhiri capatʼ giḍikakʼ okte ar onako halaṅ jarwae okte, dulạṛ salakʼ hạṛubokʼ okte ar hạṛupʼ khon sahaṛokʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:6 sendra ńam okte ar adokʼ okte, dohoy okte ar giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 oṛecʼ giḍikakʼ okte ar rog lạgitʼ okte, thir hapekokʼ okte ar roroṛ lạgitʼ okte," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 dulạṛokʼ reakʼ okte ar kurudokʼ lạgitʼ okte, lạṛhại okte ar sulukokʼ lạgitʼ okte." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Okoeye kạmikan uni do cetʼ acʼakʼ khaṭaokʼakʼ reakʼ jo bae ńama? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Isor do manwa cetanre oka bojhae lade akatʼ ona doń ńelakada. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Uni do sanamakʼ reakʼ okteye ṭhik dohoakada. Uni do manwa ontorre jaejug reaṅ bujhạu reakʼ mone emakawadea, menkhan manwa do pạhil khon mucạtʼ hạbicʼ cetʼe cekaea ona bae bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ińiń baḍaea, manwa jionre rạskạ ar bhage kạmi chaḍa uni lạgitʼ bhageakʼ do ar cetʼhõ bạnukʼa." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Niạ do Isorakʼ dan kana, sanam manwageko jom ńũiya ar uniyakʼ joto kạmire kusiko tahena." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ińiń baḍaea Isor jãhãnakʼgeye cekae ona do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena; cetʼge ona tulucʼ do baṅ juṭujokʼa ar cetʼge ona khon hõ baṅ badokʼa. Isor doe nonka akada jemon manwa uniko botorae. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Okako menakʼ ona do sedae khonge tahẽkana, ar oka hoyokʼ ona hõ sedaere tahẽkana; oka hoyen Isor do ona ar hõe hoeocoya." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Iń do siń cando latarre ar mitʼṭen bepariń ńelkeda, hok bicạr ar dhorom jaegare hõ bedhorom do menakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Iń do mone moneteń menkeda, “Isor do dhoromicʼ ar bedhoromicʼ nukin bana hoṛgeye bicạrkinạ, ente uni ṭhen do sanamakʼ babotre ar sanamakʼ kạmire mitʼṭecʼ niṭ akan okte menakʼa.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Iń do noa hõń hudiskeda, Isor do manwae biḍạu aṭkaretʼkoa jemonko bujhạu daṛeakʼ onko do janwar tulni kanako mente," 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ente manwakore okako hoyokʼ janwarkore hõ onakoge hoyokʼa. Janwar cetʼleka gujukʼ hoyokʼtae onkage manwa hõ gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea. Unkinakʼ sahẽtʼ do mitʼ lekangea. Niạ babotre janwar ar manwa talare cetʼ begarge bạnukʼa; ente sanamakʼ do ạuṛiyakʼgea. 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Jotoge mitʼ jaegareko calakʼa; sanamakʼge hasa khon benao akana ar hasatege ruạṛ calakʼa. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Manwa jiu do cetan secʼ ar janwar jiwi do ot latar secʼ calakʼa ona do okoeye baḍaea? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Onateń ńelkeda, nijakʼ kạmire rạskạkʼ chaḍa ar bhage jãhãnakʼ do manwa lạgitʼ bạnukʼa. Onage uniyakʼ kuṛại do, ente uniyakʼ gujukʼ tayom cetʼ hoyokʼtae ona do okoeye udukʼ daṛekea?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Siń cando latarre oka santaoko hoyokʼkan ona secʼ mitʼ dhao beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda santao ocokʼko doko rakʼeda, menkhan onko jiwi raṛecʼ emako lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa. Sasantaoko ṭhen do ektiạri menakʼa, menkhan santao ocokʼko jiwi raṛecʼ emako lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ińiń bujhạu daṛeada okoe ńit hạbicʼ jiwetʼ menakʼko onko khon okoe lahareko gocʼ akan onko do arhõ bhage dosare menakʼkoa. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Menkhan nukin bana hoṛ khon uniyakʼ obosta do arhõ bhagegea okoe ńit hõ ạuriye janamokʼ ar siń cando latarre behokakʼko ạuriye ńel. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ińiń ńelkeda, ạḍepaseren hoṛ cetanre hiskạ iạte manwa do joto lekanakʼe khaṭaokʼ kana ar joe ńameda. Ar niạ hõ ạuṛiyakʼ kana, eken hoe tayomte ńir calakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Bebuj hoṛ do acʼakʼ tiye lạṭumkakʼ kana ar reṅgecʼteye eken jaṅokʼ kana. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Hoe tayomte ńir calakʼ lạgitʼ khaṭaokate bar ańjle ńam khon sulukte mitʼ cuputʼ ńamge bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Siń cando latarre arhõ thoṛa bin joteakʼ iń ńelkeda. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mitʼṭen hoṛ doe eskargea-uniren do gidrạ hõ bạnukʼkotaea; ar boeha hõ bạnukʼkotaea; enhõ uniyakʼ khaṭaokʼ reakʼ ses do bạnukʼtaea ar dhon duribte hõ mẽtʼ do baṅ tirpitokʼ kantaea. Uni doe kuliyana, “Okoe lạgitʼ iń khaṭaokʼ kana? Ar hesecʼ sekrecʼjokʼ khon do cedakʼ iń pharak akana?” Niạ do ạuṛiyakʼgea, ar haron bạḍkana." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Mitʼ hoṛ khon bar hoṛge bhagea, ente unkinakʼ kạmi do jo bahakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Mitʼ hoṛe bhindạṛlen khan uniren gate do uniye or beretʼ daṛeaea; menkhan hae uni hoṛ do oneye bhindạṛlenre berede lạgitʼ celege bako tahen. 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ona chaḍa bar hoṛ mitʼrekin giticʼlen khan hoṛmo do lolokʼgea, menkhan mitʼ hoṛ do cekate lolokʼtaea." 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Manwa eskare tahẽlen khan algategeye bhagao ocokʼa, menkhan bar hoṛ dokin rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa. Pea baber mitʼdomte ũńle khan algate do baṅ topakʼ godokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mitʼṭen lelha haṛam raj, okoe do sopolha hatao bae khoj uni khon boroṅ mitʼṭen reṅgecʼ ar budan juạngeye bhagea." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Uni juạn do ona rajosṭi reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ reṅgecʼ gharońjreye janamlenre hõ enhõ hajot khon oḍok tayom do raje hoylena. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ińiń ńelkeda, okoe jiwetʼko tahẽkan, metakʼme siń cando latarreko dãṛãbaṛae kan tahẽkan onko do lelha haṛam raj tayom okoeṭakʼ juạn do raje hoylen uniko pańjakedea." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Nui juạn rajren do lahate aema hoṛko tahẽkana one okoeko cetanreye rajokʼkan tahẽkan, menkhan uni tayomte darakanko do unire kusi bako tahẽkana. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea, eken hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ jokhecʼ sontorte taṛamme. Okoe apnarakʼ behokakʼ bae bujhạu akatʼ uni bebujicʼ leka samaṅokʼakʼ porob manao khon bickom Isorakʼ bataotaege bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Amakʼ mocate katha do usạrate alom roṛgoda; ar Isor ṭhen hako pako jãhãnakʼ katha hõ alom roṛa. Isor do sermare menaea ar am do dhạrtire, onate amakʼ katha do jemon thoṛage hoyokʼ." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ḍher bhabna cintạ tahẽlen khan hoṛko cetʼleka kukmũko ńel onkage ḍher katha roṛle khan bebujtetʼ hõ oḍok hijukʼa. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Isor ṭhen jãhãnakʼge manotakʼem dohoakatʼ khan ona purạu do alom biloma. Uni do bebuj hoṛkore rạskạ do bạnukʼtaea. Ar amakʼ manotakʼ do uni purạuaeme. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ente manotakʼ dohokate bam purạu daṛeakʼ khan baṅ dohoge bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Amakʼ moca do kại secʼ aloe or idimema. Ar alom menma, “Ińakʼ manotakʼ dohoy do bhul hoyakana,” Noa katha do mundilren sapʼdapʼko hõ alom lạiyakoa. Amakʼ katha iạte Isor do cedakʼe edrekʼte amakʼ titeakʼ kạmi doe bạṛijtama?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ḍher kukmu ńel ar ḍher katha roṛ do ạuṛiyakʼgea, menkhan am do Isor botoraeme." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Amakʼ elakaren jãhãe reṅgecʼ hoṛ santao ocokʼem ńellere se jãhãe hoṛakʼ hok reakʼ bicạr ar hok reakʼ ạidạri bae ńametʼkanem ńellere alom botorokʼa, ente mitʼ kạmiạyicʼ cetanre maraṅ ar mitʼ kạmiạyicʼ menaea ar unkin banahoṛ cetanre arhõ maraṅ kạmiạyicʼ menaea." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Enhõ cas reakʼ jumiko rukhiyại lạgitʼ mitʼṭen raje tahẽlen khan disạm lạgitʼ do bhage hoyokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Okoe hoṛ ṭaka poesae dulạṛetʼkan uni do ṭaka poesate tisge bae bikʼa. Okoe hoṛ dhon duribe dulạṛetʼkan uni do acʼakʼ arjaoakʼte tisge bae tirpitokʼa. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Sompotti ḍherlen khan jojom hoṛ hõko ḍherokʼa. Onaren mạlik do onako beṅgetʼakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼ lab hoyokʼtaea? 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Okoeye khaṭaokʼ uni do thoṛa ar ḍhere jomlere hõ mońj jạpitʼ hoyokʼtaea. Menkhan kisạ̃ṛ hoṛakʼ ḍher dhon durib do bae jạpitʼ ocoaea. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Siń cando latarre mitʼṭecʼ ạḍi bạṛicʼakʼ iń ńel akada- kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ do ḍher dhonko doho jogaogea menkhan sesre ona reakʼ do lokshan hoyokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Jãhãnakʼ ghoṭonare paṛaokate ona do caba utạrokʼa. Onate uniren hopon lạgitʼ do ar cetʼge baṅ tahena. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Eṅgatakʼ kukhi khon manwa do uluṅgeye hijukʼkana; ar oka lekae hijukʼkan onkageye calakʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ cetʼge bae iditora daṛeakʼa. 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Niạ hõ ạḍi duk reakʼ bepar kana, manwa cetʼlekae hijukʼ onkage ruạṛ calakʼ hoyokʼtaea; onate uniyakʼ lab do cetʼtae? Uni do hoe lạgitʼgeye khaṭaokʼ kana." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Uni do jiwetʼ jonomge ńutreye tahenkana ar edre are kạhĩsokʼ kana. 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ona tayomiń bujhạukeda, siń cando latarre manwa tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe dohoyede onate jom-ńũ ar kajak khaṭao talate tirpitokʼ tahenge uni lạgitʼ do bhage ar lek kana, ente uniyakʼ kuṛại do ona kangea." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ona chaḍa Isor do tinre manwa dhon duribe danaea unre uni do ona jom lạgitʼgeye danae kana, uni do apnarakʼ kạmikate hesecʼ sekrecʼjokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ hĩse emaekana. Noa jotoge Isorakʼ dan kana." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Uni do acʼakʼ bahaokʼ din secʼ do bae beṅgeda, ente Isor do uniyakʼ monre rạskạteye perecʼ akatʼtaea." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Siń cando latarre armitʼṭecʼ duk iń ńelakada, ona do manwako lạgitʼ ạḍi hamalgea." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Isor do jãhãe manwa nunạkʼ dhon, sompotti ar manote danae kana, one uni khojogokʼakʼ cetʼge baṅ tahenkan, menkhan Isor do suk bhog lạgitʼ ektiạri bae emakawadea, menkhan eṭakʼ mitʼ hoṛ do ona reakʼ suke joma. Noa do ạḍi duk reakʼ kangea, ar ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Jãhãe hoṛren mitʼsae hopon ar hoponerako tahentae ar ḍher din jiwetʼe tahen, menkhan jionre suk bae bhog ar lek leka topa hõ bako topaye enḍekhan jãhãtinạkʼ bochorge jiwetʼe tahen ińiń menkea ona khon bickom gocʼ hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ janamge bhagekokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Uni gocʼicʼ hopon do khamakha hecʼkate ńutrege bidại hataokea ar ńutrege uniyakʼ ńutum do dapalkokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Uni do tishõ siń cando bae ńellede se cetʼge bae baḍaeletʼre hõ uni hoṛ khon ḍher jirạue ńama. 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Menkhan uni hoṛ jodi bar hajar bochor jiwetʼe tahen ar jionre suk bae bhog daṛeakʼ enḍekhan uniyakʼ do cetʼ porho? Jotoge cetʼ ona mitʼ ṭhạ̃irege bako calakʼa? 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Manwawakʼ joto lekan khaṭaoakʼ do uniyakʼ lacʼ lạgitʼ kana, enhõ uniyakʼ reṅgecʼ do tishõ baṅ cabakʼtaea?" 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Lelha hoṛ khon ạkilan hoṛ do cetʼteye sorosa? Eṭakʼko samaṅre cetʼleka calakʼ hoyokʼ onae baḍaekate mitʼṭecʼ reṅgecʼ hoṛakʼ do cetʼ porho? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Arhõ ńam reakʼ as khon bickom mẽtʼte oka ńel ńamokʼ onare tirpit tahenge bhagea. Niạ hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea, eken hoe tayomte ńir calakʼkan chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Oka menakʼ ona do laha khonge ṭhik dohoakana, ar manwa baṅe celekan ona doe baḍaegea; ar apnar khon okoeye daṛege uni sãote do bae reṭepeṭekʼa." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Tinạkʼ bạ̃ṛti katha hoyokʼ unạkʼge ạuṛiyakʼtetʼ hõ ḍherokʼa, onate manwa do cetʼ porho hoyokʼtaea?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Manwawakʼ goṭa jionre uni lạgitʼ bhageakʼ do okoeye baḍaea? Uni do acʼakʼ thoṛa ar baṅ tahẽ utạrakʼ dinko umul lekae khemaoeda. Ar uniye sen len khan siń cando latarre oka hoyokʼ ona do okoeye lại daṛekea? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Damanakʼ sunum khon bhage ńutumokʼge bogea, janam din khon gujukʼ dinge bhagea." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Bhoj oṛakʼte calakʼ khon homor oṛakʼte calakʼge bogea, ente sanam manwage mitʼ din gujukʼ hoyokʼtakoa; ar jiwetʼko do onako moneyakʼma." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Rạskạkʼ khon bhabnakʼge bhagea, ente mẽtʼãhãre duk tahẽlenrehõ ontorre do suk tahẽdaṛeakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ạkilan hoṛakʼ mon do homor oṛakʼre tahena, menkhan bebujkoakʼ mon do rạskạwakʼ oṛakʼrege." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Bebujkoakʼ sereń ańjom khon ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ egere bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ṭukucʼ latarre jạnum sahan cetʼ leka oṭejokʼ; bebujkoakʼ landa hõ onkage. Noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ạkilan hoṛe julum khan uni do bebujicʼ lekae hoyokʼa, ar ghus do buje nosṭoea." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Jãhãnakʼ reakʼ etohopʼ khon mucạtʼge bhagea, ar bạḍại khon sombhurikʼge bhagea." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Amakʼ mon do alom kạhĩs ocoytama, ente kạhĩs do bebujkoakʼ koṛamre gạḍiạu akan tahena." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 “Nahakʼ khon Sedaeakʼ dinkoge cedakʼ bhage tahẽkana?” Niạ katha do alom kuliya, ente budan hoṛkoakʼ nonka kukli do baṅ sajaokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ạkil do sompotti ńamakatʼ leka bhage jinis kana; jiwetʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ ona do sorosgea. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ṭaka poesa lekage ạkil doe rukhiyạgea, tobe ạkil reakʼ sorostetʼ do hoyokʼkana ạkil do ạkilan hoṛakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitaea." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Isorakʼ kạmiko ạribạndhitae pe. Uniye konḍea akatʼakʼ do okoeye sojhe daṛekea? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Suk dinkore rạskạkʼme; menkhan duk dinre do niạko katha hudisokʼme, Isor cetʼleka suke dohoakatʼ onkage duk hõe dohoakada, jemon manwa do acʼakʼ tayom din reakʼ cetʼge aloe baḍae daṛeakʼ." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ińakʼ noa ạuṛiyakʼ dinkoreń ńelakada, mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ dhoromtetʼreye gujukʼ kana, ar mitʼṭen bedhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ bạṛicʼakʼre ḍher dine bahaokʼ kana." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Apnarakʼ mẽtʼre ḍher do alom dhoromokʼa se ḍher ạkilan hõ alom hoyokʼa. Cedakʼ am do apnartetʼem maraokʼa? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Bedhoromre alom tahena, ar bebujicʼ hõ alom hoyokʼa. Okte ạurire do cedakʼem gujukʼa?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Niạ banar sopolhage sapʼ dohoyme, okaṭakʼ hõ alom aṛakʼ giḍikakʼa; okoe hoṛ Isore botorae uni do jãhãnakʼge ạḍi do bae bạ̃ṛtiya." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Gel goṭecʼ disạm cakʼlaoko nagraha tinạkʼ bako daṛe ocoy ạkil do mitʼṭen ạkilanicʼ hoṛ ona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiye daṛe ocoyea. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Dhạrtire nonkan dhorom hoṛge bạnukʼkoa okoe jao okte bhageakʼe kạmikan, ar tishõ bae kạiyetʼ." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Hoṛko roṛ baṛae sanam kathako do alom luturakʼa, baṅkhan, amren guti ame sarapam kanem ańjom boteja;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 ente am do amakʼ ontorem baḍaegea, am hõ eṭakʼko ḍher dhaoem sarap akatʼkoa." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Iń do niạko ińakʼ ạkilte biḍạukateń ńelkeda, ariń menkeda, “Ạkilan hoyokʼte hõń hoyokʼgea.” Menkhan ona do iń khon sạṅgińre tahẽyena." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Jion reakʼ asol manetetʼ do khạndrigea, ona do baṅ ṭạmḍạu tiyogokʼa; ar okoe ona doe sendra ńam daṛekea?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ona iạte iń do mon iń murukkeda jemon ạkil ar jotowakʼ tayomre oka goṭawakʼ menakʼ onań baḍae daṛeakʼ ar biḍạu ar khoj hataokateń ńel daṛeakʼ, ariń bujhạu daṛeakʼ, bạṛicʼakʼ do bebujtetʼ kana mente ar bebujtetʼ do khepawakʼge." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ińiń ńelkeda, gujukʼ khon hõ uni maejiu doe haṛhatʼgea, uniyakʼ mon do mitʼṭecʼ jhampa ar jhạli leka ar uniyakʼ tikin do sikṛige. Ar okoe hoṛ Isore kusi ocoye uni do uniyakʼ ti khon apnartetʼe rukhiyạkʼa, menkhan kại hoṛ do jhạlireye paṛaokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Sosolhayicʼe meneda, “Ńelme, jotowakʼ tayomre oka goṭawakʼ menakʼ ona ńela mente iń do dhape dhap lahakate adomakʼ bisoekoń baḍaekeda." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Iń do ạkil reakʼ iń sendrakeda menkhan bạń ńamleda unre iń do hajar hoṛko talare sarhao lek mitʼṭen khạṭi herel hoponiń ńamkedea, menkhan onko talare khạṭi mitʼṭen maejiu hõ bạń ńamledea." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Eken niạgeń baḍae daṛeada, Isor do manwa khạṭigeye benaoledea, menkhan manwa do aema lekan ghạṭ secʼko calaoena.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ạkilanicʼ leka do okoe menaea? Katha reakʼ bhed bhaṅgao do okoeye baḍaea? Ạkil do manwawakʼ mẽtʼãhãe malkao ocoyetʼtaea ar uniyakʼ mẽtãhã reakʼ ṭheṭamu do pheraokʼkana. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ińakʼ sopolha do niạge, rajakʼ hukum bataotaeme, ente am do Isor samaṅre onagem kiriạ akana." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usạrate raj bạgikate alom calakʼa. Ar bạṛicʼ jãhãnakʼ sãote alom seledokʼa, ente raj do acʼakʼ sana lekae kạmikana." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Rajakʼ kathage joto khon maraṅakʼkan khan uni do okoeye mendaṛekea, “Am do cetʼem ceka kana?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Okoe uniyakʼ hukume dohoyetʼ uni do cetʼ bạṛicʼakʼge baṅ paṛaoaea. Ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ mon do ṭhik okte ar kạmi reakʼ dharakoe baḍae oroma. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Jotowakʼ lạgitʼge ṭhik okte ar kạmi reakʼ dhara do menakʼa, menkhan manwawakʼ ạkil do thoṛagetaete ạḍi kosṭoe ńameda;" 
Ecclesiastes8:7 ente jãhãe manwa tinre bako baḍaea cetʼ hoyokʼa mente unre okoe hõ bako lại daṛeaea ona do tinre hoyokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Hoe cetʼleka okoehõ bako sapʼ ṭarhao daṛeakʼ ar lạṛhại jokhecʼ cetʼleka okoehõ chuṭi bako ńam, onkage gujukʼ din cetanre okoeyakʼ hõ ektiạri do bạnukʼa. Bedhoromkoakʼ bedhoromtetʼ hõ ona khon do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakoa." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Siń cando latarre jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ ona ạribạndhi kateń ńelkeda, mitʼṭen hoṛ do eṭakʼko cetanre ektiạriye calaoeda ar onate onkoe duk ocoyetʼkoa." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ona tayom noa hõń ńelkeda, bedhoromko doko topa ocokʼ kana. Noko do mundilteko bolo oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana; tayomte nagraharen hoṛ do onkoakʼ dusṭạmiko hiṛińketʼtakoa. Niạ hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Dusṭạmi kạmi reakʼ sạjại usạrate baṅ emawako khan hoṛkoakʼ mon do bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ artetʼ tearokʼtakoa. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kạkại hoṛ mitʼsae bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi ar ḍher dine bahaokʼre hõ ińiń baḍaea Isor botoraekan hoṛ do bhạlại hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Menkhan bedhoromko do Isor bako botoraekante bhạlại do baṅ hoyokʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ bahaokʼ din do umul lekage hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Dhạrtire ar mitʼṭen ạuṛiyakʼ do hoyokʼkana, bedhoromkoakʼ kuṛại do dhorom hoṛgeko ńama, ar dhorom hoṛkoakʼ kuṛại do bạṛicʼ hoṛko ńameda. Ińiń meneda noa hõ ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Onate iń do jion reakʼ rạskạkʼ iń sarhaokeda, ente siń cando latarre jom-ńũ ar rạskạ chaḍa manwawakʼ bhage mente do ar cetʼge bạnukʼa. Enḍekhan siń cando latarre Isor emakʼ manwa jion reakʼ dinkore uniyakʼ kạmire rạskạge uniren gate do." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ạkil ńam lạgitʼ ar dhạrtire oka hoyokʼkan ona bujhạu lạgitʼ iń do tinreń moneyada unreń ńelkeda, mitʼṭen hoṛakʼ mẽtʼ jodi siń ńindạ beṅgetʼge tahentae rehõ uni do siń cando latarre Isor okae ceka akatʼ ona purạte bae bujhạu daṛeakʼa. Ar manwa do ona sendra ńam lạgitʼ joto lekanakʼe kurumuṭulere hõ ona do bae sendra ńam daṛeakʼa. Mitʼṭen ạkilan hoṛ ona doe baḍaegea menteye menlere hõ enhõ uni do purạte ona bae bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes8:17  
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ona iạte iń do niạko reaṅiń hudiskeda ariń ńelkeda, dhorom ar ạkilan hoṛko ar onkoakʼ kạmi do jotoge Isorakʼ tire menakʼa. Okoehõ bako baḍaea onko samaṅre cetʼ menakʼa mente- dulạṛ se edre." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Sanamkoakʼ ses dosa do mitʼgea- baṅ doe dhoromicʼkan ar baṅ doe bedhoromicʼkan, baṅ doe bhageyicʼkan are baṅ doe bhõnḍicʼkan, dãṛẽ samaṅge cetʼ ar baṅ samaṅge cetʼ. Bhage hoṛ do kạkại hoṛ khon cetʼte hõ bae sorosa; ar kiriyạkʼicʼ hoṛ hõ baṅ kiriạyicʼ khon bae sorosa." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Siń cando latarre okako hoyokʼkan ona modre duk reakʼ do hoyokʼkana, sanamko inạ mitʼ dosage hoyokʼtakoa. Ona chaḍa manwa ontor do dukte perecʼgea ar jiwetʼe tahen bhor uniyakʼ ontorre do khepatetʼ tahena, ar ona tayom uni doe gujukʼa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Jiwetʼ hoṛkoakʼ as do menakʼgea; ar gocʼicʼ dhạcri kul khon jiwetʼ setageye bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Jiwetʼ hoṛ doko baḍaegea, onko do gujukʼ hoyokʼtakoa mente, menkhan gocʼko do cetʼ hõ bako baḍaea. Onko lạgitʼ kuṛại do bạnukʼa, ente onkoakʼ katha do hiṛińena." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Onkoakʼ dulạṛ, kurud ar hiskạ do laharege caba akana; siń cando latarre jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ onare onkoakʼ do jãhãn bakhrage bạnukʼtakoa." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Onate am do senkate rạskạte jomme ar sukte darkha rasa ńũ joṅme, ente Isor do amakʼ niạko kạmi reakʼ laha khongeye kusi ạgu akawada." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Jao okte amakʼ kicricʼ do ponḍge tahenma ar bohokʼre sunum ojokʼ kate rạskạkʼme. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Siń cando latarre Isor okako dine emakawatʼme, amakʼ jion reakʼ onako dinre amren bạhu, okoe dom dulạṛede, uni sãote sukte khemaome, ente siń cando latarre amakʼ jion ar amakʼ kosṭoteakʼ khaṭaokʼre noa do amakʼ kuṛại kana." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Amakʼ tire jãhãnakʼ kạmige hijukʼ ona do amakʼ goṭa daṛete kạmime, ente oka ṭhạ̃item calakʼkan ona gujukʼ jaegare jãhãn kạmi se hudis se bidiạ se ạkil mente cetʼge bạnukʼa." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Siń cando latarre iń do arhõń ńelakada, ona do hoyokʼkana: Ńir hapaorakʼre coṭkarkoge jao okteko jitạukʼa, ona do baṅa; daṛeankoge jao okteko jitạukʼa, ona hõ baṅa; ạkilankoge jao okte lacʼ bikʼ jomakʼko ńama ona hõ baṅa; budankoge jao okteko kisạ̃ṛokʼa, ona hõ baṅa; gạkhuṛ hoṛge jao okte ạtko ńama, ona hõ baṅa; ente okte ar bhạg do sanamko lạgitʼge menakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Okoe hõ bae baḍaea tinreye gujukʼa mente. Cetʼleka hako do jhạlireko aṭkaokʼ ar cẽṛẽ do jhampare onkage muhin do manwa cetanre ackage hijukʼa ar muhinreye paṛaoakʼ. 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Iń do siń cando latarre ạkil reaṅ nonkan mitʼṭecʼ iń ńelkeda ar ińakʼ bujre ona do sorosakʼge tahẽkana. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń nagrahare thoṛa hoṛko tahẽkana. Ar mitʼṭen daṛean raj do ona upạrte hecʼkateye gheraokeda ar ona akromon lạgitʼe sapṛaoena. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ona nagrahare do mitʼṭen ạkilan reṅgecʼ hoṛe tahẽkana. Uni do acʼakʼ ạkilte nagrahae rukhiyạkeda, menkhan uni reṅgecʼ hoṛ do celege bako disạ doholedea." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Onateń menkeda, “Daṛe khon ạkilge sorosa,” Menkhan reṅgecʼ hoṛkoakʼ ạkil do nihạ̃tokʼ kana ar uniyakʼ katha do celege bako ańjomleda." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Bebujkoakʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ kạu kạu aṛaṅ khon ạkilankoakʼ sulukte perecʼ katha ańjomge bhagea. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Lạṛhại reakʼ sajbaj khon ạkil do sorosgea, menkhan mitʼṭen kại hoṛ do ạḍi utạr boge kạmiye bạṛija." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Gocʼ rõ do cetʼleka so sunum seageye so ocoy, onkage thoṛa bebujtetʼ do ạkil ar manote muchạu giḍiya." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ạkilankoakʼ mon do bhage hor secʼ ruạṛa, menkhan bebujkoakʼ ontor do bhul horte calakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Horte calakʼ jokhecʼ hõ ńelogokʼa, bebujicʼ do bud khaṭogetaea; ar uniyakʼ bebujtetʼ do joto hoṛko bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ am cetanreye edrelenre amakʼ ṭhạ̃i do alom bạgiyakʼa; ente sobori do sanam bạṛicʼakʼkoe thir ocoya. 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Siń cando latarre mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼakʼ iń ńelkeda okaṭakʼ do ṭhikakʼ baṅkan: Disạm cakʼlaoko do nonkageko bhula- 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Bebujko do cetan hudạreko doho ocokʼa, ar kisạ̃ṛko do latar hudạreko duṛupʼ ocokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Iń do golamko sadom cetanre ar cetan hudạren hoṛko do golam leka taṛamate calakʼ iń ńel akatʼkoa. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Okoe ghaḍlakʼe lae uni do onaregeye khańjokʼa; ar okoe bhite dasao uni do bińe ger botejea. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Okoe dhiriye rakab uni do onategeye hạnokʼa; ar okoe sahane paṛag uni do ona hotetege muhinreye paṛaokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ṭeṅgocʼ bhotṛoge khan ar baṅ laser khan onare daṛe do ḍherge lagaokʼa, menkhan ạkil do kạmi leṭecʼ lạgitʼgeye goṛowama." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ạuri bandhonere bińe gerle khan babandhonicʼ do acʼakʼ gun reakʼ jãhãn porhoge bạnukʼtaea. 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Ạkilan hoṛakʼ moca kathare do daya menakʼa, menkhan bebujicʼ do acʼakʼ moca kathateye marao ocokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Uniyakʼ katha reakʼ etohopʼrege bebujtetʼ tahenkana, ar mucạtʼre do purạte lelhatetʼ tahenkana." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Bebujko do ḍher kathako roṛa, menkhan cetʼ darae kana ona do celege bako baḍaea, ar tayomte cetʼ hoyokʼa ona do manwa okoeye lạiyaea?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Bebujicʼakʼ khaṭaokʼ do uniye laṅga cabayea; uni do nunạkʼe lelhagea, nagrahate calakʼ reakʼ hor hõ bae baḍaekana." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Hae, ona disạm do! Okare kạ̃ṛmĩren bacṛa hopon do raj hudại ńam ar onḍenko mukhiyạko do setakʼ hạbicʼ bhojko jom." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Bhạgangea ona disạm do, one onaren raj doe bhodro hoṛren hoponkan, ar onḍenko mukhiyạko do ńũ bulokʼ lạgitʼ do baṅ menkhan daṛekʼ lạgitʼ oktereko jom ńũiyetʼ kan." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Asketokʼ hoṛkoakʼ sạṛim do lạndubokʼa; ar ḍhilạu iạte oṛakʼre dakʼ jorokʼa. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Bhoj daka do rạskạ ocome lạgitʼ; darkha rasa do jiwi hulạs ocoy lạgitʼ; ar ṭaka-poesa do sanamakʼe jogaoa. 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Raj do mon monte hõ alom sarapaea se apnar giticʼ oṛakʼre kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ hõ alom sarapaea, ente coṭren cẽṛẽ do amakʼ kathako idiya; ar udạu senkate amakʼ kathakoe lại boteja." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Amakʼ jomakʼ do dakʼ cetanre chiṭiạume, ente ḍher din tayom ona do arhõm ńam ruạṛa." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Eae goṭecʼ, hẽ irạl goṭecʼ hõ bakhrawakome, ente dhạrtire cetʼ muhin hijukʼa ona do do bam baḍaea." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Rimil do dakʼte perecʼge tahen khan ona do dhạrtire dakʼe dul ruạṛa. Dare do utạr ar dạkhin jãhãsecʼge bhinḍạṛokʼ, ona do inạ ṭhạ̃irege tahenkana." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do ṭhik hoe lạgitʼe tạṅgiyetʼkan uni do itạ bae era; ar rimilko ạribạndhiyetʼkan hoṛ do phosol bae ira. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Eṅgatakʼ kukhire menae gidrạre jiuakʼ bolokʼ cetʼleka bam baḍaekan, onkage sanamakʼren sisirjạuicʼ Isorakʼ kạmi hõ bam bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Am do setakʼ jokhecʼ itạ er me, ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ hõ amakʼ ti doe onkaema, ente oka okte reakʼ kạmi jo bahakʼa se banarge soman hoyokʼa, ona do bam baḍaea." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Marsal do mońjgea, ar siń cando ńele hõ mẽtʼ lạgitʼ bogegea." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Jãhãe manwa ḍher din jiwetʼe tahen khan uni do onako dinreye rạskạ joṅma. Menkhan ńut reakʼ kathako hõ jemone disạima, ente onako do ḍhergea. Ar darakanakʼ jotoge ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 E juạn, amakʼ juạn oktere hulạsokʼme, juạn umer reakʼ dinkore amakʼ ontor do ame rạskạ ocomema. Amakʼ monejoṅ leka horte taṛamme ar amakʼ mẽtʼre oka bhageakʼkan ona kạmime, menkhan baḍae dohokakʼme, niạko lạgitʼ Isor do ame bicạrmea." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Amakʼ mon khon bhabna do sahaṛkakʼme, ar amakʼ hoṛmo do alom kosṭo ocowakʼa, ente juạn okte ar koṛa pạṛiạ do ạuṛiyakʼgea." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Amakʼ juạn oktere amren sisirjạuicʼ hõ disạyem, ente amakʼ haṛam umer reakʼ dinko hijukʼ kana, metakʼme, duk reakʼ dinko hijukʼ kana, one unrem men, “Niạ haṛam umerre onako do bạń hạ̃sakʼ kana.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Unre siń cando, ar marsal, ńindạ cando ar ipilkoko ńutokʼa, ar jạṛi dakʼko tayom rimil do arhõ ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Unre oṛakʼ horhokin dokin thar tharaokʼa, ar daṛean hoṛ dokin kubjạkʼa; guhum riritʼko doko thoṛakʼa. Ar khiṛki duạr khon oyoṅetʼkan kin dokin ạndhuạkʼa." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Unre kulhi secʼakʼ kapaṭ duạr dokin sińokʼa; onate jante reakʼ saḍe do ar baṅ ańjomokʼa, cẽṛẽkoakʼ ceroberote haṛam hoṛko ebhenokʼa, ar sereń kuṛiko doko khay khoyokʼa." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Unre usul jaegate ar horte calakʼ doe botorokʼa. Ar badam dare do bahakʼa, sosrocʼ do hoḍgor hoḍgore taṛama hichạ baha do mosodokʼa. Ona tayom manwa do jaejug reakʼ oṛakʼteye calakʼa, ar hokʼmorko do kulhireko dãṛãbaṛaea." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Rupạ reakʼ sikṛi ạuri topagokʼre, se sona reakʼ bhajan ạuri rạpudokʼre, ḍạḍi ṭhen kanḍa ạuri posakʼ gejerokʼre, se kuńre cak ạuri kuṭrạ ńurokʼre, amren sisirjạuicʼ baṛe disạyeme." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Hasa do hasarege ruạṛ calakʼa. Isor okoe jiue emakade uni jiu do acʼ ṭhengeye ruạṛ calakʼa. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Sosolhayicʼe meneda, “Ạuṛiyakʼgea, ạuṛiyakʼgea, jotoge ạuṛiyakʼgea!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Sosolhayicʼ do ạkilan hoṛe tahẽkana ar hoṛko hõ bidiyại cetʼ idiwatʼkoa. Uni do hudis ar biḍạu aṭkarkate ạḍi utạr kạhtukkoe gathao galaṅkeda. 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Uni do jut jut kathakoe ńamtotʼ akada, ar uni okaṭakʼe olakatʼ ona do khạṭi ar sạri kangea." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Ạkilan hoṛkoakʼ katha do gupikoakʼ ṭheṅga leka. Onkoakʼ kathako do kuṭạm jalatʼ akatʼ jạlạiko lekana. Ona do mitʼṭen gupiyicʼe roṛakatʼ leka. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 E beṭa, men cehaokʼme, puthiko olokʼ reakʼ ses do bạnukʼa ar ḍher paṛhaokʼte do hoṛmo laṅgakʼa." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kathako reakʼ mucạtʼ do nokʼõe; tobe ses katha do hoyokʼkana, Isor botoraeme ar uniyakʼ hukumko dohoyme; ente noa kangea manwakoakʼ dạyik do." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Isor do mitʼke mitʼ kạmi reakʼ, se mitʼke mitʼ okoakʼko hõe bikʼcạra-baṅ do bạṛicʼakʼ kan ar baṅ do bhageakʼ kan." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Noa do jotoko khon mońj utạrakʼ sereń kana. Noa do Solomonakʼ sereń kana. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Cokʼạńme amakʼ moca reakʼ cokʼte, ente amakʼ dulạṛ do darkha rasa khon hõ sorosgea." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Amakʼ sunum reakʼ mońj so doe rạskạ ocoyediń kana; dul akatʼ mońj so sunum lekage amakʼ ńutumtam do. Onatege am do kuṛikoko dulạṛetʼmea. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Iń do rajiń metadea, “Am sãote idiyińme; dela, alaṅ do laṅ ńir senokʼa.” Uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye aderkedińa. Ale do am sãotele rạskạkʼa arle hulạsokʼa; darkha rasa khon hõ amakʼ dulạṛ do ḍherle sarhaotama. Onko amko dulạṛetʼme ona do jutakʼ kangea." 
SongOfSongs1:5 E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, kedar reakʼ tạmbuko lekań hendege rehõ Solomonakʼ tạmbu orwalko lekań cehragea." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ińiń hendegete nonka do alope koyokʼạńạ, ente siń candogeye jharkao akadińạ. Ińren boehako do ińreko edre akante darkha bagwan horhoyicʼ menteko dohokadińa, onate ińakʼ darkha bagwan do bạń joton akada." 
SongOfSongs1:7 E ińren dulạṛiạtiń, mase lạiyạńme, amren pal bhiḍiko do okarem gupikoa? Ar tikin jokhecʼ do okarem aḍakoa? Am sãoten gupikoren pal bhiḍiko ṭhen cedakʼ kusumbiko leka doń ṭuṭuri calakʼa;" 
SongOfSongs1:8 E maejiukoren mońj utạricʼ, am do ona bam baḍae khan palren bhiḍikoakʼ pańja ńel ńelte hijukʼme ar gupikoakʼ tạmbu aṛete amren merom hoponko gupikotam." 
SongOfSongs1:9 E ińren dulạṛiạtiń Pharaoakʼ rãt gạḍiren ghuṛi tulucʼ iń do amiń juriyetʼmea. 
SongOfSongs1:10 Cemkecʼ getama amakʼ johakin ar galaṅ upʼtam ar amakʼ hoṭokʼre mạnik mala do mońjge ńelokʼkana. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sona gunsikole galaṅama rupạ reakʼ ṭikliko salakʼ. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Raj do acʼakʼ ṭenḍar mạcire tinreye ṭenḍar akan tahẽkana unre ińakʼ jaṭamạnsi sunum do mahkao oḍokena. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Dulạṛiạtiń do gondhoroste perecʼ thạilạkʼ lekatiń one ińakʼ bạskin talare dohoakan. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Dulạṛiạtiń do mehndi baha thopa leka kantińae Engedi reakʼ darkha bagwan talare. 
SongOfSongs1:15 E dulạṛiạtiń, am dom mońjgea! Ńelme am do ạḍim cehragea. Amakʼ mẽtʼkin do potam mẽtʼkin leka." 
SongOfSongs1:16 E dulạṛiạtiń, ńelme am dom mońjgea! Hẽ, ạḍitetʼgem napaegea. Alaṅakʼ aṭetʼ do hạriạṛ sakamte benao akana." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Alaṅakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ koaliko do Debdạru dareko kana ar saro dare do alaṅakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ koṭha kana. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Iń do Saron reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kiyạ baha kạnạń, buru nala reakʼ sikiyạm bahage." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Rạṅgạini talare sikiyạm baha cetʼleka, onkage juạn kuṛiko talare ińren dulạṛiạ hõ." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Bir dareko talare apel dare cetʼleka, onkage juạnko talare ińren dulạṛiạ hõ. Uniyakʼ umulre duṛupʼkateń rạskạkʼ kana, ar uniyakʼ jo do heṛemgea ińakʼ mocare." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Uni do manḍawa latarteye aderkedińa, dulạṛ reakʼ nisạnateye umulkedińa ar dulạṛiń reakʼe sodorkeda." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Kismis jom ocoyińme ar daṛe ocoyińme badam jo jom ocoyińte ṭanḍhayińme ente dulạṛte iń doń latwakʼ akana. 
SongOfSongs2:6 Leṅga tite uni do bohokʼe ãṭhṛẽketʼtińạ, ar jojom tite doe hạṛupʼkedińạ." 
SongOfSongs2:7 E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, Poṭretʼ jel ar posta eṅgako ńutumteń nehõrokʼ kana, dulạṛ do alope buskuyea ar alope ebhenea uniyakʼ okteko ạuri hoyokʼ hạbicʼ." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ote ańjompe, ińren dulạṛiạwakʼ sabad, hạni ńelepe, uni doe hijukʼ kana; uni do buru boṭkocʼ cetante don donteye hijukʼ kana." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Dulạṛiạtiń do selepʼ jelren hopon leka. Hạni ńelepe, uni do aleakʼ pạcri tayomreye teṅgo akana, uni do jalna secʼteye ńeleń kana, ar bhurni khone oyoṅ edeńkana." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ińren dulạṛiạ do ińe metadińạ, “E ińren dulạṛiạ, ma beretʼme; E mońjicʼ, iń sãote dela hijukʼme." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ńelme rabaṅ dinko do parom akana; ar jạputʼ dinko hõ caba akana. 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ṭạnḍire bahako saṛ akana, ar cẽṛẽkoakʼ sereńko hõ ańjomokʼ kana disạmre mala potamkoakʼ kukuḍubur hõ ańjomokʼ kana." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Loa darere jo do ehopʼ akana; darkha nạ̃ṛĩko do bahakʼ kana ar onako reakʼ bas do mahkaokʼ kana. E ińren dulạṛiạ, ma beredokʼme; E mońjicʼ tiń, dela iń soṅgete hijukʼme.”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 E potamtiń, huṭupʼ dhiri lopakʼre tahenicʼ buru cuṛạ pakhakore menamicʼ, amakʼ rup baṛe ńel ocoyińme, amakʼ aṛaṅ baṛe ańjom ocoyińme, ente am dom cehragea ar aṛaṅ do heṛemgetama." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Ape do khĩkṛĩko sapʼkope, onko kạṭicʼ kạṭicʼ hoponkoge, onko do aboakʼ darkha bagwanko nosṭoyeda; ente darkha nạ̃ṛĩko do bhoṭogokʼ kana." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Dulạṛiạtiń doe ińren kangea ar ińhõ unirenge; uni do sikiyạm baha bagwan talareye gukʼpikana. 
SongOfSongs2:17 E ińren dulạṛiạ, ruạṛ hijukʼme baṛe; tin hạbicʼ baṅ aṅga marsalokʼ ar ńut ạuri cabakʼ un hạbicʼ am do tahenme. Buru rindiṛkore juạn jhaṅkaṛ jel baṛe hoyokʼme, selepʼ jel leka baṛe hoyokʼme." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ aṭetʼre ińren dulạṛiạtiń iń sendra baṛayede tahẽkana; ińiń sendrayede tahẽkana, menkhan bạń ńamledea." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ińiń hudiskeda, iń do beretʼkate nagrahare, kulhire ar racakoreń dãṛãbaṛaea; iń do onḍe ińren dulạṛiạtińiń sendrayea; uniń sendra ledegea menkhan bạń ńamledea." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Nagraharen pahradarko do dãṛã dãṛãte pahrae jokhecʼ ińko ńel ńamkedińa. Iń do onkoń kuliketʼkoa, “Ape do cetʼ ińren dulạṛiạpe ńel akadea?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Onkoń paromketʼko khan ińren dulạṛiạtiń doń ńamkedea. Ar uni sapʼkate eṅgạńakʼ oṛakʼte ạuriń ạguiye hạbicʼ bạń aṛakʼledea; ar okoe kukhireye doholediń uniyakʼ oṛakʼtegeń ạgukedea. 
SongOfSongs3:5 E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, poṭretʼ jel ar posta eṅgako ńutumteń nehõrokʼ kana uniyakʼ okteko ạuri hoyokʼtae hạbicʼ uni do alope buskuyea, ar alope ebhenea." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Hahaṅkar secʼ khon hijukʼkan tutʼ tutʼ dhũạ khunṭi lekanicʼ doe okoekana? Ona dhũạ khunṭire do beparikoakʼ joto lekanakʼ, gondhoros ar kundurute mahkaokʼ jut so mosolako menakʼa." 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ńelpe ona do Solomonakʼ khuṛkhuṛi kana! Ona khuṛkhuṛi beṛhaete do turuigel birbanṭa menakʼkoa; onko do Israelren joto khon daṛean bir kanako. 
SongOfSongs3:8 Onko jotoko ṭhen do tarwaṛe menakʼa, ar lạṛhạire jotogeko gạkhuṛgea; onko do ḍanḍare tarwaṛeko tolakada ar ńindạ reakʼ muhin iạte sapṛao menakʼkoa." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Solomon raj do acʼ lạgitʼge niạ khuṛkhuṛi doe benao ocoleda, ona do Lebanon reakʼ kaṭtegeye benao ocoleda." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Ona khuṛkhuṛi reakʼ khunṭiko do rupạ reakʼ, ar ṭenḍarakʼ do sona reakʼ tahẽkana, ona reakʼ palan do beguni roṅakʼge; ar Jerusalemren kuṛiko do dulạṛte bhitri reakʼ aṭetʼakʼko benaoatʼ tahẽkana." 
SongOfSongs3:11 E Sionren kuṛiko, dela oḍok hijukʼpe, ńelpe, Solomon raj do mạ̃ṛteye sajao akana; uniyakʼ baplakʼ dinre, ar uniyakʼ rạskạ dinre, uniren eṅgattetʼ do mạ̃ṛe horokʼ akawadea." 
SongOfSongs4:1 E dulạṛiạtiń, am dom mońjgea! Hẽ, am do ạḍitetʼgem mońjgea. Ṭuṭuri danaṅre potam mẽtʼkin leka amakʼ mẽtʼkin do, ar amakʼ upʼ do Gilead buru khonko pheḍ hijukʼkan merom pal lekage." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amakʼ ḍaṭako do kạpci akatʼko bhiḍi palrenko leka one onko do ạrupʼko khonko rakapʼ hijukʼkan. Onko mimitʼkoren do joṛa menakʼkoa, ar okoeṭakʼge bako atʼ akana!" 
SongOfSongs4:3 Amakʼ luṭikin do jeṅgetʼ arakʼ phitạ leka; ar mẽtʼãhã do ạḍi napaegetama! Ṭuṭuri danaṅre ḍạlim jo kecakʼ leka amakʼ joha do. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Amakʼ hoṭokʼ do Dạudakʼ buruńj leka; onare do mitʼ hajar ḍhalko aka menakʼa, ona do jotoge birbão hoṛkoakʼ ḍhal kana." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amakʼ bạskin do sikiyạm bagwanre ạtińkan poṭretʼ jelren jawa hoponkin leka. 
SongOfSongs4:6 Tin hạbicʼ baṅ aṅga marsalokʼ ar ńut ạuri cabakʼ unhạbicʼ iń do gondhoros burure, hẽ, kunduru reakʼ burureń tahena." 
SongOfSongs4:7 E dulạṛiạtiń, ạḍige napaegea amakʼ hoṛmo do, amre jãhãn khutge bạnukʼa." 
SongOfSongs4:8 E bạhutiń, dela iń sãote Lebanon khon hijukʼme, Lebanon khon iń tulucʼge dela hijukʼme. Amana reakʼ cuṛạ khon, Senir ar Hermon buru reakʼ muthni khon, dhạcri kulkoakʼ dander khon, poṭea tạrupʼkoakʼ buru khon dela pheḍ hijukʼme." 
SongOfSongs4:9 E dulạṛiạtiń, E bạhutiń, amakʼ beṅgetʼte iń dom mạluṅ kedińạ; ar amakʼ hoṭokʼ reakʼ mitʼ goṭecʼ sikṛi malate ińakʼ mon dom tolketʼtińạ." 
SongOfSongs4:10 E dulạṛiạtiń, E bạhutiń, amakʼ dulạṛ doe rạskạ ocoyedeń kana! Ente darkha rasa khon, sanam jut mosolako khon ar amem ojokʼ akatʼ sunum reakʼ bas khon hõ amakʼ dulạr do artetʼge sorosgea!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 E bạhutiń, amakʼ luṭikin khon do nirạ dumur rasage jorokʼ kana. Amakʼ alaṅre do toa ar dumur rasage menakʼa; amakʼ kicricʼko reakʼ bas do Lebanon bir reakʼ mohok leka." 
SongOfSongs4:12 E dulạṛiạtiń, E bạhutiń, am do pạcri esetʼ akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ bagwan leka; ar bond akatʼ jharna ar kũń ḍạḍi kanam." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Am do mońj ḍạlim bagwan leka; one onḍe soros soros joko jo akan; onḍe do mehndi ar jut so nạ̃ṛĩkoge menakʼa. 
SongOfSongs4:14 Onḍe do jaṭamạnsi, sasaṅ, boc, darcini ar sanam lekan kunduru darekoge menakʼa; onḍe do gondhoros, oguru ar joto lekan jut so dare nạ̃ṛĩkoge menakʼa." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Am do bagwanko reakʼ jharna kanam, bhumbuk oḍokokʼ kan kũń dakʼ leka, Lebanon khon ạtu oḍokokʼ gaḍa hõ kanam." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Ebhenokʼme E utạr hoe ar dela hijukʼme E dạkhin reakʼ hoe. Aben do ińakʼ bagwan cetante hoe ben jemon ona reakʼ so do mahkao oḍokokʼ. Ińren dulạṛiạ do acʼakʼ bagwanre hecʼkate ona reakʼ bhage bhage jo ko baṛeye jomma. 
SongOfSongs5:1 E dulạṛiạ, E bạhutiń, iń do ińakʼ bagwanreń bolo akana; ińakʼ gondhoros iń sitʼetʼkana ińakʼ mahkaokʼ salakʼ. Iń do chatań jometʼtińạ ińakʼ dumur rasa tulucʼ, ar ińakʼ darkha rasań ńũiyetʼtińạ toa tulucʼ. Jompe, E gateko ar ńũ joṅpe, dulạṛte ńũ bikʼpe E dulạṛiạko. Dulạṛiạwakʼ katha: (Kuṛi)" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Iń doń jạpitʼleda, menkhan ontor do jagwarge tahẽkantińạ. Ote ańjompe, ińren dulạṛiạ do silpińe ṭhopʼ ṭhopʼeda, “E dulạṛo, E dulạṛiạtiń, E potam juri tiń, E nichorayicʼ tiń, duạr jhicʼạńme baṛe. Ente sisir dakʼte ar ńindạ reakʼ kuṛhạte ińakʼ bohokʼ upʼ do lohodokʼ kantińạ.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Iń do mone moneteń menkeda, “Kicricʼ iń bhạnduṛ akatʼtińạ, ar cekate ona doń horokʼ ruạṛa? Iń do jaṅgań ạbuk sapha akana, cekate ona doń mạilạitińạ?”" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Dulạṛiạtiń do huṛkạṛ bhugạkʼre tiye aderkeda, ar uni lạgitʼ ińakʼ mon do bhak bhakaoentińạ." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Iń do dulạṛiạtiń duạr jhicʼae lạgitʼ iń beretʼena, unre ińakʼ ti do gondhoroste ojokʼ tahẽkana, ar kạṭupʼko khon gondhoros hõ jorokʼkan tahẽkante huṛkạṛ reakʼ ḍạnḍi do lohotʼena." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Dulạṛiạtiń lạgitʼ iń do duạriń jhicʼkeda, menkhan uni doe gusạu senena. Uni do tinre kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre ińakʼ jiwi do oṭaṅ lentińạ. Iń doń sendra baṛakedea, menkhan bạń ńamledea; hohowạdiyạń, menkhan bae goṅledeńa." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Nagraharen dãṛãnkan pahradarko do pahrae jokhecʼko ńamkedińa; onko do ińko dal ghạlkedińa; ar pạcrikoren pahradarko do oyon aṅgropko recʼkedińa. 
SongOfSongs5:8 E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, kiriạwạńpe, ińren dulạṛiạtińpe ńamle khan lạiyaepe iń do dulạṛteń kạhil caba akana." 
SongOfSongs5:9 E maejiukoren mońj utạricʼ, amren dulạṛiạ do eṭakʼko khon oka secʼteye sorosa? Ar eṭakʼ dulạṛiạko khon oka oka secʼteye bhagegete, am do nonkam kiriạ ocoyetʼlea?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ińren dulạṛiạ doe eselgea, uniyakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ roṅ do arakʼgetaea; gel hajarko mod khon hõe sorosgea." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Uniyakʼ bohokʼ do nirạ sona leka, uniyakʼ lacha upʼ do piṭi piṭi ar bhonḍa kạhũ leka ńõṛõm ńõṛõm:" 
SongOfSongs5:12 uniyakʼ mẽtʼ do ạtukʼkan soḍokʼ aṛere potamkin leka, Toate ạrupʼ akan, perecʼ soḍokʼ dakʼ aṛerekin apʼ akana." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Uniyakʼ johakin do jut so mosola reakʼ baṛge leka, one onḍe khon jut so mahkao oḍokokʼ kan. Uniyakʼ luṭikin do gondhoros joro pheḍokʼkan sikiyạm baha leka." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Uniyakʼ sopo do gulạnḍ sona leka mạnik dhiriko bạisạuakʼge. Hoṛmo do hạti sonḍa reakʼ kundạuakʼ leka, nilkanto mạnik dhirikote bạisạu esetʼakʼge." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Uniyakʼ bulukin do mormor khunṭi leka nirạ sona reakʼ ganḍore doṛomakʼge. Uniyakʼ rup do Lebanon reakʼ usul buru leka, debdạru dare leka sorosakʼge." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Uniyakʼ galmarao do heṛemgetaea, uni do joto secʼte ạḍi hạ̃sạnicʼge. E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, ińren dulạṛiạtiń ar ińren gate doe nonkanicʼ kangea." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Maejiuko modren E napae utạricʼ, dulạṛiạtam do okateye senakana? Uni do oka secʼe ạcur sen akana? Ma lạiyaleme, ale hõ jemonle sendra goṛowam." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Dulạṛiạtiń do acʼakʼ bagwanteye sen akana, jut so mosola reakʼ bawgantege; bagwanre acʼren khạṛko ạtińko lạgitʼ ar sikiyạm baha sitʼ jarwae lạgitʼge." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Iń do dulạṛiạtińren ar uni hõ ińrenge, uni do sikiyạm baha bagwan talareye gukʼpikana."
