SongOfSongs6:4 E dulạṛiạtiń, am do Tirsa nagraha lekam mońjgea, Jerusalem lekam ṭhosokgea; nisạnkoante phạdko leka ṭhonokanicʼge." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Amakʼ mẽtʼkin do iń khon sahaṛtam; ente ona dokin khadbadao ocoyedeń kana Amakʼ upʼ do Gilead buru khon pheḍ hijukʼkan merom palko lekage. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amakʼ ḍaṭako do kạpci akatʼko bhiḍi palrenko leka; one onko ạrupʼko khonko rakapʼ hijukʼkan. Onko mimitʼkoren do joṛa menakʼkoa, ar okoeṭakʼge bako atʼ akana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Amakʼ ṭuṭuri kicricʼ danaṅre amakʼ joha do dạlim jo kecakʼ leka. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Turuigel rạni ar irạl gel chuṭki erako ar alekha kuṛikoko tahẽdaṛeakʼa," 
SongOfSongs6:9 menkhan potamtiń, nichorayicʼtin leka do okoege bạnukʼkoa. Uni do eṅgattetʼren sadhericʼge, one lacʼreye doholede acʼren dulạṛ hoponera. Juạn kuṛiko do uni ńelkate bhạganko metadea rạni ar chuṭki erako hõ uniko sarhaokedea." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Onkoko menkeda, “Okoe kanae uni do, one aṅga marsalokʼ leka pĩṛĩtʼ pĩṛĩtʼe rakapʼ hijukʼkan, ńindạ cando leka mońj, ar siń cando leka jhak jhak, nisạnkoante phạdko leka ṭhonokicʼge?”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Buru lodamre sarhekʼkan nãwã itạko ńel lạgitʼ, darkha nạ̃ṛĩkore baha bhoṭogokʼ kana se baṅa ona ńel lạgitʼ ḍạlim darekore baha mõhẽkʼ kana se baṅa ona ńel lạgitʼ iń do badam dare bagwanteń pheḍ senlena." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ar jãhãnakʼ ạuriń bujhạurege ińakʼ jiwi do ińren rajakʼ rãt gạḍiko reakʼ mitʼṭecʼreye duṛupʼkedińa. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Ruạṛme, dela ruạṛme, E Sulemit; ale do jemon amle ńelme ona iạte ruạṛme, dela ruạṛ hijukʼme. Ape do Mohenoyimakʼ enecʼ ńel leka, cedakʼ Sulemit ńele dope khojkana?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Heṛan mońjgea panahe horokʼ akatʼ amakʼ jaṅgakin reakʼ goṛhon do! Amakʼ kaera opatʼ bulukin reakʼ abhran do mạnik leka ona do gạkhuṛ kạrigolakʼ tite kạmiyakʼge. 
SongOfSongs7:2 Amakʼ bukạ do gulạnḍ bạṭi leka onare bheńjao akatʼ darkha rasa do baṅ ṭonṭakʼa. Amakʼ lacʼ do puńji akatʼ guhum leka ona do sikiyạm bahakote esetʼ ạcur akana. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amakʼ bạskin do jel hoponkin leka poṭretʼ jelren jawa hoponkin lekage. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Amakʼ hoṭokʼ do hạti sonḍa reakʼ buruńj lekana, ar amakʼ mẽtʼkin do Hesbon reakʼ pukhri leka ona do Beth-rabbim reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhenakʼge. Amakʼ mũ do Lebanon reakʼ buruńj lekana, one ona do Damesek secʼ sen akan." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Bohokʼ tam do Karmel buru leka sajakana; amakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ dalae dalae upʼ do beguni roṅ lekage; ar raj do ona lacha upʼteye bondi akana. 
SongOfSongs7:6 E dulạṛiạtiń, E hạ̃sanicʼ, am do ạḍitetʼgem mońjgea, ar ạḍitetʼgem cemkecʼgea!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Amakʼ goṛhon do khijur dare leka, ar amakʼ bạskin do darkha nạ̃ṛĩ jo reakʼ thoka leka." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ińiń menkeda, “Iń do khijur darereń dejokʼa, ar ona reakʼ jokoń saba.” Amakʼ bạskin do darkha jo reakʼ thoka leka hoyokʼma, ar amakʼ sahẽtʼ reakʼ bas do ḍabha reakʼ lekage." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Amakʼ cokʼ do mońj darkha rasa lekage baṛe hoyokʼma. Ona darkha rasa do dulạṛiạtińakʼ nạnḍrite pheḍokʼma cetʼleka jạpitʼ akatʼicʼakʼ luṭi ar ḍaṭako secʼte joro pheḍokʼkan. 
SongOfSongs7:10 Iń do ińren dulạṛiạren kạnạń ar ińrege uniyakʼ gagoj do menakʼtaea. 
SongOfSongs7:11 E dulạṛiạtiń, dela, alaṅ do ṭạnḍire laṅ oḍok calakʼa. Ar ato bahre ar mehendi jhupuṭoṛokore laṅ giticʼ aṅgakʼa." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Dela, ạḍire laṅ beredokʼa ar darkha bagwante laṅ bolokʼa, onḍe darkha nạ̃ṛĩ bhoṭogokʼ kana se baṅa, onare baha do saṛ akana se baṅa, ar ḍạlim bahako baha akana se baṅa ona laṅ ńela; ar iń do onḍege ińakʼ dulạṛiń emama." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Dudại bahako do mahkaokʼ kana; alaṅakʼ duạr ṭhen do sorosakʼ nãwã ar mare joko hõ menakʼa. E dulạṛiạtiń, iń do am lạgitʼgeń doho jogao akada." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ohae, ińren boeha baṛem tahẽlen khan okoe do eṅgạńakʼ toakine nunu akatʼ! Ar bahrereń ńamlem khan enḍekhan am doń cokʼkema, ar okoehõ cetʼge bako mendaṛekińạ;" 
SongOfSongs8:2 ar iń do horiń udukʼamkea ińren eṅgạńakʼ oṛakʼteń ạgukema, ar am dom cetʼạńkea. Iń do jut so mosola mesalakatʼ darkha rasań ńũ ocokema, ar ińakʼ ḍạlim jo reakʼ ros hõń ńũ ocokema." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Uni do leṅga tite bohokʼe ãṭhṛẽketʼtińạ, ar jojom tite doe hạṛupʼkedińạ." 
SongOfSongs8:4 E Jerusalemren kuṛiko, nehõrkateń metape kana, dulạṛ do alope buskuyea ar alope ebhenea uniyakʼ okteko ạuri hoyokʼtae hạbicʼ." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Acʼren dulạṛiạreye ṭenḍar akan uni hahaṅkar secʼ khon rakapʼ hijukʼicʼ doe okoekana? Apel dare latarreń ebhenketʼmea; amren eṅgam do onḍege bedon rakapʼadete ame janamketʼmea. 
SongOfSongs8:6 Amakʼ ontorte dohoyińme mohorchap akatʼleka ar amakʼ soporege mohor chapakʼme; ente dulạṛ do moron leka daṛeanakʼ kana, ar kobor leka kumãyãwakʼ kana ahkaokʼ do. Ona do lepʼ seṅgel leka jolokʼtege tahena, ạḍi tạpis lepʼ lekage ona do." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Aema dakʼ hõ bae ĩṛĩcʼ daṛeakʼa dulạṛ do; ar banbạsi hõ ohoe ḍubạ daṛelea ona do. Dulạṛ lạgitʼ jãhãe acʼakʼ jotowakʼe emlenre hõ ona do nihạ̃t giḍikakʼge hoyokʼa. 
SongOfSongs8:8 Aleren mitʼṭen huḍiń misera menaetalea, uniyakʼ bạskin do ńit hõ ạuri harakʼtaea. Unire tisokʼ peṛako lagaokʼa enhilokʼ do cetʼle cekaea?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Uni do pạcriye tahẽlen khan uni cetante rupạ reakʼ pahra oṛakʼle benaokea. Ar duạre tahẽlen khan enḍekhan debdạru kaṭ reakʼ toktate uni do sińkatele dohokea. 
SongOfSongs8:10 Iń do mitʼṭecʼ pạcri kạnạń, ar ińakʼ bạskin do usul pahra oṛakʼkin lekage. Iń do uniyakʼ nońjorre onkageń hoyena suluke ńamketʼ kuṛi lekage." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Bakʼal-hamonre Solomonakʼ do mitʼṭecʼ darkha bagwan menakʼa; ona do horhokoe jimạ akatʼkoa. Ar ona jo reakʼ dam lekate mimitʼ hoṛ do gelbar keji rupạ sekelko emokʼa. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ińakʼ darkha bagwan menakʼa, ona do ińakʼkangea. E Solomon, ona gelbar keji rupạ do amakʼge tahenma, menkhan bar keji tala do onko lạgitʼge okoe do joko horho kan." 
SongOfSongs8:13 E bagwanre tahenkạnicʼ, gateko do amakʼ aṛaṅ ańjom lạgitʼko akʼtenkana, ar ińhõ baṛe ańjom ocoyińme." 
SongOfSongs8:14 E dulạṛiạtiń, dela hijukʼme; jut so mosolate perecʼ buru coṭre selepʼ jel leka, juạn jhaṅkaṛ jel leka baṛe hoyokʼme." 
Isaiah1:1 Jihudi disạmren Usiạ raj, Jotham raj ar Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere Amosren hopon Jesaea do Jihudạ ar Jerusalem reaṅ oka dorsone ńamletʼ ona reaṅge nonḍe do ol akana." 
Isaiah1:1 Jihudi disạmren Usiạ raj, Jotham raj ar Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere Amosren hopon Jesaea do Jihudạ ar Jerusalem reaṅ oka dorsone ńamletʼ ona reaṅge nonḍe do ol akana." 
Isaiah1:2 E serma ańjomme, E pirthimi ańjomme, Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do hoponkoń joton hara akatʼkoa, menkhan onko do iń upạrteko hul akada." 
Isaiah1:3 Ḍaṅgra do acʼren kisạ̃ṛe oromedea, gadha hõ acʼren mạlikakʼ nandware oromeda, menkhan Israel do acʼren mạlik bae baḍaeyede kana, ar ińren hoṛ hõ iń do bako bujhạu edeńkana.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Hae! Onko do kạite perecʼ mitʼṭen jạtrenkoge, dusi reakʼ bojhate perecʼ hoṛge, behoketʼren bõskoge, bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiyetʼkan hoponkoge. Onko do Probhu Isorko bạgi giḍi akadaea ar Israelren uni sonoticʼko nihạ̃t akadea arko dea giḍi akadea." 
Isaiah1:5 Ape do cedakʼ dalpe joma? Cedakʼ huhultegepe tahena? Ape do bohokʼrepe ghạl ocoakana, ar goṭa ontor do nijorgetapea." 
Isaiah1:6 Jaṅga talka khon bohokʼ upʼ hạbicʼ okare hõ niphuṭ do bạnukʼanaṅ, eken ghạl, dal reakʼ cinhạ ar ghaoko menakʼa. Ona do baṅ sapha akantapea se bedhao hõ baṅ hoyakana, ar sunum dulakʼte haso hõ baṅ komao akantapea." 
Isaiah1:7 Apeakʼ disạm do ujạṛ akantapea, nagrahako do seṅgelte jarkhar akana. Apeakʼ khetko reakʼ phosolko do apeakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅrege porjạtrenko luṭ idiyetʼ kana; ar bidisiạko do disạmko jarkhar akada." 
Isaiah1:8 Sion hoponera do nonkae bạgi giḍi ocoakana uni do darkha bagwanren pahradar oṛakʼ lekae hoyakana, uni do phosol goḍaren ḍera oṛakʼ ar bạiriko hotete gherao ạcurakatʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha lekageye hoyakana." 
Isaiah1:9 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do abo lạgitʼ adom adom hoṛko jiwetʼ bae doholeko khan enḍekhan aboakʼ dosa do Sodom ar Gomora leka hoykokʼa. 
Isaiah1:10 E Sodomren mukhiyạko, Probhu Isorakʼ katha baṛe ańjompe. E Gomoraren hoṛko, aboren Isorakʼ bondobos reakʼ baṛe luturakʼpe." 
Isaiah1:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Aperen jãhãn teṅgenokʼko do baṅ jạruṛạńạ. Bheḍa ar lodgopʼ posao janwarkoakʼ itil reakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ iń do bạń hạ̃sakʼ kana; ḍaṅgra, bheḍa ar meromakʼ mãyãm hõ bạń kusiyakʼ kana." 
Isaiah1:12 Ape do iń ṭhenpe jarwakʼ ar ińakʼ racape lebetʼ gańjaotiń, noa do ape ṭhen okoeye khojkana?" 
Isaiah1:13 Ạuṛiyakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinis do ar alope ạguiya. Iń do apeakʼ dhup jeredokʼakʼ doń hirkhạwakʼ kana. Molokʼ cando, jirạukʼ mãhã, dhorom sabha ar porobko reakʼ bedhoromakʼ kheloḍko iń do ar bạń sahao daṛeakʼ kana." 
Isaiah1:14 Apeakʼ molokʼ cando reakʼ rạskạ ar niṭ akatʼ porobko doń hirkhạwakʼ kana. Iń ṭhen noako do bojha leka hoyakana; noako gokʼ gokʼte iń doń laṅga caba akana. 
Isaiah1:15 Koejoṅ lạgitʼ tinre apeakʼ tipe rakabtapea unre ape secʼ do bạń beṅgeda. Ar ḍherpe koere hõ bạń ańjomtapea, ente apeakʼ ti do mãyãmte perecʼgetapea." 
Isaiah1:16 Ape do apnartetʼ khạṭikʼpe ar saphakʼpe. Ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon apeakʼ sanam bạṛicʼ kạmiko sạṅgiń giḍikakʼpe; ar onako alope kạmiya. 
Isaiah1:17 Bhageakʼ kạmi reakʼ cetʼ joṅpe, hok reakʼ bicạrpe, sasantaoko sudhrạukope, reṅgecʼko secʼ tahenpe, ar rạnḍi maejiukoakʼ teṅgo goṛowakope.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Dela hijukʼpe, ńitokʼ bon galmarao phanḍaolege. Ente apeakʼ sanam kạiko sindur leka arakʼ akanre hõ enhõ ona do him leka ponḍokʼa; ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ kanre hõ enhõ ona do bhiḍi upʼ leka ponḍokʼa." 
Isaiah1:19 Ape do tabe akan tahenpe aṅgocetʼ khan enḍekhan disạm reakʼ joto khon bhage phosolpe joma," 
Isaiah1:20 menkhan tabe akae bape aṅgoc arpe hul enḍekhan khạṭige tarwaṛetepe marao ocokʼa.” Probhu Isor do acʼge niạ kathae roṛeda. 
Isaiah1:21 Hae, kũạri nagraha, ona do kusumbi leka hoyakana! Mitʼ okte uni do hok reakʼ bicạrte perecʼe tahẽkana; unire dhorom tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ do khũniạhikoko girobasokʼ kana." 
Isaiah1:22 Amakʼ rupạ do mạilạ akana; amakʼ bhage darkha rasare do dakʼ mesal akana. 
Isaiah1:23 Amren disạm cakʼlaoko do huhulko ar kombṛokoren gateko hoyakana; sanamkoge ghusko kusiyakʼa ar sandesko khoja. Onko do reṅgecʼ hoṛko secʼ bako teṅgon kana ar rạnḍi maejiukoakʼ mambla hõ onko ṭhen do baṅ seṭerokʼ kana. 
Isaiah1:24 Ona iạte phạdkoren Probhu, Israelkoren daṛeanicʼ Isore meneda, “Aha, iń secʼren okoeko baṅkan onko khon iń do rukhiyạń ńama ar ińren bạiriko cetanreń hala hạliya." 
Isaiah1:25 Am upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń rakab tińạ. Ar amakʼ mạilạ do kharteń oḍok giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ sanam bhejal doń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. 
Isaiah1:26 Lahateakʼ dinko leka iń do disạm cakʼlaoko ar sopolhakoń emama; ar ona tayom do dhorom reakʼ nagraha, ar kũạri nagraham men ocokʼa.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Isor do acʼakʼ hokʼ reakʼ bicạrte Sione chaḍaoa, ar okoe kại khon monko ạcur onko do acʼakʼ dhoromteye chaḍaokoa." 
Isaiah1:28 Menkhan huhulko ar kạikại hoṛ do jotoge mitʼ sãoteko maraokʼa, ar okoe Probhu Isorko bạgi akade onko doko caba utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah1:29 “Hẽ, ape okoe do debdạru darepe sewawakʼ kan tahẽkan ape do ona iạtepe lajao ocokʼa, ar okako bagwanrepe sewayetʼ tahẽkan ona iạtepe nihạ̃t ocokʼa." 
Isaiah1:30 Ape do ona debdạru dare lekan kope hoyokʼa one oka reakʼ sakam do tolmojokʼkan; ar ona bagwan lekan kope hoyokʼa one oka do dakʼte baṅ paṭao akatʼ. 
Isaiah1:31 Daṛean hoṛko do rohoṛ busupʼ lekan kope hoyokʼa, ona reakʼ kạmi do seṅgel reakʼ alaṅ leka. Ona do mitʼ dhaogeye lokʼa; ar okoehõ ona seṅgel do bako ĩṛĩcʼ daṛeakʼa.” bańcaoicʼ" 
Isaiah2:1 Jihudạ ar Jerusalem babotre Amosren hopon Jesaea okae ńelletʼ ona do niạ kana: 
Isaiah2:1 Jihudạ ar Jerusalem babotre Amosren hopon Jesaea okae ńelletʼ ona do niạ kana: 
Isaiah2:2 Mucạtʼ dinre sanam buruko modre ona buruge joto khon usulteye rakapʼ ocokʼa one okare Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ menakʼ. Huḍiń buru boṭkocʼko khon uni do usulteye rakapʼ ocokʼa, ar sanam jạtrenko do ạtukʼ dakʼ leka uni secʼko ạtu calakʼa." 
Isaiah2:3 Jạt jạtren hoṛ do hecʼkateko mena, “Dela, abo do Probhu Isorakʼ burute bon rakapʼlenge, dela, Jakobren Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bon calakʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ hor reaṅe cetʼabona ar uniyakʼ horte bon taṛama.” Onko do noa kathako mena, ente Sion khon do hukum emogokʼa ar Jerusalem khon do Probhu Isorakʼ kathage." 
Isaiah2:4 Uni do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talareye bicạra; ar aema jạtrenko talare hok reakʼe bicạr chinḍạutakoa. Onko do akoakʼ tarwaṛe rạputʼkate nahel reakʼ phalko benaojoṅa ar borlom rạputʼkate do datromkoge. Mitʼ jạtrenko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko upạrte tarwaṛe ar bako rakaba; onko do lạṛhại hõ ar bako lạṛhạiya. 
Isaiah2:5 E Jakob bõsrenko, dela hijukʼpe; dela, Probhu Isorakʼ marsalre bon dãṛãnma." 
Isaiah2:6 Am do amren hoṛko, metakʼme Jakobren hoponkom bạgi giḍi akatʼkoa. Onko do purub disạmren ojhakoteko perecʼ akana; Philisṭiko leka onko do jạdu biddạko kusiyakʼ kana ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko sãote tiko milạu akada." 
Isaiah2:7 Disạm do sona ar rupạte perecʼgea, onkoakʼ dhon durib do asambheṛgea. Onkoakʼ disạm do sadomkote perecʼgea ar rãt gạḍi hõ alekha menakʼtakoa." 
Isaiah2:8 Ona chaḍa disạm do boṅga murtikote perecʼgetakoa. Onko do akoakʼ tite benaoakʼ jinisko sewawakʼ kana, ar kạṭupʼte okako benaoetʼkan onageko ḍobokʼakʼ kana." 
Isaiah2:9 Onatege hoṛko doko tumbutʼ ocokʼa ar sanamkogeko copotʼ ocokʼa. Onko do alogem ikạkoa. 
Isaiah2:10 Probhu Isorakʼ botoranakʼ edre ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ malkaokʼ khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ maraṅ maraṅ dhiri paṛakʼkore bolokʼpe, ar otre okokʼpe." 
Isaiah2:11 Ar gorbokʼkan hoṛakʼ beṅgetʼ do tumbutʼ hape ocokʼa hoṛkoakʼ bạḍại do copotʼ ocokʼa. 
Isaiah2:12 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do gorbokʼ ar bạḍại udukʼetʼ hoṛko ar cetanre menakʼko onko sanamko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ dine ṭhik dohoakada; enhilokʼ do jotogeko tumbutʼ ocokʼa. 
Isaiah2:13 Lebanon reakʼ sanam jeleń ar usul debdạru dareko ar Bason reakʼ sanam Elon dareko do copotʼ ocokʼa; 
Isaiah2:14 ona chaḍa sanam maraṅ maraṅ buruko," 
Isaiah2:15 mitʼke mitʼ usul pahra oṛakʼko, mitʼke mitʼ keṭecʼ pạcriko," 
Isaiah2:16 sanam Tạrsis-jahajko ar mitʼke mitʼ jakjomok jahajko do copotʼ ocokʼa. 
Isaiah2:17 Manwakoakʼ gorbokʼ do copotʼ ocokʼtakoa ar hoṛkoakʼ bạḍại hõ copotʼ ocokʼa. Enhilokʼ do eken Probhu Isorgeye manot ocokʼa," 
Isaiah2:18 ar boṅga murtiko doko marao utạrokʼa. 
Isaiah2:19 Probhu Isor do tinre dhạrtiren hoṛko botor udukʼako lạgitʼe hijukʼa unre uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ jhalkaokʼ khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ hoṛko do buru dander ar ot reakʼ bhugạkʼteko bolokʼa. 
Isaiah2:20 Enhilokʼ hoṛko do oneko pujạwako kan sona ar rupạte benao murtiko do cũd ar bạduṛ ṭhenko giḍikakoa. 
Isaiah2:21 Probhu Isor do tinre dhạrtiren hoṛko botor udukʼako lạgitʼe hijukʼa unre uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ malkaokʼ khon bańcaokʼ lạgitʼ maraṅ maraṅ dhiri ciritʼre ar buru reakʼ paṛakʼreko bolokʼa. 
Isaiah2:22 Manwako cetanre do alope bhorsakʼa. Uniyakʼ jiwi ma uniyakʼ mũ reakʼ sahẽtʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkan; uniyakʼ do cetʼ damge bạnukʼtaea. 
Isaiah3:1 Ńitokʼ ńelme, phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Jerusalem ar Jihudạ khon ṭheṅga ar ṭhesae ocokʼeda. Uni do onkoakʼ sanam jomakʼ ar dakʼkoe ocoga." 
Isaiah3:2 Ona chaḍa uni do birbao hoṛ ar lạṛhại sipạhiko, disạm cakʼlaoko ar nạbiko, gonokko ar murubbiko," 
Isaiah3:3 mõṛẽgel cetanren subedarko ar manotan hoṛko, jạdu udukʼko ar biń sasapʼkoe sạṅgińkoa." 
Isaiah3:4 Onko cetanre do kom umerren koṛakoge matha lekae benaokoa; ar thoṛa budan koṛako do onkoren cakʼlaokoko hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah3:5 Manwa do manwa, aḍepaseren hoṛko do aḍepaseren hoṛko santaokoa; kạṭicʼko do haṛamko upạrte ar nicạṛ hoṛ do manotan hoṛ upạrteko teṅgona." 
Isaiah3:6 Hoṛko do apnarakʼ bõsren mitʼ hoṛ sapʼkateko mena, “Amakʼ do oyonakʼ menakʼtama, am do aleren ạyuricʼ hoyokʼme, ar niạ jarkhar akan disạm reakʼ bhar do amge hataome.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Menkhan enhilokʼ uni hoṛ do roṛ ruạṛateye metakoa, “Disạm bhạlại reakʼ ińakʼ do cetʼge bạnukʼtińạ. Ińakʼ oṛakʼre jãhãn jomakʼ se kicricʼko hõ bạnukʼtińạ; disạmren ạyuricʼ do alope benaoińạ.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Jerusalem doe tohotʼ akana ar Jihudạ doe bhindạṛ akana, ente unkinakʼ katha ar kạmi do Probhu Isor birudrege hoyokʼkana; unkin do uni samaṅrege uniyakʼ ṭhonok kin nihạ̃tetʼ akada." 
Isaiah3:9 Unkinakʼ mẽtʼãhãge unkin upạrte gohae emetʼkana; unkin do Sodom reakʼ leka ạkinakʼ ghạṭkin sodoreda, ar bạkin danaṅkakʼ kana. Hae, onko hoṛko do! Onko do apnar cetanrege ghoṭnako paṛao ocoakada." 
Isaiah3:10 Dhorom hoṛko metakope, bhạlại hoyokʼtakoa, ente onko do akoakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛạiko ńama." 
Isaiah3:11 Hae hae, bedhorom hoṛko do! Onko cetanre do muhin hijukʼa. Ar okako kạmikan ona reakʼ kuṛại doko ńamgea." 
Isaiah3:12 Okoe ińren hoṛko santaoetʼko onko do gidrạko leka, ar okoe onkoko ḍanṭaoetʼko onko do maejiuko leka. E ińren hoṛko, aperen hor udukʼ hoṛkoge bạṛicʼ secʼko idiyetʼpea; onko do ṭhik hor khon bhul horteko idiyetʼpea." 
Isaiah3:13 Probhu Isor do mambla lạgitʼe beretʼ akana; uni do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko bicạrko lạgitʼe teṅgo akana. 
Isaiah3:14 Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko modre haṛam hoṛko ar mukhiyạko upạrte bicạrkateye meneda, “Ape do ińakʼ darkha bagwanpe nosṭo akada; ar reṅgecʼ hoṛkoakʼ jinisko luṭkate apeakʼ oṛakʼtepe idiakada." 
Isaiah3:15 Cetʼ iạte ińren hoṛ dope lebetʼ kucạ akatʼkoa ar reṅgecʼ hoṛ dope lebetʼ gańjao akatʼkoa?” Niạ katha do phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeye meneda. 
Isaiah3:16 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Sionren maejiu do bạḍạiteko perecʼgea. Onko do hoṭokʼ tiạrkateko beraberi baṛae kana arko bijli baṛayeda; ar chamak chamak taṛamate jhamak jhunur pạigạnko saḍe ocoyeda." 
Isaiah3:17 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Sionren maejiuko bohokʼreye ńẽtʼkoa ar onate onko doko ceḍekʼa.” 
Isaiah3:18 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ napae napae goena gạṭikoe recʼkoa. Uni do onkoakʼ pạigạnko, cạndi reakʼ rupạ jhạliko, chondro harko," 
Isaiah3:19 jhurjhuriko, curiko, ṭuṭuriko," 
Isaiah3:20 mạ̃ṛko, bạjuko, kạcni piṭiko, jiṭhuyạkʼko, mạndạliko," 
Isaiah3:21 mundạmko ar mũ reakʼ mạ̃kṛiko," 
Isaiah3:22 porob reakʼ kicricʼko, oyon aṅgropko, sal kicricʼko ar jhola thạilạkʼko," 
Isaiah3:23 ạrsiko, mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼko ar jhińjri ṭuṭurikoge." 
Isaiah3:24 Mońj so bodolte bạṛicʼ so, ḍanḍa totolakʼ bodolte baber, mońj rokʼ nạkicʼ upʼ bodolte ceḍe, damanakʼ kicricʼ bodolte gõṛẽ kicricʼ, ar mońj rup bodolte lo reakʼ dag tahena." 
Isaiah3:25 Aperen hoṛko do tarwaṛete ar lạṛhại birko do lạṛhạireko gujukʼa. 
Isaiah3:26 Sion reakʼ phaṭok duạr doko homor halaṅa; ar Sion do ujạṛ akante otreye duṛupʼkokʼa. 
Isaiah4:1 Enhilokʼ eae goṭen maejiu do mitʼṭen herel hoṛ sapʼkateko metaea, “Aleakʼ jom-ńũ ar horokʼ bande reakʼ do aletegele bebosta joṅa; eken amren bạhu mentele tahen reakʼ ạidạri baṛe emaleme. Aleakʼ henosta baṛe sạṅgińtaleme.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isorakʼ kahle do husnạkʼ ar ṭhonokanakʼ hoyokʼ ar disạm reakʼ jo do Israelren sarecʼ hoṛkoakʼ mạhima ar saj lạgitʼge hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah4:3 Enhilokʼ Sionre okoe sarecʼko tahen, metakʼme Jerusalemre tinạkʼ jiwetʼko tahen onko do sonot menteko hoho ocokʼa. Jerusalemre jiwetʼ tahen lạgitʼ onko hoṛkoakʼ ńutum do tạlikare ol caṛhaokʼa." 
Isaiah4:4 Probhu Isor do acʼren Jiu hotete seṅgelte dhorom reakʼe bicạrkote Sionren maejiukoakʼ mạilạkoe ạrupʼ saphaetakoa ar Jerusalem khon mãyãm reakʼ dage sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. 
Isaiah4:5 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do Sion buru reakʼ sanam jaega cetanre ar okoe onḍeko jarwakʼ onko cetanre dhũạ reakʼ rimil ar ńindạ do jolokʼkan seṅgel reakʼ marsale sirjạua; ona do sanam Israelkoakʼ mạhima cetanre mitʼṭecʼ chamḍa lekage hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah4:6 Noa do setoṅ khon umul ńam reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ chạuni ar hoe ar dakʼ khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ asray ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah5:1 Ińiń dulạṛede kan lạgitʼ do mitʼṭecʼ sereńiń sereńa, uniyakʼ darkha bagwan reaṅakʼgeń sereńa. Burure mitʼṭecʼ bhage hasawan jaegare ińren dulạṛiạwakʼ mitʼṭecʼ darkha bagwan tahẽkana." 
Isaiah5:2 Uni do beṛhaeteye la ạcurkeda ar ona reakʼ dhirikoe ocokʼ giḍikada ar onare joto khon bhageakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩye rohoekeda. Uni do ona talare usulge pahra oṛakʼe benaokeda ar darkha lelen kunḍ hõ onareye kholaokeda. Ona tayom do bhage darkha jo lạgitʼe koyokʼ horkeda, menkhan onare do jojo darkha jo joyena." 
Isaiah5:3 “E Jerusalem ar Jihudạren hoṛko, ńitokʼ do apege lạipe, noa do cetʼ ińakʼ, se ińakʼ darkha bagwan reakʼ doskana?" 
Isaiah5:4 Ińakʼ darkha bagwan lạgitʼ okań ceka akatʼ ona khon bạ̃ṛti do ar cetʼ cekae hoykokʼtińa? Tinre iń do bhage darkha lạgitʼ iń koyokʼ horkeda unre cedakʼ onare jojo darkha jo do joyena? 
Isaiah5:5 Ińakʼ darkha bagwan cetanre okań cekae ona do ńitokʼ iń lạiyapea: iń do ona reakʼ eṭetʼakʼ iń ocoga onate bagwan doko jom ṭhuṭkuya; ar ona reakʼ pạcriń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa onate ona doko lebetʼ gańjaoa. 
Isaiah5:6 Iń do mitʼṭecʼ dhaṅ dhaser jaegageń hoeocoya; nạ̃ṛĩ hõ baṅ kamanokʼa ar jumi hõ baṅ casokʼa, onḍe do rạṅgạini ar aṭkuṭige hara perejokʼa. Rimil hõń hukumakʼa onare jemon dakʼ aloe jạṛiyakʼ.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ darkha bagwan do Israel bõsren hoṛkoge; ar Jihudạren hoṛko do rạskạwanakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩge. Uni do hok bicạr reakʼe ńam baṛakeda menkhan mãyãme ńelkeda; uni do dhorom reakʼe ńam baṛakeda menkhan duk reakʼ rakʼe ańjomkeda. 
Isaiah5:8 Hae ape do, one okoe do oṛakʼ sãote oṛakʼ ar khet sãote khetpe toṅge idiyetʼkan; sesre eṭakʼko lạgitʼ jãhãn ṭhạ̃ige baṅ tahena, ar ape eskarge disạmrepe girobasokʼa." 
Isaiah5:9 Ińakʼ luturte phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ niạ kathań ańjomakada, “Sạrige maraṅ maraṅ oṛakʼko do marao utạrokʼa, ar napae napae dolanre do celege bako tahena." 
Isaiah5:10 Pegel bighạ darkha bagwan khon eken bargel bar liṭar darkha rasa ńamokʼa, ar mitʼsae irạgel keji itạ khon eken gel irạl keji phosolge janamokʼa.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Hae, onko hoṛ do, okoe do bubulakʼ ńũi lạgitʼ setakʼreko beredokʼkan ar ḍher ńindạ hạbicʼ duṛupʼkate darkha rasako hoṅgorkan, one ạuriko ńũ bhuteṛokʼ hạbicʼ." 
Isaiah5:12 Onkoakʼ bhojre do peṛesaṅ ar binạ banam, kortal, tiriyạ ar darkha rasa tahenkana; menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ kạmi reakʼ do cetʼge bako moneyakʼ kana, ar uniyakʼ ti teakʼ kạmi reakʼ hõ bako ńeletʼkana." 
Isaiah5:13 Onate buj bạnukʼtako iạte ińren hoṛko do eṭakʼ disạmre bondi akanko tahena. Onkoren manotan hoṛ do reṅgecʼteko gujukʼa, ar onkoren eṭakʼko hoṛ do tetaṅteko chaṭ chaṭaokʼa." 
Isaiah5:14 Ona iạte patal puri do acʼakʼ nạnḍriye osar akatʼtaea, ar moca do maraṅ okocʼe cahapʼ akada. Ar manotanko ar disạm hoṛko, jhogṛakʼko, gulmaletʼ hoṛko jotoge onḍeko ńurokʼa." 
Isaiah5:15 Maraṅ ar huḍiń jotogeko tumbudokʼa, ar phulạukʼ kan mẽtʼ hõ copotʼ ocokʼa." 
Isaiah5:16 Menkhan phạdkoren Probhu Isor do dhorom reakʼe bicạra are usulokʼa; sonoticʼ Isor do acʼakʼ dhorom iạte sonot menteye sodorokʼa. 
Isaiah5:17 Unre bhiḍiko do akoakʼ khetre cetʼlekako ạtiń onkage kisạ̃ṛkoakʼ sanam dhaṅdhaser jaegakoreko ạtiń baṛaea, ar porjạtrenko do ona dhaṅdhaserakʼ jaegako hameṭjoṅa." 
Isaiah5:18 Hae, onko hoṛ do, one okoe do eṛeteakʼ baberte behok reakʼko or idiyetʼ ar kại do sagaṛ reakʼ baberte." 
Isaiah5:19 Onkoko mena, “Isor doe usạrae ma; uni do acʼakʼ kạmi usạrateye kạmima jemon onale ńel. Israelren uni sonoticʼakʼ goṭawakʼ baṛeye purạukʼtae jemon onale baḍae daṛeakʼa.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Hae, onko hoṛ do, one okoe bạṛicʼakʼ do mońjko metakʼkan ar mońjakʼ do bạṛicʼko metakʼkan, marsal do ńutko metakʼkan ar ńut do marsal menteko hudisetʼkan, ar okoe heṛemakʼ do haṛhatʼko metakʼkan ar haṛhatʼ do heṛemakʼ menteko hudisetʼkan." 
Isaiah5:21 Hae, onko hoṛ do, okoe apnarakʼ mẽtʼre ạkilan ar budan kanako menteko hudisokʼkan." 
Isaiah5:22 Hae, onko hoṛ do, okoe doe darkha rasa hoṅgorkoren guru ar bubulakʼ mesalakʼ kạmireko gạkhuṛge," 
Isaiah5:23 okoe do ghus jomkate dusiyicʼko aṛakʼede ar bin dusiyicʼ do hok reakʼ bako bicạretʼtae. 
Isaiah5:24 Onatege seṅgel reakʼ alaṅ do cetʼleka busupʼe loyetʼ ar seṅgel reakʼ lepʼre rohoṛ ghãsko jarkharokʼkan, onkage onkoakʼ benaoakʼ do seakʼtakoa ar dhuṛi lekage onkoakʼ baha do oṭaṅokʼtakoa; ente onko do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ hukumko bebatao akada ar Israelren uni sonoticʼakʼ kathako lebetʼ gańjao akada." 
Isaiah5:25 Ona iạte Probhu Isorakʼ edre do uniren hoṛko upạrte jolokʼkana; uni do ti tulkateye hạnetʼkoa. Buru-boṭkocʼko do daldalaoena ar mạ̃ṛĩko do horkore mạilạ leka ńur tahẽyena. Niạko tayom hõ uniyakʼ edre do baṅ thirlena, uni do ti tulgeye dohoakatʼtaea." 
Isaiah5:26 Uni do sạṅgiń jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ nisạne rakabtaea ar dhạrti reakʼ ses simạnaren hoṛkoe hohoakoa. Ar ńelpe, onko do usạrateko ńir hijukʼa." 
Isaiah5:27 Onko do okoehõ bako laṅgakʼa, ar bako tohodokʼa; okoehõ bako dudṛuma; onkoakʼ ḍanḍa totolakʼ do baṅ raṛakʼtakoa, panahe reakʼ phitạ hõ baṅ topagokʼtakoa;" 
Isaiah5:28 Onkoakʼ sar do dhargetakoa, onkoakʼ akʼ do ṭuniạuge menakʼtakoa; onkoren sadomkoakʼ khurạ do cok muki dhiri leka jhalkaokʼ kana, ar onkoakʼ rãt gạḍiko reakʼ pạ̃ihạ̃ko do hoe bharḍo leka." 
Isaiah5:29 Kul eṅga lekage onkoakʼ hạnḍrạukʼ do; onko do dhạcri kul lekako hạnḍrạukʼa ar guńjrạukʼ kanako akoren sikạrko lạgitʼ. Onko doko ger ạtkirkoa; ar celege bako rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. 
Isaiah5:30 Enhilokʼ onko do doreão reakʼ hud hud saḍe leka Probhu Isorren hoṛko cetanreko gondraokʼa. Jãhãege unre disạm secʼe beṅged enḍekhan uni do ńut ar kosṭogeye ńela; ar marsal hõ rimilte danaṅokʼte ńutokʼa. 
Isaiah6:1 Oka bochor Usiạ raje gocʼen un bochor iń doń ńelkeda Probhu Isor do ạḍi usul reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana. Ar uniyakʼ raj kicricʼ reakʼ latar secʼakʼ hĩste mundil doe perecʼ akada. 
Isaiah6:2 Uni cetanre do Seraphimko teṅgo akan tahẽkana; onko mimitʼko do turui goṭecʼkate phạ̃krạ̃kʼ tahẽkantakoa- onko do barea phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte mẽtʼãha ar barea phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte do jaṅga dapal akan tahẽkantakoa ar barea phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte doko uḍạukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Isaiah6:3 Onko do hohowateko menjoṅ kan tahẽkana, “Phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe sonot, sonot, sonotgea; Goṭa dhạrti do uniyakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼgea." 
Isaiah6:4 Onkoakʼ aṛaṅte mundil reakʼ silpiń do dal dalaoena ar oṛakʼ do dhũạte perecʼena. 
Isaiah6:5 Unre iń doń menkeda, “Hae, iń doń marao utạrena, ente ińakʼ moca do bhõnḍgetińa ar nonkan hoṛko talareń girobasokʼ kana okoekoakʼ moca do bhõnḍgetako. Iń do ińakʼ mẽtʼte raj, phạdkoren Probhu Isoriń ńelkedea.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Unre mitʼṭen Seraphimko modren mitʼṭen do acʼakʼ tite mitʼṭecʼ jolokʼkan aṅgra sapʼkate iń ṭhene uḍạu hecʼena; ona aṅgra do pinḍ khon cimṭạteye halaṅleda. 
Isaiah6:7 Ar ona aṅgra do ińakʼ mocare jakʼketʼteye menkeda, “Ńelme, noa do amakʼ luṭikine joṭetʼkeda; amakʼ behokakʼko do sạṅgiń akana ar amakʼ kại do ikạyentama.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ona tayom iń do Probhu Isorakʼ kathań ańjomkeda. Uniye menkeda, “Okoeyiń kolea? Abo secʼ khon okoeye calakʼa?” Ińiń menkeda, “Iń minạńa, ińge koleńme baṛe.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Uniye menkeda, “Am do senkate onko hoṛem metakoa, ‘ape dope ańjomgea menkhan bape bujhạua, ńeńel dope ńeńelgea menkhan bape oroma.’ ”" 
Isaiah6:10 Ona tayom uni do arhõe metadińa, “Noko hoṛkoakʼ ontorem ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa, onkoakʼ luturem ṭosa ocoytakoa, ar onkoakʼ mẽtʼ dom kãṛã ocoytakoa. Ar baṅ khan onko do mẽtʼteko ńeńela, luturteko ańjoma, ar ontorreko bujhạua ar kại khon mon ạcurkateko boge ocokʼa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Unre iń doń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Tinạkʼ din nagrahako baṅ marao utạrokʼ, oṛakʼ-duạr baṅ ujạṛokʼ ar khet-baṛgeko baṅ jarkharokʼ;" 
Isaiah6:12 ar tinạkʼ din Probhu Isor do eṭakʼko bae sạṅgińko ar disạm talare ńir bạgi ṭhạ̃iko ạuri saṅgekʼ hạbicʼ. 
Isaiah6:13 Unre disạm talare gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń hoṛko tahen, enhõ onko doko jalao marao ocokʼa. Menkhan Elon dare makʼ bhindạṛlere cetʼleka ona reakʼ hurutʼtetʼ tahen, onkage hurutʼtetʼ lekate disạmre sonot itạ leka adom hoṛko tahena.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Usiạren goṛomtetʼ, metakʼme Jothamren hopon Ahas do tinre Jihudạ disạmren raje hoyena unre Aramren Rathsin raj do Israelren raj Ramayelren hopon Pekoho soṅgekate Jerusalem upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe rakapʼ hecʼena, menkhan unkin do bạkin jitạu daṛeada." 
Isaiah7:2 Unre Dạud bõsren hoṛko men ocoyena, “Aramren lạṛhại phạdko do gate lekate Ephrayimreko ḍera akana.” Niạ katha ańjomkate Ahas ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ mon do botorte hoete bir reakʼ dareko leka dalmalaoentakoa." 
Isaiah7:3 Unre Probhu Isor do Jesaeae metadea, “Am ar amren hopon Sear-Jasub taben oḍok hijukʼte kicricʼ sobotʼ ghaṭ cetan gạḍiạ sãote mitʼakan dakʼ nala reakʼ muk ṭhen senkate Ahas sãote ńapamokʼ ben." 
Isaiah7:4 Ar niạ katha ben metaea, ‘Sontor akan ar nirola monan tahenme ar alom botorokʼa. Dhũạkʼkan ona ṭhuṭkutʼ kuṭrạ ńelte, metakʼme Resin, Aramrenko ar Remaliạren hoponakʼ jaljalaokʼkan edre seṅgel ńelte mon do alom lạbṛukʼ ocoytama." 
Isaiah7:5 Aramrenko, Ephrayem ar Remaliạren hopon do niạ menkate am maraome lạgitʼko soṛojontro kana," 
Isaiah7:6 onko do Jihudạ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko calakʼa ar ona dokholkate Tabeyel hopon do onḍenicʼ rajko benaoea. 
Isaiah7:7 Menkhan iń Probhu Isor do noań meneda je, niạ lạṛhại do baṅ hoyokʼa," 
Isaiah7:8 ente Aramren matha Damesek baṅ cetʼ ar Damesekren matha Resin raj baṅe cele kan? Turuigel mõṛẽ bochor bhitrite Ephrayem do nonkae marao utạrokʼa je, jạtrenko lekate uni do ar bae tahena." 
Isaiah7:9 Ephrayimren matha Samariạ baṅ cetʼ kan, ar Samariạren matha Remaliạren hoponge baṅe celekan? Apeakʼ pạtiạure ṭehãḍ akanpe tahen khan ape do oka lekate hõ ohope teṅgo keṭecʼ daṛelena.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Probhu Isor do arhõ Ahase metadea," 
Isaiah7:11 “Am do amren Probhu Isor ṭhen menme jemon uni do mitʼṭecʼ cinhại udukʼam- ar ona cinhạ do patal puri khon serma hạbicʼ jãhãn ṭhạ̃iregeye udukʼam ma.” 
Isaiah7:12 Menkhan Ahase menkeda, “Iń do ona bạń meneda, ar Probhu Isor hõ bạń biḍạuea.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Menkhan Jesaeae menkeda, “Dạud bõsren hoṛko, ańjompe. Manwawakʼ sombhuri biḍạu aṭkar do cetʼ baṅ ḍhera? Ape do cetʼ ińren Isorakʼ sombhuripe biḍạutaea?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do acʼge ape ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ cinhại uduga. Ona do hoyokʼ kana, mitʼṭen kũạri kuṛi doe bhạrti hoṛmokʼa ar uniren do mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại hoyokʼtaea; ar uniyakʼ ńutum do Immanuel dohokʼtaea." 
Isaiah7:15 Oka bạṛicʼakʼ kan ona phesṛao giḍikakʼ ar oka bhageakʼ ona bachao joṅ reakʼ oktere uni do dahe ar dumur rasae joma. Menkhan E Ahas raj, ona reakʼ okteko ạurirege okoeyem botorakin kan unkin banar rajakʼ disạm do ujạṛokʼa." 
Isaiah7:16  
Isaiah7:17 Jihudạ ar Ephrayimakʼ begarokʼ din hilokʼ khon oka tisge baṅ hoyakan, Probhu Isor do am ar amren hoṛko ar amren apatakʼ bõsren hoṛko cetanre ona lekan mitʼṭen okteye ạguiya. Ar unre uni do Ạsurren raje ạguiyea.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do Misor disạm reakʼ sạṅgiń gaḍako khon rõ ar Ạsur disạm khon dumurkoe gol ạgukoa. 
Isaiah7:19 Onko do hecʼkate buru dhasnakore, buru paṛakʼkore, jạnum jhạuạkore ar ṭạnḍikoreko basakʼa." 
Isaiah7:20 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do apeakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ, jaṅga reakʼ upʼ ar gocoko hoyo ocoytape lạgitʼ Phurạt gaḍa hanasa khon mitʼṭecʼ holatʼ, metakʼme Ạsur raje bhaṛa ạguiyea." 
Isaiah7:21 Enhilokʼ jãhãege mitʼṭen gại se barea merome dohokin onko do nunạkʼko toako emokʼa, uni do dahe hõe jom daṛeakʼa. Ar disạmre okoeko tahen onko sanamkoge dahe ar dumur rasako joma." 
Isaiah7:22  
Isaiah7:23 Enhilokʼ okako jaegare gelbar keji rupạ reakʼ dam mitʼ hajar goṭecʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ tahẽkan onḍe do eken jạnum ar rạṅgạinige tahena. 
Isaiah7:24 Ar hoṛko do akʼ sarante onḍeko calakʼa, ente disạm do jạnum ar rạṅgạinite perejokʼa." 
Isaiah7:25 Ar oka burure kuḍiteko casetʼ tahẽkan onḍe do jạnum botorte ar bako calakʼa; ona do ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍiko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah8:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Am do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ cạkti dhirire disạmren hoṛkoakʼ tite olakʼ leka niạ katha olme, Maher-Salal-Has-Bas (Mane do ‘Usạra luṭ reakʼ, ạḍi usạrage recʼ reakʼ’)." 
Isaiah8:2 Iń do naeke Uriạ ar Jeberekiạren hopon Sakariạ do ińren bises gohayicʼ menkateń bahalea.” 
Isaiah8:3 Tayomte ińren bạhu, okoe do maejiu nạbiye tahẽkan, uni sãoteń giticʼ mitʼente uni doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamkedea. Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Uniyakʼ ńutum do Maher-Salal-Has-Bas em dohoytaea." 
Isaiah8:4 Ar uni gidrạ do ‘Gogo’ se ‘Baba’ roṛ ạuriye cedrege Damesek reakʼ dhon durib ar Samariạ reakʼ luṭakʼ jinisko do Ạsur raj hecʼkateye idijoṅa.” 
Isaiah8:5 Probhu Isor do arhõ ińe metadińa," 
Isaiah8:6 “Noko hoṛ do Siloah reakʼ legem ạtukʼ dakʼko nihạ̃tetʼ kana, onko do Resin ar Remaliạren hopon iạteko rạskạkʼ kana." 
Isaiah8:7 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Phurạt gaḍa reakʼ ḍubạ dakʼ leka jotowakʼ ṭhonok salakʼ Ạsurren raj do usạrage onko upạrteye ạguiyea. Ona ḍubạ dakʼ do gaḍa ar nala reakʼ jotowakʼe ạtu idiya," 
Isaiah8:8 ar Jihudạ disạm talateye ạtu idiyte uniyakʼ hoṭokʼ hạbicʼe cape rakapʼ ocoya. E Immnuel, Ạsurren raj do oneye lap lapa akatʼtae phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte amakʼ goṭa disạme umul eseda." 
Isaiah8:9 “E jạtrenko, ape do midokʼpe, menkhan ape dope marao utạrokʼa; E sạṅgiń reakʼ disạmko, ańjompe, ape do lạṛhại lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe, menkhan ape dope marao utạrokʼa; hẽ, lạṛhại lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe, menkhanpe marao utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah8:10 Ape dope goṭaegea, menkhan bape jo bahakʼa; goṭae reakʼ kathape roṛa, menkhan ona do baṅ ṭikạukʼtapea, ente ‘Isor do ale tulucʼ menaea.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:11 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti iń cetanre dohokate iń tulucʼe galmaraokeda. Uni doe sontorkedińa jemon noko hoṛkoakʼ horte aloń taṛam. Uni doe metadińạ," 
Isaiah8:12 “Noko hoṛ okaṭakʼ do soṛojontroko metakʼkan ape do onako okaṭakʼ hõ soṛojontro do alope metakʼa. Ar onko okaṭakʼko botorakʼ ape do ona alope botorokʼa; ar botoranakʼ mente hõ ona do alope hudisa. 
Isaiah8:13 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do sonot mente hudisepe; unige botoraepe; ar unige botoranicʼ mente hudisepe. 
Isaiah8:14 Enḍekhan unige mitʼṭecʼ sonot asrayokʼ ṭhạ̃iye hoyokʼtapea, menkhan Israelkoakʼ banar disạm lạgitʼ do mitʼṭecʼ tạkʼkicʼakʼ dhirigeye hoyokʼa jemon hoṛkoko tohodokʼ. Jerusalemren hoṛko lạgitʼ uni do jhampa ar pạsi lekae hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah8:15 Onko modre ḍherkogeko tohodokʼa. Onko doko tohotʼ bhindạṛokʼa arko rạputʼ gejerokʼa; ar pạsiteko sabokʼa.” 
Isaiah8:16 Am do niạ goha rukhiyại me ar ińren celako talare ona do chapkate dohokakʼme," 
Isaiah8:17 Iń do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akaeyiń tahena, okoe do Jakob bõsrenko secʼ khon mẽtʼãhãe ạcur akatʼtae; iń do uni cetanrege bhorsa akaniń tahena." 
Isaiah8:18 Nokʼõe ńelpe, iń ar onko hoponko okoe do Probhu Isore emakawạdiń. Uni phạdkoren Probhu Isor, okoe do Sion burureye tahẽnkan ale do uniren cinhạkole hoyakana." 
Isaiah8:19 Hoṛko do tinre onko ṭhen calakʼko metapea one okoe do gocʼ hoṛko ar bạṛicʼ jiuko sãote helmelko dohoyetʼ arko biṛ biṛetʼkan, unre ape do cetʼ Isor ṭhen calakʼ lek baṅkantapea? Okoe jiwetʼ menakʼko onkoren hoykate cedakʼ gocʼko sãote sopolha lạgitʼ dope calakʼa?" 
Isaiah8:20 Ape do Isorakʼ hukum ar gohako ṭhen calakʼ hoyokʼtapea. Ar Isorakʼ katha leka onko bako roṛ enḍekhan bujhạu hoyokʼa onko talare marsal do bạnukʼa. 
Isaiah8:21 Onko do reṅgecʼ ar kosṭote disạm talareko ạcur baṛaea. Reṅgecʼ jalate coṭ secʼ beṅgetʼkate raj ar onkoren Isorko sarapaea. 
Isaiah8:22 Ona tayom onko do ot secʼ beṅgetʼkate eken duk kosṭo ar ńutko ńela. Ar botoranakʼ ńutre onko doko sạṅgiń ocokʼa. 
Isaiah9:1 Menkhan lahate okoe do gạr ar muhinreko tahẽkan onko do ńutre ar bako tahena. Lahateakʼ dinkore Isor do Sebulon ar Napthali ṭoṭhae copotʼ ocoleda, menkhan tayom daram dinkore jalapuri aṛeteakʼ hor khon ehopʼkate Jordan gaḍa purub aṛe reakʼ ṭoṭha boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ Gạlil hạbicʼe manot ocoya." 
Isaiah9:2 Okoeko hoṛ do ńutreko tahenkan onko do maraṅ marsalko ńela; ar okoe kaṛaṅ ńut reakʼ umulreko duṛupʼ akan onko do marsal bamberakoa. 
Isaiah9:3 Am do onko jạtrenkom ḍherkoa ar onkoakʼ rạskạm maraṅtakoa; phosol ir jokhecʼ cetʼ leka hoṛko rạskạkʼ, luṭakʼ jinis hạṭiń oktere cetʼ leka rạskạ hecʼako, onkage onko do am samaṅreko rạskạkʼa," 
Isaiah9:4 Midiạnakʼ bhagaokʼ dinre okam cekaletʼ, onkage am dom rạputʼ kaca kucạya ona hamal arãṛ do, one okako gokʼ akatʼ, ar ona ṭheṅgage, one oka doe daletʼko, ar onko jạtrenkoge, okoe do onkoko santaoetʼko." 
Isaiah9:5 Lạṛhại lạgitʼko hạjukʼkan mitʼke mitʼ lạṛhại birkoakʼ panahe, ar mãyãmte lohotʼ akan mitʼke mitʼ kicricʼ do seṅgelre atar ocokʼa." 
Isaiah9:6 Noa jotowakʼ do hoyokʼa, ente abo lạgitʼ mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại janamokʼa, mitʼṭen hopon do abo lạgitʼe emocokʼa. Mạliki do uniyakʼ tarenrege tahena, ar uni ńutum do hoyokʼa hahaṛa sosolhayicʼ, daṛeanicʼ Isor, jaejugren apat, ar sulukren raj." 
Isaiah9:7 Uniyakʼ mạliki reakʼ baḍhaokʼ ar suluk do baṅ cabakʼa. Uni do Dạudakʼ siṅghạson ar uniyakʼ rajosṭi cetanreye rajokʼa; uni do un okte khon jaejug hạbicʼ hok reakʼ bicạr ar dhoromte onae bandhaoa are ṭarhao utạra. Phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ ãṭge noae hoeocoya. 
Isaiah9:8 Jakob upạrte Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ sombate kol akada; ona do Israel cetanrege hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah9:9 Ephrayim ar Samariạren sanam hoṛ do onako baḍae daṛeakʼa. Onko do bạḍại ar gorbo iạteko mena," 
Isaiah9:10 “Iṭạko do lạnduṛ akana, menkhan ale do arhõ mońte getʼakʼ dhirikotele benao rakaba; joto loa dare do makʼ giḍi akana, menkhan ale do ona bodolte debdạru darekole rohoea.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Menkhan Probhu Isor do Resin upạrte uniren bạirikoe daṛe ocoakatʼkoa ar uni upạrte onkoe edre ocoakatʼkoa. 
Isaiah9:12 Aramrenko do purub secʼ khon ar Philisṭiko do pạchim secʼ khon moca cahapʼkateko utʼ gotʼkaea. Niạko hoylenre hõ uniyakʼ edre do baṅ thirokʼtaea. Ńit hõ uniyakʼ ti do tul akaege menakʼtaea. 
Isaiah9:13 Menkhan okoe onkoe hạn akatʼko uni ṭhen hoṛko do bako ruạṛ hecʼlena, ar phạdren Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka hõ bako calaolena." 
Isaiah9:14 Onatege Probhu Isor do Israelakʼ khijur ḍạr ar chuchi ṭheṅga, metakʼme bohokʼ ar canḍbol do mitʼ dinregeye samakʼ topaga." 
Isaiah9:15 Ona bohokʼ do kana murubbiko ar manotan hoṛkoge, ar canḍbol do eṛe sikhạuna emokʼ nạbiko." 
Isaiah9:16 Okoe onko jạtrenko horko udukʼako onko do bhul horteko idikoa; ar onko pańjakanko do bako bujhạu daṛeakʼa okateko calakʼ kana mente. 
Isaiah9:17 Onatege Probhu Isor do juạnko hotete bae rạskạkʼ kana, ṭũạr ar rạnḍi maejiuko hõ bae dayawako kana; ente sanamkoge Isor do bako botorae kana arko kharap caba akana, jotoge bạṛicʼ bạṛicʼ kathako roṛeda. Ar niạko hoylenre hõ uniyakʼ edre do baṅ thirokʼtaea; ar ńitokʼ hõ uniyakʼ ti do tulge menakʼtaea." 
Isaiah9:18 Sạrige dusṭạmi do seṅgel leka jolokʼ kana, ona do jạnum ar rạṅgạinikoe atar giḍikakʼa. Ona do bir gajaṛkoe jeretʼeda ar onate dhũạ do cetante tutʼ tutʼ gurlạu rakabokʼa." 
Isaiah9:19 Phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ edrete disạm do jarkharokʼa, ar hoṛko do seṅgel lạgitʼ sahan lekako hoyokʼa. Celege acʼren boeha hõ bae dayawaea." 
Isaiah9:20 Onko do leṅgati secʼko losagre hõ reṅgecʼkoa ar jojomti secʼko tạhuṛre hõ bako tirpitokʼa. Sesre onko do apnarren hoṛkoakʼ jelgeko joma. 
Isaiah9:21 Manase do Ephrayimakʼ ar Ephrayim do Manaseakʼ jelko joma, onko do mitʼ sãote Jihudạ upạrteko teṅgona. Ar noako hoylenre hõ uniyakʼ edre do baṅ thirokʼtaea; ar ńit hõ uniyakʼ ti do tulge menakʼa." 
Isaiah10:1 Hae onko hoṛ do, okoe do behok reakʼ ạn oḍok kate ar eṛe dolil benaokate reṅgecʼ hoṛko akoakʼ ạidạri khonko ocokʼetʼko ar ińren santao ocokʼkan hoṛko hok reakʼ bicạr khonko tạkicʼetʼko, ar rạnḍi maejiu ar ṭũạrkoakʼ jinisko luṭetʼtako." 
Isaiah10:2  
Isaiah10:3 Sạjạiyokʼ dinre tinre sạṅgiń khon jarkharakʼ hijukʼa unre ape do cetʼpe cekaea? Goṛo ńam lạgitʼ okoe ṭhenpe ńir calakʼa? Apeakʼ dhon durib do okoe ṭhenpe doho oṭokakʼa? 
Isaiah10:4 Ape do bondiko talarepe tahena se gocʼkoren gatepe hoyokʼa; unre ape do cetʼge bape ceka daṛeakʼa. Ar niạko hoylenre hõ uniyakʼ edre do baṅ thirokʼtaea; ńit hõ uniyakʼ ti do tulge menakʼtaea. 
Isaiah10:5 Hae, Ạsur do, ińakʼ khĩs reakʼ ṭheṅga! Uniyakʼ tirege menakʼa ińakʼ edre reakʼ mutạk do." 
Isaiah10:6 Uni do Isor baṅ botorae kan mitʼ jạtrenko upạrteń kolekana ar okoe ińko khĩs ocoakadiń onko upạrteń kolekana jemon uni do luṭ are recʼko ar hor reakʼ losotʼ lekae lebetʼ gańjao daṛeako. 
Isaiah10:7 Menkhan Ạsurrenkoakʼ monsubạ onka do baṅa, uniyakʼ goṭawakʼ do eṭakʼ leka; uniyakʼ monsubạ do marao giḍikakʼ ar ḍher jạtrenko ses utạrko." 
Isaiah10:8 Uni doe meneda, “Ińren senaputiko do cetʼ jotoge raj leka doko baṅkana?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalnowakʼ dosa do cetʼ Karkemis leka do baṅkana? Ar Hamat do cetʼ Arpad leka baṅkana? Samariạ do cetʼ Damesek leka do baṅkana? 
Isaiah10:10 Onko boṅga murhutʼkote perecʼ rajosṭiko do ińakʼ tirege paṛao akana; onkoren murhutʼko do Jerusalem ar Samariạren murhutʼ khon ḍherko bhagegea. 
Isaiah10:11 Samariạ ar onaren boṅga murhutʼko cetanre okań ceka akatʼ Jerusalem ar uniren murhutʼko cetanre hõ onkageń kạmiya.” 
Isaiah10:12 Probhu Isor do Sion buru ar Jerusalem upạrte acʼakʼ sanam kạmi sạtkateye mena, “Ạsurren rajakʼ bạḍại ontor ar uniyakʼ gorbote perecʼ beṅgetʼ doń sạjạiyea," 
Isaiah10:13 ente uni doe mena, ‘ińakʼ ti reakʼ daṛe ar ạkilte noań kạmi akada, ente bud menakʼtińạ. Jạtrenkoakʼ simạ doń sạṅgiń akada, onkoakʼ dhon durib iń luṭ akatʼtakoa; ar daṛean bir leka onkoren rajiń dobnao akatʼkoa." 
Isaiah10:14 Jãhãege cetʼleka tukại tiyog onkage iń hõ jạtrenkoakʼ dhon durib iń hatao akatʼtakoa. Ar hoṛko cetʼ leka beleko halaṅ jarwae onkage iń do dhạrti reakʼ sanam disạmiń hạr samṭao akada. Phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do okoehõ bako phada phuduyeda ar okoehõ bako cahapʼeda ar bako cero beroyeda.’ ” 
Isaiah10:15 Ṭeṅgocʼ do cetʼ mamakʼicʼ cetanreye rakapʼ kana se korat do cetʼ kaṭ mistiri samaṅreye bạḍại daṛeakʼa? Ona do baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa. Ṭheṅga do ekʼpelicʼ bae ghiriạ daṛeaea ar ladhna hõ ladhna sasapʼicʼ do bae epel daṛeaea. 
Isaiah10:16 Ona iạte phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Ạsurren daṛean lạṛhại birko cetanre mitʼṭecʼ rohoṛokʼ ruại kola; ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok latarre do lepʼ leka seṅgel jol ocokʼa. 
Isaiah10:17 Israel reakʼ marsal do hoyokʼa seṅgel leka; onkoren sonotko doko hoyokʼa mitʼṭecʼ seṅgel lepʼ leka. Ar ona seṅgel do mitʼ dinre ona reakʼ joto jạnum ar rạṅgạinikoe atar giḍiya. 
Isaiah10:18 Mitʼṭen rugi hoṛ cetʼlekae rohoṛ idikʼkan, onkage ona seṅgel do Ạsur reakʼ sanam bir ar batao akatʼ khetko purạteye marao giḍiya." 
Isaiah10:19 Uniyakʼ bir reakʼ sarecʼ dareko do lekharege nunạkʼ komaokʼa je, mitʼṭen huḍiń gidrạ hõ lekhakate onae ol daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah10:20 Enhilokʼ Israelren jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko, metakʼme Jakobakʼ bõsren sarecʼ hoṛ do akoren hạhạnko cetanre ar bako bhorsakʼa, menkhan Probhu Isor cetanre, Israelren uni sonoticʼ cetanre sạrigeko bhorsakʼa." 
Isaiah10:21 Ar sarecʼ tahen hoṛ doko ruạṛ hijukʼa; Jakobren sarecʼ hoṛko do daṛean Isor ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Isaiah10:22 E Israel, amren hoṛkoakʼ lekha do jalapuri reakʼ gitil unạkʼlenre hõ enhõ thoṛa hoṛgeko ruạṛ hijukʼa. Israelko lạgitʼ maraokʼ do ṭhik doho akana ar hok reakʼ sạjại do onkore paṛaokʼgea." 
Isaiah10:23 Goṭa disạm cetanre oka ḍahao maraokʼ ṭhik dohoakan ona lekage phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe kạmiya. 
Isaiah10:24 Ona iạte phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E ińren hoṛko, okoe do Sionrepe tahenkan, ape do Ạsurren hoṛko Misor disạmrenko leka ṭheṅgateko dalpe ar ape upạrte mutạkko tulrehõ alope botorakoa." 
Isaiah10:25 Ape cetanre ińakʼ edre do usạratege cabakʼa, ar ona do Ạsurrenkoe maraokoa.”" 
Isaiah10:26 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Oreb burure Midiạnrenkoe hạnko jokhecʼ cetʼlekae cekaletʼ onkage uni do cạbukkote Ạsurrene dalkoa. Ar Misorre cetʼe cekaletʼ onkage uni do dakʼ cetanre acʼakʼ ṭheṅgae tultaea. 
Isaiah10:27 Enhilokʼ onkoakʼ bojha ar arãṛ do apeakʼ taren khon ocogokʼa; arpe moṭa akante ona arãṛ do rạpudokʼtakoa. 
Isaiah10:28 Onko do Aieteko bolo akana, Migronko parom akada; onko do Mikmasre akoakʼ jiniskoko doho oṭoakada." 
Isaiah10:29 Onko do buru sinit (giripoth) paromkateko hecʼakana, “Abo do Geba ṭhen ḍerakate bon tahẽ aṅgakʼa.” Onate Rama do thar tharaokʼ kana, Sạulakʼ Geba khon hoṛko doko ńir joṅkana." 
Isaiah10:30 E Gonemeren hoṛko, ape do kikiạupe. E Laesaren hoṛko, ape do luturakʼpe. E Anathot!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmenaren hoṛ doko ńir joṅkana; Gebinren hoṛ doko okokʼ kana. 
Isaiah10:32 Teheń Ạsurrenko do Nobre senkateko thirokʼa; onko do Sion kuṛiyakʼ buru secʼ, metakʼme Jerusalem buru secʼ muṭko epel akatʼtakoa." 
Isaiah10:33 Ńelme, phạdkoren Probhu Isor do maraṅ daṛete ḍạrkoe rạputʼ giḍiya. Ar usul usul dareko do makʼ giḍikʼa; ar onako do otre bhindạṛokʼa." 
Isaiah10:34 Uni do ṭeṅgocʼte bir reakʼ gajaṛkoe maga, ar daṛean mitʼṭen hotete Lebanon reakʼ dareko hõe marao utạra." 
Isaiah11:1 Jesaeakʼ gonḍa khon mitʼṭecʼ nãwã kahle do oḍokokʼa; ar rehetʼ reakʼ ona kahlre do jo bahakʼa. 
Isaiah11:2 Ar Probhu Isorren Jiu do uni cetanreye tahena, uni do ạkil ar bujren jiu, solha ar jor reakʼ jiu, bud ar Probhu Isor botorae reakʼ jiuge." 
Isaiah11:3 Uniyakʼ rạskạ do Probhu Isor botoraege. Uni do mẽtʼte okae ńel ona leka do bae bicạra, se luturte okae ańjom ona leka hõ bae phanḍaoa;" 
Isaiah11:4 Menkhan reṅgecʼko do hok reakʼe bicạr takoa, ar dhạrtiren mạ̃hirkoakʼ do dhorom seletʼe phanḍaotakoa. Uni do acʼakʼ moca ṭheṅgate dhạrtirenkoe ńẽtʼkoa, ar bạṛicʼ hoṛko do acʼakʼ sãhetʼteye gocʼkoa." 
Isaiah11:5 Dhorom do uniyakʼ ḍanḍa reakʼ totolakʼ hoyokʼtaea ar pạtiạrtetʼ do uniyakʼ totolakʼ pạṭkạge. 
Isaiah11:6 Hunḍạr do bhiḍi hopon tulucʼe basakʼa, poṭea tạrupʼ do merom hopon tulucʼe burumokʼa; mĩhũ, dhạcri kul ar moṭasoṭa bạchur do mitʼ ṭhenko tahena, ar mitʼṭen huḍiń gidrạ do onkoe gupikoa." 
Isaiah11:7 Gại ar bana do mitʼ sãotekin ạtińa, unkinren hoponko do mitʼteko burumkokʼa; ar dhạcri kul do ḍaṅgra leka busupʼe joma." 
Isaiah11:8 Kạrinạṅgin reakʼ bhugạkʼ ṭhen nunu gidrạ doe enecʼa, ar nunu bạgi gidrạ do ayaṅ bińakʼ bhugạkʼko soga." 
Isaiah11:9 Ińakʼ sonot buru reakʼ jãhãn jaegare okoehõ bako hạhạna, ar bako nonosṭoa, ente jalapuri cetʼleka dakʼte perecʼge tahen onkage Probhu Isorakʼ ạkilte dhạrti hõ perecʼge tahena." 
Isaiah11:10 Enhilokʼ Jesaea reakʼ kahle do sanam jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhạnḍi lekae teṅgona; ar sanam jạtrenko do uni ṭhenko jarwakʼa ar uniyakʼ ṭhạ̃i do ṭhonokanakʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Isaiah11:11 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do acʼren sarecʼ jiwetʼ hoṛko Ạsur khon, Misor khon, Pathros khon, Kus khon, Elam khon, Babel khon, Hamath ar jalapuri ḍhip reakʼ disạm khon bańcaoko lạgitʼ dosar dhao tiye tiyạrtaea." 
Isaiah11:12 Uni do jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhạnḍiye rakaba ar bidesre bondi akan Israelkoe jarwakoa; ar Jihudạren chirchạtur akan hoṛko pirthimi reakʼ beṛhae khone jarwakoa. 
Isaiah11:13 Ephrayim reakʼ hiskạ do sạṅgińokʼtakoa ar Jihudạrenko do bạiri mente bako tahena. Ephrayim do Jihudạ cetanre bae hiskạkʼa, Jihudạ hõ Ephrayim sãote bae bạirikʼa." 
Isaiah11:14 Unkin do pạchim secʼ khon Philisṭikoakʼ disạm reakʼ daṛaṅ jaegare hatkin lagaoa, ar mitʼ sãote purub secʼakʼ disạmkin luṭa. Unkin do Edom ar Moabkin dokhol joṅa ar Amonrenko do unkin gobolrenko hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah11:15 Probhu Isor do jalapuri reakʼ locoṅe marao utạra; uni do lolo hoete phurạt gaḍa cetanre acʼakʼ daṛeye uduga. Uni do onae hạṭińa ar eae goṭecʼ nalae benaoa, jemon hoṛko do panahe horokʼkateko parom daṛeakʼ." 
Isaiah11:16 Misor khon oḍok hijukʼ jokhecʼ cetʼleka Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼe horletʼ onkage uniren jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko lạgitʼ Ạsur khon mitʼṭecʼ raj ḍahar do oḍokokʼa. 
Isaiah12:1 Enhilokʼ am dom mena, “E Probhu Isor, iń do amiń sarhaomea, ente iń cetanre edrem sodorleda; menkhan ńitokʼ amakʼ edre do caba akana ar jiwi raṛecʼem emạń kana." 
Isaiah12:2 Sạriyakʼren, Isorge ińren babańcaoicʼ do; iń do uniregeń bhorsakʼkana, ar bạń botorokʼa. Probhu Isorge, ińakʼ daṛe ar ińakʼ sereń; ińren babańcaoicʼ doe uni kangea.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ona iạte ape do hulạsate bańcao reakʼ kũń khon dakʼpe loya. 
Isaiah12:4 Ape do enhilokʼpe mena, “Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ar uniyakʼ gun reakʼ katha lại pasnaope; uni okae ceka akatʼ ona do sanam jạtrenko baḍae ocokope ar lại pasnaope, uni doe maraṅ utạricʼ kana." 
Isaiah12:5 Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe, ente uni do ṭhonok reakʼe kạmi akada; ar goṭa dhạrtire niạ katha do baḍae ocoype." 
Isaiah12:6 E Sionren hoṛko, ape do andoṛpe ar rạskạte sereńpe, ente Israelren uni sonoticʼ do maraṅgeae ape talare.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Amosren hopon Jesaea do Babel reaṅ dorsone ńamleda. 
Isaiah13:1 Amosren hopon Jesaea do Babel reaṅ dorsone ńamleda. 
Isaiah13:2 Probhui Isore meneda, “Ape do poṭor buru cetanre mitʼṭecʼ jhạnḍi rakabtape; ar ãṭ aṛaṅte lạṛhại birko hohoakope ar asol asol hoṛko phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ lạgitʼ tite gạwicʼakope." 
Isaiah13:3 Iń ńutumte begar akan hoṛkoń hukum akatʼkoa; ińakʼ edre dul giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ ińren lạṛhại birkoń hohoakatʼkoa. Ińakʼ mạhima sodor akante onko do rạskạteko gorbokʼ kana.” 
Isaiah13:4 Ańjompe, buru boṭkocʼ cetanre ḍher hoṛkoakʼ sabadge ańjomokʼ kana. Ańjompe, sanam jạtren ar rajosṭiren hoṛ do jarwa mitʼkateko gulmaletʼkana. Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do lạṛhại lạgitʼ phạdkoe sajaoetʼkoa." 
Isaiah13:5 Onko do sạṅgiń disạm khonko hijukʼ kana, onko do pirthimi reakʼ ses simạna khonko rakapʼ hijukʼ kana; Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ edre reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍawante goṭa pirthimi marao lạgitʼe hijukʼ kana." 
Isaiah13:6 Ape do ãṭ aṛaṅte ragpe, ente Probhu Isorakʼ din do sorakana; enhilokʼ phạdkoren ṭhen khon do ḍahao maraoakʼ hijukʼa." 
Isaiah13:7 Ona iạte hoṛkoakʼ ti do lạbṛugokʼa ar sanam hoṛ do dilko adtakoa. 
Isaiah13:8 Onko do ạḍi bebạṛicʼko botorokʼa, ar ạḍi ãṭ hasokoa, gidrạ janamede kan maejiu leka bedonteko thakao cabakʼa, onko do cahapʼkate apan apin secʼko beṅgetʼjoṅa ar mẽtʼãhã do jaljalaokʼtakoa." 
Isaiah13:9 Ńelpe, Probhu Isorakʼ din do hijukʼ kana. Ona do kurmutạha, kurkurạukʼ ar jaljalaokʼkan edreante hijukʼ kana; pirthimi ar onaren kại hoṛko cabako lạgitʼge hijukʼ kana." 
Isaiah13:10 Unre sermaren ipilko do marsal bako emokʼa; siń candoe rakabokʼ okterehõ ńutge tahena ar ńindạ cando hõ bae terdeja. 
Isaiah13:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Bạṛicʼakʼko iạte iń do pirthimiń sạjạiyea; ar bạṛicʼkoakʼ behokakʼ iạte onkoń sạjạikoa. Iń do phulạkʼ kankoakʼ bạḍạiyiń cabaetakoa ar kurmutạhakoakʼ gorbo doń rạpudtakoa." 
Isaiah13:12 Unre hoṛko do khạṭi sona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiń mahrog ocokoa ar manwa do ophir sona khon hõ bạ̃ṛtige. 
Isaiah13:13 Ona iạte iń do sermań daldalao ocoya; ar phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ kurkurạukʼte uniyakʼ jaljalaokʼkan edre dinre pirthimi do ḍikạ ḍakekʼa. 
Isaiah13:14 “Lagayede kan selepʼ jel leka, gupi begor bhiḍi leka mimitʼko do akoren hoṛ ṭhenko ruạṛ calakʼa, mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do akoakʼ disạmteko dạṛa." 
Isaiah13:15 Ar okoeko ńamokʼ onko do khanḍateko ghạl ocokʼa; ar okoeko sapʼ ocokʼ onko do tarwaṛeteko gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Isaiah13:16 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege gidrạkoko tawakʼ gocʼkoa; onkoakʼ oṛakʼ duạrko luṭtakoa ar maejiuko nosṭokoa. 
Isaiah13:17 “Ńelpe, onko upạrte iń do Mediren hoṛkoń buskukoa. Onko do rupạ secʼ hõ bako beṅgeda ar sona iạte hõ bako rạskạkʼa." 
Isaiah13:18 Onko do akʼte juạnkoko gocʼkoa; ar bale gidrạko cetanre bako mãyãkʼa ar gidrạko cetanre hõ bako dayakʼa. 
Isaiah13:19 Sanam rajosṭiko reakʼ ṭhonok Babel ar Kạldikoakʼ gorbo Isor do Sodom ar Gomora lekae dhaṅdhaser ocoya. 
Isaiah13:20 Onare do ar tishõ bako tahena se piṛhike piṛhi celege onḍe do bako girobasokʼa. Arobrenko hõ onḍe do tạmbu bako ṭaṅgaoa, jãhãe gukʼpiko hõ onḍe akoren palko bako aḍakoa." 
Isaiah13:21 Menkhan bir janwarkoge onḍe doko mạnḍiạukʼa, onḍenakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko do bir dundukote perejokʼa, ũṭ cẽṛẽko onḍeko tahena ar bir merom boda doko don baṛaea." 
Isaiah13:22 Onḍenakʼ buruńjre do toyoko raga ar khĩkṛĩ do gaṛreko tahena. Babel reakʼ okte do hecʼakana onako reakʼ din do ar baṅ ḍher ocowakʼa.” 
Isaiah14:1 Probhu Isor do Jakobe mãyãwaea; uni do arhõ Israele bachaoea ar onkoakʼ disạmreye duṛubea. Bidisiạ hoṛko do onko sãoteko seledokʼa ar onko do Jakobakʼ bõsrenko tulucʼko midokʼa. 
Isaiah14:2 Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko do akoakʼ disạmteko idi seṭerkoa. Probhu Isorakʼ disạmre eṭakʼ jạtrenko do Israelren guti kạ̃ṛmĩko hoyokʼa. Ar okoe do Israelko bondiletʼko ńitokʼ onko do akogeko bondi ocokʼa ar Israelko do akoren sasantaoko cetanre mạlikiko calaoa. 
Isaiah14:3 E Israel, oka hilokʼ Probhu Isor do amakʼ harkhet saset khon, amakʼ jala, hamal kạmi ar golam khone rukhiyạmea enhilokʼ am do Babelren raj upạrte nonkage ṭiṭkạri katham roṛa, “Ńelpe, sasantaoicʼ do cetʼlekae cabayena! Uniyakʼ sasantao edre do mucạtʼentaea." 
Isaiah14:4  
Isaiah14:5 Probhu Isor do bedhoromkoakʼ ṭheṅgae rạputʼakada. Ar mạliki cakʼlaoko reakʼ mutạk hõ. 
Isaiah14:6 Uni do kurkurạukʼ edrete jạt jạtrenkoe ńẽtʼetʼko tahẽkana, one baṅ thirokʼ ńẽtʼkotege. Uni do edrekate jạt jạtrenko cetanre mạlikiye calaoetʼ tahẽkana, ar santaokateye domonetʼko tahẽkana." 
Isaiah14:7 Ar ṅitokʼ do goṭa dhạrti jirạu ar nirại akana; ar onatege rạskạteko sereńeda. 
Isaiah14:8 Saro dareko ar Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dareko hõ rạskạ salakʼ Babelren rajko metaekana, ‘am dom copotʼena, ar bhagege hoyakana; cele mamakʼko hõ ale ṭhen do ar bako hijukʼa’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Sheoltem calakʼkante Sheolren hoṛko do am tulucʼ ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ ạḍiko asbasao caba akana. Onate gocʼkoren jiu do am daram idime lạgitʼko beretʼ akana. Okoe niạ dhạrtiren mukhiyạko tahẽkan onko jotogeko beredokʼ kana; ar okoe do jạtrenko cetanre rapajko tahẽkan onko sanamkoge siṅghạson khonko beredokʼ kana. 
Isaiah14:10 Ar sanamkoge hohoateko metama, ‘Am hõ ale lekagem nijor akana; ar ale somanem hoyena.’" 
Isaiah14:11 “Amakʼ sanam ṭhonok do Sheolte giḍi ocoakana; ona sãote amakʼ binạ banamko reakʼ saḍe hõ giḍi akana. Am latarre do tejoko menakʼkoa onko do amko thoprom esetʼ akatʼmea. 
Isaiah14:12 E bhurkạkʼ ipil, aṅga marsalokʼren hopon, am do serma khonem ńur akana. Am do jạtrenkom bhagao akatʼkoa, ar ńitokʼ do dhạrtitem giḍi ocoakana." 
Isaiah14:13 Am do mone monetem meneda, ‘ińge sermateń rakapʼa, Isorren ipilko cetanre ińakʼ siṅghạson iń rakabtińạ; okare debotako jarwa midokʼ ona utạr senakʼ buru coṭre siṅghạsonreń duṛupʼa." 
Isaiah14:14 Iń do rimil reakʼ muthni cetanreń dejokʼa; ar maraṅ Isor soman iń hoyokʼa.’ 
Isaiah14:15 Menkhan am do patal puritem pheḍ ocoakana, hẽ, ona khạndṛuṅ utạrakʼ jaegatem pheḍ ocoakana." 
Isaiah14:16 Okoe amko beṅgetʼam onko do am secʼ koyokʼ akaeko tahena. Ar amakʼ dosa ńelteko mena, ‘okoe do pirthimiye ḍikạ ḍakeyetʼ tahẽkan ar rajosṭikoe dalmalaoetʼ tahẽkan nui do cetʼ uni hoṛ doe baṅkana?" 
Isaiah14:17 Nuige cetʼ, prithimi doe hahaṅkar barag ocoletʼa, ar nagrahakoe dhaṅdhaseletʼ tahẽkana, ar bondiko oṛakʼte bae ruạṛ ocoako kan tahẽkana?’" 
Isaiah14:18 “Jạt jạtren sanam rapajko do ṭhonokreko giticʼakana, onkoakʼ apan ạpin topare." 
Isaiah14:19 Menkhan am do giḍi akatʼ dare ḍạr leka topa khon bahretem giḍi ocoakana. Ar tarwaṛeteko gocʼakan okoe do patal puri reakʼ khạndṛuṅ utạrakʼ jaegateko kol ocoakan onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩtem ten ocoakana. Am do jaṅgate lebetʼ gańjao akatʼ mạ̃ṛĩ lekam hoyakana. 
Isaiah14:20 Am do eṭakʼ rapajko leka do bam topa ocokʼa, ente amakʼ disạm dom jarkhar akada ar amren hoṛkom khũn akatʼkoa. Bạṛicʼ bõsrenkoakʼ katha do artis hõ baṅ ńumogokʼa." 
Isaiah14:21 Onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ kại iạte onkoren hoponko gocʼko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaega ṭhik dohoyme. Onko do disạm ạidạri lạgitʼ bako beretʼa; ar prithimi do akoakʼ nagrahakote bako pereja.” 
Isaiah14:22 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do onko upạrteń teṅgona; Babel reakʼ ńutum ar onare jiwetʼ menakʼko hoṛ ar onko bõsren doń caba utạrkoa." 
Isaiah14:23 Ona do jhĩkko reakʼ ạidạri ar dakʼ ghaḍlakʼkoń hoeocoya. Ar mohor meṭao reakʼ jonokʼte ona doń jokʼ saphaea. Phạdkoren Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda.” 
Isaiah14:24 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do kiriạkateye meneda, “Sạrige, iń oka lekań ṭhik dohoakatʼ onkage hoyokʼa, ona do teṅgo tahena." 
Isaiah14:25 Ińakʼ disạm talare Ạsurren raj doń rạputʼ gejerea ar ińakʼ buru cetanreń lebetʼ gasmanḍaoea. Unre ińren hoṛko ṭhen khon uniyakʼ arãṛ do sạṅgińokʼa ar onkoakʼ taren khon bojha hõ ocogokʼa.” 
Isaiah14:26 Goṭa dhạrti lạgitʼ niạ bebosta do ṭhik dohoakana ar sanam jạtrenko cetanre niạ tige tiạr dohoakana. 
Isaiah14:27 Phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noako doe ṭhik dohoakada, onate okoe ona doe mạutạ daṛekea? Uniyakʼ ti do tiạr akan menakʼtaea, ar okoe ona doe lạbṛukʼ daṛeketaea?" 
Isaiah14:28 Oka bochor Ahas raje gocʼen ona bochorge Jesaea do niạ nạbi kathae ńamleda. 
Isaiah14:29 E Philisṭiko, apeye ńẽtʼetʼpe tahẽkan ṭheṅga do rạputʼ akante alope rạskạkʼa. Ente bińakʼ bõs khonge ayaṅ bińe hijukʼa, ar uni biń khon do uḍạukʼicʼ bińgeye oḍok hijukʼa." 
Isaiah14:30 Joto khon reṅgejokʼko do jomakʼko ńama ar nacarko do nirạiteko giticʼa. Menkhan amakʼ rehetʼ do akalteń marao giḍiya, onate amren sarecʼ jiwetʼ hoṛ doko gujukʼa." 
Isaiah14:31 E phaṭok duạr, homor halaṅ joṅme. E nagraha, rakʼ joṅme. E Philisṭiko, ape do sanamakʼpe juriyeda. Utạr secʼ khon dhũạ reakʼ rimil do hijukʼ kana, ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko khon celehõ bako pạcokʼ kana." 
Isaiah14:32 Boṅgan hoṛ jạtren goḍetko do cetʼ roṛ ruạṛ emakoa? Onko do noage metakoa, “Probhu Isor do Sione bạisạu akada ar onare santaokʼkan uniren hoṛ do asrayko ńama.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Moab babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nonka kana: Moab reakʼ Ar ńutumanakʼ nagraha ar Kir nagraha do mitʼ ńindạtege jarkharena. 
Isaiah15:2 Moabren hoṛko do rakʼjoṅ lạgitʼ Dibonakʼ mundilre ar than boṭkocʼkoreko rakapʼ akana. Onko do Nebo ar Medeba ńutumteko homor halaṅeda. Onko do jotoge bohokʼko hoyo munḍrạ akana ar goco hõko kaṭopʼ akatʼtakoa. 
Isaiah15:3 Ar kulhikore gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ baṛayeda. Onko sanamkoge chat cetanre ar nagraha reakʼ dobạṭiạkoreko jare jarekʼkana. Ar ạḍitetʼko rakʼeda. 
Isaiah15:4 Hesbon ar Eleale dokin rakʼeda; unkinakʼ aṛaṅ do Jahas hạbicʼ ańjom calakʼ kana. Ona iạte Moabren lạṛhại phạdko hõko rakʼeda ar onkoakʼ ontor do botorte thar tharaokʼ kantakoa. 
Isaiah15:5 Moab lạgitʼ ińakʼ ontor doe rakʼeda; uniren hoṛko do Soar secʼ Eglath-selesia hạbicʼko dạṛetʼ kana. Onko do rakʼ rakʼte Luhit buru reakʼ horteko rakapʼ calakʼkana; onkoakʼ ṭhạ̃i do dhaṅdhaser akantakote rakʼ homorate Horonạiyim reakʼ horteko calakʼ kana. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim reakʼ sanam dakʼ do nosṭo ocoakana ar ghãs hõ rohoṛ kạrcupʼ akana; dareko hõ bạnukʼa, legecʼ hạṛiạṛ mente ar cetʼge sarecʼ do bạnukʼa." 
Isaiah15:7 Ona iạte onkoakʼ arjawakʼ dhon do sũṛũkucʼ soḍokʼ hanasa hạbicʼko gokʼ idiyeda. 
Isaiah15:8 Moab simạ reakʼ beṛhaete onkoakʼ rakʼ do ańjomokʼ kana; Eglayim ar Ber-Elim hạbicʼ onkoakʼ rakʼ do seṭer akana. 
Isaiah15:9 Dimon reakʼ dakʼko do mãyãmte perecʼ akana, enhõ iń do ona cetanre arhõ dukiń ạguiya; Moab khonko dạṛ akatʼ hoṛko cetanre ar okoe do disạmre jiwetʼko tahen onko cetanre dhạcri kulkoń ạgukoa." 
Isaiah16:1 E Moabrenko, ape do hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ Sela ar Sion buru disạmren disạm cakʼlaoko ṭhen dan sandes lekate bheḍa hoponko kolkope." 
Isaiah16:2 Cẽṛẽ do tukạ khon oḍok kate cetʼleka hantenateye uḍạu baṛae onkage Moabren hoṛko do Arnon gaḍa taṛam paromokʼ jaega ṭhenko ạcur baṛaea. 
Isaiah16:3 Onko doko mena, “Solha emalepe; ar lạiyalepe cetʼle cekaea. Ape do tikin reakʼ umul do ńindạ reakʼ ńut leka hoeocoype- ar okoeko dạṛetʼkan onko do okore dohokakope, ar rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ asray lạgitʼko khojkan hoṛ do alope soprotkoa." 
Isaiah16:4 Moabren dạdạṛkan hoṛko do ape sãote tahẽ ocoakope; ar jarkharkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạkope.” Jihudạren sasantaoko doko marao utạrokʼa; onkoakʼ jarkharokʼ reakʼ kạmi do thirokʼtakoa. Disạmre sasantaoko do ar bako ńelokʼa. 
Isaiah16:5 Asambheṛ dulạṛte Dạudakʼ raj oṛakʼre mitʼṭecʼ siṅghạson do beredokʼa; mitʼṭen pạtiạrạnicʼ hoṛ do onareye duṛupʼa. Uni do dhoromteye bicạra ar usạrage dhorom kạmiye purạua. 
Isaiah16:6 Ale do Moabakʼ bạḍại reakʼ kathale ańjom akada; uni do ạḍitetʼ bạḍại menakʼtaea. Uniyakʼ gorbo reakʼ katha, ar acʼ apnarte maraṅokʼ reakʼ katha ar sanam lekan bạḍại reakʼ kathale ańjomakada, menkhan joto bạḍại do ạuṛiyakʼgetaea." 
Isaiah16:7 Onatege Moabrenko do akoakʼ disạm lạgitʼ mitʼ domte ãṭ aṛaṅteko rakʼjoṅa, ar Kir-hareseth reakʼ kismis piṭhạ lạgitʼ ape do ãṭ aṛaṅtepe raga arpe dukokʼa." 
Isaiah16:8 Hesbon reakʼ khetko ar Sibmạ reakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩko do tolmocʼ akana. Jạtkoren disạm cakʼlaoko do bhage bhage darkha nạ̃ṛĩko lebetʼ gasmanḍao akada; ar mitʼdin onako do Jaser hạbicʼ haralente hahaṅkar hạbicʼ pasnao idilena. Onako reakʼ nạ̃ṛĩ do arhõ pasnao idiyente jalapuri hõe parom idileda. 
Isaiah16:9 Ona iạte iń do Jaser lekage Sibmạ reakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ lạgitʼ iń rakʼeda. E Hesbon, E Eleale, aben do mẽtʼ dakʼteń jehe jobe bena. Ente abenakʼ jo ar irokʼ phosolrege lạṛhại reakʼ andoṛ do paṛao akana." 
Isaiah16:10 Joanakʼ bagwan khon hulạs ar rạskạ do sạṅgiń ocoakana. Darkha bagwanre do celege bako sereńa ar bako andoṛa, ar darkha lelen kunḍrehõ celege darkha rasa do bako lebetʼ roḍoja, ente ona reakʼ andoṛ do mokoń ocoakana." 
Isaiah16:11 Ińakʼ jiwi do Moab lạgitʼ, ińakʼ bhitri do Kir-Heres lạgitʼ peṛesaṅ leka ṭiṛiṅ ṭuṛuṅokʼ kana." 
Isaiah16:12 Moab do tinreye bujhạu daṛeakʼa, than boṭkocʼkore senkate jãhãn lab bạnukʼa unre uni do koejoṅ lạgitʼ acʼakʼ mundilteye bolokʼa; menkhan onate hõ jãhãn lab do baṅ hoyokʼtaea." 
Isaiah16:13 Probhu Isor do Moab reaṅ niạ katha laharegeye roṛ akada. 
Isaiah16:14 Menkhan ńitokʼ Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Mitʼṭen din mujuri hoṛ cetʼleka bochore lekhae onkage pe bochor bhitrite Moabakʼ ṭhonok ar uniren ḍher hoṛ doko nihạ̃t ocokʼa ar jiwetʼ tahen hoṛ do lekhare thoṛa ar nijorko hoyokʼa.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Damesek reakʼ nạbi katha do nonka leka: Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, Damesek nagraha do ar baṅ tahena, ona do mitʼṭecʼ dhaṅdhaserakʼ ḍạṅge hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah17:2 Aroye reakʼ atoko do jaejug lạgitʼ ńir bạgiyakʼge hoyokʼa. Onako do janwarko lạgitʼge hoyokʼa. Onko do onḍegeko aḍakʼa; ar celege bako botor ocokoa. 
Isaiah17:3 Ephrayimre do jãhãn gaṛge baṅ tahena ar Damesekre hõ rajosṭige baṅ tahena; Aramren sarecʼ jiwetʼ hoṛ do Israelko leka ṭhonok hoyokʼtakoa.” Noa do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha kana. 
Isaiah17:4 “Enhilokʼ Jakobakʼ ṭhonok do cabakʼa; ar uniyakʼ itilanakʼ hoṛmo do osogokʼtaea. 
Isaiah17:5 Irokʼicʼ cetʼleka teṅgowakʼ phosole samṭao ar gele geleye ir jarwae, onkage Israelkoakʼ dosa do hoyokʼa. Rephayim buru nalare hoṛko cetʼleka hulạkʼko halaṅ jarwae onkage onkoakʼ dosa do hoyokʼtakoa." 
Isaiah17:6 Enhõ thoṛa hulạkʼ do ńurakan tahena. Jạitun dare joko rukui tayom cetʼleka cetan ḍạrkore mitʼ bar jo tahen, onkage onkoakʼ dosa hõ hoyokʼtakoa.” Israelkoren Probhu Isorge niạ katha doe meneda." 
Isaiah17:7 Enhilokʼ hoṛko do akoren sisirjạuicʼ secʼko beṅgeda, Israelren uni sonoticʼ secʼ mẽtʼko ạcurtakoa." 
Isaiah17:8 Onko do akoakʼ tite benaoakʼ pinḍ secʼ bako beṅgeda, ar akoakʼ kạṭupʼte benaoicʼ Asera muṭhạn ar dhudhup pinḍko secʼ hõ bako moneyakʼa." 
Isaiah17:9 Enhilokʼ onkoakʼ kajak nagrahako do bir gajaṛ leka hoyokʼtakoa. Cetʼleka hoṛko do Israelko iạte nagraha bạgikateko dạṛletʼ onkage onkoakʼ dosa hõ hoyokʼtakoa. Onkoakʼ disạm do jarkharakʼge hoyokʼtakoa. 
Isaiah17:10 Am do amren babańcaoicʼ Isorrem hiṛiń akadea; ar ona asrayokʼ buru hõm hiṛińakada. Ar am do mońj mońj cara ar eṭakʼ disạm khon ạguwakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩkom rohoejoṅ kana," 
Isaiah17:11 ar enhilokʼge ona dom hara ocowakʼ kana ar setakʼ do onare bhoṭokʼem hoyocoyeda, enhõ haron kosṭo ar ruạ hasokʼ dinre irokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãn phosol do baṅ tahena." 
Isaiah17:12 Hae, hae, jạt jạtrenkoakʼ hud hudạukʼ do ańjomokʼ kana! Ona do jalapuri reakʼ hud hudạukʼ lekage. Disạmrenkoakʼ hud hudạukʼge ańjomokʼ kana. Onko do ḍubạ dakʼ reakʼ hud hud saḍe lekageko andoṛeda." 
Isaiah17:13 Disạm disạmrenko do aema dakʼ lekako hud hudạukʼkanre hõ, enhõ uniye dhomkao lekore onko do sạṅgińteko ńirjoṅa. Onko do oṭaṅokʼkan bhusạ leka, ar hoete gurlạu baṛaekan dhuṛi lekae oṭaṅ cabakoa." 
Isaiah17:14 Ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ doko torasokʼa ar ạuri setagokʼrege onko doko caba utạrokʼa. Abo luluṭkoakʼ do noage menakʼa, ar noage onkoakʼ bakhra do." 
Isaiah18:1 Hae! Kus disạm reakʼ gaḍako hanasare nonkan mitʼṭecʼ disạm menakʼa one onḍe phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko reakʼ san san saḍe ańjomokʼkan. 
Isaiah18:2 Ona disạm do dakʼ cetante pạṭiolte benaoakʼ lạukạte pathaonakoe koletʼkoa. E coṭkar paṭhaonako, okoe jạtren hoṛko doko usulge arko cĩkạ̃ṛge ar boṅgan jạtrenkanko, ar okoe jạtrenko do sor ar sạṅgińren hoṛko botorako, ar okoe daṛean jạtrenko do eṭakʼkoko lebetʼ gasmanḍaoetʼko ar okoekoakʼ disạm do gaḍa ar soḍokʼkote hạṭińge, ape do onko ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼpe." 
Isaiah18:3 E dhạrtiren hoṛko, E dhạrtire girobasokʼ kanko, ape do tinre buru boṭkocʼ cetanre jhạnḍi rakabokʼa ona ńelpe, ar tinre sakwa saḍekʼa ona ańjompe." 
Isaiah18:4 Probhu Isor do ińe mitạń kana, “Iń do Sapha serma reakʼ jaratʼ jaratʼ setoṅ reakʼ dãk leka, lolo dinre phosol samṭao oktere kuṛhạ reakʼ rimil leka ińakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khon hape hapeteń beṅgeda.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Phosol samṭao ạurire tinre baha baṅ tahena ar ona baha do darkha jokate belekʼa unre uni do kạidạte kahle ḍạrkoe hesea ar cap capa ḍạrko doe kaman giḍikakʼa. 
Isaiah18:6 Ar onko do jotokoge bururen gidi ar bir janwar ṭhenko giḍi ocokʼa; ar kũṛĩtʼ ar gidi do onakote niron dinko ṭalaoa ar bir janwarko do onakote rabaṅ dinko khemaoa. 
Isaiah18:7 Unre phạdkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen do onko usul ar cĩkạ̃ṛ jạtrenko ṭhen khon sandesko hijukʼa. Onko do boṅgan hoṛ jạtren kanako okoe do sor ar sạṅgińren hoṛko botorakokan. Onko do noko daṛean jạtren kangeako okoe do eṭakʼko jaṅgateko lebetʼ gańjaoetʼko ar okaṭakʼ disạm do gaḍa soḍokʼkote hạṭiń akantako. Onko jạtrenkoakʼ dan sandes do Sion burure, phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ite ạgukʼa." 
Isaiah19:1 Misor disạm babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nonka kana: Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ coṭkar rimilte Misor disạmteye hijukʼkana. Uni samaṅre Misorren boṅga murhutʼko doko thar tharaokʼa, ar Misorren hoṛ doko hae nisạsokʼa." 
Isaiah19:2 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do Misorren hoṛkoge Misorren hoṛko upạrteń uskurkoa; onate boeha do boeha upạrte, aḍepaseren hoṛ do aḍepaseren hoṛko upạrte, nagraharen hoṛ do nagraharen hoṛko upạrte, ar rajosṭiren hoṛ do rajosṭiren hoṛko upạrteko lạṛhạiya." 
Isaiah19:3 Misorrenko doko hae nisạsokʼa, ar iń do onkoakʼ goṭawakʼko bạń jo baha ocoytakoa. Ente onko do boṅga murhutʼko ar gocʼ hoṛ ḍakʼkaoko, ar jan guruko ṭhen khon solhako hataoeda." 
Isaiah19:4 Iń do mitʼṭen kurmutạha mạlikakʼ tire Misorrenkoń jimạkoa; mitʼṭen botoranicʼ raj do onko cetanre raje calaoa.” Ar noa kangea phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha do. 
Isaiah19:5 Nil gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ do ańjetʼ rohoṛokʼa, ar gaḍako do rohoṛte paṛagokʼa." 
Isaiah19:6 Soḍokʼko do seakʼa; Misor reakʼ nalako do ạdhikʼa ar ańjedokʼa; pạṭiol ar chuchi do goso cabakʼa; 
Isaiah19:7 Nil gaḍa aṛe reakʼ sanam dareko hõ rohoṛokʼa. Gaḍa aṛe reakʼ itạ rohoe khetko hõ rohoṛte paṛagokʼa; carako hõ tolmojokʼte jhãorakʼa, ar cetʼge baṅ tahena." 
Isaiah19:8 Jạilạko hõko hae haeyokʼa ar nil gaḍare okoe do bạ̃ṛsiko oḍao onko doko homor halaṅa. Ar okoe dakʼre jhạliko caḍoe onko doko nijorokʼa. 
Isaiah19:9 Ar okoe do mĩhĩ mushnạ sutạmko benaoetʼkan ar okoe do mĩhĩ kicricʼko tearetʼkan onko doko as chuṭạukʼa. 
Isaiah19:10 Disạmren kham khunṭi doko kaca kucạkʼa ar din mujuriko do jotoge jiwire dukko ńama. 
Isaiah19:11 Soanren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko doko bebujgea; Pharaoren ạkilan sosolhako do ạuṛiyakʼ solhako emokʼkana. Ape do cekate Pharaope men daṛeae kana, “Iń do ạkilan hoṛko modren mitʼ hoṛ ar sedaeren raj bõsren kạnạń mente?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Amren ạkilan hoṛ ńitokʼ do okare menakʼkoa? Misor upạrte phạdkoren Probhu Isor okae ṭhik dohoakatʼ ona do apnarteko baḍaema ar amko metam ma. 
Isaiah19:13 Soanren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko do bebuj lekako hoyakana, ar Memphisren mukhiyạko doko ạnḍicʼakana; ar Misorren khũṭkoren mathako do bạṛicʼ horteko sen akana." 
Isaiah19:14 Probhu Isor do onko talare ạulạ jhạulại hoyocoakada, onate bubulicʼ cetʼleka acʼakʼ becʼ cetanreye konḍe manḍekʼkan onkage onko do jotowakʼ kạmire Misorko konḍe manḍe ocoyedea." 
Isaiah19:15 Misor talare bohokʼ se canḍbol, khijur ḍạr se pạṭiol, okoe hõ cetʼge bako ceka daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah19:16 Enhilokʼ Misorren hoṛko do maejiu lekako hoyokʼa. Onko upạrte phạdkoren Probhu Isor do tiye rakabtaea ar ona ńelte onko do botorteko thar tharaokʼa. 
Isaiah19:17 Ar Jihudạ disạm do Misorrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ torasge hoyokʼa. Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do onko upạrte oka cekae lạgitʼe ṭhik akawan ona iạte onko doko botorokʼa. 
Isaiah19:18 Enhilokʼ Misor reakʼ mõṛẽ goṭecʼ nagraha do Kanan reakʼ pạrsiteko roṛa ar phạdkoren Probhu Isorre pạtiạrko tahena menteko kiriyạkʼa. Ar ona nagrahako modre mitʼṭecʼ do siń cando reakʼ nagrahako metakʼa. 
Isaiah19:19 Enhilokʼ Misor disạm talare Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ ar ona reakʼ simạnare mitʼṭecʼ tham khunṭi tahena. 
Isaiah19:20 Ar noage hoyokʼa Misor disạmre phạdkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ ar goha do. Onkoakʼ santao iạte onko do tinre Probhu Isor ṭhenko raga unre onko ṭhen mitʼṭen babańcaoicʼ ar rurukhiyạicʼe kolea ar uni do onkoe bańcaokoa. 
Isaiah19:21 Nonkate Probhu Isor do Misorrenko ṭhen apnartetʼe sodorokʼa ar enhilokʼ onko do Probhu Isorko aṅgocea. Onko do janwarko samaṅkoa ar phosolko samaṅa arko sewawaea ar Probhu Isor ṭhen manotakʼko purạutakoa. 
Isaiah19:22 Ar Probhu Isor do Misorren hoṛkoe ńẽtʼkoa; uni doe ńẽtʼkoa ar boge hõe bogekoa. Onko do Probhu Isor secʼko ạcurokʼa, ar uni do onkoakʼ nehõre ańjomtakoa are bogekoa." 
Isaiah19:23 Enhilokʼ Misor khon Ạsur hạbicʼ do mitʼṭecʼ raj ḍaharge hoyokʼa. Ạsurrenko do Misorte ar Misorren do Ạsurteko calao hijukʼa. Unre Ạsurren ar Misorrenko do mitʼ soṅgeteko dewa sewaea. 
Isaiah19:24 Enhilokʼ Israel do Misor ar Ạsur tulucʼ tesaricʼe lekhakʼa ar dhạrtire onko do bhorankoko hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah19:25 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do niạ menteye bhorakoa, “Bhoranko hoyokʼma Misorrenko, ińren hoṛkoge, Ạsurrenko do ińakʼ ti reakʼ kạmige; ar Israelrenko do ińakʼ ạidạrirenkoge”" 
Isaiah20:1 Ạsurren raj Sargon do acʼren maraṅ subedar oka bochor Asdodteye kollede uni subedar do senkate ona upạrteye lạṛhạiyente onae hatkeda. 
Isaiah20:2 Ar oka bochore hatketʼ inạ bochorge Probhu Isor do Amosren hopon Jesaeae metade tahẽkana, “Amakʼ hoṛmo khon gõṛẽ kicricʼ ar jaṅga khon panahe bojme.” Onate Jesaea do koṭoge ar eken jaṅgageye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana." 
Isaiah20:2 Ar oka bochore hatketʼ inạ bochorge Probhu Isor do Amosren hopon Jesaeae metade tahẽkana, “Amakʼ hoṛmo khon gõṛẽ kicricʼ ar jaṅga khon panahe bojme.” Onate Jesaea do koṭoge ar eken jaṅgageye dãṛã baṛaekan tahẽkana." 
Isaiah20:3 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ińren guti Jesaea do cetʼleka Misor ar Kus upạrte mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ ar tayom daram reakʼ nisạn lekate pe bochor hạbicʼ koṭoge ar eken jaṅgageye dãṛã baṛaketʼ," 
Isaiah20:4 onkage Ạsurren raj do Misor lajao ocoye lạgitʼ Misorren ar Kusren bondi akan koṛakoge cetʼ ar haṛamkoge cetʼ jotoge koṭo ar eken jaṅga ar oṭakʼ dhaṛakateye idikoa. 
Isaiah20:5 Ar okoe Kus disạm cetanreko bhorsakʼkan tahẽkan ar Misor iạteko gorbokʼkan tahẽkan onko do botor arko lajao ocokʼa. 
Isaiah20:6 Enhilokʼ doreão aṛe aṛete tahenkan hoṛ doko mena, ‘ńelpe, nõkʼõe nonkayenako onko do one okoe cetanre goṛo ńam lạgitʼ bon bhorsakʼkan tahẽkan ar Ạsur rajakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ okoe ṭhen bon senokʼkan tahẽkan. Enḍekhan cekate abo do bon paskao daṛekokʼa?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Jalapuri-hahaṅkar reaṅ nạbi katha: Dạkhin disạmte birbao hoe sen idikʼkan leka, ona do hahaṅkar khon hijukʼ kana mitʼṭecʼ botoranakʼ disạm khonge." 
Isaiah21:2 Mitʼṭecʼ botoranakʼ dorsongeń ńel ocoyena, luluṭicʼ doe luluṭkana, nonosṭoyicʼ doe nonosṭokana. E Elam, rakapʼ senokʼme, gherao esedme, E Madiạ. Iń do uniye hoyocoakatʼ sanam kurkurạuakʼkoń caba utạra." 
Isaiah21:3 Iń do lacʼ hasoteń thakao akana, maejiuakʼ bedon leka haso rakapʼ akadińạ. Ar ạḍi jalaregeń paṛao akana, ariń ańjomeda, botorge ańjomokʼkana, menkhan bạń ńel ńameda." 
Isaiah21:4 Ińakʼ ontor do dhak dhakaokʼ kantińạ; botorteń thar tharaokʼ kana. Oka ńindạ lạgitʼ iń koyokʼ horakatʼ tahẽkan ona do ńitokʼ botoranakʼge hoyakantińạ. 
Isaiah21:5 Onko do jomakʼko sajaoeda, ar pạṭiạko beleda arko jom-ńũiyeda. E mukhiyạko, ma beretʼpe, apeakʼ ḍhalko sunumakʼtape." 
Isaiah21:6 Probhu Isor do ińe mitạńkana, “Am do senkate mitʼṭen pahradar dohoyem. Ar jãhãnakʼgeye ńel ona reakʼ sombat uni doe jạhirama." 
Isaiah21:7 Uni do tinre joṛa joṛa aswarikoe ńelkoa ar gadha se ũṭre decʼakan hoṛkoe ńelkoa, unre sontor akane tahenma, purạpuri sontor akaege uni doe tahen ma.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Unre uni pahradar do dhạcri kul lekae hohokeda, “E ińren Probhu Isor, iń do goṭa siń jao hilokʼ usul pahra oṛakʼre teṅgo akaniń tahẽnkana; ar goṭa ńindạ dinke dinge ińakʼ pahra ṭhạ̃ireń tahenkana." 
Isaiah21:9 Hanko ńelkom, joṛa joṛa aswarikoko darae kana.” Ona tayom uni doe mena, “Babel do lạnduṛena, lạnduṛena. Onaren sanam boṅga muṭhạnko do otreko tawakʼ posakʼ ocoakana.”" 
Isaiah21:10 E ińren hoṛko, ape do ińakʼ khạrạire enakʼ ar oṭaṅ saphawakʼ jaṅ kanape. Phạdkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen khon, Israelkoren Isor ṭhen khon iń okań ańjomakatʼ ona do apeń baḍae ocoketʼpea." 
Isaiah21:11 Duma, metakʼme Edom upạrte nạbi katha do nonka: Seyir khon okoe coṅ hohoateye mitạńkana, “E hohorhoyicʼ, tinạkʼ ńindạ akana? E hohorhoyicʼ, tinạkʼ ńindạ akana?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Hohorhoyicʼ doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Setakʼ hijukʼ kana, menkhan ona tayom ńindạ hõ darae kana. Arhõ kulijoṅpe menetʼ khan ruạṛ hecʼkate arhõ kuliyińpe.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Arob upạrte nạbi katha do nonka: E Dedanren hortenko, ape do Arob reakʼ birrepe aṅga hạṭińokʼa," 
Isaiah21:14 Ape do aperen tetaṅetʼko hoṛ lạgitʼ dakʼ ạguiype. E Ṭema disạmren girobasokʼkan hoṛko, ape do dạdạṛkan hoṛko lạgitʼ jomakʼ ạguiype." 
Isaiah21:15 Onko do tarwaṛe samaṅ khon, bocʼ akatʼ tarwaṛe samaṅ khon, ṭuniạu akatʼ akʼ sar khon ar botoranakʼ lạṛhại khonko dạṛ hecʼakana." 
Isaiah21:16 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Rikit akade guti cetʼleka bochore lekhae onkage mitʼ bochor bhitrite Kedar reakʼ sanamakʼ ṭhonok do caba utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah21:17 Kedarren dhinkiạko modre thoṛa hoṛge jiwetʼko tahena. Israelren Probhu Isor do niạ kathageye meneda.” 
Isaiah22:1 Dorson reakʼ buru-nala babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nonka: Am do ńitokʼem ceka akante, amren hoṛko do chat cetanteko rakapʼ kana?" 
Isaiah22:2 E gulmalte perecʼ nagraha, E kạumạu ar andoṛetʼkan nagraha, amren gocʼ hoṛko ma tarwaṛete se lạṛhạite ma bacoko gocʼ akan." 
Isaiah22:3 Amren mukhiyạko do jotoge mitʼ domteko dạṛ pạnḍucʼ akada; ar akʼ begortege onko doko sapʼ ocoakana. Ar amre okoeko sapʼ ocolen, onko do sạṅgińteko dạṛletʼre hõ jotoge mitʼ domteko bondi idi ocoakana." 
Isaiah22:4 Ona iạteń menkeda, “Iń ṭhen khon calakʼpe; ar hũk hũk rakʼ ocowạńpe. Ińren hoṛko marao akante jiwi raṛecʼtiń lạgitʼ do alope kurumuṭuiya.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen khon dorson reakʼ buru nalare do heṛan botorge hoyakana, onḍe do ḍamaḍol ar lebetʼ gańjao ar andmandao reakʼ dinge hecʼakana. Ona do pạcri rạputʼ giḍikakʼ ar buru-nala ṭhen rakʼjoṅ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ din kangea." 
Isaiah22:6 Elamrenko do sar ṭhoṅgako gugukeda; rãt gạḍi ar aswarikoantege. Ar Kirrenko do ḍhalanteko sapṛao akana. 
Isaiah22:7 Amakʼ bachao akatʼ buru-nala do rãt gạḍite perecʼ akana, ar nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrkore do aswarikoko sapṛao dohoakana." 
Isaiah22:8 Jihudạ reakʼ rurukhyiạ reakʼ do sạṅgiń ocoakana. Enhilokʼ ape do bir oṛakʼ reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa secʼpe beṅgetʼkeda. 
Isaiah22:9 Ape do Dạud nagraha reakʼ bhitkore aema paṛakʼkope ńelkeda ar latar reakʼ pukhrire dakʼpe jarwakeda. 
Isaiah22:10 Ape do Jerusalem reakʼ oṛakʼ duạrpe lekhakeda ar pạcri benao kajak lạgitʼ onakope rạputʼkeda. 
Isaiah22:11 Mare pukhri reakʼ dakʼ dohoy lạgitʼte ape do banar pạcrikin talare mitʼṭecʼ dakʼ dohoy lạgitʼ pukhripe benaokeda. Menkhan okoe onae hoyocoletʼ uni secʼ do bape beṅgetʼleda, ar ḍher din lahare okoe niạko reakʼe goṭaletʼ uni hõ bape botoradea." 
Isaiah22:12 Enhilokʼ phạdkoren Probhu Isor do rakʼ ar homor lạgitʼ, bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ hoyo poṭortape lạgitʼ ar gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼ lạgitʼe hohowatʼpe tahẽkana." 
Isaiah22:13 Menkhan ńelpe, ape do onḍe ḍaṅgra ar bheḍape guretʼkoa, jel ar darkha rasape ńũiyetʼte rạskạ arpe hulạsokʼ kana. Arpe meneda, “Dela, bon jom-ńũwanrege, ente gapa do bon gujukʼa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do niạ katha iń ṭhene sodor akada, “Apepe gujukʼre hõ niạ kại do baṅ ikạkʼtapea. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge niạ kathań meneda.”" 
Isaiah22:15 Phạdkoren Probhu Isorre meneda, “Am do raj ar bhanḍariko ṭhen calakʼme, ar raj oṛakʼ reakʼ dạyike ńamakatʼ Sebna ṭhen senkate metaeme," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘nonḍe do cetʼem ceka kana? Ar nonḍe amakʼ topa lae lạgitʼ, usul jaegare amakʼ topa ṭhạ̃i ṭhik lạgitʼ, ar buru kholaokate jirạukʼ jaega benao lạgitʼ ạidạri do okoeye em akatʼmea?" 
Isaiah22:17 Sontorokʼme, E daṛean hoṛ, Probhu Isor do sapʼkateye lebda giḍime lạgidokʼ kana." 
Isaiah22:18 Uni do beṛhaete ghiriạ ạcurkate mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ disạmreye lebda giḍikama. Onḍe dom gujukʼa, ar amakʼ napae napae rãt gạḍiko do doho akange tahena. Am do amren mạlikakʼ raj oṛakʼem besonot akada." 
Isaiah22:19 Iń do amakʼ hudạ khoniń ocokʼmea; ar amakʼ ṭhạ̃i khoniń ḍheka ńurmea. 
Isaiah22:20 Enhilokʼ ińren guti Hilkiạren hopon Eliakim iń hoho ạguiyea. 
Isaiah22:21 Ar amakʼ kicricʼ iń horokʼaea ar uniyakʼ ḍanḍare amakʼ ḍanḍa totlakʼ iń tolaea ar amakʼ kạmi reakʼ bhar do unireń jimạkakʼa. Uni do Jerusalem ar Jihudạreko girobasokʼ kan bõskoren go baba lekae hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah22:22 Uniyakʼ tarenre Dạud bõs reakʼ choṛaniń dohoaea; uni do onae jhija ar celege ona do bako siń daṛeakʼa, ar uniye sińlere ona do cele hõ bako jhicʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah22:23 Mitʼṭecʼ keṭecʼ jaegare khunṭi leka uni doń bitʼkaea, uni do apatakʼ bõs lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhonok reakʼ siṅghạsone hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah22:24 Uniyakʼ bõsrenkoakʼ sanam bojha do uniyakʼ tarenre ladekʼa. Joto lekan kạṭicʼ lạtu bhajanko cetʼleka uniyakʼ bharreko akakakʼ onkage uniren gidrạko ar bõsko hõ uniyakʼ tarenreko akakokʼa. 
Isaiah22:25 Okaṭakʼ khunṭi do kajak jaegareko kuṭạm jalatʼletʼ enhilokʼ ona do bocʼ hijukʼa; ona do makʼ kuṭrạkʼa ar ona cetanre okako aka tahẽkan onako do getʼ ńur ocokʼa.’ ” Noa do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha kana. Niạko hoyokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do acʼge onae meneda." 
Isaiah23:1 Tur babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nonka: E maraṅ maraṅ tạrsis jahajko, hae haeyokʼpe, ente Tur do jarkhar akana; onḍe do oṛakʼ hõ bạnukʼa, bondor hõ bạnukʼa. Ape do Kuprus disạm khon niạ sombatpe ańjomakada." 
Isaiah23:2 E ḍhip aṛe aṛete tahenkan hoṛko, E Sidonren bạnij bepariko, thirokʼpe. Aperen nạbikko do jalapuriko parom akada." 
Isaiah23:3 Sihon gaḍa, metakʼme nil gaḍa ḍhip aṛeteakʼ anaj do maraṅ jalapuri cetante hijukʼkan tahẽkana; ar Tur reakʼ arjaowakʼ do ona gaḍa aṛe reakʼ phosolge tahẽkana, ar Tur do sanam jạtkoren beparigeye tahẽkana." 
Isaiah23:4 E Sidon, lajaokʼme, ente jalapuri, ona jalapuri reakʼ gaṛ do niạ kathae meneda, “Iń do bedon baṅ rakapʼ akawạdińa, ar janam hõ bạń janam akatʼkoa. Iń do juạn koṛako bạń ạsul hara akatʼkoa ar juạn kuṛiko hõ bạń joton akatʼkoa.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Misorre niạ khobor seṭerlen khan Misorrenko do Tur reakʼ sombat iạte monre ạḍi kosṭoko ńama. 
Isaiah23:6 E jalapuri aṛe aṛete girobasokʼ kan hoṛko, ape do hae haeyokʼpe; ar Tạrsiste parom senokʼpe." 
Isaiah23:7 Noage baṅ rạskạteakʼ nagrahatape do, ona mare nagraha, one ạḍi marege, one onaren hoṛko sạṅgiń disạmte girobasokʼ lạgitʼko calakʼkan tahẽkan?" 
Isaiah23:8 Okoe Tur do eṭakʼko mukuṭe horokʼako kan tahẽkan, ar okoeren bạkʼnijko doko rapajko kan ar bekʼpariko do dhạrtiren manotanko kan, uni upạrte niạ do okoeye goṭakeda?" 
Isaiah23:9 Uniyakʼ sanam bạḍạiko maraotae lạgitʼ ar dhạrtiren manotan hoṛko bemanotko lạgitʼ phạdkoren Probhu Isorge niạ doe goṭa doholetʼ tahẽkana. 
Isaiah23:10 E Tạrsisren hoṛko, nil gaḍa dakʼ cetʼ leka chạplạu rakabokʼ onkage ape hõ disạmrepe chirchạturokʼa; ape aṭkao dohope leka do ar celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Isaiah23:11 Probhu Isor do jalapuri cetanre acʼakʼ tiye tiyạr akatʼtaea ar rajosṭikoe daldalao akada. Uni do Kanan disạm babotre mitʼṭecʼe hukum akada jemon ona reakʼ gaṛkoe marao giḍikakʼ. 
Isaiah23:12 Uni doe menkeda, “E Sidonren hoṛko, apeakʼ rạskạ do caba akantapea, ente ape dope santao ocokʼkana. Ma beretʼpe, ar Kuprus dipte parom calakʼpe; onḍehõ jirạu do bape ńama.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Kạldikoakʼ disạm beṅgetʼakʼpe; mitʼ okte uniren hoṛko do celege bako baḍaeyetʼko tahẽkana. Ạsurrenko Babel do hahaṅkarren janwarkoakʼ ṭhạ̃iko hoy ocoakada, menkhan Babelrenko do Tur upạrte jhãp em lạgitʼ pahra oṛakʼ leka usul usul rãt gạḍiko benao akada, ar uniyakʼ maraṅ maraṅ oṛakʼko luṭ akada ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ ḍạṅ lekako hoyocoakada." 
Isaiah23:14 E maraṅ maraṅ tạrsis jahajko, ape do hae haeyokʼpe, ente apeakʼ asray bondor do dhaṅ dhaser akantapea." 
Isaiah23:15 Ona jokhecʼ mitʼṭen rajakʼ dinko leka, metakʼme eaegel bochor hạbicʼ Tur doe hiṛiń ocokʼa. Menkhan eaegel bochor purạulen khan Tur do kusumbi kuṛiyakʼ sereń lekae hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah23:16 E hiṛiń ocoakan kusumbi kuṛi, peṛesaṅ banamate nagrahare dãṛã baṛaeme. Napaete peṛesaṅ banamme; ar ḍher sereń sereńme jemon arhõm disạ ocokʼ." 
Isaiah23:17 Eaegel bochor paromlen khan Probhu Isor do Tur secʼe moneyakʼa. Unre uni do acʼakʼ bekʼpari kạmire ruạṛ senkate dhạrtiren sanam rapajko sãoteye bạnij bepara. 
Isaiah23:18 Menkhan uniyakʼ lab ar rojgar do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohokʼa; se jogaokʼa ona do baṅa. Ar okoe do Probhu Isor samaṅreko dãṛã baṛae onkoakʼ ḍher jomakʼ ar mońj kicricʼko lạgitʼge uniyakʼ ona labtetʼ do khorocokʼtaea.
