Isaiah24:1 Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do dhạrtiye ujạṛ utạr are marao lạgidokʼ kana. Uni do ona reakʼ cetantetʼe ulṭạu giḍikakʼa ar onare girobasokʼ kan hoṛkoe chirc hạturkoa." 
Isaiah24:2 Enhilokʼ naeke ar disạm hoṛko, kisạ̃ṛ ar gutiko, kisạ̃ṛ erako ar kạ̃ṛmĩko, kiriń ar ạkhrińko, dhar emokʼko ar hataoko ar rin emokʼko ar rin hataoko onko jotokoakʼ dosa do mitʼ lekage hoyokʼtakoa." 
Isaiah24:3 Dhạrti do ujạṛ utạrokʼa, ar purạtege luṭ ocokʼa. Probhu Isor do niạ kathageye meneda." 
Isaiah24:4 Dhạrti do hińjrạukʼ kana ar boraokʼ kana ar pirthimi do loraokʼ kana ar boraokʼ kana. 
Isaiah24:5 Dhạrti do uniren hoṛko besonot akada. Onko do ạn-ạriko bemanot akada; ạnko rạputʼ akada ar Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos leka do bako taṛam akada. 
Isaiah24:6 Ona iạte mitʼṭecʼ sarap do dhạrtiye utʼ cabaea; ar uniren hoṛko do dusikoko hoyokʼa. Ona iạte dhạrtire okoeko girobasokʼ kan onko doko atar giḍi ocokʼa ar thoṛa hoṛge jiwetʼko tahena. 
Isaiah24:7 Nãwã darkha rasa do baṅ tahena ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩ hõ hińjrạukʼa; ar okoeko hulạsokʼkan tahẽkan onko do jotoge duk iạteko kuhrạukʼa. 
Isaiah24:8 Toblako reakʼ saḍe ar andoṛetʼko reakʼ sabad ar peṛesaṅ reakʼ rạskạ do caba utạrokʼa. 
Isaiah24:9 Onko do sereńate darkha rasa do ar bako ńũiya; ar bul hoṛkoakʼ mocare bubulakʼ do haṛhatʼge ạikạukʼa. 
Isaiah24:10 Nagrahako do dhaṅdhaser akan tahena. Sanam oṛakʼ duạr do huṛkạṛokʼa; ar bhitrite do bako bolo daṛeakʼa. 
Isaiah24:11 Darkha rasa lạgitʼ hor horteko kikiạu baṛaea. Rạskạ bodolte duk hoyokʼa, ar dhạrti khon hulạs do sạṅgińokʼa." 
Isaiah24:12 Nagraha do dhaṅdhaser ḍạṅ leka hoyokʼa ar phaṭok duạrko do kuṭạm lạnduṛ ocokʼa. 
Isaiah24:13 Jạitun dare ruku tayom ar darkha jo gotʼ tayom cetʼleka darere thoṛa jo tahen, onkage dhạrtiren jạtkoakʼ dosa hõ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Isaiah24:14 Onko do rạskạteko andoṛa arko sereńa. Onko do pạchim secʼ khon ãṭ aṛaṅte Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokko sarhaotaea. 
Isaiah24:15 Ona iạte purub secʼrenko do Probhu Isorko sarhaoema ar sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko do Israelren Probhu Isorko õṛhẽ sereńaema. 
Isaiah24:16 Dhạrti reakʼ ses simạ khon ale do niạ sereńle ańjom ńameda, “Dhoromicʼ Isorakʼge sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtae ma!” Menkhan ińiń meneda, “Hae! Iń do sorbonasreń paṛao akana, ente bepạtiạrko doko bepạtiạreda; hẽ onko do ạḍitetʼko bepạtiạr akada.”" 
Isaiah24:17 E dhạrtiren hoṛko, ape lạgitʼ botor, ghaḍlakʼ ar pạsi doe koyokʼ hor akada.”" 
Isaiah24:18 Okoe hoṛ botoranakʼ saḍe ańjomkateye ńirjoṅ uni do ghaḍlakʼreye khańjokʼa, ar okoe ghaḍlakʼ khone rakabokʼ uni do pạsireye sapʼ ocokʼa. Serma reakʼ khiṛkiko jhijokʼa ar dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼ do dal dalaokʼa." 
Isaiah24:19 Dhạrti do kaṭra kuṭrạ cabakʼa, dhạrti do oṛejokʼa ar dhạrti do botorge dal dalaokʼa." 
Isaiah24:20 Dhạrti do ńũ bul hoṛ leka konḍe manḍekʼa, ar hoete lewer lewerokʼkan oṛakʼ leka lewer lewerokʼa. Uniyakʼ kại reakʼ bojha do nunạkʼ hamal hoyokʼtaea, uni do ar tisge bae teṅgo ruạṛ daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah24:21 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do sermaren phạdkoe sạjạikoa, ar dhạrtire do rapajkoe sạjạikoa." 
Isaiah24:22 Jelkhana reakʼ khạndṛuṅre bondi akan hoṛko cetʼleka mitʼ ṭhenko doho ocokʼ onkage onko do mitʼ ṭhenko doho ocokʼa. Onko do Jelkhanareko bond ocokʼa ar ḍher din hạbicʼko sạjại ocokʼa. 
Isaiah24:23 Ńindạ cando doe nak kaṭakʼa ar siń cando doe lajaokʼa, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Sion buru ar Jerusalemreye rajokʼa, ar onaren murubbiko do uniyakʼ ṭhonokko ńela." 
Isaiah25:1 E Probhu, am kangeam ińren Isor do; iń do amgeń sarhaomea ar amakʼ ńutumgeń õṛhẽytama. Oka hahaṛawakʼ kạmiko ḍher din khonem goṭa akatʼ ona do amge purạ pạtiạr salakʼem kạmi akada." 
Isaiah25:2 Ente nagraha do dhiri puńjirem hoy ocoakada ar pạcrite esetʼ nagrahako dom dhaṅ dhaser akada. Bidisiạ bạirikoakʼ gaṛ do ar baṅ tahena; ona do tishõ baṅ benaokʼa. 
Isaiah25:3 Ona iạte daṛean jạtrenko do amko sarhaomea ar kurmutạha jạtrenkoakʼ nagraha do amko botorama. 
Isaiah25:4 Am do nandankoren aotan gaṛ kanam, ar nacarkoakʼ kosṭokʼ okteren hõ aotan gaṛ kanam, birbão hoe khon rukhiyạ reakʼ jaega kanam ar khaṅgoṭ jaegare jharla jhạrli setoṅ khon aḍ ńam lạgitʼ umul kanam. Am do bidisiạkoakʼ kạumạuem thir akatʼtakoa. Rimil reakʼ umul cetʼleka loloye komaoetʼ onkage kurmutạhakoakʼ sereń hõm thir ocoakatʼtakoa." 
Isaiah25:5  
Isaiah25:6 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do niạ buru cetanre sanam jạtren hoṛko lạgitʼ bhage bhage jomakʼ ar mare darkha rasa reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ bhoje emokʼa; onare joto khon bhageakʼ jel ar joto khon bhageakʼ darkha rasa hõ tahena. 
Isaiah25:7 Okaṭakʼ orwalte sanam jạtren hoṛko danaṅ akan, ar okaṭakʼ cador do sanam jạtrenkoe esetʼ akatʼko, niạ bururege ona doe nosṭo giḍikakʼa." 
Isaiah25:8 Gujukʼ do jaejug lạgitʼe marao giḍikakʼa. Probhu Isor do sanamkoakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼe jodtakoa ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ henosta do goṭa dhạrti khone sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. Probhu Isor do niạ kathageye meneda. 
Isaiah25:9 Enhilokʼ hoṛko mena, “Ńelpe, nui kangeae aboren Isor do; abo do uni koyokʼ horrege bon tahẽkana jemone bańcao daṛeabon. Uni kangeae Probhu do; abo do uni koyokʼ horre bon tahẽkana. Dela, abo do uniyakʼ bańcao kạmi iạte rạskạ arbon hulạsokʼma.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Probhu Isorakʼ kạmi do niạ bururege tahena. Guricʼ sãote busupʼ cetʼlekako lebetʼ gańjao ṭhik onkage Moab hõe lebetʼ gańjao ocokʼa. 
Isaiah25:11 Paerakʼicʼ cetʼ leka tiye pasnaoetʼtae onkage onko hõ guricʼre akoakʼ tiko pasnaotakoa. Onkoakʼ ti reakʼ kurumuṭu do ạuṛiyakʼge hoyokʼtakoa; Isorge onkoakʼ bạḍại doe rạpudtakoa. 
Isaiah25:12 Uni do Moabakʼ pạcri reakʼ usul gaṛkoe lạnduṛ giḍikakʼa; onako doe hasareye mesaoa, ar dhuṛi lekae hoeocoya." 
Isaiah26:1 Enhilokʼ Jihudạ disạmre niạ sereńko sereńa: Jihudạ disạmre kajak nagraha menakʼ tabona; Isorakʼ babańcaoge hoyokʼa ona reakʼ pạcri ar gaṛko do. 
Isaiah26:2 Ape do phaṭok-duạrko jhijpe jemon dhorom ar pạtiạrko dohoyetʼ jạtrenkoko bolo daṛeakʼ. 
Isaiah26:3 Okoeyakʼ mon amre tahẽ uricʼ akan uni do purạ suluktem dohoyedekana, ente uni do am cetanreye bhorsakʼ kana." 
Isaiah26:4 Ape do Probhu Isorre jaejug bhorsa akan tahenpe, ente Probhu, Isor do jaejugren asray buru kanae." 
Isaiah26:5 Okoe usul ṭhạ̃ireko girobasokʼ kan onko doe copotʼ akatʼkoa; uni do ona cetan nagrahakoe copotʼ ocoyeda. Ona do ot hạbicʼgeye copotʼeda, ar dhuṛireye milạueda." 
Isaiah26:6 Santaokʼko ar reṅgecʼko do jaṅgate onako lebetʼ gańjaoa. 
Isaiah26:7 Isor botorae hoṛkoakʼ hor do somangea; E dhoromicʼ, am do Isor botoraekoakʼ horem somaneda." 
Isaiah26:8 Hẽ, Probhu Isor, ale do amakʼ dhorom hortele taṛametʼkante am koyokʼ horre menakʼlea; aleakʼ khojokʼakʼ do amakʼ kạmi hotete sodorokʼme baṛe." 
Isaiah26:9 Ińakʼ jiwi do ńindạ am lạgitʼe rakʼeda. ińren jiu do am lạgitʼe ahkaokʼ kana. Dhạrtire amakʼ hok bicạr hecʼlenre prithimiren hoṛ do dhorom reakʼ cecetʼakʼ ko ńama. 
Isaiah26:10 Bedhorom hoṛko daya udukʼakore hõ onko do dhorom bako ceda; hokakʼ disạmre onko do dusṭạmiko kạmiya ar Probhu Isorakʼ mạhima hõ bako aṅgoca. 
Isaiah26:11 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ ti do coṭte tul akan tahen kana, menkhan onko do ona bako ńeleda. Amren hoṛko lạgitʼ amakʼ ãṭ baṛeko ńelma arko lajaokʼma; ar seṅgel do amren bạirikoe jom cabakoma." 
Isaiah26:12 E Probhu Isor, suluk baṛe teṅgo aleme; ente okale ceka daṛeakatʼ ona sanamakʼge am do ale lạgitʼem kạmi akatʼa." 
Isaiah26:13 E Probhu, aleren Isor, am chaḍa eṭakʼ Probhuko hõ ale cetanre mạlikiko calaoleda, menkhan ale do eken amgele aṅgocetʼmea." 
Isaiah26:14 Gocʼ akanko do ar bako jiwedokʼa; onkoren jiu do ar bako beretʼa. Onko do sạjạikatem meṭao giḍi akatʼako; onkoakʼ disạ hõm marao akatʼtakoa. 
Isaiah26:15 E Probhu Isor, am do onko jạtrenkom baḍhao akatʼkoa; ar onko jạtrenkom baḍhao akatʼkote sarhaoem ńamakada; am do disạm reakʼ sanam simạkom phaelao akada." 
Isaiah26:16 E Probhu Isor, kosṭokʼre onko do amko ńam baṛaketʼmea; ar amakʼ sạjại paṛaoatʼkore onko do nehõrate khae khoe koejoṅko phuṭạuatʼmea." 
Isaiah26:17 Bhạrti hoṛmo maejiu do janame oktere cetʼleka bedonteko eṛseń toṛseń baṛae, E Probhu Isor, ale hõ am samaṅre onkagele hoyakana." 
Isaiah26:18 Ale dole bhạrti hoṛmo akana, ar bedontele eṛseń toṛseń baṛaekana, menkhan ale do hoegele janam akada. Ar ale hotete disạm do baṅ rukhiyạlena, dhạrtiren hoṛ hõ ale hotete jion do bako ńamleda." 
Isaiah26:19 Menkhan amren gocʼakan hoṛ doko bańcaokʼa; onkoakʼ hoṛmo do jiwetʼ ruạṛokʼtakoa. Ape okoe do dhuṛirepe girobasokʼ kan, ape do dela ebhenokʼpe ar rạskạte andoṛpe. Setakʼ reakʼ sisir dakʼ cetʼleka dhạrtiye purṭhạ ocoyetʼ onkage am do gocʼko jiwiyem danakoa." 
Isaiah26:20 E ińren hoṛko, do calakʼpe, apeakʼ kandhate bolokʼ bayokʼpe ar duạr sińkakʼpe; ar thoṛa ghạṛicʼ lạgitʼ oko hataṛokʼpe, one khĩs ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ." 
Isaiah26:21 Ńelpe, dhạrtiren hoṛko kại reakʼ sạjại emako lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khone oḍok hijukʼ kana. Dhạrti do acʼre joro akan mãyãme sodora; ar acʼre khũn akanko do bae dapalkoa." 
Isaiah27:1 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ keṭecʼ ar maraṅ daṛean tarwaṛete uni khiṛiạpaṭeye dạṛetʼkan biń Libiathone sạjạiyea. Ar jalapurire menae uni danob doe gojea. 
Isaiah27:2 Enhilokʼ niạ sereńko sereńa; “Sereńpe ona darkha bangwan reaṅ one oka khon rasa ńamokʼkan. 
Isaiah27:3 Iń Probhu Isorge ona doń ńel todarotetʼ kana; iń do jao okte onare dakʼ iń emakʼ kana. Ar okoehõ jemon ona aloko lokshantiń onate siń ńindạń horhoyeda. 
Isaiah27:4 Ona upạrte ińakʼ edre do bạnukʼtińạ. Aha, jạnum ar rạṅgạini upạrte lạṛhại tahentiń khan! Onako upạrte jhãpiń emkea ar seṅgelreń atar giḍikea." 
Isaiah27:5 Bickom onako do asray ńam lạgitʼ iń ṭhenko hijukʼma; ar iń sãoteko sulukokʼ ma. Hẽ, iń sãotegeko sulukokʼ ma." 
Isaiah27:6 Hijukʼkan dinkore Jakob doe rehedokʼa, ar Israel doe bahakʼa ar sagenokʼa ar goṭa dhạrti do joteye pereja.”" 
Isaiah27:7 Probhu Isor do Israelren sasantaoko cetʼlekae hạn akatʼko Israel do onka bae hạn akadea; okoe uniko khũn akade onko leka hõ uni do bae khũn akadea. 
Isaiah27:8 Uni do bicạrkateye oḍok giḍi akadea, menkhan bạ̃ṛti sạjại do bae em akawadea; purub reakʼ hoe leka uni doe oṭaṅ idiakadea." 
Isaiah27:9 Niạ hotete Jakobakʼ kại reakʼ rin do puruchunokʼtaea, menkhan uniyakʼ joto kạiko sạṅgiń giḍikatae lahare cun dhiri leka uniyakʼ pinḍ reakʼ dhirikoe gejertaea; onate Asera muṭhạn se dhup-pinḍko do ar baṅ tahena." 
Isaiah27:10 Pạcrite esetʼ nagraha do nisun akana; ona do bạgi giḍiyakʼ oṛakʼ ar hahaṅkar leka bạgi giḍi hoyakana. Onḍe do mĩhũko ạtińa arko burumokʼa; ar dare reakʼ sakamko joma. 
Isaiah27:11 Ona reakʼ ḍạrko rohoṛlen khan ona do rạputʼ giḍikʼa ar maejiuko do hecʼkate seṅgelre onako khadlea. Noko do mitʼṭen lelha jạtren kanako, onate okoe onkoe benao akatʼko onko cetanre uni do jãhãnakʼ bae mãyãkʼa; onkoren sisirjạuicʼ hõ onkore bae dayakʼa." 
Isaiah27:12 E Israelko, enhilokʼ ạtu calakʼkan phurạt gaḍa khon Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa hạbicʼ Probhu Isor do anaj lekae en pea ar ape mimitʼko dope samṭao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah27:13 Enhilokʼ maraṅ mitʼṭecʼ sakwa do oroṅokʼa. Unre Ạsur disạmre okoe do atʼko tahẽkan ar Misorte okoeko laga ńir ocolen onkoko ruạṛ hijukʼa ar Jerusalem reakʼ sonot burure Probhu Isorko sewawaea. 
Isaiah28:1 Hae, Ephrayimren bul hoṛkoakʼ mukuṭ lekan nagraha, one oka iạte onko doko bạḍạiyetʼ tahẽkan! Hae, ona Ephrayim reakʼ bạḍạite perecʼ ṭhonok reakʼ mosotʼ akan mala, one oka do buru-nala otet reakʼ muthnire menakʼakʼ! Ona buru-nalaren hoṛko do darkha rasateko ńũ oborakana." 
Isaiah28:2 Ńelpe, Probhu Isorren mitʼṭen ektiạran ar daṛean hoṛ menaea. Arel ar jarkharicʼ mitʼṭecʼ birbão hoe lekage, uni do daṛean birbão reakʼ banbạsi dakʼ leka otre ona nagraha doe tawakʼ giḍikakʼa." 
Isaiah28:3 Ephrayimren bubulkoakʼ ona bạḍạiteakʼ mukuṭ do otre lebetʼ gasmanḍaokʼa. 
Isaiah28:4 Ephrayim reakʼ ṭhonok mosotʼ akan mala oka do buru-nala otet reakʼ muthnire menakʼ, ona do bele loa leka pạhilrege caba utạrokʼa; one jãhãege ona ńelkate hataokateye jomke." 
Isaiah28:5 Enhilokʼ phạdkoren Probhu Isor do acʼren sarecʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ṭhonokanakʼ mukuṭ ar mitʼṭecʼ mońj malae hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah28:6 Uni do bikʼcạrkoakʼ ontorre dhorom reakʼ monsubại danakoa. Ar okoe phaṭok-duạr ṭhen khon lạṛhạiko ocog onko do daṛeye emakoa. 
Isaiah28:7 Menkhan Ephrayimren naekeko ar nạbiko do ńitokʼ darkha rasa ńũkateko bul akana arko guṛdạu baṛaekana; onko do kiḍạkaḍe akan tahenrege dorsonko ńela ar inạ dosarege rayko ema. 
Isaiah28:8 Onkoakʼ joto ṭebil do becʼte perecʼ akana; ar oka jaega hõ sapha do bạnukʼa. 
Isaiah28:9 Onkoko mena, “Uni do bidiạ okoeye cetʼakoa? Ar acʼakʼ katha do okoeye bujhạu ocokoa? Okoe ńũńũko bạgi akatʼ ar okoe bạ̃s khonko or chaḍao ocoakan onko ṭhenge cetʼ baṅa?" 
Isaiah28:10 Ente sikhạuna upạr sikhạuna menakʼa, sikhạuna upạr sikhạunage. Thar upạr thar, ar thar upạr tharge, nonḍe thoṛa hanḍe thoṛa. ”" 
Isaiah28:11 Bhagegea, enḍekhan Probhu Isor do bidisiạkoakʼ moca reakʼ hahaṛa pạrsite onko hoṛko ṭhen kathae roṛa." 
Isaiah28:12 Uni do onkoe metatʼko tahẽkana, “Niạ kangea ona jirạukʼ jaega do, laṅga akan hoṛ do nonḍegeko jirạu joṅma. Ńelpe, ona kangea aosan jaega do.” Menkhan onko do ona bako ańjomleda." 
Isaiah28:13 Onatege onko ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do hoyokʼa, “sikhạuna upạr sikhạuna, sikhạuna upạr sikhạuna. Thar upạr thar, thar upạr thar. nonḍe thoṛa hanḍe thoṛa,” Jemon onko do taṛamle khange sạmbirteko bhindạṛokʼ arko hạnokʼte pạsireko sapʼ ṭarhaokʼ." 
Isaiah28:14 Ona iạte E ṭiṭkạrikan hoṛko, okoe do Jerusalemre onko hoṛko cetanre mạlikipe calaoetʼ, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Isaiah28:15 Ape do bạḍạitepe meneda, “Ale do moron ar Sheol sãote mitʼṭecʼ bondobosle bandhao akada. Maraokʼ reakʼ cạbuk pheḍ hecʼlenre hõ ale do bae tiyokʼlea, ente eṛeteakʼ do aleakʼ hirlạ ar phikir do aleakʼ asraygele benao akawana.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Onatege Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, “Ńelpe, biḍạu aṭkarkate mitʼṭecʼ dhiriyiń bachao akawana; ona do Sion reakʼ konac dhiri lekateń bạisạu akada. Okoe onareye pạtiạukʼ uni do ṭarhao akane tahena." 
Isaiah28:17 Hok reakʼ bicạr do jokha baber ar dhorom do sạhul baberiń benaoa; arel do apeakʼ eṛeteakʼ hirlạkoe marao tapea, ar ḍubạ dakʼ do apeakʼ okoakʼ asraye cape iditapea." 
Isaiah28:18 Moron tulucʼ okaṭakʼpe bondobos akatʼ ona do bạtilokʼa; ar Sheol sãote oka bondobospe bandhao akatʼ ona hõ baṅ ṭikạukʼtapea. Maraokʼ reakʼ cạbuk pheḍ hijukʼre, ape do onatepe dal ocokʼa." 
Isaiah28:19 Ar tinạkʼ dhao ona pheḍ hijukʼa unạkʼ dhaogepe dal ocokʼa; aṅga marsalokʼ khon setakʼ hạbicʼ, siń ar ńindạ ona do kajakte pheḍ hijukʼa. Niạ kathape bujhạule khan torasge hoyokʼtapea.”" 
Isaiah28:20 Ar apeakʼ gitijokʼakʼ aṭetʼ hõ khaṭokʼtapea, ar oyokʼ lạgitʼ kombol hõ sakṛakʼtapea." 
Isaiah28:21 Probhu Isorgeye lạṛhạiya, cetʼleka uni do Perasim buru ṭhene kạmiletʼ. Uni doe raṅgaokʼa, cetʼleka Gibeon buru ṭhene raṅgaolen. Nonkate uni do acʼakʼ kạmi, acʼakʼ hahaṛa kạmiye sạta." 
Isaiah28:22 Onate ńitokʼ apeakʼ ṭiṭkạri katha do thirtape, ar baṅkhan apeakʼ totolakʼ do arhõ urijokʼtapea; ente phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ mocare goṭa dhạrti jarkharokʼ reakʼ kathageń ańjomakada." 
Isaiah28:23 Ańjompe, ar ińakʼ katha luturakʼpe; ar okań roṛetʼkan monte ona ańjompe." 
Isaiah28:24 Casokʼicʼ do itạ erokʼ lạgitʼ cacastegeye tahena? Uni do cetʼ jaoge ḍhelake gejera are ãṛgom somana? 
Isaiah28:25 Hasae somanlere uni do cetʼ kạliạ jirạ ar jirạ bae eretʼ kana? Uni do cetʼ sạr sạrte guhum ar ṭhik jaegare jao ar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ guhumko simạnare bae rohoeyeda? 
Isaiah28:26 Uniren Isorge uni doe hukumaea ar ṭhik hor reakʼe cetʼaea. 
Isaiah28:27 Kạliạ jirạ do paṭate bako ena, se sagaṛ reakʼ pạ̃ihạ̃ hõ bako guṛgạu baṛaea, bickom ṭheṅgatege kạliạ jirạ ar jirạ doko ena." 
Isaiah28:28 Okoehõ ḍher din hạbicʼ guhum do bako manḍaea, onate ona do bạṛijokʼa; manḍae jokhecʼ ona cetante pạ̃ihạ̃ se sadom nonkako calao koa jemon ona alo nosṭokʼ." 
Isaiah28:29 Niạko ạkil do phạdkoren Probhu ṭhen khonge hijukʼa. Uniyakʼ sopolha do hahaṛagea ar uniyakʼ ạkil do sorosgea. 
Isaiah29:1 Hae, Ariel, E Ariel, Dạudakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i reakʼ nagraha! Am do bochor bochorgem juṭicʼakʼ kana ar amakʼ porobko do ạcur ạcurte hecʼ ruạṛokʼ kana." 
Isaiah29:2 Menkhan iń do Ariel cetanre muhiniń ạguiya. Uni do hae hae are jare jarekʼa; ar iń ṭhen do mitʼṭecʼ Ariel lekae hoyokʼa, metakʼme seṅgelanakʼ pinḍ lekage." 
Isaiah29:3 Iń do am beṛhaete ar am upạrteń chạunikʼa; gaṛiń benaoa ariń gherao ạcurmea, ar am upạrte buruńjkoń benaoa." 
Isaiah29:4 Am do latartem ńur ocokʼa ar ot khon katham roṛa; ar amakʼ katha do baṅ pusṭạukʼtama. Bhutakʼ aṛaṅ leka amakʼ katha do ot khon rakabokʼa; ar dhuṛi khon do khae khoe oḍokokʼtama. 
Isaiah29:5 Menkhan amren locotʼ locotʼ bạiriko do lopotʼ dhuṛi lekako hoyokʼa; onko kurmutạhako do oṭaṅokʼkan bhusạ lekako hoyokʼa. Hẽ, mitʼ ripitʼrege phạdkoren Probhu Isor do huḍur, ot laṛao ar ãṭ saḍete, bharḍo ar birbão hoe ar jojomkan seṅgelteye sạjạikoa." 
Isaiah29:6  
Isaiah29:7 Unre sanam gad gad boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko okoe do Ariel upạrteko lạṛhạikan, metakʼme okoe do uni ar uniyakʼ gaṛ upạrteko lạṛhạikan arko cipạyede onko do kukmũ ar ńindạ reakʼ dorson lekako hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah29:8 Reṅgecʼ akade hoṛ kukmũte jom mae jojomkan, menkhan ebhenlenre ńelme, reṅgecʼma tahenkange. Ar tetaṅakade hoṛ kukmũte ńũ mae ńũńũkan, menkhan ebhenlenre ńelme, uni do nijor ar tetaṅedekangea. Onkage onkoakʼ hõ hoyokʼtakoa sanam gad gad boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ do, one okoe Sion buru upạrteko lạṛhạikan." 
Isaiah29:9 Ape do ṭhak ar hahaṛakʼpe; jạpitʼkate kãṛãkʼpe, menkhan darkha rasa ńũte do alo; konḍe manḍekʼpe, menkhan bubulakʼ iạte do alo;" 
Isaiah29:10 ente Probhu Isor do ape cetanre mitʼṭecʼ jạpitʼe ạguakada; apeakʼ mẽtʼ do nạbiko kana, apeakʼ ona mẽtʼ uni doe bond akada ar apeakʼ bohokʼ do cholte ńeńelkoakʼ kana, apeakʼ ona bohokʼ doe poṭom akatʼtapea." 
Isaiah29:11 Niạ goṭa dorsonge ape ṭhen do eken chapkate bedhao akatʼ puthi lekage hoyakana. Okoe paṛhaokʼe baḍae uni ona puthi emkate metae khan, “Dayakate niạ paṛhaome,” Enḍekhan uni doe roṛ ruạṛa, “Iń do bạń daṛeakʼa, ente niạ do chapte bond akana.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Ar paṛhao baṅ baḍaeyicʼ niạ puthi emkate metae khan, “Dayakate ma niạ paṛhaome,” Enḍekhan uni doe roṛ ruạṛa, “Iń do paṛhaokʼ bạń baḍaea.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Noko do mocategeko ganaoedeńkana ar luṭitegeko manotedeńkana, menkhan onkoakʼ ontor do iń khon sạṅgińgetakoa. Onko do manwa cecetʼakʼ niạmkote ińko sewawạń kana." 
Isaiah29:14 Onate iń do arhõ hahaṛawakʼ kạmikote noko hoṛ doń ṭhak utạrkoa; onate ạkilankoakʼ ạkil do maraokʼtakoa ar budankoakʼ bud hõ danaṅokʼa.” 
Isaiah29:15 Hae onko hoṛ do, okoe do akoakʼ goṭawakʼko Probhu Isor ṭhen okoe reakʼko kurumuṭukan. Onko do ńutreko kạmiya arko hudisa, “Okoe baṅ abo doe ńeletʼ bon? Ar cele baṅe baḍayetʼbon?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Apeakʼ bud do ulṭạ palṭagea! Kuṅkạl ar jaṭaṅ hasa do mitʼ lekagepe hudiseda! Okoeye benaoetʼkan uniyakʼ benao jinis do cetʼ uni reaṅe roṛ daṛeakʼa, “Uni do bae benao akadińạ mente?” Ar bhajan do cetʼ kuṅkạl babotreye mena, “Uni do cetʼge bae baḍaea?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Ar thoṛa din khange cetʼ Lebanon do jo bahakʼkan bagwan leka baṅ hoyokʼa? Ar jo bahakʼkan bagwan do bir gajaṛ tulni baṅ lekhakʼa? 
Isaiah29:18 Enhilokʼ kalako do ona bedhao akatʼ puthi reakʼ kathako ańjoma, ar kaṛaṅ ńutre tahenkan kãṛãko doko ńeńela." 
Isaiah29:19 Mạ̃hir hoṛko do arhõ Probhu Isor iạteko rạskạkʼa, ar okoe ḍherko reṅgecʼge onko do Israelren uni sonoticʼ iạteko rạskạkʼa." 
Isaiah29:20 Kurmutạhako do ar bako tahena; ṭiṭkạri hoṛko hõko caba utạrokʼa, ar okoe bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko menjoṅkan onko doko marao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah29:21 Onko do eṛe kathate hoṛko dusikoa, nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrre okoe do bindusạnko secʼe tahenkan uni do pạsiko oḍaoae kana ar sạriyakʼreye tahenkan hoṛ do ạuṛiyakʼteko or ghańjeṛ edekana." 
Isaiah29:22 Ona iạte Abrahamren babańcaoicʼ Probhu Isor do Jakobakʼ bõs babotreye meneda, “Jakob do ar bae lajao ocokʼa; uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do ar baṅ mulinokʼtaea." 
Isaiah29:23 Tinre onko do ako talare ińakʼ ti reakʼ kạmi, metakʼme akoren gidrạkoko ńelkoa unre sonoticʼ menteko manaoińạ. Jakobren uni sonoticʼ do sonot menteko aṅgocea ar Israelren Isorko botoraea." 
Isaiah29:24 Ar okoe ṭhik leka bako bujhạu daṛeakʼkan tahẽkan onko do mońjteko bujhạua, ar okoeko karacʼ kurujokʼkan tahẽkan onko do ạkilko cetʼjoṅa." 
Isaiah30:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Hae onko ṭhoṭhok hoponko do, okoe do ponthawakʼko kạmikan menkhan iń leka do baṅa. Onko do bondobosko bandhaoeda menkhan ińren Jiu reakʼ sana leka do baṅ. Jemon kại cetan kạiko ḍạṅjoṅ." 
Isaiah30:2 Iń sãote sopolha baṅkate Misorteko calakʼ kana; onko do goṛo ńam lạgitʼ Pharaoakʼ asrayko hataoeda ar Misor reakʼ umulreko hirlạkʼ kana. 
Isaiah30:3 Menkhan Pharaoakʼ asray doe lajao ocoyetʼkoa ar Misor reakʼ umul doe bemanotkoa. 
Isaiah30:4 Soanre onkoren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko menakʼkoa ar onkoren goḍetko do Hanesteko seṭerakana," 
Isaiah30:5 menkhan enhõ onko mimitʼko doko lajao ocokʼa, ente onko jạtrenko do jãhãnakʼ porhoge bako hoyokʼtakoa. Onko do cetʼ goṛo ar porho hõ bako ńama; eken lajao arko bemanot ocokʼa.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Dạkhin disạmren janwarko reaṅ nạbi katha: onko goḍetko do kosṭo ar durdosate perecʼ disạm talate ar dhạcri kul ar kul eṅga, bisan biń ar uḍạukʼkan bińkoakʼ disạm talateko calakʼa. Onko do akoakʼ dhon-duribko gadhare ladekate ar damanakʼ jinisko do ũṭ deare ladekate onko jạtrenko ṭhenko idiya one okoe hotete jãhãn labge baṅ hoyokʼtako." 
Isaiah30:7 Misor reakʼ goṛo do ạuṛiyakʼgea, jãhãn kạmi reakʼge baṅkana; ona iạte iń do onko jạtrenkoakʼ ńutumiń dohoakada Rahab, metakʼme duṛupʼ hape akanicʼ." 
Isaiah30:8 Am do ńitokʼ mitʼṭecʼ dhiri paṭare ar mitʼṭecʼ puthire ol dohoyme, jemon darakan dinkore ona do Israelko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ goha leka tahen." 
Isaiah30:9 Noko do kạṭhuạ jạtren kanako, eṛe roroṛ hoponkoge: Probhu Isorakʼ cecetʼakʼ baṅ ańjometʼkan hoponkoge." 
Isaiah30:10 Onko do ńeńelkoko metako kana, “Dorson do ar alope ńela,” Ar nạbi doko metakokana, “Okaṭakʼ sạrikan ona do ar alope lạiya. Ale ṭhen suk reakʼ katha lạipe; ar okaṭakʼ sạriyakʼ baṅkan onkanakʼko nạbiyalepe." 
Isaiah30:11 Hor khon sahaṛokʼpe, ar suṛucʼ hor khon ghańjeṛokʼpe. Israelren uni sonoticʼakʼ katha do ar alope ańjomalea.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ona iạte Israelren uni sonoticʼ do niạ kathae meneda, “Ape do ińakʼ kathape nihạ̃t akada, ar eṛe ar sasantaoko cetanrepe bhorsakʼkana." 
Isaiah30:13 Onate niạ kại do ape lạgitʼ usul bhitre menakʼ oḍo oḍo paṛakʼ leka kana oka do oborokʼ lạgidokʼkan, one ona ackage obor ńurokʼ mitʼ ripitʼtege." 
Isaiah30:14 Ona do hasa reakʼ bhajan leka rạputʼ gejerokʼa; ar nonka rạpudokʼa, ona reakʼ mitʼ kecakʼ kelhatʼ hõ baṅ ńamokʼa one onate culhạ khon torocʼ se kuń khon dakʼ rakapʼ daṛekokʼ.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Probhu Isor, Israelren uni sonoticʼ do niạ kathae meneda, “Kại khonpe ruạṛlen khan bańcaope ńama, ar pạtiạrre diṛho akaepe tahelen khan do daṛepe ńama.” Menkhan ape do bape rạmjạulena." 
Isaiah30:16 Apepe menkeda, “Baṅ, ale do sadomre decʼkatele dạṛa.” Onate ale do dạdạṛ hoyokʼtalea. Apepe menkeda, “Khacaṛ sadomre decʼkatele calao joṅa. Onate okoe apeko khudạupe onko do coṭkargeko hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah30:17 Mitʼ hoṛ botoraete aperen do hajar hoṛko dạṛa ar mõṛẽ hoṛ botorakote sanamkogepe dạṛ pạnḍuja; onate aperen lạṛhại phạdko do buru cetan reakʼ jhạnḍi chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅ tahentakoa. 
Isaiah30:18 Enhõ Probhu Isor do ape dayawape lạgitʼe koyokʼ horakada; uni do ape mãyãwape lạgitʼe sapṛao akana. Probhu doe dhoromren Isor kana; okoe uni lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akaeko tahen onko doko bhạgangea. 
Isaiah30:19 E Sionren hoṛko, okoe do Jerusalemrepe tahenkan, ape do ar bape raga. Goṛo ńam lạgitʼpe rakʼle khan uni do khạṭigeye dayawapea. Uni do ańjom torageye roṛ ruạṛapea." 
Isaiah30:20 Probhu Isor do thoṛa piṭhạ ar thoṛa dakʼe ematʼpe tahẽkanre hõ, enhõ aperen cecetʼicʼ Probhu Isor do ar bae oko tahena; apeakʼ mẽtʼtege unipe ńelea." 
Isaiah30:21 Etom se kõńe jãhãtegepe calakʼ ape do tayom khon uniyakʼ niạ kathape ańjom ńama, “Niạ kangea hor do; niạ hortege taṛam idipe.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Unre ape do aperen rupạ ar sonatepe muṛạu akatʼko boṅga murhutʼpe bhõnḍ ocokoa; ar mạilạ kicricʼ lekape giḍikakoa arpe mena, “Men nonḍe khon do sạṅgińokʼpe!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Uni dor dakʼe kolapea jemon otre itạpe er daṛeakʼ ar jumi khon oka phosolpe ńam ona do mońj ar purṭhạge hoyokʼa. Enhilokʼ aperen ạsul janwarko do maraṅ maraṅ ạtiń ṭạnḍireko ạtińa. 
Isaiah30:24 Aperen cacas ḍaṅgrako ar gadhako do buluṅ akawatʼ danako joma one oka do haṭakʼ supticʼteko tear akatʼ. 
Isaiah30:25 Enhilokʼ ḍher hoṛko gocʼ ocokʼa ar gaṛko do lạnduṛokʼa unre sanam buru boṭkocʼko khon dakʼko ạtu pheḍokʼa. 
Isaiah30:26 Unre Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoakʼ ghạlkoe bedhaotakoa ar ńẽtʼ ghaokoe bogeytakoa ar enhilokʼ ńindạ cando do siń cando leka marsale emokʼa, ar siń cando reakʼ marsal do eae dobṛa hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah30:27 Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do jolokʼkan edre ar dạriạ dhũạ reakʼ rimilte sạṅgiń khone hijukʼkana; uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do edrete perecʼ ar uniyakʼ alaṅ do jojom seṅgel leka." 
Isaiah30:28 Uniyakʼ sahẽtʼ do tạpiste ạtu hijukʼkan dakʼ leka oka do manwakoakʼ hoṭokʼ hạbicʼ rakabokʼkan. Uni do sanam jạtrenko nonosṭo reakʼ calateye calakoa ar mocare jhinkate maraokʼ secʼe or idikoa. 
Isaiah30:29 Ar ape do sonot porob ńindạpe manaoetʼ lekape sereńa. Ar hoṛko do tinre tiriạwante Probhu Isorakʼ burure rakapʼkate Israel reakʼ asray buru ṭhenko hijukʼa ar unre cetʼleka rạskạ hoyokʼ onkage apeakʼ ontor hõ rạskạkʼtapea. 
Isaiah30:30 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ botoranakʼ kurkurạukʼ, jojom seṅgel reakʼ lepʼ, hoe dakʼ ar arel ńurokʼ hotete acʼakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocokoa ar sạjại reakʼ tiye udukʼakoa." 
Isaiah30:31 Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅte Ạsur doe keklesedokʼa; ar acʼakʼ ṭheṅgate uni do Ạsurrenkoe hạnkoa. 
Isaiah30:32 Probhu Isor do onko sãote lạṛhại jokhecʼ tinre acʼakʼ niṭ akatʼ ṭheṅgate onkoe hạnkoa unre tobla ar peṛesaṅ do banamokʼa. 
Isaiah30:33 Ente jolokʼkan jaega do laharege tear ṭhik akana; ona do raj lạgitʼ sapṛao akana. Ona jaega do khạndri ar osarge benao akana, ar onare seṅgel lạgitʼ ḍher sahanko menakʼa. Probhu Isorakʼ sahẽtʼ do jolokʼkan gondhok ạtukʼ leka onare seṅgele jereda." 
Isaiah31:1 Hae onko do one okoe goṛo ńam lạgitʼ Misorteko calakʼkan! Onko do sadom ar rãt gạḍireko bhorsakʼ kana ar aswarikoakʼ maraṅ daṛe cetanre pạtiạuko dohoyeda, menkhan onko do Israelren uni sonoticʼ secʼ bako beṅgetʼeda ar Probhu Isor ṭhen goṛo bako khojkana." 
Isaiah31:2 Enrehõ uni doe ạkilangea, uni do ghoṭnakoe hoeocoya; acʼakʼ katha do bae ruạṛtaea. Uni do bạṛicʼko upạrte ar onkoren gokʼṛoko upạrteye beredokʼa." 
Isaiah31:3 Misorrenko doko manwa kange, Isor doko baṅ kana; onkoren sadomko hõ jelren kanageko, jiu doko baṅkana. Probhu Isor do tinre acʼakʼ tiye rakabtaea unre gokʼṛoko doko tohodokʼa ar okoe goṛoko ńametʼ tahẽkan onko doko ńurokʼa; ar jotoge mitʼteko marao utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah31:4 Probhu Isor do niạ kathae metadińạ, “Dhạcri kul cetʼleka acʼe gocʼ akade janwar cetanreye gondraokʼkan ar uni upạrte mitʼ dol gukʼpikoko hoholere hõ bae botorokʼkan. Onkage phạdkoren Probhu Isor do lạṛhại lạgitʼ Sion buru ar ona reakʼ usul ṭhạ̃ikoreye pheḍ hijukʼa." 
Isaiah31:5 Manḍraokʼkan cẽṛẽ leka, phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Jerusaleme aḍ bańcaoa. Uni do onae aḍa are rukhiyạya, onae tạnkhiya are bańcaoa." 
Isaiah31:6 E Israelrenko, okoe upạrte nunạkʼpe hulletʼkan uni ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe," 
Isaiah31:7 ente enhilokʼ ape okoe do sona ar rupạren boṅga murhutʼko benaokatepe kại akatʼ, onko dope capatʼ giḍikakoa." 
Isaiah31:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Manwa khonakʼ baṅkan nonkan mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛe reakʼ hạnte Ạsurrenko doko gurokʼa; ar ona tarwaṛege onko doe ńẽtʼkoa. Uniren hoṛko do tarwaṛe samaṅ khonko ńir pharakokʼa ar onkoren juạnko do khaṭao lạgitʼko jormoṭkoa." 
Isaiah31:9 Onkoren raj do botorteye dạṛ pạnḍuja; uniren senaputiko do jhạnḍi ńelte ạḍiko botorokʼa.” Sionre okoeyakʼ seṅgel ar Jerusalemre okoeyakʼ bhaṭa menakʼtae, uni Probhu Isorge niạ katha doe meneda." 
Isaiah32:1 Ńelpe, mitʼṭen raj do dhoromte raje calaoa ar disạm cakʼlaoko do hok reakʼko bicạra." 
Isaiah32:2 Onkoren mimitʼko do birbão hoe khon okokʼ jaega ar hoe dakʼ khon danaṅokʼ jaegako hoyokʼa, ar khaṅgoṭ jaegare do ạtukʼ dakʼ lekako hoyokʼa, ar loraokʼkan disạmre do mitʼṭecʼ dhiri reakʼ umul lekankoge." 
Isaiah32:3 Unre okoeko ńeńel onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do baṅ jạpidokʼtakoa, ar okoeko ańjom onko do ańjomtegeko tahena." 
Isaiah32:4 Ạuṛahakoakʼ mon do bhage bicạre ńamjoṅa, ar thotṛa hoṛ do pusṭạute kathako roṛa." 
Isaiah32:5 Bebujicʼ hoṛ do bhodro bae ńumogokʼa, ar bodmas hoṛ hõ manoticʼ mente ar bae lekhakʼa," 
Isaiah32:6 ente bebujicʼ do bebuj kathageye roṛa ar uniyakʼ mon do dusṭạmiyakʼe ponthaya. Uni do hirkhạwakʼkoe kạmiya ar Probhu Isor reaṅ henosta kathakoe roṛa. Uni doe nonkaea jemon reṅgecʼ edekanicʼ hoṛ do jomakʼ aloe ńam ar tetaṅ edekanicʼ hõ dakʼ aloe ńam. 
Isaiah32:7 Bodmaskoakʼ kạmi do bạṛicʼgetakoa; nacarkoakʼ nehõr hok reakʼ kanrehõ onko do eṛe kathate maraoko lạgitʼ bạṛicʼakʼ phundiko aṭaoa. 
Isaiah32:8 Menkhan bhage hoṛ do bhageakʼe goṭaea ar acʼakʼ bhage kạmirege lạgiạ paṛao akane tahena. 
Isaiah32:9 E nirdạndi tahenkan maejiuko, ińakʼ katha baṛe bataope. E khạtir monan kuṛiko, ińakʼ kathako luturakʼtińpe." 
Isaiah32:10 E khạtir monan kuṛiko, mitʼ bochor khon thoṛa bạ̃ṛti okte hoylen khange ape do botortepe thar tharaokʼa, ente darkha nạ̃ṛĩ do nosṭokʼa, ar ona reakʼ jo bahakʼ okte do ar baṅ hijukʼa." 
Isaiah32:11 E nirdạndi tahenkan maejiuko ar khạtir monan kuṛiko, ape do botortepe thar tharaokʼa; ape do apeakʼ kicricʼko bhạnduṛkate ḍanḍare gõṛẽ kicricʼ paṭhe joṅpe." 
Isaiah32:12 Bhage bhage khet baṛge ar jote perecʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ lạgitʼ apeakʼ koṛam ceṭagtape. 
Isaiah32:13 Jạnum ar rạṅgạinite perecʼ ińren hoṛkoakʼ disạm lạgitʼ koṛam ceṭagtape. Hẽ rạskạ ar hulạste perecʼ oṛakʼ duạr ar andoṛte perecʼ nagraha lạgitʼ koṛam ceṭagtape. 
Isaiah32:14 Tin hạbicʼ cetan khon sonot jiu abore bae dul ocokʼ ar hahaṅkarre bhage jumi ar bhage jumi do bir gajaṛ leka baṅ hoyokʼ, unhạbicʼ gaṛre ar rão rãokʼkan nagrahare do celege bako tahena, ar buru ar pahra buruńj do dander leka hoyokʼa. Ar ona do bir gadhakoakʼ rạskạjoṅ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i ar janwarkoakʼ ạtiń jaegakoge hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah32:15  
Isaiah32:16 Ona tayom hahaṅkarre do hok reakʼ bicạr ar jo bahakʼkan bagwanre do dhoromge girobasokʼa. 
Isaiah32:17 Ar dhorom do suluk reakʼ jo hoyokʼa, ar ona iạte jaejug lạgitʼ khạtirjoma ar bhorsage hijukʼa." 
Isaiah32:18 Ińren hoṛko do sulukte perecʼ jaegare, khạtirjomako tahen jaegare ar nirdạndi tahen jaegare girobas akanko tahena." 
Isaiah32:19 Arelte bir do chaka chunokʼa ar nagraha do otre mitʼ são utạrokʼa. 
Isaiah32:20 Bhạgangeape ape do, one okoe dakʼ aṛe aṛere itạpe eretʼkan ar aperen ḍaṅgra ar gadhako nirdạndi ạtiń lạgitʼpe aṛakʼkako kan." 
Isaiah33:1 E jarkharicʼ, hae am do! Am do bam jarkhar akanre hõm jarkhareda; am do bam pạtiạu ocoakanre hõ am dom bepạtiạu ocoakana. Jarkhar reakʼ kạmi sạtlen khange am dom jarkhar ocokʼa; bepạtiạrtetʼ sạtlen khange am dom bepạtiạr ocokʼa." 
Isaiah33:2 E Probhu Isor, alere dayakʼme; ale do am lạgitʼgele koyokʼ hor akada. Dinạmge setakʼ jokhecʼ ińren hoṛkoren daṛe baṛe hoyokʼme, ar muhinre bańcaoleme." 
Isaiah33:3 Amakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomte hoṛ doko ńir pharakokʼa; amem rakapʼlenre onko doko chirchạturokʼa. 
Isaiah33:4 Pohoko cetʼleka anajko nosṭo cabae, onkage E jarkharicʼ, apeakʼ jinisko hõ luṭokʼtapea. Pohoko cetʼ leka onareko don khadlekʼ onkage hoṛko hõko don khadlekʼa." 
Isaiah33:5 Probhu Isor doe dayawạnicʼ kana! Uni do sermareye tahenkana; Sion do hok reakʼ bicạr ar dhoromteye perecʼ akada. 
Isaiah33:6 Piṛhi cetan piṛhi uni do onkoren rurukhiyạyicʼ, babańcaoicʼ, ạkil ar buj reakʼ daṛe kanae. Probhu Isor botoraege onkoakʼ dhon do." 
Isaiah33:7 Ńelpe, onkoren birbão hoṛko do hor horteko rakʼ baṛaeyeda; sulukokʼ lạgitʼ kol ocoakan paṭhaonako hõ hũk hũkko rakʼeda." 
Isaiah33:8 Ḍaharko do khạligea, cele hoṛ hõ horte bako calakʼ kana. Bondobos do rạputʼ akana; nagrahako do nihạ̃t ocokʼkana ar manwa do cele hõ bako metakokana." 
Isaiah33:9 Disạm do hińjrạukʼ kana ar loraokʼ kana, Lebanon doe lajao ocokʼkana ar tolmojokʼ kana, Saron do hahaṅkar leka hoyakana ar Basan ar Karmel reakʼ dare sakamko do ńur caba akana." 
Isaiah33:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńitokʼ doń teṅgokʼa, ńitokʼ doń usul ocokʼa, ńitokʼ do ińakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼtińa." 
Isaiah33:11 Apeakʼ kukhire do bhusạ gaṛhaokʼa ar busupʼpe janama. Apeakʼ sahẽtʼ do seṅgel leka apegeye jompea. 
Isaiah33:12 Hoṛko do rapakʼakʼ cun dhiri lekako hoyokʼa ar getʼ giticʼakʼ jạnumko lekage onako do seṅgelreko atar giḍi ocokʼa.” 
Isaiah33:13 Okoe sạṅgińre menakʼpe, ape do iń okań ceka akatʼ ona ańjompe; ar okoe sorre menakʼpe ape do ińakʼ daṛe aṅgocpe." 
Isaiah33:14 Sionren kạkạiko do ạḍiko botor akana; Isor baṅ botorae hoṛ doko dhak dhakaokʼ kana. Onkoko meneda, “Abo modren okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do jojomkan seṅgel ṭhene tahẽdaṛekokʼa? Ar okoe do jaejug jolokʼkan seṅgel sãoteye tahẽdaṛeakʼa?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Unigeye daṛeakʼa, okoe do dhoromteye colonetʼkan ar hok reakʼkoe roṛetʼkan, ar okoe do julum reakʼ labkoe hirkhạwakʼ kan ar ghus hatao khon pharakreye tahenkan, okoe hoṛ do khũn reakʼ alo ańjom lạgitʼ luture tubetʼetʼtae ar bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi ńel khon mẽtʼe jạpitʼkatae kan." 
Isaiah33:16 Uni hoṛ do khạtirjomae girobasokʼa ar uniyakʼ asray do buru reakʼ gaṛkoge hoyokʼa. Uni do jomakʼe emocokʼa ar dakʼ hõ khạṭigeye ńama. 
Isaiah33:17 Amakʼ mẽtʼ do raje ńelea uniyakʼ mońj rupre, manḍerte phaelao akan disạmgeye ạribạndhiya." 
Isaiah33:18 Amakʼ hudisre do lahateakʼ ona heṛan botoranakʼ kathage tahena. Amem hudisokʼa, “Okare menaea uni ṭaka lekhayicʼ do? Ar okare menaea uni hoṛ, okoe do khajnae uṭhạuetʼ? Ar okare menaea uni bhuruńj lekhayicʼ hoṛ do?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Uni bạḍạite perecʼ hoṛ do ar bam ńelea; ar ạ̃nạ̃ṛi pạrsian hoṛ hõ bam ńelkoa, one onkoakʼ hahaṛa kathako do baṅ bujhạukʼ." 
Isaiah33:20 Aboakʼ sanam porob reakʼ nagraha Sion secʼ beṅgedme. Amakʼ mẽtʼkin do Jerusaleme ńela, nirạite tahen jaega ar baṅ ocogokʼ tạmbuge. Ona reakʼ khunṭiko do tishõ baṅ or todokʼa ar ona reakʼ baber hõ baṅ topagokʼa." 
Isaiah33:21 Onḍe daṛean Probhu Isor do aboakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼe tahena. Onḍe do osar osar gaḍa ar nalako tahena. Onḍe do lạukạ hõ baṅ calakʼa; ar jãhãn daṛeanakʼ jahaj hõ ona cetante baṅ calakʼa. 
Isaiah33:22 Probhu Isorge aboren hokren bikʼcạricʼ ar aboren cakʼlaoyicʼ do; Probhu Isorge aboren raj, unige abo doe rukhiyạbona." 
Isaiah33:23 Amakʼ ṭakʼnao baberko do ḍhil akantama; onare badam khunṭi do kajakte baṅ aṭkao akana, ar badam hõ baṅ pasnao akana. Unre ạḍi utạr jinisko hạṭińokʼa; ar leḍhako hõ luṭakʼ jinisko idi joṅa." 
Isaiah33:24 Sionre girobasokʼ hoṛko do okoehõ bako mena, “Iń doń ruạkʼ kana.” Ar onḍe okoeko girobasokʼ onkoakʼ kại do ikạkʼtakoa." 
Isaiah34:1 E jạtrenko, hecʼ sorokʼpe, ar ańjompe; E hoṛko, luturakʼpe. Dhạrti ar onaren sanam hoṛko ańjompe; prithimi ar ona reakʼ hasa khon benao akan hoṛko ańjomma." 
Isaiah34:2 Sanam jạtrenko cetanrege Probhu Isor doe edre akana; onkoren sanam lạṛhại phạdko cetanre uni do ạḍiye edre akana. Uni doe marao utạrkoa, onko do jarkharakʼ tireye jimạkoa." 
Isaiah34:3 Onkoren gocʼ hoṛko do bahreteye capatʼ giḍikakoa. Onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko reakʼ sea sĩṛĩcʼ so do ghãṛã ghạ̃ṛĩ rakabokʼa ar onkoakʼ mãyãmte buru-boṭkocʼ do ạrupʼ pheḍokʼa. 
Isaiah34:4 Sermaren siń cando, ńindạ cando ar ipilko doko marao utạrokʼa ar serma do kagoc leka lạṭumokʼa. Cetʼleka darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa jo dare khon rohoṛ sakamko ńurokʼ onkage sanam ipilkoko ńurokʼa." 
Isaiah34:5 Ińakʼ tarwaṛe do sermare ńu rosao akana, ńelpe, bikʼcạr lạgitʼ ona do Edom cetanre, metakʼme okoeko hoṛ do jarkharokʼ lạgitʼ iń dohoakatʼko onko cetanre pheḍ hijukʼa." 
Isaiah34:6 Probhu Isorakʼ tarwaṛe do mãyãmte ńũ turetʼ akana; ona do itilte tol akana. Ona mãyãm do bhiḍi hoponko ar merom hoponkoakʼ mãyã leka ar itil do bheḍakoakʼ kunḍi reakʼ itil lekage, ente Probhu Isor do Bosrare mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porobe hoeocoya ar Edomre do ạḍi utạr hoṛko gur ocokʼa." 
Isaiah34:7 Onko sãote do bir ḍạṅgrako, sanḍ ḍaṅgrako ar juạn ḍaṅgrako hõko gurkoa. Onkoakʼ disạm do mãyãmte ńũ bulokʼa, ar itilte dhuṛi do poṭomokʼa." 
Isaiah34:8 Niạko hoyokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do hala hạli reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ din menakʼtaea, Sion secʼ khon sạjại emokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ oktege menakʼa." 
Isaiah34:9 Edom reakʼ ạtukʼ dakʼ do alkatra leka hoyokʼa, ona reakʼ dhuṛiko do gondhok leka, onate disạm reakʼ ot do jolokʼkan alkatra lekage hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah34:10 Siń ar ńindạ tishõ ona do baṅ ĩṛĩjokʼa; jaejug ona reakʼ dhũạ do coṭte rakabokʼa. Piṛhike piṛhi ona do khạli akaege tahena; ona talate tishõ okoege bako senokʼa. 
Isaiah34:11 Pajhaṛ ar jhĩk do onako dokhola, Dundu ar kạhũko do onḍeko ḍerakʼa. Probhu Isor do ạlmạl reakʼ jokha babere tija ar onaren napṛakʼko upạrte gulmal reakʼ sạhul babere pheḍa." 
Isaiah34:12 Rajosṭi calao lạgitʼ cele rajge onḍe do bako tahena. Ar onaren sanam mukhiyạko doko maraokʼa. 
Isaiah34:13 Ona doṅgolre do jạnum jhonḍako hara rakapʼa, seṅgel siń ar rạigạini do ona reakʼ gaṛkore. Ona disạm do toyokoakʼ dander ar ũṭ cẽṛẽkoakʼ tahen jaega hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah34:14 Hahaṅkarren janwarko do toyo sãoteko tahena ar bir meromko do ako akoko hohojoṅa. Onḍe do ńindạ dãṛãn bhutko girobasokʼa; ar jirạukʼ jaegako ńam baṛaea. 
Isaiah34:15 Dundu do onḍe tukại benaojoṅa are beleya, inạ tayom uni doe obora are hoponkoa ar mitʼ ṭhene jarwakoa ar acʼakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ umulreye guṅgutʼkoa." 
Isaiah34:16 Ape do Probhu Isorakʼ puthire ḍunḍhạupe ar paṛhaokate ńelpe. Onḍe ol menakʼa, noko do mitʼṭen hõ bako adokʼa; ar cele hõ bin juri do bae tahena; ente ińakʼ mocate Probhu Isor doe hukum akada, ar uniren Jiu doe mitʼ ṭhene jarwakoa." 
Isaiah34:17 Uni do gulibãṭkate ar jokha baberte soṅkate ona jaegae hạṭińakoa. Ar ona do jaejug onkoakʼge tahena; ar piṛhike piṛhi onko do onḍeko girobasokʼa. 
Isaiah35:1 Hahaṅkar jaega ar khaṅgoṭ disạm do rạskạkʼa; khaṅkar ot do hulạsokʼa ar jo bahakʼa. Sạpin leka asecʼ tasecʼ bahakʼa; khaṅgoṭ ot do rạskạkʼa are hulạsokʼa. Uni do Lebanon reakʼ ṭhonoke emocokʼa, uni do Karmel ar Saron reakʼ mạhimako emaea; ar hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokko ńela, aboren Isorakʼ mạhimage." 
Isaiah35:2  
Isaiah35:3 Lebṛecʼ ti do keṭecʼ ocoytape; ar lakaṛ lukuṛ gunṭhi hõ kajaktape. 
Isaiah35:4 Ḍurukiạ monanko metakope, “Ape do daṛeanko hoyokʼpe, ar alope botorokʼa. Aperen Isor doe hijukʼa, uni do halahạli ar sạjại emokʼ lạgitʼgeye hijukʼa; ar hecʼkateye bańcaopea.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Unre kãṛãkoakʼ mẽtʼ do saṛokʼtakoa, ar kala hoṛkoakʼ lutur do jhijokʼtakoa." 
Isaiah35:6 Unre leḍhako do jel hopon lekako don baṛaea, guṅgạ hoṛkoakʼ alaṅ do rạskạteye andoṛa, hahaṅkarre do dakʼ bhumbukokʼa. Ar khaṅkar jaegakore do gaḍa dakʼ ạtukʼa." 
Isaiah35:7 Rohoṛ ṭhon ṭhon jumi do pukriko hoyokʼa, ar tetaṅokʼkan ot do dakʼ reakʼ jharnakoge; ar toyoko tahenkan jaega do dalahe, chuci ar pạṭiolge janamokʼa." 
Isaiah35:8 Onḍe do ḍahar hoyokʼa, hẽ onḍe do mitʼṭecʼ horge hoyokʼa; ona do sonotakʼ horko metakʼa. Be sapha hoṛ do ona cetante bae taṛama; ona do sonot hoṛkoakʼ horge hoyokʼa. Lelha hoṛko hõ ona horte do bako calakʼa," 
Isaiah35:9 Onḍe do cele dhạcri kul hõ bako tahena, cele kaṭaha janwarko hõ ona horte do bako calakʼa; ar onko do onḍe ńelhõ bako ńelokʼ, menkhan eken chakʼḍao ńam hoṛge ona horteko taṛama," 
Isaiah35:10 Probhu Isorren chaḍao hoṛ doko ruạṛ hijukʼa. Onko do rạskạ sereń sereńte Sionteko bolokʼa; onkoakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ mukuṭ do jaejug reakʼ rạskạge hoyokʼtakoa. Onko do kusi ar rạskạte onako ńama, unre duk ar kũhrạukʼ dokin dạṛjoṅa." 
Isaiah36:1 Hiskiạ raje rajokʼ gelponakʼ bochorre Ạsurren raj Senakerib do Jihudạ reakʼ pạcrite esetʼ sanam nagrahakoe akromonketʼte onakoe dokholana. 
Isaiah36:2 Ona tayom Ạsurren raj do Rabsake sãote mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ utạr lạṛhại phạdkoe soṅgeadete Lakis khon Jerusalemren raj Hiskiạ ṭhene kolkedea. Rabsake do senkate kicricʼ sobotʼkoakʼ ṭạnḍi reakʼ ḍahar aṛe usul jaega reakʼ pukhri sãote joṛao akatʼ dakʼ nala ṭhene teṅgoyena. 
Isaiah36:3 Unre raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạ Hilkiạren hopon Eliakim, rajren olokʼicʼ Sibna ar Itihãs olokʼicʼ Asaphren hopon Joa do oḍokente uni ṭhenko senena." 
Isaiah36:4 Rabsake do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Hiskiạ do noa kathape metaea, maharaj, metakʼme Ạsurren raje meneda, ‘am do cetʼ cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ińiń meneda amakʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼ bud ar daṛe reakʼ katha do ạuṛiyakʼgetama. Ma lạiyạńme, okoe cetanrem bhorsakʼkante iń upạrtem huhul kana?" 
Isaiah36:6 Am dom loṭocʼ, pạṭiol ṭheṅga, metakʼme Misor cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana. Okoe ona pạṭiol ṭheṅga cetanreye bhorsakʼkan uni do ti pạṭi tabokʼtaea. Misorren raj Pharao cetanre okoeye bhorsakʼ uni cetanre hõ onkage hoyokʼa.’" 
Isaiah36:7 Arpe mitạń khan aleren Probhu Isor cetanrele bhorsa akana, enḍekhan uni do cetʼ uni Isor doe baṅkana one uniyakʼ than boṭkocʼko ar pinḍko Hiskiạ doe marao giḍiakatʼtae, ar one uni do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoe metako kan niạ pinḍrege sewae hoyokʼtakoa mente?" 
Isaiah36:8 “Iń hũyạte aperen raj arhõ metaepe, ‘daṛeakʼ khanem ińren kisạ̃ṛ Ạsurren raj sãote bạji dohoyme, iń do bar hajar sadomkoń emapea ar onko lạgitʼ ape do aswariko ńamkope." 
Isaiah36:9 Ar ona hõ bam daṛeakʼ khan ińren kisạ̃ṛren huḍiń utạricʼ subedar do cekatem tạkicʼ daram daṛekea, ente am do Misor reakʼ rãt gạḍi ar aswariko cetanrem bhorsakʼ kana?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ona chaḍa iń do cetʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen khon begor hukum hataokate niạ jaega akromon lạgitʼ iń rakapʼ hecʼakana? Niạ disạm upạrte lạṛhạikate ona marao lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do acʼge ińe menakawạdińa.’ ” 
Isaiah36:11 Unre Eliakim, Sibna ar Joa do Rabsakiko metadea, “Amren golamko ṭhen dayakate Arami pạrsite katha roṛme, ente ale do onale bujhạu daṛeakʼa. Pạcri cetanren hoṛko samaṅre Ibri pạrsite do alom metalea.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Menkhan Rabsake doe menkeda, “Ińren kisạ̃ṛ do cetʼ eken aperen kisạ̃ṛ ar ape ṭhen niạko katha lại lạgitʼe kol akadińạ? Pạcri cetanre duṛupʼ akan noko hoṛko, okoe ape leka akoakʼ icʼ ar putu jojom hoyokʼtako onko ṭhen hõ cetʼ bae kol akadińa?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Ona tayom Rabsake do teṅgoyente ãṭ aṛaṅte Ibri pạrsiteye menkeda, “Ape do maraṅ rajakʼ, metakʼme Asurren rajakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Isaiah36:14 Raje meneda, Hiskiạ do alo jemone eṛepe. Ente uni do bae rukhiyạ daṛeapea." 
Isaiah36:15 Hiskiạ do nonka menkate Probhu Isorre aloe bhorsa ocope ma enkathae, ‘Probhu Isor do khạṭige apeye bańcaopea; ar niạ nagraha do Ạsurren rajakʼ tire bae jimạyea.”" 
Isaiah36:16 “Hiskiạwakʼ katha do alope ańjoma. Ạsurren raje meneda, ‘iń tulucʼ sulukokʼpe ar iń ṭhen oḍok hijukʼpe. Enḍekhan ape do apan ạpin darkha bagwan reakʼ jo ar apan ạpin loa dare reakʼ jope joma ar apnarakʼ kuń khon dakʼpe ńũiya." 
Isaiah36:17 Ona tayom iń do hecʼkate apeakʼ disạm leka ar mitʼ disạmteń idipea. Ona disạm do anaj ar nãwã darkha rasa reakʼ disạm, piṭhạ ar darkha bagwan reakʼ disạmtege." 
Isaiah36:18 Hiskiạ do aloe ạnḍicʼpe ma oneye metape, Probhu Isorgeye rukhiyạbona. Jạt jạtkoren jãhãe debotage cetʼ Ạsur rajakʼ ti khon acʼakʼ disạme rukhiyạ daṛeakada?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamat ar Arphadren debotako doko okayena? Ar Sepharwayimren debotako hõko okaeyen? Onko do cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon Samariạko rukhiyạ daṛe akawada? 
Isaiah36:20 Niạko disạmren sanam debotako hõ cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon apnarakʼ disạmko rukhiyạ daṛeakawada? Enḍekhan Probhu Isor do cetʼ ińakʼ ti khon Jerusaleme rukhiyại daṛeakʼa?’ ” 
Isaiah36:21 Menkhan hoṛko do hapegeko tahẽyena, cetʼge bako roṛ ruạṛleda, ente Hiskiạ raj do jãhãnakʼ roṛ ruạṛ lạgitʼe baronletʼkoa." 
Isaiah36:22 Inạ tayom raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạko do Hiskiạren hopon Eliakim, rajren olokʼicʼ Sibna ar Itihãs olokʼicʼ Asaphren hopon Joa do akoakʼ kicricʼko oṛecʼketʼte Hiskiạ raj ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena ar Rabsake cetʼkoe roṛketʼ ona jotowakʼko lạiyadea." 
Isaiah37:1 Hiskiạ raj do niạ kathae ańjomketʼ khan acʼakʼ kicricʼe oṛecʼketʼtaete gõṛẽ kicricʼe horokʼkeda ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteye boloyena. 
Isaiah37:2 Uni do raj oṛakʼren mukhiyạ Eliạkim, rajren olokʼ icʼ Sibna, naekeko ar mukhiyạko gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ akatʼge Amasren hopon Jesaea nạbi ṭhene kolkatʼkoa." 
Isaiah37:3 Onko do Jesaeako metadea, “Hiskiạ do nonkae meneda, teheńakʼ din do gạr, ar nisṛạu ar opoman reakʼ din kana. Ale do gidrạkole janamko leka dosa hoyakantalea menkhan onko janamko reakʼ daṛege bạnukʼtalea." 
Isaiah37:4 Ạsurren raj do jiwetʼ Isor nisṛạue lạgitʼ Rabsakeye kolakadea, menkhan amren Probhu Isor do hoedaṛeakʼa onako sanamakʼ katha ańjomkate uniye sạjạiyea. Onate am do onko lạgitʼ koeme one okoe ńit hạbicʼ jiwetʼ menakʼko.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Hiskiạ rajren kạmiyạko do tinre Jesaea ṭhenko hecʼena," 
Isaiah37:6 Unre Jesaea do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Aperen kisạ̃ṛpe metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘okaṭakʼem ańjomakatʼ, metakʼme Ạsur rajren gutiko iń upạrte oka henosta kathako roṛ akatʼ onate am do alom botorokʼa." 
Isaiah37:7 Ańjompe, iń do unire mitʼṭecʼ jiuiń kolea ar onate uni do mitʼṭecʼ sombate ańjoma ar acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calakʼa, ar iń do onḍege tarwaṛeteń makʼ gojea.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Rabsake doe ańjomkeda, Ạsurren raj do Lakis bạgikate Libna upạrteye lạṛhại kana. Ona iạte uni hõ onḍeye calaoena." 
Isaiah37:9 Ạsurren raj Senakerib doe ańjomkeda, Kus disạmren Tirhak raj do acʼ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼakana. Uni do niạ kathae ańjomketʼ khan Hiskiạ ṭhen goḍetkoe kolketʼkoa. Uni do onkoe metatʼkoa," 
Isaiah37:10 “Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ nonka metaepe, ‘okoe cetanrem bhorsakʼkan uni Isor doe meneda, Ạsurren rajakʼ tire Jerusalem do baṅ soprotokʼa. Uniyakʼ ona eṛe kathate am do alom bulạu ocokʼa." 
Isaiah37:11 Ńelme, Ạsurren raj do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạmko cetʼlekae marao giḍiyakatʼ ona do khạṭigem ańjom akada; enḍekhan cekate am dom hudiseda onam rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ińren hapṛamko do okoe jạtren hoṛko marao giḍiletʼko onkoren debotako, metakʼme Gosan, Haran, Reseph ar Telasarreko girobasokʼ kan Edonren debotako do cetʼ onkoko rukhiyạ daṛeatʼko tahẽkana?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamatren raj, Arpadren raj, Sepharwayim nagraharen raj ar Hena ar Ibahren raj doko okayena?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Hiskiạ do pathaonakoakʼ ti khon ciṭhi hataokateye paṛhaokeda. Ona tayom uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokate Probhu Isor samaṅre ciṭhiye samaṅkeda. 
Isaiah37:15 Hiskiạ do Probhu Isor ṭhen noae koekeda," 
Isaiah37:16 “E Probhu Israelkoren raj, am do Kerubkin talarem tahẽnkana, ar am eskarge dhạrtiren sanamakʼ rajosṭiren Isor kanam. Am do serma ar otem benao akada" 
Isaiah37:17 E Probhu Isor, luturakʼ tińme baṛe; ar amakʼ mẽtʼ beṅgedtam, ńelme; Senakerib do jiwetʼ Isor henostawae lạgitʼ cetʼko kathae roṛ gotʼakada." 
Isaiah37:18 E Probhu Isor, noa katha do sạrikana, Ạsurren rapajko do onkoakʼ disạmko marao giḍiakada ar onko jạtren hoṛko maraoketʼkote onkoren debota do seṅgelreko khadle giḍikatʼkoa. Onko do Isor doko baṅkana, manwa tite benaoakʼ eken kaṭ ar dhiri kanako; ar ona iạtege onko doko marao giḍi daṛeatʼko tahẽkana." 
Isaiah37:19  
Isaiah37:20 E aleren Probhu Isor, de ńitokʼ Ạsurren rajakʼ ti khon rukhiyạleme, jemon dhạrtiren sanam rajosṭirenko baḍae daṛeakʼ, am eskar kangeam Probhu Isor do.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea do Hiskiạ ṭhen niạ kathae kolkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, Asurren raj Senakerib reaṅ amakʼ koejoṅ do uniye ańjom akada." 
Isaiah37:21 Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea do Hiskiạ ṭhen niạ kathae kolkeda, “Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, Asurren raj Senakerib reaṅ amakʼ koejoṅ do uniye ańjom akada." 
Isaiah37:22 Uni upạrte Probhu Isore meneda, ‘kũạri kuṛi Sion am doko nisṛạumea arko landa-dhutʼama. Jerusalemren hoṛko do am tayomre bohokʼko rukuitakoa." 
Isaiah37:23 Am do okoeyem henosta akadea? Ar okoe upạrte opoman reakʼ kathako dom roṛetʼkana? Am do okoe upạrtem kikiạukʼ kana ar okoe cetantem beṅgetʼ paromeda? Am do Israelren uni sonoticʼ upạrtege noakom nonka akada. 
Isaiah37:24 Amren golamko hotete Probhu Isor dom landa-dhutʼae kana, amakʼ sanam rãt gạḍikoante bururem decʼakana, Lebanon reakʼ usul utạrakʼ cuṛạrem rakapʼ akana, ar ona reakʼ usul usul debdạru ar bhage bhage saro dareko dom makʼ giḍiakada, ar ona reakʼ bir bhitrikorem boloakana," 
Isaiah37:25 Uprikoakʼ jaegare am do kuńem la akada ar onḍenakʼ dakʼem ńũ akada. Amakʼ jaṅgate Misor reakʼ gaḍakom lebetʼ rohoṛakada. 
Isaiah37:26 Am do cetʼ bam ańjomakada, ḍher din laha khonge ona doń niṭakatʼ tahẽkana, ar ḍher din laharege ona reakʼ iń goṭa akatʼ tahẽkana mente? Ńitokʼ do onań hoyocokeda. Onatege pạcrite esetʼ nagrahako do dhiri puńjirem hoyocoakada." 
Isaiah37:27 Onḍenko hoṛ doko nijor akana ar ạḍi bạṛicʼko botor akana arko lajao akana. Onko do khet reakʼ ghãs leka, omon rakapʼ akan hạriạṛ cara leka, chad cetanre janam akan ghãs leka ạuri hara rakabokʼregeko tolmojokʼ kana." 
Isaiah37:28 Menkhan am do okarem tahen kana ar tinrem hijukʼkana arem calakʼkana ar cedakʼ iń upạrtem raṅgaokʼkana onako joto doń baḍaegea. 
Isaiah37:29 Iń upạrtem edre akana ar amakʼ bạḍại reakʼ katha do ińakʼ luturre hecʼakana ar onate iń do mũreń nakolmea ar mocareń jhinmea; ar oka hortem hecʼakan ona hortegeń ruạṛ gotʼkama.’ 
Isaiah37:30 “E Hiskiạ, am lạgitʼ cinhạ do nõkʼõe: nes acʼte oka janamokʼ onape joma, ar kalom ona khon oka janamokʼ onage jompe. Menkhan satom do itạpe era ar phosolpe ira ar darkha bagwan benaokate ona reakʼ jope joma." 
Isaiah37:31 Jihudạ gusṭiren okoeko hoṛ do unhạbicʼ jiwetʼko tahen onko do ar mitʼ dhaoko jo bahakʼa. Dare leka onko do latar secʼko rehedokʼa ar cetan secʼ doko jo bahakʼa. 
Isaiah37:32 Ar sarecʼ hoṛ do Jerusalem khonko oḍokokʼa ar Sion buru khon do rukhiyạko ńamakatʼ mitʼ dol hoṛko hijukʼa. Phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ ãṭ do onageye hoeocoya. 
Isaiah37:33 “Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Ạsurren raj reaṅ niạ kathae meneda, ‘Uni do niạ nagrahate bae bolokʼa se nonḍe do mitʼṭecʼ sar hõ bae aṛaga. Ar ḍhalante niạ samaṅte hõ bae hijukʼa se gherao esetʼkate dejokʼ ar pheḍokʼ lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼge bae benaojoṅa." 
Isaiah37:34 Uni do okaṭakʼ horteye hecʼakan ona hortegeye ruạṛ calakʼa; niạ nagrahare do bae bolokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda. 
Isaiah37:35 Ar ińge ińren guti Dạud lạgitʼ niạ nagrahań esetʼ ạcurkakʼa ariń rukhiyạya.’ ” 
Isaiah37:36 Ona tayom Probhu Isorren goḍet do oḍok senkate Ạsurrenkoakʼ ḍeraren mitʼ lakh irạlgel mõṛẽ hajar hoṛe gocʼketʼkoa. Ar dosar hilokʼ setakʼre hoṛko to tinreko beretʼena unre sanam jaegare eken mạ̃ṛĩko ńelkeda. 
Isaiah37:37 Onate Ạsurren raj Senakerib do acʼren lạṛhại phạdanteye ruạṛ calaoena ar Niniwi nagrahare senkateye tahẽyena. 
Isaiah37:38 Mitʼdin Senakerib do acʼren debota Nisrokakʼ mundilreye dewa sewayetʼkan tahẽkanre uniren hopon Adramelek ar Sareser do onḍe bolokate tarwaṛete unikin gocʼkedea ar Ararat disạmtekin dạṛkeda. Ar uniren hopontetʼ Esarhadon do uni bodolteye rajena. 
Isaiah38:1 Onako dinre Hiskiạ do gujukʼ dạkhile ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana. Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbi do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, amakʼ oṛakʼ duạr sạriạutam, ente am dom gujukʼgea, ar bam bogekʼa.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Onako dinre Hiskiạ do gujukʼ dạkhile ruạ kạhil akan tahẽkana. Unre Amosren hopon Jesaea nạbi do uni ṭhen senkateye menkeda, “Probhu Isore meneda, amakʼ oṛakʼ duạr sạriạutam, ente am dom gujukʼgea, ar bam bogekʼa.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Niạ katha ańjomkate Hiskiạ do bhit secʼ samaṅkate Probhu Isor ṭhen koeketʼteye menkeda," 
Isaiah38:3 “E Probhu Isor, disạime baṛe, am samaṅre oka leka pạtiạrạnicʼ iń tahẽkana ar goṭa ontorte am botoram tulucʼ iń dãṛãnkan tahẽkana ar amakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼkan onageń kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana.” Ar niạ menkate Hiskiạ do hũk hũke rakʼkeda." 
Isaiah38:4 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha do Jesaea ṭhen sodorena," 
Isaiah38:5 “Am do senkate Hiskiạm metaea, amren hapṛam Dạudren Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘amakʼ koejoṅiń ańjom akada ar amakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ iń ńel akada; iń do amakʼ bahaokʼ din arhõ gelmõṛẽ bochor iń jutucʼatʼtama." 
Isaiah38:6 Ạsurren rajakʼ ti khon am ar niạ nagrahań rukhiyạya ar iń do noa nagrahań aḍa. 
Isaiah38:7 “ ‘Ińakʼ katha lekageń kạmikan ona reakʼ cinhạ do noage: 
Isaiah38:8 Ahasakʼ siṛhire siń cando reakʼ umul tinạkʼ dhap laha akan ona umul do gel dhapiń pạc ocoya.’ ” Onatege siń cando sãote umul do arhõ gel dhap pạc ruạṛena. 
Isaiah38:9 Jihudạren Hiskiạ raj do acʼakʼ ruạ khone bogeyen tayom okae olletʼ ona do nonka: 
Isaiah38:10 Ińiń menleda, “Ińakʼ bahaokʼ reakʼ adha dinkorege cetʼ iń do Sheol reakʼ duạrte bolokʼ hoyokʼtińạ? Ar ińakʼ sarecʼ bochorko khon do cetʼ iń eṛe ocokʼa?”" 
Isaiah38:11 Ińiń menleda, “Jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre Probhu Isor do ar bạń ńelea; niạ purire girobasokʼ kan manwako hõ ar bạń ńelkoa." 
Isaiah38:12 Gupikoakʼ tạmbu leka ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ do uṭhạukʼtińạ ar iń khoniń idi ocokʼa. Kicricʼ teteńko leka ińakʼ bahaokʼ dinko doń guṛhe doholeda ar ona khon ńitokʼ dom getʼ chaḍaotińạ. Ar mitʼ dinregem ses utạrińạ. 
Isaiah38:13 Ạuri setagokʼ hạbicʼ goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń doń rakʼkeda. Dhạcri kul leka ińakʼ jaṅkom rạputʼketʼtińạ; ar mitʼ dinrege iń dom ses utạrińạ. 
Isaiah38:14 Bhạluạ ar kõkʼ lekań keco beḍrokʼkan tahẽkana, potam lekań kuku ḍuburetʼ tahẽkana. Coṭ secʼ beṅgetʼ beṅgetʼte ińakʼ mẽtʼ do ṭolmolaokʼ kantiń tahẽkana. E Probhu Isor, iń doń cipạ ocokʼ kana, ińakʼ bhar baṛe hataome." 
Isaiah38:15 “Menkhan iń do cetʼ iń mena? Unige nonkae men akadińa ar acʼge noae nonka akada. Ińakʼ jiwi reakʼ noa jontrona iạte goṭa jion reakʼ sarecʼ bochorkore hape akaniń tahena. 
Isaiah38:16 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ katha ar kạmitege manwa do jiwetʼko tahenkana; niạko talarege ińakʼ jiu do jiwetʼ tahena. Ar ińakʼ hoṛmom ruạṛ kạtińte jiwetʼ iń tahena." 
Isaiah38:17 “Ńelme, ińakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼge niạ bạṛicʼ jontronań jomeda menkhan nosṭokʼ reakʼ khorloṅ khon am do amakʼ dulạṛtem bańcao akadińạ. Ar ińakʼ joto kạikom capatʼ giḍi akada." 
Isaiah38:18 Ente Sheol do bae sarhao daṛeama ar gujukʼ hõ bae õṛhẽ daṛeama. Ar okoe niạ khorloṅteko pheḍ calakʼ onko do amakʼ gokʼakʼ reakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ bako ńel daṛeakʼa. 
Isaiah38:19 Eken jiwetʼkoge, hẽ jiwetʼkoge am doko sarhaomea cetʼleka teheń amiń sarhaoetʼme; apat do acʼren hoponko amakʼ gokʼakʼ reakʼ kathae lạiyako leka." 
Isaiah38:20 Probhu Isor do ińe rukhiyạ akadińạ, onate aboakʼ goṭa jion reakʼ dinko Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre taranakʼ bajna sãote bon sereńa.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Niạ lahare Jesaea doe menleda, “Loa jo reakʼ piṭhạ benaokate uniyakʼ bis phoṛareko thopramae khange uni doe bogekʼa.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Unre Hiskiạ do noa hõe menletʼ tahẽkana, “Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteń sen daṛeakʼ reakʼ cinhạ do cetʼkana?" 
Isaiah39:1 Un jokhecʼ Babel raj Baladanren hopon Merodak Baladan do Hiskiạwakʼ ruạ ar ruạ khon bogekʼ reakʼ khobor ańjomkate uni ṭhen ciṭhi ar sandeskoe kolkeda. 
Isaiah39:2 Hiskiạ do kusite onko goḍetkoe ataṅ aderketʼkoa ar acʼakʼ sanam khajańci oṛakʼ, sona, rupạ, jut so mosola, daman sunumko, khanḍa bhanḍako ar murạikoe udukʼatʼkoa. Hiskiạwakʼ raj oṛakʼre se uniyakʼ rajosṭire nonkan cetʼge baṅ tahẽlena one okaṭakʼ do bae udukʼatʼko." 
Isaiah39:3 Tayomte Jesaea nạbi do Hiskiạ ṭhen senkateye kulikedea, “Onko hoṛko do cetʼko menkeda, ar oka khonko hecʼlena?” Hiskiại menkeda, “Onko do sạṅgiń disạm, Babel khonko hecʼlena.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Nạbi do uniye kulikedea, “Onko do amakʼ raj oṛakʼre cetʼ cetʼko ńelkeda?” Hiskiạ doe menkeda, “Ińakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼge onko doko ńelkeda. Ińakʼ khajańci oṛakʼre nonkan cetʼge bạnukʼa one okaṭakʼ do bạń udukʼ akawatʼko.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Unre Jesaea do Hiskiại metadea, “Phạdkoren Probhu Isor okae menetʼ ona baṛe ańjomme." 
Isaiah39:6 Probhu Isore meneda, nonkan din hijukʼa tinre amakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ jotowakʼ ar amren hapṛamkoko jogao akatʼ jãhãnakʼge teheń hạbicʼ tinạkʼ menakʼ onako jotoge Babelte idi ocokʼa, cetʼge baṅ bạgi oṭokʼa." 
Isaiah39:7 Amren adom bõsko, amren hoponko, okoe dom janam akatʼko onko do Babel rajakʼ oṛakʼre mạ̃yạ̃ṛi akae tahẽkate sapʼ sosor kạmiko kạmiya.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Hiskiại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Probhu Isorakʼ oka katham menketʼ ona do bhagegea.” Uni do niạ kathae menkeda, enteye hudisleda acʼakʼ jion bhor suluk ar nirạiteye tahẽdaṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah40:1 Aperen Isorre meneda, “Ińren hoṛko jiwi raṛecʼ emakope, Jiwi raṛecʼ emakope." 
Isaiah40:2 Jerusalemren hoṛko sãote mạ̃hir salakʼ katha roṛpe, ar onko ṭhen niạ katha lại sodorpe, onkoakʼ duk ar kosṭo do caba akana, onkoakʼ ghạṭko do ikạ akantakoa, onkoakʼ sanam kạiko reakʼ jo do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon purạgeko ńamakada.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Mitʼṭecʼ ãṛaṅ doe hohokana “Hahaṅkarre Probhu Isor reakʼ hor tearkataepe; khaṅkarre aboren Isor lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍahar mitʼsãope. 
Isaiah40:4 Mitʼke mitʼ buru-nala do dhapaokʼa, buru ḍuṅgriko do copodokʼa, harcatʼ hurcutʼakʼ do mitʼsãokʼa, ar khoedakʼ lopakʼakʼ do bilạn ṭạnḍikʼa." 
Isaiah40:5 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokʼ sodorokʼa, ar manwa jạtren sanamko do mitʼte uniko ńela; Probhu Isorge noako katha doe meneda.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Mitʼ hoṛakʼ aṛaṅe meneda, “Hohoeme” Ińiń menkeda, ‘Cetʼ menteń hohoea?” “Manwako do ghãs leka kanako, onkoakʼ ṭhonoktetʼ do ṭạnḍi reakʼ bahako lekage." 
Isaiah40:7 Ghãs do rohoṛokʼa ar baha hõ ńurokʼa, Probhu Isorakʼ sãhetʼ onareye oṅlere. Sạrige manwa do ghãs leka kanako." 
Isaiah40:8 Ghãs do rohoṛokʼa ar baha do ńurokʼa menkhan aboren Probhu Isorakʼ katha do jaejug tahẽ akan tahenkana.” 
Isaiah40:9 E Sion, bhage sombat jạkʼhiricʼ, am do usul burute rakapʼ calakʼme. E Jerusalem, bhage sombat jạkʼhiricʼ, am do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoeme, ar alom botorokʼa; Jihudạ reakʼ nagraharen hoṛko metakom, “Hạni ńelepe aperen Isor!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do daṛe salakʼe hijukʼkana, uniyakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do raje calaoetʼtaea. Ńelpe, kuṛại do uni sãorege menakʼa, ar uniyakʼ hala ruạṛ do uni samaṅrege." 
Isaiah40:11 Uni do gukʼpiko leka acʼren bhiḍikoe gupikoa, bhiḍi hoponkoe hobor samṭaokoa ar hoborkateye idikoa, hopon menakʼkotako eṅga do bại bạiteye sotokʼ idikoa." 
Isaiah40:12 Okoe dakʼko do acʼakʼ loṭteye soṅakada ar sermako do okoe acʼakʼ bitạteye jokha akada? Dhạrti reakʼ dhuṛi do ạṛire okoeye sahopʼ ocoakada ar buru ar ḍuṅgriko hõ okoe tulạteye tulạ akada? 
Isaiah40:13 Probhu Isorren jiu do okoeye calao akadea ar uniren sosolhayicʼ lekate do okoeye solha akadea? 
Isaiah40:14 Buj ńam lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do okoeyakʼ solhae hatao akada, ar ṭhik hor do okoe uniye udukʼ akawadea? Okoe uni do ạkile cetʼ akawadea se buj bicạr reakʼ hore udukʼ akawadea?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ńelpe, boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko do kanḍa reakʼ mitʼ ṭhopʼ dakʼ lekanako; onko do tulạ reakʼ dhuṛi baraggeko lekhakʼ kana. Jalapuri reakʼ ṭạpuko do lemeń dhuṛi lekae tul rakapʼeda." 
Isaiah40:16 Lebanon reakʼ kaṭ do sahan lạgitʼ baṅ kulạukʼa ar onaren janwarko hõ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ bako kulạukʼa. 
Isaiah40:17 Jạt jạtrenko do uni samaṅre cele hõko baṅkana; onko do celege bae moneyetʼkoa; uni ṭhen do ạuṛiyakʼgeko lekhakʼ kana. 
Isaiah40:18 Enḍekhan okoe tulucʼ Isor dope jurikea? Ar cetʼ sãotepe jurikea? 
Isaiah40:19 Kạrigol do chãchre goṛhon muṭhạne duleda; ar sonhar do sonate onae toleda ar ona lạgitʼ rupạ sikṛikoe benaoeda. 
Isaiah40:20 Reṅgecʼ hoṛ do boṅga muṭhạn benao lạgitʼ baṅ seakʼ kaṭgeye bachao joṅa. Oka baṅ ḍikạ ḍaketʼ onkan boṅga muṭhạn benao lạgitʼ uni do gạkhuṛ kạrigolgeye sendrayea. 
Isaiah40:21 Ape do cetʼ bape baḍaea? Ape do cetʼ bape ańjomeda? Pạhil khonge cetʼ onako katha do baṅ lại akawatʼpea? Dhạrti rehedokʼ khonge cetʼ bape bujhạu akada? 
Isaiah40:22 Prithimi cetan reakʼ sermare unige siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼ akana, dhạrtiren hoṛko do sosrocʼ leka kanako. Orwal leka uni do sermae pasnao akada, tahen lạgitʼ tạmbu leka onae ṭaṅgao akada." 
Isaiah40:23 Uni do rapajko cetat hõ bae hoeocoyetʼkoa ar disạm cakʼlaoko hõ ạuṛiyakʼe lekhayetʼkoa. 
Isaiah40:24 Enegeko rohoeyokʼ kana, ar enegeko erogokʼ kana ar enegeko rehedokʼ kana, uni do onko cetanreye oṅeda ar onko doko tolmojokʼ kana; mitʼṭecʼ hoe bharḍo leka uni doe oṭaṅ idiyetʼkoa." 
Isaiah40:25 Uni sonoticʼe meneda, “Okoe tulucʼpe juriyińa? Ar okoe iń soman doe hoyokʼa?”" 
Isaiah40:26 Coṭ secʼ beṅgetʼ rakabpe ar ńelpe; noako do okoeye sirjạu akada? Unige ipilko do mimitʼ mimitʼteye oḍoketʼkoa; unige onko mimitʼko ńutum ńumkateye hohowako kana. Uniyakʼ napṛakʼtetʼ ar maraṅ daṛete onkoren mitʼṭen hõ bako adokʼ kana. 
Isaiah40:27 E Jakob, cedakʼem meneda, E Israel, cedakʼem lạliseda, “Ińakʼ hor do Probhu ṭhen khon danaṅ akana ińakʼ hok reakʼ bicạr ńam lạgitʼ ińren Isor do bae moneyạń kana?”" 
Isaiah40:28 Aben do cetʼ baben baḍaea? Aben do cetʼ baben ańjomakada? Probhu Isor okoe doe jaejugren Isorkan, okoe do dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạko hõe benao akatʼ, uni do bae laṅgakʼa, ar bae nijorokʼa, uniyakʼ ạkil reakʼ khạndritetʼ do celehõ bako jokha daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah40:29 Uni do laṅga akankoe daṛe ocoyetʼkoa ar nijorko do jore emako kana. 
Isaiah40:30 Juạnko hõ laṅga arko thakao cabakʼ kana ar juạn koṛako hõ laṅgateko gujukʼ kana," 
Isaiah40:31 menkhan Probhu Isorre okoe asko dohoyetʼ onko do nãwã daṛeko ńama. Pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ leka onko do phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ hotete coṭteko uḍạukʼa; onko doko dạṛ idiya ar bako laṅgakʼa, taṛamako ar bako nijorokʼa." 
Isaiah41:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko, iń samaṅre thir hape akae tahenpe. E jạt jạtrenko, ape do nãwã daṛepe ńama; ape do hecʼ sorokʼpe ar katha roṛpe. Dela, bicạr lạgitʼ mitʼ sãote bon jarwakʼ ma." 
Isaiah41:2 “Purub secʼren uni do okoeye teṅgo ocokedea, one uni taṛam piche jitge daram edekan? Uni do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko uni ṭhene soprotkoa. Ar ona iạte uni do rapajko jaṅgateye lebetʼ gańjaokoa. Uni do acʼakʼ tarwaṛete dhuṛi lekae hoyocokoa ar uniyakʼ akʼte bhusạ lekae oṭaṅkoa." 
Isaiah41:3 Uni do onkoe khudạu idikoa: ar oka horte tishõ bae senakan ona horte khạtirjomae parom calakʼa. 
Isaiah41:4 Okoe noa doe kạmi akada? Ar okoe hotete niạ kạmi do hoyakana? Piṛhike piṛhi cetʼko hoyokʼ ona do pạhil khon okoeye ṭhik dohoakada? Iń Probhu Isorge pạhil khon minạńa ar ses okteren hoṛko sãote hõń tahena.” 
Isaiah41:5 Probhu Isorakʼ noa kạmi ńelte sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛ do botor caṛhaoakoa ar dhạrti reakʼ ses simạren hoṛ doko thartharaokʼa. Ar hecʼ sorkate mitʼ ṭhenko jarwakʼa; 
Isaiah41:6 onko do ako akoko gopoṛokʼa ar apan ạpin boehako metakoa, “Dil akae tahenpe.”" 
Isaiah41:7 Kạrigol do sonhar dile emaekana; kuṭạsite kuṭạmicʼ do nihại kuṭạmkạnicʼe udgạu edekana. Uni do rasao reakʼ kạmi ńelteye mena, “Bhagege hoyakana. Uni do jạlạite onakoe kajakeda jemon ona alo laṛaokʼ." 
Isaiah41:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Menkhan E ińren guti Israel, ar ińiń bachao akade Jakob, ińren dulạṛicʼ Abrahamren bõs," 
Isaiah41:9 iń do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna khoniń hoho ạguakatʼmea. Ińiń metatʼmea, ‘am do ińren guti kanam,’ iń do amiń bachao akatʼmea, ar bạń dea gidiakatʼmea." 
Isaiah41:10 Onate alom botorạńạ, ente iń do am sãotegeń tahẽnkana; ar alom andesalekʼa, ente iń doń amren Isor kana. Iń doń daṛe ocomea ar khạṭigeń goṛowama ar ińakʼ jit reakʼ jojom titeń sapʼ ṭarhaomea." 
Isaiah41:11 “Okoe am cetanreko raṅgaokʼkan onko do khạṭige lajao arko bemanot ocokʼa. Okoe am upạrteko teṅgonkan onko do cetʼ cinhạge baṅ tahentakoa; onko doko marao utạrokʼa. 
Isaiah41:12 Ar amren bạirikom sendra baṛalekore hõ onko do bam ńamkoa. Okoe am upạrteko lạṛhại onko do cetʼ cinhạge ar baṅ tahentakoa," 
Isaiah41:13 ente iń kangeạń Probhu, amren Isor do: iń do amakʼ jojom tiyiń sapʼ akatʼtama ariń metamkana, alom botorokʼa; iń do amiń goṛowama." 
Isaiah41:14 E am tejo Jakob, alom botorokʼa; ińge amiń goṛowama. Iń Probhu Isor do amren babańcaoicʼ Israelren uni sonoticʼge niạ katha doń meneda." 
Isaiah41:15 Ńelme, nãwã enokʼ paṭageń hoyocomea. Am do burukom en gunḍạea, ar ḍuṅgriko do bhusạ lekam hoeocoya." 
Isaiah41:16 Am do onakom guma ar hoe do onakoe oṭaṅ idia. Menkhan am do Probhu Isor iạtem rạskạkʼa ar Israelren uni sonoticʼ do amren sarhaoanicʼe hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah41:17 “Reṅgecʼ ar nacarko do dakʼ reakʼko ńam baṛayeda, menkhan bako ńameda; tetaṅte alaṅ do sạkitʼ caba akantakoa. Menkhan iń Probhu Isorge onkoń roṛ ruạṛakoa; iń Israelren Isor do onko bạń bạgi giḍikoa." 
Isaiah41:18 Iń do poṭor buru cetante gaḍa dakʼ iń ạtu ocoya, ar buru-nalare do dakʼ reakʼ jharnakoge. Iń do hahaṅkarre pukhriń benaoa, ar rohoṛ otre do bhumbuk iń hoeocoya." 
Isaiah41:19 Hahaṅkarre, debdạru, babla, mehndi ar jạitun darekoń rohoea ar khaṅkarre do saro, tạsur ar jhão darekoge," 
Isaiah41:20 jemon ona ńelte hoṛko baḍae arko bujhạu daṛeakʼ, noa do Probhu Isorakʼ tigeye kạmi akada, Israelren uni sonoticʼge niạkoe nonka akada.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Probhu Isor, metakʼme Jakobren raje meneda, “Apeakʼ mambla samaṅtape, ar sạbudko ạguiytape." 
Isaiah41:22 Onako sạbud ạguiytape ar oka hoyokʼ ona lạiyabonpe. Lahateakʼ ghoṭnako reaṅ lạipe, jemon bon baḍae daṛeakʼ onako reaṅ mucạtʼ do cetʼ hoyokʼa mente; se darakanakʼ reakʼko lạiya bonpe cetʼ cetʼko hoyokʼa mente." 
Isaiah41:23 Tayom daram dinkore cetʼ cetʼko hoyokʼa ona lạiyalepe, jemonle baḍae daṛeakʼ, ape dope debotako kana. Boge ar bạṛicʼ jãhãnakʼge mitʼṭecʼ kạmipe jemon ona ńelte hahaṛa arle botorokʼ." 
Isaiah41:24 Menkhan ape do sạrige cele hõpe baṅkana, ar apeakʼ kạmiko hõ cetatakʼge baṅkana; ar okoe apeye bachaope uni doe hirkhạwạnicʼ kana." 
Isaiah41:25 “Purub secʼren mitʼṭen hoṛ do ińakʼ ńutume lại sodora; uni do utạr secʼ khon hijukʼ lạgitʼ iń uskurede kana, ar uni doe hijukʼkana. Hasa cetʼlekako lebed ar kuṅkạl cetʼleka hasae lebetʼ gańjaoetʼkan onkage uni do disạm cakʼlaokoe lebetʼ gańjaokoa." 
Isaiah41:26 Niạ babotre pạhil khon do okoeye lạileda jemon bon baḍae daṛeke? Se okoe pạhilreye baḍae ocoletʼ bona jemon bon roṛ daṛeke, ‘uni do ṭhik kathae meneda mente? Okoe hõ bako lạiyakada, ar okoe hõ bako baḍae ocoakada, ar okoe hõ katha roṛ do bako ańjomakada." 
Isaiah41:27 Iń do pạhilre Sioniń men akadea ar ńelkom onko doko hecʼakana. Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ bhage sombat emokʼicʼ hoṛiń em akadea. 
Isaiah41:28 Ińiń beṅgetʼ ạcurketʼ khan celege bạń ńamletʼkoa; sopolha emokʼ lạgitʼ onko modre okoehõ bạnukʼkoa, one uniń kulile khan roṛ ruạṛe em daṛeạń." 
Isaiah41:29 Ńelpe, onko jotogeko ạuṛiyakʼgea, onkoakʼ kạmi do cetʼhõ baṅkana. Onkoren dul muṭhạnko do eken hoe baragge.”" 
Isaiah42:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, ińren guti, one uniń goṛowae kan; ariń bachao akade ar one unireń kusi akan. Ińren Jiu do unireń dohoyea ar uni do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ṭhen hok reakʼ bicạre lại jạhira." 
Isaiah42:2 Uni do bae hohoea ar ãṭ aṛaṅte bae roṛa; uni do kulhikore acʼakʼ aṛaṅ hõ bae ańjom ocoytaea. 
Isaiah42:3 Ar talga tạuạkʼ akan chuci do bae rạpuda ar ńũṛũ ńũṛũkʼkan diuhe hõ bae ĩṛĩja. Uni do dhoromte hok reakʼe bicạra. 
Isaiah42:4 Dhạrti reakʼ hok bicạr ạuriye purạu hạbicʼ uni do bae laṅgakʼa se bae talga tạuạgokʼa. Ar jalapuri ḍhipkoren hoṛ do uniyakʼ ạnko ńel hor akaeko tahena.” 
Isaiah42:5 Probhu Isor do serma sirjạukateye bel akada; uni do dhạrti ar onare oka janamokʼ onakoe aṭetʼ akada; uni do onare tahenkan hoṛko sãhetʼe emako kana ar onḍe okoeko dãṛãnkan onko do jiue emakokana. Uniye meneda," 
Isaiah42:6 “Iń Probhu Isorge dhoromreń hohoakatʼmea; iń do amakʼ tiyiń sabtama. Ińgeń rukhiyạmea ar ińren hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobos menkateń dohomea ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko lạgitʼ do marsal lekań hoe ocomea. 
Isaiah42:7 Am do kãṛãkoakʼ mẽtʼem jhicʼ ocoytakoa, ar jelkhanare bondi akanko hõm chaḍaokoa ar okoe ńut reakʼ khạndṛuṅreko doho ocoakan onko dom oḍok ạgukoa." 
Isaiah42:8 “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, ińakʼ ńutum do niạ kangea. Ińakʼ man ar sabasi do eṭakʼ boṅga murhutʼko bạń em ocoakokana." 
Isaiah42:9 Ńelpe, lahateakʼ ghoṭnako do ghoṭao akana ar iń do nãwã ghoṭna reakʼ iń lại sodoreda; ar onako ạuri ghoṭaokʼrege ape ṭhen onań lạiyeda.”" 
Isaiah42:10 E jalapuri cetante dãṛãnkan hoṛko, ar onare menakʼ sanamakʼko, E sạṅgiń disạmko ar onaren girobasokʼko, ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte mitʼṭecʼ nãwã sereń sereńpe, pirthimi reakʼ ses simạna khon uniyakʼ sarhao sereńpe." 
Isaiah42:11 Hahaṅkar ar ona reakʼ nagrahakoren do ãṭteko sarhao sereńma; Kedarre tahenkanko hõko sarhao sereńma, Selaren hoṛko hõ hulạsateko sereńma, buru reakʼ cuṛạ khon hõ rạskạteko sereńma." 
Isaiah42:12 Onko do Probhu Isorko sarhaoema; ar sạṅgiń disạmkoren do uniyakʼ sarhaoko jạhirtaema. 
Isaiah42:13 Mitʼṭen birbão hoṛ leka Probhu Isor doe oḍok hijukʼa; uni do lạṛhại bir leka acʼakʼ tạpise uskurtaea; uni do lạṛhại lạgitʼ ãṭ aṛaṅteye hohoea ar bạiriko cetanreye jitạukʼa. 
Isaiah42:14 “Iń Probhu Isor do ḍher din khoniń hape akana; iń doń thirakan ariń rokao akana. Menkhan ńitokʼ do gidrại janam edekan maejiu lekań kikiạukʼkana, ahkaokʼ kạnạń ar phõ phõń sãhetʼeda." 
Isaiah42:15 Iń do buru boṭkocʼkoń jarkhara ar onḍenakʼ sanam aṛakʼ sakamkoń rohoṛ kạrcuba; ar gaḍako do ghuṭu otiń hoeocoya ar jolako doń ańjetʼ rohoṛa. 
Isaiah42:16 Kãṛãkoń ạyurkoa, ar bako baḍaekan ar ona suṛucʼ horteń idikoa. Ar ńut do onko laha lahateń marsal ocoya ar harcatʼ hurcutʼ hor doń mitʼsão utạra. Iń do niạkoń nonkaea, ar khạṭigeń nonkaea." 
Isaiah42:17 Menkhan okoe goṛhon muṭhạnreko bhorsakʼkan, ar okoe do chãchre dulakʼ boṅga muṭhạnko metakʼkan, ‘apege aleren debota do,’ enḍekhan onko do ạḍi lajaoreń paṛao ocokoa." 
Isaiah42:18 “Ańjompe, E kalako, ar E kãṛãko, ape do beṅgetʼ rakabpe." 
Isaiah42:19 Ińren golam chaḍa ar okoeye kãṛãwa? Ińiń kol akade goḍet leka kala do okoe menaea? Ar iń cetanre bhorsakʼkạnicʼ kãṛã doe okoekana? Probhu Isorren golam leka kãṛã do okoe menaea? 
Isaiah42:20 Am do ḍherem ńel akatʼre hõ bam moneyakʼ kana; ar lutur jhicʼgetamre hõ jãhãnakʼ bam ańjomeda.” 
Isaiah42:21 Probhu Isor doe kusiyena ar acʼakʼ dhorom ńutumte acʼakʼ ạnko maraṅ are ṭhonok ocoakada. 
Isaiah42:22 Menkhan noko hoṛ do jotowakʼge luṭ idi akantakoa, ar jotoge khạndṛuńreko khadle giḍi ocoakana ar jelkhanareko siń doho ocoakana. Onko do recʼ ocoakʼ jinis lekako hoyakana, onko rukhiyạko lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa. Onko do luṭteakʼ malko hoyakana; ar okoege bako meneda, “Onko ruạṛkope.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Ape modre ińakʼ katha ańjomicʼ do okoe menaea? Ar oka okte hijukʼkan ona lạgitʼ ińakʼ katha do okoeye moneyakʼa? 
Isaiah42:24 Jakob do luṭe lạgitʼ okoeye soprot akadea? Ar Israel do luluṭkoakʼ tire okoeye jimạ akadea? Unige cetʼ Probhu Isor doe baṅkana, one uni upạrte bon kại akatʼ? Unkin do uniyakʼ horte calakʼ bạkin khojleda, ar uniyakʼ hukum hõ bạkin manaoleda." 
Isaiah42:25 Onate uni do acʼakʼ jolokʼkan edre ar lạṛhại reakʼ botor do Israel cetanreye dulkeda. Onate seṅgel do beṛhaete jol rakapʼena, enhõ uni do bae bujhạuleda; seṅgel do uniyakʼ hoṛmore lagaoena, enhõ uni do bae moneyada." 
Isaiah43:1 E Jakob, okoe ame sirjạu akatʼme, E Israel, okoe ame benao akatʼme, uni Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ niạ kathae meneda, “Alom botorokʼa, ente am doń chaḍao akatʼmea. Iń do amakʼ ńutum ńumkateń hohoakatʼmea, am dom ińren kana." 
Isaiah43:2 Dakʼ talatem sen paromokʼre hõ iń do am são sãoteń tahena. Ar gaḍako secʼtem calakʼre hõ onako do bako ḍubạmea; ar seṅgel talatem parom calakʼre hõ, am do bam lokʼa; seṅgel lepʼ do bae jharkao daṛeama;" 
Isaiah43:3 ente ińkangeạń amren Probhu, amren babańcaoicʼ Isor, ar Israelren uni sonoticʼ. Iń do amakʼ chaḍao reakʼ dam lekate Misor disạmiń emokʼkana, ar am bodolte do Kus ar Seba disạmge." 
Isaiah43:4 Am bodolte iń do eṭakʼ hoṛkoń emokʼa ar amakʼ jiwi bodolte eṭakʼ jạtrenkoń emokʼa, ente ińakʼ nońjorre am dom damangea arem manotgea, ar iń do amiń dulạṛetʼmea." 
Isaiah43:5 Alom botorokʼa, ente iń do am sãotege minạńa. Purub disạm khon amren bõskoń ạgukoa ar pạchim disạm khon do amiń jarwamea." 
Isaiah43:6 Ar utạr reakʼ disạm doń metaea, ‘onko aṛakʼkako me,’ Ar dạkhin disạm doń metaea, ‘alom aṭkaokoa. Iń do unkiniń metakinạ, ‘aben do sạṅgiń disạm khon ińren hoponko ạguko ben, ar pirthimi reakʼ ses simạna khon ińren hoponerako ạguko ben." 
Isaiah43:7 Ińakʼ ńutumte okoeko hoho ocokʼ, okoe do ińakʼ ṭhonok lạgitʼ iń sirjạu akatʼko, okoe doń gaṛhao akatʼko ariń benao akatʼko, onko mimitʼko ạgukope.’ ”" 
Isaiah43:8 Okoe do mẽtʼ menakʼ tulucʼ hõko kãṛãge ar lutur menakʼ tulucʼ hõ bako ańjom onko doko oḍokʼ hijukʼma. 
Isaiah43:9 Sanam boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko doko jarwa midokʼma ar hoṛko do mitʼ jaegareko hecʼ jarwakʼma. Onko modre ona do okoeko jạhir daṛeakʼa, ar pạhil reakʼko do okoeye udukʼ daṛeabona? Ar onkoakʼ kathako je, sạrikan ona sạbud lạgitʼ onko do akoren gohako ạgukoma jemon onko do ona ańjomkateko mendaṛeakʼ, “Noage sạriyakʼ kana.”" 
Isaiah43:10 Probhu Isor do Israelkoe metakokana, “Apege ińren goha ar ińren bachao akan golam kanape, ar ape jemonpe pạtiạukʼ arpe baḍae daṛeakʼ, iń kangeạń uni do. Iń lahate okoe Isor hõ bako sirjạu akana ar iń tayomte eṭakʼ cele Isor hõ bako tahena." 
Isaiah43:11 Ińge Probhu Isor do, iń chaḍa ar cele babańcaoko hõ bạnukʼkoa." 
Isaiah43:12 Ińiń lại jạhireda, ariń bańcao akatʼpea ariń sodoreda; unre ape talare cele debota hõ bako tahẽkana. Ar niạ reaṅ do apege ińren gohako kanape. Iń Probhu Isorge inạ katha doń meneda; ińkangeạń Probhu do." 
Isaiah43:13 Hẽ, pạhil khon ini kangeạń. Okoege ińakʼ ti khon do ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelena. Ińiń kạmile khan ona do okoe hõ bako bạtil daṛeakʼa.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Probhu Isor, aperen chakʼḍaoicʼ, Israelren uni sonoticʼ do niạ kathae meneda, ‘iń do ape ńutumte Babelte hoṛkoń kolkoa ar sanam huṛkạṛ koń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa; ar Kạldikoakʼ bạḍạiyiń maraotakoa." 
Isaiah43:15 Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, aperen uni sonoticʼ; ińge Israelren sisirjạuicʼ ar aperen raj do.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Probhu Isor do jalapuri talate hore benaoleda, ona khạndri dakʼ talate suṛucʼ horgeye benaoleda." 
Isaiah43:17 Uni do rãt gạḍiko ar daṛean lạṛhại phạdkoe oḍok ạguletʼkoa. Onko do mitʼ domte onḍeko khadlelena, ar baṅgeko rakapʼ daṛeada. Onko do diuhe lekako ĩṛĩcʼena." 
Isaiah43:18 Uni doe meneda, “Lahateakʼ jotowakʼ do alope disạea; sedaeakʼ jãhãnakʼ hõ alope moneyakʼa." 
Isaiah43:19 Ńelpe, iń do mitʼṭecʼ nãwã kạmiń kạmi lạgidokʼ kana. Ona do ńitge ehobokʼa arpe baḍae daṛeakʼa. Iń do hahaṅkar talate horiń benaoa ar khaṅkarre gaḍań ạtu ocoya." 
Isaiah43:20 Bir janwar, toyo ar ũṭ cẽṛẽko do ińko sarhaoińa, ente ińren hoṛko, ińren bachao akan hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ hahaṅkarre dakʼiń jogao akoa ar khaṅkarre do gaḍań hoeocoya." 
Isaiah43:21 Onko hoṛko do iń apnar lạgitʼ iń benao akatʼkoa jemon ińakʼ ṭhonokko sodor daṛeakʼ. 
Isaiah43:22 “Menkhan E Jakob, am do bam hohoakadińạ; E Israel, am do iń iạtem laṅga akana." 
Isaiah43:23 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ iń ṭhen bhiḍi hõ bam ạguakatʼkoa ar amakʼ jãhãnakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ hotete iń do bam manot akadińạ. Iń do am cetanre anaj samaṅokʼakʼ bhar do bạń em akatʼmea; ar kundurukote hõ bạń laṅga ocoakatʼmea. 
Isaiah43:24 Am do jãhãn jut so bocʼ hõ bam kiriń akawạdińa; ar janwar samaṅokʼakʼ itilte bam kusi ocoakadińạ. Ona bodolte am do amakʼ kại reakʼ bojham ladeakawadińa ar amakʼ sanam behokakʼtem laṅga ocokedeńạ. 
Isaiah43:25 “Ińge amakʼ ghạṭkoń meṭao akada; iń do amakʼ kạiko bạń disạ dohoytama. 
Isaiah43:26 Amakʼ bisoeko reaṅ disạ ocoyińme; ar dela hijukʼme, dela ona reaṅ laṅ reṭepeṭelenge, am do apnar secʼ katha roṛme jemon dhoromem ṭarhaokʼ." 
Isaiah43:27 Amren pạhil ạpum doe kạikeda; amren mańjha mańjhi hoṛ do iń reaṅko ghạṭkeda. 
Isaiah43:28 Onate iń do apeakʼ mundilren naekekoń opomankoa ar Jakob do marao ocokʼ lạgitʼ iń soprotea ar Israel do landa-dhutʼicʼ iń hoeocoyea.” 
Isaiah44:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ańjomtińme E ińren guti Jakob, ar amiń bachao akatʼme Israel." 
Isaiah44:2 Probhu Isor, okoe do ame sirjạu akatʼme, okoe do eṅgamakʼ kukhireye gaṛhaoletʼme ar one uniye goṛowam, uni do niạ kathae meneda, ‘E ińren golam Jakob, ar ińiń bachao akawan Jisurun, am do alom botorokʼa;" 
Isaiah44:3 ente tetaṅokʼkan disạmre dakʼ iń dula. Ar amren hoponko cetanre ińren Jiu iń dulea ar amakʼ bõsren hoṛkoń bhorakoa. 
Isaiah44:4 Onko do dakʼ tala reakʼ ghãs lekako sahre rakapʼa, dakʼ nalako aṛere bạisi dareko lekage." 
Isaiah44:5 Mitʼṭen doe mena, uni doe Probhu Isor kana; ar dosaricʼ do Jokob ńutumteye ńumogokʼa, ar eṭagicʼ do acʼakʼ tireye ola, uni doe Probhu Isorren kana, ar Israelakʼ ńutumteye pạrisokʼa.’ ”" 
Isaiah44:6 Probhu Isor, okoe do Israelren raj are babańcaoicʼ kan, okoe doe phạdkoren Probhu Isor kan, uni do niạ kathae meneda, “Ińge pạhilicʼ ar Ińge sesicʼ; iń chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa." 
Isaiah44:7 Iń leka do okoe menakʼkoa? Uni do onae lại jạhirma. Uni doe lại jạhirma are lạiyạńma, sedae reakʼ darakanakʼko do okoeye lại sodorakada; ar cetʼko darakana ona baṛeye lạima." 
Isaiah44:8 Alope botorokʼa ar alope thar tharaokʼa. Iń do cetʼ ḍher laha khonge niạko bạń lại jạhir akawatʼpea? Apege ińren goha do; iń chaḍa cetʼ ar jãhãe Isor menakʼkoa? Baṅa, ar jãhãn asray buru do bạnukʼa; iń do ar celege bạń baḍae akatʼkoa.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Okoe goṛhon muṭhạnko benao onko doko ạuṛiyakʼgea; onkoren damanakʼ jinisko do porhoanakʼ doko baṅkana. Onko muṭhạnko secʼ okoe kathako roṛ onko doko kãṛãgea, cetʼge bako baḍaea; ona iạte onko do lajaoreko paṛaokʼa." 
Isaiah44:10 Nonkanicʼ okoe menaea one goṛhon muṭhạne dul ar ona iạte porho bae asokʼkan? 
Isaiah44:11 Goṛhon muṭhạnre okoe jamaṛ akan menakʼko onko doko lajao ocokʼa; onkoren kạrigolko do manwa chaḍa ar cele hõko baṅkana. Onko sanamkoge mitʼ sãoteko teṅgokʼma; onko doko torasokʼa ar mitʼdomteko lajao ocokʼa. 
Isaiah44:12 Kamar do mitʼṭecʼ ṭeṅgocʼe benaoeda ar koela seṅgelreye dhipạueda. Uni do hạtuṛte muṭhạne emakʼkana, ar ti reakʼ daṛete onae benaoeda. Onate uni do reṅgejea ar daṛe komaokʼtaea; ar dakʼ begor ńũteye jhin jhinạukʼa." 
Isaiah44:13 Chutạr mistri do sutạme ticʼeda ar pensilteye ãk ạcureda; ar hoṛ muṭhạn leka onae muṭhạneda. Onate uni do mitʼṭecʼ mońj manwa rupe hoeocoyeda jemon ona do oṛakʼre dohokʼ. 
Isaiah44:14 Okoe do debdạru dareye makʼeda, ar okoe do tirsạ dare se mitʼṭecʼ elon dareye bachao joṅkana. Uni do bir reakʼ dare sãote onae hara ocowakʼkana, ar baṅkhan debdạru dareye rohoe joṅkana ar serma dakʼ do onae hara ocoyeda." 
Isaiah44:15 Tayomte ona do manwako lạgitʼ sahan hoyokʼkana. Uni do thoṛa hataokateye jorokʼ kana, arhõ onate piṭhạ hõe rapakʼeda, arhõ mitʼṭen deb benaokateye sewawakʼ kana, arhõ goṛhon muṭhạne benaoeda ar ona samaṅreye ombagokʼ kana." 
Isaiah44:16 Ona reakʼ adhate do seṅgele joleda, ona tayom onare acʼakʼ jomakʼe teareda ar jele rapakʼeda ar lacʼ bikʼe jomeda; arhõe jorokʼ orgumteye mena, “Ah! Jorokʼ orguminạń, ar seṅgel reakʼ loloń aṭkarana.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ar sarecʼ hĩste do mitʼṭen debota, metakʼme mitʼṭen goṛhon muṭhạn benaokate otre ombakʼkateye ḍobokʼakʼa are sewawakʼa. Ar uni ṭhen koekateye mena, “Bańcaoińme; am kangeam ińren debota do.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Onko hoṛko do cetʼge bako baḍaea, ar bujhạu hõ bako bujhạua. Arko kãṛãgete bako ńeńela ar monhõ bondgetakote bujhạu hõ bako bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah44:19 Okoe hõ bae hudisokʼkana; ar okoeyakʼ hõ bud ar ạkil baṅ do bạnukʼte oneye men, “Iń do niạ reakʼ mitʼ hĩste seṅgel iń jol akada, ar ona reakʼ koela seṅgelte piṭhạń rapakʼ akada ar jel hõń rapakʼkeda ariń jom biyena. Enḍekhan niạ reakʼ sarecʼ hĩste do cetʼ hirkhạwanakʼ jinisiń benaoa? Kaṭ munḍhạtʼ samaṅre cetʼ iń doń ombagokʼa?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Uni do torocʼ jom lekae kạmiya ar uniyakʼ bạulạha akan mon do bạṛicʼ horteye idiyea. Apnarte uni do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa se bae mena, “Ińakʼ jojomti reakʼ niạ jinis do cetʼ eṛeakʼ baṅkana?”" 
Isaiah44:21 “E Jakob, E Israel, niạko disạ dohoyme, ente am do ińren guti kanam. Iń do amiń sirjạu akatʼmea, amge ińren golam do; E Israel bạń hiṛiń giḍimea." 
Isaiah44:22 Amakʼ ghạṭko do rimil lekań oṭaṅ giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ sanam kạiko do setakʼ reakʼ kuṛhạ lekań sạṅgiń akada. Iń ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼme, ente ińge am doń chaḍao akatʼmea.”" 
Isaiah44:23 E serma, hulạsokʼme, ente Probhu Isorge noae nonka akada. E dhạrti reakʼ khạndriyakʼko, hulạsokʼpe. E bir buru ar onḍenakʼ dareko, ape do rạskạte andoṛpe, ente Probhu Isor do Jakobe chaḍao akadea ar Israel hotete acʼakʼ ṭhonoke sodortaea." 
Isaiah44:24 Amren Probhu Isor, okoe doe amren chakʼḍaoicʼ kan, ar okoe do kukhireye gaṛhaoletʼme uniye meneda, “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do; ińge jotowakʼ iń sirjạuakada. Iń do sermań aṭetʼ akada ar ińge prithimiń pasnao akada." 
Isaiah44:25 Bhonḍ nạbikoakʼ cinhạ doń ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa ar ńeńelko do lelha lekań hoyocokoa. Iń do ạkilankoakʼ ạkiliń ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa ar onkoakʼ bidiyạ doń bebuj ocoya. 
Isaiah44:26 Menkhan iń do ińren gutikoakʼ kathań jo baha ocoya ar ińren goḍetkoakʼ kathań purạua. Iń do Jerusalem reaṅ doń mena, ‘onḍe do hoṛko girobasokʼa,’ ar Jihudạ nagrahako reaṅ doń mena, ‘onako do arhõ teṅgo ruạṛokʼa.’ Ar disạm reakʼ maraokʼ akanakʼko do arhõń teṅgo ruạṛa." 
Isaiah44:27 Athantar dakʼ doń metakʼa, ‘rohoṛokʼme; iń do amakʼ gaḍakoń ańjetʼ ocoya.’" 
Isaiah44:28 Ar Kores reaṅ doń mena, ‘uni do ińren gupiyicʼ kanae; ar iń okań kusiyakʼ ona sanamakʼe kạmiya. Uni do Jerusalem reaṅe mena, ‘arhõ teṅgo ruạṛokʼma,’ ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ reaṅ doe mena, ‘ona reakʼ rehetʼ do bạisạukʼma.”" 
Isaiah45:1 Probhu Isor do acʼren ojokʼ bachao akan hoṛ Kores reaṅe meneda, “Uni samaṅre boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko jaṅga latarko ar rapajko reakʼ paṭheakʼ raṛaetako lạgitʼ iń do uniyakʼ jojomtiyiń sapʼ akatʼtaea. Iń do uni samaṅre silpińkoń jhija jemon duạrko siń alo tahen.”" 
Isaiah45:2 Uni do Korese metaekana, “Am laha lahate senkate burukoń mitʼsãoa; ar pitạl reakʼ silpińkoń rạpuda ar mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ huṛkạṛkoń samakʼ kuṭrạya." 
Isaiah45:3 Iń do ńut jaegare oko danaṅakʼ acel pacel dhonkoń emama, jemonem baḍae daṛeakʼ, iń kangeạń Probhu, Israelren Isor do, one okoe do ńutum ńumkateye hohowamkan."
