Isaiah45:4 Ińren golam Jakob lạgitʼ, ińiń bachao akawan Israel lạgitʼ iń do amakʼ ńutum ńumkateń hohoakatʼmea. Ar iń bam baḍae akadińre hõ amgeń bahna akatʼmea." 
Isaiah45:5 Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, eṭakʼ ar cele hõ bạnukʼkoa; iń chaḍa eṭakʼ Isor do ar bạnuiya. Am bam baḍae akadińre hõ iń doń paṭhe keṭecʼetʼmea," 
Isaiah45:6 Jemon purub khon pạchim secʼren hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼ, iń chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa. Ar iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, eṭagicʼ ar okoehõ bạnugicʼan." 
Isaiah45:7 Ińge marsal ar ńutiń benao akada; ińge bhạlạiyiń ạguiyeda ar ińge ghoṭnań sirjạueda. Iń Probhu Isorge niạkoń nonkayeda. 
Isaiah45:8 “E sermako, de coṭ khon dakʼ jạṛipe; E rimilko dhorom jạṛipe. Ot do jhijokʼte bańcaoe janam ocoyma, ar ot do dhorome sagen ocoyma. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ doń sirjạu akada." 
Isaiah45:9 “Hae uni hoṛ do, okoe do acʼren sisirjạuicʼ sãoteye reṭepeṭekʼ kan. Uni do hasa bhajanko modren chaḍa ar cetʼgeye baṅkana. Jaṭaṅ hasa do cetʼ kuṅkạle kuli daṛekea, ‘cedakʼem sirjạukedińa?’ Amakʼ benaoakʼ jinis do cetʼ ame men daṛeama, ‘am do cetʼ dhej hõ bạnukʼtama?’" 
Isaiah45:10 Hae uni hoṛ, okoe do acʼren apate metae, ‘am do cele jonomen em akadea?’ Se acʼren eṅgate metae, ‘am do cetʼ iạtem bedonokʼ kana?’" 
Isaiah45:11 “Probhu Isor, okoe doe Israelren uni sonoticʼ kan, okoe doe uniren sisirjạukʼ kan, uni do niạ kathae meneda, ‘ape do cetʼ tayom daram ghoṭna reaṅpe kuli akadińạ? Ińren gidrạko se ińakʼ ti reakʼ kạmi reaṅpe hukum akawạdińa?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ińge dhạrti sirjạukate onare manwań sirjạukedea; iń do ińakʼ tite sermań pasnao akada ar sermaren siń cando, ńindạ cando ar ipilkoń benao akatʼkoa." 
Isaiah45:13 Ińakʼ dhoromte Kerosiń uskureya; iń do uniyakʼ sanam horkoń sojheytaea. Uni do ińakʼ nagraha arhõe teṅgo ruạṛa, ińren hoṛko okoe bondi dosare menakʼko onkoe aṛakʼkoa menkhan jãhãn dam se kuṛại lạgitʼ do bae onkaea.’ Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do noa kathageye meneda.”" 
Isaiah45:14 Probhu Isor do Israel jạtrenkoe metakokana, “Misorakʼ hameṭakʼ dhon ar Kusren bạnij beparikoakʼ jinis do am ṭhen hijukʼa. Ar Sabarenko hõ apnartege am ṭhenko hijukʼa; onko do amrenko hoyokʼa ar amko pańjamea. Onko do sikṛikote tol akan dosarege am ṭhenko hijukʼa. Onko do otre ombakʼkate amko ḍobokʼama ar nehõrkateko metama, ‘Isor do khạṭige am sãote menaea. Eken uni eskar kangeae Isor do, uni chaḍa ar cele Isor hõ bạnukʼkoa.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 E Israelren Isor ar babańcaoicʼ, sạrige am do nonkan Isor kanam okoe do danaṅrem tahenkan." 
Isaiah45:16 Ar okoe goṛhon muṭhạnko benaoetʼkan onko do jotoge lajao arko andmandaokʼa; ar mitʼteko akbakaokʼa. 
Isaiah45:17 Menkhan Probhu Isor do jaejug lạgitʼ Israele bańcaoea; am do jaejug hạbicʼ bam lajao ocokʼa ar bam andmandaokʼa. 
Isaiah45:18 Probhu Isor, okoe do sermae sirjạu akatʼ, uni kangeae Isor do; one uni dhạrti do muṭhạne emakawatʼ are benao akatʼ, unige onae bandhoakada. Ar dhạrti do ạlmạl bae benaoleda, bickom girobasokʼ lạgitʼgeye benaokeda. Uni doe meneda, “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, iń chaḍa eṭagicʼ do ar cele hõ bạnuiya." 
Isaiah45:19 Iń do oko danaṅre hõ bạń roṛakada, ńut reakʼ disạmre hõ bạń roṛakada. Ar Jakobren bõsko hõ bạń men akawatʼkoa,, ‘ape do ạuṛiyakʼgepe ńam baṛayedińa.’ Iń Probhu Isor do hok reakʼ kathań roṛeda; ar oka sạriạkʼkan onageń lại jạhireda." 
Isaiah45:20 “Jarwakʼpe ar hijukʼpe, ma hecʼ sorokʼpe, E ape boṅgan hoṛ jạtren paskao akanko. Onko do cetʼ hõ bako baḍaea, one okoe do akoakʼ kaṭ reakʼ goṛhon muṭhạnko gokʼ baṛayetʼ. Onko do nonkan debota ṭhenko koejoṅa okoe do bae bańcao daṛeako." 
Isaiah45:21 Dela, mambla samaṅtape, dạkhiltape; ar mitʼsãote sopolhaepe. Niạ ghoṭna hoyokʼ ona do laha khon okoeye men akawatʼpea? Sedaeakʼ ona do lahare okoeye sodor akada? Iń Probhu Isorge cetʼ ona do bạń onka akada? Iń chaḍa ar cele Isorge bạnukʼkoa; iń do dhoromren Isor kạnạń, ar babańcaoicʼ hõ ińge. Iń chaḍa ar cele Isor hõ bạnuiya." 
Isaiah45:22 “E dhạrti reakʼ ses simạnarenko, iń secʼ ruạṛokʼpe ar bańcaokʼpe, ente iń kangeạń Isor do, iń chaḍa ar cele hõ Isor doko baṅkana." 
Isaiah45:23 Iń do ińakʼ ńutumtegeń kiriyạkʼ kana, ińakʼ dhoromte niạ katha doń meneda, ar ona do baṅ bạtilokʼa. Ona katha do hoyokʼkana, iń samaṅre mitʼke mitʼ gunṭhi do ikhṛumokʼa ar mitʼke mitʼ alaṅ do ińregeye kiriyạkʼa." 
Isaiah45:24 Onko do iń reaṅko roṛa, ‘eken Probhu Isorrege dhorom ar daṛe do menakʼa.’ Hoṛko do iń ṭhenko hijukʼa ar okoe ińko edreạń onko doko lajao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah45:25 Ińrege Israelren sanam bõsko do bin dusạn menteko sạbudokʼa ar ińko sarhaoińạ.” 
Isaiah46:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Bel debota doe ombagokʼa ar Nebo debota hõe sombodokʼa; unkinren goṛhon muṭhạnkoakʼ bojha do janwarkore lade idikʼa. Babelrenko okoe do boṅga murhutʼko sewawako kan tahẽkan onko do bojha lekako hoyokʼtakoa, ar laṅga janwarko lạgitʼ hõ bojhako hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah46:2 Unkin debota do mitʼ domtekin sombodokʼa arkin ombakʼ hapekʼa. Unkin do bojha idiko hõ bạkin rukhiyạ daṛeakoa bickom akingekin bondi idi ocokʼa. 
Isaiah46:3 “E Jakob bõsrenko, ar Israel bõsren sarecʼ sanam hoṛko, ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Kukhirepe gaṛhaolen okte khon arpe janamen tayom khon ińge ape doń heo ạguakatʼpea." 
Isaiah46:4 Apeakʼ haṛam pạṛiạ hạbicʼ hõ iń doń ini kangea ar apeakʼ bohokʼ upʼ pạnḍukʼ hạbicʼ hõ apeń ghõṛapea, Ińgeń benao akatʼpea, ar ińgeń heo pea; ińgeń ghõṛapea ariń rukhiyạpea." 
Isaiah46:5 “Ape do okoe sãotepe jurikińạ se okoe tulucʼpe somankińạ? Ar okoe tulucʼpe juriyińte soman bon lekhakʼa? 
Isaiah46:6 Adomko do akoakʼ thạilạkʼ khon sonako upʼ oḍokeda ar tulạte rupạko soṅeda. Ar onakote onko do goṛhon muṭhạn tear lạgitʼ sonharko emako kana; ar tayomte do ona goṛhon muṭhạnko ḍobokʼakʼ kana arko sewawakʼ kana. 
Isaiah46:7 Onko do tarenre ladekateko gokʼ idiyedea; ar uniyakʼ jaegareko dohoyedea ar onḍege uni doe tahenkana. Ar ona jaega khon bae ocogokʼkana. Ar jãhãege uni ṭhene rakʼlere hõ bae roṛ ruạṛeda, ar uniyakʼ duk-kosṭo khon hõ bae rukhiyạ daṛeaekana." 
Isaiah46:8 E kạiyanko, niạ katha disạ dohoype ar moneyakʼpe." 
Isaiah46:9 Sedae reakʼ kathako disạipe. Iń kangeạń Isor do, iń chaḍa eṭakʼ jãhãe ar celege bạnukʼkoa; Iń kangeạń Isor do, Iń leka do ar celege bạnuiya." 
Isaiah46:10 Etohopʼ khonge mucạtʼakʼ koń jạhireda, ar sedae khon oka baṅ hoyakan ona hõń lạiyeda. Ińiń men akada, ińakʼ monsubạ do ṭarhao akaege tahena; ar ińakʼ jotowakʼ monsubạń purạutińạ." 
Isaiah46:11 Ińakʼ monsubạ purạutiń lạgitʼ iń do sạṅgiń disạm khon mitʼṭen hoṛiń hoho ạguiyea; uni do purub disạm khon sendra cẽṛẽ lekae hijukʼa. Ar iń okań menakatʼ ona doń purạugea ar okań goṭa akatʼ ona hõń hoeocoygea. 
Isaiah46:12 E keṭecʼ monan hoṛ, okoe do dhorom khon sạṅgińre menakʼpe, ińakʼ katha ańjomtińpe." 
Isaiah46:13 Ińakʼ dhorom do ape ṭheniń ạguiyeda; sạṅgińre ona do bạnukʼa ar ińakʼ babańcao hõ baṅ bilomokʼa. Iń do Sionre babańcao iń dohoya, Israel lạgitʼ, ińakʼ ṭhonokʼ lạgitʼge.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E kũạri kuṛi Babel, am do dhuṛire duṛupʼme; E Babel am do siṅghạson bạgikate otre duṛupʼme. Ente Kakosiạ ar sukmạr do ar bako metama." 
Isaiah47:2 Jante sabme ar holoṅ ridme ar ṭuṭuri ocogtam. Amakʼ kiricʼ do bulu hạbicʼ rakabtam ar gaḍako taṛam paromme. 
Isaiah47:3 Amakʼ uluṅ do oṭagokʼa ar lajao do ńel ńamokʼtama. Iń doń hala hạlia, okoeyakʼ nehõr hõ bạń ańjoma.”" 
Isaiah47:4 Aboren babańcaoicʼ do Israelren uni sonoticʼ kanae; uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhuge. 
Isaiah47:5 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Babel, am do duṛupʼ thirkokʼme; ar ńutre bolokʼme. Ente rajosṭikoren rạni do ar bam hoho ocokʼa." 
Isaiah47:6 Ińren hoṛko cetanre ińakʼ edre do caṛhaolentińạ ar ińakʼ sompotti doń bhõnḍ ocoleda. Onko do amakʼ tireń soprotletʼkoa ar am do onko cetanre bam mãyãlena. Ar haṛam hoṛko hõ hamal bojham ladeyatʼko tahẽkana. 
Isaiah47:7 Amem menleda, ‘iń do jaejug hạbicʼ rạniń tahena.’ Menkhan niạko reaṅ am do hudis hõ bam hudisleda, se mucạtʼ jo cetʼ hoyokʼtama mente ona hõ bam hudisleda." 
Isaiah47:8 “Ńitokʼ ańjomme, E suk bhog dulạṛetʼkạnicʼ; am do nirdạndi duṛupʼkate mone monetem meneda, ‘eken ińge minạńa, iń chaḍa do celege bạnukʼkoa. Iń do tishõ bạń rạnḍikʼa se gidrạ atʼko reakʼ dukte bạń dukokʼa.’" 
Isaiah47:9 Menkhan gidrạko adokʼ se amem rạnḍikʼ noa banarge mitʼ dinte mitʼ ripitʼre amre hecʼ paṛaokʼa. Unre amakʼ mantarko ar guniko ḍhergetamre hõ onakin do purạtege amre paṛaokʼa. 
Isaiah47:10 Am do amakʼ ona dusṭami cetanrem bhorsakʼkana arem meneda, ‘celehõ bako ńeńel kana.’ Amakʼ ạkil ar bidiạge am dokin bhaṅgṭao akatʼmea; ente mone monetem meneda, ‘eken iń eskarge minạńa, iń chaḍa ar okoehõ bạnukʼkoa.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Menkhan am do durdosarem paṛaokʼa, ar mantar hotete hõ ona do bam kaṭao daṛeakʼa. Unre muhinrem paṛaokʼa, ar bam ṭarhao daṛeakʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ sorbonas babotre laha khon bam baḍaekan tahẽkan ona do ackage amre hecʼ paṛaokʼa." 
Isaiah47:12 “Am do kuṛi jokhecʼ khon okaṭakʼ mantar ar guni lạgitʼem kurumuṭu ạguakatʼ ona kạmime. Hoedaṛeakʼa ona do ame jo baha ocomea, ar botorem janam ocoketʼge." 
Isaiah47:13 Am okaṭakʼ solham ńamakatʼ ona do ame laṅga ocoakatʼmea. Amren gukʼniko do samaṅ secʼko hijukʼma; ipilko ńelte okoe do cando candoko nạbiyetʼ onko do amre oka paṛao lạgidokʼkan ona khonko rukhiyạmema. 
Isaiah47:14 Onko do bhusạ lekan kanako; cetʼ leka seṅgel do onkoe ḍahaoko. Onko do seṅgel lepʼ khon apnarte bako rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa. Niạ seṅgel lepʼ do aṅgra seṅgel do baṅ kana one duṛupʼkateko jorokʼ daṛeakʼ se marsalko ńam daṛeakʼ. 
Isaiah47:15 Okoeko soṅgetem kurumuṭuletʼ ar juạn jokhecʼ okoeko tulucʼem karbarletʼ onko do onkageko hoyokʼa. Onko mimitʼko do apan ạpin horteko mohnḍa akana; am bańcaome lạgitʼ mitʼ hoṛ hõ bạnukʼkoa.” 
Isaiah48:1 E Jakob bõsrenko, noa ańjompe. Ape okoe do Israelpe ńum ocokʼkan, ape do Jihudạ bõs khonpe hecʼakana, ape do Probhu Isor ńutumtepe kiriyạkʼ kana ar Israelren Isor ṭhenpe koejoṅ kana, menkhan sạri se dhoromte do bape onkayeda." 
Isaiah48:2 Ape do sonot nagraharen hoṛ mentepe ńumogokʼ kana ar Israelren Isor cetanrepe bhorsakʼ kana, one uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhuge." 
Isaiah48:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Oka hoyakan ona do sedaeregeń menleda; ariń baḍae ocoleda ar ińakʼ moca do onae lại jạhirleda. Ona tayom ackageń onkakeda ar ona do hoyena." 
Isaiah48:4 Entepe keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan hoṛkan ona doń baḍaekan tahẽkana; apeakʼ taren reakʼ jel do mẽṛhẽtʼ leka ar cạndi do pitạl leka hoyakantapea. 
Isaiah48:5 Ona iạte sedaerege iń do niạkoń lạileda ar ona hoyokʼ laharege ape ṭheniń lại jạhirleda, jemon bape mendaṛeakʼ, ‘aleren goṛhon muṭhạnko, aleren murhutʼko ar chãchre dul muṭhạnkoge niạ doko hukumakada.’" 
Isaiah48:6 Ape do niạkope ańjomakada; ar noa sanamakʼ secʼpe koyokʼ horakada. Ape do cetʼ ona bape aṅgoca? Ńitokʼ khon iń do nãwã nãwãnakʼkoń ańjom ocopea oka do danaṅ reakʼakʼko kan. 
Isaiah48:7 Sedaere onako do baṅ sirjạu akan tahẽkana, ona do ńitokʼge sirjạu akana; teheń lahare onako do bape ańjomakada. Onatege bape lại daṛeakʼ kana, ‘hẽ, ale do onale baḍaekan tahẽkana.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Ape do ona bape ańjomakada ar bujhạu hõ bape bujhạu daṛeakada; sedae khon apeakʼ lutur hõ baṅ jhicʼ akantape tahẽkana. Enteń baḍaekan tahẽkana ape do bepạtiạr hoṛ kanape mente, ar janam khonge huhulko mentepe ńum ocokʼkana." 
Isaiah48:9 Ińakʼ ńutum iạte ińakʼ edreń bilom ocoyeda; ar ińakʼ sabasi lạgitʼ ona doń sambṛaoa jemon aloń marao giḍipe. 
Isaiah48:10 Ńelpe, seṅgelreń khadlepea, menkhan ape do rupạ leka nirại do bape oḍok hecʼakana; iń do duk reakʼ bhaṭareń biḍạu aṭkar akatʼpea." 
Isaiah48:11 Iń okakoń cekae ona do iń lạgitʼge, eken iń lạgitʼgeń kạmiyeda. Iń do cetʼ ińakʼ ńutumiń besonot ocoytińạ? Ińakʼ sarhao eṭagicʼ do ohoń emlea." 
Isaiah48:12 “E Jakob, E ińiń bachao akawan Israel, aben do ińakʼ katha ańjomben. Iń kangeạń uni do; ińge pạhilicʼ ar ińge sesicʼ." 
Isaiah48:13 Ińakʼ tite pirthimi reakʼ rehetʼ iń bạisạu akada ar jojomtite sermakoń pasnao akada; ar onakoń hohowakʼre mitʼ domte teṅgo godokʼ kana. 
Isaiah48:14 “Ape sanamko jarwa mitʼkate ańjompe. Goṛhon muṭhạnko reaṅ do lahare okoeye lạiyakada? Babel upạrte Probhu Isorren bachao hoṛko do uniyakʼ sanako purạutaea; Probhu Isorakʼ ti do Babelrenko upạrte rakabokʼa. 
Isaiah48:15 Ińge, iń Probhuge kathań roṛ akada; hẽ, ińge uni doń hohoakadea. Iń do uniń ạguiyea ar uni do acʼakʼ kạmireye jo bahakʼa." 
Isaiah48:16 “Ape do iń ṭhen hijukʼte ańjompe. Iń do pạhil khon jãhãnakʼ katha danaṅ dohoy lạgitʼ do bạń roṛ akada; onako katha purạukʼ oktere iń do onḍegeń tahẽkana.” Ńitokʼ Probhu Isor do acʼren Jiu ińre emkateye kol akadińạ. 
Isaiah48:17 Probhu Isor, aperen chakʼḍaoicʼ, Israelren uni sonoticʼ do niạ kathae meneda, “Aperen Probhu Isor doń ińkangea; ar ape bhạlạiype lạgitʼgeń cetʼ apekana. Oka horte calakʼ lek kanpe ona hortegeń ạyuretʼpea." 
Isaiah48:18 Ape do eken ińakʼ hukumpe ańjomletiń khan apeakʼ suluk do gaḍa leka ar dhorom do jalapuriko leka hoyokʼtapea. 
Isaiah48:19 Ona chaḍa aperen bõsko do gitil lekako hoyokʼa ar aperen gidrạko do lemeń gitil leka alekhako hoyokʼa. Onkoakʼ ńutum do iń samaṅ khon tishõ baṅ getʼ giḍikʼtakoa se tis hõ baṅ mohor meṭaokʼa.” 
Isaiah48:20 Ape do Babel khon oḍok calakʼpe, ar Babelrenko khon dạṛ pharakokʼpe. Ar rạskạ reakʼ aṛaṅte lại saḍepe ar noa jạhirpe, “Probhu Isor do acʼren golam Jakobe chaḍao akadea.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Tinre uni do hahaṅkar talateye ạyuretʼko tahẽkana unre onko do tetaṅte bako laṅgalena, ente dhiri khon dakʼe oḍok ocoleda; uni do dhiriye paṛakʼ ocoleda ar ona khon dakʼ oḍoklena." 
Isaiah48:22 Probhu Isore meneda, “Bedhoromko lạgitʼ suluk do bạnukʼa.”" 
Isaiah49:1 E sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe; E sạṅgiń jạtrenko, luturakʼ tińpe. Probhu Isor do kukhi khone ḍakao akadińạ; ar eṅgạńakʼ hoṛmoreń tahẽkan khonge uni do ińakʼ ńutume ńum akatʼtińa." 
Isaiah49:2 Ińakʼ moca do laser tarwaṛe lekae hoyoco akatʼtińạ. Uni do acʼakʼ ti reakʼ umulreye danaṅ akadińạ. Uni do jhak jhak ạ̃pạ̃ṛi lekae benao akadińạ ar acʼakʼ sar ṭhoṅgareye doho akadińạ. 
Isaiah49:3 Uni doe metadińạ, “E Israel, am do ińren golam kanam; am talate iń do ińakʼ ṭhonokiń sodortińạ.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Menkhan ińiń menkeda, “Iń do nahakgeń khaṭao akana; ạuṛiyakʼ ar michạge ińakʼ daṛekoń khoroc akatʼtińạ. Enhõ ińakʼ paona do Probhuakʼ tirege menakʼa, ar ińakʼ kuṛại do Isor ṭhenge." 
Isaiah49:5 Probhu Isor do acʼren golame hoeocoyiń lạgitʼ kukhireye benaoledińạ jemon Jakob do uni ṭheniń ạgu ruạṛe ar Israel do uni ṭhenko jarwakʼ. Iń do Probhu Isor nońjorreń manot ocoakana ar ińren Isor do ińakʼ daṛegeye hoyakana. 
Isaiah49:6 Uniye meneda, “Eken Jakobakʼ bõsrenko bańcaoko lạgitʼ ar Israelren sarecʼ hoṛko ruạṛ ạguko lạgitʼ ińren golamem hoyokʼa ona do baṅa; ente ona do ḍherge komgea. Ona chaḍa iń do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ṭhen hõ marsal lekań hoyocomea jemon am hotete goṭa dhạrtiren hoṛ do kại khon bańcaoko ńam.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Hoṛko okoeko nihạ̃t giḍi akade arko hirkhạwaekan, okoe doe disạm cakʼlaokoren golamkan, uni Israelren sonoticʼ ar chakʼḍaoicʼ do Probhu Isor niạ kathae metaekana, “Rapajko do am ńelteko beredokʼa, ar mukhiyạko do amko ḍobokʼama, ente Probhu Isor do ame bachao akatʼmea; Israelren uni sonoticʼ doe pạtiạranicʼ kana.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Probhu Isor do nonkae meneda, “Bạsutakʼ okterege amiń roṛ ruạṛama ar bańcaokʼ reakʼ dinre amiń goṛowama. Iń do amiń rukhiyạmea ar am hotete hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń dohoya, jemon disạmem teṅgo ruạṛ daṛeakʼ ar ujạṛakʼ jaegakore hoṛko arhõm ạidạri daṛeako." 
Isaiah49:9 Am do bondi akankom metakoa, ‘Dela oḍok hijukʼpe.’ Onko do hoṛ aṛe aṛeteko ạtińa ar poṭor buruko do onkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah49:10 Onko do baṅ reṅgecʼkoa, ar baṅ tetaṅkoa se hahaṅkar reakʼ lolo se siń cando reakʼ jharla jhạrli setoṅ hõ baṅ paṛaoakoa. Onko cetanre okoeye mãyãkʼkan unige hore udukʼakoa ar dakʼ jharna ṭhene ạyur idikoa." 
Isaiah49:11 Ińakʼ sanam buruko do horiń hoeocoya; ar ińakʼ ḍaharko do sạriạukʼa. 
Isaiah49:12 Ńelpe, onko do sạṅgiń khonko hijukʼa; okoe do utạr khon, okoe do pạchim khon ar okoe do Sinim disạm khonko hijukʼa.”" 
Isaiah49:13 E sermako rạskạte sereńpe; E pirthimi, hulạsokʼme; E buru-ḍuṅgriko, hulạsokʼpe; ente Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko jiwi raṛecʼe emakoa ar santao ocokʼkan acʼren hoṛko cetanreye mãyãkʼa." 
Isaiah49:14 Menkhan Sion doe meneda, “Probhu Isor do ińe bạgi giḍi akadińạ, uni doe hiṛińkedeńạ.”" 
Isaiah49:15 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, “Gogo do cetʼ acʼren nunu gidrại hiṛiń daṛekea? Gidrạ janam akadiyicʼ do cetʼ gidrạ cetanre bae mãyãkʼa? Hẽ, Eṅgat do acʼren gidrại hiṛiń daṛekea menkhan iń do tishõ bạń hiṛińmea." 
Isaiah49:16 Ńelme, ińakʼ ti talkare amakʼ ńutumiń ol dohoakatʼa; am beṛhaeteakʼ pạcriko do jaoge iń samaṅre menakʼa." 
Isaiah49:17 Amren hoponko do ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼko usạrayeda ar okoe amko jarkhar akatʼme onko do am khonko calaojoṅa. 
Isaiah49:18 Beṛhaete beṅgetʼ ạcurme; ar ńelme amren hoponko do jarwakate am ṭhenko hijukʼkana. Kiriạkateń metamkana, onko jotoge amakʼ abhran lekako hoyokʼa, bapla bạhu kuṛiyakʼ abhran lekage." 
Isaiah49:19 “Am dom jarkhar akana arem ujạṛakana ar amakʼ disạm do nasao akatʼ disạm leka hoyakanre hõ enhõ okteko hijukʼkana unre amren hoṛko amre jaega do bam em daṛeakoa, ar okoe amko tạhuṛletʼme onko doko sạṅgińokʼa." 
Isaiah49:20 Amren okoeko hoponem atʼletʼko onko do am ṭhen hecʼkateko mena, ‘ale lạgitʼ niạ jaega do huḍińgea; tahen lạgitʼ arho maraṅ jaega emaleme.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Unre am do mone monetem mena, ‘noko do okoeye janam akawạdińa? Iń do hoponkoń atʼletʼkote bạńjhi lekań hoylena; ariń sạṅgiń ocolena; iń doń ńir baṛaekan tahẽkana. Enḍekhan noko do okoeye ạsul haraketʼkoa? Iń ma coṅ eskargeń giḍi ocolen, menkhan noko? Noko do oka khonko hecʼakana?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelme, iń do isạrate eṭakʼ jạtrenkoń hohowakoa ar ińakʼ nisạn iń udukʼakoa. Onate onko do hoborate ińren hoponkoko ạgukoa ar ińren hoponerko doko ghõṛa ạgukoa." 
Isaiah49:23 Rapajko do amko ạsul haramea ar onkoren rạniko do amren bukạ getʼ buḍhiko hoyokʼa. Onko do otre ombakʼkateko ḍobokʼama ar amakʼ jaṅga reakʼ dhuṛiko caṭoga. Unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do; ar okoe ińreko bhorsakʼkan onko do bako lajao ocokʼa.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Daṛean hoṛ ṭhen khon cetʼ luṭ reakʼ jinis dom recʼ daṛeakʼa? Se kumãyãicʼren jhuṭiạuicʼ do cetʼem chaḍao daṛekea? 
Isaiah49:25 Mekhan Probhu Isore meneda, “Hẽ, daṛeanicʼren jhuṭiạuicʼ hõe recʼ idi ocokʼa ar kumãyaicʼren recʼ akawanicʼ hõe chaḍao ocokʼa. Okoe am tulucʼko jhogṛakʼ onko tulucʼ do ińgeń jhogṛakʼa ar amren hoponko do ińgeń rukhiyạkoa." 
Isaiah49:26 Okoe amko santaome onkoakʼ jel do onkogeń jom ocokoa; onko do bubulakʼ leka akoakʼ mãyãmko ńũiya arko bulokʼa. Unre sanam manwako baḍaea, iń Probhu Isorge amren babańcaoicʼ ar chakʼḍaoicʼ, ar Jakobren uni daṛeanicʼ do.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Eṅgamakʼ bapag dolel do okare menakʼa, one okaṭakʼteń bạgikede? Ińren mahajonko modre okoe ṭheniń ạkhriń akatʼpea? Apeakʼ kại iạtege ape dope ạkhriń akana; apeakʼ behokakʼ lạgitʼge aperen eṅgam doe bạgi ocoakana." 
Isaiah50:2 Ińiń hecʼlenre onḍe do cedakʼ okoege bako tahẽkana? Ińiń hoholetʼre goṅeń lạgitʼ do cedakʼ bako tahẽkana. Ape chaḍaope lạgitʼ ińakʼ ti do cetʼ ḍher khaṭogetińa? Ape bańcaope lạgitʼ cetʼ daṛe hõ komaogetińa? Ńelpe dhomoktege jalapuriń ańjetʼ ocoyeda ar gaḍakoń khaṅkhor ocoyeda; onaren hakoko do dakʼ begorteko seakʼ kana ar tetaṅteko gujukʼ kana. 
Isaiah50:3 Serma do kicricʼ leka ńutiń horokʼae kana ar gõṛẽ kicricʼ do ona reakʼ oyonakʼ geń hoeocoyeda.” 
Isaiah50:4 Probhu Isor do sikhnạt reakʼ alaṅgeye em akawadińạ jemon katha hotete laṅga akan hoṛkoń goṛo daṛeako. Uni do dinạm hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼe ebhen edeńkana ar ińakʼ luture cetao ocoyetʼtińạ jemon mitʼṭen cela lekań ańjomtae. 
Isaiah50:5 Probhu Isor do ińakʼ luture jhicʼ akatʼtińạ ar iń doń batao akatʼtaea, ar bạń pạc ruạṛ akana." 
Isaiah50:6 Okoeko daleńkan onko ṭhen ińakʼ dea doń alae akatʼtińạ ar okoe ińakʼ gocoko racakʼ topakʼ akatʼtiń onko do ińakʼ johageń samaṅ akatʼkoa. Ar tinre ińko opoman arko thoạńkan tahẽkana unre ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do bạń betʼ esetʼletʼtińạ. 
Isaiah50:7 Probhu Isore goṛowạńte iń do bạń opomanokʼa. Onate ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do cok moki dhiri lekae hoyocoakatʼtińạ, ariń baḍaea, iń do bạń lajao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah50:8 Okoe bin dusạnicʼ menteye sạbud akadiń uni do sorrege menaea; enḍekhan okoe iń upạrte doe lạlisa? Dela, bon teṅgo ńapamlenge. Ar okoeye dusi akadiń, uni do iń samaṅreye hecʼ sorokʼma." 
Isaiah50:9 Probhu Isor do ińe goṛowạń kana, onate okoeye dusikińạ? Onko sanamkoge kicricʼ lekako mare cabakʼa; ar tejoko do onkoko jomkoa." 
Isaiah50:10 Ape modre okoe Probhu Isore botorae kan, ar uniren gutiyakʼ kathae bataoetʼtaea, ar marsal bạnukʼte ńũtreye taṛametʼkan, uni do Probhu cetanreye pạtiạukʼ ma ar uniren Isor cetanre bhorsa akane tahenma." 
Isaiah50:11 Menkhan ape okoe do seṅgelpe lagaoetʼ ar chechape dugur duguretʼ, ape sanamkoge apeakʼ seṅgel reakʼ marsal ar mosal reakʼ marsalte calakʼpe. Ińakʼ ti khon do, harkhet sasetre giticʼ kunḍlạṅokʼge hoyapea." 
Isaiah51:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ape okoe do dhorompe khudạuetʼkan ar ińakʼ sana leka calakʼpe kurumuṭukan, ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Okaṭakʼ dhiri khonpe makʼ totʼ akan ar oka khạn khonpe la totʼ ocoakan ona baṛe beṅgetʼakʼpe." 
Isaiah51:2 Aperen baba Abraham beṅgetʼaepe ar ape okoeye janam akatʼpe uni Sara hõ beṅgetʼaepe. Iń tinreń hohowade tahẽkana unre uni do mitʼ hoṛgeye tahẽkana, ar uniń bhoradete lekhare aema hoṛiń hoy ocoketʼkoa." 
Isaiah51:3 Sion do khạṭige jiwi raṛecʼ iń emaea ar uniyakʼ sanam jarkharakʼko cetanreń mãyãkʼa; Ona reakʼ hahaṅkar do Eden bagwan lekań hoeocoya ar khaṅgoṭ ot do Probhu Isorakʼ bagwan leka. Onare do hulạs, rạskạ, sarhao ar sereń reakʼ aṛaṅkoge ńamokʼa." 
Isaiah51:4 “E ińren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe, ińakʼ kathako luturakʼpe. Iń khonge hukum do oḍokokʼa; ar ińge dhorom reakʼ bicạriń ṭarhao ocoya jemon jạt jạtrenko hõ marsalko ńam." 
Isaiah51:5 Ińakʼ dhorom do hecʼ sorakana ar ińakʼ babańcao reakʼ kạmi hõ ehopʼakana. Ińge jạt jạtrenko cetanre dhoromiń bicạra. Ar sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko do iń secʼ beṅgetʼ akaeko tahena ar ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ sopo ńel hor akaeko tahena. 
Isaiah51:6 Serma secʼ beṅgetʼ rakabpe ar ot secʼ beṅgetʼ pheḍpe. Serma do dhũạ leka oṭaṅokʼa, ar ot do kicricʼ leka marekʼa ar onare girobasokʼ kan hoṛ doko gujukʼa. Menkhan ińakʼ babańcao do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽakan tahena ar ińakʼ dhorom do tishõ baṅ mạutạkʼa." 
Isaiah51:7 “Ińakʼ ańjomtińpe E ape dhorom bakʼḍaeko one okoeyakʼ monre ińakʼ ạnko menakʼ. Ape do manwakoakʼ henosta kathate alope botorokʼa ar onkoakʼ nindạu kathate hõ alope torasokʼa," 
Isaiah51:8 ente onko do kicricʼ leka jạrnḍi ṭhenko jom ocokʼa ar tejoko ṭhen do bhiḍikoakʼ upʼ lekako jom ocokʼa. Menkhan ińakʼ dhorom do jaejug hạbicʼ tahenkana; ar ińakʼ babańcao do piṛhike piṛhige.” 
Isaiah51:9 E Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti, ma ebhenokʼme, beredokʼme ar amakʼ daṛe baṛe sodortam. Cetʼleka sedae khonem tahẽkan, cetʼleka piṛhike piṛhim beretʼlen onkage baṛe beredokʼme. Amge cetʼ Rahab do bam chaka chunledea? Silodam danob do cetʼ amge bam sobokʼ tapʼledea?" 
Isaiah51:10 Amge cetʼ khạndri jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do bam ańjetʼ ocoleda? Amge cetʼ jalapuri bhitrite hor do bam tearleda one amren chaḍao akan hoṛko taṛam paromlen? 
Isaiah51:11 Probhu Isorren rukhiyạ akan hoṛ doko ruạṛ hijukʼa ar sereń sereńte Sionteko rakapʼa. Ar jaejugakʼ rạskạge onkoakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ mukuṭ do hoyokʼtakoa. Onko do ạḍiko hulạsokʼa ar duk ar kũhrạu do onko khon ńir pharakokʼa. 
Isaiah51:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń kangeạń apeakʼ jiwi rakʼṛecʼicʼ do. Manwa do cedakʼpe botorako kana? Onko doko gujukʼgea. Manwa hopon do ghãs baragge thoṛa okteko tahena." 
Isaiah51:13 Ar ape okoeye sirjạu akatʼpe uni do cedakʼpe hiṛińkedea? Uni do sermae pasnao akada ar dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạu akada. Cikʼpạyicʼakʼ kurkurạukʼ edrete cedakʼ ape do siń sạṭupʼpe torasokʼ kana? Uni cikʼpạyicʼakʼ edre do botoranakʼ cetʼ hõ baṅkana. 
Isaiah51:14 Bondi akanko do usạrageko aṛakʼ ocokʼa. Onko do kạd oṛakʼ reakʼ khạndṛuṅre bako gujukʼa, ar jomakʼte hõ bako ṭonṭakʼa." 
Isaiah51:15 Ińge Probhu, aperen Isor do. One jalapuriń leoḍalere ona do ḍheokote hud hudạukʼkan. Ińakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhuge." 
Isaiah51:16 Ińakʼ kathako do apeakʼ mocareń emakada ar ińakʼ ti reakʼ umulreń danaṅ akatʼpea. Serma do acʼakʼ jaegareń dohoakada ar dhạrti do rehetʼ iń bạisạu akada. Ar Sion doń men akawadea, ‘am dom ińren hoṛ kana.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 E Jerusalem, ebhenokʼme, beredokʼme; ar teṅgonme. Ente am do Probhu Isorakʼ ti khon uniyakʼ edreteakʼ bạṭi khonem ńũ akada; okaṭakʼ bạṭi khon manwa do ńũkateko konḍe manḍekʼ ona bạṭi reakʼ do amgem ńũ ańjetʼakada." 
Isaiah51:18 Ar okoeko hoponem janam akatʼko onko modre hor udukʼako leka do celege bạnukʼkoa; ar okoe hoponkom ạsul hara akatʼko onko modre ti sapʼkate tiyạkʼme leka hõ celege bạnukʼkoa. 
Isaiah51:19 Jarkhar ar dhaṅdhaser, akal ar tarwaṛe noakin banar muhinge amre paṛao akana. Jiwi raṛecʼ do okoeye emdaṛekema? Ar cekate iń hõ jiwi raṛecʼ iń emama?" 
Isaiah51:20 Amren hoponko doko jhin jhinạu akana; onko do kulhi mucạtʼre jhạlire sapʼakan jhaṅkaṛ jel lekako giticʼ akana. Onko cetanre Probhu Isorakʼ edre, amren Isorakʼ sạjại onkore paṛao akana." 
Isaiah51:21 Onate E am nacaricʼ, niạ katha ańjomme. Am dom bul ocoakana, menkhan darkha rasate do baṅa." 
Isaiah51:22 Amren Probhu, amren Isor, okoe do acʼren hoṛko secʼ menae uni do noa kathae meneda, “Ńelme, am oka bạṭi reakʼ ńũkatem konḍe manḍekʼ kan tahẽkan ona do amakʼ ti khoniń hatao akada; ińakʼ edre reakʼ ona bạṭi khon do ar tishõ bam ńũiya." 
Isaiah51:23 Ona bạṭi do amren cikʼpạkankoakʼ tireń jimạya, ar okoe amko metam kan, ‘ma ombagokʼme, jemon am cetanteń taṛam parom daṛeakʼ.’ Am cetante taṛam paromokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ dea do ot ar kulhi lekam hoyocoakada.”" 
Isaiah52:1 E Sion, ebhenokʼme, ar beredokʼme, amakʼ daṛe sodortam. E sonot nagraha Jerusalem, amakʼ ṭhonokʼ reakʼ kicricʼ horogtam. Bin khatna ar bhõnḍ hoṛ do amre ar bako bolo daṛeakʼa." 
Isaiah52:2 E Jerusalem, beredokʼme, ar amakʼ dea khon dhuṛi koṭa ńurhạime ar siṅghạsonre duṛupʼme. E bondi akan Sion kuṛi amakʼ hoṭokʼ reakʼ sikṛiko raṛaetam." 
Isaiah52:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Begor damtem ạkhriń ocolena arhõ begor damtegem chaḍao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah52:4 Sedaere ińren hoṛ do Misorte girobasokʼ lạgitʼko senlena; ar Ạsurrenko do ạuṛiyakʼte onko cetanre julumko calaoleda. 
Isaiah52:5 Ar nonḍe ńitokʼ ińakʼ do cetʼ menakʼtińạ? Ińren hoṛko do ạuṛiyakʼteko idi ocoakana, ar disạm cakʼlaoko do onko cetanreko kạumạueda; ar siń sạṭupʼ ińakʼ ńutumko nindạuetʼ kana." 
Isaiah52:6 Onate ińren hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼ iń doń okoe kana mente; enhilokʼ onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa iń kangeạń roroṛicʼ; hẽ ińgeń roṛleda.” 
Isaiah52:7 Buruko cetanre uniyakʼ jaṅga do heṛan mońj, okoe boge hukigot emokʼ lạgitʼe hijukʼkan, suluke lại jạhiretʼkan ar bhạlại reakʼ sombate ạguiyetʼkan, babańcaoe lại sodoretʼkan ar Sione metaekan, ‘amren Isor doe rajokʼ kana,’" 
Isaiah52:8 Ańjomme, amren pahradarko doko andoṛetʼkana, onko do rạskạte mitʼ domteko sereńeda, ente Probhu Isor do tinre Sionteye ruạṛ hijukʼa unre onko do akoakʼ mẽtʼte onako ńela." 
Isaiah52:9 E Jerusalem reakʼ jarkharakʼko, ãṭ aṛaṅte hulạsate sereńpe, ente Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko jiwi raṛecʼe emakatʼkoa ar Jerusalem doe chaḍao akadea." 
Isaiah52:10 Probhu Isor do sanam jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ sonot tiye sodortaea, ar dhạrti reakʼ sanam jaegaren hoṛko do aboren Isorakʼ babańcao reakʼ kạmiko ńela." 
Isaiah52:11 Ma oḍokokʼpe, men ona jaega khon oḍok hijukʼpe. Ar chutakʼ jãhãn jinisko alope joṭeda. Ape okoe Probhu Isorakʼ bhajankope gokʼ idiyetʼ ape do ona jaega khon oḍok hijukʼpe ar saphakʼpe." 
Isaiah52:12 Menkhan usạrate do alope oḍok hijukʼa se alope dạṛ ạguiya, ente Probhu Isor do ape laha lahateye calakʼa; ar Israelkoren Isorgeye samṭao idipea." 
Isaiah52:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, ińren guti doe jo bahakʼa. Uni doe rakapʼ ocokʼa ar ạḍitetʼe maraṅokʼa." 
Isaiah52:14 Uniyakʼ rup do nunạkʼ bạṛicʼ ocokʼtaea, manwa leka do baṅ tahentaea; ar onate ḍherkoge uni ńelteko ṭhak utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah52:15 Menkhan uni do aema jạtren hoṛkoe saphakoa, ar uni khạtirte rapajko do moca sikubokʼtakoa; ente okaṭakʼ baṅ lại akawatʼko tahẽkan onageko oroma.”" 
Isaiah53:1 Abo emakʼ sombat do okoeye pạtiạu akawada? Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ sopo do okoe ṭhen sodorlena? 
Isaiah53:2 Uni samaṅre bale cara leka uni doe omon rakapʼena ar rohoṛ ot khon rehetʼ poha lekae harayena. Uniyakʼ do nonkan rup se ṭhonok hõ baṅ tahẽkantaea, one onate uni secʼ bon beṅgetʼke; ar cetʼ ḍhob hõ baṅ tahẽkantaea, onate bon hạ̃ske." 
Isaiah53:3 Hoṛko do uniko hirkhạwadea arko nihạ̃tkedea; uni do duk jom ar harkhet saset bakʼḍayicʼgeye tahẽkana. Uni ńelte hoṛko do mẽtʼãhãko bedokʼkan tahẽkana; onko do uniko hirkhạwae kan tahẽkana ar abo hõ babon manotledea. 
Isaiah53:4 Sạrige, uni do aboakʼ sanam dukkoe ladeana ar aboakʼ sasetko hõe gokʼketʼtabona; menkhan abo do bon bujhạukeda Isorge uni doe ńẽtʼkedea, unigeye gocʼkedea ar duke emadea." 
Isaiah53:5 Aboakʼ kại gunạkʼtege uni doe ghạl ocolena; aboakʼ ghạtko iạtege uni doe talga tạuạkʼ ocoyena. Okaṭakʼ sạjại hotete abore suluk hecʼakan ona sạjại do unigeye em ocoyena, ar uniyakʼ dal ur iạte abo do bon bogeyena." 
Isaiah53:6 Abo sanamkoge bhiḍiko leka bon asokʼ ṭayokʼlena; abo mimitʼko do apan ạpin horte bon mohnḍalena. menkhan Probhu Isor do aboakʼ sanam ghạṭko acʼreye ladeyana. 
Isaiah53:7 Uni doe santao ocoyena ar duke jomkeda, menkhan enhõ acʼakʼ moca do bae jhicʼletʼtaea; uni do mage lạgidokʼkan bhiḍi hopon lekae tiyạkʼ idi ocoyena, ar kạpciyicʼ samaṅre hape akan bhiḍi leka uni do moca bae jhicʼletʼtaea." 
Isaiah53:8 Jobor jạsti ar behok reakʼ bicạr iạte uni doe gocʼ ocolena. Uni piṛhiren hoṛko modre okoeye hudisleda ińren hoṛkoakʼ ghạṭ iạte jiwetʼkoakʼ disạm khon uni doe getʼ begar ocokʼa mente? Ona sạjại ma onkoakʼ paonage coṅ tahẽkan. 
Isaiah53:8 Jobor jạsti ar behok reakʼ bicạr iạte uni doe gocʼ ocolena. Uni piṛhiren hoṛko modre okoeye hudisleda ińren hoṛkoakʼ ghạṭ iạte jiwetʼkoakʼ disạm khon uni doe getʼ begar ocokʼa mente? Ona sạjại ma onkoakʼ paonage coṅ tahẽkan. 
Isaiah53:9 Uni do jor julumakkoʼ bae kạmi akatʼre hõ se uniyakʼ mocare eṛeteakʼ baṅ tahẽkanre hõ, enhõ bedhoromko ṭhen uniyakʼ topako tearkeda ar gujukʼte uni do kisạ̃ṛ hoṛ tulucʼe soṅgeyena." 
Isaiah53:10 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ kusilekage uniye talga tạuạkʼ ocokedea ar duke jom ocokedea. Probhu Isorren golam do tinre acʼakʼ jiwiye samaṅtaea unre uni do acʼren hoponkoe ńel ńamkoa ar uniyakʼ bahaokʼ dine baṛhaotaea; uni hotetege Probhu Isorakʼ sana do purạukʼa. 
Isaiah53:11 Uni do acʼakʼ jiwi reakʼ duke ńela are tirpitokʼa; Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ińre dhorom golam do acʼakʼ baḍaete ḍher hoṛkoe dhorom ocokoa, ente uni do onkoakʼ sanam ghạṭkoe gogtakoa." 
Isaiah53:12 Ona iạte iń do napṛakʼko talareń bakhrawaea ar uni do daṛeanko tulucʼ luṭakʼkoe bakhra joṅa, ente uni do gujukʼ hạbicʼ jiwiye alaeketʼtaea. Uni do kạiyanko tulucʼe lekha mitʼena; uni do ḍher hoṛkoakʼ kạiye gokʼ idikeda ar ghạghạṭko ńutumteye arojkeda." 
Isaiah54:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E bạńjhi, one tisge gidrạ bam janam akatʼko, am do rạskạte sereńme; ar am okoe do tishõ bedon baṅ rakapʼ akatʼme, am do hulạsokʼme ar andoṛme; ente jãwãe menaetayicʼ khon bạgi giḍiyicʼren hopongeko saṅgegetaea." 
Isaiah54:2 Amakʼ tạmbu reakʼ jaega do arhõ baṛhaome; amakʼ tạmbu reakʼ orwal do arhõ osartam, alom cipạya. Amakʼ tạmbu reakʼ baberko alom khaṭoea ar khunṭiko hõ kajaktam," 
Isaiah54:3 ente am do etom ar kõńe secʼem pasnaokʼa. Amren hoponko do eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ disạmko dokholjoṅa ar ujạṛakʼ nagrahareko girobasokʼa. 
Isaiah54:4 Alom botorokʼa, ente am do bam lajao ocokʼa. Ar alom andesalekʼa, ente bam nak kaṭakʼa. Amakʼ juạn okte reakʼ lajao dom hiṛińa ar amakʼ rạnḍi jokhecʼ reakʼ durnam hõ bam disạitama." 
Isaiah54:5 Amren sisirjạuicʼge amren jãwãe do, uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhuge; Israelren uni sonoticʼge amren chakʼḍaoicʼ do. Unige goṭa dhạrtiren Isore ńum ocokʼkana." 
Isaiah54:6 Am do bạgi giḍiyicʼ ar jiwi lokʼkantae maejiu lekagem hoyakana, ar juạn oktere bạgi giḍi akade bạhu lekagem hoyakana; menkhan Probhu Isor do arhõ ame hohowam kana. Iń amren Isorge niạ katha doń meneda." 
Isaiah54:7 “Thoṛa ghạṛi lạgitʼ iń bạgiletʼmea, menkhan ạḍi mãyãkateń ruạṛ ạgumea." 
Isaiah54:8 Raṅgao capeyạdiń tahẽkante am cetan khon mẽtʼãhãń danaṅletʼtińạ, menkhan jaejug reakʼ dulạṛte amiń mãyãwama. Iń amren chakʼḍaoicʼ Probhu Isorge noa katha doń roṛeda." 
Isaiah54:9 “Iń ṭhen noa do Noha okte reakʼ dinko leka kana. Ar cetʼ lekań kiriạlen, Noha okte reakʼ ḍubạ dakʼ leka dhạrtire ar tishõ bạń dula, onkage noa hõń kiriạkʼ kana, am cetanre ar do bạń raṅgaokʼa, ar tishõ bạń egermea." 
Isaiah54:10 Ente buruko do sahaṛokʼa ar ḍuṅgriko do ocogokʼa, menkhan ińakʼ asambheṛ daya do am khon tishõ baṅ sahaṛokʼa ar ińakʼ suluk reakʼ bondobos hõ baṅge ocogokʼa.” Am cetanre okoeyakʼ mãyã menakʼtae uni Probhu Isorge noa katha doe meneda." 
Isaiah54:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “E birbão hoete gurlạu akanicʼ, ar jiwi raṛecʼ baṅ ńamakatʼicʼ ar nihạ̃t ocokʼicʼ nagraha, iń do nirola dhiriteń benaome lạgidokʼ kana ar amakʼ rehetʼ do nilkanto muniteń bạisạua." 
Isaiah54:12 Amakʼ cuṛạko do podmorag mạnikteń benaoa, ar amakʼ phaṭok duạr do surjokanto mạnikkote ar amakʼ pạcri bhitko do damanakʼ dhirikoteń benaoa." 
Isaiah54:13 Amren sanam hoponko do Probhu Isor hoteteko cetʼ ocokʼa ar amren hoponkoakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah54:14 Am do dhoromge bandhao akanem tahena. Am ṭhen khon jor julum do pharakokʼa; amakʼ botorteakʼ do cetʼge baṅ tahena. Bạṛicʼ botorko hõ sạṅgińokʼa, ar am ṭhen baṅge hijukʼa." 
Isaiah54:15 Jãhãege amre jhãpe em enḍekhan bujhạume uni do bạń kol akadea. Ar okoe ame akromonme uni do am hotete gujukʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Isaiah54:16 “Ńelme, mẽṛhẽtʼ kạrigol do ińgeń sirjạu akadea, one okoe do koela seṅgelteye uskạuetʼ. Mohor meṭao lạgitʼ ińge makʼraoicʼ hõń sirjạu akadea." 
Isaiah54:17 Am upạrte tearakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako hõ oka kajrege baṅ jojaokʼa; ar bicạrre am upạrteko teṅgokʼ hoṛko do amge dusirem paṛaokoa. Noa kangea Probhu Isorren golamkoakʼ bakhra do, ar noa kangea onkoakʼ dhorom hõ.”" 
Isaiah55:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E tetaṅetʼpe hoṛko, dakʼ ṭhen dela hijukʼpe; okoeyakʼ ṭaka poesa bạnukʼtae, uni doe hijukʼma ar kirińkateye ńũiyma. Dela hijukʼpe, darkha rasa ar toa kirińjoṅpe, bin ṭaka poesatege ar bin damtege." 
Isaiah55:2 Okaṭakʼ jomakʼ baṅkan ona lạgitʼ ṭaka poesa do cedakʼpe khoroca? Okaṭakʼte baṅ tirpit ona lạgitʼ do cedakʼpe khaṭaokʼ kana? Ańjompe, ińakʼ katha ańjompe, oka bhageakʼkan ona jompe; ar itilanakʼre rạskạjoṅpe." 
Isaiah55:3 Ińakʼ katha luturakʼpe, ar iń ṭhen hijukʼpe; jemon ińakʼ katha ańjomkate jiwetʼpe tahen. Iń do pạtiạrte perecʼ dulạṛ iạte Dạud ṭhen okań gokʼletʼ ona lekage ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaejugakʼ bondobos iń bandhaoa." 
Isaiah55:4 Ńelpe, jạt jạtrenko lạgitʼ uni do mitʼṭecʼ goha lekań teṅgo akadea, hoṛkoren mitʼṭecʼ ạyuricʼ ar cakʼlaoicʼge." 
Isaiah55:5 Sạrige, ape do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkope hohoakoa, okoe do bako oromakatʼpe, onko do ape ṭhenko ńir hijukʼa. Aperen Probhu Isor, Israelren uni sonoticʼ lạgitʼge onko doko hijukʼa, ente uni do apeye ṭhonok ocoakatʼpea.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Probhu Isor do sorreye tahenrege uni secʼ ruạṛokʼpe; ar sorreye tahenrege uni ńam baṛayepe. 
Isaiah55:7 Bedhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ hore bạgiyakʼma ar dusṭạmi hoṛ do acʼakʼ sanam hudisakʼkoe bạgiyakʼma. Uni do Probhu Isor secʼe ạcur ruạṛokʼma, inạkhan uni cetanre Probhu Isor doe mãyãkʼa; aboren Isor secʼgeye ruạṛ ma, ente uni do asambheṛe ikạitaea." 
Isaiah55:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ińakʼ hudis joṅakʼko do apeakʼ hudisakʼko leka do baṅ kana; ar ińakʼ hor hõ apeakʼ horko leka do baṅkana." 
Isaiah55:9 Sermako cetʼleka dhạrti khon ḍher coṭge, onkage ińakʼ horko hõ apeakʼ horko khon ḍher sạṅgińgea, ińakʼ hudisakʼko hõ apeakʼ hudisakʼko khon ḍher coṭgea." 
Isaiah55:10 Dakʼ ar him do serma khon cetʼleka ńurokʼkante ote hemal ocoyetʼkan ar onḍe baṅ ruạṛkan, bickom ona iạte jo ar bahakʼkan, ar erokʼ icʼ do itạ ar jojomicʼ do jomakʼe emaekan," 
Isaiah55:11 onkage ińakʼ moca khon oḍokokʼkan katha do hoyokʼgea, iń ṭhen ona do ạuṛiyakʼ baṅ ruạṛ hijukʼa. Menkhan okaṭakʼ iń moneakatʼ onageye kạmiya, ar okaṭakʼ lạgitʼ iń kolletʼ onageye jo baha ocoya." 
Isaiah55:12 Ape do rạskạ salakʼ bahretepe calakʼa ar suluktepe idi ocokʼa. Buru ḍuṅgriko do am samaṅre ãṭ aṛaṅteko sereńa ar ṭạnḍi reakʼ dareko doko thayoea. 
Isaiah55:13 Ar jạnumko bodolte do saro dareko ar seṅgel siń bodolte do mehendi dareko hara rakabokʼa. Probhu Isor lạgitʼ ona do mitʼṭecʼ dikʼsạ cinhạge hoyokʼa. Ona cinhạ do tishõ baṅ maraokʼa.” 
Isaiah56:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Dhorom reakʼ bicạr teṅgoepe ar hok reakʼ kạmipe, ente ińakʼ babańcao do hare pharege hecʼ godokʼa, ar ińakʼ rurukhiyạ do sodorokʼa." 
Isaiah56:2 Bhạgangeae uni hoṛ, okoe do onae kạmikan; bhạgangeae uni manwa do, okoe do onakoe moneyakʼkan. Jirạukʼ mãhã okoeye manaoetʼkan, ar bae besonotetʼ ar bạṛicʼ kạmi khon acʼakʼ tiye sontoretʼtae, uni doe bhạgangea.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Probhu Isore dewa sewawae kan bidisiạ hoṛ do aloe menma, “Probhu Isor do khạṭige acʼren hoṛko tala khone begarińạ.” Ar mạ̃yạ̃ṛi hõ aloe menma, “Iń do mitʼṭen rohoṛ dare kạnạń,”" 
Isaiah56:4 Ente Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, “Mạ̃yạ̃ṛiko okoe do ińakʼ jirạukʼmãhãko manaoetʼ, ar iń okań kusiyakʼ onako bachao joṅ ar ińakʼ bondobos kajakteko sapʼ dohoy," 
Isaiah56:5 enḍekhan onkoakʼ ńutum do hopon ar hoponerako khon hõ sorosge ińakʼ oṛakʼre ar ińakʼ pạcri bhitrireń bạisạukea mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ lekate. Ar jaejugakʼ ńutumgeń emkekoa oka do baṅ maraokʼ. 
Isaiah56:6 Ona chaḍa okoe bidisiạko do iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ar iń dulạṛiń ar ińren golamko hoyokʼ lạgitʼ apnartetʼ iń ṭhenko emokʼ ar okoe do Jerusalem bako besonot bickom onako manao ar ińakʼ bondobos kajakteko sapʼ dohoy," 
Isaiah56:7 7 onko do ińakʼ sonot buruteń idikoa ar ińakʼ oṛakʼre, metakʼme koejoṅ oṛakʼre onkoń rạskạ ocokoa. Ińakʼ pinḍ cetanre onkoakʼ jeredokʼ ar eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ koń ataṅtakoa. Onate ińakʼ oṛakʼ do sanam jạtrenkoakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ mente ńumogokʼa.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Probhu Isor, okoe do chirchạtur akan Israelkoe jarwako uni do noa kathae meneda, “Okoe lahareko samṭao ocoakan onko sãote iń do eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko hõń samṭao jarwakoa.”" 
Isaiah56:9 E ṭạnḍiren ar birren sanam janwarko, jom lạgitʼ dela hijukʼpe." 
Isaiah56:10 Israelren pahradarko doko kãṛãgea, onko do cetʼge bako baḍaea. Onko do guṅgạ seta lekanako, bako bhokʼ daṛeakʼa. Onko do giticʼkateko kukmũya ar jạpitʼko kusiyakʼa." 
Isaiah56:11 Onko do lebṛa seta lekanako, onko do bikʼ bako baḍaea. Onko do bebuj gukʼpiko lekanako; jotokoge apan ạpin horteko ruạṛ calao akana ar apnarakʼ lab reakʼko kurumuṭu kana." 
Isaiah56:12 Onkoko meneda, “Dela hijukʼpe, darkha rasa bo ạgujoṅa; dela, bubulakʼkote bon ńũ turedokʼa. Teheń khon gapa do arhõ mońj hoyokʼa.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Dhorom hoṛko maraokʼkan ona secʼ do okoehõ bako moneyakʼ kana. Isor bhokto hoṛ doko idi ocokʼ kana, menkhan okoege bako bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana, bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼge onko doko idi ocokʼ kana mente." 
Isaiah57:2 Okoe sojhe horteko calakʼkan onko do sulukko ńama; onko do gujukʼ hotete jirạuko ńama. 
Isaiah57:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “E gunidar ạimạiren hoponko, laṭghaṭicʼ ar kusumbiren hoponko, dela nonḍe hijukʼpe." 
Isaiah57:4 Ape do okoepe landa dhutʼae kana? Ar okoepe isiṛae kana ar alaṅpe totʼae kana? Ape do cetʼ sasantaoicʼ ar ekʼṛeyicʼren hopon dope baṅkana? 
Isaiah57:5 Ape do Elon dare buṭạkore, mitʼke mitʼ hạriạṛ dare buṭạkore herel reakʼ sanatepe jal jalaokʼkana; ape do buru nala ar huṭupʼ buru ciritʼkore aperen hoponpe teṅgenetʼkoa." 
Isaiah57:6 “E Israel, am do buru nala reakʼ cĩkạ̃ṛ dhirikom sewawakʼ kana; ar onakoge, hẽ onakoge amakʼ sompottikana. Am do onako ṭhengem coḍoreda ar anajkom samaṅeda. Iń do cetʼ niạko ńelte hape akangeń tahena?" 
Isaiah57:7 Am do usul buru cetanre amakʼ aṭetʼem beleda, ar amakʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porob lạgitʼ onḍegem rakapʼ akana." 
Isaiah57:8 Amakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ cạukaṭ ar silpiń danaṅre amakʼ cinhạm dohoakada. Iń bạgikate eṭakʼkom ńam akawante kicricʼ bhạnduṛkate aṭetʼtem rakapʼ akana, ar amakʼ aṭetʼem osar akatʼtama ar onko tulucʼ tahen lạgitʼem bondobos akada; ar onko sãote tahengem kusiyakʼ kana, ente onkoakʼ uluṅtetʼem ńelakatʼtakoa." 
Isaiah57:9 Am do jạitun sunum ojokʼkate raj ṭhenem senlena, ar ḍher mahkaokʼ sunumem beoharleda. Amren paṭhaonako do sạṅgiń disạmtem kol akatʼkoa, hẽ, Sheolte hõm kol akatʼkoa." 
Isaiah57:10 Am do dãṛã dãṛãtem laṅga caba akana, enhõ ‘as do bạnukʼa,’ niạ katha do bam menleda. Menkhan sewakate nãwã daṛem ńam idikeda, onate bam laṅgalena." 
Isaiah57:11 “Okoeyem botoraekante iń ṭhen eṛe katham roṛkeda, ar ińem hiṛińkedeńạ ar bam moneyạń kana? Ḍher din khon hape akae minạńte cetʼ bam botorạń kana?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ńitokʼ do ińge dhoromiń sodortama; ar amakʼ kạmiko hõ; onako do cetʼ porhowanakʼge baṅ hoyokʼtama. 
Isaiah57:13 Goṛo ńam lạgitʼ tinrem raga unre amem jarwa akawan boṅga murhutʼkogeko rukhiyạ mema! Hoe do onkoe oṭaṅ idikoa; ar hisitʼ hoe doe idi tapʼkoa. Menkhan okoe hoṛ iń ṭhen asraye hatao uni do disạmre ar ińakʼ sonot burure ạidạriye ńama.” 
Isaiah57:14 Probhu Isore mena, “Sạriạupe, sạriạupe, hor tearpe. Ińren hoṛkoakʼ hor khon mitʼke mitʼ tokʼhotʼakʼko ocokʼ giḍikakʼpe.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Ente usulicʼ ar coṭicʼ, okoe do jaejug tahẽakane tahenkan, uni sonoticʼ doe meneda, “Iń do usulakʼ ar sonotakʼreń tahẽnkana, ar nindhạnicʼ ar talga tạuạkʼicʼ sãote hõń tahenkana jemon nindhạnicʼ ar talga tạuạkʼicʼ hoṛakʼ ontoriń jiwetʼ ruạr ocoytae." 
Isaiah57:16 Iń do jaejug hạbicʼ manwa do bạń dusiyea se ińakʼ edre unre bạń dohoya. Ente iń khonge jiu do oḍokokʼ kana ar ińge jiu reakʼ sahẽtʼ doń benao akada. 
Isaiah57:17 Onkoakʼ lob laloc reakʼ ghạṭ iạteń edre sạngińlena, ar onkoń sạjạiletʼkoa ar edre iạteń dea giḍiletʼkoa; enhõ onko do akoakʼ kusi leka calakʼko ehopʼena." 
Isaiah57:18 Manwakoakʼ hor doń ńelakatʼgea, ar enhõ onko doń bogekoa. Iń do onkoń ạyurkoa ar hirdạukʼkanko hõ jiwi raṛecʼiń danakoa." 
Isaiah57:19 Onko do onateko mena, ‘sor ar sạṅgińren sanamko lạgitʼge suluk baṛe hoyokʼma.’ Iń Probhugeń meneda, onko do ińgeń bogekoa.”" 
Isaiah57:20 Menkhan bedhoromko do kuṭlạ kuṭlikʼkan jalapuri lekanako; ente ona do thol baṅ tahẽdaṛeakʼa. Ar ona reakʼ dakʼko do losotʼ ar mạilạkoe heola rakaba. 
Isaiah57:21 Ińren Isore meneda, “Bedhoromko lạgitʼ do jãhãn sulukge bạnukʼa.”" 
Isaiah58:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Kajakte hohoeme, amakʼ goṭa daṛete hohoeme; sakwa saḍe leka ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoeme. Ińren hoṛko ṭhen onkoakʼ bedhorom reakʼ katha ar Jakobren bõsko ṭhen onkoakʼ ghạṭ akatʼ reakʼ katha baḍae ocokom." 
Isaiah58:2 Onko do dinke din ińko ńam baṛańkana ar ińakʼ hor bakʼḍae lạgitʼko rạskạkʼ kana; onko do nonkan jạtren kanako okoe do dhoromko kạmikante Isorakʼ ạn bako bạgiyakʼkan; onko do iń ṭhen dhorom bikʼcạrko khojkana jemon Isor ṭhen hijukʼ lạgitʼko rạskạkʼ. 
Isaiah58:3 Onkoko meneda, ‘upạs akadale ar bam ńelletʼlea? Kosṭokʼ kanale ar bam moneyakʼlea? Menkhan ńelpe, apeakʼ upạs reakʼ dinre apeakʼ hạ̃sgepe ńam bakʼṛakana, ar aperen kạmiyạko cetanrepe julumeda." 
Isaiah58:4 Ńelpe jhogṛa ar reṭepeṭe lạgitʼgepe upạseda arpe kuhạukʼ kana. Nonkan upạs do apeakʼ aṛaṅ coṭte bae ańjom ocoytapea. 
Isaiah58:5 Iń do cetʼ nonkanakʼ upạs iń khojkana? Apeakʼ upạs do eken apnartetʼ kosṭokʼ; ar pạṭiol leka bohokʼ kuḍbur akatʼ, ar gõṛẽ kicricʼ ar torocʼre giticʼ akan leka kana. Ape do cetʼ noage upạs ar Probhu Isore bạsutakʼ dinpe metakʼkana?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Iń do nonkan upạsgeń khojkana; ape do apeakʼ bedhorom reakʼ sikṛi ar arãṛ reakʼ baber raṛaetape, jorjulumko chaḍaokope ar mitʼke mitʼ arãṛ rạputʼ giḍikakʼpe," 
Isaiah58:7 reṅgecʼ hoṛko apeakʼ jomakʼ khon hạṭińakope, ar asray bạnukʼtako hoṛko apeakʼ oṛakʼre asray emakope, jãhãe uluṅpe ńellekore kiricʼ horokʼakope, ar aperen peṛa pạrbhạko alope dea giḍikoa. Niạkope kạmi lekhan apeakʼ do sạriyakʼ reakʼ upạs hoyokʼtapea." 
Isaiah58:8 Enḍekhan apeakʼ marsal do aṅga marsalokʼ leka jhak jhakokʼa ar usạratepe bogekʼa; apeakʼ dhorom do ape laha lahate calakʼa ar ińakʼ ṭhonok do ape tayomte rurukhiyạwakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah58:9 Ar unre iń ṭhenpe koe lekhan iń doń ańjomtapea; ar goṛo ńam lạgitʼpe hohoạń khan doń mena, ‘nonḍege minạńa.’ “Ape ṭhen khon julumakʼ arãṛ, kạṭupʼte udukʼakʼ ar hiskạte perecʼ kathape bạgiyakʼ khan," 
Isaiah58:10 ar reṅgecʼ hoṛpe mãyãwako ar jomakʼpe emako, enḍekhan ńutrehõ apeakʼ marsal do jolokʼtapea ar ńindạ do tikin okte leka hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah58:11 Iń Probhuge Isorge sanam ghạṛicʼ iń ạyurpea; ar khaṅgoṭ jaegakoreń tirpit ocopea ar hoṛmore daṛeń danapea. Ape do dakʼ ńametʼkan bagwan lekape hoyokʼa ar nonkan dakʼ jharnakope hoyokʼa ona do baṅge ańjedokʼa. 
Isaiah58:12 Aperen hoṛko do sedae reakʼ jarkharakʼko cetanre arhõko benao rakaba ar lahateakʼ rehetʼ cetanre arhõko gathao ruạṛa; ar ape do dhasao bhit ar bosotokʼ lạgitʼ kulhi jujutkope ńum ocokʼa. 
Isaiah58:13 “Jirạukʼ mãhãpe manao ar ińakʼ sonot dinre apnar tirpitokʼ lạgitʼ bape kạmi; menkhan jirạukʼ mãhã do hạ̃sakʼ ar Probhu Isorakʼ din do manotanakʼ mentepe bujhạu, ar apnar kusileka sen baṅkate ona dinpe sonot ar apeakʼ kusileka bape kạmi se bạṛicʼ kathako bape roṛ," 
Isaiah58:14 enḍekhan ape do ińregepe rạskạjoṅa ar dhạrti reakʼ sanam usulako cetanre ạidạriń emapea. Ona chaḍa aperen baba Jakobakʼ ạidạri hõń emapea. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda.” 
Isaiah59:1 Ńelpe, Probhu Isorakʼ ti do baṅ khaṭotaea abo bańcao bon lạgitʼ; uniyakʼ lutur hõ baṅ goṛdhotaea aboakʼ ańjomta bon lạgitʼ." 
Isaiah59:2 Menkhan apeakʼ kạige aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen khone begar akatʼpea. Apeakʼ ghạṭ iạtege uni doe dea giḍiakatʼpea; ar onatege bae ańjometʼtapea. 
Isaiah59:3 Ente apeakʼ tiko do mãyãmte bhõnḍakana ar apeakʼ kạṭupʼ do ghạṭkote perecʼ akana. Apeakʼ moca do eṛe kathae roṛeda ar apeakʼ alaṅ do dusṭạmigeye phuṭạu akada. 
Isaiah59:4 Okoe hõ hok reakʼ do bako mamblakʼ kana, okoe hõ dhorom salakʼ do bako okalotikʼ kana. Onko do ạuṛiyakʼregeko bhorsa joṅkana ar eṛe kathako roṛeda; onko do kukhire dusṭạmiko omon ocoyeda ar bạṛicʼakʼko jamaneda." 
Isaiah59:5 Onko do bisan bińakʼ beleko oboreda ar bindi ganakʼko gakʼeda. Ar ona bele okoeye jom uni doe gujukʼa; ar onako reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ posakʼlen khan ona khon bisan biń doe oḍokʼ hijukʼa. 
Isaiah59:6 Onkoakʼ bindi ganakʼte kicricʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa; ar okako horokʼetʼkan onate apnartetʼ hõ bako aḍ daṛeakʼa. Onko do joto kạmige bạṛicʼgetakoa, onkoakʼ tire do jor julumge menakʼa." 
Isaiah59:7 Onkoakʼ jaṅga do kại secʼge ńir calakʼtakoa; onko do bindusạnkoakʼ mãyãm joro ocoytako lạgitʼko usạrayeda. Onkoakʼ joto hudiskoge bạricʼgetakoa; onkoakʼ horre do jarkhar ar harkhetge menakʼa. 
Isaiah59:8 Onko do suluk reakʼ hor bako baḍaea; onkoakʼ horre do hok reakʼ bicạrge bạnukʼa. Onko do akoakʼ horko konḍea akada; ar ona horte calakʼko do sulukokʼ bako baḍaea. 
Isaiah59:9 Ona iạte hok reakʼ bicạr do abo ṭhen khon sạṅgińre tahen kana ar dhorom do abo hạbicʼ baṅ seṭerokʼ kana. Abo do marsal bon khojkana, menkhan jotoge ńutgea; ḍig ḍig marsal bon khojkana, menkhan kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutre bon dãṛãnkana." 
Isaiah59:10 Abo do kãṛãko leka bhit bon ṭạmḍạu baṛayetʼkana; hẽ mẽtʼ bạnukʼtako hoṛ lekage hor bon ṭạmḍạu baṛayeda; abo do tikinge bon tohodokʼ kana; ar jiwetʼko talare gocʼko leka menakʼ bona. 
Isaiah59:11 Abo sanamkoge bana leka bon hukạueda, ar parwa leka bon bak bạkureda. Abo do dhorom reakʼ bicạr ar bańcaoge bon khojkana, menkhan ona do ḍher sạṅgińre tahenkana." 
Isaiah59:12 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ mẽtʼre alaeakʼ behokakʼ do ḍhergetalea; aleakʼ kại do ale upạrte gohae emetʼkana. Aleakʼ bedhoromtetʼ do ale sãorege menakʼa ar aleakʼ ghạṭko reaṅ dole baḍaekangea." 
Isaiah59:13 Onako do hoyokʼkana, aleakʼ hul ar am baṅ aṅgocme, aleren Isor ṭhen khon sạṅgińte calakʼ, sasantao ar luṭ lạgitʼ uskạu ar mon khon eṛe katha phuṭạukate roṛ." 
Isaiah59:14 Ona iạte hokʼ reakʼ bicạr do pạc ruạṛ akana ar dhorom do sạṅgińre teṅgo akana; sạriyakʼtetʼ do horreye tohodokʼ kana, ar sojheteakʼ do baṅ bolo daṛeakʼ kana." 
Isaiah59:15 Sạriyakʼtetʼ do okare hõ baṅ sendra ńamokʼa, ar okoe bạṛicʼakʼe bạgiyakʼ uni doe santao ocokʼa. Probhu Isor do noakoe ńelkeda ar hok reakʼ bicạr bạnukʼte uni doe edreyena." 
Isaiah59:16 Uni doe ńelkeda are bhaṛoyena, ente hok reakʼ bicạr secʼ teṅgokʼ lạgitʼ do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa; ar onatege uni do acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite babańcao reakʼe kạmikeda ar uniyakʼ dhoromgeye teṅgo ṭarhaoadea." 
Isaiah59:17 Uni do koṛam aḍtae lạgitʼ dhoromgeye horokʼana ar bohokʼre do babańcaoge. Uni do hala hạli reakʼ kicricʼe horokʼkeda ar edre do kicricʼ leka hoṛmoreye oyowana. 
Isaiah59:18 Ar hoṛ okako ceka akatʼ onage uni doe ruạṛakoa; ar okoe acʼ secʼrenko baṅkan onko cetanre acʼakʼ edreye dulakoa ar bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ sạjạiye emakoa. Uni do sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛkoakʼ kuṛại hõe emkatakoa. 
Isaiah59:19 Pạchim secʼren hoṛko do Probhu Isorko botoraea ar purub secʼren hoṛ do uniyakʼ mạhima ńelteko botorokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sahẽtʼteye laga ńiretʼkan ḍubạ dakʼ lekae hijukʼa." 
Isaiah59:20 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jakobren okoeko kại khon monko ạcur akatʼtako onkoren chaḍaoicʼ do Sionreye hijukʼa." 
Isaiah59:21 Onko lạgitʼ ińakʼ bondobos do noage: ińren Jiu okoe do apere menae ar ińakʼ okako katha apeakʼ mocareń emakatʼ ona do ape, aperen hoponko ar onkoren hoponkoakʼ moca khon baṅ adokʼa; ona do ńit khon jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽ akae tahena. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jerusalem, Beretʼme, marsal emokʼme, ente amakʼ marsal do sor hecʼakana; Probhu Isorakʼ mạhima do marsale emam kana." 
Isaiah60:2 Ńelme, dhạrti do ńutte dapal akana ar boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko cetanre do kaṛaṅ ńutge, menkhan Probhu Isor do am cetanre marsale emokʼa ar uniyakʼ mạhima do am cetanre sodorokʼa." 
Isaiah60:3 Jạt jạtrenko do amakʼ marsal ṭhenko hijukʼa; ar rapajko do aṅga marsal ṭhenko hijukʼa. 
Isaiah60:4 “Am do beṛhaete beṅgetʼ rakabme, onko sanamkoge mitʼ domte am ṭhenko hijukʼkana; amren hoponko do sạṅgiń khonko hijukʼkana ar amren hoponerako doko heo ạgu ocokʼkana." 
Isaiah60:5 Ona ńelte am do rạskạtem kharsalakʼa, ar hulạstem perejokʼa; jalapuri reakʼ dhon do am ṭhenko ạguiya, ar jạt jạtrenkoakʼ dhon do am ṭhen hijukʼa." 
Isaiah60:6 Amakʼ disạm do gạd gạd ũṭkote perejokʼa Midian ar Epharen daṛean ũṭkotege. Onko do sona ar kunduruwante Seba disạm khonko hijukʼa ar Probhu Isorakʼ sabasiko jạhira. 
Isaiah60:7 Kedarren pal bhiḍiko do am ṭhenko hecʼ jarwakʼa, Nebayotren bheḍako do amakʼ kạmireko lagaokʼa; ińakʼ pinḍre samaṅokʼakʼ lekate iń do onakoń ataṅa, ar ińakʼ ṭhonokʼ reakʼ oṛakʼ do artetʼgeń ṭhonok ocoya." 
Isaiah60:8 “Apnarakʼ tahen jaega secʼ parwa cetʼlekako uḍạu hijukʼ onkage rimil lekako uḍạu hijukʼkan onko doko celekana? 
Isaiah60:9 Sạrige sạṅgiń disạmren hoṛko do iń lạgitʼko koyokʼ horeda; amren hoponko lạgitʼ sona rupạ reakʼ maraṅ maraṅ Tạrsis jahajko do jotoko khon laha lahate hijukʼkana. Israelren uni sonoticʼ do, amren Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum sarhaotae lạgitʼ amren hoponkoko hijukʼkana, ente uni doe ṭhonok ocoakatʼmea." 
Isaiah60:10 “Bidisiạko do arhõ amakʼ pạcriko gathao ruạṛa onkoren rapajko doko sapʼ sorama. Ar edrete amiń hạnletʼmere hõ enhõ iń do amiń mãyãwama. 
Isaiah60:11 Amakʼ duạrko do jao okte jhicʼge tahena, siń ar ńindạ tishõ onako do baṅ siń tahena jemon boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ dhon am ṭhen ạgukʼ; ar onkoren rapajko hõ onako soṅgete." 
Isaiah60:12 Okoe jạtrenko ar rajosṭiko am bako sewawam onko doko jarkharokʼa, arko marao utạrokʼa." 
Isaiah60:13 “Lebanon reakʼ mạhima do am ṭhen hijukʼa; ińakʼ sonotakʼ ṭhạ̃i sajao lạgitʼ saro dare, jhao dare ar tạsur darekoge ạgukʼa; ar iń do ińakʼ jaṅga reakʼ ṭhạ̃iyiń ṭhonok ocoytińạ." 
Isaiah60:14 Okoe amko santaoetʼme tahẽkan onkoren hoponko do am ṭhen tumbutʼkateko hijukʼa; ar okoeko nihạ̃tetʼme tahẽkan onko jotoge amko ḍobokʼama ar Probhu Isorakʼ nagraha, Israelren uni sonoticʼakʼ Sion menteko bikạumea." 
Isaiah60:15 “Am do bạgi arem hirkhạ ocolen tahẽkanre, am talate okoehõ bako calakʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan am do jaejug ṭhonokạnicʼ iń hoyocomea piṛhi cetan piṛhi sanamkoren rạskạwạnicʼge." 
Isaiah60:16 Gogo cetʼleka acʼren hopone nunuae onkage boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ar rapajko do akoakʼ bhage bhage jinisko emama. Ar unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhuge amren babańcaoicʼ, amren chakʼḍaoicʼ, ar ińge Jakobren uni daṛeanicʼ do." 
Isaiah60:17 Iń do pitạl bodolte sonań ạguama ar mẽṛhẽtʼ bodolte do rupạge. Kaṭ bodolte pitạl ar dhiri bodolte do mẽṛhẽtʼgeń ạguama. Bhạlại do amren ḍanṭaoicʼ ar dhorom do amren mukhyiạgeń hoeocoya. 
Isaiah60:18 Amakʼ disạmre jor jobor reakʼ katha ar do baṅ ańjomokʼa, ar amakʼ simạna talare jãhãn jarkharokʼ ar maraokʼ reakʼ katha hõ baṅ ańjomokʼa. Babańcao do pạcriko reakʼ ńutum hoyokʼa ar sarhao do amakʼ duạrko reakʼ ńutumge." 
Isaiah60:19 Sińre siń cando reakʼ marsal do ar baṅ jạruṛama, ńindạ cando reakʼ terdecʼ marsal hõ baṅa, ente Probhu Isorge amren jaejug reakʼ marsale hoyokʼa, ar amren Isorge amakʼ ṭhonoke hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah60:20 Amren siń cando do tisge ar bae hạsurokʼa, ar amren ńindạ cando hõ ar bae adokʼa. Probhu Isorge amakʼ jaejug reakʼ marsale hoyokʼa; ar amakʼ hirdạukʼ reakʼ dinko do mucạdokʼtama." 
Isaiah60:21 Unre amren sanam hoṛ do dhoromko hoyokʼa; onko do jaejug lạgitʼ disạmko ạidạrijoṅa. Onko do ińakʼ tite, rohoe akan kahle kanako, onko hotetege ińakʼ mạhima do sodorokʼa." 
Isaiah60:22 Ape modre huḍiń utạricʼ do hajar hajare saṅgekʼa, ar kạṭicʼ utạricʼ do daṛean jạtgeye hoyokʼa. Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do; okte nạpitre ińge usạrateń hoeocoya.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Probhu Isorren Jiu doe decʼ akawạdińa, ente uni do ińe ojokʼ akadińạ jemon reṅgecʼ orecʼko bhage sombatiń danako. Uni doe kol akadińạ rạputʼ monanko bogeko lạgitʼ, bondi akanko ṭhen sạdhinokʼ reakʼ katha lại jạhir lạgitʼ; kạd oṛakʼre tol akanko ṭhen chaḍaokʼ reakʼ katha sodor lạgitʼ;" 
Isaiah61:2 Probhu Isorakʼ daya reakʼ bochor ar aboren Isorakʼ hala hạli reakʼ dinko lại pasnao lạgitʼ ar hirdạukʼkanko jiwi raṛecʼtako lạgitʼ; 
Isaiah61:3 jemon Sionre okoeko hirdạukʼkan onkoakʼ bohokʼre torocʼ bodolte abhraniń emako; hirdạukʼkan bodolte rạskạ reakʼ sunum ar as chuṭạukʼ akan bodolte sarhaoe reakʼ kicricʼ iń em daṛeako. Onko do dhorom reakʼ elon dareko ńumogokʼa; Probhu Isorge ona doe rohoe akada jemon onko hotete acʼakʼ mạhima sodorokʼtae. 
Isaiah61:4 Onko do sedae reakʼ jarkharakʼ ṭhạ̃iko arhõko benao ruạṛa ar ujạṛakʼko arhõko teṅgo ruạṛa. Ar okako nagraha do piṛhike piṛhi dhaṅdhaser akae tahẽkan ona do arhõko benao ruạṛa. 
Isaiah61:5 Eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko do hecʼkate aperen pal bhiḍikoko gupikoa; ar bidisiạko do apeakʼ anaj khetkoren ar darkha bagwanren mạliko hoyokʼa. 
Isaiah61:6 Ar ape do Probhu Isorren naekepe ńum ocokʼa; ar hoṛko do aboren Isorren sapʼdapʼkoko metapea. Ape do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ dhonpe jomtakoa ar onkoakʼ dhon iạtepe sabasikʼa. 
Isaiah61:7 Ińren hoṛko do lajao bodolte sompotti reakʼ dobṛa hĩsko ńama, ar bemanot bodolte do dhonteko hulạsokʼa. Onkoakʼ disạmre dobṛa hĩsko ńama ar jaejugko rạskạkʼa." 
Isaiah61:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do hok reakʼ bicạrgeń kusiyakʼa ar luṭakʼ ar behokakʼ doń kurudakʼ kana. Ińakʼ pạtiạrtetʼre kuṛạiyiń emakoa ar jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń bandhaoa." 
Isaiah61:9 Boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talare onkoren bõsko ar hoṛko talare onkoren hoponko doko ńum ńamokʼa. Ar okoe onkoko ńelko onko jotogeko bujhạu daṛeakʼa, onko jạtrenko do Probhu Isore bhor akatʼkoa mente.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Iń do Probhu Isore ạḍitetʼgeń kusikʼ kana; ińakʼ jiwi do Isorreye hulạsokʼa, ente jãwãe koṛa cetʼleka bohokʼre mạ̃ṛteye abhranokʼ ar bạhu kuṛi cetʼleka acʼakʼ gohnakoteye sajokʼ onkage uni do babańcao reakʼ kicricʼe horokʼ akawạdińa ar dhorom reakʼ oyon aṅgropteye oyo akadińạ." 
Isaiah61:11 Otre cetʼleka kahleko omon oḍokokʼ ar bagwanre cetʼleka erakʼko hõ janamokʼ onkage Probhu Isor do sanam jạtrenko samaṅre dhorom ar sarhao reakʼ kahleye omon ocoya. 
Isaiah62:1 Sion ńutumte hape akan do bạń tahena, Jerusalem iạte thir akan hõ bạń tahena, tin hạbicʼ ona reakʼ dhoromtetʼ marsal leka baṅ jhak jhakoakʼ, ar ona reakʼ bańcaokʼ do jolokʼkan diuhe leka baṅ jolokʼ." 
Isaiah62:2 E Jerusalem, boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko do amakʼ dhorom, ar sanam rapajko do amakʼ ṭhonokko ńela; am do mitʼṭecʼ nãwã ńutumem ńum ocokʼa, Probhu Isorge ona ńutum doe emokʼa." 
Isaiah62:3 Am do Probhu Isorakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼ ṭhonokanakʼ mukuṭem hoyokʼa ar amren Isorakʼ tire do mitʼṭecʼ raj mukuṭge. 
Isaiah62:4 Onko do “Bạgi akadeyicʼ ” ardo bako metama se amakʼ disạm reakʼ ńutum “Ujạṛakʼ do” bako metakʼa, bickom am do “Ińren dulạṛiạ” mentem hoho ocokʼa, ar amakʼ disạm do “Baplayicʼe” ńum ocokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do am iạteye kusikʼa ar amakʼ disạm reakʼ do bapla hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah62:5 Cetʼleka mitʼṭen juạn koṛa do mitʼṭen kũạri kuṛiye baplaye onkage amren hoṛ do amko baplamea; ar cetʼleka jãwãe koṛa do bạhu kuṛi iạteye rạskạkʼ onkage Isor hõ am iạteye rạskạkʼa. 
Isaiah62:6 E Jerusalem, iń do amakʼ pạcri bhit cetanre pahradarkoń bahal akatʼkoa; onko do siń ar ńindạ hape akan do bako tahena. E pahradarko, tis hạbicʼ Probhu Isor do Jerusalem bae bạisạue ar dhạrtire sarhaoanicʼ mente bae teṅgo rakabe unhạbicʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ gokʼakʼ reakʼ katha disạwaepe; alope jirạukʼa ar uni hõ alope jirạu ocoaea." 
Isaiah62:7  
Isaiah62:8 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ jojom tite, acʼakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite kiriạkateye men akada, “Iń do ar tishõ amakʼ anajko bạirikoakʼ tire bạń emokʼa ar okaṭakʼ darkha rasa lạgitʼpe khaṭaokʼkan ona hõ bidisiạko do tishõ bako ńũiya." 
Isaiah62:9 Ona do okoe phosolko samaṭaoa onkoge joma ar Probhu Isorko sarhaoea. Okoe darkha rasako jarwae onko do ińakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ racareko ńũiya.” 
Isaiah62:10 Ape do lahakʼpe, ar phaṭok duạr secʼ sen idikʼpe, ar hoṛko lạgitʼ hor sạriạupe. Apeakʼ ḍaharko benaope, ar tearpe. Joto dhiriko ocokʼ giḍikakʼpe; ar jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ nisạn rakabtape." 
Isaiah62:11 Probhu Isor do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạ hạbicʼe lại sodoreda, “Sionren kuṛi metaepe, ‘ńelme amren babańcaoicʼ doe hijukʼkana. Ńelme, uni okaṭakʼ kuṛạiye ńamakatʼ ona do acʼ sãotege menakʼtaea; ar acʼakʼ kuṛại do uni ṭhenge menakʼa.’ ”" 
Isaiah62:12 Uniren hoṛko do, “Probhu Isor ńutumte begar ocoakan hoṛko men ocokʼa, metakʼme Probhuren chakʼḍao akan hoṛko.” E Jerusalem, am do, “Sendra ńam nagrahagem” men ocokʼa, metakʼme beretʼ ruạṛ akatʼ nagrahage.”" 
Isaiah63:1 Edom reakʼ Bosra khon jeṅgetʼ arakʼ kicricʼ horokʼkate uniye hijukʼkạnicʼ, doe okoe kana? Ṭhonokte perecʼ kicricʼ horokʼkate maraṅ daṛe salakʼ daraekạnicʼ, doe okoe kana? “Iń kangeạń uni do, ińge hok reakʼ kathań roṛeda, ińge maraṅ daṛeteń babańcao kana.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Darkha lelen kunḍre darkha joe lelenkan hoṛ leka amakʼ kicricʼko do cedakʼ arakʼgetama? 
Isaiah63:3 “Iń eskarge darkha jo doń lelenkana; jạt jạtrenko mod khon okoe hõ iń soṅgete do bako tahẽkana. Iń do edreteń lebetʼketʼkoa ar raṅgaote jaṅgateń lebetʼ gańjaoketʼkoa; ar onkoakʼ mãyãmge ińakʼ kicricʼre irciyena ar ińakʼ sanam kicricʼko do gabao cabayentińạ. 
Isaiah63:4 Ńitokʼ do chakʼḍao reakʼ okte hecʼakana; ar hala hạli reakʼ oka okteń ṭhik dohoakatʼ ona hõ hecʼ seṭerena. 
Isaiah63:5 Iń doń beṅgetʼkeda, menkhan gokʼṛoko do celege bạń ńamletʼkoa; ar iń doń hahaṛayena, ar okoehõ bako goṛowạdińa. Ona iạte nijakʼ daṛetege babańcao reakʼ iń kạmikeda, ar ińakʼ edre doe khĩs ocokedińa." 
Isaiah63:6 Iń do edrete jạt jạtrenko jaṅgateń en ketʼkoa; ar edrete bul bhuteṛko lekań hoyocoketʼkoa ar otre onkoakʼ mãyãmiń suḍrạu ocokeda.” 
Isaiah63:7 Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ dayań lại jạhira ar uniyakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi reakʼ iń sarhaotaea. Acʼakʼ daya ar asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte uni do Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ ḍher bhạlại reakʼe kạmi akatʼte uni doń sarhaoea. 
Isaiah63:8 Uni doe men akada, “Khạṭige onko do ińren hoṛ kanako, ar nonkan hopon kanako onko do tishõ bako bepạtiạu ocokʼa,” Ar ona iạtege onkoren babańcaoicʼe hoyena." 
Isaiah63:9 Uni do onkoakʼ jotowakʼ dukreye dukena ar uniren goḍet do onkoe bańcaoketʼkoa. Uniyakʼ daya ar dulạṛte uni do onkoe chaḍaoketʼkoa; sedaeakʼ sanam dinkore onko doe tul rakapʼketʼkoa are ghõṛa idiketʼkoa. 
Isaiah63:10 Enhõ onko doko hulkeda ar uniren sonot Jiuko duk ocokedea. Ona iạte uni do onkoren bạiriye hoyena ar acʼtetʼge onko upạrte lạṛhạiye ehopʼena. 
Isaiah63:11 Unre uniren hoṛ do mare din reakʼ katha, metakʼme Mose ar uniren hoṛko okte reakʼ kathako disạkeda. Onkoko menkeda, “Okoe do acʼren hoṛko ar onkoren mukhiyạko jalapuri talateye ạyur ạguletʼko, okoe do onko talare tahen lạgitʼ iạte acʼren sonot Jiue ematʼko tahẽkan uni do okare menaea?" 
Isaiah63:12 Okoe do Mose goṛowae lạgitʼ acʼakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ daṛeye ematʼko tahẽkan, okoe do acʼakʼ ńutum jaejug hạrjoṅ lạgitʼ onko samaṅre dakʼe bar hạṭiń ocoletʼ," 
Isaiah63:13 okoe do jalapuri talate onkoe ạyur idiletʼko uni do okare menaea? Ar onatege onko do hahaṅkarre taṛametʼkan sadom leka bako tohotʼlena. 
Isaiah63:14 Probhu Isorren Jiu do buru nalateko pheḍ hijukʼkan ạsul janwarko lekageye jirạu ocoketʼkoa. Uniyakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ ńutum bạisạutae lạgitʼ uni do acʼren hoṛkoe ạyurletʼkoa.” 
Isaiah63:15 E Probhu Isor, serma khon, amakʼ sonot ar ṭhonokanakʼ tahen oṛakʼ khon beṅgetʼkate ńelme. Amakʼ ãṭ ar daṛe kạmiko do okayentama? Amakʼ mạ̃hir ar mãyã do ale ṭhen khonem ocokʼakada." 
Isaiah63:16 E Probhu Isor, am do aleren baba kanam. Abraham do bae baḍae akatʼlere hõ se Jakob bae aṅgoclere hõ, enhõ amge aleren baba kanam; am do jaejug hạbicʼ chakʼḍaoicʼ kanam ar noage amakʼ ńutum do." 
Isaiah63:17 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ hor bạgikate cedakʼem ạcur baṛa ocoyetʼlea? Ar alo jemonle botoram onate aleakʼ ontor dom keṭecʼetʼtalea. Amren gutiko lạgitʼ, metakʼme okoe bõsko amakʼ ạidạrire menakʼko, onko lạgitʼge ruạṛ hijukʼme baṛe." 
Isaiah63:18 Amakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i do thoṛa din lạgitʼ amren begar akan hoṛkoakʼ tire tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ aleren bạiri do ona sonot ṭhạ̃iko lebetʼ gasmanḍaoetʼ kana." 
Isaiah63:19 Okoe cetanre tishõ mạliki bam calao akatʼ, okoe tishõ amakʼ ńutumte bako hoho ocoakan, ńitokʼ ale do onko somanle hoyakana." 
Isaiah64:1 Serma oṛecʼkate baṛem pheḍ hecʼlen khan! Ar am samaṅre buruko dalmalaolen khan! 
Isaiah64:2 Seṅgel cetʼleka jhurikoe jol ocoyte dakʼe heḍecʼ ocoy onkage am hõ pheḍ hijukʼte amren bạiriko ṭhen sodorokʼme, jemon jạt jạtrenko am samaṅre botorteko thar tharaokʼ." 
Isaiah64:3 Ar oka bale as akan onkan botorakʼkom kạmiletʼre am dom pheḍ hecʼena ar buruko do am samaṅre daldalaolena. 
Isaiah64:4 Ona sedaeakʼ piṛhi khon am chaḍa ar jãhãe Isorakʼ katha do okoe hõ luturte bale ańjom akada, ar mẽtʼte hõ bale ńel akadea, one uni do acʼ ńeńelko lạgitʼe kạmiyetʼkan." 
Isaiah64:5 Okoe do Isorakʼ sana leka kạmi lạgitʼ rạskạko ńametʼkan ar amko disạyetʼmete amakʼ horteko calakʼkan onko goṛowako lạgitʼ am dom hijukʼ kana; menkhan ale dole kại akada ar ḍher din khon inạ dosarege menakʼlete ale cetanre ạḍim raṅgao akana. Enḍekhan cekate bańcao dole ńama? 
Isaiah64:6 Ale sanamkoge besapha hoṛko lekale hoyakana ar aleakʼ sanam dhorom kạmi do mạilạ kicricʼ leka hoyakantalea. Ale sanamkoge sakam lekale tolmocʼ akana, aleakʼ kại do hoe lekageye oṭaṅ idiyetʼlea." 
Isaiah64:7 Am do okoe hõ bako hohowam kana se nehõram lạgitʼ am ṭhen do okoe hõ bako hijukʼkana, ente ale dom dea giḍiakatʼlea ar aleakʼ ghạṭko iạte jarkharokʼ lạgitʼem aṛakʼ akatʼlea." 
Isaiah64:8 Enre hõ, E Probhu Isor, am do aleren Baba kanam. Ale do hasa kanale, ar am dom kuṅkạl kana; ale sanamkoge amakʼ ti reakʼ kạmiko kanale." 
Isaiah64:9 E Probhu Isor, alom edre sạṅgińokʼa; ar aleakʼ ghạṭko jaejug hạbicʼ alom disạ dohoytalea. Alele nehõram kana, ale secʼ baṛe beṅgedme, ente ale sanamkoge amren hoṛ kanale." 
Isaiah64:10 Amakʼ sonot nagrahako do hahaṅkar ṭoṭha hoyakana; Sion reakʼ dosa hõ onkage hoyakana, hẽ, Jerusalem hõ ujạṛ akana." 
Isaiah64:11 Aleren hapṛamko okare amko sarhaoetʼme tahẽkan aleakʼ ona sonot ar ṭhonokanakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ do seṅgelte ḍahao marao akana ar amem kusiyakʼkan tahẽkanakʼko do jarkhar akana. 
Isaiah64:12 E Probhu Isor, niạko tayom hõ cetʼ am do duṛupʼ hape akanem tahena? Am do cetʼ hape akan tahente ãṭte sạjạiyem emalea?" 
Isaiah65:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Noko hoṛ do iń ṭhen nehõrokʼ lạgitʼ ạt iń em akatʼkoa, menkhan onko do jãhãn nehõrakʼge bako baḍae ocoakadińạ; iń do onko sorregeń tahẽkana, menkhan goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń ṭhen bako hecʼlena. Iń do onko jạtrenkoń men akatʼkoa, ‘nonḍege minạńa, nonḍege minạńa,’ menkhan iń ṭhen do cetʼge bako arojlakʼa." 
Isaiah65:2 Keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan hoṛko secʼ siń sạṭupʼ ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạr akatʼtińạ. Onko do apnarakʼ bundisko pańjayetʼte bạṛicʼ horteko calakʼkana. 
Isaiah65:3 Onko hoṛ do ạuṛiyakʼteko ạṛis ocoyediń kana; onko do bagwankore samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅeda ar iṭạkore dhupko jeretʼeda. 
Isaiah65:4 Onko do topakoreko ikṛum baṛaekana ar danaṅ ṭhạ̃ireko tahẽ aṅgakʼkana; onko do sukri jelko jomeda ar bespha jel reakʼ suṛạ hõ onkoakʼ celaṅre tahenkana. 
Isaiah65:5 Onko doko mena, ‘pharakre tahenme; iń ṭhen do alom hijukʼa, ente am khon ḍhergeń sonotgea.’ Onko hoṛ do ińakʼ mũ reakʼ dhũạ kanako ar goṭa din jolokʼkan seṅgel kanako." 
Isaiah65:6 “Ńelpe, onkoakʼ katha iń samaṅre ol menakʼa. Iń do ar thir hape akan bạń tahena bickom sạjạiyiń emakoa. Onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ kại lạgitʼ do onkogeń dạyikoa. Onko do burure dhupko jeretʼeda ar onḍe ińko nihạ̃t edeńkana; ona iạte onkoakʼ kuṛại do soṅ ateń emakoa.”" 
Isaiah65:7  
Isaiah65:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Darkha jo reakʼ thopare rasa menakʼa ńelte cetʼleka hoṛko men, ‘alom nosṭoea, ńithõ onare bhageakʼ menakʼa,’ onkage ińren gutiko modre joto do bạń maraokoa." 
Isaiah65:9 Iń do Jakob khon ar Jihudạ khon mitʼṭen bõsiń beretʼkoa; onko do ińakʼ buru-ḍuṅgrikoren ạidạriko hoyokʼa. Ińren bachao akan hoṛ do onako ạidạrijoṅa ar ińren gutiko do onḍeko girobasokʼa. 
Isaiah65:10 Ińren hoṛko okoe do ińakʼ sana lekako calakʼkan onkoren pal bhiḍiko lạgitʼ Saron do ạtiń ṭạnḍi hoyokʼa ar Akhor buru nala do ạsul janwarko lạgitʼ aḍa reakʼ jaegage. 
Isaiah65:11 Menkhan ape okoe do Probhu Isorpe bạgi akawadea ar ińakʼ sonot burupe hiṛiń akatʼ, ar okoe do bhạg lạgitʼ mejpe sajaoetʼ ar likhạ lạgitʼ bubulakʼkote bạṭikope perecʼetʼ," 
Isaiah65:12 apeakʼ likhạ do tarwaṛegeń hoeocoya, ar ape sanamkoge gur ocokʼ lạgitʼ hoṭokʼpe lahaetapea. Ente, iń do apeń hohowatʼpe tahẽkana menkhan bape goṅledińa, ińiń roṛleda menkhan bape ańjomletʼtińạ. Ińakʼ mẽtʼre ape do bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmi akada ar iń edre ocoyiń lạgitʼ onape bachao akawana.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Onatege Probhu Isor doe meneda, ‘ińren golam doko joma, menkhan ape do reṅgecʼtepe gujukʼa; ińren golamko do dakʼko ńũiya, menkhan ape do tetaṅpea; ińren golam doko rạskạkʼa, menkhan ape dope lajao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah65:14 Ontorre rạskạ iạte ińren golamko doko sereńjoṅa, menkhan ape do mon reakʼ jalatepe raga ar rạputʼ ontor iạtepe hae haeyokʼa." 
Isaiah65:15 Ińren bachao akan hoṛko do jãhãe henostako lạgitʼ apeakʼ ńutumko ńumtapea. Probhu Isor do apeye gocʼpea, menkhan acʼren golamko do ar mitʼṭecʼ ńutume emakoa." 
Isaiah65:16 Disạm talare jãhãe hoṛ ạsirbade khoj uni do sạriạkʼren Isor ṭhengeye khoja; ar disạm talare jãhãegeye kiriyạkʼ uni do Isor ńutumtegeye kiriạkʼa; ente hoṛ do lahateakʼ kosṭoko hiṛińa ar ińakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅ khon ona do danaṅokʼa. 
Isaiah65:17 “Ńelpe, iń do nãwã serma ar nãwã dhạrtiń sirjạua. Lahateakʼ do baṅ disạkʼa. Ar monre hõ baṅ rakapʼa." 
Isaiah65:18 Iń okań sirjạuetʼkan ona ńutumte jaejug kusi akanpe tahena arpe rạskạkʼa, ente Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ rạskạ reakʼ ar uniren hoṛkoakʼ kusi reakʼ jinis lekań sirjạuea." 
Isaiah65:19 Iń do Jerusalem iạteń rạskạkʼa ar ińren hoṛko iạteń kusikʼa; ona talare ar jãhãn rakʼjoṅ do baṅ ańjomokʼa. 
Isaiah65:20 Onḍe do nunu gidrạko hõ bako gujukʼa, se haṛam hoṛ hõ bahaokʼ din ạuri cabakʼtako hạbicʼ bako gujukʼa. Ar jãhãe mitʼsae bochor umerreye gocʼlenre hõ uni do juạn mentegeye bikạukʼa; ar okoe mitʼsae bochor bae bańcaokʼ uni do sarapanicʼe hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah65:21 Onko do oṛakʼ-duạr benaokate onḍeko girobasokʼa ar darkha bagwan benaokate ona reakʼ joko joma. 
Isaiah65:22 Onko oṛakʼko benao lekhan eṭakʼko do onḍe ar bako tahena, se dareko rohoele khan eṭakʼko ona reakʼ jo do bako joma. Ińren hoṛkoakʼ bahaokʼ din do mitʼṭecʼ dare somange hoyokʼtakoa; ar ińiń bachao akawan hoṛ do ḍher din akoakʼ tite kạmiyakʼko bhogjoṅa." 
Isaiah65:23 Onkoakʼ khaṭaoteakʼ do baṅ ạuṛiyagokʼa ar onkoren hoponko do muhinre bako paṛaokʼa, ente onko ar onkoren hoponko do Probhu Isorakʼ bhor ńamjoṅ hoṛko hoyokʼa." 
Isaiah65:24 Ar iń ạuriko hohoạńrege onkoakʼ iń ańjomtakoa, hẽ, katha roroṛkan tulucʼgeń ańjomtakoa." 
Isaiah65:25 Hunḍạr ar bhiḍi hopon do mitʼtekin ạtińa, dhạcri kul do ḍaṅgra leka busupʼe joma ar dhuṛi do bińakʼ jomakʼge hoyokʼa. Onko do ińakʼ sonot burure okare hõ bako hạhạna se bako nonosṭowa." 
Isaiah66:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Serma do ińakʼ siṅghạson kana ar ot do ińakʼ jaṅga lebedokʼakʼ ganḍo kana. Iń lạgitʼ oṛakʼ do okarepe benaoa? Ińakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do okare hoyokʼa?" 
Isaiah66:2 Niạko sanamakʼ do ińakʼ titeń benao akada ar onatege niạko do hoyakana. Okoe doe nindhạnge, okoeyakʼ ontor do talga tạuạkʼ akantae ar okoe ińe botorạń iń do unigeń beṅgetʼaea." 
Isaiah66:3 Menkhan okoe mitʼṭen ḍaṅgrae samaṅede uni do manwa khũnicʼ kanae, okoe mitʼṭen bhiḍi hopone samaṅede uni do setawakʼ hoṭokʼ rạputʼicʼ kanae, ar okoe anaje samaṅetʼkan uni do sukrikoakʼ mãyãm samaṅicʼ kanae, ar iń ńutumte dhupe jeretʼetʼkạnicʼ do boṅgako sewayicʼ kanae. Onko do apan ạpin horko bachao akawana; ar hirkhạwakʼ jinisteko tirpitokʼkana." 
Isaiah66:4 Onate iń do onko cetanre sạjạiyiń ạguiya ar onko okaṭakʼko botorakʼ onage onko cetanreń paṛao ocoya, ente ińiń hoholetʼre okoege bako goṅledeńa, ar kathań roṛletʼre hõ okoege bako ańjomletʼtińạ. Onko do ińakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼkan onageko kạmikana, ar okaṭakʼteń edrekʼ onageko bachao joṅkana.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Ape okoe Probhu Isorakʼ kathatepe luk lukạukʼ kan ape do uniyakʼ katha ańjomtaepe. Uniye meneda, “Aperen boeha do apeko kurudapea ar iń iạte apeko ḍheka oḍokpea. Onko doko mena, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok hoyokʼma, ale do jemon apeakʼ rạskạle ńelńam,’ Menkhan onko do apnartege lajaoreko paṛaokʼa." 
Isaiah66:6 Ańjompe, nagrahare kạumạu ańjomokʼ kana; ańjompe, mundil khon aṛaṅ ańjom hijukʼkana; noa do Probhu Isorakʼ aṛaṅkangea uni do acʼren bạirikoe sạjạiyetʼkoa." 
Isaiah66:7 Sion do bedon ạuri rakapʼaerege gidrại janam akadea; uniyakʼ haso ạuri rakabokʼrege mitʼṭen koṛa gidrại jamankedea. 
Isaiah66:8 Nonkan katha do okoeye ańjomakada? Okoe nonkan ghoṭna doe ńelakada? Mitʼṭecʼ disạm do cetʼe janam daṛeakʼa? Se mitʼṭen jạt reakʼ janam do ṭuṅ ghuṛite hoyokʼa? Menkhan Sion do bedon ạuri rakapʼaerege acʼren hoponkoe janamketʼkoa. 
Isaiah66:9 Iń amren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ‘Janamokʼ horre ạgu ocokʼte cetʼ iń do bạń uyukʼ ocokoa? Janam ocoko reakʼ iń bebosta akatʼ khan cetʼ janamokʼ reakʼ kukhiń bond ocoya?’ ”" 
Isaiah66:10 Ape okoe Jerusalempe dulạṛetʼ ape do uni tulucʼ rạskạkʼpe, ar uni iạte hulạsokʼpe; ape okoe uni iạtepe dukokʼkan ape do uni tulucʼ rạskạkʼpe." 
Isaiah66:11 Ape do nunuipe ar bikʼpe Jerusalem reakʼ bạ̃skin khon asambheṛ oḍokokʼ kan bhạlại reakʼ jomkate tirpitokʼpe. 
Isaiah66:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do uni secʼ gaḍa dakʼ leka bhạlạiyiń ạtu ocoya, ar boṅgan hoṛren jạtrenkoakʼ dhon-durib do uni ṭhen banbạsi leka ạtu hijukʼa. Ape do nonkan bale gidrạ lekape hoyokʼa ape dope nunuiya ar ḍanḍarepe heokokʼa ar hoborrepe cerecʼ ocokʼa." 
Isaiah66:13 Gogo cetʼleka acʼren hoponakʼ jiwiye raṛejtae onkage jiwi raṛecʼ iń emapea; ar ape do Jerusalemre jiwi raṛecʼpe ńama.” 
Isaiah66:14 Noako ńelte apeakʼ ontor do rạskạkʼtapea ar ape do ghãs lekagepe hara rakabokʼa. Probhu Isorren guti do uniyakʼ daṛeko ńel ńama, ar uniren bạiriko do uniyakʼ edreko ńela." 
Isaiah66:15 Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do seṅgelteye hijukʼa ar uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiko do hoe bharḍo lekage hijukʼa. Unre uni do acʼakʼ edreye sodortaea, uniyakʼ eger do seṅgel lepʼ leka sodorokʼa." 
Isaiah66:16 Probhu Isor do seṅgel ar tarwaṛete sanam manwako cetanre acʼakʼ bicạr reakʼe kạmiya; uni do onkoe gocʼkoa ar onkoakʼ lekha do ḍherokʼtakoa. 
Isaiah66:17 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe sukri gel, goḍo gel ar eṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ jinisko jom ar porob cakʼlaoko tayom tayomte Jaher ṭạnḍire bolokʼ lạgitʼ debotako ńutumte apnarko begarokʼ arko sonotokʼ, onko do mitʼ domteko marao ocokʼa." 
Isaiah66:18 Iń do onkoakʼ kạmi reakʼ sanam hudis bundiskoń baḍaegea. Sanam jạtrenko ar pạrsirenko do mitʼ ṭhen jarwako reakʼ okte do seṭer akana. Onko do hecʼkate ińakʼ mạhimako ńela.” 
Isaiah66:19 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Onko talare mitʼṭecʼ cinhạń dohoya ar okoe jiwetʼko tahen onko mod khon adom do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ṭheniń kolkoa. Tạrsis, Put ar Ludren dhinkiạko, Tubal, Greece ar okako sạṅgiń disạmre ińakʼ ńutum bako ańjomakatʼ ar ińakʼ mạhima bako ńelakatʼ onko ṭheniń kolkoa. Onko do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ṭhen ińakʼ mạhima reakʼ kathako lại jạhira." 
Isaiah66:20 Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼ lekate sanam jạtrenko tala khon aperen boehako do rãt gạḍikote, sadomkote, gadhakote ar ũṭkoante ińakʼ sonot buru Jerusalemteko hijukʼa. Israelko cetʼleka sapha bhajanre anaj samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ạgui onkage onko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko ạguiya." 
Isaiah66:21 Onko mod khon adom liwiko do naeke ar sapʼsosorko hoyokʼ lạgitʼ iń bachaokoa.” 
Isaiah66:22 Probhu Isore meneda, “Oka nãwã serma ar nãwã dhạrtiń sirjạu ar cetʼleka iń samaṅre ona ṭikạu tahen onkage apeakʼ ńutum ar aperen bõsko hõko ṭikạu tahena." 
Isaiah66:23 Molokʼ cando ar jirạukʼmãhã piche sanam hoṛ do iń samaṅre hecʼkateko dewa sewaea. 
Isaiah66:24 Ar onko do oḍok kate iń upạrteko hulletʼ tahẽkan hoṛkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkoko ńela. Onkoren tejoko okoe do gocʼ hoṛakʼ jelko jom onko do bako gujukʼa ar onkoakʼ seṅgel hõ baṅ ĩṛĩjokʼa; ar onko do sanam manwa jạtrenko lạgitʼ hirkhạwanakʼgeko hoyokʼa. 
Jeremiah1:1 Niạko katha do Hilkiạren hopon Jirimiạwakʼ katha kana. Uni do Benjạmin ṭoṭharen Anathrot atoren naekeko modren mitʼ hoṛe tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah1:2 Jihudạren raj Amonren hopon Josiạwakʼ rajokʼ gelpe bochor oktere Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena. 
Jeremiah1:3 Josiạren hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ okte khon Jihudạren raj Josiạren hopon Sedekiại rajokʼ gel mitʼ bochor reakʼ mõṛẽ cando hạbicʼ Probhu Isorakʼ katha do arhõ sodorena. Ar inạ candoge Jerusalemren hoṛko do bondikateko idi ocolena. 
Jeremiah1:4 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do iń ṭhen hecʼena," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Eṅgamakʼ kukhire ạuriyem gaṛhaokʼrege iń do amiń bachao akatʼmea. Ar amakʼ janam ạurirege iń do amiń begar doho akatʼmea ar jạtrenko ṭhen nạbi lekateń dohoakatʼmea.” 
Jeremiah1:6 Unre iń doń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, iń do katha roroṛ bạń baḍaea; ar iń doń huḍińgea.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Menkhan Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Alom mena iń doń huḍińgea. Ente okoeko ṭheniń kolme onko mimitʼko ṭhen am dom calakʼa ar okaṭakʼ roroṛ iń metam onagem roṛa." 
Jeremiah1:8 Onko do alom botorakoa, ente iń Probhu Isorge amiń rukhiyạmea ar am sãotegeń tahena.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ti tiạrkate ińakʼ mocae joṭetʼketʼteye metadińạ, “Nitokʼ do amakʼ mocare ińakʼ kathakoń dohokeda." 
Jeremiah1:10 Ńelme, totʼ giḍikakʼ ar rạputʼ giḍikakʼ, jarkharokʼ ar marao giḍikakʼ, benao rakapʼ ar bạisạukakʼ lạgitʼge teheń iń do jạtrenko ar rajosṭiko cetanreń dohoketʼmea.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ona tayom Probhu Isor doe kulikedeńạ, “E Jirimiạ, am do cetʼem ńeleda?” Ińiń roṛ ruạṛadea, “Iń do badam dare reakʼ mitʼṭen ḍạriń ńel ńameda.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Probhu Isore metadińa, “Am do ṭhikgem ńelakada, ente ińakʼ kathare iń doń jagwargea onako kạmi purạu lạgitʼ.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ, “Am do cetʼem ńeleda?” Iń doń menkeda, “Mitʼṭecʼ heḍejokʼkan ṭukucʼ, ona do utạr secʼ khon dũṛũjokʼkana.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Probhu Isore metadińạ, “Niạ disạmre okoeko girobasokʼ kan onko cetanre muhin do utạr secʼ khon banbạsi leka hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah1:15 Iń do utạr reakʼ rajosṭiren sanam jạtrenkoń hohoako kana.” Ar rapajko do hecʼkate Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok duạrko reakʼ bolokʼ horre akoakʼ siṅghạsonko bạisạua. Ar onko do ona beṛhaeteakʼ pạcri ar Jihudạ reakʼ sanam nagrahako esetʼ ạcura. 
Jeremiah1:16 Ińren hoṛ do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińạ, onko do debotako ńutumte dhupko jeretʼeda ar apnar tite benaoakʼ jinisko ḍobokʼakʼ kana. Iń do onkoakʼ dusṭạmi kạmi iạte onko upạrte ińakʼ bicạrkoń jạhira." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Am do ḍanḍa paṭhe keṭejokʼte teṅgokʼme ar okaṭakʼ roroṛ iń metam onko ṭhen ona lạime. Ar onko ńelte do alom torasokʼa, jemon onko samaṅre aloń toras ocome." 
Jeremiah1:18 Am do teheń mitʼṭecʼ daṛeanakʼ nagraha leka, mitʼṭecʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ khunṭi leka ar mitʼṭecʼ pitạl reakʼ bhit lekań hoyocoketʼmea jemon goṭa disạm upạrte, metakʼme Jihudạren rapajko, cetan hudạren kạmiyạko, naekeko ar disạmren hoṛko upạrtem teṅgo daṛeakʼ." 
Jeremiah1:19 Onko do am upạrteko lạṛhạiya menkhan bako bhagao daṛeama, ente iń do rukhiyạime lạgitʼ am são sãotege minạńa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Probhu Isor do Jerusalemteye idikedińa ar onḍenko hoṛ ṭhen niạ katha lại lạgitʼe metadińa: “Amakʼ juạn jokhecʼ reakʼ pạtiạrtetʼ iń disạyetʼtama. Am do baplakʼkan bạhu kuṛi lekam dulạṛedeń tahẽkana ar oka disạmre bako casetʼkan tahẽkan onkan hahaṅkar jaegakore hõm pańja baṛaledeńa. 
Jeremiah2:2  
Jeremiah2:3 Israel do Probhu Isor lạgitʼ sonoticʼgeye tahẽkana; uniyakʼ pạhil phosol reakʼ gelege. Ar okoe onako jomketʼko onko do jotoge dusiko hoyena, ar onko sanamko cetanrege muhin do hecʼ paṛaoena. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 E Jakob bõsrenko, ar Israelren sanam gusṭirenko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomtaepe." 
Jeremiah2:5 Probhu Isore meneda, “Aperen hapṛamko do cetʼ ińakʼ dosko ńamletʼa, ar onate iń khonko sạṅgińlena? Onko do ạuṛiyakʼren boṅgako pańjaketʼkote apnartetʼ hõko ạuṛiyakʼena." 
Jeremiah2:6 Onko do bako menleda, ‘okare menaea uni Probhu Isor do? One uni Misor disạm khone rakapʼ ạguketʼle, one uni hahaṅkarreye ạyurketʼle; khaṅkar ar khorloṅ reakʼ disạmre khaṅgoṭ ar moron dhund reakʼ disạmrege? Mitʼṭecʼ disạmre one ona secʼte celege bako dãṛãnkan, ar one onare cele hoṛge bako tahenkan?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ asecʼ tasecʼ hoyokʼ disạmtegeń ạguletʼpea jemon onḍenakʼ jo ar bhage bhage jiniskope jom daṛeakʼ; menkhan ape do hecʼkate ińakʼ disạmpe bhonḍ akada, ar ińakʼ ạidạriyakʼko do kurudanakʼ jinisgepe hoyocoakada." 
Jeremiah2:8 Naekeko hõ bako kuliyana, ‘Probhu do okare menaea mente?’ Okoeyakʼ tire ạn-ạri tahẽkan onko hõ bako oromledeńa; onko do iń upạrteko hulkeda. Nạbiko hõ ạuṛiyakʼren boṅgako tayomte senkate Bakʼal debota ńutumteko nạbiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Ona iạte iń do ape ar aperen hoponko artetʼgeń dusipea. 
Jeremiah2:10 Ape do parom hecʼkate Kuprus doreão ḍhip aṛe teakʼ disạmkote parom senkate ńelpe, ar Kedarte hoṛ kolkate mońjte ạribạndhipe. Onḍepe ńela nonkan jãhãnakʼ do tishõ baṅ hoyakana." 
Jeremiah2:11 Jạtkoren debota do Isorko baṅkanre hõ enhõ jãhãe jạtrenkoge akoren debota do bako bodol akatʼkoa; menkhan ińren hoṛ do akoren ṭhonokren Isor bodolte ạuṛiyakʼren debotako aṅgocetʼkoa. 
Jeremiah2:12 E sermako, niạ ńelte ṭhak utạrokʼpe ar botorte thar tharaokʼpe," 
Jeremiah2:13 Ente ińren hoṛ do bareako ghạṭ akada. Jion dakʼ reakʼ bhumbuk doń ińkangea, onko do ińgeko bạgi giḍi akadińạ, ar apnar lạgitʼ nonkan dakʼ ḍạḍiko benao akada one onakore do dakʼge baṅ tahenkan." 
Jeremiah2:14 Israel do cetʼ golam kanae? Uni do cetʼ janam khongeye guti kana? Cedakʼ uni do luṭ ocokʼicʼe hoyakana? 
Jeremiah2:15 Dhạcri kul doko hạnḍrạukʼ kana: uni upạrteko hạnḍrạukʼ kana. Onko do uniyakʼ disạmko ujạṛakada; ar uniyakʼ nagrahako doko ḍahao marao akada, onate onare do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ona chaḍa Noph ar Tahaphones nagraharen hoṛko hõ am akʼ bohokʼ khạpriko posakʼ akatʼtama. 
Jeremiah2:17 Amren Probhu Isor do ṭhik horteye idiyetʼme tahẽkanre unim bạgiyadete amtege cetʼ noako do bam ạgu akawana? 
Jeremiah2:18 Ar ńitokʼ do nil gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ ńũi lạgitʼ cedakʼ Misorte dom calakʼ kana? Phurạt gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ ńũi lạgitʼ hõ Ạsurte do cedakʼem calakʼkana? 
Jeremiah2:19 Am do amakʼ bạṛicʼakʼgeye sạjạimea; ar bạṛicʼ hortem calao akante uni do ame dusimea. Enḍekhan baḍaekakʼme ar hudiskate ńelme, amren Probhu Isorem bạgi giḍiyae ar uni bam botorae ona do am lạgitʼ tinạkʼ bạṛicʼakʼ ar haṛhatʼakʼge hoyokʼa. Noa katha do iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Ḍher din laharege am do amakʼ arãṛem rạputʼ giḍi akada ar amakʼ tonolem topakʼ akada; arem meneda, ‘am do bạń sapʼ sorama.’ Am do mimitʼ usul buru ar hạṛiạṛ dare buṭạkore kusumbi leka ombakʼkatem laṭghaṭetʼ kana." 
Jeremiah2:21 Iń do bachao akatʼ itạ khon janamakʼ bhage darkha reakʼ cara lekań rohoeketʼmea; enḍekhan cekate am do bạṛicʼ bir darkha nạ̃ṛĩ dom hoyena? 
Jeremiah2:22 Am do sạji dakʼtem ạrupʼlenre hõ ar ḍher sạbuntem sạbunlenre hõ enhõ amakʼ ghạṭko reakʼ gabao do iń samaṅre tahengetama. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.
