Jeremiah2:23 Ar cekatem meneda, iń do bạń bhõnḍ akana, am do cetʼ Bakʼal debota tayomte bam ńir sen akana? Buru nalakore amakʼ horko beṅgetʼatam; ar am okam ceka akatʼ ona hõ hudisokʼme. Am do mecka mecki baṛaekan phẽṭaṛ ũṭ leka hante natem piḍgạu baṛaekana." 
Jeremiah2:24 Am do hahaṅkarren mitʼṭen bir gadha eṅga leka kanam, okoe do otoṅokʼ lạgitʼ hoeye ji baṛayetʼ. Uniyakʼ ritiạṅ do okoeye khento daṛeketaea? Uni ńam bakʼṛako do laṅga haronokʼ baṅ jạruṛtakoa; otoṅokʼ jokhecʼ uni doe ńamokʼgea." 
Jeremiah2:25 Menkhan am do sontor akae tahenme, ar baṅkhan jaṅga reakʼ panahe hõ nosṭokʼtama ar amakʼ nạnḍri hõ rohoṛokʼ tama. Menkhan amem men akada, ‘jãhãn porhoge bạnukʼa. Iń do debotageń dulạṛetʼkoa, onkogeń pańjakoa.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Kombṛoe sapʼ ocolenre cetʼ lekae lajao ocokʼ onkage Israel bõsrenko hõko lajao ocokʼa. Onko do apnarte, akoren rapajko ar kạmiyạko, onkoren naekeko ar nạbiko jotogeko lajao ocokʼa" 
Jeremiah2:27 Onko do kaṭko metakʼa, ‘amgem ińren ạpuń kana,’ ‘ar amgem ińren eṅgạń kana.’ Onko do iń secʼ khon deako ạcur akatʼtakoa mẽtʼãhã do baṅa; enhõ muhinre doko mena, ‘dela hijukʼme, ale bańcaoleme.”" 
Jeremiah2:28 E Jihudạ, apnar lạgitʼ okoe debotakom benao akawan onko do unre okareko tahenkana? Muhinrem paṛaolenre amko bańcao daṛeam khan doko hecʼocoge, ente aema nagrahako menakʼtama ar debotako hõko ḍhergetama." 
Jeremiah2:29 Probhu Isore meneda, “Cedakʼpe dusiyedeń kana? Ape sanamkoge coṅ iń upạrtepe hul akatʼ." 
Jeremiah2:30 Iń do ạuṛiyakʼgeń sạjại akatʼpea; ińakʼ cehaona do bape moneyada. Jom ukʼjạṛkan dhạcri kul leka apeakʼ tarwaṛe do aperen nạbikoe gocʼ akatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah2:31 “Niạ piṛhiren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Israelko ṭhen iń do cetʼ hahaṅkar iń hoyakana? Iń do cetʼ kaṛaṅ ńut reakʼ disạmiń hoyakana? Ińren hoṛ do cedakʼko mena, ‘ale do sạdhintegele dãṛãbaṛa daṛeakʼa; ar am ṭhen do bale hijukʼa?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Jãhãe kuṛige cetʼ acʼakʼ abhrankoe hiṛiń daṛekea? Jãhãe baplakʼkan bạhu kuṛi do cetʼ bapla reakʼ abhrane hiṛiń daṛekea? Menkhan ińren hoṛko do ḍher din khon ińko hiṛiń akadińạ. 
Jeremiah2:33 “E Jihudạ, am do dulạṛ khudạurem gạkhuṛgea! Bạṛicʼ utạricʼ maejiu hõ amakʼ hor doe ńeleda arem cetʼaekana." 
Jeremiah2:34 Amakʼ tire do miridos reṅgecʼ orecʼkoakʼ jiwi reakʼ mãyãmge ńamokʼkana, onko do sind bhugạkʼ ṭhen bam ńamletʼkoa. Ar niạko tayom hõm meneda, ‘iń doń miridosgea; Probhu Isor do ińre jãhãn edre bạnukʼtaea.’ Menkhan iń do bicạrkateń sạjạimea, ente am dom meneda, ‘iń do bạń kại akada.’" 
Jeremiah2:35  
Jeremiah2:36 Amakʼ hor pheraotam lạgitʼ do cedakʼem ạcur baṛae kana? Ạsur babotre cetʼlekam lajao ocolen onkage Misor iạte hõm lajao ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah2:37 Am do bohokʼre ti capokate ona ṭhạ̃iyem bạgiyakʼa, ente okoe cetanrem bhorsalen onko do iń Probhu Isorgeń nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼkoa; onko hotete jãhãn porho do baṅ hoyokʼtama.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jãhãe hoṛ acʼren bạhui bạgiye ar uni maejiu do uni ṭhen khon senkate eṭakʼ hoṛ tulucʼe baplakʼ, enḍekhan uni herel hoṛ do cetʼ arhõ uni maejiu ṭhene ruạṛ calakʼa? Uniye ruạṛ calaolen khan ona disạm do cetʼ baṅ bhonḍokʼa. Menkhan am do ḍherko sãote tahẽkate kusumbiko lekam laṭghaṭ akada; ar ńit do cekate arhõ iń ṭhenem ruạṛ hijukʼa?" 
Jeremiah3:2 “Ceḍe ḍuṅgriko secʼ beṅgetʼ rakapʼkate ńelme. Nonkan jãhãn ṭhạ̃i menakʼa one onḍe bam laṭghaṭ akatʼ? Okoeko tulucʼem laṭghaṭ akatʼ onko lạgitʼ am do hor aṛerem duṛupʼkokʼ kan tahẽkana, hahaṅkarre mitʼṭen Arabi hoṛ lekam tãṛãkʼkokʼ kan tahẽkana. Amakʼ hirkhạwakʼ ar loṭghuṭikote disạm dom bhonḍ akada." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ona iạte achaṛ dakʼko akoṭokʼ kana ar niron din reakʼ dakʼ hõ baṅ hijukʼkana. Am do kusumbi ạimại lekagem ńelokʼkana; ar lajao hõ bam lajaokʼ kana. 
Jeremiah3:4 Am do cetʼ ńitge hohoate bam metadińạ, ‘E baba, am do ińakʼ juạn jokhecʼren gate kanam," 
Jeremiah3:5 am do cetʼ jao oktege edre akanem tahena? Amakʼ edre do cetʼ jaejug hạbicʼ tahentama?’ Am do onkagem men akada, menkhan daṛeakʼ bhor bạṛicʼakʼgem kạmi akada.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Josiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ oktere Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Bạṛicʼakʼ horteye sen akan Israel okae cekakan ona do cetʼem ńel akatʼgea? Uni do sanam usul buruko cetanre ar hạṛiạr dare buṭạkore senkateye laṭghaṭ akada." 
Jeremiah3:7 Iń doń hudisetʼ tahẽkana niạko tayom do iń ṭhene ruạṛ hijukʼa, menkhan bae ruạṛ hecʼlena ar uniren bepạtiạricʼ misera Jihudạ hõ onae ńelkeda." 
Jeremiah3:8 Bạṛicʼ horte senakan Israel do bapag doleliń emade tahẽkana ar sanam lekan laṭghaṭ iạte uniń sạṅgiń giḍiledea. Menkhan iń doń ńelkeda uniren bepạtiạricʼ boeha kuṛi Jihudạ hõ jãhãn botorge bạnukʼtaea; uni hõ senkateye loṭghoṭikeda. 
Jeremiah3:9 Uni do loṭghuṭi reakʼ kạmi jãhãnakʼ bae metatʼte dhiriren ar kaṭren debotako sãoteye laṭghaṭketʼte disạme bhonḍkeda. 
Jeremiah3:10 Ar niạko hoyenre hõ Israelren bepạtiạricʼ boeha kuṛi Jihudạ do acʼakʼ goṭa monte do baṅa menkhan eken iń ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼ reakʼe bhankeda. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah3:11 Probhu Isor do iń metadińạ, “Bạṛicʼ horte sen akan Israel do bepạtiạricʼ Jihudạ khon hõ bạ̃ṛti dhorome udugokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah3:12 Am do senkate utạr secʼ samaṅkate noako sombat lại jạhirme: ‘iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, E bạṛicʼ horte ghańjeṛ akan Israel, dela ruạṛ hijukʼme. Kurkunḍucʼkate am secʼ beṅgetʼ akae do bạń tahena; ente iń doń dayawạnicʼ kana, onate jaejug hạbicʼ edre akan do bạń tahena." 
Jeremiah3:13 Am do eken amakʼ ghạṭko aṅgocʼme, amren Probhu Isor upạrtem hul akada mente, ar hạṛiạṛ dare buṭạkore debotako do amakʼ dulạṛem em akawatʼkoa ar ińakʼ aṛaṅ hõ bam ańjom akada.’" 
Jeremiah3:14 ‘Iń Probhu Isor do arhoń meneda, ‘E bạṛicʼ horte sen akan hoṛko, dela ruạṛ hijukʼpe, ente iń kangeạń aperen jãwãe do. Iń do ape tala reakʼ mimitʼ nagraha khon mitʼ hoṛ ar mimitʼ bõsrenko khon babar hoṛ bachaokate Sionteń ạgupea." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ar ona tayom do ińakʼ kusi leka gukʼpikoń emapea; onko do ạkil ar bud salakʼko calaopea. 
Jeremiah3:16 Ona jokhecʼ disạmre aperen hoṛkoakʼ lekha tinre ḍher idikʼa unre hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobos sinduk reaṅ ar do bako roṛ baṛaea. Uniyakʼ katha doko hiṛiń cabaya ar disạ hõ bako disạya; ona do bako khojogokʼa, ar benao hõ bako benaojoṅa." 
Jeremiah3:17 Unre sanam jạtren hoṛko Jerusalem do Probhu Isorakʼ siṅghạsonko metakʼa, ar Probhu Isor dewa sewawae lạgitʼ onḍeko jarwakʼa. Ar akoakʼ bạṛicʼ ontor do ṭenḍoskate bako pańjaea." 
Jeremiah3:18 Un jokhecʼ Jihudạren hoṛ do Israelren hoṛko sãoteko seledokʼa ar okaṭakʼ disạm ạidạri menkate aperen hapṛamkoń ematʼko tahẽkan ona disạmre mitʼdomte utạr secʼ khonko ruạṛ hijukʼa.’ 
Jeremiah3:19 “Ińgeń menleda, ‘ińge hoponko menkateń ataṅpea ar mitʼṭecʼ hạ̃sanakʼ disạmre, jạt jạtrenko talare mońj utạr ạidạriankoń hoyocopea.’ Iń doń hudisleda baba mentepe hohowạńạ ar iń tayom khon do bape ruạṛa." 
Jeremiah3:20 Menkhan E Israelko, jãwãetetʼ cetanre bepạtiạricʼ bạhu leka ape do ińre bepạtiạrankope hoyakana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Ceḍe ḍuṅgriko cetanre Israelkoakʼ rakʼjoṅ ar nehõr reakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomokʼ kana, ente onko do akoakʼ horko konḍea akatʼtakoa ar akoren Probhu Isorko hiṛiń akadea." 
Jeremiah3:22 Probhu Isore meneda, “E bạṛicʼ horte sen akan hoponko, dela ruạṛ hijukʼpe; apeakʼ peṛta horte ghańjeṛ akan reakʼ ruạń cabaetapea.” Unre Israelkoko mena, “Hẽ, ale do am ṭhengele ruạṛ hijukʼa, ente am kangeam aleren Probhu Isor do." 
Jeremiah3:23 Sạrige buru boṭkocʼ khon goṛowakʼ do eṛeteakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅkana. Sạrige aleren Probhu Isorrege Israelkoakʼ bańcaokʼ do menakʼa. 
Jeremiah3:24 Aboakʼ juạn jokhecʼ khonge aboren hapṛamkoakʼ khaṭaoteakʼ jo, metakʼme onkoren gại-ḍaṅgra, bhiḍi merom palko ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerako do onko lajao ocokʼkan debotageko utʼ akatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah3:25 Dela hijukʼpe, abo do aboakʼ lajaoakʼre bon kunḍlạṅokʼma,, aboakʼ lajao do aboko danaṅ esetʼbon ma. Juạn okte khon teheń hạbicʼ abo do aboren Probhu Isor upạrte bon kạiyeda, ar aboren hapṛamko hõ onkageko kạmileda. Abo do aboren Probhu Isorakʼ bon bebatao akada.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israel, ruạṛ hijukʼem menetʼ khan iń ṭhenge ruạṛme. Ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon amren hirkhạwan boṅga murhutʼkom sạṅgiń giḍikako ar bạṛicʼ horte bam senokʼ," 
Jeremiah4:2 ar sạriyakʼte, hokte ar dhoromte ‘jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumtem’ kiriạkʼ, enḍekhan boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko do unireko bhorjoṅa ar uniregeko sarhaokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Probhu Isor do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoe metakokana, “Arna ot abad joṅpe ar jạnumko talare itạ do alope era." 
Jeremiah4:4 E Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, Probhu Isorakʼ bataotae lạgitʼ apnartetʼ khatnakʼpe, metakʼme apeakʼ ontor reakʼ ghạṭko ocokʼ giḍikakʼpe; ar baṅ khan apeakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi iạte ińakʼ edre do seṅgel leka salgaokʼa, ar ona do okoehõ bako ĩṛĩcʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah4:5 “Jihudạ ar Jerusalemre lại jạhirpe, ‘ar goṭa disạmre sakwa oroṅpe.’ Ar ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoate roṛpe, ‘samṭao jarwakʼpe. Dela, abo do gaṛ nagrahakote bon bolokʼ ma.’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Sion secʼ mitʼṭecʼ nisạn tul rakabtape. Ar bin bilomte ńir bańcaokʼpe, ente iń do utạr secʼ khon maraṅ jarkharokʼgeń ạgu lạgidokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah4:7 Mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do gajaṛ bạgikateye oḍok hecʼakana; ar jạtrenko maraoko lạgitʼ hõ mitʼ hoṛe mohnḍa akana. Amakʼ disạm ujạṛ lạgitʼ uni do acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i khone oḍok akana. Amakʼ nagrahako do jarkharokʼa, onḍe do celege bako tahena." 
Jeremiah4:8 Onate gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate homor halaṅpe ar jare jarekʼpe, ente Probhu Isorakʼ jolokʼkan edre do abo ṭhen khon baṅ ruạṛ sen akana.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 Probhu Isore meneda, “Enhilokʼ raj ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạko do dilko adtakoa, ar naekeko ar nạbiko doko ṭhak utạrokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Unreń menkeda, “Hae, hae! E Probhu Isor, noko hoṛko ar Jerusalemrenko do ạḍitetʼgem andha akatʼkoa ar nonkam roṛakada, ‘apeakʼ sulukge hoyokʼtapea,’ menkhan tarwaṛe do aleakʼ jiwi hạbicʼem ader akada.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Unre Probhu Isor do onko hoṛ ar Jerusalemren koe metatʼkoa, “Hahaṅkar reakʼ ceḍe ḍuṅgriko khon lolo hoe do ińren hoṛko secʼ hijukʼkana, menkhan phosol oṭaṅ saphae lạgitʼ do baṅkana;" 
Jeremiah4:12 Ińakʼ hukumgete hijukʼkana ar ona hoe reakʼ daṛe do ḍhergea. Ar iń do nonkage onko upạrte ińakʼ bicạr iń jạhira.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Ńelpe, uni do rimilko lekae oṭaṅ hijukʼkana. Uniyakʼ rãt gạḍiko do bharḍo leka hijukʼkana ar uniren sadomko do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ khon hõko coṭkargea. Hae, hae, abo do bon jarkharena!" 
Jeremiah4:14 E Jerusalem, amakʼ ontor reakʼ bạṛicʼakʼko ạrupʼ saphaeme jemon bańcaoem ńam. Ar mon reakʼ bạṛicʼ hudisko hõ ar tinạkʼ dinem dohokakʼa?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Dan nagraha ar Ephrayim reakʼ buruko khon muhin reakʼ katha do lại jạhirokʼ kana. 
Jeremiah4:16 Jạt jạtrenko ṭhen ar Jerusalemrenko ṭhen niạ katha jạhirpe, “Gherao ekʼsetʼ lạgitʼ lạṛhại phạdko do sạṅgiń disạm khonko hijukʼkana; onko do Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko hohoyetʼkana." 
Jeremiah4:17 Khetren pahradarko leka onko do Jerusalemko gherao eseda, ente uni do iń upạrteye hul akada. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Jeremiah4:18 Amakʼ colon ar amakʼ sanam kạmiko iạtege noako do am upạrteko hecʼakana. Noa do amakʼ dusṭami reakʼ sạjạikana. Noa do ạḍitetʼ haṛhatʼgea; noa do amakʼ ontorre bitʼ akana.” 
Jeremiah4:19 Hae, ińakʼ mon do, ińakʼ ontor do! Iń doń khadbadaokʼ kana. Hae, ińakʼ ontor, iń doń dhak dhakaokʼ kana. Iń do hape akan bạń tahẽdaṛeakʼ kana, ente sakwa reakʼ saḍe ar lạṛhại reakʼ sabadiń ańjomakada." 
Jeremiah4:20 Muhin cetan muhin do hijukʼkana; goṭa disạmge dhaṅdhaserokʼa. Ar thoṛa ghạṛicʼ khange ińakʼ tạmbuko, ar ackage ińakʼ tạmbu reakʼ orwalko do jarkharokʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah4:21 Tinạkʼ din nisạn do tul akaniń ńela, ar tinạkʼ din sakwa reakʼ saḍe doń ańjoma?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Ińren hoṛko doko lelhagea; onko do bako baḍae akadińạ. Onko do bebuj hopon ar hoponera kanako; onko do bujhạu reakʼ daṛege bạnukʼtakoa. Bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiren guruko kanako, menkhan bogeakʼ kạmi do bako baḍaea.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Iń do dhạrtiń beṅgetʼada; ona do ạlmạl ar khạligea; sermako secʼ iń beṅgetʼkeda, onḍe do marsal bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah4:24 Buruko secʼ iń beṅgetʼkeda, onako do dal dalaokʼ kana; ar ḍuṅgriko do ḍikạ ḍakekʼ kana." 
Jeremiah4:25 Beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda, onḍe do cele hoṛge bạnukʼkoa; ar coṭren cẽṛẽ hõko dạṛ akada." 
Jeremiah4:26 Beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda Probhu Isor samaṅre, uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre samaṅre disạm do hahaṅkar hoyakana; uniyakʼ sanam nagrahako do dhaṅ dhaser akana." 
Jeremiah4:27 Probhu Isore meneda, “Goṭa disạmge ujạṛokʼa, menkhan purạ puri do bạń marao utạra." 
Jeremiah4:28 Dhạrti doe homor halaṅa ar coṭ sermako do ńutokʼa, ente ińge noa katha doń meneda. Noa do ińgeń ṭhik dohoakada; ona khon do bạń pạc ruạṛokʼa, ona doń hoeocoygea.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Aswari ar dhinkiạkoakʼ sabad ańjomte nagraharen sanam hoṛ doko dạṛ pạnḍuja. Adom hoṛ do gajaṛteko bolokʼa ar adom hoṛ do maraṅ maraṅ dhiriteko rakapʼa. Mitʼke mitʼ nagraha do ujạṛ akan tahẽna; onḍe do cele hoṛge bako girobasokʼa. 
Jeremiah4:30 E ḍahao marao akan nagraha, am do cetʼem cekaya? Arakʼ kicricʼ ar sona reakʼ gohnate do cedakʼem abhranokʼ kana? Cedakʼ mẽtʼre do aenom kajarem lagaojoṅ kana? Am do ạuṛiyakʼgem sajokʼ kana. Amren dulạṛiạko do amko kurudam kana, onko do amakʼ jiwi hatao lạgitʼko kurumuṭu kana." 
Jeremiah4:31 Mitʼṭen maejiuakʼ bedonokʼ reakʼ aṛaṅ leka, pạhil hopone janamokʼ reakʼ bedon leka Sionren hoponerawakʼ rakʼ iń ańjomakada. Uni do sahẽtʼ ńam lạgitʼe ahkaokʼ kana ar ti tiạrkateye meneda, “Hae iń doń acetokʼ kana, khũniyạhiko do ińko seseń kana.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jerusalem reakʼ ḍaharkore onte note ńir baṛaepe ar beṛhaete beṅgetʼ ạcurpe. Onḍenakʼ nagraha reakʼ haṭ bajarkore khoj hataope. Ńelpe, nonkan jãhãepe ńamea se baṅa okoe do dhorom ar sạriyakʼreye dãṛãnkan enḍekhan iń do ona nagrahań ikạkakʼa." 
Jeremiah5:2 Ar onkoko men, ‘jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana,’ enhõ onko do eṛe eṛeko kiriạkʼ kana.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 E Probhu Isor, am do cetʼ sạriyakʼ bam beṅgetʼakʼ kana? Onkom hạ̃nletʼkore onko do cetʼ baṅ hasoletʼkoa; ar onkom sumạrletʼkore hõ onko do bako sudhrạulena. Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do dhiri khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiko keṭecʼketʼtakote kastaokʼ hõ bako aṅgocleda." 
Jeremiah5:4 Iń doń hudisleda, “Onko do nacar arko lelhagea, ente onko do Probhu Isorakʼ hor ar akoren Isorakʼ ạn-ạri bako baḍaea." 
Jeremiah5:5 Onatege iń do mukhiyạko ṭheniń senokʼa ariń galmaraoakoa; onko do khạṭige Probhu Isorakʼ hor ar akoren Isorakʼ ạnko baḍaegea.” Menkhan onko do mitʼdomte arãṛ rạputʼkate tonolko topakʼ akada. 
Jeremiah5:6 Ona iạte bir khon mitʼṭen dhạcri kul do oḍok hecʼkate onkoe gocʼkoa. Ar hahaṅkarren mitʼṭen hunḍạr doe maraokoa ar onkoakʼ nagraha ṭhen mitʼṭen tạrupʼ do tãṛãkʼ akane tahena. Ar jãhãege onḍe khonko oḍokokʼ onko doe or cirạkoa, ente onkoakʼ ghạṭ do ḍhergea ar bạṛicʼ horte calakʼ reakʼ ghoṭna hõ maraṅgetakoa." 
Jeremiah5:7 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jerusalem, am do cedakʼ iń ikạmea? Amren hoponko doko bạgi giḍiakadińạ ar okoe do Isorko baṅkan onkoakʼ ńutumteko kiriạkʼ kana. Iń do onkoakʼ jạruṛokʼakʼ jotowakʼ iń purun akatʼtakore hõ, enhõ onko doko laṭghaṭ akada ar kusumbikoakʼ oṛakʼte gad gadko calaoena." 
Jeremiah5:8 Onko do lacʼ bi jomakatʼ bandhar sadomko leka eṭakʼkoren bạhu tulucʼ giticʼ midokʼ lạgitʼko hinhạuakokan tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah5:9 Iń Probhu Isorgeń kulikana, niạ iạte onko do cetʼ bạń sạjạikoa? Nonkan jạtrenko upạrte iń do cetʼ bạń hala hạliya?" 
Jeremiah5:10 “Ape do Jerusalem reakʼ darkha bagwan talate sen paromokʼpe ar onako maraope menkhan purạte do alope nosṭo caba utạra. Ona reakʼ dạṛko hese giḍikakʼpe, ente noko do Probhu Isorren doko baṅkana." 
Jeremiah5:11 Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko do ińre ạḍitetʼ bepạtiạranko hoyakana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah5:12 Onko do Probhu Isor reaṅ eṛeakʼgeko roṛeda. Onko doko meneda, “Uni do cetatgeye baṅkana. Aboakʼ jãhãn loksan do baṅ hoyokʼ tabona; abo do tishõ lạṛhại ar akal do babon ńela." 
Jeremiah5:13 Nạbiko do hoe lekako hoyakana; onkore Isorakʼ katha do bạnukʼa. Onate onko okako men ona do onkorege hoyokʼa. 
Jeremiah5:14 Onatege phạdkoren Probhu Isor do nonkae meneda, “Hoṛko niạko menetʼte amakʼ mocare ińakʼ katha do seṅgel lekań hoeocoya ar noko hoṛ do kaṭ lekań hoyocokoa; ar ona seṅgel do onkoe jomkoa.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israel jạtrenko, am upạrte sạṅgiń disạm khon mitʼ jạtrenkoń ạgukoa. Onko do sedae jugren ṭikạu akan jạtrenko kanako; onko hoṛkoakʼ pạrsi do bape baḍaea ar onkoakʼ katha hõ bape bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah5:16 Onkoakʼ sar ṭhoṅga do jhicʼ akatʼ kobor leka; onko jotoge daṛean bir kanako. 
Jeremiah5:17 Onko do apeakʼ phosol ar jomakʼko jomtapea, aperen hopon ar hoponerakoko jomkoa; onko do aperen bhiḍi-merom-ḍaṅgra palko jomkoa, ar apeakʼ sanam darkha bagwan ar loa dareko jom cabaetapea. Ar okaṭakʼ gaṛ nagraharepe bhorsakʼkan ona do tarwaṛeteko dhaṅdhasera.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Probhu Isore meneda, “Enhõ onako dinre purạte do bạń dhaṅdhasera." 
Jeremiah5:19 Tinre hoṛko kulimea, ‘aboren Probhu Isor do abore cedakʼ nonkae kạmikeda?’ Unre onkom metakoa, ‘cetʼleka iń bạgikate apeakʼ disạmre debotakope sewawako kan onkage okaṭakʼ disạm apeakʼ baṅkan ona disạmre senkate ńit ape do bidisiạkope sapʼsorakoa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Probhu Isor do Jakob bõsrenko niạ katha lạiyako ar Jihudạ ṭhen niạ katha jạhirako lạgitʼe meneda," 
Jeremiah5:21 “E lelha ar bebuj hoṛko, okoe do mẽtʼ tahen tulucʼ bape ńeńelkan, lutur tahen tulucʼ bape ańjomkan, ape do luturakʼtińpe." 
Jeremiah5:22 Iń do cetʼ bape botorạń kana? Iń samaṅre cetʼ bape thar tharaokʼ kana? Ińge jaejug reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobos lekate gitilte doreão reakʼ simạnań ṭhik dohoakada, jemon jalapuri do ona bae parom daṛeakʼ. Ona reakʼ ḍheoko hecʼlenre hõ ona do bae leṭecʼ daṛeakʼa; ar ona do hud hudạukʼre hõ bae parom daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah5:23 Menkhan noko hoṛkoakʼ ontor do keṭecʼgetakoa ar onko do huhul jạtren kanako. Onko do bạṛicʼ horteko ghańjeṛ akana. 
Jeremiah5:24 Onko do mone monete hõ bako mena, ‘dela, aboren Probhu Isor bon botorae ma, ente uni do jao okte lolo ar rabaṅ dinreye dakʼ abon kana, ar phosol irokʼ jokhecʼ hõ jaogeye rukhiyạyetʼ bona.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Apeakʼ bedhorom kạmi iạte noako do sạṅgińre dohoakana; apeakʼ ghạṭ iạte apeakʼ bhạlại do baṅ hoyoktapea. 
Jeremiah5:26 “Ińren hoṛko talare bạṛicʼ hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe do cẽṛẽ jhãmpako leka tãṛãkʼ akaeko tahenkan; onko do pạsi oḍaokate manwako sapʼkoa. 
Jeremiah5:27 Khańca do cẽṛẽkote cetʼleka perecʼge onkage onkoakʼ oṛakʼ hõ eṛe cholkote perecʼgea. Onate onko do kisạ̃ṛ ar daṛeanko hoyakana," 
Jeremiah5:28 Onko do moṭa arko cĩkạ̃ṛ akana. Onkoakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ simạko do bạnukʼtakoa; ṭũạr amarko jemon hok reakʼ bicạr aloko ńam onate onko secʼ bako teṅgokʼ kana ar nacarkoakʼ ạidạri hõ bako rukhiyạyetʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah5:29 Onate cetʼ onko do bạń sạjạikoa? Iń do cetʼ nonkan jạtrenko cetanre bạń halaea? Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Jeremiah5:30 “Disạm talare ạḍi botoranakʼ ghoṭnakoge hoyokʼkana. 
Jeremiah5:31 Nạbiko do eṛeyakʼko nạbiyeda, naekeko do akoakʼ tirege ạidạri dohokateko ḍanṭao kana, ar ińren hoṛko do nonkageko dulạṛkana. Menkhan E ińren hoṛko, ona reakʼ mucạtʼ hecʼlenre cetʼpe cekaea?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Benjạminren hoṛko, rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ ńir joṅpe. Jerusalem khon ńirjoṅpe. Tekoa nagrahare sakwa oroṅpe. Beth-hakeremre cinhạ tul rakabtape, ente utạr secʼ khon jarkhar ar muhin dokin samaṅ ṭhikakada." 
Jeremiah6:2 Napae ar lulubucuteye tahenkan Sionren kuṛi doń maraoea. 
Jeremiah6:3 Gukʼpiko cetʼleka pal bhiḍiwanteko hijukʼ onkage rapajko hõ akoren lạṛhại phạdkoante uni upạrteko hijukʼa; uni beṛhaete onko do tạmbuko ṭaṅgaoa ar apan ạpin jaegareko tahena. 
Jeremiah6:4 Onkoko mena, ‘uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ sapṛaokʼpe. Ma beretʼpe, dela bo calakʼa, abo do tikin jokhecʼge jhãpbo ema. Menkhan hae, marsal do komao idikʼkana, ar ńut reakʼ umul do jhạl idikʼkana." 
Jeremiah6:5 Onate ma beretʼpe, dela, ńindạge abo do jhãpbo ema ar uniyakʼ gaṛko bon mohor meṭaotaea.’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, “Dareko makʼ bhindạṛpe ar Jerusalem upạrte ghekʼrao pinḍhạ benaope. Niạ nagraha do sạjạite hõ sạjạiyokʼgea; ona do jor-julumte perecʼ akana." 
Jeremiah6:7 Kuń reakʼ dakʼ cetʼleka tartạriạ tahen onkage uni do acʼakʼ dusṭạmiye tartạriạ ocoyeda. Ona bhitrire jorbojor ar jarkhar reakʼ saḍe ańjomokʼ kana; uniyakʼ rog ar ghạl do jaoge iń samaṅre menakʼa. 
Jeremiah6:8 E Jerusalem, sontorokʼ reakʼ katha ańjomme, ar baṅkhan am ṭhen khon ruạṛ senkate amakʼ disạmiń jarkhar cabaytama ar baṅ berelokʼ disạmgeń hoeocoya.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Darkha khet khon cetʼ leka darkha joko gotʼ doṛhae onkage bạiriko do disạm khon Israel jạtrenko gotʼ dohṛakoa. Okoe hoṛ darkha joe god ar cetʼleka tiye ạwil onko hõ sarecʼ hoṛkore onkageko kạmiya.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Okoeyiń galmaraoakoa ar okoeyiń sontorkoa jemon ińakʼ kathako ańjomtiń? Onkoakʼ lutur do tepetʼgete bako ańjom ńameda. Probhu Isorakʼ katha onko lạgitʼ do mitʼṭecʼ henostage hoyakana; onare jãhãn rạskạge bako ńameda. 
Jeremiah6:11 Menkhan iń do Probhu Isorakʼ raṅgaoteń perecʼ akana; iń do ar bạń sambṛao daṛeakʼ kana. Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do kulhiren gidrạko cetanre ar mitʼ ṭhenko jarwa akan juạnko cetanre dulme. Onate bạhu ar jãwãe hõ onarekin sabokʼa, ar haṛamko ar ḍher haṛam hoṛ hõ rukhiyạ do ohoko ńamlea." 
Jeremiah6:12 Okoe disạmreko girobasokʼkan onko upạrte tinre sạjại reakʼ tiyiń rakaba unre eṭakʼkoakʼ tite onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko, khet baṛgeko ar onkoren era uruko hõko jimạkoa." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Huḍińko khon hapṛakʼko hạbicʼ sanamkoge labko monejoṅ kana, nạbi ar naekeko hõ eṛeyakʼko kạmikana." 
Jeremiah6:14 Onko do ińren hoṛkoakʼ ghạlkoko tolkatako kana okaṭakʼ do cetʼge baṅkan. Onkoko meneda, ‘suluk, suluk,’ menkhan suluk do sạrige bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Jeremiah6:15 Onko do akoakʼ ona baṛicʼ kạmi iạte cetʼko lajaokʼ kana? Baṅa, onko do cetʼ lajaoge bạnukʼtakoa; onko do lajaokʼge bako baḍaea. Ona iạte onko do gurokʼko sãoteko gurokʼa. Ar tinreń sạjạikoa unre onko doko tawakʼ ńurokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko nonkae metakokana, “Dobạṭiạkore teṅgokate ńelpe ar sedae jug reakʼ suṛucʼ horko kulijoṅpe; bhage hor do okare menakʼa mente ar ona horte calakʼpe. Onate ape do apan ạpin jiwi lạgitʼ jirạupe ńama. Menkhan apepe meneda, ‘ale do ona horte bale taṛama.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ape cetanre pahradarko bahalkateń metatʼkoa, ‘sakwa reakʼ saḍe moneyakʼpe.’ Menkhan apepe meneda, ‘ale do bale moneyakʼa.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Onate E jạt jạtrenko, ańjompe; ińren hoṛkoakʼ oka hoyokʼ ona ạribạndhipe." 
Jeremiah6:19 E pirthimi, ańjomme, iń do hoṛko cetanre muhiniń paṛao ocoya; ona do onkoakʼ hudis joṅ reakʼ joge hoyokʼa, ente ińakʼ katha do bako ańjomleda ar ińakʼ ạn-ạri hõko nihạ̃t giḍiakada." 
Jeremiah6:20 E ińren hoṛko, Seba disạm khon oka kunduru hijukʼkan se sạṅgiń disạm khon oka soros boc hijukʼkan onate ińakʼ do cetʼ jạruṛ? Apeakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko bạsutokʼakʼko do baṅkana; ar apeakʼ janwar dãṛẽteakʼko hõ bae kusi ocoyediń kana.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Onate Probhu Isore meneda, “Noko hoṛ samaṅre iń do aema tạkʼkicʼakʼ iń dohoya. Apat ar hoponko onare mitʼ domteko tohodokʼa; aḍepaseren hoṛ ar gateko doko marao utạrokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, “Ńelpe, utạr disạm khon mitʼ dol maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko hijukʼkana; pirthimi reakʼ ses simạna khon mitʼ maraṅ jạtrenko udgạu ocokʼkana." 
Jeremiah6:23 Onko ṭhen do akʼ sar ar borlom menakʼa; onko do kurmutạha ar bin dayakʼ hoṛ kanako. Sadomte decʼ hijukʼ jokhecʼ onkoakʼ sabad do jalapuri reakʼ hud hud saḍe leka; E Sionren hoponera, onko do amre jhãp em lạgitʼ lạṛhại bir lekako thạrakana.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Onko reaṅ khoborle ńamakada ar onate aleakʼ ti do lạbṛugokʼkantalea. Ale do hasotele thakao akana; bedonokʼkan maejiu lekage haso rakapʼ akawatʼlea. 
Jeremiah6:25 Nagraha bahrete alope oḍok calakʼa se kulhikore hõ alope dãṛãna, ente bạirikoakʼ tire do tarwaṛe menakʼa ar goṭage bạṛicʼ botor menakʼa." 
Jeremiah6:26 E ińren hoṛko, gõṛẽ kicricʼ horogpe ar torocʼre kunḍlạṅ baṛaepe. Sadher hoponakʼ gujukʼre cetʼleka hoṛko homor halaṅ onkage homor halaṅpe, ente jarkharicʼ do acʼkage abo cetanreye hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah6:27 Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do hoṛkoren biḍạu aṭkaricʼ iń doho akatʼmea jemon onkom biḍạu aṭkar daṛeakote onkoakʼ horkom ńel daṛeakʼ." 
Jeremiah6:28 Onko do jotoge huhulko kanako; onko do okta cintại lạgitʼko dãṛãbaṛaea. Onko do pitạl ar mẽṛhẽtʼ lekan kanako; ar jotogeko kharap caba akana. 
Jeremiah6:29 Seṅgelte sisạ jeredokʼ lạgitʼ cạpwạ do ạḍitetʼ hoeye emokʼkana; menkhan ạuṛiyakʼgeko galao saphakʼkana, ente bạṛicʼko do bako ocokʼ giḍikʼkana." 
Jeremiah6:30 Onko do nihạ̃t giḍiakan rupạ kanako, ente iń Probhu Isorge onko doe nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼkoa.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ mundil reakʼ duạr ṭhen teṅgokate niạ khobor lại jạhir lạgitʼe metadea, Jihudạren okoeko hoṛ noa duạrte Probhu Isor sewawae lạgitʼko bolokʼ onko do jemon Probhu Isorakʼ kathako luturakʼ." 
Jeremiah7:2  
Jeremiah7:3 Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Ape do apeakʼ colon beohar ar kạmiko sudhrạutape enḍekhan niạ ṭhạ̃iregeń girobas ocopea." 
Jeremiah7:4 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ ńutumte oka eṛe katha roṛogokʼkan onare do alope bhorsakʼa. 
Jeremiah7:5 Ape do sạrige apeakʼ colon ar kạmiko reakʼpe jutletape khan ar hoṛkoakʼ hok reakʼpe chinḍạuletako khan," 
Jeremiah7:6 ar bidisiạko, ṭũạr amarko se rạnḍiko bape santaoko ar niạ disạmre miridoskoakʼ mãyãm bape joro ocoy ar eṭakʼ debotako bape pańjako," 
Jeremiah7:7 enḍekhan niạ disạmre aperen hapṛamko cetʼleka piṛhike piṛhi girobasokʼ lạgitʼ iń em akatʼko ape hõ onkage nonḍeń girobas ocopea. 
Jeremiah7:8 “Ńelpe, ape do eṛe kathakoregepe pạtiạu akana, menkhan onare do cetʼ porhoge bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah7:9 Ape do kombṛoko, gogocʼko, laṭghaṭko ar eṛe eṛe kiriạkʼko kanape ar Bakʼ-al debota ńutumte dhupkope jeretʼetʼ kana. Ona chaḍa okoe debotako bape orom akatʼko onkope pańjayetʼkoa." 
Jeremiah7:10 Ar ona tayom do ińakʼ oṛakʼre hecʼkate iń samaṅre teṅgokatepe meneda, ale dole rukhiyạle ńamkeda. Apepe onkayeda jemon bạṛicʼ kạmikope kạmi daṛeakʼ." 
Jeremiah7:11 Ińakʼ oṛakʼ do cetʼ ape ṭhen ḍạkukoakʼ dander hoyakana? Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, iń do noakoń ńeletʼgea." 
Jeremiah7:12 “Ape do ńitokʼ Silore one ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ okare pạhilteń hoyocoletʼ onḍe calakʼpe ar ińren hoṛ Israelkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ khạtirte onare cetʼ iń cekaletʼ ona ńel ạguiype. 
Jeremiah7:13 Ape do noakope kại akada, metakʼme bar bar metatʼpere hõ ape ańjomletʼtińạ ar hohoatʼpere hõ bape goṅledińa." 
Jeremiah7:14 Nokʼoe niạ oṛakʼ cetanrepe bhorsakʼkan ona oṛakʼ do ińakʼ tahen oṛakʼ iń hoyocoleda, ar niạ ṭhạ̃i do ape ar aperen hapṛamkoń ematʼko tahẽkana. Menkhan apeakʼ kại iạte niạ oṛakʼ ar niạ ṭhạ̃i do ona lekań hoeocoya one Siloreń cekaletʼ." 
Jeremiah7:15 Iń do aperen boehako lạgitʼ, metakʼme Ephrayimren hoṛkore cetʼ iń cekaletʼ onkage ape hõ iń samaṅ khoniń ṭhelao giḍikapea.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 Probhu Isore meneda, “Noko hoṛko lạgitʼ do alom koejoṅa, onko lạgitʼ do alom raga ar jãhãnakʼ iń ṭhen alom nehõrokʼa; ar jãhãnakʼ hõ alom ạjijokʼa, ente iń do bạń ańjomtama." 
Jeremiah7:17 Am do cetʼ bam ńeńelkana Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahakore ar Jerusalem reakʼ kulhikore onko do cetʼko ceka kana mente? 
Jeremiah7:18 Gidrạko do sahanko halaṅeda, apatko do seṅgelko joleda ar maejiuko do holoṅko sipiyeda ar sermaren rạni ńutumte piṭhạko benaoeda. Ar iń duk ocoyiń lạgitʼ onko do debotako ńutumte coḍor samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅeda." 
Jeremiah7:19 Menkhan noako kạmikate cetʼ ińko duk ocoyedeń kana?” Onko do akotege lajaoko ạgujoṅkana ar apnartetʼko dukokʼkana.” 
Jeremiah7:20 Ona iạte Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Ińakʼ edre ar raṅgao do niạ ṭhạ̃i cetanre, manwa ar janwarko cetanre, ṭạnḍi reakʼ dare nạ̃ṛĩko cetanre ar jumi reakʼ phosolko cetanreń paṛao ocoya, ar ona edre do jolokʼtege tahena, baṅge ĩṛĩjokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Apeakʼ eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sãote jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅkate ona reakʼ jel do cedakʼ bape jomeda?" 
Jeremiah7:22 Iń do noa kathań meneda, ente Misor disạm khon aperen hapṛamko tinreń oḍok ạguletʼkoa unre jeredokʼ ar eṭakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ katha iń do bạń metatʼko tahẽkana se bạń hukumatʼko tahẽkana," 
Jeremiah7:23 menkhan noań hukumatʼko tahẽkana, ‘ińakʼ katha leka senokʼpe, iń do aperen Isoriń hoyokʼa ar ape do ińren hoṛpe hoyokʼtińạ. Ar oka horte calakʼ reakʼ iń hukumakatʼpe ona horte calakʼpe jemon bhạlại hoyokʼtape.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Menkhan onko do ona bako ańjomleda ar mone hõ bako moneyada; ona bodolte akoakʼ kusi leka, akoakʼ bạṛicʼ mon reakʼ kạṭhuạtetʼ lekako taṛamkeda. Onko doko pạc ruạṛena, ar bako lahalena." 
Jeremiah7:25 Aperen hapṛamko Misor disạmko bạgiyatʼ tayom khon teheń hạbicʼ dinke din ape ṭhen ińren gutiko, metakʼme nạbikoń kolletʼkoa." 
Jeremiah7:26 Menkhan ińakʼ katha do bape ańjomleda se mone hõ bape moneyada. Ape do hoṭokʼpe keṭecʼketʼtapete aperen hapṛamko khon hõ ḍher bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmi akada. 
Jeremiah7:27 “Am do noako katham galmaraoakore onko do amakʼ katha bako ańjomtama; arem hohoakore hõ onko do bako goṅama. 
Jeremiah7:28 Onate onkom metakoa, ‘ape do onko jạtrenko kanape, okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ sana leka bako senlen ar uniye sudhrạuletʼkore hõ bako hetaoatʼtaea. Sạriyakʼ do cabayena; ar ona do onkoakʼ moca khon getʼ gidiyena.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:29 E Jerusalem, amakʼ upʼ getʼkate sạṅgińte giḍikakʼme; ceḍe ḍuṅgrikore homor halaṅme, ente Probhu Isor do acʼe raṅgao akan piṛhirenko nihạ̃t are giḍi sae akatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah7:30 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jihudạren hoṛ do iń nońjorre bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi akada. Ińakʼ oṛakʼre akoren hirkhạwan boṅgako doho akatʼkote onako bhonḍakada." 
Jeremiah7:31 Onko do akoren hoponko ar hoponerako seṅgelre khadleko lạgitʼ Bin-hinom buru lodam reakʼ Tophet ńutumanakʼ than boṭkocʼko benao akada. Menkhan niạ hukum iń do bạń em akana, ińakʼ monre hõ ona do baṅ rakapʼlena." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ona iạte ńelme, nonkan dinko hijukʼkana hoṛko do ona ṭhạ̃i Tophet se Bin-hinom tapol do ar bako metakʼa, bickom khukhun buru nalako metakʼa, ente tinạkʼ din Tophtre jaega tahena unạkʼ din onḍege onko do gocʼkoko topakoa." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ona tayom noko hoṛkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽko ar dhạrtiren janwarkoakʼ jomakʼ hoyokʼa ar onko lagako lạgitʼ do celehõ bako tahena. 
Jeremiah7:34 Iń do Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahakore ar Jihudạ reakʼ sanam horkore rạskạ ar hulạs reakʼ aṛaṅ ar jãwãe ar bạhu kuṛiyakʼ aṛaṅiń thir ocoya, ente disạm do mitʼṭecʼ jarkharakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah8:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Unre Jihudạren raj ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạkoakʼ jaṅko, naeke ar nạbikoakʼ jaṅko ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ jaṅko do onkoakʼ topa khon oḍok ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah8:2 Ona jaṅko do siń-cando, ńindạ-cando ar sermaren sanam ipilko samaṅre giḍi akan tahena, ente onko do sermaren sanamgeko dulạṛetʼko tahẽkana arko sewawako kan tahẽkana ar onkoko pańjayetʼko tahẽkante, onko sãoteko solhayetʼ tahẽkana arko sewawako kan tahẽkana. Ar ona jaṅko do jarwakate bako topakakʼa, bickom onako do otre guricʼmande lekage hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah8:3 Okareń sạṅgiń giḍikako onḍe onko dusṭạmi jạtren sarecʼ jiwetʼ tahen hoṛ do jion khon morongeko kusiyakʼa. Noa katha do phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeye roṛeda.” 
Jeremiah8:4 Probhu Isor do noa katha lạlạiye metadińạ, “Hoṛko bindạṛlenre cetʼ ar bako beretʼa? Jãhãe bạṛicʼ horteko senlen khan cetʼ bako ruạṛ hijukʼa?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Menkhan Jerusalemren hoṛ do bạṛicʼ horte senkate cedakʼ bako ruạṛ hijukʼkana? Onko do eṛeyakʼko sapʼ kajak akawana; ar ruạṛ hijukʼ do bako rebenkana. 
Jeremiah8:6 Iń do mone lagaokateń ańjomakada, onko do ṭhikakʼ katha bako roṛeda. Bạṛicʼakʼko khon mon ạcurkate okoehõ bako meneda, ‘hae, cetʼ iń cekakeda!” Sadom cetʼ leka lạṛhạireye ńir bolokʼkan onkage onko do apan ạpin horteko calakʼkana." 
Jeremiah8:7 Kisni hõ acʼakʼ niṭakatʼ okteye baḍaekana, mala potam, bhạluạ ar kõkʼ hõ akoakʼ ruạṛ hijukʼ reakʼ okteko baḍaekana, menkhan ińren hoṛko do ińakʼ ạn-ạri secʼ bako moneyakʼ kana." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Ape do cekatepe meneda, ‘ale do ạkilanko kanale ar Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko ale ṭhen menakʼa.’ Menkhan dhorom guru do ạn-ạriko bhulgeko lạiyetʼte olokʼko do eṛe kathako ol akada." 
Jeremiah8:9 Ạkilan hoṛ do lajao arko torasokʼ kana ar jhạlireko paṛaokʼ kana. Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ kathako nihạ̃t giḍiakada, enḍekhan onko do cetʼ lekan ạkil menakʼtakoa?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ona iạte akoren bạhuko do eṭakʼ hoṛko ar onkoakʼ khet baṛge do nãwã mạlik koń emakoa. Huḍiń utạricʼ khon maran utạricʼ hạbicʼ jotoge lab lạgitʼko lalocakʼ kana; nạbiko ar naekeko jotoge eṛeyakʼko kạmikana. 
Jeremiah8:11 Ińren hoṛkoakʼ ghạlko onko do eken cetan cetanteko bogeyetʼtakoa. Onko do ‘suluk, suluk ko,’ meneda menkhan suluk do bạnukʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah8:12 Onko do cetʼ akoakʼ ona bạṛicʼ kạmi iạteko lajaokʼkana? Baṅa, onko do cetʼ lajaoge bạnukʼtakoa; onko do lajaokʼge bako cetʼakada. Ona iạte onko do gurokʼko sãoteko gurokʼa. Ar tinre onkoń sạjạikoa unre onko doko tawakʼ ńur ocokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah8:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do onkoń maraokoa. Darkha nạ̃ṛĩre jãhãn joge baṅ tahena, loa darere loa hõ baṅ tahena ar onako reakʼ sakam do tolmojokʼa. Ar okań em akawatʼko ona hõ onko khon sahaṛ akan tahena.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Nonḍe do cedakʼ bon duṛupʼ akana? Dela, mitʼ sãote ona gaṛ nagrahate bon bolokʼma ar onḍege bon maraokʼ ma, ente aboren Probhu Isor do nosṭokʼ lạgitʼe alae akatʼ bona ar ńui lạgitʼ bis dakʼe em akatʼbona, ente uni upạrte bon kại akada." 
Jeremiah8:15 Sulukokʼ lạgitʼ bon aslena menkhan jãhãn bhạlạige baṅ hoylen tabona; abo do bogekʼ lạgitʼ bon aslena menkhan heṛan botor seṭeratʼbona. 
Jeremiah8:16 Dan nagraha khon bạirikoren sadomakʼ phurko ańjomokʼ kana; onkoren sadomkoakʼ hiṅhạukʼte goṭa disạm do thar tharokʼkana. Disạm ar ona reakʼ sanam nagraha ar onaren hoṛko maraoko lạgitʼko hijukʼkana. 
Jeremiah8:17 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, iń do apeko talare bisan bińkoń kolkoa; onko kạrinạṅgiń biń do cetʼte hõ bako bandhonokʼa, onko do apeko sogakʼpea.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 Ińakʼ duk do nunạkʼ ḍhera, ona reakʼ jiwi raṛecʼ do bạnukʼa; ińre ińakʼ ontor do ạḍi dukokʼkana." 
Jeremiah8:19 Sạṅgiń disạm khon ińren hoṛko do noa rakʼko ańjommeda, “Probhu Isor do cetʼ Sionre bạnuiya? Uniren raj do cetʼ onḍe do bạnuiya?” Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Onko do onkoren sanam boṅga muṭhạnko ar onkoren eṛe boṅgakote cedakʼko ạṛis ocoyediń kana?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Ińren hoṛko meneda, “Phosol irokʼ okte hõ parom calaoena, ar lolo din hõ cabayena, menkhan bańcao do babon ńamleda.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ińren hoṛko lạbṛukʼente iń hõń lạbṛukʼ akana; iń doń homor halaṅetʼkana ar bạṛicʼ botor sapʼakadińạ. 
Jeremiah8:22 Gileadre cetʼ molom do bạnukʼa? Onḍe do cetʼ cele ḍaktarge bạnukʼkoa? Enḍekhan iń jạtren hoponerawakʼ hoṛmo do cedakʼ baṅ bogekʼkana? 
Jeremiah9:1 Hae, ińakʼ bohokʼ do dakʼge hoylen khan, ar ińakʼ mẽtʼ do jharna dakʼge hoylentiń khan! Enḍekhan iń jạtren okoeko hoṛko gocʼ ocoakan onko lạgitʼ siń ar ńindạń rakʼkea." 
Jeremiah9:2 Hae, hahaṅkar ṭhạ̃ire horten calakʼkoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍerań hoylen khan! Enḍekhan ińren hoṛko bạgikate onḍegeń sen pharakkokʼa, ente onko jotoge laṭghaṭ ar ekʼṛekoren dol kanako." 
Jeremiah9:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Onko do eṛeyakʼ sar tuń lạgitʼ akoakʼ akʼ leka alaṅko sapṛao akatʼtakoa; disạmre sạriyakʼ cetanre eṛeyakʼ jitạu akana. Onko do kại cetanko kạiyeda. Ar akoren Isor mente bako aṅgoc edeńkana." 
Jeremiah9:4 Onko do mimitʼ gateko khon sontor akaeko tahenma ar apnar boehako hõ aloko pạtiạuako ma, ente mitʼke mitʼ boeha doko ṭhokagea ar mitʼke mitʼ gate doko okta baṛaegea." 
Jeremiah9:5 Gate do gateye ṭhokayea ar sạri katha do okoe hõ bako roṛeda. Onko do akoakʼ alaṅre eṛe roroṛko cetʼ akada; ar ghạṭ iạteko laṅga caba akana. 
Jeremiah9:6 Am do eṛeyakʼ talarem girobasokʼ kana! Amren hoṛko do eṛeyakʼteko perecʼgea; ar iń ṭhen do bako jimạkʼ kana.” 
Jeremiah9:7 Ona iạte phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, onko doń galaokoa ariń biḍạu aṭkarkoa, ente ińren hoṛko onka akatʼ iạte ar cetʼ iń ceka daṛeakʼa?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Onkoakʼ alaṅ do gogocʼakʼ sar leka; ona do phạsiạra kathageko roṛa. Onko do mocate aḍepaserenko tulucʼ sebel sebel kathako galmaraoa menkhan ontorre do uni upạrte jhãmpako oḍaoeda. 
Jeremiah9:9 Iń do cetʼ ona iạte bạń sạjạikoa? Nonkan jạtrenko cetanre ińge cetʼ bạń hala hạliya?” 
Jeremiah9:10 Buruko ńutumteń rakʼeda ar hahaṅkar reakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko lạgitʼ doń homor halaṅeda. Ente onako do dhaṅdhaser akana, ar okoehõ onkate do bako paromokʼkana. Mĩhũ meromkoakʼ bhokraokʼ hõ baṅ ańjomokʼkana. Coṭren cẽṛẽ ar janwar doko dạṛ akada arko calao cabayena." 
Jeremiah9:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ dhaṅdhaserakʼ ar toyokoakʼ tahen lạgitʼ bhugạkʼgeń hoeocoya. Ar Jihudạ nagrahako do nonkań dhaṅdhasera, onḍe do ar okoehõ bako girobasokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Jãhãe nonkan ạkilanicʼ menaea, okoe do onae bujhạu daṛeakʼ? Probhu Isor ṭhen khon ańjomkate okoe ona do eṭakʼkoe baḍae ocodaṛekekoa? Okaṭakʼ disạm do jarkhar iạte hahaṅkar leka roṅgo akan, ar onkate do celege bako paromokʼ kana?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, iń okaṭakʼ ạn-ạriń emakatʼko ona doko bạgi akawada; onko do ińakʼ aṛaṅ bako ańjomleda ar ona leka bako taṛamleda." 
Jeremiah9:14 Ona bodolte akoakʼ ontor reakʼ kạṭhuạtetʼ lekako senokʼkana. Ar akoren apatkoakʼ cecetʼakʼ leka onko hõ Bakʼal debotako pańjayede kana. 
Jeremiah9:15 Ona iạte iń do Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte noa kathań roṛeda, ‘ńelme, noko hoṛ do haṛhatʼ jomakʼ ar bis dakʼ iń ńũ ocokoa." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ar nonkan boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talareń chirchạturkoa okoe do akohõ baṅ ar akoren hapṛamko hõ bako baḍae akatʼko. Ar ạuriko marao utạrko hạbicʼ onko tayom tayomte lạṛhạiyiń kola.’ ” 
Jeremiah9:17 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ma ńitokʼ do hudiskate ńelpe. Homor halaṅ maejiuko hoho ạgukope; okoe do rarakʼreko gạkhuṛge onko hoho ạguko lạgitʼ hoṛko kolkope.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Onko do usạra hecʼkate abo ńutumteko jare jarekʼ ma jemon aboakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ hiḍir hiḍir jorokʼtabon. 
Jeremiah9:19 Sion khon jare jare ańjomokʼ kana, “Abo dobon jarkhar utạrena! Ar ạḍitetʼ bon lajao ocoakana! Aboakʼ oṛakʼ duạr do marao utạr akana, ar onatege aboakʼ disạm do bạgiyakʼ hoyokʼtabona.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Ńitokʼ do E Maejiuko, Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe; uniyakʼ moca reakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ lutur jhijtape. Ar aperen hoponerako jare jarekʼ cetʼakope ar eṭakʼko do homor halaṅ reakʼ sereń cetʼakope." 
Jeremiah9:21 Gujukʼ do aboakʼ jalna secʼte aboakʼ gaṛkore boloakana; ona do kulhi khon gidrạko ar dobạṭiạ khon juạnkoe marao utạr akatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah9:22 Probhu Isorge noa katha do memene metadińạ, “Hoṛkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do gur akan tahena guricʼ leka; irokʼicʼ tayomre binḍạko leka, okoehõ ona do bako jarwaea.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ạkilan hoṛ do akoakʼ ạkil iạte aloe sarhaokʼma, ar daṛeanko hõ akoakʼ daṛe iạte aloko sarhaokʼma ar kisạ̃ṛko hõ akoakʼ dhon iạte aloko sarhaokʼma," 
Jeremiah9:24 menkhan jãhãe sarhaokʼe menjoṅ kan khan uni do noa iạteye sarhaokʼma, uni do ińe orom akadińạ, metatʼme uni doe baḍae akadińạ, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do; ińakʼ dulạṛ do asambheṛgea ar dhạrtire ińakʼ kạmi do dhorom ar sạriyakʼte perecʼgea. Ente iń do noakogeń bạsutakʼkana. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Probhu Isore meneda, “Nonkan dinko hijukʼkana tinre iń do Misorre, Jihudạre, Edomre, Amonre, Moabre ar hahaṅkarreko girobasokʼ kan, okoe do bohokʼ banarsa aṛe reakʼ upʼko kaṭopʼetʼtako onko sanamkogeń sạjạikoa. Onko do eken hoṛmo motoko khatna akana, ontor do baṅa; Israelko hõ ontor do bako khatna akana.”" 
Jeremiah9:26  
Jeremiah10:1 E Israel jạtrenko, Probhu Isor okae metapekan ona ańjompe." 
Jeremiah10:2 Probhu Isore meneda, “Boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ cạl-colon do alope cetʼjoṅa, ar serma reakʼ cinhạko ńelte alope torasokʼa, ente eṭakʼ jạtrenko do ona ńelteko torasokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah10:3 Niạ reakʼ karon onkoakʼ dhorom cạl-colon do ạuṛiyakʼgetakoa. Onko do bir khon dareko makʼ ạguiyeda ar kạrigol do apnarakʼ tite baṭalite onare muṭhạnko benaoakʼkana. 
Jeremiah10:4 Onko do sona ar rupạte onako sajaoeda ar alo jemon ḍikạḍakekʼ onate kuṭạsi ar jạlạite onako uricʼeda. 
Jeremiah10:5 Onkoren boṅgako do taher goḍare bitʼ akatʼ bhibhiṛkạu khunṭiko leka kanako, onko do katha bako roṛ daṛeakʼa; onko do gokʼ idiko hoyokʼa; ente bako taṛam daṛeakʼa. Alope botorakoa; onko do apeakʼ bako loksan daṛeakʼa, ar bhạlại hõ bako bhạlại daṛeapea.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 E Probhu Isor, am leka do okoehõ bạnukʼkoa; am dom maraṅgea, ar amakʼ daṛe hõ maraṅgetama." 
Jeremiah10:7 E jạtkoren raj, okoe baṅ am do bae botoram? Noa do amakʼ kuṛại kana. Jạt jạtkoren sanam ạkilan hoṛko talare ar onkoakʼ sanam rajosṭiko talare am leka do celehõ bạnukʼkoa." 
Jeremiah10:8 Onko jotoge lelha ar bebujan kanako. Onkoren boṅga do kaṭteko benao akana, onko do cetʼ jãhãn sikhnạtko em daṛeakʼa?" 
Jeremiah10:9 Tạrsis khon koṭecʼ capṛawakʼ rupạ ar Uphas khon sonako ạguiyeda. Ar kạrigol ar sonhar do onakote boṅgako muṛạuetʼkoa. Onko do beguni roṅakʼ kicricʼ ar jeṅgetʼ arakʼ kicricʼko horokʼako kana; ona do gạkhuṛ kạrigol tite benaoakʼ kana. 
Jeremiah10:10 Menkhan Probhuge sạriyakʼren Isor kanae; uni doe jiwetʼgea ar jaejugren raj kanae. Uniyakʼ edrete dhạrti do thar tharaokʼa; jạt jạtrenko uniyakʼ edre do bako sahao daṛeakʼa. 
Jeremiah10:11 Hoṛko metakope, noko debota do ot ar serma bako sirjạuakada; onko do pirthimi khon ar serma latar khonko marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah10:12 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛete dhạrtiye sirjạu akada, ar acʼakʼ ạkiltege pirthimi reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạu akada ar uniyakʼ bujte sermae pasnao akada." 
Jeremiah10:13 Uniyakʼ hukumte serma reakʼ dakʼ do chilkibilkikʼ kana; uni do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna khon rimile rakapʼ ạguyetʼkana. Uni do dakʼ lạgitʼe bijli ocoyeda ar acʼakʼ murại khon hoe koe oḍok ạguiyeda. 
Jeremiah10:14 Sanam manwage bin ạkilan ar bebuj kanako; mimitʼ sonhar do akoren benao boṅga muṭhạn iạteko lajao ocokʼa. Uniren dul boṅga muṭhạnko doko ạuṛiyakʼgea, onkore do sahẽtʼge bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah10:15 Onako do ạuṛiyakʼgea, lajao ocokʼakʼ jiniskangea; bicạr hilokʼ onako do marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jakob reakʼ bakhra do noako leka do baṅkana, ente unige sanamakʼ jinisko reakʼ sisirjạuicʼ kanae ar Israel do uniyakʼ sompotti kana. Uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorge." 
Jeremiah10:17 Ape okoe dope gherao esetʼ ocoakan, ape do disạm bạgi oṭowakʼ lạgitʼ apan ạpin jinisko moṭraetape," 
Jeremiah10:18 ente Probhu Isore meneda, “Noa oktere okoe disạmreko tahen onko doń capatʼ giḍikakoa; onko cetanre nonkan ghoṭnań paṛao ocoya jemonko aṭkar daṛeakʼ.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Hae, ińakʼ jokhom do! One okaṭakʼ do baṅ bogekʼtiń! Enhõ nijạteń menjoṅkana, “Noa do ińakʼ rog kana, noa do sahaotege hoyokʼtińạ.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Ińakʼ tạmbu do jarkhar akana; ona reakʼ sanam baberko topakʼ akana. Ińren hoponko do iń ṭhen khonko oḍok calao akana, onko do ar bạnukʼkoa; ińakʼ tạmbu ar ona reakʼ orwal ṭaṅgao lạgitʼ ńitokʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Jeremiah10:21 Gukʼpiko doko bebujgea, onko do Probhu Isorakʼ mone joṅakʼ baḍae bako khoja; ar onatege bako jo bahakʼkana ar onkoren sanam pal janwarko doko chirchạtur akana." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ańjompe, khobor hijukʼkana! Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako do ujạṛokʼa ar toyokoakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i hoeocoy lạgitʼ utạr disạm khon gulmal reakʼ sabad hijukʼ kana." 
Jeremiah10:23 E Probhu Isor, ińiń baḍaea manwawakʼ jion hor acʼ apnarakʼ do baṅkana; uniyakʼ jaṅga reakʼ dhap lạgitʼ hukum hõ uniyakʼ kạmi do baṅkana." 
Jeremiah10:24 E Probhu Isor, eken dhorom bicạrte baṛe sudhrạuiń me, menkhan amakʼ edrete ona do alom onkaea, arem onkae khan iń doń caba utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah10:25 Okoe jạtrenko bako aṅgocme, ar okoe bako hohowam, onko cetanre amakʼ edre baṛe dulme. Onko do Jakobko jom akadea, ar uniyakʼ disạmko marao giḍiakada," 
Jeremiah11:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ jemon noa bondobos reakʼ kathakoń ańjom ar ona do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoń lạiyako, Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe noa bondobos reakʼ kathako bae ańjometʼ uni doe sarapangea." 
Jeremiah11:2  
Jeremiah11:3  
Jeremiah11:4 Tinre iń do aperen hapṛamko Misor disạm khon, mẽṛhẽtʼ bhaṭa khoniń oḍok ạguletʼkoa unre noa menkate onkoń hudisatʼko tahẽkana, ‘ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe ar iń okaṭakʼ cekaeyiń hukum akawatʼpe ona onkaepe, enḍekhan ape do ińren hoṛpe hoyokʼa ar iń do aperen Isorgeń hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah11:5 Iń do aperen hapṛamko ṭhen nonkan disạm emako lạgitʼ iń kiriạlena one okare do toa, darkha rasa ar cetʼ jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼ, ar ona gokʼakʼ doń purạugea.’ Ona disạmge teheń do apepe ạidạri akawana.” Ińiń roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Amen, Probhu Isor!”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Probhu Isor do Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahakore ar Jerusalem reakʼ kulhikore niạ lại sodor lạgitʼe metadińa, “Niạ bondobos reakʼ kathako ańjomkate ona manaope." 
Jeremiah11:7 Aperen hapṛamko tinre Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguletʼkoa unkhon teheń hạbicʼ ạḍi dhao sontorkateń metatʼko tahẽkana, ‘ape do ińakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomtińpe.’" 
Jeremiah11:8 Menkhan onko do bako ańjomleda ar bako moneyada; ona bodolte akoakʼ mon reakʼ kạṭhuạtetʼteko taṛametʼ tahẽkana. Onate okaṭakʼ bondobos manao reakʼ iń hukumatʼko tahẽkan ona bako manaoletʼte ona bondobos reakʼ katha lekateń sạjạiletʼkoa.” 
Jeremiah11:9 Ona tayom Probhu Isor doe metadińạ, “Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko talare mitʼṭecʼ soṛojontro calakʼkana." 
Jeremiah11:10 Onko do onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ kại secʼgeko ruạṛ akana one okoe do ińakʼ katha ańjom bako rebenlen. Onko do debotako sewawako lạgitʼ onkoko pańjaketʼkoa. Onkoren hapṛamko lạgitʼ oka bondobosiń doholetʼ ona do Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko bako manaoleda. 
Jeremiah11:11 Onatege iń Probhu Isor doń meneda, onko cetanre nonkan muhiniń paṛao ocoya one ona khon do bako ńir bańcao daṛeakʼa. Onko do iń ṭhenko ragre hõ onkoakʼ katha do bạń ańjomtakoa." 
Jeremiah11:12 Tinre muhin hijukʼa unre Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛ do senkate onko debota ṭhenko raga one okoe samaṅre dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan, menkhan onko do bako rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah11:13 Jihudạre tinạkʼ nagraha ar atoko menakʼ unạkʼge debotako hõ menakʼkoa, ar Jerusalemre tinạkʼ kulhiko menakʼ uniye lajao ocokʼ Bakʼal debota ńutumte dhup jered lạgitʼ pinḍko hõ unạkʼge benao akana." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Noko hoṛko lạgitʼ do alom koejoṅa se onko lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ hõ alom nehõrạńạ, onkoakʼ kosṭokʼ oktere ińko hohoạńre hõ iń do bạń ańjomtakoa." 
Jeremiah11:15 “Ińren dulạṛiạyicʼ do ińakʼ oṛakʼre cetʼ ạidạri menakʼtaea, aemako tulucʼ dusṭạmiye kạmiakatʼ khan? Cetʼ sonot jel do amakʼ nosṭokʼe eṛankea? E behokko, muhin hecʼapere hõ cetʼpe hulạskokʼa?”" 
Jeremiah11:16 Probhu Isor do noko jạtrenko jote perecʼ mońj mitʼṭen jạitun dare menteye hohoatʼko tahẽkana. Menkhan maraṅ birbão reakʼ saḍe iạte uni do onare seṅgele lagaoakʼa ar onate onako reakʼ ḍạrko do lo ṭhuṭkudokʼa. 
Jeremiah11:17 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor, okoe do uniye rohoelede uni do uniyakʼ sorbonas reakʼe ray akada, ente Jihudạ ar Israelren hoṛ do bạṛicʼakʼko kạmiakada ar Bakʼal debota ńutumte dhupko jeretʼ akatʼte uniko edre ocoakadea." 
Jeremiah11:18 Anathotren hoṛkoakʼ soṛojontro reakʼ katha do Probhu Isorge iń ṭhene sodorletʼte onań baḍae daṛeada. 
Jeremiah11:19 Iń do gure lạgitʼ tiyạkʼ idiyekan bheḍa hopon lekań tahẽkana; iń do bạń bujhạu daṛeada, onko do noa menkate iń upạrteko soṛojontro kana mente, “Dela, abo do dare ar ona reakʼ jo bon nosṭoea; dela, abo do jiwetʼkoakʼ disạm khon uni bon getʼ giḍikaea jemon uniyakʼ ńutum do alo disạkʼtae.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 E phạdkoren Probhu Isor, dhoromtegem bicạreda, am do mon ar ontor reakʼem biḍạu aṭkareda, onate uni cetanre amakʼ halae reakʼ ńel ocowạńme, ente iń do am ṭhengeń lạlis akada." 
Jeremiah11:21 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Anathotren hoṛko reaṅe meneda, “Okoe amakʼ jiwiko sendra baṛayetʼ arko menetʼ, ‘Probhu Isor ńutumte nạbi lekate katha do alope mena, arpe roṛle khan aleakʼ tirepe gujukʼa.’" 
Jeremiah11:22 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, iń do onkoń sạjạikoa. Onkoren juạnko do lạṛhạire ar onkoren gidrạko do akalteko gujukʼa." 
Jeremiah11:23 Ar onkoren sarecʼko mente do celehõ bako tahena, ente Anathotren hoṛkoakʼ cetanre ghoṭnań paṛao ocoya onkoakʼ sạjạiyokʼ reakʼ sermare.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 E Probhu Isor, am upạrteń mamblakʼ kanre hõ am do jao oktem dhoromgea. Enhõ iń do amakʼ bicạr reaṅ am sãote thoṛaganiń galmaraoa. Bedhoromkoakʼ hor do cedakʼ jo bahakʼkantakoa? Bepạtiạr hoṛ do cedakʼ khạtirjomako girobaso daṛeakʼ kana?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Onko do amgem rohoey akatʼkoa arko rehetʼ akana; onko doko harakʼkana arko jo bahakʼkana. Onko do mocate jao okte amakʼ kathako roṛa menkhan onkoakʼ ontor do am khon ḍher sạṅgińgetakoa. 
Jeremiah12:3 E Probhu Isor, am dom baḍae akadińạ; arem tunkhi talaseyedeń kana ar tinạkʼ iń botoramkan ona hõm biḍạu aṭkar edeńkana. Onko do bhiḍiko leka gurko lạgitʼem tiyạkʼ idiyetʼkoa; ar gurko hilokʼ lạgitʼem begar dohoyetʼkoa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Disạm do tinạkʼ dine homor halaṅa ar ṭạnḍi reakʼ ghãs hõ tinạkʼ din tolmocʼ akae tahena? Okoe onḍeko girobasokʼ kan onkoko bạṛicʼgete janwar ar cẽṛẽko hõko marao akana. Onko hoṛko meneda, “Abo cetʼ bon cekayetʼ do bae ńeńelkana.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 “Manwa sãote ńir haparaokʼrem laṅgayen khan tobe do sadom sãote ńir haparaokʼ do cekatem daṛekokʼa? Eken sulukte perecʼ disạmrege khạtirjoma tahenem hudisetʼ khan enḍekhan jordan reakʼ bir gajaṛre do cekatem tahena? 
Jeremiah12:6 Amren boehako, metakʼme am bõsren hoṛ do bepạtiạrko hoyakana; onko hõ am tayomreko lagao akana. Am reaṅ bhageakʼ kathako roṛlere hõ onko do alom pạtiạuakoa." 
Jeremiah12:7 “Iń do amren hoṛkoń aṛakʼ giḍi akatʼkoa ar ińakʼ sompotti Israel doń bạgi akadea; ar okoeyiń dulạṛede uni do acʼren bạirikoakʼ tireń soprot akadea. 
Jeremiah12:8 Ińakʼ sompotti do birren mitʼṭen dhạcri kul leka hoyakana. Uni do iń ńelteye hạnḍrạukʼ kana, onate iń do uniń kurudae kana." 
Jeremiah12:9 Ińakʼ sompotti iń ṭhen do sendra cẽṛẽ leka hoyakana, one eṭakʼ sendra cẽṛẽko gherao esetʼkate ińko hạ̃neń kan. Am do senkate sanam bir janwarko jarwakate ạgukom jemon onko do uniko jom daṛeae." 
Jeremiah12:10 Aema gupiko do ińakʼ darkha bagwanko nosṭo akatʼtińạ ar jaṅgateko lebetʼ gasmanḍao akada; ińakʼ mońj bagwan do ujạṛakʼ ar hahaṅkargeko hoyoco akada. 
Jeremiah12:11 Ona do iń ṭhene homor halaṅetʼkana. Goṭa disạmge khaṅkor ot hoyakante okoe hõ bako moneyakʼkana. 
Jeremiah12:12 Hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ ceḍe buruko cetanre maraoakʼge hecʼena, ente Probhu Isorakʼ tarwaṛe do disạm reakʼ mitʼ nakha khon eṭakʼ nakha hạbicʼe jojomkana; ar okoehõ sulukte do bạnukʼkoa." 
Jeremiah12:13 Onko do guhumko ereda menkhan jạnumgeko ireda; onko do kạṭhinko khaṭaokʼkana menkhan cetʼge bako ńameda. Probhu Isorakʼ jolokʼkan edre iạte ape do apeakʼ phosol irpe lajaokʼ kana.” 
Jeremiah12:14 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ạidạri lekate okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i ińren hoṛkoń em akawatʼko onare ińren sanam kharap aḍepase hoṛ do jhãpko emakada. Ona iạte iń do onkoakʼ disạm khon onkoń or totʼ giḍikakoa ar onko tala khon Jihudạren hoṛkoń rakapʼ ạgukoa." 
Jeremiah12:15 Menkhan onkoń totʼ giḍikako tayom do arhõń dayawakoa onkoakʼ apan ạpin ạidạrite ar mitʼke mitʼ hoṛkoakʼ disạmteń ruạṛ ạgukoa. 
Jeremiah12:16 Mitʼdin onko do ińren hoṛko Bakʼal debota ńutumteko kiriạ ocoletʼkore hõ enhõ jodi ińren hoṛkoakʼ horteko taṛam ar ‘Jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteko kiriạkʼ, enḍekhan onko do ińren hoṛko talareko benao rakapʼa." 
Jeremiah12:17 Menkhan jodi jãhãe jạtrenko ona bako onkae enḍekhan onko doń or totʼ giḍikakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah13:1 Probhu Isor do iń metadińa, “Am do senkate musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhaṅga kirińme ar horogme, menkhan ona do dakʼre alom lohoda.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Onate Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka iń do mitʼṭecʼ jhaṅga kirińkateń horokʼkeda. 
Jeremiah13:3 Unre Probhu Isor do dosar dhaoe metadińạ," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Okaṭakʼ jhaṅga kirińkatem horokʼ akatʼ ona totʼkate ńitge phurạt gaḍa ṭhen senokʼme ar dhiri reakʼ ciritʼre oko oṭokakʼme.” 
Jeremiah13:5 Onate Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka iń do phurạt gaḍa ṭhen onań oko doho oṭokada. 
Jeremiah13:6 Ona ḍher din tayom Probhu Isore metadińạ,, “Am do ńitokʼ phurạt gaḍa ṭhen calakʼme ar onḍe okaṭakʼ jhaṅga oko dohokakʼ iń metakʼme tahẽkan ona ạguiyme.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ona iạte iń do phurạt gaḍa ṭhen senkate okareń oko doholetʼ onḍe khon ona jhaṅgań gelecʼ oḍokkeda, menkhan unre ona do nosṭo akan tahẽkana ar baṅ beoharokʼ leka hoyena." 
Jeremiah13:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Iń Probhu Isor do noa kathań meneda, Jihudạ reakʼ bạḍại ar Jerusalem reakʼ maraṅ bạḍại do nonkageń maraoa." 
Jeremiah13:10 Noko bạṛicʼ jạtren hoṛko, okoe do ińakʼ katha ańjom bako moneyakʼkan ar onkoakʼ mon reakʼ kạṭhuạtetʼreko taṛametʼ ar eṭakʼ Isorko sewako arko ḍobokʼakokan onko do noa jhaṅga lekageko okạjwạ ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah13:11 Hoṛko cetʼleka ḍanḍare jhaṅgako horog onkage iń do goṭa Israel ar Jihudạren sanam hoṛko ińreń jalatʼ ocoletʼkoa, jemon onko do ińakʼ ńutumko sarhaotiń arko manotiń ar ińren hoṛko hoyokʼ, menkhan onko do ińakʼ katha bako ańjomleda." 
Jeremiah13:12 “Onko do noa katham metakoa, Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘darkha rasa dohowakʼ mitʼke mitʼ kum do darkha rasate perejtape.’ Arko metam khan, ‘ale do cetʼ bale baḍaea, darkha rasa dohowakʼ mitʼke mitʼ kum do darkha rasate perej hoyokʼa mente?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Enḍekhan onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘okoe niạ disạmreko girobasokʼ kan, metakʼme Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼ akan sanam rapajko, naekeko, nạbiko ar Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan jotoge iń doń bul ocokoa." 
Jeremiah13:14 Darkha rasa reakʼ kumko leka mimitʼ hoṛ do eṭakʼ hoṛ cetanreń tawakʼ gejerea; baṅ doe apatkan ar baṅ doe hoponkan jotogeń gejer cabakoa. Iń do daya hõ baṅ ar mãyã hõ bạń mãyãwakoa; onko doń marao cabakoa.’ ” 
Jeremiah13:15 Ańjomtińpe, ar moneyakʼtińpe, bạḍạiko leka do alope hoyokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do kathae roṛeda." 
Jeremiah13:16 Ape do aperen Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ar baṅkhan uni do ńute ạguapea ar ape do ńut hijukʼkan buru cetanrepe tohodokʼa. Marsal reakʼpe aslenre hõ uni do ńute hoeocoya, ar ona do kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutge hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ar katha bape ańjom khan apeakʼ bạḍại iạte iń do danaṅreń raga, ạḍitetʼ geń raga ar ińakʼ mẽtʼ do mẽtʼ dakʼte perecʼjokʼtińạ, ente Probhu Isorren hoṛ do bondikateko idi ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah13:18 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Am do raj ar uniren eṅgatem metaea, ‘siṅghạson ṭhen khon pheḍ hijukʼ ben, ente abenakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ mukuṭ do abenakʼ bohokʼ khon ńur akana." 
Jeremiah13:19 Negeb reakʼ nagrahakote bolokʼ reakʼ hor do bondokʼa ar onḍe do okoehõ bako bolo daṛeakʼa. Jihudạren sanam hoṛ do bondikateko idi ocokʼa, ar sanamgeko idi ocokʼa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jerusalem, beṅgetʼ rakabme, ńelme utạr secʼ khon bạiriko daraekana. Okaṭakʼ palrenko do amakʼ tireko em hoylen, ar okoeko bhiḍiko iạtem bạḍạiyetʼ tahẽkan onko doko okayena?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Okoeko rapaj sãotem gatelen Probhu Isor do am cetare onko tinreye dohokoa unre am do cetʼem menkea? Bedonokʼ jokhecʼ maejiu cetʼ leka haso rakapʼae onkage amhõ cetʼ baṅ hasomea? 
Jeremiah13:22 Am apnartetʼem kulilen khan, ‘ińre noa do cedakʼ hoyena?’ Enḍekhan ona reakʼ roṛ ruạṛ do hoyokʼkana, ạḍi utạr kạiko iạte amakʼ kicricʼko do oṛecʼ akantama arem jorbojor ocoakana." 
Jeremiah13:23 Kus disạmren hoṛ do cetʼ acʼakʼ harta reakʼ roṅ se tạrupʼ do acʼakʼ ṭiklạkʼ ṭiklạkʼ dage pherao daṛeataea? Amhõ onkage bhage kạmi do bam daṛeakʼa, ente bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikoregem lobdhao akana." 
Jeremiah13:24 “Hahaṅkarre hoete oṭaṅ calakʼkan bhusạ leka iń do amren hoṛkoń oṭaṅ idikoa. 
Jeremiah13:25 Noage amakʼ kuṛại do; noage am lạgitʼ iń soṅ dohoakada, ente am dom hiṛiń akadińạ ar debotakom pańja akatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah13:26 Amakʼ kicricʼ do mẽtʼãhã hạbicʼ iń rakabtama jemon amakʼ lajaoteakʼ ńelokʼtam. 
Jeremiah13:27 Iń do amakʼ laṭghaṭ, hinhạukʼ ar nilạjiạ loṭghuṭgeń ńelakada; ṭạnḍi ar buru boṭkocʼre amakʼ hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko hõń ńelakada. Amre do hae hae E Jerusalem! Ar tinạkʼ din besapha akan dom tahena?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Akal reaṅ Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Jihudạ doe homor halaṅeda, ente uniyakʼ nagrahako do nijor akantaea; onḍenko hoṛ do otre duṛupʼkateko homor halaṅeda, ar Jerusalem khon do rakʼ ańjomokʼkana." 
Jeremiah14:3 Lekman hoṛ do dakʼ lạgitʼ akoren gutikoko koletʼkoa; menkhan onko do dakʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ite hecʼkate dakʼ bako ńametʼkante eken kanḍawategeko ruạṛ calakʼ kana; onko do lajao arko as chuṭạu akante bohokʼko poṭom esetʼ akatʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah14:4 Ot do paṛakʼ akana, ente disạmre dakʼge bae dakʼeda; cacasko hõko as chuṭạuente bohokʼre tiko capo akana." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ar ṭạnḍire hạriạṛ ghãs bạnukʼte jel eṅga hõ janamkate hopone bạgi oṭoae kana. 
Jeremiah14:6 Bir gadha do ceḍe buru cetanre teṅgokate toyo lekako ahka ạhkikʼkana; ghãs begorte onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do dhundokʼ kantakoa.” 
Jeremiah14:7 E Probhu Isor, aleakʼ kại do ale upạrteye gohayetʼre hõ enhõ amakʼ ńutum iạte jãhãnakʼ baṛe cekawaleme. Ale do ḍher dhao bạṛicʼ hortele sen akana; ar am upạrtele kại akada." 
Jeremiah14:8 E Israelren asicʼ, kosṭokʼ okteren rurukhiyạicʼ, disạm talare cedakʼ bin opromicʼ leka do menama, ar cedakʼ mitʼ ńindạ tahen kạnicʼ horten hoṛ lekam hoyakana?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Cetʼ iạte am do andesale akan hoṛ lekam hoyakana, ar cetʼ iạte baṅ rurukhiyạ daṛe lạṛhại bir leka dom hoyakana? E Probhu Isor, ale talarege menama ar amren kangeale; am do alom bạgi giḍilea." 
Jeremiah14:10 Probhu Isor do noko hoṛko reaṅgeye meneda, “Onko do ạcur baṛaeko kusiyakʼ kana; onko do jaṅga bako jirạuetʼtakoa. Onate iń do bạń ataṅetʼkoa; ar ńitokʼ do onkoakʼ dusṭạmi reaṅ iń disạ ruạṛa ar kại reakʼ sạjạiyiń emakoa.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do iń metadińạ, “Noko hoṛkoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ do alom koea." 
Jeremiah14:12 Onkoko upạsetʼre hõ onkoakʼ rakʼ do bạń ańjomtakoa; jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅre hõ iń do bạń ataṅtakoa. Ona bodolte lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạrgeń kola ar onateń maraokoa.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Onate iń doń menkeda, “Hae, Probhu Isor! Nạbiko doko meneda, ‘ape do lạṛhại bape ńela ar akaltehõ bape kosṭokʼa. Probhu Isor do sạrige niạ ṭhạ̃ire jaejug suluke danapea.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Nạbiko do iń ńutumte eṛe kathako roṛakada. Onko do bạń kol akatʼkoa, ar bạń hukum akatʼkoa se onko ṭhen jãhãn kathage bạń roṛakada. Ape ṭhen onko do eṛe dorson, okaj sạgun ar akoakʼ monre benaoakʼ eṛe kathako roṛetʼkana." 
Jeremiah14:15 Okoeko nạbi do iń ńutumteko nạbiyetʼkan onko reaṅge iń Probhu Isor do noa kathageń menetʼkana, onko do bạń kol akatʼkoa, enhõko meneda, ‘niạ disạmre jãhãn lạṛhại se akal do baṅ hoyokʼa.’ Menkhan onko nạbi do jotoge lạṛhại ar akalteko marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah14:16 Okoe nạbi do onko ṭhen nạbi lekate kathako roṛetʼkan onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do lạṛhại ar akalte Jerusalem reakʼ kulhikore giḍi ocokʼa. Unre onko se onkoren bạhuko ar gidrạko topako lạgitʼ okoehõ bako tahena. Onkoakʼ kuṛại do onko cetanregeń upʼakoa. 
Jeremiah14:17 “Am do hoṛko noa katham metakoa, ‘siń ńindạ ińakʼ mẽtʼ khon mẽtʼ dakʼ jorokʼma, ente iń jạtren kũạri kuṛiko do ạḍiko ghạl akana." 
Jeremiah14:18 Bahreteń oḍok calakʼkan khan iń do mạ̃ṛĩkoń ńeleda; ar nagrahateń bolokʼkan khan do akalte kosṭokʼkan hoṛkoń ńeletʼkoa. Naeke ar nạbiko do nonkan disạmreko dãṛãbaṛae kana one ona reaṅ cetʼge bako baḍaekan.’ ” 
Jeremiah14:19 E Probhu Isor, Jihudạ do cetʼem nihạ̃t giḍikakʼa? Ar Sion hõ cetʼem hirkhạwakʼ kana? Cetʼ iạte nonka dom kosṭo ocoyetʼlea, ale do cekate bale boge daṛeakʼ kana? Suluk reakʼle aslena menkhan jãhãn bhạlạige baṅ hecʼatʼlea, bogekʼ lạgitʼle aslena menkhan bạṛicʼ botorge alere paṛaoena." 
Jeremiah14:20 E Probhu Isor, aleakʼ dusṭạmi ar aleren hapṛamkoakʼ dos reakʼle aṅgocetʼ kana; sạrige ale do am upạrtele kại akada." 
Jeremiah14:21 Amakʼ ńutum rukhiyạitam lạgitʼ ale secʼ khon mẽtʼãhã do alom ạcurtama; amakʼ ṭhonokanakʼ siṅghạson reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do alom bemanot ocoya. Ale lạgitʼem bondobos akatʼ katha reakʼ baṛe disạime; ona do alogem bạtil giḍikakʼa. 
Jeremiah14:22 Jạt jạtkoren ạuṛiyakʼren boṅga murhutʼko do cetʼ dakʼko ạgu daṛeakʼgea? Serma do cetʼ jạṛi dakʼe em daṛekea? E aleren Probhu Isor, eken amgem daṛeakʼa. Am cetanrege ale do asle dohoyeda, ente amge noakom kạmikana." 
Jeremiah15:1 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Mose ar Sạmuel hõ hecʼkate iń samaṅrekin teṅgolenre hõ enhõ ińakʼ mon do noko hoṛ secʼ ohoge ạcurlena. Iń samaṅ khon noko do laga ńirkom; onko doko sen joṅma." 
Jeremiah15:2 Onko do amko kulilem khan, ‘ale do cetʼ hoyokʼtalea?’ Enḍekhan onkom metakoa, ‘Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, ‘okoe mahamạri lạgitʼ kanko onko do mahamạrite, okoe tarwaṛe lạgitʼ kanko onko do tarwaṛete ar okoe akal lạgitʼ kanko onko do akalteko gujukʼa; ar okoe do bondi ocokʼ lạgitʼ kanko doko bondi idi ocokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah15:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Onko upạrte pon lekan nonosṭokoń kolkoa. Tarwaṛete doko gujukʼa, setako doko or cirạkoa, ar coṭren cẽṛẽko ar otren janwarko doko jomkoa arko mohor meṭaokoa." 
Jeremiah15:4 Jihudạren raj Hiskiạren hopon Manase Jerusalemre okae ceka akatʼ ona iạte uni oka sạjạiyiń emae ona ńelte dhạrtiren sanam rajosṭiren hoṛ do botor caṛhaoakoa. 
Jeremiah15:5 “E Jerusalem, am do okoeye dayawama? Am lạgitʼ do okoeye homor halaṅa? Cetʼ leka menama ona kulime lạgitʼ do okoeye hijukʼa?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, am dom bạgi akadińạ ar eṭakʼ hortem ghańjeṛ akana. Ona iạte am secʼ tiyiń tiạrtińạ ariń maraomea; ar bạń dayawama." 
Jeremiah15:7 Disạm reakʼ phaṭok duạrkore amren hoṛ do haṭakʼteń gumkoa. Ińren hoṛko cetanre hoponkoakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ homor halaṅ iń paṛao ocoya ar onko doń marao utạrkoa, ente onko do akoakʼ hor khon bako ruạṛ akana." 
Jeremiah15:8 Onkoren rạnḍi maejiukoakʼ lekha do gaṅgaren gitil lekań hoeocoya. Am do bir banṭa hoṛren eṅgat kanam, amren hoṛko upạrte tikin jokhecʼ mitʼṭecʼ nonosṭoyicʼ iń ạguiyea; ar onko cetanre ackage haso ar botoriń paṛao ocoya." 
Jeremiah15:9 Eae goṭen hoponkoren eṅgat do lajao ar opoman dosaregeye gujukʼa. Okte ạurirege uniyakʼ jion reakʼ siń cando doe hạsurokʼa. Ar okoe jiwetʼko tahen onko hõ tarwaṛe samaṅreń ạgukoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.” 
Jeremiah15:10 Hae, hae! E eṅgạńtiń, cedakʼ iń dom janamkedińa, one okoe sãote goṭa disạm do jhogṛa are lạṛhạikan? Okoehõ rin do bạń emakatʼkoa se okoehõ iń do rin bako emakawạdińa, enhõ sanamkoge iń doko sarapạńkana." 
Jeremiah15:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Mitʼṭecʼ bhạlại iạte khạṭigeń aṛakʼmea. Iń do nonkan dosań hoeocoya, onate muhin ar akal oktere amren bạiriko do am ṭhen hecʼkateko nehõrokʼa." 
Jeremiah15:12 “Jãhãe hoṛ do cetʼ utạr disạm reakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ se pitạle rạputʼ daṛekea? 
Jeremiah15:13 E Jihudạ amakʼ sanam kạiko ar goṭa disạm tala reakʼ kạiko ńutumte amakʼ dhon ar murạiko do, begor damteakʼ luṭakʼ jinis lekateń soprota." 
Jeremiah15:14 Oka disạm reakʼ katha bam baḍaeakatʼ ona disạmre amren bạirikoren golamiń hoyocomea, ente ińakʼ edre seṅgel do am cetanre jolakana ar ona do jaejug hạbicʼ jolokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 E Probhu Isor, am do jotowakʼgem bujhạu daṛeakʼkana; onate ińakʼ katha disạime ar ińakʼ moneyakʼme. Ińren jor julumko cetanre amge hala hạlime. Onko cetanre amakʼ sombhuri do ḍhergetama, menkhan onko tire do alom marao ocoyińạ; disạime, am iạte cetʼlekan ṭiṭkạriń sahao akada." 
Jeremiah15:16 Amakʼ katha sodorena ar ińakʼ ontorre ona doń ataṅkeda; ona katha do iń lạgitʼ rạskạwanakʼ ar ontorre sukge tahẽkana, ente E phạdkoren Probhu Isor, iń doń amren kangea." 
Jeremiah15:17 Okoe rạskạ ar hulạsate bubulakʼko ńũiyetʼkan onkoakʼ dolre do tishõ bạń duṛupʼlena, onko sãote tishõ bạń rạskạ mitʼlena; iń cetanre amakʼ ti tahẽkante eskargeń duṛupʼkan tahẽkana ar am do raṅgaotem perecʼ akadińa." 
Jeremiah15:18 Cedakʼ ińakʼ haso do baṅ cabakʼkantińạ, cedakʼ ińakʼ ghao do baṅ besokʼkantińạ, cedakʼ ona do baṅ ocogokʼkana? Iń ṭhen do cetʼ eṛe ạtukʼkan dakʼ ar baṅ tahenkan jharna dakʼ lekagem hoyokʼa?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Unre Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Monem ạcurletam khan iń do lahate lekań ataṅ ruạṛmea jemon ińem sapʼsorạń; ar ạuṛiyakʼ katha roṛ baṅkate damanakʼ katham roṛ enḍekhan ińakʼ mocategem roṛa. Noko hoṛ do am secʼko ạcurokʼa, menkhan am do onko secʼ alom ạcurokʼa." 
Jeremiah15:20 Noko hoṛ ṭhen do pitạl reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ daṛeanakʼ pạcri lekań hoyocomea; onko do am upạrteko lạṛhạiya menkhan bako bhagao daṛeama, ente iń Probhu Isorgeń metamkana, am rukhiyạme ar bańcaome lạgitʼ iń do am são sãoteń tahena." 
Jeremiah15:21 Iń do bạṛicʼkoakʼ ti khoniń rukhiyạmea ar kurmutạhakoakʼ ti khon doń chaḍaomea.” 
Jeremiah16:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isore metadińạ," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Noa ṭhạ̃ire do alogem baplakʼa ar gidrạko hõ alom janamkoa," 
Jeremiah16:3 ente iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, noa ṭhạ̃ire janamokʼ gidrạko, ar onkoren eṅgatko ar onkoren apatko do gogocʼ rogteko gujukʼa. Okoehõ onko lạgitʼ do bako homor halaṅa ar okoehõ onko do bako topakoa menkhan guricʼ leka giḍi akanko tahena. Onko do lạṛhại ar akal hoteteko marao utạrokʼa ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽ ar birren janwarkoakʼ jomakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah16:4  
Jeremiah16:5 “Okaṭakʼ oṛakʼre hoṛko homor halaṅetʼkan ona oṛakʼte do alogem bolokʼa; Homor hakʼlaṅ ar onkoakʼ duktem dukokʼte onḍe do alogem calakʼa, ente noko hoṛko khon ińakʼ suluk, dulạṛ ar daya doń ocokʼ akatʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah16:6 Niạ disạmren huḍiń hapṛakʼ sanamgeko gujukʼa. Okoehõ onko do bako topakoa, onko lạgitʼ do bako homor halaṅa ar onko lạgitʼ akoakʼ hoṛmo hõ bako getʼ cirạitakoa, ar bohokʼ hõ bako hoyo poṭorokʼa." 
Jeremiah16:7 Okoe onko gocʼko lạgitʼko homor halaṅ, se eṅgat-apat lạgitʼko homor halaṅ onko jiwi raṛecʼ emako lạgitʼ okoehõ piṭhạ ar dakʼ do bako emakoa." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Bhoj oṛakʼte senkate jom ńũi lạgitʼ alope duṛupʼa," 
Jeremiah16:9 ente iń Israelkoren Isor sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhugeń meneda, iń do niạ ṭhạ̃irege hoṛkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre onkoakʼ rạskạ ar hulạs reakʼ aṛaṅiń cabaetakoa ar jãwãe koṛa ar bạhu kuṛiyakʼ aṛaṅ hõń bond ocoya." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Noko hoṛko niạko katham jạhirako tayom tinre amko kulimea, ‘Cetʼ iạte Probhu Isor do ale upạrte nonkan muhin reakʼ kathae roṛeda? Ar aleakʼ ghạṭ do cetʼ kantalea? Aboren Probhu Isor upạrte ale do cetʼle kại akada?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Unre am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘noa reakʼ karon do hoyokʼ kana aperen hapṛamko do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińa ar debotako pańja akatʼkote onkoko sewa akatʼkoa. Onko doko bạgi giḍi akadińa ar ińakʼ ạn-ạriko bebatao akada." 
Jeremiah16:12 Menkhan ape do aperen hapṛamko khonhõ bạṛicʼpe coloneda. Ńelpe, ape mimitʼko do ińakʼ katha leka sen baṅkate apeakʼ bạṛicʼ mon reakʼ keṭecʼtetʼ iạte apeakʼ kusi lekape calakʼkana." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ona iạte ape do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ disạmteń lebda giḍikapea one ona disạm reakʼ katha bape baḍaekan, ar aperen hapṛamko hõ bako baḍaekan tahẽkana. Onḍe ape do siń ńindạ debotakope sewawakoa, ente iń do ar baṅgeń dayawapea.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Probhu Isore meneda, “Nonkan dinko hijukʼkana unre hoṛko do ar bako mena, ‘Misor disạm khon okoe do Israelkoe oḍok ạguletʼko, uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼkana,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 bickomko mena, ‘utạr disạm ar eṭakʼ disạmkore okoe do Israelkoe sạṅgińletʼko ar onḍe khone oḍok ạguakatʼko uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumtele kiriạkʼ kana.’ Onko do ona kathako mena, ente onkoren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạmiń udukʼatʼko tahẽkan ona disạmtegeń ruạṛ ạgukoa." 
Jeremiah16:16 “Menkhan ńitokʼ do ḍher jạilạgeń hoho ạgukoa ar onko do hako lekako sapʼkoa. Ona tayom iń do arhõ sesendrako hõń hoho ạgukoa onko do mitʼke mitʼ maraṅ ar huḍiń buruko ar dhiri ciritʼ khonko sendra totʼkoa. 
Jeremiah16:17 Onkoakʼ dãṛãn cetanre ińakʼ mẽtʼ do menakʼa; ińakʼ mẽtʼ khon danaṅre do bạnukʼkoa ar onkoakʼ ghạṭ hõ iń khon do baṅ okokʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah16:18 Onkoakʼ dusṭạmi ar kại gunạkʼte onko do doboṛageń hala ruạṛakoa, ente ińakʼ disạm doko bhonḍ akada ar akoren dhiri murti ar boṅga muṭhạnkote ińakʼ ona ạidạriko tuhetʼ akada.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ daṛe ar ińakʼ aotan gaṛ, ar gạr hilokʼre ińakʼ hirlạ! dhạrti reakʼ ses simạ khon eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ do am ṭhen hecʼkateko mena, “Aleren hapṛamko do eṛe debotako ar ạuṛiyakʼren boṅga murtiko ạidạrian tahẽkana, ar onate onkoakʼ do jãhãn porhoge baṅ hoylentakoa." 
Jeremiah16:20 Hoṛko do cetʼ apnar lạgitʼ debotako benao daṛeakoa? Arko benaolekore hõ onko do isor doko baṅkana.” 
Jeremiah16:21 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ona iạte ińakʼ daṛe ar ektiạri do Israelkoń udukʼakoa. Onateko baḍae daṛeakʼa ińakʼ ńutum do Probhu Isor kana mente." 
Jeremiah17:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jihudạ reakʼ kại do mẽṛhẽtʼ kolomte ol akana, hirạ reakʼ surshạtege onkoakʼ ontorre, onkoakʼ pinḍ reakʼ dereńre ol gạḍiạu akana." 
Jeremiah17:2 Aperen hopon ar hoponerako do mimitʼ hạṛiạṛ dare buṭạkore ar usul buruko reakʼ than boṭkocʼko ar Asera khunṭiko disạyetʼkana. 
Jeremiah17:3 E Jihudạ, amakʼ kại gunạkʼte disạm talare ińakʼ burure amakʼ dhonko ar amakʼ murạiko ar goṭa disạm reakʼ amakʼ than boṭkocʼko do luṭ reakʼ jinis lekateń soprota." 
Jeremiah17:4 Okaṭakʼ ạidạriyiń ematʼme tahẽkan, ona do amakʼ dostegem ada. Ar okaṭakʼ disạm reakʼ katha bam baḍaeakatʼ ona disạmre amren bạirikoren golamiń hoyocomea, ente am do ińakʼ edre seṅgelem salgao akatʼtińạ ona do jaejug hạbicʼ jolokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe hoṛ manwa cetanreye bhorsakʼkan ar acʼakʼ daṛere pạtiạue dohoyetʼte ińre mon bạnukʼtae uni doe sarapanicʼ kana." 
Jeremiah17:6 Uni do potit jumire mitʼṭecʼ jhạuạ lekanae; bhage okte hecʼlen khan ona do bae ńela. Uni do hahaṅkarre lolo ṭhạ̃ire, metakʼme okare celege bako girobasokʼ nonkan reḍha ṭhạ̃ireye girobasokʼa." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Menkhan bhạgangea uni hoṛ do, okoe do Probhu Isorreye bhorsakʼkan ar uniyakʼ pạtiạuren rehetʼ doe Probhu Isorkan." 
Jeremiah17:8 Uni do dakʼ aṛere rohoe akan dare lekanae one ona reakʼ rehetʼ do gaḍa hạbicʼ ạtiń senokʼkan. Setoṅ din hecʼlenre uni do bae botorokʼa; uniyakʼ sakam do jao okte hạriạṛge tahentaea. Akal bochorre hõ bae dạndikʼa ar jao oktegeye jo bahakʼa. 
Jeremiah17:9 “Mon do sanamakʼ khon ṭhokgea, ona do oka lekate hõ baṅ bogekʼa. Manwa ontor do okoe hõ bae bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah17:10 Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ ontoriń ḍunḍhạueda ar moniń biḍạu aṭkareda; iń do manwawakʼ dãṛãn ar uniyakʼ kạmi lekate kuṛạiyiń emaekana. 
Jeremiah17:11 “Uni hoṛ do chitri cẽṛẽ lekanae, okoe acʼ bae obor akatʼ beleren hoponkoe jarwayetʼko; uni do bạṛicʼ lekate dhone hameṭjoṅa. Uni do acʼakʼ adha dinkorege ona doe bạgiyakʼ kana, ar mucạtʼre uni do lelha lekae sạbudokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah17:12 Ona pạhil khon bạisạu akatʼ ṭhonokanakʼ siṅghạsonge aboakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do. 
Jeremiah17:13 E Probhu, Israelkoakʼ as, okoe amko bạgi akatʼme onko sanam do lajaoreko paṛao ocokʼa. Am ṭhen khon okoeko ruạṛ senakan onkoakʼ ńutum do dhuṛire olokʼtakoa, ente onko do jiwetʼ dakʼren jharna Probhuko bạgi akadea." 
Jeremiah17:14 E Probhu, bogeyińme, enḍekhaniń bogekʼa; bańcao ińme, enḍekhaniń bańcaokʼa, ente amkangeam ińren sarhaoanicʼ do." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ńelme, onko doko mitạń kana, “Probhuakʼ katha do okayena? Ona do ńitokʼ purạukʼma.”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Amren hoṛ gupiko khon iń do bạń ńir pharak akana; am dom baḍaegea muhin do bạń khojkana. Ińakʼ moca khon oka oḍokokʼ ona do am ṭhen baṅ okoya. 
Jeremiah17:17 Iń lạgitʼ toras do alom hoyokʼa; muhinren hirlạ dom amkangea. 
Jeremiah17:18 Iń khedeńkanko do lajaoreko paṛaokʼma, menkhan iń do alom lajao ocoyińạ. Onko doko torasokʼma, menkhan iń do alom toras ocoyińạ. Onko cetanre muhin reakʼ din ạguiyme; ar dobṛa nosṭote jarkharkom!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Okaṭakʼ phaṭok duạrte Jihudạkoren rapajko bolo oḍokokʼ kan tahẽkan Probhu Isor do ona phaṭok duạr ṭhen ar Jerusalem reakʼ eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko ṭhen senkate teṅgokʼ lạgitʼe metadińạ. 
Jeremiah17:20 Uni do noa kathae metadińạ, “E Jihudạren rapajko ar sanam hoṛko ar Jerusalemre girobasokʼkan hoṛko, ape okoe do noa phaṭok duạrtepe bolo oḍokokʼkan, Probhu Isorakʼ katha baṛe ańjompe." 
Jeremiah17:21 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘sontor akae tahenpe; jirạukʼ mãhãre jãhãn bojha alope idi ạguiya se Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok bhitrite alope adera." 
Jeremiah17:22 Cetʼ leka aperen hapṛamkoń hukumatʼko tahẽkan onkage jirạukʼ mãhãre ape do apeakʼ oṛakʼ khon jãhãn bojha alope oḍoka se jãhãnakʼ alope kạmiya, bickom jirạukʼ mãhã do iń ńutumte begar dohokakʼpe." 
Jeremiah17:23 Aperen hapṛamko ona kathako ańjomletʼre hõ, bako moneyada. Onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼketʼ takoa; onko do ińakʼ katha bako ańjomleda ar ińakʼ ḍanṭao hõ bako manaoleda." 
Jeremiah17:24 Menkhan ape do sontorkate ińakʼ katha lekape calakʼ ar jirạukʼ mãhãre nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrte jãhãn bojha bape ạgui ar jirạukʼ mãhãre jãhãnakʼ baṅ kạmikate iń ńutumtepe begar dohoy," 
Jeremiah17:25 enḍekhan aperen rapajko do Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼkate rajosṭiko calaoa. Onko do, akoren rajren kạmiyạko ar Jihudạren hoṛko ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ rãt gạḍi ar sadomre decʼkate nagraha reakʼ phaṭokteko bolo oḍokokʼa; ar nagraha do tishõ baṅ ujạṛokʼa." 
Jeremiah17:26 Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako ar Jerusalem beṛhaeteakʼ atoko khon Benjạmin reakʼ ṭoṭha khon ar usul copotʼ buru ṭoṭhako khon ar Negeb khon hoṛko hijukʼa ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, janwar samaṅokʼakʼ, anaj samaṅokʼakʼ, dhudhup ar suluk samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jinisko ạguiya." 
Jeremiah17:27 Menkhan ińakʼ katha bape ańjom ar jirạukʼmãhã iń ńutumte bape begar dohoy ar Jerusalem phaṭok duạrte enhilokʼ bojhakope ader, enḍekhan Jerusalem reakʼ sanam phaṭok duạrkore seṅgeliń lagaoa ar ona do Jerusalem reakʼ dolankoe joma. Ona seṅgel do okoehõ bako ĩṛicʼ daṛeakʼa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Probhu do Jirimiạ ṭhen noa kathae sodorkeda," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Kuṅkạlakʼ oṛakʼte calakʼme, onḍege iń do am sãote kathań roṛa.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ona iạte iń do kuṅkạlakʼ oṛakʼteń senena ar unre uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼreye kạmikan tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah18:4 Uni do hasa reakʼe bekʼnaokan tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ tire bhajanko jãhãtinre bạṛijokʼkan khan, uni do ona reakʼ eṭakʼ bhajane benaoetʼ tahẽkana, acʼ, metakʼme, kuṅkạl bese bujhạuetʼ tahẽkan leka." 
Jeremiah18:5 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Ińiń meneda, ‘E Israelren hoṛko, iń do cetʼ uni kuṅkạl leka ape sãote bạń beohar daṛekea? E Israelren hoṛko, ape do ińakʼ tire kuṅkạlakʼ hasa leka kanape." 
Jeremiah18:7 Jãhãtis jãhã jạtrenko se jãhã rajosṭirenko rehetʼ sudhạń totʼ giḍikako, ariń rạputʼ giḍikako se marao giḍikako reakʼ iń lại sodor lekhan ar onko jạtrenko ona sontor katha ańjomkate bạṛicʼ khonko ruạṛokʼ, enḍekhan oka muhin ạgui reakʼ iń goṭaletʼ ona do ar bạń paṛao ocoya." 
Jeremiah18:8  
Jeremiah18:9 Ar jãhãtis jãhã jạtrenko se jãhã rajosṭiń benao ruạṛ ar rohoe reakʼ kathań lại jạhir lekhan ar onko jạtrenko do ińakʼ mẽtʼre bạṛicʼakʼko kạmi ar ińakʼ kathako bako ańjom, enḍekhan onko oka bhạlạiko reakʼ iń hudisletʼ ona bhạlại iạteń kastaokʼa.’" 
Jeremiah18:10  
Jeremiah18:11 “Ona iạte am do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ńelpe, ape lạgitʼ muhin reakʼ iń hudis akada ar ape upạrte mitʼṭecʼ iń goṭa akada. Onate ape do apeakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛokʼte bhageakʼ colonpe ar bhageakʼko kạmipe.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Menkhan onko doko roṛ ruạṛkeda, ‘jãhãn labge bạnukʼa. Ale do aleakʼ bundisakʼko leka gele calakʼa; ale mimitʼko do aleakʼ bạṛicʼ mon reakʼ kạṭhuạtetʼ lekagele kạmiya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, “Jạt jạtrenko talare ḍunḍhạukate ńelme, noa lahare nonkan katha do okoeye ańjomakada? Kũạri kuṛi Israel do mitʼṭecʼ hirkhạwakʼe kạmiakada." 
Jeremiah18:14 Lebanon reakʼ him do cetʼ jãhãtis buru reakʼ dhasna khon le cabakʼa? Ar sạṅgiń khon ạtu ãṛgonkan reaṛ dakʼ do cetʼ jãhãtisokʼ cabakʼa? 
Jeremiah18:15 Menkhan ińren hoṛ do iń hiṛińkate ạuṛiyakʼren boṅga ṭhen dhupko jeretʼeda. Onko do akoakʼ ḍaharreko tohotʼ gurakana. Ar iń sabeń lạgitʼ khạyũkʼko la akada, ona sedae reakʼ soṛok korege. Onko do bhage hor bạgikate bạṛicʼ secʼko ghańjeṛ akana." 
Jeremiah18:16 Ona iạte onkoakʼ disạm do potit jumi ar mitʼṭecʼ hirkhạwanakʼ jinis lekage hoyokʼtakoa; ar jãhãege ona aṛeteko parom senokʼ onko do hahaṛa tulucʼ bohokʼko rukuiytakoa. 
Jeremiah18:17 Onkoren bạiriko samaṅre onko do purub reakʼ hoe lekań chirchạturkoa; ar onkoakʼ muhin hilokʼ doń dea giḍikoa.” 
Jeremiah18:18 Hoṛko menkeda, “Dela, abo do Jirimiạ upạrte phundi bon aṭaoa; ente naeke ṭhen ạn-ạri reakʼ cecetʼakʼ, ạkilanko ṭhen sopolha ar nạbiko ṭhen Isorakʼ katha ma menakʼge. Onate dela, aboakʼ moca kathate uni bon dusiyea ar uniyakʼ katha do babo moneyakʼa." 
Jeremiah18:19 E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ katha ańjomme; iń upạrte okam menakatʼ ona moneyakʼme." 
Jeremiah18:20 Bhageakʼ bodolte cetʼ bạṛicʼakʼko halaea? Menkhan onko do iń lạgitʼ ghaḍlakʼko la akada. Disạime, amakʼ edre onkore jemon ruạṛ calakʼ onate am samaṅre teṅgokate onkoakʼ kathań roṛetʼkana." 
Jeremiah18:21 Onate onkoren hoponko do akal ar tarwaṛere baṛe soprotkom. Onkoren bạhuko do bạńjhi arko rạnḍikʼtakoma; onkoren herel hoṛ do mahamạriteko gujukʼma, ar onkoren juạnko hõ lạṛhạire tarwaṛetege." 
Jeremiah18:22 Onko upạrte ackage hạ̃hạ̃nkom ạgukote onkoakʼ oṛakʼ khon rakʼko ańjomokʼma, ente iń sabeń lạgitʼ onko do ghaḍlakʼko la akada ar ińakʼ jaṅga lạgitʼ pạsiko oḍaoakada." 
Jeremiah18:23 Menkhan E Probhu Isor, iń gojeń lạgitʼ noako soṛojontro reakʼ katha dom baḍaegea. Onkoakʼ noa behok do alom ikạitakoa se amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon onkoakʼ kại do alom meṭaotakoa. Onko do samaṅregeko tohotʼ gurokʼma; ar amem edrekokʼ jokhecʼge halawakome." 
Jeremiah19:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do senkate kuṅkạl ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ hasa reakʼ bhajan kiriń ạguiyme. Ar am sãote mitʼ bar murubbiko ar naekeko hõ iditorakom." 
Jeremiah19:2 Ona tayom kelhatʼ phaṭok reakʼ bolokʼ hor ṭhen Bin-hinom reakʼ buru nalate calakʼme. Ar okaṭakʼ kathań lạiyam onḍe senkate ona jạhirme. 
Jeremiah19:3 Ona katha do hoyokʼkana, ‘E Jihudạren rapajko ar Jerusalemren hoṛko, iń Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhu okaṭakʼ kathań roṛetʼkan ona ańjompe. Iń do niạ ṭhạ̃i cetanre nonkan ghoṭnań paṛao ocoya, ona ańjomkate onko mimitʼkoakʼ lutur do tiṅgitʼ utạrokʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ente onko do ińko bạgi giḍi akadińa ar niạ ṭhạ̃i do debotakoakʼ ṭhạ̃iko benao akada; onko do nonkan debotako ṭhen dhupko jeretʼeda one onkoakʼ katha do akoren hapṛamko se Jihudạren rapajko hõ tisge bako baḍaekan tahẽkan. Ona chaḍa niạ ṭhạ̃i do miridoskoakʼ mãyãmteko perecʼ akada. 
Jeremiah19:5 Onko do Bakʼal ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼko menkate akoren hoponko seṅgelre atar giḍiko lạgitʼ Bakʼal boṭkocʼ thankoko benao akada, menkhan iń do bạń hukum akada se bạń menakada ar ona do ińakʼ monre tishõ baṅ rakapʼakana." 
Jeremiah19:6 Onate nonkan dinko hijukʼkana tinre hoṛko do niạ ṭhạ̃i Tophet se Bin-hinom buru nala bako metakʼa, menkhan ona do gogocʼ buru lodamgeko metakʼa." 
Jeremiah19:7 “ ‘Niạ ṭhạ̃ire iń do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ goṭawakʼ iń ạuṛiyakʼ ocoytakoa. Ar okoe onkoakʼ jiwi hataoko khoj onko do onkoren bạiriko hotete lạṛhạireń gocʼkoa ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽ ar bir janwarkoń jom ocokoa. 
Jeremiah19:8 Niạ nagraha doń jarkhara ar landa-dhutʼakʼgeń hoeocoya; ar okoe ona aṛeteko parom calakʼ onko do ona reakʼ duk ńelte botor caṛhaoakoa arko land-dhutʼakʼa. 
Jeremiah19:9 Onkoren bạiriko, metakʼme onkoakʼ jiwi sendrako do tinre onkoko gherao esetʼkoa un reakʼ ona kosṭokʼ oktere iń do onkoren hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ jeliń jom ocokoa ar mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do ako aḍepaseren hoṛkoakʼ jelko joma.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Ona tayom okoe am sãoteko calakʼ onko hoṛ samaṅre hasa reakʼ ona bhajanem rạpuda arem metakoa, phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘kuṅkạlakʼ noa bhajan rạputʼ lekhan cetʼleka baṅ joṛaokʼ ṭhik onkage iń hõ noko jạtrenko ar nagrahań rạputʼ gejera. Hoṛko do Tophetreko topakoa, topako lạgitʼ eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i baṅ tahen iạte." 
Jeremiah19:11  
Jeremiah19:12 Iń do niạ ṭhạ̃ire ar nonḍenko hoṛko lạgitʼ okań cekae ona do noage; noa nagraha do Tophet lekań hoeocoya; 
Jeremiah19:13 Jerusalem reakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar Jihudạ reakʼ rapajkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr, metakʼme okako oṛakʼ-duạr reakʼ chat cetanre siń cando, ńindạ cando ar ipilko ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan ar debotako ńutumte coḍorakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅetʼ tahẽkan onako oṛakʼ-duạr do Tophet lekań bhonḍ ocoya.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Ona tayom Jirimiạ do Tophet khone ruạṛ hecʼena. Probhu Isorge acʼakʼ katha lại jạhir lạgitʼ onḍeye kolledea. Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ racare teṅgokate sanam hoṛkoe galmaraoatʼkoa," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ańjompe, iń do niạ nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ atoko cetanre oka ghoṭna paṛao ocoe reakʼ kathań menakatʼ ona do onko cetanreń paṛao ocoya, ente onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼ akatʼtakoa ar ińakʼ katha hõ bako ańjomleda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Jirimiạ do tinre nạbi lekate noako kathae galmaraoako kan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼren mukhiyạ sordar Emerren hopon naeke Pashur do ona kathae ańjomkeda. 
Jeremiah20:2 Uni do Jirimiạ nạbiye dalkedete Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ sor reakʼ cetan ṭhạ̃ire Benjamin phaṭok duạr ṭhen haṛi paṭakateye dohokadea.
