Jeremiah20:3 Ona dosar hilokʼ Pashur do ona hạṛipaṭa khon Jirimiại raṛakedea. Unre Jirimiạ do uniye metadea, “Probhu Isore em akatʼme amakʼ ńutum Pashur do baṅ bickom Magor-Misabibge hoyokʼa (mane do ‘beṛhaeten botoric’)," 
Jeremiah20:4 Ente Probhu Isore meneda, ‘apnar lạgitʼ ar ar amren gateko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ torasgeń hoyocomea. Onko do am ńeńel tulucʼge akoren bạirikoakʼ tarwaṛeteko gocʼ ocokʼa. Iń do goṭa Jihudạ Babelren rajakʼ tireń soprota. Uni do onkoren ḍher hoṛge Babelteye bondi idikoa ar sarecʼ hoṛ do tarwaṛeteye gocʼkoa." 
Jeremiah20:5 Iń do noa nagraha reakʼ sanam dhon-durib, metakʼme onkoakʼ khet baṛge reakʼ anajko ar sanam damanakʼ jinisko ar Jihudạ rapajkoakʼ sanam murạiko onkoren bạirikoakʼ tireń soprota. Onko do ona luṭkate Babelteko idiya." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ar E Pashur, am ar am gharońjren sanam hoṛ do bondikate Babeltepe idi ocokʼa. Onḍe do amem gujukʼa arko topamea; ar amren okoeko gateko ṭhen nạbi lekate eṛe katham roṛakatʼ onko jotokoakʼ dosa hõ onkage hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 E Probhu Isor, am dom bulạu kedeńte ińakʼ nonka dosa do hoyakantińạ; ar iń khonem daṛegete am dom jitạu akana. Iń do goṭa dinge landa-dhutʼạń kan hoṛgeń hoyakana; ar sanam hoṛge ińko siṛogạń kana." 
Jeremiah20:8 Iń do tinạkʼ dhao kathań roṛetʼkan unạkʼ dhaoge maraokʼ reakʼ kathageń porcaretʼ kana. Onate Probhu Isorakʼ katha iạte iń do goṭa dinge opoman ariń cigạri ocokʼkana. 
Jeremiah20:9 Ińiń menkhan, “Uniyakʼ katha do bạń lạiya se uniyakʼ ńutumte ar cetʼge bạń roṛa,” enḍekhan uniyakʼ katha do ińakʼ ontorre lokʼkan bursi seṅgel leka jaṅ bhitri hạbicʼ bond akange tahẽnkana. Iń do bhitrire doho dohoteń laṅga cabakʼkana; sạrige ona do ar bạń doho daṛeakʼkana." 
Jeremiah20:10 Iń beṛhaete do ạḍitetʼge botorgea, ente niạko katha do ḍher hoṛge khae khoyetʼ kaniń ańjometʼkoa, “Uni ńutumte mamblae me; dela, uni ńutumte bon mamblae ma.” Ińren sanam gateko do ińiń leńjetʼ bhindạṛokʼ reakʼ ńel horrege menakʼkoa, “Hoedaṛeakʼa uni bon ṭhoka daṛeaea, ar uni cetanre bon jitạukʼa arbon hala hạli daṛeakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Menkhan Probhu Isor do daṛeanicʼ bir banṭa leka iń são sãote menaea, onate iń khedeńko doko tohodokʼa ar bako jitạu daṛeakʼa. Onko do bako jo baha daṛeakʼa ar lajaoreko paṛaokʼa; onkoakʼ bemanot ocokʼ reakʼ do okoehõ tisge bako hiṛiń daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah20:12 E phạdkoren Probhu Isor, am do dhorom hoṛkom biḍạu aṭkaretʼko kana ar mimitʼkoakʼ ontor ar mon reakʼ katham baḍaekana. Ińren bạiriko cetanre onem hala hạliyetʼkan ona baṛe ńel ocoyińme, ente ińakʼ mambla do amgeń baḍae ocoakatʼmea." 
Jeremiah20:13 Ape do Probhu Isor ńutumte sereńpe. Probhu Isorge õṛhẽyepe. Uni do dusṭạmi hoṛkoakʼ ti khon reṅgecʼ orecʼkoakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạyetʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah20:14 Ińakʼ janam din do sarapanakʼge hoyokʼma. Oka hilokʼ ińren eṅgạńe janamlediń enhilokʼ do bhoranakʼ alo hoyokʼma. 
Jeremiah20:15 “Amren do mitʼṭen koṛa hopone hoyakana,” Niạ sombat iạte ińren ạpuń okoeye rạskạ ocolede uni do sarapanicʼe hoyokʼma." 
Jeremiah20:16 Probhu Isor do daya baṅkate one sanam nagrahae maraoletʼ uni hoṛ do onka baṛeye hoyokʼma. Uni do setakʼ jokhecʼ guhere ańjomma ar tikin do lạṛhại reakʼ andoṛge; 
Jeremiah20:17 ente eṅgatakʼ kukhireń tahẽkanre uni do bae gocʼledińa. Enḍekhan ińren eṅgạńge ińakʼ topae hoekokʼa, ar uniyakʼ kukhi do jaejug bhurtiyakʼge hoekokʼa." 
Jeremiah20:18 Kosṭo ar duk ńel lạgitʼ ar lajaote ińakʼ okteko khemao lạgitʼ cedakʼ kukhi khon doń oḍok hecʼena? 
Jeremiah21:1 Tayomte Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena. Ona jokhecʼ Sedekiạ raj do Malkiạ hopon Pashur ar Maseya hopon naeke Sephaniạ do Jirimiạ ṭhen niạ kathakin roṛ gotʼkada," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Babelren Nebukadnesar raj do abo sãoteye lạṛhại kana; onate abo ńutumte Probhu Isor ṭhen nehõrokʼ me jemon uni do abo ṭhene ruạṛ hijukʼ. Hoedaṛeakʼa Probhu Isor do lahate leka abo lạgitʼ hahaṛawakʼe kạmiya.” 
Jeremiah21:3 Jirimiạ do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do Sedekiạ raj metaepe," 
Jeremiah21:4 Israelren Probhu Isor do niạ kathae meneda, ‘Babelren raj ar okoe Babelrenko do pạcri bahreteko gherao esetʼ akatʼme onko upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ amakʼ tire okako khanḍa bhanḍa menakʼ onako doń ạcur ruạṛtapea ar nagraha talareń samṭao jarwaea." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ińge ape upạrteń lạṛhạiya ińiń tiyạr akatʼ ti ar keṭecʼ sopote, edre raṅgao ar maraṅ kurkurạukʼtege." 
Jeremiah21:6 Niạ nagrahare okoeko girobasokʼkan baṅ do manwa baṅ do janwar, onko jotoge mahamạriteń ńẽtʼkoa, ar onate onko doko gujukʼa." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ona tayom iń do mahamạri, lạṛhại ar akal khon bańcao tahen Jihudạren Sedekiạ raj, uniren rajkạmiyạko ar niạ nagraharen sanam hoṛ do Babelren raj Nebukadnesar rajakʼ tire ar okoe onkoakʼ gujukʼko khojkan onko bạirikoakʼ tireń soprotkoa. Nebukadnesar do onkoe gocʼkoa; uni do jãhãn daya ar mãyãge onkore bae dohoya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea, “Am do hoṛkom metakoa, Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, ‘ńelpe, ape samaṅre iń do jion reakʼ hor ar gujukʼ reakʼ hor iń dohoakada." 
Jeremiah21:9 Jãhãege niạ nagrahareye tahen uni do tarwaṛe, akal ar mahamạriteye gujukʼa; menkhan jãhãege bahrete oḍok senkate acʼren khekedkoakʼ tire apnartetʼe jimạkʼ uni doe bańcaokʼa; ar acʼakʼ jiwiye bańcaotaea." 
Jeremiah21:10 Iń do niạ nagraharen bhalạiyicʼ doń baṅkana menkhan loksan lạgitʼge monreń goṭa dohoakada. Babelren rajakʼ tire noa do emogokʼa, uni do seṅgelteye ḍahao maraoa.’" 
Jeremiah21:11 Ona chaḍa Jihudạ reakʼ raj bõsrenko hõ niạ katha ańjom lạgitʼem metakoa," 
Jeremiah21:12 ‘E Dạud bõsrenko, Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ape do din hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ hok reakʼ bicạrtakope. Luṭ ocoakanicʼ do uniren sasantaoicʼ khonpe rukhiyạyea; ar baṅkhan apeakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmiko khạṭirte ińakʼ edre do seṅgel leka oḍokokʼte jolokʼa, ona do okoehõ bako ĩṛĩcʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah21:13 E Jerusalem, buru nala otetre tahenkanicʼ iń do enhõ am upạrte minạńa. Am dom meneda, ape upạrte do okoege bako hecʼdaṛeakʼa, ar apeakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ire okoehõ bako bolo daṛeakʼa;" 
Jeremiah21:14 Menkhan iń do amakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại lekateń sạjạimea. Amakʼ birkore seṅgeliń lagaoa; ona seṅgel do am beṛhaete jotowakʼe jom cabaea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Jeremiah22:1 Probhu Isor do Jihudạ reakʼ raj oṛakʼte senkate noa sombat lại jạhir lạgitʼe metadińạ," 
Jeremiah22:2 “Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonrem duṛupʼ akan E Jihudạren raj, am do, amren kạmiyạko ar amren okoeko hoṛ do niạ phaṭok duạrteko bolokʼkan, ape sanamkoge Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Jeremiah22:3 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘oka hok reakʼkan ar oka ṭhikakʼ kan ona onkaepe. Okoeye luṭ ocokʼkan uni do acʼren sasantaoicʼ khon rukhiyạyepe. Bidisiạko, ṭũạr amako ar rạnḍi maejiuko jãhãnakʼ alope behoktakoa se alope santaokoa ar niạ ṭhạ̃ire miridoskoakʼ mãyãm alope joro ocoytakoa." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ape do niạ hukumpe bataotae enḍekhan aperen rapajko do Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonreko duṛupʼa ar onkoren rajkạmiyạko ar hoṛko do rãt gạḍi ar sadomre decʼkate niạ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạrte bhitriteko bolokʼa. 
Jeremiah22:5 Menkhan niạko hukum bape manao enḍekhan iń Probhu Isor do ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, niạ raj oṛakʼ do jarkharokʼa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Jihudạ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃i reaṅ Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do iń ṭhen Gileadrenko leka ar Lebanon reakʼ buru muthni leka kanrehõm khạṭige am do hahaṅkar ṭoṭha reakʼ ujạṛakʼ nagraha lekań hoyocomea." 
Jeremiah22:7 Iń do am upạrte nonosṭokoń kolkoa; onko mimitʼkoakʼ tire do khanḍa bhanḍa tahena. Onko do amakʼ bhage bhage debdạru dareko maga ar seṅgelreko khadle giḍikakʼa. 
Jeremiah22:8 “Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko do niạ nagraha aṛeteko parom calakʼ jokhecʼ am ińko kulikʼa, ‘Probhu Isor do noa maraṅ nagraha cedakʼe nonkakeda?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Unre onkoko roṛ ruạṛa, ‘ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana onko do Probhu Isorakʼ bondobosko bạgi akada ar debotakoko sewawako kan tahẽkana.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Gocʼ akan raj lạgitʼ do alope rakʼ homora; ona khon bickom bondikate okoe sạṅgińteye idi ocoakan uni lạgitʼ rakʼ homorpe, ente uni do tishõ ar bae ruạṛ hijukʼa se acʼakʼ janam disạm hõ ar bae ńelńama." 
Jeremiah22:11 Uni doe hoyokʼ kana Josiạ hopon Salum, okoe do acʼren apat tayom Jihudạren raje hoylena menkhan uni do noa ṭhạ̃i bạgikateye calaoena. Probhu Isor do uni reaṅe meneda, “Uni do tishõ ar bae ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah22:12 Okare bondikateye idi ocoakan uni do onḍegeye gujukʼa; uni do noa disạm ar bae ńelńama.” 
Jeremiah22:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Hae uni do, one okoe bedhoromakʼte acʼakʼ oṛakʼe benaoetʼkan ar behokakʼkote acʼakʼ koṭha kandhakoe tearetʼtae. Hae uni do, okoe hoṛ jãhãnakʼ baṅ emkate acʼakʼ disạmren hoṛkoe khaṭaoetʼko ar onkoakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ kuṛại bae emako kan." 
Jeremiah22:14 Hae uni do, okoeye menetʼ, ‘iń lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ oṛakʼ iń benaoa ar cetan koṭhare do maraṅ maraṅ kandhakoń teara. Ar onare maraṅ maraṅ jalnakoń benaoa ar ona reakʼ toktako do debdạru reakʼ kaṭte ar arakʼ roṅteń sajaoa.’" 
Jeremiah22:15 Aema Aema debdạru dareko tahẽlen khan ona do cetʼ raje benao daṛeama? Amren ạpum do bhage bhageye jom-ńũiyetʼ tahẽkanre hõ okaṭakʼ ṭhikakʼ ar hok reakʼakʼ kan onageye onkayetʼ tahẽkante un jokhecʼ jotowakʼ do bhagege tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah22:16 Uni do reṅgecʼ orecʼko ar dukhạliạkoakʼ mamblae chinḍạuetʼtako tahẽkana. Probhu Isor baḍaeye do ona sanamakʼ kạmikoge. 
Jeremiah22:17 Menkhan amakʼ mẽtʼ ar mon do eken behokakʼ hameṭjoṅ, miridoskoakʼ mãyãm ar santao ar julum reakʼge menakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Onatege Probhu Isor do Jihudạ raj Josiạren hopon Jehoyakim reaṅe meneda, “Uni lạgitʼ do okoehõ bae ‘hae haeyokʼa.’ Hoṛko do uni lạgitʼ ‘hae ińren kisạ̃ṛ! Hae uniyakʼ ṭhonok,’ onka do bako homor halaṅa." 
Jeremiah22:19 Gadha cetʼ lekae topa ocokʼ onkage uni hõe topa ocokʼa; uni do Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok duạr bahrete or idikateko giḍikaea.” 
Jeremiah22:20 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jerusalem, am do Lebanonte senkate hohoeme, ar Basonre amakʼ aṛaṅ ańjom ocoytam. Am do Abarim khon kikiạume, ente amren dulạṛiạko doko chirchạtur akana." 
Jeremiah22:21 Iń do amakʼ bhạlại jokhecʼ iń sontorletʼmea, menkhan amem metadiń tahẽkana, ‘iń do bạń ańjomtama.’ Pạhil khonge amakʼ beohar do nonkage tahẽkana; am do bam batao letʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah22:22 Hoe do amren sanam gukʼpikoe oṭaṅ idikoa ar amren dulạṛiạko do bondikate sạṅgińteko idi ocokʼa. Unre amakʼ sanam dusṭạmi iạte lajao arem opoman ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah22:23 E Lebanon reakʼ debdạru kaṭte benaoakʼ oṛakʼren tahen kạnicʼ, maejiu hoṛakʼ bedon leka tinre haso rakapʼama unre am dom geraṅa!”" 
Jeremiah22:24 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jihudạ rajren Jehoyakimren hopon Konia, iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, ińakʼ jojom ti reakʼ chapakʼ mundạmem hoylenre hõ enhõ iń do amiń or totʼ giḍikama." 
Jeremiah22:25 Okoe amakʼ jiwi hataoko menetʼ, ar okoeyem botoraekan uni Babel raj Nebukadneser ar kạldikoakʼ tireń soprotmea." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iń do am ar okoeye janam akatʼme uni eṅgam hõ eṭakʼ disạmte, one onḍe okoeyakʼ hõ janam baṅ hoyakantape ona disạmreń lebda giḍikapea, ar aben bana hoṛge onḍeben gujukʼa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ar okaṭakʼ disạmte ruạṛ hijukʼpe khojkan onḍe do tishõ bape ruạṛ hecʼ daṛeakʼa.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Nui Konia do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ nihạ̃t giḍiyicʼ rạputʼ bhajan kanae one okoehõ bako khoje? Cedakʼ uni ar uniren hoponko do bin opromakʼ disạmreko lebda giḍi ocokʼa? 
Jeremiah22:29 E disạm, E disạm, E disạm, am do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjome." 
Jeremiah22:30 Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do olme, nui hoṛren cele gidrạge bạnukʼkotaea. Uni do bae jo baha daṛeakʼa ar uniren hoponko hõ bako jo bahakʼa. Onkoren okoehõ Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre do bako duṛupʼa se Jihudạ disạmre bako rajokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Hae, onko gukʼpiko do, one okoe do ińakʼ gupi ṭạnḍiren bhiḍikoko maraoetʼko arko chirchạtur cabayetʼkotiń.”" 
Jeremiah23:2 Ona iạte okoe do ińren hoṛko gupiyetʼko onko gukʼpiko upạrte Israelren Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Ape do ińakʼ palren bhiḍikope chirchạtur akatʼkoa arpe laga ńir akatʼkoa, onko do bape joton akatʼkoa; onate iń do apeakʼ behok iạteń sạjạipea." 
Jeremiah23:3 Okako disạmre ińren pal bhiḍikoń laga ńirletʼko onḍe khon ińge onkoren sarecʼko do akoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiteń ruạṛ ạgukoa; onḍe onko doko bạḍokʼa arko saṅge idikʼa. 
Jeremiah23:4 Onko cetanre nonkan gukʼpikoń bahalkoa okoe do onkoko ńel todarot daṛeako; unre ińren bhiḍiko bako botorokʼa, bako asokʼ ṭayogokʼa ar okoeṭakʼge bako adokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ kathań meneda.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ona dinko hijukʼkana tinre iń do Dạudakʼ bõsre mitʼṭecʼ dhorom reakʼ kahleń omon ocoya; uni do raj lekate ạkil salakʼ rajosṭiye calaoa ar disạmre hok ar dhorom reakʼe kạmiya." 
Jeremiah23:6 Unre Jihudạ do rukhiyại ńama ar Israelko do khạtirjomako girobasokʼa. Ar uni do noa ńutumgeye hoho ocokʼa ‘Probhu Isorge aboakʼ dhorom do.’ 
Jeremiah23:7 “Onate nonkan dinko hijukʼkana tinre hoṛ do ar bako mena, ‘Misor disạm khon okoe do Israelkoe oḍok ạguletʼko uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 bickomko mena, ‘okoe do Israelko utạr ar eṭakʼ disạmteye sạṅgińletʼko ar onḍe khone ạguketʼko uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda.’ Onate onko do akoakʼ disạmreko girobasokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Noa tayom nạbiko babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomkate iń do ontorreń rạputʼ gejer akana ar ińakʼ sanam jaṅko do lewe lewe akana. Probhu Isor ar uniyakʼ sonot katha iạte iń do bul hoṛ leka, darkha rasa ńũkate bul bhuteṛ hoṛ lekań hoyakana." 
Jeremiah23:10 Laṭghaṭkote disạm do perecʼ akana; sarap iạte disạm doe hińjrạukʼkana ar hahaṅkar reakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do rohoṛ akana. Hoṛko do bạṛicʼ horteko sen akana ar onkoakʼ ektiạri do behokakʼteko boeharetʼa. 
Jeremiah23:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Nạbi ar naeke do Isor bako botorae kana; ińakʼ oṛakʼre hõ onkoakʼ dusṭạmiń ńel akatʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah23:12 Ona iạte onkoakʼ hor do leńjedokʼ reakʼ horge hoyakana; ńut doe laga baṛakoa ar onko do onḍegeko bhindạṛokʼa. Ar sạjại emako jokhecʼ iń do onko cetanre muhiniń paṛao ocoya. 
Jeremiah23:13 “Samariạren nạbiko talare iń do niạkoń ńel akada, onko do Bakʼal debota ńutumte nạbi lekate katha roṛkate ińren Israel hoṛko bạṛicʼ horteko idiakatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ona chaḍa Jerusalemren nạbiko talare do noa botoranakʼ jinisgeń ńelakada, onko do laṭghaṭ ar eṛeyakʼre jionko khemaokana. Onko do sasantaokoakʼ tiko keṭecʼetʼtakoa jemon dusṭạmi khon okoe hõ aloko ruạṛ daṛeakʼ. Onko sanamkoge iń ṭhen do Sodom ar Gomoraren hoṛ lekako hoyakana." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Ona iạte iń do phạdkoren Probhu Isorren nạbiko reakʼ iń roṛeda, iń do haṛhatʼakʼ jomakʼ ar bis dakʼgeń ńũ ocokoa, ente Jerusalemren nạbiko ṭhen khon do besonotakʼge goṭa disạmre oḍok akana.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Nạbiko okaṭakʼ kathako menetʼkan ona do alope ańjoma; onko do apeakʼ monre eṛe asko janam ocoyeda. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ moca khon ańjomakʼ katha do bako roṛeda bickom akoakʼ benaoakʼ dorson reakʼ kathageko roṛetʼkana." 
Jeremiah23:17 Okoe ińko nihạ̃t edeńkan onko ṭhen nạbiko do niạ kathako roṛa, ‘Probhu Isore meneda, suluk hoyokʼtapea,’ ar okoe akoakʼ ontor reakʼ keṭecʼakʼteko senokʼkan onko doko mena, ‘jãhãn muskil do baṅ hoyokʼtapea.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 Menkhan ape modre ińakʼ katha ańjom ar bujhạu lạgitʼ iń samaṅre do okoeye teṅgona? Okoe ińakʼ katha doe lutur akawada se onae moneakawada? 
Jeremiah23:19 Ńelpe, ińakʼ edre do birbão hoe leka ar dusṭạmikoakʼ bohokʼ cetanre do hoe bharḍo leka ạcurokʼkana." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ińakʼ edre do ińakʼ ontor ńutumte purạte ạuri perejokʼ hạbicʼ baṅ ruạṛa. Ar ape do tayom daram din pusṭạute onape bujhạu daṛeakʼa. 
Jeremiah23:21 Noko nạbiko do bạń kol akatʼkoa, enhõ onko do ahkaokʼ seletʼ akoakʼ sombat do hoṛko baḍae ocoakatʼkoa; menkhan iń do cetʼ kathage bạń lạiyakatʼkoa, enhõ onko do kathako roṛeda." 
Jeremiah23:22 Menkhan iń samaṅreko teṅgolen khan onko do ińren hoṛko ṭhen ińakʼ kathako lại jạhirkea ar bạṛicʼ hor ar bạṛicʼ kạmi khon onkoko ruạṛkekoa.” 
Jeremiah23:23 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do cetʼ eken sorren Isor kạnạń, ar sạṅgińren Isor doń baṅkana?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Jãhãege cetʼ nonkan danaṅ jaegareye oko daṛeakʼa okare bạń ńelńam daṛeae? Iń do serma ar ot reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃irege cetʼ bạń tahẽnkana?” 
Jeremiah23:25 “Okoeko nạbi iń ńutumte eṛe kathako roṛetʼkan onkoakʼ katha doń ańjom akatʼgea. Onko doko meneda, ‘iń do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńelakada, mitʼṭecʼ kukmũgeń ńelakada.’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Noko nạbiko do ar tinạkʼ din akoakʼ ontorre eṛe khon eṛeteakʼko roṛa? 
Jeremiah23:27 Onko doko hudiseda akoren hapṛamko cetʼleka Bakʼal debotako sewawade tahẽkante ińko hiṛińledeń onkage akoakʼ kukmũ reakʼ katha sanam ṭhenko roṛte ińren hoṛko ińakʼ ńutumko hiṛiń ocokoa. 
Jeremiah23:28 Okoe nạbi kukmũe ńeletʼ uni do acʼakʼ kukmũ reakʼ katha do kukmũ lekageye roṛma, menkhan okoe ińakʼ kathae ńamakatʼ uni do pạtiạr salakʼ onae lại jạhirma; ente guhum jaṅ ṭhen bhusạ reakʼ do jãhãn damge bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ińakʼ kathako do cetʼ seṅgel leka do baṅkana? Okaṭakʼ hạtuṛ dhiriye kuṭạm gejeretʼkan ińakʼ katha do cetʼ ona hạtuṛ leka do baṅkana? 
Jeremiah23:30 “Ona iạte okoe nạbiko eṭakʼko ṭhen khon ińakʼ kathako kombṛoe iń do onko upạrte minạńa. 
Jeremiah23:31 Hẽ, iń do onko nạbi upạrtege minạńa okoe do akoakʼ alaṅko laṛaoetʼkan arko lại jạhiretʼkan, ‘Probhu Isore meneda.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Sạrige iń do onko nạbi upạrte minạńa okoe eṛe kathako roṛetʼkan. Onko do onageko roṛeda ar onkoakʼ bạḍạite perecʼ kathate ińren hoṛko bạṛicʼ horteko idiyetʼkoa. Menkhan onko do bạń kol akatʼkoa se hukum hõ bạń hukum akatʼkoa. Onko do noko hoṛkoakʼ thoṛa hõ bako upkạr daṛeakʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah23:33 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Noko hoṛ se jãhãe nạbi se naekeko tinre amko kulimea, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ katha do cetʼ kana mente?’ Unre onkom lạiyakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ape do ińren bojhako kanape ar iń doń giḍikapegea.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Jãhãe nạbi se naeke se eṭakʼ jãhãeye men, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ katha do noa kana,’ enḍekhan uni hoṛ ar uniyakʼ gharońjren doń sạjạikoa." 
Jeremiah23:35 “E ińren hoṛko, ape mimitʼko do aperen gate se peṛako ṭhen kulijoṅpe, ‘Probhu Isor do cetʼe roṛ ruạṛ akada mente?’ Se ‘Probhu Isor do cetʼe menakada?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Menkhan ape do tishõ jemon alope men, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ katha do noa kana,’ ente mimitʼ hoṛ do akoakʼ kathage Isorakʼ katha menteko benaoeda. Nonkate ape do jiwetʼ Isorakʼ, aperen phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ kathape konḍeayetʼkana.”" 
Jeremiah23:37 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa, “Onko modre tinre jãhãege nạbi lekate kathae roṛ unre unipe kuliyea, ‘am do cetʼ Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛ akatʼmea? Se ‘Probhu Isor do cetʼe menakada?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 “E ińren hoṛko, ińakʼ katha bape manao arpe men, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ katha do noa kana,’" 
Jeremiah23:39 enḍekhan khạṭigiń uṭhạupea ar iń samaṅ khoniń giḍikapea ar okaṭakʼ nagraha do ape ar aperen hapṛamkoń ematʼko tahẽkan ona nagraha hõ iń samaṅ khoniń lebda giḍikakʼa. 
Jeremiah23:40 Ape do jaejug henosta ar lajaogeń ladeapea ar ona do baṅ hiṛińokʼa.” 
Jeremiah24:1 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Jehoyakim hopon Jekoniạ Jihudạren raj, Jihudạren mukhiyạko, kạrigolko ar kamarko do Jerusalem khon Babelteko bondi idi ocoyen tayom Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ oṛakʼ samaṅre dohoakan bar khạclạkʼ loa joe ńel ocokedińa." 
Jeremiah24:2 Mitʼṭecʼ khạclạkʼre do pạhil beleakʼ loa leka bhage loa tahẽkana, ar eṭakʼ khạclạkʼre do ạḍi bạṛicʼ loa jo tahẽkana, ona do nunạkʼ bạṛicʼ tahẽkana je, okoege bako jom daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah24:3 Probhu Isor do ińe kulikedińa, “E Jirimiạ, cetʼ em ńeleda?” Iń doń roṛ ruạṛadea, “Loa jo; mońjakʼ do ạḍige mońj, menkhan bạṛicʼakʼ do nunạkʼge bạṛicʼ, one okoehõ ohoko jomdaṛele.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Iń Israelkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, Jihudạren okoe do nonḍe khon Babel disạmte bondikateń kol akatʼko onko do noa bhage loa lekageń bujhạuetʼkoa." 
Jeremiah24:6 Iń do bhạlạiko lạgitʼge onkoń ńel todarotkoa ar noa disạmteń ạgu ruạṛkoa. Onko doń benao rakapʼkoa, ar bạń dhaṅdhaserkoa; onko doń rohoekoa, ar bạń or totʼ giḍikoa." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ar iń do noa baḍae lạgitʼ moniń emakoa je, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar iń do onkoren Isorgeń hoyokʼa, ente goṭa ontortege iń ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Menkhan noa bạṛicʼ loa, okaṭakʼ do ạḍi bạṛicʼge, one oka baṅ jomogokʼ, onako leka Jihudạren raj Sedekiạ, uniren kạmiyạko ar Jerusalemren okoeko hoṛ do disạmre menakʼko ar Misorre okoeko tahenkan onko sãote do bạṛicʼ iń beohara." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ar jãhãrege onkoń sạṅgiń giḍikako onḍege onko do botorankoń hoyocokoa, dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko ṭhen hirkhạwanko, landa-dhutʼanko, henostako ar kạhtukgeń hoyocokoa. Ar onkoakʼ ńutum iạte hoṛko do onkoko sarapakoa." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ar onkoren hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạmiń emakawatʼko ona disạmre tin hạbicʼ bako marao utạrokʼ un hạbicʼ onko talare lạṛhại, mahamạri ar akal iń kola.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Josiạren hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre, metakʼme, Babel raj Nebukadnesarakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Jihudạren sanam hoṛko reaṅ Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena." 
Jeremiah25:2 Ona iạte Jirimiạ nạbi do Jihudạren sanam hoṛko ar Jerusalemreko tahẽnkan sanam hoṛkoe jạhiratʼkoa," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Josiạren hopon Jihudạren raj Amonakʼ rajokʼ gelpe bochor khon ńit hạbicʼ, metakʼme noa bargel pe bochor Probhu Isorakʼ katha do iń ṭhen sodor akana ar iń do aema dhao onań lạiyakatʼpea, menkhan ape do bape lutur akawatʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah25:4 “Probhu Isor do acʼren sanam gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko jaoge ape ṭhene kolletʼkore hõ ape do bape ańjomletʼtakoa ar mone hõ bape moneyada." 
Jeremiah25:5 Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ noa kathako metatʼko tahẽkana, ‘Ape do ńitokʼ apeakʼ bạṛicʼ hor ar bạṛicʼ kạmiko khon ruạṛokʼpe, enḍekhan oka disạm aperen hapṛamkoń ematʼko tahẽkan ona disạmre ape do jaejug hạbicʼpe tahẽdaṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah25:6 Ape do debotako alope pańjakoa ar sewa hõ alope sewawakoa; apeakʼ tite benaokʼ jiniskote iń do alope edre ocoyińạ. Ar baṅkhan bạń bhạlạipea.’ 
Jeremiah25:7 “Ńitokʼ Probhu Isor doe meneda, ‘menkhan ape do ińakʼ katha bape ańjomletʼtińạ. Ar ona bodolte apeakʼ tite benaoakʼ jiniskote iń edre ocoakadińte apnar cetanre muhinpe ạguakawana.’" 
Jeremiah25:8 “Ona iạte phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ape do ińakʼ katha bape ańjomletʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah25:9 Iń do utạrren sanam jạtrenko ar ińren golam Babelren Nebukadnesar rajiń hoho ạguiyea. Noa disạm ar onaren hoṛko upạrte ar beṛhaeten sanam jạtrenko upạrte onkoń ạgukoa. Iń do purạte onko hoṛkoń maraokoa ar onko do botoran ar landa-dhutʼan jạtrenkoń hoyocokoa; onkoakʼ disạm do jaejug lạgitʼ iń ḍahao maraoa. 
Jeremiah25:10 Onko tala khon rạskạ ar hulạs reakʼ aṛaṅ, jãwãe ar bạhu kuṛiyakʼ aṛaṅ, jante reakʼ saḍe ar diuhe reakʼ marsal doń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa." 
Jeremiah25:11 Niạ disạm do jarkhar ar potit jumige hoyokʼa ar noko jạtrenko do eaegel bochor hạbicʼ Babel rajren golam akanko tahena. 
Jeremiah25:12 Menkhan eaegel bochor purạulen khan iń do Babelren raj ar uniyakʼ jạtrenko do onkoakʼ behokakʼ iạteń sạjạikoa ar Babel disạm do jaejug lạgitʼ iń ḍahao maraoa. 
Jeremiah25:13 Iń do onako sanam disạm upạrte okako kathań roṛletʼ okaṭakʼ do noa puthire ol menakʼ, metakʼme sanam jạtrenko upạrte Jirimiạ nạbi oka kathae nạbiyakatʼ ona disạmre iń do onakoń paṛao ocoya." 
Jeremiah25:14 Babelrenko do aema jạtrenko ar maraṅ maraṅ rajkoren golamko hoyokʼa; onkoakʼ kạmiko lekatege iń do kuṛạiyiń emakoa.’ ” 
Jeremiah25:15 Israelren Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Ińakʼ ti khon darkha rasa, metakʼme ińakʼ edrete perecʼ noa bạṭi hataome ar okoe jạtrenko ṭheniń kolme onko onam ńũ ocokoa." 
Jeremiah25:16 Onko do ona ńũkateko konḍe manḍekʼa ar okaṭakʼ lạṛhại onko talareń kol ona iạteko lelha cabakʼa. 
Jeremiah25:17 Unre iń do Probhu Isorakʼ ti khon ona bạṭiń hataokeda ar okoe jạtrenko ṭhene kolkedeń onkoń ńũ ocoketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah25:18 Iń do Jerusalem ar Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako ar onaren rapajko ar rajkạmiyạkoń ńũ ocoketʼkoa, jemon teheń cetʼ leka menakʼko onkage jarkharakʼ, ujạṛakʼ, cigạri ar sarapan hoṛko hoyokʼ." 
Jeremiah25:19 Ona chaḍa Misorren Pharao raj ar uniren rajkạmiyạko, uniyakʼ disạmren mukhiyạko ar uniren sanam hoṛko;" 
Jeremiah25:20 onḍe tahenkan sanam bidisiạko; Kus disạmren sanam rapajko; Philisṭiren sanam rapajko, metakʼme Askelon, Gasa, Ekron ar Asdodren sarecʼkoren rapajko;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edomrenko, Moabrenko ar Amonren hoṛko;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Tur ar Sidonren sanam rapajko; doreão hanasaren rapajko; 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, Bus disạmren hoṛko; bohokʼ upʼ gegetʼ hoṛko;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabren sanam rapajko; hahaṅkarre girobasokʼ kan sanam bidisiạ rapajko; 
Jeremiah25:25 Simri, Elam ar Madaeren sanam rapajko;" 
Jeremiah25:26 sor ar sạṅgińren mitʼke mitʼ utạrren sanam rapajko. Metakʼme, dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko onań ńũ ocoketʼkoa. Onko sanamko tayom do Sesakren, metakʼme Babelren raj hõ onae ńũiya." 
Jeremiah25:27 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa, “Onkom metakoa, Israelkoren Isor phạdkoren Probhui meneda, ‘ape talare iń do lạṛhạiyiń koleda; ape do ińakʼ edreteakʼ bạṭi khon ńũiype, bul bhuteṛokʼpe, bejpe, sombodokʼpe ar alope beretʼa.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Menkhan amakʼ ti khon ona bạṭi reakʼ okoe ńũńũ bako reben onkom metakoa, phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘noa do ńũńũtege hoyokʼtapea." 
Jeremiah25:29 Ńelpe, ińakʼ nagrahage pạhilteń marao giḍikakʼ lạgidokʼ kana, enḍekhan ape do cetʼ begor sạjạitepe tahena? Sạjại dope ńamgea, ente dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko upạrte iń do lạṛhạiyiń ạguakada. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Ńitokʼ am do onko upạrte nạbi lekate noako katha roṛme, ‘Probhu Isor do cetan khone hạnḍrạua; ar acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i khon acʼakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoytaea ar uniyakʼ disạm upạrte ãṭteye hạnḍrạua. Ar darkha joko len leka uni do dhạrtireko girobasokʼkan sanamko upạrteye hohoea." 
Jeremiah25:31 Dhạrti reakʼ ses simạnako hạbicʼ ona reakʼ saḍe do ańjomokʼa, ente Probhu Isor do jạt jạtrenko upạrte mamblae ạguiya. Uni do sanam manwae bicạrkoa ar dusṭạmi hoṛ do tarwaṛeteye gocʼkoa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelme, mitʼ jạtrenko khon ar mitʼ jạtrenko cetanre muhin do pasnao akana; dhạrti reakʼ ses simạnako khon mitʼṭecʼ birbão hoe do rakapʼakana.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Unre Probhu Isor okoekoe gocʼko onko do dhạrti reakʼ mitʼ simạ khon eṭakʼ simạ hạbicʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire sombhotʼ bhinḍạṛ akanko tahena. Onko lạgitʼ do celege bako halaṅ homora se onko do celehõ bako jarwakoa se topa hõ bako topakoa, menkhan onko do ot cetanre guricʼ lekako hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah25:34 E gukʼpiko, ape do ragpe, homor halaṅpe; E gukʼpikoren mukhiyạko, ape do dhuṛire guṛdạukʼpe, ente ape gurpe reakʼ okte do seṭer akana; ape do mońj mitʼṭecʼ hasa reakʼ bhajan lekape rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah25:35 Gukʼpiko do dạṛ reakʼ upạige baṅ tahentakoa; gupikoren mukhiyạko hõ okatehõ bako sen daṛeakʼa. 
Jeremiah25:36 Gukʼpikoakʼ rakʼ ar palren mukhiyạkoakʼ homor halaṅ ańjompe, ente Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍikoe nosṭo caba akatʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah25:37 Probhuakʼ jolokʼkan edre iạte sulukte perecʼ ṭạnḍiko do potit jumi leka tahena. 
Jeremiah25:38 Uni do dhạcri kul leka acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i bạgikateye oḍok hijukʼa; onate sasantaokoakʼ raṅgao iạte ar Probhu Isorakʼ jolokʼkan edre iạte onkoakʼ disạm do jarkhar cabakʼa. 
Jeremiah26:1 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ pạhil secʼ Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, am do senkate ińakʼ racare teṅgokʼme ar Jihudạ reakʼ nagrahako khon okoeko hoṛ do koejoṅ lạgitʼ ińakʼ oṛakʼteko hijukʼ onko sanamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ katha galmaraoakoń hukum akatʼme ona reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ katham lạiyakoa, mitʼṭecʼ hõ alom bad oṭokakʼa." 
Jeremiah26:3 Hoedaṛeakʼa onko do onako ańjoma ar akoakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khonko ruạṛ hijukʼa. Ar onkoakʼ behokakʼ iạte onko cetanre okaṭakʼ muhin ạgui lạgitʼ iń goṭa akatʼ ona do ar bạń paṛao ocoya. 
Jeremiah26:4 Am do noa katham jạhirakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘unạkʼ din ińakʼ katha do bape ańjomleda ar ape samaṅre okaṭakʼ ạn-ạriń dohoakatʼ ona hõ bape manao akada;" 
Jeremiah26:5 ona chaḍa aema dhao ińren golamko, metakʼme nạbiko ape ṭheniń kolletʼkoa menkhan ape do onkoakʼ katha hõ bape ańjomletʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah26:6 Onate niạ oṛakʼ do Silo lekań hoeocoya ar nonkań hoeocoya jemon dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko niạ nagrahako sarapakʼ.’ ” 
Jeremiah26:7 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre Jirimiạ do tinre noako kathae galmaraoako kan tahẽkana unre naekeko, nạbiko ar sanam hoṛko do onako ańjomkeda." 
Jeremiah26:8 Menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ hukum leka Jirimiạ do sanamakʼe lại sạtketʼ khan naekeko, nạbiko ar sanam hoṛko do uni sapʼkedeteko metadea, “Am do gujukʼtege hoyokʼtama." 
Jeremiah26:9 Cedakʼ am do Probhu Isor ńutumte nonkam nạbi akada, “Baṅma noa oṛakʼ do Silo leka hoyokʼa ar nagraha do ḍahao maraokʼte ujạṛokʼa?” Noa menkate sanam hoṛ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre Jirimiạko esetʼ ạcurkedea." 
Jeremiah26:10 Jihudạren rajkạmiyạko do noa kathako ańjomketʼ khan raj oṛakʼ khon Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko hecʼena ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ nãwã phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ hor ṭhenko duṛupʼena. 
Jeremiah26:11 Unre naekeko, nạbiko, rajkạmiyạko ar sanam hoṛko menkeda, “Nui hoṛ do gujukʼ sạjại ńam lek kanae, ente uni do noa nagraha upạrteye nạbi akada; ar ona do apeakʼ luturtegepe ańjomakada.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Unre Jirimiạ do sanam hoṛko ar rajkạmiyạkoe metatʼkoa, “Ape do niạ oṛakʼ ar nagraha upạrte okape ańjomketʼ ona lạlại lạgitʼge Probhu Isor do ińe kol akadińa." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ńitokʼ ape do apeakʼ colon ar kạmiko sudhrạutape ar aperen Isor Probhuakʼ katha ańjomtaepe. Enḍekhan Probhu Isor do ape upạrte okaṭakʼ muhin kol reakʼe goṭa akatʼ ona do ar bae kola. 
Jeremiah26:14 Ńelpe, iń do apeakʼ tirege minạńa; okaṭakʼ bhage ar hok reakʼ mentepe hudisetʼ onage ińre kạmipe." 
Jeremiah26:15 Tobe noa do khạṭige baḍaekakʼpe, ińpe gocʼ giḍikạńre hõ miridosicʼakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dạyi do ape cetanrege ar niạ nagraha cetanre ar okoe nonḍeko tahenkan onko cetanrege paṛaokʼa; ente noako katha baḍae ocope lạgitʼge Probhu Isor doe kol akadińạ.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Unre rajkạmiyạko ar sanam hoṛko do naekeko ar nạbikoko metatʼkoa, “Nui do gujukʼ sạjại lek doe baṅkana. Uni do aboren Probhu Isor ńutumte abo ṭhen kathae roṛakada.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Inạ tayom disạmren murubbiko modre adomko do samaṅ secʼ hecʼente jarwa akan sanam hoṛko metatʼkoa," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Jihudạren Hiskiạ raj oktere Moresetren Mikạ do nạbi lekate kathae roṛetʼ tahẽkana. Uni do Jihudạren hoṛkoe metatʼko tahẽkana, ‘phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, Sion do khet baṛge lekae cas ocokʼa, Jerusalem do dhaṅ dhaserakʼ ḍhipi leka hoyokʼa ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ buru do jhạuạkote dapal esedokʼa.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Jihudạren raj Hiskiạ se Jihudạren eṭakʼ jãhãe do cetʼ Mikại gocʼledea? Hiskiạ do cetʼ Probhu Isor bae botorae kan tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ daya do cetʼ bae khojletʼa? Onate Probhu Isor do hoṛko cetanre oka muhin paṛao ocoy reakʼ kathae roṛletʼ ona do ar bae kolleda. Menkhan abo do apnarte mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ botor bon ạgujoṅkana. ” 
Jeremiah26:20 Kiriyat-Jearimren Semaya hopon Uriạ do ar mitʼ nạbi hoṛe tahẽkana, uni do Probhu Isor ńutumteye nạbiyetʼ tahẽkana. Uni hõ Jirimiạ lekage noa nagraha ar noa disạm upạrte onkageye nạbileda." 
Jeremiah26:21 Jehoyakim raj ar uniren sanam subedarko ar rajkạmiyạko tinre Uriạwakʼ kathako ańjomkeda unre raj do uni goje reakʼe kurumuṭukeda. Menkhan ona katha ańjomkate Uriạ do botorte Misor disạmteye dạṛkeda. 
Jeremiah26:22 Jehoyakim raj do unre Akbor hopon Elnathan ar uni sãoten arhõ thoṛa hoṛ Misorteye kolketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah26:23 Onko do Misor khon Uriạko hoho ạgukedete Jehoyakim raj ṭhenko idikedea; ar raj do tarwaṛete uniye gocʼkedea ar hoṛkoakʼ topa ṭhen uniyakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye giḍikatʼtaea. 
Jeremiah26:24 Menkhan Saphanren hopon Ahikam do Jirimiại goṛowadea, onate Jirimiạ goje lạgitʼ hoṛkoakʼ tire bae soprotledea." 
Jeremiah27:1 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ pạhil secʼ Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena. 
Jeremiah27:2 Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Am do harta reakʼ phitạ ar kaṭ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ arãṛ benaokate amakʼ tarenre gogme." 
Jeremiah27:3 Ona tayom okoeko paṭhaona do Edomren raj, Moabren raj, Amonren raj, Turren raj ar Sidonren raj ṭhen khon Jerusalemte Jihudạren raj Sedekiạ ṭhenko hecʼakan onko hotete sanam rapajko ṭhen khoborem kola." 
Jeremiah27:4 Onkoren kisạ̃ṛko mitʼṭecʼ khobor emako lạgitʼem metakoa, Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhu do onkoren kisạ̃ṛko niạ katha galmarao ako lạgitʼe metakokana," 
Jeremiah27:5 ‘ińakʼ maraṅ daṛete ar ektiạri perecʼ tite iń do niạ dhạrti ar ona cetanre okoe manwa ar janwarkoń sirjạu akatʼko, ar okoe lek kanae menteń hudisede uniyakʼ tirege iń do ektiạriń emetʼkana." 
Jeremiah27:6 Ńitokʼ iń do apeakʼ goṭa disạmge ińren golam Babelren raj Nebukadnesarakʼ tireń soprota; ar bir janwarko hõ uni tabereń dohokoa. 
Jeremiah27:7 Tinạkʼ din uniyakʼ disạm reakʼ okte baṅ hijukʼ unạkʼ din sanam jạtrenko do uniren hoponko ar uniren goṛomtetʼkoren golamko hoyokʼa; ona tayom aema jạtrenko ar maraṅ maraṅ rapajko do unige akoren golamko benaoea. 
Jeremiah27:8 “Menkhan jãhãe jạtrenko se rajosṭi jodi Babel raj Nebukadnesar ren golam bako hoyokʼ se uniyakʼ arãṛ bako gog enḍekhan onko jạtrenko do lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạriteń sạjạikoa tin hạbicʼ onko jạtrenko uni tite bạń maraoko." 
Jeremiah27:9 Onate aperen nạbiko, gonokko, ar kukmũ guruko, mãyãko, se jạdu udukʼkoakʼ katha do alope ańjomtakoa; onko do apeko metapea, Babel rajren golam do bape hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah27:10 Onko do eṛeyakʼko nạbiya, onate ape do apeakʼ disạm khonpe sạṅgiń ocokʼa; iń do apeń laga ńirpea ar ape dope marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah27:11 Menkhan jãhãe jạtrenko jodi Babel rajakʼ arãṛko gog ar uniren gutiko hoyokʼ enḍekhan onko jạtrenko do akoakʼ disạmreń tahẽ ocoakoa jemon onḍeko casbas daṛeakʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah27:12 Jihudạren raj Sedekiạ do ona sombatgeń lạiyadea, “Babelren rajakʼ arãṛ gogme; uni ar uniren hoṛkoren golam hoyokʼme, enḍekhan am dom bańcaokʼa." 
Jeremiah27:13 Okoe jạtrenko do Babel rajren golam bako hoyokʼ onko upạrte Probhu Isor okae menetʼkan ona leka am ar amren hoṛko do lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạrite cedakʼpe gujukʼa?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Onko nạbikoakʼ katha alo ańjomtako lạgitʼ okoeko metapekan, ‘ape do tishõ Babel rajren golam bape hoyokʼa,’ onko do ape ṭhen eṛeyakʼko nạbiyeda." 
Jeremiah27:15 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do onko bạń kol akatʼkoa. Onko do iń ńutumte eṛeyakʼko nạbiyeda. Ona iạte ape ṭhen okoeko nạbiyetʼ onko nạbi doń sạṅgińkoa ar ape sanamkogepe marao utạrokʼa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Unre iń do naekeko ar sanam hoṛkoń metatʼkoa, Probhu Isor meneda, “Okoe nạbi oneko metapekan, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko do usạratege Babel khon ruạṛ ạgukʼa,’ onkoakʼ katha do alope ańjomtakoa. Onko do ape ṭhen eṛeyakʼko nạbiyeda." 
Jeremiah27:17 Onkoakʼ katha do alogepe ańjoma. Ape do Babelren raj sapʼsoraepe, enḍekhan ape dope bańcaokʼa. Noa nagraha do cedakʼ jarkharokʼa?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Onko doko nạbikan khan ar Probhu Isorakʼ katha onko ṭhen menakʼ khan enḍekhan Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ, Jihudạwakʼ raj oṛakʼ reakʼ ar Jerusalemre ńithõ oka jinisko sarecʼ menakʼ ona jemon Babelte alo idikʼ ona lạgitʼ phạdkoren Probhu Isor ṭhenko nehõrokʼ ma." 
Jeremiah27:19 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Jehoyakimren hopon Jihudạren raj Jekoniạ, Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren mukhiyạko Jerusalem khon Babelte idiko jokhecʼ oka tham khunṭikin, maraṅ bhajan, doṛomakʼko ar eṭakʼ okako jinisko bako idiakatʼ onako reaṅ phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe meneda," 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 ‘okako jinis ińakʼ oṛakʼ ar Jihudạ rajakʼ oṛakʼre ar Jerusalemre menakʼ onako hõ Babelte idikʼa ar tin hạbicʼ onako bạń moneyakʼ un hạbicʼ onako do onḍege tahena. Ar ona tayom iń do arhõ niạ ṭhạ̃ite onakoń ruạṛ ạguiya. Iń Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhuge niạ katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Jeremiah27:22  
Jeremiah28:1 Inạ bochorge, Jihudạren raj Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ pạhil secʼ, metakʼme ponakʼ bochor reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ candore Gibeon nagraharen Asur hopon Hananiạ nạbi do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre naekeko ar sanam hoṛko samaṅre Jirimiạ noa kathae metadea," 
Jeremiah28:2 Israelkoren Isor phạdkoren Probhui meneda, ‘iń do Babelren rajakʼ arãṛ iń rạpudtaea." 
Jeremiah28:3 Babel raj Nebukadnesar do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ okako jinis nonḍe khon Babelteye idiyakatʼ onako iń do bar bochor bhitrite nonḍeń ạgu ruạṛa. 
Jeremiah28:4 Ona chaḍa iń do Jehoyakim hopon Jihudạren raj Jekoniạ ar Jihudạren eṭakʼ bondiko okoe do Babelteko senakan onko hõ niạ jaegateń ruạṛ ạgukoa, ente Babelren rajakʼ arãṛ doń rạputʼ giḍiytaea. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Unre Jirimiạ nạbi do naekeko ar sanam hoṛko okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko teṅgo akan tahẽkan onko samaṅre Hananiạ nạbiye roṛ ruạṛadea. 
Jeremiah28:6 Uni doe menkeda, “Amen, Probhu Isor do onageye onkaema. Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jinisko ar Babel khon sanam bondiko nonḍe ruạṛ ạgukote Probhu Isor do amakʼ nạbi katha reakʼgeye purạu ma." 
Jeremiah28:7 Menkhan am ar sanam hoṛko samaṅre okaṭakʼ katha lại jạhir iń menetʼkan ona baṛe ańjomtińpe. 
Jeremiah28:8 Am ar iń lahate sedaeren okoe nạbikoko tahẽkan, onko do aema disạm ar maraṅ maraṅ rajosṭi upạrte lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạri reaṅko nạbileda." 
Jeremiah28:9 Menkhan okoe nạbi do suluk reakʼ kathae roṛ ar uniyakʼ katha tinre purạukʼa unre baḍaeyokʼa, sạrige uni do Probhu Isorgeye kolledea mente.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Inạ tayom Hananiạ nạbi do Jirimiwakʼ taren reakʼ arãṛe rạputʼkeda. 
Jeremiah28:11 Ar sanam hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘nonkage iń do bar bochor bhitrite sanam jạtrenkoakʼ taren khon Babel raj Nebukadnesarakʼ arãṛ iń rạputʼ giḍiya.’ ” Unre Jirimiạ nạbi do onḍe khone calaoena." 
Jeremiah28:12 Hananiạ arãṛe rạputʼletʼ thoṛa din tayom khange Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Am do senkate Hananiạ metaeme, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘am do kaṭ reakʼ arãṛem rạputʼ giḍiakada menkhan iń do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ arãṛ iń benaoa." 
Jeremiah28:14 Iń Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, noko jạtrenko jemon Babelren raj Nebukadnesarren golamko hoyokʼ onate onkoakʼ tarenre mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ arãṛ iń ladeakoa, ar onko do uniko sapʼsoraea. Ar uni do bir janwarko cetanre hõ ektiạriń emaea.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Unre Jirimiạ nạbi do Hananiại metadea, “E Hananiạ, ańjomme. Probhu Isor do bae kol akatʼmea, menkhan jạtrenko do eṛe kathatem pạtiạu ocoakatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah28:16 Onate Probhu Isore meneda, ‘am do dhạrti khoniń ocokʼmea. Niạ bochorge am dom gujukʼa, ente am do Probhu Isor upạrte hul reakʼem porcar akada.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Inạ bochor reakʼ eaeakʼ candore Hananiạ nạbi doe gocʼena. 
Jeremiah29:1 Bondiko modre sarecʼ akan murubbiko, naekeko, nạbiko ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko Nebukadnesar raj do Jerusalem khon bondikate Babelteye idiletʼko onko ṭhen Jirimiạ do Jerusalem khon mitʼṭecʼ ciṭhiye kolkeda." 
Jeremiah29:2 Ar Jekoniạ raj ar uniren eṅgat, rajkạmiyạko, Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren mukhiyạko, kạrigolko ar kamarko Jerusalem khon bondikate idiko tayom noa ciṭhi do ol hoylena." 
Jeremiah29:3 Jihudạren Sedekiạ raj do Saphan hopon Elasa ar Hilkiạ hopon Gemaria do Nebukadnesar raj ṭhene kolletʼkina, ar Jirimiạ do unkin tite noa ciṭhiye kolleda. Onare ol tahẽkana:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor okoe do bondi lekate Jerusalem khon Babelteye kol akatʼko onko sanamko ṭhene meneda," 
Jeremiah29:5 “Ape do oṛakʼ-duạr benaokate girobasokʼpe; ar kheb baṛge benaokate ona reakʼ jo jompe. 
Jeremiah29:6 Baplakʼpe ar gidrạko janamkope; aperen hoponko bạhuakope ar hoponerako baplakakope jemon onkoren hõ gidrạko hoyokʼtako. Ape do onḍe saṅgekʼpe, ar alope komaokʼa." 
Jeremiah29:7 Ona chaḍa okaṭakʼ nagrahare bondi lekateń idiakatʼpe onḍenakʼ bhạlại reakʼ kurumuṭuipe. Ona iạte iń ṭhen koejoṅpe, ente ona nagraha reakʼ bhạlại hoylen khan ape hõ bhạlại hoyokʼtapea." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ape talare menakʼko nạbiko ar gonokko jemon aloko eṛepe. Onko okaṭakʼ kukmũko ńeletʼ ona do alope moneyakʼa. 
Jeremiah29:9 Onko do iń ńutumte eṛe kathako roṛeda. Iń Probhu Isor do onko bạń kol akatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah29:10 “Babel reaṅ eaegel bochor reakʼ okaṭakʼ katha roṛakan ona purạulen khan iń do apeń moneyapea; ar okaṭakʼ bhạlạipe reakʼ iń gokʼ akawatʼpe onań purạua, metakʼme noa ṭhạ̃iteń ạgu ruạṛpea." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ape lạgitʼ ińakʼ goṭawakʼ do ińiń baḍaea; ona do apeakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼge, bạṛicʼ lạgitʼ do baṅa. Ar ona goṭawakʼ hotetege apeakʼ tayom daram reakʼ as do purạukʼtapea." 
Jeremiah29:12 Unre ape do ińpe hohowạńạ ar iń ṭhen hecʼkatepe koejoṅa; ar iń do apeakʼ iń ańjomtapea. 
Jeremiah29:13 Ape do ontorte baḍaeyiń reakʼ tinrepe ahkaokʼa unre ińpe baḍae daṛeạńạ. 
Jeremiah29:14 Ape dope baḍaeyińạ, ar iń do apeakʼ bondi dosa khoniń ruạṛ ạgupea. Okoe jạtrenko ar ṭhạ̃ireń sạṅgiń akatʼpe onḍe khon iń doń samṭao jarwapea. Ar okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon bondikateń idi ocoletʼpe iń do onḍegeń ạgu ruạṛpea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah29:15 Hoedaṛeakʼa apepe mena, “Probhu Isorge Babelre ale tala khon nạbikoe upel akatʼkoa.”" 
Jeremiah29:16 Menkhan Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼ raj reaṅ ar niạ nagraharen sarecʼ sanam hoṛko reaṅ, metakʼme apeakʼ disạmren hoṛko okoe do ape sãote bako bondi ocolen onko sanamko reaṅ Probhu Isor doe meneda," 
Jeremiah29:17 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isor do onko upạrte lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạriń kola ar onko do hirkhạwakʼ loa lekań hoyocokoa one ona do bạṛicʼ iạte celege bako jom daṛeakʼ." 
Jeremiah29:18 Iń do lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạrite onkoń khudạu baṛakoa ar dhạrtiren sanam rajosṭirenko ṭhen do botoranko lekań hoyocokoa. Ar okoe jạtrenko talareń laga ńirko onko ṭhen do landa-dhutʼan ar hirkhạwankogeń hoyocokoa. Onko ńelte hoṛko doko ṭhak utạrokʼa ar onkoakʼ ńutum do sarapanakʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah29:19 Ente okaṭakʼ katha iń do aema dhao ińren golamko, metakʼme nạbiko hotete onko ṭheniń jạhirletʼ onko do ona bako ańjomletʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah29:20 “Ona iạte ape bondi akanko, okoe do Jerusalem khon Babelteń kolakatʼpe, ape sanamge ińakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Jeremiah29:21 Kolayaren hopon Ahab ar Maseyaren hopon Sedekiạ, unkin do iń ńutumte ape ṭhen eṛekin nạbiyetʼkan, unkin reaṅ iń Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhugeń meneda, unkin do Babelren raj Nebukadnesarakʼ tireń soprotkińạ, ar uni do apeakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅregeye gocʼkinạ." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ar Babelre menakʼko Jihudạren sanam bondiko do hoṛko ạsisakore unkinakʼ kathako roṛa, ‘Probhu Isor do Sedekiạ ar Ahab lekae hoeocoy tạkinma, one Babelren raj do seṅgelte unkine atarletʼ kin,’" 
Jeremiah29:23 ente unkin do Israelko talare ạḍi hirkhạwakʼ kin kạmi akada; unkin do aḍepaseren maejiuko tulucʼkin laṭghaṭ akada ar okaṭakʼ bạń menakatʼ kin unkin do ińakʼ ńutumte eṛeyakʼkin nạbi akada. Iń do onań baḍaegea ar onaren goha kạnạń. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelamren Semaya dom metaea," 
Jeremiah29:25 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Am do amakʼ ńutumte Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko ṭhen, Maseyaren hopon naeke Sephaniạ ṭhen ar eṭakʼ sanam naekeko ṭhen ciṭhim kol akada." 
Jeremiah29:26 Am do Sephaniạm ol akawadea, ‘Probhu Isor do Jehoyada naeke bodolte amge naeke menteye ojokʼ bahal akatʼmea jemon Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhar am cetanre tahen. Jãhãe lelha hoṛ nạbi lekae kạmi khan uni dom hạṛi paṭayea ar hoṭokʼre mẽṛhẽtʼ sikṛitem tolea." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ar Anathotren Jirimiạ do unre ape ṭhene nạbiketʼre cedakʼ bam sạjạiledea? 
Jeremiah29:28 Uni do Babelre ale ṭhen niạ khobore kolleda, ḍher din nonḍe tahen hoyokʼtalea. Onate oṛakʼ-duạrle benao joṅte nonḍele girobasokʼ ar khet baṛge benaokate cas baskatele joma.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Naeke Sephaniạ do menkhan ona ciṭhi Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhene paṛhaokeda. 
Jeremiah29:30 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Am do sanam bondiko ṭhen niạ khobor kolme, Nehelamren Semaya reaṅ Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Semaya do bạń kol akadea, enhõ uni do ape ṭhen nạbiye udugokʼ kana ar eṛe kathateye pạtiạu ocoakatʼpea." 
Jeremiah29:32 Iń do khạṭige Nehelamren Semaya ar uni bõsrenkoń sạjạikoa. Noko jạtrenko modre uniren do celege bako tahena ar ińren hoṛko okań bhạlạiko ona do bae ńela, ente uni do iń upạrteye hul akada. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Probhu Isor ṭhen khon noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Iń Israelren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, am okako kathań galmarao akatʼme ona joto do mitʼṭecʼ puthire ol dohoyme," 
Jeremiah30:3 ente nonkan dinko hijukʼkana tinre iń do ińren hoṛ Israel ar Jihudạ reakʼ dosań ạgu ruạṛa ar okaṭakʼ disạm do onkoren hapṛamkoń ematʼko tahẽkan ona disạmre iń do onkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa, ar ona do onkoakʼ dokholre tahena.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Israel ar Jihudạ babore Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda," 
Jeremiah30:5 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, suluk reakʼ aṛaṅ do baṅ bickom toras reakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅge ańjomokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah30:6 Ape do kulijoṅpe ar ńelpe, herel hoṛ do cetʼ kukhire gidrại janam daṛekea? Enḍekhan cetʼ iạte daṛean herel hoṛ do bedonokʼkan maejiu leka lacʼ cetanre ti capo akan ar sanamkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mulin akaniń ńeletʼkana?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Hae, enhilokʼ do ạḍi botoranakʼge hoyokʼa! Onka do ar tisge baṅ hoyokʼa. Ona do Jakobakʼ kosṭo reakʼ okte hoyokʼa, menkhan uni do ona khone bańcao ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah30:8 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, enhilokʼ iń do onkoakʼ taren khon arãṛiń rạputʼ giḍikatakoa ar onkoakʼ tolkoń topakʼ giḍikakʼa; bidisiạko ar do golam menkate bako dohokoa." 
Jeremiah30:9 Ona bodolte onko do akoren Probhu Isor ar akoren raj Dạudren mitʼṭen hoponko sapʼsoraea one iń do onkoren rajiń hoeocoye. 
Jeremiah30:10 “Onate E ińren golam Jakob, am do alom botorokʼa; E Israel, alom as chuṭạukʼa. Iń do sạṅgiń ṭhạ̃i khon am ar bondi idi ocoakan amren hoponko khạṭigeń bańcaokoa. Jakob do arhõ suluk ar nirạiteye tahena ar okoehõ bako botor ocoyea." 
Jeremiah30:11 Am são sãotege minạńa ar iń do amgeń bańcaomea. Okoe jạtrenko talare amiń chirchạturletʼme onko doń marao utạrkoa, menkhan apeko do purạte do baṅa. Menkhan begor sạjạite hõ bạń aṛakʼpea, iń do dhoromte bicạrkateń ḍanṭaopea.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Amakʼ ghao do baṅ besokʼtama, amem hạn akan reakʼ ran do bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah30:13 Am secʼ katha roroṛ hoṛ do okoehõ bạnukʼkoa, amakʼ ghao reakʼ ran do bạnukʼa, ar am do besokʼ reakʼ ashõ bạnukʼtama." 
Jeremiah30:14 Amren sanam dulạṛiạko do amko hiṛiń akatʼmea; onko do am reaṅ bako ganḍonokʼ kana. Bạiri hạnko lekage amiń hạn akatʼmea ar kurmutạha lekageń sạjại akatʼmea, ente amakʼ bedhorom do ḍhergetama ar kạiko hõ ḍhergea." 
Jeremiah30:15 Baḍaegeam ghao do baṅ besokʼtama menkhan hasote cedakʼem kikiạueda? Amakʼ aema bedhorom ar kại iạte iń do amre noań nonka akada. 
Jeremiah30:16 “Menkhan okoe amko ses utạretʼme onko sanamgeko marao ocokʼa; amren sanam bạiri do bondi dosareko calakʼa. Ar okoe ame luṭ akatʼme uni hõe luṭ ocokʼa; okoe amakʼ jinisko recʼetʼme iń hõ onkoakʼ jiniskoń recʼ ocoytakoa. Hoṛ do amko metama, ‘nui kangeae uni sạṅgiń ocoakan Sion do one uniyakʼ khoj okoehõ bako hataoetʼkan," 
Jeremiah30:17 menkhan enhõ iń do amakʼ hoṛmoń ruạṛkakʼa ar amakʼ ghaokoń bogeytama.’ ” 
Jeremiah30:18 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jakobakʼ bõsren hoṛkoakʼ dosa doń ruạṛtakoa ar onko cetanre dayań uduga. Nagraha do ona dhaṅdhaser cetanre arhõ benao ruạṛokʼa ar raj oṛakʼ do lahateakʼ ṭhạ̃ire teṅgo akae tahena." 
Jeremiah30:19 Ar ona khon do rạskạ reakʼ aṛaṅ ar sarhao reakʼ sereńge ańjomokʼa. Onkoakʼ lekha doń baṛhaotakoa, onko do bako komaokʼa. Onko doń manotkoa, onko do okoege bako nihạ̃t ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Onkoren hopon ar hoponerako do lahate lekageko hoyokʼa, ar iń samaṅrege onkoakʼ somaj do rehedokʼtakoa. Ar okoe onkoko jor julumko onko doń sạjạikoa." 
Jeremiah30:21 Onkoren mukhiyạ do onkoren mitʼ hoṛe hoyokʼtakoa; onko tala khonge ḍanṭaoicʼe rakabokʼa. Iń do uniń hohoaea ar uni do iń ṭhene hijukʼa, ente bạń hohoae khan uni do cetʼ dil salakʼ iń ṭhene hecʼdaṛeakʼa?" 
Jeremiah30:22 Onatege ape do ińren hoṛpe hoyokʼa ar iń do aperen Isoriń hoyokʼa.” 
Jeremiah30:23 Ńelpe, Probhu Isorakʼ edre do birbão hoe leka oḍok hijukʼa, ar lagakan hoe leka one dusṭạmikoakʼ bohokʼ cetanre pheḍ hijukʼkan." 
Jeremiah30:24 Probhu Isorakʼ sana purạpuri kạmire ạuri lagaokʼ hạbicʼ uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre do baṅ ruạṛtaea. Tayom daram dinkore hõ noa dope bujhạu daṛeakʼa. 
Jeremiah31:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Un jokhecʼ iń do Israelkoren sanam gusṭiren Isoriń hoyokʼa, ar onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Israelko jirạu ńam lạgitʼko calakʼkan tahẽkanre tinạkʼ do tarwaṛe khonko paskaolen onko do hahaṅkarre ińakʼ dayako ńamleda.”" 
Jeremiah31:3 Ona jokhecʼ Israelko doko menleda, Probhu Isor do sạṅgiń khon onko ṭhene ńel ocolena. Ar Probhu Isor do unre onkoe metatʼko tahẽkana, “Asambheṛ dayateń dulạṛ akatʼpea; ar asambheṛ mãyãtege iń ṭheniń or sorakatʼpea.”" 
Jeremiah31:4 Ńitokʼ do uniye meneda, “E kũạri kuṛi Israel, iń do arhõń jut ruạṛmea, onate am do arhõm jut dohṛakʼa. Am do arhõ amakʼ tablam hataoa ar rạskạkʼko tulucʼem enecʼa." 
Jeremiah31:5 Samariạ burure am do arhõ darkha bagwanem benaojoṅa; ar okoe bagwanko benaojoṅ onko do ona reakʼ joko joma. 
Jeremiah31:6 Nonkan dinko hijukʼa tinre Ephrayimakʼ buru coṭre pahradarko do hohoateko mena, ‘Dela, Sionte aboren Probhu Isor ṭhen bon calakʼa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ape do Jakob lạgitʼ kusi monte sereńpe; sanamko khon soros jạtrenko lạgitʼ sarhao sereńpe. Ape do sarhao sereńate menpe, ‘E Probhu Isor, amren hoṛko, Israelren sarecʼ hoṛko baṛe bańcaokom.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Ńelpe, utạr disạm khon iń do Israelkoń ạgukoa ar dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna khoniń jarwa mitʼkoa. Onko modre kãṛãko, leḍhako, bhạrti hoṛmoko ar bedon rakapʼ akatʼko maejiu hõko tahena; ar maraṅ utạr mitʼṭecʼ dolko ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah31:9 Onko do rakʼ rakʼteko hijukʼa; ar tinre onkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa unre onko do koe koeteko hijukʼa. Onko do otte ar gaḍa dakʼko secʼteń taṛam ocokoa; onḍe onko do bako tohodokʼa, ente iń do Israelren, metakʼme Eprayimren apat kạnạń ar uni do ińren pạhil janamicʼ hopon kanae." 
Jeremiah31:10 “E Jạt jạtrenko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe; ar sạṅgiń disạmkore niạ katha lại jạhirpe, ‘okoe do Israelkoe chirchạturletʼko uni do onkoe jarwakoa ar gukʼpiko leka acʼakʼ palkoe rukhiyạitaea.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Iń Probhu Isorge Jakob doń chaḍao ạguiyea ar onko khon hõ daṛeankoakʼ ti khoniń owareya. 
Jeremiah31:12 Onko do hecʼkate Sion reakʼ cetan ṭhạ̃ireko rạskạkʼa; ar iń emakʼ ḍher anaj, nãwã darkha rasa, sunum, bhiḍi merom ar pal ḍaṅgrakoren hopon ńamkateko rạskạkʼa. Onko do bhage dakʼ ńamakʼ bagwan lekako hoyokʼa; onko do ar bako nijorokʼa." 
Jeremiah31:13 Kũạri kuṛiko doko enecʼa arko rạskạ joṅa, juạnko ar haṛamko hõ bako badokʼa. Onkoakʼ homor halaṅ do rạskạteń pheraotakoa; duk bodolte jiwi raṛecʼ ar rạskạń emakoa." 
Jeremiah31:14 Naekeko do sanamakʼteń purunkoa, ar ińren hoṛko do ińakʼ bhor iạteko tirpidokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ramare ãṭ aṛaṅte rakʼjoṅ ar hae haeyokʼge ańjomokʼkana; Rahel do acʼren gidrạko lạgitʼe rakʼeda, cetʼte hõ jiwi do baṅ raṛejokʼ kantaea, ente onko do ar bạnukʼkotaea." 
Jeremiah31:16 Thirokʼme alom raga ar mẽtʼ dakʼ jodtam, ente amakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại dom ńamgea. Onko do bạirikoakʼ disom khonko ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah31:17 Onate tayom daram din lạgitʼ as do menakʼgetama. Amren hoponko do akoakʼ disạmteko ruạṛ hijukʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda. 
Jeremiah31:18 “Iń do khạṭige Ephrayimakʼ noa hae haeyokʼ doń ańjomakatʼgea, ‘am do bin etoakan mĩhũ lekam ḍanṭao akadińạ, ar ona iạte iń do sạjạiyiń ńam akada. Ruạṛińme, enḍekhaniń ruạṛ hijukʼa, ente am kangeam ińren Probhu Isor do." 
Jeremiah31:19 Iń do bạṛicʼ horte sen tayom kastaokateń ruạṛ hecʼena, bujhạu ńamkate koṛamiń ceṭakʼena. Iń do lajao ariń opoman ocoyena, ente ińakʼ juạn umer reakʼ kại iạtegeń opoman ocoyena.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Ephrayim do cetʼ ińren sadher hopon doe baṅ kantińạ? Nui do cetʼ uni hopon doe baṅ kantińạ one uni ńelteń kusikʼkan? Uni upạrte jao okte kathań roṛ akatʼrehõ enhõ iń do jaogeń disạyede kana. Ona iạte ińakʼ jiwi do uni lạgitʼe rakʼeda; uni lạgitʼ ińakʼ daya do menakʼgetińạ. 
Jeremiah31:21 “Ape do hor horte; udukʼakʼ cinhạko dohoype ar khunṭiko bạisạupe. Ar oka hortem senlen ona hor reakʼ katha disạime. E kũạri Israel, dela ruạṛ hijukʼme, amakʼ goṭa nagrahawante ruạṛ hijukʼme." 
Jeremiah31:22 E bạṛicʼ horte senakan kuṛi, ar tinạkʼ din am dom dãṛãbaṛaea? Iń Probhu Isor do dhạrtire mitʼṭecʼ nãwãnakʼ iń hoyocoakada, ona do hoyokʼ kana, maejiu do herel hoṛe aḍ bańcaoea.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhui meneda, “Bondi dosa khon tinre hoṛkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa unre Jihudạ disạm ar ona nagraharen hoṛ do arhõko mena, ‘E dhoromte perecʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i, E sonot buru, Probhu Isor do ame bhoramma.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Onko hoṛ do Jihudạ ar ona reakʼ sanam nagrahareko girobasokʼa ar cacasko ar okoe do akoren ạsul janwarko anteko ạcur baṛaekan onko hõ onḍeko tahena. 
Jeremiah31:25 Iń do laṅga akankoń cerṭha ocokoa ar nacarkoakʼ ontor doń daṛe ocoytakoa.” 
Jeremiah31:26 Unre iń do ebhenkate beṛhaeteń beṅgetʼ ạcurkeda. Ar jạpitʼ do iń ṭhen mońjge tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah31:27 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okte hijukʼ kana one unre iń do Israelko ar Jihudạren hoṛko ar janwarko itạ lekań erkoa." 
Jeremiah31:28 Cetʼleka onkoń or totʼko, ariń rạputʼ giḍiko ariń lebda giḍikako ar onko cetanre ḍahao marao ar muhin ạgui reakʼ nońjoriń doholetʼ onkage onko benao rakapʼko ar cara leka rohoe aroko secʼhõ nońjoriń dohoyeda." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ona jokhecʼ hoṛko do ar bako mena, ‘Apatko do jojo darkha joko jomakada, menkhan ḍaṭa do hoponkoakʼ khoroyentakoa.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Ona bodolte mimitʼ hoṛ do akoakʼ kại iạtegeko gujukʼa; ar okoe jojo darkha joe jom unige ḍaṭa do khorokʼtaea.” 
Jeremiah31:31 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okte hijukʼ kana Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko lạgitʼ iń do mitʼṭecʼ nãwã bondobosiń bandhaoa." 
Jeremiah31:32 Onkoren hapṛamko Misor disạm khon ti sapʼkateń oḍok ạguko jokhecʼ onko lạgitʼ oka bondobos iń doholetʼ noa nãwã bondobos do ona leka do baṅ hoyokʼa. Iń do unkinren jãwãe lekań tahẽkanre hõ enhõ unkin do ińakʼ bondobos kin rạputʼ akada. 
Jeremiah31:33 Israelko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ bondobos iń bandhaoa ona do hoyokʼ kana, ińakʼ ạn-ạriko onkoakʼ monreń rebetʼakoa ar onkoakʼ ontorre hõń ol dohoya. Iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa ar onko do ińren hoṛgeko hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah31:34 Apnar aḍepaserenko ar apnar boeha hõ noa mente okoege tishõ bae cetʼakoa, ‘Probhu Isor baḍaeyepe,’ ente jotoge ińko oromińạ. Ona iạte iń do onkoakʼ bedhoromiń ikạitakoa, onkoakʼ kại do ar tishõ bạń disạitakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Okoe do sińre siń cando, ńindạ do ńindạ cando ar ipilko marsal emokʼ lạgitʼe hukumako, ar okoe do jalapuriye lebḍayetʼkan jemon onako reakʼ ḍheoko hud hudạukʼ, ar okoeyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorkan," 
Jeremiah31:36 uni doe meneda, “Noa reakʼ niạmko ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon sakʼ khan, Israelko hõ jạtrenko lekate iń samaṅ khonko marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah31:37 Coṭ serma reakʼakʼko soṅlen khan ar latarre dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼ sendra ńamlen khan enḍekhan Israelko okako cekakan onate onko do bạń bạsutakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah31:38 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ona okteko hijukʼkana tinre iń lạgitʼ Hananel buruńj khon Konac reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼ niạ nagraha do arhõ benao arokʼa." 
Jeremiah31:39 Sosoṅakʼ baber do onḍe khon Gareb buru hạbicʼ ticʼkate ona do Goa hạbicʼ ạcurokʼa. 
Jeremiah31:40 Goṭa buru lodam one okare mạ̃ṛĩ ar torocʼko giḍikakʼ ar purub secʼ sadom phaṭok reakʼ konac hạbicʼ Kedron buru lodam reakʼ sanam bilạn ṭạnḍiko ona do Probhu Isor ńutumte begar dohokakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar nagraha do tishõ baṅ rạputʼ giḍikʼa se baṅ dhaṅdhaserokʼa.” 
Jeremiah32:1 Jihudạren raj Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ gelakʼ bochorre, metakʼme Nebukadnesarakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen hecʼena." 
Jeremiah32:2 Unre Babel rajren lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalemko gherao esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkana ar Jirimiạ do raj oṛakʼ reakʼ pahradarkoakʼ racareko bondi akade tahẽkana. Uni do onḍegeye tahẽkana," 
Jeremiah32:3 ente Jihudạ raj Sedekiạ do noa katha menteye bondi ocoledea, “Am do noa katham nạbi akada, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘noa nagraha do Babel rajakʼ tireń soprota ar uni do noae hata." 
Jeremiah32:4 Jihudạ raj Sedekiạ do Babel rajakʼ ti khon ohoe rukhiyạ daṛelena uni do khạṭige onkoren rajakʼ tireye soprot ocokʼa. Uni do Babel raj tulucʼ samna sạmni kathae roṛa ar acʼakʼ mẽtʼte uniye ńelea. 
Jeremiah32:5 Babelren raj do Sedekiại idiyea ar tin hạbicʼ uni secʼ bạń beṅged unhạbicʼ uni do onḍegeye tahena. Ona iạte Babelrenko tulucʼpe lạṛhạilenre hõ ape do bape jitạu daṛeakʼa.’ ” 
Jeremiah32:6 Unre Jirimiại menleda, “Probhu Isor do iń metadińạ," 
Jeremiah32:7 iń kaka Salumren hopon Hanamel do iń ṭhen hecʼkateye mena, ‘Anathotre ińakʼ okaṭakʼ jumi menakʼ ona kirińme, ente sor peṛa lekate ona kiriń reakʼ ạidạri do amakʼge menakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka iń kakaren hopon Hanamel do pahradarkoakʼ racare iń ṭhen hecʼkateye metadińạ, ‘Benjamin ṭoṭhako reakʼ Anathotre ińakʼ oka jumi menakʼ ona do amge hataome. Ona chaḍao ar dokhol reakʼ hok ạidạri do amakʼ kangea onate amge ona do kirińme.’ “Ińiń baḍaekan tahẽkana noa do Probhu Isorakʼ katha kana:" 
Jeremiah32:9 Onate iń kakaren koṛa Hanamel ṭhen khon Anathot reakʼ ona jumiń kirińkeda ar mitʼsae irạlgel eae gram rupạń soṅadea. 
Jeremiah32:10 Iń do dolelreń suhiyada, ariń mohor chapada ar gohako hõń dohoketʼkoa ar tulạte ona rupạń soṅadea." 
Jeremiah32:11 Iń do barea dolelgeń hataokeda. Niạm lekate mohor chapakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ar begor mohor chapakʼ eṭakʼakʼ mitʼṭecʼ. 
Jeremiah32:12 Ona tayom do iń kakaren koṛa Hanamel samaṅre okoe gohako dolelreko suhiletʼ onko ar pahradarkoakʼ racareko duṛupʼ akan tahẽkan sanam Jihudiko samaṅre ona dolel do Neriạren hopon Barukiń emadea. Nui Neriạ do Maseyaren hopone tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah32:13 Onko samaṅrege iń do Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhuakʼ noa hukum Barukiń emadea, ‘am do jumi kiriń reakʼ mohor chapatʼ ar baṅ mohor chapakatʼ ona banar dolelge hataokate hasa reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhajanre dohokakʼme jemon ona do ḍher din ṭikạu tahen," 
Jeremiah32:14  
Jeremiah32:15 ente noa disạmre oṛakʼ-duạr, jaega-jumi ar darkha bagwan do arhõ kiriń ạkhrińokʼa. Iń Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhuge noa katha doń meneda.’" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Jumi kiriń reakʼ dolel do Neriạren hopon Baruk emade tayom iń do Probhu Isor ṭhen noań koekeda," 
Jeremiah32:17 ‘E Probhu Isor, am do amakʼ maraṅ daṛete ar amakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite serma ar otem benao akada. Am ṭhen bin leṭecʼakʼ do cetʼge bạnukʼanaṅ." 
Jeremiah32:18 Am do hajar hajarko amakʼ asambheṛ dayam udukʼako kana ar apatkoakʼ ghạṭko reakʼ sạjại do onkoren hoponkom emakokana. E maraṅ ar daṛeanicʼ Isor, amakʼ ńutum do sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhuge;" 
Jeremiah32:19 amakʼ hudisko do sorosgea ar amakʼ sanam kạmiko do daṛete perecʼgea. Manwakoakʼ sanam cạl colon secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼkin do beṅgetʼ akaege menakʼa; am do mimitʼko akoakʼ cạl colon ar kạmi reakʼ kuṛạiyem emakokana. 
Jeremiah32:20 Am do Misor disạmre aema cinhạkom udukʼ akatʼa ar hahaṛawakʼkom kạmileda ar teheń hõ Israel ar sanam manwako talare onakom kạmikana, onate amakʼ ńutum do pasnao idikʼkantama." 
Jeremiah32:21 Am do cinhạ ar hahaṛawakʼ kạmikom udukʼ akada ar daṛe ar ektiạri perecʼ ti tiạrkate botoranakʼkote amren hoṛ Israelko onḍe khonem oḍok ạguletʼkoa. 
Jeremiah32:22 Oka disạmre toa, dumur rasa ar jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼ ona disạm emako reakʼ katha onkoren hapṛamko ṭhenem gokʼleda ar onam ematʼko tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah32:23 Onko do hecʼkate onako ạidạrian tahẽkana, menkhan onko do amakʼ katha bako ańjomleda ar amakʼ ạn-ạri leka bako senlena; ar okaṭakʼ cekae lạgitʼem hukumatʼko tahẽkan ona reakʼ cetʼge bako kạmileda. Ar onatege noako muhin do onkorem paṛao ocoleda." 
Jeremiah32:24 Nagraha hatao lạgitʼ cetʼleka pạcri sãote pinḍhạ benao hoyokʼkan ona baṛe ńelme. Lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạri hotete nagraha do Babelrenkoakʼ tire calakʼ lạgitʼ. Ar ona dom ńeletʼkangea, ar okam menletʼ onage hoyakana," 
Jeremiah32:25 menkhan E Probhu Isor, Babelrenkoakʼ tire nagraha hatlenre hõ am dom metadiń tahẽkana, iń do jemon rupạte jumiyiń kiriń ar onaren gohakoń dohoko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Tayomte Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Iń Probhu Isorge, sanam manwakoren Isor kạnạń. Iń lạgitʼ Jãhãnakʼ cekae do cetʼ baṅ hoedaṛeakʼa?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Onate noa nagraha do Babelrenko ar onkoren raj Nebukadnesarakʼ tireń soprota. Uni do noae hatjoṅa. 
Jeremiah32:29 Babelrenko do nagrahate bolokate onare seṅgelko junḍiyakʼa. Ar okako oṛakʼ reakʼ chat cetanre hoṛko do Bakʼal debota ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan ar eṭakʼ debotako ńutumte coḍorkate ińko khĩs ocoyedeń tahẽkan onko do ona oṛakʼ-duạr sudhạ nagrahako jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. 
Jeremiah32:30 “Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko do huḍiń khonge ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre eken bạṛicʼakʼ chaḍa ar cetʼge bako kạmi akada; sạrige Israelren hoṛko do akoakʼ tite benaoakʼ jiniskote ińko bekusi ocoakadińạ. 
Jeremiah32:31 Oka hilokʼ noa nagraha benaolen enhilokʼ khon teheń hạbicʼ onage ińakʼ khĩs ar edre do nonkae rakapʼ ocoakada je, ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon ona doń ocokʼ giḍikakʼa," 
Jeremiah32:32 ente Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko, onkoren sanam raj ar rajkạmiyạko, naekeko ar nạbiko, Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko do akoakʼ sanam bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi hotete ińko bekusi ocoakadińạ." 
Jeremiah32:33 Onko do iń secʼko dea akada, mẽtʼãhã do baṅa; iń do aema dhao onkoń cetʼ akawatʼko tahẽkanre hõ enhõ onko do ińakʼ ḍanṭao bako aṅgocleda." 
Jeremiah32:34 Onko do ińakʼ oṛakʼre akoren hirkhạwan murhutʼko doho akatʼkote onako bhonḍakada. 
Jeremiah32:35 Onko do Molok debota ńutumte akoren gidrạko samaṅko lạgitʼ Bin-hinom buru nalare Bakʼal debota ńutumte boṭkocʼ thankoko benao akawana. Iń do tishõ ona bạń hukum akawatʼkoa se ińakʼ monre tishõ baṅ hecʼakana, onko do nonkan bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikate Jihudạko kại ocoyea mente." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Ape do noa nagraha reaṅpe roṛeda, ‘lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạri hotete noa do Babel rajakʼ tire emakana,’ menkhan iń Israelren Probhu Isorgeń meneda," 
Jeremiah32:37 ińakʼ khĩs ar jolokʼkan edre iạte okako disạmre onkoń sạṅgiń giḍiletʼko onḍe khon khạṭigeń jarwakoa. Ar noa ṭhạ̃iteń ruạṛ ạgukoa ar khạtirjomań girobas ocokoa. 
Jeremiah32:38 Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa, ar iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah32:39 Iń do nonkan mon ar ontoriń emakoa onko do eken iń secʼgeko ạwilokʼa; onate onko do ako apnarte ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ jao okte ińko botorạńạ. 
Jeremiah32:40 Onko lạgitʼ iń do noa jaejug bondobosiń dohoya ar onko lạgitʼ bhạlại do tisge bạń bonda. Iń do onkoakʼ monre botoriń rakapʼ ocoytakoa jemon iń khon tishõ aloko ruạṛ calakʼ. 
Jeremiah32:41 Iń do kusi monte onkoń bhạlạikoa ar ińakʼ goṭa mon ar ontorte niạ disạmre khạṭige onko do cara lekań rohoekoa. 
Jeremiah32:42 “Iń do noko hoṛko cetanre cetʼleka niạ maraṅ muhiniń ạguakatʼ onkage onko do ińakʼ gokʼakʼ sanamakʼ bhạlạiyiń danakoa. 
Jeremiah32:43 Okaṭakʼ disạm reakʼpe menetʼ tahẽkan, ‘noa do mitʼṭecʼ potit jomikana, noare manwa se janwar celege bạnukʼkoa, ente noa do Babelrenkoakʼ tire em ocoakana,’ ona disạmre jumi do arhõ kiriń ạkhrińokʼa." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjạmin ṭoṭhare, Jerusalem beṛhaeteakʼ ṭoṭhare, Jihudạ ar Negeb reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahakore ar usul-copotʼ buru ṭoṭha reakʼ sanam ato ar nagraha reakʼ jumiko kirińokʼa, dolelre suhikʼa ar mohor chapakʼ hoyokʼa ar gohakoko dohokʼa, ente iń do onkoakʼ lahateakʼ dosań ạgu ruạṛtakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Jirimiạ do unhõ pahradarkoakʼ racare bondi akane tahẽkana ar nonkan oktere Probhu Isorakʼ katha do dosar dhao uni ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah33:2 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ińakʼ ńutum do Probhu kana, iń doń kạmikana; ar okaṭakʼ iń kạmi ona reakʼ doń goṭa lahayetʼkana ariń kạmi sạtetʼkana. Ińiń meneda," 
Jeremiah33:3 hohoạńme, ar iń doń roṛ ruạṛama ar nonkan maraṅ ar nonkan danaṅakʼko reaṅ kathań lạiyama one oka do bam baḍaekan." 
Jeremiah33:4 Babelrenko sãote lạṛhại jokhecʼ pạcri sãote benao akatʼ pinḍhạ ar tarwaṛe khon rukhiyạkʼ lạgitʼ noa nagraha reakʼ okako oṛakʼ-duạr ar Jihudạ reakʼ raj dolanko rạputʼ hoylen onako do onko hoṛkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkote perejokʼa one okoe do ińakʼ edre ar raṅgao iạteń gocʼko. Onkoakʼ sanam dusṭami iạte niạ nagraha secʼ khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãń doń betʼakatʼtińạ. Ar iń Israelren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Jeremiah33:5  
Jeremiah33:6 “Enhõ iń do napae hoṛmoteń dohoya ariń ran bogea; ińren hoṛkoń ran bogekoa ar sạriyakʼ reakʼ asambheṛ suluk nirại ar khạtirjoma iń khulạuakoa. 
Jeremiah33:7 Iń do Jihudạ ar Israelren hoṛko bondi dosa khoniń ruạṛ ạgukoa ar onkoakʼ disạm do arhõ lahate lekań benao ruạṛa. 
Jeremiah33:8 Ar iń upạrte okako kại akatʼ ona khoniń saphakoa ar iń upạrteko kạmi akatʼ onkoakʼ sanam bedhoromakʼ ar hulko hõń ikạitakoa. 
Jeremiah33:9 Unre niạ nagraha do dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko samaṅre ińe rạskạ ocoyińạ are manot ocoyińạ are sarhao ocoyińạ. Ar uni okakoń bhạlạiye ona do onko jạtrenko ańjom ńama, ar uniń em akawade asambheṛ bhạlại ar suluk ńelte hoṛko doko botorokʼa arko thar tharaokʼa." 
Jeremiah33:10 “Ape do niạ ṭhạ̃i reaṅpe meneda, ‘noa do ujạṛ akana; nonḍe do manwa se janwar hõ bạnukʼkoa.’ Menkhan Jihudạ reakʼ okako nagraha ar Jerusalem reakʼ okako ḍahar do ujạṛge menakʼ, one okare manwa se janwar hõ bako tahenkan onḍe do arhõ rạskạ ar hulạs reakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomokʼa ar jãwãe koṛa ar bạhu kuṛiyakʼ aṛaṅ hõ ańjomokʼa; ar okoe Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre gun manao reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko ạgui onkoakʼ aṛaṅ hõ ańjomokʼtakoa. Onko doko mena, ‘phạdkoren Probhu Isor sarhaoepe, ente Probhu Isor doe bhagegea, ar uniyakʼ daya do jaejug hạbicʼ tahẽakae tahenkana.’ Iń do lahate lekage niạ disạm reakʼ dosań ạgu ruạṛa." 
Jeremiah33:11  
Jeremiah33:12 Noa potit jumi, okare manwa ar janwar celege bạnukʼko, onḍe ar onḍenakʼ sanam nagraha ar atoko do arhõ gukʼpiko ar bhiḍiko lạgitʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍige hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah33:13 Usul ar copotʼ buru ṭoṭha reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahakore, Benjạmin ṭoṭhakore, Jerusalem beṛhaete ar Jihudạ ar Negeb reakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahakore bhiḍi gukʼpiko do akoren bhiḍiko lekha lekhateko chaṛ sạ̃itạukoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 Probhu Isore meneda, “Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko ṭhen oka bhạlại reakʼ iń gokʼletʼ ona okteko do hijukʼkana ar iń do onań purạua." 
Jeremiah33:15 Onako dinre ar onako oktere iń do Dạudakʼ bõs khon mitʼṭecʼ dhorom reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ ḍạr iń omon ocoya; uni do dhạrtire dhorom ar sạriyakʼteye bicạra. 
Jeremiah33:16 Ona jokhecʼ Jihudạren hoṛ do bańcaoko ńama ar Jerusalemren hoṛ do khạtirjomako girobasokʼa. Uni do niạ ńutumgeye hoho ocokʼa, ‘Probhu Isorge aboakʼ dhorom do.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Israel reakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ Dạudakʼ bõsren hoṛ do tishõ bako khạntikʼa. 
Jeremiah33:18 Iń samaṅre teṅgokate jaoge jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ, jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ar janwar samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ Liwi naekeko modre hõ bako khạntikʼa.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Inạ tayom Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen hecʼena," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, siń ar ńindạ lạgitʼ iń bandhao akatʼ ińakʼ bondobospe rạputʼ daṛeakʼ khan, onate okte nạpitre siń ar ńindạ baṅ hoyokʼ," 
Jeremiah33:21 enḍekhan ińren guti Dạud lạgitʼ ar iń samaṅre teṅgokate okoe do sekʼwa reakʼko kạmikan onko Liwi naekeko lạgitʼ oka bondobosiń bandhao akatʼ ona hõ rạpudokʼa ar Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre rajokʼ lạgitʼ uniren cele hoponge bako tahena. 
Jeremiah33:22 Ińren guti Dạudren hoponko ar okoe Liwiko do iń samaṅre teṅgokate sekʼwa reakʼko kạmikan onko do sermaren ipil lekako saṅgekʼa, ar ohogeko lekha caba daṛelena.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ arhõe metadea," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Hoṛko okako menetʼ, baṅma, ‘Probhu Isor do Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛkoe bachaoan tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ do onkoe nihạ̃t giḍikako kana,’ ona do cetʼ bam kheyaletʼ kana? Onko do ińren hoṛko nihạ̃tetʼkoa ar jạtrenko lekate bako ńeletʼkoa." 
Jeremiah33:25 Menkhan iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, siń ar ńindạ lạgitʼ ińakʼ bondobos ar serma ar pirthimi lạgitʼ ạriko bạń bandhao akatʼ khan," 
Jeremiah33:26 enḍekhan Jakob ar ińren guti Dạud bõsrenko hõń nihạ̃t giḍikakoa ar Abraham, Isạhak ar Jakobakʼ bõsrenko cetanre rajokʼ lạgitʼ Dạud bõsrenko khon mitʼ hoṛ hõ bạń bachaojoṅa. Iń do khạṭige onkoakʼ bhage dosań ruạṛkatakoa ariń mãyãwakoa.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar, ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar uni tabe reakʼ sanam rajosṭiko ar jạtrenko tinre Jerusalem ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ nagrahako upạrteko lạṛhạikan tahẽkana unre Israelren Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea uni do jemon Jihudạren Sedekiạ raj ṭhen senkateye metae, “Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda, noa nagraha do Babel raj ṭheniń soprota ar uni do seṅgelteye ḍahao maraoa." 
Jeremiah34:2  
Jeremiah34:3 Ar uniyakʼ ti khon do bam rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa; am do khạṭige sapʼkate uniyakʼ tireko soprotmea; ar apnar mẽtʼte Babelren rajem ńelea; uni do am samaṅre kathae roṛa, ar am do Babeltem calakʼa." 
Jeremiah34:4 “E Jihudạren Sedekiạ raj, enhõ ińakʼ katha ańjomme. Am reaṅgeń menetʼkana, tarwaṛete am do bam gujukʼa;" 
Jeremiah34:5 menkhan suluktegem gujukʼa. Amren hapṛamko, metakʼme am lahate okoe rajko tahẽkan onko manot emako lạgitʼ cetʼleka dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onkage hoṛko do am manotme lạgitʼ dhupko jereda ar ‘haere hae kisạ̃ṛtale do’ niạ menteko halaṅ homora. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Unre Jirimiạ nạbi do Jerusalemre Jihudạ raj Sedekiạ onako kathae metadea. 
Jeremiah34:7 Ona jokhecʼ Babel rajren lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalem, Lakis ar Aseka upạrteko lạṛhạikan tahẽkana, ente Jihudạ disạm talare eken pạcrite esetʼ nagrahakoge ạidạri lạgitʼ sarecʼ tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah34:8 Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ tulucʼ arhõ kathae roṛkeda. Noa lahare Sedekiạ raj do Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko sãote golamkoakʼ chaḍaokʼ reaṅ niạme goṭa akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah34:9 Ona niạm do hoyokʼ kana, joto hoṛge akoren Ibri guti kạ̃ṛmĩko aṛakʼkoa; ar Jihudi boeha do okoehõ guti mente bako doho daṛeakoa." 
Jeremiah34:10 Onate rajkạmiyạko ar sanam hoṛko do niạ hukumko manaokeda ar akoren guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩko aṛakʼko lạgitʼko rạjiyena ar golam mente bako dohokoa menteko ṭhikkeda. Unre onko do akoren gutikoko aṛakʼkatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah34:11 Menkhan tayomte onko do monko ạcurketʼtakoa ar okoeko guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩkoko aṛakʼletʼko onko ruạṛ ạgukate arhõ golamko benaoketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah34:12 Ona iạte Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Iń Israelren Probhu Isoriń meneda, aperen hapṛamko tinre Misor disạm khon, golam oṛakʼ khoniń oḍok ạguletʼkoa unre onko do noa bondobos lekateń metatʼko tahẽkana," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘jãhãe Ibri boeha acʼte ape ṭhene ạkhriń akan khan enḍekhan eaeakʼ bochorre uni do aṛakʼkae hoyokʼtapea. Uni do turui bochor ape ṭhen golame khaṭaokʼa ar ona tayom do aṛakʼkae hoyokʼa.’ Menkhan aperen hapṛamko do ińakʼ katha bako ańjomleda, ar ińakʼ katha mone hõ bako moneyada." 
Jeremiah34:15 Thoṛa dinge hoyakana ape do monpe ạcur akatʼtapea ar ińakʼ mẽtʼre oka ṭhikakʼ kan, metakʼme ape sanamkoge aperen Ibri boehako aṛakʼko reakʼpe lại sodor akada. Ar ape do ińakʼ oṛakʼre iń samaṅre ińakʼ niạmko manao lạgitʼpe rebenlena." 
Jeremiah34:16 Menkhan ńitokʼ dope ạcur calao akana ar ińpe henosta akadina; ape do okoe guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩko akoakʼ kusi leka calakʼ lạgitʼpe aṛakʼletʼko onko do ruạṛ ạgukate arhõ aperen guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩpe benao akatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah34:17 “Ona iạtegeń meneda, ape do bape bataoletʼtińạ, ente aperen jạt bhạiko lạgitʼ ape do chaḍao reakʼ bape lại jạhirleda. Ona iạte ńitokʼ iń do ape lạgitʼ chaḍaokʼ reakʼ iń lại sodoreda; ona chaḍaokʼ do hoyokʼ kana lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạrige. Iń do nonka dosań hoyocoe tapea ona ńelte dhạrtiren sanam rajosṭiren hoṛ do botorteko thar tharaokʼa." 
Jeremiah34:18 Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren mukhiyạko, rajkạmiyạko, naekeko ar disạmren sanam hoṛko do kuṭrạ akade mĩhũ talate taṛam paromkate ińakʼ niạm pańjae lạgitʼko gokʼleda, menkhan onko do ińakʼ niạmko rạputʼ akada ar ona gokʼakʼ do bako purạuleda." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Ona iạte okoe bạiriko onko gocʼko reakʼko menetʼkan onko bạirikoakʼ tiregeń soprotkoa. Onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do coṭren cẽṛẽko ar birren janwarkoakʼ jomakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Jeremiah34:21 “Ar okoe bạiriko do Jihudạren raj Sedekiạ ar uniren kạmiyạko gocʼkoko menetʼkan iń do onko bạirikoakʼ tirege onkoń soprotkoa. Babel rajren okoe lạṛhại phạdko ape khonko ruạṛ sen akan iń do onkoakʼ tirege apeń soprotpea. 
Jeremiah34:22 Iń do onkoń hukumakoa ar niạ nagrahategeń ruạṛ ạgukoa. Onko do noa nagraha upạrteko lạṛhạiya arko hatjona ar onako jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. Iń do Jihudạ nagrahakoń marao ar ujạṛakʼ iń hoeocoya.” 
Jeremiah35:1 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakime rajokʼ oktere Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Am do Rekabiạ bõsren hoṛko ṭhen senokʼme ar ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kandhate hijukʼ metakom ar darkha rasa ńũ ocokom.” 
Jeremiah35:3 Unre iń do Habasianiạ ren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Jirimiạren hopon Jasaniạ ar uniren sanam boeha ar hoponko, metakʼme Rekabiạkoren goṭa bõsrengeń ạguketʼkoa." 
Jeremiah35:4 Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte Isorren hoṛ Igdaliaren hopon Hananren hoponkoakʼ kandhateń idiketʼkoa. Ona do Salumren hopon pahradar Maseyawakʼ kandha cetanre kạmiyạkoakʼ kandha aṛere tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah35:5 Ona tayom iń do onko Rekabiạko samaṅre darkha rasate perecʼ ṭhiliko ar bạṭikoń ạguketʼte onkoń metatʼkoa, “Ape do darkha rasa ńũiype.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Menkhan onko doko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Darkha rasa do bale ńũiya, ente aleren hapṛam Rekabiạren hopon Jonadab do noa reakʼe mana akatʼlea, ‘ape se aperen hoponko darkha rasa do alope ńũiya." 
Jeremiah35:7 Ona chaḍa ape do tishõ oṛakʼ duạr alope benaojoṅa, ir hõ alope ira se darkha bagwan hõ alope kirińjoṅa ar cas hõ alope casa; menkhan jao okte tạmburege girobasokʼpe. Enḍekhan oka disạmre bidisiạko lekape tahen onḍe do ḍher dinpe tahẽdaṛeakʼa.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Aleren hapṛam Rekabiạren hopon Jonadab okae hukum akatʼle ona do jotogele manao ạgu akada. Ale ar aleren bạhuko se gidrạko okoege darkha rasa do bale ńũ akada," 
Jeremiah35:9 ar girobasokʼ lạgitʼ oṛakʼ hõ bale benaoleda se darkha bagwan, anaj se phosol reakʼ khet hõ bale benao joṅan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ale do tạmbukorele girobasokʼkan tahẽkana ar aleren hapṛam Jonadab okae hukum akatʼle ona jotoge purạtele manao ạguyetʼkana. 
Jeremiah35:11 Menkhan Babelren raj Nebukadneser do tinre niạ disạme hatkeda unrele menkeda, ‘Babel ar Aramren lạṛhại phạdko ṭhen khon dela bon ńir paskaokʼma ar Jerusalemte bon calakʼma.’ Onate ale do Jerusalemregele tahẽyena.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Ona tayom Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko ṭhen senkate noa katha lạlạiye metadińạ, “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, cedakʼ ińakʼ sikhnạt do bape ataṅeda ar ińakʼ kathako bape manaoeda?" 
Jeremiah35:13  
Jeremiah35:14 Rekabiạren hopon Jonadab do acʼren hoponko darkha rasa ńũiye baronletʼkoa ar onko do ona hukumko bataoleda. Ar teheń hõ onko do darkha rasa bako ńũiyeda, ente onko do akoren hapṛamkoakʼ hukumko bataoetʼkana. Menkhan iń do aema dhao apeń metatʼpe tahẽkanre hõ, ińakʼ katha do bape ańjomletʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah35:15 Iń do ińren sanam gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko aema dhao ape ṭheniń kolletʼkoa. Onkoko metatʼpe tahẽkana, ‘bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛpe ar colonko bhageytape; ar debotako sewawako lạgitʼ do alope pańjakoa. Enḍekhan okaṭakʼ disạm do ape ar aperen hapṛamkoń em akatʼpe onḍepe thamgạḍi akanpe tahena.’ Menkhan ape do ińakʼ katha bape moneyada ar ańjom hõ bape ańjomleda." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekabiạren hopon Jonadabren bõsko do akoren hapṛamkoakʼ emakʼ hukumko batao ạguyetʼkana, menkhan ape do ińakʼ katha bape ańjomletʼtińạ." 
Jeremiah35:17 “Ona iạte iń Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isoriń meneda, ‘ańjompe, Jihudạ ar Israelreko girobasokʼ kan mimitʼko upạrte oka muhin reakʼ kathań men akatʼ ona reakʼ jotowakʼ do onko cetanreń paṛao ocoya. Iń do onkoń metatʼko tahẽkana, menkhan bako ańjomletʼtińạ; hohowatʼko tahẽkạnạń, menkhan bako goṅledeńa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Ona tayom Jirimiạ do Rekabiạkoe metatʼkoa, Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ape do aleren hapṛam Jonadabakʼ hukumpe pańjayetʼkante ona lekape calakʼ kana ar uniyakʼ hukum lekagepe kạmikana." 
Jeremiah35:19 Ona iạte iń do Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isoriń meneda, iń sewawạń lạgitʼ Rekabiạren hopon Jonadabakʼ bõsre tishõ hoṛkoakʼ khạnti do baṅ hoyokʼtakoa.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Am do guṛhạ akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ puthi hataome ar Josiạwakʼ rajokʼ okte khon ehopʼkate teheń hạbicʼ Israel, Jihudạ ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko reaṅ okaṭakʼ kathań lạiyatʼme tahẽkan onako joto do onare olme." 
Jeremiah36:3 Jihudạren hoṛko cetanre okako muhin paṛao ocoy reakʼ kathań ṭhik dohoakatʼ onko do onako muhin reakʼ katha ańjomkate pasere pase bạṛicʼ hor khonko ruạṛ botejokʼ; ar jemon onkoakʼ ghạṭ ar kạiyiń ikạ daṛeatako.” 
Jeremiah36:4 Unre Jirimiạ do Neriạren hopon Baruke hohoadea ar Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ katha roroṛe metade tahẽkan uniyakʼ moca khon ańjomkate Baruk do guṛhạwakʼ puthire onako jotowakʼe olkeda. 
Jeremiah36:5 Ona tayom Jirimiạ do Baruke metadea, “Iń do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ iń baron ocoakante onḍe do bạń bolo daṛeakʼa." 
Jeremiah36:6 Onate am do mitʼṭecʼ upạs dinre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokate noa puthire olakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ katha hoṛkom paṛhao ańjomakoa one oka do ińakʼ moca khonem ańjomakatʼ. Ar Jihudạren hoṛko okoe do akoakʼ nagraha khonko hijukʼ onko sanamko hõ onam paṛhao ańjomakoa. 
Jeremiah36:7 Pasecʼ onko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko koejoṅa ar akoakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khonko ruạṛ hijukʼa, ente noko hoṛko birudrege Probhu Isor do edre ar khĩs reakʼ kathae roṛakada.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Jirimiạ do Neriạren hopon Baruk oka kạmi reakʼ kathae metade tahẽkan uni do jotogeye kạmikeda; uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre ona puthi khone paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah36:9 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ mõṛẽakʼ bochor reakʼ areakʼ candore Jerusalemren sanam hoṛko ar Jihudạ nagrahako khon hecʼakan hoṛko lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅre upạs reakʼ kathae lại jạhirkeda. 
Jeremiah36:10 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ nãwã phaṭok duạr ṭhen cetan reakʼ bakher racare Saphan hopon Gemariạ olokʼicʼakʼ kandhare teṅgokate Baruk do ona puthi khon Jirimiạ reakʼ kathako sanam hoṛkoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah36:11 Saphanren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Gemariạren hopon Mikạ do tinre ona puthi khon Probhu Isorakʼ sanam kathakoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa," 
Jeremiah36:12 unre uni do raj oṛakʼ talare olokʼicʼakʼ kandhateye boloyena; onḍe do sanam rajkạmiyạko, metakʼme olokʼicʼ Elisama, Semayaren hopon Delaya, Akborren hopon Elnathan, Saphan hopon Gemariạ, Hanani hopon Sedekiạ ar eṭakʼ sanam mukhiyạkoko duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah36:13 Baruk do ona puthi khon okae paṛhao ańjomatʼko Mikạ do onko rajkạmiyạko ṭhen ona jotowakʼe lạikeda; 
Jeremiah36:14 unre sanam rajkạmiyạko do Nethaniạl hopon Jehudi hotete Baruk ṭhenko roṛgotʼkada, “Okaṭakʼ puthi khon hoṛkom paṛhao ańjomatʼko ona do nonḍe ạguiyme.” Nethaniạl do Selemiạren hopone tahẽkana, ar Selemiạ do Kusren hoponge. Unre Neriạren hopon Baruk do ona puthi hataokate onko ṭhene senena." 
Jeremiah36:15 Onko do Barukko metadea, “Dayakate ma duṛupʼme ar ona paṛhao ańjomaleme.” Unre Baruk do onkoe paṛhao ańjomatʼkoa." 
Jeremiah36:16 Onko do sanamakʼ katha ańjomkate botorokʼ salakʼ am iń secʼko beṅgetʼana ar Barukko metadea, “Noako reakʼ joto katha do raj jạhiraetege hoyokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Ona tayom onko do Barukko kulikedea, “Lạiyaleme noako katha do cekatem olkeda? Jirimiạwakʼ moca khon ańjomkate cetʼ noa kom olakada?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruke roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, uni do noako kathae menakada ar iń do kạlite noa puthireń ol akada.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Unre rajkạmiyạko do Barukko metadea, “Do, senkate okokokʼ ben, am hõ ar Jirimiạ hõ. Ar okoe hõ jemon aloko baḍae daṛeakʼ okare menakʼbena mente.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Ar rajkạmiyạko do olokʼicʼ Elisamawakʼ kandhare ona guṛhe puthiko doho oṭokada ar bakher racare raj ṭhenko senena ar jotowakʼko baḍae ocokedea. 
Jeremiah36:21 Unre raj do ona puthi ạguiy lạgitʼ Jehudiye kolkadea. Ar Jehudi do olokʼicʼ Elisamawakʼ kandha khon ona guṛhe puthi ạgukate raj ar uni aṛere teṅgo akan sanam rajkạmiyạko samaṅre ona paṛhao ańjomakoe ehopʼena. 
Jeremiah36:22 Unre areakʼ cando tahẽkana. Ar raj do rabaṅ din khemao reakʼ oṛakʼreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar uni samaṅre seṅgel reakʼ karahere seṅgel do jolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi do ona puthi khon pe pon sakame paṛhaoketʼ khan raj do olokʼicʼakʼ churite ona hĩskoe getʼ kuṭrạkeda ar seṅgelreye khadlekeda; nonkate purạ puthige seṅgelteye atar giḍikada. 
Jeremiah36:24 Ar onko do okoehõ bako toraslena raj hõ baṅ ar uniren golamko modren tinạkʼko ańjomketʼ onko hõ baṅ. Ar akoakʼ kicricʼko hõ bako oṛecʼletʼtakoa.
