Jeremiah36:25 Elnathan, Delaya ar Gemariạ do ona puthi alo rapag lạgitʼ rajko nehõrade tahẽkana, menkhan raj do onkoakʼ katha bae ańjomletʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah36:26 Ona bodolte uni do olokʼicʼ Baruk ar Jirimiạ nạbi tạkin sapʼ ạgukin lạgitʼ raj hopon Jirohomel, Asrayelren hopon Sorae ar Abdiyelren hopon Selimi takoye hukumatʼkoa. Menkhan Probhu Isor do unkine oko dohokatʼkinạ." 
Jeremiah36:27 Jirimiạwakʼ nạbi kathako Baruk okaṭakʼ puthireye olletʼ raj do onae jeretʼ giḍikatʼ khan Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen hecʼena," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Ar Jihudạren raj Jehoyakim okaṭakʼ puthiye jeretʼ giḍiletʼ ona pạhilakʼ puthire okako ol tahẽkan ona jotoge ar mitʼṭecʼ guṛhạ puthire olme. 
Jeremiah36:29 Ona chaḍa Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimem metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘puthi jeretʼ giḍikateyem kulikana Jirimiạ do cedakʼ ona puthireye ol akada, Babelren raj do khạṭige hecʼkate noa disạme jarkhara ar manwa ar janwarkoe maraokoa?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ona iạte am reaṅ iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, Dạudakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ amren do celege jiwetʼ bako tahena; amakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do bahrete giḍi ocokʼa siń reakʼ setoṅ lạgitʼ ar ńindạ reakʼ rataṅ lạgitʼ." 
Jeremiah36:31 Iń do am ar amren hoponko ar amren kạmiyạkoakʼ behokakʼko iạteń sạjạipea; iń do ape upạrte okako muhin reakʼ kathań roṛakatʼ ona sanamakʼge ape cetanre, Jerusalemre ar Jihudạren hoṛko cetanreń paṛao ocoya, ente ape do ińakʼ katha bape ańjomletʼtińạ.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Unre Jirimiạ do ar mitʼṭecʼ guṛhạ dohoakatʼ puthi hataokate Neriạren hopon Baruke emadea; ar okaṭakʼ puthi do Jihudạren raj Jehoyakim seṅgelteye jeretʼ giḍiletʼ ar onare okako ol tahẽkan onako kathage Jirimiạwakʼ moca khon ańjomkate Baruk do arhõe olkeda. Ar ona lekan arhõ aema kathako hõ ona sãote juṭucʼ idiyena. 
Jeremiah37:1 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Josiạ hopon Sedekiạge Jihudạren raje hoyocokedea, onate Sedekiạ do Jehoyakimren hopon Koniạ, metakʼme Jehoyakinakʼ ṭhạ̃ire rajokʼe ehopʼena." 
Jeremiah37:2 Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ nạbi hotete okako kathae menletʼ onare Sedekiạge cetʼ, uniren gutikoge cetʼ, disạmren hoṛkoge baṅ cetʼ, celege uniyakʼ katha do bako ańjomletʼtaea." 
Jeremiah37:3 Enhõ mitʼdin Sedekiạ raj do Selemiạ hopon Jehukal ar Maseya hopon naeke Sephaniạ tekin Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhen kolketʼkinteye roṛgotʼkada, “Am do dayakate, aboren Probhu Isor ṭhen ale lạgitʼ koeme.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Onako oktere Jirimiạ do hoṛko talareye dãṛãnkan tahẽkana, ente unhõ uni do hajotre bae bond ocoakan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah37:5 Unre Babelrenko do Jerusalemko gherao esetʼakatʼ tahẽkana, menkhan onko do tinreko ańjomkeda Pharaoren lạṛhại phạdko do Misor khonko oḍok hecʼakana; unre onko do Jerusalem khonko uṭhạu calaoena." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ona tayom Israelren Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ nạbiye metadea, “Jihudạren raj, okoe do iń ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼe kol akatʼben, uni senkate metae ben, ‘Pharaoren okoe lạṛhại phạdko ape goṛowape lạgitʼko oḍok hecʼakan onko do akoakʼ disạm Misorteko ruạṛ calakʼa." 
Jeremiah37:7  
Jeremiah37:8 Ar ona tayom Babelrenko do ruạṛ hecʼkate noa nagrahako akromona; ar noa dokhola ar seṅgelteko ḍahao maraoa. 
Jeremiah37:9 “ ‘Ar noa kathate apeakʼ jiwi do alope eṛe ocoytapea je, Babelrenko do khạṭige ape ṭhen khonko uṭhạu calakʼa. Menkhan onko do bako uṭhạu calakʼa." 
Jeremiah37:10 Okoe Babelren lạṛhại phạdko apeko akromonetʼpe onko jodi sanamkope bhagaoko ar onkoren eken hạ̃n akan hoṛko tạmbureko tahen, enḍekhan onkoge oḍok hecʼkate niạ nagraha do seṅgelteko ḍahao maraoa." 
Jeremiah37:11 Pharaoren lạṛhại phạdko iạte Babelren lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalem khonko uṭhạu calao khan Jirimiạ do Benjạminkoakʼ ṭoṭhate acʼakʼ sompotti reakʼ bakhra ńam lạgitʼ Jerusalem bạgikateye mohnḍayena. 
Jeremiah37:12  
Jeremiah37:13 Menkhan tinre uni do Benjạminakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhene seṭerena, unre Iria ńutuman mitʼṭen pahradarkoren subedar do uni sapʼkedeteye metadea, “Am dom Kạldiko secʼ lạgidokʼ kana.” Nui Iria do Selemiạren hopone tahẽkana, ar Selemiạ do Hanaiạren hopon kanae." 
Jeremiah37:14 Jirimiại menkeda, “Noa do eṛe katha kana, iń do Kạldiko secʼ do bạnuńa. Menkhan Iria do uniyakʼ katha bae ańjomletʼte Jirimiại sapʼkedea ar rajkạmiyạko samaṅreye idikedea." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ar onko rajkạmiyạko doko raṅgaoente Jirimiạko dalkedea, ar olokʼicʼ Jonathan oṛakʼre idikateko bondi dohokadea; onko do onage hajot khana lekako benao akatʼ tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah37:16 Ona hajot khana reakʼ ot latar reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kandhare Jirimiạko dohokadea. Ar uni do onḍe aema dine tahẽyena; 
Jeremiah37:17 ona tayom Sedekiạ do hoṛ kolkate uniye oḍok ạgukedea; ar raj do acʼakʼ oṛakʼre oko okoteye kulikedea, “Probhu Isorakʼ jãhãn katha menakʼa?” Jirimiại menkeda, “hẽ, menakʼgea. Uni do arhõe menkeda, am do Babelren rajakʼ tirem soprot ocokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Ona tayom Jirimiạ do Sedekiạ raj noa hõe metadea, “Iń do am upạrte, amren gutiko upạrte, noko hoṛko upạrte cetʼ iń kại akatʼte, iń do hajot khanarepe dohoakadińạ?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Okoe ape ṭhen noa kathako nạbiletʼ baṅma, Babel raj do am ar niạ disạm upạrte do bae hijukʼa, onko aperen nạbiko doko okayena?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Ńitokʼ do, E ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj, nehõrokʼ kạnạń, dayakate ańjomtińme. Am samaṅre iń do noa nehõriń dohoyeda olokʼicʼ Jonathanakʼ oṛakʼte do alom kolkạńạ, arem kolliń khan iń do onḍegeń gujukʼa.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Unre Sedekiạwakʼ hukum iạte Jirimiạ do pahradarkoakʼ racareko dohokadea, ar goṭa nagrahare piṭhạ ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ din hilokʼ piṭhạ bekʼnaoko do kulhi khon mitʼṭecʼkate piṭhạko emaekan tahẽkana. Ar nonkate Jirimiạ do pahradarkoakʼ racaregeye tahẽyena." 
Jeremiah38:1 Jirimiạ do tinre sanam hoṛkoe galmarao akokan tahẽkana unre Matan hopon Sepaṭiạ, Pasu hopon Gedaliạ, Selemiạ hopon Jukal ar Malkiạ hopon Pashurteko do ona kathako ańjomkeda." 
Jeremiah38:2 Jirimiạ doe menetʼ tahẽkana, “Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, ‘jãhãege noa nagrahareye tahen uni do lạṛhại talate ar baṅkhan akalte ar baṅkhan mahamạriteye gujukʼa, menkhan okoe Babelrenko ṭhene calakʼ uni do bae gujukʼa. Uni do jãhãlekate acʼakʼ jiwiye rukhiyạitaea." 
Jeremiah38:3 Noa nagraha do khạṭige Babel rajren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ tire emocokʼa; onko do noako ạidạrijoṅa.’ ” 
Jeremiah38:4 Unre rajkạmiyạko do akoren rajko metadea, “Nui hoṛ do gocʼ ocokʼ lek kanae. Ente niạ nagrahare okoe lạṛhại phạdko ar hoṛko sarecʼ menakʼko uni do noako katha menteye as chuṭạu ocoyetʼkoa. Uni do noko hoṛkoakʼ bhạlại do bae khojkana.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Sedekiạ raje roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Uni ma apeakʼ jimạrege coṅ menae; raj do ape upạrte ohoe calao daṛelena.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Unre onko do Jirimiạko sapʼkedea ar rajren hopon Malkiạwakʼ kuńreko bhoraokedea. Noa kuń do pahradarkoakʼ raca talarege tahẽkana. Ar Jirimiạ do baberte tolkate ona kuńreko pheḍkadea. Ona kuńre dakʼ do baṅ, menkhan eken losotʼge tahẽkana; ar Jirimiạ do ona losotʼreye unumokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah38:7 Unre raj oṛakʼren mitʼṭen cạkrạ Kusi Ebed Melek doe ańjomkeda, Jirimiạ do kuńreko giḍi akadea. Ar raj do unre Benjạmin reakʼ phaṭok duạrreye duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebed Melek do raj oṛakʼ khon oḍokkate raj ṭhen senkateye menkeda," 
Jeremiah38:9 “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharaj, noko hoṛ do Jirimiạ nạbi cetanre okako ceka akatʼ ona do behokakʼ kana. Onko do kuńre uniko giḍi akadea; uni do onḍe reṅgecʼteye gujukʼa, ente nagrahare ar piṭhạge bạnukʼa.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Unre raj do Kusi Ebed Melek noae hukumadea, “Nonḍe khon pegel hoṛ soṅgekom ar kuń khon Jirimiạ rakapʼ ạguiyem jemon aloe gujukʼ.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Unre Ebed Melek do onko hoṛko soṅgekate raj oṛakʼ reakʼ murại latar reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ kandhateye boloyena. Onḍe khon uni do mitʼ bar mare ar oṛecʼ kicricʼkoe hataokeda ar baberte kuńre jirimiạ ṭhene pheḍkeda. 
Jeremiah38:12 Kusi Ebed Melek do Jirimiại metadea, “Noa mare ar oṛecʼ kicricʼko amakʼ hatlakʼ latarre dohoyme jemon baberte alo hasome.” Ar Jirimiạ doe onkakeda." 
Jeremiah38:13 Unre onko do baberte kuń khon uniko or rakapʼkedea. Inạ tayom Jirimiạ do pahradarkoakʼ racaregeye tahẽyena. 
Jeremiah38:14 Ona tayom Sedekiạ raj do hoṛ kolkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼ tesarakʼ ṭhạ̃ire Jirimiại hoho ạgukedea. Raj do Jirimiại metadea, “Mitʼ kathań kulimea, menkhan iń ṭhen khon cetʼge alom okoya.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Unre Jirimiạ do Sedekiại metadea, “Amiń lạiyam khan do ińem gojeńa. Ar solhań emam khan hõ ińakʼ katha do bam ańjomtińạ.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Onate Sedekiạ raj do danaṅre Jirimiạ ṭhen kiriạyenteye menkeda, “Okoe sahẽtʼe em akawatʼ bon uni jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, am do bạń gocʼmea ar okoe am gocʼme reakʼko kurumuṭukan onkoakʼ tire hõ bạń soprotmea.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Unre Jirimiạ do Sedekiại metadea, “Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Babel rajren subedar ṭhen bhagao ocokʼ reakʼem aṅgocetʼ khan amakʼ jiwi do bańcaokʼtama ar noa nagraha do seṅgelte baṅ ḍahao maraokʼa; ar am gharońjrenpe bańcaokʼa." 
Jeremiah38:18 Menkhan Babel rajren subedar ṭhen bhagao ocokʼ reakʼ bam aṅgoc enḍekhan noa nagraha do Babelrenkoakʼ tire soprotokʼa ar onko do seṅgelte noako ḍahao maraoa; ar amhõ onkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ do bam ńama.’ ” 
Jeremiah38:19 Sedekiạ raj do unre Jirimiại metadea, “Okoe Jihudiko Babelteko idi ocoakan iń do onkoń botor akokana, ente Babelrenko do hoedaṛeakʼa onkoakʼ tireko soprotińạ ar onko do iń tulucʼ bạṛicʼko beohara.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jirimiại roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Onko do bako soprotmea. Iń okań metamkan onam onkaete Probhu Isorakʼ bataotaeme. Enḍekhan amakʼ bhage hoyokʼa, ar amakʼ jiwim bańcaotama." 
Jeremiah38:21 Menkhan bhagao ocokʼ reakʼ bam aṅgocetʼ khan Probhu Isor iń ṭhen okae sodorakatʼ ona do nonka kana: 
Jeremiah38:22 Jihudạ rajakʼ oṛakʼren sarecʼ maejiuko do Babel rajren subedar ṭhenko idi ocokʼa. Onko maejiuko do amko metama, ‘amren gateko do bạṛicʼ horteko idiakatʼmea, ar amko bhagao ocoakatʼmea. Losotʼre jaṅga do thạli akantama; ar amren gateko do amko bạgi akatʼmea.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Amren sanam bạhuko ar hoponko ar hoponerako do Babelrenko ṭhenko idi ocokʼa. Ar amhõ onkoakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ do bam ńama bickom Babel rajakʼ tirem sapʼ ocokʼa, ar noa nagraha do seṅgelte ḍahao maraokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Unre Sedekiạ do Jirimiại metadea, “Noa katha jemon okoehõ aloko baḍae, arko baḍaele khan am dom gujukʼa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ar rajkạmiyạkoko ańjomle khan, am sãote kathań roṛakada mente, ar onko hecʼkateko kulime, ‘raj okam men akawade ar okae men akatʼme ona ale hõ lạiyaleme; arem danaṅle khan amle gocʼmea,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 enḍekhan onkom metakoa, ‘raj iń nehõrade tahẽkana jemon Jonathanakʼ oṛakʼte aloe ruạṛ idiyiń, ente onḍeye kolkạń khan iń do gujukʼ hoyokʼtińạ.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Rajkạmiyạko do senkate Jirimiạko kulikede khan raj oka katha memene hukumade tahẽkan onkage uni doe lạiyatʼkoa. Unre onko do cetʼge bako metadea, ente raj sãote uniyakʼ galmarao do okoehõ bako ańjomletʼ tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah38:28 Babelrenko do tinạkʼ din Jerusalemko dokholakatʼ tahẽkan unạkʼ din Jirimiạ do pahradarkoakʼ ona racaregeye tahẽyena. 
Jeremiah39:1 Jerusalem do nonka leka dokhol hoylena. Jihudạren Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ areakʼ bochor reakʼ gelakʼ candore Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoante Jerusalem upạrte hecʼkate nagrahae gherao esetʼkeda. 
Jeremiah39:2 Sedekiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gelmitʼ bochor ponakʼ cando reakʼ areakʼ dinre nagraha pạcri reakʼ mitʼ jaegare bhugạkʼ hoyena. 
Jeremiah39:3 Unre Babel rajren sanam rajkạmiyạko, metakʼme Nergal Saretser, Samgar Nebo, Sarkim ńutuman mitʼṭen maraṅ kạmiạyicʼ; Nergal Saretser ńutuman cetan hudạren mitʼ rajren kạmiạyicʼ ar Babel rajren eṭakʼ sanam kạmiyạko do hecʼkate tala phaṭok duạr ṭhenko duṛupʼena." 
Jeremiah39:4 Jihudạren Sedekiạ raj ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do onko ńelteko dạṛkeda; onko do ńindạ jokhecʼ rajakʼ bagwan ṭhenakʼ banar pạcri reakʼ phaṭok duạrte nagraha khonko oḍokena ar Araba secʼko dạṛkeda. 
Jeremiah39:5 Menkhan Babelren lạṛhại phạdko do onkoko khudạu idiketʼkote Jerikho reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍire Sedekiạko sapʼ tiyokʼkedea. Arko sapʼkede khan Hamat disạm reakʼ Riblare Babelren raj Nebukadnesar ṭhenko idikedea. Ar Nebukadnesar raj do uni sạjạiye reakʼe hukumkeda. 
Jeremiah39:6 Babelren raj do Riblare Sedekiạ samaṅrege uniren hoponkoe gocʼketʼkoa ar Jihudạren sanam rajkạmiyạko hõe gocʼketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah39:7 Ona tayom uni do Sedekiạwakʼ mẽtʼkine hoṭor totʼketʼtaea ar pitạl reakʼ sikṛite tolkate Babelteko bondi idikedea. 
Jeremiah39:8 Babelrenko do rajakʼ oṛakʼre ar hoṛkoakʼ oṛakʼkore seṅgelko jeretʼada ar Jerusalem reakʼ pạcriko rạputʼkeda. 
Jeremiah39:9 Ar rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do unre okoeko nagraharegeko tahẽkan, ar okoe do Babel secʼrenko hoyen ar okoe do disạmre sarecʼko tahẽyen onko bondikate Babelteye idiketʼkoa." 
Jeremiah39:10 Menkhan rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do begor jaega jumiyan thoṛa hoṛ do Jihudạ disạmregeye doho oṭokatʼkoa; ona jokhecʼ uni do darkha bagwan ar thoṛa jumi hõe ematʼkoa. 
Jeremiah39:11 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Jirimiạ babotre rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan noa hukumadea," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Unim ńel todarotea; ar jãhãnakʼ alom loksantaea bickom uni okae men onam onkawaea.” 
Jeremiah39:13 Onate rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan, Nebusasban ńutuman mitʼṭen maraṅ hudạren kạmiạyicʼ, Nergal-Sareser ńutuman eṭakʼ ar mitʼṭen cetan hudạren kạmiạyicʼ ar Babel rajren cetan hudạren eṭakʼ kạmiyạko do hoṛ kolkate pahradarkoakʼ raca khon Jirimiạko oḍok ạgukedea. Ar onko do Saphan hopon Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạwakʼ tireko jimạkadea; jemon uni do acʼakʼ oṛakʼteye idiye. Nonkate Jirimiạ do acʼren hoṛko talareye tahẽyena." 
Jeremiah39:14  
Jeremiah39:15 Jirimiạ do pahradarkoakʼ racare tinre bondi akane tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do uni ṭhen hecʼena," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Kusiren Ebed Melek ṭhen senkate metaeme, Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘bhạlạite do baṅ begor bhạlại talatege iń do noa nagraha upạrte ińakʼ katha purạu lạgitʼ iń calakʼkana. Ar ona do amakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅrege purạukʼa," 
Jeremiah39:17 menkhan iń do amiń bańcaomea. Am okoeyem botor akokan onkoakʼ tire bam jimạ ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah39:18 Iń do khạṭige amiń rukhiyạmea; ar bam gocʼ ocokʼa, bickom jãhãlekatege amakʼ jiwim rukhiyạitama, ente am do ińrem bhorsa akana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Jerusalem ar Jihudạren sanam bondiko tinre Babelteko idi ocokʼkan tahẽkana unre Babel rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do onko sãote Jirimiạ hõ sikṛite tolkateye idikedea. Menkhan uni do Ramare Jirimiại aṛakʼkedea. Ona tayom Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ ṭhen kathae roṛkeda. 
Jeremiah40:2 Jirimiại aṛage jokhecʼ Nebusaradan do uniye metade tahẽkana, “Amren Probhu Isor do Jihudạ upạrte niạ maraokʼ reakʼgeye roṛleda." 
Jeremiah40:3 Ar Probhu Isor do ńitokʼ onageye onka akada. Noako do hoyakana, ape do Probhu Isor upạrtepe kại akada ar uniyakʼ aṛaṅ hõ bape ańjomletʼtaea." 
Jeremiah40:4 Menkhan teheń iń do amakʼ ti reakʼ tonol baber khoniń chaḍaoketʼmea. Amem khoj khan iń sãote Babeltem sen daṛeakʼa, iń do amiń ńel sãohamea; ar iń tulucʼ calakʼ bam menetʼ khan alom calakʼa. Ńelme, goṭa disạmge am samaṅre menakʼa; amakʼ kusi lekam tahẽ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Menkhan Jirimiạ onḍe khon ạuriye calakʼrege Nebusaradan doe menkeda, “Am do Saphanren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ ṭhen ruạṛ calakʼme. Babelren raj do Jihudạ reakʼ sanam nagrahako cetanre uniye bahal akadea. Am do uni sãoten hoṛko talaregem tahẽdaṛeakʼa se amakʼ kusi leka eṭakʼ secʼ hõm sen daṛeakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah40:6 Unre Jirimiạ do Mispate Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ ṭhen senkate disạmren sarecʼ hoṛko talareye tahẽyena. 
Jeremiah40:7 Ona jokhecʼ Jihudạren lạṛhại phạdkoren okoe subedarko ar onkoren okoeko hoṛ do ṭạnḍireko tahẽkan onko doko ańjomkeda je, Ahikam hopon Gedaliạ do disạm cakʼlaoyicʼe bahal ocoakana ar okoe do Babelte bako bondi idi ocoakan onko reṅgecʼ herel hoponko ar maejiuko ar onkoren hoponko hoponerakoakʼ bhar do uni tire emakana." 
Jeremiah40:8 Unre onko lạṛhại phạdko, metakʼme Nethaniạren hopon Ismael, Kareyer hoponkin Johanan ar Jonathan, Tanhumet hopon Seraya, Netophati Ephaeren hoponko ar Makathiren hopon Jasaniạ ar onkoren hoṛko do Mispate Gedaliạ ṭhenko senena." 
Jeremiah40:9 Saphanren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ do onko ar onkoren hoṛko ṭhen kiriạkate noa kathae metatʼkoa, “Babelrenko gobolre tahen do alope botorokʼa; disạmre girobasokʼpe ar Babel raj gobolre hijukʼpe, onate ape do bhage hoyokʼtapea." 
Jeremiah40:10 Iń apnarge Mispareń tahena ar Babelren okoeko abo ṭhenko hijukʼ onko ṭhen ape huyạte kathań roṛa; menkhan ape do darkha rasa, niron din reakʼ pholḍol ar sunumko samṭao jarwaepe ar apeakʼ bhajankore bae dohoepe ar okako ato ar nagrahakope dokhol akatʼ onḍege girobasokʼpe.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Moabrenko, Amonrenko, Edomrenko ar eṭakʼ disạmren sanam Jihudikoko ańjomkeda baṅma Babelren raj do Jihudạ disạmre thoṛa hoṛe bạgi oṭo akatʼkoa ar Gedaliạ do onko cetanre disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ dohoakadea." 
Jeremiah40:12 Unre onko do okako disạmreko chirchạtur akan tahẽkan onḍe khon Jihudạ disạm reakʼ Mispate Gedaliạ ṭhenko ruạṛ hecʼena. Onko do asambheṛ darkha rasa ar niron din reakʼ pholḍolko jarwakeda. 
Jeremiah40:13 Ar Karea hopon Johanan ar ṭạnḍireko tahẽkan lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko do Mispate Gedaliạ ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda," 
Jeremiah40:14 “Am do cetʼ bam baḍaea, Amonren Bakʼalis raj do gocʼme lạgitʼ Nethania hopon Ismaele kol akadea mente? Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ do onkoakʼ katha bae pạtiạuada." 
Jeremiah40:15 Unre Karea hopon Johanan do Mispate hecʼkate hape hapete Gedaliại metadea, “Amem hukum lekhan iń do senkate Nethania hopon Ismaeliń gojea, ona do okoehõ bako baḍae daṛeakʼa; uni do cedakʼ ame gocʼmea? Onate okoe Jihudiko am beṛhaeteko jarwa akan onko doko chirchạturokʼa ar Jihudạren sarecʼ hoṛ doko marao utạrokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Menkhan Ahikam hopon Gedaliạ do Karea hopon Johanane metadea, “Onka do alom kạmiya. Ismael reaṅ okam menetʼkan ona do ạuṛiyakʼgea.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Elisamaren goṛomtetʼ koṛa Nethaniạ hopon Ismael do raj bõsren hoṛe tahẽkana ar uni do cetan hudạren mitʼṭen rajkạmiyạ hoṛge. Eaeakʼ candore uni do gel hoṛko soṅgekate Mispate Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ ṭhene hecʼena. Onko do tinre mitʼteko jojomkan tahẽkana, unre Ismael ar uni soṅgeten onko gel hoṛ do Babel rajren bahalicʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Gedaliạ do tarwaṛeteko gocʼkedea." 
Jeremiah41:2  
Jeremiah41:3 Ona chaḍa Mispare Gedaliạ sãote okoe Jihudiko tahẽkan ar Babelren okoe sipạhiko onḍeko tahẽkan Ismael do onko hõe gocʼketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah41:4 Gedaliại khũnen dosar hilokʼ ona katha ạuri baḍaerege Sikem, Silo ar Samariạ khon irạlgel hoṛ do akoakʼ gocoko hoyo akan, kicricʼko hõ gạndur gạpur ar akoakʼ hoṛmoko getʼ sirạ sorokate jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ar kunduruante Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼteko hijukʼkan tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah41:5  
Jeremiah41:6 Ar Ismael do onko sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼ acʼhõ rakʼ rakʼte Mispa khone oḍok hecʼena. Ar onko sãoteye ńapamen khan uni doe metatʼkoa, “Ahikamren hopon Gedaliạ ṭhen dela bon calakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Onko do nagrahateko boloyen são sãote Ismael ar uni soṅgeten hoṛ do onko hoṛko gocʼketʼkote mitʼṭecʼ kuńreko giḍikatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah41:8 Menkhan onko mod khon gel hoṛ do Ismaelko metadea, “Ale do alom gocʼlea. Ale do ṭạnḍire aleakʼ jao, guhum, sunum ar dumur rasakole oko dohoakada.” Ona iạte Ismael do onkoe aṛakʼkatʼkoa, ar eṭakʼko sãote bae gocʼletʼkoa." 
Jeremiah41:9 Gedaliạ ar eṭakʼko gocʼkate okaṭakʼ kuńre onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩye giḍiletʼtako ona do Israelren raj Bakʼasawakʼ ti khon rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ Asa raj do onae benaoan tahẽkana. Ar Ismael do mạ̃ṛĩkote onae giḍi dhapaokada. 
Jeremiah41:10 Ismael do Misparen sarecʼ sanam hoṛkoe bondiketʼkoa. Onko modre rajren hoponera hõko tahẽkana ar onḍeko doho oṭolen eṭakʼ sanam hoṛ hõko tahẽkana. Rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do noko hoṛko cetanre Gedaliại doholedea. Ismael do onkoe bondi idiketʼkote Amonrenko ṭhen parom calakʼ lạgitʼe mohnḍayena. 
Jeremiah41:11 Karea hopon Johanan ar uni sãoten lạṛhại phạdkoren sanam subedarko do tinre Ismaelakʼ joto behok reakʼ kathako ańjomkeda," 
Jeremiah41:12 unre onko do akoren sanam hoṛko soṅgekate uni tulucʼ lạṛhại lạgitʼko oḍok senena. Ar Gibeon reakʼ maraṅ pukhri ṭhen uniko ńamkedea. 
Jeremiah41:13 Ismael do Mispa khon okoeko hoṛ bondikateye idiyetʼko tahẽkana onko do Johanan ar uni sãoten lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko ńelketʼko khan ạḍiko kusiyena ar Johanan ṭhenko ruạṛ calaoena. 
Jeremiah41:14  
Jeremiah41:15 Menkhan Ismael ar uni sãoten irạl hoṛ do Johanan ṭhen khonko dạṛketʼte Amonrenko ṭhenko calaoena. 
Jeremiah41:16 Ona tayom Johanan ar uni sãoten lạṛhại phạdkoren sanam subedarko do Gibeon khon Mispare sarecʼ sanam hoṛko ruạṛ ạguketʼkoa. Ar Johanan do Gedaliại khũnen tayom Ismaelakʼ ti khon noko sanam lạṛhại phạdko, maejiuko ar gidrạko ar rajkạmiyạkoe bańcaoketʼkoa." 
Jeremiah41:17 Onko do Misorte calakʼ horre Bethlehem ṭhen Gerut Kimhamre thoṛa dinko tahẽyena. 
Jeremiah41:18 Onko do Babelrenko botorte Jihudạ khonko dạṛetʼkan tahẽkana, ente Ismael do Babel rajren bahalicʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼe gocʼledea." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ona tayom lạṛhại phạdkoren sanam subedarko, Karea hopon Johanan ar Hosaya hopon Jasniạ ar sanam hoṛko do Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhen hecʼkateko menkeda, “Dayakate aleakʼ nehõr baṛe ańjomtaleme ar noko sarecʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ amren Probhu Isor ṭhen koeme. Am do ńitem ńeletʼkangea mitʼ okte ale do ḍhergele tahẽkana ar ńitokʼ do eken thoṛa hoṛge sarecʼ menakʼlea." 
Jeremiah42:2  
Jeremiah42:3 Amren Probhu Isor ṭhen koeme jemon aleye lạiyale ńitokʼ cetʼle cekaea ar okatele calakʼa.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Jirimiạ nạbi do onkoe roṛ ruạṛatʼkoa, “Apeakʼ katha doń ańjomakada. Apeakʼ nehõr lekate iń do aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen khạṭigeń koejoṅa. Ar Probhu Isor okae lạiyạń ona jotogeń baḍae ocopea, ape ṭhen do cetʼge bạń okoya.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Unre onko do Jirimiạko metadea, “Amren Probhu Isor do okaṭakʼ baḍae ocole lạgitʼe kolme ar onka baṅle kạmi enḍekhan ale upạrte Probhu Isorge mitʼṭen sạri pạtiạricʼren gohae hoyokʼma." 
Jeremiah42:6 Ale okoe ṭhenle koletʼme uni Probhu Isorakʼ kathare ale do tabe akaele tahena baṅ dole kusiyakʼ baṅ do baṅ enhõle ańjomtaea. Ar aleren Probhu Isorakʼ kathale bataotae khan ale do bhage hoyokʼtalea.” 
Jeremiah42:7 Inạ gel din tayom Jirimiạ ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do hecʼena. 
Jeremiah42:8 Unre uni do Johanan ar uni soṅgeten sanam lạṛhại phạdkoren subedarko ar sanam hoṛkoe hoho jarwaketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah42:9 Uni doe metatʼkoa, “Apeakʼ nehõr joṅakʼ baḍae ocope lạgitʼ okoe ṭhenpe kolledeń uni Israelren Probhu Isor doe meneda," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘disạmrepe tahẽlen khan doń benao rakapʼ pea, ar bạń rạputʼ giḍipea; iń doń rohoepea, ar bạń totʼ giḍikapea, ente ape cetanre oka muhiniń ạguakatʼ ona iạte iń do monre dukiń ńamakada." 
Jeremiah42:11 Okoepe botorae kan uni Babelren raj do ar alope botoraea, ente iń do ape sãotege minạńa. Ińgeń rukhiyạpea ar ińge uniyakʼ ti khoniń bańcaopea." 
Jeremiah42:12 Iń doń dayawapete, uni hõ apeye mãyãwapea ar apeakʼ ṭhạ̃ite arhõe ruạṛ ạgupea.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Menkhan apepe men, ‘ale do disạmre bale tahena’ ar nonkate aperen Probhu Isorakʼ katha bape manao," 
Jeremiah42:14 arpe men, ‘ale do Misorte senkatele girobasokʼa; onḍe do lạṛhại hõ bale ńela, siṅgạ reakʼ saḍe hõ bale ańjoma, ar jomakʼte hõ bale ṭonṭakʼa,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 enḍekhan Jihudạren sarecʼko Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe. Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Misorte calakʼpe ṭhik dohoakatʼ khan ar onḍege girobasokʼpe menetʼ khan," 
Jeremiah42:16 enḍekhan okaṭakʼ lạṛhạipe botorakʼ kan ona do ape tayomtege Misorteye pańja idipea ar ape do onḍegepe gujukʼa. 
Jeremiah42:17 Noa katha do sạrikana, okoe Misorte senkate girobasokʼ lạgitʼpe goṭa akatʼ onḍe ape do jotoge lạṛhạite, akalte, mahamạritepe gujukʼa; ar oka muhin onko cetanreń paṛao ocoy ona khon onkoren mitʼṭen hoṛ hõ jiwetʼ do bako tahena ar bako paskao daṛeakʼa.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Jerusalemre okoeko girobasokʼkan onko cetanre cetʼleka ińakʼ edre ar khĩs paṛaokʼ akan onkage Misortepe senlen khan ińakʼ edre do ape cetanre paṛaokʼa. Ape do ṭiṭkạri ar hirkhạwan hoṛpe hoyokʼa; ape ńelte hoṛko do botor caṛhaoakoa ar ape do ạsisankope hoyokʼa. Ar tishõ niạ ṭhạ̃i do bape ńela.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “E Jihudạren sarecʼ hoṛko Probhu Isor do apeye metapekana, ‘Misorte do alope calakʼa.’ Baḍae dohokakʼpe teheń do apeń sontorkape kana," 
Jeremiah42:20 ape do ạḍi maraṅakʼpe bhul lạgidokʼ kana. Ape do aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen niạ mentepe kolledeńa, ‘ale lạgitʼ aleren Probhu Isor ṭhen koeme; ar uni okae men ona jotowakʼge lạiyaleme ar ale do ona lekagele calakʼa.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Iń do teheń apeń metatʼpea menkhan okako babotre roṛ lạgitʼ aperen Probhu Isor do ape ṭhene kol akadiń ona do ńit hõ bape manao akada. 
Jeremiah42:22 Onate ńitokʼ baḍaekakʼpe, okaṭakʼ ṭhạ̃ite senkate girobasokʼpe menetʼkan onḍe do lạṛhạite, akalte ar mahamaritepe gujukʼa.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ okako katha hoṛko ṭhen lại jạhir lạgitʼe kollede ar tinre onako kathae lại mucạtʼkeda unre Hosaya hopon Asaria, Karea hopon Johanan ar sanam bạḍạiyan hoṛko do Jirimiạko metadea, “Am do eṛe katham roṛeda. ‘Misorte upriạ tahen lạgitʼ do alope calakʼa’ niạ katha roṛ lạgitʼ aleren Probhu Isor do bae kol akatʼmea." 
Jeremiah43:2  
Jeremiah43:3 Menkhan Neriạren hopon Baruk do ale upạrte ame uskur akatʼmea jemon Babelrenkoakʼ tirem soprotle arko gocʼle se bondikate Babelteko idile.” 
Jeremiah43:4 Nonkate Johanan ar lạṛhại phạdkoren sanam subedarko ar sanam hoṛko do Jihudạ disạmre tahen babotre Probhu Isorakʼ hukum bako bataoleda. 
Jeremiah43:5 Jihudạren sarecʼ hoṛko okoe do jạt jạtrenko talare chir chạtur akanko tahẽkan ar onḍe khon Jihudạ disạmre girobasokʼ lạgitʼko ruạṛ hecʼlen onkowante Johanan ar subedarko do Misorteko mohnḍayena. 
Jeremiah43:6 Noko do onko herel hoṛko, maejiuko, gidrạko ar rajren hoponerako tahẽkana, one Babel rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do Gedaliạwakʼ tire onkoe doho oṭoletʼko tahẽkan. Noko sãote Jirimiạ nạbi ar Baruk hõe tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah43:7 Nonkate onko do Probhu Isorakʼ bako bataoletʼte Misorteko boloyena ar Tahpanhes hạbicʼko senena. 
Jeremiah43:8 Ar Tahpanhesre Probhu Isor do Jirimiại metadea," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Am do lạṭu lạṭu dhiri hataokate Tahpanheste Pharao rajakʼ doṅgolte bolokʼ horre iṭạte tolakʼ racare Jihudikoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre onam topakakʼa. 
Jeremiah43:10 Ona tayom onkom metakoa, Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ińren guti Babelren raj Nebukadnesar iń hoho ạguiyea ar okaṭakʼ dhiri nonḍeń oko dohoakatʼ ona cetanre uniyakʼ siṅghạsoniń bạisạua; ar ona cetanre uni do acʼakʼ raj tạmbui pasnaotaea." 
Jeremiah43:11 Uni do hecʼkate Misor cetanre jhãpe ema ar okoe gujukʼ lạgitʼko ṭhik dohoakan onko doko gujukʼa, ar okoe bondi idikʼ lạgitʼko ṭhik dohoakan onko doko bondi idiocokʼa ar okoe tarwaṛe lạgitʼko ṭhik dohoakan onko do lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa." 
Jeremiah43:12 Misorren debotakoakʼ mundilkore uni do seṅgele junḍiyakʼa; uni do onkoakʼ mundilkoe jeretʼ giḍikakʼa ar onkoren debotako bondikateye idikoa. Gukʼpiyicʼ cetʼleka acʼakʼ oyon aṅgrope horog onkage uni do Misorteye oyokʼa ar onḍe khon khạtirjomae oḍok calakʼa. 
Jeremiah43:13 Uni do Misor disomre menakʼ Heliopolis reakʼ boṅga khunṭikoe rạpuda ar Misorren debotakoakʼ mundilkoe jeretʼ giḍikakʼa.’ ” 
Jeremiah44:1 Misor disạmre okoe Jihudiko do Migdolre, Tahpanhesre, Naphre ar Pathros ṭoṭhareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ ṭhen hecʼena." 
Jeremiah44:2 “Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, iń do Jerusalem ar Jihudạ reakʼ sanam atoko ar nagrahako cetanre oka muhin iń ạguletʼ ona dope ńelakatʼgea. Onako do teheń dhaṅdhaser akange menakʼa; onḍe do celehõ bako girobasokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah44:3 Ona do iń khĩs ocoyiń lạgitʼ dusṭạmi kạmiko kạmiakada, onko do senkate dhupko jeretʼkeda ar eṭakʼ isorko sewawatʼkoa, one okoe do bako baḍaeakatʼko ar ape hõ baṅ ar aperen hapṛamko hõ bako baḍaeletʼko." 
Jeremiah44:4 Iń do aema dhao ińren gutiko, metakʼme nạbikoń kolletʼkoa nonka memen lạgitʼ; noa hirkhạwakʼ do alope kạmiya okaṭakʼ iń kurudakʼkan." 
Jeremiah44:5 Menkhan onko do bako luturada, ar bako hetaoada; ar onko do akoakʼ dusṭạmi khon bako ruạṛlena ar debotako ṭhen dhup jered hõ bako bạgiletʼa." 
Jeremiah44:6 Onatege ińakʼ jolokʼkan edre doń dulletʼ tahẽkana; ona do Jihudạkoakʼ nagrahare ar Jerusalem reakʼ ḍaharkore jol rakapʼlena ar onate onako do teheń ujạṛakʼ ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ hoyakana. 
Jeremiah44:7 “Ńitokʼ iń do Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isoriń meneda, cedakʼ apnarte nunạkʼ bạṛicʼakʼ dope kạmikana? Ape do herelko, maejiuko, ńir keṭecʼ gidrạko, nunu gidrạko Jihudạ khonpe oḍok ạguketʼkote apnartege onkope maraoetʼkoa." 
Jeremiah44:8 Ar okare girobasokʼ lạgitʼpe hecʼakan ona Misor disạmren debotakoren boṅga murhutʼko samaṅre dhuppe jeretʼetʼte cedakʼpe khĩs ocoyedeńa ar ińakʼ pitpe caṛhao ocoyetʼtińạ? Ape do apnartegepe maraokʼ kana ar dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko talare mitʼṭecʼ sarap ar mitʼṭecʼ henostankope hoyokʼa. 
Jeremiah44:9 Jihudạ disạm ar Jerusalem reakʼ ḍaharkore aperen hapṛamkoakʼ, Jihudạren rapajko ar rạnikoakʼ, ape ar aperen bạhukoakʼ dusṭạmi reakʼ katha do cetʼpe hiṛińkeda?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Teheń hạbicʼ hõ apeakʼ ontor do dukte bape rạputʼletʼtapea se ińhõ bape botoradińa; ar aperen hapṛamko ṭhen okaṭakʼ niạmkoń ematʼko tahẽkan ona hõ bape manaoakada. 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ona iạte iń Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isor doń ṭhik dohoakada, ape cetanre muhiniń ạguiya ar goṭa Jihudạ disạmgeń marao utạra." 
Jeremiah44:12 Jihudạren sarecʼ hoṛko okoe do Misorte senkate upriạ hoṛko leka girobasokʼ lạgitʼko goṭa akatʼ onko upạrte nonka bebostań hataoa onko jotoge Misorreko marao utạrokʼa. Onko do lạṛhạite ar baṅkhan akalteko gujukʼa. Ar landa dhutʼako jạtrenko hoyokʼa; onkoakʼ dosa ńelte hoṛko botorokʼa, ar onkoakʼ ńutumko sarapakʼa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Iń do cetʼleka Jerusalem iń sạjại akadea, ar okoe Misorreko girobasokʼ kan onko hõ onkage lạṛhại, akal ar mahamạriteń sạjạikoa." 
Jeremiah44:14 Nonkate Misor disạmre tahen lạgitʼko hecʼakan Jihudạren sarecʼko do cele hõ bako paskaokʼa, ar bako sarejokʼa, onko do Jihudạ disạmte ruạṛ lạgitʼko ahkaokʼgea, menkhan celege bako ruạṛa mitʼ bar ńir paskaokʼko chaḍa.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Unre okoe hoṛko baḍaekan tahẽkan baṅma, akoren bạhuko do debotako ńutumte dhupko jeretʼeda ar onḍe jarwa akan sanam maejiuko, metakʼme Misor reakʼ Pathros ṭoṭhare girobasokʼ kan maejiuko do Jirimiạko metadea," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Probhu Isor ńutumte okako katham lạiyale kan ona do bale ańjomtama. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ale okale roṛakatʼ ona do khạṭigele kạmiya. Cetʼ leka aleren hapṛamko, rapajko ar rajkạmiyạko do Jihudạ nagrahakore ar Jerusalem reakʼ ḍaharkore sermaren rạni ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan arko coḍoretʼ tahẽkan onkage ale hõle kạmiya. Ona jokhecʼ aleakʼ do aḍhela jomakʼ tahẽkana ar ale hõ ạḍi bhagele tahẽkana ar jãhãn kosṭoge bale ńamleda." 
Jeremiah44:18 Menkhan tin khon sermaren rạni ńutumte dhup jered ar coḍorle bạgikeda, un khon ale do reṅgejokʼle ehopʼena ar lạṛhạite, akaltele marao idikʼ kana.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Maejiuko do arhõko menkeda, “Ale do tinre sermaren rạni ńutumte dhuple jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana arle coḍoretʼ tahẽkana ar uni lekage piṭhạle benaoetʼ tahẽkana unre cetʼ aleren jãwãeko do ona katha bako baḍaekan tahẽkana?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Jirimiạ do sanam hoṛko, metakʼme herel hoṛko ar maejiukoe metatʼkoa" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Jihudạ reakʼ atoko ar nagrahakore ar Jerusalem reakʼ ḍaharkore ape ar aperen hapṛamko, aperen rapajko, rajkạmiyạko ar disạmren eṭakʼ hoṛko okoe do dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan ona do cetʼ Probhu Isorakʼ disạ do bạnukʼtaea ar ona reaṅ uni do cetʼ bae dạndikʼ kana?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Apeakʼ bạṛicʼ ar hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko Probhu Isor do tinre bae sahao daṛeada unre apeakʼ disạm do ujạṛakʼ, maraoakʼ ar hirkhạwakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyena ar ona disạm reakʼ ńutum do hoṛkoko sarapakʼa. Ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona do onkage menakʼa." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ape do dhuppe jeretʼ akada ar Probhu Isor upạrtepe kại akada; uniyakʼ kathape bemanot akada ar uniyakʼ ạnko, niạmko ar kathako bape ańjomaletʼtaea; ona iạte niạ muhin do apere hecʼ paṛao akana. Ar ona dope ńeletʼ kangea.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Ona tayom Jirimiạ do sanam herel hoṛko ar maejiukoe metatʼkoa, “Misorre upriạ lekate girobasokʼ kan Jihudạren sanam hoṛko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Jeremiah44:25 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, ‘apepe menleda, sermaren rạni ńutumte dhup jered ar coḍor reakʼ okale kiriạ akan ona do khạṭigele onkaea. Apeakʼ ona kiriạ lekate ape ar aperen bạhukoakʼ kạmi hotete ona dope udukʼ akada.’ “Onate okaṭakʼpe kiriạ akan ona baṛe onkaepe. Apeakʼ kiriạwakʼko purạutape." 
Jeremiah44:26 Menkhan Misorre girobasokʼ kan sanam Jihudiko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe. Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do ińakʼ maraṅ ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, Misorre jãhã ṭhạ̃iregeko girobasokʼ kan Jihudạren hoṛko do iń ńutumte kiriạkate bako mena, jiwetʼ Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana." 
Jeremiah44:27 Onkoakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼ do baṅ menkhan bạṛicʼ lạgitʼte onko cetanre kheyaliń dohoyeda; Misorreko girobasokʼ kan Jihudiko do lạṛhại ar akalteko marao utạrokʼa. 
Jeremiah44:28 Ar okoe do lạṛhại khonko bańcaokʼte Misor khon Jihudạ disạmteko ruạṛ hijukʼ onkoakʼ lekha do thoṛage hoyokʼa. Ona tayom Jihudạren sarecʼ okoeko hoṛ Misorte girobasokʼ lạgitʼko hecʼakan onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa okoeyakʼ katha ṭhik tahena, ińakʼ se onkoakʼ." 
Jeremiah44:29 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do ape lạgitʼ mitʼṭen cinhạń emokʼa, niạ ṭhạ̃ire apeń sạjạipea jemonpe baḍae daṛeakʼ ape oka botoriń udukʼatʼpe tahẽkan ona do ṭhikgea mente. Ar ona cinhạ do noage," 
Jeremiah44:30 Jihudạren raj Sedekiạ do okoeṭakʼ bạiri goje reakʼe kurumuṭuletʼ uni Babelren raj Nebukadnesarakʼ tire cetʼ lekań soprotlede, ṭhik onkage Misorren Pharao raj Hopra hõ uniren bạirikoakʼ tireń soprotea one okoe do uniyakʼ jiwi hataotae lạgitʼko kurumuṭuyetʼkan.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre Jirimiạ ṭhen khon ańjomkate Neriạren hopon Baruk do guṛhạ akatʼ puthire onae ol caṛhaoletʼ tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah45:2 Ona jokhecʼ Jirimiạ do uniye metadea, “E Baruk, Israelren Probhu Isor doe meneda," 
Jeremiah45:3 amem menakada, ‘hae! Probhu Isor ińakʼ duk cetanre arhõ hirdạnim emạń kana; iń do hae haeteń laṅga cabayena, jirạuge bạń ńameda.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Probhu Isor do niạ katha am lạiyam lạgitʼe metadińa, ‘iń Probhu Isor do goṭa disạm talare okaṭakʼ iń benaoakatʼ ona doń rạputʼ dhaṅ dhasera ar okań rohoe akatʼ ona doń or totʼ giḍikakʼa." 
Jeremiah45:5 Enḍekhan cekate apnar lạgitʼ maraṅ maraṅakʼko dom asokʼ kana? Ona do alom asokʼa. Disạime, sanam hoṛko cetanre iń do muhin iń ạguiya, menkhan jãhãtegem calakʼ iń do amakʼ jiwiń rukhiyạitama. Iń Probhu Isorge niạ katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhen eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ katha. 
Jeremiah46:2 Josiạ hopon Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do phurạt gaḍa ṭhen Karkemisre Misorren Pharao raj Neko do okoe lạṛhại phạdkoe bhagaoletʼko Probhu Isor do onko reaṅe meneda," 
Jeremiah46:3 “Kạṭicʼ ar lạṭu ḍhalko benaokate lạṛhại lạgitʼ oḍok calakʼpe. 
Jeremiah46:4 Sadomko sapṛaokope ar onkore dejokʼpe. Bohokʼ aḍokʼ reakʼ ṭupri horokʼkate ṭhạ̃ire senkate teṅgo thạrokʼpe. Apeakʼ borlomko lasertape. Ar lạṛhại reakʼ sajbaj horogpe. 
Jeremiah46:5 “Iń do cetʼ iạte noakoń ńeleda? Onko do botor caṛhao akatʼkoa, arko pạcakana, onkoren lạṛhại bir doko bhagao ocoyena. Onko do tayom secʼ beṅgetʼ ruạṛ baṅkate am ińko dạṛjoṅkana, ente beṛhaetege toras do menakʼa." 
Jeremiah46:6 Coṭkarko hõ bako ńir pharak daṛeakʼkana ar lạṛhạyicʼ birbanṭa hõ baṅa. Utạr secʼ phurạt gaḍa ṭhen onko doko sombotʼ bhindạṛena. 
Jeremiah46:7 “Okoe kanae uni do, one nil gaḍa leka, gaḍa dakʼko lekae dundunạu hijukʼkan?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Misor do nil gaḍa leka, ar gaḍa dakʼko dundunạukʼ lekageye rakapʼ hijukʼ kana. Uni doe meneda, ‘iń doń rakapʼa ar dhạrtiń ḍubạ eseda; ar nagrahako ar onaren hoṛkoń marao cabakoa.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 E sadomko, ape do ńir bhiṛạukʼpe. E rãt gạḍiko, ape do giṛgiṛạu baṛaepe. E birbanṭako, ḍhal akʼsenkan Kusren ar Puṭren hoṛko, ar Ludren dhinkiạko, ape do laha idikʼpe." 
Jeremiah46:10 Menkhan ona din do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ din kana. Enhilokʼ do uniren bạiriko cetanre hala hạli reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa. Tarwaṛe ạuriye tirpitokʼ hạbicʼ ar uniyakʼ mãyãm reakʼ tetaṅ ạuri meṭaokʼ hạbicʼ uni do gocʼkotegeye tahena; ente phạdkoren Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ teṅgenokʼakʼ menakʼtaea utạr senakʼ disạmre, phurạt gaḍa aṛere." 
Jeremiah46:11 “E kũạri kuṛi Misor, am do Gileadte rakapʼ calakʼme ar haso reakʼ ran sunum ạgujoṅme. Am do ạuṛiyakʼge ạḍi lekan rankom lagao joṅkana; am do bam bogekʼa." 
Jeremiah46:12 Jạt jạtrenko do amakʼ lajao paṛao reakʼko ańjom akada; amakʼ kạuạ rạuạte dhạrti do andoṛokʼa. Ente birbão hoṛ do birbão hoṛregeye tohodokʼa ar unkin do bana hoṛge mitʼ domtekin bhindạṛokʼa.” 
Jeremiah46:13 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Misor akromon lạgitʼe hijukʼ, ona reakʼ sombat Probhu Isor do Jirimiạ nạbiye lạiyade tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah46:14 Uniye metade tahẽkana, “Ape do Misorre porcarpe, Migdolre lại jạhirpe, Naph ar Tophnhesre lại sodorpe, ‘ar ṭhạ̃ire teṅgokʼpe ar sapṛaokʼpe, ente tarwaṛe do ape beṛhaeteye jojomkana.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Aperen lạṛhại phạdko do cedakʼko bhagao ocokʼa? Onko do ghuriạ bako teṅgo daṛeakʼa, ente Probhu Isorge latarteye ṭhelao ńurkoa." 
Jeremiah46:16 Onko do ghane ghạṛicʼko tohodokʼa; ar hạni nại cetanre lade ghuguko bhindạṛokʼa. Onkoko mena, ‘ma beretʼpe, dela abo do sasantaokoakʼ tarwaṛe samaṅ khon aboren hoṛko ṭhen ar apnarakʼ disạmte bon ruạṛ calakʼa.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Onḍenko hoṛko meneda, ‘Misorren Pharao raj do murukte rukʼkan mitʼṭecʼ ghonṭa kanae; uni do acʼakʼ ạte atʼ akatʼtaea.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:18 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe lại jạhiretʼkana, “Iń ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, nonkan mitʼ hoṛe hijukʼa okoe do buruko tala reakʼ Tabor leka, Jalapuri aṛe reakʼ Karmel leka." 
Jeremiah46:19 E Misorrenko, sạṅgińte bondi idiocokʼ lạgitʼ apeakʼ jinisko sapṛaotape, ente Naph do ujạṛakʼ ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah46:20 “Misor do mitʼṭen mońj okocʼ mĩhũ kanae, menkhan utạr secʼ khon uni upạrte mitʼṭen rõ doe hijukʼkana." 
Jeremiah46:21 Misorren din mạjuri lạṛhại phạdko do lodgopʼ mĩhũ leka kanako. Onko hõ ruạṛkate mitʼ domteko dạṛ pharakokʼa; ar bako teṅgo ṭarhaokʼa, ente onko cetanre maraokʼ reakʼ dinge hijukʼkana, onkoakʼ sạjại ńam reakʼ okte do sor hecʼ akana." 
Jeremiah46:22 Bạiriko tinreko laha hijukʼa unre Misorrenko do biń lekako leń calakʼa arko dạṛa; ar bạiriko do ṭeṅgocʼante Misor upạrteko hijukʼa. 
Jeremiah46:23 Onko do Misor reakʼ bir gajaṛko makʼ saphaea. Onko do pohoko khon hõ lekhateko ḍhergea; ar ohoko lekha caba daṛelena. 
Jeremiah46:24 Misorren hoṛ doko lajao ocokʼa ar utạr secʼren hoṛkoakʼ tireko soprot ocokʼa.” 
Jeremiah46:25 Israelren phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe iń do Thebesren boṅga Amon, ar Pharao ar Misor, ar onaren boṅgako ar onaren rapajko sudhạ Pharao ar unire bhorsakʼ kanko upạrte sạjạiyiń ạguiyeda." 
Jeremiah46:26 Okoe onkoakʼ jiwiko sendara kan Babelren raj Nebukadnesar ar uniren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ tire onkoń jimạkoa. Ona tayom do Misorre arhõ lahate leka hoṛko girobasokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah46:27 “E ińren golam Jakob, am do alom botorokʼa; E Israel, bin udgạuicʼ do alom hoyokʼa. Iń do sạṅgiń disạm khon, bondi akan disạm khon am ar amren hoponko khạṭigeń bańcaopea. Jakob do arhõ sulukte ar khạtirjomae tahena, celege bako botor ocoyea." 
Jeremiah46:28 E ińren guti Jakob, alom botorokʼa, ente iń do am sãorege minạńa. Okoe jạtrenko talareń laga ńirletʼme onko jạtrenkoń marao utạrlekore hõ am do purạte bạń maraomea. Ar begor sạjạite hõ bạń aṛakʼmea, menkhan hok reakʼ bicạrtegeń ḍanṭaomea.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Pharao do Gasa ạuriye akromonre Philisṭiko babotre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah47:2 “Ńelme, utạr secʼ khon banbạsi rakapʼ hijukʼkana; ona do se rakabokʼkan ạtukʼ dakʼ lekage hijukʼkana. Ona do disạm ar onare menakʼakʼ joto ato ar nagraharen girobasokʼ kan sanam hoṛkoe ḍubạ esetʼkoa. Ona iạte hoṛko doko guhera; ar disạmreko girobasokʼ kan joto hoṛgeko jare jarekʼa." 
Jeremiah47:3 Onko do bandhaṛ sadomkoakʼ khurạ reakʼ kaṭapʼ kaṭapʼ saḍe, bạirikoakʼ rãt gạḍiko reakʼ huḍ huḍạukʼ saḍe ar pạ̃ihạ̃ko reakʼ giṛgiṛ saḍeko ańjoma. Unre baba do akoren hoponko goṛowako lạgitʼ bako ruạṛa; onkoakʼ ti do lạbṛugokʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah47:4 Philisṭikoren sanamko maraokʼ reakʼ din, Tur ar Sidonren mitʼke mitʼ sarecʼ gokʼṛokoakʼ gocʼ ocokʼ reakʼ din do seṭer akana. Iń Probhu Isorge Philisṭikoakʼ, metakʼme Kaphtor dip khon hecʼakan hoṛkoń maraokoa." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gasa doe jare jarekʼa ar acʼakʼ bohokʼe ceḍeytaea; Askelon doe marao giḍi ocokʼa. E bilạn ṭạnḍiren sarecʼ hoṛko, ar tinạkʼ din apeakʼ hoṛmope getʼ sirạ soroytapea?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Ape do nonkape rakʼeda, ‘E Probhu Isorakʼ tarwaṛe, ar tinạkʼ din tayomem jirạukʼa? Amakʼ khaprege bolo ruạṛokʼme; jirạukʼme, ar thir hapeakan taheme.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Menkhan iń do uniń hukum akawadea onate uni do cekateye jirạukʼ daṛekokʼa? Iń do Askelon ar jalapuri ḍhip aṛerenko upạrte jhãp em lạgitʼ iń hukum akadea. 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab reaṅ phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Nebore do hae hae! Ona do marao utạrokʼa. Kiriạthaim doe lajao ocokʼa ar eṭakʼkoakʼ tireye paṛaokʼa; uniyakʼ gaṛko do lajao ocokʼte rạputʼ dhaṅ dhaserokʼa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab do ar bae sarhao ocokʼa; uniyakʼ ńurokʼ lạgitʼ hoṛko do Hesbonre soṛojontro tulucʼko mena, ‘dela, abo do onko jạtren bon marao utạrkoa.’ E Madmen, am hõm marao ocokʼa; tarwaṛe do ame khudạumea." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim khon do rakʼ ańjomokʼkana, jarkhar ar dhaṅdhaser reakʼ rakʼge ańjomokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah48:4 Moab doe dhaṅdhaser ocokʼa; onaren huḍińko doko rakʼjoṅkana. 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhit rakapʼ calakʼ horre hoṛko do rakʼ rakʼteko rakapʼ calakʼa; ar Horonaim secʼ okaṭakʼ hor pheḍ sen akan onḍe do dhaṅdhaser iạte guher ańjomokʼa. 
Jeremiah48:6 Dạṛjoṅpe, apan ạpin jiwi rukhiyạitape; hahaṅkarren mitʼṭen arna gadha leka hoyokʼpe." 
Jeremiah48:7 Am do amakʼ kạmi ar dhon cetanrem bhorsa akanre hõ am dom bondi idi ocokʼa, ar Kemos do acʼren naeke ar rajkạmiyạko sãote bondikate saṅgińteye idi ocokʼa." 
Jeremiah48:8 Mitʼke mitʼ nagraha upạrte dhaṅdhasericʼe hijukʼa ar oka nagrahage bae paskao daṛeakʼa. Ińakʼ katha leka buru nala do maraokʼa ar bilạn ṭạnḍi do jarkharokʼa. 
Jeremiah48:9 Moab do phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ emaepe jemone uḍạu sen daṛeakʼ; uniyakʼ nagrahako do ujạṛokʼtaea, onḍe do celege bako berelokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ińakʼ kạmire okoe hoṛe asketokʼ unire do sarap paṛaokʼma. Okoe acʼakʼ tarwaṛere mãyãm bae joro ocoy uni cetanre hõ sarap paṛaokʼma." 
Jeremiah48:11 “Mitʼ kanḍa khon eṭakʼ kanḍare ạuri dul hạbicʼ cetʼleka bubulakʼ do acʼakʼ gadrege tahen onkage Moab do acʼakʼ huḍiń umer khon khạtirjomae tahenkana; uni do bondi dosare bae sen akana. Onate ona reakʼ sebel do lahate lekage menakʼa, ona reakʼ mońj so do baṅ bodol akana." 
Jeremiah48:12 Menkhan dinko hijukʼ kana tinre iń do kanḍa dũṛũcʼ lạgitʼ hoṛkoń kolkoa, onko do uniko dul oḍokea; uniyakʼ kanḍako khạliytaea ar uniyakʼ bhajan doko rạputʼ gejertaea." 
Jeremiah48:13 Israelko Bethelre pạtiạukate cetʼlekako lajao ocolen onkage Moab hõ Kemos reaṅ iạteko lajao ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah48:14 “Ape do cekatepe meneda, ‘birbao hoṛ kanale, ale do dilan lạṛhại bir kanale?’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab do jarkharokʼa ar uniyakʼ nagrahako do dokholokʼtaea; uniren juạn koṛako do gocʼ ocokʼ lạgitʼko pheḍ calakʼkana.” Okoeyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorkan uni rajge noa katha doe meneda," 
Jeremiah48:16 “Moabakʼ ńurokʼ do sor hecʼakana; uniyakʼ muhin do usạrage hijukʼa. 
Jeremiah48:17 Ape okoe do uni beṛhaetepe girobasokʼ kan, ar okoe uniyakʼ ńutum reakʼpe ańjom akatʼ, ape do jotoge uni lạgitʼ homor halaṅpe. Uni metaepe, ‘daṛeanakʼ raj ṭheṅga, ona ṭhonokanakʼ ṭheṅga do cekate rạputʼena?’ ”" 
Jeremiah48:18 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Dibonren hoṛko, apeakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon pheḍ hijukʼte khaṅgoṭ otre duṛupʼpe, ente Moabren dhaṅdhasericʼ do ape upạrte hecʼkate apeakʼ gaṛkoe dhaṅdhasertapea." 
Jeremiah48:19 E Aroerren hoṛko, ape do hor aṛere teṅgokate ńelpe. Ar dạṛjoṅkan hoṛko kulikope, ‘cetʼ hoyakana mente?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab doe lajao ocoakana, ente uni doe talga tạuạkʼ ocoakana. Ape do rakʼjoṅpe ar homor halaṅpe. Ar Arnon gaḍa aṛere noa porcarpe, Moab do jarkhar akana." 
Jeremiah48:21 Bilạn ṭạnḍi reakʼ noa sanam ṭhạ̃ikore bicạr reakʼ okte do seṭer akana- Holonre, Jahsare, Mephatre," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibonre, Nebore, Beth-Diblathayimre," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriyạthayimre, Beth-Gamulre, Beth-Meonre," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriyothre ar Bosrare, metakʼme Moab disạm reakʼ sor ar sạṅgińre menakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahako cetanre bicạr do seṭer akana." 
Jeremiah48:25 Moabakʼ reakʼ dereń do makʼ giḍiyena; uniyakʼ ti do rạputʼentaea. 
Jeremiah48:26 “Moab bul ocoyepe, ente uni do iń upạrte apnartetʼ maraṅe udugokʼ kana. Uni do acʼakʼ becʼreye jobe akana; uni do landa-dhutʼicʼgeye hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah48:27 E Moab, Israel do cetʼ amren landa-dhutʼicʼ bae tahẽkana? Uni do cetʼ kombṛoko talareye ńamlena, onate uni reaṅem roṛ pichạ hirkhạte bohokʼem rukuyetʼtama?" 
Jeremiah48:28 E Moabren hoṛko, nagraha bạgikate huṭupʼ dhirikore berelokʼpe. Ar onkan potamko leka baṛe hoyokʼpe, okoe do khandṛaṅ moca ṭhen tukạko benaojoṅ kan." 
Jeremiah48:29 “Moab do ạḍi bạḍại hoṛkanae. Abo do uniyakʼ bạḍại reakʼ katha, uniyakʼ eṛeteakʼ, uniyakʼ edre reakʼ ar uniyakʼ phulạukʼ reakʼ katha bon baḍaegea." 
Jeremiah48:30 Iń do uniyakʼ bạḍạite perecʼ dhomok reakʼ katha hõń baḍaegea, menkhan ona do eṛeteakʼ kana ar uniyakʼ bạḍại do jãhãn kạmirege baṅ lagaokʼa." 
Jeremiah48:31 Onate iń do Moab lạgitʼ iń homor halaṅa, goṭa Moab lạgitʼ iń raga, Kir-Heresren hoṛko lạgitʼ doń hae haeyokʼa." 
Jeremiah48:32 E Sibnar darkha nạ̃ṛĩ, iń do Jaser lạgitʼ cetʼ lekań rakʼetʼkan ona khon bạ̃ṛti do am lạgitʼ hõń raga. Amakʼ ḍạrko do jalapuri hạbicʼ pasnao akana; onako do Jaser reakʼ jalapuri hạbicʼ seṭer akana. Menkhan amakʼ niron din reakʼ jo ar darkha jo jarkharicʼ doe hecʼ sor akana." 
Jeremiah48:33 Moabakʼ bagwan reakʼ jo, metakʼme Moab disạm khon rạskạ ar kusi do ocokʼ akana. Iń do darkha lelen kunḍ khon darkha rasań ańjetʼ akada; rạskạ ar hulạsate okoe hõ ona do bako lena. Hoho menakʼgea menkhan rạskạ reakʼ do baṅkana." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Onkoakʼ rakʼjoṅ reakʼ aṛaṅ do Hesbon khon Elial ar Jahas hạbicʼ ańjomokʼ kana, Soar khon Horonayim ar Eglath Selisiạ hạbicʼ rakapʼ akana, ente Nimrim reakʼ dakʼ hõ ańjetʼ akana." 
Jeremiah48:35 Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda, Moabre okoe do than boṭkocʼkore samaṅokʼakʼko samaṅetʼ tahẽkan ar onkoren debotako ńutumte dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onko doń marao utạrkoa." 
Jeremiah48:36 Onate Moab reakʼ ar Kir-Heresren hoṛko lạgitʼ ińakʼ ontor do tirio leka ńohoṛ ńohoṛokʼkantińạ. Ar okaṭakʼ dhonko jarwaletʼ ona hõ cabayentakoa. 
Jeremiah48:37 Onko do duk sodor lạgitʼ mitʼke mitʼ bohokʼko ceḍe akatʼtakoa ar gocoko hoyo giḍi akatʼtakoa; tiko getʼ sirạsoro akana ar ḍanḍare gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ akawana. 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab reakʼ sanam oṛakʼ chatkore, nagraha reakʼ kulhi ar dobạṭiạkore homor halaṅ chaḍa ar cetʼge baṅ ańjomokʼ kana, ente okaṭakʼ bhajan celege bako bạsutakʼkan onkage Moab doń rạputʼ gejer akadea." 
Jeremiah48:39 Uni doe talga tạuạkʼ akana! Uni do sanam hoṛko lạgitʼe homor halaṅeda! Moab do cetʼleka lajaoteye dea akada! Uni do beṛhaeten sanam hoṛko ṭhen landa-dhutʼicʼe hoyakana, uniyakʼ dosa ńelte onko hoṛ doko toras akana.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, mitʼṭen hoṛ do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ lekae ạphir hijukʼkana ar Moab upạrte acʼakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼe lap lapa akatʼtaea." 
Jeremiah48:41 Uniyakʼ sanam nagrahako do hatokʼa ar aotan gaṛko hõ ạidạrikʼtaea. Enhilokʼ Moabren birbão hoṛkoakʼ mon do bedonokʼkan maejiuakʼ mon leka hoyokʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah48:42 Jạtrenko lekate Moab doe marao ocokʼa, ente iń upạrte acʼteye usul akana." 
Jeremiah48:43 E Moabren hoṛko, ape lạgitʼ botor, ghaḍlakʼ ar jhãmpa doe koyokʼ hor akada." 
Jeremiah48:44 Okoe toras khone dạṛjoṅ uni do ghaḍlakʼreye ńurokʼa, ar okoe ghaḍlakʼ khone rakapʼ hijukʼ uni do jhãmpareye sabokʼa; ente iń do Moab reakʼ sạjạiyiń ṭhik dohoakada. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Hesbon reakʼ umulte ńir paskaoen hoṛ do latwakʼgeye teṅgo akana, ente Hesbon khon seṅgel ar Sihon reakʼ tala khon seṅgel reakʼ lepʼge oḍok akana; ar ona do Moab reakʼ simạkoe jomakada ar hulmalren hoponkoakʼ bohokʼ doe jeretʼ akatʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah48:46 E Moab, hae am do! Kemosren hoṛ doko marao utạrena; ar amren hoponko do sạṅgiń disạmteko idiakatʼkoa ar amren hoponerako hõko bondi ocoakana." 
Jeremiah48:47 Menkhan tayom daram dinre Moab reakʼ dosa doń ạcur ruạṛa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” Moabakʼ bicạr reakʼ katha do nonḍege mucạtʼena. 
Jeremiah49:1 Amonrenko reaṅ Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, “Israelren do cetʼ cele hoponge bạnukʼkotaea? Uniyakʼ gujukʼ tayom uniyakʼ sompottiren ạkʼạidạriko do cetʼ celege bạnukʼkoa? Enḍekhan Milkom do Gad gusṭirenkoakʼ ṭhạ̃i do cedakʼe ạidạri akawana? Cedakʼ Milkom sekʼwako do onḍenakʼ nagrahareko berel akana?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ńelme, okteko hijukʼkana tinre iń do Amonrenkoakʼ Raba nagraha upạrte lạṛhại reakʼ andoṛiń ańjom ocoya; unre ona do dhaṅdhaser akatʼ ḍạṅge hoyokʼa, ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ atoko do seṅgelko junḍiyakʼa. Unre Israelko do okoe ṭhenko dokhol ocolen onkogeko dokholkoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Jeremiah49:3 “E Hesbon, homor halaṅme, ente Ai nagraha do jarkhar akana. E Raba nagraharen hoṛko, rakʼjoṅpe; gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate homor halaṅpe. Pạcriko talare ńir baṛaepe, ente aperen debota Milkom do sạṅgiń disạmteye bondi idiocokʼa, ar uni sãote uniren naekeko ar cetan hudạren kạmiyạko hõko idiocokʼa." 
Jeremiah49:4 Am do amakʼ buru nala iạte cedakʼem bạḍạiyokʼ kana? E bepạtiạricʼ kuṛi, amakʼ dhon durib cetanre bhorsakatem meneda, ‘iń do okoeye akromon daṛekińạ?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, am beṛhaeten sanamko ṭhen khon amre heṛan botoriń ạguiya. Ape mimitʼko dope laga ńir ocokʼa; ar dạṛjoṅ hoṛ do okoehõ bako samṭaokoa." 
Jeremiah49:6 Menkhan tayomte Amonrenkoakʼ dosa doń ạcur ruạṛtakoa. 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom babotre phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Temanre ạkil do cetʼ bạnukʼa? Budanko ṭhen khon cetʼ sopolha do caba akana? Onkoakʼ ạkil do cetʼ heṛ akantakoa?" 
Jeremiah49:8 E Dedanren hoṛko, ape do ńir ruạṛokʼpe ar dạṛjoṅpe, danaṅ ṭhạ̃ite senkate okokʼpe, ente Esao cetanre muhiniń paṛao ocoya ar uniń sạjạiyea." 
Jeremiah49:9 Darkha jo gogotʼ hoṛ am ṭhenko hecʼlenre onko do cetʼ thoṛa darkha jo bako sarecʼ oṭokakʼa? Ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ kombṛoe hecʼlen khan jạruṛae bhorge cetʼ bae idiya? 
Jeremiah49:10 Menkhan Esaoakʼ ṭhạ̃i do ujạṛ utạrakʼ iń hoeocoya. Ar jemon aloe oko daṛeakʼ onate uniyakʼ oko ṭhạ̃ikoń sodortaea. Uniyakʼ bõsren hoṛko, peṛa pạrbhạko ar aḍepaseren hoṛ doko marao utạrokʼa ar uni hõ bae tahena." 
Jeremiah49:11 Amren ṭũạr amarko bạgi oṭowakome; iń do onkoakʼ jiwiń rukhiyạitakoa. Amren rạnḍi maejiuko hõ ińreko bhorsakʼma.” 
Jeremiah49:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe sạjại ńam reakʼ lekko baṅkan, ar sạjại reakʼ bạṭire ńũnũige lagaoae enḍekhan cedakʼ begor sạjạite dom tahena? Am do ona bạṭire ńũkate sạjại jojom hoyokʼtama." 
Jeremiah49:13 Iń do ińakʼ ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, Bosra doe marao utạrokʼa ar hirkhạwạnicʼe hoyokʼa. Uniyakʼ dosa ńelte hoṛko torasokʼa ar uniyakʼ ńutumko sarapakʼa. Uniyakʼ sanam ato ar nagrahako do jaejug ujạṛakʼge hoyokʼa.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Probhu Isor ṭhen noa sombatiń ańjom akada je, mitʼṭen goḍet do jạt jạtrenko ṭhene kol ocoakana. Uniye meneda, “Edomre jhãp em lạgitʼ jarwakʼpe. Ar lạṛhại lạgitʼ beredokʼpe.”" 
Jeremiah49:15 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńitokʼ do jạt jạtrenko talareń huḍińmea ar hoṛko talare hirkhạwạnicʼ iń hoyocomea." 
Jeremiah49:16 E dhiri paṛakʼkore girobasokʼ kan buru reakʼ usul ṭhạ̃iren ạidạriyicʼ, am dom torasanicʼ kanre hõ amakʼ ontor reakʼ bạḍạikoge am doe eṛe akatʼmea. Am do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ leka coṭrem tukạlere hõ latarteń or pheḍ ạgumea." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edom reakʼ dosa ńelte hoṛko torasokʼa; ar okoe ona aṛeteko parom calakʼ onko do botor caṛhaoakoa ar uniyakʼ sanam ghạl iạte uniko landa-dhutʼaea. 
Jeremiah49:18 Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda, aḍepase atoko sudhạ cetʼ leka Sodom ar Gomorań ḍahao maraoletʼ onkage Edomre hõ celege bako girobasokʼa; onare cele manwage bako tahena." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Jordan reakʼ bir khon cetʼleka dhạcri kul do sikạr lạgitʼe oḍokʼ hijukʼ onkage mitʼ ripitʼre Edom do acʼakʼ disạm khoniń laga ńirea. Onḍe do ińren bachao akan hoṛkoń bahalkoa. Iń lekanicʼ do okoe menaea? Ar iń upạrte do okoeye teṅgo daṛekokʼa? Jãhãe gukʼpiyicʼ do cetʼ iń samaṅreye teṅgo daṛekokʼa?” 
Jeremiah49:20 Onate Probhu Isor do Edom upạrte okae goṭa akatʼ, ar Temanren hoṛko upạrte okae pontha akatʼ ona ańjomme. Palren kạṭicʼ hoponko hõko or idi ocokʼa; onkoakʼ kạmi khạtirtege ạtiń ṭạnḍi doe maraoa." 
Jeremiah49:21 Onkoakʼ gurokʼ reakʼ saḍete dhạrti do dal dalaokʼa; onkoakʼ rakʼ do arakʼ gaḍa hạbicʼ ańjomokʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah49:22 Ńelpe, onkoren bạiri do pajhaṛ leka coṭteye uḍạukʼa ar Bosra cetanre phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼe lap lapaete sã sãye pheḍ hijukʼa. Enhilokʼ Edomren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ mon do bedonokʼkan maejiuakʼ mon leka hoyokʼtakoa." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damesek babotre Probhu Isore meneda, “Hamat ar Arpad dokin andmandao akana, ente unkin do bạṛicʼ khoborkin ańjomakada. Unkin dokin as chuṭạu akana, ar haḍak ḍabakokʼkan doreão lekakin hoyakana." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damesek doe lạbṛukʼ akana, uni do dạṛ lạgitʼe ruạṛ akana ar botor caṛhao akadea; bedonokʼkan maejiu leka bedon rakapʼ akawadea." 
Jeremiah49:25 Ona namḍak nagraha, oka nagraha iạte ạḍiń kusikʼkan tahẽkan, hoṛko do cedakʼ ona bạgikate bako calao akana?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, uniren juạnko do khạṭige nagraha reakʼ kulhikore ar dobạṭiạkoreko gujukʼa; enhilokʼ uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko doko marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah49:27 Damesek reakʼ pạcrikore iń do seṅgeliń junḍiyakʼa; ona do Benhadad gaṛkoe lo poṭor cabaea.” 
Jeremiah49:28 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Kedar ar Hasorren okoekin raje bhagaoletʼ kin unkin babotre Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Beretʼpe, ar Kedarte rakapʼ calakʼpe ar purub disạmren hoṛko jarkharkope." 
Jeremiah49:29 Hoṛko do onkoakʼ tạmbuko ar onkoren ạsul janwarkoko hatkoa ar onkoakʼ sanam jinisko, tạmbu reakʼ orwalko ar ũṭkoko idikoa. Ar hoṛko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko ańjomakoa, ‘torasge, beṛhaete torasge!’ ”" 
Jeremiah49:30 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Hasorren hoṛko, usạrate dạṛpe. Ar danaṅ ṭhạ̃ire senkate tahenpe. Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do ape upạrteye soṛojontro kana, ape upạrte mitʼṭecʼe goṭa ṭhik akada." 
Jeremiah49:31 E Babelrenko, ape do beretʼpe, ar khạtirjomako tahenkan onko jạtrenko cetanre jhãp empe. Onko jạtrenko do phaṭok duạr hõ bạnukʼtakoa, huṛkạṛ hõ bạnukʼa; onko do ako motogeko girobasokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah49:32 Onkoren ũṭko do luluṭren malko hoyokʼa ar onkoren ạsul janwarko do luṭren jinisgeko hoyokʼa. Okoe do bohokʼ upʼko kaṭopʼetʼkan onko do beṛhaeteń chirchạturkoa ar onko cetanre joto secʼ khon muhiniń ạguiya. 
Jeremiah49:33 Hasor do toyokoakʼ tahen reakʼ ṭhạ̃i ar jaejug ujạṛakʼge hoyokʼa. Onḍe do okoe hõ bako girobasokʼa, ar cele manwage onare do bako tahena.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Jihudạren raj Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ pạhil secʼ Elam reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Jirimiạ nạbi ṭhen sodorena," 
Jeremiah49:35 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, iń do Elamrenkoakʼ akʼ kạnạń, onkoakʼ asolakʼ khunṭi doń rạputʼ giḍiya." 
Jeremiah49:36 Iń do serma reakʼ beṛhae khon ponea hoe Elom upạrteń ạguiya. Ona hoe do onko beṛhaeteń pasnaoa; ar Elame sạṅgiń akatʼko bondiko do sanam jạtrenko talareń chirchạturkoa. 
Jeremiah49:37 Ar okoe onko gocʼko reakʼko monejoṅ onko bạiriko samaṅrege iń do Elamrenkoń dhaṅdhaserkoa; ińakʼ jolokʼkan edre do onko cetanreń paṛao ocoya. Ar ạuriko cabakʼ hạbicʼ onko upạrte tarwaṛeń kola. 
Jeremiah49:38 Iń do Elamre siṅghạsoniń bạisạua ar uniren raj ar kạmiyạko hõń maraokoa," 
Jeremiah49:39 menkhan tayom daram dinre iń do Elam reakʼ dosań ruạṛ ạguiya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Jeremiah50:1 Babel, metakʼme Babelrenkoakʼ disạm reaṅ Jirimiạ nạbi hotete Probhu Isor do noa kathae menleda," 
Jeremiah50:2 “Ape do jạt jạtrenko ṭhen porcarpe ar lại jạhirpe, nisạn teṅgoepe ar lại jạhirpe. Danaṅ do cetʼge alope dohoya, bickom menpe, ‘eṭakʼko do Babelko ạidạrijoṅa; Bakʼal deboda doe lajao ocokʼa, Merodok debota doe chaka chun ocokʼa. Babelren boṅga murhutʼko doko lajao ocokʼa ar uniren boṅga muṭhạnko hõko chaka chunokʼa.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Utạr khon mitʼ jạtrenko do uni upạrteko hijukʼa ar uniyakʼ disạm do ujạṛakʼko hoeocoya. Okoe hõ onare do bako girobasokʼa; manwa hõ ar janwar hõko dạṛjoṅa. 
Jeremiah50:4 Onako dinre ar ona jokhecʼ Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛko do mitʼteko hijukʼa ar rakʼ rakʼteko hijukʼa ar onkoren Probhu Isorko ńam baṛayea. 
Jeremiah50:5 Onko do Sionte calakʼ reakʼ horko kukʼliya ar ona secʼ akoakʼ mẽtʼãhãko samaṅtakoa. Onko do hecʼkate Probhu Isor sãote nonkan mitʼṭecʼ bondobosko bandhaoa one ona do tishõ baṅ hiṛińokʼ. 
Jeremiah50:6 “Ińren hoṛ do atʼ akan bhiḍiko lekako hoyakana; onkoren gukʼpiko do bạṛicʼ horteko ghańjeṛ idi akatʼkoa. Onko gukʼpiko iạte onko do buru burukore ar boṭkocʼ boṭkocʼko calakʼkana ar akoakʼ chaṛko hiṛińakada. 
Jeremiah50:7 Ar jãhãege onkoko ńametʼko onkogeko tạhuṛetʼkoa; onkoren bạiriko meneda, ‘ale do dusi dole baṅkana, ente Probhu Isor upạrte, onkoakʼ sạriyakʼ reakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi upạrte, onkoren hapṛamkoren asicʼ uni Probhu Isor birudre onko doko kại akada.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “E Israelko, ape do Babel khon dạṛjoṅpe; Babelrenkoakʼ disạm bạgiyakʼpe ar pal laha lahate calakʼkan merom bodako leka hoyokʼpe." 
Jeremiah50:9 Iń do utạr reakʼ disạm khon maraṅ maraṅ jạtrenkoń jarwakoa ar onkoń buskukote Babel upạrteń ạgukoa. Onko do Babel upạrte lạṛhại phạdko sapṛaokoa ar onako ạidạrijoṅa. Onkoakʼ sar do gạkhuṛ birbão hoṛko leka baṅ ạuṛiyagokʼtakoa. 
Jeremiah50:10 Babel doe luṭ ocokʼa; ar okoe uniyakʼko luṭ idiy onko do jotogeko tirpitokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Jeremiah50:11 “E Babelrenko, ape do ińakʼ ạidạripe luṭ akawana ar onatepe rạskạkʼ kana, arpe kusikʼ kana. Ape do phosol enokʼkan mĩhũ lekape don baṛaekana ar khacaṛ sadom lekape hinhạukʼ kana;" 
Jeremiah50:12 ona iạte aperen eṅgat do ạḍiye lajao ocokʼa; okoeye janam akatʼpe uni doe lajao ocokʼa. Jạt jạtrenko ṭhen joto khone copotʼ ocokʼa; uni do mitʼṭecʼ hahaṅkar, khaṅgoṭ ar khaṅkar ṭhạ̃igeye hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah50:13 Probhu Isorakʼ edre iạte okoehõ onare do bako girobasokʼa, ona do ujạṛ utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. Ar Babel aṛete okoeko parom calakʼ onko jotogeko torasokʼa ar uniyakʼ sanam duk iạteko landa-dhutʼaea." 
Jeremiah50:14 “E dhinkiạko, ape do jotoge lạṛhại lạgitʼ Babel beṛhaete teṅgokʼpe. Uni secʼ sar tuńpe. Okaṭakʼ sar hõ alope mãyãwakʼa, ente uni do Probhu Isor birudreye kại akada." 
Jeremiah50:15 Uni beṛhaete uni upạrte lạṛhại reakʼ andoṛpe. Uni doe bhagao ocoakana, uniyakʼ rurukhiyạ bebosta do rạputʼ akana ar uniyakʼ pạcri do lạnduṛ akantaea. Probhu Isor do uni cetanreye hala hạlikʼkana, ape hõ halawaepe. Eṭakʼko cetʼ lekae ceka akawatʼko ape hõ uni onkawaepe." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babelre okoe do itạko erokʼkan ar okte nạpitreko irokʼkan onko mitʼmitʼko do maraokope. Sasantaokoakʼ tarwaṛe reakʼ botorte mimitʼko do akoren hoṛ ṭhenko ruạṛ calakʼa, ar mimitʼko do akoakʼ disạmteko dạṛjoṅa." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israel do chirchạtur akan bhiḍi palko leka kanae one dhạcri kule laga akade. Pạhilre Ạsurren raj do uniye jomkedea; ar mucạtʼre Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do uniyakʼ jaṅkoe tạhuṛketʼtaea. 
Jeremiah50:18 Ona iạte iń phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Ạsurren raj cetʼ lekań sạjạilede onkage Babelren raj ar uniyakʼ disạmre hõ sạjạiyiń ạguiya. 
Jeremiah50:19 Menkhan Israel do acʼakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiteń ruạṛ ạguiyea uni do Karmel ar Basanreye ạtińa; Ephrayim ar Gilead reakʼ burukore acʼakʼ jiwiye tirpit ocoytaea. 
Jeremiah50:20 Onako dinre ar onako oktere Israel reakʼ ghạṭko ńam baṛakʼa menkhan mitʼṭecʼ hõ baṅ ńamokʼa, ar Jihudạ reakʼ kạiko hõ ńam baṛakʼa menkhan mitʼṭecʼ hõ baṅ ńamokʼa, ente jiwetʼ okoyiń dohoko onko doń ikạkoa." 
Jeremiah50:21 “E Babelren bạiriko, iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ape do Merathaim disạm ar okoe do Pekodreko tahenkan onko upạrte rakapʼ senokʼpe. Ape do onko laga ńirkope, ar gocʼkope ar marao utạrkope; ar apeń hukum akawatʼpe reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ palonpe." 
Jeremiah50:22 Disạmre lạṛhại ar maraṅ dhaṅdhaserokʼ reakʼ saḍe ańjomokʼ kana. 
Jeremiah50:23 Goṭa dhạrti reakʼ hạtuṛ do rạputʼ kạtra kuṭrạyena. Babel reakʼ dosa ńelte sanam jạtren hoṛ doko ṭhak utạrena. 
Jeremiah50:24 E Babel, iń do am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jhạliń oḍao akada ar begor baḍaete onarem jhạli akana; am dom ńamakana ar sapʼ hõm sapʼ ocoakana, ente am do iń upạrtem teṅgolena." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ińakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa reakʼ oṛakʼ jhicʼkate ińakʼ edre reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍakoń oḍok ạguiya, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isor do Babelrenko upạrte mitʼṭecʼ kạmi reakʼ menakʼtaea." 
Jeremiah50:26 E Babelren bạiriko, ape do sạṅgiń khon uni upạrte hijukʼpe. Uniyakʼ murạiko jhijtaepe; jarwa akatʼ anaj leka puńjiyepe. Ar purạte marao utạrepe, uniyakʼ cetʼge sarecʼ alope dohoytaea." 
Jeremiah50:27 Uniren sanam ḍaṅgrako gocʼkope; onko do gocʼko lạgitʼko idi ocokʼma. Hae, onko do sạjạiyokʼ reakʼ dinge paṛao akatʼkoa.”" 
Jeremiah50:28 Ańjompe, Babel khon ńir paskao akan hoṛkoakʼ aṛaṅ do Sionre hecʼkateko lại jạhiretʼkana, aboren Probhu Isor do cetʼleka acʼakʼ oṛakʼ iạteye hala hạlikʼ kana." 
Jeremiah50:29 Probhu Isore meneda, “Babelrenko birudre sanam dhinkiạko hoho jarwakope. Ona beṛhaete lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍera benaope; okoehõ alope dạṛ ocokoa. Uniyakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại ńam ocoyaepe. Uni okalekae ceka akatʼ ape hõ unire onkage kạmipe, ente uni do Probhu Isor upạrte, Israelren uni sonoticʼ upạrte apnarteye maraṅokʼ kana." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ona iạte uniren juạnko do nagraha reakʼ kulhi ar dobạṭiạkoreko gocʼ ocokʼa; ar enhilokʼ uniren sanam lạṛhại phạd doko marao ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah50:31 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, E bạḍạiyicʼ, ńelme, am birudrege minạńa, ente sạjại ńam reakʼ din do seṭer akantama." 
Jeremiah50:32 Uni bạḍạiyicʼ doe sombotʼ bhindạṛokʼa ar berede lạgitʼ do celege bako goṛowaea; uniyakʼ nagrahakore seṅgeliń junḍiyakʼa, ar beṛhaeteakʼ jotowakʼ doń jeretʼ giḍikataea.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛ doko santao ocokʼkana. Okoe onkoko sapʼakatʼko onko jotoge kajakteko sapʼ dohoakatʼkoa, ar bako sen ocoako kana." 
Jeremiah50:34 Menkhan onkoren chakʼḍaoicʼ doe daṛeangea; uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorge. Uni do onkoakʼ mamblae calaotakoa jemon onkoakʼ disạmre suluke ạgui ar Babelren hoṛkoe ḍamaḍol ocoko.” 
Jeremiah50:35 Probhu Isore meneda, “Babelrenko upạrte, uniren hoṛko upạrte ar uniren cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar ạkilan hoṛko upạrte tarwaṛe do menakʼgea." 
Jeremiah50:36 Uniren bhonḍ nạbiko upạrte hõ tarwaṛe menakʼa; onko do lelhako hoyokʼa. Uniren birbão hoṛko upạrte hõ tarwaṛe menakʼa; onko do botor caṛhaoakoa. 
Jeremiah50:37 Uniren sanam sadomko, rãt gạḍiko ar bidisiạ lạṛhại phạdko upạrte hõ tarwaṛe menakʼgea; onko do maejiu lekako nijorokʼa. Uniyakʼ dhon duribko upạrte hõ tarwaṛe menakʼgea; onako do luṭ idikʼtaea." 
Jeremiah50:38 Akalte uniyakʼ sanam dakʼko ańjedokʼa, ente ona do boṅgakoakʼ disạm kana, ar onko boṅgako do onḍenko hoṛko koṅka ocokoa." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Ona iạte hahaṅkarren jiwiyanko, toyoko ar ũṭ cẽṛẽko do onḍeko tahena. Onḍe do cele hoṛge bako tahena, herelko hõ baṅ ar maejiuko hõ bako berelokʼa." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ar beṛhaeteakʼ atoko sudhạ cetʼ leka Sodom ar Gomorań ḍahao maraoletʼ, onkage onḍe do celege bako girobasokʼa; ar onare cele manwage bako tahena. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Ńelpe, utạr disạm khon mitʼ dol maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko hijukʼkana; pirthimi reakʼ ses simạna khon mitʼ maraṅ jạtrenko ar aema rapajko udgạu ocokʼkana." 
Jeremiah50:42 Onko do akʼ sar ar tarwaṛe sasapʼko kanako; onko do kurmutạha ar bin dayakʼ hoṛ kanako. Sadomte decʼ hijukʼ jokhecʼ, jalapuri reakʼ hud hud saḍe leka onkoakʼ sabad do; E Babel kuṛi, onko do lạṛhại reakʼ sajbajte amre jhãp em lạgitʼko hijukʼkana." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babelren raj do onko babotre khobore ańjom akada ar uniyakʼ ti do lạbṛukʼ akantaea. Ar bedonokʼkan maejiu lekage haso rakapʼ akawadea. 
Jeremiah50:44 Jordan reakʼ bir khon cetʼleka dhạcri kul do mońj ạtiń ṭạnḍire sikạr lạgitʼe oḍokʼ hijukʼ onkage mitʼ ripitʼre Babelrenko do akoakʼ disạm khoniń laga ńirkoa. Onḍe do ińren bachao akan hoṛkoń bahalkoa. Iń lekanicʼ do okoe menaea? Ar iń upạrte do okoeye teṅgo daṛekokʼa? Jãhãe gukʼpiyicʼ do cetʼ iń samaṅreye teṅgo daṛekokʼa?” 
Jeremiah50:45 Onate Probhu Isor do Babel upạrte okae goṭa akatʼ, ar Babelren hoṛko upạrte okae pontha akatʼ ona ańjompe. Palren kạṭicʼ hoponko hõko or idi ocokʼa; ar onkoakʼ kạmi khạtirtege ạtiń ṭạnḍi doe maraoa." 
Jeremiah50:46 “Babel do dokhol akana.” Noa reakʼ saḍete dhạrti do dal dalaokʼa; ar jạt jạtrenko talare uniyakʼ rakʼ reakʼ aṛaṅ ańjomokʼa. 
Jeremiah51:1 Probhu Isore Meneda, “Ńelpe, Leb-Kamae, metakʼme Babel ar uniren hoṛko upạrte mitʼṭecʼ jarkhaokʼ hoe iń rakapʼ ocoya." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ar Babel do ekʼwer lạgitʼ ar uniyakʼ disạm jarkharokʼ lạgitʼ uni ṭhen bidisiạkoń kolkoa; onko do muhin hilokʼ beṛhae secʼ khon uni upạrteko teṅgona. 
Jeremiah51:3 Babelren dhinkiạko do akoakʼ akʼ aloko ṭuniạutakoma se akoakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ aṅgrop hõ aloko horogma. Uniren juạnko do alope aṛakʼkoa; uniren lạṛhại phạdko dope marao utạrkoa. 
Jeremiah51:4 Onko do ghạl iạte Babel reakʼ hor horte gocʼ bhinḍạṛ akanko tahena.” 
Jeremiah51:5 Israel ar Jihudạ do phạdkoren Probhu Isor do bae bạgi akatʼkinạ, Israel do uni sonoticʼ samaṅre acʼakʼ disạmre ghạṭteye perecʼ akada." 
Jeremiah51:6 Ape do Babel khon dạṛjoṅpe. Ar apan ạpin jiwi rukhiyạitape. Uniyakʼ kại iạte alope maraokʼa. Probhu Isor do hala hạli reakʼ okte seṭer akantaea; uniyakʼ oka kuṛại ona doe ńamgea. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babel do Probhu Isorakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼ sona reakʼ bạṭi leka tahẽkana; uni do goṭa dhạrtiye ńũ bul ocoleda. Jạt jạtrenko do uniyakʼ darkha rasako ńũleda, onate ńithõ onko do koṅkage menakʼkoa." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babel do ackageye ńũrena are rạputʼ dhaṅdhaserena. Uni lạgitʼ homor halaṅpe. Uniyakʼ haso lạgitʼ ran ạguiype; pasere pase uni doe boge ruạṛokʼa. 
Jeremiah51:9 Hoṛko mena, “Ale do Babel bogeye reakʼle kurumuṭuletʼgea, menkhan uni do bae bogelena. Dela, abo do uni bon bạgi oṭowaema ar apan ạpin disạmte bon ruạṛ calakʼma, ente uniyakʼ sạjại do coṭ hạbicʼ rakapʼ akana, ar rimil hạbicʼ seṭerakana.”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Probhu Isorren hoṛkan bon ona do uniye udukʼ akada; aboren Probhu Isor okae ceka akatʼ dela, ona do Sionre bon lại jạhirma." 
Jeremiah51:11 Ape do apeakʼ sarko lasertape, ar ḍhalko hatao joṅpe. Probhu Isor do Madaeren rajkoakʼ jiue uskur akatʼtakoa, ente bạiriko upạrte uniyakʼ monejoṅakʼ do jarkharakʼge. Probhu Isor do khạṭige acʼakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼe hala hạlikʼa." 
Jeremiah51:12 Babelre jhãp em lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ nisạn rakabtape. Rurukhiyạ dolko do arhõ daṛeanko hoyocokope, pahrako dohokope, danaṅ ṭhạ̃ire lạṛhại phạdko sapṛao dohokope. Probhu Isor do Babelren hoṛko upạrte acʼakʼ monsubạ ar hukum lekageye kạmiya." 
Jeremiah51:13 E Babel, am do ḍher dakʼ aṛerem thamgạḍi akana ar ḍher dhonem ạidạri akawana; amakʼ ses do seṭerakana, ar am kamanme reakʼ okte hõ seṭerakana." 
Jeremiah51:14 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateye meneda, “Iń do khạṭige mitʼ jhãk pohoko leka hoṛkote amiń perecʼmea, ar am cetanre jitạukʼ reakʼ iń andoṛa.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ daṛete dhạrtiye sirjạu akada, ar acʼakʼ ạkiltege pirthimi reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạu akada ar uniyakʼ bujte sermae pasnao akada." 
Jeremiah51:16 Uniyakʼ hukumte serma reakʼ dakʼ do chilkibilkikʼ kana; uni do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna khon rimile rakapʼ ạguyetʼkana. Uni do dakʼ lạgitʼe bijli ocoyeda ar acʼakʼ murại khon hoeye oḍok ạguiyeda. 
Jeremiah51:17 Sanam manwage bin ạkilan ar bebuj kanako; mimitʼ sonhar do akoren boṅga muṭhạn iạteko lajao ocokʼa. Uniren dul boṅga muṭhạnko doko ạuṛiyakʼgea, onkore do sahẽtʼge bạnukʼa." 
Jeremiah51:18 Onako do ạuṛiyakʼgea, lajao ocokʼakʼ jiniskangea; bicạr hilokʼ onako do marao utạrokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakob reakʼ bakhra do noako leka do baṅkana, ente unige sanamakʼ jinisko reakʼ sisirjạuicʼ kanae, ar Israel do uniyakʼ sompotti kana. Uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorge." 
Jeremiah51:20 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Babel, am kangeam ińakʼ lạṛhại reakʼ mutạk, am kangeam ińakʼ lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍa; am hotetege jạtrenkoń chaka chun akatʼkoa, ar am hotetege rajosṭikoń marao giḍiakada;" 
Jeremiah51:21 am hotetege sadomko ar aswarikoń chaka chun akatʼkoa, am hotete rãt gạḍiko ar rãt gạḍi cakʼlaokoń marao utạr akatʼkoa;" 
Jeremiah51:22 am hotetege iń do herel ar maejiukoń chirchạtur akatʼkoa, am hotetege haṛamko ar bale gidrạkoń chirchạtur akatʼkoa, am hotetege juạn ar juạnikoń chaka chun akatʼkoa;" 
Jeremiah51:23 am hotete iń do gukʼpiko ar bhiḍi palkoń chaka chun akatʼkoa, am hotetege casokʼko ar ḍaṅgrakoń chaka chun akatʼkoa, am hotete disạm cakʼlaoko ar rajkạmiyạkoń chaka chun akatʼkoa.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 Probhu Isore meneda, “Babel ar Baelre tahenko Sionre oka behokakʼko kạmiakatʼ onko do apeakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅrege kuṛạiyiń emakoa.”" 
Jeremiah51:25 Probhu Isore meneda, “E jarkharicʼ buru, am do goṭa dhạrtiren makʼraoicʼ kanam; iń do am upạrte minạńa. Iń do am upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń tiạra ar cạṭạni khoniń kunḍlạń ńurhạmea ar am do mitʼṭecʼ lo ceḍe buru lekań hoyocomea." 
Jeremiah51:26 Hoṛko do konac reakʼ dhiri lạgitʼ am khon do bako hataoa, ar rehetʼ bạisạu lạgitʼ hõ bako hataoa; am do jaejug ujạṛ utạrakʼgem hoyokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Ape do disạmre nisạn rakabtape. Ar jạt jạtrenko upạrte siṅgạ oroṅpe. Uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ jạtrenko sapṛao dohokope; uni upạrte Ararot, Mini ar Askenasren rajko hohoakope. Uni upạrte mitʼṭen subedar bahalepe; ar sobotʼ sobotʼ pohoko leka ạḍi utạr sadom kolkope." 
Jeremiah51:28 Uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ jạtrenko, Madaeren rapajko, onkoren disạm cakʼlaoko ar sanam rajkạmiyạko ar onkoren ḍanṭaoko tabere sanam rajosṭiko sapṛaope." 
Jeremiah51:29 Disạm do daldalaokʼ kana ar mocṛa mucṛikʼ kana, ente Babel do ujạṛokʼakʼ hoeocoy lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ oka goṭawakʼ ona do ṭhik dohoakana." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babelren birbanṭako do lạṛhạiko thirakana; onko do akoakʼ gaṛrege menakʼkoa. Onkoakʼ daṛe do ńurentakoa; ar maejiuko lekako nijor akana. Onkoakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do seṅgelteko jeretʼ akatʼtakoa; Babel reakʼ sanam phaṭok duạr reakʼ huṛkạṛko do rạputʼ ocoakana. 
Jeremiah51:31 Khoboricʼ do eṭakʼ khoboricʼ daram, goḍet do eṭakʼ goḍet dakʼrame calakʼ kana, Babelren raj ṭhen lại saḍe lạgitʼ, baṅma uniyakʼ goṭa nagraha do hatena," 
Jeremiah51:32 uniyakʼ gaḍa paromokʼ ghaṭko hõ dokhol akana, pạṭiol birre seṅgelko lagao akada ar lạṛhại phạdko do ạḍi botor caṛhao akatʼkoa.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, “Babel kuṛi do phosol enokʼ jokhecʼ reakʼ khạrại lekageye hoyakana; ar phosol samṭao leka uni samṭaoe reakʼ okte do usạrage hijukʼa.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Jerusalemren hoṛko meneda, “Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do aboe utʼ akatʼbona, abo doe chaka chun akatʼbona, ar eken kanḍa lekae hoyocoakatʼ bona. Danob leka uni doe utʼ akatʼbona ar aboakʼ bhage bhage jomakʼ do lacʼ bicʼe jomakada, ar tayomte do haḍapʼ siṭhạ akatʼ jaṅ lekae giḍi sạṅgiń akatʼ bona.”" 
Jeremiah51:35 Sionren hoṛko meneda, “Aleakʼ hoṛmo cetanre oka santao hoyakana ona do Babel cetanre hoyokʼma. Babelre okoeko girobasokʼ kan onko do aboakʼ mãyãm reakʼ dạyiko tahenma.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jerusalem, iń doń am sejokʼa ar am huyạteń hala hạlikʼa; uniyakʼ jalapuri doń rohoṛtaea ar sanam bhumbuk koń ańjetʼ ocoytaea." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babel do ujạṛ akatʼ ḍạṅge hoyokʼa, toyokoakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa ar landa-dhutʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i hõ. Onḍe do celege bako girobasokʼa; uniyakʼ dosa ńelte hoṛ doko torasokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:38 Uniren hoṛko do jotoge dhạcri kul lekako hạnḍrạukʼa, dhạcri kul hopon lekako gõ gõkʼa." 
Jeremiah51:39 Onkoko jaljalaolenre iń do mitʼṭecʼ bhojiń teara. Ar onkoń bul ocokoa jemonko rạskạ daṛeakʼ, ar ona tayom do jaejug lạgitʼko jạpitʼjoṅa, ar tisge bako ebhenokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:40 Bhiḍi hoponko leka, bheḍako leka ar merom bodako leka iń do gurko reakʼ ṭhạ̃iteń tiyạkʼ idikoa." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Sesak, metakʼme Babel do cetʼ leka dokholokʼa! Goṭa dhạrtiren sarhaoańicʼren hopon hõ cetʼ lekae ạidạri ocokʼa! Babel ńelte jạtrenko doko torasokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:42 Babel cetanre jalapuri do rakapʼ hijukʼa, uniyakʼ haḍak ḍabak ḍheoko do uniye unumea." 
Jeremiah51:43 Uniyakʼ nagrahako do marao utạrokʼa. Onako do khaṅgoṭokʼa ar hahaṅkar disạm leka hoyokʼa; ona disạmre do okoehõ bako tahena, ar ona talate okoehõ bako calao hijukʼa." 
Jeremiah51:44 Iń do Babelren Bel debotań sạjạiyea ar uni okae utʼ akatʼ ona doń becʼ oḍok ocoyea. Jạt jạtrenko do uni ṭhen ạtukʼ dakʼ leka ar bako calakʼa. Ar Babel reakʼ pạcri bhit hõ dạsuṛokʼa. 
Jeremiah51:45 “E ińren hoṛko, Babel khon oḍok hijukʼpe. Apan ạpin jiwi rukhiyạitape. Probhu Isorakʼ jolokʼkan edre khon ńir pharakokʼpe." 
Jeremiah51:46 Tinre aema kathako unạnokʼa unre alom hadosokʼa se alom botorokʼa; mitʼ bochorre mitʼṭecʼ katha unạnokʼa ar eṭakʼ bochorre ar mitʼṭecʼ katha unạnokʼa. Ona unạnokʼ katha do kana, Babelre santao hoyokʼkana ar mitʼ disạmren cakʼlaoyicʼ do eṭakʼ disạmren cakʼlaoyicʼ upạrteye teṅgonkana." 
Jeremiah51:47 Nonkan okteko khạṭige hijukʼ kana iń do Babelren boṅga murhutʼkoń sạjạikoa; uniyakʼ goṭa disạmge lajaoakʼ hoyokʼa ar uniren gocʼ ocokʼ hoṛ do ona talareko gurokʼa. 
Jeremiah51:48 Serma, ot ar onako tala reakʼ sanamakʼge Babel iạteko hulạs rạskạkʼa, ente makʼraoko do utạr secʼ khon hecʼkate unire jhãpko ema. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babel iạte goṭa dhạrtiren hoṛko cetʼlekako gocʼlen onkage Israelkoakʼ gujukʼ hotete Babelrenko hõko gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Jeremiah51:50 Ape okoe do gujukʼ reakʼ ti khon rukhiyạpe ńamakatʼ dela hijukʼpe, alope biloma. Sạṅgiń disạmre tahenrege Probhu Isor disạiyepe ar Jerusalem reaṅ dạndikʼpe." 
Jeremiah51:51 “Apepe meneda, ‘ale babotre henosta kathale ańjom akatʼte ale dole lajao ocoakana. Lajao do aleakʼ mẽtʼãhãe betʼ akatʼtalea, ente Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ikore bidisiạkoko bololena.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Menkhan ińiń meneda, dinko hijukʼ kana iń do Babelren boṅga muṭhạnkoń sạjạikoa ar Babel reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire ghạl akan hoṛ doko hae haeyokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babel do serma hạbicʼe usullenre hõ ar onḍe kajak aotan gaṛpe benaolerehõ, enhõ iń do uni upạrte jarkharicʼ iń kolea.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Babel khon rakʼ ańjomokʼ kana, Babelrenkoakʼ disạm khon do maraṅ okocʼ ḍhao maraokʼ reakʼ andoṛge ańjomokʼ kana," 
Jeremiah51:55 ente Probhu Isor do Babele ḍahao maraoa; uni do ona reakʼ botor andoṛe thir ocoya. Bạiriko do lạṭu lạṭu ḍheoko leka haḍak ḍabakko hijukʼa; ar onko do ãṭ aṛaṅteko hohoea. 
Jeremiah51:56 Babel upạrte jarkharkoko hijukʼa; uniren birbão hoṛ doko sapʼ ocokʼa ar onkoakʼ akʼ do rạpudokʼtakoa; ente Probhu Isor do hala hạliren Isor kanae; Babel reakʼ kuṛại do purạtegeye emaea. 
Jeremiah51:57 Okoeyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isor kan uni raje meneda, “Iń do uniren rajkạmiyạko, ạkilan hoṛko, disạm cakʼlaoko, cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar birbão hoṛkoń bul ocokoa. Onko do jaejug lạgitʼko jạpitʼjoṅa; ar bako ebhenokʼa." 
Jeremiah51:58 Babel reakʼ moṭa pạcri rạputʼkate soman ocokʼa ar ona reakʼ usul phaṭok duạrko do seṅgelte ḍahao maraokʼa. Hoṛko do ạuṛiyakʼgeko laṅga ocokʼa, ar jạt jạtrenkoakʼ khaṭaokʼ reakʼ kuṛại do seṅgelte lo roṅgo cabakʼa.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Jihudạren raj Sedekiạwakʼ rajokʼ ponakʼ bochorre Maseyarren goṛomtetʼ koṛa, metakʼme Neriạ hopon Seray okoe do rajren kạmiyicʼe tahẽkan, uni do tinre raj sãote Babelteye senlena unre Jirimiạ do thoṛa hukume emade tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah51:60 Babel cetanre okako muhin hijukʼ, metakʼme Babel reaṅ okako katha ol hoylen Jirimiạ do ona mitʼṭecʼ guṛhạ puthireye ol doholeda." 
Jeremiah51:61 Jirimiạ do Seraye metadea, “Am do tinre Babelrem seṭerokʼa unre hoṛko noakom paṛhao ańjomakoa." 
Jeremiah51:62 Ar ona tayomem mena, ‘E Probhu Isor, am do niạ ṭhạ̃i marao reakʼ katham meneda, onate manwa se janwar okoe hõ celege bako basokʼa; noa do jaejug lạgitʼ ujạṛ akange tahena.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Niạ puthi paṛhao sạtkate onare mitʼṭecʼ dhiri tolkate phurạt gaḍare giḍiyme. 
Jeremiah51:64 Ona tayomem mena, ‘Nonkage Babel hõ unumokʼa, ar baṅ rakapʼa, ente Probhu Isor do ona cetanre muhine ạguiya. Uni doe marao utạrokʼa.’ ” Jirimiạ reakʼ katha do nonḍege mucạtʼena." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiạ do bargel mitʼ bochor umerre raje hoylena. Uni do Jerusalemre gelmitʼ bochor raje calaokeda. Uniren eṅgatakʼ ńutum do Hamutal tahẽkana; uni do Libna nagraha Jirimiạren hoponerae tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:2 Jehoyakim leka Sedekiạ do Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼre oka bạṛicʼakʼ onageye kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:3 Jerusalem ar Jihudạren hoṛko iạte Probhu Isor do edreteye jaljalaoena ar mucạtʼre acʼ samaṅ khon onkoe sạṅgiń giḍikatʼkoa. Tayomte Sedekiạ do Babelren raj upạrteye hulkeda. 
Jeremiah52:4 Ona iạte uniyakʼ rajokʼ areakʼ bochor reakʼ gelakʼ cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdkoante Jerusalem upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼe mohnḍayena. Onko do nagraha bahrereko ḍerayena ar nagraha beṛhaete pinḍhạkoe benaokeda. 
Jeremiah52:5 Sedekiạ rajakʼ rajokʼ gelmitʼ bochor hạbicʼ nagraha do gherao esetʼge tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ar ponakʼ cando reakʼ areakʼ dinre nagrahare akal iạte nonka hoyena, hoṛkoakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ cetʼge baṅ tahẽlena." 
Jeremiah52:7 Tayomte nagraha pạcri reakʼ mitʼ jaegareko bhugạkʼkeda. ar Babelrenko do nagrahako gherao esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkanre hõ ńindạ jokhecʼ Jihudạren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do rajakʼ bagwan ṭhenakʼ banar pạcri reakʼ phaṭok duạrte nagraha khonko oḍokena ar Araba secʼko dạṛkeda. 
Jeremiah52:8 Rajren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do acʼ ṭhen khonko begarente onko doko chirchạturena ar ona jokhecʼ Babelren lạṛhại phạdko do Sedekiạ rajko khudạu idikedea ar Jerikho reakʼ bilạn ṭạnḍireko sapʼ tiyokʼkedea. 
Jeremiah52:9 Onko do Sedekiạko bondikedea ar Hamat disạm reakʼ Riblate Babelren raj ṭhenko idikedea ar onḍe do sạjạiye reakʼ hukumko emena. 
Jeremiah52:10 Babelren raj do Riblare Sedekiạ samaṅrege uniren hoponko ar Jihudạren sanam rajkạmiyạko hõe gocʼketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ona tayom uni do Sedekiạwakʼ mẽtʼkine hoṭor totʼketʼtaea, ar pitạl reakʼ sikṛite tolkate Babelteye bondi idikedea ar uni ạuriye gujukʼ hạbicʼ jel khanareye dohokadea." 
Jeremiah52:12 Babelren raj Nebukadnesar rajokʼ gel areakʼ bochor reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar hisạbte okoe do raje sapʼ soraekan tahẽkan uni Nebusaradan do Jerusalemteye hecʼena. 
Jeremiah52:13 Uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre, raj oṛakʼre ar Jerusalem reakʼ joto oṛakʼre seṅgele jeretʼada. Ar asol asol oṛakʼko hõe jeretʼ giḍikada." 
Jeremiah52:14 Rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar tabere Babelren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do Jerusalem reakʼ pạcri bhitko rạputʼkeda. 
Jeremiah52:15 Ar okoeko reṅgecʼ hoṛ do nagrahare sarecʼko tahẽyen onko modren adomko ar sarecʼ kạrigolko ar okoe do Babel raj secʼko hoylen rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do onko hõ bondikateye idiketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah52:16 Menkhan darkha bagwan ńel todarot ar jumi cas lạgitʼ thoṛa reṅgecʼ hoṛko disạmreye doho oṭokatʼkoa. 
Jeremiah52:17 Babelrenko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ pitạl reakʼ tham khunṭi kin, pitạl reakʼ ganḍoko ar pitạl reakʼ maraṅakʼ luihạ do rạputʼ khanḍa khunḍikate Babelteko idikeda." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ona chaḍa onko do sanam ṭukucʼko, kạ̃ṛchũko, sultạ saphae reakʼ cimṭạko, belcako ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ eṭakʼ sanam pitạl reakʼ jiniskoko idikeda." 
Jeremiah52:19 Rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar do sona se rupạte benaoakʼ bhajanko, seṅgel dohoy reakʼ celaṅko, bạṭiko, diuhe dohowakʼko, belcako, coḍor lạgitʼ loṭako ar eṭakʼ okako bhajan tahẽkan onako jotoko idikeda." 
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon raj do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ barea tham khunṭi, maraṅ karahe ar ona latar reakʼ gelbar goṭecʼ pitạlren ḍaṅgrako ar okako bhajane benaoletʼ tahẽkan ona reakʼ sanam pitạlko do ojon daṛekokʼ khon hõ ḍherge tahẽkana." 
Jeremiah52:21 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ khunṭi do gel irạl moka usul ar ona reakʼ beṛ do gelbar moka tahẽkana; mimitʼ goṭecʼ khunṭi reakʼ pitạl do pon kạṭupʼ dạriạ ar bhitri do kholge tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:22 Mitʼṭecʼ khunṭi reakʼ muthni do mõṛẽ moka usul tahẽkana ar ona beṛhaete do pitạl reakʼ sikṛi ar pitạl reakʼ ḍạlim jokote sajao tahẽkana. Ar eṭakʼakʼ khunṭi hõ onkage tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:23 Pitạl reakʼ sikṛi beṛhaete do mitʼsae ḍạlim joko tahẽkana, menkhan samaṅ secʼ khon do eken aregel turui goṭecʼ ńelokʼkan tahẽkana."
