Jeremiah52:24 Jihudikoren maraṅ naeke Seruya, dosaricʼ naeke Sephaniạ ar pene pahradarko do uni rurukhiyạ dolren subedare bondi idiketʼkoa." 
Jeremiah52:25 Ar okoe do unhõ nagrahareko tahẽkan onko mod khon uni do birbão hoṛko cetanre bahal akade mitʼṭecʼ kạmiyạ hoṛ ar rajren eae goṭen sopolhakoe sapʼketʼkoa. Ona chaḍa subedarren olokʼicʼ, okoe do lạṛhại phạdre hoṛkoe bhoraoetʼko tahẽkan uni ar nagrahareko ńamen arhõ turuigel hoṛkoe sapʼketʼkoa." 
Jeremiah52:26 Subedar Nebusaradan do onko sanamkoe bondiketʼkote Riblate Babelren raj ṭhene idiketʼkoa. 
Jeremiah52:27 Ar raj do Hamat disạm reakʼ Riblare noko sanam hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa. Nonkate Jihudạren hoṛko bondikate apnarakʼ disạm khon sạṅgińteko idiocoyena. 
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukadnesar do okoe Jihudikoe bondi idiletʼko onkoakʼ lekha do hoyokʼ kana eae bochorre pe hajar bargel pe hoṛ," 
Jeremiah52:29 Nebukadnesarakʼ rajokʼ gel irạlakʼ bochorre Jerusalem khon irạl sae pegel bar goṭen Jihudiko; 
Jeremiah52:30 ar uniyakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ bargel pe bochorre rajren rurukhiyạ dolren subedar Nebusaradan do eae sae pongel mõṛẽ Jihudikoe idiletʼkoa. Onkoakʼ leka do jotote pon hajar turui sae tahẽkana. 
Jeremiah52:31 Jihudạren raj Jehoyakine bondi idi ocokʼre pe gel eae bochorre Ewil Merodak do Babelren raje hoyena. Uni do inạ bochor reakʼ gelbar cando reakʼ bargel mõṛẽakʼ dinre Jehoyakin do hajot khone aṛakʼkedea. 
Jeremiah52:32 Uni do Jehoyakin sãote mońjteye galmaraokeda ar Babelre uni sãote ar okoe rajko tahẽkan onko khon hõ ḍher manotakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye duṛupʼkedea. 
Jeremiah52:33 Jehoyakin do jel khana reakʼ kicricʼe bocʼkeda ar jion reakʼ sarecʼ dinko do raj sãote jom ńũkateye paromkeda. 
Jeremiah52:34 Ar tinạkʼ din jiwetʼe tahẽkan unạkʼ din raj do din hilokʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhata lekae emaekan tahẽkana. 
Lamentations1:1 Hae! ona nagraha do, mitʼ jokhecʼ onare hoṛkote perecʼ tahẽkana, uni do cetʼleka eskare duṛupʼ akana. Okaṭakʼ nagraha do mitʼ jokhecʼ jạt jạtrenko talare maraṅe tahẽkan, uni do ńitokʼ rạnḍi maejiu lekae hoyakana. Uni do disạmkoren rạniye tahẽkana ar ńitokʼ do kạ̃ṛmĩye hoyakana." 
Lamentations1:2 Uni do ạyupʼ jokhecʼ ạḍiye rakʼetʼ kana, mẽtʼ dakʼte johakine lohotʼetʼtaea. Acʼren dulạṛiạko modren uniyakʼ jiwi raṛejtae lạgitʼ do okoehõ bạnukʼkoa. Uniren gateko do jotoge uniko eṛeakadea; onko jotoge uniren bạiriko hoyakana." 
Lamentations1:3 Kosṭo ar kajak khaṭaokʼ tayom Jihudạ do sạṅgińteye bondi idi ocoakana. Uni do eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareye girobasokʼ kana; ar okarehõ jirạu do bae ńam akada. Okoe uniko khudạulede onko do uniyakʼ dạrun dukko talatege uniko sapʼ tiyokʼ akadea. 
Lamentations1:4 Sion reakʼ kulhiko doe homor halaṅeda, ente niṭ akatʼ porobre okoehõ bako hijukʼkana. Uniyakʼ sanam phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ hor do khạligea. Uniren naekeko doko jare jarekʼ kana, ar juạn kuṛiko doko dukokʼ kana, onate uni do monre ạḍi duke ńameda." 
Lamentations1:5 Uni upạrtenko do uniren kisạ̃ṛko hoyakana; Uniren bạiriko do khạtirjomako tahenkana. Uniyakʼ ḍher ghạṭ iạte Probhu do dukreye paṛao ocoakadea. Uniren kạṭicʼ gidrạko do bondikate bạiriko laha lahateko senakana. 
Lamentations1:6 Sion kuṛiyakʼ sanam mahatto do caba akantaea. Uniren mukhiyạko do nonkan jel lekako hoyakana okoe do ạtiń ṭạnḍiko bako ńametʼkan; onko doko nijorente onko laha lahateko dạṛkeda. One okoe do onkoko khudạuetʼko. 
Lamentations1:7 Jerusalem do acʼakʼ kosṭo ar dãṛãbaṛae dinkore acʼakʼ sedaeakʼ dhon dorib reakʼ kathae disạyetʼ kana. Uniren hoṛko tinre bạirikoakʼ tireko paṛaolena unre uni goṛowae lạgitʼ okoehõ bako tahẽkana. Uniren bạiriko uni secʼko beṅgetʼ akada ar maraokʼ lạgitʼko landa-dhutʼae kan tahẽkana. 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem do ạḍiye ghạṭ akada, onate uni doe bhonḍ akana. Okoe uniko manotede tahẽkan onko jotoge uniko nihạ̃t giḍi akadea, ente onko do uniyakʼ lajaoakʼko ńel akatʼtaea; uni doe kuhrạueda ar mẽtʼãhãe betʼetʼtaea." 
Lamentations1:9 Uniyakʼ mạilạ do uniyakʼ kicricʼrege laṭkao akantaea; darakan din reakʼ do bae dạndilena. Uni doe sombotʼ bhindạṛ akana; jiwi raṛecʼtae lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkotaea. Uniye meneda, “E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ duk baṛe ńeltińme, ente bạiriko doko jitạu akana. ”" 
Lamentations1:10 Uniren bạiriko do uniyakʼ damanakʼ jinisko joṭetʼ akatʼtaea; boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko hõ acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ite bolokʼe ńelakatʼkoa. Noko doko onko hoṛ kangea okoe do amakʼ somajte bolokʼem baronletʼko. 
Lamentations1:11 Uniren sanam hoṛko do jare jaretʼte jomakʼko ńam baṛakana; apnar bańcao tahen lạgitʼ onko do jomakʼ bodolte akoakʼ damanakʼ jinisko emakana. Jerusaleme meneda, “E Probhu Isor, beṅgedme, ar hudisme, iń doń nihạ̃t giḍi ocoakana." 
Lamentations1:12 Ape okoe do iń aṛetepe parom calakʼkan ape do cetʼ jãhãnakʼge baṅ cekakʼ kantapea? Ạribạndhipe ar ńelpe. Iń cetʼ lekań harkhet sasetʼ ocokʼkan onka do cetʼ jãhãeko harkhet ocoakana, okaṭakʼ Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ jolokʼkan edre hilokʼe emakawạdiń?" 
Lamentations1:13 Coṭ khon uni do ińakʼ jaṅkore seṅgelgeye kol akada. Ińakʼ jaṅga lạgitʼ uni do jhãmpae oḍao akada ar ạcur ruạṛokʼ lạgitʼe jormoṭ akadińạ. Uni do ińe eskar akadińạ, goṭa din nijorgeye dohoakadińạ." 
Lamentations1:14 Ińakʼ ghạṭko do arãṛ lekae tol joṛao akatʼtińạ; uniyakʼ titege onako doe tol mitʼakada. Ar ińakʼ tarenreye lade akawạdińạ, Probhu Isorge ińakʼ daṛe doe caba akattińạ. Ar okoe bạń teṅgo daram daṛeako onkoakʼ tireye soprot akadińa." 
Lamentations1:15 Probhu Isorge ińren sanam birbão hoṛkoe nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼkoa; uni do ińren juạnko chaka chunko lạgitʼ iń upạrte mitʼṭecʼ okteye ṭhik dohoakada. Darkha lelen kunḍre kuạ̃ri kuṛi Jihudạ do jaṅgateye lebetʼ gasmanḍao akadea. 
Lamentations1:16 Onatege iń doń rakʼeda, ińakʼ mẽtʼdakʼ do jorokʼ kantińạ. Jiwi raṛejtiń lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa, ar jiwi cerṭha ocoytiń lạgitʼ hõ bạnukʼkoa. Ińren gidrạko do ujạṛgeko hoyakana, ente bạiriko doko jitạuena. ”" 
Lamentations1:17 Sion do acʼakʼ tiye tiạr akatʼtaea, menkhan uniyakʼ jiwi raṛejtae lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa. Probhu Isor do Jokob lạgitʼ noae hukum akada, aḍepaseren hoṛge uniren bạiriko hoyokʼa. Onko talare Jerusalem do mitʼṭecʼ bhonḍakʼ jinisge hoyakana." 
Lamentations1:18 Uni doe meneda, “Probhu Isor doe dhoromgea, iń do uniyakʼ hukum birudreń hul akada. Sanam jạtrenko, ańjompe, ińakʼ harkhet ńelpe; ińren juạn ar juạniko do bondikate sạṅgińteko idi ocoakana." 
Lamentations1:19 Ińren dulạṛiạkoń hohoatʼkoa menkhan onko doko eṛekedińa. Ińren naekeko ar murubbiko do apnar jiwetʼ tahen lạgitʼ jomakʼ sendra sendrate nagraha talaregeko ses utạrena. 
Lamentations1:20 E Probhu Isor, ńelme, tinạkʼ iń kosṭokʼ kana! Iń bhitrire hõń sasetokʼ kana. Ińakʼ ontor do torasokʼ kantińạ, ente iń do huhulicʼ iń hoyakana. Nagraha bahrere do tarwaṛe jiwiye hataoeda, ar bhitrire do eken gujukʼge menakʼa." 
Lamentations1:21 Hoṛko do ińakʼ kuhrạuko ańjomakada, menkhan jiwi raṛejtiń lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa. Ińren sanam bạiriko do ińakʼ kosṭo reakʼ kathako ańjomakada; ar amem onka akatʼte onko doko rạskạkʼ kana. Ona din baṛe hecʼ ocoyme okaṭakʼem jạhirakatʼ jemon ona dinre iń lekako hoedaṛeakʼ." 
Lamentations1:22 Onkoakʼ sanam bạṛicʼ kạmiko do am samaṅre hijukʼma. Ińakʼ sanam ghạṭko iạte ińre okam ceka akatʼ onkorehõ baṛe onkaeme. Ińakʼ kuhrạu do ḍhergea, ińakʼ mon do kạhil akantińạ. ”" 
Lamentations2:1 Hae, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ edrete cetʼleka Sion hoponera do ńutreye danaṅ esetʼ akadea! Ar Israelakʼ ṭhonok do serma khon otreye giḍiakada. Acakʼ edrekʼ dinre uniyakʼ jaṅga dohoy reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do bae disạ dohoakada." 
Lamentations2:2 Jakobakʼ tahen joto ṭhạ̃ige Probhu Isor doe mohor meṭao akada, uni do cetʼge bae mãyã akawadea. Jihudạ hoponerawakʼ aotan gaṛ hõ acʼakʼ kurkurạukʼ edreteye rạputʼ akada, ar onako do otreye milạu akada. Uniyakʼ rajosṭi ar mukhiyạko doe besonot ocoakatʼkoa." 
Lamentations2:3 Jaljalaokʼkan edrete uni doe makʼ giḍi akada Israel reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ dereńko. Bạiriko samaṅ khon uni do acʼakʼ jojom tiye or ruạṛ akatʼtaea. Beṛhaete sanamakʼko ḍahao lạgitʼ uni do seṅgel lepʼ leka Jakobreye jol rakapʼ akana. 
Lamentations2:4 Bạiri leka uni do acʼakʼ sare aṛakʼ akatʼtaea, acʼakʼ jojomti tulkateye teṅgoyena mitʼṭecʼ modoi leka. Okoe ńelte onkoko rạskạkʼkan tahẽkan onko doe gocʼ giḍi akatʼkoa. Sion hoponerawakʼ tạmbure seṅgel leka acʼakʼ edreye dul akatʼtaea." 
Lamentations2:5 Probhu Isor do bạiriko lekae hoyakana; uni do Israele utʼ akadea. Uni do ona reakʼ sanam dolankoe mohor meṭaokeda ar uniyakʼ sanam gaṛko hõe jarkhar akatʼtaea. Uni do Jihudạ hoponerawakʼ homor halaṅe ḍherakatʼtaea. 
Lamentations2:6 Uni do bagwan reakʼ dare leka uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃iye totʼ giḍiakatʼtaea; uniyakʼ niṭ akatʼ ńapamokʼ ṭhạ̃i hõe marao akatʼtaea. Sion do acʼakʼ sanam porob ar jirạukʼ mãhã reakʼ kathae hiṛiń ocoakadea; ar acʼakʼ edre reakʼ khĩste raj ar naekekoe nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼkoa. 
Lamentations2:7 Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ pinḍe nihạ̃t giḍi akada, ar uniyakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃iye dea giḍi akatʼtaea. Uniyakʼ aotan gaṛ reakʼ pạcriko do bạirikoakʼ tireye soprot akada. Porob reakʼ dinko leka bạiriko do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼreko andoṛetʼa." 
Lamentations2:8 Probhu Isor do jarkhar lạgitʼe mone muruk akada Sion hoponerawakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ pạcriko. Uni do sosoṅakʼ baberteye soṅakada mohor mekʼṭao khon acʼakʼ ti do bae or ruạṛtaea. Uni do Sion reakʼ aotan gaṛ ar pạcriye hińjrạu ocoakada; onako do mitʼ domte nijor akana. 
Lamentations2:9 Ona reakʼ phaṭok duạrko do otre danaṅ akana; huṛkạṛko doe rạputʼ giḍiakada. Uniren raj ar mukhiyạko do jạt jạtrenko talareko bondi ocoakana; ạn-ạri mente cetʼge bạnukʼa; uniren nạbiko do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon dorson do bako ńameda. 
Lamentations2:10 Sion hoponeraren murubbiko do otreko duṛupʼ hapeakana. Onko do akoakʼ bohokʼre dhuṛiko ojokʼ akawana ar gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼ akada. Jerusalemren juạn kuṛiko do dukte ot secʼko kuḍbur hapeakana. 
Lamentations2:11 Rakʼ rakʼte ińakʼ mẽtʼ do dhundentińạ, ińakʼ jiwi do ṭolmolaokʼ kantińạ; iń jạtren hoponerae nosṭoyen iạte nagraha reakʼ kulhikore ńir keṭecʼ gidrạ ar nunukoko loraokʼkan iạte ińakʼ ontor do bhabnate suḍrạu oḍokentińạ." 
Lamentations2:12 Onko do akoren eṅgatko rakʼ rakʼteko metako kana, “Piṭhạ ar darkha rasa do okare menakʼa?” Nagraha reakʼ kulhikore ghạl akan hoṛ lekako lorao giticʼ akana eṅgatakʼ hoborre onkoakʼ jiwi do oḍokokʼ kantakoa." 
Lamentations2:13 E Jerusalemren hoponera, iń do cetʼ katha roṛkateń am sejokʼa? Am do cetʼ sãoteń jurikema? E Sion kuạ̃ri kuṛi, jiwi raṛejtam lạgitʼ cetʼ tulucʼ iń somankema? Amakʼ ghạl do doreão leka maraṅgea; okoe am doe boge daṛekema?" 
Lamentations2:14 Amren nạbikoakʼ dorson do ạuṛiyakʼgea ar eṛeyakʼkana; amakʼ bondi dosa jemon sạṅgińokʼtam onate onko do amakʼ ghạṭko bako udukʼ akawatʼmea. Nạbi lekate okako lạiyakatʼ ona do eṛegea; ona do bhul horteye idiakatʼpea. 
Lamentations2:15 Am aṛeteko parom calakʼ hoṛ do am ńelteko thayoya; onko do Jerusalem hoponera ńelteko landa dhudhutʼa ar bohokʼ ruku rukuteko mena, “Noa do cetʼ ona mońj utạrakʼ nagraha do baṅkana, one uni iạte goṭa dhạrtirenko rạskạkʼkan tahẽkan?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Amren bạiriko do am upạrte mocako cahapʼ akada; onko doko landa dhudhutʼa ar togocʼ ḍaṭakateko mena, “Uni dole utʼ akadea. Niạ din lạgitʼgele koyokʼ hor akatʼ tahẽkana ar ona dole ńelkeda. ”" 
Lamentations2:17 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ goṭawakʼ lekageye kạmi akada; one okaṭakʼ katha ḍher laha khongeye roṛletʼ uni do ona kathae purun akada. Uni do begor mãyãtegeye lebda giḍi akatʼmea; bạiriko hõ am upạrteye rạskạ ocoyetʼkoa, uni do am upạrtenkoakʼ daṛeye ḍher ocoyetʼtakoa." 
Lamentations2:18 Amren hoṛkoakʼ ontor do Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼ rakʼteko meneda, “E Sion hoponerawakʼ pạcri, amakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ do siń ńindạ gaḍa leka ạtukʼma; am apnar do alom sạjại ocokʼa, mẽtʼ hõ alom jirạu ocowakʼa." 
Lamentations2:19 Beretʼme, ar ńindạ reakʼ mimitʼ oktere ragme; Probhu Isor samaṅre amakʼ mon do dakʼ leka dul oḍoktam. Amren gidrạko okoe do reṅgecʼte kulhi reakʼ dobạṭiạkore acetko giticʼ akan, onkoakʼ jiwi bańcao lạgitʼ uni ńutumte amakʼ ti tultam." 
Lamentations2:20 E Probhu Isor, ma beṅgedme, ar hudisme, am do okoe cetanrehõ nonka do bam beohar akada? Maejiuko do cetʼ akoren hoponko jomkoa one onkoko joton harayetʼko? Probhu Isorakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ire do cetʼ naekeko ar nạbikoko gocʼ ocokʼa?" 
Lamentations2:21 Koṛa hoṛ ar haṛamko do kulhi dhuṛireko guṛdạu akana; ińren juạn ar juạniko do tarwaṛeteko hạ̃n akana. Amakʼ edrekʼ dinre am do onkom gocʼketʼkoa; onko dom kaman sapha akatʼkoa, ar bam mãyã akatʼkoa." 
Lamentations2:22 Porob reakʼ dinre cetʼ leka hoṛkom jarwako onkage iń beṛhaete aema lekan botorakʼkom jarwa akada. Probhu Isorakʼ edre hilokʼ do cele hõ bako paskaokʼa ar celehõ bako sarejokʼa; iń do okoe joton ariń ạsul haraletʼko ińren bạiri do onkogeko marao akatʼkoa. 
Lamentations3:1 Iń doń uni hoṛ kana, okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ edre reakʼ sạjạiye ńamakatʼ." 
Lamentations3:2 Uni doe laga ńir akadińạ; marsalre do baṅ, menkhan ńutreye taṛam ocoakadińạ;" 
Lamentations3:3 sạrige goṭa din iń upạrte uni do ghane ghane acʼakʼ tiye tuletʼtaea. 
Lamentations3:4 Ińakʼ harta ar jel doe rohoṛ ocoakatʼtińạ ar jaṅko doe rạputʼ giḍiakatʼtińa. 
Lamentations3:5 Uni do haṛhatʼ sisir ar harkhette ińe esetʼ ạcur akadińạ. 
Lamentations3:6 Okoe ḍher din lahareko gocʼakan onko leka uni do ńutreye berel ocoakadińạ. 
Lamentations3:7 Alo jemoniń dạṛ daṛeakʼ onate beṛhaeteye esetʼ ạcurakadińạ; ar hamal sikṛiteye tol akadińạ. 
Lamentations3:8 Goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń hohoyetʼre ariń rakʼetʼre, uni do ińakʼ koejoṅ bae ańjometʼtińạ." 
Lamentations3:9 Hamal hamal dhirite ińakʼ hore esetʼ akatʼtińạ; ar ińakʼ horkoe konḍea akada. 
Lamentations3:10 Iń ṭhen uni do tãṛãkʼ akan bana leka ar danaṅre menae dhạcri kul lekanae; 
Lamentations3:11 Hor khon or ghec ghece ạgukateye khanḍa khunḍi akadińạ ar eskargeye giḍi oṭoakadińạ. 
Lamentations3:12 Uni do acʼakʼ akʼ reakʼ sare or akada ar acʼakʼ bheja khunṭigeye hoyocoakadińạ. 
Lamentations3:13 Acʼakʼ khap khon sar bocʼkate ińakʼ ontoreye tuń bitʼ akada. 
Lamentations3:14 Ińren sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ do landawakʼgeń hoyakana; onko do goṭa dinge sereńateko landa-dhutʼạń kana. 
Lamentations3:15 Haṛhatʼakʼkote uni doe perecʼ akadińạ, ar bisteye bi ocoakadińạ." 
Lamentations3:16 Dhirite ińakʼ ḍaṭae koṭecʼ rạputʼ akatʼtińạ ar torocʼreye ota kacakucạ akadińạ 
Lamentations3:17 Suluk do iń ṭhen khon sạṅgiń akana; ar bhạlại doń hiṛiń akada. 
Lamentations3:18 Onateń meneda, “Ińakʼ daṛe do caba akantińạ. Probhu Isor ṭhen okań aslen ona hõ ar do bạnukʼa. ”" 
Lamentations3:19 Ińakʼ kosṭo ar ạcur baṛae reakʼ katha disạime; disạime ińakʼ haṛhatʼ ar biste perecʼ jion reakʼ katha. 
Lamentations3:20 Jao okte ona do disạ menakʼtińgea, ińakʼ jiwi do iń bhitrire dukokʼ kantińạ." 
Lamentations3:21 Enhõ as do menakʼtińgea, ente iń do noa kathageń hudisetʼkana;" 
Lamentations3:22 Probhu Isorakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ iạte bale marao akana, ente uniyakʼ daya do tishõ baṅ cabakʼtaea;" 
Lamentations3:23 Din hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ ona do nãwã arokʼkana; uniyakʼ pạtiạr do maraṅgetaea. 
Lamentations3:24 Mon monteń mena, “Probhu Isor kangeae ińren sompotti, onate unirege asiń dohoytińa. ”" 
Lamentations3:25 Probhu Isor cetanre okoe asko dohoy ar okoe unireko bhorsakʼ uni do onkoe bhạlạikoa. 
Lamentations3:26 Probhu Isor khon bańcao ạuri hoyokʼ hạbicʼ jiwi hataṛkate koyokʼ horge bhagea. 
Lamentations3:27 Juạn oktere arãṛ gog manwa lạgitʼ do bhagegea. 
Lamentations3:28 Probhu Isorge ona arãṛ do uniye gokʼ akawadea, onate uni do hape akane tahenma." 
Lamentations3:29 Uni do dhuṛireye ombagokʼma, pasere pase as menakʼtaege." 
Lamentations3:30 Uni do thapakạnicʼ acʼakʼ johae ạcuraema ar henostateye tuhedokʼma. 
Lamentations3:31 Probhu Isor do jaejug lạgitʼ manwa bae sạṅgiń giḍikoa. 
Lamentations3:32 Uni do duke emokʼrehõ enhõ uniyakʼ asambheṛ daya iạteye mãyãkʼgea," 
Lamentations3:33 ente acʼakʼ kusi monte manwa do bae haraonkoa ar bae dukkoa. 
Lamentations3:34 Dhạrtiren sanam bondiko doko jaṅga latar ocokʼkana," 
Lamentations3:35 maraṅ Isor samaṅre manwakoakʼ ạidạri baṅ aṅgockan," 
Lamentations3:36 ar dhoromte baṅ bicạrokʼkan Probhu Isor do cetʼ noako bae ńeleda? 
Lamentations3:37 Probhu Isor hukum bae emokʼ khan moca roṛte jãhãe jãhãnakʼe hoyoco daṛekea? 
Lamentations3:38 Maraṅ Isorakʼ moca khonge cetʼ bhalạiyanakʼ ar bin bhạlạiyanakʼ cetʼ baṅ oḍokokʼ kana? 
Lamentations3:39 Mitʼṭen manwa do acʼakʼ kạiko reakʼ sạjại iạte cedakʼ ona iạte doe lạlisa? 
Lamentations3:40 Dela, abo do jion reakʼ hor bon biḍạu aṭkarma ar Probhu Isor ṭhen bon ruạṛ hijukʼma." 
Lamentations3:41 Dela, aboakʼ mon ar ti do sermaren Isor secʼ rakapʼkate bon menma," 
Lamentations3:42 “Ale dole kại akada, arle hul akada; ar am do bam ikạ akatʼlea." 
Lamentations3:43 Edretem oyoakana arem khudạuakatʼlea; ar mãyã baṅkate alem gocʼ akatʼlea. 
Lamentations3:44 Am do rimiltem danaṅ akana jemon aleakʼ koejoṅ ona talate bae parom daṛeakʼ. 
Lamentations3:45 Jạt jạtrenko talare ale do mạilạ ar jobra lekam hoyocoakatʼlea. 
Lamentations3:46 Aleren sanam bạiriko do ale upạrte mocako cahapʼ akatʼtakoa. 
Lamentations3:47 Ale do toras, jhãmpa, dhaṅdhaser ar jarkharge hecʼ akatʼlea. ”" 
Lamentations3:48 Ińren hoṛ doko marao idikʼkana, onate ińakʼ mẽtʼdakʼ do gaḍa dakʼ leka ạtukʼ kantińạ." 
Lamentations3:49 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ do ạtukʼtege tahena, ar baṅ thirokʼa," 
Lamentations3:50 Probhu Isor coṭ serma khon latarte ạuriye oyoṅ hạbicʼ. 
Lamentations3:51 Ińakʼ nagraharen sanam maejiuko reaṅ okań ńeletʼkan, onate ińakʼ jiwi do ragokʼ kantińạ." 
Lamentations3:52 Ạuṛiyakʼte okoe ińren bạiriko hoyakan onko do cẽṛẽ leka laga lagate ińko ṭuṭi akadińạ. 
Lamentations3:53 Onko do maraoiń lạgitʼ khandṛaṅreko khańjo akadińa, ar cetan khon dhiriteko tińeń kana." 
Lamentations3:54 Ińakʼ bohokʼ cetante dakʼ do ạtu paromena, hudisokʼkan tahẽkạnạń iń doń gujukʼkana." 
Lamentations3:55 E Probhu Isor, ona khạndri khandṛaṅ khon amiń hohowatʼmea." 
Lamentations3:56 Ar ińakʼ nehõr joṅakʼem ańjomketʼtińạ, “Goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń rakʼamre lutur do alom bond esetʼkatama. ”" 
Lamentations3:57 Amiń hohoatʼme tahẽkanre am do sorregem ńamena, Arem metadińạ, “Alom botorokʼa. ”" 
Lamentations3:58 E Probhu Isor, am do iń secʼem hoyakana, ar ińakʼ jiwim chaḍaoketʼtińạ" 
Lamentations3:59 E Probhu Isor, ińre oka behokakʼ hoyakan ona dom ńel akatʼgea. Dhoromte baṛe bicạrkạtińme." 
Lamentations3:60 Onkoakʼ sanam hala hạli dom ńelakatʼgea, iń upạrte joto soṛojontro reakʼ hõm ńelakada." 
Lamentations3:61 E Probhu Isor, onkoakʼ landa-dhutʼ reakʼ, ar iń upạrte soṛojontro reakʼ kathako hõm ańjomakatʼgea." 
Lamentations3:62 Ińren bạiriko do goṭa dinge iń upạrteko phasar phusuretʼ kana ar ạḍi lekan kathako roṛeda," 
Lamentations3:63 Ńelme, onkoakʼ sanam kạmiko talate sereńate ińko landa-dhutʼạń kana." 
Lamentations3:64 E Probhu Isor, onkoakʼ kạmi leka baṛe kuṛại emakom." 
Lamentations3:65 Onkoakʼ mon baṛe keṭecʼ ocoytakome, ar amakʼ sarap do onkorege paṛao ocoyme." 
Lamentations3:66 E Probhu Isor onko do edretem laga ńirkoa, ar amakʼ serma latar khonem maraokoa." 
Lamentations4:1 Hae! cetʼleka mạlchạ akana sona do, Cetʼ leka pherao akana nirạ sona do. Mitʼke mitʼ kulhi reakʼ dobạṭiạkore sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ dhiriko do cetʼ leka chirchạtur akana." 
Lamentations4:2 Sionren soros soros hoponko okoe do sona tulucʼko tulnikʼ; ńitokʼ do hasa bhajan lekako lekhakʼ kana. 
Lamentations4:3 Toyoko hõ akoren hoponko nunuako kana, menkhan ińren hoṛko do hahaṅkarren ũṭ cẽṛẽ leka kurmutạhako hoyakana." 
Lamentations4:4 Nunu gidrạkoakʼ alaṅ do tetaṅte tạrure jalatʼakana; gidrạko do jomakʼko kokoekana, menkhan celehõ bako emakokana." 
Lamentations4:5 Okoe bhage bhage jomakʼko jometʼ tahẽkan ńitokʼ onko do ṭonṭa iạte kulhireko lorao akana. Okoe do jeṅgetʼ arakʼakʼko horokʼetʼ tahẽkan onko do ńitokʼ torocʼ cetanreko giticʼ baṛaekana. 
Lamentations4:6 Ente ińren hoṛkoren hoponerawakʼ ḍạnṭao do maraṅge tahẽkana, Sodom reakʼ kại khon do, one ona mitʼ ripitʼtege jalao maraolen; ar onare tige baṅ lagaolena." 
Lamentations4:7 Onkoren bachao akan mukhiyạko do him khon hõ marsal, toa khon hõ ponḍgeko tahẽkana; onkoakʼ hoṛmo do Probal dhiri khon hõ arakʼge tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ cehra do Nilkanto moni leka tahẽkana." 
Lamentations4:8 Menkhan ńitokʼ onko do doat kạli khon hõ ḍherko hende akana; kulhikore bako ńel oromokʼ kana. Onkoakʼ harta do jaṅkore jalatʼ caba akantakoa; ona do kaṭ leka rohoṛ akana. 
Lamentations4:9 Akalte gujukʼ khon tarwaṛete gujukʼge bhagea; ińren hoṛko do khet reakʼ phosol ṭonṭate reṅgecʼ jalateko ạsitʼ cabakʼkana. 
Lamentations4:10 Mãyãwan maejiuko do akoakʼ tite akoren hoponko teke isinetʼkoa. Ińren hoṛkoren hoporeawakʼ jarkharokʼre akoren hoponge onkoren jomakʼko hoylentakoa. 
Lamentations4:11 Probhu Isor do purạte acʼakʼ edreye oḍok akada; uniyakʼ jolokʼkan edre doe dul buhạu akada. Uni do Sionre seṅgele jolakada; ar ona reakʼ rehetʼko hõe jomakada. 
Lamentations4:12 Dhạrtiren rapajko do bako pạtiạukʼkan tahẽkana, Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok duạrte jãhãe bạiriko bolo daṛeakʼa mente." 
Lamentations4:13 Noa do uniren nạbikoakʼ ghạṭ iạte, ar uniren naekekoakʼ bedhorom iạte hoylena, ente onḍege onko do dhorom hoṛkoakʼ mãyãmko joroyetʼtako tahẽkana." 
Lamentations4:14 Onko do kãṛãko leka kulhikoreko dãṛãnkan tahẽkana; onko do mãyãmte nonkako bhonḍ akana, celege onkoakʼ kicricʼ do bako joṭetʼetʼ tahẽkana." 
Lamentations4:15 Hoṛko do hohoateko metakokan tahẽkana, “Ocogokʼpe, ape dope bhonḍgea. Ocogokʼpe, men ocokʼpe, alope joṭetʼlea. ” Onko do uḍạcal hoṛ lekako ạcur baṛaekan tahẽkana; boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko doko menetʼ tahẽkana, “Abo talare upriạ do bako tahẽ daṛeakʼa. ”" 
Lamentations4:16 Probhu Isorge onko doe chirchạtur akatʼkoa; onko do ar bae moneyako kana. Hoṛko do naekeko bako manotetʼkoa, ar murubbiko hõ bako mãyãwako kana." 
Lamentations4:17 Ạuṛiyakʼ goṛo ńam reakʼ aste aboakʼ mẽtʼ do nijor akantabona; nonkan mitʼ jạtrenko secʼ bon koyokʼ horakatʼ tahẽkana okoe do bako rukhiyạ daṛeabon. 
Lamentations4:18 Hoṛko do abo lạgitʼ tãṛãkʼ akaeko tahenkan tahẽkana, onate abo do phaelao ṭhạ̃ikore babon taṛam daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Aboakʼ ses dinko do sorakan tahẽkana, ar aboakʼ dinko hõ caba akan tahẽkana, ente aboakʼ ses okte do seṭer akan tahẽkana." 
Lamentations4:19 Abo okoeko lagayetʼ bon tahẽkan onko do pajhaṛ khon hõ coṭkargeko tahẽkana; onko do burukoreko laga baṛayetʼ bon tahẽkana ar hahaṅkarre abo lạgitʼko tãṛãkʼkokʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Lamentations4:20 Aboakʼ mũ reakʼ sahẽtʼ Probhuren ojokʼicʼ do, onkoakʼ khạnreye sapʼ ocolena; menkhan abo dobon hudisokʼkan tahẽkana uniyakʼ umulre jạt jạtrenko talare bon girobasokʼa." 
Lamentations4:21 Us disạmre berel akanicʼ E Edom hoponera am do rạskạ ar hulạsokʼme; menkhan amhõ ona bạṭi dom emocokʼa; am dom ńũ bulokʼa arem uluṅokʼa. 
Lamentations4:22 E Sion hoponera, amakʼ sạjại do cabakʼa; bondi dosare do ar bam tahena; menkhan E Edom hoponera, uni do behokakʼ reakʼ sạjạiyiń emama ar amakʼ kạiye sodortama." 
Lamentations5:1 E Probhu Isor, ale cetanre oka hoyakan ona baṛe disạime; ạribạndhime, ar aleakʼ henosta baṛe ńelme." 
Lamentations5:2 Aleakʼ ạidạriko do bidisiạkoakʼ tire jimạ akana, ar aleakʼ oṛakʼ do eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko em ocoakana." 
Lamentations5:3 Ale do ṭũạr amarkole hoyakana, aleren baba do bạnuitalea, aleren gogo doko rạnḍi akana." 
Lamentations5:4 Dakʼ do kirińkatele ńũiyeda; ar aleakʼ sahan hõ damtele kirińeda. 
Lamentations5:5 Tarenre arãṛko ladeakatʼlea, ãṭko kạmi ocoyetʼlea laṅga cabayenale; jirạu do bạnukʼtalea." 
Lamentations5:6 Ale do jomakʼko ńama iạte Misor ar Ạsurrenko gobolrenkole hoyakana. 
Lamentations5:7 Aleren hapṛamko doko kạileda; onko do ńitokʼ ar bạnukʼkoa, menkhan ale do onkoakʼ ghạṭkole gokʼbaṛayeda." 
Lamentations5:8 Golamkoge ale cetanre mạlikiko calaoeda; onkoakʼ ti khon bańcaole lạgitʼ celege bạnukʼkoa. 
Lamentations5:9 Hahaṅkarre ḍạkuko botorte jiwi cuputʼkate jomakʼle jogaṛetʼkana. 
Lamentations5:10 Aleakʼ harta do bhaṭa leka dhipạu akana; reṅgecʼ reakʼ jaljalao iạte. 
Lamentations5:11 Maejiuko do Sionreko nosṭo ocokʼ kana; ar kũạri kuṛiko do Jihudạ ato ar nagrahakore. 
Lamentations5:12 Cetan hudạren kạmiyạko do tire tolkateko akaketʼkoa; ar murubbiko do bako manot ocolena. 
Lamentations5:13 Juạn koṛako do janteko ritʼeda; ar huḍiń koṛako do sahan bojha gokʼteko keḍe keḍekʼkana. 
Lamentations5:14 Nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen murubbiko do ar bako duṛupʼ kana; Juạnko hõ ar bako sereń durạṅeda. 
Lamentations5:15 Aleakʼ mon khon rạskạ do caba akana ale do enecʼ baṅkatele halaṅ homoreda. 
Lamentations5:16 Aleakʼ bohokʼ khon mukuṭ do ńur akana. Hae ale do, entele kại akada!" 
Lamentations5:17 Noa iạte aleakʼ mon do nijor akana, noako iạte aleakʼ mẽtʼ do ńuṛu ńuṛu akantalea." 
Lamentations5:18 Sion buru do ujạṛakʼ hoyakana; toyoko do onareko dãṛã baṛaekana. 
Lamentations5:19 E Probhu Isor, jaejug hạbicʼ rajokʼme; amakʼ siṅghạson do piṛhike piṛhi tahenkana." 
Lamentations5:20 Am do cetʼ jaejug lạgitʼem hiṛiń akatʼlea? Nunạkʼ din khon cedakʼem bạgi giḍiakatʼlea? 
Lamentations5:21 E Probhu Isor, bam nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼle khan, ale cetanre bam bekusi akan khan, enḍekhan am ṭhen baṛe ruạṛ idilem adole ruạṛ hijukʼa; ar sedae leka aleakʼ dinko baṛe ruạṛ kataleme." 
Lamentations5:22  
Ezekiel1:1 Pegel bochor reakʼ ponakʼ cando reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ dinre Kebar gaḍa aṛere bondi akan hoṛko talareń tahẽkanre iń samaṅre serma do jhicʼena ar Isorakʼ dorson iń ńelkeda. 
Ezekiel1:2 Un okte do Jehoyakin rajakʼ bondi tayom mõṛẽakʼ bochor tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:3 Babelrenkoakʼ disạmre Kebar gaḍa aṛere Busiren hopon Jeheskel ṭhen, metakʼme Probhu Isorakʼ katha do iń ṭhen sodorena. Ar onḍe Probhu Isorakʼ ti do iń cetanre tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:4 Iń do beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼteń ńelkeda utạr secʼ khon mitʼṭecʼ birbão hoe hijukʼkana, mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ rimilre bijli malkaokʼ kana ar ona beṛhaete do jhak jhak marsal tahẽkana. Ona bijli talare pitạl reakʼ jhalkaokʼkan mitʼṭecʼ marsal tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:5 Iń do onḍe ponea jiwetʼ jiwiyanko lekań ńelketʼkoa. Onko do ńelokʼte manwa lekako tahẽkana," 
Ezekiel1:6 menkhan onko mimitʼkoakʼ do poneakate mẽtʼãhã ar poneakate phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽkantakoa. 
Ezekiel1:7 Onkoakʼ jaṅga do sojhege ar jaṅga thopa do mĩhũwakʼ khurạ leka tahẽkana; onako do jhalkaokʼkan pitạl leka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:8 Onkoakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre do manwa tige tahẽkana. Onko mimitʼko do mẽtʼãhã ar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽkantakoa," 
Ezekiel1:9 onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko do mitʼṭecʼ tulucʼ eṭakʼakʼ sãote jakʼ akan tahẽkana. Onko do jotoge laha secʼko calakʼkan tahẽkana, ar calakʼ jokhecʼ do bako ạcur ruạṛokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:10 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ muṭhạn do manwa muṭhạn lekage tahẽkana ar onko mimitʼkoakʼ jojomsa aṛe reakʼ muṭhạn do dhạcri kulakʼ mẽtʼãhã leka, ar leṅga secʼakʼ muṭhạn do ḍaṅgra mẽtʼãhã leka ar mitʼṭenkate pajhạṛ cẽṛẽyakʼ mẽtʼãhã leka hõ tahẽkantakoa." 
Ezekiel1:11 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do nonkage tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do coṭ secʼ laplapa tahẽkana; mimitʼkoakʼ banar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do uni banar secʼren jiwiyanicʼakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼre jakʼ akan tahẽkana, ar barea phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte do hoṛmo esetʼge tahẽkantakoa." 
Ezekiel1:12 Onko mimitʼko do akoakʼ mẽtʼãhã lekate beṛhaeteko laha daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoren jiu oka secʼe calakʼkan tahẽkan onko hõ ontegeko calakʼkan tahẽkana, ar calakʼ jokhecʼ do bako ạcurkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:13 Noko jiwetʼ jiwiyanko talare do aṅgra se mosal seṅgel leka jolokʼkan tahẽkana ona do onko jiwiyanko bhitrite oḍok bolokʼkan tahẽkana; ona seṅgel do jhalkaokʼkan tahẽkana ar ona tala khon bijliko oḍok hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:14 Jiwetʼ jiwiyanko do bijli malkaokʼ lekako calao hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:15 Onko jiwetʼ jiwiyanko secʼ iń beṅgetʼketʼ khan ponea jiwiyanko pheḍre otre mimitʼ goṭecʼ pạihạ̃ń ńelkeda. 
Ezekiel1:16 Ona pạihạ̃ko reakʼ goṛhon do nonka leka tahẽkana- Boidorjomuni mạnik leka jhakjhak ar ona pạihạ̃ko ńelokʼte do mitʼge tahẽkana. Mitʼṭecʼ bhitrire armitʼṭecʼ pạihạ̃ menakʼa leka onako do benao tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:17 Pạihạ̃ko tinre guṛdạukʼkan tahẽkana unre onko jiwiyanko beṛhaete jãhãsecʼge sojhete calakʼkan tahẽkana; calakʼ jokhecʼ pạihạ̃ko do baṅ ạcur ruạṛokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:18 Ona pạihạ̃ko do ạḍi maraṅ ar botorge tahẽkana ar ponea pạihạ̃ reakʼ beṛhaete do mẽtʼkote perecʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:19 Jiwetʼ jiwiyanko calakʼ jokhecʼ ona pạihạ̃ko hõ calakʼkan tahẽkana; jiwiyanko ot khonko rakapʼlen tayom pạihạ̃ko hõ rakabokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:20 Jiwiyankoren Jiu do tinre jãhã secʼe calakʼkan tahẽkana pạihạ̃ko hõ ona são sãote calakʼkan tahẽkana, ente onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoakʼ jiu do ona pạihạ̃rege tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:21 Jiwiyanko tinreko calakʼkan tahẽkana unre pạihạ̃ hõ calakʼkan tahẽkana; ar jiwiyankoko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkanre pạihạ̃ko hõ teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana; arhõ jiwiyanko ot khonko rakapʼlenre pạihạ̃ko hõ onko são sãote rakabokʼkan tahẽkana, ente onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoren jiu do pạihạ̃kore tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:22 Onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoakʼ bohokʼ cetanre cetʼ coṅ aṭetʼ akan tahẽkana; ona do him leka ponḍ ar botorge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:23 Ona latarre onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do laplapa akatʼ tahẽkana ar mitʼṭen reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do eṭakʼ ar mitʼṭecʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼre jakʼ akan tahẽkana. Eṭakʼ banar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼte do mimitʼkoakʼ hoṛmoe esetʼkakʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel1:24 Jiwiyankoko calaoen tayom iń do onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ sabadiń ańjomkeda; ona do banbạsi ar ạtukʼ dakʼ reakʼ saḍe leka ańjomokʼkan tahẽkana, sanam daṛeanicʼ reakʼ aṛaṅ leka tahẽkana, mitʼṭen lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ kạumạu lekage. Jiwiyankoko teṅgokan tahẽkanre phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ doko samṭaokatako kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:25 Onko do phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ samṭaokate tinreko teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana unre onkoakʼ bohokʼ cetan reakʼ ona ṭhạ̃i khon mitʼṭecʼ aṛaṅ ańjomena. 
Ezekiel1:26 Ar onḍe nilkanto mạnik reakʼ siṅghạson leka ńelena. Ar ona coṭre menakʼ siṅghạson cetanre manwa muṭhạn leka mitʼ hoṛiń ńelkedea. 
Ezekiel1:27 Iń doń ńelkedea ḍanḍa khon cetan hạbicʼ uni do ńelokʼte jhalkaokʼkan pitạl leka, ona do seṅgelte perecʼ, ar ḍanḍa khon latar hạbicʼ do seṅgel leka ńelokʼkan tahẽkana; ar beṛhaete do marsalge tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel1:28 Dakʼ dinre rimil tala khon liṭạ akʼ leka ona beṛhaete ona marsal do ńelokʼkan tahẽkana. Okań ńelketʼ ona do Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokge tahẽkana. Ona ńelte iń do otreń ombakʼena ar mitʼ hoṛ katha roroṛiń ańjomkedea. 
Ezekiel2:1 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, ma teṅgokʼme; iń do am tulucʼ iń galmaraoa.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Uni tinre kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre Isorren Jiu do ińreye boloyena ar ińakʼ jaṅgateye teṅgo ocokedińa ar uni do iń tulucʼ galmarao in ańjomkedea. 
Ezekiel2:3 Uniye metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am do Israelko ṭhen, metakʼme okoe iń upạrteko huletʼkan onko jạtrenko ṭheniń koletʼmea; onko ar akoren hapṛamko do teheń hạbicʼ iń upạrteko huletʼkana." 
Ezekiel2:4 Okoe ṭheniń koletʼme onko hoṛ do ṭheṭamu ar keṭecʼ monan hoṛkanako. Ar am do Probhu Isorakʼ katham galmarao akoa. 
Ezekiel2:5 Onko do amakʼ katha bako ańjoma, ente onko do huhul jạtren kanako; enhõ onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, onko talare mitʼṭecʼ nạbi do menaegea." 
Ezekiel2:6 Menkhan E manwa hopon, am do onko ar onkoakʼ kathate alom botorokʼa. Onko do seṅgel siń ar jạnumko leka am beṛhaeteko tahẽlenrehõ ar kidiń kaṭkom talare menamre hõ am do alom botorokʼa. Onko ńelte se onkoakʼ katha ańjomte hõ alogem botorokʼa; ente onko do huhul jạtrenko kanako." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ar huhul jạtren kanteko ińakʼ katha do ohoko ańjomlea, menkhan baṅ doko ańjom ar baṅ do bako ańjom am do ińakʼ katham lạiyakoa." 
Ezekiel2:8 E manwa hopon, iń okań metam ona ańjomme. Am do onko huhulkan jạtrenko leka do alom hoyokʼa. Ma cahabme, ar okań emamkan ona jomme.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Unre beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda iń secʼ mitʼṭecʼ ti do tiạr akana. Ar onare mitʼṭecʼ guṛhe puthi menakʼa. 
Ezekiel2:10 Uni do iń samaṅre onae oṭakʼkeda. Ona reakʼ banarsage homor halaṅ, kũhrạukʼ ar hae haeyokʼ reakʼ kathako ol tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel3:1 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am samaṅre oka menakʼ ona jomme; noa guṛhạ puthi do jomme, ar ona tayom do Israelko ṭhen senkate galmarao akome.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Unre mocań cahapʼketʼtińạ, ar uni do ona puthiye jom ocokedińa." 
Ezekiel3:3 Ar ona tayom uni doe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, iń emakʼ noa puthi jomkate amakʼ lacʼ bi ocoytam.” Onate iń do onań jomkeda, ar ińakʼ mocare do dumur rasa leka heṛemiń ạikạukeda." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ona tayom uni doe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am do ńitokʼ Israelko ṭhen senkate ińakʼ kathako galmarao akome." 
Ezekiel3:5 Am do nonkan hoṛko ṭhen do bam kol ocokʼkana one onkoakʼ pạrsi do ạnạṛige ar muskilge, menkhan am do Israelko ṭhengem kol ocokʼkana." 
Ezekiel3:6 Okoekoakʼ katha bam bujhạu onkan ạnạṛi ar kuṭhin pạrsi roroṛ ḍher jạtrenko ṭhen do bam kol ocokʼkana. Onko ṭheniń kollem khan khạṭige onko do amakʼ kathako ańjomkea. 
Ezekiel3:7 Menkhan Israelko do amakʼ katha bako ańjomtama, ente onko do ińakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ bako rebena; noa reakʼ karon do hoyokʼ kana, goṭa Israel jạtren hoṛ do kạṭhuạ ar keṭecʼ monan kanako." 
Ezekiel3:8 Menkhan am do onko leka kạṭhuạ ar keṭecʼ monan hoṛiń hoyocomea. 
Ezekiel3:9 Amakʼ moloṅ do hirạ mạnik leka keṭecʼ, ar cokmuki dhiri khon hõń keṭecʼ ocoakatʼtama. Onko doko huhulkan jạtren kanrehõ alogem botorakoa ar onko ńelte alom botorokʼa.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Uni do arhõe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, iń okako kathań lạiyam kan ona do mon lagaokate ańjomtińme ar monre rebetʼ dohokakʼme." 
Ezekiel3:11 Am do ńitokʼ bondi dosare menakʼko amakʼ disạmren hoṛko ṭhen senkate galmarao akome. Onkoko ańjomtam ar bako ańjomtam, am do Probhu Isorakʼ katha onko galmarao akome.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Ona tayom Isorren Jiu do ińe kuṭuṅ rakapʼkedińa, ar iń tayom secʼre ãṭ aṛaṅte roṛoṛkan noa kathań ańjomkeda, “Coṭ utạrre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ sarhao hoyokʼtaema.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Iń do onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ saḍeń ańjomkeda ar onko pantere tahẽkan pạihạ̃ reakʼ saḍe hõ kajakteń ańjomkeda. 
Ezekiel3:14 Isorren Jiu do ińe kuṭuṅ rakapʼ idiyiń jokhecʼ iń do ińakʼ mon reakʼ duktegeń calaoena, ar Probhu Isorakʼ keṭecʼ ti do ińre tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel3:15 Bondi akan okoeko hoṛ do Kebar gaḍa ṭhenakʼ Tel-Abibreko tahẽkan onko ṭhen iń doń calaoena. Ar okareko tahẽkan onḍe onko talare iń do eae din hape akaniń tahẽyena. 
Ezekiel3:16 Eae din paromen khan Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen hecʼena," 
Ezekiel3:17 “E manwa hopon, Israelko lạgitʼ pahradar iń benaoakatʼmea; onate iń okań metam ona ańjomme ar iń huyạte onkom sontorkoa." 
Ezekiel3:18 Iń do tinre mitʼṭecʼ dusṭạmi hoṛiń metaea, ‘khạṭige am dom gujukʼa,’ unre am do uni bam sontore, se uniyakʼ jiwi bańcaotae lạgitʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ bam metae, enḍekhan uniyakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do amgeń dạyimea." 
Ezekiel3:19 Menkhan dusṭạmi hoṛem sontore tayom hõ uni do acʼakʼ dusṭạmi khon se acʼakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon bae ruạṛ hijukʼ enḍekhan uniyakʼ kại iạte uni doe gujukʼa; menkhan am dom rukhiyạkʼa. 
Ezekiel3:20 “Arhõ, jãhãe dhorom hoṛ jodi acʼakʼ hor khon ruạṛkate bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi ar uni samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ muhin iń dohoy, enḍekhan uni doe gujukʼa. Ar uni bam sontorlede iạte uni do acʼakʼ kại iạteye gujukʼa. Ar okako dhorom reakʼ uniye kạmi akatʼ ona do ar baṅ disạkʼtaea; ar uniyakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ am do bạń dạyimea." 
Ezekiel3:21 Menkhan alo kại lạgitʼ jodi uni dhorom hoṛem sontore ar uni bae kại enḍekhan sontorokʼ reakʼ katha ańjom khạtirte uni do khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa ar am hõ apnarte rukhiyạm ńama.” 
Ezekiel3:22 Onḍe Probhu Isorakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti do iń cetanre tahẽkana ar uni do iń metadińạ, “Ma beretʼme ar bilạn ṭạnḍite oḍok calakʼme, onḍe iń do am tulucʼ kathań roṛa.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Onatege iń do beretʼkate bilạn ṭạnḍiteń oḍok calaoena. Ar Kebar gaḍa aṛere Probhu Isorakʼ oka ṭhonok iń ńelletʼ onkan ṭhonokge onḍe hõń ńelkeda; ar iń doń ombakʼena. 
Ezekiel3:24 Unre Isorren Jiu do ińreye boloyena ar ińakʼ jaṅgateye teṅgokedińa. Uni doe metadińạ, “Am do amakʼ oṛakʼte bolokʼme ar duạr sińkate bhitrire tahenme." 
Ezekiel3:25 E manwa hopon, am do babertem tol ocokʼa; onate bahreren hoṛko talare bam oḍok sen daṛeakʼa." 
Ezekiel3:26 Am do jemon hape akanem tahen ar onko bam ruhetʼ daṛeako ona iạte amakʼ alaṅ do tạrureń jalatʼ ocoytama. Ente Israelko do mitʼṭen huhulkan jạtren kanako. 
Ezekiel3:27 Menkhan am tulucʼ iń galmarao jokhecʼ iń do amakʼ mocań jhijtama ar am do onko ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katham lạiya. Onko modre okoe amakʼ ańjom reakʼe khoj uni doe ańjomma ar okoe ańjom bae khoj uni do aloe ańjomma; ente onko do huhulkan jạtren kanako.” 
Ezekiel4:1 Uni do arhõe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, ńitokʼ do mitʼṭecʼ hasa reakʼ paṭa ạgukate iń samaṅre dohoyme ar ona cetanre Jerusalem nagraha reakʼ muṭhạn benaome." 
Ezekiel4:2 Ona beṛhaete nonka gherao esetʼakʼ dohoyme; ona upạrte mitʼṭecʼ usul pạcri benaome ar beṛhaete mitʼṭecʼ pinḍhạ upʼ rakabme, ar nagraha upạrte lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍera benaome ar ona beṛhaete pạcri rạpud reakʼ jontroko bạisạume." 
Ezekiel4:3 Ona tayom mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ paṭa hataokate ona do am ar nagraha talare pạcri leka dohoyme ar amakʼ mẽtʼãhã ona secʼ ạcurtam. Onate nagraha do esetʼ ạcur akana mente bujhạukʼa; ar nonkatem ńela, nagraha do gherao ạcur akana. Ar noa do Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ cinhạge hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Ona tayom amakʼ leṅga aṛete soṛtatem giticʼa ar Israelakʼ kại reakʼ sạjại am cetanrem hataoa. Ar tinạkʼ din soṛtate giticʼ akanem tahena unạkʼ din am do onkoakʼ sạjạiyem goga. 
Ezekiel4:5 Onkoakʼ sạjại ńam reakʼ bochor lekha hisạbkate unạkʼ din iń do gog lạgitʼ iń ematʼmea. Onate am do pesae aregel din Israelakʼ sạjạiyem goga. 
Ezekiel4:6 “Noako purạulen khan arhõm giticʼa; niạ dhao do jojomsa aṛete soṛtatem giticʼa ar Jihudạwakʼ kại reakʼ sạjạiyem goga. Giticʼ akan tahen lạgitʼ iń do pongel din iń ematʼmea, mimitʼ bochor lạgitʼ do mimitʼ din." 
Ezekiel4:7 Am do Jerusalem reakʼ gherao ạcur akan secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼãhãm samaṅtama ar ti cetan khon kicricʼ ocokʼkate ona nagraha upạrtem nạbiya. 
Ezekiel4:8 Amakʼ ghekʼrao dinko ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ jemon banarsa aṛe bam ạcur daṛeakʼ ona iạte iń do baberteń tolkama. 
Ezekiel4:9 “Am do guhum ar jao, malhan, mạsri dạl, kode ar guḍma guhumko hataokate mitʼṭecʼ bhajanrem dohoya ar onakote am lạgitʼ piṭhạm benao joṅa. Ar oka pe sae aregel din mitʼsa aṛete soṛtate giticʼ akanem tahen unre onam joma." 
Ezekiel4:10 Din hilokʼ soṅkate barsae pongel gram jomakʼ do enhilokʼge mitʼ domem joma. 
Ezekiel4:11 Ona chaḍa adha liṭar khon thoṛa ḍher ńokʼ dakʼhõ dinre mitʼ domem ńũiya. 
Ezekiel4:12 Onako jomakʼ do jao reakʼ piṭhạ lekam joma; hoṛ icʼ reakʼ gõeṭhate onko samaṅrem rapakʼ akatʼakʼge. 
Ezekiel4:13 Ar okoe do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talare Israelkoń laga ńirko onko talare tahen jokhecʼ onko do nonkage besaphawakʼ jomakʼko joma.” Noa katha do Probhu Isorgeye meneda. 
Ezekiel4:14 Unre ińiń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, nonka do alo baṛe hoyokʼma. Iń do tishõ bạń besapha akana. Gidrạ khon ńit hạbicʼ acʼte gocʼ akan janwar se janwar hotete ciro gocʼicʼakʼ jãhãnakʼge bạń jomakada. Jãhãn besapha jel do ińakʼ mocate baṅ bolo akana.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Uniye menkeda, “Ńelme, iń do manwa mạilạ bodolte gại guricʼ iń aṛakʼam kana, am do ona gõeṭhate piṭhạ tearkatem joma.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Ona tayom uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, iń do Jerusalemre jom reakʼ jogao doń bonda. Hoṛko do dạndikate tulạkate jomakʼko joma ar dakʼ do tharbasaoate soṅkateko ńũiya," 
Ezekiel4:17 ente jomakʼ ar ńũi reakʼ do ṭonṭa hoyokʼa. Onko do tharbasaoateko beṅgetʼ joṅa ar akoakʼ kại iạteko heṛokʼa. 
Ezekiel5:1 “E Manwa hopon, ńitokʼ am do amakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ ar goco hoyo saphae lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ laser holatʼ hataome ar nạpitakʼ khur leka beoharme. Ona tayom onako do tulạte pe ṭhen hạṭińme." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ar tinre nagraha reakʼ gherao dinko cabakʼa unre ona upʼ reakʼ pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do nagraha talare seṅgelrem atar giḍikakʼa. Ar pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń upʼ do tarwaṛete nagraha beṛhaetem samakʼ kuṭrạya, ar pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń upʼ do hoerem uḍiạu gotʼkakʼa. Ar ona tayom tayomte iń do tarwaṛeń kola." 
Ezekiel5:3 Menkhan thoṛa upʼ dohokate amem horokʼ akatʼ kicricʼrem rebetʼ dohokakʼa. 
Ezekiel5:4 Ona tayom do arhõ thoṛa upʼ hataokate seṅgelrem atar giḍikakʼa. Ar seṅgel do onḍe khon goṭa Israel jạtrenko talare pasnaokʼa. 
Ezekiel5:5 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, noa do Jerusalem kana. Iń do jạt jạtrenko talare onań dohoakada; ar ona beṛhaete do aema disạmko menakʼa." 
Ezekiel5:6 Menkhan onakoren do ińakʼ ạnko upạrte bebạṛicʼko ṭhok akada, boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko khon bạ̃ṛtige dusṭạmiko kạmi akatʼte, ar ińakʼ ạriko upạrte beṛhaeteakʼ disạmkorenko khon bạ̃ṛtige; ente ińakʼ ạnkoko phesṛao giḍi akada ar ińakʼ ạrikore hõ bako taṛamakada." 
Ezekiel5:7 “Onate iń Probhu Isoriń meneda, E Jerusalem, am beṛhaeteakʼ disạmko khon hõ bạ̃ṛtim bạṛicʼ akana. Am do ińakʼ niạm bam ańjomakada ar ińakʼ ạn ạriko hõ manao tińme. Am beṛhaeten jạtrenko hõ niạm lekate bako calao akana." 
Ezekiel5:8 Ona iạte ińge am upạrte, ar boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅreń sạjạimea." 
Ezekiel5:9 Amren hirkhạwan sanam boṅgako iạte am cetanre okań cekae ona do tishõ bạń onka akada ar tishõ bạń onkaea. 
Ezekiel5:10 Ona iạte am talaren apatko do akoren gidrạkoakʼ jelko joma ar gidrạko do akoren apatkoakʼ jelko joma. Iń do amiń sạjạimea ar amre sarecʼ jiwetʼ tahen hoṛ do beṛhaeteń chirchạturkoa. 
Ezekiel5:11 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isor do ińre kiriạkateń meneda, amren sanam hirkhạwan boṅga murtiko ar hirkhạwakʼ kạmikote ińakʼ oṛakʼem besapha akatʼte iń do ińakʼ dayań ocogtińạ; ar am secʼ do bạń beṅgeda ar mãyã hõ bạń mãyãwama." 
Ezekiel5:12 Amren pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń hoṛ do am talare mahamạrite ar baṅkhan akalteko gujukʼa ar pe hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do pạcri bhit bahrere lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa ar pe hạtiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń do beṛhaeteń chirchạturkoa ar tarwaṛe do onkoe khudạu baṛakoa. 
Ezekiel5:13 “Niạko tayom ińakʼ heṛan edre do cabakʼa; onko cetanre ińakʼ edre purạteń upʼako tayom iń doń hapekʼa. Ar unreko baḍae daṛeakʼ, ińakʼ ontor reakʼ jaljalao iạte iń Probhu Isor do noa kathań meneda." 
Ezekiel5:14 “E Jerusalem, am beṛhaeten jạtrenko modre okoe do am aṛeteko parom calakʼ onkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre dhaṅdhasericʼ ar landa-dhutʼicʼ iń hoyocomea." 
Ezekiel5:15 Iń do tinre heṛan edre, ar raṅgao ar heṛan eger hotete amiń sạjạimea unre am beṛhaeten jạtrenko do am ńelteko tharbasaokʼa; onko ṭhen am do nihạ̃t ar landa-dhutʼicʼgem hoyokʼa ar mitʼṭecʼ sontoricʼ lekage." 
Ezekiel5:16 Am maraome lạgitʼge am cetanre akal reakʼ botoranakʼ sariń aṛaga. Iń do am cetanre ona akal arhõń ḍher ocoya ar amakʼ jomakʼ reakʼ jogaṛ hõń bond ocoya. 
Ezekiel5:17 Am upạrte iń do akal ar jojom janwarkoń kolkoa; onko do amren hoponkoko jomkoa. Mahamạri ar mãyãm do amre ạtukʼa ar iń do am upạrte lạṛhạiyiń ạguiya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel6:1 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha iń ṭhen sodorena, “E manwa hopon, am do Israelakʼ buru boṭkocʼ secʼ samaṅkate roṛme, Probhu Isor do onko upạrte noa kathae roṛeda, ‘E Israel reakʼ buru boṭkocʼko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe. Iń Probhu Isorge buru boṭkocʼko ar khạndṛuń ar nalakoń metapekana, iń do ape upạrte lạṛhại hotete apeakʼ pujạ reakʼ than boṭkocʼkoń marao giḍikakʼa." 
Ezekiel6:2  
Ezekiel6:3  
Ezekiel6:4 Apeakʼ sanam pinḍko do maraokʼtapea ar apeakʼ dhudhup pinḍko hõ rạputʼ giḍikʼa. Aperen boṅga murhutʼko samaṅrege ‘aperen hoṛkoń gocʼkoa. 
Ezekiel6:5 Israel hoponko reakʼ mạ̃ṛĩko do onkoren boṅga murhutʼko samaṅregeń dohoya ar pinḍ beṛhaete do apeakʼ jaṅkoń giḍikakʼa. 
Ezekiel6:6 Ar jãhãregepe girobasokʼ onḍenakʼ nagrahako do jarkharokʼtapea ar than boṭkocʼko do ujạṛokʼa; onate apeakʼ pinḍko do marao utạrokʼtapea, aperen boṅga murhutʼko doko rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa, apeakʼ dhudhup pinḍko do makʼ lạnduṛokʼa ar apeakʼ benaoakʼ sanamakʼ do maraokʼtapea," 
Ezekiel6:7 ar ape talarege aperen hoṛ doko gocʼ ocokʼa. Ar noako hoylen khanpe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘Tobe thoṛa hoṛ do jiwetʼ iń dohokoa; aperen paskaokʼko do tinre eṭakʼ eṭakʼ disạm ar jạtrenko talareko chirchạturokʼa unre onko hoṛ do gujukʼ reakʼ ti khon rukhiyạko ńama. 
Ezekiel6:9 Onko do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talare iń reaṅ noa kathako disạya, onkoakʼ bepạtiạr ontor ar mẽtʼte cetʼ lekako duk ocoakadińạ mente; onkoakʼ ontor do iń khon ghańjeṛ akantakoa ar onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do boṅga murhutʼko ńamko lạgitʼ ahkaokʼ kantakoa. Onkoakʼ sanam bạṛicʼ ar hirkhạwakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ onko do apnartetʼko hirkhạjoṅa." 
Ezekiel6:10 Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do; onko cetanre niạ muhin paṛao ocoy reakʼ katha ạuṛiyakʼ do bạń roṛakada.’ ”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Am do ti thayoeme ar jaṅga do dhap dhapme ar menme, hae hae, Israel jạtrenkoakʼ sanam bạṛicʼakʼ ar hirkhạwakʼko ńutumte, ente onko do lạṛhạite, akalte ar mahamạriteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel6:12 Okoe sạṅgińre menakʼko onko do mahamạriteko gujukʼa ar okoe sorre menakʼko onko do lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa, ar okoe sarecʼko tahena onko do gherao esetʼ akan talare akal iạteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel6:13 Israelko do akoakʼ pinḍ beṛhaeten boṅga murhutʼko talare, maraṅ maraṅ buru cetankore, darebuṭạkore ar hạṛiạṛ sakam darekore, debdạru buṭạkore, metakʼme okako ṭhạ̃ikore onkoren boṅga murhutʼko ńutumte jut mosola reakʼ dhupko jeretʼetʼ tahẽkan onako ṭhạ̃ire onko do gocʼ akanko tahena. Unre sarecʼ jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel6:14 Israelko do jãhãregeko girobasokʼ iń do onko upạrte ińakʼ tiń calaoa ar hahaṅkar ṭoṭha khon Dibala hạbicʼ goṭa disạmge ujạṛakʼ ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ iń hoeocoya. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińa," 
Ezekiel7:2 “E manwa hopon, Israel disạm ṭhen iń Probhu Isor do noa kathań menetʼkana, ‘ńelme, sesokʼ reakʼ okte! Sesokʼ do disạm beṛhae khon daraekana!" 
Ezekiel7:3 Ńitge ona okte do am cetanre hecʼpaṛao akana ar am upạrte ińakʼ edre doń dula. Amakʼ colon lekań bicạrmea ar sanam hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko iạte amiń sạjạimea. 
Ezekiel7:4 Iń do mãyãte hõ bạń beṅgetʼama ar aṛakʼ hõ bạń aṛakʼmea; amakʼ colon ar am bhitri reakʼ hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko iạte iń do khạṭigeń sạjạimea. Ar unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. ’ ”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Probhu Isor do nonkae meneda, “Muhin! Mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ muhinge hijukʼ kana!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Ses okte do seṭer akana! Ape upạrte ona do rakapʼ akana, ar hecʼ seṭerakana!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Disạmre okoepe girobasokʼ kan ape cetanre sorbonas do hecʼ seṭerakana. Okte do hoyena, din hõ sorena; unre buru boṭkocʼko cetanre rạskạ reakʼ andoṛ bodolte botor reakʼ aṛaṅge ańjomokʼa." 
Ezekiel7:8 Iń do usạrage ape cetanre ińakʼ edreń dula. Apeakʼ colon lekategeń bicạrpea ar apeakʼ sanam hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko khạtirtegeń sạjạipea. 
Ezekiel7:9 Iń do mãyãte bạń beṅgetʼapea ar aṛakʼ hõ bạń aṛakʼpea; apeakʼ colon ar ape tala reakʼ hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko reakʼ kuṛạiyiń emapea. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorgeń hạhạna mente." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Ńelpe, din do hecʼena! Ona do seṭerakana! Sorbonas do oḍokʼ hecʼakana, ṭheṅgare baha bhoṭokʼ akana, bạḍại reakʼ baha do saṛ akana." 
Ezekiel7:11 Santao reakʼ ṭheṅgatege bedhoromkoakʼ sạjại do emogokʼa. Onkoakʼ lekha do ḍhergere hõ celege bako tahena, onkoakʼ dhon-durib se ṭhonok cetʼge baṅ tahentakoa." 
Ezekiel7:12 Okte do hoyena, din hõ seṭerena. Onate jumi kirińetʼkan hoṛ do aloko rạskạkʼma ar ạkhrińetʼko hõ aloko dukokʼ ma, ente onko sanamko cetanre edre do seṭerakana." 
Ezekiel7:13 Kiriń ar ạkhriń kin bana hoṛ jiwetʼkin tahẽlenre hõ okoeye ạkhriń akatʼ uni do jumi bae ńam ruạṛa, ente noa dorson do sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ kana, ona do hoyokʼte hõ hoyokʼgea. Dusṭạmi hoṛko modre mitʼ hoṛ hõ acʼakʼ jiwi do bae rukhiyạ daṛeataea." 
Ezekiel7:14 Hoṛko do sakwa oroṅkate sanamakʼko sapṛao dohoakada, menkhan lạṛhại lạgitʼ do celege bako oḍok calakʼkana, ente ińakʼ jaljalao edre do disạmren sanam hoṛko cetanre menakʼa." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Nagraha bahrere do lạṛhại ar bhitrire do mahamạri ar akal menakʼa; ar okoe bahrereko tahen onko do lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa, ar okoe nagraha bhitrireko tahen onko do akal ar mahamạriteko jom ocokʼa." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ar okoe jiwetʼko tahen arko ńir bańcaokʼ onko do jotoge buru boṭkocʼkoreko tahena ar mimitʼko do akoakʼ kại lạgitʼ buru nalaren potam lekako homor halaṅa. 
Ezekiel7:17 Mimitʼkoakʼ ti do lạbṛujokʼtakoa ar mitʼke mitʼ gunṭhi do nijorokʼa. 
Ezekiel7:18 Onko do gõṛẽ kicricʼko paṭhejoṅa ar botorteko thartharaokʼa. Onko do lajaoteko perejokʼa ar bohokʼ doko hoyo munḍrạ ocokʼa. 
Ezekiel7:19 Akoakʼ rupạ do kulhikoreko giḍikakʼa ar akoakʼ sona do besaphawakʼ jinisge hoyokʼa. Probhu Isorakʼ edre hilokʼ onkoakʼ sona ar rupạ do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakoa. Onate onkoakʼ lacʼ do baṅ bikʼa se reṅgecʼ hõ baṅ cabakʼtakoa. Onko do onakoge kạireye paṛao ocoakatʼkoa. 
Ezekiel7:20 Onko do mońj mońj gohna iạteko gorbokʼkan tahẽkana ar onate akoren hirkhạwan boṅga muṭhạnko benaojoṅ kan tahẽkana. Onate iń do onako hirkhạwakʼ jinisgeń hoyoco akatʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ar onako jinis do bidisiạkoakʼ tire ar luṭ reakʼ jinis lekate dhạrtiren dusṭạmikoakʼ tireń soprota; onko do onako besonota. 
Ezekiel7:22 Ḍạkuko do ińakʼ sonot jaegare bolokate onako besonota, ar onko secʼ khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã doń ạcurtińạ." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Sikṛi do ṭhik akaege menakʼa, ente disạmre mãyãm joro ocoete ar nagraha do santaote perecʼakana." 
Ezekiel7:24 Onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr dokhol lạgitʼ iń do jạt jạtrenko tala khon dusṭạmi jạtrenkoń ạgukoa. Iń do daṛeankoakʼ bạḍạiyiń rạpudtakoa, ar onkoakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ikoń besapha ocoytakoa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Heṛan botor hecʼlen khan onko do suluk reakʼko ńam baṛaya menkhan bako ńama. 
Ezekiel7:26 Muhin cetan muhin hijukʼa, unạn cetan unạn ańjomokʼa. Onko do nạbiko ṭhen khon dorson reakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼko kurumuṭuiya; naekekoakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ cecetʼakʼ ar murubbikoakʼ sopolha do baṅ tahena." 
Ezekiel7:27 Raj doe homor halaṅa, rajkumar doe andesalekʼa, ar disạmren hoṛkoakʼ ti do thar tharaokʼtakoa. Iń do onkoakʼ colon lekage onko sãoteń beohara ar onkoakʼ kuṛại lekageń sạjạikoa. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Bondi dosare tahen turuiyakʼ bochor reakʼ turuiyakʼ cando reakʼ mõṛẽyakʼ dinre iń do tinre ińakʼ oṛakʼreń duṛupʼ akan tahẽkana ar Jihudạren murubbiko do iń samaṅre duṛupʼ akanko tahẽkana unre Probhu Isorakʼ ti do ona ṭhạ̃ire iń cetanre hecʼena. 
Ezekiel8:2 Iń doń beṅgetʼketʼ khan manwa leka mitʼ hoṛiń ńelkedea. Uniyakʼ ḍanḍa khon latar hạbicʼ do seṅgel leka, ar ḍanḍa khon cetan hạbicʼ do jhak jhakaokʼkan pitạl leka." 
Ezekiel8:3 Uni do ti tiạrkate ińakʼ bohokʼ upʼe jhuṭiạuketʼtińạ. Ar Isorren Jiu do ot ar serma talareye rakapʼ idikedeńạ ar Isor emakʼ dorsonkote Jerusalem reakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri raca reakʼ utạr secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr reakʼ bolokʼ horteye idikedińa. Onḍe do mitʼṭen boṅga muṭhạn tahẽkana ona iạte Isor do edrete pit caṛhaoade tahẽkana," 
Ezekiel8:4 onḍe iń samaṅre Israelren Isorakʼ ṭhonok tahẽkana, okaṭakʼ do bilạn ṭạnḍire dorson hoteteń ńelletʼ." 
Ezekiel8:5 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, utạr secʼ beṅgedme.” Onate iń do onteń beṅgetʼ rakapʼkeda ar pinḍ reakʼ duạrre, metakʼme utạr secʼ reakʼ phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ horre boṅga muṭhạniń ńelkeda." 
Ezekiel8:6 Uni doe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, onko cetʼko kạmikan ona do cetʼem ńeletʼkangea? Israelko do onḍe napṛakʼ napṛakʼ hirkhạwakʼko kạmikana ar ona iạte iń do ińakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i khoniń pharakokʼ kana. Menkhan am do niạ khon hõ artetʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmikom ńela.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Ona tayom uni do bakher racate bolokʼ horreye idikedińa. Iń do bhitre mitʼṭecʼ bhugạkʼ iń ńel ńamkeda. 
Ezekiel8:8 Uni doe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, bhit reakʼ ona bhugạkʼ do lạṭuime.” Ona iạte iń do ona bhugạkʼ iń lạṭukeda ar onḍe do mitʼṭecʼ duạriń ńel ńamkeda." 
Ezekiel8:9 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “Am do bhitrite senkate onḍe oka bạṛicʼakʼ ar hirkhạwakʼko kạmikan ona ńelme.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Onate iń do bhitrite bolokateń beṅgetʼ ạcurkeda ar bhit reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire leńokʼkan jiwiyanko ar besapha janwarko ar Israelren sanam boṅga muṭhạnko ol caṛhao akan iń ńelkeda. 
Ezekiel8:11 Onako samaṅre Israelren gel eae murubbiko teṅgo akan ar onko talare Saphan hopon Jasaniạ teṅgo akaniń ńelkedea. Ar onko mimitʼkoakʼ tire do mitʼṭecʼkate dhup dạni tahẽkana ar ona khon dhũạ do rimil cetan secʼ rakabokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel8:12 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, Israelkoren murubbiko ńutre apan ạpin oṛakʼren boṅgako ṭhen cetʼko cekayetʼkan dom bujhạu daṛeakʼ kangea? Onkoko meneda, ‘Probhu Isor do ale secʼ bae beṅgetʼeda, ente uni do disạm bạgikateye calao akana.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Uni do arhõe metadińạ, “Noa khon hõ onkoakʼ bạ̃ṛti hirkhạwanakʼ kạmikom ńela.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ona tayom uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ utạr secʼakʼ phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ horreye ạgukedińa, ar ińiń ńelkeda onḍe maejiuko do duṛupʼkate Tamus debota lạgitʼko rakʼeda." 
Ezekiel8:15 Uni do ińe metadińa, “E manwa hopon, am do cetʼ onam ńeletʼgea? Am do noa khon hõ ḍher hirkhạwakʼ jiniskom ńela.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ona tayom uni do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ bhitri reakʼ racareye idikedińa ar onḍe koejoṅ oṛakʼte bolokʼ hor reakʼ pinḍạre ar pinḍ talare bargel mõṛẽ hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ mundil secʼ deakate siń candoko sewawae kan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel8:17 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am do cetʼ noam ńelkeda? Onḍe Jihudạren hoṛko oka bạṛicʼakʼko kạmiakatʼ onako do cetat reakʼ hõ baṅkana? Onko do santao iạte disạmko perecʼ akada ar ińakʼ pitko caṛhao ocoakatʼtińạ. Ńelme, onko do cetʼ lekako henosta akadińạ." 
Ezekiel8:18 Onatege iń do edre seṅgelte onko sãoteń beohara; ar mãyãte do bạń beṅgetʼakoa ar aṛakʼ hõ bạń aṛakʼkoa. Ar ińakʼ lutur ṭhen ãṭ aṛaṅteko ragrehõ bạń ańjomtakoa.” 
Ezekiel9:1 Ona tayom Isor do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoate roroṛiń ańjomkedea, “E nagrahako jarkhar reakʼ kạmire bahal akan hoṛko, ape do maraokʼ reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako nonḍe ạguiytape.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Unre utạr secʼ reakʼ cetan ṭhạ̃i reakʼ phaṭok duạr secʼ khon turui hoṛ hijukʼkan iń ńelketʼkoa; onko mimitʼkoakʼ tire do maraokʼ reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako tahẽkana. Onko sãote mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ mitʼṭen hoṛe tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ ḍanḍare do olokʼicʼakʼ doat kạli hõ tahẽkana. Onko do bhitrite bolokate pitạl reakʼ pinḍ ṭhenko teṅgoyena. 
Ezekiel9:3 Unre Israelren Isorakʼ oka ṭhonok do Kerubkin cetanre tahẽkan ona do onḍe khon rakapʼente mundil reakʼ duạr ganaḍe ṭhene senena. Ar Probhu Isor do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ uni hoṛe hohowadea. 
Ezekiel9:4 Uni doe metadea, “Am do Jerusalem nagraha talate parom calakʼme ar ona talare okako bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi hoyakan ar ona iạte okoeko kũhrạuetʼkan onkoakʼ moloṅre mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ emakom.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Ona tayomiń ańjomkeda uni do onko turui hoṛe metakokana, “Ape do nagraha talate uni pańja idiyepe ar jãhãn daya mãyã baṅkate hoṛpe gocʼkoa, ar okoege alope aṛakʼkoa." 
Ezekiel9:6 Haṛamko, juạnko, juạniko, maejiuko, ar kạṭicʼ gidrạko jotope gocʼkoa, menkhan okoekoakʼ moloṅre cinhạ menakʼ onko do alope joṭetʼkoa. Mundil khonge ona do ehobpe.” Onate onko do mundil samaṅre okoe murubbiko tahẽkan onko hoteteko ehopʼkeda." 
Ezekiel9:7 Ona tayom Isor do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Gocʼ hoṛkote bakher raca perejpe ar mundil do bhonḍpe. Do calakʼpe, ar kạmipe.” Onate onko doko oḍokente nagrahate senkate hoṛ gogocʼko ehopʼena." 
Ezekiel9:8 Unre iń do mundilre eskargeń tahẽkana. Ar ona jokhecʼ iń do ombakʼkateń menkeda, “Hae, Probhu Isor! Jerusalem cetanre amakʼ edrem dulte cetʼ Israelren sarecʼ sanam hoṛkom marao giḍikoa?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛadińa, “Israel ar Jihudạren hoṛkoakʼ ghạṭ do ḍhergetakoa; disạm do mãyãmte perecʼ akana ar nagraha do bedhorom kạmire unumakana. Onkoko meneda, ‘Probhu Isor do noa disạme bạgi akawada: onate uni do noako bae ńeletʼkana.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Ona iạte onko do mãyãte bạń beṅgetʼakoa, ar aṛakʼ hõ bạń aṛakʼkoa; ar okako cekayetʼ ona reakʼ kuṛại do onkoreń dula.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Tayomte mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ uni hoṛ do ruạṛ hecʼkate noa khobore emena, “Iń do amakʼ hukum lekageń kạmi akada.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Ona tayom beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda, ar Kerubkoakʼ bohokʼ cetan secʼre okaṭakʼ aṭetʼ tahẽkan ona cetanre nilkanto dhiri reakʼ siṅghạson lekań ńel ńamkeda." 
Ezekiel10:2 Probhu Isor do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼe horokʼ akatʼ hoṛe metadea, “Kerubko latarre okaṭakʼ pạihạ̃ko menakʼ am do onako talare calakʼme. Ar onko Kerubko talare tahẽkate am do ańjlete perecʼ aṅgra seṅgel hataome ar nagraha cetanre chiṭiạugotʼkam.” Ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege uni hoṛ do onḍeye boloyena." 
Ezekiel10:3 Unre Kerubko do mundil reakʼ dạkhin secʼreko teṅgo akan tahẽkana, ar bhitri raca do rimilte perecʼena." 
Ezekiel10:4 Un jokhecʼ Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do Kerubko khon rakapʼkate mundil reakʼ duạr ganaḍe secʼ senena. Ar mundil oṛakʼ do rimilte perecʼena, unre Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ marsalte raca do perecʼena." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kerubkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ reakʼ saḍe do raca hạbicʼ ańjomokʼkan tahẽkana; ona saḍe do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ roroṛkan aṛaṅ lekage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel10:6 Probhu Isor do tinre mĩhĩ mushnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ hoṛ noae hukumade tahẽkana, “Am do Kerubko talare pạihạ̃ khon seṅgel hataome,” Unre uni hoṛ do bhitrite bolokate mitʼṭecʼ pạihạ̃ aṛereye teṅgoyena." 
Ezekiel10:7 Kerubkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre manwa ti leka tahẽkana, onate Kerubko modre mitʼṭecʼ do ạkin tala reakʼ seṅgel secʼ tiye tiyạrkeda. Uni do thoṛa seṅgel hataokate one mĩhĩ mushnạ kicricʼe horokʼ akatʼ hoṛakʼ tireye caladea. Ar uni do ona hataokateye oḍok calaoena." 
Ezekiel10:8  
Ezekiel10:9 Ona tayom iń do Kerubko secʼ iń beṅgetʼketʼ khan onko aṛere mitʼṭecʼkate jotote ponea pạihạ̃ń ńel ńamkeda; pạihạ̃ko do Boidurjomoni dhiri leka jhak jhakaokʼkan tahẽkana. Ona ponea pạihạ̃ do ńelokʼte mitʼ muṭhạnge tahẽkana; mitʼṭecʼ pạihạ̃ bhitrire ar mitʼṭecʼ pạihạ̃ menakʼ leka. 
Ezekiel10:10  
Ezekiel10:11 Ar calakʼ jokhecʼ ona pạihạ̃ko do beṛhaete jãhã secʼge sojhete calakʼkan tahẽkana; ar eṭakʼ secʼ do baṅ ạcurokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar onako do Kerubkoakʼ bohokʼ oka secʼre tahenkan tahẽkan ontege calakʼkan tahẽkana; ar calakʼ jokhecʼ do baṅ ruạṛkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel10:12 Onkoakʼ ponea pạihạ̃re, goṭa hoṛmore, deare, tire ar phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko beṛhaete do mẽtʼkote perecʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ińiń ańjomkeda pạihạ̃ko do “ạcurokʼ pạihạ̃” mente ńum ocokʼkana. 
Ezekiel10:14 Onko mimitʼkoakʼ do poneakate mẽtʼãhã tahẽkana, pạhilakʼ do Kerub leka, dosarakʼ do manwa leka, tesarakʼ do dhạcri kul leka ar ponakʼ do pajhaṛ leka." 
Ezekiel10:15 Ona tayom onko Kerubko do cetan secʼko rakapʼena. Nokoge onko jiwetʼ jiwiyanko, okoe do Kebar gaḍa aṛereń ńelletʼko." 
Ezekiel10:16 Kerubko tinreko calakʼkan tahẽkana unre onko aṛe reakʼ pạihạ̃ko hõ calakʼkan tahẽkana; Kerubko do tinre ot bạgikate coṭte rakabokʼ lạgitʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko lap lapayetʼ tahẽkana unre pạihạ̃ko do onko aṛerege tahenkan tahena. 
Ezekiel10:17 Kerubkoko teṅgolen khan onako hõ teṅgokʼkan tahẽkana ar Kerubko rakapʼlen khan onko sãote pạihạ̃ko hõ rakabokʼkan tahẽkana, ente onko jiwetʼ jiwiyankoakʼ jiu do onakore tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do mundil reakʼ duạr ganaḍe cetan khon calaoente Kerubko cetanre thamgạḍiyena. 
Ezekiel10:19 Ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege Kerubko do phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko lap lapaketʼte cetante rakabokʼko ehopʼena, ar pạihạ̃ko hõ onko sãote sãote calao idiyena. Onko do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ purub phaṭok duạr bolokʼ horre senkateko teṅgoyena; ar Israelren Isorakʼ ṭhonok do onko cetanre tahẽyena." 
Ezekiel10:20 Noko jiwetʼ jiwiyanko do Kebar gaḍa aṛere Israelren Isorakʼ siṅghạson latarreń ńelletʼkoa, ar onko jeko Kerubko kan ona doń bujhạu daṛeada." 
Ezekiel10:21 Onko mimitʼkoakʼ do poneakate mẽtʼãhã ar poneakate phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽkana ar onkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ latarre do manwa ti leka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel10:22 Kebar gaḍa aṛere iń cetʼ lekań ńelletʼ onkage onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do tahẽkana. Onko mimitʼko do samaṅ secʼ sojheteko calakʼ kan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel11:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isorren Jiu do ińe tul rakapʼ idikedeńte mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ purub secʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhene ạgukedińa. Onḍe phaṭok duạr bolokʼ horre do bargel mõṛẽ goṭen herel hoṛko tahẽkana, ar iń do onko talare Asurren hopon Jasaniạ ar Benayaren hopon Pelatiạ tekiniń ńelketʼkinạ; unkin do hoṛkoren mukhiyạkin tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel11:2 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, noko kangeako onko hoṛ okoe do nagraha talare bạṛicʼakʼko hudisetʼkan ar bạṛicʼ sopolhako emokʼkan tahẽkan." 
Ezekiel11:3 Onkoko meneda, ‘oṛakʼ duạr benao reakʼ okte do cetʼ baṅ hoyakana? Noa nagraha do utu reakʼ celaṅ kana ar abo do jel kanabon.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Onate E manwa hopon, am do noko upạrte nạbi lekate katha roṛme, hẽ, nạbi lekatege baṛe katha roṛme.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Ona tayom Probhu Isorren Jiu do ińreye hecʼena, ar noa katha lạlạiye metadińạ, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘E Israelko, ona kathape roṛeda, menkhan apeakʼ monre cetʼ menakʼ ona doń baḍaegea." 
Ezekiel11:6 ape do noa nagraharen ḍher hoṛpe gocʼ akatʼkoa ar onkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩkote kulhipe perecʼ akada.’ 
Ezekiel11:7 “Ona iạte Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, ‘sạrige noa nagraha do utu teakʼ celaṅ kana, menkhan okoeko hoṛ do nagraharepe gocʼ akatʼko onko kangeako jel do; ar onḍe khon iń doń laga oḍokpea." 
Ezekiel11:8 Okaṭakʼ tarwaṛepe botorakʼ kan ona tarwaṛege ape upạrteń ạguiya. 
Ezekiel11:9 Iń do nagraha khon okoń laga ńirkote bidisiạkoakʼ tireń soprotkoa ar apeń sạjạipea. 
Ezekiel11:10 Ape do lạṛhạirepe gujukʼa; ar Israelakʼ simạnare sanamkoń sạjạipea. Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. 
Ezekiel11:11 Niạ nagraha do ape lạgitʼ celaṅ baṅ hoyokʼa ar ape hõ onaren jel do bape hoyokʼa; iń do Israelakʼ simạnare sanamkoń sạjạipea. 
Ezekiel11:12 Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. Ińakʼ niạm leka ape do bape calao akana se ińakʼ ạn ạriko bape manao akada bickom ape beṛhaeten jạtrenkoakʼ niạm lekatepe calao akana.’ ”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Iń do nạbi lekate tinre kathań roroṛkan tahẽkana unre Benayaren hopon Pelatiạ doe gocʼena. Unre iń do ombakʼkate ãṭ aṛaṅteń menkeda, “Hae, Probhu Isor! Am do cetʼ Israelren sarecʼ sanam hoṛkom marao cabakoa?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel11:15 “E manwa hopon, amren boehako, am apnarren hoṛko, metakʼme bondi dosare menakʼko sanam Israelko reaṅ Jerusalemren hoṛko meneda, ‘onko do Probhu Isorakʼ disạm khon sạṅgińteko calao akana; noa disạm do ạidạri lekate aboge bon em ocoakana.”" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Ona iạte iń Probhu Isor okań menetʼkan ona do amren hoṛkom metakoa, iń do eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareń kol akatʼkore hõ ar disạm disạmreń chirchạtur akatʼkore hõ enhõ onko okako disạmteko senakan onḍehõ thoṛa ghạṛicʼ lạgitʼ ińge onkoren sonot ṭhạ̃iyiń hoyakana." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Onate am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko tala khon ińgeń jarwa mitʼkoa; ar okako disạmreko chirchạtur akan onḍe khoniń ruạṛ ạgukoa ar Israel disạm do arhõ onkogeń ruạṛkatakoa." 
Ezekiel11:18 “Onko do onḍe ruạṛ senkate sanam bạṛicʼ boṅga murhutʼko ar hirkhạwan boṅga muṭhạnkoko sạṅgiń giḍikakoa. 
Ezekiel11:19 Iń do nonkan ontoriń emakoa onko do eken iń secʼge bul akanko tahena, ar iń do onko talare nãwã Jiu iń emakoa; ar onkoakʼ keṭecʼ ontor ocokʼkate norom ontoriń emakoa." 
Ezekiel11:20 Enḍekhan onko do ińakʼ niạm lekako calakʼa ar ińakʼ ạn ạriko joton salakʼko palona. Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel11:21 Menkhan okoeyakʼ ontor do bạṛicʼ murhutʼ ar hirkhạwan boṅga muṭhạnko secʼge menakʼa, onkoakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại do onkoregeń dula. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń roṛeda.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Ona tayom Kerubko do akoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼko lap lapakeda; ar onko aṛere ona pạihạ̃ko tahẽkana, ar Israelren Isorakʼ ṭhonok do onko cetanre tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel11:23 Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do nagraha tala khon rakapʼente nagraha purub secʼakʼ buru cetanre senkate thirena. 
Ezekiel11:24 Ona tayom Isorren Jiu do ińe tul rakapʼ kedińa ar uni emakʼ dorson talate arhõ Babelre bondi akanko ṭhene seṭerkedińa. Ar okaṭakʼ dorson iń ńelletʼ ona tayom ona do cabayena. 
Ezekiel11:25 Probhu Isor okakoe udukʼ ạḍiń ona jotoge iń do bondi akanko ṭheniń lại jạhirkeda. 
Ezekiel12:1 Tayomte Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen hecʼena," 
Ezekiel12:2 “E Manwa hopon, am do mitʼṭen huhulkan jạtrenko talarem girobasokʼ kana. Onko do mẽtʼ menakʼgetakoa menkhan bako ńeńel kana, lutur menakʼgetakoa menkhan bako ańjomeda, ente onko do mitʼṭen huhulkan jạtren kanako." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Onatege E manwa hopon, am do sạṅgińtem bondi idi ocokʼkana ar onkage amakʼ jinisko hõ samṭaotam ar onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅte siń marsalrege oḍokokʼme; ar okare menam onḍe khon eṭakʼ jaegate calakʼme. Pasecʼ onko do mitʼṭen huhulkan jạtren hoṛ kanako menteko bujhạu daṛeakʼa." 
Ezekiel12:4 Sạṅgińte bondi idi ocokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ samṭaoakʼ jinisko do siń marsalrege onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅtegem oḍok idiya. Ona tayom ạyupʼ jokhecʼ sạṅgińte bondi idi ocokʼ leka onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅtem oḍokokʼa. 
Ezekiel12:5 Onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege pạcri bhit bhugạkʼkate ona talate jiniskom oḍok idiya. 
Ezekiel12:6 Jinisko do onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege amakʼ tarenrem ladejoṅa ar ńutrege onakom oḍok idiytama. Amakʼ mẽtʼãhã dom betʼ esetʼkatama jemon amakʼ disạm reakʼ ot alom ńelńam, ente Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ am do mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ lekageń hoyocoakatʼmea.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Iń okań hukum ocoyen ona lekage iń doń kạmikeda. Sạṅgińte bondi idi ocokʼ leka ińakʼ jinisko do siń marsalregeń oḍok ạgukeda. Ona tayom ạyupʼ jokhecʼ tite pạcri bhitiń la bhugạkʼkeda. Ar onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege ińakʼ jinisko do tarenre ladekateń mohnḍayena. 
Ezekiel12:8 Setakʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel12:9 “E manwa hopon, huhulkan Israel jạtrenko do cetʼ bako kuliletʼmea, ‘cetʼem ceka kana mente?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Niạ cinhạ do Jerusalemren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ ar onḍenko Israelko lạgitʼ kana.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Am do onkom metakoa, onko ṭhen do mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ kanam mente. Am cetʼ lekam cekaketʼ, onkore hõ onkage hoyokʼa. Onko do bondikate sạṅgiń disạmteko idi ocokʼa." 
Ezekiel12:12 “Onko talaren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do ńutre acʼakʼ jinisko tarenre ladekateye oḍokokʼa ar pạcri bhit do kholao bhugạgokʼa jemon ona talateye oḍok hecʼ daṛeakʼ. Uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼe betʼ esetʼtaea jemon acʼakʼ disạm reakʼ ot bae ńelńam. 
Ezekiel12:13 Iń do uni lạgitʼ jhạliń oḍaoa ar uni do ińakʼ pạsireye sabokʼa. Ar uni do Babelrenkoakʼ disạmteń idiyea, menkhan ona do bae ńela; uni do onḍegeye gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel12:14 Uni beṛhaete sanamko, metakʼme uniren kạmiyạko ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do beṛhaeteń chirchạturkoa ar tarwaṛeteń lagakoa." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Iń do tinre jạt jạtrenko ar disạm talareń chirchạturkoa unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa ińkangeạń Probhu do Isor. 
Ezekiel12:16 Menkhan onko talaren adom hoṛ do lạṛhạite, akalte ar mahamạri reakʼ ti khoniń bańcaokoa, jemon jãhãregeko calakʼ onḍege jạt jạtrenko talare akoakʼ joto hirkhạwakʼ kạmi reakʼ kathako aṅgoc. Onate onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel12:18 “E manwa hopon, am do botorte thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ jom ar ńũiyme." 
Ezekiel12:19 Ar disạmren hoṛkom metakoa, Israel disạm reakʼ Jerusalemren hoṛko reaṅ Probhu Isor doe meneda, ‘onko do botor botorte akoakʼ jomakʼko joma ar nisạsate dakʼko ńũiya, ente onḍenko hoṛkoakʼ santao khạtirte onkoakʼ disạm do ujạṛokʼa." 
Ezekiel12:20 Hoṛte perecʼ nagrahako do dhaṅdhaserokʼa ar disạm do ujạṛokʼa. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel12:22 “E Manwa hopon, Israel disạmre noa do cetʼ lekan katha kana, ‘din do parom calakʼ kana ar mimitʼ dorsonko do ạuṛiyakʼ hoyokʼ kana?’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Onkom metakoa Probhu Isore menetʼ kana, ‘ińge ona calao hijukʼkan katha doń bạtil gotʼkakʼa; Israelakʼ ona katha do ar okoehõ bako roṛa.’ Ona bodolte onkope metakoa, ‘din seṭer akana, ńitokʼ do mimitʼ dorsonko sạriyagokʼa." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israelren hoṛko talare eṛe dorson ar kusi ocokʼ reakʼ gona-poṛa do ar baṅ tahena. 
Ezekiel12:25 Unre iń Probhu Isor okaṭakʼ iń roṛ onage purạukʼa, ar baṅ bilomokʼa. E huhulkan jạtrenko, iń okań roṛetʼ ona do apeakʼ okteregeń purạu ocoya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Tayomte Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel12:27 “E manwa hopon, Israelkoko meneda, am okaṭakʼ dorsonem ńelakatʼ ona do ńitʼ khon ḍher bochor tayom reakʼ katha kana, ar okaṭakʼ nạbi katham roṛetʼ ona do tayom daramakʼko reaṅ kana." 
Ezekiel12:28 Onate onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼ kana, ‘ińakʼ jãhãn kathage purạukʼ do baṅ bilomokʼa; iń okań men ona doń hoeocoygea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel13:2 “E manwa hopon, Israelren okoe nạbiko do ńitokʼ kathako roṛetʼkan onko upạrte am do nạbi lekage katha roṛme. Okoe akoakʼ mongoṛa katha lekako nạbiyetʼkan onkom metakoa jemon onko do Probhu Isorakʼ kathako ańjom." 
Ezekiel13:3 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Hae, onko bebuj nạbiko do, okoe do jãhãn dorson baṅ ńamkate hõ ạuṛiyakʼte nạbi kathako roṛetʼkan." 
Ezekiel13:4 E Israel, amren nạbiko do dhaṅdhaser talare toyo lekan kanako." 
Ezekiel13:5 Onko do Israel jạtrenkoakʼ pạcri bhit jut aroe lạgitʼ onḍe do bako rakapʼ akana jemon Probhu Isorakʼ dinre lạṛhại oktere ona do kajakte teṅgo akae tahen. 
Ezekiel13:6 Onkoakʼ dorson do eṛegea ar onkoakʼ gona-poṛa hõ sạriyakʼ do baṅkana. Onkoko meneda, iń do noa kathań meneda, onko do bạń kol akatʼkoa; enhõ onko doko asokʼkana onkoakʼ katha do purạukʼtakoa." 
Ezekiel13:7 Onko do cetʼ eṛe dorson bako ńeleda ar eṛe gona-poṛa bako kạmiyetʼ kana? Onko doko meneda, iń do noa kathań meneda, menkhan iń do bạń roṛakada." 
Ezekiel13:8 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, onkoakʼ eṛe katha ar eṛe dorson lạgitʼ iń do onko upạrte minạńa." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ińakʼ ti do onko nạbiko upạrte rakabokʼa okoe do eṛe dorsonko ńeletʼkan ar eṛeyakʼko gona-poṛayetʼkan. Ińren hoṛkoakʼ somajre onkoakʼ ńutum do baṅ tahena, ar Israel disạmre hõ onko do bako ruạṛ hecʼ daṛeakʼa. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel13:10 “ ‘Tinre jãhãn suluk baṅ tahena unre nạbikoko mena, suluk menakʼgea, ar nonkate onko do ińren hoṛko bạṛicʼ horteko idikoa. Onko do hoṛko gathao rakapʼ akatʼ nonkan pạcri bhit cetanre cunteko potao akada one oka do kajakakʼ baṅkan." 
Ezekiel13:11 Ona iạte okoe noako kạmikan onkom metakoa, ona pạcri bhit do lạnduṛokʼa. Jhar jhare daga ar lạṭu lạṭu arelko ńurokʼa ar birbão hoeko hijukʼa." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ona pạcri bhit tinre lạnduṛ ńurokʼa unre hoṛko do cetʼ bako kulikoa, okaṭakʼ pạcri bhit do cunteko potao esetʼletʼ ona cun do okayena?" 
Ezekiel13:13 “ ‘Iń do edrete ińakʼ birbão hoeyiń hoeocoya. Ińakʼ edre ar khĩste lạṭu lạṭu arel ar jhar jhar dakte onań marao giḍikakʼa. 
Ezekiel13:14 Nạbiko okaṭakʼ pạcri bhit do cunteko potao esetʼletʼ ona do rạputʼkate hasa sãoteń milạu gotʼkakʼa jemon ona reakʼ rehetʼ do oṭakʼge tahen. Ar ona rạputʼ ńurokʼ jokhecʼ onko hõ ona talareko marao utạrokʼa. Ar unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ona pạcri bhit ar ona okoe cunteye potao esetʼ akatʼ onko cetanre iń do ińakʼ edreń dula. Iń do hoṛkoń metakoa, ona pạcri bhit hõ bạnukʼa ar okoe cunte onako potaoletʼ tahẽkan," 
Ezekiel13:16 metakʼme Israelren onko nạbiko okoe do Jerusalemren hoṛko ṭhenko roṛletʼ ar suluk baṅ tahẽkanrehõ suluk reakʼ dorsonko ńelletʼ onko hõ bạnukʼkoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Ezekiel13:17 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am jạtren okoe maejiuko do nạbi lekate akoakʼ benaoakʼ kathako roṛetʼkan ńitokʼ onko upạrte teṅgokʼme. Am do onko upạrte noa katha roṛme," 
Ezekiel13:18 Probhu Isor doe menetʼkana, ‘Hae maejiuko! Ape ma hoṛkoakʼ tire lạgitʼ tạbijko ar bohokʼ ṭuṭuri lạgitʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jokha reakʼ kicricʼkope benaoeda jemon hoṛkope bos daṛeako. Ape do cetʼ ińren hoṛkoakʼ jiwipe hataoetʼtakoa ar apnarakʼ jiwi dope rukhiyạkana?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Mitʼ bar cuputʼ jao ar mitʼ bar goṭecʼ piṭhạ lạgitʼ ape do ińren hoṛko samaṅre ińpe besonot akadińạ. Ińren hoṛko, okoe do eṛe kathako ańjometʼ, onko ṭhen eṛe katha roṛkate okoe do gujukʼ lekko baṅkan onkope gocʼ ocoakatʼkoa ar okoe jiwetʼ tahen lekko baṅkan onko do jiwetʼpe doho akatʼkoa." 
Ezekiel13:20 “ ‘Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼ kana, ape okoe do tạbijkote cẽṛẽ leka hoṛkope sapʼetʼko iń doń onko upạrte minạńa. Apeakʼ ti khon onakoń topakʼ giḍikakʼa. Ar cẽṛẽ leka okoepe sapʼetʼko onko doń aṛakʼkakoa." 
Ezekiel13:21 Apeakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ ṭuṭuri kicricʼkoń oṛejtapea ar apeakʼ ti khon ińren hoṛkoń bańcaokoa; onko do apeakʼ tire sikạr leka ar do bako sabokʼa. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel13:22 Okoe dhorom hoṛko bạń duk ocoakawatʼko, ape do eṛe kathate onkope as chuṭạu ocoakatʼkoa ar dusṭạmi hoṛ dope cehao akatʼkoa jemon onko do jiwi bańcaotako lạgitʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon aloko ruạṛ hijukʼ." 
Ezekiel13:23 Ona iạte eṛe dorson do bape ńela ar gona-poṛa hõ bape gona-poṛaoa. Apeakʼ ti khon ińren hoṛkoń bańcaokoa. Unre apepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Israelren adom murubbiko do iń ṭhen hecʼkate iń samaṅreko duṛupʼena. 
Ezekiel14:2 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel14:3 “E manwa hopon, noko hoṛ do akoakʼ ontorre boṅga muṭhạnko bạisạu akawante kạire ńurokʼ lekan jinis ako samaṅreko dohoakada. Ona iạte iń ṭhen jãhãnakʼ reakʼko kulijoṅ khan onko do cetʼge bạń roṛ ruạṛakoa." 
Ezekiel14:4 Onate onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘jãhãe Israel acʼakʼ ontorre boṅga muṭhạn bạisạu iạte kạire ńurokʼ lekan jinis apnar samaṅreye dohoy ar ona tayom nạbi ṭhene hijukʼ, enḍekhan iń Probhu Isorge uniren ḍher boṅga muṭhạnko iạteń roṛ ruạṛaea." 
Ezekiel14:5 Israelkoakʼ ontor ńam ruạṛ lạgitʼge iń do noań onkaea, ente onko jotoge akoren boṅga muṭhạnko lạgitʼ ińko bạgi akadińạ." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Ona iạte am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼ kana, ‘mon ạcurtape. Aperen boṅga muṭhạnko khon ruạṛokʼpe ar hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko bạgiype." 
Ezekiel14:7 Jãhãe Israel hoṛ se Israel disạmre girobasokʼ kan jãhãe bidisiạ hoṛ iń ṭhen khone begarokʼ ar acʼakʼ monre boṅga muṭhạne bạisạute kạire ńurokʼ lekan jinis uni samaṅreye dohoy ar ona tayom iń ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼ jãhãe nạbi ṭhene hijukʼ, enḍekhan iń Probhu Isorge uni doń roṛ ruạṛaea." 
Ezekiel14:8 Iń do uni hoṛ upạrteń teṅgona ar uni do mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ ar mitʼṭecʼ kạhtukgeń hoeocoyea. Ar ińren hoṛko tala khon uniń ocokʼ giḍikaea. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel14:9 “ ‘Ar uni nạbi jãhãnakʼe roṛ ruạṛae enḍekhan baḍaeme, iń Probhu Isorge roṛ ruạṛ emokʼ lạgitʼ uniń bulạu akadea. Ona tayom uni nạbi upạrte tiyiń tultińạ ar ińren hoṛ Israelko tala khoniń marao giḍikaea." 
Ezekiel14:10 Unkin bana hoṛge behok reakʼ sạjạikin ńama; uni nạbi ar solha hatao lạgitʼe hecʼakan hoṛ banarge soman sạjạikin ńama. 
Ezekiel14:11 Unre Israelko do iń ṭhen khon bạṛicʼ horte bako calakʼa ar onkoakʼ sanam ghạṭkote apnar do bako besaphakʼa. Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar iń do onkoren Isorgeń hoyokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Ezekiel14:12 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa," 
Ezekiel14:13 “E manwa hopon, jãhã disạmren bepạtiạrakʼko kạmite iń reaṅko kại, ar iń do onko upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạrte ona lạgitʼ piṭhạ reakʼ jogao iń bond ocoy, ar onate akaliń kolte manwako ar janwarkoń maraoko," 
Ezekiel14:14 ar onko pene hoṛ, metakʼme Noha, Daniel ar Jobge, ona talareko tahen, enḍekhan, onko hõ akoakʼ dhorom iạte eken akoakʼ jiwigeko rukhiyạ daṛeketakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel14:14 ar onko pene hoṛ, metakʼme Noha, Daniel ar Jobge, ona talareko tahen, enḍekhan, onko hõ akoakʼ dhorom iạte eken akoakʼ jiwigeko rukhiyạ daṛeketakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel14:14 ar onko pene hoṛ, metakʼme Noha, Daniel ar Jobge, ona talareko tahen, enḍekhan, onko hõ akoakʼ dhorom iạte eken akoakʼ jiwigeko rukhiyạ daṛeketakoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Iń do ona disạmre bir janwarkoń dãṛã ạcur ocoko ar onko do onako jarkhar ar ona do nonkan ujạṛakʼ hoyokʼ, onko janwarko iạte onkate cele hõ bako parom sen daṛeakʼ," 
Ezekiel14:16 enḍekhan iń ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, onko pene hoṛ onḍeko tahẽlenre hõ onko do akoren gidrạko hõ ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. Onko do eken apnartetʼko rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa menkhan disạm do ujạṛ utạrakʼ hoykokʼa." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Iń do ona disạm upạrte tarwaṛe ạgukateń men, ‘disạm reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire lạṛhại hoyokʼma,’ ar iń do onaren hoṛko ar janwarkoń gocʼko." 
Ezekiel14:18 enḍekhan iń ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, ona talare onko pene hoṛko tahẽlenre hõ onko do akoren gidrạko hõ ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. Onko do eken apnartetʼko rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Ar iń do ona disạm talare mahamạriń kol ar onaren manwa ar janwarkoń gocʼ cabakote ińakʼ edre onko cetanreń dultiń," 
Ezekiel14:20 enḍekhan iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, Noha, Daniel ar Jobge ona talareko tahẽlenre hõ onko do akoren hopon se hoponerako hõ ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. Onkoakʼ dhorom iạte onko do eken apnartetʼgeko rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa." 
Ezekiel14:20 enḍekhan iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, Noha, Daniel ar Jobge ona talareko tahẽlenre hõ onko do akoren hopon se hoponerako hõ ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. Onkoakʼ dhorom iạte onko do eken apnartetʼgeko rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa." 
Ezekiel14:20 enḍekhan iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, Noha, Daniel ar Jobge ona talareko tahẽlenre hõ onko do akoren hopon se hoponerako hõ ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelekoa. Onkoakʼ dhorom iạte onko do eken apnartetʼgeko rukhiyạ daṛekokʼa." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Ńitokʼ iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼ kana, iń do tinre Jerusalemren manwa ar janwarko gocʼko lạgitʼ uni upạrte lạṛhại, akal, bir janwarko ar mahamạri noa ponea botoranakʼ sạjạiyiń kola unre tinạkʼ artetʼ bạṛicʼ hoyokʼa!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Enhõ onḍe adomko do jiwetʼko tahena ar onko doko oḍok ocokʼa. Onko do ape ṭhenko hijukʼa, ar tinre onkoakʼ bạṛicʼ sobhab ar kạmikope ńela unre Jerusalem cetanre muhiniń ạguiyre ape do jiwi raṛecʼpe ńama." 
Ezekiel14:23 Onkoakʼ sobhab ar kạmiko ńelte ape do jiwi raṛecʼpe ńama arpe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, ạuṛiyakʼte iń do jãhãnakʼ bạń cekaya mente. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel15:2 “E manwa hopon, darkha nạ̃ṛĩ do cetʼ bir reakʼ jãhãn dare nạ̃ṛĩ khon sorosgea?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Jạruṛokʼakʼ jãhãnakʼ benao lạgitʼ cetʼ ona khon kaṭ do hataokʼgea? Jinisko aka dohokakʼ lạgitʼ hoṛko do cetʼ onate gońjko benaogea? 
Ezekiel15:4 Sahan lekate seṅgelre khadlekakʼ tayom tinre banarsa aṛe lokʼa ar ona reakʼ talare khạurạukʼa unre ona do cetʼ jãhãn kạmire lagaokʼgea? 
Ezekiel15:5 Seṅgelre khadlekakʼ laharege jãhãnakʼ kạmire baṅ lagaokʼ khan enḍekhan lo khạurạulen tayom cetʼ onate jãhãnakʼ jinis do benaokʼa? 
Ezekiel15:6 “Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼ kana, bir reakʼ dareko talare menakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ cetʼ leka sahan lekate seṅgelreń jimạ akatʼ, onkage Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan hoṛko hõ seṅgeteń atar cabakoa." 
Ezekiel15:7 Iń do onko upạrteń teṅgona. Ar seṅgel khonko oḍoklenre hõ onko do seṅgelgeye jomkoa. Iń do tinre onko upạrteń teṅgona unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel15:8 Disạm do ujạṛakʼ iń hoeocoya, ente onko do bin pạtiạranko hoyakana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel16:2 “E manwa hopon, Jerusalem do acʼakʼ hirkhạwakʼko kạmi reaṅ baḍae ocoyem." 
Ezekiel16:3 Am dom mena, Probhu Isor do Jerusaleme metaekana, ‘amakʼ oṛakʼ ar amakʼ janam ṭhạ̃i do Kananren hoṛkoakʼ disạm khonakʼ kana; amren ạpum doe hoyokʼ kana Amori ar eṅgam do Hitti hoṛge." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ar oka hilokʼem janamlen enhilokʼ amakʼ bukạ do bako getʼletʼtama, dakʼte hõ bako ạrupʼ saphaletʼmea, hoṛmore buluṅ hõ bako gasaoatʼme tahẽkana ar kicricʼte hõ bako oyoletʼmea." 
Ezekiel16:5 Okoe hõ mãyãte bako beṅgetʼatʼme tahẽkana ar amre noako cekae lạgitʼ okoeyakʼ monre hõ daya do baṅ hecʼatʼko tahẽkana. Bickom ṭạnḍiregem giḍi ocoakan tahẽkana, ente oka hilokʼem janamlen enhilokʼ am dom hirkhạ ocolena." 
Ezekiel16:6 “‘Iń do am aṛeteń parom calakʼkan tahẽkan jokhecʼ amakʼ mãyãmrege khạṛupạṭukʼ kaniń ńelketʼmea. Ar unreń hukumatʼmea jemon amakʼ mãyãmrege jiwetʼem tahen. 
Ezekiel16:7 Am do khet reakʼ cara lekageń hara ocoketʼmea. Arem hara juạnena, amakʼ bạ̃skin hõ harayena, upʼ hõ harayentama, menkhan am do uluṅge ar begor kicricʼtem tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel16:8 “ ‘Iń do am aṛeteń parom calakʼkan tahẽkanre am secʼ beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda, amakʼ do dulạṛokʼ reakʼ okte hoyakantama; ona iạte ińakʼ kicricʼ reakʼ hĩs am cetanreń dapalketʼte amakʼ uluṅiń esetʼketʼtama. Iń do am ṭheniń kiriạyena ar am tulucʼ baplakʼ reakʼ iń bondoboskeda, ar onate ińrenem hoyena." 
Ezekiel16:9 Iń doń umketʼmea ar am khon mãyãmiń ạrupʼ giḍikada ar hoṛmore sunumiń ojokʼatʼmea. 
Ezekiel16:10 Ar likhon goṛhon kicricʼteń oyokatʼmea ar jaṅgare do takʼhas harta reakʼ mońj okocʼ panahiń horokʼatʼmea. Iń do mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼteń bedhaoketʼmea ar lumạṅ sutạm reakʼ kicricʼteń bandekatʼmea. 
Ezekiel16:11 Gohonakoteń sajaoketʼmea; tire sakom, hoṭokʼre mala," 
Ezekiel16:12 mũre mạkṛi, luturre pagra ar bohokʼre do napae okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ mukuṭiń horokʼakʼmea."
