Ezekiel16:13 Nonkate am do sona ar rupạtem saj ocoyena; amakʼ kicricʼko do mĩhĩ musnạ ar lumạṅ reakʼ likhon goṛhon kicricʼko tahẽkana. Amakʼ jomakʼ do mĩhĩ moeda, dumur rasa ar jạitun reakʼ sunumge tahẽkana. Am do ạḍitetʼem mońjena ar rạni hudạm ńamkeda." 
Ezekiel16:14 Amakʼ mońj iạte amakʼ ńutum do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talare pasnaoentama, ar am sajketʼme reakʼ purạ mahttoge ińakʼ tahẽkana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel16:15 “ ‘Menkhan am dom namḍakente amakʼ mońjtetʼrem bhorsayena arem laṭghaṭkeda. Ar jãhãege am aṛeteko parom calakʼkan tahẽkan uni sãotegem laṭghaṭetʼ tahẽkana ar amakʼ mońjtetʼ do uniyakʼge hoyokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel16:16 Am do amakʼ kicricʼkom hataoketʼte onol bonol boṭkocʼ thankom sajao benaoana ar onakorem laṭghaṭkeda. Menkhan amakʼ onkan kạmi do lek baṅ tahẽkantama. 
Ezekiel16:17 Ińakʼ sona-rupạte benaoakʼ gohnako, okaṭakʼ iń ematʼme tahẽkan, ona napae okocʼ gohnakote am lạgitʼ herel boṅga muṭhạnem benaoana ar onako sãotem loṭghuṭiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel16:18 Am do likhon goṛhon kicricʼkom horokʼetʼ tahẽkana ar onko boṅga samaṅre ińakʼ sunum ar dhupem jeretʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel16:19 Amakʼ jomakʼ lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ mĩhĩ moeda, jạitun sunum ar dumur rasakoń ematʼme tahẽkan ona do onko samaṅre jut so mosola lekam dohoyetʼ tahẽkana, arem onka idikeda. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼ kana." 
Ezekiel16:20 “ ‘Amren okoe hopon ar hoponerako iń lạgitʼ kukhirem janametʼko onko do jomakʼ lekate boṅgako ńutumtem samaṅ akatʼkoa. Amakʼ loṭghuṭi reakʼ kạmi do cetʼ ḍherge baṅ tahẽkana? 
Ezekiel16:21 Am do arhõ amren hopon ar hoponerako boṅga muṭhạnko ńutumtem teṅgenketʼkote seṅgelrem khadleketʼkoa. 
Ezekiel16:22 Ar amakʼ sanam hirkhạwakʼkote ar amakʼ laṭghaṭkote amakʼ kuṛi jokhecʼ reakʼ din do bam disạleda, bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi ar amakʼ loṭghuṭi talare am do amakʼ gidrạ pạṛiạ reakʼ katha hõ bam disạleda one tinre uluṅge ar eken hoṛmo apnarakʼ mãyãm cetanrem khạṛupạtu baṛaekan tahẽkan." 
Ezekiel16:23 “ ‘Hae, hae am do! Amakʼ noako dusṭạmi tayom hõ apnar lạgitʼ nagraha reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ phaelao ṭhạ̃ikore mitʼṭenkate boṅga muṭhạnem banao akawana." 
Ezekiel16:24  
Ezekiel16:25 Dobạṭiạkore hõ boṅga muṭhạnko benaokate amakʼ mońjtetʼ do hirkhawakʼgem hoyoco akada. Ar jãhãege am aṛeteye parom senakan unige amakʼ hoṛmom danaekan tahẽkante amakʼ loṭghuṭi reakʼ kạmim ḍher akatʼtama. 
Ezekiel16:26 Amren sor peṛa Misorrenko sãote hõm lạṭghaṭ akada ar amakʼ loṭghuṭi reakʼ kạmim ḍher idiyetʼte ińem khĩs ocoakadińạ. 
Ezekiel16:27 Ona iạte iń do am upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạrketʼte amakʼ sompottiń ạdhi akatʼtama. Amren bạiriko, metakʼme Philisṭikoren hoponerako, okoe do amakʼ hirkhạwakʼ sobhab iạtem lajao ocoakan onkoakʼ tireń soprot akatʼmea." 
Ezekiel16:28 Asurrenko sãote hõm loṭghuṭi akada, ente bam tirpitokʼkan tahẽkana; menkhan am do enrehõ bam tirpitlena." 
Ezekiel16:29 Ona tayom hõ am do amakʼ laṭghaṭem ḍher idiketʼtama ar bạnijkoakʼ disạm Babel sãote hõm laṭghaṭkeda, menkhan enhõ bam tirpitlena." 
Ezekiel16:30 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, am dom nicạṛ monan kana, ente mitʼṭen besorom kusumbi ạimại lekage noakom kạmikana." 
Ezekiel16:31 Am do kulhi mucạtʼ dobạṭiạkore than ghuṭukom benao joṅkana ar loṭghuṭi kạmikate hõ amakʼ kuṛại dom nihạ̃t giḍikakʼ kana. 
Ezekiel16:32 Am dom laṭghaṭicʼ era kana, am do amren jãwãe khon bin oprom hoṛge ḍherem kusiyako kana." 
Ezekiel16:33 Sanam kusumbikoge kuṛại doko ńamgea, menkhan am do amren sanam dulạṛiạko kuṛạiyem emako kana. Am sãote laṭghaṭ lạgitʼ jemon sanam ṭhạ̃i khon am ṭhenko hijukʼ ona iạte onko do ghusem emako kana." 
Ezekiel16:34 Onatege eṭakʼ kusumbiko khon am dom judạgea; am tulucʼ laṭghaṭ lạgitʼ cele hõ bako hecʼam kana. Ente am dom judạgea, ar ṭaka do bam hataoeda menkhan amge ṭakam emako kana.’ ”" 
Ezekiel16:35 E laṭghaṭicʼ maejiu, Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomme." 
Ezekiel16:36 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Laṭghaṭ kạmire am do amakʼ lajaoakʼem udukʼ akokante amakʼ uluṅ do amren dulạṛiạko ṭhenem sodoretʼkana. Amakʼ sanam hirkhạwakʼ boṅga muṭhạn lạgitʼ ar onko ńutumte amren hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ oka mãyãmem emakatʼ," 
Ezekiel16:37 ona iạte amren onko sanam dulạṛiạkoń jarwakoa one okoeko tulucʼem rạskạ mitʼlen. One okoeyem dulạṛletʼko tahẽkan ar okoeyem hirkhạwako kan tahẽkan onko sanamkoń jarwakoa. Iń do beṛhae khon am upạrteń jarwakoa ar onko samaṅre amakʼ kicricʼ iń bhạnduṛtama jemon onko do amakʼ lajaoteakʼko ńel daṛeatam. 
Ezekiel16:38 Okoe maejiuko laṭghaṭetʼkan ar okoe mãyãmko joroyetʼkan onko okaṭakʼ sạjạiko ńam am hõ ona sạjạigeń emama. Ińakʼ edre ar mon reakʼ jaljalao iạte am do gujukʼ sạjạiyiń emama. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ona tayom do amren dulạṛiạkoakʼ tireń soprotmea; onko do amren boṅga muṭhạnkoakʼ duṛupʼakʼko marao giḍikakʼa. Onko do amakʼ kicricʼko bhạnduṛtama ar amakʼ mońj mońj gohnako hataoa ar am do uluṅ ar laṅgaṭgeko bạgi oṭowama. 
Ezekiel16:40 Ar am upạrte mitʼ dol hoṛko uskạukoa; ar onko do dhiriteko tiń gocʼmea ar onkoakʼ tarwaṛeteko kaṭra kuṭrạmea. 
Ezekiel16:41 Onko do amakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko jeredtama ar ḍher maejiuko samaṅre amiń sạjạimea. Nonkate iń do amakʼ laṭghaṭiń mokoń ocoytama; ar amren dulạṛiạko do ṭaka poesa ar bam emakoa. 
Ezekiel16:42 Ona tayom am cetanre ińakʼ edre ar mon reakʼ khĩs do thirokʼtińạ. Ariń thirokʼa, ar bạń edrekʼa." 
Ezekiel16:43 “Am do amakʼ kuṛi pạṛiạ reakʼ dinko bam disạleda, bickom noako kạmikate ińem ạṛis ocokedińạ; ona iạte ińhõ amakʼ kuṛạiyiń emkatama. Amakʼ eṭakʼ sanam bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi sãote noa hirkhạwanakʼ kạmi hõ cetʼ bam juṭucʼ akawada?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Hoṛko do am reaṅ noa kathako mena, ‘Eṅgattetʼ cetʼleka hoponera hõ onkage.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Am do uni eṅgat hoṛren hoponera kanam, okoe acʼren jãwãe ar gidrạkoe hirkhạwatʼko; ar am do onkan kuṛi boeharen kuṛi boeha kanam, okoe ạkinren jãwãe ar gidrạko kin hirkhạwatʼko. Eṅgam do Hitti maejiue tahẽkana ar ạpum do Amori hoṛge." 
Ezekiel16:46 Ar ạjim do Samariạ kanae; one uni am khon utạr secʼre acʼren hoponerako sãoteye tahẽnkan. Amren bokom kuṛi Sodom; one uni do acʼren hoponerako sãote dạkhinreye tahẽnkan. 
Ezekiel16:47 Enrehõ am do unkinakʼ horkore taṛamte ar unkinakʼ hirkhạwakʼko leka kạmite do bam tirpitlena, bickom eken thoṛa ghạṛitege amakʼ sanam horkore unkin khon hõ bạ̃ṛtigem kharapena." 
Ezekiel16:48 Ińakʼ katha do sạrikana je, am ar amren hoponerako okaṭakʼpe kạmiakatʼ amren boeha kuṛi Sodom ar uniren hoponerako do tishõ onka bako kạmi akada. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel16:49 “Amren boeha kuṛi Sodomakʼ do noa kại tahẽkana, uni ar hoponerako do bạḍại tahẽkantakoa, ente onko do ḍher jomakʼ tahẽkantakoa ar khạtirjomako girobasokʼkan tahẽkana, menkhan onko do reṅgecʼ ar laṅgaṭ hoṛ bako goṛoako kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel16:50 Onko do bạḍạite perecʼko ar iń samaṅre hirkhạwakʼko kạmikan tahẽkana. Onate am cetʼ lekam ńeletʼkan onkage onko hõń sạṅgiń akatʼkoa. 
Ezekiel16:51 Am okakom kại akatʼ ona reakʼ adha hõ Samariạ do bae onka akada. Am do unkin khon hõ ḍher hirkhạwakʼ kạmikom kạmi akada. Ar amem kạmikan ńelte amren boeha kuṛikin do dhoromkin hudisokʼ kana. 
Ezekiel16:52 Amakʼ be-sonman do amge asen baṛae hoyokʼtama, ente amakʼ kạmiko do amren boeha kuṛikin secʼ gohae emetʼkana. Amakʼ kại do unkin khon hõ ḍher hirkhạwanakʼ kante am khon dhoromgekin hudisokʼkana. Onate am do lajaokʼme ar amakʼ be-sonman asen baṛaeme, ente am do amren boeha kuṛikin dhorom mentem sạbud ocoyetʼkinạ." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Iń do Sodom ar uniren hoponerako, Samariạ ar uniren hoponerako ar onko sãote amakʼ dosa hõ pạhil lekań ạcur ruạṛa." 
Ezekiel16:54 Onate am do amakʼ bemanotem dipil baṛaea ar amem kạmi akatʼ sanamakʼ iạtem lajao ocokʼa. 
Ezekiel16:55 Ar amren boeha kuṛikin Sodom ar uniren hoponerako do akoakʼ pạhil dosateko ruạṛokʼa ar Samariạ ar uniren hoponerako hõ akoakʼ lahateakʼ dosateko ruạṛokʼa. 
Ezekiel16:56 Am do amakʼ bạḍại reakʼ dinre amren boeha kuṛi Sodom dom landa-dhutʼaekan tahẽkana; 
Ezekiel16:57 ar unre amakʼ dusṭạmiko do baṅ sodor akan tahẽkantama. Ńitokʼ Aramren hoponerako ar uni aḍepaserenko, Philisṭi hoponerako, metakʼme am beṛhaeten okoe do amko hirkhạwamkan onko jotoge amko landa-dhutʼam kana." 
Ezekiel16:58 Am do amakʼ nilạjiạ ar amakʼ hirkhạwakʼ reakʼ kuṛạigem dipil baṛaea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa doń meneda. 
Ezekiel16:59 “Amakʼ kạmi lekage am sãoteń beohara, ente ińakʼ bondobosem rạputʼ akatʼte ińakʼ kiriạwakʼem nihạ̃t giḍi akada." 
Ezekiel16:60 Enhõ amakʼ thoṛa umerre am lạgitʼ oka bondobosiń doholetʼ ona doń disạigea ar am lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaejug reakʼ bondobosiń bandhaoa. 
Ezekiel16:61 Amren hoponera lekate am khon maraṅicʼ ar am khon huḍińicʼ boeha kuṛikiniń emama ar am do unkinem ataṅkinạ, unkin do amakʼ bondobos talare bạnukʼkinạ. Unre am do amakʼ colon reakʼ katham disạiya arem lajaokʼa." 
Ezekiel16:62 Am lạgitʼ ińakʼ bondobosiń bạisạua, arem baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel16:63 Iń do tinre amakʼ sanam behokakʼ iń ikại tama unre am do onako behok reakʼ katha disạitem lajaokʼa ar amakʼ bemanot iạte tishõ moca do bam jhijtama. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel17:1 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel17:2 “E manwa hopon, phen hotete Israelko lạiyakome," 
Ezekiel17:3 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Roṅ beroṅ jhạl jhạl ilte perecʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼante mitʼṭen maraṅ okocʼ pajhaṛ do Lebanonre hecʼkateye apʼena. Ar onḍenakʼ mitʼṭecʼ debdạru dare reakʼ coṭ utạr ḍạr reakʼ bale ḍoge ṭuṅgạcʼketʼte beparikoakʼ disạmte idikate beparikoakʼ nagrahareye rohoekeda." 
Ezekiel17:4  
Ezekiel17:5 Ona tayom uni do disom reakʼ pohako khon mitʼṭecʼ hataokate, gobrao hasareye rohoekeda. Ar aema dakʼ aṛere ona do sũṛũsucʼ dare lekae rohoekeda." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ona kahle do harayente alag balag otre pasnao idiyente mitʼṭecʼ nạ̃ṛĩ leka hoyena. Ar ona nạ̃ṛĩ reakʼ bale ḍog do uni pajhạṛ secʼge lawer idiyena, ar ona reakʼ rehetʼko do ot bhitri hạbicʼge. Nonkate ona do mitʼṭecʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ hoyena ar ona reakʼ kahleko oḍokente onare sakamkote perecʼena." 
Ezekiel17:7 “ ‘Menkhan onḍe do napṛakʼ napṛakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼan ar aema ilan mitʼṭen eṭakʼicʼ pajhaṛe tahẽkana. Ar ona nạ̃ṛĩ do onḍe khon dakʼ ńam lạgitʼ acʼakʼ rehetʼko ar ḍogko uni pajhaṛ secʼe lawerkeda. 
Ezekiel17:8 Aema dakʼ aṛe reakʼ bhage hasare uni doe rohoe ocoakan tahẽkana jemon uni do bale ḍogkoe oḍok ocoyte, joye sapʼ ocoy ar mońj okocʼ nạ̃ṛĩ hoyokʼ.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 “Am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘uni do cetʼe hara rakabokʼgea? Cetʼ uni do ona reakʼ rehetʼ bae or toda ar ona reakʼ thopako bae geda jemon rohoṛokʼ ar nãwã sagenakʼ sanam sakamko tolmojokʼ? Ar ona reakʼ rehetʼ sudhạ or totʼ giḍikakʼ lạgitʼ ḍher hoṛakʼ jạruṛ do baṅ lagaokʼa." 
Ezekiel17:10 Uni do mońjteye rohoe lenrehõ jiwetʼ do bae tahena. Ar okaṭakʼ jumireye hara rakapʼlen onḍe uni do puruạ reakʼ hoe iạteye tolmocʼ utạrokʼa.’ ” 
Ezekiel17:11 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Noko huhulkan jạtrenkom metakoa, ‘cetʼ noako reakʼ manetetʼ do bape bujhạueda? Babelren raj do Jerusalemte hecʼkate onaren raj ar onaren mukhiyạkoe hataoketʼkote Babelteye idiketʼkoa." 
Ezekiel17:13 Ona tayom uni do raj gharońjren mitʼ hoṛ tulucʼ bondobose bandhaoketʼte acʼ tabere tahen lạgitʼe kiriạ ocokedea. Uni do disạmren asol asol hoṛko sapʼkateye idiketʼkoa jemon ona rajosṭi do acʼ tabereye doho daṛeakʼ ar ona do daṛeanakʼ alo hoyokʼ menkhan bondobos lekate ṭikạu tahen. 
Ezekiel17:14  
Ezekiel17:15 Menkhan uni disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do sadom ar mitʼṭen maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko ńamko lạgitʼ Misorte goḍete kolkedete Babelren raj upạrteye hulkeda. Uni do cetʼe jitạukʼgea? Okoe nonkanakʼe kạmi uni do cetʼ rehaeye ńamgea? Kiriạ teakʼe rạputʼ lekhan uni do cetʼ rukhiyại ńamgea? 
Ezekiel17:16 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorge ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń menetʼkana, Khạṭige uni do uni rajakʼ ṭhạ̃ire, okoe uniye rajkede, one uniyakʼ kathae neṅghaoketʼ, one uniyakʼ bondobose rạputʼketʼ, uni ṭhenge, metakʼme Babelreye gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel17:17 Pharao do acʼren maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko ar aema gadel hoṛkoante lạṛhạire do bae goṛoaea. pinḍhạko upʼ rakabre ar gherao bhitko benaore aema hoṛko gocʼko lạgitʼ. 
Ezekiel17:18 Ente uni do bondobose rạputʼakada ar kiriại neṅghao akada. Uni tabere tahen reakʼe bondobosletʼre hõ noae kạmi akatʼte rehay do bae ńama. 
Ezekiel17:19 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń menetʼkana, uni do iń ńutumte kiriạkate onae neṅghao akada ar iń tabere tahen reakʼ bondobose rạputʼ akatʼte ona reakʼ kuṛạiyiń emaea." 
Ezekiel17:20 Iń do uni lạgitʼ jhạliń oḍaoa ar uni do ińakʼ pạsireye sabokʼa. Ar ińreye bepạtiạr akante uni do Babelteń idiyea ar onḍegeń sạjạiyea. 
Ezekiel17:21 Uniren lạṛhại phạdkoren soros utạrko do lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa ar sarecʼ lạṛhại phạdko do beṛhaeteko chirchạturokʼa. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Ińge debdạru dare reakʼ coṭ agal khon bale ḍog hataokate buru muthnireń rohoea." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel reakʼ usul buru cetanre ona khon ḍạrko oḍokokʼa ar jo bahakʼa; ar ona do mitʼṭecʼ napae okocʼ debdạru dare hoyokʼa. Joto lekan cẽṛẽko do ona reakʼ ḍạrre tukạko benaoa ar ona reakʼ umulreko tahena. 
Ezekiel17:24 Onate ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam darekoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge usul dare doń pheḍle ocoya ar pheḍle dare doń usula. Ińge hạriạṛ darekoń rohoṛ ocoya ar rohoṛ dare doń jiwetʼ ocoya. “Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda ar iń do onań onkaea.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Israel disạmre oka kạhtukpe menetʼkan ona reakʼ mane do cetʼkana, ‘Apatko jojo darkha joko jomkeda ar hoponkoakʼ ḍaṭa do khuruyen takoa?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Ińakʼ ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, Israelre noa katha do ar baṅ roṛogokʼa." 
Ezekiel18:4 Jiwetʼ sanam hoṛge ińren kanako, apat ar hopon banarge ińren kanakin. Jãhãegeye kại unigeye gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Jãhãe dhorom hoṛ hok ar ṭhikakʼe kạmi khan- 
Ezekiel18:6 ar buru cetan reakʼ than boṭkocʼkore bae jom-ńũi khan, se Israelkoren jãhãn boṅga muṭhạnko bae ḍobokʼako khan, ar aḍepaseren hoṛren oṛakʼ hoṛ bae bạṛicʼede khan, se candoteakʼ hoyokʼkantae maejiu sãote bae giticʼmidokʼ khan," 
Ezekiel18:7 ar okoehõ bae santaoetʼko bickom rin akatʼ hoṛ do bondhoke ruạṛkatae kan, ar bae kombṛoyetʼkan, menkhan reṅgecʼ hoṛko jomakʼe emakokan ar laṅgaṭkoe kicricʼetʼko," 
Ezekiel18:8 ar sudte ṭaka bae emako, behokakʼ khon acʼakʼ tiye akoṭetʼtae ar hoṛko talare hok reakʼe bicạretʼkan," 
Ezekiel18:9 ar ińakʼ niạm lekateye calakʼkan ar pạtiạr salakʼ ińakʼ ạn-ạrikoe palonetʼkan, enḍekhan uni hoṛ do sạrigeye dhoromgea; ar khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Menkhan, uni hoṛren do mitʼṭen sasantaoicʼ hopon menaetae. Uni doe mãyãm jokʼroyicʼkan ar eṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼkoe kạmikan one uniren apat do tishõ onka bae kạmiakatʼ. Uni do buru reakʼ than boṭkocʼkoreye jom-ńũiyetʼkan, ar aḍepaseren hoṛren maejiue bạṛicʼede," 
Ezekiel18:11  
Ezekiel18:12 uni do reṅgecʼ ar laṅgaṭkoe santaoetʼko are kombṛoyetʼkan ar bondhok jinisko bae ruạṛkatako kan, uni do boṅgakoe sewawakokante hirkhạwakʼe kạmikan;" 
Ezekiel18:13 uni do sudte ṭaka dhare emokʼkan ar bạ̃ṛti sude hataoetʼkan, enḍekhan uni hopon do cetʼ jiwetʼe tahena? Uni do jiwetʼ bae tahena. Uni do noa hirkhạwakʼe kạmi akatʼte khạṭigeye gujukʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ apnarge dạyireye paṛaokʼa." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Menkhan, uni hoṛren mitʼṭen hopon menaetae, ar uni do acʼren apattetʼakʼ sanam kạiko ńelkatere hõ onka bae kạmikan," 
Ezekiel18:15 uni do buru coṭ reakʼ than boṭkocʼkore bae jom-ńũiyetʼkan ar Israelren boṅgako bae sewawako kan, uni do aḍepaseren maejiu hõ bae bạṛicʼede ar okoehõ bae santaoetʼko, uni do rin iạte jãhãn bondhok bae hataoetʼ, ar bae kombṛoyetʼ ar reṅgecʼ hoṛ jomakʼe emaekan ar laṅgaṭicʼe kicricʼede," 
Ezekiel18:16  
Ezekiel18:17 ar reṅgecʼ orecʼko bae santaoetʼko ar jãhãn sudge bae hataoetʼ, menkhan ińakʼ ạn-ạriko lekae calakʼkan ar ińakʼ niạmkoe manaoetʼ, enḍekhan uni do apattetʼakʼ kại iạte bae gujukʼa; bickom khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa." 
Ezekiel18:18 Menkhan uniren apattetʼ do apnarakʼ kại iạtegeye gujukʼa, ente uni do jor julumkate ṭakae ạdạiyetʼ tahẽkana, boehawakʼ jiniskoe kombṛoyetʼ tahẽkana ar acʼren hoṛko talare behokakʼe kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Enhõ ape dope meneda, ‘apatakʼ dos iạte hopon do cedakʼ sạjại bae ńama?’ Uni hopon do hok ar dhorom reakʼe kạmi akada ar ińakʼ sanam niạmko joton salakʼe palon akada, onate khạṭige uni doe bańcaokʼa." 
Ezekiel18:20 Okoeye kại uni do khạṭigeye gujukʼa. Hopon do apatakʼ dos iạte sạjại ohoe ńamlea ar apat hõ hoponakʼ dos iạte bae sạjại ocokʼa. Dhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ dhorom kạmi reakʼ joe ńama ar bạṛicʼ hoṛ do acʼakʼ dusṭạmi reakʼ jogeye ńama. 
Ezekiel18:21 Menkhan mitʼṭen dusṭạmi hoṛ do acʼakʼ sanam kại khon ruạṛkate ińakʼ ạn-ạrikoe palonte hok ar dhorom reakʼe kạmi enḍekhan khạṭige uni doe bańcaokʼa, ar bae gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Uni okakoe kạmi akatʼ ona do ar bạń disạ dohokʼtaea. Ar dhorom reakʼ okakoe kạmi akatʼ ona iạte uni doe bańcaokʼa. 
Ezekiel18:23 Dusṭạmi hoṛakʼ gujukʼ iạte cetʼ iń doń kusikʼ kana? Bickom tinre uni do acʼakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ hor khon ruạṛkateye bańcaokʼa unrege iń doń kusikʼa. 
Ezekiel18:24 “Menkhan mitʼṭen hoṛ do acʼakʼ dhorom khon ruạṛkateye kại ar dusṭạmi hoṛko leka bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi enḍekhan uni do cetʼ jiwetʼe tahena? Unre uniyakʼ dhorom kạmi do ar bạń disạitaea. Uni do acʼakʼ bepạtiạr ar kại iạtege khạṭigeye gujukʼa. 
Ezekiel18:25 “Enhõ ape dope menetʼkana, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ hor do ṭhikakʼ baṅkana.’ E Israelko, ańjompe. Ińakʼ hor do cetʼ behok reakʼ hor kana? Ona do baṅa, bickom apeakʼ kangea behok reakʼ hor do." 
Ezekiel18:26 Mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛ acʼakʼ dhorom khon ruạṛkateye kại are gujukʼ, enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ kại gunạkʼteye gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Menkhan mitʼṭen dusṭạmi hoṛ acʼakʼ dusṭạmi khon ruạṛkate hok ar dhorom reakʼe kạmi, uni do acʼakʼ jiwiye bańcaotaea." 
Ezekiel18:28 Uni do acʼakʼ behok reakʼ katha hudiskate ona khone ruạṛ akante khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa, ar bae gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Enhõ apepe menetʼ kana, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ hor ṭhikakʼ do baṅkana.’ E Israelko, ińakʼ do cetʼ behok reakʼ hor kana? Behok reakʼ hor do apeakʼ kangea." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Ona iạte E Israelko, iń do ape mimitʼko apeakʼ colon lekateń bicạrpea. Ape do ruạṛpe, ar sanam behokakʼ kạmi khon mon ạcurtape; enḍekhan apeakʼ kại iạte ohope maraolena." 
Ezekiel18:31 Apeakʼ sanam ghạṭko ape khoniń sạṅgiń giḍikatapea ar apeakʼ mon ar ontor do nãwãte benao rakabtape. Cedakʼpe gujukʼa? 
Ezekiel18:32 Okoeyakʼ gujukʼtehõ iń do bạń kusikʼ kana. Ape do mon ạcurkate bańcaokʼpe. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel19:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Am do Israelren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ lạgitʼ homor halaṅme ar roṛme," 
Ezekiel19:2 ‘Dhạcri kulko talare amren eṅgam do soros utạr kule tahẽkana. Uni do juạn dhạcri kulko talareye giticʼkokʼ kan tahẽkana; ar acʼren hoponkoe jotonetʼko tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel19:3 Uniren mitʼṭen hopon doe harayente daṛeanicʼ dhạcri kule hoyena. Uni do janwarko sendrae cetʼkeda ar manwa jomkoe ehopʼena. 
Ezekiel19:4 Jạt jạtrenko do uni reaṅko ańjomkeda; Uni do onkoakʼ khạnreye sapʼena. Onko do mũre nakolkate Misor disạmteko idikedea. 
Ezekiel19:5 “ ‘Uni kul doe ńelkeda acʼakʼ as do baṅ purạulena; ar okaṭakʼe khojkan tahẽkan ona hõ baṅ hoylentaea; unre uni do acʼren ar mitʼṭen hopon daṛeanicʼe hoyocokedea. 
Ezekiel19:6 Uni hopon do dhạcri kulko talare ạcur baṛaete mitʼṭen daṛeanicʼ dhạcri kule hoyena. Uni do janwarko sendrae cetʼkeda ar manwako jojome ehopʼena. 
Ezekiel19:7 Uni do onkoakʼ gaṛkoe rạputʼkeda ar sanam nagrahakoe dhaṅdhaserkeda. Uniyakʼ hạnḍrạukʼ reakʼ aṛaṅte disạmren hoṛko botorena. 
Ezekiel19:8 Unre uni beṛhaeten jạtrenko do uni upạrteko rakapʼ hecʼena. Onko do uni lạgitʼ jhạliko oḍaokeda, ar uni do onkoakʼ khạnreye sapʼena." 
Ezekiel19:9 Onko do mũreko nakolkedete pińjrạreko bhoraokadea ar Babelren raj ṭhenko idikedea. Onko do gaṛreko aṭkao dohokadea; Israel reakʼ burukore uniyakʼ hạnḍrạukʼ reakʼ aṛaṅ do ar baṅ ańjomlena. 
Ezekiel19:10 “ ‘Amren eṅgam do dakʼ aṛere rohoe akan mitʼṭecʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ lekanae; aema dakʼe ńametʼ tahẽkante onare do ḍạr perecʼ jo tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel19:11 Ona reakʼ kahleko do keṭecʼge tahẽkana, disạm cakʼlaoicʼakʼ ḍanṭao reakʼ ṭheṅga leka. Ona nạ̃ṛĩ do cetante rakapʼente rimile tiyokʼkeda; onate sakamte perecʼ nạ̃ṛĩko do nońjorre paṛaoena." 
Ezekiel19:12 Menkhan Probhu Isor do edre onae or totʼketʼte otreye giḍikada. Puruạ reakʼ hoete ona do rohoṛena, ona reakʼ jo do goso ńurena; uniyakʼ keṭecʼ ḍạrko do rạputʼente rohoṛena, ar seṅgel do onae jomkeda." 
Ezekiel19:13 Ona do ńitokʼ hahaṅkarre, rohoṛre, khaṅgoṭ disạmre rohoe akana." 
Ezekiel19:14 Ona reakʼ mul nạ̃ṛĩ khon seṅgel do oḍokena; ar ona reakʼ ḍạr ar jokoe jomkeda. Disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ ṭheṅga lạgitʼ onare mitʼṭecʼ ḍạr hõ baṅ tahelena. “Noa do mitʼṭecʼ homor halaṅ kana; duk reakʼ sereń lekate noa do beoharokʼa.” 
Ezekiel20:1 Eaeakʼ bochor reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre Israelren adom murubbiko do Probhu Isorakʼ sana baḍae lạgitʼ iń ṭhen hecʼkateko duṛupʼena. 
Ezekiel20:2 Unre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen hecʼena," 
Ezekiel20:3 “E manwa hopon, am do Israelren murubbikom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ape do cetʼ iń ṭhen kulijoṅ lạgitʼpe hecʼakana? Ińakʼ ńutumteń menetʼkana, iń do bạń baḍae ocopea.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “E manwa hopon, am do cetʼ onkom bicạrkoa? Enḍekhan onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ bạṛicʼ colon reakʼ katha baṛe baḍae ocokome." 
Ezekiel20:5 Onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘oka hilokʼ Israeliń bachaolede enhilokʼ Jakob bõsren hoṛko ṭheniń kiriạlena ar Misorre onko ṭheniń sodorlena. Iń do kiriạkate onkoń metatʼko tahẽkana, ińkangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel20:6 Enhilokʼ onko ṭhen arhoń kiriạlena, Misor disạm khon onkoń oḍok ạgukoa ar onko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ disạmiń ṭhik dohoakatʼ ona disạmteń idikoa. Onḍe do toa ar dumur rasa ar jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼa; ona do sanam disạmko khon sorosgea." 
Ezekiel20:7 Onkoń metatʼko tahẽkana, okoe hirkhạwan boṅga muṭhạnko mońjko bujhạuletʼko onko do jemonko sạṅgiń giḍikako ar Misorren boṅgako hotete apnartetʼ hõ aloko besaphakʼ, ente iń kangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel20:8 “ ‘Menkhan onko do iń upạrteko hulkeda, ińakʼ katha ańjom do bako rạjilena. Okoe hirkhạwan boṅga murhutʼko bhageko hudisetʼko tahẽkan onko do bako sạṅgiń giḍiletʼkoa ar Misorren boṅga muṭhạnko hõ bako bạgiyatʼkoa. Onatege ińiń menkeda Misorre onko cetanre ińakʼ edre ar khĩs do onkoreń dula." 
Ezekiel20:9 Menkhan ińakʼ ńutum rukhiyại tiń lạgitʼ ona do bạń onka akada, jemon okoe jạtrenko talareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko ṭhen ińakʼ ńutum besonotakʼ alo hoyokʼ. Misor disạm khon Israelko oḍok ạgukate onko jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre Israelko ṭhen ińtetʼ geń sodorena." 
Ezekiel20:10 Misor khon onko do hahaṅkarteń oḍok ạguketʼkoa. 
Ezekiel20:11 Onko do ińakʼ niạmkoń ematʼkoa ar ińakʼ ạn-ạrikoń baḍae ocoketʼkoa; ar okoe onae manaoa uni do ona hotetege jione ńama. 
Ezekiel20:12 Iń ar onko talare cinhạ lekate jirạukʼmãhãń ematʼkoa jemonko baḍae daṛeakʼ je, iń Probhu Isorge iń ńutumteń begar dohoakatʼkoa mente." 
Ezekiel20:13 “Menkhan Israelren hoṛko do hahaṅkarre iń upạrteko hulkeda. Onko do ińakʼ niạm bako manaoleda ar ińakʼ okaṭakʼ ạn-ạri manao hotete manwa jionko ńam ona doko nihạ̃t giḍikada; ar iń emakʼ jirạukʼmãhã reakʼ sonottetʼ hõ bako rukhiyạleda. Onatege iń doń menkeda, onko cetanre ińakʼ edreń dulakote hahaṅkarrege onko doń marao giḍikakoa." 
Ezekiel20:14 Menkhan ińakʼ ńutum rukhiyại tiń lạgitʼ iń do ona bạń onkaleda, jemon okoe jạtrenko samaṅre onkoń oḍok giḍiletʼko onko ṭhen ińakʼ ńutum besonotakʼ alo hoyokʼtiń." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ona chaḍa ona hahaṅkarrege onko ṭheniń kiriạyena, iń emakʼ disạmge one okaṭakʼ disạmre toa, dumur rasa ar jãhãnakʼ reakʼ okulạnge bạnukʼ, okaṭakʼ disạm do sanam disạmko khon soros utạrge ona disạmte do bạń idikoa." 
Ezekiel20:16 Onko do ińakʼ ạn-ạriko nihạ̃t giḍiakada ar ińakʼ niạmko bạgi giḍiakada ar iń emakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãko reakʼ sonottetʼ do bako rukhiyạ akada, ente onkoakʼ ontor do boṅgako secʼge orokʼ kan tahẽkantakoa." 
Ezekiel20:17 Enhõ iń do daya reakʼ mẽtʼteń ńelketʼkote hahaṅkarre bạń marao utạrletʼkoa. 
Ezekiel20:18 Onḍe onkoren hoponko ar hoponerakoń metatʼkoa, onko jemon akoren hapṛamko leka aloko kạmi, onkoakʼ colon leka aloko calakʼma ar onkoren boṅga muṭhạnkote apnartetʼ aloko besaphakʼma." 
Ezekiel20:19 Iń do arhõń metatʼkoa, iń kangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do, onate jemon ińakʼ niạmko pańjae ar ińakʼ ạn-ạri lekako taṛam." 
Ezekiel20:20 Onko do ińakʼ jirạukʼmãhã reakʼ sonottetʼ jemonko rukhiyạ dohoy; onate iń ar onko talare ona do mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ leka tahena, ar onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel20:21 “ ‘Menkhan onko hoponko ar hoponerako do iń upạrteko hulkeda. Onko do ińakʼ niạm bako manaoleda ar okaṭakʼ ạn-ạri palon hotete manwa do jionko ńam onko do ińakʼ ona ạn-ạri manao secʼ do bako moneyada; onko do iń emakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãko reakʼ sonottetʼ bako rukhiyạleda. Onate onkoń metatʼkoa hahaṅkarre onko cetanre ińakʼ edreń dulakoa. 
Ezekiel20:22 Menkhan ińakʼ ti doń ocokʼketʼtińạ ar ińakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ ona do bạń onkaleda jemon sanam jạtrenko samaṅre onkoń oḍok ạguletʼko tahẽkan onko ṭhen ińakʼ ńutum do besonotakʼ alo hoyokʼ. 
Ezekiel20:23 Ona chaḍa hahaṅkarre iń do onko ṭheniń kiriạlena, aema jạtrenko ar disạmko talare onkoń chirchạturkoa," 
Ezekiel20:24 ente onko do ińakʼ ạn-ạri bako manaoleda, ińakʼ niạmko nihạ̃t giḍiakada, iń emakʼ jirạukʼ mãhã reakʼ sonottetʼ bako rukhiyạleda, ar akoren hapṛamkoren boṅga murhutʼkoge bhageko hudiseketʼkoa." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ona iạte okaṭakʼ bhageakʼ baṅkan ar okaṭakʼ niạm hotete jion bako ńam onako reakʼ tireń aṛakʼ giḍikatʼkoa. 
Ezekiel20:26 Pạhilko janam akan hoponko do seṅgelreko khadleketʼkoa, ar ona hoteteń bhõnḍ ocowatʼkoa jemoniń marao utạrko. Unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa je, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’" 
Ezekiel20:27 “Onatege E manwa hopon, am do Israelkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘aperen hapṛamko do bepạtiạu reakʼ kạmikote ińko henosta akadińạ." 
Ezekiel20:28 Okaṭakʼ disạm emako reakʼ iń kiriạlen onḍe idiko tayom onko do jãhãrege usul buru ar hạriạṛ dare buṭạko ńelketʼ onḍege janwarko samaṅketʼkoa. Onko do samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobkote ińko khĩs ocokedińạ. 
Ezekiel20:29 Unre iń do onkoń kuliketʼkoa ona usul ṭhạ̃itepe rakapʼ calakʼkan ona do cetʼkana?’ ” Teheń hõ onako ṭhạ̃i reakʼ ńutum do Bamah, metakʼme “Than boṭkocʼ.” ńutumtege menakʼa." 
Ezekiel20:30 Onatege Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Am do Israelkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘ape do cetʼ aperen hapṛamko leka apnartetʼpe bhonḍokʼa ar onkoren hirkhạwan muṭhạnkope sewawakoa?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Teheń hạbicʼ ape do aperen boṅgako ṭhen aperen hopon ar hoponerako seṅgelrepe samaṅetʼkote onko boṅgako hotete apnartetʼpe bhonḍokʼ kana. E Israelko, iń do cetʼ ape hoteteń kuli ocokʼa? Iń ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana, oka lekate hõ ińakʼ monsubạ do bạń baḍae ocopea." 
Ezekiel20:32 “ ‘Ape dope menetʼ kana, dhạrtiren eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛko lekape hoyokʼa okoe do kaṭ ar dhiri reakʼko pujạwakʼkan. Menkhan apeakʼ monre oka menakʼ ona do tishõ baṅ hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel20:33 Iń Probhu Isorge ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiyạrkate edreń dulapete ape cetanreń rajokʼa." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ ti tiyạrkate ar ińakʼ edre dul hotete aema jạtrenko tala khoniń ạgupea ar okako disạmrepe pasnao ocolen onḍe khon arhoń jarwapea. 
Ezekiel20:35 Jạt jạtrenkoakʼ hahaṅkarteń idipea ar onḍege ape tulucʼ samka sạṭi reakʼ bicạriń phanḍaoa. 
Ezekiel20:36 Misor disạm reakʼ hahaṅkarre aperen hapṛamko cetʼlekań bicạrletʼko onkage ape hõń bicạrpea. 
Ezekiel20:37 Ińakʼ ṭheṅga latarteń sen parom ocopea; ar ińakʼ bondobos reakʼ tonolreń aderpea. 
Ezekiel20:38 Ape modre okoe iń upạrteko hul onko doń sạṅgiń giḍikakoa. Ar onko okaṭakʼ disạmreko girobasokʼkan onḍe khoniń oḍok ạgukorehõ onko do Israel disạmre bako bolo daṛeakʼa. Unre apepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘E Israelko, iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, Do calakʼpe, ar senkate aperen boṅgako sewawakope. Menkhan tayomte khạṭige ińakʼ kathape ańjoma ar unre apeakʼ sandes ar boṅgakote ińakʼ sonot ńutum do ar bape besonota." 
Ezekiel20:40 Unre disạm talare ińakʼ sonot burure, Israel reakʼ usul burure, Israelren sanam hoṛ do ińko sewawạńạ ar iń do onḍe onkoń ataṅkoa. Onḍe iń do apeakʼ joto lekanakʼ sonot samaṅokʼakʼ, dan ar bhage bhage sandeskoń ataṅtapea." 
Ezekiel20:41 Iń do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko tala khon tinreń oḍok ạgupea ar okako disạmrepe pasnao akan onḍe khoniń jarwapea unre jut so mosola lekate apeń ataṅpea. Unre ape hotete jạt jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa iń kangeạń sonoticʼ do. 
Ezekiel20:42 Aperen hapṛamko ṭhen oka disạm emako reakʼ iń gokʼletʼ ona Israel disạmre apeń idipe tayom apepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel20:43 Onḍe apeakʼ lahateakʼ colon reakʼ katha ar okako kạmi hotete apnartetʼpe bhonḍlen onakope disạya ar apeakʼ sanam bạṛicʼ kạmiko iạte apnartetʼpe hirkhạjoṅa. 
Ezekiel20:44 E Israelko, iń do apeakʼ bạṛicʼ colon ar bạṛicʼ kạmi lekate ape sãote do bạń beohara, menkhan ińakʼ ńutum rukhiyại tiń lạgitʼ ape sãote bhageń beohara. Ar unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel20:46 “E manwa hopon, amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do dạkhin secʼ samaṅtam ar ona disạm upạrte katha roṛme ar onḍenakʼ bir upạrte nạbi katha roṛme." 
Ezekiel20:47 Ar dạkhin reakʼ bir do ińakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ metaeme. Unim metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do amre seṅgeliń salgaoa ar ona do amakʼ sanam berel ar rohoṛ dare nạ̃ṛĩkoe joma. Ona jolokʼkan seṅgel do bạṅ ĩṛĩjokʼa ar dạkhin khon utạr hạbicʼ sanam hoṛ do ona reakʼ lepʼteko khạurạkʼa." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ar sanam manwa jạtrenko ńela, iń Probhu Isorge ona doń salgao akada; ona do baṅ ĩṛĩjokʼa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Unre ińiń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, hoṛko iń reaṅko meneda, iń do eken phenkote noa doń roṛeda.”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa," 
Ezekiel21:2 “E manwa hopon, amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do Jerusalem secʼ samaṅkate koejoṅ oṛakʼ upạrte katha roṛme ar Israel disạm upạrte nạbi katha roṛme." 
Ezekiel21:3 Unim metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do am upạrte minạńa. Iń do khap khon ińakʼ tarwaṛeń oḍoka ar am tala khon dhorom hoṛ ar bedhorom hoṛ jotogeń gocʼkoa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Dhorom hoṛ ar bedhorom hoṛ sanamko gocʼko lạgitʼ ińakʼ tarwaṛe do khap khoniń or oḍoka ar dạkhin khon utạr hạbicʼ sanam hoṛkoń gocʼkoa. 
Ezekiel21:5 Unre sanam hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge khap khon tarwaṛeń oḍok akada; ar ona do baṅ doho ruạṛokʼa.”" 
Ezekiel21:6 “Ona iạte E manwa hopon, am do kũhrạukʼme, koṛam oṛejokʼ lekage ar hae nisạste onko samaṅre kũhrạukʼme." 
Ezekiel21:7 Onko do tinre amko kulimea, ‘cedakʼem kũhrạukʼ kana?’ Am dom mena, ‘okaṭakʼ sombat hijukʼkan ona lạgitʼ iń kũhrạukʼ kana. Unre sanamkoakʼ mon do udạsokʼa ar ti do lạbṛujokʼtakoa; onkoakʼ mon do latwagokʼa ar gunṭhi do nijor cabakʼtakoa. Probhu Isore menetʼ kana, ona do hijukʼkana; ar hoyokʼte hõ hoyokʼgea.’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel21:9 “E manwa hopon, am do noa nạbi katha roṛme, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘noa do tarwaṛe kana! Laser ar jhalkao akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛege!" 
Ezekiel21:10 Gogocʼ lạgitʼ ona do laser ocoakana, ar jhalkao akana ar bijli leka malkaokʼ kana.’ ” Israelkoko meneda, “Jihudạ reakʼ raj ṭheṅga iạte abo dobon rạskạkʼa; ona raj ṭheṅga do sanamakʼe nihạ̃t giḍi akada.”" 
Ezekiel21:11 Probhu Isor meneda, “Tarwaṛe do jhalkao ocoakana jemon beoharokʼ; ar gogocʼicʼakʼ tire emokʼ lạgitʼ ona do laser ar jhalkao ocoakana." 
Ezekiel21:12 E manwa hopon, ragme ar homor halaṅme, ente ona tarwaṛe do ińren hoṛko upạrte ar Israelren sanam mukhiyạko upạrtehõ kana. Onko do ińren hoṛko sãote tarwaṛe ṭhenko soprot ocoakana. Onate am do koṛam ceṭagtam." 
Ezekiel21:13 Noako biḍạu do hijukʼgea. Jihudạren raj jodi ińakʼ sạjạiye nihạ̃t gidikakʼ enḍekhan uni do cetʼe ṭikạu tahẽ daṛeakʼa? 
Ezekiel21:14 “Onate E manwa hopon, am do nạbi katha roṛme ar ti thayoyme. Ona tarwaṛe do bar dhao, se pe dhaoge hecʼ ocoge. Noa do gocʼ ocokʼko lạgitʼ, hẽ ḍherko gocʼko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛe kana; ona do beṛhaete onkoe gherao akatʼkoa." 
Ezekiel21:15 Iń do onkoakʼ sanam nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrkore noa gogocʼ reakʼ tarwaṛeń dohoakada jemon onkoakʼ mon do udạs cabakʼtako ar ḍher hoṛko gujukʼ. Hẽ, ona tarwaṛe do bijli leka malkaokʼa; ona do gogocʼ lạgitʼge laser ocoakana." 
Ezekiel21:16 E laser tarwaṛe, jojomti secʼ uyugme, ona tayom do leṅgati secʼge, ar jãhãsecʼgem samaṅ ontege uyugme." 
Ezekiel21:17 Ińhõ tiyiń thayoya ar ińakʼ jaljalaokʼ edreń tirpit ocoytińạ. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel21:18 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa," 
Ezekiel21:19 “E manwa hopon, Babel rajakʼ tarwaṛe calakʼ lạgitʼ barea horre cinhạ dohoyme, ona banar horge mitʼ disạm khon oḍok hijukʼa. Ar okare hor hạṭińente nagraha secʼ senakan onḍe do hor udug reakʼ khunṭi bidme." 
Ezekiel21:20 Tarwaṛe lạgitʼ Amonrenko do Raba nagraha upạrte calakʼ reakʼ mitʼṭen hor ar Jihudạ ar pạcrite esetʼ nagraha upạrte calakʼ lạgitʼ horre mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ dohoyme," 
Ezekiel21:21 ente Babelren raj do onakin barea hor reakʼ etohopʼ ṭhen dobạṭiạreye teṅgo akana bhao ocoy lạgitʼ. Uni do sare aṛaga, ar acʼren debotako ṭhene kulijoṅkana ar jãhãn janwarkoakʼ inboroteye biḍạu aṭkara." 
Ezekiel21:22 Uniyakʼ jojom ti reakʼ gulibãṭ do paṛao akana Jerusalem lạgitʼ, ona doe lạiyaekana lạṛhại andoṛ rakab lạgitʼ, phaṭok duạrko upạrte sobokʼ bhugạkʼakʼkoe jut aroe lạgitʼ, pinḍhạko upʼ rakab lạgitʼ, ghekʼrao buruńjko benao lạgitʼ." 
Ezekiel21:23 Jerusalemren okoe hoṛko do Babel raj tabere tahen lạgitʼko kiriạlen onko ṭhen noa gona-poṛa do ạuṛiyakʼge hoyokʼa, menkhan onkoakʼ dos reakʼ katha do onkoe disạ ocokoa are bondi idikoa." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, apeakʼ papko sodor akana; ar ona iạte apeakʼ ghạṭkope disạ ocoyetʼkana; ar ona iạtege apeakʼ ghạṭko do apeakʼ sanam kạmikore ńel ńamokʼkana, apepe disạ ocokʼkan iạte, ape do onko tirepe sapʼ ocokʼa." 
Ezekiel21:25 “E besonot ar Israelren dusṭạmi raj, amakʼ din do seṭer akana, amakʼ sạjại reakʼ okte do seṭer akana." 
Ezekiel21:26 Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, amakʼ dạhṛi raṛaetam, ar mukuṭ do bojtam. Ente cetʼleka tahẽkan onka do ar baṅ hoyokʼa. Usulakʼ do copodokʼa ar copodakʼ do usul ocokʼa." 
Ezekiel21:27 Dhaṅdhaser, dhaṅdhaser! Iń do noa jotogeń dhaṅdhasera! Ar sạriyakʼ reakʼ ạidạri okoeyakʼ menakʼtae uni ạuriye ruạṛ hijukʼ hạbicʼ noako do ar baṅ tahena. Iń do unige noakoń emaea." 
Ezekiel21:28 “E manwa hopon, am do nạbi katha roṛme, Amonrenko ar onkoakʼ henosta reaṅ do Probhu Isore meneda, ‘mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛe, mitʼṭecʼ tarwaṛe do gogocʼ lạgitʼ bocʼ akana; ona do jhalkao akana makʼrao lạgitʼ ar bijli leka malkaokʼ lạgitʼ." 
Ezekiel21:29 E tarwaṛe onko do am reaṅ ạuṛi dorsonko ńeńelkanre hõ ar am reaṅ ạuṛiyakʼko guniyetʼkanre hõ okoeko gocʼ ocokʼ onko bedhorom bạṛicʼkoakʼ hoṭokʼ am dom giḍi ocokʼa; ente onkoakʼ din do hecʼ paṛao akana, onkoakʼ sạjại reakʼ okte do seṭer akana." 
Ezekiel21:30 E Amonirenko, apeakʼ tarwaṛe do khapre bhorao ruạṛkakʼpe. Ar oka ṭhạ̃irepe sirjạulen, aperen hapṛamkoakʼ ona disạmre iń do apeń bicạrpea." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ińakʼ edre do ape cetanreń dula ar ape upạrte ińakʼ khĩs reakʼ seṅgeliń oṅa. Ar nonkan kurmutạha hoṛkoakʼ tireń soprotpea okoe do makʼrao kạmireko gạkhuṛge. 
Ezekiel21:32 Ape do seṅgel lạgitʼ sahan lekagepe hoyokʼa. Apeakʼ mãyãm do apeakʼ disạmrege jorokʼa ar ape dope hiṛiń ocokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Ezekiel22:1 Probhu Isor do arhõ ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel22:2 “E manwa hopon, am do cetʼ bicạr lạgitʼem sapṛaogea? Enḍekhan mãyãme joro ocoakatʼ niạ nagraha reakʼ baṛe bicạrme. Am do uniyakʼ sanam hirkhạwakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha baḍae ocoyem." 
Ezekiel22:3 Unim metaea, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘noa do ona nagraha kana, okoe do apnar talare mãyãm joro ocokate apnarakʼ sorbonase ạgujoṅa ar boṅga benaokate apnartetʼe bhonḍokʼkan." 
Ezekiel22:4 Mãyãmem joro ocoakatʼte am do dusim hoyakana ar boṅga benaokate besaphayicʼem hoyakana. Am do amakʼ dinkom sạt ạgu akatʼtama ar amakʼ ses okte do seṭer akana. Ona iạte jạt jạtrenko do amko landa dhutʼama ar sanam disạmrenko ṭhen do cigạrigeń hoyocomea. 
Ezekiel22:5 E besulukte perecʼ hirkhạwanakʼ nagraha, am do sor ar sạṅgińren sanamko amko landa-dhutʼama." 
Ezekiel22:6 “‘Ńelme, amre menakʼko Israelren cakʼlaoko do akoakʼ daṛe leka mãyãm joro ocoy lạgitʼko mone muruk akada" 
Ezekiel22:7 Am talarege hoṛko do eṅga-apako nihạ̃tetʼkoa, bidisiạkoko santaoetʼkoa ar ṭũạr amar ar rạnḍi maejiuko tulucʼ hõko jor julumeda." 
Ezekiel22:8 Am do ińakʼ sonot jiniskom hirkhạ akawada ar ińakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãko reakʼ sonottetʼ do bam rukhiyạ akada. 
Ezekiel22:9 Am talare nonkan hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe do eṭakʼkoakʼ bodnamko lại baṛaete onkoakʼ mãyãmko joro ocoyetʼkan, buru cetan than boṭkocʼreko jom-ńũiyetʼkan ar kharap kharapakʼko kạmikan." 
Ezekiel22:10 Am talare nonkan hoṛ menakʼkoa okoe do kạki eṅgattetʼ sãoteko laṭghaṭetʼkan, ar candoteakʼ hoyokʼkan maejiu sãote jor jobor salakʼko giticʼmidokʼ kan," 
Ezekiel22:11 aḍepaseren hoṛren bạhutetʼ sãote, kimintetʼ sãote ar kạki gogoren hoponera sãoteko laṭghaṭetʼ kan." 
Ezekiel22:12 Am talare mãyãm joro ocoy lạgitʼ hoṛko do ghusko hataoeda; ona chaḍa am hõ ḍher sudkom hataoeda ar jor julumkate aḍepaseren hoṛkom recʼetʼkoa. Ar iń dom hiṛiń akadińạ. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Am okaṭakʼ behokakʼem lab akatʼ ar am talare okaṭakʼ mãyãmem joro ocoakatʼ ona lạgitʼ khạṭige iń do ti thayowateń hạ̃nmea. 
Ezekiel22:14 Ar oka hilokʼ am ṭhen khon hisạbiń hataoa enhilokʼ do cetʼ dil tahentamgea? Amakʼ ti do cetʼ keṭecʼge tahentama? Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda ar onage iń doń onkaea. 
Ezekiel22:15 Iń do amren hoṛko eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare ar disạmko talareń chirchạturkoa ar amakʼ besaphawakʼ iń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa. 
Ezekiel22:16 Ar jạt jạtrenko samaṅre tinrem besonotokʼa unre am dom baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel22:18 “E manwa hopon, Israelko iń ṭhen do mạilạ lekako hoyakana; onko sanamkoge bhaṭa reakʼ pitạl, ṭin, mẽṛhẽtʼ ar sisạ kanako. Rupạ reakʼ mạilạ kanako." 
Ezekiel22:19 Onatege Probhu Isore meneda, ‘sanamkoge mạilạpe hoyakante iń do Jerusalemreń jarwapea." 
Ezekiel22:20 Hoṛko do cetʼleka rupạ, pitạl, ṭin, mẽṛhẽtʼ, ar sisạ jarwakate bhaṭa reakʼ seṅgel salgaokateko galao onkage ińakʼ edre ar khĩs do nagraha talare jarwakateye galaopea." 
Ezekiel22:21 Iń do apeń jarwapea ar ińakʼ jolokʼkan edreyiń oṅapea ar ape do nagraha talarepe galaokʼa. 
Ezekiel22:22 Culhạre cetʼ leka rupạ galaokʼ onkage ape hõ onarepe galaokʼa. Unre ape dope baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge ape cetanre ińakʼ edreń dul akada mente.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Probhu Isor do arhõ ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel22:24 “E manwa hopon, disạm do nonkam metaea, ‘am do mitʼṭecʼ besapha disạm kanam, onate ińakʼ edre reakʼ dinkore am cetanre do bae daga.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Ona disạmren nạbiko doko soṛojontrokana; onko do hạnḍrạukʼ kan dhạcri kul leka kanako. Onko do hoṛko jomkoa, dhon-durib ar damanakʼ jinisko hataoa ar disạm talare ḍher maejiuko rạnḍi ocokoa." 
Ezekiel22:26 Uniren naekeko do ińakʼ ạn-ạri upạrteko kạmikana ar ińakʼ sonot jiniskoko besonot ocoyeda. Okaṭakʼ sonotakʼkan ar okaṭakʼ do sonotakʼ baṅkan ona jotoko mitʼeda; onko do sapha ar besaphawakʼ talare oka pharak menakʼ ona reaṅ bako cetʼako kana ar ińakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãko manao babotre mẽtʼ doko jạpitʼkatako kana. Onate onko talare ińakʼ ńutum reakʼ sonottetʼ do nosṭokʼ kana. 
Ezekiel22:27 Hunḍạr cetʼleka sikạrko sapʼko onkage onḍenko rajkạmiyạko do mãyãmko joro ocoyeda ar behok lekate lab iạte manwako khũnetʼkoa. 
Ezekiel22:28 Eṛe dorson ar eṛe gukʼniko iạte onkoren nạbiko do onkoakʼ kạmiko cetanre cunteko potaoetʼkana. Probhu Isor bae men akatʼre hõ onko doko mena, ‘Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda.’" 
Ezekiel22:29 Disạmren hoṛ doko jor jukʼlum kana arko rerecʼkana; reṅgecʼ orecʼko cetanreko behoketʼ kana ar dhorom bicạr baṅkate bidisiạko cetanreko sasantao kana. 
Ezekiel22:30 “Iń do onko talare nonkan mitʼ hoṛakʼ khojiń hataokeda, okoe do bhite gathao rakab ar disạmren hoykate bhit reakʼ paṛakʼre iń samaṅreye teṅgokʼ jemon disạm do aloń dhaṅdhaser daṛeakʼ, menkhan celege bạń ńamletʼkoa." 
Ezekiel22:31 Onatege ińakʼ edre do onko cetanreń dultińạ ar onkoakʼ colon reakʼ kuṛại do onkoakʼ bohokʼ cetanreń paṛao ocoya ar ińakʼ jolokʼkan edrete onkoń jeretʼ giḍikoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel23:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel23:2 “E manwa hopon, barea boeha kuṛikin tahẽkana one unkin do mitʼ gogoren hoponera kin tahẽkan." 
Ezekiel23:3 Huḍiń umer khon unkin do Misor disạmre kusumbi kin tahẽkana. Ona disạmrege hoṛko do unkinakʼ bạ̃sko sapʼetʼ tạkin tahẽkana ar kũạri cuńciko locayetʼ tạkin tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel23:4 Unkin modre maraṅicʼakʼ ńutum do Ohola ar bokot kuṛiyakʼ ńutum do Oholiba. Unkin do ińrenkin hoyena ar koṛa hopon ar kuṛi hoponkin janamketʼkoa. Ohola do Samariại hoyena ar Oholiba do Jerusalemge. 
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola do ińrene tahẽkanre hõe loṭghuṭikeda. Uniren dulạṛiạko, metakʼme Ạsurrenko secʼ uni doe gagojok ʼkan tahẽkana. Onko do beguni roṅ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ lạṛhại birko, disạm cakʼlaoko ar subedarko tahẽkana; ar jotoge ńapae juạn ar sadomre dejokʼ aswariko tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel23:6  
Ezekiel23:7 Uni do acʼakʼ hoṛmoe danatʼkoa Ạsurren onko soros soros hoponkoge; ar jãhãegeye gagojatʼko onkoren sanam boṅga murhutʼko iạte apnartetʼ hõe bhonḍena. 
Ezekiel23:8 Uni do acʼakʼ laṭghaṭ kạmiko do bae bạgileda, one Misorre tahẽkan jokhecʼ khone ehopʼletʼ; onḍe uni do kom umere tahẽkanrege hoṛko sãoteye giticʼ mitʼena ar onkoakʼ laloc do acʼreye dulante acʼakʼ kũạritetʼe nosṭoketʼtaea." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Ona iạte iń do uniren dulạṛiạkoakʼ tire, metakʼme okoeye gagojako kan tahẽkan onko Ạsurrenkoakʼ tireń soprotkadea." 
Ezekiel23:10 Onko do uniko uluṅkedete uniren koṛa hopon ar kuṛi hoponko recʼkedea ar tarwaṛeteko makʼ gocʼkedea. Ar maejiuko talare uni do mitʼṭecʼ kạhtukgeye hoyena, ente unire bicạrko do purạuena." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Uniren boeha kuṛi Oholiba do noakoe ńelkeda, enhõ uni do acʼakʼ gagojokʼre ar laṭghaṭre acʼren boeha kuṛi khon hõ bạ̃ṛtiye kharapena." 
Ezekiel23:12 Uni hõ Ạsurrenko secʼe gagojena; onko do disạm cakʼlaoko ar subedarko tahẽkana; ar mońj kiricʼ horokʼ akatʼ lạṛhại bir ar aswariko tahẽkana; onko do jotoge napae juạnko tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel23:13 Iń doń ńelkeda uni hõ apnartetʼe bhonḍena; banarge inạ mitʼ hortegekin taṛamkeda. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Menkhan Oholiba do arhõ bạ̃ṛtiye laṭghaṭ idikeda. Uni do pạcri bhitre chap akan herel hoponkoe ńelketʼkoa, sindurte chap akan Kạldikoakʼ muṭhạnge." 
Ezekiel23:15 Onko do paṭheyakʼte ḍanḍareko tol ạcurakana, bohokʼre dhacanakʼ dạhṛiteko dạhṛi akana; onko do jotoge ńelokʼte Babel disạmren subedarko lekako ńelokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel23:16 Onko ńelko sãote uni do onko cetanre laloc hecʼadea ar Bablete hoṛe kulketʼkoa. 
Ezekiel23:17 Onate Babelrenko do uni ṭhen hecʼkate uni tulucʼ aṭetʼreko giticʼ mitʼena arko laṭghaṭketʼte uniko bhonḍkedea. Arko bhonḍkede khan uni do onko hirkhạwakoe ehopʼena. 
Ezekiel23:18 Uni do tinre khulạsate loṭghuṭiye ehopʼkeda ar acʼakʼ uluṅtetʼe sodorkeda unre iń do uniń hirkhạwadea, cetʼleka acʼren boeha kuṛiń hirkhạwade tahẽkan." 
Ezekiel23:19 Juạn oktere tinre uni do Misorreye loṭghuṭiyetʼ tahẽkana unreakʼ dinko disạkate uni do arhõ bạ̃ṛti loṭghuṭi kạmiye ehopʼena. 
Ezekiel23:20 Onḍe uni do nonkan hoṛkoe gagojatʼkoa one onkoakʼ hereltetʼ reakʼ jel hoṛmo hạṭiń do gadhakoakʼ jel hoṛmo hạṭiń leka ar onkoakʼ hereltetʼ reakʼ itạ do sadomkoakʼ itạ leka tahẽkan. 
Ezekiel23:21 “E Oholiba, amakʼ juạn oktere Misorren hoṛko do amakʼ bạ̃sko sipotʼetʼ tahẽkana ar amakʼ juạn nunu cuńciko locayetʼ tahẽkana. Onko do amakʼ kũạritetʼko nosṭoketʼtama; ar ńitokʼ am do arhõ onko tulucʼge loṭghuṭi reakʼem khojkana." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, amren okoe dulạṛiạkom hirkhạ akatʼko onkoge am upạrteń uskạukoa ar beṛhae khon am upạrteń ạgukoa." 
Ezekiel23:23 Onko do Babelrenko, sanam Kaldiko, Pekod, Soya ar Koa ar onko sãote sanam Ạsurren hoṛko. Onko do jotogeko napae juạn kanako; ar jotoge disạm cakʼlaoko, subedarko, rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko, cetan hudạren kạmiyạko ar aswariko tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel23:24 Onko do utạr khon khanḍa bhanḍawante, rãt gạḍikote, sagaṛ gạḍikote ar mitʼ maraṅ phạdante am upạrteko hijukʼa. Onko do maran ar huḍiń ḍhalante bohokʼ aḍokʼ reakʼ ṭupri horokʼkate amko gherao esetʼmea. Ar iń do onkoakʼ tireń soprotmea ar akoakʼ niạm lekako sạjạimea." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ińakʼ jaljalaokʼkan edre do am upạrteń paṛao ocoya jemon onko do raṅgaote am tulucʼko beohar. Onko do amakʼ mũ ar luturko heseytama ar amren sarecʼ hoṛ doko gocʼkoa. Onko do amren hoponko ar hoponerako idikoa, ar amren sarecʼ hoṛ do seṅgelteko ḍahao maraokoa." 
Ezekiel23:26 Onko do amakʼ kicricʼko bhạnduṛtama ar amakʼ mońj abhranko idiytama. 
Ezekiel23:27 Okaṭakʼ laṭghaṭ kạmi Misor disạmrem ehopʼletʼ ona do nonkageń cabaytama. Onate am do onko hoṛko secʼ bam beṅgeda ar Misor hõ bam disạyea. 
Ezekiel23:28 “Ar okoekom hirkhạwako kan, ar okoeko secʼ khonem ạcurakan onkoakʼ tiregeń soprotmea." 
Ezekiel23:29 Onko do amko hirkhạwama ar amem khaṭaolen reakʼ sanam jo do onkoko idiytama. Onko doko uluṅmea arko ekenti oṭokama. Unre amakʼ kusumbiteakʼ kạmi reakʼ lajaoakʼ do sodorokʼtama. Amakʼ laṭghaṭ kạmi ar kusumbigiri khạtirte noako do amre hijukʼa, ente am do jạt jạtrenko tulucʼ laṭghaṭ reakʼem kạmi akada, metakʼme onkoren boṅga murhutʼkotem bhonḍ akana." 
Ezekiel23:30  
Ezekiel23:31 Am do amren boeham kuṛiyakʼ hortegem sen akana; onate uniyakʼ bạṭi do amakʼ tireń calam kana. 
Ezekiel23:32 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, amren boeham kuṛiyakʼ bạṭiregem ńũiya; ente ona do khạ̃yukʼ ar lạṭugea. Ar onare ḍherge sahobokʼte am do ona ńũkate hirkhạwan ar landa dhutʼicʼem hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel23:33 Am do botor ar maraokʼakʼ bạṭi khonem ńũite, amren boeham kuṛi Samariawakʼ bạṭi khon ńũkatem bulokʼa ar duktem perejokʼa." 
Ezekiel23:34 Am do onarem ńũiya, arem ńũ ańjeda; ar ona reakʼ kelhatʼ hom togoja ar amakʼ toakin hõm raboṛ cirạitama. Ar ińakʼ bicạr reakʼ ray do noa kangea." 
Ezekiel23:35 Am do ińem hiṛiń arem dea giḍi akadińte amakʼ laṭghaṭ ar kusumbi reakʼ kuṛạiyem joma. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel23:36 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am do cetʼ Ohola ar Oholiba tạkin bicạrkin lạgitʼem sapṛaogea? Enḍekhan unkinakʼ hirkhạwanakʼ kạmiko reakʼ katha baṛe baḍae ocokinme." 
Ezekiel23:37 Unkin dokin laṭghaṭ akada ar ti do mãyãmtekin thoko boko akatʼtạkina. Boṅga murhutʼkin sewawako kante unkin dokin laṭghaṭ akada; ar iń lạgitʼkin janam akatʼko hopon ar hoponerako do boṅga murhutʼkoren jomakʼ lekate seṅgelrekin samaṅ akatʼkoa. 
Ezekiel23:38 Ona chaḍa inạko okterege unkin do ińakʼ oṛakʼkin bhonḍ akada. Unkin do ińakʼ jirạukʼ mãhãko reakʼ sonottetʼ do bạkin rukhiyạ akada. 
Ezekiel23:39 Inạko dinrege unkin do ạkinren boṅgako ṭhen ạkinren hopon ar hoponerako kin teṅgen akatʼkoa ar ińakʼ oṛakʼte bolokatekin bhõnḍ akana. Unkin do ińakʼ oṛakʼrege noakin kạmi akada. 
Ezekiel23:40 “Ona chaḍa Ohola ar Oholiba do sạṅgiń disạm khon hoṛko ạguko lạgitʼ hoṛkin kolketʼkoa. Ar onko hoṛko hecʼen khan unkin dokin um saphayena, aenom kajarkin lagaoana ar gohna horokʼkate mońjtekin sajaoena." 
Ezekiel23:41 Ona tayom unkin do mońj aṭetʼre duṛupʼkate ona samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ ṭebil ạgukate ona cetanre ińakʼ dhup ar sunumgekin dohokeda. 
Ezekiel23:42 “Unkin beṛhaete do gad gad hoṛkoakʼ aṛaṅge ańjomokʼkan tahẽkana. Unkin talare do nicạṛ monan hoṛ ar hahaṅkar ṭoṭharen ńũ bhuteṛ hoṛko tahẽkana. Onko do boeha kuṛikin tire sakomko horokʼatʼkinạ ar unkinakʼ bohokʼre do mońj okocʼ mukuṭko horokʼatʼkinạ. 
Ezekiel23:43 Unre laṭghaṭte laṅga akan maejiu reaṅ iń menkeda, ‘ńitokʼ onko hoṛ do kusumbi lekageko beohar ocoge ar uni hõ onko sãoteye laṭghaṭ idiyma.’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Hoṛko cetʼ leka kusumbiko sãoteko giticʼmidokʼ onkage onko do Ohola ar Oholiba ṭhenko boloyena, unkin nilạjiạ maejiukin ṭhenge." 
Ezekiel23:45 Menkhan dhorom hoṛ do unkinko bicạrkinạ laṭghaṭ maejiuko bicạrko lekage, ar mãyãmko joro ocoy ạimạiko bicạrko lekage, ente unkin do laṭghaṭren maejiukin kanakin ar mãyãm do unkinakʼ tire menakʼa." 
Ezekiel23:46 “Ente Probhu Isor do nonkae meneda; unkin upạrte phạdke phạd ạgukope ar mitʼṭecʼ botoranakʼ ar jarkharakʼge hoyocokinpe. 
Ezekiel23:47 Onko hoṛ do dhiriteko tińkinạ ar tarwaṛeteko makʼ khanḍa khunḍikinạ. Onko do unkinren hoponko ar hoponerako gocʼkoa ar onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạrko jeretʼ giḍikatakoa. 
Ezekiel23:48 “E Ohola ar E Oholiba nonkage iń do disạm tala khon bạṛicʼ kạmiń caba ocoya jemon sanam maejiuko cehaokʼte aben leka nilạjiạwakʼ aloko kạmi. 
Ezekiel23:49 Abenakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi reakʼ jo do abenge jojom hoyokʼtabena ar boṅga murhutʼko sewawako reakʼ kuṛại do ben asen baṛaea. Ar unre ben baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Bondi dosa reakʼ areakʼ bochor reakʼ gelakʼ cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel24:2 “E manwa hopon, am do teheń, teheńakʼ tạrik reakʼ kathage ol dohokakʼme, ente teheń Babelren raj do Jerusaleme gherao esetʼeda." 
Ezekiel24:3 Noko huhulkan jạtrenko ṭhen niạ phen reakʼ katha lạime. Onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Celaṅ condaeme, celaṅ condaeme ar onare dakʼ dulakʼme." 
Ezekiel24:4 Ona talare jel kuṭi emakʼme, bulu ar taren reakʼ bhage bhage jel kuṭige emakʼme. Ar bhage bhage jaṅkoante ona do perej me." 
Ezekiel24:5 Ar palren bhiḍiko khon soros utạricʼ bheḍa hataoem; ar celaṅ latarre sahan sajaome; ar mońjte jaṅko teke isinme.’ 
Ezekiel24:6 “Probhu Isor do arhõe menetʼkana, ‘Hae, uni mãyãm joro ocoyicʼ nagraha do! Uni do mitʼṭecʼ celaṅ kanae one onare mạilạ tạpukʼ akan, one oka do baṅ saphakʼ. Jelko bachao hatao baṅkate kuṭi kuṭige lo oḍokme. Gulibãṭ do okaṭakʼre hõ baṅ paṛao akana." 
Ezekiel24:7 Ente uniye joro ocoakatʼ mãyãm do ńithõ acʼ talarege menakʼa; uni do ona cenḍeń cạṭạnireye jorokeda, otre do bae joroleda dhuṛire ona dapalkakʼ lạgitʼ do." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ińakʼ edre caṛhao ocoy lạgitʼ ar hala hạli lạgitʼge ona mãyãm do cạṭạni cetanreń doho akada jemon alo danaṅ esedokʼ.’ 
Ezekiel24:9 “Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, ‘Hae, ona mãyãm joro ocoyetʼkan nagraha do! Iń hõ sahaniń ṭhiki jarwaea." 
Ezekiel24:10 Onate aema sahan ṭhekaokate, seṅgel jolme, mosola makhaokate mońjte jel teke isinme, ar jaṅko do roṅgo ocoyme." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ona tayom aṅgra cetanre ạjạuṛi celaṅ condaeme; jemon ona dhipạukʼ, ar ona reakʼ pitạl do jeredokʼ, jemon ona reakʼ mạilạko onarege lekʼte ona reakʼ icʼtetʼ jeretʼ cabakʼ." 
Ezekiel24:12 Menkhan sanamakʼ kurumuṭuge eṛeteakʼ hoyakana; ona reakʼ dạriạ icʼ do baṅ cabakʼkana ar icʼtetʼ hõ seṅgelte baṅ caba akana. 
Ezekiel24:13 “ ‘E Jerusalem, amakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmige hoyokʼ kana ona bhonḍtetʼ do. Iń do saphaeme reakʼ iń kurumuṭukeda menkhan amakʼ bhõnḍtetʼ khon bam saphalena. Am upạrte ińakʼ edre purạte ạuriń dultiń hạbicʼ am do bam saphakʼa." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ińakʼ kạmi reakʼ okte do seṭerakana. Iń do onań onkaegea, bạń mãyãkʼa se bạń dayakʼa. Amakʼ colon ar amakʼ kạmi lekagem bicạr ocokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel24:16 “E manwa hopon, noa uyukʼrege am ṭhen khon amakʼ mẽtʼ reakʼ hạ̃siń idi lạgidokʼ kana. Enhõ am do alom rakʼ homora, alom raga se mẽtʼ dakʼ alom joroytama." 
Ezekiel24:17 Am do kuhrạukʼme. Ar gocʼ icʼ lạgitʼ do alom homor halaṅa. Dạhṛikʼme jaṅgare cạṭki horogme; amakʼ moca alom bedtama ar hokʼmorkoakʼ jomakʼ hõ alom joma.” 
Ezekiel24:18 Iń do setakʼ jokhecʼ hoṛko sãote kathań roṛkeda ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ ińren bạhu doe gocʼena. Ar dosar hilokʼ setakʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekań kạmikeda. 
Ezekiel24:19 Unre hoṛko do ińko kulikedińa, “Okam cekaketʼ ale lạgitʼ onako do cetʼ kana? Ona do cetʼ bam lạiyalea? ”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Onatege iń do onkoń metatʼkoa, Probhu Isor do Israelko noa katha lạiyakoe metadińa, “Ińakʼ oṛakʼ, okaṭakʼ do apeakʼ daṛe reakʼ gorbokan, okaṭakʼ do mẽtʼ reakʼ suk kan ar mãyã reakʼ jiniskan, onage iń doń besonot ocoya. Ar okoe hopon ar hoponerakope bạgi giḍi akatʼko onko do lạṛhạiteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel24:21  
Ezekiel24:22 Unre Jeheskel okae cekaketʼ apehõ onape onkaea. Moca bape beda ar hokʼmorkoakʼ jomakʼ hõ bape joma. 
Ezekiel24:23 Bohokʼre dạhṛipe tola ar jaṅgare cạṭkipe horoga. Ar bape homora se rakʼ hõ bape raga, menkhan apan ạpin ghạṭ iạtepe nijorokʼa ar eṭakʼko ṭhenpe geraṅ baṛaea." 
Ezekiel24:24 Jeheskel do ape ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ cinhạ lekae hoyokʼ; uni okae ceka akatʼ ape hõ onagepe kạmiya. Tinre noako hoyokʼa unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, oka hilokʼ iń do ona daṛe reakʼ gorbo, onkoakʼ rạskạ ar ṭhonok, onkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ suk, onkoakʼ mon reakʼ khojogokʼakʼ ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerakoń hataokoa," 
Ezekiel24:26 enhilokʼ mitʼṭen nir paskaoicʼ hoṛ do am khoboram lạgitʼe hijukʼa. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ona jokhecʼ amakʼ moca do jhijokʼtama; am do uni tulucʼ katham roṛa, amakʼ alaṅ do ar baṅ thirokʼtama. Nonkate am do onko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ cinhạm hoyokʼa ar onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel25:2 “E manwa hopon, Amonrenko secʼ amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅme ar onko upạrte nạbikatha roṛme." 
Ezekiel25:3 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha onko ańjom lạgitʼ metakom, ‘Ińakʼ oṛakʼ besonotokʼkan ar Israel disom ujạṛokʼkan ńelte ar Jihudạren hoṛko bondi ocokʼkan ńelte ape do ạḍipe kusilena." 
Ezekiel25:4 Onate iń do purub disạmren hoṛkoakʼ tireń soprotpea. Onko do apeakʼ disạmre tạmbuko ṭaṅgao ar ape talareko girobasokʼa; onko do apeakʼ jo ar toako joma. 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabba nagraha do ũṭkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiń hoeocoya ar Amon disạm do bhiḍikoakʼ jirạukʼ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ige. Unre ape dope baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ape do Israel disạm reakʼ dosa ńeltepe thayoleda, arpe enecʼlena ar monre hiskạ iạtepe rạskạlena." 
Ezekiel25:7 Ona iạte ape upạrte iń do ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạrtińạ ar luṭakʼ mal lekate eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ tireń soprotpea. Eṭakʼ jạtrenko ar disạm tala khoniń hese giḍikapea ariń marao utạrpea. Ar onatepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Moab ar Seyir dokin meneda, ‘ńelpe, Jihudạren hoṛko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko lekageko hoyakana.’" 
Ezekiel25:9 Ona iạte iń do Moab reakʼ mitʼ secʼakʼ simạnań jhicʼ ocoya. Ar onate Moab reakʼ ṭhonok nagraha Beth-Jesimoth, Bakʼal-Meyon ar Kiriathayim cetanre jhãp ema." 
Ezekiel25:10 Iń do Amonrenko sãote Moab hõ purub disạmren hoṛkoakʼ tireń soprotkoa jemon jạt jạtrenko talare Amonrenkoakʼ katha do hiṛińokʼ ar Moab hõ sạjạiye ńam. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel25:11  
Ezekiel25:12 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Edom do Jihudạren hoṛko cetanreko hala hạli akatʼte ạḍiko behok akada." 
Ezekiel25:13 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, Edom upạrte iń do tiyiń tiyạrtińạ ar onḍenko sanam hoṛ ar janwarkoń gocʼ cabakoa. Ona do dhaṅ dhaserakʼgeń hoeocoya ar Teman khon Dedan hạbicʼ hoṛko do tarwaṛeteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel25:14 Iń do ińren hoṛ Israelkoakʼ tite Edom cetanreń hala hạliya ar onko do ińakʼ edre ar khĩs lekate Edom birudteko kạmiya. Unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińgeń hala hạli akada mente.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Probhu Isor do nonkae menkeda, “Philisṭiko do Jihudạ cetanre hala hạkʼliko calao akada; onko do jug reakʼ bene bạiri meṭao lạgitʼ Jihudạ marao utạreko khojkana." 
Ezekiel25:16 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, ‘Philisṭiko upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạrtińạ; ar Kerethikoń marao cabakoa ar jalapuri aṛeren sarecʼ hoṛko hõń maraokoa." 
Ezekiel25:17 Iń do raṅgao reakʼ ḍanṭaore maraṅ hala hạli onko upạrteń purạua. Ar tinre onko cetanreń hala hạliya unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Aboakʼ bondi dosa reakʼ gelmitʼ bochorre cando reakʼ pạhil dinre Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel26:2 “E manwa hopon, Jerusalem babotre Tur do kusikateye menakada, ‘bhagege hoyakana, jạt jạtrenkoakʼ phaṭok duạr do rạputʼ akana ar ona reakʼ silpińko do jhicʼakana; iń doń purunokʼa, ente nagraha do jarkharena.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, ‘E Tur, am secʼ do bạnuńa. Jalapuri cetʼ leka ḍheokoe rakapʼ ocoy onkage iń hõ am upạrte ḍher jạtrenkoń ạgukoa.’" 
Ezekiel26:4 Onko do Tur reakʼ pạcri bhitko rạpuda ar usul pahra oṛakʼko dhasao giḍikakʼa. Ar iń do ona reakʼ dhuṛi hasakoń lakʼ giḍiya ar ona do cạṭạni lekań hoeocoya. 
Ezekiel26:5 Uni do jalapuri talare jhạliko tase reakʼ ṭhạ̃igeye hoyokʼa, ente iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana. Uni do boṅgan hoṛ jạtkoren luṭteakʼ jinise hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel26:6 Uni tabere menakʼ ghuṭu atoko do lạṛhại iạte marao utạrokʼa. Unre onḍenko hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel26:7 “E Tur, iń do am upạrte utạr secʼ khon sadomko, rãt gạḍiko, aswariko ar maraṅ okocʼ mitʼṭecʼ lạṛhại phạdko sãote rapajkoren raj, metakʼme Babelren raj Nebukadnesar iń ạguiyea." 
Ezekiel26:8 Uni do lạṛhạikate amakʼ atokoe marao giḍikakʼa. Uni do am upạrte mitʼṭecʼ usul pinḍhại upʼ rakaba ar amakʼ pạcri bhit sãote bhiṛạu akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ daṛaṅ pinḍhại benaoa; ar apnar rukhiyạkʼ lạgitʼ ḍhalko reakʼ chate teṅgoea. 
Ezekiel26:9 Uni do pạcri bhit bhugạg reakʼ jontrote amakʼ bhite sobokʼ bhugạgtama ar acʼakʼ jontrote amakʼ usul pahra oṛakʼkoe lạnduṛ giḍikakʼa. 
Ezekiel26:10 Uniren sadomko do nunạkʼko saṅgeya je, onkoakʼ uḍiạu dhuṛite am dom topa utạrokʼa. Ar rạputʼ bhit talate hoṛko cetʼleka nagrahateko bolokʼ onkage uni do tinre lạṛhại sadomko, sagaṛ gạḍiko ar rãt gạḍikoante amakʼ phaṭok duạrteye bolokʼa unre onako reakʼ sabadte amakʼ pạcri bhit do daldalaokʼa." 
Ezekiel26:11 Uniren sadomkoakʼ khurạ do amakʼ sanam horko lebetʼ gasmanḍaoa; uni do amren hoṛkoe gocʼkoa ar amakʼ keṭecʼ keṭecʼ khunṭiko do otre bhindạṛokʼa. 
Ezekiel26:12 Onko do amakʼ dhon-durib ar amakʼ bạnij bepar reakʼ jinisko luṭ idiytama; ar amakʼ pạcri bhitko rạputʼ giḍikakʼa, mońj mońj oṛakʼ-duạrko marao giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ dhiri, kaṭ ar dhuṛi do jalapurireko giḍikakʼa." 
Ezekiel26:13 Iń do amakʼ sereń reakʼ arãṛiń thir ocoytama; binạ banam reakʼ saḍe hõ ar do baṅ ańjomokʼa. 
Ezekiel26:14 Am do cạṭạni lekań hoyocomea ar am do jhạliko tase reakʼ rohoṛ ṭhạ̃igem hoyokʼa. Ar am do bam benao aro ocokʼa, ente iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel26:15 Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, “ E Tur, jalapuri ḍhiprenko do amakʼ gurokʼ reakʼ saḍe ańjomte, ona gurokʼ reakʼ one onare ghạl akankoko geraṅetʼ, ar am talare khũn hoyokʼkan, onate cetʼ bako thartharaokʼa?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Unre jalapuri aṛe reakʼ disạmkoren rapajko do akoakʼ siṅghạson khon pheḍkate akoakʼ raj kicricʼ ar noksa akatʼ kicricʼko totʼ giḍikakʼa. Ar botorte otreko duṛupʼa, ar jao okteko thar tharaokʼa ar am ńelteko torasokʼa." 
Ezekiel26:17 Unre onko do am reaṅ homor halaṅkateko mena, ‘E namḍak nagraha, am do cetʼ lekam marao utạrena! Amren hoṛko do doreão cetanteko dãṛãn kan tahẽkan. Jalapurire am ar amren hoṛko do daṛeanko tahẽkana; Jalapuri aṛekore okoeko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko do amko botoram kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel26:18 Ńitokʼ do amakʼ ńurokʼ reakʼ dinre jalapuri aṛe reakʼ disạmko do daldalaokʼ kana; amakʼ maraokʼ ńelte jalapuri tala reakʼ ḍhipko hõe botorokʼ kana.’ 
Ezekiel26:19 “E Tur, iń Probhu Isorge tinre ujạṛakʼ nagraha lekań hoyocomea one okare celege bako girobasokʼ kan, ar doreão reakʼ dakʼ tinre am cetanreń ạguiya ar ona do ame dapal esetʼmea," 
Ezekiel26:20 unre patal purite calakʼkan hoṛko sãote onko sedaeren hoṛko ṭheniń pheḍ idimea. Ar dhạrti khạndṛuṅ reakʼ jarkharakʼ talare patal purite calakʼkan hoṛko sãoteń girobas ocomea. Amre do ar celege bako girobasokʼa ar jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre amakʼ ṭhạ̃i do ar baṅ hoyokʼtama. 
Ezekiel26:21 Am do mitʼṭecʼ torasgeń hoyocomea; am do ar bam tahena. Ar hoṛ do amko sendra baṛamea menkhan tishõ ar bam ńamokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.” 
Ezekiel27:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel27:2 “E Manwa hopon, Tur babotre homor halaṅme." 
Ezekiel27:3 Jalapuri bolokʼ reakʼ horre okoe menae, ar jalapuri ḍhipren okoe doe jạt jạtkoren beparikan uni Tur dom metaea, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E Tur, am dom meneda cehratem perecʼgea." 
Ezekiel27:4 Jalapuri talare amakʼ rajosṭi; mitʼṭecʼ mońj jahaj leka mistriko do amakʼ napaetetʼ purạteko ạguakada. 
Ezekiel27:5 Senir ṭoṭha khon onko do saro dare reakʼ toktako benao akada; ar amakʼ badam khunṭi lạgitʼ do Lebanon khon debdạru dareko ạguakada. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ar Bason disạm reakʼ Elon darete do amakʼ jahaj reakʼ ḍạḍuko benao akada; ar Kaprus khon Tạsur kaṭ ạgukate onko do amakʼ jahaj reakʼ anaṭetʼ benaokate hạti reakʼ ḍaṭateko sajao akada. 
Ezekiel27:7 Misor reakʼ likạn goṛhon mĩhĩ mushnạ kicricʼte amakʼ jahaj reakʼ badam do benaolena ar onatege hoṛko do amko orom daṛeamkan tahẽkana. Elisa khon ạguwakʼ nil ar beguni roṅakʼ kicricʼ do amakʼ dapalakʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:8 Sidon ar Arwadren hoṛko do amakʼ jahajren ḍạḍu okʼorkoko tahẽkana. E Tur, gạkhuṛ hoṛko do amren jahaj cakʼlaokoko tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebalren murubbiko do gạkhuṛ hoṛko lekate amre oṛecʼ paṛakʼakʼren jut aroe reakʼko kạmikan tahẽkana. Doreão reakʼ sanam jahaj ar onkoren jahaj cakʼlaoko do amakʼ jinisko bạnij bekʼpar lạgitʼ am ṭhenko hijukʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Paras, Lud ar Put disạmren hoṛko hõ amren lạṛhại phạdko sãote tahẽkateko lạṛhạikan tahẽkana. Onko do akoakʼ ḍhal ar bohokʼ rurukhiyạ reakʼ ṭupri amre ṭaṅgaokate amakʼ ṭhonoktetʼko maraṅetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arwad ar Helekren hoṛko do am beṛhaeteakʼ pạcri bhit cetanreko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana, ar Gamadren hoṛko do amakʼ usul buruńj oṛakʼko horhoyetʼ tahẽkana. Am beṛhaeteakʼ pạcri bhitre onko do ḍhalko aka dohokakʼkan tahẽkana; ar amakʼ sanam mońjtetʼ do onkogeko ạguleda." 
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘Amakʼ asambheṛ dhon-durib lạgitʼ Tạrsis do am sãoteye bạnij-beparetʼ tahẽkana; rupạ, mẽṛhẽtʼ, ṭin ar sisạkote amakʼ jiniskoe kirińetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:13 Jawan, Tubạl ar Mesek do am sãoteko bạnij-beparetʼ tahẽkana; onko do amakʼ jinisko bodolte guti-kạ̃ṛmĩ ar tambako emokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:14 Amakʼ jinisko bodolte Beth-togarmaren hoṛko do sadomko, lạṛhại sadomko ar khoccorko emokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedanren hoṛko do am sãoteko bạnij-beparetʼkan tahẽkana ar jalapuri aṛeteakʼ ḍher disạmge amakʼ jiniskoko kirińetʼ tahẽkana; onko do hạti ḍaṭa ar terel mańjko emamkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:16 Amakʼ benaoakʼ ḍher jinisko lạgitʼ Siriya do am tulucʼe bạnij-beparetʼ tahẽkana; amakʼ jinisko bodolte onko do akoakʼ podmorag mạnik, beguni roṅakʼ kicricʼ, likạn goṛhon kicricʼ, mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ ar rokto mạnikkote amakʼ jinisko hataoetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:17 Jihudạ ar Israel do am sãotekin bạnij beparetʼ tahẽkana; unkin do amakʼ jinis bodolte guhum, jomakʼ jinis, toa, sunum, ar jut so mosola kin emam kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:18 Am benaoakʼ ḍher jinisko ar asambheṛ dhon-durib lạgitʼ Damesek do Helbon reakʼ darkha rasa ar ponḍ bhiḍi upʼte am sãoteye bạnij beparetʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:19 Bodan ar Jawanren hoṛko do amakʼ jinisko bodolte Usal khon ạguwakʼ koṭecʼ jhalkaoakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ, darcini, tejpat ar bocko emokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan do am sãote aswarikowakʼ palan kicricʼkoe bạnij-beparetʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arob ar Kedarren sanam sordarko do amren asol bạnij-bekʼpariko tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:22 Seba ar Ramaren bạnij-bepariko hõ am sãoteko bạnijetʼ tahẽkana; amakʼ jinisko bodolte onko do sanam lekan bhage bhage mosola, damanakʼ dhiri ar sonako emam kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanne, Edon ar Sebaren bepariko ar Ạsur ar Kilmad hõ am sãoteko bạnijetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:24 Onko do amakʼ bajarre mońj mońj kicricʼko, nil kicricʼko, likạn goṛhon kicricʼko ar roṅ beroṅ kicricʼko baberte kajakte tolkateko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel27:25 “ ‘Tạrsis reakʼ jahajko do amakʼ jiniskoko ạguiyetʼ tahẽkana. Doreão talare ḍher jiniskote am do perecʼem tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:26 Okoe do jahaj reakʼ ḍạḍu ghanṭakoko tahẽkan onko do jalapuri talateko idiyetʼme tahẽkana; menkhan jalapuri talare purub reakʼ hoete am dom rạputʼ gejerena. 
Ezekiel27:27 Amakʼ maraokʼ reakʼ dinre amakʼ dhon-durib, amakʼ bạnij reakʼ jinisko, eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jinisko, amren jahaj cakʼlaoko, jujut akʼroko, amren bạnij-bekʼpariko ar amren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar amreko tahenkan eṭakʼ sanamko hõ jalapuri talareko unum gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel27:28 Amren jahaj cakʼlaokoakʼ kạumạute jalapuri aṛe reakʼ ṭhạ̃iko do daldalaokʼa. 
Ezekiel27:29 Okoe ḍạḍuko ghanṭae onko sanamkoge akoakʼ jahaj bạgikateko calakʼa; ar jahaj cakʼlaoko do jotoge jalapuri aṛere teṅgo akanko tahena. 
Ezekiel27:30 Onko do am ńutumteko kạuạ rạuạkʼa ar apnarakʼ bohokʼre dhuṛiko ojokʼ joṅa ar torocʼreko guṛdạukʼa. 
Ezekiel27:31 Onko do am iạte bohokʼko hoyo munḍrạkʼa ar gõṛẽ kicricʼko horoga. Onko do mon reakʼ dukte am ńutumteko homor halaṅa ar ạḍi ãṭko raga. 
Ezekiel27:32 Onko do am lạgitʼ ãṭ aṛaṅteko raga; ar am iạte homor halaṅateko mena; “ ‘Jalapuri talare Tur leka do ar okoeye nosṭoakana? 
Ezekiel27:33 Amakʼ bạnij reakʼ jinisko do tinre jalapurire oḍokokʼkan tahẽkana unre am do jạt jạtrenkom tirpitetʼko tahẽkana; amakʼ asambheṛ dhon-durib ar jiniskote dhạrtiren rapajkom kisạ̃ṛetʼko tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:34 Am do ńitokʼ jalapuri reakʼ khạndri dakʼrem rạputʼ gejer akana; amakʼ jinisko ar amren sanam hoṛko do am sãoteko unum akana. 
Ezekiel27:35 Doreão aṛere girobasokʼ kan hoṛko do jotoge amakʼ dosa ńelteko tharbasao akana; onko do raj botorteko thar tharaokʼkan tahẽkana arko keklesedokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel27:36 Jạt jạtrenko talaren bepariko do am ńelteko sisetʼkan tahẽkana. Ar am do mitʼṭecʼ torasgem hoyakana; ar bam tahena.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel28:2 “E manwa hopon, am do Turren cakʼlaoyicʼ metaeme, Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, amakʼ ontor do gorbote perecʼ akana, ar am dom menakada, iń doń deb kana, iń do jalapuri talare Isorakʼ duṛupʼakʼreń duṛupʼ akana; menkhan am do ekenem manwa kana, deb dom baṅkana, enhõ am do debota tulnim hudisokʼ kana." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ńelme, Daniel khon hõm ạkilangea, jãhãn khạndri katha hõ am ṭhen do baṅ danaṅa;" 
Ezekiel28:3 Ńelme, Daniel khon hõm ạkilangea, jãhãn khạndri katha hõ am ṭhen do baṅ danaṅa;" 
Ezekiel28:4 amakʼ ạkil ar amakʼ budte am lạgitʼ dhonem hạr akawana, am lạgitʼ sona ar rupạgem sõc akawana;" 
Ezekiel28:5 amakʼ maraṅ ạkil reakʼ bạnij hotete amakʼ dhonem baḍhao ocoakada, ar ona dhonkote amakʼ mon do bạḍạite perecʼ akantama;" 
Ezekiel28:6 ona iạte Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, amakʼ mon do Isorakʼ mon lekam hudisetʼtama;" 
Ezekiel28:7 Ona iạte ńelme, iń do am upạrte bidisiạkoń ạgukoa, jạt jạtrenko talare onko do kurmutạhakoge, onko do amakʼ ạkil reakʼ mońjakʼ upạrte apan ạpin tarwaṛeko bojtakoa, ar amakʼ ṭhonokko maraotama." 
Ezekiel28:8 Onko do khandṛaṅreko ńurhạmea; ar am do gocʼ ocokʼko reakʼ gujukʼtem gujukʼa tala jalapurirege. 
Ezekiel28:9 Amren gogocʼko samaṅre unre cetʼem mena, ‘iń doń isor kana?’ Menkhan okoe ame ghạlme, uniyakʼ tire am dom manwa kana, debota do baṅa." 
Ezekiel28:10 Am do bidisiạkoakʼ ti hotete bin khatna akan hoṛko lekam gujukʼa, ente iń do noageń menakada, noa do Probhu Isorgeye meneda." 
Ezekiel28:11 Tayomte Probhu Isorakʼ niạ katha do iń ṭhen seṭerena," 
Ezekiel28:12 “E manwa hopon, am do Turren raj lạgitʼ homor halaṅme, unim metaea, Probhu Isor do noa kathae meneda, ‘am do sạbit utạricʼ mohorte chapakanicʼ, ạkilte perecʼicʼ, ar ńelokʼte mońj utạricʼ kanam." 
Ezekiel28:13 Am do Isorakʼ Eden bagwanrem tahẽkana, sanam lekan damanakʼ dhiri, cuni, podmorag, hirạ, gomedok, boidurjo ar surjokanto, nilkanto, pitmani, morokot ar sona do amakʼ abhrange tahẽkana, amakʼ jhan jhanaokʼkan mala ar seke sekekʼ hạ̃sli do sona reakʼge tahẽkana; noako do sirjạu hilokʼrege tearlena." 
Ezekiel28:14 Am do hohorhoyicʼ Kerub lekatem ojokʼ ocolena; am do Isorakʼ sonot bururem tahẽkana; am do seṅgel reakʼ dhiriko talategem taṛametʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel28:15 Amakʼ sirjạukʼ hilokʼ khon am do bin dusạngem tahẽkana; ar mucạtʼre amre behokakʼge ńamena. 
Ezekiel28:16 Amakʼ ạḍi utạr beparikote jor julumtem perecʼena arem kạikeda, onate Isorakʼ buru khoniń lagaketʼmea, ar E horhoyicʼ Kerub, am do seṅgel reakʼ dhiriko tala khoniń laga ńirketʼmea." 
Ezekiel28:17 Amakʼ mon do amakʼ mońjtetʼ iạte bạḍạiteye perecʼena ar amakʼ ṭhonok iạte amakʼ ạkil dom nosṭo akada. Onate iń do otreń lebda giḍikatʼmea; ar rapajko samaṅreń dohoketʼmea jemon onko do am ńelteko kusikʼ. 
Ezekiel28:18 Amakʼ aema ghạṭ ar bedhorom pherbepar iạte am do apnarakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ ṭhạ̃ikom besonot akada. Ona iạte amre seṅgeliń jeretʼleda ar ona doe lo roṅgoketʼmea; okoeko ńeńelkan tahẽkan onko sanamkoakʼ mẽtʼ samaṅre am do ot reakʼ torocʼ lekageń hoyocoketʼmea. 
Ezekiel28:19 Ar okoe jạtrenko bako baḍaeakatʼme tahẽkan onko do am ńelteko tharbasaoena. Am do botorgem caba utạrena; am do ar bam tahena.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:20 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel28:21 “E manwa hopon, am do Sidon secʼ samaṅkate uni upạrte nạbi katha roṛme," 
Ezekiel28:22 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E Sidon, iń doń am upạrten kana; am upạrte okań cekae onate ińakʼ ṭhonok do sodorokʼa. Iń do tinre amiń sạjạimea ar am talare ińakʼ sonottetʼ iń sodortińạ unre amren hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel28:23 Am cetanre mahamạriń kola ar amakʼ horkore do mãyãm joro ocokʼa. Beṛhae secʼ khon am dom hạ̃n ocokʼa ar onate hoṛko khũn ocokʼte amre giḍi akanko tahena. Unre amren hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:24 Probhu Isor do arhõe menkeda, “Israel jạtrenko haso ocoko lạgitʼ jãhãn jạnumanakʼ dare se jãhãn hasoanakʼ jạnum do arbaṅ tahena onko beṛhaeten sanamko modre, one onkoko nihạ̃tletʼko tahẽkan. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare chirchạtur akan Israelko tinreń jarwakoa unre jạt jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre onko talare ińakʼ sonottetʼ iń sodora. Unre onko do akoakʼ ona disạmreko girobasokʼa one okaṭakʼ disạm do ińren guti Jakob iń emade tahẽkan. 
Ezekiel28:26 Onḍe onko do oṛakʼ-duạrko benaojoṅa ar nirạiteko girobasokʼa ar darkha bagwanko benaojoṅa. Ar onkoren landa dhudutʼkan jạtrenko tinreń sạjạikoa unre onko do nirạiteko girobasokʼa. Onate onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Aboakʼ bondi dosa reakʼ gelakʼ bochor reakʼ gelakʼ cando reakʼ gelbarakʼ dinre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel29:2 “E manwa hopon, amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do Misorren raj Pharao secʼ samaṅkate uni ar goṭa Misor disạm upạrte nạbi katha roṛme," 
Ezekiel29:3 Probhu Isor doe menetʼkana, ‘E Misorren Pharao raj, iń do am secʼren doń baṅkana. Am do apnarakʼ gaḍareye giticʼkan uni maraṅ utạricʼ tayan kanam. Am dom menetʼ kana, nil gaḍa do amakʼ kangea ar apnar lạgitʼge ona dom benao akawana." 
Ezekiel29:4 Menkhan iń do amakʼ jambere ạṅkusiń lagaoa ar amakʼ gaḍaren hakoko do amakʼ cuạ̃kʼreń laṭkao ocokoa. Ar amakʼ cuạ̃kʼre laṭkao akan sanam hakoko sudhạ am do gaḍa khoniń or rakapʼ ạgumea. 
Ezekiel29:5 Iń do am ar amakʼ gaḍaren sanam hakoko hahaṅkarreń giḍikapea. Am do ṭạnḍire giḍi akanem tahena ar bam topa ocokʼa. Iń do jomakʼ lekate bir janwarko ar coṭren cẽṛẽko ṭheniń jimạ akatʼmea. 
Ezekiel29:6 Onate okoe Misorreko girobasokʼ kan onko sanamgeko baḍae daṛeakʼa ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. “Am do Israelko lạgitʼ chuci ṭheṅgagem tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ar onko do tinre titeko sapletʼmea unre am dom paṛakʼena ar onkoakʼ tarenrem cirạketʼtakoa. Ar tinre am ṭhenko ṭenḍarena unre am dom rạputʼena ar onate onkoakʼ ḍanḍa dom ḍikạ ḍakeketʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel29:8 “Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, iń do am upạrte tarwaṛeń ạguiya ar amren hoṛko ar janwarkoń gocʼ cabakoa." 
Ezekiel29:9 Misor do mitʼṭecʼ ujạṛakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. Unre hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do. “Am dom menetʼkana, nil gaḍa do amakʼ kana ar amge ona dom benao akada." 
Ezekiel29:10 Ona iạte am ar amakʼ gaḍa reakʼ sanam dakʼko upạrte minạńạ. Iń do Migdol khon Seyene, metakʼme Kus reakʼ Simạna hạbicʼ Misor disạm do ujạṛakʼ ṭhạ̃igeń hoeocoya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ar ona talate do cele manwa se janwar hõ bako sen paromokʼa; ar pongel bochor hạbicʼ onḍe do celege bako girobasokʼa. 
Ezekiel29:12 Jarkhar akan disạmko modre Misor disạm reakʼ dosa do artetʼ kharapiń hoeocoya; ar dhaṅdhaser akan nagrahako modre uniyakʼ nagrahako do pongel bochor hạbicʼ artetʼge bạṛicʼ hoyokʼa. Ar Misorrenko do jạt jạtrenko ar disạmko talareń chirchạturkoa. 
Ezekiel29:13 “ ‘Ar pongel bochor tayom do jạt jạtrenko tala khon Misorren hoṛkoń jarwakoa. 
Ezekiel29:14 Iń do lahate leka onkoakʼ dosań ruạṛkatakoa ar onkoren hapṛamkoakʼ disạm Pathrosteń ạgu ruạṛkoa. Onḍe onkoakʼ rajosṭi do nijorakʼ hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel29:15 Pathros do joto khon nijor utạrakʼ rajosṭige hoyokʼa; eṭakʼ jạtrenko cetanre uni do apnarte ar tishõ bae usulokʼa. Uni do nunạkʼ iń nijor ocoyea, ar tishõ eṭakʼ jạtrenko cetanre rajosṭi bae calao daṛeakʼa." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israelko do tishõ Misor cetanre ar bako ṭehãḍokʼa. Onko do Misor reakʼ dosa ńelteko bujhạu daṛeakʼa je, goṛo ńam lạgitʼ Misor secʼko ruạṛlenteko kạileda. Ar onateko baḍae daṛeakʼa, Probhu Isor doń ińkangea.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Bondi dosa reakʼ bargel eae bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel29:18 “E manwa hopon, Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Tur upạrte lạṛhại jokhecʼ acʼren lạṛhại phạdko nunạkʼe khaṭaoletʼkoa je, onko sanamkoakʼ bohokʼ do ceḍelentakoa ar taren reakʼ harta hõ poṭakʼ cabalentakoa. Enhõ Tur upạrte okaṭakʼe lạṛhạilen onate uni ar acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ do cetʼ labge baṅ hoylentakoa." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ona iạte Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Misor disạmiń emaea ar uni do uniyakʼ dhonkoe idiytaea. Ar acʼren lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ kuṛại lạgitʼ uni do ona disạme luṭ joṅa. 
Ezekiel29:20 Acʼakʼ kạmi reakʼ kuṛại lekate uni do Misor disạmiń em akawadea, ente uni do iń lạgitʼe kạmi akada. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Enhilokʼ Israel do daṛean jạtkoń hoyocokoa ar onko talare katha roṛ lạgitʼ amakʼ mocań jhijtama. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Probhu Isor do arhõ ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel30:2 “E manwa hopon, am do noa nạbi katha roṛme, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘enhilokʼ lạgitʼ jare jarekʼpe." 
Ezekiel30:3 Mitʼṭecʼ botoranakʼ dinge hijukʼkana, ente Probhu Isorakʼ din do seṭerakana; ona do rimilte danaṅ esetʼ akan din ar boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ mucạtʼ okte kana." 
Ezekiel30:4 Misor cetanre lạṛhại hijukʼa ar Kus cetanre do udạsge. Misorren hoṛko do ńur akanko tahena, ona reakʼ dhon-durib do idi ocokʼa ona reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃i do dhaṅdhaserokʼa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kus, Puṭ, Lud ar sanam Arob disạm, Kub ar gate disạmren hoṛko do lạṛhạire Misorrenko sãoteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel30:6 Misorren gate disạmkoren hoṛ doko gurokʼa ar uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ bạḍại hõ cabakʼtaea. Migdol khon Seyene hạbicʼ hoṛko do lạṛhạireko gujukʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Ezekiel30:7 “ ‘Jarkhar akan disạmko modre Misor reakʼ dosa do arhõ bạṛicʼ hoyokʼa ar dhaṅdhaser akan nagrahako modre uniyakʼ nagrahako reakʼ dosa do artetʼge bạṛicʼ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel30:8 Misorre iń do tinre seṅgeliń jolla ar onaren sanam gokʼṛokoko rạpudokʼa unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Enhilokʼ nicind tahen kạnicʼ Kus do botor udukʼae lạgitʼ sombat akʼsenko ińakʼ hukum lekate jahajteko oḍok calakʼa. Misor reakʼ ses dinre Kus hõe udạsokʼa, ente ona din do uni cetanre hõ hijukʼa." 
Ezekiel30:10 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, Babelren raj Nebukadnesarakʼ tite Misor reakʼ anecʼ dhanecʼ iń caba utạra." 
Ezekiel30:11 Uni ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko, metakʼme jạt jạtrenko talare okoeko kurmutạhage onkogeko ạgu ocokʼa disạm jarkhar lạgitʼ. Onko do Misorre jhãpko ema ar gocʼ hoṛkote disạmko pereja." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ar iń do nil gaḍa reakʼ dakʼ iń ańjetʼ ocoya ar bạṛicʼ hoṛko ṭhen disạmiń ạkhrińa; bidisiạkoakʼ tite disạm ar ona tala reakʼ sanamakʼ iń dhaṅ dhaser ocoya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Iń do Memphisren boṅga muṭhạnkoń marao utạrkoa, ar uniren murhutʼkoń cabakoa. Misorre do cele disạm cakʼlaokoge bako tahena ar disạm reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃irege iń do botoriń paṛao ocoya." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ar Pathros do ujạṛakʼ iń hoeocoya, ar Soanre do seṅgeliń salgaoa ar Thebes nagraha doń sạjạiyea." 
Ezekiel30:15 Misor reakʼ kajak gaṛ Pelusium nagraha cetanre ińakʼ edreń dultińạ ar Thebes nagraharen sanamkoń makʼ gocʼ cabakoa. 
Ezekiel30:16 Misorre do seṅgeliń lagaoakʼa; ar Pelusium nagraha do hasote eṛseń toṛseńokʼa. Thebes nagraha cetanre ackage muhin hijukʼa; ar ona do banbạsite unumokʼa. 
Ezekiel30:17 Ona ar Pibesethren juạn hoṛ do lạṛhạireko gujukʼa ar eṭakʼ hoṛko do bondikateko idiocokʼa. 
Ezekiel30:18 Iń do tinre Misor reakʼ arãṛiń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa unre Tahpanhesre siń do ńutokʼa; onḍe uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ bạḍạitetʼ hõ cabakʼtaea. Uni do rimilteye danaṅ esedokʼa ar uniyakʼ atoren hoṛko do bondikateko idi ocokʼa. 
Ezekiel30:19 Nonkate iń do Misoriń sạjạiyea, ar unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Aleakʼ bondi dosa reakʼ gelmitʼakʼ bochor reakʼ pạhil cando reakʼ eaeyakʼ dinre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel30:21 “E manwa hopon, iń do Misorren raj Pharaoakʼ tiyiń rạputʼ akatʼtaea. Ar bogekʼ lạgitʼ ona ti do kicricʼte baṅ bedhao akana jemon ghuriạte ona do tarwaṛe bae sapʼ daṛeakʼ." 
Ezekiel30:22 Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, Misorren raj Pharao upạrten kạnạń. Iń do uniyakʼ keṭecʼakʼ ar rạputʼatʼ banar tigeń rạpudtaea ar uniyakʼ ti khon tarwaṛeń ńur ocoytaea." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ar jạt jạtrenko ar disạmko talare Misorrenkoń chirchạturkoa. 
Ezekiel30:24 Iń do Babel rajakʼ tire daṛeń ema ar ińakʼ tarwaṛe do uniń calaea, menkhan Pharaoakʼ ti doń rạpudtaea. Onate Pharao do Babel raj samaṅre ghạl akan hoṛ lekae geraṅa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Iń do Babel rajakʼ tire daṛeń emaea menkhan Pharaoakʼ sopo do ńurokʼtaea. Ar ińakʼ tarwaṛe tinre Babel rajiń calaea ar uni do Misor upạrte onae calaoa unre sanamgeko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ar Misorrenko do tinre eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko ar disạmko talareń chir chạturkoa unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Bondi dosa reakʼ gelmitʼakʼ bochor reakʼ tesar cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel31:2 “E manwa hopon, Misorren raj Pharao ar uniren sanam hoṛko metakom, ‘Amakʼ maraṅtetʼ lekate am do okoe tulucʼem jurikʼkana?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ạsur reakʼ katha hudiskate ńelme, uni do mitʼ din Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dareye tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ mońj mońj ḍạrko do birre umuletʼ tahẽkana; uni do ạḍi usule tahẽkana, ar ona reakʼ muthni do rimil hạbicʼ ṭuṅgạu akan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel31:4 Athantar dakʼte ona doe hara ocokeda ar khạndri jharna do onae usul ocokeda; ar ạtukʼ jharna do ona ṭhạ̃i reakʼ beṛhaeteye ạtu ocoyetʼ tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ gaḍako do bir reakʼ sanam dare nạ̃ṛĩko dakʼe emakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel31:5 Nonkate bir reakʼ joto dareko khon ona do usulena; ar ḍher dakʼe ńamketʼte ona reakʼ do maraṅ maraṅ ḍạrko hoyena ar hara idiyente pasnao idiyena. 
Ezekiel31:6 Coṭren sanam cẽṛẽko do ona reakʼ ḍạrkoreko tukạko benao joṅana ar birren sanam janwarko hõ uniyakʼ umulreko busạgokʼkan tahẽkana; ar ona reakʼ umulre do sanam napṛakʼ napṛakʼ jạtren hoṛko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel31:7 Ona pasnao akan ḍạrko reakʼ mońjtetʼ iạte ona do maraṅge tahẽkana, ente ona reakʼ rehetʼ do latar dakʼko hạbicʼ boloakan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel31:8 Isorakʼ bagwan reakʼ debdạru dareko hõ ona sãote do baṅ jurilena. Saro dareko hõ uniyakʼ maraṅ ḍạrko soman do baṅ tahẽkana; uniyakʼ ḍạrko sãote Armon dareko hõ baṅ jurilena. Ar mońj dareko hõ cetatge baṅ tahẽkana ona reakʼ tulni do. Isorakʼ bagwan reakʼ jãhãn dareko reakʼ husnạkʼ hõ ona leka do baṅ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel31:9 Aema ḍạrkote ińge ona do ṭhosokiń benaoleda; Edenre Isorakʼ bagwan reakʼ joto dare do onako hiskạwada. 
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Ńitokʼ do iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ona doe usul akana, ona reakʼ muthni do rimile tiyạkʼ akada, ar usul akante bạḍạite perecʼ akana." 
Ezekiel31:11 Ona iạte iń do boṅgan hoṛ jạtren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ tireń soprot akadea; uni do uniyakʼ bạṛicʼtetʼ lekate uni tulucʼe beohara. Uni doń nihạ̃t giḍi akadea. 
Ezekiel31:12 Boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talare joto khon kurmutạha jạtren hoṛ do uniko makʼ bhinḍạṛ akadea arko bạgi oṭoakadea. Uniyakʼ maraṅ maraṅ ḍạrko do buruko ar nalako cetanre ńur akana; uniyakʼ ḍạrko do rạputʼente disạm reakʼ sanam ạtukʼ dakʼkore ńur akana. Dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do uniyakʼ umul khon oḍok kate uniko bạgi oṭo akadea. 
Ezekiel31:13 Ona bhindạṛ akan darere coṭren sanam cẽṛẽko do hecʼkateko tahenkana ar birren sanam janwarko hõ uniyakʼ ḍạrreko ḍerakʼkana.
