Ezekiel31:14 Ona iạte dakʼ aṛe reakʼ eṭakʼ jãhãn dareko do bạḍạite baṅ usulokʼa, ona reakʼ muthniko do rimil bae tiyoga ar ona do nunạkʼ coṭhõ baṅ hara rakabokʼa. Onako joto do manwa leka gujukʼ tabe reakʼ kana; onako do dhạrti reakʼ khạndri, metakʼme patal purite pheḍokʼ lạgitʼ ṭhik doho akana." 
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorge arhoń menetʼkana, oka hilokʼ Seolte ona pheḍena enhilokʼ uni lạgitʼ homor halaṅ reakʼ cinhạ lekate ona athantar dakʼ iń dapal esetʼkeda; iń do ona reakʼ sanam ạtukʼ dakʼkoń thir ocokeda, onate ona reakʼ sanam dakʼko do teṅgo thirena. Ona lạgitʼ iń do Lebanoniń homor halaṅ ocokedea ar uniyakʼ bir reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ dare do loraoena." 
Ezekiel31:16 Gocʼ hoṛko sãote tinre Seolteń pheḍkadea unre uniyakʼ ńurokʼ reakʼ saḍete boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko doko thar tharaoena. Unre Eden reakʼ sanam dareko, Lebanon reakʼ bachao akan ar soros soros dareko ar mońjte dakʼ ńam akawatʼ sanam dareko do ot reakʼ latar utạrakʼkore jiwi raṛecʼko ńamkeda." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ar okoe uniyakʼ umulreko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan, metakʼme okoe do jạt jạtrenko talareko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onko do uni sãote Seolre laṛhạite gocʼ akan hoṛko ṭhenko pheḍ calaoena." 
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘E Pharao raj, ṭhonok ar jakjomok secʼte Eden reakʼ dareko modre mitʼṭecʼ hõ am soman do baṅkana. Enhõ Eden reakʼ dareko sãote amhõ ot reakʼ latar utạrakʼkotem pheḍ ocokʼa; ar okoe bin khatna akan hoṛ lạṛhạiteko gocʼakan onko sãote giticʼ akanem tahena.’ “Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, ona dare do hoyokʼ kana Pharao ar uniren sanam phạdkoge.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Bondi dosa reakʼ gelbar bochor reakʼ gelbar cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel32:2 “E manwa hopon, Misorren raj Pharao babotre homor halaṅkate noam metaea, ‘am dom hudisetʼ tahẽkana jạtrenko modre mitʼṭen dhạcri kul kanam mente, menkhan am do tala gaḍaren mitʼṭen tayan kanam. Am do amakʼ gaḍaregem humtạgokʼkan tahẽkana, ar jaṅgate leoḍakate dakʼem boḍeyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel32:3 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, iń do am cetanre jhạliń pasnaotińạ, hẽ, jạt jạtrenko sãotege ar onko do ińakʼ jhạliteko or rakapʼmea." 
Ezekiel32:4 Iń do ṭạnḍire amiń lebda giḍikama. Ińakʼ hukumte coṭren cẽṛẽko do am cetanreko abokʼa ar dhạrtiren sanam janwarko do amko jommea arko tirpitokʼa. 
Ezekiel32:5 Amakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ do kuṭrạkate burukore ar buru nalakoreń giḍikakʼa. 
Ezekiel32:6 Buru-ḍuṅgri hạbicʼ iń do amakʼ mãyãmte disạmiń lohoda; ar amakʼ mãyãmte ạtukʼ dakʼ do aragokʼa. 
Ezekiel32:7 Am sesme jokhecʼ rimil doń dapal esetʼkakʼa ar ipilkoń ńutkoa; rimilte siń candoń dapal esedea ar ńindạ cando do marsal bae emokʼa. 
Ezekiel32:8 Am cetan reakʼ serma reakʼ joto marsal doń ńut ocoya; amakʼ disạm cetanre ńutiń ạguiya. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Ezekiel32:9 “ ‘Jạt jạtrenko talare, amakʼ bin baḍaeyakʼ eṭakʼ disạmko talare tinre amakʼ ḍahao maraokʼ reakʼ sombatiń emakoa unre onko do monre dukko ńama." 
Ezekiel32:10 Iń do am cetanre okań cekae ona ńelte ḍher jạtrenko doko tharbasaokʼa. Ar onko samaṅre tinre ińakʼ tarwaṛeń ạcurtińạ unre onkoren rapajko do botorteko thar tharaokʼa. Amakʼ ńurokʼ dinre onkoren mimitʼko do akoakʼ jiwi botorte jao okteko thar tharaokʼa. 
Ezekiel32:11 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, Babelren rajakʼ tarwaṛe do am cetanre hijukʼa." 
Ezekiel32:12 Daṛean hoṛkoakʼ tarwaṛete, metakʼme sanam jạtrenko modre joto khon kurmutạha jạtrenkoakʼ tarwaṛete amren hoṛkoakʼ ńurokʼ iń hoeocoya. Onko do Misor reakʼ bạḍạiko chaka chuntaea ar onaren sanam hoṛko marao utạrkoa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Dakʼ aṛere tahenkan onaren sanam janwarko hõń maraokoa; ona dakʼ do manwawakʼ jaṅga se janwarakʼ khurạte ar baṅ boḍekʼa. 
Ezekiel32:14 Nonkate ona reakʼ dakʼ do saphageń dohoya ar ona reakʼ sanam gaḍako do sunum lekań ạtu ocoya. 
Ezekiel32:15 Tinre iń do Misoriń marao giḍiyea ar disạm tala reakʼ jotowakʼ iń ujạṛa ar onḍe tahenkan sanamkoń gocʼkoa unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel32:16 “ ‘Niạko sanam katha onko do Misor lạgitʼ duk sodorkateko sereńa. Eṭakʼ jạtkoren maejiuko hõko homor sereńa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Ezekiel32:17 Bondi dosa reakʼ gelbar bochor reakʼ pạhilakʼ cando reakʼ gelmõṛẽakʼ dinre Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel32:18 “E manwa hopon, Misorren hoṛko lạgitʼ homor halaṅpe ar okoe Seolteko pheḍ calakʼkan onko sãote uni ar eṭakʼ daṛean jạtkoren hoṛko hõ dhạrti reakʼ khandṛaṅte kolkakome." 
Ezekiel32:19 Ar Misor do metaeme, ‘am do cetʼ eṭakʼko khon ḍhergem cehragea? Am do Seolte pheḍ senkate bin khatna akan hoṛko talare giticʼkokʼme.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 Lạṛhạire okoeko gocʼakan onko modre uniren hoṛge giḍi akanko tahena. Uni do tarwaṛereye soprot ocokʼa; uniren sanam hoṛko sãote uni hõe or idi ocokʼa. 
Ezekiel32:21 Seol tala khon daṛean lạṛhại birko do Misor ar uniren gateko reaṅko mena, ‘tarwaṛete gocʼakan onko bin khatna hoṛko do latarte hecʼkateko giticʼ akana." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Ạsur do acʼren sanam lạṛhại phạdante onḍe menaea. Uni beṛhaete do acʼren sanam gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ topa menakʼa; noko sanamkoge lạṛhạireko gocʼlena. 
Ezekiel32:23 Onkoakʼ topa do Seol reakʼ khandṛaṅre menakʼa ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko do uniyakʼ topa beṛhaeteko gocʼ akana. Jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre okoe do botorko unạnakatʼ onko sanamge lạṛhạireko gocʼ ocoakana. 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elam hõ onḍege menaea; uniyakʼ topa beṛhaete do acʼren sanam hoṛko menakʼkoa. Onko sanamkoge lạṛhạireko gocʼ ocoakana. Onko do jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre botorko unạn ocoletʼ tahẽkana, menkhan mucạtʼre onko sanamkoge bin khatna akan dosare dhạrti reakʼ khandṛaṅreko pheḍena. Ar okoe Seolteko pheḍ sen akan onko sãotege noko hoṛ do akoakʼ lajaoko dipil akada." 
Ezekiel32:25 Gocʼ hoṛko talare do Elem reakʼ aṭetʼakʼ aṭetʼ akana; ar uniyakʼ topa beṛhaete do uni sãote uniren sanam hoṛge menakʼkoa. Noko do bin khatna akan hoṛkoakʼ lạṛhạiteko gocʼ ocoakana. Jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre onko do botorko unạnetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan okoe Seolteko pheḍakan onko sãotege noko hoṛ do akoakʼ lajaoko dipil akada; ar gocʼ hoṛ talaregeko giticʼ akatʼkoa." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesek ar Tebal do onḍe menakʼkinạ; unkin beṛhaete do unkinren sanam hoṛkoakʼ topa menakʼa. Noko do bin khatna akan hoṛkoakʼ tarwaṛeteko gocʼ ocoakana. Jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre onko do torasko pasnaoleda. 
Ezekiel32:27 Menkhan onko do bin khatna akan eṭakʼ lạṛhại birko sãote do bako giticʼ tahena. Onko lạṛhại bir do khanḍa bhanḍawante Seolteko pheḍ akana, onkoakʼ tarwaṛe do onkoakʼ bohokʼ latarre doho akana ar onkoakʼ kại reakʼ sạjại do onkoakʼ jaṅko cetanrege menakʼa. Onko do jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre torasko udukʼako kan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel32:28 “E Misor, am hõm rạputʼ ocokʼa ar onko bin khatna akan hoṛko talare giticʼ akanem tahena okoe do tarwaṛeteko gocʼ ocoakan." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edom, ar uniren rapajko ar uniren sanam disạm cakʼlaoko okare menakʼko; onkoakʼ daṛe tahẽlenre hõ lạṛhạire gocʼakan hoṛko sãoteko giticʼ akana. Okoe Seolteko pheḍ sen akan onko bin khatna akan hoṛko sãote onko doko giticʼ akana." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Onḍe do utạr secʼren disạm cakʼlaoko menakʼkoa, onko sanamkoge ar Sidonren sanamkoge, one onko gocʼ ocoakanko tulucʼ lajao salakʼko pheḍ senakan, okoakʼ birbao daṛete sanam torasko hoyocoakatʼ tahẽkanre hõ, onko do bin khatnage tarwaṛete gur akanko tulucʼko giticʼakana, ar khandṛaṅte pheḍ calakʼkanko tulucʼ akoakʼ lajaoko dipil akatʼtakoa." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Pharao do onkoe ńẽtʼkoa ar acʼren sanam phạdko ńutumte jiwiye raṛejtaea. Pharao ar uniren sanam lạṛhại phạdko do tarwaṛeteko ńẽtʼena, Probhu Isore meneda." 
Ezekiel32:32 Iń do Pharao hotete jiwetʼkoakʼ disạmre botoriń pasnao ocoletʼre hõ enhõ uni ar uniren sanam hoṛko do bin khatna akan, lạṛhạire gocʼakan hoṛko sãoteko giticʼ ocokʼa. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel33:2 “E manwa hopon, am jạtren hoṛko metakom, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘jãhã mitʼṭecʼ disạmre lạṛhạiyiń ạgui, ar ona disạmren hoṛko do akoren mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ bachaokate horhoyicʼko dohoye," 
Ezekiel33:3 ar uni do ona disạm upạrte tarwaṛe hijukʼkan ńelte hoṛko sontorko lạgitʼ sakwae oroṅ," 
Ezekiel33:4 ar jodi sakwa reakʼ saḍe ańjomkate hõ jãhãe bae sontorokʼ ar tarwaṛe hecʼkate uniye capoṭe enḍekhan uniyakʼ mãyãm do acʼrege paṛaokʼa. 
Ezekiel33:5 Sakwa reakʼ saḍe ańjomkate bae sontorlente uniyakʼ mãyãm do acʼrege paṛaokʼa; are sontorlen khan, jiwi do rukhiyạ daṛekokʼtaea." 
Ezekiel33:6 Menkhan, uni pahradar do tarwaṛe hijukʼkan ńelkaterehõ hoṛko sontorko lạgitʼ sakwa bae oroṅ, ar tarwaṛe hecʼkate jãhãe mitʼ hoṛe capoṭe, enḍekhan acʼakʼ ghạṭ iạte uni doe capoṭ ocokʼa, menkhan uni pahradarakʼ ti khon uniyakʼ mãyãm reakʼ iń hala hạliya." 
Ezekiel33:7 “E manwa hopon, Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼ iń do pahradariń bahal akadea; onate iń okań menetʼkan ona ańjompe ar iń ńutumte onko cehaokope." 
Ezekiel33:8 Iń do tinre jãhãe bedhorom hoṛiń metae, ‘Eya bedhoromicʼ, am do khạṭigem gujukʼa,’ ar am do bạṛicʼ hor khon ạcur ruạṛokʼ lạgitʼ uni bam sontore, enḍekhan uni bedhorom hoṛ do acʼakʼ ghạṭ iạteye gujukʼa menkhan uniyakʼ gujukʼ lạgitʼ do amgeń dạyimea." 
Ezekiel33:9 Menkhan uni bedhorom hoṛ acʼakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛokʼ lạgitʼem cehaoe ar enhõ bae ruạṛ enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ ghạṭ iạteye gujukʼa, menkhan am do amakʼ jiwim rukhiyạitama." 
Ezekiel33:10 “E manwa hopon, am do Israel jạtrenkom metakoa, ‘apepe meneda apeakʼ behokakʼ ar kại reakʼ bojhatepe lade ocoakana; ar onategepe heṛokʼkana, jiwetʼ tahen reakʼ asge bạnukʼtapea.’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Am do onkom metakoa, iń Probhu Isorge, iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ gujukʼte jãhãn rạskạ do bạń ńameda, bickom bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛkate jemonko bańcaokʼ onate iń doń rạskạkʼa. E Israel jạtrenko, dela ruạṛpe, apeakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khon ruạṛ hijukʼpe. Ente cedakʼpe gujukʼa?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Ona iạte, E manwa hopon, am jạtren hoṛkom metakoa, ‘dhorom hoṛ jodi Probhu Isorakʼ bae bataotae enḍekhan uni do acʼakʼ dhoromtetʼ iạte bae rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa. Dhorom hoṛ jodiye kại enḍekhan uniyakʼ lahateakʼ dhoromtetʼ iạte uni do bae bańcao daṛeakʼa.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛiń metae, am do khạṭige jiwetʼem tahena, menkhan uni do dhoromre bhorsakate bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi enḍekhan lahate okako dhoromakʼe kạmi akatʼ ona reakʼ okaṭakʼge baṅ disạkʼtaea; ar oka bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi akatʼ ona iạtege uni doe gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel33:14 Iń do mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ hoṛiń metae, ‘am do khạṭigem gujukʼa,’ menkhan uni do kại khon ruạṛkate dhorom ar bhageakʼkoe kạmi," 
Ezekiel33:15 metakʼme uni do bondhok dohoakatʼ jinis ar kombṛo akatʼakʼ jiniskoe ruạṛkakʼ ar jiwetʼakʼ ạn-ạrikoe manao ar bạṛicʼakʼ bae kạmi enḍekhan uni do bae gujukʼa, khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Uni okae kại akatʼ ona reakʼ jãhãnakʼge uni upạrte do baṅ disạ dohokʼtaea. Uni do dhorom ar bhageakʼkoe kạmiakatʼ iạte khạṭigeye bańcaokʼa. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Enhõ am jạtren hoṛko mena, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ hor do baṅ ṭhika.’ Menkhan onkoakʼ horge baṅ ṭhiktakoa." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mitʼṭen dhorom hoṛ jodi acʼakʼ dhoromtetʼ khon ruạṛkate bạṛicʼakʼe kạmi enḍekhan ona iạte uni doe gujukʼa. 
Ezekiel33:19 Mitʼṭen bạṛicʼ hoṛ jodi acʼakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ khon ruạṛkate dhorom ar bhageakʼkoe kạmi enḍekhan uni doe bańcaokʼa. 
Ezekiel33:20 Enhõ E Israelko, apepe meneda, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ hor do ṭhikteakʼ baṅkana.’ Ape cetʼlekape calakʼkan onkage mimitʼkoń bicạrpea.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Bondi dosa reakʼ gelbar bochor reakʼ gelakʼ cando reakʼ mõṛẽakʼ dinre mitʼṭen hoṛ do Jerusalem khone ńir paskaoente iń ṭhen hecʼenteye menkeda, “Bạiriko do nagrahako dokhol akada.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Uni hoṛ seṭerokʼ lahare ạyupʼ jokhecʼ Probhu Isorakʼ ti do iń cetanre tahẽkana ar setakʼ jokhecʼ iń ṭhene hijukʼ lahare Probhu Isor do ińakʼ mocae jhicʼketʼtińạ. Onate iń do katha roroṛiń ehopʼena, ar guṅgạ do bạń tahẽlena." 
Ezekiel33:23 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel33:24 “E manwa hopon, Israel disạm reakʼ dhaṅ dhaser akan ṭhạ̃ire okoeko girobasokʼ kan onko doko meneda, ‘Abraham do eken mitʼṭen manwa hoykate hõ disạm reakʼ ạidạriye ńamleda. Menkhan ale dole ḍhergea; onate disạm do khạṭige aleakʼ ạidạri lạgitʼ em ocoakana.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Ona iạte am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘ape do mãyãm sudhạ jelpe jomeda, ar boṅgakope sewa akokana ar mãyãmpe joroyetʼkana; enḍekhan ape do cetʼ disạmpe ạidạri joṅa?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Ape do apeakʼ tarwaṛe cetanrepe bhorsakʼ kana, ar bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmikana ar aḍepaseren mimitʼ hoṛkoren bạhupe nosṭoyetʼkoa; enḍekhan ape do cetʼ disạmren ạidạrikope hoyokʼa?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Am do onkom metakoa, iń Probhu Isorge iń ńutumte kiriạkateń menetʼkana, okoe ona dhaṅ dhaser akan ṭhạ̃ire menakʼko onko doko gocʼ ocokʼa, ar okoe ṭạnḍire menakʼko onko do bir janwar ṭhen jom ocokʼ lạgitʼ iń emakoa ar okoe gaṛ ar danderre menakʼko onko do mahamạriteko gujukʼa." 
Ezekiel33:28 Israel disạm do mitʼṭecʼ ujạṛ utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃igeń hoeocoya; uniyakʼ daṛe reakʼ bạḍạitetʼ do caba utạrokʼtaea ar uniyakʼ buru-ḍuṅgriko do ujạṛ akange tahena, ar onkate do celege bako sen paromokʼa." 
Ezekiel33:29 Onkoakʼ hirkhạwakʼ sanam kạmiko iạte tinre disạm do ujạṛ utạrakʼ iń hoeocoya unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel33:30 “E manwa hopon, am jạtren hoṛko do pạcri bhit pheḍre ar oṛakʼ reakʼ duạrko ṭhen am reaṅko galmaraojoṅ kana, mitʼ hoṛ do ar mitʼ hoṛe metaekana, ‘Probhu Isor ṭhen khon oka khobor hecʼakan dela, senkate ona bon ańjomlege.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Ińren hoṛ do hewa lekate am ṭhenko hijukʼkana ar amakʼ kathako ańjomeda ar am samaṅreko duṛubokʼ kana, menkhan onka do bako kạmikana. Mocatege onko do dulạṛ reakʼ kathako roṛeda menkhan onkoakʼ mon do labjoṅrege gaḍao akantakoa." 
Ezekiel33:32 Noa katha do sạrikana je, onko ṭhen do cĩkạ̃ṛ aṛaṅte bajnako salakʼ dulạṛ reakʼem sereńetʼkan mitʼṭen hoṛ chaḍa cele hõm baṅkana; ente amakʼ katha doko ańjometʼgea, menkhan onka do bako kạmiya." 
Ezekiel33:33 “Tinre noako jotowakʼ hoyokʼa, ar khạṭige hoyokʼte hõ hoyokʼgea, unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, onko talare mitʼṭen nạbigeye tahẽkana mente. ”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Probhu Isoe do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel34:2 “E manwa hopon, Israelren gukʼpiko upạrte am do nạbi lekate niạ katham lại jạhira, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘Hae, Israelren onko gukʼpiko do, okoe do eken apnargeko ńel jujutkan! Bhiḍiko ńel todarotko do cetʼ gukʼpikoakʼ lek do baṅkana?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Ape do toape jomeda, ar upʼte do kiricʼ benaokatepe horokʼeda ar bachao akan bheḍakope guretʼkoa, menkhan bhiḍiko do bape jotonetʼkoa." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ape do nijor akanko bape daṛe ocoletʼkoa, ruạkʼko bape boge ocoletʼkoa, ghạl akankoakʼ ghaoko bape bedhao letʼtakoa. Ar okoe bạṛicʼ horteko sen akan onko hõ bape ruạṛ ạguletʼkoa ar atʼ akan hoṛkoakʼ khoj tolas hõ bape hataoleda, bickom kajak ar kurmutạha lekape ḍanṭao akatʼkoa." 
Ezekiel34:5 Gukʼpiko bạnukʼko iạte onko doko chirchạtur akana ar bir janwarkoren adharko hoyakana. 
Ezekiel34:6 Ińren bhiḍiko do goṭa buru-nalakoreko ạcur baṛaekana. Goṭa dhạrtireko chirchạtur akana; okoehõ onkoakʼ khoj tolas do bako hatao akada. 
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Onatege, E gukʼpiko, ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Ezekiel34:8 Iń Probhu Isorge iń ńutumte kiriạkateń menetʼkana, gukʼpiko begorte ińren palko do luṭren jinisko hoyakana ar bir janwarkoren adharko hoyakana. Ińren gukʼpiko do ińren palrenkoakʼ khoj tolas bako hatao akada ar ńel hõ bako ńel todarotletʼkoa; ona bodolte onko do ako apnargeko ńel todarotokʼ kana." 
Ezekiel34:9 Ona iạte, E gukʼpiko, ińakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Ezekiel34:10 Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, iń do gukʼpiko secʼ do bạnuńạ; ar onkoakʼ ti khon ińren bhiḍikoń hataokoa. Ar ińren pal gukʼpiko khoniń ocokʼkoa jemon apnartetʼ aloko lab daṛeakʼ. Onkoakʼ moca khon ińakʼ palrenkoń rukhiyạkoa ar bhiḍiko do onkoren jomakʼ bako hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel34:11 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, iń apnartetʼge ińren bheḍakoakʼ khoj tolasiń hataoa ar onkoń ńel jutkoa." 
Ezekiel34:12 Gukʼpiyicʼ cetʼ leka acʼren pasnao akan palrenkoe tolasko onkage ińren bhiḍi hõń tolaskoa. Rimil ar ńut reakʼ dinre oka ṭhạ̃ikoreko pasnao akan iń do onḍe khoniń bańcao ạgukoa. 
Ezekiel34:13 Iń do jạt jạtrenko ar disạmko tala khoniń oḍok ạgukoa ar akoakʼ disạmreń jarwakoa. Ar Israel reakʼ buru-boṭkocʼ cetanre, gaḍako aṛere ar disạm reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ikore onkoń gupikoa." 
Ezekiel34:14 Onko do bhage bhage ạtiń ṭạnḍireń gupikoa ar Israel reakʼ usul burukore onkoakʼ ạtiń ṭhạ̃i do hoyokʼa. Onko do bhage ṭhạ̃iregeko tahena ar onḍe Israelakʼ burukore bhage ạtiń ṭạnḍireko ạtiń baṛaea. 
Ezekiel34:15 Ińge ińren bhiḍikoń gupikoa ar jirạukʼ ṭhạ̃iteń idikoa. 
Ezekiel34:16 Ar okoeko atʼakan onkoń sendra ạgukoa ar okoe do eṭakʼ hor secʼko ghańjeṛ akan onko doń ruạṛ ạgukoa. Ar hạn akanko do ghaokoń bedhaokatakoa ar nijorko do jorankoń hoyocokoa, menkhan lodgopʼ ar daṛeanko doń marao giḍikoa, ente iń do dhorom reakʼ bicạr talate ińren palrenkoń ńel jutkoa." 
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘E ińakʼ palrenko, ańjomtińpe. Iń do bhage bhiḍi ar bạṛicʼ bhiḍiko talareń bicạra. Ar bhiḍi ar meromko talare hõń bicạra." 
Ezekiel34:18 Apeakʼ bhage ạtiń ṭạnḍi do cetʼ komkante sarecʼakʼ ạtiń jaega hõ jaṅgatepe lebetʼ gasmanḍaoa? Ar phạriạ dakʼpe ńũiyetʼ do cetʼ komkante sarecʼ dakʼ hõ jaṅgatepe leoḍa boḍeyeda? 
Ezekiel34:19 Jaṅgate okape lebetʼ gasmanḍao akatʼ ar okaṭakʼ dakʼpe leoḍa boḍeakatʼ onage cetʼ ińren bhiḍiko do ńũńũi hoyokʼtakoa? 
Ezekiel34:20 “ ‘Ńelpe, iń Probhu Isorge lodgopʼ ar roga bhiḍiko talareń bicạra." 
Ezekiel34:21 Joto nijor bhiḍiko ạuripe laga ńirko hạbicʼ ape do hoṛmo ar tarenkote onkope ṭhelaoetʼkoa ar dereńtepe uṭicʼ pạsiretʼkoa. 
Ezekiel34:22 Onate ińren bhiḍi doń rukhiyạkoa ar luṭren jinis do bako hoyokʼa. Iń do boge bhiḍiko ar bạṛicʼ bhiḍiko talareń bicạra. 
Ezekiel34:23 Onko cetanre mitʼṭen gukʼpiyicʼ, metakʼme ińren guti Dạudiń ojokʼ bahalea; uni acʼge onkoe ńel todarotkoa ar onkoren gukʼpiyicʼe hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel34:24 Iń Probhu Isorge onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa ar ińren guti Dạud do onkoren mukhiyại hoyokʼa. Iń Probhuge noa katha doń meneda. 
Ezekiel34:25 “ ‘Iń do onko lạgitʼ bhạlại reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosiń dohoya ar disạm khon botoran janwarkoń marao utạrkoa jemon ińren bhiḍiko do khạtirjomako tahente bir-gajaṛkore hõko jạpitʼ daṛeakʼ. 
Ezekiel34:26 Iń do onkoń bhorakoa ar ińakʼ buru reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ ṭhạ̃iko hõń bhorakʼa. Iń do okte nạpitre dakʼ iń kola; ar ona do ạsirbad reakʼ dakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel34:27 Ona do ṭạnḍi reakʼ darekore joye sapʼ ocoya ar ot do phosole emokʼa; ar onko do apan ạpin jumireko girobasokʼa. Ar onkoakʼ arãṛ tinreń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa ar okoe do golamko benaoletʼko onkoakʼ ti khoniń chaḍao ạgukoa, ar unreko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel34:28 Onko do jạt jạtkoren luluṭ jinis do ar bako hoyokʼa, bir janwarko ṭhen hõ bako jom ocokʼa. Onko do khạtirjomako tahena ar celege bako botor ocokoa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Iń do upjạuakʼ ot baṛgekoń emakoa; disạm talare onko do akalre ar bako paṛaokʼa ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko ṭhen hõ bako henosta ocokʼa. 
Ezekiel34:30 Unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do ar ińge onko são sãote minạńa ar onko do metakʼme, Israelko do ińren hoṛ kanako." 
Ezekiel34:31 E ińakʼ palrenko, ińakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍirenko, ape do ińren kangeape ar iń doń aperen Isor kana. Ar iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel35:2 “E manwa hopon, Seyir buru secʼ samaṅme ar uni upạrte noa nạbi katha roṛme," 
Ezekiel35:3 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, E Seyir buru, iń do am upạrte minạńa; iń do am upạrte tiyiń tultińạ ar ujạṛ utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃igeń hoyocomea." 
Ezekiel35:4 Amakʼ nagrahako do dhaṅdhaserakʼ ṭhạ̃igeń hoeocoya ar am do ujạṛakʼem hoyokʼa. Ar unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel35:5 “ ‘Ḍher din khon am do Israelren bạirim hoyakana ar onkoakʼ muhinre tinre onkoakʼ sạjại do purạteko em ocoakana unre am do tarwaṛe reakʼ daṛerem soprotketʼkoa. 
Ezekiel35:6 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isorge ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, iń do mãyãm reakʼ tireń soprotmea ar ona do ame khudạu baṛamea. Am do mãyãm bam hirkhạwakʼkante mãyãmge am doe khudạu baṛamea." 
Ezekiel35:7 Seyir buru do ujạṛakʼ ar dhaṅdhaserakʼ ṭhạ̃i iń hoeocoya ar okoe onḍeko bolo oḍokokʼ onko jotogeń marao utạrkoa. 
Ezekiel35:8 Amakʼ buruko do gocʼ hoṛkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩteń pereja; lạṛhạire okoeko gocʼakan onko do amakʼ burukore, nalakore ar amakʼ sanam dakʼ ạtukʼ ṭhạ̃ikore giḍi akanko tahena." 
Ezekiel35:9 Jaejug lạgitʼ am do ujạṛ utạrakʼ iń hoyocomea; amakʼ nagrahakore do ar celege bako girobasokʼa. Unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel35:10 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do Israel ar Jihudạre hạjir iń tahẽkanre hõ am dom menetʼkana, niạ banar disạmren hoṛko ar onkoakʼ disạm do apeakʼge hoyokʼa ar ape do onape ạidạrijoṅa." 
Ezekiel35:11 Ona iạte iń Probhu Isor do ińakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateń menetʼkana, onko cetanre hirkhạ iạte cetʼleka hiskạ ar raṅgaoem udukʼletʼ onkage iń hõ am sãoteń beohara; ar tinreń bicạrmea unre onko talare apnariń sodorokʼa." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ar unrem baḍae daṛeakʼa, am do Israel reakʼ buruko upạrte oka henosta reakʼ katham roṛakatʼ ona do iń Probhu Isorgeń ańjom akada. Am dom menakada, dhaṅ dhaserakʼ do utʼgotʼkakʼ lạgitʼgem em ocoakana." 
Ezekiel35:13 Am do iń upạrte bạḍạikate ḍher katham roṛ akada. Ar ona doń ańjomakada. 
Ezekiel35:14 Goṭa dhạrtirenko tinreko hulạsokʼa unre am do ujạṛ utạrakʼ iń hoyocomea. 
Ezekiel35:15 Ar Israelko ạidạri lekate okaṭakʼ disạmko ńamakatʼ ar ujạṛ akan ńelte cetʼ lekam rạskạkʼkan onkage iń do am sãoteń beohara. E Seyir buru, am ar Edom reakʼ sarecʼ sanam ṭhạ̃i do ujạṛ utạrakʼge hoyokʼa. Unre hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, Israel reakʼ buruko ṭhen nạbi katha roṛme ar Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha ańjom lạgitʼem metakoa, bạiriko do onko reaṅe menetʼkana, ‘Ah! Mare usul ṭhạ̃iko do aboakʼ dokholre hecʼakana.’" 
Ezekiel36:2  
Ezekiel36:3 Onatege iń Probhu Isoriń menetʼ kana, jạt jạtrenkoakʼ dokholre jemonpe hijukʼ ar jemon hoṛko hiskạ arko landa dhutʼape ona lạgitʼ onko do beṛhae secʼ khonko maraoetʼpea arko utʼetʼpea." 
Ezekiel36:4 Onate E Israel reakʼ buruko, ape do ińakʼ katha ańjompe. E maraṅ ar huḍiń buruko, khandṛaṅko, buru-nalako, ujạṛ utạrakʼ dhaṅ dhaserakʼko ar ape beṛhaeten eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko okoe do luluṭko ar landa dhudhutʼkope hoyocoakatʼko ona bạgi oṭowakʼ nagrahako," 
Ezekiel36:5 Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, ińakʼ dugur dugurokʼkan edre iạte eṭakʼ jạtrenko ar sanam Edomrenko upạrte kathań roṛetʼkana, ente onko do goṭa mon reakʼ rạskạte ar nihạ̃t gikʼḍi monte ińakʼ disạm do ạidạri menteko hạtińana; jemon onako ạidạri daṛeakʼ arko luṭ daṛeakʼ. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Am do Israel disạm upạrte nạbi katha roṛme. Uniyakʼ maraṅ buruko ar huḍiń buruko, khandṛaṅko ar buru-nalakom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘ińakʼ dugur dugurokʼ kan edreteń menetʼkana, ente ape do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenkoakʼ nisṛạupe dipil akada." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ona iạte iń do kiriạkateń menetʼkana, ape beṛhaeten jạtrenko hõ akoakʼ nisṛạuko dipiltakoa." 
Ezekiel36:8 “ ‘Menkhan E Israel reakʼ buruko, ape do apeakʼ dare reakʼ ḍạrkope kahle oḍok ocoyte ińren hoṛ Israelko lạgitʼ ḍher jope jokʼa, ente onko do usạratege oṛakʼteko ruạṛ hijukʼa." 
Ezekiel36:9 Iń do ape secʼge minạńa ar apegeń moneyapea; onate apere do casogokʼa ar itạ hõ erogokʼa. 
Ezekiel36:10 Apere goṭa Israel jạtren hoṛkoakʼ lekhań ḍher ocoya. Nagrahakore hoṛko girobasokʼa ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ do arhõ benao arokʼa. 
Ezekiel36:11 Apere manwa ar janwarkoakʼ lekha hõń ḍher ocoya ar onko doko bạḍ idikʼa ar lekhareko ḍherokʼa. Ar apere lahate lekage hoṛkoń girobas ocokoa ar laha khon hõ ḍher gidrạkoń hoyocokotapea. Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel36:12 Iń do ape cetante hoṛko, metakʼme ińren hoṛ Israelkoń dãṛãbaṛa ocokoa. Onko do apeko ạidạripea ar onkoren ạidạri reakʼ ṭhạ̃ipe hoyokʼa; ar tishõ bin gidrạwanko do bape hoyocokoa." 
Ezekiel36:13 “ ‘E Israel disạm, hoṛ doko metamkana, am do hoṛ jojomicʼ kanam ar apnar jạtrenko do bin gidrạwan kom hoyoco akatʼkoa." 
Ezekiel36:14 Menkhan ińiń menetʼkana, manwa do ar alom utʼkoa ar am jạtren hoṛko hõ bin gidrạwanko alom hoyocokoa." 
Ezekiel36:15 Jạt jạtrenkoakʼ landa dhutʼicʼ do ar bạń hoyocomea ar onkoakʼ henosta hõ ar bam ańjoma. Am khạtirte amren hoṛko do ar bako tohodokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Ezekiel36:16 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel36:17 “E Manwa hopon, Israelrenko akoakʼ disomreko girobasokʼ jokhecʼ onkoakʼ colon ar kạmiko hotete disạmko bhonḍleda. Ar ińakʼ mẽtʼre onkoakʼ colon do maejiukoakʼ candoteakʼ reakʼ besaphawakʼ lekage tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ona iạte ińakʼ raṅgao do onko cetanreń upʼleda, ente onko do disạm talare mãyãmko joroleda ar onkoren boṅga murhutʼkote disạmko bhonḍleda." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ona iạte boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko ar disạmko talareń chir chạturletʼkoa; ar onkoakʼ colon ar kạmi lekateń sạjạiletʼkoa. 
Ezekiel36:20 Ar jạt jạtrenko talare jãhãregeko senlen onḍege ińakʼ sonot ńutumko besonot letʼtińạ, ente hoṛ do onko reaṅko roṛetʼ tahẽkana, ‘Probhuren hoṛ kanako, enhõ uniyakʼ disạm khon oḍokʼ hijukʼ hoyentakoa.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Ińakʼ ńutum reakʼ sonottetʼ rukhiyạitiń lạgitʼgeń moneyatʼ tahẽkana, ente Israel hoponko do jạt jạtrenko talare ińakʼ ńutumko besonot akatʼtińạ." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Onatege am do Israelkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E Israelko, ape khạtirte noakoń kạmi lạgidokʼkan ona do baṅa, menkhan ińakʼ ona sonot ńutum khạtirtege onań onkaea. Ape okoe do jạt jạtrenko talarepe senlen onḍege ińakʼ ńutumpe besonot akada." 
Ezekiel36:23 Okaṭakʼ ńutum do jạt jạtrenko talare besonot hoyakan ona ińakʼ maraṅ ńutum reakʼ sonottetʼ iń do apeń udukʼapea; ente onko talare ape do ona ńutumpe besonot akada. Iń do onkoakʼ mẽtʼãha samaṅre ape hotetege ińakʼ ńutumiń sonot ocoytińạ ar unre jạt jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel36:24 “ ‘Boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko tala khon ińge apeń oḍok ạgupea; ar goṭa disạm khoniń jarwapea ar apeakʼ disạmteń ruạṛ ạgupea. 
Ezekiel36:25 Ape cetanre saphakʼ reakʼ dakʼ iń chiṭkạu apea, ar onatepe saphakʼa; apeakʼ sanam hirkhạwakʼko ar boṅga murhutʼko khon apeń saphapea." 
Ezekiel36:26 Iń do apere nãwã ontor ar nãwã moniń emapea; ar apeakʼ keṭecʼ moniń sạṅgiń ocoyte lạbitʼ moniń danapea. 
Ezekiel36:27 Apere ińren Jiu iń bạisạuapea ar nonkań hoyocopea jemon ińakʼ sanam niạmpe manaotiń. Onate ape do ińakʼ ạn-ạṛikope moneyakʼa. 
Ezekiel36:28 Ar aperen hapṛamko okaṭakʼ disạm iń ematʼko tahẽkan onḍegepe girobasokʼa; ape do ińren hoṛpe hoyokʼa ar iń do aperen Isor iń hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel36:29 Iń do apeakʼ sanam besaphawakʼ khoniń rukhiyạpea. Ar aema phosolkoń emapea ar apeakʼ disạmre akal do ar bạń kola. 
Ezekiel36:30 Iń do dare reakʼ jo ar khet reakʼ phosolkoń baḍhao ocoytapea jemon akal khạtirte jạtrenko talare alope bemanot ocokʼ. 
Ezekiel36:31 Ar unre ape do apeakʼ bạṛicʼ colon ar bạṛicʼ kạmiko reakʼ kathape disạiya ar apeakʼ kại ar bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko iạte apnartetʼpe hirkhạ joṅa. 
Ezekiel36:32 Ape do baḍaekakʼpe, ape khạtirte noa kạmi do bạń kạmi lạgidokʼkana. E Israel jạtrenko, apeakʼ colon iạte lajao ar dukokʼpe." 
Ezekiel36:33 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, oka hilokʼ sanam kạiko khoniń saphapea enhilokʼ iń do nagrahakore hoṛkoń girobas ocokoa ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ ṭhạ̃iko arhõń benao aroya." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ar parom senokʼre hoṛko do okaṭakʼ disạm jarkhar akanko ńelletʼ ona disạmre do cas abadokʼa. 
Ezekiel36:35 Onko doko mena, noa disạm do lahate maraolen tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ ona do Eden bagwan leka hoyakana; ona reakʼ nagrahako do maraoakʼ, ujạṛakʼ ar jarkharakʼ hoylena, menkhan ńitokʼ do pạcrite esetʼ ar ḍerakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyakana." 
Ezekiel36:36 Unre ape beṛhaete jiwetʼ tahen jạt jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge dhaṅ dhaserakʼko arhõń benao aro akada ar ujạṛakʼ ṭhạ̃ikore arhõ darekoń rohoe akada. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menakada ar ińge onań onkaea.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ińe metadińa, “Iń do ar mitʼ dhao Israel jạtrenko iń ṭhen nehõrokʼ iń metakoa ar onkoakʼ nehõrokʼakʼ lekate bhiḍi palko leka onkoren hoṛko alekhań hoyocokoa." 
Ezekiel36:38 Jerusalemre niṭ akatʼ porobre cetʼleka samaṅokʼ bheḍakote perejokʼkan tahẽkan onkage dhaṅdhaser akan nagrahako do alekha manwakote perejokʼa. Unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Probhu Isorakʼ ti do iń cetanre tahẽkana ar uni do acʼren Jiu hoteteye idikedeńte mitʼṭecʼ buru-nala reakʼ otetreye dohokedińa; ona ṭhạ̃i do jaṅkote perecʼge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel37:2 Uni do onako reakʼ beṛhaeteye idikedińa. Ar ona buru-nala reakʼ otetre aema jaṅkoń ńelkeda; onako do rohoṛge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel37:3 Uni do ińe kulikedińa, “E manwa hopon, noako jaṅ do cetʼ jiwetʼ daṛekokʼgea? ” Ińiń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, eken amge ona dom baḍaea.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Unre uni do ona jaṅko ṭhen noa nạbi katha roroṛe metadińạ, “E rohoṛ jaṅko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjompe." 
Ezekiel37:5 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘iń do apere sahẽtʼ iń aderapea arpe jiwedokʼa." 
Ezekiel37:6 Iń do apeakʼ jaṅko sãote jaṅkoń tolkatapea, ar apeakʼ jelkoń janam ocoya ar hartate onakoń esetʼ ocoya. Ar sahẽtʼ iń emapea arpe jiwedokʼa. Unre ape dope baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ar cetʼ lekań hukum ocolen onkage iń do nạbi kathań roṛkeda. Nạbi katha roroṛ jokhecʼge khaṭ khoṭ saḍeń ańjomkeda ar mitʼke mitʼ jaṅ do apan ạpin jaṅ sãote joṛao mitʼena. 
Ezekiel37:8 Ińiń ńelkeda jaṅko sãote jaṅ tolena, ar ona cetanre jel hoyena ar hartate ona do dapal esetʼena, menkhan onkore sahẽtʼ do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel37:9 Unre uni do ińe metadińạ, “Am do hoe ńutumte nạbi katha roṛme; E manwa hopon, noa nạbi katha roṛme, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E hoe, am do beṛhae secʼ khon hijukʼme ar noko gocʼ hoṛkore sahẽtʼ emokʼme jemonko jiwedokʼ.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Ona iạte uniyakʼ hukum lekage iń do nạbi kathań roṛkeda ar unre onkore sahẽtʼ boloyena; ar onko doko jiwetʼena ar jaṅgateko teṅgoyena. Onko do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼ lạṛhại phạdko tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel37:11 Ona tayom uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, noako jaṅ do hoyokʼkana sanam Israel jạtrenkoge. Onkoko meneda, ‘aleakʼ jaṅ do rohoṛ akantalea ar aleakʼ ashõ bạnukʼtalea; ale dole gocʼakana.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Onatege am do onko ṭhen noa nạbi katha roṛme, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E ińren hoṛko, iń do apeakʼ topa jhicʼkate onḍe khon iń rakapʼ ạgupea. Israel disạmre apeń ruạṛ ạgupea." 
Ezekiel37:13 Iń do tinre apeakʼ topakoń jhijtapea ar onḍe khoniń oḍok ạgupea unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ińren Jiu do apereń emokʼa ar ape dope jiwedokʼa. Ar apeakʼ disạmreń girobas ocopea. Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana ariń onka akada.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Ezekiel37:16 “E manwa hopon, mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅga hataokate am do ona cetanre noa katha olme, ‘Jihudạ ar ona sãote Israelko lạgitʼ.’ Ona tayom ar mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅga ạgukate ona cetanre olme, ‘Ephrayem reakʼ ṭheṅga, metakʼme Joseph ar uni sãoten sanam Israelko lạgitʼ.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Tayomte ona banar ṭheṅga joṛaokate mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅga benaome jemon amakʼ tire ona banar ṭheṅga do mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅgage hoyokʼ. 
Ezekiel37:18 “Ar am jạtren hoṛko tinreko kulimea, ‘am do cetʼ noa reakʼ mane bam lạiyalea?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Unre onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘Ephrayemakʼ tire Joseph ar uni sãote Israelren gusṭiko reakʼ oka ṭheṅga menakʼ iń do ona hataokate Jihudạ reakʼ ṭheṅga sãote joṛaokate mitʼṭecʼ ṭheṅgageń hoeocoya ar ona banar do ińakʼ tire mitʼṭecʼge hoyokʼa.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 Am okakin ṭheṅga cetanrem olakatʼ ona do unkinakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre dohokate unkinem metakinạ, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘Israelko okoe jạtrenko talare menakʼko onḍe khon iń do onkoń oḍok ạgukoa. Ar beṛhae secʼ khoniń jarwakoa ar akoakʼ disạmteń ruạṛ idikoa." 
Ezekiel37:21  
Ezekiel37:22 Onḍe Israel reakʼ buruko cetanre onko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ rajosṭiń benaoa. Onko sanamko cetanre mitʼṭen rajgeye hoyokʼa ar onko do tishõ barea do bako hoyokʼa ar barea rajosṭi do baṅ hạṭińokʼa. 
Ezekiel37:23 Onkoren sanam boṅga murhutʼkote se jãhãn behokakʼte onko do apnartetʼ ar bako bhonḍokʼa. Iń do onkoakʼ sanam kại ar bạṛicʼ hor khoniń rukhiyạkoa ariń saphakoa. Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel37:24 “ ‘Ińren guti Dạud do onkoren raje hoyokʼa ar sanamkoren gukʼpiyicʼ do mitʼṭengeye hoyokʼa. Onko do ińakʼ ạn-ạri lekako calakʼa ar ińakʼ sanam niạm sontorteko manaoa. 
Ezekiel37:25 Ar okaṭakʼ disạm do ińren guti Jakob iń em akawadea, ar okaṭakʼ disạmre onkoren hapṛamko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkan onḍege onko hõko girobasokʼa. Onko ar onkoren hoponko, hoponerako ar goṛom gidrạko onḍe jaejugko tahena ar ińren guti Dạud do jaejug hạbicʼ onkoren raje hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel37:26 Onko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhạlạiyanakʼ bondobosiń dohoya; ar ona do jaejug lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobosge hoyokʼa. Onko do daṛeankoń hoyocokoa ar onkoakʼ lekhań baḍhao ocoytakoa ar ińakʼ oṛakʼ do jaejug lạgitʼ onko talareń bạisạutińạ. 
Ezekiel37:27 Ińakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do onko talarege hoyokʼa; iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa ar onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel37:28 Ińakʼ oṛakʼ do tinre jaejug lạgitʼ onko talare hoyokʼa unre jạtren sanamko baḍaea daṛeakʼa, iń Probhu Isorge iń ńutumte Israel doń begar dohoakadea.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Ezekiel38:2 “E manwa hopon, am do Mogog disạm reakʼ Mesok ar Tubạlren maraṅ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Gog secʼ samaṅkate noa nạbi katha roṛme," 
Ezekiel38:3 Probhu Isore meneda, ‘E Mesok ar Tubạlren maraṅ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Gog, iń do am secʼren doń baṅkana." 
Ezekiel38:4 Am do tayom secʼ iń ạcurmea ar amakʼ jambere bạ̃ṛsiń lagaoa ar amakʼ goṭa lạṛhại phạdko sãote, metakʼme sanam sadomko, mońj kicricʼ horokʼakatʼ aswariko ar lạṭu kạṭicʼ ḍhalko ar tarwaṛeko sudhạ mitʼ maraṅ okocʼ dol sãote amiń oḍok ạgumea." 
Ezekiel38:5 Onko sãote Pharas, Kus ar Puṭ disạmren lạṛhại phạdko tahena; onko sanamkoge ḍhal ar bohokʼ rurukhiyạ ṭupri horokʼ akaeko tahena." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer disạmren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar utạr secʼ reakʼ ses simạna reakʼ Beth-Togarma disạmren sanam lạṛhại phạdko am sãoteko tahena. Ar ḍher jạtrenkoge am sãoteko tahena. 
Ezekiel38:7 “ ‘Ma sapṛaokʼme; am beṛhaete jarwa akan sanam dol bolko salakʼ, ape do apnartetʼ sapṛaokʼpe ar am do onkoren subedar hoyokʼme." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ḍher bochor tayom am do lạṛhại lạgitʼem hoho ocokʼa. Unre am do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ disạm cetanre jhãpem ema okaṭakʼ disạm do lạṛhại khon rehaye ńamakatʼ, one onaren hoṛko do ḍher jạtrenko tala khon Israel reakʼ burureko jarwa akan. Ona disạm do ḍher din khon ujạṛakʼ tahẽkana, menkhan am do jhãp ạurim emrege uniren hoṛko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko tala khonko oḍok ạgu ocokʼa, ar unre onko do jotoge khạtirjomako tahena." 
Ezekiel38:9 Amren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar am sãoten ḍher jạtrenko do ona disạm cetanre jhãp em lạgitʼ hoe bharḍo lekako laha idikʼa; ar ape do rimil leka disạmpe chạplạu eseda. 
Ezekiel38:10 “ ‘Enhilokʼ amakʼ monre do aema lekan hudisko hecʼama ar mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼ bundisem perejokʼa. 
Ezekiel38:11 Arem mena, nonkan mitʼṭecʼ disạmre jhãpiń ema one oka reakʼ atokore pạcri bạnukʼ. Am do sulukte ar khạtirjoma tahen hoṛko cetanre jhãpem ema one okoe do pạcri, phaṭok duạr, ar huṛkạṛ chaḍageko girobasokʼ kan." 
Ezekiel38:12 Am do onkoakʼ jiniskom recʼkoa arem luṭtakoa ar dhaṅ dhaserakʼ jut aroakan jaegako upạrte ar jạt jạtrenko tala khon jarwa akatʼko hoṛ upạrte amakʼ tiyem tultama. Ona jokhecʼ onko hoṛ do janwarko ar jiniskote kisạ̃ṛ akanko tahena ar disạm do dhạrti reakʼ tala utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel38:13 “ ‘Unre Seba, Dedan ar Tạrsis ar uniyakʼ sanam atokoren bạnij bekʼparko do amko kulimea, am do luṭ paṭ lạgitʼem hecʼakana se sona rupạ, janwarko ar jinisko idiy lạgitʼ ar ḍher jinisko recʼ idiy lạgitʼ amren dol bolkom jarwa akatʼkoa?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Onatege, E manwa hopon, Gog do noa nạbi katham metaea, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘enhilokʼ tinre ińren hoṛ Israelko do khạtirjomako girobasokʼa unre cetʼ ona do bam baḍaea?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Utạr secʼakʼ mucạtʼ simạna reakʼ amakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon am ar am sãote aema jạtren hoṛko do sadomre decʼkate mitʼ maraṅ ar daṛean lạṛhại phạdko rakapʼ hijukʼa. 
Ezekiel38:16 Am do rimil leka disạmem dapal eseda ar ińren hoṛ Israelko upạrtem rakapʼ hijukʼa. E Gog, mucạtʼre ińakʼ disạm upạrte amiń ạgumea. Unre iń do jạt jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre iń apnartetʼ do am hotete sonot menteń udugokʼa jemon onko do ińko baḍae daṛeạń." 
Ezekiel38:17 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼ kana, sedaeakʼ dinkore ińren gutiko, metakʼme Israelren nạbiko hotete okoeyakʼ kathań roṛletʼ uni do cetʼ am dom baṅkana? Ona jokhecʼ bochorke bochor nạbikoko menleda, iń do onko upạrteń ạgumea." 
Ezekiel38:18 Enhilokʼ Gog do tinre Israel disạmre jhãpe ema unre iń do edreteń jaljalaokʼa. 
Ezekiel38:19 Iń do jaljalaokʼkan edreteń lại sodoretʼkana, ona jokhecʼ Israel disạmre ạḍi botor dhạrti laṛao hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel38:20 Unre jalapuriren hakoko, coṭren cẽṛẽko, birren janwarko, ot cetanren mimitʼ leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅokʼko ar dhạrtiren sanam hoṛ do iń samaṅreko thar tharaokʼa, Maraṅ buruko do ulṭạukʼa, usul buruko do khanḍa khunḍikʼa ar joto pạcri do otre lạnduṛ ńurokʼa." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ińakʼ disạm reakʼ sanam buruko cetanre Gog upạrte lạṛhạiyiń ạguiya. Mitʼke mitʼ manwawakʼ tarwaṛe do acʼren boeha upạrte tahentaea. 
Ezekiel38:22 Iń do mahamạri ar mãyãmte Gogiń sạjạiyea; botoranakʼ dakʼ, arel ar jolokʼkan gondhok do uni cetanre, ar uniren lạṛhại phạdko cetanre ar uni soṅgeten sanam jạtrenko cetanreń upʼ gotʼkakʼa." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ar nonkate iń do jạt jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅreń sodorokʼa; ar dhorom ar sonotgeń sodora. Unre onkoko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do.’" 
Ezekiel39:1 “E manwa hopon, Gog upạrte am do noa nạbi katha roṛme, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E Mesok ar Tubạlren maraṅ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ Gog, am secʼ do bạnuńa." 
Ezekiel39:2 Am do tayom secʼ ạcur ruạṛkateń or idimea. Ar utạr reakʼ ses simạ khon ạgukate Israel reakʼ buruko upạrteń kolmea. 
Ezekiel39:3 Ona tayom iń do amiń ghạlmea ar amakʼ leṅga ti khon akʼ ar jojom ti khon do sar iń giḍikatama. 
Ezekiel39:4 Israel reakʼ buruko cetanre am ar amren sanam lạṛhại phạdko ar am sãote jạtrenko do giḍi akanko tahẽkan. Ar am do gidi ar janwarkoakʼ jomakʼgeń hoyocomea. 
Ezekiel39:5 Am do ṭạnḍire giḍi akangem tahena, ente iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana." 
Ezekiel39:6 Magogre ar okoe do sạṅgiń disạmkore khạtirjomako girobasokʼ kan onko cetanre do seṅgeliń kola; ar onateko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel39:7 “Ińren hoṛ Israelko talare iń do ińakʼ sonottetʼ iń sodortińạ. Ińakʼ ńutum do ar bạń besonot ocowakʼa; onate jạtrenko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń Probhu Isor Israelren uni sonoticʼ." 
Ezekiel39:8 Ńelpe, noa do hijukʼkana ar hoyokʼgea. Noa din reakʼ kathage iń Probhu Isor doń menleda." 
Ezekiel39:9 “ ‘Unre Israel reakʼ nagrahare tahenko do bahrete oḍok calakʼa ar sahan leka lạṛhại reakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako jeretʼ giḍikakʼa. Onko do kạṭicʼ ar lạṭu ḍhalko, akʼ-sarko, lạṛhại reakʼ mutạkko ar borlomkote eae bochor hạbicʼ sahan lekako jereda." 
Ezekiel39:10 Onko do sahan jogaṛ lạgitʼ ṭạnḍi khon se bir-gajaṛ khon ạgu baṅ lagao akoa, ente sahan bodolte khanḍa bhanḍako jereda. Onko do luluṭkoakʼ jinisko luṭ joṅa; ar rerecʼkoakʼ jinisko recʼ ruạṛkoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana." 
Ezekiel39:11 “ ‘Enhilokʼ Gog do Israelko talare mitʼṭecʼ topa ṭhạ̃iyiń emaea. Ona do doreão purub secʼ dãṛãnkoakʼ buru-nalage hoyokʼa. Ar ona do sen paromokʼkan hoṛkoakʼ hore esedtakoa, ente Gog ar uniren sanam phạdko do onḍeko topa ocokʼa. Ona iạte ona do Gogren hoṛkoakʼ buru-nalage hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel39:12 Israelko do eae cando hạbicʼ onkoakʼ topa iạte disạmko bhonḍa. 
Ezekiel39:13 Disạmren sanam hoṛ do onkoko topakoa. Nonkate ińakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼ dinre onkoakʼ ńutum do pasnaokʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel39:14 Ona eae cando mucạtʼre disạm saphae lạgitʼ hoṛko bahal ocokʼa. Onko do goṭa disạm dãṛã dãṛãte giḍi akan jaṅko sendra toda arko topakakʼa. 
Ezekiel39:15 Disạm talare dãṛãn jokhecʼ jãhãege manwawakʼ mitʼṭecʼ jaṅe ńelńam enḍekhan tin hạbicʼ topa lala hoṛko do Gogren hoṛkoakʼ buru-nalare bako topae unhạbicʼ onko do ona jaṅ lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ cinhạko bitʼ dohoya. 
Ezekiel39:16 Nonkate onko do disạmko saphaea. Ona buru-nala otet reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ nagraha reakʼ ńutum do Hamoena (mane do hoṛkoakʼ) dohokʼa.’ 
Ezekiel39:17 “E manwa hopon, iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, am do joto lekan cẽṛẽko ar sanam bir janwarko hohoatem metakoa, ‘jarwakʼpe ar ape lạgitʼ Israelakʼ buru boṭkocʼkore one okare maraṅ okocʼ dãṛẽ reakʼ iń bondobos akatʼ ona lạgitʼ beṛhae secʼ khon jarwakʼpe. Onḍe ape do jel ar mãyãmpe joma." 
Ezekiel39:18 Ape do daṛean hoṛkoakʼ jelpe joma ar dhạrtiren disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ mãyãmpe ńũiya; noko hoṛko do Bason disạmren moṭa soṭa bheḍa, bheḍa hopon, merom boda ar ḍaṅgra leka kanako." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ar okaṭakʼ dãṛẽ reakʼ ape lạgitʼ iń bebostayetʼ onate lacʼ ạuri bikʼtape hạbicʼ itilpe joma ar ạuripe bul bhuteṛokʼ hạbicʼ mãyãmpe ńũiya. 
Ezekiel39:20 Ińakʼ ṭebilre ape do lacʼ perecʼ sadomko reakʼ, rãt gạḍi cakʼlaoko reakʼ, daṛean hoṛko reakʼ ar sanam lạṛhại phạdko reakʼ jelpe joma.’" 
Ezekiel39:21 “Iń do jạtrenko talare ińakʼ ṭhonok iń sodora ar ińakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite onko okaṭakʼ sạjạiyiń emako ona do sanam jạtrenko ńela. 
Ezekiel39:22 Enhilokʼ khon Israelko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń onkoren Probhu Isor do." 
Ezekiel39:23 Ar jạt jạtrenko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, Israelko do akoakʼ kại iạte bondi dosateko senlena mente, ente onko do ińre bepạtiạuko tahẽkana. Ona iạte ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do onko khoniń betʼ esetʼ akatʼ tahẽkana ar bạirikoakʼ tireń soprotletʼkoa; ar onko do jotoge lạṛhạireko gocʼlena." 
Ezekiel39:24 Iń do onkoakʼ besaphawakʼ leka ar onkoakʼ pap ghạṭiko lekageń halawatʼkoa ar onko khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhãń betʼ esetʼletʼtińạ.” 
Ezekiel39:25 Probhu Isor do arhõe menkeda, “Jakob do ńitokʼ bondi dosa khoniń ruạṛ ạguyea ar Israelren sanam hoṛkoń mãyãwakoa ar ińakʼ ńutum reakʼ sonottetʼ lạgitʼ iń ãṭokʼa." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ar onko do akoakʼ disạmre tinre khạtirjomako girobasokʼa ar okoehõ bako botor ocokoa ar unre iń upạrteko kạmiletʼ akoakʼ lajao ar sanam bepạtiạrakʼko hiṛińạ. 
Ezekiel39:27 Ar iń do jạt jạtrenko tala khon ar bạirikoakʼ disạm khoniń jarwakoa ar ḍher jạtrenkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅre onko hotete ińakʼ sonottetʼ iń sodortińạ. 
Ezekiel39:28 Unre onko doko baḍae daṛeakʼa, onkoren Probhu Isor doń ińkangea, ente jạt jạtrenko talare bondi dosareń kolletʼko tahẽkanre hõ onko do akoakʼ disạmteń ruạṛ ạgukoa, ar okoehõ bạń bạgi oṭoakoa." 
Ezekiel39:29 Onko ṭhen khon ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do ar bạń betʼ esetʼkakʼa, ente Israelko cetanre iń do ińren Jiu iń dulea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Bondi dosa reakʼ bargel mõṛẽ bochor reakʼ etohopʼre, cando reakʼ gelakʼ dinre, Jerusalem nagraha ńurokʼ gelpon bochor tayom Probhu Isorakʼ ti do iń cetanre tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:2 Isor emakʼ dorson talate uni do Israel disạmteye idikedeńte mitʼṭecʼ usul buru cetanreye dohokedińa. Ona buru reakʼ dạkhin aṛere adom dolan oṛakʼko tahẽkana onako do ńelokʼte nagraha leka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:3 Uni do onḍe ińe idikedińa ar iń do mitʼṭen manwań ńelkedea one uniyakʼ hoṛmo do tama leka jhak jhakaokʼkan tahẽkantae. Uniyakʼ ti re do musnạ reakʼ baber ar jokha reakʼ ḍaṅ tahẽkana ar uni do phaṭok duạr ṭhene teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:4 Uni hoṛ do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, am do mẽtʼte ńelme ar luturte ańjomme ar iń okań udukʼam ona jotowakʼ moneyakʼme, ente ona lạgitʼge nonḍeń ạgu akatʼmea. Ar jãhãnakʼgem ńel ona jotoge Israelkom lạiyakoa.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Iń doń ńelkeda koejoṅ oṛakʼ do beṛhaete mitʼṭecʼ pạcrite esetʼ ạcurakana. Uni hoṛakʼ ti reakʼ jokha ḍaṅ do jeleńte turui moka; mimitʼ moka reakʼ jeleń do mitʼ moka pon kạṭupʼ tahẽkana. Uni do pạcri bhite jokhakeda; ona do mitʼ ḍaṅ osar ar mitʼ ḍaṅ usul tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:6 Ona tayom uni do purub secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhene senene. Uni do siṛhite cetanteye rakapʼente phaṭok duạre jokhakeda; ona do jeleńte mitʼ ḍaṅ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:7 Phaṭok duạrre pahradarkoakʼ kandhako do mitʼ ḍaṅ jeleń ar mitʼ ḍaṅ osar tahẽkana ar mitʼ kandha khon eṭakʼ kandha tala reakʼ bhit do mõṛẽ moka osar tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr reakʼ ganaḍe do mitʼ ḍaṅ jeleń tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:8 Ona tayom uni do ona kandhae jokhakeda; ona reakʼ osar do kandhate bolokʼ duạr reakʼ osar khon banar secʼ mitʼ ḍaṅ bạ̃ṛti tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:9 Ona kandha do jeleńte irạl moka ar ona khon oḍokokʼ hor reakʼ banarsa reakʼ kham khunṭi do bar moka kate osar tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr mucạtʼ reakʼ ona kandha duạr do mundil oṛakʼ secʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:10 Purub secʼakʼ phaṭok duạr bhitri banarsa aṛere peakate jotote turui goṭecʼ kandha tahẽkana; onako mimitʼ goṭecʼ reakʼ jokha do somange tahẽkana ar onako tala reakʼ bhitko reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ reakʼ jokha hõ mitʼge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:11 Ona tayom uni do phaṭok duạre jokhakeda; ona bolokʼ hor reakʼ jeleń do gelpe moka ar bolokʼ duạr reakʼ osar do gel moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:12 Pahradarkoakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ kandha samaṅre do mitʼ moka usul ar mitʼ moka osar bhit tahẽkana ar kandhako reakʼ jeleń ar osar do turui mokakate tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:13 Ona tayom uni do phaṭok duạr reakʼ chat reakʼ osare jokhakeda; uni do mitʼṭecʼ kandha reakʼ bahre secʼ khon uniyakʼ samaṅ kandha reakʼ bahre hạbicʼe jokhakeda. Mitʼṭecʼ kandha bhit reakʼ khạli ṭhạ̃i khon uniyakʼ samaṅ kandha reakʼ khạli ṭhạ̃i reakʼ sạṅgiń do bargel mõṛẽ moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:14 Ar phaṭok duạr kham khunṭikin reakʼ usultetʼ do turui gel moka kateye jokhakeda. Kham khunṭikin khonge phaṭok duạr reakʼ raca do ehopʼakana. 
Ezekiel40:15 Phaṭok duạr reakʼ bolokʼ hor khon phaṭok reakʼ mucạtʼ simạ reakʼ kandha hạbicʼ do mõṛẽgel moka jeleń tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:16 Kandhako reakʼ bahre bhitre ar kham khunṭikin sor reakʼ bhitre jạli emakʼ jalna tahẽkana, ar phaṭok reakʼ mucạtʼre oka kandha tahẽkan ona reakʼ bhitrehõ onage tahẽkana; nonkate phaṭok duạr reakʼ bhitkore do onkan jalnako tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa banar kham khunṭire do khijur dare muṭhạnko rokʼ akan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:17 Ona tayom uni do bahre bakher racateye idikedińa. Raca reakʼ sanam secʼ do jotote pegel kandhań ńelkeda ar onako do jotoge mitʼ secʼ khạli tahẽkana; onako samaṅre do mitʼṭecʼ dhiri bạisạuakʼ ṭhạ̃i tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:18 Ona dhiri bạisạuakʼ jaega do duạr aṛe aṛete senakana, duạr reakʼ jeleńtetʼ somange; ona do latar reakʼ dhiri bạisạuakʼ jaega tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:19 Ona tayom uni do latar senakʼ duạr reakʼ bhitri nakha samaṅ khon bhitri raca reakʼ bahre nakha hạbicʼe jokhakeda, ar ona do tahẽkana, mitʼsae moka." 
Ezekiel40:20 Ona tayom uni do bahre raca reakʼ utạr secʼ samaṅ akan phaṭok duạr reakʼ jeleńtetʼ ar osartetʼe jokhakeda. 
Ezekiel40:21 Ona reakʼ horho kandhako, dene banar nakha do pepe goṭecʼ, ar ona reakʼ paya khunṭiko ar ona reakʼ osarko do pạhilakʼ duạr reakʼ jokha lekage tahẽkana; ona reakʼ jeleńtetʼ do mõṛẽgel moka ar osar bargel mõṛẽ moka tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ona reakʼ jalnako ar ses utạrakʼ kandha ar kham khunṭiko reakʼ khijur dare muṭhạnko do ar purub duạr lekage tahẽkana. Ar onḍe rakabokʼ reakʼ eae goṭecʼ siṛhi dhap tahẽkana ar phaṭok duạr mucạtʼ simạnare ona kandha do tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:23 Bhitri raca reakʼ purub duạr lekage ona utạr reakʼ duạr hõ tahẽkana. Uni do bahre raca reakʼ phaṭok duạr khon bhitri raca reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼe jokhakeda; ona do mitʼsae moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:24 Ona tayom uni do dạkhin secʼe idikedińa. Ar iń do bahre raca reakʼ dạkhin duạriń ńelkeda. Uni do ona phaṭok duạr reakʼ kham khunṭiko ar mucạtʼ reakʼ kandhae jokhakeda. Eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko leka ona reakʼ jokha hõ mitʼge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:25 Eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko leka niạ phaṭok duạrkore jalnako tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr do mõṛẽgel moka jeleń ar osar do bargel mõṛẽ moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:26 Onḍe rakabokʼ lạgitʼ eae goṭecʼ siṛhi dhap tahẽkana ar phaṭok duạr reakʼ ses simạnare do ona reakʼ kandha tahẽkana. Phaṭok bhitri banarsa reakʼ kham khunṭire do khijur dare muṭhạnko rokʼ akan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:27 Bhitri reakʼ racare hõ mitʼṭecʼ dạkhin duạr tahẽkana. Uni do ona phaṭok duạr khon bahre raca reakʼ dạkhin duạr hạbicʼe jokhakeda; ona do mitʼsae moka hoyena. 
Ezekiel40:28 Ona tayom uni do bhitri raca reakʼ dạkhin duạr talate bhitri racateye idikedińa ar phaṭok duạre jokhakeda; onako do eṭakʼakʼko leka inạ mitʼ jokhage hoyena. 
Ezekiel40:29 Ona phaṭok duạr reakʼ pahradarkoakʼ kandhako, banar kham khunṭikin ar mucạtʼ reakʼ kandha do eṭakʼakʼko leka inạ mitʼ jokhage tahẽkana. Ar eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko lekage noa phaṭok duạrre hõ jalna tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr reakʼ jokha do mõṛẽgel moka jeleń ar bargel mõṛẽ moka osar tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:30 Bhitri raca reakʼ eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃ire kham khunṭi cetanre chat reakʼ ṭhạ̃i tahẽkana. Onako do bargel mõṛẽ moka jeleń ar mõṛẽ moka osar tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:31 Bhitri reakʼ raca reakʼ dạkhin duạr bolokʼ kandha reakʼ duạr do bahre raca secʼ tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr bolokʼ hor banarsa reakʼ kham khunṭire do khijur dare muṭhạnko rokʼ akan tahẽkana. Onḍe rakabokʼ lạgitʼ do irạl goṭecʼ siṛhi tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:32 Ona tayom uni do bhitri raca reakʼ purub secʼe ạgukedińa ar onḍenakʼ phaṭok duạre jokhakeda; ona reakʼ jokha hõ eṭakʼakʼko lekage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:33 Ar pahradarkoakʼ kandhako, kham khunṭikin ar bolokʼ kandhako do eṭakʼakʼko leka inạ mitʼ jokhage tahẽkana. Eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko lekage noa phaṭok duạrre hõ jalna tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr do mõṛẽgel moka jeleń ar bargel mõṛẽ moka osar tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ona kandhare bolokʼ reakʼ duạr do bahre raca secʼ tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr bolokʼ banarsa reakʼ kham khunṭire do khijur dare muṭhạnko rokʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar onḍe rakabokʼ reakʼ siṛhi do eae goṭecʼ dhap tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:35 Ona tayom uni do utạr phaṭok duạr ṭhene ạgukedeńte onae jokhakeda. Onako do eṭakʼakʼko leka inạ mitʼ jokhage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:36 Ona reakʼ pahradar kandhako, banar khunṭi ar bolokʼ kandha do eṭakʼakʼko leka inạ mitʼ jokhage tahẽkana. Eṭakʼ phaṭok duạrko lekage noa phaṭok duạrre hõ jalna tahẽkana. Phaṭok duạr do mõṛẽgel moka jeleń ar osar do bargel mõṛẽ moka tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ona reakʼ kham khunṭi do bahre raca secʼ tahẽkana; ar onakore do khijur dare muṭhạn rokʼ akan tahẽkana. Ar onḍe rakabokʼ lạgitʼ do irạl goṭecʼ siṛhi tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:38 Bahre raca reakʼ bhitri phaṭok duạrko reakʼ kham khunṭi aṛere mitʼ secʼ jhicʼ akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ kandha tahẽkana; ona do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ janwarkoakʼ jel ạrupʼ ṭhạ̃i tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:39 Phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ kandha reakʼ banarsa aṛerege bareakate ṭebil tahẽkana. Onako cetanre do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, puruchun lạgitʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar dos samaṅokʼren janwarkoakʼ jel getʼkateko dohoyetʼ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:40 Utạr duạr bolokʼ hor reakʼ siṛhi ṭhen banarsa aṛerege bareakate ṭebil tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:41 Nonkate phaṭok reakʼ mitʼ aṛere ponea ar eṭakʼ aṛere ponea jotote irạl goṭecʼ ṭebil tahẽkana one ona cetanre samaṅokʼkan janwarakʼ jelko getʼ kaṭa kuṭiyetʼ tahẽkan. 
Ezekiel40:42 Jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ oka ponea ṭebil tahẽkan onako do dhiri reakʼ getʼ benao tahẽkana; mimitʼ goṭecʼ ṭebil reakʼ jeleń do mitʼ moka tala, osar hõ mitʼ moka tala ar usul do mitʼ moka. Onḍe do samaṅokʼakʼ khanḍa bhanḍako dohokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel40:43 Pon kạṭupʼ jeleń barea ạṅkus do bhitre khil jalatʼ tahẽkana. Onare do ṭebilko cetanre samaṅokʼakʼ jelko dohokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:44 Bhitri raca talare phaṭok duạr aṛere sekʼreńko lạgitʼ pe secʼ jhicʼge kandha tahẽkana; barea do utạr phaṭok aṛere dạkhin duạr ar mitʼṭecʼ do purub phaṭok aṛere utạr duạr. 
Ezekiel40:45 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “Dạkhin duạr do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ ńel todarot reakʼ bhare ńamakatʼ naeke lạgitʼkana ar utạr duạr kandha do pinḍko ńel todarot reakʼ bhare ńamakatʼ naekeko lạgitʼ kana. Onko naekeko doko hoyokʼ kana Sadekren hoponko; liwiko modre eken onkoge Probhu Isor samaṅre uniyakʼ sewakʼ kạmi lạgitʼko sen daṛeakʼa.”" 
Ezekiel40:46  
Ezekiel40:47 Ona tayom uni do racae jokhakeda. Ona do tahẽkana mitʼsae moka jeleń ar mitʼsae moka osar mitʼṭecʼ ponkona ṭhạ̃ige. Ar pinḍ do mundil oṛakʼ samaṅre tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:48 Ona tayom uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ pinḍạreye ạgukedińa ar pinḍạ samaṅ reakʼ kham khunṭikin ar bolokʼ hor reakʼ banarsa duạr paya khunṭiye jokhakeda. Mimitʼ paya khunṭi do mõṛẽ moka osar ar pe moka osar tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel40:49 Pinḍạ do bargel moka jeleń ar gelmitʼ moka osar tahẽkana. Ar onḍe rakabokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ siṛhi tahẽkana ar ona banar paya khunṭi samaṅre mitʼṭecʼkate kham khunṭi tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:1 Ona tayom uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ maraṅ kandha ṭhen hecʼkate duạr reakʼ banar paya khunṭiye jokhakeda; banar secʼakʼ paya khunṭi do osarte turui mokakate tahẽkana; 
Ezekiel41:2 mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhithõ turui moka osar tahẽkana. Banar paya tala reakʼ jaega do gel moka tahẽkana ar mimitʼ paya khunṭi do mõṛẽ moka osar tahẽkana. Uni do tala kandha reakʼ jokha hõe hataokeda; ona reakʼ jeleń do pongel moka ar osar do bargel moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:3 Ona tayom uni do bhitri reakʼ kandhate senkate onḍe bolokʼ duạr reakʼ paya khunṭikoe jokhakeda; mimitʼ paya khunṭi do bar mokakate osar tahẽkana. Banar paya khunṭi tala reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do turui moka tahẽkana ar paya khunṭi sãote joṛao akatʼ banar aṛe reakʼ bhit do jeleńte eae moka kate tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:4 Ona tayom uni do bhitri kandhae jokhakeda; ona do jeleńte bargel moka ar osarte bargel moka tahẽkana. Uni do ińe metadińạ, “Noa do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i kana.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Ona tayom uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhite jokhakeda; ona do turui moka dạriạ tahẽkana ar ona bhit reakʼ beṛhae aṛeteakʼ kandhako reakʼ osar do ponon moka kate tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:6 Ona kandhako do mitʼṭecʼ cetanre ar mitʼṭecʼ nonkate pe mahla tahẽkana; mimitʼ mahlare pegel kate kandhako tahẽkana. Kandhako reakʼ bhar do mundil oṛakʼ bhit reakʼ pe secʼge khap tahẽkana. Kandhako reakʼ bim do ona tak cetanre doṛom tahẽkana, mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitre bhorao do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ona iạte mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ pe senakʼ kandhako do osarte latar mahla khon cetan mahla hạbicʼ osar idiakana. Latar mahla khon bar mahla talate cetan mahla hạbicʼ mitʼṭecʼ siṛhi do rakapʼ akana. 
Ezekiel41:8 Ińiń ńelkeda, mundil oṛakʼ do mitʼṭecʼ cetan ṭhạ̃ire menakʼa ar onage mundil oṛakʼ ar kandhako reakʼ rehetʼ tahẽkana. Ona rehetʼ do mitʼ ḍaṅ tahẽkana, metakʼme turui moka usul tahẽkana ar kandhako khon mõṛẽ moka bạ̃ṛti tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel41:9 Kandhako reakʼ bahre bhit do mõṛẽ moka dạriạ tahẽkana. Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ khon naekekoakʼ oṛakʼko hạbicʼ bargel moka osar jaega tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:10  
Ezekiel41:11 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ kandhakote bolokʼ lạgitʼ utạr secʼ mitʼṭecʼ ar dạkhin secʼ ar mitʼṭecʼ duạr tahẽkana ar ona duạrkin do phaelao jaega secʼ samaṅ akan tahẽkana. Rehetʼ reakʼ ona mõṛẽ moka phaelao hĩs do banar duạr ṭhen calakʼ hor tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:12 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ pạchim secʼ phaelao jaega reakʼ mucạtʼ simạnare mitʼṭecʼ dalan tahẽkana. Ona do eaegel moka osar ar aregel moka jeleń tahẽkana. Ona beṛhaeteakʼ bhitko do mõṛẽ moka dạriạ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:13 Ona tayom uni do mundil oṛakʼe jokhakeda; ona do jeleńte mitʼsae moka ar mundil oṛakʼ khon phaelao jaega ar tayom reakʼ bhit sudhạ dolan do mitʼsae moka jeleń tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:14 Purub secʼ mundil oṛakʼ samaṅre okaṭakʼ phaelao jaega tahẽkan ona hõ jeleńte mitʼsae moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:15 Ona tayom uni do banar aṛe reakʼ bhitri hor sudhạ pạchim secʼakʼ dolan hõe jokhakeda; ona do jeleńte mitʼsae moka tahẽkana. Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ asolakʼ kandha, bhitri reakʼ kandha ar raca secʼ samaṅ akatʼ pinḍạ reakʼ bhitko do kaṭ reakʼ toktate dapal esetʼ tahẽkana. Ona pe jaegate bolokʼ hor reakʼ banar aṛe reakʼ ganaḍe ar bata lagao akatʼ joto jalnako hõ toktate esetʼ tahẽkana. Ar jalnakore do kaṭ reakʼ palla tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel41:16  
Ezekiel41:17 Bolokʼ hor cetan reakʼ bhit sudhạ asolakʼ kandha ar bhitri kandha reakʼ joto bhit reakʼ tokta cetanre Kerubko ar khijur dare reakʼ muṭhạnko rokʼ benao tahẽkana; mitʼṭecʼ khijur dare ar mitʼṭen Kerub do por por sajao tahẽkana. Mimitʼ Kerubkinren do bareakate mẽtʼãhã tahẽkana," 
Ezekiel41:18  
Ezekiel41:19 mitʼṭen do manwawakʼ mẽtʼãhã ar eṭakʼakʼ do dhạcri kulakʼ mẽtʼãhãge; manwawakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mitʼṭecʼ khijur dare secʼ ar dhạcri kulakʼ mẽtʼãhã do eṭakʼ khijur dare secʼ samaṅ akan tahẽkana. Goṭa mundil oṛakʼ bhit reakʼ beṛhaete noako do rokʼ benao akan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:20 Mimitʼ goṭecʼ kandha do pạcri reakʼ tala khon ehopʼkate bolokʼ hor cetan reakʼ jaega hạbicʼ joto jaegare Kerub ar khijur dareko reakʼ muṭhạn rokʼ benao akan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:21 Tala kandha reakʼ duạr khunṭiko do ponkona tahẽkana ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i reakʼ duạr hõ inạ lekage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:22 Tala kandhare pe moka usul, bar moka jeleń ar bar moka osar kaṭ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ pinḍ tahẽkana ar noa reakʼ ponon kona, rehetʼ ar beṛhaete do kaṭ reakʼge tahẽkana; uni do arhõe menkeda, “Noa do hoyokʼkana ona ṭebil oka do Probhu Isor samaṅre tahenkan.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Tala kandha ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ire mitʼṭecʼkate bar palla reakʼ duạr tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:24 Mimitʼ palla do barea toktate benao akan tahẽkana; ar tokta kin do kobjare ạcurokʼakʼge. 
Ezekiel41:25 Tala kandha duạr reakʼ palla kin do cetan bhit reakʼ lekage Kerub ar khijur dareko reakʼ muṭhạn rokʼ benao akan tahẽkana. Ar pinḍạ bolokʼ duạr chat latarre do mitʼṭecʼ bim tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel41:26 Pinḍạre batako emakawatʼ jalnako reakʼ banarsa aṛe ar bhitkore do khijur dare muṭhạnkoge rokʼ benao tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhit ar sor kandhakore hõ khijur dare muṭhạnkoge rokʼ benao tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:1 Tayomte uni do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ utạr secʼ bahre racareye ạgukedeńte mitʼṭecʼ dolanteye idikedińa. Ona dolan do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ utạr secʼ phaelao jaega aṛere pạchim secʼakʼ dolan ṭhen tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:2 Ona do mitʼsae moka jeleń ar mõṛẽgel moka osar ar onare bolokʼ hor do utạr duạr tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:3 Noa dolan do tahẽkana bhitri raca reakʼ bargel moka ona phaelao jaega ar bahre racare tol akatʼ jaega talare. Dolan do pe mahla tahẽkana ar mimitʼ mahla reakʼ kandhako samaṅte taṛam reakʼ hor hõ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:4 Ona hor do gel moka osar tahẽkana; onḍe khon dolan bhitri reakʼ phaelao jaegate calakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ moka osar mitʼṭecʼ hor tahẽkana. Ar dolan reakʼ kandhako do utạr secʼ jhicʼge tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:5 Bhitri phaelao jaegako reakʼ khunṭiko leka dolan reakʼ cetan banar mahla reakʼ do jãhãn khunṭige baṅ tahẽkana. Ar onatege noa dolan reakʼ horko do mitʼṭecʼ cetanre ar mitʼṭecʼ baṅ tahẽkana, bickom tinạkʼ cetante rakapʼ akan unạkʼge bhitri secʼ bolo idiakana; onate kandhako do huḍiń idiakana." 
Ezekiel42:6  
Ezekiel42:7 Ona dolan reakʼ purub secʼ mitʼṭecʼ bolokʼ duạr tahẽkana ar ona samaṅre utạr-dạkhinte jeleń mitʼṭecʼ mõṛẽgel moka bhit tahẽkana. Ar ona bhit reakʼ purub aṛere do bahre raca tahẽkana. Ona bhit do dolan reakʼ osartetʼ soman tahẽkana. Dolan reakʼ purub aṛe bahre raca secʼ do osarte mõṛẽgel moka ar mundil oṛakʼ secʼ jeleń do mitʼsae moka tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:8  
Ezekiel42:9  
Ezekiel42:10 Mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ dạkhin secʼ ṭhik nonkage mitʼṭecʼ dolan tahẽkana. Ona do tahẽkana raca reakʼ phaelao jaega aṛere ar pạchim secʼakʼ dolan ṭhen. 
Ezekiel42:11 Utạr secʼ lekage noa dolan do mitʼṭecʼ hor tahẽkana. Noa dolan do joto secʼ khon, metakʼme jeleńte, osarte, bolokʼ hor ar bhitri reakʼ jotowakʼko utạr secʼakʼ dolan leka tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ar ona dolante bolokʼ reakʼ hor do dạkhin secʼ tahẽkana. Dolan reakʼ purub secʼ ar mitʼṭecʼ bolokʼ hor tahẽkana ar ona samaṅre hõ mitʼṭecʼ bhit tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel42:13 Ona tayom uni do ińe metadińạ, “Mundil reakʼ phaelao jaegare utạr ar dạkhin secʼakʼ banar dolan do naekekoakʼ kana. Okoe naekeko do Probhu Isor ṭhenko bolokʼ onkoge niạ banar dolanre samaṅokʼakʼ sonot utạrakʼ jinisko joma. Onḍe onko do anaj samaṅokʼakʼ, dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại ńutumte puruchunokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ sonot utạrakʼ jinisko dohoya, ente banar dolange sonotgea." 
Ezekiel42:14 Naekeko sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ okako kicricʼ horokʼkate mundil oṛakʼteko bolokʼ onako do niạ banar dolanreko bocʼ doho oṭokakʼa ar ona tayom do bahre racateko oḍok daṛeakʼa, ente onako do sonot utạrakʼ kicricʼkana. Hoṛkoakʼ jaegate calakʼ lahare onko do eṭakʼ kicricʼ horokʼ lagao akoa.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Mundil oṛakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ bhit reakʼ sanamakʼ jokha hoyen khan uni do purub secʼakʼ phaṭok duạrte bahreteye ạgukedińa ar bahre reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ jaegae jokhakeda. 
Ezekiel42:16 Uni do ḍaṅte jaega reakʼ purub, utạr, dạkhin ar pạchim secʼe jokha sạtketʼ khan onako reakʼ mimitʼ jokha do mõṛẽsae ḍaṅkate hoyena." 
Ezekiel42:17  
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 Sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i khon hoṛkoakʼ jaegae begar lạgitʼ eṭakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ joto secʼ mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ jeleń mitʼṭecʼ bhit tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel43:1 Ona tayom uni do purub duạr secʼakʼ phaṭok ṭhene ạgukedeńạ," 
Ezekiel43:2 Ar iń do purub secʼ khon Israelren Isorakʼ ṭhonok hijukʼ kaniń ńelkeda. Uniyakʼ aṛaṅ do aema dakʼko reakʼ sabad leka tahẽkana ar dhạrti do uniyakʼ ṭhonokte marsalena. 
Ezekiel43:3 Noa dorson ńelkate iń doń ombakʼena; ar nagraha maraokʼ reakʼ oka dorson Kebar gaḍa aṛereń ńelletʼ noa dorson do ona lekage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel43:4 Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do purub duạr reakʼ phaṭok duạrte mundilte boloyena. 
Ezekiel43:5 Unre Probhu Isorren jiu do ińe rakapʼ idikedeńte bhitri racateye idikedeńạ, ar Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok do mundil oṛakʼre perecʼena." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ar uni manwa do unre iń aṛere teṅgo akane tahẽkana, ar iń do mundil oṛakʼ tala khon okoe coṅ iń tulucʼ katha roroṛiń ańjomkedea." 
Ezekiel43:7 Uni doe menkeda, “E manwa hopon, noa do ińakʼ siṅghạson reakʼ ṭhạ̃i ar ińakʼ jaṅga dohoy lạgitʼ jaega kana. Iń do nonḍege Israelko talareń girobasokʼa. Israelko tishõ ińakʼ sonot ńutum do bako besonot ocoytińạ. Baṅ do ako ar baṅ do onkoren rapajkoakʼ laṭghaṭ iạte, ar akoren gocʼakan rapajko ńutumte dikʼsạwakʼko teṅgoe hotete onko do ińakʼ ńutum ar bako besonot ocoytińạ." 
Ezekiel43:8 Onko do ińakʼ oṛakʼ aṛerege akoakʼ oṛakʼko benaoletʼa; onkoakʼ oṛakʼ ar ińakʼ oṛakʼ talare eken mitʼṭecʼ bhitge tahẽkana. Onkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko hotete onko do ińakʼ sonot ńutumko besonot ocoletʼtińạ. Ar onatege onko do edreteń maraoletʼkoa. 
Ezekiel43:9 Ar ńitokʼ do akoren boṅga murhutʼko ar akoren rapajkoakʼ mạ̃ṛĩ iń khonko sạṅgiń giḍikakʼma; inạkhan iń do jaejug hạbicʼ onko talareń girobasokʼa. 
Ezekiel43:10 “E manwa hopon, am do Israelko ṭhen noa mundil oṛakʼ reaṅ lại jạhirme ar noa noksha reaṅ hudis lạgitʼ metakom, jemon onko do akoakʼ kại iạteko lajaokʼ." 
Ezekiel43:11 Onko do akoakʼ sanam kạmi iạteko lajaokʼ enḍekhan mundil oṛakʼ noksha reakʼ khạṭinạṭi sanamkʼem baḍae ocokoa; ar ona reakʼ kaṭhamo, ar bhitrite bolokʼ ar bahrete calakʼ reakʼ hor, metakʼme ona reakʼ purạ noksha ar ona reakʼ joto niạm ar ạn-ạriko onko ṭhenem sodora. Ona reakʼ jotowakʼ onko samaṅre olme jemon onko do ona reakʼ noksha lekateko kạmi daṛeakʼ ar ona reakʼ joto niạm jemonko manao." 
Ezekiel43:12 “Noa do hoyena mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ ạn; ar buru reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ ṭhạ̃i do sonot utạrakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ ạn do noa kangea. 
Ezekiel43:13 “Pinḍ reakʼ jokha do nonka kana, mokate (moka do mitʼ moka ar pon kạṭupʼ jeleń): ona reakʼ pheḍtetʼ do mitʼ moka usul, mitʼ moka osar, ar ona reakʼ kaṅkha aṛe aṛete do beṛhaete mitʼ bitạ tahena." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ar pinḍ reakʼ usul do nonka tahena; otre ona reakʼ pheḍtetʼ khon latarakʼ khap hạbicʼ bar moka, ar osartetʼ do mitʼ moka tahena; hoponakʼ khap khon maraṅakʼ khap hạbicʼ, pon moka ar osartetʼ do mitʼ moka:" 
Ezekiel43:15 ar pinḍ reakʼ muthnitetʼ culhạ hĩs do pon moka tahena, ar pinḍ reakʼ culhạ reakʼ hĩs khon coṭ secʼ ponea dereń oḍok akan tahena, mimitʼ moka usul." 
Ezekiel43:16 Pinḍ reakʼ culhạ hĩs do gel bar moka jeleń ar gel bar moka osar, pon konḍanakʼ tahena." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ar khap hõ pon konḍanakʼge tahena, gelpon moka jeleń ar gelpon moka osar; ar ona beṛhaete do kaṅkha tahena, adha moka osar. Ar pinḍ reakʼ pheḍtetʼ do beṛhaete mitʼ moka oḍokakan tahena, ar ona reakʼ siṛhiko do purub secʼ samaṅkokʼa.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Ona tayom uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, pinḍ benao sạtlen khan ar oka hilokʼ Probhu Isor ńutumte ona samaṅokʼa ar ona cetanre jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ mãyãm ircikʼa enhilokʼ noa niạm do manao hoyokʼa;" 
Ezekiel43:19 Sadok bõsren naekeko okoe do ińakʼ sekʼwae lạgitʼ iń ṭhenko hijukʼ onko do mitʼṭen ạnḍiạ ḍaṅgra samaṅokʼ lạgitʼem emakoa. 
Ezekiel43:20 Ar am do uniyakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate pinḍ reakʼ ponea dereńre, ar tala hĩs reakʼ ponon konare ar aṛete joto secʼem joda; nonkate kại puruchun reakʼ porobem hoeocoyte pinḍem sapha ocoya." 
Ezekiel43:21 Am do kại samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ gur akade ḍaṅgra idikate mundil oṛakʼ bahre sonot ṭhạ̃ire niṭ akatʼ jaegarem jeredea. 
Ezekiel43:22 “Dosar hilokʼ am do mitʼṭen niphuṭ merom bodam ạguiyea, ar naekeko do kại samaṅokʼakʼ porobko hoeocoya ar pinḍ do ḍaṅgrawakʼ mãyãmte cetʼ leka sapha hoylen onkagem saphaea." 
Ezekiel43:23 Pinḍ saphae tayom am do mitʼṭen niphuṭ damkom ar pal khon niphuṭ mitʼṭen bheḍawante Probhu Isor samaṅrem hạjirokʼa; Ar naekeko do uni cetanre buluṅko chiṭiạuaea ar Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ reakʼ porobko hoeocoya. 
Ezekiel43:24  
Ezekiel43:25 “Eae din hạbicʼ din hilokʼ am do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen kate merom boda emokʼ hoyokʼtama. Ona chaḍa hõ mitʼṭen damkom ar pal khon mitʼṭen bheḍa emokʼ hoyokʼa; ar onko do jemon niphuṭ utạrkoko hoyokʼ. 
Ezekiel43:26 Naeke do eae din hạbicʼ pinḍ reakʼ kại puruchun reakʼ porobe hoeocoyte onae saphaea; nonkate pinḍ do Probhu Isor ńutumteko samaṅa. 
Ezekiel43:27 Niạko din mucạtʼlen khan irạl din hilokʼ khon naekeko do ona pinḍ cetanre apeakʼ jeredokʼ ar helmel samaṅokʼakʼ porobko hoeocoya. Unre iń do apeń ataṅpea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.” 
Ezekiel44:1 Ona tayom uni hoṛ do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ purub secʼ samaṅ akan bahre duạr ṭhene ruạṛ idikedińa; duạr do siń akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel44:2 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Noa duạr do sińge tahena, noa do baṅge jhijokʼa jemon celege noa bhitrite aloko bolo daṛeakʼ. Noa do bond akaege tahena, ente Israelren Probhu Isor do noategeye bolo akana." 
Ezekiel44:3 Eken disạm cakʼlaokoge phaṭok duạr ṭhen duṛupʼkate Probhu Isor samaṅreko jom daṛeakʼa. Ar mucạtʼ kandha talate duạrteko bolokʼa ar inạ hortegeko oḍok calakʼa.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Ona tayom uni manwa do utạr duạr reakʼ horte mundil oṛakʼ samaṅreye ạgukedińa. Ińiń ńelkeda Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ do uniyakʼ ṭhonokte perecʼ akana; ar unre iń doń taberena. 
Ezekiel44:5 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, mońjte ńelme ar luturte ańjomme ar ińakʼ oṛakʼ reaṅ okako niạm ar ạn-ạriko reaṅ iń lạiyam ona mitʼke mitʼ moneyakʼme. Mundil oṛakʼre okoeko bolo daṛeakʼa ar okoe do bako bolo daṛeakʼ ona reaṅ moneyakʼme." 
Ezekiel44:6 Am do huhulkan jạtren Israelkom metakoa, Probhu Isore menetʼkana, ‘E Israelko, apeakʼ bạṛicʼ colon do ḍher akantapea." 
Ezekiel44:7 Apeakʼ eṭakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ colonko sãote ape do iń ṭhen jomakʼ, itil ar mãyãm samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅ jokhecʼ ontor ar hoṛmore bin khatna akan bidisiạko ińakʼ oṛakʼrepe ader akatʼkote ińakʼ oṛakʼpe besonot akada ar onkoakʼ kạmi hotete ińakʼ bondobospe bạtil akada." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ińakʼ sonot jinisko cetanre okaṭakʼ dạyik tahẽkan ona baṅkate ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ bhar do eṭakʼkoakʼ tirepe jimạ akada. 
Ezekiel44:9 Okoe bidisiạkoakʼ ontor ar hoṛmo hõ baṅ khatna akantako onko do ińakʼ oṛakʼte bako bolo daṛeakʼa; ar Israelko talareko girobasokʼ kan bidisiạko hõ bako bolo daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:10 “ ‘Israelko tinre bạṛicʼ horteko senlena unre iń bạgikate okoeko Liwi do boṅga secʼko ạcurlente iń khon sạṅgińko senlen onko do akoakʼ kại reakʼ kuṛại asen baṛae hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel44:11 Enhõ mundil oṛakʼ duạr horhoe reakʼ bharko ńamakatʼte onko do ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmiko kạmi daṛeakʼa. Onko do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼren janwarko gur daṛeakoa ar hoṛko lạgitʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob hõko ạyur daṛeakʼa ar hoṛko sapʼsorako lạgitʼ onko samaṅreko teṅgo daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:12 Menkhan onko do boṅgako samaṅre hoṛkoko sapʼsor akawatʼkoa ar Israel jạtrenko kại ocoakatʼkoa, ona iạte iń Probhu Isor doń kiriạ akana, onkoakʼ kại reakʼ kuṛại do onkoge asen baṛae lagaoakoa." 
Ezekiel44:13 Onko do naeke lekate iń sewawạń lạgitʼ iń ṭhen do aloko hijukʼma ar ińakʼ jãhãn sonot se sonot utạrakʼ jinis ṭhen hõ bako hecʼdaṛeakʼa; onkoakʼ hirkhạwakʼ lajaotetʼ do asen baṛae hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel44:14 Enhõ mundil oṛakʼ cetanre dạyik ar onḍenakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi cetanre bhar do onko cetanregeń dohoya. 
Ezekiel44:15 “Menkhan Israelko do tinre iń ṭhen khon bạṛicʼ horteko senlena unre Sadok bõsren okoe Liwi do naekeko lekate ińakʼ oṛakʼre pạtiạr salakʼ akoakʼ dạyikko palon akatʼ onkoge iń sewawạń lạgitʼ iń ṭhenko hecʼdaṛeakʼa; onko do mãyãm ar itil samaṅ lạgitʼ iń samaṅreko teṅgo daṛeakʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana. 
Ezekiel44:16 Eken onkoge ińakʼ oṛakʼreko bolo daṛeakʼa; eken onkoge ińakʼ sewa kạmi lạgitʼ ińakʼ ṭebil ṭhenko hecʼdaṛeakʼa ar onkoge ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ sanamakʼko kạmi daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:17 “ ‘Musnạ kicricʼ horokʼkate onko do bhitri raca reakʼ duạrteko bolokʼa; ar bhitri raca reakʼ duạr ṭhen se mundil oṛakʼ talare sewa kạmi jokhecʼ do jãhãn upʼ reakʼ kicricʼ bako horokʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:18 Onkoakʼ bohokʼre musnạ kicricʼ reakʼ dạhṛi tahena ar onko do musnạ reakʼ jhaṅgako horoga; ar alo jemonko udgạrokʼ nonkan kicricʼ do bako horoga. 
Ezekiel44:19 Onko do tinre bahre racare tahenkan hoṛko ṭhenko calakʼa unre sekʼwa kạmi reakʼ kicricʼ totʼkate sonot oṛakʼreko doho oṭokakʼa ar eṭakʼ kicricʼko horoga, jemon onkoakʼ kicricʼ reakʼ jakʼte hoṛko iń ńutumte aloko begarokʼ." 
Ezekiel44:20 “ ‘Onkoakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ do bako hoyo munḍrạitakoa se jeleń hõ bako doho daṛeakʼa menkhan upʼ doko getʼ kạṭicʼ daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:21 Jãhãe naekege darkha rasa ńũkate bhitri oṛakʼte do bae bolo daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel44:22 Rạnḍi maejiu se jãwãeye bạgi akawade nonkan jãhãe maejiu onko do bako bapla daṛeakoa; onko do eken Israel jạtren kũạri kuṛi se naekeren rạnḍi akan bạhuko bapla daṛeakoa. 
Ezekiel44:23 Iń ńutumte okaṭakʼ begar dohoakan ar oka baṅ begar akan ona tala reakʼ ińren hoṛko cetʼakoa ar okaṭakʼ saphawakʼ ar okaṭakʼ baṅ saphawakʼ onako udukʼakoa. 
Ezekiel44:24 “ ‘Jãhãn mambla hoylen khan naekeko do Hạkim reakʼko kạmiya ar ińakʼ hukum lekage onko doko bicạr phanḍaoa. Ar ińiń niṭ akatʼ sanam porobko lạgitʼ onko do ińakʼ ạn-ạri ar niạmko palona ar jirạukʼ mãhãko reakʼ sonottetʼko rukhiyạ dohoya. 
Ezekiel44:25 “ ‘Naeke do jãhãe gocʼ hoṛko ṭhen senkate apnar do bae bhonḍokʼa; menkhan gogo-baba, hopon ar hoponera, boeha se baṅ bapla akade boeha kuṛi lạgitʼ apnar doe bhonḍ daṛeakʼa." 
Ezekiel44:26 Are saphalen tayom uni do eae din hạbicʼ tạṅgi hataṛ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel44:27 Ona tayom oka hilokʼ uni do sekʼwa kạmi lạgitʼ mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ bhitri racateye bolokʼa un hilokʼ do apnar lạgitʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ samaṅ hoyokʼtaea. Noa do iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana. 
Ezekiel44:28 “ ‘Naekekoakʼ sompotti do eken ińgeń tahena. Ape Israelko do apeakʼ disạmre jãhãn sompottige alope emakoa; onkoren sompotti do ińgeń hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel44:29 Onko do anaj samaṅokʼakʼ, kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko joma; Israel disạmre Probhu Isor ńutumte emakʼ mitʼke mitʼ jiniskoge onkoakʼ hoyokʼa; onako do baṅ chaḍao ạgukʼa." 
Ezekiel44:30 Joto lekan phosol reakʼ pạhilre rakapʼakʼ khon bhageakʼ hĩs ar apeakʼ sanam sandesko do naekekoakʼ hoyokʼa. Apeakʼ nãwã holoṅ reakʼ pạhilakʼ hĩs ape do onkope emakoa jemon apeakʼ gharońj cetanre bhor tahen. 
Ezekiel44:31 Gocʼ akan se bir janware cirạ akade nonkan jãhãn cẽṛẽ se janwarakʼ jel naekeko do bako jom daṛeakʼa. 
Ezekiel45:1 “ ‘Ape do sompotti lekate disạm reakʼ jumi tinrepe hạṭińa unre bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar bargel hajar ḍaṅ osar disạm reakʼ mitʼ hĩs jumi do Probhu Isorpe emaea; ona purạ elakage sonotakʼ ṭhạ̃i hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel45:2 Ona tala khon mõṛẽ sae ḍaṅ jeleń ar mõṛẽ sae ḍaṅ osar mitʼṭecʼ hĩs do mundil oṛakʼ lạgitʼ tahena; ar ona beṛhaete do mõṛẽgel moka phaelao jaega hõ tahena. 
Ezekiel45:3 Ona sonot ṭhạ̃i reakʼ tala khon bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar gel hajar ḍaṅ osar mitʼṭecʼ hĩsem jokha dohokakʼa. Noa hĩsrege mundil oṛakʼ, metakʼme sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i do tahena." 
Ezekiel45:4 Noa hĩs do naeke lạgitʼ kana; ona do sonotgea. Naekeko do mundil oṛakʼre sapʼsor kạmikate ar Probhu Isorakʼ sekʼwae lạgitʼ uni samaṅreko laha idikʼa. Ar ona ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr ar mundil oṛakʼ lạgitʼ sonotakʼ ṭhạ̃i. 
Ezekiel45:5 Sarecʼ bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar gel hajar ḍaṅ osar ṭhạ̃i do onko Liwikoakʼ ạidạrire tahena one okoe do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ kạmiko kạmi idi. Onko do onḍegeko girobasokʼa. 
Ezekiel45:6 “ ‘Sonot ṭhạ̃i aṛere mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ osar ar bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń mitʼṭecʼ hĩs do nagraha lạgitʼ dohoy hoyokʼa. Ona nagraha do goṭa Israel jạtrenko lạgitʼge tahena. 
Ezekiel45:7 “ ‘Sonot ṭoṭha ar nagraha simạna reakʼ purub ar pạchim aṛe reakʼ jumi do disạm cakʼlaokoakʼ hoyokʼa. Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ noa banar ṭhạ̃i do disạm reakʼ pạchim ar purub simạna hạbicʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar noa ṭhạ̃i reakʼ utạr ar dạkhin reakʼ jokha do sonot ṭoṭha ar nagraha reakʼ utạr dạkhin reakʼ jokha somange hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel45:8 Niạ ṭhạ̃ire Israel disạmren disạm cakʼlaoko do ińren hoṛko ar bako santaokoa, bickom Israel jạtrenko do akoakʼ gusṭirenko lekate jumiko hạṭińakoa." 
Ezekiel45:9 “ ‘E Israelren disạm cakʼlaoko, iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, ḍherge hoyakana. Ńitokʼ do jor julum ar santao bạgikate dhorom ar bhage reakʼ kạmipe. Ińren hoṛkoakʼ jaega apeakʼ dokholre ạgui do bạgipe." 
Ezekiel45:10 Ape do tulạ ar eṭakʼ sosoṅakʼ jinisko ṭhik leka tahentape ma. 
Ezekiel45:11 Epha ar bath do mitʼ somange hoyokʼma; mitʼ bath do homer reakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń hoyokʼma; noa banar sosoṅakʼge hoyokʼa homer leka. 
Ezekiel45:12 Mitʼ sekelre do bargel gira tahena. Ar mitʼ manehre turui gel sekel tahena. 
Ezekiel45:13 “ ‘Ar dan lekate okape em ona do hoyokʼkana: apeakʼ sanam guhum reakʼ turui gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń, ar sanam jao reakʼ turui gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń," 
Ezekiel45:14 sanam jạitun sunum reakʼ mitʼsae hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń. Sunum soṅ lạgitʼ do bath beohar hoyokʼa. Gel bath soman do mitʼ homer ar mitʼ homer soman do mitʼ kor. 
Ezekiel45:15 Israel disạm talare bhage jumireko ạtiń nonkan mimitʼ barsae bhiḍi-merom khon mitʼṭen hopon emokʼ hoyokʼtapea. Hoṛkoakʼ kại puruchun lạgitʼ noako do anaj samaṅokʼakʼ, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼ lạgitʼko beoharokʼa." 
Ezekiel45:16 Disạmren sanam hoṛ do Israelren disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ noa sandesko emaea. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ar disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do sanamakʼ porobko, molokʼ candoko reakʼ ar jirạukʼ mãhã lạgitʼ, metakʼme Israel jạtrenkoakʼ niṭ akatʼ sanamakʼ porobko lạgitʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ, anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ, coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jiniskoe kulạu juṛạua. Uni do Israelkoakʼ kại ńutumte puruchunokʼ lạgitʼ samaṅokʼakʼ, anaj samaṅokʼakʼ, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jiniskoe kulạu juṛạua." 
Ezekiel45:18 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do arhõń menetʼkana, am do pạhil cando reakʼ pạhil hilokʼ mitʼṭen niphuṭ damkomem hataoea ar mundil oṛakʼem saphaea." 
Ezekiel45:19 Naeke do kại samaṅokʼ reakʼ thoṛa mãyãm hataokate mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ banar khunṭire, pinḍ reakʼ ponon konare ar bhitri raca reakʼ phaṭok duạr reakʼ banar khunṭire ona mãyãmem joda." 
Ezekiel45:20 Okoe do bhulte se begor baḍaete mundil oṛakʼ upạrte jãhãnakʼko kại onko lạgitʼ do cando reakʼ eae hilokʼ onkagem kạmiya. Nonkate ape do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ reakʼ porob hoyocokate mundil oṛakʼpe saphaea. 
Ezekiel45:21 “ ‘Pạhil cando reakʼ gelponakʼ tạrikre bańcaokʼ porobpe hoeocoya. Niạ porob do eae din reakʼ hoyokʼa; unre ape do bin khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạ jojom hoyokʼtapea. 
Ezekiel45:22 Enhilokʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do acʼ ar disạmren sanam hoṛko lạgitʼ kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lekate mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel45:23 Porob reakʼ eae din dinạmge uni do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ niphuṭ utạr eae goṭen ḍaṅgra ar eae goṭen bheḍa emokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ mitʼṭen merom boda hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel45:24 Anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lekate uni do mimitʼ ḍaṅgra ar bheḍa lạgitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ ar pe liṭar eae sae mõṛẽgel gram sunum emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel45:25 “ ‘Eae cando reakʼ eae din hilokʼ oka eae din reakʼ porob hoyokʼ onare samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ, jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ jinisko ar sunumko emokʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Ezekiel46:1 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, bhitri raca reakʼ purub duạr do kạmi reakʼ turui dinge siń tahena, menkhan jirạukʼmãhãre ar molokʼ candore ona do jhijokʼa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Unre disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do bahre khon phaṭok duạr bolokʼ kandhate bolokate phaṭok duạr reakʼ khunṭikin aṛere teṅgokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Ar naekeko do uniyakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ porobko hoeocoya. Phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ horre uni do sekʼwa baṛakateye oḍokokʼa, menkhan ńindạ hạbicʼ phaṭok do jhicʼge tahena." 
Ezekiel46:3 Hoṛko hõ jirạukʼ mãhãre ar molokʼ candore ona phaṭok duạr bahrere Probhu Isorko sewawaea. 
Ezekiel46:4 Jirạukʼmãhã hilokʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ turui goṭen bheḍa hopon ar mitʼṭen bheḍa ạguiye hoyokʼtaea; onko do jemon niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ. 
Ezekiel46:5 Bheḍa sãote anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ emokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar bheḍa hoponko sãote do kusiyakʼ bhor holoṅe emokʼa; mimitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ lạgitʼ pe liṭar eae sae mõṛẽgel gram sunum emokʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel46:6 Molokʼ cando hilokʼ uni do mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra ar turui goṭen bheḍa hopon ar mitʼṭen bheḍa samaṅko hoyokʼtaea; onko do niphuṭ utạrko hoyokʼ jạruṛa. 
Ezekiel46:7 Ar ḍaṅgra sãote uni do gel irạl keji holoṅ ar bheḍa sãote gel irạl keji holoṅ ar bheḍa hoponko sãote do kusiyakʼ bhor holoṅ anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lekate emokʼ hoyokʼtaea; mimitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ lạgitʼ pe liṭar eae sae mõṛẽgel gram sunum emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel46:8 Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do phaṭok duạrte bolokʼ kandha talate bhitrite bolokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar inạ hortege onḍe khon oḍok hijukʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel46:9 “ ‘Niṭ akatʼ sanam porob jokhecʼ disạmren hoṛko do tinre sekʼwae lạgitʼ Probhu Isor samaṅreko hijukʼa unre jãhãege utạr phaṭok duạrteye bolokʼ uni do dạkhin phaṭok duạrteye oḍokokʼa ar okoe dạkhin phaṭok duạrteye bolokʼ uni do utạr phaṭok duạrte oḍokokʼ hoyokʼtaea. Hoṛko oka phaṭok duạrteko bolokʼ ona phaṭok duạrte do bako oḍokokʼa, menkhan mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do bolokʼ phaṭok duạr reakʼ ulṭạ secʼakʼ phaṭok duạrte oḍok calakʼ hoyokʼtakoa." 
Ezekiel46:10 Bhitrite bolokʼ jokhecʼ disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do hoṛko sãote bhitrite bolokʼ hoyokʼtaea ar bahrete oḍokokʼ jokhecʼ hõ hoṛko sãotege oḍok hijukʼ hoyokʼtaea. 
Ezekiel46:11 “ ‘Porob ar niṭ akatʼ bhoj jokhecʼ mitʼṭen ḍaṅgra lạgitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ, bheḍa lạgitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ ar bheḍa hoponko lạgitʼ kusiyakʼ bhor holoṅe emokʼa; mimitʼ gel irạl keji holoṅ sãote pe liṭar eae sae mõṛẽgel gram sunum emokʼ hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do tinre Probhu Isor ńutumte acʼakʼ kusite jãhãnakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅa, baṅ do jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar baṅ do sulukren samaṅokʼakʼ, unre uni lạgitʼ purub secʼ samaṅ akan phaṭok duạrko jhicʼaea. Uni do jirạukʼmãhã lekage acʼakʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ se sulukren samaṅokʼakʼe samaṅa. Ona tayom bahreteye oḍoklen khan phaṭok duạr do sińokʼa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “ ‘Probhu Isor ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ ape do din hilokʼ mitʼṭenkate mitʼ bochorren niphuṭ utạr bheḍa hopon samaṅe hoyokʼtapea; din hilokʼ setakʼ jokhecʼ ona do kạmi hoyokʼtapea. 
Ezekiel46:14 Ona chaḍa niạ sãote din hilokʼ setakʼre apeakʼ anaj samaṅokʼakʼ jinis hõ emokʼ hoyokʼtapea; onare tahena pe keji holoṅ ar onare sipiy lạgitʼ mitʼ liṭar barsae mõṛẽgel gram sunum. Noa do Probhu Isor ńutumte anaj samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ porob reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ niạm kana. 
Ezekiel46:15 Nonkage jao hilokʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ setakʼre bheḍa hopon ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ holoṅ ar sunum hõ emokʼ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel46:16 “ ‘Iń Probhu Isor do arhõń menetʼkana, jodi disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ acʼakʼ sompotti khon acʼren jãhãe hopon jãhãṭakʼ jaegae danae enḍekhan uniren bõsko hõ ạidạri tahentakoa. Onko do ona sompottiren ạidạrikoko hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Menkhan uni do acʼakʼ sompotti khon acʼren jãhãe guti jãhãn ṭhạ̃iye danae enḍekhan uni guti do chuṭạ bochor hạbicʼ ona doe doho daṛeakʼa; ona tayom arhõ ona do disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ dokholre ruạṛ hijukʼa. Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ sompotti do eken uniren hopongeko ńama; ar ona do onkoakʼge hoyokʼtakoa. 
Ezekiel46:18 Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ do onko hoṛkoe laga ńir lekorehõ onkoakʼ jãhãn sompotti do bae dokhol daṛeatakoa. Uni do eken acʼakʼ sompotti khonge acʼren hoponkoe em daṛeakoa jemon ińren hoṛko mod khon celege uniyakʼ sompottiren mạlikana aloko adtako.’ ”
