Ezekiel46:19 Ona tayom uni manwa do phaṭok duạr aṛe reakʼ bolokʼ horte naekekoakʼ utạr secʼ samaṅ akan sonot dolan samaṅreye ạgukedińa. Uni do dolan reakʼ pạchim secʼ reakʼ ses simạnare mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃iye udukʼạdińa. 
Ezekiel46:20 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “Noa do ona ṭhạ̃i kana one okare naekeko do dos ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ ar kại ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jelko teke isin ar anaj samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko sekao isin jemon ona sonot jinisko bahre racare ạgu baṅ lagaoako, ente jãhãe hoṛge onae joṭed uni do Probhu Isor ńutumteye begar utạrokʼa.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Ona tayom uni do bahre racareye ạgukedeńte ona reakʼ ponon kona secʼteye ạcur idikedińa, iń do mimitʼ konare ar mitʼṭecʼkate huḍiń racań ńelkeda." 
Ezekiel46:22 Pạcrite esetʼ ona huḍiń racako reakʼ jokha do pongel moka jeleń ar pegel moka osar tahẽkana. Mimitʼ racako do mitʼ leka jokhage tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel46:23 Ona ponea raca reakʼ mimitʼ goṭecʼ bhitri reakʼ beṛhaeteakʼ bhit sãote lagao akatʼ dhiri reakʼ tak tahẽkana ar ona tak latarre beṛhaete culhạ tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel46:24 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “Noako do culhạ kana; okoe mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ sekʼwa kạmiko kạmi onko do onḍe hoṛkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko isina.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Ona tayom uni do mundil oṛakʼte bolokʼ hor ṭhene ruạṛ ạgukedińa, ariń ńelkeda mundil oṛakʼte bolokʼ hor reakʼ kandha khon dakʼ do purub secʼ ạtu oḍokokʼ kana. Mundil oṛakʼ do purub secʼ samaṅ akan tahẽkana. Ona dakʼ do mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ dạkhin aṛe reakʼ kandha khon pinḍ reakʼ dạkhin aṛete ạtu calakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tayomte uni do utạr phaṭok duạr talateye oḍok ạgukedińa ar bahre horteye ạcur idikedeńte purub secʼ samaṅ akan phaṭok duạr ṭhene idikedeńạ; ona phaṭok reakʼ dạkhin aṛete thoṛa dakʼko atu calakʼkan tahẽkana. 
Ezekiel47:3 Jokha baber hataokate uni do jokha jokhate mitʼ hajar moka purub secʼe sen idiyena. Onḍe uni do sebecʼ sebecʼ dakʼ talateye idikedińa. 
Ezekiel47:4 Ona tayom mitʼ hajar mokae jokhaketʼ khan gunṭhi soman dakʼ talateye idikedińa. Ona tayom uni do ar mitʼ hajar mokae jokhaketʼte ḍanḍa soman dakʼ talateye idikedińa. 
Ezekiel47:5 Ona tayom uni do ar mitʼ hajar mokae jokhakeda, menkhan dakʼ do unre gaḍa leka hoyena ar iń do bạń parom daṛeada, ente dakʼ do perecʼ idikʼkan tahẽkana ar paerakʼ leka khạndri tahẽkana. Ar nonkan gaḍa hoyena one ona do celege bako taṛam parom daṛekea." 
Ezekiel47:6 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, noa do cetʼem ńeleda?” Ona tayom uni do gaḍa aṛeteye ruạṛ idikedińa." 
Ezekiel47:7 Onḍe seṭerkate iń do gaḍa banarsa aṛerege aema darekoń ńelkeda. 
Ezekiel47:8 Uni do ińe metadińa, “Noa dakʼ do purub secʼ ạtu calakʼ kana ar Araba talate doreãore senkate dulokʼ kana. Ar tinre ona do doreãore ńurokʼkana unre onḍenakʼ dakʼ do heṛemokʼ kana." 
Ezekiel47:9 Oka secʼ lekate noa gaḍa ạtu calakʼa onḍe do joto lekan jhake jhak jiwetʼ jiwiyanko ar hakoko tahena. Ar noa dakʼ oka secʼte calakʼa onḍenakʼ dakʼ doe heṛem ocoya; onatege oka secʼte gaḍa ạtu calakʼa onḍenakʼ jotowakʼge jiwedokʼa. 
Ezekiel47:10 Jạilạko do gaḍa aṛereko teṅgona; En gedi khon En Eglayim hạbicʼ do jhạli tase reakʼ jaega hoyokʼa. Ar onḍehõ jalapuri leka aema lekan hakoko ńamokʼa. 
Ezekiel47:11 Menkhan dalahe ar bil reakʼ dakʼ do baṅ heṛemokʼa; onako do buluṅ lạgitʼ tahena. 
Ezekiel47:12 Gaḍa reakʼ banar aṛetege sanam lekanakʼ jo reakʼ dare janamokʼa. Onako reakʼ sakam do baṅ tolmojokʼa, ar jo hõ baṅ cabakʼa. Jao candoge onare do jokʼa, ente mundil oṛakʼ khon onḍe do dakʼ ạtu hijukʼa. Onako reakʼ jo jom lạgitʼ ar sakamko do bogekʼ lạgitʼ beoharokʼa.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ape do sompotti lekate Israelren gelbar gusṭiko talare disạm do nonkage hạṭińakope. Ape sanamkoge somantepe hạṭińa menkhan Joseph do bar hạṭińe ńam daṛeakʼ. Noa disạm do aperen hapṛamko emako lạgitʼgeń kiriạlena ar noa disạm do apeakʼ sompottige hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel47:14  
Ezekiel47:15 “Disạm reakʼ simạna do hoyokʼa nonka: utạr secʼakʼ simạna do hoyokʼ maraṅ doreão khon Hethlon secʼte Sedad hạbicʼ; 
Ezekiel47:16 onḍe khon Damesek ar Hamat reakʼ simạna talare menakʼ Berothat ar Sibrayem hạbicʼ; ar onḍe khon Haoran simạna aṛe reakʼ Haser-enon hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel47:17 Noa simạna do calakʼa maraṅ doreão khon Damesek reakʼ utạr simạna aṛete Haser-enon hạbicʼ, metakʼme Hamat simạ hạbicʼge. Ar noage hoyokʼa utạr senakʼ simạna do." 
Ezekiel47:18 Purub secʼ reakʼ simạna Haoran ar Damesek talate Gilead ar Israel disạm tala reakʼ jordan gaḍa secʼte senkate doreão hạbicʼ. Ar noage hoyokʼa purub secʼ reakʼ simạna do. 
Ezekiel47:19 Dạkhin secʼ reakʼ simạna do doreão reakʼ Tamar khon Kadesh reakʼ Meribath dakʼko hạbicʼ senkate Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa secʼte maraṅ jalapuri hạbicʼ. Ar noage hoyokʼa dạkhin reakʼ simạna do. 
Ezekiel47:20 Pạchim secʼ reakʼ simạna do maraṅ jalapuri secʼte Hamat reakʼ botolo mũhạ̃ mũhĩ hoyokʼa. Ar noage hoyokʼa pạchim reakʼ simạna do. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Israelren gusṭiko lekate disạm do ape talare hạṭiń joṅpe. 
Ezekiel47:22 Okoe bidisiạko akoren hopon ar hoponerakoante ape talareko girobasokʼ kan onko lạgitʼ ar ape lạgitʼ disạm do sompotti lekatepe hạṭińjoṅa. Onko do disạmreko janam akan Israel menteko lekhakʼa. Ape sãote onko hõ Israel gusṭiko talare sompotti lekate jumi reakʼ hạṭińko ńama. 
Ezekiel47:23 Okoe gusṭiko talare onko bidisiạko girobasokʼ kan onḍege onko do jumi reakʼ ạidạri emakope. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Ezekiel48:1 Ona tayom Probhu Isore menkeda, “Gusṭirenko lekate disạm reakʼ jumi hạṭiń do nonka leka hoyokʼa. Disạm reakʼ utạr simạnare Dan do mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do maraṅ jalapuri khon Hethlon reakʼ hor samaṅ secʼte Hamat hạbicʼ; ar onḍe khon purub secʼ Damesek reakʼ utạr simạ aṛe Hasar-enan hạbicʼ, metakʼme Hamat simạna hạbicʼge." 
Ezekiel48:2 Aser hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Dan simạna reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:3 Naphtali hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Aser simạ reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:4 Manase hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Napthali simạ reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:5 Ephrayim hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Manase simạna reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:6 Ruben hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Ephrayim simạna reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:7 Jihudạ hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchim Ruben simạna reakʼ dạkhin hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Jihudạ simạna dạkhinre purub khon pạchim hạbicʼ oka jaega tahen ona do bises kạmi lạgitʼpe begar dohokakʼ. Ona do osarte hoyokʼa bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ ar jeleń do eṭakʼ gusṭirenkoakʼ hĩs leka disạm reakʼ purub simạna khon pạchim simạna hạbicʼ; ar ona jaega talare do mundil oṛakʼ tahena. 
Ezekiel48:9 Ona begar dohokakʼ jaega khon mitʼṭecʼ bises hĩs do Probhu Isorpe emaea; ona do bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar osar do gel hajar ḍaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel48:10 Noa do hoyokʼa naekeko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ sonot hĩs. Utạr ar dạkhin secʼ noa do bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar pạchim ar purub secʼ do gel hajar ḍaṅ osar. Ona talare do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ tahena. 
Ezekiel48:11 Noa bises hĩs do hoyokʼa iń ńutumte begar dohoakatʼ Sadok bõsren naekeko lạgitʼ. Onko do iń sewawạńre pạtiạranko tahẽkana ar Israelko sãote bạṛicʼ horteko senlen Liwiko leka bạṛicʼ horte do bako senlena. 
Ezekiel48:12 Noa do hoyokʼa disạm reakʼ sonot hĩs khon onko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ bises hĩs; noa hĩs do Liwikoakʼ hĩs reakʼ simạna aṛerege tahena, ar noa do sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa." 
Ezekiel48:13 “Naekekoakʼ simạna aṛere Liwiko do bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ar gel hajar ḍaṅ osar mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃iko ńama. 
Ezekiel48:14 Liwiko ona jumi do bako ạkhriń daṛeakʼa se akoakʼ hĩs hõ bako bodol daṛeakʼa. Ona do joto khon bhageakʼ jumi kana ar eṭakʼkoakʼ tire ona emako do baṅ ganokʼa, ente Probhu Isor ńutumte ona do sonot akana." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Sarecʼ mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ osar ar bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ jeleń ṭhạ̃i do nagraharen hoṛko lạgitʼ hoyokʼa, metakʼme oṛakʼ-duạr ar janwar ạtińko lạgitʼ beoharokʼa. Nagraha do ona talare tahena;" 
Ezekiel48:16 ar ona nagraha beṛhaeteakʼ jokha do pon hajar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel48:17 Nagraha beṛhaete janwar ạtińko reakʼ ṭhạ̃i do barsae mõṛẽgel ḍaṅ tahena. 
Ezekiel48:18 Noa nagraha reakʼ purub aṛe reakʼ gel hajar ḍaṅ ar pạchim aṛe reakʼ gel hajar ḍaṅ ṭhạ̃ire oka phosol hoyokʼ ona do nagraharen kạmiyạkoakʼ jomakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Ezekiel48:19 Israelren sanam gusṭiko khon okoe do noa nagrahareko kạmi onkoge noa jumiko casa. 
Ezekiel48:20 Ona begar dohoakatʼ purạ ṭhạ̃i do bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅkate mitʼṭecʼ dokhol jaega tahena. Noa jaega talare tahena ona sonot hĩs ar nagraha ar ona aḍepase reakʼ jaega. 
Ezekiel48:21 Ona begar dohoakatʼ jaega reakʼ purub ar pạchim aṛe reakʼ jaega do disạm cakʼlaoyicʼ lạgitʼ tahena. Niạ banar jaega utạr ar dạkhin reakʼ jokha do begar dohoakatʼ jaega leka bargel mõṛẽ hajar ḍaṅ tahena. Noa banar jaega do disạm reakʼ purub ar pạchim simạna hạbicʼ calakʼa. Ar nonkate disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ jaega reakʼ talare mundil oṛakʼ sudhạ naekekoakʼ jaega, Liwikoakʼ jaega ar nagraha reakʼ jaega hoyokʼa. Disạm cakʼlaoyicʼakʼ niạ jaega do utạrre Jihudạ ar dạkhinre Benjạminakʼ jaega reakʼ simạna talare tahena." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 “Sarecʼ gusṭiko talare Benjạmin do mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchimre begar dohoakatʼ jaega reakʼ dạkhinre. 
Ezekiel48:24 Simeon hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchimre Benjạmin simạna reakʼ dạkhinre. 
Ezekiel48:25 Isakar mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchimre Simeon simạna reakʼ dạkhinre. 
Ezekiel48:26 Sebulon hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchimre Isakar simạna reakʼ dạkhinre. 
Ezekiel48:27 Gad hõ mitʼṭecʼ hĩse ńama; ona do hoyokʼa purub khon pạchimre Sebulon simạna reakʼ dạkhinre. 
Ezekiel48:28 Gad reakʼ dạkhin simạna do hoyena disạm reakʼ dạkhin simạna hạbicʼ. Ona do Tamar khon Kades Meribath dakʼ hạbicʼ senkate Misor reakʼ rohoṛ gaḍa samaṅ secʼte maraṅ jalapuri hạbicʼ. 
Ezekiel48:29 Noa disạm do Israelren gusṭiko sompotti lekatepe hạṭińakoa, ar noakoge hoyokʼa onkoakʼ hĩs do. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Nagraha khon bahrete calakʼ reakʼ adomakʼ phaṭok duạrko tahena. Israelren gusṭikoakʼ ńutum lekate ona phaṭok duạrko reakʼ ńutum do emogokʼa. Pon hajar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ utạr secʼakʼ bhitre do pea duạr tahena. Onako reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Ruben-duạr, Jihudạ-duạr ar Liwi-duạr." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32 Pon hajar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ purub secʼakʼ bhit reakʼ pea duạr reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Joseph-duạr, Benjạmin-duạr ar Dan-duạr." 
Ezekiel48:33 Pon hajar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ dạkhin secʼ bhit reakʼ pea duạr reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Simeon-duạr, Isakhar-duạr ar Sebulon-duạr." 
Ezekiel48:34 Pon hajar mõṛẽsae ḍaṅ pạchim secʼ bhit reakʼ pea duạr reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa Gad-duạr, Aser-duạr ar Napthali-duạr." 
Ezekiel48:35 Nagraha beṛhaete bhit reakʼ jokha do hoyokʼa gel irạl hajar ḍaṅ. Ar un khon nagraha reakʼ ńutum do hoyokʼa, ‘Probhu Isor do nonḍege menaea.’ ”" 
Daniel1:1 Jihudạren raj Jehoyakimakʼ rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre Babelren raj Nebukadnesar do Jerusalemte hecʼkate nagrahae gherao ạcurkeda. 
Daniel1:2 Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ tire Jihudạren raj Jehoyakime soprotkedea ar uni sãote Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ adomakʼ bhajanko hõe emadea. Ar ona bhajanko uni do Babelte acʼren debotawakʼ mundilre idikate onḍenakʼ khajańci oṛakʼreye dohokada. 
Daniel1:3 Tayomte raj do acʼren mukhiyạ cạkrạ Aspenase hukumadea jemon uni do Israelren raj gharońjrenko ar manotan gharońjrenko tala khon adom juạnkoe ạguko. 
Daniel1:4 Onko juạnko do ńelokʼte mońj, ạkilan, niphuṭ, cecetʼakʼte perecʼ ar raj dorbarre kạmi lạgitʼ lek lekako hoyokʼ. Aspenas doe hukum ocoyena jemon uni do onko juạnko Babel reakʼ pạrsi ar sahitto reaṅe cetʼako." 
Daniel1:5 Raj do acʼakʼ jomakʼ khon din hilokʼ reakʼ jomakʼ ar darkha rasa emako reakʼ hõe hukumkeda. Nonkate pe bochor cetʼako tayom onko do raj ṭhenko ạgu ocokʼa. 
Daniel1:6 Noko modre Jihudạ gusṭiren Daniel, Hananiạ, Misayel ar Asariạ takoko tahẽkana." 
Daniel1:7 Uni cạkrạkoren sordar do onkoakʼ nãwã ńutume dohoketʼtakoa; Daniel do Beltesasar, Hanaiạ do Sadrak, Misayel do Mesak ar Asariạ do Abed-nego ńutume emadea." 
Daniel1:8 Daniel do menkhan mone moneteye goṭakeda, rajakʼ jomakʼ ar darkha rasate apnar do bae besaphakʼa. Ar apnar jemon aloe besaphakʼ onate uni cạkrạkoren sordar ṭhene arojkeda." 
Daniel1:9 Isor do uni cạkrạkoren sordarakʼ monre Daniel lạgitʼ daya ar mãyãe ńam ocokeda. 
Daniel1:10 Tobe uni cạkrạkoren subedar do Daniele metadea, “Okoe ape lạgitʼ jomakʼ ar darkha rasae bebosta akatʼ uni ińren maharaj doń botorae kana. Uni do ape umerren eṭakʼ juạnko khon cedakʼ apeakʼ mẽtʼãhã do muline ńeltapea? Noate raj do ape iạte ińakʼ bohokʼe makʼ ńur ocoytińạ.”" 
Daniel1:11 Uni cạkrạkoren subedar do Daniel, Hananiạ, Misayel ar Aasriạ noko jotonko lạgitʼ okoe hoṛe dohokede Daniel do uniye metadea," 
Daniel1:12 “Am do dayakate gel din amren guti baṛe biḍạu aṭkarkate ńeleme; am do eken aṛakʼ sakam ar ńũi lạgitʼ dakʼ emalem. 
Daniel1:13 Ona tayom rajakʼko jometʼ onko juạnko sãote aleakʼ mẽtʼãhã ạribạndhikate ńeltaleme ar oka lekam ńelle onkage amren ale gutiko sãote beoharme.” 
Daniel1:14 Onate uni doe rạjiyena ar gel din onkoe biḍạu aṭkarketʼkoa. 
Daniel1:15 Gel din mucạtʼre ńelena rajakʼko jometʼkan tahẽkan joto juạnko khon onko do arhõ mońj ar hoṛmowanko hoyakana. 
Daniel1:16 Unre uni hoṛ do rajakʼ jomakʼ ar darkha rasae ocokʼketʼte ona bodolte onko do aṛakʼ sakamge emakoe ehopʼena. 
Daniel1:17 Ar Isor do ạkilte, bidiạte, sahittote ar joto lekan bujteye perecʼketʼkoa ar bujhạu reakʼ daṛe hõe danatʼkoa; ar Daniel do sanam lekan dorson ar kukmũ reakʼ bhedko hõe bhaṅgao daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Daniel1:18 Ado raj samaṅre onko juạnko idiko reakʼ okte hoyen khan uni cạkrạkoren sordar do Nebukadnesar samaṅre onkoe idiketʼkoa. 
Daniel1:19 Raj do onko sãote katha roṛkateye bujhạu daṛeada je, Daniel, Hananiạ, Misayel ar Asariạ soman do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa; onate noko pon hoṛ do rajakʼ kạmireko bahal ocoyena." 
Daniel1:20 Ạkil ar bud ar jotowakʼ kathakore raj do onko kuliketʼkoteye bujhạu daṛeada, onko do acʼakʼ goṭa rajosṭiren sanam gukʼniko ar ojhako khon hõ gel doboṛko sorosgea." 
Daniel1:21 Ar Daniel do Kores rajakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochor hạbicʼ raj kạmire bahal akane tahẽyena. 
Daniel2:1 Nebukadnesarakʼ rajokʼ dosarakʼ bochorre raj do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũe ńelkeda; ar ona kukmũ iạte uniyakʼ mon do khadbadaokʼ ehopʼentaea, ar jạpitʼge bae jạpitʼ daṛeada." 
Daniel2:2 Ar acʼakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhed baḍaejoṅ lạgitʼte uni do gonokko, gunidarko, muhnidarko ar kạldikoe hoho ạgu ocoketʼkoa. Arko hecʼen khan onko do raj samaṅreko teṅgoyena." 
Daniel2:3 Raj do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń ńel akada; ar ona reakʼ mane baḍae lạgitʼ ińakʼ mon do khadbadaokʼ kantińạ.”" 
Daniel2:4 Unre kạldiko do Arami pạrsite rajko metadea, “E maharaj, jaejug baṛe jiwetʼem tahenma. Amakʼ kukmũ do amren gutiko lạiyaleme, ale do ona reakʼ bhedle bhaṅgaoama.”" 
Daniel2:5 Raj do onkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń doń goṭa dohoakada, ińakʼ kukmũ ar ona reakʼ bhed bape lại daṛeạń enḍekhan makʼ khanḍa khunḍikateń giḍikapea ar apeakʼ oṛakʼ duạrko do mạilạ reakʼ ḍạṅge hoyokʼa." 
Daniel2:6 Menkhan ińakʼ kukmũ ar ona reakʼ bhedpe lại daṛeakʼ, enḍekhan ape do iń ṭhen khon maraṅ puruskar, sandes, ar manotpe ńama. Onate ińakʼ kukmũ ar ona reakʼ bhedtetʼ bhaṅgaoạńpe.”" 
Daniel2:7 Onko do uniko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Maharaj do acʼren gutiko ṭhen acʼakʼ kukmũ baṛeye lạima, ar ale do ona reakʼ bhedle lạiyaea.”" 
Daniel2:8 Unre raje menkeda, “Iń do khạṭigeń baḍae kana, ape do bilom idi reakʼpe kurumuṭukana, entepe bujhạu daṛeakʼ kana, noa babotre monre cetʼ iń goṭa dohoakada mente." 
Daniel2:9 Ińakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bape lại daṛeakʼ khan ape lạgitʼ do eken mitʼṭecʼ sạjạige menakʼa. Ape do eṛe ar kharap katha lạiyạń lạgitʼpe niṭ akawana, noa askate baṅma, okte paromlen khan katha hõ pheraokʼa mente. Ona iạte ma kukmũ lạiyạń pe; enḍekhan iń bujhạu daṛeakʼa, ape do ona reakʼ bhedpe lại daṛeạńạ.”" 
Daniel2:10 Kạldiko do rajko roṛ ruạṛadea, “Maharaj ale ṭhen khon oka baḍae joṅem menetʼkan ona baḍae daṛeakʼ leka nonkan hoṛ do dhạrtire cele hõ bạnukʼkoa. Okoe maraṅ raj hõ tisge nonkanakʼ reaṅ jãhãe gonokko, muhnidarko ar kạldiko ṭhen do bae kulkli akada." 
Daniel2:11 Maharaj okae khojkan ona do ạḍitetʼ muskilgea. Debotako chaḍa ar celege maharaj ṭhen ona do bako sodor daṛeakʼa, ar manwa talare onko ma bako girobasokʼ kan.”" 
Daniel2:12 Ona iạte raj do ạḍiye raṅgaoena ar raṅgaote nunạkʼe kurkurạuena je, uni do Babelren sanam ạkilanko gocʼko reakʼe hukumkeda." 
Daniel2:13 Onate rajren ạkilanko gocʼko reakʼ hukum hoyena. Unre Daniel ar uniren gateko hõ gocʼko lạgitʼ onko ṭhen hoṛko kol ocoyena. 
Daniel2:14 Rajren rurukhiyicʼ subedar Ariyek do tinre onko ạkilanko gocʼko lạgitʼe oḍok hecʼena unre Daniel do bud salakʼ sontorte uni tulucʼ kathae roṛkeda. 
Daniel2:15 Uni do subedare kulikedea, “Noa botoranakʼ hukum maharaj do cedakʼe em akada?” Unre Ariyek do Daniele lạiyadea." 
Daniel2:16 Ona ańjomkate Daniel do raj ṭhen senkate somoeye khojkeda jemon uni do rajakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhede lại daṛeae. 
Daniel2:17 Ona tayom Daniel do oṛakʼte ruạṛ senkate acʼren gate Hananiạ, Misayel ar Asariạteko noa babotreye baḍae ocoketʼkoa." 
Daniel2:18 Uni do onkoe nehõratʼkoa jemon ona baṅ baḍaeteakʼ baḍae lạgitʼ sermaren Isor ṭhen dayako khoj, ar onkate eṭakʼ ạkilanko sãote ako hõ jemon aloko gujukʼ." 
Daniel2:19 Ado ńindạ jokhecʼ Daniel ṭhen ona baṅ baḍaeakʼ do dorson hotete sodorena. Unre Daniel do sermaren Isore gun manao joharadea. 
Daniel2:20 Uni doe menkeda, “Isor do jaejug baṛe bhạganicʼe hoyokʼma; ạkil ar daṛe do uniyakʼge." 
Daniel2:21 Unige okte ar nạpitko acʼakʼ tabereye dohoyetʼkana; unige rapajko siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼetʼkoa are ńur ocoyetʼkoa. Uni do ạkilanko ạkile danako kana ar budanko do bude emakokana. 
Daniel2:22 Uni do khạndri ar okoakʼko babotreye sodoretʼkana; unigeye baḍaea ńutre do cetʼ menakʼa; uni sãote do marsal tahẽnkana. 
Daniel2:23 E ińren hapṛamkoren Isor, amiń sarhaoetʼme kana, ariń õṛhẽyetʼme kana, ente am do ạkil ar daṛeyem em akawạdińa; ale do okaṭakʼ am ṭhen khon baḍae joṅle khojletʼ ona do ińem baḍae ocoakadińạ; rajakʼ kukmũ reaṅ am do alem baḍae ocoakatʼlea.”" 
Daniel2:24 Daniel do Ariyek ṭhene calaoena. Raj do Ariyekge uniren ạkilanko gocʼko lạgitʼe hukumade tahẽkana. Daniel do Ariyeke metadea, “Rajren ạkilanko do alom gocʼkoa. Raj ṭhen dela idiyińme; iń do rajakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhediń bhaṅgaoaea.”" 
Daniel2:25 Ariyek do unrege raj ṭhen Daniel idikedeteye menkeda, “Jihudạren bondiko talare nonkan mitʼṭen hoṛiń ńam akadea one uni do maharajakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhede lại daṛeakʼ.”" 
Daniel2:26 Daniel, okoe do Beltesasar ńutumteye hoho ocokʼkan tahẽkan raj do uniye kulikedea, “Am do cetʼ ińakʼ kukmũ ar ona reakʼ manetetʼem lại daṛeạńạ?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniel do uniye metadea, “Maharaj oka bin baḍaeakʼ reaṅem kulikan ona do gonokko, muhnidarko ar Kaldiko celege bako lại daṛeakʼa;" 
Daniel2:28 Menkhan sermare mitʼṭen Isor menaea okoe do okoakʼko reaṅe sodoretʼkan. Ar tayom daram dinkore cetʼko hoyokʼa ona do unige Nebukadnesar raje baḍae ocoakadea. Amakʼ kukmũ, metakʼme aṭetʼre giticʼkate okaṭakʼ kukmũm ńelakatʼ ona do ńitokʼ iń lạiyama." 
Daniel2:29 “E maharaj, am do tinre aṭetʼrem giticʼ akan tahẽkana unre tayom daram dinkore cetʼ hoyokʼa ona reakʼ kathakom hudisjoṅkan tahẽkana. Ar okoe okoakʼko reaṅe sodoretʼkan uni do ame udukʼatʼmea cetʼko hoyokʼa mente." 
Daniel2:30 Noa bin baḍaeakʼ sodor lạgitʼ eṭakʼko khon ińakʼ ạkil do sorosgea ona do baṅa, menkhan E maharaj, iń do noań men ocoakana jemon noa reakʼ manem baḍae daṛeakʼ ar amakʼ mon reakʼ ganḍonjoṅakʼ kom bujhạu daṛeakʼ." 
Daniel2:31 “E maharaj, am dom koyokʼ akatʼ tahẽkana, ar am samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ utạr muṭhạn do teṅgo akanem ńelkedea; uni do ạḍitetʼ maraṅge, jhak jhak ar ńelokʼte ạḍitetʼ botor." 
Daniel2:32 Uni boṅga muṭhạn reakʼ bohokʼ do khạṭi sona reakʼ, koṛam ar ti do rupạ reakʼ, lacʼ ar bulu do pitạl reakʼ tahẽkana;" 
Daniel2:33 uniyakʼ jaṅga do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ ar uniyakʼ jaṅga thopa do mẽṛhẽtʼ ar jaṭaṅ hasa reakʼge tahẽkana. 
Daniel2:34 Am dom ńeńelkan tahẽkangea, ar mucạtʼre begor manwa tite mitʼṭecʼ dhiri do uni boṅga muṭhạn ar jaṭaṅ hasae josketʼte onakoe gejerkeda." 
Daniel2:35 Unre ona mẽṛhẽtʼ, jaṭaṅ hasa, pitạl, rupạ ar sona do mitʼdomte gejerena ar niron din reakʼ khạrại bhusạ leka hoyena, ar hoe do onakoe oṭaṅ idikeda, ar onako lạgitʼ do okare hõ ṭhạ̃i baṅ hoylena, Ar okaṭakʼ dhiri ona boṅga muṭhạnre josen, ona do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ buru hoyena, ar goṭa dhạrti perecʼena." 
Daniel2:36 Amakʼ kukmũ do noage tahẽkana; ar ńitokʼ ale do maharaj samaṅre noa reakʼ bhedle lạiyeda. 
Daniel2:37 E maharaj, am do rapajkoren raj kanam, sermaren Isor do rajosṭi, ektiạri, daṛe ar ṭhonoke em akatʼmea." 
Daniel2:38 Ar jãhã ṭhạ̃irege manwako girobasokʼ kan, onḍege uni do otren janwarko ar coṭren cẽṛẽko hõ amakʼ tireye jimạ akatʼkoa ar onko jotoko cetanre mạlike benao akatʼmea; ar amkangeam uni sonaren bohokʼ do." 
Daniel2:39 Am tayom eṭakʼ ar mitʼṭecʼ rajosṭi teṅgokʼa ona do am khon huḍiń macha; ar ona tayom do pitạl reakʼ tesar ar mitʼṭecʼ rajosṭi teṅgokʼa, ona do goṭa dhạrti cetanre mạlike calaoa." 
Daniel2:40 Ar ponakʼ rajosṭi do mẽṛhẽtʼ leka hoyokʼa; ente mẽṛhẽtʼ cetʼ leka sanamakʼkoe rạputʼ kaṭra kuṭrại ar mẽṛhẽtʼ cetʼ lekae gejer, onkage ona rajosṭi do sanamakʼe rạputʼ gejera." 
Daniel2:41 Am dom ńel akada, banar jaṅga ar jaṅga talka jotoge kuṅkạlakʼ hasa ar mẽṛhẽtʼ mesal akatʼ leka, noate do hạṭiń akatʼ rajosṭigeye bujhạu ocoyeda; menkhan ona rajosṭire do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ keṭecʼtetʼ hõ tahena, ente am do hasa mesalakatʼ mẽṛhẽtʼem ńel akada." 
Daniel2:42 Ar jaṅga talka ar kạṭupʼko cetʼleka mẽṛhẽtʼ mesalakatʼ hasa leka tahẽkan, onkage rajosṭi reakʼ mitʼ hĩs do kajak tahena ar mitʼ hĩs do rạpudokʼa." 
Daniel2:43 Am cetʼ lekam ńel akatʼ, mẽṛhẽtʼ do hasa mesalakatʼ onkage onko hoṛ do naṛjoṛteko mesalokʼa; menkhan ako akore do bako jomkao midokʼa, cetʼleka mẽṛhẽtʼ do hasa sãote baṅ mesalokʼ." 
Daniel2:44 Onko rapajkoakʼ oktere sermaren Isor do mitʼṭen rajostiye teṅgoyea, ona do tishõ baṅ maraokʼa, ar ona rajosṭi do eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ tire baṅ jimạkʼa; ona do onako rajosṭiye rạputʼ gejera ar acʼge jaejuge tahena." 
Daniel2:45 Ente am dom ńel akada, buru khon mitʼṭen dhiri do begor manwa titege chaḍao ńurena ar ona dhiri do, pitạl, jaṭaṅ hasa, rupạ ar sonae gejerkeda; maraṅ Isor do noako hoyokʼ lạgidokʼ ghoṭnakoge am doe baḍae ocoakatʼmea; kukmũ do khạṭigea ar ona reakʼ bhedtetʼ hõ sạrigea." 
Daniel2:46 Unre Nebukadnesar raj doe ombakʼente Daniele ḍobokʼadea, ar uni ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar jut so mosola samaṅokʼ lạgitʼe hukumkeda." 
Daniel2:47 Raj do Daniele metadea, aperen Isor do sạrige Isorkoren Isor kanae, rapajkoren Probhu kanae ar okoakʼko sodoricʼ hõ kanae, ente am do noa okoakʼko reaṅem sodor daṛeada." 
Daniel2:48 Unre raj do maraṅ hudạ ar aema sandesko Daniele emadea, ar Babel reakʼ sanam disạmkoren cakʼlaoicʼ ar Babelren sanam ạkilanko cetanre mukhiyại dohokedea." 
Daniel2:49 Tayomte Daniel do raj ṭhene nehõren khan raj do Sadrak, Mesak ar Abed-nego teko hõ Babel disạmren rajkạmireye bahalketʼkoa; menkhan Daniel do raj dorbarreye tahẽyena." 
Daniel3:1 Nebukadnesar raj do turuigel moka usul ar turui moka osar sonaren mitʼṭecʼ boṅga murhutʼe benaokedete Babel disạm reakʼ Dura bilạn ṭạnḍireye dohokedea. 
Daniel3:2 Ona tayom uni boṅga murhutʼ reakʼ uḍhạu porobre hijukʼ lạgitʼ Prodes ren cakʼlaoko ar mukhiyạ ạkʼyurko, bibhagren ạkʼyurko, muntriko, khajańciko, maraṅ bikʼcạrko, hạkimko ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ maraṅ hudạren sanam kạmiyạkoe neotaketʼkoa." 
Daniel3:3 Unre onko joto do Nebukadnesarre benao akade boṅga murhutʼ reakʼ uḍhạu porob manao lạgitʼko hecʼ jarwayena ar uni boṅga murhutʼ samaṅreko teṅgoyena. 
Daniel3:4 Unre roṛ saḍeyicʼ do ãṭ aṛaṅte noa kathae lại saḍekeda, “E eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko, disạm ar pạrsirenko, ape do noa hukumpe emocokʼ kana," 
Daniel3:5 tinre sakwa, tiriạ, binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, taranakʼ banamko, joṛa murli ar sanam lekan bajnako reakʼ saḍepe ańjoma unre ape joto hoṛ do otre ombakʼkate Nebukadnesar rajren bekʼnaoicʼ uni sonaren murhutʼpe sewawaea." 
Daniel3:6 Ar jãhãege ombakʼkate bae sewae uni do unrege ona jolokʼkan culhạreye khadle ocokʼa.” 
Daniel3:7 Onate hoṛko do tinre onako bajna reakʼ saḍeko ańjomkeda unrege sanam jạtrenko, disạmrenko ar pạrsiren hoṛko do otre ombakʼkate Nebukadnesare benao akade murhutʼko ḍobokʼadea." 
Daniel3:8 Inạ oktere adom kạldi hoṛko do hecʼkate Jihudiko dusiketʼkoa. 
Daniel3:9 Onko do rajko metadea, “E maharaj, jaejug jiwetʼ baṛem tahenma." 
Daniel3:10 Am do mitʼṭecʼem hukumleda, hoṛko tinre sakwa, tiriạ, binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, taranakʼ banam, joṛa murli ar sanam lekan bajna reakʼ saḍeko ańjoma unre onko do jemon otre ombakʼkate sonaren uni murhutʼko ḍobokʼaea;" 
Daniel3:11 menkhan okoe ombakʼkate bae ḍobog uni do jolokʼkan culhạreye khadle ocokʼa. 
Daniel3:12 E maharaj, adom Jihudiko menakʼkoa okoe do Babel Prodes reakʼ rajkạmiyạrem dohoakatʼko; onko doko hoyokʼkana, Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego. Onko do amakʼ hukum bako lutur akawada. Am okoeṭakʼ debotam sewawae kan onko do uni bako sewawae kana ar am okoeṭakʼ sonaren muhurtʼem benao akade uni hõ bako ḍobokʼae kana.”" 
Daniel3:13 Noa katha ańjomkate Nebukadnesar raj do edreteye seṅgelena ar Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego teko hoho ạguko lạgitʼ hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Ar onko do raj samaṅreko ạgu ocoyena." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadnesar do onkoe metatʼkoa, “E Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego, noa do cetʼ sạrikana, ińren debota bape sapʼsorae kana, ar iń okoeṭakʼ sonaren murhutʼ iń benao akade uni hõ bape sewawae kana?" 
Daniel3:15 Ńitokʼ ape do sakwa, tiriạ, binạ banam, peṛesaṅ, taranakʼ banam, joṛa murli ar sanam lekan bajna reakʼ saḍe ańjomkate ińren bekʼnaoicʼ murhutʼ ḍobokʼae lạgitʼ sapṛao akaepe tahen enḍekhan ma bhagege. Ar jodi bape ḍobog enḍekhan jolokʼkan bhaṭare unregepe khadle ocokʼa. Unre cele debota hõ ińakʼ ti khon do bako bańcao daṛeapea?”" 
Daniel3:16 Unre Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego tako do rajko metadea, “E maharaj Nebukadnesar, niạ babotre am roṛ ruạṛam reakʼ jãhãn jạruṛge bale bujhạueda." 
Daniel3:17 Ale okoe Isorle sewawae kan uniye khoj khan tobe do ona jolokʼkan bhaṭa khon acʼakʼ titeye bańcaolea. 
Daniel3:18 Menkhan E maharaj, ar uni bae onkaere hõ ale do amren debota do bale sewawaea se amem benao akade sonaren murhutʼ hõ bale ḍobokʼaea.”" 
Daniel3:19 Unre Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego cetanre Nebukadnesar do ạḍiye raṅgaoena ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã reakʼ boron hõ pheraoentaea. Uni doe hukumkeda jemon bhaṭa do nindarako jol khon eae dobṛa bạ̃ṛtiko jol ocoy." 
Daniel3:20 Uni do acʼren lạṛhại phạdrenko khon adom daṛean palṭonkoe hukumatʼkoa onko do jemon Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego takoko tolko ar jolokʼkan bhaṭareko khadleko." 
Daniel3:21 Khange onko pene hoṛ do akoakʼ ḍeṅganakʼko, akoakʼ aṅgropko, akoakʼ dạhṛiko ar akoakʼ eṭakʼ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼgeko tol ocoyena ar jolokʼkan bhaṭareko khadlekatʼkoa." 
Daniel3:22 Rajakʼ hukum do ãṭge tahẽkante ar bhaṭa hõ ạḍi lologe tahẽkante seṅgel lepʼ do onko hoṛkoe gocʼketʼkoa okoe do Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego takoko kuṭuṅ idiletʼko." 
Daniel3:23 Menkhan onko pene hoṛ do tol akaege jolokʼkan bhaṭa seṅgelreko khadle ocoyena. 
Daniel3:24 Unre Nebukadnesar raj doe hahaṛayena ar don beretʼenteye teṅgoyena ar acʼren ạkilankoe metatʼkoa, “Abo do cetʼ pe hoṛge tolkate seṅgelre babon khadleletʼkoa? ” Onkoko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ maharaj.”" 
Daniel3:25 Uniye menkeda, “Enḍekhan iń do pon hoṛ seṅgelre dãṛãbaṛae kaniń ńeletʼkoa. Onko do raṛage menakʼkoa ar jãhãnakʼge baṅ hạ̃n akantakoa, ar ponicʼ hoṛ do ńelokʼte debota lekae ńelokʼkana.”" 
Daniel3:26 Unre Nebukadnesar do jolokʼkan bhaṭa reakʼ duạr ṭhen senkate ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, “E maraṅ Isorren guti Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego, dela oḍok hijukʼpe.” Ar onate Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego do jolokʼkan seṅgel tala khonko oḍok hecʼena." 
Daniel3:27 Unre disạm cakʼlaoko ar ạkʼyurko, bibhagren cakʼlaoko ar eṭakʼ sanam usul hudạren kạmiyạko do onko ṭhen hecʼkateko bhiṛkeda. Onko doko ńelkeda seṅgel do onkoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge bae hạ̃n akatʼtakoa, onkoakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ upʼ hõ baṅ lo akantakoa, kicricʼ hõ baṅ nosṭo akana ar onkoakʼ hoṛmore seṅgel reakʼ so hõ bạnukʼa." 
Daniel3:28 Unre Nebukadnesar doe menkeda, “Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-negoren Isorakʼge sarhao hoyokʼtae ma, okoe do acʼren serma goḍetko kolkate acʼren gutikoe bańcaoketʼkoa. Noko do uni cetanre biswạskatege rajakʼ hukumko bebataoleda ar akoren Isor chaḍa ar jãhãn debota sewawako bodolte gujukʼ hõ rạjigeko tahẽkana." 
Daniel3:29 Ona iạte iń do noań hukumiń emetʼkana, jãhãn jạtren, disạmren se pạrsiren hoṛ jodi Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego takoren Isor upạrte jãhãe jãhãnakʼe roṛ enḍekhan uni doe makʼ khanḍa khunḍi ocokʼa ar uniyakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr do guricʼ mande leka hoyokʼtaea, ente nonka do cele debotage bako babańcaoa.”" 
Daniel3:30 Inạ tayom raj do Sedrok, Mesak ar Abed-nego tako Babel disạm talare arhõ maraṅ hudạreye dohoketʼkoa." 
Daniel4:1 Nebukadnesar raj do dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko, disạmrenko ar pạrsiren hoṛko ṭhen noa sombate kolkeda: Apeakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtapema." 
Daniel4:2 Maraṅ Isor iń lạgitʼ okako cinhạ ar hahaṛawakʼkoe kạmi akatʼ ona do kusite apeń baḍae ocoyetʼpea. 
Daniel4:3 Uniyakʼ cinhạko do maraṅgea, uniyakʼ hahaṛa kạmiko do heṛan daṛeana! Uniyakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug reakʼ rajosṭi kana, ar uniyakʼ raj do piṛhi cetan piṛhige." 
Daniel4:4 Iń Nebukadnesar do ińakʼ oṛakʼre nirạiteń tahenkan tahẽkana ar ińakʼ raj dolanre iń do ḍag ḍagiń sahrekʼkan tahẽkana. 
Daniel4:5 Ar tinre ińakʼ aṭetʼreń giticʼ akan tahẽkana unre mitʼṭecʼ kukmũ ńelteń botorena; kukmũte okakoń ńelketʼ ona do ińakʼ monre botore caṛhaoạdińa. 
Daniel4:6 Ona iạte ińakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhed bhaṅgao lạgitʼ iń do Babelren sanam ạkilanko iń samaṅre ạguko lạgitʼ iń hukumkeda. 
Daniel4:7 Khan gunidarko, muhnidarko, kạldiko ar gonokko iń ṭhenko hecʼen khan onko ṭhen kukmũ reakʼ iń lạikeda, menkhan onko do ona reakʼ bhed bako bhaṅgao daṛeadeńa." 
Daniel4:8 Mucạtʼre Daniel do iń ṭhene hecʼen khan iń do mitʼṭecʼ kukmũń lạiyadea. Ińren debotawakʼ ńutum lekate uni do Beltesasare ńutum ocoyena. Unire nonkan sonotakʼ tahẽkana one ona do dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan. 
Daniel4:9 Ińiń menkeda, “E gunidarkoren mukhiyạ Beltesasar, ińiń baḍaea amre nonkan sonotakʼ menakʼa one ona do noa dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan ar jãhãn danaṅakʼko hõ am ṭhen muskilakʼ do baṅkana. Ińakʼ noa kukmũ reakʼ bhed baṛe bhaṅgaoạńme." 
Daniel4:10 Aṭetʼre giticʼkate iń do noa dorsoniń ńelleda. Iń do beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda dhạrti talare mitʼṭecʼ dare do teṅgo akana; ona do ạḍi usulge tahẽkana. 
Daniel4:11 Dare do hara idiyente ạḍi maraṅ ar daṛeanakʼ hoyena ar ona reakʼ coṭ agal do serma hạbicʼ rakapʼena; dhạrti reakʼ ses simạ khon hõ ona dare do ńel ńamokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Daniel4:12 Ona reakʼ sakamko do ạḍi napae tahẽkana ar jo hõ ạḍi ḍher tahẽkana ar ona khon sanamkoge jomakʼko ńametʼ tahẽkana. Ona latarre do ṭạnḍiren janwarko ḍerakʼkan tahẽkana ar coṭren cẽṛẽko hõ ona reakʼ ḍạrkoreko tukạyetʼ tahẽkana; ar sanam jiwiyankoge ona khon jomakʼko ńametʼ tahẽkana. 
Daniel4:13 “Aṭetʼre giticʼkatege ona dorsonre beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda, mitʼṭen sonot pahradar do serma khone pheḍ hecʼena." 
Daniel4:14 Uni do ãṭ aṛaṅteye menkeda, ‘dare do makʼ bhindạṛpe ar ona reakʼ ḍạrko hese giḍipe; ona reakʼ sakamko hotʼ giḍikakʼpe ar ona reakʼ joko chiṭiạu giḍikakʼpe. Ar ona dare buṭạ khon janwarko ar ḍạrko khon cẽṛẽko ńir joṅma," 
Daniel4:15 Menkhan ona reakʼ gonḍa ar rehetʼko do mẽṛhẽtʼ ar pitạlte tol akan ot reakʼ ghãskore tahenma. Ar sisir dakʼte ona do lohodokʼma ar dhạrti reakʼ dareko talare ar janwarko sãote uni doe girobasokʼ ma. 
Daniel4:16 Unire manwa sobhab do alo tahenma ar eae bochor hạbicʼ uni do janwarakʼ sobhabe em ocokʼma. 
Daniel4:17 “ ‘Noa hukum do hohorhokoakʼ niṭakʼ lekateakʼ kana, sonotkoakʼ kathatege noa khojgokʼ do, jemon jiwetʼko doko baḍae daṛeakʼ, Coṭ utạricʼ do manwakoakʼ rajosṭiye calaoeda mente; ar jãhãegeye kusiyaekan unige rajosṭi doe danae kana ar manwa talare sanam khon nicạṛicʼge cetanreye duṛupʼede kana.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Noa kukmũge iń Nebukadnesar raj doń kukmũkeda. Ńitokʼ do E Beltesasar, ma lạiyạńme noa reakʼ mane do cetʼkana? Ińakʼ rajren okoe ạkilanko hõ noa reakʼ mane do bako lại daṛeadińa; menkhan am dom daṛeakʼa, ente amre sonot nonkanakʼ menakʼa one ona do niạ dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan.”" 
Daniel4:19 Unre Daniel, metakʼme Beltesasar do kukmũ reakʼ katha hudiskateye botorena ar thoṛa okte lạgitʼe asbasoena. Onate raj doe menkeda, “E Beltesasar, kukmũ se ona reakʼ bhed do alo baṛeye cintạ ocomema.” Beltesasar doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E maharaj, niạ kukmũ ar niạ reakʼ bhed do amren bạiriko cetanre baṛe paṛaokʼma.”" 
Daniel4:20 Am okaṭakʼ darem ńelletʼ, oka do maraṅ ar daṛe idikʼkan tahẽkan, okaṭakʼ reakʼ coṭ agal do serma hạbicʼ senakan tahẽkan ar oka do dhạrtiren sanam hoṛko ńelńametʼ tahẽkan," 
Daniel4:21 one onare mońj sakam ar ḍher joko tahẽkan, oka do sanamkoakʼ jomakʼe jogaṛetʼ tahẽkan, oka do janwarko asraye emako kan tahẽkan ar ḍạrkore coṭren cẽṛẽko hõko tahenkan tahẽkan." 
Daniel4:22 E maharaj, am kangeam ona dare do. Am do maraṅ ar daṛeanem hoyakana; amakʼ daṛe do ḍher akante serma hạbicʼem tiyokʼ akada ar amakʼ rajosṭi do dhạrti reakʼ ses simạna hạbicʼ seṭer akana." 
Daniel4:23 E Maharaj, mitʼṭen sonot hohorhoyicʼ do serma khon pheḍ hijukʼkanem ńelkedea. Uni doe menleda, ‘dare do makʼ bhindạṛpe, menkhan ona reakʼ gonḍa ar rehetʼko do mẽṛhẽtʼ ar pitạlte tolkate ot reakʼ ghãsre giḍikakʼpe. Ona do serma reakʼ sisir dakʼte lohodokʼma; ar uniyakʼ bakhra do eae bochor hạbicʼ janwarko tulucʼ tahentaema.’" 
Daniel4:24 “E maharaj, ńitokʼ okań menetʼkan ona do ińren kisạ̃ṛ maharajakʼ kukmũ reakʼ bhedkana. Noa do Coṭ utạricʼakʼ hukum kangea." 
Daniel4:25 Am do hoṛko tala khonem laga ńir ocokʼa ar janwarko sãotem tahena; am do ḍaṅgra leka ghãsem joma ar serma reakʼ sisirdakʼtem lohodokʼa. Nonkate eae bochor hạbicʼ calakʼa, one tin hạbicʼ bam aṅgocʼ manwakoakʼ rajosṭi cetanre maraṅ Isorgeye rajokʼkana mente ar onako rajosṭi do acʼ okoeye kusiyae unigeye emaekana." 
Daniel4:26 Rehetʼ sudhạ dare reakʼ gonḍa dohokakʼ reakʼ hukum do hoyokʼ kana, am do tinrem aṅgoca sermaren Isorgeye rajokʼkana unre amakʼ rajosṭi do amgem em ruạṛ ocokʼa." 
Daniel4:27 Onate E maharaj, am do ińakʼ solha ańjomme. Am do bhageakʼ kạmime ar reṅgecʼ-orecʼko dayawakome ar amakʼ behokakʼ ar kại reakʼ kạmiko do bạgime; pasere pase amakʼ nirại dinko do jhạl idikʼtamge.”" 
Daniel4:28 Noako sanam do Nebukadnesar raj cetanre paṛaoena. Ar gelbar cando tayom tinre uni do Babelre raj doṅgol reakʼ chatreye dãṛãbaṛae kan tahẽkana unreye menkeda, “Ińakʼ maraṅ daṛe hotete ar ińakʼ ṭhonok sodorokʼ lạgitʼ raj naṅgraha lekate okań benao akatʼ ona do cetʼ noa maraṅ Babel do baṅkana?”" 
Daniel4:29  
Daniel4:30  
Daniel4:31 Uni do katha ạuriye mucạdrege serma khon okoe coṅe menkeda, “E Nebukadnesar raj, am dom men ocoakana je, amakʼ rajosṭi do am khon recʼ hatao akana." 
Daniel4:32 Am do hoṛko tala khonem laga ńir ocokʼa ar janwarko sãotem tahena; ar ḍaṅgra leka ghãskom joma. Ar tin hạbicʼ bam aṅgoc maraṅ Isor do manwakoakʼ rajosṭiko cetanreye rajokʼkana ar onako rajosṭi do acʼakʼ kusi lekae em akokana unhạbicʼte eae bochor do parom calakʼa” 
Daniel4:33 Nebukadnesar reaṅ oka roṛlen unrege ona do purạuena. Manwako tala khon uni doe laga ńir ocoyena ar ḍaṅgra leka ghãs jojome ehopʼena. Ar uniyakʼ hoṛmo do sisirdakʼte lohodokʼ ehopʼentaea; uniyakʼ upʼko do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽakʼ il leka ar ramako do cẽṛẽkoakʼ rama leka hoyentaea. 
Daniel4:34 Ona okte purạuen khan iń Nebukadnesar do serma secʼ iń beṅgetʼkeda ar ińakʼ bud do ruạṛ hecʼadińạ. Unre iń do Coṭ utạrricʼ iń sarhaokedea; okoe do jaejug jiwetʼ menae uniń ḍobokʼadea ariń sarhaokedea. Ińiń menkeda, “Isorakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug hạbicʼ reakʼ rajosṭikana; uniyakʼ rajosṭi do piṛhike piṛhi tahena." 
Daniel4:35 Dhạrtiren sanam hoṛ uni ṭhen do cele hõko baṅkana. Uni do serma goḍetko ar dhạrtiren hoṛkoante acʼakʼ kusi sana lekae kạmikana. Nonkan celege bạnukʼkoa, uniyakʼ tiko thir ocodaṛeataea arko men daṛeaea, ‘cetʼem ceka kana am do?’" 
Daniel4:36 Tinre ińakʼ mon bogeyentińạ unre ińakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ manot lạgitʼ ińakʼ ṭhonok do ińiń em ruạṛ ocoyena. Ińren montriko ar mukhiyạko do ińko sendra ńamkedińạ ar siṅghạsonre arhõko duṛupʼkedińa ar iń do laha khon arhõ maraṅiń hoyena. 
Daniel4:37 Ńitokʼ iń Nebukadnesar do uni sermaren raj sarhao, manot ar ṭhonokiń emaekana, ente uni okaṭakʼe cekae ona do ṭhikakʼgeye onkayeda, ar uniyakʼ jotowakʼ horge dhoromte perecʼgetaea. Ar okoe bạḍạiteko perecʼge uni do onkoe copotʼkoa." 
Daniel5:1 Beltsasar raj do acʼren hajar napṛakʼ napṛakʼ hoṛko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ okocʼe khelodkeda, ar onko hajarko samaṅre darkha rasae ńũkeda." 
Daniel5:2 Darkha rasako ńũńũkan tahẽkanre Beltsasar doe hukumkeda, sona ar rupạ reakʼ bhajanko ạgui lạgitʼ one oka uniren apat Nebukadnesar do Jerusalem reakʼ mundil khone oḍok ạguakatʼ tahẽkan, jemon onakore uniren napṛakʼ napṛakʼko, uniren erako ar chuṭki erakoko ńũ daṛeakʼ." 
Daniel5:3 Unre Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon sona reakʼ okako bhajan ạgu hoylen onako oḍok ạguketʼ khan raj do, acʼren mukhiyạko, uniren bạhuko ar chuṭki erako onare darkha rasako ńũkeda." 
Daniel5:4 Onko do darkha rasa ńũńũkan tulucʼ sona, rupạ, tama, mẽṛhẽtʼ, kaṭ ar dhiriren debotakoko sarhaoketʼkoa." 
Daniel5:5 Unre acʼkage manwawakʼ mitʼṭen ti do hecʼkate raj oṛakʼ reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ ṭhen bhit cetanre okʼolkan ńel ńamena. Ar olokʼkan jokhecʼ raj do ona tiye ńel ńamkeda. 
Daniel5:6 Ar onate uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do keklesetʼentaea ar nunạkʼ botor caṛhaoadea, uniyakʼ ḍanḍa do lạbṛucʼentaea ar gunṭhi kin hõ thar tharaokʼ ehopʼentaea." 
Daniel5:7 Unre raj do ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoate gonokko, gunidarko, kạldiko ạguko lạgitʼe hukumkeda. Uni do Babelren ạkilankoe metatʼkoa, “Jãhãege noa olakʼ paṛhaokate ona reakʼ bhede lại daṛeạń enḍekhan uni do beguni kicricʼ ar hoṭokʼre sona reakʼ mala hõe emocokʼa ar rajosṭiren pea rajko modre uni hõ mitʼṭecʼ hudại emocokʼa.”" 
Daniel5:8 Rajren sanam ạkilan hoṛ do hecʼkate bhitriteko boloyena menkhan okoege ona do bako paṛhao daṛeada se raj hõ ona reakʼ mane do bako lại daṛeadea," 
Daniel5:9 Unre Beltsasar raj do arhõ botor caṛhaoadea ar uniyakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mirluṅentaea. Ar uniren mukhiyạko hõko as basaoena. 
Daniel5:10 Raj ar uniren mukhiyạkoakʼ katha ańjomkate rajren eṅgattetʼ do bhoj oṛakʼre hecʼkateye menkeda, “E maharaj, jaejug jiwetʼ baṛe tahenme. Am do alom botorokʼa ar amakʼ mẽtʼãhã do alom mirluṅ ocoytama." 
Daniel5:11 Amakʼ rajosṭi talare nonkan mitʼ hoṛ menaea ar unire nonkan sonotakʼ menakʼa oka do noa dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan. Am baba bidạlre marsal ar bud ar ạkil, debotako reakʼ ạkil lekanakʼge unire ńamokʼkan tahẽkana. Ar am baba Nebukadnesar maharaj do gonokko, muhnidarko, Kạldiko ar sạkʼgunkoren mukhiyạ menkateye bahalledea." 
Daniel5:12 Daniel ńutuman nui hoṛ do Beltesasar mente hõe bahnaledea. Unire do mitʼṭen soros utạr jiue menaea, uni do bidiạ ar buj ar kukmũ reakʼ bhede bhaṅgao daṛeakʼkan tahẽkan ar kudumko ar muskilakʼko reakʼ hõe bhoṅ daṛeakʼkan tahẽkan. Am do uni Daniel hoho ạguiyem; unige noa olakʼ reakʼ bhede lạiyama.”" 
Daniel5:13 Unre Daniel do raj samaṅreye ạgu ocoyena, ar raj do uniye metadea, “Am do cetʼ uni Daniel kanam onko Jihudikoren mitʼ hoṛ okoe do iń baba Jihudạ disạm khon bondikateye ạguletʼko?" 
Daniel5:14 Ińiń ańjomakada amre nonkanakʼko menakʼa oka do noa dhạrti reakʼ baṅkan, ar amre bujhạu reakʼ daṛe, bud ar bises ạkil hõ menakʼa." 
Daniel5:15 Noa olakʼ paṛhaokate ona reakʼ bhed lạiyạń lạgitʼ muhnidarko ar eṭakʼ sopolhako iń ṭhenko ạgu ocolena, menkhan noa reakʼ mane do bako lại daṛeada," 
Daniel5:16 Ińiń ańjomkeda, am do okoakʼko reaṅ manekom lại daṛeakʼa ar muskilakʼko hõm alga daṛeakʼa. Am do ńitokʼ noa ol akanakʼem paṛhao daṛeakʼ ar ona reakʼ bhedem bhaṅgao daṛeạń enḍekhan am do beguni kicricʼem horokʼ ocokʼa ar hoṭokʼre sona reakʼ mala hõm ńama ar rajosṭiren pea rapajko modre am hõ mitʼṭecʼ hudạm ńama.”" 
Daniel5:17 Unre Daniel do raje roṛ ruạṛadea, “Amakʼ puruskar do amakʼge baṛe tahenma ar baṅkhan eṭakʼ jãhãe hoṛ emakom. Menkhan iń do maharaj ṭhen ol akanakʼ iń paṛhaoa ar ona reakʼ bhediń bhaṅgaoaea." 
Daniel5:18 E Maharaj, maraṅ Isor do am baba, metakʼme Nebukadnesar do rajosṭi, ar ṭhonoke emade tahẽkana." 
Daniel5:19 Uni do daṛeye emocoyen khan sanam jạtrenko, disạmrenko ar pạrsirenko do uni samaṅre botorteko thar tharaokʼkan tahẽkana. Uni do acʼakʼ kusi lekae gocʼetʼko tahẽkana ar acʼakʼ kusi leka jiwetʼe dohoyetʼko tahẽkana ar jãhãege moneyae unige cetan hudại emaekan tahẽkana ar jãhãege moneyae unigeye copotʼede tahẽkana." 
Daniel5:20 Menkhan tinre uniyakʼ ontor do usulokʼ ehopʼentaea ar gorboteye perecʼena unre uni do raj siṅghạson khone pheḍ ocoyena ar uniyakʼ ṭhonok do recʼ ocoyena. 
Daniel5:21 Uni do manwa tala khone laga ńir ocoyente mitʼṭecʼ janwarakʼ sobhabe em ocoyena. Ar tinạkʼ din bae aṅgocletʼ, maraṅ Isorge manwakoakʼ rajosṭiko cetanren mạlik kanae ar uni okoeye kusiyae unige rajosṭiko cetanreye duṛupʼede kana, unạkʼ din uni do gadhako sãoteye girobas akan tahẽkana ar ḍaṅgra leka ghãskoe jometʼ tahẽkana ar coṭ reakʼ sisirdakʼteye lohodokʼ kan tahẽkana." 
Daniel5:22 “Menkhan E Beltsasar, am do uniren hopon kanam; ar jotowakʼ baḍaekatere hõ cedakʼ am do bam nindhạnokʼ kana." 
Daniel5:23 Menkhan ona bodolte amge sermaren Probhu Isor upạrtem teṅgon akana. Am do uniyakʼ oṛakʼ khon ạguwakʼ bạṭikom oḍok ạgu ocoakada, ar onakore am ar amren mukhiyạko, amren bạhuko ar chuṭki erako ape do darkha rasape ńũ akada. Ar am do sonaren, rupạren, pitạlren, mẽṛhẽtʼren, kaṭren ar dhiriren benao akatʼko debotako okoe do ńeńelhõ bako ńeńel ar ańjom hõ bako ańjom ar bujhạu hõ bako bujhạu onkom sarhaoetʼkoa. Menkhan Isor do bam sarhaoede kana, one uniyakʼ tire amakʼ jiwi ar amakʼ goṭa horge menakʼtam." 
Daniel5:24 Ona iạte uni do ona ti kolkate noa kathae ol akada. 
Daniel5:25 “Ona ol do hoyokʼkana: ‘MENE MENE TEKEL UPHARSIN.’ 
Daniel5:26 “Ona katha reakʼ mane do hoyena: MENE, metakʼme Isor do amakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ dinkoe lekha akada ar ona doe sạt akada." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL, metakʼme sosoṅakʼ tulạre am doe soṅakatʼmea ar am dom komaogea." 
Daniel5:28 UPHARSIN, metakʼme, hạṭińena, amakʼ rajosṭi do hạṭińena ona do Madae ar Parasrenko ṭhen emocoyena.”" 
Daniel5:29 Unre Beltsasarakʼ hukum leka Daniel do beguni kicricʼko horokʼadea ar uniyakʼ hoṭokʼre sona reakʼ mala hõ. Ar rajosṭiren pea rajko talare mitʼ hoṛakʼ hudạ emae reakʼ hõ lại sodorena. 
Daniel5:30 Ar enhilokʼ ńindạge Babelren raj Beltsasar doe makʼ gocʼ ocoyena," 
Daniel5:31 Ar Madae Darjawes do turuigel bar bochor umerre rajosṭi reakʼ bhare hataokeda. 
Daniel6:1 Darjawes do acʼakʼ rajosṭi reakʼ sanam disạmko cetanre mitʼsae bargel cakʼlaoko bahalko do jute metatʼa. 
Daniel6:2 Onko cetanre pea do rajren ạkʼyurkoko tahẽkana. Noko pe hoṛ modre Daniel hõe tahẽkana. Noko pe hoṛ ṭhenge onko subedarko do hisạb emokʼ hoyokʼkan tahẽkantakoa jemon maharajakʼ jãhãnakʼ loksan alo hoyokʼtae. 
Daniel6:3 Daniel do acʼakʼ gun iạte eṭakʼ raj-ạkʼyurko ar disạmren cakʼlaoko khon arhõ bhage utạricʼ menteye sạbudena. Ona iạte maharaj do goṭa rajosṭi cetanre bahale reakʼe monejoṅana. 
Daniel6:4 Onate onko raj-ạkʼyurko ar onko disạm cakʼlaoko do sorkari kạmi babotre Danielakʼ dos ńam baṛaeko ehopʼena, menkhan bako daṛeada. Unire onko do jãhãn dosge bako ńam daṛeada, ente uni do pạtiạrgeye tahẽkana, jãhãn dos se bhul do unire baṅ tahẽkana." 
Daniel6:5 Mucạtʼre onko hoṛko menkeda, “Daniel dusire paṛao ocoye lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ cetʼge babon ńam daṛeakʼa, eken Isorakʼ ạn ạrite unire jãhãnakʼge bon ńam khan.”" 
Daniel6:6 Unre raj-cakʼlaoko ar disạm cakʼlaoko do mitʼ dhaote raj ṭhen senkateko menkeda, “Maharaj Darjawes, jaejug jiwetʼ baṛe tahenme." 
Daniel6:7 Sanam raj-cakʼlaoko, disạm cakʼlaoko ar subedarko, sopolhako ar bibhagren cakʼlaoko onko sanamkoge mitʼ kathareko rạjiyena je, maharaj do mitʼṭecʼ kajak hukum jemone emokʼ. Ar ona hukum do hoyokʼ kana, jãhãe hoṛ pegel din hạbicʼ E maharaj, am chaḍa eṭakʼ debotako se manwa ṭhene koejoṅ enḍekhan uni do dhạcri kulakʼ ghaḍlakʼre giḍikae hoyokʼa." 
Daniel6:8 Onate E maharaj, ńitokʼ ona hukum olakʼ lekate emokʼme jemon Madae ar Parasrenkoakʼ arhõ mitʼṭecʼ ạn hoyokʼte tishõ ona do baṅ bodolokʼ.”" 
Daniel6:9 Unre Darjawes raj do ona olakʼ hukumreye suhikeda. 
Daniel6:10 Daniel do rajakʼ hukumre suhi akana menteye ańjomketʼ khan acʼakʼ koṭha kandhateye rakapʼena; ona oṛakʼ reakʼ jalna do Jerusalem secʼge jhicʼ tahẽkana. Uni do acʼakʼ hewa leka dinre pe dhao ikhṛumkateye koejoṅana ar acʼren Isore gun manao joharadea. 
Daniel6:11 Unre onko do mitʼ dhaote onḍe senkate Daniel Isor ṭhen koejoṅ ar nehõrokʼkanko ńelkedea. 
Daniel6:12 Onate onko do raj ṭhen ruạṛ senkate uniyakʼ hukum reakʼ kathako disạ ocokedea arko metadea, “E maharaj, am do cetʼ noa hukum bam emlena, jãhãe hoṛ pe gel dinre am chaḍa eṭakʼ debota se manwa ṭhene koejoṅ enḍekhan uni do dhạcri kulakʼ ghaḍlakʼreye giḍi ocokʼa mente?” Raj doe roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Madae ar Parasrenkoakʼ ạn lekate noa hukum do ṭikạu menakʼa, ente ona ạn do baṅ bodolokʼa.”" 
Daniel6:13 Unre onko do rajko metadea, “E maharaj, Daniel ńutuman Jihudạ disạmren bondiko modren mitʼṭecʼ hoṛ do amakʼ katha se am oka hukumem emakan ona bae luturakʼ kana. Uni do ńithõ dinre pe dhaogeye koejoṅ kana.”" 
Daniel6:14 Raj do niạ katha ańjomkate ạḍiye dukena; ar Daniele rukhiyạyea mente monreye goṭawana ar uni bańcaoe lạgitʼ siń cando ạuriye hạsurokʼ hạbicʼ joto lekanakʼe kurumuṭukeda. 
Daniel6:15 Unre onko hoṛ do arhõ mitʼ dhaote hecʼkate rajko metadea, “E maharaj, disạime baṛe, Madae ar Parasrenkoakʼ ạn lekate raj okaṭakʼ hukume emokʼ ona do tishõ baṅ bodolokʼa.”" 
Daniel6:16 Sesre raj doe hukumkeda ar hoṛ do senkate Danielko sapʼkedea ar dhạcri kulakʼ khandṛaṅreko khadlekedea. Unre raj do Daniele metadea, “Jaoge amren okoeṭakʼ Isorem sewawae kan unige am doe rukhiyạmema.”" 
Daniel6:17 Ar mitʼṭecʼ dhiri ạgukate ona ghaḍlakʼ reakʼ moca ṭhenko dohokada. Raj do acʼ ar mukhiyạ hoṛkoakʼ chapakʼ mundạmte onae chapada jemon Daniel lạgitʼ eṭakʼ jãhãn bebosta alo hoyokʼ. 
Daniel6:18 Ar raj do acʼakʼ doṅgolte ruạṛkate mitʼ ńindại upạs aṅgakeda; ar mon hulạsokʼtae lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ hõ bako ạguadea; uni do jạpitʼ hõ bae jạpitʼ daṛeada. 
Daniel6:19 Ar raj do aṅga marsalokʼ sãote beretʼkate usạra ona dhạcri kulkoakʼ khandṛaṅ ṭhene calaoena. 
Daniel6:20 Ar ona khandṛaṅ ṭhen senkate botorokʼ salakʼ Daniele hohoadea, “E jiwetʼ Isorren guti Daniel, jao okte okoeyem sewawae kan uni amren Isor do cetʼ dhạcri kulkoakʼ moca khone rukhiyạ akatʼmea?”" 
Daniel6:21 Daniele roṛ ruạṛkeda, “E maharaj, jaejug jiwetʼ baṛe tahenme." 
Daniel6:22 Ińren Isor do acʼren dutkoe kolketʼkote dhạcri kulkoakʼ mocae bondketʼtakoa. Onko do bako ghạl akadińạ, ente Isorakʼ mẽtʼãhãre bin dusạniń tahẽkana. E maharaj, am ṭhen hõ jãhãnakʼ do bạń dosakada.”" 
Daniel6:23 Unre raj do ạḍiye kusiyena ar ona khandṛaṅ khon Daniel rakabe lạgitʼe hukumkeda. Daniele rakapʼ ocoyen khan uniyakʼ hoṛmore ghạl reakʼ jãhãn cinhạge baṅ ńellena, ente uni do acʼren Isor cetanre bhorsa akane tahẽkana." 
Daniel6:24 Okoeko hoṛ do hiskạte Danielko dusilede onko do rajakʼ hukum iạteko ạgu ocoyena ar onkoren bạhuko gidrạko sudhạ ona dhạcri kulkoakʼ khandṛaṅreko khalde ocoyena. Ar onḍe ạuriko ńurokʼrege dhạcri kulko do onkore jhãpko emkeda ar onkoakʼ jaṅko rạputʼ gejerketʼtakoa. 
Daniel6:25 Inạ tayom Darjawes raj do sanam jạtrenko, disạmrenko ar pạrsiren hoṛko ṭhen niạ kathae olkeda: “Apeakʼ bhạlại hoyokʼtape ma!" 
Daniel6:26 Ińiń hukumetʼ kana, ińakʼ rajosṭiren sanam hoṛ do jemon Danielren Isorko botorae arko ḍobokʼaema, ente uni kangeae jiwetʼ ar jaejugicʼ Isor do. Uniyakʼ rajosṭi do tishõ baṅ maraokʼtaea, ar uniyakʼ ạidạri do tishõ baṅ mucạdokʼtaea." 
Daniel6:27 Uni do rurukhiyạ are babańcaoa; uni do sermare ar dhạrtire hõ cinhạ lekate ạḍi lekan hahaṛa kạmikoe kạmikana. Uni do dhạcri kulkoakʼ moca khon Daniele rukhiyạ akadea.” 
Daniel6:28 Nonkate Darjawes ar Parasren raj Koresakʼ rajokʼ oktere Daniel do pạtiạr ar manote ńam idikeda. 
Daniel7:1 Babelren raj Beltsasare rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Daniel do acʼakʼ aṭetʼreye giticʼakan tahẽkanre acʼakʼ bohokʼre hecʼen kukmũ ar dorsonkoe ńelkeda ar nokʼõe nonka onako reakʼ guṭtetʼe ol dohokeda. “Ńindạ jokhecʼ iń do dorsonteń ńelkeda, serma reakʼ ponea hoe do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ jalapuriko uṭlạu rakapʼkeda." 
Daniel7:2  
Daniel7:3 Ar ona jalapuri khon ponea maraṅ janwarko rakapʼ hecʼena; onko mimitʼko do judạ judạko tahẽkana. 
Daniel7:4 Pạhilicʼ doe tahẽkana dhạcri kul leka ar uniyakʼ do cẽṛẽ leka phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽkantaea. Ar ńel ńeltege uniyakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼkin do or chaḍaoena ar uni do ot khon cetanteye rakapʼ ocoyena. Unre uni do manwa leka banar jaṅgateye teṅgoyena ar manwawakʼ ontore emocoyena. 
Daniel7:5 “Ona tayom iń do dosaricʼ janwariń ńelkedea. Uni do ńelokʼte Bana lekae tahẽkana. Uni do mitʼ dhaṛateye duṛupʼ akana ar uniyakʼ mocare do pańjra reakʼ pea jaṅ tahẽkana. Uni doe men ocoyena, ‘am do senkate lacʼ bikʼ jel jomme.’" 
Daniel7:6 “Ona tayom iń do ar mitʼṭecʼ janwariń ńelkedea. Uni do ńelokʼte hunḍạr lekae tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ deare do cẽṛẽkoakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ leka ponea phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ tahẽkana. Nui janwarakʼ do ponea bohokʼ tahẽkantaea ar uni do raj ektiạriye emocoyena. 
Daniel7:7 “Ńindạ jokhecʼ ińakʼ ona kukmũ talareń beṅgetʼketʼ khan ponicʼ janwariń ńel ńamkedea. Uni do botorgeye tahẽkana ar daṛe hõ ạḍi daṛeye tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ lạṭu lạṭu ḍaṭa tahẽkantaea. Ar acʼren sikạr doe chaka chunkedeteye utʼkedea ar oka sarecʼ tahẽyen ona do jaṅgateye lebetʼ gańjaokeda. Nui do lahaten janwarko khon hõ begargeye tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ do gel goṭen dereń tahẽkana. 
Daniel7:8 Iń do tinre ona dereńkoń kheyalkeda unre mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń dereń do onako talare janam rakapʼena; ona samaṅre lahateakʼ dereńko tala khon pea dereń do or totʼ giḍi ocoyena. Noa dereńko do manwawakʼ mẽtʼ leka tahẽkana ar mitʼṭecʼ moca hõ tahẽkana one uni do gorbokʼ salakʼe roṛetʼkan tahẽkan. 
Daniel7:9 “Tayomteń ńelkeda adomakʼ siṅghạso doho ocoyena ar mitʼṭecʼ mare haṛam hoṛ do acʼakʼ siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼena. Uniyakʼ kicricʼko do him leka ponḍ ar uniyakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ do ponḍ il leka tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ siṅghạson ar siṅghạson reakʼ pạ̃ihạ̃kore do seṅgel jolokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Daniel7:10 Uni samaṅ khon mitʼṭecʼ seṅgel reakʼ gaḍa do ạtu oḍokena. Ar hajar hajar hoṛ do uniko sewawae kan tahẽkana; ar lakh lakh hoṛ do uni samaṅre teṅgo akaeko tahẽkana. Ado bicạr ehopʼena ar puthiko hõ oṭakʼ hoyena. 
Daniel7:11 “Ińiń ńelkeda ona dereń do unhõ gorbokʼ salakʼ kathae roṛetʼkan tahẽkana. Ar tin hạbicʼ uni janwar bae gur ocoyen unhạbicʼ iń do beṅgetʼ akaegeń tahẽkana. Uniyakʼ hoṛmo do marao ocoyente jolokʼkan seṅgelre giḍi ocoyentaea. 
Daniel7:12 Ar eṭakʼ eṭakʼ janwarko ṭhen khon hõ raj ektiạri do hatao ocoyena menkhan niṭ akatʼ okte lạgitʼ onko do jiwetʼko doho ocoyena. 
Daniel7:13 “Ńindạ jokhecʼ iń do dorsoniń ńelkeda, manwa hopon leka mitʼ hoṛ do coṭ khon rimil talate hijukʼkaniń ńelkedea. Uni do murubbi ṭhene laha idiyena ar uni samaṅreye idi ocoyena." 
Daniel7:14 Uni manwa hopon do ektiạri, ṭhonok ar rajosṭiye emocoyena jemon sanam jạtrenko, disạmrenko ar pạrsirenko uniko sewawae. Uniyakʼ rajosṭi do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena; ona do baṅ mucạdokʼa ar uniyakʼ rajosṭi hõ tisge baṅ maraokʼtaea." 
Daniel7:15 “Unre iń Daniel do kukmũ talare monre kosṭoń ạikạukeda ar okakoń ńelketʼ ona do ińe kạulạ kạuli ocoyedeń tahẽkana. 
Daniel7:16 Okoe onḍeko teṅgo akan tahẽkan iń do onko mitʼ hoṛ ṭhen senkate noako reakʼ manetetʼ iń kuliyana. Unre uni do noa menkate onako reakʼ bhede bhaṅgaoạdińa," 
Daniel7:17 ‘Onko ponea maraṅ okocʼ janwar doko hoyokʼ kana dhạrti reakʼ ponea rajosṭi. 
Daniel7:18 Menkhan mucạtʼre maraṅ Isorren hoṛko do ektiạri ńamkate jaejug, hẽ, jaejug hạbicʼko rajokʼa.’" 
Daniel7:19 “Unre iń do uni ponicʼ janwarakʼ mane baḍae joṅ lạgitʼ iń khojkeda. Uni doe uni janwar kana one okoe do eṭakʼko khon judạ ar botorangeye tahẽkan, uniyakʼ do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ ḍaṭa ar pitạl reakʼ rama tahẽkantaea, one okoeṭakʼ janwar do acʼakʼ sikạre chakachunkede ar sarecʼakʼ do jaṅgateye lebetʼ gasmanḍaoletʼ tahẽkan." 
Daniel7:20 Uniyakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ gel goṭecʼ dereń ar eṭakʼ oka dereńko janam rakapʼlen, ar okoe samaṅre pea dereń ńurlen, ar okoeyakʼ mẽtʼko ar gorbokʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ moca tahẽkantae ar okaṭakʼ dereń do eṭakʼakʼko khon lạṭu idikʼkan tahẽkan, ona dereń babotre baḍae joṅ lạgitʼ iń khojkeda." 
Daniel7:21 Ona tayom iń doń ńelkeda ona dereń do Isorren hoṛko upạrte lạṛhạikate onkoe bhagaoetʼko tahẽkana," 
Daniel7:22 one tin hạbicʼ uni murubbi hecʼkate maraṅ Isorren hoṛko secʼ ray ạuriye em. Ar ona tayom khon Isorren hoṛko do rajokʼko ehopʼena. 
Daniel7:23 “Ona tayom uni do nonkae lạiyạdińạ, ‘ponicʼ janwar doe hoyokʼ kana dhạrti reakʼ ponakʼ rajosṭi. Ona do eṭakʼ rajosṭiko khon begarge hoyokʼa ar ona do goṭa dhạrtiye chakachuna." 
Daniel7:24 Ona gel goṭecʼ dereń do hoyokʼ kana gel goṭecʼ rajosṭi khon gel goṭen rapajko upelokʼa. Onko tayom do ar mitʼṭen raje rakapʼ hijukʼa, uni do lahaten rapajko khon eṭakʼ lekae hoyokʼa; ar onko pea rapajkoe bhagaokoa." 
Daniel7:25 Maraṅ Isor upạrte uni do kathae roṛa ar uniren hoṛkoe santaokoa. Uni do niṭakatʼ dinko hạbicʼ ar ạn-ạriko bodol reakʼe kurumuṭuya. Isor do onko hoṛko pe bochor tala hạbicʼ uniyakʼ tireye jimạkoa. 
Daniel7:26 Menkhan tayomte uni doe bicạr ocokʼa ar uniyakʼ ektiạri do uni khon rejogokʼa, ar ona do jaejug lạgitʼ marao giḍikʼteaa." 
Daniel7:27 Ona tayom rajosṭi, ektiạri ar pirthimi reakʼ sanamakʼ rajosṭiko reakʼ daṛe do maraṅ Isorren hoṛkoakʼ tire jimạ ocokʼa. Onkoakʼ rajosṭi do hoyokʼa jaejug hạbicʼ ar sanam rapajko do onkoko sapʼsorakoa ar onko tabereko tahena." 
Daniel7:28 “Nonḍege ona kukmũ reakʼ mucạtʼtetʼ do. Iń Daniel do ińakʼ noako hudis iạte nunạkʼ botoriń ạikạukeda je, ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do keklesetʼentińa, menkhan kukmũ reakʼ bisoe do monreń rebetʼ dohokada, okoe hõ bạń lạiyatʼkoa.”" 
Daniel8:1 Beltsasar rajakʼ rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre iń Daniel do ar mitʼṭecʼ dorsoniń ńelkeda. 
Daniel8:2 Ona dorsonre iń do Elem Prodes reakʼ Susan gaṛiń ńelkeda. Ona dorson talare iń do Ulại gaḍa aṛereń tahẽkana. 
Daniel8:3 Iń do gaḍa aṛere mitʼṭen bheḍa teṅgo akaniń ńelkedea. Uniyakʼ do barea jeleń dereń tahẽkantaea. Mitʼṭecʼ dereń do eṭakʼakʼ khon jeleńge tahẽkana ar ona do hara rakabokʼkan tahẽkana. 
Daniel8:4 Iń doń ńelkeda Bheḍa do pạchim, utạr ar dạkhin secʼe uṭicʼetʼ kana. Uni samaṅre cele janwarge bako ṭikạu daṛeada ar uni khon bańcaoko leka do celege bako tahẽkana. Uni do acʼakʼ kusi lekae cekayetʼ tahẽkana are daṛe idiyena." 
Daniel8:5 Iń do noa reaṅ tinreń hudisokʼkan tahẽkana unre ackage pạchim secʼ khon mitʼṭen merom do ot begor jakʼte onḍeye dạṛ ạgukeda; uniyakʼ banar mẽtʼ talare mitʼṭecʼ huḍiń dereń tahẽkana. 
Daniel8:6 Ar barea dereńan okoeṭakʼ bheḍa gaḍa aṛere teṅgo akaniń ńellede uni secʼ merom do botorokʼ salakʼe dạṛ idikeda. 
Daniel8:7 Ińiń ńelkeda merom do uni bheḍaye tińkedea ar uniyakʼ banar dereńe rạputʼketʼtaea. Uni samaṅre bheḍa do baṅgeye teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeada; merom do uniye tiń bhinḍạṛkede khan jaṅgate lebedeye ehopʼena. Unre uni khon jãhãe bheḍaye bańcaoe nonkan celege bako tahẽkana. 
Daniel8:8 Merom do ạḍiye daṛe idiyena, menkhan uni do tinre acʼakʼ mucạtʼ daṛereye hoyena unre uniyakʼ lạṭu dereń do rạputʼentaea ar ona jaega beṛhaete ponea ńel ńamokʼ leka dereń rakapʼena." 
Daniel8:9 Ar onako dereń reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ khon ar mitʼṭecʼ dereń janamena; ona do pạhilre huḍińge tahẽkana menkhan tayomte do dạkhin, purub ar ṭhonok disạm secʼ hara idiyena." 
Daniel8:10 Ona do hara harate sermaren ipilko hạbicʼ seṭerena ar adom ipil do otreye ńurhạketʼkoa ar jaṅgateye lebetʼ gańjaoketʼkoa. 
Daniel8:11 Ar acʼtetʼ do onko ipilren mạlik soman kanae menteye udukʼena. Uni ńutumte din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob uni doe bondkeda ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ hõe besonotkeda. 
Daniel8:12 Uniyakʼ kại iạte onko ipilko ar din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob do uniyakʼ tire calaoena. Ar sạri dhorom do otreye giḍikada ar okaṭakʼe cekaketʼ onaregeye jo bahayena. 
Daniel8:13 Ona tayom mitʼṭen serma goḍet do katha roroṛkaniń ańjomkedea ar armitʼṭen sonot serma goḍet do uniye kulikedea, “Niạ dorsonre oka udukʼen ona do ar tinạkʼ din hạbicʼ calakʼa? Ar tin hạbicʼ din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob bodolte ujạṛakʼ kại reakʼ jinis do tahena? Ar tinạkʼ din koejoṅ oṛakʼ ar ipilko do jaṅgateko lebetʼ gańjao ocokʼa?”" 
Daniel8:14 Uniye menkeda, “Bar hajar pe sae ńindạ ar setakʼ hạbicʼ noa do calakʼa. Ona tayom koejoṅ oṛakʼ do arhõ sapha ocokʼa.”" 
Daniel8:15 Ar iń Daniel do tinre dorson reakʼ bujhạu lạgitʼ iń kurumuṭuyetʼ tahẽkana unre manwa leka ńelokʼ mitʼ hoṛ do iń samaṅre hecʼkateye teṅgoyena. 
Daniel8:16 Iń do mitʼṭen manwawakʼ aṛaṅiń ańjomkeda; ona aṛaṅ do Ulại gaḍa khon hohoateye menkeda, “Gabriel, noa dorson reakʼ mane do nui hoṛ bujhạuaeme.”" 
Daniel8:17 Iń okareń teṅgo akan tahẽkan ona ṭhạ̃ireye hecʼen khan iń do botorte otreń bhindạṛena. Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E manwa hopon, noa dorson je ses dinko babot reakʼkan ona baṛe bujhạume.”" 
Daniel8:18 Uni do tinre iń sãote kathae roroṛkan tahẽkana unre iń do acetiń taber akan tahẽkana. Uni do ińe sapʼ rakapʼ kedeńteye teṅgokedińa. 
Daniel8:19 Uni doe menkeda, “Edre okte reakʼ mucạtʼ dinkore oka hoyokʼ ona do amiń lạiyam kana, ente dorson do hoyokʼkana mucạtʼ dinko reakʼ niṭ akatʼ okte reaṅ." 
Daniel8:20 Barea dereńan okoeṭakʼ bheḍam ńellede onakin do hoyokʼkana Madae ar Parasren rajkin. 
Daniel8:21 Uni upʼan merom doe hoyokʼkana Junạn reakʼ rajosṭi ar uniyakʼ banar mẽtʼkin tala reakʼ maraṅakʼ dereń do hoyokʼ kana ona rajosṭiren pạhilicʼ raj. 
Daniel8:22 Rạputʼ akan dereń reakʼ jaegare ona ponea dereń do hoyokʼ kana ponea rajosṭi one onko do jạtrenko tala khonko oḍok hijukʼa menkhan ona rajosṭikoren rapajko do pạhil rapaj leka ektiạri do baṅ tahentakoa. 
Daniel8:23 “Onkoakʼ rajokʼ sesa sesi dinkore ghạghạṭkoakʼ kạmi coṛaṅlentakore mitʼṭen kurmutạha ar phorphundiyicʼ raje teṅgokʼa. 
Daniel8:24 Uni do ạḍi daṛeanicʼe hoyokʼa, menkhan apnarakʼ daṛete do baṅ. Uni doe marao utạra ar jãhãnakʼgeye cekae onaregeye jo bahakʼa. Uni do daṛean hoṛko ar Isorren hoṛkoe maraokoa." 
Daniel8:25 Uniyakʼ phorphundi iạte uni do eṛekateye jo bahakʼa ar jotoko khon maraṅe hudisokʼa. Ar hoṛko do tinre nirdạndiko hudisokʼa unre uni do ḍher hoṛe maraokoa ar disạm cakʼlaokoren mukhiyạko upạrteye teṅgona. Ar mucạtʼre uni doe marao ocokʼa, menkhan manwawakʼ daṛete do baṅa." 
Daniel8:26 “Am do ńindạ ar setakʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼ reaṅ okaṭakʼ dorsonem ńel ocoyen ona do sạrikana, menkhan noa dorson do chapkate dohokakʼme, ente ona do tayom daram dinre hoyokʼa.”" 
Daniel8:27 Iń Daniel doń laṅgayena ariń ruạyente thoṛa din giticʼ iń tahẽyena. Ona tayomiń beretʼena ar rajakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ iń senena. Iń do ona dorson ńelkate ạḍiń cintạyena, ente ona dorson reakʼ mane do bạń bujhạuleda." 
Daniel9:1 sw Madae bõsren Ahasberosren hopon Darjawes do Babel rajosṭiren raje hoylena. Uniyakʼ rajokʼ reakʼ pạhil bochorre iń Daniel do Jirimiạ nạbiye emocolen Probhu Isorakʼ katha lekate sostor khoniń bujhạu daṛeada je, Jerusalem do eaegel bochor hạbicʼ dhaṅdhaser akan tahena." 
Daniel9:2  
Daniel9:3 Ona iạte iń do upạskate, gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate ar torocʼ ojokʼkate nehõr salakʼ Probhu Isor ṭheniń koejoṅana." 
Daniel9:4 Ińren Isor Probhu ṭheniń koejoṅana ar kại aṅgockateń menkeda, “E Probhu, am do maraṅ ar botoricʼ Isor kanam. Am do bondobos ar daya onko tulucʼem dohoyeda okoe do amko dulạṛetʼme ar amakʼ hukumko dohoyetʼtam." 
Daniel9:5 Ale dole kại akada, arle behok akada. Ale do bạṛicʼakʼle kạmi akada arle hul akada. Ale do amakʼ hukum ar ạn-ạriko reakʼ hor khonle ocokʼ akana." 
Daniel9:6 Aleren rajko, mukhiyạko, hapṛamko ar disạmren sanam hoṛko ṭhen amren guti nạbiko do am emakʼ oka kathako menakatʼ ona do ale bale ańjomleda." 
Daniel9:7 “E Probhu, am dom hokren Isor kana, menkhan teheń hạbicʼ ale do aleakʼ lajaole asen baṛayeda. Jihudạrenko, Jerusalemrenko ar Israelren sanamko do amre bepạtiạr iạte jạt jạtrenkoakʼ disạmrem chirchạturletʼko onko sanamkoge lajaoko asen baṛayeda." 
Daniel9:8 E Probhu Isor, aleren rajko, mukhiyạko, hapṛamko ar ale sanamkoge lajaole asen baṛayeda, ente ale do am upạrtele kại akada." 
Daniel9:9 Aleren Probhu Isor do dayakʼicʼ ar ikʼkạyicʼ Isor kanae, enhõ ale do am upạrtele hul akada." 
Daniel9:10 Ale do aleren Probhu Isorakʼ katha bale bataoletʼa; amren guti nạbiko hotete am emakʼ hukumko hõ bale manao akada. 
Daniel9:11 Israelko jotoge amakʼ hukumko bebatao akada ar amakʼ hor khonko ghańgeṛ akana; onko do amakʼ katha bako ańjomleda. Ona iạte amren guti Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrikore olakʼ okaṭakʼ sarap reakʼ katha kiriạkatem roṛletʼ ona do ale cetanrege upʼ akana, ente ale do am upạrtele kại akada." 
Daniel9:12 Ale ar aleren disạm cakʼlaoko upạrte okaṭakʼ katham roṛakatʼ ona purạu lạgitʼ am do ale cetanre maraṅ muskilem ạguakada. Jerusalem cetanre oka hoyakan onka do dhạrti reakʼ ar okare hõ baṅ hoyakana. 
Daniel9:13 Moseyakʼ ạn-ạrire cetʼleka olakan onkage niạko muhin do ale cetanre hecʼ paṛao akana, enhõ ale do aleakʼ kại khon ruạṛkate aleren Probhu Isorakʼ daya ńam lạgitʼ bale kurumuṭu akada; amakʼ sạriyakʼre hõ bale moneyakʼkan tahẽkana." 
Daniel9:14 Onatege E Probhu Isor, am do muhinem ṭhik dohoakada jemon ale cetanre ńitem kol daṛeakʼ, ente aleren Probhu do sanamakʼ kạmirege hokakʼren Isor kanae; enhõ ale do amakʼ katha bale ańjomleda." 
Daniel9:15 “E aleren Probhu Isor, amakʼ daṛeanakʼ tite amren hoṛko Misor disom khonem oḍok ạguletʼkoa ar amakʼ ńutum do maraṅlentama, ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ ona menakʼa. Ale dole kại akada ar bạṛicʼakʼle kạmi akada." 
Daniel9:16 E Probhu Isor, amakʼ dhorom lekate amakʼ nagraha, metakʼme amakʼ sonot buru Jerusalem khon amakʼ edre ar khĩs baṛe sạṅgiń giḍikakʼme. Ente aleakʼ kại ar aleren hapṛamkoakʼ ghạṭ gunạkʼte Jerusalem ar ale amren hoṛko do ale beṛhaete menakʼko sanamko ṭhen henostagele hoyakana." 
Daniel9:17 “Ńitokʼ, E ińren Isor, amren gutiyakʼ koejoṅ ar nehõr ańjomme. E Probhu, amakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ ujạṛokʼkan amakʼ oṛakʼ secʼ amakʼ daya reakʼ mẽtãhã baṛe samaṅme." 
Daniel9:18 E ińren Isor, luturakʼme baṛe; ar ańjomme; amakʼ mẽtʼ jhijme ar okaṭakʼ nagraha do amakʼ ńutumte bikạuakan ona reakʼ ujạṛakʼ mitʼ dhao beṅgetʼakʼme. Aleakʼ gunte do baṅ bickom amakʼ maraṅ dayate am ṭhenle nehõrokʼ kana." 
Daniel9:19 E Probhu, ańjomme. E Isor, ikạkaleme. E Probhu moneyakʼtaleme, ar jãhãnakʼ baṛe cekaeme. E ińren Isor, amakʼ ńutum rukhiyạitam lạgitʼ ar alom biloma, ente amakʼ nagraha ar amren hoṛko do amakʼ ńutumtegeko bikạu akana.”" 
Daniel9:20 Nonkage iń doń koejoṅkan tahẽkana, iń ar iń jạtren Israelkoakʼ kại iń aṅgockeda ar ińren Probhu Isor ṭhen acʼakʼ sonot buru lạgitʼ iń nehõrena." 
Daniel9:21 Iń do unreń koejoṅkan tahẽkana ar unre lahateakʼ dorsonre okoeyiń ńellede uni Gabriel goḍet do ạyupʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼ jokhecʼ iń ṭhen usạrateye uḍạu hecʼena. 
Daniel9:22 Uni do ińe bujhạuạdińa, “E Daniel, ńitokʼ do am bujhạuam reakʼ daṛe ar bud emokʼ iń hecʼakana." 
Daniel9:23 Am do koejoṅem ehopʼletʼrege Isor doe roṛ ruạṛe em akatʼmea, ar ona baḍae ocome lạgitʼgeń hecʼakana, ente uni do ạḍiye dulạṛetʼmea. Ona iạte ona katha moneyakʼme ar dorson baṛe bujhạu joṅme." 
Daniel9:24 “Amren hoṛko ar amakʼ sonot nagraha lạgitʼ eaegel hapta ṭhik dohoakana. Ar onako oktere bạṛicʼakʼko do cabakʼa, bedhorom hõ baṅ tahena, kại do puruchunokʼa, ar jaejug dhoromge bikạukʼa, dorson ar nạbi katha purạukʼa ar sonot utạrakʼ ṭhạ̃i do ojokʼ bahal ocokʼa." 
Daniel9:25 “Onate baḍaeme ar bujhạume, Jerusalem do arhõ benao ruạṛ ar jut aroe reakʼ hukum oḍokokʼ khon mitʼṭen ojokʼicʼ, metakʼme, cakʼlaoicʼe hijukʼ hạbicʼ do eae haptage hoyokʼa. Khan turuigel bar hapta do benao aroakan tahena dobạṭiạ ar pogar gaḍawante, menkhan muskil oktekorege." 
Daniel9:26 Ar ona turuigel bar hapta tayom uni ojokʼicʼ doe gocʼ ocokʼa ar uniyakʼ do cetʼge baṅ tahentaea. khan hijukʼkanicʼ cakʼlaoicʼren hoṛko do nagraha ar koejoṅ oṛakʼko maraoa. Ar ona reakʼ mucạtʼ do banbạsite hoyokʼa, ar mucạtʼ hạbicʼ lạṛhại do calao idikʼa; ar ona reakʼ jarkharokʼ do niṭakana." 
Daniel9:27 Ar uni disạm cakʼlaoicʼ do mitʼ hapta lạgitʼ ḍher hoṛko sãote keṭecʼ mitʼṭecʼ bondobose bandhaoa, ar tala hapta hạbicʼ uni do teṅgenokʼakʼ ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼe caba ocoya; ar jarkharicʼ do hirkhạwakʼko reakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼteye hijukʼa niṭakatʼ sumạrokʼ jarkharicʼre ạuri dul bubhạukʼ hạbicʼ.”" 
Daniel10:1 Parasren raj Koresakʼ rajokʼ tesarakʼ bochorre okoe do Beltesasare ńutum ocolen uni Daniel ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ katha sodorena. Katha do sạrikana ar ona do mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ kosṭo reaṅge. Mitʼṭecʼ dorson hotete uni doe bujhạu ocoyena. 
Daniel10:2 Ona jokhecʼ iń Daniel do pe hapta hạbicʼiń homor halaṅkeda. 
Daniel10:3 Ona pe hapta ạuri mucạdokʼ hạbicʼ jãhãn bhage jomakʼ do bạń jomleda, jel se darkha rasa hõ bạń cakha ạikạuleda ar sunum hõ bạń ojokʼana." 
Daniel10:4 Pạhil cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre iń do maraṅ gaḍa Hidekel aṛereń teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Daniel10:5 Un jokhecʼ iń doń beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ ar ḍanḍare khạṭi sona reakʼ totolakʼteye tol akan mitʼṭen hoṛiń ńelkeda. 
Daniel10:6 Uniyakʼ hoṛmo do Boidorjomuni leka, mẽtʼãhã do bijli leka, mẽtʼãhã do jolokʼkan mosal leka, ti-jaṅga do pạlis akatʼ tamba leka ar uniyakʼ aṛaṅ do ḍher hoṛkoakʼ sabad leka." 
Daniel10:7 Iń Daniel do eskarge ona dorsoniń ńelkeda; iń sãoten hoṛ do ona bako ńel ńamleda, menkhan onko do nunạkʼko botorena je, onko doko ńir okoyena." 
Daniel10:8 Onate iń eskarge ona dorson do ńeńeliń ehopʼena. Ińre jãhãn daṛege baṅ tahẽlena, ińakʼ mẽtʼãhã do keklesetʼentińạ ar iń doń laṅga idiyena." 
Daniel10:9 Ona tayom do uni hoṛakʼ kathań ańjom ńamkeda ar uniyakʼ katha ańjomtorage iń do otre acetge ombakʼ akaniń tahẽyena. 
Daniel10:10 Unre mitʼṭecʼ ti do ińe joṭetʼkedeń khan banar ti ar gunṭhite thar tharaoakʼ tulucʼe kaḍa ocokedińa. 
Daniel10:11 Uniye metadińạ, “E Isorren dulạṛiạ Daniel, iń okaṭakʼ katha lạiyam lạgitʼ ona do mońjte moneyakʼme. Ma beretʼme, ente iń do am ṭheniń kol ocoakana.” Uni noa kathae metadiń khan iń do thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ iń teṅgoyena." 
Daniel10:12 Uni do roroṛe ehopʼena, “E Daniel, alom botorokʼa, ente buj ńam lạgitʼ ar amren Isor samaṅre nindhạnokʼ lạgitʼ amakʼ monem lagaoketʼ pạhil hilokʼ khonge amakʼ kathako do ańjom akantama; ar iń do amakʼ kathako iạtegeń hecʼakana." 
Daniel10:13 Menkhan Paras rajosṭiren mukhiyạ do bargel pạhil din hạbicʼe tạkicʼ daramledińa. Unre Mikayel ńutuman mukhiyạ serma goḍetkoren mitʼṭen do iń goṛowạń lạgitʼe hecʼena, ente iń do Paras rajko talare iń eskargeń tahẽkana." 
Daniel10:14 Ar ńitokʼ doń hecʼakana bujhạu ocome lạgitʼ darakan dinkore amren hoṛkore cetʼ hoyokʼa mente. Ente dorson do darakan dinko reakʼkangea.” 
Daniel10:15 Uni do tinre niạ kathae metadińạ unre iń doń tumbutʼ akan tahẽkana, ar ińakʼ mocare cetʼ kathage baṅ tahẽkana." 
Daniel10:16 Unre manwa leka ńelokʼicʼ uni serma goḍet, okoe do iń samaṅreye teṅgo akan tahẽkan, uni do ińakʼ luṭikine joṭetʼketʼtińạ, ar moca jhicʼentińte uniń metadea, “E ińren kĩsạ̃ṛ noa dorson iạte monre ạḍi dukiń ńameda ariń nijor idikʼkana." 
Daniel10:17 E ińren kĩsạ̃ṛ, iń doń amren gutikana, iń do cekate am sãote kathań roṛa? Ińakʼ daṛe do bạnukʼtińạ ar ińre sahẽtʼhõ bạnukʼa.”" 
Daniel10:18 Unre manwa leka ńelokʼicʼ uni serma goḍet do arhõ ińe joṭetʼkedińa ar daṛeye emadińa. 
Daniel10:19 Uni do ińe metadińạ, “E Isorren dulạṛiạ, alom botorokʼa. Amakʼ suluk baṛe hoyokʼma. Diljoṅme ar daṛean hoyokʼme.” Uni do iń sãote kathae roṛketʼ sãote iń do daṛe ńamketʼteń menkeda, “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ, ma roṛme, ente am do daṛem emadińạ.”" 
Daniel10:20 Unre uni do ińe metadińa, “Amem baḍaea cetʼ lạgitʼ am ṭheniń hecʼakana? Sạriyakʼ puthire oka olakan ona baḍae ocome lạgitʼgeń hecʼakana. Parasren mukhiyạ upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ iń do usạrateń ruạṛ calakʼa ar ińiń calaolen tayom Junạnren mukhiyạ hõ lạṛhại lạgitʼe oḍok hijukʼa. Amren hoṛkoren mukhiyạ uni Mikayel chaḍa ar okoehõ uni upạrte teṅgo goṛowạńko do bạnukʼkoa." 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 Iń apnar hõ Madae Darjawesakʼ rajokʼ pạhil bochorre Mikayel goṛowae lạgitʼ iń senlena ariń daṛe ocokedea. 
Daniel11:2 “Ńitokʼ iń okań metam ona do sạrige hoyokʼa. Parasre arhõ pea rapajko rajokʼa. Onko tayom ar mitʼṭen raj do eṭakʼkin khon ḍher kisạ̃ṛe hoyokʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ dhon duribko iạteye daṛe idikʼte Junạn rajosṭi upạrte sanamkoe udgạukoa. 
Daniel11:3 Unre mitʼṭen daṛean raje upelokʼa ar maraṅ daṛeteye rajokʼa; uni do acʼakʼ kusi lekae kạmiya. 
Daniel11:4 Ar uniye upelokʼ tayom uniyakʼ rajosṭi do rạpudokʼte pon hạṭińokʼtaea. Uniyakʼ rajosṭi do acʼren bõsrenkoakʼ tire do baṅ calakʼa; ar ona rajosṭiko okoeyakʼ tire calakʼa onko do lahaten raj leka daṛe do bako hoyokʼa, ente onkoakʼ rajosṭi do jarkharokʼte eṭakʼkoakʼ tire calakʼa." 
Daniel11:5 “Dạkhin secʼren raj do daṛeanicʼe hoyokʼa, menkhan uniren mitʼṭen subedar do uni khon hõ bạ̃ṛti daṛeye hoyokʼa ar mạlikiye calaoa. Uniyakʼ mạliki do maraṅ okocʼ mạlikige hoyokʼtaea." 
Daniel11:6 Ado thoṛa bochor tayom uni do utạr secʼren raj sãoteye gatekʼa. Ar dạkhin rajren hoponera do utạrren raj tulucʼ midokʼ lạgitʼe hijukʼa, menkhan uni hoponerawakʼ sopo reakʼ daṛe do baṅ tahẽ idikʼa, uni utạrren raj ar uniren hoponko hõ bako tahẽ idikʼa; menkhan uni raj hoponera ar uni soṅgeteko senen, uniren hopon ar uniye sãohaledeyicʼ, onko doko soprot ocokʼa." 
Daniel11:7 “Ar onako din tayom khange uni raj hoponera reakʼ rehetʼ reakʼ kahleko mod khon mitʼṭecʼ kahle do uni rajakʼ jaegare omon rakapʼa, uni do lạṛhại phạdko upạrteye hijukʼa, ar utạrren rajakʼ gaṛteye bolokʼa; ar onko upạrte lạṛhạikateye jitạukʼa." 
Daniel11:8 Uni do onkoren debotako, dul muṭhạn sanam boṅgako, rupạ ar sonako reakʼ damanakʼ jiniskoe luṭjoṅa ar Misorteye idiya. Ar thoṛa bochor lạgitʼ uni do utạrren raj upạrte jhãp emokʼe ikạ hataṛkakʼa." 
Daniel11:9 Ona tayom utạrren raj do dạkhin rajakʼ rajosṭiteye bolokʼa, menkhan uni do acʼakʼ disạmte ruạṛ calakʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Daniel11:10 Uniren hoponko do lạṛhạiko ehoba, ar aema gadel lạṛhại phạdko jarwakoa, onko do banbạsi leka lạṛhại lạṛhạite dạkhin rajakʼ gaṛ hạbicʼko calakʼa." 
Daniel11:11 “Unre dạkhinren raj do edreteye oḍok hijukʼa ar utạrren raj upạrteye lạṛhạiya. Utạrren raj do maraṅ lạṛhại phạdkoe teṅgolekore hõ enhõ onko doko bhagao ocokʼa. 
Daniel11:12 Ar dạkhinren raj do lạṛhại phạdko bondikateye idiko tayom bạḍạiteye perejokʼa ar hajar hajar hoṛkoe gocʼkoa, enhõ uni do mucạtʼ hạbicʼ do bae ṭikạu tahena." 
Daniel11:13 Utạrren raj do pạhil lạṛhại phạdko khon arhõ maraṅ lạṛhại phạdkoe jarwakoa; ar thoṛa bochor tayom uni do maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko ar ḍher mal jalkoanteye laha idikʼa. 
Daniel11:14 “Ona jokhecʼ ḍher hoṛko do dạkhinren raj upạrteko teṅgona, ar amren hoṛko modren jor bokʼjor hoṛ doko teṅgona dorson reakʼ katha purạukʼ lạgitʼ; menkhan onko doko gurokʼa." 
Daniel11:15 Ona tayom utạrren raj do hecʼkate mitʼṭecʼ pạcrite esetʼ nagrahae gherao eseda ar onae ạidạrijoṅa. Ar dạkhinren lạṛhại phạdko do teṅgo daram reakʼ daṛege baṅ tahentakoa; onkoren bhage lạṛhại phạdko hõ onko upạrte bako teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa. 
Daniel11:16 Unre jhãp emokʼko do akoakʼ kusi lekako kạmiya; onko upạrte celege bako teṅgo daṛeakʼa. Uni do ṭhonok disạm upạrteye teṅgona ar ona do ekalte uni gobolokʼa. 
Daniel11:17 Uni do acʼakʼ goṭa rajosṭi reakʼ daṛe salakʼ onḍe hijukʼ lạgitʼe goṭaea ar dạkhinren raj sãoteye gatekʼa. Ar ona rajosṭi marao lạgitʼ uni do acʼren hoponera dạkhinren raj sãoteye baplayea, menkhan uniyakʼ goṭawakʼ do baṅ jo bahakʼtaea se jãhãn bhạlạige baṅ hoyokʼtaea." 
Daniel11:18 Ona tayom utạrren raj do sạṅgiń disạmko secʼe moneyakʼa ar aema disạmkoe dokhola, menkhan mitʼṭen subedar do uniyakʼ ona jitạukʼ reakʼ bạḍạitetʼe caba utạrtaea ar uniyakʼ hekʼnostage ạcur ruạṛaea." 
Daniel11:19 Inạ tayom uni do acʼakʼ disạm reakʼ gaṛteye ruạṛ hijukʼa, menkhan uni doe ńurokʼa; ar ńamge bae ńamokʼa." 
Daniel11:20 “Ar uniyakʼ jaegare okoe raje hoyokʼ uni do rajosṭi reakʼ ṭhonoktetʼ ruạṛ ạguiy lạgitʼ khajna ukʼṭhạukoe kolkoa. Menkhan thoṛa bochor bhitrirege uni doe marao utạrokʼa; noa maraokʼ do jãhãn edre se lạṛhại talate do baṅ hijukʼa. 
Daniel11:21 “Okoe do raj hoyokʼ reakʼ ạidạri bae em ocoakan nonkan mitʼṭen nihạ̃ticʼge uniyakʼ jaegare raje hoyokʼa. Ar hoṛko do khạtirjoma tinreko tahena unrege uni do soṛojontro talate rajosṭiye dokhol joṅa. 
Daniel11:22 Ar uni samaṅ khon lạṛhại phạdko doko laga ńir ocokʼa arko rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa ar bondobosren mạlik hõe rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa. 
Daniel11:23 Bondobos tayom uni raj doe bukʼlạua ar thoṛa hoṛkoakʼ goṛote ektiạriye hameṭ joṅa. 
Daniel11:24 Kisạ̃ṛ disạmrenko tinre khạtirjoma menteko hudisokʼa unrege uni do onko cetanre jhãpe ema ar uniren hapṛamko ar onko hapṛamkoren hapṛamko oka bako ceka daṛeakatʼ uni do onae kạmiya. Ar recʼ ạguwakʼ ar luṭakʼ jinisko ar dhon duribko uni do acʼren hoṛko talareye em hạṭińakoa. Uni do gaṛko dhaṅdhaser lạgitʼe soṛojontroya, menkhan ona do thoṛa din lạgitʼ hoyokʼa." 
Daniel11:25 “Uni do maraṅ lạṛhại phạdante dạkhinren raj upạrte acʼakʼ daṛe ar dile uskurtaea. Dạkhinren raj do maraṅ daṛean lạṛhại phạdkoanteye lạṛhạiya, menkhan uni upạrte oka soṛojontro hoyokʼ ona iạte bae teṅgo daram daṛeakʼa." 
Daniel11:26 Okoe do rajakʼ jomakʼ reakʼ hĩsko ńam onkoge uniko maraoea. Uniren maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko tahẽlenre hõ onko do ḍhergeko gocʼ ocokʼa. 
Daniel11:27 Ar nukin banar rajge bạṛicʼakʼ secʼkin mohnḍakʼa ar ṭebilre duṛupʼkate apan ạpin talare eṛe kathakin roṛa, menkhan onate bạkin jo bahakʼa, ente unkinakʼ jotowakʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ do niṭ akatʼ okterege hijukʼa." 
Daniel11:28 Utạrren raj do ḍher dhon-duribante acʼakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calakʼa, menkhan uniyakʼ ontor do sonot bondobos birudre tahena. Uni do acʼakʼ kusilekae kạmiya ar ona tayom do apnarakʼ disạmteye ruạṛ calakʼa." 
Daniel11:29 “Niṭ akatʼ oktere uni do arhõ dạkhin disạm cetanre jhãpe ema, menkhan pạhil dom leka niạ dom do baṅ hoyokʼa." 
Daniel11:30 Ente Kitim reakʼ jahajko do uni upạrte hijukʼa ar uni doe as chuṭạukʼa. Unre uni do ruạṛkate sonot bondobos birudte acʼakʼ kusilekae kạmiya. Uni do ruạṛ hecʼkate okoe sonot bondobosko bạgi akatʼ onkoe moneyakoa. 
Daniel11:31 Uni ṭhen khon kol ocoakan lạṛhại phạdko doko hijukʼa ar sonot ṭhạ̃i, ar aotan gaṛko bhonḍa ar din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼko caba ocoya. Ona tayom onko do jarkharakʼ ujạṛakʼgeko bạisại oṭokakʼa." 
Daniel11:32 Ar bondobosko rạputʼetʼkan hoṛko do cĩkạ̃ṛ cĩkạ̃ṛ kathateye ạnḍicʼkoa; menkhan akoren Isorko baḍayedekan hoṛko do teṅgo kajak akanko tahena ar onako teṅgo darama. 
Daniel11:33 “Onko hoṛko modre okoekoakʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛe menakʼtako onko do ḍher hoṛko cetʼakoa, enhõ thoṛa okte hạbicʼ onko talare ḍherkoge tarwaṛe ar seṅgel lepʼ, kạidạu ocokʼ ar luṭ ocokʼteko gurokʼa." 
Daniel11:34 Ar unre gurokʼko do thoṛa goṛoko ńamgea ar aema hoṛ do cĩkạ̃ṛ cĩkạ̃ṛ kathakoteko onko tulujokʼa. 
Daniel11:35 Ar ạkilanko modre adom adomko doko gurokʼa jemonko niphuṭ ocokʼa, arko pạṛchạ ocokʼ arko sapha ocokʼ mucạtʼ okte hạbicʼ, ente unhõ mucạtʼtetʼ do niṭ akatʼ okterege hoyokʼa." 
Daniel11:36 “Utạrren raj do acʼakʼ kusi lekae kạmiya. Uni do bạḍạiteye perejokʼa ar sanam debotako khone maraṅokʼa udugokʼa ar debotaren Isor upạrte hõ maraṅ maraṅ kathae roṛa; ar raṅgao ạuri cabakʼ hạbicʼ uni doe jo bahakʼa, ente okaṭakʼ ṭhik dohoakan ona do hoyokʼgea." 
Daniel11:37 Uni do acʼren hapṛamkoren debotako hõ bae hetaoakoa ar maejiukoren hạ̃sasicʼ debota hõ baṅ, uni do cele debotage bae hetaoakoa, ente sanamko cetanre acʼ do sorosicʼe udugokʼa." 
Daniel11:38 Onko bodolte uni do aotan gaṛkoren debotakogeye manotkoa; ar okoe debotako do akoren hapṛamko bako oromakatʼko onkoge uni do sona, rupạ, damanakʼ mạnik dhiriko ar sandeskoteye manotkoa." 
Daniel11:39 Uni do bidesren debotakoakʼ goṛote kajak kajak gaṛko acʼakʼ kusi lekae laṛcaṛa, ar jãhãege uniko aṅgoce onko doe manotkoa are maraṅkoa; ar onko do aema hoṛko cetanre mạliki cakʼlaokoe benaokoa, ar jumi jaega do damteye hạṭińakoa." 
Daniel11:40 “Mucạtʼ oktere dạkhinren raj do uni tulucʼe ropokʼa; ar utạrren raj do rãt gạḍiko, aswariko ar ḍher jahajante uni upạrte hoe bharḍo lekae hijukʼa. Uni do aema disạmko cetanre jhãpe ema ar banbạsi lekae ạtu saphakoa." 
Daniel11:41 Uni do ṭhonok disạmte hõe bolokʼa. Ar ḍher disạmko do ńurokʼa, menkhan goṭa Edom, Moab ar Amonren joto khon bhage hoṛko do uniyakʼ ti khon bańcaoko ńama." 
Daniel11:42 Ḍher disạm cetanre uni do acʼakʼ ektiạriye ḍher ocoytaea; ar Misor hõ uniyakʼ gobolre hijukʼa. 
Daniel11:43 Misor reakʼ sanam sona rupạ ar dhonko do uniyakʼ ạidạrire hijukʼa ar Libiạ ar Kusrenko do uni gobolreko hijukʼa. 
Daniel11:44 Menkhan purub ar utạr reakʼ khobor ńamkate uni doe torasokʼa ar edre iạte ḍher hoṛ gocʼko lạgitʼe oḍokʼ hijukʼa. 
Daniel11:45 Doreão ar mońj sonot buruko talare uni do acʼakʼ raj tạmbui bereda. Menkhan uni do acʼakʼ mucạtʼ secʼgeye mohnḍakʼa ar celege uni do bako goṛowaea. 
Daniel12:1 “Ona jokhecʼ amren hoṛkoren rurukhiyạyicʼ maraṅ serma goḍet Mikayel doe ape sejokʼa. Ar nonkan mitʼṭecʼ kosṭo okte seṭerokʼa one ona do am jạtrenko khon ehopʼkate ona okte hạbicʼ tishõ baṅ hoyakan. Menkhan ona okte do amren hoṛko modren okoekoakʼ ńutum do puthire ol tahen onko do bańcaoko ńama. 
Daniel12:2 Ar unre dhạrti reakʼ otreko jạpitʼ akatʼ alekha hoṛ doko ebhenokʼa; ar adomko do jaejug jiwetʼ tahen lạgitʼko beretʼa, arhõ adomko doko beretʼa lajao ar jaejug hirkhạwanko hoyokʼ lạgitʼ." 
Daniel12:3 Okoeyakʼ bujhạu reakʼ daṛe menakʼtako, metakʼme okoe do ḍher hoṛko dhorom reakʼ horteko ạguakatʼko onko do sermaren marsal ar jolokʼkan ipil leka jaejug jol akanko tahena." 
Daniel12:4 Menkhan am, Daniel do, mucạtʼ okte ạuri hijukʼ hạbicʼ noa nạbi katha reakʼ puthi bondkate ona reakʼ kathako chapkate dohokakʼme. Onako dinre ḍherkoge hanḍe nanḍeko calakʼa ar ạkil do baṛhaokʼtakoa." 
Daniel12:5 Unre iń Daniel doń beṅgetʼketʼ khan eṭakʼ bar hoṛ iń samaṅre teṅgo akaniń ńelketʼkinạ. Unkin modren mitʼ hoṛ do gaḍa niạsare ar eṭakʼ armitʼ hoṛ do gaḍa hanasareye tahẽkana. 
Daniel12:6 Ar mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ okoe do gaḍa dakʼ cetanreye tahẽkan uni do unkin bar hoṛ modren mitʼhoṛe metadea, “Noako hahaṛawakʼ mucạdokʼ do ar tinạkʼ din lagaokʼa?”" 
Daniel12:7 Unre iń doń ańjomkeda, gaḍa dakʼ cetanreye tahẽkan mĩhĩ musnạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ uni hoṛ do acʼakʼ banar ti serma secʼ rakapʼkate okoe do jaejug jiwetʼ menae uni ńutumte kiriạkateye menkeda, “Pe bochor tala okte do lagaokʼa. Ar mucạtʼre Isorren hoṛkoakʼ daṛe do tinre rạputʼ utạrokʼa unre noako katha do purạukʼa.”" 
Daniel12:8 Iń doń ańjomketʼgea menkhan cetʼge bạń bujhạu daṛeada. Ona iạte iń doń kuliyana, “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ, noako reakʼ mucạtʼ jo do cetʼ hoyokʼa? ”" 
Daniel12:9 Uniye menkeda, “E Daniel, noako reaṅ do alom cintạkʼa, ente mucạtʼ okte ạuri hijukʼ hạbicʼ noako katha do bondkate chap dohoakana." 
Daniel12:10 Ḍherkoge, sapha, niphuṭ arko khạṭi ocokʼa, menkhan dusṭạmi hoṛ do bedhorom iditegeko tahena. Dusṭạmiko do celege bako bujhạu daṛeakoa, menkhan ạkilanko doko bujhạu daṛeakogea." 
Daniel12:11 Ar din hilokʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do enhilokʼ khon bond ocokʼa ar ujạṛ utạrakʼ jinisko bạisạu dohokʼa ar enhilokʼ khon mitʼ hajar barsae aregel din do purạukʼa. 
Daniel12:12 Uni hoṛ doe bhạgangea okoe doe ńel hohorkan ar mitʼ hajar pe sae turuigel mõṛẽ din reakʼ mucạtʼ hạbicʼ ṭikạu akane tahenkan. 
Daniel12:13 “Menkhan am nonḍe cetʼleka gujukʼ hạbicʼ menam onkage tahenme. Ona tayom am do jirạuem ńama ar mucạtʼ dinre kuṛại ńam lạgitʼem jiwetʼ ruạṛokʼa. ” 
Hosea1:1 Jihudạren raj Usiạ, Jotham, Ahas ar Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere ar Israel raj Joasren hopon Jerobiamakʼ oktere Beriren hopon Hosea ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorena." 
Hosea1:2 Hosea hotete pạhil dhao katha roṛ jokhecʼ Probhu Isor do uniye metadea, “Am do senkate mitʼṭen kusumbi ayo baplayem. Ar laṭghaṭren hoponko omonjoṅme, ente disạmren hoṛko do ạḍitetʼko laṭghaṭeda Probhu Isorko bạgi akadete.”" 
Hosea1:3 Onate Hosea do Diblayimren hoponera Gomere baplakedea ar Gomer doe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar Hosea lạgitʼ mitʼṭen hopone janamkedea. 
Hosea1:4 Unre Probhu Isor do Hoseae metadea, “Am do uniyakʼ ńutum Jisreyelem dohoytaea, ente Jisreyel nagrahare Jehu do ḍher hoṛe gocʼletʼkote iń do uniyakʼ bõsrenko cetanre usạrage sạjạiyiń ạguiya ar Israelakʼ rajosṭiń caba utạra." 
Hosea1:5 Enhilokʼ iń do Jisreyelakʼ buru nalare Israelakʼ akʼ-sariń rạputʼ giḍikatakoa.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomer do arhõe bhạrti hoṛmoyena ar uniren do armitʼṭen kuṛi hopone janamena. Unre Probhu Isor do Hoseae metadea, “Kuṛi hoponakʼ ńutum do Lo ruhamah. (metakʼme ‘Mãyãwạnicʼ do baṅa’) ente Israelren hoṛko do ar bạń dayawakoa, ar onko do baṅgeń ikạkoa." 
Hosea1:7 Menkhan Jihudạren hoṛko doń dayawakoa ar onkogeń bańcaokoa. Ona bańcao do akʼ-sar se tarwaṛe se lạṛhại se sadom se aswariko hotete do baṅ hoyokʼa, bickom iń Probhu Isorge onkoń bańcaokoa.”" 
Hosea1:8 Lo-ruhamah do toa ńũńũi bạgiketʼ khan Gomer do arho mitʼṭen hopone janamkedea.
