Hosea1:9 Unre Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Nuiyakʼ ńutum do Lo-ammi (metakʼme ‘ińren hoṛ do baṅa’). ente ape do ińren hoṛ dope baṅkana ar iń hõ aperen Isor doń baṅkana." 
Hosea1:10 Enhõ Israel do gaḍa aṛe reakʼ gitil lekako saṅgekʼa, oka do soṅ hõ baṅ soṅ daṛekokʼ se lekha hõ bako lekha daṛekokʼ. Oka jaegare onkoko men ocolen, ‘ape do ińren hoṛpe baṅkana’ onko do onḍegeko men ocokʼa, ‘jiwetʼ Isorren hoponko kanape.’" 
Hosea1:11 Jihudạ ar Israelren hoṛko do arhõko midokʼa ar ako cetanre mitʼṭen mukhiyạko dohoyea. Ona laha oka disạmre bondi akanko tahẽkan onḍe khon onko doko calaojoṅa, ente Jisreyelakʼ ona din do maraṅge hoyokʼa." 
Hosea2:1 “Ape do aperen boehape metakoa Ommi (metakʼme ‘ińren hoṛ’) ar aperen miserako do Ruhama (metakʼme ‘dayaren hoṛ). 
Hosea2:2 “Aperen gogo nehõraepe, unige ruhedepe, ente ińren bạhu doe baṅkana ar ińhõ uniren jãwãe doń baṅkana. Uni do acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhã khon laloce ocokʼ giḍikakʼma ar acʼakʼ ontor khon laṭghaṭ hõe sạṅgiń giḍikakʼma." 
Hosea2:3 Ar baṅkhan uni doń uluṅea ar acʼakʼ janam hilokʼ cetʼlekae tahẽkan onkageń hoeocoyea. Uni do hahaṅkar jaega, ar khaṅgoṭ jumi lekań hoeocoyea ar dakʼ tetaṅteń gocʼ ocoyea." 
Hosea2:4 Uniren hopon ar hoponerako do bạń dayawakoa, ente onko do laṭghaṭren hopon kanako." 
Hosea2:5 Onkoren eṅgattetʼ doe laṭghaṭ akada ar okoe uniyakʼ kukhireye hoyakan uni do lajao paṛaoakʼgeye kạmi akada. Uniye menkeda, ‘ińren dulạṛiạkoń pańjakoa; onkoge ińakʼ jomakʼ ar ńũiyakʼ, bhiḍi upʼ, mĩhĩ musnạ jạ̃ṛĩ sutạm, sunum ar ńũńũakʼko emạńkana.’" 
Hosea2:6 Ona iạte iń do jạnumkote uniyakʼ horiń esedtaea; ar uni beṛhaete hõń pạcri eseda jemon acʼakʼ hor aloe sendra ńam daṛeakʼ. 
Hosea2:7 Uni do acʼren dulạṛiạko tayomteye ńir calakʼa menkhan onko do bae tiyokʼ daṛeakoa; uni do onkoe sendrakoa menkhan bae ńamkoa. Khan unreye mena, ‘ińren pạhil jãwãe ṭheniń ruạṛ calakʼa, ente onḍe do bhagegeń tahẽkana.’" 
Hosea2:8 Uni do bae aṅgocetʼ tahẽkana, ińge anaj, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunumiń emaekan tahẽkana, sona ar rupạko hõ ḍher okocʼiń emaekan tahẽkana, one oka uni do Bakʼal debota lạgitʼe beboharetʼ tahẽkan." 
Hosea2:9 “Onate ińakʼ phosol belelen khan ar ińakʼ nãwã darkha rasa hoylen khan ona doń hatao ruạṛa. Ar okaṭakʼte uniyakʼ uluṅtetʼe dapal esetʼkakʼ kan tahẽkan ona ińakʼ bhiḍi upʼ ar musnạ jạ̃ṛĩ sutạm hõń ạguiytińạ. 
Hosea2:10 Ar acʼren dulạṛiạwakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege uniyakʼ lajao paṛaoakʼ kạmi reakʼ iń sodortaea; ińakʼ ti khon uni do celege bako bańcao daṛeaea. 
Hosea2:11 Iń do uniyakʼ joto rạskạ reakʼ porob, molokʼ candoko, jirạukʼ mãhãko metakʼme uniyakʼ niṭ akatʼakʼ sanam porobkoń caba utạrtaea." 
Hosea2:12 Oka darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa dare reaṅe roṛakatʼ baṅma, acʼakʼ kuṛại iạtege acʼren dulạṛiạkoko em akawadea, ona doń nosṭoetaea; ar onako do bir gajaṛ iń hoeocoya ar bir janwarko do onako joma." 
Hosea2:13 Tinạkʼ din Bakʼal debota ńutumte dhupkoe jered ar mundạm ar abhrankote sajkate acʼren dulạṛiạkoe pańjako ar ińe hiṛińiń unạkʼ dinge uniń sạjạiyea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Hosea2:14 “Ar cĩkạ̃ṛ cĩkạ̃ṛ kathate uni do hahaṅkarteń ạyur idiyea ar uni tulucʼ dulạṛ reakʼ kathań roṛa. 
Hosea2:15 Onḍe iń do uniyakʼ darkha bagwaniń ruạṛkataea ar Akhor reakʼ buru nala do as reakʼ duạriń hoeocoyea. Uniyakʼ juạn oktere leka uni do onḍeye sereńa cetʼleka uni do Misor khon oḍok hijukʼ dinreye sereńletʼ tahẽkan. 
Hosea2:16 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń menetʼkana, enhilokʼ uni do ‘acʼren jãwãe’ menteye hohowạńạ; ‘ińren kisạ̃ṛ’ mente do ar bae hohoạńạ." 
Hosea2:17 Uniyakʼ moca khon do Bakʼal debotawakʼ ńutumiń ocoga; ar Bakʼal do uni bae hohoaea. 
Hosea2:18 Enhilokʼ uni lạgitʼ do janwarko, cẽṛẽko ar leńokʼ ṭunḍạṅokʼ jiwiyanko sãote bondobosiń bandhaoaea. Ar disạm khon akʼ-sar, tarwaṛe ar lạṛhạikoń sạṅgiń gidikakʼa jemon sanamko nirạiteko giticʼ jirạu daṛeakʼ." 
Hosea2:19 “E Israel, am sãote baplakʼ reaṅ do jaejug hạbicʼ iń kajak utạra; dhoromte, hok reakʼ bicạrte, asambheṛ dulạṛte ar dayate iń do ona reaṅiń kajak utạra." 
Hosea2:20 Iń do pạtiạr salakʼ ona jopoṛaoiń kajaka ar unre am do khạndrite Probhu Isorem baḍae daṛeaea. 
Hosea2:21 “Iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, enhilokʼ amakʼ iń ańjomtama. Iń do sermań hukumaea; ar serma do dhạrtire dakʼe ema:" 
Hosea2:22 ar dhạrti do phosol, nãwã darkha rasa ar sunume emaea, ar onko hotete Jisreyel, metakʼme Israel do ińakʼ monejoṅakʼe bujhạua." 
Hosea2:23 Iń lạgitʼge uni do disạmre itạ lekań ereya; ar okoeyiń metade tahẽkan, ‘ińren dayayicʼ hoṛ dom baṅkana’ unre unigeń dayawaea. Ar okoekoń metatʼko tahẽkan, ‘ińren hoṛ doko baṅkana,’ onko doń metakoa, ‘ape do ińren hoṛ kanape’ ar onko doko mena, ‘am kangeam aleren Isor do.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Amren bạhu do eṭakʼ hoṛ sãoteye loṭghuṭi akatʼre hõ enhõ senkate arhõ dulạṛem. Israelko do debotako secʼko ạcur akanre hõ ar pujạ reakʼ kismis piṭhạko kusiyakʼkanre hõ enhõ Probhu Isor cetʼlekae dulạṛetʼko, ṭhik onkage am hõ amren bạhum dulạṛea.”" 
Hosea3:2 Onate iń do mitʼsae irạlgel gram rupạ ar aregel keji jaoteń kiriń ạgukedea. 
Hosea3:3 Ona tayom uniń metadea, “Iń tulucʼ giticʼmidokʼ lạgitʼ am do ḍher din tạṅgiy hoyokʼtama. Menkhan am do alom loṭghuṭiya se jãhãe hoṛ sãote hõ alom dulạṛokʼa. Ar ińhõ am lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akaeyiń tahena.”" 
Hosea3:4 Ṭhik nonkage Israelko do ḍher din hạbicʼ rapajko, mukhiyạko, samaṅokʼakʼ porobko, pujạ reakʼ dhiriko, ephod ar boṅgako chaḍageko tahena." 
Hosea3:5 Ar ona tayom do akoren Probhu Isor ar onkoren raj Dạud secʼko ruạṛa. Mucạtʼre onko do Probhu Isorakʼ bhor ńam lạgitʼ botor salakʼ uni ṭhenko hijukʼa. 
Hosea4:1 E Israelko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomtaepe, ente okoe disạmreko tahenkan onko upạrte Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ mambla menakʼtaea. Ona do hoyokʼkana, disạmre pạtiạr ar asambheṛ dulạṛ do bạnukʼa ar Isor do okoehõ sạriyakʼ lekate bako baḍaeyede kana;" 
Hosea4:2 eken eṛe kiriạ, eṛe katha, khũn, kombṛo ar laṭghaṭ menakʼtakoa. Onko do ạn bako manaoeda ar mãyãm cetan mãyãmko joro ocoyetʼkana." 
Hosea4:3 Ona iạte disạm doe homor halaṅeda ar okoe uni talareko tahen kan onko doko marao utạrokʼ kana ar janwarko, cẽṛẽko ar hako hõko gocʼ cabakʼ kana." 
Hosea4:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe hõ onko upạrte do aloko mamblae ma, okoehõ eṭakʼko aloko dusiko ma, ente ape do onko hoṛ lekape hoyakana okoe do naekeko upạrte mamblako ạguiyetʼkan." 
Hosea4:5 E naekeko, ape do siń ar ńindạpe tohodokʼkana ar ape sãote nạbiko hõko tohodokʼkana. Onatege iń do aperen gogo Israel doń marao utạrea." 
Hosea4:6 Isor reaṅ ạkil begorte ińren hoṛko doko maraokʼkana. Ona ạkil bape moneyakʼkante iń hõ ińren naeke menkate bạń moneyape kana. Ape do aperen Isorakʼ ạn-ạrikope hiṛińakada, onate ińhõ aperen hopon ar hoponera koń hiṛińkotapea." 
Hosea4:7 “Naekeko tinạkʼko saṅge idikʼkan unạkʼge onko do iń upạrteko kạiyeda, ona iạte onko do manot bodolteń bemanotkoa." 
Hosea4:8 Ińren hoṛkoakʼ kại gunạkʼte onkoakʼ do lab hoyokʼ kana ar ińren hoṛko kại lạgitʼko udgạuetʼkoa. 
Hosea4:9 Hoṛko cetʼlekań sạjạiko onkage naekeko hõko sạjại ocokʼa; onkoakʼ colon iạte onko jotogeń sạjạikoa ar onkoakʼ kạmi lekate kuṛạiyiń emakoa. 
Hosea4:10 Onko doko jomgea menkhan bako tirpitokʼa; onko doko laṭghaṭa menkhan lekhare bako ḍherokʼa, ente onko do boṅgako iạte Probhu Isorko bạgi giḍi akadea." 
Hosea4:11 “Loṭghuṭi ar nãwã ar mare darkha rasage ińren hoṛkoakʼ bud doe nosṭo akatʼtakoa. 
Hosea4:12 Onko do kaṭren boṅgako ṭhen sopolhako hataoeda ar kaṭ reakʼ ṭheṅga do onkoe hukumakoa, ente loṭghuṭi reakʼ mon do bạṛicʼ horteye idi akatʼkoa; onko do akoren Isor ṭhen bepạtiạranko hoyakana." 
Hosea4:13 Buru reakʼ cuṛạkore onko do janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼkoa ar buru cetan reakʼ Elon, Libni ar Ela dare buṭạko reakʼ umulre dhupko jeretʼeda. Ona iạte aperen hoponerako do kusumbiko hoyokʼtapea ar hoponkoren bạhuko doko loṭghuṭiya." 
Hosea4:14 Aperen hoponerako do kusumbiko hoylenre ar aperen hoponkoren bạhukoko loṭghuṭilere hõ onko do bạń sạjạikoa, ente herelko do apnarge kusumbiko ṭhenko senokʼkana ar mundil kusumbiko sãote janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼkoa. Noko bebuj jạtrenko doko marao utạrokʼa." 
Hosea4:15 “E Israel, am dom laṭghaṭ akatʼre hõ Jihudạ do inạ dusire alo jemone paṛaokʼ. Ape do Gilgolte alope senokʼa; Beth-Abentehõ alope calakʼa; Ar ‘jiwetʼ Probhu Isor ńutumteń kiriạkʼ kana’ mente do alope kiriạkʼa." 
Hosea4:16 Israelko do keṭecʼ hoṭokʼan gại leka kanako. Onate ṭạnḍiren bhiḍi hoponko leka Probhu Isor do cekateye gupikoa? 
Hosea4:17 Ephrayim do boṅgako sãoteye mitʼakana; uni do onage onka ocowaeme. 
Hosea4:18 Onko do bubulakʼko tinreko ńũ sạta unre onko do loṭghuṭiko ehoba; onkoren disạm cakʼlaoko do lajao paṛaoakʼ colongeko kusiyakʼa. 
Hosea4:19 Sạjại do hoe leka onkoe oṭaṅ idikoa; onkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ porob iạte onko doko lajao ocokʼa.” 
Hosea5:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “E naekeko, noa katha ańjompe. E Israelren hoṛko, moneyakʼpe. E raj bõsko, luturakʼpe baṛe. Noa ray do ape upạrtege emocokʼkana, ente ape do Mispare jhãmpa leka ar Taborre do tase akatʼ jhạli lekape hoylena." 
Hosea5:2 Huhulko do heṛan botorko santao kana, menkhan onko sanamkogeń sạjạikoa." 
Hosea5:3 Ephrayim reaṅ do jotogeń baḍaea; ar iń khon Israel do danaṅre bạnuiya. Ephrayim do ńitokʼe laṭghaṭetʼ kana; ar Israel doe bhonḍ akana. 
Hosea5:4 “Onkoakʼ kạmi do onkoren Isor secʼ bae ruạṛ ocoako kana. Onkore do laṭghaṭ reakʼ mon menakʼa. Probhu Isor do sạriyakʼte bako baḍae akadea. 
Hosea5:5 Israelakʼ bạḍạige onko upạrte gohae emetʼkana; Ephrayim, se goṭa Israel do akoakʼ kại iạteko tohodokʼkana ar Jihudạ hõ onko sãoteye tohodotʼ bhindạṛokʼ kana." 
Hosea5:6 Onko do akoren bheḍa ar ḍaṅgra palkoante Probhu Isor ṭhenko senlenre uni do bako ńamekana; onko khon acʼ doe ocogokʼkana. 
Hosea5:7 Onko do Probhu Isor ṭhen bepạtiạranko hoyakana; onko do bidhuạ gidrạko janametʼkoa. Ar onatege ńitokʼ molokʼ cando do onkoakʼ porobkoe lakopʼtakoa akoakʼ khet baṛge sudhạ. 
Hosea5:8 “Ape do Gibiạre siṅgạ ar Ramare do pẽpṛẽtʼpe oroṅeda. Ar Beth-Abnere do hohoatepe meneda, ‘E Benjamin, lạṛhại baṛe ạyur bonme.’" 
Hosea5:9 Sạjại emakʼ dinre Ephrayim do ujạṛokʼakʼ hoyokʼa. Ar okaṭakʼ do hoyokʼte hõ hoyokʼge ona do Israel gusṭirenko talareń lại sodoretʼkana. 
Hosea5:10 Jihudạren mukhiyạko do simạna dhiri ocokʼko leka kanako. Ińakʼ edre do onkore banbạsi lekageń paṛao ocoya. 
Hosea5:11 Ephrayim do acʼakʼ kusileka michạwakʼe pańjayeda uni doe santao ocokʼkana ar bicạrreye lebetʼ gańjao ocoakana. 
Hosea5:12 Ephrayimko ṭhen do tejo leka ar Jihudạren hoṛko ṭhen do heṛ akan jinis lekageń hoyakana. 
Hosea5:13 “Ephrayim do tinre acʼakʼ roge ńelkeda ar Jihudạ do acʼakʼ ghaoko unre Ephrayim do Ạsur secʼ ạcur ruạṛkate goṛo ńam lạgitʼ uni maraṅ raj ṭhen hoṛe kolketʼkoa. Menkhan uni do rog hõ bae boge daṛeataea ar uniyakʼ ghaoko hõ bae bes daṛeakʼa. 
Hosea5:14 Ephrayim ṭhen ar Jihudạ ṭhen do dhạcri kul lekageń hoyokʼa. Unkin doń or cirạkinạ ar kaṭra kuṭrạkateń bạgi oṭoạkinạ. Iń do unkiniń idikinạ ar unkin bańcaokin lạgitʼ do celege bako tahena. 
Hosea5:15 Ar tin hạbicʼ onko do akoakʼ dos bako aṅgoc ar iń secʼ bako moneyakʼ unhạbicʼ iń do ińakʼ jaegate ruạṛ senkate onḍeń tahena. Onkoakʼ duk kosṭore onko do gagoj salakʼ iń ṭhenko ruạṛ hijukʼa.” 
Hosea6:1 Dela, abo do Probhu Isor ṭhen bon ruạṛ calakʼa. Unigeye or cirạ akatʼbona, ar unigeye boge bona; unige abo doe ghạl akatʼbona, ar unige aboakʼ ghaokoe bedhaokata bona." 
Hosea6:2 Thoṛa din tayom unige aboe bańcao bona, ar lahate lekae ạgu ruạṛ bona jemon uni samaṅre bon girobas daṛeakʼ." 
Hosea6:3 Dela, abo do Probhu Isor bon aṅgocema; ar baḍaeye lạgitʼ bon pańjayema. Siń candoe rakabokʼ leka uni do khạṭigeye sodorokʼa; uni do aghãṛ cando reakʼ dakʼte ote lohotʼetʼkan leka ar jạṛi dakʼ lekageye hijukʼa." 
Hosea6:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Ephrayim, am do cetʼ iń cekawama? E Jihudạ, am hõ cetʼ iń cekawama? Amakʼ pạtiạr do setakʼ reakʼ kuṛhạ leka, aṅga marsalokʼ reakʼ sisir leka oka do usạrate chanokʼkan." 
Hosea6:5 Ona iạte ińren nạbiko hotete ape doń getʼ khanḍa khunḍi akatʼpea, ińakʼ moca reakʼ kathateń gocʼakatʼpea; ińakʼ bicạr reakʼ ray do ape cetanre bijli leka malkao rakapʼ akana." 
Hosea6:6 Iń do pạtiạrgeń khojkana dãṛẽ do baṅ; jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ khon Isorge jemon mońjteko baḍaeye onageń khojkana. 
Hosea6:7 Adam leka ińiń bandhao akatʼ bondobos do bape manaoleda; ape do ińrepe bepạtiạrena. 
Hosea6:8 Gilead do onko bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ nagraha kana one onḍe do onkoakʼ mãyãmte perecʼ jaṅga reakʼ chap menakʼa. 
Hosea6:9 Ḍạkuko cetʼleka manwa lạgitʼko tãṛãkʼkokʼ, onkage naekeko hõ tãṛãkʼ akaeko tahenkana; onko do Sikem calakʼ horre manwako khũnetʼkoa ar heṛan bạṛicʼakʼko kạmikana." 
Hosea6:10 Israelko talare mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼakʼ iń ńel akada. Ephrayim do onḍeye laṭghaṭ akada ar Israel doe bhonḍ akana. 
Hosea6:11 “E Jihudạ, am lạgitʼ hõ phosol irokʼ reakʼ okte do ṭhik dohoakana." 
Hosea7:1 Ińren hoṛkoakʼ dosa tinre ạcur ruạṛtakoń mena, ar tinre Israel bogeye reakʼ iń khoja, unrege Ephrayimakʼ kại do ńelokʼkantaea ar Samariạwakʼ do behokakʼko sodorokʼkana. Onko doko ekʼṛegea, oṛakʼre kombṛo doe bolokʼkana ar ḍạkuko do bahrereko luṭjoṅ kana;" 
Hosea7:2 menkhan onko do bako bujhạueda je, onkoakʼ sanamakʼ kạmi reakʼ iń disạ dohoyeda mente. Onkoakʼ kại do purạtegeye gherao esetʼ akatʼkoa; onako do jao oktege iń samaṅre menakʼa." 
Hosea7:3 “Onkoakʼ dusṭạmi iạte onko do raj ar eṛeyakʼ kathate kạmiyạ hoṛko rạskạ ocoyetʼkoa. 
Hosea7:4 Onko jotoge laṭghaṭko kanako, onko do piṭhạ rapakʼicʼakʼ jolokʼkan culhạ leka; holoṅ sipi khon ehopʼkate ona phulạu rakabokʼ hạbicʼ one ona reakʼ seṅgel do uskurakʼ baṅ jạruṛ." 
Hosea7:5 Rajakʼ porob hilokʼre kạmiyạko do darkha rasa reakʼ tạpisteko ruạ utạrlena ar raj do onko landa dhudhutʼkan hoṛko sãote tiye milạuketʼtaea. 
Hosea7:6 Menkhan onko do tinreko phor phundikeda unre onkoakʼ ontor do culhạ leka dugur dugur jollentakoa. Onkoren piṭhạ bekʼnaoko do goṭa ńindạko jạpitʼkeda ar setakʼ jokhecʼ ona phor phundi do bhaṭa seṅgel leka jolentakoa. 
Hosea7:7 Ar jotokoge culhạ lekako dhipạuena ar akoren disạm cakʼlaoko do seṅgel lekako jeretʼ cabaketʼkoa. Onkoren rapaj do sanamgeko gocʼena; ar onko do okoege bako hohowạdińa. 
Hosea7:8 “Ephrayim do eṭakʼ jạt jạtrenko sãoteye mesaokʼkana; uni do baṅ ulṭạu akatʼ piṭhạ kanae. 
Hosea7:9 Bidisiạko do uniyakʼ daṛeko jom akatʼtaea, menkhan uni do ona bae bujhạu daṛeakʼkana. Uniyakʼ bohokʼ reakʼ upʼ do hanḍe nanḍe ponḍ akantaea, ar ona hõ bae kheyal akada." 
Hosea7:10 Israelakʼ bạḍại do uni upạrte gohae emetʼkana, menkhan noako hoykate hõ uni do acʼren Probhu Isor ṭhen bae ruạṛ hijukʼkana." 
Hosea7:11 “Ephrayim do mitʼṭen bebuj parwa leka kanae; uni doe lelhagea. Uni do ghane Misore hohoaekana ar ghane do Ạsur ṭhene calakʼkana. 
Hosea7:12 Ar onko tinreko senokʼa unre iń do onko cetanre jhạliń capada; ar coṭren cẽṛẽko leka onkoń or pheḍkoa. Israelko ṭhen cetʼ leka roṛ hoylen onkage onko doń sạjạikoa. 
Hosea7:13 Hae onko do, ente onko do iń ṭhen khon bạṛicʼ horteko calao akana. Onko do sorbonas hoyokʼtako ma, ente iń upạrteko hul akada. Onko chaḍaokoń khojkangea menkhan onko do iń upạrte eṛe kathako roṛeda." 
Hosea7:14 Onko do akoakʼ aṭetʼreko homor halaṅeda, menkhan ontor khon iń ṭhen do bako rakʼeda. Anaj ar nãwã darkha rasa ńam lạgitʼko jarwakʼkana ar iń upạrteko hulletʼkana." 
Hosea7:15 Iń do lạṛhại reakʼ cecetʼakʼ iń em akatʼkoa ariń daṛe ocoakatʼkoa, menkhan onko do iń upạrtege bạṛicʼakʼko soṛojontroyetʼ kana." 
Hosea7:16 Onko do Bakʼal secʼko ạcur akana; onko do peṛta akʼ lekako hoyakana. Onkoren mukhiyạko do tarwaṛeteko gujukʼa, ar onate Israelko do Misor disạmre landa dhutʼkoko hoyokʼa." 
Hosea8:1 “Am do siṅgạ oroṅme. Probhu Isorren hoṛko upạrte bạiri do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ lekae hijukʼkana, ente hoṛko do iń emakʼ bondobos reakʼko bebatao akada ar ińakʼ ạn-ạri upạrteko hul akada." 
Hosea8:2 Israel do iń ṭhen rakʼ rakʼteye menetʼkana, ‘E ińren Isor, ale do amle aṅgocetʼmea.’" 
Hosea8:3 Menkhan okaṭakʼ bhageakʼ kan Israel do onae nihạ̃t giḍi akada, onate bạiri do uniko khudạu baṛayea." 
Hosea8:4 Ińakʼ hukum chaḍage onko do rapajko bahal akatʼkoa; ińakʼ hukum chaḍage onko do mukhiyạko bachao akawana. Onko do sona ar rupạren boṅgako benaoetʼkote sorbonasreko paṛaokʼkana. 
Hosea8:5 E Samariạ, amren mĩhũ-boṅga doń nihạ̃t giḍi akadea. Ar onako upạrtege ińakʼ edre seṅgel do jolokʼkana. Bogekʼ lạgitʼ amren hoṛ do ar tinạkʼ din lagaoakoa?" 
Hosea8:6 Israelren hoṛge uni mĩhũ doko benao akadea. Mitʼṭen kạrigolge uni doe benao akadea; onate uni do Isor doe baṅkana. Samariạren uni mĩhũ hopon doe rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa. 
Hosea8:7 “Onko do hoegeko era ar sesre do hoe bharḍoko irạ. Phosol reakʼ gelere do jãhãn danage bạnukʼa; ona khon holoṅ do ohoge ńamlena. Ar onare jãhãnakʼge hoyokʼ ona do bidisiạ hoṛgeko jom cabaea. 
Hosea8:8 Israel doko utʼ ocoakana; bạṛicʼakʼ jinis leka onko do ńitokʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talare menakʼkoa. 
Hosea8:9 Onko do eskar eskar ạcur baṛaekan bir gadha leka Ạsur hạbicʼko sen akana. Ar Ephrayim do ṭakate dulạṛiạkoe ạgu akawana. 
Hosea8:10 Onko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko sãote ṭakateko gate akanre hõ iń do mitʼ domte jarwakateń sạjạikoa. Onko do disạm cakʼlaokoren rapajkoakʼ santao iạteko caba utạrokʼa. 
Hosea8:11 “Ephrayim do acʼakʼ ghạṭko sạṅgińtae lạgitʼ aema pinḍkoe benao akawana, menkhan onako do kạkại reakʼ pinḍkantaea." 
Hosea8:12 Ińakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ ḍher kathage onko lạgitʼ iń olleda, menkhan onko do bidisiạ hoṛkoakʼ jãhãnakʼ jinis menteko hudisleda." 
Hosea8:13 Iń ńutumte janwar samaṅkate onko do ona reakʼ jelko jojomkana menkhan iń Probhu Isor do onkore kusi bạnuńa. Ńitokʼ iń do onkoakʼ dusṭạmi reakʼ kathań disạite kại reakʼ sạjạiyiń emakoa; ar onko do Misorteko ruạṛ calakʼa. 
Hosea8:14 Israelren hoṛ do akoren sisirjạuicʼ hiṛińkate maraṅ maraṅ oṛakʼko benaojoṅ kana; Ar Jihudạren hoṛko hõ pạcrite nagrahako esetʼ ạcurakada. Menkhan Iń do onkoakʼ nagrahako cetanre seṅgeliń kola ar ona do onkoakʼ sanam gaṛkoe jarkhartakoa.” 
Hosea9:1 E Israel, eṭakʼ jạtrenko leka do alom hulạs porobokʼa. Am do amren Isor bạgikate unire bepạtiạricʼem hoyakana; ar mitʼke mitʼ khạrạire kusumbi reakʼ kuṛại ńamkate am dom kusi akana." 
Hosea9:2 Inạ tayom khạrại ar darkha rasa lelenkunḍ reakʼ jaega do jomakʼ bako emokʼa; ar onko do nãwã darkha rasa hõ bako ńama. 
Hosea9:3 Onko do Probhu Isorakʼ disạmre bako tahena; Ephrayim do Misorteye ruạṛ calakʼa ar Ạsur do besaphawakʼ jomakʼgeye joma. 
Hosea9:4 Onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte darkha rasate coḍorakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ do bako samaṅa ar onkoren janwar samaṅokʼakʼte hõ uni do bako kusi ocodaṛeaea. Onkan samaṅokʼakʼ onko ṭhen do hokʼmor halaṅetʼkoakʼ jomakʼ lekage hoyokʼa; ar okoe onako jom onko sanamgeko bhonḍokʼa. Ona jomakʼ do akoakʼ lacʼ bikʼ lạgitʼge hoyokʼa, Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼte ona do baṅ ạgukʼa." 
Hosea9:5 Onko do cetʼko cekaea ńiṭ akan porob dinre ar Probhu Isorakʼ porob dinre hõ onko do cetʼko cekaea? 
Hosea9:6 Onko do ḍahao maraokʼakʼ ti khon tinreko ńir pharakokʼa unre Misor do onkoe jarwakoa ar Memphis nagraha doe topakoa. Seṅgelsiń do onkoakʼ rupạ reakʼ damanakʼkoe hameṭjoṅa; ar rạṅgạiniko do onkoakʼ tạmbui jạpudtakoa. 
Hosea9:7 Israel do jemone baḍae ńam, sạjại reakʼ din do seṭer akana ar hisạb hatao reakʼ din hõ hecʼakana. Onkoakʼ kại do lekhare ḍhergea Isorko hirkhạwaekante, nạbiko do lelha ar jiuan hoṛ do khepako hudisetʼkoa." 
Hosea9:8 Nạbi do ińren Isor sãote Ephrayimren hohorhoyicʼe hoyakanre hõ uniyakʼ sanam horrege pạsi do oḍao akana ar uniren Isorakʼ oṛakʼre uni upạrte do kurudge. 
Hosea9:9 Gibea reakʼ dinkore okaleka tahẽkan onkage Israelko do bedhoromreko unum akana. Isor do onkoakʼ dusṭạmi reakʼ kathae disạitakoa ar onkoakʼ kại iạteye sạjạikoa. 
Hosea9:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “Hahaṅkarre darkha nạ̃ṛĩ leka Israel doń ńamledea; pạhil dhao jo emokʼkan loa dare reakʼ pạhilakʼ jo lekage aperen hapṛamkoń ńelletʼkoa. Menkhan onko do Bakʼal-Piyạr ṭhen senkate apnartetʼko ạkhrińena ar akoren dulạṛiạ boṅga lekage onko do hirkhạwankoko hoylena." 
Hosea9:11 Ephrayimakʼ gorbo do cẽṛẽ lekage uḍạu calakʼtaea; unre gidrạwakʼ janam do baṅ hoyokʼa, celege bako bhạrti hoṛmokʼa ar onko do bạńjhiko hoyokʼa." 
Hosea9:12 Onkoren gidrạkoko ạsul haralekore hõ onko gidrạ doń gocʼkoa; onkoren mitʼṭen hõ bako tahena. Hae onko do, tinre onko ṭhen khoniń calakʼa." 
Hosea9:13 Ephrayim do Tur reakʼ rosaṛ jaegare rohoe akaniń ńel akadea. Menkhan Ephrayim do acʼren gidrạko gogocʼicʼ ṭhen idiko hoyokʼtaea.” 
Hosea9:14 E Probhu Isor, noko hoṛko lạgitʼ do cetʼ iń khoja? Am do noko cetʼem emakoa? Am do hosor giḍikʼ kukhi ar rohoṛ bạ̃sge baṛe emakom." 
Hosea9:15 Probhu Isore meneda, “Gilgolre onko do akoakʼ joto lekan dusṭạmiko ehopʼleda, ar onḍe onko do hirkhạwakoń ehopʼena. Onkoakʼ kại iạte ińren hoṛko tala khoniń laga oḍokkoa. Onko do ar bạń dulạṛkoa; onkoren mukhiyạko doko huhulko kana." 
Hosea9:16 Ephrayim doe ńẽtʼ akana, onkoakʼ rehetʼ do rohoṛ akana, onare jo do baṅ sabokʼkana. Ar onkoren hoṛko do gidrạko janamlekore hõ iń do onkoren dulạṛiạ gidrạkoń gocʼ cabakoa.”" 
Hosea9:17 Ińren Isor do onkoe nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼkoa, ente onko do uniyakʼ bako bataoletʼtaea; onko do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko talareko ạcur baṛaea." 
Hosea10:1 Israel doe alak balakokʼkan darkha nạ̃ṛĩ kana; onare do ḍher joge sapʼlena. Uni do joko tinạkʼ saṅge idiyentae unạkʼge pinḍko hõe ḍherkeda; ar disạm hõ tinạkʼ sahre idiyentae unạkʼge uni do mońj mońj boṅga khunṭikoe benaokeda. 
Hosea10:2 Uniren hoṛkoakʼ ontor do bepạtiạr getakoa; onate onko do ńitokʼ dos reakʼ bojha asen baṛae hoyokʼtakoa. Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ pinḍkoe rạputʼ giḍikatakoa ar onkoakʼ pujạ reakʼ dhirikoe marao cabaetakoa. 
Hosea10:3 Unre onko do khạṭigeko mena, “Probhu Isor bale botorade tahẽkante aleren do cele rajge bạnukʼkotalea. Menkhan raje tahẽlenre hõ uni do ale lạgitʼ cetʼe cekakea?”" 
Hosea10:4 Onko do ạuṛi kathakogeko roṛeda ar eṛe eṛe kiriạkate bondobosko bandhaoeda. Onate bicạr do khet reakʼ nahel gaḍakore bisanakʼ aṛakʼ sakam leka phuṭạu rakapʼkana. 
Hosea10:5 Samariạreko girobasokʼ kan hoṛ do Beth-Abenren mĩhũ boṅga iạte botor caṛhao akatʼkoa. Uniren hoṛ doko homor halaṅeda ar uniren boṅgako sewawako kan naekeko doko hae haeyokʼ kana, ente boṅgako reakʼ ṭhonok do onko khon sạṅgiń ocoakana." 
Hosea10:6 Ona do Ạsurte idi ocoakana ar maharajakʼ khajna lekate emakana. Ona iạte Ephrayim do bae manot ocokʼa, ar Israel do acʼakʼ goṭawakʼ lạgitʼe lajao ocokʼa." 
Hosea10:7 Dakʼ do cetʼ leka huḍiń ḍạrkoe ạtu idiyetʼ onkage Samariạ ar uniren raj doe ạtu idi ocokʼa. 
Hosea10:8 Beth-Aben reakʼ than boṭkocʼko, metakʼme Israelakʼ kại reakʼ ṭhạ̃iko do maraokʼ ocokʼa. Onḍe do rạṅgạini jạnumko janam rakabokʼte onkoakʼ pinḍkoe danaṅ esedtakoa. Unre onko do maraṅ maraṅ buruko metawakʼa, “De danaṅ esetʼlepe” ar huḍiń buruko doko metawakʼa, “De ale cetanre ńurokʼpe.”" 
Hosea10:9 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israel, Gibearem kạiletʼ khonge am dom kại ạguiyetʼkana, ar kạirege am dom tahẽyena. Lạṛhại do cetʼ Gibearen dusṭạmiren hoponko bae tiyokʼ daṛeakoa?" 
Hosea10:10 Ińaakʼ kusi sana lekage onko doń sạjạikoa; onkoakʼ babar goṭecʼ kại iạte onko tolko lạgitʼ eṭakʼ jạtrenko onko upạrteń jarwakoa. 
Hosea10:11 Ephrayim do kuṛạiye ńam akatʼ mitʼṭen gại leka kanae okoe do phosol manḍae kusiyakʼ kan, menkhan iń do uniyakʼ mońj hoṭokʼre arãṛ iń gokʼaea. Ephrayim do ińren cacas ḍaṅgrae hoyokʼtińạ ar Jihudạ do ińakʼ nahelgeye ora, ar Jakob do ḍhelak hasae gejera.”" 
Hosea10:12 Ape do apnar lạgitʼ dhorom reakʼ itạ er joṅpe, ar pạtiạrteakʼ phosol irpe ar apere baṅ cas akan ontor rạpudtape, ente Probhu Isor secʼ ạcur ruạṛokʼ reakʼ okte do hecʼakana. Ar tinre onape onkaea unre uni do hecʼkate ape cetanre dhorom reakʼ jạṛi dakʼe emapea." 
Hosea10:13 Menkhan ape do dusṭạmigepe laṭkao akawana, ar bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ phosolpe getʼ akada ar eṛeteakʼ jo hõpe jom akada. Ape do apeakʼ daṛe ar ḍher lạṛhạiko cetanrepe bhorsa akana;" 
Hosea10:14 ona iạte ape upạrte lạṛhại reakʼ kạumạu rakapʼa ar apeakʼ sanam gaṛko do marao ocokʼa, cetʼleka Solomon do lạṛhại hilokʼ Beth-Arbele maraoletʼ. Unre hopon ar hoponerako sãote eṅgatko hõ otreko tawakʼ ocolena." 
Hosea10:15 E Bethel, amre onkage hoyokʼa, ente amakʼ dusṭạmi do ḍhergetama. Aṅgalen khange Israelren raj do purạteye marao ocokʼa." 
Hosea11:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Israel do gidrạ tahẽkan khongeń dulạṛedekana ar Misor khon do ińren hopongeń hoho ạgukedea." 
Hosea11:2 Mekhan Israel tinạkʼ iń hohowade unạkʼge uni do iń ṭhen khon sạṅgińteye ocokʼ calaoena. Uniren hoṛko do Bakʼal debota ṭhen janwar dãṛẽko samaṅketʼkoa ar boṅga murhutʼko ṭhen dhup jeretʼko ehopʼena. 
Hosea11:3 Ińge Ephrayim do taṛamiń cetʼade tahẽkana, ińgeń hewekan tahẽkana; menkhan uniren hoṛko do bako bujhạuleda, ińge onko doń bogeletʼkoa mente." 
Hosea11:4 Iń do daya reakʼ baberte ar dulạṛ reakʼ tonolteń calaoetʼko tahẽkana; onkoakʼ taren khon arãṛiń ocokʼkeda ar eṅgotʼkateń jom ocoyetʼko tahẽkana. 
Hosea11:5 Israelko mon ạcur bako rebenlente Misorte do bako ruạṛ calakʼa, bickom Ạsurrenko do onko cetanreko rajokʼa." 
Hosea11:6 Onkoakʼ nagrahakore botorge lạṛhại hoyokʼa; onate onkoakʼ phaṭok duạrko reakʼ huṛkạṛko do rạpudokʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ goṭawakʼ iạte onko doko marao utạrokʼa. 
Hosea11:7 Ińren hoṛko do iń ṭhen khon ruạṛ calakʼko niṭ akada. Ona iạte onko do maraṅ Isor, metakʼme ińko hohowạńre hõ bạń goṛowakoa." 
Hosea11:8 “E Ephrayim, am do cekateń bạgimea? E Israel, cekate am do eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ tireń jimạmea? Cekate iń do Adma ar Seboyim lekań marao utạrmea? Am lạgitʼ ińakʼ ontor do ahkaokʼkantińa; ińakʼ daya do amre rakabokʼkana." 
Hosea11:9 Ińakʼ botoranakʼ edre do bạń sodora, Ephrayim do ar bạń marao utạrea, ente iń doń Isor kana, manwa do baṅa; iń do amreń tahenkan uni sonoticʼ kangeạń. Edre do bạń ạguiya." 
Hosea11:10 Amren hoṛ do ińko pańjayińạ, ente iń do dhạcri kul lekań hạnḍrạukʼa. Ar ińiń hạnḍrạu tayom ińren hoponko do pạchim secʼ khon thar tharaokʼ tulucʼko hijukʼa." 
Hosea11:11 Misor khon cẽṛẽ leka, ar Ạsur khon do potam leka onko do thar tharaokʼ tulucʼ iń ṭhenko hijukʼa. Ar iń do onkoakʼ oṛakʼregeń dohokoa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Hosea11:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ephrayimakʼ eṛe katha, Israelakʼ phạsiạratetʼ do iń beṛhaete menakʼa. Jihudạ do Isorakʼ, metakʼme uni pạtiạran sonoticʼ reakʼe bebatao akada." 
Hosea12:1 Ephrayim do hoeye jomeda; uni do goṭa din purub reakʼ hoeye khudạueda ar eṛe katha ar bedhorome ḍhereda. Uni do Ạsurrenko sãoteye bondoboseda ar Misor do jạitun reakʼ sunume kolae kana.” 
Hosea12:2 Jihudạ upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ mitʼṭecʼ mambla menakʼtaea; Jakobakʼ colon lekate uni doe sạjạiyea ar uniyakʼ kạmi lekate kuṛạiye emaea. 
Hosea12:3 Eṅgatakʼ kukhire tahenrege Jakob do acʼren boehawakʼ iḍiye sapʼletʼtaea; ar harakate do Isor sãoteye lạṛhạiyena. 
Hosea12:4 Uni do Serma goḍet sãoteye lạṛhạilena ar uniye bhagaokedea; ar daya ńam lạgitʼ uni do rakʼ rakʼteye nehõrlena. Uni do Bethelre Probhu Isore ńamledea ar onḍe do Probhu Isor sãote kathaye roṛleda. 
Hosea12:5 Uni kangeae phạdkoren Probhu Isor do; ar Probhu Isor ńutumtege uni do hoṛko disạiyea. 
Hosea12:6 Ńitokʼ do E Jakob bõsren hoṛko, aperen Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe; pạtiạranko hoyokʼpe, dhorom reakʼ bicạrpe ar sanam ghuṛi aperen Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ horre tahenpe." 
Hosea12:7 Probhu Isore meneda, “Bepari Ephrayim do ṭhok reakʼ tulạgeye beoharetʼkana; uni do julumgeye kusiyakʼkana." 
Hosea12:8 Uniye mena, ‘iń do ạḍiń kisạ̃ṛ akana, ḍher dhon duribgeń jogaṛ akada. Ińakʼ sanam kạmiko talare hoṛko do ińakʼ dos se kại do bako sendra ńamtińạ.’" 
Hosea12:9 Menkhan E Ephrayim, ińge amren Probhu Isor do; ińge Misor khoniń oḍok ạguakatʼmea. Amakʼ niṭakatʼ porobko reakʼ okte leka arhõ am do tạmbureń tahẽocomea." 
Hosea12:10 Iń do nạbiko ṭhen kathań roṛ akada, onko do ḍher dorsoniń emakatʼkoa ar onko hotete aema kathageń roṛakada.”" 
Hosea12:11 Gilead do bedhoromteye perecʼgea; uniren hoṛ doko ạuṛiyakʼgea. Onko do Gilgolre ḍher ḍaṅgrako samaṅketʼkoa. Onkoakʼ pinḍko do casetʼkan jumire dhiri ḍạṅko leka ḍhergea. 
Hosea12:12 Jakob do Aram disạmteye dạṛleda; ar Israel do bạhu ńame lạgitʼ din mạjur reakʼe kạmileda ar bhiḍi gupi kạmi hõe kạmileda. 
Hosea12:13 Probhu Isor do Misor khon Israel ạguiye lạgitʼ mitʼṭen nạbiye beoharledea; uni hotete uniye ńel todarot ledea. 
Hosea12:14 Menkhan Ephrayim do Probhu Isore edre ocokedea; ona iạte uniren Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ bạṛicʼ kạmi lạgitʼ unigeye dạyireye paṛaoea ar uniyakʼ henosta do uniregeye paṛao ocoya. 
Hosea13:1 Ephrayim kathae roṛlere hoṛko doko thar tharaokan tahẽkana; Israel gusṭirenko modre uni do maraṅ utạrice hoylena. Menkhan Bakʼal debota sewawae iạte dusiyente uni doe gocʼena. 
Hosea13:2 Ńitokʼ uniren hoṛko do arhõ ḍherko kại akada; akoakʼ rupạte onko do ako lạgitʼ dul boṅga muṭhạn, metakʼme gạkhuṛ tite boṅgako benao akadea; ar onako do jotoge kạrigolkoakʼ kạmikana. Nui boṅga reaṅ onkoko mena, “Okoe dãṛẽko samaṅetʼkan onko do mĩhũren boṅgako cokʼae ma.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ona iạte onko do setakʼ reakʼ kuṛhạ ar chanokʼkan sisir dakʼ leka kanako, onko do khạrại khon hoete oṭaṅ calakʼkan bhusạ leka, ar jalna secʼte oḍok calakʼkan dhũạ leka kanako." 
Hosea13:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “Misor khoniń oḍok ạgu akatʼme khon ińkangeạń amren Probhu Isor do. Iń chaḍa ar eṭakʼ Isor do bạnukʼkoa; iń chaḍa ar cele babańcaoko hõ bạnukʼkoa." 
Hosea13:5 Hahaṅkarre, ona rohoṛ disạmre iń do amiń ńel jutletʼmea." 
Hosea13:6 Ar amren hoṛiń jom ocoletʼko tayom onko doko tirpitlena; ar tirpitente onko do bạḍạiteko perecʼena, ar ona tayom do ińko hiṛińkedińa." 
Hosea13:7 Onatege iń do dhạcri kul leka onko cetanreń hijukʼa, ar hunḍạr leka hor aṛereń tãṛãkʼ tahena." 
Hosea13:8 Hoponko recʼakade bana eṅga leka iń do onko cetanre jhãpiń ema ar koṛamiń or cirạitakoa. Kul eṅga lekań utʼgotʼkakoa; ar bir janwarko lekań khanḍa khunḍi cabakoa. 
Hosea13:9 “E Israel, am do iń secʼren dom baṅkana, metakʼme amren gokʼṛoyicʼ secʼrenem baṅkante iń do amiń marao giḍikama." 
Hosea13:10 Amren raj doe okayena one uni amakʼ sanam nagrahakoe rukhiyạ daṛeatam? Amren disạm cakʼlaoicʼ doe okayena one onko reaṅem menetʼ tahẽkan, ‘iń do raj ar disạm cakʼlaoko imạńme?’" 
Hosea13:11 Onate iń do edrete mitʼṭen rajiń ematʼme tahẽkana ar raṅgaote uni doń uṭhạukedea. 
Hosea13:12 Ephrayimakʼ dosko, metakʼme uniyakʼ sanam kạiko do ol dohoakana." 
Hosea13:13 Maejiukoakʼ bedonokʼ reakʼ haso lekage uni do bedon rakapʼ akawadea, menkhan uni do bebuj gidrạ leka; okte hoylen khan hõ kukhi reakʼ duạrre bae hijukʼ kana." 
Hosea13:14 “Seoul reakʼ daṛe khon ińge damte uniń chaḍao ạguiyea. Ar gocʼko khon hõń bańcaoea. E gujukʼ, okortam hul? E Seoul, okortam amakʼ moron do? Iń do bạń mãyãkʼa." 
Hosea13:15 Ephrayim do acʼren boehako talareye jo bahakʼre hõ enhõ Probhu Isor ṭhen khon purub reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ hoe do hahaṅkar khoniń rakapʼ ạguiya; ona reakʼ jharna dakʼ do baṅ tahena ar uniyakʼ kũńko hõ rohoṛ cabakʼtaea. Ar uniyakʼ khajańci reakʼ sanam damanakʼ jinisko do luṭ idikʼa. 
Hosea13:16 Samariạren hoṛko do akoren Isor upạrteko hul akatʼte onko do akoakʼ ghạṭko goga. Onko do lạṛhạireko gujukʼa; onkoren huḍiń gidrạko do otreko tawakʼ gejer ocokʼa ar onkoren bhạrti hoṛmo maejiuko do lacʼko getʼ cirạ ocokʼa.” 
Hosea14:1 E Israelren hoṛko, aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe. Apeakʼ kại iạtege ape dope ńur akana." 
Hosea14:2 Ape do Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe ar uni metaepe, “Aleakʼ sanam kạiko ikạitaleme ar aleakʼ oka bhageakʼkan ona ataṅme jemon ale do damkom samaṅokʼakʼ leka aleakʼ luṭitele sarhaome." 
Hosea14:3 Ạsur do bae bańcao daṛealea; ale do lạṛhại sadom cetanre bale bhorsakʼkana. Aleakʼ titele benao akatʼko boṅga murhutʼko do ar tishõ bale metakoa, ‘aleren debota kanape,’ ente ṭũạr amarko do am ṭhenge dayako ńama.”" 
Hosea14:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ińge onko do bạṛicʼ hor khoniń ruạṛ ạgukoa ar jãhãn gokʼakʼ chaḍageń dulạṛkoa, ente ińakʼ edre do onko cetan khon ocokʼ akana." 
Hosea14:5 Israel ṭhen do sisir dakʼ lekageń hoyokʼa; uni do Kiyạ baha lekae bahakʼa. Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare leka uni do acʼakʼ rehetʼko latar secʼe pheḍtaea. 
Hosea14:6 Uniyakʼ ḍạrko do pasnaokʼtaea. Uni do jạitun dare leka mońje hoyokʼa ar uniyakʼ mońj so do Lebanon reakʼ debdạru dare leka hoyokʼa. 
Hosea14:7 Okoe uniyakʼ umulreko tahen onko do ḍher phosolko arjao ocoya. Onko do darkha nạ̃ṛĩ leka jo bahateko perejokʼa ar Lebanon reakʼ darkha rasa leka onkoakʼ ńutum do pasnaokʼtakoa. 
Hosea14:8 E Ephrayim, boṅgako sãote amakʼ do jãhãn sompokge bạnukʼa. Ińge amakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ roṛ ruạṛiń emama ar amiń jotonmea. Iń kangeạń soṛa Saro dare do; amakʼ jo do iń khonge hijukʼkana.”" 
Hosea14:9 Ạkilan doe okoekana? Uni do noako reaṅe baḍaema. Probhu Isorakʼ hor do dhorom reakʼ hor kana; dhorom hoṛ do ona hortegeko taṛama, menkhan bedhoromicʼ doe tohotʼ gurokʼa." 
Joel1:1 Pethuel hopon Joel ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorlena. 
Joel1:2 E murubbiko, ape do noa katha ańjompe; E disạmre girobasokʼ kan hoṛko, apehõ ańjompe. Ape se aperen hapṛamkoakʼ oktere nonkan ghoṭna do cetʼ jãhãtis hoylena?" 
Joel1:3 Niạ ghoṭna reakʼ katha do aperen hopon ar hoponerako lạiyakope ar onko hõ akoren hopon ar hoponera ṭhenko lạima ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerako do akoren bõsko lạiyakoma. 
Joel1:4 Jojom pohoko okaṭakʼko sarecʼ oṭokakʼ ona do dodon pohoko jomkeda; dodon pohoko okaṭakʼko sarecʼ oṭokakʼ ona do jal jalte jojom pohoko jomkeda; ar jal jalte jojom pohoko okaṭakʼko sarecʼ oṭokakʼ ona do rehetʼ sindetʼ jojom pohoko jomkeda. 
Joel1:5 E bul bhutạṛ hoṛko, ma cetaokʼpe ar rakʼjoṅpe. E sanam bubulakʼ hoṅgorko, ape do ṭaṭka darkha rasa reakʼ bubulakʼ lạgitʼ homorpe, ente apeakʼ moca khon ona do recʼ ocoakana." 
Joel1:6 Mitʼ jạtrenko do ińakʼ disạmko akromon akada; onko doko daṛeangea ar onkoren lạṛhại phạdko do alekha. Onkoakʼ ḍaṭa do dhạcri kulakʼ ḍaṭa leka ar onkoakʼ laser ḍaṭa do kul eṅgawakʼ jambe ḍaṭa leka. 
Joel1:7 Onko do ińakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩko nosṭo akada ar loa dare reakʼ ḍạr hõko rạputʼ akada. Ar ona reakʼ chal chaḍaokateko giḍiakada; onate ḍạrko do ponḍ akana. 
Joel1:8 E ińren hoṛko, okoe kũạri kuṛi do acʼakʼ juạn oktere acʼrene hoyokʼ lạgidokʼkan jãwãeakʼ gujukʼ iạte gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkateye homoretʼkan ape do uni leka homorpe." 
Joel1:9 Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ porob do sahaṛ akana. Okoe Probhu Isorko sewawae kan tahẽkan onko naekeko doko homor halaṅeda. 
Joel1:10 Sanam khetko do nosṭo akana, ot doe homoretʼkana, ente phosol do nosṭo caba akana, nãwã darkha rasa ańjetʼakana ar sunum hõ caba hijukʼkana." 
Joel1:11 E cacasko, lajaokʼpe baṛe; ar okoe do darkha nạ̃ṛĩpe jotonetʼkan, ape do guhum ar jao lạgitʼ homor halaṅpe; ente khet reakʼ phosol do nosṭoakana." 
Joel1:12 Darkha nạ̃ṛĩ do rohoṛ akana ar loa dare hõ gujukʼkana; ḍạlim dare, khijur dare, apel dare ar khet baṛge reakʼ joto dareko do rohoṛakana. Ar hoṛko tala khon rạskạ hõ caba akana." 
Joel1:13 E naekeko, ape do gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate homor halaṅpe; ar okoeko pinḍre sewa reakʼpe kạmikan ape do rakʼ homorpe. Okoe ińren Isorpe sewawae kan ape hõ hijukʼte gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate ńindạ tahẽ aṅgakʼpe, ente aperen Isorakʼ oṛakʼre jomakʼ samaṅokʼ ar coḍor samaṅokʼakʼ porob do akoṭakana." 
Joel1:14 Ape do sonot upạs reakʼ bebostaepe; mitʼṭecʼ sabha baṛe hoeocoype. Murubbiko ar disạmre girobasokʼ kan sanamko aperen Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre hoho ạgukope ar Probhu Isor ṭhen rakʼ joṅpe. 
Joel1:15 Hae, hae, ona botoranakʼ din do! Ente Probhu Isorakʼ din do seṭerakana; jarkharakʼ din lekate ona din do phạdkoren Probhu Isor ṭhen khonge hijukʼkana." 
Joel1:16 Aboakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅrege jomakʼ ar aboren Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon rạskạ ar hulạs do cetʼ baṅ sahaṛakana? 
Joel1:17 Itạko do ḍhelka hasa latarre rohoṛ roṅgoyena. Phosol reakʼ murại do jarkharena, gola oṛakʼ do jotoge rạputʼ giḍi ocoakana, ente phosol do jhãorayena." 
Joel1:18 Mĩhũ merom doko kuhrạũkʼkana! Gại ḍaṅgra pal doko anḍrokʼ sanḍrokʼ baṛaekana, ente onkoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍi do bạnukʼtakoa; ar bhiḍi merom doko andakʼ tawakʼ baṛaekana." 
Joel1:19 E Probhu Isor, iń do amgeń hohoam kana, ente ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do seṅgele jomakada ar seṅgel reakʼ lepʼ do ṭạnḍi reakʼ sanam darekoe lo roṅgo akada." 
Joel1:20 Bir janwarko hõ am ṭhenko rakʼeda, ente ạtukʼ dakʼ do ańjetʼ rohoṛakana ar hahaṅkar reakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko hõ seṅgele jomakada." 
Joel2:1 Sionre sakwa oroṅpe, ińakʼ sonot burure muhin reakʼ soṅket baṛe ruipe. Disạmreko girobasokʼ kan sanam hoṛ doko thar tharaokʼ ma, ente Probhu Isorakʼ din do hijukʼkana; ona din do hecʼ sorakana." 
Joel2:2 Ona do ńut ar kaṛaṅ kucạṅ ńutakʼ dinge, hende rimil ar kaṛaṅ ńutakʼ dinge. Buru ar ḍuṅgriko cetanre cetʼleka aṅga hijukʼ reakʼ marsal pasnao idikʼ onkage maraṅ ar daṛean pohokoren phạdko hijukʼkana. Nonkan lạṛhại phạd do lahateakʼ jugre tishõ bako tahẽkana, ar oka jugko hijukʼkan unrehõ bako tahena." 
Joel2:3 Onko laha lahate do seṅgele jojomkana ar onko tayomte do seṅgel lepʼe roṅgokana. Onko samaṅre disạm do Eden bagwan leka, ar onko tayomre do ujạṛakʼ hahaṅkar; ona khon rukhiyạ do cetʼge bae ńameda." 
Joel2:4 Onkoakʼ muṭhạn do sadomleka; sadomre decʼakan lạṛhại phạdko leka ar onko doko ńir baṛaekana. 
Joel2:5 Rãt gạḍi reakʼ sabad leka, lanḍha jolokʼkan seṅgel reakʼ saḍe leka onko do buru cetanteko don hijukʼa. Onko do lạṛhại lạgitʼ sajao akan mitʼ dol daṛean lạṛhại phạdko lekage." 
Joel2:6 Onko ńelte jạtrenkoakʼ monre jontrona hoyokʼkana; sanamkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mirluṅ akantakoa. 
Joel2:7 Onko lạṛhại phạdko do lạṛhại bir lekako ńir baṛaekana, lạṛhại phạdko leka pạcriteko decʼ paromokʼkana. Onko do jotoge mitʼ sạrteko laha calakʼkana, ar akoakʼ hor khon bako ocogokʼkana." 
Joel2:8 Onko do apan ạpin cetanre bako lade ghugukʼkana; onko mimitʼko do samaṅ secʼko laha idikʼkana. Cetʼtege bako akoṭokʼkana onko do sạr sạrtegeko laha idikʼkana. 
Joel2:9 Onko do nagraha cetanre jhãpko ema, ar pạcri cetanteko ńir baṛaea; onko do oṛakʼ-duạrteko dejokʼa, ar kombṛo leka jalna secʼteko bolokʼa." 
Joel2:10 Onko samaṅre dhạrti do dal dalaokʼa, serma hõ thạl thạlokʼa, siń cando ar ńindạ cando dokin ńutokʼa ar ipilko hõ bako terdeja." 
Joel2:11 Probhu Isor do acʼren lạṛhại phạdko laha lahate acʼakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoytaea; uniren lạṛhại phạdko do lekhate ohoko caba daṛelena ar okoe uniyakʼ hukumko senakʼkan onko doko daṛeanko kana. Probhu Isorakʼ din do maraṅ ar ạḍi botorangea; okoe ona doe sahao daṛekea? 
Joel2:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńitokʼ do upạspe ar rakʼjoṅpe ar duk sodor salakʼ goṭa ontorte iń ṭhen ruạṛpe.”" 
Joel2:13 Apeakʼ kicricʼ do baṅ menkhan ontor oṛejtape. Aperen Probhu Isor ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe, ente uni do daya ar mãyãteye perecʼgea; uni do bae edre hodokʼa, uniyakʼ daya do asambheṛgetaea ar bạṛicʼakʼko iạteye kastaokʼkana." 
Joel2:14 Okoeye baḍaea, hoedaṛeakʼa uni do arhõ mone ạcur ruạṛtaea ar bhore em oṭokakʼa, jemon aperen Probhu Isor ńutumte jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar coḍor porobpe porob daṛeakʼ." 
Joel2:15 Ape do Sionre sakwa oroṅpe, ar sonot upạs reakʼ bebostaepe, ar mitʼṭecʼ sabha hoeocoype;" 
Joel2:16 ar hoṛko jarwakate Isor ńutumte begar dohokope; murubbiko mitʼ jaegare hoho jarwakope, toa ńuńuko ar gidrạko hõ jarwakope. Jãwãe ar bạhu kuṛi do ạkinakʼ aṭetʼkin bạgi oṭowakʼma." 
Joel2:17 Okoe Probhu Isor samaṅre sekʼwa kạmiko kạmikan onko naeke do koejoṅ oṛakʼ pinḍạ ar pinḍ talareko rakʼjoṅma. Onko doko menma, “E Probhu Isor amren hoṛko dayawakome. Amakʼ sompotti do landa dhutʼakʼ alom hoeocoya, ar jạt jạtrenko talare kạhtukko hõ alom hoyocokoa. Eṭakʼ jạtren hoṛ do cedakʼko mena, ‘onkoren Isor doe okayena?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Unre Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ disạm lạgitʼe ãṭokʼa ar acʼren hoṛkoe mãyãwakoa. 
Joel2:19 Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ katha reakʼe roṛ ruạṛakoteye mena, “Iń do ape ṭhen nãwã darkha rasa, sunum, ar phosolkoń kola, onatepe tirpitokʼa; ar jạt jạtrenko ṭhen ar tishõ landa dhutʼanko do bạń hoyocopea." 
Joel2:20 “Utạr secʼ khon hijukʼkan lạṛhại phạdko do ape ṭhen khoniń sạṅgiń giḍikakoa; khaṅgoṭ ar jarkhar akan hahaṅkar jaega secʼ iń laga ńirkoa. Onko samaṅ secʼrenko do purub jalapurire ar onko tayom secʼrenko do pạchim jalapuriteń lagakoa. Onkoakʼ bạṛicʼ so do cetante rakapʼa ar seage so oḍokokʼa, ente onkoakʼ kạmi do bạḍạite perecʼge takoa.”" 
Joel2:21 E Jihudạ disạm, alom botorokʼa; am do kusikʼme, rạskạkʼme, ente Probhu Isor do maraṅ maraṅakʼkoe kạmiakada." 
Joel2:22 E ṭạnḍiren janwarko, alope botorokʼa, ente ạtiń ṭạnḍi do hạriạ̃ṛ akana. Darekore jo hõ sapʼakana; loa dare ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩ hõ ḍher jo akana." 
Joel2:23 E Sionren hoṛko, ma kusikokʼpe, aperen Probhu Isor iạte rạskạkʼpe, ente uniyakʼ dhorom iạte uni do laha dakʼe emapekana. Uni do ape lạgitʼ asecʼ tasecʼ dakʼe emokʼkana, pạhil lekage uni do laha ar tayom dakʼe emapekana." 
Joel2:24 Khạrại do phosolkote perejokʼtapea; bhajan khon darkha rasa ar sunum do se oḍokokʼa. 
Joel2:25 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Ińren maraṅ lạṛhại phạdko okoe do ape ṭheniń kolletʼko metakʼme jhãke jhãk pohoko, jaljalte jojom pohoko, dodonkan pohoko ar rehetʼ jojom pohoko ar jom ṭhuṭkutʼ pohoko tinạkʼ bochor hạbicʼ apeakʼ phosolko jomakatʼ ona doń sodkatapea." 
Joel2:26 Ape do lacʼ bikʼpe joma arpe tirpitokʼa ar aperen Probhu Isorpe sarhaoea one uni ape lạgitʼ hahaṛa kạmikoe kạmi akatʼ; ar ińren hoṛ do ar tishõ bako lajao ocokʼa. 
Joel2:27 Unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, ińge Israelko talare minạńa ar iń kangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do, ar iń do eṭagicʼ doń baṅkana; ińren hoṛ do ar tishõ bako lajao ocokʼa." 
Joel2:28 “Ona tayom iń do sanam hoṛko cetanre ińren Jiu iń dulea. Onate aperen hopon ar hoponerako do nạbi lekate Isorakʼ kathako roṛa, ar aperen haṛam hoṛ do kukmũko ńela ar aperen juạnko hõ dorsonko ńama." 
Joel2:29 Ona jokhecʼ ińren guti ar kạ̃ṛmĩko cetanre hõ ińren Jiu iń dulea. 
Joel2:30 Iń do serma ar otre hahaṛawakʼ ghoṭnakoń uduga, metakʼme mãyãm, seṅgel ar ḍher dhũạgeń uduga." 
Joel2:31 Probhu Isorakʼ ona maraṅ ar botoranakʼ din hijukʼ lahare siń cando doe ńutokʼa ar ńindạ cando do mãyãm lekae hoyokʼa. 
Joel2:32 Unre rukhiyạ ńam lạgitʼ jãhãege Probhu Isore hohowae uni do rukhiyại ńama, ente Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka Sion bururen ar Jerusalemren adom hoṛ do rukhiyạko ńama. Isor okoeye bachao akatʼko onko do rukhiyạ akan hoṛ talareko tahena." 
Joel3:1 “Ańjompe, onako dinre ar onako oktere Jihudạ ar Jerusalem do tinre lahate lekań beretʼ ruạṛa," 
Joel3:2 unre iń do sanam jạtrenkoń jarwa mitʼkoa ar Jehosaphat reakʼ buru nalareń pheḍ ạgukoa. Onḍe ińakʼ sompotti, metakʼme ińren hoṛ Israelko reaṅ onko upạrteń bicạra, ente jạt jạtrenko tala khon onko do ińren hoṛko chirchạturletʼkoa ar ińakʼ disạmko hạṭińjoṅan tahẽkana." 
Joel3:3 Onko do ińren hoṛko hạṭińko reakʼko gulibãṭleda ar kusumbi ńamko lạgitʼ Israelren hoponkoko ạkhrińletʼkoa; ar darkha rasa lạgitʼ hõ Israelren hoponerako ạkhrińletʼkoa jemon darkha rasako ńũ daṛeakʼ. 
Joel3:4 “Ńitokʼ do E Tur, Sidon ar Philisṭi reakʼ sanam ṭoṭhako, iń sãote apeakʼ do cetʼ? Ape do cetʼ iń cetanrepe hala hạkʼli kana? Iń cetanre hala hạlipe menetʼ khan ape okape cekae iń hõ apeakʼ bohokʼre usạrate onań paṛao ocoya." 
Joel3:5 Ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, ape do ińakʼ sona ar rupạpe hatao akada ar ińakʼ joto khon damanakʼ jinisko apeakʼ mundilrepe aderakada." 
Joel3:6 Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛko do akoakʼ disạm khon sạṅgiń giḍikako lạgitʼ Junạniko ṭhenpe ạkhrińletʼkoa. 
Joel3:7 “Ańjompe, okako ṭhạ̃ikore onkope ạkhriń akatʼko onḍe khon iń do onkoń hoho ạgukoa ar ape okaṭakʼpe ceka akatʼ onage apeakʼ bohokʼreń ruạṛapea." 
Joel3:8 Aperen hopon ar hoponerako do Jihudạren hoṛ ṭheniń ạkhrińkoa ar onko do sạṅgińre menakʼko Saba jạtren ṭhenko ạkhrińkoa.” Noa katha do Probhu Isorgeye menetʼkana. 
Joel3:9 Ape do jạt jạtrenko talare niạ katha lại sodorpe; “Sonot lạṛhại lạgitʼ sapṛao akae tahenpe, ar daṛean hoṛko hoho ạgukope. Ar sanam lạṛhại phạdko do senkate jhãpko em ma." 
Joel3:10 Apeakʼ nahel reakʼ phalkote do tarwaṛeko koṭecʼ benaojoṅpe ar kạidạkote do borlomge benaojoṅpe. Ar nijoran hoṛ doe menma, ‘iń doń daṛeangea.’" 
Joel3:11 E beṛhaeten sanam jạtrenko, ape do usạra hecʼkate jarwakʼpe.” E Probhu Isor, amren daṛean hoṛko baṛe kolkakome." 
Joel3:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jạt jạtrenko doko hoho ạgu ocokʼ ma; onko do Jehosaphat reakʼ buru nalateko sen idikʼma, ente onḍe iń do beṛhaeten sanam jạtrenko bicạrko lạgitʼ iń duṛupʼa." 
Joel3:13 Onkoakʼ dusṭạmi do ḍhergetakoa, ona iạte ma datrom calaope, ente phosol do bele akana. Ape do hecʼkate darkha jo lenpe, ente darkha jo lelen reakʼ kunḍ do cehel cepel akana. Darkha rasa reakʼ bhajan khon rasa do se oḍokokʼ kana.”" 
Joel3:14 Sạjại reakʼ lodamre ḍher hoṛkoakʼ bhiṛ, hẽ ḍher hoṛkoakʼ bhiṛge hoyakana, ente sạjại reakʼ lodamre Probhu Isorakʼ din do seṭer akana." 
Joel3:15 Siń cando ar ńindạ cando dokin ńutokʼa ar ipilko do marsal bako emokʼa. 
Joel3:16 Probhu Isor do Sion khone hạnḍrạukʼa, ar Jerusalem khon acʼakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoytaea; serma ar ot do dal dalaokʼa. Menkhan Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛkoren hirlại hoyokʼa." 
Joel3:17 Probhu Isore meneda, “Unrepe baḍaea daṛeakʼa, ińkangeạń aperen Probhu Isor do; ińge Sionre, ińakʼ sonot burureń girobasokʼ kana. Jerusalem do sonotokʼa; ar bidisiạko hõ onḍe do tishõ bako calakʼa." 
Joel3:18 “Enhilokʼ maraṅ buruko khon nãwã darkha rasako ńamokʼa ar huḍiń buruko khon do toage. Jihudạ reakʼ sanam dakʼ ạtukʼ nalako khon do dakʼ ạtu oḍokokʼa. Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ khon hõ mitʼṭecʼ jharna phuṭạukʼte Siṭim reakʼ buru nalare dakʼe emakʼa. 
Joel3:19 Menkhan Misor do dhaṅdhaserakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa ar Edom do jarkharakʼ hahaṅkar hoyokʼa, ente Jihudạren hoṛko cetanre santao hoyakana ar onkoakʼ disạmre bin dusạnkoakʼ mãyãm joro ocoakana." 
Joel3:20 Lahate noko do dusi menteń lekhaletʼkoa, menkhan ńitokʼ do onkoakʼ doskoń ikạkatakoa. Ar hoṛko do Jihudạre jaejugko girobasokʼa ar Jerusalemre do piṛhike piṛhi hạbicʼge, ar iń Probhu Isorge Sionreń tahena.”" 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Tekoaren gukʼpiko modre Amos hõ mitʼhoṛe tahẽkana. Unre Jihudạren raj do Usiạ ar Israelren raj do Joasren hopon Jerobiame tahẽkana. Dhạrti laṛaokʼ bar bochor lahare Israel babotre Isor okae udukʼade tahẽkan onage Amos doe lại jạhirleda. 
Amos1:2 Amose menkeda, “Probhu Isor do Sion khone hạnḍrạukʼkana ar Jerusalem khon do acʼakʼ ãṭ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoyeda. Onate gukʼpikoakʼ ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do ṭonḍaṅokʼ kana ar Karmel buru muthni reakʼ dareko do gujukʼkana.”" 
Amos1:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Damesek reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige onkoń sạjạikoa, ente mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ jạnumanakʼ enokʼ paṭate onko do Gileadko en akadea." 
Amos1:4 Ona iạte iń do Hasael reakʼ raj oṛakʼ cetanre seṅgeliń kola; ona do Benhadadakʼ gaṛkoe joma. 
Amos1:5 Iń do Damesek reakʼ huṛkạṛ koń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa; ar Awen reakʼ lodamre hoṛko ar Beth-Edenre okoeṭakʼ hoṛ do raj ṭheṅgae sapʼakatʼ uni doń marao giḍikaea. Ar Aramren hoṛ do bondikate Kirteko idi ocokʼa.” 
Amos1:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Gasa reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige onkoń sạjạikoa, ente onko sanam hoṛ do bondikate Edomakʼ tireko jimạ ocoakana." 
Amos1:7 Ona iạte iń do Gasa reakʼ pạcri bhit upạrte seṅgeliń kola; ona do uniyakʼ gaṛkoe jomtaea. 
Amos1:8 Iń do Asdosren hoṛkoakʼ ar Askelonre okoeṭakʼ hoṛ raj ṭheṅgae sapʼakatʼ uniń marao utạrea. Iń do Ekron upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń tiyạrtińạ, onate Philisṭiren sarecʼ hoṛ doko gujukʼa.”" 
Amos1:9 Probhu Isore meneda, “Tur reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige onkoń sạjạikoa, ente boeha tulucʼ boehawakʼ bondobos nihạ̃t giḍikate onko do adom atoren sanam hoṛ bondikate Edomakʼ tireko jimạ akatʼkoa." 
Amos1:10 Ona iạte iń do Tur reakʼ bhit upạrte seṅgeliń kola; ona do uniyakʼ gaṛkoe joma.” 
Amos1:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Edom reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige onkoń sạjạikoa, ente sanam daya mãyã bạgikate uni do tarwaṛeante acʼren boehako khudạu akadea. Ona chaḍa botoranakʼ edre do onkore ńelokʼkangea ar onako dohoakada." 
Amos1:12 Onate iń do Teman upạrte seṅgeliń kola; ona do Bosrawakʼ gaṛkoe joma.” 
Amos1:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “Amon reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige onkoń sạjạikoa, ente simạna baṛhaotako lạgitʼ onko do Gileadren bhạrti hoṛmo maejiukoakʼ lacʼko cirạ akatʼtakoa." 
Amos1:14 Ona lạṛhại dinre botoranakʼ birbão hoe leka lạṛhại talare iń do Rahab reakʼ bhit upạrte seṅgeliń kola; ar ona do uniyakʼ gaṛkoe joma. 
Amos1:15 Uniren raj ar uniren disạm cakʼlaoko do mitʼ sãote bondikateko idi ocokʼa.” 
Amos2:1 Probhu Isore meneda, “Moab reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige uniń sạjạiyea, ente uni do Edomren rajakʼ jaṅkoe lo torocʼ akatʼtaea." 
Amos2:2 Onatege iń do Moab upạrte seṅgeliń kola; ona do Keriot reakʼ gaṛkoe joma. Lạṛhại reakʼ hoho ar sakwa saḍe reakʼ gulmal talare Moab doe gujukʼa. 
Amos2:3 Uniren raj doń marao giḍikaea ar uni sãote uniren sanam disạm cakʼlaoko hõń gocʼkoa.” 
Amos2:4 Probhu Isore meneda, “Jihudạ reakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige uniń sạjạiyea, ente uniren hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ ạn-ạriko bebatao akada, ar uniyakʼ niạmko bako dohoakada. Onkoren hapṛamko okoe do eṛe debotako pańjaletʼko onkage onko hõ bạṛicʼ horteko senakana." 
Amos2:5 Ar onatege iń do Jihudạ cetanre seṅgeliń kola; ona do Jerusalem reakʼ gaṛkoe joma.” 
Amos2:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Israelakʼ pea ghạṭ iạte, hẽ, ponea ghạṭ iạte iń do khạṭige uniń sạjạiyea. Uniren hoṛ do ṭaka poesa lạgitʼ dhorom hoṛko ar jaṅga reakʼ mitʼ joṛa panahe lạgitʼ reṅgecʼ hoṛko ạkhriń akatʼkoa." 
Amos2:7 Onko do dhuṛiko eretʼkan lekage reṅgecʼ hoṛko eretʼkoa ar nandanko do hor khonko ṭhelao ocokʼetʼkoa. Apat ar hopon do ini mitʼ maejiu sãotegekin laṭghaṭetʼ kana ar nonkate onko do ińakʼ sonot ńutumko besonotetʼtińạ. 
Amos2:8 Onko do mitʼke mitʼ pinḍ ṭhen senkate bondhok hatao akatʼ kicricʼreko jạpitʼetʼkana. Onkoakʼ koejoṅ oṛakʼre onko do juribana reakʼ ṭakate darkha rasako ńũjoṅkana. 
Amos2:9 “E Israelren hoṛko, Amoriko do debdạru dare leka usul ar Elon dare leka daṛeanko tahẽkanre hõ enhõ onko Amoriko do ape samaṅregeń marao giḍiletʼkoa. Iń do onkoakʼ rehetʼ ar jo sudhạgeń maraoletʼtakoa." 
Amos2:10 Amorikoakʼ disạm emape lạgitʼ ińge Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạguketʼpea ar hahaṅkarre pongel bochor hạbicʼ iń ạyurletʼpea. 
Amos2:11 E Israelren hoṛko, noa do cetʼ sạri katha baṅkana, one aperen hoponko mod khon adom do nạbiko ar adom do nasriạkoń bachaoan tahẽkana mente?" 
Amos2:12 Menkhan ape do nạsriko darkha rasape ńũ ocoletʼkoa ar nạbi lekate katha roṛ hõ bape roṛ ocowatʼkoa. 
Amos2:13 “Binḍạte perecʼ bhạri sagaṛte jãhãnakʼ ten len khan cetʼleka chakachunokʼ onkage ape hõ ńitokʼ doń chaka chunpea. 
Amos2:14 Okoe usạrako dạṛ daṛeakʼ onko do apnarte ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelena ar lạṛhại birko hõ akoakʼ jiwi do ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelea. 
Amos2:15 Dhinkiạ hõ ohoko teṅgo ṭarhao daṛelea, ar coṭkarko dạṛ daṛeakʼ hoṛ hõ bako dạṛ daṛeakʼa; hẽ, aswariko hõ akoakʼ jiwi do ohoko rukhiyạ daṛelea." 
Amos2:16 Lạṛhại birko talare okoe do joto khone dilan hoṛkan unihõ enhilokʼ do laṅṭakateye ńirjoṅa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Amos3:1 E Israelren hoṛko, ape upạrte, metakʼme Probhu Isor okoe do Misor disạm khone oḍok ạgu akatʼko onko jạtren sanamko upạrte uni okae menakatʼ ona ańjompe:" 
Amos3:2 “Dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko tala khon iń do eken apegeń bachao akatʼpea; ar onate apeakʼ sanam kại iạte apegeń sạjạipea.” 
Amos3:3 Laha khon jãhãe bạkin ṭhik dohole khan cetʼ mitʼ sãotekin calao daṛekokʼa? 
Amos3:4 Sikạr bae ńamle khan kul do cetʼ gajaṛ khone hạnḍrạukʼgea? Ar jãhãnicʼ bae sapʼ daṛeae khan dhạcri kul do cetʼ acʼakʼ danderreye gondraokea? 
Amos3:5 Jhampare jãhãn laoṭa bae tahelen khan cẽṛẽ do cetʼ jhampa ṭhene hijukʼgea? Jãhãnicʼ bae siṭạpʼlen khan siṭạpʼ do cetʼ phetʼ rakabokʼgea? 
Amos3:6 Nagrahare sakwa reakʼ saḍe ańjomle khan hoṛ do cetʼ bako botorokʼa? Probhu Isor bae hoyocole khan nagrahare cetʼ muhin do paṛaokʼa? 
Amos3:7 Probhu Isor do acʼren guti nạbiko ṭhen acʼakʼ jãhãnakʼ goṭawakʼ bae sodorle khan cetʼge ohoe cekalea. 
Amos3:8 Dhạcri kule hạnḍrạulere okoe hale bae botorkokʼa? Probhu Isor roroṛe metae khan nạbi lekate katha do okoe hale bae nạbikea? 
Amos3:9 Ape do Asdod ar Misor reakʼ sanam gaṛren hoṛko ṭhen roṛpe, “Ar Samariạ reakʼ buruko cetanre jarwakʼpe; ńelpe, ona talare tinạkʼ gulmal hoyokʼkana! Uniren hoṛko talare tinạkʼ santao hoyokʼkana!”" 
Amos3:10 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Onko do hokakʼ kạmi bako baḍaekana; onko do gaṛko talare julum ar luṭ reakʼ jinisko doho jarwa akawana. Onatege mitʼṭen bạiri do onkoakʼ disạme gherao esetʼeda; ar onkoakʼ dakʼram gaṛkoe rạpudtakoa ar gaṛkoe luṭjoṅa.”" 
Amos3:11  
Amos3:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “Gukʼpiyicʼ cetʼleka dhạcri kulakʼ moca khon jaṅga reakʼ eken barea jaṅ se lutur reakʼ mitʼ kuṭrại rukhiyạ daṛeakʼ onkage Israelren okoeko hoṛ Samariạreko girobasokʼ kan onko do eken onkoakʼ ṭenḍar mạci reakʼ mitʼ konac ar parkom reakʼ kuṭrạgeko rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa.”" 
Amos3:13 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Ańjompe ar Jakobren bõsko sontorkope." 
Amos3:14 Kại iạte oka hilokʼ Israeliń sạjạiye enhilokʼ do Bethel reakʼ pinḍko hõń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa; unre pinḍ reakʼ dereńko do otre rạputʼ ńurokʼa. 
Amos3:15 Iń do rabaṅ din oṛakʼ ar oṛakʼ banargeń rạpuda; ar hạti ḍaṭate kạmi akatʼ oṛakʼ do nosṭokʼa ar maraṅ maraṅ oṛakʼko do maraokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Amos4:1 E Samariạ buru cetan reakʼ Basonren mãṛ bitkilko, ańjompe baṛe. Ape do reṅgecʼ hoṛpe santaoetʼkoa ar nandanko dope lebetʼ jạuetʼkoa ar aperen jãwãe dope metakokana, “Bubulakʼ ạgualepe.”" 
Amos4:2 Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sonottetʼ reakʼ kiriạteye meneda, “Ona okte do khạṭige daraekana tinre ạṅkuskotepe bạkupʼ idi ocokʼa; ape sanamkoge ạṅkustepe or idi ocokʼa." 
Amos4:3 Ape mimitʼko do lạnduṛakan bhit secʼtegepe or oḍok ocokʼa ar Hermon secʼpe giḍi ocokʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana. 
Amos4:4 “Ape do Betheltepe calakʼa arpe ghạṭa; Gilgalte senkate arhõ bạ̃ṛtipe ghạṭa. Din hilokʼ setakʼ reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ar pepe din hilokʼre apeakʼ gel hạṭiń reakʼ mitʼ hạṭiń jiniskope idiyetʼkana. 
Amos4:5 Ape do gun manao reakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lekate khạmiyanakʼ piṭhạpe samaṅetʼa ar apeakʼ monejoṅakʼ lekage samaṅokʼakʼ jiniskote bạḍạitepe perejokʼkana, ente E Israelko, ape do onagepe kusiyakʼkana. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana." 
Amos4:6 “Iń do arhõń menetʼkana, mimitʼ nagrahare reṅgecʼteń dohoketʼpea ar mimitʼ atorenko do piṭhạ reakʼ ṭonṭateń dohoketʼkoa; enhõ ape do iń ṭhen bape ruạṛlena." 
Amos4:7 Irokʼ din pe cando ạuri tiyogokʼrege iń do ape cetanre jạṛi dakʼ iń akoṭkeda. Mitʼṭecʼ atore jạṛi dakʼ kolkate eṭakʼ atore do bạń dakʼ ocowada. Mitʼṭecʼ khet do dakʼte lohotʼena, ar eṭakʼ khet do dakʼ begorte khaṅgoṭena." 
Amos4:8 Dakʼ lạgitʼ ape do ḍhoya ḍhape mitʼ ato khon eṭakʼ atope senlena menkhan tirpitokʼ leka dakʼ do bape ńamleda; enhõ ape do iń ṭhen bape ruạṛ hecʼlena. 
Amos4:9 Ạḍi dhao apeakʼ bagwan ar darkha bagwanko jhãoraokʼteń ńẽtʼketʼa ariń ujạṛketʼtapea. Apeakʼ loa dare ar jạitun dareko do pohoko jomkeda; enhõ ape do iń ṭhen bape ruạṛ hecʼlena. 
Amos4:10 Misorre cetʼlekań kolletʼ onkage ape talare iń do mahamạriń kolkeda. Ar lạṛhại hotete aperen juạnkoń gocʼketʼkoa ar aperen sadomkoń idiketʼkoa. Apeakʼ chạuni reakʼ bạṛicʼ so do mũreyiń jiyatʼpea; enhõ ape do iń ṭhen bape ruạṛ hecʼlena. 
Amos4:11 Ińge aperen Isor do cetʼleka Sodom ar Gomorań maraoletʼ onkage aperen ḍherkogeń maraoketʼkoa. Ape do seṅgel khon halaṅ rakapʼ akatʼ jolokʼkan ṭhuṭkutʼ leka kanape, enhõ ape do iń ṭhen bape ruạṛ hecʼlena." 
Amos4:12 Onatege E Israel, iń do khạṭige am sãote nonkań beohara. Ona iạte E Israel, amren Isor samaṅre teṅgokʼ lạgitʼ ma sapṛaokʼme.”" 
Amos4:13 Disạipe, okoe buru boṭkocʼkoe benao akatʼ, ar hoeye sirjạu akatʼ ar manwa ṭhen acʼakʼ ganḍon joṅakʼkoe sodor ocoy, okoe do marsale ńut ocoy ar dhạrti reakʼ buru boṭkocʼko cetanteye daṛan kan uniyakʼ ńutum do phạdkoren Probhu Isorge." 
Amos5:1 E Israelren hoṛko, ape reaṅ iń homor halaṅetʼkan ona baṛe ańjompe." 
Amos5:2 “Kũạri kuṛi Israel doe gurena, ar tishõ bae beretʼ daṛeakʼa; uni do acʼakʼ ot reye giḍi ocoakana, ar uni berede lekan do celege bạnukʼkoa.”" 
Amos5:3 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Israelakʼ oka nagraha khon mitʼ hajar daṛean hoṛko oḍokʼ senokʼkan tahẽkan onaren do mitʼsae jiwetʼko tahena, arhõ okaṭakʼ ato khon mitʼsae daṛean hoṛko oḍokʼ senokʼkan tahẽkan onaren do gel goṭen jiwetʼko tahena.”" 
Amos5:4 Probhu Isor do Israelren hoṛkoe metakokana, “Iń ṭhen hijukʼpe, enḍekhanpe bańcaokʼa." 
Amos5:5 Ape do Bethel se Gilgal se Ber-sebate alope calakʼa, ente Gilgalren hoṛ do khạṭige bondikate eṭakʼ disạmteko idi ocokʼa ar Bethel do ạuṛiyakʼge hoyokʼa.”" 
Amos5:6 Probhu Isor ṭhen calakʼpe enḍekhanpe bańcaokʼa; ar baṅkhan uni do seṅgel leka Josephren, metakʼme Israelren hoṛko talareye jol rakabokʼa. Ar seṅgel do onae joma ar Bethelren okoehõ ona do bako ĩṛĩcʼ daṛeakʼa." 
Amos5:7 Ape do hok reakʼ bicạrpe haṛhatʼ ocoyetʼkana ar dhorom do otrepe lebda giḍikakʼkana. 
Amos5:8 Okoe do soren-ipilko ar arãṛ lalakʼ ipilkoe benao akatʼko, ar okoe do ńute marsal ocoyetʼkan ar siń doe ńut ocoyetʼkan, okoe do jalapuri reakʼ dakʼe hoho ạguiyetʼte pirthimi cetanreye dul bubhạuetʼ, uniyakʼ ńutum do Probhu Isor kangea." 
Amos5:9 Uni do daṛeanko cetanre ar onkoakʼ gaṛko cetanre ackage ceṭer leka jarkhare ạguiya ar onakoe marao utạra. 
Amos5:10 Okoe do nagraha reakʼ phaṭokre behokakʼ upạrteye teṅgonkan uni dope hirkhạwaekana ar okoe sạriyakʼ kathakoe roṛetʼkan uni dope nihạ̃t edekana. 
Amos5:11 Ape do reṅgecʼ hoṛpe santaoetʼkoa ar jor julumkate onko ṭhen khon guhumpe ạdạiyetʼkana. Ape do dhiri reakʼ maraṅ maraṅ oṛakʼkope benaojoṅ kangea menkhan onare do bape girobas daṛeakʼa. Ape do mońj darkha bagwanpe benao joṅkangea enhõ ona reakʼ darkha rasa do bape ńũ ńama. 
Amos5:12 Ińiń baḍaea apeakʼ behokʼakʼko do tinạkʼ ḍhertapea ar apeakʼ ghạṭko hõ tinạkʼ bạ̃ṛtitapea mente! Ape do dhorom hoṛpe santaoetʼkoa ar ghuspe jomeda; ar nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạr ṭhen reṅgecʼ hoṛkoakʼ hok reakʼ do bape bicạretʼa. 
Amos5:13 Ar onatege budan hoṛ do nonkan oktere thir hape akane tahenkana, ente okte do bạṛicʼgea." 
Amos5:14 Ape jemonpe bańcao daṛeakʼ ona lạgitʼ bhageakʼko khudạupe, bạṛicʼakʼ do baṅa; enḍekhan cetʼlekape roṛ baṛae onkage sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor do sạrige ape sãoteye tahena." 
Amos5:15 Bạṛicʼakʼ hirkhạwakʼpe, ar bhageakʼ dulạṛpe; nagraha reakʼ phaṭok duạrkore hok reakʼ bicạr rukhiyạitape. Israelren sarecʼ jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko cetanre sanam daṛeante perecʼ Probhu Isor doe daya botecʼkokʼge coṅ cetʼ coṅ." 
Amos5:16 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe meneda, “Nagraha reakʼ mitʼke mitʼ phaelao ṭhạ̃ire hoṛko homor halaṅa ar mitʼke mitʼ horre doko hae haeyokʼa. Hẽ, dukokʼkanko sãote homor halaṅ lạgitʼ cacasko hõko hoho ocokʼa." 
Amos5:17 Sanam darkha khetkorege homor halaṅ do hoyokʼgea ente iń do apeko talateń parom calakʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Amos5:18 Hae ape do! Ape do ahkaokʼ salakʼ Probhu Isorakʼ din ńeljoṅpe khojkana! Ar cedakʼ ona din lạgitʼ dope gorojokʼkana? Ape ṭhen ona din do marsal reakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa menkhan ńut reakʼge hoyokʼa. 
Amos5:19 Ona din do dhạcri kul khon ńir bańcaokate bana eṅga samaṅreye paṛao akan hoṛ leka, one acʼakʼ oṛakʼte ńir bolokate bhitreye capoyen sãote biń do tiye sogakʼkede." 
Amos5:20 Probhu Isorakʼ din do marsal baṅkate cetʼ ńutakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa? Jhalkaokʼ marsal khon cetʼ kaṛaṅ ńutakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa? 
Amos5:21 Probhu Isore meneda, “Apeakʼ porobko doń hirkhạwakʼkana, ar bạń moneyakʼkana, apeakʼ sabha do bạń sahao daṛeakʼkana." 
Amos5:22 Ape do iń ńutumte jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ ar jomakʼ samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅrele hõ iń do ona bạń ataṅtapea. Ape do lodgopʼ janwarkote sulukren samaṅokʼakʼpe samaṅạńre hõ samaṅạńre hõ ona secʼ do bạń beṅgeda. 
Amos5:23 Apeakʼ sereń durạṅ do sạṅgiń giḍikakʼpe. Apeakʼ peṛesaṅ reakʼ mońj rãwãokʼ do bạń ańjomtapea. 
Amos5:24 Ona khon bickom hok do gaḍa leka ar dhorom do jaejug ạtukʼkan dakʼ leka baṛe hoyokʼma. 
Amos5:25 “E Israelren hoṛko, pongel bochor hahaṅkarrepe tahẽkanre ape do cetʼ iń ńutumte jãhãn janwar se eṭakʼ jiniskope samaṅ ạdiń tahẽkana?" 
Amos5:26 Ona do baṅa, bickom apeakʼ tite benaoicʼ raj-debota Sakuthakʼ muṭhạn ar ipil debota Kạyunakʼ muṭhạngepe gokʼ idileda." 
Amos5:27 Onate iń doń bondi ocopea ar Damesek hanasateń kolpea. Noa katha do iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda.” 
Amos6:1 Hae ape do! Ape do Sionre nicindpe tahenkana ar Samariạ buru do khạtirjomape hudisetʼkana. Ape do sanam khon maraṅ jạt Israelren namḍak hoṛ kanape ar ape ṭhenge Israelren hoṛ doko hijukʼkana. 
Amos6:2 Ape do Kalnete senkate ńelpe; ar onḍe khon maraṅ Hamatte calakʼpe, ar ona tayom do Philisṭikoakʼ Gat nagrahate calakʼpe. Ona rajosṭiko khon apeakʼ noakin rajosṭi do cetʼ bhagegea? Se onkoakʼ simạ khon apeakʼ simạ do cetʼ maraṅgea?" 
Amos6:3 Ape dope hudisetʼkana, muhin reakʼ din dope sạṅgiń giḍiakada, menkhan ape do jobor jạsti reakʼ rajosṭipe calaoeda." 
Amos6:4 Ape do hạti ḍaṭate benaoakʼ parkomrepe giticʼ akana ar apeakʼ palak parkomrepe tiyạr akana. Ape do aperen pal khonpe bachao akatʼko bhiḍi hopon ar goṛa tala khon mĩhũpe jometʼkoa. 
Amos6:5 Ape do peṛesaṅ banamatepe sereńetʼkana ar Dạudakʼ nana parkan bajnakope benaojoṅ kana. 
Amos6:6 Ape do bạṭi perecʼ darkha rasape ńũiyeda ar joto khon bhage so sunumpe ojokʼeda, menkhan Josephren, metakʼme Israelakʼ maraokʼ iạte do bape dukokʼ kana." 
Amos6:7 Onate okoe do bondikate eṭakʼ disạmteko idi ocokʼ onko modre apege pạhil thokren hoṛpe hoyokʼa; unre bhoj jom ar kunḍlạṅ hataṛokʼ do cabakʼtapea. 
Amos6:8 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ ńutumte kiriạkateye meneda, “Iń do Jakobakʼ bạḍại ar uniyakʼ gaṛkoń hirkhạwakʼ kana; onate apeakʼ nagraha ar onare menakʼ jotowakʼ do eṭakʼ hoṛakʼ tireń jimạkakʼa.”" 
Amos6:9 Mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼre gel goṭen hoṛ jiwetʼko tahẽlenre hõ onko doko gujukʼa. 
Amos6:10 Ona tayom jãhãeṭakʼ peṛage onako mạ̃ṛĩ do oḍok idikate rapakʼ giḍikakʼ lạgitʼe hijukʼa. Uni do oṛakʼ bhitrire bolokate ar jãhãe menakʼkoa se baṅa ona baḍae lạgitʼe kulijoṅa, “Am chaḍa ar jãhãe menakʼkoa?” Unre ona oṛakʼren hoṛe mena, “Baṅa, bạnukʼkoa.” Onate uni peṛa doe mena, “Hapekokʼme. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ ńutum hõ alom ńuma.”" 
Amos6:11 Probhu Isor do tinreye hukuma unre maraṅ maraṅakʼ oṛakʼko do rạputʼ dhaṅdhaserokʼa ar huḍiń huḍiń oṛakʼko do rạputʼ gejerokʼa. 
Amos6:12 Khaṛa burure cetʼ sadom doko kamsaokʼgea? Jalapurire cetʼ jãhãe do ḍaṅgrateye sikeya? Menkhan hok reakʼ bicạr ape do bis lekape hoyocoakada ar dhorom reakʼ jo dope haṛhatʼ ocoakada. 
Amos6:13 Am do Lo-dabarrem (mane do ‘Ạuṛiyakʼ ’) hat akatʼtem rạskạkʼkana, arhõm roṛ baṛayeda, “Ale do cetʼ apnarakʼ daṛete Korniạm (mane do ‘Daṛeanakʼ dereń’) do bale ạidạri akawana?”" 
Amos6:14 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israelren hoṛko, iń do ape upạrte mitʼṭen jạtreniń teṅgoyea. Uni do utạr secʼ reakʼ Hamat khon dạkhin reakʼ Araba buru lodam hạbicʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ireye santaopea.”" 
Amos7:1 Probhu Isor do noa dorsone ńel ocokedińạ: Dosarakʼ phosol jokhecʼ rajakʼ bhag reakʼ ghãs irketʼ tayom tinre ghãs do arhõ omon rakabokʼkan tahẽkana unre Probhu Isor do jhãke jhãk pohokoe ṭhik dohoketʼkoa. 
Amos7:2 Onko do tinre disạm reakʼ hạriạṛ dare sakamko jom cabakeda unre iń do nehõrkateń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ikạkakome baṛe. Jakob do cekateye teṅgo ruạṛokʼa? Uni ma coṅ ạḍiye huḍińge.”" 
Amos7:3 Unre Probhu Isor do mone ạcurketʼteye menkeda, “Onka do ar baṅ hoyokʼa.”" 
Amos7:4 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ar mitʼṭecʼ dorsone udukʼạdińa. Probhu Isor do sạjại emokʼ lạgitʼ seṅgele hohowadea. Ar ona seṅgel do jalapuriye jomkeda ar ot hõ jojome ehopʼena. 
Amos7:5 Unre iń do nehõrenteń menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, nehõramkạnạń ma thirokʼme. Jakob do cekateye teṅgo ṭarhaokʼa? Uni ma coṅe huḍińge.”" 
Amos7:6 Unre Probhu Isor do ona ńutumte kastaoenteye menkeda, “Onka do ar baṅ hoyokʼa.”" 
Amos7:7 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do ar mitʼṭecʼ dorsone ńel ocokedińa. Uni do sạhul baber hataokate sạhul baber jokhate benaoakʼ mitʼṭecʼ bhit aṛereye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Amos7:8 Uni doe metadińạ, “Amos, cetʼem ńeleda?” Ińiń roṛ ruạṛadea, “Mitʼṭecʼ sạhul baber.” Unre Probhu Isore menkeda, “Ińren hoṛ Israelko talare iń do mitʼṭecʼ sạhul baber iń dohoyeda; onko do ar bạń dayawakoa." 
Amos7:9 Isahak bõsren hoṛkoakʼ than boṭkocʼko ar Israelakʼ koejoṅ reakʼ eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃iko do maraokʼ giḍikʼa. Iń do tarwaṛete Jerobiam bõsrenko upạrteń teṅgona.” 
Amos7:10 Tayomte Bethelren naeke Amasiạ do Israelren raj Jerobiam ṭhen noa khobore kolkeda, “Amos do Israelko talare am upạrte mitʼṭecʼe soṛojontroyetʼkana. Disạmren hoṛko do uniyakʼ katha bako sahao daṛeakʼkana." 
Amos7:11 Amose meneda, ‘Jerobiam do tarwaṛeteye gocʼ ocokʼa ar Israel do khạṭige acʼakʼ disạm khon eṭakʼ disạmteye bondi idi ocokʼa.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Unre Amasiạ do Amose metadea, “E ńeńelicʼ, am do sạṅgińokʼme. Ar Jihudạ disạmte calakʼme. Onḍege nạbiyme ar jom ạsulokʼme." 
Amos7:13 Bethelre do ar alom nạbiya, ente noa do rajakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃ikana ar rajosṭi reakʼ mundil kana.”" 
Amos7:14 Amos do Amasiại roṛ ruạṛdea, “Iń do nạbi hõ bạń tahẽkana, ar nạbiren celahõ bạń tahẽkana; iń do mitʼṭen gupiyicʼgeń tahẽkana, ar loa darekoń ńel todarotetʼ tahẽkana." 
Amos7:15 Menkhan Probhu Isor do bhiḍi merom gukʼpi khone hoho ạgukedińteye metadińạ, ‘am do senkate ińren Israelko ṭhen nạbi lekate katha roṛme.’" 
Amos7:16 Enḍekhan ńitokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomme. Am dom menetʼkana, ‘Israel upạrte alom nạbiya ar Isahakakʼ bõsrenko upạrtehõ alom porcara.’" 
Amos7:17 Ar onatege Probhu Isor doe meneda, ‘amren bạhu do nagrahare kusumbiye hoyokʼa, ar amren hopon ar hoponerako do tarwaṛeteko gujukʼa. Amakʼ disạm do jokha baberteko hạṭińjoṅa ar am do mitʼṭecʼ bhonḍ disạmrem gujukʼa. Israelren hoṛ do khạṭige akoakʼ disạm khon eṭakʼ disạmteko bondi idi ocokʼa.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Probhu Isor do ar mitʼṭecʼ dorsone udukʼạdińa. Iń doń ńelkeda, mitʼ ḍạlicʼ jo." 
Amos8:2 Uni doe kulikedińa, “Amos, am do cetʼem ńeleda? Iń doń roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Mitʼ ḍạlicʼ jo.” Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Ińren hoṛ Israelakʼ okte do caba hecʼakana; iń do ar bạń sa paromkoa." 
Amos8:3 Enhilokʼ mundil reakʼ sereńko do jare jare hoyokʼa, ar ‘mạ̃ṛĩko do aemage hoyokʼa; ar onako do hape hapete goṭa ṭạnḍi giḍi akan tahena.’ ”" 
Amos8:4 Ape okoe do laṅgaṭkope lebetʼ gańjaoetʼko ar reṅgecʼ orecʼkope caba utạrletʼko, ape baṛe ańjompe." 
Amos8:5 Ape dope menetʼkana, “Molokʼ cando do tis baṅ cabakʼ jemon jomakʼle ạkhriń daṛeakʼ? Sabath din baṅ tis paromokʼ jemon bajarre senkate guhumle ạkhriń daṛeakʼ? Ale do sosoṅakʼ baṭkharale komaotalea, ar damle ḍhera, ar ṭhoka reakʼ tulạkole beohara," 
Amos8:6 rupạte reṅgecʼ hoṛle kirińkoa ar mitʼ joṛa panahete laṅgaṭkole kirińkoa ar jokʼ giḍiyakʼ guhum do onko ṭhenle ạkhrińa.” 
Amos8:7 Probhu Isor, okoe doe Jakobren ṭhonokanicʼ kan, uni do kiriạkateye meneda, “Onko okako kạmi akatʼ ona do tishõ bạń hiṛińokʼa." 
Amos8:8 Noa iạte cetʼ disạm do baṅ daldalaokʼa? Onare girobasokʼ kan jotoge cetʼ bako homor halaṅa? Goṭa disạmge Misor reakʼ nil gaḍa dakʼ leka se rakabokʼa ar ona tayom do pheḍ calakʼa.” 
Amos8:9 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Enhilokʼ tikin jokhecʼ siń cando doń hạsur ocoyea ar siń marsalrege dhạrti doń ńut ocoya." 
Amos8:10 Apeakʼ sanam hulạs do dukte ar sanam sereń doń homor halaṅ ocoya. Sanamkoge gõṛẽ kicricʼ iń horokʼ ocopea ar bohokʼ doń hoyo ceḍeytapea. Ona okte do sadher hoponakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ homor lekań hoeocoya ar ona do mucạtʼ hạbicʼ ạḍi dukge hoyokʼa.” 
Amos8:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Nonkan dinko daraekana tinre iń do disạm talare akaliń hoeocoya. Ona do jomakʼ reakʼ akal se dakʼ tetaṅ reakʼ akal do baṅ hoyokʼa menkhan Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjom lạgitʼ akalge hoyokʼa." 
Amos8:12 Hoṛko do Probhu Isorakʼ katha sendrae lạgitʼ purub khon pạchim ar utạr khon dạkhin hạbicʼko ạcur baṛaea, menkhan bako ńama." 
Amos8:13 Enhilokʼ ńelokʼte mońj juạn kuṛiko ar daṛean juạn koṛako do ona katha lạgitʼ tetaṅteko loraokʼa. 
Amos8:14 Onko okoe Samariạren boṅga ńutumte kiriạkateko men, ‘E Dan, amren jiwetʼicʼ debota ńutumtele kiriạkʼkana se, ‘Ber-sebaren jiwetʼicʼ debota ńutumtele kiriạkʼkana,’ onko doko bhindạṛokʼa, ar tishõ bako beretʼa.”" 
Amos9:1 Probhu Isor do pinḍ aṛere teṅgo akaniń ńelkedea. Uniye metadińa, “Khunṭi chatnako kuṭạmme jemon duạr saṅgako daldalaokʼte sanam hoṛkoakʼ bohokʼ cetanre rạputʼ ńurokʼ. Okoe jiwetʼko tahen onko do tarwaṛeteń gocʼkoa. Onko do celege bako ńir phoṛokʼa ar celege bako dạṛ paskaokʼa." 
Amos9:2 Onko do Sheol hạbicʼko la bololenre hõ ińakʼ ti do onḍe khon hõe oḍok ạgukoa. Ar coṭ sermateko rakapʼlenre hõ onḍe khoniń pheḍ ạgukoa. 
Amos9:3 Karmel buru muthnire apnartetʼko okolenre hõ iń do onḍe khoniń sendra oḍokkoa ariń sapʼạgukoa. Onko do jalapuri latarreko okolenre hõ onko gerko lạgitʼ bińiń hukumakoa. 
Amos9:4 Bạiriko hotete eṭakʼ disạmteko bondi idi ocolenre hõ onko gocʼko lạgitʼ tarwaṛeń hukumaea. Bhạlại lạgitʼ do baṅ menkhan bin bhạlại lạgitʼ onko cetanre mẽtʼ do tahentińạ.” 
Amos9:5 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do dhạrtiye joṭetʼ lekhan ona do le cabakʼa ar onare girobasokʼ kan sanamgeko homor halaṅa. Uniyakʼ joṭetʼte goṭa dhạrtige Misor reakʼ nil gaḍa dakʼ leka se rakabokʼa ar ona tayom do pheḍ calakʼa. 
Amos9:6 Uni do sermare acʼakʼ usul oṛakʼe benao akada ar dhạrti cetanre chamḍa leka sermae aṭetʼ akada; uni do jalapuri reakʼ dakʼe hoho ạguiyetʼa ar otreye dul bubhạu ocoyeda. Ar okoe noakoe kạmikan uniyakʼ ńutum do Probhu Isorge. 
Amos9:7 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israelren hoṛko, ape do cetʼ Kusrenko leka dope baṅkana? Iń do cetʼ Misor khon Israelko, Kapthor khon Philisṭiko ar Kir khon Aramrenko bạń ạguakatʼkoa?" 
Amos9:8 Ińakʼ mẽtʼ do khạṭige niạ ghạṭte perecʼ rajosṭi cetanre menakʼa. Dhạrti khon iń do onań marao giḍikakʼa; enhõ Jakobakʼ bõs do purạte bạń marao utạra. 
Amos9:9 Iń do hukumiń emokʼa, ar calate guhum cetʼlekako calae onkage sanam jạtrenko tala khon Israel bõsrenkoń calakoa, menkhan muṭkuri do mitʼṭecʼ hõ otre baṅ ńurokʼa." 
Amos9:10 Ińren sanam kại hoṛko modre okoeko men, ‘muhin do bae tiyokʼlea se ale ṭhen baṅ hijukʼa,’ onko sanamge tarwaṛeteko gujukʼa.”" 
Amos9:11 Probhu Isore meneda, “Enhilokʼ Dạudakʼ lạnduṛ akan oṛakʼ do arhõń beretʼ ruạṛa. Uniyakʼ rạputʼ ṭhạ̃ikoń jut aroya, ar dhaṅdhaserakʼ koń ṭhika ar lahate lekageń beretʼ ruạṛa." 
Amos9:12 Jemon Israelko do Edomren sarecʼ hĩs ar eṭakʼ jạtrenkoakʼ disạmko ạidạri daṛeakʼ.” Probhu Isor, okoe do noakoe kạmikan, unige noa katha doe meneda." 
Amos9:13 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Onako dinge darae kana tinre phosolko nunạkʼ ḍher hoyokʼa je, onako ạuri ir cabaerege arhõ cas lạgitʼ okte hijukʼa ar darkha jo hõ nunạkʼ jokʼa je, ona ạuriko len cabaerege arshõ rohoe okte hijukʼa. Maraṅ buruko khon nãwã darkha rasa ńamokʼa ar huḍiń buruko khon do ạtu ãṛgona." 
Amos9:14 Bondi dosare menakʼko ińren hoṛ Israelkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa; onko do dhaṅdhaser akan nagraha arhõko benao aroea ar onakoreko tahena. Onko do darkha bagwanko benaojoṅa arko ńũiya; onko do bagwanko benaoa ar ona reakʼ joko joma. 
Amos9:15 Israelko do akoakʼ disạmre dare lekań rohoekoa; okaṭakʼ disạmiń em akawatʼko onḍe khon onko do ar tishõ bako or totʼ giḍi ocokʼa.” Noa katha do aperen Probhu Isorgeye meneda. 
Obadiah1:1 Obodiạwakʼ dorson. Edom disạm babotre Probhu Isor do noa kathae roṛetʼkana. Ale do Probhu Isor ṭhen khon mitʼṭecʼ sombatle ańjom akada. Uni do jạt jạtrenko ṭhen mitʼṭecʼ goḍet kolkate noa katha lạlạiye metade tahẽkana, “Dela beretʼpe, Edom upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ bon oḍok calakʼa.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Probhu Isor do Edome metaekana, “Ńelme, jạt jạtrenko talareń huḍińmea; ar am dom nihạ̃t ocokʼa." 
Obadiah1:3 Am do huṭupʼ dhiri lopakʼrem girobasokʼ kana ar usul usul ṭhạ̃ikorem tahenkana ar mone monetem meneda, ‘okoe hale otre doe pheḍ daṛekińạ?’ Menkhan amakʼ ontor reakʼ bạḍạikoge am doe ṭhoka akatʼmea." 
Obadiah1:4 Am do pajhaṛ cẽṛẽ leka coṭrem ạphir baṛaekanre hõ ar ipilko talare oṛakʼem benaojoṅkanre hõ iń do onḍe khoniń or pheḍ ạgumea. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Obadiah1:5 “Hae, cetʼ lekan muhinge baṅ am lạgitʼe koyokʼ horakatʼ! Kombṛo am ṭhenko hecʼlenre; ar ḍạku hõ ńindạko hecʼlenre, onko do akoakʼ mone joṅakʼ lekageko kombṛo idiya. Ar darkha jo gogotʼ hoṛ am ṭhenko hecʼlenre am lạgitʼ thoṛa jo doko sarecʼ oṭokakʼgea." 
Obadiah1:6 Menkhan Esao do mitʼ dhaogeye luṭ ocokʼa, uniyakʼ dhon do jotoge luṭ idikʼtaea." 
Obadiah1:7 Amren sanam gate-rajosṭiko hõ amren ńir pharakokʼkan hoṛko akoakʼ simạna talate bako bolo ocoakoa. Ar amren gate hõ amko ṭhokamea ar ako secʼko or ạgumea; okoe amakʼko jometʼkan tahẽkan onko do am lạgitʼ jhãmpako oḍaoa, menkhan am do cetʼge bam bujhạu daṛeakʼa.”" 
Obadiah1:8 Probhu Isore menetʼkana, “Enhilokʼ iń do Edomren ạkilan hoṛko ar Esao buru khon bujan hoṛko cetʼ bạń maraokoa?" 
Obadiah1:9 E Teman, amren lạṛhại phạdko do heṛan botorko botorokʼa ar Esao bururen do sanamgeko gocʼ ocokʼa." 
Obadiah1:10 Amren boeha Jakob upạrte santao lạgitʼ am do lajaotem dapalokʼa; am do jaejug lạgitʼem marao utạrokʼa. 
Obadiah1:11 Eṭakʼ disạmren hoṛko do tinre Jakobakʼ dhon-duribko idiyetʼ tahẽkana ar uniyakʼ phaṭok duạr secʼte bolokate Jerusalem lạgitʼko gulibãṭletʼ tahẽkana unre am do sạṅgińre teṅgo akanem tahẽkana; ar onkoren mitʼ hoṛ lekam hoylena. 
Obadiah1:12 Am boehawakʼ hale ḍale oktere am do ạḍitetʼem kusiyena, ar Jihudạren hoṛkoakʼ maraokʼ dinre onko babotrem hulạsena ar onkoakʼ kosṭo hilokʼre do bạḍạitem perecʼlena." 
Obadiah1:13 Ińren hoṛkoakʼ muhin hilokʼre am do onkoakʼ phaṭok duạrkotem boloyena, onkoakʼ maraokʼ hilokʼ onkoakʼ muhim ńelte ạḍim kusiyena ar onkoakʼ dhon-duribem luṭana," 
Obadiah1:14 onkoren dạdạṛkan hoṛko gocʼko lạgitʼ onkoakʼ horrem tãṛãkʼlena, ar onkoakʼ kosṭokʼ hilokʼre onkoren paskaolen hoṛko do bạirikoakʼ tirem soprotketʼkoa. Noako am lạgitʼ lek do baṅ tahẽkana." 
Obadiah1:15 “Sanam jạtrenko lạgitʼ Probhu Isorakʼ din do sor hecʼakana. Am cetʼkom ceka akatʼ onkage amre hõ hoyokʼa; amakʼ kạmi reakʼ jo do amakʼ bohokʼ cetanrege ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Obadiah1:16 Ińakʼ sonot burure cetʼleka bubulakʼem ńũletʼ onkage sanam jạtrenko do jaoge ińakʼ edre reakʼ bubulakʼko ńũiya; onko do ona jojomtegeko tahena ar purạteko caba utạrokʼa. 
Obadiah1:17 Menkhan Sion bururen adom hoṛko do rukhiyạko ńama; onko do Isor ńutumte begar akan hoṛ kanako. Ar Jakobakʼ bõsren hoṛ do akoakʼ sompottiko ńama. 
Obadiah1:18 Jakobakʼ bõsren doko hoyokʼa seṅgel ar Josephakʼ bõsrenko do seṅgel reakʼ lepʼge; Esao bõsrenko do lanḍha lekako hoyokʼa ar ona seṅgel do onakoe lo torocʼkoa. Esao bõsren do celege jiwetʼ bako tahena. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Obadiah1:19 Negebre tahenkan Israelrenko do Esaoakʼ buruko dokhol joṅa ar latar buru ṭoṭharen hoṛ do Philisṭikoakʼ disạmko ạidạri joṅa. Onko do Ephrayim ar Samariạ reakʼ ṭhạ̃iko dokhol joṅa ar Benjạmin Gilead ṭoṭhako ạidạri joṅa. 
Obadiah1:20 Bondi dosare tahen Israelko do hecʼkate Sarephat hạbicʼ Kananikoakʼ disạmko ạidạri joṅa; ar bondi dosare tahẽkan Jerusalemren hoṛ okoe do Sepharatre menakʼko onko do hecʼkate Negeb reakʼ atoko ạidạri joṅa. 
Obadiah1:21 Disạm cakʼlaoko do Sion buru khon Esaoakʼ buru ṭoṭhakoren hoṛko ḍanṭaokoa, ar rajosṭi do Probhu Isorakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Jonah1:1 Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do Amitạiren hopon Jona ṭhen sodorena, “Am do ona maraṅ nagraha Niniwite senokʼme ar ona upạrte porcarme, ente hoṛkoakʼ bạṛicʼakʼ iń ńel ńametʼ kana.”" 
Jonah1:2  
Jonah1:3 Menkhan Jona do Probhu ṭhen khon Tạrsiste ńir pharakokʼ lạgitʼe mohnḍayena. Uni do Jopha bondorre senkate Tạrsiste calakʼ reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ Jahaje ńamkeda. Ar bhaṛa em tayom ona jahajreye decʼena ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khon ńir pharakokʼ lạgitʼ Tạrsis secʼe mohnḍayena. 
Jonah1:4 Unre Probhu Isor do jalapurire mitʼṭecʼ tạpis hoeye kolkeda. Ona iạte nonka botoranakʼ birbão hoe rakapʼena, jahaj do rạpudokʼ leka hoyena." 
Jonah1:5 Onate jahaj cakʼlaoko do botorte apan ạpinren boṅga ṭhen rakʼ joṅko ehopʼena. Ar jahajre tahẽkan jinisko do jalapuri reakʼ dakʼreko capatʼ khadlekada jemon jahaj rawalokʼtako. Menkhan Jona do noa laharege jahaj bhitrire bolokateye giticʼente acete jạpitʼ akatʼ tahẽkana. 
Jonah1:6 Unre jahajren cakʼlaoicʼ do Jona ṭhen senkateye metadea, “Cekate galasaṅem jạpitʼ akada? Ma beretʼme ar amren debota hohoaeme. Pasere pase uni do aboe beṅgetʼ abon ar onatebon bańcao daṛekokʼ.”" 
Jonah1:7 Ar jahaj cakʼlaoko hõ ako akoreko mepenena, “Noa muhinren dạyi do okoeye hoedaṛekokʼa, onate dela gulibãṭkate bon ńelma.” Arko gulibãṭketʼ khan onare Jonawakʼ ńutumge rakapʼena." 
Jonah1:8 Unre onko do Jonako kulikedea, “Ma lạiyaleme, muhinre bon paṛao akanren dusi hoṛ doe okoekana? Am do cetʼkom kạmikana? Ar oka khonem hecʼakana? Am dom oka disạmren hoṛ kana? Ar oka jạtren kanam?”" 
Jonah1:9 Jonae roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do mitʼṭen Ibri hoṛ kạnạń. Iń do sermaren Probhu Isoriń sewawae kana. Unige jalapuri ar ot doe benaoakada.”" 
Jonah1:10 Ar Probhu Isor ṭhen khone ńir pharakokʼ kan onko do onako baḍaekeda, ente Jona do ona kathae lạiyatʼkoa. Onate onko do botorente uniko kulikedea, “Noa do cetʼem ceka akada?”" 
Jonah1:11 Jalapuri reakʼ haḍak ḍabakokʼ ḍheoko do arhõ tạpis idikʼkante uniko kulikedea, “Jalapuri jemon ḍelḍelokʼ ona lạgitʼ am dole cekamea?”" 
Jonah1:12 Jonae roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Doreãore giḍikạńpe enḍekhan jalapuri do ḍelḍel thirokʼa. Ińiń baḍaea, ińakʼ dos iạtege noa birbão hoe do apere paṛao akana.”" 
Jonah1:13 Enhõ onko cakʼlaoko do ona baṅkate ghuṭu secʼ jahaj calao idiko kurumuṭukeda; menkhan bako daṛeada, ente jalapuri reakʼ haḍak ḍabakokʼ do arhõ bạṛti idiyena." 
Jonah1:14 Unre onko do Probhu Isor hohoadeteko menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, nui hoṛakʼ gujukʼ iạte alo jemonle gujukʼ. Ar mitʼṭen miridos hoṛakʼ gujukʼ iạte ale do alom dusi ocolea, ente E Probhu Isor, am do amakʼ sana lekam kạmikana.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ona tayom onko do Jonako sapʼkedete jalapuri reakʼ dakʼreko khadlekedea, ar onate haḍak ḍabakokʼkan jalapuri do ḍelḍel thir hapeyena." 
Jonah1:16 Ona iạte hoṛko do Probhu Isor ạḍiko botoradea. Onko do Probhu Isor ńutumte janwar dãṛẽko samaṅketʼkoa ar manotakʼko dohokeda. 
Jonah1:17 Probhu Isor do Jona ude lạgitʼ mitʼṭen maraṅ okocʼ hakoe ṭhik dohoakade tahẽkana. Ar Jona do uni hakoakʼ lacʼre pe siń pe ńindại tahẽyena. 
Jonah2:1 Jona do uni hakoakʼ lacʼ khon acʼren Probhu Isor ṭhene koeyana. Uniye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ kosṭokʼ oktere amiń hohoatʼmea ar am do ińem roṛ ruạṛadińạ. Sheol khon goṛo ńam lạgitʼ iń hohoatʼmea ar am do ińakʼ rakʼjoṅakʼem ańjomketʼtińạ." 
Jonah2:2  
Jonah2:3 Am do jalapuri reakʼ khạndri dakʼrem giḍikedińa ar ạtukʼkan dakʼreń tạpukʼena; ar ḍheoko do iń cetante parom idiyena. 
Jonah2:4 Iń doń menkeda, ‘amakʼ mẽtʼãhã samaṅ khon sạṅgińteń idi ocoakana; enhõ iń do amakʼ ona sonot oṛakʼ secʼ arhõń beṅgetʼ rakaba.’" 
Jonah2:5 Jalapuri reakʼ dakʼ do ińe esetʼ ạcurkedińte gujukʼ reakʼ duạr hạbicʼe idikedińa; ar athantar dakʼ doe gherao esetʼkedińạ ar ona reakʼ sealom do ińakʼ bohokʼe bedhaoketʼtińạ. 
Jonah2:6 Iń doń unumena ar buru reakʼ rehetʼ hạbicʼ iń senena; Sheol do jaejug lạgitʼe aṭkao dohokedińa. Menkhan E ińren Probhu Isor, am do onḍe khonem rakapʼ ạgukedińa." 
Jonah2:7 “E Probhu Isor, tinre ińakʼ jiwi do oḍokʼ calakʼkan tahẽkana unre amiń disạketʼmea, ar ińakʼ koejoṅ do am ṭhen, amakʼ sonot oṛakʼre rakapʼena." 
Jonah2:8 Okoe ạuṛiyakʼren boṅgako sewawako kan onko do amakʼ okaṭakʼ dayako ńamke ona do bako moneyakʼkana," 
Jonah2:9 menkhan iń do sarhao sereńate am ńutumte janwar dãṛẽgeń samaṅama. Ar okań manot akatʼ onań purạuama. Ar bańcaoiń do Probhu Isorakʼ kạmikana.” 
Jonah2:10 Probhu Isor do hakoe hukumadea ar hako do ghuṭure Jonae ulạkedea. 
Jonah3:1 Probhu Isorakʼ katha do dosar dhao Jona ṭhen sodorena. 
Jonah3:2 Uni doe menkeda, “Am do ńitokʼ ona maraṅ nagraha Niniwite calakʼme ar oka sombatiń lạiyam onḍe senkate ona lại jạhirme.”" 
Jonah3:3 Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka Jona do Niniwi nagrahateye calaoena. Niniwi do ạḍi maraṅ nagraha tahẽkana; ona reakʼ osar do taṛamate pe din reakʼ horge tahẽkana. 
Jonah3:4 Jona do ona nagrahare bolokate mitʼdin reakʼ hore senena ar noa katha hohoate lạlạiye ehopʼena, “Ar pongel mãhã khange Niniwi nagraha do ḍahao maraokʼa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Unre Niniwiren hoṛko do Isorakʼ kathareko pạtiạuena. Ar upạs reakʼko lại sodorkeda ar huḍiń khon hapṛakʼ sanamkoge gõṛẽ kicricʼko horokʼkeda. 
Jonah3:6 Raj ṭhen ona khobor seṭeren khan uni hõ siṅghạson khone beretʼente acʼakʼ raj-kicricʼe totʼketʼtaea ar gõṛẽ kicricʼ horokʼkate torocʼreye duṛupʼena. 
Jonah3:7 Ona tayom uni do Niniwire acʼ ar acʼren kạmiyạkoe hukumatʼkoa: Manwa ar janwar, ḍaṅgra se bhiḍi palko celege alo jemonko jomma; onko do jomakʼ se dakʼ hõ aloko ńũiyma." 
Jonah3:8 Manwa ar janwar sanamkoge jemon gõṛẽ kicricʼteko oyokʼma. Ar mitʼke mitʼ hoṛ do goṭa daṛete Isorko hohoaema ar bạṛicʼ hor khonko ruạṛokʼma ar bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko bạgiyma. 
Jonah3:9 Okoe baḍaea hoedaṛeakʼa Isor do moneye ạcurtaete jaljalaokʼkan edre khone ruạṛkange jemon alo bon marao utạrokʼ.” 
Jonah3:10 Ar Isor do onkoakʼ kạmikoe ńelketʼtakoa, cetʼleka onko do akoakʼ bạṛicʼ hor khonko ạcurena, ar Isor do ona bạṛicʼ ńutumteye kastaoena one oka onko cetanre kạmi lạgitʼe roṛletʼ ona do ar bae onkaleda." 
Jonah4:1 Menkhan Jona do noa iạte ạḍi bạṛicʼe ạikạukeda ar ạḍiye edreyena. 
Jonah4:2 Uni do Probhu Isor ṭhen koekateye menkeda, “E Probhu Isor, iń do disạmre tahenregeń baḍaekan tahẽkana, nonka hoyokʼa mente. Ona iạtege iń do pạhilre Tạrsisteń ńir pharakokʼ kan tahẽkana.
