Ińiń baḍaekan tahẽkana, am do daya ar mãyãwan Isor kanam, ar ạḍi anecʼ edrekʼicʼ ar dayate kisạ̃ṛicʼge, ar bạkʼṛicʼ khon dom kastaokʼkana." 
Jonah4:3 Ńitokʼ do E Probhu Isor, ińakʼ jiwi baṛe hataotińme, ente ińakʼ jiwetʼ tahen khon gujukʼge bhagetińạ.”" 
Jonah4:4 Probhu Isore roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Pit caṛhaokʼ kantamte dom ṭhiketʼgea?”" 
Jonah4:5 Unre Jona do nagraha bahrete senkate purub secʼre mitʼṭecʼ ṭhạ̃ire cạli benaokate ona reakʼ umulreye duṛupʼena. Ar nagraha reakʼ cetʼ dosa hoyokʼa mente ona ńel lạgitʼ koyokʼ horreye tahẽyena. 
Jonah4:6 Unre Probhu Isor do onḍe mitʼṭecʼ eraḍom dareye janam ocokeda. Ar ona dare do Jona cetanteye hara rakapʼ ocokeda uniyakʼ bohokʼ umultae lạgitʼ. Ona dare iạte Jona do ạḍiye kusiyena. 
Jonah4:7 Menkhan dosar hilokʼ ạḍi setakʼre Isor do mitʼṭen ganḍra tejoye kolkedea; ar tejo do ona dareye ńẽtʼkeda, onate dare do tolmocʼena." 
Jonah4:8 Ar siń candoe rakapʼen khan Isor do purub reakʼ lolo hoeye rakapʼ ocokeda; onate setoṅ do Jonawakʼ bohokʼre paṛaoena, uni doe jhãeyena. Unre uni do gujukʼ lạgitʼe koeketʼteye menkeda, “Jiwetʼ tahen khon gujukʼge bhage tahẽkana.”" 
Jonah4:9 Menkhan Isor do Jonae metadea, “Ona dare ńutumte pit caṛhaokʼ kantam dom ṭhiketʼgea?” Jonae menkeda, “Hẽ gujukʼ hạbicʼ pit caṛhaokʼkantiń doń ṭhiketʼgea.”" 
Jonah4:10 Menkhan Probhu Isor doe menkeda, “Am do noa dare lạgitʼ jãhãnakʼ bam khaṭao akana ar hara hõ bam hara ocoakada enhõ dare lạgitʼem mãyãkʼkana. Ona do mitʼ ńindạte omonena ar mitʼ ńindạtege gocʼena." 
Jonah4:11 Menkhan Niniwire mitʼ lakh bargel hajar khon hõ bạ̃ṛti gidrạ menakʼkoa onko do bako baḍaea okaṭakʼ do jojomti ar okaṭakʼ do leṅga ti kana mente; ona chaḍa ḍher ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍiko hõ menakʼkoa. Enḍekhan iń do cetʼ iń cekaea? Iń do cetʼ ona maraṅ nagraha lạgitʼ bạń mãyãkʼa?” 
Micah1:1 Jihudạren raj Jothom, Ahos ar Hiskiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere Moresethren Mikạ ṭhen Samariạ ar Jerusalem reaṅ Probhu Isorakʼ katha do dorson hotete sodorlena." 
Micah1:2 E jạt jạtrenko, ape sanamkoge ińakʼ luturakʼtińpe; E dhạrti ar onare menakʼ sanamakʼko ańjompe! Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sonot oṛakʼ khon ape upạrte gohae ema." 
Micah1:3 Ńelpe, Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i khone hijukʼkana; uni do pheḍ hecʼkate dhạrti reakʼ usul ṭhạ̃iko cetanreye lebedokʼa." 
Micah1:4 Mom cetʼleka seṅgelre le cabakʼ, dharsãṛ ṭhạ̃ite cetʼleka dakʼ ạtukʼ pheḍokʼ onkage uniyakʼ jaṅga latar reakʼ buru-ḍuṅgriko do le cabakʼa, ar buru nalako do paṛagokʼa." 
Micah1:5 Jakobakʼ kại lạgitʼ, metakʼme Israel bõsrenkoakʼ behok lạgitʼge noako do hoyokʼa. Jakobakʼ ghạṭ reakʼ dusi doe okoekana? Samariạ do cetʼ baṅa Jihudạwakʼ than boṭkocʼko lạgitʼ dusi doe okoekana? Jerusalem do cetʼ baṅa?" 
Micah1:6 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, “Samariạ do khola ṭạnḍi reakʼ ḍipigeń hoeocoya, ar ona do darkha nạ̃ṛĩ rohoe reakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. Ona reakʼ dhiriko do lodamreń giḍikakʼa ar ona reakʼ rehetʼ doń oṭakʼ dohokakʼa." 
Micah1:7 Ar uniren sanam boṅgako doko rạputʼ gejer ocokʼa; uniren mundil-kusumbikoakʼ sanam rojgar do seṅgelte rapakʼ giḍikʼa; uniren sanam boṅga muṭhạnko doń marao giḍikoa. Uni do kusumbi reakʼ kuṛại lekate noakoe ńam akada onate onako do arhõ kusumbikʼ lạgitʼ laṛcaṛokʼa.” 
Micah1:8 Noa iạte iń doń rakʼjoṅa ariń homora; iń do eken jaṅga uluṅgeń dãṛã baṛaea; iń do toyo ar utʼ cẽṛẽ rakʼ lekageń homora. 
Micah1:9 Samariạwakʼ ghao do ar baṅ besokʼtaea; ona do Jihudạ ṭhen khon hecʼakana. Ona do ińren hoṛkoakʼ phaṭok hạbicʼ, hẽ, Jerusalem hạbicʼ seṭerakana." 
Micah1:10 Gatre noa katha do alope baḍae ocoya, ar thoṛa hõ alope rakʼ homora. Ape do Beth-le-aphrare dhuṛire guṛdạu baṛaepe." 
Micah1:11 E Saphirre tahenkan hoṛko, ape do uluṅ ar lajaokʼpe baṛe. Ar okoe Saananreko girobasokʼ kan onko do bako oḍok hecʼdaṛeakʼa. Beth-ethsol doe homor halaṅetʼkana; uni do ape secʼ bae teṅgona." 
Micah1:12 Okoe Marothrepe girobasokʼ kan onko do rehay ńam lạgitʼko ahkaokʼkana, ente Probhu Isor ṭhen khon muhin do hecʼpaṛao akana; hẽ, ona do Jerusalem reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼ seṭer akana." 
Micah1:13 E Lakisre tahenkan hoṛko, ape do Rãt gạḍi sãote sadomko joṛaokope. Israelakʼ bedhoromtetʼ pạhilre ape talare ńamlen iạte Sion-kuṛi do apege kại hortepe idiledea." 
Micah1:14 Ona iạte apege Moreseth-gath dope bidạyea. Israelren rapajko do Aksib nagraha cetanre ar bako ṭehãḍ daṛeakʼa. 
Micah1:15 E Maresare girobasokʼ kan hoṛko Probhu Isor do ape upạrte mitʼṭen dokʼkhol kan hoṛe kolea. Ar Israelakʼ sanamakʼ bạḍạiko do Adulamte calakʼa. 
Micah1:16 Okoe do hopon ar hoponerako iạtepe rạskạkʼkan tahẽkan onko lạgitʼ homor halaṅ iạte bohokʼ hoyo poṭorokʼpe; gidi bohokʼ leka apeakʼ bohokʼ do ceḍeytape, ente onko do bondikate ape khon sạṅgińteko idi ocokʼa." 
Micah2:1 Hae onko do, one okoe do behok lạgitʼko goṭayetʼkan, one okoe do apnarakʼ aṭetʼre bạṛicʼakʼ reakʼ phundiko aṭaoetʼkan. Ar setakʼlen khan do onka lekako kạmikana, ente ona onkae reakʼ daṛe do akoakʼ tire menakʼa." 
Micah2:2 Onko do ot-baṛge ar oṛakʼ duạr cetanreko lalockate onako rerecʼa. Onko do hoṛko ṭhokakoa ar oṛakʼ-duạr ar jaega-jumiko recʼkoa. 
Micah2:3 Ona iạte Probhu Isore meneda, “Ape upạrte iń do bin bhạlạiyakʼ iń goṭa akada one ona khon apnarte ohope rukhiyạ daṛelen, ente okte do muhin reakʼge hoyokʼa." 
Micah2:4 Enhilokʼ do maraṅ homor halaṅge hoyokʼa ar noa duk reakʼ sereń hoyokʼa. Ale dole marao utạr akana; ale jạtrenkoakʼ sompotti do recʼidi ocoakana. Probhu Isor do ale ṭhen khon onae idi akada. Aleakʼ khet-baṛge do bepạtiạrankoe emakawatʼkoa.” 
Micah2:5 Onatege ape talare okoehõ Probhu Isorren hoṛko sãote jumi reakʼ hạṭiń do bako ńama. 
Micah2:6 Aperen nạbiko do aleko metalekana, “Noako katha do alope mena, ar niạko reaṅ jãhãn katha hõ alope roṛa, ente ale cetanre opoman do baṅ hijukʼa.”" 
Micah2:7 E Jakob bõsrenko, apeakʼ noa katha roṛ do baṅ ganokʼa, “Probhu Isorren Jiu do bae ạṛis akana; ar uni do noako kạmi bae kạmiya.” Probhu Isore meneda, “Okoe dhorom horteye calakʼ eken onko cetanrege ińakʼ katha do bhạlạiye ạguiya." 
Micah2:8 Nebetar ińren hoṛ do bạiri lekako hoyakana. Lạṛhại khon ruạṛ hecʼakan hoṛko leka okoe do khạtirjomako dãṛãnkan onkoakʼ hoṛmo khon kicricʼpe or totʼetʼtakoa. 
Micah2:9 Ińren hoṛkoren maejiuko do onkoakʼ oṛakʼ duạr khonpe laga ńiretʼkoa. Ińakʼ bhor khon onkoren hopon ar hoponerako jaejugpe recʼetʼkoa. 
Micah2:10 Ape do beredokʼte, calakʼpe, ona do apeakʼ jirạukʼ jaega do baṅkana; ente ape do disạmpe bhonḍakada, ona iạtege ona do marao utạrokʼa." 
Micah2:11 Ar jãhãe ekʼṛeyicʼ ar ṭhok hoṛ hecʼkateye men, ‘ińiń meneda je, apeakʼ bạ̃ṛti bubulakʼ ar darkha rasa hoyokʼtapea,’ enḍekhan unige noko jạtrenko lạgitʼ lek lekanicʼ nạbiye hoyokʼa!”" 
Micah2:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jakob, iń do khạṭige ape sanamkoń jarwa mitʼpea; iń do khạṭige Israelren bańcao tahen sarecʼ hoṛkoń jarwa mitʼkoa. Bosraren bhiḍiko leka, khạṛre tahen bhidi palko leka iń do onkoń jarwa mitʼkoa; disạm do arhõ hoṛkote perejokʼa.”" 
Micah2:13 Bondi dosa khon ruạṛ hijukʼ lạgitʼ okoe do hore jhij uni do onko laha lahateye calakʼa; onko do phaṭok duạr rạputʼkateko oḍok calakʼa. Probhu Isor, okoe doe onkoren rajkan, uni do onkoe ạyur idikoa." 
Micah3:1 Iń Mikạgeń meneda, E Jakobren mukhiyạko, metakʼme Israel bõsren disạm cakʼlaoko, ape do ańjompe. Ape do cetʼ hok reakʼ bicạr babotre baḍae baṅ lek kantapea?" 
Micah3:2 Ape do bhageakʼ kạmipe hirkhạwakʼ kana ar bạṛicʼakʼ kạmi dope dulạṛeda; Ape do ińren hoṛkoakʼ hoṛmo khon harta ar jaṅ khon jelpe chaḍaoetʼtakoa; 
Micah3:3 Ape do ińren hoṛkoakʼ jelpe jometʼkana, onkoakʼ harta chaḍaokate jaṅko dope rạputʼ gejereda; ape do celaṅ reakʼ jel leka onkope kuṭiyetʼkoa." 
Micah3:4 Okte darakana tinre ape do Probhu Isor ṭhenpe rakʼjoṅa, menkhan uni do bae roṛ ruạṛapea. Unre uni do ape secʼ khon acʼakʼ mẽtʼãhãe danaṅtaea, ente ape do bạṛicʼakʼpe kạmikana." 
Micah3:5 Okoe nạbiko ińren hoṛko bạṛicʼ horteko idi akatʼko ar onko jãhãeye jom ocoakatʼko enḍekhan onko do “Suluk ” menteko roṛ sodora; menkhan bako jom ocoko enḍekhan onko do uni upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼko sapṛaokʼa. Ona iạte Probhu Isor do onko nạbikoe metakokana," 
Micah3:6 “Ape lạgitʼ ńindạ daraekana, ape do cetʼ dorsonge bape ńela; ape lạgitʼ do ńut daraekana, ape do nạbi lekate cetʼge bape roṛ daṛeakʼa. Ape lạgitʼ cando doe hạsurokʼa ar siń do ńutokʼa.”" 
Micah3:7 Onate dorson ńeńelko doko lajao ocokʼa gonokko doko bemanot ocokʼa. Onko do jotoge mẽtʼãhãko danaṅtakoa, ente Isor do cetʼ roṛ ruạṛge bae emakoa." 
Micah3:8 Menkhan Jakob do acʼakʼ behokakʼ reakʼ, ar Israel do acʼakʼ kại reaṅ baḍae ocoye lạgitʼ Probhu Isorren Jiu reakʼ daṛete, ar dhorom reakʼ bicạrre dilteń perecʼ akana." 
Micah3:9 E Jakob bõsren mukhiyạko, ar Israelren bõsren disạm cakʼlaoko, ańjompe. Ape do dhorom reakʼ bicạrpe nihạ̃tetʼkana ar sojheakʼ dope konḍea ocoyetʼa." 
Micah3:10 Ape do mãyãmte Sion, ar behokakʼte Jerusalempe benao rakapʼ akada." 
Micah3:11 Onḍenko mukhiyạ do ghus jomkateko bicạra, ar naekeko do ṭakate cecetʼakʼko emokʼa ar nạbiko hõ ṭaka hataokateko nạbiya. Ar Probhu Isorakʼ gokʼṛo reakʼ as dohokateko mena, “Probhu Isor do cetʼ abo talare bạnuiya? Abo cetanre jãhãn muhin do baṅ hijukʼa.”" 
Micah3:12 Onatege Sion do ape iạte khet baṛge lekae cas ocokʼa, ar Jerusalem do dhaṅ dhaserakʼ ḍhipi leka hoyokʼa, ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ buru do jhạuạkote dapal esedokʼa." 
Micah4:1 Mucạtʼ dinre sanam buruko modre ona buruge joto khon usulteye rakapʼ ocokʼa one okare Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ menakʼ. Huḍiń buru boṭkocʼko khon uni do usulteye rakapʼ ocokʼa, ar sanam jạtrenko do ạtukʼ dakʼ leka uni secʼko ạtu calakʼa." 
Micah4:2 Jạt jạtren hoṛko do hecʼkateko mena, “Dela, abo do Probhu Isorakʼ burute bon rakapʼa, Dela, Jakobren Isorakʼ oṛakʼte bon calakʼa. Uni do acʼakʼ hor reaṅe cetʼabona ar abo do uniyakʼ horte bon taṛama.” Onko do noa kathako mena, ente Sion khon do hukum emogokʼa ar Jerusalem khon do Probhu Isorakʼ katha oḍokokʼa." 
Micah4:3 Uni do boṅgan hoṛ jạtrenko talareye bicạra ar sạṅgińren daṛean hoṛko talare hok reakʼe chinḍạukatakoa. Onko do akoakʼ tarwaṛe rạputʼkate nahel reakʼ phalko benaojoṅa ar borlom rạputʼkate do datromkoge. Mitʼ jạtrenko do eṭakʼ jạtrenko upạrte tarwaṛe ar bako rakaba; onko do lạṛhại hõ bako lạṛhạiya. 
Micah4:4 Mimitʼko do apan ạpin darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa dare latarreko duṛupʼa ar celege onko do bako botor ocokoa, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isorge ona katha doe meneda." 
Micah4:5 Jạt jạtrenko do akoren debotakoakʼ daṛeteko kạmiyetʼre hõ abo do jaejug aboren Probhu Isorakʼ daṛete bon kạmi idiyma. 
Micah4:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Enhilokʼ iń do leḍhakoń jarwakoa; ar okoe bondikate eṭakʼ disạmteko idi ocoakan, ar okoeyiń duk ocoakatʼko onko do mitʼ ṭheniń jarwa mitʼkoa." 
Micah4:7 Leḍhako do jiwetʼ iń dohokoa ar laga ńir hoṛko do mitʼṭen daṛean jạtreniń hoyocokoa. Ar iń Probhu Isorge enhilokʼ khon jaejug hạbicʼ Sion burure onko cetanreń rajokʼa. 
Micah4:8 E bhiḍi gukʼpikoakʼ pahra oṛakʼ, E Sion kuṛi reakʼ gaṛ, lahateakʼ rajosṭige am ṭhen do ruạṛ ocokʼa; raj do arhõ Jerusalemreye rajokʼa.”" 
Micah4:9 Cedakʼ am do ńitokʼ ãṭ aṛaṅtem rakʼeda? Amren raj do cetʼ bạnuiya? Amren sosolhayicʼ do cetʼe gocʼakana? Ar cetʼ iạte bedonokʼ kan maejiu leka dom bedonokʼkana? 
Micah4:10 E Sion kuṛi, bedonokʼkan maejiu leka hasote baṛe thakoakʼme, ente ńitokʼ do amakʼ nagraha bạgikate ṭạnḍire tahen hoyokʼtama. Am hõ Babeltem calakʼa; ar onḍe do bańcaoem ńama. Probhu Isor do onḍege amren bạirikoakʼ ti khone chaḍaomea." 
Micah4:11 Menkhan ńitokʼ jạt jạtrenko do am upạrteko jarwa akana. Onkoko meneda, “Uni doe bhonḍ ocokʼma; dela, abo do Sion reakʼ dosa ńelte bon rạskạkʼma.”" 
Micah4:12 Menkhan onko do Probhu Isorakʼgoṭawakʼ reakʼ katha do bako baḍaea; onko do bako bujhạu daṛeakʼkana je, uni do binḍạ leka khạrạire en ko lạgitʼe jarwa akatʼkoa mente." 
Micah4:13 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Sion kuṛi, ma beredokʼte phosol manḍaeme; iń do mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ dereń ar pitạl reakʼ khurạń emama jemon ḍher jạtrenkom gejer daṛeako. Onkoakʼ behokte hameṭakʼ jinisko ar dhon do iń ńutumte, goṭa dhạrtiren Probhu Isor ńutumte maraokʼ reakʼem sarapakoa.”" 
Micah5:1 E lạṛhại phạdko hotete gherao akan nagraha, amren lạṛhại phạdko jarwakotam, ente onko do abonko gherao esetʼ akatʼbona. Bạiriko do Israelren cakʼlaoicʼ ṭheṅgate johareko dal akadea." 
Micah5:2 Probhu Isore meneda, “Menkhan, E Bethlehem reakʼ Ephrata, am do Jihudạren hajarko modre huḍiń utạricʼ kanre hõm, enhõ am khon ińren nonkan mitʼ hoṛe oḍok hijukʼa okoe do Israelkoren cakʼaloicʼe hoyokʼ, uniyakʼ etohopʼ do ạd khon hecʼạguakana. Sedae jug khonakʼge.”" 
Micah5:3 Ona iạte uni do unhạbicʼe alae giḍikoa one tin hạbicʼ jakʼnamicʼ do bae janame. Ar unre acʼren boehakoren sarecʼko doko ruạṛa, Israel hoponko ṭhenge." 
Micah5:4 Ar uni disạm cakʼlaoicʼ do hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ daṛete, acʼren Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonokte uni do gukʼpiyicʼ leka acʼren hoṛkoe ạyurkoa. Onko do khạtirjomako girobasokʼa, ente uni doe maraṅ utạricʼkan ona katha do unre dhạrti reakʼ ses simạ hạbicʼko aṅgoca;" 
Micah5:5 Uni do suluke ạguiya. Ạsurrenko tinre aboakʼ disạmko akromona ar aboakʼ gaṛ do jaṅgateko lebetʼ gasmanḍaoa unre uni upạrte abo do eae goṭen gukʼpiko, hẽ, irạl goṭen mukhiyạge bon teṅgokoa." 
Micah5:6 Onko do lạṛhại talate Ạsurrenkoakʼ disạm metakʼme, Nimrod disạmko calao. Ar Ạsurrenko do aboakʼ disạmko akromonle khan ar aboakʼ simạko lebetʼle khan unre onkoakʼ ti khon aboren disạm cakʼlaoicʼgeye rukhiyạbona." 
Micah5:7 Jạt jạtrenko talare Jakobren bańcao tahen hoṛ do Probhu Isor ṭhen khonakʼ sisir dakʼ leka, ar ghãs cetanre achaṛ dakʼ lekage one ona do hoṛ bae tạṅgiko, ar baṅ do manwa hoponkoe koyokʼ horko." 
Micah5:8 Jạt jạtrenko talare Jakobren bańcao tahen hoṛ do bir janwarko talare dhạcri kul lekako hoyokʼa, bhiḍi pal talare dhạcri kul lekage; uni dhạcri kul do tinre bhiḍiko talareye bolokʼa unre onko doe sapʼkoa are or cirạkoa; ar celege onko do bako bańcao daṛeakoa." 
Micah5:9 Jakobren hoṛ do bạiriko cetanreko jitạukʼa ar onkoren sanam bạiriko marao utạrkoa. 
Micah5:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Israel uren iń do am tala khon amren sadomkoń caba utạrkoa ar amakʼ rãt gạḍikoń marao giḍikakʼa." 
Micah5:11 Amakʼ disạm reakʼ nagrahakoń maraoa ar amakʼ sanam gaṛkoń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa. 
Micah5:12 Iń do amakʼ gukʼnikoń nosṭo giḍikakʼa; ar mãyã biddạko beoharetʼ kan hoṛ do amre ar bako tahena. 
Micah5:13 Am bhitri khon goṛhon muṭhạnkoń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ sewa khunṭiko hõń maraoa; amakʼ tite benaoakʼ jinisko do ar bam pujạwakʼa. 
Micah5:14 Iń do am tala khon Asera-khunṭikoń or totʼ giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ nagrahakoń rạputʼ giḍiytama. 
Micah5:15 Okoe jạtrenko iń tabere bạnukʼko onko cetanre do edreteń hala hạliya.” 
Micah6:1 E Israel, Probhu Isorakʼ katha ańjomme. Uniye meneda, “E Mikạ, am do teṅgokʼme ar buru-ḍuṅgri samaṅre amakʼ mambla sodorme; amakʼ oka mementeakʼ menakʼtam ona do burukoko ańjomma.”" 
Micah6:2 E buru-ḍuṅgriko, ape do Probhu Isorakʼ aroj ańjompe; E dhạrti reakʼ jaejug rehetʼko apehõ ańjompe. Noa reakʼ karon do uniren hoṛko upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ mementeakʼ menakʼtaea; uni do Israelko upạrte mitʼṭecʼe mambla akada." 
Micah6:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “E ińren hoṛko, iń do apeakʼ cetʼ iń ceka akada? Ar oka lekate ape do kosṭoń em akatʼpea? Ma roṛ ruạṛạńpe." 
Micah6:4 Iń do Misor disạm khoniń oḍok ạgu akatʼpea, ar golam khoniń chaḍao akatʼpea. Ape goṛowape lạgitʼte Mose, Aron ar Mạriạm tekoń kolletʼkoa." 
Micah6:5 E ińren hoṛko, Moab raj Balak okae goṭaletʼ ar Beor hopon Biliam okae roṛ ruạṛletʼ ona baṛe hudiskate ńelpe. Siṭim khon Gilgol hạbicʼ apeakʼ calakʼ reakʼ katha disạipe jemon ape do ińiń kạmiletʼakʼ bańcaokʼ reakʼ kathape baḍae daṛeakʼ.”" 
Micah6:6 Iń do cetʼkoante Probhu Isor samaṅreń hijukʼa ar coṭren Isor samaṅreń omagokʼa? Iń do cetʼ jeredokʼ samaṅokʼakʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ bochor umerren mĩhũkoante uni samaṅreń hijukʼa? 
Micah6:7 Probhu do cetʼ hajar hajar bheḍakoteye kusikʼa, uni do cetʼ sunumte perecʼ gaḍakoe bạsutakʼa? Ińakʼ ghạṭko ńutumte iń do cetʼ ińren pạhil janamicʼ hoponiń emaea, ińakʼ kại gunạkʼte cetʼ ińakʼ kukhi reakʼ jogeń samaṅaea?" 
Micah6:8 E manwa, okaṭakʼ bhageakʼkan ona ma coṅ udukʼ akawatʼme. Hok reakʼem kạmi, dayam dulạṛ ar amren Isor tulucʼ nindhạntem taṛam chaḍa Probhu Isor do ar cetʼhõ coṅ am ṭhen khon ma bae khojkan." 
Micah6:9 Ạkilan hoṛ do Probhu Isorko botoraekana. Ma ańjompe, Probhu Isor do nagraharen hoṛkoe hohoako kana. Uni doe meneda, “Ape do sạjại reakʼ ṭheṅga secʼ ar okoe do onae niṭ akatʼ uni secʼ moneyakʼpe." 
Micah6:10 Bedhorom hoṛkoakʼ oṛakʼre bedhoromte ńamakʼ dhon ar ṭhokako reakʼ sosoṅakʼ doń hirkhạwakʼ kana. 
Micah6:11 Okoeko hoṛ ṭhen ṭhokako reakʼ tulạ ar ojonte kom reakʼ baṭkhara menakʼ uni do cetʼ bin dusạn menteń hudis daṛekea? 
Micah6:12 Aperen kisạ̃ṛ hoṛko doko sasantaogea, ar ape hõpe ekʼṛegea ar apeakʼ moca hõ phạsiạragetapea." 
Micah6:13 Ar onatege iń do apeakʼ ghạṭ iạte bạṛicʼ sạjạiyiń sạjạipea ariń marao utạrpea. 
Micah6:14 Ape dope jomgea menkhan bape bikʼa; lacʼre reṅgecʼ do tahengetapea. Apeakʼ jinisko mitʼ ṭhạ̃i khon eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃itepe idiygea menkhan cetʼge bape rukhiyạ daṛeakʼa, ar thoṛape rukhiyạ daṛeakʼ khan hõ ona do lạṛhạiteń marao giḍikatapea." 
Micah6:15 Itạpe eragea menkhan phosol do bape getʼ rakapʼ daṛeakʼa; ape do jạitun jope lelena menkhan ona reakʼ sunum do bape beohar daṛeakʼa, ar darkha len katehõ ona reakʼ rasa hõ bape ńũ daṛeakʼa." 
Micah6:16 Ape do Omri reakʼ niạmkope manaoetʼ kana ar Ahab bõsrenkoakʼ hewa lekape calakʼkana. Ona iạte iń do maraope reakʼ ti ar landa dhutʼape reakʼ tiregeń jimạkapea; ar ińren hoṛkoakʼ henostagepe gokʼ baṛaea” 
Micah7:1 Hai iń do! Iń do niron din reakʼ joko samṭao akatʼ lekageń hoyakana one joko gotʼketʼ tayomko tumạlketʼ, ar jom lạgitʼ darkha reakʼ jãhãn thopage bạnukʼa; ar pạhilre beleakʼ loa hõ bạnukʼa one oka lạgitʼ ińakʼ jiwiye gagojokʼkan." 
Micah7:2 Disạm khon Isor botorae kan hoṛ doko meṭao ocoakana; dhoromicʼ do mitʼ hoṛ hõ bạnugicʼan. Sanamkoge mãyãm joroy lạgitʼko tãṛãkʼ akana; onko jotoge akoakʼ pạsire jhạlikoko khojkana. 
Micah7:3 Onkoakʼ banar ti do behokakʼ kạmi lạgitʼ gạkhuṛgetakoa. Mukhiyạko do sandesko khojkana, bikʼcạrko do ghusko jomeda, ar kisạ̃ṛko okako khojkan onako baḍae ocokana; ar onko jotoge mitʼ domte phundiko aṭaoetʼkana." 
Micah7:4 Onko modren sanamko khon bhage hoṛ do rạṅgạini lekako hoyakana, ar joto khon dhorom hoṛ do kuṛitʼrama reakʼ beṛha lekage. Aperen pahradarko lạiyakope, apeakʼ sạjại reakʼ din do sor akana mente. Ar andesalekʼ reakʼ okte do ńitokʼkangea." 
Micah7:5 Aḍepaseren hoṛko cetanre bhorsa alope dohoya, ar jãhãe gateko cetanre hõ pạtiạu alope dohoya; hẽ, amakʼ koṛam pheḍreye giticʼkan amren bạhu ṭhen katha hõ sontorte roṛme," 
Micah7:6 ente hopon do apate nihạ̃tea, hoponera do eṅgattetʼ upạrteye teṅgona ar bạhu kuṛi do hanhartetʼ upạrte. Manwa do acʼakʼ gharońjren hoṛge bạiriye hoyokʼtaea." 
Micah7:7 Menkhan iń do Probhu Isor cetanre asiń dohoyeda, ińren babańcaoicʼ Isor lạgitʼ iń koyokʼ horeda. Ińren Isor do ińakʼ kathae ańjomtińạ." 
Micah7:8 E aleren bạiriko, aleakʼ gurokʼ ńelte alope rạskạkʼa. Alele ńurlenre hõ ale do arhõle beretʼ daṛeakʼgea. Ńutrele duṛupʼ tahẽlenre hõ Probhu Isor do aleren marsale hoyokʼa." 
Micah7:9 Ńitokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ edrele asen baṛayetʼkana, ente ale do uni upạrtele kại akada, menkhan mucạtʼre uni doe ale sejokʼa ar aleakʼ ạidạriye teṅgoalea. Uni do marsalteye oḍok ạgulea ar ale do uniyakʼ dhorom reakʼ bicạrle ńela." 
Micah7:10 Unre aleren bạiri do ona ńelteko lajaokʼa. Onko do aleko metale kan tahẽkana, “Aperen Probhu Isor do okare menaetapea?” Menkhan aleakʼ mẽtʼ do onkoakʼ ńurokʼe ńela; hẽ, hor reakʼ losotʼ lekage onko doko lebetʼ khadbadao ocokʼa." 
Micah7:11 E Jerusalem, unre amakʼ bhit do benao arokʼtama, ar amakʼ simạnako do baṛhao ocokʼa." 
Micah7:12 Ona jokhecʼ Ạsur ar Misor reakʼ nagrahako khon hoṛ do ape ṭhenko hijukʼa; hẽ Misor khon phurạt gaḍa hạbicʼrenko, mitʼ jalapuri khon armitʼ jalapurirenko ar mitʼ buru khon armitʼ buru hạbicʼren hoṛko hijukʼa." 
Micah7:13 Dhạrtire girobasokʼ kan bedhorom hoṛko iạte dhạrti do ujạṛokʼa. 
Micah7:14 E Probhu Isor, am do ṭheṅgate gukʼpiko leka amren hoṛko ạtińkom. Ente onko do amakʼ palren kangeako. Onko beṛhaete ạtiń ṭạnḍi menakʼre hõ onko do eskarge hahaṅkarreko girobasokʼ kana. Ḍher din lahare cetʼlekako ạtińkan tahẽkan onkage Bason reakʼ Gileadre jemonko ạtiń daṛeakʼ." 
Micah7:15 Misor disạm khon oḍok hijukʼ reakʼ dinko leka am do hahaṛawakʼ kạmiko udukʼaleme. 
Micah7:16 Jạt jạtrenko daṛeanko hoylenre hõ onko do amakʼ kạmi ńelteko lajaokʼa. Onko do mocako bedokʼma ar luturko esetʼkatakoma. 
Micah7:17 Onko do biń ar eṭakʼ lacʼte takʼṛam jiwiyanko leka dhuṛiko caṭoga. Onkoakʼ gaṛ khon onko do thar tharaoate am ṭhen, aleren Probhu Isor ṭhenko oḍok hijukʼa arko botoram ma." 
Micah7:18 Am lekan Isor do ar celehõ bạnuiya okoe do jiwetʼ tahen hoṛkoakʼ kại ar behokakʼe ikạyetʼtako. Am do jaejug edre bam sapʼ dohoya bickom amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛem udugte rạskạm bujhạueda. 
Micah7:19 Am do arhõ ale cetanrem mãyãkʼkana; ar aleakʼ sanam kạiko dom jaṅga latarketʼtalea ar aleakʼ joto ghạṭko do jalapuri reakʼ khạndri dakʼrem giḍikatalea. 
Micah7:20 Ḍher din lahare am do aleren hapṛamko ṭhen cetʼlekam gokʼletʼ onkage Abraham ar Jakob bõsrenko ṭhen pạtiạranicʼ baṛe tahenme ar amakʼ asambheṛ dulạṛ baṛe sodorme. 
Nahum1:1 Niniwi babotre Isorakʼ katha. Elkosi atoren Nạhum oka dorsone ńelletʼ ona do noa puthire ol akana. 
Nahum1:2 Probhu Isor do nonkan Isor kanae uni do acʼakʼ kuṛạiye khojkana ar joe emokʼkana; Probhu Isor doe hala hạliya ar acʼren bạiriko lạgitʼ edreye dohokakʼa. 
Nahum1:3 Probhu Isor do usạrate bae edrekʼa ar daṛete hõe maraṅgea. Uni do begor sạjạite bae aṛakʼa. Uniyakʼ hor do birbão ar hoere tahenkana, ar rimil do uniyakʼ jaṅga reakʼ dhuṛikana." 
Nahum1:4 Uni do jalapuriye dhomkaoetʼte onae ańjetʼ ocoyeda; ar gaḍako doe rohoṛ ocoyeda. Bason ar Karmel do gosokʼkana ar Lebanon reakʼ bahako do tolmojokʼkana. 
Nahum1:5 Maraṅ maraṅ buruko do uni samaṅre dal dalaokʼ kana ar huḍiń buruko do galaokʼkana. Uniyakʼ hạjirokʼre dhạrti ar onare tahen kan jotogeko thar tharokʼkana. 
Nahum1:6 Uniyakʼ raṅgao samaṅre do okoeye ṭikạu tahẽdaṛekokʼa? Ar uniyakʼ botoranakʼ edre do okoeye sahao daṛeketaea? Uniyakʼ edre do seṅgel leka jolokʼkana; ar uni samaṅre lạṭu lạṭu dhiriko do gejerokʼ kana. 
Nahum1:7 Probhu Isor doe bhagegea, ar gạr hilokʼren doe aotan gaṛ kana. Ar acʼre okoeko hirlạkʼkan onko doe baḍaeyetʼkogea." 
Nahum1:8 Menkhan uni do ḍubạ dakʼte Niniwi nagrahae marao utạra; ar okoe acʼ secʼrenko baṅkan onko do ńutteye laga ńirkoa. 
Nahum1:9 E Niniwiren hoṛko, Probhu Isor upạrte jãhãnakʼgepe cekae uni do ona bae jo baha ocoytapea. Uni doe caba utạra ar gạr do dohṛate baṅ rakapʼa." 
Nahum1:10 Ape do jạnum jhạuạrepe ramphakʼa ar darkha rasa ńũtepe bulokʼa; ar lanḍha lekape lokʼa. 
Nahum1:11 Ente ape tala khon nonkan mitʼ hoṛe oḍok hecʼakana okoe do Probhu Isor upạrte bạṛicʼakʼe ponthayetʼ ar bạṛicʼ sopolhae emokʼkan. 
Nahum1:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Jihudạ, Ạsurrenko doko daṛegere hõ arko alekhagere hõ enhõ onko doko gocʼ ocokʼa. Iń do sạrigeń duk ocoakatʼmea, menkhan ar bạń duk ocomea." 
Nahum1:13 Ńitokʼ do amakʼ taren khon onkoakʼ arãṛiń rạputʼ giḍikakʼa ar amakʼ tol koń topakʼ giḍikakʼa.” 
Nahum1:14 E Niniwi, Probhu Isor do am reaṅe menetʼkana, “Amakʼ ńutum rukhiyại lạgitʼ amre cele hoṛge bako tahena. Amren debotakoakʼ mundilre oka boṅga muṭhạnko menakʼ onakoń marao giḍikakʼa. Ar ạḍitetʼem bạṛicʼgete amakʼ topań teartama.”" 
Nahum1:15 Okoeṭakʼ hoṛ bhage sombate ạguyetʼkan ar suluk reakʼe roṛetʼkan, ma ńelme uniyakʼ jaṅga do buru cetanre menakʼtaea. E Jihudạ, amakʼ porobko palonme ar okaṭakʼ manotem dohoakatʼ ona purạume. Dusṭạmi hoṛ do ar bako akromonmea; onko doko marao ocokʼa." 
Nahum2:1 E Niniwi, okoeṭakʼ hoṛ doe chiṭiạu giḍikakʼkan uni do am upạrteye hijukʼkana. Pạcri gaṛko cetanre amren lạṛhại phạdko sapṛaokom, ar ḍahar horhoeme, ḍanḍa paṭhe keṭejokʼme ar lạṛhại phạdko jarwakom." 
Nahum2:2 Dhaṅ dhakʼserko do Israelko ujạṛ akadere hõ ar uniyakʼ darkha bagwanko marao akatʼtaere hõ Probhu Isor do ńit hõe Jakobren kangea, metakʼme uni do Israelakʼ lahateakʼ ṭhonoke ruạṛkataea." 
Nahum2:3 Bạiri ar lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍhal do arakʼgea ar lạṛhạikoakʼ kicricʼ hõ jeṅgetʼ arakʼgea. Onko do lạṛhại lạgitʼko jarwa akana; onkoakʼ mẽṛhẽtʼ reakʼ rãt gạḍiko do jhak jhakaokʼ kana; ar onko do borlomko hurlạyeda; 
Nahum2:4 Onkoakʼ sanam rãt gạḍiko do hor horte hoe bharḍo leka calakʼkana ar nagraha reakʼ phaelao jaegako talate baṅ sambṛaoicʼ leka hante natekʼkana. Onako do ńelokʼte jolokʼkan mosal leka; ar bijli leka ńir baṛae kana. 
Nahum2:5 Raj do acʼren subedarkoe hohoakokana; arko tohotʼ bhindạṛokʼ kanrehõ onko doko laha idikʼ kana; ar nagraha reakʼ bhit ṭhenko ńir calakʼkana; onko do bhit rạpud reakʼ jontroko bạisạueda. 
Nahum2:6 Gaḍako reakʼ phaṭok duạrko do jhicʼena ar raj oṛakʼ do maraokʼkana. 
Nahum2:7 Rạniyakʼ kicricʼko do otoṛ giḍikʼkante uni doe bondi idi ocokʼkana Uniren kạ̃ṛmĩko do potam lekako rakʼetʼkana ar koṛamko ceṭagokʼkana. 
Nahum2:8 Niniwi do phoṛ akatʼ mitʼṭecʼ pukhri leka one ona reakʼ dakʼko ạtu oḍokokʼkan. Onko do “Teṅgokʼpe, teṅgokʼpe” menteko hohoyetʼkana menkhan uniren hoṛ do celege tayom secʼ bako beṅgetʼ ạcureda." 
Nahum2:9 Uniyakʼ rupạ luṭtaepe, ar sona hõ luṭ joṅpe. Noako jinis do asambheṛgea; noako do uniyakʼ murạiko reakʼ dhon kana." 
Nahum2:10 Uni doe luṭ ocokʼkana, are eken ti ocokʼkana are marao ocokʼkana. Uniren hoṛkoakʼ ontor do norom akana, ar gunṭhi do lakaṛ lukuṛokʼkantakoa; onkoakʼ ḍanḍare daṛe do bạnukʼa, onko mimitʼkoakʼ mẽtʼãhã do mulin akantakoa." 
Nahum2:11 Onko dhạcri kulkoakʼ dander ńitokʼ do okare menakʼa, one okare akoren hoponko nunuako kan tahẽkan, ar onḍe dhạcri kul ar kul eṅga do hoponko salakʼ khạtirjomako tahẽkana?" 
Nahum2:12 Dhạcri kul do acʼren hoponko lạgitʼ janware gocʼetʼko tahẽkana ar acʼren kul eṅga lạgitʼ hõe limbạtʼ gocʼetʼko tahẽkana; uni doe gocʼ akawan janwarte acʼakʼ oṛakʼ are or cirạ akatʼko janwarte acʼakʼ dandere perecʼetʼ tahẽkana. 
Nahum2:13 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E Niniwi, iń do am upạrte; amakʼ rãt gạḍikoń jeretʼ giḍikakʼa, ar tarwaṛe do amren dhạcri kulkoe jomkoa. Iń do amren sikạr lạgitʼ celege noa dhạrtire bạń doho oṭokakoa. Ar amren sombat emokʼkoakʼ aṛaṅ hõ ar baṅ ańjomokʼtakoa.”" 
Nahum3:1 Hae, ona mãyãm joro ocoakatʼ nagraha do, one onare eṛe ar luṭakʼ jiniskote perecʼge, onḍe do jaoge manwako gocʼ ocokʼkana." 
Nahum3:2 Ańjomme, cạbuk do sapaṭ sapaṭ ar pạ̃ihạ̃ko reakʼ saḍe do ghaṛ ghaṛaokʼkana; sadomko doko don idiyeda; ar rãt gạḍiko do bin sambṛaokʼ leka calakʼ kana;" 
Nahum3:3 ar aswariko doko ńir bhiṛạukʼkana, tarwaṛe do jhak jhakaokʼ kana, ar borlom do malkaokʼkana. Ńelpe, ḍher ghạl akan hoṛ ar mạ̃ṛĩko reakʼ ḍạṅge, alekha mạ̃ṛĩkoge, ar hoṛko do mạ̃ṛĩreko hãṛãgokʼ kana." 
Nahum3:4 Noako do uni kusmbiyakʼ aema utạr loṭghuṭi iạte hoyokʼkana; uni doe cemkecʼgea are bukʼlạuicʼ era kana. Uni do acʼakʼ loṭghuṭi iạte jạt jạtrenkoe ạkhrińetʼkoa; ar disạm disạmrenko do acʼakʼ muhnite. 
Nahum3:5 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E Niniwi, iń do am upạrteń teṅgo akana; amakʼ mẽtʼãhã hạbicʼ kicricʼ iń rakabtama. Amakʼ uluṅ do jạt jạtrenkoń ńel ocokoa ar rajosṭiren do amakʼ lajaoakʼtetʼge." 
Nahum3:6 Iń do am cetanre jońjalkoń capatʼ lạthiạuama, ar hirkhạ mẽtʼteń ńelmea ar landha dhutʼicʼ hoṛiń hoyocomea." 
Nahum3:7 Am ńelte hoṛ do mẽtʼãhãko ạcurtakoa arko mena, ‘Niniwi do maraoena, ar ona lạgitʼ do okoeye homor halaṅa?’ Am lạgitʼ jiwi rakʼṛecʼicʼ do okareń ńamea?”" 
Nahum3:8 E Niniwi, am do cetʼ Na-aman khon hõm bhagegea? Uni do nil gaḍa aṛereye tahẽkana ar uni beṛhaete do dakʼ tahẽkana. Gaḍa do uniyakʼ rurukhiyạ bhitge tahẽkana." 
Nahum3:9 Kus ar Misor do asambheṛ daṛekin emaekan tahẽkana; uniren gateko modre Puṭ ar Libia hõkin tahẽkana. 
Nahum3:10 Enhõ uniren hoṛko do bondikate eṭakʼ disạmteko idi ocolena. Mitʼke mitʼ dobạṭiạkore uniren gidrạ doko tawakʼ gocʼ ocolena. Uniren manotan hoṛko do gulibãṭkate sikṛite tolkateko bondi idi ocolena. 
Nahum3:11 E Niniwi, am hõ bul bhuteṛkatem kunḍlạṅ hapekokʼa; ar bạiriko khon okokʼ lạgitʼ asrayem sendrajoṅa." 
Nahum3:12 Amakʼ sanam gaṛko do bele jote perecʼ loa dare leka; jãhãege onae rukui uniyakʼ mocarege ona do ńurokʼa. 
Nahum3:13 Amren lạṛhại phạdko do jotoge maejiuko leka kanako. Amakʼ disạm reakʼ phaṭok duạrko do amren bạiriko samaṅre jhicʼge menakʼa; ar seṅgel do onako reakʼ duạr-sikṛikoe jeretʼ giḍiakada. 
Nahum3:14 Gherao okte lạgitʼ dakʼ do rakapʼkate dohokakʼme, ar amakʼ gaṛko daṛeanakʼ hoeocoyme. Hasa do lebetʼ khadbadaome; cun ar gitil mesalkate iṭạ tearme." 
Nahum3:15 Seṅgel do onḍe ame jommea; ar tarwaṛe doe samakʼmea ar jarkharetʼkan pohoko lekae marao utạrmea. Am do makʼraokan ar jhãke jhãk pohoko leka lekhate saṅge idikʼme. 
Nahum3:16 Amren bạnij beparkoakʼ lekha do sermaren ipilko khon hõ ḍherem saṅge akatʼkoa, menkhan onko do makʼraokan pohoko leka urkateko uḍạu calaoena." 
Nahum3:17 Amren hohorhoko ar kạmiyạko do jhãke jhãk pohoko lekage, one onko do rabaṅ dinre bhit cetanreko duṛupʼ tahenkan ar siń candoe rakapʼlen khan doko uḍạu calakʼkan, ar okateko calakʼkana ona do celege bako baḍaea." 
Nahum3:18 E Ạsurren raj, amren mukhiyạ doko jạpitʼ joṅkana; ar amren rajren kạmiyạko doko giticʼ akana. Amren hoṛko do burureko pasnao akana, ar onko jarwako lạgitʼ do celege bạnukʼkoa." 
Nahum3:19 Jãhãnakʼ cetʼtege amakʼ ghao do baṅ bogekʼkana; ente amakʼ ghạl do maraṅgea. Okoe amakʼ khoborko ańjomakatʼ onko mimitʼko do amakʼ ńutumte tiko thayoyeda, ente amakʼ bin mucạtʼ dusṭạmire do okoe hale bae paṛao akana?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Isorakʼ katha do Habakuk nạbi ṭhen dorson hotete sodorlena. 
Habakkuk1:2 E Probhu Isor, ar tinạkʼ din goṛo ńam lạgitʼ amiń hohowama ar am do bam ańjomtińạ? Ar tinạkʼ din “Santao hoyokʼte” am ṭheniń rakʼjoṅa ar am do bam bańcaoińạ?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Cedakʼ dusṭami hoṛ ńelko lạgitʼ dom jorae moṭeńkana? Cedakʼ am do behokakʼem sahaoeda? Iń samaṅre jarkhar ar santao hoyokʼkana ar jhogṛa hõ jaoge hoyokʼkana. 
Habakkuk1:4 Ạn-ạriko nijor idikʼkana ar dhorom reakʼ bicạr do baṅge hoyokʼkana. Dhorom hoṛko khon dusṭạmi hoṛkoakʼ ektiạrige ḍherokʼkante bicạr do ulṭạukʼkana. 
Habakkuk1:5 Probhu Isore menkeda, “Jạt jạtrenko secʼ beṅgedpe, enḍekhanpe ṭhak utạrokʼa, ente ape bidạlrege nonkanakʼ iń kạmiya one ona reakʼ kathań lại apere hõ ohogepe pạtiạulena." 
Habakkuk1:6 Iń do Babelrenkoń sapṛaoetʼkoa; onko do kurmutạha jạtren kanako, onko do eṭakʼkoakʼ disạm hatjoṅ lạgitʼ dhạrti reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃iteko calakʼkana." 
Habakkuk1:7 Onko ńelte hoṛ do ạḍiko botorokʼa. Onko do akotege akoakʼ ạn-ạriko benaojoṅa ar okoe tabere hõ tahen do bako aṅgoca. 
Habakkuk1:8 Onkoren sadomko do hunḍạr khon hõ usạrateko calakʼa, ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ do hunḍạr khon hõko botorangea. Onkoren aswariko do sạṅgiń khon tạpisteko hijukʼa; ar onko do jojom lạgitʼ pajhạṛ lekako ạphir hijukʼkana." 
Habakkuk1:9 Onko do santao lạgitʼgeko hijukʼkana. Onkoren maraṅ phạdko doko laha hijukʼkana ar gitil leka alekha hoṛko bondi idikoa. 
Habakkuk1:10 Onko do rapajkoko siṛog akokana ar subedarko doko landa dhutʼako kana. Gaṛ ńelteko landa joṅkana; ar pạcrite decʼ paromokʼ lạgitʼ dhiri reakʼ ḍhipiko benaoeda ar gaṛkoko dokholeda. 
Habakkuk1:11 Ar ona tayom do hadaṛ hadaṛ hoe lekako parom calakʼkana. Onko hoṛ doko dusigea, ente onkoren debota do akoakʼ daṛege.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 E Probhu, ińren Isor, ińren sonoticʼ, am do cetʼ jaejug tahenkạnicʼ dom baṅkana? Ale do ohole marao utạrlena. E Probhu Isor, ale sạjạile iạtege am do Babelrenkom bachao akatʼkoa; E asray buru, ale sạjạile lạgitʼge onko dom teṅgo akatʼkoa." 
Habakkuk1:13 Am do nunạkʼgem khạṭigea je, am do bạṛicʼakʼ secʼ beṅgetʼ hõ bam beṅgetʼeda ar behokakʼ hõ bam sahao daṛeakʼ kana. Enḍekhan cekate onko bepạtiạr hoṛ do bhage mẽtʼtem ńeletʼkoa? Dusṭạmi hoṛ do tinre ako khon hõ bhage hoṛko tạhuṛetʼkoa unre cedakʼ am do hape akanem tahenkana?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Cedakʼ am do hoṛko jalapuriren hako ar leńokʼkan jiwiyanko leka cakʼlaoicʼ bạnuitako hoṛ lekam doho akatʼkoa? 
Habakkuk1:15 Babelrenko do onkoren sanamkoge bạ̃ṛsiteko or rakapʼetʼkoa ar jhạliteko owar rakapʼetʼkoa, arko samṭao jarwayetʼkoa; ar onate onko doko rạskạkʼ kana, arko kusikʼkana." 
Habakkuk1:16 Onko do akoakʼ jhạli ńutumte janwar dãṛẽko samaṅetʼkoa ar or jhạli ńutumte dhupko jeretʼeda, ente jhạli iạtege onko do ḍherko laba ar bhage bhage jomakʼko joma." 
Habakkuk1:17 Onko do cetʼ ghane ghạṛicʼge akoakʼ jhạliko ạjạuṛiytakoa ar jạt jạtrenko bin mãyãteko gocʼ idikoa? 
Habakkuk2:1 Iń do ińakʼ pahra ṭhạ̃ireń teṅgona, ar pạcri cetanreń dejokʼa; ar uni cetʼe mitạńa ar ińakʼ lạlis reakʼ cetʼe roṛ ruạṛạńa ona lạgitʼ iń koyokʼ hora." 
Habakkuk2:2 Unre Probhu Isor do roṛ ruạṛạdińteye metadińạ, “Noa dorson reakʼ katha olme ar dhiri paṭa cetanre pusṭạute rokʼ caṛhaome jemon ona paṛhaoetʼkanicʼ doe algateye paṛhao daṛeakʼ." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ente noa dorson reakʼ katha hoyokʼ lạgitʼ ńithõe tạṅgiyeda, menkhan usạratege hijukʼkana ar ona dorson do eṛe mente baṅ sạbudokʼa. Bilom lenrehõ ona lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akae tahenme; ona do niṭ akatʼ okterege purạukʼa. Ar noa katha do ol dohokakʼme:" 
Habakkuk2:4 “Bạḍạite perecʼ Babel do dhoromicʼ doe baṅkana, menkhan okoe miridos menteye ataṅ ocokʼkan uni do acʼakʼ biswạs khạtirtege jiwetʼe tahena." 
Habakkuk2:5 Bạḍạite perecʼ Babel sãote darkha rasa doe bepạtiạr akada, uni doe andesale ocoyedekana. Uni do Seoulre leka lalocicʼ ar gujukʼicʼ leka tishõ bae tirpitokʼa; uni do sanam jạtrenko acʼ ṭhene jarwayetʼkoa ar bondikateye idiyetʼkoa." 
Habakkuk2:6 “Onko sanamkoge uniko landa-dhutʼaea arko mena, ‘hae uni do, one okoe eṭakʼkoakʼ jinis acʼ lạgitʼe jarwajoṅ kan ar jạmin reakʼ jiniskoteye kisạ̃ṛokʼkan. Nonka do ar tinạkʼ din calakʼa?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Amren paonadarko do cetʼ ackage bako teṅgona? Arko cetaolen khan onko do cetʼ bako thar tharao ocomea? Unre onko ṭhen am do luṭren jinis lekagem hoyokʼa. 
Habakkuk2:8 Aema jạtren hoṛkoakʼ dhonem luṭ akatʼte onko jạtren sarecʼ hoṛ do amakʼ dhonko luṭtama. Ente am do manwakoakʼ mãyãmem joro ocoakada; ar disạm, nagraha ar onako talaren sanam hoṛkom santao akatʼkoa." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Jạt jạtrenkoko mena, ‘Hae, uni do, okoe do behok reakʼ labte acʼakʼ tahen oṛakʼe benaoetʼkan jemon khạtirjomae tahẽdaṛeakʼte muhin reakʼ ti khon rukhiyại ńam.’" 
Habakkuk2:10 Am do ḍher jạtrenkom marao akatʼkote amakʼ gharońj cetanre lajaoem ạgu akada ar bańcaokʼ reakʼ ạidạri dom caba akada. 
Habakkuk2:11 Amakʼ oṛakʼ-bhit reakʼ dhiri do am upạrteye lạlisa ar oṛakʼ reakʼ saṅga kaṭ do ona kathageye sãhạ̃kʼakʼa. 
Habakkuk2:12 “Jạt jạtrenko doko mena, ‘hae uni do, one okoe do mãyãm hotete nagrahae benaoetʼ kan ar behokakʼ hotete atokoe teṅgoyetʼkan.’" 
Habakkuk2:13 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor doe niṭ dohoakada, jạt jạtrenkoakʼ khaṭaoakʼ reakʼ kuṛại do seṅgelre atar giḍikʼa ar onko do ạuṛiyakʼge apnartetʼko laṅga ocokʼa." 
Habakkuk2:14 Jalapuri cetʼleka dakʼte perecʼ tahen onkage dhạrti hõ Probhu Isorakʼ ṭhonok reakʼ ạkilte perecʼge tahena. 
Habakkuk2:15 “Jạt jạtrenkoko mena, ‘Hae uni do, okoe do edrete acʼ aḍepaseren hoṛko bubulakʼteye ńũ bul ocoyetʼko jemon onkoakʼ lajaoakʼtetʼe ńel daṛeatako.’" 
Habakkuk2:16 Am do manot bodolte lajaotem perejokʼa. Ar ńitokʼ do amakʼ pạlikana. Am do bubulakʼ ńũkatem konḍa manḍekʼ kana. Probhu Isorakʼ jojomti reakʼ edrete perecʼ bạṭi do am secʼge hijukʼkana; ar bemanotakʼte amakʼ manot do dapal esedokʼa. 
Habakkuk2:17 Lebanon cetanre oka santaoem calao akatʼ ona do purạtege amre hijukʼa ar onḍenko janwarem gocʼ akatʼkote ńitokʼ do janwarge amko botor ocomea. Am do manwakoakʼ mãyãmem joro ocoakada ar disạm, nagraha ar onḍenko sanam hoṛkom santao akatʼkoa." 
Habakkuk2:18 “Boṅgawakʼ do jãhãn damge bạnukʼtaea, ente manwage coṅ uni mae rokʼ benao akade. Ar dulicʼ muṭhạn hõ jãhãn damge bạnukʼtaea, ente manwa do ona khon eṛe cecetʼakʼgeko ńama. Ar okoe acʼakʼ tite onakoe benao akatʼ uni do cedakʼ onareye ṭehãḍokʼkana? Uni boṅga ma kathage coṅ bae roṛ daṛeakʼ." 
Habakkuk2:19 Jạt jạtrenko doko mena, ‘Hae uni hoṛ do, one okoe kaṭ do jiwetʼakʼe metakʼkan se jiwi bạnukʼ dhiri do beredokʼe metaekan.’ Onako do cetʼ uni sikhnạte em daṛeaea? Onako ma eken sona ar rupạte muṛạu esetʼ akan; onakore do cetʼ sahẽtʼge bạnukʼa." 
Habakkuk2:20 Menkhan Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ sonot oṛakʼre menaea; sanam dhạrti do uni samaṅre hapeakan tahenma.” 
Habakkuk3:1 Habakuk nạbiyakʼ koejoṅ 
Habakkuk3:2 E Probhu Isor, iń do amakʼ kạmi reakʼ katha ańjomteń botorena. E Probhu Isor, ale okterege onako do arhõ onkaeme; aleakʼ okterege am do onako udukʼaleme. Edrekʼ jokhecʼ mãyãkʼ reakʼ katha do alom hiṛińa." 
Habakkuk3:3 Isor do Teman khone hijukʼkana, uni sonoticʼ do Paran buru khone hijukʼkana. [Sela] Uniyakʼ ṭhonok do sermae tiyokʼakada; dhạrti do uniyakʼ sarhaote perecʼ akana." 
Habakkuk3:4 Siń cando lekage uni doe jhak jhakaokʼkana; uniyakʼ ti khon marsal do oḍok hijukʼkana, onḍe uniyakʼ daṛe do danaṅre menakʼtaea." 
Habakkuk3:5 Uni laha lahate do mahamạrige calakʼkana; ar uni tayom tayomte do ruạ ar hasoge. 
Habakkuk3:6 Uni do teṅgokate dhạrtiye daldalaoeda; ar beṅgetʼte jạt jạtrenkoe thar tharao ocoyetʼkoa. Sedae reakʼ buru-ḍuṅgriko do rạpudokʼkana ar sedae jug reakʼ buruko do rạputʼ ńurokʼkana. Jug hilokʼ khon uniyakʼ hor reakʼ jãhãn bodolge bạnukʼtaea. 
Habakkuk3:7 Kusanren hoṛ do nindhạn dosareń ńelketʼkoa, ar Midiạnren hoṛ doko thar tharaokʼkana." 
Habakkuk3:8 E Probhu Isor, gaḍako cetanre amakʼ edre do cetʼ caṛhao akana? Amakʼ edre do cetʼ gaḍako cetanrege paṛao akana? Am do cetʼ jalapuri cetanrem ạṛis akana? Ona iạte cetʼ am do amren sadomko ar amakʼ jit reakʼ rãt gạḍikorem decʼ baṛaekana?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Amakʼ akʼ dom halaṅ rakapʼkeda ar sar do ghũṛạ̃rem lagao akada. (Sela) Ar gaḍakote dhạrti dom hạṭiń akada. 
Habakkuk3:10 Buru-ḍuṅgriko do am ńelteko dal dalaokʼkana. Ar dakʼ do botorge ạtukʼkana; athantar dakʼ do acʼakʼ aṛaṅe ańjom ocoyeda, ar ḍheoko do cetanreye rakapʼ ocoyeda." 
Habakkuk3:11 Amakʼ ạphir calakʼkan sar reakʼ jhalkaote ar bijli leka amakʼ borlom reakʼ jhak jhakte sermare siń cando ar ńindạ cando dokin teṅgo hapeyena. 
Habakkuk3:12 Am do edrete dhạrti talatem laha idiyena ar jạt jạtrenkom lebetʼ gańjaoketʼkoa. 
Habakkuk3:13 Amren hoṛko bańcaoko lạgitʼ ar amren ojokʼicʼ hoṛ rukhiyạye lạgitʼ am dom oḍok hecʼena. Am do dusṭạmi disạmren mukhiyạm ghạlkedea, ar uniyakʼ disạm do purạtem marao utạrketʼtaea. [Sela]" 
Habakkuk3:14 Am do amakʼ ṭheṅgate uniren lạṛhại hoṛkoren matham sobokʼedea. One onko do chirchạtur cabale lạgitʼ hoe bharḍo lekako hijukʼkan, one onko nandanicʼ oko okote jome lekako rạskạkʼkan." 
Habakkuk3:15 Amakʼ ạyurte sadom do doreãoko lebḍakeda ar athantar dakʼ doko haḍak ḍabak ocokeda. 
Habakkuk3:16 Ona ańjomkate iń do botorokʼ iń ehopʼena, ińakʼ luṭikin hõ thar tharaoentinạ; iń doń nijor idiyena ar ińakʼ jaṅgakin do lakaṛ lukuṛokʼ ehopʼena. Enhõ iń do ona din lạgitʼ jiwi hataṛkate koyokʼ hor akaegeń tahena one oka hilokʼ ale khekhedko do muhinreko paṛaokʼ." 
Habakkuk3:17 Loa darere baṅ bahakʼre hõ ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩre darkha jo baṅ jolenre hõ, jạitun darere jãhãn jo baṅ saplenre hõ ar khetre jãhãn phosol baṅ hoylenre hõ, bhiḍikoakʼ khạṛre bhiḍiko bako tahẽlenre hõ ar goṛare kaḍa bitkil bako tahẽlenre hõ," 
Habakkuk3:18 enhõ iń do Probhu Isor iạteń rạskạkʼa; ar ińren babańcaoicʼ Isor iạtegeń hulạsokʼa. 
Habakkuk3:19 Probhu Isorge ińren daṛe do; uni do jel eṅgawakʼ jaṅga leka ińakʼ jaṅgae hoyocoketʼtińạ ar usul usul ṭhạ̃ite calakʼ reakʼ daṛegeye emạńkana. Sereń cakʼlaoko lạgitʼ tumạlakʼ. Ińakʼ hukum lekate taranakʼ bajnako sãote sereń hoyokʼa. 
Zephaniah1:1 Amonren hopon Jihudạren raj Josiạwakʼ rajokʼ jokhecʼ Kusren hopon Sephaniạ ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorena. Kus do Gedaliạren hopon, ar Gedaliạ do Amariren hopon, ar Amari do Hiskiạren hopone tahẽkana." 
Zephaniah1:2 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do dhạrti khon sanamakʼ iń marao utạra." 
Zephaniah1:3 Manwa ar janwar, coṭren cẽṛẽ ar jalapuriren hakoko hõń caba utạrkoa. Iń do bedhoromkoń sumạrkoa. Ar dhạrti khon manwa doń marao utạrkoa." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Jihudạ upạrte ar Jerusalemre girobasokʼ kan sanamko upạrte ińakʼ tiyiń rakabtińạ. Niạ disạm khon Bakʼal debota sewawae reakʼ jotowakʼko ar lạṭu ar kạticʼ hudạren sanam naekekoń marao utạrkoa. 
Zephaniah1:5 Sermaren sanam ipilko sewawako lạgitʼ okoe do chat cetanre decʼkateko ḍobokʼetʼkan ar okoe do Probhu Isor ńutume kiriạ tayom hõ Milkom debota ńutumteko kiriạkʼ kan onko hõń marao utạrkoa. 
Zephaniah1:6 Ar okoe Probhu Isor tayom khonko ruạṛakan ar uniyakʼ sanaleka bako calakʼkan ar uniyakʼ sana baḍaejoṅ bako khojkan onko hõń marao giḍikoa.” 
Zephaniah1:7 Ape do Probhu Isor samaṅre hape akan tahenpe, ente Probhu Isorakʼ din do hecʼ sor akana. Probhu Isor do mitʼṭecʼ samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼe nenḍa akada; ar uni okoeye neota akatʼko onko doe sapha akatʼkoa." 
Zephaniah1:8 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ińakʼ ona samaṅokʼakʼ dinre iń do rajren kạmiyạko, rajren hoponko ar okoe bidisiạkoakʼ kicricʼko horokʼetʼkan onko sanam hoṛkoń sạjạikoa." 
Zephaniah1:9 Okoe do duạr reakʼ ganaḍe donateko paromokʼkan ar santao ar phạsiạra hotete akoren debotawakʼ oṛakʼko perecʼetʼkan onko do enhilokʼgeń sạjạikoa” 
Zephaniah1:10 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Enhilokʼ do hako phaṭok duạr ṭhen khon rakʼ reakʼ aṛaṅ ar nagraha reakʼ dosar hĩs khon homor halaṅ ar buruko secʼ khon do rạputʼ ńurokʼkan reakʼ saḍege ańjomokʼa." 
Zephaniah1:11 E Motteserre tahenkan hoṛko, ape do homor halaṅpe, ente aperen bepariko ar ṭaka poesa karbạriạko do jotogeko marao ocokʼa." 
Zephaniah1:12 Unre iń do diuheante Jerusalem reakʼ sanam ṭhạ̃ire khojiń hataoa ar okoe do apnartetʼ tirpit akae tahenteye men, ‘Probhu Isor do bhage bạṛicʼ cetʼge bae cekaea,’ onko doń sạjạikoa." 
Zephaniah1:13 Onkoakʼ dhon do luṭ idikʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ oṛakʼ-duạr hõ maraokʼtakoa. Onko do oṛakʼ-duạrko benaojoṅa menkhan onare do bako tahẽdaṛeakʼa; darkha bagwan hõko benaojoṅa menkhan darkha rasa do bako ńũ daṛeakʼa.” 
Zephaniah1:14 Probhu Isorakʼ ona maraṅakʼ din do sor hecʼakana ar ạḍi usạrage hijukʼkana. Ote Probhu Isorakʼ din reakʼ sabad ańjompe! Unre lạṛhại birko do hasoteko raga. 
Zephaniah1:15 Ar enhilokʼ do Probhu Isorakʼ edre reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa, gạr ar cikʼpạ reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa, muhin ar jarkharokʼ reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa, dhund reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa, rimil ar kaṛaṅ ńut reakʼ dinge hoyokʼa." 
Zephaniah1:16 Ona do pạcrite esetʼ joto nagrahako upạrte ar konac reakʼ sanam khon usul pahra oṛakʼ upạrte sakwa reakʼ saḍe ar lạṛhại reakʼ hoho dinge hoyokʼa. 
Zephaniah1:17 Probhu Isor do hoṛko cetanre maraṅ kosṭogeye paṛao ocoyte onko do kãṛã hoṛ leka ṭạmḍạu baṛaea, ente onko do Probhu Isor upạrteko kại akada. Onkoakʼ mãyãm do dhuṛi lekage giḍi ocokʼa ar onkoakʼ hoṛmo do guricʼ leka giḍi akan tahena." 
Zephaniah1:18 Probhu Isorakʼ edre hilokʼ onkoakʼ sona ar rupạ do bae rukhiyạ daṛeakoa. Uniyakʼ ontor jala reakʼ seṅgelte goṭa dhạrti do lokʼa, ente dhạrtire tahẽnkan sanamkoge uni do ackageye caba utạrkoa, hẽ uni do botorgeye ses utạrkoa." 
Zephaniah2:1 E bin lajaokʼ jạtrenko, ape do midokʼpe ar mitʼ sãote jarwakʼpe." 
Zephaniah2:2 Ona din do peṭecʼ leka uḍạu hijukʼkana; onate niṭ akatʼ okte ạuri hijukʼre, ar Probhu Isorakʼ jolokʼkan edre apere ạuri hijukʼre, uniyakʼ khĩs ạuri hijukʼre ape do mitʼ saote jarwakʼpe." 
Zephaniah2:3 E disạmren sanam mạ̃hir hoṛko, ape okoe do Probhu Isorakʼ hukum lekape kạmikan, ape do uniyakʼ sanaleka dhoromte ar mạ̃hirte calakʼpe; enḍekhan Probhu Isorakʼ edre reakʼ dinre ape do hoedaṛeakʼa asraype ńama." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gasa do ujạṛakʼ ar Askelon do dhaṅdhaserakʼ ṭhạ̃ige hoyokʼa. Asdodren hoṛ do siń marsalregeko laga ńir ocokʼa ar Ekron doe totʼ giḍi ocokʼa. 
Zephaniah2:5 E Kerithiren hoṛko, okoe do jalapuri aṛerepe tahenkan, hae ape do! E Philisṭikoakʼ Kanan, am upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ katha do nonka, “Am do nonkań jarkharmea, amre celege bako tahena.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Jalapuri aṛe reakʼ jaega do ạtiń ṭạnḍikoge hoyokʼa; onḍe do gukʼpikoakʼ kumbạ ar bhiḍikoakʼ khạṛ tahena. 
Zephaniah2:7 Onako ṭoṭha do Jihudi bõsren sarecʼkoakʼ ạidạrire tahena; onḍe onko do ạtiń reakʼ ṭhạ̃iko ńama. Ar ạyupʼ jokhecʼ do Askelonakʼ oṛakʼreko giticʼa. Onkoren Probhu Isor do onkoe ńel todarotkoa; ar lahate lekae ruạṛkatakoa. 
Zephaniah2:8 Israelren Isor phạdkoren Probhui meneda, “Moab reakʼ henosta ar Amonrenkoakʼ landa dhutʼ reakʼ katha doń ańjom akatʼgea; unkin do ińren hoṛkin henosta akatʼkoa ar onkoakʼ disạm dokhol lạgitʼte ạḍikin bạḍạiyokʼ kana. Iń ńutumte kiriạkateń meneda, Moab do khạṭige Sodom leka ar Amonrenkoakʼ disạm do Gomora lekań hoeocoya. Ona do rạṅgạini jhạuạko, buluṅ reakʼ khet ar jaejug lạgitʼ potit jumige hoyokʼa. Iń jạtren sarecʼ tahen hoṛko do unkinakʼko luṭtạkina ar disạmko ạidạrijoṅa.”" 
Zephaniah2:9  
Zephaniah2:10 Unkin do ạkinakʼ bạḍại iạtege noa kuṛạikin ńama, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isorren hoṛkin landa dhutʼatʼko tahẽkana ar onko upạrte apnartetʼ do maraṅkin udugokʼkan tahẽkana." 
Zephaniah2:11 Probhu Isor do unkin ṭhen maraṅ botoranicʼgeye hoyokʼa; uni do dhạrtiren sanam debotakoe nijor ocokoa. Unre sạṅgiń disạmren sanam jạtren hoṛ do apan ạpin disạm khon uniko sewawaea. 
Zephaniah2:12 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Kusrenko, apehõ ińakʼ tarwaṛetepe gujukʼa.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 Probhu Isor do utạr secʼ birudre ti tiạrkate Ạsurrenkoe marao giḍikoa ar Niniwi do ujạṛ utạrakʼ ar hahaṅkar leka khaṅgoṭ ṭhạ̃igeye hoeocoya. 
Zephaniah2:14 Onḍe do ḍaṅgra ar bhiḍi palko ar sanam jạtren jiwiyanko basakʼa. Hahaṅkarren kokor ar dundu do ona reakʼ khunṭi chatnakoreko basakʼa, ar jalna secʼte onkoakʼ rakʼ do ańjomokʼa. Oṛakʼ duạr do marao utạrokʼa ar onako reakʼ debdạru dare reakʼ tokta do luṭ idikʼa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Noage hulạsokʼkan nagraha do one okare nirại menakʼ. Uni do mone moneteye mena, “Ińge minạńa, iń chaḍa ar celege bạnukʼkoa.” Uni do okalekae maraoena, ar bir janwarkoakʼ asray ṭhạ̃ige hoyena! Ar okoe ona aṛeteko parom calakʼ onko doko landa dhudhutʼa ar buḍhạ kạṭupʼko uduga." 
Zephaniah3:1 Hae uni sasantaoicʼ, huhulicʼ ar bhonḍicʼ nagraha do!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Uni do celege bae manaokoa, ar ḍanṭao hõ bae moneyakʼa. Probhu Isor cetanre uni do bae bhorsakʼkana, acʼren Isor ṭhen hõ bae senokʼkana." 
Zephaniah3:3 Uniren rajren kạmiyạko do hạnḍrạukʼkan dhạcri kul leka ar disạm cakʼlaoko do ńindạren hunḍạr leka kanako; one setakʼ lạgitʼ cetʼge bako sarecʼ dohokakʼ kan. 
Zephaniah3:4 Uniren nạbiko do ṭhok arko bepạtiạrgea. Uniren naekeko do sonotakʼko besonot ocoakada ar ạn-ạri upạrteko kạmikana. 
Zephaniah3:5 Unireye tahenkan Probhu Isor doe dhoromgea; uni do bae behoka; uni do setakʼre acʼakʼ dhorom bicạre udukʼeda; oka hilokʼ hõ bae gạphileda. Menkhan bedhorom kạmikoakʼ lajao do bạnukʼtakoa. 
Zephaniah3:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do jạt jạtrenkoń marao akatʼkoa; onkoakʼ usul pahra oṛakʼ hõ marao akana. Onkoakʼ hor doń ujạṛ akatʼtakoa; celege onare do bako dãṛãnkana. Onkoakʼ sanam nagraha do marao akana; onḍe do celege bạnukʼkoa ar celege bako girobasokʼ kana." 
Zephaniah3:7 Iń ar do Jerusalemiń metatʼa, ‘ńitokʼ do khạṭigem botorạńạ ar ińakʼ ḍanṭaoem bataotińạ.’ Enḍekhan uniyakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃i do baṅ nosṭo ocokʼtaea, ińakʼ sanam sạjại hõ uni cetanre baṅ hijukʼa. Menkhan uniren hoṛko do gagoj salakʼ kharapakʼ kạmiko kạmiyeda." 
Zephaniah3:8 “E Jerusalem, am do iń lạgitʼ koyokʼ horre tahenme; oka hilokʼ jạt jạtrenko upạrte goha emokʼ iń teṅgona enhilokʼ lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akae tahenme. Iń doń ṭhik akada, jạt jạtrenkoń jarwakoa, ar rajosṭikoń mitʼ ṭheja ar onko cetanre ińakʼ khĩs, ar ińakʼ jolokʼkan edreń dula. Ińakʼ ontorre jolokʼkan seṅgelte goṭa dhạrti do lo cabakʼa." 
Zephaniah3:9 Ar ona tayom do jạt jạtrenko napae alaṅiń emakoa jemon jotokoge ińko sewawạń ar jotoko mitʼ jomokteko dewa sewa daṛeạń. 
Zephaniah3:10 Kus disạm reakʼ gaḍa hanasa khon iń sewawạńko, ar ińren chirchạtur akan hoṛko do iń ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ạguiya." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ar ińre okako behok reakʼem kạmiakatʼ ona iạte enhilokʼ am dom lajaokʼa, ente niạ nagraha khon iń do sanam hulạsokʼ ar bạḍạiyokʼkan hoṛkoń oḍok giḍikoa. Ińakʼ sonot buru cetanre am do ar tishõ bam gorbokʼa." 
Zephaniah3:12 Okoe Probhu Isor cetanreko bhorsakʼkan onkan mạ̃hir ar iń botorạńkan hoṛ do amreń sarecʼ dohokoa. 
Zephaniah3:13 Israelren onko sarecʼ hoṛ do behokakʼ bako kạmiya; onko do eṛe katha hõ bako roṛa ar onkoakʼ moca khon phạsiaratetʼ hõ baṅ tahena. Onko do jom-ńũkate khạtirjomako jạpitʼjoṅa ar celege bako botor ocokoa.” 
Zephaniah3:14 E Sion kuṛi, ma sereńme; E Israel, ãṭ aṛaṅte hohoeme; E Jerusalemren kuṛi, am do kusikʼme ar amakʼ goṭa ontorte rạskạkʼme." 
Zephaniah3:15 Probhu Isor do amakʼ sạjạiye sạṅgiń giḍiakada, uni do amren bạirikoe laga ńir akatʼkoa. Israelren raj Probhu Isor do am talare menaea; am do ar tishõ bin bhạlạiyakʼ do alom botorakʼa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Enhilokʼ am dom men ocokʼa, “E Sion kuṛi alom botorokʼa, ar alogem as chuṭạukʼa." 
Zephaniah3:17 Amren Probhu Isor do amrege menaea, ar rurukhiyạme lạgitʼ daṛe menakʼgetaea. Uni do am reaṅ ạḍiye rạskạkʼa ar uniyakʼ khạndri dulạṛ reakʼ tirpitokʼte uni doe thir hapekʼa. Ar am reaṅ rạskạteye sereńa.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 Probhu Isore meneda, “Niṭ akatʼ porob bako palon daṛeatʼte amren okoeko hoṛko dukokʼkan onko doń jarwa mitʼakatʼkoa. Onko do bemanot reakʼ bojhako asen baṛayetʼkana." 
Zephaniah3:19 Okoe amko santaoetʼme onko sanamkoge ona oktereń sạjạikoa; leḍhakoń bańcaokoa ar okoeko chirchạtur ocolen onko doń jarwakoa. Onkoakʼ lajao bodolte goṭa dhạrtire sarhao ar maniń emakoa. 
Zephaniah3:20 E Jerusalemren hoṛko, ona jokhecʼ iń do apeń ạgu jarwapea. Ar lahate leka tinreń ruạṛkatapea unre dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko talare ape do manot ar ṭhonokan hoṛiń hoyocopea, ar onape ńela. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Haggai1:1 Darjawes rajakʼ rajokʼ dosar bochorre Sealṭielren hopon Serubabel do Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoicʼe tahẽkana ar Jehosadokren hopon Josuạ do maraṅ naekeye tahẽkana. Ar inạ bochorge turui cando reakʼ pạhilakʼ dinre Probhu Isor do Hagae nạbi hotete onkoe metatʼkoa," 
Haggai1:2 “Phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń menetʼ kana, noko hoṛko meneda, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao reakʼ okte do ńithõ ạuri seṭerokʼa.”" 
Haggai1:3 Unre nạbi Hagae hotete Probhu Isor do arhõe menkeda," 
Haggai1:4 “Noa do cetʼ ṭhik hoyokʼkana, ape do noksa akatʼ oṛakʼrepe tahenkana ar ińakʼ oṛakʼ do dhaṅdhaserakʼ hoyakantińạ?" 
Haggai1:5 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, okalekape calakʼkan ona mońjte hudiskate ńelpe." 
Haggai1:6 Ape do ḍhergepe eretʼkana, menkhan thoṛagepe ireda. Jom dope jometʼgea, menkhan bape bikʼ kana. Darkha rasape ńũiyetʼkangea, menkhan ḍher do bape ńameda. Kicricʼpe horokʼetʼgea, menkhan bape lolokʼ kana. Ar beton ńamkate do bhugạkʼ thạilạkʼrepe dohoyetʼkana." 
Haggai1:7 Onate ape okalekape calakʼkan ona do mońjte hudiskate ńelpe. 
Haggai1:8 Ape do ńitokʼ burure decʼkate kaṭ ạguiype ar koejoṅ oṛakʼ benaope, jemoniń kusikʼ ar manotiń ńam." 
Haggai1:9 “Ape do ḍher phosol ńam lạgitʼpe aslena, menkhan thoṛagepe ńam akada. Ar oṛakʼte tinạkʼpe aderan tahẽkan ona doń oṭaṅ giḍi akatʼtapea. Cedakʼ iń onka akatʼtapea? Ińakʼ oṛakʼ lạgitʼge ona doń onka akada, ente ińakʼ oṛakʼ do dhaṅ dhaser akana, ar ape do apan ạpin oṛakʼ lạgitʼpe odoṛ dhopuṛ baṛaekana." 
Haggai1:10 Ona iạtege serma do acʼakʼ sisir dakʼ ar jumi do phosol emokʼe bondleda. 
Haggai1:11 Khet baṛge, buru-ḍuṅgri, phosolko, nãwã darkha rasa, sunum ar otre okako omonokʼ ona cetanre ar manwa, janwar ar apeakʼ tite kạmiyakʼ sanamakʼko cetanre dakʼ alo emokʼ lạgitʼ iń hukumleda.”" 
Haggai1:12 Unre Sealṭiel hopon Serubabel, Jehosadek hopon maraṅ naeke Josuạ ar eṭakʼ sanam hoṛko do akoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha leka ar uniye kollede Hagae nạbiyakʼ katha lekako kạmikeda, ente onko do Probhu Isorko botorae kan tahẽkana." 
Haggai1:13 Unre Probhu Isor do uniren goḍet Hagae hotete hoṛkoe metatʼkoa, “Iń Probhu Isor do ape são sãotege minạńạ.”" 
Haggai1:14 Inạ tayom Probhu Isor do Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoicʼ Serubabelren, maraṅ naeke Josuạ ar sarecʼ sanam hoṛkoakʼ ontorre udgạuketʼtakoa. Onate onko do jotoge hecʼkate phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ kạmiko ehopʼkeda." 
Haggai1:15 Ona kạmi do Darjawese rajokʼ dosar bochor reakʼ turuiyakʼ cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre ehopʼena. 
Haggai2:1 Eaeakʼ cando reakʼ bargel pạhilakʼ dinre Probhu Isor do Hagae nạbiye metadea," 
Haggai2:2 “Am do Sealṭiel hopon Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoicʼ Serubabel, Jehosadak hopon maraṅ naeke Josuạ ar sarecʼ sanam hoṛkom kulikoa," 
Haggai2:3 ‘ape talare nonkan okoe menaea one uni do noa oṛakʼ reakʼ lahateakʼ ṭhonoke ńelakatʼ? Ar ńitokʼ ona do cetʼ lekae ńeleda? Ape do cetʼ bape hudisetʼkana, lahateakʼ khon noa do cetʼge baṅkana mente?’" 
Haggai2:4 Ona tayom am do onkom metakoa, Probhu Isore meneda, ‘E Serubabel, am do dil joṅme; E maraṅ naeke Josuạ, dil joṅme; E disạmren sanam hoṛko, apehõ dil joṅpe ar kạmipe; ente iń phạdkoren Probhu Isor do ape são sãotege minạńa." 
Haggai2:5 Ape tinre Misor disạm khonpe oḍok hecʼlena unre ape ṭhen noageń gokʼleda, ar ińren Jiu do ńithõ ape talare menaea. Ape do alope botorokʼa." 
Haggai2:6 “‘Phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ar thoṛa ghạṛicʼ khange iń do ar mitʼ dhao serma, ot, jalapuri ar khaṅgoṭ ot iń dalmalao ocoya." 
Haggai2:7 Ar sanam jạtrenkoń thar tharao ocokoa ar onate onko do akoakʼ dhon nonḍeko ạguiytakoa. Ar unre noa oṛakʼ do ṭhonokteń pereja. 
Haggai2:8 Rupạ hõ ińakʼkana, ar sona hõ ińakʼkangea." 
Haggai2:9 Lahateakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ ṭhonok khon ńitokʼakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ ṭhonok do arhõ bạ̃ṛti jak jomok hoyokʼa. Noa ṭhạ̃ire iń do bhạlạiyiń ạguiya. Phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Haggai2:10 Darjawesakʼ rajokʼ dosarakʼ bochor reakʼ areakʼ cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre Probhu Isor do Hagae nạbiye metadea," 
Haggai2:11 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ạn-ạri babotre am do naekeko noa katham kulikoa," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Jãhãe hoṛ acʼakʼ kicricʼre sonotakʼ jele ghẽṭ idiy ar ona kicricʼre jãhãnakʼ piṭhạ, isinakʼ jomakʼ, darkha rasa, sunum se eṭakʼ jãhãn jomakʼre jakʼ tiyokʼlen khan ona do cetʼ sonotakʼ hoyokʼa?’ ” Naekeko do Hagae roṛ ruạṛadeteko metadea, “Baṅ, ona do baṅ sonotokʼa.”" 
Haggai2:13 Unre Hagaeye metatʼkoa, “Gocʼ hoṛe joṭetʼ akade iạteye bhonḍ akan nonkan jãhãe hoṛ noako reakʼ mitʼṭecʼe joṭetʼ tiyog, enḍekhan ona jinis do cetʼ bhonḍakʼ hoyokʼa? ” Naekeko roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Hẽ, ona do bhonḍakʼge hoyokʼa.”" 
Haggai2:14 Unre Hagae doe metatʼkoa, “Probhu Isore meneda, ‘ṭhik onkage ińakʼ mẽtʼre noko hoṛko ar noko jạtren doko bhonḍgea. Ona iạte onko okako cekayetʼ ar jãhãnakʼgeko samaṅetʼkan ona do bhonḍgetakoa." 
Haggai2:15 Ar ńit khon noa babotre mońjte hudisokʼpe, ińakʼ oṛakʼre tinre mitʼṭecʼ dhiri cetanre armitʼṭecʼ dhiri tahẽkana unre cetʼ dosa tahẽkana." 
Haggai2:16 Jãhãege tinre bargel mon phosol ṭhiki ṭhene hijukʼkan tahẽkan uni do eken gel mone ńametʼ tahẽkana. Jãhãe mõṛẽgel liṭar darkha rasa hatao lạgitʼ darkha rasa reakʼ jala ṭhene hijukʼkan tahẽkan uni do eken bargel liṭar sunume ńametʼ tahẽkana. 
Haggai2:17 Apeakʼ tite upcạuakʼ phosol do copate, jhãorate ar arelteń ńẽtʼletʼtapea menkhan enhõ iń secʼ do bape ruạṛlena." 
Haggai2:18 Teheń areakʼ cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ rehetʼ bạisạu hoyena. Ar ape lạgitʼ cetʼ iń cekae lạgidokʼkan onape ńela. 
Haggai2:19 Ńitokʼ apeakʼ murạire jãhãn itạge bạnukʼtapea ar unạkʼ din do darkha nạ̃ṛĩ, loa dare, ḍạlim dare ar jạitun darere jo hõ thoṛage sapʼlena, menkhan teheń khon doń bhorapea.’ ”" 
Haggai2:20 Inạ dinge Probhu Isor do Hagae arhõe metadea," 
Haggai2:21 “Am do Jihudạren disạm cakʼlaoicʼ Serubabel metaeme, ‘iń do serma ar ot iń daldalao ocoya." 
Haggai2:22 Iń do eṭakʼ eṭakʼ jạtren rapajkoakʼ siṅghạson koń ulṭạu giḍikatakoa ar onkoakʼ ektiạriń marao utạra. Iń do rãt gạḍiko ar onaren cakʼlao koń ulṭạu giḍikoa; sadomko ar aswariko do uniren boehawakʼ tarwaṛeteko gujukʼa. 
Haggai2:23 E Sealṭiel hopon ińren guti Serubabel, iń Probhu Isor do enhilokʼ ińakʼ chachap reakʼ mundạm lekań hoyocomea, ente iń do amiń bachao akatʼmea.’ Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń menetʼkana.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Darjawese rajokʼ dosarakʼ bochor reakʼ irạlakʼ candore Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Sakariạ nạbi ṭhen sodorena. Sakariạ do Berekiạren hopone tahẽkana ar Berekiạ do Idoren hopone tahẽkana. 
Zechariah1:2 Probhu Isor do Sakariại metadea, “Aperen hapṛamko cetanre iń do ạḍiń edrelena." 
Zechariah1:3 Ona iạte am do hoṛkom metakoa, phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe, enḍekhan iń hõ apeń beṅgetʼapea." 
Zechariah1:4 Aperen hapṛamko leka do alope hoyokʼa. Onko ṭhen lahaten nạbiko do niạ kathageko lạileda, jemon onko do akoakʼ bạṛicʼ hor ar bạṛicʼ hewa khonko ruạṛ hijukʼ. Menkhan bako ańjomleda ar ińakʼ katha hõ bako hetawada." 
Zechariah1:5 Aperen onko hapṛam do ńitokʼ okare menakʼkoa? Ar nạbiko do cetʼ jaejug jiwetʼko tahena? 
Zechariah1:6 Menkhan iń do ińren gutiko, metakʼme nạbiko okań hukumatʼko tahẽkan, ińakʼ onako katha ar niạm lekate aperen hapṛamko do cetʼ sạjại bako ńamleda? Unre onko do mon ạcurkateko menleda, sanam daṛeanicʼ Probhu Isor do onkoakʼ ạri cạli ar hewa lekate onko lạgitʼ okae ṭhik doholetʼ onageye kạmi akada.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Darjawese rajokʼ dosar bochor reakʼ gelmitʼ cando reakʼ metakʼme Sebaṭ cando reakʼ bargel ponakʼ dinre Berekiạren hopon Sakariạ nạbi ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha do seṭerena. 
Zechariah1:8 Ńindạ jokhecʼ iń Sakariạ do mitʼṭecʼ dorson iń ńelkeda. Iń doń ńelkeda, manwa leka ńelokʼte mitʼṭen serma goḍet do arakʼ sadomreye decʼakana. Ar sadom do mitʼṭecʼ copotʼ jaegare mehendi dareko talareye teṅgo akana. Ar uni hoṛ tayomre do arakʼ, sãoṛa ar ponḍ roṅan sadomko tahẽkana." 
Zechariah1:9 Iń doń kuliyana, “E ińren Probhu Isor, noako do cetʼkana?” Ar mitʼṭecʼ serma goḍet one okoe do iń sãote kathae roroṛkan tahẽkan uniye menkeda, “Onako cetʼkan ona do amiń udukʼama.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Okoe do mehendi dareko talareye teṅgo akan tahẽkan uni do ińe metadińạ, “Goṭa dhạrti ạcurkate ńel ạgui lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do nokoe kol akatʼkoa.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Probhu Isorren okoeṭakʼ goḍet do mehendi dareko talareye teṅgo akan tahẽkan aswariko do uniko metadea, “Ale do goṭa dhạrti dãṛã ạcurkatele ńelkeda, goṭa dhạrtige khạtirjoma ar sulukte perecʼgea.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Unre Probhu Isorren goḍete menkeda, “E phạdkoren Probhu Isor, am do Jerusalem ar Jihudạ reakʼ eṭakʼ nagrahako cetanre nõkʼõe eaegel bochor raṅgao akanem tahẽkana ar tinạkʼ din onkore begor mãyãtem tahena?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Unre okoeṭakʼ serma goḍet do iń sãoteye galmaraokan tahẽkan Probhu Isor do uni ḍher bhạlại ar jiwi raṛecʼ reakʼ kathae metadea. 
Zechariah1:14 Ona iạte uni serma goḍet do ińe metadińạ, “Am do noa lại sodorme, phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘Jerusalem lạgitʼ, metatʼme Sion lạgitʼ iń do monre ạḍiń dukokʼ kana." 
Zechariah1:15 Ar nirdạndiko tahenkan onko sanam jạtrenko cetanre ạḍitetʼ iń raṅgao akana, ente iń do tinre ińren hoṛko cetanre thoṛa ghạṛicʼ iń raṅgaolena unre onko jạtrenko do ińren hoṛkoakʼ dosa sãote arhõ bạṛicʼ dosako juṭucʼatʼko tahẽkana." 
Zechariah1:16 Ona iạte iń do Jerusalem mãyãwakʼ lạgitʼ arhõń ruạṛ hijukʼa ar Jerusalemre sosoṅ baber do arhõ tijokʼa. 
Zechariah1:17 Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa doń gokʼetʼkana, ińakʼ nagrahakore arhõ bhạlại do se oḍokokʼa ar Sion do arhõ jiwiń raṛejtaea ar Jerusalem do arhõń bachaojoṅa.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Ona tayom iń doń beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan ponea dereń iń ńelkeda. 
Zechariah1:19 Ar okoeṭakʼ serma goḍet do iń sãoteye galmaraokan tahẽkan uniń kulikedea, “Noako do cetʼ kana?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Noa do onako dereńkana oka do Jihudạ, Israel ar Jerusalemren hoṛko eṭakʼ eṭakʼ ṭhạ̃ireye chirchạtur akatʼko.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Probhu Isor do ona tayom ponea mistriye udukʼ ạdińa. 
Zechariah1:21 Iń do uniń kulikedea, “Noko do cekae lạgitʼko hecʼakana?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Ona dereńko do hoyokʼkana onko jạtrenko reakʼ daṛe okoe do Jihudạren hoṛko nonkae chirchạtur akatʼkoa okoe do bohokʼge bako rakapʼ daṛe akatʼtako. Onko jạtren botor ocoko lạgitʼ ar onko maraoko lạgitʼge noko mistri doko hecʼakana.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ona tayom iń doń beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan jokha baber sapʼakatʼ mitʼ hoṛiń ńelkedea. Iń do uniń kulikedea, “Am do okatem calakʼkana?” Uni doe metadińạ, “Jerusalem tinạkʼ osara ar tinạkʼ jeleńa ona jokha lạgitʼ iń calakʼkana.”" 
Zechariah2:2  
Zechariah2:3 Okoeṭakʼ serma goḍet do iń sãoteye galmaraokan tahẽkan uni doe calakʼkan tahẽkana, ar un jokhecʼ armitʼṭen serma goḍet do uni sãote ńapamokʼ lạgitʼe hecʼena." 
Zechariah2:4 Uni doe menkeda, “Am do ńir senkate uni juạn koṛa metaeme, ‘Jerusalemre manwa ar janwar doko ḍher akante onare jãhãn pạcri do baṅ tahena." 
Zechariah2:5 Probhu Isore meneda, uni acʼtetʼge ona beṛhaete seṅgel reakʼ pạcriye hoyokʼa ar uni do acʼakʼ ṭhonokte onḍeye tahena.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:6 Probhu Isore meneda, “Ańjompe ar luturakʼtińpe. Iń do beṛhaete apeń sạṅgińletʼpea, menkhan ńitokʼ do utạr disạm khon ńir paskaokate hijukʼpe." 
Zechariah2:7 E Sionren hoṛko, ape okoe do Babelrepe girobasokʼkan, ape do ńir paskaokʼpe ar hijukʼpe.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do acʼakʼ ṭhonok sodortae lạgitʼ onko jạtrenko ṭhene kol akadińạ one okoe do aboko luṭ akatʼbon. Uni doe meneda, “Jãhãege apeye joṭetʼpe uni do ińakʼ mẽtʼ reakʼ monigeye joṭeda." 
Zechariah2:9 Iń do onko upạrte khạṭige ińakʼ tiyiń tultińạ, onate onkoren gutiko do onkoko luṭkoa.” Ar tinre ona hoyokʼa unrepe bujhạu daṛeakʼa, phạdkoren Probhu Isor do ińgeye kol akadińạ." 
Zechariah2:10 Probhu Isore meneda, “E Sion-kuṛi, rạskạte sereńme ar hulạsokʼme, ente ińiń hijukʼkana, ar iń do ape talareń girobasokʼa." 
Zechariah2:11 Enhilokʼ jạt jạtrenko do iń sãoteko midokʼa ar ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa. Ar iń do ape talareń girobasokʼa.” Ar tinre ona hoyokʼa unrepe baḍae daṛeakʼa, phạdkoren Probhu Isor do ape ṭhen ińe kol akadińạ." 
Zechariah2:12 Sonot disạmre uniyakʼ sompotti lekate Probhu Isor do Jihudạ disạme ạidạrijoṅa ar Jerusalem do arhõe bachaojoṅa. 
Zechariah2:13 E sanam manwako, ape do Probhu Isor samaṅre hape akan tahenpe, ente uni do bicạr lạgitʼ acʼakʼ sonot ṭhạ̃i khone oḍok hijukʼkana." 
Zechariah3:1 Ona tayom uni serma goḍet do maraṅ naeke Josuạ samaṅre teṅgo akaniń ńelkedea ar dusiye lạgitʼ Soetan do uniyakʼ jojomsa aṛereye teṅgo akana. 
Zechariah3:2 Probhu Isor do Soetane metadea, “E Soetan, Probhu Isor do ame tạkicʼ daram mema. Jerusalem okoeye bachao akawan uni do ame tạkicʼ daram mema. Nui hoṛ do cetʼ seṅgel khon or oḍok akatʼ ṭhuṭkutʼ doe baṅkana?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Unre Josuạ do mạilạ kicricʼ horokʼ akatʼ dosarege Probhu Isorren goḍet samaṅreye teṅgo akan tahẽkana. 
Zechariah3:4 Uni goḍet do acʼ samaṅre teṅgo akan eṭakʼ goḍetkoe metatʼkoa, “Uniyakʼ mạilạ kicricʼko totʼ giḍikataepe.” Ona tayom uni do Josuại metadea, “Ńelme amakʼ kạikoń sạṅgiń giḍi akatʼtama ar iń do mońj kicricʼ iń horokʼama.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Unre iń doń menkeda, “Uni do bohokʼre mitʼṭecʼ saphawakʼ dạhṛiye em ocokʼma.” Ona iạte onko goḍetko do uniyakʼ bohokʼre mitʼṭecʼ dạhṛi ar kicricʼ hõko horokʼadea." 
Zechariah3:6 Ona tayom Probhu Isorren goḍet do Josuại metadea," 
Zechariah3:7 “Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do ame metamkana, ‘am do ińakʼ hortem senlen khan arem sapʼsorạń khan tobe do ińakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ jotowakʼem ạyura ar ińakʼ khạrại ńel todarot reakʼ bharem ńama, ar okoe nonḍeko teṅgo akan onko leka iń samaṅre hijukʼ reakʼ ạidạriń emama." 
Zechariah3:8 E Maraṅ naeke Josuạ, am do ańjomme ar am samaṅre duṛupʼakan amren sãoten naeke hõko ańjomma. Iń okaṭakʼ kahle metakʼme ińren gutiń ạguiye unigeye hoyokʼa naekeko reakʼ cinhạ do." 
Zechariah3:9 E Josuạ, iń do am samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ dhiriń dohoakada. Ona dhiri cetanre do eae goṭecʼ mẽtʼ menakʼa, ar ona cetanre mitʼṭecʼ kathageń rokʼ dohokakʼa ar mitʼ dinrege noa disạm reakʼ kại doń sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa." 
Zechariah3:10 Enhilokʼ ape mimitʼko do apeakʼ darkha nạ̃ṛĩ ar loa dare buṭạre duṛubokʼ lạgitʼ ape ạḍepaseren hoṛkoń neotakoa. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.’ ” 
Zechariah4:1 Ona tayom okoeṭakʼ serma goḍet do iń sãoteye galmarao kan tahẽkan uniye ruạṛ hecʼena ar jạpitʼ khon ebhenkediń lekae ebhenkedińa. 
Zechariah4:2 Uni doe metadińa, “Am do cetʼem ńeleda?” Ińiń roṛ ruạṛadea, “Iń do mitʼṭecʼ sona reakʼ diuhe dohowakʼ iń ńeletʼkana ar ona reakʼ bohokʼre do mitʼṭecʼ sunum reakʼ cukạkʼge. Ona diuhe dohowakʼ cetanre eae goṭecʼ diuhe ar mimitʼ goṭecʼ diuhere eae goṭecʼkate sultạ dohoy reakʼ jaega menakʼa." 
Zechariah4:3 Ona diuhe dohowakʼ ṭhen barea jạitun dare menakʼa, jojomti secʼ mitʼṭecʼ ar leṅgati secʼre ar mitʼṭecʼ.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Iń do uni serma goḍetiń kulikedea, “E ińren kĩsạ̃ṛ, noako do cetʼkana?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Uni do ińe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Noako cetʼkan ona do cetʼ bam baḍaekana?” Ińiń menkeda, “E ińren kisạ̃ṛ, iń do bạń baḍaea.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Unre uni doe metadińa, “Probhu Isor do Serubabel noa sombate emaekana, ‘daṛe se ektiạri hotete do baṅa, menkhan iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ińren Jiu hotete am dom jo bahakʼa." 
Zechariah4:7 E maraṅ utạrakʼ buru, am dom okoekana? Serubabel samaṅre am do ot lekagem hoyokʼa. Koejoṅ oṛakʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ dhiri bạisạu jokhecʼ hoṛ do hohokateko mena, ạḍi mońjge hoyakana.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ona tayom Probhu Isorakʼ noa katha do iń ṭhen sodorena," 
Zechariah4:9 “Serubabelakʼ ti do noa mundil reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạu akada ar uniyakʼ titege noa do sạtokʼa. Unre hoṛko baḍae daṛeakʼa, iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge onko ṭhen amgeye kol akatʼmea." 
Zechariah4:10 Nunạkʼ din oka kạmi hoyakan ona do hoṛko nihạ̃t giḍi akada. Menkhan Serubabelakʼ tire sạhul baber ńelte hoṛ doko rạskạkʼa.” Ona tayom iń ańjomkeda, “Niạ eae goṭecʼ diuhe do hoyokʼkana Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼ oka do goṭa dhạrtiye ńeletʼkan.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Unre iń do uni serma goḍet iń kulikedea, “Ona diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ jojomsa aṛere ar leṅgasa aṛere oka barea jạitun dare menakʼ onakin do cetʼkana?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Iń do arhõń kulikedea, “Ona banar jạitun dare reakʼ ḍạr khon sona roṅ sunum oḍok hecʼente sona diuhe dohowakʼ reakʼ banar sultạ dohowakʼ ṭhạ̃ire ńurena. Ona ḍạr reakʼ mane do cetʼkana?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛadińa, “Am do cetʼ bam baḍaea ona banar reakʼ mane do cetʼkana mente?” Ińiń meneda, “E ińren kĩsạ̃ṛ, iń do bạń baḍaea." 
Zechariah4:14 Unre uniye menkeda, “Onakin do hoyokʼkana unkin bar hoṛ okoe do goṭa pirthimiren Probhu Isor sapʼsorae lạgitʼ kin ojokʼ bahal ocoakan.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Iń do arhõ beṅgetʼkateń ńelkeda oṭakʼ akan guṛhạ puthi do uḍạukʼkana. 
Zechariah5:2 Uni doe metadińa, “Am do cetʼem ńeleda?” Iń doń roṛ ruạṛkeda, “Iń do bargel moka jeleń ar gel moka osar mitʼṭecʼ uḍạukʼkan puthiń ńeleda.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Uni doe metadińạ, “Noa do hoyokʼkana ona sarap oka do goṭa dhạrtire sodorokʼ. Ona reakʼ olakʼ lekate joto kombṛo doko laga ńir ocokʼa ar eṭakʼ secʼakʼ katha lekate eṛe eṛe kiriạkʼko hõko sạṅgiń ocokʼa." 
Zechariah5:4 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘iń do ona sarapiń kola ar ona do kombṛokoakʼ oṛakʼre ar okoe iń ńutumte eṛe eṛeko kiriạkʼkan onkoakʼ oṛakʼte senkateye bolokʼa ar onkoakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ kaṭ ar dhiri sudhại jarkhartakoa.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Ona tayom uni serma goḍet do laha nõkʼ hecʼkateye metadińạ, “Am do coṭ secʼ beṅgedme cetʼ hijukʼkana?”" 
Zechariah5:6 Iń doń kulikedea, “Ona do cetʼkana?” Uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Ona do mitʼṭecʼ sosoṅakʼ bhajan kana.” Uni do arhõe menkeda, “Ona do okoe goṭa dhạrtiko behoketʼkan onkoakʼ rup kana.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ona tayom ona bhajan reakʼ sisạ ḍhakna oṭakʼen khan onare mitʼṭen maejiu do duṛupʼ akane ńelena. 
Zechariah5:8 Uni serma goḍet doe metadińa, “Nui doe hoyokʼkana dusṭạmi.” Ar noa menkate uni maejiu do ona bhajanreye ṭhelao bhoraokedea ar ona reakʼ moca do sisạ ḍhaknateye hạrupʼkada." 
Zechariah5:9 Ona tayom iń doń beṅgetʼ rakapʼketʼ khan barea maejiu do hoe sãote oṭaṅ hijukʼkaniń ńelketʼkinạ. Unkinakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ do kisni cẽṛẽakʼ phạ̃kṛạ̃kʼ leka ar unkin do ona bhajan coṭtekin rakapʼ idikeda. 
Zechariah5:10 Unre iń do uni serma goḍetiń kulikedea, “Ona bhajan do okatekin idiyeda?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛadińa, “Unkin do Sinạr disạmtekin idiyeda. Onḍe do uni maejiu lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ oṛakʼ benaokʼa. Ar oṛakʼ benao sạtlen khan uni do acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃ire kin duṛubea.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Iń do arhõń beṅgetʼketʼ khan ponea rãt gạḍiń ńelkeda. Onako do barea buru tala khon oḍok hijukʼkan tahẽkana. Ar ona burukin do tama reakʼ tahẽkana. 
Zechariah6:2 Pạhilakʼ rãt gạḍire do jotoge arakʼ sadomko tahẽkana ar dosarakʼ rãt gạḍire do jotoge hende sadomko tahẽkana. 
Zechariah6:3 Ar tesarakʼ rãt gạḍire do jotoge ponḍ sadomko tahẽkana ar ponakʼ rãt gạḍire do nana parkan roṅan sadomko tahẽkana; ar joto sadomge daṛegeko tahẽkana. 
Zechariah6:4 Iń do uni serma goḍet iń kulikedea, “E ińre kĩsạ̃ṛ, noako do cetʼkana?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Uni doe roṛ ruạṛạdińa, “Noako do serma reakʼ ponea hoe kana; goṭa dhạrtirenko Probhu Isor samaṅreko teṅgolen tayom noko doko oḍokʼ hijukʼa." 
Zechariah6:6 Hende sadomkoakʼ rãt gạḍi do utạr disạm secʼ calakʼkana, ar ponḍ sadomkoakʼ rãt gạḍi do pạchim secʼ ar nana parkan roṅan sadomkoakʼ rãt gạḍi do dạkhin secʼ calakʼkan tahẽkana.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Daṛe sadomko do oḍok hecʼkate goṭa dhạrti dãṛã ạcurkate ńel lạgitʼko asbasao baṛaekan tahẽkana. Unre uni serma goḍete menkeda, “Dhạrti reakʼ sanam jaegako dãṛãkate ńelpe.” Onate onko do dhạrti reakʼ sanam jaegako dãṛã dãṛãte ńel lạgitʼko oḍok calaoena." 
Zechariah6:8 Ona tayom uni do hohoạdińteye metadińạ, “Ńelme, okoe utạr secʼko calakʼkan onko do ińakʼ edreko dapalketʼtińạ.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Tayomte Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Zechariah6:10 “Babel reakʼ bondi dosa khonko ruạṛ hecʼakan Heldai, Tobiạ ar Jedae teko ṭhen khon sona ar rupạ hataome. Ar enhilokʼge am do Sephaniạ hopon Josuạ ṭhen calakʼme." 
Zechariah6:11 Ona tayom do ona sona ar rupạte mitʼṭecʼ mukuṭem benaoa ar Jehosadak hopon maraṅ naeke Josuạ do bohokʼrem horokʼaea. 
Zechariah6:12 Arem metaea, phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, ‘nuige uni hoṛ do, one uniyakʼ ńutum do dare reakʼ kahle kan; uni do acʼakʼ ṭhạ̃i khone hara rakabokʼa ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼe benaoa." 
Zechariah6:13 Hẽ, unige Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼe benaoa. Uni do rajakʼ manote emocokʼa ar acʼakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼkateye ḍanṭaokoa. Uni do mitʼṭecʼ naeke lekate siṅghạsonreye duṛupʼa ar onate noakin banar hudạ talare begartetʼ do baṅ tahena.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Helem, metakʼme, Heldai, Tobia, Jedae ar Sephaniạren hopon Hen, metakʼme Josuạ disạye reakʼ cinhạ lekate ona mukuṭ do Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼrege tahena." 
Zechariah6:15 “Okoe sạṅgińre menakʼko onko do hecʼkate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ goṛoko emokʼa. Unre ape dope baḍae daṛeakʼa, phạdkoren Probhu Isorge iń doe kol akadińạ. Ape do joton salakʼ aperen Probhu Isorakʼ kathape ańjomtaea enḍe anecʼ noako do purạukʼa.”" 
Zechariah7:1 Darjawese rajokʼ ponakʼ bochor reakʼ Kislew ńutumakʼ areakʼ cando reakʼ ponakʼ dinre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do Sakariạ ṭhen sodorena. 
Zechariah7:2 Ona jokhecʼ Probhu Isorakʼ bhor ataṅ lạgitʼ Bethelren hoṛko do Sareser, Regem-melek ar unkinren hoṛko kolketʼkoa." 
Zechariah7:3 Onko do phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼren naekeko ar nạbiko noa katha kuli lạgitʼko kolketʼkoa, “Unạkʼ bochor okalekale ceka ạguakatʼ onkage cetʼ mõṛẽakʼ candorele homor halaṅa arle upạsa?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Unre phạdkoren Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ," 
Zechariah7:5 “Am do disạmren sanam hoṛ ar naekekom metakoa, ‘ape do eaegel bochor khon mõṛẽ ar eaeakʼ candore okape homor halaṅetʼ tahẽkan arpe upạsetʼ tahẽkan ona do Probhu Isor ńutumte do bape onka akada." 
Zechariah7:6 Ar tinrepe jom ńũiyetʼ tahẽkana unre apnar lạgitʼgepe onkayetʼ tahẽkana. 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusalem ar ona beṛhaeteakʼ nagrahakore tinre hoṛko girobasokʼ kan tahẽkana ar tinre ona reakʼ dosa bhage tahẽkana ar Negeb ar pạchim reakʼ latar buru ṭoṭhakore hoṛko tahẽkana unrehõ Probhu Isorakʼ noako katha do lahaten nạbiko hoteteye roṛlena.’ ” 
Zechariah7:8 Probhu Isor do arhõe metadińạ, “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noako katha doń metatʼko tahẽkana, ‘hok reakʼ bicạrpe; ar ape talare pạtiạranko hoyokʼpe ar dayakʼ salakʼ beoharpe." 
Zechariah7:9  
Zechariah7:10 Ape do rạnḍi maejiuko, ṭuạ̃r amarko, bidisiạko ar reṅgecʼ hoṛko alope santaokoa.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Menkhan onko do ona ańjom bako rebenlena; onko do hoṭokʼko keṭecʼketʼtakoa ar ruạṛ senkate luturko esetʼketʼtakoa. 
Zechariah7:12 Onko do dhiri leka monko keṭecʼketʼtakoa ar ạn-ạri do bako bataoleda. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge ińren Jiu hotete lahaten nạbiko hotete okaṭakʼ kathań kolletʼ ona hõ bako luturada. Ar onatege ińakʼ maraṅ edre do jol rakapʼlentińạ. 
Zechariah7:13 Ińiń hohowatʼkore hõ onko do bako hetawatʼtińạ, ar onkoko hohowạdińre iń phạdkoren Probhu Isor do bạń ańjomletʼtakoa." 
Zechariah7:14 Iń do bin oprom jạtrenko talareń pasnaoletʼkoa. Inạ tayom onkoakʼ disạm do nonka khaṅgoṭakʼ hoylena, onḍe do celege bako senokʼkan tahẽkana. Nonkate ona mońj disạm do ujạṛ utạrakʼko hoyocoleda.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Ar phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ katha do sodorena. Uni doe menkeda, “Sion lạgitʼ ińakʼ ontor do lokʼ kantińạ; iń do ona lạgitʼ ạḍitetʼ iń ãṭokʼkana." 
Zechariah8:2  
Zechariah8:3 Iń do Sionte ruạṛ hecʼkate Jerusalemreń tahena. Unre Jerusalem do ‘sạriyakʼ reakʼ nagraha’ ar phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ buru do ‘sonot buru’ mente ńumogokʼa. 
Zechariah8:4 Umerte laha akan herel hoṛ ar maejiuko do arhõ Jerusalem reakʼ ṭhạ̃ire duṛupʼkate okteko khemaoa ar ḍher umer iạte onko mimitʼkoakʼ tire do ṭheṅga tahena. 
Zechariah8:5 Nagraha reakʼ maedanre aema koṛa hopon ar kuṛi hoponko enecʼ baṛaea. 
Zechariah8:6 Ar okako hoyokʼ ona do noko jạtren sarecʼ jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko ṭhen do oho hoedaṛelena mente hudiskokʼa, menkhan iń ṭhen baṅ hoyokʼakʼ do bạnukʼa. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Zechariah8:7 Iń do arhõń meneda, purub disạmrenko ar pạchim disạmrenko khon ińren hoṛkoń rukhiyạkoa." 
Zechariah8:8 Jerusalemre girobasokʼ lạgitʼge onko doń ruạṛ ạgukoa. Onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa ar iń do onkoren Isoriń hoyokʼa; ar onkore pạtiạr ar dhoromgeń tahena. 
Zechariah8:9 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ińakʼ oṛakʼ benao lạgitʼ rehetʼ bạisạu jokhecʼ nạbiko do ona kathageko roṛleda, ar ńitokʼ ape do inạ kathagepe ańjomeda; onate ape do daṛeanko hoyokʼpe." 
Zechariah8:10 Ona kạmi ạuri ehopʼre manwako reakʼ kuṛạige baṅ tahẽkana ar janwarakʼ hõ bhaṛa bako em daṛeakʼkan tahẽkana. Bạiri iạte celege khạtirjoma bako dãṛãnkan tahẽkana ente ińge mimitʼko do ako aḍepaseren hoṛko upạrteń uskurletʼkoa. 
Zechariah8:11 Menkhan ńitokʼ do noko jạtren jiwetʼ sarecʼ hoṛko sãote lahate leka do bạń beohara. 
Zechariah8:12 Ńitokʼ do itạ khon dare do mońjtege harakʼa, ar darkha nạ̃ṛĩre jo sabokʼa, khetre phosol janamokʼa ar noko jạtren jiwetʼ tahen hoṛko do iń emakʼ ạidạri lekate jotowakʼko ńama." 
Zechariah8:13 E Jihudạ ar Israel gharońjrenko, lahate jạt jạtren hoṛko do sarap lekate apeakʼ ńutumko ńumetʼ tahẽkana, menkhan ńitokʼ iń do apeń bańcaopea ar onko do apeakʼ ńutum bhor lekateko ńuma. Alope botorokʼa, bickom daṛeanko hoyokʼpe." 
Zechariah8:14 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, aperen hapṛamko tinre ińko khĩs ocoledińa unre onko cetanre muhiniń ạguiya menteń ṭhik doholeda ar ona hõń hoyocoletʼa." 
Zechariah8:15 Menkhan ńitokʼ do arhõ Jerusalem ar Jihudạ lạgitʼ bhạlạiyiń ạguiya menteń ṭhik doho akada. Ape do alope botorokʼa. 
Zechariah8:16 Niạko hukum do manao hoyokʼtapea. Ape do eṭakʼko ṭhen sạriyakʼ kathape roṛa ar apeakʼ adalotre hok reakʼpe bicạra jemon hoṛko talare suluk hoyokʼ; 
Zechariah8:17 ar okoe upạrte hõ bạṛicʼakʼ do alope phundiya ar eṛe goha hõ alope ema. Iń Probhu Isor do noakoń hirkhạwakʼ kana. 
Zechariah8:18 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do arhõ ińe metadińạ," 
Zechariah8:19 “Ponakʼ, mõṛẽakʼ, eaeakʼ ar gelakʼ cando reakʼ upạs do Jihudiko lạgitʼ rạskạteakʼ, kusiyakʼ ar bhạlạiyanakʼ porobge hoyokʼa. Onate ape do sạriyakʼ ar sulukge dulạṛpe." 
Zechariah8:20 “Nonkan okte hijukʼa tinre ḍher jạtrenko ar ḍher nagraharen hoṛko do Jerusalemteko hijukʼa; 
Zechariah8:21 ar mitʼ nagraharen hoṛko do eṭakʼ nagrahare senkateko mena, ‘sanam phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ bhor ataṅ lạgitʼ ar uniyakʼ sewae lạgitʼ, ńitge bon calakʼma.’ Unre ḍher hoṛgeko mena, ‘iń hõń calakʼa.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Iń sewawạń lạgitʼ ar ińakʼ bhor hatao lạgitʼ ḍher hoṛko ar daṛean jạtrenkoge Jerusalemteko hijukʼa. 
Zechariah8:23 Ona jokhecʼ aema pạrsi ar jạtkoren gel goṭen hoṛ do mitʼṭen Jihudi hoṛakʼ kicricʼ ańcar sapʼkateko mena, ‘ale hõ ape sãotele calakʼa, ente alele ańjom akada, Isor do ape sãorege menaea.’ Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Zechariah9:1 Hadrak ar Damesek upạrte Probhu Isorakʼ oka katha sodorlen ona do purạukʼa. Israel gusṭirenko ar eṭakʼ sanam manwakoakʼ mẽtʼ do Probhu Isorrege menakʼa. 
Zechariah9:2 Hamat, oka do Hadrak simạna ṭhen menakʼ ona upạrte hõ Probhu Isorakʼ katha do purạukʼa. Tur ar Sidonrenko do ạkilan hoṛ kanrehõko, enhõ onko upạrte ona do hoyokʼgea." 
Zechariah9:3 Tur do apnar lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ gaṛe benao akawana ar dhuṛi leka rupại jarwa akada ar hor reakʼ losotʼ leka do sonage. 
Zechariah9:4 Menkhan Probhu Isor do uniyakʼ sanamakʼe sạṅgiń giḍikakʼa; uniyakʼ dhon-durib do jalapurireye khadle giḍikataea ar seṅgel do ona nagrahae jarkhara. 
Zechariah9:5 Askilan do ona ńelteye botorokʼa, Gasa do hasoteye thakaokʼa ar Ekronakʼ dosa hõ onage hoyokʼa, ente uniyakʼ as do baṅ puruạukʼtaea. Gasa do acʼren raje adea ar Askelonre do celege bako tahena." 
Zechariah9:6 Mesal jạtren bõsko do Asdodreko girobasokʼa. Probhu Isore meneda, “Philisṭikoakʼ bạḍại doń maraotakoa." 
Zechariah9:7 Onkoakʼ moca khon mãyãm sudhạ jel ar baronakʼ eṭakʼakʼ jomakʼ iń oḍoktakoa. Onko modre okoe jiwetʼko tahen onko do ińren hoṛko hoyokʼa; onko do Jihudạren mitʼṭen bõsren lekako hoyokʼa ar Ekron do Jebusiko lekae hoyokʼa. 
Zechariah9:8 Jhãpko calaoetʼkan lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ti khon ińren hoṛkoń rukhiyạkoa. Jãhãn sasantaoko do tishõ ińren hoṛko ṭhen bako hijukʼa, ente ńitokʼ do ińgeń horhoyetʼkana." 
Zechariah9:9 “E Sion kuṛi, ma rạskạkʼme. E Jerusalem, hulạsokʼme. Ńelme amren raj do am ṭhene daraekana; uni doe dhoromgea ar uni ṭhen do bańcao menakʼa; uni doe mạ̃hirgea, ar gadha cetanre gadha hopon cetanreye decʼ hijukʼkana." 
Zechariah9:10 Iń Ephrayimge rãt gạḍi ar Jerusalemren lạṛhại sadom jotogeń maraokoa ar lạṛhại reakʼ akʼ iń rạputʼ giḍikatakoa. Uni do jạt jạtrenko ṭhen suluke lại sodora. Uniyakʼ ḍanṭao do doreão khon doreão hạbicʼ, Phurạt gaḍa khon dhạrti reakʼ ses simạnako hạbicʼ hoyokʼtaea." 
Zechariah9:11 E Jerusalem, am lạgitʼ ińakʼ bondobos bạisạu reakʼ mãyãm iạte amren bondi akanko do ona rohoṛ khorloṅ khoniń chaḍaokoa." 
Zechariah9:12 E aste perecʼ bondi akanko, ape do apeakʼ gaṛte ruạṛ calakʼpe; teheń iń doń kiriạkʼkana, ape do bar doboṛiń bhorapea." 
Zechariah9:13 Jihudạ do akʼ leka ar Ephrayim do sar lekań beoharea. E Sion, iń do amren hoponko Grecce disạmren hoponko upạrteń uskạukoa ar am do lạṛhại reakʼ tarwaṛe lekań hoyocomea.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Ona tayom Probhu Isor do acʼren hoṛko talareye sodorokʼa; uniyakʼ sar do bijli leka malkaokʼtaea. Probhu Isor do sakwae oroṅa ar dạkhin reakʼ birbão hoe lekae laha calakʼa; 
Zechariah9:15 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do onkoe rukhiyạkoa. Onate onko do bạirikoko maraokoa ar onkoakʼ bạṭul reakʼ dhiriko do jaṅgateko lebetʼ gańjaoa. Onko do darkha rasako ńũiya ar bul hoṛ lekako andoṛa; pinḍ reakʼ konacre mãyãm coḍor leka onko do ḍher mãyãmko joro ocoya. 
Zechariah9:16 Enhilokʼ onkoren Probhu Isor do bhiḍi palko leka acʼren hoṛkoe bańcaokoa. Onko do uniyakʼ disạmre mukuṭ reakʼ hirạ-mạnik lekako jhak jhakaokʼa. 
Zechariah9:17 Onkoakʼ cehra do ạḍi mońj hoyokʼtakoa. Onkoakʼ phosol do onkoren juạn koṛakoe sahre ocokoa ar nãwã darkha rasate do onkoren juạn kuṛikoge. 
Zechariah10:1 Niron din reakʼ dakʼ lạgitʼ Probhu Isor metaepe; unige dakʼ reakʼ rimilkoe benaoeda. Uni do hoṛe dakʼako kana ar sanamkoakʼ khetre phosole omon ocoyeda. 
Zechariah10:2 Boṅga doko phạsiaragea, ar gonokko do eṛe kathako roṛa; onko okaṭakʼ kukmũ reakʼ kathako roṛ ona do eṛegetakoa, ar eṛe jiwi raṛecʼko emokʼkana. Ar hoṛko do santaokʼkan iạte bhiḍi lekako ạcur baṛaekana, ente onkoren gukʼpiyicʼ do bạnuitakoa." 
Zechariah10:3 Probhu Isore meneda, “Gukʼpiko upạrte ińakʼ edre do jaljalaokʼ kantińạ, ona iạte mukhiyạ gukʼpikoń sạjạikoa. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge ińakʼ palren, metakʼme Jihudạren hoṛkoń ńel todarotkoa ar daṛean lạṛhại sadom lekań hoyocokoa." 
Zechariah10:4 Jihudạ khonge konac reakʼ dhiri, tạmbu reakʼ gońj, lạṛhại reakʼ akʼ sar ar disạm cakʼlaokoko oḍok hijukʼa." 
Zechariah10:5 Unre Jihudạren hoṛ do nonkan daṛean hoṛ lekako hoyokʼa onko do lạṛhạire ḍahar reakʼ losotʼ leka bạiriko lebetʼ khadbadaokoa. Ar iń do onko sãoteń tahente lạṛhạire aswarikoko bhagaokoa. 
Zechariah10:6 “Iń do Jihudạren hoṛko daṛeaniń hoyocokoa ar Josephakʼ, metakʼme Israelren hoṛkoń bańcaokoa. Iń do onkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa, ente onko cetanre mãyã menakʼtińạ. Unre onko do bạń nihạ̃t giḍi akatʼko lekako hoyokʼa, ente ińkangeạń onkoren Isor do; arko hohowạńre onkoakʼ iń ańjomtakoa." 
Zechariah10:7 Eprayimrenko do daṛean hoṛ lekako hoyokʼa, onkoakʼ ontor do darkha rasa ńũ akatʼ leka kusikʼtakoa. Ona ńelte onkoren hopon ar hoponerako doko hulạsokʼa; onkoakʼ ontor do iń iạte rạskạkʼtakoa."
