Zechariah10:8 Iń do gol golteń hohoea ar mitʼ domteń jarwakoa. Onko doń chaḍaokoa ar lahate leka lekhare ḍherko hoyokʼa. 
Zechariah10:9 Ar jạt jạtrenko talareń pasnao akatʼkore hõ sạṅgiń disạmre onko do ińko disạyińạ. Onko ar onkoren hopon ar hoponerako jiwetʼko tahena ar onko doko ruạṛ hijukʼa. 
Zechariah10:10 Misor disạm khon iń do onkoń ruạṛ ạgukoa ar Ạsur khoniń jarwakoa. Gilead ar Lebanonteń ạgukoa ar nunạkʼ hoṛko hoyokʼa, onḍe onkoakʼ jaega do baṅ anṭaokʼa." 
Zechariah10:11 Iń do kosṭo reakʼ doreão talateń calakʼa ar doreão reakʼ ḍheokoń domona ar onate nil gaḍa reakʼ khạndri jaegako do rohoṛokʼa. Ạsur reakʼ bạḍại do rạputʼ ocokʼa ar Misor reakʼ ḍanṭao hõ sạṅgińokʼa. 
Zechariah10:12 Ińakʼ daṛete onko do daṛeankoń hoyocokoa ar ińakʼ sana lekageko calakʼa. Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.” 
Zechariah11:1 E Lebanon, amakʼ duạrko jhicʼ dohokam, jemon seṅgel do amakʼ debdạru darekoe jom daṛeakʼ." 
Zechariah11:2 E saro dare, homor halaṅme, ente debdạru dare do bhinḍạṛena. Ar soros dareko hõ maraoena. E Bason reakʼ Elon dare, ape hõ homor halaṅpe, ente raṭen bir reakʼ sanam dareko do makʼ giḍi ocoakana." 
Zechariah11:3 Bhiḍi gukʼpikoakʼ homor halaṅ ańjompe; onkoakʼ bhage bhage ạtiń ṭạnḍiko do nosṭo caba akana. Dhạcri kulkoakʼ hạnḍrạu ańjompe; jordan reakʼ bir do ujạṛena. 
Zechariah11:4 Ińren Probhu Isore meneda, “Gur ocokʼ lạgitʼ okoe bheḍa palrenko ṭhik doho akan am do onkoren gupiyicʼge baṛe hoyokʼme." 
Zechariah11:5 Okoe onkoko kirińetʼko onko doko guretʼkogea menkhan apnar do bin dusạn mente bako hudisokʼkana. Ar okoe onkoko ạkhrińetʼko onko doko mena, ‘Probhu Isorakʼge sarhao baṛe hoyokʼtaema, iń doń kisạ̃ṛ akana.’ Onkoren gukʼpiko do onko cetanre bako dayakʼ kana." 
Zechariah11:6 Disạmren hoṛko cetanre iń do ar bạń dayakʼa; iń do mimitʼko ako aḍepaseren hoṛko ṭhen ar rajawakʼ tireń jimạkoa. Onko do disạmko jarkhara ar onkoakʼ ti khon okoege bạń bańcaokoa.” 
Zechariah11:7 Gurko lạgitʼ okoe bhedạ palko ṭhik doho ocoakan, biseskaete iń do onko palren dukhạliạko ạtińkoń ehopʼena. Ona tayom do barea ṭheṅgań hataokeda ar ona reakʼ mitʼṭecʼ do Daya ar eṭakʼakʼ reakʼ ńutum do Tonol iń dohokeda; ar iń do ona palrenko gupiyiń ehopʼena." 
Zechariah11:8 Mitʼ cando bhitrite iń do pea gukʼpikoń laga ńirketʼkoa. Ar palrenko do iń kurudạńko ehopʼena ar ińhõ onko iạteń laṅga cabayena. 
Zechariah11:9 Ińiń menkeda, “Aperen gukʼpiko do bạń hoyokʼa. Okoeyakʼ gujukʼ reakʼ katha menakʼ uni doe gujukʼma ar okoeyakʼ pharakokʼ reakʼ katha menakʼ uni doe sạṅgińokʼma. Ar sarecʼko do ako akoakʼ jelko jomma.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ona tayom iń do Daya ńutumakʼ ona ṭheṅga hataokateń rạputʼkeda ar sanam jạtrenko sãote okaṭakʼ bondobos tahẽkan onań bạtilkeda. 
Zechariah11:11 Ar enhilokʼge ona do bạtilena, onatege palren dukhiko okoe do ińko tuṅkhi arko talas baṛayediń tahẽkan onkoko baḍaekeda, noako talatege Probhu Isor do kathae roṛetʼkana." 
Zechariah11:12 Iń do onkoń metatʼkoa, “Bhagepe hudisetʼ khan ińakʼ kuṛại em kạtińpe; ar bhage bape hudisetʼ khan do doho oṭokakʼpe.” Unre onko do pegel rupạ ṭakako emadińạ." 
Zechariah11:13 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Kuṅkạl baṛe ona do capatʼ giḍi oṭowaeme- ona bhạri damge, okaṭakʼ onkoko dam ạdiń.” Ona tayom iń do ona pegel rupạ ṭaka hataokate Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre kuṅkạliń lebda gotʼadea." 
Zechariah11:14 Ona tayom iń do Tonol ńutumanakʼ ona ṭheṅgań rạputʼketʼte Jihudạ ar Israel talare boeha reakʼ oka helmel tahẽkan onań nosṭokeda. 
Zechariah11:15 Unre Probhu Isor do ińe metadińạ, “Niạ dhao do arhõ mitʼṭen kharap gukʼpiyicʼakʼ jinisko hataome." 
Zechariah11:16 Iń do disạm cetanre nonkan mitʼṭen gukʼpiyicʼ iń rakabea one uni do muhinre paṛao akan hoṛko bae beṅgetʼako, pasnao akan hoṛko bae sendrako, ghạl akan hoṛko bae bogeko, moṭasoṭa hoṛko bae jom ocoko; menkhan uni do bachao akatʼko bheḍakoakʼ jele joma ar onkoakʼ khurạ khon hõ jel or chaḍaokateye hạmbuṛa." 
Zechariah11:17 “Hae, uni lelha gupiyicʼ do, one okoe do palrenko bạgikateye calakʼ kan! Tarwaṛe do uniyakʼ ti ar jojomsa reakʼ mẽtʼgeye ghạltaea. Onate uniyakʼ ti do borojokʼtaea ar uniyakʼ jojomsa reakʼ mẽtʼ do kãṛãkʼtaea.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Noa kangea Israel babotre Probhu Isorakʼ katha do. Probhu Isor, one okoe do sermae aṭetʼ akatʼ, okoe do dhạrti reakʼ rehetʼe bạisạu akatʼ, okoe do manwa bhitrire Jiue sirjạuakawade, uniye meneda," 
Zechariah12:2 “Jerusalem do nonkan mitʼṭecʼ bubulakʼ bhajaniń benaoa one ona reakʼ ńũkate aḍepaseren sanam jạtren hoṛko konḍa manḍekʼa. Jerusalemrenko sãote Jihudạ reakʼ eṭakʼ nagrahako hõ gherao esetʼ ocokʼa. 
Zechariah12:3 Enhilokʼ tinre sanam jạtrenko Jerusalem upạrteko jarwakʼa unre uni do sanam jạtrenko lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ hamal dhiri lekań hoeocoyea. Ar okoe ona dhiri rakapʼ reakʼko kurumuṭui onko do apnargeko ghạl ocokʼa. 
Zechariah12:4 Enhilokʼ iń do mitʼke mitʼ sadomkoń botor ocokoa ar aswari do lelhań hoyocokoa. Ar Jihudạren hoṛko lạgitʼ do sontorte nońjoriń dohoya, menkhan eṭakʼ jạtren joto sadom doń kãṛã ocokoa." 
Zechariah12:5 Unre Jihudạren mukhiyạko do mon monteko mena, ‘Jerusalemren hoṛkoge aleakʼ daṛe do, ente phạdkoren Probhu Isor do onkoren Isor kanae.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Enhilokʼ Jihudạren mukhiyạko do kaṭ reakʼ bojha talare jolokʼkan aṅgra leka ar phosol reakʼ binḍạ talare jolokʼkan mosal lekań hoyocokoa. Onko do jojomsa ar leṅgasa secʼ aḍepaseren sanam jạtrenko jomkoa, menkhan Jerusalemren hoṛ do arhõ akoakʼ ṭhạ̃iregeko girobasokʼa." 
Zechariah12:7 “Iń Probhu Isorge pạhilre Jihudạ reakʼ tahen ṭhạ̃ikoń bańcaoa jemon Dạudakʼ bõsren ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ manot do Jihudạren eṭakʼ eṭakʼ hoṛko khon ḍher baṅ hoyokʼ. 
Zechariah12:8 Enhilokʼ iń do Jerusalemren hoṛkoń rukhiyạkoa. Unre onko talaren sanam khon nijor utạran hoṛ hõ Dạud lekako hoyokʼa ar Dạudren bõsko do Isor leka, metakʼme Probhu Isorren goḍetko leka onko laha lahateko calakʼa." 
Zechariah12:9 Enhilokʼ okoe jạtrenko do Jerusalem cetanre jhãp em lạgitʼko hijukʼ iń do onkoń marao giḍikakoa. 
Zechariah12:10 “Iń do Dạudakʼ bõs ar Jerusalemren hoṛko cetanre ińren Jiu iń dulea; uni doe dayakʼa ar koejoṅ reakʼ mone emokʼa. Onate onko do iń secʼ, metakʼme okoe do uniko sobokʼ tapʼlede uni secʼ beṅgetʼ akaeko tahena. Ar sadher hopon ńutumte homor halaṅ leka onko do uni lạgitʼko homor halaṅa ar pạhilicʼ hopon lạgitʼ cetʼ lekako homor halaṅ onkageko jare jarekʼa." 
Zechariah12:11 Enhilokʼ Jerusalemre ạḍitetʼ homor halaṅ hoyokʼa cetʼleka Megido ṭạnḍire Haddad Rimonre hoylen. 
Zechariah12:12 Disạmren mimitʼ bõsren hoṛ do apan ạpin judạ judạko halaṅ homora. Dạud bõsrenko, Nathon bõsrenko, Liwi bõsrenko, Simại bõsrenko ar sarecʼ sanam bõsren hoṛko homor halaṅa. Herel hoṛko ar onkoren maejiuko hõ apan ạpin judạ judạko rakʼ homora." 
Zechariah12:13  
Zechariah12:14  
Zechariah13:1 “Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorgeń meneda, enhilokʼ Dạudakʼ bõsren ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ kại ar besapha akanakʼ ạrupʼ saphae lạgitʼ mitʼṭecʼ jharna do jhijogokʼa. Ar enhilokʼ do disạm khon boṅgako sạṅgiń ocokʼa ar onkoakʼ ńutum do celehõ bako disạiya. Disạm khon onkoren nạbikoń sạṅgiń giḍikakoa ar bạṛicʼ jiuko hõń sạṅgińkoa." 
Zechariah13:2  
Zechariah13:3 Enhõ jãhãe nạbi lekate kathako roṛ enḍekhan acʼren eṅgat-apat do unikin metaea, ‘am do gujukʼ hoyokʼtama, ente am do Probhu Isor ńutumte eṛe katham roṛeda.’ Ar nạbi lekate kathae roṛetʼkante uniren eṅgat-apat do unikin sobokʼ gojea." 
Zechariah13:4 “Enhilokʼ mimitʼ nạbiko do uniyakʼ dorson reaṅko lajao ocokʼa. Ekʼṛe nạbiko leka upʼ reakʼ kicricʼ uni do bae horoga. 
Zechariah13:5 Uni doe mena, ‘nạbi doń baṅkana, iń do mitʼṭen casa hoṛge; gidrạ tahen khonge iń do golam menteń ạkhriń ocoakana.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Ar jãhãege uniye kuliye, ‘amakʼ hoṛmore noako do cetʼ reakʼ dag kana?’ Uni doe roṛ ruạṛa, ‘ińren gatekoakʼ oṛakʼre oneń ghạllen onako reakʼ dag kangea noako do.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E tarwaṛe, am do ińren gukʼpiko upạrte, ińren sãoten hoṛko upạrte, ebhenokʼme. Gukʼpiyicʼ iń mageya, enḍekhan bhiḍiko doko chir chạturokʼa; ar iń do bhiḍi hoponko upạrte hõ tiyiń tula." 
Zechariah13:8 Goṭa disạm reakʼ pe hạṭiń reakʼ bar hạṭińren hoṛ doko gocʼ ocokʼa, menkhan iń Probhu Isorgeń meneda, ona modre pe hạṭiń do jiwetʼko tahena." 
Zechariah13:9 Niạ tesar hạṭińrenko do seṅgel talateń idikoa; rupạ cetʼlekako khạṭi ocoy onkage onko doń khạṭikoa ar sona cetʼlekako biḍạu aṭkar onkage onkoń biḍạu aṭkarkoa. Onko do ińko hohowạńạ ariń roṛ ruạṛakoa; ińiń metakoa, ‘noko do ińren hoṛ kanako,’ ar onkoko mena, ‘Probhu Isor do aleren Isor kanae.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Probhu Isorakʼ nonkan din hijukʼ kana oka hilokʼ Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ jinisko luṭokʼtakoa ar onko samaṅrege hạṭińokʼa. 
Zechariah14:2 Jerusalem upạrte lạṛhại lạgitʼ Probhu Isor do sanam jạtrenkoe jarwakoa. Nagraha dokholokʼa, oṛakʼ duạr luṭokʼa ar maejiukoakʼ kuạ̃ritetʼko nosṭoetakoa. Nagraharen adha hoṛ do bondikate eṭakʼ disạmteko idi ocokʼa menkhan sarecʼ hoṛ do nagrahareko tahena." 
Zechariah14:3 Ona tayom Probhu Isor doe oḍokokʼa ar lạṛhại jokhecʼ okae cekae onkage uni do jạtrenko upạrteye lạṛhạiya. 
Zechariah14:4 Enhilokʼ uni do hecʼkate Jerusalem purub secʼ reakʼ jạitun buru cetanreye teṅgona; onate jạitun buru do purub secʼ khon pạchim hạbicʼ paṛagokʼa ar adha do utạr secʼ ar adha do dạkhin secʼ ocogokʼte mitʼṭecʼ maraṅ buru nalage benaokʼa. 
Zechariah14:5 Ape do buru reakʼ ona buru nalatepe dạṛjoṅa, ente ona buru nala do Asel hạbicʼ calakʼa. Jihudạren raj Usiạwakʼ rajokʼ oktere dhạrti laṛaokʼ jokhecʼ cetʼ lekape dạṛletʼ onkagepe dạṛa. Ona tayom ińren Probhu Isor do uniren sanam sonotko soṅgeteye ạgukoa." 
Zechariah14:6 Enhilokʼ jãhãn marsalge baṅ tahena, siń cando ar ńindạ cando dokin ńutokʼa." 
Zechariah14:7 Enhilokʼ do eṭakʼ jãhãn dinko leka baṅ hoyokʼa, siń marsal hõ baṅ hoyokʼa, ńindạ hõ baṅ hoyokʼa; siń marsal reakʼ katha do eken Probhu Isorgeye baḍaea. Ar enhilokʼ ạyupʼ jokhecʼ hõ marsalge tahena." 
Zechariah14:8 Un jokhecʼ niron din ar rabaṅ dinre Jerusalem khon do heṛem dakʼ ạtu oḍokokʼte adha do purub jalapuri secʼ ar adha do pạchim jalapuri secʼ ạtu calakʼa. 
Zechariah14:9 Ar goṭa dhạrtiren raj do Probhu Isorgeye hoyokʼa. Enhilokʼ manwa do Probhuge Isor menteko aṅgocea, eken uniyakʼ ńutumgeko sewawakʼa." 
Zechariah14:10 Goṭa dhạrtige Araba reakʼ tapol ot leka hoyokʼa, Geba khon Jerusalem dạkhin secʼre menakʼ Rimon hạbicʼ, menkhan Jerusalem do usulrege tahena. Benjạmin reakʼ phaṭok duạr khon pạhilakʼ phaṭok duạr ar konac reakʼ phaṭok duạr hạbicʼ ar Hannanelakʼ usul pahra oṛakʼ khon rajakʼ darkha lelen ṭhạ̃i hạbicʼ goṭa nagraha do ṭhikge tahena." 
Zechariah14:11 Onḍe do hoṛko girobasokʼa; ar Jerusalem do tishõ jarkharokʼ leka sarapakʼ do baṅ hoyokʼa. Ona do khạtirjoma akae tahena. 
Zechariah14:12 Ar jãhãn jạtrenko Jerusalem upạrteko lạṛhại khan Probhu Isor do onko jạtrenko mahamạriteye ńẽtʼkoa. Onko do teṅgo akaeko tahenrege onkoakʼ hoṛmo reakʼ jel do seakʼtakoa ar onkoakʼ mẽtʼ do mẽtʼ ṭhuyạ̃kʼre tahenrege seakʼa ar alaṅ hõ mocarege seakʼtakoa. 
Zechariah14:13 Enhilokʼ Probhu Isor ṭhen khon maraṅ ḍamaḍolge onkore paṛaokʼa ar onko doko ńẽtʼ ocokʼa. Onko sanamkoge apan ạpin upạrte tiko epela. 
Zechariah14:14 Jihudạ hõ Jerusalem upạrteye lạṛhạiya. Aḍepase jạtrenkoakʼ dhon-durib, metakʼme ạḍi utạr sona, rupạ ar kiricʼ khạnḍwạkʼko jarwaea." 
Zechariah14:15 Inạ mitʼ lekan mahamarige onko sanam lạṛhại phạdkoakʼ ḍeraren sadomko, khaccorko, ũṭko, gadhako ar eṭakʼ sanam janwarkoe ńẽtʼkoa." 
Zechariah14:16 Tayomte onko sanam jạtren sarecʼ tahen hoṛ do uni rajakʼ, metakʼme phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sewae lạgitʼ ar chạuni porob manao lạgitʼ jao bochor Jerusalemteko rakapʼ hijukʼa." 
Zechariah14:17 Ar dhạrtiren jạt jạtrenko Jerusalemte phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ sewae lạgitʼ bako calakʼ enḍekhan onkoakʼ disạmre do dakʼ hõ bae daga. 
Zechariah14:18 Misorrenko hõ bako calakʼ khan ar dewa seware bako seledokʼ khan onkoakʼ disạmre hõ bae daga. Ar okoe jạtrenko chạuni porob manao lạgitʼ bako calakʼ Probhu Isor do onko cetanre oka mahamạriye paṛao ocoy Misorrenko cetanre hõ inạ mahamạrigeye paṛao ocoya. 
Zechariah14:19 Misor ar eṭakʼ jạtrenko okoe do ona chạuni porob palon lạgitʼ bako rakapʼ calakʼ onko hõ niạ sạjạigeko ńama. 
Zechariah14:20 Enhilokʼ “Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotokʼ ” niạ katha do sadomakʼ hoṭokʼ reakʼ ghạnṭi cetanre rokʼ akae tahena ar Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼ reakʼ isinakʼ reakʼ bhajanko do pinḍ samaṅ reakʼ bạṭiko leka sonotakʼ hoyokʼa. 
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem ar Jihudạ reakʼ mimitʼ isinakʼ reakʼ bhajanko do phạdkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotokʼa ar okoe do janwar samaṅokʼakʼ porob palon lạgitʼko rakapʼ hijukʼ onko do onako bhajan reakʼ khon hataokate onareko isina. Ar enhilokʼ phạdkoren Probhu Isorakʼ oṛakʼre do okoe hõ bako bạnij-bepara. 
Malachi1:1 Malaki hotete Israelko ṭhen Probhu Isorakʼ katha. 
Malachi1:2 Probhu Isore meneda, “Iń do apeń dulạṛ akatʼpea, ” Menkhan apepe meneda, “Am do oka lekam dulạṛketʼlea” Probhu Isor doe roṛ ruạṛakeda, “Esao do cetʼ Jakobren boeha bae tahẽkana? Enhõ Jakob iń dulạṛkedea menkhan Esao do bạń moneyadea. Ińge uniyakʼ burukoń jarkharketʼtaea ar uniyakʼ ṭhạ̃i do hahaṅkarren toyokoakʼ iń hoyoco akada.”" 
Malachi1:3  
Malachi1:4 Edom doe men boteja, “Alele chakachun akanre hõ jarkharakʼko do arhõle benao rakaba.” Menkhan phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Onkoko beretʼ daṛeakʼa menkhan iń do onań rạputʼ giḍikatakoa. Onko do ‘bedhorom’ reakʼ disạmko menocokʼa one onko jạtrenko do jao okte Probhu Isorakʼ edre latarre menakʼko." 
Malachi1:5 Ape do apeakʼ mẽtʼte onape ńela arpe roṛa, ‘Israelakʼ simạnako bahrere hõ Probhu Isor doe maraṅgea.’ ”" 
Malachi1:6 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Hopon do acʼren apattetʼ ar guti do arcʼren kisạ̃ṛe manotea. Apatiń hoyakan khan ińakʼ manot do okare? Ar kĩsạ̃ṛiń hoyakan khan ińakʼ manot do okor? E naekeko, apege ińpe nihạ̃t giḍi akadińạ. Arpe meneda, ‘cekate ale do amle nihạ̃tetʼmea?”" 
Malachi1:7 Ape do ińakʼ pinḍ cetanre besaphawakʼ jomakʼ dohokate ińpe nihạ̃t giḍi akadińạ. Menkhan apepe meneda, ‘onate do cetʼ besaphayicʼem hoyakana?’ Apege, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ ṭebil do hirkhạwakʼ lek kana mentepe menetʼ khan,’ apege coṅ iń ma besaphayicʼpe mitạń kan." 
Malachi1:8 Janwar samaṅokʼakʼ porob lạgitʼ ape do kãṛã janwarante tinrepe hijukʼkana unre ona do cetʼ apeakʼ behokakʼ do baṅkana? Ape do tinre leḍha ar ruạkʼkan janwarkote samaṅokʼakʼ porobpe porobokʼ kana, unre cetʼ ona do behokakʼ do baṅkana? Aperen disạm cakʼlaoko ṭhen onakope samaṅle khan uni do cetʼ apereye kusikokʼgea? Uni do cetʼ bae nihạ̃t giḍikepea? Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge apeń kuliyetʼpea.”" 
Malachi1:9 Ńitokʼ Isor ṭhen daya khojkate cetʼ lab? Apeakʼ tite nonkanakʼpe samaṅetʼ khan uni do cetʼ ape bae nihạ̃tpea? Ańjompe, phạdkoren Probhu Isor katha, uni okae menetʼ," 
Malachi1:10 “Hae! Ape modre mitʼ hoṛ hõ mundil oṛakʼ reakʼ duạre sińlere ar ińakʼ pinḍ cetanre ạuṛiyakʼ reakʼ seṅgel bape jeretʼ lekhan iń do ạḍiń kusikokʼa. Ape cetanre iń doń khĩs akana ar samaṅokʼakʼ reakʼ jinisko hõ apeakʼ tite bạń ataṅa. 
Malachi1:11 Purub khon pạchim hạbicʼ sanam jạtrenko talare ińakʼ ńutum do maraṅokʼa. Iń ńutumte sanam ṭhạ̃irege dhupko jeredokʼa ar samaṅokʼ lạgitʼ sapha jinisko ạgukʼa, ente sanam jạtrenko talare ińakʼ ńutum do maraṅokʼtińạ." 
Malachi1:12 Menkhan ape do ińakʼ ńutumpe bemanot akada, entepe meneda, ‘Probhu Isorakʼ ṭebil do baṅ saphaoa ar ona cetan reakʼ jomakʼko hõ bạṛicʼgea.’" 
Malachi1:13 Ape do noa hõpe meneda, ‘Noako do samani haronokʼakʼ kana!’ Ape do luṭ ocoakan, leḍha se ruạkʼkan janwarpe ạguiyetʼkoa ar samaṅokʼren porob ńutumtepe samaṅetʼkoa, menkhan cetʼ iń do apeakʼ ti khon onań ataṅ daṛekea? Iń Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Malachi1:14 Jãhãege palre menakʼkotae lek lekan janwarko khon emokʼ lạgitʼe manot akatʼ khan ar hoṛmore dusiyicʼ mitʼṭen janwar Probhu Isor ńutumteye samaṅakade khan, uni doe ṭhokgea. Uni cetanre do sarap paṛaokʼma. Iń kangeạń maraṅ raj do ar sanam jạtrenko do ińgeko botorạńạ. Ar iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Malachi2:1 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “E naekeko, ńitokʼ ape ṭhen noa sontor kathań koleda. Ińakʼ katha bape ańjom ar iń bape manotiń enḍekhan ape cetanre sarapiń paṛao ocoya ar apeakʼ sanam ạsirbad do sarapakʼ iń hoeocoya. Hẽ, iń do lahate hõń onkaleda, ente manotiń secʼ do bape moneyakʼ kana." 
Malachi2:2  
Malachi2:3 Ape khạtirte aperen bõskoń sạjạikoa; apeakʼ porobre samaṅokʼkan janwarkoakʼ mạilạ do apeakʼ mẽtʼãhãregeń thopramapea ar ona mạilạ sudhạ sạṅgińteń giḍikapea.” 
Malachi2:4 Phạdkoren Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Baḍaekakʼpe, iń do ape ṭhen noa sontor kathań kol akada jemon Liwi bõsrenko lạgitʼ iń bạisạu akatʼ bondobos do tahẽakange tahen." 
Malachi2:5 Onko lạgitʼ oka bondobosiń doholetʼ ona do jion ar bhạlại reakʼ bondobos kana. Noa bondobosge onkoń ematʼko tahẽkana. Ona chaḍa noa do botoranakʼ bondobos hõ kana, jemon ińko botorạń; ar sạrige onko do ińko botorạńkan tahẽkana." 
Malachi2:6 Onkoakʼ mocare sạriyakʼ reakʼ cecetʼakʼge tahẽkana ar onare jãhãn eṛeteakʼ do baṅ tahẽkana. Sạriyakʼ ar dhoromte onko do iń sãoteko dãṛãnkan tahẽkana ar ḍherkoge kại khonko ruạṛ ạguiyetʼko tahẽkana. 
Malachi2:7 Isorakʼ monsubạ babotre cecetʼakʼ emokʼ do naekekoakʼ lek kana, menkhan ona cecetʼakʼ jemon alo adokʼ. Ona chaḍa Isorakʼ katha baḍae lạgitʼ do naekeko ṭhenge calakʼ jạruṛa, ente onko do phạdkoren Probhu Isorren paṭhaona hoṛ kanako." 
Malachi2:8 Menkhan ape do ṭhik hor khonpe ghańgeṛ akana ar apeakʼ cecetʼakʼte ḍher hoṛpe tohotʼ bhinḍạṛ ocoyetʼkoa. Nonkate Liwi bõsrenko lạgitʼ dohowakʼ bondobospe bad giḍikakʼ kana. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda. 
Malachi2:9 Ape do ińakʼ horte bape senlena bickom ạn-ạriko babotre hoṛko sãote ape hõ mẽtʼãhãpe beṅgetʼakʼ kan tahẽkana. Ona iạte sanam hoṛko samaṅre nihạ̃t ocokʼ ar bemanot ocokʼkoń hoyoco akatʼpea.” 
Malachi2:10 Abo sanamkoren baba do cetʼ uni mitʼ babageye baṅkana? Mitʼṭen Isorge cetʼ abo do bae sirjạu akatʼbona? Enḍekhan cedakʼ mitʼ hoṛ do armitʼ hoṛ sãote bin pạtiạr bon hoyokʼkante aboren hapṛamko lạgitʼ doho akan bondobos bon bemanotetʼ kana? 
Malachi2:11 Jihudạ doe phạsiạragea. Israel ar Jerusalemre do bạṛicʼakʼ kạmiko hoyakana. Jihudạren hoṛ do boṅgan hoṛkoren hoponerako baplaletʼko iạte Probhu Isore dulạṛetʼko hoṛko besapha ocoakatʼkoa. 
Malachi2:12 Okoe nonkako kạmikan onko do phạdkoren Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko ạguiyre hõ enhõ Probhu Isor do Jakob bõsrenko hotete onko sanamkoe marao giḍikoa. 
Malachi2:13 Ar mitʼṭecʼ bạṛicʼ kạmipe kạmikana; apeakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼte ape do Probhu Isorakʼ pinḍpe lohotʼetʼtaea. Ape dope rakʼeda arpe homor halaṅeda, ar okape emokʼkan uni do ona ar bae moneyakʼkana ar kusi monte apeakʼ ti khon ataṅ hõ bae ataṅeda." 
Malachi2:14 Arpe meneda, “Cetʼ iạte bae ataṅeda? Ona reakʼ karon do hoyokʼkana, Probhu Isor do aperen mimitʼ hoṛko ar onkoren juạn okteren bạhukoakʼ bapla reakʼ gohae hoylena; menkhan onkoren bạhu do onkoren sãoten hoṛkanako, onkoren bapla bondobosren bạhukanako, enhõ onko do uni tulucʼ phạsiarako hoyakana." 
Malachi2:15 Probhu Isor do jãwãe ar maejiu cetʼ bae mitʼ akatʼkinạ? Hoṛmo ar jiu do uniren kangea kin. Unkin do cekate kin mitʼgea? Ente uni do unkin hotete Isore botorae kan mitʼ bõsrenko rukhiyạkoe menleda. Ar onate ape do apeakʼ ontor babotre sontor akae tahenpe; jemon juạn okteren bạhuko sãote phạsiạrako alope hoyokʼ. 
Malachi2:16 Israelren Probhu Isore meneda, “Bạhu bạgiye doń hirkhạwakʼ kana.” Ona chaḍa phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Kicricʼe horokʼetʼ leka okoe do sasantaoakʼte apnare sajaokʼkan uniyakʼ kạmi doń hirkhạwakʼ kana. Onate ape do apeakʼ ontor babotre sontor akae tahenpe, ar phạsiạrako do alope hoyokʼa.”" 
Malachi2:17 Ape do apeakʼ katha hotete Probhu Isorpe laṅga ocoyede kana. Enhõpe meneda, “Cekate ale do unile laṅga ocoakadea?” Ape dope nonkayeda, arpe meneda, “Okoeko behoketʼkan onko sanamkoge Probhu Isorakʼ mẽtʼreko bhagegea ar uni hõ onko cetanreye kusigea,” Sepe meneda, “Okare menaea uni Isor do one uni dhorom reakʼe bicạretʼkan?”" 
Malachi3:1 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelpe, ińren goḍetiń kolekana; uni do iń lahate senkate hore teara. Ona tayom okoe Probhu Isor lạgitʼ koyokʼ hor akae menakʼpe uni do ackage uniyakʼ oṛakʼteye hijukʼa; bondobos kạmi pukʼrạuicʼ uni goḍetge, one okoepe koyokʼ hore kan uni doe hijukʼkana.”" 
Malachi3:2 Menkhan uniyakʼ hijukʼ din do okoehõ bako sahao daṛeakʼa; uniye sodorlenre celege bako teṅgo ṭarhao daṛeakʼa; ente uni do rupạ biḍạu aṭkaricʼ seṅgelgeye hoyokʼa ar dhubiyakʼ sạbun leka hõ. 
Malachi3:3 Rupạ gakʼlaoicʼ hoṛ leka uni doe hijukʼa. Uni do Liwikoe saphakoa ar sona-rupạ lekae khạṭikoa. Ona tayom onko do dhorom reakʼ monte Probhu Isor ńutumte samaṅokʼakʼ porobko porobokʼa. 
Malachi3:4 Unre sedaeakʼ din leka, mareakʼ dinko leka Jihudạ ar Jerusalemren hoṛkoakʼ samaṅokʼakʼ jinisko do Probhu Isore kusi ocoyea." 
Malachi3:5 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Unre bicạrme lạgitʼ iń do am ṭheniń hijukʼa; ar unre jạdu udukʼko, kusumbiko, eṛe goha emokʼko ar okoe do din ṭakʼlaokoe ṭhokayetʼko, okoe do rạnḍi maejiu ar ṭũạr amarkoe santaoetʼko ar bidisiạko hok reakʼ bae bicạretʼtako kan, metakʼme okoe iń bako botorạń onko sanamko upạrte goha emokʼ do bạń biloma." 
Malachi3:6 “Iń kangeạń Probhu Isor do, ińakʼ jãhãn mon bodol do bạnukʼtińạ. Ona iạte E Jakob bõsrenko, ape do bape marao ocokʼa." 
Malachi3:7 Aperen hapṛamko okte khonge ape do ińakʼ sanam ạn-ạri khonpe ocokʼakana ar palon hõ bape palon akada. Iń ṭhen ruạṛ hijukʼpe, ar ińhõ ape ṭheniń ruạṛ hijukʼa. Menkhan apepe meneda, ‘ale do cekatele ruạṛ hijukʼa?’" 
Malachi3:8 Manwa do cetʼ Isore ṭhoka daṛekea? Menkhan ape do ińgepe ṭhoka edińkana. Enhõpe meneda, ‘ale do cekatele ṭhokayetʼmea?’ Gelakʼ hĩs ar dan babotre ape do ińpe ṭhokayediń kana." 
Malachi3:9 Ape do saraprege menakʼpea, enhõ aperen goṭa jạtrenko do ińko ṭhokayediń kana." 
Malachi3:10 Apeakʼ jotowakʼ reakʼ gelakʼ hĩs do ińakʼ murạite ạguiype jemon ińakʼ oṛakʼ do jomakʼte perecʼ tahen. Noa babotre biḍạu aṭkarińpe, ente iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge serma reakʼ joto duạrkoń jhija ar jạruṛape khon hõ bạ̃ṛti bhor iń dul apea." 
Malachi3:11 Iń do jojom ukʼjạṛkan tejokoń tạkicʼ daramkoa jemon apeakʼ phosol aloko jomtape; ona chaḍa apeakʼ ot baṛge reakʼ darkha jo hõ baṅ jhurokʼtapea. 
Malachi3:12 Unre sanam jạtren hoṛ do bhạganko metapea, ente apeakʼ disạm do hulạste perejokʼa. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda.”" 
Malachi3:13 Probhu Isor do arhõe meneda, “Ape do iń upạrte keṭecʼ keṭecʼ kathape roṛeda, menkhan apepe meneda, ‘am upạrte do cetʼle menakada?’" 
Malachi3:14 Apepe meneda, ‘Isor sarhaoe do ạuṛiyakʼgea. Uniyakʼ ạn-ạri lekate kạmi ar homor halaṅ baṛakate phạdkoren Probhu Isor samaṅre dãṛãbaṛae do cetʼ aboakʼ jãhãn lab hoyena?" 
Malachi3:15 Ńitokʼ ale do bạḍạikan hoṛge bhạganle metako kana; hẽ, sasantaoko doko benao idikʼkana; onko do Isorko biḍạu aṭkar edekanre hõ rukhiyạko ńameda.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Unre okoe do Probhu Isorko botorae kan tahẽkan onko do ako akore kathako roṛana ar Probhu Isor do onae moneyada. Okoe Probhu Isorko botorae kan tahẽkan ar uni babotre khạndri reakʼko hudisetʼkan tahẽkan onko disạko lạgitʼ onko samaṅre mitʼṭecʼ puthi do olena. 
Malachi3:17 Onko babotre phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ińakʼ niṭ akatʼ dinre onko do ińren sompottiko hoyokʼa; onko do ińrengeko hoyokʼa. Mitʼṭen hoṛ cetʼleka acʼren sapʼsosoricʼ hopone mãyãwaekante sạjại khone sahaṛede onkage onko hõń sahaṛkoa." 
Malachi3:18 Unre ape do dhorom ar dusṭạmiko talare, metakʼme okoe ińe sewawạń ar okoe bae sewawạń onko talare cetʼlekań begar dohoy onape ńela.”" 
Malachi4:1 Phạdkoren Probhu Isore meneda, “Ńelme, ona din hijukʼkana, ona do culhạ reakʼ seṅgel leka jolokʼa. Enhilokʼ sanam bạḍại hoṛko ar sasantaoko do lanḍha busupʼ lekako hoyokʼa arko lo torojokʼa. Mitʼṭecʼ rehetʼ se mitʼṭecʼ ḍạr hõ sarecʼ do baṅ tahena." 
Malachi4:2 Menkhan ape okoe do ińpe botorạń kan ape cetanre iń do dhoromren siń candoń rakapʼ ocoyea uniyakʼ marsalre do phạphạriạwakʼge tahena. Ar ape do goṛa khon oḍok ạgukede mĩhũ lekape piḍgạu baṛaea. 
Malachi4:3 Ona tayom do dusṭạmikope lebetʼ gańjaokoa, ente oka hilokʼ onakoń kạmiya enhilokʼ onko do apeakʼ jaṅga latarre ńur akan torocʼ baraggeń hoyocokoa. Iń phạdkoren Probhu Isorge noa katha doń meneda." 
Malachi4:4 “Ape do ińren guti Moseyakʼ ạn-ạri reakʼ katha, metakʼme Horeb burure sanam Israelko lạgitʼ okaṭakʼ ạn-ạriń emade tahẽkan ona disạipe." 
Malachi4:5 “Ńelpe, Probhu Isorakʼ ona maraṅ ar botoranakʼ din ạuri hijukʼrege iń Probhu Isor do ape ṭhen Eliạ nạbiń kolea." 
Malachi4:6 Uni do apatkoakʼ ontor akoren hoponko ar hoponerako secʼ ar hopon ar hoponerakoakʼ ontor do apatko secʼe ạcur ruạṛtakoa, ar hecʼkate sarap iạte disạm jemon aloń jarkhar.”" 
Matthew1:10 Hiskiạ do Manase jonome emadea; Manase do Amos jonome emadea; Amos do Josiạ jonome emadea; 
Matthew24:15 “Daniel nạbi hotete ujạṛ reakʼ hirkhạwakʼ reaṅ oka roṛ akan ona sonot jaegare teṅgo akanpe ńellere (okoeye paṛhaoetʼkan uni doe bujhạuma)," 
Luke3:25 Joseph do Matathiạren hopon, Matathiạ do Amosren hopon, Amos do Nạhumren hopon, Nạhum do Esliren hopon, Esli do Nạggạiren hopon;" 
Acts2:16 Noa do ona ghoṭna leka, one okoeyakʼ katha Joel nạbi hotete roṛlen," 
Romans9:25 Ente Hosea nạbi puthire Isore menakada, “Okoe ińrenko baṅkan, onkoge ińren hoṛ menteń hohowakoa. Ar okoe bạń dulạṛakade, uni do dulạṛiạ menteń hohoaea." 
James5:11 Okoe sombhurikateko sahao akatʼ onko do bhạgankole metakokana. Ape do Jobe sumbrạuletʼ reakʼ kathape ańjomakada ar Probhu Isorakʼ kạmi reakʼ mucạtʼ jo do bhagegea mente ona hõpe ńelakada. Probhu Isorakʼ daya ar mãyã reakʼ mucạtʼtetʼ do bạnukʼa.
